Genesis1:1 Sha hiihii Aôndo gba Sha man tar: 
Genesis1:2 Tar yô, gba lun dang, gbilin tsô; ime lu sha zegemnger man Jijingi u Aôndo gba karen sha kwavmnger." 
Genesis1:3 Tsô Aôndo kaa er: Iwanger i̱ lu; maa iwanger lu je. 
Genesis1:4 Aôndo nenge iwanger, er i doo yô; nahan Aôndo pav iwanger a ime." 
Genesis1:5 Tsô Aôndo yila iwanger er atetan, man ime yô, A yila er tugh. Nahan hingir iyange i been man pepe, ka iyange i hiihii je la." 
Genesis1:6 Aôndo shi kaa er: Kwavaôndo u̱ lu hen atô u mnger, u̱ pav mngerem a mngerem." 
Genesis1:7 Nahan Aôndo er kwavaôndo, A pav mngerem ma shin kwavaôndo a mngerem ma sha kwavaôndo la; maa lu di nahan je." 
Genesis1:8 Tsô Aôndo yila kwavaôndo er Sha. Nahan hingir iyange i been man pepe, ka iyange i sha uhar je la." 
Genesis1:9 Aôndo shi kaa er: Mngerem ma shin kwavaôndo ma̱ kohol ijiir i môm, tareghnyaagh u̱ due; maa lu di nahan je." 
Genesis1:10 Tsô Aôndo yila tareghnyaagh er tar; man mngerem ma ma kohol mara yô, A yila ma er zegemnger. Aôndo nenge er i doo nahan yô." 
Genesis1:11 Aôndo shi kaa er: Tar u̱ mende toho, imendenev mbi wan isham man ikon i umen atam sha anza a i kposo kposo, a lun a ake kimi, sha tar; maa lu di nahan je." 
Genesis1:12 Tsô toho mende sha tar, imendenev mbi wan isham sha anza a mbi; man ikon i umen atam a lun a ake kimi sha anza a i. Aôndo nenge er i doo nahan yô." 
Genesis1:13 Nahan hingir iyange i been man pepe, ka iyange i sha utar je la." 
Genesis1:14 Aôndo shi kaa er: Akaa a nan iwanger a̱ lu sha kwavaôndo Sha, sha er a̱ pav atetan a tugh yô; a̱ lu sha ci u akav man ashighe man ayange kua anyom;" 
Genesis1:15 Shi a̱ lu akaa a nan iwanger sha kwavaôndo Sha, er a̱ taan iwanger sha tar yô; maa lu di nahan je." 
Genesis1:16 Tsô Aôndo er akaavesen a nan iwanger ahar, u hemban la sha u a̱ lu a tahav atetan, u kiriki la yô, a̱ lu a tahav tugh; kua asan kpaa." 
Genesis1:17 Tsô Aôndo ver a sha kwavaôndo Sha, er a̱ taan iwanger sha tar," 
Genesis1:18 A̱ lu a tahav atetan man tugh, shi a̱ pav iwanger a ime kpaa. Aôndo nenge er i doo nahan yô." 
Genesis1:19 Nahan hingir iyange i been man pepe, ka iyange i sha unyiin je la." 
Genesis1:20 Aôndo shi kaa er: Mngerem ma̱ mgbough a akaauma a zenden shimi, inyon kpaa i̱ purugh sha tar, sha kwavaôndo Sha." 
Genesis1:21 Aôndo gba uzegembainyamev mba shin zegemnger man hanma kwagh u uma u zenden, u mngerem ma mgbough a mi sha anza a ve yô, man shi hanma inyon i purugh, sha inja i i. Aôndo nenge er i doo nahan yô." 
Genesis1:22 Shi Aôndo ver ve doo doo kaa er: Mar nen kpishi, ngee nen, iv nen shin mngerem ma uzegembamngerev; inyon kpaa i̱ seer a seer ngeen sha tar." 
Genesis1:23 Nahan hingir iyange i been man pepe, ka iyange i sha utaan je la." 
Genesis1:24 Aôndo shi kaa er: Tar u̱ due a akaauma sha inja i a, uzendenya man akaa a a kper a kpela inya man inyamtoho i sha tar, sha anza a ve; maa lu di nahan je." 
Genesis1:25 Aôndo er inyamtoho i sha tar sha anza a i, man uzendenya di kpaa sha anza a ve, man hanma kwagh u a kper a kpela inya sha inja na. Aôndo nenge er i doo nahan yô." 
Genesis1:26 Tsô Aôndo kaa er: Sé er or sha inja i mlu wase, sha ibeen Yase; ishu i shin zegemnger man inyon i sha man uzendenya man tar cii kua hanma kwagh u kpelan inya, u a kper a kpela sha tar kpaa, ve̱ lu sha ikev ve." 
Genesis1:27 Nahan Aôndo gba or sha inja i mlu Na, lu sha inja i mlu u Aôndo je A gba nan ye; lu nomsoor man kwase A gba ve ye." 
Genesis1:28 Aôndo ver ve doo doo; Aôndo kaa a ve er: Mar nen kpishi, seer nen ngeen, iv nen tar, gema nen u, u̱ lu sha ikev yen; ishu i shin zegemnger man inyom i purugh sha kwavaôndo man hanma kwagh u uma u a zenden sha tar cii, ve̱ lu sha ikev yen." 
Genesis1:29 Aôndo shi kaa er: Nenge, M na ne hanma imendenegh ki wan isham, ki ki lu sha tar cii, man hanma kon u ityamegh ki lu sha u, ki lun a ake kimi, a̱ hingir kwaghyan wen." 
Genesis1:30 Man shi hanma inyam i sha tar, man hanma inyon i sha, man hanma kwagh u akper a kpela inya u a lu uma yô, M na ve hanma ihuugh, ki̱ lu kwaghyan ve; maa lu di nahan je." 
Genesis1:31 Tsô Aôndo gema nenge hanma kwagh u Un er yô, lu u doon tsung. Nahan hingir iyange i been man pepe, ka iyange i sha ataratar je la." 
Genesis2:1 Nahan i kure u gban Sha man tar, kua akum a ve cii:" 
Genesis2:2 Sha iyange i sha utaankaruhar la, Aôndo kure tom Na u A er yô; sha iyange i sha utaankaruhar la, A mem tom Na u A er cii yô:" 
Genesis2:3 Man Aôndo ver iyange i sha utaankaruhar la doo doo, A tsegha i kpaa; sha ci u lu sha i man Aôndo mem tom Na cii, u A er sha u gban a gba u la ye." 
Genesis2:4 Akaa angan ka mhii u akaa a Sha man a tar zum u i gba a je la. Sha iyange i TER Aôndo er Sha man tar la yô," 
Genesis2:5 ma imendenegh ki ken toho lu a lu sha won ga, ma ihuugh kpaa lu a mende ga, gadia TER Aôndo lu a na ura u nôô sha tar ga, or u kahan sule kpaa lu a lu ga," 
Genesis2:6 saa di irkpiigh tsô, lu gban, ndôhôr tar cii ye." 
Genesis2:7 TER Aôndo maa or sha vuulevu u inyaagh, fehe nan iôôn i uma ken ahenga, or la maa hingir or u uma:" 
Genesis2:8 TER Aôndo er sule ken Eden vegher u sha ityoughkitaregh, ver or u A er la keregh." 
Genesis2:9 TER Aôndo er hanma kon u doon u nengen man shi u doon u yan, u mende hen inya; man kon u uma kpaa lu her atô sule, kua kon u mfe u fan kwagh u dedoo man kwagh u bo." 
Genesis2:10 Ifi kpaa due ken Eden sha u ndôhôr sule la, ka haala a pav a ta agbaa a anyiin ye." 
Genesis2:11 Iti i u hiihii la er Pishon; ka un je man a ningir a wa tar u Havila atô, ape zenaria a lu la ye." 
Genesis2:12 Zenaria u tar la ka u doon, man iniôndo i balsem man iwen i oniki kpaa mba ker je." 
Genesis2:13 Iti i ifi u sha uhar la er Gihon; ka un man a ningir tar u Kushi cii a we u atô la. 
Genesis2:14 Iti i ifi u sha utar la er Hidekel; ka un a tera sha ishigh ki tar u Ashiria ye. Ifi u sha unyiin la ka Uferati. 
Genesis2:15 Tsô TER Aôndo tôô or la ver un ken sule u Eden, sha u a̱ sôron u man a̱ kuran u kpaa." 
Genesis2:16 TER Aôndo wa or kwagh kaa er: Hanma kon u ken sule ne, gbaa yan u tsô," 
Genesis2:17 kpa kon u mfe u fan kwagh u dedoo man kwagh u bo la, de ye u ga, gadia iyange i ú ya u la, ú kpe je." 
Genesis2:18 TER Aôndo gema kaa er: Doo u or nana lu tswen ga; yô, Me er nan orwasen u lun er nan nahan." 
Genesis2:19 Ka inya, TER Aôndo er hanma inyamtoho man hanma inyon i sha a mi ye. Tsô A va a mi hen or la er Una nenge er nana yila ve yô; hanma myer u or la a yila hanma kwagh u uma yô, maa hingir iti na je." 
Genesis2:20 Or la ii uzendenya cii ati kua inyon i sha man inyamtoho kpaa cii; kpa or la yô, zua a or u wasen un, u lun er un nahan ga." 
Genesis2:21 Tsô TER Aôndo haa or la mnyam tsung, a hungul mnyam; A dugh hwan na môm, A hide a inyam A kondo ijiir la." 
Genesis2:22 Nahan TER Aôndo gema hwan u A tsuwa hen or la, maa kwase a mi, va a mi hen or la." 
Genesis2:23 Or la kaa er: Ngun yô, ka kuhe u ikuhe yam, ka inyam i inyam yam je; nahan a yila un er kwase, sha ci u i dugh un ken nomsoor yô." 
Genesis2:24 Ka sha ci u nahan man or ka nan undu ter u nan kua ngô u nan, nan var ken kwase u nan, ve hingir iyôgh i môm ye:" 
Genesis2:25 Ve uhar cii ve lu idyelegh, or la vea kwase na, kunya kôr ve ga." 
Genesis3:1 Iyô yô, i hemba inyamtoho i TER Aôndo er la cii atseregh. I kaa a kwase la er: Ka mimi je, Aôndo kaa er, né de ye atam a ma kon u ken sule ne gaa?" 
Genesis3:2 Tsô kwase la gema kaa a iyô la er: Atam a ikon i ken sule ne yô, i rumun er se̱ ya," 
Genesis3:3 kpa atam a kon u u lu hen atô sule la yô, Aôndo kaa er: De ye nen ga, ave tsô kpaa, de benden nen sha min ga, sha er né kpe ga yô." 
Genesis3:4 Tsô iyô kaa a kwase la er: Né kpe je ga; 
Genesis3:5 gadia Aôndo fa iyange i né ya a la, iyange la ashe aa bugh ne, né hingir er Aôndo nahan, né gba fan kwagh u dedoo man kwagh u bo." 
Genesis3:6 Tsô zum u kwase la nenge er kon la u doo u yan, man shi er u doo ashe kpaa, man u lu kwagh u saren sha u nan or kwaghfan yô, a zôr atam a u, a ya, shi a na nom na, u lu vea na la, un kpaa ya je." 
Genesis3:7 Tsô ve uhar cii ashe a ve bugh, ve kav er ve lu idyelegh yô, nahan ve kor ika i tur, hingir ve akondo a zeren." 
Genesis3:8 Tsô ve ungwa iov i TER Aôndo, er lu zenden ken sule shighe u kundun iyol u aikighe la. Or la vea kwase na maa ve cia TER Aôndo, ve yer ken ikon i ken sule la." 
Genesis3:9 Tsô TER Aôndo yila or la, pine un er: U ngu hana?" 
Genesis3:10 Un gema kaa er: M ungwa iov You ken sule, nahan cier mo iyol, sha ci u m lu idyelegh yô; maa m yer." 
Genesis3:11 A pine un er: Ka an nan kaa u er u ngu idyeleghee? U ya kon u yan M ta icin Mer, de ye ga la, zee?" 
Genesis3:12 Or la gema kaa er: Kwase u U nem Wer a lu a mo imôngo la, ka un a nem atam a kon la, m ye ye." 
Genesis3:13 Tsô TER Aôndo kaa a kwase la er: Ka nyi kwagh u er nee? Kwase la kaa er: Ka iyô, i tsughum, ve m ye ye." 
Genesis3:14 TER Aôndo kaa a iyô er: Er u er nahan yô, u ngu a ifan iyol ken uzendenya cii man inyamtoho cii; ú kpelan a kpela iyav inya, man ú yaan inya gbem sha ayange a ou cii." 
Genesis3:15 Me ver ihom hen atô wou vea kwase man hen atô u vor wou a vor na kpaa, u ua cagh u ityough, we di kpaa ú cagh u ikishinguhar" 
Genesis3:16 Shi A kaa a kwase la er: Me seer we ican tsung sha iyav mbu wan ou, ú maren sha ican je; isharen you ia lu sha nomu, ú lu sha ikev na." 
Genesis3:17 Shi A kaa a or la er: Er u ongo imo i kwase wou, u ye atam a kon u iyange M ta u icin Mer, de ye ga la yô, tar u̱ lu a ifan iyol sha ci wou, ka sha ican je man ú ya u, sha ayange a ou cii ye," 
Genesis3:18 usaa man usagher vea mende u sha mi; ú yaan akaamenden a ken toho; 
Genesis3:19 ka sha iusa i sha ishigh you man ú ya kwaghyan ye, zan zan ú hide hen inya, gadia ka i, i tee, i er u min ye, gadia u ngu vuulevu, nahan ú shi ú hide ú hingir vuulevu." 
Genesis3:20 Or la gema ii kwase na iti er Ifa, sha ci u un a lu ngô u uuma cii yô." 
Genesis3:21 TER Aôndo er or la vea kwase na, uriga mba akôvough, haa ve." 
Genesis3:22 Man TER Aôndo kaa er: Nenge, or hingir er mô Wase nahan, sha u fan kwagh u dedoo man kwagh u bo; hegen yô, a̱ de naregh uwegh a̱ tôôn ityamegh ki kon u uma ne a̱ yaan, a̱ tsôron ga." 
Genesis3:23 Tsô TER Aôndo dugh un ken sule u Eden kera, er a̱ kahan inya i i tee, i er un min la." 
Genesis3:24 Nahan A zenda or la kera, A gema A ver ucerubi hen sule u Eden vegher u sha ityoughkitaregh la, kua sanker u usu u jingir, sha u kuran gbenda u kon u uma la." 
Genesis4:1 Or la tsa a kwase na Ifa, maa a wa iyav, a mar Kain, a kaa er: M zua a nomsoor sha iwasen i TER." 
Genesis4:2 Man shi a mar idyondon na Abel. Abel lu orkuranilev, kpa Kain yô, gema lu or u kahan sule." 
Genesis4:3 Ayange nga tse yô, Kain tôô iyiav mbi ken sule va na TER nagh a mi." 
Genesis4:4 Abel kpaa pande ônov mba tsutswav mba ilev nav, va na ahôm a ve. TER rumun Abel kua nagh nagh." 
Genesis4:5 Kpa Kain man nagh nagh yô, A rumun ga. Nahan ishima vihi Kain tsung, a kera saan ishigh sha ga." 
Genesis4:6 Nahan TER kaa a Kain er: Ka nyi ishima i vihi we, man ka nyi u saan ishigh sha ga?" 
Genesis4:7 Aluer wea er sha mi yô, ma u saan ki sha gaa? Man aluer wea er sha mi ga yô, nenge, isholibo kegh sha hunda je; ka sha a we je isharen i i, i lu ye, kpa ka we man ú hemba i ye." 
Genesis4:8 Tsô Kain ôr kwagh a anngô na Abel; man er ve lu ken toho yô, Kain mough num a idyondon na Abel, wua un je." 
Genesis4:9 Nahan TER pine Kain er: Anngôu Abel, ngu hana? A kaa er: M fa ga, m kor anngômô?" 
Genesis4:10 Tsô A kaa er: U er nana? Awambe a anngôu nga genger imo hen inya, yilan Mo." 
Genesis4:11 Hegen yô, ú lu a ifan iyol hen inya i i aver zwa sha u ngohol awambe a anngôu sha uwegh ough ne;" 
Genesis4:12 aluer ú kaha sule kpaa, inya ia kera doo iyiagh ga; ú hingir or u yevese man or u zenden a zende sha won." 
Genesis4:13 Tsô Kain kaa a TER er: Mtsaha wam ne gandem. 
Genesis4:14 Nenge ase, nyian U zendam sha tar kera; me gema me lu U myer, or u yevese man or u zenden a zende sha won. Nahan yô, hanma or u nana kohol mo nana wuam je." 
Genesis4:15 Tsô TER kaa a na er: Nahan yô, hanma or u nana wua Kain, á or iyev sha a nan kwa taankaruhar. Shi TER ver Kain ikav, sha u or nana zua a na kpaa, nana̱ de woo un ga yô." 
Genesis4:16 Nahan Kain kar sha ishigh ki TER kera, za tema ken tar u Noda u u lu Eden vegher u sha ityoughkitaregh la." 
Genesis4:17 Tsô Kain tsa a kwase na, maa a wa iyav mar Heno; nahan a maa gar, a ii gar la iti sha iti i wan na, Heno." 
Genesis4:18 Heno mar Irada; Irada mar Mehuyael; Mehuyael mar Metushael; Metushael mar Lameki. 
Genesis4:19 Lameki er kasev uhar, u môm iti na er Ada, ugen iti na er Shila." 
Genesis4:20 Ada mar Yabal; ka un man lu ter u mba ve tem ken utenti ve lun a ilev la ye. 
Genesis4:21 Iti i anngô na er Yubal; ka un man lu ter u mba ve koho mbaadiguve ve tenge amar la ye. 
Genesis4:22 Shila mar Tubal-kain, orvaren-iwa i iyôv mbi bashiv kua mbi iliv kpaa; man anngô u Tubal-kain u kwase yô, iti na er Naama." 
Genesis4:23 Lameki gema kaa a kasev nav er: We Ada vea Shila, ungwa nen imo yam; ne kasev mba Lameki ver nen ato sha kwaghôron wam: M wua or sha ci u nan gberem ivav, ka wanyekwaor je, sha ci u iyol i nan vihim yô." 
Genesis4:24 Aluer á or iyev i Kain kwa taankaruhar yô, i Lameki yô, á lu kwa akunduatargber kar utaankaruhar." 
Genesis4:25 Adam shi tsa a kwase na, nahan a mar wannomso; a ii un iti er Setu, gadia a kaa er: Aôndo verem vor ugen sha ityough ki Abel, gadia Kain wua un." 
Genesis4:26 Setu kpaa gema mar wan, ii un iti er Enoshi. Ka sha ayange la je man i hii u yilan sha iti i TER ye." 
Genesis5:1 Ngun ka ruamabera u tsombor u Adam ne: Iyange i Aôndo gba or yô, ka sha mlu u ibeen i Aôndo A gba nan ye;" 
Genesis5:2 lu nomsoor man kwase A gba ve ye, A ver ve doo doo, A ii ve iti er Or, sha iyange i i gba ve la je." 
Genesis5:3 Adam lu anyom deri môm man ikundugber man a mar wan sha ibeen na man sha mluyol na ye; a ii un iti er Setu. 
Genesis5:4 Ayange a Adam tsa sha won er a mar Setu kera la, lu anyom deri anigheni; a shi a mar ônov mba nomso man mba kasev." 
Genesis5:5 Ayange a Adam sha won cii yô, lu anyom deri utaankarunyiin man ikundugber, man a kpe ye." 
Genesis5:6 Setu lu anyom deri môm kar ataan man a mar Enoshi ye. 
Genesis5:7 Mar Enoshi kera yô, Setu shi seer tsan anyom deri anigheni kar ataankarahar; a shi a mar ônov mba nomso man mba kasev." 
Genesis5:8 Ayange a Setu sha won cii yô, lu anyom deri utaankarunyiin man pue kar ahar, man a kpe ye." 
Genesis5:9 Enoshi lu anyom akunduanyiingber man a mar Kenan ye. 
Genesis5:10 Mar Kenan kera yô, Enoshi shi tsa anyom deri anigheni man pue kar ataan; a shi a mar ônov mba nomso man mba kasev." 
Genesis5:11 Ayange a Enoshi sha won cii yô, lu anyom deri utaankarunyiin man ataan, man a kpe ye." 
Genesis5:12 Kenan lu anyom akunduatargber man a mar Mahalalel ye. 
Genesis5:13 Mar Mahalalel kera yô, Kenan shi tsa anyom deri anigheni man akunduahar; a shi a mar ônov mba nomso man mba kasev." 
Genesis5:14 Ayange a Kenan sha won cii yô, lu anyom deri utaankarunyiin man pue, man a kpe ye." 
Genesis5:15 Mahalalel lu anyom akunduatar kar ataan man a mar Yaredi ye. 
Genesis5:16 Mar Yaredi kera yô, Mahalalel tsa anyom deri anigheni man ikundugber; a shi a mar ônov mba nomso man mba kasev." 
Genesis5:17 Ayange a Mahalalel sha won cii yô, lu anyom deri anigheni man akunduanyiingber kar ataan, man a kpe ye." 
Genesis5:18 Yaredi lu anyom deri môm man akunduatar kar ahar man a mar Enoki ye. 
Genesis5:19 Mar Enoki kera yô, Yaredi shi tsa anyom deri anigheni; a shi a mar ônov mba nomso man mba kasev." 
Genesis5:20 Ayange a Yaredi sha won cii yô, lu anyom deri utaankarunyiin man akunduatar kar ahar, man a kpe ye." 
Genesis5:21 Enoki lu anyom akunduatar kar ataan man a mar Metusela ye. 
Genesis5:22 Mar Metusela kera yô, Enoki gba zenden vea Aôndo imôngo anyom deri utar; a shi a mar ônov mba nomso man mba kasev." 
Genesis5:23 Ayange a Enoki sha won cii yô, lu anyom deri utar man akunduatar kar ataan." 
Genesis5:24 Enoki gba zenden vea Aôndo, kpa va kera lu ga, gadia Aôndo yem a na." 
Genesis5:25 Metusela lu anyom deri man akunduanyiin kar ataankarahar man a mar Lameki ye. 
Genesis5:26 Mar Lameki kera yô, Metusela shi tsa anyom deri utaankaruhar man akunduanyiin kar ahar; a shi a mar ônov mba nomso man mba kasev." 
Genesis5:27 Ayange a Metusela sha won cii yô, lu anyom deri utaankarunyiin man akunduatar kar ataankaranyiin, man a kpe ye." 
Genesis5:28 Lameki lu anyom deri môm man akunduanyiin kar ahar man a mar wannomso ye; 
Genesis5:29 a ii un iti er Noa, a kaa er: Ka ngun je una sur se asema sha tom wase kua ican i yan i sha ave ase sha tar u TER A we u ifan ne ye." 
Genesis5:30 Mar Noa kera yô, Lameki tsa anyom deri utaan man akunduanyiingber kar ataan; a shi a mar ônov mba nomso man mba kasev." 
Genesis5:31 Ayange a Lameki sha won cii yô, lu anyom deri utaankaruhar man akunduatargber kar ataankarahar, man a kpe ye." 
Genesis5:32 Noa yô, lu anyom deri utaan; Noa gema mar Shem man Ham kua Yafeti." 
Genesis6:1 Tsô zum u ior hii ngeen sha won la, man er ve mar ônov mba kasev kpaa yô," 
Genesis6:2 ônov mba Aôndo nenge ônkasev mba iorov doo ashe; tsô ve er kasev mba sha asema a ve cii. 
Genesis6:3 TER kaa er: Jijingi Wam Una kera tema ken or gbem ga, gadia nan kpaa nan ngu inyam tsô, nahan kpaa ayange a uma u nan yô, aa lu anyom deri man ikundu." 
Genesis6:4 Akôraior lu sha won sha ayange la, kua ken masejime kpaa, zum u ônov mba Aôndo tsa a ônkasev mba iorov, mar a ve la; mbala lu ior mba ageev, mba sha ayange a ngise la, mbaduenati je." 
Genesis6:5 Er TER nenge isholibo i or kehe sha won, man hanma mhen u ishima i nan kpaa lu u bo tseegh gbem yô," 
Genesis6:6 TER vaa afanyô er Un er or sha won yô, vihi Un ken ishima." 
Genesis6:7 TER shi kaa er: Or u M gbe nan ne, Me tim nan sha tar kera, or kua uzendenya man akaa a a kper a kpela inya man inyon i sha; gadia M vaa afanyô er M er ve yô." 
Genesis6:8 Kpa gema doo TER a Noa. 
Genesis6:9 Ingin ka icombor i Noa ne: Noa yô, lu orperapera, lu a acôghol iyol ga, ken ikov na cii; Noa zenden vea Aôndo imôngo je;" 
Genesis6:10 Noa mar ônov utar Shem man Ham kua Yafeti. 
Genesis6:11 Kpa tar vihi sha ishigh ki Aôndo, man tar mgbough a apera kpaa." 
Genesis6:12 Aôndo nenge, tar vihi; gadia uumace cii vihi gbenda ve sha won kera." 
Genesis6:13 Aôndo kaa a Noa er: Mkur u uumace cii va sha ishigh Yagh ve; gadia ve iv a apera sha tar; nenge, timin Yam ve a tar imôngo ne." 
Genesis6:14 Yô, er tso sha kon u gofer; tôndo ayou ker, ukpo ukpo, man shighe un mningem kimi kua ken won kpaa." 
Genesis6:15 Er un nahan: iniembe i tso, aseva deri utar, igbanger na, aseva akunduahargber, ityaven na yô, aseva ikundugber." 
Genesis6:16 Yô, gber ian sha tso la, tôndo undu tiôn u sha ishiva i môm hunda u tsoogh la kpaa, gber u hen imbusu; pav un ukpo utar, kpo u shin man u her atô man u sha." 
Genesis6:17 Gadia Mo Me va a mngerem sha tar deemee, sha u timin hanma kwagh u uma cii, u a lu a iôôn i uma ken a na, sha won, kera; hanma kwagh u sha tar cii una kpe." 
Genesis6:18 Kpa, Me ya ikur a we; ú nyôr ken tso la, we a ônov ou, man kwase wou man kasev mba ônov ou a we imôngo." 
Genesis6:19 Hanma kwagh u uma u a lu di uma tsô yô, ú nyôr a mi uhar uhar ken tso, sha u ve̱ lu uma a we imôngo yô; á lu nom man mgbian." 
Genesis6:20 Inyon i sha, sha anza a i, man uzendenya sha anza a ve, man hanma kwagh u a kper a kpela inya u shin tar sha inja na; hanma nongokwagh, vea va her a we uhar uhar, sha u ve̱ war yô." 
Genesis6:21 Man we yô, gema tôô hanma injakwaghyan i i ye, kohol hen a we, i̱ lu kwaghyan sha ci wou kua ve kpaa." 
Genesis6:22 Noa er nahan; kwagh u Aôndo kaa un la cii, a er sha mi je." 
Genesis7:1 Shi TER kaa a Noa er: We a ya wou cii, nyôr nen ken tso; gadia ka we, M nenge u lu orperapera sha ishigh Yagh ken kov ne ye." 
Genesis7:2 Hanma inyam i wang yô, tsuwa itiankarihiar itiankarihiar, nom man mgbian, nom man mgbian. Inyam i wang ga yô, i̱ lu ihiar ihiar, nom man mgbian, nom man mgbian;" 
Genesis7:3 man inyon i sha kpaa itiankarihiar itiankarihiar, nom man ngô, nom man ngô; sha u ivor i̱ war sha won yô." 
Genesis7:4 Gadia shi ayange ataankarahar, tsô Me nôô ura sha tar ayange akunduahar, atetan kua tugh kpaa; hanma kwagh u uma u M er cii, Me tim un sha won kera." 
Genesis7:5 Noa er kwagh u Aôndo kaa un la vough. 
Genesis7:6 Noa lu anyom deri ataratar zum u mngerem va sha tar deemee la. 
Genesis7:7 Tsô Noa nyôr a ônov nav man kwase na kua kasev mba ônov nav a na imôngo ken tso, sha ci u mngerem ma deemee mara." 
Genesis7:8 Inyam i wang ga, man inyam i wang, man shi inyon man hanma kwagh u a kper a kpela inya," 
Genesis7:9 ve va hen Noa uhar uhar ken tso, nom man mgbian, er Aôndo kaa Noa yô." 
Genesis7:10 Tsô ayange ataankarahar la, nga kar kera yô, mngerem lu sha won deemee." 
Genesis7:11 Sha inyom, i anyom a Noa kuma deri ataratar la, sha uwer u sha uhar, ayange a u pue kar ataankarahar la, sha iyange la yô, ambor a aiv a mnger ande sha, ahura a Sha kpaa bugh." 
Genesis7:12 Zegeura lu nôôn sha tar, ayange akunduahar, atetan kua tugh kpaa." 
Genesis7:13 Sha iyange shon la je, Noa nyôr, wen vea Shem man Ham kua Yafeti, ka ônov mba Noa je la, man kwase u Noa, man kasev utar mba ônov nav mbala, a ve imôngo," 
Genesis7:14 ve man hanma inyamtoho sha inja na, man uzendenya cii, sha anza a ve, man hanma kwagh u a kper a kpela inya, sha inja na, man hanma inyon sha inja i i, inyon i lun a ingur kposo kposo." 
Genesis7:15 Ve nyôr ken tso hen Noa, uhar uhar; hanma injakwaghuma i iôôn i uma i lu ken i tsô yô." 
Genesis7:16 Mba ve nyôr yô, ve nyôr nom man mgbian u akaauma cii, er Aôndo kaa un yô. TER maa wuhe un kimi." 
Genesis7:17 Ayange akunduahar mngerem lu sha tar deemee, mngerem seer a seer kenden a tso sha, undu tar shin je." 
Genesis7:18 Mngerem hemba seer a seer sha tar kpishi; tso la yô, gba zenden sha kwavmnger." 
Genesis7:19 Mngerem hemba tar elegh elegh, je ugôgômbaiwoov sha won uve." 
Genesis7:20 Mngerem kar ve sha, aseva pue kar ataan, iwo kpaa uve." 
Genesis7:21 Akaauma cii, a a zenden sha tar, kpe kera: inyon man uzendenya man inyamtoho man hanma kwagh u a kper a kpela inya, man hanma or kpaa;" 
Genesis7:22 akaa cii a iôôn i jijingi u uma a lu ken ahenga a a, a a lu sha tar kpe." 
Genesis7:23 I tim hanma kwaghuma u a lu sha tar ci ca, or man zendenya man kwagh u a kper a kpela inya kua inyon i sha, i tim ve sha won kera. Noa mase waren tswen a mba ve lu vea na imôngo ken tso la." 
Genesis7:24 Mngerem hemba tar ayange deri man akunduahargber. 
Genesis8:1 Tsô Aôndo umbur Noa man inyam cii kua uzendenya cii, mba ve lu a na imôngo ken tso yô. Aôndo er ahumbe va ta sha tar, mngerem maa goho." 
Genesis8:2 Ambor a zegemnger man a-an a Sha kondo zegeura u senen sha kpaa tôndo; 
Genesis8:3 mngerem gba hiren ijime ijime sha tar; ayange deri man akunduahargber nga kar yô, mngerem songor." 
Genesis8:4 Sha uwer u sha utaankaruhar, sha ayange a u pue kar ataankarahar la, tso hange sha iwo i Ararati;" 
Genesis8:5 mngerem seer a seer u hiren ijime zan zan uwer u sha pue la; uwer u sha pue iyange i hiihii i u la, ityouv mbi iwoov hii duen." 
Genesis8:6 Tsô ayange akunduahar nga kar yô, Noa bugh ian i a gber sha tso la," 
Genesis8:7 a pase gugôô, due gba purugh wue wue zan zan mngerem kar uman sha tar." 
Genesis8:8 Shi a pase atii sha u una nenge mngerem maa pande sha tar yô. 
Genesis8:9 Kpa atii zua ape veren angahar a na ga, nahan a hire hen a na hen tso, gadia mngerem lu sha tar cii deemee; tsô a za uwegh a kôr un a nyôr a mi ken tso." 
Genesis8:10 Shi a tamber ayange ataankarahar, nahan shi a pase atii la, due ken tso;" 
Genesis8:11 tsô atii la hide her a na aikighe a ihômon i olev sha zwa; nahan Noa fa er mngerem pande sha tar ve. 
Genesis8:12 A shi a tamber ayange ataankarahar, a shi a pase atii la; nahan a kera hide her a na ga." 
Genesis8:13 Tsô sha inyom i deri ataratar kar i môm, sha uwer u hiihii, sha iyange i hiihii i u la yô, mngerem uma sha tar; Noa bugh kughur u tsoogh; nengen kera yô, nenge, inya uma cii." 
Genesis8:14 Sha uwer u sha uhar, sha ayange a u ikundu kar ataankarahar la, tar hingir tseghe tseghe." 
Genesis8:15 Tsô Aôndo ôr kwagh a Noa kaa er: 
Genesis8:16 Due ken tso, we vea kwase wou man ônov ou kua kasev mba ônov ou a we imôngo." 
Genesis8:17 Man shi due a hanma kwagh u uma cii, u a lu a we imôngo: inyon man uzendenya kua hanma kwagh u a kper a kpela inya, sha u ve̱ mgbough sha won, ve̱ maren ve̱ seer a seer sha won." 
Genesis8:18 Tsô Noa due a ônov nav man kwase na kua kasev mba ônov nav a na imôngo; 
Genesis8:19 hanma inyam man hanma kwagh u a kper a kpela inya man hanma inyon kua hanma kwagh u a tenger hen inya, ve due ken tso, sha iniongo iniongo." 
Genesis8:20 Tsô Noa ta atse a nanden TER nagh sha mi, a pande hanma injanyam i wang, man hanma injanyon i wang, a na nagh ku nanden sha atse la." 
Genesis8:21 TER ungwa ihuma i dedoo; nahan TER kaa ken ishima Na er: Me kera wa tar ifan sha ci u or ga, gadia mhen u ishima i or ka u bo, hii sha iyev mbu nan je; man shi Me kera tsaha akaauma er M vande eren nahan ne ga." 
Genesis8:22 Sha ayange a tar ua lu ne cii, shighe u lôôn iyiav man shighe u sundan, hir man iceenyolough, inyom man fam, atetan man tugh, vea bunden ga." 
Genesis9:1 Tsô Aôndo ver Noa doo doo kua ônov nav cii; A kaa a ve er: Maren nen, seer nen a seer, man shi iv nen tar." 
Genesis9:2 Hanma inyam i sha tar cii hanma inyon i sha kpaa, né cier ve iyol, vea cia ne; hanma kwagh u a kper a kpela inya cii kua ishu i shin zegemnger cii, i wa ne sha ikev." 
Genesis9:3 Hanma kwagh u tenger u a lu uma yô, una lu kwaghyan wen; M na ne ve cii, er lu M na ne akaamenden nahan." 
Genesis9:4 Saa di inyam kua uma u i tsô, ka awambe a i je la, de ye nen ga." 
Genesis9:5 Kpa awambe a en yô, Me or iyev i a kpee je, Me or i sha hanma inyam, sha or kpaa, orgen a orgen, Me or iyev i uma u or." 
Genesis9:6 Or u nan hee awambe a or inya yô, shi ka sha ikev i or á haa di awambe a nan inya ye; gadia ka sha mlu u Aôndo je, A er or ye." 
Genesis9:7 Ne kpaa, maren nen, seer nen a seer, samber nen sha tar, ngeen nen sha u." 
Genesis9:8 Aôndo ôr kwagh a Noa kua ônov nav a na imôngo, kaa er:" 
Genesis9:9 Nenge, Mo yô, M ya ikur a ven kua tsombor wen u ken ijime yen kpaa," 
Genesis9:10 man a hanma kwagh u uma u a lu a ven imôngo, mba ve dugh ken tso la cii, inja na yô, ka hanma inyam i sha won cii." 
Genesis9:11 M ya ikur a ven, á kera tim uuma sha won cii sha mngerem ma deemee ga; man shi mngerem ma deemee ma timin tar kpaa, maa kera lu ga." 
Genesis9:12 Shi Aôndo kaa er: Ingin ka ikav i ikuryan Yam a ven, man hanma kwagh u uma u a lu a ven imôngo, sha ikov ikov zan zan je:" 
Genesis9:13 M ver ikume Yam sha abeen Mer i̱ lu ikav i ikuryan Yam a tar. 
Genesis9:14 Nahan zum u Me gba ura sha tar man á nenge ikume la sha u yô," 
Genesis9:15 Mo kpaa, Me umbur ikuryan Yam a ven kua hanma injakwaghuma u uuma sha won cii; mngerem kpaa maa kera va deemee sha u timin uuma sha won cii ga." 
Genesis9:16 Zum u ikume la ia lu sha abeen, Mo kpaa, Me nenge a i, Me umbur ikuryan i tsôron i Aôndo ya a hanma injakwaghuma i uuma sha won cii la." 
Genesis9:17 Aôndo kaa a Noa er: Ingin ka ikav i ikuryan i m ya a uuma sha won cii je la. 
Genesis9:18 Ônov mba Noa mba ve due ken tso la yô, lu Shem man Ham kua Yafeti. Ka Ham je a lu ter u Kanaan ye." 
Genesis9:19 Mba utar mban ka ônov mba Noa; ka ve je ve na ior ve samber sha won cii ye. 
Genesis9:20 Noa hii tom u sule, a kaha sule u ikon i wain;" 
Genesis9:21 tsô a ma wain, a gba hunden, a yav ken tenti na idyelegh." 
Genesis9:22 Ham, ter u Kanaan la, nenge idyelegh u ter na, nahan a za kaa anngôôv nav mba uhar mbala ken won." 
Genesis9:23 Tsô Shem man Yafeti tôô ikondo, ve hambe sha avande ve, ve uhar cii, ve gba zan ajimejime, ve za cir idyelegh u ter ve; ishiv vev yô, lu ken ijime, ve nenge idyelegh u ter ve ga." 
Genesis9:24 Tsô zuzu u wain been Noa ashe, va kaven kwagh u wan na u kiriki la a er un yô," 
Genesis9:25 akaa er: Ifan i̱ kôr Kanaan; a̱ hingir kpan u ikpan i anngôôv nav. 
Genesis9:26 Man a shi a kaa er: I̱ wuese TER, Aôndo u Shem; Kanaan yô, a̱ lu kpan na." 
Genesis9:27 Aôndo A̱ gbanger Yafeti tar, a̱ tema ken utenti mba Shem; Kanaan yô, a̱ lu kpan na." 
Genesis9:28 Er mngerem ma deemee bee kera yô, Noa shi tsa anyom deri utar man akunduahargber." 
Genesis9:29 Ayange a Noa cii yô, lu anyom deri utaankarunyiin man akunduahargber, man a kpe ye." 
Genesis10:1 Ingin ka icombor i Shem man Ham kua Yafeti, ônov mba Noa. Ve mar ônov zum u mngerem ma deemee bee kera la." 
Genesis10:2 Ônov mba Yafeti yô, ka: Gomer man Magogi man Madai man Yavan man Tubal man Mesheki kua Tirase." 
Genesis10:3 Ônov mba Gomer yô, ka: Asekenashi man Rifati kua Togarma." 
Genesis10:4 Ônov mba Yavan yô, ka: Elisha man Tarshishi man Kitim man Dodanim." 
Genesis10:5 Ka ken ve man ityar i hen kpezegemnger i akuraior gba paven ityar ve kposo kposo, hanmô a zwa u nan, sha icombor ve man akur a ve ye." 
Genesis10:6 Ônov mba Ham yô, ka: Kushi man Miseraim man Puti kua Kanaan." 
Genesis10:7 Ônov mba Kushi yô, ka: Seba man Havila man Sabeta man Raama kua Sabateka; man ônov mba Raama yô, ka: Sekeba man Dedan." 
Genesis10:8 Kushi mar Nimrodi; ka un je hii lun nomor sha tar ye. 
Genesis10:9 Un lu ortato u ageegh sha ishigh ki TER; ka nahan man i ver ishor je er: Bee Nimrodi ortato u ageegh sha ishigh, ki TER, ye." 
Genesis10:10 Mhii u tartor na yô, lu sha Babel man Ereki man Akada man Kalne ken tar u Shinar la." 
Genesis10:11 Ka ken tar la a due a yem ken Ashiria ye; a za maa Ninive man Rehoboti-ir man Kala," 
Genesis10:12 man Resen, hen harga u Ninive vea Kala, ka zegegar shon je la." 
Genesis10:13 Miseraim gema mar Ludim man Anamim man Lehabim man Nafetuhim 
Genesis10:14 man Peterushim man Kaseluhim—ka ken mban Mbafiliti due ye—man Kafetorim. 
Genesis10:15 Kanaan mar wan na u iunda Shidon, man Heti" 
Genesis10:16 man Mbayebushi man Mbaamor man Mbagirgashi 
Genesis10:17 man Mbahivi man Mbaarki man Mbashini 
Genesis10:18 man Mbaarvadi man Mbaasemari man Mbahamati; ken masetyô la, icombor i Mbakanaan samber." 
Genesis10:19 Man shi ikighirtar i Mbakanaan, hii hen Shidon kura yem ken ian i Gera zan zan za nyôr ken Gasa; man hii ken Gasa kura yem ken ian i Sodom man Gomora man Adema man Seboim zan zan za nyôr ken Lasa." 
Genesis10:20 Mban ka ônov mba Ham sha icombor ve man ijô ve man ityar ve man akur a ve je ne. 
Genesis10:21 Shem, anngô u Yafeti, u vesen, ter u ônov mba Eber cii, un kpaa mar ônov." 
Genesis10:22 Ônov mba Shem yô, ka: Elam man Ashur man Arpakeshadi man Ludi kua Aram." 
Genesis10:23 Ônov mba Aram yô, ka: Ushi man Hul man Geter kua Masha." 
Genesis10:24 Arpakeshadi mar Shela, man Shela gema mar Eber." 
Genesis10:25 Eber mar ônov mba nomso uhar, u môm la iti na er Pelegi; gadia ka sha ayange na la ior pav sha ityar ityar ye; iti i anngô na er Yokotan." 
Genesis10:26 Yokotan mar Almodadi man Shelefi man Hasar-maveti man Yera 
Genesis10:27 man Hadoram man Usal man Dikela 
Genesis10:28 man Obal man Abimael man Sekeba 
Genesis10:29 man Ofir man Havila kua Yobabi. Mban cii lu ônov mba Yokotan. 
Genesis10:30 Ijiir i teman ve hii hen Mesha kura yem hen Sefar, uwo u sha ityoughkitaregh la." 
Genesis10:31 Mban ka ônov mba Shem sha icombor ve man ijô ve man ityar ve man akur a ve je ne. 
Genesis10:32 Ka icombor i ônov mba Noa sha ikov ve ken akur a ve je; ka ken i man akuraior a pav sha tar zum u mngerem ma deemee bee la ye. 
Genesis11:1 Tar cii lu zwa môm, ilyam kpaa môm." 
Genesis11:2 Zum u ve lu yemen vegher u sha ityoughkitaregh la, ve zua a ijiir i lun gbulumaa ken tar u Shinar, maa ve haa her." 
Genesis11:3 Tsô ve kaa ayol a ve er: Sé gbidye nen akam, sé sôô nen dedoo. Akam la hingir ve er ka awen, man inya i tiher hingir ve er ka inya i hôron yô." 
Genesis11:4 Ve kaa er: Sé maa nen Zegegar man gôgôyou u taven sha, a̱ za tagher sha Aôndo je, iti yase i̱ za gwa sha won, sé kera samber nen sha tar cii ga." 
Genesis11:5 Tsô TER sen sha u Una nenge gar man gôgôyou u ônov mba iorov ve maan yô. 
Genesis11:6 TER kaa er: Nenge, ve cii, ka nongo môm, zwa ve kpaa ngu môm je; man ka kwagh u ve hii u eren je ne, nahan ma kwagh u ve we ishima u eren yô, una hemba ve ga." 
Genesis11:7 Yô, Sé sen, Sé za nzughul ve zwa, ve̱ de kera ongo kwaghôron u ayol a ve ga." 
Genesis11:8 Nahan TER va num ve heregh, sambe ve sha tar cii wue wue, man ve de u maan zegegar la." 
Genesis11:9 Ka nahan man i yer iti na er Babel ye, gadia ka heregh man Ter nzughul zwa u ior sha won cii ye; ka heregh la kpaa TER sambe ve sha tar cii wue wue ye." 
Genesis11:10 Ungun ka tsombor u Shem ne: Shem lu anyom deri man a mar Arpakeshadi ye, zum u mngerem ma deemee bee anyom kar ahar la;" 
Genesis11:11 er a mar Arpakeshadi kera yô, Shem shi seer tsan anyom deri utaan; a shi a mar ônov mba nomso man mba kasev." 
Genesis11:12 Arpakeshadi lu anyom ikundugber kar ataan man a mar Shela ye; 
Genesis11:13 mar Shela kera yô, Arpakeshadi seer tsan anyom deri unyiin kar atar; a shi a mar ônov mba nomso man mba kasev." 
Genesis11:14 Shela lu anyom ikundugber man a mar Eber ye; 
Genesis11:15 mar Eber kera yô, Shela shi seer tsan anyom deri unyiin kar atar; a shi a mar ônov mba nomso man mba kasev." 
Genesis11:16 Eber lu anyom ikundugber kar anyiin man a mar Pelegi ye; 
Genesis11:17 mar Pelegi kera yô, Eber shi seer tsan anyom deri unyiin man ikundugber; a shi a mar ônov mba nomso man mba kasev." 
Genesis11:18 Pelegi lu anyom ikundugber man a mar Reu ye; 
Genesis11:19 mar Reu kera yô, Pelegi shi seer tsan anyom deri uhar kar ataankaranyiin; a shi a mar ônov mba nomso man mba kasev." 
Genesis11:20 Reu lu anyom ikundugber kar ahar man a mar Serugi ye; 
Genesis11:21 mar Serugi kera yô, Reu shi seer tsan anyom deri uhar kar ataankarahar; a shi a mar ônov mba nomso man mba kasev." 
Genesis11:22 Serugi lu anyom ikundugber man a mar Nahor ye; 
Genesis11:23 mar Nahor kera yô, Serugi shi seer tsan anyom deri uhar; a shi a mar ônov mba nomso man mba kasev." 
Genesis11:24 Nahor lu anyom ikundu kar ataankaranyiin man a mar Tera ye; 
Genesis11:25 mar Tera kera yô, Nahor seer tsan anyom deri man pue kar ataankaranyiin; a shi a mar ônov mba nomso man mba kasev." 
Genesis11:26 Tera lu anyom akunduatargber man a mar Aberam man Nahor man Haran ye. 
Genesis11:27 Ungun ka tsombor u Tera ne: Tera mar Aberam man Nahor man Haran; Haran gema mar Loti. 
Genesis11:28 Haran kpe er ter na Tera lu uma her, ken tar u i mar un la, ka Ur u Mbakaldi je la." 
Genesis11:29 Kpa Aberam man Nahor er kasev; iti i kwase u Aberam yô, er Sarai; iti i kwase u Nahor yô, er Milka, wan u Haran, ter u Milka man ter u Yiseka kpaa." 
Genesis11:30 Sarai yô, lu ikômkwase, lu a wan ga." 
Genesis11:31 Tsô Tera kua a wan na Aberam man Loti, wan u wan na Haran, kua Sarai, kwase u wan na Aberam, a mough a ve ken Ur u Mbakaldi, ve gba yemen ken tar u Kanaan; mba za ar hen Haran yô, ve tema heregh." 
Genesis11:32 Ayange a Tera yô, lu anyom deri uhar kar ataan; Tera maa kpe ken Haran." 
Genesis12:1 Tsô TER kaa a Aberam er: Due ken tar wou man ken ityô you man ken ya u teru, yem ken tar u Me tese u la." 
Genesis12:2 Me er u, ú hingir ikurior i vesen, Me ver u doo doo, Me er iti you i̱ za gwa man shi ú lu iveren kpaa." 
Genesis12:3 Mba vea ver u doo doo yô, Mo kpaa Me ver ve doo doo; or u nana wa u ifan la, Mo kpaa Me wa nan ifan; ka ken a we je akuraior a sha won cii aa zua a iveren ye." 
Genesis12:4 Tsô Aberam yem er TER kaa Un nahan; Loti kpaa yem a na imôngo. Aberam lu anyom akunduatargber kar ataan zum u a mough ken Haran la. 
Genesis12:5 Aberam mough a kwase na Sarai man Loti wan u anngô na, man inyarev vev mbi ve kohol cii, kua ior mba ve zua a mi ken Haran, ve gba yemen ken tar u Kanaan; ve za nyôr ken tar u Kanaan." 
Genesis12:6 Tsô Aberam gba zenden ken tar la zan zan za ar hen tembe u Shekem, hen kon u terebin u More. Sha ayange la Mbakanaan lu ken tar la." 
Genesis12:7 Tsô TER ande hen Aberam, kaa er: Me na tsombor wou tar ne. Nahan a ta TER u A ande her a na la, atse a nanden nagh sha mi heregh." 
Genesis12:8 A mough heregh a yem sha iwo i i lu Betel vegher u sha ityoughkitaregh la, a za tim tenti na her; Betel lu un vegher u shin ityôtar, Ai gema lu un vegher u sha ityoughkitaregh; keregh la, a ta TER atse a nanden nagh sha mi, a yila sha iti i TER." 
Genesis12:9 Aberam gba zenden veren ishigh ken Imbusutariyan la. 
Genesis12:10 Tsô ijen gba hen tar la, nahan Aberam sen za shin Igipiti sha u una lu shir ker; gadia ijen taver hen tar la yum." 
Genesis12:11 Tsô za mgbôghom u nyôron ken Igipiti yô, a kaa a kwase na Sarai er: Nenge, m fa, u ngu kwase u doon ashe mimi;" 
Genesis12:12 nahan zum u Mbaigipiti vea za nenge a we yô, vea kaa er: Ka kwase na je; nahan vea gema á wuam, kpa we yô, vea de u uma." 
Genesis12:13 Nahan yô, ma u za kaa wer, u ngu anngôm u kwase, sha er á kpem iyol sha ci wou man uma wam kpaa a̱ war sha ci wou." 
Genesis12:14 Tsô Aberam za nyer ken Igipiti yô Mbaigipiti nenge kwase la doo ashe tsung. 
Genesis12:15 Mbatarev mba Farao kpaa nenge a na; tsô, ve gba wuese un sha ishigh ki Farao; maa i kua a kwase la, i za a mi hen ya u Farao." 
Genesis12:16 Nahan a er a Aberam doo doo sha ci na; a zua a iyôngo man abua man anomajaki man ikpan i nomso man i ukase man anmgbianajaki man urakumi. 
Genesis12:17 Kpa TER tsaha tor Farao kua ya na cii, sha atsan a vesen, sha ci u Sarai kwase u Aberam la." 
Genesis12:18 Nahan Farao yila Aberam kaa er: Ka nyi u er a mo nahana? Inja na nan u kaam er i lu kwase wou ga? 
Genesis12:19 Inja na nan, u kaa wer: Ka anngôm u kwase, ve m gem m koo a naa? Yô, kwase wou ngun, kua a na, yem." 
Genesis12:20 Farao shi na nomso mbagenev er ve̱ za ver un gbenda vea kwase na, kua akaa a a lu a mi cii." 
Genesis13:1 Tsô Aberam mough ken Igipiti, gba yemen ken Imbusutariyan vea kwase na kua akaa a a lu a mi cii, man Loti kpaa a na imôngo." 
Genesis13:2 Aberam lu ornyar, a ngee a uzendenya man azurfa kua zenaria." 
Genesis13:3 A mough ken Imbusutariyan la, lu tsan gbenda yemen zan zan a za nyôr ken Betel, henpe tenti na lu hiihii, hen harga u Betel vea Ai la;" 
Genesis13:4 ka henpe a ta atse a nan nagh sha mi hiihii la; Aberam yila sha iti i TER heregh. 
Genesis13:5 Loti u a za vea Aberam imôngo la kpaa, lu a iyôngo man abua kua utenti kpaa." 
Genesis13:6 Tar la gema yina ve u vea tema ijiir i môm; gadia akaa a ve lu a mi ngee yum, nahan ve kera fatyô u vea lu imôngo ga." 
Genesis13:7 Tsô mbakuranilev mba Aberam man mba Loti mough num ayol a ve. Sha ayange la, Mbakanaan kua Mbaperishi lu ken tar la." 
Genesis13:8 Tsô Aberam kaa a Loti er: Ayôôso a̱ de luun mo a we ga, man hen atô u mbakuranilev av a mba ou kpaa ga, gadia se mba anmgbianev je." 
Genesis13:9 Tar ne cii, u ngu a ian sha mi gaa? Pav a mo kera tsô; wea zaan ken imese yô, mo me za ken iyan; man wea zaan ken iyan yô, mo me za ken imese." 
Genesis13:10 Tsô Loti kende ashe, nenge gbulumaa u Yordan cii, lu a mngerem han han kpaa; er TER lu a tim Sodom man Gomora ga la, vegher u zan hen Soar la, lu er sule u TER yô, bee tar u Igipiti." 
Genesis13:11 Maa Loti tsôr gbulumaa u Yordan la cii; tsô Loti hembe, yem vegher u sha ityoughkitaregh; ve pav ayol a ve." 
Genesis13:12 Aberam yô, tema ken tar u Kanaan; Loti di tema ken uzegembaagarev mba ken gbulumaa la; a kporom a utenti nav za sôsom a Sodom." 
Genesis13:13 Kpa ior i Sodom yô, lu aferaior, lu eren akaabo kpishi sha ishigh ki TER." 
Genesis13:14 TER ôr kwagh a Aberam, zum u Loti pav a na la, kaa er: Kende ashe sha yôô; hen ape u lu ne je, gema nenge ken imbusutarimese man iyan man ityoughkitaregh man ityôtar kpaa," 
Genesis13:15 gadia tar u, u nengen ne cii, Me na u, u̱ lu u wou kua u tsombor wou, gbem sha won." 
Genesis13:16 Man shi Me gema tsombor wou ua hingir er vuulevu u hen inya nahan; aluer or nana fatyô u ôron vuulevu u hen inya yô, ka ape tsombor wou kpaa á ôr u la." 
Genesis13:17 Mough, zende tar ne cii, za kighir sha ilihen i u man igbanger i u, gadia nan Yam we u." 
Genesis13:18 Tsô Aberam mough a utenti nav yem za tema hen ikon i terebin i Mamre i i lu ken Heberon la. A ta TER atse a nanden nagh sha mi heregh. 
Genesis14:1 Tsô sha ayange a Amrafel tor u Shinar, man Arioki tor u Elasar, man Kedor-laomer tor u Elam, man Tidal tor u Goim la," 
Genesis14:2 ve gba ityav a Ber, tor u Sodom, man Birsha, tor u Gomora, man Shinabi, tor u Adema man Shemeber, tor u Seboim man tor u Bela, ka Soar je la." 
Genesis14:3 Mban cii zua shin pev u Shidim ka Zegemnger u Bar je la. 
Genesis14:4 Anyom pue kar ahar ve lu sha ikev i Kedor-laomer, kpa sha inyom i sha pue kar utar la, ve mough ahendan." 
Genesis14:5 Sha inyom i sha pue kar unyiin la, Kedor-laomer va a utor mba ve lu a na ityô, ve va hemba Mbarefai ityav ken Asheteroti-Karnaim, man Mbashushi shin Ham, man Mbaemi ken Shave Kiriataim," 
Genesis14:6 man Mbahor hen uwo ve u Seir, zan zan za ar hen El-paran ua lu hen kpe desereti la." 
Genesis14:7 Shi ve hide ve va hen Enmisepati, ka Kadeshi je la; ve hemba tar u Mbaamaleki cii, kua Mbaamor mba ve tema ken Hasason-Tamar la kpaa." 
Genesis14:8 Tsô tor u Sodom man tor u Gomora man tor u Adema man tor u Seboim man tor u Bela, ka Soar je la; ve due ve cinge ityav a ve shin pev u Sidim;" 
Genesis14:9 ve gba nôngon ityav a Kedor-laomer tor u Elam, man Tidal tor u Goim, man Amrafel tor u Shinar, man Arioki tor u Elasar; ka utor unyiin lu nôngon a utor utaan ye." 
Genesis14:10 Kpa pev u Sidim la mgbough a ahungwa a inya i tiher. Utor mba Sodom man Gomora mba ngur yevese yô, ve za gba shimi; mba ve shi her yô, mase yevese unden sha iwo." 
Genesis14:11 Nahan ve kura akaa a Sodom man Gomora cii, kua akaayan a ve cii kpaa, ve gba yemen." 
Genesis14:12 Ve kôr Loti, wan u idyondon u Aberam la kpaa, a akaa a na, ve yem a mi; gadia a lu ken Sodom." 
Genesis14:13 Tsô orgen u a war yô, za ôr Aberam Orheberu u a tema hen ikon i terebin i Mamre, Oramor la. Mamre ne lu angbian u Esekol man u Aner la; ve yô, ve lian a Aberam." 
Genesis14:14 Zum u Aberam ungwa er i kôr anngô na yô, a mough a ior nav mba fan ityav, mba i mar ve hen ya na yô, ior deri utar man pue kar anigheni, a gba tôvon ve hwange zan zan za ar hen Dan." 
Genesis14:15 A pav ior nav tugh, lu un kua mbashiren nav, za ta num sha a ve; a hemba ve, a zenda ve zan zan za ar hen Hoba, u a lu Damaseku vegher u imbusutarimese la." 
Genesis14:16 Tsô a hide a akaa la cii; man Loti anngô na a akaa a na kpaa, a hide a mi; man kasev kua ior mbagenev kpaa." 
Genesis14:17 Er a lu hiden ken ityav mbi a hemba Kedor-laomer aa utor mba ve lu a na ityô yô, tor u Sodom due va kegh un gbenda shin pev u Shave, ka pev u tor je la." 
Genesis14:18 Tsô Melkisedeki tor u Salem za va a bredi man wain, un lu zegepristi u Aôndo Uhembansha." 
Genesis14:19 A ver un doo doo, a kaa er: Aôndo Uhembansha A̱ ver Aberam doo doo, u A gbe Sha man tar la;" 
Genesis14:20 I̱ wuese Aôndo Uhembansha, u A ne mbaihomov ou sha ikev you yô. Tsô a tsuwa môm-ken-upue u ken hanma kwagh, a na un." 
Genesis14:21 Nahan tor u Sodom kaa a Aberam er: Nam ior, kpa akaa agen yô, saa a mi tsô." 
Genesis14:22 Kpa Aberam kaa a tor u Sodom er: M kende uwegh agh sha, sha TER Aôndo Uhembansha u A gbe Sha man tar," 
Genesis14:23 me ngohol gwarmou tsô kpaa ga, shin kwange u akôvough, shin hanma kwagh u a lu u wou cii, sha u de kaan wer: Ka mo, m ne Aberam a hingir ornyar, ga;" 
Genesis14:24 M soo kwagh môm ga, saa di kwagh u mbayev ve ye tsô, man kwar u mba ve ze a mo imôngo, Aner man Esekol man Mamre; ve, ve̱ tôô kwar ve." 
Genesis15:1 Ken masetyô u akaa ne yô, mkaanem ma TER va hen Aberam sha mpase u sha mnenge er: De cie ga Aberam, Mo M ngu u perutya, injar you kpaa ia vese kpishi." 
Genesis15:2 Tsô Aberam kaa er: Ter AÔNDO, ka nyi Ú nama, er m lu yemen, m ver wan ga, nahan or u nana ya dyako u ya wam á lu Elieser, Ordamaseku ne." 
Genesis15:3 Shi Aberam kaa er: Nenge, U nam tsombor ga, nahan wanye wam u shiren mo, una ya dyako wam." 
Genesis15:4 Tsô mkaanem ma TER va hen a na, kaa er: Or ne una lu or u yan dyako wou ga, saa u ú mar iyol you je, una ya dyako wou ye." 
Genesis15:5 Maa A due a na ken won, A kaa er: Kende ashe sha yôô, ôr iyenge i asan, aluer wea fatyô u ôron yô; shi A kaa a na er: Kape tsombor wou ua lu je la." 
Genesis15:6 A na TER jighjigh, tsô A gema kwagh ne hingir perapera na je." 
Genesis15:7 Shi TER kaa a na er: Ka Mo TER u M dugh a we ken Ur u Mbakaldi sha u nan we tar ne u̱ ya dyako u u yô. 
Genesis15:8 A kaa er: Ter AÔNDO, ka sha nyi man me fa er me ya dyako u u?" 
Genesis15:9 A kaa a na er: Vam a tulebua u a kom anyom atar man ngôivo u anyom atar man nomiyôngo u anyom atar man atii kua tuleikungu kpaa. 
Genesis15:10 Tsô a va Un a akaa ne cii, a pav ve her atô, a ver vegher ugen ken, vegher ugen ken; kpa inyon yô, a pav i ga." 
Genesis15:11 Tsô inyon i wan akor sen sha u ia ya inyam la, nahan Aberam hure i kera." 
Genesis15:12 Iyange i gbe been yô, Aberam gba mnyam, yav mem mem; tsô mcieryol u angôghime haa un iyol." 
Genesis15:13 Nahan A kaa a Aberam er: Fa dedoo, tsombor wou ua lu shir ken tar u lu u ve ga yô, ua er tom u ikpan, man á er u ican anyom deri unyiin je;" 
Genesis15:14 man ikurior i vea er i tom u ikpan la, Me ôr i ijir; ken masetyô yô, vea due a akaa kpishi." 
Genesis15:15 Kpa we yô, ú za kohol uter ou bem bem, ú tsa sha won man ú kpe á ii u ye." 
Genesis15:16 Kov u sha unyiin la ua shi á hide hen ijiir ne; gadia ibo i Mbaamor ngi a iv ve ga. 
Genesis15:17 Tsô er iyange bee, ime wa mgbigh mgbigh yô, nenge, atse a duen mnyim man ikaghusu kar hen atô u avegher a inyam la." 
Genesis15:18 Ka sha iyange la man Aôndo ya ikur a Aberam ye. Ka tsombor wou je, Me na u tar ne ye, hii hen ifi u Igipiti zan zan za ar hen zegeifi, ka ifi u Uferati je la:" 
Genesis15:19 Mbakeni man Mbakenishi man Mbakademoni 
Genesis15:20 man Mbahiti man Mbaperishi man Mbarefai 
Genesis15:21 man Mbaamor man Mbakanaan man Mbagirgashi kua Mbayebushi kpaa. 
Genesis16:1 Kpa Sarai, kwase u Aberam, mar un ônov ga; kpa un gema lu a kpankwase u Igipiti, iti na er, Hagar." 
Genesis16:2 Nahan Sarai, kaa a Aberam, er: Nenge, TER yangem mar, nahan yô, ma u shi tee kpankwase wam ne, alaghga me wa iyagh a na. Aberam rumun zwa u Sarai la." 
Genesis16:3 Zum u Aberam vande tsan anyom pue ken tar u Kanaan kera yô, Sarai kwase u Aberam, gema Hagar, kpankwase na u Igipiti la, na Aberam, nom na, hingir kwase na." 
Genesis16:4 Tsô a tsa a Hagar, maa a wa iyav; nengen er un lu iyav; yô, ngô na hingir un kwagh u lahan sha ashe na je." 
Genesis16:5 Sarai gema kaa a Aberam er: Kwagh u i erem a vihim ne, ngu sha ityough you; mo m na kpankwase wam sha ikev you, man er a nenge er un we iyav yô, m hingir un kwagh u lahan sha ashe na; yô, TER A̱ kure kwagh wam vea we ne." 
Genesis16:6 Tsô Aberam kaa a Sarai er: Nenge, kpankwase wou ngu sha ikev you; er a na er i doo u yô. Nahan Sarai er un ican tsung zan zan maa a yevese un." 
Genesis16:7 Ortyom u TER za kohol un hen imbormnger ken desereti, hen imbor i i lu sha gbenda u zan sha Shur la." 
Genesis16:8 A kaa er: Hagar, kpankwase u Sarai, u due han u ve, man ka han u zee? A kaa er: Ka ayem m yevese ngôm Sarai ye." 
Genesis16:9 Ortyom u TER la, kaa a na er: Hide hen ngôu, hire a iyol you ijime, lu sha ikev na." 
Genesis16:10 Shi ortyom u TER kaa a na er: Me seer tsombor wou, ua ngee je á gande u ôron iyenge i u." 
Genesis16:11 Ortyom u TER shi seer kaan un er: Nenge, u ngu iyav, maren you wan u nomso je; ú ii un iti wer Ishemael, gadia TER ungwa u ken ican you." 
Genesis16:12 Una lu or inja er jaki i ken toho nahan, uwegh nagh kua lu ihom a hanma or, uwegh ku hanma or kpaa kua lu di ihom a na; una tema sha ishigh ki anmgbianev nav cii." 
Genesis16:13 Tsô a yila iti i TER u A er kwagh a na la er: We U ngu Aôndo u nengen; gadia a kaa er: Mo kpaa, m gema m nenge a Un u A nenge a mo heen ne?" 
Genesis16:14 Ka nahan man i yer ijôr la er Ber-lahai-roi ye, ngi keela hen harga u Kadeshi a Berede." 
Genesis16:15 Hagar mar Aberam wan u nomso. Aberam ii wan na, u Hagar mar la, iti er Ishemael." 
Genesis16:16 Aberam lu anyom akunduanyiin kar ateratar, zum u Hagar mar Aberam Ishemael la." 
Genesis17:1 Zum u Aberam lu anyom akunduanyiingber kar ataankaranyiin la, TER ande hen Aberam, kaa a na er: Mo M ngu Aôndo Uhembanagee, zenden sha ishigh Yagh, nahan yô, ú lu vough." 
Genesis17:2 Mo kpaa, Me ver ikyuryan Yam her atô Wam a we, Me seer we iyenge kpishi." 
Genesis17:3 Tsô Aberam gure wa ityough inya, Aôndo gema ôr kwagh a na kaa er:" 
Genesis17:4 Mo yô, nenge, M ya ikur a we, ú hingir ter u akuraior kpishi." 
Genesis17:5 A kera yilan iti you er Aberam ga, kpa á gema iti you er Aberaham; gadia M gema u, u hingir ter u akuraior kpishi." 
Genesis17:6 Man shi Me er u, ú ngee a ônov kpishi, ú va hingir akuraior je, utor kpaa vea due ken a we." 
Genesis17:7 Me taver ikyuryan Yam hen atô Wam a we kua tsombor wou u ken ijime you zan zan sha ikov ikov cii, i̱ lu ikuryan i tsôron; Me lu Aôndo wou kua u tsombor wou ken ijime you." 
Genesis17:8 Me na u kua tsombor wou u ken ijime you, tar u u lu shir ker ne, ka tar u Kanaan ne cii; ua hingir kwagh ve gbem; Mo kpaa Me lu Aôndo ve." 
Genesis17:9 Man Aôndo kaa a Aberaham er: We yô, waan ikuryan Yam iko, we, kua tsombor wou ken ijime you zan zan sha ikov ikov." 
Genesis17:10 Ingin ka ikuryan Yam i né waan i iko hen atô Wam a we man tsombor wou ken ijime you ne: I̱ tsôngon hanma wannomso wen. 
Genesis17:11 Á tsôngon ne ipusu yen, á lu ikav i ikuryan her atô Wam a ven." 
Genesis17:12 U nan kom ayange anigheni ken ven yô, i̱ tsôngo nan; hanma nomsoor, zan zan sha ikov ikov, man marinya wou kua u i yam a yam nan sha inyar a orgen u nan lu nongo wou ga kpaa." 
Genesis17:13 I̱ tsôngon marinya wou kua or u u yam sha inyar kpaa, kpee je. Ka nahan man ikuryan Yam ia lu ikuryan i tsôron ye." 
Genesis17:14 Oripusu u i tsenge nan ipusu i nan ga yô, i̱ dugh or la ken nongo u nan kera; nan vihi ikuryan Yam." 
Genesis17:15 Man Aôndo shi kaa a Aberaham er: De kera yer kwase wou Sarai wer, Sarai ga; kpa á yilan iti na er Sara." 
Genesis17:16 Me ver un doo doo man Me na u wan ken a na kpaa; Me ver un doo doo una hingir akuraior, utor mba iorov kpaa vea due ken a na." 
Genesis17:17 Tsô Aberaham gure wa ityough inya, gba sen, kaan ken ishima na er: Or u nan lu anyom deri kpaa, nana mar wana? Sara u a lu anyom akunduanyiingber je kpaa una mara?" 
Genesis17:18 Tsô Aberaham kaa a Aôndo er: Ishemael ma a shi lu uma sha ishigh You! 
Genesis17:19 Aôndo kaa er: Ei, ka Sara, kwase wou, una mar u wan yô, ú ii un iti wer Isaka; Me taver ikuryan Yam vea na, á lu ikuryan i tsôron, sha ci u tsombor na u ken ijime na." 
Genesis17:20 Man sha kwagh u Ishemael kpaa, M ungwa msen wou; nenge, Me ver un doo doo, Me na, una mar kpishi, Me seer un iyenge, una mar utyombaiorov pue kar uhar; Me gema un una hingir zegeikurior." 
Genesis17:21 Kpa ikuryan Yam yô, Me taver i ken Isaka, u Sara una mar u, sha inyom i sha, hen shighe ne nahan la." 
Genesis17:22 Kur kwaghôron a na yô, Aôndo undu Aberaham yem." 
Genesis17:23 Tsô Aberaham kua wan na Ishemael man umarinya nav cii man mba a yam sha inyar cii, hanma nomsoor u hen ya u Aberaham; sha iyange la je, a tsôngo ve ipusu ve, er Aôndo kaa un yô." 
Genesis17:24 Aberaham yô, lu anyom akunduanyiingber kar ataankaranyiin zum u i tsôngo un ipusu na la;" 
Genesis17:25 wan na Ishemael lu anyom pue kar atar, zum u i tsôngo un ipusu na la." 
Genesis17:26 Sha iyange la je, i tsôngo Aberaham kua wan na Ishemael kpaa," 
Genesis17:27 man nomso mba hen ya na cii; umarinya mba hen ya, man mba i yam ve sha inyar a nongo ugen kposo, i tsôngo ve a na imôngo." 
Genesis18:1 Tsô TER shi ande her a na hen ikon i terebin i Mamre er a tema hen hunda u tenti na, oo gera gera yô." 
Genesis18:2 Er a kende ashe sha yô, a nenge iorov utar tile un sha ishi; nengen a ve yô, a mough hen hunda u tenti saghera sha u una za kegh ve gbenda yô. A gure inya a kaa er:" 
Genesis18:3 Terem, aluer a doo u a mo yô, de karen a kar hen wanakiriki wou ze he!" 
Genesis18:4 De i̱ va a anmnger, ôô nen angahar a en, mem nen hen itinekon ne;" 
Genesis18:5 yô, m̱ va a ankwaghyan, kundu nen asema a mi man né mase yemen ye; man a bee er ne kar hen wanakiriki wen ye. Ve kaa er: Yô, er ase er u kaa nahan." 
Genesis18:6 Tsô Aberaham nyôr ken tenti hen Sara fese, kaa er: Hôr mwem ma kengese, uikaren utar, kaa masa a mi fefa je." 
Genesis18:7 Aberaham kar ayem za hen ikum i abua, za kôr gumbua u dedoo u a lu inyam legh legh yô, na kpan na; ngula bur fefa je." 
Genesis18:8 A tôô atumba a kôrough man a lun alatata kua gumbua u a sôr la, a va ver ve inya; a tile a ve her, hen itinekon la, ve ya." 
Genesis18:9 Ve pine un er: Kwase wou Sara, ngu hana? A kaa er: Ngula ken tenti la." 
Genesis18:10 A kaa er: Shi Mea hire her a we kpee, hen shighe ne nahan; man nenge, kwase wou Sara una mar wan. Yô, Sara gema lu sha hunda u tenti ken ijime Na, lu ungwan." 
Genesis18:11 Aberaham man Sara yô, ve bee iyol, ve tsa sha won; Sara de u duen won." 
Genesis18:12 Tsô Sara gba sen ken ishima na, kaan er: Er m bee iyol kera, terem kpaa a bee iyol, nahan kpaa me shi me mar wana?" 
Genesis18:13 Tsô TER kaa a Aberaham er: Ka nyi Sara a sen a kaan er: Er m bee iyol kera, nahan kpaa me shi me mar wana?" 
Genesis18:14 Ma kwagh u kpilighyol u hemban TER ngu jee? Me hide hen a we sha shighe u i ver la, hen shighe ne nahan, Sara una lu a wan ave." 
Genesis18:15 Tsô Sara gba tunan kaan er: M se ga; gadia lu cian. Kpa TER kaa er: Ei, u se." 
Genesis18:16 Ior mbala mough heregh, ver ishigh ken Sodom; Aberaham kpaa mough a ve, za ver ve gbenda." 
Genesis18:17 Tsô TER kaa er: Me yer Aberaham kwagh u M lu eren ne shinii; 
Genesis18:18 er Aberaham a lu hingir ikyurior i vesen i ageegh, man akuraior sha won cii aa zua a iveren ken a na yôô?" 
Genesis18:19 Gadia M tsuwa un sha er a̱ kaa ônov nav man mba ken ya na ken ijime, ve̱ waan gbenda u TER iko, ve̱ eren perapera man kwagh u a lu vough, sha er TER Una kure Aberaham kwagh u A ôr sha a na la yô." 
Genesis18:20 TER shi kaa er: Er mliam ma i vaa Sodom man Gomora ma gbe ikôr, man er asorabo a ve a vihi yum yô," 
Genesis18:21 Me hungwa hegen. Me nenge; aluer ieren ve ia kuma sha mliam ma ma nyer her a Mo la yô, Me fa; shin a lu nahan ga kpaa Me fa." 
Genesis18:22 Tsô ior mbala undu ijiir la gba yemen ken Sodom, kpa Aberaham tile her sha ishigh ki TER." 
Genesis18:23 Nahan Aberaham kporom kaa er: Ú tim orperapera a orifer imôngoo? 
Genesis18:24 Alaghga mbaperapera vea lu ken gar la akunduahargber, nahan kpaa Ú tim ijiir la, Ú tsegha i sha ci u mbaperapera mba akunduahargber la gaa?" 
Genesis18:25 Tuna u We nahan Ú er injakwagh ne sha u wuan mbaperapera a mbaaferev imôngo, je mbaperapera geman hingir kwagh môm a mbaaferev; kwagh ne tuna U tsô; Orjirigh u tar cii, Una kera er vough gaa?" 
Genesis18:26 Tsô TER kaa er: Aluer Mea zua a mbaperapera akunduahargber ken Sodom yô, Me tsegha ijiir la cii, sha ci ve." 
Genesis18:27 Aberaham gema kaa er: Nenge, m gbe cihin ôron kwagh a TER tsô, mo u m lu di inya kua mtwem tsô ne;" 
Genesis18:28 alaghga á zua a mbautaan ken mbaperapera akunduahargber la ga, nahan Ú tim gar cii sha ci u mbautaan mba ve lu ga laa? A kaa er: Aluer Mea zua a akunduahar kar utaan ker yô, Me tim un ga." 
Genesis18:29 A shi a ôr kwagh a Na a kaa er: Alaghga á zua a mi akunduahar keregh. A kaa er: Sha ci u mbaakunduahar mbala yô, Me kera er kwagh la ga." 
Genesis18:30 A shi a kaa er: TERE, ishima i̱ de vihin We ga, shi me ôr kwagh; alaghga á zua a mi ikundugber keregh. A kaa er: Aluer Mea zua a mi ikundugber ker yô, Me kera er kwagh la ga." 
Genesis18:31 A shi a kaa er: Nenge, m gbe cihin ôron kwagh a TER tsô, alaghga á zua a mi ikundu keregh. A kaa er: Sha ci u mbaikunduv mbala Me tim ga." 
Genesis18:32 A shi a kaa er: TERE, ishima i̱ de vihin We ga, me mase ôron kwagh ne môm tsô. Alaghga á zua a mi pue. A kaa er: Sha ci u mbapuev kpaa, Me tim ga." 
Genesis18:33 Tsô TER gba yemen, zum u A kure kwaghôron na a Aberaham la. Aberaham kpaa gba hiden hen ijiir na." 
Genesis19:1 Mbatyomov mba uhar mbala za ar hen Sodom aikighe; yô, Loti tema hen hundagar u Sodom; Loti nengen a ve yô, a mough a za kegh ve gbenda, a ngurum, a wa ityough inya," 
Genesis19:2 a kaa er: Ne uter av, shi kaha nen, nyôr nen hen ya u wanakiriki wen, tsa nen, ôô nen angahar, tsô né va mough pepe né yem; kpa ve kaa er: Ei, ka hen tembe sé tsa ye." 
Genesis19:3 A zamber a ve tsung; tsô ve goom her a na, ve nyôr hen ya na; un kpaa a yôr ve iwer, a kaa bredi u i we kwa sha mi ga yô, ve ya." 
Genesis19:4 Kpa er ve lu a yav ga je tsô, ior mba hen gar la, Mbasodom, ve kase ya la, mbayevikaior kua mbatamen kpaa, ior ca ca cii;" 
Genesis19:5 ve gba yilan Loti, kaan a na er: Ior mba ve ve hen a we tugh ne yô, mba hana? Due a ve, va a ve hen vese heen, se̱ fa ve." 
Genesis19:6 Tsô Loti due za hen ve, gema uwegh wuhe hunda ken ijime." 
Genesis19:7 A kaa er: Anmgbianev av, de eren nen ifer nahan ze he!" 
Genesis19:8 Nenge, mo m ngu a ônov mba kasev uhar mba ve lu a fa nom ga yô; yô shi de nen, m̱ due ne a ve, er nen a ve er i sar ne yô, kpa ior mban yô, de eren nen ve kwagh ga, sha er ve va nyer hen haav av yô." 
Genesis19:9 Ve kaa er: Kpela keela. Shi ve kaa er: Or ne va shir tsô, man gema ngu veren iyol er un ngu orjir; yô, sé er u kwagh u bo á hemba u ve. Tsô ve imbishi or la, ka Loti je la, ve kporom sha u vihin hunda." 
Genesis19:10 Kpa ior mbala naregh uwegh vegh, kôr Loti nyôr a mi, va kohol ve ken iyou, maa ve wuhe hunda." 
Genesis19:11 Tsô ve pir mba hen hunda u ya la ashe, mbakiriki kua mbatamen cii; ve ker hunda je ve vôr." 
Genesis19:12 Tsô ior mbala kaa a Loti er: Ior mbagenev kpaa mba u heene? Wankem man ônov ou mba nomso man mba kasev mba u lu a mi hen gar cii, due a ve hen ijiir ne kera;" 
Genesis19:13 gadia timin yase ijiir ne, sha ci u mliam ma i vaa ve gba ikôr sha ishigh ki TER, nahan TER tindi se sha u se̱ va tim i." 
Genesis19:14 Tsô Loti due ôr kwagh a ônov nav mba kemev mba ve sôôr ônov nav yô, a kaa er: Mough due nen hen ijiir ne kera; gadia TER timin gar ne je ne; kpa ônov nav mba kemev yô, lu ve er ka asenge a eren yô." 
Genesis19:15 Sev mbu av yô, mbatyomov gba torough a Loti kaan er: Mough kua kwase wou man ônov ou mba kasev mba uhar mba ve lu heen ne, sha er ú tim sha ibo i gar ne ga yô." 
Genesis19:16 Kpa a er zô zô; ior mbala kôr un sha uwe kua kwase na man ônov nav mba kasev uhar, gadia Aôndo lu zungwen un mhôônom; ve due a na, ve ver un ken akôngo a gar." 
Genesis19:17 Tsô zum u ve due a ve ken won yô, A kaa a ve er: Yevese war, de gem ashe ijime ga, gbulumaa ne cii kpaa, de til her ga, yevese yem sha uwo, sha er ú tim ga yô." 
Genesis19:18 Loti kaa a na er: Ku, nahan ga, TERE!" 
Genesis19:19 Nenge, doo U a wanakiriki wou, U zungwem je, er U yem uma wam yô; kpa me fatyô u yevese za waren sha uwo la ga; gadia kwaghbo una kohol mo sha gbenda, me kpe." 
Genesis19:20 Shi nenge, gar ne ngu heen ikua ikua u yevese za waren ker, ka u kiriki je. Yô, shi de, m̱ za ker, ka u kiriki tsô gaa? Uma wam a̱ war." 
Genesis19:21 A kaa a na er: Yô, sha kwagh ne kpaa, M rumun we ve, Me tim gar u u kaa la ga." 
Genesis19:22 Er fefa, yem ker, gadia Me fatyô u eren ma kwagh ga, saa u nyôr ker ve. Ka nahan man i yila gar la er Soar ye." 
Genesis19:23 Zum u Loti ar ken Soar la yô, iyange vande kôndon sha ve." 
Genesis19:24 Tsô TER er sulfur man usu due sha TER Sha, haa sha Sodom man Gomora." 
Genesis19:25 A tim agar la, man gbulumaa la cii, man mba ve lu ken agar la cii kua akaamenden a hen inya kpaa." 
Genesis19:26 Kpa kwase na u a lu un ken ijime la gema ashe ijime, maa a hingir icebar." 
Genesis19:27 Tsô Aberaham mough pepe za her ape yan tile sha ishigh ki TER la; 
Genesis19:28 te ashe nengen ken ian i Sodom man Gomora kua gbulumaa u tar la cii yô, a nenge mnyim hen inya lu kôndon sha, er ka mnyim ma duen ken atse yô." 
Genesis19:29 Shighe u Aôndo timin agar a hen gburumaa la, Aôndo umbur Aberaham, A er Loti due ken mtim la kera, zum u lu timin agar a Loti tema ker la." 
Genesis19:30 Loti due ken Soar tema sha uwo, a ônov nav mba kasev uhar a na imôngo; gadia lu cian u teman ken Soar; a tema ken bar, un kua ônov nav mba kasev uhar mbala." 
Genesis19:31 Tsô u vesen la kaa a u kiriki la er: Ter wase bee iyol, man ma or nan kera ngu sha tar u nana va hen vese inja i ior ve eren sha tar ga." 
Genesis19:32 Va, sé er ter wase a̱ ma wain; yô, sé yav a na sha u sé ver ter wase tse yô." 
Genesis19:33 Tsô ve er ter ve ma wain hen tugh mbula; nahan u iunda la nyôr za yav a ter na; kpa a fa myav na ga, shin mmough na kpaa ga." 
Genesis19:34 Tsô kper nan yô, u vesen la kaa a u kiriki la er: Nenge, nyen tugh m yav a terem; yô, shi sé er un a̱ ma wain tugh mbun kpaa, we kpaa, nyôr yav a na, sha u sé ver ter wase tse yô." 
Genesis19:35 Tsô ve er ter ve ma wain hen tugh mbula kpaa; wen ukiriki la nyôr yav a na. Kpa a fa myav na ga, shin mmough na kpaa ga." 
Genesis19:36 Nahan ônov mba Loti uhar cii, ve wa iyav a ter ve." 
Genesis19:37 U iunda la mar wannomso, a ii un iti er, Moabi. Ka un je a lu ter u Mbamoabi zan zan nyian ye." 
Genesis19:38 U kiriki la kpaa mar wan, a ii un iti er Benami. Ka un a lu ter u ônov mba Amon zan zan nyian ye." 
Genesis20:1 Tsô Aberaham mough heera yem ken tar u Imbusutariyan la, za tema hen harga u Kadeshi vea Shur; za lu shir ken Gerar." 
Genesis20:2 Aberaham lu ôron kwagh sha kwagh u kwase na Sara er: Ka anngôm u kwase. Nahan Abimeleki, tor u Gerar tindi i za kua a Sara." 
Genesis20:3 Tsô Aôndo va hen Abimeleki ken mnyam ma cien tugh, kaa a na er: Nenge, ú kpe sha ci u kwase u u koo a mi ne; gadia ka kwase u or je." 
Genesis20:4 Kpa Abimeleki lu a bende a na ve ga; a maa a kaa er: TERE, Ú wua ikurior i perapera?" 
Genesis20:5 Kera ka un iyol na a kaa a mo er: Ka anngôm u kwase ye gaa? Shi kwase iyol na kpaa a kaa er: Ka anngôm u nomso je. Yô, ka sha ishima i gbar gbar man ave am a wang m er kwagh ne ye." 
Genesis20:6 Tsô Aôndo kaa a na ken mnyam mara er: Een, M fa, ka sha ishima i gbar gbar u er nahan ye, Mo kpaa M yange u sha u de kera eren Mo kwaghbo ga; ka nahan man M rumun Mer bende a na ga ye." 
Genesis20:7 Hegen yô, hire ase or la a kwase na, gadia ka profeti je; una er msen sha ci wou, ú lu uma; man aluer wea hide a na ga yô, fa, ka ku ú kpe ye, we kua ior ou cii." 
Genesis20:8 Tsô Abimeleki mough pepe pepe yila mbatomov nav cii, ôr akaa ne cii sha ato ve; ior mbala cia kpishi." 
Genesis20:9 Nahan Abimeleki kaa a na er: Ka nyi u er a vese nahana? Ka han m er u kwaghbo man u heem ibo i vesen iyol a tartor wam cii? U erem akaa a a kom u or á er ga. 
Genesis20:10 Shi Abimeleki kaa a Aberaham er: U hen nan man u er kwagh ne nahana? 
Genesis20:11 Aberaham kaa er: M hen mer, mayange mba cie Aôndo hen ijiir ne ga; yô, vea va wuam sha ci u kwase wam." 
Genesis20:12 Man un yô, ka anngôm u kwase mimi je, ka wan u terem, kpa ka wan u ngôm ga, man a hingir kwase wam ye." 
Genesis20:13 Man er Aôndo A ne m dugh hen ya u terem, m zenden wue wue yô, m kaa a na mer: Kwagh u ú erem man á doom yô, hanma ijiir i sea za yô, ú ôr sha kwagh wam wer: Un ka anngôm." 
Genesis20:14 Tsô Abimeleki kôr iyôngo man abua man ikpan i nomso man i ukase na Aberaham, shi hide un a kwase na Sara kpaa." 
Genesis20:15 Abimeleki shi kaa a na er: Tar wam ungun sha ashe ou ne, hanma ijiir i i doo u yô, tema her je." 
Genesis20:16 Shi a kaa a Sara er: Nan yam anngôu agbenger a azurfa dubu ne, a̱ lu u kwagh u yisan ishigh hen mba ve lu her a we, man ú lu a ishô sha hanma gbenda cii." 
Genesis20:17 Tsô Aberaham sôn Aôndo, Aôndo war Abimeleki vea kwase na kua ikpan na i ukase, nahan ve gba maren." 
Genesis20:18 Gadia TER kondo usagh mba hen ya u Abimeleki ca ca, sha ci u kwagh u Sara, kwase u Aberaham." 
Genesis21:1 Tsô TER va sôr Sara er lu kaa nahan; TER er Sara kwagh u A vande teren la. 
Genesis21:2 Sara wa iyav mar Aberaham wannomso er a bee iyol nahan kpaa, sha shighe u Aôndo lu kaa un la vough." 
Genesis21:3 Aberaham ii wan na u i mar un la, ka u Sara mar un je la, iti er Isaka." 
Genesis21:4 Aberaham tsôngo wan na Isaka zum u a kuma ayange anigheni yô, er Aôndo kaa un nahan." 
Genesis21:5 Aberaham lu anyom deri zum u i mar un wan na Isaka la. 
Genesis21:6 Man Sara kaa er: Aôndo erem m hingir ahanzwa, hanma or u nan ongo kpaa, ahan á gba nan zwa sha kwagh wam ne." 
Genesis21:7 Man a kaa er: Ka an man nan fetyô u kaan a Aberaham er: Sara una va ambe ônovo? Gadia m mar un wan er a bee iyol nahan kpaa. 
Genesis21:8 Wan la vese, de atumba. Tsô Aberaham er zegeiniongo sha iyange i Isaka de atumba la." 
Genesis21:9 Tsô Sara ta ashe za nenge wan u Hagar Wanigipiti, u a mar Aberaham la, lu numben;" 
Genesis21:10 nahan a kaa a Aberaham er: Zenda kpankwase ne vea wa na; wan u kpankwase ne a̱ de ye dyako vea wan wam Isaka imôngo ga. 
Genesis21:11 Kwagh la lu Aberaham kwagh u vihin tsung, gadia lu wan na je." 
Genesis21:12 Kpa Aôndo kaa a Aberaham er: Kwagh ne a̱ de kera vihin we sha ci u wan ne kua kwase wou ne kpaa ga; kwagh u Sara a kaa u cii, ungwa imo na, gadia ka ken Isaka je á va yilan er tsombor wou ye." 
Genesis21:13 Wan u kpankwase ne kpaa, Me er un una lu ikurior, sha ci u a lu vor wou yô." 
Genesis21:14 Tsô Aberaham mough pepe pepe, tôô bredi man isheghmnger, na Hagar, penda un sha vande kua wan la kpaa, maa a na un gbenda a yem. A mough a gba zenden wue wue ken desereti u Bersheba." 
Genesis21:15 Mngerem ma ken ishegh mara ma been yô, a gema wan a gbir hen ihuu." 
Genesis21:16 Tsô a kar a za tema ca er ikeren i ivaan yô; gadia a kaa er: Me nenge ku u wan ne ga. A za tema ken hemen kpuaa, a hembe mliam a gba vaan." 
Genesis21:17 Kpa Aôndo ungwa mliam ma wan la; tsô ortyom u Aôndo yila Hagar Sha, kaa a na er: Ka nyi i er uwe, Hagar? De cie ga, gadia Aôndo ungwa imo i wan henpe a lu la." 
Genesis21:18 Mough kôr wan la wa un sha ikum, gadia Me gema un una hingir ikurior i vesen." 
Genesis21:19 Tsô Aôndo bugh un ashe, a nenge a ijôr, a za iv mngerem shin ishegh, a na wan la, ma." 
Genesis21:20 Aôndo lu a wan la, lu vesen; a maa a tema ken desereti, a hingir or u keren avaan." 
Genesis21:21 A tema ken desereti u Paran; ngô na er kwase ken tar u Igipiti na un. 
Genesis21:22 Hen shighe la, Abimeleki man Pikol, kurutya u ikumutya na, ôr kwagh a Aberaham, kaa er: Aôndo ngu a we ken akaa a u eren cii." 
Genesis21:23 Yô, ma u shi bum a mo heen, sha ishigh ki Aôndo wer, ú kera er a mo dang ga, shin a ônov av, shin a tsombor wam kpaa ga; kpa sha erdoo u m er a we yô, kape we kpaa ú er a mo je la, kua a tar u u lu shir her ne kpaa." 
Genesis21:24 Aberaham kaa er: Me bum. 
Genesis21:25 Tsô Aberaham zôhô a Abimeleki sha kwagh u ijôr i mbatomov mba Abimeleki ngohol sha apera la. 
Genesis21:26 Abimeleki gema kaa er: M fa or u nan er kwagh ne ga; we kpaa u kaam ga, mo kpaa, m ungwa ga, saa nyian." 
Genesis21:27 Tsô Aberaham kôr iyôngo man abua, na Abimeleki; ve uhar ve ya ikur." 
Genesis21:28 Aberaham tsegha utulembaiyôngov utaankaruhar ken uile. 
Genesis21:29 Tsô Abimeleki pine Aberaham er: Inja i utulembaiyôngov utaankaruhar mba u tsegh ne yô, ka nyi?" 
Genesis21:30 A kaa er: Utulembaiyôngov utaankaruhar mban, ngohol ve sha ikev yam, i̱ hingir mo ikav er i lu mo m tim ijôr ne yô." 
Genesis21:31 Kape i lu man i yer ijiir la iti er Bersheba la; gadia ka heregh man ve uhar cii ve bum ye. 
Genesis21:32 Kape ve ya ikur hen Bersheba la. Nahan Abimeleki mough vea Pikol kurutya na, ve hide ken tar u Mbafiliti." 
Genesis21:33 Tsô Aberaham môôr kon u tsamia hen Bersheba, hen ijiir la, a yila sha iti i TER, Aôndo u tsôron." 
Genesis21:34 Aberaham lu shir ken tar u Mbafiliti ayange kpishi. 
Genesis22:1 Tsô ken masetyô u akaa ne yô, Aôndo kar Aberaham, kaa a na er: Aberaham! A kaa er: Een." 
Genesis22:2 A kaa er: Tôô Isaka wan wou u môm môm u a doo u ishima la, yem ken tar u Moria, za na nagh ku nanden a mi sha uwo ugen u Me tese u yô." 
Genesis22:3 Tsô Aberaham mough pepe pepe kange jaki na shidi; a mough a mbayev nav uhar kua Isaka wan na; a ar ikon sha ci u nagh ku nanden; a gba zan hen ijiir i Aôndo tese un la. 
Genesis22:4 Sha iyange i sha utar la, Aberaham ta ashe za nenge a ijiir la ca je." 
Genesis22:5 Tsô Aberaham kaa a mbayev nav mbala, er: Lu nen heen a jaki, mo vea wanakiriki ne sé za shara, sé za civir Aôndo man sé hide sé va kohol ne ye." 
Genesis22:6 Aberaham tôô ikon i nanden nagh penda wan na Isaka sha vande, un iyol na yô, kôr usu man ihô sha uwe; tsô ve uhar cii, ve gba yemen imôngo." 
Genesis22:7 Nahan Isaka ôr kwagh a ter na Aberaham kaa er: Terem. A rumun er: Een, wan wam. A kaa er: Usu ngun man ikon kpaa ngin, man waniyôngo u á za nande nagh a mi yô, ngu hana?" 
Genesis22:8 Aberaham kaa er: Aôndo Una na waniyôngo u nanden nagh a mi iyol Na, wan wam; tsô ve gba yemen imôngo ve uhar cii." 
Genesis22:9 Nahan ve za ar hen ijiir i Aôndo kaa un la; Aberaham ta atse heregh, a wa ikon vôôr vôôr, akange wan na Isaka a penda un sha atse, sha ikon la." 
Genesis22:10 Tsô Aberaham za uwegh tôô ihô sha u una sôngo wan na. 
Genesis22:11 Kpa ortyom u TER yila un Sha, kaa er: Aberaham! Aberaham! A rumun er: Een." 
Genesis22:12 A kaa er: De ze uwegh ough sha wanakiriki ga, shi de eren un ma kwagh kpaa ga; gadia hegen yô, M fa u ngu or u cian Aôndo sha er u nyumum wan wou u môm môm kpaa ga yô." 
Genesis22:13 Aberam kenden ashe sha yô, a nenge nomiyôngo ken ijime na wever akor ken ageva. Tsô Aberaham za, za kôr iyôngo la, va na nagh ku nanden a mi sha ityough ki wan na." 
Genesis22:14 Aberaham maa ii ijiir la iti er Yehova-yire (TER Una na kwagh u a gbe yô); ka nahan man zan zan nyian i kaan er: Sha uwo u TER yô, á na kwagh u a gbe yô." 
Genesis22:15 Ortyom u TER yila Aberaham Sha, myer u sha kwa har," 
Genesis22:16 kaa er: TER kaa er: M bum iyol Yam je, er u er kwagh ne nahan, u nyumum wan wou u môm môm ga yô," 
Genesis22:17 Me ver u doo doo, Me seer tsombor wou iyenge er asan a Sha man er waarawa u shin kpezegemnger nahan; tsombor wou ua ngohol hundagar u mbaihomov mba u, ua hingir u ve;" 
Genesis22:18 nahan akuraior a sha won cii aa zua a iveren ken tsombor wou, sha ci u, u we imo Yam iko yô." 
Genesis22:19 Tsô Aberaham hide va kohol mbayev nav; ve mough ve hide imôngo hen Bersheba; Aberaham maa tema hen Bersheba. 
Genesis22:20 Tsô ken masetyô u akaa ne yô, i va kaa a Aberaham er: Nenge, Milka un kpaa a mar anngôu Nahor, ônov;" 
Genesis22:21 wan na u iunda ka Use man anngô na Buse, man Kemuel ter u Aram," 
Genesis22:22 man Kesedi man Haso man Pilda man Yidela man Betuel; 
Genesis22:23 Betuel gema mar Rebeka. Mba anigheni mban, Milka mar ve a Nahor anngô u Aberaham." 
Genesis22:24 Kwase u sha uika u i yilan un iti er Reuma la, mar Tebaha man Gaham man Tahashi kua Maaka." 
Genesis23:1 Mtse u Sara sha won cii, lu anyom deri man ikundu kar ataankarahar; ka iyenge i anyom a uma u Sara sha won je la." 
Genesis23:2 Sara kpe ken Kiriati-arba, ka Heberon je la, ken tar u Kanaan; Aberaham nyôr gba zungwen ku u Sara vaan un." 
Genesis23:3 Tsô Aberaham mough hen ku na la, za ôr kwagh a Mbahiti, kaa er:" 
Genesis23:4 Mo m ngu orvannya man shiror hen a ven; yô, nam nen ijiir i iwaregh her a ven, i̱ hingir i yam je, sha u me ii ku wam kera yô." 
Genesis23:5 Tsô Mbahiti gema ôr kwagh a Aberaham, kaa a na er:" 
Genesis23:6 Ungwa imo yase, tere; we u ngu ityough ki orough hen vese; yô, ii ku wou shin uwar wase u hemban la; man se kpaa, ma or u nana nyume u uwar u nan, er u̱ de iin ku wou ga yô, nan ngu ga." 
Genesis23:7 Tsô Aberaham mough, gure civir ior mba hen tar la, ka Mbahiti je la." 
Genesis23:8 A shi a ôr kwagh a ve, a kaa er: Aluer a lu ishima yen u m̱ ii ku wam kera yô, ungwa nen imo yam, ôr nen a Eferon wan u Sohar," 
Genesis23:9 a̱ nam bar u Makpela, u a lu a mi, u a lu hen ikighir i tar na la, sha ishe na vough, a̱ hingir u wam, a̱ lum ijiir i iwaregh hen a ven." 
Genesis23:10 Eferon kpaa tema lu hen atô u Mbahiti; tsô Eferon Orhiti gema kaa a Aberaham sha ato a Mbahiti, ka mba ve lu karen nyôron sha hundagar na la cii er:" 
Genesis23:11 Nahan ga terem, ungwa imo yam; tiôntar ne m na u, kua bar u a lu heregh la kpaa, m na u; m ngu nan we un sha ishigh ki ior av; ii ku wou." 
Genesis23:12 Tsô Aberaham gure sha ishigh ki ior mba ken tar la. 
Genesis23:13 A ôr kwagh a Eferon kpaa, sha ato a ior mba ken tar la, a kaa er: We kpaa, ma u shi ongo imo yam; me na u inyaregh ki sha ijiir la, ngohol; yô, me ii ku wam her." 
Genesis23:14 Eferon gema ôr kwagh a Aberaham, kaa a na er:" 
Genesis23:15 Terem, ver ato hen mo: Tiôntar u ishe na i kom azurfa ushekel deri unyiin ne, we vea mo yum nahan, ngun gba nyi? Gba iin ku wou tsô." 
Genesis23:16 Aberaham ungwa imo i Eferon; nahan Aberaham kar Eferon inyaregh ki a ter sha ato a Mbahiti la, ka azurfa ushekel deri unyiin, ka inyaregh ki i eren kasua a min je la." 
Genesis23:17 Nahan tiôntar u Eferon u a lu ken Makpela sha ishigh ki Mamre, tar la, man bar u a lu kimi kua ikon cii, i i lu ken tiôntar la cii kpaa," 
Genesis23:18 i na Aberaham hingir kwagh na, sha ishigh ki Mbahiti, sha ashe a mba ve lu karen nyôron sha hundagar na cii." 
Genesis23:19 Tsô ken masetyô la, Aberaham ii kwase na Sara ken bar u tiôntar u Makpela sha ishigh ki Mamre, ka Heberon je la, ken tar u Kanaan." 
Genesis23:20 Tiôntar la man bar u a lu ker la, Mbahiti gema na Aberaham hingir ijiir i iwaregh na jim je." 
Genesis24:1 Aberaham bee iyol, a tsa sha won. TER lu veren Aberaham doo doo sha akaa cii." 
Genesis24:2 Nahan Aberaham kaa a wanakiriki na u vesen u hen ya na, u akaa na cii lu sha ikev na la, er: Shi verem uwegh ough hen ikooso;" 
Genesis24:3 yô, m̱ er a we, bum TER, Aôndo u Sha man Aôndo u tar, wer, ú er wan wam kwase ken ônkasev mba Mbakanaan, mba m tem hen ve ne, ga;" 
Genesis24:4 kpa ú za ken tar wam, ken ityô yam, ka keela man ú za er wan wam Isaka kwase ye." 
Genesis24:5 Wanakiriki na la, gema kaa a na er: Alaghga kwase la una rumun u van a mo imôngo ken tar ne ga; nahan yô, m̱ hide a wan wou ken tar u u dugh la zee?" 
Genesis24:6 Aberaham kaa a na er: Ver ishima, de kera hidi a wan wam keela ga." 
Genesis24:7 TER, Aôndo u Sha, u A due a mo hen ya u terem, ken tar u i marem la, A ôr kwagh a mo man A bum a mo, A kaa er: Me na tsombor wou tar ne; ka Un je Una tindi ortyom Na Una hemen we, ú za er kwase keela ú na wan wam ye." 
Genesis24:8 Man aluer kwase la una rumun u van a we imôngo ga yô, ú lu a ishô sha mbum wam ne; saa di mhir tsô, ú hire a wan wam keela ga ye." 
Genesis24:9 Tsô wanakiriki la ver ter na Aberaham uwegh hen ikooso, bum a na sha kwagh la." 
Genesis24:10 Nahan wanakiriki la kôr urakumi pue ken urakumi mba ter na, maa a mough; a tôô hanma injakwagh i dedoo i ter na; tsô a kôr gbenda a gba yemen ken Mesopotamia, hen gar u Nahor." 
Genesis24:11 A er urakumi ve gure inya ken akôngo a gar, hen kpejôr, aikighe, shighe u kasev ka ve zan mngerem ma za kesen la." 
Genesis24:12 A kaa er: TERE, Aôndo, u terem Aberaham, ma U shi doom ikôr nyian, ma i doo U a terem Aberaham!" 
Genesis24:13 Nenge, mo m ngun m til hen kpe u imbormnger heen je; ônkasev mba ior mba hen gar ne mba duen van mngerem ma kesen." 
Genesis24:14 Yô, na er iniunkwase i me kaa a i mer: Shi shir ityegh ki mngeregh you m̱ ma; man ia kaa er: Ma, me na urakumi ou kpaa, ve̱ ma yô, i̱ lu i U tsegh sha ci u wanakiriki wou Isaka je la; ka sha kwagh ne je, me fa er i doo U a terem ye." 
Genesis24:15 Er a lu a kure kwaghôron ga je tsô, Rebeka u Betuel wan u Milka, kwase u Nahor, anngô u Aberaham, mar un la, va due a ityegh ki mngeregh sha vande." 
Genesis24:16 Wankwase la doo ashe tsung, lu iniun je, lu a fa nom ga; a hungwa shin imbormnger la, za kese mngerem shin itye poo, a hide a due sha won." 
Genesis24:17 Tsô wanakiriki la kura ayem za kohol un, kaa a na er: Ma m shi me anmnger shin ityegh you." 
Genesis24:18 A kaa er: Ma, orvesen wam; tsô a shir ityegh fese, a kôr a na un a ma." 
Genesis24:19 Ne un mngerem, me yô, a kaa er: Me kese me na urakumi ou kpaa ve̱ ma i̱ kuma ve." 
Genesis24:20 A gema mngerem ma shin ityegh nagh a haa shin tso fese, shi a hide shin ijôr ayem, a za kese mngerem; a kese a haa urakumi nav cii." 
Genesis24:21 Tsô or la hôn ashe sha a na, lu ving, sha u una fa shin TER na ikôr doo un sha zende na ve shinii?" 
Genesis24:22 Tsô urakumi mba til mngerem ma man yô, or la tôô kunya u zenaria u wan sha ihinga, myohom ma u kuma veghershekel je, man ahye ahar a wan ken ave, myohom ma a kuma ushekel mba zenaria pue." 
Genesis24:23 A kaa er: U ngu wan u ana? Shi kaam yôô. Ijiir ngi hen ya u teru er sé tsa je kpa? 
Genesis24:24 A kaa a na er: Mo m ngu wan u Betuel wan u Milka, u a mar a Nahor yô." 
Genesis24:25 Shi a kaa a na er: Se mba a adenga a alakema man kwaghyan u uile kpishi kua ijiir i tsan kpaa. 
Genesis24:26 Tsô or la wa ityough inya, gure civir TER." 
Genesis24:27 Man a kaa er: I̱ wuese TER, Aôndo u terem Aberaham, u A bunde erdoo man mimi Na a terem ga yô; mo yô, TER hemen mo sha gbenda zan zan va nyôr a mo hen ya u anmgbianev mba terem." 
Genesis24:28 Tsô wankwase la gber ayem, za ôr mba hen ya u ngô na akaa la." 
Genesis24:29 Rebeka lu a anmgbian iti na er Laban; tsô Laban due ayem, za hen or la hen kpe u imbormnger la." 
Genesis24:30 Er a nenge kunya la man ahye la sha ave a anngô na, man er a ungwa kwaghôron u anngô na Rebeka, lu ôron la er: Ka ape or la er kwagh a mo ne, nahan a za hen or la; ngula tile her, a urakumi hen kpe u imbormnger." 
Genesis24:31 A kaa er: Nyôr, we or u lun a iveren i TER! Ka nyi u til ken wono? Gadia m vande sôron ya kua ijiir i urakumi kpaa, m ver a ver." 
Genesis24:32 Tsô or la nyôr ken ya, i sagh urakumi ikav; i va a adenga a alakema man kwaghyan sha ci u urakumi, man mngerem ma ôôn angahar a na kua angahar a mba ve lu a na imôngo yô." 
Genesis24:33 I ver un kwaghyan inya er a̱ ya; kpa a kaa er: Me ya ve ga, saa me vande ôron kwagh u m ve ne ve. A kaa er: Yô, ôr ase je." 
Genesis24:34 A kaa er: Mo m ngu wanakiriki u Aberaham. 
Genesis24:35 TER ver terem doo doo tsung je, a hingir shagbaor; shi A na un akum a iyôngo kua abua man azurfa kua zenaria man ikpan i nomso man i ukase man urakumi kua ujaki." 
Genesis24:36 Man Sara kwase u terem mar terem wan, zum u a bee iyol la; man a gema akaa a a lu a mi cii a na un." 
Genesis24:37 Terem erem m bum; a kaa er: De eren wan wam kwase ken ônkasev mba Mbakanaan, mba m tem ken tar ve ne ga," 
Genesis24:38 kpa za ken ya u terem ken ityô yam, za er wan wam kwase ker." 
Genesis24:39 Yô, m gema m kaa a terem mer: Alaghga kwase la nana rumun u van a mo imôngo ga." 
Genesis24:40 A kaa a mo er: TER u m zenden sha ishigh Nagh ne, Una tindi ortyom Na a we imôngo, Una doo u ikôr sha gbenda wou, ú er wan wam kwase ken ityô yam, ken ya u terem je;" 
Genesis24:41 nahan ú lu a ishô sha mbum u u bum a mo ne, zum u ú za ken ityô yam la; aluer vea na u ga yô, ú lu a ishô sha mbum u u bum a mo ne." 
Genesis24:42 Nyian yô, m va ar hen imbormnger ne; yô, m kaa mer: TERE, Aôndo u terem Aberaham, aluer Wea doom ikôr sha gbenda wam u m ve ne yô," 
Genesis24:43 m ngun m til hen kpe u imbormnger heen ne; yô, na er iniunkwase i ia due sha u va kesen mngerem, i me kaa a i mer: Ma m shi me anmnger shin ityegh you;" 
Genesis24:44 man ia kaa a mo er: Ma, man me kese me na urakumi ou kpaa yô, na, ingila i̱ lu iniunkwase i TER A tsegh sha ci u wan u terem yô." 
Genesis24:45 Er m lu a kure kwaghôron la ken ishima yam ga je tsô, nenge, Rebeka due a ityegh ki mngeregh nagh sha vande, a hungwa shin imbormnger la, a kese mngerem; mo kpaa m kaa a na mer: Ma m shi me." 
Genesis24:46 Tsô a shir ityegh ki mngeregh nagh fese, a kaa er: Ma, shi me na urakumi ou kpaa ve̱ ma; tsô m ma, a shi a na urakumi kpaa ma." 
Genesis24:47 Tsô m pine un mer: U ngu wan u ana? A kaa er: Ka wan u Betuel, wan u Nahor, u Milka a mar a na yô; tsô m wa un kunya sha ihinga man ahye sha ave na kpaa." 
Genesis24:48 Nahan m wa ityough inya, m gure m civir TER, m wuese TER, Aôndo u terem Aberaham, u A ze a mo sha gbenda u jighilii er, m̱ er wan u anngôm u terem a̱ lu kwase u wan na yô." 
Genesis24:49 Hegen yô, á lu ne ka eren a terem dedoo man sha mimi kpaa yô, kaam nen, man á lu nahan ga kpaa, kaam nen, sha u me gema ken iyan shin ken imese yô." 
Genesis24:50 Tsô Laban vea Betuel gema kaa er: Kwagh ne ka hen TER a dugh ye; se se fatyô u ôron we kwagh u bo shin u dedoo ga. 
Genesis24:51 Rebeka ngula, kua a na, yem a̱ za lu kwase u wan u teru, er TER kaa yô." 
Genesis24:52 Tsô zum u wanakiriki u Aberaham ungwa imo ve yô, a gure inya sha ishigh ki TER." 
Genesis24:53 Nahan wanakiriki la maa dugh inyarev mbi hweev mbi azurfa man mbi zenaria kua akondo kpaa, na Rebeka; shi a na anngô na kua ngô na iwua sha ikav mbi injaav." 
Genesis24:54 Tsô ve ya, ve ma, kua mba ve lu a na imôngo, ve tsa; kper nan ve nder pepe, nahan a kaa er: Nam nen gbenda m̱ yem hen terem."
