Genesis24:55 Tsô anngô na man ngô na, kaa er: De wankwase a̱ shi a̱ tsa a vese kpuaa, er ayange pue nahan; tsô una mase yemen." 
Genesis24:56 Kpa a kaa a ve er: De timbir nen mo ga, gadia TER verem doo doo sha gbenda wam; yô, de nen, m̱ yem hen terem." 
Genesis24:57 Ve kaa er: Yô, sé yila wankwase, sé ungwa imo na." 
Genesis24:58 Tsô ve yila Rebeka, ve pine un er: Ú yem a or ne imôngo zee? A rumun er: Me yem." 
Genesis24:59 Tsô ve na anngô ve Rebeka gbenda man yese na kua wanakiriki u Aberaham a ior nav kpaa. 
Genesis24:60 Ve ver Rebeka dedoo, ve kaa a na er: Anngô wase u kwase, za hingir ngô u udubu mba udubu pue; tsombor wou u̱ ngohol hundagar u mbaihomov vev, u̱ hingir u ve." 
Genesis24:61 Nahan Rebeka mough a mbayev nav mba kasev, henda urakumi, ve dondo sha or la. Kape wanakiriki la kua a Rebeka, ve yem la." 
Genesis24:62 Tsô Isaka due hen ian i Ber-lahai-roi; gadia a tema ken tar u Imbusutariyan la. 
Genesis24:63 Yô, Isaka due za ken akôngo aikighe sha u za henen kwagh; kenden ashe sha yô, a ta ashe a za nenge urakumi van." 
Genesis24:64 Rebeka kpaa kende ashe; nengen a Isaka yô, a hungwa sha rakumi." 
Genesis24:65 A gema a pine wanakiriki la er: Ka anti nan zenden ken akôngo, nan ve u va keghen se gbenda la? Wanakiriki la kaa er: Ka terem je la; tsô a tôô ikondo i yisan, a yisa ishigh nagh." 
Genesis24:66 Wanakiriki la ôr Isaka akaa a un er cii. 
Genesis24:67 Tsô Isaka va a na ken tenti u ngô na Sara; a kua a Rebeka, hingir kwase na; a doo un ishima. Isaka maa zua a msurshima sha ku u ngô na." 
Genesis25:1 Aberaham shi er kwase ugen, iti na er Ketura." 
Genesis25:2 A mar un Shimeran man Yokeshan man Medan man Midian man Ishebaki man Shua. 
Genesis25:3 Yokeshan mar Sekeba kua Dedan. Ônov mba Dedan yô, ka: Ashurim man Letushim kua Leumim." 
Genesis25:4 Ônov mba Midian yô, ka: Efa man Efer man Hanoki man Abida kua Eldaa; mban cii ka ônov mba Ketura." 
Genesis25:5 Aberaham gema akaa a na cii, na Isaka." 
Genesis25:6 Kpa ônov mba Aberaham mar a kasev nav mbagenev mbala yô, Aberaham na ve iwua; er a lu uma her la je, a na ve gbenda er ve̱ pav a wan na Isaka, ve̱ yem vegher u sha ityoughkitaregh ken tar u sha ityoughkitaregh la." 
Genesis25:7 Iyenge i anyom a mtse u Aberaham a tsa sha won yô, lu anyom deri man akunduatargber kar ataan." 
Genesis25:8 Tsô Aberaham sure; a tsa sha won man a mase kpen ye, hingir tamenor, bee iyol; a za kohol ior nav." 
Genesis25:9 Ônov nav Isaka man Ishemael, ve ii un ken bar u Makpela, ken tiôntar u Eferon wan u Sohar Orhiti, u a lu sha ishigh ki Mamre la." 
Genesis25:10 Ka tiôntar u Aberaham yam a Mbahiti je la; ka ker man i ii Aberaham kua kwase na Sara ye. 
Genesis25:11 Tsô ken masejime u Aberaham kpe kera yô Aôndo ver wan na Isaka doo doo; Isaka tema hen Ber-lahai-roi. 
Genesis25:12 Ingin ka icombor i Ishemael, wan u Aberaham, u Hagar, Wanigipiti, kpankwase u Sara, mar Aberaham ne:" 
Genesis25:13 Angan ka ati a ônov mba Ishemael, ka ati ve sha ikov ve ne: Waniunda u Ishemael yô, ka Nebayoti; u dondon yô, ka: Kedar man Adebeel man Mibesam" 
Genesis25:14 man Mishema man Duma man Masa," 
Genesis25:15 Hadadi man Tema man Yetur man Nafishi kua Kedema; 
Genesis25:16 mban ka ônov mba Ishemael, ka ati a ve je ne, sha agar a ve man afo a ve, uityombaiorov pue kar uhar, sha akur a ve." 
Genesis25:17 Angan ka anyom a Ishemael tsa ne: lu anyom deri man ikundugber kar ataankarahar; tsô a sure, a kpe, a za kohol ior nav." 
Genesis25:18 Ve tema twev vev, hii hen Havila zan zan za ar hen Shur u a lu sha ishigh ki Igipiti, sha ian i yemen sha Ashiria la. A tema sha ishigh ki anmgbianev nav cii." 
Genesis25:19 Ingin ka icombor i Isaka, wan u Aberaham ne: Aberaham mar Isaka." 
Genesis25:20 Isaka lu anyom akunduahar zum u a er wan u Betuel Orshiria u hen Padan-aram; ka Rebeka anngô u Laban Orshiria je la. 
Genesis25:21 Isaka zamber a TER sha ci u kwase na, gadia lu ikômkwase; TER kpaa rumun, ungwa zamber na, nahan kwase na Rebeka maa wa iyav." 
Genesis25:22 Tsô ônov gba keman ayol a ve ken iyav nav; nahan a kaa er: Er kwagh ne a va er nahan yô, ka nyi i erem nee? Tsô a za a za pine TER." 
Genesis25:23 TER gema kaa a na er: Ka akuraior ahar a lu ken iyav ou ye; akuraior ahar aa pav ken iyol you je; ikurior i môm ia hemba igen agee; u vesen la una shiren u kiriki. 
Genesis25:24 Tsô ayange nga kom a una mar yô, i kav un a ônov mba ahinav ken uya." 
Genesis25:25 U iunda la due nyian bong, iyol na cii lu er ka ikondo i aivegh yô, nahan i ii un iti er Isou." 
Genesis25:26 Ken masetyô la anngô na due, kôr uwegh sha ikishinguhar i Isou, nahan i ii un iti er Yakob; Isaka lu anyom akunduatar zum u a mar ve la." 
Genesis25:27 Mbayev mbala vese; Isou hingir ortato u fan ikôr; kpa Yakob yô, lu or u kumbur ga, teman ken utenti tsô." 
Genesis25:28 Isou doo Isaka ishima gadia un lu or u wan akor yum: Yakob yô, gema doo di Rebeka ishima." 
Genesis25:29 Yakob jiidi kwagh, tsô Isou za hide ken toho, a vôr." 
Genesis25:30 Nahan Isou kaa a Yakob er: Shi nam kwagh u nyian ashe ne, m̱ ya, gadia m vôr; ka nahan man i yila un iti er Edom ye." 
Genesis25:31 Yakob kaa er: Yô, vande teen mo dyako wou u waniunda la ve." 
Genesis25:32 Isou kaa er: Tsô, nenge, m ngu nôngon ku, dyako wam u waniunda la, una lum a inja sha nyi?" 
Genesis25:33 Yakob kaa er: Yô, vande bumun ase; nahan a bum a na, a tee Yakob dyako na u waniunda." 
Genesis25:34 Tsô Yakob na Isou bredi man alev a jiidi; a ya, a ma, a mough, a yem a nagh; kape Isou laha dyako na u waniunda la." 
Genesis26:1 Ijen gba ken tar la, kpa ka ijen i hiihii i i kôr sha ayange a Aberaham la ga. Tsô Isaka za hen Abimeleki, tor u Mbafiliti, hen Gerar." 
Genesis26:2 TER ande her a na, kaa er: De senen yemen shin Igipiti ga, kpa tema hen tar u Me kaa u yô." 
Genesis26:3 Lu shir ken tar ne, Mo kpaa Me lu a we, Me ver u doo doo; gadia ka we kua tsombor wou Me na ne ityar ne cii ye, Me taver mbum Wam, u M bum a teru Aberaham la;" 
Genesis26:4 Me seer tsombor wou iyenge er asan a Sha nahan, Me na tsombor wou ityar ne cii; akuraior a sha won cii, aa zua a iveren ken tsombor wou;" 
Genesis26:5 sha ci u Aberaham lu ungwa imo Yam, waan iko sha imo Yam man atindi Am man akaawan Am man atindiakaa Am." 
Genesis26:6 Isaka tema ken Gerar. 
Genesis26:7 Ior mba hen ijiir la mba pin un sha kwagh u kwase na yô, a kaa er: Ka anngôm u kwase; gadia lu cian u kaan er: Ka kwase wam; sha u ior mba hen ijiir la ve̱ de woom sha ci u Rebeka ga yô, kape a kaa la; gadia a doo ashe tsung." 
Genesis26:8 Tse hen ijiir la, ayange nga kar yô, Abimeleki tor u Mbafiliti, ta ashe hen ian i iyoughough za nenge Isaka lu numben a Rebeka, kwase na la." 
Genesis26:9 Tsô Abimeleki yila Isaka, kaa er: Ehee! Kwase ne ka u wou mimi je, ngun ve u kaan wer: Un ka anngôm u kwase yee? Isaka kaa a na er: M hen ken ishima mer: M̱ de kpe sha ci na ga." 
Genesis26:10 Abimeleki kaa a na er: Ka nyi u er a vese nahana? Ka ican u or ugen ma nan yav a kwase wou ga, nahan ma u hee se ibo iyol je." 
Genesis26:11 Nahan Abimeleki ta ior icin cii, kaa er: Or u nana bende or ne ave shin kwase na yô, á wua nan kpee." 
Genesis26:12 Isaka lôô iyiav ken tar la; hen inyom la, iyiav tser kwa akunduataan, gadia TER ver un doo doo." 
Genesis26:13 Or la seer a seer icivir yem hemen zan zan hingir zegeor," 
Genesis26:14 lu a akum a iyôngo man a abua, shi lu a mbatomov kpishi kpaa; nahan Mbafiliti mough iwuhe a na." 
Genesis26:15 Azôr a mbatomov mba ter na yan ve time sha ayange a ter na Aberaham la cii, Mbafiliti cir a, iv inya shin a." 
Genesis26:16 Tsô Abimeleki kaa a Isaka er: Yem hen vese kera, gadia u hemba se ca yum." 
Genesis26:17 Nahan Isaka mough heregh yem za haa afo shin pev u Gerar, tema her." 
Genesis26:18 Tsô Isaka shi bugh azôr a yan i dugh sha ayange a ter na Aberaham la, gadia Mbafiliti cir a, er Aberaham kpe kera la; a shi a yila a sha ati a ter na lu vanden yilan a la." 
Genesis26:19 Er mbatomov mba Isaka time hen pev la yô, ve dugh ijôr i saar mngerem." 
Genesis26:20 Nahan mbakuranilev mba hen Gerar mough ayôôso a mbakuranilev mba Isaka, gba kaan er: Mngerem man ka ma asem; nahan a ii ijôr la iti er Eseki, sha ci u ve hendan a na yô." 
Genesis26:21 Ve shi ve time ijôr igen, ngila kpaa shi ve kpelan, nahan a ii i iti er Setena." 
Genesis26:22 A kporom a shi a time ijôr igen, ngila yô, ve kera kpelan ga; a maa a ii i iti er Rehoboti, a kaa er: Hegen yô, TER bugh se ian gbangese, nahan á kpe se iyol ken tar ne." 
Genesis26:23 Tsô a mough heregh a va ken Bersheba. 
Genesis26:24 Hen tugh mbula je, TER ande her a na, kaa er: Ka Mo Aôndo u teru Aberaham, de cie ga, gadia M ngu a we, Me ver u doo doo, Me seer tsombor wou sha ci u wanakiriki Wam Aberaham." 
Genesis26:25 Tsô a ta atse a nanden nagh sha mi heregh, a yila sha iti i TER; a tim tenti na heregh; mbatomov mba Isaka dugh ijôr her." 
Genesis26:26 Tsô Abimeleki mough hen Gerar za her a na vea ikar na Ahusati kua kurutya na Pikol kpaa. 
Genesis26:27 Isaka kaa a na er: Ka nyi ne ve her a mo er ne kerem ihom ye, ne zenden her a ven kera?" 
Genesis26:28 Ve kaa er: Se nenge dedoo er TER A lu a we yô; yô, se kaa ser: Mbum ma a shi lu her atô wase, ka se a we je la; yô, sé ya ikur a we;" 
Genesis26:29 de eren se kwagh u bo ga, di er se kpaa se bende u ave ga, se er u kwagh u vihin ga, saa u dedoo tseegh, man se na u gbenda bem bem nahan; gayô, we u ngu a iveren i TER je." 
Genesis26:30 A yôr ve iwer, ve ya, ve ma." 
Genesis26:31 Kper nan ve mough pepe je, ve bum ayol a ve; tsô Isaka na ve gbenda, ve mough her a na bem bem." 
Genesis26:32 Sha iyange shon la je, mbatomov mba Isaka va, va ôr un kwagh u ijôr i ve dugh yô, ve kaa a na er: Se zua a mngerem shimi." 
Genesis26:33 A ii i iti er Sheba; ka nahan man i yer iti i gar la er Bersheba zan zan nyian ye. 
Genesis26:34 Zum u Isou lu anyom akunduahar yô, a er Yuditi wan u Beeri, Orhiti, man Basemati wan u Orhiti." 
Genesis26:35 Ve gema ve na Isaka vea Rebeka ishima i vihin kpishi. 
Genesis27:1 Tsô zum u Isaka bee iyol, ime kpaa wa un ashe, kera nengen ga la, a yila wan na u iunda Isou, a kaa a na er: Wan wam! Un kpaa a rumun er: Mo ne." 
Genesis27:2 A kaa er: Nenge, m bee iyol, m fa iyange i ku wam ga." 
Genesis27:3 Nahan yô, shi tôô ikav mbi tohov you, gbande avaan man ada, za ken toho za wua swase," 
Genesis27:4 erem kwaghyan u doon ken zwa, imba i m soo yô, vam a mi, m̱ ya, ishima yam i̱ ver u doo doo, er m lu a kpe ga ne." 
Genesis27:5 Yô, Rebeka lu ungwan er Isaka lu ôron kwagh a wan na Isou yô. Isou yem ken toho u za wuan swase, van a mi." 
Genesis27:6 Nahan Rebeka ôr kwagh a wan na Yakob, kaa er: Nenge, m ungwa teru ngu ôron kwagh a anngôu Isou, kaan er:" 
Genesis27:7 Vam a swase, erem kwaghyan u doon mo ken zwa m̱ ya, m̱ ver u doo doo sha ishigh ki TER, er m lu a kpe ga ne." 
Genesis27:8 Hegen yô, wan wam, ungwa imo yam sha kwagh u me wa u ne." 
Genesis27:9 Yô, za hen ikumuile, za vam a anivoov uhar, mba dedoo, m̱ er kwaghyan u doon ken zwa a mi, sha ci u teru, inja i i doon un la;" 
Genesis27:10 nahan ú gema ú za a mi hen teru, a̱ ya, a̱ ver u doo doo, er a lu a kpe ga ne." 
Genesis27:11 Yakob kaa a ngô na Rebeka er: Nenge, anngôm Isou ka or u lun a ice iyol, man mo m gema m kôngor iyol." 
Genesis27:12 Alaghga terem una pevem ave iyol, nahan me hingir un or u eren beer sha a na, me gema me haa ifan iyol, á kera lu iveren ga." 
Genesis27:13 Kpa ngô na kaa a na er: Ifan you i̱ hide sha a mo wan wam, gba eren sha imo yam tsô; za, za vam a mi." 
Genesis27:14 Tsô a za, a za kôr, a za na ngô na, ngô na er kwaghyan u doon ken zwa, inja i i doon ter na la." 
Genesis27:15 Nahan Rebeka tôô uicighanmbaakondov mba wan na u iunda Isou, mba ve lu hen na ken iyou yô, a haa Yakob wan na u kiriki la;" 
Genesis27:16 shi a tôô akôv a anivoov mbala, a cir un sha akaseaveegh man sha mon;" 
Genesis27:17 a gema inyam i doon ken zwa kua bredi u a er la, a na wan na Yakob." 
Genesis27:18 Tsô a za hen ter na, a kaa er: Tereme! Un kpaa rumun er: Een, ka we ana, wan wama?" 
Genesis27:19 Yakob kaa a ter na er: Ka mo wan wou u iunda Isou, m er kwagh u u kaam la ve; yô, mough ase, tema sha, ya swase wam ne sha er ú verem doo doo yô." 
Genesis27:20 Isaka kaa a wan na er: U er nan man u zough a mi fefa nahan, wan wama? A kaa a na er: Ka TER, Aôndo wou, A ne ikôr i diom nahan ye." 
Genesis27:21 Isaka kaa a Yakob er: Shi kporom ase heen, m̱ pev u ave iyol yôô; ka we wan wam Isou mimi je kpa!" 
Genesis27:22 Nahan Yakob za ikua ikua a ter na Isaka; tsô a pev un ave iyol a kaa er: Imo yô, ka imo i Yakob, kpa ave yô, gema ka ave a Isou." 
Genesis27:23 A kav er i lu un ga, sha ci u ave na lu a ice sha mi er ave a anngô na Isou yô; nahan a ver un doo doo." 
Genesis27:24 Shi a pine er: Ka we wan wam Isou mimi je he? A rumun er: Een, ka mo." 
Genesis27:25 A kaa er: Kporom a mi ikua ikua, m̱ ya swase u wan wam, sha er m̱ ver u doo doo yô. Tsô a kporom a mi her a na, a ya; shi a va na un wain kpaa, a ma." 
Genesis27:26 Ter na Isaka kaa a na er: Kporom, susem zwa yôô, wan wama." 
Genesis27:27 A kporom a suse un zwa; ongo ihuma i dedoo i akondo na yô, a ver un doo doo, a kaa er: Nenge, ihuma i wan wam ngi er ihuma i toho u TER A ver u doo doo yô;" 
Genesis27:28 Aôndo A̱ na u avure a Sha man inya i doon sule i shin tar, man iyiagh kua wain wuee kpaa." 
Genesis27:29 Ior ve̱ shiren we tom, akuraior kpaa, a̱ gure u inya. Lu ityough sha anmgbianev ou, ônov mba ngôu, ve̱ gure u inya. Hanma or u nana wa u ifan yô, ifan i̱ kôr nan; hanma or u nana ver u doo doo yô nana̱ lu a iveren." 
Genesis27:30 Tsô zum u Isaka veren Yakob been yô, Yakob mough sha ishigh ki ter na due; hen shighe la je, anngô na Isou maa hidi ikôr va nyer." 
Genesis27:31 Un kpaa, a er kwaghyan u doon ken zwa, a va a mi hen ter na, a kaa a ter na er: Terem a̱ mough, a̱ ya swase u wan na, sha er ú verem doo doo yô." 
Genesis27:32 Tsô ter na Isaka, kaa a na er: Ka we ana? A kaa er: Ka mo wan wou u iunda Isou je." 
Genesis27:33 Isaka cia sulugha, pine er: Ka an nan woo swase nan va nem m ye cii er u lu a ar ga la, m ver nan doo doo laa? Man iveren la, ia lu i nan kpee je." 
Genesis27:34 Zum u Isou ungwa kwaghôron u ter na yô, a ngor mliam genger genger sha ishima i vihin je, a kaa a ter na er: Mo kpaa, shi verem doo doo terem!" 
Genesis27:35 A kaa er: Anngôu va ngohol iveren sha icugh kera ve. 
Genesis27:36 A kaa er: Kera ka nahan man i yer un iti er Yakob ye gaa? Gadia ka kwa har je a mgbeghem kera ne; a ngohol dyako wam u waniunda, man nenge hegen a shi a ngohol iveren yam kpaa. A pine er: U shi shim ma iveren her gaa?" 
Genesis27:37 Isaka gema kaa a Isou er: Nenge, m vande veren un mer, a̱ lu ityough sha a we, m shi m na un anmgbianev nav cii, ve̱ hingir mbashiren un, man m koso un sha uyia kua wain; tsô we yô, me shi me er a we nana, wan wama?" 
Genesis27:38 Isou kaa a ter na er: U ngu a iveren i môm tsô, tereme? Mo kpaa, shi verem doo doo terem! Isou shi ngor mliam gba vaan." 
Genesis27:39 Ter na Isaka gema kaa a na er: Nenge, ijiir you i teman ia gba ca a inya i doon sule, i shin tar, man a avure a Sha kpaa." 
Genesis27:40 Ka sha sanker wou man ú lu uma ye, ú shiren anngôu kpaa; zum u ú kpoghol iyol yô, ú kende igbur na sha mon wou kera." 
Genesis27:41 Nahan Isou kôr Yakob ihom sha ci u iveren i ter na ver un la; man Isou kaa ken ishima na er: Ayange a zungwen ku u terem mgbôghom ve, tsô shighe la me wua anngôm Yakob." 
Genesis27:42 Er i va pase Rebeka kwaghôron u wan na u iunda Isou la yô, a tindi i za yila Yakob wan na u kiriki, a kaa a na er: Nenge anngôu Isou, ngu cirin we, veren ishima u wuan we." 
Genesis27:43 Hegen yô, wan wam, ungwa imo yam, mough, yevese yem hen anngôm Laban, ken Haran," 
Genesis27:44 za tema a na ayange kpeghee, zan zan num u anngôu u̱ mem;" 
Genesis27:45 zan zan ishima i vihin i anngôu a we i̱ kar kera, kwagh u u er un la a̱ hungul un ve; tsô me tindi i̱ za kua a we keregh; ka nyi man ne uhar cii né va saam kera iyange i mômô?" 
Genesis27:46 Rebeka kaa a Isaka er: Nyôrom iyol a ônkasev mba Mbahiti mban. Aluer Yakob una er kwase ken ônkasev mba Mbahiti, inja mban nahan, ken ônkasev mba hen tar ne yô, me shi me lu uma sha won sha ci u nyi?" 
Genesis28:1 Isaka yila Yakob ver un doo doo, wa un kwagh kaa er: De eren kwase ken ônkasev mba Kanaan ga." 
Genesis28:2 Mough yem ken Padan-aram hen ya u Betuel, ter u ngôu, za er kwase ken ônov mba Laban, anngô u ngôu." 
Genesis28:3 Aôndo Uhembanagee, A̱ ver u doo doo, A̱ ngee u ônov, A̱ seer we iyenge u hingir ikpila i akuraior yô," 
Genesis28:4 A̱ na u iveren i Aberaham, we a tsombor wou, sha u u̱ ya dyako u tar u u lu shir ker ne, u Aôndo lu na Aberaham yô." 
Genesis28:5 Tsô Isaka na Yakob gbenda; nahan a yem ken Padan-aram hen Laban wan u Betuel, Orshiria, anngô u Rebeka ngô u Yakob vea Isou la." 
Genesis28:6 Er Isou nenge Isaka ver Yakob doo doo na un gbenda er a̱ yem Padan-aram, a̱ za er kwase keregh, man lu veren un doo doo wan un kwagh kaan er: De eren kwase ken ônkasev mba Kanaan ga la," 
Genesis28:7 man a shi a nenge Yakob ungwa kwaghôron u ter man ngô na, je a yem Padan-aram kpaa," 
Genesis28:8 man er Isou nenge er ônkasev mba Kanaan ve doo ter na Isaka ga yô," 
Genesis28:9 Isou nyiishi yem hen Ishemael, za er Mahalata, wan u Ishemael, wan u Aberaham, anmgbian u Nebayoti, seer sha kasev mba un lu a mi la." 
Genesis28:10 Tsô Yakob mough hen Bersheba gba yemen ken Haran. 
Genesis28:11 A za ar hen ijiir igen a tsa heregh, gadia iyange i mire; a tôô iwen i môm ken awen a hen ijiir la, a ver, a penda ityough sha mi, a yav her." 
Genesis28:12 Mnyam cie un er gogo tuur shin inya, za suur ityough sha aôndo je; mbatyomov mba Shaav mba Aôndo gema lu unden man shi hungwan sha mi." 
Genesis28:13 Man TER tile sha ityough nagh kaa er: Mo M ngu TER, Aôndo u teru Aberaham, Aôndo u Isaka kpaa; tar u u yav her ne, Me na u u kua tsombor wou kpaa." 
Genesis28:14 Tsombor wou ua hingir er vuulevu u hen inya yô, ú samber je ú za ar ityôtar man ityoughkitaregh man imbusutarimese man imbusutariyan; ka ken a we kua ken tsombor wou je man akuraior a sha won cii aa zua a iveren ye." 
Genesis28:15 Nenge, M ngu a we, Me kuran we henpe ú za cii, Me shi Me hide a we ken tar ne kpaa; gadia Me undu u ga, saa Me kure kwagh u M kaa u ne ve." 
Genesis28:16 Tsô Yakob nder, a kaa er: Mimi je, TER ngu hen ijiir ne, man mo yô, m fa ga." 
Genesis28:17 Cier un iyol, a kaa er: Ijiir ne i cier iyolo! Ka ma kwagh ugen ga, ka iyou i Aôndo je, ka hunda u Sha je." 
Genesis28:18 Tsô Yakob mough pepe, a tôô iwen i a yav a penda ityough sha mi la, a tim i sha, er i̱ lu ikav i umbur; a haa mkurem sha ityough ki i." 
Genesis28:19 Shi a ii ijiir la iti er Betel; kpa kera yô, i vanden yilan gar la iti er Lushi." 
Genesis28:20 Man shi Yakob tsegha zwa, kaa er: Aluer Aôndo Una lu a mo, Una kuram sha gbenda u m ze ne, Una nam kwaghyan sha u m̱ ya, man akondo sha u m̱ zer." 
Genesis28:21 Zan zan mea hide hen ya u terem dedoo yô, nahan TER Una lu Aôndo wam," 
Genesis28:22 iwen i m tim i sha mer i̱ lu ikav i umbur ne yô, ia hingir iyou i Aôndo; man akaa a Ú nam cii, me tsuwa môm-ken-upue me na U." 
Genesis29:1 Tsô Yakob mough gba yemen sha tar u ior mba sha ityoughkitaregh la. 
Genesis29:2 Te ashe yô, a nenge ijôr ken ikôngo; akumauile atar gema yav hen kpe u i; gadia ka shin ijôr la man i naan akumauile mngerem ye; iwen i sha zwa u ijôr la gba ikôr kpishi." 
Genesis29:3 Zum u, akumauile cii a va kohol her yô, i menger iwen sha zwa u ijôr la kera, i na ilev mngerem, i shi i hide a iwen la sha zwa u ijôr her." 
Genesis29:4 Yakob pine ve er: Anmgbianev av, ne mba mba hana? Ve kaa er: Se mba mba ken Haran." 
Genesis29:5 Shi a pine ve er: Ne fa Laban wan u Nahor la kpa? Ve rumun er: Een, se fa un." 
Genesis29:6 Shi a pine ve er: Tsô ngu dedoo zee? Ve rumun er: Een, ngu dedoo; wan na u kwase Rahel ngula van a ilev la." 
Genesis29:7 A kaa er: Nenge, iyange ngi her je, shighe ngu a kuma u kohol ilev ga; yô, na nen iyôngo mngerem i̱ ma, shi za nen a i, i̱ za ya toho." 
Genesis29:8 Ve kaa er: Se fatyô ga, saa akumauile á vande kohol cii, man á menger iwen sha zwa u ijôr kera, man sé na iyôngo mngerem ye." 
Genesis29:9 Ngur ôron a ve nahan yô, Rahel va nyôr a iyôngo i ter na; gadia ka un kuran i ye." 
Genesis29:10 Tsô Yakob nengen a Rahel wan u Laban, anngô u ngô na, man iyôngo i Laban, anngô u ngô na yô, Yakob kporom menger iwen sha zwa u ijôr kera, na ilev mbi Laban anngô u ngô na la, mngerem." 
Genesis29:11 Tsô Yakob suse Rahel zwa, a gba vaan genger genger." 
Genesis29:12 Yakob ôr Rahel er un lu anngô u ter na yô, un ngu wan u Rebeka; tsô a za ayem, a za kaa ter na." 
Genesis29:13 Tsô Laban ongo kwagh u Yakob wan u anngô na u kwase yô, a za ayem, a za kegh un gbenda, a kuve un, a suse un zwa, a va nyôr a na hen ya na. Shi a ôr Laban akaa la cii." 
Genesis29:14 Laban kaa a na er: Mimi je, we, u ngu kuhe wam kua inyam yam kpaa. A tema a na kuma uwer môm." 
Genesis29:15 Tsô Laban pine Yakob er: Ka er u lu anngôm man u gbe eren mo tom gbilin tsô yee? Kaam ase injar i á kimbin we yô. 
Genesis29:16 Laban gema lu a ônov mba kasev uhar, iti i u vesen la er Lea, u kiriki la iti na er Rahel." 
Genesis29:17 Lea yô, ashe na lu fuu; kpa Rahel yô, kuma ashe, doo ashe kpaa." 
Genesis29:18 Rahel doo Yakob ishima; nahan, a kaa er: Me er u tom anyom ataankarahar sha ci u Rahel wan wou u kiriki la." 
Genesis29:19 Laban kaa er: Guda u me na u un a u me na orgen; lu a mo. 
Genesis29:20 Tsô Yakob er tom anyom ataankarahar sha ci u Rahel; er a doo un ishima yum yô, lu un er ka ayange kpuaa tsô yô." 
Genesis29:21 Nahan Yakob kaa a Laban er: Nam ase kwase wam, gadia ayange a i wam laa bee ve, m̱ tsa a na." 
Genesis29:22 Tsô Laban kohol ior mba hen ijiir la cii, er iniongo." 
Genesis29:23 Iyange i been yô, a tôô wan na Lea, a za na un, tsô a tsa a na." 
Genesis29:24 Laban gema Selpa kpan na u kwase, na wan na Lea, hingir kpan na." 
Genesis29:25 Sev mbu aven yô, gema lu Lea. Nahan a kaa a Laban er: Ka nyi u er a mo nahana? M er u tom, ka sha ci u Rahel gaa? Man ka nyi u gem u tsughum nahana?" 
Genesis29:26 Laban kaa er: Ka ieren yase ne ga, u vanden nan u kiriki kera a u vesen la." 
Genesis29:27 Yô, lu a na, ayange a ataankarahar a iniongo ne a̱ kure, tsô ngula kpaa sé na u, tsô ú shi ú erem tom anyom ataankarahar." 
Genesis29:28 Yakob er nahan, a lu a na ayange a ataankarahar a iniongo la; nahan a na un wan na Rahel kpaa, hingir kwase na." 
Genesis29:29 Laban shi gema Bila kpan na u kwase, na wan na Rahel, hingir kpan na." 
Genesis29:30 A tsa a Rahel kpaa; Rahel hemba doon un ishima a Lea; nahan shi a kimbir u eren un tom anyom ataankarahar. 
Genesis29:31 Er TER nenge i lu wan Lea iko ga yô, A bugh un sagh; kpa Rahel yô, gema lu ikôm." 
Genesis29:32 Tsô Lea wa iyav, mar wannomso, a ii un iti er Ruben; gadia a kaa er: TER nenge ican yam; hegen yô, me doo nomom ishima." 
Genesis29:33 Shi a wa iyav, a mar wannomso, a kaa er: TER ungwa, mba wan mo iko ga, ka nahan A shi A nem wan ne kpaa ye; maa a ii un iti er Shimeon." 
Genesis29:34 A shi a wa iyav, a mar wannomso, a kaa er: Hen zum ne yô, nomom una zua a mo, gadia m mar un ônov mba nomso utar; ka nahan man a ii un iti er Levi ye." 
Genesis29:35 Man a shi a wa iyav, a mar wannomso, a kaa er: Hegen yô, me wuese TER; ka nahan man a ii un iti er Yuda ye; tsô a tile mar." 
Genesis30:1 Tsô er Rahel nenge un mar Yakob ônov ga yô, Rahel gba nôngon anngô na iwuhe; a kaa a Yakob er: Nam ônov, gayô me kpe." 
Genesis30:2 Tsô Yakob nyoon ishima a Rahel gba kaan er: Mo m ngu er Aôndo u A nyim u ônov mba ken uya la, shinii?" 
Genesis30:3 A kaa er: Kpan wam u kwase Bila ngun, tsa a na, a̱ mar sha ikum yam, mo kpaa m̱ wa iyagh a na." 
Genesis30:4 Tsô a na un kpankwase na Bila, hingir kwase na, Yakob tsa a na." 
Genesis30:5 Bila wa iyav, mar Yakob wannomso." 
Genesis30:6 Tsô Rahel kaa er: Aôndo kurem ijir, A ungwa imo yam, A nam wannomso; ka nahan man a ii un iti er Dan ye." 
Genesis30:7 Bila kpankwase u Rahel shi wa iyav mar Yakob wannomso u sha uhar. 
Genesis30:8 Rahel kaa er: Ka sha iniôngon i tsung i m nenge a anngôm la, man m hembe un ye; ka nahan man a ii un iti er Nafetali ye." 
Genesis30:9 Er Lea nenge er un til mar yô, a tôô Selpa kpankwase na, a na Yakob, hingir kwase na." 
Genesis30:10 Selpa kpankwase u Lea la, mar Yakob wannomso." 
Genesis30:11 Tsô Lea kaa er: Ikôr doo ve! Maa a ii un iti er Gadi. 
Genesis30:12 Selpa kpankwase u Lea, shi mar Yakob wannomso u sha uhar." 
Genesis30:13 Nahan Lea kaa er: Saan mo iyol yum! Gadia ônkasev vea wuese er i saan mo iyol; maa a ii un iti er Asher. 
Genesis30:14 Tsô sha ayange a i lu sundan alakema la, Ruben za, za zôr mkehem ken toho, va a mi hen ngô na Lea. Tsô Rahel kaa a Lea er: Shi pandem mkehem ma wan wou ne he!" 
Genesis30:15 A kaa a na er: Mngohol u u ngohol mo nom ne yô, ka u kwagh u kiriki, sar u pe ngohol mkehem ma wan wam kpaa ha? Rahel kaa er: A lu nahan yô, nyian tugh a̱ tsa a we sha ci u mkehem ma wan wou la." 
Genesis30:16 Yakob za hidi ken toho aikighe yô, Lea za kegh un gbenda gba kaan er: Ka her a mo ú va tsa ye, gadia m goho u a goho sha mkehem ma wan wam je. Tsô hen tugh mbula a maa a tsa a na." 
Genesis30:17 Aôndo kpaa ver ato hen Lea, a wa iyav, a mar Yakob wannomso u sha utaan." 
Genesis30:18 Nahan Lea kaa er: Aôndo nam injar yam, sha er m ne nomom kpan wam u kwase; maa a ii un iti er Isakar." 
Genesis30:19 Lea shi wa iyav mar Yakob wannomso u sha ataratar. 
Genesis30:20 Tsô Lea kaa er: Aôndo nam iwua i dedoo, hegen yô, nomom una wa ikile her a mo, gadia m mar un ônov mba nomso ataratar; maa a ii un iti er Sebulon." 
Genesis30:21 Ken masetyô la, a mar wan u kwase, a ii un iti er Dina." 
Genesis30:22 Aôndo umbur Rahel, shi Aôndo wa un iko kpaa, nahan A bugh un sagh." 
Genesis30:23 A wa iyav, a mar wannomso. Nahan a kaa er: Aôndo kar a iheen yam kera ve," 
Genesis30:24 maa a ii un iti er Yosev; a kaa er, TER A̱ seer mo wannomso!" 
Genesis30:25 Rahel maren Yosev yô, Yakob kaa a Laban er: Nam gbenda, m̱ yem ken ya wam man ken tar wam kpaa." 
Genesis30:26 Nam ase kasev av man ônov av mba m er u tom sha ci u ve yô, m̱ yem; gadia we iyol you u fa tom wam u m er u yô." 
Genesis30:27 Tsô Laban kaa a na er: Aluer a shi doo u a mo yô, m nenge ikav er TER A verem doo doo sha ci wou yô." 
Genesis30:28 Shi a kaa er: Kaam injar you, me na u." 
Genesis30:29 A kaa a na er: We iyol you kpaa, u fa tom u m er u yô, man er mlu u ilev you mbi lu her a mo kpaa." 
Genesis30:30 Gadia er yan m lu a va ga la, kwagh u u lu a mi lu kpeghee tsô, kpa a gema a seer ngeen; TER ver u doo doo sha avindigh a am cii; tsô ka hanma shighe je, mo kpaa me koso ior mba hen ya wama?" 
Genesis30:31 Tsô a pine er: Ka nyi m̱ na uwe? Yakob kaa er: De nem kwagh môm ga; me shi me koson ilev you man shi me kuran mbi kpaa, aluer wea erem kwagh ne yô:" 
Genesis30:32 Me nyôr hen ilev you cii, nyian, me sange mbi lun amian amian man mbi lun abeen abeen, hanma iyôngo i il man hanma ivo i lun abeen abeen man amian kpaa, ka mbi mbia lu injar yam je la." 
Genesis30:33 Nahan perapera wam una erem shiada sha ayange a ken hemen, zum u ú va nenge injar yam yô; hanma ivo i i lu amian amian shin abeen abeen ga, man iyôngo i i lu il kpaa ga, aluer á zua a mi her a mo yô, hingir iv je ve." 
Genesis30:34 Laban kaa er: Doo yum, i̱ lu er u kaa nahan." 
Genesis30:35 Sha iyange la je, a sange ukpev mba anger anger kua abeen abeen man ungômbaivoov mba amian amian man abeen abeen, hanmô i i lu a ibeenegh ki pupuu iyol, man iyôngo i il cii; a gema i a na i sha ikev i ônov nav." 
Genesis30:36 Tsô a gbihi ian i kuman zende u ayange atar hen atô na vea Yakob. Yakob lu kuran ilev mbi Laban mbigenev mbi mbi shi her la. 
Genesis30:37 Tsô Yakob tôô anigboov mba ndorov mba kon u popeler man u amondi kua u pelatanu, a bugh ve avuu iyol, ihange ihange, due ken u kungun." 
Genesis30:38 A ver anigboov mba a bugh ve avuu la sha ishigh ki akumauile shin utso mba akumauile a ze, a za me mngerem ker yô; mbia za maan yô, mbi gba keren noov." 
Genesis30:39 Akumauile gba keren noov sha ishigh ki anigboov mbala, nahan akumauile mar mba lun anger anger man amian amian kua abeen abeen kpaa." 
Genesis30:40 Yakob pav aniyôngov ver ve kposo, man a gema ilev mbi ver ishigh ken mbi lun anger anger kua mbi iliv cii, mbi ken ikum i Laban la; a pav akum a na kposo, a zua a, a a Laban la ga." 
Genesis30:41 Tsô hanma shighe u ilev mbi taver ayol mbia keren noov yô, Yakob a ver mbi anigboov mbala sha ishi shin utso, sha u ve̱ keren noov hen atô u anigboov mbala." 
Genesis30:42 Kpa zum u ilev mbia kera taver iyol ga yô, a kera ver ve shimi ga; nahan mbi taver ga la, lu mbi Laban, kpa mbi taver mbila lu mbi Yakob." 
Genesis30:43 Nahan or la za hemen tsung, a zua a akumauile a tamen man ikpan i ukase man ikpan i nomso man urakumi kua ujaki kpishi kpaa." 
Genesis31:1 Tsô a ungwa alam a ônov mba Laban mba nomso, a ve lu kaan er: Yakob ngohol ter wase akaa cii; man ka sha inyaregh ki ter wase je, a hingir ornyar a mi yum ye." 
Genesis31:2 Yakob kpaa, er a nenge ishigh ki Laban yô, nenge, ki kera lu a na er ngise nahan ga." 
Genesis31:3 Tsô TER kaa er: Hide ken tar u uter ou, hen ityô you; Mo Me lu a we." 
Genesis31:4 Nahan Yakob tindi i za yila Rahel kua Lea er ve̱ va hen akôngo hen ilev nav; 
Genesis31:5 a kaa a ve er: M nenge ishigh ki ter wen, kera ki a mo er ngise nahan ga; kpa Aôndo u terem gema lu a mo." 
Genesis31:6 Ne ayol a en kpaa, ne fa er m lu eren ter wen tom sha agee am cii yô." 
Genesis31:7 Ter wen nzughul a mo, a gema injar yam acin pue je; kpa Aôndo na un ian i vihin mo kwagh ga." 
Genesis31:8 Ka una kaa er: Mbi amian amian mbi̱ lu injar you yô, nahan ilev cii i gba maren mbi lun amian amian; shi una kaa er: Mbi anger anger mbi̱ lu injar you yô, shi nenge, ilev cii mbi mar mbi lun anger anger." 
Genesis31:9 Kape Aôndo ngohol ilev mbi ter wen gema nam la. 
Genesis31:10 Zum u ilev lu keren noov la, m gema ashe ken mnyam ma cien, m nenge ukpev mba ve lu undun ilev cii, ve lu anger anger man amian amian man abeen abeen." 
Genesis31:11 Ortyom u Aôndo yilam ken mnyam ma cien mala er: Yakob; mo kpaa m rumun mer: Een. 
Genesis31:12 A kaa er: Gema ase ashe, nenge, ukpev mba ve undu ilev cii, ka mba anger anger man amian amian man abeen abeen; gadia M nenge kwagh u Laban a eren a we la cii." 
Genesis31:13 Ka mo, Aôndo u Betel, henpe yan u haa mkurem sha iwen, man u tsegha zwa a Mo la; yô, mough ase, due ken tar ne, hide ken tar u i mar u ker yô." 
Genesis31:14 Rahel vea Lea ve gema ve kaa a na er: Shi se mba a ma kwagh shin dyako hen ya u ter wasea? 
Genesis31:15 Kera nengen se er se mba un iorvannya tsô gaa? Gadia a tee se a tee je; inyaregh ki sha vese kpaa, a ya cii." 
Genesis31:16 Inyaregh ki Aôndo ngohol ter wase la cii yô, ka ki yasegh je, kua ki ônov asev kpaa; nahan hanma kwagh u Aôndo A kaa u yô, er je." 
Genesis31:17 Tsô Yakob mough, penda ônov nav kua kasev nav sha urakumi;" 
Genesis31:18 a kura uzendenya nav cii, man inyaregh nagh ki a kohol, uzendenya nav mba a zua a mi, mba a kohol hen Padan-aram la, sha u una yem hen ter na Isaka, ken tar u Kanaan yô." 
Genesis31:19 Er Laban yem sha u za tôndon iyôngo na aive yô, Rahel gema ii ter na terafim." 
Genesis31:20 Yakob er a Laban Orshiria sha ayom; a kera pase un er i lu un pe yemen nahan ga. 
Genesis31:21 Nahan a yevese a akaa a un lu a mi cii. A mough a per ifi u Uferati, a ver ishigh sha uwo u Gileadi." 
Genesis31:22 Sha iyange i sha utar la i za kaa Laban er Yakob a yevese yô. 
Genesis31:23 Nahan a mough a anmgbianev nav, a gba tôvon un angahar, kuma zende u ayange ataankarahar je; a za kohol un hen uwo u Gileadi." 
Genesis31:24 Tsô Aôndo va hen Laban Orshiria la ken mnyam ma cien tugh, kaa a na er: Kura iyol you, de er ma kwagh a Yakob ga, shin a lu u doon shin a lu u bo kpaa ga." 
Genesis31:25 Tsô Laban va kohol Yakob. Yô Yakob vande timin tenti na hen uwo la kera ve; nahan Laban a anmgbianev nav kpaa tim di mba vev her, hen uwo u Gileadi." 
Genesis31:26 Tsô Laban kaa a Yakob er: Inja na nan u er a mo sha ayom, u kerem ônov mba kasev er ka mbakwarev mba sha ishôm nahana." 
Genesis31:27 Er nan u yevese myer u yem her a mo sha ayom nahan; mkaa tsô kpaa, u shi kaam er ma m ne u gbenda a ahan zwa man a atsam man sha genga kua adiguve gaa?" 
Genesis31:28 Mrumun tsô kpaa, u rumun wer, m̱ va suse ônov av mba nomso man mba kasev zwa ga. U er ibumekwagh." 
Genesis31:29 M ngu a agee a eren ne kwagh u vihin; kpa Aôndo u ter wen, nyen ôr kwagh a mo tugh, kaa er: Kura iyol you, de er ma kwagh a Yakob ga, a lu u doon shin a lu u bo kpaa ga." 
Genesis31:30 Myem yô, u yem je ve, er ya u teru a sar u yum yô; man ka nyi u gem u iim mbaaôndoo?" 
Genesis31:31 Yakob gema kaa a Laban er: Ka sha ci u m lu cian mer, alaghga wea ngohol mo ônov ou mba kasev sha agee." 
Genesis31:32 Or u ú zua a mbaaôndo ou her a nan yô, nana kera lu uma ga; ker ase ikav yav sha ashe a anmgbianev asev je, tôô kwagh wou; kpa Yakob fa er i lu Rahel a ii ve ga." 
Genesis31:33 Tsô Laban nyôr ken tenti u Yakob man ken tenti u Lea man ken tenti u ikpan i ukase ihiar la, kpa a zua a mi ga. Dugh ken tenti u Lea yô, a kar a za nyôr ken tenti u Rahel kpaa." 
Genesis31:34 Rahel yô, tôô terafim la wa ken shidi u rakumi, tema sha mi. Laban pev akaa ken tenti wue wue kpa zua a mi ga." 
Genesis31:35 A kaa a ter na er: Terem a̱ de yugh er m fetyô u moughon tilen sha ishigh you ga ze, gadia gbaaôndo u ukase kôrom. A ker, kpa a zua a terafim la ga." 
Genesis31:36 Ishima nyoon Yakob, a zôhô a Laban. Yakob gema kaa a Laban er: Ibo yam ngi hana? Ka nyi kwaghbo je m er man u tevem ityô sha kume nahana?" 
Genesis31:37 Er u pev ikav yav cii, nahan yô, ka nyi kwagh i ken ya wou u zough a mini? Due a mi heen sha ashe a anmgbianev av kua a anmgbianev ou kpaa, ve̱ kure se kwagh." 
Genesis31:38 M tsa a we anyom ikundu je, ungômbaiyôngov ou man ungômbaivoov ou dugh iyav ga, anomaiyôngo ken ikumuile you kpaa, m ya ga." 
Genesis31:39 Kwagh u inyamikume i woo kpaa, m va na u ga, mo m kimbi a kimbi; kwagh u i ii kpaa, a lu atetan shin a lu tugh kpaa, u va ker her a mo." 
Genesis31:40 Kape m lu la; oo u shiin tan mo tetan; tugh yô, m tsa wuhe; mnyam kpaa ma kôrom ashe ga." 
Genesis31:41 Anyom ikundu angan, m lu hen ya wou; m er u tom anyom pue kar anyiin sha ci u ônov ou mba kasev uhar, anyom ataratar kpaa lu sha ci u ilev you; u gemam injar acin pue je." 
Genesis31:42 Ka er Aôndo u terem, Aôndo u Aberaham man Mcieryol u Isaka lu a mo yô, gayô, mimi je, hegen ma u nem gbenda aveve. Aôndo nenge zayol wam man tom u tsung u ave am, man nyen yange u tugh ye." 
Genesis31:43 Laban gema kaa a Yakob er: Ônkasev mban, ka mba av; mbayev mban kpaa, ka mba av; ilev mbin kpaa, ka mbi yav; akaa a u nengen a mi ne cii kpaa, ka a am je; ahegen yô, ônov av mba kasev mban kua ônov vev mba ve mar la, me er nan man me er ve kwagha?" 
Genesis31:44 Yô, sé ya ikur, mo vea we, i̱ hingir shiada hen atô wase." 
Genesis31:45 Nahan Yakob tôô iwen tim i sha er i̱ lu ikav i umbur. 
Genesis31:46 Tsô Yakob kaa a anmgbianev nav er: Kohol nen awen; nahan ve kura, ve va ta tihi, maa ve ya kwagh heregh." 
Genesis31:47 Laban ii un iti er Yegar-sahaduta; kpa Yakob yô, ii un iti er Galedi." 
Genesis31:48 Laban shi kaa er: Tihi ne ka shiada her atô wam a we nyian; ka nahan man a ii un iti er Galedi 
Genesis31:49 man shi Misepa kpaa ye, gadia a kaa er: TER A̱ kuran her atô wam a we, zum u se kera lu imôngo ga yô." 
Genesis31:50 Aluer ú er ônov av mba kasev ican, shi aluer ú er kasev mbagenev ú seer sha ônov av mban yô, shin or á kera lu a vese ga kpa, nenge, Aôndo ngu orshiada hen atô wam a we." 
Genesis31:51 Laban kaa a Yakob er: Nenge tihi awen ne, man iwen i m tim i sha mer i̱ lu ikav i umbur her atô wam a we ne." 
Genesis31:52 Tihiawen ne a̱ lu shiada, iwen i i tim i sha ne kpaa, i̱ lu shiada, mayange me aver tihiawen ne me za ker a we ga, we di kpaa, ú aver tihiawen ne, man iwen i i tim i sha ne, ú va her a mo a awashima u bo ga." 
Genesis31:53 Aôndo u Aberaham man Aôndo u Nahor, Aôndo u ter ve, A̱ ôr ijir her atô wase. Nahan Yakob maa bum Mcieryol u ter na Isaka." 
Genesis31:54 Tsô Yakob na nagh ku sôngon sha uwo la, a lôhô anngôôv nav er ve̱ va ya kwagh; ve va ya di je, maa ve tsa hen uwo la." 
Genesis31:55 Nahan Laban mough pepe pepe, suse ônov nav mba nomso kua mba kasev zwa, ver ve doo doo; tsô Laban kôr gbenda ikev, hire ken ya na." 
Genesis32:1 Tsô Yakob gba yemen, mbatyomov mba Aôndo va kohol un." 
Genesis32:2 Yakob nengen a ve yô, a kaa er: Ka ikumior i Aôndo je; a maa a ii ijiir la iti er Mahanaim." 
Genesis32:3 Yakob tindi mbazan a loho er ve̱ hemen ve̱ vande za nyôron hen anngô na Isou ken tar u Seir, ipaventar u Edom la." 
Genesis32:4 A kaa a ve er: Kaa nen terem Isou nahan ner: Wanakiriki wou Yakob ngu kaan nahan er: M tsa shir hen Laban je m lu ker zan zan nyian; 
Genesis32:5 m ngu a abua man ujaki man akumaiyôngo kua ivo man ikpan i nomso man i ukase; yô, m tindi mer, i̱ za kaa terem, sha u ma i doo u a mo." 
Genesis32:6 Tsô mbazan a loho mbala hide hen Yakob va kaa er: Se za nyôr hen anngôu Isou, ngu van je, u va keghen we gbenda a ior deri unyiin a na ityô." 
Genesis32:7 Nahan cier Yakob iyol kpishi, ishima gba nyian un; ior mba ve lu a na man akumaiyôngo kua ivo man abua kua urakumi kpaa, a pav ve akum ahar;" 
Genesis32:8 a hen er: Aluer Isou una va due sha ikum i môm una ta num sha mi yô, ikum i i shi la i̱ war." 
Genesis32:9 Yakob kaa er: Aôndo u terem Aberaham, Aôndo u terem Isaka, TERE, We u U kaa a mo Wer: Hire hen ya wou man hen ityô you, Me ver u doo doo," 
Genesis32:10 mo m kuma sha erdoo ne cii, man sha mimi ne cii, u U er a wanakiriki wou ne ga; gadia iyange m peren Yordan ne yô m lu a aga tseegh, man hegen yô, hingir akum ahar je." 
Genesis32:11 Shi yimam sha ikev i anngôm, sha ikev i Isou; gadia m ngu cian un mer, a̱ de va te num sha a mo, a̱ wuan ngô a ônov ga." 
Genesis32:12 Ka We je, U kaa Wer: Mimi je, Me er a we dedoo, Me gema tsombor wou ua hingir er waarawa u zegemnger u i fetyô u ôron u ga, sha ci u mngee u u yô." 
Genesis32:13 Tsô maa a tsa heregh; akaa a a lu a mi kpaa, a tsuwa kwagh ker u za sughun anngô na Isou a mi;" 
Genesis32:14 ungômbaivoov deri uhar man ukpev ikundu, ungômbaiyôngov deri uhar man anomaiyôngo ikundu," 
Genesis32:15 ungômbaurakumi mba amben atumba ikundugber a ônov vev, ungômbaabuav akunduahar, anomabua pue, anmgbianajaki ikundu man agumajaki pue." 
Genesis32:16 A gema a, a na sha ikev i mbatomov, akum akum; a kaa a mbatomov nav er: Hemen nen je, man shi ver nen akum akum a̱ gba angbar." 
Genesis32:17 A kaa a u sha hemen la er: Zum u anngôm Isou una kohol we, una pine u er: We u ngu u ana? Man ka han u zee, man akaa a a lu u sha hemen la ka a ana?" 
Genesis32:18 Nahan kaa wer: Ka a wanakiriki wou Yakob; ka ishughun i i tindi terem Isou a mi yô; nenge, un iyol na kpaa ngu van se ijime je." 
Genesis32:19 Shi a kaa a u sha uhar man u sha utar kua mba ve dondo sha akumauile la cii, er: Kape nea kohol Isou ve, kaa nen un la;" 
Genesis32:20 kaa nen ner: Wanakiriki wou Yakob kpaa ngu se ijime je. Gadia a kaa er: Me wam un sha ishughun i i vande hemen la, tsô me mase nengen ishigh nagh, alaghga una rumun mo." 
Genesis32:21 Tsô ishughun la kar vande hemen a na; kpa un iyol na yô, a tsa hen afo tugh mbula." 
Genesis32:22 A mough tugh mbula je, a kasev nav uhar, man ikpan na i ukase ihiar, kua ônov nav pue kar môm, a per hen ihongo i Yaboki." 
Genesis32:23 A kua a ve, a na ve gbenda er ve̱ per ifi; akaa a un lu a mi cii kpaa, i per a mi." 
Genesis32:24 Yakob mase lun her tswen; tsô or va nôngo wav a na zan zan sev sôôn aven. 
Genesis32:25 Man er nan nenge er nan hembe un ga yô, nan gema nan kôr un hen ijuwan i ikooso, nahan ijuwan i ikooso i Yakob maa ndivir er a lu nôngon wav a nan la." 
Genesis32:26 Nan kaa er: Pasem, gadia sev mbu aven. Kpa a kaa er: Me pase u ga, saa ú verem doo doo ve." 
Genesis32:27 Nan pine un er: Iti you er ana? A kaa er: Ka mo Yakob. 
Genesis32:28 Nan kaa er: Á kera yilan we iti er Yakob ga, kpa á yilan we er Iserael, gadia u nôngo wav a Aôndo kua ior, u hemba kpaa." 
Genesis32:29 Yakob pine un er: Shi kaam iti you. Nan kaa er: Inja na nan man u pin iti yama? Tsô maa nan ver un doo doo hen ijiir la. 
Genesis32:30 Yakob maa ii ijiir la iti er Peniel; gadia a kaa er: M zua ishigh a Aôndo, nahan kpaa, uma wam war." 
Genesis32:31 Iyange due un shighe u a va kar hen Peniel, a lu keer ikooso la." 
Genesis32:32 Kape i lu man Mbaiserael ve kera ye igbela i ikooso, i hen ijuwan i ikooso la ga, zan zan ainge ne, sha ci u nan kôr Yakob hen ijuwan i ikooso, hen ape igbela i ikooso i lu la." 
Genesis33:1 Yakob te ashe nengen Isou van a ior deri unyiin a na ityô yô, a pav ônov a wa sha ikev i Lea man Rahel man ikpan i ukase ihiar la." 
Genesis33:2 A ver ikpan i ukase la a ônov vev sha hemen, Lea vea ônov nav ve dondo, Rahel vea Yosev ve mase." 
Genesis33:3 Un iyol na kar hemen ve, gba guren tan inya kwa taankaruhar je, zan zan za mgbôghom a anngô na." 
Genesis33:4 Isou kura ayem za kohol un kuve un, kamber un ave sha mon, gba susen un zwa; tsô ve gba vaan." 
Genesis33:5 A ta ashe a nenge kasev a ônov mbala, a kaa er: Mban mba ve lu a we ne yô, ka unô? A kaa er: Ka ônov mba Aôndo A zungu wanakiriki wou mhôônom a mi yô." 
Genesis33:6 Tsô ikpan i ukase kporom a ônov vev, ve gure inya;" 
Genesis33:7 Lea kpaa kporom a ônov nav ve gure inya; ken masejime la yô, Yosev kpaa kporom vea Rahel va gure inya." 
Genesis33:8 Nahan a pine er: Awashima wou a ikpelaakaa i m zough a mi la yô, ka nana? A kaa er: Ka sha u ma i doo terem a mo yô." 
Genesis33:9 Isou kaa er: M ngu a kwagh kumam anngôm; kwagh u u lu a mi yô, a̱ lu u wou tsô." 
Genesis33:10 Yakob kaa er: Ei, aluer hegen i doo u a mo yô, shi ngohol ishughun yam i sha uwegh agh ne, gadia m nenge ishigh you je er i nengen a ishigh ki Aôndo nahan, shi doo u a mo kpaa." 
Genesis33:11 Yô, shi ngohol ishughun yam, i i ze u a mi la; gadia Aôndo zungwem mhôônom, kwagh wam kpaa kumam. A za un iyol, tsô a ngohol." 
Genesis33:12 Tsô a kaa er: Yô, sé mough sé yem, mo me hemen we." 
Genesis33:13 Kpa a kaa a na er: Terem u fa er mbayev ve taver ga, akum a iyôngo man ivo kua abua kpaa a a lu a mo, nga a ônov ityô, nahan aluer á zende a ve apera apera, iyange i môm tseegh tsô kpaa akum a iyôngo man ivo cii, aa kpe." 
Genesis33:14 Yô, terem a̱ gba hemen wanakiriki na tsô; mo me zaan a ve tegh tegh, sha inja i uzendenya mba ve lum sha ishi, man sha injazende i mbayev, zan zan me za kohol terem hen Seir." 
Genesis33:15 Isou kaa er: Yô, me pande ior av me undu u a mi. A kaa er: Nahan kpee shinii? De kera, i̱ doo terem a mo." 
Genesis33:16 Isou kôr gbenda iyange la je, yem ken Seir." 
Genesis33:17 Kpa Yakob yô, kar yem hen Sukoti za maa ya na keregh, kua atôrauile kpaa; ka sha ci u nahan man i yer ijiir la iti er Sukoti ye." 
Genesis33:18 Yakob za nyôr ken gar u Shekem, u a lu ken tar u Kanaan la dedoo er a due ken Padan-aram yô; a haa afo ken akôngo a gar." 
Genesis33:19 Shi a yam tiôntar henpe a tim tenti na la, a ônov mba Hamor, ter u Shekem, sha agbenger a inyar kuma deri." 
Genesis33:20 A ta atse a nan nagh sha mi heregh, a ii a iti er El-elohe-Iserael (ka Aôndo u Iserael A lu Aôndo ye)." 
Genesis34:1 Dina, wan u Lea u a mar a Yakob la, due sha u za nengen ônkasev mba hen tar la." 
Genesis34:2 Tsô Shekem wan u Hamor, Orhivi, tor u hen tar la, nengen a na yô, a kua a na, a yav a na, a vihi un." 
Genesis34:3 Ishima na cii, lu sha Dina wan u Yakob; wankwase la doo un ishima, a ôr kwagh a wankwase la legh legh." 
Genesis34:4 Shekem shi ôr kwagh a ter na Hamor kpaa, kaa er: Erem iniunkwase ne." 
Genesis34:5 Yakob ungwa aun er a vihi wan na Dina; kpa er ônov nav lu a ilev nav ken toho yô, Yakob wa ishima zan zan ve hide." 
Genesis34:6 Tsô Hamor ter u Shekem due va hen Yakob sha u una va ôr kwagh a na. 
Genesis34:7 Ônov mba Yakob kpaa, zum u ve za ungwa kwagh la yô, ve hide ken toho; ve mba nomso mbala, asema vihi ve, kwagh vihi ve tsung, sha u a er kwagh u ibume ken Iserael, er a yav a wan u Yakob yô, kwagh la doo u ma i er nahan ga." 
Genesis34:8 Nahan Hamor ôr kwagh a ve kaa er: Ishima i wan wam Shekem ngi sha wan wen; yô, shi gema nen un, na nen un, a̱ hingir kwase na." 
Genesis34:9 Ne kpaa eren nen kasev a vese; naan nen se ônov enev mba kasev, ne di kpaa gema eren nen ônov asev mba kasev." 
Genesis34:10 Gba lun nen a vese tsô, tar ngun gbanger gbanger ne, tema nen ker, zenden nen kasua, zuan nen a inyaregh keregh." 
Genesis34:11 Shekem kaa a ter u wankwase man anmgbianev mba wankwase la er: De nen i̱ doo ne a mo, kwagh u né wam kpaa, me na." 
Genesis34:12 Wam nen kem man inyaregh ki iwuagh; nea wam nan nan kpaa, me na er ne wem la; kpa nam nen iniunkwase ne, m̱ er i." 
Genesis34:13 Tsô ônov mba Yakob gema ôr kwagh a Shekem man ter na Hamor sha ayom, sha ci u a vihi Dina anngô ve u kwase yô." 
Genesis34:14 Ve kaa a ve er: Se fatyô u geman anngô wase nan oripusu nahan ga, gadia nahan ka se kwagh u aheenegh yum." 
Genesis34:15 Kwagh u né er keng man sé rumun ne yô, saa né hingir er se nahan; inja na yô, hanma nomsoor ken a ven nana̱ tsôngo;" 
Genesis34:16 nahan sé naan ne ônov asev mba kasev, se kpaa sé eren ônov enev mba kasev, sé tema a ven imôngo, sé hingir nongo môm." 
Genesis34:17 Kpa aluer nea ungwa imo yase ner, i̱ tsôngo ne ga yô, sé kua a wan wase, sé yem a yasegh." 
Genesis34:18 Kwaghôron ve la doo Hamor vea Shekem wan u Hamor la. 
Genesis34:19 Wanyekwaor la kera ngôôr sha kwagh la je ga, gadia wan u Yakob doo un yum yô, man un kpaa, lu a icivir hemba mba hen ya u ter na cii." 
Genesis34:20 Tsô Hamor vea wan na Shekem ve za hen hundagar ve, ve za ôr kwagh a ior mba ken gar ve, ve kaa er:" 
Genesis34:21 Ior mban tema a vese doo doo; nahan yô, sé de nen ve, ve̱ tema ken tar ne, ve̱ zenden kasua ker, gadia nenge, tar ne gbanger kuma ve; nahan sé eren ônov vev mba kasev, se di kpaa sé naan ve ônov asev mba kasev, ve̱ eren." 
Genesis34:22 Kwagh u á er man ior mban vea rumun u teman a vese, sé hingir nongo môm a ve yô, ka u hanma nomsoor ken a vese nana̱ tsôngo, di er ve kpaa ve lu mbaicôngov nahan." 
Genesis34:23 Ilev vev man inyarev vev man uzendenya vev cii, á kera va hingir akaa ase gaa? Sé gba rumun nen kwagh ve la tsô, ve̱ tema a vese imôngo." 
Genesis34:24 Mba ve duen hen hundagar na cii, ve ungwa kwaghôron u Hamor man wan na Shekem la; nahan i tsôngo hanma nomsoor, mba ve duen hen hundagar na cii." 
Genesis34:25 Tsô sha iyange i sha utar la, er lu nyoon ve yum yô, ônov mba Yakob uhar Shimeon man Levi, anngôôv mba Dina, hanmô ve tôô sanker na, ve za bur a bur gar la, ve wua nomsombaiorov cii." 
Genesis34:26 Ve wua Hamor man wan na Shekem sha zwa u sanker; tsô ve kua a Dina ken ya u Shekem ve due ve yem. 
Genesis34:27 Ônov mba Yakob va due sha mba i woo la, ve sar gar la gbulugh gbulugh, sha ci u ve vihi anngô ve u kwase yô." 
Genesis34:28 Ve kura ve iyôngo man ivo man abua man ujaki, hanma kwagh ua lu ken gar kua ken ikôngo kpaa." 
Genesis34:29 Inyarev vev cii, man mbayev vev cii kua kasev vev, ve kôr, ve ya ishar sha min kua akaa a ken ayou cii." 
Genesis34:30 Tsô Yakob kaa a Shimeon man Levi er: Ne nzughul a mo je, ne gemam, m due ior mba ken tar ne ishima, ka Mbakanaan man Mbaperishi je la; man mo, m ngu annongo kpeghee tsô. Aluer vea kohol vea va ta num sha a mo yô, me tim a ya wam." 
Genesis34:31 Ve gema ve kaa a na er: Ka nyi man a er a anngô wase u kwase er ka idyakwase nahana? 
Genesis35:1 Tsô Aôndo kaa a Yakob er: Mough yem hen Betel, za tema her; ka heregh je ú ta atse a nanden Aôndo nagh sha mi, u A ande her a we, zum u u yevese anngôu Isou la, ye." 
Genesis35:2 Yakob kaa a mba hen ya na, man mba ve lu a na cii er: Haa nen mbaaôndo mbagenev mba ve lu her a ven la, kera; wanger nen ayol a en, haa nen akondo agen," 
Genesis35:3 mough sé yem nen hen Betel, me za ta atse a nanden Aôndo nagh sha mi heregh, u A ungwa imo yam sha iyange i ican yam, man A lu a mo sha gbenda u m lu zan sha mi la." 
Genesis35:4 Nahan ve va na Yakob mbaaôndo mbagenev mba ve lu a mi cii, kua ikunya ve i ken ato; Yakob ii ve hen itinekon i terebin i hen Shekem la." 
Genesis35:5 Tsô ve mough ve gba yemen; mcieryol u Aôndo haa sha agar a a kase ve cii, nahan ve kera zenda ônov mba Yakob ijime ga." 
Genesis35:6 Yakob va hen Lushi u a lu ken tar u Kanaan, ka Betel je la, un a ior mba ve lu a na imôngo cii." 
Genesis35:7 A ta atse a nanden nagh sha mi heregh, a ii ijiir la iti er El-betel (Aôndo u Betel) sha ci u ka heregh Aôndo ande her a na zum u a yevese anngô na la ye." 
Genesis35:8 Debora, yese u Rebeka la kpe, i ii un hen Betel vegher u shin, hen itine i kon u ouki; maa ve ii un iti er Alon-bakuti (ouki u mlia)." 
Genesis35:9 Aôndo shi ande hen Yakob, zum u a hide ken Padan-aram la, A ver un doo doo." 
Genesis35:10 Aôndo kaa a na er: Iti you er Yakob; á kera yilan we er Yakob ga, kpa iti you á lu Iserael; A maa a ii un iti er Iserael." 
Genesis35:11 Shi Aôndo kaa a na er: Ka Mo Aôndo Uhembanagee, maren, seer a seer; ikurior man ikpila i akuraior ia due ken a we, utor vea due ken a we." 
Genesis35:12 Tar u M ne Aberaham kua Isaka la, Me gema u, Me na u; man tsombor wou u ken ijime you kpaa, Me na u tar shon." 
Genesis35:13 Tsô Aôndo mough undu un hen ijiir i A lu ôron kwagh a na la, A yem." 
Genesis35:14 Tsô Yakob tim ikav i umbur hen ijiir i A er kwagh a na la; ikav la i lu iwen; a haa nagh ku man sha mi, shi a haa mkurem sha mi kpaa." 
Genesis35:15 Yakob ii ijiir i Aôndo ôr kwagh a na la iti er Betel. 
Genesis35:16 Tsô ve mough hen Betel ve gba yemen; ka kera shi ca u nyôron ken Eferata ga yô, Rahel maa gba toghol mar, ican er un sha mar kpishi." 
Genesis35:17 Er a lu toghol yum yô, kwase u kôron mar kaa a na er: De cie ga; gadia ngun kpaa ka wannomso u mar ye." 
Genesis35:18 Tsô er uma na lu duen kera yô, gadia a kpe, a ii un iti er Ben-oni (wan u ican yam); kpa ter na ii un iti er Benyamin (wan uwegh ku yanegh)." 
Genesis35:19 Rahel maa kpe, i ii un hen gbenda u zan Eferata, ka Betelehem je la." 
Genesis35:20 Yakob tim ikav i umbur sha uwar na la; ka ikav i umbur uwar u Rahel je ngu her zan zan nyian. 
Genesis35:21 Iserael gba yemen, a za tim tenti na ken hemen u Mikedal-eder." 
Genesis35:22 Tsô zum u Iserael tema hen tar la yô, Ruben yav a Bila, kwase u ter na u sha uika; Iserael ungwa nahan. Ônov mba Yakob lu pue kar uhar." 
Genesis35:23 Ônov mba Lea yô, lu: Ruben, waniunda u Yakob, man Shimeon man Levi man Yuda man Isakar kua Sebulon." 
Genesis35:24 Ônov mba Rahel yô, lu: Yosev kua Benyamin." 
Genesis35:25 Ônov mba Bila kpankwase u Rahel yô, lu: Dan man Nafetali." 
Genesis35:26 Ônov mba Selpa, kpankwase u Lea yô, lu: Gadi kua Asher. Mban cii, ka ônov mba Yakob mba i mar ve ken Padan-aram je la." 
Genesis35:27 Tsô Yakob za hen ter na Isaka hen Mamre, hen Kiriati-arba, ka Heberon je la, henpe Aberaham man Isaka ve lu shir la." 
Genesis35:28 Ayange a Isaka lu anyom deri man akunduanyiin. 
Genesis35:29 Tsô Isaka sule, kpe, a za kohol ior nav; hingir tamenor, bee iyol; ônov nav, Isou man Yakob ii un." 
Genesis36:1 Ingin ka icombor i Isou, ka un Edom je la." 
Genesis36:2 Isou er kasev nav ken ônov mba Kanaan: Ada, wan u Elon, Orhiti, man Oholibama, wan u Ana, wan u Shibeon, Orhivi," 
Genesis36:3 man Basemati, wan u Ishemael, anmgbian u Nebayoti." 
Genesis36:4 Ada mar Elifasa a Isou; Basemati gema mar Reuel; 
Genesis36:5 Oholibama mar Yeushi man Yalam kua Kora; mban ka ônov mba Isou mba i mar un ve, ken tar u Kanaan la." 
Genesis36:6 Isou kura kasev nav kua ônov nav mba nomso man mba kasev man mba hen ya na cii man ilev nav man uzendenya kua inyarev nav mbi a kohol ken tar u Kanaan cii, a yem ken tar ugen ca je, a undu idyondon na Yakob." 
Genesis36:7 Gadia akaa a ve ngee gande u vea tema imôngo; tar u ve lu shir ker la, yina ve, gadia uzendenya vev ngee yum." 
Genesis36:8 Isou za tema hen uwo u Seir; Isou ka Edom. 
Genesis36:9 Ingin ka icombor i Isou, ter u Mbaedom, hen uwo u Seir ne:" 
Genesis36:10 Ati a ônov mba Isou yô, ka a ne: Ka Elifasa wan u Ada, kwase u Isou, man Reuel wan u Basemati, kwase u Isou." 
Genesis36:11 Ônov mba Elifasa yô, ka: Teman man Omar man Sefo man Gatam kua Kenashi." 
Genesis36:12 Timna lu kwase u sha uika u Elifasa wan Isou, a mar Amaleki a Elifasa; mban ka ônov mba Ada kwase u Isou je la." 
Genesis36:13 Mban ka ônov mba Reuel ne: Ka Nahati man Sera man Shama man Misa; mban ka ônov mba Basemati kwase u Isou je la. 
Genesis36:14 Mban ka ônov mba Oholibama wan u Ana, wan u Shibeon, kwase u Isou; a mar Yehushi man Yalam kua Kora, a Isou." 
Genesis36:15 Mban ka uityombaiorov mba ônov mba Isou ne: Ônov mba Elifasa, waniunda u Isou, ka: uityombaiorov, Teman man Omar man Sefo man Kenashi" 
Genesis36:16 man Kora man Gatam man Amaleki; mban ve lu uityombaiorov mba hen Elifasa ken tar u Edom; ka ônov mba Ada je la. 
Genesis36:17 Mban ka ônov mba Reuel wan u Isou ne: Ka uityombaiorov, Nahati man Sera man Shama man Misa; mban ka uityombaiorov mba hen Reuel ken tar u Edom; mban ka ônov mba Basemati kwase u Isou je la." 
Genesis36:18 Mban ka ônov mba Oholibama kwase u Isou ne: Ka uityombaiorov, Yehushi man Yalam man Kora; mban ka uityombaiorov mba hen Oholibama wan u Ana kwase u Isou je la." 
Genesis36:19 Mban ka ônov mba Isou, man uityombaiorov vev kpaa; ka ve Edom je la." 
Genesis36:20 Mban ka ônov mba Seir, Orhori, mba i lu tar ve la: Ka Lotan man Shobal man Shibeon man Ana" 
Genesis36:21 man Dishon man Eser man Dishan; mban ka uityombaiorov mba hen Mbahori, ônov mba Seir, ken tar u Edom la." 
Genesis36:22 Ônov mba Lotan ka: Hori man Heman; man anngô u Lotan yô, lu Timna." 
Genesis36:23 Mban ka ônov mba Shoba, ne: Ka Alavan man Manhati man Ebal man Sefo man Onam." 
Genesis36:24 Mban ka ônov mba Shibeon je: Ka Aya man Ana; ngun ka Ana u a zua a amboramnger a tseen ken desereti, zum u a lu kuran ujaki mba ter na Shibeon la." 
Genesis36:25 Mban ka ônov mba Ana ne: Ka Dishon man Oholibama wan u Ana u kwase. 
Genesis36:26 Mban ka ônov mba Dishon je: Ka Hemedan man Esheban man Iteran man Keran. 
Genesis36:27 Mban ka ônov mba Eser ne: Ka Bilhan man Saavan man Akan. 
Genesis36:28 Mban ka ônov mba Dishan je: Ka Ushi man Aran. 
Genesis36:29 Mban ka uityombaiorov mba hen Mbahori ne: Ka uityombaiorov Lotan man Shobal man Shibeon man Ana 
Genesis36:30 man Dishon man Eser man Dishan; mban ka uityombaiorov mba Mbahori sha uipaven vev ken tar u Seir je la. 
Genesis36:31 Mban ka uityombaiorov mba ve tema tor ken tar u Edom je er ma tor lu a tema tor sha Mbaiserael ga je: 
Genesis36:32 Bela wan u Beor tema tor ken Edom, iti i gar na er Dinhaba." 
Genesis36:33 Bela kpe kera yô, Yobabi wan u Sera u ken Bosera ya tor sha ityough nagh." 
Genesis36:34 Yobabi va kpe yô, Husham u hen tar u Mbateman ya tor sha ityough nagh." 
Genesis36:35 Husham va kpe yô, Hadadi wan u Bedadi u a ta num sha Mbamidian a hemba ve ken akôngo a Moabi la, tema tor sha ityough nagh, iti i gar na er Aviti." 
Genesis36:36 Hadadi va kpe yô, Samla u ken Masereka tema tor sha ityough nagh." 
Genesis36:37 Samla va kpe yô, Shaul u ken Rehoboti u hen Ifi la, tema tor sha ityough nagh." 
Genesis36:38 Shaul kpe yô, Baal-hanan wan u Akebor tema tor sha ityough nagh." 
Genesis36:39 Baal-hanan wan u Akebor va kpe yô, Hadar tema tor sha ityough nagh; iti i gar na er Pahu; iti i kwase na er Mehetabel, wan u Materedi, wan u Mesahaba." 
Genesis36:40 Angan ka ati a utyombaiorov mba hen Isou ne, sha icombor ve, sha ajiir a ve, man ati a ve kpaa; ka: Timna, Alva, Yetete," 
Genesis36:41 Oholibama, Ela, Pinon," 
Genesis36:42 Kenashi, Teman, Mibesar," 
Genesis36:43 Makediel, Iram; mban ka uityombaiorov mba Edom sha ajiir a teman a ve ken tar ve je la; ka Isou a lu ter u Mbaedom ye." 
Genesis37:1 Yakob tema ken tar u ter na lu shir ker la, ka Kanaan je la." 
Genesis37:2 Ingin ka icombor i Yakob ne: Yosev lu anyom pue kar ataankarahar, lu kuran ilev a anmgbianev nav imôngo, lu wanyekwaor, lu a ônov mba Bila man ônov mba Selpa, kasev mba ter na, imôngo. Yosev ôron ter ve aeren a ve a doon ga la." 
Genesis37:3 Iserael yô, Yosev hemba doon un ishima a ônov nav cii, gadia lu wan na u a mar un tamen yô; a kor un gôgôriga u lihen ave." 
Genesis37:4 Anngôôv nav kav er a hembe doon ter ve ishima a anngôôv nav cii yô, ve kôr un ihom je, ve kera fatyô u ôron kwagh a na bem bem ga." 
Genesis37:5 Tsô mnyam cie Yosev, a ôr anngôôv nav, shi ve seer kôron un ihom." 
Genesis37:6 A kaa a ve er: Ma ne shi ongo mnyam ma ma ciem ne. 
Genesis37:7 Nenge, se lu kangen aile a alakema ken sule, tsô ile wam mough tile sha, aile a en gema va kase ile wam la, gure inya." 
Genesis37:8 Anngôôv nav kaa a na er: Nahan yô, ú tema tor sha a vese he? Shi ú lu a tahav sha a vese kpaa ha? Nahan shi ve seer kôron un ihom sha ci u mnyam ma ma cien un kua sha akaaôron a na la kpaa." 
Genesis37:9 Shi a kimbir u ôron anngôôv nav mnyam magenem, a kaa er: Nenge, mnyam shi ciem er, iyange man uwer man asan pue kar môm ve lu guren mo inya." 
Genesis37:10 Er a ôr ter na man anngôôv nav ma yô, ter na gema zôhô a na, kaa a na er: Ka nyi mnya i cie u nahana? Nahan yô, mo man ngôu kua anngôôv ou, sé va, sé va gure u inya ha?" 
Genesis37:11 Anngôôv nav lu nôngon un iwuhe; kpa ter na yô, lu a kwaghôron la ken ishima na." 
Genesis37:12 Tsô anngôôv nav yem a ilev mbi ter ve ken Shekem u za nan mbi toho. 
Genesis37:13 Nahan Iserael kaa a Yosev er: Ka ken Shekem anngôôv ou ve yem a ilev u za nan mbi toho ye gaa? Yô, va m̱ tindi u her a ve. A rumun a na er: Een." 
Genesis37:14 A gema a kaa a na er: Yô, za za nenge er anngôôv ou ve lu yô, kua ilev kpaa, hide va ôrom. Ka shin pev u Heberon a lu man a tindi un er a̱ za ye; nahan a va nyôr ken Shekem." 
Genesis37:15 Tsô orgen va kohol un lu zenden ken toho wue wue; or la pine un er: Ka nyi u kerene? 
Genesis37:16 A kaa er: Ka anngôôv av m keren ye; yô, shi kaam her ape ve kor ilev yôô?" 
Genesis37:17 Or la kaa er: Ve mough heen kera; yan m ungwa ve lu ôron er: Sé yem nen ken Dotan. Tsô Yosev gba tôvon anngôôv nav angahar, za kohol ve ken Dotan." 
Genesis37:18 Ve ta ashe, ve za nenge a na ca je; er a lu a mgbôghom a ve ga je tsô, ve wa kwagh ayol a ve sha a na, er vea wua un yô." 
Genesis37:19 Ve kaa ayol a ve er: Ormnya la, ngula van la." 
Genesis37:20 Yô, sé wua nen un, sé gbihi nen un shin ijôr i môm i ken azôr ne, tsô sé kaa ser: Ka ma inyamikume i ye un ye; nahan sé nenge er mnyam nam maa za yô." 
Genesis37:21 Ruben ongo nahan yô, yima un sha ikev ve, kaa er: Sé wua nen un ga." 
Genesis37:22 Ruben kaa a ve er: De hee nen awambe inya ga, gbihi nen un shin ijôr i i lu ken toho ne, de benden nen un ave ga; lu wan ishima u yiman un sha ave ve hiden a na hen ter na." 
Genesis37:23 Zum u Yosev ar hen anngôôv nav yô, ve er Yosev riga na, gôgôriga u lihen ave u a lu a mi iyol la." 
Genesis37:24 Ve kôr un ve gbihi shin ijôr la; ijôr la lu tseghe tseghe, mngerem lu shimi ga." 
Genesis37:25 Tsô ve za tema ve gba yan kwagh; mba kenden ashe sha yô, nenge, mbakasuav mba Ishemael mba ve due ken Gileadi mba van a urakumi vev, ve tôô ilyôghonov man balsem man mire, ve lu yemen a mi ken Igipiti." 
Genesis37:26 Tsô Yuda kaa a anngôôv nav er: Inja i sé wua anngô wase, sé yer awambe na yô, ka nyi?" 
Genesis37:27 Yô, sé tee nen un, Mbaishemael ve̱ yam, sé bende nen un ave ga, gadia anngô wase, ka iyol yase je. Anngôôv nav rumun imo na la." 
Genesis37:28 Tsô Mbamidian mbazendenkasua mba va karen yô, ve kôr Yosev ve urugh ve due a mi shin ijôr la, ve tee Yosev, Mbaishemael yam sha agbenger a azurfa ikundu. Mbala yem a Yosev ken Igipiti." 
Genesis37:29 Kpa Ruben hidi hen ijôr la yô, Yosev kera lu shimi ga, tsô a ande akondo na." 
Genesis37:30 A hire hen anngôôv nav, a kaa er: Wanakiriki la ngu ga, man mo yô, me za hana?" 
Genesis37:31 Tsô ve tôô riga u Yosev, ve sôngo ivo, ve wa riga la shin awambe a i;" 
Genesis37:32 ve na gôgôriga la, i za a mi hen ter ve, ve kaa er: Se zua a ngun, nenge dedoo, ka riga u wan wou shin ka u na ga." 
Genesis37:33 A kav un; a kaa er: Ka riga u wan wam je ne! Ka ma inyamikume je, i ye un ye; i kôr Yosev javer javer, mnyiman ngu ga." 
Genesis37:34 Tsô Yakob ande akondo a na, a ta ikondo uya, a zungwe ku u wan na ayange kpishi." 
Genesis37:35 Ônov nav mba nomso kua mba kasev cii ve mough sha u surun un ishima, kpa ishima pever un ga; a kaa er: Mo me sen shin Sheol a mzungu, me za kohol wan wam. Ter na vaa un." 
Genesis37:36 Mbamidian mbala za tee un ken Igipiti, Potifar orvesen u ken ya u Farao, tor u adugwer, yam un." 
Genesis38:1 Hen shighe la je Yuda mough hen anngôôv nav kar yem za kohol Oradulam, iti na er Hira." 
Genesis38:2 Keregh la, Yuda za nenge a wankwase u Orkanaan, iti na er Shua; a er un, a tsa a na." 
Genesis38:3 A wa iyav a mar wannomso, a ii un iti er Er." 
Genesis38:4 Shi a wa iyav a mar wannomso ugen, a ii un iti er Onan." 
Genesis38:5 Shi a mar wannomso, a ii un iti er Shela; lu ken Geshibi zum u a mar un la." 
Genesis38:6 Tsô Yuda er kwase, na Er wan na u iunda la, iti i kwase la er Tamar." 
Genesis38:7 Kpa Er, waniunda u Yuda la, inja na doo TER ga, nahan TER wua un." 
Genesis38:8 Tsô Yuda kaa a Onan er: Tôô kwase u anngôu, tsa a na, ver anngôu tse." 
Genesis38:9 Onan fa tse la á lu u na ga; nahan zum u una tsa a kwase u anngô na yô, a gema a haa ken inya, sha u una ver anngô na tse ga yô." 
Genesis38:10 Kwagh u a er la lu kwagh u vihin sha ishigh ki TER; nahan un kpaa A wua un. 
Genesis38:11 Tsô Yuda kaa a Tamar, kwase u wan na la, er: Gba teman kwasecôghol ken ya u teru tsô, zan zan Shela wan wam á vese ve; gadia a kaa er: Un kpaa a̱ de kpeen er anngôôv nav nahan ga. Tsô Tamar yem za tema hen ya u ter na." 
Genesis38:12 Tsô ayange nga karen yô, Wanshua, kwase u Yuda kpe; ku ngu hoghol Yuda yô, a za hen mbatôndon iyôngo na aive hen Timna, un vea ikar na Hira, Oradulam." 
Genesis38:13 I kaa a Tamar er: Nenge, ter u nomu ngu zan hen Timna sha u za tôndon iyôngo na aive." 
Genesis38:14 Tsô a er ikav nav mbi kwasecôghol kera, a cir ikondo sha ishi, a yisa iyol na, a za tema hen hundagar u Enaim u u lu sha gbenda u zan hen Timna yô; gadia a nenge Shela vese, man i gema un, i na un er a̱ tôô un ga." 
Genesis38:15 Tsô Yuda nengen a na yô, gba henen er ka agbaga, sha ci u a yese ishigh nagh yô." 
Genesis38:16 Tsô a kaha a za hen na sha gbenda, a kaa er: Shi de, m̱ yav a we he; gadia a fa er i lu kwase u wan na ga. Kwase la kaa a na er: Ú nam nyi, man ú yav a mo?" 
Genesis38:17 A kaa er: Me za kôr gumivo ken uile, me na i̱ va na u. A kaa er: Nahan ú nam ityungu, man ú mase tindin a mi ye zee?" 
Genesis38:18 A kaa er: Ka nyi ityungu m̱ na we? A kaa er: Ka kunya wou u i ver ikav sha mi la man kor u u la, kua gbough ku u lu a mi sha uwe la. Tsô a na un akaa la, maa a yav a na, a wa iyav a na je." 
Genesis38:19 Tsô a mough, a yem a nagh, a za bugh ikondo la kera, a tôô ikav nav mbi kwasecôghol la, a haa." 
Genesis38:20 Yuda za tindi a gumivo sha ikev i ikar na, Oradulam la, sha u a̱ za paa un ityungu sha ikev i kwase la yô, kpa a za zua a na ga." 
Genesis38:21 Tsô a pine ior mba hen ijiir na la er: Agbaga u iyange lu hen Enaim hen gbenda ne ngu hana? Ve kaa er: Ma agbaga lu heen ga. 
Genesis38:22 Tsô a hide hen Yuda, a kaa er: M zua a na ga; man ior mba hen ijiir la kpaa kaa er: Ma agbaga lu heen ga." 
Genesis38:23 Yuda kaa er: De un, a̱ gba lun a mi tsô, sé ker aheen ga; nenge, m tindi a gumivo ne, kpa u za tser a na ga." 
Genesis38:24 Tsô iwer ngi kom itiar yô, i kaa Yuda er: Tamar kwase u wan wou er idya, a wa iyav sha idya je. Yuda kaa er: Due a na, i̱ nande un." 
Genesis38:25 Mba dugh a na yô, a na loho hen ter u nom na, a kaa er: Ka or u akaa ne a lu a nan la, nan we iyav a mo ye; man shi a kaa er: Shi nenge dedoo yô, or u akaa ne, a lu a nan yô: kunya u i ver ikav sha mi ne man kor ne kua gbough kun." 
Genesis38:26 Yuda kav a, nahan a kaa er: A hembam mimi, gadia m na un wan wam Shela ga. Mayange a kera shi yav a na ga." 
Genesis38:27 Tsô zum u a gba toghol iyav yô, lu ônov mba ahinav lu ken iyav nav ye." 
Genesis38:28 Ngur maren yô, u môm naregh uwegh, kwase u kôron mar kôr uwegh nagh zer un mou u nyian sha uwe, kaa er: Ngun vande duen." 
Genesis38:29 Tsô hidi a uwegh nagh yô, anngô na kar due. A kaa er: U ande sha apera tsô! Ka nahan man i ii un iti er Perese ye." 
Genesis38:30 Ken masetyô la anngô na due, u a lu a mou u nyian sha uwe la; i ii un iti er Sera." 
Genesis39:1 I yem a Yosev shin Igipiti; Potifar orvesen u ken ya u Farao, tor u adugwer, Origipiti, yam un a Mbaishemael mba ve za a na shin her la." 
Genesis39:2 TER lu a Yosev, nahan ikôr doo un; lu hen ya u ter na, Origipiti." 
Genesis39:3 Ter na kav er TER A lu a na yô, man shi er hanma kwagh u a ker ave mi cii TER A veren un doo doo yô," 
Genesis39:4 nahan doo un a Yosev, a gba eren un tom; man a gema a ver un or u nengen un sha ya; a gema akaa a a lu a mi cii, a wa un sha ikev." 
Genesis39:5 Tsô hii hen shighe u a ver un or u nengen un ya kua sha akaa a a lu a mi cii la yô, TER ver ya u Origipiti la doo doo sha ci u Yosev; iveren i TER lu sha akaa a a lu a mi cii, a ken ya kua a ken won kpaa." 
Genesis39:6 Akaa a a lu a mi cii a gema a wa Yosev sha ikev; er a lu a na yô, ma kwagh kera gba un u veren ishima sha mi ga, saa di kwaghyan u un yaan la tsô. Yosev yô, kuma ashe, doo ashe kpaa." 
Genesis39:7 Tsô ken masejime u akaa ne yô, kwase u ter na la, gema ashe kenger Yosev kaa er: Va yav a mo." 
Genesis39:8 Kpa a venda, a kaa a kwase u ter na la er: Nenge, er mo m lu a terem yô, ma kwagh kera gba un u veren ishima sha mi ken ya na ga; akaa a na cii kpaa, a gema a wam sha ikev;" 
Genesis39:9 ma or u hemban mo hen ya ne ngu ga; ma kwagh kpaa, a yangem ga, saa we tseegh, sha ci u we u ngu kwase na; a er nan man me er kwaghbo u vesen ne, me er Aôndo isholibo nahana?" 
Genesis39:10 Shin er a zer ôron kwagh a Yosev ayange ayange nahan kpaa, Yosev wa iko u yaven a na ga, shin u teman a na imôngo tsô kpaa ga." 
Genesis39:11 Tsô iyange igen yô, a nyôr ken iyou sha u eren tom na; ior mba hen ya cii lu her ga." 
Genesis39:12 Tsô a kôr un sha ikondo na, a kaa er: Va yav a mo; a undu un a ikondo na la, a yevese a due ken won." 
Genesis39:13 Tsô nengen er a undu riga na sha ikev na a yevese a dugh yô," 
Genesis39:14 a yila ior mba hen ya na, a ôr kwagh a ve, a kaa er: Nenge nen, a va na se Orheberu ne er a va neen iyar sha a vese; a va nyôr er una va yav a mo, tsô m gbire vaa;" 
Genesis39:15 ongo er m gbir vaa nahan yô, a undu ikondo na her a mo, a yevese, a due ken won." 
Genesis39:16 Tsô a koso ikondo na la her, zan zan ter na kar hiden hen ya." 
Genesis39:17 A tôô akaa la a ôr un, a kaa er: Kpan u Heberu u u ne se ne, a va nyôr her a mo, ngu va eren iyar a mo;" 
Genesis39:18 tsô m gbir vaa genger genger yô, a undu ikondo na her a mo a yevese a due." 
Genesis39:19 Ter na ongo kwaghôron u kwase na ôr un, er: Kape kpan wou a er a mo la yô, ishima nyoon un." 
Genesis39:20 Ter u Yosev kôr un wa ken gaadi, her ape i wuhe mbakwarev mba tor la; maa a lu ker ken gaadi." 
Genesis39:21 Kpa TER lu a Yosev, eren a na dedoo, A na doo orkurangaadi la a na." 
Genesis39:22 Orkurangaadi gema mbakwarev mba ve lu ken gaadi la ca ca, wa Yosev sha ikev; hanma kwagh u i eren her kpaa, i lu un a er ye." 
Genesis39:23 Ishima i kera nyian orkurangaadi sha ma kwagh môm u a lu sha ikev na ga, gadia TER lu a na; kwagh u a eren kpaa, TER A veren kwagh la doo doo." 
Genesis40:1 Tsô ken masetyô u akaa ne yô, ortoonkwaghman u tor u Igipiti man orkaanbredi na, ve er ter ve, tor u Igipiti kwaghbo." 
Genesis40:2 Ishima vihi Farao a mbavesen mba ken ya na mba uhar mbala, ka orvesen u mbatoonkwaghman man orvesen u mbakaanbredi." 
Genesis40:3 Tsô a wa ve ken uikangen ken ya u tor u adugwer, ken gaadi her ape i wuhe Yosev la." 
Genesis40:4 Un tor u adugwer la, wa ve sha ikev i Yosev er a̱ wasen ve; ve lu ken uikangen ayange kar." 
Genesis40:5 Ve uhar cii mnyam cie ve tugh môm, hanma or lu a mnyam ma nan, hanma or mpase u mnyam ma nan shi lu kposo je; un ortoonkwaghman man orkaanbredi u tor u Igipiti la kpaa, ve mba i wuhe ve ken gaadi la." 
Genesis40:6 Yosev za nyôr hen a ve pepe yô, a nenge ve gba teman zuduu." 
Genesis40:7 A pine mbavesen mba ken ya u Farao mba i wuhe ve a na imôngo ken ya u ter na la er: Ka nyi ne lu ishiv nyian gbuu nahana? 
Genesis40:8 Ve kaa a na er: Mnyam cie se, man or u pasen se ma, nan ngu ga. Yosev kaa a ve er: Ka Aôndo A lu a mpase ye gaa? Ôrom nen ma yôô." 
Genesis40:9 Tsô orvesen u mbatoonkwaghman la, ôr Yosev mnyam nam, a kaa er: Mnyam ciem er, itinewain lum sha ishi je;" 
Genesis40:10 itine la ta agbaa atar, maa hôm je, gba kparen je, asume a na via atam je;" 
Genesis40:11 m lu a iyongo i Farao sha uwe; tsô m zôr atam a wain, m kam shin iyongo i Farao la, m gema iyongo la, m na Farao sha uwegh nagh." 
Genesis40:12 Yosev kaa a na er: Inja i ma yô, ka i ne: Agbaa atar la ka ayange atar je la." 
Genesis40:13 Ayange atar a lu a kar ga tsô Farao una kende u ityough sha una hide a we ken tom wou; shi ú naan Farao iyongo na sha uwegh nagh er zum u, u lu ortoonkwaghman na la nahan." 
Genesis40:14 Aluer wea za zua a mkpeyol yô, umbur mo, shi er a mo dedoo, ôr kwagh wam a Farao, dughum ken ya ne kera;" 
Genesis40:15 gadia mimi je i iim a ii ken tar u Mbaheberu; heen kpaa, m er ma kwagh man ve va wuhem ken gaadi ga." 
Genesis40:16 Zum u orvesen u mbakaanbredi nenge mpase la doo nahan yô, a kaa a Yosev er; Mo kpaa mnyam ciem, m nenge a akese a bredi u pupuu atar, lum sha ityou." 
Genesis40:17 Shin ikese i sha la akaayan a kaan a kaa anza kposo kposo lu shimi sha ci u Farao; inyon lu va yan mo a shin ikese sha ityou je. 
Genesis40:18 Yosev gema kaa er: Inja i ma yô, ka i ne: Akese atar la, ka ayange atar je la;" 
Genesis40:19 ayange atar á lu a kar ga tsô Farao una kende a ityough you una kar a mi sha, una hambe u sha kon, inyon ia ya inyam you." 
Genesis40:20 Tsô sha iyange i sha utar la, lu iyange i umbur mmar u Farao la, a yôr mbatomov nav cii iwer; tsô a kende orvesen u mbatoonkwaghman man orvesen u mbakaanbredi ityough sha, ken mbatomov nav mbala." 
Genesis40:21 A shi a hide a orvesen u mbatoonkwaghman ken tom na u toon kwaghman la, a shi a hingir or u nan Farao iyongo sha uwe." 
Genesis40:22 Kpa a sende orvesen u mbakaanbredi, er Yosev vande pasen ve nahan." 
Genesis40:23 Nahan kpaa, orvesen u mbatoonkwaghman la, kera umbur Yosev ga, a hungul un." 
Genesis41:1 Anyom nga kar ahar vough yô, mnyam cie Farao er un tile hen kpe u ifi u Nil;" 
Genesis41:2 nenge, abua ataankarahar due shin ifi u Nil, a dedoo, a kehen, lu yan awoo." 
Genesis41:3 Ken masejime, abua agen ataankarahar due shin ifi u Nil vihi ashe, kande, va tile a abua agen la hen kpe u ifi u Nil." 
Genesis41:4 Abua a vihin ashe a kanden la gema ya abua a ataankarahar a dedoo a kehen la. Tsô Farao nder. 
Genesis41:5 Shi hidi yaven yô mnyam kimbir cien un; tsô nenge, asagher a alakema ataankarahar due sha itine i môm, wa asange king king, doo u nengen." 
Genesis41:6 Ken masejime asagher agen shi due ataankarahar a lun tsaasaa, ahumbe a sha ityoughkitaregh va ta sha mi, uma a kera." 
Genesis41:7 Asagher a tsaasaa la gema mena asagher a ataankarahar a dedoo a wan king king la. Farao nderen yô, gema lu mnyam ma cien tsô." 
Genesis41:8 Tsô sev mbu aven yô, hingir un ken ishima hang; a tindi er i̱ za yila mbaahiriv mba Igipiti kua mbafankwagh cii, ve̱ va; tsô Farao ôr ve mnyam nam; kpa mô ve môm u pasen Farao ma, lu ga." 
Genesis41:9 Tsô orvesen u mbatoonkwaghman gema ôr kwagh a Farao kaa er: Nyian ne, m umbur asorabo am;" 
Genesis41:10 yan Farao yuwe a mbatomov nav, verem uikangen ken ya u tor u adugwer, mo kua orvesen u mbakaanbredi;" 
Genesis41:11 hen tugh môm je mnyam cie se, mo kua un; hanmô wase mnyam ma nan lu a mpase u ma je." 
Genesis41:12 Wanye u Heberu lu a vese ker imôngo, lu wanakiriki u tor u adugwer; se ôr un ma, nahan a pase se mnyam asem; hanma or a pase nan inja i mnyam ma nan." 
Genesis41:13 Tsô er a pase se yô, maa er di sha mi nahan vough; mo i hide a mo ken tom wam; wen yô, i sende un sha kon." 
Genesis41:14 Tsô Farao tindi er i̱ za yila Yosev; nahan i dugh un ken gaadi fese je; a hondo ishigh, a musan akondo a na, a va nyôr hen Farao." 
Genesis41:15 Farao kaa a Yosev er: Mnyam ciem, man or u pasen ma, nan ngu ga; man m ungwa mba teren we er, aluer u ungwa mnyam yô, u fa u pasen ma." 
Genesis41:16 Yosev gema kaa a Farao er: Mo ga: Aôndo Una na imo sha u i̱ kpe Farao iyol yô. 
Genesis41:17 Farao kaa a Yosev er: Ken mnyam am yô, m tile hen kpe u ifi u Nil," 
Genesis41:18 tsô nenge, abua ataankarahar due shin ifi u Nil, a kehen, doo u nengen, lu yam awoo." 
Genesis41:19 Ken masejime abua agen ataankarahar shi due gengaa, vihi ashe tsung, kande kpishi, imba i ken tar u Igipiti cii, m lu a vande nengen a mi vihin nahan ga yô;" 
Genesis41:20 abua a kanden a vihin ashe la gema ya abua a ataankarahar a hiihii a kehen la," 
Genesis41:21 haa shin uya, nahan kpaa, u fa wer nga a shin uya mayange ga, gadia a vihi ashe heregh tsô, er ashen nahan. Tsô m nder." 
Genesis41:22 Shi ken mnyam am kpaa, m nenge asagher ataankarahar, due sha itine i môm wa king king, doo u nengen;" 
Genesis41:23 ken masejime asagher agen shi due ataankarahar tsuasaa, shi lu tsaasaa, ahumbe a sha ityoughkitaregh va ta sha mi, uma a kera." 
Genesis41:24 Asagher a tsaasaa la mena asagher a ataankarahar a doon la; m gema m ôr mbaahiriv ma, kpa mô ve môm fatyô u pasen mo ma ga." 
Genesis41:25 Yosev kaa a Farao er: Mnyam ma Farao ma inja i môm tsô; ka kwagh u Aôndo A we ishima u eren, man A pasen Farao ye." 
Genesis41:26 Abua a dedoo a ataankarahar la, ka anyom ataankarahar je la; asagher a alakema a ataankarahar a dedoo la kpaa, ka anyom ataankarahar je la; mnyam man ma inja i môm tsô." 
Genesis41:27 Abua a ataankarahar a kanden man a vihin a a dugh ken ijime i a la, ka anyom ataankarahar je la, man shi asagher a ataankarahar a tsaasaa a ahumbe a sha ityoughkitaregh a ta sha a uma a kera la, á lu anyom ataankarahar a ijen je la." 
Genesis41:28 Ka kwagh u m kaa Farao je la mer: Kwagh u Aôndo A we ishima u eren yô, A pase Farao." 
Genesis41:29 Nenge, anyom ataankarahar nga van a iyiav mbia ngee ken tar u Igipiti cii yô;" 
Genesis41:30 ken masejime la, anyom ataankarahar a ijen aa dondo, imbayia la cii ia hungul ken tar u Igipiti, ijen ia vihi tar cii;" 
Genesis41:31 fan a fa tsô kpaa, á kera fa er iyange iyiav lu ken tar ne ga, sha ci u ijen i ia gba la, gadia ia taver kpishi." 
Genesis41:32 Er i kimbir Farao mnyam mara kwa har yô, ka sha ci u Aôndo A we ishima er Una er kwagh la kpee je yô, man Una er fefa kpaa." 
Genesis41:33 Yô, Farao a̱ ker or u tsôngon ishima u fan kwagh, a̱ ver nan sha tar u Igipiti." 
Genesis41:34 Farao a̱ er kwagh ne: a̱ ver mbanengen sha tar ne, a̱ tsuwa tihi môm ken atihi a ataankarahar a iyiav mbi dumbur ne." 
Genesis41:35 Shi ve̱ kohol akaayan cii, ken anyom a dedoo a a ve ne, ve̱ ombo iyiav sha imo i Farao, mbi̱ lu kwaghyan ken agar, ve̱ kura mbi kpaa." 
Genesis41:36 Kwaghyan la, á koso un sha ci u tar ne, sha ci u anyom a ataankarahar a ijen ia va gba ken tar u Igipiti la, sha u tar u̱ de timin sha ijen ga yô." 
Genesis41:37 Kwagh la doo Farao kua mbatomov nav cii. 
Genesis41:38 Farao kaa a mbatomov nav er: Se fatyô u zuan a or u Jijingi u Aôndo A lu ken a nan er or ne nahan kpa? 
Genesis41:39 Farao gema kaa a Yosev er: Er Aôndo A tese u akaa ne cii, nahan yô, ma or u tsôngon ishima fan kwagh er we nahan ngu ga;" 
Genesis41:40 ka we, ya wam una lu sha ikev you ye, ka sha imo you kpaa, man ior av cii vea zaan ye; ka sha ikônough ki torough tsô, me hemba u min ye." 
Genesis41:41 Farao kaa a Yosev er: Nenge, m ver u sha tar u Igipiti cii." 
Genesis41:42 Tsô Farao tsuwa kunya na ken uwe, u i ver ikav sha mi la, wa Yosev ken uwe, a haa un akondo a dedoo a pupuu iyol, shi a har un shirigh ku zenaria sha mon kpaa;" 
Genesis41:43 a penda un sha ikyekye i anyinya na, i sha uhar la; ve gba yôôn zan un sha hemen er: Haa nen inya! Kape a ver un sha tar u Igipiti cii la." 
Genesis41:44 Shi Farao kaa a Yosev er: Ka mo Farao; ken tar u Igipiti cii, ma or nana kende uwegh ku nan shin nguhar u nan ga, saa sha imo you." 
Genesis41:45 Farao gema ii Yosev iti er Safenati-panea; man shi a na un Asenati wan u Potifera, pristi u On, a er. Tsô Yosev mough gba zenden ken tar u Igipiti." 
Genesis41:46 Anyom a Yosev lu ikundugber zum u a tile sha ishigh ki Farao tor u Igipiti la. Yosev mough hen Farao, gba zenden ken tar u Igipiti cii." 
Genesis41:47 Ken anyom a ataankarahar a iyiagh dumbur la, ishule doo iyiagh ishima i môm." 
Genesis41:48 A kohol kwaghyan u ken anyom a ataankarahar la, u ken tar u Igipiti cii, a ombo kwaghyan ken agar; kwaghyan ken sule u u kase u ningir gar yô, a ombo un ker." 
Genesis41:49 Yosev koso samuyia er waarawa u zegemnger nahan, ngee je i de u ôron iyenge, gadia gande u ôron." 
Genesis41:50 Yosev mar ônov mba nomso uhar er inyom i ijen lu a va ga la, ka mba a mar a Asenati wan u Potifera, pristi u On, la." 
Genesis41:51 Yosev ii u iunda la iti er Manase, gadia a kaa er: Aôndo na m hungul ican yam cii kua ya u terem cii kpaa." 
Genesis41:52 Idyondon la, a ii un iti er Eferaim; gadia a kaa er: Aôndo nam, m mar ônov ken tar u ican yam." 
Genesis41:53 Tsô anyom a ataankarahar a iyiagh dumbur ken tar u Igipiti la, bee kera." 
Genesis41:54 Anyom a ataankarahar a ijen hii, er Yosev lu kaa yô; ijen gba sha ityar cii; kpa ken tar u Igipiti cii yô, kwaghyan lu han han kpaa." 
Genesis41:55 Zum u ijen kôr tsung sha tar u Igipiti cii yô, ior vaa kwaghyan a Farao; nahan Farao kaa a Mbaigipiti er: Za nen hen Yosev, kwagh u una kaa ne yô, er nen." 
Genesis41:56 Ijen lu sha won cii; Yosev bugh iuna cii, gba teen, Mbaigipiti yamen; ijen kôr ken tar u Igipiti taveraa." 
Genesis41:57 Tar cii gba van ken Igipiti hen Yosev sha u va yamen kwaghyan; gadia ijen kôr sha won cii. 
Genesis42:1 Tsô Yakob ongo er i lu zuan a alakema ken Igipiti yô, a kaa a ônov nav er: Ka nyi ne gbe kenger ayol a en nahana?" 
Genesis42:2 A kaa er: Nenge m ungwa mer alakema ngu ken Igipiti; yô, sen nen shimi, za yam nen alakema shin her sha ci wase, sha er sé lu uma sé kpe ga yô." 
Genesis42:3 Tsô anngôôv mba Yosev pue za sha u za yamen alakema ken tar u Igipiti. 
Genesis42:4 Kpa Yakob tindi Benyamin, idyondon u Yosev, a anngôôv nav imôngo ga; gadia a kaa er: Kwagh a̱ de kera za tseren un ga." 
Genesis42:5 Nahan ônov mba Iserael kpaa, za va ken mbavan mbala, sha u va yamen alakema; gadia ijen lu ken tar u Kanaan." 
Genesis42:6 Ka Yosev lu orkuran u tar la ye, man ka un kpaa a teen ior mba ken tar la cii alakema ye; tsô anngôôv mba Yosev va, va gure un inya, kuma ishigh inya." 
Genesis42:7 Yosev nengen a anngôôv nav yô, a fa ve, kpa a er a ve er a fa ve ga yô a ôr kwagh a ve sha tswam, a pine ve er: Ne due hana? Ve kaa a na er: Ka ken tar u Kanaan se mough se ve ser, sé va yam kwaghyan ye." 
Genesis42:8 Yosev fa anngôôv nav; kpa ve yô, ve fa un ga." 
Genesis42:9 Tsô Yosev umbur mnyam ma ma cie un a ve la, a gema a kaa a ve er: Ne mba mbamkerev, ne va sha u va nengen ian i nyôron ken tar ne." 
Genesis42:10 Ve kaa a na er: Ei, terem, ka kwaghyan u yamen ikpan you ne i ve ye." 
Genesis42:11 Se cii se mba ônov mba or môm; se mba ior mba mimi, se ikpan you, se mba mbamkerev ga." 
Genesis42:12 A kaa a ve er: Mayange ga, ne va sha u va nengen ian i nyôron ken tar ne." 
Genesis42:13 Ve kaa er: Se ikpan you se mba anngôôv pue kar uhar, ônov mba or môm je, ken tar u Kanaan; u masetyô la ngu a ter wase hegen; u môm yô, ngu ga." 
Genesis42:14 Yosev kaa a ve er: Ka kwagh u m kaa a ven je mer: Ne mba mbamkerev, la ga!" 
Genesis42:15 Ka sha kwagh ne man á kar ne ye: M bum uma u Farao je, né due heen ga, saa anngô wen u masetyô la una va heen ve." 
Genesis42:16 Tindi nen or wen môm, nana̱ za va a anngô wen la; ne yô, hire lu nen uikangen, sha er á kar kwaghôron wen, shin ne mba a mimi jeo á lu nahan ga yô, m bum uma u Farao, mimi je ne mba mbamkerev." 
Genesis42:17 Tsô a wuhe ve cii, ayange atar." 
Genesis42:18 Sha iyange i sha utar la, Yosev kaa a ve er: Ka kwagh u né er, ve né lu uma ne; gadia mo m cie Aôndo:" 
Genesis42:19 Aluer nea lu ior mba mimi yô, á wuhe anngô wen môm ken iyou i i wuhu ne ker ne; kpa ne yô, tôô nen alakema yem nen a mi sha ci u ijen i hen uya enev," 
Genesis42:20 za va nen a anngô wen u kiriki her a mo; ka nahan man kwaghôron wen una lu mimi, ne kpaa, né kpe ga ye. Ka ape ve er je la." 
Genesis42:21 Tsô ve kaa ayol a ve er: Mimi je, se mba a ibo sha kwagh u anngô wase, sha er se nenge ican i uma na, zum u a lu zamber a vese, kpa se wa iko ga la; ka nahan ican ne i hir sha a vese ye." 
Genesis42:22 Ruben gema kaa a ve er: Yan m kaa a ven mer: De eren nen wanakiriki ne kwaghbo ga, kpa ne wa iko ga ga? Ka nahan man ike i awambe na ne i ker se ye." 
Genesis42:23 Ve fa er Yosev lu ungwan ga; gadia i lu eren ve tafinta.
