Exodus12:39 Ve kaa umasa mba i we kwa sha mi ga yô, sha mwem ma hôron ma ve dugh a mi ken Igipiti la, gadia i lu a wa ma kwa ga; gadia i zenda ve a zenda ken Igipiti kera, ve fatyô u timbir ga, nahan kwaghyan u gbenda kpaa ve er ga." 
Exodus12:40 Mtse u Mbaiserael ve tsa ken Igipiti yô, kuma anyom deri unyiin man ikundugber." 
Exodus12:41 Tsô anyom deri unyiin man ikundugber nga kar yô, sha iyange la je, akumaior a TER cii due ken tar u Igipiti." 
Exodus12:42 Ka tugh mbu wan mbu iko kpishi, civir TER min, sha ci u mdugh u A due a ve ken tar u Igipiti la; mbun ka tugh mbu TER, mbu Mbaiserael cii vea waan mbu iko sha ikov ikov cii yô." 
Exodus12:43 Tsô TER shi kaa a Mose vea Aron er: Ka tindi u Paseka ne: Ma or u ikur igen nana̱ de ye un ga. 
Exodus12:44 Kpa kpan u hanma or nan yam sha inyar, aluer u tsôngon un kera yô, zum la á gbaa yan tsô." 
Exodus12:45 Kpa shiror vea ortom u sha tôndo yô, ve̱ de ye un ga." 
Exodus12:46 I̱ ya un ken iyou i môm; de dugh a ma ivurugh ki inyamegh ken won ga; man de sombon kuhe na kpaa ga. 
Exodus12:47 Mkohol u ior i Iserael cii a̱ eren nahan. 
Exodus12:48 Aluer ma shiror u nan nyer u a nyôr á sar nan pe yan Paseka, civir TER yô, i̱ tsôngo nomso mba hen ya u nan, man nana kporom nana za ya ye; nana hingir er ka or u tar la yô; kpa oripusu môm môm nana̱ de ye un ga." 
Exodus12:49 Tindi ngu môm sha ci u or u tar la kua shiror u a va nyer ne a nyôr la kpaa. 
Exodus12:50 Mbaiserael cii ve er nahan; er TER kaa Mose vea Aron yô, kape ve er sha mi je la." 
Exodus12:51 Tsô sha iyange la je, TER due a Mbaiserael ken tar Igipiti akum akum." 
Exodus13:1 Tsô TER ôr kwagh a Mose, kaa er:" 
Exodus13:2 Tsegham hanma waniunda cii, kwagh u a hii duen ken uya ken Mbaiserael, a lu or shin zendenya kpaa, ka u Wam je." 
Exodus13:3 Tsô Mose kaa a ior er: Umbur nen iyange i ne due ken Igipiti ken ya u ikpan ne; gadia ka sha uwegh ku ageegh je TER due a ven ken ajiir ne ye; i̱ de ye bredi u lun a kwa ga. 
Exodus13:4 Ka nyian je ne lu duen ye, sha uwer u Abiba ne." 
Exodus13:5 Yô, zum u TER Una za a we ken tar u Mbakanaan man Mbahiti man Mbaamor man Mbahivi man Mbayebushi, u A bum a uter ou er Una na u u la, tar u atumbabua man iyough ve dumbur ken u la yô; shighe la, wa iko u eren ieren ne sha uwer ne je" 
Exodus13:6 Ayange ataankarahar cii ú ya bredi u i we kwa sha mi ga yô, sha iyange i ataankarahar la yô, á er iniongo i civir TER." 
Exodus13:7 Bredi u i we kwa sha mi ga la yô, á ya un sha ayange a ataankarahar la cii, i̱ de nengen we a bredi u lun a kwa ga; ken tar wou cii, i̱ de nengen we a kwa tsô kpaa ga." 
Exodus13:8 Sha iyange la je, ú kaa wan wou wer: Kwagh ne ka sha ci u kwagh u TER lu er sha ci wam, zum u m due ken tar u Igipiti la." 
Exodus13:9 A̱ hingir we ikav sha uwegh ough, kua ikav i umbur sha kungwa wou, sha u tindi u TER a̱ lu u ken zwa yô; gadia ka sha uwegh ku ageegh je, TER due a we ken tar u Igipiti ye." 
Exodus13:10 Nahan yô, wa iko u eren sha tindi ne sha shighe na vough, sha anyom anyom." 
Exodus13:11 Tsô zum u TER Una nyôr a we ken tar u Mbakanaan er lu bum a we man uter ou la, Una za na u u yô," 
Exodus13:12 tsegha TER hanma wan u a hii duen ken uya; hanma waniunda u u lu a mi u a dugh ken zendenya, u a lu u nom yô, ka u TER je." 
Exodus13:13 Hanma waniunda u jaki yô, ú paa un sha waniyôngo; man wea paa un ga yô, sombo un mon; hanma waniunda u or kpaa, u ken ônov ou, ú paa un." 
Exodus13:14 Tsô zum u wan wou una pine u iyange igen er: Inja i kwagh ne ka nyi? Kaa un wer: Ka sha uwegh ku ageegh je TER due a vese ken tar u Igipiti ken ya u ikpan ye; 
Exodus13:15 man shi er Farao venda er se̱ de yemen ga yô, TER wua hanma waniunda ken tar u Igipiti, waniunda u or kua waniunda u zendenya kpaa; ka nahan man m ne TER nagh mi; kpa ônov mba iundav mba ônov av yô, m paan ve." 
Exodus13:16 A̱ hingir ikav sha uwegh ough man kwagh u zeren sha icul senen hen kungwa wou; gadia ka sha uwegh ku ageegh je TER due a vese ken Igipiti ye. 
Exodus13:17 Man zum u Farao de ior er ve̱ yem yô, Aôndo kar a ve hen gbenda u ken tar u Mbafiliti ga, er u lu kôvoraa nahan kpaa; gadia Aôndo kaa er: Ior mban ve̱ de za nengen a ityav, ve̱ vaan afanyô, ve̱ hiden ken Igipiti ga." 
Exodus13:18 Nahan Aôndo ningir a ior sha gbenda u ken desereti hen Zegemnger u Nyian la. Mbaiserael due ken tar u Igipiti a ikav mbi utyav iyol. 
Exodus13:19 Mose tôô akuhe a Yosev kpaa, lu yemen a mi, gadia a er Mbaiserael ve bum sha ishima i môm, a kaa er: Aôndo Una va sôr ne kpee je; yô tôô nen akuhe am heen sha, yem nen a mi." 
Exodus13:20 Tsô ve hembe hen Sukoti ve za haa hen Etam hen kpe u desereti. 
Exodus13:21 TER kar hemen ve gbenda atetan sha ibeenegh ki lun er ityôgh nahan sha u tesen ve gbenda; tugh yô, gema lu sha usu u lun er ityôgh nahan sha u nan ve iwanger, sha er ve̱ Zenden tugh kua tetan kpaa yô;" 
Exodus13:22 ibeenegh ki lun er ityôgh nahan la, ki undun ior atetan ga, man usu u lun er ityôgh nahan la kpaa, u undun ve tugh ga." 
Exodus14:1 Tsô TER ôr kwagh a Mose kaa er: 
Exodus14:2 Kaa Mbaiserael, ve̱ hire ijime, ve̱ za haa afo sha ishigh ki Pihahiroti hen harga u Mikidol a zegemnger; ka sha ishigh ki Baal-sefon jigh jigh né haa afo hen kpe u zegemnger ye." 
Exodus14:3 Nahan Farao una gba teren Mbaiserael kaan er: Ve tsume ken tar la ve, desereti yisa ve gbenda." 
Exodus14:4 Me cighir Farao ishima, una tôv ve angahar; nahan Me gema Me zua a zua a icivir sha kwagh u Farao kua ikumutya na cii; Mbaigipiti vea fa er Mo M lu TER yô. Tsô ve er nahan." 
Exodus14:5 Zum u i kaa tor u Igipiti er ior mbala ve yem a yem je yô, ishima i Farao kua i mbatomov nav gema kposo sha kwagh u ior mbala, ve pine er: Ka nyi se gbe den Iserael ve yem ve de u shiren se nahana?" 
Exodus14:6 Tsô a zer ikyekye na sha anyinya, a mough a ior nav;" 
Exodus14:7 a tôô akeke deri ataratar a hemban, kua akeke a Igipiti cii, a ior mba fan ityav sha mi cii." 
Exodus14:8 TER cighir Farao tor u Igipiti ishima, tsô a zenda Mbaiserael ijime; kpa Mbaiserael yô, ve due ve lu yemen sha uwegh ku ageegh je." 
Exodus14:9 Mbaigipiti gema gba zendan ve ijime a anyinya man akeke a Farao cii man mbahendan a, kua mbautyav nav kpaa, ve va kohol ve hen afo hen kpe u zegemnger hen Pihahiroti sha ishigh ki Baal-sefon." 
Exodus14:10 Farao mgbôghom yô, Mbaiserael ta ashe; yô, nenge, Mbaigipiti mbala di van ve ijime la, cier ve iyol kpishi; nahan Mbaiserael gba vaan yilan TER." 
Exodus14:11 Ve pine Mose er: Ka iwar i ban ken Igipiti ve u kor se wer se̱ va kpe ken toho yee? Ka nyi u er a vese nahan, u due a vese ken Igipiti?" 
Exodus14:12 Ka kwagh u iyange se kaan a we ken Igipiti ser: Gba den se, se̱ eren Mbaigipiti tom tsô ne gaa? Gadia hemba doon se u eren Mbaigipiti tom a u se lu kpen ken desereti ne." 
Exodus14:13 Kpa Mose kaa a ior er: De cie nen ga, tile nen her, nenge nen myem u TER Una yima ne nyian yô; er ne nengen Mbaigipiti nyian nahan, mayange né kera shi nenge a ve sha won ga," 
Exodus14:14 TER Una nôngo ityav sha ci wen, lu nen ving tsô." 
Exodus14:15 Tsô TER pine Mose er: Ka nyi u vaan a Moo? Kaa Mbaiserael ve̱ hembe ve̱ yem hemen. 
Exodus14:16 We gema gbough ough kende sha, naregh uwegh ough sha zegemnger pav un." 
Exodus14:17 Yô, Mo Me cighir Mbaigipiti asema ve̱ hungwa ve̱ cir ve ijime; Me gema Me zua a zua a icivir sha kwagh u Farao kua ikumutya na cii, man sha akeke na kua mbaanyinyav nav cii." 
Exodus14:18 Mbaigipiti kpaa vea fa er M lu TER yô, shighe u Me zua a icivir sha kwagh u Farao man sha akeke na kua mbaanyinyav nav la." 
Exodus14:19 Tsô ortyom u Aôndo u a hemen ikumior i Iserael la, mough kar hile ve ken ijime; ibeenegh ki lun er ityôgh la kpaa, mough sha hemen kar va tile ve ken ijime." 
Exodus14:20 Ki lu hen atô u ikumior i Mbaigipiti a ikumior i Mbaiserael; yô, ibeenegh lu kua ime, nahan kpaa, ki gema ki wanger tugh; hen tugh mbula cii, igen mgbôghom a igen ga." 
Exodus14:21 Tsô Mose naregh uwegh nagh sha zegemnger; TER er zegemnger kuwa kera sha ahumbe a ken ityoughkitaregh, a taver, a tsa van tugh kaka; zegemnger uma, mngerem pav." 
Exodus14:22 Mbaiserael hungwa hen atô u zegemnger sha tareghnyaagh; mngerem tile lu ve ken iyan kua ken imese er kpekpe nahan. 
Exodus14:23 Mbaigipiti cir ve ijime gba hungwan zan shin atô u zegemnger ken ijime ve, anyinya a Farao cii man akeke na kua mbaanyinyav nav kpaa." 
Exodus14:24 Tsô ka kom sha mkorutu u sha use la yô, TER lu ken usu u lun er ityôgh la, kua ken ibeenegh kila, lu kenger ikumutya i Mbaigipiti; tsô A haa ikumutya i Mbaigipiti anzughul." 
Exodus14:25 A er inya kange sha akaver a akeke ve, ve gba yemen hemen sha ican je; tsô Mbaigipiti kaa er: Sé yevese nen Mbaiserael, gadia TER ta ikaa ken ve, ngu ihom a Mbaigipiti." 
Exodus14:26 Tsô TER kaa a Mose er: Naregh uwegh ough sha zegemnger, mngerem ma hide ma zua her, ma cir Mbaigipiti a akeke a ve kua mbaanyinyav vev kpaa." 
Exodus14:27 Tsô Mose naregh uwegh nagh sha zegemnger, zegemnger hide doon her sha use er ma lun keke nahan; Mbaigipiti gba yevese, ve va ta sha mi; TER haa ve shin zegemnger." 
Exodus14:28 Mngerem hide her, uve akeke kua mbaanyinyav, ka ikumutya i Farao cii, i i cir ve ijime shin zegemnger je la; mô ve môm kera shi ga." 
Exodus14:29 Kpa Mbaiserael yô, per sha tareghnyaagh hen atô u zegemnger; mngerem lu ve ken iyan kua ken imese er kpekpe nahan." 
Exodus14:30 Kape TER yima Mbaiserael sha ikev i Mbaigipiti sha iyange la je la; Mbaiserael nenge akom a Mbaigipiti hen kpezegemnger. 
Exodus14:31 Mbaiserael nenge zegetom u TER A er sha Mbaigipiti yô, tsô ior cia TER, ve na TER jighjigh kua wanakiriki Na Mose kpaa." 
Exodus15:1 Tsô zum la Mose kua Mbaiserael gba wan icam ne teren TER, kaan er: Me wa icam me ter TER, gadia A hemba tser tser; nyinya kua orhendan un kpaa, A haa ve shin zegemnger." 
Exodus15:2 TER ka agee am man icam yam kpaa, A hingir myom wam kpaa. Ka Aôndo wam, me wuese Un; Aôndo u terem, me kende Un sha." 
Exodus15:3 Ter ka orutya je; iti na er TER. 
Exodus15:4 Akeke a Farao kua ikumutya na kpaa, A haa ve shin zegemnger; mbautyav nav mba hemban cii kpaa, ve mire shin Zegemnger u Nyian." 
Exodus15:5 Aiv cir ve, ve sen shin iv er iwen nahan." 
Exodus15:6 Uwegh Ough ku yanegh, TERE, ku a icivir, sha ci u agee Ou; uwegh Ough ku yanegh, TERE, ku her orihom." 
Exodus15:7 Sha ivesen i icivir You yô, U gbihi mba ve hendan a We mbala inya; U tindi iyugh You va nande ve kera er adenga a alakema nahan." 
Exodus15:8 Sha iôôn i ahenga Ou la, mngerem ta tihi, uikuwanmbamngerev tile sha er ka tihi nahan aiv kôrough shin sema u zegemnger." 
Exodus15:9 Orihom kaa er: Me tôv me za kohol, me kar ishar; awashima wam una kure sha a ve, me tsuwa sanker wam; uwegh agh kua tim ve." 
Exodus15:10 U fehe ahumbe Ou, zegemnger cir ve, ve mire er inyelegh shin mngerem ma tamen yô." 
Exodus15:11 Ka an nan lu er We nahan ken mbaaôndo? Ka an nan lu er We, a icighanmlu u icivirigh man aeren a a kom iwuese a cieryol kua a kpilighyoloo?" 
Exodus15:12 U naregh uwegh Ough ku yanegh, inya mena ve." 
Exodus15:13 Sha erdoo Wou, U hemen ior mba U paa ve yô, U hemen ve gbenda sha agee Ou, U za a ve hen icighanjiir Wou." 
Exodus15:14 Akuraior ungwa, akarkase nga gbidyen ve iyol; mbamtoghor tser mba ve tem ken Mbafiliti" 
Exodus15:15 Tsô kondo utor mba Edom iyol; mbatarev mba Moabi kpaa, akarkase gbidye ve iyol; mba ve tem ken Kanaan cii, iyol kpe ve." 
Exodus15:16 Iwondo man mciem haa ve iyol; sha mtaver u uwegh Ough, ve huan ving, er iwen yô, shighe u ior Ou lu karen la TERE, shighe u ior mba U yam la ve lu karen yô," 
Exodus15:17 Ú nyôr a ve, Ú za môôr ve sha uwo u u lu dyako Wou la, ka ijiir i U gem i, i hingir ijiir You i teman her je la TERE, icighanjiir u ave Ou a ver un yô, TERE." 
Exodus15:18 TER Una tema tor gbem sha won je. 
Exodus15:19 Gadia anyinya a Farao a akeke na kua mbaanyinyav nav hungwa shin zegemnger cir ve; kpa Mbaiserael yô, per sha tareghnyaagh hen atô u zegemnger." 
Exodus15:20 Profeti u kwase Miriam, anngô u Aron u kwase, kôr angenga sha uwe; kasev cii due dondo sha a na a anigingav, gba vinen amar." 
Exodus15:21 Miriam kaa a ve er: Ter nen TER icam, gadia A hemba tser tser; nyinya kua orhendan un kpaa, A haa ve shin zegemnger." 
Exodus15:22 Tsô Mose mough a Mbaiserael hen Zegemnger u Nyian, ve gba nyôron ken desereti u Shur; ve zende ken desereti ayange atar je, ve zua a mngerem ga." 
Exodus15:23 Mba va ar hen Mara yô, ve fatyô u man mngerem ma Mara ga, gadia ma yua; ka nahan man i yilan ijiir la iti er Mara ye." 
Exodus15:24 Tsô ior gba zan Mose ivever iyol, ve kaa er: Sé ma nyi?" 
Exodus15:25 Nahan a vaa a TER; tsô TER tese un kon ugen, a gbihi u shin mnger, mngerem maa hingir dedoo. A wa ve kwagh heregh, shi A na ve tindi kpaa; ka heregh kpaa, A kar ve ye;" 
Exodus15:26 A kaa er: Aluer ú waan imo i TER, Aôndo wou, iko a ishima i môm man ú eren kwagh u a lu vough sha ishigh Nagh kpaa, shi ú waan iko sha atindi a Na, man ú ver ishima sha akaawan a Na cii yô, angev mbu M ne Mbaigipiti la, môm tsô kpaa, Me na u ga; gadia ka Mo TER u been we angev." 
Exodus15:27 Tsô ve ar hen Elim, ihwembemnger lu her pue kar ihiar man atine a ivilegh akunduatargber; ve haa afo hen mngerem mara." 
Exodus16:1 Tsô ve mough hen Elim, mkohol u ior Mbaiserael cii nyôr ken desereti u Sen u a lu hen harga u Elim a Senai la, Sha uwer u sha uhar ayange a u pue kar ataan, er ve mough ken tar u Igipiti la." 
Exodus16:2 Mkohol u ior Mbaiserael cii za Mose vea Aron ivever iyol ken desereti; 
Exodus16:3 Mbaiserael kaa a ve er: Guda u ma se kpe sha uwegh ku TER ken tar u Igipiti zum u se teman a ityev mbi inyamev ikum se yaan bredi kuman se la; gadia ne va a vese ken desereti ne ner, né va wua nongoior ne cii sha ijen." 
Exodus16:4 Tsô TER kaa a Mose er: Nenge, Me er kwaghyan una due Sha una haa ne shin inya; ior ve̱ due hanma iyange, ve̱ kuran á kuman sha sev mbula, sha u Me kar ve, shin vea er sha atindi Am, shin vea er sha mi ga." 
Exodus16:5 Sha iyange i sha ataratar la yô, ve̱ er kwaghyan sha kwagh u ve ve a mi la, a̱ kuma er ve kor ayange ayange nahan, kwa har." 
Exodus16:6 Tsô Mose man Aron kaa a Mbaiserael cii er: Aikighe yô, né va fa er i lu TER je A dugh a ven ken tar u Igipiti yô." 
Exodus16:7 Pepe né nenge icivir i TER, gadia A ungwa ivever yen i ne er a TER yô; se, se mba di nyi man ne er se ivevere?" 
Exodus16:8 Mose kaa er: Ka shighe u TER Una na ne inyam aikighe, né ya, kua kwaghyan pepe kpaa, á kuma ne la; gadia TER ungwa ivever i ne eren Un la; se mba nyi? Ka se, ne ze se ivever iyol ga, kpa ka TER." 
Exodus16:9 Mose kaa a Aron er: Kaa mkohol u ior i Mbaiserael cii wer: Va kporom nen sha ishigh ki TER, gadia A ungwa ivever yen." 
Exodus16:10 Tsô er Aron lu ôron kwagh a mkohol u ior i Mbaiserael cii ave la, ve gema ashe ken desereti; tsô, nenge, icivir i TER ande sha ibeen." 
Exodus16:11 TER ôr kwagh a Mose, A kaa er:" 
Exodus16:12 M ungwa ivever i Mbaiserael; yô ôr kwagh a ve, kaa ve wer: Aikighe né ya inyam, kper pepe yô, né ya kwaghyan una kuma ne man né fa er Mo M lu Aôndo wen ye." 
Exodus16:13 Tsô iyange i been yô, utakange va, va haa hen afo cii; kper nan pepe yô, avure gba, ningir afo tser." 
Exodus16:14 Avure a a gbe la nga om kera yô, i gba kaven kwagh hen inya cir sha desereti lu ipe vegh vegh ndahar er ishwa nahan." 
Exodus16:15 Zum u Mbaiserael nenge a mi yô, ve gba pinen ayol a ve er: Ka nyi ne? Gadia ve fa kwagh shon ga. Tsô Mose kaa a ve er: Ka kwaghyan u TER A ne ne, er né ya je ne." 
Exodus16:16 Kwagh u TER A kaa yô, ka un ne: Hanma or nana̱ kohol un, a̱ kuma sha mye u nan; hanma or omer môm, sha iyenge i ior enev, ka ape né kuran la, hanma or sha ci u mba ve lu ken tenti u nan." 
Exodus16:17 Kape Mbaiserael er je la, ugen nan kura kpishi, ugen nan kura yum ga." 
Exodus16:18 Kpa zum u vea karen sha ikaren i omer yô, un u a kor kpishi la kwagh neer un ga, man un u a kor kpuaa la kpaa, kwagh yina un ga; hanma or kura sha mye u nan vough." 
Exodus16:19 Mose kaa a ve er: Or môm nana̱ de deen, a̱ lu her zan zan sev mbu̱ av ga." 
Exodus16:20 Nahan kpaa, ve wa imo i Mose iko ga; mbagenev yô, ve de a lu her zan zan sev mbu av, nahan a gba azôô, a huma; ishima vihi Mose a ve." 
Exodus16:21 Ve kuran hanma sev, hanma or sha mye u nan vough; zum u oo ua taan yô, a sough." 
Exodus16:22 Kpa sha u ayange ataratar la, ve kuran kwaghyan kuma sha u ve vanden kuran la kwa har, omer uhar uhar sha ci u hanma or; nahan mbavesen mba mkohol u ior cii va, va kaa Mose." 
Exodus16:23 A kaa a ve er: Ka kwagh u TER A kaa je la er: Kper ka iyange i memen, ka icighaniyange i memen i TER je; kaa nen kwagh u a sar ne u kaan yô, shi jiidi nen kwagh u a sar u jiidi kpaa; hanma kwagh u a shi yô, koso nen zan zan sev mbu av." 
Exodus16:24 Ve koso zan zan sev av, sha imo i Mose la; yô, kera huma ga, azôô kpaa, gba ga." 
Exodus16:25 Mose kaa er: Ya nen ngun nyian, gadia nyian ka iyange i memen i TER; nyian né kera zua a mi ken akôngo ga." 
Exodus16:26 Ayange ataratar né kohol un; kpa sha iyange i ataankarahar la yô, ka iyange i memen je la, sha iyange la una lu ga." 
Exodus16:27 Tsô sha iyange i ataankarahar la, ior mbagenev due sha u vea kura, kpa ve zua a mi ga." 
Exodus16:28 Tsô TER kaa a Mose er: Ka hanma shighe je man né de u vendan u wan iko sha imo Yam kua atindi Ama? 
Exodus16:29 Nenge, er TER A ne ne iyange i memen yô, nahan sha iyange i ataratar la, ka A na ne kwaghyan a kuma ayange ahar. Yô, hanma or nana lu hen ijiir i nan, or môm nana de kera duen hen ijiir i nan sha iyange i ataankarahar la ga." 
Exodus16:30 Tsô ior mem sha iyange i ataankarahar la. 
Exodus16:31 Ya u Iserael yila iti na er: Mana; lu pupuu er asange a koliande nahan, lu ken zwa er mumuyough nahan." 
Exodus16:32 Mose kaa er: Kwagh u TER A kaa yô, ka un ne: I̱ koso ikaren u omer môm poo sha ci u ikov yen i ken hemen, sha u ve̱ nenge kwaghyan u M koso ne a mi ken desereti zum u M due a ven ken tar u Igipiti yô." 
Exodus16:33 Mose kaa a Aron er: Tôô ityegh, haa mana shimi, ikaren u omer môm poo, ver sha ishigh ki TER, i̱ kuran un her sha ci u ikov yen i ken hemen." 
Exodus16:34 Er TER kaa Mose nahan, kape Aron ver un sha ishigh ki Shiada la, sha u kuran un her." 
Exodus16:35 Mbaiserael lu yan mana la anyom akunduahar zan zan ve za nyôr ken tar u ior ve tem ker yô; ve ya mana la zan zan ve za ar hen ikighirtar i Kanaan. 
Exodus16:36 Ikaren u omer yô, ka môm-ken-upue u efa je." 
Exodus17:1 Mkohol u ior i Mbaiserael cii, lu zenden ken desereti u Sen, haan afo zan, sha imo i TER, tsô ve za haa hen Rafidim; kpa ve zua a mngerem ma ior vea ma ga." 
Exodus17:2 Nahan ior mough ayôôso a Mose, ve kaa er: Na se mngerem, se̱ ma. Mose kaa a ve er: Ka nyi ne mough ayôôso a mo, man ka nyi ne karen TERE?" 
Exodus17:3 Yô, imura lu kôron ior, nahan ior gba zan Mose ivever iyol pinen er: Ka nyi u dugh a vese ken tar u Igipiti wer u va wua se a ônov asev kua uzendenya asev sha imura?" 
Exodus17:4 Tsô Mose vaa a TER, a kaa er: Me er a ior mban nana? Shi kpuaa tsô vea tam awen." 
Exodus17:5 TER kaa a Mose er: Mough a mbatamen mba Iserael mbagenev, undu ior ken hemen; gbough ough ku iyange u gbidye ifi a mi la, kôr ku ken uwe, yem." 
Exodus17:6 Nenge, Me tile sha ishigh you keregh, sha vande u hen Horebi; gbidye vande la, tsô mngerem maa due ker, sha u ior vea ma yô. Mose er nahan sha ishigh ki mbatamen mba Iserael;" 
Exodus17:7 Maa a ii ijiir la iti er: Masa kua Meriba, sha ci u ayôôso a Mbaiserael la, man shi sha ci u ve kar TER sha u pinen er: TER ngu a vese shin ngu ga?" 
Exodus17:8 Tsô Amaleki va, va nôngo ityav a Iserael hen Rafidim." 
Exodus17:9 Nahan Mose kaa a Yosua er: Sange ior sha ci wase, due za nôngo ityav a Amaleki; kper mo me tile sha ityough ki igungu a gbough ku Aôndo ken uwe." 
Exodus17:10 Yosua er er Mose kaa un nahan, a nôngo ityav a Amaleki; kpa Mose man Aron kua Hur yô, ve unde sha ityough ki igungu la." 
Exodus17:11 Tsô, Mose una kenden uwegh sha yô, Iserael a hemba, una shirin uwegh yô, Amaleki a gba, hemban." 
Exodus17:12 Ave nga kpen Mose yô, ve tôô iwen ve ver un er a̱ tema sha mi; Aron man Hur gema kôr ave na sha, u môm kôr ken, u môm kôr ken; nahan ave na lu dông zan zan iyange kar miren." 
Exodus17:13 Yosua hemba Amaleki a ior sha zwa u sanker. 
Exodus17:14 Tsô TER kaa a Mose er: Nger kwagh ne ken ruamabera a̱ lu kwagh u umbur, ôr Yosua un dedoo, a̱ fa: M-umbur u ma i umbur Amaleki tsô kpaa, Me ese un sha won kera." 
Exodus17:15 Tsô Mose ta atse a nan nagh sha mi, a ii a iti er Yehova-nishi (TER ka tuta wam);" 
Exodus17:16 A kaa er: Uwegh ku sha kwav u TER je; TER Una nôngo ityav a Amaleki sha ikov ikov. 
Exodus18:1 Tsô Yetero, pristi u Midian, terkem u Mose, ungwa akaa a TER A er Mose cii, kua ior nav Iserael kpaa, er TER A dugh a Iserael ken Igipiti yô." 
Exodus18:2 Nahan Yetero terkem u Mose mough a Shipora kwase u Mose–u yan na un a hire la— 
Exodus18:3 Kua ônov nav uhar, iti i u môm la er Gershom; gadia a kaa er: M tema shir ken tar u m fe u ga yô;" 
Exodus18:4 Ugen la iti na er Elieser; gadia, a kaa er: Aôndo u terem, ka Un A lu iwasen yam ye, man A yimam m war sanker u Farao kpaa." 
Exodus18:5 Tsô Yetero, terkem u Mose va hen Mose a ônov nav man kwase na ken desereti henpe a haa afo hen uwo u Aôndo la;" 
Exodus18:6 A tindi er i̱ za kaa Mose er: Mo, teru kem, Yetero, m ngu van her a we, a kwase wou kua ônov nav mba uhar mbala." 
Exodus18:7 Tsô Mose due za kegh ter na kem gbenda, a gure a suse un zwa, ve gba pinen mlu ve ayol a ve; tsô ve nyôr ken tenti." 
Exodus18:8 Mose ôr ter na kem akaa cii, a TER A er a Farao man Mbaigipiti sha ci u Iserael yô, man shi atsan a a tser ve sha gbenda cii, kua myem u TER yima ve kpaa." 
Exodus18:9 Nahan Yetero ember akaaôron la cii, a TER A er a Iserael, er A dugh a ve sha ikev i Mbaigipiti yô." 
Exodus18:10 Yetero kaa er: I̱ wuese TER u A yem ne sha ikev i Mbaigipiti man sha ikev i Farao kpaa. 
Exodus18:11 Hegen yô, m fa, TER hemba mbaaôndo cii, gadia A yima ior sha ikev i Mbaigipiti, zum u ve manger sha ve la." 
Exodus18:12 Man shi Yetero terkem u Mose za a nagh ku nanden kua iniav mbi sôngon za na Aôndo; Aron va a mbavesen mba Iserael cii, sha u va yan kwagh a terkem u Mose imôngo sha ishigh ki Aôndo" 
Exodus18:13 Tsô kper gen yô, Mose tema lu kuren ior ajir; ior tile hen Mose pepe je zan zan iyange kar been." 
Exodus18:14 Kpa zum u terkem u Mose nenge kwagh u a eren a ior cii yô, a pine er: Ka nyi kwagh u eren a ior ne nahana? Ka nyi u tem we tswen, ior cii ve til her a we pepe je zan zan iyange i kar beene?" 
Exodus18:15 Tsô Mose kaa a ter na kem er: Ka sha ci u ior ve va her a mo er vea va pine Aôndo kwagh; 
Exodus18:16 Zum u ka vea lu a ma kwagh yô, ve va her a mo; m kure kwagh u or u kwagh a zough nan a orgen yô, m tese ve akaawan a TER kua atindi a Na kpaa." 
Exodus18:17 Tsô terkem u Mose kaa a na er; Yô, kwagh u u eren la doo ga." 
Exodus18:18 U ngu wuan a wua iyol you je kua ior mba ve lu a we mban kpaa; gadia kwagh ne gande u; u fatyô u eren un, we tswen ga." 
Exodus18:19 Yô, ver ase ato sha kwaghôron wam ne, me wase u henen, Aôndo kpaa Una lu a we; we ú lu sha ishigh ki Aôndo sha ci u ior mban, ka we ú zaan a akaa hen Aôndo ye;" 
Exodus18:20 Man ú tesen ve akaawan man atindi, shi ú pasen ve gbenda u vea zaan sha mi, kua tom u vea eren kpaa." 
Exodus18:21 Shi ú sange ior mba fan kwagh ken ior cii, mba ve cie Aôndo, mba mimi, mba ve vende inyaregh ki yamen ishô; ver ve sha ior, ve̱ lu mbavesen sha ior dubu dubu man sha ior deri man sha ior akunduahargber akunduahargber man sha ior pue pue," 
Exodus18:22 ve̱ ôron ior ajir ayange ayange; akaavesen yô, ve̱ gema ve̱ va a mi her a we, kpa akaakiriki yô, ve ayol a ve, ve̱ gba kuren a tsô; nahan á heghem we iyol, ve kpaa ve̱ tôôn ikav a we imôngo." 
Exodus18:23 Aluer ú er nahan, man Aôndo kpaa Una tese u nahan yô, kwagh á kera hemba u ga, man ior mban cii kpaa vea yem hen ajiir a ve saan saan." 
Exodus18:24 Nahan Mose rumun imo i ter na kem la, a er sha mi vough cii." 
Exodus18:25 Mose sange ior mba fan kwagh ken Iserael cii, ver ve, ve̱ lu uityombaiorov sha ior, ve̱ lu mbavesen sha ior dubu dubu, man sha ior deri deri man sha ior akunduahargber akunduahargber man sha ior pue pue kpaa." 
Exodus18:26 Ve gba ôron ior ajir ayange ayange, a lu akaa a cimin yô, ve za a mi hen Mose, kpa akaakiriki yô, ve ayol a ve, ve gba kuren a tsô." 
Exodus18:27 Tsô Mose ver ter na kem gbenda, yem ken tar na." 
Exodus19:1 Sha uwer u sha utar u mdugh u Mbaiserael ken tar u Igipiti sha iyange la je, ve nyôr ken desereti u Senai." 
Exodus19:2 Ve hembe hen Rafidim ve va nyôr ken desereti u Senai, ve haa afo ken desereti; Iserael haa afo her, sha ishigh ki uwoogh kila." 
Exodus19:3 Tsô Mose unde za hen Aôndo; TER yila un sha uwo la, kaa er: Kaa ya u Yakob man ôr Mbaiserael wer:" 
Exodus19:4 Ne nenge kwagh u M er Mbaigipiti man er M tee ne sha akper a aguvegh M ve a ven hen a Mo yô. 
Exodus19:5 Hegen yô, aluer né veren ato sha kwaghôron Wam mimi je, shi né waan ikuryan Yam iko kpaa yô, nahan akuraior a sha won cii, ka ne né hingir kwagh Wam iyol Yam je ye; gadia tar cii, ka u Wam je." 
Exodus19:6 Ka ne né lum tartor u upristi kua icighanikurior ye. Ka akaa a ú za ôr Mbaiserael je ne. 
Exodus19:7 Tsô Mose va va yila mbatamen mba ior la, tume ve akaaôron a TER ôr un la cii inya." 
Exodus19:8 Ior cii kaa zwa môm er: Akaa a TER A kaa cii, sé er. Tsô Mose hide za ôr TER akaaôron a ior la." 
Exodus19:9 Nahan TER kaa a Mose er: Nenge, M ngu van hen a we ken ibeenegh ki iligh sha shighe u Me ôron kwagh a we yô, ior ve̱ ungwa, ve̱ gema, ve̱ naan we jighjigh gbem. Mose ôr TER akaaôron a ior la." 
Exodus19:10 Tsô TER kaa a Mose er: Za hen ior, za tsegha ve nyian kua kper, ve̱ ôô akondo a ve kpaa," 
Exodus19:11 man shi ve̱ kohol iyol er ayange atar a lu a kuma ga la, gadia sha iyange i sha utar la, TER Una sen sha uwo u Senai sha ashe a ior cii." 
Exodus19:12 Man shi ver ior ikighir, i̱ ningir i̱ tser, kaa wer: Ver nen ishima, de undu nen sha uwo la ga, shin mbende tsô kpaa, de benden nen a itine i u ga; hanma or u nana bende a uwo la yô, á wua nan kpee je;" 
Exodus19:13 uwegh tsô kpaa, or a̱ de benden sha u ga, mimi je á ta nan awen, shin á ta nan ivaan; shin a lu ilegh shin a lu or kpaa, vea kera lu uma ga; zum u korough kua gba imo tueen yô, ve̱ unde sha uwo." 
Exodus19:14 Tsô Mose hungwa sha uwo la va hen ior, va wanger ior; man shi ve ôô akondo a ve kpaa." 
Exodus19:15 Tsô a kaa a ior er: Kohol nen ayol er ayange atar la, a lu a kuma ga yô; de kera sôsom nen a kwase ga." 
Exodus19:16 Tsô sha iyange i atar la, sev mbu av yô, idyuran man inyiar kua ibeenegh ki iligh kpaa lu sha uwo la, man imo i ikpamkor lu kaan taver taver; ior mba hen afo cii gbidye akarkase iyol." 
Exodus19:17 Tsô Mose due a ior hen afo, sha u vea za kohol Aôndo yô; ve za tile hen itinewoogh la." 
Exodus19:18 Uwo u Senai cii gba duen mnyim sha ci u TER A sen sha u ken usu yô; mnyim mara gba kôndon er ka mnyim ma duen ken atse yô, uwo la cii tenger kpishi." 
Exodus19:19 Zum u ikpamkor lu seer a seer taver imo la yô, Mose lu ôron kwagh, Aôndo kpaa lu rumun un sha imo i taver je." 
Exodus19:20 TER sen sha uwo u Senai, sha ityough ki uwoogh la; tsô TER yila Mose er, a̱ unde sha ityough ki uwoogh kila; nahan Mose unde." 
Exodus19:21 Tsô TER kaa a Mose er: Hungwa, za kaa ior, ve̱ de aver ve̱ zaan hen TER er vea va kenger man ior kpishi vea gema vea tim ga." 
Exodus19:22 Upristi, mba ve mgbôghom a TER, ve̱ tsegha ayol a ve, sha er TER A̱ de te num sha a ve ga yô." 
Exodus19:23 Mose kaa a TER er: Ior vea fatyô u unden sha uwo u Senai ga, gadia U vande wan se kwagh je Wer: Ver ikighir hen itinewoogh, tsegha u." 
Exodus19:24 Tsô TER kaa a na er: Mough, hungwa shin inya; yô, shi hide unde vea Aron imôngo; kpa upristi kua ior ve̱ de aver ve̱ unden ve̱ vaan hen TER ga, sha er A̱ de te num sha a ve ga yô." 
Exodus19:25 Tsô Mose hungwa va hen ior va kaa ve. 
Exodus20:1 Tsô Aôndo ôr akaa angan cii, A kaa er:" 
Exodus20:2 Ka Mo TER, M lu Aôndo wou, u M dugh a we ken tar u Igipiti, ken ya u ikpan ye." 
Exodus20:3 De lu a mbaaôndo mbagenev ga, saa Mo." 
Exodus20:4 De gbe eev ga, shin kwagh u a bee ma kwagh u a lu sha kwavaôndo shin u a lu shin inya, shin u a lu shin mngerem ma shin mkur u inyaagh kpaa ga." 
Exodus20:5 De gur ve inya ga, shi de civir ve kpaa ga; gadia Mo TER, Aôndo wou, M ngu Aôndo u gban iwuhe; M tsahan mbayev sha ci u iferkwagh i uter zan zan ikov itiar man inyiin kpaa i mba ve kerem ihom;" 
Exodus20:6 kpa mba M doo ve ishima man ve we atindi a Am iko yô, M eren a udubu vev imôngo dedoo." 
Exodus20:7 De teren iti i TER Aôndo wou dang ga; gadia or u nan teren iti i TER dang dang yô, Una na nan ishô mayange ga." 
Exodus20:8 Umbur iyange i memen sha er u tsegha i yô. 
Exodus20:9 Ayange ataratar er tom man shi akaa a ou cii; 
Exodus20:10 kpa iyange i ataankarahar la, ka iyange i memen i TER, Aôndo wou, je la; sha iyange ngila de ker ma tom ave ga, we, man shi wan wou u nomso, man shi wan wou u kwase, man shi or u shiren we tom, man shi kwase u eren we tom, man shi uzendenya ou, man shi shiror u nan nyer u a nyôr;" 
Exodus20:11 gadia TER gba Sha man tar man zegemnger kua akaa a a lu ken ve cii, ayange ataratar, sha iyange i ataankarahar la A mem, ka nahan man TER A ver iyange i memen doo doo, A tsegh i kpaa ye." 
Exodus20:12 Civir teru man ngôu, er á seer we ayange ken tar u TER, Aôndo wou, A lu nan we yô." 
Exodus20:13 De woo or ga. 
Exodus20:14 De eren idya ga. 
Exodus20:15 De iin ga. 
Exodus20:16 De we or u wan ndor a we aie iyol ga. 
Exodus20:17 De tem ya u or u wan ndor a we ga, shi de tem kwase u or u wan ndor a we ga, shin or u shiren nan tom, shin kwase u eren nan tom, shin bua u nan, shin jaki i nan kpaa, kwagh môm môm u a lu u or u wan ndor a we yô, de tem ga." 
Exodus20:18 Ior cii lu nengen a idyuran man inyiar man imo i ikpamkor kua uwo u u lu duen mnyim la; er ior nenge a mi nahan yô, ve gbidye akarkase iyol, ve tile ca je." 
Exodus20:19 Ve kaa a Mose er: We, gba ôron kwagh a vese tsô, kpa sé ungwa; i̱ de luun Aôndo A̱ ôron kwagh a vese ga, er sé kpe ga yô." 
Exodus20:20 Tsô Mose kaa a ior er: De cie nen ga, gadia Aôndo va sha u va karen ne a kar tsô, mciem ma cian Un ma lu ne sha ishi, sha er né er isholibo ga yô." 
Exodus20:21 Tsô ior tile ca; kpa Mose yô, kporom hen angôghime henpe Aôndo lu la." 
Exodus20:22 TER kaa a Mose er: Kaa Mbaiserael nahan wer: Ne ayol a en kpaa, ne nenge er M er kwagh a ven Sha je yô." 
Exodus20:23 De eren nen ma kwagh seer sha a Mo ga; de eren nen mbaaôndo mba sha azurfa shin mba sha zenaria ga. 
Exodus20:24 Tam atse a inyaagh; ka sha a, ú naan iniav mbi nanden man iniav mbi bem, iyôngo you kua abua ou ye; sha hanma ijiir i M ver Mer, i̱ umbur iti Yam ker yô, Me va kohol we her, Me ver u doo doo." 
Exodus20:25 Man aluer ú tam atse sha awen yô, de te a sha awen a i vande kuan a ga; gadia aluer ú kende ikagh ki tomough you sha, sha mi yô, u hôngor a je ve." 
Exodus20:26 Man de undu sha atse Am sha agbur a tan angahar sha mi ga, sha u idyelegh wou a̱ de bughun sha a ga yô." 
Exodus21:1 Ka akaaôron a jirigh a ú ver ve sha ishi ne: 
Exodus21:2 Aluer ú yam kpan u Heberu yô, nana̱ er tom u kpan anyom ataratar; sha inyom i sha utaankaruhar la yô, nana̱ due ken kpan kera, gbilin." 
Exodus21:3 Aluer nan va tswen yô, nana̱ due di tswen; aluer nana̱ lu a kwase yô, kwase u nan a̱ due a̱ yem a nan imôngo." 
Exodus21:4 Aluer ter u nan una na nan kwase man nana̱ mar ônov a nan, a lu mba nomso shin mba kasev kpaa, kwase la vea ônov nav vea hingir mba ter u nan la, nana̱ due tswen." 
Exodus21:5 Kpa aluer kpan la nan kaa gbar gbar er: Terem man kwase wam kua mbayev av ve doom ishima, nahan me due ken kpan ga yô;" 
Exodus21:6 nahan, ter u nan a̱ za a nan hen Aôndo, a̱ va a nan hen hunda, shin hen kpande u imbusuhunda; ter u nan la, a̱ pev nan togh sha sua, nahan nana eren un tom gbem sha won." 
Exodus21:7 Aluer or nan tee wan u nan u kwase, á za hingir kpankwase yô, una due er ikpan i nomso i dugh nahan ga." 
Exodus21:8 Aluer una kera doo ter na, u a lu veren ishima er ma a lu kwase na la ga yô, a̱ de, i̱ paa un; una fatyô u geman un teen ikurior igen ga, sha ci u a tsugh un a tsugh yô." 
Exodus21:9 Aluer una lu veren ishima er a̱ lu kwase u wan na yô, a̱ er ase a na vough er i eren a ônov mba kasev nahan." 
Exodus21:10 Aluer una er ugen kpaa, kwaghyan u ngula man akondo na kua akaa a sha ivôson na, a̱ de panden a ga." 
Exodus21:11 Aluer una er un akaa atar ne ga yô, a̱ due ken kpan gbilin a̱ yem, i̱ de luun sha inyar ga." 
Exodus21:12 Or u nan gbidi or je nan kpe yô, i̱ wua nan kpee je." 
Exodus21:13 Kpa aluer or nan vande wan ishima nahan ga, kpa a lu Aôndo A ne er kwagh la a er nan nahan yô, Me ver ijiir i nana yevese á za yô." 
Exodus21:14 Aluer or nan va sha apera hen or u nan we ndor a nan, nana wua nan sha ayom yô, kar a nan hen atse Am a nanden nagh sha mi kera, sha er nana kpe yô." 
Exodus21:15 Or u nan gbidi ter u nan shin ngô u nan yô, i̱ wua nan kpee je." 
Exodus21:16 Or u nan ii or, nan za tee, shin i kohol nan a mi ave yô, i̱ wua nan kpee je." 
Exodus21:17 Or u nan toho ter u nan shin ngô u nan yô, i̱ wua nan kpee je." 
Exodus21:18 Man aluer nomsombaiorov vea lu nôngon num, man ugen a kema ugen iwen, shin una ta nan iju man nana kpe ga, kpa nana lu sha gambe uange yô," 
Exodus21:19 aluer nana shi nana mough nana gba zenden sha aga u nan yô, u a gbidi nan la, a war je ve; kpa a̱ kimbi nan shighe u nan u a vihi nan la, shi a̱ sôr nan angev mbu nan, mbu̱ bee." 
Exodus21:20 Aluer or a gbidye kpan u nan shin kpan u nan u kwase sha gbo, man una gema kpe nan sha ave yô, i̱ or iyev la kpee je." 
Exodus21:21 Kpa aluer una tsa iyange i môm, shin ayange ahar yô, á kera or iyev ga; gadia ka inyaregh ki nan je." 
Exodus21:22 Aluer nomsombaiorov vea lu nôngon num man ugen a ta sha kwase uya, je una dugh iyav, kpa kwagh ugen a kera er ga yô, i̱ ya or la zwajirigh kpee je, sha kwagh u nom u kwase la a kaa yô; nana̱ kimbi er mbaajiriv ve rumun la." 
Exodus21:23 Kpa aluer ma kwaghbo ugen kposo a er yô, i̱ kimbi uma sha uma," 
Exodus21:24 ishe sha ishe, inyigh sha inyi, uwegh sha uwe, nguhar sha nguhar," 
Exodus21:25 usuhian sha usuhian, ivav sha ivav, ibembegh sha ibembe." 
Exodus21:26 Aluer or á ta kpan u nan u nomso shin u kwase sambe sha ishe, nana vihi i yô, nana̱ dugh un ken kpan kera, sha ci u ishe na la." 
Exodus21:27 Man aluer nan tsuwa kpan u nan u nomso shin u kwase inyigh kpaa, nana̱ dugh un ken kpan kera, sha ci u inyigh nagh kila." 
Exodus21:28 Aluer bua una kôr nomsoor shin kwase, vea kpe yô, i̱ wua bua la sha awen kpee je, i̱ de ye inyam na ga; kpa or u bua la yô, i̱ de nan." 
Exodus21:29 Kpa aluer kera je, bua la una kôron, man i kaa or u a lu u nan la, kpa nana kura un ga, zan zan una va wua nomsoor shin kwase yô, i̱ wua bua la sha awen kpee je, or u a lu u nan la kpaa, i̱ wua nan." 
Exodus21:30 Man aluer á wa nan ipaa yô, nana̱ na ipaa sha u paan uma u nan, sha hanma kwagh u i we nan la cii." 
Exodus21:31 Shin a lu wan u nomso una kôr, shin a lu u kwase kpaa, kape á kure ijir i nan ne." 
Exodus21:32 Aluer bua la una kôr kpan u nomso shin kpan u kwase yô, nana̱ kimbi ter la ushekel mba azurfa ikundugber, man shi i̱ wua bua la sha awen." 
Exodus21:33 Aluer or nana bugh ijôr, shin nana̱ time ijôr man nana wuhe i hunda ga, man bua shin jaki a va gba shimi yô," 
Exodus21:34 or u ijôr la, nana̱ kimbi, nana̱ na or la inyaregh, kpa gundu la yô, a̱ hingir u nan." 
Exodus21:35 Aluer bua u or una kôr bua u orgen, je una wua un yô, ve̱ tee bua u uma la, ve̱ kar inyaregh nagh, gundu la kpaa ve̱ kar." 
Exodus21:36 Man aluer kera je kpa i vande fan er bua la a ker man or u bua la a kura un ga yô, nana̱ kimbi vough, bua sha bua, gundu la a̱ hingir u nan." 
Exodus22:1 Aluer or ii bua shin iyôngo nana sôngo, shin nana tee yô, nana̱ kimbi ibua itian sha bua u môm la, man iyôngo inyiin sha iyôngo i môm la." 
Exodus22:2 Aluer á kôr ormbaiv iin ave je, man á gbidye nan, nana kpe yô, ibo ia lu sha awambe a nan la ga," 
Exodus22:3 kpa aluer iyange ia due nan a mi yô, ibo ia lu sha awambe a nan. Nana̱ kimbi kpee; aluer nan ngu a kwagh ga yô, i̱ tee nan sha ci u iv mbu nan." 
Exodus22:4 Man aluer á kohol nan a kwagh u nan ii la ave, uma yô, á lu bua, shin jaki, shin iyôngo yô, nana̱ kimbi kwa har." 
Exodus22:5 Aluer or nana pase ilev mbi nan er mbi̱ ya ikôngough ki nan shin sule u nan u wain man mbia za ya kwagh ken ikôngough ki orgen yô, nana̱ kimbi sha vegher-ikôngo u nan u hemban doon man veghersule u wain u nan u hemban doon kpaa." 
Exodus22:6 Aluer usu ua gba, ua hia usaa man aile a uyia, shin alakema u shisha; shin ikôngough kia hia yô; u nan nande usu la nana̱ kimbi kpee je." 
Exodus22:7 Aluer or á na orgen inyaregh shin akaa agen er nan koso man i va ii a hen ya u or la yô, a̱ zua a ormbaiv la yô, nana̱ kimbi kwa har." 
Exodus22:8 Man aluer á zua a ormbaiv la ga yô, orya la nana̱ za hen Aôndo, nana̱ za bum er nan bende uwegh sha inyaregh ki or la ga yô." 
Exodus22:9 Hanma kwagh u a nzughul, shin a lu kwagh u bua, shin jaki, shin iyôngo, shin ikondo, shin hanma kwagh u a saa, man orgen nan kaa er: Ka un je ne yô; ve uhar cii, i̱ za a kwagh ve sha ishigh ki Aôndo; or u Aôndo A ne nan ibo yô, nana̱ kimbi ugen la kwa har." 
Exodus22:10 Aluer or á na orgen jaki, shin bua, shin iyôngo, shin hanma ilegh er nan nengen sha min, man aluer ki kpe shin kia gba angev, shin a kor ki, or á nenge ga yô," 
Exodus22:11 mbum u TER una kure ve kwagh la, shin nan bende uwegh sha kwagh u or la, shin nan bende ga yô; or u i lu kwagh u nan la kpaa i̱ kuma nan, nahan ugen la nana kimbi ga." 
Exodus22:12 Kpa aluer a ii a ii kwagh la hen a nan je yô, nana̱ kimbi or u kwagh la." 
Exodus22:13 Man aluer á ande un a ande yô, nana̱ va a mi sha ci u shiada; kwagh u i ande la yô, nana kimbi ga." 
Exodus22:14 Aluer or á goho kwagh hen or man kwagh la za vihi iyol, shin una kpe, man or u kwagh la una lu heregh a na ga yô, nana̱ kimbi kpee je." 
Exodus22:15 Kpa aluer or u kwagh la una lu heregh a na imôngo yô, nana̱ kimbi ga; aluer i vande ôron veren sha inyar yô, i̱ kure sha ki." 
Exodus22:16 Aluer or á mee iniunkwase i i lu a vande tôndon zwa u nan or ga, nana̱ yav a mi yô, nana̱ kem i kpee, i̱ hingir kwase u nan." 
Exodus22:17 Aluer ter na una venda gbang gbang u nan nan i yô, nana̱ na inyaregh vough er i kemen anuunaukase nahan." 
Exodus22:18 De kera deen kwase u eren ahir a̱ luun uma ga. 
Exodus22:19 Or u nan yav a zendenya yô, i̱ wua nan kpee." 
Exodus22:20 Or u nan ne ma aôndo ugen nagh ku sôngon i lu TER tseegh ga yô, i̱ tim nan kera purututu." 
Exodus22:21 De eren a shiror dang ga, shi de eren nan ican kpaa ga; gadia ne kpaa, ngise ne lu shir ken tar u Igipiti." 
Exodus22:22 De eren ma kwasecôghol ican ga, shin ancôghol kpaa ga." 
Exodus22:23 Aluer ú er ve ma ican man vea gema vea vaa a Mo yô, Me ungwa mliam vem kpee je;" 
Exodus22:24 ishima i vihin Yam ia yegh a yegh, Me wua ne sha sanker; kasev enev vea hingir kasev mba côgholov, ônov enev kpaa vea hingir ancôgholov." 
Exodus22:25 Aluer wea pwar inyaregh wea na icanor u ken ior Av, u nan lu a we imôngo yô, de eren a nan er or u cirin or injô nahan ga, shi de kera we nan mngerem kpaa ga." 
Exodus22:26 Aluer wea ngohol orgen riga sha ityungu yô, hide nan a mi je er iyange i lu a mire ga yô;" 
Exodus22:27 gadia ka un tseegh a lu kwagh na u cirin ye, ka ikondo i cirin kwavyolough na je la. Ka nyi una yav a mini? Nahan yô, zum u una vaa a Mo yô, Me ungwa; gadia M ngu a mhôônom ma zungwen." 
Exodus22:28 De toho Aôndo ga, shi de tem kwaghbo sha ortaregh u nongo wou kpaa ga." 
Exodus22:29 De ngôôr u nan nagh ku iyiav youv mbi ken sule wou ga, kua wain wou kpaa ga. Waniunda u ken ônov ou mba nomso ú naan Mo." 
Exodus22:30 Kape ú er a abua ou kua iyôngo you kpaa la; ayange ataankarahar a̱ lu a ngô na, sha iyange i sha anigheni la yô, ú nam un." 
Exodus22:31 Lum nen uicighanmbaiorov; nahan yô, de ye nen ma inyam i inyamikume i woo i ken toho ga; gbihi nen iwa i." 
Exodus23:1 De samber a gwa u aiegh ga; de te ken iferor, hingir orshiada u aperagh ga." 
Exodus23:2 De dondo ikpelaior sha ifer i eren ga; shi de eren shiada sha kwagh nyôron nongo a ikpelaior sha u vihin ijir ga; 
Exodus23:3 man shi de ôron icanor ijir wer, ka icanor ga." 
Exodus23:4 Aluer wea kohol bua u orihom wou shin jaki u nan una saan toho yô, hide a mi va na nan kpee je." 
Exodus23:5 Aluer wea nenge a jaki i or u nan ker u ihom, ikav mbia kighir i hen inya yô, de undu nan a mi tswen ga, wase nan u saghen kpee je." 
Exodus23:6 De hundun ijir i icanor wou zum u á va yer ijir na la ga. 
Exodus23:7 Lu ca a kwagh u aiegh; de woo orishôôgh man orperapera ga; gadia Me na oriboogh ishô ga. 
Exodus23:8 Man shi de ngohol inyaregh ki yamen ishô a mi la ga; gadia inyaregh ki yamen ishô a mi la, ki pirin mba ve nenge la ashe, shi ki nzughul mbaperapera ijir kpaa." 
Exodus23:9 De eren shiror ican ga; gadia ne fa inja i shiror, gadia ne kpaa ne lu shir ken tar u Igipiti." 
Exodus23:10 Kaha sule wou anyom ataratar, kohol iyiav mbi ken u, ombo;" 
Exodus23:11 kpa sha inyom i sha utaankaruhar la yô, de u, u̱ gba lun tsô, sha er atsanaior a ior ou vea ya yô; kwagh u una shi yô, inyamtoho i̱ mase yan. Ka ape ú eren a sule wou u wain kua u olev kpaa la." 
Exodus23:12 Er tom wou ayange ataratar, sha iyange i ataankarahar la mem, sha er bua wou kua jaki you kpaa ve̱ mem, wan u kpankwase wou kua shiror kpaa, i̱ yôhôl ve iyol." 
Exodus23:13 Akaa a M kaa ne ne cii, waan nen a iko, de teren nen ati a mbaaôndo mbagenev ga, i̱ de ongo a sha zwa wou ga." 
Exodus23:14 Eren nen Mo iniongo hanma inyom, kwa tar." 
Exodus23:15 Eren nen iniongo i bredi u i we kwa sha mi ga yô; ayange ataankarahar cii, ú ya bredi u i we kwa sha mi ga la, er M kaa u nahan, sha shighe u i ver la, sha uwer u Abiba; gadia ka sha u man u dugh ken tar u Igipiti ye; or a̱ de ve sha ishigh Yagh aveve ga;" 
Exodus23:16 man iniongo i sunda, ka iyiav mbi tsutswav mbi sha tom wou, mbi u lee ken sule je la, kua iniongo i kurun a iyiav sha mbee u inyom, zum u u kurun a akaa a ken sule a sha tom wou la." 
Exodus23:17 Hanma inyom nomsombaiorov ou cii, ve̱ va sha ishigh ki TER Aôndo kwa tar." 
Exodus23:18 De senge awambe a nagh Agh a kwagh u i we kwa sha mi imôngo ga; ahôm a iniongo Yam kpaa a̱ de luun her zan zan sev mbu aven ga. 
Exodus23:19 Iyiav mbi tsutswav mbi hemban doon mbi ken sule wou, ú za a mi ken iyou i TER, Aôndo wou. De jiir wanivo sha atumba a ngô na ga." 
Exodus23:20 Nenge, M ngu tindin Ortyom Mer, A̱ hemen we gbenda, A̱ za nyôr a we hen ijiir i M ser i yô." 
Exodus23:21 Ver nen ishima sha a Na, ver nen ato sha imo Na kpaa; shi de hendan nen a Na ga; gadia Una de ne asorabo a en ga; gadia iti Yam ngi ken a Na." 
Exodus23:22 Aluer ú ver ato sha imo Na mimi je, ú er akaa a M kaa cii yô, Me hingir orihom u mbaihomov ou, man shi orhendan a mbaahendanev ou." 
Exodus23:23 Gadia Ortyom Wam Una hemen we gbenda Una za nyôr a we hen Mbaamor man Mbahiti man Mbaperishi man Mbakanaan man Mbahivi man Mbayebushi. Me tim ve kera kpaa. 
Exodus23:24 De gur mbaaôndo vev inya ga, shi de civir ve kpaa ga, shi de eren sha aeren ve la kpaa ga; kpa yôhôl ve kera ci ca, hembe mtôm vem ma awenem avur avur." 
Exodus23:25 Civir TER, Aôndo wen, Un kpaa Una na iveren sha kwaghyan wou kua mngerem ou; shi Me kar a angev hen we kera kpaa." 
Exodus23:26 Ma iyav mbu dughun mbua lu ken tar wou ga, shin ikôm kpaa ga, Me iv iyenge i ayange ou." 
Exodus23:27 Me na mcieryol Wam una vande hemen a we, Me er mbaihomov ou cii vea yevese we." 
Exodus23:28 Me na, ihambe ia vande hemen a we ia za zenda Mbahivi man Mbakanaan man Mbahiti sha ishigh you kera," 
Exodus23:29 Me zenda ve sha ishigh you kera inyom i môm tseegh ga, sha er tar u̱ de hingir toho, inyamtoho i̱ seer ngeen i̱ ganden we inya ga." 
Exodus23:30 Me zendan ve sha ishigh you tegh tegh, zan zan ú mar ior á ngee, ú ya dyako u tar la." 
Exodus23:31 Me ver akighir a tar wou á hii hen Zegemnger u Nyian je zan zan á za ar hen zegemnger u Mbafiliti, shi á hii ken desereti zan zan á za ar hen ifi u Uferati, gadia Me gema mba ve tem ken tar la, Me na ve sha ikev you; ú zenda ve sha ishigh you kera." 
Exodus23:32 De ye ikur a ve ga, shin a mbaaôndo vev kpaa ga." 
Exodus23:33 Ve̱ de kera tem ken tar wou ga, sha u ve̱ de geman we, ú eren kwaghbo ga yô; gadia aluer ú civir mbaaôndo vev yô, á va hingir ihônon i á hôn u a mi je la." 
Exodus24:1 Tsô A kaa a Mose er: Unde va nen hen TER, we vea Aron man Nadabi man Abihu man mbatamen mba Iserael akunduatargber; gure nen ca je;" 
Exodus24:2 ka Mose tsegh a̱ kporom a TER ikua ikua ye; kpa ve yô, ve̱ de ve ikua ikua ga; ior kpaa ve̱ de undu a na imôngo ga." 
Exodus24:3 Tsô Mose va ôr ior akaaôron a TER cii, kua akaaôron a jirigh cii; ior cii rumun zwa môm, er: Akaaôron a TER A kaa cii, sé er sha mi." 
Exodus24:4 Tsô Mose nger akaaôron a TER cii; shi a mough pepe pepe, a ta atse a nan nagh sha mi hen tinewoogh la, man a tim mtôm ma awenem pue kar mhar sha ikwe i Mbaiserael pue kar ihiar la vough." 
Exodus24:5 Shi a tindi mbayevikaior mba ken Mbaiserael ve na TER nagh ku nanden, shi ve sôngo TER nagh ku bem sha anomabua." 
Exodus24:6 Nahan Mose pande awambe la haa shin utasa; agen la yô, a mishi sha atse a nanden nagh sha mi la." 
Exodus24:7 A tôô Ruamabera u ikuryan la, a ôr, ior ungwa dedoo; ve kaa er: Akaa a TER A kaa la cii, sé er, shi sé waan a iko kpaa." 
Exodus24:8 Tsô Mose tôô awambe la, mishi sha ior, a kaa er: Ka awambe a ikuryan i TER A ye a ven sha akaaôron ne cii je ne." 
Exodus24:9 Nahan Mose vea Aron man Nadabi man Abihu man mbatamen mba Iserael akunduatargber mbala ve unde," 
Exodus24:10 ve nenge a Aôndo u Iserael; ape angahar a Na a lu, vegher u shin, lu er tembe u i kôngor u sha iwen i safir yô, wanger wang je, er kwavaôndo nahan." 
Exodus24:11 A bende mbatamen mba Iserael ave ga, ve nenge a Aôndo, ve ya kwagh, ve ma kwagh." 
Exodus24:12 Tsô TER kaa a Mose er: Unde va her a Mo sha uwo, lu sha mi; yô, Me na u ikpande i awen man atindiakaa kua akaawan a M nger sha u tesen ve a yô." 
Exodus24:13 Tso Mose mough, un vea Yosua, wanakiriki na; nahan Mose unde sha uwo u Aôndo." 
Exodus24:14 A gema a kaa a mbatamen er: Keghen nen se heen zan zan se hire hen a ven; nenge, Aron vea Hur mba a ven imôngo; hanma or u nan lu a ijir i yilan yô, nana̱ za hen ve." 
Exodus24:15 Nahan Mose unde sha uwo; tsô ibeenegh cir uwo la. 
Exodus24:16 Iengem i TER lu sha uwo u Senai, ibeenegh kpaa cir u ayange ataratar; sha iyange i ataankarahar la, A yila Mose ken atô u ibeen." 
Exodus24:17 M-ande u iengem i TER lu er usu u yeghen nahan sha ityough ki uwoogh sha ashe a Mbaiserael. 
Exodus24:18 Tsô Mose nyôr ken atô u ibeenegh kila, gba unden sha uwo. Mose tsa sha uwo ayange akunduahar man aime akunduahar." 
Exodus25:1 Tsô TER ôr kwagh a Mose, A kaa er:" 
Exodus25:2 Kaa Mbaiserael ve̱ vam a nagh; ngohol nagh Agh hen hanma or u i doo nan u nan yô. 
Exodus25:3 Nagh ku né ngohol hen a ve yô, ka ku ne: zenaria man azurfa man togula" 
Exodus25:4 man ikondo i kwel man i nyian dindee man i nyian bong man ikondo i pupuu i kôngor man aive a ivo 
Exodus25:5 man akôv a anomaiyôngo a i nyian a yô, man akôv a ayu man kon u saa" 
Exodus25:6 man mkurem sha ci u tsaren man ilyôghonov sha ci u mkurem ma shighen man kwaghhumandoon u nanden nagh a mi 
Exodus25:7 man awen a oniki man shi awen a varen sha efodi man sha ikpa i sha vanger. 
Exodus25:8 Shi ve̱ erem icighanjiir sha er Me tema ve her atô yô. 
Exodus25:9 Er M tese u akaa ne nahan, ikav i tabernakel, man ikav i akaa a keregh cii, kape za er nen un je la." 
Exodus25:10 Ve̱ er areki sha kon u saa; iniembe na i̱ lu aseva ahar cir tiôn, igbanger na ishiva i môm cir tiôn, ityaven na kpaa ishiva i môm cir tiôn." 
Exodus25:11 Cir un zenaria u wang; kimi kua ken won kpaa ú cir, shi kase un tsar u zenaria tser." 
Exodus25:12 Haa ahye a zenaria anyiin sha ci na, var a shin angahar a na a anyiin la; vegher keen ahye ahar shi vegher keen kpaa ahye ahar." 
Exodus25:13 Gba igbough sha kon u saa, cir mbi zenaria iyol." 
Exodus25:14 Shindi igbough mbila ken ahye a ken ambusu a areki la, sha u tôôn areki a min." 
Exodus25:15 Igbough la kpaa mbi̱ lu ken ahye a areki la, i̱ de tsough mbi kera ga." 
Exodus25:16 Areki la yô, ú wa Shiada u Me na u la ker." 
Exodus25:17 Er ijiir i nan iwom her sha zenaria u wang; iniembe i i, i̱ lu aseva ahar cir tiôn, igbanger na ishiva i môm cir tiôn." 
Exodus25:18 Shi er ucerubi uhar sha zenaria; var ve a var sha akur ahar a ijiir i nan iwom her la. 
Exodus25:19 Er cerubi u môm sha kur ne, u môm sha kur ne, ucerubi ve̱ lu kwagh môm a ijiir i nan iwom her, sha akur a na ahar la, ijoron i̱ de lu ga." 
Exodus25:20 Ucerubi mbala ve̱ naregh akper a ve, ve̱ cir ijiir i nan iwom her la sha akper a ve, ve̱ zua ishigh ayol a ve; ishiv mbi ucerubi mbi kenger ijiir i nan iwom her la." 
Exodus25:21 Ver ijiir i nan iwom her la sha areki; areki la yô, ú wa Shiada u Me na u la ker." 
Exodus25:22 Me kohol we ker, Me ôr kwagh a we hen ijiir i nan iwom her la, hen atô u ucerubi uhar, mba ve lu sha areki u shiada la, Me kaa u akaa cii a Me kaa Mer Mbaiserael ve̱ er a la." 
Exodus25:23 Shi er tebul sha kon u saa, iniembe na i̱ lu aseva ahar, igbanger na ishiva i môm, ityaven na ishiva i môm cir tiôn." 
Exodus25:24 Cir un zenaria u wang iyol, kase un tsar u zenaria tser." 
Exodus25:25 Man shi kase un kpande u ken imbusu na, u̱ gbangese er ikevwe nahan, ningir tser, man kurkpandegh la kpaa, kase u tsar u zenaria, tser." 
Exodus25:26 Er un ahye a zenaria anyiin, wa ahye la sha azongo anyiin a angahar a na anyiin la." 
Exodus25:27 Ka ikua ikua a kpande u ken ambusu na la man ahye la a lu, sha ci u ajiir a igbough mbi tôôn tebul a mi la ye." 
Exodus25:28 Gba igbough sha kon u saa, cir mbi zenaria iyol, sha u tôôn tebul a mi." 
Exodus25:29 Er utasa nav man agbande a na, man ugber nav man ayongo a na a haan kwagh a mi; ka zenaria u wang ú er ve a mi ye." 
Exodus25:30 Sha tebul la yô, ú veren ubredi mba sha ishi la, sha ishigh Yagh gbem." 
Exodus25:31 Shi er daarimenger sha zenaria uwang; i̱ var a var daarimenger la, ityô na man gôngor na; angbandev nav man adôôr a na kua uimondon nav cii, ve̱ lu kwagh môm a na, ijoron i̱ de lu ga;" 
Exodus25:32 a̱ lu a agbaa ataratar ken ambusu a na; agbaa a daarimenger atar ken imbusu ingin, man agbaa a daarimenger atar ken imbusu ingila;" 
Exodus25:33 angbandev utar mba i er er uikparen mba amondi nahan sha gbaa môm, idyôôrough kua imondon; man shi angbandev utar mba i er er uikparen mba amondi nahan sha gbaa ugen, idyôôrough kua imondon; ka ape i̱ er agbaa ataratar a a dugh sha daarimenger la je la." 
Exodus25:34 Sha daarimenger la iyol na angbandev unyiin mba i er er uikparen mba amondi nahan, adôôr a na kua uimondon nav;" 
Exodus25:35 idyôôrough môm shin agbaa a ahar a a zer ken na la; shi idyôôrough môm shin agbaa a ahar a a zer ken na la; shi idyôôrough môm shin agbaa a ahar a a zer ken na la, sha ci u agbaa a ataratar a a dugh sha daarimenger la." 
Exodus25:36 Adôôr a ve man agbaa a ve, ve̱ lu kwagh môm a na, ijoron i̱ de lu ga; un jimin cii i̱ var un a var sha zenaria u wang." 
Exodus25:37 Er un amenger ataankarahar; á veren amenger a na, sha er a̱ wanger ken hemen na yô." 
Exodus25:38 Akambe a na kua utasa nav mba kuran il mi, i̱ er ve sha zenaria u wang." 
Exodus25:39 Ka sha zenaria u wang u a kom talenti môm, á er un kua ikav mbin cii kpaa ye." 
Exodus25:40 Yô, ver ishima, er ve sha akav a ve, a i tese u sha uwo ne." 
Exodus26:1 Man shi er tabernakel la sha akondo a yisan pue; sha ikondo i pupuu i kôngor i sha mou u sendan man i kwel man i̱ nyian dindee man i nyian bong a ucerubi sha mi, i̱ lu or u fan eev nana̱ er ye." 
Exodus26:2 Iniembe i hanma ikondo i yisan i̱ lu aseva ikundu kar anigheni, igbangese i hanma ikondo i yisan i̱ lu aseva anyiin; akondo a yisan la cii, a̱ lu vough vough." 
Exodus26:3 Akondo a yisan ataan i̱ zua a, i̱ kor; ataan agen la kpaa shi i̱ zua a, i̱ kor." 
Exodus26:4 Er ahura a wever a kwel sha kur u ikondo i ken kpe, i ikondo i yisan i i zough i la; kape shi ú er sha kur u ikondo i ken kpe, i ikondo i yisan i sha uhar i i zough a zua i kpaa la." 
Exodus26:5 Er ahura a wever akunduahargber sha ikondo i yisan i môm la, man shi er ahura a wever akunduahargber sha kur u ikondo i yisan i ken kpe, i ikondo i sha uhar i i zough i la; ahura a wever a̱ ngara cii, a̱ zua sha akar akar." 
Exodus26:6 Er uiwever mba zenaria akunduahargber, zua akondo a yisan la sha uiwever, sha u tabernakel una lu kwagh môm yô." 
Exodus26:7 Tume akondo a yisan sha aive a ivo, a̱ lu tenti u á cirin tabernakel a mi yô; ka akondo a yisan pue kar môm ú tume ye." 
Exodus26:8 Iniembe i hanma ikondo i yisan i̱ lu aseva ikundugber, igbanger i hanma ikondo i yisan aseva anyiin; akondo a yisan a pue kar môm la, a̱ lu vough vough." 
Exodus26:9 Zua akondo a yisan ataan kor, shi zua akondo a yisan ataratar kor, hure ikondo i yisan i sha ataratar i sha hunda u tenti la kpar uhar." 
Exodus26:10 Er ahura a wever akunduahargber sha kur u ikondo i ken kpe, i ikondo i yisan i i zough i la, man ahura a wever akunduahargber sha kur u ikondo i yisan i sha uhar i i zough i la." 
Exodus26:11 Er uiwever mba togula akunduahargber, wever uiwever mbala sha ahura a wever la, zua tenti imôngo sha u una lu kwagh môm yô." 
Exodus26:12 Vegher u akondo a yisan u a neer a shir la, ka vegher u ikondo i yisan i i neer je la, gema un cir un ken ijime i tabernakel." 
Exodus26:13 Man ishiva i môm i ken imbusu i keen man ishiva i môm i ken imbusu i keela a neer sha iniembe i akondo a yisan a tenti la, a̱ shir ken ambusu a tabernakel keen man keela, a̱ cir un." 
Exodus26:14 Er kwagh u cirin tenti a mi sha akôv a anomaiyôngo a i nyian a yô; man kwagh u cirin un sha akôv a ayu, a̱ mase sha." 
Exodus26:15 Man shi gba mtôm ma ipeem ma tabernakel sha kon u saa. 
Exodus26:16 Ityaven i ityô i̱ lu aseva pue man igbanger i hanma ityôgh i̱ lu ishiva i môm cir tiôn. 
Exodus26:17 Hanma ityôgh ki̱ lu a azongo ahar a i zough a zua a yô; ka ape u er mtôm ma ipeem ma tabernakel cii la. 
Exodus26:18 Gba mtôm ma ipeem sha ci u tabernakel; mtôm ma ipeem ikundu sha ci u vegher u ken imbusutariyan ken ian i imbusutariyan la. 
Exodus26:19 Shi er agbur akunduahar sha azurfa shin atô a mtôm ma ipeem ikundu, agbur ahar shin ityôgh i môm, sha ci u azongo a ki ahar la, man shi agbur ahar shin ityôgh kigenegh sha ci u azongo a ki ahar la;" 
Exodus26:20 man vegher u tabernakel ugen kpaa, vegher u ken imbusutarimese la, mtôm ma ipeem ikundu;" 
Exodus26:21 man agbur a ve akunduahar mba sha azurfa; agbur ahar shin ityôgh i môm, man agbur ahar shin ityôgh kigenegh." 
Exodus26:22 Gba mtôm mtaratar sha ci u vegher u ken ijime i tabernakel shin ian i ityôtar la. 
Exodus26:23 Gba mtôm mhar sha ci u azongo a tabernakel ken ijime; 
Exodus26:24 i̱ zua ma mhar ken akur (ma guvur), ma̱ lu kwagh môm vegher u shin kua vegher u sha, zan zan ar sha ihye la; kape ma mhar mara cii ma̱ lu la; maa lu sha ci u azongo ahar la." 
Exodus26:25 Mtôm ma ipeem maa lu anigheni kua agbur a ma a sha azurfa la; agbur pue kar ataratar, agbur ahar shin ityôgh i môm, shi agbur ahar shin ityôgh kigenegh." 
Exodus26:26 Er itiran i sha kon u saa; itiran sha ci u mtôm ma ipeem ken imbusu i tabernakel i môm. 
Exodus26:27 Man itiran itian sha ci u mtôm ma ipeem ma ken imbusu i tabernakel igen la; shi itiran itian kpaa sha ci u mtôm ma ken ijime i tabernakel, vegher u shin ityôtar la." 
Exodus26:28 Teran u hen atô la, u̱ tera hen atô u mtôm ma ipeem mara, hii hen kpe ungun zan zan u̱ za ar ken kpe ungula." 
Exodus26:29 Cir mtôm ma ipeem mara zenaria iyol, er ahye a ma sha zenaria, a̱ lu ajiir a itiran la; shi cir itiran la zenaria iyol kpaa." 
Exodus26:30 Tim tabernakel la, er i tese u ikav na sha uwo nahan." 
Exodus26:31 Kor ikondo i yisan, sha ikondo i kwel man i nyian dindee man i nyian bong man i pupuu i kôngor, i sha mou u sendan, a ucerubi sha mi, i̱ lu or u fan eev nana̱ er ye." 
Exodus26:32 Wever i sha mtôm ma saa mnyiin ma i cir ma zenaria iyol ma ma lu a uiwever mba zenaria ma ma til sha agbur a anyiin a azurfa la. 
Exodus26:33 Wever ikondo i yisan la sha uiwever; yô, nyôr a areki u shiada ken kpar u ikondo i yisan la; ikondo i yisan la i̱ lu ne ndor hen atô u icighankpar a icighankpar u hemban cii la." 
Exodus26:34 Man shi ver ijiir i nan iwom her la, sha areki u shiada ken icighankpar u hemban cii la." 
Exodus26:35 Ver tebul ken won u ikondo i yisan la, man daarimenger kpaa, a̱ lu sha ishigh ki tebul vegher u tabernakel ken ian i imbusutariyan la; ver tebul hen vegher u ken imbusutarimese." 
Exodus26:36 Er ikondo i yisan hunda u tenti a mi, i kwel man i nyian dindee man i nyian bong man ikondo i pupuu i kôngor i sha mou u sendan, i̱ lu or u eren kwagh sha hwe nana̱ er ye." 
Exodus26:37 Gba mtôm ma saa mtaan sha ci u ikondo i yisan la, cir ma zenaria iyol; uiwever mba ma kpaa ve̱ lu mba zenaria; haa ma agbur a togula ataan." 
Exodus27:1 Man shi er atse a nanden nagh sha mi, sha kon u saa, iniembe i a i̱ lu aseva ataan, igbanger i a kpaa, i̱ lu aseva ataan, a̱ lu akuku; ityaven i̱ a i̱ lu aseva atar." 
Exodus27:2 Er akor sha azongo a a anyiin; akor a a la, a̱ lu kwagh môm a a, ijoron i̱ de lu ga; cir a togula iyol." 
Exodus27:3 Shi er ityev mbi a sha ci u kuran a mtwem, man indyuhar i a, man utasa mba a, man iyôv mbi a mbi dughun inyam a mi, man ugbande mba tôôn usu a mi; ikav mbi a cii, er mbi sha togula." 
Exodus27:4 Er a kperiyôô sha togula; gema er ahye a togula anyiin sha kper la, sha azongo a anyiin." 
Exodus27:5 Kase un shin tsembe u atse la, vegher u shin; kperiyôô la, a̱ va saa her atô u atsegh la." 
Exodus27:6 Man shi gba igbough sha ci u atse la, igbough mbi sha kon u saa, cir mbi togula iyol." 
Exodus27:7 I̱ wa igbough mbila ken ahye la, igbough mbi̱ lu sha ambusu ahar a atsegh la, shighe u á tôôn a la." 
Exodus27:8 Er a sha ikpande, a̱ lu a ho kimi; er i tese u sha uwo nahan, kape ve̱ er a la." 
Exodus27:9 Man shi kase kwa, wa tembe u tabernakel atô; vegher u ken imbusutariyan ken ian i imbusutariyan la, akondo a kasen tembe a mi la, a̱ lu ikondo i pupuu i kôngor i sha mou u̱ sendan; iniembe i vegher u môm i̱ lu aseva deri;" 
Exodus27:10 mtôm nam ma̱ lu ikundu, agbur a togula a ma kpaa a̱ lu ikundu; uiwever mba mtôm mara kua ahye a ma la, ve̱ lu mba azurfa." 
Exodus27:11 Vegher u imbusutarimese kpaa, iniembe i akondo a kasen la, a̱ lu aseva deri, mtôm nam ma lu ikundu, agbur a togula a ma kpaa a̱ lu ikundu; uiwever mba mtôm mara kua ahye a ma la, ve̱ lu mba azurfa." 
Exodus27:12 Igbanger i tembe vegher u shin ityôtar yô, akondo a kasen, a̱ lu aseva akunduahargber, mtôm nam ma̱ lu pue, agbur a ma kpaa a̱ lu pue." 
Exodus27:13 Igbanger i tembe vegher u sha ityoughkitaregh hen ian i ityoughkitaregh yô, i̱ lu aseva akunduahargber." 
Exodus27:14 Akondo a kasen vegher môm, a̱ lu aseva pue kar ataan, mtôm nam mtar, agbur a ma kpaa, a̱ lu atar." 
Exodus27:15 Vegher ugen la kpaa, akondo a kasen a̱ lu aseva pue kar ataan, mtôm nam mtar, agbur a ma kpaa a̱ lu atar." 
Exodus27:16 Sha hunda u tembe la, kwagh u yisan a̱ lu iniembe aseva ikundu, u i er un sha ikondo i kwel man i nyian dindee man i nyian bong man ikondo i pupuu i kôngor i sha mou u sendan, i̱ lu or u eren kwagh sha hwe nana̱ er ye; mtôm nam mnyiin, man agbur a ma kpaa anyiin." 
Exodus27:17 Mtôm ma ma kase tembe la cii, i̱ er ma ahye a azurfa; uiwever mba ma kpaa ve̱ lu mba azurfa, agbur a ma a̱ lu a togula." 
Exodus27:18 Iniembe i tembe la i̱ lu aseva deri, igbanger na hanma vegher i̱ lu aseva akunduahargber, ityaven i u i̱ lu aseva ataan, sha ikondo i pupuu i kôngor i sha mou u sendan; agbur a ma a̱ lu a togula." 
Exodus27:19 Ikav mbi tomov mbi tabernakel cii, mbi i lu eren tom na a mi cii man amande na cii kua amande a tembe cii, i̱ lu togula i̱ er mi ye." 
Exodus27:20 Kaa Mbaiserael ve̱ va na u mkurem ma olev ma kumen ma wang, sha ci u tsaren, sha er á tsar imenger ia yeghen gbem yô." 
Exodus27:21 Ken tenti u kohol her la, ken won u ikondo i yisan i i lu sha ishigh ki Shiada la, Aron vea ônov nav ve̱ sôron i sha ishigh ki TER, i̱ yeghen aikighe zan zan sev mbu̱ aven a mi; i̱ hingir Mbaiserael tindi gbem sha ikov ikov." 
Exodus28:1 Due a anngôu Aron kua ônov nav, ken atô u Mbaiserael, ve̱ kporom her a we sha er a̱ eren Mo tom u pristi yô, ka Aron man Nadabi man Abihu man Eleasar kua Itamar, ônov mban Aron." 
Exodus28:2 Kor anngôu Aron uicighanmbaakondov, ve̱ lu kwagh u icivirigh u doon ashe." 
Exodus28:3 Man shi kaa mbafaneev cii, mba m iv ve a jijingi u mfe, ve̱ er Aron akondo, sha u á tsegha un a̱ eren Mo tom u pristi yô." 
Exodus28:4 Akondo a ve̱ er yô, ka ikpa i sha vanger man efodi man togo man riga u i er hwe sha mi man atsar a sha ityou man tsar u shin iwenge; ve̱ er uicighanmbaakondov sha ci u anngôu Aron man ônov nav, sha u a̱ eren Mo tom u pristi yô." 
Exodus28:5 Ve̱ tôô zenaria man ikondo i kwel man i nyian dindee man i nyian bong man ikondo i pupuu i kôngor. 
Exodus28:6 Ve̱ er efodi sha zenaria man sha ikondo i kwel man i nyian dindee man i nyian bong man ikondo i pupuu i kôngor i sha mou u sendan, i̱ lu or u fan eev nana̱ er ye." 
Exodus28:7 I̱ er un abamber ahar a sha avande sha u zuan un, i̱ zua un sha akur a na a ahar la." 
Exodus28:8 Tsar na u zeren un mi, u a lu sha mi la, a̱ lu injatom i môm a na, shi a̱ lu kwagh môm a na kpaa, sha zenaria man ikondo i kwel man i nyian dindee man i nyian bong man i pupuu i kôngor i sha mou u sendan." 
Exodus28:9 Man shi tôô awen a oniki ahar, gber ati a ônov mba Iserael sha a;" 
Exodus28:10 ati a ve ataratar sha iwen i môm man ati a ve ataratar agen la di sha iwen igen sha dondo dondo. 
Exodus28:11 I̱ lu or u fan u gberen akav sha iwen nana̱ er ye, er ka i gber akav sha kwagh nahan; gber ati a ônov mba Iserael sha awen ahar la; i̱ er a agbende a zenaria ken ijime." 
Exodus28:12 Var awen ahar la sha abamber a sha avande a efodi la, a̱ lu awen a umbur Mbaiserael a mi; Aron a̱ tôôn ati a ve sha avande a na ahar sha ishigh ki TER, sha er á umbur ve yô." 
Exodus28:13 Man shi er agbende a zenaria," 
Exodus28:14 kua mshirim mhar kpaa sha zenaria u wang; ishir ma er kwar nahan, zer mshirim ma ishir mara sha agbende la." 
Exodus28:15 Man shi er ikpa i sha vanger i kuren kwagh, i̱ lu or u fan eev nana̱ er i ye; er i, i̱ lu injatom i môm a efodi; ka sha zenaria man ikondo i kwel, man i nyian dindee man i nyian bong man ikondo i pupuu i kôngor i sha mou u sendan ú er i ye." 
Exodus28:16 A̱ lu ambusu akuku kpa uhar; iniembe na i̱ kuma abe môm, igbanger na kpaa i̱ kuma abe môm." 
Exodus28:17 Var awen sha mi, iniongo inyiin; nongo u̱ sardiu man topashi kua karbunkel, u̱ lu nongo u hiihii;" 
Exodus28:18 nongo u sha uhar yô, u̱ lu emeraldi man safir kua diamondi;" 
Exodus28:19 nongo u sha utar yô, hiakinto man agati kua ametise;" 
Exodus28:20 nongo u sha unyiin yô, beril man oniki kua yasepi; i̱ kase a zenaria i̱ var a sha ajiir a a." 
Exodus28:21 Awen la, a̱ lu pue kar ahar sha ati a ônov mba Iserael vough, sha ati a ve ser ser, er ka i gber ikav sha kwagh nahan; hanmô i̱ lu a iti i i; a̱ lu sha ci u ikwe i pue ka ihiar la." 
Exodus28:22 Er ikpa i sha vanger la mshirim ma i; ishir ma a ishir er kwar nahan, sha zenaria u wang." 
Exodus28:23 Var ikpa i sha vanger la ikunya i zenaria ihiar, zer ikunya ihiar la sha azongo ahar a ikpa i sha vanger la." 
Exodus28:24 Ta mshirim ma mhar ma i ishir ma sha zenaria la, sha ikunya ihiar i sha azongo a ikpa la." 
Exodus28:25 Ijô ihiar i mshirim mhar ma ishir la, zer i sha agbende ahar la, gema a var sha abamber a sha avande a efodi la vegher u ken ishi la." 
Exodus28:26 Var ikunya i zenaria ihiar, zer i sha azongo ahar a ikpa i sha vanger la, sha kur u kimi vegher u a lian ken efodi la." 
Exodus28:27 Shi er ikunya i zenaria ihiar zer i sha abamber a sha avande a efodi la vegher u shin, ken ishigh nagh, hen ijiir i i zough un la, i̱ gbihi tsar u efodi shin." 
Exodus28:28 Ve̱ zer ikpa i sha vanger la sha efodi, ve̱ ta ikunya i i ikar i kwel ve̱ zer i sha ikunya i efodi la, i̱ gbihi tsar u efodi shin, sha er ikpa i sha vanger ia kera bugh sha efodi kera ga yô." 
Exodus28:29 Nahan Aron una tôô ati a ônov mba Iserael sha ikpa i kuren kwagh la, sha ishima na, zum u una nyôron ken icighanjiir yô, sha er a̱ lu kwagh u á umbur sha ishigh ki TER gbem yô." 
Exodus28:30 Man wa Urim kua Tumim ken ikpa i kuren kwagh la; ve̱ lu Aron sha ishima, zum u una nyôr hen ishigh ki TER yô. Nahan Aron una tôôn kwagh u kuren kwagh u Mbaiserael sha ishima na, sha ishigh ki TER." 
Exodus28:31 Man shi er togo u efodi, u̱ lu kwel cii." 
Exodus28:32 U̱ lu a mon hen atô jighjigh, wa u tsar u i tume a tume yô, guu yisa er mon u riga u utya nahan, sha er ua ande ga yô." 
Exodus28:33 Shin mka na la, er anzôr a sha ikondo i kwel man i nyian dindee man i nyian bong, a̱ ningir mka la a̱ tser, man anmemem ma zenaria hen uharegh mba anzôrov mbala kpaa, ve̱ ningir ve̱ tser;" 
Exodus28:34 animem u zenaria man injôr man animem u zenaria man injôr shin mka u togo la, ve̱ ningir ve̱ tser." 
Exodus28:35 Aron a̱ lu a mi iyol shighe u una eren tom yô, á ungwan iov i u shighe u una nyôron ken icighankpar sha ishigh ki TER, man shighe u una duen kpaa, sha er una kpe ga yô." 
Exodus28:36 Er kpande sha zenaria u wang, nger sha mi, er ka i gber ikav sha kwagh nahan wer: I TSEGHA UN SHA CI U TER." 
Exodus28:37 Zer u sha kwar u kwel, u̱ lu sha atsar a sha ityou; ka vegher u ken ishigh ki tsar la ua lu ye." 
Exodus28:38 Ua luun Aron sha icul, nahan Aron una tôô ibo i uicighanmbaakaav, mba Mbaiserael vea tseghan sha uicighanmbainiav vev la; ua luun un sha icul gbem, sha u á rumun ve sha ishigh ki TER yô." 
Exodus28:39 Man tume riga la sha hwe sha ikondo i pupuu i kôngor, man shi er atsar a sha ityou sha ikondo i pupuu i kôngor, shi er tsar u shin iwenge, i̱ lu or u nan fe u eren hwe sha kwagh nana̱ er ye." 
Exodus28:40 Man shi kor ônov mba Aron uriga, er ve atsar a shin iwenge, man shi kor ve ader, i̱ lu kwagh u icivirigh u doon ashe." 
Exodus28:41 Yô, haa anngôu Aron ikav mbila iyol kua ônov nav kpaa a na imôngo; shighe ve mkurem, ver ve sha tom, tsegha ve, ve̱ eren Mo tom u Pristi." 
Exodus28:42 Kor ve afo a pupuu sha u cirin idyelegh ve, a̱ hii sha iwenge a saa sha anam;" 
Exodus28:43 Aron man ônov nav ve̱ huwan a shighe u vea nyôron ken tenti u kohol ker la, shin shighe u vea kporom hen atse sha u eren tom ken icighanjiir, sha u ve̱ de kpel ibo, ve̱ kpeen ga yô; i̱ lu un tindi u gbem kua tsombor na u ken ijime na." 
Exodus29:1 Kwagh u ú er ve, sha u tseghan ve, sha u ve̱ eren Mo tom u pristi yô: Kôr gumbua kua anomaiyôngo ahar, ve cii ve̱ de luun a ihogholough iyol ga," 
Exodus29:2 man shi tôô bredi u i we kwa sha mi ga, man umasa mba i we kwa sha mi ga, mba i nongo sha mkure yô, man umasa mba par par mba i we kwa sha mi ga, mba i shigh ve mkurem yô. Ka sha mwem ma alakema ma kengese ú er ve ye." 
Exodus29:3 Haa ve shin ikese i môm, tôô ve hen ikese, va a mi, kua nombua man anomaiyôngo ahar la kpaa." 
Exodus29:4 Yô, va a Aron man ônov nav hen hunda u tenti u kohol ker la, ôô ve iyol sha mnger." 
Exodus29:5 Tôô akondo la, haa Aron riga man togo u efodi man efodi kua ikpa i sha vanger la; kange un tsar u efodi la." 
Exodus29:6 Kange un atsar sha ityou, shi kange icighantsar sha atsar la kpaa." 
Exodus29:7 Gema tôô mkurem ma shighen, haa un sha ityou, shighe un." 
Exodus29:8 Va a ônov nav kpaa, haa ve uriga." 
Exodus29:9 Kange ve atsar shin awenge, Aron a ônov nav; cir ve ader sha ityou; tom u pristi u̱ lu u ve sha tindi gbem sha won; kape ú ver Aron a ônov nav sha tom je la." 
Exodus29:10 Nombua la kpaa, va a mi sha ishigh ki tenti u kohol ker la; Aron a ônov nav ve̱ penda ave ve sha ityough ki nombua la." 
Exodus29:11 Sôngo nombua la sha ishigh ki TER hen hunda u tenti u kohol ker la. 
Exodus29:12 Er awambe a nombua la sha ihôwe, felegh sha akoratseegh; awambe agen la cii, gema a, haa hen ityôatsegh." 
Exodus29:13 Tôô ahôm a a cir ikav mbi kimi la cii, kua ishwalegh ki mtema man ahi ahar kua ahôm a sha mi la, nande sha atse." 
Exodus29:14 Kpa inyam i nombua la a ikôvough nagh man icômbov nav yô, nande sha usu ken akôngoafogh; ka nagh ku isholibo je la." 
Exodus29:15 Shi kôr nomiyôngo la môm; Aron man ônov nav ve̱ penda ave ve sha ityough ki nomiyôngo la. 
Exodus29:16 Sôngo nomiyôngo la, kura awambe a na haa sha ambusuatsegh la, ningir tser." 
Exodus29:17 Bur nomiyôngo la, ôô ikav nav mbi ker atô la man akusu a na, penda sha aci a na kua ityough nagh." 
Exodus29:18 Nande nomiyôngo la jimin cii sha atse, ka nagh ku nanden TER, ka ihuma i doon, man nagh ku usugh ku nan TER je la." 
Exodus29:19 Shi kôr nomiyôngo ugen; Aron man ônov nav ve̱ penda ave a ve̱ sha ityough ki iyôngo la. 
Exodus29:20 Sôngo nomiyôngo la kpaa; er awambe a na, felegh Aron hen kpe u togh ku yanegh man hen akpeatogh a ônov nav a yan, man sha ihôwe ve u tamen u ken yan man ihônguhar ve u tamen u ken yan, gema awambe haa sha ambusuatsegh ningir tser." 
Exodus29:21 Er awambe a sha atse la, kua mkurem ma shighen kpaa, mishi Aron iyol kua sha akondo a na, man ônov nav, kua sha akondo a ônov nav kpaa; nahan á tsegha un kua akondo a na man ônov nav kua akondo a ônov nav kpaa." 
Exodus29:22 Shi tôô ahôm a anomaiyôngo la man tsa u ahômough man ahôm a a cir sha ikav mbi kimi man ishwalegh ki mtema man shi ahi ahar man ahôm a sha a, kua namegh ku yanegh (gadia ka nomiyôngo u tseghan or min je)," 
Exodus29:23 man shi dugh kpenbredi môm man masa môm u i we un mkurem, man shi masa u par par môm, shin ikese i umasa mba i we kwa sha mi ga yô, i i lu sha ishigh ki TER la;" 
Exodus29:24 gema ve cii penda sha ave a Aron kua a ônov nav cia ve, i̱ hingir nagh ku cian sha ishigh ki TER." 
Exodus29:25 Shi hire ngohol ve sha ave ve, nande sha atse sha nagh ku nanden la, i̱ lu ihuma i doon sha ishigh ki TER, ka nagh ku usugh ku nan TER je la." 
Exodus29:26 Tôô gugu u nomiyôngo u tseghan Aron mi la, cia un, a̱ hingir nagh ku cian sha ishigh ki TER; maa á hingir kwar wou." 
Exodus29:27 Tsegha gugu u nagh ku cian la, kua namegh ku kenden sha, ku i cie ku man ku i kende ku sha, sha nomiyôngo u tseghan or mi u a lu sha ci u Aron kua ônov nav la," 
Exodus29:28 ve̱ hingir kwar u Aron kua ônov nav gbem je, u Mbaiserael vea naan ve yô, gadia ka nagh ku kenden sha je, ka nagh ku kenden sha, ku Mbaiserael ve̱ kenden ku sha, sha iniav vev mbi bem, ka nagh vegh ku kenden sha ku ve ne TER je la." 
Exodus29:29 Uicighanmbaakondov mba Aron la, vea hingir mba ônov nav ken ijime na, sha er á shighe ve mkurem, á tsegha ve a mi iyol yô." 
Exodus29:30 Wan na u nana hingir pristi sha ityough nagh, u nana va nyôr ken tenti u kohol ker la, sha u eren tom ken icighanjiir yô, nana̱ haa ve ayange ataankarahar." 
Exodus29:31 Tôô nomiyôngo u tseghan or mi la, jiir inyam na ken icighanjiir." 
Exodus29:32 Aron a ônov nav, ve̱ ya inyam i iyôngo la kua bredi u shin ikese, hen hunda u tenti u kohol ker la." 
Exodus29:33 Man shi ve̱ ya akaa a i na iwom a mi sha u veren ve sha tom man tseghan ve la; or u ken inya yô, nana̱ de ye ga, gadia ka icighankwagh je." 
Exodus29:34 Man aluer inyam i tseghan or mi la, shin bredi kpaa vea lu her zan zan sev á av yô, nande kwagh u a shi la sha usu, i̱ de ye ga, gadia ka icighankwagh je." 
Exodus29:35 Kape ú er a Aron kua ônov nav la, er M kaa u nahan vough; ayange ataankarahar cii, i̱ tseghan ve a tsegha." 
Exodus29:36 Hanma iyange ú na nagh ku isholibo sha nombua, ku̱ lu iwom; wanger atse la sha u nan iwom sha a, shighe a mkurem, tsegha a." 
Exodus29:37 Ayange a ataankarahar la cii ú naan iwom sha atse sha u tseghan a yô; nahan atse aa hingir icighankwagh u hemban cii; hanma kwagh u a bende a atse la yô, una hingir icighankwagh." 
Exodus29:38 Kwagh u ú na nagh a min sha atse la yô, a̱ lu agumaiyôngo ahar a a kom inyom i môm i môm, ayange ayange, i̱ de bundu ga." 
Exodus29:39 Gumiyôngo u môm, ú na nagh a min pepe, ugen ú gema ú na aikighe," 
Exodus29:40 man shi mwem ma kengese ma ma kom môm-ken-upue u efa ma i nongo mkurem sha mi, ma kumen a kume, ma ma kom môm ken unyiin u hin, man wain u a kom môm ken unyiin u hin sha ci u nagh ku man, a gumiyôngo u môm imôngo." 
Exodus29:41 Gumiyôngo ugen la yô, ú na nagh a mi aikighe, vough er u ne nagh ku sha samuyia ku pepe man nagh ku man la nahan, ku̱ lu ihuma i dedoo, ka nagh ku usugh ku nan TER je la." 
Exodus29:42 I̱ hingir ne nagh ku nanden gbem sha ikov ikov hen hunda u tenti u kohol ker la, sha ishigh ki TER, henpe Me kohol ne sha u ôron kwagh a we her yô." 
Exodus29:43 Ka heregh kpaa Me kohol Mbaiserael ye; man ijiir la ia hingir icighanjiir sha ci u icivir Yam. 
Exodus29:44 Me tsegha tenti u kohol ker la, kua atse a nanden nagh sha min la kpaa; Aron man ônov nav kpaa Me tsegha ve, ve̱ eren Mo tom u pristi." 
Exodus29:45 Man Me tema a ônov mba Iserael imôngo, Me lu Aôndo ve kpaa." 
Exodus29:46 Nahan vea fa er Mo TER M lu Aôndo ve, u M dugh a ve ken tar u Igipiti, sha er Me tema hen atô ve yô; Mo M ngu TER, Aôndo ve." 
Exodus30:1 Er atse a nanden kwaghhumandoon sha mi; ka sha kon u saa ú er a ye; 
Exodus30:2 Iniembe i a, i̱ lu ishiva i môm, igbanger i a kpaa ishiva i môm; a̱ lu ambusu anyiin akuku; ityaven i a, i̱ lu aseva ahar; akor a a, a̱ lu kwagh môm a a cii." 
Exodus30:3 Cir a zenaria u wang iyol, tembe u a man ambusu a a ningir tser cii, kua akor a a kpaa; kase a tsar u zenaria ningir tser." 
Exodus30:4 Er a ahye a zenaria ahar, shin kur u tsar la; er a sha azongo a a, sha ambusu a a ahar la; a̱ lu ajiir a igbough mbi tôôn a a mi." 
Exodus30:5 Gba igbough sha kon u saa, cir mbi zenaria iyol." 
Exodus30:6 Ver a sha ishigh ki ikondo i yisan i i lu sha ishigh ki areki u shiada sha ishigh ki ijiir i nan iwom i i lu sha Shiada, hen ijiir i Me kohol we la." 
Exodus30:7 Aron a̱ nanden kwaghhumandoon sha ilyôghonov mbi dedoo sha a; hanma sev zum u una sôron amenger la, a̱ nanden un." 
Exodus30:8 Zum u Aron una tsaren amenger aikighe yô, a̱ nande un, ka kwaghhumandoon u gbem sha ishigh ki TER sha ikov ikov je la." 
Exodus30:9 De nanden nen ma kwaghhumandoon ugen kposo sha a ga, shin nagh ku nanden, shin nagh ku sha samuyia kpaa ga; man de urun nagh ku man sha a kpaa ga." 
Exodus30:10 Aron a̱ na iwom sha akor a a, hanma inyom kwa môm, sha awambe a iwom i nagh ku isholibo la; a̱ na iwom sha ci u a, hanma inyom kwa môm sha ikov ikov cii; ka TER icighankwagh u hemban cii." 
Exodus30:11 Shi TER ôr kwagh a Mose, kaa er:" 
Exodus30:12 Zum u ú ôron iyenge i Mbaiserael yô, ve mba i er ve la, hanma nomsoor nana̱ na TER ipaan sha ci u uma u nan, shighe u ú ôr iyenge ve la; sha er i̱ de hee ve bouange zum u ú or iyenge ve la ga." 
Exodus30:13 Ka kwagh u vea na ne: hanma or u nan kar nan za kohol mba i er ve la, nana̱ na veghershekel, i̱ lu shekel u icighanjiir la je (shekel yô, ka ugera ikundu); veghershekel la ka nagh ku nan TER." 
Exodus30:14 Hanma or u nan kar nana za kohol mba i er ve la yô, hii sha u nan lu anyom ikundu man u nan hembe nahan, nana̱ na nagh ku TER kura." 
Exodus30:15 Ornyar nana̱ de ne i hembe ga, icanor kpaa nana̱ de ne i̱ yen veghershekel la ga, zum u vea naan nagh ku TER sha u nan iwom sha ci uuma enev la." 
Exodus30:16 Ngohol inyaregh ki iwom hen Mbaiserael, ver ki sha ci u tom u tenti u kohol ker la, sha er ki̱ hingir kwagh u umbur Mbaiserael a mi sha ishigh ki TER yô, sha u nan iwom sha ci u uuma enev." 
Exodus30:17 TER ôr kwagh a Mose, kaa er:" 
Exodus30:18 Er tasa sha togula, ityô na kpaa i̱ lu sha togula, sha ci u ôôn iyol mi, ver un hen harga u tenti u kohol ker la a atse a nanden nagh sha mi la, haa mngerem shimi." 
Exodus30:19 Aron kua ônov nav ve̱ ôôn ave kua angahar a mi; 
Exodus30:20 shighe u vea nyôron ken tenti u kohol her la yô, ve̱ ôô iyol sha mnger sha er vea kpe ga yô, shin shighe u vea kporom hen atse a nanden nagh sha mi sha u eren tom nanden TER nagh ku usugh yô." 
Exodus30:21 Kape ve̱ ôôn ave kua angahar kpaa la, sha er vea kpe ga yô; i̱ hingir ve tindi u gbem je, un a tsombor na sha ikov ikov." 
Exodus30:22 TER shi ôr kwagh a Mose, kaa er:" 
Exodus30:23 Tôô ilyôghonov mbi hemban doon: mire u nondon, a̱ kuma ushekel deri utaan; man shinamon u human doon, a̱ kuma vegher na, ka ushekel deri uhar man akunduahargber je la; man kalamu u human doon, a̱ kuma ushekel deri uhar man akunduahargber;" 
Exodus30:24 man kashi, a̱ kuma ushekel deri utaan, i̱ lu shekel u icighanjiir la; man mkurem ma olev ma ma kom hin môm yô;" 
Exodus30:25 er icighanmkure u shighen a mi, kwagh u human doon, i̱ lu or u nan fe u nungwan kwaghhumandoon nana̱ nungwa ma ye; i̱ lu icighanmkure u shighen." 
Exodus30:26 Shighe tenti u kohol ker la mi, man areki u shiada," 
Exodus30:27 man tebul a ikav nav cii, man daarimenger a ikav nav," 
Exodus30:28 man atse a nanden kwaghhumandoon sha mi, man atse a nagh ku nanden a ikav mbi a cii, kua zegetasa a ityô na." 
Exodus30:29 Tsegha ve, ve̱ hingir uicighanmbaakaav mba hemban cii yô; hanma kwagh u una bende a ve yô, una hingir icighankwagh." 
Exodus30:30 Shi shighe Aron ma, a ônov nav kpaa, tsegha ve, ve̱ eren Mo tom u pristi." 
Exodus30:31 Man shi ôr kwagh a Mbaiserael, kaa ve wer: Mkurem man, ma̱ lum icighanmkure u shighen sha ikov ikov." 
Exodus30:32 I̱ de hee or ma iyol ga, man shi de nongo magenem ma lun er ma nahan ga, i̱ tsegha ma, ma̱ lu ne icighankwagh." 
Exodus30:33 Hanma or u nana nungwa magenem er ma nahan, shin hanma or u nan haa or u ken inya ma iyol yô, i̱ dugh nan ken nongo u nan kera." 
Exodus30:34 TER shi kaa a Mose er: Tôô akaahumandoon: setaketi man onika man galbanum, akaahumandoon man libano u human doon u wang; myohom vem cii, ma̱ lu vough vough." 
Exodus30:35 Er kwaghhumandoon a mi u nanden, i̱ lu or u nan fe u nungwan kwaghhumandoon nana̱ nungwa ye, i̱ wa bar sha mi, a̱ lu u wang man u i tsegh un kpaa." 
Exodus30:36 Pande un, kume a̱ via, ver sha ishigh ki Shiada ken tenti u kohol ker la, hen ijiir i Me kohol a we la, a̱ hingir we icighankwagh u hemban cii." 
Exodus30:37 Kwaghhumandoon u nanden u ú er yô, de nongo nen ugen u lun er un nahan sha ci wen ga; a̱ hingir ne icighankwagh u TER." 
Exodus30:38 Hanma or u nana er ugen er ngun nahan, nana ungwan ihuma na yô, i̱ dugh nan ken nongo u nan kera." 
Exodus31:1 Tsô TER ôr kwagh a Mose, kaa er:" 
Exodus31:2 Nenge, M yila Besalel wan u Uri wan u Hur u ken kwe u Yuda, sha iti na je;" 
Exodus31:3 M iv un a Jijingi u Aôndo, sha kwaghfan man mkav man sha u eren hanma injatom cii," 
Exodus31:4 sha u dughun mbamfe sha uee, sha u eren tom sha zenaria man azurfa man togula," 
Exodus31:5 man u kuan awen a varen sha akaa man u ngeren ikon, u eren hanma injatom cii." 
Exodus31:6 Nenge, M ver Oholiabi, wan u Ahisamaki u ken kwe u Dan a na imôngo; shi M na kwaghfan ken asema a mba ve lu a mfe cii, sha er vea er akaa a M kaa cii yô;" 
Exodus31:7 ka tenti u kohol ker la, man areki u shiada man ijiir i nan iwom, i i lu sha mi la, man ikav mbi tabernakel cii," 
Exodus31:8 man tebul a ikav nav, man daarimenger u wang a ikav nav cii, man atse a nanden kwaghhumandoon sha mi kpaa," 
Exodus31:9 man atse a nagh ku nanden a ikav mbi a cii, man tasa u ôôn iyol mi a ityô na," 
Exodus31:10 man akondo a i kor a tsembelee, uicighanmbaakondov mba pristi Aron, man akondo a ônov nav la, sha u eren tom u pristi a mi;" 
Exodus31:11 man mkurem ma shighen man kwaghhumandoon u nanden u sha ilyôghonov sha ci u icighanjiir la. Er M kaa u nahan cii, kape ve̱ er je la." 
Exodus31:12 TER shi ôr kwagh a Mose, kaa er:" 
Exodus31:13 Ôr kwagh a Mbaiserael, kaa ve wer: Waan nen ayange a memen Am iko kpee je, gadia ka ikav i hen atô Wam a ven sha ikov ikov, sha u u̱ fa er Mo M lu TER u M tsegh ne, ne hingir wang yô." 
Exodus31:14 Nahan yô, waan nen iyange i memen iko, i̱ hingir ne icighankwagh je; hanma or u nana hôngor a i yô, i̱ wua nan kpee; hanma or u nana er tom sha i yô, i̱ dugh or la ken nongo u nan kera." 
Exodus31:15 I̱ er tom ayange ataratar, kpa iyange i sha utaankaruhar la yô, ka iyange i memen, i̱ memen tom cii, ka icighankwagh u TER je; hanma or u nana er tom sha iyange i memen yô, i̱ wua nan kpee je." 
Exodus31:16 Mbaiserael ve̱ waan iyange i memen iko, ve̱ memen sha i sha ikov ikov, i̱ hingir ve ikuryan i tsôron." 
Exodus31:17 Ka ikav i hen atô Wan a Mbaiserael gbem sha won je; gadia TER er Sha man tar ayange ataratar, sha iyange i sha utaankaruhar la yô, A mem, yôhôl Un iyol." 
Exodus31:18 Tsô zum u A kure kwaghôron a Mose sha uwo u Senai yô, A na un ikpande i Shiada ihiar la, ka ikpande i awen i i nger i sha ihôwe u Aôndo yô." 
Exodus32:1 Zum u ior nenge er Mose tsa sha uwo, kera hungwa ga yum yô, ior va kohol hen Aron, ve kaa a na er: Mough, er se mbaaôndo mba vea hemen se yô; gadia Mose or u a dugh a vese ken tar u Igipiti ne yô, se fa kwagh u a za er un ga."
