Exodus32:2 Tsô Aron kaa a ve er: Tsuwa nen ikunya i zenaria i ken ato a kasev enev man ônov enev mba nomso kua mba kasev la, va nam nen i." 
Exodus32:3 Tsô ior cii tsuwa ikunya i ve wa ken ato la, ve va na Aron." 
Exodus32:4 A ngohol i sha ikev ve, a sôr i sha kanji, a er wanbua a mi, a ker; tsô ve kaa er: Iserael, ka mbaaôndo ou mba ve dugh a we ken tar u Igipiti je ne!" 
Exodus32:5 Zum u Aron nenge nahan yô, a ta atse a nanden nagh sha mi sha ishigh nagh; shi Aron yôô er: Kper yô, ka iniongo i TER." 
Exodus32:6 Kper nan yô, ve mough pepe, ve na iniav mbi nanden, shi ve va a iniav mbi bem kpaa; tsô ior tema inya gba yan akaa man akaa, shi ve mough ve gba vinen amar." 
Exodus32:7 Tsô TER ôr kwagh a Mose, kaa er: Mough, hungwa, gadia ior ou mba u dugh a ve ken tar u Igipiti la, ve hôngor ayol a ve ve," 
Exodus32:8 Ve undu gbenda u M kaa ve Mer ve̱ za sha mi la kera kpaa, ve er wanbua u keren a ker, ve va gure un inya, ve na un nagh, ve kaa er: Iserael ka mbaaôndo ou, mba ve dugh a we ken tar u Igipiti je ne." 
Exodus32:9 TER shi kaa a Mose er: M nenge ior mban, man nenge, ka ior i taver ityough kpe kpe." 
Exodus32:10 Yô, dem ase, iyugh Yam i̱ mough a ve ityô, M̱ tim ve; nahan Me gema u, ú hingir ikurior i vesen." 
Exodus32:11 Kpa Mose zamber a TER, Aôndo na, er: Ku TERE, ka nyi man iyugh You i mough a ior Ou ityô, mba U dugh a ve ken tar u Igipiti sha agee a vesen man uwegh ku ageegh nahana?" 
Exodus32:12 Ka nyi man Mbaigipiti vea gba va ôron kwagh kaan er: Ka sha u nzughul a ve tsô, A dugh a ve, sha u Una za wua ve sha iwo, Una tim ve sha won kera. Yô, de iyugh You i taver yum la, gema ishima, de kwaghbo u ma U er ior Ou la." 
Exodus32:13 Umbur mbayev Ou, Aberaham man Isaka man Iserael, mba U bum a ve sha iyol You je, U kaa a ve Wer: Me seer tsombor wen ua ngee er asan a Sha nahan; man tar u M ter kwagh u u ne cii Me na tsombor wen, ú ya dyako u u gbem sha won." 
Exodus32:14 Tsô TER gema ishima de kwaghbo u A kaa er Una er ior Nav la. 
Exodus32:15 Nahan Mose gema hungwa sha uwo a ikpande i shiada ihiar la sha uwe; ikpande i i nger i avegher cii yô, i nger i keen man keen kpaa." 
Exodus32:16 Ikpande la yô, lu tom u Aôndo je; ingeren la kpaa lu ingeren i Aôndo je, i gber a gber i sha ikpande." 
Exodus32:17 Zum u Yosua ungwa ayôôso a ior, er ve lu gbiren vaa yô, a kaa a Mose er: Igeren i utya ngi ken afo." 
Exodus32:18 Kpa a kaa er: Ka imo i mbaeren akenge sha mhembe ga, man shi ka imo i mbagbiren ivaa er kwagh tser ve kpaa ga; kpa ka imo i atsam a wan, m ongo ye." 
Exodus32:19 Tsô va mgbôghom her afo yô, a nenge wanbua la kua amar a vinen; nahan ishima vihi Mose tsung, a gema ikpande la a haa kera, a hembe i hen itinewoogh." 
Exodus32:20 Nahan a tôô wanbua u ve er la, a nande sha usu, a wua hingir vuwe, a urugh sha mnger, a na Mbaiserael, ve ma." 
Exodus32:21 Mose kaa a Aron er: Ior mban ve er nyi, man u hee ve zegekwaghbo iyol nahana?" 
Exodus32:22 Tsô Aron kaa er: Ishima i̱ de vihin terem tsung nahan ga; we iyol you kpaa u fa ior mban er ve ver asema sha afer a eren yô. 
Exodus32:23 Gadia ve kaa a mo er: Er se mbaaôndo mba vea hemen se yô, gadia Mose, or u a dugh a vese ken tar u Igipiti ne yô, se fa kwagh u a za er un ga." 
Exodus32:24 Nahan m kaa a ve, mer: U nan lu a zenaria yô, nana̱ tsuwa un; tsô ve va nam; m gema m haa ken usu, maa wanbua ne due ker." 
Exodus32:25 Zum u Mose nenge er ior ar ave yô; gadia Aron na, ve ar ave je, mbaihomov vev gba lamen sha ve dang dang;" 
Exodus32:26 nahan Mose za za tile hen hunda u afoogh kaa er: U nan te ikaa ken TER yô, nana̱ va kohol mo. Nahan ônov mba Levi cii za kohol un." 
Exodus32:27 A kaa a ve er: TER, Aôndo u Iserael, kaa nahan er: Hanma or nana̱ kange sanker u nan iwenge, nana̱ za heen nana̱ hide heen, sha ihinda ihinda, ken afo cii, hanma or nana̱ wua anngô u nan, hanma or nana̱ wua ikar u nan, man shi hanma or kpaa, nana̱ wua u a we ndor a nan." 
Exodus32:28 Tsô ônov mba Levi er sha imo i Mose; sha iyange la ior kpe ku u ishôm er dubu utar nahan. 
Exodus32:29 Mose kaa er: Tsegha nen ayol a en nyian, sha u eren TER tom–gadia hanma or lu ihom a wan u nan kua anngô u nan kpaa–sha er Una na ne iveren nyian yô." 
Exodus32:30 Tsô kper nan sev mbu aven yô, Mose kaa a ior er: Ne er isholibo je; yô, ahegen me kôndo sha TER, alaghga me za na iwom sha ci u isholibo yen." 
Exodus32:31 Tsô Mose hide hen TER za kaa er: Ahii! Ior ne er isholibo i vesen je, ve er mbaaôndo sha zenaria." 
Exodus32:32 Hegen yô, ma U shi de ve isholibo ve, man aluer ka nahan ga yô, esem ken ruamabera Wou u U nger la kera tsô." 
Exodus32:33 Tsô TER kaa a Mose er: Hanma or u nan erem isholibo yô, ka nan je Me ese nan ken ruamabera Wam kera ye." 
Exodus32:34 Ahegen yô, za za hemen ior, za a ve hen ijiir i M kaa u la; nenge, ortyom Wam una hemen we; nahan kpaa, sha iyange i Me va u va tsahan yô, Me tsaha ve sha isholibo ve." 
Exodus32:35 Kape TER tsaha ior mbala, sha ci u wanbua u Aron a er la." 
Exodus33:1 Tsô TER kaa a Mose er: Mough heen, we kua ior mba u due a ve ken tar u Igipiti ne, yem nen ken tar u M bum a Aberaham man Isaka man Yakob M kaa Mer: Ka tsombor wou je Me na u u ye;" 
Exodus33:2 Me tindi ortyom a̱ hemen we–Me zenda Mbakanaan man Mbaamor man Mbahiti man Mbaperishi man Mbahivi man Mbayebushi kera— 
Exodus33:3 u zan hen tar u atumbabua man iyough ve dumbur ker la, gadia Mo Me zaan hen atô wou a we imôngo ga, gadia we u ngu ikurior i taver ityough, sha er Me tim u sha gbenda ga yô." 
Exodus33:4 Zum u ior ungwa mkaanem ma bom man, nahan ve gba zungwen; mô kera haa ikav mbi nan mbi hweev ga." 
Exodus33:5 TER shi kaa a Mose er: Kaa Mbaiserael wer: Ne mba ior i taver ityough yum; aluer Me zaan hen atô wou a ven imôngo anshighe kpeghee tsô kpaa, Me tim ne kera; ahegen yô, er ikav youv mbi hweev kera, man Me fa er Me er a we ye." 
Exodus33:6 Mbaiserael maa hii u den ikav mbi hweev hen uwo u Horebi la je. 
Exodus33:7 Mose yô, a tôô tenti a tim ken akôngoafogh, lu ca a afo, a yila un er: Tenti u kohol ker. Nahan yô, hanma or u nan keren TER, nan due nan za hen tenti u kohol ker, u ken akôngoafogh la." 
Exodus33:8 Nahan yô, shighe u Mose una due una zaan hen tenti la, ior cii ve mough, hanma or nan za tile hen hunda u tenti u nan, ve haa ashe sha Mose zan zan a kar za nyôron ken tenti." 
Exodus33:9 Mose una nyôron ken tenti yô, ityôgh ki ibeenegh kila ki sen, ki va tile hen hunda u tenti; tsô TER A gba ôron kwagh a Mose." 
Exodus33:10 Zum u ior cii vea nengen er ityôgh ki ibeenegh ki til sha hunda u tenti yô, ior cii ve mough ve tile sha, ve gure inya hanma or hen hunda u tenti u nan." 
Exodus33:11 Nahan TER A ôr kwagh a Mose ishigh a ishigh er or ka nan ôr kwagh a huror u nan nahan, tsô a hire ken afo; kpa wanakiriki na Yosua, wan u Nun, wanyekwaor la yô, duen ken tenti ga." 
Exodus33:12 Tsô Mose kaa a TER er: Nenge, ka U kaa a mo Wer: Za a ior mban; kpa U kera tesem or u U tindi Wer nana̱ za a mo imôngo ga. Nahan kpaa, U kaa Wer: M fa u sha iti you je, man doom a we kpaa." 
Exodus33:13 Ahegen yô, aluer a doo U a mo yô, ma U shi tesem igbenda You sha er me fa U yô; sha er i̱ doo U a mo yô; shi fa er ikurior ne i lu ior Ou yô." 
Exodus33:14 A kaa er: M̱ za iyol Yam M̱ za nyôr a We hen ijiir i memen zee? 
Exodus33:15 A kaa a Na er: Aluer We iyol You Wea zaan ga yô, de moughon a vese heen ga." 
Exodus33:16 Gadia ka sha nyi je man á fa er i doo U a mo kua ior Ou mbana? Kera ka sha mze u Ú za a vese imôngo la gaa? Ka nahan man mo kua ior Ou se lu kposo a ior mba ve lu sha won cii ye. 
Exodus33:17 TER shi kaa a Mose er: Kwagh u u kaa la, Me er un kpaa, gadia doom a we, shi M fa u sha iti you kpaa." 
Exodus33:18 A kaa er: Ma U tesem iengem You. 
Exodus33:19 A kaa er: Me er mdoom Am cii maa kar sha ishigh you, shi Me yôô iti i TER sha ishigh you kpaa; Me rumun or sha mhôôn, u i lum pe rumun nan yô; Me zungwe or mhôônom u i lum pe zungwen nan yô." 
Exodus33:20 Shi A kaa er: Ú fatyô u nengen a ishigh Yagh ga; gadia or á fatyô u nengen a Mo, shi lun uma ga." 
Exodus33:21 Tsô TER kaa er: Nenge, ijiir ngi hen Mo ape u fatyô u za tilen sha vande yô;" 
Exodus33:22 tsô zum u iengem Yam ia va karen yô, Me wa u ken kwe u vande, Me cir uwegh Agh sha a we zan zan Me kar karen;" 
Exodus33:23 tsô Me tôô uwegh Agh kera, ú nenge ijime Yam; kpa ishigh Yagh yô, á nenge a mi ga." 
Exodus34:1 Tsô TER kaa a Mose er: Er ikpande i awen ihiar, i̱ lu er i tsuaa la nahan; ikpande la, Me nger akaaôron sha mi a a lu sha ikpande i tsuaa i u hembe i la." 
Exodus34:2 Wa ago iyol sha use; pepe nahan unde sha uwo u Senai, za za tile her a Mo sha ityough ki uwoogh." 
Exodus34:3 Or môm nana̱ de undu a we ga, uwo la cii kpaa i̱ de nengen a ma or sha u ga; ilev mbi kiriki man abua kpaa ve̱ de ye toho ikua ikua a uwo ne ga." 
Exodus34:4 Nahan a er ikpande i awen ihiar er i tsuaa la nahan; tsô Mose mough pepe, unde sha uwo u Senai er TER kaa un nahan, a kôr ikpande i awen ihiar la sha uwegh nagh." 
Exodus34:5 Tsô TER sen ken ibeen va tile a na heregh, A yôô iti i TER." 
Exodus34:6 TER kar sha ishigh nagh gba yôôn er: TERE, TERE, Aôndo u mgboughon a mhôônom ma zungwen kua mrumun u sha mhôôn, u wan ishima man u lun a erdoo man mimi wuee je," 
Exodus34:7 u eren a ior udubu imôngo dedoo, u deen ifer man tindi u peren man isholibo; kpa u tsahan yô, deen ga, tsahan ônov sha ci u ifer i uter kua ônov mba ônov kpaa, zan zan kov u sha utar man shi u sha unyiin kpaa." 
Exodus34:8 Tsô Mose gure fese, wa ityough inya." 
Exodus34:9 A kaa er: TERE, aluer doo U a mo yô, TER ma A ze a vese imôngo, gadia ka ior i taver ityough yum; de se ifer yase man isholibo yase kpaa, ngohol se, se̱ lu dyako Wou." 
Exodus34:10 Tsô A kaa er: Nenge, yan Yam ikur ne, Me er akaakpilighyol sha ishigh ki ior ou, inja i mayange je i lu a er sha won je ga yô, shin hen hanma ikurior kpaa ga; ior mba u lu hen atô ve cii vea nenge a tom u TER; gadia kwagh u M lu eren a we ne, ka kwagh u cieryol je." 
Exodus34:11 Ver ishima sha kwagh u M we u nyian ne; nenge, M zenda Mbaamor sha ishigh you kera kua Mbakanaan man Mbahiti man Mbaperishi man Mbahivi man Mbayebushi kpaa." 
Exodus34:12 Ver ishima, de ye ikur a mba ve tem ken tar u, ú za nyôr ker la, ve̱ hôn u ga." 
Exodus34:13 Kpa yôhôl atse a ve a nanden nagh sha mi kera, hembe mtôm vem ma awenem, shi gber mtôm vem ma ikonom kera kpaa." 
Exodus34:14 We yô, de gur ma aôndo ugen kposo inya ga; gayô TER u i yer Un er iwuhe la, ka Aôndo u iwuhegh je." 
Exodus34:15 De ye ikur a ior mba ken tar la je ga, gadia zum u vea eren idya sha u dondon mbaaôndo vev, shi nan mbaaôndo vev nagh kpaa yô, vea lôhô u, we kpaa ú za ya nagh vegh kura;" 
Exodus34:16 shi ú er ônov vev mba kasev ú na ônov ou mba nomso kpaa; nahan ônov vev mba kasev mbala zum u vea eren idya sha u dondon mbaaôndo vev yô, vea na ônov ou mba nomso kpaa vea er idya sha u dondon mbaaôndo vev mbala." 
Exodus34:17 De eren mbaaôndo mba keren a ker ga. 
Exodus34:18 Eren nen iniongo i bredi u i we kwa sha mi ga la. Ayange ataankarahar cii, ú ya bredi u i we kwa sha mi ga yô, er M kaa u yô, sha shighe u i ver, sha uwer u Abiba la; gadia ka sha uwer u Abiba la, u due ken Igipiti ye." 
Exodus34:19 Mba ve hii duen ken uya cii ka mba Av je, anomauile a ou cii, ônovmbaiundav mba ibuav kua mba iyôngov." 
Exodus34:20 Kpa waniunda u jaki yô, paa un sha waniyôngo; man aluer wea paa un ga yô, sombo un mon. Ônovmbaiundav ou mba nomso cii, paa ve. Ma or nana̱ de ve sha ishigh Yagh aveve ga." 
Exodus34:21 Er tom ayange ataratar, kpa sha iyange i ataankarahar la yô, ú mem; sha shighe u kahan sule man shighe u sundan la kpaa, ú mem." 
Exodus34:22 Eren nen iniongo i ulahadi la, ka iyiav mbi tsutswav mbi alakema je la, man iniongo i kurun a iyiav kpaa, sha mkur u inyom la." 
Exodus34:23 Hanma inyom, nomsombaiorov ou cii, ve̱ va sha ishigh ki ter AÔNDO, Aôndo u Iserael, kwa tar je." 
Exodus34:24 Gadia Me zenda akuraior sha ishigh you kera, shi Me er tar wou u̱ gbanger kpaa; ma or nana tôm tar wou zum u ú zaan hen ishigh ki TER, Aôndo wou, hanma inyom kwa tar la ga." 
Exodus34:25 De senge awambe a nagh Agh a kwagh u i we kwa sha mi imôngo ga; shi nagh ku iniongo i Paseka ku̱ de luun her zan zan sev mbu̱ aven ga. 
Exodus34:26 Iyiav mbi tsutswav mbi hemban doon mbi ken sule wou, ú za a mi ken iyou i TER, Aôndo wou. De jiir wanivo sha atumba a ngô na ga." 
Exodus34:27 TER shi kaa a Mose er: Nger akaaôron ne; gadia ka sha akaaôron ne M ya ikur a we kua Iserael kpaa ye. 
Exodus34:28 A lu her, a TER imôngo ayange akunduahar man aime akunduahar; a ya kwagh ga, mngerem tsô kpaa, a ma ga. Nahan a nger akaaôron a ikuryan la sha ikpande, ka Akaaôron a pue je la." 
Exodus34:29 Tsô Mose hungwa sha uwo u Senai, ikpande i shiada ihiar lu un sha uwe zum u a hungwa sha uwo la; Mose fa er kwav u ishigh nagh u engem ga, sha er a lu ôron kwagh a Na yô." 
Exodus34:30 Zum u Aron man Mbaiserael cii nenge a Mose yô, kwav u ishigh nagh engem, nahan ve cia u mgbôghom a na." 
Exodus34:31 Tsô Mose yila ve; nahan Aron kua mbavesen mba mkohol u ior cii ve hire hen na; tsô Mose gba ôron kwagh a ve. 
Exodus34:32 Ken masejime la, Mbaiserael cii kporom, a gema a wa ve kwagh sha akaa a TER A er un sha uwo u Senai la cii." 
Exodus34:33 Tsô zum u Mose mem kwaghôron a ve yô, a cir ikondo sha ishi." 
Exodus34:34 Kpa zum u Mose una nyôron hen ishigh ki TER u ôron kwagh a Na yô, a bugh ikondo i yisan la kera zan zan a kar duen; una duen yô, a za ôr Mbaiserael kwagh u i kaa un la." 
Exodus34:35 Mbaiserael vea nengen ishigh ki Mose, er kwavshi u Mose u lu engem yô, Mose a shi a cir ikondo sha ishi zan zan saa shi una nyôron u ôron kwagh a Na." 
Exodus35:1 Tsô Mose kohol mkohol u Mbaiserael cii, kaa a ve er: Ka akaaôron a TER A kaa ne, er ne̱ eren a ne:" 
Exodus35:2 I̱ eren tom ayange ataratar, kpa iyange i ataankarahar la yô, i̱ lu ne icighanyange i memen i civir TER; hanma or u nana er nyityôtom sha i yô, i̱ wua nan." 
Exodus35:3 Ken uya enev cii, de keer nen usu sha iyange i memen ga." 
Exodus35:4 Tsô Mose ôr kwagh a mkohol u Mbaiserael cii, kaa er: Ka kwagh u TER A kaa er né er un ne:" 
Exodus35:5 Tsuwa nen nagh ken akaa a en, sha u nan TER; hanma or u i doo nan u nan yô, nana̱ va a mi, ka nagh ku á na TER ne: zenaria man azurfa man togula" 
Exodus35:6 man ikondo i kwel man i nyian dindee man i nyian bong man ikondo i pupuu i kôngor man aive a ivo 
Exodus35:7 man akôv a anomaiyôngo a i nyian a yô, man akôv a ayu man ikon i saa," 
Exodus35:8 man mkurem sha ci u tsaren, man ilyôghonov sha ci u mkurem ma shighen, kua kwaghhumandoon u nanden nagh a mi kpaa," 
Exodus35:9 man awen a oniki man shi awen a varen sha efodi kua sha ikpa i sha vanger kpaa. 
Exodus35:10 Hanma orfaneev ken a ven nana̱ va er hanma kwagh u TER A kaa yô; 
Exodus35:11 tabernakel man tenti na man ikondo i sanen un a mi, man uiwever nav, man mtôm nam ma ipeem, man itiran na, man mtôm nam, man agbur a na;" 
Exodus35:12 areki man igbough nav man ijiir i nan iwom la man ikondo i yisan; 
Exodus35:13 tebul man igbough nav kua ikav nav cii man ubredi mba sha ishi; 
Exodus35:14 man daarimenger sha ci u tan iwanger, a ikav nav man amenger a na, kua mkurem sha ci u tsaren iwanger;" 
Exodus35:15 man atse a nanden kwaghhumandoon sha mi a igbough mbi a, man mkurem ma shighen, man kwaghhumandoon u nanden nagh a mi, man ikondo i yisan hunda u tabernakel;" 
Exodus35:16 man atse a nanden nagh sha mi, a kperiyôô u togula u a man igbough mbi a, man ikav mbi a cii, man tasa u ôôn iyol a ityô na;" 
Exodus35:17 man akondo a kasen tembe la, man mtôm ma a kua agbur a ma, man ikondo i yisan hunda u tembe la;" 
Exodus35:18 man amande a tabernakel man amande a tembe kua ikor i a; 
Exodus35:19 man akondo a i kor a tsembelee a eren tom a mi ken icighanjiir yô, man uicighanmbaakondov sha ci u pristi Aron, kua akondo a ônov nav a eren tom u pristi a mi." 
Exodus35:20 Tsô mkohol u Mbaiserael cii hembe hen ishigh ki Mose kera. 
Exodus35:21 Nahan hanma or u ishima i tor nan ityô man hanma or u jijingi u nan a mgbegh nan yô, ve va a nagh ku TER sha ci u tom u tenti u kohol ker la, man sha ci u ityom i keregh cii, man sha ci u uicighanmbaakondov." 
Exodus35:22 Ve va nomso man kasev, hanmôv mba asema a doo ve, ve va a akaa a hweegh a sha vanger man inyarev mbi wan ken ato man ikunya i lun a akav man akaahweegh a zeren sha iker, lu akaa a sha zenaria cii. Hanma or u nan lu a nagh ku zenaria ku nan TER," 
Exodus35:23 man shi hanma or u nan lu a ikondo i kwel man i nyian dindee man i nyian bong, man ikondo i pupuu i kôngor man aive a ivo man akôv a anomaiyôngo a i nyian a man akôv a ayu yô, nan va a mi." 
Exodus35:24 Hanma or u i lu nan ka nan nagh ku azurfa shin ku togula yô, nan va a nagh ku TER; man hanma or u nan lu a kon u saa sha ci u eren hanma tom a mi yô, nan va a mi." 
Exodus35:25 Kasev mba fan eev cii kpaa ve ta mou sha ave ve, ve va a u ve te la; ikondo i kwel, man i nyian dindee man i nyian bong man ikondo i pupuu i kôngor." 
Exodus35:26 Man kasev mba fan eev cii mba asema a mgbegh ve, ve ta aive a ivo." 
Exodus35:27 Mbavesen va a awen a oniki, man awen a varen sha efodi kua sha ikpa i sha vanger;" 
Exodus35:28 man ilyôghonov kua mkurem sha ci u tsaren, man mkurem ma shighen, kua kwaghhumandoon u nanden nagh a mi la." 
Exodus35:29 Mbaiserael na TER nagh sha ishima i dedoo, hanma nomsoor man hanma kwase mba asema a mgbegh ve u van a kwagh sha ci u tom u TER A kaa a Mose er i̱ er a la cii yô; Mbaiserael na TER nagh sha mi sha asema a dedoo." 
Exodus35:30 Tsô Mose kaa a Mbaiserael er: Nenge, Besalel wan u Uri wan u Hur u ken tsombor u Yuda, TER yila un sha iti je;" 
Exodus35:31 A iv un a Jijingi u Aôndo, a kwaghfan man mkav man sha u eren hanma injatom cii;" 
Exodus35:32 u dughun mbamfe sha uee sha u eren tom sha zenaria man azurfa man togula," 
Exodus35:33 man u kuan awen a varen sha akaa man u ngeren ikon, u eren hanma injatom i sha uee cii." 
Exodus35:34 A shi A wa un ishima i tesen kwagh, un vea Oholiabi wan u Ahisamaki, u ken tsombor u Dan." 
Exodus35:35 Ka ve, A iv ve a kwaghfan ken ishima u vea er hanma injatom, u gban akaa man u eren tom u sha uee, man u eren tom u hweegh sha akondo a kwel man a nyian dindee man a nyian bong man sha ikondo i pupuu i kôngor, man u tumen akondo; ka mba ve eren hanma injatom, man mbadughun mbamfe sha uee." 
Exodus36:1 Besalel man Oholiabi ve er tom kua hanma or u fan eev, u TER A we mfe man mkav ken a nan sha u fan u eren hanma tom u icighanjiir, er TER A kaa nahan cii." 
Exodus36:2 Tsô Mose yila Besalel man Oholiabi kua hanma or u fan eev, u TER A ne kwaghfan ken ishima i nan, ka hanmô cii, u ishima i mgbegh nan u zan hen tom la, u za eren u yô." 
Exodus36:3 Ve gema ve ngohol nagh ku Mbaiserael va a mi sha u eren tom u icighanjiir a mi la cii, hen Mose. Hanma sev ve zer van a nagh sha ishima i dedoo." 
Exodus36:4 Tsô mbafankwagh cii, mba ve eren tom u icighanjiir la cii, hanmô ve mough hen tom u nan lu eren yô," 
Exodus36:5 ve va ôr kwagh a Mose, ve kaa er: Ior mba van a akaa ka ganden tom u TER A kaa er i̱ er u la yô." 
Exodus36:6 Tsô Mose kaa, maa i yôô hen afo cii, er: Nomsoor shin kwase kpaa, ve̱ de kera seer u eren ma tom sha ci u nagh ku icighanjiir la ga. Nahan i yange ior u van a mi." 
Exodus36:7 Gadia ikav mbi ve lu a mi yô, kuma u eren tom la a mi cii, gande a gande je." 
Exodus36:8 Nahan mbafaneev cii mba ken mbaerentom la, ve er tabernakel la sha akondo a yisan pue; sha ikondo i pupuu i kôngor i sha mou u sendan man ikondo i kwel man i nyian dindee man i nyian bong a ucerubi sha mi, lu tom u orfaneev je." 
Exodus36:9 Iniembe i hanma ikondo i yisan lu aseva ikundu kar anigheni man igbanger i hanma ikondo i yisan lu aseva anyiin; akondo a yisan la cii, a lu vough vough." 
Exodus36:10 A zua akondo a yisan a ataan la a kor, shi agen a ataan kpaa a zua a, a kor." 
Exodus36:11 Shi a er ahura a wever a kwel sha kur u ikondo i ken kpe, i ikondo i yisan i i zough i la; kape shi a er sha kur u ikondo i ken kpe, i kondo i yisan i sha uhar i i zough a zua i la kpaa." 
Exodus36:12 A er ahura a wever akunduahargber sha ikondo i yisan i môm la shi a er ahura a wever akunduahargber sha kur u ikondo i yisan i sha uhar i i zough i la; ahura a wever la cii, lu sha akar akar." 
Exodus36:13 A er uiwever mba zenaria akunduahargber; a zua akondo a yisan la sha uiwever mbala; nahan tabernakel la hingir môm. 
Exodus36:14 A shi a tume akondo a yisan sha aive a ivo er a̱ lu tenti u cirin tabernakel a mi; a tume akondo a yisan pue kar môm. 
Exodus36:15 Iniembe i hanma ikondo i yisan lu aseva ikundugber, igbanger i hanma ikondo i yisan lu aseva anyiin; akondo a yisan a pue kar môm la cii, a lu vough vough." 
Exodus36:16 A zua akondo a yisan a ataan kposo, akondo a yisan agen a ataratar di kposo." 
Exodus36:17 A er ahura a wever akunduahargber sha kur u ikondo i ken kpe, i ikondo i yisan i i zough i la, shi a er ahura a wever akunduahargber sha kur u ikondo i yisan i sha uhar i i zough a zua i la kpaa." 
Exodus36:18 A er uiwever mba togula akunduahargber sha u zuan tenti er una lu môm yô. 
Exodus36:19 A er kwagh u cirin tenti a mi sha akôv a anomaiyôngo a i nyian a yô, man kwagh u cirin mi u a mase sha la sha akôv a ayu." 
Exodus36:20 Shi a gba mtôm ma ipeem ma tabernakel sha ikon i saa. 
Exodus36:21 Ityaven i ityôgh lu aseva pue, igbanger i hanma ityôgh lu ishiva i môm cir tiôn." 
Exodus36:22 Hanma ityôgh lu a azongo ahar a i zough a zua a yô, kape a er mtôm ma tabernakel cii la." 
Exodus36:23 Man a gba mtôm ma ipeem mara sha ci u tabernakel; mtôm ikundu sha ci u vegher u imbusutariyan ken ian i imbusutariyan la; 
Exodus36:24 man a er agbur a azurfa ahar shin atô a mtôm ma ikundum mara, agbur ahar shin ityô i môm, sha ci u azongo a ki ahar la, man agbur ahar shin ityôgh kigenegh, sha ci u azongo a ki ahar la." 
Exodus36:25 A gba mtôm ma ipeem ikundu sha ci u vegher u tabernakel ugen u ken imbusutarimese la," 
Exodus36:26 man agbur a azurfa a ma, akunduahar, agbur ahar shin ityô i môm, man agbur ahar shin ityôgh kigenegh." 
Exodus36:27 A gba mtôm ma ipeem mtaratar sha ci u ijime i tabernakel, vegher u shin ityôtar la." 
Exodus36:28 Man a gba mtôm mhar sha ci u azongo a tabernakel a ken ijime la; 
Exodus36:29 i zua ma mhar ken akur (ma guvur) ma lu kwagh môm vegher u shin kua vegher u sha kpaa zan zan ar sha ihye la; kape a er ma mhar cii ken azongo ahar la. 
Exodus36:30 Mtôm ma ipeem lu mnigheni a agbur a azurfa a ma, agbur pue kar ataratar, agbur ahar shin hanma ityô." 
Exodus36:31 A er itiran i sha kon u saa, itian sha ci u mtôm ma imbusu i tabernakel i môm," 
Exodus36:32 man itiran itian sha ci u mtôm ma imbusu i tabernakel igen la, man shi itiran itian sha ci u mtôm ma shin ijime i tabernakel vegher u shin ityôtar la." 
Exodus36:33 Shi a er teran u hen atô, u u tera hen atô u mtôm ma ipeem hii hen kpe ungun zan zan ar ken kpe ungula." 
Exodus36:34 A cir mtôm mara zenaria iyol, shi a er ma ahye a zenaria, hingir ajiir a itiran, itiran la kpaa, a cir i zenaria iyol." 
Exodus36:35 Shi a er ikondo i yisan i kwel man i nyian dindee man i nyian bong man ikondo i pupuu i kôngor i sha mou u sendan a ucerubi sha mi; lu tom u orfaneev je. 
Exodus36:36 A er mtôm mnyiin sha kon u saa sha ci u i, a cir ma zenaria iyol; uiwever mba ma kpaa, lu mba zenaria; a haa ma agbur a azurfa anyiin." 
Exodus36:37 Shi a er ikondo i yisan hunda u tenti, i kwel man i nyian dindee man i nyian bong man ikondo i pupuu i kôngor i sha mou u sendan, lu tom u orfan ikondo i tumen sha hwe;" 
Exodus36:38 man mtôm ma i mtaan a uiwever mba ma; a cir ityouv mbi ma man ahye a ma zenaria iyol; agbur a ma ataan lu a togula. 
Exodus37:1 Besalel er areki sha kon u saa, iniembe na lu aseva ahar cir tiôn, igbangese na lu ishiva i môm cir tiôn, ityaven na kpaa lu ishiva i môm cir tiôn." 
Exodus37:2 A cir un zenaria u wang iyol kimi kua ken won kpaa, a kase un tsar u zenaria ningir tser." 
Exodus37:3 A haa un ahye a zenaria anyiin shin angahar a na a anyiin la; vegher keen ahye ahar shi vegher keen kpaa ahye ahar. 
Exodus37:4 A gba igbough sha kon u saa, a cir mbi zenaria iyol." 
Exodus37:5 A shindi igbough mbila ken ahye a ken ambusu a areki la, sha u tôôn areki a mi." 
Exodus37:6 A er ijiir i nan iwom her sha zenaria, iniembe na lu aseva ahar cir tiôn, igbangese na lu ishiva i môm cir tiôn." 
Exodus37:7 A er ucerubi uhar sha zenaria, a var a var ve sha akur ahar a ijiir i nan iwom her la," 
Exodus37:8 cerubi u môm ken kur ne, cerubi u môm ken kur ne; a er ucerubi mbala lu kwagh môm a ijiir i nan iwom her la, sha akur a i ahar la, ijoron lu ga." 
Exodus37:9 Ucerubi mbala naregh akper a ve sha, cir ijiir i nan iwom her la sha akper a ve, man ve zua ishiv ayol a ve; ishiv mbi ucerubi mbila kenger ijiir i nan iwom her la." 
Exodus37:10 A er tebul sha kon u saa, iniembe na lu aseva ahar, igbangese na ishiva i môm, ityaven na ishiva i môm cir tiôn;" 
Exodus37:11 a cir un zenaria u wang iyol, a kase un tsar u zenaria a ningir a tser." 
Exodus37:12 A kase un kpande u ken ambusu na, igbangese er ikevwe nahan, a kase tsar u zenaria sha kpande la ningir tser." 
Exodus37:13 A haa un ahye a zenaria anyiin, a wa ahye la sha azongo anyiin a sha angahar a na a anyiin la," 
Exodus37:14 ahye la lu ikua ikua a kpande la; ka ajiir a igbough mbi tôôn tebul a mi je la. 
Exodus37:15 A gba igbough mbila sha kon u saa, a cir mbi zenaria iyol, sha u tôôn tebul a mi." 
Exodus37:16 Shi a er ikav mbi tebul, utasa nav man agbande a na man ayongo na kua ugber nav mba haan kwagh a mi, lu zenaria u wang cii." 
Exodus37:17 A er daarimenger sha zenaria u wang, a var a var daarimenger la, ityô na man gôngor na man angbandev nav man adôôr a na man uimondon nav, ve lu kwagh môm a na, ijoron lu ga." 
Exodus37:18 A lu a agbaa ataratar, due ken ambusu a na; agbaa a daarimenger atar ken imbusu ingin, shi agbaa a daarimenger atar ken imbusu ingin;" 
Exodus37:19 angbandev utar er uikparen mba amondi nahan sha gbaa môm, idyôôrough kua imondon; man angbandev utar kpaa er uikparen mba amondi nahan sha gbaa ugen, idyôôrough kua imondon; kape agbaa a ataratar a a dugh ken daarimenger la lu la." 
Exodus37:20 Daarimenger la iyol na kpaa lu a angbandev unyiin er uikparen mba amondi nahan, a adôôr kua uimondon;" 
Exodus37:21 idyôôrough môm shin agbaa ahar a a zer ken na, shi idyôôrough i môm shin agbaa ahar a a zer ken na, shi idyôôrough i môm shin agbaa ahar a a zer ken na, sha agbaa a ataratar a a dugh sha daarimenger la cii." 
Exodus37:22 Adôôr a ve man agbaa a ve, lu kwagh môm a na, ijoron lu ga; un jimin cii i var un a var sha zenaria u wang." 
Exodus37:23 A er amenger a na a ataankarahar man akambe a na man utasa nav mba kuran il mi, sha zenaria u wang." 
Exodus37:24 Ka sha zenaria u wang u a kuma talenti môm a er un kua ikav nav cii kpaa ye. 
Exodus37:25 Shi a er atse a nanden kwaghhumandoon sha mi, sha kon u saa, iniembe i a lu ishiva i môm, igbanger i a kpaa lu ishiva i môm, lu a ambusu anyiin akuku, ityaven i a lu aseva ahar; akor a a, lu kwagh môm a a, ijoron lu ga." 
Exodus37:26 A cir a zenaria u wang iyol, tembe u a man ambusu a a ningir tser, kua akor a a kpaa; a kase a tsar u zenaria, a ningir a tser." 
Exodus37:27 A shi a er ahye a zenaria ahar shin kur u tsar u a kase a la, sha azongo a a sha ambusu a a ahar la, lu ajiir a igbough mbi tôôn a." 
Exodus37:28 Shi a er igbough mbila sha kon u saa, a cir mbi zenaria iyol." 
Exodus37:29 A er icighanmkure u shighen man kwaghhumandoon u wang u nanden la, sha ilyôghonov mbi dedoo, lu tom u orfan u eren kwaghhumandoon je." 
Exodus38:1 Shi a er atse a nanden nagh sha kon u saa, iniembe i a lu aseva ataan, igbanger i a kpaa aseva ataan; lu a ambusu anyiin akuku, ityaven i a lu aseva atar." 
Exodus38:2 Man a er akor a a sha azongo a a anyiin; akor a a la, lu kwagh môm a a, ijoron lu ga; a cir a togula iyol." 
Exodus38:3 A er ikav mbi atse la cii: ityev man indyuhar man utasa man iyôv mbi dughun inyam a mi man ugbande mba tôôn usu a mi; ikav mbi a cii a er sha togula. 
Exodus38:4 A er kperiyôô sha ci u atse la, sha togula, shin tsembe u atse vegher u shin la, va saa hen atô u a." 
Exodus38:5 A haa ahye anyiin sha azongo a anyiin a kperiyôô u togula la, lu ajiir a igbough la." 
Exodus38:6 A gba igbough sha kon u saa, a cir mbi togula iyol." 
Exodus38:7 A shindi igbough mbila ken ahye a ken ambusu a atsegh la, sha u tôôn a mi; a er a sha ikpande, lu a ho kimi." 
Exodus38:8 Shi a er tasa u togula a ityô na sha ajingi a kasev mba ve lu eren tom hen hunda u tenti u kohol ker yô. 
Exodus38:9 Shi a er kwa u kasen tembe a mi vegher u imbusutariyan ken ian i imbusutariyan la; akondo a kasen tembe la lu ikondo i kôngor i sha mou u sendan, lihe kuma aseva akunduataan;" 
Exodus38:10 mtôm lu ikundu man agbur a togula a ma kpaa lu ikundu; uiwever mba mtôm mara kua ahye a ma la ve lu mba azurfa. 
Exodus38:11 Vegher u imbusutarimese kpaa lu aseva akunduataan; mtôm lu ikundu, agbur a togula a ma kpaa lu ikundu; uiwever mba mtôm mara kua ahye a ma la, ve lu mba azurfa." 
Exodus38:12 Vegher u shin ityôtar yô, akondo a kasen lu aseva akunduahargber, mtôm lu pue, agbur a ma kpaa lu pue; uiwever mba mtôm kua ahye a ma la ve lu mba azurfa." 
Exodus38:13 Vegher u sha ityoughkitaregh hen ian i ityoughkitaregh kpaa lu aseva akunduahargber. 
Exodus38:14 Akondo a kasen vegher môm lu aseva pue kar ataan, mtôm lu mtar, agbur a ma kpaa lu atar;" 
Exodus38:15 vegher ugen la kpaa, hanma vegher u hunda u tembe, akondo a kasen lu aseva pue kar ataan, mtôm lu mtar man agbur a ma kpaa lu atar." 
Exodus38:16 Akondo a kasen tembe a mi cii lu akondo a pupuu a kôngor a sha mou u sendan. 
Exodus38:17 Agbur a mtôm lu a togula; uiwever mba mtôm kua ahye a ma la, lu mba azurfa; sha ityouv mbi ma la kpaa, i cir mbi azurfa; mtôm ma tembe cii lu a ahye a azurfa." 
Exodus38:18 Kwaghyisan hunda u tembe lu tom u orfan u eren hwe sha akaa, lu ikondo i kwel man i nyian dindee man i nyian bong man ikondo i pupuu i kôngor i sha mou u sendan; iniembe na lu aseva ikundu, ityaven na, ka igbangese i ikondo je la, lu aseva ataan, vough er akondo a i kasen tembe mi la nahan." 
Exodus38:19 Mtôm nam lu mnyiin, agbur a ma kpaa lu anyiin a togula; uiwever mba ma lu azurfa; kwagh u cirin ma sha ityouv kua ahye a ma kpaa lu azurfa." 
Exodus38:20 Amande a tabernakel kua a tembe u i kase la cii, lu a togula." 
Exodus38:21 Inyaregh ki i er tabernakel a min ne, ka tabernakel u shiada la, er i ôr iyenge i ki sha imo i Mose yô, lu Mbalevi ve ôr ki sha ikev i Itamar wan u pristi Aron ye." 
Exodus38:22 Besalel wan u Uri, wan u Hur u ken tsombor u Yuda er akaa cii a TER kaa Mose er a̱ er yô," 
Exodus38:23 un vea Oholiabi wan u Ahisamaki u ken tsombor u Dan, or u gban akaa, u fan u eren tom u sha uee man u tumen akondo sha hwe, a kwel man a nyian dindee man a nyian bong man akondo a pupuu a kôngor." 
Exodus38:24 Zenaria u i er tom a mi cii, sha tom u icighanjiir la cii, lu zenaria u i na nagh a mi yô, kuma utalenti ikundu kar utaankarunyiin man ushekel deri utaankaruhar man ikundugber, lu ushekel mba icighanjiir." 
Exodus38:25 Azurfa u ior mba i ôr iyenge ve ken mkohol u ior la yô, kuma utalenti deri man ushekel dubu man deri utaankaruhar man akunduatargber kar utaan, lu ushekel mba icighanjiir;" 
Exodus38:26 beka môm, ka vegher u shekel je la, lu shekel u icighanjiir, sha ci u hanma or u nan kar nan za kohol mba i er iyenge ve la, hii sha mba ve kom anyom ikundu man mba ve hembe nahan kpaa, nahan ka ior dubu deri ataratar man dubu utar man deri utaan man akunduahargber." 
Exodus38:27 Utalenti mba azurfa deri la lu sha ci u haan agbur a icighanjiir kua agbur a kwaghyisan la a mi; utalenti deri kuma agbur deri; talenti môm kuma igbur i môm. 
Exodus38:28 Ushekel mba dubu môm man deri utaankaruhar man akunduatargber kar utaan la yô, a er uiwever a mi sha ci u mtôm mara, shi a cir ityouv mbi ma man a wa ahye sha ma kpaa." 
Exodus38:29 Man togula u i na nagh a mi yô, kuma utalenti akunduatargber man ushekel dubu uhar man deri unyiin." 
Exodus38:30 A er agbur a hunda u tenti u kohol ker la, a mi, man atse a togula kua kperiyôô u togula u a la, man ikav mbi atse cii," 
Exodus38:31 man agbur a a kase tembe la ningir tser, man agbur a hunda u tembe man amande a tabernakel cii, kua amande la cii a a kase tembe la ningir tser." 
Exodus39:1 Akondo a kwel man a nyian dindee man a nyian bong la, ve gema ve kor akondo a tsembelee a mi, a eren tom a mi ken icighanjiir, shi ve er Aron uicighanmbaakondov kpaa, er TER kaa Mose nahan." 
Exodus39:2 Shi a er efodi sha zenaria man ikondo i kwel man i nyian dindee man i nyian bong man ikondo i pupuu i kôngor i sha mou u sendan. 
Exodus39:3 Ve var zenaria hingir par par, ve ov un hingir kor u iyôô, sha u eren tom a mi sha ikondo i kwel man i nyian dindee man i nyian bong kua sha ikondo i pupuu i kôngor; lu tom u orfaneev je." 
Exodus39:4 Ve er un abamber ahar a sha avande sha u zuan un; ka sha akur a na ahar i zua un ye. 
Exodus39:5 Tsar na u zeren un a mi u a lu sha mi la, lu kwagh môm a na, shi lu inja i môm a na, sha ikondo i kwel man i nyian dindee man i nyian bong man ikondo i pupuu i kôngor i sha mou u sendan, er TER kaa Mose nahan." 
Exodus39:6 Shi ve sôr awen a oniki a i wa a agbende a zenaria ken ijime, i gber ati a ônov mba Iserael sha mi, er ka i nger ikav sha kwagh nahan." 
Exodus39:7 A var a sha abamber a sha avande a efodi la, sha er a̱ lu awen a umbur Mbaiserael a mi; er TER kaa Mose nahan." 
Exodus39:8 A shi a er ikpa i sha vanger, lu tom u orfaneev je, er tom u efodi nahan, sha zenaria man ikondo i kwel man i nyian dindee man i nyian bong man ikondo i pupuu i kôngor i sha mou u sendan." 
Exodus39:9 I lu a ambusu anyiin akuku; ve er ikpa i sha vanger kpa uhar; iniembe i i kuma abe môm, igbanger na kpaa kuma abe môm, lu kpa uhar." 
Exodus39:10 Ve var awen iniongo inyiin sha mi, nongo u sardiu man topashi kua karbunkel, ka nongo u hiihii je la." 
Exodus39:11 Nongo u sha uhar yô, lu emeraldi man safir kua diamondi." 
Exodus39:12 Nongo u sha utar yô, lu hiakinto man agati kua ametise." 
Exodus39:13 Nongo u sha unyiin yô, lu beril man oniki kua yasepi; a lu ken agbende a zenaria sha ajiir a i var a la." 
Exodus39:14 Awen la, lu pue kar ahar sha ati a ônov mba Iserael, sha ati a ve ser ser, er ka i gber ikav sha kwagh nahan, hanmô lu a iti i i, a lu sha ci u ikwe i pue kar ihiar la." 
Exodus39:15 Ve er ikpa i sha vanger la mshirim er ikar i i ishir i, sha zenaria u wang je." 
Exodus39:16 Shi ve er agbende a zenaria ahar kua ikunya ihiar i zenaria, ve wa ikunya ihiar la sha azongo a ahar a ikpa i sha vanger la." 
Exodus39:17 Ve ta mshirim ma mhar ma i ishir ma sha zenaria mara sha ikunya ihiar i sha azongo a ikpa i sha vanger la. 
Exodus39:18 Ijô ihiar igen i mshirim ma mhar mara ve zer i sha agbende a ahar la, ve var a sha abamber a sha avande a efodi vegher u ken ishi la." 
Exodus39:19 Ve er ikunya i zenaria ihiar, ve wa i sha azongo a ahar a ikpa i sha vanger la, sha kur u kimi vegher u a lian ken efodi la." 
Exodus39:20 Shi ve er ikunya i zenaria ihiar ve zer i sha abamber a sha avande a ahar a efodi vegher u shin, ken ishigh nagh, hen ijiir i i zough un la, i gbihi tsar u efodi la shin." 
Exodus39:21 Ve zer ikpa i sha vanger la sha efodi, ve ta ikunya i i ikar i kwel, ve zer i sha ikunya i efodi la, i tema i gbihi tsar u efodi la shin, sha er ikpa la ia kera bugh sha efodi kera ga yô, er TER kaa Mose nahan." 
Exodus39:22 Shi a er togo u efodi, a tume a tume un, lu kwel cii;" 
Exodus39:23 mon na lu hen atô jighjigh er ka mon u riga u utya yô, man i wa mon la tsar, i guu u, i yisa, sha er ua ande ga yô." 
Exodus39:24 Ve er anzôr a sha ikondo i kwel man i nyian dindee man i nyian bong i sha mon u sendan sha mka u togo. 
Exodus39:25 Shi ve er anmemem sha zenaria u wang, ve zer anmemem mara hen uharegh mba anzôr a a kase mka u togo la, ningir tser," 
Exodus39:26 animem man shi injôr man shi animem man injôr, sha mka u togo la ningir tser, sha u eren tom mi, er TER kaa Mose nahan." 
Exodus39:27 Shi ve kor uriga sha ikondo i pupuu i kôngor i i tum a tume i yô, sha ci u Aron a ônov nav." 
Exodus39:28 Man atsar a sha ityou a sha ikondo i pupuu i kôngor, man ader a dedoo sha ikondo i pupuu i kôngor kua afo a sha ikondo i pupuu i kôngor i sha mou u sendan," 
Exodus39:29 man tsar u shin iwenge u sha ikondo i pupuu i kôngor i sha mou u sendan man ikondo i kwel man i nyian dindee man i nyian bong, lu tom u or u tumen akondo sha hwe; er TER kaa Mose nahan." 
Exodus39:30 Shi ve er kpande u icighantsar la sha zenaria u wang, ve nger sha mi er ka i gber ikav sha kwagh nahan, er: I TSEGHA UN SHA CI U TER." 
Exodus39:31 Ve ta u kwar u kwel sha u zeren u sha atsar a sha ityou la; er TER kaa Mose nahan. 
Exodus39:32 Kape i kure tom u tabernakel u tenti u kohol ker la cii; Mbaiserael er er TER kaa Mose nahan vough, kape ve er la." 
Exodus39:33 Tsô ve va na Mose tabernakel la, tenti kua ikav nav cii, uiwever nav man mtôm nam ma ipeem man itiran na man mtôm nam man agbur a na;" 
Exodus39:34 man kwagh u cirin u i er sha akôv a anomaiyôngo a i nyian a yô, man kwagh u cirin u i er sha akôv a ayu, man ikondo i yisan;" 
Exodus39:35 man areki u shiada a igbough nav, man ijiir i nan iwom," 
Exodus39:36 man tebul a ikav nav cii, man ubredi mba sha ishi;" 
Exodus39:37 man daarimenger u wang a amenger a na, ka amenger a sôron a, pendan a sha mi la, man ikav nav cii, kua mkurem sha ci u tsaren," 
Exodus39:38 man atse a zenaria man mkurem ma shighen man kwaghhumandoon u nanden man kwagh u yisan hunda u tenti mi; 
Exodus39:39 man atse a togula man kperiyôô u a u togula man igbough mbi a kua ikav mbi a cii man tasa a ityô na," 
Exodus39:40 man akondo a yisan a tembe man mtôm ma u, kua agbur a u man kwaghyisan hunda u tembe man ikor i u, kua amande a u man ikav mbi eren tom a mi ken tabernakel u tenti u kohol ker la cii," 
Exodus39:41 man akondo a i kor a tsembelee a eren tom a mi ken icighanjiir man uicighanmbaakondov mba pristi Aron la, kua akondo a ônov nav, a eren tom u pristi mi la." 
Exodus39:42 Er TER kaa Mose nahan, kape Mbaiserael kure tom la cii, la." 
Exodus39:43 Mose nenge tom la cii ve er u er TER kaa nahan; kape ve er u je la; tsô Mose ver ve doo doo. 
Exodus40:1 Tsô TER shi ôr kwagh a Mose kaa er: 
Exodus40:2 Sha iyange i hiihii i uwer u hiihii la ú tim tabernakel u tenti u kohol ker la. 
Exodus40:3 Ver areki u shiada ker, yisa areki la sha ikondo i yisan la." 
Exodus40:4 Nyôr a tebul, sôr akaa a a lu sha mi yô, man shi nyôr a daarimenger kpaa man tsar amenger a na la." 
Exodus40:5 Ver atse a zenaria a nanden kwaghhumandoon sha mi la, sha ishigh ki areki u shiada, har kwaghyisan sha hunda u tabernakel la." 
Exodus40:6 Ver atse a nanden nagh sha hunda u tabernakel u tenti u kohol ker la. 
Exodus40:7 Ver tasa hen harga u tenti u kohol ker la a atse la; haa mngerem shimi. 
Exodus40:8 Kase tembe kwa, ningir tser, har kwaghyisan u hunda u tembe la." 
Exodus40:9 Tôô mkurem ma shighen, shighe tabernakel kua akaa a a lu kimi cii, tsegha un a ikav nav cii; nahan una lu icighankwagh je." 
Exodus40:10 Shighe atse a nanden nagh la mkurem a ikav mbi a cii, tsegha atse la; nahan atse aa lu icighankwagh u hemban cii je." 
Exodus40:11 Shighe tasa la mkurem kua ityô na kpaa, tsegha un." 
Exodus40:12 Va a Aron kua ônov nav hen hunda u tenti u kohol ker la, ôô ve iyol sha mnger." 
Exodus40:13 Haa Aron uicighanmbaakondov, shighe un mkurem, tsegha un, a̱ eren Mo tom u pristi." 
Exodus40:14 Va a ônov nav, haa ve uriga;" 
Exodus40:15 shighe ve mkurem er u shigh ter ve nahan, ve̱ eren Mo tom u pristi; mshigh ve la maa una na, vea lu upristi gbem sha ikov ikov." 
Exodus40:16 Kape Mose er la; er TER kaa un nahan, kape a er vough je la." 
Exodus40:17 Tsô sha inyom i sha uhar, uwer u hiihii, sha iyange i hiihii la, i tim tabernakel." 
Exodus40:18 Tsô Mose tim tabernakel, a ver agbur a na, a tim mtôm nam ma ipeem, a tera itiran na, shi a tim mtôm nam kpaa." 
Exodus40:19 A samber tenti sha tabernakel la, a gema kwagh u cirin sha tenti la kpaa, a cir sha mi; er TER kaa Mose nahan." 
Exodus40:20 A tôô Shiada la, a wa ken areki, a shindi igbough mbila sha areki, a ver ijiir i nan iwom her la, sha areki;" 
Exodus40:21 a nyôr a areki la ken tabernakel; a har ikondo i yisan, a yisa areki u shiada; er TER kaa Mose nahan." 
Exodus40:22 Man a ver tebul ken tenti u kohol ker la, vegher u tabernakel u ken imbusutarimese, ken won u ikondo i yisan la." 
Exodus40:23 A ver ubredi sha mi sha inja sha inja, sha ishigh ki TER, er TER kaa Mose nahan." 
Exodus40:24 A ver daarimenger ken tenti u kohol ker la, sha ishigh ki tebul, vegher u tabernakel u ken imbusutariyan la." 
Exodus40:25 A ver amenger sha mi, sha ishigh ki TER, er TER kaa Mose nahan." 
Exodus40:26 A ver atse a zenaria la ken tenti u kohol ker la, sha ishigh ki ikondo i yisan la," 
Exodus40:27 shi a nande kwaghhumandoon sha ilyôghonov mbi dedoo sha mi; er TER kaa Mose nahan. 
Exodus40:28 Man a har kwaghyisan u sha hunda u tabernakel la. 
Exodus40:29 A ver atse a nanden nagh sha hunda u tabernakel u tenti u kohol ker la, a na nagh ku nanden kua nagh ku sha samuyia sha mi; er TER kaa Mose nahan." 
Exodus40:30 Shi a ver tasa hen harga u tenti u kohol ker a atse la, a haa mngerem ma ôôn iyol shimi." 
Exodus40:31 Mose vea Aron kua ônov nav kpaa, ve ôôn ave kua angahar sha ma;" 
Exodus40:32 zum u vea nyôron ken tenti u kohol ker man vea kporom hen atse kpaa ve vande ôôn; er TER kaa Mose nahan. 
Exodus40:33 A kase kwa u tembe, a wa tabernakel kua atse atô; a har kwaghyisan u sha hunda u kungur. Kape Mose kure tom la la." 
Exodus40:34 Tsô ibeenegh va cir tenti u kohol ker la; iengem i TER kpaa iv ken tabernakel. 
Exodus40:35 Mose fatyô u nyôron ken tenti u kohol ker la ga, sha ci u ibeenegh lu sha mi, iengem i TER kpaa iv ken tabernakel yô." 
Exodus40:36 Zum u ibeenegh kia moughon sha tabernakel kera yô, Mbaiserael ve mough ve gba yemen ken hemen, kape ve lu haan zan la." 
Exodus40:37 Kpa ibeenegh kia lu a mough ga yô, ve kpaa ve mough ga, saa iyange i kia mough la." 
Exodus40:38 Gadia ibeenegh ki TER ki lu sha tabernakel la atetan, tugh yô, usu u lu ker, sha ashe a ya u Iserael cii, sha zende ve cii." 
Leviticus1:1 Tsô TER yila Mose, ôr kwagh a na ken tenti u kohol ker la, A kaa er:" 
Leviticus1:2 Ôr kwagh a Mbaiserael, kaa a ve wer: Aluer hanma or ken a ven á lu nan pe nan TER nagh yô, na nen nagh sha uile, sha abua kua iyôngo man ivo." 
Leviticus1:3 Aluer nagh ku nan, á lu ku nanden ku sha abua yô, nana̱ na nom u a lu a ihogholough iyol ga yô, nana̱ za na hen hunda u tenti u kohol ker la, sha er TER Una rumun nan yô." 
Leviticus1:4 Nana̱ penda uwegh sha ityough ki nagh ku nanden kura; nahan á rumun ku sha ci u nan er ku̱ hingir iwom sha ci u nan yô. 
Leviticus1:5 Nana̱ sôngo gumbua la sha ishigh ki TER; upristi, ônov mba Aron mbala, ve̱ va a awambe, ve̱ va haa awambe la sha ambusu a atse a a lu hen hunda u tenti u kohol ker la, ve̱ ningir ve̱ tser." 
Leviticus1:6 Nana̱ hua nagh ku nanden kura nana̱ bur ku. 
Leviticus1:7 Ônov mba pristi Aron ve̱ penda usu sha atse a nanden nagh sha mi ve̱ wa ikon sha mi vôôr vôôr. 
Leviticus1:8 Upristi, ônov mba Aron mbala ve̱ tar aci a inyam la kua ityough man ahôm sha inja sha inja, sha ikon i i lu sha usu u sha atse la;" 
Leviticus1:9 kpa ikav mbi kimi kua angahar yô, nana̱ ôô sha mnger; pristi a̱ gema cii a̱ nande sha atse a nanden nagh sha mi, i̱ lu nagh ku nanden, ka nagh ku usugh ku human doon ku nan TER je la." 
Leviticus1:10 Man aluer nagh ku nan, ku nanden á lu sha iyôngo shin ivo yô, nana̱ na nom u a lu ihogholough iyol ga yô." 
Leviticus1:11 Nana̱ sôngo i vegher u atse a nanden nagh sha mi u ken imbusutarimese la, sha ishigh ki TER; upristi, ônov mba Aron ve̱ haa awambe la sha ambusuatsegh, ve̱ ningir ve̱ tser." 
Leviticus1:12 Nana̱ bur i aci aci, ityough ki i man ahôm a i; pristi a̱ tar a sha inja sha inja sha ikon i i lu sha usu u sha atse la;" 
Leviticus1:13 kpa ikav mbi kimi kua angahar a i yô, nana̱ ôô sha mnger; pristi a̱ va a mi cii, a̱ va nande sha atse; ka nagh ku nanden ku usugh ku human doon ku nan TER je la." 
Leviticus1:14 Aluer nagh ku nana na TER á lu ku nanden ku sha inyon yô, nana̱ na nagh sha mbaatii shin sha utulembamkunguv." 
Leviticus1:15 Pristi la, a̱ va a mi hen atse, a̱ tôndo ityough kera, a̱ nande ki sha atse; i̱ kam awambe la sha imbusuatsegh;" 
Leviticus1:16 a̱ dugh kerker, shi a̱ tsuwa ingur, a̱ haa hen kpeatsegh, vegher u sha ityoughkitaregh hen ijiir i haan mtwem la." 
Leviticus1:17 A̱ ande un hen akper a na, kpa a̱ de paven vegher a̱ gbe ken inya ga; pristi a̱ nande un sha atse, sha ikon i i lu sha usu la; ka nagh ku nanden ku usugh ku human doon ku nan TER." 
Leviticus2:1 Aluer a̱ lu anti or ka nan TER nagh ku sha samuyia yô, nagh ku nan ku̱ lu sha mwem ma kengese; nana̱ haa mkurem sha mi, shi nana̱ penda libano u human doon sha mi kpaa;" 
Leviticus2:2 nana̱ va a mi hen upristi, ônov mba Aron; pristi a̱ ongo mwem ma kengese kua mkurem mara, ikevwe poo, shi a̱ kura libano u human doon u a lu sha mi la cii, a̱ nande sha usu, i̱ lu nagh ku umbur; ka nagh ku usugh ku human doon ku nan TER." 
Leviticus2:3 Nagh ku sha samuyia ku ku shi la yô, ku̱ hingir kwagh u Aron a ônov nav, ka icighankwagh u hemban cii ken iniav mbi usuv mbi nan TER la." 
Leviticus2:4 Zum u wea naan nagh ku sha samuyia ku kaan a kaa sha atse yô, i̱ lu umasa mba i we kwa sha mi ga, mba sha mwem ma kengese ma i nongo mkurem sha mi yô, gayô, i̱ lu umasa mba par par mba i we kwa sha mi ga, mba i shigh a shighe mkurem sha mi yô." 
Leviticus2:5 Aluer nagh ough kua lu nagh ku sha samuyia ku kaan sha icenge yô, i̱ lu mwem ma kengese ma i nongo mkurem sha mi, i we kwa sha mi ga yô." 
Leviticus2:6 Vur ku avur avur, haa mkurem sha mi, ka nagh ku sha samuyia je la." 
Leviticus2:7 Man aluer nagh ough kua lu nagh ku sha samuyia ku kaan shin icenge i tumuu yô, i̱ er ku sha mwem ma kengese i̱ wa mkurem sha mi." 
Leviticus2:8 Va a nagh ku sha samuyia ku i er ku sha akaa ne yô, hen TER; i̱ va na pristi, a̱ za a mi hen atse." 
Leviticus2:9 Pristi a̱ kura nagh ku umbur ku nagh ku sha samuyia la, a̱ nande ku sha atse; ka nagh ku usugh ku human doon ku nan TER je la." 
Leviticus2:10 Nagh ku usugh ku ku shi la yô, ku̱ hingir kwagh u Aron a ônov nav; ka icighankwagh u hemban cii ken iniav mbi usuv mbi nan TER la." 
Leviticus2:11 Ma nagh ku sha samuyia ku ne va na TER nagh a mi cii, i̱ de eren ku sha kwagh u i we kwa sha mi ga, kwa man iyough yô, de nanden nen TER nagh ku usugh sha mi ga." 
Leviticus2:12 Na nen TER nagh a mi er ka iyiav mbi tsutswav yô, kpa hen atse yô, i̱ de ve a mi er ka kwaghhumandoon ga." 
Leviticus2:13 Hanma nagh ough ku sha samuyia yô, ú wa bar sha mi; bar u ikuryan i Aôndo wou a̱ de banen sha nagh ough ku sha samuyia ga; iniav youv cii, i̱ va a mbi a bar imôngo." 
Leviticus2:14 Aluer wea naan TER nagh ku sha samuyia sha iyiav mbi tsutswav yô, va a asagher a mgbaghen sha usu, asange a alakema u he a i johol a, va na nagh ku sha samuyia ku sha iyiav mbi tsutswav you a mi;" 
Leviticus2:15 haa mkurem sha mi, shi haa libano u human doon sha mi kpaa; ka nagh ku sha samuyia." 
Leviticus2:16 Pristi a̱ pande asange a alakema a i johol a la kua mkurem, shi a̱ kura libano u human doon la cii, a̱ nande sha usu, i̱ lu nagh ku umbur; ka nagh ku usugh ku nan TER." 
Leviticus3:1 Aluer nagh ku nan á lu nagh ku sôngon ku bem yô, man aluer nana na bua, á lu nom shin mgbian, nana̱ na, u a lu a ihogholough iyol ga yô, sha ishigh ki TER." 
Leviticus3:2 Nana̱ penda uwegh sha nagh ku nan kura, nana̱ sôngo ku hen hunda u tenti u kohol ker la, upristi, ônov mba Aron, ve̱ haa awambe sha ambusuatsegh ve̱ ningir ve̱ tser." 
Leviticus3:3 Nana̱ pande nagh ku bem, nana̱ gema á na TER nagh ku usugh a mi; i̱ lu ahôm a a cir ikav mbi kimi, man ahôm a a lu sha ikav mbi kimi cii," 
Leviticus3:4 man ahi ahar man ahôm a a lu sha a, vegher u shin iwenge la, man ishwalegh ki mtema, nana̱ dugh ki a ahi imôngo." 
Leviticus3:5 Ônov mba Aron ve̱ gema cii, ve̱ nande sha atse, sha nagh ku nanden ku ku lu sha ikon i sha usu la; ka nagh ku usugh ku human doon ku nan TER." 
Leviticus3:6 Aluer nagh ku nan ku sôngon ku bem ku nan TER á lu iyôngo shin ivo, nom shin mgbian, nana̱ na, i i̱ lu a ihogholough iyol ga yô." 
Leviticus3:7 Aluer ka sha gumiyôngo nan lu nan nagh yô, nana̱ na un sha ishigh ki TER;" 
Leviticus3:8 nana̱ penda uwegh sha nagh ku nan, nana̱ sôngo ku sha ishigh ki tenti u kohol ker la; ônov mba Aron ve̱ haa awambe a ku sha ambusuatsegh ve̱ ningir ve̱ tser." 
Leviticus3:9 Nana̱ pande nagh ku sôngon ku bem kura, nana̱ na TER nagh ku usugh a mi; i̱ lu ahôm a ku man tsa u ahômough jimin cii, nana̱ dugh u ikua ikua a lyemen, man ahôm a a cir ikav mbi kimi la, kua ahôm a a lu sha ikav mbi kimi cii," 
Leviticus3:10 man ahi ahar la, kua ahôm a a lu sha a, vegher u shin iwenge la, man ishwalegh ki mtema, nana̱ dugh ki a ahi imôngo." 
Leviticus3:11 Pristi a̱ gema cii, a̱ nande sha atse; ka kwaghyan u nagh ku usugh ku nan TER." 
Leviticus3:12 Man aluer nagh ku nan á lu sha ivo yô, nana̱ va na i sha ishigh ki TER;" 
Leviticus3:13 nana̱ penda uwegh sha ityough ki i, nana̱ sôngo i sha ishigh ki tenti u kohol ker la; ônov mba Aron ve̱ haa awambe a i sha ambusuatsegh, ve̱ ningir ve̱ tser." 
Leviticus3:14 Nana̱ pande i, nana̱ na TER nagh ku nan ku usugh a mi; i̱ lu ahôm a a cir ikav mbi kimi la, kua ahôm a a lu sha ikav mbi kimi cii," 
Leviticus3:15 man ahi ahar la, kua ahôm a a lu sha a, vegher u shin iwenge la, man ishwalegh ki mtema, nana̱ dugh ki a ahi imôngo." 
Leviticus3:16 Pristi a̱ gema cii, a̱ nande a sha atse; ka kwaghyan u nagh ku usugh ku human doon je la; ahôm cii ka a TER." 
Leviticus3:17 Ka tindi u eren nahan gbem sha won sha ikov ikov ken uya enev cii: De ye nen ahôm man awambe mayange ga. 
Leviticus4:1 Tsô TER ôr kwagh a Mose, kaa er:" 
Leviticus4:2 Ôr kwagh a Mbaiserael, kaa a ve wer: Aluer hanma or nana er isholibo abu, nana er ma kwagh u TER A yange er i̱ de eren ga yô," 
Leviticus4:3 aluer pristi u i shigh un mkurem la, una er isholibo una haa ior ibo iyol yô, a̱ na TER nagh ku isholibo sha gumbua u a lu a ihogholough iyol ga yô, sha ci u isholibo na i a er la;" 
Leviticus4:4 a̱ va a nombua la hen hunda u tenti u kohol ker la, sha ishigh ki TER, a̱ penda uwegh sha ityough ki nombua la, a̱ sôngo un sha ishigh ki TER." 
Leviticus4:5 Pristi u i shigh un mkurem la a̱ pande awambe a nombua la, a̱ va a mi hen tenti u kohol ker la;" 
Leviticus4:6 pristi la a̱ civ ihôwe shin awambe, a̱ mishi awambe la, kwa taankaruhar sha ishigh ki TER, sha ishigh ki ikondo i yisan i icighanjiir la." 
Leviticus4:7 Pristi la a̱ er awambe la, a̱ feregh sha akor a atse a nanden kwaghhumandoon sha mi, a a lu sha ishigh ki TER, ken tenti u kohol ker la; awambe a nombua la cii, a̱ gema a̱ haa hen ityô i atse a nanden nagh, a a lu hen hunda u tenti u kohol ker la." 
Leviticus4:8 Ahôm a nombua u nagh ku isholibo la cii, a̱ kura a sha; ahôm a a cir ikav mbi kimi la, man ahôm a a lu sha ikav mbi kimi la cii," 
Leviticus4:9 man ahi ahar la, kua ahôm a a lu sha a, vegher u shin iwenge la, man ishwalegh ki mtema, a̱ dugh ki a ahi la imôngo," 
Leviticus4:10 er ka i kura a sha, sha nombua u nagh ku bem la nahan; pristi a̱ gema cii, a̱ nande sha atse a nagh ku nanden." 
Leviticus4:11 Ikôvough ki nombua la, a inyam na cii, kua ityough nagh man angahar a na man ikav nav mbi kimi, man icômbov nav," 
Leviticus4:12 nombua la jimin cii, a̱ due a mi ken akôngoafogh hen ijiir i wanger, henpe i hee mtwem yô, i̱ za nande un sha usu sha ikon; ka hen ijiir i haan mtwem la, i̱ nande un ye." 
Leviticus4:13 Aluer mkohol u ior i Iserael cii vea kar kpe, man mkohol una fa nahan ga, vea er ma kwagh u TER A yange er i̱ de eren ga, vea tôô ibo yô," 
Leviticus4:14 zum u isholibo i ve er la ia due ken igbar yô, shighe la mkohol a̱ na nagh ku isholibo sha gumbua, ve̱ va a mi sha hunda u tenti u kohol ker la," 
Leviticus4:15 nahan mbatamen mba mkohol u ior ve̱ penda ave sha ityough ki nombua la sha ishigh ki TER, i̱ sôngo gumbua la sha ishigh ki TER." 
Leviticus4:16 Pristi u i shigh un mkurem la, a̱ pande awambe a nombua la, a̱ va a mi hen tenti u kohol ker la;" 
Leviticus4:17 pristi a̱ civ ihôwe shin awambe la, a̱ mishi a kwa taankaruhar sha ishigh ki TER, sha ishigh ki ikondo i yisan la." 
Leviticus4:18 A̱ er awambe la, a̱ feregh sha akor a atse a a lu sha ishigh ki TER ken tenti u kohol ker la, a̱ gema awambe la cii, a̱ haa a hen ityô i atse a nanden nagh sha mi a a lu hen hunda u tenti u kohol ker la." 
Leviticus4:19 Ahôm a na la cii, a̱ kura a, a̱ nande a sha atse," 
Leviticus4:20 a̱ er a nombua la er a er a nombua u sha nagh ku isholibo la nahan, kape á er a ngun kpaa la; pristi a̱ na iwom sha ci ve, tsô á de ve asorabo a ve." 
Leviticus4:21 Nahan a̱ tôô nombua la, a̱ due a mi ken akôngoafogh, a̱ za nande un er nombua u hiihii la nahan; ka nagh ku isholibo ku mkohol u ior je la." 
Leviticus4:22 Aluer ortaregh nana er ma kwagh abu u TER, Aôndo na, A yange er i̱ de eren ga la, nana tôô ibo yô," 
Leviticus4:23 aluer nana̱ va kav isholibo i nan la yô, nana̱ va na nagh sha kpev u a lu a ihogholough iyol ga yô," 
Leviticus4:24 nana̱ penda uwegh sha kpev la, nana̱ sôngo un hen ijiir i sôngon nagh ku nanden sha ishigh ki TER; ka nagh ku isholibo." 
Leviticus4:25 Pristi a̱ er awambe a nagh ku isholibo la sha ihôwe na, a̱ feregh sha akor a atse a nagh ku nanden, a̱ gema awambe a na a̱ haa hen ityô i atse a nanden nagh sha mi la." 
Leviticus4:26 Ahôm a na cii, a̱ nande sha atse, er i eren a ahôm a nagh ku sôngon ku bem la nahan; pristi a̱ na iwom sha ci u nan, sha ci u isholibo i nan er la, nahan á de nan isholibo i nan." 
Leviticus4:27 Man aluer hanma or u ken inya kpaa, nana er isholibo abu, nana er ma kwagh u TER A yange er i̱ de eren ga la, nana tôô ibo yô," 
Leviticus4:28 aluer nana va kav isholibo i nan er la yô, nana̱ va a nagh sha tuleivo u a lu a ihogholough iyol ga yô, sha ci u isholibo i nan er la." 
Leviticus4:29 Nana̱ penda uwegh sha ityough ki nagh ku isholibo kura, nana̱ sôngo ku hen ijiir i nagh ku nanden la." 
Leviticus4:30 Pristi a̱ er awambe sha ihôwe, a̱ feregh sha akor a atse a nagh ku nanden, a̱ gema awambe la cii, a̱ haa hen ityôatsegh;" 
Leviticus4:31 ahôm cii yô, a̱ kura a sha, er ka i kura ahôm a nagh ku sôngon ku bem la nahan; pristi a̱ na iwon sha ci u nan, nahan á de nan isholibo i nan." 
Leviticus4:32 Man aluer nana na waniyôngo sha ci u nagh ku nan ku isholibo yô, nana̱ va a tule u a lu a ihogholough iyol ga yô." 
Leviticus4:33 Nana̱ penda uwegh sha ityough ki nagh ku isholibo kura, nana̱ sôngo un sha ci u nagh ku isholibo hen ijiir i i senge nagh ku nanden la." 
Leviticus4:34 Pristi a̱ er awambe a nagh ku isholibo kura sha ihôwe na, a̱ feregh sha akor a atse a nagh ku nanden; a̱ gema awambe la cii, a̱ haa hen ityôatsegh;" 
Leviticus4:35 ahôm cii yô, a̱ kura a sha, er ka i kura ahôm a gumiyôngo u nagh ku sôngon ku bem la nahan; pristi a̱ nande a sha atse, sha iniav mbi usugh mbi TER; pristi a̱ na iwom sha ci u nan, sha ci u isholibo i nan er la, nahan á de nan isholibo i nan." 
Leviticus5:1 Aluer hanma or nana er isholibo sha er nan ongo imo i sha mbum, er nan lu orshiada nan nenge shi nan fe kwagh la, kpa nana rumun u pasen ga yô, nan hingir u lun a ibo iyol ve." 
Leviticus5:2 Shin aluer hanma or nana bende a ma kwagh u a lu wang ga, shin a lu gundu u ma swase u u lu wang ga, shin gundu u ma ilegh ki ki lu wang ga, shin gundu u ma kwagh u a kper a kpera inya, u a lu wang ga, man nana fa ga yô, nan kera ngu wang ga, nan hingir u lun a ibo iyol ve." 
Leviticus5:3 Shin aluer nana bende a kwagh u a lu wang ga, u or, a lu hanma kwagh u wang ga u or á fatyô u hingir wang ga a mi la, man nana fa ga yô, man nana va kav nahan yô, nan hingir u lun a ibo iyol ve." 
Leviticus5:4 Shin aluer anti or nana gba bumun gagh sha zwa u nan sha u eren kwagh u bo shin u dedoo; nyityô kwagh i or nana kaa fefa sha mbum, man nan fa ga yô; kpa nana va kav nahan yô, nan hingir u lun a ibo iyol sha ma kwagh u ken akaa la ve." 
Leviticus5:5 Nahan zum u ibo ia kôr nan sha ma kwagh yô, nana̱ pase isholibo i nan," 
Leviticus5:6 nana̱ va na TER nagh sha ci u isholibo i nan er yô, mgbianile, tuleiyôngo shin tuleivo, i̱ lu nagh ku isholibo; pristi a̱ na iwom sha ci u nan sha ci u isholibo i nan er la." 
Leviticus5:7 Kpa aluer inyaregh ki nan kia kuma iyôngo shin ivo ga yô, nana̱ va na TER nagh sha ci u isholibo i nan er la sha mbaatii uhar shin utulembamkunguv uhar, u môm sha ci u nagh ku isholibo, ugen sha ci u nagh ku nanden." 
Leviticus5:8 Nana̱ va na pristi; a̱ gema u a lu sha ci u nagh ku isholibo la, a̱ vande nan nagh a mi, a̱ tôndo un gôngor ikua ikua a ityough, kpa ki de gbe inya ga;" 
Leviticus5:9 a̱ pande awambe a nagh ku isholibo la, a̱ mishi sha imbusuatsegh, awambe a a shi ker la, a̱ kam a hen ityôatsegh; ka nagh ku isholibo." 
Leviticus5:10 A̱ gema u sha uhar la, a̱ na nagh ku nanden a mi, sha tindi; pristi a̱ na iwom sha ci u isholibo i nan er la, nahan á de nan isholibo i nan." 
Leviticus5:11 Kpa aluer inyaregh ki nan kia kuma mbaatii uhar, shin utulembamkunguv uhar ga yô, nana̱ va na nagh sha ci u isholibo i nan er la, sha mwem ma kengese ma ma kom môm-ken-upue u efa, sha ci u nagh ku isholibo; nana̱ de we mkurem sha mi ga, man nana̱ de we ma libano u human doon sha mi kpaa ga, gadia ka nagh ku isholibo." 
Leviticus5:12 Nana̱ va a mi hen pristi, pristi a̱ ongo ikevwe poo, i̱ lu nagh ku umbur, a̱ nande sha atse sha iniav mbi usuv mbi TER; ka nagh ku isholibo je." 
Leviticus5:13 Pristi a̱ na iwom sha ci u nan, sha ci u isholibo i nan er sha ma kwagh u ken akaa ne yô, nahan á de nan isholibo i nan; kwagh u a shi la, a̱ hingir u pristi, er i eren a nagh ku sha samuyia nahan." 
Leviticus5:14 TER ôr kwagh a Mose, kaa er:" 
Leviticus5:15 Aluer hanma or nana er kwagh sha mimin ga, nana er isholibo abu, nana nzughul sha akaa a i tsegh a sha ci u TER yô, nana̱ va na TER nagh sha nomiyôngo shin kpev u a lu a ihogholough iyol ga yô, u a kom sha ishe i u we, sha ushekel mba azurfa yô, i̱ lu shekel u icighanjiir la, sha ci u nagh ku iboogh;" 
Leviticus5:16 nana̱ hide a kwagh u nan nzughul sha akaa a i tsegh a la, shi nana̱ seer môm-ken-utaan sha mi, nana̱ na pristi; pristi a̱ na iwom sha ci u nan, sha nomiyôngo u nagh ku iboogh la, nahan á de nan isholibo i nan." 
Leviticus5:17 Aluer anti or nana er isholibo, nana er ma kwagh u TER A yange er i̱ de eren ga la, abu yô, man nana ya ibo, nana hingir u lun a ibo iyol yô," 
Leviticus5:18 nana̱ va na pristi nomiyôngo, shin kpev u a lu a ihogholough iyol ga yô, sha ishe i u we yô, sha ci u nagh ku iboogh; pristi a̱ na iwom sha ci u nan, sha kwagh u nan er abu nan fe ga la, nahan á de nan isholibo i nan." 
Leviticus5:19 Ka nagh ku iboogh je la; nan ngu a ibo sha ishigh ki TER kpee je. 
Leviticus6:1 TER shi ôr kwagh a Mose, kaa er:" 
Leviticus6:2 Aluer anti or nana er isholibo nana er TER kwagh u a lu sha mimi ga, nana tuna er or u wan ndor a nan, na nan inyaregh nan koso ga, shin ityungu kpaa ga, shin nan ii nan kwagh kpaa ga; shin nana ya or u wan ndor a nan kwagh sha apera;" 
Leviticus6:3 shin nana zua a kwagh u a saa, man nana gema á tuna; shin nana bum sha aie yô; sha hanma kwagh u or a fatyô u eren isholibo sha mi yô;" 
Leviticus6:4 aluer nana er isholibo, man ibo ia kôr nan yô, nahan nana̱ hide a kwagh u nan ii la, shin kwagh u nan ye or sha apera la, shin inyaregh ki i ne nan, koso la, shin kwagh u a saa man nan zough a mi la," 
Leviticus6:5 shin nyityô kwagh i nan bum sha mi sha aie la cii, nana̱ hide a mi cii, shi nana̱ seer môm-ken-utaan sha mi; sha iyange i nan ye ibo la, nana̱ hide a min, nana̱ na or u i lu kwagh u nan la je." 
Leviticus6:6 Shi nana̱ na TER nagh sha nomiyôngo, shin kpev u a lu a ihogholough iyol ga yô, u a kom sha ishe i u we la, sha ci u nagh ku iboogh; nana̱ va na pristi," 
Leviticus6:7 pristi a̱ na iwom sha ci u nan sha ishigh ki TER, nahan á de nan kwaghbo u nan, sha hanma kwagh u nan er man nan hingir oriboogh sha mi la." 
Leviticus6:8 TER shi ôr kwagh a Mose, kaa er:" 
Leviticus6:9 Kaa Aron a ônov nav wer: Ka tindi u nagh ku nanden ne: Nagh ku nanden, ku̱ lu sha usu sha atse a nanden nagh sha mi, tugh jimin cii, zan zan sev mbu kar aven; usu a atsegh la u̱ lu sha mi gbem." 
Leviticus6:10 Pristi a̱ haa riga na u sha ikondo i pupuu, shi a̱ huwa ifo na i sha ikondo i pupuu, a̱ cir idyelegh na, a̱ kura mtwem ma nagh ku nanden ku usu u hie ku sha atse la, a̱ haa ma hen kpeatsegh." 
Leviticus6:11 Nahan a̱ er akondo na la kera, a̱ haa akondo agenegh, a̱ kura mtwem mara, a̱ due a mi ken akôngoafogh hen ijiir i wang." 
Leviticus6:12 Usu u sha atse la, u̱ lu her, u̱ de pirin ga; pristi a̱ waan ikon sha mi hanma sev, a̱ pendan nagh ku nanden sha mi sha inja sha inja, a̱ nanden ahôm a nagh ku bem sha mi." 
Leviticus6:13 Usu u̱ yeghen sha atse gbem, u̱ de pirin mayange ga." 
Leviticus6:14 Ka tindi u nagh ku sha samuyia ne: Ônov mba Aron ve̱ vaan a ku sha ishigh ki TER hen kpeatsegh. 
Leviticus6:15 A̱ ongo mwem ma kengese ma nagh ku sha samuyia ma i hee mkurem sha mi la, ikevwe poo, shi a̱ kura libano u human doon u a lu sha nagh ku sha samuyia la cii, a̱ nande sha atse, i̱ lu ihuma i doon; ka nagh ku umbur ku nan TER." 
Leviticus6:16 Kwagh u a shi her yô, Aron a ônov nav ve̱ ya; i̱ de we kwa sha mi ga, i̱ yaan ku ken icighanjiir; ka ken tembe u tenti u kohol ker la, ve̱ yaan ku ye." 
Leviticus6:17 I̱ de kaan ku a kwa sha mi ga. Ka kwar u M ne ve je ne, ken iniav Yav mbi usuv; ka icighankwagh u hemban cii je, er nagh ku isholibo man nagh ku iboogh nahan." 
Leviticus6:18 Hanma wan u Aron u nomso nana ya ku, ka tindi u gbem sha ikov ikov sha iniav mbi usuv mbi TER; hanma or u nana bende a mbi yô, nana hingir icighanor." 
Leviticus6:19 TER shi ôr kwagh a Mose, kaa er:" 
Leviticus6:20 Nagh ku Aron a ônov nav, ku vea na TER sha iyange i á shighe un mkurem la yô, ka mwem ma kengese ma ma kom môm-ken-upue u efa, sha ci u nagh ku sha samuyia ku gbem, i̱ pande ma vough vough, i̱ na pepe man aikighe." 
Leviticus6:21 I̱ kaa ma sha mkure sha icenge, i̱ vande hôron ma, man á va a mi ye; ka avur a kaan nan nagh ku sha samuyia mi ye, i̱ lu TER ihuma i dedoo." 
Leviticus6:22 Pristi u i shigh un mkurem, u a tem sha ityough nagh ken ônov nav la, ka un una naan ku ye, ka tindi u gbem; á nanden TER ku jimin cii." 
Leviticus6:23 Hanma nagh ku sha samuyia ku pristi yô, i̱ nande ku jimin cii, i̱ de ye ku ga." 
Leviticus6:24 TER shi ôr kwagh a Mose, kaa er:" 
Leviticus6:25 Ôr kwagh a Aron man ônov nav, kaa a ve wer: Ka tindi u nagh ku isholibo ne: ka hen ijiir i i senge nagh ku nanden la, i̱ sôngon nagh ku isholibo sha ishigh ki TER kpaa ye, ka icighankwagh u hemban cii je." 
Leviticus6:26 Pristi u a ne ku sha ci u isholibo la, ka un una yaan ku ye; i̱ yaan ku hen icighanjiir je, ka hen tembe u tenti u kohol ker la." 
Leviticus6:27 Hanma or u nana bende a inyam i ku yô, nana hingir icighanor; aluer awambe a ku á tsenda sha ikondo yô, ôô kwagh u a tsende sha mi la ken icighanjiir." 
Leviticus6:28 Ityegh ki inyaagh ki i jiir ku shi mi yô, i̱ hembe ki; man aluer á jiir ku shin ityegh ki togula yô, i̱ kile ki i̱ elegh ki sha mnger." 
Leviticus6:29 Hanma nomsoor u ken upristi yô, nana ya ku; ka icighankwagh u hemban cii je." 
Leviticus6:30 Kpa nagh ku isholibo ku i pande awambe a ku, i ve a min ken tenti u kohol ker la, sha u nan iwom mi ken icighanjiir yô, i̱ de ye ku mayange ga, i̱ nande ku sha usu je." 
Leviticus7:1 Tindi u nagh ku iboogh yô, ka un ne: Ka icighankwagh u hemban cii je." 
Leviticus7:2 Ka hen ijiir i ve senge nagh ku nanden la, ve̱ sôngon nagh ku iboogh kpaa ye; awambe a ku yô, á mishi a sha ambusuatsegh á tser." 
Leviticus7:3 Á na nagh sha ahôm a ku cii: tsa u ahômough man ahôm a a cir ikav mbi kimi," 
Leviticus7:4 man ahi ahar man ahôm a a lu sha a, vegher u shin iwenge la, man ishwalegh ki mtema, a̱ dugh ki a ahi imôngo." 
Leviticus7:5 Pristi a̱ nande sha atse, i̱ lu nagh ku usugh ku nan TER; ka nagh ku iboogh je." 
Leviticus7:6 Hanma nomsoor ken upristi yô, nana ya ku; i̱ yaan ku ken icighanjiir; ka icighankwagh u hemban cii je." 
Leviticus7:7 Er nagh ku isholibo ku lu nahan, kape nagh ku iboogh kpaa ku lu je la, tindi ve ngu môm tsô; pristi u a ne iwom sha ku la ka un, una zua a ku ye;" 
Leviticus7:8 pristi u a ne nagh ku nanden ku hanma or yô, pristi la una zua a ikôvough ki nagh ku a ne la." 
Leviticus7:9 Hanma nagh ku sha samuyia, ku i kaa ku sha atse man ku i kaa sha icenge kua shin icenge i tumuu kpaa, pristi u a ne nagh sha ku la, ka un una zua a ku ye." 
Leviticus7:10 Man shi hanma nagh ku sha samuyia ku i nongo mkurem sha mi, shin ku ombor kpaa, ônov mba Aron cii vea gbaa ngohol tsô, á sange a sange ve ga." 
Leviticus7:11 Tindi u nagh ku sôngon ku bem, ku or á na TER yô, ka un ne:" 
Leviticus7:12 Aluer nana va a mi á lu nagh ku iwuese yô, nana̱ va a nagh ku iwuese la, a umasa mba i we kwa sha mi ga, mba i nongo mkurem sha mi yô, man umasa mba par par mba i we kwa sha mi ga, mba i shigh ve mkurem yô, man mba i her ve sha mwem ma kengese ma i we mkurem sha mi yô." 
Leviticus7:13 Nana̱ na nagh ku nan a umasa mba i we kwa sha mi yô, a nagh ku nan ku bem ku iwuese imôngo." 
Leviticus7:14 Nana̱ dugh masa môm ken hanma nagh, a̱ hingir nagh ku nan TER; a̱ hingir kwagh u pristi u a mishin awambe a nagh ku bem la." 
Leviticus7:15 Inyam i nagh ku bem ku iwuese la yô, i̱ ya i sha iyange i nan ne nagh ku nan la je; nana̱ de deen ma kwagh, a̱ lu her zan zan sev mbu̱ aven ga." 
Leviticus7:16 Kpa aluer nagh ku nan á lu iceghzwa shin nagh ku sha ishima i nan je yô, i̱ ya ku sha iyange i nan ne nagh ku nan la, kper nan kpaa i̱ ya kwagh u a tse her la;" 
Leviticus7:17 kpa inyam i nagh kura ia lu her zan zan ayange atar yô, i̱ nande i sha usu." 
Leviticus7:18 Aluer á ya ma inyam i nagh ku sôngon ku nagh ku bem sha iyange i atar la yô, á kera lu kwagh u rumun un ga, man u nana va na nagh sha i kpaa, á kera lu nan a inja sha ma kwagh ga, á hingir kwagh u ndôhôrshima, man or u nana ya i kpaa nana lu a ibo iyol." 
Leviticus7:19 Inyam i i bende a hanma kwagh u a lu wang ga yô, i̱ de ye i ga, i̱ nande sha usu. Inyam yô, hanma or u nan lu wang nana ya i," 
Leviticus7:20 kpa or u nan ye inyam i nagh ku sôngon ku nagh ku bem ku ku lu ku TER yô, er nan lu wang ga la yô, i̱ dugh or la ken nongo u nan kera." 
Leviticus7:21 Man shi aluer anti or nana bende a hanma kwagh u a lu wang ga, shin kwagh u a lu wang ga u or, shin swase u u lu wang ga, shin hanma kwagh u a lu wang ga a ndôhôr ishima kpaa yô, man nana gema á ya inyam i nagh ku sôngon ku nagh ku bem ku ku lu ku TER la yô, i̱ dugh or la ken nongo u nan kera." 
Leviticus7:22 TER shi ôr kwagh a Mose, kaa er:" 
Leviticus7:23 Ôr kwagh a Mbaiserael kaa a ve wer: Ahôm a bua man a iyôngo man a ivo yô, de ye nen a mayange ga." 
Leviticus7:24 Ahôm a kwagh u a gbe kpen tsô, man ahôm a kwagh u inyam i kume i woo un yô, i̱ gba eren hanma injatom a mi tsô, kpa mye yô, i̱ de ye a je ga." 
Leviticus7:25 Gadia hanma or u nana ya ahôm a ilev mbi ka i na TER nagh ku usugh a i yô, or u nan ye la, i̱ dugh nan ken nongo u nan kera." 
Leviticus7:26 Man shi de ye nen ma awambe ken uya enev ga, shin a lu a inyon shin a lu a uile kpaa ga." 
Leviticus7:27 Hanma or u nana ya ma awambe yô, i̱ dugh or la ken nongo u nan kera." 
Leviticus7:28 TER shi ôr kwagh a Mose, kaa er:" 
Leviticus7:29 Ôr kwagh a Mbaiserael kaa a ve wer: Or u nan ne TER nagh ku sôngon ku bem yô, nana̱ va na nagh sha kwagh u nan dugh ken nagh ku sôngon ku nagh ku nan ku bem la;" 
Leviticus7:30 ka ave a nan iyol i nan je a̱ va a iniav mbi TER mbi usuv ye, nana̱ va a ahôm man gugu; gugu yô, ka sha u cian a cia a mi, a̱ hingir nagh ku cian sha ishigh ki TER." 
Leviticus7:31 Pristi a̱ nande ahôm la sha atse; kpa gugu la yô, a̱ lu u Aron a ônov nav." 
Leviticus7:32 Namegh ku yanegh yô, gema na nen pristi, ku̱ lu nagh ku kenden sha ken iniav mbi sôngon mbi iniav yenev mbi bem." 
Leviticus7:33 Wan u Aron u nan ne nagh sha awambe a iniav mbi bem kua sha ahôm la, ka nan, namegh ku yanegh kua lu kwar u nan ye." 
Leviticus7:34 Gadia gugu u cian a mi la, kua namegh ku kenden sha la, M ngohol hen Mbaiserael ken iniav mbi sôngon mbi iniav vev mbi bem, M gema M na pristi Aron a ônov nav, ka kwar ve u gbem, u Mbaiserael vea naan ve yô." 
Leviticus7:35 Ungun ka kwar u Aron kua kwar u ônov nav ken iniav mbi TER mbi usuv je ne, sha iyange i A va a ve sha u ve̱ er tom u pristi sha ishigh ki TER la," 
Leviticus7:36 ka kwar u TER kaa er Mbaiserael ve̱ naan ve ne, sha iyange i A shighe ve mkurem la. Ka tindi u eren sha mi gbem je, sha ikov ikov." 
Leviticus7:37 Ka tindi u nagh ku nanden man nagh ku sha samuyia man nagh ku isholibo man nagh ku iboogh man nagh ku tseghan or a mi kua nagh ku sôngon ku bem je ne; 
Leviticus7:38 ka tindi u TER lu na Mose sha uwo u Senai, sha iyange i A kaa a Mbaiserael er, ve̱ va a iniav vev hen TER, ken desereti u Senai je la." 
Leviticus8:1 TER shi ôr kwagh a Mose kaa er: 
Leviticus8:2 Va a Aron kua ônov nav a na imôngo, man akondo la man mkurem ma shighen man nombua u nagh ku isholibo man anomaiyôngo ahar kua ikese i umasa mba i we kwa sha mi ga yô;" 
Leviticus8:3 yô, kohol ior cii hen hunda u tenti u kohol ker la." 
Leviticus8:4 Tsô Mose er er TER kaa un nahan, i kohol ior hen hunda u tenti u kohol ker la." 
Leviticus8:5 Mose kaa mkohol u ior er: Ka kwagh u TER A kaa er i̱ er ne: 
Leviticus8:6 Nahan Mose va a Aron man ônov nav, a ôô ve iyol sha mnger." 
Leviticus8:7 A haa un riga, a zer un kwange, a haa un togo, shi a haa un efodi man a zer un kor u efodi, a tsule un efodi sha u." 
Leviticus8:8 A har un ikpa i sha vanger; ken ikpa i sha vanger la, a wa Urim man Tumim ker." 
Leviticus8:9 A kange un atsar sha ityou, a zer kpande u zenaria u icighanikav la sha atsar la, vegher u ken ishi, er TER kaa Mose nahan." 
Leviticus8:10 Tsô Mose tôô mkurem ma shighen, a shighe tabernakel kua akaa a a lu kimi cii, a tsegha un." 
Leviticus8:11 Shi a mishi ma sha atse kwa taankaruhar, a shighe atse la kua ikav mbi a cii kua tasa u ôôn iyol a ityô na kpaa, sha u tseghan ve." 
Leviticus8:12 A haa Aron mkurem ma shighen sha ityou, a shighe un, sha u tseghan un." 
Leviticus8:13 Shi Mose va a ônov mba Aron kpaa, a haa ve akondo, a zer ve ikange, a cir ve ader er TER kaa Mose nahan." 
Leviticus8:14 Tsô a va a nombua u nagh ku isholibo la; Aron kua ônov nav ve va penda ave sha ityough ki nombua u nagh ku isholibo la. 
Leviticus8:15 Nahan a sôngo un; Mose er awambe sha ihôwe feregh sha akoratseegh ningir tser, a wanger atse la, a gema awambe, a haa hen ityôatsegh, a tsegha a, a na iwom sha ci u a." 
Leviticus8:16 A tôô ahôm a sha ikav mbi kimi la cii; man ishwalegh ki mtema, man ahi ahar kua ahôm a a lu sha mi la, Mose gema nande sha atse a nanden nagh sha mi." 
Leviticus8:17 Kpa nombua a ikôvough nagh man inyam na kua icômbov yô, a nande sha usu ken akôngoafogh, er TER kaa Mose nahan." 
Leviticus8:18 Shi a va a nomiyôngo u nagh ku nanden la, Aron kua ônov nav ve penda ave sha ityough ki nomiyôngo la," 
Leviticus8:19 a sôngo un, Mose haa awambe la sha ambusuatsegh ningir tser." 
Leviticus8:20 Tsô a bur iyôngo la aci, Mose nande ityough man aci a inyam la kua ahôm." 
Leviticus8:21 A ôô ikav mbi kimi kua angahar sha mnger; tsô Mose nande nomiyôngo la jimin sha atse a nanden nagh sha mi; lu nagh ku nanden ku human doon; ka nagh ku usugh ku nan TER, er TER kaa Mose nahan." 
Leviticus8:22 Shi a va a nomiyôngo ugen la kpaa, ka nomiyôngo u tseghan or a min la, Aron kua ônov nav ve penda ave sha ityough ki nomiyôngo la," 
Leviticus8:23 a sôngo un, Mose er awambe la, feregh Aron sha kpe u togh ku yanegh man sha ihônguhar na u tamen u ken yan." 
Leviticus8:24 Tsô a va a ônov mba Aron, Mose feregh ve awambe sha akpeatogh a ve a yan, man sha ahôaveegh a ve a tamen a ken yan man sha ahôangahar a ve a tamen a ken yan; Mose shi haa awambe la sha atse ningir tser." 
Leviticus8:25 A tôô ahôm la kua tsa u ahômough man ahôm a sha ikav mbi kimi cii, man ishwalegh ki mtema, man ahi ahar kua ahôm a sha mi la, man namegh ku yanegh," 
Leviticus8:26 man shin ikese i masa u i we kwa sha mi ga yô, i i lu sha ishigh ki TER la, a dugh masa môm u i we kwa sha mi ga, man masa môm u bredi u sha mkure kua masa môm u par par, a penda ve sha ahôm la kua sha namegh ku yanegh kura;" 
Leviticus8:27 a gema akaa la cii, a penda Aron sha ave kua sha ave a ônov nav kpaa, a cia a, hingir nagh ku cian sha ishigh ki TER." 
Leviticus8:28 Tsô Mose tôô a sha ave ve kera, a gema a nande a sha atse sha nagh ku nanden, hingir nagh ku tseghan or a mi, ku human doon; ka nagh ku usugh ku nan TER." 
Leviticus8:29 Tsô Mose tôô gugu la cia, hingir nagh ku cian sha ishigh ki TER; ka kwar u Mose sha iyôngo i tseghan or a mi je la, er TER kaa Mose nahan." 
Leviticus8:30 Shi Mose tôô mkurem ma shighen kua awambe a sha atse la, mishi Aron iyol kua sha akondo a na, man shi ônov nav kua sha akondo a ônov nav kpaa; a tsegha Aron kua akondo a na man ônov nav kua akondo a ve kpaa." 
Leviticus8:31 Tsô Mose kaa a Aron man ônov nav er: Jiir nen inyam la hen hunda u tenti u kohol ker la, ya nen i heregh sha bredi u a lu shin ikese i iniav mbi tseghan la, er m vande kaan nahan mer: Aron a ônov nav ve̱ yaan la." 
Leviticus8:32 Inyam i i shi her kua bredi u a shi la yô, nande nen sha usu." 
Leviticus8:33 Ayange ataankarahar cii, de dugh nen hen hunda u tenti u kohol ker la ga, saa ayange a mtsegh wen la á bee kera; gadia á tsegha ne ayange ataankarahar je." 
Leviticus8:34 Er i er nyian nahan, kape TER A kaa er á eren á naan iwom sha ci wen ne." 
Leviticus8:35 Ayange a ataankarahar la cii luun nen hen hunda u tenti u kohol ker la, tugh man tetan; waan nen iko sha imo i TER sha er né kpe ga yô, gadia kape i kaam je la." 
Leviticus8:36 Tsô Aron kua ônov nav ve er akaa a TER kaa Mose la cii. 
Leviticus9:1 Tsô sha iyange i anigheni la Mose yila Aron a ônov nav man mbatamen mba Iserael," 
Leviticus9:2 a kaa a Aron er: Kôr gumbua sha ci u nagh ku isholibo man nomiyôngo sha ci u nagh ku nanden, ve̱ de luun a ihogholough iyol ga, va a mi sha ishigh ki TER." 
Leviticus9:3 Yô, ôr kwagh a Mbaiserael kaa a ve wer: Kôr nen kpev sha ci u nagh ku isholibo man gumbua man gumiyôngo, mba ve kom inyom i môm, mba ve lu a ihogholough iyol ga yô, sha ci u nagh ku nanden;" 
Leviticus9:4 man shi nombua kua nomiyôngo sha ci u nagh ku bem ku sôngon sha ishigh ki TER man nagh ku sha samuyia ku i we ku mkurem yô; gadia nyian TER ngu anden her a ven. 
Leviticus9:5 Tsô ve va a kwagh u Mose kaa la sha ishigh ki tenti u kohol ker la; mkohol u ior cii kporom va tile sha ishigh ki TER. 
Leviticus9:6 Tsô Mose kaa er: Ka kwagh u TER A kaa er ne̱ er man iengem i TER ia ande her a ven je ne. 
Leviticus9:7 Mose shi kaa a Aron er: Kporom hen atse a nan nagh sha mi, na nagh ough ku isholibo man nagh ough ku nanden, na iwom sha ci wou iyol you kua sha ci u ior kpaa, na nagh ku ior, na iwom sha ci ve, er TER A kaa ne nahan" 
Leviticus9:8 Tsô Aron kporom hen atse a nanden nagh sha mi, a sôngo gumbua u nagh ku isholibo u a lu sha ci na iyol na la." 
Leviticus9:9 Ônov mba Aron va na un awambe, a civ ihôwe na shin awambe la, a feregh a sha akoratseegh, a gema awambe la a haa hen ityôatsegh;" 
Leviticus9:10 kpa ahôm a nagh ku isholibo man ahi a ku, kua ishwalegh ki mtema la, a gema a nande sha atse, er TER kaa Mose nahan." 
Leviticus9:11 Ikôvough man inyam yô, a nande ken akôngoafogh sha usu." 
Leviticus9:12 Shi a sôngo nagh ku nanden; ônov mba Aron va na un awambe, a haa a sha ambusuatsegh a ningir a tser." 
Leviticus9:13 Shi ve va na un nagh ku nanden aci aci kua ityough kpaa, a gema a nande sha atse a nan nagh sha mi." 
Leviticus9:14 A ôô ikav mbi kimi kua angahar, a nande sha atse sha nagh ku nanden la." 
Leviticus9:15 Shi a va a nagh ku sha ci u ior la; a kôr ivo i nagh ku isholibo i i lu sha ci u ior la, a sôngon i, a na nagh ku isholibo a mi er i vande eren a ku hiihii la nahan." 
Leviticus9:16 Shi a na nagh ku nanden, a er a mi sha tindi." 
Leviticus9:17 A na nagh ku sha samuyia kpaa, a ongo ikevwe poo, a nande sha atse a nanden nagh sha mi la, a nagh ku nanden ku pepe la imôngo cii." 
Leviticus9:18 A sôngo nombua kua nomiyôngo la, ka nagh ku sôngon ku bem ku ku lu sha ci u ior je la; ônov mba Aron ve na un awambe la–a haa a sha ambusuatsegh a ningir a tser—" 
Leviticus9:19 man ahôm a nombua man a nomiyôngo la, man tsa u ahômough man ahôm a a cir ikav mbi kimi man ahi kua ishwalegh ki mtema;" 
Leviticus9:20 ve penda ahôm sha ugugu, a gema a nande ahôm la sha atse a nanden nagh sha mi;" 
Leviticus9:21 kpa ugugu kua namegh ku yanegh yô, Aron cia ve, hingir nagh ku cian sha ishigh ki TER, er Mose kaa nahan." 
Leviticus9:22 Tsô Aron kende ave sha, samber sha ior, ver ve doo doo. Been u nan nagh ku isholibo man nagh ku nanden kua nagh ku bem yô, a hungwa." 
Leviticus9:23 Nahan Mose vea Aron ve nyôr ken tenti u kohol ker la, shi ve hide ve due, ve ver ior doo doo; tsô iengem i TER maa ande hen ior cii." 
Leviticus9:24 Usu due sha ishigh ki TER, hia nagh ku nanden sha atse kua ahôm la cii; ior cii mba nengen nahan yô, ve gba gbiren awer, ve kuma ityough inya." 
Leviticus10:1 Tsô Nadabi vea Abihu ônov mba Aron, ve tôô ugbande mba usuv, hanmô tôô u nan, nan wa usu shimi, shi nan wa kwaghhumandoon shimi, kpa nan va a usu ugen kposo sha ishigh ki TER, u A ne ve zwa sha u ga yô." 
Leviticus10:2 Tsô usu due sha ishigh ki TER va hia ve, ve kpe sha ishigh ki TER." 
Leviticus10:3 Tsô Mose kaa a Aron er: Ka kwagh u TER A kaa je la, er: Ka hen mba ve mgbôghom a Mo la, Me pase icighanmlu Wam ye, shi Me pase icivir Yam sha ishigh ki iorough cii kpaa ye. Kpa Aron lu ving." 
Leviticus10:4 Nahan Mose yila Mishael man Elesafan ônov mba Ushiel anngô u ter u Aron la, a kaa a ve er: Kporom nen heen, va tôô nen anngôôv enev hen icighanjiir kera, yem nen a mi ken akôngoafogh." 
Leviticus10:5 Tsô ve kporom ve va tôô ve a akondo a ve iyol, ve due a mi ken akôngoafogh er Mose kaa nahan." 
Leviticus10:6 Mose gema kaa a Aron man ônov nav Eleasar man Itamar, er: De lu nen ityough meghaa ga, man de anden nen akondo a en kpaa ga, sha er né kpe ga, man A̱ de yugh ior cii kpaa ga yô; kpa anmgbianev enev, ya u Iserael cii yô, ve̱ gba vaan usu u TER A nande la tsô." 
Leviticus10:7 De dugh nen hen hunda u tenti u kohol ker la ga, sha er né kpe ga yô; gadia mkurem ma shighen ma TER ma ne iyol. Tsô ve kpaa ve er, er Mose kaa ve nahan je." 
Leviticus10:8 TER shi ôr kwagh a Aron, kaa er:" 
Leviticus10:9 Msôrom, shin ma kwaghman u taver yô, de me nen ga, we kua ônov ou kpaa, zum u nea nyôron ken tenti u kohol ker la, sha er né kpe ga yô; ka tindi u eren sha mi gbem sha ikov ikov;" 
Leviticus10:10 sha er ne̱ pav icighankwagh kposo, a kwagh u a lu icighankwagh ga yô, kua kwagh u a lu wang ga yô, a kwagh u a lu wang yô." 
Leviticus10:11 Man sha er ne̱ tese Mbaiserael akaawan a TER, a Mose ôr ve la cii yô." 
Leviticus10:12 Tsô Mose ôr kwagh a Aron man a Eleasar man Itamar ônov nav mba ve shi her la, a kaa a ve er: Tôô nen nagh ku sha samuyia ku iniav mbi usuv mbi TER ku ku shi her la, ya nen ku hen kpeatsegh, kwa u̱ de lu shimi ga; gadia ka icighankwagh u hemban je;" 
Leviticus10:13 yaan nen ku ken icighanjiir, gadia ka kwar wou a ônov ou, u i dugh ken iniav mbi usuv mbi TER je la; gadia kape i kaam la." 
Leviticus10:14 Man gugu u cian kua namegh ku kenden sha yô, yaan nen ken ijiir i wang, we kua ônov ou mba nomso man mba kasev kpaa, gadia i na u, ka kwar wou a ônov ou, u i dugh ken iniav mbi bem mbi Mbaiserael je la." 
Leviticus10:15 Namegh ku kenden sha man gugu u cian la yô, ve̱ vaan a mi a iniav mbi usuv mbi sha ahôm mbila imôngo, sha er vea na nagh ku cian mi sha ishigh ki TER, i̱ hingir kwagh wou a ônov ou, ka kwar wen u gbem je la, er TER kaa nahan." 
Leviticus10:16 Tsô Mose ker ivo i nagh ku isholibo tsung, kpa i vande nanden i kera ve; nahan ishima vihi un a Eleasar man Itamar, ônov mba Aron, mba ve shi her la, a kaa er:" 
Leviticus10:17 Inja na nan ne kera ye nagh ku isholibo ken icighanjiir ga? Gadia ka icighankwagh u hemban cii je; A na ne ku sha u ne̱ tôô ibo i ior kera man ne̱ na iwom sha ci ve sha ishigh ki TER. 
Leviticus10:18 Nenge, i va a awambe a ku ken atô u icighanjiir ga; yô ka u ma ne ye ku ken icighanjiir je, er m kaa nahan." 
Leviticus10:19 Tsô Aron ôr kwagh a Mose, kaa er: Nenge, nyian ve na nagh vegh ku isholibo kua nagh vegh ku nanden sha ishigh ki TER; man nenge, imbakwagh i i tserem ne; mea ye nagh ku isholibo nyian nahan ma i doo TERE he?" 
Leviticus10:20 Mose ongo nahan yô, doo un." 
Leviticus11:1 Tsô TER ôr kwagh a Mose man Aron, A kaa a ve er:" 
Leviticus11:2 Ôr nen kwagh a Mbaiserael ner: Ishôso i sha won cii, i né yaan i yô, ka i ne:"
