Leviticus11:3 Hanma swase u u pav apande ahar dedoo, shi u kengese kwaghyan kpaa yô, ka u, yaan nen ye." 
Leviticus11:4 Kpa i i kengese kwaghyan man i i pav apande, i né yaan i ga yô, ka rakumi, gadia un kengese kwaghyan kpa a pav apande ga, a̱ lu ne kwagh u a lu wang ga yô." 
Leviticus11:5 Man ikuwa, gadia i kengese kwaghyan, kpa i pav apande ga, i̱ lu ne kwagh u a lu wang ga yô." 
Leviticus11:6 Man alôm, gadia un kengese kwaghyan, kpa a pav apande ga, a̱ lu ne kwagh u a lu wang ga yô." 
Leviticus11:7 Man igo kpaa, gadia i pav apande, a pav dedoo je, kpa i kengese kwaghyan ga, i̱ lu ne kwagh u a lu wang ga yô." 
Leviticus11:8 De ye nen inyam i i ga, mbende tsô kpaa, de benden nen a gundu u i ga, i̱ lu ne kwagh u a lu wang ga yô." 
Leviticus11:9 Akaa a shin mnger a né yaan di yô, ka hanma kwagh u shin mnger u a lu a tsaase kua avuu, á lu shin zegemnger shin á lu shin uifi, ka a yaan nen ye." 
Leviticus11:10 Akaa a a lu shin zegemnger man shin uifi, akaa a zenden shin mnger man akaauma cii a a lu shin mnger a a lu a tsaase kua avuu ga yô, a̱ lu ne kwagh u ndôhôrshima je." 
Leviticus11:11 Een, a lu ne kwagh u ndôhôrshima, de ye nen inyam i a ga, agundu a a kpaa a̱ lu ne kwagh u ndôhôrshima." 
Leviticus11:12 Hanma kwagh u shin mnger u a lu a tsaase man avuu ga yô, a̱ lu ne kwagh u ndôhôrshima je." 
Leviticus11:13 Man inyon i ia lu ne kwagh u ndôhôrshima, i yan i ga, i i lu kwagh ndôhôrshima yô, ka: iguve man gafa man iwaa;" 
Leviticus11:14 man azembe, man tsoghor, anza la cii;" 
Leviticus11:15 man gugôô, anza la cii;" 
Leviticus11:16 man konkofi, man kpire man shimiu man kunkure, anza la cii;" 
Leviticus11:17 man kaaki man ayaicambev man ivungu; 
Leviticus11:18 man akiki man akumedu man apu; 
Leviticus11:19 man ôô-ôô man ipevnor, anza la cii; man inyonalôm kua inima." 
Leviticus11:20 Ankaam ma ma lu a ingur ma ma zenden sha angahar anyiin, ma̱ lu ne kwagh u ndôhôrshima." 
Leviticus11:21 Ankaam ma ma lu a ingur ma zenden sha angahar anyiin ma né yaan yô, ka ma ma̱ lu a agbeen a tsuwen mi yô;" 
Leviticus11:22 a i rumun, u né yaan a yô, ka: ahungwa, anza la cii; man ahungwa u sha kon, anza la cii; man ahungwa u tsuwen, anza la cii; man uigu mbaahungwa, anza la cii." 
Leviticus11:23 Kpa akaa agen cii a a lu a ingur man angahar anyiin yô, a̱ lu ne kwagh u ndôhôrshima je." 
Leviticus11:24 Ka akaa a á na ne, né kera lu wang ga ne, anti or u nana bende a mô ve u a kpe yô, nana kera lu wang ga zan zan iyange ia kar been;" 
Leviticus11:25 anti or u nana tôô mô ve u a kpe yô, nana ôô akondo a nan, nana kera lu wang ga zan zan iyange ia kar been." 
Leviticus11:26 Hanma inyam i i pav apande, a pav ahar dedoo ga, shi i kengese kpaa ga yô, i̱ lu ne kwagh u a lu u wang ga yô; hanma or u nana bende a i yô, nana kera lu wang ga." 
Leviticus11:27 Ishôso i akevegh i zenden sha angahar a i anyiin la cii yô, i̱ lu ne kwagh u a lu u wang ga yô; anti or u nana bende a gundu u i yô, nana kera lu wang ga zan zan iyange ia kar been." 
Leviticus11:28 Man u nan tee gundu u i la kpaa, nana̱ ôô akondo a nan, nana kera lu wang ga zan zan iyange ia kar been; i̱ lu ne akaa a a lu wang ga yô." 
Leviticus11:29 Akaa a a kper a kpela inya a a̱ lu ne kwagh u wang ga yô, ka: ijuhyev man ihyev man mende, anza la cii;" 
Leviticus11:30 man adendem man huel man vange man ishondo man hum. 
Leviticus11:31 Ka akaa a a kper a kpela inya a a lu ne kwagh u wang ga, je ne; or u nana bende a a zum u a kpe la yô, nana kera lu wang ga zan zan iyange ia kar been." 
Leviticus11:32 Man shi hanma kwagh u mô ve u kpen, a gbe sha mi yô, una kera lu wang ga, shin a lu ikagh ki konough, shin akondo, shin ikôvough, shin iba; hanma ikagh ki i eren tom a ki cii, i̱ wa ki shin mnger kia lu wang ga zan zan iyange ia kar been, man kia wanger ye." 
Leviticus11:33 Hanma ikagh ki inyaagh kpaa ki hanmô ve a gbe sha mi yô, hanma kwagh u a lu shimi cii, una kera lu wang ga; nahan hembe nen ki." 
Leviticus11:34 Hanma kwaghyan u i we mngerem sha mi yô, una kera lu wang ga; man hanma kwaghman u á ma shin injaika shon kpaa una kera lu wang ga." 
Leviticus11:35 Hanma kwagh u gundu ve una gba sha mi yô, una kera lu wang ga, shin a lu atse, shin a lu ityev mbi jiir kwagh mi kpaa, i̱ hembe kera, gadia ve kera lu wang ga je ve, ve̱ lu ne kwagh u wang ga." 
Leviticus11:36 Nahan kpaa imbor kua ijôr henpe mngerem ma kohol yô, ia lu wang, kpa or u nana bende a gundu u a shin mi la yô, nana kera lu wang ga." 
Leviticus11:37 Man aluer gundu ve una gba shin ivorkwagh i i ver sha ci u lôôn yô, ia lu wang." 
Leviticus11:38 Kpa aluer i haa mngerem sha ivor la man gundu ve una gba shimi yô, ia lu ne kwagh u wang ga." 
Leviticus11:39 Aluer hanma ilegh ki ne ye kpaa, kia kpe a kpe yô, or á bende a gundu u ki, nana kera lu wang ga zan zan iyange ia kar been." 
Leviticus11:40 Or u nana ya gundu u ki, nana̱ ôô akondo a nan, nana kera lu wang ga zan zan iyange ia kar been; man u nan tee gundu u ki kpaa nana̱ ôô akondo a nan, nana kera lu wang ga, zan zan iyange ia kar been." 
Leviticus11:41 Inyarev mbi zenden hen inya iuu la, ka kwagh u ndôhôrshima je; i̱ de ye mbi ga." 
Leviticus11:42 Hanma kwagh u a kper iyav inya man hanma kwagh u a zenden sha angahar anyiin man hanma kwagh u lun a angahar kpishi kpaa, ka inyarev mbi zenden hen inya la cii, de ye nen ga, gadia ka akaa a ndôhôrshima je." 
Leviticus11:43 De gem nen ayol a en hingir nen kwagh u ndôhôrshima sha hanma inyarev mbi zenden hen inya iuu la ga; man shi de hôngor nen ayol a en sha mbi ga, sha er de kera hingir nen wang ga, sha mbi ga." 
Leviticus11:44 Gadia ka Mo M lu TER Aôndo wen; nahan tsegha nen ayol a en, lu nen uicighanmbaiorov je, gadia Mo M ngu icighan je; yô, de hôngor nen ayol a en sha inyarev mbi mbi kper a kpela inya ga." 
Leviticus11:45 Gadia ka Mo TER u M dugh a ven ken tar u Igipiti sha u Me lu Aôndo wen yô; lu nen uicighanmbaiorov, gadia Mo kpaa M ngu icighan je." 
Leviticus11:46 Ngun ka tindi u sha ishôso man sha inyon man sha hanma kwaghuma u a zenden shin mnger, man sha hanma kwagh u a zenden sha tar kpaa yô;" 
Leviticus11:47 sha er á pav kwagh u a lu wang ga kposo, a kwagh u a lu wang yô, man ishôso i i doo u yan kpaa, a i i doo u yan ga yô." 
Leviticus12:1 Tsô TER shi ôr kwagh a Mose, kaa er:" 
Leviticus12:2 Ôr kwagh a Mbaiserael, kaa a ve wer: Aluer kwase nan wa iyav man nan mar wan u nomso yô, nana kera lu wang ga zan zan ayange ataankarahar, vough er ayange a ka nan due won i pav a nan la nahan, nana kera lu wang ga." 
Leviticus12:3 Sha iyange i anigheni la, i̱ tsôngo un." 
Leviticus12:4 Ayange ikundugber kar atar cii, nana lu ken awambe a mwanger la, nana̱ de benden ma icighankwagh ave ga, man nana̱ de nyer ken icighanjiir kpaa ga, zan zan ayange a mwanger u nan á bee ve." 
Leviticus12:5 Man aluer nana mar wan u kwase yô, nana kera lu wang ga zan zan ayange pue kar anyiin, vough er ayange a ka nan due won la nahan, ayange akunduatar kar ataratar nana lu ken awambe a mwanger la." 
Leviticus12:6 Zum u ayange a mwanger u nan aa bee sha kwagh u wan, shin a lu u nomso, shin u kwase kpaa yô, nana̱ va a gumiyôngo u a kom inyom i môm yô, sha ci u nagh ku nanden, man tuleikungu, shin atii, sha ci u nagh ku isholibo, hen hunda u tenti u kohol ker la, hen pristi;" 
Leviticus12:7 pristi a̱ va a mi sha ishigh ki TER, a̱ va na iwom sha ci u nan, tsô nana hingir wang sha mhee u awambe a nan la. Ngun ka tindi sha ci u kwase u nan mar wan u nomso shin u kwase je ne." 
Leviticus12:8 Man aluer inyaregh ki nan kia kuma sha gumiyôngo ga yô, nana̱ va a mbaatii uhar shin utulembamkunguv uhar, umôm sha ci u nagh ku nanden, u môm yô, sha ci u nagh ku isholibo, pristi a̱ na iwom sha ci u nan, nahan nana hingir wang." 
Leviticus13:1 TER shi ôr kwagh a Mose man Aron kaa er: 
Leviticus13:2 Aluer or á lu a imor sha kwavyolough u nan, shin iyolkuran, shin ma ibeenegh man á hingir angev mbu imandev sha kwavyolough u nan yô, i̱ va a nan hen Aron, shin hen mô u ken ônov nav, upristi;" 
Leviticus13:3 pristi a̱ nenge angev mbu mbu lu nan sha kwavyolough la; aluer ice i heregh ia hingir pupuu man aluer mbua lu er mbu saa sha kwavyolough tseegh ga, mbu nyôr kimi yô, ka angev mbu imandev je la; pristi una nengen nahan yô, a̱ pase er nan kera lu wang ga yô." 
Leviticus13:4 Aluer ibeenegh kila kia kungu sha kwavyolough u nan man aluer kia lu er ki saa sha kwavyolough, kia nyôr kimi ga, man ice i heregh kpaa ia hingir pupuu ga yô, pristi a̱ wuhe or u kwagh a dugh nan iyol la ayange ataankarahar;" 
Leviticus13:5 pristi a̱ shi a̱ nenge nan sha iyange i ataankarahar la; yô, aluer nan nenge, á lu nan er angev mbula mbu her nahan tsô, mbu seer sha kwav u nan ga yô, pristi a̱ shi a̱ wuhe nan ayange ataankarahar;" 
Leviticus13:6 sha iyange i ataankarahar la, pristi a̱ shi a̱ nenge nan, nahan aluer kwagh u a dugh nan iyol la una hingir fing, una seer a seer sha kwavyolough ga yô, pristi a̱ pase er nan ngu wang; ka iyolkuran tsô, nana̱ ôô akondo a nan, tsô nana lu wang." 
Leviticus13:7 Kpa aluer iyolkuran la ia seer a seer sha kwavyolough er nan vande tesen pristi iyol i nan sha u i̱ wanger nan kera la yô, shi nana̱ kimbir u tesen pristi iyol i nan;" 
Leviticus13:8 pristi a̱ nenge, aluer iyolkuran la ia seer a seer sha kwavyolough yô, pristi a̱ pase er nan ngu wang ga, ka imande je." 
Leviticus13:9 Aluer angev mbu imandev mbua lu or iyol yô, i̱ va a nan hen ishigh ki pristi;" 
Leviticus13:10 pristi a̱ nenge, aluer una nenge imor i pupuu sha kwavyolough man ia gema ice ia hingir pupuu yô, man sha imor la a lu azoghol azoghol yô," 
Leviticus13:11 ka tse imande je a lu sha kwavyolough u nan ye, pristi a̱ pase er nan ngu wang ga, a̱ de wuhu nan ga, gadia nan kera ngu wang ga." 
Leviticus13:12 Aluer imande ia samber sha kwavyolough zan zan ia cir kwavyolough u oruange la cii, á hii sha ityough ki nan je, á ar shin angahar a nan, sha ashe a pristi er a nenge yô," 
Leviticus13:13 pristi una nenge imande la i cir nan kwavyolough cii yô, a̱ pase er or la nan ngu wang, nan gema nan hingir pupuu cii, nan ngu wang je." 
Leviticus13:14 Kpa aluer azoghol a va due nan iyol yô, nan ngu wang ga." 
Leviticus13:15 Pristi una nenge a azoghol la yô, ka kwagh u wang ga, ka imande je." 
Leviticus13:16 Aluer azoghol la a mire a gema a hingir pupuu yô, nana̱ va hen pristi;" 
Leviticus13:17 pristi a̱ nenge nan, aluer una nenge angev mbula mbu gema mbua hingir pupuu yô, pristi a̱ pase er oruange la nan ngu wang; nan ngu wang je." 
Leviticus13:18 Aluer nana lu a ivav sha kwavyolough u nan man ia va bee," 
Leviticus13:19 man sha ijiir i ivavegh la imor i pupuu ia gema á due, shin ibeenegh ki nyian daalaa yô, i̱ tese pristi;" 
Leviticus13:20 pristi a̱ nenge, aluer kia lu er ki saa sha kwavyolough ga, man ice i her kpaa ia gema á hingir pupuu yô, pristi a̱ pase er nan ngu wang ga, ka angev mbu imandev je, mbu hii sha ivav ye." 
Leviticus13:21 Kpa aluer pristi una nenge sha mi man una zua a ice i pupuu sha mi ga, man kia saa sha kwavyolough, kia gba lun fing nahan tsô yô, pristi a̱ wuhe nan ayange ataankarahar;" 
Leviticus13:22 man aluer kia samber a samber sha kwavyolough yô, pristi a̱ pase er nan ngu wang ga, ka angev je." 
Leviticus13:23 Kpa aluer ibeenegh kila kia saa heregh kia samber ga yô, ka iyolough ku ivavegh tsô; pristi a̱ pase er nan ngu wang." 
Leviticus13:24 Shin aluer usu u hia or sha kwavyolough man iyolough ku usugh kura kua hingir ibeenegh ki nyian daalaa, shin ki pupuu yô," 
Leviticus13:25 pristi a̱ nenge ijiir la, aluer ice i hen ibeenegh kila ia gema ia hingir pupuu man kia lu er ki saa sha kwavyolough ga, ki mire kimi yô, ka imande je; i hii sha mhie u usu la ye, pristi a̱ pase er nan ngu wang ga, ka angev mbu imandev je." 
Leviticus13:26 Kpa aluer pristi una nenge sha mi, man una nenge a ice i pupuu sha ibeenegh kila ga, man kia saa sha kwavyolough kia gba lun fing nahan, pristi a̱ wuhe nan ayange ataankarahar;" 
Leviticus13:27 sha iyange i ataankarahar la, pristi a̱ shi a̱ nenge nan, aluer kwagh la una seer a seer sha kwavyolough yô, pristi a̱ pase er nan ngu wang ga; ka angev mbu imandev je." 
Leviticus13:28 Kpa aluer ibeenegh kila kia lu di her nahan tsô, kia seer a seer sha kwavyolough ga, kia lu fing yô, ka imor i mhie u usu la tsô, pristi a̱ pase er nan ngu wang; gadia ka iyolough ku usugh tsô." 
Leviticus13:29 Aluer nomsoor shin kwase vea lu a angev sha ityou shin sha indyer yô," 
Leviticus13:30 pristi a̱ nenge angev mbula; aluer mbua lu er mbu saa sha kwavyolough ga, mbu nyôr kimi, man ice i her la, ia lu vende vende ia nyian er ayaikure yô, pristi a̱ pase er nan ngu wang ga, ka lagh je, ka imande i sha ityou, shin i sha indyer." 
Leviticus13:31 Man aluer pristi una nenge lagh la una lu er a saa sha kwavyolough ga, man ice i il kpaa ia lu sha mi ga yô, pristi a̱ wuhe or u lagh a er nan la ayange ataankarahar." 
Leviticus13:32 Sha iyange i ataankarahar la, pristi a̱ nenge angev mbula; aluer una nenge lagh la una seer a seer ga, man ice i nyian er ayaikure nahan ia lu sha mi ga, man shi aluer lagh la una lu er a saa sha kwavyolough tsô yô," 
Leviticus13:33 nana̱ hondo ityough kpa nana̱ de hondon lagh la ga, pristi a̱ shi a wuhwe or u lagh a er nan la, ayange ataankarahar." 
Leviticus13:34 Sha iyange i ataankarahar la, pristi a̱ nenge lagh la; aluer lagh una seer a seer sha kwavyolough ga, man aluer una lu er a saa sha kwavyolough yô, pristi a̱ pase er nan ngu wang, nana̱ ôô akondo a nan, tsô nana lu wang je." 
Leviticus13:35 Kpa aluer lagh la una gema á seer a seer sha kwavyolough er i vande pasen er nan ngu wang yô," 
Leviticus13:36 pristi a̱ nenge nan, aluer una nenge lagh la, a seer a seer sha kwavyolough yô, pristi a̱ de kera ker ice i i nyian er ayaikure nahan ga, nan ngu wang ga." 
Leviticus13:37 Kpa aluer sha mnenge na, lagh la una lu di her nahan tsô, man ice i il kpaa ia mende sha mi yô; lagh la bee je ve, nan ngu wang; pristi a̱ pase er nan ngu wang je." 
Leviticus13:38 Man shi aluer nomsoor shin kwase nana lu a abeen sha kwavyolough u nan, pung yô," 
Leviticus13:39 pristi a̱ nenge, man aluer una nenge abeen a sha kwavyolough ve la, a kungu fuwee yô, ka iyolkuran tsô i dugh sha kwavyolough ye, nan ngu wang." 
Leviticus13:40 Aluer ice i or la ia tsor nan sha ihaghtyo yô, nan kpur ityough; nan ngu wang." 
Leviticus13:41 Man aluer ice i nan ia tsor nan hen icul yô, nan kpur icul; nan ngu wang." 
Leviticus13:42 Kpa aluer sha ityough ki kpurun kila shin sha icul i kpurun la, ijiir i nyian fing ia lu her yô, ka imande je i dugh nan sha ityough ki kpurun kila, shin sha icul i kpurun la ye." 
Leviticus13:43 Pristi a̱ nenge nan, aluer imor i hen ijiir la, ia nyian fing sha mkpur u ityough ki kpurun ki nan, shin sha icul i kpurun i nan, er imande ka i lu sha kwavyolough nahan yô," 
Leviticus13:44 ka orimande je, nan ngu wang ga, pristi a̱ pase kpee er nan lu wang ga yô; angev mbu nan sha ityou." 
Leviticus13:45 Orimande u nan lu a angev yô, i̱ ande akondo a nan, nana̱ lu ityough meghaa, nana̱ cir gbemzwa u nan u sha, nana̱ genger imo nana̱ kaa er: Wang ga, wang ga!" 
Leviticus13:46 Ayange a angev mbu lu nan iyol la cii, nana lu wang ga, nan ngu wang ga; nana̱ teman tswen; ka ken akôngoafogh man ijiir i teman i nan ia lu ye." 
Leviticus13:47 Aluer angev mbu imandev mbua lu sha ikondo yô, shin a lu ikondo i sha ul shin i sha mou kpaa," 
Leviticus13:48 shin mbua lu sha zermou shin sha abamou u ikondo i mou shin i ul la, shin mbua lu sha ikôv, shin sha hanma kwagh u i er sha ikôv;" 
Leviticus13:49 aluer angev mbua lu sha ikondo kwel, shou shou, shin mbua lu nyian kpaa, shin sha ikôv, shin sha zermou, shin sha abamou, shin sha hanma kwagh u i er sha ikôv kpaa yô, ka angev mbu imandev je; i̱ tese pristi." 
Leviticus13:50 Pristi a̱ nenge angev mbula, a̱ wuhe kwagh u a lu a angev la ayange ataankarahar;" 
Leviticus13:51 sha iyange i ataankarahar la a̱ nenge angev mbula; aluer angev mbua seer a seer sha ikondo, shin sha zermou, shin sha abamou, shin sha ikôv, hanma kwagh u i er sha ikôv cii kpaa, ka imande i bo je, ka kwagh u wang ga." 
Leviticus13:52 A̱ nande ikondo, shin a lu zermou, shin a lu abamou, shin a lu i sha ul shin i sha mou, shin hanma kwagh u i er sha ikôv u angev mbu lu sha mi la, gadia ka boimande a̱ nande sha usu." 
Leviticus13:53 Kpa aluer pristi una nenge angev mbua seer a seer sha ikondo, shin sha zermou, shin sha abamou, shin sha hanma kwagh u i er sha ikôv la ga yô," 
Leviticus13:54 pristi a̱ kaa, i̱ kile kwagh u angev mbu lu sha mi la, shi a̱ wuhe un ayange ataankarahar;" 
Leviticus13:55 tsô pristi a̱ nenge er i kir angev mbula kera yô, aluer una nenge angev mbula mbua gema mluashe u mbu ga, shin mbua samber ga kpaa, ka kwagh u wang ga; nande un sha usu je, mbu yan a ya je, shin a lu kimi, shin ken won kpaa." 
Leviticus13:56 Aluer pristi una nenge, man angev mbula mbua hingir fing er i kir mbu kera yô, a̱ ande a̱ dugh mbu, shin a lu sha ikondo, shin sha ikôv, shin sha zermou, shin sha abamou kpaa;" 
Leviticus13:57 aluer nahan kpaa, shi mbua due ken igbar sha ikondo, shin sha zermou, shin sha abamou, shin sha hanma kwagh u i er sha ikôv yô, mbu duen a due je, nande kwagh shon u angev mbu lu sha mi la sha usu je." 
Leviticus13:58 Ikondo, shin zermou, shin abamou, shin hanma kwagh u i er sha ikôv u u kir un la, aluer angev mbua bee sha mi yô, i̱ kimbir u kilen, nahan una hingir wang." 
Leviticus13:59 Ka tindi u angev mbu imandev je ne, sha ikondo, shin a lu i ul, shin a lu i mou, shin sha zermou, shin sha abamou, shin hanma kwagh u i er sha ikôv, sha u pasen er ka kwagh u wang, shin u pasen er ka kwagh u wang ga." 
Leviticus14:1 TER shi Ôr kwagh a Mose, kaa er:" 
Leviticus14:2 Ka tindi u sha orimande, sha iyange i mwanger u nan ne: I̱ va a nan hen pristi;" 
Leviticus14:3 pristi a̱ za ken akôngoafogh, pristi a̱ nenge, aluer angev mbu imandev mbu bee orimande la yô," 
Leviticus14:4 pristi a̱ kaa, i̱ va a inyon i uma i̱ wang sha ci u or u á wanger nan la, man kon u sedar man mou u nyian dindee kua hisop." 
Leviticus14:5 Pristi a̱ kaa, i̱ sôngo inyon i môm shin ityegh ki inyaagh sha mngerem ma senen." 
Leviticus14:6 Inyon i uma la yô, a̱ kôr i, shi a̱ tôô kon u sedar man mou u nyian dindee man hisop a̱ mir a inyon i uma la imôngo shin awambe a inyon i i senge sha mngerem ma senen la," 
Leviticus14:7 a̱ mishi or u i lu wanger nan imande ave la iyol kwa taankaruhar, a̱ pase er nan ngu wang, nahan a̱ pase inyon i uma la, i̱ purugh i̱ yem ken ikôngo." 
Leviticus14:8 Man shi or u i lu wanger nan ave la, nana̱ ôô ikondo i nan, nana̱ hondo ice iyol kera ca ca, nana̱ ôô iyol sha mnger, tsô nana hingir wang, man nana mase nyôron ken afo ye; kpa nana̱ tsa ken kungur u tenti u nan ayange ataankarahar." 
Leviticus14:9 Tsô sha iyange i ataankarahar la, nana̱ torough ice i nan i sha ityou kua indyer i nan man ingurashee i nan, nana̱ hondo ice iyol cii, nana̱ ôô akondo a nan, shi nana̱ ôô iyol i nan shin mnger, tsô nana hingir wang." 
Leviticus14:10 Sha iyange i anigheni la nana̱ kôr agumaiyôngo ahar a a lu a ihogholough iyol ga yô, man tuleiyôngo môm u a kom inyom i môm u a lu a ihogholough iyol ga yô, shi nana̱ tôô mwem ma kengese ma ma kom uikaren utar-ken-upue, ma i nongo mkurem sha mi, sha ci u nagh ku sha samuyia, man logi u mkure môm" 
Leviticus14:11 Pristi u a lu wanger nan la, a̱ gema or u i lu wanger nan la, a kaa la cii, a̱ ver sha ishigh ki TER hen hunda u tenti u kohol ker la." 
Leviticus14:12 Pristi a̱ kôr gumiyôngo u môm a̱ na nagh ku iboogh a mi, kua logi u mkure la kpaa, a̱ cia ve, i̱ lu nagh ku cian sha ishigh ki TER;" 
Leviticus14:13 a̱ sôngo gumiyôngo la hen ijiir i i senge nagh ku isholibo man nagh ku nanden la, hen icighanjiir; gadia er nagh ku isholibo ku lu ku pristi nahan, kape nagh ku iboogh kpaa ku lu la; ka icighankwagh u hemban cii je;" 
Leviticus14:14 nahan pristi a̱ er awambe a nagh ku iboogh, a̱ felegh sha kpe u togh ku yanegh ku or u i lu wanger nan la, man sha ihôwe u nan u tamen u ken uwegh ku yanegh, man sha ihônguhar u nan u tamen u ken iyan;" 
Leviticus14:15 pristi a̱ kende logi u mkure la, sha ikevwe na i imese," 
Leviticus14:16 Pristi a̱ civ ihôwe na u ken iyan ken mkurem ma ma lu ken uwegh nagh ku imesegh la, a̱ mishi ma sha ihôwe na la kwa taankaruhar sha ishigh ki TER;" 
Leviticus14:17 tsô mkurem ma ma shi sha uwegh nagh la, pristi a̱ er ma, a̱ felegh sha kpe u togh ku yanegh ku or u i lu wanger nan la, sha ihôwe u nan u tamen u ken uwegh ku yanegh man ihônguhar u nan u tamen u nguhar ku ken iyan la, sha awambe a nagh ku iboogh la;" 
Leviticus14:18 man mkurem ma ma shi pristi sha ihôwe la, a̱ gema ma, a̱ shighe sha ityough ki or u i lu wanger nan la; pristi a̱ na iwom sha ci u nan sha ishigh ki TER." 
Leviticus14:19 Pristi a̱ va a nagh ku isholibo, a̱ na iwom sha ci u or u i lu wanger nan la, sha ci u mlu u nan u wang ga la; ken masetyô yô, a̱ sôngo nagh ku nanden;" 
Leviticus14:20 nahan pristi a̱ na nagh ku nanden man nagh ku sha samuyia sha atse a nanden nagh sha mi; pristi a̱ na iwom sha ci u nan, tsô nana hingir wang je." 
Leviticus14:21 Kpa aluer nan lu icanor, nana fatyô u zuan a mi nahan ga yô, nana̱ kôr gumiyôngo môm sha ci u nagh ku iboogh, sha u cian a mi, sha er á na iwom sha ci u nan yô, man shi mwem ma kengese ma ma kom ikaren umôm-ken-upue, ma i nongo mkurem sha mi, sha ci u nagh ku sha samuyia, man logi u mkure môm," 
Leviticus14:22 kua mbaatii uhar, shin utulembamkunguv uhar, er nan fetyô yô; u môm a̱ lu nagh ku isholibo, ugen a̱ lu nagh ku nanden." 
Leviticus14:23 Sha iyange i anigheni la, nana̱ va a mi hen pristi sha er á wanger nan, hen hunda u tenti u kohol ker la, sha ishigh ki TER yô." 
Leviticus14:24 Pristi a̱ kôr gumiyôngo u nagh ku iboogh la man logi u mkure, pristi a̱ cia a mi, i̱ hingir nagh ku cian sha ishigh ki TER;" 
Leviticus14:25 a̱ sôngo gumiyôngo u nagh ku iboogh la, pristi a̱ er awambe a nagh ku iboogh la, a̱ felegh sha kpe u togh ku yanegh ku or u i lu wanger nan la, man sha ihôwe u nan u tamen u ken uwegh ku yanegh, man shi sha ihônguhar u nan u tamen u ken nguhar u ken iyan;" 
Leviticus14:26 pristi a̱ ker mkurem sha ikevwe na i ken imese; 
Leviticus14:27 man pristi a̱ er mkurem ma ma lu sha ikevwe na i imese la, sha ihôwe na u ken iyan a̱ mishi kwa u taan kar uhar sha ishigh ki TER;" 
Leviticus14:28 shi pristi a̱ er mkurem ma ma lu sha ikevwe na la, a̱ felegh sha kpe u togh ku or u i lu wanger nan la, man sha ihôwe u nan u tamen ken uwegh ku yanegh man sha ihônguhar u nan u tamen u ken nguhar u ken iyan, sha ijiir i awambe a nagh ku iboogh a lu la;" 
Leviticus14:29 mkurem ma ma shi pristi sha ikevwe la, a̱ gema ma a̱ shighe sha ityough ki or u i lu wanger nan la, a̱ na iwom sha ci u nan, sha ishigh ki TER." 
Leviticus14:30 A̱ na atii u môm la, shin tuleikungu u môm la, er nan fetyô yô;" 
Leviticus14:31 inja na yô, ka kwagh u nan fetyô u zuan a mi je la, u môm sha ci u nagh ku isholibo, ugen sha ci u nagh ku nanden a nagh ku sha samuyia imôngo; pristi a̱ na iwom sha ci u or u i lu wanger nan la, sha ishigh ki TER." 
Leviticus14:32 Ka tindi u or u nan lu a angev mbu imandev, u nan lu a kwagh u a kom u á wanger nan a mi ga yô." 
Leviticus14:33 TER shi ôr kwagh a Mose man Aron kaa er: 
Leviticus14:34 Zum u né ar ken tar u Kanaan, u M lu nan ne Mer, u̱ lu u wen la yô, Mea haa angev mbu imandev ken ma iyou igen ken tar wen la," 
Leviticus14:35 orya la nana̱ va kaa pristi er: Mnenge wam yô, angev mbu tsaren mbu ken iyou la." 
Leviticus14:36 Nahan pristi a̱ kaa, i̱ due a ikav i̱ undu iyou la, je er pristi a lu a va sha u va nengen angev mbula ga yô, sha er akaa cii a a lu ken iyou la, a̱ de hingir a wang ga ze; ken masetyô yô, pristi a̱ nyôr sha u nengen iyou la;" 
Leviticus14:37 a̱ nenge angev mbula, aluer una nenge angev mbula mbu ken kpekpe u iyou la, anjiirim kwel, shou shou, shin nyian fing nahan, man mbua lu er mbu saa sha kpekpe ga, mbu za kimi yô," 
Leviticus14:38 pristi a̱ due ken iyou la, a̱ za hen hunda u iyou, a wuhe iyou la ayange ataankarahar je;" 
Leviticus14:39 pristi a̱ shi a̱ va sha iyange i ataankarahar la, a va nenge; aluer una nenge angev mbula mbua seer sha kpekpe u iyou la yô," 
Leviticus14:40 pristi a̱ kaa, ve̱ dugh awen a angev mbula mbu lu sha mi la, ve̱ haa ken ijiir i uihôgh ken akôngo a gar;" 
Leviticus14:41 shi ve̱ kember iyou la kimi cii, man inya i i kember la, i̱ za haa ken akôngo a gar hen ijiir i uihôgh;" 
Leviticus14:42 man ve̱ tôô awen agen ve̱ wa sha ajiir a awen a i dugh kera la, shi ve̱ tôô inya igen ve̱ shighe iyou la." 
Leviticus14:43 Man aluer angev mbula shi mbu due ken iyou la, er i vande dughun awen la kera man i kember iyou la man i shigh i kpaa yô," 
Leviticus14:44 pristi a̱ nyôr a̱ nenge, aluer angev mbua samber ken iyou la yô, ka imande je i lu ken iyou la ye; ka kwagh u wang ga." 
Leviticus14:45 A̱ hembe iyou la, kua awen a i, man ikon i i, man inya i i shigh iyou la a mi cii, a̱ kura a̱ yem a mi ken ijiir i uihôgh ken akôngo a gar." 
Leviticus14:46 Man hanma or u nana nyôr ken iyou la sha ayange a i wuhe i la yô, nana lu wang ga, zan zan iyange ia kar been." 
Leviticus14:47 Or u nana yav ken iyou la kpaa, nana̱ ôô akondo a nan, man shi or u nana ya kwagh ken iyou la kpaa, nana̱ ôô akondo a nan." 
Leviticus14:48 Aluer pristi una nyôr una nenge angev mbu due ken iyou la ga, er i vande shighen iyou la kera yô, pristi a̱ pase er iyou la i lu wang yô, gadia angev mbula mbu bee." 
Leviticus14:49 Nahan a̱ kôr inyon ihiar, shi a̱ tôô kon u sedar man mou u nyian dindee kua hisop sha u wanger iyou la a mi;" 
Leviticus14:50 a̱ sôngo inyon i môm shin ityegh ki inyaagh sha mngerem ma senen; 
Leviticus14:51 a̱ tôô kon u sedar man hisop man mou u nyian dindee kua inyon i uma la, a̱ mir shin awambe a inyon i i senge la man shin mngerem ma senen, a̱ mishi iyou la kwa taankaruhar;" 
Leviticus14:52 a̱ wanger iyou la sha awambe a inyon man sha mngerem ma senen kua inyon i uma man kon u sedar man hisop man mou u nyian dindee la; 
Leviticus14:53 nahan a̱ pase inyon i uma la, i̱ due ken won gar, i̱ purugh i̱ yem ken akôngo; kape una na iwom sha ci u iyou je la, nahan ia hingir wang." 
Leviticus14:54 Ka tindi u sha hanma injauange i imande kua lagh," 
Leviticus14:55 man imande i sha ikondo kua i ken iyou kpaa," 
Leviticus14:56 man sha imor man iyolkuran kua ibeenegh," 
Leviticus14:57 sha u tesen er á fa kwagh u a lu wang ga, man kwagh u a lu wang yô; ka tindi u imande je la." 
Leviticus15:1 Tsô TER shi ôr kwagh a Mose man Aron kaa er: 
Leviticus15:2 Ôr nen kwagh a Mbaiserael, kaa nen a ve ner: Aluer anti or ihyelegh kua due nan iyol yô, kwagh u a dugh nan ken iyol la, ngu wang ga." 
Leviticus15:3 Mwanger u nan wanger ga sha kwagh u a dugh ken a nan la yô, ka un ne: shin kwagh la una duen nan iyol her, shin kwagh la una himbir, una lu nan ken iyol kpaa; ka mlu u wang ga, u nan je la." 
Leviticus15:4 Hanma gambe u or u kwagh a dugh nan ken iyol la, nana yav sha mi yô, una kera lu wang ga; man hanma kwagh u nana tema sha mi cii kpaa, una kera lu wang ga." 
Leviticus15:5 Hanma or u nana bende a gambe u nan kpaa, nana̱ ôô akondo a nan man nana̱ ôô iyol i nan sha mnger kpaa, nana kera lu wang ga zan zan iyange la ia kar been." 
Leviticus15:6 Or u nana tema sha hanma kwagh u or u kwagh a dugh nan ken iyol la nan tem sha mi yô, nana̱ ôô akondo a nan man nana̱ ôô iyol i nan sha mnger kpaa, nana kera lu wang ga zan zan iyange ia kar been." 
Leviticus15:7 Or u nana bende a iyol i or u kwagh a dugh nan ken iyol la kpaa, nana̱ ôô akondo a nan man nana̱ ôô iyol i nan sha mnger kpaa, nana kera lu wang ga zan zan iyange ia kar been." 
Leviticus15:8 Aluer or u kwagh a dugh nan ken iyol la, nana haa ma or u wang ijer iyol yô, or la nana̱ ôô akondo a nan man nana̱ ôô iyol i nan sha mnger kpaa, nana kera lu wang ga zan zan iyange ia kar been." 
Leviticus15:9 Man hanma shidi u or u kwagh a dugh nan ken iyol la, nana tema sha mi yô, una kera lu wang ga." 
Leviticus15:10 Man shi hanma or u nana bende a ma kwagh u nan tem sha mi yô, nana kera lu wang ga zan zan iyange ia kar been; man u nana tôô kwagh la kpaa, nana̱ ôô akondo a nan man nana̱ ôô iyol i nan sha mnger kpaa, nana kera lu wang ga zan zan iyange ia kar been." 
Leviticus15:11 Aluer or u kwagh a dugh nan ken iyol la, nana ôô ave sha mnger ga yô, tsô nana̱ bende a ma or yô, or u i bende a nan la, nana̱ ôô akondo a nan man nana̱ ôô iyol i nan sha mnger kpaa, nana kera lu wang ga zan zan iyange ia kar been." 
Leviticus15:12 Ityegh ki inyaagh kpaa, ki or u kwagh a dugh nan ken iyol la nana bende ki yô, i̱ hembe ki, man hanma ikagh ki konough kpaa, i̱ kile ki sha mnger." 
Leviticus15:13 Zum u or u kwagh a dugh nan ken iyol la, kwagh la una bee nan kera yô, nana̱ ôr ayange ataankarahar sha ci u mwanger u á wanger nan la, nana̱ ôô akondo a nan man nana̱ ôô iyol sha mngerem ma senen, tsô nana hingir wang." 
Leviticus15:14 Sha iyange i anigheni la, nana̱ kôr mbaatii uhar, gayô, utulembamkunguv uhar, nana̱ va a mi sha ishigh ki TER, hen hunda u tenti u kohol ker la, nana̱ va na pristi;" 
Leviticus15:15 pristi a̱ gema u môm, a̱ na nagh ku isholibo mi, ugen la, a̱ gema a̱ na nagh ku nanden mi; pristi a̱ na iwom sha ci u nan, sha ishigh ki TER, sha ci u kwagh u a dugh nan ken iyol la." 
Leviticus15:16 Aluer hanma or ityujer ia due nan yô, nana̱ ôô iyol i nan cii sha mnger, nana kera lu wang ga, zan zan iyange ia kar been." 
Leviticus15:17 Hanma ikondo man hanma ikôvough, aluer ityujer ia haa sha mi yô, i̱ ôô sha mnger kera, ka kwagh u wang ga, zan zan iyange ia kar been." 
Leviticus15:18 Man kwase kpaa u nom a yav a nan a vese nan yô, ve uhar cii, ve̱ ôô iyol sha mnger, vea kera lu wang ga zan zan iyange ia kar been." 
Leviticus15:19 Aluer kwagh a due kwase ken iyol man kwagh u a dugh nan ken iyol la, a lu awambe yô, nana̱ lu ken mlu u wang ga u nan la, ayange ataankarahar; hanma or u nana bende a nan, nana kera lu wang ga zan zan iyange ia kar been." 
Leviticus15:20 Man hanma kwagh u nana yav sha mi er nan lu ken mlu u wang ga u nan la yô, una kera lu wang ga; hanma kwagh u nana tema sha mi kpaa, una kera lu wang ga." 
Leviticus15:21 Man hanma or u nana bende a gambe u nan, nana̱ ôô akondo a nan nana̱ ôô iyol sha mnger kpaa, nana kera lu wang ga, zan zan iyange ia kar been." 
Leviticus15:22 Man shi hanma or u nana bende a ma kwagh u nan tem sha mi yô, nana̱ ôô akondo a nan man nana̱ ôô iyol sha mnger kpaa, nana kera lu wang ga, zan zan iyange ia kar been." 
Leviticus15:23 Aluer ka gambe shin hanma kwagh u nan tem sha mi man nana bende a mi yô, nana kera lu wang ga, zan zan iyange ia kar been." 
Leviticus15:24 Aluer hanma or nana yav a nan yô, mlu u nan u wang ga, una per ken nan, nana kera lu wang ga ayange ataankarahar; hanma gambe u nana yav sha mi kpaa, una kera lu wang ga." 
Leviticus15:25 Aluer awambe a gba duen kwase ayange kpishi, kpa a kera lu sha ayange a mlu u wang ga u nan la ga, shin aluer nana due awambe a gande ayange a ma nan lu ken mlu u wang ga u nan la yô, ayange a awambe la a lu duen nan la cii, nana kera lu wang ga, er sha ayange a mlu u wang ga u nan la nahan; nan kera ngu wang ga." 
Leviticus15:26 Hanma gambe u kwase la nana yav sha mi, sha ayange a awambe a lu duen nan la cii, una hingir nan er ka gambe u nan u sha ayange a mlu u wang ga u nan la nahan; man hanma kwagh u nana tema sha mi una kera lu wang ga, vough er kwagh u a kera lu wang ga, sha ci u mlu u wang ga u nan la nahan." 
Leviticus15:27 Man shi hanma or u nana bende a akaa la yô, nana kera lu wang ga, nana̱ ôô akondo a nan man nana̱ ôô iyol i nan sha mnger kpaa, nana kera lu wang ga, zan zan iyange ia kar been." 
Leviticus15:28 Kpa aluer kwase la, awambe a wanger nan yô, nana̱ ôr ayange ataankarahar, ken masetyô yô, nana hingir wang." 
Leviticus15:29 Sha iyange i anigheni la, nana̱ kôr mbaatii uhar, shin utulembamkunguv uhar, nana̱ va a mi hen pristi hen hunda u tenti u kohol ker la." 
Leviticus15:30 Pristi a̱ gema u môm a̱ na nagh ku isholibo mi, ugen la a̱ gema a̱ na nagh ku nanden mi; pristi a̱ na iwom sha ci u nan sha ishigh ki TER, sha ci u kwagh u wang ga u a dugh nan ken iyol la." 
Leviticus15:31 Kape wanger nen Mbaiserael sha er ve̱ de kpeen sha mlu ve u wang ga la ga, er ve gbe hôngor a tabernakel Wam u a lu ve her atô la yô." 
Leviticus15:32 Ka tindi u or u kwagh a dugh nan ken iyol man or u ityujer i dugh nan la, man nan hingir wang ga yô," 
Leviticus15:33 man kwase u nan lu dedoo ga, sha ci u mlu u wang ga u nan la, man or u kwagh a dugh nan ken iyol, shin a lu nomsoor shin a lu kwase kpaa, kua or u nan yav a kwase u a lu wang ga kpaa." 
Leviticus16:1 TER ôr kwagh a Mose ken masetyô u ku u ônov mba Aron mba uhar, mba ve kporom sha ishigh ki TER ve kpe la;" 
Leviticus16:2 tsô TER ôr kwagh a Mose er: Kaa a anngôu Aron wer, a̱ de gbe nyôron ken icighanjiir ken atô u ikondo i yisan sha ishigh ki ijiir i nan iwom her, i i lu sha areki la, hanma shighe tsô ga, sha er una kpe ga yô, gadia ka ken ibeen M ande sha ijiir i nan iwom her la ye." 
Leviticus16:3 Akaa a Aron una nyôr a mi ken icighanjiir yô, ka: Gumbua sha ci u nagh ku isholibo man nomiyôngo sha ci u nagh ku nanden." 
Leviticus16:4 A̱ haa icighanriga u sha ikondo i pupuu, shi a̱ huwa ifo i sha ikondo i pupuu, a̱ cir idyelegh na, a̱ zer tsar u sha ikondo i pupuu shin iwenge man a̱ kange atsar a sha ikondo i pupuu sha ityou; ka uicighanmbaakondov je, a̱ ôô iyol sha mnger man una haa ve ye." 
Leviticus16:5 A̱ ngohol ukpev uhar hen ior i Mbaiserael sha ci u nagh ku isholibo, man nomiyôngo môm sha ci u nagh ku nanden." 
Leviticus16:6 Man Aron a̱ va a nombua u nagh ku isholibo ku ku lu sha ci na la, a̱ na iwom sha ci na iyol na kua ya na kpaa." 
Leviticus16:7 Shi a̱ kôr ukpev mba uhar mbala, a̱ ver ve sha ishigh ki TER, hen hunda u tenti u kohol ker la." 
Leviticus16:8 Aron a̱ er ishor sha ukpev mba uhar mbala, ishor i môm sha ci u TER, i môm sha ci u Asasel;" 
Leviticus16:9 Aron a̱ va a kpev u ishor i gbe sha mi sha ci u TER la, a̱ na nagh ku isholibo a mi." 
Leviticus16:10 Kpa kpev u ishor i gbe sha mi sha ci u Asasel la, a̱ ver un uma sha ishigh ki TER, sha u i̱ na iwom sha na, i̱ pase un a̱ yem ken toho sha ci u Asasel, ken desereti." 
Leviticus16:11 Nahan Aron a̱ va a nombua u nagh ku isholibo ku ku lu sha ci na la, a̱ na iwom sha ci na iyol na kua ya na, a̱ sôngo nombua u nagh ku isholibo ku ku lu sha ci na iyol na la;" 
Leviticus16:12 a̱ iv gbande a akausu a kpenger kpenger a sha atse a nanden nagh sha mi sha ishigh ki TER la, shi a̱ iv kwaghhumandoon u i kum un kpur kpur yô, ken ave na, a̱ nyôr a mi ken atô u ikondo i yisan;" 
Leviticus16:13 a̱ penda kwaghhumandoon la sha usu, sha ishigh ki TER, mnyim ma kwaghhumandoon ma cir ijiir i nan iwom her la, i i lu sha shiada la, sha er una kpe ga yô;" 
Leviticus16:14 a̱ er awambe a nombua la sha ihôwe, a̱ mishi sha ijiir i nan iwom her la, vegher u sha ityoughkitaregh; man sha ishigh ki ijiir i nan iwom her la kpaa, a̱ er awambe sha ihôwe a̱ mishi kwa taankaruhar." 
Leviticus16:15 Tsô a̱ sôngo kpev u nagh ku isholibo u a lu sha ci u ior la, a̱ nyôr a awambe na ken atô u ikondo i yisan la, a̱ er a awambe na er a er a awambe a nombua la nahan, a̱ mishi sha ijiir i nan iwom her la, kua sha ishigh ki ijiir i nan iwom her la kpaa;" 
Leviticus16:16 a̱ na iwom sha ci u icighanjiir sha ci u mlu u wang ga, u Mbaiserael, kua afer a ve kpaa, ka asorabo a ve la cii; kape a̱ er sha ci u tenti u kohol ker kpaa la, u a lu hen a ve ken atô u mlu ve u wang ga la." 
Leviticus16:17 Ma or nana̱ de luun ken tenti u kohol ker la, zum u una nyôr sha u za nan iwom ken icighanjiir la ga, saa una kar duen er a vande nan iwom kera sha ci na iyol na man mba hen ya na kua mkohol u ior i Mbaiserael cii." 
Leviticus16:18 Nahan a̱ due a̱ za hen atse a nanden nagh sha mi a a lu sha ishigh ki TER la, a̱ za na iwom sha ci u a; a er awambe a nombua kua a kpev la, a̱ felegh sha akoratseegh, a̱ ningir a̱ tser." 
Leviticus16:19 A̱ mishi awambe sha a kwa taankaruhar sha ihôwe na, a̱ wanger a, shi a̱ tsegha a kpaa, sha ci u mlu u Mbaiserael u wang ga la." 
Leviticus16:20 Una kuren tom u nan iwom sha ci u icighanjiir man tenti u kohol ker la, kua atse a nanden nagh sha mi yô, a̱ va a kpev u uma la." 
Leviticus16:21 Yô, Aron a̱ penda ave na ahar cii sha ityough ki kpev u uma la, a̱ pase afer a Mbaiserael cii sha mi, akaabo a ve, asorabo a ve la cii; a̱ haa sha kpev la; tsô a̱ na un sha ikev i or u i vande veren nan yô, nana̱ yem a mi ken desereti;" 
Leviticus16:22 kpev la una tôô afer a ve cii sha iyol na, una yem a a ken tar u or lu ga yô; nana̱ za pase kpev la ken desereti je." 
Leviticus16:23 Aron a̱ nyôr ken tenti u kohol ker la, a̱ er akondo a sha ikondo i pupuu a a hee a nyer a mi ken icighanjiir la, a̱ undu a ker;" 
Leviticus16:24 a̱ ôô iyol sha mnger hen icighanjiir, a haa akondo a na, a̱ due, a̱ na nagh ku nanden sha ci na, man nagh ku nanden ku sha ci u ior la; a̱ na iwom sha ci na iyol na kua sha ci u ior kpaa." 
Leviticus16:25 Ahôm a nagh ku isholibo la yô, a̱ nande sha atse a nan nagh sha mi." 
Leviticus16:26 Man or u nana za pase kpev u Asasel la, nana ôô akondo a nan, shi nana̱ ôô iyol sha mnger kpaa, ken masetyô yô, nana̱ nyôr ken afo." 
Leviticus16:27 Nombua u nagh ku isholibo man kpev u nagh ku isholibo, u i nyer a awambe a ve sha u nan iwom a mi ken icighanjiir la yô, i̱ tôô i̱ due a mi ken akôngoafogh, i̱ za nande akôv a ve man inyam ve kua icômbov ve sha usu." 
Leviticus16:28 Or u nana nande la kpaa, nana̱ ôô akondo a nan, shi nana̱ ôô iyol i nan sha mnger; ken masetyô yô, nana nyôr ken afo." 
Leviticus16:29 I̱ hingir ne tindi u gbem sha won je; uwer u sha utaankaruhar sha ayange a u pue la, ule nen, hanma injatom kpaa de eren nen ga, shin a lu or u tar la jim, shin shiror u nan lu shir her a ven kpaa;" 
Leviticus16:30 gadia sha iyange la, á na iwom sha ci wen, sha er á wanger ne yô, asorabo a en a sha ishigh ki TER la cii á wanger ne a kera." 
Leviticus16:31 I̱ lu ne iyange i memen i kôron ma tom ave je ga, ule nen, ka tindi u gbem sha won je." 
Leviticus16:32 Man pristi u á shighe nan mkurem, á tsegha nan er nana̱ lu pristi sha ityough ki ter u nan la, ka nan nana naan iwom ye, nana haa akondo a sha ikondo i pupuu, ka uicighanmbaakondov je la;" 
Leviticus16:33 nana na iwom sha ci u icighanjiir, shi nana na iwom sha ci u tenti u kohol; ker la, man sha ci u atse a nanden nagh sha mi kpaa, nana na iwom sha ci u upristi man ior i mkohol la cii kpaa." 
Leviticus16:34 I̱ hingir ne tindi u gbem sha won je, u nan iwom sha ci u Mbaiserael sha ci u asorabo a ve cii, hanma inyom kwa môm. Tsô a er er TER kaa Mose nahan." 
Leviticus17:1 Shi TER ôr kwagh a Mose, kaa er:" 
Leviticus17:2 Ôr kwagh a Aron man Mbaiserael cii, kaa ve wer: Ka kwagh u TER A kaa ne ne, er:" 
Leviticus17:3 Hanma or u hen ya u Iserael u nana wua bua shin waniyôngo shin ivo ken afo shin nana wua ken akôngoafogh kpaa," 
Leviticus17:4 nana kera va a mi hen hunda u tenti u kohol ker la, er nana va na TER nagh a mi sha ishigh ki tabernakel u TER ga yô, i̱ na or la ibo i awambe, nan haa awambe inya je; i̱ dugh or la ken nongo u nan kera;" 
Leviticus17:5 sha er Mbaiserael ve̱ vaan a iniav vev mbi ve senge ken toho la, sha ishigh ki TER, hen hunda u tenti u kohol ker la, hen pristi yô; ve̱ sôngo mbi ve̱ naan TER iniav mbi bem." 
Leviticus17:6 Pristi a̱ mishi awambe la sha atse a TER hen hunda u tenti u kohol ker la, shi a̱ nande ahôm, i̱ lu TER ihuma i dedoo." 
Leviticus17:7 Ve̱ de kera senge iniav vev ve̱ naan ujijingi mba bov mba ve lu dondon ve, ve eren idya la ga. I̱ hingir ve tindi u gbem sha won sha ikov ikov." 
Leviticus17:8 Shi kaa a ve wer: Hanma or u hen ya u Iserael shin u hen ushirmbaiorov mba ve nyer a nyôr ve yô, u nan ne nagh ku nanden shin nagh ku sôngon" 
Leviticus17:9 man nan ve a mi hen hunda u tenti u kohol ker la, sha u nan TER ga yô, or la i̱ dugh nan ken nongo u nan kera." 
Leviticus17:10 Hanma or u hen ya u Iserael shin u hen ushirmbaiorov mba ve nyer a nyôr ve yô, u nan ye ma awambe yô, Me kera saan ishigh a u nan ye awambe la ga, Me dugh nan ken nongo u nan kera." 
Leviticus17:11 Gadia uma u inyam yô, ka ken awambe a lu ye, Mo M na ne a sha atse a nanden nagh sha mi, sha u nan iwom a mi sha ci u uuma enev; gadia awambe nga ne iwom sha uma u a la." 
Leviticus17:12 Ka nahan man M kaa Mbaiserael, Mer: Ma or u ken ven nana̱ de ye awambe ga, shiror u nan nyer a nyôr ne kpaa nana̱ de ye a ga ye." 
Leviticus17:13 Man shi hanma or ken Mbaiserael shin u hen ushirmbaiorov mba ve nyer a nyôr ve la, u nan ker inyamtoho shin inyon i i ye yô, nana̱ haa awambe a i inya, nana̱ cir inya sha mi." 
Leviticus17:14 Gadia uma u hanma inyam yô, ka awambe a i a lu uma u i ye; ka nahan man M kaa Mbaiserael Mer: De ye nen awambe a ma inyam ga ye; gadia uma u hanma inyam ka awambe a i; hanmô u nana ya a yô, i̱ dugh nan kera." 
Leviticus17:15 Hanma or u nan ye kwagh u a kpe a kpe, shin kwagh u inyamikume i woo yô, shin a lu or u tar la jim, shin a lu shiror kpaa, nana̱ ôô akondo a nan, shi nana̱ ôô iyol sha mnger kpaa, nana kera lu wang ga, zan zan iyange ia kar been man nana hingir wang ye." 
Leviticus17:16 Kpa aluer nana ôô a ga, iyol i nan kpaa nana ôô ga yô, nana lu a ibo iyol." 
Leviticus18:1 TER shi ôr kwagh a Mose, kaa er:" 
Leviticus18:2 Ôr kwagh a Mbaiserael, kaa a ve wer: Ka Mo TER M lu Aôndo wen ye." 
Leviticus18:3 Aeren a ken tar u Igipiti ape yan ne lu la, de kera eren nen a ga; man shi aeren a ken tar u Kanaan, ape Mo M lu van a ven ne kpaa, de eren nen a ga; shi de eren nen sha atindi a ve kpaa ga." 
Leviticus18:4 Ka akaaôron a Am a jirigh, eren nen sha mi ye; man shi ka akaawan a Am kpaa, waan nen a iko, zenden nen sha mi ye; ka Mo TER M lu Aôndo wen ye." 
Leviticus18:5 Yô, waan nen akaawan a Am man akaaôron a Am a jirigh iko, a or á er sha mi yô, nana lu uma sha a; ka Mo TER." 
Leviticus18:6 Mô wen môm nana̱ de mgbôghom a anngô u nan sha u bughun idyelegh ga; ka Mo TER. 
Leviticus18:7 Idyelegh u Teru ka idyelegh u ngôu je la, de bughun ga, ka ngôu; de bughun idyelegh na ga." 
Leviticus18:8 De bughun idyelegh u kwase u teru ga, ka idyelegh u teru je la." 
Leviticus18:9 Idyelegh u anngôu u kwase, wan u teru u kwase, shin wan u ngôu u kwase, shin i mar un hen ya, shin a lu pe gen kpaa, de bughun idyelegh na ga." 
Leviticus18:10 Idyelegh u wankwase u wan wou u nomso, shin idyelegh u wankwase u wan wou u kwase, de bughun ga, gadia idyelegh vev ka idyelegh wou je." 
Leviticus18:11 Idyelegh u wankwase u kwase u teru, u teru a mar yô, ka anngôu u kwase je, de bughun idyelegh na ga." 
Leviticus18:12 De bughun idyelegh u anngô u teru, u kwase ga, ka anngô u teru je." 
Leviticus18:13 De bughun idyelegh u anngô u ngôu u kwase ga, gadia ka anngô u ngôu je." 
Leviticus18:14 De bughun idyelegh u anngô u teru, u nomso ga, de mgbôghom a kwase na ga; un ka anngôu je." 
Leviticus18:15 De bughun idyelegh u kwase u wan wou ga, gadia ka kwase u wan wou je, de bughun idyelegh na ga." 
Leviticus18:16 De bughun idyelegh u kwase u anngôu ga, ka idyelegh u anngôu je la." 
Leviticus18:17 De bughun idyelegh u kwase kua wan u nan u kwase ga; de eren wankwase u wan na u nomso, shin wankwase u wan na u kwase sha u bughun idyelegh ve ga; ve ka anngôôv ou je; ka ifer i ndôhôr ishima je." 
Leviticus18:18 De eren wonu a̱ va hingir wuhe u anngô na sha u á bughun idyelegh na er ngula a lu uma her la ga. 
Leviticus18:19 De mgbôghom a kwase sha u bughun idyelegh u nan shighe u nan lu wang ga la ga. 
Leviticus18:20 De yaven a kwase u or u nan we ndor a we, sha er ú hôngor iyol you a nan ga." 
Leviticus18:21 De ne mô wan wou sha u i̱ kar a nan ken usu sha ci u Moleki ga, de hôngor a iti i Aôndo wou ga; ka Mo TER." 
Leviticus18:22 De yaven a nomsoor er i yaven a kwase nahan ga; ka kwagh u ihôngorough je. 
Leviticus18:23 De yaven a ma zendenya, sha er ú hôngor iyol you a mi ga; kwase kpaa, nana̱ de za til sha ishigh ki zendenya er a̱ unde nan ga; ka mnongo u ndôhôr ishima je." 
Leviticus18:24 De hôngor nen ayol a en sha ambaakaa ne ga; gadia ka akaa ne cii, akuraior a M lu va zendan a sha ishigh yenegh kera ne, a hôngor ayol a a a mi ye." 
Leviticus18:25 Tar la hôngor, ka nahan man M tsaha u sha ci u kwaghbo u u ye, tar gema suwa mba ve tem ken u la kera." 
Leviticus18:26 Yô, waan nen akaawan a Am iko kua akaaôron Am a jirigh kpaa, de eren nen kwagh môm ken akaahôngorough ne ga; shin a lu or u tar la jim, shin a lu shiror u a nyer a nyôr ne kpaa." 
Leviticus18:27 Gadia akaahôngorough ne cii ior mba ken tar la er a, ve mba ve vande teman a ven her la, nahan tar hôngor je;" 
Leviticus18:28 sha er tar u̱ de soo ne kera, zum u ne hôngor a u, er lu u suwa akuraior a a vande a ven la nahan ga." 
Leviticus18:29 Gadia hanmô u nana er ma kwagh u ken akaahôngorough ne yô, ior mba ve er a la, i̱ dugh ve ken nongo ve kera." 
Leviticus18:30 Nahan yô, waan nen kwagh u M we ne ne iko, sha u de eren nen ma kwagh u ken aeren a hôngorough ne ga, a i vande eren, er ne, ne lu a va ga la, sha er ne̱ de hôngor ayol a en sha mi ga yô; ka Mo TER M lu Aôndo wen ye." 
Leviticus19:1 TER shi ôr kwagh a Mose, kaa er:" 
Leviticus19:2 Ôr kwagh a mkohol u Mbaiserael cii, kaa a ve wer: Lu nen uicighanmbaiorov, gadia Mo TER, Aôndo wen, M ngu icighan je." 
Leviticus19:3 Hanmô wen nana̱ cian ngô u nan kua ter u nan; waan nen ayange a memen a Am ikô; ka Mo TER M lu Aôndo wen ye. 
Leviticus19:4 De gem nen hen mbaaôndo mba gbiliniv ga, shi de eren nen mbaaôndo mba i ker a ker ga; ka Mo TER M lu Aôndo wen ye." 
Leviticus19:5 Zum u nea naan TER nagh ku sôngon ku bem yô, naan nen ku er á rumun ne yô." 
Leviticus19:6 Iyange i á na ku la, ka iyange la je, á ya ku ye, kua kpernan kpaa; kpa ma kwagh u una tsa her, á kuma ayange atar yô, i̱ nande un sha usu." 
Leviticus19:7 Aluer nahan kpaa, á ya un sha iyange i atar la yô, ka kwagh u ihôngorough; á kera rumun un ga;" 
Leviticus19:8 or u nana ya un yô, nana lu a ibo iyol, sha ci u nan hôngor a icighankwagh u TER yô; i̱ dugh or la ken nongo u nan kera." 
Leviticus19:9 Zum u nea sundan iyiav mbi ken ishule yen kpaa, de sondo ken ikpisule you been ga, de yaren twar hen akumbe ou kpaa ga." 
Leviticus19:10 De yaren twar hen sule wou u wain ga, shi de kor atam a sule wou u wain a a hee inya la kpaa ga, undu a her sha ci u icanor kua shiror; ka Mo TER M lu Aôndo wen ye." 
Leviticus19:11 De iin nen ga, man de eren nen aie ga, man de tsughun nen ayol a en ga." 
Leviticus19:12 De bumun iti Yam sha aie geman hôngor a iti i Aôndo wou ga; Ka Mo TER. 
Leviticus19:13 De imbishi or u nan we ndor a we ga, shi de ye nan kwagh sha apera kpaa ga; injar i ortom u sha tôndo i̱ de tse her a we zan zan sev mbu aven ga." 
Leviticus19:14 De toho orakondoato ga, shi de pende orapirashe kwagh u nôngon gbev a mi sha hemen ga, kpa cian Aôndo wou; ka Mo TER." 
Leviticus19:15 De eren ifer sha ijirôron ga; de gbe tan ken icanor tsô ga, de hembe wan shagbaor iko kpaa ga, kpa ôr or u nan we ndor a we ijir sha perapera je." 
Leviticus19:16 De zenden anger hen ior ou ga, de nenge u haan awambe a or u nan we ndor a we ga; ka Mo TER." 
Leviticus19:17 De ker anngôu ihom ken ishima you ga, venda kwagh a or u nan we ndor a we gbar gbar, de kera kper ibo sha iyol you sha ci u nan ga." 
Leviticus19:18 De oron iyev ga, shi de we ishima bough a ônov mba ior ou ga, kpa or u nan we ndor a we nana̱ doo u ishima er we iyol you nahan; ka Mo TER." 
Leviticus19:19 Waan nen akaawan a Am iko, de deen uzendenya ou anza ahar, ve̱ unden nungwa nungwa ga; de te ivor anza ahar ken sule wou ga; man de hee riga u i kor un sha akondo atô ahar iyol ga." 
Leviticus19:20 Or u nana yav a kwase u a lu kpankwase u i vande tôndon zwa er á na orgen, kpa i lu a paa un ga, man i lu a dugh un ken kpan kpaa ga yô, i̱ tsaha ve a tsaha i̱ de woo ve ga, gadia ngu a due ken kpan ga." 
Leviticus19:21 Nana̱ va a nagh ku nan ku iboogh hen TER, hen hunda u tenti u kohol ker la, i̱ lu nomiyôngo sha ci u nagh ku iboogh." 
Leviticus19:22 Pristi a̱ na iwom sha ci u nan sha nomiyôngo u nagh ku iboogh la, sha ishigh ki TER, sha ci u isholibo i nan er yô; tsô á de nan isholibo i nan er la." 
Leviticus19:23 Zum u né nyôr ken tar la, nea môôr hanma anza a ikon i i ye atam a i yô, atam a i la a̱ lu ne kwagh u tsweren; tswer nen a anyom atar je; i̱ de ye a ga." 
Leviticus19:24 Kpa inyom i sha unyiin la, atam a i cii aa lu icighaniwua i wuese TER a mi." 
Leviticus19:25 Inyom i sha utaan la yô, ya nen atam a i, sha er ia seer umen ne atam yô; ka Mo TER M lu Aôndo wen ye." 
Leviticus19:26 De ye nen ma kwagh kua awambe a na ga; de kpehen nen ishor ga, shi de eren nen ahir kpaa ga." 
Leviticus19:27 De hondon nen ityough gbilititi ga, shi de tende nen indyer yen ken akpe ga." 
Leviticus19:28 De esen nen avav iyol sha ci u or u nan kpe ga; de gberen nen akaa iyol kpaa ga; ka Mo TER. 
Leviticus19:29 De heen wan wou u kwase, veren un a̱ hingir idyakwase ga; sha er tar la u̱ de gbe ken idya u̱ mgboughon a ifer i ndôhôr ishima ga." 
Leviticus19:30 Waan nen ayange a memen Am iko; civir nen icighanjiir Wam; ka Mo TER. 
Leviticus19:31 De ze nen hen ujijingi mba mbakpenev ga, shin mbatsenganpasen akaa kpaa ga, de keren nen ve sha er né hôngor ayol a en sha ve ga; ka Mo TER M lu Aôndo wen yen." 
Leviticus19:32 Mough tile sha, sha ishigh ki or u menden ivu, civir ishigh ki tamenor, cian Aôndo wou; ka Mo TER." 
Leviticus19:33 Aluer shiror una lu her a we ken tar wen yô, de eren nen un ican ga." 
Leviticus19:34 Shiror u a lu her a ven yô, a̱ lu ne er ka or u tar la jim yô, a̱ doo u ishima er iyol you nahan; gadia ne kpaa ngise ne lu ushirmbaiorov ken tar u Igipiti; ka Mo TER M lu Aôndo wen ye." 
Leviticus19:35 De eren nen ifer sha ijirôron ga, shin sha ikaren i iniembe, shin sha myoho, shin sha ikagh ki karen kwagh a mi kpaa ga." 
Leviticus19:36 Ka iyôgh ki karen ki vough man uikaren mba vough man efa u vough man hin u vough kpaa, luun nen a mi ye; ka Mo TER M lu Aôndo wen u M dugh a ven ken tar u Igipiti ye." 
Leviticus19:37 Akaawan Am cii kua akaaôron Am a jirigh cii, waan nen a iko eren nen sha mi; ka Mo TER." 
Leviticus20:1 TER shi ôr kwagh a Mose, kaa er:" 
Leviticus20:2 Shi kaa Mbaiserael wer: Hanma or u ken Mbaiserael shi u ken ushirmbaiorov mba ve tse ken Iserael, u nana na Moleki wan u nan yô, i̱ wua nan kpee je; ior mba ken tar la je, ve̱ ta nan awen." 
Leviticus20:3 Me kera saan ishigh a or la ga, Me kar a nan ken nongo u nan kera, sha ci u nan ne Moleki wan u nan, nan hôngor a icighanjiir Wam shi nan hee icighanti Wam kpaa yô." 
Leviticus20:4 Man aluer ior mba hen tar la vea gba den or la tsô, zum u nan ne Moleki wan u nan vea kera wua nan ga yô," 
Leviticus20:5 Mo Me kera saan ishigh a or la ga, kua a ior mba ken ya u nan kpaa ga, or la kua mba ve er idya a nan imôngo sha u dondon Moleki la cii, Me dugh ve ken nongo ve kera." 
Leviticus20:6 Or u nan ze hen ujijingi mba mbakpenev man mbatsenganpasen akaa sha u nana er idya sha u dondon ve yô, Me kera saan ishigh a or la ga, Me dugh nan ken nongo u nan kera." 
Leviticus20:7 Nahan tsegha nen ayol a en, lu nen uicighanmbaiorov; gadia ka Mo TER M lu Aôndo wen ye." 
Leviticus20:8 Waan nen akaawan a Am iko, eren nen sha a; ka Mo TER M tsegh ne ye." 
Leviticus20:9 Gadia hanma or u nan toho ter u nan shin ngô u nan yô, i̱ wua nan kpee je, nan tuhwa ter u nan shin ngô u nan je; awambe a nan a̱ lu sha ityough ki nan." 
Leviticus20:10 Or u nan er idya a kwase u orgen, ka u nan er idya a kwase u or u nan we ndor a nan yô, idyaor la kua idyakwase la kpaa, i̱ wua ve kpee je." 
Leviticus20:11 Or u nan yav a kwase u ter u nan yô, nan bugh idyelegh u ter u nan je ve; ve uhar cii, i̱ wua ve kpee je; awambe a ve a̱ lu sha ityouv vev." 
Leviticus20:12 Man aluer or nana yav a kwase u wan u nan yô, ve uhar cii i̱ wua ve kpee, ve er kwagh u dang yum; awambe a ve a̱ lu sha ityouv vev." 
Leviticus20:13 Aluer or á yav a nomsoor er i yaven a kwase nahan yô, ve uhar cii ve er kwagh u ihôngorough i̱ wua ve kpee je; awambe a ve a̱ lu sha ityouv vev." 
Leviticus20:14 Aluer or á er kwase kua ngô u kwase la yô, ka ifer i ndôhôr ishima je, i̱ nande ve sha usu, un kua ve, sha er ifer i i ndôhôr ishima i̱ de luun hen ven ga yô." 
Leviticus20:15 Aluer or á yav a zendenya yô, i̱ wua nan kpee je; zendenya la kpaa, wua nen un." 
Leviticus20:16 Man aluer kwase nana mgbôghom a ma zendenya sha u a̱ unde nan yô, i̱ wua kwase la kua zendenya la; i̱ wua ve kpee je, awambe a ve a̱ lu sha ityouv vev." 
Leviticus20:17 Man aluer or nana er anngô u nan u kwase, ka wan u ter u nan u kwase, shin wan u ngô u nan u kwase je la, nana nenge idyelegh na, man un kpaa una nenge idyelegh u nan yô, ka kwagh u kunya je; nahan i̱ dugh ve sha ashe a ônov mba nongo ve kera gadia nan bugh idyelegh u anngô u nan u kwase je; nana lu a ibo iyol." 
Leviticus20:18 Aluer or nana yav a kwase zum u a dugh won, nana bugh idyelegh na yô, nan bugh idyelegh u imbor na je, kwase la kpaa bugh imbor i awambe na; ve uhar cii, i̱ dugh ve ken nongo ve kera." 
Leviticus20:19 De bughun idyelegh u anngô u ngôu u kwase ga, shin anngô u teru u kwase kpaa ga, gadia nahan á bugh idyelegh u anmgbian je; vea lu a ibo iyol." 
Leviticus20:20 Man aluer or á yav a kwase u anngô u ter u nan yô, nan bugh idyelegh u anngô u ter u nan je; vea tôô isholibo ve, vea kpe atseen." 
Leviticus20:21 Man aluer or á tôô kwase u anngô u nan yô, ka kwagh u ihôngorough, nan bugh idyelegh u anngô u nan je, vea ver tse ga." 
Leviticus20:22 Waan nen akaawan a Am cii kua akaaôron Am a jirigh iko, eren nen sha a kpaa, sha er tar u M lu van a ven ker Mer, tema nen ker la, ua suwa ne kera ga yô." 
Leviticus20:23 De dondon nen aeren a ikurior i M lu va zendan i sha ishigh yenegh kera ne ga; gadia akaa ne cii ve er a, nahan ve ndôhôr Mo ishima." 
Leviticus20:24 Kpa ne yô, M kaa ne Mer, ka ne né ya dyako u tar ve ye, Mo Me na ne u, u̱ hingir kwagh wen jim, ka tar u atumbabua a dumbur ken u kua iyough kpaa; ka Mo TER M lu Aôndo wen u M ver ne kposo a akuraior yô." 
Leviticus20:25 Nahan yô, pav nen zendenya u wang kposo a u a lu wang ga yô, man inyon i wang ga, a i lu wang yô; de hôngor nen a uuma enev sha uzendenya ga shin sha inyon shin hanma injakwagh i kper a kpela inya kpaa ga, mba M tswer ne ve Mer, ve mba wang ga yô." 
Leviticus20:26 Lum nen uicighanmbaiorov, gadia Mo TER M ngu icighan je, M pav ne a akuraior, M ver ne kposo, sha u lu nen ior Av yô." 
Leviticus20:27 Aluer nomsoor shin kwase nana lu a jijingi u orkpen shin tsenganpasen akaa yô, i̱ wua ve kpee, i̱ ta ve awen; awambe a ve a̱ lu sha ityouv vev." 
Leviticus21:1 TER kaa a Mose er: Ôr kwagh a upristi, ônov mba Aron, kaa ve wer, hanmô ve nana̱ de gbe hôngor iyol i nan sha ikom i or u ken nongo u nan tsô ga;" 
Leviticus21:2 saa á lu or u ken ya u nan, á lu ngô u nan, shin ter u nan, shin wan u nan u nomso, shin wan u nan u kwase, shin anngô u nan u nomso kpaa;" 
Leviticus21:3 shin á lu anngô u nan u kwase u iniunugh u a lu a nan her je, a lu a er nom ga yô; un yô, nana fatyô u hôngor iyol i nan sha mi." 
Leviticus21:4 Nana̱ de hôngor iyol i nan ga, sha ci u nan lu orhemen ken ior mba nan yô, doo u nana hôngor iyol i nan ga." 
Leviticus21:5 Ve̱ de hondon ma ijiir sha ityou ga, man shi ve̱ de hondon indyer ve ken akpe ga, shi ve̱ de esen avav iyol kpaa ga." 
Leviticus21:6 Ve̱ lu uicighanmbaiorov mba Aôndo je, ve̱ de hôngor a iti i Aôndo ve ga; gadia mba ne iniav mbi usuv mbi TER, ka kwaghyan u Aôndo ve je la; nahan yô, ve̱ lu uicighanmbaiorov." 
Leviticus21:7 Ve̱ de eren kwase u a lu idyakwase ga, shin iniunkwase i i vande vihin i kpaa ga, shi ve̱ de eren kwase u a dugh hen nom u nan kpaa ga; gadia un ngu icighanor u Aôndo je." 
Leviticus21:8 Nahan tsegha un, gadia ne nagh, ka kwaghyan u Aôndo wou je la; a̱ lu u icighanor je; gadia Mo TER u M tsegh ne ne, M ngu icighan je." 
Leviticus21:9 Aluer wan u pristi u kwase nana hôngor iyol i nan, nana er idya yô, nan hôngor ter u nan je ve; i̱ nande nan sha usu." 
Leviticus21:10 Pristi u a lu u vesen ken anmgbianev nav, u i hee un mkurem ma shighen sha ityou i tsegh un er a̱ haan akondo la yô, a̱ de lu ityough meghaa ga, shi a̱ de anden akondo na kpaa ga," 
Leviticus21:11 shi a̱ de ze hen ma ikom i or ga, á lu ter na shin ngô na kpaa, a̱ de hôngor iyol na sha ci ve ga;" 
Leviticus21:12 man a̱ de dugh ken icighanjiir ga, a̱ de hôngor a icighanjiir u Aôndo na kpaa ga, gadia mtsegh u mkurem ma shighen u Aôndo ngu sha a na; ka Mo TER." 
Leviticus21:13 A̱ er kwase er nan lu iniun la je. 
Leviticus21:14 Kwasecôghol shin kwase u a dugh hen nom, shin iniunkwase i i vihi i shin idyakwase, mbala yô, a̱ de eren ga; kpa i̱ lu iniunkwase i ken nongo na, a̱ er i ye." 
Leviticus21:15 A̱ de hôngor a tsombor na ken nongo na ga; gadia ka Mo TER M tsegh un ye. 
Leviticus21:16 TER shi ôr kwagh a Mose kaa a na er: 
Leviticus21:17 Ôr kwagh a Aron kaa un wer: Á lu anti or ken tsombor wou, shin á lu ikov i ken hemen kpaa, nana lu a iwan iyol yô, nana̱ de kporom sha u nan nagh ku kwaghyan u Aôndo u nan ga." 
Leviticus21:18 Gadia hanma or u nan lu a iwan iyol yô, nana̱ de kporom ga; orapirashe, shin orkeer, shin or u gban iwan sha ishi, shin u nan lihi ilyeegh ki gande ikaa inya," 
Leviticus21:19 shin or u sombon nguhar, shin or u sombon uwegh," 
Leviticus21:20 shin or u van igundu, shin or u kanden kôhôlôô, shin or u lun a ishange ken ishe, shin or u kpesan iyol, shin or u i vihi nan ake;" 
Leviticus21:21 ma or u ken tsombor u pristi u Aron, u nan lu a iwan iyol, nana̱ de kporom er nana na iniav mbi usuv mbi TER ga, nan ngu a iwan yum; nana̱ de kporom er nana na nagh ku Aôndo u nan ga." 
Leviticus21:22 Nana ya kwaghyan u Aôndo u nan, u a lu icighankwagh u hemban cii, kua u a lu icighankwagh tsô, la," 
Leviticus21:23 kpa nana̱ de nyer ken ijiir i ikondo i yisan la ga, shi nana̱ de kporom hen atse a nanden nagh sha mi kpaa ga, sha ci u nan lu a iwan yô, sha er nana̱ de hôngor a uicighanmbaajiiriv Av ga yô, gadia ka Mo TER u M tsegh ve ne," 
Leviticus21:24 Kape Mose kaa Aron man ônov nav kua Mbaiserael cii la. 
Leviticus22:1 TER shi ôr kwagh a Mose, A kaa er:" 
Leviticus22:2 Ôr kwagh a Aron man ônov nav, ve̱ ver ishima sha uicighanmbaakaav mba Mbaiserael ve tsegh sha ci Wam la, sha er ve̱ de hôngor a icighanti Wam ga yô; ka Mo TER." 
Leviticus22:3 Kaa a ve wer: Hanmô u ken ikov yen cii, u ken tsombor wen cii, u nana kporom hen uicighanmbaakaav mba Mbaiserael ve tsegh sha ci u TER, zum u nan lu wang ga la yô, i̱ dugh or la sha ishigh Yagh kera; ka Mo TER." 
Leviticus22:4 Hanma or u ken tsombor u Aron u nan lu orimande, shin u nan dugh ihyelegh iyol, nana̱ de ye uicighanmbaakaav ga, saa nana vande hingir wang ve. Man shi hanmô u nan bende a ma kwagh u a hôngor sha ikomor, shin or u ityujer i dugh nan kpaa," 
Leviticus22:5 shin hanmô u nan bende a ma kwagh u a kper a kpela inya, u nana zua a hôngor sha mi yô, shin u nan bende a or nan tee hôngor hen a nan, hanma inja i hôngorough i nan lu a mi yô," 
Leviticus22:6 or u nana bende a hanma injakwagh i nahan, nana kera lu wang ga, zan zan iyange ia kar been; mye kpaa nana̱ de ye uicighanmbaakaav ga, saa nana vande ôôn iyol i nan sha mnger kera ve." 
Leviticus22:7 Zum u iyange ia bee yô, nana hingir wang; ken masetyô yô, nana ya uicighanmbaakaav, gadia ka kwaghyan u nan je." 
Leviticus22:8 Kwagh u a gbe kpen tsô yô, shin u inyamikume i woo yô, nana̱ de ye, nana̱ hôngor iyol i nan sha mi ga, ka Mo TER." 
Leviticus22:9 Yô, ve̱ waan kwagh u M we ve ne iko, sha er ve̱ de kper ibo, ve̱ hee iyol, ve̱ kpeen zum u ve hôngor a mi la ga; ka Mo TER u M tsegh ve ne." 
Leviticus22:10 Ma or u ken inya, nana̱ de ye icighankwagh ga; ma shiror u hen ya u pristi shin or u va eren tom sha tôndo kpaa, nana̱ de ye icighankwagh ga." 
Leviticus22:11 Kpa aluer pristi una yam ma or sha inyaregh nagh yô, nana̱ ya, kua mba i mar hen ya na cii kpaa, ve̱ ya kwaghyan na." 
Leviticus22:12 Aluer wan u pristi u kwase nana er or u ken inya yô, nana̱ de ye nagh ku kenden sha, ku uicighanmbaakaav la ga." 
Leviticus22:13 Kpa aluer wan u pristi u kwase nana hingir kwasecôghol shin nana due ken nom man nana lu a wan ga, man nana hide hen ya u ter u nan, er yan nan lu iyev la nahan yô, nana yaan kwaghyan u ter u nan la, kpa ma or u ken inya yô, nana̱ de ye ga." 
Leviticus22:14 Man aluer or nana ya icighankwagh abu yô, nana̱ seer u môm-ken-utaan sha mi, nana̱ hide a icighankwagh, nana̱ na pristi." 
Leviticus22:15 Ve̱ de hôngor a uicighanmbaakaav mba Mbaiserael ve ne TER la ga; 
Leviticus22:16 ve̱ de kper ibo, ve̱ hee iyol, sha er ve̱ kuma u yan mtsaha, zum u ve ye uicighanmbaakaav vev la ga, gadia ka Mo TER u M tsegh ve ne." 
Leviticus22:17 TER ôr kwagh a Mose kaa er: 
Leviticus22:18 Ôr kwagh a Aron man ônov nav kua Mbaiserael cii, kaa a ve wer: Hanma or u ken ya u Iserael shin u ken ushirmbaiorov mba ken Iserael, u nan ve a nagh ku nan, shin a lu uiceghzwa vev, shin a lu iniav vev mbi sha ishima i dedoo mbi ve ne TER, sha ci u nagh ku nanden yô," 
Leviticus22:19 sha er á rumun ne yô i̱ lu nomile u a lu a ihogholough iyol ga yô, bua shin iyôngo shin ivo." 
Leviticus22:20 Kpa hanma kwagh u a lu a ihogholough iyol yô, de ve nen a mi ga, gadia una na, á kera rumun ne ga." 
Leviticus22:21 Man shi hanmô u nana va na TER nagh ku sôngon ku bem, sha i kuren iceghzwa, shin sha ci u nagh ku sha ishima i dedoo, shin á lu bua, shin á lu iyôngo kpaa yô, ku̱ lu tsembelee, sha er á rumun ku yô, ma ihogholough ki̱ de luun sha mi ga." 
Leviticus22:22 Kwagh u pirin ashe, shin u sombon shin u keer, shin u lun a avav, shin u kpesan iyol, shin u kuran iyol yô, de ne nen TER ga, de ne nen TER nagh ku usugh mi sha atse a nanden nagh sha mi la ga." 
Leviticus22:23 Gumbua shin gumiyôngo u a lu a ilyeegh ki ki lihi ki gande inya, shin ki ki yen yô, u fatyô u va nan nagh ku sha ishima i dedoo mi, kpa a lu nagh ku sha iceghzwa yô, á rumun un ga." 
Leviticus22:24 Kwagh u i vihi un ake shin i cagh a, shin i ande a, shin i tende a yô, de ne nen TER nagh a mi ga; man de eren nen ken tar wen nahan ga." 
Leviticus22:25 Man de ngohol nen anza la sha ikev i or u tar gen sha u va nan nagh ku kwaghyan u Aôndo a mi ga; gadia mlu u a u wang ga la ngu ken a; ihogholough ki sha a, á rumun a sha ci wen ga." 
Leviticus22:26 TER shi ôr kwagh a Mose, kaa er:" 
Leviticus22:27 Zum u bua shin iyôngo shin ivo á mar wan yô, wan la a̱ lu a ngô na ayange ataankarahar; hii sha iyange i anigheni la, zan zan ken hemen yô, á rumun un sha nagh ku usugh ku nan TER." 
Leviticus22:28 Shin a lu ngôbua shin ngôiyôngo kpaa, de senge nen un a wan na imôngo sha iyange i môm ga." 
Leviticus22:29 Man zum u nea sôngo TER nagh ku iwuese yô, na nen ku er á rumun ne yô." 
Leviticus22:30 Ka sha iyange la je, á ya ku ye, de deen nen ma kwagh u ku, a̱ tsa her zan zan sev mbu aven ga; ka Mo TER." 
Leviticus22:31 Waan nen atindi a Am iko, eren nen sha mi; ka Mo TER." 
Leviticus22:32 De hôngor nen a icighanti Wam ga; i̱ tseghan Mo ken Mbaiserael; ka Mo TER u M tsegh ne," 
Leviticus22:33 M due a ven ken tar u Igipiti, sha u Me lu Aôndo wen ne ye; ka Mo TER." 
Leviticus23:1 TER shi ôr kwagh a Mose, kaa er:" 
Leviticus23:2 Ôr kwagh a Mbaiserael, kaa a ve wer: Uiniongo mba TER mba né yôô, sha u ve̱ lu uicighanmbamkohol yô, ka ve ne, ka uiniongo Av je:" 
Leviticus23:3 I̱ eren tom ayange ataratar, kpa iyange i ataankarahar la, ka iyange i memen i kôron ma tom ave ga, ka icighanmkohol; de eren nen ma tom ga; ka iyange i memen i TER ken ajiir a en a ne tem cii." 
Leviticus23:4 Mban ka uiniongo mba TER, ka uicighanmbamkohol mba né yôôn sha ashighe a i ver yô:" 
Leviticus23:5 Uwer u hiihii ayange a u pue kar anyiin, aikighe, ka Paseka u TER." 
Leviticus23:6 Uwer la ayange a u pue kar ataan la, ka iniongo i TER, i bredi u i we kwa sha mi ga yô." 
Leviticus23:7 Sha iyange i hiihii la er icighanmkohol; de eren nen ma tom u ican ga. 
Leviticus23:8 Naan nen TER nagh ku usugh, ayange ataankarahar la cii; sha iyange i ataankarahar la, á er icighanmkohol, de eren nen ma tom u ican ga." 
Leviticus23:9 TER shi or kwagh a Mose, kaa er:" 
Leviticus23:10 Ôr kwagh a Mbaiserael, kaa a ve wer: Zum u né va nyôr ken tar u M lu nan ne ne, nea sundan iyiav mbi ken u yô, né va a ile u iyiagh ki tsutswagh ki ne sondo la, hen pristi," 
Leviticus23:11 a̱ cia ile la sha ishigh ki TER, sha er á rumun ne yô; kpernan iyange i dondon sha iyange i memen la, pristi a̱ cia u." 
Leviticus23:12 Iyange i ne cie ile la, va nen a gumiyôngo u lun a ihogholough iyol ga, u a kom inyom i môm yô, sha u nan TER nagh ku nanden a mi," 
Leviticus23:13 kua nagh ku sha samuyia ku ku, mwem ma kengese ma ma kom uikaren uhar-ken-upue, ma i nongo mkurem sha mi yô, ka nagh ku usugh ku nan TER ku human doon je la; man shi nagh ku man ku ku, sha wain u a kom ikaren u môm-ken-unyiin u hin." 
Leviticus23:14 De ye nen bredi ga, shin iyiagh ki kaan a kaa kpaa ga, shin asagher a he kpaa ga, zan zan iyange la i̱ kar kuman, saa ne vande van a nagh ku Aôndo wen ve; ka tindi u gbem sha ikov ikov, ken a jiir a en a ne tem cii." 
Leviticus23:15 Ôr nen iyenge, i̱ hii sha iyange i dondon sha iyange i memen, ka iyange i né va a ile u nagh ku cian la je la, ulahadi utaankaruhar ve̱ iv vough;" 
Leviticus23:16 ka ayange akunduahargber je, né er a la, zan zan ar sha iyange i dondon sha iyange i memen i sha utaankaruhar la, man né na TER nagh ku sha samuyia sha iyiav mbi hev ye." 
Leviticus23:17 Tôô nen ubredi mba cian a mi uhar, ken ajiir a ne tem cii, va nen a mi, mba i er ve sha mwem ma kengese ma ma kom uikaren uhar-ken-upue, i̱ kaa ve i̱ wa kwa sha mi, ve̱ lu iyiav mbi tsutswav mbi nan TER." 
Leviticus23:18 Va nen a agumaiyôngo ataankarahar a a lu a ihogholough iyol ga, a a kom inyom i môm i môm yô, man gumbua môm kua anomaiyôngo ahar, a ubredi mbala imôngo, i̱ na TER nagh ku nanden mi, a nagh vegh ku sha samuyia, kua iniav mbi man imôngo cii ka nagh ku usugh ku human doon ku nan TER je la." 
Leviticus23:19 Na nen nagh ku isholibo sha kpev, shi ne nen nagh ku bem sha agumaiyôngo ahar, a a kom inyom i môm i môm yô." 
Leviticus23:20 Pristi a̱ cia a mi, a ubredi mba iyiav mbi tsutswav la imôngo, i̱ lu nagh ku cian sha ishigh ki TER, a agumaiyôngo ahar la imôngo, i̱ lu icighankwagh u TER sha ci u pristi." 
Leviticus23:21 Sha iyange la je, i̱ yôô i̱ lu ne icighanmkohol, de eren nen ma tom u ican ga; ngun ka tindi u gbem sha ajiir a ne tem cii sha ikov ikov." 
Leviticus23:22 Zum u nea sunda iyiav mbi ken ishule yen yô, de sondo ken ikpisule you been ga, shi de yaren twar ken akumbe a ou kpaa ga, undu her sha ci u icanor kua shiror; ka Mo TER M lu Aôndo wen ye." 
Leviticus23:23 TER shi ôr kwagh a Mose, kaa er:" 
Leviticus23:24 Ôr kwagh a Mbaiserael, kaa a ve wer, uwer u sha utaankaruhar, sha iyange i hiihii i u la, mem nen iyol, ka kwagh u umbur sha ikor i tôngon, ka icighanmkohol." 
Leviticus23:25 De eren nen ma tom u ican ga; na nen TER nagh ku usugh. 
Leviticus23:26 TER shi ôr kwagh a Mose, kaa er:" 
Leviticus23:27 Uwer u sha utaankaruhar sha ayange a u pue la, ka iyange i nan iwom, i̱ lu ne icighanmkohol, ule nen, na nen TER nagh ku usugh." 
Leviticus23:28 De eren nen ma tom sha iyange la ga, gadia ka iyange i nan iwom, á na iwom sha ci wen sha ishigh ki TER, Aôndo wen." 
Leviticus23:29 Gadia hanma or u nana ule sha iyange la ga yô, á dugh nan ken nongo u nan kera." 
Leviticus23:30 Man hanma or u nana er ma tom sha iyange la yô, Me tim or la ken nongo u nan kera." 
Leviticus23:31 De eren nen ma tom ga; ka tindi u gbem sha ikov yen, sha ajiir a en a ne tem cii." 
Leviticus23:32 I̱ lu ne iyange i memen i̱ kôron ma tom ave ga, ule nen; uwer la, sha ayange a u ataankaranyiin la, iyange i been, hii sha iyange i been zan zan za kure kpernan iyange i been, mem nen sha iyange i memen yen." 
Leviticus23:33 TER shi ôr kwagh a Mose, kaa er:" 
Leviticus23:34 Ôr kwagh a Mbaiserael, kaa a ve wer: Uwer u sha utaankaruhar, ayange a u pue kar ataan la, i̱ er iniongo i atumbe i TER, ayange ataankarahar." 
Leviticus23:35 Sha iyange i hiihii la, i̱ er icighanmkohol, de eren nen ma tom u ican ga." 
Leviticus23:36 Ayange a ataankarahar la cii, naan nen TER nagh ku usugh, sha iyange i anigheni la, né er icighanmkohol; na nen TER nagh ku usugh; ka iyange i iniongo, de eren nen ma tom u ican ga." 
Leviticus23:37 Ka uiniongo mba TER, mba i ver, mba né yôô ner ka uicighanmbamkohol sha u nan TER nagh ku usugh, nagh ku nanden, man nagh ku sha samuyia, man nagh ku sôngon, kua iniav mbi man, hanmôgh sha iyange i ku;" 
Leviticus23:38 kua shi ayange a memen a TER cii, man iwua yen, man uiceghzwa enev cii, kua iniav yenev cii mbi sha ishima i dedoo mbi né naan TER yô." 
Leviticus23:39 Kpa sha uwer u sha utaankaruhar, ayange a u pue kar ahar la, shighe u ne vande sundan iyiav mbi ken ishule la yô, er nen iniongo i TER, ayange ataankarahar; sha iyange i hiihii la, i̱ mem iyol, man sha iyange i anigheni kpaa, shi i̱ mem iyol." 
Leviticus23:40 Sha iyange i hiihii la yô, tôô nen atam a ikon i doon ashe man andaravilegh kpaa, man agbaa a ikon i ngeen a ika man ikon i nelem agbaa i ken mnger; ember nen sha ishigh ki TER, Aôndo wen, ayange ataankarahar la cii." 
Leviticus23:41 Eren nen i, i̱ lu iniongo i TER hanma inyom; i̱ eren i ayange ataankarahar; ka tindi u gbem u sha ikov yen; er nen i ken uwer u sha utaankaruhar la." 
Leviticus23:42 Tema nen ken atumbe ayange ataankarahar; mba i mar ve ken Mbaiserael cii, ve̱ tema ken atumbe," 
Leviticus23:43 sha er ikov yen i̱ fa, Mo M na Mbaiserael ve tema ken atumbe, zum u M due a ven ken tar u Igipiti la; ka Mo TER M lu Aôndo wen ye." 
Leviticus23:44 Tsô Mose pase Mbaiserael uiniongo mba TER mba i ver la. 
Leviticus24:1 TER ôr kwagh a Mose kaa er: 
Leviticus24:2 Kaa Mbaiserael ve̱ va na u mkurem ma olev ma kumen ma wang sha ci u tsaren, sha er i̱ tsar imenger i̱ yeghen gbem yô." 
Leviticus24:3 Aron a̱ sôron i ken won u ikondo i yisan i Shiada ken tenti u kohol ker la, i̱ yeghen her aikighe zan zan sev mbu av, sha ishigh ki TER gbem; i̱ lu tindi u gbem sha ikov ikov." 
Leviticus24:4 A̱ sôron amenger a sha daarimenger u wang la, sha ishigh ki TER gbem." 
Leviticus24:5 Tôô mwem ma kengese, kaa umasa a mi pue kar uhar, masa môm a̱ kuma uikaren uhar-ken-upue." 
Leviticus24:6 Ver ve iniongo ihiar môôr, môôr, hanma nongo ve̱ lu ataratar, sha tebul u wang la, sha ishigh ki TER." 
Leviticus24:7 Shi ver libano u human doon u wang sha hanma nongo, a̱ lu nagh ku umbur ku bredi la, ka nagh ku usugh ku nan TER je la." 
Leviticus24:8 Hanma iyange i memen a̱ veren ve sha ishigh ki TER gbem, i̱ lu Mbaiserael ikuryan i tsôron je." 
Leviticus24:9 Ve̱ lu sha ci u Aron a ônov nav; ve̱ yaan ve ken icighanjiir, gadia ka un icighankwagh u hemban cii, ken iniav mbi usugh mbi nan TER, ka tindi u tsôron je." 
Leviticus24:10 Tsô orgen, ngô na lu wan Mbaiserael, ter na gema lu Origipiti, due nyôr Mbaiserael hen atô; nahan or u ngô na lu wan Mbaiserael la nongo num a or u Iserael hen afo." 
Leviticus24:11 Tsô or u ngô na lu wan Mbaiserael la ter ITI la dang, gba tuhwan; nahan i va a na hen Mose. Iti i ngô na er Shelomiti wan u Diberi u ken kwe u Dan." 
Leviticus24:12 Ve wa un ken gaadi sha u TER A̱ pase ve kwagh u á er yô. 
Leviticus24:13 Tsô TER ôr kwagh a Mose, kaa er:" 
Leviticus24:14 Due a or u nan toho la ken akôngoafogh; mba ve ongo cii, ve̱ penda un ave sha ityou, mkohol u ior cii ve̱ ta un awen ve̱ wua." 
Leviticus24:15 Ôr kwagh a Mbaiserael, kaa a ve wer, hanmô u nana tuhwa Aôndo u nan yô, nana lu a ibo iyol." 
Leviticus24:16 Man shi u nan toho iti i TER kpaa, i̱ wua nan kpee je; mkohol u ior cii ve̱ ta nan awen, ve̱ ta nan awen ve̱ wua kpee je; shin a lu shiror shin a lu or u tar la jim kpaa, aluer nana ter ITI la dang yô, i̱ wua nan." 
Leviticus24:17 Man or u nan gbidi or nan woo yô, i̱ wua nan kpee je." 
Leviticus24:18 Or u nan gbidi zendenya nan woo yô, nana̱ kimbi un; uma sha uma." 
Leviticus24:19 Man aluer or nana vihi or u nan we ndor a nan iyol yô, er nan er la, kape nan di kpaa i̱ er a nan la;" 
Leviticus24:20 msombo sha msombo, ishe sha ishe, inyigh sha inyi; er nan vihi or iyol la, kape á er a nan di vough la." 
Leviticus24:21 Or u nan woo zendenya yô, nana̱ kimbi un; or u nan woo or yô, i̱ wua nan." 
Leviticus24:22 Lu nen a tindi môm sha ci u shiror man or u tar la jim; gadia ka Mo TER M lu Aôndo wen ye. 
Leviticus24:23 Tsô Mose ôr kwagh a Mbaiserael, ve due a or u nan toho la ken akôngoafogh, ve ta un awen ve wua; Mbaiserael er, er TER kaa Mose nahan." 
Leviticus25:1 TER ôr kwagh a Mose sha uwo u Senai, A kaa er:" 
Leviticus25:2 Ôr kwagh a Mbaiserael, kaa a ve wer: Zum u né nyôr ken tar u M lu nan ne la yô, tar la u̱ mem iyol sha ci u civir TER." 
Leviticus25:3 Kaha sule wou anyom ataratar, sôr sule wou u wain, anyom ataratar, sunda iyiav mbi ken u;" 
Leviticus25:4 kpa inyom i sha utaankaruhar la yô, inya i̱ mem iyol gil gil, ka mmem sha ci u civir TER je, de kera lee kwagh ken sule wou ga; sule wou u wain kpaa, de kera ser u ga." 
Leviticus25:5 Iyiav youv mbi mbi gbe menden tsô yô, de kera sondo mbi ga; atam a ikon i wain you i u ser i ga la kpaa, de kera sondo a ga; inya i̱ mem iyol inyom la cii." 
Leviticus25:6 Kwagh u a gbe menden shighe u inya i mem la yô, una hingir kwaghyan wen, sha ci wou man kpan wou u nomso man kpan wou u kwase man or u eren we tom sha tôndo kua shiror u nan nyer u a nyôr la;" 
Leviticus25:7 man sha ci u ilev you man ishôso i hen tar wou; iyiav mbi keregh cii mbia hingir kwaghyan ve. 
Leviticus25:8 Ôr ulahadi mba anyomov utaankaruhar, ka anyom ataankarahar kwa taankaruhar je la. Nahan ayange a ulahadi mba anyomov utaankaruhar la, aa hingir we anyom akunduahar kar ataankaranyiin je." 
Leviticus25:9 Shighe la, tindi i̱ tôngon korough ku kaan sha uwer u sha utaankaruhar sha ayange a u pue la; sha iyange i nan iwom la, né tindi i̱ tôngon korough ku kaan ken tar wen cii ye." 
Leviticus25:10 Tsegha nen inyom i sha akunduahargber la, yôô nen mpase u i pase i toho, ken tar la, hen mba ve tem ken u cii, i̱ lu ne inyom i jubilii; hanma or wen nana̱ hide hen kwagh u nan, hanma or wen kpaa nana̱ hide hen ior mba nan." 
Leviticus25:11 Inyom i sha akunduahargber la, i̱ lu ne jubilii, de kera lee nen kwagh ga, de kera sondo nen kwagh u a gba menden iyol na tsô, kpaa ga; man shi de sondo nen atam a ikon i wain i i ser i ga la, kpaa ga." 
Leviticus25:12 Gadia ka inyom i jubilii; i̱ lu ne icighankwagh je; za tôô nen a tôô iyiav mbi ken sule, yaan nen." 
Leviticus25:13 Sha inyom i jubilii la, hanmô wen nana̱ hide hen kwagh u nan." 
Leviticus25:14 Nahan yô, aluer wea tee or u nan we ndor a we ma kwagh, shin wea yam ma kwagh a or u nan we ndor a we yô, orgen nana̱ de kera nzughul a orgen ga;" 
Leviticus25:15 ka sha iyenge ia nyom a a kar jubilii la, u yam kwagh a or u nan we ndor a we ye, ka sha iyenge i anyom a á va sunda kwagh sha a la, man nana̱ tee ye." 
Leviticus25:16 Ka sha mngee u anyom man ú seer ishe i u ye, shi ka sha mndahar u anyom man ú pande ishe i u ye; gadia ngu teen we sha iyenge i ú va sundan yô." 
Leviticus25:17 Orgen nana̱ de nzughul a orgen ga, kpa cian Aôndo wou; gadia ka Mo TER M lu Aôndo wen ye." 
Leviticus25:18 Yô, eren nen sha akaawan a Am, man waan nen akaaôron Am a jirigh iko eren nen sha mi; ka nahan man né tema ken tar la bem bem ye." 
Leviticus25:19 Tar ua doo iyiagh, né ya, á kuma ne, né tema ken u bem bem." 
Leviticus25:20 Aluer nea kaa ner: Sé ya nyi ken inyom i sha utaankaruhar la, aluer sé lôô ga, shi sé sunda iyiagh yasegh kpaa ga yôô?" 
Leviticus25:21 Yô, Mo Me na ne iveren Yam sha inyom i sha ataratar la, iyiagh kia ngee kia kuma anyom atar je." 
Leviticus25:22 Sha inyom i sha anigheni la, né lôô, kpa né yaan iyiagh ki tsegh kila her; zan zan iyiagh ki inyom i sha utaankarunyiin la kia via, né yaan iyiagh ki tsegh kila her." 
Leviticus25:23 I̱ de teen inya la i̱ saan ga; gadia ka inya Yam, gadia ne mba mbavannya man ushirmbaiorov Av." 
Leviticus25:24 Inya i ken tar wen cii, rumun nen, i̱ paa i." 
Leviticus25:25 Aluer anngôu nana gba ican je nana pande kwagh u nan, nana tee yô, orpaan u nan u a hembe lun angbian a nan ikua ikua la, a̱ va paa kwagh u anngô na lu tee la." 
Leviticus25:26 Man aluer or ngu a or u paan kwagh u nan ga, man nan iyol i nan nana va hingir ornyar nana zua a kwagh u a kom u paan yô," 
Leviticus25:27 nana̱ ôr anyom a nan tee kwagh u nan la, nana̱ hide or u yan yam la a kwagh u a shi her yô, tsô nana hide hen kwagh u nan la." 
Leviticus25:28 Kpa aluer nana zua a kwagh á kuma u paan kwagh u nan la ga yô, kwagh u nan tee la, a̱ gba lun sha ikev i u nan yam la tsô, zan zan inyom i jubilii; á va kuma sha jubilii yô, kwagh la una due; tsô, nana hide hen kwagh u nan." 
Leviticus25:29 Man aluer or nana tee iyou ken gar u i maa un gir yô, nana lu a ian i paan i inyom i môm er nan tee i kera la; inyom jimin cii nana lu a ian i paan i." 
Leviticus25:30 Kpa aluer á paa i ken inyom i môm la ga yô, iyou shon i ken gar u i maa un gir la, ia hingir i u nan yam i la gbem sha ikov ikov cii; ia kera due sha inyom i jubilii la kpaa ga." 
Leviticus25:31 Kpa ayou a ken angarev mba kiriki mba i maa gir i we ve atô ga yô, i̱ nengen ve er ka mkôngom ma tar la nahan, ian i paan a ngi, man aa due ken jubilii kpaa." 
Leviticus25:32 Kpa agar a Mbalevi yô, ayou a ken agar a a lu a ve yô, Mbalevi vea lu a ian i paan a hanma shighe cii." 
Leviticus25:33 Man aluer Orlevi nana paa i ga yô, iyou i i tee i, i ken gar u nan la, ia due ken jubilii; gadia ayou a ken agar a Mbalevi ka kwagh ve, ken ônov mba Iserael." 
Leviticus25:34 Kpa ajiir a ilev mbi ye toho her, ken akôngo a agar a ve la yô, i̱ de teen a ga, gadia ka kwagh ve gbem." 
Leviticus25:35 Aluer anngôu u a lu a we una gba ican je kwagh a hemba un yô, wase un, a̱ lu a we er orvannya man shiror nahan." 
Leviticus25:36 De kera ngohol mngerem hen a na ga, shin mtsera kpaa ga, kpa cian Aôndo wou sha er angôu una tema a we yô." 
Leviticus25:37 De pwaren un inyaregh you wan un mngerem ga, man shi de ne un akaayan a ou, ngohol mtsera sha mi kpaa ga." 
Leviticus25:38 Ka Mo TER M lu Aôndo wen, u M dugh a ven ken tar u Igipiti, sha u Me na ne tar u Kanaan, Me lu Aôndo wen kpaa ye." 
Leviticus25:39 Aluer anngôu u a lu a we una gba ican je una tee iyol na, wea yam yô, de kera gem un a̱ eren we tom er ka kpan nahan ga;" 
Leviticus25:40 a̱ lu a we er ka ortom u sha tôndo man er shiror nahan, a̱ eren we tom zan zan inyom i jubilii," 
Leviticus25:41 tsô una due hen we a ônov nav cii, una hide hen ityô na, hen ijiir i uter nav la." 
Leviticus25:42 Gadia ve ka mbayev Av je, mba m dugh a ve ken tar u Igipiti; yô, i̱ de teen ve er ka ikpan nahan ga." 
Leviticus25:43 De ye tor sha a na eren un ican ga, kpa cian Aôndo wou." 
Leviticus25:44 Sha kwagh u ikpan you i nomso man i ukase i ú va zua a mi yô, ka akuraior a a kase ne la, man né yamen ikpan i nomso man i ukase ker ye." 
Leviticus25:45 Man shi ônov mba ior mba van a va mba ve lu shir hen a ven la kpaa, ka ve né yamen ye, kua ior vev mba ve mar ken tar wen ve lu a ven imôngo la, ka ve vea lu kwagh wen ye." 
Leviticus25:46 Ka ve né gema ve vea hingir dyako u ônov enev mba ken ijime yen ye, ka ve vea lu ikpan yen gbem ye; kpa anmgbianev enev Mbaiserael yô, môgen nana̱ de ye tor sha anngô u nan eren nan ican ga." 
Leviticus25:47 Aluer orvannya shin shiror u a lu a we una hingir ornyar, man anngôu u a lu a na una hingir icanor, una gema iyol na una tee orvannya la a yam, shin a lu shiror, u a lu a we la, shin or u ken tsombor u orvannya kpaa," 
Leviticus25:48 ian ngi i á paan un zum u a tee iyol na kera la, mô anngô na nana̱ paa un;" 
Leviticus25:49 shin a lu anngô u ter na, shin wan u anngô u ter na kpaa, nana̱ paa un, shin hanma or u nan zough ityô a na, nana̱ paa un; man aluer un iyol na una hingir ornyar yô, a̱ paa iyol na;" 
Leviticus25:50 a̱ ôr iyenge a or u nan yam un la, hii sha inyom i a tee iyol na a nan la, zan zan ar sha inyom i jubilii, ishe i i tee un la, i̱ lu sha iyenge i anyom la vough; mlu na her a nan la, a̱ lu er ka or u eren tom sha tôndo nahan." 
Leviticus25:51 Aluer anyom shi her ngee yô, ka sha mngee u a la man una hide a inyaregh ki paan iyol na, ki ki shi her, sha inyaregh ki iyange i yam un a mi la ye." 
Leviticus25:52 Man aluer anyom a mase shin ciôn man inyom i jubilii ia kuma yô, a̱ ôr iyenge a nan; ka sha iyenge i anyom la man una hide a inyaregh ki paan iyol na mi ye." 
Leviticus25:53 A̱ lu a nan er or u eren tom sha tôndo anyom anyom nahan, nana̱ de ye tor sha a na nana̱ eren un ican sha ishigh you ga." 
Leviticus25:54 Aluer á paa un sha igbenda ne ga yô, una due sha inyom i jubilii, un a ônov nav cii." 
Leviticus25:55 Gadia Mbaiserael ka mbayev Av, ka mbayev Av je, mba M dugh a ven ken tar u Igipiti yô; ka Mo TER M lu Aôndo wen ye."
