Leviticus26:1 De eren nen mbaaôndo mba gbiliniv ga, shi de gbe nen eev timin nen mbu sha ga, shin ityôgh ki iwenegh kpaa ga, shi de timin nen ma iwen i i lu a eev sha mi ken tar wen ner, né guren né civir i ga; gadia ka Mo TER M lu Aôndo wen ye.," 
Leviticus26:2 Waan nen ayange a memen a Am iko; civir nen icighanjiir Wam; ka Mo TER. 
Leviticus26:3 Aluer nea zenden ken akaawan Am, man nea waan atindi a Am iko, né eren sha mi kpaa yô," 
Leviticus26:4 Mo Me nôô ne ura sha ashighe a u, inya ia doon iyiav, ikon i ken toho kpaa ia umen atam a i." 
Leviticus26:5 Shighe u sundan iyiav la, né sundan zan zan shighe u sundan atam a wain a kuma, atam a wain kpaa, né sundan zan zan shighe u lôôn iyiav a kuma; né yaan kwaghyan á kuman ne, né tema ken tar wen." 
Leviticus26:6 Me na bem ken tar la, né yav je, ma or u tan ne mciem iyol nana lu ga; Me er inyamikume ia bee ken tar wen, sanker kpaa una kar hen atô u tar wen ga." 
Leviticus26:7 Me zenda mbaihomov enev, vea kpe ku u sanker sha ishigh yenegh." 
Leviticus26:8 Ior enev utaan vea zenda ior deri, ior enev deri vea zenda ior dubu pue; mbaihomov enev kpaa, vea kpe ku u sanker sha ishigh yenegh." 
Leviticus26:9 Me waan ne iko, Me ngee ne ônov, Me seer a seer ne iyenge, Me taver ikuryan Yam a ven." 
Leviticus26:10 Né ya kwagh u ombon u tse je, né va dugh u tse la kera sha ci u u he." 
Leviticus26:11 Me ver tabernakel Wam hen atô wen, ishima kpaa, ia ndôhôr Mo a ven ga." 
Leviticus26:12 Me zende hen atô wen, Me lu Aôndo wen, ne né lu ior Av." 
Leviticus26:13 Ka Mo TER M lu Aôndo wen, u M dugh a ven ken tar u Igipiti, sha er né kera lu ikpan ve ga yô, shi M sombo amande a igbur i sha mon wen, M er ne ne zende sha nôô nôô." 
Leviticus26:14 Kpa aluer nea kera ver ato hen Mo nea eren sha atindi Am ne cii ga yô," 
Leviticus26:15 Man aluer nea venda akaawan Am, man akaaôron Am a jirigh aa ndôhôr ne ishima, nea kera eren sha atindi Am ga, shi nea vihi ikuryan Yam kpaa yô;" 
Leviticus26:16 Mo Me er a ven, Me ta ne mciem iyol, houghbar una kôr u kua angev mbu tseeyol; mbua hungwa u ashe ikôr, mbua na asema a en aa ure; né lôôn ivor yen, kpa á lu gbilin tsô, gadia ka mbaihomov enev vea va ya i ye." 
Leviticus26:17 Me kera saan ishigh a ven ga, mbaihomov enev vea hemba ne; mbakôron ne ihom vea tema tor sha a ven; né gbaa yevese tsô, or kpaa nana zendan ne ga." 
Leviticus26:18 Aluer nahan kpaa shi ne ver ato hen a Mo ga yô, Me seer tsahan ne kwa taankaruhar sha ci u asorabo a en." 
Leviticus26:19 Me sombo agee a en a ne te ihagh a mi la, kera, Me gema kwavaôndo wen ua hingir er iyôgh ki iligh nahan, tar wen ua hingir er togula nahan;" 
Leviticus26:20 né vihin agee a en gbilin; gadia inya yen ia doon iyiagh ga, ikon i hen tar la kpaa, ia umen atam a i ga." 
Leviticus26:21 Aluer nea hendan a Mo, né kera rumun u veren ato hen Mo je ga yô, Me seer tsahan ne kwa taankaruhar sha asorabo a en." 
Leviticus26:22 Me tindi inyamikume her a ven ia va kôr ne ônov, ia tim ilev yenev, ia pande ne, né kera ngee ga, igbenda yen kpaa ia kpe." 
Leviticus26:23 Man aluer sha akaa ne nahan kpaa nea rumun mkôôm Wam ga, né hendan a Mo her yô," 
Leviticus26:24 Mo Me hendan a ven, Mo Me tsaha ne kwa taankaruhar sha ci u asorabo a en." 
Leviticus26:25 Me va a sanker sha a ven, una va or iyev i ikuryan, zum u ne za haa ken agar a en la, Me tindi bouange hen ven, né gema né hingir sha ikev i mbaihomov." 
Leviticus26:26 Zum u Me vihi kwaghyan wen u ne suur sha mi la kera yô, kasev pue vea kaa bredi wen ken atse môm, vea kar bredi wen myohom man vea hide á na ne yô; né ya, kpa á kuma ne ga." 
Leviticus26:27 Man aluer nahan kpaa, nea ver ato her a Mo ga, nea hendan a Mo her yô," 
Leviticus26:28 Mo Me henda a ven sha ishima i nyoon je, Mo Me tsaha ne kwa taankaruhar sha ci u asorabo a en." 
Leviticus26:29 Né ya inyam i ônov enev mba nomso; inyam i ônov enev mba kasev kpaa, né ya." 
Leviticus26:30 Shi Me vihi ajiir a en a taven sha la, Me vihi atse a en a nanden kwaghhumandoon sha mi la kera, Me haa akom a en sha akom a mbaaôndo enev mba gbiliniv; ishima ia ndôhôr Mo a ven." 
Leviticus26:31 Me gema agar a en á hingir atse, Me vihi uicighanmbaajiiriv enev kera; Me ungwa ihuma i kwaghhumandoon wen la ga." 
Leviticus26:32 Me tim tar la, je mbaihomov enev mba ve tem ken u, á kpiligh ve iyol sha kwagh la." 
Leviticus26:33 Me sambe ne ken akuraior, Me tsuwa sanker Me tôv ne ijime, tar wen ua hingir ikôngough gbilin, agar a en kpaa aa hingir atse." 
Leviticus26:34 Nahan á kpe tar iyol sha ayange a memen a u, sha ayange a u lu ikôngough gbilin la; man né gema né lu ken tar u mbaihomov enev la; nahan tar ua mem, á kpe u iyol sha ayange a memen a u." 
Leviticus26:35 Ayange a u lu ikôngough gbilin la cii, ua zua a mmem, ka mmem u yan u zuan a mi ga la, sha ayange a memen a en zum u ne tema ker la." 
Leviticus26:36 Ior enev mba ve shi her yô, Me er asema a ve aa lu per per ken ityar i mbaihomov vev, shin iov i kwa u ahumbe a purugh a mi tsô kpaa, ia num ve; vea yevese er ka i yevese sanker nahan, vea gba, kpa or a lu zendan ve ijime kpaa ga." 
Leviticus26:37 Vea tan sha ayol a ve, vea nôngon gbev er ka sha ishigh ki sanker nahan, or kpaa nana lu zendan ve ityô ga; né lu a agee a né hendan a mbaihomov enev ga." 
Leviticus26:38 Né tim ken akuraior, tar u mbaihomov enev ua ya ne." 
Leviticus26:39 Ior enev mba ve shi her yô, vea hingir seelee sha ci u afer a ve, ken tar u mbaihomov enev, kua sha ci u afer a uter vev kpaa, vea hingir seelee er ve nahan." 
Leviticus26:40 Zum la vea pase afer a ve man afer a uter vev sha mimi ga ve, u ve er a Mo sha mimin ga la, man shi er ve lu hendan a Mo kpaa yô," 
Leviticus26:41 nahan Mo kpaa M hendan a ve, M va a ve ken tar u mbaihomov vev; aluer shighe la ishima ve i ve tsenge ga la, ia hide ijime, vea rumun mtsaha u sha ifer ve yô," 
Leviticus26:42 zum la Me umbur ikuryan Yam a Yakob; ikuryan Yam a Isaka man ikuryan Yam a Aberaham kpaa, Me umbur i; tar la kpaa Me umbur u." 
Leviticus26:43 Tar la yô, vea undu u, á kpe u iyol a ayange a memen a u, shighe u ua hingir ikôngough gbilin, zum u vea lu ga la; ve kpaa vea ngohol mtsaha u sha ifer ve, sha ci u ve vende akaaôron Am a jirigh, man akaawan a Am a ndôhôr ve ishima kpaa yô." 
Leviticus26:44 Nahan kpaa er vea lu ken tar u mbaihomov vev la kpaa, Me ta ve kera ga, vea ndôhôr Mo ishima je er Me tim ve kera ca ca Me bunde ikuryan Yam a ve ga; gadia ka Mo TER M lu Aôndo ve ye." 
Leviticus26:45 Ka sha ci ve man Me umbur ikuryan i uter, mba M dugh a ve ken Igipiti sha ishigh ki akuraior sha u Me lu Aôndo ve ye, ka Mo TER." 
Leviticus26:46 Ka akaawan man akaaôron a jirigh man atindi a TER wa hen atô Na a Mbaiserael sha uwo u Senai sha ikev i Mose je ne. 
Leviticus27:1 TER ôr kwagh a Mose, kaa er:" 
Leviticus27:2 Ôr kwagh a Mbaiserael, kaa a ve wer: Aluer or á tsegha zwa a TER sha or, nana̱ wa inyaregh ki paan yô," 
Leviticus27:3 inyaregh ki u we la, kia lu sha nomsoor u nan kom anyom ikundu zan zan u nan kom anyom akunduatar kpaa, inyaregh ki u we la, ki̱ lu shekel mba azurfa akunduahargber, i̱ lu shekel u icighanjiir la." 
Leviticus27:4 Nana lu kwase yô, inyaregh ki u we la, ki̱ lu ushekel ikundugber." 
Leviticus27:5 Man aluer á lu u nan kom anyom ataan zan zan u nan kom anyom ikundu yô, inyaregh ki u we la, á lu nomsoor yô, ki̱ lu ushekel ikundu, man á lu kwase yô, ki̱ lu ushekel pue." 
Leviticus27:6 Man aluer á lu u nan kom uwer môm zan zan u nan kom anyom ataan yô, inyaregh ki u we la, á lu nomsoor yô, ki̱ lu ushekel mba azurfa utaan, man á lu kwase yô, ki̱ lu ushekel mba azurfa utar." 
Leviticus27:7 Man aluer á lu u nan kom anyom akunduatar shin u nan hembe nahan kpaa, á lu nomsoor yô, inyaregh ki̱ u we la, ki̱ lu ushekel pue kar utaan, man á lu kwase yô, ki̱ lu ushekel pue vough." 
Leviticus27:8 Man aluer nana gba ican, inyaregh ki u we la kia hemba nan yô, i̱ va a nan sha ishigh ki pristi, pristi a̱ wa nan inyaregh, pristi a̱ wa nan inyaregh er or u nan tsegh zwa la, nana fatyô yô." 
Leviticus27:9 Á lu ilegh yô, inja i ka i va na TER nagh a mi la yô, hanma kwagh u or nana na TER la cii yô, a hingir icighankwagh je." 
Leviticus27:10 Nana̱ de veren kwagh ugen sha ityough ki kila ga, shi nana̱ de musan ki, va nan ki dedoo sha ityough ki ki doo ga kila, shin nan ki doon ga, sha ityough ki ki dedoo kila kpaa ga; aluer nahan kpaa nana̱ tôô ilegh kila nana̱ musan kigen a mi yô, kila kua ki i musan ki ami la, mbi cii mbia hingir icighankwagh." 
Leviticus27:11 Man aluer ka ma ilegh ki ki lu wang ga, inja i i ne TER nagh a mi ga la yô, nana̱ va ver ilegh kila sha ishigh ki pristi." 
Leviticus27:12 Nahan pristi a̱ wa ki inyaregh sha mlu u ki, kia lu ki dedoo shin kia lu ki doon ga kpaa, er we pristi u we ki inyaregh la, ka pe a lu je la." 
Leviticus27:13 Man á lu pe nana paa ki keng yô, nana̱ seer u môm-ken-utaan sha inyaregh ki u we ki la." 
Leviticus27:14 Aluer or nana tsegha iyou i nan sha u i̱ hingir icighankwagh u TER yô, pristi a̱ wa inyaregh sha mlu u i, shin ia lu i dedoo shin ia lu i̱ dedoo ga kpaa, er pristi a we i inyaregh la ka pe á lu je la." 
Leviticus27:15 Man aluer u nan tsegh i la, á sar nan pe paan iyou i nan yô, nana̱ seer u môm-ken-utaan sha inyaregh ki u we i la, nahan ia hingir i nan." 
Leviticus27:16 Aluer or nana tsegha vegher u sule u nan, sha ci u TER yô, inyaregh ki u we un la, ki̱ lu sha mngee u ivor i á lôô her yô, sam u shair, homer môm yô, i̱ wa inyaregh ki̱ kuma ushekel mba azurfa akunduahargber." 
Leviticus27:17 Aluer nana tsegha sule u nan sha inyom i jubilii yô, er u we u inyaregh la, kape á lu je la." 
Leviticus27:18 Man aluer nana tsegha sule u nan ken ijime i inyom i jubilii yô, pristi a̱ wa nan inyaregh sha anyom a a shi u aren ken inyom i jubilii la, nahan inyaregh ki u we la, á pande ki." 
Leviticus27:19 Man aluer or u nan tsegh sule la, á sar nan u paan u kpee yô, nana̱ seer u môm-ken-utaan sha inyaregh ki u we u la, nahan ua hingir u nan." 
Leviticus27:20 Man aluer á sar nan u paan sule la ga, shin aluer nana vande teen orgen sule la yô, á kera paa u mayange ga." 
Leviticus27:21 Zum u sule la ua va due ken inyom i jubilii yô, ua hingir icighankwagh u TER, er ka sule u i tswer u nahan, ua hingir kwagh u pristi." 
Leviticus27:22 Man aluer nana tsegha TER ma sule ugen u nan yam, man u lu sule u nan iyol i nan jim ga yô," 
Leviticus27:23 pristi a̱ wa nan inyaregh ki kia kuma sha ishe i u we la zan zan i̱ ar sha inyom i jubilii, nana̱ na ishe i u we la sha iyange la je, ka icighankwagh u TER." 
Leviticus27:24 Sha inyom i jubilii la, sule ua hide sha ikev i, u yan i yam u vea nan la, ka or u i lu sule u nan je la." 
Leviticus27:25 Ishe i u we la cii, i̱ lu shekel u ken icighanjiir, shekel môm ka ugera ikundu." 
Leviticus27:26 Kpa waniunda u uzendenya u sha mmar na je i mar un er a̱ lu waniunda u TER yô, ma or nana̱ de tsegh un ga; shin a lu bua, shin a lu iyôngo kpaa, ka kwagh u TER je." 
Leviticus27:27 Aluer á lu zendenya u wang ga yô, nana̱ paa un sha inyaregh ki u we nan yô, man nana̱ seer u môm-ken-utaan u ishe i i we la, sha mi; aluer á paa un ga yô, i̱ tee un sha inyaregh ki u we yô." 
Leviticus27:28 Ma icighankwagh u or nana tsegha TER ken akaa a nan lu a mi cii, shin a lu or, shin a lu zendenya, shin a lu sule u u lu kwagh u nan jim kpaa, i̱ de tee ga, mpaa kpaa, i̱ de paan ga; hanma icighankwagh ka icighankwagh u TER, u hemban cii." 
Leviticus27:29 Ma or u i we nan ifan i dugh nan ken ior kera yô, i̱ de paan nan ga, i̱ wua nan kpee je." 
Leviticus27:30 Môm-ken-upue u inyaregh cii, shin a lu iyiagh ki inyaagh, shin atam a ikon, ka u TER je; ka icighankwagh u TER." 
Leviticus27:31 Man aluer á sar or pe paan ma kwagh ken u môm-ken-upue la yô, nana̱ seer u môm-ken-utaan sha mi." 
Leviticus27:32 Môm-ken-upue u ikum i uile i abua man i iyôngo kpaa, hanma kwagh u i hur sha gbo yô, môm-ken-upue na, una hingir icighankwagh u TER." 
Leviticus27:33 Nana̱ de tim sha mi er nana fa shin a lu u dedoo, shin a lu u dedoo ga kpaa ga, nana̱ de musan un kpaa ga; kpa aluer nana musan un yô, un kua kwagh u i musan un a mi la, ve cii vea hingir uicighanmbaakaav; i̱ de paan un ga." 
Leviticus27:34 Ka atindiakaa a TER lu na Mose sha ci u Mbaiserael hen uwo u Senai je ne. 
Numbers1:1 TER ôr kwagh a Mose ken desereti u Senai ken tenti u kohol ker la, sha iyange i hiihii i uwer u sha uhar, sha inyom i sha uhar er ve due ken tar u Igipiti kera la, A kaa er:" 
Numbers1:2 Ôr nen iyenge i ior i Mbaiserael cii, sha uipaven uipaven, sha uya mba uter, sha iyenge i ati ve, hanma nomsoor ser ser;" 
Numbers1:3 i̱ hii sha mba ve kom anyom ikundu man mba ve hembe nahan, hanma or u ken Iserael u nan kom u zan ityav yô; we kua Aron, ôr nen iyenge ve sha akum akum." 
Numbers1:4 Ken hanma kwe á tsuwa or môm môm, ve̱ lu a ven imôngo, or u nan lu orhemenegh hen ya u uter mba nan la." 
Numbers1:5 Ati a mba vea lu a ven imôngo yô; ken Ruben ka Elisur wan u Sedeur; 
Numbers1:6 ken Shimeon yô, ka Selumiel wan u Surisadai;" 
Numbers1:7 ken Yuda yô, ka Nakeson wan u Aminadabi;" 
Numbers1:8 ken Isakar yô, ka Netanel wan u Suar;" 
Numbers1:9 ken Sebulon yô, ka Eliabi wan u Helon;" 
Numbers1:10 ken ônov mba Yosev yô, ken Eferaim, ka Elishama wan u Amihudi; man ken Manase, ka Gamaliel wan u Pedasur;" 
Numbers1:11 ken Benyamin yô, ka Abidan wan u Gideoni;" 
Numbers1:12 ken Dan yô, ka Ahieser wan u Amisadai;" 
Numbers1:13 ken Asher yô, ka Pagiel wan u Okeran;" 
Numbers1:14 ken Gadi yô, ka Eliasav wan u Reuel;" 
Numbers1:15 ken Nafetali yô, ka Ahira wan u Enan." 
Numbers1:16 Ka mba i tsuwa ve ken ior je ne, ka mbahemenev mba sha ikwe i uter vev, ka uityombaiorov mba sha uipaven mba Iserael." 
Numbers1:17 Tsô Mose man Aron kua a ior mba i ter ati a ve ne," 
Numbers1:18 ve kohol ior cii imôngo, sha iyange i hiihii i uwer u sha uhar la, ve pav sha uipaven uipaven man sha uya mba uter vev, sha iyenge i ati a ve, hii sha mba ve kom anyom ikundu man mba ve hembe nahan, ser ser," 
Numbers1:19 er TER kaa Mose nahan. A ôr iyenge ve ken desereti u Senai. 
Numbers1:20 Ônov mba Ruben, waniunda u Iserael, tsombor ve, sha uipaven vev, sha uya mba uter vev, sha iyenge i ati ser ser, hanma nomsoor, hii sha mba ve kom anyom ikundu man mba ve hembe nahan, mba vea fatyô u zan ityav cii;" 
Numbers1:21 mba ken kwe u Ruben mba i ôr iyenge ve yô, lu ior dubu akunduahar kar ataratar man deri utaan." 
Numbers1:22 Ônov mba Shimeon yô, tsombor ve, sha uipaven vev, sha uya mba uter vev, sha iyenge i ati ser ser, hanma nomsoor, hii sha mba ve kom anyom ikundu man mba ve hembe nahan mba vea fatyô u zan ityav cii;" 
Numbers1:23 mba ken kwe u Shimeon mba i ôr iyenge ve yô, lu ior dubu akunduahargber kar utaankarunyiin man deri utar." 
Numbers1:24 Ônov mba Gadi yô, tsombor ve, sha uipaven vev, sha uya mba uter vev, sha iyenge i ati, hii sha mba ve kom anyom ikundu man mba ve hembe nahan, mba vea fatyô u zan ityav cii;" 
Numbers1:25 mba ken kwe u Gadi, mba i ôr iyenge ve yô, lu ior dubu akunduahar kar utaan man deri ataratar man akunduahargber." 
Numbers1:26 Ônov mba Yuda yô, tsombor ve, sha uipaven vev, sha uya mba uter vev, sha iyenge i ati, hii sha mba ve kom anyom ikundu man mba ve hembe nahan, mba vea fatyô u zan ityav cii;" 
Numbers1:27 mba ken kwe u Yuda mba i ôr iyenge ve yô, lu ior dubu akunduatargber kar unyiin man deri ataratar." 
Numbers1:28 Ônov mba Isakar yô, tsombor ve, sha uipaven vev sha uya mba uter vev, sha iyenge i ati, hii sha mba ve kom anyom ikundu man mba ve hembe nahan, mba vea fatyô u zan ityav cii;" 
Numbers1:29 mba ken kwe u Isakar mba i ôr iyenge ve yô, lu ior dubu akunduahargber kar unyiin man deri unyiin." 
Numbers1:30 Ônov mba Sebulon yô, tsombor ve, sha uipaven vev, sha uya mba uter vev, sha iyenge i ati, hii sha mba ve kom anyom ikundu man mba ve hembe nahan, mba vea fatyô u zan ityav cii;" 
Numbers1:31 mba ken kwe u Sebulon mba i ôr iyenge ve yô, lu ior dubu akunduahargber kar utaankaruhar man deri unyiin." 
Numbers1:32 Ônov mba Yosev yô, ônov mba Eferaim, tsombor ve, sha uipaven vev, sha uya mba uter vev, sha iyenge i ati, hii sha mba ve kom anyom ikundu man mba ve hembe nahan, mba vea fatyô u zan ityav cii;" 
Numbers1:33 mba ken kwe u Eferaim mba i ôr iyenge ve yô, lu ior dubu akunduahar man deri utaan." 
Numbers1:34 Ônov mba Manase yô, tsombor ve, sha uipaven vev, sha uya mba uter vev, sha iyenge i ati, hii sha mba ve kom anyom ikundu man mba ve hembe nahan, mba vea fatyô u zan ityav cii;" 
Numbers1:35 mba ken kwe u Manase mba i ôr iyenge ve yô, lu ior dubu ikundugber kar uhar man deri uhar." 
Numbers1:36 Ônov mba Benyamin yô, tsombor ve, sha uipaven vev, sha uya mba uter vev, sha iyenge i ati, hii sha mba ve kom anyom ikundu man mba ve hembe nahan, mba vea fatyô u zan ityav cii;" 
Numbers1:37 mba ken kwe u Benyamin mba i ôr iyenge ve yô, lu ior dubu ikundugber kar utaan man deri unyiin." 
Numbers1:38 Ônov mba Dan yô tsombor ve, sha uipaven vev, sha uya mba u uter vev, sha iyenge i ati, hii sha mba ve kom anyom ikundu man mba ve hembe nahan, mba vea fatyô u zan ityav cii;" 
Numbers1:39 mba ken kwe u Dan mba i ôr iyenge ve yô, lu ior dubu akunduatar kar uhar man deri utaankaruhar." 
Numbers1:40 Ônov mba Asher yô, tsombor ve, sha uipaven vev, sha uya mba uter vev, sha iyenge i ati, hii sha mba ve kom anyom ikundu man mba ve hembe nahan, mba vea fatyô u zan ityav cii;" 
Numbers1:41 mba ken kwe u Asher mba i ôr iyenge ve yô, lu ior dubu akunduahar kar môm man deri utaan." 
Numbers1:42 Ônov mba Nafetali yô, tsombor ve, sha uipaven vev, sha uya mba uter vev, sha iyenge i ati, hii sha mba ve kom anyom ikundu man mba ve hembe nahan, mba vea fatyô u zan ityav cii;" 
Numbers1:43 mba ken kwe u Nafetali mba i ôr iyenge ve yô, lu ior dubu akunduahargber kar utar man deri unyiin." 
Numbers1:44 Ka mba i ôr iyenge ve je la; lu Mose man Aron kua mbahemenev mba Iserael mba pue kar uhar mbala ve ôr iyenge ve ye; hanmô ve va sha ci u ya u ter u nan. 
Numbers1:45 Nahan ônov mba Iserael mba i ôr iyenge ve cii, sha uya mba uter vev, hii sha mba ve kom anyom ikundu man mba ve hembe nahan, mba ken Iserael mba vea fatyô u zan ityav cii," 
Numbers1:46 mba i ôr iyenge ve cii, ve lu ior dubu deri ataratar dubu kar utar man deri utaan man akunduahargber." 
Numbers1:47 Kpa Mbalevi sha kwe u uter vev yô, i ôr iyenge ve zum u i ôr mbagenev la ga." 
Numbers1:48 Gadia TER kaa a Mose er: 
Numbers1:49 Saa kwe u Levi tseegh ú ôr ga ye, man iyenge ve kpaa de we i ken Mbaiserael ga;" 
Numbers1:50 kpa ver Mbalevi ve̱ nengen sha tabernakel u shiada man sha ikav nav cii, kua sha hanma kwagh u a lu u na kpaa; ka ve vea tôôn tabernakel a ikav nav cii, man ka ve vea eren tom na kpaa, shi vea haan afo a ve, vea kasen tabernakel ye." 
Numbers1:51 Man á kuman u moughon a tabernakel yô, Mbalevi ve̱ sough un; á kuman u timin tabernakel kpaa, i̱ lu Mbalevi ve̱ tim ye; aluer or u ken inya nana kporom her yô, i̱ wua nan." 
Numbers1:52 Mbaiserael ve̱ tim utenti vev, hanma or hen afo a nan, hanma or kpaa hen tuta u nan, sha akum a ve." 
Numbers1:53 Kpa Mbalevi yô, ve̱ haa ve̱ kase tabernakel u shiada, sha er iyugh i̱ de hee sha mkohol u ior i Mbaiserael ga yô; Mbalevi ve̱ nengen sha tabernakel u shiada la." 
Numbers1:54 Kape Mbaiserael er je la; er TER kaa Mose nahan cii, kape ve er la." 
Numbers2:1 TER ôr kwagh a Mose man Aron kaa er: 
Numbers2:2 Mbaiserael ve̱ haa afo, hanma or hen tuta u nan, hen akav a sha uya mba uter vev; ve̱ haa afo, ve̱ kase tenti u kohol ker la, ve̱ de sôsom a na yum ga." 
Numbers2:3 Mba vea haa afo vegher u sha ityoughkitaregh, sha pe iyange i dugh la yô, ka: Tuta u hen afo a Yuda, sha akum a ve; orhemenegh u ônov mba Yuda yô, lu Nakeson wan u Aminadabi." 
Numbers2:4 Ikum na la, mba i ôr iyenge ve yô, lu ior dubu akunduatargber kar unyiin man deri ataratar." 
Numbers2:5 Mba vea haa afo á dondo a na yô, i̱ lu kwe u Isakar; orhemenegh u ônov mba Isakar yô, lu Netanel wan u Suar;" 
Numbers2:6 ikum na la, mba i ôr iyenge ve yô, lu ior dubu akunduahargber kar unyiin man deri unyiin." 
Numbers2:7 Man shi kwe u Sebulon; orhemenegh u ônov mba Sebulon yô, lu Eliabi wan u Helon;" 
Numbers2:8 ikum na la, mba i ôr iyenge ve yô, lu ior dubu akunduahargber kar utaankaruhar man deri unyiin." 
Numbers2:9 Mba hen afo a Yuda cii, mba i ôr iyenge ve yô, lu ior dubu deri man akunduanyiin kar ataratar man deri unyiin, sha akum a ve. Ka ve vea hiin moughon ye." 
Numbers2:10 Tuta u afo a Ruben, sha akum a ve, u̱ lu ken vegher u imbusutariyan la; orhemenegh u ônov mba Ruben yô, lu Elisur wan u Sedeur;" 
Numbers2:11 ikum na la, mba i ôr iyenge ve yô, lu ior dubu akunduahar kar ataratar man deri utaan." 
Numbers2:12 Mba vea haa afo á dondo a na yô, i̱ lu kwe u Shimeon; orhemenegh u ônov mba Shimeon yô, lu Selumiel wan u Surisadai;" 
Numbers2:13 ikum na la, mba i ôr iyenge ve yô, ve lu ior dubu akunduahargber kar utaankarunyiin man deri utar." 
Numbers2:14 Man shi kwe u Gadi; orhemenegh u ônov mba Gadi yô, lu Eliasav wan u Reuel;" 
Numbers2:15 ikum na la, mba i ôr iyenge ve yô, lu ior dubu akunduahar kar utaan man deri ataratar man akunduahargber." 
Numbers2:16 Mba hen afo a Ruben cii, mba i ôr iyenge ve yô, lu ior dubu deri môm man dubu akunduahargber kar môm man deri unyiin man akunduahargber, sha akum a ve. Ka ve vea dondo ye." 
Numbers2:17 Tsô tenti u kohol ker la una mough, afo a Mbalevi a̱ lu hen atô u afo agen; er ve hee la, kape ve̱ moughon kpaa la, hanma or sha ijiir i nan, hen tuta ve." 
Numbers2:18 Tuta u afo a Eferaim, sha akum a ve, u̱ lu ken vegher u shin ityôtar la; orhemenegh u ônov mba Eferaim yô, lu Elishama wan u Amihudi;" 
Numbers2:19 ikum na la mba i ôr iyenge ve yô, lu ior dubu akunduahar man deri utaan." 
Numbers2:20 Mba vea haa afo á dondon sha a na yô, i̱ lu kwe u Manase; orhemenegh u ônov mba Manase yô, lu Gamaliel wan u Pedasur;" 
Numbers2:21 ikum na la, mba i ôr iyenge ve yô, lu ior dubu ikundugber kar uhar man deri uhar." 
Numbers2:22 Man kwe u Benyamin; orhemenegh u ônov mba Benyamin yô, lu Abidan, wan u Gideoni;" 
Numbers2:23 ikum na la, mba i ôr iyenge ve yô, lu ior dubu ikundugber kar utaan man deri unyiin." 
Numbers2:24 Mba hen afo a Eferaim cii, mba i ôr iyenge ve yô, lu ior dubu deri kar anigheni man deri môm, sha akum a ve. Ve, ka nongo u sha utar sha mmough ve." 
Numbers2:25 Tuta u afo a Dan, sha akum a ve, u̱ lu ken vegher u imbusutarimese; orhemenegh u ônov mba Dan yô, lu Ahieser, wan u Amisadai;" 
Numbers2:26 ikum na la, mba i ôr iyenge ve yô, lu ior dubu akunduatar kar uhar man deri utaankaruhar." 
Numbers2:27 Mba vea haa afo á dondo a na yô, i̱ lu kwe u Asher; orhemenegh u ônov mba Asher yô, lu Pagiel wan u Okeran;" 
Numbers2:28 ikum na la, mba i ôr iyenge ve yô, lu ior dubu akunduahar kar môm man deri utaan." 
Numbers2:29 Man shi kwe u Nafetali; orhemenegh u ônov mba Nafetali yô, lu Ahira wan u Enan;" 
Numbers2:30 ikum na la, mba i ôr iyenge ve yô, lu ior dubu akunduahargber kar utar man deri unyiin." 
Numbers2:31 Mba hen afo a Dan cii, mba i ôr iyenge ve lu ior dubu deri kar akunduahargber kar utaankaruhar man deri ataratar. Ka ve ve lu mba masen moughon sha tuta ve ye." 
Numbers2:32 Ka Mbaiserael mba i ôr iyenge ve sha uya mba uter vev je ne; mba ken afo, sha akum a ve cii mba i ôr iyenge ve yô, lu ior dubu deri ataratar, dubu kar utar man deri utaan man akunduahargber." 
Numbers2:33 Kpa i ôr iyenge i Mbalevi i wa i ken Mbaiserael ga, er TER kaa Mose nahan." 
Numbers2:34 Mbaiserael er er TER kaa Mose nahan cii, kape ve haan afo hen tuta ve la, shi kape ve moughon kpaa la, hanma or hen ipaven u nan, sha uya mba uter vev." 
Numbers3:1 Ka icombor i Aron man Mose sha iyange i TER ôr kwagh a Mose sha uwo u Senai la ne: 
Numbers3:2 Ati a ônov mba Aron yô, ka a ne: Waniunda lu Nadabi, man Abihu man Eleasar kua Itamar." 
Numbers3:3 Ka ati a ônov mba Aron, upristi mba i shighe ve mkurem, mba i ver ve er ve̱ er tom u pristi je ne." 
Numbers3:4 Kpa Nadabi man Abihu yô, ve kpe sha ishigh ki TER zum u ve na nagh sha usu ugen kposo, sha ishigh ki TER, ken desereti u Senai la, ve mar ônov ga; nahan Eleasar man Itamar, ve gema ve er tom u pristi sha ishigh ki ter ve Aron." 
Numbers3:5 Tsô TER ôr kwagh a Mose, kaa er:" 
Numbers3:6 Kporom a kwe u Levi, ver ve sha ishigh ki pristi Aron, ve̱ wasen un tom." 
Numbers3:7 Ve̱ waan iko sha tom na kua tom u mkohol u ior cii, sha ishigh ki tenti u kohol ker la, ve̱ eren tom u tabernakel la;" 
Numbers3:8 ve̱ kuran ikav mbi tenti u kohol ker la cii, shi ve waan iko sha tom u Mbaiserael ve̱ eren tom u tabernakel la." 
Numbers3:9 Gema Mbalevi na Aron a ônov nav; i tsuwa ve ken Mbaiserael, i na a na un je." 
Numbers3:10 Ver Aron man ônov nav, ve̱ eren tom ve u pristi; or u ken inya nana kporom, her yô, i̱ wua nan." 
Numbers3:11 TER shi ôr kwagh a Mose kaa er: 
Numbers3:12 Ka Mo je, M tsough Mbalevi ken Mbaiserael sha ityough ki mbaiundav mba ve hii duen ken uya, ken Mbaiserael la, Mer, Mbalevi ve̱ lu mba Av ye;" 
Numbers3:13 gadia mbaiundav cii ka mba Av; sha iyange i M wua mbaiundav cii ken tar u Igipiti la, M tsegha mbaiundav mba ken Iserael cii sha ci Wam, mba iorov kua mba uzendenya kpaa; ka mba Av je; ka Mo TER." 
Numbers3:14 TER shi ôr kwagh a Mose ken desereti u Senai, A kaa er:" 
Numbers3:15 Ôr iyenge i ônov mba Levi, sha uya mba uter vev, sha uipaven vev; hanma nomsoor, hii sha mba ve kom uwer môm man mba ve hembe nahan; ka ve, ôr ve ye." 
Numbers3:16 Tsô Mose ôr ve sha imo i TER, er i kaa un nahan." 
Numbers3:17 Ônov mba Levi sha ati ati yô, ka: Gershon man Kohati kua Merari." 
Numbers3:18 Ati a ônov mba Gershon sha uipaven vev yô, ka: Libeni kua Shimei." 
Numbers3:19 Ônov mba Kohati sha uipaven vev yô, ka: Amram kua Isehar man Heberon kua Ushiel." 
Numbers3:20 Ônov mba Merari sha uipaven vev yô, ka: Maheli man Mushi. Mban ka uipaven mba Levi sha uya mba uter vev je ne." 
Numbers3:21 Uipaven mba Gershon yô, ka ipaven u Mbalevi man ipaven u Mbashimei; ka uipaven mba Mbagershon je la." 
Numbers3:22 Ior vev mba i ôr ve, sha iyenge i nomsombaiorov cii, hii sha mba ve kom uwer môm man mba ve hembe nahan, ior vev mba i ôr ve yô, lu ior dubu utaankaruhar man deri utaan." 
Numbers3:23 Uipaven mba Mbagershon yô, ve̱ haan afo ken ijime i tabernakel vegher u shin ityôtar la." 
Numbers3:24 Orhemenegh u hen ya u ter, u Mbagershon yô, lu Eliasav wan u Lael." 
Numbers3:25 Tom u i ver Mbagershon ken tenti u kohol ker la yô, lu u nengen sha tabernakel man tenti a kwagh u cirin sha mi, man kwagh u yisan hunda u tenti u kohol ker la a mi," 
Numbers3:26 man akondo a kasen tembe a mi, man kwagh yisan hunda u tembe a mi u u we tabernakel man atse a nanden nagh sha mi atô la, man ikor na, akaa a sha tom na cii." 
Numbers3:27 Uipaven mba Kohati yô, ka ipaven u Mbaamram man ipaven u Mbaisehar man ipaven u Mbaheberon man ipaven u Mbaushiel, ka uipaven mba Mbakohati je la." 
Numbers3:28 Sha iyenge i nomsombaiorov cii, hii sha mba ve kom uwer môm man mba ve hembe nahan, lu ior dubu anigheni man deri ataratar; tom ve lu u nengen sha icighanjiir." 
Numbers3:29 Uipaven mba ônov mba Kohati ve̱ haan afo hen kpe tabernakel vegher u ken imbusutariyan la. 
Numbers3:30 Orhemenegh u hen ya u ter, u uipaven mba Mbakohati yô, lu Elisafan wan u Ushiel." 
Numbers3:31 Tom ve yô, lu u nengen sha areki man tebul man daarimenger man atse a nanden nagh sha mi, man ikav mbi icighanjiir mbi ve eren tom sha mbi, man ikondo i yisan man tom u sha mi la cii." 
Numbers3:32 Orvesen u mbahemenev mba Mbalevi lu Eleasar wan u pristi Aron, a lu nengen sha mba ve eren tom u icighanjiir la." 
Numbers3:33 Uipaven mba Merari yô, ka ipaven u Mbamaheli man ipaven u Mbamushi, ka uipaven mba Mbamerari je la." 
Numbers3:34 Ior vev mba i ôr ve, sha iyenge i nomsombaiorov cii, hii sha mba ve kom uwer môm man mba ve hembe nahan, lu ior dubu ataratar man deri uhar." 
Numbers3:35 Orhemenegh u hen ya u ter, u uipaven mba Merari yô, lu Suriel wan u Abihail; ve̱ haan afo hen kpe tabernakel vegher u ken imbusutarimese la." 
Numbers3:36 Tom u i ver ônov mba Merari sha mi yô, lu u nengen sha mtôm ma ipeem ma tabernakel man itiran na man mtôm nam man agbur a ma a ikav nav cii, kua tom na cii;" 
Numbers3:37 man mtôm ma tembe ma ma ningir ma tser la, man agbur a ma man amande a ma kua ikor i ma." 
Numbers3:38 Mba ve̱ haan afo sha ishigh ki tabernakel vegher u sha ityoughkitaregh, sha ishigh ki tenti u kohol ker la, sha vegher u iyange i dugh la yô, lu Mose man Aron a ônov nav, mba ve eren tom u ken icighanjiir la, ka tom u i eren Mbaiserael je la; or u ken inya u nana kporom her yô, i̱ wua nan." 
Numbers3:39 Mbalevi mba i ôr iyenge ve cii, mba Mose vea Aron ve ôr iyenge ve sha imo i TER, sha uipaven vev yô, nomsombaiorov cii, hii sha mba ve kom uwer môm man mba ve hembe nahan, lu ior dubu ikundu kar uhar." 
Numbers3:40 TER shi kaa a Mose er: Ôr iyenge i ônovmbaiundav mba nomso mba Iserael cii, hii sha mba ve kom uwer môm man mba ve hembe nahan, kohol iyenge i ati ve." 
Numbers3:41 Man shi ngohol Mbalevi sha ci Wam, ka Mo TER, sha ityough ki ônovmbaiundav mba Iserael cii, man uzendenya mba Mbalevi kpaa sha ityough ki ônovmbaiundav mba uzendenya mba Mbaiserael." 
Numbers3:42 Tsô Mose ôr iyenge i ônovmbaiundav mba Mbaiserael cii er, TER kaa un nahan." 
Numbers3:43 Ônovmbaiundav mba nomso cii, iyenge i ati ve yô, hii sha mba ve kom uwer môm man mba ve hembe nahan, mba i ôr iyenge ve yô, lu ior dubu ikundu kar uhar man deri uhar man akunduatargber kar utar." 
Numbers3:44 TER shi ôr kwagh a Mose kaa er: 
Numbers3:45 Ngohol Mbalevi sha ityough ki ônovmbaiundav mba Iserael man uzendenya mba Mbalevi kpaa sha ityough ki uzendenya vev; Mbalevi ve̱ lu mba Av; ka Mo TER. 
Numbers3:46 Man sha u paan ônovmbaiundav mba Iserael deri uhar man akunduatargber kar utar mba ve hembe Mbalevi ken inya la yô," 
Numbers3:47 ngohol ushekel utaan sha ityough ki hanmô ve; i̱ lu shekel u icighanjiir la, ngohol ye, shekel môm ka ugera ikundu;" 
Numbers3:48 inyaregh ki i paa iyenge i mba ve gande ken inya la a mi yô, gema ki, na Aron a ônov nav." 
Numbers3:49 Tsô Mose ngohol inyaregh ki paan kila hen mba ve gande ken inya ve hembe mba i paa ve sha Mbalevi la. 
Numbers3:50 A ngohol inyaregh hen ônovmbaiundav mba Iserael, ushekel dubu man deri utar man akunduatar kar utaan, lu shekel u icighanjiir la." 
Numbers3:51 Tsô Mose gema inyaregh ki paan kila na Aron man ônov nav, sha imo i TER, er TER kaa Mose nahan." 
Numbers4:1 TER ôr kwagh a Mose man Aron kaa er: 
Numbers4:2 Ôr nen iyenge i ônov mba Kohati ken ônov mba Levi, sha uipaven vev, sha uya mba uter vev," 
Numbers4:3 hii sha mba ve kom anyom ikundugber man mba ve hembe nahan, za kighir sha mba ve kom anyom akunduahargber, mba ve nyôron tom la cii, sha u eren tom u tenti u kohol ker la." 
Numbers4:4 Tom u ônov mba Kohati ken tenti u kohol ker la yô, ka sha uicighanmbaakaav mba hemban cii." 
Numbers4:5 Á kuman u hemben hen afo yô, Aron a̱ nyôr a ônov nav imôngo, ve̱ sagh ikondo i yisan la, ve̱ cir areki u shiada a mi;" 
Numbers4:6 shi ve̱ cir kwaghcirin a mi, u i er sha akôv a ayu yô, man ve̱ mase samber ikondo i lun kwel cii sha mi, shi ve̱ shindi igbough nagh kpaa." 
Numbers4:7 Ve samber ikondo i kwel sha tebul u ubredi mba sha ishi, ve̱ penda utasa man agbande man ugber man ayongo a haan kwagh a mi sha mi; ubredi mba lun her gbem la kpaa, ve̱ lu sha mi;" 
Numbers4:8 ve̱ cir ikondo i nyian dindee sha mi, shi ve̱ cir ngila kwaghcirin mi, u i er sha akôv a ayu yô, ve̱ shindi igbough nagh." 
Numbers4:9 Ve̱ tôô ikondo i kwel ve̱ cir daarimenger u a lu sha ci u iwanger la kua amenger a na man akambe a na man utasa mba kuran il nav man ikav mbi mkurev nav cii, mbi i eren tom a mi sha mi yô;" 
Numbers4:10 ve̱ gema un kua ikav nav cii ve̱ wa ken kwaghcirin a mi, u i er sha akôv a ayu yô, ve̱ penda sha kpande u tôôn kwagh a mi." 
Numbers4:11 Ve̱ samber ikondo i kwel sha atse a zenaria a nanden nagh sha mi la, ve̱ cir kwaghcirin a mi, sha mi, u i er sha akôv a ayu, ve̱ shindi igbough nagh sha mi;" 
Numbers4:12 ve̱ tôô ikav mbi tomov cii, mbi ve eren tom a min ken icighanjiir la, ve̱ wa ken ikondo i kwel, ve̱ cir kwaghcirin a mi, sha mi, u i er sha akôv a ayu yô, ve̱ penda sha kpande u tôôn kwagh a mi." 
Numbers4:13 Ve̱ kura mtwem sha atse a nanden nagh sha mi, ve̱ cir ikondo i nyian dindee sha mi;" 
Numbers4:14 ve̱ gema ikav mbi á cii, mbi i eren tom a mi, ve̱ penda sha mi; ugbande mba tôôn usu a mi man iyôv mbi dughun inyam a mi man indyuhar kua utasa, ikav mbi atsegh cii; ve̱ samber kwaghcirin a mi, sha mi, u i er sha akôv a ayu yô, ve̱ shindi igbough i a." 
Numbers4:15 Zum u Aron a ônov nav vea cir icighanjiir man ikav mbi icighanjiir kera, shighe a kuma u hemben hen afo la yô, ken masejime la, ônov mba Kohati ve̱ va tôô, kpa ve̱ de benden uicighanmbaakaav ave ga, sha er vea kpe ga yô. Ka ikav mbi tenti u kohol ker, mbi ônov mba Kohati vea tôôn je ne." 
Numbers4:16 Tom u Eliasar wan u pristi Aron yô, ka u nengen sha mkurem ma imenger man kwaghhumandoon man nagh ku sha samuyia ku ayange ayange la, man mkurem ma shighen; tom u nengen sha tabernakel cii, man akaa ker cii, icighanjiir a ikav nav." 
Numbers4:17 TER ôr kwagh a Mose man Aron kaa er: 
Numbers4:18 De rumun nen ner i̱ tim kwe u uipaven mba Mbakohati ken Mbalevi kera ga; 
Numbers4:19 kpa er nen a ve nahan, sha er vea lu uma, vea kpe ga yô, zum u vea kporom hen uicighanmbaakaav yô, Aron a ônov nav ve̱ nyôr ve̱ ver hanma or sha tom u nan man ikav mbi nan;" 
Numbers4:20 kpa ve̱ de nyer sha u gbirin ashe sha uicighanmbaakaav côhin kpaa ga, er vea kpe ga yô." 
Numbers4:21 TER ôr kwagh a Mose kaa er: 
Numbers4:22 Ôr iyenge i ônov mba Gershon cii, sha uya mba uter vev, sha uipaven vev," 
Numbers4:23 hii sha mba ve kom anyom ikundugber man mba ve hembe nahan, za kighir sha mba ve kom anyom akunduahargber yô; ôr iyenge ve, mba vea nyôron tom la cii, sha u eren tom u tenti u kohol ker la." 
Numbers4:24 Kwagh u uipaven mba Mbagershon vea eren sha kwagh u tom la man ikav mbi tôôn yô, ka un ne:" 
Numbers4:25 Ve̱ tôôn akondo a tabernakel man tenti u kohol ker la man kwagh u cirin un a mi, man kwaghcirin mi u i er sha akôv a ayu yô, u a masen sha la, man kwagh u yisan hunda u tenti u kohol ker la a mi;" 
Numbers4:26 man akondo a kasen tembe a mi man kwagh u yisan hunda u nyôron sha tembe la a mi u u kase tabernakel man atse a nanden nagh sha mi la, man ikor ve man ikav mbi tomov vev cii; akaa a eren sha mi cii, ve̱ eren a." 
Numbers4:27 Ka sha imo i Aron a ônov nav, ônov mba Gershon vea eren tom ve cii ye, ikav vev mbi tôôn kua tom ve u eren cii; ka ne né tesen ve ikav vev cii mbi vea tôôn ye." 
Numbers4:28 Ka tom u uipaven mba ônov mba Mbagershon sha tenti u kohol ker la je ne; ka Itamar wan u pristi Aron una nengen sha tom ve ye. 
Numbers4:29 Ônov mba Merari yô, ôr iyenge ve sha uipaven vev, sha uya mba uter vev," 
Numbers4:30 hii sha mba ve kom anyom ikundugber man mba ve hembe nahan, za kighir sha mba ve kom anyom akunduahargber yô; ôr iyenge ve, mba vea nyôron tom la cii, sha u eren tom u tenti u kohol ker la." 
Numbers4:31 Ikav mbi vea tôôn, sha kwagh u tom ve u ken tenti u kohol ker la cii yô, ka mtôm ma ipeem ma tabernakel man itiran na man mtôm nam man agbur a ma;" 
Numbers4:32 man mtôm ma ma kasen tembe la, man agbur a ma, man amande a ma kua ikor i ma a ikav mbi tomov cii, man akaa a eren sha mi cii; tesen nen ve ikav mbi tomov sha ati ati, mbi vea tôôn yô." 
Numbers4:33 Ka tom u uipaven mba ônov mba Merari je ne, ityom ve cii sha tenti u kohol ker la; lu Itamar wan u pristi Aron nengen sha ve ye." 
Numbers4:34 Tsô Mose man Aron kua mbahemenev mba mkohol u ior, ve ôr iyenge i ônov mba Kohati sha uipaven vev, sha uya mba uter vev," 
Numbers4:35 hii sha mba ve kom anyom ikundugber man mba ve hembe nahan, za kighir hen mba ve kom anyom akunduahargber yô, mba vea nyôron tom la cii, sha u eren tom u tenti u kohol ker la;" 
Numbers4:36 mba i ôr iyenge ve, sha uipaven vev yô, lu ior dubu uhar man deri utaankaruhar man akunduahargber." 
Numbers4:37 Mban ka uipaven mba Kohati, mba i ôr iyenge ve, mba ve eren tom u tenti u kohol ker la cii, mba Mose man Aron ôr iyenge ve sha imo i TER, sha ikev i Mose je la." 
Numbers4:38 Ônov mba Gershon mba i ôr iyenge ve sha uipaven vev sha uya mba uter vev," 
Numbers4:39 hii sha mba ve kom anyom ikundugber man mba ve hembe nahan, za kighir sha mba ve kom anyom akunduahargber yô, mba vea nyôron tom la cii, sha u eren tom u tenti u kohol ker la yô," 
Numbers4:40 mba i ôr iyenge ve sha uipaven vev, sha uya mba uter vev yô, lu ior dubu uhar man deri ataratar man ikundugber." 
Numbers4:41 Mban ka uipaven mba ônov mba Gershon, mba i ôr iyenge ve, mba vea eren tom u tenti u kohol ker la cii, mba Mose man Aron ôr iyenge ve sha imo i TER yô." 
Numbers4:42 Uipaven mba ônov mba Merari mba i ôr iyenge ve sha uipaven vev sha uya mba uter vev," 
Numbers4:43 hii sha mba ve kom anyom ikundu man mba ve hembe nahan, za kighir sha mba ve kom anyom akunduahargber, mba vea nyôron tom la cii, sha u eren tom u tenti u kohol ker la yô," 
Numbers4:44 mba i ôr iyenge ve sha uipaven vev yô, lu ior dubu utar man deri uhar." 
Numbers4:45 Mban ka uipaven mba ônov mba Merari mba i ôr iyenge ve, mba Mose vea Aron ôr iyenge ve sha imo i TER sha ikev i Mose je la." 
Numbers4:46 Mbalevi mba i ôr iyenge ve cii, mba Mose vea Aron man mbahemenev mba Iserael ve ôr iyenge ve sha uipaven vev sha uya mba uter vev yô," 
Numbers4:47 hii sha mba ve kom anyom ikundugber man mba ve hembe nahan, za kighir sha mba ve kom anyom akunduahargber yô, mba vea nyôron tom la cii, sha u eren tom man u tôôn ikav mbi tenti u kohol ker la yô," 
Numbers4:48 mba i ôr iyenge ve yô, lu ior dubu anigheni man deri utaan man akunduanyiin." 
Numbers4:49 Ka sha imo i TER i ôr iyenge ve sha ikev i Mose ye, hanma or sha tom u nan man sha ikav nav mbi tôôn; kape i ôr iyenge ve la, er TER kaa Mose nahan." 
Numbers5:1 TER ôr kwagh a Mose, kaa er:" 
Numbers5:2 Kaa Mbaiserael, ve̱ due a hanma orimande hen afo kera, man hanma or u kwagh a dugh nan ken iyol a nende inya yô, man hanma or u nan kera lu wang ga, sha ci u nan bende a ku yô." 
Numbers5:3 Shin a lu nomsoor shin a lu kwase kpaa, due nen a ve, ve̱ yem ve̱ za lu ken akôngoafogh, sha u ve̱ de hôngor afo ve, a Mo M tem ker la ga." 
Numbers5:4 Tsô Mbaiserael er nahan, ve due a ve er ve̱ za lu ken akôngoafogh; er TER kaa Mose nahan, kape ônov mba Iserael ve er la." 
Numbers5:5 TER shi ôr kwagh a Mose kaa er: 
Numbers5:6 Kaa a Mbaiserael wer, á lu nomsoor shin kwase nana er ma isholibo i ior ve eren yô, nan kera er a TER sha mimi ga, man ibo á kôr nan yô," 
Numbers5:7 nana̱ pase kwaghbo u nan er la; nahan nana̱ hide a kwagh u nan lu a ibo sha mi la her vough, nana̱ seer môm-ken-utaan sha mi, nana̱ na or u nan er nan kwaghbo la." 
Numbers5:8 Kpa aluer or la nana lu a orpaan u nana ngohol kwagh u á hide a mi la ga yô, nahan kwagh u á hide a mi la, una hingir kwagh u TER, ka kwagh u pristi je la, kua nomiyôngo u wamen a mi kpaa u a na iwom a mi sha ci u nan la." 
Numbers5:9 Hanma nagh ku kenden sha sha uicighanmbaakaav mba Mbaiserael cii, ku ve va na pristi yô, ku̱ hingir kwagh na je." 
Numbers5:10 Uicighanmbaakaav mba hanma or cii, ve̱ hingir kwagh na, kwagh u hanma or nan ne pristi yô, a̱ hingir kwagh na." 
Numbers5:11 TER shi ôr kwagh a Mose kaa er: 
Numbers5:12 Ôr kwagh a Mbaiserael, kaa a ve wer, aluer kwase u ma or una kar kpe, una er nan kwaghbo," 
Numbers5:13 orgen nana yav a na, nom na nana fa ga, man kwagh la kpaa una due ken igbar ga, shin er a hôngor iyol na nahan kpaa, man a zua a shiada sha na ga, shi a kohol un a kwaghbo la ave kpaa ga yô," 
Numbers5:14 aluer jijingi u wan iyol sha kwagh una kende nan sha kwagh u kwase u nan, er a hôngor iyol kera yô; shin jijingi u wan iyol sha kwagh una kende nan sha kwagh u kwase u nan, una hôngor iyol ga kpaa," 
Numbers5:15 or la nana̱ va a kwase u nan la hen pristi, nana̱ va a nagh sha ci u nan, mwem ma shair ma ma kom môm-ken-upue u efa; nana̱ de hee mkurem sha mi ga, shin nana̱ de we libano u human doon sha mi kpaa ga, gadia ka nagh ku sha samuyia ku iyol i wan sha kwagh, ka nagh ku sha samuyia ku umbur kwagh, ku ku umbur ifer yô." 
Numbers5:16 Pristi a̱ kporom a kwase la, a̱ ver un sha ishigh ki TER;" 
Numbers5:17 nahan pristi a̱ tôô icighanmnger hen ityegh ki inyaagh, pristi a̱ ongo vuulevu hen inya ken tabernakel, a̱ haa shin mnger;" 
Numbers5:18 tsô pristi a̱ ver kwase la, a̱ tile sha ishigh ki TER, a̱ sagh kwase la ice, a̱ penda nagh ku sha samuyia ku umbur kwagh sha ave a kwase la, ka nagh ku sha samuyia ku iyol i wan sha kwagh je la; pristi a̱ gema a lu a mngerem ma nan mnyoonom ma van a ifan sha uwegh nagh;" 
Numbers5:19 pristi a̱ er kwase la a̱ bum, a̱ kaa a kwase la er: Aluer orgen nan yav a we ga, man er u lu a nomu ne, wea kaha wea er kwagh u hôngorough ga yô, u ngu a ishô sha mngerem ma nan mnyoonom ma van a ifan ne, ma de eren we kwagh ga;" 
Numbers5:20 kpa aluer u kaha er u lu a nomu ne, u hôngor iyol you, orgen u nan lu nomu ga nan yav a we yô," 
Numbers5:21 pristi a̱ er kwase la a̱ bum mbum u wan or ifan, pristi a̱ kaa a kwase la er: TER A̱ er u hingir kwagh u wan ifan a mi man u eren ishor a mi hen ior ou, sha m-er u TER Una er u akooso ou á uma man iyav ou mbua mor la." 
Numbers5:22 Mngerem ma van a ifan man maa nyôr u shin uya maa mor u iyav, maa uma u akooso; nahan kwase la a̱ rumun er: Amen, Amen." 
Numbers5:23 Nahan pristi a̱ nger ifan la sha ruamabera, a̱ ôô i shin mngerem ma nan mnyoonom mara;" 
Numbers5:24 a̱ na kwase la, a̱ ma mngerem ma nan mnyoonom ma van a ifan mara; tsô mngerem ma van a ifan mara maa nyôr un shin uya, maa gba nyoon un." 
Numbers5:25 Pristi a̱ ngohol nagh ku sha samuyia ku iyol i wan sha kwagh, sha ikev i kwase la, a̱ cia nagh ku sha samuyia kura sha ishigh ki TER, a̱ va a ku hen atse a nanden nagh sha mi;" 
Numbers5:26 pristi a̱ ongo nagh ku sha samuyia kura ikevwe poo i̱ lu nagh ku umbur ku ku, a̱ nande ku sha atse a nanden nagh sha mi; ken masetyô yô, a̱ na kwase la mngerem mara a̱ ma." 
Numbers5:27 Una na kwase mngerem mara una maan yô, aluer una hôngor iyol na, una er nom na kwaghbo yô, mngerem ma van a ifan mara maa nyôr un ken uya, maa gba nyoon un, iyav nav mbua mor, akooso na aa uma, kwase la una hingir kwagh u wan ifan a mi hen ior nav." 
Numbers5:28 Kpa aluer kwase la una hôngor iyol na ga, una lu wang yô, una war una mar ônov." 
Numbers5:29 Ka tindi u iyol i wan sha kwagh ne: Aluer kwase u lun a nom una kar kpe una hôngor iyol na," 
Numbers5:30 shin aluer jijingi u wan iyol sha kwagh una kende or nana wa iyol sha kwase u nan yô, nana̱ ver kwase la sha ishigh ki TER, pristi a̱ er a kwase la sha tindi ne cii." 
Numbers5:31 Or la nana lu a ibo ga; kpa kwase la yô, una lu a ibo iyol." 
Numbers6:1 TER shi ôr kwagh a Mose, kaa er:" 
Numbers6:2 Ôr kwagh a Mbaiserael, kaa a ve wer, aluer nomsoor shin kwase nana tsegha zwa sha ma kwagh, a lu iceghzwa i ornaseri sha u tseghan iyol i nan sha ci u Ter yô," 
Numbers6:3 nana̱ tswer wain man msôrom; nana̱ de kera me vineger u wain shin vineger u msôr kpaa ga; man shi nana̱ de kera me ma zar u atam a wain ga, man nana̱ de kera ye atam a wain ga, shin a ndor shin a ombor kpaa ga." 
Numbers6:4 Sha ayange a mtsegh u nan cii, nana̱ de kera ye ma kwagh u a dugh ken itine i wain ga, hii sha asange a na je kua apusu na kpaa." 
Numbers6:5 Ayange a iceghzwa, i nan tsegh iyol i nan la cii, nana̱ de ze atsem sha ityou ga zan zan ayange a nan tsegh iyol i nan sha ci u TER la a̱ bee; nana̱ lu icighanor, nana̱ de ice i nan i̱ ume." 
Numbers6:6 Ayange a nan tsegh iyol i nan sha ci u TER la cii, nana̱ de mgbôghom a ikom ga," 
Numbers6:7 shin a lu ter u nan, shin ngô u nan, shin anngô u nan u nomso, shin anngô u nan u kwase, nana̱ de hôngor iyol i nan sha ve, zum u ve kpe la ga; gadia mtsegh u nan tsegh iyol i nan sha ci u Aôndo la, ngu sha ityough ki nan je." 
Numbers6:8 Ayange a mtsegh u nan la cii, nan ngu icighanor u TER je." 
Numbers6:9 Aluer ma or á kpe ikua ikua a nan fese man nana vihi ityough ki nan ki nan tsegh ki la yô, nahan nana̱ hondo ityough ki nan sha iyange i mwanger u nan; ka sha iyange i ataankarahar la, nana̱ hondo ki ye." 
Numbers6:10 Sha iyange i anigheni la, nana̱ va a mbaatii uhar shin utulembamkunguv uhar hen pristi, hen hunda u tenti u kohol ker la;" 
Numbers6:11 pristi a̱ na nagh ku isholibo sha u môm, a̱ gema ugen la, a̱ na nagh ku nanden a mi, a̱ na iwom sha ci u nan, sha ci u nan er isholibo sha kwagh u kuugh la yô; a̱ tsegha ityough ki nan sha iyange la je." 
Numbers6:12 Nahan nana̱ tsegha TER ayange a mtsegh u nan, nana̱ va a gumiyôngo u a kom inyom i môm yô, sha ci u nagh ku iboogh; kpa ayange a a kar la yô, a hingir gbilin je ve, sha ci u mtsegh u nan tsegh iyol i nan la hôngor." 
Numbers6:13 Tindi u sha ornaseri, aluer ayange a mtsegh u nan a bee yô, ka un ne: i̱ va a nan hen hunda u tenti u kohol ker la," 
Numbers6:14 nana̱ na TER nagh ku nan; gumiyôngo môm u a kom inyom i môm u a lu a ihogholough iyol ga yô, sha ci u nagh ku nanden, man tuleiyôngo môm u a kom inyom i môm u a lu a ihogholough iyol ga yô, sha ci u nagh ku isholibo, man nomiyôngo môm u a lu a ihogholough iyol ga yô, sha ci u nagh ku bem;" 
Numbers6:15 man ikese i bredi u i we kwa sha mi ga yô, man umasa mba sha mwem ma kengese ma i nongo mkurem sha mi yô, man umasa mba par par mba i we kwa sha mi ga, i shigh a shighe ve mkurem yô, man nagh ku sha samuyia man iniav vev mbi man mbi maghen sha mi la." 
Numbers6:16 Pristi a̱ va a mi sha ishigh ki TER, a̱ na nagh ku nan ku isholibo man nagh ku nanden;" 
Numbers6:17 a̱ va a nomiyôngo la, a̱ na TER nagh ku sôngon ku bem a mi kua ikese i bredi u i we kwa sha mi ga kpaa, shi pristi a̱ na nagh ku sha samuyia ku maghen sha mi kua nagh ku man kpaa." 
Numbers6:18 Nahan ornaseri la, nana̱ hondo ityough ki nan tsegh la, hen hunda u tenti u kohol ker la, nana̱ kura ice i sha ityough ki nan, ki nan tsegh la, nana̱ haa sha usu u u lu shin nagh ku sôngon ku nagh ku bem la." 
Numbers6:19 Pristi a̱ tôô kpaakpawe u nomiyôngo u i jiidi la, shi a̱ dugh masa shin ikese la môm u i we kwa sha mi ga yô, man shi masa u par par môm u i we kwa sha mi ga yô, a̱ penda ornaseri la sha ave, zum u nan hondo ityough ki nan ki nan tsegh la kera yô." 
Numbers6:20 Nahan pristi a̱ cia a mi, a̱ hingir nagh ku cian sha ishigh ki TER; a̱ lu icighankwagh u pristi, kua gugu u i cie a mi man namegh ku kenden sha; ken masetyô yô, ornaseri la, nana̱ gba man wain." 
Numbers6:21 Ka tindi u ornaseri u nan tsegh zwa je ne, ka nagh ku nana̱ na TER sha ci u mtsegh u nan la, kua akaa agen a nan fetyô u nan yô; er nan tsegh zwa la, nana̱ er di sha tindi u mtsegh u i tsegh nan er nan lu ornaseri la." 
Numbers6:22 TER shi ôr kwagh a Mose kaa er: 
Numbers6:23 Ôr kwagh a Aron kua ônov nav kaa wer: Veren nen Mbaiserael nahan ner: 
Numbers6:24 TER A̱ ver u shi A̱ kura u; 
Numbers6:25 TER A̱ er ishigh Nagh ki̱ wanger sha a we, A̱ zungwe u mhôônom;" 
Numbers6:26 TER A̱ ver ishigh Nagh sha we, A̱ na u bem." 
Numbers6:27 Kape ve̱ veren iti Yam sha Mbaiserael la; Mo Me veren ve doo doo. 
Numbers7:1 Tsô sha iyange i Mose tim tabernakel kera la, a shighe un mkurem a tsegha un kua ikav mbi kimi cii, man atse a nanden nagh sha mi kua ikav mbi a cii kpaa; er a shighe mbi mkurem a tsegha mbi kera la," 
Numbers7:2 mbahemenev mba Iserael, uityombaiorov, mba sha uya mba uter vev, va na nagh; ka mba ve lu mbahemenev sha ikwe, mba ve lu nengen sha mba i ôr iyenge ve la;" 
Numbers7:3 ve va a nagh vegh sha ishigh ki TER; akeke a kpelan ikav ataratar a lun a haav, man ibua pue kar ihiar; mbahemenev uhar na ikyekye i môm, hanma orhemen na bua môm, ve va na hen hunda u tabernakel." 
Numbers7:4 Tsô TER ôr kwagh a Mose, kaa er:" 
Numbers7:5 Ngohol a hen ve sha u á eren tom u tenti u kohol ker la a mi yô, gema a, na Mbalevi, na hanma or sha mlu u tom u nan." 
Numbers7:6 Tsô Mose ngohol akeke a kpelan ikav kua ibua la, na Mbalevi." 
Numbers7:7 Akeke ahar kua ibua inyiin, a na ônov mba Gershon, sha mlu u tom ve;" 
Numbers7:8 akeke anyiin man ibua anigheni, a na ônov mba Merari, sha mlu u tom ve, sha ikev i Itamar wan u pristi Aron." 
Numbers7:9 Kpa ônov mba Kohati yô, a na ve kwagh ga, gadia ve, ve lu eren tom u icighanjiir, ve tôôn ikav nav sha avande." 
Numbers7:10 Mbahemenev va a nagh ku tseghan atse a nanden nagh la, sha iyange i i shigh a mkurem la; mbahemenev va na nagh vegh sha ishigh ki atsegh." 
Numbers7:11 TER kaa a Mose er: Ve̱ na nagh vegh, hanma orhemenegh nana̱ na sha iyange i nan kposo, sha ci u tseghan atse a mi." 
Numbers7:12 Or u nan na nagh ku nan sha iyange i hiihii la yô, lu Nakeson wan u Aminadabi u ken kwe u Yuda;" 
Numbers7:13 nagh nagh yô, lu tasa u azurfa môm, myohom nam lu ushekel deri man ikundugber, man iwese i azurfa môm u sha ushekel akunduatargber, lu shekel u icighanjiir la; ve uhar cii ve iv a mwem ma kengese ma i nongo mkurem sha mi yô, sha ci u nagh ku sha samuyia;" 
Numbers7:14 gbande u zenaria môm u sha ushekel pue, iv a kwaghhumandoon u nanden;" 
Numbers7:15 gumbua môm, nomiyôngo môm, gumiyôngo môm u a kom inyom i môm yô, sha ci u nagh ku nanden;" 
Numbers7:16 kpev môm, sha ci u nagh ku isholibo;" 
Numbers7:17 man nagh ku sôngon ku bem yô, lu: ibua ihiar, anomaiyôngo ataan, ukpev utaan, agumaiyôngo ataan a a kom inyom i môm i môm yô; ka nagh ku Nakeson wan u Aminadabi je ne." 
Numbers7:18 Sha iyange i sha uhar la Netanel wan u Suar, orhemenegh u Isakar na nagh;" 
Numbers7:19 nagh nagh ku a na yô, lu tasa u azurfa môm, myohom nam lu ushekel deri man ikundugber, man iwese u azurfa môm u sha ushekel akunduatargber, lu shekel u icighanjiir la; ve uhar cii ve iv a mwem ma kengese ma i nongo mkurem sha mi yô, sha ci u nagh ku sha samuyia;" 
Numbers7:20 gbande u zenaria môm u sha ushekel pue, iv a kwaghhumandoon u nanden;" 
Numbers7:21 gumbua môm, nomiyôngo môm, gumiyôngo môm u a kom inyom i môm yô, sha ci u nagh ku nanden;" 
Numbers7:22 kpev môm sha ci u nagh ku isholibo; 
Numbers7:23 man nagh ku sôngon ku bem yô, lu: ibua ihiar, anomaiyôngo ataan, ukpev utaan, agumaiyôngo ataan a a kom inyom i môm i môm yô; ka nagh ku Netanel wan u Suar je ne." 
Numbers7:24 Sha iyange i sha utar la, Eliabi wan u Helon, orhemenegh u ônov mba Sebulon;" 
Numbers7:25 nagh nagh yô, lu tasa u azurfa môm, myohom nam lu ushekel deri man ikundugber, man iwese u azurfa môm u sha ushekel akunduatargber, lu shekel u icighanjiir la; ve uhar cii ve iv a mwem ma kengese ma i nongo mkurem sha min yô, sha ci u nagh ku sha samuyia;" 
Numbers7:26 gbande u zenaria môm u sha ushekel pue, iv a kwaghhumandoon u nanden;" 
Numbers7:27 gumbua môm, nomiyôngo môm, gumiyôngo môm u a kom inyom i môm yô, sha ci u nagh ku nanden;" 
Numbers7:28 kpev môm sha ci u nagh ku isholibo; 
Numbers7:29 man nagh ku sôngon ku bem yô, lu: ibua ihiar, anomaiyôngo ataan, ukpev utaan, agumaiyôngo ataan a a kom inyom i môm i môm yô; ka nagh ku Eliabi, wan u Helon je ne" 
Numbers7:30 Sha iyange i sha unyiin la Elisur wan u Sedeur orhemenegh u ônov mba Ruben," 
Numbers7:31 nagh nagh yô, lu tasa u azurfa môm, myohom nam lu ushekel deri man ikundugber, man iwese u azurfa môm u sha ushekel akunduatargber, lu shekel u icighanjiir la; ve uhar cii, ve iv a mwem ma kengese ma i nongo mkurem sha min yô, sha ci u nagh ku sha samuyia;" 
Numbers7:32 gbande u zenaria môm u sha ushekel pue, iv a kwaghhumandoon u nanden;" 
Numbers7:33 gumbua môm, nomiyôngo môm, gumiyôngo môm u a kom inyom i môm yô, sha ci u nagh ku nanden;" 
Numbers7:34 kpev môm sha ci u nagh ku isholibo; 
Numbers7:35 man nagh ku sôngon ku bem yô, lu: ibua ihiar, anomaiyôngo ataan, ukpev utaan, agumaiyôngo ataan a a kom inyom i môm i môm yô; ka nagh ku Elisur, wan u Sedeur je ne." 
Numbers7:36 Sha iyange i sha utaan la Selumiel wan u Surisadai, orhemenegh u ônov mba Shimeon;" 
Numbers7:37 nagh nagh yô, lu tasa u azurfa môm, myohom nam lu ushekel deri man ikundugber, man iwese u azurfa môm u sha ushekel akunduatargber, lu shekel u icighanjiir la; ve uhar cii ve iv a mwem ma kengese ma i nongo mkurem sha min yô, sha ci u nagh ku sha samuyia;" 
Numbers7:38 gbande u zenaria môm u sha ushekel pue, iv a kwaghhumandoon u nanden;" 
Numbers7:39 gumbua môm, nomiyôngo môm, gumiyôngo môm u a kom inyom i môm yô, sha ci u nagh ku nanden;" 
Numbers7:40 kpev môm sha ci u nagh ku isholibo; 
Numbers7:41 man nagh ku sôngon ku bem yô, lu: ibua ihiar, anomaiyôngo ataan ukpev utaan, agumaiyôngo ataan a a kom inyom i môm môm yô; ka nagh ku Selumiel wan u Surisadai je ne." 
Numbers7:42 Sha iyange i sha ataratar la, Eliasav wan u Reuel, orhemenegh u ônov mba Gadi;" 
Numbers7:43 nagh nagh yô, lu tasa u azurfa môm, myohom nam lu ushekel deri man ikundugber, man iwese u azurfa môm u sha ushekel akunduatargber, lu shekel u icighanjiir la; ve uhar cii ve iv a mwem ma kengese ma i nongo mkurem sha min yô, sha ci u nagh ku sha samuyia;" 
Numbers7:44 gbande u zenaria môm u sha ushekel pue, iv a kwaghhumandoon u nanden;" 
Numbers7:45 gumbua môm, nomiyôngo môm, gumiyôngo u a kom inyom i môm yô, sha ci u nagh ku nanden;" 
Numbers7:46 kpev môm sha ci u nagh ku isholibo; 
Numbers7:47 man nagh ku sôngon ku bem yô, lu; ibua ihiar, anomaiyôngo ataan, ukpev utaan, agumaiyôngo ataan a a kom inyom i môm i môm yô; ka nagh ku Eliasav wan u Reuel je ne." 
Numbers7:48 Sha iyange i sha utaankaruhar la, Elishama wan u Amihudi, orhemenegh u ônov mba Eferaim;" 
Numbers7:49 nagh nagh yô, lu tasa u azurfa môm myohom nam lu ushekel deri man ikundugber, man iwese i azurfa môm u sha ushekel akunduatargber lu shekel u icighanjiir la; ve uhar cii ve iv a mwem ma kengese ma i nongo mkurem sha min yô, sha ci u nagh ku sha samuyia;" 
Numbers7:50 gbande u zenaria môm u sha ushekel pue, iv a kwaghhumandoon u nanden;" 
Numbers7:51 gumbua môm, nomiyôngo môm, gumiyôngo môm u a kom inyom i môm yô, sha ci u nagh ku nanden;" 
Numbers7:52 kpev môm sha ci u nagh ku isholibo; 
Numbers7:53 man nagh ku sôngon ku bem yô, lu: ibua ihiar, anomaiyôngo ataan, ukpev utaan, agumaiyôngo ataan a a kom inyom i môm i môm yô; ka nagh ku Elishama, wan u Amihudi je ne." 
Numbers7:54 Sha iyange i sha anigheni la, Gamaliel wan u Pedasur, orhemenegh u ônov mba Manase;" 
Numbers7:55 nagh nagh yô, lu tasa u azurfa môm, myohom nam ku ushekel deri man ikundugber, man iwese u azurfa môm u sha ushekel akunduatargber, lu shekel u icighanjiir la; ve uhar cii ve iv a mwem ma kengese ma i nongo mkurem sha min yô, sha ci u nagh ku sha samuyia;" 
Numbers7:56 gbande u zenaria môm u sha ushekel pue, iv a kwaghhumandoon u nanden;" 
Numbers7:57 gumbua môm, nomiyôngo môm, gumiyôngo môm u a kom inyom i môm yô, sha ci u nagh ku nanden;" 
Numbers7:58 kpev môm sha ci u nagh ku isholibo; 
Numbers7:59 man nagh ku sôngon ku bem yô, lu: ibua ihiar, anomaiyôngo ataan, ukpev utaan, agumaiyôngo ataan a a kom inyom i môm i môm; yô ka nagh ku Gamaliel, wan u Pedasur je ne." 
Numbers7:60 Sha iyange i sha utaankarunyiin la, Abidan wan u Gideoni, orhemenegh u ônov mba Benyamin;" 
Numbers7:61 nagh nagh yô, lu tasa u azurfa môm, myohom nam lu ushekel deri man ikundugber, man iwese u azurfa môm u sha ushekel akunduatargber, lu shekel u icighanjiir la; ve uhar cii ve iv a mwem ma kengese ma i nongo mkurem sha min yô, sha ci u nagh ku sha samuyia;" 
Numbers7:62 gbande u zenaria môm u sha ushekel pue, iv a kwaghhumandoon u nanden;" 
Numbers7:63 gumbua môm, nomiyôngo môm, gumiyôngo môm u a kom inyom i môm yô, sha ci u nagh ku nanden;" 
Numbers7:64 kpev môm sha ci u nagh ku isholibo; 
Numbers7:65 man nagh ku sôngon ku bem yô, lu: ibua ihiar, anomaiyôngo ataan, ukpev utaan, agumaiyôngo ataan a a kom inyom i môm i môm yô; ka nagh ku Abidan wan u Gideoni je ne." 
Numbers7:66 Sha iyange i sha pue la, Ahieser wan u Amisadai, orhemenegh u ônov mba Dan;" 
Numbers7:67 nagh nagh yô, lu tasa u azurfa môm, myohom nam lu ushekel deri man ikundugber, man iwese u azurfa môm u sha ushekel akunduatargber, lu shekel u icighanjiir la; ve uhar cii ve iv a mwem ma kengese ma i nongo mkurem sha min yô, sha ci u nagh ku sha samuyia;" 
Numbers7:68 gbande u zenaria môm u sha ushekel pue iv a kwaghhumandoon u nanden; 
Numbers7:69 gumbua môm, nomiyôngo môm, gumiyôngo môm u a kom inyom i môm yô, sha ci u nagh ku nanden;" 
Numbers7:70 kpev môm sha ci u nagh ku isholibo; 
Numbers7:71 man nagh ku sôngon ku bem yô, lu: ibua ihiar, anomaiyôngo ataan, ukpev utaan, agumaiyôngo ataan a a kom inyom i môm i môm yô; ka nagh ku Ahieser, wan u Amisadai je ne." 
Numbers7:72 Sha iyange i sha pue kar môm la, Pagiel wan u Okeran, orhemenegh u ônov mba Asher;" 
Numbers7:73 nagh nagh yô, lu tasa u azurfa môm, myohom nam lu ushekel deri man ikundugber, man iwese u azurfa môm u sha ushekel akunduatargber, lu shekel u icighanjiir la; ve uhar cii ve iv a mwem ma kengese ma i nongo mkurem sha min yô, sha ci u nagh ku sha samuyia;" 
Numbers7:74 gbande u zenaria môm u sha ushekel pue, iv a kwaghhumandoon u nanden;" 
Numbers7:75 gumbua môm, nomiyôngo môm, gumiyôngo môm, u a kom inyom i môm yô, sha ci u nagh ku nanden;" 
Numbers7:76 kpev môm sha ci u nagh ku isholibo; 
Numbers7:77 man nagh ku sôngon ku bem yô, lu: ibua ihiar, anomaiyôngo ataan, ukpev utaan, agumaiyôngo ataan a a kom inyom i môm i môm yô; ka nagh ku Pagiel wan u Okeran je ne." 
Numbers7:78 Sha iyange i sha pue kar uhar la Ahira, wan u Enan, orhemenegh u ônov mba Nafetali;" 
Numbers7:79 nagh nagh yô, lu tasa u azurfa môm, myohom nam lu ushekel deri man ikundugber, man iwese u azurfa môm, u sha ushekel akunduatargber, lu shekel u hen icighanjiir la; ve uhar cii ve iv a mwem ma kengese ma i nongo mkurem sha min yô, sha ci u nagh ku sha samuyia;" 
Numbers7:80 gbande u zenaria môm u sha ushekel pue, iv a kwaghhumandoon u nanden;" 
Numbers7:81 gumbua môm nomiyôngo môm, gumiyôngo môm u a kom inyom i môm yô, sha ci u nagh ku nanden;" 
Numbers7:82 kpev môm sha ci u nagh ku isholibo; 
Numbers7:83 man nagh ku sôngon ku bem yô, lu: ibua ihiar, anomaiyôngo ataan, ukpev utaan, agumaiyôngo ataan a a kom inyom i môm i môm yô; ka nagh ku Ahira wan u Enan je ne." 
Numbers7:84 Ka iwua i sha mtsegh u atse a nanden nagh sha mi la, i mbahemenev mba Iserael na, sha iyange i i shighe a mkurem je la; utasa mba azurfa pue kar uhar, iwese i azurfa pue kar ihiar, agbande a zenaria pue ka ahar;" 
Numbers7:85 hanma tasa u azurfa lu ushekel deri man ikundugber, hanma iwese lu ushekel akunduatargber; azurfa u ikav mbila cii kuma ushekel dubu uhar man deri unyiin, lu shekel u icighanjiir la;" 
Numbers7:86 agbande a zenaria pue kar ahar, a a iv a kwaghhumandoon u nanden, hanma gbande lu ushekel pue, lu shekel u icighanjiir la; zenaria u agbande la cii, kuma ushekel deri man ikundu;" 
Numbers7:87 ibua i nan nagh ku nanden a mi cii lu: anomabua pue kar ahar, anomaiyôngo pue kar ahar, agumaiyôngo a a kom inyom i môm i môm kpaa pue kar ahar a nagh ku a ku sha samuyia; ukpev sha ci u nagh ku isholibo, pue kar uhar;" 
Numbers7:88 ibua sha ci u nagh ku sôngon ku bem cii yô, lu: anomabua ikundu kar anyiin, anomaiyôngo akunduatar, ukpev akunduatar, agumaiyôngo a a kom inyom i môm i môm kpaa akunduatar. Ka iwua i sha mtsegh u atse a nanden nagh sha mi er i shighe a mkurem kera la je la." 
Numbers7:89 Zum u Mose nyôr ken tenti u kohol ker la, sha u ôron kwagh a Na yô, a ungwa Imo lu ôron kwagh a na sha ijiir i nan iwom her i i lu sha areki u shiada hen atô u ucerubi uhar la; tsô A ôr kwagh a na." 
Numbers8:1 TER ôr kwagh a Mose, kaa er:" 
Numbers8:2 Ôr kwagh a Aron kaa un wer: Zum u ú tsar amenger yô, amenger a ataankarahar la, a̱ wanger ken hemen u daarimenger." 
Numbers8:3 Aron er nahan; a tsar amenger sha u a̱ wanger ken hemen u daarimenger, er TER kaa Mose nahan." 
Numbers8:4 M-er u daarimenger la yô, i var un a var sha zenaria; ityô na kua uimondon nav cii, i var a var; lu sha ikav i TER tese Mose, kape a er daarimenger je la." 
Numbers8:5 TER ôr kwagh a Mose, kaa er:" 
Numbers8:6 Dugh Mbalevi ken Mbaiserael ver ve kposo, wanger ve." 
Numbers8:7 Kwagh u ú er ve sha u wanger ve yô, ka un ne: Mishi ve mngerem ma ôôn isholibo; shi ve̱ zende atsem iyol cii, ve̱ ôô akondo a ve, ve̱ wanger ayol a ve." 
Numbers8:8 Ve̱ va a gumbua a nagh ku sha samuyia ku i magh sha mi la, ka mwem ma kengese ma i nongo mkurem sha min yô; shi kôr nombua ugen kpaa sha ci u nagh ku isholibo." 
Numbers8:9 Va a Mbalevi hen hunda u tenti u kohol ker la; kohol ior i Mbaiserael cii; 
Numbers8:10 ver Mbalevi sha ishigh ki TER; Mbaiserael ve̱ penda Mbalevi ave iyol. 
Numbers8:11 Aron a̱ gema Mbalevi a̱ cia nagh ku cian a mi, sha ishigh ki TER, sha ci u Mbaiserael; i̱ ver ve ve̱ lu mba eren tom u TER." 
Numbers8:12 Mbalevi ve̱ penda ave ve sha ityouv mbi ibua; gema u môm na TER nagh ku isholibo a mi, shi gema ugen la na nagh ku nanden a mi, ku̱ hingir iwom sha ci u Mbalevi." 
Numbers8:13 Ver Mbalevi ve̱ tile sha ishigh ki Aron kua ônov nav, gema ve, cia nagh ku cian a mi sha ci u TER." 
Numbers8:14 Kape ú dugh Mbalevi ken Mbaiserael, ú ver ve kposo la; Mbalevi ve̱ lu mba Av." 
Numbers8:15 Ken masetyô la, Mbalevi ve nyôr sha u eren tom u tenti u kohol ker la; wanger ve, gema cia nagh ku cian a mi." 
Numbers8:16 Gadia i tsuwa ve ken Mbaiserael i nam a na je, M ngohol ve sha ityough ki hanma wan u a hii duen ken uya yô, ka mbaiundav mba Mbaiserael cii je la." 
Numbers8:17 Gadia ônovmbaiundav mba ken Mbaiserael cii ka mba Av, mba iorov kua mba uzendenya cii; sha iyange i M wua mbaiundav mba ken tar u Igipiti cii la, M tsegha ve sha ci Wam iyol Yam." 
Numbers8:18 M ngohol Mbalevi sha ityough ki mbaiundav mba ken Mbaiserael cii. 
Numbers8:19 M tsuwa Mbalevi ken Mbaiserael M gema ve M na Aron a ônov nav, ve̱ eren tom u Mbaiserael ken tenti u kohol ker la, shi ve̱ naan iwom sha ci u Mbaiserael, sha er bouange a̱ de luun ken Mbaiserael, sha mkporom u Mbaiserael vea kporom hen icighanjiir la ga." 
Numbers8:20 Kape Mose man Aron man ior i Mbaiserael cii ve er a Mbalevi la, er TER kaa Mose er a̱ er a Mbalevi la cii yô, kape Mbaiserael er a ve je la." 
Numbers8:21 Mbalevi wanger asorabo a ve kera, shi ve ôô akondo a ve kpaa; Aron gema ve, cia nagh ku cian a mi, sha ishigh ki TER; Aron na iwom sha ci ve, sha u wanger ve." 
Numbers8:22 Ken masetyô la, Mbalevi nyôr ken tenti u kohol ker la, sha u eren tom ve sha ishigh ki Aron man ônov nav; er TER kaa Mose er a̱ er a Mbalevi la, kape i er a ve je la." 
Numbers8:23 TER shi ôr kwagh a Mose kaa er: 
Numbers8:24 Mbalevi yô, kape kwagh ve una lu ne, hii sha or u nan kom anyom ikundu kar ataan man u nan hembe nahan, ka nan nana va nyôr tom u tenti u kohol ker la ye;" 
Numbers8:25 kpa or u nan kom anyom akunduahargber yô, nana̱ de tom la, nana̱ de kera yaren u ga;" 
Numbers8:26 kpa nana̱ wasen di a wase anmgbianev mba nan ken tenti u kohol ker la, sha tom ve tsô; kpa tom la yô, ve̱ de hoghom sha mi ga. Kape ú er a Mbalevi sha kwagh u tom ve la." 
Numbers9:1 TER or kwagh a Mose ken desereti u Senai sha inyom i sha uhar sha uwer u hiihii er ve due ken tar u Igipiti kera la, A kaa er:" 
Numbers9:2 Mbaiserael ve̱ ver ishima ve̱ yaan Paseka sha shighe u i ver la vough. 
Numbers9:3 Uwer ne, sha ayange a u pue kar anyiin, aikighe, ya nen un sha shighe u i ver la, sha atindi na cii man sha akaawan a na cii kape ya nen un la." 
Numbers9:4 Mose gema kaa a Mbaiserael er, ve̱ ya Paseka." 
Numbers9:5 Tsô ve ya Paseka ken uwer u hiihii la, sha ayange a u pue kar anyiin, aikighe, ken desereti u Senai; er TER kaa Mose nahan, kape Mbaiserael ve er je la." 
Numbers9:6 Kpa ior mbagenev lu, mba ve lu wang ga sha ci u ve bende a ikomor yô, nahan ve fatyô u yan Paseka sha iyange la ga; nahan ve va hen Mose vea Aron sha iyange la je;" 
Numbers9:7 ior mbala kaa a na er: Se yô, se kera mba wang ga, sha ci u se bende a ikomor yô, man ka nyi i yange se u nan TER nagh a Mbaiserael imôngo sha shighe u i ver laa?" 
Numbers9:8 Tsô Mose kaa a ve er: Hira tile, nen, m̱ ungwa kwagh u TER Una kaa sha kwagh wen ve." 
Numbers9:9 Tsô TER ôr kwagh a Mose, kaa er:" 
Numbers9:10 Ôr kwagh a Mbaiserael kaa a ve wer: Aluer hanma or ken a ven shin ken tsombor wen nana kera lu wang ga sha ci u nan bende a ikomor yô, shin nana lu ken zende ca, nahan kpaa, nana ya Paseka u TER." 
Numbers9:11 Uwer u sha uhar sha ayange a u pue kar anyiin la, aikighe, ve̱ ya un sha bredi u i we kwa sha mi ga yô, kua ika i yuan;" 
Numbers9:12 ve̱ de deen ma kwagh na a luun her zan zan sev mbu aven ga, man ve̱ de sombon kuhe na kpaa ga; ka sha atindi a Paseka vough ve̱ yaan un ye." 
Numbers9:13 Kpa or u nan lu wang nan lu ken zende kpaa ga, man nan we iko u yan Paseka ga yô, i̱ dugh nan ken nongo u nan kera, gadia nan na TER nagh sha shighe u i ver la ga, or la nana tôô isholibo i nan." 
Numbers9:14 Aluer shiror u nan va nyer ne a nyôr, man á sar nan ka yan Paseka u TER yô, nana̱ ya un sha tindi u Paseka kua kwaghwan na kpaa, lu nen a tindi môm sha ci u shiror kua or u tar la jim." 
Numbers9:15 Iyange i i tim tabernakel la, ibeenegh sen cir tabernakel, ka tenti u shiada je la; iyange ia been yô, ki lu sha tabernakel er ka usu nahan zan zan sev mbu kar aven." 
Numbers9:16 Kape i luun gbem la, ibeenegh ki cir un; tugh yô, ki lu er usu nahan." 
Numbers9:17 Hanma shighe u ibeenegh kia moughon sha tenti kera yô, Mbaiserael ve mough ve gba yemen; henpe ibeenegh kia za tilen la, Mbaiserael ve haa afo heregh." 
Numbers9:18 Ka sha imo i TER, Mbaiserael zenden ye, ka sha imo i TER kpaa, ve haan afo ye; ayange a ibeenegh kia tema sha tabernakel la cii, ve lu hen afo." 
Numbers9:19 Ibeenegh kia lu sha tabernakel ayange a ngeen yô, Mbaiserael ve eren tom u TER, ve mough ga." 
Numbers9:20 Shighe gen yô, ibeenegh ki lu sha tabernakel anyangem kpeghee tsô; ka sha imo i TER ve haan afo, shi ka sha imo i TER kpaa ve moughon ve yemen ye." 
Numbers9:21 Shighe gen yô, iyange i been nahan, ibeenegh ki lu her zan zan sev mbu av; zum u ibeenegh kia mough pepe yô, ve mough ve gba yemen; shin a lu tugh shin atetan ibeenegh kia mough yô, ve mough je ve gba yemen." 
Numbers9:22 Shin a lu ayange ahar, shin a lu uwer, shin a lu inyom man ibeenegh kia tema sha tabernakel kia lu sha mi yô, Mbaiserael ve lu hen afo her, ve mough ga; kpa shighe u kia moughon yô, ve mough ve gba yemen." 
Numbers9:23 Ka sha imo i TER ve haan afo, shi ka sha imo i TER kpaa ve moughon ve yemen ye; ve wa kwaghôron u TER iko, er TER kaa Mose, Mose gema kaa ve nahan." 
Numbers10:1 TER ôr kwagh a Mose, kaa er:" 
Numbers10:2 Er ukakaki uhar sha azurfa, var a var ve, ve̱ lu u kwagh u yilan ior a mi, man u yôôn sha er i̱ hembe hen afo i̱ yem hemen yô." 
Numbers10:3 Zum u á tôngo ve uhar yô, ior cii ve̱ kohol her a we hen hunda u tenti u kohol ker la." 
Numbers10:4 Aluer á tôngo môm tseegh yô, mbahemenev, ka uityombaiorov mba sha ikwe i Iserael je la, ve̱ va kohol her a we." 
Numbers10:5 Aluer nea tôngo puusu puusu yô, mba ve hee afo vegher u sha ityoughkitaregh la, ve̱ hembe ve̱ gba yemen je." 
Numbers10:6 Aluer nea tôngo puusu puusu sha kwa har yô, mba ve hee afo vegher u ken imbusutariyan la, ve̱ hembe; ve̱ tôngon puusu puusu zum a á kuma u hemben la." 
Numbers10:7 Kpa zum u á lu u kohol a kohol ior tseegh yô, tôngo nen, kpa de tenge nen puusu puusu ga." 
Numbers10:8 Upristi, ônov mba Aron ve̱ tôngon ukakaki mbala; i̱ hingir ne tindi u gbem sha ikov ikov." 
Numbers10:9 Zum u né mough hen tar wen u za nôngon ityav a mbaihomov enev mba ve eren ne ican yô, tôngo nen ukakaki puusu puusu, tsô á umbur ne sha ishigh ki TER, Aôndo wen, á yima ne sha ikev i mbaihomov enev." 
Numbers10:10 Sha ayange a en a ember kpaa, man sha ayange a uiniongo enev, man mdugh u iweregh kpaa, tôngon nen ukakaki sha iniav yenev mbi nanden kua iniav yenev mbi sôngon mbi bem kpaa, vea na á umbur ne sha ishigh ki Aôndo wen; ka Mo TER M lu Aôndo wen ye." 
Numbers10:11 Tsô sha inyom i sha uhar, uwer u sha uhar, sha ayange a u ikundu la, ibeenegh kila mough sha tabernakel u shiada la sha." 
Numbers10:12 Mbaiserael hembe hen desereti u Senai gba haan afo yemen; ibeenegh za tile ken desereti u Paran. 
Numbers10:13 Ka mhii u ve hii hemben sha imo i TER, er A kaa Mose, Mose gema kaa ve nahan." 
Numbers10:14 Hiihii yô, tuta u afo a ônov mba Yuda hemen akum akum; orhemenegh u ikum na yô, lu Nakeson wan u Aminadabi." 
Numbers10:15 Orhemenegh u ikum i kwe u ônov mba Isakar yô, lu Netanel wan u Suar." 
Numbers10:16 Orhemenegh u ikum i kwe u ônov mba Sebulon yô, lu Eliabi wan u Helon." 
Numbers10:17 Tsô i sough tabernakel; ônov mba Gershon man ônov mba Merari mba ve tôôn tabernakel la, ve mough." 
Numbers10:18 Tuta u afo a Ruben mough akum akum, orhemenegh u ikum na yô, lu Elisur wan u Sedeur." 
Numbers10:19 Orhemenegh u ikum i kwe u ônov mba Shimeon yô, lu Selumiel wan u Surisadai." 
Numbers10:20 Orhemenegh u ikum i kwe u ônov mba Gadi yô, lu Eliasav wan u Reuel." 
Numbers10:21 Tsô Mbakohati, mba ve tôôn uicighanmbaakaav la kpaa mough; i vande timin tabernakel kera man ve ve mase za nyôron ye." 
Numbers10:22 Tuta u afo a ônov mba Eferaim mough akum akum; orhemenegh u sha ikum na yô, lu Elishama wan u Amihudi." 
Numbers10:23 Orhemenegh u ikum i kwe u ônov mba Manase yô, lu Gamaliel wan u Pedasur." 
Numbers10:24 Orhemenegh u ikum i kwe u ônov mba Benyamin yô, lu Abidan wan u Gideoni." 
Numbers10:25 Tuta u afo a ônov mba Dan a mase jime cii la, mough akum akum; orhemenegh u ikum na lu Ahieser wan u Amisadai." 
Numbers10:26 Orhemenegh u ikum i kwe u ônov mba Asher yô, lu Pagiel wan u Okeran." 
Numbers10:27 Orhemenegh u ikum i kwe u ônov mba Nafetali yô, lu Ahira wan u Enan." 
Numbers10:28 Kape mhembe u Mbaiserael luun sha akum akum la; nahan ve hembe ve gba yemen. 
Numbers10:29 Tsô Mose kaa a Hobabi, wan u Reuel, Ormidian u a lu terkem u Mose la er: Se mba yemen hen ijiir i TER A kaa er: Me na ne i la; yô, mough a vese imôngo, sé er a we dedoo; gadia TER ôr kwagh u dedoo sha Iserael." 
Numbers10:30 A kaa a na er: Me za ga, me hide ken tar wam hen anmgbianev av." 
Numbers10:31 A kaa a na er: De undun se ze he; gadia ka we ú faan er sé eren man sé haan afo ken desereti ye, ú hingir ashe ase." 
Numbers10:32 Nahan aluer ú za a vese imôngo yô, mimi je, kwagh u dedoo u TER Una er se la, se kpaa sé er a we nahan." 
Numbers10:33 Ve hembe hen uwo u TER, ve zende ayange atar, areki u ikuryan u TER hemen ve gbenda ayange atar je, lu keren ve ijiir i memen." 
Numbers10:34 Ibeenegh ki TER luun ve sha atetan, zum u vea hembe hen afo vea gba yemen yô." 
Numbers10:35 Zum u areki una mough una gba yemen yô, Mose a kaa er: Mough sha TERE, i̱ sambe mbaihomov Ou; mba ve ker U ihom ve̱ yevese ve̱ kar sha ishigh You kera." 
Numbers10:36 Una za tilen yô, a kaa er: TERE, hide hen udubu pue mba udubu mba Iserael." 
Numbers11:1 Tsô ior gba vaan ican sha ato a TER; zum u TER ungwa nahan ishima nyoon Un, tsô usu u TER gba yeghen hen atô ve, hia kpeafogh." 
Numbers11:2 Nahan ior vaa a Mose; Mose gema sôn TER, usu maa pir." 
Numbers11:3 Maa i ii ijiir la iti er, Tabera, sha ci u usu u TER u hie hen atô ve yô." 
Numbers11:4 Tsô agbilinaior a a lu a ve ityô la, akor kôr ve, nahan Mbaiserael shi gba vaan, kaan er: Ka an nana shi na se inyam se̱ ya?" 
Numbers11:5 Se umbur ishu i lu se yaan ken Igipiti gbilin kua furum man icegher man alabusa mba kiriki man mbatamen man tapania; 
Numbers11:6 kpa hegen yô, uma wase gema use a use; ma kwagh ngu heen ga; se mba gbe nengen di a mana ne tseegh tsô." 
Numbers11:7 Mana yô, lu er ishange i koliande nahan, mluashe na lu er iniôndo i balsem nahan." 
Numbers11:8 Ior ve due ve za kura un ve wua sha iniase, gayô, ve kume a kume shin mbaakpela, ve jiir shin itye, ve eren masa a mi; aluer ú bende un ken zwa yô, a lu u er ka masa u i kaa sha mkure yô." 
Numbers11:9 Zum u avure aa gba hen afo tugh yô, mana kpaa a haa a a imôngo." 
Numbers11:10 Tsô Mose ungwa ior lu vaan sha uipaven vev cii, hanma or her hunda u tenti u nan; ishima nyoon TER tsung; Mose kpaa doo un ga." 
Numbers11:11 Mose gema kaa a TER er: Ka nyi U er wanakiriki wou ican nahana? Shi ka nyi i kera doo U a mo ga, U gem ior mban cii, zegeuikya ne nahan, U wem avee?" 
Numbers11:12 Ka mo m wa iyav mbu ior mban yee? Ka mo m mar ve shinii, ve U kaan a mo Wer: Kôr ve sha ikum er yese ka a kôr wan u man atumba nahan, a ve hen tar u U bum Wer Ú na uter vev la yee?" 
Numbers11:13 Me zua a inyam han man me na ior mban cii nahana? Gadia mba vaan a mo kaan er: Na se inyam, se̱ ya." 
Numbers11:14 Me fatyô u tôôn ior mban cii, mo tswen ga, gadia yuhwa hembam." 
Numbers11:15 Aluer kape U eren a mo nahan ne yô, ma U shi woom tsô; aluer a doo U a mo yô, m̱ de kera nengen ican yam ga." 
Numbers11:16 TER kaa a Mose er: Kohol Mo mbatamen mba Mbaiserael akunduatargber mba u fe ve ve lu mbatamen, shi i ver ve ve hemen ior kpaa yô, va a ve hen tenti u kohol ker la, ve̱ va tile a we her imôngo." 
Numbers11:17 Me sen, Me va ôr kwagh a we her; Me pande jijingi u a lu ken a we, Me ver sha a ve, ve̱ tôô ior mba ve lu zegeuikya ne, a we imôngo, sha er ú kera tôô, we tswen ga yô." 
Numbers11:18 Shi kaa a ior wer: Tsegha nen ayol a en, sha ci u kper nahan, né ya inyam, gadia ne vaa sha ato a TER ner: Ka an nana na se inyam se̱ ya? Gadia lu doo se ken Igipiti; nahan yô, TER Una na ne inyam né ya di je." 
Numbers11:19 Né ya iyange i môm shin ayange ahar shin ataan shin pue shin ikundu tsô ga; 
Numbers11:20 kpa á lu uwer jimin zan zan ia due ne ishima, ia ndôhôr ne ishima kpaa, sha ci u ne vende TER u A lu hen atô wen, ne vaa sha ishigh Nagh ne kaa ner: Ka nyi yan se due ken Igipiti nahana?" 
Numbers11:21 Mose kaa er: Ior mba m lu a ve, ka ior dubu deri ataratar je, mba zan angahar, man U kaa Wer: Ne na ve inyam ve̱ ya uwer môm jimin." 
Numbers11:22 Á sôngo ve a sôngo akum a iyôngo man a ibua man aa kuma ve yee? Shin á kohol ve ishu i ken zegemnger cii man ia kuma ve yee? 
Numbers11:23 TER kaa a Mose er: Nahan uwegh ku TER yina zee? Hegen ú nenge kwaghôron Wam, shin una kure u sha mi vough, shin una kure ga kpaa." 
Numbers11:24 Tsô Mose due, ôr imo i Aôndo; a kohol mbatamen mba ve hemen ior akunduatargber, a ver ve, ve kase tenti la." 
Numbers11:25 Tsô TER sen ken ibeenegh ôr kwagh a na; A pande Jijingi u a lu sha a na la, A ver sha mbatamen mba akunduatargber mbala, tsô zum u Jijingi va tema sha a ve la, ve ôr kwagh er uprofeti nahan, tsô ve de, ve kera shi kimbir ga." 
Numbers11:26 Kpa ior uhar shi ken afo, u môm iti na er Eldadi, ugen iti na er Medadi, Jijingi sen tema sha a ve; ve kpaa i nger ve ati a mbala imôngo, kpa ve za hen tenti ga; nahan ve gba ôron kwagh hen afo er uprofeti nahan." 
Numbers11:27 Tsô wanye ugen gber ayem za kaa Mose er: Nenge, Eldadi man Medadi mba ôron kwagh er uprofeti nahan." 
Numbers11:28 Tsô Yosua wan u Num u a lu wanakiriki u Mose, iyev na je, gema kaa er: Terem Mose, yange ve." 
Numbers11:29 Mose kaa a na er: U wa iyol sha mo tsôô! Ior mba TER ci ca cii ma ve lu uprofeti, TER ma A ver Jijingi Na sha a ve." 
Numbers11:30 Tsô Mose nyôr ken afo, un kua mbatamen mba Iserael." 
Numbers11:31 Nahan ahumbe due sha TER, kura utakange vegher u shin zege mnger, va haa ve hen afo kuma er zende u iyange i môm vegher ken man zende u iyange i môm vegher ken kpaa, kase akôngoafogh tser; ve zurum a inya je er aseva ahar nahan." 
Numbers11:32 Tsô ior mough sha iyange la, ve shi kôron utakange didi, tugh kpaa ve tsa mi kaka man kper nan kpaa ve shi mi nahan cii, or u nan kohol i yen sha mbagenev yô, nan kohol homer pue je; ve tsen ve han han kpaa, kase afo cii." 
Numbers11:33 Er inyam lu ve sha anyi her, ve lu a tam cii ga je tsô, ishima nyoon TER a ior tsung, A wua ior sha bouange." 
Numbers11:34 I ii ijiir la iti er Kiberoti-hataawa, sha ci u ka heregh man i ii ior mba akor a kôr ve yum la ye." 
Numbers11:35 Ior hembe hen Kiberoti-hataawa la, ve yem hen Haseroti, ve haa hen Haseroti." 
Numbers12:1 Tsô Miriam kua Aron ôr kwagh u vihin sha Mose, sha ci u kwase u Kushi u a er yô; gadia a er kwase u Kushi." 
Numbers12:2 Ve kaa er: Ka Mose tsô, TER A er kwagh a na yee? Se yô, er kwagh a vese gaa? Nahan TER ungwa." 
Numbers12:3 Kpa Mose yô, lu or u ishima legh legh je zua ga, hemba hanma or sha won cii." 
Numbers12:4 TER maa ôr kwagh a Mose man Aron kua Miriam fese je, A kaa a ve er: Ne mba utar mban, due va nen hen tenti u kohol ker la. Tsô ve due, ve utar." 
Numbers12:5 Nahan TER sen ken ityôgh ki ibeenegh va tile hen hunda u tenti, yila Aron kua Miriam; ve uhar cii, ve due." 
Numbers12:6 A kaa er: Ungwa nen imo Yam yôô; aluer profeti a lu ken a ven yô, Mo TER Me pase iyol Yam her a na sha mpase u nengen a nenge a mi, Me ôr kwagh a na ken mnyam ma cien." 
Numbers12:7 Wanakiriki Wam Mose ngu nahan ga; un ka or u jighjigh ken ya Wam cii; 
Numbers12:8 M er kwagh a na sha zwa wanger wanger je, ka lun kwaghôron u cimin ga, nengen mlu u TER er A lu yô; man ka nyi ne cie u ôron kwaghvihin sha wanakiriki Wam, Mose ga?" 
Numbers12:9 Nahan ishima nyoon TER a ve tsung; A mough, A yem." 
Numbers12:10 Ibeenegh ki moughon sha tenti kera yô, Miriam gba imande, hingir pung er senou yô; Aron gema kenger Miriam yô, a kav un a imande iyol." 
Numbers12:11 Nahan Aron kaa a Mose er: Ahii! Tere, de ne se ibo ga, er se bum se er isholibo nahan kpaa." 
Numbers12:12 De deen un a̱ hingir er wan u i mar un kpenegh, a dugh a hee vegher môm ze he!" 
Numbers12:13 Tsô Mose vaa a TER, a kaa er: Aôndo ma U shi wanger un." 
Numbers12:14 Tsô TER kaa a Mose er: Aluer ter na una te un ijer sha ishi tseegh kpaa, ma a hee ayange ataankarahar gaa? I̱ wuhe un ken akôngoafogh ayange ataankarahar; ken masetyô yô, i̱ shi i̱ nyôr a na." 
Numbers12:15 Nahan i wuhe Miriam ken akôngoafogh ayange ataankarahar; ior ve kera hembe ve yem er i lu a nyôr a Miriam ga la ga. 
Numbers12:16 Ken masetyô la, ior hembe yem hen Haseroti, ve za haa afo ken desereti u Paran." 
Numbers13:1 TER shi ôr kwagh a Mose kaa er: 
Numbers13:2 Tindi ior ve̱ za nenge mker ken tar u Kanaan u M lu nan Mbaiserael la; tsuwa or ken hanma kwe u uter vev, ve cii ve̱ lu mbahemenev." 
Numbers13:3 Tsô Mose tindi ve, ve mough hen desereti u Paran sha imo i TER; ve cii ve lu mbahemenev ken Mbaiserael." 
Numbers13:4 Ka ati a ve ne: Or u ken kwe u Ruben yô, lu Samua wan u Sakur." 
Numbers13:5 U ken kwe u Shimeon yô, lu Shafati wan u Hori." 
Numbers13:6 U ken kwe u Yuda yô, lu Kalebu wan u Yefune." 
Numbers13:7 U ken kwe u Isakar yô, lu Igal wan u Yosev." 
Numbers13:8 U ken kwe u Eferaim yô, lu Hosea wan u Nun." 
Numbers13:8 U ken kwe u Eferaim yô, lu Hosea wan u Nun." 
Numbers13:9 U ken kwe u Benyamin yô, lu Palti wan u Rafu." 
Numbers13:10 U ken kwe u Sebulon yô, lu Gadiel wan u Sodi." 
Numbers13:11 U ken kwe u Yosev yô ken kwe u Manase lu Gadi wan u Sushi. 
Numbers13:12 U ken kwe u Dan yô, lu Amiel wan u Gemali." 
Numbers13:13 U ken kwe u Asher yô, lu Setur wan u Mikael." 
Numbers13:14 U ken kwe u Nafetali yô, lu Nagebi wan u Wofeshi." 
Numbers13:15 U ken kwe u Gadi yô, lu Gehuel wan u Maki." 
Numbers13:16 Angan ka ati a ior mba Mose tindi sha u ve̱ za nenge tar la mker je ne. Man Mose ii Hosea wan u Nun iti er Yosua. 
Numbers13:16 Angan ka ati a ior mba Mose tindi sha u ve̱ za nenge tar la mker je ne. Man Mose ii Hosea wan u Nun iti er Yosua. 
Numbers13:17 Tsô Mose tindi ve er ve̱ za nenge tar u Kanaan mker. A kaa a ve er: Kôndo nen sha gbenda u Imbusutariyan ne, unde nen sha iwo," 
Numbers13:18 nenge nen tar la er u lu yô, kua ior mba ve tem kimi, shin ka mba taverou, shin ka aseeraiorou, shin mba kpegheou, shin mba kpishiou;" 
Numbers13:19 man injatar i ve tem ker la, shin ka u dedoou, shin ka u dedoo gaou; man anzaagar a ve tem ken a la, shin a lu ken afoou, shin a lu ken ugilgarou;" 
Numbers13:20 man inya la, shin ka i doon iyiaghou, shin ka i doon iyiagh gaou, shin ikon ngi kereghou, shin ngi gaou. Taver nen ishima va nen a atam a ken tar la; shighe la lu shighe u atam a wain a tsutswa lu vian yô." 
Numbers13:21 Tsô ve kôndo, ve gba nengen tar la mker, ve hii hen desereti u Zen zan zan ve va ar hen Rehobi hen gbenda u karen zan Hamati la." 
Numbers13:22 Ve kôndo sha Imbusutariyan la, ve va nyôr sha Heberon; Ahiman man Sesai man Talmai, ônov mba Anaki lu ker. Er i maa Heberon yô, anyom kar ataankarahar man i mase maan Soan ken Igipiti ye." 
Numbers13:23 Tsô ve va hen pev u Esekol, ve gber gbaa u wain a sumegh sha mi, ve har ku sha aga, ior ihiar tôô; shi ve va a atam a pomegraneti kua a tur kpaa." 
Numbers13:24 I ii ijiir la iti er Pev u Esekol sha ci u sumegh ku Mbaiserael gber her la. 
Numbers13:25 Tsô ayange nga kar akunduahar yô, ve hide mker u za nengen tar la." 
Numbers13:26 Ve za va hen Mose man Aron man hen ior i Mbaiserael cii, hen desereti u Paran hen Kadeshi; ve va ôr ve kwagh kua ior cii, ve tese ve atam a ikon a ken tar la kpaa." 
Numbers13:27 Ve ôr un er: Se za ken tar u u tindi se la, mimi je, atumbabua dumbur ken u man iyough; ka atam a ikon a ker je ne."
