Numbers13:28 Kpa mba ve tem ken tar la, ka ior mba ageev, agar kpaa i maa a gir, a kehe kpishi, shi se nenge a ônov mba Anaki ker kpaa." 
Numbers13:29 Mbaamaleki tema ken tar u Imbusutariyan la; Mbahiti man Mbayebushi kua Mbaamor gema tema sha iwo; Mbakanaan gema haa vegher u shin zegemnger man hen kpe u Yordan. 
Numbers13:30 Kpa Kalebu yange ior sha ishigh ki Mose a kaa er: Kpa sé za nen, sé za ngohol nen u; gadia se fatyô u hemban u dedoo." 
Numbers13:31 Kpa ior mba ve za a na imôngo la, ve kaa er: Se fatyô u nôngon ityav a ior mbala ga, gadia ve hemba se agee." 
Numbers13:32 Shi ve ôr Mbaiserael akaavihin a sha kwagh u tar u ve za nenge u mker la, ve kaa er: Tar u se za u za nengen u mker la ka tar u u timin mba ve tem ken u yô; ior mba se nenge a ve ker cii ka ugôgômbaiorov je." 
Numbers13:33 Se nenge mbagbanakôr ker, ônov mba Anaki, tsombor u mbagbanakôr; se gema se nenge ayol ase yô, se lu er mbaahungwa nahan, kape ve kpaa ve lu nengen se je la." 
Numbers14:1 Tsô ior cii ger mliam, ior tsa vaan tugh mbula." 
Numbers14:2 Mbaiserael cii gba zan Mose man Aron ivever iyol, ior cii kaa er: Guda ma se kpe ken tar u Igipiti, gayô, guda ma se kpe ken desereti ne je!" 
Numbers14:3 Ka nyi man TER A ve a vese ken tar ne er se̱ va kpe ku u ishôm nahana? Kasev man mbayev asev mba kiriki, á va kura ve; kera guda u sé hide ken Igipiti gaa?" 
Numbers14:4 Tsô ve gba kaan ayol a ve er: Sé ver nen or u hemen se, sé hide nen ken Igipiti." 
Numbers14:5 Tsô Mose vea Aron ve gure ve kuma ishigh inya sha ishigh ki mkohol u ior i Mbaiserael cii. 
Numbers14:6 Tsô Yosua, wan u Nun kua Kalebu wan u Yefune, mba ve lu ken mba ve za nenge tar la mker la, ve ande akondo a ve;" 
Numbers14:7 ve ôr kwagh a ior i Mbaiserael cii, ve kaa er: Tar u se zende ken u sha u nengen u mker la, ka tar u doon kpishi." 
Numbers14:8 Aluer i doo TER a vese yô, Una nyôr a vese ken tar la, Una na se u; ka tar u atumbabua man iyough ve dumbur ken u." 
Numbers14:9 Ka mhendan tsô, de hendan nen a TER ga ye, de cie nen ior i tar la kpaa ga; gadia ve ka kwaghyan wase je; mure ve kar sha ve kera. TER ngu a vese; de cie nen ve ga." 
Numbers14:10 Kpa ior cii kaa er, i̱ ta ve awen; tsô iengem i TER ande hen Mbaiserael cii, ken tenti u kohol ker la." 
Numbers14:11 Tsô TER kaa a Mose er: Ka hanma shighe je man ior mban vea de u lahan Mo? Man ka hanma shighe je man vea nam jighjigh, er M er uivande hen a ve yum nahan nee?" 
Numbers14:12 Me tsaha ve sha bouange, Me ngohol ve dyako ve kera Me gema u ú hingir ikurior i ia hemba ve iyenge man agee kpaa." 
Numbers14:13 Tsô Mose kaa TER er: Nahan Mbaigipiti vea ungwa, gadia U due a ior mban ken a ve kera sha agee je," 
Numbers14:14 tsô vea gba ôron mba ve tem ken tar ne; man ve kpaa ve vande ungwan, er We TER U lu ken atô u ior mban yô, man mba nengen a We TER ishigh a ishigh je, man ibeenegh You kpaa ki luun ve sha, shi We U hemen ve gbenda ken ityôgh ki ibeenegh atetan man ken ityôgh ki usugh tugh." 
Numbers14:15 Man aluer U gba wuan ior mban icin i môm nahan yô, akuraior a a ongo gwa u iti You la, aa ôr kwagh aa kaa er:" 
Numbers14:16 Ka sha ci u TER A fetyô u nyôron a ior mban ken tar u A bum er Una na ve la ga man A woo ve ken desereti ye. 
Numbers14:17 Yô, agee a TER a̱ shi vese, er U kaa la Wer:" 
Numbers14:18 TER we ishima, ngu a erdoo wuee, deen ifer man tindi u peren, kpa u tsahan yô, den ga; tsahan ônov sha ifer i uter zan zan kov u sha utar man shi u sha unyiin kpaa." 
Numbers14:19 Ma U shi de ior mban ifer ve sha erdoo Wou u U lu a mi yum la, er U hii den ior mban, hii ken Igipiti je zan zan nyian ne yô." 
Numbers14:20 Tsô TER kaa er: M de ve sha imo you ve; 
Numbers14:21 kpa mimi je er M lu u uma man er tar cii ua iv a iengem i TER yô," 
Numbers14:22 mimi je, ior mban cii, mba ve nenge iengem Yam man uivande Av mba M er ken Igipiti man ken desereti, nahan kpaa, ve meem je i kom kwa pue, ato kpa ve veren sha imo Yam ga ne yô," 
Numbers14:23 vea nenge a tar u M bum a uter vev Mer Me na ve la ga; mbalahan Mo cii, mô ve môm nana nenge a u ga;" 
Numbers14:24 kpa wanakiriki Wam Kalebu, er un yô, jijingi na a lu kposo man a dondom jighilii kpaa yô, ka un Me nyôr a na ken tar u a ze la ye; tsombor na kpaa ua ya u." 
Numbers14:25 Mbaamaleki man Mbakanaan yô, ve tema ya shin pev; kper hide nen ijime, yem nen ken desereti za nen gbenda u zan shin zegemnger u Nyian la." 
Numbers14:26 Tsô TER ôr kwagh a Mose kua Aron, kaa er:" 
Numbers14:27 Ka hanma shighe je ior mba aferev mban vea de u zan Mo ivever iyoloo? M ungwa ivever i Mbaiserael ve eren Mo yô. 
Numbers14:28 Kaa nen a ve ner: Er M lu u uma ne yô, kape TER A kaa la, mimi je, kwaghôron u ne er sha ato Am la, kape Me er a ven di je la;" 
Numbers14:29 akom a en aa saa ken desereti ne; mba i er iyenge ve cii, iyenge yen la ci ca cii, hii sha mba ve kom anyom ikundu man mba ve hembe nahan, mba ve zem ivever iyol ne," 
Numbers14:30 ne yô, né nyôr ken tar u M bum Mer, Me na ne u, sha er né tema ker la je ga, saa Kalebu wan u Yefune man Yosua wan u Nun tseegh." 
Numbers14:31 Kpa mbayev enev mba kiriki mba ne kaa ner, á kura ve la yô, gema ka ve je, Me nyôr a ve, vea fa tar u ne vende u la ye." 
Numbers14:32 Kpa ne yô, akom a en aa saa ken desereti ne." 
Numbers14:33 Ônov enev vea hingir mba zenden ken desereti wue wue er mbakuranilev nahan, zan zan anyom akunduahar je; vea tôô ibo i idya yen zan zan akom a en aa saa ishe ken desereti cii ve." 
Numbers14:34 Iyenge i ayange a ne lu nengen tar la mker, ayange akunduahar la, inyom i môm sha ityough ki hanma iyange, né tôô afer a en, ka anyom akunduahar je la, ka nahan man né fa er i kera doom a ven ga ye." 
Numbers14:35 Mo TER M kaa nahan, kape Me er a ior mba bov mban ne cii, mba ve kohol ve hendan a Mo ne, vea tim ken desereti ne je, ka keregh vea kpe ye." 
Numbers14:36 Ior mba Mose tindi sha u ve̱ za nenge tar la mker man ve hide ve gema ve va er ior za un ivever iyol sha akaavihin a ve ôr sha tar la," 
Numbers14:37 ior mba ve va ôr akaavihin sha tar la la, bouange wua ve sha ishigh ki TER." 
Numbers14:38 Ka Yosua wan u Nun kua Kalebu wan u Yefune mba ve lu ken mba ve za sha u za nengen tar la mker yô, ve mase shin her uma ye." 
Numbers14:39 Mose er Mbaiserael akaa ne cii yô, ior gba zungwen tsung." 
Numbers14:40 Tsô ve mough pepe ve unde sha ityough ki uwoogh, ve gba kaan er: Kôndon yase, sé yem hen ijiir i TER A kaa je ne; gadia se er isholibo." 
Numbers14:41 Kpa Mose kaa a ve er: Ka nyi ne per tindi u TER nahana, gadia kwagh ne una za á doo ga." 
Numbers14:42 De kende nen ga, gadia TER ngu a ven ga; sha er mbaihomov enev ve̱ de za hembe ne ga yô." 
Numbers14:43 Gadia Mbaamaleki man Mbakanaan mba ne ken hemen keela, á wua ne sha sanker; er ne de u dondon TER yô, TER kpaa Una kera lu a ven ga." 
Numbers14:44 Nahan kpaa, ve norom ve za unde sha ityough ki uwoogh; kpa areki u ikuryan u TER kua Mose yô, ve due ken afo ga." 
Numbers14:45 Tsô Mbaamaleki man Mbakanaan mba ve tema sha iwo la, sen, va ta num sha a ve, hemba ve, zenda ve zan zan za ar hen Horma." 
Numbers15:1 TER ôr kwagh a Mose A kaa er: 
Numbers15:2 Ôr kwagh a Mbaiserael, kaa a ve wer: Zum u ne za nyôr ken tar u né za tema ker, u M lu nan ne la," 
Numbers15:3 man á sar ne ka nan TER nagh ku usugh, a lu nagh ku nanden, shin nagh ku sôngon, sha u kuren iceghzwa, shin nagh ku sha ishima i dedoo, shin ku sha uiniongo mba i ver sha ashighe ashighe la, sha u eren TER kwaghhumandoon sha ibua shin sha iyôngo yô," 
Numbers15:4 or u nan ne nagh ku nan la, nana̱ na TER nagh ku sha samuyia, i̱ lu mwem ma kengese ma ma kom môm-ken-upue u efa ma i nongo mkurem sha mi ma ma kom môm-ken-unyiin u hin;" 
Numbers15:5 man wain sha ci u nagh ku man, na a̱ kuma môm-ken-unyiin u hin sha hanma gumiyôngo, a nagh ku nanden shin a nagh ku sôngon imôngo." 
Numbers15:6 Man a lu nomiyôngo yô, na nagh ku sha samuyia sha mwem ma kengese ma ma kom uhar-ken-upue u efa ma i nongo mkurem sha mi ma ma kom môm-ken-utar u hin;" 
Numbers15:7 man na wain sha ci u nagh ku man a̱ kuma ci môm ken utar u hin; ka kwagh u human doon TER. 
Numbers15:8 Aluer wea na nagh ku nanden, shin nagh ku sôngon sha gumbua sha u kuren iceghzwa, shin a lu nagh ku bem ku nan TER kpaa," 
Numbers15:9 nahan i̱ na nagh ku sha samuyia a gumbua la imôngo, i̱ lu mwem ma kengese ma ma kom utar-ken-upue u efa, ma i nongo mkurem sha mi ma ma kom vegher u hin." 
Numbers15:10 Man shi na wain sha ci u nagh ku man, a̱ kuma vegher u hin, ka nagh ku usugh ku human doon TER je la." 
Numbers15:11 Kape hanma nombua shin nomiyôngo shin gumiyôngo shin gumkpev kpaa i̱ er a ve la. 
Numbers15:12 Iyenge i ne na la, kape er nen a hanmô ve sha iyenge ve la." 
Numbers15:13 Hanma or u nan lu or u tar la jim yô, kape nana̱ na akaa ne nahan vough ne, zum u nana naan nagh ku usugh ku human doon TER la." 
Numbers15:14 Man aluer shiror u nan nyer ne a nyôr, shin hanma or u nan tse a ven sha ikov ikov, man á sar nan ka nan nagh ku usugh ku human doon TER yô, er ne eren la kape nan kpa, nana̱ er je la." 
Numbers15:15 Ior cii, tindi a̱ lu môm sha ci wen kua shiror u nan nyer ne a nyôr la; ka tindi u gbem sha ikov ikov; er ne ne lu la, kape shiror kpaa una lu sha ishigh ki TER je la." 
Numbers15:16 Tindi a̱ lu môm, kwaghwan kpaa môm, sha ci wen kua shiror u nan nyer ne a nyôr la." 
Numbers15:17 TER shi ôr kwagh a Mose, A kaa er:" 
Numbers15:18 Ôr kwagh a Mbaiserael kaa a ve wer: Zum u né za nyôr ken tar u M lu zan a ven ker la," 
Numbers15:19 né gbaa yan iyiagh ki hen tar la yô, naan nen TER nagh ku kenden sha." 
Numbers15:20 Na nen masa u sha mwem ma geran enem ma hiihii la, a̱ lu nagh ku kenden sha, er nagh ku kenden sha ku vande u gbidyen iyiav sha mi nahan, kape né kende ku sha la." 
Numbers15:21 Naan nen TER nagh ku kenden sha, sha mwem ma geran enem ma hiihii la, sha ikov ikov." 
Numbers15:22 Zum u né kar kpe, né kera wa atindi a TER na Mose ne cii iko ga yô;" 
Numbers15:23 ka akaa a TER kaa Mose, Mose gema kaa ne a la cii, hii sha iyange i TER hii u kaan a la je zan zan sha ikov ikov;" 
Numbers15:24 yô, aluer ior cii er kwagh la man ve fa ga yô, nahan ior cii ve̱ zua, ve̱ va a gumbua sha ci u nagh ku nanden ku human doon TER kua nagh ku sha samuyia man nagh ku man ku i magh sha mi, sha tindi la, man kpev môm sha ci u nagh ku isholibo." 
Numbers15:25 Pristi a̱ na iwom sha ci u ior i Mbaiserael cii, tsô á de ve kwaghbo ve; gadia ve er abu tsô, man ve̱ va a nagh vegh, ka nagh ku usugh ku nan TER kua nagh ku isholibo, sha ishigh ki TER, sha ci u kwagh u ve er abu la;" 
Numbers15:26 tsô á de ior i Mbaiserael cii, isholibo ve la, kua shiror u nan nyer ve a nyôr la kpaa, gadia ior cii er kwagh la abu." 
Numbers15:27 Man aluer or môm nana er isholibo abu yô, nana̱ va a tuleivo u a kom inyom i môm yô, sha ci u nagh ku isholibo." 
Numbers15:28 Pristi a̱ na iwom sha ci u or u nan kar kpe nan er isholibo abu sha ishigh ki TER la, a̱ na iwom sha ci u nan, tsô á de nan isholibo i nan." 
Numbers15:29 Tindi môm a̱ lu sha ci wen; or u nan er kwaghbo abu la, shin a lu or u tar la jim ken Mbaiserael, shin a lu shiror u nan nyer ne a nyôr kpaa." 
Numbers15:30 Kpa aluer hanma or nana er ma kwagh sha apera, shin a lu or u hen tar la jim shin a lu shiror kpaa, nan ngu lahan TER; or la i̱ dugh nan ken nongo u nan kera;" 
Numbers15:31 sha ci u nan laha kwaghôron u TER, shi nan vihi tindi Na kpaa yô, i̱ dugh or la kera keng, ifer i nan ia lu nan iyol." 
Numbers15:32 Zum u Mbaiserael lu ken desereti la, ve kohol orgen lu taven ikon sha iyange i memen." 
Numbers15:33 Ve mba ve kohol un taven ikon la, ve va a na hen Mose man Aron kua hen ior cii." 
Numbers15:34 Tsô ve wa un ken gaadi, gadia i lu a fa kwagh u á er a na ga." 
Numbers15:35 Tsô TER kaa a Mose er: I̱ wua or ne kpee, ior cii ve̱ ta un awen ken akôngoafogh." 
Numbers15:36 Tsô ior cii due a na ken akôngoafogh, ve ta un awen, ve wua, er TER kaa Mose nahan." 
Numbers15:37 Tsô TER ôr kwagh a Mose, A kaa er:" 
Numbers15:38 Ôr kwagh a Mbaiserael, kaa ve wer, ve̱ taan anzôr sha azongo a akondo ve, sha ikov ikov cii, man hanma injôr sha zongo la, ve̱ kange mou u kwel sha mi;" 
Numbers15:39 a̱ lu ne anzôr a né kenger sha mi man né umbur atindi a TER cii, né waan a iko kpaa yô; sha er de zenden nen sha ishima yen man sha ashe a en ga, ka kwagh u a ne ne idya i eren je la;" 
Numbers15:40 sha u né umbur atindi a Am cii, né eren sha mi, né hingir uicighanmbaiorov mba Aôndo wen yô." 
Numbers15:41 Ka Mo TER M lu Aôndo wen, u M dugh a ven ken tar u Igipiti Mer, Me lu Aôndo wen ye; ka Mo TER M lu Aôndo wen ye." 
Numbers16:1 Kpa Koraki wan u Isehar wan u Kohati wan u Levi, man Datan man Abiram ônov mba Eliabi kua On wan u Peleti, ônov mba Ruben, ve kua a ior," 
Numbers16:2 ve va tile sha ishigh ki Mose; ve lu a Mbaiserael mbagenev, lu ior deri uhar man akunduahargber, lu mbahemen ior mba i yila ve mkohol yô, lu ior mba duen ati je;" 
Numbers16:3 tsô ve kohol, ve hingir ayongo a Mose man Aron, ve kaa a ve er: Ne ya kuma ve, gadia ior cii ka uicighanmbaiorov, hanma or kpaa; TER ngu a ve; man ka nyi ne kenden ayol a en sha je er ne hemba ior i TER cii nahana?" 
Numbers16:4 Er Mose ungwa nahan yô, a gure a kuma ishigh inya," 
Numbers16:5 a ôr kwagh a Koraki kua ior nav cii, a kaa er: Kper pepe TER Una tese mba ve lu mba Nav, man or u nan lu icighanor yô, Una er, nana kporom her a Na, een, or u Una tsuwa nan la, Una er, nana kporom her a na." 
Numbers16:6 Yô, er nen kwagh ne: tôô nen ugbande mba nanden kwaghhumandoon shimi, Koraki a ior nav cii;" 
Numbers16:7 Kper yô, haa nen usu shimi, gema haa nen kwaghhumandoon sha mi, sha ishigh ki TER, tsô or u TER Una tsuwa nan la, ka nan nana lu icighanor ye, ne kumbur yum, ne ônov mba Levi." 
Numbers16:8 Tsô Mose kaa a Koraki er: Shi ungwa nen yôô, ne ônov mba Levi:" 
Numbers16:9 Er Aôndo u Iserael A tsough ne ken ior mba Iserael sha u Una kporom a ven her a Na sha u né eren tom u tabernakel u TER, man né tilen sha ishigh ki iorough né eren ve tom," 
Numbers16:10 man er A kporom a we kua anngôôv ou, ônov mba Levi cii kpaa, nahan kpaa kuma ne gaa? Shi tom u pristi kpaa ne mba kerene?" 
Numbers16:11 Nahan we a ior ou cii, ne kohol ne hingir iyongo a TER; Aron ngu di nyi man ne hon unu?" 
Numbers16:12 Tsô Mose tindi i za yila Datan man Abiram, ônov mba Eliabi, kpa ve venda er: Sé va ga;" 
Numbers16:13 er u dugh a vese ken tar u atumbabua man iyough dumbur ker la wer, ú va wua se ken desereti ne, nahan ka kwagh u kiriki? Shi ka u ka yan tor sha vese kpaa ha?" 
Numbers16:14 Man u va a vese ken tar u atumbabua man iyough dumbur ker ga, u na se dyako u ishule man ikon i wain kpaa ga; sar u ka tsuwan ior mban ashe? Yô, sé va ga." 
Numbers16:15 Nahan ishima vihi Mose tsung, a kaa a TER er: De rumun nagh vegh ku ve ve a mi la ga; shin jaki môm tsô kpaa, m ngohol ve sha apera ga, shi m er mô ve môm kwaghvihin kpaa ga." 
Numbers16:16 Tsô Mose kaa a Koraki er: Kper yô, we, kua ior ou cii, va nen sha ishigh ki TER, we man ve man Aron;" 
Numbers16:17 hanmô wen nana̱ tôô gbande u nan u kwaghhumandoon, nana̱ haa kwaghhumandoon shimi, man hanmô wen nana̱ va a gbande u nan u kwaghhumandoon sha ishigh ki TER, ka ugbande deri uhar man akunduahargber; we kua Aron kpaa, hanmô wen nana̱ va a gbande u nan u kwaghhumandoon." 
Numbers16:18 Tsô hanma or tôô gbande u nan u kwaghhumandoon nan haa usu shimi, shi nan haa kwaghhumandoon sha mi, nan za tile hen hunda u tenti u kohol ker la, a Mose man Aron imôngo." 
Numbers16:19 Koraki kohol ior cii, hingir ayongo a ve, hen hunda u tenti u kohol ker la; tsô iengem i TER va ande hen ior cii." 
Numbers16:20 Nahan TER ôr kwagh a Mose man Aron kaa er: 
Numbers16:21 Due nen ken ior mban kera, M tim ve icin i môm." 
Numbers16:22 Kpa ve gure ve kuma ishiv inya, ve kaa er: Ahii! Aôndo u ujijingi mba uumace cii, or môm nan er kwaghbo, tsô Ú gema Ú yuwe ior cii?" 
Numbers16:23 Nahan TER ôr kwagh a Mose kaa er: 
Numbers16:24 Ôr kwagh a ior kaa ve wer: Kar nen hen tenti u Koraki man Datan man Abiram kera. 
Numbers16:25 Tsô Mose mough za hen Datan man Abiram; mbavesen mba Iserael kpaa cir un ijime. 
Numbers16:26 A za ôr kwagh a ior, a kaa er: Kar nen hen utenti mba aferaior mban kera yôô; de benden nen ma kwagh ve ave ga, sha er né tim sha asorabo a ve la cii ga yô." 
Numbers16:27 Tsô ve kar hen utenti mba Koraki man Datan man Abiram kera; Datan vea Abiram yô, ve due, ve tile hen hunda u utenti vev, ve a kasev vev man ônov vev mba nomso man mbayev vev mba kiriki." 
Numbers16:28 Mose kaa er: Ka sha kwagh ne man né fa er i lu TER A tindim sha u m̱ eren ityom ne cii ye, m gbe eren i sha ishima yam tsô ga." 
Numbers16:29 Aluer ior mban vea kpe er ior cii ve kpen nahan, shin ma kwagh á er ve u a eren ior mbagenev kpaa yô, ka TER A tindim ga." 
Numbers16:30 Kpa aluer TER Una er kwagh u he, inya ia aver zwa u i, ia mena ve kua ior vev cii, vea haa shin Sheol uma yô, fa er ior mban ve laha TER yô." 
Numbers16:31 Tsô kur akaaôron ne yô, inya pav hen pe ve tile la;" 
Numbers16:32 inya aver zwa u i, mena ve man ônov vev kua ior mba Koraki cii, a akaa ve cii." 
Numbers16:33 Ve a akaa a ve lu a mi cii, ve haa shin Sheol uma; inya hide zua her, cir ve, ve tim ken ior kera." 
Numbers16:34 Mbaiserael mba ve kase ve cii, zum u ve ungwa mliam vem la yô, ve yevese; gadia ve kaa er: Inya i̱ de men se ga." 
Numbers16:35 Shi usu due hen TER, hia ior deri uhar man akunduahargber mba ve va nande nagh ku kwaghhumandoon la." 
Numbers16:36 Tsô TER ôr kwagh a Mose kaa er: 
Numbers16:37 Kaa Eliasar wan u pristi Aron, a̱ kura ugbande mba kwaghhumandoon ken usu u lu masen enger la, a̱ tsenda usu la kera ca je; gadia ve hingir uicighanmbaakaav;" 
Numbers16:38 ka ugbande mba kwaghhumandoon mba ior mba asorabo a ve a ne ve ku ne; i var iyôv mbi par par mbi cirin atse a nanden nagh sha mi la a mi; gadia ve va a mi sha ishigh ki TER, ka nahan man ve hingir uicighanmbaakaav ye; nahan vea lu Mbaiserael ikav." 
Numbers16:39 Tsô pristi Eliasar tôô ugbande mba togula mba kwaghhumandoon mba ior mba i nande ve, ve va na nagh a mi la, i̱ var kwagh u cirin atse a nanden nagh sha mi la a mi;" 
Numbers16:40 sha u ve̱ lu Mbaiserael ikav i umbur kwagh, man sha u or u ken inya nan lu ken tsombor u Aron ga, nana de kporom er nana̱ nande kwaghhumandoon sha ishigh ki TER, nana gema á hingir er Koraki a ior nav nahan ga, er TER kaa Mose, Mose gema kaa un nahan." 
Numbers16:41 Tsô sev mbu av yô, ior i Mbaiserael cii mough ayôôso sha Mose kua Aron, ve gba kaan er: Ka ne je ne woo ior mba TER ye." 
Numbers16:42 Tsô er ior kohol hingir ayôôso a Mose man Aron la yô, ve gema ashe ken vegher u tenti u kohol ker la, ibeenegh gema cir sha mi, iengem i TER kpaa ande ken igbar." 
Numbers16:43 Tsô Mose vea Aron ve kar ken hemen u tenti u kohol ker la. 
Numbers16:44 TER ôr kwagh a Mose, kaa er:" 
Numbers16:45 Kar nen hen ior ne kera, Me tim ve icin i môm; tsô ve gure ve kuma ishiv inya." 
Numbers16:46 Mose kaa a Aron er: Tôô gbande wou u kwaghhumandoon, dugh usu ken atse a nanden nagh sha mi, wa shimi, haa kwaghhumandoon sha mi, tôô fese za a mi hen ior, za na iwom sha ci ve; gadia TER ngu yuwen, bouange kpaa hii ve." 
Numbers16:47 Tsô Aron tôô, er Mose kaa un nahan, za ayem, za nyôr ior hen atô; yô bouange vande hiin hen ior kera kpaa; tsô a haa kwaghhumandoon sha mi, a na iwom sha ci u ior." 
Numbers16:48 Tsô til hen atô u mbakpenev a mbaumav yô, bouange la maa de." 
Numbers16:49 Ior mba ve kpe sha bouange la yô, lu ior dubu pue kar unyiin man deri utaankaruhar je, i ôr ior mba ve kpe sha kwagh u Koraki la ga." 
Numbers16:50 Tsô Aron hide hen Mose hen hunda u tenti u kohol ker la; bouange la kpaa bee. 
Numbers17:1 TER ôr kwagh a Mose, kaa er:" 
Numbers17:2 Ôr kwagh a Mbaiserael ngohol igbough her a ve, sha hanma kwe môm môm, hen hanma orhemenegh, sha ikwe ve, ka igbough pue kar ihiar je la; nger iti i hanma or sha gbough ku nan." 
Numbers17:3 Nger iti i Aron sha gbough ku Levi; gadia gbough môm ku̱ lu sha ci u orhemen u kwe ve. 
Numbers17:4 Ver i ken tenti u kohol ker la, sha ishigh ki Shiada, henpe M kohol a ven la." 
Numbers17:5 Tsô or u Me tsuwa nan yô, gbough ku nan kua hôm; Me er ahon a Mbaiserael a ve hon ne la, a̱ beem ato." 
Numbers17:6 Nahan Mose ôr kwagh a Mbaiserael, mbahemenev vev cii na un igbough, hanma orhemenegh na gbough môm sha ikwe ve cii, igbough pue kar ihiar; gbough ku Aron kpaa lu a igbough vev imôngo." 
Numbers17:7 Mose ver igbough mbila sha ishigh ki TER ken tenti u shiada. 
Numbers17:8 Tsô kper nan Mose za nyer ken tenti u shiada yô, gbough ku Aron ku hen nongo u Levi la mughul amuwe, kpar, ume mbaamondi mba vian." 
Numbers17:9 Nahan Mose due a igbough cii sha ishigh ki TER, a va a mbi hen Mbaiserael cii; ve nenge, hanma or tôô gbough ku nan." 
Numbers17:10 TER kaa a Mose er: Hide a gbough ku Aron ver sha ishigh ki Shiada, i̱ koso ku her, ku̱ lu ônov mba ihembeato ikav, sha u u̱ bee ahon a ve, a ve honom la, sha er vea kera kpe ga yô." 
Numbers17:11 Kape Mose er la; er TER kaa un nahan, kape a er la." 
Numbers17:12 Tsô Mbaiserael ôr kwagh a Mose kaa er: Nenge, se mba kpen, se mba timin, se cii se mba timin." 
Numbers17:13 Hanma or u nan kporom a kporom hen tabernakel u TER tsô kpaa, nana kpe; nahan yô, se cii sea kpe." 
Numbers18:1 TER kaa a Aron er: We a ônov ou man ya u teru a we imôngo, né tôô ibo i sha icighanjiir la, man we a ônov ou kpaa né tôô ibo i sha tom wen u pristi kpaa." 
Numbers18:2 Anngôôv ou, kwe u teru, ve̱ kporom a we imôngo, ve̱ kohol we, ve̱ eren we tom; kpa we a ônov ou yô, lu nen sha ishigh ki tenti u shiada." 
Numbers18:3 Ve̱ eren we tom kua tom u tenti cii; saa mkporom tsô, ve̱ de kporom hen ikav mbi icighanjiir man hen atse a nanden nagh sha mi la ga ye, sha er vea kpe ga, ve man ne kpaa ga yô." 
Numbers18:4 Ve̱ kohol we, ve̱ eren tom u tenti u kohol ker la, hanma tom u tenti cii; or u ken inya nana̱ de mgbôghom a ve ga." 
Numbers18:5 Eren nen tom u icighanjiir kua tom u atse a nanden nagh sha mi kpaa, sha er i̱ de kera shi yuwen a Mbaiserael ga yô." 
Numbers18:6 Nenge, Mo M tsuwa anngôôv enev mba Levi ken Mbaiserael, ve̱ lu ne iwua i i ne ne yô, i gema ve i na TER sha u ve̱ eren tom u tenti u kohol ker la." 
Numbers18:7 Kpa we a ônov ou yô, eren nen tom u pristi u sha hanma kwagh u hen atse a nanden nagh sha mi man u ken atô u ikondo i yisan la; ka her né eren tom ye; M na ne tom u pristi gbilin; or u ken inya u nana kporom her yô, i̱ wua nan." 
Numbers18:8 TER kaa a Aron er: Nenge, ka Mo je, M ne u tom u nengen sha iniav mbi kenden sha la ye; uicighanmbaakaav mba Mbaiserael la cii, ka we M ne u ve a ônov ou, ka kwar wen gbem je la." 
Numbers18:9 Uicighanmbaakaav mba hemban cii mba i nanden sha usu ga yô, kwagh u una lu u wou sha mi yô, ka iniav vev cii, hanma nagh vegh ku sha samuyia man hanma nagh vegh ku isholibo man hanma nagh vegh ku iboogh ku vea nam la, kua hingir we kua ônov ou icighankwagh u hemban cii je." 
Numbers18:10 Yaan mbi er i ye icighankwagh u hemban cii nahan; hanma nomsoor nana̱ ya mbi; mbi̱ lu u icighankwagh. 
Numbers18:11 Kwagh u shi una lu u wou yô, ka nagh ku kenden sha ku uiwua vev la, ka iniav mbi cian mbi Mbaiserael cii, M na u mbi, a ônov ou mba nomso man mba kasev, ka kwar wen gbem; hanma or u hen ya wou u nan lu wang yô, nana̱ ya mbi." 
Numbers18:12 Mkurem ma hemban doon cii, man wain u hemban doon cii, kua alakema kpaa; iyiav mbi tsutswav vev, mbi ve ne TER yô, M na u mbi." 
Numbers18:13 Hanma iyiav mbi tsutswav, mbi ken tar ve cii, mbi ve ve TER a mi, mbia hingir mbi you; hanma or u hen ya wou u nan lu wang yô, nana̱ ya mbi." 
Numbers18:14 Hanma kwagh u ken Iserael, u i tswer yô, á lu u wou." 
Numbers18:15 Hanma kwaghuma u a hii duen ken uya, u ve ne TER yô, shin á lu or, shin a lu zendenya kpaa, á lu u wou; kpa á lu waniunda u or yô, ú paa un kpee, man shi waniunda u uzendenya mba ve lu wang ga kpaa ú paa un." 
Numbers18:16 Ipaan i á paa un la yô, wan u a kom uwer môm la, ú paa un er u we ishe la, i̱ lu ushekel utaan, shekel u icighanjiir la, ka ugera ikundu je la." 
Numbers18:17 Kpa wanbua u iunda, shin waniyôngo u iunda, shin wanivo u iunda yô, de paan ve ga; ve ka uicighanmbaakaav je, haa awambe ve sha atse a nanden nagh sha mi, gema ahôm a ve nande TER nagh ku usugh ku human doon a mi." 
Numbers18:18 Inyam ve i̱ lu i you, er vanger u cian a mi kua namegh ku yanegh nahan, kape ia lu i you la." 
Numbers18:19 Iniav mbi kenden sha, mbi uicighanmbaakaav cii, mbi Mbaiserael ve ne TER yô, M na u mbi a ônov ou mba nomso man mba kasev a we imôngo, ka kwar wen gbem; we a tsombor wou, á lu ne ikuryan i bar gbem, sha ishigh ki TER." 
Numbers18:20 TER kaa a Aron er: Ú zua a dyako ken tar ve ga, kwar kpaa ú zua a mi her a ve ga; Mo M ngu kwar wou man dyako wou ken Mbaiserael." 
Numbers18:21 Nenge, M na ônov mba Levi môm-ken-upue u ken Iserael la cii, i̱ hingir dyako ve, sha ci u tom ve u ve eren yô, ka tom u tenti u kohol ker la." 
Numbers18:22 Nahan yô, Mbaiserael ve̱ de kera kporom hen tenti u kohol ker la ga, sha u ve̱ de kper ibo i isholibo, ve̱ kpeen ga yô." 
Numbers18:23 Kpa Mbalevi ve̱ eren tom u tenti u kohol ker, man shi ka ve vea tôôn ibo ve ye; ka tindi u gbem sha ikov ikov; ken Mbaiserael yô, vea zua a ma dyako ga." 
Numbers18:24 Gadia môm-ken-upue u Mbaiserael u ve ne TER nagh ku cian mi la, M na Mbalevi, hingir dyako ve; ka nahan man M kaa Mer, ken Mbaiserael yô, vea zua a ma dyako ga ye." 
Numbers18:25 TER ôr kwagh a Mose, A kaa er:" 
Numbers18:26 Ôr kwagh a Mbalevi kaa a ve wer: Zum u né ngohol môm-ken-upue hen Mbaiserael, u M ne ne a hingir dyako wen la yô, pande, na nen TER nagh ku kenden sha mi, ka môm-ken-upue u umôm-ken-upue la je la." 
Numbers18:27 Nagh enegh ku kenden sha kun, kua hingir ne er ka alakema u sha vande u gbiren iyiav yô, man shi er wain u a iv hen ihungwa i shoghol nahan." 
Numbers18:28 Nahan môm-ken-upue wen cii, mba ne ngohol hen Mbaiserael la, ne kpaa, tsuwan nen nagh ku kenden sha, naan nen TER; gema nen nagh ku kenden sha, ku TER la, naan nen pristi Aron." 
Numbers18:29 Iwua i i ne ne cii kpaa, tsuwan nen nagh ku kenden sha la cii, naan nen TER, i̱ lu kwagh u a hembe doon cii, shi a̱ lu icighankwagh ker kpaa yô." 
Numbers18:30 Yô, kaa a ve wer: Zum u nea tsuwan kwagh u a hembe doon ker yô, una hingir Mbalevi er ka iyiav ki sha vande u gbiren iyiav man er wain u hen ihungwa i shoghol nahan." 
Numbers18:31 Gbaa yan nen un hanma ijiir tsô, ne a mba hen uya enev, gadia ka injar yen i sha tom wen u ken tenti u kohol ker la je la." 
Numbers18:32 Aluer nea tsuwan kwagh u a hembe doon ker yô, né kera kpela ibo sha mi ga; de hôngor nen a uicighanmbaakaav mba Mbaiserael ga, sha er né kpe ga yô." 
Numbers19:1 TER ôr kwagh a Mose man Aron, A kaa er:" 
Numbers19:2 Ka tindi u i̱ eren sha mi u TER A we je ne er: Ôr kwagh a Mbaiserael ve̱ va u a tulebua u nyian u a lu a iyolough ga, shi a lu a ihogholough iyol kpaa ga yô, u i lu a vande tan un igbur mayange ga yô;" 
Numbers19:3 gema un na pristi Eleasar, nahan i̱ due a mi ken akôngoafogh, i̱ za wua un sha ishigh nagh je." 
Numbers19:4 Pristi Eleasar a̱ er awambe na sha ihôwe na, a̱ mishi awambe na vegher u hen ishigh ki tenti u kohol ker la, kwa taankaruhar;" 
Numbers19:5 i̱ nande tulebua la sha usu sha ishigh nagh je, ikôvough nagh man inyam na man awambe a na a icômbov nav, i̱ nande cii;" 
Numbers19:6 pristi a̱ tôô kon u sedar man hisop kua ikondo i nyian dindee, a̱ gbihi hen atô u usu u lu hian tulebua la." 
Numbers19:7 Nahan pristi a̱ ôô akondo a na, shi a̱ ôô iyol sha mnger kpaa, man una mase hiden ken afo ye, pristi una kera lu wang ga zan zan iyange ia kar been." 
Numbers19:8 Or u a nande tulebua la kpaa, a̱ ôô akondo a na sha mnger, shi a̱ ôô iyol sha mnger kpaa, una kera lu wang ga zan zan iyange ia kar been." 
Numbers19:9 Or u nan lu wang yô, nana̱ kura mtwem ma tulebua la, nana̱ ver ma ken akôngoafogh hen ijiir i wang; i̱ ver ma sha ci u ior i Mbaiserael sha ci u mngerem ma wanger kwagh a min; ka nagh ku isholibo je." 
Numbers19:10 Or u a kor mtwem ma tulebua la, a ôô akondo a na, una kera lu wang ga zan zan iyange ia kar been; Mbaiserael cii kua shiror u nan va nyer ve a nyôr la kpaa, i̱ lu ve tindi u gbem." 
Numbers19:11 Or u nana bende a ikom i or yô, nana kera lu wang ga ayange ataankarahar." 
Numbers19:12 Nana̱ wanger iyol i nan sha mtwem mala sha iyange i atar la, man sha iyange i ataankarahar la kpaa, nahan nana hingir wang; kpa aluer nana wanger iyol i nan sha iyange i atar man sha iyange i ataankarahar la kpaa ga yô, nana kera lu wang ga." 
Numbers19:13 Anti or u nana bende a ikom i or u nan kpe yô, man nan wanger iyol i nan ga yô, nan ngu hôngor tabernakel u TER; or la, i̱ dugh nan ken Iserael kera, sha ci u i lu a mishi nan mngerem ma wanger kwagh a mi la, iyol ga yô, nan kera ngu wang ga; mlu u wang ga u nan la ngu a nan her." 
Numbers19:14 Tindi u sha or u nan kpe ken tenti yô, ka un ne: Hanma or u nan nyer ken tenti la, man hanma or u nan lu ken tenti la kpaa, nana kera lu wang ga, ayange ataankarahar." 
Numbers19:15 Hanma kwagh u a lu ivegher, u i cir kughur sha mi ga yô, kera ngu wang ga." 
Numbers19:16 Hanma or u nan lu ken ikôngo man nan bende a or u i woo nan sha sanker yô, shin a lu kuhe u or, shin a lu uwar kpaa, nana kera lu wang ga, ayange ataankarahar." 
Numbers19:17 Or u nan lu wang ga la yô, i̱ pande mtwem ma nagh ku isholibo, ma i nande la, i̱ kese mngerem ma senen, i̱ haa sha mtwem mala shin ika;" 
Numbers19:18 or u nan lu wang yô, nana̱ tôô hisop nana̱ civ shin mnger, nana̱ mishi sha tenti man sha uika cii man sha ior mba ve lu heregh cii kua sha or u nan bende a kuhe, shin nan bende a or u i woo nan yô, shin nan bende a ikom, shin a lu uwar kpaa;" 
Numbers19:19 or u wang la, nana̱ mishi u a lu wang ga la ma iyol, sha iyange i atar kua sha iyange i ataankarahar la kpaa; sha iyange i ataankarahar la, nana̱ wanger un; nahan una ôô akondo a na, shi una ôô iyol sha mnger kpaa, iyange ia been yô, una hingir wang." 
Numbers19:20 Kpa or u nan kera lu wang ga, man nana wanger iyol i nan ga yô, or la i̱ dugh nan ken ior kera, sha ci u nan hôngor icighanjiir u TER yô, i mishi nan mngerem ma wanger kwagh a mi la iyol ga; nan ngu wang ga her." 
Numbers19:21 I̱ hingir ieren ve gbem; or u a mishi mngerem ma wanger kwagh a mi la, a̱ ôô akondo a na; hanma or u nana bende a mngerem ma wanger kwagh mi la yô, nana kera lu wang ga zan zan iyange ia kar been." 
Numbers19:22 Hanma kwagh u or u nan lu wang ga la, nana bende a mi yô, una kera lu wang ga; shi orgen u nan bende a kwagh la kpaa, nana kera lu wang ga, zan zan iyange ia kar been." 
Numbers20:1 Tsô Mbaiserael, ka ior ci ca je la, ve va ken desereti u Zin sha uwer u hiihii la; ior maa haa hen Kadeshi; Miriam kpe heregh i ii un her." 
Numbers20:2 Mngerem ma va banen ior yô, ve kohol imôngo ve hingir ayongo a Mose kua Aron." 
Numbers20:3 Ior hingir ayongo a Mose, ve gba kaan er: Guda u ma se kpe zum u anngôôv asev kpeen sha ishigh ki TER la!" 
Numbers20:4 Man inja na nan man ne ve a ior i TER ken desereti ne, sha u sé va kpe ker, se a uzendenya asev cii?" 
Numbers20:5 Man ka nyi je ne due a vese ken Igipiti, ne va a vese hen bojiir ne nahana? Ka ma ijiir i lun a iyiagh ga, shin tur, shin ikon i wain, shin pomegraneti kpaa ga; mngerem ma man kpaa ma ga." 
Numbers20:6 Tsô Mose vea Aron ve mough hen ior, ve za hen hunda u tenti u kohol ker la, ve gure ve kuma ishiv inya; nahan iengem i TER ande hen ve!" 
Numbers20:7 Tsô TER ôr kwagh a Mose, kaa er:" 
Numbers20:8 Tôô gbough, kohol ior we vea anngôu Aron; yô, ôr kwagh a vande sha ashe ve, tsô ua due a mngerem ma u; er, mngerem ma due ken vande la, na ior ve̱ ma kua uzendenya vev kpaa." 
Numbers20:9 Tsô Mose tôô gbough sha ishigh ki TER, er A kaa un nahan." 
Numbers20:10 Mose vea Aron ve kohol ior hen vande la; a kaa a ve er: Ungwa nen ase, ne mbahembanato mban; sé due a mngerem ken vande ne, sé na ne zee?" 
Numbers20:11 Tsô Mose kende uwegh sha, gbidye vande sha gbough nagh kwa har mngerem due kpishi, ior ma kua uzendenya vev kpaa." 
Numbers20:12 Nahan TER kaa a Mose man Aron er: Er ne nem jighjigh ne tseghem sha ishigh ki Mbaiserael ga yô, nahan né kera nyôr a ior ne ken tar u M ne ve la ga." 
Numbers20:13 Ka mngerem ma Meriba je ne; gadia Mbaiserael hingir ayôôso a TER, shi A pase ve iyol Na er Un lu icighan yô." 
Numbers20:14 Hen Kadeshi la, Mose tindi mbatyomov hen tor u Edom er: Anngôu Iserael ngu kaan nahan er: We iyol you kpaa, u fa ican i i tser se la cii," 
Numbers20:15 er uter asev yem ken Igipiti, se tsa ken Igipiti gbem, man Mbaigipiti ve er se ican, se a uter asev kpaa yô;" 
Numbers20:16 zum u se vaa a TER yô, A ungwa imo yase, A tindi Ortyom, va due a vese ken tar u Igipiti; se mban heen hen Kadeshi gar u hen ikighirtar you ne;" 
Numbers20:17 yô, ma u shi de, ma se kar hen tar wou; sé nyôr ken sule u uyia shin u wain ga, mngerem ma shin azôr kpaa sé ma ga, kpa sé kar di sha igbudu u tor tsô; sé kaha ken iyan shin ken imese kpaa ga, zan zan sé za bee tar wou." 
Numbers20:18 Kpa Edom kaa a na er: De karen hen mo, m̱ due a sanker m̱ nôngo ityav a we ga." 
Numbers20:19 Tsô Mbaiserael kaa a na er: Sé kar sha igbudu, aluer sea ma mngerem ou, mo kua uzendenya av kpaa, me kimbi ishe i ma; ka kwagh je ga, de m̱ gba karen angahar tsô." 
Numbers20:20 Kpa a kaa er: Ú kar ga. Tsô Edom gba van her a na a ishima i num a ior kpishi sha agee je. 
Numbers20:21 Kape Edom venda er Iserael a̱ de karen hen tar na ga la; nahan Iserael kaha kar hen na kera. 
Numbers20:22 Tsô ve hembe hen Kadeshi; Mbaiserael, ka ior ci ca, ve va ar hen uwo u Hor." 
Numbers20:23 TER ôr kwagh a Mose man Aron hen uwo u Hor, sha ikighirtar i Edom la, A kaa er:" 
Numbers20:24 Aron una za kohol ior nav, gadia una nyôr ken tar u M ne Mbaiserael la ga, sha ci u ne hembe ato sha kwaghôron Wam hen mngerem ma Meriba yô." 
Numbers20:25 Yô, kua a Aron man wan na Eleasar, unde a ve sha uwo u Hor;" 
Numbers20:26 er akondo a Aron haa wan na Eleasar; Aron yô, una za kohol ior nav, una kpe sha her." 
Numbers20:27 Tsô Mose er er TER kaa nahan; ve unde sha uwo u Hor sha ashe a ior cii. 
Numbers20:28 Nahan Mose er akondo a Aron haa wan na Eleasar; Aron maa a kpe her sha ityough ki uwoogh; Mose vea Eleasar ve hungwa sha uwo la. 
Numbers20:29 Ior cii mba kaven er Aron a kpe yô, ya u Iserael cii vaa ku u Aron ayange ikundugber." 
Numbers21:1 Tsô tor u Aradi, Orkanaan, u a tema ken Imbusutariyan la, a ungwa gwa er Iserael kar sha gbenda u Atarim, nahan a za nôngo ityav a Iserael, a kôr mbagenev." 
Numbers21:2 Nahan Iserael tsegha zwa a TER, kaa er: Aluer Ú na ikurior ne sha ikev yam mimi yô, me tim agar a ve purututu." 
Numbers21:3 Tsô TER ungwa imo i Iserael, A na Mbakanaan sha ikev ve, ve tim ve purututu kua agar a ve cii; maa i ii ijiir la iti er Horma." 
Numbers21:4 Tsô ve hembe hen uwo u Hor, ve gba yemen gbenda u zan hen zegemnger u Nyian la, sha u vea ningir tar u Edom yô; asema gba yinan ior sha gbenda." 
Numbers21:5 Nahan ior hingir ayôôso a Aôndo man Mose, ve kaa er: Ka nyi ne dugh a vese ken Igipiti ner, sé va ken desereti nahan? Gadia kwaghyan kpaa ngu ga, mngerem kpaa ma ga; kwaghyan u injaa ga ne, due se ishima." 
Numbers21:6 Tsô TER haa iyô i bo hen atô u ior, i nyuma ior; Mbaiserael kpishi pande kpe." 
Numbers21:7 Nahan ior va hen Mose, ve kaa er: Se er isholibo er se hingir ayôôso a TER man a we kpaa yô; sôn TER A̱ kura iyô ne hen a vese kera. Tsô Mose gba sônon sha ci u ior." 
Numbers21:8 Nahan TER kaa a Mose er: Er iyô, hambe sha ityô; nahan yô, hanma or u iyô i nyom nan, nana gema á kenger ngila yô, nana war." 
Numbers21:9 Tsô Mose ker iyô i togula, hambe i sha ityô; nahan or u iyô i nyom nan nan kenger sha iyô i togula la yô, nan war je." 
Numbers21:10 Tsô Mbaiserael hembe za haa afo hen Oboti. 
Numbers21:11 Shi ve hembe hen Oboti, ve za haa afo hen Iye-abarim, ken desereti u a lu sha ishigh ki Moabi, vegher u sha pe iyange i dugh la." 
Numbers21:12 Heera kpaa, ve hembe, ve za haa shin pev u Seredi." 
Numbers21:13 Heera kpaa, ve hembe ve za haa afo yande Arnon u a lu ken desereti u a hii sha tar u Mbaamor la; gadia Arnon ka ikighir i Moabi, ngu hen atô u Moabi a Mbaamor." 
Numbers21:14 Ka nahan man i kaa ken Ruamabera u Ityav mbi TER er: Wahebi u ken Sufa, man upev mba Arnon," 
Numbers21:15 soughsough u upev, u a tingir a sen shin ijiir i teman i Ar, shi a za lian sha ikighir i Moabi la ye." 
Numbers21:16 Heera yô, ve hembe ve yem hen Beer, ijôr i TER kaa a Mose er: Kohol ior imôngo, M̱ na ve mngerem la." 
Numbers21:17 Tsô Iserael wa icam ne er: Va ase mngerem, we ijôr, ter nen i icam;" 
Numbers21:18 ijôr i mbahemenev time, i akpamaior a dugh sha tô, man sha igbough vegh la. Ve hembe hen desereti ve yem Matana;" 
Numbers21:19 ve hembe hen Matana ve yem Nahaliel; ve hembe hen Nahaliel ve yem Bamoti; 
Numbers21:20 ve hembe hen Bamoti ve yem shin pev u hen kpuun kpuun u Moabi, sha ityough ki Pisega u a ver ishigh shin taaikôngo la." 
Numbers21:21 Tsô Iserael tindi mbatyomov hen Shihon, tor u Mbaamor, kaa er:" 
Numbers21:22 Ma m kar hen tar wou; sé kaha sé nyôr ken sule ga, shin ken sule u wain kpaa ga; mngerem ma shin azôr kpaa, sé ma ga; sé kar sha igbudu u tor zan zan sé bee tar wou." 
Numbers21:23 Kpa Shihon rumun er Iserael a̱ kar hen tar na ga, Shihon gema kohol ior nav cii, gba van hen Iserael ken desereti a ishima i num; a va zan zan hen Yahashi; a nôngo ityav a Iserael." 
Numbers21:24 Iserael hemba un sha zwa u sanker, ngohol tar na hii hen Arnon je zan zan za ar hen Yaboki kar za kighir hen Mbaamon, gadia ikighirtar i Mbaamon la taver tsô." 
Numbers21:25 Iserael ngohol agar la cii, nahan Iserael tema ken agar a Mbaamor cii, ken Heshebon kua ken agar a na kpaa." 
Numbers21:26 Gadia Heshebon lu gar u Shihon, tor u Mbaamor; ka un lu nôngo ityav a tor u Moabi u tsuaa la, a ngohol tar na cii zan zan za kighir hen Arnon ye." 
Numbers21:27 Ka nahan man mbaôron kwagh sha anzaakaa ve kaa er: Va nen hen Heshebon, i̱ maa gar u Shihon, a̱ lu her dông." 
Numbers21:28 Gadia usu due ken Heshebon, nombor usu due ken gar u Shihon, u hia Ar u Moabi, mba ve tema tor sha ajiir a taven sha a Arnon la." 
Numbers21:29 Kwagh á tser u, Moabi! Ne saa ve, ne ior i Kemoshi; a er ônov nav mba nomso hingir mba yevese, ônov nav mba kasev ve hingir mbakwarev mba Shihon tor u Mbaamor." 
Numbers21:30 Se ta ve avaan; i tim Heshebon zan zan za ar hen Dibon; se vihi tar la zan zan za ar hen Nofa, za kighir hen Medeba." 
Numbers21:31 Nahan Iserael tema ken tar u Mbaamor la. 
Numbers21:32 Mose tindi er i̱ za nenge mker ken Yaser; ve̱ ngohol agar a na, shi ve̱ zenda Mbaamor mba ve lu her la kpaa." 
Numbers21:33 Tsô ve gema ve gba kôndon sha ian i Bashan; nahan Ogo, tor u Bashan due di a ior nav sha u nôngon ityav a ve, hen Ederei." 
Numbers21:34 TER kaa a Mose er: De cie un ga, gadia M na un sha ikev you; ior nav cii kua tar na kpaa, ú er a na er u er a Shihon, tor u Mbaamor u a tema ken Heshebon la nahan." 
Numbers21:35 Nahan ve wua un a ônov nav mba nomso kua ior nav cii, zan zan ma or kera lu un her ga; maa ve ngohol tar na." 
Numbers22:1 Tsô Mbaiserael hembe, za haa afo hen ukpuunkpuun mba Moabi yande Yordan tiôn u hen Yeriko la." 
Numbers22:2 Yô, Balaki wan u Shipor nenge akaa a Mbaiserael er a Mbaamor la cii." 
Numbers22:3 Nahan Moabi cia ior mbala kpishi sha ci u ve ngee yum yô, ishima gba nyian Moabi a Mbaiserael." 
Numbers22:4 Tsô Moabi kaa a mbavesen mba Midian er: Hegen ikpelaior ne ia ya akaa a a kase se ne cii, er bua ka a kpur toho u ken akôngo nahan. Balaki wan u Shipor lu tor u Moabi hen shighe la." 
Numbers22:5 A tindi mbatyomov hen Balaam wan u Beor, hen Petor, u a lu hen kpe Ifi hen tar u ônov mba ior nav la er, i̱ yila un; a kaa er: Nenge, ior mbagenev za mough ken Igipiti, man nenge, ve va cir tar cii, ve va haa ikua ikua a mo je." 
Numbers22:6 Yô, ma u shi ve, ma u va wem ior mban ifan, gadia ve hembam agee; alaghga me zua a agee a me hemba ve, me zenda ve ken tar ne kera yô; gadia m fa, or u u ver nan doo doo yô, nana lu a iveren je, man u u we nan ifan kpaa, ifan ia kôr di nan je." 
Numbers22:7 Tsô mbavesen mba Moabi man mbavesen mba Midian, ve za a injar i ahir a ve, ve va hen Balaam ve va ôr un kwagh u Balaki la." 
Numbers22:8 A kaa a ve er: Tsa nen heen nyian, tsô me va ôr ne kwagh u TER Una ôrom yô; nahan atiator a Moabi tsa a Balaam." 
Numbers22:9 Tsô Aôndo va hen Balaam, va pine un er: Ka unô ior ve lu a we nee?" 
Numbers22:10 Balaam gema kaa a Aôndo er: Balaki wan u Shipor, tor u Moabi tindim a loho er:" 
Numbers22:11 Nenge, ior mba ve dugh ken Igipiti la, ve va cir tar cii; yô, va ahegen, va wam ve ifan; alaghga me lu a agee a me nôngo ityav a ve, me zenda ve yô." 
Numbers22:12 Aôndo kaa a Balaam er: De ze a ve imôngo ga; man de we ior mbala ifan kpaa ga, gadia ka mba lun a iveren je." 
Numbers22:13 Tsô Balaam mough pepe kaa atiator a Balaki la er: Yem nen ken tar wen tsô, gadia TER rumun er m̱ za a ven ga." 
Numbers22:14 Nahan atiator a Moabi mough hide hen Balaki za kaa er: Balaam rumun u van a vese ga. 
Numbers22:15 Tsô Balaki shi tindi atiator agen, hemba a tsuaa la iyenge, shi hemba a icivir kpaa." 
Numbers22:16 Ve va hen Balaam, ve va kaa a na er: Balaki wan u Shipor kaa nahan er: De rumun ma kwagh a̱ yangen we u van her a mo ze he;" 
Numbers22:17 gadia me na u icivir kpishi, hanma kwagh u u kaam cii me er; yô, shi va, va wam ase ior mban ifan." 
Numbers22:18 Balaam gema kaa a mbayev mba Balaki la er: Shin Balaki una nam ya na a azurfa man zenaria ker poo kpaa, me fatyô u karen imo i TER, Aôndo wam, shin sha kwagh u vesen, shin u kiriki kpaa ga." 
Numbers22:19 Nahan yô, ne kpaa, shi tsa nen heen nyian, sha er me fa kwagh u TER Una shi á ôrom yô." 
Numbers22:20 Nahan Aôndo va hen Balaam tugh, va kaa a na er: Aluer ior mbala va u va yilan we yô, mough, yem a ve imôngo; kpa ka kwagh u Me kaa la tseegh, za er ye." 
Numbers22:21 Tsô Balaam mough pepe, kange jaki na shidi, yem a atiator a Moabi la imôngo." 
Numbers22:22 Kpa ishima vihi Aôndo tsung er a lu zan je yô; Ortyom u TER za tile sha gbenda, sha u yangen un; a lu sha jaki na, mbayev nav uhar kpaa lu a na imôngo." 
Numbers22:23 Tsô jaki nenge Ortyom u TER tile sha gbenda tsuwa sanker kôr sha uwe, nahan jaki kaha nyôr ken toho; Balaam gbidye jaki sha u una hire a i sha gbenda." 
Numbers22:24 Tsô Ortyom u TER za tile hen gbenda u hoghol, hen atô u ishule i wain, i wa gar ken man ken kpaa." 
Numbers22:25 Jaki nengen Ortyom u TER la yô, gba kômbon iyol ken kpekpe, i kighir Balaam nguhar ken kpekpe; nahan shi a gbidye i." 
Numbers22:26 Ortyom u TER la kporom ken hemen, za tile he ijiir i hogholoo ape ian lu i á kaha ken iyan shin ken imese kpaa ga yô." 
Numbers22:27 Jaki nengen a Ortyom u TER la yô, iyav inya a Balaam sha ijime; ishima nyoon Balaam, a gema gbough a gbidye jaki." 
Numbers22:28 Tsô TER bugh jaki zwa, i kaa a Balaam er: M er u nyi, ve u gbidyem acin atar je?" 
Numbers22:29 Balaam kaa a jaki er: Ka sha er u heem yô; mea lu a sanker sha uwe yô, ma m woo u a wua je." 
Numbers22:30 Jaki kaa a Balaam er: Ka mo jaki you i u ndera hendan ayange ou cii zan zan nyian ne gaa? M eren a we nahan mayange kpa? A kaa er: Ei. 
Numbers22:31 Tsô TER bugh Balaam ashe, a nenge Ortyom u TER tile sha gbenda tsuwa sanker kôr sha uwe; nahan a suwa ityough inya, a gure a kuma ishigh inya." 
Numbers22:32 Tsô Ortyom u TER pine un er: Ka nyi u gbidi jaki you acin atar nahana? Nenge, Mo M va sha u yangen we, gadia gbenda ne kam u bo je;" 
Numbers22:33 jaki ne nenge a Mo, i kaha sha ishigh Yagh kuma acin a tar je; ia palegh Mo ga yô, mimi je, ma M woo u a wua je, ma M de i, ma i lu uma." 
Numbers22:34 Tsô Balaam kaa a Ortyom u TER la er: M er isholibo, gadia m fa er We U til sha gbenda sha u hendan a mo ga; yô, ahegen, aluer a doo U ga yô, me hide ijime." 
Numbers22:35 Ortyom u TER la kaa a Balaam er: Yem a ior mban; kpa ka kwagh u Me kaa u la tseegh, za er ye; tsô Balaam yem a atiator a Balaki la imôngo." 
Numbers22:36 Zum u Balaki ungwa er Balaam a ve yô, a due a za kegh un gbenda hen gar u Moabi u a lu sha ikighir i Arnon ikighir i tar shon la je." 
Numbers22:37 Balaki kaa a Balaam er: M tindi loho hen we tsung mer va ga? Man ka nyi u ve her a mo ga nahana? M kera fatyô u nan we icivir kpishi je gaa? 
Numbers22:38 Balaam kaa a Balaki er: Nenge, m va her a we je ve, kpa kwaghôron yô, me fatyô u ôron ma kwagh jee? Kwagh u TER A ne ken zwa wam ka un je me ôr ye." 
Numbers22:39 Tsô Balaam yem vea Balaki imôngo, ve va hen Kiriati-husoti." 
Numbers22:40 Nahan Balaki na nagh sha ibua man iyôngo, a pande a tindi Balaam a mi kua atiator a a lu a na imôngo la." 
Numbers22:41 Tsô sev mbu aven yô, Balaki mough vea Balaam za a na sha ajiir a taven sha a Baal, pe a fatyô u nengen a kpeafogh u ior la yô." 
Numbers23:1 Tsô Balaam kaa a Balaki er: Tam atse ataankarahar heen man shi verem anomabua ataankarahar man shi anomaiyôngo ataankarahar kpaa; 
Numbers23:2 Balaki er er Balaam kaa un nahan; tsô Balaki vea Balaam na nagh sha nombua man nomiyôngo sha atse la ser ser. 
Numbers23:3 Nahan Balaam kaa a Balaki er: Lu hen nagh ough ku nanden, mo me za; alaghga TER Una va kohol mo; hanma kwagh u Una pasem cii me ôr u. Tsô a unde sha igungu i kpuun kpuun." 
Numbers23:4 Aôndo va kohol Balaam; Balaam kaa a Na er: M ta atse ataankarahar, m na nagh sha nombua man nomiyôngo sha atse la ser ser." 
Numbers23:5 Tsô TER na kwaghôron ken zwa u Balaam, A kaa er: Hide hen Balaki, ka kwagh ne za ôr un ye." 
Numbers23:6 Nahan a hide hen a na; yô, un lu hen nagh nagh ku nanden heregh, a atiator a Moabi cii." 
Numbers23:7 Tsô a tôô injakwagh na, a kaa er: Ka hen Aram je Balaki a za koo a mo ye, ka tor u Moabi je, ka sha iwo i sha ityoughkitaregh la: Va, va wam Yakob ifan, va, yuwe a Iserael," 
Numbers23:8 Me er nan man me wa mba Aôndo A we ve ifan ga la ifana? Me er nan man me yuwe a mba TER A yugh a ve ga laa? 
Numbers23:9 Gadia er m til sha ityough ki avande yô, m nenge a na; er m til sha agungu yô, m kav un; nenge, ka ikurior i teman tseke ve, mba nongo a akuraior agen ga." 
Numbers23:10 Ka an nana fatyô u ôron iyenge i vuulevu u Yakob, shin iyenge i umôm-ken-unyiin u Iseraela? Ma m kpe ku u orperapera, mkur wam ma a lu er u na nahan!" 
Numbers23:11 Tsô Balaki kaa a Balaam er: Ka nyi u er a mo nahana? M za va a we mer va wam mbaihomov av ifan, man nenge ase, u gema u ver ve a ver doo doo." 
Numbers23:12 A kaa a na er: Kera ka u me ver ishima me ôr kwagh u TER A ne ken zwa wam la tseegh gaa? 
Numbers23:13 Balaki kaa a na er: Shi va, sé yem ijiir igen, pe shi ú za nenge a ve yô; ka kpeafogh ve tseegh ú nenge a mi ye, ú nenge a ve cii ga; za wam ve ifan her." 
Numbers23:14 Tsô a za a na ken ikôngough ki Sofim, sha ityough ki Pisega, a ta atse ataankarahar, a na nagh sha nombua man nomiyôngo sha atse la ser ser." 
Numbers23:15 Tsô a kaa a Balaki er: Lu hen nagh ough ku nanden; mo me za me za kegh keela. 
Numbers23:16 Tsô TER va kohol Balaam, na un kwaghôron ken zwa. A kaa er: Hide hen Balaki, ka kwagh ne za ôr un ye." 
Numbers23:17 Nahan A va her a na; yô, un lu hen nagh nagh ku nanden heregh, atiator a Moabi kpaa lu a na. Balaki pine un er: Tsô TER kaa nana?" 
Numbers23:18 Nahan a tôô injakwagh na a kaa er: Mough! Tile sha, Balaki, ungwa; kegh ato her a mo, we wan u Shipor;" 
Numbers23:19 Aôndo ka or man Una er aie ga; shi ka wan u or man Una vaa afanyô kpaa ga; Una kaa kwagh yô, Una kera er sha mi gaa? Man Una ôr kwagh yô, Una kera kure sha mi vough gaa?" 
Numbers23:20 Nenge, i nam zwa er m̱ na iveren; Un A na iveren kera ve, mo me fatyô u geman i kposo ga." 
Numbers23:21 I nenge a ifer ken Yakob ga, shi i nenge a injughul ken Iserael kpaa ga; TER, Aôndo na, ngu a na imôngo, awer a gbiren a ember tor nga her a ve." 
Numbers23:22 Aôndo u A dugh a ve ken tar u Igipiti la; ngu ve er ikoryaregh nahan. 
Numbers23:23 Mimi je, ma ishor i kpehen i ia kôr Yakob ngi ga, ma ahir a eren a aa er Iserael kwagh kpaa, nga ga. Hegen yô, á pase sha Yakob man Iserael kwagh u Aôndo A er yô:" 
Numbers23:24 Nenge, ikurior ne ngi moughon er ngôbegha nahan, man ngi moughon tilen tswang er begha nahan; una yav inya ga, saa una ya kwagh u a tusu a min, man una ma awambe a mba a woo ve yô." 
Numbers23:25 Tsô Balaki kaa a Balaam er: Yô ifan kpaa de we ve ga, iveren kpaa de kera veren ve doo doo ga." 
Numbers23:26 Kpa Balaam gema kaa a Balaki er: M kaa u mer: Kwagh u TER A kaa la, ka un me er kpee ye gaa?" 
Numbers23:27 Balaki kaa a Balaam er: Va, m̱ za a we hen ijiir igen; alaghga á za lu Aôndo pe ú wam ve ifan her." 
Numbers23:28 Tsô Balaki za a Balaam sha ityough ki Peor u a ver ishigh shin taaikôngo la. 
Numbers23:29 Balaam kaa a Balaki er: Tam atse ataankarahar heen, verem anomabua ataankarahar man shi anomaiyôngo ataankarahar." 
Numbers23:30 Tsô Balaki er er Balaam kaa un nahan, a na nagh sha nombua man nomiyôngo sha atse la ser ser." 
Numbers24:1 Zum u Balaam nenge lu TER pe veren Iserael doo doo yô, a kera due a ker uivande er sha ashighe agen la nahan ga, kpa a ver ishigh nagh vegher u shin desereti." 
Numbers24:2 Tsô Balaam kende ashe sha, a nenge Iserael haa afo sha ikwe ikwe, tsô Jijingi u TER gba sha a na." 
Numbers24:3 A tôô injakwagh na, a kaa er: Mpase u Balaam wan u Beor, mpase u or u bughun ashe," 
Numbers24:4 mpase u or u ungwan akaaôron a Aôndo, u a nengen mpase u Uhembanagee, u a gbe inya, ashe a na a lu ivegher la." 
Numbers24:5 Utenti ou doo je, Yakob; ka ajiir a teman a ou la, Iserael!" 
Numbers24:6 Er apev a a lu geghekeke nahan; er ishule hen kpeifi; er ikon i alou i TER A môôr; er ikon i sedar i hen kpemnger yô. 
Numbers24:7 Mngerem maa kuwan shin ubaketi nav, ivor na ia lu hen pe mngerem ma ngee yô; tor na una hemba Agagu, á kende a tartor na sha." 
Numbers24:8 Aôndo u A dugh a na ken Igipiti, ngu un er ikoryaregh nahan; Una ya akuraior a a lu ihom a na yô, Una hembe akuhe a ve avur avur, Una ta ve avaan a na tsula." 
Numbers24:9 A gure a yav inya er begha nahan, man er ngôbegha nahan; ka an je nana num unu? Hanma or u nan ver u doo doo yô, á ver nan doo doo. Hanma or u nan we u ifan yô, á wa nan di ifan je." 
Numbers24:10 Tsô ishima vihi Balaki a Balaam, a gbire ave; Balaki kpaa kaa a Balaam er: M yila u mer, va wam mbaihomov av ifan, man nenge u gem u veren ve a ver doo doo, ka acin atar je ne." 
Numbers24:11 Yô, mough yem ken ya wou; m fa mer me civir we kpishi je, kpa nenge, TER bunde u icivir ve." 
Numbers24:12 Balaam kaa a Balaki er: Mo kpaa, iyange m kaa a mbatyomov ou mba u tindi hen a mo la mer:" 
Numbers24:13 Shin Balaki una nam ya na a azurfa man zenaria ker poo kpaa, me fatyô u karen imo i TER, eren ma kwagh sha ishima yam ga, shin a lu u doon shin a lu u bo kpaa; kwagh u TER A kaa la, ka un me kaa ye gaa?" 
Numbers24:14 Hegen yô, yemen yam hen ior av; va m̱ pase u kwagh u ikurior ne ia va er a ior ou sha ayange a masetyô yô." 
Numbers24:15 Tsô a tôô injakwagh na, a kaa er: Mpase u Balaam wan u Beor, mpase u or u bughun ashe," 
Numbers24:16 mpase u or u ungwan akaaôron a Aôndo, u a fe kwaghfan u Uhembanagee, u a nengen mpase u Uhembanagee, u a gbe inya, ashe a na a lu ivegher la." 
Numbers24:17 M nenge a na, kpa ka hegen ga; m ta ashe m nenge a na, kpa ka ikua ga; ishan ia due ken Yakob, tôgh ku torough kua lu hen Iserael, una hembe a-ase a Moabi, una zôhô ônov mba Setu." 
Numbers24:18 Edom una hingir sha ikev i orgen; Seir kpaa, una hingir sha ikev i orgen, ve mba ve lu mbaihomov nav la; kpa Iserael yô una hemban a hemba her," 
Numbers24:19 una tema ken Yakob una kuran tar, una tim mba ve shi ken gar kera." 
Numbers24:20 A nenge a Amaleki, tsô a tôô injakwagh na, a kaa er: Akuraior cii, ka Amaleki a lu u hiihii ye; kpa mkur na yô, á lu mtim." 
Numbers24:21 A nenge a Mbakeni, tsô a tôô injakwagh na, a kaa er: Ijiir you i teman ngi taveraa, i wa u iya ken vande;" 
Numbers24:22 nahan kpaa, á tim Kain kera, mase shin nan, man Ashur una yem a we uikangena?" 
Numbers24:23 A shi a tôô injakwagh na, a kaa er: Wu! Ka an je nana lu uma zum u Aôndo Una va er kwagh laa?" 
Numbers24:24 Kpa utso vea due ken Kitim, vea er Ashur ican, shi vea er Eber ican; un di kpaa una tim." 
Numbers24:25 Tsô Balaam mough, yem, hire hen ya na; Balaki di yem a nagh." 
Numbers25:1 Zum u Iserael lu hen Shitim la, ior hii u eren idya a ônkasev mba Moabi;" 
Numbers25:2 ve ve lôhô ior iniav mbi mbaaôndo vev. Nahan ior ve ya, shi ve gure ve civir mbaaôndo vev kpaa." 
Numbers25:3 Iserael zua vea Baal-Peor kangenaa; tsô ishima nyoon TER a Iserael tsung. 
Numbers25:4 TER kaa a Mose er: Kôr mbahemenev mba ior mbala cii, sende ve ken oo sha ci u TER, sha er ishima i nyoon i TER i tsung la i̱ hide ijime hen Iserael yô." 
Numbers25:5 Tsô Mose ka a mbaajiriv mba Iserael er: Hanma or nana̱ wua ior mba nan mba ve zough a Baal-Peor la 
Numbers25:6 Yô, orgen u ken Mbaiserael za va a kwase u Midian va nyôr a mi hen anmgbianev nav sha ashe a Mose je kua sha ashe a ior i Mbaiserael cii, er ve lu vaan hen hunda u tenti u kohol ker la je." 
Numbers25:7 Zum u Pinehashi, wan u Eleasar, wan u pristi Aron, nenge nahan yô, a mough hen atô u ior, a kôr iwange sha uwe," 
Numbers25:8 a cir or u Iserael la ijime zan zan a nyôr ken tenti, a za kuma ve uhar cii, a kuma or u Iserael la kar kôr kwase la, a pev un iyav. Nahan bouange la maa mem hen Mbaiserael." 
Numbers25:9 Mba ve kpe bouange la yô, lu ior dubu ikundu kar unyiin je." 
Numbers25:10 Tsô TER ôr kwagh a Mose, kaa er:" 
Numbers25:11 Pinehashi wan u Eleasar wan u pristi Aron a kar a ishima i nyoon Yam la hen ônov mba Iserael kera ve, sha er a we iyol sha kwagh Wam ken atô ve, nahan M kera tim ônov mba Iserael sha iyol i wan sha kwagh Wam la ga." 
Numbers25:12 Nahan yô, kaa wer: Nenge, M ya ikur Yam a na i bem," 
Numbers25:13 ia lu un a tsombor na u ken ijime na, ikuryan i sha tom u pristi gbem, sha er a we iyol sha kwagh u Aôndo na, man a ne iwom sha ci u Mbaiserael kpaa yô." 
Numbers25:14 Iti i Oriserael u i wua un a kwase u Midian la er, Shimeri wan u Salu, lu orhemen u hen ya u ter na ken nongo u Shimeon." 
Numbers25:15 Iti i kwase u Midian u i wua la er, Kosebi wan u Sur u a lu orhemen hen ya u ter na, ken Mbamidian la." 
Numbers25:16 Tsô TER ôr kwagh a Mose A kaa er: 
Numbers25:17 Ta num sha Mbamidian wua ve," 
Numbers25:18 gadia ve nôngo num a ven sha atseregh a ve er a ven sha kwagh u Peor man sha kwagh u Kosebi anngô ve u kwase, wan u ititor i Midian, u i wua un sha iyange i bouange u sha kwagh u Peor la." 
Numbers26:1 Tsô bouange la been kera yô, TER ôr kwagh a Mose man Eleasar wan u pristi Aron, A kaa er:" 
Numbers26:2 Ôr iyenge i ior i Mbaiserael cii, hii sha mba ve kom anyom ikundu man mba ve hembe nahan, sha uya mba uter vev, hanma or u Iserael u nan kom u zan ityav yô." 
Numbers26:3 Tsô Mose man pristi Eleasar ôr kwagh a ve hen ukpuunkpuun mba Moabi hen kpe u Yordan tiôn u hen Yeriko la, ve kaa er:" 
Numbers26:4 I̱ ôr iyenge i ior, i̱ hii sha mba ve kom anyom ikundu man mba ve hembe nahan, er TER kaa Mose kua Mbaiserael, mba ve due ken Igipiti la nahan." 
Numbers26:5 Ruben lu waniunda u Iserael; ônov mba Ruben yô, ka: Hanoki orhemenegh u ipaven u Mbahanoki; Palu orhemenegh u ipaven u Mbapalu;" 
Numbers26:6 Heseron orhemenegh u ipaven u Mbaheseron; Karmi orhemenegh u ipaven u Mbakarmi. 
Numbers26:7 Ka uipaven mba Mbaruben je ne; mba i ôr iyenge ve yô, lu ior dubu akunduahar kar utar man deri utaankaruhar man ikundugber." 
Numbers26:8 Ônov mba Palu yô, ka Eliabi." 
Numbers26:9 Ônov mba Eliabi yô, ka: Nemuel man Datan kua Abiram. Mban ka Datan man Abiram mba i tsuwa ve ken ior, mba ve hingir num a Mose man Aron a ior mba Koraki la imôngo, zum u ve hingir num a TER la," 
Numbers26:10 nahan inya aver zwa, mena ve a Koraki imôngo, zum u ior mbala kpe la; ka shighe u usu hia ior deri uhar man akunduahargber, maa ve hingir ikav je." 
Numbers26:11 Kpa ônov mba Koraki yô, kpe ga." 
Numbers26:12 Ônov mba Shimeon sha uipaven vev yô, ka: Nemuel orhemenegh u ipaven u Mbanemuel; Yamin orhemenegh u ipaven u Mbayamin; Yakin orhemenegh u ipaven u Mbayakin;" 
Numbers26:13 Seraki orhemenegh u ipaven u Mbaseraki; Shaul orhemenegh u ipaven u Mbashaul. 
Numbers26:14 Ka uipaven mba Mbashimeon je ne; lu ior dubu ikundu kar uhar man deri uhar. 
Numbers26:15 Ônov mba Gadi sha uipaven vev yô, ka: Sefon orhemenegh u ipaven u Mbasefon; Hagi orhemenegh u ipaven u Mbahagi; Shuni orhemenegh u ipaven u Mbashuni;" 
Numbers26:16 Oseni orhemenegh u ipaven u Mbaoseni; Eri orhemenegh u ipaven u Mbaeri; 
Numbers26:17 Arodi orhemenegh u ipaven u Mbaarodi; Arelu orhemenegh u ipaven u Mbaarelu. 
Numbers26:18 Ka uipaven mba ônov mba Gadi mba i ôr iyenge ve je ne; lu ior dubu akunduahar man deri utaan. 
Numbers26:19 Ônov mba Yuda ka: Er man Onan; Er man Onan yô, ve kpe ken tar u Kanaan." 
Numbers26:20 Ônov mba Yuda sha uipaven vev yô, ka: Shela orhemenegh u ipaven u Mbashela; Perese orhemenegh u ipaven u Mbaperese; Seraki orhemenegh u ipaven u Mbaseraki." 
Numbers26:21 Ônov mba Perese yô, ka: Heseron orhemenegh u ipaven u Mbaheseron; Hamul orhemenegh u ipaven u Mbahamul." 
Numbers26:22 Ka uipaven mba Yuda mba i ôr iyenge ve je ne; lu ior dubu akunduatargber kar ataratar man deri utaan. 
Numbers26:23 Ônov mba Isakar sha uipaven vev yô, ka: Tola orhemenegh u ipaven u Mbatola; Pua orhemenegh u ipaven u Mbapua;" 
Numbers26:24 Yashubi orhemenegh u ipaven u Mbayasubi; Shimeron orhemenegh u ipaven u Mbashimeron. 
Numbers26:25 Ka uipaven mba Isakar mba i ôr iyenge ve je ne; lu ior dubu akunduatar kar unyiin man deri utar. 
Numbers26:26 Ônov mba Sebulon sha uipaven vev yô, ka: Seredi orhemenegh u ipaven u Mbaseredi; Elon orhemenegh u ipaven u Mbaelon; Yahel orhemenegh u ipaven u Mbayahel." 
Numbers26:27 Ka uipaven mba Mbasebulon mba i ôr iyenge ve je ne; lu ior dubu akunduatar man deri utaan. 
Numbers26:28 Ônov mba Yosev sha uipaven vev yô, ka: Manase man Eferaim." 
Numbers26:29 Ônov mba Manase yô, ka: Makir orhemenegh u ipaven u Mbamakir; Makir mar Gileadi, Gileadi gema lu orhemenegh u ipaven u Mbagileadi." 
Numbers26:30 Ônov mba Gileadi yô, ka: Ieser orhemenegh u ipaven u Mbaieser; Heleki orhemenegh u ipaven u Mbaheleki;" 
Numbers26:31 Aseriel orhemenegh u ipaven u Mbaaseriel; Shekem orhemenegh u ipaven u Mbashekem; 
Numbers26:32 Shemida orhemenegh u ipaven u Mbashemida; Hefer orhemenegh u ipaven u Mbahefer. 
Numbers26:33 Selofehadi wan u Hefer lu a wan u nomso ga, a lu a ônov mba kasev tseegh; ati a ônov mba kasev mba Selofehadi yô, ka: Mahela man Noa man Hogela man Milka kua Tirsa." 
Numbers26:34 Ka uipaven mba Manase mba i ôr iyenge ve je ne; lu ior dubu akunduahargber kar uhar man deri utaankaruhar. 
Numbers26:35 Ônov mba Eferaim sha uipaven vev yô, ka: Sutela orhemenegh u ipaven u Mabasetula; Tahan Beker orhemenegh u ipaven u Mbabeker;" 
Numbers26:36 Ônov mba Sutela yô, ka: Eran orhemenegh u ipaven u Mbaeran." 
Numbers26:37 Ka uipaven mba ônov mba Eferaim mba i ôr iyenge ve je ne; lu ior dubu ikundugber kar uhar man deri utaan. Ka ônov mba Yosev sha uipaven vev je ne. 
Numbers26:38 Ônov mba Benyamin sha uipaven vev yô, ka: Bela orhemenegh u ipaven u Mbabela; Asebel orhemenegh u ipaven u Mbaasebel; Ahiram orhemenegh u ipaven u Mbaahiram;" 
Numbers26:39 Shefufam orhemenegh u ipaven u Mbashefufam; Hufam orhemenegh u ipaven u Mbahufam. 
Numbers26:40 Ônov mba Bela yô, ka Ardi kua Naaman; Ardi lu orhemenegh u ipaven u Mbaardi; Naaman gema lu orhemenegh u ipaven u Mbanaaman." 
Numbers26:41 Ka ônov mba Benyamin sha uipaven vev mba i ôr iyenge ve je ne; lu ior dubu akunduahar kar utaan man deri ataratar. 
Numbers26:42 Ônov mba Dan sha uipaven vev yô, ka: Suham orhemenegh u uipaven mba Mbasuham; ka uipaven mba Dan sha uipaven vev je ne." 
Numbers26:43 Uipaven mba Mbasuham cii, mba i ôr iyenge ve yô, lu ior dubu akunduatar kar unyiin man deri unyiin." 
Numbers26:44 Ônov mba Asher sha uipaven vev yô, ka: Imna orhemenegh u ipaven u Mbaimna: Ishevi orhemenegh u ipaven u Mbaishevi; Beria orhemenegh u ipaven u Mbaberia." 
Numbers26:45 Ônov mba Beria yô, ka: Heber orhemenegh u ipaven u Mbaheber; Malkiel orhemenegh u ipaven u Mbamalkiel." 
Numbers26:46 Iti i wan u Asher u kwase er Sera. 
Numbers26:47 Ka uipaven mba ônov mba Asher mba i ôr iyenge ve je ne; lu ior dubu akunduahargber kar utar man deri unyiin. 
Numbers26:48 Ônov mba Nafetali sha uipaven vev yô, ka: Yakeseel orhemenegh u ipaven u Mbayakeseel; Guni orhemenegh u ipaven u Mbaguni;" 
Numbers26:49 Yeser orhemenegh u ipaven u Mbayeser; Shilem orhemenegh u ipaven u Mbashilem. 
Numbers26:50 Ka uipaven mba Nafetali sha uipaven vev mba i ôr iyenge ve je ne; lu ior dubu akunduahar kar utaan man deri unyiin. 
Numbers26:51 Ka ônov mba Iserael mba i er iyenge ve je ne; lu ior dubu deri ataratar dubu kar môm man deri utaankaruhar man ikundugber. 
Numbers26:52 Tsô TER ôr kwagh a Mose kaa er: 
Numbers26:53 I̱ kar ior mban tar sha iyenge i ati ve la, u̱ hingir dyako ve." 
Numbers26:54 Mba ve ngee yô, na ve dyako a̱ ngee; mba ve ndahar yô, na ve dyako a̱ ndahar; na hanma kwe dyako sha mlu u iyenge i u la." 
Numbers26:55 Nahan kpaa, ka sha ishor i eren á kar tar la ye; ka sha ati a ikwe i uter vev vea ya dyako ye." 
Numbers26:56 Ka sha ishor i eren man á kar mba ve ngee man mba ve ndahar la kpaa, dyako ve ye." 
Numbers26:57 Mbalevi mba i er iyenge ve sha uipaven vev yô, ka: Gershon orhemenegh u ipaven u Mbagershon; Kohati orhemenegh u ipaven u Mbakohati; Merari orhemenegh u ipaven u Mbamerari." 
Numbers26:58 Uipaven mba Levi yô, ka: Ipaven u Mbalibeni man ipaven u Mbaheberon man ipaven u Mbamaheli man ipaven u Mbamushi kua ipaven u Mbakora. Kohati mar Amram." 
Numbers26:59 Iti i kwase u Amram er Yokebedi, wan u Levi, u Levi mar un ken Igipiti la; ônov mba a mar a Amram ka: Aron man Mose kwa Miriam anngô ve u kwase." 
Numbers26:60 Aron mar Nadabi man Abihu man Eleasar kua Itamar. 
Numbers26:61 Nadabi man Abihu yô, ve kpe, zum u ve na nagh sha usu ugen kposo sha ishigh ki TER la." 
Numbers26:62 Mba i ôr iyenge ve yô, lu ior dubu ikundu kar utar; hanma nomsoor hii sha mba ve kom uwer môm man mba ve hembe nahan; gadia i na ve dyako ken ônov mba Iserael ga." 
Numbers26:63 Ka ve mba Mose vea pristi Eleasar ôr iyenge ve ne; ve ôr iyenge i ônov mba Iserael hen ukpuunkpuun mba Moabi hen kpe u Yordan tiôn u hen Yeriko la. 
Numbers26:64 Mba Mose man pristi Aron vande ôron iyenge ve zum u ve ôr iyenge i ônov mba Iserael ken desereti u Senai la yô, mô ve môm kera lu ken mban ga." 
Numbers26:65 Gadia TER ôr kwagh ve er: Vea kpe ken desereti kpee; nahan mô ve môm kera shi ga, saa Kalebu wan u Yefune man Yosua wan u Nun." 
Numbers27:1 Tsô ônov mba kasev mba Selofehadi, wan u Hefer, wan u Gileadi, wan u Makir, wan u Manase, ken uipaven mba Manase wan u Yosev, ve za va; ati a ônov nav mba kasev mbala er: Mahela man Noa man Hogela man Milka kua Tirsa." 
Numbers27:2 Ve tile sha ishigh ki Mose man pristi Eleasar man sha ishigh ki mbahemenev man ior cii, hen hunda u tenti u kohol ker la, ve kaa er:" 
Numbers27:3 TER wase kpe ken desereti, man un yô, nyôr nongo a ior mba ve hingir ayongo a TER la ga, ka ior mba Koraki je la, kpa a kpe sha isholibo na iyol na, wannomso kpaa lu a mi ga." 
Numbers27:4 Inja na nan iti i ter wase i̱ gba saan ken nongo na kera, sha ci u a lu a wannomso ga nahana? Yô, na se dyako a anngôôv mba ter wase mba nomso imôngo." 
Numbers27:5 Tsô Mose va a kwagh ve la hen TER. 
Numbers27:6 TER ôr kwagh a Mose, kaa er:" 
Numbers27:7 Ônov mba kasev mba Selofehadi kaa sha mi, na ve kwar a anngôôv mba ter ve imôngo kpee; gema dyako u ter ve la na ve." 
Numbers27:8 Ôr kwagh a Mbaiserael, kaa a ve wer: Aluer or á kpe man nana lu a wannomso ga yô, i̱ gema dyako u nan i̱ na wan u nan u kwase." 
Numbers27:9 Aluer nana lu a wan u kwase ga yô, i̱ gema dyako u nan i̱ na anngôôv mba nan mba nomso." 
Numbers27:10 Man aluer nana lu a anngôôv mba nomso ga yô, i̱ gema dyako u nan i̱ na anngôôv mba ter u nan." 
Numbers27:11 Man aluer ter u nan una lu a anngôôv ga yô, i̱ gema dyako u nan i̱ na anmgbian u a dondo a nan ken nongo u nan la, a̱ ya; kwagh ne a̱ hingir Mbaiserael tindi, ve̱ eren nahan, er TER A kaa Mose nahan." 
Numbers27:12 Tsô TER kaa a Mose er: Unde sha uwo u Abarim ne, ta ashe nenge tar u M ne Mbaiserael la." 
Numbers27:13 Zum u ú nenge a u yô, we kpaa ú za kohol ior ou, er anngôu Aron a za kohol mba nav nahan;" 
Numbers27:14 sha ci u ne hemba ato sha kwaghôron Wam ken desereti u Zin, zum u ior hingir ayôôso la, ne kera tsegham hen mnger sha ashe ve ga yô. Ka mngerem ma Meriba hen Kadeshi ken desereti u Zin je la." 
Numbers27:15 Tsô Mose ôr kwagh a TER, A kaa er:" 
Numbers27:16 TER, Aôndo u ujijingi mba uuma cii, A̱ ver ior mban or" 
Numbers27:17 u nana hemen ve u duen man nana hemen ve u nyôron, nana duen ve̱ man nana hiden a ve, sha er ior i̱ de hingir er ilev mbi mbi lu a orkuran ga ze." 
Numbers27:18 Tsô TER kaa a Mose er: Va a Yosua wan u Nun, or u Jijingi A lu ken a na la, penda uwegh sha a na," 
Numbers27:19 ver un sha ishigh ki pristi Eleasar kua sha ishigh ki ior cii, na un tom ne sha ishiv vev je." 
Numbers27:20 Pande icivir you na un, ior i Mbaiserael cii ve̱ wa iko." 
Numbers27:21 Ka sha ishigh ki pristi Eleasar una tilen er a pinen ipasen i Urim sha ishigh ki TER sha ci na ye; ka sha imo na vea duen ye, shi ka sha imo na kpaa vea nyôron ye, un a Mbaiserael cii a na imôngo, ka ior cii je la" 
Numbers27:22 Tsô Mose er er TER kaa un nahan; a va a Yosua a va ver un sha ishigh ki pristi Eleasar man sha ishigh ki ior cii; 
Numbers27:23 tsô a penda un ave, a ver un sha tom, er TER kaa Mose nahan." 
Numbers28:1 TER ôr kwagh a Mose, A kaa er:" 
Numbers28:2 Kaa ônov mba Iserael wer: Ver nen asema, nam nen nagh Agh, kwaghyan Wam, sha ci u iniav Yav mbi usuv mbi humandoon la, sha ashighe a i ver yô." 
Numbers28:3 Kaa a ve wer: Nagh ku usugh ku né naan TER yô, i̱ luun agumaiyôngo a a kom inyom i môm i môm, a a lu a ihogholough iyol ga yô, ahar ahar sha hanma iyange cii, sha ci u nagh ku nanden gbem ku bunden ga la." 
Numbers28:4 Gumiyôngo u môm ú na pepe, ugen la ú na aikighe." 
Numbers28:5 Man mwem ma kengese ma ma kom môm-ken-upue u efa, sha ci u nagh ku sha samuyia, ma i nongo mkurem ma kumen a kume sha mi yô, ma ma kom môm-ken-unyiin u hin yô." 
Numbers28:6 Ka nagh ku nanden gbem ku bunden ga, ku i hii nan ku hen uwo u Senai er ku lu ihuma i dedoo la; ka nagh ku usugh ku nan TER." 
Numbers28:7 Nagh ku man ku á magh sha mi yô, ku kuma môm-ken-unyiin u hin sha ci u hanma gumiyôngo; ka ken icighanjiir je ú toon TER nagh ku man ku kwaghman u taver la, hen inya ye." 
Numbers28:8 Gumiyôngo ugen la yô, ú na nagh a mi aikighe; er u ne nagh ku sha samuyia ku pepe man nagh ku man ku i magh sha mi la nahan, kape ú naan kun kpaa la; ka nagh ku usugh ku human doon TER." 
Numbers28:9 Sha iyange i memen yô, i̱ lu agumaiyôngo ahar a a kom inyom i môm i môm, a a lu a ihogholough iyol ga yô, man mwem ma kengese ma ma kom uikaren uhar-ken-upue u efa sha ci u nagh ku sha samuyia, ma i nongo mkurem sha mi yô, kua nagh ku man ku maghen sha mi kpaa;" 
Numbers28:10 ka nagh ku nanden ku sha hanma iyange i memen je ne, man shi nagh ku nanden ku gbem ku bunden ga la, kua nagh ku man ku maghen sha mi." 
Numbers28:11 Sha mhii u hanma uwer wen yô, naan nen TER nagh ku nanden, agumabua ahar man nomiyôngo môm man agumaiyôngo ataankarahar a a kom inyom i môm i môm, a a lu a ihogholough iyol ga yô," 
Numbers28:12 man mwem ma kengese ma ma kom uikaren utar-ken-upue sha ci u nagh ku sha samuyia, ma i nongo mkurem sha mi yô, sha ci u hanma gumbua; man mwem ma kengese ma ma kom uikaren uhar-ken-upue sha ci u nagh ku sha samuyia, ma i nongo mkurem sha mi yô, sha ci u nomiyôngo u môm la;" 
Numbers28:13 man mwem ma kengese, ma ma kom ikaren môm-ken-upue ma i nongo mkurem sha mi yô, sha ci u nagh ku sha samuyia, sha hanma gumiyôngo; ka nagh ku nanden ku humandoon, shi ka nagh ku usugh ku nan TER kpaa je la." 
Numbers28:14 Iniav mbi man mbi á magh sha mi yô, mbi̱ lu wain, a̱ kuma vegher u hin sha nombua, man môm-ken-utar u hin sha nomiyôngo, man môm-ken-unyiin u hin sha gumiyôngo; ka nagh ku nanden ku sha iwer iwer, sha iwer i inyom la cii je la." 
Numbers28:15 Man kpev môm sha ci u nagh ku isholibo ku nan TER; i̱ na ku a nagh ku nanden ku gbem la imôngo kua nagh ku man ku maghen sha mi la. 
Numbers28:16 Uwer u hiihii, sha ayange a u pue kar unyiin la, ka Paseka u TER." 
Numbers28:17 Uwer ne sha ayange a u pue kar ataan la, i̱ er iniongo i yan bredi u i we kwa sha mi ga yô, ayange ataankarahar." 
Numbers28:18 Sha iyange i hiihii la, i̱ er icighanmkohol; de eren nen ma tom u ican ga;" 
Numbers28:19 na nen TER nagh ku usugh, ka nagh ku nanden je la, sha agumabua ahar man nomiyôngo môm man agumaiyôngo ataankarahar a a kom inyom i môm i môm yô, a a lu ne a ihogholough iyol ga yô;" 
Numbers28:20 man nagh ku sha samuyia ku maghen sha mi, mwem ma kengese ma i nongo mkurem sha mi yô, na nen uikaren utar-ken-upue sha nombua, man uikaren uhar-ken-upue sha nomiyôngo;" 
Numbers28:21 na ikaren môm-ken-upue sha hanma gumiyôngo sha agumaiyôngo ataankarahar la cii; 
Numbers28:22 man kpev môm sha ci u nagh ku isholibo, sha u nan iwom sha ci wen." 
Numbers28:23 Na nen mbin cii a nagh ku nanden ku pepe ku ku lu nagh ku nanden ku gbem la imôngo. 
Numbers28:24 Ka gbenda u naan nen nagh a mi ayange ayange ne, zan zan ayange ataankarahar la cii, i̱ lu kwaghyan u nagh ku usugh ku humandoon TER, i̱ na ku a nagh ku nanden ku gbem la imôngo kua nagh ku man ku maghen sha mi la kpaa." 
Numbers28:25 Sha iyange i ataankarahar la, er nen icighanmkohol, de eren nen ma tom u ican ga." 
Numbers28:26 Man shi sha iyange i iyiagh ki tsutswagh zum u ne na TER nagh ku sha samuyia ku hegh sha iniongo yen i ulahadi la yô, er nen icighanmkohol, de eren nen ma tom u ican ga," 
Numbers28:27 kpa na nen TER nagh ku nanden ku human doon sha agumabua ahar man nomiyôngo môm man agumaiyôngo ataankarahar a a kom inyom i môm i môm yô; 
Numbers28:28 man nagh ku sha samuyia ku maghen sha mi, mwem ma kengese ma i nongo mkurem sha mi yô, ma ma kom uikaren utar-ken-upue, sha hanma gumbua man uikaren uhar-ken-upue sha nomiyôngo môm la," 
Numbers28:29 man ikaren môm-ken-upue sha hanma gumiyôngo, sha agumaiyôngo ataankarahar la cii;" 
Numbers28:30 man kpev môm sha u nan iwom sha ci wen. 
Numbers28:31 Naan nen mbi a nagh ku nanden ku gbem kua nagh ku sha samuyia ku maghen sha mi la imôngo, i̱ lu mbi mbi lu ne a ihogholough iyol ga yô, kua iniav mbi man mbi maghen sha mi la kpaa." 
Numbers29:1 Uwer u sha utaankaruhar, sha iyange i hiihii i u la, er nen icighanmkohol, de eren nen ma tom u ican ga, i̱ lu ne iyange i tôngon ikor." 
Numbers29:2 Na nen TER nagh ku nanden ku humandoon sha gumbua môm man nomiyôngo môm man agumaiyôngo ataankarahar a a kom inyom i môm i môm, a a lu a ihogholough iyol ga yô;" 
Numbers29:3 man nagh ku sha samuyia ku maghen sha mi, mwem ma kengese, ma i nongo mkurem sha mi yô, ma ma kom uikaren utar-ken-upue sha nombua, man uikaren uhar-ken-upue sha nomiyôngo," 
Numbers29:4 man ikaren môm-ken-upue sha hanma gumiyôngo, sha agumaiyôngo ataankarahar la cii," 
Numbers29:5 man kpev môm sha ci u nagh ku isholibo, sha u nan iwom sha ci wen," 
Numbers29:6 a nagh ku nanden ku sha mdugh u uweregh kua nagh ku sha samuyia ku maghen sha mi la imôngo, man nagh ku nanden ku gbem kua nagh ku sha samuyia ku maghen sha mi la, man iniav mbi man mbi maghen sha mi, sha tindi u mbi, i̱ lu kwagh u human doon; ka nagh ku usugh ku nan TER." 
Numbers29:7 Uwer u sha utaankaruhar ne, sha ayange a u pue la, er nen icighanmkohol, ule nen, hanma injatom kpaa de eren nen ga;" 
Numbers29:8 kpa na nen TER nagh ku nanden ku humandoon, gumbua môm man nomiyôngo môm man agumaiyôngo ataankarahar a a kom inyom i môm i môm, a a lu ne a ihogholough iyol ga yô;" 
Numbers29:9 man nagh ku sha samuyia ku maghen sha mi, mwem ma kengese ma i nongo mkurem sha mi yô, ma ma kom uikaren utar-ken-upue sha nomiyôngo môm la," 
Numbers29:10 ikaren môm-ken-upue sha hanma gumiyôngo sha agumaiyôngo ataankarahar la cii," 
Numbers29:11 kpev môm sha ci u nagh ku isholibo, kua nagh ku isholibo ku nan iwom mi, man nagh ku nanden ku gbem, man nagh ku sha samuyia ku maghen sha mi, kua iniav mbi man mbi maghen sha mi kpaa." 
Numbers29:12 Uwer u sha utaankaruhar sha ayange a u pue kar ataan la, er nen icighanmkohol de eren nen ma tom u ican ga, er nen iniongo i TER, ayange ataankarahar;" 
Numbers29:13 na nen TER nagh ku nanden, ka nagh ku usugh ku humandoon, sha agumabua pue kar atar man anomaiyôngo ahar, man agumaiyôngo pue kar anyiin a a kom inyom i môm i môm, a a lu a ihogholough iyol ga yô," 
Numbers29:14 a nagh ku sha samuyia ku maghen sha mi, mwem ma kengese ma i nongo mkurem sha mi yô, ma ma kom uikaren utar-ken-upue sha hanma gumbua, sha agumabua pue kar atar la cii; uikaren uhar-ken-upue sha hanma nomiyôngo sha anomaiyôngo ahar la cii;" 
Numbers29:15 man ikaren môm-ken-upue sha hanma gumiyôngo, sha agumaiyôngo a pue kar anyiin la cii," 
Numbers29:16 kpev môm sha ci u nagh ku isholibo, kua nagh ku nanden ku gbem la, man nagh ku sha samuyia ku maghen sha mi, kua nagh ku man ku maghen sha mi kpaa." 
Numbers29:17 Sha iyange i sha uhar la na nen agumabua pue kar ahar man anomaiyôngo ahar kua agumaiyôngo pue kar anyiin a a kom inyom i môm i môm, a a lu a ihogholough iyol ga yô," 
Numbers29:18 a nagh vegh ku sha samuyia ku maghen sha mi man iniav mbi man mbi maghen sha mi, sha anomabua man anomaiyôngo man agumaiyôngo la, sha iyenge i a sha tindi;" 
Numbers29:19 kpev môm sha ci u nagh ku isholibo, kua nagh ku nanden ku gbem la, man nagh ku sha samuyia ku maghen sha mi, kua iniav mbi man mbi maghen sha mi." 
Numbers29:20 Sha iyange i sha utar la anomabua pue kar môm, anomaiyôngo ahar, agumaiyôngo pue kar anyiin a a kom inyom i môm i môm a a lu a ihogholough iyol ga yô," 
Numbers29:21 a nagh vegh ku sha samuyia ku maghen sha mi man iniav mbi man mbi maghen sha mi, sha anomabua man anomaiyôngo man agumaiyôngo la, sha iyenge i a, sha tindi;" 
Numbers29:22 man kpev môm sha ci u nagh ku isholibo kua nagh ku nanden ku gbem la man nagh ku sha samuyia ku maghen sha mi, kua nagh ku man ku maghen sha mi kpaa." 
Numbers29:23 Sha iyange i sha unyiin la anomabua pue, anomaiyôngo ahar, agumaiyôngo pue kar anyiin a a kom inyom i môm i môm a a lu a ihogholough iyol ga yô," 
Numbers29:24 a nagh vegh ku sha samuyia ku maghen sha mi man iniav mbi man mbi maghen sha mi, sha anomabua man anomaiyôngo man agumaiyôngo, sha iyenge i a sha tindi;" 
Numbers29:25 man kpev môm sha ci u nagh ku isholibo, kua nagh ku nanden ku gbem la, man nagh ku sha samuyia ku maghen sha mi kua nagh ku man ku maghen sha mi." 
Numbers29:26 Sha iyange i sha utaan la, anomabua ataankaranyiin, anomaiyôngo ahar, agumaiyôngo pue kar anyiin a a kom inyom i môm i môm a a lu a ihogholough iyol ga yô," 
Numbers29:27 a nagh vegh ku sha samuyia ku maghen sha mi man iniav mbi man mbi maghen sha mi, sha anomabua man anomaiyôngo man agumaiyôngo, sha iyenge i a sha tindi;" 
Numbers29:28 man kpev môm sha ci u nagh ku isholibo, kua nagh ku nanden ku gbem la man nagh ku sha samuyia ku maghen sha mi kua nagh ku man ku maghen sha mi kpaa." 
Numbers29:29 Sha iyange i sha ataratar la, anomabua anigheni, anomaiyôngo ahar, agumaiyôngo pue kar anyiin a a kom inyom i môm i môm a a lu a ihogholough iyol ga yô," 
Numbers29:30 a nagh vegh ku sha samuyia ku maghen sha mi man iniav mbi man mbi maghen sha mi, sha anomabua man anomaiyôngo man agumaiyôngo, sha iyenge i a sha tindi;" 
Numbers29:31 man kpev môm sha ci u nagh ku isholibo, kua nagh ku nanden ku gbem la man nagh ku sha samuyia ku maghen sha mi kua nagh ku man ku maghen sha mi kpaa." 
Numbers29:32 Sha iyange i sha utaankaruhar la, anomabua ataankarahar, anomaiyôngo ahar, agumaiyôngo pue kar anyiin a a kom inyom i môm i môm a a lu a ihogholough iyol ga yô," 
Numbers29:33 a nagh vegh ku sha samuyia ku maghen sha mi man iniav mbi man mbi maghen sha mi, sha anomabua man anomaiyôngo man agumaiyôngo, sha iyenge i a sha tindi;" 
Numbers29:34 man kpev môm sha ci u nagh ku isholibo, kua nagh ku nanden ku gbem la, man nagh ku sha samuyia ku maghen sha mi kua nagh ku man ku maghen sha mi kpaa." 
Numbers29:35 Sha iyange i sha anigheni la, er nen icighanmkohol de eren nen ma tom u ican ga," 
Numbers29:36 kpa na nen TER nagh ku nanden, ka nagh ku usugh ku humandoon, sha nombua môm man nomiyôngo môm man agumaiyôngo ataankarahar a a kom inyom i môm i môm a a lu a ihogholough iyol ga yô," 
Numbers29:37 a nagh vegh ku sha samuyia ku maghen sha mi man iniav mbi man mbi maghen sha mi, sha nombua man nomiyôngo man agumaiyôngo, sha iyenge i a sha tindi;" 
Numbers29:38 man kpev môm sha ci u nagh ku isholibo kua nagh ku nanden ku gbem la man nagh ku sha samuyia ku maghen sha mi kua nagh ku man ku maghen sha mi kpaa. 
Numbers29:39 Naan nen TER mbin, sha uiniongo enev mba i ver sha ashighe ashighe la, kua uiceghzwa enev man iniav yenev mbi sha ishima i dedoo kpaa, i̱ lu iniav yenev mbi nanden man iniav yenev mbi sha samuyia man iniav yenev mbi man, man iniav yenev mbi bem." 
Numbers29:40 Tsô Mose ôr ônov mba Iserael kwagh u TER kaa Mose la cii. 
Numbers30:1 Mose ôr kwagh a mbavesen mba sha ikwe i Mbaiserael, a kaa er: TER ngu kaan nahan er:" 
Numbers30:2 Aluer or á tsegha zwa a TER shin nana bum er nana kighir ishima i nan inya yô, nana̱ de bundu kwaghôron u nan la ga, nana̱ er sha kwagh u a dugh ken zwa u nan la cii." 
Numbers30:3 Man aluer kwase tsegha zwa a TER, shin nana bum nana kighir ishima i nan inya, shighe u nan lu iyev hen ya u ter u nan la yô," 
Numbers30:4 man ter u nan una ungwa iceghzwa i nan man er nan kighir iyol i nan inya sha kwagh yô, ter u nan una bugh zwa a nan sha mi ga yô, uiceghzwa mba nan cii vea lu dông, hanma kwagh u nan kighir ishima i nan inya sha mi yô, una lu her dông." 
Numbers30:5 Kpa aluer ter u nan venda a nan sha iyange i a ongo la yô, ma iceghzwa i nan môm, shin ma kwagh u nan kighir iyol i nan inya sha mi kpaa, una kera lu dông ga; TER Una de nan, sha ci u ter u nan a vende a nan yô." 
Numbers30:6 Aluer nana er nom er uiceghzwa mba nan ve lu nan iyol her la yô, shin kwagh u nan er sha zwa gagh nan kighir ishima i nan inya sha mi kpaa," 
Numbers30:7 nom u nan la una bugh zwa a nan sha iyange i a ongo la ga yô, uiceghzwa mba nan vea lu her dông man ma kwagh u nan kighir ishima i nan inya sha mi kpaa una lu her dông." 
Numbers30:8 Kpa aluer nom u nan una venda a nan sha iyange i a ongo kwagh la yô, una bunde iceghzwa i i lu sha nan la, kua kwagh u nan er sha zwa u nan gagh nan kighir ishima i nan inya sha mi la kpaa; TER Una de nan." 
Numbers30:9 Kpa iceghzwa i kwasecôghol shin i kwase u nan dugh hen nom yô, hanma kwagh u nan kighir ishima i nan inya sha mi yô, una lu her dông." 
Numbers30:10 Man aluer nana tsegha zwa hen ya u nom u nan shin nana bum er nana kighir ishima i nan inya kpaa," 
Numbers30:11 nom u nan una ungwa, kpa una bugh zwa a nan una venda a nan ga yô, uiceghzwa mba nan la cii, vea lu her dông; hanma kwagh u nan kighir ishima i nan inya sha mi kpaa, una lu her dông." 
Numbers30:12 Kpa aluer nom u nan una bunde akaa la iyange i a ongo a la yô, nahan akaa a a dugh ken zwa u nan sha uiceghzwa mba nan, shin sha akaa a nan kighir ishima i nan inya sha mi kpaa, aa kera lu her dông ga; nom u nan bunde a ve; TER Una de nan." 
Numbers30:13 Hanma iceghzwa shin hanma mbum u i kighir inya u eren yô, nom u nan una kôrcio u taver un, shin una kôrcio u bunden un kpaa." 
Numbers30:14 Kpa aluer nom u nan una bugh zwa a nan ga ayange ayange gbem yô, nahan a taver uiceghzwa mba nan cii kua akaa a nan kighir ishima i nan sha mi la kpaa, a taver a taver a je ve, sha er a bugh zwa a nan sha iyange i a ungwa a la ga yô." 
Numbers30:15 Kpa aluer una ungwa nahan man ken masejime una bunde a yô, una lu a ibo iyol." 
Numbers30:16 Ka akaawan a TER na Mose sha kwagh u nom a kwase u nan, kua ter a wan u nan u kwase, er nan lu hen ya u ter u nan her la." 
Numbers31:1 Tsô TER ôr kwagh a Mose A kaa er: 
Numbers31:2 Or Mbaiserael iyev sha Mbamidian; ken masetyô yô, ú za kohol ior ou." 
Numbers31:3 Tsô Mose ôr kwagh a ior, a kaa er: Pande nen ior ken a ven, na nen ve ikav mbi utyav ve̱ za nôngo ityav a Midian, ve̱ za kure iyevoron i TER sha Midian." 
Numbers31:4 Hanma kwe u ken ikwe i Iserael cii, tsuwa nen ior ker dubu, tindi nen ve ken utya." 
Numbers31:5 Nahan i tsuwa ior ken udubu dubu mba Iserael, hanma kwe na ior dubu môm; tsô ior dubu pue kar uhar wa iyol sha utya je." 
Numbers31:6 Nahan Mose tindi ve hen utya, ken hanma kwe ior lu dubu môm kua Pinehashi wan u pristi Eleasar a ikav mbi icighanjiir man ukakaki mba yôôn kwagh a min." 
Numbers31:7 Tsô ve nôngo ityav a Midian er TER kaa Mose nahan; ve wua nomsombaiorov cii.
