Numbers31:8 Ve wua utor mba Midian a mba ve wua la imôngo, ka Evi man Rekem man Sur man Hur kua Reba, utor mba Midian utaan; shi ve wua Balaam wan u Beor la kpaa, sha sanker." 
Numbers31:9 Tsô Mbaiserael kôr kasev mba Midian kua mbayev mba kiriki; ibua ve cii man akumauile ve cii kua inyarev vev cii, ve ya ishar sha mi." 
Numbers31:10 Man agar a ve cii, a ve tema yô, kua afo a ve cii, ve nande sha usu." 
Numbers31:11 Ve tôô akaa a ve kura ken utya cii man ishar cii, ior kua uzendenya." 
Numbers31:12 Ve va a mbakwarev man ishar kua akaa a ve kura ken utya la hen Mose man hen pristi Eleasar man hen ior i Mbaiserael cii hen afo hen ukpuunkpuun mba Moabi, hen kpe u Yordan tiôn u hen Yeriko la." 
Numbers31:13 Tsô Mose man pristi Eleasar man mbahemenev mba ior la cii, ve za sha u za keghen ve gbenda ken akôngoafogh." 
Numbers31:14 Kpa ishima gema vihi Mose a mbahemenev mba ikumutya la, ka ukur mba ve lu a ior dubu dubu sha ikev man ukur mba ve lu a ior deri mba ve za hide ityav la." 
Numbers31:15 Mose pine ve er: Ne de kasev cii uma? 
Numbers31:16 Nenge, ka mban lu ve na Mbaiserael ve er TER kwaghbo sha kwaghwan u Balaam, sha kwagh u Peor la, ka nahan man bouange nyôr hen ior mba TER ye." 
Numbers31:17 Hegen yô, wua hanma wannomso ken mbayev mba kiriki mban man shi wua nen hanma kwase u nan vande yaven a or yô." 
Numbers31:18 Kpa mbayev kasev cii mba ve vande yaven a or ga yô, de nen ve uma, ve̱ lu sha ci wen." 
Numbers31:19 Lu nen ken akôngoafogh ayange ataankarahar; hanmô wen u nan woo or shin u nan bende a ikom yô, wanger nen ayol a en sha iyange i sha utar la man i sha utaankaruhar la kpaa, ne kua mba ne ker ve la." 
Numbers31:20 Hanma ikondo man kwagh u i er sha ikov cii man akaa a i er sha aive a ivo cii kua akaa a i er sha ikon cii, wanger nen a." 
Numbers31:21 Tsô pristi Eleasar gema kaa a mbautyav mba ve za ityav la er: Ka kwaghwan u sha tindi u TER A we Mose ne: 
Numbers31:22 Zenaria man azurfa man togula man iyôgh man kwaza kua inyelegh," 
Numbers31:23 hanma kwagh u a vihin sha usu ga yô, wa nen un ken usu, tsô una wanger; nahan kpaa, shi á wanger un sha mngerem ma wanger kwagh a min la; hanma kwagh u a vihin sha usu yô, wa nen un shin mnger." 
Numbers31:24 Sha iyange i sha utaankaruhar la, ôô nen akondo a en, tsô né lu wang; ken masejime la né nyôr ken afo." 
Numbers31:25 TER ôr kwagh a Mose, A kaa er:" 
Numbers31:26 Ôr iyenge i ishar i i ye yô, ior kua uzendenya, we vea pristi Eleasar man mbavesen mba sha uya mba uter mba ior la;" 
Numbers31:27 kar ishar mbaaci uhar, na mbautyav mba ve ze ityav yô, shi na ior cii kpaa;" 
Numbers31:28 ngohol kpandegh ku TER hen mbautyav, mba ve ze ityav la; môm ken deri utaan u ior man u ibua man u ujaki man u iyôngo kpaa." 
Numbers31:29 Ngohol nen ku ken kwar ve la, na pristi Eleasar, i̱ lu nagh ku kenden sha ku TER." 
Numbers31:30 Ken kwar u Mbaiserael la yô, ngohol môm u i tsough ken hanma akunduahargber, u ior man u ibua man u ujaki man u iyôngo, uzendenya cii, gema na Mbalevi, mba ve eren tom ken tabernakel u TER la." 
Numbers31:31 Tsô Mose man pristi Eleasar er er TER kaa Mose nahan. 
Numbers31:32 Ishar i mbautyav ve ya, i i shi her la yô, lu iyôngo dubu deri ataratar man dubu akunduatargber kar utaan;" 
Numbers31:33 ibua dubu akunduatargber kar dubu uhar; 
Numbers31:34 ujaki dubu akunduatar kar dubu môm; 
Numbers31:35 man ior cii lu dubu ikundugber kar uhar, ka kasev mba ve vande yaven a or ga la." 
Numbers31:36 Vegher u a lu kwar u mba ve za ityav la yô, iyenge i iyôngo lu dubu deri utar man dubu ikundugber kar utaankaruhar man deri utaan;" 
Numbers31:37 kpandegh ku TER sha iyôngo lu deri ataratar man akunduatargber kar itian. 
Numbers31:38 Ibua lu dubu ikundugber kar ataratar; kpandegh ku TER sha i lu akunduatargber kar ihiar. 
Numbers31:39 Ujaki lu dubu ikundugber man deri utaan; kpandegh ku TER sha ve lu akunduatar kar môm. 
Numbers31:40 Ior lu dubu pue kar ataratar; kpandegh ku TER sha ve lu ikundugber kar uhar. 
Numbers31:41 Tsô Mose na pristi Eleasar kpandegh ku ku lu nagh ku kenden sha ku TER, er TER kaa Mose nahan." 
Numbers31:42 Kwar u Mbaiserael u Mose pav kposo a u mbautyav la," 
Numbers31:43 kwar u ior la yô, lu iyôngo dubu deri utar man dubu ikundugber kar utaankaruhar man deri utaan," 
Numbers31:44 man ibua dubu ikundugber kar ataratar," 
Numbers31:45 man ujaki dubu ikundugber man deri utaan," 
Numbers31:46 man ior dubu pue kar dubu ataratar; 
Numbers31:47 ken kwar u Mbaiserael la yô, Mose ngohol môm u i tsough ken hanma akunduahargber, u ior man u uzendenya la, na Mbalevi, mba ve eren tom u tabernakel u TER, er TER kaa Mose nahan." 
Numbers31:48 Tsô mbahemenev mba udubu dubu mba ikumutya la, ka ukur mba ve lu a ior dubu dubu sha ikev man ukur mba ve lu a ior deri deri, ve va hen Mose;" 
Numbers31:49 ve kaa a Mose er: Mbayev ou ôr iyenge i mbautyav mba ve lu sha ikev yase la, mô wase môm saa ga." 
Numbers31:50 Nahan se va na TER iwua sha akaa a i er sha zenaria, a anti or nan zough a mi yô, ahye a shin angahar man a sha uwe man ikunya i ken ave kua iyôv mbi ken ato man akaa a hweegh a zeren sha iker, sha u nan iwom a min sha ci u uuma asev sha ishigh ki TER." 
Numbers31:51 Tsô Mose man pristi Eleasar ngohol zenaria la hen a ve, lu ikav mbi hweev cii." 
Numbers31:52 Zenaria u nagh ku kenden sha u ve na TER la cii, u a dugh hen ukurmbautyav mba ve lu a ior dubu dubu sha ikev man mba ve lu a ior deri deri la yô, lu ushekel dubu pue kar ataratar man deri utaankaruhar man akunduahargber." 
Numbers31:53 Gadia mbautyav ya ishar hanma or sha ci u nan. 
Numbers31:54 Nahan Mose man pristi Eleasar ve ngohol zenaria la sha ikev i ukur mba ve lu a ior dubu dubu sha ikev, man mba ve lu a ior deri deri la; ve va a mi hen tenti u kohol ker sha u umbur Mbaiserael a min sha ishigh ki TER." 
Numbers32:1 Ônov mba Ruben man ônov mba Gadi, ve lu a ilev ngee kpishi; man er ve nenge tar u Yasar man tar u Gileadi lu tar u doon ilev yô," 
Numbers32:2 ônov mba Gadi man ônov mba Ruben ve va ôr kwagh a Mose man pristi Eleasar man mbahemenev mba ior la, ve kaa er:" 
Numbers32:3 Ataroti man Dibon man Yasar man Nimra man Heshebon man Eleale man Sebam man Nebo kua Behon; 
Numbers32:4 tar u TER kôr ngohol sha ishigh ki ior i Iserael la, ka tar u doon ilev, man mbayev ou gema mba a ilev." 
Numbers32:5 Shi ve kaa er: Aluer a doo u a vese yô, ma i ne mbayev ou tar ne ma u hingir u ve; de peren a vese yande Yordan keela ga." 
Numbers32:6 Tsô Mose kaa a ônov mba Gadi man ônov mba Ruben er: Nahan yô, anmgbianev enev ve̱ za ityav, ne né tema heen zee?" 
Numbers32:7 Inja nan man ne eren ner asema a̱ hide ônov mba Iserael ijime ve̱ de peren ve̱ zaan ken tar u TER A ne ve la ga nahana? 
Numbers32:8 Kape uter enev lu er zum u m tindi ve hen Kadeshi-barnea sha u ve̱ za nenge tar je la. 
Numbers32:9 Er ve za hen pev u Esekol ve za nenge tar la yô, ve va na asema hide Mbaiserael ijime ve kera za ken tar u TER na ve la ga." 
Numbers32:10 Ishima vihi TER sha iyange la tsung, nahan A bum, er:" 
Numbers32:11 Mba ve dugh ken Igipiti ne, mô ve môm u nan kom anyom ikundu man u nan hembe nahan yô, nana nenge tar u M bum a Aberaham man Isaka man Yakob la ashe je ga, sha er ve dondom sha ishima i môm ga yô," 
Numbers32:12 saa Kalebu wan u Yefune Orkenishi, man Yosua wan u Nun, sha ci u ve dondo TER sha ishima i môm yô." 
Numbers32:13 Ishima vihi TER a Iserael tsung je. A er ve, ve gba zenden ken desereti wue wue anyom akunduahar, zan zan kov u u er ifer sha ishigh ki TER la tim kera cii." 
Numbers32:14 Nenge, ne mough sha ityough ki uter enev, ne tsombor u eren kwaghbo ne, sha u né seer ishimavihin i TER a Iserael i tsung la, i̱ za a za hemen yô." 
Numbers32:15 Gadia aluer ne de u dondon Un yô, Un kpaa Una shi á de ve, vea lu ken desereti her, nahan né tim ior mban cii." 
Numbers32:16 Tsô ve va her a na, ve kaa er: Sé maa atôrauile heen sha ci u ilev yasev man agar kpaa sha ci u mbayev asev mba kiriki;" 
Numbers32:17 kpa se yô, sé kange iyol i utya sé hemen Mbaiserael zan zan sé za ar a ve hen ijiir ve i teman; mbayev asev mba kiriki yô, vea hira lu ken agar a taver la, sha ci u ior mba ve lu ken tar ne." 
Numbers32:18 Sé hide ken uya asev ga, saa Mbaiserael cii vea ya dyako, hanma or nana lu a dyako u nan." 
Numbers32:19 Gadia se sé ya dyako a ve imôngo yande Yordan ga, yande keela cii, gadia se sé zua a dyako wase yande Yordan keen, vegher u sha ityoughkitaregh ne." 
Numbers32:20 Tsô Mose kaa a ve er: Aluer nea er nahan, nea kange iyol i utya sha ishigh ki TER sha u zan ityav yô," 
Numbers32:21 man hanmô wen u nan kange iyol i utya yô, nana per Yordan sha ishigh ki TER, zan zan A za zenda mbaihomov Nav sha ishigh Nagh kera," 
Numbers32:22 man á hemba tar la sha ishigh ki TER yô, ken masetyô la né hide nahan né kera lu a ibo sha ishigh ki TER man sha ishigh ki Iserael kpaa ga; tar ne kpaa ua hingir u wen sha ishigh ki TER." 
Numbers32:23 Kpa aluer nea er nahan ga yô, nenge, ne er TER isholibo, fa nen isholibo yen ia kôr ne." 
Numbers32:24 Yô, maa nen agar sha ci u mbayev enev mba kiriki man atôr sha ci u ilev yenev, man er nen er ne kaa nahan." 
Numbers32:25 Tsô ônov mba Gadi man ônov mba Ruben ôr kwagh a Mose, ve kaa er: Mbayev ou vea er er terem a kaa nahan." 
Numbers32:26 Mbayev asev mba kiriki man kasev asev man ilev yasev man hanma zendenya wase cii vea lu ken agar a Gileadi keela. 
Numbers32:27 Kpa se mbayev ou yô, sé per hanma or nan kange iyol i utya, sha ishigh ki TER, sha u zan ityav, er terem a kaa nahan." 
Numbers32:28 Tsô Mose ôr pristi Eleasar kwagh ve man Yosua wan u Nun kua mbavesen mba uya mba uter mba ikwe i Mbaiserael la kpaa. 
Numbers32:29 Mose kaa a ve er: Aluer ônov mba Gadi man ônov mba Ruben vea per Yordan a ven imôngo yô, hanma or u nan kange iyol i utya sha ishigh ki TER man á hemba tar la sha ishigh yenegh yô, na nen ve tar u Gileadi u̱ hingir u ve;" 
Numbers32:30 kpa aluer vea rumun u peren a ven imôngo a iyol i utya ga yô, ve̱ zua a kwar ve a ven imôngo ken tar u Kanaan." 
Numbers32:31 Tsô ônov mba Gadi man ônov mba Ruben gema kaa er: Kwagh u TER A kaa mbayev ou yô, kape sé er la." 
Numbers32:32 Sé per sha ishigh ki TER a iyol utya, sé za ken tar u Kanaan; dyako wase u yan yô, á lu Yordan yande keen." 
Numbers32:33 Tsô Mose na ônov mba Gadi man ônov mba Ruben man vegherkwe u Manase wan u Yosev, tartor u Shihon tor u Mbaamor man tartor u Ogo tor u Bashan, tar la cii man agar a ker, a mkôngom ma a, agar a ken tar la cii." 
Numbers32:34 Nahan ônov mba Gadi man Dibon man Ataroti man Aroer 
Numbers32:35 man Ataroti-sofan man Yaser man Yogbeha 
Numbers32:36 man Bete-nimra kua Bete-haran, agar a taver man atôrauile." 
Numbers32:37 Ônov mba Ruben maa Heshebon man Eleale man Kiriataim 
Numbers32:38 man Nebo man Baal-meon (i gema a ati) kua Sebema; ve ii agar a ve maa la ati agen. 
Numbers32:39 Ônov mba Makir wan u Manase, ve za ken Gileadi ve za hemba un, ve zenda Mbaamor mba ve tema ker la." 
Numbers32:40 Mose gema Gileadi na Makir wan u Manase, a tema ker." 
Numbers32:41 Yair wan u Manase, za hemba agar a ker, maa a ii a iti er Havoti-yair." 
Numbers32:42 Noba kpaa za hemba Kenati kua angarev nav, maa a ii un iti er Noba, sha iti na." 
Numbers33:1 Ka myem u Mbaiserael lu haan afo yemen, zum u ve due ken tar u Igipiti akum akum sha ikev i Mose man Aron ne:" 
Numbers33:2 Mose nger ajiir a ve lu hemben, yemen hemen hemen la sha imo i TER; ka ajiir a ve lu hemben sha a, yemen ne:" 
Numbers33:3 Ve hembe hen Ramese sha uwer u hiihii, sha ayange a pue kar ataan a uwer hiihii la; kper nan ken ijime i Paseka la, Mbaiserael due sha uwegh ku ageegh sha ashe a Mbaigipiti cii," 
Numbers33:4 Mbaigipiti gema lu iin ônovmbaiundav vev mba TER wua ve cii la; mbaaôndo vev kpaa, TER ôr ve ijir tsaha ve." 
Numbers33:5 Mbaiserael hembe hen Ramese ve za haa hen Sukoti. 
Numbers33:6 Ve hembe hen Sukoti ve za haa hen Etam u a lu hen kpe u desereti la. 
Numbers33:7 Ve hembe hen Etam, ve hide hen Pihahiroti u a lu sha ishigh ki Baal-sefon la, ve za haa sha ishigh ki Mikidol." 
Numbers33:8 Ve hembe hen ishigh ki Pihahiroti, ve per hen atô u zegemnger ve nyôr ken desereti; ve tsa gbenda ken desereti u Etam ayange atar ve za haa hen Mara." 
Numbers33:9 Ve hembe hen Mara ve za haa hen Elim; hen Elim la ihwembe i mnger lu pue kar ihiar man atineavilegh akunduatargber; ve haa her. 
Numbers33:10 Ve hembe hen Elim ve za haa hen kpe u Zegemnger u Nyian. 
Numbers33:11 Ve hembe hen kpe u Zegemnger u Nyian ve za haa hen desereti u Sen. 
Numbers33:12 Ve hembe hen desereti u Sen ve za haa hen Dofeka. 
Numbers33:13 Ve hembe hen Dofeka ve za haa hen Alushi. 
Numbers33:14 Ve hembe hen Alushi ve za haa hen Rafidim, henpe ior zua a mngerem ma man ga la." 
Numbers33:15 Ve hembe hen Rafidim ve za haa hen desereti u Senai. 
Numbers33:16 Ve hembe hen desereti u Senai ve za haa hen Kiberoti-hataawa. 
Numbers33:17 Ve hembe hen Kiberoti-hataawa ve za haa hen Haseroti. 
Numbers33:18 Ve hembe hen Haseroti ve za haa hen Ritema. 
Numbers33:19 Ve hembe hen Ritema ve za haa hen Rimon-perese. 
Numbers33:20 Ve hembe hen Rimon-perese ve za haa hen Libena. 
Numbers33:21 Ve hembe hen Libena ve za haa hen Risa. 
Numbers33:22 Ve hembe hen Risa ve za haa hen Kehelata. 
Numbers33:23 Ve hembe hen Kehelata ve za hen uwo u Sefer. 
Numbers33:24 Ve hembe hen uwo u Sefer ve za haa hen Harada. 
Numbers33:25 Ve hembe hen Harada ve za haa hen Makeloti. 
Numbers33:26 Ve hembe hen Makeloti ve za haa hen Tahati. 
Numbers33:27 Ve hembe hen Tahati ve za haa hen Tera. 
Numbers33:28 Ve hembe hen Tera ve za haa hen Miteka. 
Numbers33:29 Ve hembe hen Miteka ve za haa hen Hasemona. 
Numbers33:30 Ve hembe hen Hasemona ve za haa hen Moseroti. 
Numbers33:31 Ve hembe hen Moseroti ve za haa hen Bene-yaken. 
Numbers33:32 Ve hembe hen Bene-yaken ve za haa hen Hor-hagidigadi. 
Numbers33:33 Ve hembe hen Hor-hagidigadi ve za haa hen Yotabata. 
Numbers33:34 Ve hembe hen Yotabata ve za haa hen Aberona. 
Numbers33:35 Ve hembe hen Aberona ve za haa hen Eshion-geber. 
Numbers33:36 Ve hembe hen Eshion-geber ve za haa hen desereti u Zin, ka Kadeshi je la." 
Numbers33:37 Ve hembe hen Kadeshi ve za haa hen uwo u Hor hen ikighirtar i Edom. 
Numbers33:38 Pristi Aron unde sha uwo u Hor, sha imo i TER, maa kpe sha mi sha inyom i akunduahar ken ijime i mdugh u Mbaiserael ken tar u Igipiti, sha uwer u sha utaan, sha iyange i hiihii i uweregh la." 
Numbers33:39 Anyom a Aron lu deri man ikundu kar atar zum u a kpe sha uwo u Hor la. 
Numbers33:40 Tor u Ardi Orkanaan u a tema ken Imbusutariyan ken tar u Kanaan la, a ungwa mve u Mbaiserael." 
Numbers33:41 Ve hembe hen uwo u Hor ve za haa hen Salamona. 
Numbers33:42 Ve hembe hen Salamona ve za haa hen Punon. 
Numbers33:43 Ve hembe hen Punon ve za haa hen Oboti. 
Numbers33:44 Ve hembe hen Oboti ve za haa hen Iye-abarim hen ikighir i Moabi. 
Numbers33:45 Ve hembe hen Iyim ve za haa hen Dibon-gadi. 
Numbers33:46 Ve hembe hen Dibon-gadi ve za haa hen Alemon-dibelataim. 
Numbers33:47 Ve hembe hen Alemon-dibelataim ve za haa hen iwo i Abarim sha ishigh ki Nebo. 
Numbers33:48 Ve mough hen iwo i Abarim ve za haa hen ukpuunkpuun mba Moabi hen kpe u Yordan tiôn u hen Yeriko la. 
Numbers33:49 Ve haa hen Yordan hii hen Bete-yeshimoti zan zan ar hen Abel-shitim hen ukpuunkpuun mba Moabi. 
Numbers33:50 TER ôr kwagh a Mose hen ukpuunkpuun mba Moabi hen kpe u Yordan tiôn u hen Yeriko, A kaa er:" 
Numbers33:51 Ôr kwagh a ônov mba Iserael kaa a ve wer: Zum u né per Yordan, né za nyôr ken tar u Kanaan yô," 
Numbers33:52 zenda nen mba ve tem ken tar la cii, shi hembe nen ieev vev mbi keren a ker cii, vihi nen ajiir a ve a taven sha la cii;" 
Numbers33:53 ngohol nen tar la, tema ker, gadia ka ne M ne ne tar la Mer u̱ lu u wen ye." 
Numbers33:54 Ya nen dyako u tar la sha ishor i eren sha uipaven enev; mba ve ngee yô, na nen ve dyako a̱ ngee, mba ve ndahar yô, na nen ve dyako a̱ ndahar, henpe ishor i tese hanma or yô, hingir kwagh u nan heregh je ve; ka sha ikwe i uter enev, ya nen dyako ye." 
Numbers33:55 Kpa aluer nea zenda mba ve tem ken tar la sha ishigh yenegh kera ga yô, ve mba ne de ve la, vea hingir kwagh u civin ne ken ashe man kwagh u kuman ne ken ihan, vea zaan ne iyol ken tar u ne tema ker la." 
Numbers33:56 Nahan yô, er M we ishima u eren a ve la, kape Me er a ven je la." 
Numbers34:1 TER ôr kwagh a Mose, A kaa er:" 
Numbers34:2 Kaa Mbaiserael wer: Zum u né va ken tar u Kanaan yô, ka tar u né ya dyako sha mi ne, tar u Kanaan pe u za kighir cii:" 
Numbers34:3 Vegher wen u ken imbusutariyan una hii hen desereti u Zin una kar hen kpe u Edom; ikighir tar yen i ken imbusutariyan la, ia hii hen mkur u Zegemnger u Bar vegher u sha ityoughkitaregh;" 
Numbers34:4 ikighir yen ia hurugh á kar igungu u Akrabim vegher u ken imbusutariyan la, ia yem ken Zin, ia kar á za kighir Kadeshi-barnea vegher u ken imbusutariyan la, shi ia yem hen Hasar-adar, ia kar á za ar hen Asemon;" 
Numbers34:5 ikighir tar la ia hurugh sha Asemon ia yem hen uwagh u Igipiti á za kure hen Zegemnger. 
Numbers34:6 Ikighir tar yen vegher u shin ityôtar yô, ka Zegemnger u Tamen la, hen kpe na; ka ikighir tar yen i shin ityôtar je la." 
Numbers34:7 Ikighir tar yen i ken vegher u imbusutarimese yô: Ver nen ikighir i̱ hii hen Zegemnger u Tamen i̱ yem zan zan i̱ za ar hen uwo u Hor; 
Numbers34:8 hen uwo u Hor la kpaa shi ver nen ikighir i̱ yem zan zan i̱ za ar hen gbenda u karen zan Hamati la; ikighir la i̱ za kighir hen Sedadi; 
Numbers34:9 shi ikighir la i̱ yem zan zan i̱ za ar hen Seferon i̱ za kure hen Hasar-enan; ka ikighir tar yen i ken imbusutarimese je la. 
Numbers34:10 Ver nen ikighir yen i sha vegher u ityoughkitaregh la, i̱ hii hen Hasar-enan i̱ yem hen Sefan;" 
Numbers34:11 ikighir la i̱ sen hen Sefan i̱ yem hen Ribela, i̱ kar Ain vegher u sha ityoughkitaregh la; shi ikighir la i̱ sen i̱ tera hen kpe u Zegemnger u Kinereti vegher u sha ityoughkitaregh la;" 
Numbers34:12 ikighir la i̱ kar i̱ yem hen Yordan, i̱ za kure hen Zegemnger u Bar. Ka tar wen je ne sha akighir a u ningir tser cii." 
Numbers34:13 Mose kaa a Mbaiserael er: Ka tar u né ya dyako sha mi sha ishor i eren je ne, u TER A kaa er i̱ na ikwe i itiankarinyiin man vegherkwe ne;" 
Numbers34:14 gadia kwe u ônov mba Ruben sha uya mba uter vev, man kwe u ônov mba Gadi sha uya mba uter vev, kua vegherkwe u Manase kpaa, ve vande ngohol kwar ve kera ve;" 
Numbers34:15 ikwe ihiar man vegherkwe la ngohol kwar ve yande Yordan, tiôn u hen Yeriko, vegher u sha ityoughkitaregh, sha pe iyange i dugh la." 
Numbers34:16 TER ôr kwagh a Mose, A kaa er:" 
Numbers34:17 Ati a mba vea kar ne tar sha u u̱ hingir dyako wen yô, ka pristi Eleasar man Yosua wan u Num" 
Numbers34:18 Shi tsuwa nen orhemenegh môm môm sha ikwe ikwe, ve̱ kar dyako u tar." 
Numbers34:19 Ati a ior mbala yô, ken kwe u Yuda, ka Kalebu wan u Yefune." 
Numbers34:20 Ken kwe u ônov mba Shimeon, ka Semuel wan u Amihudi." 
Numbers34:21 Ken kwe u Benyamin, ka Elidadi wan u Kiselon." 
Numbers34:22 Ken kwe u ônov mba Dan, ka orhemenegh Buki wan u Yogeli." 
Numbers34:23 Ken ônov mba Yosev: Ken kwe u ônov mba Manase, ka orhemenegh Haniel wan u Efodi;" 
Numbers34:24 man ken kwe u ônov mba Eferaim, ka orhemenegh Kemuel wan u Shifetan." 
Numbers34:25 Ken kwe u ônov mba Sebulon, ka orhemenegh Elisafan wan u Parnaki." 
Numbers34:26 Ken kwe u ônov mba Isakar, ka orhemenegh Paltiel wan u Asan." 
Numbers34:27 Ken kwe u ônov mba Asher, ka orhemenegh Ahihudi wan u Selomi." 
Numbers34:28 Ken kwe u ônov mba Nafetali, ka orhemenegh Pedahel wan u Amihudi." 
Numbers34:29 Ka mban TER kaa a ve er, ve̱ kar ônov mba Iserael dyako ken tar u Kanaan ye." 
Numbers35:1 TER ôr kwagh a Mose hen ukpuunkpuun mba Moabi hen kpe u Yordan tiôn u hen Yeriko la, A kaa er:" 
Numbers35:2 Kaa Mbaiserael ve̱ pande dyako u ve zough a mi la ve̱ na Mbalevi agar a teman ker, shi na nen Mbalevi akôngo a lun a toho sha ci u uile, a a kase agar la kpaa." 
Numbers35:3 Agar la a̱ lu sha u ve̱ tema ker yô; akôngo a lun a toho la yô, ka sha ci u ilev vev man akaa a ve kua uzendenya vev cii." 
Numbers35:4 Akôngo a lun a toho a agar a né na Mbalevi la yô, a̱ hii hen gil u gar la je a̱ yem ken hemen zan zan i̱ kuma aseva dubu, a̱ ningir a̱ tser cii." 
Numbers35:5 Man shi kar nen akôngo a gar, aseva dubu uhar sha vegher u sha ityoughkitaregh, man vegher u ken imbusutarimese kpaa, aseva dubu uhar, vegher u shin ityôtar kpaa aseva dubu uhar man vegher u ken imbusutariyan kpaa kar nen aseva dubu uhar, gar a̱ lu hen atô; a̱ lu ve ajiir a uzendenya mba ken agar la vea yaan toho her yô." 
Numbers35:6 Agar a né na Mbalevi yô, i̱ lu agar ataratar a waren ker la, a né na sha u or á wua or yô, nana̱ yevese nana̱ za ta ker yô; shi na nen agar agen akunduahar kar ahar kpaa." 
Numbers35:7 Nahan agar a né na Mbalevi cii yô, ka agar akunduahar kar anigheni, a akôngo a uzendenya yan toho her sha mi imôngo." 
Numbers35:8 Agar a né tsuwa ken kwar u Mbaiserael yô, mba ve ngee yô, ngohol nen hen ve i̱ ngee; mba ve lu kpuaa yô, ngohol nen hen ve kpuaa; ka sha mlu u dyako u vea ya la man vea pande agar a ve, vea na Mbalevi ye." 
Numbers35:9 TER shi ôr kwagh a Mose A kaa er: 
Numbers35:10 Ôr kwagh a Mbaiserael, kaa a ve wer: Zum u né per Yordan, né nyôr ken tar u Kanaan yô," 
Numbers35:11 tsuwa nen agar ver nen a̱ lu ne agar a waren ker; sha er or u nan woo or, nan woo or abu yô, nana̱ yevese nana̱ za ta ker yô." 
Numbers35:12 Agar la a̱ hingir ne ajiir a waren ker sha ikev i or u oron iyev la, sha er or u nan woo or la nana̱ de kpe ga, saa nana vande tilen sha ishigh ki ior, á ôr nan ijir ve." 
Numbers35:13 Agar a né na la yô, a̱ lu ne agar a waren ker, ataratar." 
Numbers35:14 Na nen agar atar yande Yordan shi na nen agar atar ken tar u Kanaan; a̱ lu agar a waren ker. 
Numbers35:15 Mbaiserael kua orvannya man u nan lu shir ker a ven kpaa, agar ataratar la a̱ lu ve ajiir a waren ker; sha u hanma or u nan woo or abu yô, nana̱ yevese nana̱ za ta ker yô." 
Numbers35:16 Kpa aluer nana gbidye or sha iyô je nana kpe yô, nan hingir orwuanor ve; orwuanor la, i̱ wua nan kpee." 
Numbers35:17 Man aluer nana kôr iwen sha uwe i i kom u wuan or a mi, nana kema or je nana kpe yô, nan hingir orwuanor ve; orwuanor la i̱ wua nan kpee." 
Numbers35:18 Shin aluer nana kôr ikagh ki konough ken uwe, ki ki kom u wuan or a mi, nana gbidye or je nana kpe yô, nan hingir orwuanor ve; orwuanor la, i̱ wua nan kpee." 
Numbers35:19 Ka or u oron iyev la, nana wua orwuanor la ye; aluer nana kohol nan yô, nana̱ wua nan je." 
Numbers35:20 Aluer nana daa or sha ihom shin nana ta or ma kwagh sha apera je nana kpe yô," 
Numbers35:21 shin nana ta or iju sha ihom je nana kpe yô, u nan te nan iju la, i̱ wua nan kpee, ka orwuanor je; or u oron iyev i awambe la, nana̱ wua orwuanor la, aluer nana kohol nan yô." 
Numbers35:22 Kpa aluer nana daa or abu a lu sha ihom ga, shin nana ta or ma kwagh man a lu sha apera kpaa ga," 
Numbers35:23 shin nana gba kenden ma iwen i i kom u wuan or a mi, nana nenge ga, man ia za ta or, nana kpe yô, man nan kpaa nana vande lun ihom a or la ga, man nana wa ishima u vihin nan iyol kpaa ga yô," 
Numbers35:24 Ior ve̱ ôr ijir i or u nan woo or vea or u oron iyev i awambe la sha atindi ne; 
Numbers35:25 ior ve̱ war or u nan woo or la sha ikev i or u oron iyev i awambe, ior ve̱ hide a nan ken gar u waren ker, henpe nan yevese nan za te la; nana̱ lu ker zan zan zegepristi u i shigh un icighanmkure la a̱ kar kpen ve." 
Numbers35:26 Kpa aluer or u nan woo or la, nana aver ikighir i gar u nan za war ker henpe nan za te la," 
Numbers35:27 man or u oron iyev i awambe la nana kohol nan ken won u ikighir i gar u nan za war ker la yô, or u oron iyev i awambe la, nana wua or u nan woo or la yô, nana kera lu a ibo sha awambe ga;" 
Numbers35:28 gadia ka u ma nan lu ken gar u nan za war ker la zan zan zegepristi ma a kar kpen ve; zegepristi una va kpeen kera yô, or u nan woo or la, nana̱ hide ken tar u nan, ape kwagh u nan a lu yô." 
Numbers35:29 Kwagh ne a̱ hingir ne tindi, eren nen nahan sha ikov ikov sha ajiir a en a ne tema cii." 
Numbers35:30 Or u nan woo or yô, i̱ wua orwuanor la sha mpase u mbashiada; kpa shiada u or môm yô, kuma u wuan or a mi ga." 
Numbers35:31 Man shi de ngohol nen ipaa sha ci u uma u orwuanor ga, u nan lu a ibo i i kom ku yô, i̱ wua nan kpee je." 
Numbers35:32 Shi de ngohol nen ipaa sha ci u or u nan za te ken gar u waren ker la ner, nana̱ hide nana̱ za tema ken tar u nan, er pristi a lu a kpe ga la ga." 
Numbers35:33 Nahan yô, de hôngor nen tar u ne tem ker ne ga; gadia awambe nga a hôngor tar; ma kwagh u á na iwom a mi sha ci u tar u i hee awambe sha u la ngu ga, saa awambe a or u nan hee a la." 
Numbers35:34 De hôngor nen a tar u ne tem ker, u Mo M tem hen atô u u ne ga; gadia Mo TER M tema hen atô u Mbaiserael." 
Numbers36:1 Tsô mbavesen mba sha uya mba uter mba hen ipaven u ônov mba Gileadi, wan u Makir, wan u Manase, u hen uipaven mba ônov mba Yosev za va, va ôr kwagh a Mose man mbahemenev mbavesen mba sha uya mba uter, mba ônov mba Iserael la;" 
Numbers36:2 ve kaa er: TER kaa a terem er a̱ na Mbaiserael tar sha ishor i eren u̱ hingir dyako ve; shi TER kaa a terem kpaa er, i̱ gema dyako u Selofehadi anngô wase, i̱ na ônov nav mba kasev." 
Numbers36:3 Nahan aluer vea er ma or u ken ikwe igen i Mbaiserael yô, á ngohol dyako u a lu u ve u a lu u uter asev la kera, á gema á na kwe u ve za lu her la, nahan á pande dyako wase u ishor i tese se la kera." 
Numbers36:4 Zum u inyom i jubilii i Mbaiserael ia kuma yô, á seer dyako ve sha dyako u kwe u ve za lu her la, nahan á ngohol dyako ve ken dyako u kwe u uter asev kera." 
Numbers36:5 Tsô Mose kaa a Mbaiserael sha imo i TER, er: Kwe u ônov mba Yosev kaa mimi." 
Numbers36:6 Ka kwagh u TER A kaa sha kwagh u ônov mba kasev mba Selofehadi ne er, ve̱ er noov sha asema a ve, kpa i̱ lu ken ipaven u kwe u ter ve, ve̱ er ye." 
Numbers36:7 Ka nahan man á ngohol dyako u Mbaiserael u hen kwe ugen á za a mi hen ugen ga ye; gadia Mbaiserael yô, hanmô nana̱ uve sha dyako u kwe u uter u nan la." 
Numbers36:8 Hanma wankwase u nan lu a dyako hen kwe u Mbaiserael yô, nana̱ er nom ken ipaven u kwe u ter u nan, sha er ônov mba Iserael ve̱ lu a dyako u uter vev, hanmô nana̱ lu a u nan yô." 
Numbers36:9 Ka nahan man á ngohol dyako u kwe ugen á za a mi hen kwe ugen ga ye; gadia ikwe i Mbaiserael yô, hanmô u̱ uve sha dyako u u." 
Numbers36:10 Er TER kaa Mose nahan, kape ônov mba Selofehadi mba kasev ve er je la;" 
Numbers36:11 gadia Mahela man Tirsa man Hogela man Milka kua Noa, ônov mba Selofehadi mba kasev, ve er ônov mba anngôôv mba ter ve." 
Numbers36:12 Ve er noov ken uipaven mba ônov mba Manase wan u Yosev, dyako ve kpaa saa ken kwe u ipaven u ter ve." 
Numbers36:13 Ka atindi man akaaôron a jirigh a TER na Mose, Mose gema na Mbaiserael hen ukpuunkpuun mba Moabi hen kpe u Yordan, tiôn u hen Yeriko je ne." 
Deuteronomy1:1 Ka akaaôron a Mose ôr Mbaiserael cii, yande Yordan ken desereti, ken Araba u a lu sha ishigh ki Sufi her atô u Paran man Tofel man Laban man Haseroti kua Di-sahabi ne." 
Deuteronomy1:2 U moughon hen Horebi karen gbenda u sha uwo u Seir zan hen Kadeshi-barnea la, ka u tsan gbenda ayange pue kar môm." 
Deuteronomy1:3 Tsô sha inyom i akunduahar la, uwer u sha pue kar môm sha iyange i hiihii i uwer la, Mose ôr Mbaiserael akaa a TER A kaa Un er a̱ ôr ve a la cii;" 
Deuteronomy1:4 er a vande hemban Shihon tor u Mbaamor, u lu tema ken Heshebon la kera, kua Ogo tor u Bashan, u lu tema ken Ashetaroti hen Ederei la kpaa." 
Deuteronomy1:5 Ka yande Yordan ken tar u Moabi la, Mose kôr a mi pasen tindi ne ye; a kaa er:" 
Deuteronomy1:6 TER, Aôndo wase, ôr kwagh a vese hen Horebi, A kaa er: Ne tsa hen uwo ne kuma ve;" 
Deuteronomy1:7 yô, hembe yem nen ken tar u iwoogh u Mbaamor, man ken ajiir a a dondo a u cii, ken Araba man ken tar u iwoogh, man tar u shin upev man ken Imbusutarimese la man hen kpe u Zegemnger, ka tar u Mbakanaan man Lebanon zan zan za ar hen ifi u tamen, ka ifi u Uferati je la." 
Deuteronomy1:8 Nenge, M gema tar la m na ne; yô, nyôr nen, ngohol nen tar la, u TER lu bum a uter enev, Aberaham man Isaka man Yakob, er Una na ve u, kua vor ve u ken ijime ve la." 
Deuteronomy1:9 Hen shighen la m ôr kwagh a ven, m kaa mer: Me fatyô u tôôn ne, mo tswen ga;" 
Deuteronomy1:10 TER, Aôndo wen, seer ne iyenge; nenge, nyian ne ngee er asan a sha aôndo nahan." 
Deuteronomy1:11 TER Aôndo u uter enev, A̱ shi A̱ seer ne iyenge er né hemba iyenge yen i hegen ne kwa dubu je, A̱ ver ne doo doo, er A tende zwa a ven nahan yô." 
Deuteronomy1:12 Á er nan man mo tswen me tôô zayol wen, ne mba ne lu ikav mbi yuhwan ne, man num wene?" 
Deuteronomy1:13 Yô, tsuwa nen ior sha ikwe yen, mbafankwagh man mbakavenkwagh, mba i fe ve yô, me ver ve ve̱ lu mbahemenev enev." 
Deuteronomy1:14 Nahan ne rumun a mo, ne kaa ner, kwagh u u kaa la doo u eren." 
Deuteronomy1:15 Tsô m tsuwa mbahemenev mba sha ikwe yen, ior mba fan kwagh, mba i fe ve yô, m ver ve, ve lu mbahemenev enev, ka ukur mba ve lu a ior dubu dubu sha ikev, man ukur mba ve lu a ior deri deri, man ukur mba ve lu a ior akunduahargber akunduahargber, man ukur mba ve lu a ior pue pue, kua mbavesen mba sha ikwe yen." 
Deuteronomy1:16 Man hen shighe la, m kaa a mbaajiriv enev mer: Waan nen iko sha ijir i yilan i anmgbianev enev, ôr nen ijir i or a anngô u nan man shiror u a lu a nan la kpaa, sha mimi." 
Deuteronomy1:17 Sha ijirôron kpaa, de hembe wan nen orgen iko a orgen ga, or u ikoogh ga kpaa, waan nen nan iko vough er or u ikoogh nahan, de cie nen or ashe ga, gadia ijir ka i Aôndo; kwagh u a hembe ne yô, va nen a mi her a mo, mo me ungwa un." 
Deuteronomy1:18 Hen shighe la m wa ne akaa a né za er cii. 
Deuteronomy1:19 Tsô se hembe hen Horebi, se nyôr zegedeserti u cier iyol u ne nenge a mi sha gbenda u zan ken tar u iwoogh u Mbaamor la, er TER, Aôndo wase, kaa se nahan; se va ar hen Kadeshi-barnea." 
Deuteronomy1:20 Tsô m kaa a ven mer: Ne ar hen tar u iwoogh u Mbaamor, u TER Aôndo A lu nan se ne ve." 
Deuteronomy1:21 Nenge, TER, Aôndo wou, gema tar la na u; kôndo, ngohol nen u, er TER, Aôndo u uter ou, A kaa u nahan; de cie ga, de yen ishima kpaa ga." 
Deuteronomy1:22 Tsô ne cii, ne va her a mo, ne kaa ner: Sé tindi nen ior mbagenev ve̱ kar ken hemen, ve̱ za nenge tar la mker sha ci wase, ve̱ va ôr se kwagh u gbenda u sé kôndo la, man agar a sé za ar sha a yô." 
Deuteronomy1:23 Kwagh la doom, nahan m tsuwa ior pue kar uhar ken a ven, hanma kwe m tsuwa or môm." 
Deuteronomy1:24 Tsô ve gba unden sha uwo la, ve za ar hen pev u Esekol, ve jinge her cii." 
Deuteronomy1:25 Ve kura atam a ikon a ken tar la, ve va se a mi, shi ve va ôr se kwagh u ker kpaa, ve kaa er: Tar u TER, Aôndo wase, A lu nan se ne ka u dedoo." 
Deuteronomy1:26 Nahan kpaa, ne rumun ne kôndo ga, kpa ne gema ne hemba TER, Aôndo wen, ato, ne ungwa imo Na ga;" 
Deuteronomy1:27 man shi ne gba hunan ken utenti enev, kaan ner: Ka er TER A ker se ihom man A dugh a vese ken tar u Igipiti sha u va nan se sha ikev i Mbaamor er ve̱ tim se ye." 
Deuteronomy1:28 Ka han sé yemene? Anmgbianev asev na se asema a yinan sha er ve kaa er: Ior mbala hemba se ikôr i gban man ityaven kpaa, agar kpaa ka a tamen, i maa a ugil tav za tagher sha aôndo je; se nenge a Mbaanaki keregh kpaa." 
Deuteronomy1:29 Zum la m kaa a ven mer: Ishima i̱ de yen ne ga, man de cie nen ve kpaa ga." 
Deuteronomy1:30 TER, Aôndo wen, u A hemen ne ne, Un Una nôngo ityav sha ci wen, vough er A vande eren sha ci wen ken tar u Igipiti sha ashe a en la," 
Deuteronomy1:31 kua ken desereti kpaa, henpe u nenge er TER, Aôndo wou, A tôô u sha, er or ka nan tôô wan u nan nahan, sha igbenda i ne lu karen la cii zan zan ne va ar hen ijiir ne." 
Deuteronomy1:32 Nahan je kpaa, mayange ne na TER, Aôndo wen, jighjigh ga," 
Deuteronomy1:33 u A hemen ne gbenda, sha u keren ne ijiir i né haan afo; tugh yô, i lu sha usu, sha u Una tese ne gbenda u né kar yô; atetan yô, i lu sha ibeen." 
Deuteronomy1:34 Zum u TER ungwa imo i akaaôron a en la yô, ishima vihi Un, A bum er:" 
Deuteronomy1:35 Mimi je, ior mba kov u bo mban ne, mô ve môm nana nenge a tar u dedoo u M bum Mer, Me na uter enev la ashe ga," 
Deuteronomy1:36 saa Kalebu wan u Yefune una nenge a u ye; man ka un kua ônov nav Me na ve tar u a ndyar nguhar sha u la, sha ci u a dondo TER a ishima i môm yô." 
Deuteronomy1:37 Mo kpaa, ishima vihi TER a mo sha ci wen, A kaa er: We kpaa ú nyôr ker ga;" 
Deuteronomy1:38 ka Yosua wan u Nun, u a lu sha ishigh you la, ka un una nyôr ker ye; yô, taver un ishima, gadia ka un una na Mbaiserael vea ya dyako u u ye." 
Deuteronomy1:39 Man shi mbayev enev mba kiriki, mba ne kaa ner á va kura ve la, man ônov enev mba ve fe kwagh u dedoo shin u bo nyian ga ne, ka ve vea nyôr ker ye, ka ve Me na ve u, shi ka ve vea ngohol u ye;" 
Deuteronomy1:40 kpa ne yô, hide nen ijime yem nen ken desereti sha gbenda u zan hen Zegemnger u Nyian la." 
Deuteronomy1:41 Tsô ne gema ne kaa a mo ner: Se er TER kwaghbo; yô, sé kôndo sé za nôngo ityav, er TER, Aôndo wase, A kaa se nahan cii. Tsô hanmô wen kange iyol i utya seer seer sha u za unden sha uwo la, lu ne kwagh u ikoogh ga." 
Deuteronomy1:42 Kpa TER kaa a mo er: Kaa ve wer: De undu nen ga, man de nenge nen ityav kpaa ga, gadia M kera ngu a ven ga; sha er mbaihomov enev ve̱ de za hembe ne ga yô." 
Deuteronomy1:43 Kape m ôr kwagh a ven la, kpa ne ungwa ga, ne gema ne hemba TER ato, ne wa imo Na iko ga, ne cihi ne unde sha uwo la." 
Deuteronomy1:44 Tsô Mbaamor mba ve tema sha uwo la, due ta num sha a ven, ve cir sha a ven er iyough ka i er nahan, ve haa ne inya shin Seir zan zan va ar hen Horma." 
Deuteronomy1:45 Tsô ne hide ne gba vaan sha ishigh ki TER; kpa TER wa imo yen iko ga, ato tsô kpa, A ver sha a ven ga." 
Deuteronomy1:46 Nahan ne tsa hen Kadeshi ayange kpishi, sha iyenge i ayange a ne tema ker la." 
Deuteronomy2:1 Tsô se mough se ver ishigh hen desereti, se gba yemen sha gbenda u zan hen Zegemnger u Nyian la, er TER kaa nahan; se ningir hen uwo u Seir ayange kpishi;" 
Deuteronomy2:2 tsô TER ôr kwagh a mo kaa er: 
Deuteronomy2:3 Ne ningir uwo ne kuma; yô, gema nen ver nen ishigh vegher u ken imbusutarimese." 
Deuteronomy2:4 Kaa ior wer: Karen yen hegen sha tar u anmgbianev enev ônov mba Isou, mba ve tem sha Seir la; vea cia ne; yô, ver nen ayol a en dedoo," 
Deuteronomy2:5 de nenge nen num a ve ga, gadia Me pande tar ve Me na ne ga, shin côhin er ikevnguhar nahan tsô kpaa ga, sha ci u M vande nan Isou uwo u Seir hingir kwagh na je." 
Deuteronomy2:6 Yam nen kwaghyan a ve sha inyar sha u né yaan yô; mngerem kpaa, yam nen a ve sha inyar sha u né maan yô." 
Deuteronomy2:7 Gadia TER, Aôndo wou, ver u doo doo sha tom wou u aveegh cii; A fa zende wou u ken zegedeserti ne; anyom akunduahar ne, TER, Aôndo wou, lu a we imôngo; ma kwagh ban u ga." 
Deuteronomy2:8 Nahan se kar hen anmgbianev asev ônov mba Isou, mba ve tem ken Seir la, se gbihi gbenda u Araba la kua Elati man Eshion-geber ijime. Se gema, se gba yemen gbenda u zan ken desereti u Moabi la." 
Deuteronomy2:9 TER kaa a mo er: De bamen Moabi ga, man de nenge num a ve kpaa ga; gadia Me pande tar ve, Me na u Mer u̱ hingir kwagh wou ga, sha ci u M vande geman Ar, M na ônov mba Loti hingir kwagh ve." 
Deuteronomy2:10 (Tsuaa yô, lu Mbaemi tema hen ijiir la ye, ve lu ior mba gban akôr, ve ngee, shi ve tav er Mbaanaki nahan;" 
Deuteronomy2:11 mban kpaa i nengen ve er ka Mbarefai, vough er Mbaanaki nahan; kpa Mbamoabi yilan ve er Mbaemi." 
Deuteronomy2:12 Tsuaa la yô, lu Mbahori ve tema hen Seir ye; kpa ônov mba Isou ve ngohol tar ve la, gema tim ve sha ishigh vegh kera, maa ve kar ve tema ker, vough er Iserael kpaa er a tar u TER na ve, ve ngohol u la nahan.)" 
Deuteronomy2:13 Hegen yô, mough nen, per nen uwagh u Seredi. Tsô se mough se per uwagh u Seredi." 
Deuteronomy2:14 Ayange a zende wase cii, hii hen Kadeshi-barnea zan zan per uwagh u Seredi yô, lu anyom ikundugber kar anigheni zan zan mbautyav mba kov la cii ve kpe ve bee ken afo er TER bum a ve yô." 
Deuteronomy2:15 Gadia uwegh ku TER lu ihom a ve, A tim ve ken afo kera, ve kpe je, ve bee." 
Deuteronomy2:16 Tsô zum u mbautyav cii, ve kpe ve bee ken ior yô," 
Deuteronomy2:17 TER ôr kwagh a mo kaa er: 
Deuteronomy2:18 Nyian ú kar hen Ar sha ikighirtar i Moabi. 
Deuteronomy2:19 Zum u ú va mgbôghom a ônov mba Amon yô, de bamen ve ga, de nenge num a ve kpaa ga, gadia Me pande tar u Amon me na u ga, sha ci u ka ônov mba Loti M ne ve u, u hingir u ve ye." 
Deuteronomy2:20 (U kpaa i nenge u er ka tar u Mbarefai; Mbarefai tema ker tsuaa la, kpa Mbaamon yô, ve yilan ve er Mbasamsumi;" 
Deuteronomy2:21 lu ior mba gban akôr, ve ngee ve tav er Mbaanaki nahan, kpa TER tim ve sha ishigh vegh kera, ve ngohol tar ve, ve kar ve tema ker;" 
Deuteronomy2:22 er A er a ônov mba Isou mba ve tema ken Seir la nahan, zum u A tim Mbahori sha ishigh vegh kera la; ve ngohol tar ve, ve kar ve tema ker zan zan nyian;" 
Deuteronomy2:23 man Mbaavi mba ve tema ken angarev zan zan za ar hen Gasa la kpaa, Mbakafetor mba ve za va ken Kafetor la ve va tim ve kera, ve kar ve tema ker.)" 
Deuteronomy2:24 Mough yem nen za per nen pev u Arnon, nenge, M na Shihon Oramor tor u Heshebon a tar na cii sha ikev you; yô, gba ase mi ngohol u je, nôngo ityav a na." 
Deuteronomy2:25 Nyian je, Me hii u haan mcieryol wou man mciem ma á cian we sha akuraior a sha won cii; mba vea ungwa kwagh wou, vea gbire akarkase iyol, asema á yina ve sha ci wou." 
Deuteronomy2:26 Ken desereti u Kedemoti la, m tindi mbatyomov hen Shihon tor u Heshebon, a akaaôron a bem, m kaa mer:" 
Deuteronomy2:27 De, m̱ kar hen tar wou, me za sha gbenda gbenda, me kaha ken iyan shin ken imese kpaa ga." 
Deuteronomy2:28 Kwaghyan kpaa, teem a tee sha inyar m̱ ya; mngerem kpaa nam sha inyar m̱ ma, kpa de m̱ kar sha angahar a am," 
Deuteronomy2:29 er ônov mba Isou mba ve tem hen Seir, man Mbamoabi mba ve tem ken Ar, ve er a mo la nahan, zan zan me per Yordan me nyôr ken tar u TER, Aôndo wase, A lu nan se la." 
Deuteronomy2:30 Kpa Shihon tor u Heshebon rumun u se̱ kar her a na ga, gadia TER, Aôndo wou, taver jijingi na, cighir un ishima kpaa, sha u Una na un sha ikev you er i lu nyian nahan." 
Deuteronomy2:31 TER kaa a mo er: Nenge, M hii u nan we Shihon a tar na ve; yô, gba ase mi ngohol je, ngohol tar na u̱ hingir u wou." 
Deuteronomy2:32 Tsô Shihon due gba van hen vese a ishima i num, un a ior nav cii, sha u va nôngon ityav hen Yahashi." 
Deuteronomy2:33 Kpa TER, Aôndo wase, gema na un sha ikev yase, se hemba un a ônov nav kua ior nav cii." 
Deuteronomy2:34 Se ngohol agar a na cii hen shighe la, se tim hanma gar purututu, nomsombaiorov mba keregh man kasev man mbayev mba kiriki kpaa se de or môm nan war ga," 
Deuteronomy2:35 saa uzendenya tseegh, se ye ishar sha mi ye, kua ishar i sha agar a se hemba a la kpaa." 
Deuteronomy2:36 Hii hen Aroer u a lu hen kpe u pev u Arnon man gar u shin pev la, zan zan za ar hen Gileadi, ma gar môm hemba se ga; TER, Aôndo wase, na se a cii;" 
Deuteronomy2:37 saa tar u ônov mba Amon la tseegh u mgbôghom a u ga ye, ka kpewaghegh u Yaboki cii, man agar a sha tar u iwoogh kua hanma ijiir i TER, Aôndo wase, A yange se yô." 
Deuteronomy3:1 Tsô se gema, se kôr gbenda u zan sha Bashan. Ogo tor u Bashan due gba van hen vese a ishima i num, un a ior nav cii, sha u va nôngon ityav hen Ederei." 
Deuteronomy3:2 Tsô TER kaa a mo er: De cie un ga, gadia M na un sha ikev you a ior nav cii kua tar na kpaa; er a na er u er a Shihon tor u Mbaamor u a tema hen Heshebon la nahan." 
Deuteronomy3:3 Tsô TER, Aôndo wase, gema Ogo tor u Bashan na un sha ikev yase, un a ior nav cii; se hemba un je or na môm tsô kpaa nan war ga." 
Deuteronomy3:4 Se ngohol agar a na cii; hen shighe la, ma gar ve u se de ngohol lu ga, lu agar akunduatar, tar u Argobi la cii, ka tartor u Ogo ken Bashan je la." 
Deuteronomy3:5 Agar la cii i kase a sha ukpekpe mba taven, ve lu a ihinda man uishindan, shi angarev mba kiriki mba i kase ve ukpekpe ga kpaa, lu kpishi." 
Deuteronomy3:6 Se tim ve purututu, er se er a Shihon tor u Heshebon nahan; se tim hanma gar purututu a nomsombaiorov keregh man mbayev mba kiriki kpaa." 
Deuteronomy3:7 Kpa uzendenya cii kua ishar i sha agar la cii, se kura, hingir kwagh wase." 
Deuteronomy3:8 Hen shighe la se ngohol tar la sha ikev i utor mba Mbaamor uhar, mba ve lu yande Yordan la, hii hen pev u Arnon zan zan za ar hen uwo u Hermon" 
Deuteronomy3:9 (Hermon ne, Mbashidon mba yer un er, Shihon, kpa Mbaamor mba yer un er, Senir)," 
Deuteronomy3:10 agar a ken kpuun kpuun la cii, man Gileadi cii kua Bashan cii, zan zan za ar hen Saleka man Ederei, ka agar a tartor u Ogo ken Bashan je la." 
Deuteronomy3:11 (Gadia Ogo tor u Bashan la, ka un tseegh mase shin ken Mbarefai ye; gambe na lu gambeiyô; ka ken Raba u ken ônov mba Mbaamon a lu ye gaa? Ityaven na ka aseva ataankaranyiin je, igbangese na gema ka aseva anyiin je, sha ishiva i karen kwagh a mi keke la.)" 
Deuteronomy3:12 Tar ne ka ken shighe la se ngohol u ye; hii hen Aroer u a lu hen pev u Arnon la man vegher u tar u iwoogh u Gileadi a agar a ken u, m na Mbaruben man Mbagadi;" 
Deuteronomy3:13 vegher u Gileadi u a shi la kua Bashan cii, ka tartor u Ogo je la, m gema m na vegherkwe u Manase; ka tar u Argobi la cii. Bashan la cii mba yer un er tar u Mbarefai." 
Deuteronomy3:14 Yair wan u Manase ngohol tar u Argobi cii zan zan za ar hen ikighir i Mbageshur man Mbamaaka, ka Bashan je la; a ii u iti sha iti na iyol na, er, Havoti-yair, zan zan nyian." 
Deuteronomy3:15 Makir yô, m na un Gileadi." 
Deuteronomy3:16 Mbaruben man Mbagadi, m gema m na ve, hii hen Gileadi zan zan za ar shin pev u Arnon, atô u pev a lu ikighir i u, zan zan za ar hen uwagh u Yaboki u u lu ikighirtar i ônov mba Amon la," 
Deuteronomy3:17 kua Araba kpaa, man Yordan lu ikighir, hii hen Kinereti zan zan za ar hen Zegemnger u Araba, ka zegemnger u bar je la, shin soughsough u Pisega, vegher u sha ityoughkitaregh la." 
Deuteronomy3:18 Hen shighe la, m wa ne tindi, mer: TER, Aôndo wen na ne tar ne sha u ne̱ ngohol u; kange nen iyol i utya, per hemen nen anmgbianev enev, Mbaiserael, ne anomaior cii;" 
Deuteronomy3:19 kpa kasev enev man mbayev enev mba kiriki kua uzendenya enev (m fa ne mba a uzendenya kpishi), ve̱ lu ken agar a en a m ne ne ne;" 
Deuteronomy3:20 zan zan TER A̱ na anmgbianev enev mmem er A ne ne nahan, man ve kpaa ve̱ ngohol tar u TER, Aôndo wen, Una na ve yande Yordan la; tsô hanmô wen nana hide hen kwagh u nan, u m ne nan yô." 
Deuteronomy3:21 Hen shighe la m kaa a Yosua mer: Ashe a ou nenge akaa a TER, Aôndo wen, A er a utor mba uhar mban cii, kape TER Una er a ityartor i né per né nyôron ken i cii la." 
Deuteronomy3:22 De cie nen ve ga, gadia TER, Aôndo wen, ka Un, A nenge ityav sha ci wen ye." 
Deuteronomy3:23 Mo kpaa m zamber a TER hen shighe la, m kaa mer:" 
Deuteronomy3:24 TER, Aôndo, U hii u tesen wanakiriki wou icivir You man uwegh Ough ku ageegh, gadia ma aôndo ugen u a lu Sha shin shin tar u una fatyô u eren imbaityom man aeren a vesen er We nahan, ngu je kpa?" 
Deuteronomy3:25 Shi de, m̱ nenge tar u dedoo u yande Yordan la, uwo u doon ashe la man Lebanon." 
Deuteronomy3:26 Kpa TER gema yuwem a yuwe sha ci wen, ungwam her ga; man shi TER kaa a mo er: Kwagh ne kuma ve; de kera shi er kwagh a Mo sha kwagh ne ga." 
Deuteronomy3:27 Unde sha ityough ki Pisega, gema ashe ou shin ityôtar man ken imbusutarimese man ken imbusutariyan man sha ityoughkitaregh, nenge sha ashe a ou je, gadia peren you Yordan ne ga." 
Deuteronomy3:28 Kpa wa Yosua kwagh, a̱ er sha icihi, taver un ishima, gadia ka un una hemen ior mban, una per a ve, shi ka un una na ve vea ya dyako u tar u wea nenge a u la ye." 
Deuteronomy3:29 Tsô se tema hen pev hen ishigh ki Bete-peor la. 
Deuteronomy4:1 Hegen yô, we Iserael, ungwa akaawan man atindi a m lu tesen ne mer, eren nen sha mi, sha er né lu uma né nyôr né ngohol tar u TER, Aôndo u uter enev, A lu nan ne la yô." 
Deuteronomy4:2 De seer ne kwagh sha kwaghôron u m we ne tindi sha mi ne ga, man de panden nen kwagh sha min kpaa ga, sha er né waan atindi a TER, Aôndo wen, a m lu wan ne ne, iko yô." 
Deuteronomy4:3 Ashe a en nenge kwagh u TER A er sha kwagh u Baal-peor la, gadia ior mba ve dondo Baal-peor cii, TER, Aôndo wou, tim ve hen a we kera." 
Deuteronomy4:4 Kpa ne mba ne var a TER, Aôndo wen, yô, ne mba uma her cii, nyian." 
Deuteronomy4:5 Nenge, m tese ne akaawan man atindi, er TER, Aôndo wam, A kaam yô, sha u né za eren sha a, ken tar u né lu zan sha u za ngohol u la." 
Deuteronomy4:6 Waan nen a iko, eren nen sha a; gadia ka kwaghfan wen man mkav wen je la, sha ashe a akuraior a á va ungwa akaawan ne cii man aa kaa er: Mimi je zegeikurior ne ka ior i fan kwagh man i kaven kwagh kpaa." 
Deuteronomy4:7 Gadia ka hanma zegeikurior je, i lu a Aôndo ikua ikua a i, er TER, Aôndo wase, zum u ka sea yila Un nahana?" 
Deuteronomy4:8 Man ka hanma zegeikurior je i lu a akaawan man atindi a perapera er atindi ne nahan cii, a m lu veren ne sha ishi nyian nee?" 
Deuteronomy4:9 Kura iyol you, ver ishima sha uma wou dedoo sha er akaawan a ashe ou a nenge a mi la, a̱ de hungul we ga, sha er sha ayange ou cii a̱ de karen we ken ishima kera ga yô, kpa tesen ônov ou a, kua shi ônov mba ônov ou kpaa;" 
Deuteronomy4:10 iyange i u tile sha ishigh ki TER, Aôndo wou, hen Horebi la, shighe u TER kaa a mo er: Kohol Mo ior cii, M̱ ôr ve akaaôron Am, ve ungwa, sha u ve̱ hen u cian Mo sha ayange a vea tsa sha won cii man sha u ve̱ tesen ônov vev a kpaa." 
Deuteronomy4:11 Ne kpaa ne kporom ne va tile hen itinewoogh la; uwo la gema lu yeghen usu je usu mande Sha, ime kpaa lu, man abeen man angôghime." 
Deuteronomy4:12 TER ôr kwagh a ven, imo Na due ken atô u usu; ne ungwa imo i akaaôron, kpa ne nenge a ma kwagh sha ashe ga, saa imo la tseegh." 
Deuteronomy4:13 Man A pase ne ikuryan Na, i A kaa er ne̱ er sha mi la, ka Atindiakaa a pue la; shi A nger a sha ikpande i awen ihiar." 
Deuteronomy4:14 Hen shighe la, TER kaa a mo er, m̱ tese ne akaawan man atindi sha er né er sha a ken tar u ne lu zan sha u za ngohol u la." 
Deuteronomy4:15 Kura nen ayol a en dedoo je, gadia iyange i TER ôr kwagh a ven hen Horebi hen atô u usu la ne nenge a ma kwagh sha ashe ga;" 
Deuteronomy4:16 sha er né de kera eren dang de dang sha u gban eev mbu been a bee ma kwagh ga, er mlu u nomsoor shin kwase nahan," 
Deuteronomy4:17 shin mlu u hanma zendenya u a lu shin tar, shin mlu u hanma inyon i lun a akper, i purugh sha," 
Deuteronomy4:18 shin mlu u hanma kwagh u a kper a kpela inya, shin mlu u hanma ishu i i lu shin mngerem ma shin mkur u inyaagh kpaa;" 
Deuteronomy4:19 man shi sha er u̱ de kera kenden ashe sha man zum u ú nenge iyange man uwer man asan, akum a sha la cii, ú rumun wer a̱ urugh we zan zan ú gure ú civir a ga; ka akaa a TER, Aôndo wou, A kar kwar a mi A ne akuraior a a lu sha won cii yô." 
Deuteronomy4:20 Ne yô, TER kua a ven due a ven ken usu u ken adum kera, ka ken Igipiti je la, sha u ne̱ hingir Un ikurior i dyako, er i lu nyian nahan." 
Deuteronomy4:21 Man ishima vihi TER a mo kpaa sha ci wen, maa bum je er, mo me per Yordan ga, man me nyôr ken tar u dedoo u TER, Aôndo wou, A lu nan we u dyako la ga." 
Deuteronomy4:22 Mo yô, m ngu kpen ken tar ne, me per Yordan ga; kpa ne yô, né per, né ngohol tar u dedoo la." 
Deuteronomy4:23 Kura nen ayol a en, sha er ikuryan i TER, Aôndo wen, A ye a ven la, i̱ de hungul ne, né gbaan eev mbu been ma kwagh u TER, Aôndo wou, A yange u la ga." 
Deuteronomy4:24 Gadia TER, Aôndo wou, ka usu u hian, ka Aôndo u gban iwuhe je." 
Deuteronomy4:25 Zum u ú mar ônov kua ônov mba ônov ou man nea tsa ken tar la kpishi man nea va gema eren dang sha u gban eev mbu been ma kwagh, nea er kwagh u ifer sha ashe a TER, Aôndo wou, sha u bamen Un yô," 
Deuteronomy4:26 m yila Sha man tar ve̱ lu shiada sha a ven nyian, né per Yordan sha u za ngohol u la je ga; né tsa ayange kpishi ken u ga, tsô né tim purututu." 
Deuteronomy4:27 Shi TER Una sambe ne ken ior, ior enev vea mase shin kpeghee ken akuraior, henpe TER Una za haa ve la." 
Deuteronomy4:28 Né civir mbaaôndo mbagenev keregh mba ve lu tomaveegh u or, mba sha ikon man mba sha awen, mba ve nengen ga, ve ongo kpaa ga, kwagh kpaa ve ye ga, ihumakwagh kpa ve ongo ga la." 
Deuteronomy4:29 Nahan ú gba keren TER, Aôndo wou, keregh; ú zua a Na je, aluer u ker Un a ishima you cii man a uma wou cii yô." 
Deuteronomy4:30 Zum u ú lu ken ican, man akaa ne cii á tser u yô, sha ayange a masetyô, ú gema hen TER, Aôndo wou, ú ver ato sha imo Na;" 
Deuteronomy4:31 gadia TER, Aôndo wou, ka Aôndo u zungwen mhôônom je; Una kende u ga, shi Una tim u kpaa ga, man ikuryan i A ye a uter ou la kpaa ia hungul Un ga." 
Deuteronomy4:32 Yô, pine ase hegen, sha ayange a a kar la, a u lu a lu ga la, hii sha iyange i Aôndo gba or sha won la, man hii hen ikighir i Sha ne, zan zan za ar ikighir i ngila, i vande eren ma kwagh u vesen er ngun nahan mayange vee, shin i vande ungwan injakwagh ne nahan mayange kpa?" 
Deuteronomy4:33 Mayange ma ikurior igen ungwa imo i Aôndo lu ôron kwagh ken atô u usu er we u ongo nahan man shi ve lu uma her kpa? 
Deuteronomy4:34 Ma aôndo nôngo u za tôôn ikurior sha ci na ker atô u ikurior igen sha ikaren man sha uivande man akaakpilighyol man sha utya man sha uwegh ku ageegh man uwegh ku naregh man sha akaacieryol, er TER, Aôndo wen, lu er sha ci wen ken tar u Igipiti sha ashe a en la, mayange je kpa?" 
Deuteronomy4:35 Ka we i tese u a ye, sha u u̱ fa er i lu TER A lu Aôndo yô; mô gen ngu ga, saa Un tseegh." 
Deuteronomy4:36 A er u u ungwa imo Na Sha je, sha u Una tese u yô; shi A er u u nenge a zegeusu Na shin tar kpaa; u ungwa akaaôron a Na ken atô u usu je." 
Deuteronomy4:37 Ka sha ci u uter ou lu doo Un ishima man A tsuwa tsombor ve u ken ijime, man Un iyol Na A due a we sha agee Na a hemban la ken Igipiti ye," 
Deuteronomy4:38 sha u Una zenda akuraior sha ishigh you kera a a hembe ngeen a we, shi a hembe u agee kpaa, sha u Una nyôr a we, Una na u tar ve, ú ya dyako sha u, er i lu nyian nahan." 
Deuteronomy4:39 Fa ase nyian ne, koso ken ishima you kpaa, er i lu TER A lu Aôndo u Sha man u shin tar kpaa yô; mô gen ngu ga." 
Deuteronomy4:40 Yô, ver ishima sha akaawan a Na, man atindi a Na a m we u nyian ne, sha er á kpe u iyol yô, we kua ônov ou mba ken ijime, sha er á seer we ayange a ou ken tar u TER, Aôndo wou, A lu nan we er u̱ lu u wou gbem sha won la." 
Deuteronomy4:41 Hen shighe la je, Mose tsegha agar atar yande Yordan sha vegher u iyange i dugh la;" 
Deuteronomy4:42 Sha er or u nan woo or yô, nana̱ za ta ker; or u nan woo orgen abu man nan vande kôron nan ihom kera kpaa ga, nana̱ yevese nana̱ za ta ken gar môm u ken agar la nana̱ war:" 
Deuteronomy4:43 Beser ken desereti ken tar u kpuun kpuun la sha ci u Mbaruben, man Ramoti ken Gileadi sha ci u Mbagadi, man Golan ken Bashan sha ci u Mbamanase." 
Deuteronomy4:44 Ka tindi u Mose ver Mbaiserael sha ishi ne. 
Deuteronomy4:45 Ka mbampase man akaawan man atindi a Mose ôr Mbaiserael zum u ve due ken tar u Igipiti la," 
Deuteronomy4:46 yande Yordan, shin pev sha ishigh ki Bete-peor, ken tar u Shihon tor u Mbaamor u iyange tema hen Heshebon la, u Mose a Mbaiserael ve hemba un zum u ve due ken Igipiti la;" 
Deuteronomy4:47 ve ngohol tar na hingir kwagh ve, kua tar u Ogo tor u Bashan, utor mba Mbaamor uhar mba ve tema yande Yordan sha vegher u iyange i dugh la," 
Deuteronomy4:48 hii hen Aroer u a lu hen kpe u pev u Arnon la zan zan za ar hen uwo u Shihon (ka Hermon je la)," 
Deuteronomy4:49 man Araba cii yande Yordan vegher u sha ityoughkitaregh zan zan za ar hen zegemnger u Araba shin soughsough u Pisega. 
Deuteronomy5:1 Tsô Mose yila Mbaiserael cii, a kaa a ve er: Ne Mbaiserael ungwa nen akaawan man atindi a me ôr ne a sha ato a en nyian ne, sha er ne henen a, man ne waan iko u eren sha mi kpaa yô," 
Deuteronomy5:2 TER, Aôndo wase, ya ikur a vese hen Horebi." 
Deuteronomy5:3 Ka uter asev TER ya ikur ne a ve ga, kpa ka se je, mba se lu uma her nyian ne cii." 
Deuteronomy5:4 TER ôr kwagh a ven ishigh a ishigh je, sha uwo la, ken atô u usu" 
Deuteronomy5:5 (ka mo je, yan m tile hen atô u TER a ven hen shighe la ye, sha u me pase ne kwaghôron u TER yô; gadia ne lu cian usu la; m-undu kpaa, ne unde sha uwo la ga), A kaa er:" 
Deuteronomy5:6 Ka Mo M lu TER, Aôndo wou, u M dugh a we ken tar u Igipiti ken ya u ikpan ye." 
Deuteronomy5:7 De lu a mbaaôndo mbagenev ga saa Mo. 
Deuteronomy5:8 De gbe eev ga, shin ma kwagh u a bee kwagh u a lu sha kwavaôndo shin u a lu shin inya, shin u a lu shin mngerem ma shin mkur u inyaagh kpaa ga;" 
Deuteronomy5:9 de gur ve inya ga, man shi de civir ve kpaa ga, gadia Mo, TER, Aôndo wou, M ngu Aôndo u gban iwuhe, M tsahan mbayev sha ci u iferkwagh i uter zan zan kov u sha utar man shi u sha unyiin kpaa, u mba ve kerem ihom;" 
Deuteronomy5:10 kpa mba M doo ve ishima man ve we atindi a Am iko yô, M eren a udubu vev imôngo dedoo." 
Deuteronomy5:11 De teren iti i TER, Aôndo wou, dang ga; gadia or u nan teren iti i TER dang dang yô, Una na nan ishô mayange ga." 
Deuteronomy5:12 Waan iyange i memen iko sha er u tseghan i yô, er TER, Aôndo wou, A kaa u nahan." 
Deuteronomy5:13 Ayange ataratar er tom man shi akaa ou cii," 
Deuteronomy5:14 kpa iyange i ataankarahar la yô, ka iyange i memen i TER, Aôndo wou, de ker tom ave sha i ga, we, man shi wan wou u nomso man shi wan wou u kwase man shi or u shiren we tom, man shi kwase u eren we tom, man shi bua wou, man shi jaki you, man shi hanma zendenya wou, man shi shiror wou u nan va nyer u a nyôr, sha u or u shiren we tom man kwase u eren we tom ve̱ mem er we nahan." 
Deuteronomy5:15 Yô, umbur, er ngise u lu kpan ken tar u Igipiti man er TER, Aôndo wou due a we ker sha uwegh ku ageegh man sha uwegh ku naregh; ka nahan man TER, Aôndo wou, A kaa u er u̱ waan iyange i memen iko ye." 
Deuteronomy5:16 Civir teru man ngôu er TER, Aôndo wou, A kaa u nahan, sha er á seer we ayange man á kpe u iyol ken tar u TER, Aôndo wou, A lu nan we yô." 
Deuteronomy5:17 De woo or ga. 
Deuteronomy5:18 Man shi de eren idya ga. 
Deuteronomy5:19 Man shi de iin ga. 
Deuteronomy5:20 Man shi de we or u wan ndor a we aie iyol ga. 
Deuteronomy5:21 Man shi de tem kwase u or u wan ndor a we ga; man shi de tem ya u or u wan ndor a we ga, shin sule u nan, shin or u shiren nan tom, shin kwase u eren nan tom, shin bua u nan, shin jaki i nan, hanma kwagh u a lu u or u wan ndor a we kpaa, de tem ga." 
Deuteronomy5:22 Akaaôron ne TER ôr mkohol u ior enev cii genger genger sha uwo, ken atô u usu man u ibeenegh man u angôghime, A seer ma kwagh gen sha mi ga. Shi A nger a sha ikpande i awen ihiar, A nam i." 
Deuteronomy5:23 Tsô zum u ne ungwa imo la ken atô u ime, er uwo la lu yeghen usu yô, ne va her a mo, lu mbahemenev mba ikwe yen cii kua mbatamen enev," 
Deuteronomy5:24 ne kaa ner: Nenge, TER, Aôndo wase, tese se icivir Na man mhembe Na, man se ungwa imo Na ken atô u usu je, nyian se nenge er Aôndo A er kwagh a or, kpa nan lu uma her yô." 
Deuteronomy5:25 Hegen yô, inja na nan man sé gba kpen nahana? Gadia zegeusu ne una hia se, aluer shi sé seer ungwan imo i TER, Aôndo wase yô, sé kpe." 
Deuteronomy5:26 Gadia uumace cii, ka an je nan vande ungwan imo i Aôndo u uma lu ôron kwagh ken atô u usu, er se nahan, man shi nan lu uma heree?" 
Deuteronomy5:27 Yô, we gba kporom tsô, ungwa akaa a TER, Aôndo wase, Una ôr cii, nahan we ú gema ú ôr se kwagh u TER, Aôndo wase, Una ôr u cii, se, sé ungwa, sé er sha mi." 
Deuteronomy5:28 TER ungwa imo i akaaôron a en shighe u ne ôr kwagh a mo la. Tsô TER kaa a mo er: M ungwa imo i akaaôron a ior mban a ve er u yô, kwagh u ve kaa cii ka sha mi." 
Deuteronomy5:29 Ma ve lu ase a imbashima i cian Mo waan atindi Am cii iko gbem la, sha er á kpe ve iyol a ônov vev cii gbem sha won yô." 
Deuteronomy5:30 Za za kaa ve wer: Hide nen ken utenti enev. 
Deuteronomy5:31 Kpa we yô, tile a Mo heen, Mo Me ôr u atindi cii man akaawan kua akaaôron a jirigh a ú za tese ve sha u ve̱ eren sha a ken tar u M lu nan ve Mer ve̱ ngohol u la." 
Deuteronomy5:32 Nahan yô, ver nen ishima u eren sha mi er TER, Aôndo wen, A kaa ne yô; de kahan nen ken uwegh ku yanegh shin ken ku imesegh kpaa ga." 
Deuteronomy5:33 Zende nen sha igbenda i TER, Aôndo wen, A kaa ne la cii, sha er né lu uma, á kpe ne iyol, man á seer ne ayange ken tar u né za ngohol u la yô." 
Deuteronomy6:1 Ka tindi man akaawan kua akaaôron a jirigh a TER, Aôndo wen, A kaa, er i̱ tese ne a, sha er né za eren sha a ken tar u né per, né za ngohol u la yô;" 
Deuteronomy6:2 sha er u̱ cia TER, Aôndo wou, u̱ waan akaawan a Na iko cii, a m we u a, we man wan wou man wan u wan wou sha ayange a uma wou cii, sha er á seer we ayange yô." 
Deuteronomy6:3 Yô, ver ato Iserael, ver ishima u eren sha mi, sha er á kpe u iyol ú seer iyenge kpishi er TER, Aôndo u uter ou, tôndo zwa a we nahan ken tar u atumbabua kua iyough ve dumbur ker yô." 
Deuteronomy6:4 Yô, ver ato Iserael: TER, Aôndo wase, ka TER, tswen, je!" 
Deuteronomy6:5 Nahan yô, TER Aôndo A̱ doo u ishima a ishima you cii man a uma wou cii man a agee ou cii." 
Deuteronomy6:6 Akaaôron a m kaan we nyian ne, a̱ lu u ken ishima," 
Deuteronomy6:7 tesen ônov ou a sha gbashima je, ôron kwagh u a, zum u wea tema hen ya wou man zum u wea zenden sha gbenda man zum u wea yav inya man zum u wea moughon sha." 
Deuteronomy6:8 Man zer a sha uwe, a̱ lu u ikav, shi a̱ lu u kwagh u zeren sha icul senen hen kungwa." 
Deuteronomy6:9 Man shi nger a sha ikpande i ken ambusu a ihinda i iyou you man sha ihindagar you kpaa. 
Deuteronomy6:10 Tsô, zum u TER, Aôndo wou, Una nyôr a we ken tar u A bum a uter ou Aberaham man Isaka man Yakob er Una na u la yô, uzegembaagarev mba dedoo, mba i lu we u maa ga yô," 
Deuteronomy6:11 man uya mba akaa a iv ker, atô kposo kposo, mba i lu we u iv ve ga yô, azôr a ombon mngerem shimi a i tim sha vande, a i lu we u tim ga yô, ishule i ikon i wain kua ikon i olev i i lu we u môôr ga yô; shighe u ú ya ú ide," 
Deuteronomy6:12 shighe la kura iyol you sha er u̱ de hungul TER u A dugh a we ken tar u Igipiti ken ya u ikpan la ga yô. 
Deuteronomy6:13 Ka TER, Aôndo wou, cian Un ye, shi ka Un kpaa eren Un tom, ka iti Na kpaa bumun nen ye." 
Deuteronomy6:14 De dondon nen mbaaôndo mbagenev ga, ma aôndo u akuraior a a kase ne la;" 
Deuteronomy6:15 gadia TER, Aôndo wou, u A lu u her atô la, ka Aôndo u gban iwuhe je; yô, ishima i̱ de vihin TER, Aôndo wou, a we, A̱ tim u sha tar kera ga." 
Deuteronomy6:16 De kera meen nen TER, Aôndo wen, er lu ne mee Un hen Masa la nahan ga." 
Deuteronomy6:17 Waan nen atindi a TER, Aôndo wen, man mbampase Nav kua akaawan a Na a A we u la iko, sha gbashima je." 
Deuteronomy6:18 Eren kwagh u a lu u mimi man u perapera sha ishigh ki TER, sha er á kpe u iyol ú nyôr ú ngohol tar u dedoo u TER lu bum a uter ou la," 
Deuteronomy6:19 er Una zenda mbaihomov ou cii sha ishigh you kera er TER lu kaa yô. 
Deuteronomy6:20 Zum u wan wou nana va pine u sha ayange a ken hemen la, er: Mbampase man akaawan ne man akaaôron a jirigh a TER, Aôndo wase, A ne ne, ne yô, inja ve ka nana?" 
Deuteronomy6:21 Yô, kaa wan wou wer: Ngise se lu ikpan i tor Farao ken Igipiti; TER due a vese ken Igipiti sha uwegh ku ageegh;" 
Deuteronomy6:22 TER er uivande man akaakpilighyol a vesen man a vihin ken Igipiti, sha Farao kua sha ya na cii sha ashe ase je." 
Deuteronomy6:23 A due a vese ker sha u Una va a vese Una va na se tar u A bum a uter asev yô; 
Deuteronomy6:24 TER kaa se er, se̱ er sha akaawan ne cii, se̱ cian TER, Aôndo wase, sha er á kpe se iyol gbem, man sha er Una kura se se̱ lu uma her, er i lu nyian nahan." 
Deuteronomy6:25 Nahan á gema á hingir perapera wase aluer sé ver ishima sé eren sha tindi ne cii, sha ishigh ki TER, Aôndo wase, er A kaa se yô." 
Deuteronomy7:1 Zum u TER, Aôndo wou, Una nyôr a we ken tar u u ze sha u za ngohol u la yô, man Una zenda akuraior kpishi sha ishigh you kera, ka Mbahiti man Mbagirgashi man Mbaamor man Mbakanaan man Mbaperishi man Mbahivi man Mbayebushi, akuraior ataankarahar a a hembe u iyenge man agee kpaa yô," 
Deuteronomy7:2 man zum u TER, Aôndo wou, Una gema a, Una na sha ikev you man wea hemba a yô, tim a purututu; de ye ikur a a ga, de zungu a mhôônom kpaa ga." 
Deuteronomy7:3 De eren kasev ken a ga; de tee wan wou u kwase ne or u ken a ga, man de eren wan u a, va ne wan wou ga." 
Deuteronomy7:4 Gadia vea gema ônov ou vea de u dondon Mo, vea gema á civir mbaaôndo mbagenev; nahan ishima á vihi TER a ven, Una tim u fese je." 
Deuteronomy7:5 Kwagh u né er a yô, yôhôl nen atse a a, a nanden nagh sha mi, hembe nen mtôm ma awenem ma a, gber nen Asherim u a, nande nen ieev mbi gban a gba mbi a sha usu." 
Deuteronomy7:6 Gadia we u ngu TER, Aôndo wou, icighannongo je; TER, Aôndo wou, tsuwa u ken akuraior a a lu sha won cii, er u̱ lu nongo Na jim." 
Deuteronomy7:7 Ka mngee, ne hembe ngeen a ma ikurior igen man TER A pende ishima sha a ven A tsough ne kpaa ga, gadia ne hemba gban ijime a akuraior cii;" 
Deuteronomy7:8 kpa ka sha ci u ne doo TER ishima man sha ci u A we ishima u kuren mbum u A bum a uter enev la, TER A dugh a ven sha uwegh ku ageegh A paa ne ken ya u ikpan sha ikev i Farao, tor u Igipiti ye." 
Deuteronomy7:9 Yô, fa, TER, Aôndo wou, Un ka Aôndo; Aôndo u jighjigh, u A we iko sha ikuryan man erdoo a mba A doo ve ishima man ve we atindi Na iko, zan zan ikov dubu je yô," 
Deuteronomy7:10 oron iyev sha mba ve ker Un ihom sha ishiv vev je, timin ve; Una de or u nan ker Un ihom ga, Una or iyev sha nan sha ishigh ki nan je." 
Deuteronomy7:11 Yô, waan iko sha tindi man akaawan man akaaôron a jirigh a M kaan we nyian mer, eren sha mi ne." 
Deuteronomy7:12 Nahan er ne ver ato sha akaaôron a jirigh ne man ne we iko u eren sha a kpaa yô, TER, Aôndo wou kpaa, Una waan iko sha ikuryan man erdoo a we er A bum a uter ou la;" 
Deuteronomy7:13 ú doo Un ishima, Una ver u doo doo, Una seer we iyenge, man shi Una ver tse wou doo doo kua iyiagh ki hen tar wou, alakema wou man wain wou, man mkurem ou, mmar u abua a ou, man ônov mba iyôngov ou, ken tar u A bum a uter ou, er Una na u la." 
Deuteronomy7:14 Ú lu a iveren i dedoo á hemba akuraior cii; á zua a or u lun ikôm shin ikômkwase ken a ven ga, shin ken uzendenya enev kpaa ga." 
Deuteronomy7:15 TER Una kura angev hen we kera cii; man shi Una na ma angev mbu bov mbu Igipiti mbu u fe mbu la er mbu̱ kôr u ga, Una gema mbu Una haa mba ve ker u ihom la cii." 
Deuteronomy7:16 Man ú tim akuraior cii a TER, Aôndo wou, Una gema a, Una na sha ikev you la; ishe you i̱ de zungu ve mhôônom ga, man de civir mbaaôndo vev ga, gadia á va hingir kwagh u hônon we min." 
Deuteronomy7:17 Aluer u kaa ken ishima you wer: Akuraior ne hembam iyenge, me er nan me zenda ve ken tar ve kera?" 
Deuteronomy7:18 Yô, de cie ve ga; umbur kwagh u TER, Aôndo wou, lu er a Farao kua Igipiti cii la;" 
Deuteronomy7:19 ikaren i vesen i ashe a ou nenge a min la, man uivande, kua akaakpilighyol, man uwegh ku ageegh, man uwegh ku naregh, ka akaa a TER, Aôndo wou, er man A due a we la; kape TER, Aôndo wou, Una er a akuraior a u cie a cii la." 
Deuteronomy7:20 Man shi TER, Aôndo wou, Una tindi ahambe ken ve, nahan mba ve shi ker, ve yer la kpaa, vea tim kera." 
Deuteronomy7:21 Ishima i̱ de te u kwe sha ci ve ga; gadia TER, Aôndo wou, ngu u hen atô, ka Aôndo u hemban man u cier iyol." 
Deuteronomy7:22 TER, Aôndo wou, Una zenda akuraior la sha ishigh you kera tegh tegh; á rumun we er ú hemba ve fese ga, sha er inyamtoho i̱ de va ngeen i̱ hemba u ga yô." 
Deuteronomy7:23 Kpa TER, Aôndo wou, Una gema ve Una na sha ikev you, Una nzughul a ve tsung zan zan vea tim." 
Deuteronomy7:24 Man Una na utor vev sha ikev you, ú er iti ve ia hungul sha won kera; ma or nana fatyô u tilen we sha ishi ga zan zan ú tim ve." 
Deuteronomy7:25 Ieev mbi mbaaôndo vev mbi gban a gba la yô, nande nen sha usu; de tem azurfa shin zenaria u a lu sha mi ga; de tee ga, sha er i̱ de hen u sha mi ga yô, gadia ka TER, Aôndo wou, kwagh u ihôngorough je;" 
Deuteronomy7:26 man de ve a kwagh u ihôngorough ken ya wou ga, sha er ú hingir a ifan iyol er un nahan ga yô, kpa nyagh un tsembelee je, i̱ lu u kwagh u ndôhôrshima, gadia ka kwagh u i we un ifan yô." 
Deuteronomy8:1 Hanma tindi u m we u nyian yô, waan nen iko eren nen sha mi, sha er né lu uma, né seer iyenge, né nyôr, né ngohol tar u TER lu bum a uter enev er Una na u yô." 
Deuteronomy8:2 Man shi umbur gbenda la cii, u TER, Aôndo wou, hemen we anyom akunduahar ken desereti sha u hiren a iyol you ijime, man u karen we, sha u fan kwagh u a lu u ken ishima, shin ú waan atindi Na ikoou, shin ú waan a iko gaou." 
Deuteronomy8:3 A hide a iyol you ijime, A de ijen kôr u, kpa A shi A koso u sha mana, kwagh u u fe un ga je yô, uter ou kpaa fa un ga, sha er Una tese u, u̱ fa er i lu sha kwaghyan tseegh man or a lu uma ga yô, kpa i lu sha hanma kwaghôron u a dugh ken zwa u TER man or a lu a uma sha mi yô." 
Deuteronomy8:4 Anyom akunduahar la, ikondo you i haan iyol, bee iyol ga, nguhar tsô kpaa, mura u ga." 
Deuteronomy8:5 Umbur dedoo, er or ka nan tsaha wan u nan nahan, kape TER, Aôndo wou kpaa, A tsaha u la." 
Deuteronomy8:6 Yô, waan atindi a TER, Aôndo wou, iko, zenden sha igbenda Na, cia Un kpaa." 
Deuteronomy8:7 Gadia TER, Aôndo wou, ngu van a we ken tar u dedoo, tar u lun a iwagh man amboramnger man mngerem ma duen shin upev man sha iwo," 
Deuteronomy8:8 tar u lun a alakema man shair man ikon i wain man ikon i tur man upomegraneti, tar u lun a mkurem ma olev man iyough," 
Deuteronomy8:9 tar u ú ya kwaghyan ker, akorakor ga, ma kwagh una ban u ker ga; tar u awen a ker a lu iyôgh ki iligh, iwo i ken u kpaa, ú time togula sha i." 
Deuteronomy8:10 Ú yaan á kuma u gbing gbing, ú wuese TER, Aôndo wou, sha ci u tar u dedoo u A ne u la." 
Deuteronomy8:11 Kura iyol you, TER, Aôndo wou, A̱ de hungul we er ú kera waan atindi Na man akaaôron a Na a jirigh kua akaawan a Na, a m we u kwagh sha mi nyian ne iko ga ze;" 
Deuteronomy8:12 sha er, zum u ú ya á kuma u man ú maa uya mba doon, ú tema ker," 
Deuteronomy8:13 man zum u ibua you man iyôngo you ia seer ngeen man azurfa wou man zenaria wou kpaa vea seer ngeen man kwagh u u lu a mi cii una seer ngeen yô," 
Deuteronomy8:14 Ú gba moron iyol je, TER, Aôndo wou, u A dugh a we ken tar u Igipiti ken ya u ikpan la Una hungul we," 
Deuteronomy8:15 Un u A kar a we ken zegedeserti u cieryol la, henpe iyô i usu lu man ayese man tar u tseghe tseghe, henpe mngerem lu ga, u A due u a mngerem ken vande u taver la," 
Deuteronomy8:16 u A koso u ken desereti sha mana, kwagh u uter ou fa un ga, sha u Una hide a iyol you ijime man Una kar u sha er ken masejime Una ver u doo doo yô." 
Deuteronomy8:17 Yô, de henen ken ishima you wer: Ka tahav av man agee a uwegh agh ve nem inyaregh kin ga." 
Deuteronomy8:18 Kpa umbur TER, Aôndo wou, ka Un A ne u tahav mbu zuan a inyaregh ye, sha er Una er sha ikuryan Na i A bum a uter ou, er i lu nyian nahan." 
Deuteronomy8:19 Tsô aluer TER, Aôndo wou, á hungul we, wea gema wea dondo mbaaôndo mbagenev, wea eren ve tom, wea guren, wea civir ve yô, m pase ne nyian ne, né tim kpee." 
Deuteronomy8:20 Er akuraior a TER A lu timin a sha ishigh yenegh la nahan, kape nea tim la, sha ci u ne vende u ungwan imo i TER, Aôndo wen, yô." 
Deuteronomy9:1 Ver ato Iserael, nyian u ngu peren Yordan sha u u̱ nyôr u̱ za ngohol akuraior a a hembe u iyenge man agee kpaa, agar a vesen a vesen a i maa a ugir tav za tagher sha aôndo je," 
Deuteronomy9:2 ior mba gban akôr, mba taven, Mbaanaki, mba u fe ve, mba u ongo, i er kwagh ve er: Ka an nana fatyô u tilen sha ishigh ki Mbaanaki laa?" 
Deuteronomy9:3 Yô, fa nyian, TER, Aôndo wou, ka Un je A lu peren hemen ne, er usu u hian nahan ye; Una tim ve, Una er ve vea var inya sha ishigh you; nahan ú tim ve fese, er TER A kaa nahan." 
Deuteronomy9:4 Yô, de henen ken ishima you, zum u TER, Aôndo wou, A lu numun ve sha ishigh you kera la, wer: Ka sha ci u perapera wam man TER A nyer a mo er m̱ ya dyako u tar ne, ga; gadia ka sha ci u ifer i akuraior ne man TER A lu zendan ve sha ishigh you kera ye," 
Deuteronomy9:5 ka sha ci u perapera wou ga; shin ka sha er u lu ishima jighilii yum man u lu nyôron sha u ngohol tar ve ga, kpa ka sha ci u ifer i akuraior ne, man TER, Aôndo wou, A lu zendan ve sha ishigh you kera ye, man shi sha er Una er sha kwaghôron u TER lu bum a uter ou, Aberaham man Isaka man Yakob la." 
Deuteronomy9:6 Yô, fa ka sha ci u perapera wou man TER, Aôndo wou, A lu nan tar u dedoo la, er u̱ ngohol u ga; gadia we u ngu ikurior i nômbon ikôr je." 
Deuteronomy9:7 Yô, umbur, i̱ de hungul we er yan u bam TER, Aôndo wou, ken desereti la ga; hii sha iyange i u due ken tar u Igipiti la je zan zan shighe u ne ve hen ijiir ne, ne lu hendan kwagh a TER je." 
Deuteronomy9:8 Hen Horebi yô, ne bam TER, TER yuwe a ven je war timin ne." 
Deuteronomy9:9 Zum u m unde sha uwo sha u za ngohol ikpande i ikuryan i TER ya a ven la, shighe la m tsa sha uwo ayange akunduahar man aime akunduahar; m ya kwagh ga, mngerem kpaa m ma ga." 
Deuteronomy9:10 TER nam ikpandeawen ihiar i i nger i sha ihôwe u Aôndo yô; ka sha i je i nger akaaôron a TER ôr ne sha uwo ken atô u usu sha iyange i mkohol u ior cii la ye. 
Deuteronomy9:11 Tsô ayange akunduahar man aime akunduahar la, nga kar kera yô, TER nam ikpandeawen ihiar la, ka ikpande i ikuryan je la." 
Deuteronomy9:12 TER kaa a mo er: Mough heen, hungwa fese, gadia ior ou mba u dugh a ve ken Igipiti la, ve er kwagh u dang ve; ve undu gbenda u M kaa ve la fese je, ve gema ve ker eev." 
Deuteronomy9:13 Man shi TER ôr kwagh a mo, kaa er: M nenge ikurior ne, nahan ka ikurior i nômbon ikôr." 
Deuteronomy9:14 Dem, M̱ tim ve, M̱ ese iti ve sha won kera, nahan Me gema u, hingir ikurior i hemban ve agee man iyenge kpaa." 
Deuteronomy9:15 Tsô m gema m hungwa sha uwo, uwo la lu yeghen usu; ikpande i ikuryan ihiar la lu sha ave am ahar ne." 
Deuteronomy9:16 Tsô m nenge er ne er TER, Aôndo wen, isholibo je yô; ne er wanbua ne ker un a ker, ne undu gbenda u TER, Aôndo wen, A kaa ne la fese je." 
Deuteronomy9:17 Nahan m gema ikpande ihiar i sha ave am ahar la, m gbihi i kera, m hembe i sha ashe a en je." 
Deuteronomy9:18 M shi m gba inya sha ishigh ki TER, er tsuaa la nahan, ayange akunduahar man aime akunduahar; m ya kwagh ga, mngerem kpaa m ma ga, sha ci u isholibo yen i ne er cii yô, er ne er ifer sha ishigh ki TER ne bam Un yô." 
Deuteronomy9:19 Gadia m lu cian iyugh man ishima i nyoon i tsung i TER nyoon a ven sha u timin ne la. Hen shighe la kpaa TER shi ungwam. 
Deuteronomy9:20 Aron kpaa ishima vihi TER a na tsung je er Una tim un yô, m er msen sha ci u Aron hen shighe la kpaa." 
Deuteronomy9:21 Kwaghbo wen, wanbua u ne er la, m tôô un m nande sha usu, m cagh un, m wua un dedoo, via je hingir er ihundu nahan, m gema ihundu na la m haa shin uwagh u u sen sha uwo la." 
Deuteronomy9:22 Man shi hen Tabera man hen Masa man hen Kiberoti-hataawa kpaa ne bam TER. 
Deuteronomy9:23 Zum u ne lu hen Kadeshi-barnea kpaa, TER tindi ne, A kaa er: Kôndo nen, za ngohol nen tar u M ne ne la; shighen la kpaa shi ne hendan a imo i TER, Aôndo wen, ne na Un jighjigh je ga, ato kpaa ne ver sha kwaghôron Na ga." 
Deuteronomy9:24 Hii sha iyange i M fa ne la je, ne lu mbahendan kwagh a TER." 
Deuteronomy9:25 Tsô m gba inya sha ishigh ki TER, ayange akunduahar man aime akunduahar shon a m gba inya la, sha ci u TER lu kaan er Una tim ne yô." 
Deuteronomy9:26 Tsô m sôn TER, m kaa mer: TER Aôndo, de timin ior Ou, dyako Wou, u U paa un sha mhembe Wou, u U due a na ken tar u Igipiti sha uwegh ku ageegh la, ga." 
Deuteronomy9:27 Umbur mbayev Ou, Aberaham man Isaka man Yakob, de we iko sha ityough ki taver ki ior mban ga, shin sha ifer ve, shin sha isholibo ve kpaa ga;" 
Deuteronomy9:28 gayô, tar u U due a vese ken u la, ua va kaa er: Ka sha er TER A fetyô u aren a ve ken tar u A tende zwa er Una na ve la ga yô, man shi sha ci u A ker ve ihom yô, ka nahan man A due a ve er Una za tim ve ken desereti ye." 
Deuteronomy9:29 Man ve ka ior Ou je man dyako Wou kpaa u U dugh a na sha agee Ou a hemban man sha uwegh ku naregh yô. 
Deuteronomy10:1 Tsô hen shighe la TER kaa a mo er: Kua ikpandeawen ihiar er i tsuaa la nahan, shi unde sha uwo va hen Mo, man shi er areki sha ikon;" 
Deuteronomy10:2 nahan Me nger kwaghôron u yan lu sha ikpande i tsuaa i u hembe i la, sha i; gema i wa ken areki." 
Deuteronomy10:3 Tsô m er areki sha kon u saa, shi m kua ikpande ihiar er i tsuaa la nahan, maa m unde sha uwo la, m lu a ikpande ihiar la sha ave am." 
Deuteronomy10:4 Nahan A nger sha ikpande la er mnger u tsuaa la nahan, Atindiakaa a pue, a TER ôr ne sha uwo la ken atô u usu sha iyange i mkohol la; tsô TER gema i nam." 
Deuteronomy10:5 Nahan m gema m hungwa sha uwo, m va wa ikpande la ken areki u m er la; ngi ker je er TER kaam yô." 
Deuteronomy10:6 (Tsô Mbaiserael hembe hen Beeroti Bene-Yakan yem hen Mosera; Aron maa kpe her, i ii un her; wan na Eleasar tema sha tom u pristi sha ityough nagh." 
Deuteronomy10:7 Ve hembe heera ve yem hen Gudugoda; hen Gudugoda ve hembe, ve yem hen Yotibata, tar u lun a iwagh.)" 
Deuteronomy10:8 Hen shighe la je TER maa tsegha kwe u Levi er ve̱ tôôn areki u ikuryan i TER man ve tilen sha ishigh ki TER, ve̱ eren Un tom, man sha u ve̱ naan iveren ken iti Na kpaa, zan zan va ar nyian ne." 
Deuteronomy10:9 Ka nahan man Levi a kera lu a kwar shin dyako a anmgbianev nav imôngo ga ye; ka TER je A lu dyako na ye, er TER, Aôndo wou, kaa un nahan." 
Deuteronomy10:10 Tsô m tsa sha uwo la er tsuaa la nahan, ayange akunduahar man aime akunduahar; hen shighe la kpaa TER shi ungwam; kera sar TER u timin we ga." 
Deuteronomy10:11 TER shi kaa a mo er: Mough, hemen ior mban, ve̱ nyôr, ve̱ ngohol tar u M bum a uter vev Mer Me na ve la." 
Deuteronomy10:12 Hegen yô, Iserael, ka nyi TER, Aôndo wou, A keren her a we, saa di u cian TER, Aôndo wou, tsô, man u zenden sha igbenda Na cii, man A̱ doo u ishima, man u̱ eren TER, Aôndo wou, tom a ishima you cii, man a uma wou cii," 
Deuteronomy10:13 man u̱ waan atindi a TER iko kua akaawan a Na a m we u nyian ne, sha er á kpe u iyol yô." 
Deuteronomy10:14 Nenge, Sha kua Sha u a lu sha je la, ka u TER, Aôndo wou, je, kua tar man akaa a lu sha u cii kpaa." 
Deuteronomy10:15 Gema ka uter ou, TER A pende ishima sha ve ye, ve doo Un ishima; ken akuraior cii, ka tsombor ve ken ijime ve A tsuwa u ye, ka ne je ne, er i lu nyian nahan." 
Deuteronomy10:16 Yô, tsôngo nen ipusu i asema a en, de kera shi luun nen mba nômbon ikôr ga." 
Deuteronomy10:17 Gadia TER, Aôndo wen, Un ka Aôndo u mbaaôndo man Ter u uter, ka Aôndo u hemban, u ageegh, u cieryol, u sangen a sange ga, ngohol inyaregh kpaa ga;" 
Deuteronomy10:18 er ijir sha ci u ancôghol man kwasecôghol, shiror doo Un ishima, ne nan kwaghyan man akondo kpaa." 
Deuteronomy10:19 Yô, ne kpaa shiror a̱ doo ne ishima, gadia ne kpaa yan ne lu ushirmbaiorov ken tar u Igipiti." 
Deuteronomy10:20 Ka TER, Aôndo wou, cian Un ye, ka Un kpaa eren Un tom, ka Un var ken Na, shi ka ken iti Na kpaa bumun nen ye." 
Deuteronomy10:21 Ka un ú wuese Un ye, Un ka Aôndo wou, u A er u uzegembaakaav mba cieryol mban, mba u nenge a mi sha ashe ou ne." 
Deuteronomy10:22 Uter ou yan yem ken Igipiti, lu ior akunduatargber tsô; ahegen yô, TER, Aôndo wou, gema u u ngee, iyenge you hingir er asan a Sha nahan." 
Deuteronomy11:1 Nahan yô, TER, Aôndo wou, A̱ doo u ishima, waan kwagh u A we u la iko gbem kua akaawan a Na man akaaôron a jirigh a Na man atindi a Na kpaa." 
Deuteronomy11:2 Shi fa nen nyian, gadia ka ônov enev mba ve fe man ve nenge mtsaha u TER, Aôndo wen, ga la, m lu ôron kwagh a ve ga, mhembe Na man uwegh nagh ku ageegh man uwegh Nagh ku naregh," 
Deuteronomy11:3 man uivande Nav man aeren a Na ken atô u Igipiti a A er Farao tor u Igipiti man tar na cii; 
Deuteronomy11:4 man kwagh u A er ikumutya i Igipiti, anyinya ve man akeke ve, er A er mngerem ma Zegemnger u Nyian kuwa, cir a, zum u ve lu zendan ne ijime la, man er TER tim ve er i lu nyian nahan," 
Deuteronomy11:5 man er lu eren a ven ken desereti zan zan ne va ar hen ijiir ne," 
Deuteronomy11:6 man kwagh u A er a Datan man Abiram, ônov mba Eliabi wan u Ruben la, er inya aver zwa u i, mena ve a ior vev man utenti vev, man hanma kwaghuma u a dondo ve cii, hen atô u Iserael cii;" 
Deuteronomy11:7 gadia ashe a en nenge uzegembaakaav mba TER er la cii. 
Deuteronomy11:8 Nahan yô, waan nen atindi a m we ne nyian ne iko cii, sha er né taver man né nyôr né ngohol tar u ne lu zan her, sha u né za ngohol u la;" 
Deuteronomy11:9 man sha er á seer ne ayange ken tar u TER bum a uter enev er Una na ve a tsombor ve la, tar u atumbabua man iyough ve dumbur ker yô." 
Deuteronomy11:10 Gadia tar u u lu nyôron sha u za ngohol u la, ngu er tar u Igipiti u ne dugh ker la ga, ken ape yan u lôôn ivor you, u urun mngerem sha nguhar ou, er sule u iue nahan;" 
Deuteronomy11:11 kpa tar u ne lu zan sha u za ngohol u la yô, ka tar u agungu man apev, ngu me mngerem ma ura u Sha u nee yô;" 
Deuteronomy11:12 ka tar u TER, Aôndo wou, A nengen sha u yô; ashe a TER, Aôndo wou, nga sha u gbem, sha mhii u inyom zan zan mkur u i." 
Deuteronomy11:13 Nahan yô, aluer né ver ato sha gbashima sha atindi a M we ne nyian ne er TER, Aôndo wen, A̱ doo ne ishima, man né er Un tom a ishima yen cii man uma wen cii yô." 
Deuteronomy11:14 Me nôôn ura sha tar wen sha ashighe ashighe, vough vough, urahe man ura u masetyô, sha er ú sunda iyiagh you man wain wou kua mkurem ou." 
Deuteronomy11:15 Shi Me er toho ua lu ken akôngo a ou sha ci u ilev you; we kpaa ú yaan kwagh á kuman we. 
Deuteronomy11:16 Ver nen ishima sha ayol a en sha er i̱ de bum ne er né kaha né hingir u eren mbaaôndo mbagenev tom, guren civir ve, ga;" 
Deuteronomy11:17 gayô, ishima á vihi TER a ven tsung, Una cir Sha, ura ua kera nôô ga, inya kpaa ia kera doo iyiagh ga, nahan né tim fese sha tar u dedoo u TER A lu nan ne ne." 
Deuteronomy11:18 Yô, koso nen akaaôron am ne ken ishima yen ken uma wen kpaa; zer nen a sha uwe, a̱ lu ne ikav, shi a̱ lu ne kwagh u zeren sha icul senen hen kungwa." 
Deuteronomy11:19 Man tesen ônov ou a, ôron kwagh u a, zum u wea tema hen ya wou, man zum u wea zenden sha gbenda, man zum u wea yav inya man zum u wea moughon sha kpaa." 
Deuteronomy11:20 Nger a sha ikpande i ken ambusu a ihinda i iyou you man sha ihindagar you kpaa; 
Deuteronomy11:21 sha er á seer ne ayange man ayange a ônov enev kpaa, ken tar u TER bum a uter enev er Una na ve la, er ayange a mlu u Sha a lu tar sha nahan." 
Deuteronomy11:22 Gadia aluer ka sha gbashima man né waan atindi a m we ne ne cii iko, né eren sha mi, TER, Aôndo wen, Una doo ne ishima, né zaan sha gbenda Na cii man né var a Na yô," 
Deuteronomy11:23 nahan TER Una zenda akuraior ne cii sha ishigh yenegh kera, né ngohol tar u akuraior a a hembe ne iyenge kua agee kpaa yô." 
Deuteronomy11:24 Hanma ijiir i ikevnguhar yen ia ndyar yô, ia hingir i yen, hii hen desereti man Lebanon, man hii shin Ifi ka ifi u Uferati je la, zan zan za ar shin zegemnger u shin ityôtar, á lu tar wen cii." 
Deuteronomy11:25 Ma or nana fatyô u tilen ne sha ishi ga; TER, Aôndo wen, Una haa mcieryol wou man mciem ma á cian we sha tar u né za ndyar sha u la cii, er A kaa ne nahan." 
Deuteronomy11:26 Nenge, nyian m ver ne iveren man ifan sha ishi;" 
Deuteronomy11:27 aluer né waan atindi a TER, Aôndo wen, a m ne ne nyian ne iko yô, ka iveren;" 
Deuteronomy11:28 kpa aluer né waan atindi a TER, Aôndo wen, iko ga, né undu gbenda u m kaa ne nyian ne, né dondo mbaaôndo mbagenev mba ne fe ve ga yô, ka ifan." 
Deuteronomy11:29 Tsô, zum u TER, Aôndo wou, Una nyôr a we ken tar u u lu zan sha u za ngohol u la yô, ver iveren sha uwo u Gerishim, gema ver di ifan sha uwo u Ebal." 
Deuteronomy11:30 Kera ka yande Yordan i lu gaa? Hen gbenda u shin vegher u shin ityôtar, bargbenda u shin ityôtar, ken tar u Mbakanaan mba ve tem ken Araba sha ishigh ki Gilgar, hen ikon i terebin i More la." 
Deuteronomy11:31 Gadia né per Yordan né za ngohol tar u TER, Aôndo wen, Una na ne la, né ngohol u, né tema ker kpaa." 
Deuteronomy11:32 Ver nen ishima waan nen akaawan man akaaôron a jirigh a m ver ne sha ishi nyian ne cii iko. 
Deuteronomy12:1 Akaawan man akaaôron a jirigh a né waan a iko, né eren sha mi ken tar u TER, Aôndo u uter ou, A ne u er u̱ ngohol u la, sha ayange a né lu uma sha won cii yô, ka a ne:" 
Deuteronomy12:2 Vihi nen ajiir, a akuraior a né za zenda a la, a lu civir mbaaôndo vev ker la kera cii, ka sha ugôgômbaiwoov man sha agungu man shin itine i hanma kon u ndor;" 
Deuteronomy12:3 yôhôl nen atse a ve a nanden nagh sha mi, hembe nen mtôm ma awenem vem, nande nen Asherim ve sha usu; gber nen ieev mbi gban a gba mbi mbaaôndo vev kera; er nen iti ve i̱ hungul hen ijiir la kera." 
Deuteronomy12:4 Kpa de eren nen a TER, Aôndo wen, nahan ga."
