Deuteronomy12:5 Kpa ijiir i TER, Aôndo wen, Una tsuwa ken ikwe yen cii, sha u Una ver iti Na ker, er i̱ lu ijiir Na i teman yô, ker nen i, vaan nen her;" 
Deuteronomy12:6 ka her kpaa né vaan a iniav yenev mbi nanden man iniav yenev mbi sôngon man môm-ken-upue enev man nagh ku kenden sha ku sha uwegh enegh man uiceghzwa enev man iniav yenev mbi sha ishima i dedoo man ônovmbaiundav mba ibua you man mba iyôngo you ye. 
Deuteronomy12:7 Shi ka her né yaan kwagh sha ishigh ki TER, Aôndo wen, ne a ior enev, né ember sha hanma kwagh u ne ker ave sha mi, u TER, Aôndo wou, A ne u iveren sha mi yô." 
Deuteronomy12:8 De kera eren nen er se eren nyian ne nahan ga, er hanma or ka nan gba eren kwagh u a lu vough ken ashe a nan tsô la;" 
Deuteronomy12:9 gadia ne mba a ar hen ijiir i memen ga, man shi hen dyako, u TER, Aôndo wou, Una na u la kpaa ga." 
Deuteronomy12:10 Kpa zum u né per Yordan né tema ken tar u TER, Aôndo wen, Una na ne dyako sha u, man Una na ne mmem sha kwagh u mbaihomov enev cii mba ve kase ne la, man né tema bem bem yô," 
Deuteronomy12:11 shighe la ijiir i TER, Aôndo wen, Una tsuwa i, sha u Una ver iti Na i̱ luun ker la, ka ker né zaan a akaa a M kaa ne la cii ye: iniav yenev mbi nanden man iniav yenev mbi sôngon man môm-ken-upue enev man nagh ku kenden sha ku sha uwegh enegh, man uicighan mba uiceghzwa enev mba ne tsegh a TER yô;" 
Deuteronomy12:12 né ember sha ishigh ki TER, Aôndo wen, ne a ônov enev mba nomso man mba kasev man ikpan yen i nomso man i ukase man Orlevi u nan va nyer u a nyôr, sha ci u nan lu a kwar shin dyako a ven imôngo ga yô." 
Deuteronomy12:13 Yô, kura iyol you, de gbe nan iniav you mbi nanden hen hanma ijiir i u nenge a min tsô ga," 
Deuteronomy12:14 saa hen ijiir i TER Una tsuwa ken ma kwe wou, ka heregh ú naan iniav you mbi nanden, shi ka heregh kpaa ú eren akaa a M kaa u cii ye." 
Deuteronomy12:15 Nahan i rumun we u sôngon inyam, ú yaan er i sar u cii, sha iveren i TER, Aôndo wou, A ver u ken uya ou cii; mba ve lu wang ga kua mba ve lu wang cii, ve̱ yaan, er ka i yaan inyam i morya man ashim nahan." 
Deuteronomy12:16 Kpa awambe yô, de ye nen a ga, haa nen a inya er mngerem nahan." 
Deuteronomy12:17 I rumun er u̱ yaan môm-ken-upue u iyiagh you hen uya ou ga, shin u wain wou, shin u mkurem ou, shin ônovmbaiundav mba ibua man iyôngo you kpaa ga, man shi uiceghzwa ou mba u tsegh cii, shin iniav mbi sha ishima i dedoo, shin nagh ku kenden sha ku sha uwegh ou kpaa ga;" 
Deuteronomy12:18 kpa ka sha ishigh ki TER Aôndo wou ú yaan akaa ne ye, hen ijiir i TER, Aôndo wou, Una tsuwa yô, we, man wan wou u nomso man wan wou u kwase man kpan wou u nomso man kpan wou u kwase man Orlevi u nan va nyer u a nyôr; ember sha ishigh ki TER, Aôndo wou, sha akaa a u ker ave sha mi cii." 
Deuteronomy12:19 Kura iyol you, de nengen sha Orlevi dang ga, sha ayange a ou a u tem ken tar wou la cii." 
Deuteronomy12:20 Zum u TER, Aôndo wou, Una seer we tar wou er A tende zwa a we nahan, man ú kaa wer: Me ya inyam–gadia sar u u yan inyam; yô, gba yan ase inyam sha ishima you je tsô." 
Deuteronomy12:21 Aluer ijiir i TER, Aôndo wou, A tsough sha u veren iti Na ker la, ia gba u ca yum yô, sôngo ibua you man iyôngo you i TER, Aôndo wou, A ne u la, er m ne u zwa nahan, gba yan ase hen ya wou sha ishima you je tsô." 
Deuteronomy12:22 Yaan i er ka i ya inyam i morya man ashim nahan, mba ve lu wang ga man mba ve lu wang cii ve̱ yaan i." 
Deuteronomy12:23 Ver ishima de ye awambe la mayange ga, gadia ka awambe je a lu uma ye, de ye uma a inyam imôngo ga." 
Deuteronomy12:24 De ye a ga, haa a inya er mngerem nahan." 
Deuteronomy12:25 De ye a ga; sha er á kpe u iyol we a ônov ou mba ken ijime you, aluer ú er kwagh u a lu vough sha ashe a TER yô." 
Deuteronomy12:26 Kpa uicighanmbaakaav ou mba u lu a mi man uiceghzwa ou yô, tôô ve za a mi hen ijiir i TER Una tsuwa la." 
Deuteronomy12:27 Va a iniav you mbi nanden, inyam man awambe la, va penda sha atse a nanden nagh sha mi a TER, Aôndo wou; awambe a iniav you mbi sôngon yô, i̱ gema a, i̱ haa sha atse a nanden nagh sha mi a TER, Aôndo wou, kpa inyam la yô, ya." 
Deuteronomy12:28 Ver ishima ungwa akaaôron a m kaa u ne cii, sha er á kpe u iyol a ônov ou mba ken ijime you cii, gbem sha won, aluer ú er kwagh u doon man u vough sha ashe a TER, Aôndo wou, yô." 
Deuteronomy12:29 Zum u TER, Aôndo wou Una tim akuraior sha ishigh you kera, a u ze wer ú za zenda a la, man zum u ú zenda a, ú tema ken tar u a yô," 
Deuteronomy12:30 kura iyol you, kwaghhônon a̱ de ker u sha u dondon ve ga, zum u á tim ve sha ishigh you kera la, man de timen nen sha kwagh u mbaaôndo vev sha u pinen er: Akuraior ne nga dondon mbaaôndo vev nana sha u mo kpaa ma m er nahan ga." 
Deuteronomy12:31 De eren a TER, Aôndo wou, nahan ga; gadia hanma kwagh u a lu TER kwaghhôngorough a vihi Un yô, ve er mbaaôndo vev; gadia ônov vev mba nomso man mba kasev je kpaa, ka ve nande ve sha usu sha ci u mbaaôndo vev." 
Deuteronomy12:32 Hanma kwagh u m kaa ne cii, ka un ver nen ishima sha mi, eren nen ye; de seer nen ma kwaghgen sha mi ga, shi de panden kwagh ker kpaa ga." 
Deuteronomy13:1 Aluer ma profeti una mough her a we, shin or u mnyam ma cien nan, una tese u ma ivande shin kwagh u kpilighyol," 
Deuteronomy13:2 man ivande la shin kwagh u kpilighyol la á va er sha mi vough, sha kwaghôron u a vande ôron we sha mi er: Sé dondo nen mbaaôndo mbagenev mba u fe ve ga, sé civir nen ve," 
Deuteronomy13:3 yô, de veren ato sha akaaôron a profeti la, shin or u mnyam ma cie nan la ga; gadia TER, Aôndo wen, ngu karen ne a kar sha er Una fa shin TER, Aôndo wen, doo ne ishima a ishima yen cii man a uma wen cii kpaou." 
Deuteronomy13:4 Dondo nen TER, Aôndo wen, cian nen Un, waan nen atindi Na iko, ungwa nen imo Na, civir nen Un, Var nen a Na." 
Deuteronomy13:5 Profeti shon la, shin or u mnyam ma cie nan la, i̱ wua nan sha ci u nan tese er i̱ hendan kwagh a TER, Aôndo wen, u A dugh a ven ken tar u Igipiti A paa u hen ya u ikpan la yô; sar nan ka urugh we sha gbenda u TER, Aôndo wou, A kaa u er u̱ za sha mi la kera. Kape ú er man ú dugh ifer ken a we kera ne." 
Deuteronomy13:6 Aluer anngôu u ngô môm, shin wan wou, shin wan wou u kwase, shin kwase wou u ishima ishima, shin huror wou u a lu er ka uma wou nahan je, una mee u myer, er: Sé za civir nen mbaaôndo mbagenev, mba u fe ve ga, uter ou kpaa ve fe ve ga yô," 
Deuteronomy13:7 ka mbaaôndo mba akuraior a a kase ne a a lu ikua ikua a we, shin a a gbe ca a we kpaa, hii hen ikighirtar ingin zan zan za ar ikighirtar igen je," 
Deuteronomy13:8 de rumun kwagh la a na ga, shi de ongo imo na kpaa ga; a̱ de ker u mhôônom ashe ga, de zungu un mhôônom ga, de yeren kwagh na la ga," 
Deuteronomy13:9 kpa wua un kpee; uwegh ough ku̱ vande lun sha a na sha u wuan un man ave a ior mbagenev cii aa mase ye. 
Deuteronomy13:10 Ta un awen, a̱ kpe, sha ci u a nenge u urugh we er, u̱ undu TER, Aôndo wou, u A dugh a we ken tar u Igipiti ken ya u ikpan la yô." 
Deuteronomy13:11 Nahan Iserael cii vea ungwa, vea cia, mayange vea kera seer eren ma injaifer er ingin nahan ken a we ga." 
Deuteronomy13:12 Aluer u ungwa mba ôron kwagh ken ma gar wen u Aôndo wou Una na u sha u ú za tema ker la, mba kaan er:" 
Deuteronomy13:13 Agbilinaior agen due ken a we je ve urugh mba ken gar ve, mba kaan er; Sé za nen, sé za dondo nen mbaaôndo mbagenev mba ne fe ve ga yô," 
Deuteronomy13:14 yô, time kwagh la, tôv, pine dedoo, aluer kwagh la una lu nahan mimi keng je, er i er kwagh u ihôngorough ne ken a we yô," 
Deuteronomy13:15 tim mba ve tem ken gar la sha zwa u sanker, ú tim un purututu a akaa a a lu kimi cii, kua uzendenya mba ker kpaa, sha zwa u sanker." 
Deuteronomy13:16 Kohol ishar i ker cii, haa hen atô u tembe na, nande gar la sha usu kua ishar na jimin cii, sha ci u TER, Aôndo wou, a̱ hingir tihialôgh gbem sha won, i̱ de kera shi maan un mayange ga." 
Deuteronomy13:17 Ma kwagh u i tswer un, de saan a mi ga, sha er TER A̱ de iyugh Na i tsung la, A̱ zungwe u mhôônom, mhôônom ma kôr Un a we, A̱ seer we iyenge er A̱ bum a uter ou nahan," 
Deuteronomy13:18 aluer u ver ato sha imo i TER, Aôndo wou, ú waan atindi a Na iko cii, a m we u nyian ne, sha er ú er kwagh u a lu vough sha ashe a TER, Aôndo wou yô." 
Deuteronomy14:1 Ne mba ônov mba TER, Aôndo wen, je; nahan yô, de gberen nen avav iyol ga, shi de torough nen ityough hen icul sha ci u or u nan kpe ga." 
Deuteronomy14:2 Gadia u ngu TER, Aôndo Wou, icighanikurior je; ken akuraior sha won cii, ka we, TER A tsough u, u hingir ikurior Na jim ye." 
Deuteronomy14:3 De ye ma kwagh u ihôngorough ga. 
Deuteronomy14:4 Ishôso i né yaan yô, ka i ne: bua man iyôngo kua ivo," 
Deuteronomy14:5 ashim man morya man ikpam man ivambe man ishuhu man kpo man makpe. 
Deuteronomy14:6 Man hanma swase u u pav apande ahar, a pav dedoo man a kengese kwaghyan yô, ka i né yaan je la." 
Deuteronomy14:7 Nahan igen i i kengese kwaghyan man i pav apande i né yaan i ga yô, ka rakumi man alôm man ikuwa, gadia ve mba kengese kpa ve pav apande ga, nahan ve̱ lu ne kwagh u a lu wang ga yô;" 
Deuteronomy14:8 igo kpaa, gadia i pav apande kpa i kengese kwaghyan ga, nahan i kpaa i̱ lu ne kwagh u a lu wang ga yô, de ye nen inyam i i ga, gundu u i tsô kpaa, de benden nen a min ga." 
Deuteronomy14:9 Akaa a shin mnger a né yaan di yô, ka a ne: Hanma kwagh u a lu a atsaase man avuu yô, ka ve né yaan ye;" 
Deuteronomy14:10 man hanma kwagh u a lu a atsaase man avuu ga yô, de ye nen ga, a̱ lu ne kwagh u a lu wang ga yô." 
Deuteronomy14:11 Inyon i wang cii yô, i rumun er né ya." 
Deuteronomy14:12 Kpa i né yaan ga yô, ka i ne: iguve man gafa man iwua;" 
Deuteronomy14:13 man azembe man ajanta, anza la cii;" 
Deuteronomy14:14 man hanma inja gugôô, anza la cii;" 
Deuteronomy14:15 man konkofi man kpire man shimiu man kunkure, anza la cii;" 
Deuteronomy14:16 man kaaki man ivungu man akiki; 
Deuteronomy14:17 man akumedu man apu man ayaicambev; 
Deuteronomy14:18 man ôô—ôô man ipevnor, anza la cii; man inyonalôm man inima." 
Deuteronomy14:19 Ankaam ma ma lu a ingur cii, ma̱ lu ne kwagh u a lu u wang ga yô, de ye nen ma ga." 
Deuteronomy14:20 Inyon i wang cii yô, i rumun er né ya." 
Deuteronomy14:21 De ye nen ma kwagh u a gbe kpen tsô la ga; kpa i rumun er u̱ na shiror u nan va nyer u a nyôr la, nana̱ ya; gayô, tee, or u ken nongo ugen nana̱ yam, gadia u ngu TER, Aôndo wou, icighanikurior je. De jiir wanivo sha atumba a ngô na ga." 
Deuteronomy14:22 Dughun môm-ken-upue u iyiav youv mbi u zough a mi ken sule wou anyom anyom la. 
Deuteronomy14:23 Ijiir i TER, Aôndo wou, Una tsuwa sha u veren iti Na i̱ luun ker yô, ka hen i, ú yaan môm-ken-upue u iyiav you sha ishigh ki TER, Aôndo wou ye, kua u wain wou man u mkurem ou man ônovmbaiundav mba ibua you man iyôngo you kpaa, sha er ú hen u cian TER, Aôndo wou, gbem yô." 
Deuteronomy14:24 Man aluer ijiir la ia gba u ca yum, wea fatyô u zan a mi her ga yô, sha ci u ijiir i TER, Aôndo wou, Una tsuwa sha u veren iti Na ker, i gbe u ca yum yô, zum u TER, Aôndo wou, Una ver u dedoo la," 
Deuteronomy14:25 nahan gema akaa la tee, yam inyaregh a mi, kange inyaregh kila kôr sha uwe, za hen ijiir i TER, Aôndo wou, Una tsuwa la," 
Deuteronomy14:26 gema inyaregh kila yam hanma kwagh u a sar u cii a mi, shin a lu ibua, shin a lu iyôngo, shin a lu wain, shin a lu kwaghman u taver, shin nyityô kwagh i i sar u kpaa; ya heregh sha ishigh ki TER, Aôndo wou, ember, we a ior ou." 
Deuteronomy14:27 Orlevi u nan nyer u a nyôr kpaa, de nengen sha nan dang ga, gadia nan ngu a kwar shin dyako a we imôngo ga." 
Deuteronomy14:28 Sha mbee u hanma anyom atar yô, dugh môm-ken-upue u iyiav mbi u zough a mi ken inyom la cii, va ver hen ihindagar you;" 
Deuteronomy14:29 Orlevi (sha er nan lu a kwar shin dyako a we imôngo ga yô) man shiror man ancôghol man kwasecôghol mba ve nyer u a nyôr yô, ve̱ va ya, i̱ kuma ve; sha er TER, Aôndo wou A̱ ver u dedoo ken tom u u eren sha ave ou cii yô." 
Deuteronomy15:1 Sha mbee u hanma anyom ataankarahar yô, de injô." 
Deuteronomy15:2 Mde u ú de injô la, ka nahan: Or u nan injô, nana̱ de injô i nan ne u a we ndor a nan la; nana̱ de cirin or u a we ndor a nan man nan lu anngô u nan kpaa yô, injô ga; gadia i yôô mde u injô u TER." 
Deuteronomy15:3 Kpa or u nongo ugen yô, i rumun er ú cir nan injô, kpa hanma kwagh wou u a lu hen anngôu yô, de a̱ saa." 
Deuteronomy15:4 Icanor nana̱ de lu hen we ga, gadia TER Una ver u dedoo ken tar u TER, Aôndo wou, Una na u dyako er ú ngohol u la," 
Deuteronomy15:5 aluer u ver ato dedoo sha imo i TER, Aôndo wou, ú waan atindi a m we u nyian ne cii iko yô." 
Deuteronomy15:6 Gadia TER, Aôndo wou, Una ver u doo doo er A tôndo zwa a we nahan, ú pwar akuraior kpishi akaa, kpa we yô, u pwar kwagh ga; ú ya tor sha akuraior kpishi, kpa we yô, vea ya tor sha a we ga." 
Deuteronomy15:7 Aluer ma icanor á lu hen a we, á lu mô anngôu, ken ma gar ken tar wou u TER, Aôndo wou, A lu nan we la, yô, de cighir ishima you ga, de kusun uwegh ough a anngôu u a gbe ican la ga;" 
Deuteronomy15:8 kpa bugh uwegh ough kpee je, pwar un kwagh a̱ kuma sha kwagh u a gbe un la;" 
Deuteronomy15:9 kura iyol you, mhen u dang, a̱ de lu ken ishima you, er ú kaa wer; inyom i sha utaankaruhar, inyom i den injô la mgbôghom ve, ga, man ú gba kenger anngôu u a gbe ican la dang, ú nyume un kwagh man una gema á vaa ieren you la a TER; nahan yô, hingir isholibo je u er ye." 
Deuteronomy15:10 Na un kpee, i̱ de vihin we, shighe u u lu nan un la kpaa ga, gadia ka sha ci u kwagh ne je man TER, Aôndo wou, Una ver u dedoo sha tom wou cii man sha hanma kwagh u u ker ave sha mi kpaa ye." 
Deuteronomy15:11 Gadia mayange mbaatsanev vea bee sha tar ga, ka nahan man m kaa Mer, bugh uwegh ough, wase anngôu man or u kwagh a gbe nan man icanor ken tar wou ye." 
Deuteronomy15:12 Aluer anngôu or u Heberu shin kwase u Heberu nana tee iyol i nan wea yam yô, nana̱ er u tom u kpan anyom a taratar, inyom i sha utaankaruhar la pase nan, nana̱ due hen we, nana̱ yem." 
Deuteronomy15:13 Kpa aluer ú pase nan wer nana̱ due hen awe yô, de deen, nana̱ yemen ave gbilin ga;" 
Deuteronomy15:14 wa nan ikav dedoo, pande ilev you man kwagh u sha vande wou u gbidyen alakema sha mi la, man sha ihungwa you i shoghol wain shimi, na nan sha mver u TER, Aôndo wou, A ver u yô." 
Deuteronomy15:15 Umbur er ngise u lu kpan ken tar u Igipiti man TER, Aôndo wou, paa u yô; ka nahan man M kaan we kwagh ne nyian ye." 
Deuteronomy15:16 Man aluer nana kaa a we er: Me due hen we ga, sha ci u u doo nan ishima kua ya wou kpaa, man sha ci u mtem u nan tem a we la doo nan yô," 
Deuteronomy15:17 tôô suagh pev nan togh i̱ kôr ken hunda, nahan una lu kpan wou gbem. Kape ú er a kpan wou u kwase kpaa la." 
Deuteronomy15:18 I̱ de vihin we u pasen nan nana̱ yem ga, gadia tom u nan er u anyom ataratar la, kuma injar i ortom u sha tôndo kwa har; TER, Aôndo wou, Una ver u doo doo sha hanma kwagh u u eren yô." 
Deuteronomy15:19 Ônovmbaiundav mba ibua you man iyôngo you i mar cii, mba ve lu anom yô, tsegha TER, Aôndo wou, ve; de eren tom a gumbua u iunda wou ga, man de tende aive a gumiyôngo u iunda wou kpaa ga." 
Deuteronomy15:20 We man ior ou, yaan nen ve sha ishigh ki TER, Aôndo wou, anyom anyom hen ijiir i TER, Aôndo wou, Una tsuwa la." 
Deuteronomy15:21 Man aluer una lu a ma ihogholough yô, de ne TER, Aôndo wou, nagh sha mi ga." 
Deuteronomy15:22 Ka ken uya ou ú yaan un ye; mba ve lu wang ga kua mba ve lu wang cii, ve̱ gba yan tsô, er ka i yaan inyam i ashim man morya nahan;" 
Deuteronomy15:23 saa awambe na tsô, de ye a ga, haa a inya er mngerem nahan." 
Deuteronomy16:1 Wa uwer u Abiba iko, er TER, Aôndo wou, Paseka; gadia ka ken uwer u Abiba TER, Aôndo wou, due a we ken Igipiti tugh ye." 
Deuteronomy16:2 Naan TER, Aôndo wou, nagh ku Paseka sha iyôngo man ibua hen ijiir i TER, Aôndo wou, Una tsuwa sha u veren iti Na ker la." 
Deuteronomy16:3 De kera ye bredi u i we kwa sha mi a na imôngo ga; ayange ataankarahar la cii, yaan bredi u i we kwa sha mi ga yô, a na imôngo, ka bredi u ican je la; gadia iyange u due ken tar u Igipiti fele fe fele; sha er u̱ umbur iyange i u due ken tar u Igipiti la sha ayange a uma wou cii yô." 
Deuteronomy16:4 Ayange ataankarahar la cii, i̱ de nengen a kwa ken tar wou je ga; ma ivurugh ki inyam i u ne nagh mi aikighe sha iyange i hiihii la ki̱ de luun her zan zan sev mbu aven ga." 
Deuteronomy16:5 I rumun er u̱ na nagh ku Paseka ken ma gar u TER, Aôndo wou, A lu nan we la ga," 
Deuteronomy16:6 saa hen ijiir i TER, Aôndo wou, Una tsuwa sha u Una ver iti Na i̱ lu ker la; ka her man ú na nagh ku Paseka aikighe, sha mmir u iyange, sha shighe u u due ken Igipiti la vough." 
Deuteronomy16:7 Ú jiir un, ú ya hen ijiir i TER, Aôndo wou, Una tsuwa la; kper nan yô, ú gema ú hide hen utenti ou." 
Deuteronomy16:8 Ayange ataratar cii, yaan bredi u i we kwagh sha mi ga yô; sha iyange i ataankarahar la, ú er icighanmkohol u TER Aôndo wou; iyange la de eren ma tom ga." 
Deuteronomy16:9 Ôr iyenge i ulahadi, ve̱ kuma utaankaruhar; hii sha shighe u nyôron a loji u sundan iyiagh you la je, ú ôr ulahadi utaankaruhar ye." 
Deuteronomy16:10 Er TER, Aôndo wou, iniongo i ulahadi sha nagh ku sha ishima i dedoo ku sha uwegh ough ku ú na sha iveren i TER, Aôndo wou, A ver u yô;" 
Deuteronomy16:11 ember sha ishigh ki TER, Aôndo wou, we man wan wou u nomso man wan wou u kwase man kpan wou u nomso man kpan wou u kwase man Orlevi u nan nyer u a nyôr, man shiror man ancôghol kua kwasecôghol mba ve lu a we, hen ijiir i TER, Aôndo wou, Una tsuwa sha u Una ver iti Na i̱ lu ker la." 
Deuteronomy16:12 Umbur er ngise u lu kpan ken Igipiti yô, waan akaawan ne cii iko eren sha a kpaa." 
Deuteronomy16:13 Er iniongo i atumbe ayange ataankarahar zum u ú bee u kohol akaa sha vande wou u gbidyen alakema man sha ihungwa you i shoghol wain la. 
Deuteronomy16:14 Ember sha iniongo you, we man wan wou u nomso man wan wou u kwase man kpan wou u nomso man kpan wou u kwase man Orlevi man shiror man ancôghol kua kwasecôghol mba ve nyer u a nyôr yô." 
Deuteronomy16:15 Ayange ataankarahar er TER, Aôndo wou, iniongo hen ijiir i TER Una tsuwa, gadia TER, Aôndo wou, Una ver u doo doo sha mtser wou cii man sha tom u sha ave ou cii, ú mgbough a iember dedoo." 
Deuteronomy16:16 Ken inyom i môm, nomsombaiorov ou cii ve̱ va sha ishigh ki TER, Aôndo wou, kwa tar, hen ijiir i Una tsuwa la; ka sha iniongo i bredi u i we kwa sha mi ga yô, man sha iniongo i ulahadi, man sha iniongo i atumbe; ve̱ de ve sha ishigh ki TER ave gbilin ga;" 
Deuteronomy16:17 hanma or nana̱ va na er nan fetyô yô, sha iveren i TER, Aôndo wou, A ver u yô." 
Deuteronomy16:18 Ver mbaajiriv man mbavesen ken agar a ou cii, a TER, Aôndo wou, Una na u, sha ikwe you yô; ve̱ ôron ior ijir sha mimi." 
Deuteronomy16:19 De geman ijir ga; shi de hembe wan orgen iko a orgen ga, man shi de ngohol iwua ga; gadia iwua i cirin mbafankwagh ashe, shi i gem akaaôron a mba ve lu a ibo ga la." 
Deuteronomy16:20 Ka mimi tseegh ú keren ye, sha er ú lu uma, ú ya dyako u tar u TER, Aôndo wou, Una na u yô." 
Deuteronomy16:21 De timin ityôgh ki hanma injakon er ka Ashera hen atse a nan nagh sha mi a TER, Aôndo wou, a u te a la ga." 
Deuteronomy16:22 Man shi de timin ma ityôgh ki iwenegh ga, kwagh u a vihi TER, Aôndo wou, la." 
Deuteronomy17:1 De ne TER, Aôndo wou, nagh sha bua shin iyôngo, kwagh u a lu a ihogholough iyol, shin u a lu a ma kwagh iyol u vihin kpaa ga, gadia nahan ka TER, Aôndo wou, kwagh u ihôngorough je." 
Deuteronomy17:2 Aluer á kohol or u ken a we, ken hanma gar wou u TER, Aôndo wou, Una na u la, a lu nomsoor shin kwase nana lu eren ma iferkwagh sha ishigh ki TER, Aôndo wou, nana vihi ikuryan Na," 
Deuteronomy17:3 nana za civir mbaaôndo mbagenev, nana gure ú civir ve, a lu iyange shin uwer, shin hanma kwagh u a lu ken ikum i Sha, u Mo M ne zwa ga," 
Deuteronomy17:4 man i kaa u, u ungwa kwagh la yô, tôv sha min kpiligh kpiligh, aluer kwagh la una lu nahan mimi keng je, er i er kwagh u ihôngorough ken Iserael yô," 
Deuteronomy17:5 due a or la, shin kwase la, u nan er ifer la, hen ihindagar you, or la shin kwase la, ta ve awen ve̱ kpe." 
Deuteronomy17:6 Ka sha zwa u mbashiada uhar shin utar man á wua or u i er nan ijiir i kuugh la ye; sha zwa u shiada môm yô, i̱ de woo nan ga." 
Deuteronomy17:7 Uwegh ku mbashiada la kua vande lun sha a nan sha u wuan man ave a ior mbagenev cii aa mase ye. Kape ú er man ú dugh ifer ken we kera ne. 
Deuteronomy17:8 Aluer ma kwagh una hemba u u ôron ijiir na yô, á lu kwagh u iwooor, shin kwagh u kpelan, shin ivav i gberen, ayôôso a hen agar a ou la, nahan mough za hen ijiir i TER Aôndo wou Una tsuwa la," 
Deuteronomy17:9 za hen Mbalevi mba ve lu upristi yô, man hen orjir u a tem ijir hen ayange la, za pine, nahan vea tese u mkur u ú kure ijir la yô." 
Deuteronomy17:10 Er sha zwa u ve kur ijir, ve kaa u, hen ijiir i TER Una tsuwa la vough; ver ishima, er sha akaa a ve tese u la cii," 
Deuteronomy17:11 ka sha tindi u vea tese u man sha mkur u ijirigh u vea tese u la, de kahan ken uwegh ku yanegh shin ku imesegh ga." 
Deuteronomy17:12 Or u nana eren kwagh sha icihi nana vendan u ungwan imo i pristi u nan lu her nan eren tom sha ishigh ki TER, Aôndo wou la, shin nana vendan imo i orjir yô, or la nana̱ kpe; kape ú er man ú dugh ifer ken Iserael kera ne." 
Deuteronomy17:13 Nahan ior cii vea ungwa, vea cia, vea kera seer cihin kwagh ga." 
Deuteronomy17:14 Zum u ú nyôr ken tar u TER, Aôndo wou, Una na u la, ú ngohol u, ú tema ker, man ú kaa wer: Me ver tor a̱ lu tor sha a mo, er akuraior a a kasem ne cii a eren nahan;" 
Deuteronomy17:15 yô, ka or u TER, Aôndo wou, Una tsuwa nan la, ka nan ú ver ye; i̱ lu or u ken anngôôv ou ú kôr nan tor nana tema tor sha a we ye; de veren or u ken nongo ugen u nan lu anngôu ga, wer nana̱ lu tor wou ga." 
Deuteronomy17:16 Nana̱ de seer a seer anyinya kpishi sha ci u nan ga, shi nana̱ de hidi a ior ken Igipiti sha u nana̱ seer anyinya ga; gadia TER vande kaan ne je er: Mayange de kera shi hidi nen sha gbenda la ga." 
Deuteronomy17:17 Man shi nana̱ de seer a seer kasev kpishi ga, sha er ishima i nan i̱ de danen ga yô; shi nana̱ de kohol azurfa man zenaria kpishi sha ci u nan ga." 
Deuteronomy17:18 Tsô zum u nana teman sha ikônough nagh ki torough yô, nana̱ nger tindi ne ken ruamabera, vough er a lu sha ishigh ki Mbalevi mba ve lu upristi la nahan;" 
Deuteronomy17:19 nana̱ lu a mi, nana̱ ôron ker sha ayange a uma u nan cii; sha u nana̱ hen u cian TER, Aôndo u nan, man u wan akaaôron a tindi ne cii kua akaawan ne iko, nana̱ eren sha mi;" 
Deuteronomy17:20 sha er nana̱ de gbanger sha anmgbianev mba nan nana̱ undu tindi ne nana̱ kaha ken uwegh ku yanegh shin ku imesegh ga, sha er á seer nan ayange ken tartor u nan a ônov mba nan ken Iserael yô." 
Deuteronomy18:1 Mbalevi mba ve lu upristi, kwe u Levi la cii, mba a kwar shin dyako a Mbaiserael imôngo ga; vea yaan iniav mbi usuv mbi TER kua dyako Na." 
Deuteronomy18:2 Una zua a ma dyako ken anmgbianev nav ga; ka TER A lu dyako na ye, er A kaa un nahan." 
Deuteronomy18:3 Kwar u upristi vea zua a mi hen ior mba ve ne nagh sha bua shin sha iyôngo yô, ka u né naan pristi kpaakpawe man ahenge ahar kua ihir." 
Deuteronomy18:4 Iyiav mbi tsutswav you, alakema wou man wain wou man mkurem ou man aive a tôndon a hiihii a iyôngo you, ú na un." 
Deuteronomy18:5 Gadia TER, Aôndo wou, tsuwa un ken ikwe you cii, sha u a̱ tile a̱ eren tom ken iti i TER, un a ônov nav gbem sha won." 
Deuteronomy18:6 Aluer ma Orlevi nana due ken ma gar u ken Iserael cii, u nan lu shir ker la, nana va a ishima i nan cii, hen ijiir i TER Una tsuwa la yô," 
Deuteronomy18:7 nahan nana er tom ken iti i TER, Aôndo u nan, er anmgbianev mba nan Mbalevi cii, mba ve til sha ishigh ki TER nahan;" 
Deuteronomy18:8 kwar u kwaghyan u vea yaan yô, ua lu môm, á wa kwagh u nan zough a mi sha dyako u nan u nan tee la ker ga." 
Deuteronomy18:9 Zum u ú nyôr ken tar u TER, Aôndo wou, Una na u la yô, de henen u eren aeren a ihôngorough a akuraior la ga." 
Deuteronomy18:10 Or u nan er wan u nan u nomso shin u kwase a kar ken usu, i̱ de zough a nan ken a we ga, shin or u kpehen ishor, shin or u eren ahir, shin or u pasen uivande, shin or u lamen ishor," 
Deuteronomy18:11 shin or u yangen akombo, shin or u nan pin jijingi u orkpen kwagh, shin nan pin jijingi u tsengan pasen akaa kwagh, shin or u lamen a mbakpenev." 
Deuteronomy18:12 Gadia hanma or u nan eren akaa angan cii, nan ngu TER kwagh u ihôngorough je; ka sha ci u akaa a ihôngorough ne man TER, Aôndo wou, A lu zendan ve sha ishigh you kera ye." 
Deuteronomy18:13 Lu vough sha ishigh ki TER, Aôndo wou." 
Deuteronomy18:14 Gadia akuraior a ú zenda a la, nga veren ishima sha mbaahiriv man mbaasorov, kpa we yô, TER Aôndo rumun er ú er nahan ga." 
Deuteronomy18:15 TER, Aôndo wou, Una ver u Profeti, Una due hen atô wou ken anmgbianev ou je, er mo nahan, ka Un né ver ato sha a Na ye." 
Deuteronomy18:16 Ka vough er u sôn TER, Aôndo wou, hen Horebi sha iyange i mkohol la, u lu kaan wer: M̱ de kera ungwan imo i TER, Aôndo wam, ga, man m̱ de kera seer nengen zegeusu ne kpaa ga, sha er me kpe ga yô." 
Deuteronomy18:17 Nahan TER kaa a mo er: Kwagh u ve kaa la, ve kaa vough." 
Deuteronomy18:18 Me ver ve Profeti, Una due ken anmgbianev vev, er we nahan; Me na akaaôron Am ken zwa Na, Una ôr ve akaa cii a Me kaa Un yô." 
Deuteronomy18:19 Nahan hanma or u nana ver ato sha akaaôron Am a Una kaa ken iti Yam ga yô, Mo Me pine nan kwagh la." 
Deuteronomy18:20 Kpa profeti u nana cihi nana ôr kwagh ken iti Yam, u M kaa a nan Mer nana̱ ôr ga, shin nana ôr kwagh ken iti i mbaaôndo mbagenev yô, profeti la nana̱ kpe." 
Deuteronomy18:21 Kpa aluer u kaa ken ishima you wer, á er nan man sé fa kwagh u i lu TER A kaa un ga laa?" 
Deuteronomy18:22 Yô, zum u ma profeti nana ôr kwagh ken iti i TER man kwagh la una er nahan ga, man una lu nahan kpaa ga yô, kwagh la, TER kaa un ga; profeti la gba ôron un sha icihi tsô; yô, de cie nan ga." 
Deuteronomy19:1 Zum u TER, Aôndo wou, Una tim akuraior, a TER, Aôndo wou, Una na u tar u a, man á zenda a kera, ú tema ken agar a ve man ken uya vev yô," 
Deuteronomy19:2 tsegha agar atar ken atô u tar wou, u TER, Aôndo wou, A lu nan we er ú ngohol u la." 
Deuteronomy19:3 Sôr igbenda; pav tar, u TER, Aôndo wou, Una na u er ú ngohol u la, uipaven utar, sha u hanma or u nan woo or yô, nana yevese nana za nyôr ker." 
Deuteronomy19:4 Kwagh u or u nan woo or man nana yevese nana za ker sha u nana war yô, ka un ne: U nan woo anngô u nan abu man nana vande kôron nan ihom kera kpaa ga;" 
Deuteronomy19:5 er or u nan ze shin ikô a anngô u nan sha u za gberen ikon nahan, nana kende ijembe sha u gberen kon man gbengerjembe la ua tsuwa ken hondo, ua tume anngô u nan la, nana kpe yô, ka nan nana̱ yevese nana̱ za hen u môm u ken agar la, nana war;" 
Deuteronomy19:6 sha er or u oron iyev sha awambe nana̱ de zende or u nan woo or la, zum u ishima i kende nan la, nana̱ za kohol nan sha ci u gbenda u lihi, nana̱ wua nan ga; gadia nan er kwagh u kuman ku ga, sha ci u nan vande kôron ngula ihom ga yô." 
Deuteronomy19:7 Ka nahan man m kaa u mer: Tsegha agar atar. 
Deuteronomy19:8 Aluer TER, Aôndo wou, Una seer we tar er A bum a uter ou, man Una na u tar u A tende zwa a uter ou er Una na ve u la cii—" 
Deuteronomy19:9 aluer ú waan atindi a m we u nyian ne cii iko sha u eren sha mi er TER, Aôndo wou, Una doo u ishima man ú zaan sha igbenda Na gbem yô nahan shi seer agar agen atar sha a atar la;" 
Deuteronomy19:10 sha er i̱ de hee awambe a orishôôgh ken tar u TER, Aôndo wou, Una na u dyako la, man ibo i awambe la i̱ hide sha a we ga." 
Deuteronomy19:11 Kpa aluer ma or nana kôr anngô u nan ihom, nana za kegh nan myer, nana mough nana gber nan ivav i bo je nana kpe, man nana yevese nana za nyôr ken gar môm u ken agar la yô," 
Deuteronomy19:12 nahan mbavesen mba hen gar u nan la, ve̱ tindi i̱ za hide a nan ker, vea gema nan vea na nan sha ikev i or u oron iyev i awambe la, sha er nana̱ kpe yô." 
Deuteronomy19:13 Ishe you i̱ de zungu nan mhôônom ga, kpa dugh ibo i̱ awambe a orishôôgh hen Iserael kera, sha er á kpe u iyol yô." 
Deuteronomy19:14 De kper a ikav i ipaventar i anngô u, i ior mba ngise tim la ga, ken dyako wou u ú zua a mi ken tar u TER, Aôndo wou A lu nan we er ú ngohol u la." 
Deuteronomy19:15 Orshiada môm tseegh nana̱ de eren shiada sha or nana̱ pase hanma injaifer i nan, shin hanma injaisholibo i nan, á lu nyityô isholibo i or la nana er kpaa ga; ka sha zwa u mbashiada uhar shin sha zwa u mbashiada utar man kwagh una kure ye." 
Deuteronomy19:16 Aluer ma orshiada u aperagh nana er shiada sha ma or, nana pase er nan er kwaghbo yô," 
Deuteronomy19:17 ve mba uhar mba anyiman a lu her atô ve la, ve̱ za tile sha ishigh ki TER sha ishigh ki upristi man mbaajiriv mba ve tem ijir hen ayange la;" 
Deuteronomy19:18 mbaajiriv mbala ve̱ time dedoo; aluer orshiada la nana er shiada u mimin ga, nana wa anngô u nan aie iyol yô," 
Deuteronomy19:19 er nen a nan er i sar nan ka i̱ er a anngô u nan la nahan, kape ú er man ú dugh ifer ken a we kera ne." 
Deuteronomy19:20 Mbagenev mbala kpaa vea ungwa vea cia, nahan mayange vea kera seer eren injaifer ne ken a we ga." 
Deuteronomy19:21 Ishe you i̱ de zungu mhôônom ga; uma sha uma, ishe sha ishe, inyigh sha inyi, uwegh sha uwe, nguhar sha nguhar." 
Deuteronomy20:1 Zum u ú za ityav mbi nôngon a mbaihomov ou, man ú nenge anyinya man akeke a nyinya kua ior mba ve hembe u iyenge kpaa, de cie ve ga; gadia TER, Aôndo wou, u A dugh a we ken tar u Igipiti la, ngu a we imôngo." 
Deuteronomy20:2 Tsô, shighe u né za mgbôghom hen ijiir i utya yô, pristi a̱ kporom a̱ ôr kwagh a ior," 
Deuteronomy20:3 a̱ kaa a ve er: Ungwa nen, ne Iserael, nyian ne va sha u nôngon ityav a mbaihomov enev; ishima i̱ de yen ne ga, de cie nen ga, de gbidyen nen ikarikase iyol ga, shi de cie nen sulugha sha ci ve ga;" 
Deuteronomy20:4 gadia TER, Aôndo wou, ngu zan a ven imôngo sha u nôngon ityav sha ci wen a mbaihomov enev, sha u Una na ne né hemba ve." 
Deuteronomy20:5 Mbavesen kpaa ve̱ ôr kwagh a ior, ve̱ kaa er: Shin ma or ngu u nan maa iyou i he, nan lu a nyôr ker ga ase? Yô, nana̱ hide hen iyou i nan, sha er nana̱ de za kpeen ken utya, orgen nana̱ nyôr ker ga yô." 
Deuteronomy20:6 Shin ma or ngu u nan môôr ikon i wain, nan lu a ya atam a i ga ase? Yô, nana̱ hide hen ya u nan, sha er nana̱ de za kpeen ken utya, orgen nana̱ ya atam a i ga yô." 
Deuteronomy20:7 Shin ma or ngu u nan sôôr kwase nan lu a er un ga ase? Yô, nana̱ hide hen ya u nan, sha er nana̱ de za kpeen ken utya, orgen nana̱ er un ga yô." 
Deuteronomy20:8 Mbavesen mbala kpaa shi ve̱ seer ôron kwagh a ior, ve̱ kaa er: Shin ma or ngu u nan lu a mciem, nan lu a ishima i yinan ase? Yô, nana̱ hide hen ya u nan, sha er ishima i anngôôv mba nan i̱ de yen er i nan nahan ga." 
Deuteronomy20:9 Tsô zum u mbavesen mbala vea kuren kwaghôron a ior yô, i̱ ver ukurmbautyav sha ior." 
Deuteronomy20:10 Zum u ú mgbôghom a ma gar sha u nôngon ityav a na yô, ôr kwagh a na sha gbenda u bem." 
Deuteronomy20:11 Tsô aluer una rumun bem, una bugh u yô, nahan ior mba á kohol ve ker la cii vea hingir sha ikev you, vea eren we tom." 
Deuteronomy20:12 Aluer una venda bem a we, á sar un ka nôngon ityav a we yô, kase un sha afo a utya," 
Deuteronomy20:13 man zum u TER, Aôndo wou, Una na u un sha ikev yô, wua hanma nomsoor u nan lu ker sha zwa u sanker;" 
Deuteronomy20:14 kpa kasev kua mbayev mba kiriki man uzendenya kua akaa a a lu ken gar la cii, ishar i utya la cii, ngohol sha ci wou; ya ishar i mbaihomov ou i TER, Aôndo wou, A ne u yô." 
Deuteronomy20:15 Kape ú er a agar a a lu a we ca, cii je la, ka agar a a lu a akuraior angan ga yô." 
Deuteronomy20:16 Kpa agar a akuraior angan a TER, Aôndo wou, Una na u a dyako yô, de deen kwagh u a lu a iôôn môm môm, a̱ lu uma ga," 
Deuteronomy20:17 kpa tim ve purututu: Mbahiti man Mbaamor man Mbakanaan man Mbaperishi man Mbahivi man Mbayebushi, er TER, Aôndo wou, A kaa u nahan," 
Deuteronomy20:18 sha er ve̱ de tesen ne u eren aeren a ve a ihôngorough a ve lu eren mbaaôndo vev la, man né gema né er TER, Aôndo wen, isholibo ga yô." 
Deuteronomy20:19 Zum u wea kase gar sha afo a utya ica i gba, ú nôngo ityav a na wer ú ngohol un yô, de timin ikon na gberen i sha ijembe ga; i rumun er u̱ ya atam a i; yô, de gberen i ga; ikon i ken akôngo ka or shin u nenge ityav a i?" 
Deuteronomy20:20 Saa ikon i u fe, i lu i yan ga la, ka i ú tim i, ú gber i, ú kaha agil sha u nôngon ityav a gar u a nenge a we, zan zan una gba ye." 
Deuteronomy21:1 Aluer á kohol orgen u i woo nan i gbihi ken ikôngo, ken tar u TER, Aôndo wou, Una na u er ú ngohol u la, man á fa or u a woo nan ga yô," 
Deuteronomy21:2 mbatamen ou man mbaajiriv ou ve̱ due ve kar ilihen, hii hen u i woo nan la, zan zan za ar sha agar a a kase nan la;" 
Deuteronomy21:3 tsô gar u una hemban lun ikua a or u i woo nan la yô, mbatamen mba hen gar la, ve̱ kôr tulebua u i lu a vande eren tom a na ga, u a lu a kpela ikyekye sha igbur kpaa ga yô;" 
Deuteronomy21:4 mbatamen mba hen gar la ve̱ sen a tulebua la shin pev u mngerem ma om shimi ga yô, u i lu a vande kahan kwagh shimi man i lu a vande lôôn kwagh her kpaa ga yô, ve̱ sombo tulebua la mon shin pev la;" 
Deuteronomy21:5 upristi, ônov mba Levi ve̱ kporom; gadia ka ve je, TER, Aôndo wou, A tsough ve sha u ve̱ eren Un tom, ve̱ naan iveren ken iti i TER, man ka sha imo ve man á kuren anyiman man hanma gbidiv kpaa ye;" 
Deuteronomy21:6 mbatamen mba hen gar la cii, mba ve hembe lun ikua a or u i woo nan la, ve̱ ôô ave, ve̱ haa sha tulebua u i sombo un mon shin pev la;" 
Deuteronomy21:7 ve̱ kaa er: Ave ase haa awambe ne ga, ashe ase kpaa nenge ga," 
Deuteronomy21:8 TERE, de ior Ou, Iserael, mba U paa ve la, asorabo a ve, de deen ibo i awambe a orishôôgh i̱ lu ker atô u ior Ou Iserael ga, de ve ibo i sha awambe la." 
Deuteronomy21:9 Kape ú ese awambe a orishôôgh ker a we kera, aluer u er kwagh u a lu vough sha ashe a TER yô." 
Deuteronomy21:10 Zum u ú due u za nôngon ityav a mbaihomov ou man TER, Aôndo wou, Una na ve sha ikev you yô, ú kôr ve," 
Deuteronomy21:11 man ken mba u ker ve mbala wea nenge a kwase u doon ashe, una sar u, á lu u ka tôôn hingir kwase wou yô," 
Deuteronomy21:12 va a na hen ya wou, a̱ hondo ityough nagh man a̱ tôndo akughul a na;" 
Deuteronomy21:13 a̱ er akondo a na, a i ker un a mi iyol la kera, a̱ tema ken ya wou a̱ zungwe ter na man ngô na uwer môm vough, ken masetyô la ú tsa a na, ú hingir nom na, un kpaa una hingir kwase wou." 
Deuteronomy21:14 Aluer una kera doo u ga yô, de un a̱ yem henpe i sar un yô; kpa de teen un sha inyar je ga, shi de eren a na er ka kpankwase ga, sha ci u u vande nan un kunya yô." 
Deuteronomy21:15 Aluer or á lu a kasev uhar, u môm una doo nan ishima, ugen una doo nan ishima ga, man ve uhar cii ve mar nan ônov yô, u a doo nan ishima man u a doo nan ishima ga la; man aluer waniunda u nomso una lu u a doo nan ga la yô," 
Deuteronomy21:16 nahan sha iyange i nana kar ônov mba nan dyako u nan la, a̱ de gem wannomso u kwase u doon nan ishima la, a̱ hingir waniunda sha ityough ki wannomso u kwase u a doo nan ishima ga, u a lu waniunda jim la, ga," 
Deuteronomy21:17 kpa nana̱ rumun waniunda u kwase u a doo nan ishima ga la, nana̱ na un kwar kwa har sha akaa a nan lu a min cii, gadia un ka mhii u agee a nan, nahan dyako u waniunda ka u na je." 
Deuteronomy21:18 Aluer or nana lu a wan u taver ityough u aperagh u hemban ter u nan man ngô u nan atô, shin ve tsaha nan, kpa nan we ve iko ga yô," 
Deuteronomy21:19 ter u nan kua ngô u nan ve̱ kôr nan ve̱ za a nan hen mbatamen mba hen gar u nan, hen hundagar u nan la;" 
Deuteronomy21:20 ve̱ kaa mbatamen mba hen gar la er: Wan wase ne ka u taver ityough, u aperagh, ongo imo yase ga, vihin inyaregh dang dang, hundu msôrom kpaa." 
Deuteronomy21:21 Nahan nomsombaiorov mba hen gar u nan la cii ve̱ ta nan awen nana̱ kpe; kape ú er man ú dugh ifer ken a we kera ne; Iserael cii vea ungwa vea cia kpaa. 
Deuteronomy21:22 Man aluer or á er isholibo i i kom ku man á wua nan, man ú hambe nan sha kon yô," 
Deuteronomy21:23 Ikom i nan i̱ de tse sha kon ga, kpa ii nan iyange la je; gadia or u i sende nan yô, Aôndo wa nan ifan; sha u u̱ de hôngor a tar u TER, Aôndo wou, Una na u dyako la ga." 
Deuteronomy22:1 Aluer u nenge bua u anngôu ngu tsumen, shin iyôngo i nan kpaa, de geman ashe kera ga, kpa hide a mi hen anngôu la kpee." 
Deuteronomy22:2 Man aluer anngôu la, nana lu ikua a we ga, shin wea fa nan ga yô, va a mi hen ya wou, a̱ lu hen we zan zan shighe u anngôu la nana ker un, tsô ú hide nan a mi." 
Deuteronomy22:3 Kape ú er a jaki i nan kpaa la; man kape ú er a riga u nan kpaa la; man shi kape ú er a hanma kwagh u a saa anngôu la; kwagh u a saa nan man ú za ande sha mi yô, de gem ashe keela ga." 
Deuteronomy22:4 Aluer ú nenge jaki i anngôu ia gba sha gbenda shin bua u nan kpaa, de gem ashe kera ga, kpa wase nan u moughon a mi kpee je." 
Deuteronomy22:5 Kwase nana̱ de hee ikav mbi nomso iyol ga, nomsoor kpaa nana̱ de hee ikondo i ukase ga; gadia hanma or u nana er akaa ne yô, nan ngu TER, Aôndo wou, kwagh u ihôngorough je." 
Deuteronomy22:6 Aluer ú zua a iya i inyon hen gbenda, sha ma kon, shin hen inya, a ônov shin aji ker, ngô kpaa una uve sha ônov mbala shin sha aji la yô, de ker ngô la a ônov mbala imôngo ga," 
Deuteronomy22:7 kpa pase ngô la a̱ yem; ônov yô, i rumun er ú tôô; sha er á kpe u iyol man á seer we ayange kpaa yô." 
Deuteronomy22:8 Zum u ú maa iyou i he yô, wa igyar sha haav mbu i sha, kase cii sha er ú va a ibo i awambe sha iyou you ga, aluer or nana osough sha nana gba yô." 
Deuteronomy22:9 De lee ivor anza ahar ken sule wou u ikon i wain ga, sha er mtser la cii a̱ de hingir kwagh u á tsegha un sha ci u icighanjiir ga, ivor i u lee la kua atam a ikon i wain la kpaa." 
Deuteronomy22:10 De zough bua vea jaki sha u ve̱ kaha sule imôngo ga. 
Deuteronomy22:11 De cirin ikondo i i kor i sha akondo atô ahar ul kua mou ga. 
Deuteronomy22:12 Ta anzôr sha azongo a anyiin a ikondo you i u cir iyol a mi la. 
Deuteronomy22:13 Aluer or nana er kwase, nana tsa a na man nana gema nana venda un," 
Deuteronomy22:14 nana kôso un sha kwagh u dang, nana za un gwa u bo nana kaa er: M er kwase ne kpa zum u m mgbôghom a na yô, m kera nenge un lu a ikav i iniunugh ga;" 
Deuteronomy22:15 nahan ter u wankwase la kua ngô na ve̱ tôô ikav i iniun i kwase la ve̱ va a mi hen mbatamen mba hen gar la sha hundagar," 
Deuteronomy22:16 ter u wankwase la a̱ kaa a mbatamen mbala er: M na or ne wan wam u kwase, a hingir kwase na, kpa a venda un," 
Deuteronomy22:17 man nenge a kôso un sha kwagh u dang, a kaa er: M zua wan wou u kwase a ikav i iniunugh ga; kpa nenge, ka ikav i iniun i wan wam u kwase ne. Nahan ve̱ samber ikondo la, sha ishigh ki mbatamen mba hen gar la." 
Deuteronomy22:18 Nahan mbatamen mba hen gar la ve̱ kôr or la ve̱ tsaha nan; 
Deuteronomy22:19 ve̱ ya nan zwajirigh sha ushekel mba azurfa deri, ve̱ na ter u wankwase la, sha ci u nan ze iniunkwase i Iserael gwa u bo yô; shi una lu kwase u nan kpaa sha ayange a uma u nan cii, nana fatyô u paven a na ga." 
Deuteronomy22:20 Kpa aluer kwagh la a lu mimi je, i zua wankwase la a ikav i iniunkwase ga yô," 
Deuteronomy22:21 ve̱ due a wankwase la hen hunda u ya u ter na, nomsombaiorov mba hen gar na la ve̱ ta un awen a̱ kpe sha ci u a er ibumekwagh ken Iserael, er a er idya ken ya u ter na yô; kape ú er man ú dugh ifer ken a we kera ne." 
Deuteronomy22:22 Aluer á kohol or nana lu yaven a kwase u orgen yô, ve̱ uhar cii ve̱ kpe, or u a yav a kwase la, man kwase la kpaa; kape ú er man ú dugh ifer ken Iserael kera ne." 
Deuteronomy22:23 Aluer wankwase u a lu iniun u a tende zwa a nom man orgen nan gem nan zough a na ken gar, nan yav a na yô," 
Deuteronomy22:24 due nen a ve uhar cii hen hundagar la, ta nen ve awen ve̱ kpe, un wankwase la yô, ka sha ci u a lu ken gar je, kpa a gbir vaa ga yô, man or la yô, ka sha ci u nan hee kwase u or u nan we ndor a nan yô; kape ú er man ú dugh ifer ken a we kera ne." 
Deuteronomy22:25 Man aluer or la nana kohol wankwase u i sôôr un a sôôr la ken toho man nana kighir un sha apera, nana yav a na yô, or u nan yav a na la, nana̱ kpe tswen;" 
Deuteronomy22:26 kpa wankwase la yô, de eren un kwagh ga; hen wankwase la ma isholibo i kuman ku ngi ga, gadia kwagh ne ngu er or u nan te num sha anngô u nan, nan woo un yô;" 
Deuteronomy22:27 gadia nan kohol un ken toho, un wankwase u i sôôr un la, a gbile vaa, kpa ma or u yiman un lu ga." 
Deuteronomy22:28 Aluer or nana zua a wankwase u a lu iniun, kpa i lu a sôôr un ga, man nan kôr un nan yav a na man á kohol ve yô," 
Deuteronomy22:29 or u nan yav a na la, nana̱ na ter u wankwase la ushekel mba azurfa akunduahargber, a̱ maa a̱ hingir kwase u nan sha ci u nan hee un yô; sha ayange a uma u nan cii nana fatyô u paven a na ga." 
Deuteronomy22:30 Or nana̱ de vese kwase u ter u nan ga, man nana̱ de bughun ikondo i ter u nan ga." 
Deuteronomy23:1 Or u i cagh nan ake shin i tende nan ilyeegh ki ken myer kpaa, nana nyôr ken mkohol u ior mba TER ga." 
Deuteronomy23:2 Wan u i mar nan sha tindi u peren nana nyôr ken mkohol u ior mba TER ga; zan zan ikov pue kpaa, ma or ken tsombor u nan nana nyôr ken mkohol u ior mba TER ga." 
Deuteronomy23:3 Oramon shin Ormoabi nana nyôr ken mkohol u ior mba TER ga; zan zan ikov pue kpaa, ma or ken a ve nana nyôr ken mkohol u ior mba TER mayange ga;" 
Deuteronomy23:4 sha ci u ve za kegh ne gbenda a kwaghyan man mngerem, zum u ne due ken Igipiti la ga yô, man shi sha ci u ve goho Balaam, wan u Beor, hen Petor u ken Mesopotamia, sha u a̱ va wa u ifan yô." 
Deuteronomy23:5 Nahan kpaa, TER, Aôndo wou, rumun u ungwan imo i Balaam ga, kpa TER, Aôndo wou, gema ifan la, hingir we iveren, gadia u doo TER, Aôndo wou, ishima." 
Deuteronomy23:6 De keren bem shin mkpeyol sha ci ve ga sha ayange a ou cii. 
Deuteronomy23:7 Oredom yô, nana̱ de luun we kwagh u ihôngorough ga, gadia un ka anngôu; Origipiti kpaa, nana̱ de luun we kwagh u ihôngorough ga, gadia ngise u lu shin ken tar na." 
Deuteronomy23:8 Ônov vev mba i mar sha kov u sha utar yô, vea nyôr ken mkohol u ior mba TER." 
Deuteronomy23:9 Zum u ú due ú za haa afo sha u za tan num sha mbaihomov ou yô, kura iyol you sha hanma kwagh u bo." 
Deuteronomy23:10 Aluer ma or nana lu ken a ven u nan kera lu wang ga, sha ci u kwagh u a ne nan anzughul tugh yô, nana̱ due ken akôngoafogh nana̱ de hidi nana̱ nyer ken afo ga;" 
Deuteronomy23:11 kpa zum u iyange ia mgbôghom u been yô, nana̱ ôô iyol sha mnger, shighe u iyange ia mire yô, nana nyôr ken afo." 
Deuteronomy23:12 Ver ijiir ken akôngoafogh i zan her," 
Deuteronomy23:13 wa tôgh ken ikav you, zum u ú za ken akôngo yô, time, gema cir akôngo ou;" 
Deuteronomy23:14 gadia TER, Aôndo wou, zenden ken atô u afo ou, sha u yiman we, nan we mbaihomov ou sha ikev, nahan yô, afo ou a̱ lu wang, A̱ de nengen a kwagh u vihin her a we, A̱ undun we ga." 
Deuteronomy23:15 Kpan u a yevese ter na a va nyer hen a we yô, de ne un sha ikev i ter na ga," 
Deuteronomy23:16 a̱ tema a we imôngo ken atô wou, hen ijiir i a tsough, ken ma gar wou, henpe i hembe doon un yô, de eren un ican ga." 
Deuteronomy23:17 Ma agbaga a̱ de lu ken ônkasev mba Iserael ga; ma Orsodom kpaa, a̱ de lu ken ônnomso mba Iserael ga." 
Deuteronomy23:18 De ve a injar i idyakwase, shin injar i iwa, hen ya u TER, Aôndo wou, sha ci u hanma iceghzwa ga, gadia ve uhar cii ka TER, Aôndo wou, kwagh u ihôngorough je." 
Deuteronomy23:19 De pwaren anngôu kwagh, wan mtser sha mi ga, shin mtser u sha inyar, shin mtser u sha kwaghyan, shin mtser u sha hanma kwagh u ka i pwar or i ya mtser sha mi yô." 
Deuteronomy23:20 Or u ken nongo ugen yô, i rumun er ú pwar nan kwagh, wan mtser sha mi, kpa de pwaren anngôu kwagh yaan mtser sha mi ga, sha er TER, Aôndo wou, A̱ ver u doo doo ken akaa cii a u ker ave sha mi ken tar u ú nyôr ú za ngohol u la." 
Deuteronomy23:21 Zum u u tsegh zwa a TER, Aôndo wou, yô, de ngôôr u eren sha mi ga, gadia TER, Aôndo wou, Una ker un her a we kpee, nahan kwagh la una hingir isholibo je u er ye." 
Deuteronomy23:22 Kpa aluer u tsegha zwa ga yô, á lu isholibo hen a we ga." 
Deuteronomy23:23 Kwagh u a vande duen ken zwa wou yô, ver ishima, er sha mi, gadia u tsegha zwa a TER, Aôndo wou, sha ishima i dedoo u pase sha zwa wou iyol you je." 
Deuteronomy23:24 Zum u ú nyôr ken sule u ikon i wain u or u nan we ndor a we yô, i rumun er u̱ ya atam sha ishima you zan zan á kuma u, kpa de we ma kwagh shin ikpa you ga." 
Deuteronomy23:25 Zum u ú nyôr ken iyiagh ki ki lu shisha ki or u nan we ndor a we yô, i rumun er u̱ tôndo asagher sha uwegh ough, kpa de we louji sha iyiagh ki ki lu shisha ki or u nan we ndor a we la ga." 
Deuteronomy24:1 Aluer or nana er kwase, nana vôso un man i kera doo nan a kwase la ga, sha ci u nan zough a kwagh u doon ga hen kwase la yô, nahan nana̱ nger un takerada u paven, nana̱ na un sha ikev, nana̱ na un gbenda a̱ due hen ya u nan kera." 
Deuteronomy24:2 Zum u una due hen ya u nan kera yô, a̱ yem, a̱ za lu kwase u orgen;" 
Deuteronomy24:3 aluer nom u dondon la kpaa nana venda un yô, nana̱ nger un takerada u paven, nana̱ na un sha ikev, nana̱ na un gbenda er a̱ due hen ya u nan kera yô, shin aluer nom u dondon u nan er un la, nana kpe yô," 
Deuteronomy24:4 nom na u hiihii u yan na un gbenda kera la, nana kera fatyô u shi eren un, er a vande hôngor kera la ga, gadia ngun ka kwagh u ihôngorough je sha ishigh ki TER; de ve a isholibo sha tar u TER, Aôndo wou, Una na u dyako sha u la ga." 
Deuteronomy24:5 Aluer or á er kwase u he yô, nana̱ de ze ityav ga, man i̱ de naan nan ma kwagh u eren kpaa ga; nana̱ gba teman a ne nagh hen ya u nan inyom i môm, nana̱ na kwase u nan er la, iember ken ishima." 
Deuteronomy24:6 Or nana̱ de ngohol nase shin anishwa sha ityungu ga, gadia nahan ka uma u or je nan ngohol ityungu ye." 
Deuteronomy24:7 Aluer á kohol or nana lu iin or u ken anmgbianev mba nan ken Mbaiserael, nan gema un, una hingir kpan, shin nan ngu teen un yô, ormbaiv la nana̱ kpe; kape ú er man ú dugh ifer ken a we kera ne." 
Deuteronomy24:8 Ver ishima sha angev mbu imandev, wa iko, er akaa cii a Mbalevi mba ve lu upristi yô, vea tese ne; er m kaa ve nahan, kape ver ishima er nen la." 
Deuteronomy24:9 Umbur kwagh u TER, Aôndo wou, lu er a Miriam sha gbenda, zum u ne due ken Igipiti la." 
Deuteronomy24:10 Zum u ú pwar anngôu ma kwagh yô, de nyer ken iyou na wer ú za ngohol ityungu na ga." 
Deuteronomy24:11 Tile ken won, un or u u pwar un kwagh la, a̱ due a ityungu a̱ va na u ken won." 
Deuteronomy24:12 Aluer una lu icanor yô, de tse a ityungu na ga;" 
Deuteronomy24:13 hide un a ityungu kpee, zum u iyange ka i been nahan, a tsa a ikondo na i cirin man a ver u doo doo; nahan kwagh la una gema á hingir perapera wou sha ishigh ki TER, Aôndo wou." 
Deuteronomy24:14 Ortom u sha tôndo u a lu icanor, or u ibanave yô, de eren nan ican ga, shin nana lu or u ken anmgbianev ou, shin nana lu or u ken ushirmbaiorov mba ken tar wou mba ve nyer u a nyôr la kpaa." 
Deuteronomy24:15 Na nan injar i nan sha iyange i nan, iyange i̱ de mir a i ga, gadia nan ngu icanor je, nan ngu veren ishima i nan sha mi; sha er nana̱ de vaan ieren you a TER, i̱ hingir isholibo hen we ga." 
Deuteronomy24:16 De woo uter sha ci u isholibo i uôn ga; man shi de woo ônov sha ci u isholibo i uter ga; hanma or ka sha ci u isholibo i nan iyol i nan á wua nan ye. 
Deuteronomy24:17 De vihin ijir i shiror shin ancôghol kpaa ga; man de ngohol ikondo i kwasecôghol ityungu ga. 
Deuteronomy24:18 Umbur er u lu kpan ken tar u Igipiti man er TER, Aôndo wou, A paa u ker yô; ka nahan man m kaa u mer, er kwagh ne ye." 
Deuteronomy24:19 Zum u ú sunda iyiagh you ken sule wou man ú hungul ma ile ken sule yô, de hidi wer ú za tôô u ga, u̱ lu sha ci u shiror man wancôghol man kwasecôghol, sha er TER, Aôndo wou, A̱ ver u doo doo sha tom u ave ou cii." 
Deuteronomy24:20 Zum u ú gbire olev yô, de kimbir u shi gbiren agbaa ga; kwagh u a shi yô, a̱ lu sha ci u shiror man wancôghol kua kwasecôghol." 
Deuteronomy24:21 Zum u ú zôr atam a wain ken sule wou yô, de kera hiden yaren twar ga, a̱ lu sha ci u shiror man ancôghol man kwasecôghol." 
Deuteronomy24:22 Umbur er ngise u lu kpan ken tar u Igipiti yô; ka nahan man m kaa u mer, er kwagh ne ye." 
Deuteronomy25:1 Aluer kwagh u anyiman una mough hen atô u nomsombaiorov man vea va hen ijir man i kure ve ijir, i na ormimi la ishô, i gema i na orifer la ibo," 
Deuteronomy25:2 aluer ibo i orifer la ia kuma gbidiv yô, orjir a̱ kaa i̱ samber nan inya, i̱ gbidye nan sha ishigh nagh sha ifer i nan la vough, i̱ ôr iyenge;" 
Deuteronomy25:3 ka kwa akunduahar una gbidye nan ye, i̱ de karen ga; sha er anngôu a̱ de heen sha ishigh you ga zum u á gbidye nan kpishi á hemba heela yô." 
Deuteronomy25:4 De we bua kper sha zwa zum u a lu shoghol iyiagh la ga. 
Deuteronomy25:5 Aluer anngôôv vea tema ijiir i môm, man mô ve ugen nana kpe nana lu a wan ga yô, kwase u or u a kpe la, a̱ de vese orgen ken won kposo ga, ka anngô u nom na la, nana̱ tsa a na, nana̱ tôô un a̱ hingir kwase u nan, nana̱ er a na er anngô u nom na nana er la." 
Deuteronomy25:6 Nahan waniunda, u kwase la una mar la, nana ya iti i anngô u nan u a kpe la, sha er i̱ de esen iti i nan ken Iserael kera ga yô." 
Deuteronomy25:7 Kpa aluer á doo or la u tôôn kwase u anngô u nan ga yô, kwase u anngô u nan la, a̱ za hen mbavesen hen hundagar, a̱ za kaa er: Anngô u nomom venda u veren anngô na tse ken Iserael, a rumun u eren a mo er anngô u nom ka nan er la nahan ga." 
Deuteronomy25:8 Nahan mbatamen mba hen gar u or la, ve̱ yila nan ve̱ ôr kwagh a nan; kpa nana̱ venda ngeghekeke, nana̱ kaa er: Sarem u tôôn un ga yô," 
Deuteronomy25:9 kwase u anngô u nan la, a̱ va her a nan sha ishigh ki mbatamen, a̱ va tsuwa nan ikôvough ki shin nguhar, a̱ haa nan ijer sha ishi, shi a̱ gema a̱ kaa a nan er: Kape á er a or u nan maa ya u anngô u nan ga la." 
Deuteronomy25:10 Nahan á yila iti i nan ken Iserael er: Ya u or u i tsough nan ikôvough ki shin nguhar kera. 
Deuteronomy25:11 Aluer nomsombaiorov mba nôngon num ayol a ve, man kwase u mô ve una va sha u una va yima nom na sha ikev i u a gbidye un la, man una za uwegh una kôr or la sha alegh a nan a ken myer yô," 
Deuteronomy25:12 tôndo un uwegh kera; ashe ou a̱ de zungu mhôônom ga. 
Deuteronomy25:13 De luun a uikaren mba myoho anza ahar, u vesen kua u kiriki ken ikpa you, ga." 
Deuteronomy25:14 De luun a ikav mbi karen kwagh a mi anza ahar, ki vesen kua ki kiriki, ken ya wou ga." 
Deuteronomy25:15 Ka ikaren u vough u mimi ú lu a mi ye; man shi ka ikagh ki karen a mi ki vough ki mimi kpaa, ú lu a mi ye; sha er á seer we ayange ken tar u TER, Aôndo wou, A lu nan we yô." 
Deuteronomy25:16 Gadia mbaeren akaa angan ne, ka mba ve eren dang cii je la, ve mba TER, Aôndo wou, kwagh u ihôngorough je." 
Deuteronomy25:17 Umbur kwagh u Amaleki lu er u sha gbenda, zum u ne due ken Igipiti la;" 
Deuteronomy25:18 er a kohol we sha gbenda yô, a wua mba ve lu van we ken ijime, mba ve lu a agee iyol ga, ve gbe ijime la cii, zum u iyol kpe u u vôr la; mayange a cia Aôndo ga." 
Deuteronomy25:19 Nahan yô, zum u TER, Aôndo wou, Una na u mmem sha mbaihomov ou cii mba ve kase u ken tar u TER, Aôndo wou, Una na u u, sha u u̱ ngohol u dyako la yô, ese m-umbur u ma i umbur Amaleki sha won la kera; de hungul ga." 
Deuteronomy26:1 Zum u ú nyôr ken tar u TER, Aôndo wou, Una na u er u̱ hingir dyako wou, ú ngohol u, ú tema ker yô," 
Deuteronomy26:2 pande atam a tsutswa a iyiagh ki tar la cii, a u kur a mi ken sule wou, u TER, Aôndo wou, A ne u la, haa a shin ikese, za a mi hen ijiir i TER, Aôndo wou, Una tsuwa sha u veren Iti Na er i̱ lu ker la." 
Deuteronomy26:3 Va hen pristi u una tema hen ayange la, kaa a na wer: Nyian m pase TER, Aôndo wou, mer, m nyôr ken tar u TER bum a uter asev er Una na se u ne ve." 
Deuteronomy26:4 Nahan pristi a̱ ngohol ikese la, sha uwegh ough, a̱ ver i sha ishigh ki atse a nanden nagh sha mi a TER, Aôndo wou." 
Deuteronomy26:5 Shi gema kaa sha ishigh ki TER, Aôndo wou wer: Terem lu Oraramia u azende azende, a yem ken Igipiti, a za lu shir ker a ior kpeghee, a hingir ikurior ker i vesen i ageegh, i ngeen kpaa;" 
Deuteronomy26:6 Mbaigipiti er se ican i bo, kighir se, man na se tom u kpan u vihin tsung;" 
Deuteronomy26:7 tsô se vaa a TER, Aôndo u uter asev; TER kpaa ungwa mliam asem, A nenge ican yase man tom wase u ican kua mkighir u i lu kighir se la;" 
Deuteronomy26:8 nahan TER due a vese ken Igipiti sha uwegh ku ageegh man uwegh ku naregh man akaacieryol a vesen man uivande kua akaakpilighyol; 
Deuteronomy26:9 A va a vese hen ijiir ne, A va na se tar ne, tar u dumbur a atumbabua man iyough." 
Deuteronomy26:10 Hegen yô, nenge, m va a atam a tsutswa a iyiagh ki hen inya ne, ki u nem yô, TERE. Nahan ver a sha ishigh ki TER, Aôndo wou; gure inya sha ishigh ki, TER, Aôndo wou." 
Deuteronomy26:11 Ember sha akaa a dedoo a TER, Aôndo wou, A ne u a ya wou cii yô, we man Orlevi kua shiror u a nyer u a nyôr la kpaa." 
Deuteronomy26:12 Zum u u dugh môm-ken-upue u iyiagh you cii, u bee, ken inyom i sha utar la yô, ka inyom i dughun môm-ken-upue je la, gema na Orlevi man shiror man ancôghol kua kwasecôghol, ve̱ ya ken ihindagar you i̱ kuma ve;" 
Deuteronomy26:13 tsô ú kaa sha ishigh ki TER, Aôndo wou, wer: M due a uicighanmbaakaav hen ya wam kera, m na Orlevi man shiror man ancôghol kua kwasecôghol sha imo You i U kaam cii yô, m per ma tindi môm ken atindi Ou ga, m hungul a kpaa ga." 
Deuteronomy26:14 M pande kwagh ker m ya, zum u m lu zungwen ku ga; m tôô ma kwagh u ker kera, zum u m lu wang ga la kpaa ga; shi m pande ma kwagh m na mbakpenev kpaa ga, m wa imo i TER, Aôndo wam, iko, m er akaa a U kaam cii." 
Deuteronomy26:15 Sha icighanjiir Wou u teman u Sha la, shir ashe Ou nenge, man ver ior Ou Iserael doo doo kua tar u U ne se er U bum a uter asev yô, tar u u dumbur a atumbabua man iyough ne." 
Deuteronomy26:16 Nyian TER, Aôndo wou, wa u akaawan kua akaaôron a jirigh ne, nahan waan a iko a ishima you cii man uma wou cii, eren sha mi." 
Deuteronomy26:17 Nyian u rumun er TER A lu Aôndo wou ve, ú zaan sha gbenda Na ú waan akaawan a Na man atindi Na kua akaaôron a jirigh a Na iko man ú ungwan imo Na kpaa." 
Deuteronomy26:18 Nyian kpaa TER rumun er we, u̱ lu ikurior Na iyol Na jim, er A kaa a we nahan, man ú waan atindi Na cii iko;" 
Deuteronomy26:19 nahan Una kende u sha, ú hemba akuraior a A gbe a cii iwuese man gwa u zan man icivir, ú lu TER, Aôndo wou, icighanikurior er A kaa nahan." 
Deuteronomy27:1 Tsô Mose kua mbatamen mba Iserael kaa a ior er: Waan nen atindi a m we ne nyian ne cii iko. 
Deuteronomy27:2 Sha iyange i né per Yordan ne, né nyôr ken tar u TER, Aôndo wou, Una na u la yô, tim uzegembaawenev, shighe ve icigh ki pupuu." 
Deuteronomy27:3 Zum u ú per yô, nger akaaôron a tindi ne cii sha mi, sha er u nyôr ken tar u TER, Aôndo wou, Una na u la, tar u u dumbur a atumbabua man iyough, er TER, Aôndo u uter ou, lu tôndo zwa a we nahan." 
Deuteronomy27:4 Zum u né per Yordan yô, tim nen awen a m kaa ne nyian ne, sha uwo u Ebal, shighe a icigh ki pupuu." 
Deuteronomy27:5 Ta atse a TER, Aôndo wou, a nanden nagh sha mi her, atse a awen; de gbidyen iyôgh sha a ga." 
Deuteronomy27:6 Ka sha awen a i koo a ga, ú ta atse a TER, Aôndo wou, ye; na TER, Aôndo wou, iniav mbi nanden sha a." 
Deuteronomy27:7 Sôngo iniav mbi bem kpaa, ya her; ember sha ishigh ki TER, Aôndo wou." 
Deuteronomy27:8 Man shi gema akaaôron a tindi ne cii nger a wanger wanger sha awen la. 
Deuteronomy27:9 Tsô Mose kua upristi mba Mbalevi, ve ôr kwagh a Iserael cii, ve kaa er: Huan ving, Iserael, ver ato. Nyian u hingir ikurior i TER, Aôndo wou, ve." 
Deuteronomy27:10 Yô, ungwa imo i TER, Aôndo wou, er sha atindi a Na man akaawan a Na a m we u nyian ne." 
Deuteronomy27:11 Tsô sha iyange la, Mose kaa a ior er:" 
Deuteronomy27:12 Zum u né per Yordan yô, mba vea tile sha uwo u Gerishim ve̱ na ior iveren, ka: Shimeon man Levi man Yuda man Isaka man Yosev kua Benyamin;" 
Deuteronomy27:13 mba vea tile sha uwo u Ebal sha u wan ifan, ka: Ruben man Gadi man Asher man Sebulon man Dan kua Nafetali." 
Deuteronomy27:14 Mbalevi ve̱ gema ve̱ kaa ior mba Iserael cii, sha imo i tiaver er:" 
Deuteronomy27:15 Ifan i̱ kôr or u nan er eev mbu gban shin mbu keren a ker yô, ka TER kwagh u ihôngorough je, ka tomaveegh u or u fan kwaghgban, u nan ver mbu myer yô. Nahan ior cii ve̱ rumun er: Amen." 
Deuteronomy27:16 Ifan i̱ kôr or u nan laha ter shin ngô u nan la. Ior cii ve̱ rumun er: Amen. 
Deuteronomy27:17 Ifan i̱ kôr or u nan kper a ikav i ipaventar i, u a we ndor a nan la. Ior cii ve̱ rumun er: Amen." 
Deuteronomy27:18 Ifan i̱ kôr or u nan tsugh orapirashe sha kwagh u gbenda yô. Ior cii ve̱ rumun er: Amen. 
Deuteronomy27:19 Ifan i̱ kôr or u nan vihi ijiir i shiror shin ancôghol shin kwasecôghol. Ior cii ve̱ rumun er: Amen. 
Deuteronomy27:20 Ifan i̱ kôr or u nan yav a kwase u ter u nan yô; gadia nan bugh ikondo i ter u nan. Ior cii ve̱ rumun er: Amen. 
Deuteronomy27:21 Ifan i̱ kôr or u nan yav a hanma inja zendenya. Ior cii ve̱ rumun er: Amen. 
Deuteronomy27:22 Ifan i̱ kôr or u nan yav a anngô u nan u kwase, ka wan u ter u nan u kwase, shin wan u ngô u nan u kwase je la. Ior cii ve̱ rumun er: Amen." 
Deuteronomy27:23 Ifan i̱ kôr or u nan yav a ngôkem u nan yô. Ior cii ve̱ rumun er: Amen. 
Deuteronomy27:24 Ifan i̱ kôr or u nan woo or u nan we ndor a nan myer la. Ior cii ve̱ rumun er: Amen. 
Deuteronomy27:25 Ifan i̱ kôr or u nan ngohol injar sha u wuan or u nan lu a ibo ga la. Ior cii ve̱ rumun er: Amen. 
Deuteronomy27:26 Ifan i̱ kôr or u nan kera we iko u eren sha akaaôron a atindi ne ga yô. Ior cii ve̱ rumun er: Amen. 
Deuteronomy28:1 Aluer ú ungwa imo i TER, Aôndo wou, ishima i môm je, ú waan atindi a Na a m we u nyian ne cii iko, ú eren sha mi yô, TER, Aôndo wou, Una kende u sha, ú hemba akuraior a sha won cii," 
Deuteronomy28:2 Iveren ne cii ia va sha a we, ia va kohol we, aluer wea ver ato sha imo i TER, Aôndo wou, yô:" 
Deuteronomy28:3 Ú lu a iveren ken gar man ú lu a iveren ken sule kpaa. 
Deuteronomy28:4 Iveren ia lu sha tsombor wou man iyiagh ki hen inya you, man ônov mba uzendenya ou, man ibua you i maren kua iyôngo you i maren kpaa." 
Deuteronomy28:5 Iveren ia lu sha ikese you man ikagh you ki hôron mwem min. 
Deuteronomy28:6 Iveren ia lu sha a we zum u ú nyôron yô, man iveren ia lu sha a we zum u ú duen kpaa." 
Deuteronomy28:7 TER Una er mbaihomov ou mba vea mough num a we, kwagh una hemba ve sha ishigh you, vea va hen a we sha gbenda môm, kpa vea gema á yevese sha ishigh you kera sha igbenda itiankarihiar je." 
Deuteronomy28:8 TER Una kaa iveren ia va sha we, sha iuna you man sha hanma kwagh u ú kôr ave sha mi; man Una ver u doo doo ken tar u TER, Aôndo wou, Una na u yô." 
Deuteronomy28:9 TER Una ver u, ú lu Un icighanikurior er A bum a we nahan; aluer ú waan atindi a TER, Aôndo wou, iko, ú zenden sha igbenda Na yô." 
Deuteronomy28:10 Akuraior a sha won cii aa nenge er i lu yilan we sha iti i TER yô, nahan aa cia." 
Deuteronomy28:11 TER Una na u akaadoon wuee, sha tsombor wou man sha ônov mba uzendenya ou, man sha iyiav mbi ken sule wou ken tar u TER bum a uter ou er Una na u u la." 
Deuteronomy28:12 TER Una bugh u iyou Na i koson akaa a dedoo ker la, Una nôô ura hen tar wou sha shighe u u, Una ver tom u ave ou cii doo doo kpaa; ú pwar akuraior kpishi akaa; kpa we yô, ú pwar kwagh ga." 
Deuteronomy28:13 TER Una er u ú lu ityough, ú lu tsa ga, ú zaan sha gbem, ú gba shin ga, aluer ú ver ato sha atindi a TER, Aôndo wou, a m we u nyian ne, ú waan a iko u eren sha mi kpaa," 
Deuteronomy28:14 man ú kaha ken iyan shin ken imese ú undu ma kwaghôron wam u m kaa u nyian ne sha u dondon mbaaôndo mbagenev civir ve ga yô. 
Deuteronomy28:15 Kpa, aluer ú kera ver ato sha imo i TER, Aôndo wou, ú waan atindi a Na man akaawan a Na a m we ne nyian ne cii iko ga yô, ifan ne cii ia va sha a we ia kôr u:" 
Deuteronomy28:16 Ú lu a ifan iyol ken gar man shi ú lu a ifan iyol ken sule kpaa. 
Deuteronomy28:17 Ikese you man ikagh you ki hôron mwem vea lu a ifan iyol. 
Deuteronomy28:18 Tsombor wou man iyiagh ki ken sule wou, ibua you i maren kua iyôngo you i maren ia lu a ifan iyol." 
Deuteronomy28:19 Ú lu a ifan iyol zum u ú nyôron man ú lu a ifan iyol zum u ú duen yô. 
Deuteronomy28:20 TER Una tindi u a ifan man anzughul man myange sha akaa a u kôr ave sha mi cii, zan zan ú tim ú saa ishe fese, sha ci u ifer i aeren a ou er u gbihim kera yô," 
Deuteronomy28:21 TER Una er bouange una zer a we, zan zan Una tim u ken tar u ú za nyôr ker sha u yan dyako u u la." 
Deuteronomy28:22 TER Una tsaha u sha houghbar man angev mbu tseeyol man kwambe man iyol i hian man icegh ki zan man mhie u uyia man yien, vea zer a we zan zan ú tim." 
Deuteronomy28:23 Kwavaôndo wou u u lu u sha yô, ua hingir togula man tar u u lu sha mi yô, ua hingir iyôgh." 
Deuteronomy28:24 TER Una gema ura u hen tar wou ua hingir vuwe man ihundu, ia due Sha ia sen sha we zan zan ú tim." 
Deuteronomy28:25 TER Una er kwagh á hemba u sha ishigh ki mbaihomov ou, ú za sha gbenda môm sha u za nôngon ityav a ve man ú gema ú yevese sha ishigh vegh kera sha igbenda itiankarihiar je; ú hingir ityartor i sha won cii ikav i cier iyol." 
Deuteronomy28:26 Akom a ou aa hingir kwaghyan u inyon i sha cii, kua inyamtoho; or u zendan i kera, nana lu ga." 
Deuteronomy28:27 TER Una tsaha u sha atundu a Igipiti man imor man lagh man akpev, ú fatyô u waren akaa ne ga." 
Deuteronomy28:28 TER Una tsaha u sha ihundu man ashe a pirin man mkondoyol; 
Deuteronomy28:29 ú peven a pev zende iyange sha tembe er mbaapirashe ve peven ken ime nahan, ú lu a iveren sha igbenda you ga; á gbaa kighir we, á nzughul a we gbem je tsô, ma or kpaa nana yima u ga." 
Deuteronomy28:30 Ú sôôr kwase, kpa orgen nana yav a mi; ú maa iyou, kpa u tema ker ga; ú môôr ikon i wain, kpa ú er kwagh a atam a i ga." 
Deuteronomy28:31 Á sôngo bua wou sha ashe a ou je, kpa ú ya inyam na ga; á ngohol jaki you sha apera sha ishigh you je, kpa á hide a mi ga; á gema iyôngo you á na mbaihomov ou, kpa ú zua a or u nana yima u ga." 
Deuteronomy28:32 Á gema ônov ou mba nomso man mba kasev á na ikurior igen, ú lu nengen sha ashe ou, ashe ou kpaa aa yina u ikôr sha ci u veren a sha a ve, sev cii, uwegh ough kpaa kua lu agee a eren ma kwagh ga." 
Deuteronomy28:33 Iyiagh ki sule wou man tom wou u ican cii, ikurior igen i u fe i ga, ia ya; kpa we yô, á gbaa kighir we eren we ican gbem tsô;" 
Deuteronomy28:34 zan zan je ú hunde sha ci u kwagh u ashe ou aa nengen mi yô. 
Deuteronomy28:35 TER Una tsaha u sha ubombaatunduv sha anu a ou man angahar a ou, mba ú fatyô u waren ve je ga, á hii shin akev angahar a ou zan zan á ar sha ihaghtyo you." 
Deuteronomy28:36 TER Una yem a we kua tor wou u u ver un una tema tor sha a we, hen ikurior igen, i we a uter ou ne fe i ga yô, keela né za civir mbaaôndo mbagenev, ikon man awen." 
Deuteronomy28:37 Ú hingir kwagh u cieryol, man kwagh u veren ishor a min man kwagh u wan ishenge a min ken akuraior cii, henpe TER Una za a we yô." 
Deuteronomy28:38 Ú yar a ivor kpishi ken ityev you, kpa ú sunda kpeghee tsô, gadia ikomon ia ya i." 
Deuteronomy28:39 Ú môôr ikon i wain man ú sôr i, kpa zar na yô, ú ma ga, ú kohol atam a i kpaa ga, gadia anyigôô una ya i." 
Deuteronomy28:40 Ú lu a ikon i olev ken tar wou cii, kpa ú shighe mkurem iyol ga; gadia olev wou una ndoor kera." 
Deuteronomy28:41 Ú mar ônov mba nomso kua mba kasev, kpa vea lu mba ou ga, gadia á kôr ve vea hingir mbakwarev." 
Deuteronomy28:42 Ikomon ia ya ikon you cii kua iyiagh ki ken sule wou. 
Deuteronomy28:43 Shiror u nan lu a we, nana hemba u, nana yemen hemen hemen; kpa we yô, ú hiden a hide ijime." 
Deuteronomy28:44 Nana pwar u kwagh, kpa we yô, ú pwar nan kwagh ga, nana lu ityough, we yô, ú lu tsa." 
Deuteronomy28:45 Ifan ne cii ia va sha a we, ia zaan a we ityô, ia kôr u zan zan ú tim; sha ci u, u kera ver ato sha imo i TER, Aôndo wou, u we atindi a Na kua akaawan a Na a A we u la iko ga yô;" 
Deuteronomy28:46 ia lu sha a we sha ci u ivande man kwagh u kpilighyol, man sha tsombor wou kpaa gbem sha won cii." 
Deuteronomy28:47 Er u kera civir TER, Aôndo wou, a ishima i iember man i saan saan ga, sha ci u, u ngee a akaa yum yô," 
Deuteronomy28:48 nahan ú er mbaihomov ou mba TER Una tindi ve hen we tom u kpan a ijen man imura man idyelegh man mban u akaa cii; Una penda u igbur i iyô sha mon, zan zan Una tim u." 
Deuteronomy28:49 TER Una va a ikurior igen ken ica, ia kôr u ihom, ia due ken ikighir i tar, er iguve ka i purugh nahan; ikurior i ú ungwa zwa u i ga je;" 
Deuteronomy28:50 ikurior i tsughur ishigh i i we orbeenyol iko ga, wanye kpaa i zungu nan mhôônom ga;" 
Deuteronomy28:51 ia ya ônov mba ilev you man iyiagh ki hen tar wou zan zan ú tim; ia de u iyiagh shin wain shin mkurem shin ônov mba ibuav ou shin ônov mba iyôngov ou kpaa ga, zan zan ia tim u kera." 
Deuteronomy28:52 Ia kase u sha ihindagar you cii zan zan ugôgômbagilgar ou mba u suur sha a ve la, vea gba, ken tar wou cii; ia kase u sha ihindagar you cii, ken tar wou cii, u TER, Aôndo wou, A ne u la." 
Deuteronomy28:53 Ú ya ônov ou mba u mar, ka inyam i ônov ou mba nomso kua mba kasev, mba TER, Aôndo wou, A ne u je la, ken mkase u utya man m-imbishi u mbaihomov ou vea imbishi we yô." 
Deuteronomy28:54 Nomsoor u hen ven u nan taver ga, nan fe ican ga, nana kenger anngô u nan ishe i bo, man kwase u nan u doon nan ishima kua ônov mba nan mba ve shi ker yô," 
Deuteronomy28:55 nana rumun u nan mô ve môm inyam i ônov mba nan, i nan lu yan la ga, sha ci u ma kwagh ugen shi her a nan ga, ken mkase u utya man m-imbishi u orihom wou una imbishi we ken ihindagar you la cii." 
Deuteronomy28:56 Kwase u hen ven u nan taver ga, nan fe ican ga man nan cihi u benden ikevnguhar i nan hen inya ga, sha ci u cian ican, man mtaverga u nan la, nana kenger nom u nan u doon nan ishima la ishe i bo man wan u nan u nomso man wan u nan u kwase kpaa," 
Deuteronomy28:57 sha ci u kôndogh u a dugh her atô u angahar a nan, man ônov mba nan mba nana mar la kpaa; gadia nana ya ve myer je sha ci u mban u akaa cii, ken mkase u utya man m-imbishi u orihom wou una imbishi we ken ihindagar you la." 
Deuteronomy28:58 Aluer ú kera rumun u wan iko sha kwaghôron u tindi ne cii u i nger ken ruamabera ne, sha u cian iti i icivirigh i cieryol i TER, Aôndo wou, ne ga yô," 
Deuteronomy28:59 TER Una haa u man tsombor wou, atsan a cier iyol, uzegembaatsanev mba vea tsa kpishi, man shi angev mbu vihin mbu tsan kpaa." 
Deuteronomy28:60 Man shi Una haa u angev mbu Igipiti la cii, mbu mbu cier we iyol la; mbua zer a we." 
Deuteronomy28:61 Man hanma angev kpaa, man hanma ican i i nger i ken ruamabera u tindi ne ga kpaa, TER Una va u a mi zan zan ú tim." 
Deuteronomy28:62 Er ngise ne ngee iyenge er asan a Sha nahan, nahan kpaa, né mase shin ior ciôn tsô; sha ci u ne ver ato sha imo i TER, Aôndo wou, ga yô." 
Deuteronomy28:63 Tsô, er TER A ember ne sha u Una ver ne doo doo, man Una seer ne iyenge la, kape TER Una ember ne sha u nan ne, né saa ishe man sha u Una tim ne la; á kar a ven ken tar u ú ze sha u za ngohol u la kera." 
Deuteronomy28:64 TER Una samber a we ken akuraior cii, hii hen ikighir i tar ne zan zan za ar ken ikighir i tar ngila; keela yô, né za civir mbaaôndo mbagenev mba we kua uter ou ne fe ve ga la, ikon man awen." 
Deuteronomy28:65 Ken akuraior la, ú zua a ma mkpeyol ga, ikevnguhar you ia zua pe memen ga; keela TER Una gema Una na u ikarikase ken ishima man ashe a yinan ikôr man ishima i uren;" 
Deuteronomy28:66 uma wou kpaa una lu zenge zenge sha ashe ou; tugh man tetan ú zer cian, ú kera fa uma wou ga;" 
Deuteronomy28:67 pepe yô, ú kaa wer: Iyange ma i shi bee! Iyange ia been yô, ú kaa wer: Ma i lu pepe! Sha ci u mcie u ishima you u ú cie yô, man sha ci u kwagh u a lu u sha ishi, u ashe ou aa nenge yô." 
Deuteronomy28:68 TER Una hide a we ken Igipiti sha utso sha gbenda u m kaa u mer: Mayange ú kera nenge a u ga la; keela né teen ayol a en ner mbaihomov enev ve̱ yam, né lu ikpan i nomso man i ukase kpaa, kpa ma or nana rumun u yamen ne ga." 
Deuteronomy29:1 Angan ka akaaôron a ikuryan i TER kaa Mose er a̱ ya i a Mbaiserael ken tar u Moabi, seer sha ikuryan i A ya a ve hen Horebi la." 
Deuteronomy29:2 Tsô Mose yila Mbaiserael cii, kaa a ve er: Ne ayol a en je, ne nenge akaa cii a TER er a Farao man mbatomov nav cii kua tar na cii sha ashe a en ken tar u Igipiti la;" 
Deuteronomy29:3 ka uzegembaikarenev mba ashe a ou nenge mi, ivande man akaakpilighyol a vesen;" 
Deuteronomy29:4 kpa zan zan hegen TER ngu a na ne ishima i kaven man ashe a nengen man ato a ungwan ga. 
Deuteronomy29:5 Anyom akunduahar M hemen ne ken desereti; akondo a ne lu a mi iyol la, bee iyol ga, ikôvough ki shin nguhar ou kpaa, bee iyol ga." 
Deuteronomy29:6 Ne ya ruam ga, ne ma wain shin kwaghman u taver kpaa ga; sha er ne̱ fa er Mo TER M lu Aôndo wen yô." 
Deuteronomy29:7 Man zum u ne va ar hen ijiir ne kpaa, Shihon tor u Heshebon man Ogo tor u Bashan due va ta num sha vese, kpa se hemba ve;" 
Deuteronomy29:8 se ngohol tar ve, se gema u se na Mbaruben man Mbagadi man vegherkwe u Manase ve ya dyako sha mi." 
Deuteronomy29:9 Yô, waan nen akaaôron a ikuryan ne iko, eren nen sha mi, sha er ne zua a mkpeyol sha tom wen cii yô." 
Deuteronomy29:10 Ne cii ne mba tilen nyian sha ishigh ki TER, Aôndo wen; uityombaiorov enev, man ikwe yen, man mbatamen enev man mbahemenev enev, nomsombaiorov man Iserael cii," 
Deuteronomy29:11 kua mbayev enev mba kiriki man kasev enev man shiror wou u nan lu hen atô u afo ou kua or u nan taven we ikon man or u nan kesen we mngerem kpaa; 
Deuteronomy29:12 sha u u̱ nyôr ken ikuryan i TER, Aôndo wou, man ken mbum Na u TER, Aôndo wou, A bum a we nyian ne;" 
Deuteronomy29:13 sha er Una ver u nyian u̱ hingir ikurior Na, man Una lu Aôndo wou er A kaa u nahan man er A bum a uter ou Aberaham man Isaka man Yakob yô." 
Deuteronomy29:14 Man ka ne tseegh, M ya ikur ne a ven tseegh ga, shi M bum a ven tseegh kpaa ga;" 
Deuteronomy29:15 kpa ka mba ve lu a vese imôngo nyian ne sha ishigh ki TER, Aôndo wase, kua mba ve lu a vese imôngo nyian ne ga kpaa." 
Deuteronomy29:16 Gadia ne fa injamtem i se tema ken tar u Igipiti, man mkar wase u se kar ken atô u akuraior a ne kar ken a ne;" 
Deuteronomy29:17 man ne nenge aeren a ve a ihôngorough kua akombo a ve, a sha ikon man awen man azurfa man zenaria, a a lu her a ve la;" 
Deuteronomy29:18 sha er i̱ de zuan a nomsoor ker a ven shin kwase shin tsombor shin kweior, u ishima ve i gem nyian sha u undun TER, Aôndo wase, yemen za civir mbaaôndo mba akuraior la ga; sha er ma mise u menden umen megh man kwaghyuan u̱ de lu ken a ven ga yô;" 
Deuteronomy29:19 man zum u or la nana ungwa akaaôron a mbum ne yô, nana ver iyol i nan doo doo ken ishima i nan nana kaa er: Me zua a bem shin er m ze sha ishima yam i hemban ato nahan kpaa; nahan nana va a mtim sha kwagh u ndor kua u ombor imôngo cii." 
Deuteronomy29:20 TER Una de nan kwaghbo u nan ga, kpa shighe la iyugh i TER man iwuhe Na ia yughur sha or la, ifan i i nger ken ruamabera ne cii ia lu sha a nan, TER Una ese iti i nan sha won kera." 
Deuteronomy29:21 TER Una dugh nan ken ikwe i Iserael cii, Una ver nan ken ican i bo sha inja i afan a ikuryan a i nger ken ruamabera u tindi ne cii." 
Deuteronomy29:22 Kov u u ve la, ônov enev mba vea mough ken ijime yen la, man or u hen nongo ugen u nan dugh ken tar u icaa kpaa, vea ôr kwagh zum u vea nenge atsan a hen tar la, man angev mbu TER A hee u mbu la;" 
Deuteronomy29:23 er inya i tar la cii kpaa i hingir sulfur man bar sha mnande u i nande u la, i kera lee kwagh sha i ga, man i mende iyiagh kpaa ga, ma kwagh môm kpaa kera mende sha i ga, er mtim u Sodom man Gomora man Adema man Seboim nahan, mba TER tim ve sha ishima i vihin Na man iyugh Na," 
Deuteronomy29:24 nahan akuraior cii aa kaa er: Ka nyi TER A er a tar ne nahana? Inja i iyugh i vihin i i kehe yum ne ka nyi? 
Deuteronomy29:25 Nahan ior vea kaa er: Ka sha ci u ve undu ikuryan i TER, Aôndo u uter vev yô, i A ya a ve, zum u A due a ve ken tar u Igipiti la;" 
Deuteronomy29:26 ve yem ve za civir mbaaôndo mbagenev, ve gure ve civir ve, mbaaôndo mba ve fe ga, man mba A ne ve kpaa ga yô;" 
Deuteronomy29:27 ka nahan man iyugh i TER i kende sha tar ne, A ve u a ifan i i nger ken ruamabera ne cii ye;" 
Deuteronomy29:28 TER wuhe ve ken tar ve kera sha iyugh man ishima i vihin man ishima i nyoon i tsung, A gbihi ve ken tar ugen er i lu nyian nahan." 
Deuteronomy29:29 Akaamyer ka a TER, Aôndo wase, kpa akaa a i pase yô, ka a ase kua a ônov asev gbem sha won cii, sha er ne er sha akaaôron a tindi ne cii yô." 
Deuteronomy30:1 Tsô zum u akaa ne cii aa va tser u, iveren man ifan i m ver u sha ishi ne, man wea umbur a ken akuraior cii, henpe TER, Aôndo wou, A zende u u yem la," 
Deuteronomy30:2 man wea hide hen TER, Aôndo wou, wea ungwa imo Na, sha akaa a m kaa u nyian ne cii, we kua ônov ou, a ishima you cii man a uma wou cii yô," 
Deuteronomy30:3 nahan TER, Aôndo wou, Una gema mlu wou, Una zungwe u mhôônom, Una shi á kohol we ken akuraior cii, henpe TER, Aôndo wou, vande samben we u za lu la." 
Deuteronomy30:4 Shin ior ou mba i sambe ve la, vea lu ken ikighir i Sha je kpaa; keela kpaa TER, Aôndo wou, Una kohol we, keela kpaa Una za tôô u;" 
Deuteronomy30:5 TER, Aôndo wou, Una va a we ken tar u uter ou iyange lu ker la, ú ngohol u kpaa; Una er a we dedoo, Una seer we iyenge je ú hemba uter ou." 
Deuteronomy30:6 TER, Aôndo wou, Una tsôngo ishima you, man ishima i tsombor wou, sha er TER, Aôndo wou, A̱ doo u ishima a ishima you cii man a uma wou cii, sha er u̱ lu uma yô." 
Deuteronomy30:7 TER, Aôndo wou, Una na afan ne cii aa kôr mba ve lu iyongo a we man mba ve ker u ihom ve tev u a ican la." 
Deuteronomy30:8 Kpa we ú shi ú ungwan imo i TER, ú eren sha atindi a Na a m we u nyian ne cii;" 
Deuteronomy30:9 TER, Aôndo wou, Una na u akaadoon wuee, sha tom u ave ou cii man sha tsombor wou man ônov mba uzendenya ou man iyiav mbi hen sule wou kpaa; gadia TER shi Una ember we sha u á kpe ne iyol, er lu ember uter ou nahan," 
Deuteronomy30:10 aluer ú ver ato sha imo i TER, Aôndo wou, ú waan atindi a Na man akaawan a Na a i nger ken ruamabera u tindi ne iko yô, aluer ú gema hen TER, Aôndo wou, a ishima you cii man uma wou cii yô." 
Deuteronomy30:11 Gadia tindi u m we u nyian ne a hemba u agee ga, man ngu ca kpaa ga;" 
Deuteronomy30:12 ngu sha aôndo ga, er ú kaa wer; Ka an nana unde sha aôndo nana va a mi her a vese nana na er sé ungwa un sha er sé waan un iko?" 
Deuteronomy30:13 Shi ngu yande zegemnger kpaa ga, er ú kaa wer: Ka an nana per zegemnger nana za va se a mi, nana na er sé ungwa un sha er sé waan un iko?" 
Deuteronomy30:14 Kpa kwaghôron ngu ikua ikua a we je, ken zwa wou man ken ishima you sha er u̱ er sha mi yô." 
Deuteronomy30:15 Nenge, m ver u uma man mkpeyol, ku man shi kwaghbo sha ishi nyian," 
Deuteronomy30:16 er m lu kaan a we nyian mer: TER, Aôndo wou, A̱ doo u ishima, zenden sha igbenda Na, waan atindi a Na man akaaôron a Na a jirigh iko sha er u̱ lu uma, u̱ seer iyenge; man shi sha er TER, Aôndo wou, Una ver u doo doo ken tar u ú lu nyôron sha u za ngohol u la yô." 
Deuteronomy30:17 Kpa aluer ishima you ia gema, ú kera ver ato ga, i urugh we, ú za civir mbaaôndo mbagenev, ú er ve tom yô," 
Deuteronomy30:18 m pase ne nyian, mimi je né tim kpee; ayange a en aa ngee ken tar u ú per Yordan wer ú nyôr ú za ngohol u la, ga." 
Deuteronomy30:19 M yila Sha man tar, ve̱ lu shiada sha a ven nyian, er m ver uma man ku sha ishigh you, man shi iveren man ifan; yô, tsuwa uma sha er ú lu uma, we a tsombor wou;" 
Deuteronomy30:20 er TER, Aôndo wou, A̱ doo u ishima, u̱ ungwan imo Na, u̱ var a Na, gadia ka uma wou man ayange ou a ngeen je la, sha er u̱ tema ken tar u TER bum a uter ou, Aberaham man Isaka man Yakob, er Una na ve u la." 
Deuteronomy31:1 Tsô Mose za ôr Iserael cii akaa ne. 
Deuteronomy31:2 A kaa a ve er: Nyian ka anyom am deri man ikundu je ne; m kera ngu fan ityô u nyôron man duen ga; TER kpaa kaa a mo er: Peren you Yordan ne ga. 
Deuteronomy31:3 TER, Aôndo wou, ka Un, Una hemen we u peren; Una tim akuraior ne sha ishigh you kera, ú ngohol tar ve; ka Yosua, una hemen we u peren ye, er TER lu kaa yô." 
Deuteronomy31:4 Man TER Una er a ve, er lu er a Shihon man Ogo, utor mba Mbaamor, man tar ve nahan, mba A tim ve la." 
Deuteronomy31:5 TER Una na ve sha ikev yen, er nen a ve sha tindi u m we ne ne cii." 
Deuteronomy31:6 Taver ishima lu icihi, de cie ga, de luun a mciem iyol sha kwagh ve kpaa ga; gadia TER, Aôndo wou, ka Un A ze a we imôngo ye; Una kende u ga, Una undu u kpaa ga." 
Deuteronomy31:7 Tsô Mose yila Yosua, a kaa a na sha ashe a Iserael cii er: Taver ishima, lu icihi, gadia ka we ú yem a ior mban ken tar u TER lu bum a uter vev er Una na ve u la ye; shi ka we kpaa ú na ve vea ngohol u kpaa ye." 
Deuteronomy31:8 Ka TER Una hemen we ye; Una lu a we, Una kende u ga, Una undu u kpaa ga; de cie ga, de luun a mciem iyol kpaa ga." 
Deuteronomy31:9 Tsô Mose nger tindi ne, na un sha ikev i upristi ônov mba Levi, mbatôôn areki u ikuryan i TER, man mbatamen mba Iserael cii." 
Deuteronomy31:10 Mose kaa a ve er: Sha mbee u hanma inyom i ataankarahar, sha shighe u i ver sha inyom i den injô la vough, sha iniongo i atumbe la," 
Deuteronomy31:11 zum u Mbaiserael cii ve kohol sha ishigh ki TER, Aôndo wou, ken ijiir i Una tsuwa la yô, ôr tindi ne sha ishigh ki Iserael cii, sha ato ve." 
Deuteronomy31:12 Kohol ior, nomso man kasev man mbayev mba kiriki kua shiror wou u nan nyer u a nyôr, ve̱ ungwa, ve̱ hen ve̱ cian TER, Aôndo wou, ve̱ waan akaaôron a tindi ne cii iko, ve̱ eren sha mi;" 
Deuteronomy31:13 ônov vev mba ve fe ga kpaa, ve̱ ungwa, ve̱ hen u cian TER, Aôndo wen, sha ayange a né tema ken tar u né lu zan ner né per Yordan né za ngohol u la cii." 
Deuteronomy31:14 Tsô TER kaa a Mose er: Ayange ou a ú kpe, mgbôghom ve; yô, yila Yosua, za nen ken tenti u kohol ker la, Me wa un kwagh. Nahan Mose vea Yosua ve za, ve za tile ken tenti u kohol ker la." 
Deuteronomy31:15 TER ande ken tenti ken ityôgh ki ibeenegh, ityôgh ki ibeenegh tile hen hunda u tenti." 
Deuteronomy31:16 Tsô TER kaa a Mose er: Nenge, yaven you a uter ou imôngo; ior mban vea mough vea er idya sha u dondon mbaaôndo mba hev mba hen tar u ve lu zan sha u vea za tema ken u la, vea gbihim kera vea vihi ikuryan Yam i M ye a ve ne." 
Deuteronomy31:17 Tsô sha iyange la iyugh Yam ia kende sha a ve, Me gbihi ve kera, Me yer ve ishigh Yagh, á omon ve, akaavihin man atsan kpishi aa tser ve; sha iyange la vea kaa er: Kera ka sha ci u Aôndo wase A lu a vese ga, man akaabo ne a tser se nahan ye gaa?" 
Deuteronomy31:18 Mo kpaa Me yer ishigh Yagh kera sha iyange la, sha ci u ifer i ve er la cii, er ve gem ve ze hen mbaaôndo mbagenev yô." 
Deuteronomy31:19 Yô, nger nen icam ne sha ci wen, tese nen ônov mba Iserael i, wa ve i ken zwa sha er icam ne i̱ hingir Mo shiada sha Mbaiserael yô." 
Deuteronomy31:20 Gadia zum u Me va a ve ken tar u M bum a uter vev, tar u dumbur a atumbabua man iyough la, vea yaan, vea iden, vea kehen, nahan vea gema vea za hen mbaaôndo mbagenev vea civir ve, vea laham, vea vihi ikuryan Yam." 
Deuteronomy31:21 Tsô zum u akaavihin kpishi man atsan aa tser ve yô, icam ne ia pase kwagh sha ishigh vegh er ka shiada yô; gadia ia hungul ken zwa u tsombor ve ga, gadia M fa mhen ve u ve lu a mi nyian ne, je er M lu a za a ve ken tar u M bum a ve la ga yô." 
Deuteronomy31:22 Nahan Mose nger icam ne sha iyange la, tese Mbaiserael i." 
Deuteronomy31:23 Tsô A kaa a Yosua wan u Nun er: Taver ishima lu icihi, gadia ka we ú za a Mbaiserael ken tar u M bum a ve la ye; Me lu a we imôngo." 
Deuteronomy31:24 Tsô zum u Mose kure u ngeren akaaôron a tindi ne ken ruamabera been cii yô," 
Deuteronomy31:25 Mose kaa a Mbalevi, mbatôôn areki u ikuryan i TER la er:" 
Deuteronomy31:26 Tôô nen ruamabera u tindi ne, ver nen hen kpe u areki u ikuryan i TER, Aôndo wen, a̱ hingir shiada sha we keregh." 
Deuteronomy31:27 Gadia mo m fa ihembeato you man ikôrnômbon you; nyian er m lu uma a ven imôngo ne kpaa ne mba hendan a TER man gema shighe u me kpe keraa? 
Deuteronomy31:28 Kohol nen mbatamen mba sha ikwe yen cii man mbahemenev enev her a mo, ôr akaa ne sha ato ve je; m yila Sha man tar ve̱ lu shiada sha ve." 
Deuteronomy31:29 Gadia m fa ken ijime i ku wam, né er dang, né undu gbenda u m kaa ne ne; kwaghbo una tser ne sha ayange a masetyô, sha ci u nea er kwaghbo sha ishigh ki TER, sha u bamen Un sha tom u ave a en." 
Deuteronomy31:30 Tsô Mose ôr asember a icam ne sha ato a ior mba Iserael cii zan zan bee. 
Deuteronomy32:1 Ver nen ato ne Usha, me ôr kwagh; tar u̱ ungwa akaaôron a zwa wam." 
Deuteronomy32:2 Ityesen yam i̱ haa er ura nahan; kwaghôron wam a̱ gba er avure nahan, er ura u hamber sha agumatoho nahan, man er ura u nôôn sha ahu nahan."
