Deuteronomy32:3 Gadia me yôô iti i TER. Wuese nen Aôndo wase er A hembe yô. 
Deuteronomy32:4 Ka Vande, tom Na ngu vough; gadia igbenda Na cii, ngi jighilii. Ka Aôndo u jighjigh, ngu a ifer ga, Un ka u perapera man u mimi." 
Deuteronomy32:5 Ve er a Na dang, ve kera mba ônov Nav ga, mba a acôghol iyol; ka kov u bo u lun kpe." 
Deuteronomy32:6 Ka TER je, ne gem ne eren a Na nahan yee; ne ior i geseghee i lun kpe ne! Ka Teru u A gbe u ne ka Un A er u, A maa u ye gaa?" 
Deuteronomy32:7 Umbur ayange a ngise, ver ishima sha anyom a sha ikov ikov la; pine teru, a̱ kaa u, mbatamen ou kpaa, ve̱ ôr u." 
Deuteronomy32:8 Zum u Uhembansha na akuraior a sha won dyako ve la, zum u A pav ônov mba iorov yô, A ver akuraior akighir a ityar ve sha iyenge i ônov mba Iserael." 
Deuteronomy32:9 Gadia kwar u TER ka ior Nav je; Yakob ka kwar u dyako Na. 
Deuteronomy32:10 A zua a na ken tar u desereti, ken taaikôngo u akaa a vaan ker; A kase un, a wa atô, A yisa un, A kura un er wanshe Na yô." 
Deuteronomy32:11 Er iguve ka i mgbegha iya i i, i purugh sha ônov mba i, i samber a akper a i, i ngohol ve, i tôô ve sha akper a i nahan," 
Deuteronomy32:12 ka TER tseegh, A hemen un ye, ma aôndo ugen lu a na imôngo ga." 
Deuteronomy32:13 A er un a unde sha ajiir a taven sha a tar, a ya iyiagh ki ken sule; A er un a suse iyough ken vande man mkurem kpaa ken vande u taver." 
Deuteronomy32:14 Atumbabua a kôrough man atumba a ivo kua ahôm a aniyôngov man anomaiyôngo, anomabua a Bashan, man ivo, kua homon alakema, man awambe a atam a wain kpaa u ma, wain u peghan hugh." 
Deuteronomy32:15 Kpa Yeshurun kehe, a ker apande; u kehe, u gba ikôr, u wa ahôm; tsô a gbihi Aôndo u A er un la, a laha Vande u myom na kpaa." 
Deuteronomy32:16 Ve kpoghol iwuhe Na sha mbaaôndo mbagenev; ka akaa a ihôngorough ve bam Un mi ye. 
Deuteronomy32:17 Ve na ujijingi mba bov mba ve lu Aôndo ga la nagh, mbaaôndo mba ve fe ve ga, mbaaôndo mba hev, mba ve dugh ainge ne, mba uter enev cia ve ga la." 
Deuteronomy32:18 Kpa Vande u u mar u la, u umbur u ga, Aôndo u A mar u la hungul we." 
Deuteronomy32:19 TER nenge, nahan ishima ndôhôr Un a ve, sha ci u ishima vihi Un a ônov Nav mba nomso man mba kasev." 
Deuteronomy32:20 A kaa er: Me yer ve ishigh Yagh, Me nenge er mkur ve Una lu yô; gadia ve ka kov u aren ave, ônov mba lun jighjigh ga." 
Deuteronomy32:21 Ve kpoghol iwuhe Yam sha kwagh u a lu Aôndo ga je, ve bamem sha akaa a ve a gbilinigh. Mo kpaa Me kpoghol iwuhe ve sha mba ve lu ikurior ga je, me bam ve sha ikurior i lanen kwagh." 
Deuteronomy32:22 Gadia i keer usu sha iyugh Yam, ngu yeghen je u ar shin atô u Sheol je; ngu hian tar a iyiagh ki u ngu hian amagh a iwoogh." 
Deuteronomy32:23 Me haa atsan sha ve; Me bee avaan Am sha ve. 
Deuteronomy32:24 Vea vôr ijen man vea saa ishe, sha angev mbu tseeyol, man angev mbu bov kpaa; Me tindi anyi a inyamikume sha ve, man megh ku akaa a a kper a kpela inya." 
Deuteronomy32:25 Ken won yô, sanker una wuan kera, ken ayou yô, mciem maa tan iyol; á tim anyekwaor man iniunkwase, man wanikundan kua ormendenivu kpaa." 
Deuteronomy32:26 Ma M kaa mer: Me fehe ve kera, Me er, ior vea kera umbur ve sha won ga;" 
Deuteronomy32:27 kpa M cia tarnahan u mbaihomov, sha er mbaahendanev vev, ve̱ de luun a mhen u tsumen, ve̱ kaa er: Uwegh asegh kende sha, ka TER A er akaa ne cii ga, ze." 
Deuteronomy32:28 Gadia ve ka ikurior i mhen ve a saa yô, ma mkav u kaven kwagh kpaa ngu ken a ve ga." 
Deuteronomy32:29 Vea lu a kwaghfan yô, ma ve kav kwagh, ma ve hen kwagh u mkur ve!" 
Deuteronomy32:30 Á er nan man or môm nana zenda ior dubu, ior ihiar kpaa vea er ior dubu pue ve a yevese, saa Vande ve ua tee ve, TER kpaa A na ve sha ikev i ior, gaa?" 
Deuteronomy32:31 Gadia vande ve ngu er Vande wase ga, mbaihomov asev ayol a ve je kpaa ve fa nahan." 
Deuteronomy32:32 Gadia kon u wain ve ka kon u wain u Sodom je, u ken ishule i Gomora; atam a wain ve ka atam a bo, asume ve ka a yuan je." 
Deuteronomy32:33 Wain ve ka megh ku iyô i vesen, megh ku boogh ku gbinde." 
Deuteronomy32:34 I ombo un her a Mo, man i senda un ken ayou Am a koson akaa ker gaa?" 
Deuteronomy32:35 Iyevoron ka i Yam man mkimbi kpaa, shighe u nguhar ve ua lyemen yô; gadia iyange i ican i mtim ve kuma ve, akaa a á va tser ve la, aa va fese je." 
Deuteronomy32:36 Gadia TER Una ôr ior Nav ijir sha mimi, mhôônom maa kôr Un a mbayev Nav, zum u Una nenge agee ve aa bee yô, man ma or kera shi ga, u ken uikangen shin u nan tem enger enger kpaa ga." 
Deuteronomy32:37 Tsô Una kaa er: Mbaaôndo vev mba hana, vande u ve sughur sha u la," 
Deuteronomy32:38 mba ve ye ahôm a iniav vev mbi sôngon, man ve ma wain u nagh vegh ku man la? Yô, ve̱ mough, ve̱ wase ne, ve hingir kwaghyisan wen!" 
Deuteronomy32:39 Yô, nenge ka Mo je ne, ma aôndo ugen ngu a Mo imôngo ga; ka M wua, M shi M nder; M gber ivav, M shi M er i de kpaa; ma or môm ngu a tahav mbu nana yima ugen sha ikev Yam ga." 
Deuteronomy32:40 Gadia M kende uwegh agh Sha, M ka mer: Er M lu u uma gbem sha won ne," 
Deuteronomy32:41 aluer Me wua sanker Wam u engem, Me kôr ijirôron i bo ave yô, Me or iyev sha mbaahendanev Av, me kimbi ve mba ve kerem ihom la." 
Deuteronomy32:42 Me er avaan a Am a̱ hunde awambe, sanker Wam kpaa una ya inyam— sha awambe a mba i woo ve man a mbakwarev, sha ityouv mbi meran mbi mbaihomov la." 
Deuteronomy32:43 Ember nen, ne akuraior, a ior Nav imôngo; gadia Una or iyev sha awambe a mbayev Nav, Una or iyev sha mbaahendanev, Una na iwom sha ci u tar Na man ior Nav." 
Deuteronomy32:44 Tsô Mose va, va ôr asember a icam ne cii sha ato a ior, un vea Hosea wan u Nun." 
Deuteronomy32:44 Tsô Mose va, va ôr asember a icam ne cii sha ato a ior, un vea Hosea wan u Nun." 
Deuteronomy32:45 Mose er Iserael cii akaaôron ne cii, been yô," 
Deuteronomy32:46 a kaa a ve er: Ver nen ishima sha akaaôron a m pase ne nyian ne cii; sha er ne wa ônov enev kwagh, ve̱ waan akaaôron a tindi ne cii iko, ve̱ eren sha mi yô." 
Deuteronomy32:47 Gadia á lu ne kwagh u gbilinigh ga, kpa ka uma wen je; ka sha kwagh ne je man á seer ne ayange ken tar u né peren Yordan sha u za ngohol u la ye." 
Deuteronomy32:48 Shi TER ôr kwagh a Mose sha iyange la, kaa er:" 
Deuteronomy32:49 Za za unde sha uwo u Abarim, ka uwo u Nebo u u lu ken tar u Moabi, u u lu sha ishigh ki Yeriko la; yô, nenge tar u Kanaan u M lu nan Mbaiserael sha u ve̱ ya dyako sha u la;" 
Deuteronomy32:50 yô, kpe sha uwo u ú unde la, za kohol ior ou, er Aron anngôu kpaa a kpe sha uwo u Hor man a za kohol ior nav nahan;" 
Deuteronomy32:51 sha ci u ne hembam ato hen atô u Mbaiserael hen mngerem ma Meriba u Kadeshi la, ken desereti u Zin; sha ci u ne tsegham hen atô u Mbaiserael ga yô." 
Deuteronomy32:52 Gadia ú nenge tar la sha ishigh you; kpa we yô, ú kera nyôr ken tar u Me na Mbaiserael la ga." 
Deuteronomy33:1 Ka iveren i Mose or u Aôndo, ver Mbaiserael er a lu a kpe ga la ne;" 
Deuteronomy33:2 a kaa er: TER due hen Senai va, A mough hen Seir, A za her a ve; A ta iwanger sha uwo u Paran, A mough hen uicighanmbaiorov dubu pue; usu lu yeghen sha uwegh Nagh ku yanegh." 
Deuteronomy33:3 Mimi je, ikwe la doo Un ishima; uicighanmbaiorov Nav cii ve mba sha ikev You, ve haa hen angahar a Ou; hanmô ve nan ngohol kwagh sha akaaôron a Ou." 
Deuteronomy33:4 Mose na se atindiakaa, ka dyako u ior i Yakob je la." 
Deuteronomy33:5 TER ya tor ken Yeshurun, zum u utyombaiorov mba ior kohol, ikwe i Iserael cii kohol imôngo la." 
Deuteronomy33:6 Ruben a̱ lu uma, a̱ de kpeen ga; kpa ior nav yô, ve̱ de ngeen ga." 
Deuteronomy33:7 Sha kwagh u Yuda yô, a kaa er: TERE, ungwa imo i Yuda, nyôr a na ken ior nav, a̱ nôngo num sha ave na iyol na je; hingir orwasen un sha mbaahendanev nav." 
Deuteronomy33:8 Sha Levi yô, a kaa er: Tumim Wou man Urim Wou mba a or u i doo U a na la, u U kar un hen Mase la, u U hendan kwagh a na hen mngerem ma Meriba la;" 
Deuteronomy33:9 u a teren ter na man ngô na er: M nenge a ve ga; man a rumun anngôôv nav kpaa ga, ônov nav kpaa a fa ve ga; gadia ve wa kwaghôron Wou iko, ve ver ishima sha ikuryan You kpaa." 
Deuteronomy33:10 Vea tese Yakob akaaôron a Ou a jirigh, vea tese Iserael tindi Wou; Vea ver kwaghhumandoon sha ishigh You, man nagh ku nanden ku jimin sha atse Ou a nanden nagh sha mi la." 
Deuteronomy33:11 TERE ver agee na doo doo, rumun tom u sha ave na; sombo mba ve mough num a na awenge, kua mba ve ker un ihom kpaa, sha er vea kera mough ga yô." 
Deuteronomy33:12 Sha Benyamin yô, a kaa er: Wen u a doo TER ishima la, una tema bem bem a Na; Una shi yisan un didi, man ka ken huwa u avandeaveegh na A tem ye." 
Deuteronomy33:13 Sha Yosev yô, a kaa er: Tar na u̱ lu a iveren i TER sha akaa a injaa a Sha man sha avure, man sha zegemnger u shin atôtaregh," 
Deuteronomy33:14 man sha akaa a injaa a atam a iyange, man sha akaa a injaa a mvese u iwer," 
Deuteronomy33:15 man sha akaa a hemban a utsembaiwoov, man sha akaa a injaa a uicôronmbaagunguv," 
Deuteronomy33:16 man sha akaa a injaa a tar man akaa a a lu ken u, man mdoo u i doo Un u A tem ken ageva la a na la. Iveren i̱ sen sha ityough ki Yosev, sha ihaghtyo i un u i tsegh un, i ver un kposo a anmgbianev nav la." 
Deuteronomy33:17 Nombua na u iunda ngu a mhembe; akor a na ka akorayaregh je; ka sha a je una mgbegha akuraior cii, je á za ar ken aikighir a tar je; ka udubu pue pue mba Eferaim, man udubu mba Manase je la." 
Deuteronomy33:18 Sha Sebulon yô, a kaa er: Ember Sebulon sha mdugh wou, we Isakar kpaa ken utenti ou." 
Deuteronomy33:19 Vea lôhô akuraior er a̱ za sha uwo, vea na iniav mbi perapera sha her; gadia vea suse akaa a zegemnger a a dumbur la, man inyaregh ki ken myer ki waarawa kpaa." 
Deuteronomy33:20 Sha Gadi yô, a kaa er: I̱ wuese Un u A gbanger Gadi la; a uve er ngôbegha nahan, a ande uwegh kua ihaghtyo je kpaa." 
Deuteronomy33:21 Kwar u hiihii a tsuwa sha ci na iyol na, gadia i tsegha kwar u orjir keela; a va kohol uityombaiorov, a er perapera u TER, kua akaaôron a Na a jirigh a Iserael imôngo." 
Deuteronomy33:22 Sha Dan yô, a kaa er: Dan ka wanbegha, u tsuwen duen ken Bashan je." 
Deuteronomy33:23 Sha Nafetali yô, a kaa er: Nafetali ide sha mkpeyol, iv a iveren i TER, ngohol zegemnger man imbusutarimese." 
Deuteronomy33:24 Sha Asher yô, a kaa er: Sha won cii, i hemba veren Asher doo doo; a̱ lu or u hemban doon anngôôv nav ishima; a̱ civ nguhar na shin mkure." 
Deuteronomy33:25 Uishindan ou ve̱ lu iyôv man togula je; er ayange a ou a lu nahan, kape agee ou kpaa a̱ lu la." 
Deuteronomy33:26 Mô môm ngu er Aôndo ga, we Yeshurun, A zenden sha Usha, sha u wasen we, man sha kwavaôndo kpaa sha mhembe Na." 
Deuteronomy33:27 Aôndo u tsôron ka ijiir you i teman, vegher u shin yô, ave a tsôron nga. A zenda orihom sha ishigh you kera, A kaa er: Tim." 
Deuteronomy33:28 Nahan Iserael tema bem bem. Imbor i Yakob tema kposo, ken tar u alakema man wain; a er, Usha nav mba nôndon avure." 
Deuteronomy33:29 Saan we iyol Iserael, ka an nan lu er we nahan? ikurior i TER A yem i perutya u iwasen you, man sanker u mhembe wou; mbaihomov ou vea var u inya, we, ú ndyar sha ajiir a ve a taven." 
Deuteronomy34:1 Tsô Mose mough hen ukpuunkpuun mba Moabi unde sha uwo u Nebo sha ityough ki Pisega, u a lu sha ishigh ki Yeriko la. TER tese un tar la cii, hii hen Gileadi zan zan ar hen Dan," 
Deuteronomy34:2 man Nafetali cii man tar u Eferaim kua Manase kua tar u Yuda cii, zan zan za ar shin zegemnger u shin ityôtar la;" 
Deuteronomy34:3 man imbusutariyan la, kua kpuun kpuun u pev u Yeriko, gar u avilegh la, zan zan za ar hen Soar." 
Deuteronomy34:4 TER kaa a na er: Ungun ka tar u M bum a Aberaham man Isaka man Yakob Mer: Me na tsombor wou u je ne; M tese u, u nenge u sha ashe ou, kpa ú per ú nyôr ker u ga." 
Deuteronomy34:5 Tsô Mose wanakiriki u TER kpe her ken tar u Moabi sha imo i TER. 
Deuteronomy34:6 A ii un shin pev la, ken tar u Moabi sha ishigh ki Bete-peor; zan zan nyian, ma or fa uwar na ga." 
Deuteronomy34:7 Mose tsa anyom deri man ikundu zum u a kpe la; ishe na wa ime ga, agee a iyolough na kpaa hide ijime ga." 
Deuteronomy34:8 Mbaiserael vaa Mose hen ukpuunkpuun mba Moabi ayange ikundugber; tsô ayange a vaan ku u Mose la bee. 
Deuteronomy34:9 Tsô Yosua wan u Nun iv a jijingi u mfe, gadia Mose vande pendan un ave sha ityo; Mbaiserael ver ato sha a na, ve er er TER kaa Mose nahan." 
Deuteronomy34:10 Ma profeti ugen kera mough ken Iserael er Mose, u TER fa un ishigh a ishigh nahan ga," 
Deuteronomy34:11 sha uivande cii man akaakpilighyol a TER tindi un sha u eren a ken tar u Igipiti a Farao man mbayev nav cii," 
Deuteronomy34:12 man sha uwegh ku ageegh cii, kua akaacieryol a Mose er sha ishigh ki Iserael la cii." 
Joshua1:1 Tsô Mose wanakiriki u TER kpe kera yô, TER ôr kwagh a Yosua wan u Nun, ortom u Mose, A kaa er:" 
Joshua1:2 Wanakiriki Wam Mose kpe; yô, mough hegen, we man ior ne cii, per Yordan ne, yem nen ken tar u M lu nan ve la, ka ve Mbaiserael." 
Joshua1:3 Hanma ijiir i ikevnguhar you ia ndyar sha mi M na ne i er iyange M kaa Mose nahan. 
Joshua1:4 Hii hen ikôngough kin man Lebanon ne, zan zan ar hen zegeifi u Uferati, tar u Mbahiti cii zan zan ar hen zegemnger vegher u iyange i mir la, á lu ikighirtar yen." 
Joshua1:5 Ma or nana fatyô u tilen sha ishigh you sha ayange a u lu uma ne ga; er M lu a Mose nahan, kape we kpaa Me lu a we la; Me kende u ga, Me undu u kpaa ga." 
Joshua1:6 Lu taveraa, taver ishima; gadia ú na ior mban vea ya dyako u tar u M bum a uter vev Mer, Me na ve la." 
Joshua1:7 Gba lun taveraa tsô, taver ishima tsung, sha u veren ishima u wan atindi cii iko a Mose wanakiriki Wam kaa u yô; de undun a, kahan ken iyan shin ken imese ga, sha er ú er kwagh sha inja henpe ú za cii yô." 
Joshua1:8 Ruamabera u atindigh ne a̱ de karen sha zwa wou kera ga, kpa zer timen kimi tugh man atetan, sha er ú ver ishima u eren akaa a i nger kimi cii; gadia ka nahan man ikôr ia lagh u sha akaa cii, shi ka nahan man ú er kwagh sha inja kpaa ye." 
Joshua1:9 M vande kaan we gaa? Lu taveraa, taver ishima; de cie ga; de luun a mciem iyol ga; gadia TER, Aôndo wou, ngu a we henpe ú za cii." 
Joshua1:10 Tsô Yosua kaa a mbavesen er: 
Joshua1:11 Nyôr nen hen atôafogh, kaa nen ior ner: Er nen kwaghyan, gadia shi ayange atar, né per Yordan ne, né nyôr, né ngohol tar u TER, Aôndo wen, A ne ne er ne̱ ngohol u la." 
Joshua1:12 Yosua shi ôr kwagh a Mbaruben man Mbagadi kua vegherkwe u Manase, a kaa er:" 
Joshua1:13 Umbur nen kwaghôron u Mose wanakiriki u Aôndo lu kaan ne er: TER, Aôndo wen, Una na ne mmem, Una na ne tar ne." 
Joshua1:14 Kasev enev man ônov enev mba kiriki, kua ilev yenev, ve̱ lu ken tar u Mose a ne ne yande Yordan ne, kpa ne yô, per, hemen nen anmgbianev enev, kange nen iyol i utya, ne anomaior a fan ityav cii, za wase nen ve;" 
Joshua1:15 zan zan TER Una na anmgbianev enev mmem er A ne ne nahan, man ve kpaa ve̱ ngohol tar u TER, Aôndo wen, A lu nan ve la; tsô né hide né va ken tar wen u Mose, wanakiriki u TER, lu na ne yande Yordan vegher u iyange i dugh la." 
Joshua1:16 Tsô ve gema ve kaa a Yosua er: Kwagh u u kaa se cii, sé er, henpe u tindi se cii kpaa, sé za." 
Joshua1:17 Er iyange se ver ato sha Mose sha akaa cii nahan, kape we kpaa sé ver ato sha a we la; TER, Aôndo wou, A̱ gba lun a we tsô, er yan lu a Mose nahan." 
Joshua1:18 Hanma or u nan nyiman imo you, man nan ver ato sha akaaôron a ou, a u kaa nan cii la ga yô, i̱ wua nan; gba lun dông tsô, taver ishima." 
Joshua2:1 Tsô Yosua wan u Nun tindi mbamkerev ior ihiar myer, ve mough hen Shitim, a kaa a ve er: Za za nenge nen tar la kua Yeriko. Tsô ve za nyôr hen ya u idyakwase, iti na er Rahabi, ve tsa her." 
Joshua2:2 I kaa tor u Yeriko er: Nenge nyian tugh ior i Mbaiserael va heen, sha u va nengen tar ne mker." 
Joshua2:3 Nahan tor u Yeriko tindi loho hen Rahabi, kaa er: Due a nomsombaiorov mba ve ve hen we, mba ve nyer hen ya wou la, gadia ve va sha u va nengen tar ne cii mker." 
Joshua2:4 Tsô kwase la kua a ior mba uhar mbala yer ve, gema kaa er: Een, nomsombaiorov mbala va her a mo, kpa m fa henpe ve dugh man ve ve heen ga;" 
Joshua2:5 man shighe u wuhen hunda, shighe u ime i we la, nomso mbala due; m fa pe ve ze ga; yô, zenda nen ve ijime fefa, tsô né kohol ve." 
Joshua2:6 Kpa un unde a ve sha haav mbu iyoughouv, a yer ve sha azenga a ada a a tar sha uha la." 
Joshua2:7 Ior mbala zenda ve ijime sha gbenda u zan shin Yordan zan zan ar shin ahongo; mbazendan ve ijime mbala mba dugh kera yô, maa ve wuhe hunda u gar." 
Joshua2:8 Er ve lu a yav ga la, a unde sha uha a za hen ve;" 
Joshua2:9 a kaa a nomsombaiorov mbala er: M fa TER na ne tar ne, ne cier se iyol, ior mba ve tem hen tar ne ci ca, mba gbidyen ikarikase iyol sha ci u cian ne." 
Joshua2:10 Gadia se ungwa er TER tôndo Zegemnger u Nyian sha ishigh yenegh, zum u ne due ken Igipiti la; man kwagh u ne er utor mba uhar mba Mbaamor, mba ve lu yande Yordan la, Shihon kua Ogo, mba ne tim purututu la." 
Joshua2:11 Er se ungwa gwa la nahan, asema shoughom se ker, ma or kera lu a ishima i tyaver ga sha ci wen; gadia TER, Aôndo wen, ka Aôndo u Sha man u shin tar kpaa." 
Joshua2:12 Yô, shi bum nen a mo sha ishigh ki TER er mo m er a ven dedoo nahan, ne kpaa né er a ya u terem dedoo; nam nen ikav i mimi," 
Joshua2:13 er né de terem uma man ngôm kua anngôôv av mba nomso man mba kasev kua akaa a ve lu a mi cii, né yima uuma asev sha ku." 
Joshua2:14 Nomsombaiorov mbala kaa a na er: Se gema uma wase je se na sha ci u u wou, aluer wea pase kwagh wase ne ga yô; zum u TER Una na se tar ne yô, sé va er a we dedoo man sha mimi kpaa." 
Joshua2:15 Tsô a ta ve kor a sen a ve hen ihura, gadia ya lu sha gilgar; ka sha gir a tema ya ye." 
Joshua2:16 Man a kaa a ve er: Za nen hen uwo la, sha er mbazendan ne ijime vea zua a ven ga yô; yer nen her ayange atar, zan zan mbazendan ne ijime ve̱ hide, man né mase kôron gbenda ave ye." 
Joshua2:17 Tsô nomsombaiorov mbala kaa a na er: Lun yase a ishô sha mbum u u ne se, se bum a we ne," 
Joshua2:18 nenge, shighen u sé va hen tar ne yô, zer kor u mou u nyian ne ken ihura i u dugh a vese ne; man shi kohol teru man ngôu man anngôôv ou man ior mba teru cii ken ya wou." 
Joshua2:19 Nahan, aluer ma or nana due hen hunda u ya wou kera yô, ibo i awambe a nan ia lu sha ityough ki nan, se yô, sé lu a ishô; kpa ma or u nana lu ken ya wou a we imôngo yô, ibo i awambe a nan ia lu sha ityough yasegh, aluer mô wase nana bende nan ave yô." 
Joshua2:20 Kpa aluer u pase kwagh wase ne yô, sé lu a ishô sha mbum u u ne se, se bum a we ne." 
Joshua2:21 Tsô a kaa er: Kwagh u ne kaa ne, ka sha mi. Nahan a na ve gbenda ve due; a zer kor u nyian sha ihura la." 
Joshua2:22 Ve yem ve za ar hen uwo la, ve tsa her ayange atar, zan zan mbazendan ve ijime mbala hide; mbazendan ve ijime mbala ker ve wue wue sha gbenda cii, kpa ve zua a ve ga." 
Joshua2:23 Tsô nomsombaiorov mba uhar mbala gba hiden, ve hungwa sha uwo la, ve per, ve va hen Yosua wan u Nun, ve va ôr un akaa a a er ve cii." 
Joshua2:24 Ve kaa a Yosua er: Mimi je, TER na tar la cii sha ikev yase, mba ve tem ken tar la mba gbidyen ikarikase iyol sha ci u cian se." 
Joshua3:1 Tsô Yosua nder pepe pepe, nahan un man ônov mba Iserael cii, ve mough hen Shitim ve va haa hen Yordan; ve hire ve tsa her man ve per ye." 
Joshua3:2 Tsô ayange atar nga kar yô, mbavesen zende ken afo," 
Joshua3:3 ve kaa ior er: Zum u né nenge areki u ikuryan u TER, Aôndo wen, man Mbalevi mba ve lu upristi mba ve tee un la yô, mough nen hen ijiir i ne hee ne, dondo nen sha mi." 
Joshua3:4 Kpa na nen ian hen atô wen a na, i̱ kuma aseva dubu uhar nahan; de mgbôghom nen a na ga, sha u ne̱ fa gbenda u né ze sha mi yô; gadia ne mba a vande karen hen gbenda ne ga." 
Joshua3:5 Tsô Yosua kaa a ior er: Tsegha nen ayol a en; gadia kper TER Una er akaakpilighyol hen atô wen. 
Joshua3:6 Shi Yosua ôr kwagh a upristi, kaa er: Tôô nen areki u ikuryan, hemen nen ior, per nen. Tsô ve tôô areki u ikuryan ve hemen ior." 
Joshua3:7 TER kaa a Yosua er: Nyian Me hii u kenden we sha, sha ishigh ki Mbaiserael cii, sha er ve̱ fa, er M lu a Mose nahan, kape we kpaa Me luun a we la." 
Joshua3:8 Yô, kaa upristi mbatôôn areki u ikuryan la, wer: zum u né va hen kpemnger u Yordan yô, gba tilen nen shin Yordan tsô." 
Joshua3:9 Tsô Yosua kaa a Mbaiserael er: Va, va ungwa nen akaaôron a TER, Aôndo wen." 
Joshua3:10 Shi Yosua kaa er: Ka sha kwagh ne man né fa er Aôndo u uma A lu a ven ye, man Una zenda Mbakanaan man Mbahiti man Mbahivi man Mbaperishi man Mbagirgashi man Mbaamor kua Mbayebushi sha ishigh yenegh kera, mimi je." 
Joshua3:11 Nenge, areki u ikuryan u TER u tar cii ngu karen sha ishigh yenegh hungwan shin Yordan." 
Joshua3:12 Nahan tsuwa nen ior pue kar uhar ken ikwe i Iserael, hanma kwe, or môm." 
Joshua3:13 Tsô shighe u akevangahar a upristi mba ve tee areki u TER, TER u tar cii, aa tile shin mngerem ma Yordan yô, á tôndo mngerem ma Yordan ma senen mara, maa tile er kpekpe nahan." 
Joshua3:14 Tsô zum u ior mough hen utenti vev sha u vea per Yordan, er upristi mba ve tee areki u ikuryan lu hemen ior gbenda yô," 
Joshua3:15 zum u mba ve tee areki, ve ar hen Yordan, man angahar a upristi mba ve tee areki mire shin kpemnger yô, gadia shighe u sunda cii, Yordan ka a sar avenge," 
Joshua3:16 tsô mngerem ma senen mara tile ijiir i môm, mor yem ca je hen Adam, gar u lu hen kpe Saretan la; mngerem ma senen shin zegemnger u Araba la, ka Zegemnger u Bar je la, i tôndo ma wang; nahan ior per sha ishigh ki Yeriko jighilii." 
Joshua3:17 Upristi mba ve tee areki u ikuryan u TER, tile dông sha tareghnyaagh shin atô u Yordan, tsô Mbaiserael cii per sha tareghnyaagh zan zan ior cii per Yordan bee ca ca." 
Joshua4:1 Tsô zum u ior cii per Yordan bee ca ca yô, TER ôr kwagh a Yosua, kaa er:" 
Joshua4:2 Tsuwa ior pue kar uhar ken ior, hanma kwe or môm," 
Joshua4:3 kaa ve wer: Tôô nen awen pue kar ahar heen, hen atô u Yordan, henpe angahar a upristi a til dông la, per nen a mi, za ver nen a hen ijiir i né za tsa tugh mbu nyian ne." 
Joshua4:4 Tsô Yosua yila mbapue-kar-uhar mba a tsuwa ken Mbaiserael mbala, ken hanma kwe lu or môm;" 
Joshua4:5 Yosua kaa a ve er: Kar nen sha hemen u areki u TER, Aôndo wen, hungwa nen shin atô u Yordan; yô, hanmô nana̱ tôô iwen i môm sha vandegh ku nan, sha iyenge i ikwe i Mbaiserael vough," 
Joshua4:6 sha er i̱ hingir ne ikav yô. Aluer iyange igen ônov enev vea pine ne er: Inja i awen ne yô, ka nyi?" 
Joshua4:7 Tsô né kaa a ve ner: Ka sha ci u i tôndo mngerem ma Yordan sha ishigh ki areki u ikuryan u TER; zum u a per Yordan la, i tôndo mngerem ma Yordan; awen ne kpaa aa hingir Mbaiserael ikav i umbur gbem sha won." 
Joshua4:8 Tsô Mbaiserael er kwagh u Yosua kaa ve la, ve tôô awen pue kar ahar her atô u Yordan er TER kaa Yosua nahan, sha iyenge i ikwe i Mbaiserael la vough, ve yem a mi hen ijiir i ve za tsa la, ve za ver her." 
Joshua4:9 Yosua kpaa ver awen pue kar ahar her atô u Yordan hen ijiir i angahar a upristi mba ve tôô areki u ikuryan tile la; nga her zan zan nyian. 
Joshua4:10 Gadia upristi mba ve tôô areki la, ve tile her atô u Yordan zan zan i kure kwagh u TER kaa a Yosua er a̱ ôr ior la cii, sha kwagh u Mose kaa Yosua sha mi cii la; ior kpaa per fefa." 
Joshua4:11 Tsô zum u ior cii per ca ca yô, areki u TER kpaa per, kua upristi kpaa, sha ashe a ior cii." 
Joshua4:12 Ônov mba Ruben, man ônov mba Gadi kua vegherkwe u Manase kpaa, ve per, ve hemen Mbaiserael a ikav mbi utyav ave, er Mose lu kaa ve nahan;" 
Joshua4:13 ior kuma er dubu akunduahar nahan; mba ve wa ago iyol sha utya yô, ve per sha ishigh ki TER sha u zan ityav, ve ver ishigh sha ajiir a kpuun kpuun a Yeriko." 
Joshua4:14 Sha iyange la TER kende Yosua sha, sha ishigh ki Iserael cii, nahan ve cia un sha ayange a un lu uma cii, er lu ve cia Mose nahan." 
Joshua4:15 Tsô TER ôr kwagh a Yosua, kaa er:" 
Joshua4:16 Kaa upristi mba ve tee areki u shiada la, ve̱ due shin Yordan sha." 
Joshua4:17 Tsô Yosua na upristi zwa, kaa er: Due nen shin Yordan sha nahan." 
Joshua4:18 Tsô zum u upristi mba ve tee areki u ikuryan u TER la due shin Yordan sha, mba pende akevangahar sha tar yô, mngerem ma Yordan hide zua her, ma sar avenge er ma vande lun nahan." 
Joshua4:19 Ior due shin Yordan sha uwer u hiihii ayange a u pue la, ve za haa afo hen Gilgal sha ikighir i Yeriko, vegher u sha ityoughkitaregh la." 
Joshua4:20 Awen a pue kar ahar a ve tôô shin Yordan la, Yosua tim a hen Gilgal." 
Joshua4:21 A ôr kwagh a Mbaiserael, a kaa er: Sha ayange a ken hemen zum u ônov enev vea pine uter vev, er: Inja i awen ne yô, ka nyi?" 
Joshua4:22 Yô, pase nen ônov enev, kaa nen ner: Iserael per Yordan ne sha tareghnyaagh." 
Joshua4:23 Gadia TER, Aôndo wen, tôndo mngerem ma Yordan sha ishigh yenegh, ne per, er TER, Aôndo wen, lu er a Zegemnger u Nyian u A tôndo un sha ishigh yasegh se per la nahan;" 
Joshua4:24 sha er akuraior a sha won cii a̱ fa uwegh ku TER ka ku ageegh je, man sha er ne̱ cian TER Aôndo wen gbem." 
Joshua5:1 Tsô zum u utor mba Mbaamor cii mba ve lu yande Yordan, vegher u shin ityôtar la, kua utor mba Mbakanaan cii mba ve lu hen kpe u Zegemnger la, ve ungwa gwa u TER tôndo mngerem ma Yordan sha ishigh ki Mbaiserael zan zan se per yô, ishima shoughom ve ker, ma ishima i taver kera lu ker a ve ga, sha ci u Mbaiserael." 
Joshua5:2 Hen shighe la je, TER kaa a Yosua er: Er ahô sha awen, shi tsôngo Mbaiserael mtsenge u sha kwa har." 
Joshua5:3 Tsô Yosua er ahô sha awen, tsôngo Mbaiserael sha Igungu u Mbaipusu." 
Joshua5:4 Er i hii man Yosua tsôngo ve yô, ior mba ve due ken Igipiti cii mbanomso mba ve lu mbanôngontyav la cii, ve kpe sha gbenda ken toho ken ijime i ve due ken Igipiti la." 
Joshua5:5 Gadia i tsôngo ior mba ve due la cii, kpa mba i mar ve sha gbenda ken toho cii ken ijime i ve due ken Igipiti la yô, i tsôngo ve ga." 
Joshua5:6 Gadia Mbaiserael zende ken toho anyom akunduahar zan zan ior cii, ka nomso mbanôngontyav mba ve due ken Igipiti je la, ve saa kera, sha ci u ve ungwa imo i TER ga yô; TER kpaa bum a ve er, Una de ve, ve̱ nenge tar u TER lu bum a uter vev, er Una na se la, ga, tar u dumbur a atumbabua man iyough la." 
Joshua5:7 Ônov vev mba A ver ve sha ityouv vev yô, ka ve, Yosua tsôngo ve ye; gadia ve lu ipusu, sha ci u i tsôngo ve sha gbenda ga yô." 
Joshua5:8 Tsô zum u i bee ior mba i lu tsôngon ve la cii yô, ve tema hen ajiir a ve ken afo zan zan icôngo i bee." 
Joshua5:9 Tsô TER kaa a Yosua er: Nyian M pahar ityuhwanev mbi Igipiti sha a ven kera ve. Ka nahan man i yer ijiir la iti er, Gilgal zan zan nyian ye." 
Joshua5:10 Tsô Mbaiserael haa afo hen Gilgal, ve er iniongo i Paseka sha uwer la, ayange a u pue kar anyiin aikighe, hen ukpuunkpuun mba Yeriko." 
Joshua5:11 Paseka been kera, sev mbu aven yô, sha iyange la je ve ya kwaghyan u hen tar la, umasa mba i we kwa sha mi ga yô, kua alakema u mgbaghen." 
Joshua5:12 Er ve ya kwaghyan u tar la kera, kper nan yô, mana de u haan; Mbaiserael shi kera zua a mana mayange ga, kpa ve ya kwaghyan u ken tar u Kanaan ken inyom la." 
Joshua5:13 Tso zum u Yosua lu hen Yeriko la yô, a kende ashe, a nenge or tile un sha ishi, nan tsuwa sanker nan kôr sha uwe; nahan Yosua za her a nan, za pine nan er: U ngu or wase shinii, u ngu or u mbaihomov aseva?" 
Joshua5:14 Nan kaa er: Ei! Mo M ngu kur u ikumutya i TER; M va hegen. Tsô Yosua gure wa ityough inya, a sugh, a kaa a Nan er: Ka nyi i lu ter pe kaan wanakiriki Naa?" 
Joshua5:15 Kur u ikumutya i TER kaa a Yosua er: Tsuwa akôv shin angahar a ou kera, gadia ijiir i u til ne, ka icighanjiir. Tsô Yosua er nahan." 
Joshua6:1 Yô, Yeriko wuhe ihinda gbong gbong sha ci u Mbaiserael; ma or due ga, ma or nyôr kpaa ga." 
Joshua6:2 TER kaa a Yosua er: Nenge, M na Yeriko a tor na kua anomaior a utya a na sha ikev you." 
Joshua6:3 Ningir nen gar la, mbautyav cii; ningir nen gar kwa môm; er nen nahan ayange ataratar." 
Joshua6:4 Upristi utaankaruhar ve̱ tôô ikor i iyôngo i tôngon, ve̱ kar a mi sha hemen u areki; sha iyange i sha utaankaruhar la, ningir nen gar kwa taankaruhar, upristi mbala ve̱ tôngo ikor la." 
Joshua6:5 Tsô zum u vea tôngo ikoriyôngo tuee yô, man zum u né ungwa imo a ikor i tôngon yô, ior cii ve̱ genger imo, ve̱ gbidye ivaa taver taver, tsô gilgar una yôhôl, ior cii ve̱ nyôr hanma or nana̱ nyôr sha ishigh ki nan jighilii." 
Joshua6:6 Tsô Yosua, wan u Nun, yila upristi, kaa a ve er: Tôô nen areki u ikuryan, upristi utaankaruhar ve̱ tôô ikoriyôngo itiankarihiar, ve̱ hemen areki u TER." 
Joshua6:7 Shi a kaa ior er: Kar ningir nen gar, mbautyav ve̱ kar ve̱ hemen areki u TER." 
Joshua6:8 Tsô, shighe u Yosua ôr kwagh a ior yô, upristi utaankaruhar mba ve tôô ikoriyôngo sha ishigh ki TER la, ve kar sha hemen, ve tôngo ikor la, areki u ikuryan u TER dondo sha a ve." 
Joshua6:9 Mbautyav hemen upristi mba ve tôngo ikor la, mba ken ijime la dondo sha areki, upristi lu tôngon ikor zan." 
Joshua6:10 Tsô Yosua wa ior kwagh kaa er: De gbir nen ivaa ga, i̱ de ongo imo yen ga, ma kwaghôron kpaa a̱ de dugh ken zwa wen ga, saa iyange i me kaa a ven mer: Gbire nen ivaa la, man né gbire ivaa ye." 
Joshua6:11 Tsô a na areki u TER ningir gar, a ningir kwa môm; tsô ve hide her afo, ve tsa her afo." 
Joshua6:12 Nahan Yosua mough pepe pepe, upristi kpaa tôô areki u TER." 
Joshua6:13 Upristi utaankaruhar mba ve tôô ikoriyôngo itiankarihiar ve hemen areki u TER la, ve lu tôngon ikor zan; mbautyav hemen; mba ken ijime dondo sha areki u TER, upristi lu tôngon ikor zan." 
Joshua6:14 Sha iyange i sha uhar la kpaa, ve ningir gar kwa môm man ve hide her afo ye; kape ve eren nahan zan zan ayange ataratar." 
Joshua6:15 Tsô, sha iyange i sha utaankaruhar la, ve mough dindee dindee, ve ningir gar er ve vande eren nahan kwa taankaruhar; ka sha iyange la tseegh ve ningir gar kwa taankaruhar ye." 
Joshua6:16 Tsô ka kom kwa taankaruhar, upristi mba ngur tôngo ikor la yô, Yosua kaa a ior er: Gbire nen ase ivaa, gadia TER na ne gar ne ve." 
Joshua6:17 Kpa gar ne yô, á tsegha un sha ci u TER, a akaa a lu kimi cii; saa Rahabi idyakwase ne tseegh, una lu uma ye, un kua mba ve lu a na ken ya cii, gadia un yer mbatyomov mba se tindi la." 
Joshua6:18 Ne kpaa kura nen iyol sha kwagh u i te icin sha mi la, i̱ de kera lu u zum u né tsegha un yô, né gema né tôô kwagh sha akaa a i te icin sha mi la ga; sha kwagh ne nea gema afo a Iserael aa hingir a ifan iyol, man né er a ican kpaa." 
Joshua6:19 Kpa azurfa man zenaria kua ikav mbi togula man mbi iyôôv cii, ka uicighanmbaakaav mba TER, á wa mbi sha inyaregh ki TER." 
Joshua6:20 Tsô ior gbire ivaa, i tôngo ikor kpaa; zum u ior ungwa ikor la yô, ve gbire ivaa taver taver, gilgar yôhôl cii, haa inya; nahan ior nyôr ken gar, hanma or sha ishigh ki nan jighilii, ve ngohol gar la." 
Joshua6:21 Ve tim akaa a ken gar la sha zwa u sanker ca ca, nomso kua kasev, man mbayev kua ior mba been iyol, man ibua man iyôngo kua ujaki." 
Joshua6:22 Tsô Yosua kaa a ior mba uhar mba ve nenge tar la mker er: Nyôr nen hen ya u idyakwase la, due nen a na kua mba ve lu mba nav cii, sha mbum u lu ne bum a na la." 
Joshua6:23 Tsô mbayevikaior, mbamkerev mbala, ve nyôr ve due a Rahabi kua ter na man ngô na man anngôôv nav kua akaa a na cii; ve due a ior nav cii, ve va ver ken akôngoafogh a Iserael." 
Joshua6:24 Ve nande gar kua akaa a lu kimi cii sha usu, saa azurfa man zenaria man ikav mbi togula kua mbi iyôôv tseegh, ve wa sha inyaregh ki ken iyou i TER ye." 
Joshua6:25 Kpa Rahabi idyakwase la a ior mba ter na, kua akaa a na cii yô, Yosua de ve uma; un maa tema ken Iserael zan zan nyian, sha ci u a yer mbatyomov mba Yosua tindi sha u nengen Yeriko mker la." 
Joshua6:26 Tsô Yosua ta ve icin sha mbum hen shighe la, a kaa er: Or u nana mough, sha u maan gar u Yeriko ne yô, ifan ia kôr nan sha ishigh ki TER. Ka sha ku u waniunda u nan je nana tim imagh nagh ye, shi ka sha ku u wan u nan u masetyô nana wa ihinda na ye." 
Joshua6:27 Kape TER lu a Yosua la; gwa na samber ken tar la cii. 
Joshua7:1 Kpa Mbaiserael per tindi sha kwagh u i te icin sha mi la; gadia Akan wan u Karmi, wan u Sabedi, wan u Sera u ken kwe u Yuda, a tôô kwagh sha akaa a i te icin sha mi la; nahan ishima vihi TER a Mbaiserael tsung." 
Joshua7:2 Tsô Yosua tindi ior due hen Yeriko za hen Ai, u a lu ikua ikua a Bete-aven, vegher u Betel u sha ityoughkitaregh la, a kaa a ve er: Kôndo, za nenge nen tar la mker; tsô ior mbala kôndo za nenge Ai mker." 
Joshua7:3 Tsô ve hide hen Yosua ve va kaa a na er: Ior ve̱ de kende cii ga; ior er dubu uhar shin utar nahan tsô, ve̱ kôndo ve̱ za hemba Ai; de eren ior ican u zan ker cii ga, gadia mba kpeghee tsô." 
Joshua7:4 Nahan ior mbagenev kuma er dubu utar nahan, ve kôndo sha mi; kpa ve za yevese Mba-Ai." 
Joshua7:5 Ior mba Ai wua ve kuma er ikundugber kar ataratar nahan; ve zenda ve, hii hen hundagar je zan zan ar hen Sebarim, ve hemba ve sha soughsough la; asema shoughom ior ker, hingir er mngerem nahan." 
Joshua7:6 Tsô Yosua ande akondo a na, gba inya kuma ishigh inya hen areki u TER, lu her zan zan aikighe je, un kua mbatamen mba Iserael, ve kura inya ve haa sha ityouv vev kpaa." 
Joshua7:7 Yosua kaa er: Kpe ahii! Tere AÔNDO, ka nyi man U rumun ior mban ve̱ per Yordan kpee, sha u nan se sha ikev i Mbaamor sha er ve̱ tim se? Guda ma se gbe lun yande Yordan keela tsô!" 
Joshua7:8 Ku! Tere! me kaa nana er Iserael vande nan ijime hen mbaihomov veve? 
Joshua7:9 Gadia Mbakanaan man mba ve tem ken tar ne cii vea ungwa gwa yô, vea va kase se, vea ese iti yase sha won kera; tsô Ú er nan a Iti You i hembana?" 
Joshua7:10 Tsô TER kaa a Yosua er: Mough sha, ka nyi u yav u cir ishigh inya nahana?" 
Joshua7:11 Iserael er isholibo; een, ve aver ikuryan Yam je, i M ye a ve la; een, ve tôô kwagh sha akaa a i te icin sha mi la; iv kpaa ve ii, icugh kpaa ve tsugh man ve ver un ken ikav vev je." 
Joshua7:12 Ka nahan man ônov mba Iserael ve fetyô u tilen sha ishigh ki mbaihomov vev ga ye, mba nan ijime ve ken mbaihomov vev, gadia ve hingir mba lun a ifan iyol; Me kera lu a ven mayange ga, saa né dugh kwagh u i te icin sha mi la, her a ven kera." 
Joshua7:13 Mough za wanger ior, kaa wer: Wanger nen ayol a en sha ci u kper; gadia TER, Aôndo u Iserael, kaa er: Kwagh u i te icin sha mi ngu her a ven, Iserael; ú fatyô u tilen sha ishigh ki Mbaihomov ou ga, saa né dugh kwagh u i te icin sha mi la ken a ven kera ve." 
Joshua7:14 Nahan pepe yô, va nen sha ikwe sha ikwe; yô, kwe u TER Una tese la, u̱ kporom sha icombor icombor, man tsombor u TER Una tese la, u̱ kporom sha uya uya, man ya u TER Una tese la, a̱ kporom sha nomso nomso." 
Joshua7:15 Tsô or u i tese nan, nan lu a kwagh u i te icin sha mi la, á nande nan sha usu, kua akaa a a lu a nan cii, gadia nan aver ikuryan i TER, shi nan er kwagh u ibume ken Iserael kpaa." 
Joshua7:16 Tsô Yosua mough pepe pepe, va a Iserael sha ikwe sha ikwe; i tese kwe u Yuda;" 
Joshua7:17 tsô er a kporom a icombor i Yuda yô, i tese tsombor u Mbasera; er a kporom a tsombor u Mbasera nomso nomso yô, i tese Sabedi;" 
Joshua7:18 er a kporom a ya na nomso nomso yô, i tese Akan, wan u Karmi, wan u Sabedi, wan u Sera, ken kwe u Yuda." 
Joshua7:19 Tsô Yosua kaa a Akan er: Wan wam, shi civir TER, Aôndo u Iserael, wuese Un, kaam kwagh u u er la hegen je, de yeren mo un ga." 
Joshua7:20 Akan gema kaa a Yosua er: Mimi je, mo m er TER, Aôndo u Iserael, isholibo, kape m er ne:" 
Joshua7:21 Er m nenge ikondo i cirin iyol i dedoo i Shinar ken ishar i utya man ushekel mba azurfa deri uhar kua ijen i zenaria i iyohov mbu i mbu kom shekel akunduahargber yô, sarem, tsô m tôô akaa la; nenge i yer a, nga shin inya, her atô u tenti wan man azurfa mase shin." 
Joshua7:22 Tsô Yosua tindi mbatyomov, za ayem hen tenti la; yô, nenge i yer a ken tenti na, azurfa mase shin." 
Joshua7:23 Ve tôô a her atô u tenti, ve va a mi hen Yosua man hen ior mba Iserael cii; ve ver a sha ishigh ki TER." 
Joshua7:24 Tsô Yosua kua Mbaiserael cii a na imôngo, ve tôô Akan wan u Sera kua azurfa la man ikondo i cirin iyol la man ijenzenaria la man ônov nav mba nomso man mba kasev man ibua na man ujaki nav man iyôngo na man tenti na kua akaa a a lu a mi cii, ve va a ve hen pev u Akor." 
Joshua7:25 Tsô Yosua kaa er: Ka nyi u er se ican nahana? TER Una er u ican nyian ne! Nahan Mbaiserael cii ta un awen; ve nande ve sha usu, ve ta ve awen." 
Joshua7:26 Tsô ve kohol awen, ve ta zegetihi sha a na; nga her zan zan nyian; nahan TER gema de ishima Na i vihin tsung la. I ii ijiir la iti er Pev u Akor, zan zan nyian." 
Joshua8:1 Tsô TER kaa a Yosua er: De cie ga, de luun a mciem iyol kpaa ga; kua a mbautyav cii a we imôngo; yô, mough, kôndo sha Ai; nenge, tor u Ai kua ior nav man gar na, kua tar na cii, M na u sha ikev;" 
Joshua8:2 er a Ai kua tor na er u er a Yeriko kua tor na nahan; kpa ishar na kua ilev nav kura nen sha ci u ayol a en; ver mbautyav mbagenev ve̱ yer ken ijime i gar la. 
Joshua8:3 Tsô Yosua mough a mbautyav cii sha u kôndon sha Ai; Yosua sange ior dubu ikundugber, anomaior a fan ityav, a na ve gbenda tugh." 
Joshua8:4 A kaa a ve er: Nenge, ne yô, za yer nen gar la, ken ijime keela; de luun nen ca a gar la yum ga, kpa ne cii kegh nen iyol;" 
Joshua8:5 mo kua ior mba ve lu a mo cii, sé kôndo sha gar la; tsô, zum u vea due sha u nôngon ityav a vese, er ve vande eren hiihii nahan yô, se sé yevese ve;" 
Joshua8:6 vea due vea gba zendan se zan zan sé za kende ve ca a gar; gadia vea kaa er: Mba yevese er iyange la nahan. Nahan sé yevese ve," 
Joshua8:7 tsô né mough henpe ne yer la, né ngohol gar la, gadia TER, Aôndo wen, Una na un sha ikev yen." 
Joshua8:8 Tsô, shighe u gar una hingir sha ikev yen yô, nande nen un sha usu; ka sha mkaanem ma TER, er nen ye; nenge, m kaa ne imo yam ve." 
Joshua8:9 Tsô Yosua na ve gbenda; ve yem henpe yeren la, ve za lu hen harga u Betel vea Ai, vegher u Ai u shin ityôtar la; kpa Yosua yô, tsa a ior hen tugh mbula heregh." 
Joshua8:10 Tsô Yosua mough pepe pepe, kohol ior, kôndo, un kua mbatamen mba Iserael, ve hemen ior u zan sha Ai." 
Joshua8:11 Mbautyav mba ve lu a na cii, ve kôndo, ve kporom ve va sha ishigh ki gar, ve haa afo hen Ai vegher u imbusutarimese la; pev lu her atô na a Ai." 
Joshua8:12 A tôô nomsombaiorov er dubu utaan nahan a yer ve hen harga u Betel vea Ai, veghergar u shin ityôtar la." 
Joshua8:13 Kape ve ver ior la; mbautyav cii mba ve lu gar vegher u ken imbusutarimese la kua mbayeren vev mba ve lu vegher u shin ityôtar la; tugh mbula je, Yosua za hen atô u pev la." 
Joshua8:14 Tsô tor u Ai nengen nahan yô, ior mba hen gar la ve mough fefa ve kange iyol pepe, ve due sha u nôngon ityav a Mbaiserael, tor a ior nav cii, sha ijiir i i vande veren sha hemen u Araba la; kpa a fa er mbayeren lu ken ijime gar ga." 
Joshua8:15 Tsô Yosua man Iserael cii gba yevese er i hemba ve nahan, ve yevese ve yem vegher u desereti." 
Joshua8:16 I yila ior mba ken gar cii er ve̱ kohol, ve̱ zenda ve ijime; ve cir sha Yosua zan zan i za kende ve ca a gar." 
Joshua8:17 Ma nomsoor môm ken Ai shin Betel de duen sha u zendan Mbaiserael ijime ga; ve undu gar gbilin, ve lu zendan Iserael ijime." 
Joshua8:18 Tsô TER kaa a Yosua er: Naregh iwange i u lu a mi sha uwe la vegher u ken Ai, gadia Me na u un sha ikev; tsô Yosua naregh iwange i i lu un sha uwe la vegher u ken gar." 
Joshua8:19 Tsô mba ve yer la ve mough hen ijiir ve fefa, ve ngohol un; ve nande gar la fefa." 
Joshua8:20 Ior mba Ai mba gem ashe yô, ve nenge, mnyim ma gar kôndo Sha je, ve kera fatyô u yevese hiden keen shin keela ga; ior mba ve yevese ve yem vegher u desereti la kpaa, ve gema ve ta num sha mba ve lu zendan ve ijime la." 
Joshua8:21 Zum u Yosua kua Mbaiserael cii nenge er mbayeren mbala ngohol gar, man mnyim ma gar ma kôndo sha je yô, ve gema ve ta num sha ior mba Ai." 
Joshua8:22 Mba ken gar mbala kpaa due ta num sha a ve; ve hingir hen atô u Mbaiserael, mbagenev ken vegher ne mbagenev ken vegher la; ve hemba ve, ve kera de mô ve môm war ga." 
Joshua8:23 Ve kôr tor u Ai uma, ve va a na hen Yosua." 
Joshua8:24 Tsô zum u Iserael wua ior i Ai ken akôngo bee, hen desereti henpe ve zenda ve ijime la, zan zan ve cii ve kpe sha zwa u sanker, ve bee yô, Mbaiserael cii gema hide hen Ai, ve va hemba un sha zwa u sanker." 
Joshua8:25 Ior mba ve kpe sha iyange la cii yô, nomso kua kasev kuma ior dubu pue kar uhar, ka ior i Ai cii je la." 
Joshua8:26 Gadia Yosua hide a uwegh nagh ku naregh iwange a mi la ga, zan zan i tim ior i Ai cii i bee." 
Joshua8:27 Saa ilev kua ishar i gar la, Iserael kura, sha mkaanem ma TER kaa a Yosua la ye." 
Joshua8:28 Kape Yosua nande Ai la, gema un hingir tihialôgh gbem, ka ice zan zan nyian." 
Joshua8:29 A sende tor u Ai sha kon; lu sha min zan zan iyange bee; iyange ngur miren yô, Yosua kaa er, i̱ hungwa a ikom na; ve gbihi i hen hundagar, ve kohol awen ve ta tihi sha mi; nga her zan zan nyian." 
Joshua8:30 Tsô Yosua ta TER, Aôndo u Iserael, atse a nanden nagh sha mi, sha uwo u Ebal," 
Joshua8:31 er Mose wanakiriki u TER kaa Mbaiserael nahan, er i nger ken ruamabera u tindi u Mose yô: atse a sha awen a i koo a ga, a ma or nan bende iyôgh sha mi ga; ka sha a, ve na TER iniav mbi nanden, man shi ve sôngo iniav mbi bem kpaa ye." 
Joshua8:32 Hen ijiir la a kimbir u ngeren tindi u Mose sha awen sha ashe a Mbaiserael je. 
Joshua8:33 Mbaiserael cii, kua mbatamen vev man mbahemenev vev man mbaajiriv vev, ve tile, mbagenev vegher u areki keen, mbagenev di vegher u keela sha ishigh ki Mbalevi mba ve lu upristi, ve tôô areki u ikuryan u TER la; ior mba ve nyer a nyôr kua mba tar la jim, vegher ve ugen tile sha ishigh ki uwo u Gerishim, vegher ugen sha ishigh ki uwo u Ebal, er Mose wanakiriki u TER vande kaan er ve̱ ver ior mba Iserael doo doo la nahan." 
Joshua8:34 Ken masetyô yô, a ôr akaaôron a tindigh cii, iveren kua ifan la, er i nger ken ruamabera u tindi la cii yô." 
Joshua8:35 Ma kwaghôron môm u Mose kaa cii, Yosua de u ôron sha ishigh ki mkohol u ior i Iserael ga, kua kasev man mbayev mba kiriki man mba ve nyer ve a nyôr ve lu zenden a ve imôngo la kpaa." 
Joshua9:1 Tsô zum u utor cii mba ve lu yande Yordan, sha tar u iwoogh man ken tar u pev, man hen kpe u zegemnger u tamen cii, sha ishigh ki Lebanon, ka Mbahiti man Mbaamor man Mbakanaan man Mbaperishi man Mbahivi man Mbayebushi, ve ungwa gwa yô," 
Joshua9:2 ve kohol ayol a ve sha u nôngon ityav a Yosua man Iserael a ishima i môm. 
Joshua9:3 Kpa zum u ior mba Gibeon ve ungwa kwagh u Yosua er a Yeriko kua Ai la yô," 
Joshua9:4 ve kôr ayom, ve za er er ve mba mbatyomov nahan; ve tôô aba a tse sha ujaki vev, man akpa a ikôv a wain a tse a anden a i cinge a kpaa," 
Joshua9:5 man akôv a tse a i sôr a gege kuma iyol, ve wa shin angahar, shi ve lu a akondo a tse iyol kpaa; bredi ve u yan gbenda cii uma, hingir akpoghol akpoghol." 
Joshua9:6 Ve za hen Yosua hen afo hen Gilgal, ve za kaa un kua ior mba Iserael er: Se yô, se due ken tar ugen u caa je; yô, ya nen ikur a vese." 
Joshua9:7 Tsô ior mba Iserael kaa a Mbahivi mbala er: Alaghga ijiir yen ngi hen atô wase, nahan sé er nan sé ya ikur a vene?" 
Joshua9:8 Tsô ve kaa a Yosua er: Se mba ikpan you. Yosua kaa a ve er: Ne mba unô? Man ne due hana? 
Joshua9:9 Ve kaa a na er: Ka ken tar ugen u caa tsung je, ikpan you i za ve sha ci u iti i TER, Aôndo wou, ye, gadia se ungwa gwa u icivir Na, man akaa a A er ken tar u Igipiti la cii," 
Joshua9:10 kua akaa cii a A er utor mba uhar mba Mbaamor, mba ve lu yande Yordan la, ka Shihon tor u Heshebon kua Ogo tor u Bashan u a lu hen Ashetaroti la." 
Joshua9:11 Mbatamen asev kua mba ve tem ken tar wase cii ve ôr kwagh a vese, ve kaa er: Tôô nen kwaghyan u yan gbenda, za kohol nen ve; yô, kaa nen ve ner: Se mba ikpan yen, yô, ya nen ase ikur a vese." 
Joshua9:12 Bredi wase ne iyange se tôô un acivin hen uya asev sha ci u kwaghyan u gbenda, sha iyange i se due sha u van hen a ven ne, nenge hegen a uma, hingir akpoghol akpoghol;" 
Joshua9:13 akpa a wain ne kpaa yan se iv a la, lu a he je, nenge hegen a ande; akondo ase ne kpaa kua akôv a ase a hingir a been iyol sha ci u gôgôzende wase." 
Joshua9:14 Tsô ior pande kwaghyan ve u gbenda la, kpa ve pine ishima i TER ga." 
Joshua9:15 Tsô Yosua zua a ve, a ya ikur a ve kpaa er, una de ve uma; mbahemenev mba mkohol u ior kpaa bum a ve." 
Joshua9:16 Tsô ayange nga kar kera atar a ve ya ikur a ve la yô, ve ungwa er ve lu mbawanndor a ve je yô, shi ve tema hen atô ve kpaa." 
Joshua9:17 Nahan Mbaiserael mough, sha iyange i sha utar la ve ar hen agar a ve. Agar a ve yô, ka Gibeon man Kefira man Beeroti kua Kiriati-yearim." 
Joshua9:18 Mbaiserael ta num sha a ve ga, sha ci u mbahemenev mba mkohol u ior vande bumun TER, Aôndo u Iserael, a ve je yô, nahan ior cii gba hunan iker sha kwagh u mbahemenev la." 
Joshua9:19 Kpa mbahemenev cii kaa a ior er: Se vande bumun TER, Aôndo u Iserael, a ve je, nahan ahegen se fatyô u benden ve ave ga." 
Joshua9:20 Kwagh u sé er a ve yô, sé de ve uma, sha er iyugh i̱ de kera ve sha a vese ga, sha ci u mbum u se bum a ve yô." 
Joshua9:21 Mbahemenev kaa a ve er: De ve, ve̱ lu uma; tsô ve hingir ior mba gberen ikon man mba kesen mngerem sha ci u mkohol u ior cii er mbahemenev vande ôron ve nahan." 
Joshua9:22 Tsô Yosua kaa, i yila ve; a ôr kwagh a ve, a kaa er: Ka nyi ne tsugh se, ne kaa ner: Se mba a ven ca tsung je; man nenge, ka hen atô wase je ne lu ne gaa?" 
Joshua9:23 Hegen yô, ne mba a ifan iyol, né va de u lun ikpan man u gberen ikon man u kesen mngerem sha ci u iyou i Aôndo wam ga." 
Joshua9:24 Ve gema ve kaa a Yosua er: I ôr ikpan you er TER, Aôndo wou, kaa a wanakiriki Na Mose er a̱ na ne tar ne cii kpee, né tim mba ve tem ken tar ne cii sha ishigh yenegh kera, nahan yô, se cia ne tsung sha ci u uuma asev, kape i lu man se er nahan ne." 
Joshua9:25 Nenge hegen yô, se mba sha ikev you, kwagh u a doo u man a lu u vough u eren a vese yô, gba eren tsô." 
Joshua9:26 Kape a er a ve la, a yima ve sha ikev i Mbaiserael er ve̱ de woo ve ga yô." 
Joshua9:27 Sha iyange la je Yosua gema ve, ve hingir ior mba gberen ikon man mba kesen mngerem sha ci u mkohol u ior man sha ci u atse a TER a nanden nagh sha mi kpaa, hen ijiir i Una tsuwa yô, zan zan nyian." 
Joshua10:1 Tsô zum u Adoni-sedeki tor u Yerusalem ungwa er Yosua hemba Ai, tim un purututu kpaa; er lu er a Yeriko man tor na nahan, kape a er a Ai man tor na kpaa la; man er mba ve tema ken Gibeon kpaa, ve zua a Iserael maa mba ken a ve je;" 
Joshua10:2 nahan ve cia kpishi, gadia Gibeon lu zegegar je, er gar u tor nahan, hemba kehen a Ai kpaa, nomsombaiorov mba ker kpaa lu mbaageev je." 
Joshua10:3 Nahan Adoni-sedeki tor u Yerusalem, tindi loho hen Hoham tor u Heberon man Piram tor u Yarmuti man Yafia tor u Lakishi man Debir tor u Egelon, a kaa er:" 
Joshua10:4 Va kohol nen mo, wasem nen, sé ta num sha Gibeon; gadia a zua a Yosua man Mbaiserael." 
Joshua10:5 Nahan utor mba utaan mba Mbaamor mbala, tor u Yerusalem man tor u Heberon man tor u Yarmuti man tor u Lakishi kua tor u Egelon, ve kohol ayol a ve kua akumautya ve cii, ve va haa afo hen Gibeon, ve nôngo ityav a na." 
Joshua10:6 Ior mba Gibeon tindi loho hen Yosua hen afo a hen Gilgal, ve kaa er: De tee uwegh ough sha ikpan you kera ga, kôndo her a vese fefa, va yima se, wase se; gadia utor mba Mbaamor cii, mba ve tem ken tar u iwoogh, kohol sha a vese." 
Joshua10:7 Tsô Yosua mough hen Gilgal kôndo, un kua mbautyav cii a na imôngo, man anomaior a fan ityav cii kpaa." 
Joshua10:8 TER kaa a Yosua er: De cie ve ga, gadia M na ve sha ikev you; ma nomsoor ve môm nan ngu, u nana cihi nana tile u sha ishi ga." 
Joshua10:9 Tsô Yosua va ta sha a ve fese, gadia a mough hen Gilgal a tsa zan kaka." 
Joshua10:10 Nahan TER nzughul a ve sha ishigh ki Iserael, a wua ve hen Gibeon je falegh gba, a zenda ve ityô sha gbenda u kôndon yemen sha Bete-horon, a lu wuan ve zan zan za ar hen Aseka, kua hen Makeda kpaa." 
Joshua10:11 Tsô zum u ve lu yevese Iserael la, er ve lu senen hen soughsough u Bete-horon yô, TER ta ve uzegembaawombov mba ve due Sha zan zan za ar hen Aseka, nahan ve kpe; mba ve kpe akpoghol a awombo la hemba mba Iserael wua sha sanker la iyenge." 
Joshua10:12 Tsô, Yosua ôr kwagh a TER sha iyange i TER na Mbaamor sha ikev i Mbaiserael la, a kaa sha ishigh ki Iserael er: We, iyange, tile gigh gigh sha Gibeon; We, uwer di kpaa shin pev u Ayalon!" 
Joshua10:13 Tsô iyange tile gigh gigh, uwer kpaa tile, zan zan ior mbala or iyev sha mbaihomov vev. Ka ken ruamabera u Yashar i nger kwagh ne ye ga? Iyange tile her atô tembe, kera mire fefa ga je er iyange jimin nahan." 
Joshua10:14 Iyange i lun er ngila nahan ngi a lu ga, shin ken ijime shin ken hemen kpaa, i TER ungwa imo i or nahan ga; gadia TER nôngo ityav sha ci u Iserael." 
Joshua10:15 Tsô Yosua hide a Iserael cii hen afo a hen Gilgal. 
Joshua10:16 Utor mba utaan mbala yevese za yer ken bar u Makeda. 
Joshua10:17 Tsô i va kaa Yosua er: I zua a utor mba utaan mbala, ve yer ken bar u Makeda." 
Joshua10:18 Tsô Yosua kaa er: Menger nen uzegembaawenev cir nen bar shon, ver nen ior mba kuran ve kpaa;" 
Joshua10:19 kpa ne yô, de timbir nen ga, zenda nen mbaihomov enev ityô, wua nen mba ken ijime; de rumun nen ner ve̱ nyôr ken agar a ve ga, gadia TER, Aôndo wen, na ve sha ikev yen." 
Joshua10:20 Tsô zum u Yosua man Mbaiserael wua ve je falegh gba, tim a tim ve je yô, mba ve shi her mbala, ve yevese ve za nyôr ken agar a a lu a ugir yô," 
Joshua10:21 ior maa hide her afo hen Yosua hen Makeda doo doo; nombor tsô kpaa, ma or cihi dugh a Mbaiserael ga." 
Joshua10:22 Nahan Yosua kaa er: Bugh ase nen bar shon, dugh nen utor mba utaan mban, va nam nen." 
Joshua10:23 Ve er nahan, ve dugh utor mba utaan mbala ken bar, ve na un; ka tor u Yerusalem man tor u Heberon man tor u Yarmuti man tor u Lakishi kua tor u Egelon je la." 
Joshua10:24 Tsô mba dugh a utor mbala mba ne Yosua yô, Yosua yila ior mba Iserael cii, a kaa mbahemenev mba utyav mba ve za a na imôngo la er: Kporom nen, penda nen angahar a en sha imon i utor mban. Tsô ve kporom ve va penda ve angahar sha imon." 
Joshua10:25 Nahan Yosua kaa a ve er: De cie nen ga, man de luun a mciem iyol kpaa ga, lu nen dông, taver nen asema kpaa, gadia kape TER Una er a mbaihomov enev cii, mba nea nôngo ityav a ve la." 
Joshua10:26 Ken masetyô yô, Yosua ta ve inya, wua ve, hambe ve sha ikon itian; ve lu sha ikon la zan zan iyange kar been." 
Joshua10:27 Tsô iyange ngur miren yô, Yosua kaa er; i̱ hungwa a ve sha ikon la, i̱ gbihi ve ken bar u ashen ve yer ker la; ve cir zwa u bar la sha uzegembaawenev, mba her zan zan nyian." 
Joshua10:28 Sha iyange la je Yosua ngohol Makeda, hemba un sha zwa u sanker, kua tor na; a tim un ci ca cii kua mbaumav mba ve lu ker cii, a shi ma or môm kimi ga; a er a tor u Makeda er lu er a tor u Yeriko nahan." 
Joshua10:29 Tsô Yosua mough hen Makeda a Iserael cii, za hen Libena; a za nôngo ityav a Libena." 
Joshua10:30 Un kpaa TER gema un kua tor na, na sha ikev i Iserael; a hemba un sha zwa u sanker kua mbaumav mba ve lu ken a na cii; a de ma or shi ker ga; a er a tor na er lu er a tor u Yeriko nahan." 
Joshua10:31 Tsô Yosua mough hen Libena, za hen Lakishi a Iserael cii, ve za haa afo, ve nôngo ityav a na;" 
Joshua10:32 TER na Lakishi sha ikev i Iserael, a ngohol un sha iyange i sha uhar la, a hemba un sha zwa u sanker, kua mbaumav mba ve lu ken a na cii, er lu er a Libena nahan." 
Joshua10:33 Tsô Horam tor u Geser kôndo sha u wasen Lakishi, kpa Yosua hemba un a ior nav, a kera shi ma or ga." 
Joshua10:34 Tsô Yosua mough a Iserael cii hen Lakishi va hen Egelon; ve za haa afo, ve nôngo ityav a na;" 
Joshua10:35 sha iyange la je ve ngohol un, ve hemba un sha zwa u sanker; mbaumav mba ve lu kimi cii kpaa, a tim ve ca ca sha iyange la, er lu er a Lakishi nahan." 
Joshua10:36 Shi Yosua mough hen Egelon a Iserael cii, kôndo va sha Heberon; ve za nôngo ityav a na;" 
Joshua10:37 ve ngohol un, ve hemba un sha zwa u sanker, kua tor na, man agar a na cii, man mbaumav mba ve lu ken a cii; a shi ma or ga, er lu er a Egelon nahan; a tim un ci ca cii kua mbaumav mba ve lu ken a na cii." 
Joshua10:38 Tsô Yosua kaha a Iserael cii ve yem hen Debir, a za nôngo ityav a na;" 
Joshua10:39 a hemba un kua tor na, man agar a na cii; ve hemba ve sha zwa u sanker, ve tim mbaumav mba keregh ci ca cii, a kera shi ma or ga; Er lu er a Heberon nahan, kape er a Debir kua tor na kpaa la; er lu er a Libena kua tor na nahan kpaa." 
Joshua10:40 Kape Yosua hemba tar la cii la, tar u iwoogh man tar u Imbusutariyan la, man tar u delaa, man tar u soughsough, a utor vev cii; a shi ma or ga; kpa a tim ve ci ca cii, hanma kwagh u ôôn cii a tim ci ca cii er TER, Aôndo u Iserael, kaa yô." 
Joshua10:41 Yosua hemba ve, hii hen Kadeshi-barnea zan zan ar hen Gasa, kua tar u Goshen cii, zan zan ar hen Gibeon." 
Joshua10:42 Yosua ngohol utor mban cii kua tar ve icin i môm tsô, sha ci u TER, Aôndo u Iserael, nôngo ityav sha ci u Iserael yô." 
Joshua10:43 Tsô Yosua hide hen afo a hen Gilgal a Iserael cii. 
Joshua11:1 Tsô zum u Yabin tor u Hasor ungwa nahan yô, a tindi loho hen Yobabi tor u Madon man hen tor u Shimeron man hen tor u Akesav," 
Joshua11:2 man shi hen utor mba ken imbusutarimese sha tar u iwoogh la man ken Araba vegher u imbusutariyan i Kinereti la man ken tar u delaa man sha agungu a Dor, vegher u shin ityôtar la," 
Joshua11:3 hen Mbakanaan, vegher u sha ityoughkitaregh man shin ityôtar, man Mbaamor man Mbahiti man Mbaperishi man Mbayebushi sha tar u iwoogh, man Mbahivi shin itine i Hermon ken tar u Misepa." 
Joshua11:4 Tsô ve due, kua akumautya ve cii, ior ngee kpishi, er waarawa u hen kpezegemnger nahan, a anyinya man akeke a kpelan kpishi je." 
Joshua11:5 Utor mban cii zua imôngo, ve va haa afo ijiir i môm hen kpe u mngerem ma Merom, sha u va nôngon ityav a Iserael." 
Joshua11:6 Tsô TER kaa a Yosua er: De cie ve ga, gadia kper er hegen nahan Me na ve cii sha ikev i Iserael kpenegh, ú tôndo anyinya ve igbela i shin akishiangahar, ú nande akeke ve a kpelan sha usu." 
Joshua11:7 Tsô Yosua a mbautyav cii va kohol ve hen mngerem ma Merom fese, ve ta sha a ve." 
Joshua11:8 TER na ve sha ikev i Iserael, ve hemba ve, ve zenda ve zan zan za ar hen Zegeshidon, man hen Miserefoti-maim kpaa, kua hen pev u Misepa vegher u sha ityoughkitaregh la; ve wua ve je ma or kera shi ga." 
Joshua11:9 Yosua er a ve er TER kaa un nahan; a tôndo anyinya ve igbela i akishiangahar, a nande akeke ve sha usu." 
Joshua11:10 Hen shighe la je Yosua gema, hide ngohol Hasor, a wua tor na sha sanker, gadia ngise Hasor lu ityough ki ityartor la cii." 
Joshua11:11 Ve wua mbaumav mba ve lu ken a na cii sha zwa u sanker, ve tim ve ci ca cii, kwagh u ôôn môm shi ker ga; a nande Hasor sha usu kpaa." 
Joshua11:12 Agar a utor mbala cii kua utor vev cii, Yosua ngohol ve, a hemba ve sha zwa u sanker, tim ve ci ca cii, er Mose wanakiriki u TER lu kaa yô." 
Joshua11:13 Kpa agar a a lu sha agungu ve yô, Iserael nande môm môm ga; saa Hasor tseegh, Yosua nande un ye." 
Joshua11:14 Ishar i sha agar la cii kua ilev mbi a, Mbaiserael ya, hingir akaa a ve; kpaa ve wua hanma or sha zwa u sanker zan zan je ve tim ve, ve shi ma kwagh u ôôn ken a ga." 
Joshua11:15 Er TER kaa a Mose wanakiriki Na la, kape Yosua kpaa er la; a undu ma kwagh ken akaa cii a TER kaa a Mose la ga." 
Joshua11:16 Kape Yosua ngohol tar la cii je la, tar u iwoogh man tar u Imbusutariyan cii, kua tar u Goshen cii man tar u delaa man Araba, man tar u iwoogh u Iserael kua pev na," 
Joshua11:17 hii hen uwo u Halaki u kôndon zan sha Seir zan zan ar hen Baal-gadi shin pev u Lebanon shin itine i uwo u Hermon; a kôr utor vev cii, a hemba ve, a wua." 
Joshua11:18 Yosua nôngo ityav a utor mban cii ica i gba. 
Joshua11:19 Ma gar môm zua a Mbaiserael ga, saa Mbahivi, ior i ken Gibeon la; ka sha utya ve lu hemban ve cii ye." 
Joshua11:20 Gadia ka TER je, A cighir ve asema er ve̱ mough ityav a Iserael sha er ve̱ tim ve ci ca cii, ve̱ de ker mhôônom ga yô, kpa ve̱ tim ve, er TER kaa a Mose nahan." 
Joshua11:21 Hen shighe la je Yosua va, va tim Mbaanaki sha tar u iwoogh kera, ken Heberon man Debir man Anabi man sha tar u Yuda u iwoogh cii kua sha tar u Iserael u iwoogh cii; Yosua tim ve ci ca cii kua agar a ve." 
Joshua11:22 I shi or môm môm u Mbaanaki ken tar u Mbaiserael ga; saa ken Gasa man Gati man Ashedodi tseegh mbagenev shi ye. 
Joshua11:23 Kape Yosua ngohol tar cii la, sha kwagh u TER ôr a Mose cii; Yosua na Iserael dyako sha u, sha uipaven vev sha ikwe ve. Tar la maa mem ityav." 
Joshua12:1 Utor mba hen tar la mba Mbaiserael hemba ve, man ve ngohol tar ve yande Yordan vegher u iyange i dugh hii hen pev, u Arnon zan zan ar hen uwo u Hermon kua Araba cii, vegher u sha ityoughkitaregh la yô, ka:" 
Joshua12:2 Shihon tor u Mbaamor, u a tema ken Heshebon la, a tema tor hii sha Aroer, u a lu hen kpe u pev u Arnon hen atô u pev man vegher u Gileadi zan zan ar hen ifi u Yaboki, ka ikighirtar i Mbaamon je la;" 
Joshua12:3 Man sha Araba kpaa zan zan ar hen zegemnger u Kinereti vegher u sha ityoughkitaregh la, zan zan ar hen zegemnger u Araba, ka Zegemnger u Bar je la, vegher u sha ityoughkitaregh, sha ian i Bete-yeshimoti man sha vegher u ken imbusutariyan, shin soughsough u Pisega;" 
Joshua12:4 man tar u Ogo, tor u Bashan, u a lu or u ken asande a Mbarefai a a shi her la, u a tema ken Ashetaroti man Ederei," 
Joshua12:5 a tema tor sha uwo u Hermon man sha Saleka kua Bashan cii, zan zan ar hen ikighirtar i Mbageshur man Mbamaakati, kua vegher u Gileadi, ikighirtar i Shihon tor u Heshebon." 
Joshua12:6 Mose wanakiriki u TER kua Mbaiserael hemba ve, man Mose wanakiriki u TER gema u, na Mbaruben man Mbagadi man vegherkwe u Manase, hingir dyako ve." 
Joshua12:7 Mban ka utor mba hen tar la, mba Yosua kua Mbaiserael hemba ve yande Yordan vegher u shin ityôtar la, hii hen Baal-gadi shin pev u Lebanon zan zan za ar sha uwo u Halaki u kôndo sha Seir la; Yosua gema tar ve na ikwe i Iserael sha uipaven vev hingir dyako ve." 
Joshua12:8 Sha tar u iwoogh man shin tar u delaa, man ken Araba, man soughsough, man ken desereti, man ken tar u Imbusutariyan; tar u Mbahiti man Mbaamor man Mbakanaan man Mbaperishi man Mbahivi man Mbayebushi;" 
Joshua12:9 tor u Yeriko, môm; tor u Ai u a lu ikua ikua a Betel la, môm;" 
Joshua12:10 tor u Yerusalem, môm; tor u Heberon, môm" 
Joshua12:11 tor u Yarmuti, môm; tor u Lakishi, môm;" 
Joshua12:12 tor u Egelon, môm; tor u Geser, môm" 
Joshua12:13 tor u Debir, môm; tor u Geder, môm" 
Joshua12:14 tor u Horma, môm; tor u Aradi, môm;" 
Joshua12:15 tor u Libena, môm; tor u Adulam, môm;" 
Joshua12:16 tor u Makeda, môm; tor u Betel, môm;" 
Joshua12:17 tor u Tapua, môm; tor u Hefer, môm;" 
Joshua12:18 tor u Afeki, môm; tor u Lasharon, môm;" 
Joshua12:19 tor u Madon, môm; tor u Hasor, môm;" 
Joshua12:20 tor u Shimeron-meron, môm; tor u Akesav, môm;" 
Joshua12:21 tor u Taanaki, môm, tor u Megido, môm;" 
Joshua12:22 tor u Kedeshi, môm; tor u Yokeneam hen Karmel, môm;" 
Joshua12:23 tor u Dor sha gungu u Dor, môm; tor u Goim ken Gilgal, môm;" 
Joshua12:24 tor u Tirsa, môm; kohol cii ka utor ikundugber kar môm je ne." 
Joshua13:1 Tsô Yosua bee iyol, a tsa sha won; nahan TER kaa a na er: We u bee iyol ve, u tsa sha won, man tar shi kpishi u á ngohol yô." 
Joshua13:2 Tar u u shi yô, ka: ityar i Mbafiliti cii, kua Mbageshur cii," 
Joshua13:3 hii hen Shihor u a dondo a Igipiti zan zan za ar hen ikighirtar i Ekeron ken imbusutarimese la; i wa u ken tar u Mbakanaan je; utor mba Mbafiliti utaan: tor u Gasa man u Ashedodi man u Asekelon man u Gati man u Ekeron, man shi Mbaavi" 
Joshua13:4 ken vegher u imbusutariyan la; tar u Mbakanaan cii man Meara u Mbashidon zan zan za ar hen Afeki man ikighirtar i Mbaamor," 
Joshua13:5 man tar u Mbagebal man Lebanon cii vegher u iyange i dugh la, hii hen Baal-gadi shin itine i uwo u Hermon zan zan za ar sha gbenda u karen zan Hamati la," 
Joshua13:6 mba ve tema ken tar u iwoogh cii, hii hen Lebanon zan zan za ar hen Miserefoti-maim, ka Mbashidon cii je la. Mo Me zenda ve sha ishigh ki Mbaiserael kera; yô, gema u, na Iserael u̱ hingir ve dyako, er M kaa u yô." 
Joshua13:7 Yô, kar ase tar ne, u̱ hingir dyako u ikwe itiankarinyiin kua vegherkwe u Manase." 
Joshua13:8 Mbaruben kua Mbagadi ngohol dyako ve a vegherkwe u Manase ugen la imôngo, u Mose na ve yande Yordan vegher u sha ityoughkitaregh la, er Mose wanakiriki u TER na ve la;" 
Joshua13:9 hii hen Aroer, u a lu hen kpe u pev u Arnon la, man gar u hen atô u pev la, man tar u vaanaa u Medeba zan zan za ar hen Dibon;" 
Joshua13:10 man agar a Shihon tor u Mbaamor u a tema tor sha Heshebon la cii zan zan za ar hen ikighirtar i Mbaamon la; 
Joshua13:11 man Gileadi man ikighirtar i Mbageshur man Mbamaakati kua uwo u Hermon cii man Bashan cii zan zan za ar hen Saleka; 
Joshua13:12 tartor u Ogo ken Bashan cii, u a lu tor ken Ashetaroti man ken Ederei (ka asande a Mbarefai mba ve shi her je la); gadia mban Mose hemba ve, zenda ve kera." 
Joshua13:13 Nahan kpaa Mbaiserael zenda Mbageshur kua Mbamaakati kera ga, kpa Geshur man Maakati tema her atô u Iserael zan zan nyian." 
Joshua13:14 Ka kwe u Levi tseegh a na u dyako ga yô; iniav mbi TER, Aôndo u Iserael, mbi i ne mbi sha usu, ka mbi, mbi lu dyako na ye, er A kaa un yô." 
Joshua13:15 Mose na kwe u ônov mba Ruben sha icombor ve; 
Joshua13:16 ve ngohol tar u u hii hen Aroer, u a lu hen kpe u pev u Arnon la, man gar u shin atô u pev la man tar u vaanaa u hen Medeba la cii;" 
Joshua13:17 Heshebon man agar a na cii a a lu hen tar u vaanaa la, ka: Dibon man Bamoti-baal man Betebaal-meon," 
Joshua13:18 man Yahashi man Kedemoti man Mefaati," 
Joshua13:19 man Kiriataim man Shibema man Sereti-shahar, sha uwo u shin pev la," 
Joshua13:20 man Bete-peor man soughsough u Pisega man Bete-yeshimoti; 
Joshua13:21 man agar a tar u vaanaa cii, kua tartor u Shihon tor u Mbaamor u a tema tor ken Heshebon, u Mose hemba un a utor mba Midian la cii, ka: Evi man Rekem man Sur man Hur kua Reba, ka utor mba Shihon mba ve tema ken tar la je la." 
Joshua13:22 Balaam wan u Beor u tsengan ôron kwagh la, Mbaiserael wua un sha sanker a mbagenev mba i wua ve la imôngo." 
Joshua13:23 Ikighirtar i ônov mba Ruben yô, ka Yordan kua iningirtar na. Ngun ka dyako u ônov mba Ruben sha icombor ve, agar a vesen kua agar a kiriki a a kase a je ne." 
Joshua13:24 Mose na kwe u Gadi sha icombor ve: 
Joshua13:25 ve ngohol tar u Yaser man agar a Gileadi cii man vegher u tar u Mbaamon zan zan ar hen Aroer u a dondo a Raba la," 
Joshua13:26 man shi hii hen Heshebon zan zan za ar hen Ramati-misepe kua Betomin, man shi hii hen Mahanaim zan zan za ar hen ikighirtar i Debir," 
Joshua13:27 man shin pev u Bete-haram man Bete-nimra, man Sukoti kua Safon, tartor u Shihon tor u Heshebon u u shi la, man Yordan man ningir na zan zan za ar hen ikighir i kpe u zegemnger u Kinereti yande u Yordan vegher u sha ityoughkitaregh la." 
Joshua13:28 Ngun ka dyako u ônov mba Gadi sha icombor ve, agar a vesen kua agar a kiriki a a kase a je ne." 
Joshua13:29 Mose na vegherkwe u Manase dyako; vegherkwe u ônov mba Manase sha icombor ve cii: 
Joshua13:30 tar ve hii hen Mahanaim, Bashan cii, tartor u Ogo tor u Bashan cii, man agar a Yair a a lu ken Bashan cii, agar akunduatar;" 
Joshua13:31 man vegher u Gileadi kua Ashetaroti man Ederei, ka agar a tartor u Ogo ken Bashan je la, ônov mba Makir, wan u Manase, ngohol, ka vegher u ônov mba Makir sha icombor ve je la." 
Joshua13:32 Man ka udyako mba Mose na ken ukpuunkpuun mba Moabi yande Yordan vegher u Yeriko sha ityoughkitaregh je la. 
Joshua13:33 Kpa kwe u Levi yô, Mose na ve ma dyako ga; TER, Aôndo u Iserael, ka dyako ve, er A tôndo zwa a ve yô." 
Joshua14:1 Mban ka udyako mba Mbaiserael ya ken tar u Kanaan, mba pristi Eleasar man Yosua wan u Nun, man mbavesen mba uya mba uter mba ikwe i Mbaiserael kar ve" 
Joshua14:2 sha ishor i eren, hingir dyako ve ne, sha imo i TER kaa Mose, Mose gema ôr ve la, sha ci u ikwe i itiankarinyiin man vegherkwe la." 
Joshua14:3 Gadia Mose vande nan ikwe ihiar man vegherkwe la dyako ve yande Yordan; kpa Mbalevi yô, a na ve ma dyako ga." 
Joshua14:4 Gadia ônov mba Yosev lu ikwe ihiar, Manase man Eferaim; Mbalevi yô, i na ve ma kwar ken tar la ga, saa di agar a vea tema ker tsô, kua akôngo a a sha ci u ilev vev kua inyarev vev cii." 
Joshua14:5 Er TER kaa a Mose nahan, kape Mbaiserael er je la, ve kar tar la." 
Joshua14:6 Tsô ônov mba Yuda va hen Yosua hen Gilgal; nahan Kalebu wan u Yefune Orkenishi kaa a na er: U fa kwagh u TER lu kaa a Mose, or u Aôndo, sha a mo vea we hen Kadeshi-barnea la." 
Joshua14:7 M lu anyom akunduahar zum u Mose wanakiriki u TER tindim, m mough hen Kadeshi-barnea sha u za nengen tar la mker; tsô m hide un a kwaghôron u a lum ken ishima yô." 
Joshua14:8 Nahan kpaa anmgbianev av mba ve kôndo a mo imôngo ve na ior iyol i kpen; kpa mo yô, m ver ishima sha TER, Aôndo wam, jighilii." 
Joshua14:9 Tsô Mose bum sha iyange la je kaa er: Mimi je, tar u u zende sha mi la ua hingir dyako wou a ônov ou gbem, sha er u ver ishima sha TER, Aôndo wam, jighilii yô." 
Joshua14:10 Hegen yô, nenge, TER dem, m ngu her uma er A kaa yô. Ka anyom akunduahar kar ataan, hii hen shighe u TER ôr kwagh ne a Mose, zum u Iserael lu zenden ken desereti la; man nenge, hegen yô, anyom am ka akunduanyiin kar ataan je ne." 
Joshua14:11 Nahan kpaa m ngu a agee iyol her er iyange i Mose tindim la nahan; er agee am lu hen shighe la kape hegen kpaa a lu ne, sha u nôngon ityav man sha u duen man u nyôron." 
Joshua14:12 Hegen yô, nan uwo ne, u TER ôr kwagh u u sha iyange la, gadia sha iyange la je u ungwa er Mbaanaki lu ker yô, man agar a vesen a lun a ugir je; alaghga TER Una lu a mo, me zenda ve kera er TER A kaa yô." 
Joshua14:13 Tsô Yosua ver un doo doo, a gema Heberon a na Kalebu wan u Yefune, er a lu dyako na." 
Joshua14:14 Tsô Heberon hingir dyako u Kalebu wan u Yefune Orkenishi zan zan nyian, sha ci u a ver ishima sha TER, Aôndo u Iserael, jighilii yô." 
Joshua14:15 Kpa iti i Heberon tsuaa yô, er, Kiriati-arba; Arba lu orvesen ken Mbaanaki cii. Tar la maa mem ityav." 
Joshua15:1 Kwe u ônov mba Yuda sha icombor ve yô, kwar ve ar hen ikighir i Edom, vegher u ken imbusutariyan, ar sha toho u Zin yem vegher u imbusutariyan ca je." 
Joshua15:2 Ikighirtar ve i ken imbusutariyan yô, hii hen mkur u Zegemnger u Bar, hen zongough ku mngeregh ku ku ver ishigh vegher u ken imbusutariyan la," 
Joshua15:3 i due ken vegher u mkende u Akrabim ken imbusutariyan la, i kar i ar sha Zin, i due sha Kadeshi-barnea vegher u ken imbusutariyan, i kar hen Heseron, i unde sha Adar, i gese i va hen Karka," 
Joshua15:4 i kar i yem hen Asemon, i va due hen uwagh u Igipiti; ikighirtar la za kure hen zegemnger; ingin ia lu ikighir yen i ken imbusutariyan la." 
Joshua15:5 Ikighir i vegher u sha ityoughkitaregh yô, lu Zegemnger u Bar zan zan za ar hen iasegh i Yordan. Ikighir i vegher u hen imbusutarimese yô, hii hen zongough ku zegemnger hen iasegh i Yordan la;" 
Joshua15:6 ikighirtar la unde sha Bete-hogela i kar Bete-araba vegher u ken imbusutarimese la, i unde i za ar sha iwen i Bohan wan u Ruben;" 
Joshua15:7 ikighirtar la due shin pev u Akor kôndo za ar sha Debir gema yem vegher u ken imbusutarimese, hen Gilgal u a lu sha ishigh ki mkende u Adumim u a lu uwagh vegher u ken imbusutariyan la; ikighir la kar zan zan za ar hen mngerem ma En-shemese, za kure hen En-rogel;" 
Joshua15:8 ikighir la kôndo hen pev u Ben-hinom za ar hen ikooso i uwo u Mbayebushi, vegher u ken imbusutariyan la (ka Yerusalem je la); ikighir la unde za ar sha ityough ki uwo u u lu sha ishigh ki pev u Hinom vegher u shin ityôtar, u u lu sha mkur u pev u Refaim vegher u ken imbusutarimese la;" 
Joshua15:9 sha ityough ki uwoogh, ikighir la gese za ar hen imbormnger i Nefetoa, kar za due hen agar a uwo u Eferon; shi ikighir la gese ar hen Baala (ka Kiriati-yearim je la);" 
Joshua15:10 hen Baala ikighir la gema ningir yem vegher u shin ityôtar za ar hen uwo u Seir, i kar i za hen ikooso i uwo u Yearim vegher u ken imbusutarimese la (ka Kesalon je la), i sen i va shin Bete-shemeshi, kar yem hen Timna;" 
Joshua15:11 ikighir la due sha ikooso i uwo u Ekeron vegher u hen imbusutarimese la, ikighir la gese za hen Shikeron, i kar sha uwo u Baala, i due hen Yabenel; ikighir la za kure hen zegemnger;" 
Joshua15:12 Ikighir i ken vegher u shin ityôtar yô, i lu Zegemnger u Tamen man ikighir na. Ingin ka ikighirtar i ônov mba Yuda, ningir cii, sha icombor ve." 
Joshua15:13 Man a na Kalebu wan u Yefune kwar ken ônov mba Yuda, er TER kaa a Yosua nahan, ka Kiriati-arba, ka Heberon je la; Arba la lu ter u Anaki." 
Joshua15:14 Tsô Kalebu zenda ônov mba Anaki mba utar hen ijiir la kera, ka Sheshai man Ahiman kua Talmai ônov mba Anaki." 
Joshua15:15 A kôndo keela a za nôngo ityav a mba ve tema ken Debir la; iti i Debir tsuaa yô, er, Kiriati-sefer." 
Joshua15:16 Tsô Kalebu kaa er: Or u nana hemba Kiriati-sefer, nana ngohol un yô, me na nan wan wam u kwase, Akesa, nana er." 
Joshua15:17 Nahan Oteniel wan u Kenashi anngô u Kalebu, ngohol un; tsô a na un wan na u kwase, Akesa, a er." 
Joshua15:18 Tsô zum u a lu van hen na yô, a za un iyol er a̱ sôn ter na tiôntar ugen; tsô a hungwa sha jaki na, Kalebu pine un er: Ka nyi i sar uwe?" 
Joshua15:19 A kaa er: Erem iwua, gadia u nam tar u tseghe tseghe; yô, nam amboramnger kpaa. Nahan a na un ambor a sha kua a shin kpaa." 
Joshua15:20 Ngun ka dyako u kwe u ônov mba Yuda sha icombor ve. 
Joshua15:21 Agar a sha ikighirtar i kwe u ônov mba Yuda zan zan za ar hen ikighirtar i Edom ken tar u Imbusutariyan la yô, ka: Kabeseel man Eder man Yagur," 
Joshua15:22 man Kina man Dimona man Adada," 
Joshua15:23 man Kedeshi man Hasor man Itenan," 
Joshua15:24 man Shiv man Telem man Bealoti," 
Joshua15:25 man Hasorhadatan man Kerioti-heseron (ka Hasor je la)," 
Joshua15:26 Amam man Sema man Molada," 
Joshua15:27 man Hasar-gada man Heshemon man Bete-peleti," 
Joshua15:28 man Hasar-shual man Bersheba man Bishiotia," 
Joshua15:29 Baala man Iyim man Esem," 
Joshua15:30 man Eltoladi man Keshil man Horma," 
Joshua15:31 man Shikelagi man Mademana, man Sansana," 
Joshua15:32 man Lebaoti man Shilhim man Ain kua Rimon; agar ne cii nga ikundu kar ataankaranyiin kua agar a kiriki a a kase a la. 
Joshua15:33 Shin pev u delaa, Estaol man Sora man Ashena," 
Joshua15:34 man Sanoa man En-ganim, Tapua man Enam," 
Joshua15:35 Yarmuti man Adulam, Soko, man Aseka," 
Joshua15:36 man Shasaraim man Aditaim man Gedera man Gederotaim; agar pue kar anyiin kua agar a kiriki a a kase a la. 
Joshua15:37 Senan man Hadasha man Migedal-gadi," 
Joshua15:38 man Dilean man Misepe man Yoketeel," 
Joshua15:39 Lakishi man Bosekati man Egelon," 
Joshua15:40 man Kabon man Laman man Kitelishi," 
Joshua15:41 man Gederoti, Bete-dagon man Naama man Makeda; agar pue kar ataratar kua agar a kiriki a a kase a la." 
Joshua15:42 Libena man Eter man Ashan," 
Joshua15:43 man Ifeta man Ashena man Neshibi," 
Joshua15:44 man Keila man Akeshibi man Maresha; agar ataankaranyiin kua agar a kiriki a a kase a la. 
Joshua15:45 Ekeron man agar a na kua agar a kiriki a a kase a la; 
Joshua15:46 hii hen Ekeron zan zan za ar hen zegemnger, tar u dondo a Ashedodi cii kua agar a kiriki a u la kpaa." 
Joshua15:47 Ashedodi, agar a na kua agar a kiriki a a kase a la; Gasa, agar a na kua agar a kiriki a a kase a la, zan zan za ar hen uwagh u Igipiti man Zegemnger u Tamen man ikighir na." 
Joshua15:48 Sha tar u iwoogh yô; Shamir man Yatir man Soko," 
Joshua15:49 man Dana man Kiriati-sana (ka Debir je la)," 
Joshua15:50 man Anabi man Eshetemo man Anim," 
Joshua15:51 man Goshen man Holon man Gilo; agar pue kar môm kua agar a kiriki a a kase a la. 
Joshua15:52 Arabi man Duma man Eshan," 
Joshua15:53 man Yamin man Bete-tapua man Afeka," 
Joshua15:54 man Humeta man Kiriati-arba (ka Heberon je la), man Shior; agar ataankaranyiin kua agar a kiriki a a kase a la." 
Joshua15:55 Maon man Karmel man Shiv man Yuta," 
Joshua15:56 man Yesereel man Yokedeam man Sanoa," 
Joshua15:57 Kain man Gibea man Timna; agar pue kua agar a kiriki a a kase a la. 
Joshua15:58 Halhul, Bete-sur man Gedor," 
Joshua15:59 man Maarati man Bete-anoti man Eletekon; agar ataratar kua agar a kiriki a a kase a la. 
Joshua15:60 Kiriati-baal (ka Kiriati-yearim je la), man Raba; agar ahar kua agar a kiriki a a kase a la." 
Joshua15:61 Ken toho yô: Bete-araba man Midin man Sekaka," 
Joshua15:62 man Nibeshan man Gar u Bar man En-gedi; agar ataratar kua agar kiriki a a kase a la. 
Joshua15:63 Kpa Mbayebushi, mba ve tema ken Yerusalem yô, ônov mba Yuda fatyô u zendan ve kera ga; nahan Mbayebushi tema a ônov mba Yuda imôngo ken Yerusalem zan zan nyian." 
Joshua16:1 Kwar u ônov mba Yosev yô, hii hen Yordan u hen Yeriko, mngerem ma Yeriko vegher u sha ityoughkitaregh la, kar ken desereti, hii hen Yeriko kôndo sha tar u iwoogh zan zan za ar hen Betel," 
Joshua16:2 due hen Betel za hen Lushi, kar zan zan za ar sha ikighirtar i Mbaarki hen Ataroti," 
Joshua16:3 kar sen vegher u shin ityôtar zan zan za ar hen ikighirtar i Mbayafeleti, zan zan za ar sha ikighir i Bete-horon u shin, zan zan za ar hen Geser, u za kure hen zegemnger." 
Joshua16:4 Nahan ônov mba Yosev, Manase kua Eferaim, ve ngohol dyako ve." 
Joshua16:5 Ikighirtar i ônov mba Eferaim sha icombor ve yô, lu nahan: ikighir i dyako ve vegher u sha ityoughkitaregh lu Ataroti-adar zan zan za ar sha Bete-horon u sha;" 
Joshua16:6 ikighir la due vegher u shin ityôtar hen Mikemeta vegher u ken imbusutarimese; ikighir la gese yem vegher u sha ityoughkitaregh zan zan za ar hen Taanati-shila kar yem vegher u sha ityoughkitaregh za ar hen Yanoa," 
Joshua16:7 sen hen Yanoa za ar Ataroti man Naara, za mande hen Yeriko za kure hen Yordan." 
Joshua16:8 Hen Tapua yô, ikighir yem vegher u shin ityôtar za ar hen uwagh u Kana, kar za kure hen zegemnger," 
Joshua16:9 kua agar a i tsegha a sha ci u ônov mba Eferaim ken atô u dyako u ônov mba Manase, agar la cii kua agar a kiriki a a kase a la." 
Joshua16:10 Ve zenda Mbakanaan mba ve tema ken Geser kera ga, kpa Mbakanaan tema ken atô u Eferaim zan zan nyian, ve hingir mba eren tom u ikpan." 
Joshua17:1 Kwe u Manase ngohol kwar ve; gadia wen lu waniunda u Yosev. Makir wan u Manase, ter u Gileadi, lu or u nôngon ityav, nahan a zua a Gileadi kua Bashan." 
Joshua17:2 Ônov mba Manase mbagenev kpaa ngohol kwar sha icombor ve: ônov mba Abieser man ônov mba Heleki man ônov mba Aseriel man ônov mba Shekem man ônov mba Hefer kua ônov mba Shemida; ka ônov mba nomso mba Manase, wan u Yosev, sha icombor ve je la." 
Joshua17:3 Kpa Selofehadi wan u Hefer, wan u Gileadi, wan u Makir, wan u Manase, lu a ônov mba nomso ga, saa mba kasev; ati a ônov nav mba kasev mbala yô, er: Mahela man Noa man Hogela man Milka man Tirsa;" 
Joshua17:4 tsô ve va hen pristi Eleasar man Yosua wan u Nun kua mbahemenev, ve kaa er: TER lu kaa a Mose er, a̱ na se dyako ken anmgbianev asev; nahan a na ve dyako ken anmgbianev mba ter ve sha imo i TER la." 
Joshua17:5 Nahan Manase zua a ikwar pue, kua tar u Gileadi man Bashan u a lu yande Yordan;" 
Joshua17:6 gadia ônov mba kasev mba Manase kpaa lu a dyako ken ônov nav mba nomso; tar u Gileadi hingir u ônov mba nomso mba Manase mba ve shi yô. 
Joshua17:7 Ikighirtar i Manase hii hen Asher za ar hen Mikemata u a lu sha ishigh ki Shekem la, ikighir la kar ken uwegh ku yanegh za ar hen mba ve tema ken En-tapua la." 
Joshua17:8 Tar u Tapua ka u Manase je, kpa Tapua u a dondo sha ikighirtar i Manase la ka u ônov mba Eferaim." 
Joshua17:9 Ikighir la sen zan zan za ar hen uwagh u Kana, vegher u ken imbusutariyan u uwagh la; agar ngara ka a Eferaim, a a lu ken agar a Manase; ikighirtar i Manase lu uwagh la vegher u ken imbusutarimese kar za kure hen zegemnger;" 
Joshua17:10 vegher u ken imbusutariyan lu u Eferaim; vegher u ken imbusutarimese yô, lu u Manase; zegemnger lu ikighir na; ve ar hen Asher vegher u ken imbusutarimese man hen Isakar kpaa vegher u sha ityoughkitaregh." 
Joshua17:11 Ken Isakar kua ken Asher yô, Manase lu a Bete-shean kua agar a na, man Ibeleam kua agar a na, ior i Dor kua agar a na, man ior i Endor kua agar a na, man ior i Taanaki kua agar a na, man ior i Megido kua agar a na, ka agungu atar je la." 
Joshua17:12 Kpa ônov mba Manase fatyô u zendan mba ve tema sha agar a ngara kera ga; Mbakanaan gba teman a ve ken tar la tsô. 
Joshua17:13 Nahan, zum u Mbaiserael hingir mba taver yô, ve na Mbakanaan tom u kpan, ve zenda ve kera ca ca ga." 
Joshua17:14 Tsô ônov mba Yosev ôr kwagh a Yosua kaa er: Ka nyi u nem dyako kwar môm man ci môm tseeghe? Mo u m lu zegeikurior je, sha er TER A verem doo doo zan zan hegen ne." 
Joshua17:15 Yosua kaa a ve er: Aluer wea lu zegeikurior yô, mough za sha ikô, za paa ijiir sha ker, sha ci wou, ken tar u Mbaperishi man tar u Mbarefai, aluer tar u iwoogh u Eferaim ua ndahar we yô." 
Joshua17:16 Tsô ônov mba Yosev kaa a na er: Tar u iwoogh kuma se ga, man Mbakanaan mba ve tem ken tar u delaa shin pev la cii mba a akeke a iyôô, ka mba ve tem ken Bete-shean man agar a na, kua mba ve tem shin pev u Yesereel cii." 
Joshua17:17 Tsô Yosua ôr kwagh a ya u Yosev, ka Eferaim man Manase je la, kaa er: U ngu ikur i vesen je, man u taver kpishi kpaa; yô, ú zua a kwar môm tseegh ga," 
Joshua17:18 kpa tar u iwoogh ua hingir u wou, gadia shin er u lu ikô nahan kpaa ú paa u, nahan tar u u dondo a i la kpaa ua hingir u wou; gadia ú zenda Mbakanaan kera shin er ve lu a akeke a iyôô, ve taver nahan je kpaa." 
Joshua18:1 Tsô mkohol u Mbaiserael cii zua hen Shilo, ve tim tenti u kohol ker heregh; tar hingir sha ikev ve." 
Joshua18:2 Ken Mbaiserael shi ikwe itiankarihiar i i lu a kar dyako u i ga yô. 
Joshua18:3 Tsô Yosua kaa a Mbaiserael er: Ka hanma shighe je man né de hwev né za ngohol tar u TER, Aôndo u uter enev, A ne ne?" 
Joshua18:4 Ver nen ior utar utar sha hanma kwe, nahan me tindi ve, ve̱ mough ve̱ zende ken tar cii, ve̱ nger mlu u u sha dyako ve, man ve̱ hide ve̱ va her a mo." 
Joshua18:5 Ve̱ kar u avegher ataankarahar; Yuda una tema ken tar na, vegher u ken imbusutariyan, ya u Yosev kpaa una tema ken tar na, vegher u ken imbusutarimese." 
Joshua18:6 Pav nen tar atôôn ataankarahar, nger, va nen a mi her a mo; yô, me er ne ishol sha mi sha ishigh ki TER, Aôndo wase." 
Joshua18:7 Mbalevi mba a ma ci ken a ven ga, gadia ka tom u pristi u TER u lu dyako ve ye; Gadi man Ruben man vegherkwe u Manase yô, ve vande ngohol dyako ve yande Yordan vegher u sha ityoughkitaregh, u Mose wanakiriki u TER na ve la." 
Joshua18:8 Tsô ior mbala mough za; mba ve za sha u ngeren mlu u tar la, Yosua kaa a ve er: Za, za zende nen ken tar la, nger nen mlu u u, shi hide nen her a mo; yô, me er ne ishol sha mi sha ishigh ki TER hen Shilo." 
Joshua18:9 Nahan ior mbala za za kar her atô u tar la, ve nger mlu u u ken takerada sha mlu u agar a u, ve pav u avegher ataankarahar; tsô ve va hen Yosua hen afo ken Shilo." 
Joshua18:10 Yosua er ve ishol sha ishigh ki TER hen Shilo; ka heregh je Yosua kar Mbaiserael tar la sha uipaven vev ye. 
Joshua18:11 Kwar u kwe u Mbabenyamin gba sha icombor ve, ipaven u ishol i tese ve yô, lu hen atô u ônov mba Yuda man ônov mba Yosev." 
Joshua18:12 Ikighirtar ve, vegher u ken imbusutarimese la, hii hen Yordan je; ikighir la kôndo za unde sha ikooso-woogh i Yeriko vegher u ken imbusutarimese, kôndo kar tar u iwoogh yem vegher u shin ityôtar, za kure ken desereti u Bete-aven." 
Joshua18:13 Keela yô, ikighir yem hen ian i Lushi zan zan za ar hen ikooso-woogh i Lushi (ka Betel je la) vegher u ken imbusutariyan; ikighir la sen za ar hen Ataroti-adar, tera sha uwo u u lu Bete-horon u shin vegher u ken imbusutariyan la." 
Joshua18:14 Ikighir gese hurugh ken ian i vegher u shin ityôtar yem ken imbusutariyan, hen uwo u u ver ishigh sha Bete-horon vegher u ken imbusutariyan la; i za kure hen Kiriati-baal (ka Kiriati-yearim je la), ka gar u ônov mba Yuda; ingin ka ikighir na i ken vegher u shin ityôtar." 
Joshua18:15 Ikighir i ken vegher u imbusutariyan hii hen pe Kiriati-yearim a kur la, gema ver ishigh shin ityôtar, kar za ar shin amboramnger a Nefetoa;" 
Joshua18:16 ikighir la sen za ar shin mkur u uwo u u lu sha ishigh ki pev u wan u Hinom u a lu shin pev u Rafaim vegher u ken imbusutarimese la; i sen i za ar shin pev u Hinom hen ikooso-woogh u Mbayebushi Vegher u ken imbusutariyan la, i sen i za ar shin En-rogel;" 
Joshua18:17 i kar vegher u ken imbusutarimese za ar hen En-shemese, i kar i za ar hen Geli-loti u a lu sha ishigh ki mkende u Adumim la, kar sen za ar hen iwen i Bohan wan u Ruben;" 
Joshua18:18 i kar hen ikooso-woogh sha ishigh ki Araba vegher u ken imbusutarimese la, kar sen za ar shin Araba;" 
Joshua18:19 ikighir la kar hen ikooso-woogh u Bete-hogela vegher u ken imbusutarimese, za kure hen zongough ku Zegemnger u Bar, ku ku lu vegher u imbusutarimese la, hen iasegh i Yordan vegher u ken imbusutariyan." 
Joshua18:20 Yordan lu ikighir i u, vegher u sha ityoughkitaregh. Ka dyako u ônov mba Benyamin je la, sha akighir a na cii ningir tser, sha icombor ve."
