Joshua18:21 Agar a kwe u ônov mba Benyamin sha icombor ve yô, lu Yeriko man Bete-hogela man Emeki-keshise" 
Joshua18:22 man Bete-araba man Semaraim man Betel 
Joshua18:23 man Avim man Para man Ofera 
Joshua18:24 man Kefaramoni man Ofeni man Geba; agar pue kar ahar kua agar a kiriki a a kase a la; 
Joshua18:25 Gibeon man Rama man Beeroti 
Joshua18:26 man Misepe man Kefira man Mosa," 
Joshua18:27 man Rekem man Irpeel man Tarala 
Joshua18:28 man Sela man Ha-elev man Yebushi (ka Yerusalem je la), man Gibeati kua Kiriati; ka agar pue kar anyiin je la, kua agar a kiriki a a kase a la. Ngun ka dyako u ônov mba Benyamin sha icombor ve." 
Joshua19:1 Kwar u sha uhar gba sha Shimeon, ka kwe u ônov mba Shimeon je la, sha icombor ve; dyako ve lu her atô u dyako u ônov mba Yuda." 
Joshua19:2 Dyako u ve zua a mi lu: Bersheba man Sheba man Molada 
Joshua19:3 man Hasar-shual man Baala man Esem 
Joshua19:4 man Eltoladi man Betul man Horma 
Joshua19:5 man Shikelagi man Bete-markaboti man Hasar-susa 
Joshua19:6 man Bete-lebaoti man Sharuhen; ka agar a pue kar atar kua agar a kiriki a a kase a la; 
Joshua19:7 Ain man Rimon man Eter kua Ashan; ka agar anyiin je la kua agar a kiriki a a kase a la; 
Joshua19:8 angarev mba ve kase agar la cii zan zan za ar hen Baalati-beer, ka Rama u ken Imbusutariyan la. Ngun ka dyako u kwe u ônov mba Shimeon sha icombor ve je ne." 
Joshua19:9 Ka ken kwar u ônov mba Yuda la, dyako u ônov mba Shimeon a lu ye, gadia kwar u ônov mba Yuda gande ve, ka nahan man ônov mba Shimeon zua a dyako ken atô u dyako ve ye." 
Joshua19:10 Kwar u sha utar gba sha ônov mba Sebulon sha icombor ve; ikighir i dyako ve yô, ar sha Saridi;" 
Joshua19:11 ikighir ve yem vegher u shin ityôtar zan zan hen Marala, kar za ar sha Dabesheti man shin uwagh u a lu sha ishigh ki Yokeneam la;" 
Joshua19:12 sha Saridi i hurugh i yem vegher u sha ityoughkitaregh sha ape iyange i dugh la, zan zan za ar hen ikighirtar i Kiseloti-tabor; i due hen Daberati, i kar i kôndo sha Yafia;" 
Joshua19:13 keela yô, i ver ishigh sha ityoughkitaregh zan zan hen Gati-hefer hen Ete-kashin; i za due hen Rimon u a samber zan zan ar hen Nea la;" 
Joshua19:14 ikighir la ningir un vegher u ken imbusutarimese za ar hen Hanaton, i za kure shin pev u Ifetael;" 
Joshua19:15 man Katati man Nahalal man Shimeron man Idala man Betelehem; agar pue kar ahar kua a kiriki a a kase a la. 
Joshua19:16 Ka dyako u ônov mba Sebulon sha icombor ve je ne, agar angan kua agar a kiriki a a kase a la." 
Joshua19:17 Kwar u sha unyiin gba sha Isakar, ka sha ci u ônov mba Isakar je la, sha icombor ve." 
Joshua19:18 Tar ve lu: Yesereel man Kesuloti man Shunem 
Joshua19:19 man Hafaraim man Shion man Anaharati 
Joshua19:20 man Rabiti man Kishion man Ebese 
Joshua19:21 man Remeti man En-ganim man En-hada man Bete-pase; 
Joshua19:22 man ikighir la za ar hen Tabor man Shahasuma man Bete-shemeshi, ikighir ve za kure hen Yordan; agar pue kar ataratar kua agar a kiriki a a kase a la." 
Joshua19:23 Ngun ka dyako u kwe u ônov mba Isakar je ne, sha icombor ve, agar kua agar a kiriki a a kase a la." 
Joshua19:24 Kwar u sha utaan gba sha kwe u ônov mba Asher sha icombor ve. 
Joshua19:25 Tar ve lu: Helkati man Hali man Beten man Akesav 
Joshua19:26 man Alameleki man Amadi man Mishal, za ar hen Karmel vegher u shin ityôtar man shi hen Shihor-libenati;" 
Joshua19:27 i hurugh i za vegher u sha ape iyange i dugh la hen Bete-dagon za ar hen Sebulon, man shin pev u Ifetael vegher u ken imbusutarimese, hen Bete-emeki man Nehiel; i due i va hen Kabul vegher u ken uwegh ku imesegh," 
Joshua19:28 man Eberon man Rehobi man Hamon man Kana zan zan ar hen Shidon u vesen; 
Joshua19:29 ikighir la hurugh za hen Rama za ar hen gilgar u Tiru shi i hurugh i za hen Hosa, za kure hen zegemnger, hii hen Heber tar u u samber zan zan za ar hen Akeshibi la," 
Joshua19:30 man Uma man Afeki man Rehobi; agar ikundu kar ahar kua agar a kiriki a a kase a la. 
Joshua19:31 Ka dyako u kwe u ônov mba Asher sha icombor ve je ne, agar ne kua agar a kiriki a a kase a la." 
Joshua19:32 Kwar u sha ataratar gba sha ônov mba Nafetali, ka ônov mba Nafetali sha icombor ve je la." 
Joshua19:33 Ikighirtar ve hii hen Helev, hen kon u terebin u u lu hen Sananim, man Adaminekebi man Yabenel za ar hen Lakumi; i za kure hen Yordan;" 
Joshua19:34 ikighir la hurugh za vegher u shin ityôtar zan zan za ar hen Asenoti-tabor, i due keela i za ar hen Hukoki, za zua a Sebulon vegher u ken imbusutariyan, kar gema za zua a Asher vegher u shin ityôtar man sha Yuda hen Yordan vegher u iyange i dugh la." 
Joshua19:35 Agar a a lu a gir yô, lu Shidim man Ser man Hamati man Rakati man Kinereti" 
Joshua19:36 man Adama man Rama man Hasor 
Joshua19:37 man Kedeshi man Ederei man En-hasor 
Joshua19:38 man Yiron man Migedal-el man Horem man Bete-anati man Bete-shemeshi, agar pue kar ataankaranyiin kua agar a kiriki a a kase a la." 
Joshua19:39 Ngun ka dyako u ônov mba Nafetali, sha icombor ve je ne, agar kua agar a kiriki a a kase a la." 
Joshua19:40 Kwar u sha utaankaruhar gba sha ônov mba Dan sha icombor ve. 
Joshua19:41 Tar u dyako ve lu hen Sora man Esetaol man Ir-shemeshi 
Joshua19:42 man Shalabin man Ayalon man Itela," 
Joshua19:43 man Elon man Timna man Ekeron 
Joshua19:44 man Eleteke man Gibeton man Baalati 
Joshua19:45 man Yehudi man Bene-beraki man Gati-rimon 
Joshua19:46 man Meyarkon man Rakon, a tar u u ver ishigh sha Yopa la." 
Joshua19:47 Tar u ônov mba Dan yina ve, nahan ônov mba Dan kôndo za nôngo ityav a Leshem, ve ngohol un ve hemba un sha zwa u sanker, ve ngohol u hingir u ve, ve tema kimi, maa ve ii Leshem iti er Dan, sha iti i ter ve Dan." 
Joshua19:48 Ngun ka dyako u kwe u ônov mba Dan sha icombor ve je ne, agar angan kua agar a kiriki a a kase a la." 
Joshua19:49 Er ve kure dyako u karen u hen tar la sha mlu u akighir a u yô, Mbaiserael gema na Yosua, wan u Nun, dyako hen atô ve." 
Joshua19:50 Sha imo i TER kaa la, ve na un gar u a sar un yô, lu Timnati-sera, sha tar u iwoogh u Eferaim; tsô a maa gar la, a tema ker." 
Joshua19:51 Mban ka udyako mba pristi Eleasar man Yosua wan u Nun man mbavesen mba yaav mba uter mba ikwe i ônov mba Iserael ve kar dyako a mi, sha ishol i eren, ken Shilo sha ishigh ki TER, hen hunda u tenti u kohol ker la. Kape ve kure tar karen la." 
Joshua20:1 Tsô TER ôr kwagh a Yosua kaa er: 
Joshua20:2 Ôr kwagh a Mbaiserael, kaa ve wer: Ver nen agar a waren ker, a yan M ôr Mose kwagh u a, gema kaa ne la," 
Joshua20:3 sha er or u nan woo or abu i lu sha apera ga nana̱ yevese nana̱ za ta ker yô, a̱ hingir ne ajiir a waren sha ikev i or u oron iyev i awambe la." 
Joshua20:4 Nana̱ yevese nana̱ za ta ken mô gar ugen, nana̱ tile sha hundagar henpe nyôron, nana̱ pase mbavesen mba gar la kwagh u nan er yô; nahan vea nyôr a nan ken gar vea na nan ijiir i teman." 
Joshua20:5 Aluer or u oron iyev i awambe la una tôv nan angahar una za kohol kpaa, ve̱ de ne or u nan woo or la sha ikev na ga, gadia nan wua u a we ndor a nan la abu, nan vande kôron un ihom kpaa ga." 
Joshua20:6 Nana̱ tema ken gar la zan zan shighe u mkohol á ôr nan ijir, man shi saa zegepristi u a tem sha ayange la una kpe kera, man or u nan woo or la, nana hide ken gar u nan, hen ya u nan, ken gar u iyange nan due nan yevese la ye." 
Joshua20:7 Tsô ve tsegha Kedeshi ken Galilia sha tar u iwoogh u Nafetali la, man Shekem sha tar u iwoogh u Eferaim, man Kiriati-arba (ka Heberon je la) sha tar u iwoogh u Yuda." 
Joshua20:8 Yande Yordan hen Yeriko vegher u sha ityoughkitaregh yô, ve ver Beser ken desereti sha tar u vaanaa ken kwe u Ruben, man Ramoti ken Gileadi ken kwe u Gadi, man Golan ken Bashan ken kwe u Manase." 
Joshua20:9 Angan ka agar a i ver sha ci u Mbaiserael cii kua or u ikur igen u nan nyer a nyôr yô, sha er hanmô u nan wua or abu yô, nana̱ yevese nana̱ ta ker, nana̱ de kpe sha ikev i or u oron iyev i awambe ga, saa nana̱ vande tilen sha ishigh ki mkohol ve." 
Joshua21:1 Tsô mbavesen mba yaav mba uter mba Mbalevi va hen pristi Eleasar man hen Yosua wan u Nun man hen mbavesen mba yaav mba uter mba ikwe i Mbaiserael; 
Joshua21:2 ve ôr kwagh a ve hen Shilo ken tar u Kanaan, ve kaa er: TER kaa Mose er, a̱ kaa, i̱ na se agar a sé tema kimi kua akôngo a lun a toho a a kase a sha ci u ilev yasev." 
Joshua21:3 Nahan Mbaiserael pande dyako ve, gema na Mbalevi agar kua akôngo a lun a toho a a kase, a sha imo i TER." 
Joshua21:4 Kwar gba sha icombor i Mbakohati; ônov mba pristi Aron, mba ve lu Mbalevi yô, ve zua a agar pue kar atar sha ishor i eren ken kwe u Yuda man kwe u Shimeon kua kwe u Benyamin." 
Joshua21:5 Ônov mba Kohati mbagenev yô, ve zua a agar pue sha ishor i eren ken icombor i kwe u Eferaim man kwe u Dan kua vegherkwe u Manase." 
Joshua21:6 Ônov mba Gershon ve zua a agar pue kar atar sha ishor i eren ken icombor i kwe i Isakar man kwe u Asher man kwe u Nafetali kua vegherkwe u Manase ken Bashan. 
Joshua21:7 Ônov mba Merari sha icombor ve, ve zua a agar pue kar ahar ken kwe u Ruben man kwe u Gadi kua kwe u Sebulon." 
Joshua21:8 Mbaiserael na Mbalevi agar ne kua akôngo a lun a toho a a kase a yô, sha ishor i eren sha imo i TER kaa, Mose gema ôr ve la." 
Joshua21:9 Kwe u ônov mba Yuda kua kwe u ônov mba Shimeon ve na agar a i ter ati a a ne," 
Joshua21:10 hingir a ônov mba Aron, icombor i Mbakohati, mba ve lu ônov mba Levi (kwar u hiihii lu u ve je)." 
Joshua21:11 Ve na ve: Kiriati-arba, Arba ka ter u Anaki (ka Heberon je la,) sha tar u iwoogh u Yuda kua akôngo a lun a toho a a kase un yô." 
Joshua21:12 Kpa ishule i gar la man agar a kiriki a a kase un yô, ve na Kalebu wan u Yefune, hingir kwagh na." 
Joshua21:13 Ônov mba pristi Aron yô, ve na ve Heberon kua akôngo a lun a toho a a kase un la, ka gar u waren ker sha ci u or u nan woo or yô, kua Libena man akôngo a na," 
Joshua21:14 man Yatir kua akôngo a na, man Eshetemoa kua akôngo a na," 
Joshua21:15 man Holon kua akôngo a na, man Debir kua akôngo a na," 
Joshua21:16 man Ain kua akôngo a na, Yuta kua akôngo a na, man Bete-shemeshi kua akôngo a na; ka agar ataankaranyiin ken ikwe ihiar je ne." 
Joshua21:17 Ken kwe u Benyamin yô, ka Gibeon kua akôngo a na, man Geba kua akôngo a na," 
Joshua21:18 man Anatoti kua akôngo a na, man Alemon kua akôngo a na; ka agar anyiin je la." 
Joshua21:19 Agar cii a ônov mba pristi Aron, lu agar pue kar atar kua akôngo a a." 
Joshua21:20 Icombor i ônov mba Kohati, Mbalevi, ka ônov mba Kohati mba ve shi yô, ve zua a agar sha ishor i eren ken kwe u Eferaim." 
Joshua21:21 I na ve Shekem kua akôngo a lun a toho a a kase un, sha tar u iwoogh u Eferaim, ka gar u waren ker sha ci u or u nan woo or yô, man Geser kua akôngo a na," 
Joshua21:22 man Kibisaim kua akôngo a na, man Bete-horon kua akôngo a na; ka agar anyiin je la." 
Joshua21:23 Ken kwe u Dan yô, lu Eleteke kua akôngo a na, man Gibeton kua akôngo a na," 
Joshua21:24 Aiyalon kua akôngo a na, man Gati-rimon kua akôngo a na; ka agar anyiin je la." 
Joshua21:25 Ken vegherkwe u Manase, lu Taanaki kua akôngo a na, man Gati-rimon kua akôngo a na; ka agar ahar je la." 
Joshua21:26 Agar cii a icombor i ônov mba Kohati mba ve shi la, lu agar pue kua akôngo a a." 
Joshua21:27 Ônov mba Gershon mba ve lu icombor i Mbalevi yô, ken vegherkwe u Manase, i na ve Golan ken Bashan, kua akôngo a na, ka agar u waren ker sha ci u or u nan woo or yô, man Beshetera kua akôngo a na; ka agar ahar je la." 
Joshua21:28 Man ken kwe u Isakar yô, lu Kishion kua akôngo a na, man Daberati kua akôngo a na," 
Joshua21:29 man Yarmuti kua akôngo a na, man En-ganim kua akôngo a na; ka agar anyiin je la." 
Joshua21:30 Ken kwe u Asher yô, lu Mishal kua akôngo a na, man Abedon kua akôngo a na," 
Joshua21:31 man Helkati kua akôngo a na, man Rehobi kua akôngo a na; agar anyiin je la." 
Joshua21:32 Man ken kwe u Nafetali yô, lu Kedeshi ken Galilia kua akôngo a na, ka gar u waren ker sha ci u or u nan woo or yô, man Hamoti-dor kua akôngo a na, ma Karetan kua akôngo a na; ka agar atar je la." 
Joshua21:33 Agar a Mbagershon cii sha icombor ve yô, lu agar pue kar atar kua akôngo a a." 
Joshua21:34 Icombor i ônov mba Merari, Mbalevi, mba ve shi yô, i na ve ken kwe u Sebulon: Yokeneam kua akôngo a na, man Karta kua akôngo a na," 
Joshua21:35 man Demena kua akôngo a na, man Nahalal kua akôngo a na; ka agar anyiin je la." 
Joshua21:36 Man ken kwe u Ruben yô, lu Beser kua akôngo a na, man Yahashi kua akôngo a na," 
Joshua21:37 man Kedemoti kua akôngo a na, man Mefaati kua akôngo a na; ka agar anyiin je la." 
Joshua21:38 Ken kwe u Gadi yô, lu Ramoti ken Gileadi kua akôngo a na, ka gar u waren ker sha ci u or u nan woo or yô, man Mahanaim kua akôngo a na," 
Joshua21:39 man Heshebon kua akôngo a na, man Yaser kua akôngo a na; ka agar anyiin je la." 
Joshua21:40 Agar ne cii ka a ônov mba Merari, sha icombor ve, ka icombor i Mbalevi i i shi je la; kwar ve lu agar pue kar ahar." 
Joshua21:41 Kohol agar a Mbalevi ken atô u Mbaiserael cii yô, lu agar akunduahar kar anigheni kua akôngo a a." 
Joshua21:42 Agar ne cii lu a akôngo a lun a toho a a, a a kase a la; ka pe agar ne cii a lu la." 
Joshua21:43 Nahan TER na Iserael tar la cii, u A bum a uter vev er Una na ve u la; ve ngohol u, ve tema ken u." 
Joshua21:44 TER na ve mmem han han kpaa, er A bum a uter vev cii yô; ma orihom môm cihi ve ga; TER na mbaihomov vev cii sha ikev ve." 
Joshua21:45 Ma kwagh u dedoo môm u Aôndo ôr ya u Iserael cii bunde ga, akaa cii kure sha mi vough." 
Joshua22:1 Tsô Yosua yila Mbaruben man Mbagadi man vegherkwe u Manase," 
Joshua22:2 a kaa a ve er: Ne er kwagh u Mose wanakiriki u TER kaa ne cii, man shi ne ver ato sha imo yam sha hanma kwagh u m kaa ne cii." 
Joshua22:3 Ayange imôngo ne, ne undu angbianev enev ga zan zan nyian, ne wa iko sha kwagh u TER, Aôndo wen, a we ne la." 
Joshua22:4 Hegen yô, TER, Aôndo wen, na anmgbianev enev mmem, er lu kaa ve yô; gema nen, hide nen hen utenti enev, hen tar u dyako wen, u Mose wanakiriki u TER a ne nen yande Yordan la." 
Joshua22:5 Yô, ver nen ishima, er nen sha kwaghwan man tindi u Mose wanakiriki u TER A we ne yô, er TER, Aôndo wen, A̱ doo ne ishima man né zenden sha igbenda Na cii, né waan atindi a Na iko, né var a Na man né eren Un tom a ishima yen cii kua uma wen cii kpaa." 
Joshua22:6 Kape Yosua ver ve doo doo, a na ve gbenda la; ve yem hen utenti vev." 
Joshua22:7 Mose vande nan vegherkwe u Manase u môm dyako ken Bashan; kpa vegherkwe ugen la yô, Yosua na ve a anmgbianev vev imôngo yande Yordan vegher u shin ityôtar. Zum u Yosua na ve gbenda u yemen hen utenti vev la yô, a ver ve doo doo," 
Joshua22:8 a ôr kwagh a ve a kaa er: Hide nen hen utenti enev a inyaregh kpishi man ilev kpishi man azurfa man zenaria man togula man iyôgh kua akondo kpishi, kar nen ishar i mbaihomov enev a anmgbianev enev." 
Joshua22:9 Tsô ônov mba Ruben man ônov mba Gadi kua vegherkwe u Manase hide, ve undu Mbaiserael ken Shilo u a lu ken tar u Kanaan la, ve za hen tar u Gileadi hen tar u dyako ve, u i ne ve dyako sha u, sha kwaghôron u TER u a kaa a Mose la." 
Joshua22:10 Zum u ve ar hen tar u u kase Yordan, u u lu ken vegher u Kanaan la yô, ônov mba Ruben man ônov mba Gadi kua vegherkwe u Manase ta atse a nanden nagh sha mi hen kpe u Yordan la, zegeatse, gba ikôr mimi." 
Joshua22:11 Tsô Mbaiserael ungwa gwa er: Nenge, ônov mba Ruben man ônov mba Gadi kua vegherkwe u Manase, ve ta atse sha ishigh ki tar u Kanaan ken tar u u kase Yordan, vegher u ken Mbaiserael la." 
Joshua22:12 Zum u Mbaiserael ungwa gwa la yô, mkohol u ior i Iserael cii kohol imôngo hen Shilo, sha u za nôngon ityav a ve." 
Joshua22:13 Tsô Mbaiserael tindi Pinehashi, wan u pristi Eleasar, hen ônov mba Ruben man ônov mba Gadi kua vegherkwe u Manase, ken tar u Gileadi," 
Joshua22:14 a atiator pue a na imôngo, ititor i môm sha hanma kwe u Iserael; hanmô ve lu orhemen ken ya u ter ken uipaven mba Iserael." 
Joshua22:15 Ve va hen ônov mba Ruben man ônov mba Gadi kua vegherkwe u Manase ken tar u Gileadi, ve va ôr kwagh a ve, ve kaa er:" 
Joshua22:16 Mkohol u ior i TER cii ngu kaan nahan er: Ka nyi kwaghbo ne, ne er Aôndo u Iserael ne gem nyian ne de u dondon TER, ne ta atse a en kposo hendan a TER nyiana?" 
Joshua22:17 Isholibo i Peor kuma se gaa? Kwagh u se lu a wanger ayol a ase sha mi ga zan zan nyian ne, shin er bouange samber sha mkohol u ior i TER je kpaa," 
Joshua22:18 nahan kpaa ne gema nyian ne de u dondon TERE? Yô, er ne hendan a TER nyian ne, kper Una yuwe a mkohol u Iserael cii." 
Joshua22:19 Kpa aluer tar u ne ngohol la, ua lu wang ga yô, per za nen ken tar u TER jim la, henpe tabernakel u TER a lu yô, ngohol nen tar ken a vese; kpa de kera hendan nen a TER ga; man de kera hendan nen a vese kpaa ga, sha u tan atse a en a nanden nagh sha mi kposo a atse a TER, Aôndo wase, ga." 
Joshua22:20 Zum u Akan wan u Sera er kwaghbo sha kwagh u i tswer i we un ifan la yô, iyugh kera va sha mkohol u ior i Iserael cii gaa? Kera lu un tseegh tim sha isholibo na ga." 
Joshua22:21 Tsô ônov mba Ruben man ônov mba Gadi kua vegherkwe u Manase gema ôr kwagh a mbahemenev mba icombor i Iserael ve kaa er: 
Joshua22:22 TER, Aôndo u mbaaôndo! TER, Aôndo u mbaaôndo! Un yô, A fa, man Iserael kpaa una fa; aluer ka sha mhendan shin sha tindi u peren u TER yô, de yem se nyian ga!" 
Joshua22:23 Aluer sea ta atse a nanden nagh sha mi, sha u sé gema sé undun TER, shin u nan nagh ku nanden sha a, shin nagh ku sha samuyia, shin sha u nan iniav mbi bem sha a yô, TER iyol Na, A̱ or iyev." 
Joshua22:24 Ka sha ishima i nyian je se er kwagh ne ye, se lu kaan ser, alaghga iyange igen ônov enev vea ôr kwagh a ônov asev vea kaa er: Ka nyi i zough ne a TER, Aôndo u Iserael?" 
Joshua22:25 Gadia TER ver Yordan, ka ikighir yase a ven, ne ônov mba Ruben kua ônov mba Gadi, ne mba a kwar ken TER ga; nahan ônov enev vea na ônov asev vea de u cian TER." 
Joshua22:26 Ka nahan se kaa ser: Sé wa ago iyol hegen, sé ta atse sha ci wase, ka sha ci u nanden nagh sha mi ga, man ka sha ci u nagh ku sôngon kpaa ga," 
Joshua22:27 kpa a̱ lu shiada hen atô wase a ven man hen atô u icombor yase i ken ijime yase, er se civir TER sha ishigh Nagh sha iniav yasev mbi nanden man iniav yasev mbi sôngon kua iniav yasev mbi bem, sha ci u iyange igen ônov enev ve̱ de kaan a ônov asev er: Ne mba a ma kwar hen TER ga, ze." 
Joshua22:28 Ka nahan se kaa ser: Tsô zum u vea kaan a vese shin vea kaan a icombor yase ken ayange a ken hemen la nahan yô, se kpaa sé kaa ser: Nenge nen inja i mte u i te atse a TER a nanden nagh sha mi ne, a uter asev ta la, lu sha ci u nagh ku nanden ga, man sha ci u nagh ku sôngon kpaa ga, kpa ka shiada her atô wase a ven." 
Joshua22:29 Mayange se fatyô u hendan a TER nyian, sé gema ijime Na nyian, sé de u dondon TER ga, sé ta atse a nanden nagh sha mi agen kposo a atse a TER, Aôndo wase, a a lu sha ishigh ki tabernakel Na la, sha ci u nagh ku nanden man ku sha samuyia kua ku sôngon ga." 
Joshua22:30 Zum u pristi Pinehashi man atiator a mkohol u ior la, ka mbahemenev mba uya mba uter mba Iserael je la, mba ve lu a na imôngo, ve ungwa akaaôron a ônov man Ruben mba ônov mba Gadi kua ônov mba Manase ôr la yô, doo ve kpishi." 
Joshua22:31 Tsô Pinehashi wan u pristi Eleasar kaa a ônov mba Ruben man ônov mba Gadi kua ônov mba Manase er: Nyian se fa TER ngu her atô wase, sha er ne er isholibo ne sha ishigh ki TER ga yô; ne yima Mbaiserael sha ikev i TER ve." 
Joshua22:32 Nahan Pinehashi wan u pristi Eleasar kua atiator, mough hen ônov mba Ruben kua ônov mba Gadi, ve due ken tar u Gileadi ve hide ken tar u Kanaan hen Mbaiserael ve va ôr ve kwagh la." 
Joshua22:33 Kwagh ne doo Mbaiserael, tsô Mbaiserael wuese Aôndo, ve kera seer ôron er vea nôngo ityav a ve, vea tim tar u ônov mba Ruben kua ônov mba Gadi la ga." 
Joshua22:34 Tsô ônov mba Ruben man ônov mba Gadi, ii atse la iti er: Nga Shiada hen atô wase er TER A lu Aôndo yô." 
Joshua23:1 Tsô ayange nga kar kera kpishi, zum u TER na Iserael mmem sha ikev i mbaihomov vev mba ve kase ve la cii yô, Yosua kpaa bee iyol, tsa sha won;" 
Joshua23:2 nahan Yosua yila Iserael cii, mbatamen vev man mbahemenev vev man mbaajiriv vev kua mbavesen vev, a kaa a ve er: Mo m bee iyol ve, m tsa sha won;" 
Joshua23:3 ne ayol a en ne nenge akaa cii a TER, Aôndo wen, er akuraior ne cii, sha ci wen yô; gadia TER, Aôndo wen, ka Un je, A nenge ityav sha ci wen ye." 
Joshua23:4 Nenge, m kar ne akuraior a a shi ne, hingir dyako u ikwe yen, hii hen Yordan je, kua akuraior cii a m tim la, zan zan za ar hen Zegemnger u Tamen vegher u shin ityôtar la." 
Joshua23:5 TER, Aôndo wen, ka Un je, Una zenda ve sha ishigh yenegh kera, Una kar a ve sha ishigh yenegh kera, né ngohol tar ve, er TER, Aôndo wen, kaa ne nahan." 
Joshua23:6 Nahan yô, taver nen ishima tsung, waan nen akaa a i nger ken ruamabera u atindigh u Mose la cii iko, eren nen sha mi, de undun un kahan ken uwegh ku yanegh shin ku imesegh ga;" 
Joshua23:7 de nongo nen a akuraior a a shi ken a ven ne mayange ga, man de teren nen iti i mbaaôndo vev ga, de bumun ve ga, de eren nen ve tom ga, de gur civir nen ve kpaa ga;" 
Joshua23:8 kpa var a TER, Aôndo wen, er ne lu eren zan zan nyian nahan." 
Joshua23:9 Gadia TER zenda akuraior a vesen a taver sha ishigh yenegh kera, kpa ne yô, ma or fatyô u tilen ne sha ishi ga zan zan nyian." 
Joshua23:10 Or wen môm kpaa ka nan zenda ior dubu; gadia TER, Aôndo wen, ka Un je A nenge ityav sha ci wen ye, er lu kaa ne nahan." 
Joshua23:11 Nahan kura nen ayol a en dedoo, TER, Aôndo wen, A̱ doo ne ishima." 
Joshua23:12 Gadia aluer nea kaha nea zua a akuraior a a shi her ken a ven ne, nea er kasev ken a ve, vea nungwa a ven yô," 
Joshua23:13 fa nen mimi je, TER, Aôndo wen, Una kera zenda akuraior ne sha ishigh yenegh kera ga, kpaa aa hingir ne kwaghhônon man to man kwagh u kuman ne hen ambusu man usaa ken ashe a en, zan zan né tim ken tar u dedoo kera, u TER, Aôndo wen, A ne ne u ne." 
Joshua23:14 Nenge nyian m ngu zan sha gbenda u ior mba sha won cii; ne kpaa ne fa ken asema a en cii kua ken uuma enev cii kpaa, ma kwagh môm sha akaa a dedoo a TER, Aôndo wen, ter sha a ven la bunde ga, a cii i kure ne a vough, ma kwagh môm bunde ga." 
Joshua23:15 Tsô, er akaa a dedoo a TER, Aôndo wen, ôr a ven la cii a er ne sha mi nahan yô, kape TER shi Una va ne a akaabo cii, zan zan Una tim ne sha tar u dedoo kera, u TER, Aôndo wen, A ne ne u ne." 
Joshua23:16 Aluer nea vihi ikuryan i TER, Aôndo wen, A ye a ven la, né yem né za civir mbaaôndo mbagenev, né gure ve inya yô, ishima ia vihi TER a ven, né tim ken tar u dedoo u A ne u ne, fese je." 
Joshua24:1 Tsô Yosua kohol ikwe i Iserael cii hen Shekem; a yila mbatamen mba Iserael man mbahemenev vev man mbaajiriv vev kua mbavesen vev; tsô ve va sha ishigh ki Aôndo. 
Joshua24:2 Yosua kaa a ior cii er: TER, Aôndo u Iserael, ngu kaan nahan er: Ngise uter enev tema Ifi yande la, ka Tera, ter u Aberaham man ter u Nahor; ve lu civir mbaaôndo mbagenev je." 
Joshua24:3 Tsô M kua a ter wen Aberaham, yande Ifi keela M zende a na ken tar u Kanaan cii, M ngee un tsombor, M na un Isaka." 
Joshua24:4 M gema M na Isaka Yakob kua Isou; M na Isou uwo u Seir, sha u a̱ ngohol u; kpaa Yakob a ônov nav, ve yem shin Igipiti." 
Joshua24:5 M tindi Mose man Aron, M tsaha Igipiti, sha akaa a M er ken atô na la; ken masetyô yô, M due a ven." 
Joshua24:6 M due a uter enev ken Igipiti, ne va ar hen zegemnger; Mbaigipiti tôv uter enev angahar a akekeautya man mbaanyinyav zan zan ve ar hen Zegemnger u Nyian." 
Joshua24:7 Zum u ve vaa TER yô, A wa ime hen atô wen a Mbaigipiti, A va a zegemnger sha a ve, A cir ve; ashe a en nenge kwagh u M er Igipiti la; ne tsa ken desereti ayange kpishi." 
Joshua24:8 Tsô M va a ven ken tar u Mbaamor, mba ve tema yande Yordan la; ve nôngo ityav a ven, kpa M na ve sha ikev yen, ne ngohol tar ve; M tim ve sha ishigh yenegh kera kpaa." 
Joshua24:9 Tsô Balaki wan u Shipor, tor u Moabi, mough, nongo ityav a Iserael; a tindi i yila Balaam wan u Beor, er a̱ va wa ne ifan." 
Joshua24:10 Kpa M rumun M ver ato hen Balaam ga; nahan a gema a ver ne doo doo; M yima ne sha ikev na. 
Joshua24:11 Ne per Yordan, ne va hen Yeriko; ior mba Yeriko nôngo ityav a ven kua Mbaamor man Mbaperishi man Mbakanaan man Mbahiti man Mbagirgashi man Mbahivi kua Mbayebushi; kpa M na ve sha ikev yen." 
Joshua24:12 M tindi ahambe hemen, za zenda ve sha ishigh yenegh kera, ka utor mba uhar mba Mbaamor je la; lu sha sanker wou ga, lu sha ada wou kpaa ga." 
Joshua24:13 M na ne tar u ne er tom ker ga yô, man agar a i lu ne ne maa ga yô, ne tema ker; man ishule i ikon i wain man i ikon i olev i i lu ne ne môôr i ga yô, ne mba yan atam a i." 
Joshua24:14 Nahan yô, cia nen TER, er nen Un tom sha ishima i môm man sha mimi kpaa; de nen mbaaôndo mba uter enev lu civir ve Ifi yande la kua ken Igipiti la, civir nen TER." 
Joshua24:15 Kpa aluer, u civir TER, á lu ne kwagh u bo yô, tsuwa nen u i lu ne ka civir la nyian, shin a lu Mbaaôndo mba Ifi yandera mba uter enev lu civir la, shin mbaaôndo mba Mbaamor, mba ne tem ken tar ve ne; kpa mo a ya wam cii yô, ka TER sé civir Un ye." 
Joshua24:16 Tsô ior gema kaa er: Mayange se fatyô u undun TER, sé gema sé civir mbaaôndo mbagenev ga;" 
Joshua24:17 gadia TER, Aôndo wase, ka Un, A dugh a vese kua uter asev ken tar u Igipiti ken ya u kpan ye, shi A er uzegembaakaav mban sha ashe ase je, A kura se sha gbenda u se vaan sha mi cii, kua ken akuraior a se kar hen atô u a cii kpaa;" 
Joshua24:18 TER zenda akuraior cii sha ishigh yasegh kera, ka Mbaamor mba ve lu ken tar ne ne; nahan yô, se kpaa sé civir TER, gadia ka Un A lu Aôndo wase ye." 
Joshua24:19 Tsô Yosua kaa a ior er: Ne fatyô u civir TER ga; gadia Un ka Aôndo u wang; ka Aôndo u gban iwuhe Una de ne akaabo a en kua asorabo a en ga. 
Joshua24:20 Aluer ne undu TER né civir mbaaôndo mbagenev yô, Una gema Una er ne kwagh u bo, Una tim ne, shin er A vande veren ne doo doo nahan kpaa." 
Joshua24:21 Tsô ior kaa a Yosua er: Sé er nahan ga, ka TER sé civir ye." 
Joshua24:22 Tsô Yosua kaa a ior er: Ne mba pasen ayol a en je ner, ne tsuwa TER né civir Un. Ve kaa er: Se mba pasen nahan." 
Joshua24:23 Nahan yô, dugh nen mbaaôndo mbagenev mba ve lu ker a ven la, kera gema ver nen asema a en sha TER, Aôndo u Iserael." 
Joshua24:24 Tsô ior kaa a Yosua er: Ka TER, Aôndo wase, sé civir un ye, ka imo Na kpaa sé ver ato sha mi ye." 
Joshua24:25 Nahan Yosua ya ikur a ior sha iyange la, a wa ve tindi kua kwaghôron u ijirigh hen Shekem." 
Joshua24:26 Tsô Yosua nger akaaôron ne ken ruamabera u atindigh u Aôndo; a tôô zegeiwen a tim un hen kon u terebin u u lu hen icighanjiir u TER la. 
Joshua24:27 Yosua shi kaa a ior cii er: Nenge, iwen ne ia hingir se shiada, gadia i ungwa akaaôron a TER A er se cii; nahan yô, ia hingir ne shiada sha er né nyiman Aôndo wen ga yô." 
Joshua24:28 Nahan Yosua na ior gbenda, hanma or yem hen dyako u nan." 
Joshua24:29 Tsô ken masejime u akaa ne, Yosua wan u Nun, wanakiriki u TER, kpe lu anyom deri man pue." 
Joshua24:30 Ve ii un ken tar u dyako na, hen Timnati-sera, u a lu ken tar u iwoogh u Eferaim hen uwo u Gaashi vegher u ken imbusutarimese la." 
Joshua24:31 Mbaiserael civir TER sha ayange a Yosua lu uma la cii, man sha ayange a mbatamen mba ve lu uma heregh er Yosua kpe kera la, mba ve fa aeren a TER cii, a A er sha ci u Iserael la." 
Joshua24:32 I ii akuhe a Yosev, a Mbaiserael mough a mi ken tar u Igipiti la ken Shekem ken tiôntar u Yakob yam a ônov mba Hamor, ter u Shekem, sha agbenger a inyar kuma deri la; a hingir dyako u ônov mba Yosev." 
Joshua24:33 Eleasar wan u Aron kpaa kpe; ve ii un sha igungu u wan na Pinehashi, u i na un sha tar u iwoogh u Eferaim la." 
Judges1:1 Tsô Yosua kpe kera yô, Mbaiserael pine TER, ve kaa er: Ka an wase nana̱ vande za nôngon ityav a Mbakanaana?" 
Judges1:2 TER kaa er: Ka Yuda una za ye; nenge, M na tar ne sha ikev na." 
Judges1:3 Tsô Yuda kaa a Shimeon anngô na er: Va, sé za imôngo ken tar u i nem la, sé za nôngo ityav a Mbakanaan; yô, mo kpaa me za a we imôngo ken tar u i ne u la. Nahan Shimeon za a na imôngo." 
Judges1:4 Tsô Yuda kôndo; TER na Mbakanaan kua Mbaperishi sha ikev ve; ve wua ve hen Beseki kuma ior dubu pue. 
Judges1:5 Ve kohol Adoni-beseki ken Beseki, ve nôngo ityav a na, ve hemba Mbakanaan kua Mbaperishi kpaa." 
Judges1:6 Kpa Adoni-beseki yevese, nahan ve zenda un ijime ve za kôr, ve tôndo un ahôaveegh a tamen kua ahôangahar a tamen." 
Judges1:7 Tsô Adoni-beseki kaa er: Utor mba akunduatargber, mba i tôndo ve ahôaveegh a tamen man ahôangahar a tamen la, lu sangen kwaghyan ve shin atô a tebul wam je; er mo iyange m er nahan, kape Aôndo kpaa A orom iyev ne. Tsô ve va a na hen Yerusalem, a va kpe her." 
Judges1:8 Ônov mba Yuda nôngo ityav a Yerusalem, ve ngohol un, ve hemba un sha zwa u sanker, ve nande gar sha usu." 
Judges1:9 Ken masetyô la, ônov mba Yuda sen za nôngo ityav a Mbakanaan mba ve tema ken tar u iwoogh, man tar u Imbusutariyan man tar u delaa la." 
Judges1:10 Yuda za nôngo ityav a Mbakanaan mba ve tema ken Heberon la (ngise la i yilan Heberon er Kiriati-arba); ve hemba Sheshai man Ahiman kua Talmai. 
Judges1:11 Shi a mough a za nôngo ityav a mba ve tema ken Debir la (ngise la, i yilan Debir er Kiriati-sefer)." 
Judges1:12 Tsô Kalebu kaa er: Or u nana hemba Kiriati-sefer, nana ngohol un yô, me na nan Akesa wan wam u kwase, nana̱ er." 
Judges1:13 Tsô Oteniel wan u Kenashi anngô u Kalebu u kiriki la, za za hemba un; nahan a na un Akesa wan na u kwase la, hingir kwase na." 
Judges1:14 Tsô zum u kwase la, lu van her a na yô, a za un iyol er a̱ sôn ter na tiôntar ugen; tsô kwase la hungwa sha jaki na, nahan Kalebu pine un er: Ka nyi i sar uwe?" 
Judges1:15 A kaa a na er: Nam iwua, u nam tar u tseghe tseghe ken tar u Imbusutariyan la, yô, shi nam amboramnger kpaa. Nahan Kalebu na un ambor a sha kua a shin kpaa." 
Judges1:16 Ônov mba Orkeni won u Mose la, mough ken gar u avilegh la, a ônov mba Yuda imôngo, ve nyôr ken ikôngough ki Yuda ki ki lu hen Aradi tar u ken Imbusutariyan la, ve za tema a ior mba hen tar la imôngo." 
Judges1:17 Yuda kpaa za a anngô na Shimeon imôngo, ve za hemba Mbakanaan mba ve tema ken Sefati la, ve tim ve ci ca cii. I maa i yila gar la iti er Horma." 
Judges1:18 Yuda ngohol Gasa a tar na, man Asekelon a tar na, kua Ekeron a tar na kpaa." 
Judges1:19 TER lu a Yuda, nahan a zenda mba ve tema sha tar u iwoogh la kera; kpa a fatyô u zendan mba ve tema shin pev la ga, sha ci u ve lu a akeke a iyôô." 
Judges1:20 Ve gema Heberon, ve na Kalebu er Mose lu kaa yô; a zenda ônov mba Anaki keregh ior itiar." 
Judges1:21 Ônov mba Benyamin yô, ve zenda Mbayebushi mba ve tema ken Yerusalem la ga; nahan Mbayebushi lu a ônov mba Benyamin imôngo ken Yerusalem zan zan nyian." 
Judges1:22 Ya u Yosev kpaa kôndo za nôngo ityav a Betel; TER lu a ve. 
Judges1:23 Ya u Yosev tindi er i̱ za nenge mker ken Betel (ngise i yilan gar shon iti er Lushi). 
Judges1:24 Mbanengenmker mbala ve nenge orgen nan lu duen ken gar, ve kaa a nan er: Shi tese se hunda u nyôron ken gar, yô, sé er a we dedoo." 
Judges1:25 Nahan nan tese ve hunda u nyôron ken gar; ve hemba gar la sha zwa u sanker; kpa or la yô, ve de nan, nan yem a ior mba nan cii." 
Judges1:26 Nahan or la yem ken tar u Mbahiti za maa gar ker, a ii un iti er Lushi ka iti na je la zan zan nyian." 
Judges1:27 Manase zenda mba ve tema ken Bete-shean man agar a na la kera ga, kua shi Taanaki kpaa man agar a na la, kua shi mba ken Dor kpaa man agar a na la, kua shi mba ken Ibeleam kpaa man agar a na la, kua shi mba ken Megido kpaa man agar a na la; kpa Mbakanaan gba teman ken tar la tsô." 
Judges1:28 Tsô zum u Iserael taver yô, ve gba kighir Mbakanaan a tom, ve zenda ve kera ca ca ga." 
Judges1:29 Eferaim zenda Mbakanaan mba ve tema ken Geser la kera ga, kpa Mbakanaan tema her atô ve ken Geser." 
Judges1:30 Sebulon zenda mba ve tema ken Kireton kera ga, man shi mba ken Nahalol la kpaa ga; kpa Mbakanaan tema her atô ve, gema hingir mba eren ve tom." 
Judges1:31 Asher zenda mba ve tema ken Ako la kera ga, man shi mba ken Shidon la kpaa ga, kua mba ken Alabi, kua shi mba ken Akeshibi, kua shi mba ken Heleba, kua shi mba ken Afiki kua shi mba ken Rehobi la kpaa ga;" 
Judges1:32 kpa Mbaasher tema hen atô u Mbakanaan, mba ve lu ken tar la la; gadia ve zenda ve ga." 
Judges1:33 Nafetali zenda mba ve tema ken Bete-shemeshi la kera ga, man shi mba ve tema ken Bete-anati la kpaa ga; kpa a tema hen atô u Mbakanaan, mba ve lu ken tar la la; nahan mba ve tema ken Bete-shemeshi kua mba ken Bete-anati kpaa gema hingir mba eren ve tom." 
Judges1:34 Mbaamor mgbegha ônov mba Dan hide sha tar u iwoogh, ve rumun u ve̱ sen shin pev ga;" 
Judges1:35 kpa Mbaamor tema sha Har-hereshi la heregh, man ken Aiyalon kua ken Sha-alebim; kpa uwegh ku ya u Yosev hemba, nahan ve gema ve hingir mba eren ve tom." 
Judges1:36 Ikighirtar i Mbaamor hii hen igungu u Akrabim, hen vande la zan zan kôndo sha." 
Judges2:1 Tsô Ortyom u TER mough hen Gilgal, kôndo za hen Bokim. A kaa er: Ka Mo M er, ne dugh ken tar u Igipiti, M ve a ven ken tar u M bum a uter enev ne ye, man M kaa Mer: Me bunde ikuryan Yam a ven mayange ga;" 
Judges2:2 ne kpaa de ye nen ikur a mba ve tem ken tar ne ga, hembe nen atse a ve a nanden nagh sha mi kera; kpa ne ver ato sha imo Yam ga; ka nyi ne er nahana?" 
Judges2:3 Ka nahan man M kaa Mer: Me kera zenda ve sha ishigh yenegh kera ga ye, kpa vea hingir mbahendan kwagh a ven; mbaaôndo vev kpaa vea hingir kwagh u hônon ne a min." 
Judges2:4 Tsô zum u Ortyom u TER ôr kwagh ne a Mbaiserael cii nahan yô, ior gba vaan genger genger." 
Judges2:5 Nahan ve ii ijiir la iti er Bokim (Mbahaan mliam); ve na TER nagh heregh. 
Judges2:6 Tsô zum u Yosua na ior gbenda yô, Mbaiserael yem, hanma or yem hen dyako u nan, sha u za ngohol tar la." 
Judges2:7 Nahan ior civir TER sha ayange a Yosua lu uma la cii, kua sha ayange a mbatamen mba ve lu ken ijime i Yosua la cii, mba ve nenge aeren a TER a vesen cii, a A er sha ci u Iserael yô." 
Judges2:8 Yosua wan u Nun, wanakiriki u TER kpe; anyom a na kuma deri man pue." 
Judges2:9 Ve ii un ken tar u dyako na sha Timnati-hereshi, sha tar u iwoogh u Eferaim, uwo u Gaashi vegher u ken imbusutarimese la." 
Judges2:10 I magh kov la cii a uter vev; tsô kov ugen mough ken ijime ve, u u fe TER kua tom u A er sha ci u Iserael ga yô." 
Judges2:11 Mbaiserael er kwaghbo sha ishigh ki TER, ve civir Ubaal;" 
Judges2:12 ve undu TER, Aôndo u uter vev, u A due a ve ken tar u Igipiti la, ve gema ve dondo mbaaôndo mbagenev, mbaaôndo mba akuraior a a kase ve la, ve gure, ve civir ve; nahan ve bam TER." 
Judges2:13 Er ve undu TER, ve civir Baal man Ashetaroti la yô," 
Judges2:14 ishima vihi TER a Iserael, A gema ve A na sha ikev i mbayanshar, mbala va kuran ve akaa; shi A tee ve, ve hingir sha ikev i mbaihomov vev mba ve kase ve la, nahan ve kera fatyô u shi tilen sha ishigh ki mbaihomov vev je ga." 
Judges2:15 Hanma ijiir i ve lu zan cii, uwegh ku TER lu ihom a ve sha u eren ve kwagh u bo, er TER kaa yô, man er TER bum a ve kpaa; nahan ican er ve tsung." 
Judges2:16 Tsô TER ver ve mbaajiriv, ve yiman ve sha ikev i mba nzughul a ve la." 
Judges2:17 Nahan kpaa ve ver ato sha mbaajiriv vev ga, kpa ve er idya sha u dondon mbaaôndo mbagenev, ve gure ve civir ve; ve kaha fese, ve undu gbenda u uter vev lu zan sha mi waan atindi a TER iko la; ve yô, ve kera er nahan ga." 
Judges2:18 Zum u TER ver ve mbaajiriv yô, TER A lu a orjir la imôngo, A yima ve sha ikev i mbaihomov vev, sha ayange a orjir la cii; gadia mhôônom kôr TER a mtoghor ve u ve toghol sha ikev i mba zan ve iyol kua mba eren ve ican la." 
Judges2:19 Kpa zum u orjir una kpe yô, ve gema ve hide ve gba eren akaa a hôngorough, a hemba a uter vev je, sha u dondon mbaaôndo mbagenev civir ve, guren ve inya; ve de aeren a ve ga, kua inja ve i taver ityough la kpaa ga." 
Judges2:20 Nahan ishima vihi TER a Iserael; A kaa er: Er ikurior ne i vende ikuryan Yam i M ya a uter vev la, shi ve we imo Yam iko kpaa ga yô," 
Judges2:21 Mo kpaa hii hegen je, Me kera zenda ma ikurior i môm sha ishigh vegh kera ga, i Yosua lu undu man kpe la;" 
Judges2:22 ka sha a je, Me kar Iserael ye, shin vea ver ishima sha gbenda u TER, vea zaan sha miou er uter vev lu ver ishima sha u nahan shin ve vea er nahan gaou?" 
Judges2:23 Nahan TER de akuraior la, A zenda a fefa ga; shi A na a sha ikev i Yosua kpaa ga." 
Judges3:1 Angan ka akuraior a TER undu a her sha er Una kar Iserael mba ve fa ityav mbi Kanaan ga la, sha a yô." 
Judges3:2 Ka sha u ikov i Mbaiserael ve̱ fa tsô, ka sha u tesen ve ityav mbi nôngon, jim je yô, ka mba ve vande fan kwagh u mbi ga la;" 
Judges3:3 ka utor utaan mba Mbafiliti, man Mbakanaan cii man Mbashidon kua Mbahivi mba ve tema sha uwo u Lebanon, hii hen uwo u Baal-hermon zan zan ar gbenda u karen zan Hamati la." 
Judges3:4 Ve lu her sha ci u karen Mbaiserael sha ve, sha u fan shin vea ver ishima sha atindi a TER, a A na Mose, Mose gema na uter vev la." 
Judges3:5 Tsô Mbaiserael tema ken atô u Mbakanaan man Mbahiti man Mbaamor man Mbaperishi man Mbahivi kua Mbayebushi; 
Judges3:6 ve er ônov vev mba kasev, ve di kpaa ve na ior mbala ônov vev mba kasev, ve civir mbaaôndo vev kpaa." 
Judges3:7 Mbaiserael er kwaghbo sha ishigh ki TER; TER, Aôndo ve, hungul ve, ve gema ve civir Ubaal man Mbaashetaroti." 
Judges3:8 Nahan ishima vihi TER a Iserael, A gema A tee ve, ve hingir sha ikev i Kushan-rishataim, tor u Mesopotamia; Mbaiserael lu sha ikev i Kushan-rishataim anyom anigheni." 
Judges3:9 Tsô zum u Mbaiserael vaa a TER yô, TER na Mbaiserael oryiman sha u a̱ yima ve yô, lu Oteniel wan u Kenashi anngô u Kalebu u kiriki." 
Judges3:10 Jijingi u TER sen sha a na, a tema orjir sha Iserael; a za ityav, TER na Kushan-rishataim, tor u Mesopotamia, sha ikev na; nahan a hemba Kushan-rishataim agee." 
Judges3:11 Tsô tar la zua a mmem anyom akunduahar, man Oteniel wan u Kenashi mase kpen ye." 
Judges3:12 Mbaiserael shi er kwaghbo sha ishigh ki TER; nahan TER na Egelon tor u Moabi la agee, za nôngo ityav a Iserael, sha ci u ve er kwaghbo sha ishigh ki TER yô." 
Judges3:13 A kohol Mbaamon kua Mbaamaleki a na imôngo, tsô a za, a za hemba Iserael; ve ngohol gar u avilegh." 
Judges3:14 Nahan Mbaiserael lu sha ikev i Egelon tor u Moabi anyom pue kar anigheni. 
Judges3:15 Tsô zum u Mbaiserael vaa a TER yô, TER na ve oryiman, lu Ehudi wan u Gera, Orbenyamin, lu orimese. Mbaiserael tindi un a kpandegh hen Egelon tor u Moabi." 
Judges3:16 Ehudi var sanker na ese akur cii, iniembe na lu ishiva i môm; a zer ken atô u riga na shin namegh nagh ku yanegh." 
Judges3:17 A va na Egelon tor u Moabi kpandegh kura; Egelon lu or u kehen mimi. 
Judges3:18 Er a na un kpandegh kera yô, a na ior mba ve tôô kpandegh kura gbenda;" 
Judges3:19 kpa un iyol na yô, aren hen awen a i kua a hen Gilgal la yô, a cin a hide a va kaa er: M ngu a loho u ken myer u kaan we, tor; tor kaa er: Huan ving. Tsô mba ve tile a na cii ve due, ve undu un." 
Judges3:20 Nahan Ehudi va hen a na, a tema sha iyou i kundun iyol i sha, un tswen. Ehudi kaa er: Aôndo tindim a kwaghôron her a we, tsô a mough sha ikagh ki a tema la, a tile sha." 
Judges3:21 Nahan Ehudi za uwegh nagh ku imesegh, tsuwa sanker hen namegh nagh ku yanegh, kuma un sha uya," 
Judges3:22 nyôr kua ityôgh cii, ahôm kange sha mi, gadia a tsuwa sanker la sha iyav nav kera ga, a nyôr a uve." 
Judges3:23 Tsô Ehudi due sha kungur, a kôr ihinda i iyou i sha la, a wuhe un ker, a senda i." 
Judges3:24 Dugh kera yô, mbayev nav va, va nenge; er ve nenge er i sende ihinda i iyou i sha la yô, ve kaa er: Alaghga ngu wanger iyol ken iyol i sha." 
Judges3:25 Ve tile zan zan lan ve ishima cii, kpa a bugh ihinda i iyou i sha la ga; nahan ve tôô makuli ve bugh i; yô, ve kav, ter ve gba, lu hen inya kpenegh." 
Judges3:26 Er ve lu timbir her la, Ehudi maa war, a za kar awen a i kua la, a yevese a za nyôr Seira." 
Judges3:27 Tsô za nyer yô, a tôngo korough sha tar u iwoogh u Eferaim, Mbaiserael mough a na imôngo sha tar u iwoogh ve sen, lu wen hemen ve ye." 
Judges3:28 A kaa a ve er: Dondo nen sha a mo; gadia TER na mbaihomov enev, Mbamoabi sha ikev yen. Tsô ve hungwa ve dondo sha a na, ve ngohol ahongo a Yordan, ve yisa Mbamoabi, ve rumun ma or môm nan per ga." 
Judges3:29 Ve wua Mbamoabi hen shighe la kuma ior dubu pue nahan; ve cii ve lu ior mba taver iyol man mba cihin kwagh, ma or môm nan war ga." 
Judges3:30 Nahan sha iyange la je Moabi hingir sha ikev i Iserael. Tsô tar la zua a mmem anyom akunduanyiin. 
Judges3:31 Ken ijime na yô, Shamgar wan u Anati tema, a wua Mbafiliti ior deri ataratar sha gbough ku huren ibua a mi; un kpaa, a yima Iserael." 
Judges4:1 Kpa Mbaiserael shi gba eren isholibo sha ishigh ki TER, zum u Ehudi kpe kera la." 
Judges4:2 Tsô TER tee ve, ve hingir sha ikev i Yabin tor u Kanaan, u a lu tor ken Hasor la; orhemen u akumautya na lu Shisera, u a tema ken Harosheti u atôatyev la." 
Judges4:3 Tsô Mbaiserael vaa a TER; gadia un lu a akekeautya a iyôô deri utaankarunyiin; a lu eren Mbaiserael ican tsung, anyom ikundu je." 
Judges4:4 Yô, Debora, profeti u kwase, kwase u Lapidoti, gema lu orjir u Iserael hen shighe la." 
Judges4:5 A tema shin itinevilegh i Debora hen harga u Rama vea Betel sha tar u iwoogh u Eferaim; Mbaiserael vaan her a na sha ci u jirigh. 
Judges4:6 Tsô a tindi er, i̱ yila Baraki wan u Abinoam, ken Kedeshi-nafetali, a kaa a na er: TER, Aôndo u Iserael kera kaa er, za za unde sha uwo u Tabor a ior i Nafetali man Sebulon dubu pue a we imôngo, gaa?" 
Judges4:7 Mo Me urugh we Shisera, kurutya u Yabin, Me va a na hen ifi u Kishon, a akekeautya na kua akumautya na; Me na un sha ikev you." 
Judges4:8 Tsô Baraki kaa a na er: Aluer wea zaan a mo imôngo yô, me za; kpa aluer wea zaan a mo imôngo ga yô, me za ga." 
Judges4:9 Nahan a kaa er: Me za a we imôngo kpee; kpa we ú zua a icivir sha gbenda u ú ze ne ga, gadia TER Una gema Shisera Una na sha ikev i kwase. Tsô Debora mough, za a Baraki imôngo hen Kedeshi." 
Judges4:10 Baraki lôhô Sebulon kua Nafetali, ve kohol hen Kedeshi; tsô ior dubu pue cir un ijime; Debora kpaa za a na imôngo." 
Judges4:11 Kpa Heber, Orkeni, vande paven a Mbakeni, ônov mba Hobabi, won u Mose la, a tim tenti na hen kon u terebin u Saananim ikua ikua a Kedeshi." 
Judges4:12 Tsô i va kaa Shisera er Baraki wan u Abinoam a kende a yem sha uwo u Tabor yô. 
Judges4:13 Nahan Shisera kohol akeke na a utya cii, akeke a iyôô lu deri utaankarunyiin, kua ior mba ve lu a na cii, hen Harosheti u atôatyev, va haa hen ifi u Kishon." 
Judges4:14 Tsô Debora kaa a Baraki er: Kohol iyol, gadia nyian ka iyange i TER Una na Shisera sha ikev you je ne; TER kar ngu hemen we je gaa? Nahan Baraki hungwa sha uwo u Tabor, ior dubu pue dondo sha a na." 
Judges4:15 Tsô TER nzughul a Shisera man akeke na cii kua akumautya a na cii kpaa, sha zwa u sanker sha ishigh ki Baraki; nahan Shisera hungwa sha ikyekye na, yevese sha angahar." 
Judges4:16 Kpa Baraki zenda akeke kua akumautya la ijime zan zan ar hen Harosheti u atôatyev; akumautya a Shisera cii kpe ku u sha sanker, or môm war ga." 
Judges4:17 Shisera yevese sha angahar za hen tenti u Yael kwase u Heber, Orkeni; gadia Yabin tor u Hasor man ya u Heber, Orkeni, ve lu ayol a ve bem bem." 
Judges4:18 Tsô Yael za kegh Shisera gbenda, kaa a na er: Kaha heen tere, kaha va her a mo, de cie ga. Tsô a kaha her a na a nyôr ken tenti na; a cir un borogo iyol." 
Judges4:19 A kaa a na er: Shi nam anmnger m̱ ma, gadia imura kôrom. Tsô a bugh ikpa i atumbagh a na un a ma, a hide a cir un her." 
Judges4:20 A kaa a na er: Tile sha hunda u tenti, aluer hanma or nana va, nana va pine u er: Or ngu heene? Yô, venda wer: Ei." 
Judges4:21 Tsô Yael kwase u Heber tôô imande i tenti, shi a tôô msabe kôr sha uwe, a za her a na teghelee a za mande un imande la sha wase, kar kôr shin inya, gadia a lu yaven mem mem; maa a kpe." 
Judges4:22 Tsô er Baraki lu tôvon Shisera angahar yô, Yael due kegh un gbenda, kaa a na er: Va, m tese u or u u keren la. Tsô va nôôr her a na yô, a kav Shisera hen inya kpenegh, a imande i tenti sha wase." 
Judges4:23 Kape Aôndo na Yabin tor u Kanaan sha ikev i Mbaiserael sha iyange la la. 
Judges4:24 Mbaiserael gba hemban Yabin tor u Kanaan agee, zan zan ve tim Yabin tor u Kanaan." 
Judges5:1 Tsô Debora kua Baraki wan u Abinoam ve wa icam sha iyange la, er:" 
Judges5:2 Er mbahemenev ve hemen ken Iserael, er ior kpaa ve ne ayol a ve sha asema a ve gbar gbar je yô, wuese nen TER." 
Judges5:3 Ungwa nen, ne utor; ver nen ato, ne atiator; mo me wa icam me ter TER, me wa icam i wuese TER, Aôndo u Iserael." 
Judges5:4 TERE, zum u U due ken Seir, zum u U zende ken tiôntar u Edom yô, inya tenger, Usha haa, abeen kpaa haa ura." 
Judges5:5 Iwo tenger sha ishigh ki TER, Senai kpaa, sha ishigh ki TER, Aôndo u Iserael." 
Judges5:6 Sha ayange a Samgar u Anati, sha ayange a Yael kpaa akômaigbinda lu gbilin, mbazendev kar sha anigbendav." 
Judges5:7 Mbahemenev hena ken Iserael, ve hena, zan zan mo Debora m mough, m mough er ngô nahan ken Iserael." 
Judges5:8 Ve tsuwa mbaaôndo mba hev, sha shighe la ityav lu ken ihinda. Perutya shin iwange, i nenge a mi, ken udubu akunduahar ken Iserael je kpa?" 
Judges5:9 Ishima yam ngi sha mbahemenev mba Iserael, mba ve dugh ken ior ve ne ayol a ve sha asema a ve gbar gbar yô. Wuese nen TER." 
Judges5:10 Ne mba ne hende anmgbianajaki a pupuu, ne mba ne tem sha ubutu mba mimi, man ne mba ne kar sha gbenda, yôô nen kwagh ne." 
Judges5:11 Ca a ayôôso a mbakerenavaan, hen ajiir a kesen mngerem la; keela je, vea kimbir u ôron aeren a perapera a TER, ka aeren a Na a perapera a sha tom Na u tor ken Iserael la; zum la ior i TER sen hen ihinda." 
Judges5:12 Nder, nder, Debora! Nder, nder, wa icam! Mough sha Baraki! Yem a mbakwarev ou, we wan u Abinoam." 
Judges5:13 Tsô mbavesen mba ve shi her la ve sen; ior i TER sen sha u wasen mo er anomaior nahan. 
Judges5:14 Ken Eferaim yô, mba mise ve u lu ken Amaleki la, ve sen; mba ve dondo yô, lu Benyamin, her atô u ior ou; ken Makir mbahemenev sen, ken Sebulon kpaa mba ve lu a tôgh ku tor." 
Judges5:15 Atiator a Isakar kpaa lu a Debora imôngo; er Isakar a lu nahan, kape Baraki kpaa a lu la; shin pev, ve cir un ijime ayem. Hen uipaven mba Ruben ve wa akaa ishima a vesen a vesen." 
Judges5:16 Ka nyi u gbe teman hen atô u atôrauile nahana? Ka sha u ungwan imar i i tenge hen ikumuile laa? Hen uipaven mba Ruben, ve wa akaa ishima a vesen a vesen." 
Judges5:17 Gileadi gba teman yande Yordan tsô, man Dan yô, ka nyi a tem hen utso nahana? Asher gba teman hen kpezegemnger ving tsô, a var hen ahongo a na." 
Judges5:18 Sebulon ka ior mba cihin kwagh je, yan ku ishe ga; Nafetali kpaa kape a lu je la, sha agungu a kpuun kpuun." 
Judges5:19 Utor va, va nôngo ityav; tsô utor mba Kanaan nôngo ityav, ken Taanaki hen mngerem ma Megido; ve ya ishar sha azurfa ga." 
Judges5:20 Sha je kpaa, asan nôngo ityav, sha zende u a la, a nôngo ityav a Shisera." 
Judges5:21 Ifi u Kushon kuwa ve kera, tsewagh la, uwagh u Kishon. Uma wam, za hemen sha agee je." 
Judges5:22 Zum la acin a apande a nyinya kaa, sha iyar, iyar eren i mbaageev." 
Judges5:23 Wa Meroshi ifan, kape Ortyom u TER A kaa la, wa mba ve tem ken a na ifan i bo je, gadia ve va, ve va wase TER ga, ve va wase TER er anomaior nahan ga." 
Judges5:24 Iveren i Yael i hemba i ukase cii, kwase u Heber, Orkeni; iveren na i hemba i kasev mba ve tem ken utenti cii." 
Judges5:25 A sôn mngerem, a gema a na un atumba; a va na un atumba a korough shin tasa u tor." 
Judges5:26 A za uwegh nagh sha imande i tenti, man uwegh nagh ku yanegh sha msabe u mbatomov; ka sha msabe a mande Shisera ye, a mande un, a pev un ityough, a pev un a-ase." 
Judges5:27 A shirigh a gba, a yav inya ving hen angahar a na; hen angahar a na je, a shirigh a gba; hen ape a shirigh la, a gba her kpenegh." 
Judges5:28 Ngô u Shisera gbir ashe hen windou, a genger imo hen kper u windou, er: Er nan man ikyekyeutya na i ngôôr van nahana? Er nan ihuran i akeke na i ngôôr van nahana?" 
Judges5:29 Kasev nav mbafankwagh gema kaa un; een, un iyol na je gema kaa er:" 
Judges5:30 Ve ya ishar, mba karen i gaa? Kpan u kwase môm, ikpan i ukase ihiar kpaa, sha ci u hanma or; ishar i akondo a ngeren swamen swamen sha ci u Shisera, ishar i akondo a ngeren swamen swamen, a i kor a sha hwe; akondo ahar a ngeren swamen swamen, a i kor a sha hwe, a i ye ishar sha mi la, sha ci u mon wam." 
Judges5:31 Mbaihomov Ou cii, ve̱ saa ishe nahan TERE! Kpa mba A doo ve ishima la yô, ve mba er iyange, zum u ka ia due sha agee a i nahan. Tsô tar la zua a mmem anyom akunduahar." 
Judges6:1 Mbaiserael shi er kwaghbo sha ishigh ki TER; nahan TER na ve sha ikev i Midian anyom ataankarahar. 
Judges6:2 Midian hemba Iserael agee; ka sha ci u Midian Mbaiserael er ajiir a yeren, a a lu sha iwo la ye, kua ubar man agar a sha iwo la kpaa." 
Judges6:3 Zum u Iserael a lôô iyiav yô, Mbamidian ve va kua Mbaamaleki a ior mba sha vegher u sha ityoughkitaregh la, ve va nôngo ityav a ve;" 
Judges6:4 ve haa afoautya hen ve, ve vihi ve iyiav zan zan za nyôr hen Gasa; ve undu ma kwaghyan ken Iserael ga, shin iyôngo, shin bua, shin jaki kpaa ga." 
Judges6:5 Gadia ve va a uzendenya vev man utenti vev, ve va kpishi er ikomon nahan, ve kua urakumi vev, iyenge ve gande u ôron; kape ve va, ve va vihi tar la." 
Judges6:6 Mbaiserael kungu ican sha kwagh u Midian la; nahan Mbaiserael vaa a TER. 
Judges6:7 Tsô zum u Mbaiserael vaa a TER sha kwagh u Midian la yô," 
Judges6:8 TER tindi Mbaiserael a profeti ugen, a va kaa a ve er: TER, Aôndo u Iserael, ngu kaan nahan er: Mo M due a ven ken Igipiti, M due a ven ken ya u ikpan kpaa;" 
Judges6:9 M yima ne sha ikev i Mbaigipiti kua sha ikev i mba ve eren ne ican cii, shi M zenda ve sha ishigh yenegh kera kpaa, M na ne tar ve;" 
Judges6:10 man M kaa a ven Mer: Ka Mo TER, Aôndo wen; de cie nen mbaaôndo mba Amor mba ne tem ken tar ve ne ga; kpa ne ver ato sha imo Yam ga." 
Judges6:11 Tsô Ortyom u TER va, va tema hen itinekon i terebin i i lu hen Ofera, i Yoashi, Orabieser la, hen shighe la wan na Gidion gema lu gbidyen alakema ken ihungwa i shoghol wain, sha u yeren Mbamidian a mi." 
Judges6:12 Tsô Ortyom u TER va ande her a na, kaa a na er: TER ngu a we, we orageegh u tseen ishima sha kwagh." 
Judges6:13 Tsô Gidion gema kaa a na er: Ku! Terem, aluer TER Una lu a vese yô, er nan man akaa ne cii a tser se nahana? Man aeren a Na a kpilighyol cii nga hana, a uter asev lu ôr se la, er: Ka TER iyange due a vese ken Igipiti ye ga? Kpa ahegen yô, TER gbihi se, A gema se, A na sha ikev i Mbamidian." 
Judges6:14 TER gema her a na, A kaa er: Yô, za a agee ou ne, za yima Iserael sha ikev i Midian; ka Mo M tindi u ye gaa?" 
Judges6:15 Tsô, a kaa a Na er: Tere, ka sha nyi je me yima Iseraele? Nenge, ken Manase cii nongo wam hemba ndahar, man mo kpa hen ya u terem m hemba gban ijime." 
Judges6:16 Tsô TER kaa a na er: Mimi je, Me lu a we, ú hemba Mbamidian er ka or môm nahan." 
Judges6:17 Nahan a kaa a Na er: Aluer a doo U a mo yô, tesem ikav, m̱ fa er i lu We U er kwagh a mo yô." 
Judges6:18 Shi de moughon heen ve ga, saa me hide sha ishigh You. A rumun er: Me tema zan zan ú hide." 
Judges6:19 Tsô Gidion nyôr, za sôngo wanivo, shi a er akpekpa u lun a kwa sha min ga, sha mwem ma ma kom efa môm yô; inyam la, a wa shin ikese, man iue yô, a haa shin tsua, a due a mi a va na Un hen itinekon i terebin la." 
Judges6:20 Tsô Ortyom u Aôndo kaa a na er: Tôô inyam la kua akpekpa u lun a kwa sha mi ga la, penda sha iwen ne, gema iue la, haa sha mi; tsô a er nahan." 
Judges6:21 Nahan Ortyom u TER naregh ityô i gbough ku ku lu Un sha uwe la, bende sha inyam kua akpekpa u lun a kwa sha mi ga la; tsô usu due ken iwen la, hia inyam kua akpekpa u i we kwa sha mi ga la; tsô Ortyom u TER ndiir un ashe." 
Judges6:22 Nahan Gidion kav er A lu Ortyom u TER yô; Gidion kaa er: M saa ve Tere, AÔNDO! gadia m nenge a Ortyom u TER ishigh a ishigh." 
Judges6:23 Tsô TER kaa a na er: Ishima i̱ de nyian we ga, de cie ga; ú kpe ga." 
Judges6:24 Tsô Gidion ta TER atse a nanden nagh sha mi her, a ii a iti er: Yehova-shalom (TER ka bem); nga her ken Ofera u Mbaabieser zan zan nyian." 
Judges6:25 Tsô hen tugh mbula je TER kaa a na er: Kôr nombua u teru, nombua u sha uhar u a kom anyom ataankarahar la, hembe atse a Baal a nanden nagh sha mi a teru la kera, shi gber Ashera u a lu hen a la kera;" 
Judges6:26 yô, ta TER, Aôndo wou, atse a nanden nagh sha mi sha inja dedoo, sha ityough ki igungu u i maa garutya sha mi ne; tôô nombua u sha uhar la, na nagh ku nanden sha kon u Ashera u u gber la." 
Judges6:27 Tsô Gidion pande mbatomov nav ior pue, a er er TER kaa un nahan; kpa er a lu cian anngôôv nav man ior mba ken gar yô, a er tom la atetan ga, a er u tugh." 
Judges6:28 Zum u ior mba hen gar nder pepe pepe yô, ve kav i hembe atse a Baal, shi i gber Ashera u a lu hen a la kpaa, man i na nagh sha nombua u sha uhar la, sha atse a nanden nagh sha mi a i ta la kera ve." 
Judges6:29 Tsô ve gba kaan ayol a ve er: Ka an nan er kwagh nee? Mba tim sha mi, shi mba pin yô, ve kaa er: Kwagh ne ka Gidion wan u Yoashi, a er ye." 
Judges6:30 Tsô ior mba hen gar la kaa a Yoashi er: Due a wan wou, i̱ wua un, gadia a hembe atse a Baal, a gber Ashera u a lu hen a la kera kpaa." 
Judges6:31 Tsô Yoashi kaa a mba ve mough num a na mbala er: Ne, né nôngo sha ci u Baala? Né yima unu? Or u nan nenge sha ci na yô, á wua nan pepe ne je; aluer una lu aôndo je yô, a̱ nôngo iyol na, sha er i hembe un atse a nanden nagh sha mi yô." 
Judges6:32 Sha iyange la je maa a yila un iti er Yerubaal, a kaa er: De Baal a̱ nôngo num a na; sha ci u a hembe un atse a nanden nagh sha mi yô." 
Judges6:33 Zum la, Mbamidian cii man Mbaamaleki kua ior mba sha vegher u sha ityoughkitaregh la, ve kohol ijiir i môm; ve per ve va haa afo shin pev u Yesereel." 
Judges6:34 Tsô Jijingi u TER va iv Gidion, nahan a tôngo korough; tsô Mbaabieser kange iyol i utya dondo sha a na." 
Judges6:35 A tindi mbatyomov hen Manase cii; ve kpaa ve kange iyol i utya ve dondo sha a na; shi a tindi mbatyomov hen Asher man hen Sebulon kua Nafetali kpaa; ve kpaa ve va, ve va kohol ve." 
Judges6:36 Tsô Gidion kaa a Aôndo er: Aluer Wea yiman Iserael sha ikev yam mimi, er U kaa nahan yô," 
Judges6:37 nenge, me ver aive a iyôngo sha vande u gbidyen alakema la, aluer avure aa gba sha aive la tseegh, man inya cii ia lu tseghe tseghe yô, nahan me fa, yiman You Iserael sha ikev yam er U kaa nahan." 
Judges6:38 Kape lu di je la; gadia kper nan a mough pepe, a kam aive a iyôngo la, avure haa iv tasa poo." 
Judges6:39 Tsô Gidion kaa a Aôndo er: Ishima i̱ de vihin We a mo ga, me mase ôron kwagh môm ne tsô; shi de m̱ mase karen sha aive a iyôngo ne kwa môm ne tsô; aive ne tseegh a̱ lu tseghe tseghe ye, kpa inya yô, i̱ gba avure." 
Judges6:40 Aôndo er nahan hen tugh mbula; gadia aive a iyôngo la tseegh lu tseghe tseghe ye, kpa inya cii, gba avure." 
Judges7:1 Tsô Yerubaal, ka Gidion je la, a ior mba ve lu a na cii, ve mough pepe ve za haa afo hen imbor i Harodi; afo a Mbamidian gema lu ve vegher u ken imbusutarimese, hii hen igungu u More zan zan za ar ken hemen shin pev." 
Judges7:2 Tsô TER kaa a Gidion er: Ior mba ve lu a we ne ngeem yum, Me fatyô u nan Mbamidian sha ikev ve ga, sha er Iserael a̱ de te ihagh a Mo a̱ kaan er: Ka uwegh agh iyol yam ku yemem ye, ga." 
Judges7:3 Yô, za, za yôô, ior cii ve̱ ungwa, kaa wer: Hanma or u nan cie nan gbidi ikarikase iyol yô, nana̱ hide tsô, nana̱ mough hen uwo u Gileadi kera. Nahan ior dubu ikundu kar uhar hide, mase shin dubu pue." 
Judges7:4 Tsô TER kaa a Gidion er: Nahan kpaa ior shi ngee heregh; yô, za a ve hen mnger, Me za sange u ve her; yô hanma or u Me kaa a we Mer: Ngun a̱ za a we ityô yô, ka nan je nana za a we ye; kpa hanma or u Me kaa a we Mer: Ngun a̱ de ze a we ga yô, nana̱ de ze ga je." 
Judges7:5 Tsô a va a ior hen mnger, nahan TER kaa a Gidion er: Hanma or u nana ndiar a ndiar mngerem sha nombor er iwa i ndiar nahan yô, ver nan kposo; kape ú er a hanma or u nana gure anu man nana ma la kpaa." 
Judges7:6 Iyenge i mba ve kese mngerem sha uwe ve ndiar sha zwa yô, ve lu ior deri utar; kpa ior mbagenev cii yô, ve gure a gure anu man ve ma mngerem ye." 
Judges7:7 Tsô TER kaa a Gidion er: Ka sha ior deri utar mba ve ndiar a ndiar la, Me yima ne, Me na Mbamidian sha ikev you ye; kpa ior mbagenev ve̱ yem hanma or hen ijiir i nan." 
Judges7:8 Tsô ior ngohol kwaghyan u mbala kua ikor ve i tôngon kpaa; a na ior mba Iserael gbenda cii, hanma or yem hen tenti u nan; kpa ior mba deri utar la yô, a lu a ve her; afo a Mbamidian gema lu un shin pev." 
Judges7:9 Tsô tugh mbula, TER kaa a na er: Mough, sen nyôr shin afo, gadia M na a sha ikev you." 
Judges7:10 Kpa aluer wea cian u senen yô, za vea wanakiriki wou Pura, sen vea na shin afo," 
Judges7:11 za ungwa kwaghôron ve; ken masetyô yô, ishima ia taver we, tsô ú nyôr ken afo. Nahan a sen vea wanakiriki na Pura hen kpeafogh u mbautyav mba ve lu her afo la." 
Judges7:12 Mbamidian man Mbaamaleki kua ior mba sha vegher u sha ityoughkitaregh la, ve cii ve haa shin pev, ve ngee er ikomon nahan; urakumi vev ngee gande u ôron, er waarawa u shin kpezegemnger nahan." 
Judges7:13 Zum u Gidion za va yô, orgen gema lu ôron anngô u nan mnyam. A kaa er: Mnyam ciem er, bredi u shair lu menger senen shin afo a Midian, za ta sha tenti je a gba, a gba tiôr a samber hen inya." 
Judges7:14 Anngô u nan la gema kaa er: Ka ma kwagh ugen ga, ka sanker u Gidion wan u Yoashi, Oriserael; Aôndo na Mbamidian kua akumautya cii sha ikev na." 
Judges7:15 Tsô zum u Gidion ungwa m-ôr u mnya, man inja i ma kpaa yô, a gure a civir; a hide hen afo a Iserael, a kaa er: Mough nen sha, gadia TER na akumautya a Mbamidian sha ikev yen ve." 
Judges7:16 Ior mba deri utar mbala, a pav ve akum atar, a na ve ikor i tôngon sha ave ve cii, man ityev mbi gbiliniv a akaghausu a yeghen ken ityev mbila." 
Judges7:17 Tsô a kaa a ve er: Nengen nen sha a mo, kwagh u me er yô, ne kpaa er nen nahan; nenge, zum u me va hen kungur u afoogh yô, kwagh u me er la, ne kpaa er nen nahan." 
Judges7:18 Zum u me tôngo korough yô, mo kua ior mba ve lu a mo imôngo cii, ne kpaa tôngo nen ikor ken akôngoafogh wue wue, kaa nen ner: Sha ci u TER man sha ci u Gidion." 
Judges7:19 Nahan Gidion kua ior deri môm mba ve lu a na la, ve va hen kungur u afoogh sha shighe u mhii u mkor u her atôutu la, shighe u i wa mbakuran mbahev, ica lu a gba ga la; ve tôngo ikor, ve hembe ityev mbi ve lu a mi sha ave la avur avur." 
Judges7:20 Akumaior atar la tôngo ikor, ve hembe ityev, ve kôr akaghausu a yeghen la, sha ave a imese, ikor yô, ve kôr sha ave a iyan sha u tôngon; ve ger imo er: Sanker u TER man u Gidion." 
Judges7:21 Hanma or tile hen ijiir i nan, ve kase afo ve tser; akumautya cii, ande ayem, ve gba gbidyen ivaa, yevese." 
Judges7:22 Er ve tôngo ikor i deri utar la, akumautya la cii, TER er sanker u hanma or gema wua anngô u nan; akumautya la yevese yem hen Bete-shita ken ian i Sereda zan zan a za ar hen ikighirtar i Abel-mehola hen Tabati." 
Judges7:23 I kohol nomsombaiorov mba Iserael mba ken Nafetali man mba ken Asher man mba ken tar u Manase cii, ve zenda Mbamidian ityô." 
Judges7:24 Gidion tindi mbatyomov sha tar u iwoogh u Eferaim cii er: Va nen ityav, va nôngo nen a Midian, hide nen ve ahongo zan zan hen Bete-bara man hen Yordan kpaa. Nahan ior mba Eferaim cii kohol, ve hide ve ahongo zan zan hen Bete-bara man hen Yordan kpaa." 
Judges7:25 Ve kôr utor mba Midian uhar, Orebi man Seebi; ve wua Orebi hen iwen i Orebi; Seebi yô, ve wua un hen ihungwa i shoghol wain i Seebi, ve zenda Mbamidian ityô; ve va a ityough ki Orebi kua ki Seebi kpaa hen Gidion yande Yordan." 
Judges8:1 Tsô ior mba Eferaim kaa a na er: Ka nyi u er a vese nahan, u yer se shighen u u za sha u za nôngon ityav a Mbamidian la ga? Ve zôhô a na tsung." 
Judges8:2 Nahan a kaa a ve er: Ka nyi je m er i kom sha i yene? Twaryaren u Eferaim hemba sunda u Abieser gaa? 
Judges8:3 Aôndo na Orebi man Seebi utor mba Midian, sha ikev yen; ka nyi je m fetyô u eren i kuman sha a vene? Tsô asema yôhôl ve er a kaa nahan yô." 
Judges8:4 Tsô Gidion va hen Yordan va per a ior deri utar mba ve lu a na imôngo la, ve vôr, nahan kpaa ve lu tôvon ve ityô." 
Judges8:5 Tsô a kaa a ior mba Sukoti er: Shi na nen mba ve lu a mo ityô ne kwaghyan gadia ve vôr, man mo m ngu zendan Seba man Salmuna utor mba Midian ityô." 
Judges8:6 Mbatarev mba Sukoti gema kaa er: Ave a Seba man Salmuna hingir sha ikev you ve shinii, sé na akumautya a ou kwaghyana?" 
Judges8:7 Tsô Gidion kaa er: Nahan yô, zum u TER Una na Seba man Salmuna sha ikev yam yô, me côvor ne iyol sha usaa mba ken toho kua ageva kpaa." 
Judges8:8 Tsô a mough her, a yem ken Penuel, ve kpaa a za ôr a ve nahan; ior mba Penuel kpaa gema ôr a na er Mbasukoti vande ôron a na nahan." 
Judges8:9 Ior mba Penuel kpaa a kaa a ve er: Aluer mea hide doo doo yô, me hembe gôgôyou u a tav yum ne." 
Judges8:10 Seba man Salmuna yô, ve lu ken Karkor a akumautya a ve, ve kuma er ior dubu pue kar utaan nahan, ka akumautya a ior mba sha ityoughkitaregh a a mase shin cii je ne; gadia mba ve kpe ken utya kuma ior dubu deri man ikundu, ka mba ve kuma u tsuwan sanker yô." 
Judges8:11 Tsô Gidion kôndo sha gbenda u mba ve teman ken utenti la, gbenda la kar Noba man Yogbeha vegher u sha ityoughkitaregh, a za hemba ikumutya la; gadia ikum la hunde ishima kera." 
Judges8:12 Seba man Salmuna ve yevese, a zenda ve ityô; a za kôr Seba man Salmuna utor mba uhar mba Midian mbala, a sambe ikumutya la." 
Judges8:13 Tsô zum u Gidion wan u Yoashi mough ken utya, hen ikooso-woogh i Hereshi la, hide yô," 
Judges8:14 a kôr wanye kwaor u ior mba Sukoti, a pine un, ngula nger un ati a mbatarev mba Sukoti kua mbatamen mba her la, ior akunduatargber kar utaankaruhar." 
Judges8:15 Tsô a va hen ior mba Sukoti a kaa er: Nenge nen, Seba man Salmuna mban, mba iyange ne naham tar sha ci ve ne, ne kaa ner: Ave a Seba man Salmuna hingir sha ikev you ve shinii, sé na ior ou mba ve ver la kwaghyana?" 
Judges8:16 Tsô a kôr mbatamen mba gar la, a tôô usaa mba ken toho kua ageva, a tese ior mba Sukoti kwagh a mi." 
Judges8:17 Shi a hembe gôgôyou u Penuel u a tav yum la kpaa, a wua nomsombaiorov mba hen gar la kpaa." 
Judges8:18 Tsô a pine Seba man Salmuna er: Ior mba iyange ne wua hen Tabor la, iyange ve lu nana? Ve kaa er: Iyange ve lu er we nahan; hanmô ve lu iyol er wan tor nahan." 
Judges8:19 A kaa er: Ve lu anngôôv av, ônov mba ngôm je; mimi je er TER A lu u uma ne, aluer nea de ve uma yô, ma m woo ne ga." 
Judges8:20 Tsô a kaa a Yeter wan na u iunda er: Mough, wua ve. Kpa wanye la tsuwa sanker na ga, lu cian sha ci u lu wanye yum yô." 
Judges8:21 Tsô Seba man Salmuna, ve kaa er: We, iyol you mough, wua se; gadia agee a or nga sha mlu u nan vough. Nahan Gidion mough, wua Seba man Salmuna, a sagh ikav mbi hweev mbi mbi lu sha imon i urakumi vev la." 
Judges8:22 Tsô ior mba Iserael kaa a Gidion er: Va, va tema tor wase, we man wan wou man shi wan u wan wou kpaa, gadia u yima se sha ikev i Midian." 
Judges8:23 Kpa Gidion gema kaa a ve er: Me tema tor wen ga, wan wam kpaa una tema tor wen ga; ka TER A tema tor wen ye." 
Judges8:24 Tsô Gidion kaa a ve er: Sarem ka sônon ne kwagh; hanmô wen ma nan nem iyôgh ki ken ato ki nan zough a mi sha ishar i yan yô. Gadia ve lu a iyôv mbi zenaria ker ato, sha er ve lu Mbaishemael yô." 
Judges8:25 Ve gema ve kaa er: Se rumun sha ishima i môm je, sé na u mbi. Tsô ve samber ikondo, hanmô ve gbihi iyôgh ki sha ishar i nan sha mi." 
Judges8:26 Myohom ma iyôv mbi ken ato mbi zenaria mbi a sôn yô, kuma ushekel mba zenaria dubu man deri utaankaruhar; i wa ikav mbi hweev, man akaa a hweegh a wan ken ato, man akondo a nyian dindee a utor mba Midian, ker ga; man mshirim ma ma lu sha imon i urakumi vev kpaa i wa ma ker ga." 
Judges8:27 Gidion gema er efodi a mi, ver un ken gar na, Ofera; tsô Iserael cii gba va eren idya heregh sha u civir un; gema hingir kwagh u hônon Gidion a mi kua mba hen ya na." 
Judges8:28 Nahan Midian cia Mbaiserael var inya, ve kera kende ityouv sha mayange ga; tar la mem anyom akunduahar sha ayange a Gidion." 
Judges8:29 Tsô Yerubaal wan u Yoashi, yem za tema hen ya na iyol na." 
Judges8:30 Gidion lu a ônov akunduatargber mba a mar iyol na yô, gadia a lu a kasev kpishi." 
Judges8:31 Kpankwase na u ken Shekem kpaa mar un wan, a ii un iti er Abimeleki." 
Judges8:32 Gidion wan u Yoashi kpe, a tsa sha won kpishi, i ii un ken uwar u ter na Yoashi, ken Ofera u Mbaabieser." 
Judges8:33 Gidion kpeen kera yô, Mbaiserael shi gba eren idya sha u dondon Ubaal, ve gema Baal-beriti hingir aôndo ve." 
Judges8:34 Mbaiserael kera umbur TER, Aôndo ve, u A yem ve sha ikev i mbaihomov vev mba ve kase ve cii ga;" 
Judges8:35 man shi ve kera er a ior mba Yerubaal (ka Gidion je la) dedoo er iyange un lu eren a Iserael nahan la ga. 
Judges9:1 Tsô Abimeleki wan u Yerubaal za hen Shekem ken igba na hen anmgbianev mba ngô na, za ôr kwagh a ve, kua ior mba hen ya u ter u ngô na cii, a kaa er:" 
Judges9:2 Shi ôr nen kwagh a ior mba Shekem cii, kaa nen ner: Ka nyi i hembe doon ne: Ônov mba Yerubaal cii, mba akunduatargber je ve̱ tema tor sha a ven, shin ka or môm nana̱ tema tor sha a vene? Man shi umbur nen er mo m lu kuhe wen man inyam yen je yô." 
Judges9:3 Nahan anngôôv mba ngô na za ôr ior mba Shekem cii akaaôron ne cii, sha ci na; nahan asema a ve cii ver sha u rumun Abimeleki; gadia ve kaa er: Ka anngô wase je." 
Judges9:4 Tsô ve na un agbenger a azurfa akunduatargber a ken ya u Baal-bereti; Abimeleki gema a, na agbilinaior a toron asema sha u ve̱ rumun un yô." 
Judges9:5 A za hen ya u ter na hen Ofera, a za wua anngôôv nav, ônov mba Yerubaal, ior akunduatargber, hen iwen; kpa Yotam wan u Yerubaal, u masetyô war, gadia a yer." 
Judges9:6 Tsô ior mba Shekem cii kohol kua ya u Milo cii kpaa, ve za, ve za kôr Abimeleki tor hen kon u terebin u hen ikav i umbur kwagh a mi la, u u lu hen Shekem la." 
Judges9:7 Er i va ôr Yotam nahan yô, a za a za unde sha ityough ki uwo u Gerishim, a genger imo a kaa a ve er: Ver nen ato her a mo, ne ior mba Shekem, sha er Aôndo kpaa Una ver ato her a ven yô." 
Judges9:8 Iyange igen ikon za sha u ia za kôr kon ugenegh tor; tsô i kaa a kon u olev er: Tema tor wase. 
Judges9:9 Kpa kon u olev kaa a i er: M̱ undu mkurem am ma Aôndo kua ior ve wuese mo ne, m̱ za m̱ za tenger daase de daase sha ikonoo?" 
Judges9:10 Tsô ikon gema kaa a tur er: Yô, we va, tema tor wase." 
Judges9:11 Kpa tur kaa a i er: M̱ undu mnyohom am man atam a am a dedoo, m̱ za m̱ za tenger daase de daase sha ikonoo?" 
Judges9:12 Tsô ikon gema kaa a kon u wain er: Yô, we va, tema tor wase." 
Judges9:13 Kpa kon u wain kaa a i er: M̱ undu zar wam u u ne Aôndo kua ior msaanyol, m̱ za m̱ za tenger daase de daase sha ikonoo?" 
Judges9:14 Tsô ikon cii kaa a saa er: Yô, we va, tema tor wase." 
Judges9:15 Tsô saa kaa a ikon er: Á lu mimi je, ne verem ner, m̱ lu tor wen yô, va kohol nen ase shin mure wam; á lu nahan ga yô, usu u̱ due ken saa, u̱ hia usedar mba Lebanon." 
Judges9:16 Nahan yô, aluer ne er kwagh u mimi man u perapera er ne ne Abimeleki tor yô; man aluer ne er a Yerubaal kua ior nav dedoo, ne er un kwagh u a lu vough sha tom u ave na yô—" 
Judges9:17 gadia terem nôngo ityav sha ci wen, a ta uma na kera, a yima ne sha ikev i Mbamidian;" 
Judges9:18 man nyian yô, ne mough num a ya u terem, ne wua ônov nav, ior akunduatargber, hen iwen, ne ver Abimeleki, wan u kpankwase na la, tor sha ior mba Shekem, sha ci u a lu anngô wen yô—" 
Judges9:19 aluer á lu kwagh u mimi man u perapera ne er a Yerubaal kua ior nav nyian ne yô, ember nen Abimeleki, un kpaa á ember ne;" 
Judges9:20 kpa á lu nahan ga yô, usu u̱ due ken Abimeleki, u̱ hia ior mba Shekem kua ya u Milo; usu shi u̱ due di ken ior mba Shekem kua ken ya u Milo, u̱ hia Abimeleki." 
Judges9:21 Tsô Yotam yevese kar kera yem ken Beer, za tema ker, sha ci u cian Abimeleki anngô na la." 
Judges9:22 Abimeleki tema tor sha Iserael anyom atar. 
Judges9:23 Tsô Aôndo tindi jijingi u bo hen atô u Abimeleki vea ior mba Shekem; nahan ior mba Shekem kera lu ishima i môm a Abimeleki ga; 
Judges9:24 sha ci u kwagh u aperagh u i er ônov mba Yerubaal akunduatargber mba i haa awambe ve inya la, a̱ hide sha ityough ki Abimeleki, anngô ve, u a wua ve la, man sha ior mba Shekem mba ve taver un ishima sha u a̱ wua anngôôv nav la." 
Judges9:25 Ior mba Shekem ver ior mba numun gbenda sha iwo, ve za kegh un; mba ve karen gbenda la cii, ve num ve; tsô i ôr Abimeleki nahan." 
Judges9:26 Tsô Gaal wan u Ebedi, va a anngôôv nav kar za hen Shekem; ior mba Shekem suur sha a na." 
Judges9:27 Ve yem ken sule ve za zôr atam a wain, ve kam, ve er iniongo, ve nyôr ken iyou i aôndo ve, ve ya, ve ma, ve gba tuhwan Abimeleki." 
Judges9:28 Tsô Gaal wan u Ebedi kaa er: Ka an je nan lu Abimeleki, u se Shekem sé civir unu? Ka wan u Yerubaal ne gaa? Man Sebul ka ititor na gaa? Civir nen ior mba Hamor, ter u Shekem, inja na nan man se sé civir unu?" 
Judges9:29 Ior mban vea lu sha ikev yam yô, ma m zende Abimeleki kera. Tsô a ôr kwagh sha kwagh u Abimeleki la er: Gba seer mbautyav ou tsô, due va." 
Judges9:30 Er Sebul ititor i gar ungwa kwaghôron u Gaal wan u Ebedi la yô, maa ishima vihi un;" 
Judges9:31 nahan a tindi mbatyomov hen Abimeleki myer, a kaa er: Nenge, Gaal wan u Ebedi a anngôôv nav ve va hen Shekem; yô, mba wan ior mba ken gar kwagh er ve̱ hendan kwagh a we." 
Judges9:32 Yô, mough tugh, we a ior mba ve lu a we, yer ken toho;" 
Judges9:33 nahan pepe er iyange ka i due nahan la mough ta num sha gar; tsô zum u un a ior mba ve lu a na vea duen u nôngon ityav a we yô, ú er a ve er u nenge i doo u u eren la." 
Judges9:34 Tsô Abimeleki mough a ior mba ve lu a na imôngo cii, tugh, ve pav akum anyiin ve yer hen Shekem." 
Judges9:35 Tsô Gaal wan u Ebedi due, va tile hen hundagar; nahan Abimeleki mough a ior mba ve lu a na hen ijiir i ve yer la." 
Judges9:36 Zum u Gaal nenge a ior yô, a kaa a Sebul er: Nenge, ior mba hungwan sha iwo. Sebul gema kaa a na er: U nenge mure u iwoogh, yô, u ngu kaan wer ka ior." 
Judges9:37 Tsô Gaal kimbir kaan er: Nenge, ior mba hungwan hen atô u sule, ikum igen ngi van sha gbenda u kon u terebin u Meonenim la." 
Judges9:38 Tsô Sebul kaa a na er: Hegen yô, kwaghôron wou la shi ngu nana u u kaan wer, Abimeleki ka an je, u sé civir unu? Kera ka ior mba u laha ve la gaa? Due ase ahegen, za nôngo ityav a ve." 
Judges9:39 Tsô Gaal due hemen Mbashekem, nôngo ityav a Abimeleki." 
Judges9:40 Abimeleki zenda un, a yevese un; ior kpishi kpe ku u ishôm, zan zan ar hen hundagar je." 
Judges9:41 Tsô Abimeleki tsa hen Aruma; Sebul gema zenda Gaal a anmgbianev nav er ve̱ de kera teman ken Shekem ga. 
Judges9:42 Sev mbu aven yô, ior due nyôr ken ikôngo; i ôr Abimeleki nahan." 
Judges9:43 Tsô a kua a ior a pav ve akum atar, a za yer ken toho; nengen er ior lu duen ken gar yô, a mough a ta num sha a ve, a hemba ve je." 
Judges9:44 Abimeleki kua akumaior a a lu a na imôngo la ve za sha hemen ayem, ve za tile hen hundagar; akumaior ahar ta sha mba ve lu ken ikôngo la cii, ve hemba ve." 
Judges9:45 Abimeleki shi nôngon ityav a gar la didi, a ngohol gar la je, a wua ior mba kimi; a yôhôl gar, a kpur bar ker." 
Judges9:46 Zum u ior mba gôgôyou u taven sha u Shekem cii, ve za ungwa gwa nahan yô, ve nyôr shin iyou i shin inya i ken iyou i Elberiti." 
Judges9:47 Tsô i kaa Abimeleki er: Ior mba gôgôyou u Shekem cii zua. 
Judges9:48 Nahan Abimeleki mough unde sha uwo u Salmon, un a ior mba ve lu a na ityô cii; Abimeleki tôô ijembe kôr sha uwe gber gbaakon môm, gbire sha vande, gema kaa a ior mba ve lu a na la er: Kwagh u ne nenge m er ne, ne kpaa er nen nahan fefa." 
Judges9:49 Kape ior mbagenev cii kpaa ve er la, hanma or gber gbaakon, dondo sha Abimeleki, va haa hen iyou i shin inya la, nande ve ker; nahan ior mba gôgôyou u Shekem la cii kpaa kpe; ior lu er dubu nahan, nomso man kasev." 
Judges9:50 Tsô Abimeleki za hen Tebeshi za haa afo a utya, nôngo a Tebeshi, ngohol un." 
Judges9:51 Kpa gôgôyou u taven sha u taver lu ken gar la, nahan nomso man kasev yevese za nyôr ker, kua ior mba ken gar cii; ve wuhe hunda, ve lu ker, ve unde sha haav mbu gôgôyou la." 
Judges9:52 Tsô Abimeleki va hen gôgôyou la va nôngo ityav a na, a va ikua ikua a hunda u gôgôyou la, er una nande un sha usu." 
Judges9:53 Yô, kwase ugen ta Abimeleki anishwa sha ityou hembe un ityough." 
Judges9:54 Tsô a yila wanye na u tilin un ikav mbi utya fefa, a kaa a na er: Tsuwa sanker wou, wuam, sha er ior ve̱ de ôron kwagh sha a mo er: Ka kwase lu wua un, ga. Tsô wanye na la kuma un, maa a kpe." 
Judges9:55 Tsô ior mba Iserael mba nengen er Abimeleki a kpe yô, hanma or yem hen ya u nan." 
Judges9:56 Ka ape Aôndo or iyev sha kwaghbo u Abimeleki u a er ter na, sha ci u a wua anngôôv nav akunduatargber la;" 
Judges9:57 man kwaghbo u ior mba Shekem cii kpaa, Aôndo or iyev sha a ve; ifan i Yotam wan u Yerubaal la, i kôr ve." 
Judges10:1 Ken jime i Abimeleki yô, Tola wan u Pua, wan u Dodo, Orisakar, mough sha u yiman Iserael; ya na lu ken Shamir ken tar u iwoogh u Eferaim." 
Judges10:2 A lu orjir sha Iserael anyom ikundu kar atar; a kpe, i ii un ken Shamir." 
Judges10:3 Ken ijime na yô, Yair Orgileadi mough; a tema orjir sha Iserael anyom ikundu kar ahar." 
Judges10:4 A lu a ônov mba nomso ikundugber mba ve hendan agumajaki ikundugber yô, ve lu a agar ikundugber, i yilan a er, Agar a Yair zan zan nyian, nga ken tar u Gileadi." 
Judges10:5 Yair kpe, i ii un ken Kamon." 
Judges10:6 Mbaiserael shi er kwaghbo sha ishigh ki TER, ve civir Ubaal man Mbaashetaroti man mbaaôndo mba Shiria man mbaaôndo mba Shidon man mbaaôndo mba Moabi man mbaaôndo mba Mbaamon kua mbaaôndo mba Mbafiliti; ve undu TER, ve de u civir Un." 
Judges10:7 Nahan ishima vihi TER a Iserael, A tee ve, ve hingir sha ikev i Mbafiliti, kua sha ikev i Mbaamon kpaa." 
Judges10:8 Inyom la je, ve er Mbaiserael ican, ve kighir ve; anyom pue kar anigheni cii ve lu kighir Mbaiserael cii, mba ve lu yande Yordan ken tar u Mbaamor u u lu ken Gileadi la." 
Judges10:9 Mbaamon per Yordan sha u va nôngon ityav a Yuda man Benyamin kua ya u Eferaim kpaa, nahan Iserael cia tsung." 
Judges10:10 Mbaiserael vaa a TER, ve kaa er: Se er U isholibo, sha er se undu Aôndo wase se gem se civir Ubaal yô." 
Judges10:11 Tsô TER kaa a Mbaiserael er: Ka Mo lu M yima ne sha ikev i Mbaigipiti man i Mbaamor man i Mbaamon kua i Mbafiliti ye gaa? 
Judges10:12 Man zum u Mbashidon man Mbaamaleki kua Mbamaon, ve kighir ne, ne vaa a Mo la, Mo kpaa M yima ne sha ikev ve gaa?" 
Judges10:13 Nahan kpaa ne undum, ne civir mbaaôndo mbagenev; nahan Me kera yima ne ga." 
Judges10:14 Yô, yem za vaa nen a mbaaôndo mba ne tsough yô, ve̱ yima ne hen shighe u ican i tser ne ne." 
Judges10:15 Nahan Mbaiserael kaa a TER er: Se er isholibo; yô, gba eren se kwagh u a doo U cii tsô; kpa ma U shi yem se nyian ne tsô." 
Judges10:16 Tsô ve dugh mbaaôndo mbagenev ken a ve kera, ve gema ve civir TER; nahan ishima vihi Un sha ci u ican i Iserael." 
Judges10:17 Tsô Mbaamon zua va haa afo ken Gileadi. Mbaiserael kpaa zua haa afo ken Misepa. 
Judges10:18 Nahan ior mba ve lu atiator a Gileadi la, ve kaa ayol a ve er: Ka anti nana hii ityav a Mbaamonou? Ka nan je nana hingir orhemenegh u mba ve lu ken Gileadi cii ye." 
Judges11:1 Yô, Yefeta Orgileadi lu or u ageegh u tseen ishima sha kwagh, kpa a lu wan u idyakwase; ka Gileadi lu ter u Yefeta ye." 
Judges11:2 Kwase u Gileadi mar un ônov mba nomso; zum u ônov mba nomso mba kwase na la vese yô, ve zenda Yefeta, ve kaa a na er: We ú ya dyako hen ya u ter wase ga, gadia we u ngu wan u kwase ugen." 
Judges11:3 Tsô Yefeta yevese anngôôv nav za tema ken tar u Tobi; agbilinaior za kohol Yefeta keregh, ve zenden a na imôngo." 
Judges11:4 Tsô, ka tse dôghôô yô, Mbaamon va nôngo ityav a Iserael." 
Judges11:5 Man zum u Mbaamon va nôngo ityav a Iserael yô, mbavesen mba Gileadi za sha u za hiden a Yefeta ken tar u Tobi la;" 
Judges11:6 ve kaa a Yefeta er: Va, va lu orhemen wase, sé nôngo ityav a Mbaamon." 
Judges11:7 Tsô Yefeta kaa a mbavesen mba Gileadi er: Ka ne, iyange ne vendam, ne zendam hen ya u terem kpaa ye gaa? Man ka nyi shi ne ve hen mo hegen er ican i tser ne nee?" 
Judges11:8 Tsô mbavesen mba Gileadi kaa a Yefeta er: Kwagh u a er man shi se gem her a we hegen yô, ka sha u ma u ze a vese imôngo ma u za nenge ityav a Mbaamon; nahan ú hingir orhemen wase, se mba se tem ken Gileadi cii." 
Judges11:9 Nahan Yefeta kaa a mbavesen mba Gileadi la er: Aluer né hide a mo ken ya sha u m̱ za nôngo ityav a Mbaamon, man TER kpaa Una na ve sha ikev yam yô, mo me hingir orhemen wen zee?" 
Judges11:10 Mbavesen mba Gileadi mbala kaa a Yefeta er: TER ngu shiada her atô wase a we; mimi je, kwagh u ú kaa yô, ka un sé er ye." 
Judges11:11 Tsô Yefeta yem a mbavesen mba Gileadi mbala imôngo, ior maa gema un, hingir orhemen ve man orvesen ve. Yefeta ôr kwagh na cii sha ishigh ki TER ken Misepa." 
Judges11:12 Tsô Yefeta tindi mbatyomov hen tor u Mbaamon a kaa er: Ka nyi i zough u a mo, u ve her a mo sha u va nôngon ityav a tar wama?" 
Judges11:13 Nahan tor u Mbaamon gema kaa a mbatyomov mba Yefeta mbala er: Ka sha ci u Iserael ngohol mo tar shighe u yan ve due ken Igipiti la, hii hen Arnon zan zan ar hen Yaboki kua hen Yordan kpaa; nahan yô, hidem a mi sha bem." 
Judges11:14 Tsô Yefeta shi tindi mbatyomov hen tor u Mbaamon; 
Judges11:15 a kaa a na er: Yefeta ngu kaan nahan er: Iserael iyange ngohol tar u Moabi ga, shin tar u Mbaamon kpaa ga;" 
Judges11:16 kpa zum u ve due ken tar u Igipiti yô, Iserael kar ken desereti zan zan hen Zegemnger u Nyian, tsô ve va ar hen Kadeshi;" 
Judges11:17 nahan Iserael tindi mbatyomov hen tor u Edom, kaa er: De m̱ shi kar ken tar wou; kpa tor u Edom rumun ga. Kape shi a tindi hen tor u Moabi kpaa la; un kpaa venda; nahan Iserael tema hen Kadeshi." 
Judges11:18 Tsô a kar ken desereti, a ningir tar u Edom, man tar u Moabi; ve kar Moabi vegher u sha ityoughkitaregh, ve haa afo yande Arnon, kpa ve nyôr ken tar u Moabi ga, gadia Arnon lu ikighir i Moabi je." 
Judges11:19 Tsô Iserael tindi mbatyomov hen Shihon tor u Mbaamor, ka tor u Heshebon je la; Iserael kaa a na er: De, se̱ shi kar ken tar wou, se̱ za hen ijiir yam." 
Judges11:20 Kpa Shihon rumun Iserael er a̱ kar ken tar na ga; nahan Shihon gema kohol ior nav cii haa afo ken Yahashi, nôngo ityav a Iserael." 
Judges11:21 Tsô TER, Aôndo u Iserael, na Shihon a ior nav cii sha ikev i Iserael, a hemba ve; nahan Iserael ngohol tar u Mbaamor mba ve tema ken tar la cii." 
Judges11:22 Ve ngohol tar u Mbaamor cii, hii hen Arnon zan zan ar shin Yaboki, man shi hii ken desereti zan zan ar shin Yordan kpaa." 
Judges11:23 Ka ape TER, Aôndo u Iserael, lu numun Mbaamor ken tar ve, sha ishigh ki ior Nav Iserael kera la, nahan we ú gema ú ngohol u ve zee?" 
Judges11:24 We ú ngohol kwagh u Kemoshi, aôndo wou a ne u er u̱ ngohol la gaa? Se di sé ya kwagh u TER, Aôndo wase, A ngohol hen ior mbagenev, A ne se yô." 
Judges11:25 Nahan u hemba Balaki wan u Shipor, tor u Moabi je kpa? A hendan kwagh a Mbaiserael, shin a nôngo ityav a ve mayange kpa?" 
Judges11:26 Er Iserael tema ken Heshebon man angarev nav, man ken Aroer man angarev nav, man ken agar a a lu hen kpe u Arnon cii, anyom kuma deri utar je, ka nyi man iyange ne kera hide ne ngohol a hen shighe shon la gaa?" 
Judges11:27 Nahan mo yô, m er u kwaghbo ga, kpa ka we u erem kwaghbo ye, er u nenge ityav a mo yô; TER Orjir, A̱ ôr ijir hen atô u Mbaiserael a Mbaamon nyian." 
Judges11:28 Nahan kpaa, tor u Mbaamon wa kwaghôron u Yefeta tindi un a mi la iko ga." 
Judges11:29 Tsô Jijingi u TER sen tema sha Yefeta, nahan a kar her Gileadi man Manase, shi a za kar Misepa u Gileadi la, a per a za hen Mbaamon." 
Judges11:30 Yefeta bum a TER, a kaa er: Aluer Wea na Mbaamon sha ikev yam mimi je yô," 
Judges11:31 nahan nyityôkwagh i ia due hen ihinda i ya wam sha u va keghen mo gbenda, zum u me hide hen Mbaamon dedoo yô, ia lu kwagh u TER, me na TER nagh ku nanden sha mi." 
Judges11:32 Tsô Yefeta per za hen Mbaamon sha u za nôngon ityav a ve; TER kpaa na ve sha ikev na. 
Judges11:33 A hemba ve, hii hen Aroer zan zan nyôr hen Miniti, ka agar ikundu je la, man zan zan ar hen Abel-keramim; ior kpe ken utya je faregh gba. Nahan Mbaamon cia Mbaiserael var inya." 
Judges11:34 Er Yefeta va ar hen ya na hen Misepa yô, wan na u kwase due sha u va keghen un gbenda a angenga u kuhwan vinen amar; lu di wan na u môm tsô la, lu a mô ugen ga, u nomso shin u kwase kpaa ga." 
Judges11:35 Tsô nengen a na yô, a ande akondo a na, a kaa er: Kpe ahii, wan wam! U sombom anu vughô vughô, u ngu ken mba eren mo ican; gadia m vande bughun zwa a TER, nahan me kera fatyô u hiden ijime ga." 
Judges11:36 A kaa a na er: Terem, u bugh zwa a TER; yô, er a mo sha kwagh u a dugh ken zwa wou yô, gadia TER or iyev sha ci wou sha mbaihomov ou, Mbaamon."
