Judges11:37 Shi a kaa a ter na er: Kpa i̱ erem kwagh ne tsô, dem iwer ihiar me mough me za sha iwo me za vaa iniun yam, mo kua azende a am." 
Judges11:38 A kaa er: Yô, za. A na un gbenda iwer ihiar; tsô a mough, un kua azende a na, a za vaa iniun na sha iwo." 
Judges11:39 Tsô iwer ihiar la ngi been yô, a hide hen ter na, a er a na sha mbum na u a bum la; mayange a lu a fa nom ga. Maa hingir ieren ken Iserael je," 
Judges11:40 ônkasev mba Iserael ve duen anyom anyom ve za wa icam i wuese wan u Yefeta Orgileadi ayange anyiin sha hanma inyom. 
Judges12:1 I kohol ior mba Eferaim ve per ve za hen Safon, ve za kaa a Yefeta er: Inja na nan u per u za nenge ityav a Mbaamon, man u lehe se wer, se̱ za a we imôngo ga? Yô, se̱ nande ya wou sha usu, ú lu kimi je." 
Judges12:2 Tsô Yefeta kaa a ve er: Mo kua ior av se lu iyongo a Mbaamon tsung man er m yila ne yô, ne va yimam sha ikev ve ga." 
Judges12:3 Er m nenge ne yimam ga yô, m ta uma wam kera, m per m za nôngo ityav a Mbaamon, TER kpaa na ve sha ikev yam; nahan ka nyi ne ve her a mo nyian ner né va nôngo ityav a mo?" 
Judges12:4 Tsô Yefeta kohol ior mba Gileadi cii, a nôngo ityav a Eferaim; ior mba Gileadi hemba Eferaim, sha ci u ve kaa er: Ne Mbagileadi, ne mba Mbaeferaim mba ne yevese a yevese, Gileadi ngu hen atô u Eferaim man Manase." 
Judges12:5 Mbagileadi ngohol ahongo a Yordan yisa Eferaim; nahan aluer hanma Oreferaim u nan yevese nan kaa er: Dem nen m̱ per yô; ior mba Gileadi ve pine nan er: U ngu or u Eferaime? Aluer nana kaa er: Ei; 
Judges12:6 yô, ve kaa a nan er: Kaa wer, Shiboleti; aluer nana gema á kaa er, Siboleti, sha er nan fatyô u yilan vough ga yô, nahan ve kôr nan, ve wua hen ahongo a Yordan; Mbaeferaim kpe hen shighe la kuma ior dubu akunduahar kar uhar." 
Judges12:7 Yefeta lu orjir u Iserael anyom ataratar. Tsô Yefeta Orgileadi la kpe, i ii un ken gar u Gileadi ugen." 
Judges12:8 Ken ijime na yô, Ibesan u Betelehem tema orjir u Iserael." 
Judges12:9 A lu a ônov mba nomso ikundugber man mba kasev ikundugber mba a na ve ken unoo yô; shi a er kasev ikundugber sha ci u ônov nav mba nomso. A lu orjir u Iserael anyom ataankarahar. 
Judges12:10 Tsô Ibesan kpe, i ii un ken Betelehem." 
Judges12:11 Ken ijime na yô, Elon or u Sebulon tema orjir u Iserael; lu orjir u Iserael anyom pue." 
Judges12:12 Elon or u Sebulon la kpe, i ii un ken Aiyalon ken tar u Sebulon." 
Judges12:13 Ken ijime na yô, Abedon wan u Hilel, Orpiraton, tema orjir u Iserael." 
Judges12:14 A lu a ônov akunduahar mba nomso, man shi ônov mba ônov nav mba nomso ikundugber, mba ve hendan agumajaki akunduatargber; a lu orjir u Iserael anyom anigheni." 
Judges12:15 Abedon, wan u Hilel, Orpiraton la kpe, nahan i ii un ken Piraton ken tar u Eferaim, sha tar u iwoogh u Mbaamaleki." 
Judges13:1 Mbaiserael shi er kwaghbo sha ishigh ki TER; nahan TER na ve sha ikev i Mbafiliti anyom akunduahar. 
Judges13:2 Orgen lu ken Sora, ken tsombor u Mbadan, iti na er Manoa; kwase na lu ikômkwase, maren ga." 
Judges13:3 Tsô Ortyom u TER ande hen kwase la, kaa a na er: Nenge, u ngu ikômkwase je, u mar ga, kpa wan you iyav, ú mar wannomso." 
Judges13:4 Nahan yô, shi ver ishima, de me wain ga, shin hanma kwagh u man hunden kpaa ga, shi de kera ye ma kwagh u lun wang ga ze;" 
Judges13:5 gadia nenge wan you iyav, ú mar wannomso; i̱ de ze un atsem sha ityou mayange ga; gadia wanakiriki la una lu Ornaseri u Aôndo er a lu ken uya je; ka un una hii u yiman Iserael sha ikev i Mbafiliti ye." 
Judges13:6 Tsô kwase la va, va ôr nom na, kaa er: Or u Aôndo va hen mo, ishigh nagh ki er ishigh ki ortyom u Aôndo nahan, cier iyol kpishi; man mo kpaa, m pine un henpe a dugh ga, man un di kpaa, a kaam iti na ga;" 
Judges13:7 man a kaam er: Nenge, wan you iyav, ú mar wannomso; hegen yô, de kera me wain ga, shin hanma kwagh u man hunden kpaa ga, man de ye ma kwagh u lun wang ga ze; gadia wanakiriki la una lu Ornaseri u Aôndo er a lu ken uya je, zan zan á ar sha iyange i kuugh na." 
Judges13:8 Tsô Manoa sôn TER, kaa er: Tere, shi na or u Aôndo u U tindi un la, a̱ shi a̱ va her a vese, a̱ va ôr se kwagh u sé er a wanakiriki u á mar la." 
Judges13:9 Tsô Aôndo ungwa imo i Manoa; nahan Ortyom u Aôndo shi va hen kwase la zum u a tema ken won yô; kpa nom na Manoa yô, lu a na her ga." 
Judges13:10 Nahan kwase la mough fese, za ayem, za kaa nom na er: Nenge, or u iyange va her a mo la, shi a va ande her a mo ve." 
Judges13:11 Tsô Manoa mough, dondo sha kwase na, va hen or la, pine un er: Ka we or u iyange u ôr kwagh a kwase ne nee? A kaa er: Ka mo." 
Judges13:12 Tsô Manoa kaa a na er: Zum u kwaghôron wou una va kure sha mi yô, ka hanma injamkor sé kura wan shono, man tom na yô, á lu nyi tomo?" 
Judges13:13 Ortyom u TER la kaa a Manoa er: Kwagh u m kaa kwase ne cii, a̱ ver ishima sha mi." 
Judges13:14 A̱ de ye ma kwagh u i zough a mi sha kon u wain ga, man shi de kera rumun wer, a̱ ma wain shin kwagh u man hunden kpaa ga, man a̱ de ye ma kwagh u lun wang ga ze; kwagh u m kaa un cii, a̱ wa iko sha mi." 
Judges13:15 Tsô Manoa kaa a Ortyom u TER la er: Shi rumun se̱ timbir we, se̱ sôngo u wanivo." 
Judges13:16 Ortyom u TER gema kaa a Manoa er: Shin er ú timbir mo nahan kpaa, me ya kwaghyan wou ga, aluer ka u pe nan nagh ku nanden yô, na TER ku. Gadia Manoa fa er a lu Ortyom u TER je ga." 
Judges13:17 Nahan Manoa pine Ortyom u TER la er: Iti you er nyi; sha u kwaghôron wou una kure yô, se̱ civir we?" 
Judges13:18 Ortyom u TER gema kaa a na er: Ka nyi u pin iti yama, gadia ka i kpilighyol." 
Judges13:19 Tsô Manoa tôô anivo kua nagh sha samuyia, a na TER nagh a mi sha iwen; A er kwagh u kpilighyol, Manoa kua kwase na ve lu kenger." 
Judges13:20 Er nomborusu u sha atse kôndo sha, Ortyom u TER la kôndo ken nomborusu u atsegh la, yem; Manoa man kwase na lu kenger; nahan ve gure ve kuma ishiv inya." 
Judges13:21 Ortyom u TER kera shi ande hen Manoa shin hen kwase na ga. Nahan Manoa kav er a lu Ortyom u TER je yô. 
Judges13:22 Tsô Manoa kaa a kwase na er: Sé kpe kpee, gadia se nenge a Aôndo." 
Judges13:23 Kpa kwase na kaa a na er: Aluer á lu Aôndo ka wuan se yô, ma A ngohol nagh ku nanden man nagh ku sha samuyia sha ikev yase ga, man shi akaa ne cii ma A tese se ga, man shi ma A er se akaa er angan nahan ga." 
Judges13:24 Tsô kwase la mar wannomso a ii un iti er Semson; wan la vese, TER ver un doo doo." 
Judges13:25 Jijingi u TER hii u toron un ityô ken Mahanedan hen harga u Sora vea Esetaol. 
Judges14:1 Tsô Semson sen hen Timna, a nenge a kwase hen Timna lu wan u Mbafiliti." 
Judges14:2 Nahan a kôndo a za ôr ter na kua ngô na, a kaa er: M nenge a kwase, ka wan u Mbafiliti ken Timna; nahan yô, erem nen un." 
Judges14:3 Tsô ter na kua ngô na ve kaa a na er: Kwase ban ken anmgbianev ou shin ken ior av cii man u gem u za er kwase ken Mbafiliti mba ve lu ipusu ne yee? Semson kaa a ter na er: Kpa erem nen un keng, gadia a doom ishima yum." 
Judges14:4 Kpa ter na kua ngô na ve fa er i lu hen TER je, kwagh ne a dugh ga; gadia lu keren ityôikaa a Mbafiliti. Shighe la, Mbafiliti tema tor sha Iserael." 
Judges14:5 Tsô Semson kua ter na man ngô na ve gba senen zan shin Timna; mba za ar hen ishule i ikon i wain i Timna yô, gumbegha mough gba tan kume a na." 
Judges14:6 Tsô Jijingi u TER kende un sha agee, nahan a ande un er ka wanivo nahan, a lu a ma kwagh sha uwegh nagh ga; kpa a ôr ter na shin ngô na kwagh u un er la ga." 
Judges14:7 Tsô a sen, a za sôôr kwase la; kwase la doo Semson ishima tsung." 
Judges14:8 Ayange nga kar yô, a hide sha u una va er un, nahan a kaha a za nenge gundu u begha la; tsô a nenge a iyough ken gundu u begha la; i wa akpa." 
Judges14:9 A dugh i, a kôr sha ave, a gba yan yemen; a za kohol ter na man ngô na, a na ve, ve ya; kpa a kaa ve er un dugh iyough la ken gundu u begha ga." 
Judges14:10 Tsô ter na za hen kwase la; Semson maa er iniongo her; gadia ka ape ikaior eren gbem la. 
Judges14:11 Tsô zum u ve nenge a na yô, ve va un a ahuraior ikundugber er ve̱ lu a na imôngo." 
Judges14:12 Tsô Semson kaa a ve er: De, m̱ ta ne kikya; aluer nea fatyô u kaan mo inja na sha ayange a ataankarahar a iniongo ne, man nea fa mpase na kpaa yô, me na ne uriga mba pupuu ikundugber kua akondo a cirin iyol kpaa ikundugber;" 
Judges14:13 kpa aluer nea fatyô u kaan mo inja na ga yô, ne né nam uriga mba pupuu ikundugber kua akondo a cirin iyol kpaa ikundugber. Tsô ve kaa a na er: Yô, ta ase kikya wou la, se̱ ungwa." 
Judges14:14 A kaa a ve er: Kwaghyan due ken kwagh u yan kwagh; kwaghnyohon due ken kwagh u ageegh. Ayange atar je, ve fatyô u pasen kikya la ga." 
Judges14:15 Nahan sha iyange i sha unyiin la, ve kaa a kwase u Semson la er: Mee nomu a̱ pase se inja i kikya ne, gayô, sé nande u kua ya u teru sha usu; shin ne lôhô se ner né kura se inyaregh ase?" 
Judges14:16 Tsô kwase u Semson va vaa a na, kaa er: U ngu vendan mo, m doo u ishima ga; u ta ior av kikya, man u pasem inja na ga. Tsô a kaa a na er: Nenge, m kaa terem ga, ngôm kpaa, m kaa un ga, nahan m̱ gema m̱ kaa wee?" 
Judges14:17 A vaa a na ayange ataankarahar a iniongo la; nahan sha iyange i sha utaankaruhar la, a kaa un, gadia a za un iyol yum; nahan a va pase ior nav kikya la." 
Judges14:18 Tsô ior mba hen gar la, ve ôr un sha iyange i sha utaankaruhar, er iyange lu a mire ga la, ve kaa er: Ka nyi i hembe nyohon a iyougho? Ka nyi i hembe begha agee? Nahan a kaa a ve er: Aluer nea kaha sule sha tulebua wam ga yô, ma ne fe kikya wam ne ga." 
Judges14:19 Tsô Jijingi u TER kende un sha agee, a sen a va hen Ashekelon, a va wua ior ikundugber shin ve, a ngohol ve akondo, a va na mba ve pase kikya na la; tsô ishima vihi un, a yem sha ya u ter na." 
Judges14:20 Nahan i gema kwase u Semson la, i na huror na u a lu vea na la." 
Judges15:1 Ka tse dôghôô yô, sha shighe u sundan alakema nahan, Semson va sôr kwase na a anivo; a kaa er: Ma m nyer hen iyou i kwase wam. Kpa ter u kwase na la rumun u a̱ nyôr ga." 
Judges15:2 Ter na gema kaa er: Mimi je m fa mer, u venda un dedoo, ka nahan man m gem un m ne ikaru ye; anngô na u kiriki hemba doon ashe a na gaa? Yô, er un sha ityough ki ngula tsô." 
Judges15:3 Nahan Semson kaa a ve er: Hen shighe ne yô, aluer me er Mbafiliti kwagh u bo kpaa, me lu a ibo ga." 
Judges15:4 Tsô Semson za, za kôr ugbaseela deri utar; a tôô akagh, a zua ve ica, man hanma ica ihiar yô, a shindi ikagh hen atô." 
Judges15:5 Tsar usu sha akagh la yô, a maa a pase ve a tuhwa, ve nyôr ken ishule i alakema u shisha u Mbafiliti, nahan atihi a alakema man iyiagh ki shishagh, kua ishule i olev cii hia." 
Judges15:6 Tsô Mbafiliti gba pinen er: Ka an nan er kwagh ne nahana? Ve kaa er: Ka Semson wankem u Ortimna, ka sha ci u a tee un kwase, a gem a ne ikar na yô. Tsô Mbafiliti va, va nande kwase la kua ter na sha usu." 
Judges15:7 Nahan Semson kaa a ve er: Aluer kape ne er la yô, mimi je, mo kpaa me de ga, saa me or iyev sha a ven keng." 
Judges15:8 A ta num sha a ve, a hemba ve, a paa ve avur avur, a wua ve je falegh gba, tsô a yem a za tema ken bar u Etam." 
Judges15:9 Tsô Mbafiliti kôndo za haa afoautya sha Yuda; ve samber ken Lehi. 
Judges15:10 Nahan ior mba Yuda pine er: Ka nyi ne ve ityav hen vese? Ve kaa er: Se va ser, sé kange Semson sé er a na er a er a vese nahan." 
Judges15:11 Tsô ior mba Yuda dubu utar sen za shin bar u Etam, ve za kaa a Semson er: U fa er Mbafiliti ve tem tor sha a vese gaa? Man ka nyi u er a vese nahana? Tsô a kaa a ve er: Er ve er a mo nahan, kape mo kpaa m er a ve je la." 
Judges15:12 Nahan ve kaa a na er: Yô, se va ser sé va kange u, sé za na u sha ikev i Mbafiliti. Semson gema kaa a ve er: Yô, bum nen ase a mo, ner, ne ayol a en né wuam ga." 
Judges15:13 Ve ôr a na, ve kaa er: Ei. Kpa sé kange u dedoo sé za na u sha ikev ve; mimi je, sé wua u ga. Tsô ve kange un sha ikor i he ihiar, maa ve due a na ken bar la kera." 
Judges15:14 Zum u a va hen Lehi yô, Mbafiliti va kohol un, ve gba geren; tsô Jijingi u TER kende un sha agee, ikor i sha ave na la hingir er ikar i adaagh i i ker usu yô, ikangenev nav sough sha ave na kera." 
Judges15:15 Tsô a zua a zeeregh ku jaki ku hegh, a za uwegh a tôô, a wua ior a mi dubu." 
Judges15:16 Nahan Semson kaa er: Sha zeeregh ku jaki, atihi atihi. Sha zeeregh ku jaki, m wua ior dubu." 
Judges15:17 Tsô zum u a kure kwaghôron ne yô, a gema zeeregh ku sha uwegh nagh kula a ta kera; i maa i ii ijiir la iti er, Ramatilehi (igungu u zeeregh)." 
Judges15:18 Tsô imura kôr un tsung, nahan a sôn TER, a kaa er: Ka We U ne myom u vesen ne sha ikev i wanakiriki Wou ne ye; nahan yô, m̱ gema m̱ kpe imura, m̱ hingir sha ikev i mbaipusuv mbana?" 
Judges15:19 Tsô TER pav pev u ken Lehi, mngerem due; me yô, jijingi na hide her, a hingir gbang gbang; nahan i maa i ii ijiir la iti er: En-hakore (ijôr i un u a yila la); ngi hen Lehi zan zan nyian." 
Judges15:20 A lu orjir hen Iserael sha ayange a Mbafiliti la, anyom ikundu." 
Judges16:1 Tsô Semson za ken Gasa, a nenge a idyakwase her, maa a nyôr hen a na." 
Judges16:2 I kaa Mbagasa er: Semson va heen. Tsô ve kase un, ve kegh un hen hundagar, tugh mbula cii, ve lu ving tugh cii, ve lu kaan er: Sev mbu̱ av, tsô sé wua un." 
Judges16:3 Tsô Semson yav zan zan ateghôtôutu, a mough ateghôtôutu la, a kôr ucivir mba hundagar man ikpande ihiar i ambusu a hunda la, a tsuwa i a ishindan cii, a gbire sha avande, a yem a mi sha ityough ki uwo u u lu sha ishigh ki Heberon la." 
Judges16:4 Tsô ken masetyô la kwase ugen shi doo un ishima hen pev u Soreki, iti na er Delila." 
Judges16:5 Nahan atiator a Mbafiliti va her a na, ve kaa a na er: Mee un, fa er i hii ve, a taver agee yum la, man er sé er ve sé hemba un, sé kange un, una hingir teleghor yô; yô, hanmô wase nana na u agbenger a azurfa dubu man deri." 
Judges16:6 Tsô Delila kaa a Semson er: Shi kaam er i hii man agee ou a taver yum nahan yô, man shi kaam kwagh u á kange u a mi man ú hingir teleghor yô." 
Judges16:7 Semson kaa a na er: Aluer á kangem sha ikange i adaagh i he itiankarihiar i i vande tsenen i ga yô, me hingir teleghor, me lu er orgen nahan." 
Judges16:8 Tsô atiator a Mbafiliti va na un ikange i adaagh i he i he itiankarihiar i i vande tsenen i ga yô, a kange un sha i." 
Judges16:9 A ver mbayeren, yer lu keghen hen iyou i yaven. Tsô a kaa a na er: Mbafiliti tser u ve Semson. Tsô a tôndo ikange la er abamou ka a vihi zum u ka una kôr usu nahan. Nahan i fa agee na ga." 
Judges16:10 Tsô Delila kaa a Semson er: Nenge, u ngu nzughul a nzughul a mo, u erem aie kpaa; nahan shi kaam, ka nyi je á kange u mini?" 
Judges16:11 A kaa a na er: Aluer á kangem sha ikor i he i he i i lu a vande eren kwagh a mi mayange ga yô, me hingir teleghor, me lu er orgen nahan." 
Judges16:12 Tsô Delila tôô ikor i he i he, kange un a mi, a kaa a na er: Nenge, Semson, Mbafiliti tser u ve. Yô, mbayeren lu keghen ken iyou i yaven. Nahan a tôndo i sha ave na kera er ka mou yô." 
Judges16:13 Tsô Delila shi kaa a Semson er: Zan zan hegen u ngu nzughul a nzughul a mo, man u erem aie kpaa; nahan kaam, ka nyi je á kange u mini? A kaa a na er: Aluer u kôr ayôr a gbatyou ataankarahar a sha ityough yagh, ú nyôr a mi ken ikav mbi ikondov ú tume yô." 
Judges16:14 Nahan a tume a, a shindi imande sha mi, tsô a kaa a na er: Semson, Mbafiliti tser u ve, nahan a nure a nder, a tsuwa imande kua ice i i tum i la cii kera." 
Judges16:15 Tsô a kaa a na er: Hii nan man u kaa wer: U doom ishima, man ishima you i lu sha a mo ga? Nahan u nzughul a mo, ka kwa tar je ne, u kaam, er i hii man u taver agee yum nahan ga." 
Judges16:16 Tsô er a za un iyol ayange ayange sha akaaôron a na tsung, man shi lu kumbur a na yum yô, ishima vihi un je ar ken ku." 
Judges16:17 Nahan a pase un ishima na cii, a kaa a na er: Mayange mba a karem atsem sha ityou ga, gadia mo m ngu Ornaseri u Aôndo er m lu ngôm ken uya je; aluer á hondom ityough yô, agee am aa undum, me hingir teleghor, me lu er orgen nahan." 
Judges16:18 Er Delila kav er a pase un ishima na cii yô, a tindi i yila utor mba Mbafiliti, a kaa er: Va nen ase hegen, gadia a pasen ishima na cii ve. Nahan utor mba Mbafiliti va her a na a inyaregh sha ikev ve." 
Judges16:19 Tsô a mee Semson yav un sha ikum, hungul mnyam; nahan a yila orgen va tôndo un ayôr a gbatyou a ataankarahar la; tsô a hii u eren un ican, agee a na kpaa undu un." 
Judges16:20 Nahan a kaa er: Semson, Mbafiliti tser u ve. Tsô a nure a nder, a kaa er: Me due er m dugh keke nahan, me nduur iyol yam me osough kera. Kpa a fa er TER A undu un ga." 
Judges16:21 Tsô Mbafiliti kôr un, ve ongor un ashe; ve va a na shin Gasa, ve kange un sha mshirim ma togula; lu eren tom u wuan kwagh sha nase ken gaadi." 
Judges16:22 Kpa ice na i sha ityou i i tôndo kera la shi hii u menden. 
Judges16:23 Tsô atiator a Mbafiliti kohol er vea na aôndo ve Dagon, nagh ku vesen, shi vea ember kpaa; gadia ve kaa er: Aôndo wase na Semson orihom wase sha ikev yase." 
Judges16:24 Zum u ior nenge a na yô, ve wuese aôndo ve; ve kaa er: Aôndo wase na orihom wase sha ikev yase ve, u a vihi se tar ca ca shi a woo se kpishi kpaa ne." 
Judges16:25 Tsô er asema a ve lu ember nahan yô, ve kaa er: Va a Semson, a̱ va er akaahômon sha ishigh yasegh. Tsô ve yila Semson due ken gaadi, gba va eren akaahômon sha ishiv vev; ve ver un her atô u ityôv." 
Judges16:26 Semson kaa a wanye u kôr un sha uwe la, er: Shi de, m̱ bende ityôv mbi iyou ne i til sha mi ne m̱ lian ken mbi yô." 
Judges16:27 Iyou la iv a nomso man kasev; atiator a Mbafiliti cii kpaa lu ker; sha tembeyough u sha kpaa nomso man kasev tema sha mi er dubu utar nahan, ve lu kenger Semson lu eren akaa a hômon yô." 
Judges16:28 Tsô Semson sôn TER, kaa er: Tere, AÔNDO, ma U shi umbur mo, mase taver mo kwa ne tseegh tsô, Aôndo, m̱ or iyev i ashe am ne icin i môm sha Mbafiliti mban." 
Judges16:29 Tsô Semson kôr ityôv mbi ihiar mbi her atô, mbi iyou tile sha mi la, ityôgh kigenegh ken uwegh nagh ku yanegh, kigenegh ken uwegh ku imesegh, a yier ken mbi." 
Judges16:30 Nahan Semson kaa er: De, m̱ hungwa a Mbafiliti imôngo. Nahan a ngurum a tuur sha agee a na cii; tsô iyou la yôhôl, kighir atiator la, kua ior mba ve lu ker la cii; nahan ior mba a hungwa a ve, ve hemba mba a wua zum u a lu uma la iyenge." 
Judges16:31 Tsô anmgbianev nav, man mba hen ya u ter na cii, ve sen ve va tôô un, ve kôndo a mi, ve za ii un hen harga u Sora vea Esetaol ken uwar u ter na, Manoa. A lu orjir ken Iserael anyom ikundu." 
Judges17:1 Orgen lu sha tar u iwoogh u Eferaim, iti na er Mika." 
Judges17:2 A kaa a ngô na er: Agbenger a azurfa a deri pue kar môm a a lu ndiir we, man u bum u wa ifan sha mi kpaa la, man u ôr kwagh la sha ato a am la, nga her a mo; ka mo m tee a ye. Tsô ngô na gema kaa er: Aôndo A̱ ver u doo doo wan wam." 
Judges17:3 Nahan a hide a agbenger a azurfa a deri pue kar môm la, a va na ngô na; ngô na kaa er: Mimi je, m ngu tseghan agbenger a azurfa angan sha ci u TER; nahan yô, me na wan wam sha u a̱ er eev mbu gban man eev mbu keren a ker; yô, me hide a mi, me na u." 
Judges17:4 Er a hide a inyaregh kila a na ngô na yô, ngô na tôô agbenger a azurfa deri uhar la, na orvareniwa, ngula er eev mbu gban man eev mbu keren a mi; i ver mbu ken ya u Mika." 
Judges17:5 Un Mika lu a iyou i civir Aôndo ker, nahan a er efodi man terafim shi a tsegha wan na môm er a̱ lu pristi na." 
Judges17:6 Sha ayange la; tor lu ken Iserael ga; hanma or gbaa eren sha ishima i nan tsô. 
Judges17:7 Yô, wanyekwaor ugen lu ken Betelehem u ken Yuda ken tsombor u Yuda, un lu Orlevi, gema lu shir heregh." 
Judges17:8 Or la due ken gar u Betelehem u ken Yuda la, sha u una za lu henpe una zua a ijiir yô; sha zende na la, a va sha tar u iwoogh u Eferaim hen ya u Mika." 
Judges17:9 Mika pine un er: Ka han u vee? A kaa a na er: Mo m ngu Orlevi u ken Betelehem u ken Yuda la, zan yam, me za lu henpe me zua a ijiir i teman yô." 
Judges17:10 Tsô Mika gema kaa a na er: Tema a mo, lum ter man pristi, me naan we agbenger a azurfa pue sha hanma inyom kua akondo man kwaghyan kpaa. Tsô Orlevi rumun." 
Judges17:11 Orlevi tema a or la; wanyekwaor la hingir un er ka wan na nahan. 
Judges17:12 Tsô Mika ver Orlevi la sha tom; wanyekwaor la hingir pristi na, lu hen ya u Mika." 
Judges17:13 Nahan Mika kaa er: Hegen yô, m fa TER Una verem dedoo, sha er Orlevi a lu pristi wam yô." 
Judges18:1 Sha ayange la tor lu ken Iserael ga; man sha ayange la kwe u Mbadan lu keren tar u vea tema ker yô; gadia ken ikwe i Iserael yô, ka ve ve lu a zua a dyako ga zan zan iyange la ye." 
Judges18:2 Nahan ônov mba Dan tindi ior utaan mba ken tsombor ve, mbavianasema, ken Sora man Esetaol, sha u ve̱ za nenge tar la mker, ve̱ nenge u dedoo; ve kaa a ve er: Za za yenge nen tar; tsô ve va sha tar u iwoogh u Eferaim hen ya u Mika, ve tsa her." 
Judges18:3 Zum u ve lu hen ya u Mika yô, ve kav imo i wanyekwaor, Orlevi, la; tsô ve kaha ve va her a na, ve va pine un er: Ka an nan ve a we heen, man ka nyi u eren heen ne, man ka nyi u lu a mi heene?" 
Judges18:4 Tsô a kaa a ve er: Mika er a mo nahan nahan, man a nam tom sha tôndo, m hingir pristi na." 
Judges18:5 Nahan ve kaa a na er: Yô, shi pine Aôndo se̱ fa shin zende u se lu zan ne ua doo yô." 
Judges18:6 Pristi la kaa a ve er: Za nen doo doo; gbenda wen u ne ze, ka sha ishigh ki TER u lu ye." 
Judges18:7 Tsô ior mba utaan mbala mough va hen Laishi, ve va nenge er ior mba ve lu ker la, ve tem gbar gbar yô, sha aeren a Mbashidon, ve tema bem bem ve hunde ishima kera je; gadia ma or u nzughul a ve lu ken tar la ga, ve lu ica a Mbashidon kpaa, kwagh zua ve a ma or kpaa ga." 
Judges18:8 Nahan ve hide hen anngôôv vev hen Sora man Esetaol; anngôôv vev pine ve er: Ne za nenge nana? 
Judges18:9 Ve kaa er: Mough nen, sé za nôngo nen ityav a ve; gadia se nenge tar la, u doo kpishi; man ne gba teman gbidaa tsô? De ngôôr nen u moughon za ngohol tar la ga." 
Judges18:10 Zum u né za yô, né za nenge a ior mba ve tem ve hundu ishima kera la, tar la kpaa gbangese; gadia Aôndo na ne u sha ikev; ka ijiir i banen a ma kwagh sha won je ga." 
Judges18:11 Nahan ior mbagenev ken kwe u Dan, ior deri ataratar, ve mough hen Sora man hen Esetaol, ve kange ikav mbi utyav." 
Judges18:12 Ve kôndo ve za haa afo sha Kiriati-yearim ken Yuda, nahan ve ii ijiir la iti er Mahanedan, zan zan nyian; ngi ken ijime i Kiriati-yearim." 
Judges18:13 Ve kar haala, ve za sha tar u iwoogh u Eferaim, ve za ar hen ya u Mika." 
Judges18:14 Tsô ior mba utaan mbala mba ve za sha u za nengen tar u Laishi mker la, ve kaa a anmgbianev vev er: Ne fa er efodi man terafim kua eev mbu gban a gba man eev mbu keren a ker ve lu ken ya ne kpa? Hegen yô, hen nen ase kwagh u né er yô." 
Judges18:15 Tsô ve kaha heera, ve za ar hen ya u wanyekwaor, Orlevi la, ka ya u Mika je la, ve pine un er a lu yô." 
Judges18:16 Ior mba Dan, deri ataratar, ve tile sha hunda a ikav mbi utyav vev." 
Judges18:17 Tsô ve ior mbautaan mbala, mba ve za sha u za nengen tar mker la, ve kôndo ve nyôr hen ijiir la, ve tôô eev mbu gban a gba man efodi man terafim kua eev mbu keren a ker la; pristi gema tile sha hunda, a ior mba deri ataratar mba ve kange ikav mbi utyav iyol la." 
Judges18:18 Tsô er ve nyôr ken ya u Mika ve tôô eev mbu gban man efodi man terafim man eev mbu keren la yô, pristi la gema pine ve er: Ka nyi ne eren ne?" 
Judges18:19 Ve kaa a na er: Huan, cir uwegh sha zwa, yem a vese imôngo, za lu ter man pristi wase. Ka nyi i hembe u doono, u lun pristi hen ya u or môm, shin ka u lun pristi hen kwe man hen tsombor u Iseraele?" 
Judges18:20 Tsô pristi la gba ember ken ishima, nahan a tôô efodi man terafim kua eev mbu gban, a nyôr ken atô u ior mbala." 
Judges18:21 Tsô ve mough ve gba yemen; ve ver mbayev vev man ilev vev kua inyarev vev sha hemen. 
Judges18:22 Mba gbe ica a ya u Mika yô, ior mba ve lu ken uya mba ve dondo a ya u Mika la, ve kohol ve zenda ônov mba Dan ityô ve za kohol." 
Judges18:23 Tsô ve yila ônov mba Dan. Mbala gema ashe, ve kaa a Mika er: Ka nyi i er u man u ve a ikpelaior nahana?" 
Judges18:24 A kaa er: Ne kuram mbaaôndo mba m er, man shi pristi, ne yem a mi; ka nyi m mase shin a mini? Man er nan ne pinim ner: Ka nyi i er uwe?" 
Judges18:25 Nahan ônov mba Dan gema kaa a na er: De kera shi bughun zwa a vese ga, sha er ior mba vihin asema ve̱ de te num sha a we ve̱ woo u kua ior ou ga." 
Judges18:26 Tsô ônov mba Dan gba yemen a ne vev. Er Mika nenge ve hemba un agee yô, a gema a hide hen ya na." 
Judges18:27 Tsô ve tôô akaa a Mika er la, man pristi u a lu a mi la, ve va hen Laishi hen ior mba ve tema bem bem ve hunde ishima kera la, ve va hemba ve sha zwa u sanker; ve nande gar la sha usu." 
Judges18:28 Ma or u yiman ve lu ga, gadia a gba ica a Shidon, man kwagh zua ve a or ga; a lu shin pev u a lu hen Bete-rehobi la. Ve shi ve maa gar la, ve tema her." 
Judges18:29 Ve ii gar la iti er Dan, sha iti i ter ve, Dan, u Iserael mar un la; kpa tsuaa la yô, i yilan gar la iti er Laishi." 
Judges18:30 Tsô ônov mba Dan ver eev mbu gban mbula sha ci ve ayol a ve; Yonatan, wan u Gershon, wan u Mose, un kua ônov nav, ka ve, ve lu upristi hen kwe u Dan ye, zan zan sha iyange i i va kura ve ken tar la kera la." 
Judges18:31 Nahan ve ver eev mbu gban mbu Mika la sha ci ve, sha ayange a iyou i Aôndo lu ken Shilo la cii." 
Judges19:1 Tsô sha ayange a tor lu ken Iserael ga la, Orlevi ugen lu shir sha tar u iwoogh u Eferaim, a tema ken zuer je, a er kpankwase ken Betelehem-yuda." 
Judges19:2 Kpankwase na la er idya hen na, nahan a yevese a yem hen ya uter na, hen Betelehem u ken Yuda, tsa ker iwer inyiin." 
Judges19:3 Tsô nom na la mough zenda un ijime, sha u una za ôr kwagh a na tegh tegh a̱ shi a̱ hide yô; wanakiriki na lu a na, a ujaki uhar. Tsô a nyôr hen ya u ter na; zum u ter u wankwase la nenge a na yô, doo un." 
Judges19:4 Ter na kem, ter u wankwase la, timbir un, nahan a tsa hen ya na ayange atar; ve yan kwagh ve man kwagh, ve lu her." 
Judges19:5 Tsô sha iyange i sha unyiin la, ve nder pepe, nahan a mough sha u una yem; kpa ter u wankwase la kaa a wan na kem er: Vande yan ankwagh, ta ishima kor man ne kôr gbenda ave ye." 
Judges19:6 Tsô ve tema ve uhar cii ve ya kwagh, ve ma kwagh, ter u wankwase la kaa a or la er: Ma u shi tse heen tugh mbun kpaa a ishima i saan saan." 
Judges19:7 Or la mough sha u una yem; kpa ter na kem kighir un, nahan a shi a tsa." 
Judges19:8 Iyange i sha utaan la, a mough pepe sha u una yem, kpa ter u wankwase la shi kaa er: Shi ta ishima kor, tema heen zan zan iyange i ndôhôr; nahan ve uhar cii ve ya kwagh." 
Judges19:9 Zum u or la mough sha u una yem, un vea kpankwase na man wanakiriki na yô, ter na kem, ter u wankwase la kaa a na er: Nenge, hegen iyange sôôn u been, nahan shi tsa nen, gayô, tugh sôôn ilen, tsa heen lu a ishima saan saan, tsô kper né mough pepe, né yem hen ya wou." 
Judges19:10 Kpa or la venda u tsan hen tugh mbula, a mough a gba yemen, a za ar ijiir i i lu teran môm a Yebushi, ka Yerusalem je la, lu a ujaki uhar a ushidi vev; kpankwase na kpaa lu a na imôngo." 
Judges19:11 Zum u ve ar hen Yebushi yô, iyange sôôn u miren; nahan wanakiriki la kaa a ter na er: Ma se kaha ma se nyer ken gar u Mbayebushi ne, ma se shi tse ker." 
Judges19:12 Kpa ter na kaa a na er: Sé kaha, sé nyôr ken gar u orityôtyev u a lu or u ken Mbaiserael ga ne ga, kpa sé kar sé za ken Gibea." 
Judges19:13 Shi a kaa a wanakiriki na er: Va sé kporom hen ijiir igen ken hemen; sé za haa hen Gibea, gayô ken Rama." 
Judges19:14 Tsô ve kar, ve gba yemen; iyange za mire ve ikua ikua a Gibea u Benyamin." 
Judges19:15 Ve kaha her er vea nyôr vea tsa ken Gibea; nahan a nyôr a tema hen tembe u gar la, gadia ma or kua a ve sha u ve̱ tsa ken iyou i nan ga." 
Judges19:16 Yô, tamenor ugen yar tom ken ityev lu kurun aikighe; or la lu u sha tar u iwoogh u Eferaim man a gema a lu shir ken Gibea; kpa ior mba hen ijiir la yô, lu Mbabenyamin." 
Judges19:17 Tsô a ta ashe a za nenge a or u zende la, sha tembegar; ortamen la pine un er: Ka han u ze, man ka han u za ve nahana?" 
Judges19:18 A kaa a na er: Se mough hen Betelehem u ken Yuda se mba karen yemen sha tar u iwoogh u Eferaim ken zuer je; ka ken pe m lu la, man m za ken Betelehem u ken Yuda. Hegen yô, m ngu zan hen ya wam; man ma or nyôr a mo ken iyou i nan ga." 
Judges19:19 Nenge, adenga a alakema nga, kwaghyan kpaa ngu sha ci u ujaki asev; bredi kua wain kpaa ngu sha ci wam kua kpankwase wou man wanakiriki u a lu a mbayev ou ne; ma kwagh ban ga." 
Judges19:20 Tsô tamenor la kaa er: Bem a̱ lu sha a we! Hanma kwagh u a ban u cii me na u; de tse hen tembe ga. 
Judges19:21 Nahan a va a na ken iyou na, a na ujaki kwaghyan; ve ôô angahar a ve, ve ya kwagh, ve ma kwagh." 
Judges19:22 Er ve lu her saan saan la yô, udangmbaiorov mba hen gar la va kase iyou la, gba tan ave sha hunda; ve ôr kwagh a orya, tamenor la, ve kaa er: Due a or u a nyer hen ya wou ne, se̱ nzughul a na." 
Judges19:23 Tsô orya la due za her a ve, za kaa a ve er: Ei, anmgbianev av nea rumun yô shi de eren nen iferkwagh nahan ga, sha er or ne a ve hen ya wam yô, de eren nen ibumekwagh ne ga." 
Judges19:24 Nenge, wan wam u kwase u iniunugh, man kpankwase na; ka ve me due a ve, me na ne ye, nzughul nen a ve, er nen a ve sha ishima yen cii; kpa or ne yô, de eren nen ibume kwagh a na ga." 
Judges19:25 Kpa ior mbala venda u ungwan imo na; nahan or la kôr kpankwase na due a mi na ve; ve nzughul a na, ve tsa nzughul a na tugh mbula cii zan zan sev av; sev mbu sôôn u aven yô, ve pase un ve tuhwa." 
Judges19:26 Tsô sev mbu hiin u aven yô, kwase la va gba hen hundaya u tamenor, u orvesen na lu her la; a lu her zan zan sev wanger." 
Judges19:27 Orvesen na mough pepe, bugh ihinda i ya, dugh er una yem yô, a kav kwase, gba hen hunda u iyoughough ave na lu sha kpandehunda, lu kpankwase na la je." 
Judges19:28 A kaa a na er: Mough, sé yem; kpa a bugh zwa ga; tsô a tôô un a penda sha jaki; nahan or la mough yem hen ya na." 
Judges19:29 Va ar hen ya na yô, a tôô ihô, a tôô kpankwase na la, a tôndo un sha alegh alegh aci pue kar ahar, a tindi a mi ken ityar i Iserael cii." 
Judges19:30 Tsô, hanmô u nan nenge a mi yô, nan kaa er: Mayange mba a er inja kwagh ne nahan ga, mnenge tsô kpaa, mba a nenge a mi ga, hii sha iyange i Mbaiserael due ken Igipiti la je zan zan nyian ne; wa nen iko sha kwagh ne, hen nen sha mi doo doo, ôr nen asema a en sha mi." 
Judges20:1 Tsô Mbaiserael cii mough, mkohol u ior cii zua er ka or môm yô, hii hen Dan je za ar hen Bersheba, man mba ken tar u Gileadi kpaa; ve va hen TER hen Misepa." 
Judges20:2 Tsô mbavesen mba ior cii, ka mba sha ikwe i Iserael la cii, va tile ken mkohol u ior mba Aôndo; ior mba zan angahar lu dubu deri unyiin mba tsuwan sanker." 
Judges20:3 Tsô ônov mba Benyamin ungwa er Mbaiserael kôndo za sha Misepa. Nahan Mbaiserael kaa er: Ôr nen ase, er i hii man iferkwagh ne i er yô." 
Judges20:4 Tsô Orlevi, nom u kwase u i wua la, gema kaa er: M va ken Gibea u Benyamin, mo vea kpankwase wam, se va tsa her." 
Judges20:5 Tsô ior mba Gibea mough num a mo, ve kase ya u m lu ker la tugh; ka mo je ve lu nôngon u wuan ye, man ve nzughul a kpankwase wam zan zan maa a kpe." 
Judges20:6 Tsô m tôô kpankwase wam, m bur un aci, m tindi a mi ken tar u dyako u Iserael cii; gadia ve er daangkwagh man kwaghbo u vihin ken Iserael yum." 
Judges20:7 Nenge, ne Mbaiserael, ne cii, ôr nen mnenge wen kua mhen wen kpaa." 
Judges20:8 Nahan ior cii mough er ka or môm yô, ve kaa er: Or môm môm nana hide ken tenti u nan ga, man or wase môm môm kpaa nana hide ken ya u nan ga." 
Judges20:9 Kpa hegen yô, kwagh u sé er Gibea yô, sé za nôngo ityav a na sha ishor i eren;" 
Judges20:10 sé tsuwa ior pue ken hanma deri, ken ikwe i Iserael cii, man deri ken dubu, man dubu ken dubu pue, ve̱ za ve̱ za tôô kwaghyan sha ci u ior; shighe u vea hide yô, sé za or iyev sha Gibea u Benyamin sha ci u kwaghbo u vihin u ve er ken Iserael la cii." 
Judges20:11 Nahan ior mba Iserael cii kohol hen gar la, ve kange ishima ishima i môm." 
Judges20:12 Tsô ikwe i Iserael tindi ior za ken kwe u Benyamin cii, ve kaa er: Ka nyi imbaiferkwagh ne i er ken a ven nahana?" 
Judges20:13 Hegen yô, dugh nen udangmbaiorov mba ken Gibea la, se̱ wua ve, se̱ dugh iferkwagh ne ken Iserael kera. Kpa Mbabenyamin rumun u ungwan imo i anmgbianev vev, Mbaiserael, ga." 
Judges20:14 Nahan Mbabenyamin due sha agar cii, ve kohol imôngo hen Gibea sha u vea nôngo ityav a Mbaiserael." 
Judges20:15 I ôr iyenge i Mbabenyamin ken agar sha iyange la, ve lu ior dubu ikundu kar ataratar mba ve kuma u tsuwan sanker yô, i seer iyenge i mba ken Gibea sha min ga, iyenge ve lu deri utaankaruhar, ve lu uicuwanmbaiorov." 
Judges20:16 Ken ior ne cii, uicuwanmbaiorov lu deri utaankaruhar mba eren imese; hanmô ve nan fatyô u keren iwen tan gwarce, á kar ga." 
Judges20:17 I ôr iyenge i Mbaiserael, kpa i dugh Benyamin kera, ve lu ior dubu deri unyiin mba ve kuma u tsuwan sanker, ve cii ve lu mbautyav." 
Judges20:18 Tsô Mbaiserael mough kôndo sha Betel, za pine ishima i Aôndo; ve kaa er: Ka unô ken vese vea vande zan sha u za nôngon ityav a Mbabenyamin? TER kaa er: Yuda a̱ vande." 
Judges20:19 Nahan Mbaiserael mough pepe, za haa afoautya hen Gibea." 
Judges20:20 Tsô ior mba Iserael due sha u za nôngon ityav a Benyamin, ior mba Iserael samber ityav a ve hen Gibea." 
Judges20:21 Mbabenyamin due ken Gibea wua ior haa inya dubu ikundu kar uhar ken Mbaiserael sha iyange la. 
Judges20:22 Tsô mbautyav, ior mba Iserael, taver asema ayol a ve, ve shi ve samber ityav henpe ve vande samber ityav sha iyange i hiihii la." 
Judges20:23 Tsô Mbaiserael kôndo za vaa sha ishigh ki TER zan zan iyange kar been, ve pine TER er: M̱ shi m̱ kporom, m̱ za nôngo ityav a Mbabenyamin anngôm la shinii? TER kaa er: Za, za nôngo ityav a na." 
Judges20:24 Tsô Mbaiserael kporom sha u nôngon ityav a Benyamin sha iyange i sha uhar la. 
Judges20:25 Benyamin kpaa due ken Gibea sha iyange i sha uhar la, sha u nôngon ityav a ve, a shi a wua ior a haa inya dubu pue kar anigheni ken Mbaiserael; ve cii ve lu mbatsuwan sanker je." 
Judges20:26 Tsô Mbaiserael cii, kua ior cii, ve kôndo sha Betel, ve za vaa, ve lu sha ishigh ki TER hen ijiir la, ve hôr kwaghyan sha iyange la zan zan iyange kar been; ve na iniav mbi nanden man iniav mbi bem sha ishigh ki TER." 
Judges20:27 Nahan Mbaiserael pine TER (gadia areki u ikuryan i Aôndo lu heregh, hen ayange la," 
Judges20:28 man Pinehashi wan u Eleasar wan u Aron lu tilen sha ishigh ki areki hen ayange la), ve kaa er: M̱ shi m̱ due m̱ za nôngo ityav a anngôm Benyamin, shin m̱ de? TER kaa a ve er: Kôndo nen, gadia kper Me na un sha ikev you." 
Judges20:29 Tsô Iserael ver ior yer, kase Gibea tser." 
Judges20:30 Tsô sha iyange i sha utar la Mbaiserael za sha u za nôngon ityav a Mbabenyamin, ve samber ityav hen Gibea er lu ve er acin a tsuaa la nahan." 
Judges20:31 Mbabenyamin due sha u nôngon ityav a ior, i mee ve, ve undu gar; tsô ve hii u wuan ior sha uigbudu er acin a tsuaa la nahan; igbudu ugen yem hen Betel man ugen nyôr ikôngough yem hen Gibea, ve wua ior er ikundugber nahan ken Iserael." 
Judges20:32 Tsô Mbabenyamin kaa er: I hemba ve sha ishigh yasegh er tsuaa la nahan. Kpaa Mbaiserael kaa er: Sé yevese nen, sé mee nen ve, ve̱ undu gar, ve̱ va sha uigbudu." 
Judges20:33 Tsô ior mba Iserael cii mough henpe ve lu la, ve samber ityav hen Baal-tamar; man ior i Iserael i i yer la kpaa hembe henpe ve yer hen ijiir i kpuun kpuun i hen Gibea la." 
Judges20:34 Tsô uicuwanmbaiorov dubu pue mba i sange ve ken Iserael cii mough gba nôngon ityav a Gibea; ityav mbila taver tsung; kpa ve fa er kwagh u bo una tser ve je ga. 
Judges20:35 TER hemba Benyamin sha ishigh ki Iserael; Mbaiserael tim Mbabenyamin sha iyange la, ior dubu ikundu kar utaan man deri môm; ve cii ve lu mbatsuwan sanker je." 
Judges20:36 Tsô Mbabenyamin kav er kwagh a hembe ve yô, gadia ior mba Iserael na Mbabenyamin ian, sha er ve lu suur sha mbayeren mba ve ver ve hen Gibea la yô." 
Judges20:37 Tsô mbayeren mbala hembe ta sha Gibea; man shi ve kar ve yem hemen ve hemba gar la cii sha zwa u sanker. 
Judges20:38 Man ikav i ior mba Iserael ver mbayeren mbala yô, er, ve̱ er zegemnyi ken gar, a̱ kôndo sha er ibeenegh nahan." 
Judges20:39 Tsô ior mba Iserael gema ishigh ken utya, nahan Benyamin gba wuan ior mba Iserael er ior ikundugber nahan; gadia ve kaa er: Mimi je, i hemba ve sha ishigh yasegh er ityav mbi hiihii la nahan." 
Judges20:40 Tsô mnyim hii u duen ken gar, er ityôgh ki ibeenegh nahan. Mbabenyamin mba gem ashe yô, gar cii gba usu hia, mnyim kôndo sha." 
Judges20:41 Tsô ior mba Iserael gema ishigh, nahan mciem gba ior mba Benyamin iyol; gadia ve kav er kwagh u bo a tser ve yô." 
Judges20:42 Tsô ve na ijime hen ior mba Iserael, ve nyôr gbenda u desereti, kpa ityav kohol ve; mba ve due ken agar kpaa wua ve ken atô u a." 
Judges20:43 Ve kase Mbabenyamin ve yisa, ve zenda ve ityô, ve hemba ve legh legh je, ve ndyar ve shin angahar hen ijiir i memen zan zan za ar sha ishigh ki Gibea vegher u sha ityoughkitaregh la." 
Judges20:44 Ken Mbabenyamin ior kpe dubu pue kar anigheni; ve cii ve lu mbafantyav. 
Judges20:45 Ve gema ijime, ve yevese, ve yem ken desereti hen vande u Rimon; ve yar twar, ve wua ior dubu utaan sha uigbudu; ve zenda ve ityô zan zan za ar hen Gidom, shi ve wua ve ior dubu uhar." 
Judges20:46 Mba ve kpe ken utya ken Benyamin sha iyange la cii kuma ior dubu ikundu kar utaan mba tsuwan sanker; ve cii ve lu mbafantyav. 
Judges20:47 Kpa ior deri ataratar gema yevese yem ken ikôngo hen vande u Rimon, ve za tema hen vande u Rimon iwer inyiin." 
Judges20:48 Tsô ior mba Iserael hide va ta num sha Mbabenyamin, ve wua ve sha zwa u sanker, ior mba ken gar cii kua uzendenya man hanma kwagh u ve zua a mi cii; agar a ve kohol la cii, ve nande sha usu." 
Judges21:1 Yô, ior mba Iserael vande bumun hen Misepa, kaa er: Mô wase môm nana̱ de ne wan u nan u kwase er Benyamin a̱ er ga." 
Judges21:2 Tsô ior va hen Betel ve tema her sha ishigh ki Aôndo zan zan iyange kar been, ve ger mliam ve vaa tsung." 
Judges21:3 Ve kaa er: TERE, Aôndo u Iserael, er nan man kwagh ne a er ken Iserael nahana? Er kwe u ken Iserael môm, u kera lu ga nee?" 
Judges21:4 Tsô kper nan pepe yô, ior mough faa, ve ta atse a nanden nagh sha mi, hen ijiir la, ve na iniav mbi nanden kua iniav mbi bem." 
Judges21:5 Nahan Mbaiserael pine er: Ka hanma kwe u Iserael u ve hen mkohol u TER ga? Gadia ve bum mimi mimi er, or u nan ve hen Misepa hen TER ga yô, á wua nan kpee." 
Judges21:6 Mhôônom kôr Mbaiserael a anngô ve Benyamin, ve kaa er: I dugh kwe môm ken Iserael kera nyian." 
Judges21:7 Tsô se er nan man mba ve shi mban vea zua a kaseva? Gadia se bum a TER, ser: Sé na ve ônov asev mba kasev, ve̱ er, ga." 
Judges21:8 Nahan ve pine er: Ka hanma kwe u Iserael u ve hen TER hen Misepa ga? Yô, lu Yabeshi-gileadi, ma or ve môm mough va hen afo hen mkohol ga." 
Judges21:9 Gadia zum u i ôr iyenge i ior yô, i zua a ma or u ken mba ve tem ken Yabeshi-gileadi la her ga." 
Judges21:10 Tsô mkohol la tindi ior dubu pue kar uhar mba fan ityav, ve kaa a ve er: Za, za wua nen mba ve tem ken Yabeshi-gileadi sha zwa u sanker, kasev kua mbayev kpaa." 
Judges21:11 Ka kwagh u er nen je ne: Wua nen hanma nomsoor man hanma kwase u nan vande yaven a or. 
Judges21:12 Tsô ve zua a anuunaukase deri unyiin hen mba ve tem ken Yabeshi-gileadi la, mba ve lu a yav a or mayange ga yô; ve va a ve hen afo hen Shilo u ken tar u Kanaan." 
Judges21:13 Nahan mkohol u ior cii tindi, i za ôr kwagh a Mbabenyamin mba ve lu hen vande u Rimon la, er i hime a ve ve." 
Judges21:14 Hen shighe la Mbabenyamin hide, ve na ve kasev mba i de ve uma ken kasev mba Yabeshi-gileadi la; nahan kpaa ve lu a kuma sha a ve ga." 
Judges21:15 Tsô mhôônom kôr ior a Benyamin, gadia TER vihi kwe ken Iserael kera." 
Judges21:16 Tsô mbatamen mba mkohol u ior kaa er: Sé er nan man sé zua a kasev sha ci u mba ve shi mbala, gadia i wua kasev ken Benyamin kera." 
Judges21:17 Ve kaa er: Dyako a̱ lu sha ci u mba ve wer ken Benyamin ne kpee je, sha er i̱ de koughon kwe môm ken Iserael kera ga yô." 
Judges21:18 Nahan kpaa, se fatyô u nan ve ônov asev mba kasev, ve̱ er ga; gadia Mbaiserael vande bumun, er: Ifan i̱ kôr or u nana na Benyamin kwase la." 
Judges21:19 Tsô ve kaa er: Nenge, iniongo i TER ngi sha anyom anyom ken Shilo u a lu Betel vegher u ken imbusutarimese la, man a lu hen gbenda u u dugh ken Betel u zan Shekem la, vegher u sha ityoughkitaregh la, shi a lu Lebona vegher u ken imbusutariyan la." 
Judges21:20 Nahan ve kaa a Mbabenyamin er: Yem za nen ken ishule i ikon i wain; 
Judges21:21 nenge nen, aluer ônkasev mba Shilo vea due sha u vinen amar yô, due nen ken ishule i ikon i wain la, hanma nomsoor nana̱ kôr kwase u nan ken ônkasev mba Shilo la, nana̱ yem ken tar u Benyamin." 
Judges21:22 Tsô aluer uter vev shin anngôôv vev vea va sha u va yilan ijir her a vese yô, sé kaa a ve ser: Gema nen ve, na nen se, gadia se zua a kasev ken utya sha ci ve ser ser ga; man ka ne, ne ne ve ga; á lu nahan yô, ma ne lu a ibo hegen." 
Judges21:23 Tsô Mbabenyamin er nahan, ve kôr kasev sha iyenge ve vough ken mbavinenamar mbala, ve yem a mi; maa ve mough, ve hide hen dyako ve, ve za maa agar, ve tema ker." 
Judges21:24 Tsô Mbaiserael mough hen ijiir la, sha ayange la, hanma or yem hen kwe u nan, man ior mba nan; ve mough heela hanma or yem ken dyako u nan." 
Judges21:25 Sha ayange la tor lu ken Iserael ga; nahan hanma or gbaa eren kwagh sha ishima i nan tsô. 
Ruth1:1 Tsô sha ayange a mbajiriv lu sôron tar la, ijen gba hen tar la. Nahan or u Betelehem u ken Yuda la yem shir ken tar u Moabi, un vea kwase na man ônov nav mba nomso uhar." 
Ruth1:2 Iti i or la er Elimeleki man iti i kwase na er Naomi, man ati a ônov nav mba nomso mba uhar mbala yô, er, Malon man Kilion; ve lu ior i Eferata ken Betelehem u ken Yuda la. Ve va ken tar u Moabi, ve va tema ker." 
Ruth1:3 Tsô Elimeleki nom u Naomi la kpe undu un a ônov nav mba nomso mba uhar mbala. 
Ruth1:4 Nahan ve er kasev ken Mbamoabi; iti i u môm er Orpa, iti i ugen la er Rutu; ve tema her er anyom pue nahan." 
Ruth1:5 Tsô Malon man Kilion, ve uhar cii, ve kpe; nahan mase shin kwase la; ônov nav mba uhar kua nom na kera lu ga." 
Ruth1:6 Tsô a mough a kasev mba ônov nav mbala er una due ken tar u Moabi una hide; gadia a ungwa ken tar u Moabi er TER va sôr ior Nav, A na ve kwaghyan." 
Ruth1:7 Tsô a mough hen ijiir i a lu la, a kasev mba ônov nav mba uhar mbala a na imôngo; ve kôr gbenda u hiden ken tar u Yuda." 
Ruth1:8 Nahan Naomi kaa a kasev mba ônov nav mba uhar mbala er: Yô, gba yemen nen tsô, hanmô wen nana̱ hide hen ya u ngô u nan; TER A̱ er a ven doo doo er lu ne er a mba ve kpe la doo doo kua mo kpaa nahan." 
Ruth1:9 TER A̱ na ne mmem, hanmô wen hen ya u nom u nan. Tsô a suse ve zwa, maa ve gba vaan genger genger." 
Ruth1:10 Ve kaa a na er: Ei, sé yem a we imôngo hen ior ou." 
Ruth1:11 Kpa Naomi kaa er: Hide nen tsô, ônov av; ka nyi man né za a mo imôngo? M shi m ngu a ônov mbagenev mba vea lu noov enevee?" 
Ruth1:12 Hide nen, ônov av, gba yemen nen tsô; gadia m bee iyol m gande nom; shin aluer me kaa mer, m ngu veren ishima her, ma m zough a nom tugh mbun je, ma m mar ônov," 
Ruth1:13 nahan kpaa, ma ne kegh zan zan ma ve vese he? Kwagh ne una er, ne gba lun a noov ga tsô? Ei, ônov av, ishima i vihin yam hemba i yen, gadia uwegh ku TER ku ihom a mo." 
Ruth1:14 Nahan shi ve vaa genger genger; tsô Orpa suse ngô u nom na zwa, kpa Rutu yô, var a na." 
Ruth1:15 Nahan a kaa er: Nenge, anngôu hide hen ityô na kua hen aôndo na kpaa; yô, we kpaa hide a anngôu imôngo." 
Ruth1:16 Kpa Rutu kaa er: De zem iyol wer, m̱ de u zan a we, m̱ undu u, m̱ hide ga; gadia henpe ú za cii, mo kpaa me za; henpe ú za tsa la, ka her mo kpaa me tsa ye; ior ou ka ior av; Aôndo wou kpaa ka Aôndo wam;" 
Ruth1:17 ijiir i ú kpe her la, ka her mo kpaa me kpe, á iim her ye; TER A̱ er a mo nahan, i̱ hemba nahan kpaa, ka ku tseegh ua pavem a we ye." 
Ruth1:18 Tsô er a kav er a we ishima u yemen a na imôngo keng yô, a de u ôron kwagh la a na." 
Ruth1:19 Tsô ve uhar ve gba yemen zan zan ve za ar hen Betelehem. Zum u ve ar her Betelehem yô, gar cii hingir gbugh gbu gbugh sha ci ve; kasev gba pinen er: Ka Naomi je ne?" 
Ruth1:20 A kaa a ve er: De kera yerem nen ner, Naomi ga, yilam nen ner, Mara; gadia Uhembanagee cii, erem kwagh u vihin yum." 
Ruth1:21 Iyange m mough hen ijiir ne, m lu ave kiva kiva, kpa TER hide a mo aveve; man ka nyi ne yerem ner Naomi, er TER A pase er Un vendem, man Uhembanagee cii A erem icanaa?" 
Ruth1:22 Kape Naomi hide vea Rutu kwase u wan na, wan u Moabi, u a due a na imôngo ken tar u Moabi la; ve ar hen Betelehem sha shighe u sundan shair." 
Ruth2:1 Naomi lu a anmgbian u nom na, lu shagbaor, ken tsombor u Elimeleki, iti na er Boashi." 
Ruth2:2 Un Rutu, wan u Moabi la, kaa a Naomi er: Ma m ze ken ityev, ma m za yar twar u asagher a uyia hen or u mhôônom maa kôr nan a mo yô. A kaa a na er: Gba zan tsô, wan wam." 
Ruth2:3 Tsô a za, a gba za yaren twar ken sule ken ijime i mbasundav; ikôr lagh un, a nyôr ken sule u Boashi, u a lu ken tsombor u Elimeleki yô." 
Ruth2:4 Tsô hen shighe la Boashi za due ken Betelehem va, a kaa a mbasundav er: TER A̱ lu a ven. Ve di kpaa ve gema ve kaa a na er: TER A̱ ver u doo doo." 
Ruth2:5 Tsô Boashi pine wanakiriki na, u a nengen sha mbasundav la er: Ka wankwase u an laa?" 
Ruth2:6 Un wanakiriki u nengen sha mbasundav la gema kaa a na er: Ka wankwase u Moabi u a hir vea Naomi imôngo ken tar u Moabi yô; 
Ruth2:7 man a kaa er: Shi nam nen ian m̱ yar twar hen aile ken ijime i mbasundav; tsô a va, a gba va yaren pepe je zan zan hegen ne; a mem ken ya cihôn tsô." 
Ruth2:8 Nahan Boashi kaa a Rutu er: Ungwa ase, wan wam kwase, de kera za yaren twar ken sule ugen ga, man shi de kera karen heen kera kpaa ga, kpa luun a ônkasev av imôngo." 
Ruth2:9 Yô, nenge sha sule u ve sondo yô, dondo ve ijime; m ta mbayev av icin mer, ve̱ de benden we ave gaa. Shighe u imura ia kôr u yô, za hen atumnger za ma mngerem ma mbayev ve kese la." 
Ruth2:10 Tsô a shirigh a gure, a wa ityough inya, a kaa a na er: Er nan man mhôônom ma ker u a mo, man u wem iko, mo u m ve a va shir nee?" 
Ruth2:11 Boashi gema kaa a na er: I pasem kwagh u u er a ngô u nomu la wanger wanger, er nomu kpe kera la; man er u undu teru man ngôu man tar u i mar u ker kpaa, man u va hen ior mba u vande fan ve ga yô." 
Ruth2:12 Yô, TER A̱ er a we dedoo sha aeren a ou la, ma u zough a injar i kuman gbing gbing hen TER Aôndo u Iserael u u ve u va ker ijiir i memen shin akper a Na yô." 
Ruth2:13 Tsô a kaa er: Mhôônom kôr u a mo terem, gayô, u surum ishima u ôr kwagh u dedoo a wanye wou u kwase, shin er m lu er mô kwase u ken kasev mba shiren we ga nahan kpaa." 
Ruth2:14 Sha shighe u kwaghyan la, Boashi kaa a na er: Va heen, va coon bredi, ya, civ shin vineger. Tsô a tema a mbasundav; a na un alakema u i mgbagh un sha usu yô, a ya kuma un, a ver u hemban la her." 
Ruth2:15 Moughon u za yaren twar yô, Boashi kaa a mbayev nav er: De nen un a̱ yar twar zan zan ken atô u aile je kpaa, de zehe nen a na ga." 
Ruth2:16 Man shi tsuwa nen ken aile sha ashighe ashighe undu nen sha ci na, a̱ yar twar, de yangen nen un ga." 
Ruth2:17 Nahan a yar twar zan zan iyange bee un ken sule la, tsô a gbire kwagh u a yar twar yô, a zua a samshair kuma efa môm nahan." 
Ruth2:18 Tsô a tôô a nyôr ken gar; ngô u nom na nenge kwagh u a zough a mi sha twar u yaren yô; shi a va a kwagh u a ya hemba un la, a na un." 
Ruth2:19 Ngô u nom na la, kaa a na er: Ka han u yar twar nyiana? Man ka han u er tomo? Iveren i̱ lu sha or u a we u iko la. A pase ngô u nom na or u un yar hen a na la, a kaa er: Iti i or u m yar her a na nyian la er Boashi." 
Ruth2:20 Naomi kaa a kwase u wan na er: TER A̱ ver un dedoo, wen u a de u tesen mbaumav kua mbakpenev kpaa, erdoo na ga la. Naomi shi kaa a na er: Or la ka anmgbian wase u ikua ikua je, man shi ka or môm ken mba vea fatyô u paan kwagh wase kpaa." 
Ruth2:21 Tsô Rutu wan u Moabi kaa er: Een, a kaa a mo er: Lu a mbayev av zan zan ve̱ kar been sunda wam cii." 
Ruth2:22 Naomi kaa a Rutu kwase u wan na la er: Doo tsô, wan wam, zenden a ônkasev nav imôngo sha u ma or nana̱ de nzughul a we ken sule ugen ga yô." 
Ruth2:23 Nahan a lu a ônkasev mba Boashi la, a gba yaren twar zan zan sunda u shair man u alakema kar been; a lu vea ngô u nom na imôngo." 
Ruth3:1 Tsô Naomi ngô u nom na, kaa a na er: Wan wam; yô, me ker u ijiir i memen er á kpe u iyol yô, gaa?" 
Ruth3:2 Boashi u u lu a ônkasev mba shiren un imôngo la, kera ka anmgbian wase gaa? Nenge, ngu tan shair nyian tugh hen ijiir i gbiren iyiav." 
Ruth3:3 Yô, ôô iyol, shighe mkurem, haa akondo iyol, za hen vande u gbiren iyiav; kpa de pasen iyol you hen or la ga, saa shighe u una ya kwagh man una ma kwagh kera ve." 
Ruth3:4 Tsô shighe u una za yav yô, ver ishima fa ijiir i una yav la; yô, za za bugh un ikondo sha angahar kera, yav; tsô una kaa u kwagh u ú er yô." 
Ruth3:5 Nahan a kaa a na er: Kwagh u u kaa cii, me er." 
Ruth3:6 Tsô a za hen vande u gbiren iyiav, a za er er ngô u nom na ôr un nahan cii." 
Ruth3:7 Zum u Boashi ya kwagh man ma kwagh, ishima lu un saan saan yô, a za yav henpe i ta tihi u alakema yô; tsô a za va teghelee a va bugh un ikondo sha angahar kera, a yav her." 
Ruth3:8 Tsô ka kom ateghôtôutu yô, a cia sulugha; gem yô, a kav kwase yav un shin angahar." 
Ruth3:9 Nahan a pine er: Ka ana? A gema a kaa er: Ka mo Rutu wanyekwase wou; cir wanyekwase wou ikondo you, gadia we u ngu orpaan." 
Ruth3:10 A kaa er: I̱ ver u doo doo wan wam; ier i dedoo i masetyô i u er ne, hemba i tsuaa la, sha er u ver ishima sha ikaior ga yô, shin vea lu mbaatsanev shin mbanyarev kpaa." 
Ruth3:11 Hegen yô, wan wam, de cie ga, hanma kwagh u u kaa, me er u; gadia hundagar u ior av cii fa er u lu kwase u injaa yô." 
Ruth3:12 Mimi je, mo m ngu orpaan; nahan kpaa, orpaan ugen u a hembe lun ikua ikua a mo ngu." 
Ruth3:13 Tsa nyian tsô; sev a av yô, aluer una soo u paan we yô, doo, a̱ gba paan tsô, kpa aluer una soo u paan we ga yô, mo me paa u mimi, er TER A lu u uma ne; gba yaven tsô, sev mbu̱ av ve." 
Ruth3:14 A yav hen angahar a na zan zan sha use; tsô a mough sha shighe u a kav or sha ishi ga yô; gadia a kaa er: I̱ de fe er kwase la a ve hen vande u gbiren iyiav ga. 
Ruth3:15 Man a shi a kaa er: Va a ikondo i u hambe sha avande la, samber i; tsô a samber i; nahan a kar shair uikaren ataratar a haa un sha mi, tsô a yem ken gar." 
Ruth3:16 Ve hen ngô u nom na yô, a pine un er: Kwagh la za er nana wan wam? Tsô a ôr un kwagh u or la a er a na cii." 
Ruth3:17 Shi a kaa er: Nenge, a nam shair ne uikaren ataratar, gadia a kaa er: De yemen hen ngô u nomu aveve ga." 
Ruth3:18 Nahan a kaa a na er: Gba teman ving tsô, wan wam, tsô ú nenge er kwagh la una za yô; gadia or la una mem ga, saa una kure kwagh ne nyian keng." 
Ruth4:1 Tsô Boashi mough za hen hundagar, za tema her; yô, orpaan u Boashi ter kwagh na la, gba va karen; a gema a kaa er: We, via la, va va tema heen yôô. Tsô a va, a va tema inya." 
Ruth4:2 Nahan a kohol mbavesen mba ken gar pue, a kaa er: Tema nen heen. Tsô ve tema." 
Ruth4:3 A gema a kaa a orpaan shon la er: Nenge, Naomi u a hir ken tar u Moabi ne, ngu teen sule u anngô wase Elimeleki la;" 
Ruth4:4 man mo yô, m hen mer, me pase u kwagh shon; yô, yam u sha ishigh ki mba ve tem heen ne, man sha ishigh ki mbavesen mba ior av. Wea paan u yô, paa ase; man aluer wea paan u ga yô, kaam sha er me fa yô; gadia orgen u paan ngu ga saa we; a lu we ga yô, saa shi ka mo je. Tsô a kaa er: Me paa u." 
Ruth4:5 Tsô Boashi gema kaa er: Iyange i ú yamen sule la a Naomi yô, ú kua Rutu sha mi kpaa, wan u Moabi, kwase u nom na a kpe la, ú ver orkpen la tse sha dyako na." 
Ruth4:6 Orpaan la gema kaa er: Nahan yô, me fatyô u paan u sha ci wam iyol yam ga, gayô, me va vihi dyako wam; we gba paan sha ityough yagh tsô; gadia mo me fatyô u paan u ga." 
Ruth4:7 Kwagh ne lu ieren hen Iserael ngise sha kwagh u paan man kwagh u musan, sha u kuren hanma kwagh a mi yô; or nan tsuwa ikôvough ki nan, nan na orgen la; kwagh ne lu u kuren kwagh a mi ken Iserael." 
Ruth4:8 Tsô orpaan la kaa a Boashi er: Yam u sha ci wou iyol you; nahan a maa a tsuwa ikôvough nagh. 
Ruth4:9 Tsô Boashi kaa a mbavesen kua ior cii er: Ne mbam shiada nyian, er akaa a Elimeleki cii, man akaa a Kilion kua a Malon kpaa m yam a, a Naomi yô." 
Ruth4:10 Man shi m tôô Rutu wan u Moabi, kwase u Malon la kpaa, a hingir kwase wam, sha u á ver orkpen la tse sha dyako na, man iti i orkpen la ia ndiir hen anmgbianev nav man hen hundagar na kera ga yô; ka ne je ne lu mbashiada nyian ye." 
Ruth4:11 Nahan ior i i kohol hen hundagar la cii kua mbavesen kpaa, ve kaa er: Se mba mbashiada. TER A̱ ver kwase u a ve hen ya wou la, a̱ hingir er Rahel man er Lea nahan, ve mba uhar, mba ve maa ya u Iserael la. We kpaa hingir orageegh ken Eferata, za iti ken Betelehem kpaa." 
Ruth4:12 Tsombor wou u TER Una na u ken wankwase ne, u̱ lu er tsombor u Perese u Tamar mar a Yuda la nahan." 
Ruth4:13 Nahan Boashi tôô Rutu hingir kwase na; a yav a na; TER rumun un, a wa iyav, a mar wannomso." 
Ruth4:14 Nahan kasev kaa a Naomi er: I̱ wuese TER u A rumun er orpaan a̱ de banen we nyian ga ne, iti na kpaa i̱ za gwa ken Iserael cii." 
Ruth4:15 Una taver uma wou shi una koson we ken iyolbeen you kpaa; gadia kwase u wan wou, u u doo un ishima la, u a hembe u ônov mba nomso utaankaruhar ne, a mar un." 
Ruth4:16 Tsô Naomi tôô wan la, kuve sha ikum, maa a hingir u yesen un." 
Ruth4:17 Kasev mba ve wa ndor a na, ve ii un iti, ve kaa er: I mar Naomi wannomso; ve ii un iti er Obedi; ka un a lu ter u Yese, ter u Davidi ye." 
Ruth4:18 Ingin ka ikov i Perese ne: Perese mar Heseron," 
Ruth4:19 Heseron mar Ram, Ram mar Aminadabi," 
Ruth4:20 Aminadabi mar Nashon, Nashon mar Solomon," 
Ruth4:21 Solomon mar Boashi, Boashi mar Obedi," 
Ruth4:22 Obedi mar Yese, Yese mar Davidi." 
1Samuel1:1 Orgen lu ken Ramataim-sofim, u sha tar u iwoogh u Eferaim, iti na er Elkana, wan u Yeroham, wan u Elihu, wan u Tohu, wan u Sufi, or u Eferaim;" 
1Samuel1:2 lu a kasev uhar; u môm iti na er Hana, ugen iti na er Penina; Penina lu a ônov, kpa Hana lu a wan ga." 
1Samuel1:3 Hanma inyom yô, or la a mough hen gar na a za civir TER u akum a Sha ken Shilo, shi a na nagh kpaa. Ônov mba Eli Hofeni kua Pinehashi upristi mba TER, ve lu her." 
1Samuel1:4 Iyange i a kuman u Elkana una na nagh yô, a na kwase na Penina kua ônov nav mba nomso man mba kasev aci a ve;" 
1Samuel1:5 kpa Hana yô, a na un aci ahar, sha ci u Hana doo un ishima yum yô, kpa TER cir un mar." 
1Samuel1:6 Wuhe na bamen un tsung, sha u vihin un ishima, er TER A cir un mar yô," 
1Samuel1:7 eren nahan anyom anyom; shighe u una za hen iyou i TER yô, kape a bamen un la; nahan a gba vaan, kwaghyan kpaa a ya ga." 
1Samuel1:8 Nahan Elkana nom na kaa a na er: We Hana, ka nyi u vaa? Man ka nyi u vende kwaghyana? Man ka nyi ishima i vihin we? Mo m hemba u ônov mba nomso pue gaa?" 
1Samuel1:9 Tsô Hana mough er ve ya man ve ma kwagh ken Shilo kera yô. Pristi Eli, tema sha kwaghteman u hen kpandehunda u tempel u TER la." 
1Samuel1:10 Yô, ishima lu vihin Hana, a gba sônon TER, vaan tsung." 
1Samuel1:11 Nahan a tsegha zwa a kaa er: TER u akum a Sha, aluer Wea rumun, Wea nenge ican i kpan Wou u kwase, Wea umbur mo, kpan Wou u kwase á hungul We ga, Wea na kpan Wou u kwase wan u nomso yô, mo kpaa me na TER un sha ayange a á lu uma cii, atsem kpaa á kar un sha ityou ga." 
1Samuel1:12 Tsô, er a ngôôr, a lu eren msen sha ishigh ki TER nahan yô, Eli nenge un sha zwa." 
1Samuel1:13 Hana lu ôron kwagh ken ishima na, zwa na lu tenger di a tenger tsô, imo na due sha ga; nahan Eli hen er, ngu hunden." 
1Samuel1:14 Eli kaa a na er: Ka hanma shighe je ú de ihundughu? Pav a wain wou la. 
1Samuel1:15 Tsô Hana gema kaa er: Ei, terem, mo m ngu kwase u ishima i vihim tsung yô, m ma wain shin ma kwagh u hunden ga, kpa m ngu pasen TER ishima yam cii." 
1Samuel1:16 De kera henen wer kpan wou u kwase ka dangkwase ga; gadia ka sha mvihi u ishima i vihim yum man mbam u i bamen mo la m er kwagh zan zan hegen ye. 
1Samuel1:17 Tsô, Eli gema kaa er: Yô, za ase bem bem; Aôndo u Iserael A̱ na u kwagh u u sen Un yô." 
1Samuel1:18 Shi a kaa er: Ma i doo u a kpan wou u kwase. Tsô kwase la kôr gbenda, a yem a za ya kwagh, ishigh nagh kera tese ishima i vihin ga." 
1Samuel1:19 Ve mough pepe pepe, ve gure sha ishigh ki TER, ve civir Un, tsô ve hide hen ya ve hen Rama; Elkana yav a kwase na Hana; TER umbur un." 
1Samuel1:20 Tsô ayange nga kar yô, Hana wa iyav, mar wannomso; a ii un iti er Samuel, a kaa er: Gadia m sôn TER un." 
1Samuel1:21 Tsô or la, Elkana, kua ior nav cii, yem sha u za nan nagh ku sôngon sha anyom anyom, kua ku a tsegh zwa sha mi la kpaa." 
1Samuel1:22 Kpa Hana za ga; gadia a kaa a nom na er: Mo me za ga; saa wan á de atumba ve, man me za a na ye, sha u a̱ za tile sha ishigh ki TER, a̱ lu ker gbem." 
1Samuel1:23 Tsô Elkana nom na kaa a na er: Gba eren kwagh u u nenge a doo u ken ishima tsô; tile zan zan wan á de atumba; TER A̱ kure kwaghôron Na. Tsô kwase la tile, na wan na atumba zan zan a de atumba." 
1Samuel1:24 Zum u a de atumba yô, a mough a na kua anomabua atar, man mwem kuma efa môm, kua ikpa i wain, a va a mi hen ya u TER hen Shilo; yô, wan la lu kpeghee je." 
1Samuel1:25 Nahan ve sôngo nombua, ve va a wan la hen Eli." 
1Samuel1:26 A kaa er: Terem, mimi je, er u lu uma ne terem, ka mo kwase u iyange m tile hen we heen sônon TER ne." 
1Samuel1:27 Ka sha ci u wan ne iyange m sônon ye; TER kpaa nam msen wam u m sen Un yô; 
1Samuel1:28 nahan mo kpaa m gema un m na TER; a̱ lu u TER sha ayange a á lu uma cii, Tsô a gure a civir TER her." 
1Samuel2:1 Nahan Hana er msen kaa er: Ishima yam ngi ember ken TER; i kende korough agh sha ken TER. Zwa wam aver sha mbaihomov av gbangeraa, gadia m ngu ember myem u U yemen yô." 
1Samuel2:2 Mô u lun wang er TER nahan nan ngu ga; gadia mô ngu ga, saa We; ma vande u lun er Aôndo wase kpaa ngu ga." 
1Samuel2:3 De kera shi seer u ôron kwagh sha imanger ga; kwaghôron u iceenegh kpaa a̱ de dugh ken zwa wen ga; gadia TER ka Aôndo u fan kwagh dedoo je, ka Un je A karen aeren ye." 
1Samuel2:4 Mbaada mba ior mbaageev sombo, mba ve nenge gbev yô, i wa ve agee iyol." 
1Samuel2:5 Mba ve idi yô, ve na ayol a ve sha tôndo sha u zuan a kwaghyan, kpa mbajenev yô, ve mem. Een, ikômkwase mar utaankaruhar; kpa wen u a mar ikpelauôn la yô, a ure." 
1Samuel2:6 TER ka A wua, A shi A na uma kpaa; ka A hungwa A or shin Sheol je, shi ka A due a or sha kpaa." 
1Samuel2:7 TER ka A na ican i gba, A shi A na inyaregh ki ngeen kpaa; ka A shirigh a or inya, shi A kende a or sha." 
1Samuel2:8 Ka A dugh icanor shin vuulevu kera, A mough a nan sha. A kende a oribanave shin tihi u ihôgh sha, er ve̱ tema a uityombaiorov imôngo, ve̱ ya dyako sha ikônough ki torough ki engem; gadia ityôv mbi tarev ka mbi TER je, A ver tar sha mbi." 
1Samuel2:9 Una kula angahar a uicighan Nav, kpa mbaaferev yô, vea saa ken ime; gadia a lu sha agee yô, ma or môm nana hemba ga." 
1Samuel2:10 Mba ve hendan a TER yô, á her ve, Una dura Sha, sha a ve; TER Una ôr akighir a tar ijir, Una na tor Na agee kpaa, Una kende a korough ku or Na u i shigh un mkurem la, sha." 
1Samuel2:11 Tsô Elkana yem hen Rama hen ya na. Wanakiriki la gba eren TER tom sha ikev i pristi Eli. 
1Samuel2:12 Kpa ônov mba Eli, lu udangmbaiorov, ve fa TER ga." 
1Samuel2:13 Ieren i pristi a ior yô, ka i ne: zum u hanma or nana naan nagh yô, ortom u pristi la a va, er i jiidi inyam i lu sha atse la je, a va a ayari u lun a agbaa atar sha uwe," 
1Samuel2:14 a kuma un shin icenge, shin shin itye, shin shin iwese, gayô, shin tsuwa; hanma kwagh u ayari la una due a mi yô, pristi a ver sha ci na iyol na. Kape ve eren hen Shilo a Mbaiserael mba ve vaan her cii la." 
1Samuel2:15 Een, er ve lu a nande ahôm ga je kpaa, wanye u pristi la a va a va kaa a or u nan nagh la er: Na inyam i á mgbagh sha ci u pristi yô; gadia una ngohol i jiidi her a we ga, saa i kô." 
1Samuel2:16 Man aluer or la nana kaa a na er: Saa á vande nanden ahôm la kpee man ú pande kwagh u a sar u yô, a gema a kaa a nan er: Ei, nam hegen je, ga yô, me ngohol sha apera." 
1Samuel2:17 Isholibo i mbayevikaior mbala, i kehe kpishi sha ishigh ki TER; gadia ior gema lu lahan nagh ku TER." 
1Samuel2:18 Kpa Samuel yô, lu eren tom sha ishigh ki TER, lu wanye je, a har efodi u sha ikondo i pupuu." 
1Samuel2:19 Man ngô na kpaa a koron un togo u kiriki va nan un anyom anyom, zum u una va vea nom na sha u va nan nagh ku sha anyom anyom la." 
1Samuel2:20 Eli ver Elkana kua kwase na doo doo a kaa er: TER A̱ na u tsombor sha kwase ne sha ityough ki iwasen i u wase TER a mi la. Tsô ve yem hen ya ve. 
1Samuel2:21 Nahan TER va sôr Hana, a shi a mar ônov mba nomso utar man mba kasev uhar. Samuel wanakiriki la, vese sha ishigh ki TER." 
1Samuel2:22 Kpa Eli bee iyol kpishi; lu ungwan akaa a ônov nav eren a Iserael cii, man shi er ve yaven a kasev mba ve eren tom hen hunda u tenti u kohol ker la kpaa." 
1Samuel2:23 Nahan a kaa a ve er: Inja na nan ne eren ambaakaa ne, gadia m ngu ungwan aferakaa a en hen ior mban cii." 
1Samuel2:24 Ei, ônov av; ka gwa u dedoo m ongo ga; ne mba nan sha u ior mba TER ve̱ er kwaghbo yô." 
1Samuel2:25 Aluer or nan er orgen isholibo yô, Aôndo Una ôr nan ijir; kpa aluer or nana er Aôndo isholibo yô, ka an nana sôn sha ci u nana? Nahan kpaa ve wa iko sha imo i ter ve ga, gadia TER ver ishima u timin ve." 
1Samuel2:26 Samuel wanakiriki la vese, TER kua ior kpaa rumun un." 
1Samuel2:27 Tsô or u Aôndo ugen va hen Eli va kaa a na er: TER ngu kaan nahan er: M pase iyol Yam hen ya u teru gbar gbar, er ve lu ken Igipiti sha ikev i ya u Farao la gaa?" 
1Samuel2:28 Man ken ikwe i Iserael cii m tsuwa un Mer, a̱ hingir pristi Wam, a̱ unden sha atse Am a nanden nagh sha mi, a̱ nanden kwaghhumandoon, man a̱ haan efodi sha ishigh Yagh; shi M na ya u teru iniav mbi usuv mbi Mbaiserael cii." 
1Samuel2:29 Inja na nan, ne ndyar nagh Agh kua iwua Yam mba M kaa Mer, i̱ eren ken tabernakel Wam la, u gem u hembe civir ônov ou a Mo, ne ye iniav mbi hemban doon mbi ior Av, Iserael, ne kehen a kehee?" 
1Samuel2:30 Nahan yô, TER, Aôndo u Iserael, ngu kaan er: M kaa je Mer, ya wou man ya u teru vea zenden sha ishigh Yagh gbem. Kpa hegen yô, TER ngu kaan er: Á kera lu nahan je ga; gadia mba ve civir Mo yô, Mo kpaa Me civir ve, man mba ve laham yô, vea kera gba kwagh ga." 
1Samuel2:31 Nenge ayange nga van a Me gber ikasewe you, man ikasewe i ya u teru, á kera zua a orbeenyol hen ya wou ga." 
1Samuel2:32 Ú nenge ican i ia er ijiir Yam i teman la, shin er Una er Iserael akaadedoo nahan kpaa; ma orbeenyol kpaa nana kera lu hen ya wou mayange ga." 
1Samuel2:33 Man shi or wou u Me kera wua nan hen atse Am a nanden nagh sha mi ga yô, nana gema á lu sha ci u vihin ashe ou kera man u vihin we ishima kpaa; tsombor u ya wou cii kpaa ua kpe a agee a ve iyol." 
1Samuel2:34 Kwagh u una hingir we ikav yô, ka kwagh u una er Hofeni man Pinehashi, ônov ou mba uhar mbala: ve uhar cii vea kpe iyange i môm." 
1Samuel2:35 Yô, Mo Me ver pristi ugen u a kom u veren ishima sha a na, u una er kwagh sha mhen Wam kua sha ishima Yam kpaa yô. Me maa un ya u lun gbem; una zenden sha ishigh ki or wam u i shigh un mkurem la, gbem." 
1Samuel2:36 Tsô hanma or u nan shi hen ya wou yô, nana va gure un sha ishi sha u nana zua a angbenger u azurfa man kpenbredi; shi nana kaa er: Shi wam ken ma tom u pristi, sha u me zua a ankwaghyan u me ya yô." 
1Samuel3:1 Samuel wanakiriki la lu eren TER tom sha ishigh ki Eli. Kwaghôron u TER za ihen hen ayange la; mpase u nengen a min sha ashe kpaa ban. 
1Samuel3:2 Tsô sha ayange la, er Eli za yav yô (ashe a na kpaa hii u wan ime, kera fan ityô u nengen dedoo ga)," 
1Samuel3:3 imenger i Aôndo lu a pir ga, Samuel yav hungul mnyam ken tempel u TER, u areki u Aôndo lu ker la." 
1Samuel3:4 Nahan TER yila Samuel; un kpaa a vengese er: Mo ne. 
1Samuel3:5 Tsô a va ayem hen Eli, a kaa er: M va ve, gadia u yilam. Eli kaa er: M yila u ga, hide za yav. Nahan a hide a shi a za yav." 
1Samuel3:6 Tsô TER shi yila Samuel. Nahan Samuel mough za hen Eli, za kaa er: M va ve, gadia u yilam. Eli gema kaa a na er: M yila u ga wan wam, shi hide za yav." 
1Samuel3:7 Samuel lu a vande fan TER ga, man shi i lu a pase un kwaghôron u TER kpaa ga." 
1Samuel3:8 Tsô TER shi yila Samuel kuma acin atar je. Nahan a mough a za hen Eli, a kaa er: M va ve, gadia u yilam. Tsô Eli kav er i lu TER A yer wanakiriki la yô." 
1Samuel3:9 Nahan Eli kaa a Samuel er: Hide, za yav; aluer Una yila u yô, kaa wer: TERE, gba ôron kwagh tsô, gadia wanakiriki Wou ngu ungwan." 
1Samuel3:10 Tsô TER va va tile, yila er ashighe agen nahan, er: Samuel! Samuel! Nahan Samuel kaa er: Gba ôron tsô, gadia wanakiriki wou ngu ungwan." 
1Samuel3:11 Tsô TER kaa a Samuel er: Nenge, eren Yam kwagh ken Iserael u hanma or nana ungwa un yô, á hingir nan ken ato gbong." 
1Samuel3:12 Sha ayange la, Me kure kwagh a Eli u M er sha kwagh u ya na la cii, á hii sha mhii je zan zan mkur." 
1Samuel3:13 Gadia M kaa un Mer, Me ôr ya na ijir gbem sha ci u kwaghbo u a fe la; gadia ônov nav ve va a ifan sha ayol a ve, kpa a yange ve ga." 
1Samuel3:14 Nahan yô, M bum a ya u Eli, ibo i ya u Eli á kera ese i sha nagh ku sôngon shin nagh ku sha samuyia kpaa mayange ga." 
1Samuel3:15 Tsô Samuel yav zan zan sev av; nahan a bugh ihinda i iyou i TER. Samuel cia u ôron Eli mpase la. 
1Samuel3:16 Tsô Eli yila Samuel, kaa er: Wan wam Samuel. A kaa er: Mo ne." 
1Samuel3:17 A pine er: Ka nyi kwagh TER A er a wee? De yeren mo un ze; Aôndo A̱ er a we nahan, i̱ hemba nahan kpaa, aluer wea yerem ma kwagh ken akaa a A kaa u cii yô." 
1Samuel3:18 Tsô Samuel ôr un akaa cii yer un ma kwagh ga. Nahan a kaa er: Un ka TER, A̱ er kwagh u a doo Un yô." 
1Samuel3:19 Tsô Samuel vese, TER lu a na, A rumun er ma kwaghôron Na môm a̱ gba inya mayange ga." 
1Samuel3:20 Iserael cii, hii hen Dan zan zan ar hen Bersheba, ve fa er Samuel a lu profeti u TER mimi yô." 
1Samuel3:21 TER kpaa shi ande ken Shilo; gadia ka ken Shilo je TER pase iyol Na hen Samuel sha kwaghôron u TER ye. 
1Samuel4:1 Kwaghôron u Samuel samber hen Iserael cii. Tsô Iserael za nôngo ityav a Mbafiliti, ve za haa afo hen Ebeneser; Mbafiliti haa di afo hen Afeki." 
1Samuel4:2 Tsô Mbafiliti samber ityav a Iserael; zum u ityav za gigh yô, Mbafiliti hemba Iserael, ve wua ior er dubu unyiin nahan ken ikôngo." 
1Samuel4:3 Zum u ior hide hen afo yô, mbatamen mba Iserael pine er: Ka nyi man TER A er Mbafiliti ve hembe se nyian nahana? Yô, sé za tôô nen areki u ikuryan u TER ken Shilo, sé va nen a mi heen, a̱ va nyôr hen atô wase, a̱ yima se sha ikev i mbaihomov asev." 
1Samuel4:4 Tsô ior tindi loho hen Shilo, i za va a areki u ikuryan u TER u akum a Sha u A tem hen atô u ucerubi la; ônov mba Eli mba uhar mbala, Hofeni man Pinehashi, ve lu a areki u ikuryan i Aôndo." 
1Samuel4:5 Zum u areki u ikuryan u TER va nyôr hen afo yô, Iserael cii ger je, inya tenger." 
1Samuel4:6 Er Mbafiliti ungwa igeren la nahan yô, ve kaa er: Inja i igeren i ken afo a Mbaheberu la, ka nyi? Tsô, ve kav er i za ve a areki u TER ken afo yô." 
1Samuel4:7 Mbafiliti cia, gadia ve kaa er: Aôndo va hen afo a ve. Shi ve kaa er: Kwagh tser se ve, gadia imbakwagh ne ngi a vande eren ga." 
1Samuel4:8 Kwagh tser se ve! Ka an nana shi yima se sha ikev i mbaaôndo mba ageev mbana? Mban ka mbaaôndo mba iyange ve tim Mbaigipiti sha hanma injacan ken desereti je ne. 
1Samuel4:9 Taver nen asema, lu nen nomsombaiorov, ne Mbafiliti, sha er né hingir ikpan i Mbaheberu er ve ve lu i yen nahan ga; lu nen nomsombaiorov, nôngo nen ityav." 
1Samuel4:10 Tsô Mbafiliti nôngo ityav, ityav hemba Iserael; hanma or yevese yem hen tenti u nan; i wua ior kpishi; gadia ken Iserael ior mba zan angahar kpe dubu ikundugber." 
1Samuel4:11 Man shi i ngohol areki u Aôndo; ônov mba Eli mba uhar mbala, Hofeni man Pinehashi kpaa, i wua ve." 
1Samuel4:12 Tsô, Orbenyamin u ken utya gber ayem va ken Shilo sha iyange shon la a akondo a anden iyol man inya sha ityou." 
1Samuel4:13 Er a va ar yô, Eli tema hen ijiir na i teman sha gbenda, lu keghen; gadia ishima lu nyian un a areki u Aôndo. Tsô er or la va ôr kwagh la ken gar yô, gar cii ger mliam." 
1Samuel4:14 Er Eli ungwa er i ger mliam nahan yô, a pine er: Ka nyi injaayôôso nee? Tsô or la va fese va kaa Eli." 
1Samuel4:15 Eli lu anyom akunduanyiingber kar anigheni; ashe a na hingir gang, kera fan ityô u nengen kpaa ga." 
1Samuel4:16 Or la kaa a Eli er: Ka mo m dugh ken utya nyian je m yevese ken utya ye. Tsô a pine er: I er nana, wan wama?" 
1Samuel4:17 U a va a loho la gema kaa er: Iserael yevese Mbafiliti; i wua ior kpishi, ônov ou mba uhar Hofeni man Pinehashi ve kpe, areki u Aôndo kpaa i ngohol kera." 
1Samuel4:18 Tsô er a ter areki u Aôndo yô, a segha sha kwaghteman na, a gba hen kpehunda, a sombo mon, a kpe; gadia lu or u been iyol je, man yuhwa kpaa. A lu orjir hen Iserael anyom akunduahar." 
1Samuel4:19 Kwase u wan na Pinehashi, lu iyav kuma u maren je; zum u a ungwa loho er i ngohol areki u Aôndo man ter u nom na kua nom na kpaa ve kpe yô, a shirigh inya, a mar; gadia martoghol kôr un." 
1Samuel4:20 Tsô er a lu nôngon ku la yô, kasev mba ve tile a na her la, ve kaa a na er: De cie ga, gadia u mar wannomso. Kpa a bugh zwa ga, a ver ishima her kpaa ga." 
1Samuel4:21 Tsô a ii wan la iti er: Ikabodi, a kaa er: Icivir kar hen Iserael kera, sha ci u i ngohol areki u Aôndo, man sha ci u kwagh u ter u nom na kua nom na la kpaa." 
1Samuel4:22 A kaa er: Icivir kar hen Iserael kera ve, gadia i ngohol areki u Aôndo." 
1Samuel5:1 Tsô Mbafiliti ngohol areki u Aôndo hen Ebeneser, ve yem a mi hen Ashedodi." 
1Samuel5:2 Nahan Mbafiliti tôô areki u Aôndo nyôr a mi ken iyou i Dagon, ve za ver ikua ikua a Dagon." 
1Samuel5:3 Kper nan, Mbaashedodi mba nderen, mba ze her pepe yô, ve kav, Dagon gba, cir ishigh inya sha ishigh ki areki u TER. Tsô ve tôô Dagon ve hide a mi ve ver hen ijiir na." 
1Samuel5:4 Kper gen shi mba ze her pepe yô, ve kav Dagon gba cir ishigh inya sha ishigh ki areki u TER; ityough ki Dagon kua akevaveegh na cii tôndo haa inya hen kpandehunda u shin; Dagon mase shin gundu tseegh." 
1Samuel5:5 Ka nahan man upristi mba Dagon kua mba ve ve hen iyou i Dagon cii ve kera ndyaren kpandehunda u shin u Dagon ken Ashedodi mayange ga zan zan nyian ye. 
1Samuel5:6 Kpa uwegh ku TER yuhwa sha ior mba Ashedodi, A cie ve, shi A tsaha ve sha iyolmuran, ka Ashedodi kua iningirtar na." 
1Samuel5:7 Tsô er Mbaashedodi nenge nahan yô, ve kaa er: Areki u Aôndo u Iserael a̱ de kera luun a vese ga, gadia uwegh Nagh yuhwa sha a vese kua sha aôndo wase Dagon kpaa." 
1Samuel5:8 Tsô ve kohol utor mba Mbafiliti cii her a ve, ve pine er: Sé er a areki u Aôndo u Iserael ne nana? Ve gema ve kaa er: Yô, i̱ tôô areki u Aôndo u Iserael ne i̱ yem a mi ken Gati. Tsô ve tôô areki u Aôndo u Iserael ve yem a mi ker." 
1Samuel5:9 Er ve va a mi keela yô, uwegh ku TER num gar la hingir nzughul nzughul cii; A tsaha ior mba hen gar la, mbakiriki kua mbavesen, imor due ve iyol." 
1Samuel5:10 Nahan ve tindi areki u Aôndo hen Ekeron. Tsô er areki u Aôndo ar hen Ekeron yô, ior mba Ekeron genger imo, ve kaa er: Ve va a areki u Aôndo u Iserael ne hen vese, sha u va wuan se kua ior asev kpaa." 
1Samuel5:11 Tsô ve kohol utor mba Mbafiliti cii, ve kaa er: tindi nen areki u Aôndo u Iserael ne a̱ hide hen ijiir na, a̱ de kera woo se a ior asev nahan ga. Gadia gar cii nzughul sha mcie je ar ken ku; uwegh ku Aôndo yuhwa kpishi heregh." 
1Samuel5:12 Ior mba ve kpe ga yô, imor due ve iyol; mliam ma gar la kôndo je ar Sha." 
1Samuel6:1 Areki u TER lu ken tar u Mbafiliti iwer itiankarihiar. 
1Samuel6:2 Tsô Mbafiliti yila upristi kua mbakpehenasor, ve pine ve er: Sé er a Areki u TER ne nana? Kaa nen se kwagh u sé er man sé hide a na hen ijiir na yôô?" 
1Samuel6:3 Ve kaa er: Aluer nea naan areki u Aôndo u Iserael gbenda yô, de ne nen un gbenda gbilin ga; shin a lu nan nan kpaa, na nen Un nagh ku iboogh, tsô, angev mbua bee ne, man shi né fa ityôikaa i uwegh Nagh ku kar sha a ven kera ga la." 
1Samuel6:4 Tsô ve pine er: Ka nyi nagh ku iboogh sé na Unu? Ve kaa er: Ka imor i zenaria itian kua ihyev i zenaria kpaa itian, sha iyenge i utor mba Mbafiliti; gadia ityôuange môm kôr ne cii kua utor enev." 
1Samuel6:5 Ka nahan man né er ieev mbi imor yen kua ieev mbi ihyev yen i i vihin tar la, man né civir Aôndo u Iserael ye; alaghga Una tôô uwegh Nagh sha a ven kera man sha mbaaôndo enev kua sha tar wen kpaa." 
1Samuel6:6 Ka nyi man ne cighir asema er Mbaigipiti kua Farao lu ve cighir asema nahana? Zum u A er akaakpilighyol her a ve la, nahan ve na ior gbenda er ve̱ yem gaa?" 
1Samuel6:7 Nahan hegen yô, nôngo, er nen ikyekye i he, kôr ibua i amben ônov, i i lu a har i igbur sha mon mayange ga yô, zer i sha ikyekye, kôr ônov mba i, hide a mi hen ya." 
1Samuel6:8 Yô, tôô areki u TER penda sha ikyekye; wa akaa a i er sha zenaria, a ne va na Un nagh ku iboogh a mi la, ken adudu, ver hen kpe na; tindi, i̱ yem a mi kera." 
1Samuel6:9 Man nenge, aluer ia yem sha gbenda u ken tar na, hen Bete-Shemeshi yô, nahan ka Wen je A er se zegekwaghbo ne ye; kpa aluer ka nahan ga yô, se fa ka uwegh Nagh ku tsaha se ga; kwagh ne gba tseren se tsô." 
1Samuel6:10 Tsô ior la er nahan; ve kôr ibua ihiar i amben ônov, ve zer i sha ikyekye, ve wuhe ônov mba i ken ya;" 
1Samuel6:11 ve penda areki u TER sha ikyekye kua adudu u i we ihyev i sha zenaria man ieev mbi imor ve shimi la. 
1Samuel6:12 Ibua la kôr gbenda u zan vegher u ken Bete-Shemeshi jighilii, i lu vaan yemen sha igbudu, kaha ken uwegh ku yanegh shin ku imesegh kpaa ga; utor mba Mbafiliti kpaa dondo sha i zan zan za ar hen ape tar u Bete-Shemeshi va kighir yô." 
1Samuel6:13 Yô, ior mba Bete-Shemeshi lu sundan alakema ve shin pev; mba kenden ashe sha yô, ve nenge areki la, man er ve nenge a mi yô, ve ember." 
1Samuel6:14 Ikyekye la nyôr ken sule u Yosua or u Bete-Shemeshi, za tile ker, zegeiwen lu her; tsô ve ar ikon i ikyekye la, ve na TER nagh ku nanden sha ibua la." 
1Samuel6:15 Mbalevi hungwa a areki u TER, man adudu u a lu a na imôngo la, u ikav mbi zenaria lu ker la, ve penda ve sha zegeiwen la; nahan ior mba Bete-Shemeshi na TER iniav mbi nanden, kua iniav mbi sôngon sha iyange la." 
1Samuel6:16 Er utor mba Mbafiliti mba utaan mbala nenge nahan yô, ve hide ken Ekeron sha iyange la je." 
1Samuel6:17 Imor i zenaria i Mbafiliti na TER nagh ku iboogh a mi yô, ka i ne; i môm sha ci u Ashedodi, i môm sha ci u Gasa, i môm sha ci u Ashekelon, i môm sha ci u Gati, i môm sha ci u Ekeron;" 
1Samuel6:18 man ihyev i zenaria, sha iyenge i agar a Mbafiliti cii a a lu sha ikev i utor mba utaan mbala la, agar a lun a ugir kua agar a kiriki a ken won kpaa. Zegeiwen u ve penda areki u TER sha mi la, ngu shiada her zan zan nyian ken sule u Yosua or u Bete-Shemeshi la." 
1Samuel6:19 Tsô A wua ior mba Bete-Shemeshi sha ci u ve kenger areki u TER yô; A wua ior akunduatargber, ior akunduahargber sha dubu; nahan ior zungwe sha ci u TER A woo ior kpishi yum yô." 
1Samuel6:20 Nahan ior mba Bete-Shemeshi kaa er: Ka an nan fatyô u tilen sha ishigh ki TER, Aôndo u wang, nee? Una mough hen a vese heen yô, Una kôndo Una za sha unô?" 
1Samuel6:21 Tsô ve tindi mbatyomov hen mba ve lu ken Kiriati-yearim la, ve kaa er: Mbafiliti hide a areki u TER ve; yô, sen va tôô nen, kôndo nen a mi sha a ven." 
1Samuel7:1 Tsô ior mba Kiriati-yearim va, va tôô areki u TER, ve nyôr a mi ken ya u Abinadabi sha igungu, ve tsegha wan na Eliasar, ve ver un er a̱ kuran areki u TER." 
1Samuel7:2 Er areki va lu ken Kiriati-yearim la yô, shighe kar kpishi, kuma anyom ikundu je; nahan ya u Iserael cii gba vaan keren TER." 
1Samuel7:3 Tsô Samuel ôr kwagh a ya u Iserael cii, a kaa er: Aluer nea gema hen TER sha ishima môm yô, dugh nen mbaaôndo mbagenev kua Ashetaroti kpaa ker a ven kera, ver nen asema sha TER, civir nen Un tseegh, tsô Un kpaa Una yima ne sha ikev i Mbafiliti." 
1Samuel7:4 Nahan Mbaiserael haa Ubaal kua Ashetaroti kera, ve civir TER tseegh." 
1Samuel7:5 Samuel shi kaa er: Kohol Iserael cii hen Misepa; yô, me va sôn TER sha ci wen." 
1Samuel7:6 Tsô ve kohol hen Misepa, ve kese mngerem ve too sha ishigh ki TER, shi ve hôr kwaghyan sha iyange la, hen ijiir la je, ve kaa er: Se er TER isholibo. Samuel ôron Mbaiserael ijir hen Misepa." 
1Samuel7:7 Mbafiliti mba ongo er Mbaiserael kohol hen Misepa yô, utor mba Mbafiliti va num sha Iserael. Er Mbaiserael ungwa nahan yô, ve gba cian Mbafiliti." 
1Samuel7:8 Tsô Mbaiserael kaa a Samuel er: De kera deen u sônon Aôndo sha ci wase ga, sha u A̱ yima se sha ikev i Mbafiliti." 
1Samuel7:9 Nahan Samuel kôr waniyôngo u man atumba, na TER nagh ku nanden ku jimin a mi; Samuel sôn TER sha ci u Iserael, TER ungwa imo na." 
1Samuel7:10 Er Samuel lu nan nagh ku nanden ave la je, Mbafiliti kporom er vea nôngo ityav a Iserael; kpaa TER dura taver taver sha Mbafiliti sha iyange la, nzughul a ve; tsô Iserael hemba ve ityav." 
1Samuel7:11 Nahan ior mba Iserael due hen Misepa gba zendan Mbafiliti ityô wuan ve zan zan ve za ar shin kpe u Bete-kar. 
1Samuel7:12 Tsô Samuel tôô iwen ver hen harga u Misepa vea Shen, a ii i iti er Ebeneser, a kaa er: TER wase se zan zan hen shighe ne je." 
1Samuel7:13 Kape i hemba Mbafiliti la, mayange ve kera va ken iningirtar i Iserael ga; uwegh ku TER lu ihom a Mbafiliti sha ayange a Samuel cii." 
1Samuel7:14 Man agar a Mbafiliti lu ngohol sha ikev i Iserael kpaa hide hingir sha ikev i Iserael, hii hen Ekeron zan zan ar hen Gati. Iserael ngohol iningirtar i a kpaa sha ikev i Mbafiliti. Bem gba hen Iserael a Mbaamor kpaa." 
1Samuel7:15 Samuel lu orjir hen Iserael sha ayange a a lu uma cii. 
1Samuel7:16 Sha hanma inyom a ningir hen Betel man Gilgal kua Misepa; a lu ôron Iserael ijir sha ajiir la cii. 
1Samuel7:17 Nahan a shi a hide hen Rama, gadia ka ker ya na lu ye; a lu ôron Iserael ijiir her; a ta TER atse a nanden nagh sha mi her kpaa." 
1Samuel8:1 Tsô er Samuel bee iyol yô, a ver ônov nav tema mbaajiriv sha Iserael." 
1Samuel8:2 Iti i wan na u iunda er Yoel; iti i idyondon na la, er Abia; ve lu mbaajiriv hen Bersheba." 
1Samuel8:3 Ônov nav yô, zaan sha gbenda na vough ga, kpa ve tsume sha inyaregh ki keren, ve ngohol inyaregh ki yamen ishô, ve vihin ijir." 
1Samuel8:4 Nahan mbatamen mba Iserael cii kohol va hen Samuel hen Rama. 
1Samuel8:5 Ve va kaa a na er: Nenge, u bee iyol, man ônov ou mba zan sha gbenda wou ga; yô, ver se tor u nana ôron se ijir yô, er akuraior agen kpaa a eren nahan." 
1Samuel8:6 Kwaghôron la vihi Samuel ishima u ve kaa er: Na se tor u nana ôron se ijir la. Tsô Samuel sôn TER. 
1Samuel8:7 TER gema kaa a Samuel er: Ver ato, ungwa hanma kwagh u ior vea kaa u cii; gadia ka we ve vende ga, kpa ka Mo ve vende er M̱ de lu tor ve ga ye." 
1Samuel8:8 Sha akaa a ve er cii, hii sha iyange i M due a ve ken tar u Igipiti la je zan zan nyian, er ve lu tan Mo kera civir mbaaôndo mbagenev nahan, kape we kpaa ve er a we la." 
1Samuel8:9 Yô, ver ato sha kwaghôron ve; nahan kpaa wa ve kwagh gbar gbar, tese ve inja i tor u nana tema tor ve la." 
1Samuel8:10 Tsô Samuel ôr mba ve ker tor her a na la akaaôron a TER la cii. 
1Samuel8:11 A kaa a ve er: Ungwa nen inja i tor u nana tema tor sha a ven la: nana ngohol ônov enev mba nomso nana ver ve, vea hingir mba nan, sha u ve̱ nengen sha akeke a nan kua anyinya a nan; vea zan ayem sha hemen u akeke a nan kpaa;" 
1Samuel8:12 shi nana ver ve vea hingir nan mbahemenev mba sha ior dubu dubu man mba sha ior akunduahargber akunduahargber; nana ver mbagenev sha u kahan nan sule man u sundan nan iyiav man shi u varen nan ikav mbi utyav kua ikav mbi akekeautya a nan kpaa. 
1Samuel8:13 Nana ngohol ônov enev mba kasev vea hingir mbanungwan nan akaa a shighen iyol man mbayôroniwer man mbaerenbredi. 
1Samuel8:14 Nana ngohol ne ishule man ikon i wain man ikon i olev i i hembe doon la, nana na mbatomov mba nan." 
1Samuel8:15 Nana tsuwan môm-ken-upue u iyiagh yenegh man u ishule yen i wain, nana na mbaeren nan tom ken iyou i nan kua mbatomov mba nan." 
1Samuel8:16 Nana ngohol ikpan yen i nomso man i ukase man mbayevikaior enev mba hemban doon ashe kua ujaki enev, nana wa ve ken tom u nan." 
1Samuel8:17 Nana ngohol môm-ken-upue u ilev yenev; ne ayol a en kpaa né hingir mbatomov mba nan. 
1Samuel8:18 Sha iyange la né vaa sha ci u tor u ne tsough la; TER kpaa Una kera ungwa imo yen sha iyange la ga. 
1Samuel8:19 Nahan kpaa ior venda u rumun imo i Samuel; ve kaa er: Ei! Se yô, ka se pe lun a tor," 
1Samuel8:20 sha u se kpaa se̱ hingir er akuraior agen cii nahan; tor wase a̱ ôron se ijir, a̱ hemen se, a̱ nôngo ityav sha ci wase." 
1Samuel8:21 Tsô Samuel ungwa akaaôron a ior la cii, nahan a gema a kimbir kwagh la sha ato a TER." 
1Samuel8:22 Tsô TER kaa a Samuel er: Er sha imo ve, na ve tor. Nahan Samuel kaa a ior mba Iserael er: Gba yemen nen tsô, hanma or a̱ yem hen ya u nan."
