1Samuel9:1 Tsô orgen lu ken Benyamin, iti na er Kishi, wan u Abiel, wan u Seror, wan u Bekorati, wan u Afia, Orbenyamin, lu ornyar." 
1Samuel9:2 A lu a wan, iti na er Saulu, lu kwaor, doo ashe tsung; ken Mbaiserael ma or hemba doon ashe a na ga, a tav a kar ior mbagenev cii hii sha avandeaveegh yem sha." 
1Samuel9:3 Tsô ujaki mba Kishi, ter u Saulu la, ve saa. Nahan Kishi kaa a wan na Saulu er: Yô, mough a ortom môm, za ker nen ujaki." 
1Samuel9:4 Tsô a mough a kar sha tar u iwoogh u Eferaim, shi a kar hen tar u Shalisha kpaa, kpa ve zua a mi ga; nahan ve kar hen tar u Shaalim, kpa ve lu heregh ga; a shi a kar ken tar u Mbabenyamin, kpa ve zua a mi ga." 
1Samuel9:5 Er ve za ar ken tar u Sufi yô, Saulu kaa a wanakiriki na u a lu a na imôngo la er: Sé hide, sha er terem a̱ de kera hundu ishima sha ujaki kera, ishima i̱ gema i̱ nyian un a vese ga." 
1Samuel9:6 Ngula gema kaa a na er: Nenge, or u Aôndo ngu ken gar ne, mba wuese un mimi; kwagh u ka una kaa yô, a er sha mi vough; nahan sé za her, alaghga una fatyô u pasen se kwagh sha zende wase ne." 
1Samuel9:7 Tsô Saulu kaa a wanakiriki na la er: Man aluer sé za yô, ka nyi sé za na or laa? Gadia bredi kpaa bee ken akpa ase, man ma iwua i sé za na or u Aôndo la kpaa ngi ga; ka nyi se lu a mini?" 
1Samuel9:8 Tsô wanakiriki la gema kaa a Saulu er: Nenge, m ngu a môm sha unyiin u shekel u azurfa, ka un me na or u Aôndo la, sha u a̱ pase se kwagh sha zende wase ne ye." 
1Samuel9:9 (Ngise ken Iserael yô, or a za sha u za pinen Aôndo kwagh yô, nan kaa nahan er: Sé za nen hen Ornengen; gadia or u i yer nan er profeti ainge yô, i yilan nan er Ornengen.)" 
1Samuel9:10 Tsô Saulu kaa a wanakiriki na er: U kaa sha mi; va, sé za. Tsô ve za hen gar u or u Aôndo lu her la." 
1Samuel9:11 Er ve lu unden igungu kôndon sha gar yô, ve kohol mbayevkasev, lu duen sha u za kesen mngerem, ve pine ve er: Ornengen ngu her kpa?" 
1Samuel9:12 Ve gema ve kaa er: Ngu her; ngula sha hemen la; yô, za nen fefa, gadia ka nyian je a nyer ken gar ye; ior mba nan nagh ku sôngon sha ijiir i taven sha nyian." 
1Samuel9:13 Né nyôron ken gar yô, né kohol un, er a lu a unde ijiir i taven sha, sha u za yan kwagh ga yô; gadia ior vea gba yan ga, saa una za ve, gadia ka un a veren nagh ku sôngon doo doo man mba i lehe ve la ve masen yan ye. Yô, kôndo nen je, gadia ka hen shighen ne je né kohol un ye." 
1Samuel9:14 Tsô ve kôndo sha gar; mba nyer ken gar yô, Samuel due di sha u una unde sha ijiir i taven sha la, maa a zua a ve." 
1Samuel9:15 Iyange i Saulu lu a va ga la, TER vande pasen Samuel er:" 
1Samuel9:16 Kper er hegen nahan, Me tindi u a or u ken tar u Benyamin, shighe un mkurem sha u a̱ lu orhemen u ior Av Iserael yô, ka wen una yima ior Av sha ikev i Mbafiliti ye; gadia M nenge ior Av, mliam vem kôndo ar her a Mo je." 
1Samuel9:17 Er Samuel nenge a Saulu yô, TER kaa a na er: Nenge, ka or u M ter u kwagh na Mer: Una tema tor sha ior Av je ne." 
1Samuel9:18 Tsô Saulu kporom hen Samuel hen hunda, a kaa er: Shi tesem henpe ya u Ornengen a lu yô." 
1Samuel9:19 Samuel gema kaa a Saulu er: Ka mo Ornengen je ne; kar hemen nen mo, sé unde nen sha ijiir i taven sha, gadia nyian né ya kwaghyan a mo imôngo; kper pepe yô, me na u gbenda, me ôr u akaa a a lu u ken ishima cii." 
1Samuel9:20 Sha kwagh u ujaki ou mba ve saa i kom ayange atar nyian ne yô, ishima i̱ de kera nyian we a ve ga, gadia i zua a mi. Akaadoon a ken Iserael cii yô, ka a ana? Kera ka a ou kua a ya u teru cii kpaa gaa?" 
1Samuel9:21 Saulu gema kaa er: Mo m ngu Orbenyamin ken ankwe u a hembe ndahar ken ikwe i Iserael cii gaa? Ipaven wam kpaa ka u hemban ndahar ken uipaven mba ken kwe u Benyamin cii gaa? Ka nyi u er imbakwagh ne a mo nahana? 
1Samuel9:22 Tsô Samuel kua a Saulu man wanakiriki na la, nyôr a ve ken iyou i mbavannya, a ver ve ve tema a mba i lehe ve la hen ijiir i i hembe lun a icivir yô, lu ior er ikundugber nahan." 
1Samuel9:23 Tsô Samuel kaa a or u yôron iwer la er: Tôô kwar u m ne u, m kaa u mer, lu a mi la." 
1Samuel9:24 Tsô oryôroniwer la tôô namegh ku atsaan, ver Saulu sha ishi. Samuel kaa er: Nenge, ka kwagh u i tsegh un, i ver sha ishigh you ye, ya; gadia i vande veren we un je er i va kuma hen shighe ne vough, zum u m kaa mer: M lôhô ior la. Tsô Saulu ya kwaghyan vea Samuel sha iyange la." 
1Samuel9:25 Er ve hungwa sha ijiir i taven sha ve nyôr ken gar yô, a za ôr kwagh a Saulu sha tembeyough u sha." 
1Samuel9:26 Tsô ve mough pepe; ka kom sha use nahan yô, Samuel yila Saulu sha tembeyough u sha, kaa er: Mough sha, m̱ ver u gbenda. Tsô Saulu mough; ve uhar cii, un vea Samuel ve due ken won." 
1Samuel9:27 Mba ngur senen ken kpegar yô Samuel kaa a Saulu er: Kaa a wanakiriki wou a̱ kar sha hemen kpeghee (tsô a kar); kpa we yô, tile heen, m̱ ôr u mkaanem ma Aôndo." 
1Samuel10:1 Tsô Samuel tôô gbermkure haa un sha ityou, suse un zwa, kaa er: TER kera shighe u mkurem er u̱ hingir tor sha dyako Na gaa?" 
1Samuel10:2 Er u mough hen a mo nyian yô, ú za kohol ior ihiar hen uwar u Rahel, hen ikighirtar i Benyamin vegher u ken Selsa; vea kaa a we er: Ujaki mba u ze u keren la, i zua a ve; nahan teru mem sha kwagh u ujaki la, ishima gema ngi nyian un a ven, ngu kaan er: Me er nan sha kwagh u wan wama?" 
1Samuel10:3 Tsô ú karen heera yô, ú za ar hen kon u terebin u Tabor, ior itiar vea kohol we her, mba zan hen Aôndo hen Betel, u môm tôô anivoov utar, ugen tôô ikpenbredi itiar, ugen shi tôô ishegh i wain;" 
1Samuel10:4 vea sugh u, vea na u ikpenbredi ihiar, ú ngohol i sha ikev ve." 
1Samuel10:5 Tsô ken masetyô yô, ú za ar hen igungu u Aôndo, hen ape afo a Mbafiliti a lu la; tsô ú aren hen gar shon yô, ú kohol ikum i uprofeti mba senen sha ijiir i taven sha mba a adiguve man akacha man imar man molo ken hemen ve; vea lu ôron kwaghôron u profeti." 
1Samuel10:6 Jijingi u TER Una gba sha a we sha agee, ú gba ôron kwaghôron u profeti a ve imôngo, ú gema ú hingir kposo." 
1Samuel10:7 Tsô, shighen u akav ne cii aa er u yô, hanma kwagh u uwegh ough ku zough a mi u eren yô, er un je, gadia TER ngu a we." 
1Samuel10:8 Vande hemen a mo, sen shin Gilgal; yô, mo kpaa, me sen me va kohol we sha u nan iniav mbi nanden man u sôngon iniav mbi bem; hila tile ayange ataankarahar, zan zan me va her a we, me va tese u kwagh u ú er yô." 
1Samuel10:9 Tsô zum u a na ijime ken Samuel ngur yemen yô, Aôndo gema un ishima; akav la cii kpaa er sha iyange la." 
1Samuel10:10 Mba za ar hen igungu la yô, ikum i mbaprofeti va zua a na her; Jijingi u Aôndo kpaa kende un sha agee, a gba ôron kwaghôron u profeti a ve imôngo." 
1Samuel10:11 Tsô ior mba ve vande fan un kera yô, er ve nenge a lu ôron kwaghôron u profeti a uprofeti imôngo yô, ve gba pinen ayol a ve er: Ka nyi i er wan u Kishi nee? Saulu di kpaa nyôr nongo a uprofetii?" 
1Samuel10:12 Ugen u ken ijiir la gema kaa er: Ka an je nan lu ter ve ase? Kwagh shon maa i ver ishor a mi je er: Saulu kpaa nyôr nongo a uprofetii? 
1Samuel10:13 Kur u ôron kwaghôron u profeti yô, a va sha ijiir i taven sha." 
1Samuel10:14 Tsô anngô u ter u Saulu pine un kua wanye na, er: Ka han ne ze? A kaa er: Ka ujaki mba za keren; er se ker, kpa se zua a mi ga yô, se va hen Samuel." 
1Samuel10:15 Anngô u ter u Saulu la kaa a na er: Shi ôrom kwagh u Samuel a er a ven yôô. 
1Samuel10:16 Saulu kaa anngô u ter na la er: A kaa se jighilii er i zua a ujaki. Kpa kwagh u tor u Samuel kaa un la yô, a ôr un ga." 
1Samuel10:17 Tsô Samuel lôhô ior er, ve̱ kohol hen TER hen Misepa;" 
1Samuel10:18 a kaa a Mbaiserael er: TER, Aôndo u Iserael, ngu kaan nahan er: Ka Mo M due a Iserael ken Igipiti ye, M yima ne sha ikev i Mbaigipiti kua sha ikev i ityartor i i er ne ican cii kpaa;" 
1Samuel10:19 kpa nyian, ne venda Aôndo wen, Un u A yem ne iyol Na je, ken atsan a en cii kua uzayol enev, ne kaa a Na, ner: Ei! Na se tor. Nahan yô, va tile nen ase heen sha ishigh ki TER sha ikwe ikwe man sha udubu udubu." 
1Samuel10:20 Er Samuel kporom a ikwe i Iserael cii ikua ikua yô, i tôô kwe u Benyamin." 
1Samuel10:21 Shi a kporom a kwe u Benyamin sha icombor icombor, nahan i tôô tsombor u Materi, i shi i tôô Saulu wan u Kishi; kpa mba keren un yô, i zua a na ga." 
1Samuel10:22 Nahan ve seer pinen TER er: Shin ma orgen ngu u nana shi á va heene? TER gema kaa er: Nenge, a yer ken uika." 
1Samuel10:23 Tsô ve za ayem ve za kua a na ker; va til hen ior yô, a tav, a kar ior mbagenev cii, hii sha avandeaveegh a na yem sha." 
1Samuel10:24 Tsô Samuel kaa a ior cii er: Ne nenge or u TER A tsough ne zee? Ma or u kuman sha a na nan ngu ga. Nahan ior cii genger imo kaa er: Tor a̱ lu uma! 
1Samuel10:25 Tsô Samuel pase ior mlu u tar u tor a lu ker yô; man shi a nger un ken ruamabera, a ver sha ishigh ki TER. Tsô Samuel na ior cii gbenda, er hanma or nana̱ yem hen ya u nan." 
1Samuel10:26 Saulu kpaa yem hen ya na hen Gibea; ior mbagenev mba mimi mba Aôndo kpoghol ve asema yô, ve yem a na imôngo." 
1Samuel10:27 Kpa udangmbaiorov mbagenev gema kaa er: Á er nan man or ne una yima se? Nahan ve laha un, ve va sugh un a ma kwagh ga; kpa un yô, lu ving." 
1Samuel11:1 Tsô Nahashi Oramon mough ityav a Yabeshi-gileadi, a haa afoautya; nahan ior i Yabeshi cii, ve kaa a Nahashi er: Ya ikur a vese, nahan sé gbaa shiren we tsô." 
1Samuel11:2 Kpa Nahashi Oramon kaa a ve er: Me ya ikur a ven aluer nea rumun ner, m̱ ongor ne ashe a ken iyan cii yô; me er kwagh ne Mbaiserael cii ve̱ hee." 
1Samuel11:3 Tsô mbatamen mba Yabeshi gema kaa a na er: Yô, na se ian ayange ataankarahar, sé tindi mbatyomov ken tar u Iserael cii; tsô, aluer ma or u yiman se nana lu ga yô, sé due sé gba van a yasegh her a we tsô." 
1Samuel11:4 Nahan mbatyomov za nyôr hen Gibea u Saulu, ve za ôr ior akaa la; nahan ior cii ger mliam, gba vaan." 
1Samuel11:5 Hen shighe la Saulu za hide ken toho, dondo sha ibua; tsô Saulu pine er: Ka nyi i tser ior mban, ve vaana? Nahan ve ôr un kwaghôron u ior mba Yabeshi la." 
1Samuel11:6 Saulu ongo akaaôron la nahan yô, Jijingi u Aôndo kende un sha agee, ishima vihi un tsung." 
1Samuel11:7 A kôr ibua ihiar, a sôngo i, a bur aci aci, a tindi a mi ken tar u Iserael cii sha ikev i mbatyomov, a kaa er: Hanma or u nana mough nana dondo sha Saulu kua Samuel ga yô, kape á er a ibua i nan la. Tsô mcieryol u TER haa sha ior, ve due er ka or môm nahan." 
1Samuel11:8 A ôr iyenge ve ken Beseki; Mbaiserael lu ior dubu deri utar; ior mba Yuda gema lu dubu ikundugber. 
1Samuel11:9 Ve kaa a mbatyomov mba ve va la, er: Za ôr nen ior mba Yabeshi-gileadi mbala ner: Kper shighe u oo á ta la, tsô né zua a myom. Tsô mbatyomov mbala va, va ôr ior mba Yabeshi nahan, nahan ve gba ember." 
1Samuel11:10 Nahan ior mba Yabeshi, kaa er: Kper sé due sé va her a ven, yô, gba eren nen a vese sha ishima yen tsô." 
1Samuel11:11 Kper nan yô, Saulu pav ior akum atar, ve va nyôr hen atô u afoogh sha mkor u sha use la, ve hemba Mbaamon zan zan oo ta; mba ve shi yô, ve sambe, i kera nenge a ior ihiar ijiir i môm je ga." 
1Samuel11:12 Nahan ior kaa a Samuel, er: Ka an nan lu pine er: Saulu una lu tor sha a vese je he? Yô, i̱ va ase a ior mbala, sé wua ve." 
1Samuel11:13 Kpa Saulu venda er: Á wua ma or sha iyange ne ga, gadia TER na myom ken Iserael nyian." 
1Samuel11:14 Tsô Samuel kaa a ior er: Va nen, sé za hen Gilgal, sé za kimbir nen tor u kôron ker." 
1Samuel11:15 Nahan ior cii za hen Gilgal; ve za kôr Saulu tor ker, sha ishigh ki TER ken Gilgal; ve na iniav mbi bem sha ishigh ki TER her; Saulu man ior mba Iserael cii ember her kpishi." 
1Samuel12:1 Tsô Samuel kaa a Iserael cii er: Nenge m ver ato sha kwaghôron wen sha hanma kwagh u ne kaam cii, m kôr ne tor." 
1Samuel12:2 Nenge hegen yô, tor ngu hemen ne; mo yô, m bee iyol ve, m mende ivu kpaa; ônov av mba a ven; er m lu iyev je m lu zenden sha ishigh yenegh zan zan nyian." 
1Samuel12:3 M ngun heen ne; pase nen ase kwagh wam nyian sha ishigh ki TER kua or Na u i shigh un mkurem la; ka an, m ngohol nan bua sha aperaa? Shi ka an je m ngohol nan jaki sha apera? Shi ka an je m kighir nan a icana? Shin ka an je m ngohol nan kwagh sha icughuu? Man ka sha ikev i an, m ngohol iwua i yamen ishô sha u me kusu ashe a am a mini? Á lu nahan yô, me hide ne a mi." 
1Samuel12:4 Tsô ve kaa er: U kighir se a ican ga, u ngohol se kwagh sha icugh ga, u ngohol kwagh sha ikev i ma or kpaa ga." 
1Samuel12:5 Nahan a kaa a ve er: Ka TER je, A lu shiada sha a ven ye, man or Na u i shigh un mkurem la kpaa ka shiada nyian, ne zua a ma kwagh sha ikev yam ga. Tsô ve kaa er: Un ka shiada." 
1Samuel12:6 Tsô Samuel kaa a ior er: Ka TER A ver Mose vea Aron, shi A due a uter enev ken tar u Igipiti kpaa ye." 
1Samuel12:7 Hegen yô, tile nen ase sha u me ôr ne kwagh sha ishigh ki TER sha aeren a perapera a TER cii, a A er ne kua uter enev kpaa yô." 
1Samuel12:8 Zum u Yakob va ken Igipiti la, man shighe u uter enev vaa a TER yô, TER tindi Mose kua Aron, ve za due a uter enev ken tar u Igipiti, ve va ver ve, ve tema hen ijiir ne." 
1Samuel12:9 Kpa TER, Aôndo ve, hungul ve, nahan A gema ve a na sha ikev i Shisera, orhemen u ikumutya i Hasor, man sha ikev i Mbafiliti kpaa, kua sha ikev i tor u Moabi; mbala nôngo ityav a ve." 
1Samuel12:10 Tsô ve vaa a TER, ve kaa er: Se, se er kwaghbo, se undu TER, se gema se civir Ubaal kua Ashetaroti; kpa hegen yô, yima se sha ikev i mbaihomov asev, nahan sé gema sé civir We." 
1Samuel12:11 Tsô TER tindi Yerubaal man Bedan man Yefeta man Samuel, A yima ne sha ikev i mbaihomov enev hanma vegher cii, ne tema doo doo." 
1Samuel12:12 Zum u ne nenge Nahashi tor u Mbaamon mough num a ven yô, ne kaa a mo ner: Ei, na se tor, a̱ lu tor sha a vese; man nenge, TER, Aôndo wen, ka Un A lu tor wen ye." 
1Samuel12:13 Hegen yô, tor u ne tsough man ne sen yô, ngun je ne; nenge, TER ver ne tor." 
1Samuel12:14 Aluer né cian TER, né civir Un, né ungwan imo Na, né hendan a tindi u TER ga yô, man aluer ne kua tor u a tem sha a ven ne, né lu mbadondon mba TER, Aôndo wen yô, á doo;" 
1Samuel12:15 kpa aluer né ungwan imo i TER ga, né gema né hendan a tindi u TER yô, uwegh ku TER kua lu num a ven er ku lu num a uter enev nahan." 
1Samuel12:16 Yô, tile nen ase, nenge nen zegekwagh u TER Una er sha ishigh yenegh ne." 
1Samuel12:17 Nyian ka iyange i sundan alakema gaa? Me sôn TER A̱ nôô ura man né fa man né nenge kpaa er kwaghbo wen a lu u vesen u ne er sha ishigh ki TER, er ne ker tor yô." 
1Samuel12:18 Tsô Samuel sôn TER; nahan TER dura shi nôô ura sha iyange la; nahan ior cii cia TER kpishi kua Samuel kpaa. 
1Samuel12:19 Tsô ior cii kaa a Samuel er: Sôn TER, Aôndo wou, sha ci u mbayev ou sha er se̱ de kpen ga yô; gadia se seer kwaghbo ne sha asorabo a ase cii, er se ker tor yô." 
1Samuel12:20 Nahan Samuel kaa a ior er: De kera cie nen ga; mimi je, ne er asorabo ne cii, nahan kpaa, de kera gbihin nen TER ga, kpa civir nen TER a ishima yen cii;" 
1Samuel12:21 de kera kahan nen sha u dondon sha ugbilinmbaakaav mba vea fatyô u wasen shin yiman ne ga la ze, gadia ka akaagbilinigh tsô." 
1Samuel12:22 Gadia TER Una gbihi ior Nav kera ga, sha ci u iti Na i vesen la; gadia doo TER u geman ne er ne̱ hingir ikurior Na iyol Na je." 
1Samuel12:23 Kpa mo yô, mayange me er TER kwaghbo ga, sha u den u eren msen sha ci wen la; kpa me zer tesen ne gbenda u dedoo kua u mimi gbem." 
1Samuel12:24 Ka TER cian nen Un ye, civir nen Un sha mimi a ishima yen cii; gadia nenge nen uzegembaakaav mba A er sha ci wen yô." 
1Samuel12:25 Kpa aluer né za hemen u eren kwaghbo yô, á tim ne, kua tor wen cii." 
1Samuel13:1 Saulu tema tor inyom i môm; er a tema tor sha Iserael kuma anyom ahar yô," 
1Samuel13:2 Saulu sange ior dubu utar ken Iserael; dubu uhar lu a Saulu ken Mikemashi kua sha uwo u Betel; dubu môm gema lu a Yonatan ken Gibea u Benyamin; ior mbagenev yô, a na ve gbenda er hanma or nana̱ yem hen tenti u nan." 
1Samuel13:3 Yonatan hemba Mbafiliti mba ve haa afo hen Geba la, Mbafiliti kpaa ungwa gwa la. Nahan Saulu tôngo korough ken tar la cii a kaa er: Mbaheberu ve̱ ungwa!" 
1Samuel13:4 Iserael cii ungwa er i kaa er Saulu hemba Mbafiliti mba hen afo la; nahan Iserael due Mbafiliti ishima. Tsô i kohol ior, ve dondo sha Saulu ve za hen Gilgal." 
1Samuel13:5 Mbafiliti kpaa va zua sha u nôngon ityav a Iserael: akekeautya dubu utar man mbaanyinyav dubu ataratar man ior ngee er waarawa u hen kpe u zegemnger nahan; tsô ve kôndo ve haa afo hen Mikemashi, Bete-aven vegher u sha ityoughkitaregh la." 
1Samuel13:6 Zum u ior mba Iserael nenge er kwagh tser ve nahan (gadia kwagh imbishi ior), nahan ve gba yeren ken ubar man ken ikô man ken ikweavande man ken ijô kua shin ahungwa." 
1Samuel13:7 Mbaheberu mbagenev vande peren Yordan nyôr ken tar u Gadi kua Gileadi; kpa Saulu yô, hila lu hen Gilgal, ior cii lu a na ityô a akarkase iyol." 
1Samuel13:8 A tsa her ayange ataankarahar, lu keghen shighen u Samuel ver la; kpa Samuel va hen Gilgal ga; tsô ior gba sarem her a na kera." 
1Samuel13:9 Tsô Saulu kaa er: Vam a nagh ku nanden kua iniav mbi bem. Tsô a na nagh ku nanden. 
1Samuel13:10 Ne nagh ku nanden been yô, Samuel maa va nyer; Saulu due za kegh un gbenda sha u una sugh un." 
1Samuel13:11 Tsô Samuel pine er: Ka nyi u ere? Saulu kaa er: Ka sha ci u m nenge ior ve lu sarem her a mo kera man we kpaa u va sha iyange i i ver la ga, man Mbafiliti kpaa kohol hen Mikemashi," 
1Samuel13:12 ka nahan man m kaa mer: Mbafiliti vea va ta sha a mo hen Gilgal er m lu a sôn iveren i TER ga ne; tsô m cimin ishima, m na nagh ku nanden." 
1Samuel13:13 Samuel kaa a Saulu er: U er ibumekwagh; u wa kwagh u TER, Aôndo wou, A kaa u la iko ga; gadia TER ma A ver tartor wou sha Iserael ma u taver gbem." 
1Samuel13:14 Kpa hegen yô, tartor wou ua kera lu gbem ga; TER ker or Na u sha ishima Na vough, TER ver un er a̱ lu orhemen u ior Nav, sha er u we kwagh u TER A kaa u ne iko ga yô." 
1Samuel13:15 Tsô Samuel mough hen Gilgal kar yem sha Gibea u Benyamin; Saulu ôr iyenge i ior mba ve lu a na, kuma er deri ataratar nahan." 
1Samuel13:16 Saulu man shi wan na Yonatan kua ior mba ve lu a ve la, ve lu ken Geba u Benyamin; Mbafiliti yô, haa afo ken Mikemashi." 
1Samuel13:17 Tsô mbayanshar due ken afo a Mbafiliti akum atar; ikum i môm yem sha gbenda u zan hen Ofera, ken tar u Shual la;" 
1Samuel13:18 ikum igen ver ishigh u zan sha gbenda u Bete-horon; shi ikum igen za gbenda u hen tar u tseghe tseghe hen pev u Seboim, vegher u yemen ken desereti la." 
1Samuel13:19 Ken tar u Iserael cii orvareniwa lu ga; gadia Mbafiliti kaa er: Mbaheberu ve̱ de varen usanker kua awange ayol a ve ga; 
1Samuel13:20 nahan Iserael cii ve zaan shin Mbafiliti, hanma or nan za tsaase nduhar u nan kua bwagi u nan man ijembe i nan kua ishôm i nan;" 
1Samuel13:21 a pav shekel avegher atar yô, i wa avegher ahar sha ci u asôm man ubwagi man mbaayari man azembe man shi vegher môm sha u sôron igbough mbi hulen ibua a mi." 
1Samuel13:22 Kape i lu man sha iyange i nôngon ityav, i zua a sanker shin iwange sha ikev i ma or môm u nan lu a Saulu man Yonatan ga la; kpa Saulu man wan na Yonatan yô, ve lu a mi." 
1Samuel13:23 Tsô nongo u mbakuran mba Mbafiliti due za hen huwa u Mikemashi. 
1Samuel14:1 Tsô, iyange igen Yonatan wan u Saulu kaa a wanye u tilin un ikav mbi tswamev er: Va sé per sé za ken mbakuran mba Mbafiliti mba ve lu yande keela la. Kpa a kaa ter na ga." 
1Samuel14:2 Saulu yô, tema ken ikighirtar i Gibea shin tine i pomegraneti i i lu ken Migeron la; ior mba ve lu a na imôngo la, ve lu er deri ataratar nahan." 
1Samuel14:3 Ahia wan u Ahitubi, anngô u Ikabodi, wan u Pinehashi, wan u Eli, pristi u TER ken Shilo, haa efodi. Kpa ior kera fa er Yonatan a yem ga." 
1Samuel14:4 Hen atô u ihigha i i sar Yonatan u karen her zan hen mbakuran mba Mbafiliti la, iwen i horon lu vegher u keen, igen lu di vegher u keela, iti i i môm er Boseshi, i igen la er Sene." 
1Samuel14:5 Iwen i môm tile sha jighilii ken vegher u imbusutarimese sha ishigh ki Mikemashi, igen la lu di ken vegher u imbusutariyan sha ishigh ki Geba." 
1Samuel14:6 Yonatan kaa a wanye u tilin un ikav mbi tswamev la er: Va, sé za ken afo a mbaipusuv mban; alaghga TER Una nôngo ityav sha ci wase, gadia ma kwagh u yangen TER u nan mhembe shin a lu sha ikev i ior kpishi shin sha ikev i ior kpeghee kpaa ngu ga." 
1Samuel14:7 Or u tilin un ikav mbi tswamev la kaa a na er: Kwagh u a lu u ken ishima cii gba eren tsô; nenge m ngu a we, er ishima you i lu nahan, kape i yam kpaa i lu di je la." 
1Samuel14:8 Tsô Yonatan kaa er: Nenge, sé per sé za hen ior mbala, sé za ande her a ve." 
1Samuel14:9 Aluer vea kaa a vese er: Tile nen zan zan sé va her a ven yô, nahan sé tile her, sé kera za her a ve ga." 
1Samuel14:10 Kpa aluer vea kaa er: Kôndo, va nen sha a vese yô, sé kôndo, gadia TER na ve sha ikev yase je ve; kwagh ne una lu se ikav." 
1Samuel14:11 Tsô ve uhar ve va ande hen afo a Mbafiliti; nahan Mbafiliti kaa er: Nenge, Mbaheberu mban gba duen shin ahungwa a ve yer la ve." 
1Samuel14:12 Ior mba her afo mbala gema kaa a Yonatan man or u tilin un ikav mbi tswamev la, er: Kôndo nen sha a vese, tsô sé tese ne kwagh. Nahan Yonatan kaa a or u tilin un ikav mbi tswamev la er: Dondo sha a mo, gadia TER na ve sha ikev i Iserael ve." 
1Samuel14:13 Yonatan gba unden ng'aa ng'e ng'aa; or u tilin un ikav mbi tswamev lu van un ken ijime; Yonatan haa ve inya; or u tilin un ikav mbi tswamev la kpaa lu wuan ve van ken ijime. 
1Samuel14:14 Mwoo u hiihii u Yonatan man or u tilin un ikav mbi tswamev ve wua la, lu nomsombaiorov kuma ikundu nahan, ijiir la kpaa kuma iniembe er atô sule nahan." 
1Samuel14:15 Akarkase gbidye ior iyol ken afo, man ken akôngo kua mbautyav cii; mbakuranafo kua mbayanshar, ve kpaa akarkase gbidye ve iyol je, inya kpaa tenger; lu akarkase a a dugh sha Aôndo je yô." 
1Samuel14:16 Tsô mbakuran mba Saulu ken Gibea u Benyamin, ve nenge ikpilaior hingir kughukuku." 
1Samuel14:17 Tsô Saulu kaa a ior mba ve lu a na mbala, er: Ôr nen iyenge hegen, nenge nen or u nan dugh her a vese kera la. Mba er iyenge yô, Yonatan man or u tilin un ikav mbi tswamev, ve lu her ga." 
1Samuel14:18 Tsô Saulu kaa a Ahia er: Va a areki u Aôndo heen. Gadia her ayange la areki u Aôndo lu ken Iserael. 
1Samuel14:19 Tsô er Saulu lu ôron kwagh a pristi la yô, ayôôso a ken afo a Mbafiliti lu seer a seer zan hemen; nahan Saulu kaa a pristi er: Tôô uwegh ough kera." 
1Samuel14:20 Nahan Saulu kua ior mba ve lu a na cii ve kohol, ve va ken utya; yô, sanker u hanma or gema lu ihom a anngô u nan; kwagh nzughul her je cier iyol." 
1Samuel14:21 Mbaheberu mba ve vande lun a Mbafiliti imôngo caigba la, mba ve mough a ve imôngo ve za hen afo la, ve yô, ve gema ve ta ken Mbaiserael mba ve lu a Saulu man Yonatan la." 
1Samuel14:22 Nahan zum u Mbaiserael, mba ve yer ken tar u iwoogh u Eferaim la cii kpaa, ungwa er Mbafiliti mba yevese yô, ve kpaa, ve cir ve ijime a ityav." 
1Samuel14:23 Nahan TER yima Mbaiserael sha iyange la; ityav kar yem ken hemen u Bete-aven. 
1Samuel14:24 Ior mba Iserael ya ican sha iyange la; gadia Saulu bum a ve er: Or u nana ya kwagh shin nana ma kwagh er iyange i lu a mire ga, man m lu a or iyev sha mbaihomov av ga ne yô, ifan i̱ kôr nan. Nahan ma or bende kwaghyan zwa ga." 
1Samuel14:25 Tsô ior cii nyôr shin ikô, akpa a iyoughough lu hen inya." 
1Samuel14:26 Er ior nyôr shin ikô yô, iyough ngee ker, kpa ma or za uwegh sha zwa ga, gadia ior lu cian mbum la." 
1Samuel14:27 Kpa Yonatan ungwa mbum u ter na bum a ior la ga; nahan a naregh gbough ku ku lu un sha uwe la, a shindi ku sha ikpayough, a za uwegh sha zwa, maa wanger un ashe." 
1Samuel14:28 Tsô orgen gema kaa er: Teru na ior ve bum gbang gbang er: Or u nana ya kwagh nyian ne yô, ifan i̱ kôr nan; nahan ior vôr." 
1Samuel14:29 Nahan Yonatan kaa er: Terem er tar ne ican tsô, nenge, m bende iyough ne ciôn nahan kpaa, wanger mo ashe," 
1Samuel14:30 man hire ior vea ye kwagh nyian gbar gbar sha ishar i mbaihomov vev i ve zough a mi la? Gadia hegen á kera wua Mbafiliti er ma i woo ve la ga. 
1Samuel14:31 Sha iyange la, ve hemba Mbafiliti hii hen Mikemashi zan zan za ar hen Aiyalon; ior vôr kpishi." 
1Samuel14:32 Tsô ior ta sha ishar, ve kôr iyôngo man ibua kua anibuav, ve sôngo hen inya; ior gba yan awambe." 
1Samuel14:33 Tsô i kaa Saulu er: Nenge, ior mba eren TER kwaghbo sha er ve ye inyam kua awambe kpaa yô. Tsô a kaa er: Ne er kwagh u dang; va nam nen zegeiwen hegen." 
1Samuel14:34 Nahan Saulu kaa er: Samber nen ken ior, kaa nen ve ner; Hanma or nana̱ va nam bua u nan heen, man hanma or kpaa nana̱ va nam iyôngo i nan, va sôngo nen heen, ya nen, de kera eren nen TER kwaghbo sha u yan awambe ga. Nahan ior cii, hanma or nan va a bua u nan hen tugh mbula, ve va sôngo heregh." 
1Samuel14:35 Tsô Saulu ta TER atse a nanden nagh sha mi; angan ka atse a hiihii a un ta TER je la. 
1Samuel14:36 Tsô Saulu kaa er: Sé sen sé tôv nen Mbafiliti ityô, tugh mbun, sé sar nen ve zan zan sev mbu kar aven, sé de ma or ve môm ga. Nahan ve kaa a na er: Gba eren kwagh u a doo u tsô. Kpa pristi kaa er: Yô, sé za nen hen Aôndo." 
1Samuel14:37 Tsô Saulu pine ishima i Aôndo, a kaa er: M̱ sen, m̱ zenda Mbafiliti ityô, shinii? Ú na ve sha ikev i Iserael shinii? Kpa A bugh un zwa sha iyange la ga." 
1Samuel14:38 Nahan Saulu kaa er: Kporom nen heen, ne mbavesen cii, time nen, fa nen henpe kwaghbo ne a lu nyian yô." 
1Samuel14:39 Gadia er TER u A yem Iserael A lu u uma ne, shin a lu wan wam Yonatan je kpaa, una kpe kpee. Kpa ma or bugh un zwa ga." 
1Samuel14:40 Tsô a kaa a Mbaiserael cii er: Haa nen vegher môm, mo vea wan wam Yonatan sé tema di vegher la. Nahan ior kaa a Saulu er: Gba eren kwagh u a doo u tsô." 
1Samuel14:41 Tsô Saulu kaa a TER er: Aôndo u Iserael, tese kwagh u mimi. Tsô ishor gba sha Yonatan kua Saulu, ior due a ishô iyol." 
1Samuel14:42 Saulu shi kaa er: Yô, er ishor sha a mo vea wan wam Yonatan; maa ishor kôr Yonatan." 
1Samuel14:43 Nahan Saulu pine Yonatan er: Kaam kwagh u u er yô. Tsô Yonatan kaa un er: Mimi je, m bende iyough kpeghee sha ityô i gbough ku m lu a mi sha uwe ne; yô me kpe tsô." 
1Samuel14:44 Nahan Saulu kaa er: Aôndo A̱ er nahan man i̱ hemba nahan kpaa, ú kpe kpee Yonatan." 
1Samuel14:45 Tsô ior pine Saulu er: Yonatan una kpe, un u a yem Iserael yum nee? Aôndo A̱ yange; er TER A lu u uma ne, gwarce na môm u sha ityou kpaa una gba inya ga; gadia a er tom a Aôndo imôngo nyian. Kape ior yima Yonatan sha u a̱ de kpe ga la." 
1Samuel14:46 Tsô Saulu de u zendan Mbafiliti ijime, mough hide; Mbafiliti kpaa yem hen ijiir ve." 
1Samuel14:47 Saulu yô, er a ya tor sha Iserael la, a nôngo ityav a mbaihomov nav cii sha hanma vegher, a Moabi man a Mbaamon man Edom kua utor mba Soba man a Mbafiliti kpaa; henpe una gema cii, a hemba." 
1Samuel14:48 A eren kwagh sha ishima i taver, a hemba Mbaamaleki, a yima Iserael sha ikev i mba ve saren ve la." 
1Samuel14:49 Ônov mba Saulu yô, lu Yonatan man Ishevi man Malkishua; man ati a ônov nav mba kasev mba uhar yô, iti i u iunda la er Merabi, iti i u kiriki er Mikal;" 
1Samuel14:50 iti i kwase u Saulu er Ahinoam, wan u Ahimashi; iti i kurutya u mbautyav nav er Abiner wan u Ner, anngô u ter u Saulu." 
1Samuel14:51 Ter u Saulu lu Kishi, man Ner, ter u Abiner la, lu wan u Abiel." 
1Samuel14:52 Sha ayange a Saulu cii a nôngo ityav mbi taver a Mbafiliti, hanma or u ageegh shin or u taver ishima u Saulu a nenge a nan yô, a tôô nan je." 
1Samuel15:1 Tsô Samuel kaa a Saulu er: TER tindim sha u m̱ shighe u mkurem u̱ tema tor sha ior Nav Iserael. Hegen yô, ver ase ato sha imo i akaaôron a TER." 
1Samuel15:2 TER u akum a Sha ngu kaan nahan er: M umbur kwagh u Amaleki lu er a Iserael er a ker un iyongo sha gbenda, zum u a due ken tar u Igipiti la." 
1Samuel15:3 Hegen yô, za, za ta num sha Amaleki, tim akaa a ve lu a mi cii, mhôônom ma de ker u a ve ga. Wua nomsoor kua kwase, wanye kua wanikundan u man atumba, bua kua iyôngo, man rakumi kua jaki kpaa." 
1Samuel15:4 Tsô Saulu yila ior, ôr iyenge ve ken Telaim; ior mba zan angahar lu dubu deri uhar kua ior mba Yuda dubu pue." 
1Samuel15:5 Tsô Saulu va hen gar u Amaleki, va yer ior shin pev." 
1Samuel15:6 Nahan Saulu kaa a Mbakeni er: Mough, yem nen, undu nen Mbaamaleki sha er m̱ de timin ne a ve imôngo ga yô; gadia ne er a Mbaiserael dedoo zum u ve due ken tar u Igipiti la. Tsô Mbakeni mough hen Mbaamaleki kera." 
1Samuel15:7 Nahan Saulu hemba Mbaamaleki, hii hen Havila vegher u zan sha Shur u a lu Igipiti vegher u sha ityoughkitaregh la." 
1Samuel15:8 A kôr Agagu tor u Amaleki la uma, kpa a tim ior mbagenev purututu cii sha zwa u sanker." 
1Samuel15:9 Kpa Saulu kua ior, ve de Agagu uma man iyôngo i hemban doon man ibua man ilev mbi kehen man aniyôngov kua akaa a doon cii, ve tim a ga; kpaa akaa a lu a injaa ga man a dang cii yô, ve tim a purututu." 
1Samuel15:10 Tsô kwaghôron u TER va hen Samuel, A kaa er:" 
1Samuel15:11 Gema vihim er M ver Saulu Mer a̱ tema tor yô; gadia a gema a de u dondon sha a Mo, a er sha imo Yam ga. Nahan ishima vihi Samuel; a tsa vaan a TER kaka." 
1Samuel15:12 Tsô Samuel nder pepe pepe sha u una za kohol Saulu yô; i va kaa Samuel er: Saulu va hen Karmel, a tim ikav i umbur kwagh heregh sha ci na, a kar, a sen hen Gilgal." 
1Samuel15:13 Tsô Samuel va hen Saulu; Saulu kaa a na er: TER A̱ ver u doo doo, m er sha imo i TER ve." 
1Samuel15:14 Nahan Samuel gema pine er: Man inja na nan, m ongo mliam ma iyôngom ken ato a am kua amo a ibua kpaa?" 
1Samuel15:15 Saulu gema kaa er: I va a mi ken Mbaamaleki; gadia ior tsegha iyôngo kua ibua i hemban doon sha u nan TER, Aôndo wou, nagh a mi; mbigenev yô, se tim mbi purututu." 
1Samuel15:16 Tsô Samuel kaa a Saulu er: Tile, m̱ ôr u kwagh u TER A kaam tugh mbu nyian mbun yô. A kaa a na er: Kaa ase!" 
1Samuel15:17 Samuel kaa er: Er u nenge iyol you kpeghee nahan, u gema u hingir orhemen u ikwe i Iserael gaa? TER kpaa shighe u mkurem ver u tor sha Iserael;" 
1Samuel15:18 man TER tindi u sha gbenda, kaa er: Za, za tim mbaasorabo purututu, ka Mbaamaleki je la, nôngo ityav a ve zan zan ve̱ bee kera." 
1Samuel15:19 Inja na nan u ongo imo i TER ga, u gem u kumbur sha ishar, u er kwaghbo sha ishigh ki TERE?" 
1Samuel15:20 Saulu kaa a Samuel er: Mimi je, m wa imo i TER iko, m za sha gbenda u TER A tindim kpaa, m va a Agagu tor u Amaleki je, m tim Mbaamaleki purututu." 
1Samuel15:21 Kpa ior pande ishar, iyôngo kua ibua, ka akaa a hemban doon ken akaa a i tim a kera je la, sha u nan TER, Aôndo wou, nagh sha mi hen Gilgal." 
1Samuel15:22 Tsô Samuel kaa er: Iniav mbi nanden kua mbi sôngon, doo TER ishima er iko i wan sha imo i TER nahan kpa? Yô, nenge, iko i wan hemba nagh ku sôngon, man u veren ato kpaa hemba ahôm a anomaiyôngo." 
1Samuel15:23 Gadia, u hendan kwagh, ka er ishor i kpehen nahan, man ityough ki taver gema ka er akombo a sôron kua eev mbu civir nahan. Er u vende u ungwan imo i TER yô, Un kpaa A venda u, u shi lun tor." 
1Samuel15:24 Tsô Saulu kaa a Samuel er: M er kwaghbo; gadia m wa imo i TER kua akaaôron a ou iko ga, sha ci u m cie ior, m er sha imo ve yô." 
1Samuel15:25 Yô, shi dem isholibo yam, gema hide a mo imôngo er me za sôn TER yô." 
1Samuel15:26 Kpa Samuel venda a Saulu er: Me hide a we imôngo ga, gadia u venda kwaghôron u TER, nahan TER kpaa venda u u shi lun tor u Iserael." 
1Samuel15:27 Tsô Samuel gem u una yem yô, a kôr un tsumbu u riga, maa a ande." 
1Samuel15:28 Nahan Samuel kaa a na er: Nyian TER ande u tartor u Iserael gema na or u nan we ndor a we nan hembe u inja yô. 
1Samuel15:29 Man shi Agee a Iserael kpaa er aie ga, Una vaa afanyô kpaa ga; gadia Un ka or man Una vaa afanyô ga." 
1Samuel15:30 Tsô a kaa er: M er kwaghbo; nahan kpaa shi civir mo sha ishigh ki mbatamen mba ior av kua sha ishigh ki Iserael kpaa, gema hide a mo sha er me za sôn TER, Aôndo wou, yô." 
1Samuel15:31 Tsô Samuel gema dondo sha Saulu; Saulu kpaa gure sôn TER. 
1Samuel15:32 Nahan Samuel kaa er: Va a Agagu tor u Amaleki la her a mo heen. Tsô Agagu va sha ishigh nagh saan saan. Agagu kaa er: Ican i kuugh kar kera je ve. 
1Samuel15:33 Kpa Samuel kaa er: Er sanker wou a er kasev ve kera lu a ônov ga nahan, kape ngôu kpaa una hingir u lun a ônov ga ken ukase je la. Tsô Samuel gber Agagu avur avur sha ishigh ki TER hen Gilgal." 
1Samuel15:34 Tsô Samuel yem hen Rama; Saulu kpaa yem hen ya na, hen Gibea u Saulu." 
1Samuel15:35 Samuel kera va sôr Saulu ga, zan zan a kar kpen; gadia Samuel lu zungwen Saulu. TER kpaa vihi Un, er A ver Saulu tor sha Iserael yô." 
1Samuel16:1 Tsô TER kaa a Samuel er: Ka hanma shighe je ú de u zungwen Saulu er M vende un u teman tor sha Iseraele? Haa mkurem ken korough ough poo; yô, za, Me tindi u hen Yese or u Betelehem, gadia ka ken ônov nav M tsough tor Wam ye." 
1Samuel16:2 Kpa Samuel gema pine er: Me er na man me zaa? Aluer Saulu una ungwa nahan yô, una wuam. Nahan TER kaa er: Kôr tulebua, za a mi za kaa wer, m va sha u me va na TER nagh." 
1Samuel16:3 Lôhô Yese nagh kula, Mo kpaa Me tese u kwagh u ú er yô; shighem un u Me ter u un la mkurem." 
1Samuel16:4 Tsô Samuel er kwagh u TER kaa yô, a va hen Betelehem. Mbavesen va kegh un gbenda gba gbidyen akarkase iyol, ve pine un er: U va ka bem je kpa?" 
1Samuel16:5 A kaa er: Ka bem; m va sha u me na TER nagh; yô wanger nen ayol, va nen a mo hen nagh ku nan. Tsô a wanger Yese kua ônov nav, a lôhô ve nagh kula." 
1Samuel16:6 Tsô zum u ve va yô, a kenger Eliabi, a kaa er: Mimi je or u TER A shighe un mkurem ngun sha ishigh Nagh ne." 
1Samuel16:7 Kpa TER kaa a Samuel er: De kenger mluyol na ga, shin ityaven na kpaa ga; gadia a kumam ga, gadia mnenge u TER ngu er mnenge u or nahan ga; gadia or nengen mluashe u ken won, kpa TER yô, nengen ken ishima." 
1Samuel16:8 Tsô Yese yila Abinadabi er a̱ kar Samuel sha ishi. Kpa a kaa er: Ngun kpaa TER tsuwa un ga. 
1Samuel16:9 Tsô Yese na Shama er a̱ kar. Kpa a kaa er: Ngun kpaa TER tsuwa un ga. 
1Samuel16:10 Yese na ônov nav utaankaruhar er ve̱ kar Samuel sha ishi. 
1Samuel16:11 Samuel pine Yese er: Ka ve ônov ou cii nee? A kaa er: Mase shin u masetyô tsô, ngu kuran ilev. Nahan Samuel kaa a Yese er: Tindi i̱ za va a na; gadia sé gba teman inya ga, saa una va ve." 
1Samuel16:12 Tsô a tindi, i va nyôr a na. Un lu nyian, a doo ashe ikor, doo u kenger. Tsô TER kaa er: Mough, haa un mkurem gadia ka un je ne." 
1Samuel16:13 Tsô Samuel tôô korough ku mkure, a shighe un mkurem hen atô u anmgbianev nav; Jijingi u TER kpaa kende Davidi sha agee, hii sha iyange la je man ken hemen kpaa. Tsô Samuel mough, yem hen Rama." 
1Samuel16:14 Kpa Jijingi u TER due hen Saulu kera, TER gema tindi jijingi u bo lu haan un mciem iyol." 
1Samuel16:15 Nahan mbayev mba Saulu kaa a na er: Nenge jijingi u bo u a ve hen Aôndo ngu eren we ican. 
1Samuel16:16 Yô, ter wase a̱ kaa mbayev nav mba ve lu a na, ve̱ ker or u nan fe molo u kuhwan doo doo yô; nahan shighe u jijingi u bo u a ve hen Aôndo la, una kende u yô, nan gba kuhwan sha uwegh ku nan, tsô á wanger we." 
1Samuel16:17 Tsô Saulu kaa a mbayev nav er: Yô, kerem nen ase or u nan fe ityougholov mbi kuhwan dedoo yô, va nen a nan her a mo." 
1Samuel16:18 Tsô wanyekwaor ugen gema kaa er: Nenge, m nenge wan u Yese, or u Betelehem, a fa ityougholov mbi kuhwan kpe kpe, ka ortavershima, orutya, or u fan kwaghôron, ka or u kuman ashe kpaa, TER kpaa ngu a na." 
1Samuel16:19 Nahan Saulu tindi mbatyomov hen Yese, kaa er: Tindim a wan wou Davidi, u a kor ilev la." 
1Samuel16:20 Tsô Yese kôr jaki, shi tôô bredi man ikpa i wain kua anivo, tindi Saulu a mi sha ikev i wan na Davidi." 
1Samuel16:21 Tsô Davidi va hen Saulu, va hingir wanye na. Nahan a doo un ishima je; a hingir or u tilin un ikav mbi tswamev." 
1Samuel16:22 Nahan Saulu tindi hen Yese, kaa er: Shi de Davidi a̱ lu wanye wam, gadia ngu sha ishima yam." 
1Samuel16:23 Nahan yô, zum u jijingi u bo u a ve hen Aôndo la, una kenden Saulu yô, Davidi a tôô molo a gba kuhwan sha uwegh nagh; nahan i yôhôl Saulu iyol, a zua a mmem, jijingi u bo kpaa, a undu un." 
1Samuel17:1 Tsô Mbafiliti kohol akumautya a ve sha u nôngon ityav; ve zua hen Soko u Yuda, ve haa afo hen harga u Soko vea Aseka ken Efese-damim." 
1Samuel17:2 Saulu man ior mba Iserael kpaa ve kohol, ve haa afo shin pev u Ela, ve samber ityav a Mbafiliti." 
1Samuel17:3 Mbafiliti tile sha uwo vegher ne, Iserael tile di sha uwo vegher la; pev lu ve her atô." 
1Samuel17:4 Tsô nomor u agbende agbende due ken afo a Mbafiliti, iti na er Goliati u Gati; ityaven na kuma aseva ataratar cir tiôn." 
1Samuel17:5 Lu a akera u togula sha ityou, haa riga u iyôô u lun avuu avuu; myohom ma riga la kuma ushekel mba togula dubu utaan." 
1Samuel17:6 Lu a akaa a yisan agongo, a sha togula, shin angahar, a gbire dagi u togula sha avande." 
1Samuel17:7 Ihande i iwange na lu er igyaikondo yô; myohom ma gbenger-iwange na kuma ushekel mba iyôgh ki iligh deri ataratar; or u tôôn un perutya, hemen un." 
1Samuel17:8 Tsô a tile a yila akumautya a Iserael, a kaa a ve er: Ka nyi ne dugh sha u tangen ityava? Ka mo Orfiliti gaa, ne di ne mba ikpan i Saulu gaa? Yô, tsuwa nen or wen nana̱ sen hen a mo heen." 
1Samuel17:9 Aluer nana fatyô u nôngon ityav a mo, nana wuam yô, sé hingir ikpan yen, man aluer mo me hemba nan, me wua nan yô, ka ne, ne lu ikpan yase, né eren se tom kpaa ye." 
1Samuel17:10 Shi Orfiliti la kaa er: M ngu bamen akumautya a Iserael nyian mer: Nam nen or, se̱ nôngo ayol a ase." 
1Samuel17:11 Zum u Saulu kua Mbaiserael cii ve ungwa kwaghôron u Orfiliti la yô, cier ve iyol, ve cia kpishi." 
1Samuel17:12 Davidi lu wan u or u Eferata, or u Betelehem u ken Yuda, u i yer iti na er Yese la; lu a ônov anigheni mba nomso; or la lu orbeenyol je sha ayange a Saulu la, tsa sha won ayange ngee." 
1Samuel17:13 Ônov mba Yese mbavesen utar vande zan a Saulu ken utya; ati a ônov nav mba utar mba ve za ityav la yô, ka Eliabi waniunda man idyondon na Aminadabi man u sha utar la, Shama." 
1Samuel17:14 Davidi lu u masetyô; mbavesen mba utar mbala lu a Saulu ityô. 
1Samuel17:15 Davidi yô, a zer moughon hen Saulu hiden sha u va kuran ilev mbi ter na hen Betelehem gbem." 
1Samuel17:16 Orfiliti la, a zer van pepe man aikighe, zan zan ayange akunduahar, lu pasen iyol na ken igbar." 
1Samuel17:17 Tsô Yese kaa a wan na Davidi er: Shi tôô efa u alakema u kaan ne kua ikpenbredi pue sha ci u anngôôv ou, yem ken afo, za na anngôôv ou;" 
1Samuel17:18 man za a uciishi pue mban, za na orhemen ve u a hemen ior dubu la, shi nenge mlu u anngôôv ou, yô, ngohol ikav her a ve." 
1Samuel17:19 Saulu man ve kua ior mba Iserael cii, ve lu shin pev u Ela, ve lu nôngon ityav a Mbafiliti." 
1Samuel17:20 Nahan Davidi mough pepe pepe, undu iyôngo sha ikev i orkuranilev ugen, a tôô, a yem er Yese kaa un nahan; a za ar hen afo a akeke la, shighe u akumautya lu duen zan hen ijiir i nôngon ityav, eren akenge a utya la." 
1Samuel17:21 Iserael man Mbafiliti ve tange ityav, ikumutya ver ishigh sha ikumutya." 
1Samuel17:22 Tsô Davidi ver ikav nav sha ikev i orkuranilev, coon ayem, za hen tangeutya, za sugh anngôôv nav." 
1Samuel17:23 Ngur ôron kwagh a ve yô, nenge, nomor u agbende agbende, Orfiliti u Gati u i yer er Goliati la, due ken tangeutya u Mbafiliti, gba ôron kwagh sha inja i a ôron keke la; nahan Davidi ungwa kwagh la." 
1Samuel17:24 Ior mba Iserael cii, mba nengen a or la yô, ve yevese un, ve cia kpishi." 
1Samuel17:25 Nahan ior mba Iserael kaa er. Ne nenge or la, er a kende kpa? Ka sha u una va bam Iserael a kende ye; nahan aluer or nana wua un yô, tor una na nan nana hingir ornyar kpishi, shi una na nan wan na u kwase, man shi una wase ya u ter u nan dedoo ken Iserael kpaa." 
1Samuel17:26 Tsô Davidi ôr kwagh a ior mba ve tile a na la, a kaa er: Á er a or u nana wua Orfiliti ne, man nana tôô iheen i Iserael kera la nana? Orfiliti oripusu ne ngu nyi je, man a bamen akumautya a Aôndo u uma?" 
1Samuel17:27 Nahan ior gema ôr un kwaghôron u ashen la, er: Ka ape á er a or u nana wua un la." 
1Samuel17:28 Tsô Eliabi, anngô na u vesen ungwa er a lu ôron kwagh a ior yô, nahan ishima vihi Eliabi a Davidi, a kaa er: Ka nyi u ve heene? Man ka an u we nan aniyôngov mba kpeghee mba ken toho mbala sha ikeve? M fa ihagher you man ifer i i lu ken ishima you la; gadia u sen, u va ityav mbi kenger tsô." 
1Samuel17:29 Tsô Davidi kaa er: M er nyi ase? M pine a pine kwagh tsô gaa? 
1Samuel17:30 Tsô a kar her a na kera a hide hen orgen, a shi a pine er ashen nahan; ior mbala shi ôr un di er ashen nahan." 
1Samuel17:31 Mba ongo kwagh u Davidi ôr la yô, ve za ôr Saulu, tsô a tindi loho er a̱ va." 
1Samuel17:32 Nahan Davidi kaa a Saulu er: Or môm môm, ishima i̱ de kera yen nan sha ci u or la ga, wanye wou una za nôngo a Orfiliti la." 
1Samuel17:33 Kpa Saulu kaa a Davidi er: U fatyô u zan, za nôngon ityav a Orfiliti ne ga; gadia we u ngu wanye tsô, kpa un yô, gema ka orutya hii iyev je." 
1Samuel17:34 Davidi gema kaa a Saulu er: Er wanye wou a kor ilev mbi ter na yô, begha ka una va shin dwem a̱ va kôr waniyôngo ken ikumuile yô," 
1Samuel17:35 m zenda un ijime, m za ta num sha a na, m ngohol un waniyôngo sha zwa; shin una mough num a mo kpaa, m kôr un sha indyer, m hemba un, m wua." 
1Samuel17:36 Wanye wou hemba begha kua dwem kpaa; nahan oripusu Orfiliti ne una hingir er mô ve nahan, sha ci u a bamen akumautya a Aôndo u uma yô." 
1Samuel17:37 Davidi shi kaa er: TER u lu yimam sha ikev i begha man sha ikev i dwem la, shi Una yimam sha ikev i Orfiliti ne kpaa, Nahan Saulu kaa a Davidi er: Yô, za, TER A̱ lu a we." 
1Samuel17:38 Tsô Saulu haa Davidi akondo a na, cir un akera u togula sha ityou, shi haa un riga u iyôô." 
1Samuel17:39 Davidi kange sanker na sha akondo a na kpaa, gba nôngon u yemen, gadia lu a vande karen a iyol ga. Tsô Davidi kaa a Saulu er: M fatyô u zenden a mi ga, gadia m vande karen a iyol ga. Nahan Davidi er a kera." 
1Samuel17:40 Tsô a kôr gbough nagh sha uwe, a sange awen a kôngor ataan, shin uwagh, a haa ken ikpa na i orkuranilev i a lu a mi yô, ka ikpa i mzu je la; mzu na kpaa a lu a mi sha uwe; tsô a kporom hen Orfiliti la." 
1Samuel17:41 Orfiliti la kpaa, gba kporom van hen Davidi; ortilin un perutya la, kar hemen." 
1Samuel17:42 Kpa zum u Orfiliti la ta ashe za nenge a Davidi yô, a laha un, gadia lu wanye tsô, lu nyian, kuma ashe." 
1Samuel17:43 Nahan Orfiliti la kaa a Davidi er: Mo m ngu waniwa, shin u ve hen a mo a mbaagaa? Shi Orfiliti la wa Davidi ifan sha iti i mbaaôndo nav." 
1Samuel17:44 Orfiliti la kaa a Davidi er: Va ase her a mo heen, me gema inyam you me na inyon i i purugh sha kua inyamtoho." 
1Samuel17:45 Tsô Davidi kaa a Orfiliti la er: U ngu van her a mo a sanker man iwange kua dagi, kpa mo yô, m ngu van hen a we ken iti i TER u akum a Sha, Aôndo u akumautya a Iserael, u u bamen Un la." 
1Samuel17:46 TER Una na u sha ikev yam nyian; me hemba u, me gber u ityough; shi me gema akom a ikumior i Mbafiliti me na inyon i i purugh sha kua inyamtoho nyian, sha er tar cii u̱ fa er Aôndo A lu ken Iserael yô;" 
1Samuel17:47 ikpelaior ne cii ia fa er TER A yem sha sanker kua iwange ga yô; gadia ityav ka mbi TER, nahan Una na ne sha ikev yase." 
1Samuel17:48 Tsô Orfiliti la ngur kporom van er una va kohol Davidi yô, Davidi sa kwan inya gba zan hen ijiir i nôngon ityav sha u una za kohol Orfiliti la." 
1Samuel17:49 Tsô Davidi za uwegh shin ikpa dugh iwen shin mi, vishigh, ta Orfiliti sha icul; iwen la nyôr tema un ken icul je; a gba, a cir ishigh inya." 
1Samuel17:50 Kape Davidi hemba Orfiliti la, sha mzu kua iwen ne; a hemba Orfiliti la, a wua un; kpa sanker lu sha uwegh ku Davidi ga." 
1Samuel17:51 Tsô Davidi coon ayem za tile hen Orfiliti la, za uwegh tsuwa sanker na la ken var, wua un, gber un ityough a mi. Er Mbafiliti nenge nomor ve kpe nahan yô, ve yevese." 
1Samuel17:52 Tsô ior mba Iserael kua mba Yuda ve mough ve ger akenge, ve cir Mbafiliti ijime zan zan ve za ar hen Gati la, man hen ihinda i Ekeron. Mbafiliti mba i vihi ve ayol yô, ve gba sha gbenda u zan sha Sharaim zan zan za ar hen Gati kua Ekeron kpaa." 
1Samuel17:53 Tsô Mbaiserael de u zendan Mbafiliti ityô, ve hide ve gba yan ishar hen afo ve." 
1Samuel17:54 Nahan Davidi tôô ityough ki Orfiliti la va a mi ken Yerusalem; kpa ikav mbi utyav nav yô, a ver ken tenti na." 
1Samuel17:55 Zum u Saulu nenge Davidi due sha u za nôngon a Orfiliti la yô, a pine kurutya na Abiner, er: Abiner, wanye ne ka wan u ana? Abiner kaa er: Mimi je, tor, er u lu uma ne m fa ga." 
1Samuel17:56 Nahan tor kaa er: Yô, pine, fa or u wanye shon a lu wan u nan yô." 
1Samuel17:57 Tsô er Davidi za wua Orfiliti la hide yô, Abiner kua a na, va a na sha ishigh ki Saulu a ityough ki Orfiliti la sha uwe." 
1Samuel17:58 Saulu pine un er: We wanyekwaor ne, u ngu wan u ana? Davidi gema kaa er: Mo m ngu wan u wanye wou Yese, or u Betelehem." 
1Samuel18:1 Tsô kur kwaghôron a Saulu yô, ishima i Yonatan maa zua a ishima i Davidi. Davidi doo Yonatan ishima je er ka uma na iyol na nahan." 
1Samuel18:2 Saulu kua a na sha iyange la je, kera rumun er a̱ hide hen ya u ter na ga." 
1Samuel18:3 Nahan Yonatan vea Davidi ve tôndo zwa ayol a ve, sha ci u a doo un ishima er uma na iyol na yô." 
1Samuel18:4 Yonatan er riga na u a lu a mi iyol la, na Davidi, man akondo a na kua sanker na kpaa, man ada na kua kwange na u shin iwenge kpaa." 
1Samuel18:5 Davidi yô, hanma ijiir i Saulu a tindi un yô, a za; aeren a na kpaa luun sha mi vough; Saulu wa mbanôngontyav sha ikev na, nahan kwagh la doo ior cii, mbayev mba Saulu kpaa doo ve." 
1Samuel18:6 Tsô, er ve hide, man Davidi kpaa hide zum u a wua Orfiliti la yô, kasev due ken agar a Iserael cii gba wan icam vinen amar zan, za keghen tor Saulu gbenda, a anigingav, a iember, man mbaadiguve mba lun a ingyanyinya utar." 
1Samuel18:7 Ken amar la yô, kasev lu wan atsam, mbagenev lu nderan, mbagenev lu rumun, kaan er: Saulu wua udubu udubu; Davidi yô, wua udubu pue pue." 
1Samuel18:8 Nahan ishima vihi Saulu je huan iyol; kwaghôron la lu sha ishima na ga; a kaa er: Ve na Davidi udubu pue pue, kpa mo yô, ve nam udubu udubu tseegh; ka nyi shi i shi unu, ka tor tsô gaa?" 
1Samuel18:9 Hii sha iyange la zan zan Saulu gba gohon Davidi ishe i bo. 
1Samuel18:10 Tsô kper nan yô, jijingi u bo u a va hen Aôndo, va gba sha Saulu taver je, a gba hunden ken ya na; kpa Davidi gba kuhwan sha uwegh nagh er a eren ayange ayange nahan; Saulu lu a iwange na sha uwe." 
1Samuel18:11 Nahan Saulu ker iwange la; a kaa er: Me tume Davidi je i̱ kar i̱ kôr ken kpekpe; kpa Davidi palegh kar kera kuma kwa har je. 
1Samuel18:12 Nahan Saulu lu cian Davidi sha ci u TER lu a na, kpa A gema A undu Saulu." 
1Samuel18:13 Ka nahan man Saulu kar a na sha ishigh nagh kera, gema ver un orhemen na u sha ior dubu ye; nahan a duen a nyôron sha ishigh ki iorough." 
1Samuel18:14 Davidi yô, eren akaa a na cii luun sha mi vough; TER kpa lu a na." 
1Samuel18:15 Er Saulu kav er aeren a na a luun sha mi vough yum nahan yô, a cia un." 
1Samuel18:16 Kpa Iserael kua Yuda cii, Davidi doo ve ishima; gadia lu duen nyôron sha ishiv vev." 
1Samuel18:17 Tsô Saulu kaa a Davidi er: Nenge, Merabi wan wam u kwase u iunda ne, me na u un a̱ hingir kwase wou, kpa lum wanye u taver ishima, nôngo ityav mbi TER. Gadia Saulu kaa er: Uwegh agh ku̱ de kera luun ihom a na ga, i̱ lu uwegh ku Mbafiliti ku̱ lu ihom a na ye." 
1Samuel18:18 Kpa Davidi kaa a Saulu er: Mo m ngu nyi, man anmgbianev av, tsombor u terem ngu di nyi ken Iserael je, u me hingir wankem u toro?" 
1Samuel18:19 Kpa er kuma u á na Davidi Merabi wan u Saulu la yô, i tôô un i na Aderiel or u Mehola er." 
1Samuel18:20 Kpa Davidi doo Mikal wan u Saulu la ishima; i ôr Saulu nahan, tsô kwagh la doo un." 
1Samuel18:21 Saulu kaa er: Me na un un, a̱ hingir kwagh u hônon un a min, uwegh ku Mbafiliti ku̱ lu ihom a na. Ka nahan man Saulu kaa a Davidi er: Nyian ka kwa har je, u lu wan wam kem ne." 
1Samuel18:22 Tsô Saulu kaa mbayev nav er: Ôr nen kwagh a Davidi myer, kaa nen ner: Nenge u doo tor ishima kpee, mbayev nav cii kpaa u doo ve ishima; nahan yô, lu wankem u tor." 
1Samuel18:23 Tsô mbayev mba tor ôr Davidi akaa la. Kpa Davidi kaa er: U lun wankem u tor ka ne kwagh u kiriki? Gadia mo m ngu icanor, m gba kwagh ga." 
1Samuel18:24 Tsô mbayev mba Saulu za kaa un er: Ka imbakwaghôron i Davidi a er ne. 
1Samuel18:25 Saulu shi kaa er: Kaa nen Davidi nahan ner: Inyaregh sar tor ga, saa uipusu mba Mbafiliti deri, sha u oron iyev sha mbaihomov mba tor. Kpa awashima u Saulu yô, lu u nan Davidi er a̱ za kpe sha ikev i Mbafiliti." 
1Samuel18:26 Er mbayev nav ôr Davidi akaa ne nahan yô, doo Davidi u hingir wankem u tor. Er ayange kpaa lu a kuma ga je tsô," 
1Samuel18:27 Davidi mough a ior nav za, za wua Mbafiliti ior deri uhar; Davidi va a uipusu vev va na tor nahan vough, er una hingir wankem u tor. Nahan Saulu na un Mikal wan na u kwase a er." 
1Samuel18:28 Saulu kpaa nenge, kav er TER A lu a Davidi yô, man Mikal wan u Saulu kpaa, Davidi doo un ishima;" 
1Samuel18:29 nahan Saulu shi seer cian Davidi; Saulu lu ihom a Davidi gbem. 
1Samuel18:30 Tsô atiator a Mbafiliti due; nahan hanma shighe u vea due yô, kwagh a hemba laghen Davidi a mbayev mba Saulu cii, je iti na za gwa kpishi." 
1Samuel19:1 Tsô Saulu wa wan na Yonatan kwagh kua mbayev nav cii er ve̱ wua Davidi. Kpa Yonatan wan u Saulu yô, Davidi doo un ishima tsung." 
1Samuel19:2 Nahan Yonatan kaa a Davidi er: Terem Saulu ngu keren we a ku; nahan yô, kper pepe, ver ishima sha iyol you, tema ken ijiir i myer, yer her;" 
1Samuel19:3 yô, mo me due me za tile a terem ken akôngo henpe u lu la, me ôr kwagh a terem sha kwagh wou; aluer mea nenge a ma kwagh yô, me kaa u." 
1Samuel19:4 Tsô Yonatan ôr ter na Saulu akaadedoo a Davidi; a kaa a na er: Tor a̱ de kera eren wanye na Davidi kwaghbo ga, gadia a er u kwaghbo ga, aeren a na a we kpaa ka a perapera kpishi je;" 
1Samuel19:5 gadia a wa uma na iko ga, a hemba Orfiliti la, nahan TER na Iserael cii mhembe tseer tseer, we kpaa u nenge, u ember je; man ka nyi ú tôô ike i awambe a or u ishôôgh, ú wua Davidi a ityôikaa ga?" 
1Samuel19:6 Nahan Saulu ver ato sha imo i Yonatan; Saulu bum kaa er: Er TER A lu u uma ne, á wua un je ga." 
1Samuel19:7 Tsô Yonatan yila Davidi; Yonatan gema pase un akaa la cii. Tsô Yonatan va a Davidi hen Saulu, va lu a na er tsuaa nahan." 
1Samuel19:8 Tsô ityav shi mough; Davidi due za nôngo ityav a Mbafiliti, wua ve je falegh gba, ve yevese un." 
1Samuel19:9 Shi jijingi u bo u a va hen TER gba sha Saulu er a tema ken ya na a iwange na sha uwe yô, man Davidi lu kuhwan kwagh sha uwegh nagh." 
1Samuel19:10 Saulu shi nôngo er una tume Davidi iwange i̱ kar i̱ kôr ken kpekpe; kpa a palegh, a kar Saulu sha ishi kera; iwange kar tume ken kpekpe; Davidi yevese, war tugh mbula." 
1Samuel19:11 Nahan Saulu tindi mbatyomov hen iyou i Davidi er ve̱ za kase un, kper ve̱ wua un pepe; kpa Mikal kwase u Davidi kaa a na er: Aluer ú yima uma wou hen tugh mbun ga yô, kper á wua u." 
1Samuel19:12 Tsô Mikal due a Davidi hen ianiyoughough; a yevese, a yem, a war." 
1Samuel19:13 Nahan Mikal tôô eev gbir sha gambe, ver mbu ikondo i sha aive a ivo vegher u sha ityou, cir akondo sha mi." 
1Samuel19:14 Er Saulu tindi mbatyomov sha u ve̱ va kôr Davidi, yô, a kaa er: Ngu dedoo ga." 
1Samuel19:15 Shi Saulu tindi mbatyomov er ve̱ za nenge Davidi, a kaa er: Tôô un sha gambe na, va nen a na hen mo, m wua un." 
1Samuel19:16 Er mbatyomov va nyôr yô, lu eev lu sha gambe ye, man ikondo i sha aive a ivo la lu mbu vegher u sha ityou." 
1Samuel19:17 Nahan Saulu kaa a Mikal er: Ka nyi u tsughum nahana, u de orihom wam wer a̱ yem a̱ wara? Mikal gema kaa a Saulu er: A kaa a mo er: Dem m yem m wua u zee?" 
1Samuel19:18 Kpa Davidi yevese, war, va hen Samuel hen Rama, va ôr un akaa a Saulu a er a na cii. Nahan un vea Samuel ve yem ve za tema ken Nayoti." 
1Samuel19:19 Tsô i va ôr Saulu er: Nenge, Davidi ngu ken Nayoti u Rama." 
1Samuel19:20 Nahan Saulu tindi mbatyomov er ve̱ za kôr Davidi, kpa zum u ve nenge ikpila i uprofeti lu ôron kwaghôron u profeti man Samuel lu hemen ve yô, Jijingi u Aôndo gba sha mbatyomov mba Saulu mbala, ve kpaa ve gba ôron kwaghôron u profeti." 
1Samuel19:21 Er i va ôr Saulu nahan yô, a shi a tindi mbatyomov mbagenev, mbala kpaa shi gba ôron kwaghôron u profeti. Saulu shi tindi mbatyomov kuma acin atar, mbala kpaa shi ôr kwaghôron u profeti." 
1Samuel19:22 Tsô un kpaa za ken Rama, za ar hen kpe u zegejôr u lu hen Seku la, a pine er: Samuel man Davidi mba hana? Orgen kaa er: Mba ken Nayoti u Rama." 
1Samuel19:23 Tsô a kar a gba zan hen Nayoti u Rama; un kpaa Jijingi u Aôndo gba sha a na, lu ôron kwaghôron u profeti yemen, zan zan za ar hen Nayoti u Rama." 
1Samuel19:24 A er ikav nav kera, a gba ôron kwaghôron u profeti sha ishigh ki Samuel, a yav idyelegh, shi didi, tugh mbula cii lu her nahan. Ka nahan man i kaa er: Saulu kpaa, nyôr nongo a uprofeti?" 
1Samuel20:1 Tsô Davidi yevese due ken Nayoti u Rama, va va pine Yonatan, er: M er nyi, kwaghbo wam ka nyi? Kwaghbo u m er sha ishigh ki teru man a keren mo a ku la yô, ka nyi?" 
1Samuel20:2 A kaa a na er: Mayange je ga, ú kpe ga; terem gbe eren ma kwagh ga, shin u vesen shin u kiriki kpaa, saa ka a vande kaan mo, man ka nyi je terem una yerem kwagh nee? Ka nahan ga." 
1Samuel20:3 Kpa Davidi bum, kaa er: Teru fa dedoo je er i doo u a mo yô; ngu kaan je er, Yonatan a̱ de fe kwagh ne ga, sha er ishima ia vihi un ga yô; kpa mimi je, er TER A lu u uma, man we kpaa u lu uma ne, mo a ku yô, kuma iavennguhar i môm tsô." 
1Samuel20:4 Tsô Yonatan kaa a Davidi er: Hanma kwagh u a sar u ken ishima yô, me er u un." 
1Samuel20:5 Tsô Davidi gema kaa a Yonatan er: Nenge, kper uwer u he ua due, man ka u me tema kwaghyan a tor kpee je; kpa dem, m̱ za, m̱ za yer ken toho zan zan iyange i sha utar, aikighe." 
1Samuel20:6 Aluer teru una fa er m lu her ga yô, kaa wer: Davidi zamber a mo tsung je er, m̱ rumun, una za ken gar na Betelehem fefa; gadia ka shighen u nan nagh ku sha anyom anyom her, sha ci u ior mba hen ya la cii." 
1Samuel20:7 Tsô aluer una kaa er: Ka sha mi! Yô wanye wou zua a mkpeyol je ve; kpa aluer ishima ia vihi un yô, fa, a wa kwaghbo ishima je ve." 
1Samuel20:8 Yô, gema er a wanye wou dedoo; gadia u vande yan ikur a wanye wou ken TER; kpa aluer ifer ia lu ken mo yô, wuam iyol you; gadia ka nyi je ú shi ú za a mo hen teru kpee?" 
1Samuel20:9 Nahan Yonatan kaa er: De henen nahan ga; gadia aluer mea fe mimi, mer, terem wa kwaghbo ishima a we yô, ma m kaa u gaa?" 
1Samuel20:10 Tsô Davidi pine Yonatan er: Aluer teru una ôr kwagh a we sha ishima i vihin yô, ka an nana kaama?" 
1Samuel20:11 Tsô Yonatan kaa a Davidi er: Va, sé za ken toho; tsô ve uhar cii ve due ve za ken toho." 
1Samuel20:12 Tsô Yonatan kaa a Davidi er: TER, Aôndo u Iserael, A̱ lu shiada; shighen u me time kwagh hen terem kper shighe ne nahan, shin sha iyange i atar la, man m nenge a kwagh u tseren Davidi ga yô, me kera tindi á za pase u gaa?" 
1Samuel20:13 TER A̱ er a Yonatan nahan, shi i̱ hemba nahan kpaa, aluer terem una wa ishima u eren we kwaghbo man mo kpaa m pase u ga, man m na u gbenda kpaa sha er ú za doo doo ga yô; TER A̱ lu a we er A vande lun a terem nahan." 
1Samuel20:14 We kpaa, er m lu uma ne, er a mo sha erdoo u TER, sha er m̱ de kpeen ga yô;" 
1Samuel20:15 shi de undun erdoo wou a ya wam mayange ga, shin shighe u TER Una tim mbaihomov mba Davidi sha won kera ci ca la kpaa ga." 
1Samuel20:16 Tsô Yonatan ya ikur a ya u Davidi, a kaa er: TER Una or iyev sha mbaihomov mba Davidi." 
1Samuel20:17 Yonatan shi er Davidi seer bumun sha dooshima u a doo un ishima la, gadia a doo un ishima er iyol na nahan." 
1Samuel20:18 Tsô Yonatan kaa a na er: Kper uwer u he ua due; yô, nahan á fa er u lu her ga yô, gadia ijiir you i teman ia lu gbilin." 
1Samuel20:19 Sha iyange i sha utar la yô, sen fefa, va hen ijiir i lu u yer, zum u i lu eren kwagh ne ave la; tema hen iwen i Esel." 
1Samuel20:20 Yô, mo me ker avaan atar hen kpe u i, er m ngu keren ma kwagh yô." 
1Samuel20:21 Nenge, me tindi wanye mer: Za, za ker avaan. Man aluer mea kaa a wanye mer: Nenge, avaan nga u vegher u keen, tsuwa a, yô, nahan gba van tsô, gadia ka bem, kwaghvihin ngu ga, er TER A lu u uma ne." 
1Samuel20:22 Kpa aluer mea kaa a wanye mer: Nenge, avaan nga u ken hemen keela yô, nahan gba yemen a you tsô, gadia TER na u gbenda je ve." 
1Samuel20:23 Sha kwagh u mo vea we, se vande ôron la, nenge, TER ngu hen atô wam vea we gbem sha won." 
1Samuel20:24 Tsô Davidi yer ken toho. Er uwer u he due yô, tor za tema kwaghyan." 
1Samuel20:25 Tor tema sha ijiir na i a tem keke la, ka ijiir i teman i i lu hen kpekpe la; tsô Yonatan mough tile sha; Abiner gema tema dondo a Saulu; kpa ijiir i Davidi i teman yô, lu gbilin." 
1Samuel20:26 Nahan kpaa Saulu ôr ma kwagh sha iyange la ga; gadia lu henen er alaghga ma kwagh er un, ngu wang ga; ngu wang ga mimi je." 
1Samuel20:27 Tsô kper nan gen u wer u he la, lu ayange ahar la, ijiir i Davidi i teman lu gbilin her tsô. Nahan Saulu pine wan na Yonatan er: I er nan man wan u Yese ne a ve hen kwaghyan ga, nyen kpaa kua nyian kpaa nahana?" 
1Samuel20:28 Yonatan gema kaa a Saulu er: Davidi zamber a mo tsung er una za ken Betelehem; 
1Samuel20:29 a kaa er: De m̱ shi za, gadia ityô yase ngi a nagh ku nan ken gar; man anngôm iyol na lôhôm er m̱ za; nahan aluer kwagh wam una doo u mimi yô, de m̱ za, m̱ za nenge anngôôv av. Ka nahan man a ve hen tebul u tor ga ye." 
1Samuel20:30 Tsô ishima gba vihin Saulu a Yonatan tsung, a kaa a na er: We dang wan u hemban ato ne, m vande fan er u tsough wan u Yese sha u ú za due sha kunya wou iyol you kua kunya u idyelegh u ngôu kpaa ga?" 
1Samuel20:31 Gadia ayange a wan u Yese a lu uma sha won ne, ú lu taveraa ga, we shin tartor wou kpaa ga. Yô, tindi ase ahegen i̱ va a na her a mô, gadia una kpe kpee." 
1Samuel20:32 Tsô Yonatan gema kaa a ter na Saulu er: Inja na nan man á wua unu? A er nyi? 
1Samuel20:33 Tsô Saulu ker un iwange er una tume un; nahan Yonatan maa fa er ter na a we ishima u wuan Davidi yô. 
1Samuel20:34 Tsô Yonatan mough hen tebul kera a ishima i vihin tsung, ya ma kwagh sha ayange a uweregh ahar la ga, gadia ishima vihi un sha ci u Davidi, sha er ter na a hee un yô." 
1Samuel20:35 Tsô, sev mbu av yô, Yonatan za ken toho sha shighe u a ver vea Davidi la, un vea wanye." 
1Samuel20:36 A kaa a wanye na er: Gber ayem, za tsuwa avaan a me ker yô. Wanye la gbe zan ayem yô, a ker ivaan aver un." 
1Samuel20:37 Er wanye la za ar hen ijiir i Yonatan ker ivaan za gba la yô, Yonatan yila wanye la pine er: Ivaan la ngi u sha hemen gaa?" 
1Samuel20:38 Yonatan shi yila wanye la kaa a na er: Kar fefa, za ayem, de kera til ga. Tsô wanye u Yonatan tsuwa avaan la hide hen orvesen na." 
1Samuel20:39 Kpa wanye la kav ma kwagh môm sha mi ga, saa Yonatan vea Davidi tseegh ve fa kwagh la ye." 
1Samuel20:40 Tsô Yonatan na wanye na ikav nav mbi tswamev kaa a na er: Yem a mbi ken gar. 
1Samuel20:41 Wanye la yemen kera yô, Davidi mough hen ijiir i hen vegher u imbusutariyan la, a va, a va gure a kuma icul inya, a ngurum kwa tar; ve suse zwa ayol a ve, ve gba vaan ayol a ve, kpa Davidi hemba vaan." 
1Samuel20:42 Yonatan kaa a Davidi er: Za doo doo gadia se bum ayol a ase sha iti i TER ser: TER A̱ tema hen atô wase, mo vea we, man hen atô u tsombor wam a tsombor wou gbem sha won. Tsô a mough, a gba yemen, Yonatan gema hide ken gar." 
1Samuel21:1 Tsô Davidi va hen Nobu hen pristi Ahimeleki; un Ahimeleki va kegh Davidi gbenda gba gbidyen ikarikase iyol, a kaa a na er: Ka nyi u lu tswen, ma or nan lu a we ga nahan?" 
1Samuel21:2 Tsô Davidi kaa a pristi Ahimeleki, er: Tor tindim ityom, a kaa a mo er: Or môm nana̱ de fe kwagh sha kwagh u m tindi u sha mi ne ga, man sha kwagh u m kaa u ne kpaa ga; nahan m ver mbayev mape." 
1Samuel21:3 Man ka nyi u lu a mi heenee? Nam ase ikpenbredi itian sha uwegh agh, shin nyityô kwagh i i lu heen kpaa." 
1Samuel21:4 Tsô pristi gema kaa a Davidi er: Ma bredi ugen m ngu a mi ga, kpa icighanbredi ngu; aluer mbayev vande kuran ayol a ve sha ukase yô, ka sha mi." 
1Samuel21:5 Tsô Davidi gema kaa a pristi la er: Mimi je, se palegh ayol a ase sha ukase ayange atar ne; zum u ka m due yô, ikav mbi mbayev kpaa mbi lu wang, shin er zende u lu icighanzende ga kpaa, nahan man hide nyian ne man ikav vev mbia kera lu wang ga yee?" 
1Samuel21:6 Tsô pristi na un icighanbredi; gadia ma bredi ugen lu her ga saa ubredi mba sha ishi mba i tee ve sha ishigh ki TER kera sha ci u á ver mba acivin sha iyange i i tee ve kera la. 
1Samuel21:7 Yô, wanye u Saulu ugen lu her sha iyange la, i timbir un sha ishigh ki TER, iti na er Doegi or u Edom; lu orhemen u mbakuranilev mba Saulu." 
1Samuel21:8 Tsô Davidi pine Ahimeleki er: U ngu a ma iwange shin sanker gaa? Gadia m va a sanker wam shin ma ikav yav mbi tswamev ga, sha ci u ityom i tor i lu fefa yum yô." 
1Samuel21:9 Tsô pristi kaa er: Sanker u Goliati Orfiliti u iyange u wua shin pev u Ela la ngu heen, i kange un ken ikondo, ngu ken ijime i efodi; aluer a sar u pe tôôn un yô, tôô tsô, gadia ugen ngu heen ga saa un. Nahan Davidi kaa er: Mô gen u kuman sha a na ngu ga, nam un." 
1Samuel21:10 Davidi maa mough yevese Saulu sha iyange la je, yem hen Akishi tor u Gati." 
1Samuel21:11 Tsô mbayev mba Akishi kaa un er: Or ne kera ka Davidi tor u hen tar ne, ne gaa? Ka un iyange ve ter un icam i amaregh er: Saulu wua udubu udubu; Davidi yô, wua udubu pue pue, gaa?" 
1Samuel21:12 Tsô Davidi gba henen akaaôron la ken ishima, gba cian Akishi tor u Gati tsung." 
1Samuel21:13 Nahan a gema inja na sha ishigh vegh, a gba eren er orihundu nahan sha ikev ve, a gba kperan akaa sha ucivir mba sha hundagar, a gba haan azer sha indyer na." 
1Samuel21:14 Tsô Akishi kaa a mbayev nav er: Ne nenge or ne ka orihundu je, man ka nyi ne ve a na her a Mo?" 
1Samuel21:15 Mbaihunduv banem shin ne ve a or ne ner, a̱ va hunde sha ishigh yagha? Ngun di nahan kpaa a nyôr hen ya wama?" 
1Samuel22:1 Tsô Davidi mough haala, yevese va hen bar u Adulam; er anngôôv nav kua ya u ter na cii ve ungwa yô, ve va her a na." 
1Samuel22:2 Man hanma or u ican i tser nan, man u nan ye anzô, man hanmô u ishima i vihi nan kpaa, ve va kohol un, maa a hingir orhemen ve; ior er deri unyiin nahan lu a na." 
1Samuel22:3 Tsô Davidi mough haala yem hen Misepa u Moabi; a za kaa a tor u Moabi er: Shi rumun terem kua ngôm ve̱ tema a ven zan zan me kar fan kwagh u Aôndo Una er a mo ve. 
1Samuel22:4 Tsô a va a ve sha ishigh ki tor u Moabi; nahan ve tema a na ayange a Davidi lu ken baruwoogh la cii. 
1Samuel22:5 Profeti Gadi kaa a Davidi er: De tem ken bar ne ga; mough yem ken tar u Yuda. Nahan Davidi maa mough a va ken ikô i Hereti. 
1Samuel22:6 Tsô Saulu ungwa er i za zua a Davidi kua ior mba ve lu a na imôngo cii; her ayange la yô, Saulu tema ken Gibea shin itine i tsamia, sha igungu, lu a iwange na sha uwe, mbayev nav cii tile kase un." 
1Samuel22:7 Tsô Saulu kaa a mbayev nav mba ve kase un la er: Ungwa nen ase, ne Mbabenyamin; wan u Yese ne, una na hanmô wen ishule man ikon i wain, una ver ne cii né hingir mbahemenev mba hemen ior dubu dubu man mbahemenev mba hemen ior deri deri," 
1Samuel22:8 man ne cii ne zua zwa sha a mo, or môm kpaa pasem shighe u wan wam á zough zwa a wan u Yese ga, mô wen kpaa m kôr nan mhôônom ga, or môm kpaa pasem er wan wam a tor wanye wam ityô er a̱ lu ihom a mo, a̱ yer a keghen mo, er i lu nyian ne gaa?" 
1Samuel22:9 Tsô Doegi, Oredom, u a tile a dondo a mbayev mba Saulu la, gema kaa er: M nenge a wan u Yese lu van ken Nobu hen Ahimeleki wan u Ahitubi." 
1Samuel22:10 A sôn TER sha ci na, shi a na un kwaghyan u gbenda man a na un sanker u Goliati Orfiliti la." 
1Samuel22:11 Tsô tor tindi er i̱ za yila pristi Ahimeleki, wan u Ahitubi kua ya u ter na cii, ka upristi mba ve lu ken Nobu je la; nahan ve cii ve va hen tor." 
1Samuel22:12 Tsô Saulu kaa er: Ungwa ase, we wan u Ahitubi. A kaa er: M ngun, terem." 
1Samuel22:13 Saulu pine un er: Inja na nan man ne zough zwa sha a mo, we man wan u Yese, sha er u ne un bredi kua sanker, shi u sen Aôndo sha ci na, sha u a̱ hendan a mo, a̱ yer a keghen mo, er i lu nyian nahana?" 
1Samuel22:14 Tsô Ahimeleki gema kaa a tor er: Ka hanma wanye wou je nan kom u veren ishima sha a nan er Davidi nahana, u a lu wankem u tor, man orhemen u mbakurantor, u a lu a icivir hen ya wou kpaa?" 
1Samuel22:15 Ka nyian m hii u sônon Aôndo sha ci na yee? Mayange ka nahan ga; tor a̱ de kera ne wanye na ma ibo ga, shin ya u terem cii kpaa ga; gadia akaa ne cii wanye wou fa ma kwagh sha mi ga, kpeghee tsô kpaa ga." 
1Samuel22:16 Nahan kpaa tor kaa er: Ú kpe kpee Ahimeleki, we kua ya u teru cii." 
1Samuel22:17 Tsô tor gema kaa a mbatyomov mba ve tile a na la er: Gema wua nen upristi mba TER mban, gadia uwegh vegh ku a Davidi imôngo, man sha er ve fe er a yevese, kpa ve pasem ga yô. Kpa mbayev mba tor venda u zan ave, tan num sha upristi mba TER." 
1Samuel22:18 Nahan tor gema kaa a Doegi er: Yô, we ta num sha upristi. Tsô Doegi Oredom gema ta num sha upristi; sha iyange la a wua ior akunduanyiin kar utaan mba ve haa efodi u i kor sha ikondo i pupuu yô." 
1Samuel22:19 Shi a za tim Nobu, gar u upristi la, sha zwa u sanker, nomso kua kasev, mbayev kua mbamanatumba, man ibua man ujaki kua iyôngo cii, sha zwa u sanker." 
1Samuel22:20 Kpa wan u Ahimeleki, wan u Ahitubi, ugen u i yila er Abiatar la, war, yevese yem hen Davidi." 
1Samuel22:21 Tsô Abiatar ôr Davidi er Saulu a woo upristi mba TER yô. 
1Samuel22:22 Davidi gema kaa a Abiatar er: Iyange Doegi, Oredom, lu heregh la, m fa je mer, una ôr Saulu kpee je; m ngu a ibo sha ku u ior hen ya u teru cii." 
1Samuel22:23 Lu a mo, de cie ga; gadia u a keren mo a ku la, we kpaa ngu keren we a ku; kpa her a mo yô, ú lu doo doo." 
1Samuel23:1 Tsô i kaa a Davidi er: Nenge, Mbafiliti mba nôngon ityav a Keila, mba va kuran ve akaa sha avande a gbiren alakema." 
1Samuel23:2 Nahan Davidi pine imo i TER, a kaa er: M̱ za, m̱ za wua Mbafiliti mban shinii? TER kaa a Davidi er: Za, za hemba Mbafiliti, yima Keila." 
1Samuel23:3 Kpa ior mba Davidi kaa a na er: Nenge, ken Mbayuda heen kpaa, se mba a mciem iyol man hire aluer se za hen Keila, se za nôngo num a Mbafiliti." 
1Samuel23:4 Tsô Davidi shi pine imo i TER. TER kaa un er: Mough, sen shin Keila, gadia Me na Mbafiliti sha ikev you." 
1Samuel23:5 Nahan Davidi kua ior nav ve za hen Keila, ve za nôngo ityav a Mbafiliti, ve za kula ve ilev, ve wua ve kpishi. Kape Davidi yima mba ve lu ken Keila la." 
1Samuel23:6 Tsô shighe u Abiatar, wan u Ahimeleki, yevese va hen Davidi ken Keila la, a lu a efodi." 
1Samuel23:7 Tsô i va ôr Saulu er, Davidi va hen Keila. Nahan Saulu kaa er: Aôndo na un sha ikev yam kera ve; gadia a wuhe iyol na je, er a nyer ken gar u lun a ihinda i iyôô kua uishindan mba iyôôv yô." 
1Samuel23:8 Tsô Saulu yila ior cii er ve̱ va ityav, vea za hen Keila sha u vea za kase Davidi a ior nav yô." 
1Samuel23:9 Kpa Davidi fa er Saulu a we kwaghbo ishima a na yô, nahan a kaa a pristi Abiatar er: Va a efodi heen." 
1Samuel23:10 Nahan Davidi kaa er: TER, Aôndo u Iserael, wanakiriki wou ungwa mimi je, er Saulu ngu nôngon u van hen Keila sha u va timin gar ne sha ci wam." 
1Samuel23:11 Shin ior mba Keila vea nam sha ikev naou? Shin Saulu una sen er wanye wou a ongo nahanou? TERE, Aôndo u Iserael, shi kaa wanakiriki wou. Tsô TER kaa er: Una sen." 
1Samuel23:12 Nahan Davidi pine er: Ior mba Keila vea nam sha ikev i Saulu a ior ava? TER kaa er: Vea na u. 
1Samuel23:13 Tsô Davidi a ior nav, ve lu er deri ataratar nahan, ve mough ve due ken Keila, ve gba zenden wue wue pe ve kercio u zan cii. Tsô i ôr Saulu er Davidi due ken Keila war; nahan a kera za ga." 
1Samuel23:14 Tsô Davidi tema a ne nagh ken toho man ken ajiir a yeren a sha iwo, kua sha tar u iwoogh ken desereti u Shiv. Saulu gba keren un ayange ayange; kpa Aôndo na un sha ikev na ga." 
1Samuel23:15 Davidi kav er Saulu a dugh sha u keren un a ku yô, Davidi gema lu ken desereti u Shiv ken Horeshi." 
1Samuel23:16 Tsô Yonatan wan u Saulu, mough za hen Davidi hen Horeshi, za taver un ishima ken Aôndo." 
1Samuel23:17 A kaa a na er: De cie ga, gadia uwegh ku terem Saulu kua zua a we ga; ú tema tor sha Iserael, mo me gema me dondo sha a we, terem Saulu kpaa fa nahan." 
1Samuel23:18 Nahan ve uhar ve ya ikur sha ishigh ki TER; tsô Davidi tema shin Horeshi, kpa Yonatan gema hide hen ya na." 
1Samuel23:19 Tsô Mbashiv va hen Saulu hen Gibea, ve va kaa er: Kera ka her a vese, Davidi a yer ken ajiir a yeren a ken Horeshi, sha igungu u Hakila, u a lu ikôngough vegher u ken imbusutariyan la gaa?" 
1Samuel23:20 Nahan tor, ishima a lu u, u senen yô, sen; se yô, sé na un sha ikev i tor." 
1Samuel23:21 Tsô Saulu kaa er: Iveren i TER i̱ lu sha a ven, gadia mhôônom kôr ne a mo." 
1Samuel23:22 Yô, shi za nen, shi za seer fan nen doo doo, fa nen, nenge nen ijiir na i yeren, man or u nan nenge a na her la kpaa; gadia i kaam er a wa ayom mimi." 
1Samuel23:23 Ver nen ishima fa nen ahoghol a a yeren cii, man shi hide nen her a mo kpee je, man me za a ven imôngo ye; tsô aluer una lu ken tar la yô, me tôv un angahar ken udubu dubu mba Mbayuda cii." 
1Samuel23:24 Nahan ve mough ve vande yemen a Saulu u zan hen Shiv; kpa Davidi a ior nav ve lu ken desereti u Maon, hen Araba, ikôngough vegher u ken imbusutariyan la." 
1Samuel23:25 Saulu a ior nav ve za u za keren un. I ôr Davidi; nahan a sen a va shin vande, a va tema ken desereti u Maon. Er Saulu ungwa nahan yô, a gba tôvon Davidi ijime ken desereti u Maon." 
1Samuel23:26 Tsô Saulu kar vegher uwo u keen, Davidi a ior nav gema lu vegherwo u keela; Davidi mough hen ijiir la fefa, lu cian Saulu; gadia Saulu a ior nav ve kase Davidi a ior nav sha u vea kôr ve yô." 
1Samuel23:27 Kpa ortyom ugen va hen Saulu, va kaa a na er: Va fefa, gadia Mbafiliti va haa ityav ken tar la." 
1Samuel23:28 Nahan Saulu de u zendan Davidi ijime, hide yem u za nôngon ityav a Mbafiliti. Ka nahan man i ii ijiir la iti er, Vande u Mwar ye." 
1Samuel23:29 Tsô Davidi maa mough heera, za tema ken ajiir a yeren a En-gedi." 
1Samuel24:1 Saulu zende Mbafiliti ityô hir yô, i kaa un er: Nenge, Davidi ngu ken desereti u En-gedi." 
1Samuel24:2 Tsô Saulu kua a ior dubu utar, uicuwanmbaiorov mba i sange ve a sange ken Iserael cii, gba za keren Davidi a ior nav sha Avande a Ashim." 
1Samuel24:3 Nahan a va ar hen atôraiyôngo sha gbenda henpe bar lu yô; tsô Saulu nyôr kimi sha u una za wanger iyol. Yô, Davidi a ior gema lu ken ape bar kure la." 
1Samuel24:4 Tsô ior mba Davidi kaa a na er: Nenge, ka iyange shon i TER lu kaa a we er: Me na orihom wou sha ikev you, er a na sha ishima you, je ne. Tsô Davidi mough nyighaa tôndo tsumbuikondo u Saulu." 
1Samuel24:5 Tsô, ken masetyô yô, ishima na Davidi ibo sha ci u a tende Saulu tsumbuikondo yô." 
1Samuel24:6 Nahan a kaa a ior nav er: TER A̱ yangem er me er terem kwagh ne ga yô, ka or u TER, u i shigh un mkurem yô, me bende uwegh agh sha a na ga; gadia un ka or u TER, u i shigh un mkurem je yô." 
1Samuel24:7 Ka sha akaaôron ne man Davidi yange ior nav ye, a rumun er ve̱ ta num sha Saulu ga. Tsô Saulu mough due ken bar la kôr gbenda ave." 
1Samuel24:8 Ken masetyô la Davidi kpaa due ken bar la, gba yilan Saulu, a kaa er: Tor, terem! Saulu gem ashe yô, Davidi gure wa ityough inya je, a gure a ta inya." 
1Samuel24:9 Shi Davidi gema kaa a Saulu er: Ka nyi u ongo alam a ior mba ve kaan a we er: Ka Davidi ka eren we kwaghbo? 
1Samuel24:10 Nenge, nyian yô, u nenge sha ashe ou je er TER A ne u sha ikev yam nyian ken bar ne yô; mbagenev je yô, ve kaa a mo er, m̱ wua u; kpa m de u; m kaa mer, me bende uwegh agh sha terem ga, gadia un ka or u TER, u i shigh un mkurem je." 
1Samuel24:11 Nenge ase, terem, een, nenge tsumbuikondo wou sha uwegh agh; gadia er m tende u tsumbuikondo je, kpa m wua u ga, yô fa, man shi kav kpaa er ma ifer shin ibo i lu her a mo ga yô, m er u kwaghbo ga, shin er u tev uma wam a ku nahan kpaa." 
1Samuel24:12 Yô, TER A̱ kure kwagh wam vea we ne, man shi TER A̱ or u iyev sha ci wam; kpa uwegh agh yô, kua bende sha a we ga." 
1Samuel24:13 Bee injakwagh i ior mba ngise kaa er: Ka hen mbaaferev ifer i dugh ye. Kpa uwegh agh yô, kua bende sha a we ga." 
1Samuel24:14 Ka sha u tôvon anti ityô, tor u Iserael a dughu? Man ka anti u ye nan akishi angahara? Ka iwa i kpene! Ka palegh mômô!" 
1Samuel24:15 Yô, TER A̱ lu orjir, A̱ kure kwagh wam vea we ne; A̱ nenge, A̱ ôr kwagh wam, A̱ yimam sha ikev you." 
1Samuel24:16 Tsô er Davidi kure u ôron Saulu akaa ne yô, Saulu gema kaa er: Ka imo you la, wan wam Davidi? Nahan Saulu gba vaan genger genger." 
1Samuel24:17 A kaa a Davidi er: U hembam perapera, gadia u er a mo doo doo, kpa mo yô, m er a we dang." 
1Samuel24:18 Nyian yô, u pase gbar gbar je, er u er a mo dedoo yô; er TER A nem sha ikev you nahan kpaa, u wuam ga." 
1Samuel24:19 Gadia aluer or á tser orihom u nan, nahan nana de un er a̱ yem dedoo kpa? Yô, TER A̱ ver u doo doo sha kwagh u u er a mo nyian ne." 
1Samuel24:20 Hegen yô, nenge, m fa mimi je, ú ya tor, tartor u Iserael kpaa ua taver sha uwegh ough." 
1Samuel24:21 Yô, bum ase a mo hegen sha iti i TER wer, ú tim tsombor wam ken ijime yam kera ga, shi ú ese iti yam ken ya u terem kera ga." 
1Samuel24:22 Tsô Davidi bum a Saulu. Nahan Saulu yem hen ya; kpa Davidi a ior nav yô ve mough ve yem ken ijiir i yeren sha uwo. 
1Samuel25:1 Tsô Samuel kpe; nahan Iserael kohol cii, ve vaa ku na, ve ii un hen ya na ken Rama. Tsô Davidi mough sen shin desereti u Paran." 
1Samuel25:2 Yô orgen lu ken Maon, kpa akaa a na yô, lu ken Karmel, or la lu ornyar kpe kpe, lu a iyôngo dubu utar, ivo dubu môm, lu tôndon iyôngo na aive ken Karmel." 
1Samuel25:3 Iti i or la er Nabal, iti i kwase na er Abigail; un yô, lu kwase u fan kwagh mimi, doo ashe kpaa; kpa or la yô, lu nomor, wa tswam kpishi, aeren a na doo ga, a lu Orkalebu." 
1Samuel25:4 Tsô Davidi ungwa agwa ken desereti er, Nabal ngu tôndon iyôngo na aive." 
1Samuel25:5 Nahan Davidi tindi mbayev pue; Davidi kaa mbayev er: Za nen hen Karmel, nyôr nen hen Nabal, sugh nen un nam;" 
1Samuel25:6 shi kaa nen un ner: Se sugh u! Bem a̱ lu sha a we, bem a̱ lu sha ya wou man shi bem a̱ lu sha akaa a u lu a mi cii." 
1Samuel25:7 Ka hegen m ongo er u lu a mbatôndon aive ye; mbakuranilev ou tsa her a vese, kpa se nzughul a ve ga, ma kwagh saa ve ga, sha ayange a ve lu ken Karmel cii." 
1Samuel25:8 Pine mbayev ou, tsô vea kaa u; nahan yô, i̱ doo u a mbayev mban; gadia se va sha iyange i ember; yô, shi na mbayev ou kua wan wou Davidi hanma kwagh u u nenge i doo u yô." 
1Samuel25:9 Tsô mbayev mba Davidi mba va nyer yô, ve ôr Nabal akaaôron la cii ken iti i Davidi, maa ve huan." 
1Samuel25:10 Tsô Nabal gema kaa a mbayev mba Davidi er: Ka an nan lu Davidi? Man ka an nan lu wan u Yese? Ikpan ngee hen ayange ne, i i yevese uter vev yô." 
1Samuel25:11 Nahan, m̱ tôô bredi wam man mngerem am kua inyam i m senge mbatôndon mo iyôngo aive, m̱ na ior mba m fe henpe ve dugh ga la ha?" 
1Samuel25:12 Tsô mbayev mba Davidi gema kôr gbenda ve ave, ve hide, ve va ôr un nahan cii." 
1Samuel25:13 Nahan Davidi kaa a mbayev nav er: Hanma or nana̱ kange sanker u nan iwenge. Nahan hanma or kange sanker u nan iwenge; Davidi kpaa kange sanker na iwenge; ior mba ve dondo sha Davidi yô, kuma er deri unyiin nahan; deri uhar gema lu her, lu nengen ikav." 
1Samuel25:14 Kpa wanye ugen va kaa Abigail, kwase u Nabal la, er: Nenge, Davidi tindi mbatyomov, ve mough ken desereti, ve va sugh ter wase; kpa a gema a nyoon ishima a ôr kwagh a ve caver caver." 
1Samuel25:15 Man ior mbala ve er a vese doo doo mayange ve nzughul a vese ga; ma kwagh kpaa saa se sha ayange a se lu a ve imôngo, zum u se lu ken desereti la ga." 
1Samuel25:16 Ve hingir se gilgar tugh man tetan kpaa, sha ayange a se lu a ve, se kuran ilev la." 
1Samuel25:17 Hegen yô, hen, fa kwagh u ú er yô, gadia i wa ishima u eren ter wase kwagh u vihin kua ya na cii kpaa; gadia un ka gbilinor je, gande u á ôr kwagh a na." 
1Samuel25:18 Tsô Abigail tôô ikpenbredi deri uhar fefa kua akpa a wain ahar man iyôngo itian i i vande sôngon i i bur dedoo yô, man alakema u kaan uikaren utaan, man asume a atam a wain a ombor deri man azen a atam a tur a uman deri uhar, a penda akaa la cii sha ujaki." 
1Samuel25:19 Nahan a kaa a mbayev nav er: Hemen nen, mo me vaan ne ijime. Kpa a kaa nom na Nabal kwagh môm ga." 
1Samuel25:20 Tsô er a lu yemen sha jaki lu senen hen pev u huwa u uwoogh yô, Davidi a ior nav di kpaa sen va due sha a na, nahan a za kohol ve." 
1Samuel25:21 Yô, Davidi vande kaa er: Mimi je, lu m nyoon iyol gbilin m kura akaa a or ne a lu a mi ken desereti cii, je ma kwagh na môm saa un ga, kpa a gema a er a mo dang sha erdoo wam a na la." 
1Samuel25:22 Yô, Aôndo A̱ er a mbaihomov mba Davidi nahan, shi i̱ hemba nahan kpaa, aluer akaa a na a a lu a mi cii mea de wanye na u nomso môm tsô nana̱ lu uma her, man sev á mase aven yô." 
1Samuel25:23 Er Abigail nenge a Davidi yô, a hungwa sha jaki fefa, a gure a kuma icul inya, sha ishigh ki Davidi, a gure inya je." 
1Samuel25:24 A gba un hen angahar, a kaa er: Terem, ibo ne ka sha a mo i lu ye, ka sha ityough yagh je, shi de kpan wou u kwase a ôr u kwagh sha ato ou, shi ungwa kwaghôron u kpan wou u kwase kpaa." 
1Samuel25:25 M ngu zamber we, terem a̱ de veren ishima sha Nabal, gbilinor la ga, gadia er iti na i lu nahan, kape un kpaa a lu la; gadia inja i iti na er ibumegh, man ibumegh ki a na; kpa mo kpan wou u kwase yô, m nenge a mbayev mba terem a tindi la ga." 
1Samuel25:26 Hegen yô, terem, mimi je, er TER A lu u uma ne, man we kpaa u lu uma ne yô, ka TER A yange u ike i awambe man iyevoron sha uwegh ough iyol you ye; yô, mbaihomov ou man mba ve keren terem a ifer la, ve̱ hingir er Nabal nahan." 
1Samuel25:27 Iwua i kpan wou u kwase a va ne ter na ne yô, i̱ gema i, i̱ na mbayev mba ve zenden a terem ityô ne." 
1Samuel25:28 Shi de kpan wou u kwase kwaghbo na; gadia TER Una maa terem ya u taver dông kpee je; gadia terem ngu nôngon ityav mbi TER; nahan sha ayange a ou cii á zua a ifer her a we mayange ga. 
1Samuel25:29 Man shi aluer or á mough sha u zendan we ijime, keren we a ku kpaa, ma i kange uma u terem ken ile u mbaumav a TER, Aôndo wou, imôngo; kpa uma u mbaihomov ou Una ta ve kera sha ihuren i mzu." 
1Samuel25:30 Tsô zum u TER Una er terem akaaôron a i ter sha a we ne cii, man shi Una ver u tor sha Iserael kpaa yô," 
1Samuel25:31 kwagh ne una hingir we u vaan afanyô sha mi man u vihin terem ishima kpaa ga, er u za haa awambe sha ityôikaa ga, man er terem a za or iyev iyol na kpaa ga yô. Man shi zum u TER Una er a terem doo doo yô, umbur kpan wou u kwase ne." 
1Samuel25:32 Tsô Davidi kaa a Abigail er: I̱ wuese TER Aôndo u Iserael, u A tindi u nyian er ú va keghem gbenda ne!" 
1Samuel25:33 I̱ wuese kwaghfan wou shi i wuese we iyol you kpaa; we u u yangem ike i awambe nyian, man u oron iyev yam sha uwegh agh kpaa yô!" 
1Samuel25:34 Gadia mimi je, er TER, Aôndo u Iserael u A yangem u eren we kwagh u bo, A lu u uma ne, ka er u er fefa sha u va keghen mo gbenda yô, gayô, mimi je shighe u sev á av yô, ma wanye nomso môm ma a shi her hen Nabal ga." 
1Samuel25:35 Tsô Davidi ngohol kwagh u a ve un a mi la hen uwegh nagh, akaa a na er: Hire hen ya wou doo doo; nenge, m ungwa imo you, m rumun we kpaa." 
1Samuel25:36 Er Abigail hide hen Nabal yô, Nabal lu eren iniongo hen ya na er ka iniongo i tor yô; yô, Nabal kpaa ishima lu un saan saan, gadia lu hunden tsung; nahan a ôr un ma kwagh je ga, zan zan sev av." 
1Samuel25:37 Tsô sev mbu aven wain samben Nabal ashe yô, kwase na ôr un akaa la, ishima na maa hume, a hingir er iwen nahan." 
1Samuel25:38 Tsô, ayange nga kar er pue nahan, TER tsaha Nabal maa a kpe." 
1Samuel25:39 Er Davidi ungwa er Nabal a kpe yô, a kaa er: I̱ wuese TER u A kurum ijir sha ilyahan i Nabal a laham a mi la, man A yange wanye Na u eren ifer kpaa yô; kpa TER hide a ifer i Nabal sha ityough nagh. Nahan Davidi tindi i ôr kwagh a Abigail, er sar un pe eren un." 
1Samuel25:40 Tsô mbayev mba Davidi va hen Abigail hen Karmel, va ôr kwagh a na, ve kaa er: Ka Davidi a tindi se her a we ye, er se̱ va kua a we ú za lu kwase na." 
1Samuel25:41 Nahan a mough a gure a kuma ishigh inya, a kaa er: Nenge, kpan wou u kwase ngun, ka kpankwase u una ôôn mbayev mba terem angahar tsô." 
1Samuel25:42 Nahan Abigail mough fefa, henda jaki a ikpan i ukase na itian i i lu a na ityô, yô, a dondo sha mbatyomov mba Davidi; a za hingir kwase na." 
1Samuel25:43 Davidi vande eren Ahinoam u ken Yesereel; ve uhar cii ve hingir kasev nav. 
1Samuel25:44 Saulu vande tôôn Mikal, wan na u kwase, kwase u Davidi la, na Palti u Laishi or u Galim er." 
1Samuel26:1 Tsô Mbashiv va hen Saulu hen Gibea, ve va kaa er: Ka sha igungu u Hakila, u a lu ikôngough vegher u sha ityoughkitaregh la man Davidi a yer her ye gaa?" 
1Samuel26:2 Nahan Saulu mough sen hen desereti u Shiv a ior mba Iserael dubu utar a na imôngo, lu icuwanmbaiorov cii, sha u za keren Davidi ken desereti u Shiv." 
1Samuel26:3 Saulu haa afo sha igungu u Hakila u a hii ikôngough vegher u sha ityoughkitaregh sha gbenda la. Kpa Davidi tema ken desereti, a nenge Saulu lu tôvon un angahar ken desereti."
