1Samuel26:4 Davidi tindi mbamkerev, nahan a fa er Saulu a ve mimi yô." 
1Samuel26:5 Tsô Davidi mough, va henpe Saulu a haa afo la; Davidi nenge ijiir i Saulu a yav yô, kua Abiner wan u Ner, kurutya na kpaa; Saulu yav hen atô u afo a akekeautya, ior gema haa wa un atô." 
1Samuel26:6 Tsô Davidi gema kaa a Ahimeleki Orhiti kua Abishai wan u Seruya, anngô u Yoabi, er: Ka an nana za vea mo hen Saulu hen afoo? Tsô Abishai kaa er: Mo me za a we imôngo." 
1Samuel26:7 Nahan Davidi vea Abishai ve za va hen ior mbala tugh yô, Saulu yav gba mnyam ken atô u afo a akekeautya la, i tume iwange na hen inya vegher u sha ityough nagh; Abiner kua ior, ve yav ve wa un atô." 
1Samuel26:8 Tsô Abishai kaa a Davidi er: Aôndo na u orihom wou sha ikev nyian ve; yô, hegen shi de m̱ tume un iwange kwa môm, i̱ kar i̱ kôr shin inya, me tume un kwa har je ga." 
1Samuel26:9 Kpa Davidi kaa a Abishai er: De woo un ga; gadia ka an nana cihi nana za uwegh ku nan sha or u TER, u i shigh un mkurem, man nana lu a ishô?" 
1Samuel26:10 Davidi gema kaa er: Er TER A lu u uma ne, TER Una tsaha un, gayô, iyange i kuugh na ia va, shin una za kpe ken utya." 
1Samuel26:11 TER A̱ yangem, m̱ de ze uwegh agh sha or u TER, u i shigh un mkurem la ga; kpa tôô iwange i i lu un vegher u sha ityou la kua isheghmnger, sé yem." 
1Samuel26:12 Nahan Davidi tôô iwange man isheghmnger, vegher u sha ityough ki Saulu, tsô ve yem; ma or nenge ga, ma or fa ga, ma or kpaa nder ga; ve cii ve lu yaven, gadia TER haa ve mnyam, ve yav mem mem." 
1Samuel26:13 Nahan Davidi kar yem yande la, za tile sha ityough ki uwoogh ca je; haregh na a ve gba ica dedoo;" 
1Samuel26:14 tsô Davidi yila ior mbala kua Abiner wan u Ner, a kaa er: U vengese ga, Abiner? Tsô Abiner vengese, gema pine er: Ka we an, u yer toroo?" 
1Samuel26:15 Davidi gema kaa a Abiner er: U ngu nomsoor gaa? Ka an nan kom sha a we ken Iseraele? Man inja na nan u kor teru tor ga? Gadia orgen va nyôr sha u wuan tor, teru la." 
1Samuel26:16 Kwagh u u er ne doo ga. Er TER A lu u uma ne, ne kuma ku, sha er ne kor ter wen, or u TER, u i shigh un mkurem la, ga yô. Yô, nenge, henpe iwange i tor i lu kua isheghmnger i i lu un vegher u sha ityou la." 
1Samuel26:17 Tsô Saulu kav imo i Davidi, nahan a kaa er: Ka imo you la wan wam Davidi? Davidi kaa er: Ka imo yam je ne, terem tor." 
1Samuel26:18 Shi a kaa er: Ka nyi terem a zende wanye na ityô? Ka nyi m ere? Man ka nyi ibo m lu a mini? 
1Samuel26:19 Yô, terem, tor, shi a̱ ungwa kwaghôron u wanye na. Aluer a lu TER je, man A tor u ityô sha er ú kôrom ihom yô, i̱ na Un nagh; kpa aluer a lu ior tsô yô, ifan i̱ kôr ve sha ishigh ki TER; gadia ve zendam nyian sha u m̱ de kera varen a dyako u TER ga, mba kaan er: Yem, za civir mbaaôndo mbagenev." 
1Samuel26:20 Yô de kera deen awambe am a̱ haa inya ca a ishigh ki TER ga, gadia tor u Iserael due sha u keren paregh môm er or u yaren ikôr i takange sha iwo yô." 
1Samuel26:21 Tsô Saulu kaa er: M er kwaghbo; hide wan wam Davidi, gadia me kera er u kwagh u vihin mayange ga, sha er uma wam a lu u a inja yum nyian nahan; nenge m bume, m nzughul kwagh kpishi je." 
1Samuel26:22 Nahan Davidi gema kaa er: Nenge, iwange i tor ngin! Tindi wanye, nana̱ va ngohol i." 
1Samuel26:23 TER Una na hanma or sha perapera u nan man sha mimi u nan; TER na u sha uwegh agh nyian, kpa m rumun m za uwegh agh sha or u TER, u i shigh un mkurem ga." 
1Samuel26:24 Nenge, er uma wou a lum kwagh u injaa yum nyian yô, kape uma wam kpaa ma a lu TER kwagh u injaa ma A yemem ken atsan am cii." 
1Samuel26:25 Tsô Saulu kaa a Davidi er: I̱ saan we iyol wan wam Davidi! Hanma kwagh u u er cii una hemba u ga, ú kure un doo doo. Tsô Davidi yem a nagh, Saulu kpaa hide hen ijiir na." 
1Samuel27:1 Nahan Davidi kaa ken ishima na er: Iyange igen me kpe sha ikev i Saulu; guda me yevese me yem ken tar u Mbafiliti, nahan Saulu una hunde ishima a mo, ken tar u Iserael cii, una kera kerem ga; ka nahan man me war sha ikev na ye." 
1Samuel27:2 Tsô Davidi mough, per a ior deri ataratar mba ve lu a na imôngo la, kar yem hen Akishi wan u Maoki, tor u Gati." 
1Samuel27:3 Nahan Davidi tema a Akishi hen Gati, un a ior nav, hanma or a ior mba nan; Davidi lu a kasev nav uhar Ahinoam wan Yesereel, man Abigail u ken Karmel, kwase u Nabal la." 
1Samuel27:4 Tsô i kaa Saulu er Davidi a yevese a yem ken Gati yô; nahan a kera za ker un ga. 
1Samuel27:5 Nahan Davidi kaa a Akishi er: Aluer a doo u a mo yô, rumun, i̱ nam ijiir i teman ken ma gar u ken toho, er me tema ker yô; gadia ka sha ci u nyi man wanye wou a tema ken gar u tor, a we imôngo?" 
1Samuel27:6 Tsô Akishi na un Shikelagi sha iyange la; ka nahan man Shikelagi a lu sha ikev i utor mba Yuda zan zan nyian ye. 
1Samuel27:7 Ayange a Davidi tema ken tar u Mbafiliti yô, lu inyom i môm man iwer inyiin." 
1Samuel27:8 Davidi a ior nav, ve duen ve yemen ityav ken Mbageshur, man Mbagirshi kua Mbaamaleki; gadia ka mbala hii teman ken tar la ngise je ye, aluer u kar sha Shur zan zan u va hen tar u Igipiti yô." 
1Samuel27:9 Nahan Davidi vihi tar la, de ma nomsoor shin ma kwase uma ga, a kura ilev kua ibua man ujaki man urakumi kua akondo, tsô a hide a kar a va hen Akishi." 
1Samuel27:10 Akishi pine er: Ka han ne za nenge ityav nyiana? Davidi kaa er: Ka ken imbusutariyan i Yuda, man ken imbusutariyan i Mbayerameeli man ken imbusutariyan i Mbakeni." 
1Samuel27:11 Davidi de ma nomsoor shin ma kwase uma, sha u van a mi ken Gati ga; a kaa er: Ve̱ de va pasen kwagh wase, ve̱ kaan er: Kape Davidi a er ne ga. Kape ieren na i lu ne, sha ayange a a lu ken tar u Mbafiliti la cii." 
1Samuel27:12 Akishi na Davidi jighjigh, kaa er: A er kwagh na a ndôhôr ior nav, Iserael, ishima doo doo ve; nahan una hingir wanye wam gbem je." 
1Samuel28:1 Tsô sha ayange la yô, Mbafiliti kohol akumautya ve sha u za nôngo ityav a Iserael. Nahan Akishi kaa a Davidi er: Faan wer, zan you a mo imôngo ken utya, we a ior ou." 
1Samuel28:2 Davidi gema kaa a Akishi er: Nahan wea nenge kwagh u wanakiriki wou una er yô. A kishi kaa a Davidi er: Ka sha mi, me ver u ú hingir or u kuran mo gbem." 
1Samuel28:3 Samuel vande kpen kera ve, Iserael cii vaa ku na, man i ii un ken Rama ken gar na iyol na. Yô, Saulu vande zendan mba ve er kwagh a ujijingi mba mbakpenev man mbatsenganpasen akaa ken tar la kera." 
1Samuel28:4 Tsô Mbafiliti kohol imôngo; ve va, ve va haa afo ken Shunem; Saulu kpaa kohol Mbaiserael cii, ve haa afo sha Gilboa." 
1Samuel28:5 Zum u Saulu nenge a akumautya a Mbafiliti nahan, cier un iyol kpishi, ishima ta un kwe kpishi." 
1Samuel28:6 Er Saulu pine TER yô, TER bugh un zwa ga, shin sha mnyam ma cien, shin sha Urim, shin sha uprofeti kpaa ga." 
1Samuel28:7 Tsô Saulu kaa a mbayev nav er: Kerem nen kwase u a er kwagh a ujijingi mba mbakpenev yô, m̱ za her a nan, m̱ za pine nan kwagh. Mbayev nav kaa a na er: Nenge, kwase u a er kwagh a ujijingi mba mbakpenev yô, ngu ken Endor." 
1Samuel28:8 Nahan Saulu gema iyol, haa akondo agen, za, un a ior mbagenev uhar a na imôngo, ve va nyôr hen kwase la tugh; a kaa a na er: Shi tsengaôron mo kwagh sha jijingi u orkpen, vam a un u me ter u la." 
1Samuel28:9 Tsô kwase la kaa a na er: Nenge, u fa kwagh u Saulu a er, er a tim mba ve er kwagh a ujijingi mba mbakpenev, kua mbatsenganpasen akaa ken tar ne, kera yô, man ka nyi u lu hônon uma wam, sha u zan a mo ken kuu?" 
1Samuel28:10 Tsô Saulu bum TER a na, a kaa er: Er TER A lu u uma ne, ma mtsaha una tser u sha kwagh ne ga." 
1Samuel28:11 Tsô kwase la pine un er: Ka an, m kôndo u a nana? A kaa er: Kôndom a Samuel." 
1Samuel28:12 Zum u kwase la nenge a Samuel yô, a gbidye vaa genger genger; kwase la gema ôr kwagh a Saulu er: Ka nyi u tsughumu? Gadia ka we Saulu je ne." 
1Samuel28:13 Tsô a kaa a na er: De cie ga; ka nyi u nenge a mini? Kwase la kaa a Saulu er: M nenge a or u Aôndo ngun kôndon duen sha tar ne. 
1Samuel28:14 A pine un er: Mlu na ngu nana? A kaa er: Ka or u been iyol, ngu kôndon, a haa togo iyol. Tsô Saulu kav er i lu Samuel yô, a gure a kuma ishigh inya je, a ta inya." 
1Samuel28:15 Tsô Samuel kaa a Saulu er: Ka nyi u zem iyol, u kende a mo? Saulu gema kaa a na er: Kwagh tserem tsung, gadia Mbafiliti mba nôngon ityav a mo, man Aôndo kpaa A undum, mayange A kera bughum zwa ga, shin sha uprofeti, shin sha mnyam ma cien kpaa ga, ka nahan man m yer u mer, va pasem m fa kwagh u me er ye." 
1Samuel28:16 Samuel gema kaa er: Ka nyi u pinim, er TER A undu u man A hingir orihom wouwe?" 
1Samuel28:17 Yô, TER er kwagh ne er lu kaa sha zwa wam yô; TER ande u tartor sha ikev you kera, gema na orgen, ka Davidi je la." 
1Samuel28:18 Ka sha ci u, u we kwaghôron u TER iko ga, u er sha ishima Na i vihin tsung a Mbaamaleki mbala ga yô, kape i lu man TER A er u kwagh ne nyian nahan ne." 
1Samuel28:19 Man shi TER Una na Iserael sha ikev i Mbafiliti a we imôngo kpaa; kper yô, we kua ônov ou né va kohol mo; akumautya a Iserael kpaa, TER Una na a sha ikev i Mbafiliti." 
1Samuel28:20 Nahan Saulu segha gbidye inya samber inya, cier un iyol kpishi sha akaaôron a Samuel la; kera lu a agee iyol ga, gadia shi didi tsa kaka ya kwagh ga." 
1Samuel28:21 Nahan kwase la va hen Saulu va kav er kwagh nzughul un yum yô, a kaa a na er: Nenge, kpan wou u kwase ungwa kwaghôron wou, m wa uma wam iko ga, m ver ato sha kwaghôron u u erem yô." 
1Samuel28:22 Hegen yô, shi ver ato sha imo i kpan wou u kwase, de, m̱ na u ankwaghyan kpeghee, ya, sha er ú lu a agee zum u ú kôr gbenda ave yô." 
1Samuel28:23 Kpa a venda, a kaa er: Me ya kwagh ga. Kpa mbayev nav kua kwase la, ve zamber a na tsung; nahan a ungwa imo ve, a mough hen inya, a tema sha gambe." 
1Samuel28:24 Kwase la lu a icighangumbua hen ya na, nahan a sôngo un fefa, shi a tôô mwem a hôr, a kaa bredi u i we kwa sha mi ga, a mi;" 
1Samuel28:25 tsô a va a mi, a va ver Saulu sha ishi, a mbayev nav; ve ya. Tsô ve mough tugh mbula je, ve yem." 
1Samuel29:1 Tsô Mbafiliti kohol akumautya ve cii hen Afeki; Iserael kpaa haa afo hen kpehwembe u ken Yesereel. 
1Samuel29:2 Atiator a Mbafiliti kar uderi uderi man udubu udubu; Davidi a ior nav yô, ve kar ken ijime a Akishi imôngo." 
1Samuel29:3 Nahan atiator a Mbafiliti pine er: Mbaheberu mban yô, ka nyi ve eren heene? Nahan Akishi kaa a atiator a Mbafiliti la er: Ka Davidi wanakiriki u tor u Iserael u a lu a mo ayange shin anyom kar je gaa? Man m zua un a ma ibo ga, hii sha iyange i a va kohol mo zan zan nyian." 
1Samuel29:4 Kpa asema vihi atiator a Mbafiliti a na tsung; nahan atiator a Mbafiliti gema kaa a na er: I̱ na or ne gbenda, a̱ hide hen ijiir na henpe u ver un yô, a̱ de zaan ityav a vese ga, sha er a̱ de kera za hingir orihom wase ken utya ga yô; gadia ka sha nyi je, man or ne una za zua vea ter na, á kera lu sha ityouv mbi ior mban gaa?" 
1Samuel29:5 Ngun kera ka Davidi u i ter un icam sha amar er: Saulu wua udubu nav; Davidi yô, wua udubu pue pue, ne gaa?" 
1Samuel29:6 Tsô Akishi yila Davidi, kaa a na er: Er TER A lu u uma ne, u ngu ormimi, mdugh wou kua mnyer wou a mo imôngo ken akumautya a doom, gadia m zua u a ibo ga, hii sha iyange i u va kohol mo la je zan zan nyian; nahan kpaa atiator rumun we ga." 
1Samuel29:7 Yô, hide gba yemen doo doo hegen tsô, de vihin atiator a Mbafiliti ishima ga." 
1Samuel29:8 Tsô Davidi kaa a Akishi er: M er nyi? Man ka nyi u zough a mi ken wanakiriki wou sha ayange a m lu a we imôngo zan zan nyian, er i rumun er m̱ za ityav hen mbaihomov mba terem, tor ga?" 
1Samuel29:9 Akishi gema kaa a Davidi er: M fa u ngu ormimi sha ashe a am, er ortyom u Aôndo nahan; nahan kpaa atiator a Mbafiliti kaa er: Un a̱ de ze a vese imôngo ken utya ga." 
1Samuel29:10 Yô, mough pepe pepe, a mbayev mba teru mba ve ve a we imôngo la, mough nen pepe dindee, á va wanger yô, yem nen." 
1Samuel29:11 Nahan Davidi mough pepe pepe, un kua ior nav, sha u vea hide vea yem ken tar u Mbafiliti pepe pepe yô. Mbafiliti kôndo yem sha Yesereel." 
1Samuel30:1 Tsô zum u Davidi a ior nav ve va ar hen Shikelagi sha iyange i sha utar la yô, Mbaamaleki vande van ityav ken Imbusutariyan la, kua sha Shikelagi kpaa; ve hemba Shikelagi, ve nande un sha usu;" 
1Samuel30:2 ve kôr kasev kua mba ve lu ker cii yô, mbakiriki kua mbavesen, ve wua ma or ga, ve kura ve cii, tsô ve gba yemen." 
1Samuel30:3 Zum u Davidi a ior nav ve va hen gar la yô, nenge, gar vande hian sha usu ve; kasev vev kua ônov vev mba nomso man mba kasev, i kura ve." 
1Samuel30:4 Tsô Davidi kua ior mba ve lu a na imôngo ve ger mliam, zan zan ve kera lu a agee iyol a shi vaan ga." 
1Samuel30:5 Kasev mba Davidi uhar kpaa, i kura ve, Ahinoam u Yesereel kua Abigail kwase u Nabal u Karmel." 
1Samuel30:6 Ishima lu nyian Davidi tsung, gadia ior lu ôron er vea ta un awen; gadia asema vihi ior cii, hanma or sha ci u ônov mba nan mba nomso kua mba kasev; kpa Davidi taver ishima na ken TER, Aôndo na." 
1Samuel30:7 Tsô Davidi kaa a pristi Abiatar, wan u Ahimeleki er: Shi vam a efodi. Nahan Abiatar tôô efodi va na Davidi." 
1Samuel30:8 Davidi pine TER, er: Aluer me zenda ior mban ijime yô, me kohol ve kpa? A rumun A kaa a na er: Zenda; gadia mimi je ú kohol kpee, man ú yima ve kpaa." 
1Samuel30:9 Tsô Davidi za, un a ior deri ataratar mba ve lu a na imôngo la, ve va ar hen uwagh u Besor, ve undu mba ve gba ijime her." 
1Samuel30:10 Kpa Davidi zenda ve ijime, un a ior deri unyiin; gadia ior deri uhar vôr, ve fatyô u peren uwagh u Besor ga, ve lu ken ijime." 
1Samuel30:11 Tsô ve kohol or u Igipiti ken ikôngo ve va a na hen Davidi, ve na un kwaghyan, a ya, ve na un mngerem kpaa, a ma;" 
1Samuel30:12 ve na un vegher u ijentur u uman man asume a atam a wain a uman ahar; ye yô, hide taver un iyol, gadia ahô atar je a ya kwagh ga, a ma mngerem kpaa ga." 
1Samuel30:13 Nahan Davidi pine un er: U ngu u ana? Man ka han u dughu? A kaa er: Mo m ngu wanye u Igipiti, m ngu kpan u Oramaleki; orvesen wam gbihim sha ci u angev kôrom, nyian ka ayange atar je ne." 
1Samuel30:14 Se za ityav ken Imbusutariyan i Mbakereti, man ken tar u Yuda kpaa, kua ken Imbusutariyan i Kalebu, se nande Shinkeragi sha usu." 
1Samuel30:15 Davidi pine un er: Tsô ú za a mo zan zan hen ikumutya la kpa? A kaa a na er: Yô, bum Aôndo a mo wer, ú wuam ga man shi ú nam sha ikev i orvesen wam kpaa ga, yô, me za a we hen ikumutya la." 
1Samuel30:16 Tsô ze a na yô, nenge, ve haa inya jir jir, ve lu yan kwagh, man kwagh, eren iniongo sha ishar i kpishi i ve kura ken tar u Mbafiliti man tar u Mbayuda la." 
1Samuel30:17 Nahan Davidi hii u wuan ve aikighe u corododo la je, zan zan kper nan iyange i bee; mô ve môm war ga; saa mbayevikaior deri unyiin mba ve henda urakumi, ve yevese ve war ye." 
1Samuel30:18 Davidi ngohol akaa a Mbaamaleki ve kura la cii; Davidi yima kasev nav mba uhar mbala kpaa. 
1Samuel30:19 Kwagh môm saa ve ga, u kiriki shin u vesen kpaa ga, shin ônov mba nomso shin mba kasev, shin ishar, shin nyityôkwagh i ve kura la kpaa ga; Davidi hide a mi cii." 
1Samuel30:20 Shi Davidi ngohol iyôngo kua ibua cii; ve hule i ve kar a mi sha hemen, ve kaa er: Ingin ka ishar i Davidi je ne." 
1Samuel30:21 Tsô Davidi va ar hen ior mba deri uhar mba ve vôr, ve fatyô u zan a Davidi ityô ga la, ve mba i undu ve hen uwagh u Besor la; ve due sha u za keghen Davidi kua ior nav mba ve lu a na la, gbenda; er Davidi va ar hen ior mbala yô, a sugh ve." 
1Samuel30:22 Tsô aferaior kua agbilinaior a a lu a mba ve za a Davidi imôngo la, ve gba kaan er: Er ve ze a vese imôngo ga yô, se kpaa sé na ve kwar u ishar i se ngohol la ga, kpa á na hanma or kwase u nan kua ônov mba nan ve̱ yem a mi tsô." 
1Samuel30:23 Kpa Davidi kaa er: Anmgbianev av, ka ape né er sha kwagh u TER A ne se ne ga; A kor se, A ne se ior mba ve ve ityav mbi nôngon a vese la sha ikev kpaa." 
1Samuel30:24 Ka anti je nana wa imo yen iko sha kwagh nee? Gadia er kwar u un u a ze ityav u lu nahan, kape kwar u un u a tem hen uika kpaa u lu la; vea ya vough." 
1Samuel30:25 Tsô hii hen iyange la zan zan ken hemen á lu nahan; a ver kwagh ne, hingir tindi kua ieren i Iserael zan zan nyian." 
1Samuel30:26 Er Davidi za ar hen Shikelagi yô, a pande ishar la, a tindi a mi hen mbatamen mba Yuda, mba ve lu akar a na la, a kaa er: Ingin ka iwua i i dugh i sha ishar i mbaihomov mba TER, i ne ne ye." 
1Samuel30:27 A tindi a mi hen mba ve lu ken Betel man mba ve lu ken Ramoti u Imbusutariyan la, man mba ve lu ken Yatir," 
1Samuel30:28 man mba ve lu ken Aroer, man mba ve lu ken Shifemoti, man mba ve lu ken Eshetemoa," 
1Samuel30:29 man mba ve lu ken Rakal, man mba ve lu ken agar a Mbayerameeli, man mba ve lu ken agar a Mbakeni" 
1Samuel30:30 man mba ve lu ken Horma, man mba ve lu ken Borashan, man mba ve lu ken Ataki," 
1Samuel30:31 man mba ve lu ken Heberon, kua hen ajiir cii, a Davidi iyol na kua ior nav ve lu zan keke la." 
1Samuel31:1 Tsô Mbafiliti nôngo ityav a Iserael; ior mba Iserael yevese Mbafiliti, ityav wua ve sha uwo u Gilboa." 
1Samuel31:2 Mbafiliti cir sha Saulu a ônov nav nombuloo. Mbafiliti wua ônov mba Saulu, Yonatan man Abinadabi kua Malkishua." 
1Samuel31:3 Ityav imbishi Saulu tsung, mbaavaanev tsule un ngegh; cier un iyol kpishi a mbaavaanev." 
1Samuel31:4 Tsô Saulu kaa a or u tilin un ikav mbi tswamev la er: Tsuwa sanker wou kuman i̱ due keela, sha er mbaipusuv mban ve̱ de va komom ve̱ heen mo ga. Kpa or u tilin un ikav mbi tswamev la venda, gadia cier un iyol yum. Nahan Saulu ngohol sanker na, ta sha mi pov." 
1Samuel31:5 Tsô er or u tilin un ikav mbi tswamev nenge er Saulu a kpe yô, un kpaa a ta sha sanker na maa a kpe a na imôngo." 
1Samuel31:6 Kape Saulu kpe a ônov nav utar, man or u tilin un ikav mbi tswamev kua ior nav cii sha iyange i môm la." 
1Samuel31:7 Zum u ior mba Iserael mba ve lu pev vegher u keela kua mba ve lu Yordan yande la, ve nenge er ior mba Iserael yevese man Saulu a ônov nav ve kpe yô, ve undu agar ve yevese; nahan Mbafiliti kar va tema ker." 
1Samuel31:8 Tsô sev mbu av yô, er Mbafiliti va u va yan ishar i mbakpenev yô, ve kohol ikom i Saulu kua akom a ônov nav mba utar mbala sha uwo u Gilboa." 
1Samuel31:9 Ve gber un ityough, ve kura ikav nav mbi utyav, ve tindi a mi ken tar u Mbafiliti ningir tser cii, sha u i̱ za yôô loho la hen iyou i akombo ve, kua hen ior kpaa." 
1Samuel31:10 Ve ver ikav nav mbi utyav ken iyou i Ashetaroti; ve gema gundu na ve mande sha kpekpe u Bete-shan. 
1Samuel31:11 Er mba Yabeshi-gileadi, ve ungwa kwagh u Mbafiliti ve er a Saulu yô," 
1Samuel31:12 anomaior cii mough tsa zan kaka za tsuwa gundu u Saulu la, kua akom a ônov nav sha kpekpe u Bete-shan la, ve va a mi ken Yabeshi, ve va nande her." 
1Samuel31:13 Ve kohol akuhe a ve, ve ii a hen itinekon i tsamia ken Yabeshi, maa ve hôr kwaghyan ayange ataankarahar." 
2Samuel1:1 Tsô zum u Saulu kpe kera man Davidi za wua Mbaamaleki hide yô, Davidi tsa ken Shikelagi ayange ahar;" 
2Samuel1:2 tsô sha iyange i sha utar la yô, orgen due ken afo hen Saulu a akondo a anden, man lu a inya sha ityou kpaa; tsô, va ar henpe Davidi lu yô, a gba inya, a gure a ta inya." 
2Samuel1:3 Tsô Davidi pine un er: U due hana? A kaa a na er: M war a war ku ken afo a Iserael. 
2Samuel1:4 Shi Davidi pine un er: Ka nyi i ere? Ôrom yôô. A gema a kaa er: Ior yevese ityav, mbagenev kpishi ityav wua ve, ve kpe; Saulu kua wan na Yonatan kpaa, ve kpe." 
2Samuel1:5 Davidi gema pine wanye u a ôr un la er: Er nan man u fe er Saulu vea wan na Yonatan ve kpe? 
2Samuel1:6 Tsô wanye u a kaa un nahan la, kaa er: M gba duen sha uwo u Gilboa tsô, yô, nenge, Saulu suur sha iwange na; man akekeautya man mbaanyinyav cir sha a na." 
2Samuel1:7 Gem ashe nengen mo yô, a yilam. M kaa mer: Een." 
2Samuel1:8 A kaa a mo er: Ka we ana? M gema m kaa a na mer, mo m ngu Oramaleki." 
2Samuel1:9 Tsô a kaa a mo er: Yô, shi va tile hen mo heen, wuam; gadia kwagh tserem man uma wam yô, ngu her doo doo je." 
2Samuel1:10 Tsô m va tile a na, m wua un, gadia m fa una kera fatyô u shi lun uma er a vande gban la ga; nahan m tôô idyer i tor i sha ityough nagh la man ihye i ken uwegh nagh m va a mi hen terem heen." 
2Samuel1:11 Tsô Davidi kôr akondo a na ande; kape ior mba ve lu a na cii kpaa ve er la; 
2Samuel1:12 ve zungwe, ve vaa, ve mem kwaghyan zan zan iyange kar been, sha ci u Saulu vea wan na Yonatan, man sha ci u ior mba TER, kua ya u Iserael kpaa; sha er ve kpe ku u ishôm yô." 
2Samuel1:13 Nahan Davidi pine wanye u a va ôr un la er: U ngu or u hana? A kaa er: Mo m ngu wan u shiror, or u Amaleki." 
2Samuel1:14 Tsô Davidi kaa a na er: Ka nyi u cie u zan uwegh sha u wuan or u TER, u i shigh nan mkurem la, ga?" 
2Samuel1:15 Nahan Davidi yila wanye ugen, kaa er: Kporom, ta sha a na. Tsô a gber un je maa a kpe." 
2Samuel1:16 Davidi kaa a na er: Ike i awambe ou i̱ hide sha ityough you, gadia ka zwa wou je u pase u ye, er u kaa wer: M wua or u TER, u i shigh nan mkurem yô." 
2Samuel1:17 Nahan Davidi gber kwelegh ne, ter Saulu man wan na Yonatan." 
2Samuel1:18 Shi a kaa er ve̱ tese ônov mba Yuda icam i ada; nenge, i nger i ken ruamabera u Yashar." 
2Samuel1:19 I wua icivir you sha ajiir a ou a taven sha Iserael! Anomaior gba je! 
2Samuel1:20 De kera ôron kwagh la ken Gati ga, de kera yôôn un sha igbenda i Ashekelon kpaa ga, sha er ônkasev mba Mbafiliti ve̱ de ember ga, Sha er ônkasev mba mbaipusuv ve̱ de kera geren ga yô." 
2Samuel1:21 Ne iwo i Gilboa, avure shin ura ve̱ de kera luun sha a ven ga, shin ajiir a nan nagh kpaa ga. Gadia ka sha her man i ta perutya u anomaior kera ye, perutya u Saulu, i shighe u mkurem ga." 
2Samuel1:22 Sha awambe a mba i woo ve man sha ahôm a anomaior, ada u Yonatan hide ijime ga; sanker u Saulu kpaa hide gbilin ga." 
2Samuel1:23 Saulu vea Yonatan ka mbadoonshima man mbasarenior kpaa, sha ayange a ve lu uma la, man ken ku kpaa ve pav ga; ve hemba ugafa kpaver, shi ve hemba begha agee kpaa." 
2Samuel1:24 Ne ônkasev mba Iserael vaa nen Saulu, un u a woho ne iyol sha akondo a nyian dindee, u a er hwe sha zenaria sha akondo a en." 
2Samuel1:25 Anomaior gba ken atô u utya je! I wua Yonatan sha ajiir a ou a taven sha. 
2Samuel1:26 Ican tsulem ken ishima sha ci wou anngôm, Yonatan; u doom tsung; dooshima wou la kam kwagh u kpilighyol, hemba dooshima u ukase." 
2Samuel1:27 Anomaior gba je! Ikav mbi utyav kpaa saa ishe! 
2Samuel2:1 Tsô er kwagh ne kar kera yô, Davidi pine TER er: M̱ kôndo m̱ za sha gar u Yuda shinii? TER kaa a na er: Kôndo; nahan Davidi pine er: Ka han m̱ kôndo? A kaa er: Ka sha Heberon." 
2Samuel2:2 Tsô Davidi kôndo sha her a kasev nav uhar kpaa, Ahinoam u Yesereel kua Abigail kwase u Nabal Orkarmel." 
2Samuel2:3 Shi Davidi va a ior mba ve lu a na la kpaa, hanma or a ior mba nan; ve za tema ken agar a Heberon." 
2Samuel2:4 Tsô ior mba Yuda va, va shighe Davidi mkurem heregh er a̱ lu tor sha ya u Yuda. Er ve kaa a Davidi er: Ka ior mba Yabeshi-gileadi, ve ii Saulu yô," 
2Samuel2:5 Davidi tindi mbatyomov hen mba Yabeshi-gileadi mbala, a kaa a ve er: TER A̱ ver ne doo doo er ne er kwagh u dedoo ne a ter wen, Saulu, ne ii un yô." 
2Samuel2:6 TER A̱ er a ven dedoo man sha mimi kpaa; mo kpaa, me er a ven dedoo sha ci u ne er kwagh ne nahan yô." 
2Samuel2:7 Yô, taver nen ave a en, lu nen nomso; gadia ter wen Saulu kpe man ya u Yuda gema shighem mkurem er m̱ tema tor sha a ve." 
2Samuel2:8 Kpa Abiner, wan u Ner, kurutya u akumautya a Saulu vande kuan a wan u Saulu Ishibosheti, per a na, za a na ken Mahanaim," 
2Samuel2:9 za ver un tor sha Gileadi man sha Mbaashur man sha Yesereel man sha Eferaim man sha Benyamin kua sha Iserael cii. 
2Samuel2:10 Anyom a wan u Saulu, Ishibosheti, lu akunduahar zum u a ya tor sha Iserael la, a tema tor anyom ahar. Kpa ya u Yuda yô, dondo Davidi." 
2Samuel2:11 Ayange a Davidi lu tor ken Heberon sha Mbayuda yô, lu anyom ataankarahar man iwer ataratar." 
2Samuel2:12 Tsô Abiner wan u Ner kua mbayev mba Ishibosheti wan u Saulu, ve due ken Mahanaim ve za ken Gibeon." 
2Samuel2:13 Nahan Yoabi wan u Seruya kua mbayev mba Davidi kpaa, ve due ve va kohol ve hen kpe u ber u Gibeon ve tema, mban haa ber yande ne, mbala di haa yande la." 
2Samuel2:14 Tsô Abiner kaa a Yoabi er: De mbayevikaior ve̱ mough ve̱ numbe sha ishigh yasegh. Yoabi kaa er: Yô, ve̱ mough." 
2Samuel2:15 Tsô ve mough, i ôr iyenge ve, pue kar uhar sha ci u Benyamin man Ishibosheti wan u Saulu; man mbayev mba Davidi di kpaa pue kar uhar." 
2Samuel2:16 Tsô hanma or kôr ugen sha ityou, nan kuma nan sanker ken ihan, nahan ve kpe icin i môm cii; ka nahan man i ii ijiir la iti er Helkati-hasurim u ken Gibeon ye." 
2Samuel2:17 Ityav taver sha iyange la tsung; mbayev mba Davidi hemba Abiner kua ior mba Iserael. 
2Samuel2:18 Ônov mba Seruya lu her utar, ka: Yoabi man Abishai kua Asahel. Asahel yô, lu or u yevese fefa er ashim nahan." 
2Samuel2:19 Nahan Asahel cir sha Abiner, zenda un tsung, kaha ken iyan shin ken imese undu Abiner ga." 
2Samuel2:20 Tsô Abiner gema ashe pine er: Ka we Asahel nee? A rumun, a kaa er: Ka mo." 
2Samuel2:21 Nahan Abiner kaa a na er: Kaha ken uwegh ku yanegh shin ku imesegh, za kôr wanye ugen, ngohol ikav nav mbi tswamev. Kpa Asahel rumun u kahan un ken ijime kera ga." 
2Samuel2:22 Nahan Abiner shi kaa a Asahel er: Karem ken ijime kera, ka nyi man m̱ gbihi u inya he? Nahan me zua ishigh a anngôu Yoabi nana?" 
2Samuel2:23 Nahan kpaa a rumun u karen kera mayange ga, tsô Abiner gema ityô i iwange na tume un hen uya, kar due ken ijime; a gba hen ijiir la je, a kpe; nahan mba ve va hen ijiir i Asahel gba, kpe la yô, ve tile her ving." 
2Samuel2:24 Kpa Yoabi man Abishai, ve gba zendan Abiner ityô; iyange mile zum u ve ar sha igungu u Ama u a lu sha ishigh ki Gia hen gbenda u desereti u Gibeon la." 
2Samuel2:25 Tsô Mbabenyamin kohol hen ijime i Abiner ve hingir ikum i môm, ve kar ve za tile sha igungu ugen." 
2Samuel2:26 Tsô Abiner yila Yoabi kaa er: Sanker á gba yan gbem tsô? U fa er kwagh u masetyô á hemba vihin ishima gaa? Ka hanma shighe je man ú kaa ior wer, ve̱ de u zendan anmgbianev vev ijime?" 
2Samuel2:27 Yoabi kaa er: Er Aôndo A lu u uma ne yô, wea er kwagh ga yô, mimi je, ior ma ve hidi, ma ve de u zendan anmgbianev vev ijime ga, saa kper." 
2Samuel2:28 Tsô Yoabi tôngo korough; ior tile, ve kera zenda Iserael ityô ga, man ve kera seer nôngon ityav kpaa ga." 
2Samuel2:29 Tsô Abiner a ior nav ve tsa yemen kaka ve kar shin Araba, ve per Yordan ve kar hen Biteron cii ve va hen Mahanaim." 
2Samuel2:30 Yoabi hide, de u zendan Abiner ityô; zum u a kohol ior cii yô, mbayev mba Davidi yina pue kar utaankarunyiin kua Asahel kpaa." 
2Samuel2:31 Kpa mbayev mba Davidi wua Benyamin kua Abiner ior deri utar man akunduatar je. 
2Samuel2:32 Ve tôô Asahel ve ii un shin uwar u ter na ken Betelehem. Yoabi a ior nav ve tsa yemen kaka, sev za av ve hen Heberon." 
2Samuel3:1 Ya u Saulu a ya u Davidi ve nôngo ityav gbem. Davidi yô, seer agee zaan hemen hemen, kpa ya u Saulu yô, lu panden hiden jime jime." 
2Samuel3:2 Davidi mar ônov mba nomso ken Heberon; wan na u iunda lu Amnon, a mar un a Ahinoam wan u Mbayesereel;" 
2Samuel3:3 u sha uhar lu Kileabi, a mar un a Abigail kwase u Nabal, Orkarmel; u sha utar lu Abesalom wan u Maaka wan u Talmai, tor u Geshur;" 
2Samuel3:4 u sha unyiin yô, lu Adoniya wan u Hagiti; u sha utaan lu Shefatia wan u Abital;" 
2Samuel3:5 u sha ataratar lu Iteream u Egela, kwase u Davidi. Mban Davidi mar ve hen Heberon." 
2Samuel3:6 Tsô er ya u Davidi a ya u Saulu ve lu nôngon ityav ayol a ve la yô, Abiner tile taveraa ken ya u Saulu." 
2Samuel3:7 Kpa Saulu lu a kpankwase, iti na er Risepa, wan u Aia. Tsô Ishibosheti kaa a Abiner er: Inja na nan u yav a kpankwase u tereme?" 
2Samuel3:8 Tsô ishima vihi Abiner kpishi sha kwaghôron u Ishibosheti la, a kaa er: Mo m ngu ityough ki iwaagh ki Yuda shinii? Zan zan hegen m ngu eren a ya u teru Saulu doo doo, man a anmgbianev nav kua akar a na kpaa, m na u sha ikev i Davidi kpaa ga; nahan kpaa, nyian yô, u ngu nan mo ibo sha kwagh u kwase ne." 
2Samuel3:9 Aôndo A̱ er a Abiner nahan shi i̱ hemba nahan kpaa aluer mea er a Davidi er TER A bum a na ga yô. 
2Samuel3:10 Me dugh tor hen ya u Saulu me taver ikônough ki torough ki Davidi sha Iserael kua sha Yuda kpaa, hii hen Dan zan zan za ar hen Bersheba." 
2Samuel3:11 Tsô a kera fatyô u ôron kwagh ugen a Abiner ga, gadia a lu cian un." 
2Samuel3:12 Tsô Abiner tindi mbatyomov hen Davidi sha ityough nagh, a kaa er: Tar ne ka u ana? Shi a kaa er: Ya ikur a mo, mo kpaa, nenge, uwegh agh kua lu a we imôngo, me gema Iserael cii me va a ve hen a we." 
2Samuel3:13 A kaa er: Ka sha mi, me ya ikur a we, kpa kwagh ngum a we môm tsô, ú nenge a ishigh yagh ve ga, saa ú vam a Mikal wan u Saulu, shighe u ú vaan u va nengen mo yô." 
2Samuel3:14 Shi Davidi tindi mbatyomov hen Ishibosheti wan u Saulu, a kaa er: Nam kwase wam Mikal u ngise m er un sha ishe i uipusu mba Mbafiliti deri la." 
2Samuel3:15 Nahan Ishibosheti tindi i za kua a na hen nom na Paltiel wan u Laishi. 
2Samuel3:16 Nom na gba veren un gbenda vaan zan a na ityô zan zan za ar hen Bahurim. Tsô Abiner kaa a na er: Hide; tsô a hide. 
2Samuel3:17 Abiner vande tumen idyu a mbatamen mba Iserael, a kaa er: Sha ayange a tsuaa la, ne lu keren Davidi ner a̱ lu tor wen." 
2Samuel3:18 Yô, er nen ase nahan, gadia TER iyange ôr kwagh ter Davidi kaa er: Ka sha uwegh ku wanakiriki Wam Davidi man Me yima ior av Iserael sha ikev i Mbafiliti kua sha ikev i mbaihomov vev cii kpaa ye." 
2Samuel3:19 Shi Abiner vande ôron kwagh a Mbabenyamin kpaa; Abiner za sha u za ôron kwagh a Davidi hen Heberon sha akaa a Iserael kua Mbabenyamin ve ver ishima u eren cii yô. 
2Samuel3:20 Tsô Abiner va hen Davidi ken Heberon a ior ikundu a na ityô. Nahan Davidi yôr Abiner kua ior mba ve lu a na ityô mbala iwer. 
2Samuel3:21 Tsô Abiner kaa a Davidi er: Me mough me yem me za kohol Iserael cii, me va a mi hen terem tor sha er ve̱ va ya ikur a we, er u tema tor er i sar u ken ishima cii yô. Tsô Davidi na Abiner gbenda, a mough doo doo." 
2Samuel3:22 Hen shighe la je mbayev mba Davidi kua mba Yoabi za hide ken utya, ve va a ishar kpishi; kpa Abiner kera lu a Davidi ken Heberon imôngo ga, gadia a vande nan un gbenda yem doo doo je." 
2Samuel3:23 Zum u Yoabi kua ikumutya i i lu a na imôngo cii, va nyôr yô, i kaa Yoabi er: Abiner wan u Ner va hen tor, a na un gbenda a yem bem bem je." 
2Samuel3:24 Tsô Yoabi va hen tor, va kaa er: Ka nyi u er nahan? Nenge, Abiner va her a we, man ka nyi u ne un gbenda a yem dedoo nahana?" 
2Samuel3:25 U fa Abiner wan u Ner. A va sha u va tsughun we sha u una fa mdugh wou man mnyer wou, shi una fa kwagh u u eren cii kpaa." 
2Samuel3:26 Zum u Yoabi mough hen Davidi due yô, a tindi mbatyomov, ve zenda Abiner ijime zan zan hen ijôr i Shira, ve za hide a na, kpa Davidi fa ga." 
2Samuel3:27 Mba za hidi a Abiner ken Heberon yô, Yoabi ta ibalegh a na hen hundagar er una ôr kwaghhuwa a na, tsô a maa a kuma un kwagh sha uya a kpe, sha ci u awambe a Asahel anngô na la." 
2Samuel3:28 Tsô ken masetyô zum u Davidi ungwa nahan yô, a kaa er: Mo kua tartor wam lun yase a ibo sha ishigh ki TER sha won je ga, sha ike i awambe a Abiner wan u Ner ne;" 
2Samuel3:29 i̱ hide sha ityough ki Yoabi kua sha ya u ter na cii; ken ya u Yoabi yô, or u duen ihyelegh iyol, shin orimande, shin or u suur sha aga, shin or u kpen ku u ishôm, shin or u banen a kwaghyan, nana̱ de banen ker ga." 
2Samuel3:30 Kape Yoabi vea anngô na Abishai ve wua Abiner la, sha ci u lu wua anngô ve Asahel hen Gibeon ken utya yô." 
2Samuel3:31 Tsô Davidi kaa a Yoabi kua ior mba ve lu a na cii er: Ande nen akondo a en, ta nen mzemba uya, kar nen Abiner sha hemen zungwe nen. Tor Davidi kpaa dondo sha ikom." 
2Samuel3:32 Ve ii Abiner ken Heberon, tor vaa hen uwar u Abiner genger genger, ior cii kpaa vaa." 
2Samuel3:33 Tor dugh kwelegh sha ku u Abiner, a kaa er: Abiner gba kpen er ibumeor ka nan kpe nahan tsôô?" 
2Samuel3:34 Ave ou i kange a ga, angahar a ou kpaa i haa a ahye a togula ga; er ônov mba aferev ka ve wua or nahan, kape i woo u la. Ior cii shi seer vaan un." 
2Samuel3:35 Tsô ior cii va, va zamber a Davidi er a̱ ya kwagh er iyange i shi her yô; kpa Davidi bum, kaa er: TER A̱ er a mo nahan shi i̱ hemba nahan kpaa aluer mea bende bredi zwa shin hanma kwaghyan ugen er iyange i lu a bee ga ne yô." 
2Samuel3:36 Nahan ior cii nenge kwagh la, doo ve gadia hanma kwagh u tor ka una er yô, a doo ior cii." 
2Samuel3:37 Ior cii kua Iserael cii kpaa, ve kav sha iyange la er i lu ishima i tor man i woo Abiner wan u Ner ga yô." 
2Samuel3:38 Shi tor kaa a mbayev nav er: Ne fa er nyian ititor, zegeor, a kpe ken Iserael gaa?" 
2Samuel3:39 Kpa mo yô, nyian m ngu a lu a agee ga, shin er i shighem mkurem sha u m̱ lu tor nahan je kpaa, gadia ior mban, ônov mba Seruya, ve taver ve hembam. TER A̱ or iferor la iyev sha ifer na la." 
2Samuel4:1 Zum u wan u Saulu ungwa er Abiner kpe ken Heberon yô, iyol kpe un; Mbaiserael cii kpaa, kondo ve iyol." 
2Samuel4:2 Wan u Saulu lu a iorov uhar, ve hemen akumautya, iti i u môm er Baana, iti i ugen la er Rekabi, ve lu ônov mba Rimon, Orbeeroti, ken ônov mba Benyamin (gadia i wa Beeroti ken Benyamin je." 
2Samuel4:3 Mbabeeroti yevese yem hen Gitaim ve lu shir ker zan zan nyian). 
2Samuel4:4 Kpa Yonatan wan u Saulu, lu a wan u sombon angahar. Anyom a na lu ataan zum u loho u Saulu man Yonatan va nyôr ken Yesereel la; yô, yese na tôô un nyôngoso a na; er lu nyôngoso zan fele fe fele la, a osough, a gba a sombo. Iti na er Mefibosheti." 
2Samuel4:5 Tsô ônov mba Rimon, Orbeeroti la, Rekabi kua Baana, ve za hen ya u Ishibosheti, oo gera gera, shighe u a lu memen iyange sha tembe la." 
2Samuel4:6 Ve va her a na ken atô ya je, er vea za tôô alakema yô; ve gema ve kuma un kwagh sha uya; tsô Rekabi kua anngô na Baana, ve yevese ve war." 
2Samuel4:7 Er ve nyôr ken ya la, un gema lu yaven sha gambe na ken iyou, nahan ve ta num sha a na ve wua, ve gber un ityough, ve yem a ityough nagh, ve kar sha gbenda u Araba, ve tsa yemen kaka." 
2Samuel4:8 Ve va a ityough ki Ishibosheti hen Davidi hen Heberon, ve kaa a tor er: Nenge ityough ki Ishibosheti wan u Saulu, orihom wou u lu keren we a ku la; nahan nyian yô, TER or iyev i terem tor sha Saulu kua tsombor na." 
2Samuel4:9 Tsô Davidi gema kaa a Rekabi kua a anngô na Baana ônov mba Rimon, Orbeeroti, er: Er TER A lu u uma ne, u A yima uma wam ken hanma ican cii yô," 
2Samuel4:10 iyange orgen va kaam er: Nenge, Saulu kpe, lu henen er un va kaam loho u dedoo je ve, nahan m kôr un m wua un ken Shikelagi, ka injar i m na un sha loho na la," 
2Samuel4:11 man hile hegen u mbaaferev ve za woo ormimi ken ya na sha gambe na je, ve me kera or iyev i awambe na sha a ven me tim ne sha won kera ga yee?" 
2Samuel4:12 Tsô Davidi kaa mbayev nav; nahan ve wua ve, ve tôndo ve ave man angahar, ve hambe ve hen kpe u ber ken Heberon; kpa ve ngohol ityough ki Ishibosheti ve za ii shin uwar u Abiner ken Heberon." 
2Samuel5:1 Tsô ikwe i Iserael cii va hen Davidi hen Heberon, ve va ôr kwagh, ve kaa er: Nenge, se mba ikuhe you, kua inyam you kpaa." 
2Samuel5:2 Sha ayange a tsuaa a Saulu lu tor sha a vese la, lu we je u hemen Iserael, u duen a ve shi u nyôron a ve kpaa ye; man TER kaa a we er: Ka we ú kura ior Av Iserael, shi ka we ú lu orhemen u Iserael kpaa ye." 
2Samuel5:3 Nahan mbatamen mba Iserael cii va hen tor hen Heberon; tor Davidi ya ikur a ve hen Heberon sha ishigh ki TER; nahan ve shighe Davidi mkurem, ve ver un tor sha Iserael." 
2Samuel5:4 Ka zum u Davidi lu anyom ikundugber la, a ya tor ye; a tema tor anyom akunduahar." 
2Samuel5:5 Ken Heberon yô, a lu tor sha Yuda anyom ataankarahar man iwer ataratar; ken Yerusalem yô, a tema tor sha Iserael cii kua Yuda, anyom ikundugber kar atar." 
2Samuel5:6 Tsô tor a ior nav, ve za ken Yerusalem sha u za nôngon ityav a Mbayebushi, mba ve tema ken tar la. Ve kaa a Davidi er: Ú nyôr heen ga, mbaapirashe kua mbasombon tseegh kpaa, vea zenda u; ve lu henen er: Davidi una fatyô u nyôron ker ga." 
2Samuel5:7 Nahan kpaa, Davidi za hemba garutya u Shion, ka gar u Davidi je la." 
2Samuel5:8 Sha iyange la je Davidi kaa er: Hanma or u i sar nan pe hemban Mbayebushi yô, nana̱ kôndo sha akpamnger, nana̱ wua mbaapirashe kua mbasombon mba ve doo Davidi ishima ga la. Ka nahan man i kaa er: Mbaapirashe man mbasombon ve̱ de nyer ken iyou ga ye." 
2Samuel5:9 Davidi za tema ken garutya la, a ii un iti er: Gar u Davidi. Davidi shi maa gar la ningir tser, hii hen Milo zan zan nyôr kimi." 
2Samuel5:10 Nahan Davidi yem hemen hemen, gadia TER, Aôndo u akum a Sha, lu a na." 
2Samuel5:11 Tsô Hiram tor u Tiru tindi mbatyomov hen Davidi a ikon i sedar man mbagbanikon kua mbamaankwagh er ve̱ va maa Davidi iyou. 
2Samuel5:12 Nahan Davidi kav er TER A ver un tor sha Iserael man shi A kende tor na sha kpishi sha ci u ior Nav Iserael yô. 
2Samuel5:13 Davidi shi seer eren kasev mba sha uika kua kasev mbagenev ken Yerusalem zum u a mough hen Heberon kera la; shi a mar ônov mba nomso kua mba kasev. 
2Samuel5:14 Ati a mba a mar ve ken Yerusalem la yô, ka Shamua man Shobabi man Natan man Solomon" 
2Samuel5:15 man Ibehar man Elishua man Nefegi man Yafia 
2Samuel5:16 man Elishama man Eliada kua Elifeleti. 
2Samuel5:17 Zum u Mbafiliti ungwa er ve shighe Davidi mkurem ve kôr un tor sha Iserael yô, Mbafiliti cii kôndo sha u va keren Davidi; tsô Davidi ongo nahan yô, a sen hen garutya." 
2Samuel5:18 Yô, Mbafiliti va va samber shin pev u Refaim." 
2Samuel5:19 Tsô Davidi pine TER, kaa er: M̱ kôndo m̱ za nôngo ityav a Mbafiliti? Ú na ve sha ikev yam shinii? TER kaa a Davidi er: Kôndo; gadia Me na Mbafiliti sha ikev you kpee je." 
2Samuel5:20 Nahan Davidi va hen Baal-perashim; tsô Davidi hemba ve heregh; a kaa er: TER ande nyôr ken mbaihomov av sha ishigh yagh er ka m-ande u mnger yô. Ka nahan man a ii ijiir la iti er, Baal-perashim ye." 
2Samuel5:21 Ve undu akombo ve her; Davidi kua ior nav ve kura a. 
2Samuel5:22 Tsô Mbafiliti shi kôndo, ve samber shin pev u Refaim." 
2Samuel5:23 Zum u Davidi pine TER yô, A kaa er: De kende ga, wa nev ken ijime ve, tsô ú za ta num sha a ve hen atine a balsem." 
2Samuel5:24 Tsô zum u ú ungwa acin sha ityouv mbi ikon i balsem yô, mough fefa, gadia TER kar hemen we sha u za hemban akumautya a Mbafiliti ve." 
2Samuel5:25 Davidi er er TER kaa un nahan; a hemba Mbafiliti, hii hen Geba zan zan za ar hen Geser." 
2Samuel6:1 Tsô Davidi shi kohol uicuwanmbaiorov mba Iserael cii, ior dubu ikundugber." 
2Samuel6:2 Nahan Davidi mough a ior mba ve lu a na imôngo cii, za hen Baal-Yuda, sha u za tôôn areki u Aôndo, u i yer un sha Iti, ka iti i TER u akum a Sha, u A tem sha ucerubi je la." 
2Samuel6:3 Ve penda areki u Aôndo sha ikyekye i he, ve due a mi hen ya u Abinadabi u a lu hen Gibea la; ônov mba Abinadabi Usa man Ahio, ve lu kôôm ikyekye a areki u Aôndo la." 
2Samuel6:4 Ahio kar hemen areki u Aôndo. 
2Samuel6:5 Davidi a ya u Iserael cii, ve gba vinen amar sha ishigh ki TER a ityogholov mbi kuhwan anza kposo kposo mbi i er sha kon u fer yô; umolo man mbaadiguve man ukungkung man mbaakaca man ukwen." 
2Samuel6:6 Zum u ve za ar hen vande u gbiren alakema u Nakon la yô, Usa za uwegh sha areki u Aôndo kôr un, gadia abua nôngo gbev." 
2Samuel6:7 Tsô ishima vihi TER a Usa; Aôndo ta num sha a na hen ijiir la sha kwaghbo na la, a maa a kpe hen kpe u areki u Aôndo la." 
2Samuel6:8 Cier Davidi iyol er TER A ande A te num sha Usa yô, a maa a ii ijiir la iti er Perese-usa zan zan nyian." 
2Samuel6:9 Davidi cia TER sha iyange la je, a kaa er: Á er nan man me va a areki u TER her a mo nahana?" 
2Samuel6:10 Nahan Davidi kera rumun u tôôn areki u TER van a mi her a na ken gar u Davidi ga; kpa Davidi kaha a mi, za a mi ken ya u Obedi-edom, Orgiti." 
2Samuel6:11 Tsô areki u TER lu hen ya u Obedi-edom, Orgiti, iwer itiar; nahan TER ver Obedi-edom doo doo a ya na cii." 
2Samuel6:12 Tsô i va ôr tor Davidi er, TER ver ya u Obedi-edom doo doo kua akaa a na cii, sha ci u areki u Aôndo. Nahan Davidi za tôô areki u Aôndo hen ya u Obedi-edom, va a mi ken gar u Davidi saan saan." 
2Samuel6:13 Er mbatôôn areki u TER la yem er a-avenangahar ataratar nahan yô, a sôngo nombua kua gumbua, a na nagh a mi." 
2Samuel6:14 Nahan Davidi vine amar sha ishigh ki TER sha agee na cii, Davidi zer efodi u sha ikondo i pupuu." 
2Samuel6:15 Kape Davidi man ya u Iserael cii ve va a areki u TER la, a awer a gbiren man ikor i tôngon kpaa kondo kondo la." 
2Samuel6:16 Tsô, er areki u TER va nyôr ken gar u Davidi yô, Mikal wan u Saulu ta ashe hen ianiyoughough za nenge tor Davidi lu tsuwen vinen amar sha ishigh ki TER; tsô a laha un ken ishima." 
2Samuel6:17 Tsô ve nyôr a areki u TER, ve va ver un hen ijiir na, ken atô u tenti u Davidi tim sha ci na la; nahan Davidi na iniav mbi nanden kua iniav mbi bem sha ishigh ki TER." 
2Samuel6:18 Zum u Davidi bee u nan nagh ku nanden kua iniav mbi bem yô, a ver ior doo doo ken iti i TER u akum a Sha." 
2Samuel6:19 Ior cii, ka ikpilaior i Iserael la cii, nomso kua kasev cii, a na hanma or akpekpa man ijuugh ki inyamegh man ijen i atam a wain a ombor. Tsô ior hembe cii, hanma or nan yem hen ya u nan." 
2Samuel6:20 Tsô Davidi hide sha u una ver ior mba hen ya na doo doo yô. Nahan Mikal wan u Saulu due u va keghen Davidi gbenda, a kaa er: Tor u Iserael ngu a icivir sha ashe a ior nyian tsôô, a er akondo kera sha ashe a ikpan i ukase i mbayev nav, vough er gbilinor u lun a kunya ga ka nan gba saghen ikondo nahan!" 
2Samuel6:21 Davidi gema kaa a Mikal er: Ka sha ishigh ki TER je, u A tsoughom, m hemba doon Un a teru man ya na cii la, A verem orhemen u ior mba TER, ka Iserael je la; me ember sha ishigh ki TER." 
2Samuel6:22 Me seer heen iyol yam á hemba heen kpaa, me laha iyol yam; kpa ikpan i ukase i u ter i la, i yô, me lu i a icivir." 
2Samuel6:23 Mikal wan u Saulu mar wan ga, zan zan kar kpen." 
2Samuel7:1 Tsô, er tor tema ken iyou na man er TER na un mmem sha mbaihomov nav cii mba ve kase un la yô," 
2Samuel7:2 tor kaa a profeti Natan er: Nenge, mo m tema ken iyou i ikon i sedar, kpa areki u Aôndo yô, gema ngu tsan ken tenti tsô." 
2Samuel7:3 Tsô Natan gema kaa a tor er: Yô, gba eren akaa a a lu u ken ishima cii, gadia TER ngu a we." 
2Samuel7:4 Tsô hen tugh mbula je, kwaghôron u TER va hen Natan er:" 
2Samuel7:5 Za, za kaa wanakiriki Wam Davidi wer: TER ngu kaan nahan er: We, ú maam iyou i Me tema ker yôô?" 
2Samuel7:6 Gadia hii sha iyange i M due a ônov mba Iserael ken Igipiti la je zan zan nyian, M ngu a tema ken ma iyou ga, kpa ka ken tenti, ka ken tabernakel M lu zenden ye." 
2Samuel7:7 Sha ajiir a M lu zenden a Mbaiserael imôngo la cii, M shi ôr kwagh a ma kwe u Iserael u M ver u sha u u kura ior Av Iserael la, Mer: Ka nyi ne maam iyou i sha ikon i sedar ga, kpa?" 
2Samuel7:8 Yô, za kaa wanakiriki Wam Davidi nahan wer, TER u akum a Sha ngu kaa nahan er: M tôô u hen ijiir i ilev yan toho, ken ijime i uile Mer, hingir or u hemen ior Av, Iserael;" 
2Samuel7:9 man M lu a we her ape u zenden cii, M tim mbaihomov ou sha ishigh you kera cii; Me er iti you ia za gwa er iti i uzegembaiorov mba ve lu sha won nahan." 
2Samuel7:10 Shi Me ver ijiir sha ci u ior Av Iserael, Me môôr ve, sha u ve̱ tema hen ijiir ve ayol a ve, á kera num ve ga; ônov mba aferev kpaa vea kera za ve iyol er tsuaa la nahan ga," 
2Samuel7:11 er hii sha ayange a M ver mbaajiriv Mer, ve̱ nengen sha ior Av Iserael la; Me na u, ú mem sha mbaihomov ou cii. Man shi TER ngu kaan a we er: TER Una maa u ya." 
2Samuel7:12 Zum u ayange ou á bee, ú yav a uter ou imôngo yô, Me ver wan wou ken ijime you u una due ken iyol you je yô, Me taver tor na." 
2Samuel7:13 Ka un una maa iyou sha ci u iti Yam ye, Mo kpaa Me ver ikônough nagh ki torough kia lu gbem." 
2Samuel7:14 Me lu Ter na, un di una lu wan Wam; aluer una er ifer yô, Me tsaha un sha akpa u or kua gbidiv mbu ônov mba iorov kpaa;" 
2Samuel7:15 kpa erdoo Wam una kar hen na kera ga, er M ngohol un hen Saulu, u M kar a na sha ishigh you kera la nahan ga." 
2Samuel7:16 Ya wou kua tartor wou vea tile dông sha ishigh you gbem; ikônough you ki torough kia lu her gbem sha won. 
2Samuel7:17 Ka sha akaaôron ne cii, kua mpase ne cii kpaa, Natan a ôr kwagh a Davidi ye." 
2Samuel7:18 Tsô tor Davidi nyôr za tema sha ishigh ki TER; a kaa er: Mo m ngu nyi, Tere AÔNDO, ya wam ngu di nyi je, man U korom zan zan hegene?" 
2Samuel7:19 Kwagh ne kpaa ka kwagh u kiriki sha ashe Ou tsô, Tere AÔNDO, U ter kwagh u ya u wanakiriki Wou sha ayange a ken hemen ca je, ngu ka tindi sha ci u ior je, Tere AÔNDO." 
2Samuel7:20 Ka nyi je Davidi una shi á seer kaan We? Gadia U fa wanakiriki Wou, Tere AÔNDO." 
2Samuel7:21 Sha ci u kwaghôron Wou man sha ishima You kpaa, U er zegekwagh ne cii, man U ne wanakiriki Wou a fe un yô." 
2Samuel7:22 Ka nahan man U hembe ye, TER Aôndo, or u kuman sha a We nan ngu ga, ma Aôndo ugen kpaa ngu ga, saa We, sha akaa a se ongo sha ato ase cii." 
2Samuel7:23 Ka hanma ikurior igen sha won i lu er ior Ou Iserael nahana, i Aôndo A za yem i er i̱ hingir ior Nav jim, sha u iti Na i̱ za sha won, man sha u Una er uzegembaakaav sha ci ve kua akaa a cieryol sha ci u tar Wou, sha ishigh ki ior Ou, mba U yem ve sha ci Wou ken Igipiti sha ikev i atôatyev man mbaaôndo veve?" 
2Samuel7:24 Shi U ver ior Ou Iserael Wer, ve̱ lu ior Ou gbem sha won; We TER, U hingir Aôndo ve." 
2Samuel7:25 Yô, TERE Aôndo, kwaghôron Wou u U er sha wanakiriki Wou kua ya na la, taver un gbem, er kwagh u U kaa la," 
2Samuel7:26 sha er i̱ kende a iti You sha gbem, er i kaan er: TER u akum a Sha ka Aôndo u Iserael; ya u wanakiriki Wou Davidi kpaa una lu sha ishigh You taveraa." 
2Samuel7:27 Gadia We TER u akum a Sha, Aôndo u Iserael, U pase wanakiriki Wou Wer, Me maa u ya, ka nahan man wanakiriki Wou a sen U kwagh ne vangertiôr ye." 
2Samuel7:28 Hegen yô, Ter AÔNDO, We U ngu Aôndo, akaaôron Ou kpaa ka a mimi, U tôndo zwa a wanakiriki Wou sha kwagh u doon ne;" 
2Samuel7:29 yô, rumun, ver ya u wanakiriki Wou, a̱ tsôr sha ishigh You gbem; gadia We Ter AÔNDO, U kaa nahan; sha iveren You i dedoo la ya u wanakiriki Wou a̱ lu a iveren gbem sha won." 
2Samuel8:1 Tsô ken masejime la Davidi hemba Mbafiliti, ve hingir sha ikev na, man Davidi ngohol tahav mbu gar u tamen sha ikev i Mbafiliti kera." 
2Samuel8:2 A hemba Mbamoabi kpaa, a er ve, ve yav inya, a kar ve sha ikaren; a kar uikaren uhar sha ci u wuan man ikaren môm sha ci u den ve uma. Nahan Mbamoabi hingir sha ikev i Davidi, ve taan un kpandegh." 
2Samuel8:3 Davidi shi hemba Hada-deser wan u Rehobi, tor u Soba, zum u a lu zan sha u una za ngohol tar na u tsuaa hen ifi u Uferati la." 
2Samuel8:4 Davidi ngohol un mbaanyinyav dubu man deri utaankaruhar, man mbazanangahar dubu ikundu; Davidi tôndo anyinya a kperan akeke cii igbela i akishiangahar, kpa a tsegha anyinya agen kuma sha akeke deri." 
2Samuel8:5 Er Mbashiria mba sha Damaseku va u wasen Hada-deser tor u Soba la yô, Davidi wua Mbashiria ior dubu ikundu kar uhar." 
2Samuel8:6 Tsô Davidi maa ver mbautyav mba kuran ken Shiria u Damaseku; Mbashiria hingir sha ikev i Davidi, ve taan un kpandegh. TER na Davidi mhembe hanma ijiir i una za cii." 
2Samuel8:7 Davidi kura iperutya i zenaria i ior mba Hada-deser lu a mi la, a va a mi ken Yerusalem." 
2Samuel8:8 Ken Beta kua Beroti, agar a Hada-deser la kpaa, tor Davidi kura utogula heregh kpishi." 
2Samuel8:9 Zum u Toi, tor u Hamati ungwa er Davidi hemba akumautya a Hada-deser cii yô," 
2Samuel8:10 nahan Toi tindi wan na Yoram, hen tor Davidi er a̱ za sugh un shi a̱ wuese un kpaa, er a nenge ityav a Hada-deser a hembe un yô; gadia Hada-deser lu or u nôngon ityav a Toi keke. Yoram va na un ikav mbi azurfa man mbi zenaria kua mbi togula kpaa;" 
2Samuel8:11 mbila kpaa tor Davidi tsegha mbi sha ci u TER, seer sha azurfa kua zenaria mba a kura ken akuraior a a hemba a la cii," 
2Samuel8:12 ka hen Shiria man Moabi man Mbaamon man Mbafiliti man Amaleki je la; kua ishar i Hada-deser, wan u Rehobi, tor u Soba kpaa." 
2Samuel8:13 Davidi za iti; er a za hemba Mbashiria shin pev u Bar, a hile yô, a wua ior dubu pue kar anigheni." 
2Samuel8:14 Shi a ver mbautyav mba kuran ken Edom; ken tar u Edom cii, a ver mbakuran; Mbaedom cii hingir sha ikev i Davidi. TER na Davidi mhembe hanma ijiir i una za cii." 
2Samuel8:15 Davidi tema tor sha Iserael cii; Davidi ôron ior nav cii ijir sha mimi. 
2Samuel8:16 Yoabi wan u Seruya lu a akumautya sha ikev; Yehoshafati wan u Ahiludi lu or u ngeren abaver ken takerada; 
2Samuel8:17 Sadoki, wan u Ahitubi man Ahimeleki, wan u Abiatar, ve lu upristi, Seraia lu orngeren;" 
2Samuel8:18 Benaia wan u Yehoyada lu a Mbakereti man Mbapeleti sha ikev; ônov mba Davidi gema lu atiator. 
2Samuel9:1 Tsô Davidi kaa er: Ma or shi shi hen ya u Saulu sha u me er a nan dedoo sha ci u Yonatan je kpa? 
2Samuel9:2 Wanye ugen lu hen ya u Saulu iti na er Shiba; i yila un a va hen Davidi, tor pine un er: Ka we Shiba nee? A kaa er: Ka mo wanye wou je ne." 
2Samuel9:3 Tor pine er: Ma or shi shi hen ya u Saulu u me er a nan dedoo sha erdoo u Aôndo gaa? Shiba kaa a tor er: Wan u Yonatan shi, kpa a sombo angahar." 
2Samuel9:4 Tor pine un er: Ngu hana? Shiba gema kaa a tor er: Ngu ken ya u Makir wan u Amiel ken Lodebar. 
2Samuel9:5 Tsô tor Davidi tindi i za tôô un hen ya u Makir wan u Amiel ken Lodebar. 
2Samuel9:6 Nahan Mefibosheti, wan u Yonatan, wan u Saulu, va hen Davidi, va gure kuma ishigh inya civir un. Davidi kaa a na er: Mefibosheti. A rumun er: Mo wanakiriki wou ne!" 
2Samuel9:7 Davidi kaa a na er: De cie ga, gadia mimi je me er a we dedoo sha ci u teru Yonatan; me hide u a tar u teru, Saulu, cii; ú ya kwagh sha tebul wam gbem." 
2Samuel9:8 Tsô a gure a civir, a kaa er: Wanakiriki wou ngu di nyi, u kenger un, mo u m lu iwa i kpen nee?" 
2Samuel9:9 Nahan tor yila Shiba, wanakiriki u Saulu la, kaa a na er: Kwagh u ngise lu u Saulu cii kua ya na cii kpaa, m na wan u orvesen wou ne." 
2Samuel9:10 Kahan un sule, we a ônov ou kua mbashilen we; vaan a iyiav kpaa sha u wan u orvesen wou a̱ zuan a kwaghyan yô; Mefibosheti wan u orvesen wou yô, una yaan kwagh sha tebul wam gbem. Yô, Shiba lu a ônov mba nomso pue kar utaan man mba shilen un ikundu." 
2Samuel9:11 Tsô Shiba kaa a tor er: Kwagh u terem tor a kaa wanakiriki na yô, kape wanakiriki wou una er je la. Nahan Mefibosheti gema yaan kwagh sha tebul u Davidi, er ka ma wan u tor nahan." 
2Samuel9:12 Mefibosheti lu a wan u nomso u kiriki iti na er Mika. Mba ve lu hen ya u Shiba cii yô, ve lu mba shilen Mefibosheti." 
2Samuel9:13 Nahan Mefibosheti tema ken Yerusalem; gadia yaan kwagh sha tebul u tor gbem. Un lu or u sombon angahar cii. 
2Samuel10:1 Tsô ken masejime la, tor u Mbaamon kpe, nahan Hanun wan na gema tema tor sha ityough nagh." 
2Samuel10:2 Nahan Davidi kaa er: Me er a Hanun wan u Nahashi dedoo, er ter na kpaa lu eren a mo dedoo nahan. Tsô Davidi tindi mbayev nav er ve̱ za yar un ku u ter na la. Nahan mbayev mba Davidi za nyôr hen tar u Mbaamon." 
2Samuel10:3 Kpa atiator a Mbaamon gema kaa a ter ve Hanun er: U ngu fan wer, Davidi ngu civir teru, sha er a tindi mbayaren we ku yôô? Davidi kera tindi mbayev nav hen a we ka sha u ve̱ va nenge aker, ve̱ fa akaa a ken gar, man ve̱ va hembe un kpaa gaa?" 
2Samuel10:4 Nahan Hanun kôr mbayev mba Davidi hondo ve indyer vegher môm môm shi tôndo ve uriga hen atô sha asenatôôgh je, tsô a na ve gbenda." 
2Samuel10:5 Zum u i va kaa Davidi nahan yô, a tindi i za kegh ve gbenda; gadia kunya kôr ior mbala mimi. Tor kaa er: Hila lu nen ken Yeriko zan zan indyer yen i̱ kar menden man né hide ye." 
2Samuel10:6 Zum u Mbaamon nenge er ve hingir kwagh u duen Davidi ishima yô, ve Mbaamon, ve tindi i goho Mbashiria mba hen Bete-rehobi kua Mbashiria mba hen Soba, ior dubu ikundu mba zan angahar, man tor u Maaka a ior dubu, kua ior i Tobi, ior dubu pue kar uhar." 
2Samuel10:7 Zum u Davidi ungwa kwagh la yô, a tindi Yoabi a ikumutya cii, lu anomaior cii." 
2Samuel10:8 Tsô Mbaamon due, tange ityav hen hundagar; Mbashiria mba hen Soba man mba hen Rehobi man ior mba Tobi kua Maaka, ve lu ijiir ve kposo ken ikôngo." 
2Samuel10:9 Zum u Yoabi nenge er i himbir un sha utya ken hemen kua ken ijime kpaa yô, a tsuwa ior ken uicuwanmbaiorov mba ken Iserael cii, a samber ve sha u ve̱ nôngo ityav a Mbashiria;" 
2Samuel10:10 ior mba ve shi la a gema a wa ve sha ikev i anngô na, Abishai, ve di kpaa a samber ve sha u ve̱ nôngo ityav a Mbaamon." 
2Samuel10:11 Nahan a kaa er: Aluer Mbashiria vea hemban mo yô, we ú va wasem; kpa aluer Mbaamon vea hemban we yô, mo di me va wase u." 
2Samuel10:12 Yô, taver nen ishima sé lu nen nomso, sha ci u ior asev man sha ci u agar a Aôndo wase; TER A̱ er kwagh u A doo Un yô." 
2Samuel10:13 Tsô Yoabi kua ior mba ve lu a na, ve kporom sha u nôngon ityav a Mbashiria, maa ve yevese un." 
2Samuel10:14 Zum u Mbaamon nenge Mbashiria mba ngur yevese yô, ve di kpaa ve yevese Abishai, ve za nyôr ken gar. Tsô Yoabi de Mbaamon, a hide ken Yerusalem." 
2Samuel10:15 Zum u Mbashiria nenge er ve yina sha Iserael yô, ve kohol." 
2Samuel10:16 Hada-deser tindi i za kua a Mbashiria mba ve lu Ifi yande la yô; tsô ve va ar hen Helam; Shobaki kurutya u akumautya a Hada-deser hemen ve. 
2Samuel10:17 I va ôr Davidi kwagh la, nahan a kohol Iserael cii, a per Yordan, a za hen Helam. Nahan Mbashiria tange ityav a Davidi, ve nôngo ityav a na." 
2Samuel10:18 Mbashiria gema yevese Iserael, Davidi wua Mbashiria mba sha akeke ior deri utaankaruhar man mbaanyinyav ior dubu akunduahar; a gber Shobaki kurutya ve la avav je maa a kpe her." 
2Samuel10:19 Zum u utor mba ve lu sha ikev i Hada-deser la, ve nenge er ve yina sha Iserael nahan yô, ve hime iyongo a Iserael, ve hingir sha ikev na. Nahan Mbashiria cia u shi wasen Mbaamon." 
2Samuel11:1 Tsô sha inyom i he, sha shighe u utor ka ve zaan ityav la yô, Davidi tindi Yoabi a mbashilen un kua Iserael cii; ve za tim Mbaamon, ve za kase Raba sha utya. Kpa Davidi yô, lu ken Yerusalem." 
2Samuel11:2 Tsô er iyange i bee yô, Davidi mough sha gambe na gba zenden sha tembeyough u sha u tor; a ta ashe sha tembeyough u sha la, a nenge kwase lu ôôn iyol; kwase la doo ashe tsung." 
2Samuel11:3 Tsô Davidi tindi er i̱ za pine kwagh u kwase la. Orgen kaa er: Kera ka Batesheba wan u Eliam, kwase u Uria Orhiti ne gaa?" 
2Samuel11:4 Tsô Davidi tindi mbatyomov za kua a na; ve hen a na yô, a yav a na (gadia a sember wanger iyol na sha mlu na u wang ga la). Tsô a hide hen ya na." 
2Samuel11:5 Kwase la maa jile iyol; nahan a tindi Davidi loho er: M wa iyav. 
2Samuel11:6 Tsô Davidi tindi loho hen Yoabi, kaa er: Tindi Uria Orhiti la a̱ va her a mo. Tsô Yoabi tindi Uria va hen Davidi." 
2Samuel11:7 Zum u Uria va hen Davidi yô, a pine un mlu u Yoabi kua mlu u ior cii, man er ityav mbi lu yô." 
2Samuel11:8 Nahan Davidi gema kaa a Uria er: Za hen ya wou, za ôô angahar. Tsô Uria due hen ya u tor, i tindi un a iwua i cir un a mi ijime." 
2Samuel11:9 Kpa Uria tsa hen hunda u ya u tor a ior mba ter na imôngo, a za hen ya na je ga." 
2Samuel11:10 Kpa er i za kaa Davidi er: Uria za hen ya na ga yô, Davidi kaa a Uria er: Ka ken zende u za hir gaa? Man ka nyi u ze hen ya wou ga?" 
2Samuel11:11 Uria gema kaa a Davidi er: Areki man Iserael kua Yuda mba tsan ken atumbe; terem Yoabi man mbashilen terem mba ken afo ken toho, man mo m̱ gema m̱ yem hen ya wam, m̱ za ya kwagh m̱ ma kwagh shi m̱ tsa a kwase wama? Er u lu uma ne, m bum uma wou, mayange me er nahan ga." 
2Samuel11:12 Nahan Davidi kaa a Uria er: Yô, nyian kpaa tsa tsô, kper me na u gbenda. Tsô Uria shi tsa hen Yerusalem sha iyange la." 
2Samuel11:13 Kper nan Davidi yila un, a va ya kwagh shi a ma kwagh a na imôngo, tsô a gba hunden; iyange been yô, a due a za yav sha gambe na a mbashilen ter na imôngo, kpa hen ya na yô, a za ga." 
2Samuel11:14 Tsô kper nan pepe yô, Davidi nger Yoabi washika, tindi Uria a min." 
2Samuel11:15 Ken washika shon la a nger a kaa er: Ver Uria ken hemen henpe ityav mbi hembe taver yô, hide nen ijime undu nen un, sha u i̱ wua un yô." 
2Samuel11:16 Tsô zum u Yoabi lu nengen mker u gar la yô, a ver Uria henpe a fe anomaior a mimi a lu yô." 
2Samuel11:17 Tsô ior mba ken gar la due, va nôngo ityav a Yoabi; nahan mba shilen Davidi mbagenev kpe: Uria Orhiti la kpaa kpe." 
2Samuel11:18 Nahan Yoabi tindi loho i za ôr Davidi akaa a a er ken utya cii; 
2Samuel11:19 shi a kaa ortyom la er: Zum u ú ôr tor akaa a a er ken utya cii yô," 
2Samuel11:20 man aluer ishima á vihi tor, je una pine u er: Ka nyi ne nenge ityav ne mgbôghom a gar ikua ikua nahana? Ne fa er vea tile sha gilgar vea ker gaa?" 
2Samuel11:21 Ka anti iyange nan ta Abimeleki wan u Yerubesheti? Kera lu kwase man tile sha gilgar ta un anishwa a kpe hen Tebeshi ye gaa? Inja na nan ne ze ikua ikua a gilgar nahana? Yô, Shighe la ú kaa wer, wanakiriki wou Uria, Orhiti, la kpaa, a kpe." 
2Samuel11:22 Tsô ortyom la yem za ôr Davidi kwagh u Yoabi a tindi un a mi la cii. 
2Samuel11:23 Ortyom la za kaa a Davidi er: Ior mbala hemba se, ve due ve va kohol se ken ikôngo je, se daa ve, se za ar hen hundagar je." 
2Samuel11:24 Mbakeren avaan sha gilgar ta mbayev ou; mbayev mba tor mbagenev kpe, wanakiriki wou Uria, Orhiti la kpaa, kpe." 
2Samuel11:25 Tsô Davidi kaa a ortyom la er: Za kaa Yoabi nahan, wer, kwagh la a̱ de kera vihin we ishima ga, gadia sanker gbe yan tsô, sange a sange ga; yô, seer nôngon nen ityav a gar la zan zan hemba nen un; za taver un ishima nahan." 
2Samuel11:26 Zum u kwase u Uria ungwa er nom na Uria kpe yô, a vaa ku u nom na." 
2Samuel11:27 Er shighe u zungwen ku la bee yô, Davidi tindi i za kua a na, i va a na hen ya na, a maa a hingir kwase na, a mar un wan u nomso. Kpa kwagh u Davidi er la yô, vihi TER ishima." 
2Samuel12:1 Tsô TER tindi Natan hen Davidi. Nahan a va her a na, a va kaa a na er: Iyange ior ihiar lu ken gar ugen, or môm lu ornyar, or môm lu icanor." 
2Samuel12:2 Ornyar la lu a akum a iyôngo kua ibua kpishi; 
2Samuel12:3 kpa icanor la lu a kwagh ga, lu di a antuleiyôngo u a yam a koso, a vese hen na a mbayev nav; yaan kwaghyan a na imôngo, maan kwagh shin iyongo na, a yav un sha ikum, hingir un vough er wan na u kwase nahan." 
2Samuel12:4 Tsô iyange igen or va ornyar la inya, a tange iyôngo na kua ibua na la, a sôngo orvannya u a ve her a na la kwagh ga, kpa a gema a kôr antuleiyôngo u icanor la, a za sôngo orvannya na la." 
2Samuel12:5 Nahan ishima vihi Davidi kpishi a or la; a kaa a Natan er: M bum er TER A lu u uma ne, or u nan er nahan la, nan kuma ku;" 
2Samuel12:6 man shi nana kimbi tuleiyôngo la, nana na iyôngo inyiin, sha ci u nan er kwagh ne, mhôônom kpaa ma ker nan ga yô." 
2Samuel12:7 Tsô Natan gema kaa a Davidi er: Ka we je, u lu or shon ye! TER, Aôndo u Iserael, ngu kaan nahan er: Mo M shighe u mkurem u hingir tor u Iserael, Mo M yima u sha ikev i Saulu kpaa;" 
2Samuel12:8 M na u ya u teru kua kasev mba teru kpaa sha ikum you, M shi M na u ya u Iserael kua u Yuda; man a yen u kpaa ma M seer we akaa agen sha mi." 
2Samuel12:9 Man ka nyi u laha kwaghôron u TER, u er iferkwagh ne sha ashe Na nahana? U wua Uria Orhiti sha sanker, u tôô kwase na a hingir kwase wou; u wua un sha sanker u Mbaamon." 
2Samuel12:10 Nahan hegen yô, sanker una kar hen ya wou kera ga; sha ci u u laham u tee kwase u Uria Orhiti a hingir kwase wou yô." 
2Samuel12:11 TER ngu kaan nahan er: Nenge, Me na kwagh u bo una mough ken ya wou una tser u, Me tôô kasev ou sha ashe ou je, Me na orwanndor a we, nana yav a kasev ou atetan ken igbar je." 
2Samuel12:12 Gadia we u er kwagh ne myer; kpa Mo yô, Me er kwagh ne sha ashe a Iserael cii, ken igbar atetan je." 
2Samuel12:13 Davidi gema kaa a Natan er: M er TER kwaghbo. Nahan Natan kaa a Davidi er: TER de u kwaghbo wou, ú kpe ga." 
2Samuel12:14 Nahan kpaa er u ne mbaihomov mba TER ityôkwagh i nan ityuhwanev kpishi sha kwagh ne yô, wan u u mar la, una kpe kpee." 
2Samuel12:15 Tsô Natan mough yem ken ya na. Nahan TER er wan u kwase u Uria mar a Davidi la ican, angev kôr un ngegh." 
2Samuel12:16 Davidi sôn Aôndo sha ci u wan la; shi Davidi hôr kwaghyan, a nyôr a yav hen inya zan zan sev kar aven." 
2Samuel12:17 Nahan mbatamen mba hen ya na mough, va tile her a na sha u a̱ mough hen inya sha yô, kpa a venda, kwaghyan tsô kpaa a ya a ve imôngo ga." 
2Samuel12:18 Tsô sha iyange i sha utaankaruhar la, wan la kpe. Cier mbashilen Davidi iyol u kaan un ku u wan la; gadia ve kaa er: Nenge, er wan la lu uma je kpaa se ôr kwagh a na, kpa a wa imo yase iko ga, man hile hegen u wan ne a kpe, sé kaa un yô, ishima ia vihi un ga yee?" 
2Samuel12:19 Kpa zum u Davidi nenge er mbashilen un ve lu ôron kwagh ivarivase ayol a ve yô, Davidi kav er wan la a kpe yô; nahan Davidi pine mbayev nav er: Wan shon kpee? Ve kaa er: Een, a saa." 
2Samuel12:20 Nahan Davidi kighir hen inya mough, za ôô iyol, shighe mkurem iyol, haa akondo agen, a za nyôr ken iyou i TER, a gure inya; tsô a hide hen ya na; zum u a sôn kwaghyan yô, i va ver un, a ya je." 
2Samuel12:21 Nahan mbashilen un pine un er: Ka nyi kwagh u er nee? U hôr kwaghyan sha mlia je sha ci u wan ne, zum u a lu uma la; kpa er wan ne a kpe yô, u mough u ya kwagh." 
2Samuel12:22 A kaa er: Er wan ne lu uma yô, m hôr kwaghyan m vaa kpaa, gadia m kaa mer, alaghga TER Una zungwem mhôônom, wan ne una lu uma." 
2Samuel12:23 Man er hegen a kpe kera yô, ka sha ci u nyi man me hôr kwaghyana? Me shi me fatyô me hide a na kpa? Ka mo me za her a na ye, kpa un yô, una hide her a mo ga." 
2Samuel12:24 Nahan Davidi sur kwase na Batesheba ishima, a nyôr her a na, a tsa a na; a mar wan u nomso, a ii un iti er Solomon. A doo TER ishima;" 
2Samuel12:25 A tindi profeti Natan er a̱ za ii un iti er: Yedidia, sha ci u TER." 
2Samuel12:26 Yô, Yoabi nôngo ityav a Raba u Mbaamon, a za hemba gar u tor la." 
2Samuel12:27 Nahan Yoabi tindi mbatyomov hen Davidi, kaa er: M nôngo ityav a Raba, m ngohol gar u mnger la je." 
2Samuel12:28 Yô, kohol ase ior mba ve shi cii, haa afoautya kase gar la, ngohol un; sha er mo m̱ de hembe gar shon man i̱ ii un iti sha iti yam ga." 
2Samuel12:29 Tsô Davidi kohol ior cii, za hen Raba, za nôngo ityav a na, ngohol un." 
2Samuel12:30 A bugh tor ve la idyer i tor kera, myohom ma i lu talenti u zenaria môm, iwen i injaa lu sha mi; i gema i i cir Davidi sha ityou, shi a kura ishar i ken gar la ngee je zua ga." 
2Samuel12:31 A due a ior mba ve lu ker la a na ve tom u eren sha uzerto, man sha ucanca mba iyôôv, man sha azembe a iyôô, man shi a na ve tom u sôôn akam. Kape a er a agar a Mbaamon cii la. Nahan Davidi kua ior cii, ve hide hen Yerusalem." 
2Samuel13:1 Tsô ken masejime la yô, Abesalom wan u Davidi lu a anmgbian u kwase u doon ashe, iti na er Tamar; man a gema a doo Amnon wan u Davidi ishima." 
2Samuel13:2 Kwagh ne nyôr Amnon ken ishima hingir angev sha ci u anngô na u kwase Tamar, gadia lu iniunkwase, man lu Amnon ican u una er kwagh a na." 
2Samuel13:3 Kpa Amnon lu a ikar iti na er Yonadabi wan u Shimea, anmgbian u Davidi; man un Yonadabi la lu or u ayomough kpishi." 
2Samuel13:4 A pine un er: Ka nyi we wan u tor man u kanden a kande gbem nahana? U rumun u kaan mo gaa? Amnon kaa a na er: Tamar anngô u anngôm Abesalom doom ishima. 
2Samuel13:5 Tsô Yonadabi kaa a na er: Yô yav sha gambe wou er u ngu uange nahan, tsô shighe u teru una va sha u va nengen we yô, kaa a na wer, anngôm u kwase Tamar ma a shi ve ma a va nem kwaghyan ma m ye, a̱ er kwaghyan sha ishigh yagh sha u me nenge, shi me ya sha uwegh nagh kpaa yô." 
2Samuel13:6 Nahan Amnon za yav er ngu uange yô, zum u tor va sha u va nengen un yô, Amnon kaa a tor er: Anngôm Tamar a̱ shi va, a̱ va erem umasa uhar sha ishigh yagh, sha er me ya sha uwegh nagh." 
2Samuel13:7 Tsô Davidi tindi loho za hen Tamar ken iyou, a kaa er: Za hen ya u anngôu Amnon za er un kwaghyan." 
2Samuel13:8 Nahan Tamar za hen ya u anngô na Amnon; yô lu yaven heregh. A tôô mwem a hôr a er umasa sha ashe na, a kaa umasa mbala." 
2Samuel13:9 A shir icenge, a haa ve sha ishigh nagh, kpa a venda u yan. Amnon gema kaa er: Ior cii ve̱ due ve nam ian. Nahan ior cii due na un ian." 
2Samuel13:10 Tsô Amnon kaa a Tamar er: Va a kwaghyan ken iyou i yaven sha er me ya sha uwegh ough yô. Nahan Tamar tôô umasa mba a kaa la, a va a mi ken iyou i yaven hen anngô na Amnon." 
2Samuel13:11 Ve a mi ikua ikua sha u a̱ ya yô, a kor un, a kaa a na er: Va va yav a mo, anngôm." 
2Samuel13:12 A gema a kaa a na er: Ei, anngôm, de heen mo nahan ga; gadia doo u á er imbakwagh ne ken Iserael ga; de eren ibumekwagh nahan ga." 
2Samuel13:13 Mo yô, me za yer kunya wam hana? Man we kpaa, ú hingir gbilinor ken Iserael je. Yô, shi ôr kwagh a tor tsô, gadia una nyume u mo ga." 
2Samuel13:14 Nahan kpaa, a rumun u ungwan kwaghôron na la ga, kpa er a hemba un agee yô, a yav a na, a hee un." 
2Samuel13:15 Nahan Tamar mase vihin Amnon ishima tsung, mvihi u a vihi un ishima la, hemba mdoo u iyange a doo un tsuaa la. Nahan Amnon kaa a na er: Mough, due kera." 
2Samuel13:16 Kpa a kaa a na er: Ei, nahan ga, gadia kwaghbo u u er, u zendem ne, hemba u u vande eren mo la. Kpa a venda imo na." 
2Samuel13:17 Tsô a yila wanakiriki na u eren un tom, a kaa a na er: Duem a kwase ne kera, kôr hunda wuhe." 
2Samuel13:18 A lu a riga iyol u vesen u lihen ave, gadia ka anza a uriga angan ônov mba tor mba kasev mba ve lu anuunaukase ve haan ye. Tsô ortom na la due a na kera, a kôr hunda a wuhe." 
2Samuel13:19 Nahan Tamar haa mtwem sha ityou, shi a ande riga na u lihen ave u a haa iyol la, shi a kaa uwegh sha ityou, gba vaan genger genger yemen." 
2Samuel13:20 Tsô anngô na Abesalom pine un er: Ka Amnon anngôu, a lu a we yee? Kpa hegen yô huan ayôôso anngôm; ka angôu je; de luun a kwagh ne ken ishima you ga. Nahan Tamar maa gba teman ken ya u anngô na Abesalom er kwase u i te nan kera nahan." 
2Samuel13:21 Zum u tor Davidi ungwa kwagh la nahan, ishima vihi un mimi." 
2Samuel13:22 Kpa Abesalom ôr kwagh a Amnon ga, shin u dedoo shin u bo kpaa ga; gadia Abesalom kôr Amnon ihom sha ci u a hee anngô na Tamar yô." 
2Samuel13:23 Tsô anyom nga kar ahar yô, Abesalom lu a mbatôndon iyôngo aive ken Baal-hasor u ken Eferaim la; nahan Abesalom lôhô ônov mba tor cii iniongo." 
2Samuel13:24 Tsô Abesalom va hen tor va kaa er: Nenge, wanakiriki wou ngu a mbatôndon iyôngo aive yô, tor kua mbatomov nav ve̱ shi za vea wanakiriki wou imôngo." 
2Samuel13:25 Tsô tor kaa a Abesalom er: Ei, wan wam, ka se cii sé za ga, nahan sé za za u iyol yum. A za un iyol, nahan kpaa a rumun u zan ga, kpa a ver un doo doo tsô." 
2Samuel13:26 Tsô Abesalom kaa er: Man a̱ lu nahan ga yô, shi de, anngôm Amnon a̱ za a vese imôngo. Nahan tor pine un er: Inja na nan man a̱ za a we imôngo?" 
2Samuel13:27 Kpa Abesalom za un iyol zan zan a de Amnon a ônov mba tor cii ve za a na imôngo. 
2Samuel13:28 Tsô Abesalom kaa a mbatomov nav er: Ver nen ishima, shighe u Amnon una va hingir saan saan sha wain yô, mea kaa a ven mer, wua nen Amnon yô, wua nen un je, de cie nen ga; ka mo m ne ne zwa ye gaa? Taver nen ishima lu nen icihi." 
2Samuel13:29 Nahan mbatomov mba Abesalom er a Amnon er Abesalom na ve zwa nahan. Tsô ônov mba tor cii hembe, hanmô henda alfadari u nan yevese." 
2Samuel13:30 Er ve lu sha gbenda la je, Davidi ungwa er: Abesalom wua ônov mba tor cii, mô ve môm shi ga." 
2Samuel13:31 Tsô tor kighir mough, ande akondo na, yav hen inya; mbatomov nav cii kpaa va tile a na her a akondo a anden iyol." 
2Samuel13:32 Kpa Yonadabi wan u Shimea, anmgbian u Davidi la, gema kaa er: Terem a̱ de henen er i wua mbayev, ônov mba tor cii ga, ka Amnon tseegh a kpe ye; gadia ishigh ki Abesalom tese kwagh la hii sha iyange i a hee Tamar, anngô na u kwase la je." 
2Samuel13:33 Yô, kwagh ne a̱ de luun terem tor ken ishima, henen er ônov mba tor cii ve kpe ga; gadia ka Amnon tseegh a kpe ye." 
2Samuel13:34 Nahan Abesalom yevese. Tsô wanye u kuran la, ta ashe za nenge ior kpishi lu van sha gbenda u karen hen igungu ken ijime na." 
2Samuel13:35 Nahan Yonadabi kaa a tor er: Nenge, ônov mba tor mbala van la; er wanakiriki wou a kaa la, ka nahan vough." 
2Samuel13:36 Tsô kur kwaghôron yô, ônov mba tor va nyôr, ve ger mliam, ve gba vaan; tor a mbatomov nav cii kpaa ve gba vaan tsung." 
2Samuel13:37 Kpa Abesalom yevese, yem hen Talmai wan u Amihur, tor u Geshur. Davidi gba zungwen ku u wan na ayange ayange." 
2Samuel13:38 Kape Abesalom yevese la, a yem hen Geshur, a za lu ker anyom atar." 
2Samuel13:39 Tsô gba saren tor Davidi ken ishima tsung u Abesalom ma a hidi; gadia ishima pever un sha kwagh u Amnon, er a kpe kera yô." 
2Samuel14:1 Er Yoabi wan u Seruya kav er ishima i lu tor sha Abesalom yô," 
2Samuel14:2 Yoabi tindi loho hen Tekoa, i za va un a kwase u fan kwagh, a kaa a kwase la er: Shi er er u ngu zungwen ku nahan, ta ikondo uya, mkurem kpaa de shigh iyol ga, kpa er, er kwase u a zungu ku ica i gbe yô." 
2Samuel14:3 Yô, za hen tor, za ôr un kwagh nahan nahan. Tsô Yoabi tam kwaghôron wa un ken zwa." 
2Samuel14:4 Zum u kwase u Tekoa la, va nyôr hen tor yô, a gure a kuma ishigh inya, a sugh, a kaa er: Ahii! Tor wasem!" 
2Samuel14:5 Tor gema pine un er: Ka nyi i tser uwe? A gema a kaa er: M ngu kwasecôghol, nomom saa," 
2Samuel14:6 man kpan wou u kwase ne lu a ônov uhar mba nomso, man ve mba uhar ve za nôngo num ken ityev, or u kôron ve num lu ga, nahan u môm gema wua ugen." 
2Samuel14:7 Man nenge, ityô cii mough num a kpan wou u kwase ne, ve kaa er: Un u a woo anngô na la, na se un, sé wua sha ci u uma u anngô na u a woo la, sé wua u yan dyako la kpaa, kape i sar ve u pirin mo anikausu u a shim her ne, er nomon a̱ de lu a iti shin tsombor sha won ga." 
2Samuel14:8 Tor gema kaa a kwase la er: Yem hen ya wou, mo me kaa imo sha kwagh wou." 
2Samuel14:9 Kwase u Tekoa la, gema kaa a tor er: Ahii! Terem tor! Ibo i̱ hide sha a mo, man sha ya u terem kpaa, tor kua ikônough nagh ve̱ lu a ishô." 
2Samuel14:10 Tor gema kaa er: Á lu anti or nana ôr ma kwagh a we yô, va a nan her a mo, tsô mayange nana kera cihi á bende u ave ga." 
2Samuel14:11 Tsô a kaa er: Tor shi umbur TER, Aôndo wou, sha er or u oron iyev i awambe, nana̱ de kera ze hemen u timin ior zan zan i̱ va wua wan wam ga; tsô a kaa er: Er TER A lu u uma ne, ma gwarce u sha ityough ki wan wou môm tsô, una gba inya ga." 
2Samuel14:12 Nahan kwase la kaa er: Shi de kpan wou u kwase a̱ shi a̱ ôr kwagh a ter na tor. A kaa er: Yô, ôr ase." 
2Samuel14:13 Nahan kwase la kaa er: Ka nyi u hen kwagh ne sha ior mba Aôndoo? Gadia sha kwaghôron ne nahan, tor hingir er ka or u lun a ibo yô, sha er tor a hide a or na u i zende nan la ga yô." 
2Samuel14:14 Gadia sé kpe kpee, sé lu er mngerem ma i hee inya i kera fetyô u kuran ga nahan; Aôndo kera ngohol a ngohol uma kera ga, kpa ka A ker gbenda sha er or u i zende nan la i̱ de te nan kera ga yô." 
2Samuel14:15 Er mo m ve sha u va ôron kwagh ne a terem tor nahan, ka sha ci u ior ve tem mciem iyol yô; kpa, kpan wou kaa er: De me za ôr kwagh a tor tsô, alaghga tor una er ishima i kpan na u kwase." 
2Samuel14:16 Gadia tor una ungwa, una war kpan na u kwase sha ikev i or u i lu nan ka timin mo kua wan wam, bunden se dyako u Aôndo la." 
2Samuel14:17 Nahan kpan wou u kwase kaa er: Kwaghôron u terem tor ma a lu u surun ishima; gadia er ortyom u Sha a lu nahan, kape terem tor kpaa a lu la, sha u paven mimi a ifer; TER, Aôndo wou kpaa A̱ lu a we." 
2Samuel14:18 Nahan tor gema kaa a kwase la er: Yô, de yeren mo ma kwagh u me pine u ga. Kwase la gema kaa er: Yô, terem tor a̱ ôr ase kwagh." 
2Samuel14:19 Tsô tor pine er: Uwegh ku Yoabi ku a we sha kwagh ne cii shinii? Nahan kwase la kaa er: Een, er u lu uma ne tor, ma or u geman ken iyan shin ken imese sha u undun kwagh u terem tor a kaa, môm nan ngu ga; een, ka wanakiriki wou Yoabi a we kwagh, shi ka wen a tam kwaghôron ne cii a we kpan wou u kwase ken zwa kpaa ye;" 
2Samuel14:20 ka sha u geman mlu u kwagh ne man wanakiriki wou Yoabi a er nahan ye; man terem kpaa ngu a kwaghfan, injakwaghfan i ortyom u Aôndo je, a fa akaa a sha won cii." 
2Samuel14:21 Nahan tor kaa a Yoabi er: Nenge, m gba eren kwagh ne ve; yô, za hide ase a Abesalom, wanyekwaor la." 
2Samuel14:22 Tsô Yoabi gure kuma ishigh inya, sugh, ver tor doo doo. Yoabi kaa er: Nyian, wanakiriki wou fa er i doo u a mo terem tor, sha er tor a er sha zamber u wanakiriki na yô." 
2Samuel14:23 Nahan Yoabi mough za ken Geshur za kua a Abesalom va a na ken Yerusalem. 
2Samuel14:24 Tor kaa er: A̱ yem hen ya na, a̱ de nengen a ishigh yagh ga. Nahan Abesalom nyôr hen ya na, kpa a nenge a ishigh ki tor je ga." 
2Samuel14:25 Ken Iserael cii ma or kuma iwuese er Abesalom nahan ga, sha kwagh u mdooashe na; hii shin akevangahar na je zan zan due sha ityough nagh a lu a ihogholough iyol ga." 
2Samuel14:26 Zum u una hondo ityough nagh yô (hanma inyom sha mbee u i a hondo ityough; gadia i yuhwa un yum, nahan a hondo ki), a kar myohom ma ice na i sha ityou, i kuma ushekel deri uhar sha ikaren i tor." 
2Samuel14:27 Abesalom mar ônov mba nomso utar man wan u kwase môm, iti na er, Tamar; a lu kwase u doon ashe." 
2Samuel14:28 Abesalom lu ken Yerusalem anyom kuma ahar je, kpa a nenge a ishigh ki tor ga." 
2Samuel14:29 Nahan Abesalom tindi er i̱ za yila Yoabi, una tindi un hen tor, kpa a venda u van her a na; a shi a tindi kuma kwa har, kpa a venda u van." 
2Samuel14:30 Nahan a kaa a mbatomov nav er: Nenge, sule u Yoabi ngu ikua a u wam, ngu a shair kimi; yô, za, za nande nen u. Tsô mbayev mba Abesalom za nande sule la." 
2Samuel14:31 Nahan Yoabi mough va hen ya u Abesalom va pine un er: Ka nyi mbayev ou ve nandem sule? 
2Samuel14:32 Abesalom gema kaa a Yoabi er: Nenge ase, m tindi loho her a we, mer, va heen, me tindi u hen tor, za pine un wer, inja na nan man m hir ken Geshur? Guda u ma m lu keregh zan zan nyian; yô, kam pe nengen a ishigh ki tor; aluer mea lu a ibo yô, a̱ wuam tsô." 
2Samuel14:33 Tsô Yoabi va hen tor, va ôr un; nahan a yila Abesalom, a va hen tor, a ngurum a wa ityough inya sha ishigh ki tor; nahan tor suse Abesalom zwa." 
2Samuel15:1 Tsô ken masejime la, Abesalom ver ikyekye kua anyinya sha ci na, man ior akunduahargber mba ve zaan un sha hemen ayem." 
2Samuel15:2 Shi Abesalom a mough pepe a tile hen gbenda hen hundagar; nahan aluer hanma or nana va ijir i yilan hen tor yô, Abesalom a yila nan, a pine nan er: U ngu or u ken hanma gara? Nan kaa er: Wanakiriki wou ka u ken kwe ugen u Iserael." 
2Samuel15:3 Nahan Abesalom, a gema a kaa a nan er: Nenge, kwaghôron wou doo, ka u mimi kpaa; nahan kpaa tor ver ma or u nana wa u iko ga." 
2Samuel15:4 Abesalom a shi a kaa er: Kpash! Ma i verem orjir ken tar ne sha er hanma or u nan lu a ijir i yilan shin kwagh u ijirigh nana̱ va her a mo, mo me ôr nan ijir sha mimi." 
2Samuel15:5 Tsô, or u nana kporom sha u nana gure nana civir un yô, a za uwegh a kôr nan, a suse nan zwa." 
2Samuel15:6 Kape Abesalom eren a Iserael cii mba ve vaan hen tor sha u a̱ kure ve ajir la; nahan tsô Abesalom ngohol nomsombaiorov mba Iserael asema. 
2Samuel15:7 Tsô anyom nga kar anyiin yô, Abesalom kaa a tor er: Shi rumun, m̱ za, m̱ za kure iceghzwa yam i m tsegh a TER er m lu hen Heberon la." 
2Samuel15:8 Gadia wanakiriki wou tsegha zwa er m lu ken Geshur u Shiria la je, m kaa mer: Aluer TER Una hide a mo ken Yerusalem mimi je yô, nahan me civir TER." 
2Samuel15:9 Tor kaa a na er: Yô, za doo doo. Tsô a mough a za ken Heberon." 
2Samuel15:10 Shi Abesalom tindi mbamkerev ken ikwe i Iserael cii, kaa er: Shighe u nea ungwa korough ku tôngon yô, kaa nen ner: Abesalom ka tor ken Heberon." 
2Samuel15:11 Nomsombaiorov deri uhar due ken Yerusalem gba zan a Abesalom imôngo; i lôhô ve, ve za abu, ve fa ma kwagh sha mi ga." 
2Samuel15:12 Er Abesalom lu nan nagh la, a tindi i za yila Ahitofel Orgilo, or u henen kwagh a Davidi, ken gar na Gilo. Mzoughzwa la taver, gadia ior lu seer a seer van hen Abesalom gbem." 
2Samuel15:13 Tsô ortyom ugen va hen Davidi va kaa er: Asema a ior mba Iserael hide hen Abesalom. 
2Samuel15:14 Nahan Davidi gema kaa a mbayev nav mba ve lu a na ken Yerusalem la, er: Mough, sé yevese nen; gayô, mô wase nana war sha ikev i Abesalom ga; mough nen fefa, sha er a̱ de va himbir se fese, a̱ eren se kwagh u bo, a̱ hemba gar sha zwa u sanker ga." 
2Samuel15:15 Tsô mbayev mba tor kaa a tor er: Nenge, mbayev ou wa iyol kegh a kegh sha u eren hanma kwagh u a doo ter wase tor yô." 
2Samuel15:16 Nahan tor due, ior nav cii cir sha a na. Tor undu kasev mba sha uika pue, sha u ve̱ kuran ya yô." 
2Samuel15:17 Tsô tor due, ior cii cir un ijime, ve za ngôôr hen iyou i mase shin kpe la." 
2Samuel15:18 Mbayev nav kar un sha hemen cii. Mbakereti cii man Mbapeleti kua Mbagati cii, lu ior deri ataratar mba ve va a na ityô hen Gati yô, ve kar, ve hemen tor." 
2Samuel15:19 Tsô tor kaa a Itai Orgati er: Ka nyi we kpaa u ze a vese imôngoo? Hide za lu a tor; gadia u ngu shiror, u undu tar wou, hide hen ijiir you." 
2Samuel15:20 Gadia ka nyen tsô u va ye, nahan nyian maa me er u u̱ hingir u zenden a vese imôngo wue wue, er mo kpaa m fe henpe m ze ga nee? Yô, we, cin hide, hide a angbianev ou kpaa; mhôônom ma zungwen kua mimi ve̱ lu a we." 
2Samuel15:21 Kpa Itai gema kaa a tor er: Er TER a lu u uma ne, man er terem tor kpaa a lu uma, mimi je, henpe terem tor una lu la, shin a lu ku shin a lu uma, ka heregh wanakiriki wou kpaa una lu ye." 
2Samuel15:22 Tsô Davidi kaa a Itai er: Yô, kar sha hemen. Tsô Itai Orgati la kar sha hemen a ior nav cii, kua mbayev mba kiriki mba ve lu a na imôngo cii." 
2Samuel15:23 Tar la cii ger mliam ding; ior cii gba karen; tor kpaa per ifi u Kederon, ior cii per gba yemen veren ishigh sha ikôngo." 
2Samuel15:24 Tsô Sadoki kpaa za va a Mbalevi a na imôngo, ve tôô areki u ikuryan u Aôndo; ve shir areki u Aôndo—Abiatar kpaa za va-zan zan ior kar duen ken gar cii." 
2Samuel15:25 Nahan tor kaa a Sadoki er: Hide a areki u Aôndo ken gar; aluer a̱ doo TER a mo yô, Una hide a mo, shi Una er, me nenge a na kua ijiir na kpaa;" 
2Samuel15:26 kpa aluer Una kaa er: Doom a we ga yô, nahan mo m ngun, A̱ gba eren a mo sha ishima Na tsô." 
2Samuel15:27 Tor shi kaa a pristi Sadoki er: U ngu ornengen kwagh u ken hemen gaa? Yô, hide ase ken gar doo doo hide kua ônov ou mba uhar, Ahimaashi wan wou man Yonatan wan u Abiatar kpaa." 
2Samuel15:28 Nenge, me ngôôr ken ahongo a ken desereti, zan zan loho ua due hen a ven, ua va kaam." 
2Samuel15:29 Tsô Sadoki vea Abiatar ve tôô areki u Aôndo ve hide a mi ken Yerusalem; maa ve tema keregh. 
2Samuel15:30 Tsô Davidi gba kôndon sha gbenda u unden sha uwo u Olev la, lu vaan unden, a yisa ityough nagh, lu yemen, lu a akôv shin angahar ga; ior mba ve lu a na imôngo cii ve yisa ityough vev seer seer, ve lu kôndon vaan yemen." 
2Samuel15:31 Er i va kaa Davidi er: Ahitofel kpaa ngu a mba ve zough zwa a Abesalom la imôngo yô, Davidi kaa er: TERE, shi gema mhen u Ahitofel, a̱ hingir ibumegh." 
2Samuel15:32 Tsô, er Davidi unde sha igungu henpe i civir Aôndo la yô, nenge, Hushai Orarkiti va kegh un gbenda, a ianden riga iyol, lu a inya sha ityou kpaa." 
2Samuel15:33 Davidi kaa a na er: Aluer wea za a mo imôngo yô, ú va hingir mo ikav mbi yuhwan tsô;" 
2Samuel15:34 kpa aluer ú hide ken gar, ú za kaa a Abesalom wer, me hingir wanakiriki wou tor; er m vande lun wanakiriki u teru nahan, kape me gema me lu wanakiriki won hegen ne; nahan yô, ú bundem mhen u Ahitofel la." 
2Samuel15:35 Upristi Sadoki kua Abiatar mba a we imôngo keela gaa? Nahan yô, hanma kwagh u wea ungwa hen ya u tor yô, ú kaa upristi Sadoki kua Abiatar." 
2Samuel15:36 Nenge, ve mba a ônov vev mba nomso uhar la Ahimaashi wan u Sadoki kua Yonatan wan u Abiatar; ka sha ikev ve je, man né tindim loho sha hanma kwagh u ne ongo cii ye." 
2Samuel15:37 Nahan Hushai, ikar u Davidi, nyôr ken gar zum u Abesalom kpaa lu nyôron ken Yerusalem la." 
2Samuel16:1 Er Davidi za poson ityough ki igungu la ciôn yô, Shiba wanakiriki u Mefibosheti va kohol un a ujaki uhar a ushidi; ve tôô ikpenbredi deri uhar man asume a atam a wain a uman deri man atam a ikon a vian deri kua ikpa i wain." 
2Samuel16:2 Tor pine Shiba er: Ka u ka eren nyi a akaa nee? Shiba kaa er: Ujaki yô, ka sha ci u mbayev mba tor ve̱ henda, ubredi man atam a ikon a vian ne yô, ka sha ci u mbayev ve̱ ya, wain yô, ka sha ci u mba ve ver ken toho yô, ve̱ ma." 
2Samuel16:3 Tsô tor pine er: Wan u orvesen wou ngu hana? Shiba gema kaa a tor er: Nenge, a tema ken Yerusalem, gadia ngu kaan er: Nyian, ya u Iserael vea hidem a tor u terem." 
2Samuel16:4 Nahan tor kaa a Shiba er: Nenge, akaa a a lu a Mefibosheti cii a hingir a ou. Nahan Shiba kaa er: M gure m civir, ma i shi doo terem tor a mo." 
2Samuel16:5 Zum u tor Davidi va ar hen Bahurim yô, nengen, or ugen u hen tsombor u ya u Saulu, iti na er Shimei, wan u Gera, due; a due, a gba tuhwan zan." 
2Samuel16:6 Shi a ker Davidi awen, kua mbayev mba tor Davidi cii, shin er ior cii kua anomaior cii lu un ken uwegh ku yanegh man ku imesegh nahan kpaa." 
2Samuel16:7 Shimei lu tuhwan kaan er: Yem kera, yem kera, we or u haan awambe, we gbilinor ne;"
