2Samuel16:8 TER gema awambe a ya u Saulu cii, u u tem tor sha ityough nagh la, hile sha ityough you; TER gema tor na sha ikev i wan wou Abesalom ve; nenge, kwagh tser u sha ifer you, sha ci u u lu or u haan awambe yô." 
2Samuel16:9 Nahan Abishai wan u Seruya pine tor er: Inja na nan iwa i kpen ne i gbe tuhwan terem tor nahana? Shi de m̱ per, m̱ za gber un ityough." 
2Samuel16:10 Tor kaa er: Ka nyi i zoughom a ven, ne ônov mba Seruya? Aluer a tuhwa, man aluer ka TER je A kaa a na er: Tuhwa Davidi yô, ka anti nana cihi nana pine er: Ka nyi u eren nahana?" 
2Samuel16:11 Shi Davidi kaa a Abishai kua mbayev nav cii er: Nenge, wan wam u a dugh ken iyol yam je kpaa, ngu keren mo a ku, man hile Orbenyamin nee? De nen un kera, a̱ gba tuhwan tsô, gadia ka TER je A ne un ian ye." 
2Samuel16:12 Alaghga Aôndo Una nenge ican yam, man TER Una gema á er a mo dedoo sha ci u ityuhwanev mbi a tohom nyian ne." 
2Samuel16:13 Nahan Davidi a ior nav cii ve kar sha gbenda, Shimei kpaa lu teran sha kpe u igungu, tuhwan zan, keren un awen, haan ihundu." 
2Samuel16:14 Tsô tor a ior mba ve lu a na imôngo cii, ve za ar ape gen, iyol kpe ve cii, nahan a mem her." 
2Samuel16:15 Tsô Abesalom, a ior cii, ka ior i Iserael je la, ve va ken Yerusalem, Ahitofel kpaa lu a na." 
2Samuel16:16 Er Hushai, Orarkiti, ikar u Davidi, va hen Abesalom yô, Hushai kaa a Abesalom er: Tor a̱ lu uma, tor a̱ lu uma." 
2Samuel16:17 Tsô Abesalom kaa a Hushai er: Ka erdoo wou a ikaru je nee? Ka nyi u ze a ikaru imôngo ga. 
2Samuel16:18 Hushai kaa a Abesalom er: Ka nahan ga; kpa un u TER kua ior mban man Iserael cii ve tsough yô, mo kpaa me lu u na, me tema a na kpaa." 
2Samuel16:19 Man shi: Ka an, mo me er nan tomo? Kera ka sha ishigh ki wan na gaa? Er m lu eren tom sha ishigh ki teru nahan, kape me er sha ishigh you kpaa la." 
2Samuel16:20 Tsô Abesalom kaa a Ahitofel er: Yô, ôr ase mhen wou sha kwagh u sé er yô." 
2Samuel16:21 Ahitofel kaa a Abesalom er: Yô, yav a kasev mba sha uika mba teru, mba a undu er ve̱ kuran ya ne; nahan Iserael cii vea ungwa er u hingir kwagh u duen teru ishima yô; tsô ave a mba ve lu a we cii, aa taver." 
2Samuel16:22 Nahan ve samber Abesalom tenti sha tembe u iyoughough sha; tsô Abesalom yav a kasev mba sha uika mba ter na sha ishigh ki Iserael cii. 
2Samuel16:23 Mhen u Ahitofel u a henen hen ayange la yô, lu er or u nan pin imo i Aôndo yô, kape hanma mhen u Ahitofel kuman Davidi kua Abesalom la." 
2Samuel17:1 Shi Ahitofel kaa a Abesalom er: De, m̱ sange nomsombaiorov dubu pue kar uhar, m̱ mough, m̱ tôv Davidi ityô hen tugh mbun je," 
2Samuel17:2 m̱ za bur un er a ver a shir ave ne, m̱ ta un mciem iyol; nahan ior mba ve lu a na ityô cii vea yevese; me mase wuan tor tseegh," 
2Samuel17:3 Me hile a ior cii her a we; mhir u ior cii ngu sha ikev i or u u keren la; nahan ior cii vea tema bem bem. 
2Samuel17:4 Kwaghôron la doo Abesalom kua mbatamen mba Iserael cii. 
2Samuel17:5 Tsô Abesalom kaa er: Yô, yila nen Hushai Orarkiti la kpaa, sé ungwa nen kwagh u wen una ôr yô." 
2Samuel17:6 Er Hushai za va hen Abesalom yô, Abesalom ôr kwagh a na er: Ahitofel ôr kwagh nahan nahan; nahan sé er sha imo naa? A lu nahan ga yô, we kaa ase." 
2Samuel17:7 Tsô Hushai kaa a Abesalom er: Mhen u Ahitofel a hen hen shighe ne yô, ka u sha mi ga." 
2Samuel17:8 Hushai shi kaa er: U fa teru a ior nav, ka anomaior je, man asema nga vihin ve hegen tsung er dwem u i ngohol un ônov ken toho yô; man teru kpaa ka or u fan ityav, una tsa a ior imôngo ga." 
2Samuel17:9 Nenge, hegen una yer shin ihungwa, shin ma ijiir igen; tsô, aluer ior mbagenev vea kpe sha num u i hii nôngon la yô, mba ve ongo cii vea kaa er: Ior mba ve lu a Abesalom ityô la, i pande i wua mbagenev." 
2Samuel17:10 Nahan or u nan lu nomor u ishima i nan i lu er begha nahan je kpaa, nana yina ishima doo doo; gadia Iserael cii fa er teru a lu nomor yô, mba ve lu a na imôngo kpaa ka anomaior mimi." 
2Samuel17:11 Kpa mo yô, m hen mer: I̱ kohol Mbaiserael cii her a we, hii hen Dan zan zan ar hen Bersheba, iyenge ve i̱ ngee er waarawa u hen kpe u zegemnger nahan, we iyol you kpaa za ken utya." 
2Samuel17:12 Nahan sé za tser un hen ijiir i a lu la, sé shile sha a na er avure nga a gba sha tar nahan; un kua ior mba ve lu a na cii, sé de ma or môm ga." 
2Samuel17:13 Man shi aluer una za nyôr ken ma gar ugen yô, Iserael cii vea tôô ikor vea za a mi hen gar la, sé kpera un sé za ta shin ifi je, aniwen ciôn tsô kpaa, una kera shi hen ijiir la ga." 
2Samuel17:14 Tsô Abesalom kua ior i Iserael cii ve kaa er: Mhen u Hushai Orarkiti ne, hemba mhen u Ahitofel. Gadia TER ver u i̱ bunde mhen u injaa u Ahitofel la, sha er TER Una va a kwaghbo sha Abesalom yô." 
2Samuel17:15 Tsô Hushai kaa a Sadoki kua Abiatar upristi mbala er: Kape Ahitofel a tese Abesalom kua mbatamen mba Iserael la, man kape mo di kpaa m tese ne." 
2Samuel17:16 Yô, tindi nen ase wanye fefa hegen nana̱ za pase Davidi er: De tse hen ahongo a ken desereti ne hen tugh mbun ga, a lu nan nan kpaa per, sha er i̱ de timin tor kua ior mba ve lu a na imôngo cii ga yô." 
2Samuel17:17 Yonatan vea Ahimaashi yô, ve tema hen En-rogel; kpankwase ugen za ôron ve akaa; ve, ve gema ve za ôron tor Davidi; gadia doo u á nenge a ve nyôron ken gar ga." 
2Samuel17:18 Kpa wanye ugen nenge a ve, za kaa Abesalom, nahan ve uhar cii ve mough fefa, ve za hen ya u or u ken Bahurim, u ya na lu a ijôr hen tembe yô, ve hungwa shimi." 
2Samuel17:19 Kwase la tôô ikondo cir sha ijôr la gema haa sam u alakema sha mi nahan i fa kwagh shon ga. 
2Samuel17:20 Tsô mbayev mba Abesalom va hen kwase la hen ya, ve pine er: Ahimaashi man Yonatan mba hana? Kwase la kaa a ve er: Ve per uwagh. Nahan ve ker, kpa ve fatyô ga, tsô ve hide ken Yerusalem." 
2Samuel17:21 Tsô mba moughon kera yô, ve due shin ijôr, ve za, ve za ôr tor Davidi; ve kaa a Davidi er: Mough, per nen mngerem fefa, gadia ka imbamhen i Ahitofel a hen sha a ven je ne." 
2Samuel17:22 Nahan Davidi mough a ior mba ve lu a na cii, ve per Yordan; er sev av yô, ma or u nan per Yordan ga nan lu ga." 
2Samuel17:23 Zum u Ahitofel nenge i er sha mhen na ga yô, a kange jaki na shidi a mough a hide ken ya, ken gar na, a sôr akaa ken ya na, tsô a sende iyol na, a kpe, i ii un shin uwar u ter na." 
2Samuel17:24 Tsô Davidi va hen Mahanaim, Abesalom kpaa per Yordan, un a ior mba Iserael cii mba ve lu a na ityô cii." 
2Samuel17:25 Tsô Abesalom ver Amasa orhemen sha akumautya sha ityough ki Yoabi. Amasa lu wan u or u i yilan iti na er Itera, Orishemael, u a vôso Abigail wan u Nahashi, anngô u Seruya u kwase, ngô u Yoabi la." 
2Samuel17:26 Iserael man Abesalom ve haa afo ken tar u Gileadi. 
2Samuel17:27 Tsô zum u Davidi va hen Mahanaim yô, Shobi wan u Nahashi ken Raba ken Mbaamon, man Makir wan u Amiel u hen Lodebar, man Barshilai, Orgileadi u ken Rogelim," 
2Samuel17:28 ve va a ugambe man utasa man ityev man alakema man shair man mwem man alakema u kaan man alev a vesen kua a kiriki," 
2Samuel17:29 man iyough man atumbabua a kôrough man iyôngo man ciishi u i er sha atumbabua yô, sha ci u Davidi kua ior mba ve lu a na imôngo mbala, er ve̱ ya; gadia ve kaa er: Ijen kôr ior mban, ve vôr, man imura kpaa kôr ve ken desereti." 
2Samuel18:1 Tsô Davidi ôr iyenge i ior mba ve lu a na la, a ver mbahemenev mba hemen ior dubu dubu man mbahemenev mba hemen ior deri deri." 
2Samuel18:2 Nahan Davidi pav ior mbala akum atar, a tindi ikum i môm sha ikev i Yoabi, i môm sha ikev i Abishai wan u Seruya, anngô u Yoabi, shi u môm la sha ikev i Itai, Orgati. Man shi tor kaa a ior er: Mo iyol yam kpaa me za a ven imôngo kpee." 
2Samuel18:3 Kpa ior kaa er: We ú za ga; gadia aluer se gba yevese kpaa, á lu ve kwagh ga; shin sea kpe kwe môm cii kpaa, á lu ve kwagh ga; kpa we u kuma er ior asev dubu pue nahan; nahan yô, hemba doon u we ú lu ken gar, ú gema ú wasen se." 
2Samuel18:4 Tsô tor kaa a ve er: Kwagh u ne nenge a doo yô, me er. Nahan tor tile hen hundagar, ior cii gba duen deri deri man dubu dubu." 
2Samuel18:5 Tor ta Yoabi man Abishai kua Itai icin, er: Er nen a er a Abesalom wanyekwaor la, sha ci wam. Ior cii lu ungwan er tor lu tan mbahemenev icin sha Abesalom yô." 
2Samuel18:6 Nahan ior due yem ken toho sha u za nôngon ityav a Iserael; ve cinge ityav shin ikô i Eferaim. 
2Samuel18:7 Mbayev mba Davidi za hemba ior mba Iserael ker. Iyange la i wua ior her kpishi, kuma ior dubu ikundu." 
2Samuel18:8 Gadia ityav mbila samber sha tar la cii; ior mba ve kpe shin ikô sha iyange la, hemba mba sanker wua yô." 
2Samuel18:9 Tsô Abesalom za ande sha mbayev mba Davidi. Abesalom lu yemen sha alfadari na, alfadari la za nyôr shin ayagher a zegekon u terebin, tsô ityough nagh za hange sha kon u terebin, gba zungur her, alfadari u wen tema sha mi la kar yem." 
2Samuel18:10 Orgen va nenge a na, za kaa Yoabi, er: Nenge, m nenge Abesalom ngu zungur sha terebin." 
2Samuel18:11 Tsô Yoabi gema kaa a or u nan kaa un la, er: Nenge, u nenge a na je, man ka nyi u woo un u gbihi inya ga? Ma m ne u agbenger a azurfa pue kua kwange kpaa." 
2Samuel18:12 Or la gema kaa a Yoabi er: Shin mea ngohol agbenger a azurfa dubu sha uwegh agh je kpaa ma m naregh uwegh agh sha u eren wan u tor kwagh ga; gadia tor ta u icin sha ato ase je, we man Abishai kua Itai, a kaa er: Ver nen ishima, kura nen a kura Abesalom wanyekwaor la." 
2Samuel18:13 Mea er a uma na dang yô (ma kwagh ma a lu tor myer ga), we iyol you kpaa ma u palegh iyol ma u undum." 
2Samuel18:14 Tsô Yoabi kaa er: Doo u me ngôôr a we nahan ga. Nahan akôr ahande atar ken uwe, a za tume Abesalom hen ishima due keela, er a lu uma her la je, hen atô u kon u terebin la." 
2Samuel18:15 Mbayev pue mba tilin Yoabi ikav mbi utyav kase un, ve ta num sha Abesalom, ve wua." 
2Samuel18:16 Tsô Yoabi tôngo korough, nahan ior hide, ve de u zendan Iserael ityô, gadia Yoabi yange ior u zan hemen." 
2Samuel18:17 Ve tôô Abesalom ve gbihi shin zegeihungwa u shin ikô, ve ta awen tihi sha mi zegenan; Mbaiserael cii yevese yem hen utenti vev." 
2Samuel18:18 Abesalom yô, zum u a lu uma la, tôô ityôgh ki iwenegh ki shin pev u Tor, tim sha ci na, gadia a kaa er: M ngu a wan u umbur iti yam ga; nahan a ii ityôgh kila iti na; mba yilan ki er: ityôgh ki umbur Abesalom a mi, zan zan nyian." 
2Samuel18:19 Tsô Ahimaashi wan u Sadoki kaa er: De m̱ gber ayem ahegen, m̱ za ôr tor loho er TER A yem un sha ikev i mbaihomov nav yô." 
2Samuel18:20 Kpa Yoabi kaa a na er: Ka we u lu or u zan a loho nyian ga, iyange igen tsô ú za a loho; nyian yô, ú za a loho u ma kwagh ga, sha ci u wan u tor a kpe yô." 
2Samuel18:21 Tsô Yoabi kaa a Orkushi, er: Za, za ôr tor kwagh u u nenge yô. Tsô Orkushi la wa ityough inya sugh Yoabi, tsô gba zan ayem." 
2Samuel18:22 Nahan Ahimaashi wan u Sadoki shi kaa a Yoabi er: A lu nan nan kpaa, shi rumun m̱ gber ayem, m̱ dondo Orkushi ne ijime. Yoabi pine un er: Ka nyi i lu u pe zan kpee wan wama, gadia ú zua a injar sha loho shon ga." 
2Samuel18:23 Kpa a lu nan nan kpaa, de m̱ za ayem. A kaa a na er: Yô, gba zan tsô. Tsô Ahimaashi gber ayem gba yemen sha gbenda u kpuun kpuun la, za kar Orkushi la." 
2Samuel18:24 Yô, Davidi tema hen huwa u ihindagar ihiar la, tsô orkuran unde sha haav mbu hundav, kôndo zan zan sha gilgar, te ashe yô, a za nenge or lu van ayem, nan lu tswen." 
2Samuel18:25 Tsô orkuran la nenger imo, kaa tor. Nahan tor kaa er: Nana lu tswen yô, nan ngu a loho u dedoo. Er nan lu van ayem, kporom yô," 
2Samuel18:26 orkuran la shi nenge orgen lu yevese van, nahan orkuran la yila orhunda, kaa er: Nenge, shi orgen ngu van ayem, nan ngu tswen. Tor kaa er: Ngula kpaa ngu van a loho u dedoo." 
2Samuel18:27 Orkuran la kaa er: Sha mnenge wam yô, ayem a or u sha hemen la ka a Ahimaashi wan u Sadoki. Tor kaa er: Un ka or u injaa, ngu van a loho u dedoo je." 
2Samuel18:28 Tsô Ahimaashi genger imo kaa a tor er: Bem! A ngurum, a wa ityough inya sha ishigh ki tor, a kuma ishigh inya, a kaa er: I̱ wuese TER, Aôndo wou, u A ne ior mba ve hendan a terem tor sha ikev yase yô." 
2Samuel18:29 Tor pine er: Abesalom wanyekwaor la ngu dedoo kpa? Ahimaashi gema kaa er: Zum u Yoabi tindi wanakiriki u tor kua mo wanakiriki wou kpaa yô, m nenge ior zua lu eren gbugh gbu gbugh, kpa m kav kwagh shon ga." 
2Samuel18:30 Tor kaa er: Na ian, hile tile keen. Tsô a hide, a tile her ving." 
2Samuel18:31 Tsô Orkushi la va nôôr: Orkushi kaa a tor er: Terem tor, ungwa ase loho u dedoo ne, TER or u iyev nyian sha mba ve hendan a we cii." 
2Samuel18:32 Tor pine Orkushi la er: Abesalom wanyekwaor la ngu dedoo kpa? Orkushi la gema kaa er: Mbaihomov mba terem tor, man mba ve hendan a we cii sha u vea er u kwaghbo yô, ma ve hingir er wanye la nahan." 
2Samuel18:33 Tsô vihi tor kpishi; a unde sha iyou i sha, i sha hundagar, a gba vaan zenden kaan er: Ahii! Wan wam Abesalom, wan Wam! Wan wam Abesalom! Guda yô, mo ma m kpe sha ci wou. Ahii! Abesalom, wan wam, wan wama!" 
2Samuel19:1 Tsô i za kaa a Yoabi er: Nenge, tor ngu vaan, ngu zungwen ku u Abesalom." 
2Samuel19:2 Nahan mhembe u sha iyange la gema hingir ior cii ku u zungwen; gadia ior ungwa gwa sha iyange la er: Ishima ngi vihin tor sha ci u ku u wan na. 
2Samuel19:3 Nahan ior nyôr ken gar ving sha iyange la, bee er ior mba kunya u ker ve, ve lu kususu er ve yevese ityav yô." 
2Samuel19:4 Tor yisa ishigh nagh, tor yila genger genger er: Ahii, wan wam Abesalom! Ahii! Abesalom wan wam, wan wam!" 
2Samuel19:5 Tsô Yoabi nyôr ken ya, za hen tor, a kaa er: Nyian u na mbayev ou cii kunya, mba ve yem uma wou nyian ne, kua uma u ônov ou mba nomso man mba kasev, man uma u kasev ou, man uma u kasev ou mba sha uika kpaa;" 
2Samuel19:6 gadia mba ve ker u ihom doo u ishima, u gem u vende mba u doo ve ishima la. Gadia nyian u pase je er, atiator kua mbayev ve lu ugbilinmbaiorov sha ishigh you yô; gadia nyian m kav, aluer Abesalom una lu uma nyian man se cii sea kpe nyian yô, ma i doo u mimi." 
2Samuel19:7 Yô, mough hegen, due za ôr kwagh u dedoo a mbayev ou; gayô m bum TER mer, aluer u due ga yô, ma or nana kera lu a we hen tugh mbun ga; nahan kwaghbo u una tser u yô, una hemba akaabo a a vande tseren we cii er u lu iyev je zan zan nyian." 
2Samuel19:8 Nahan tor mough za tema hen hunda. Nahan i kaa ior cii er: Nenge, tor tema hen hunda; tsô ior va kohol hen ishigh ki tor cii. Kpa Iserael yô, yevese kera, hanma or yem ken tenti u nan." 
2Samuel19:9 Ior cii lu zôhôn zwa ayol a ve ken ikwe i Iserael cii, ve lu kaan er: Tor yima se sha ikev i mbaihomov asev, shi a yima se sha ikev i Mbafiliti kpaa, man ahegen yô, a yevese ken tar ne kera, sha ci u Abesalom." 
2Samuel19:10 Man Abesalom u se ver un tor sha a vese la, a gema a kpe ken utya. Man ka nyi ne kera er kwagh ahegen ner, i̱ hide a tor ga?" 
2Samuel19:11 Tsô tor Davidi tindi loho hen upristi Sadoki kua Abiatar, a kaa er: Ôr nen kwagh a mbatamen mba Yuda, kaa nen ner: Ka nyi ne né va hingir mbamasetyô sha u hiden a tor hen ya na? (Gadia kwaghôron u Iserael la cii va ar hen tor hen ya na.)" 
2Samuel19:12 Ne mba anngôôv av, akuhe am man nyian yam kpaa; man ka nyi né va hingir mbamasetyô sha u hiden a toro?" 
2Samuel19:13 Shi kaa nen Amasa ner, u ngu akuhe am man inyam yam je gaa? Aôndo A̱ er a mo nahan shi i̱ seer nahan kpaa, aluer we wea hingir tor u akumautya sha ishigh yagh gbem sha ityough ki Yoabi ga yô." 
2Samuel19:14 Nahan a gema asema a ior i Yuda cii, hingir er ka or môm yô; nahan ve tindi tor loho, er: Hide a mbayev ou cii." 
2Samuel19:15 Tsô tor gba hiden, va ar hen Yordan. Nahan Yuda va hen Gilgal sha u va keghen tor gbenda, er vea per a tor hen Yordan." 
2Samuel19:16 Shimei wan u Gera, Orbenyamin, u a lu ken Bahurim la, a mough fefa, a va a ior mba Yuda imôngo, sha u va keghen tor Davidi gbenda," 
2Samuel19:17 ior i Benyamin dubu lu a na imôngo, man Shiba u hen ya u Saulu a ônov nav pue kar utaan kua mbatomov nav ikundu a na imôngo kpaa; ve per hen Yordan sha ashe a tor je." 
2Samuel19:18 Tso u hen ihongo lu zan sha u peren a ior i tor, man sha u eren kwagh u a doo un yô. Nahan Shimei wan u Gera, va gure sha ishigh ki tor, zum u a lu veren iyol u peren Yordan la." 
2Samuel19:19 A kaa a tor er: Tor a̱ de nem ibo ga, man shi de kera umbur kwagh u wanakiriki wou a er dang sha iyange i terem tor due ken Yerusalem la, je er tor una koso kwagh la ken ishima na ga." 
2Samuel19:20 Gadia mo wanakiriki wou, m fa er m er kwaghbo yô; nahan nenge, ken ya u Yosev cii, ka mo m vande van nyian sha u me va kegh terem tor gbenda ye." 
2Samuel19:21 Kpa Abishai wan u Seruya gema kaa er: Er Shimei a toho or u TER, u i shigh un mkurem, nahan kpaa á wua un sha ci u kwagh ne gaa?" 
2Samuel19:22 Kpa Davidi kaa er: Ka nyi i joughom a vene, ne ônov mba Seruya, ne mba ne hingir mba hendan kwagh a mo nyian nee? Á wua or u ken Iserael nyianaa? M fa er nyian m lu tor u Iserael gaa?" 
2Samuel19:23 Tsô tor kaa a Shimei er: Ú kpe ga; shi tor bum a na kpaa. 
2Samuel19:24 Mefibosheti wan u Saulu kpaa va sha u va keghen tor gbenda; angahar a na tsô kpa, a ôô ga, indyer na kpaa a sôr ga, akondo na kpaa a ôô ga, hii sha iyange i tor mough je zan zan iyange i a kar hiden doo doo la." 
2Samuel19:25 Tsô zum u a va ken Yerusalem sha ci u keghen tor gbenda yô, tor pine un er: Ka nyi iyange u za a mo imôngo ga, Mefibosheti?" 
2Samuel19:26 A gema a kaa er: Terem tor, wanakiriki wam iyange tsughum; gadia wanakiriki wou kaa er: Me kange jaki wam shidi me unde sha mi, me za a tor ityô; gadia wanakiriki wou ka ishombonor." 
2Samuel19:27 A za vihi iti i wanakiriki wou hen terem tor; nahan kpaa terem tor ngu er ortyom u Aôndo yô; nahan gba eren kwagh u a doo u tsô. 
2Samuel19:28 Gadia ior mba hen ya u terem cii, ve lu er ior mba ve kom ku sha ishigh ki terem tor, nahan kpaa, u ver wanakiriki wou ken mbayan sha tebul wou. Nahan m shi ngu a ian i me vaa a toro?" 
2Samuel19:29 Tor kaa a na er: Ka nyi u ngee kwaghôron yum nahana? Imo yam yô, we vea Shiba gba karen tar la tsô." 
2Samuel19:30 Tsô Mefibosheti kaa a tor er: A̱ gba ngohol cii tsô, sha er terem tor a hir hen ya na doo doo yô." 
2Samuel19:31 Barshilai Orgileadi kpaa za mough hen Rogelim, va per Yordan a tor imôngo, sha u una za ver un gbenda zan zan yande Yordan yô." 
2Samuel19:32 Barshilai bee iyol kpishi, anyom a na lu akunduanyiin; a koson tor er a lu ken Mahanaim la, gadia un lu shagbaor kpekpe." 
2Samuel19:33 Tsô tor kaa a Barshilai er: Yô, per a mo imôngo, me za koson we ken Yerusalem, lu a mo imôngo." 
2Samuel19:34 Barshilai gema kaa a tor er: Anyom a uma wam shi shi ayange a me je, ve me kôndo a tor imôngo sha Yerusaleme?" 
2Samuel19:35 Nyian anyom a am kuma anyom akunduanyiin je; me fatyô u fan mkposo u kwagh u a doo shin u a vihi kpa? Wanakiriki wou fa u benden kaven mnyohom ma kwagh u me ya shin u me ma? M shi m fatyô u ungwan imo i nomso kua kasev mba wan atsam kpaa? Ka nyi man wanakiriki wou una gema á seer a seer terem tor icanaa? 
2Samuel19:36 Sar wanakiriki wou ka peren Yordan zan a tor cihôôn tsô; man er nan tor una er a mo doo doo yum nahana? 
2Samuel19:37 Yô, shi de wanakiriki wou a̱ hide, sha er me kpe hen gar wam yô, hen uwar u terem man ngôm. Kpa wanakiriki wou Kimham ngun, a̱ per a terem tor imôngo, yô, za er a na er i doo u la." 
2Samuel19:38 Nahan tor gema kaa er: Kimham una per a mo imôngo, yô, me za er a na er i doo u yô; man hanma kwagh u a sar u her a mo kpaa, me er u un." 
2Samuel19:39 Tsô ior cii per Yordan, tor kpaa per; tor suse Barshilai zwa, ver un doo doo; tsô a hide hen ya na." 
2Samuel19:40 Nahan tor per va hen Gilgal, Kimham kpaa per a tor imôngo; ior i Yuda cii kua vegher u Iserael ugen, ve za hide a tor." 
2Samuel19:41 Tsô ior i Iserael cii va hen tor, ve va kaa a tor er: Inja na nan anmgbianev asev, ior i Yuda, ve koo a we, ve per a tor myer a ior nav cii hen Yordan kua ior i Davidi cii a na imôngo nahana?" 
2Samuel19:42 Tsô ior i Yuda cii gema kaa a ior i Iserael er: Ka sha ci u tor a lu anmgbian wase yô; man inja na nan kwagh ne a vihi ne? Se ya ma kwagh u dedoo hen toro? Shin a na se iwua sha ma kwagha? 
2Samuel19:43 Tsô ior mba Iserael gema kaa a ior mba Yuda er: Se mba a aci pue ken tor, se hemba mban a ian sha Davidi a ven; man inja na nan ne lahan se? Kera ka se man iyange se hii u henen u hiden a tor gaa? Kpa kwaghôron u ior mba Yuda, hemba taver a ior mba Iserael." 
2Samuel20:1 Tsô gbilinor ugen lu her, iti na er Sheba wan u Bikeri, Orbenyamin; a tôngo korough a kaa er: Se mba a ci ken Davidi ga; man se mba a dyako ken wan u Yese kpaa ga; yô, hanma or nana̱ hide hen tenti u nan, ne Iserael." 
2Samuel20:2 Tsô ior i Iserael cii mough undu Davidi, gema dondo sha Sheba wan u Bikeri la; kpa ior i Yuda yô, ta ken tor ve, hii shin Yordan je zan zan za ar sha Yerusalem." 
2Samuel20:3 Tsô Davidi va hen ya na ken Yerusalem; tor tôô kasev mba puev mbala, kasev nav mba sha uika, mba lu undu ve er ve̱ kuran un ya la, a wa ve ken iyou, a ver mbakuran lu koson ve, a kera yav a ve ga. I wuhe ve ker, zan zan ayange a kuugh a ve, ve lu icôghol." 
2Samuel20:4 Tsô tor kaa a Amasa er: Kohol mo ior i Yuda er ayange a lu a kuma atar ga ne, we kpaa lu her." 
2Samuel20:5 Nahan Amasa za sha u una za kohol ior i Yuda; kpa a timbir zan zan iyange i i ver un la i kar. 
2Samuel20:6 Tsô Davidi gema kaa a Abishai er: Hegen Sheba wan u Bikeri una er se kwagh u bo á hemba u Abesalom la; yô, kua a mbayev mba teru, zenda un ijime sha er a̱ de nyer ken agar a i maa a ugil, a̱ ndiir se ashe ga." 
2Samuel20:7 Tsô ior mba Yoabi mough va dondo un, kua Mbakereti man Mbapeleti man anomaior cii; ve due ken Yerusalem sha u zendan Sheba wan u Bikeri ijime." 
2Samuel20:8 Zum u ve ar hen zegeiwen u hen Gibeon la yô, Amasa va kegh ve gbenda. Yô, Yoabi lu a akondo na a utya iyol, a kange kwange sha mi, kua sanker shin iwenge ken var na; ngur yemen yô, sanker tsuwa gba." 
2Samuel20:9 Tsô Yoabi kaa a Amasa er: Anngôm u ngu dedoo kpa? Yoabi gema kôr Amasa sha indyer sha uwegh nagh ku yanegh er una suse un zwa yô. 
2Samuel20:10 Kpa Amasa ver ishima sha sanker u Yoabi lu a mi sha uwe la ga; nahan a kuma un sha uya, myam nam haa inya, a kera seer kuman un ga; tsô a kpe. Tsô Yoabi kar vea anngô na Abishai, ve zenda Sheba wan u Bikeri ityô." 
2Samuel20:11 Wanye u Yoabi ugen tile her, a gema a kaa er: Or u Yoabi a doo nan, man nan te ken Davidi yô, nana̱ cir ase Yoabi ijime." 
2Samuel20:12 Yô, Amasa lu heregh lu sharegh iyol sha awambe na hen atô gbenda. Zum u or la nenge ior cii tile yô, a tôô Amasa a kar a mi sha gbenda kera, a ver un ken toho a cir un ikondo, gadia a nenge hanma or u nan va ar hen na yô, nan tile." 
2Samuel20:13 Er i tôô un sha gbenda kera yô, ior ca ca kar dondo Yoabi ijime, sha u zendan Sheba wan u Bikeri la ityô." 
2Samuel20:14 Un yô, a kar hen ikwe i Iserael cii a va ken Abel man Bete-maaka kua Mbaberi cii; ve cii ve kohol, ve dondo un." 
2Samuel20:15 Tsô i va kase un ken Abel u Bete-maaka, ve ta tihi inya hen kpegar za ar sha gil u ken won la ior mba ve lu a Yoabi imôngo cii ve gba timen gilgar er a̱ gba." 
2Samuel20:16 Tsô kwase u fan kwagh u ken gar la yila, kaa er: Ungwa nen, ungwa nen! Shi kaa nen Yoabi ner: Va heen, m̱ ôr kwagh a we." 
2Samuel20:17 Tsô a kporom her a na; kwase la kaa a na er: Ka we Yoabi nee? A rumun a kaa er: Ka mo. Tsô a kaa a na er: Yô, ungwa ase kwaghôron u kpan wou u kwase ne. A gema a kaa er: M ngu ungwan." 
2Samuel20:18 Tsô a kaa er: Ayange a tsuaa la yô, i kaan er: I̱ za hen kwagh a Abel; kape i kuren kwagh la." 
2Samuel20:19 Mo m ngu môm ken mba keren bem man môm ken mba kuman u veren ishima sha a ve ken Iserael; ka saren we u timin gar, man gema ka ngô ken Iserael je; inja na nan man i lu u ka vihin dyako u TERE?" 
2Samuel20:20 Yoabi gema kaa er: Ka nahan ga! Ka nahan je ga! Mo m ngu nyi je ve me vihi kwagh shin me tim kwagha? 
2Samuel20:21 Kwagh ne ka nahan ga; kpa orgen u sha tar u iwoogh u Eferaim iti na er Sheba wan u Bikeri, a mough ngu hendan kwagh a tor Davidi je; yô, due a na tseegh tsô, tsô me kar hen gar ne kera. Kwase la gema kaa a Yoabi er: Yô, á gbihi u ityough nagh kia sen sha kpekpe gar." 
2Samuel20:22 Nahan kwase la za ôr kwagh a ior cii sha kwaghfan. Tsô ve gber ityough ki Sheba wan u Bikeri, ve kende Yoabi. Tsô a tôngo korough, ve sambe, ve kar hen gar la kera, hanma or yem hen tenti u nan. Yoabi kpaa hide ken Yerusalem hen tor." 
2Samuel20:23 Yoabi yô, lu orvesen sha ikumutya i Iserael cii; Benaia wan u Yehoyada lu sha Mbakereti man Mbapeleti;" 
2Samuel20:24 Adoram lu nengen sha mba ve eren tom u kpan yô; Yehoshafati wan u Ahiludi lu or u ngeren abaver ken takerada; 
2Samuel20:25 Sheva lu or u ngeren; Sadoki man Abiatar lu upristi; 
2Samuel20:26 man Ira Oryair kpaa lu pristi u Davidi. 
2Samuel21:1 Sha ayange a Davidi la, ijen gba anyom atar, sha adondo adondo; nahan Davidi ker ishigh ki TER. TER kaa a na er: Ka sha ci u ike i awambe ngi sha Saulu kua ya na sha ci u a wua Mbagibeon." 
2Samuel21:2 Tsô tor yila Mbagibeon, kaa a ve er (Mbagibeon yô, ka mba ken nongo u Mbaiserael ga, kpa ka mba ken Mbaamor mba ve shi her la, man iyange Mbaiserael ve bum a ve; kpa Saulu yô, lu un ka wuan ve, sha ci u ishima i tseen na sha Mbaiserael kua Mbayuda)," 
2Samuel21:3 Davidi kaa a Mbagibeon er: M̱ er a ven nana? Man ka nyi me er ve, me wam ne, sha er né ver dyako u TER doo doo?" 
2Samuel21:4 Mbagibeon kaa a na er: Ka kwagh u azurfa shin zenaria a gbe se a Saulu kua ya na ga; man shi ka kwagh wase u wuan ma or ken Iserael kpaa ga. Tsô a pine er: Ne hen nana, m̱ er ne nyi?" 
2Samuel21:5 Ve kaa a tor er, or u lu wua se man shi wa ishima u timin se er se̱ de kera luun ken ma veghertar u Iserael ga la," 
2Samuel21:6 i̱ na se ônov mba nan utaankaruhar, sé sende ve sha ishigh ki TER ken Gibea u Saulu, or u TER lu tsuwa un la. Tor kaa er: Me na." 
2Samuel21:7 Kpa tor yima Mefibosheti, wan u Yonatan, wan u Saulu, sha ci u mbum u TER u a lu hen atô ve la, ka hen atô u Davidi vea Yonatan, wan u Saulu je la." 
2Samuel21:8 Nahan tor gema kôr ônov mba Risepa wan u Aya, uhar, mba a mar a Saulu yô, ka Armoni man Mefibosheti; man ônov mba Merabi, wan u Saulu, utaan, mba a mar a Aderiel wan u Barshilai, Ormekolati la," 
2Samuel21:9 a na ve sha ikev i Mbagibeon, ve sende ve sha uwo la, sha ishigh ki TER, ve mba utaankaruhar mbala cii, ve kpe icin i môm; lu sha shighe u sundan iyiav i wua ve ye, lu sha ayange a i hii u sundan shair la." 
2Samuel21:10 Tsô Risepa, wan u Aya la tôô bufu samber sha iwen sha ci na, hii sha mhii u sundan iyiav je zan zan shighe u ura kar nôôn sha akom la; mayange a rumun u inyon i sha i̱ gba sha a ve tetan ga, shin ishôso i utu kpaa ga." 
2Samuel21:11 Tsô i za ôr Davidi kwagh u Risepa wan u Aya, kwase u Saulu u sha uika la, a er yô." 
2Samuel21:12 Tsô Davidi za za tôô akuhe a Saulu man akuhe a wan na Yonatan, sha ikev i ior mba Yabeshi-gileadi mba ve za ii a hen kpuun kpuun u Bete-shan, henpe Mbafiliti lu sende ve sha iyange i Mbafiliti wua Saulu sha Gilboa la;" 
2Samuel21:13 a za kura akuhe a Saulu man akuhe a wan na Yonatan, a va a min, shi ve kura akuhe a mba i sende ve la kpaa," 
2Samuel21:14 ve va ii akuhe a Saulu man a wan na Yonatan ken tar u Benyamin ken Sela, shin uwar u ter na Kishi; ve er sha imo i tor cii. Ken masetyô la yô, Aôndo ungwa msen u i er sha ci u tar la yô." 
2Samuel21:15 Er Mbafiliti shi va nôngo ityav a Iserael yô, Davidi sen a mbayev nav, ve za nôngo ityav a Mbafiliti; nahan Davidi vôr." 
2Samuel21:16 Ishebi-benobi u a lu môm ken ônov mba Rafa, u myohom ma iwange na kuma ushekel mba togula deri utar la, a kange sanker u he shin iwenge, a lu henen er una wua Davidi." 
2Samuel21:17 Kpa Abishai wan u Seruya wase un, a gber Orfiliti la, a wua. Tsô ior mba Davidi bum a na, kaa er: Ú kera zaan ityav a vese mayange ga, sha er ú pir imenger i Iserael ga yô." 
2Samuel21:18 Tsô, ken masetyô la, i shi i nôngo ityav a Mbafiliti hen Gobi; nahan Shibekai, Orhusha, wua Sav, u a lu môm ken ônov mba Rafa la." 
2Samuel21:19 I shi i nôngo ityav hen Gobi a Mbafiliti; nahan Elhanan, wan u Yaare-Oregim, Orbetelehem, wua Goliati, u ihande i iwange na lu er igaikondo nahan la." 
2Samuel21:20 Shi i nôngo ityav hen Gati, orgen lu ker u taven tsung, hanma uwegh nagh lu a ahôaveegh ataratar man hanma nguhar kpaa lu a ahôangahar ataratar, kohol a cii ka ikundu kar anyiin je la; un kpaa lu Orrafa." 
2Samuel21:21 Er a gba lahan Iserael yô, Yonatan wan u Shimei, anngô u Davidi, wua un." 
2Samuel21:22 Mba unyiin mban cii, lu ônov mba Rafa ken Gati; Davidi man mbayev nav wua ve." 
2Samuel22:1 Tsô Davidi ôr kwagh a TER sha asemberakaa a icam ne sha iyange i TER yima un sha ikev i mbaihomov nav cii, kua sha ikev i Saulu kpaa la." 
2Samuel22:2 A kaa er: TER ka vande wam man garutya wam, kua Oryiman wam kpaa;" 
2Samuel22:3 Aôndo wam, vande wam u taver, ka sha a Na me suur ye; ka perutya wam man korough ku myom wam, barwoogh wam man ijiir yam i yeren kpaa, Oryiman wam; U yimam sha ikev i kwagh u aperagh;" 
2Samuel22:4 M yer TER u A kom u á wuese Un yô, ka nahan man ka i yimam sha ikev i mbaihomov av ye." 
2Samuel22:5 Gadia agôndoamnger a kuugh kasem, iyuhamnger i mtim ta sha a mo." 
2Samuel22:6 Ikor i Sheol kasem; akaahônon a kuugh tserem. 
2Samuel22:7 Ken mkighir u i kighir mo ne, m yila TER; een, m yila Aôndo wam, A ungwa imo yam, ken tempel Na, mliam am nyôr Un ken ato." 
2Samuel22:8 Tsô tar tenger er ngigh ngigh, amagh a Sha kpaa tenger; i tenger a, sha ci u A yugh yô." 
2Samuel22:9 Mnyim due Un ken ahenga kôndo sha, usu due ken zwa Na hia je, aka kpaa kôr usu sha u." 
2Samuel22:10 A nelem Usha, A hungwa shin inya, angôghime lu shin angahar a Na." 
2Samuel22:11 A unde sha cerubi, A purugh; een, i nenge a Na sha akper a ahumbe." 
2Samuel22:12 A gema ime, i hingir ityumbe Na i kasen Un wan atô, mngerem ma wan ime kua abeen a il." 
2Samuel22:13 Sha iengem i sha ishigh Nagh la, akausu yegh." 
2Samuel22:14 TER dura Sha, Uhembansha kende a imo Na sha." 
2Samuel22:15 A ker avaan a Na, A sambe ve; inyiar Na nyiar, nzughul a ve." 
2Samuel22:16 Zum la tareghnyaagh u zegemnger due, amagh a taregh hingir ken igbar, sha myange u TER, sha m-ee u humbe u ken ahenga a Na." 
2Samuel22:17 A naregh uwegh sha A kôrom, A dughum shin uzegembamngerev;" 
2Samuel22:18 A yimam sha ikev i orihom wam u ageegh, sha ikev i mba ve kerem ihom la; gadia ve hembam agee." 
2Samuel22:19 Ve ta sha a mo sha iyange i ican yam; kpa TER lu ishuur wam. 
2Samuel22:20 A va a mo hen ijiir i gbanger, A yimam sha ci u i doo Un a mo yô." 
2Samuel22:21 TER er a mo vough sha mlu wam u perapera; A nam injar sha mwanger u ave am. 
2Samuel22:22 Gadia m wa igbenda i TER iko, m undu Aôndo wam sha u eren ifer ga." 
2Samuel22:23 Gadia akaaôron a Na a jirigh cii lum sha ishi; m hunde ishima sha akaawan a Na kpaa ga. 
2Samuel22:24 M lu jighilii sha ishigh Nagh; m kem iyol m nyagh iferkwagh yam. 
2Samuel22:25 Ka nahan man TER A nem injar sha perapera wam; sha inja i mwanger wam sha ishigh Nagh ye. 
2Samuel22:26 Or u nan zungu mhôônom yô, U tese di nan mhôônom Ou ma zungwen je; or u mimi yô, U tese nan mimi Wou je" 
2Samuel22:27 or u wang kpaa, U tese nan iyol You er U lu wang yô; kpa or u nan lu ormimi ga yô, U shi U tese nan di ishimanyoon You je." 
2Samuel22:28 Gadia We U yima ior mba i kighir ve a ican yô, kpa ashe a Ou nga ihom a mbagengeseyol; U hee ve." 
2Samuel22:29 Gadia U ngu imenger yam TERE; TER wanger ime yam. 
2Samuel22:30 Gadia ka sha agee Ou je, man m te num sha ikumutya ye, shi ka sha agee a Aôndo wam je m tsugh gilgar m aver ye." 
2Samuel22:31 Gbenda u Aôndo yô, ka u jighilii je; mkaanem ma TER ma wang cii. Un ka perutya u mba ve suur sha a Na la cii." 
2Samuel22:32 Gadia ka an nan lu Aôndo, saa TER tseegh gaa? Man ka an nan lu vande, saa Aôndo wase tseegh gaa?" 
2Samuel22:33 Aôndo ka gar wam u utya u taver; A gema gbenda wam u hingir vough. 
2Samuel22:34 A gema angahar a am, hingir er ka a ashim yô; A erem m tile sha ajiir a am a taven sha." 
2Samuel22:35 Ngu tesen ave am ityav mbi nôngon zan zan akaseaveegh am nga hende ada u iyôgh ki bashigh. 
2Samuel22:36 U nam perutya u myom Wou kpaa; ishima You i legh legh erem m gba ikôr. 
2Samuel22:37 U naregh a-avenangahar am gba ca, angahar a am kpaa a dolough ga." 
2Samuel22:38 M zenda mbaihomov av ityô m tim ve; m hide je ga, saa m vande timin ve." 
2Samuel22:39 M tim ve, m her ve, je, ve fatyô u moughon ga; ve gbidye inya hen angahar a am." 
2Samuel22:40 Gadia U wam agee iyol, sha u zan ityav; mba ve mough num a mo yô, U er ve ve shiligh hen ikum yam." 
2Samuel22:41 Man shi U na mbaihomov av ve yevese mo, mba ve kerem ihom yô, m tim ve." 
2Samuel22:42 Ve yenge keen, ve yenge keen, kpa or u yiman ve lu ga; ve nenge sha TER je kpaa, kpa A rumun ve ga." 
2Samuel22:43 Tsô m kume ve, ve hingir er vuulevu u hen inya nahan, m ndyar ve er angbiôr sha igbenda nahan, m sambe ve kera." 
2Samuel22:44 U yimam sha inyum i ior av; U kuram m hingir orhemen u akuraior. Ior mba m fe ve ga kpaa, ve hingir mba shilen mo" 
2Samuel22:45 Atôatyev va hen a mo agurenu; er ve ungwa a ungwa gwa wam tseegh tsô, ve rumun imo yam je." 
2Samuel22:46 Atôatyev use, ve due hen ajiir a ve a ken iuv la, a akarkase iyol." 
2Samuel22:47 TER ngu uma; i̱ wuese Vande wam; i̱ kende Aôndo u A lu vande u myom wam ne sha! 
2Samuel22:48 Ka Aôndo u A oron iyev sha ci wam, u A ne akuraior sha ikev yam," 
2Samuel22:49 u A due a mo sha ikev i mbaihomov av; een, U kendem sha sha mba ve hendan a mo; U yimam sha ikev i iferor." 
2Samuel22:50 Ka nahan man me wuese We ken akuraior TERE, me wa atsam a wuese iti You kpaa ye." 
2Samuel22:51 Ngu nan tor Na myom u vesen; ngu tesen erdoo Na a u A shigh un mkurem la, a Davidi kua tsombor na gbem." 
2Samuel23:1 Ka akaaôron a Davidi a masetyô ne: Davidi wan u Yese ngu ôron, or u i kende un sha la, ngu ôron, ka or u Aôndo u Yakob, u i shigh un mkurem, or u doon ishima ken atsam a Iserael je la." 
2Samuel23:2 Jijingi u TER ôr kwagh ken a mo, kwaghôron Na kpaa ngu sha nombor wam," 
2Samuel23:3 Aôndo u Iserael kaa kwagh, Vande u Iserael ôr kwagh a mo: Or u hemban u a tem tor sha ior, u a tem tor, a cie Aôndo," 
2Samuel23:4 una lu er iwanger i pepe, er iyange ka ia duen nahan, er sev mbu abeen ka a lu ga la, iyange i wanger; man er ura ka u nôô, toho u mende shin inya u hôm nahan." 
2Samuel23:5 Kape ya wam a lu hen Aôndo je la gaa? Gadia A ya ikur i tsôron a mo, i i vande sôron i vighe vighe, man ka i bunden ga kpaa; gadia myom wam cii kua isharen yam cii, Una er er vea vese gaa?" 
2Samuel23:6 Kpa agbilinaior yô, a cii, nga er usaa mba i hee kera nahan, gadia á kôr ve sha uwe ga;" 
2Samuel23:7 kpa a lu or ka benden a ve yô, nana̱ vande lun a ikagh ki iyôgh man ihandeiwange sha uwe, á nande ve sha usu purututu hen ijiir la je" 
2Samuel23:8 Anomaior a Davidi lu a mi yô, ka ati a ve ne: Or u hen Shebeti, Ortakemoni, orvesen u mbahemen ityav, ka Adino Oreseni je la, a nôngo ityav a ior deri anigheni a wua ve icin i môm." 
2Samuel23:9 Ken ijime na yô, lu Eleasar, wan u Dodo, wan u Orahohi, lu u môm ken anomaior atar a a lu a Davidi ityô la; zum u ve lu suwen num a Mbafiliti mba ve kohol sha u nôngon ityav la, Mbaiserael lu kôndon yô," 
2Samuel23:10 a mough a tile sha, a wua Mbafiliti zan zan uwegh kpe un, uwegh nagh var sha sanker na kpaa; TER na zegemhembe sha iyange la; ior mase van un ijime sha u va yan ishar tseegh." 
2Samuel23:11 Or u nan dondo sha a na yô, lu Shama, wan u Agee, Orharari. Mbafiliti kohol imôngo henpe sule u alev a vegh vegh lu yô; ior yevese Mbafiliti." 
2Samuel23:12 Kpa un yô, tile her atô u sule la, a sendegh her, a wua Mbafiliti; TER na mhembe u vesen." 
2Samuel23:13 Ior itiar ken mbahemenev mba ikundugber mbala, ve sen ve va hen Davidi sha ayange a sundan iyiav, hen bar u Adulam; ikumutya i Mbafiliti gema haa afo shin pev u Refaim." 
2Samuel23:14 Hen shighe la Davidi lu ken garutya; ikumutya i Mbafiliti gema haa ken Betelehem. 
2Samuel23:15 Tsô sar Davidi tsung, a kaa er: Ma or ma nan shi nem mngerem ma shin ijôr i Betelehem i i lu hen hunda la, ma m me!" 
2Samuel23:16 Tsô anomaior atar la tor hen atô u ikumutya i Mbafiliti za kese mngerem shin ijôr i Betelehem i i lu hen hunda la, ve va na Davidi; kpa a kera rumun u man ma ga, a gema a haa ma inya sha ishigh ki TER." 
2Samuel23:17 Shi a kaa er: TERE, me er nahan mayange ga, kera ka awambe a ior mba ve te uma ve kera gaa? Nahan a rumun u man ga. Ka kwagh u anomaior atar la er je ne." 
2Samuel23:18 Abishai, anngô u Yoabi wan u Seruya, lu orhemen ken ve mba utar mbala. A kende iwange na sha ior deri utar a wua ve je, nahan a due iti ken ve mba utar mban." 
2Samuel23:19 Ka un je a hemba icivir ken ve mba utar mban ye gaa? Nahan i ver un orhemen ve, nahan kpaa a ar sha mba utar mba hiihii la ga." 
2Samuel23:20 Benaia, wan u Yehoyada, wan u nomor ugen u ken Kabeseel, u a er akaa a vesen yô, a wua ônov mba Ariel, Ormoabi, uhar; shi a hungwa shin ihungwa a wua begha sha shighe u senou lu haan la." 
2Samuel23:21 A wua Origipiti kpaa, or u kuman ashe; Origipiti la lu a iwange sha uwe, kpa a sen hen a na a gbough, a tsuwe Origipiti la iwange sha uwe, a wua un sha iwange na la je." 
2Samuel23:22 Ka akaa a Benaia wan u Yehoyada a er je ne, a due iti ken anomaior atar la." 
2Samuel23:23 A hemba mba ikundugber mbala icivir cii je, kpa a ar sha mba utar mba hiihii mbala ga. Davidi ver un orvesen u mbakuran un." 
2Samuel23:24 Asahel anngô u Yoabi, lu u môm ken mba ikundugber la; man Elhanan wan u Dodo u hen Betelehem;" 
2Samuel23:25 Shama, Orharodi; Elika Orharodi;" 
2Samuel23:26 Helese Orpalti; Ira wan u Ikeshi, Ortekoa;" 
2Samuel23:27 Abieser Oranatoti; Mebunai Orhusha; 
2Samuel23:28 Salmon, Orahohi; Maharai, Ornetofa;" 
2Samuel23:29 Helebi wan u Baana, Ornetofa; Itai wan u Ribai u hen Gibea u ken Mbabenyamin la;" 
2Samuel23:30 Benaia, Orpiraton; Hidai u hen iwagh i Gaashi;" 
2Samuel23:31 Abi-albon, Orarbati; Asemaveti, Orbahurim;" 
2Samuel23:32 Eliaba, Orshaalbon; ônov mba Yashen; Yonatan;" 
2Samuel23:33 Shama, Orharar; Ahiam wan u Sharar Orharar;" 
2Samuel23:34 Elifeleti wan u Ahashebai, wan u Ormaakati; Eliam wan u Ahitofel, Orgilo;" 
2Samuel23:35 Hesero, Orkarmel; Paarai, Orarebi;" 
2Samuel23:36 Igal wan u Natan, Orsoba; Bani, Orgadi;" 
2Samuel23:37 Saleki Oramon; Naharai, Orbeeroti, tilin Yoabi wan u Seruya ikav mbi utyav;" 
2Samuel23:38 Ira, Oriteri; Garebi, Oriteri;" 
2Samuel23:39 Uria, Orhiti; kohol ve cii kuma ikundugber kar utaankaruhar je." 
2Samuel24:1 Tsô ishima shi vihi TER a Iserael, nahan A tor Davidi ityô sha u a̱ er ve kwagh u vihin yô. A kaa er: Za, za ôr iyenge i Iserael man i Yuda." 
2Samuel24:2 Tsô tor kaa a Yoabi orhemen u ikumutya, u a lu vea na la, er: Za hegen, zende nyôr ken ikwe i Iserael cii, hii hen Dan zan zan za ar hen Bersheba, ôr iyenge i ior er me fa iyenge i ior cii yô." 
2Samuel24:3 Nahan Yoabi kaa a tor er: TER, Aôndo wou, A̱ seer iyenge i ior kwa deri, ashe a terem tor kpaa a̱ nenge a mi, kpa inja na nan man kwagh ne a gbe terem tor ishima yum nahana?" 
2Samuel24:4 Nahan kpaa imo i tor hemba i Yoabi kua mbahemenev mba akumautya; tsô Yoabi kua mbahemenev mba akumautya due sha ishigh ki tor, sha u za ôron iyenge i ior i Iserael." 
2Samuel24:5 Ve per Yordan ve haa hen Aroer, u a lu ken uwegh ku yanegh ku gar u a lu hen atô a pev u Gati la, zan zan ve za ar hen Yaser;" 
2Samuel24:6 shi ve za hen Gileadi, man hen tar u Tatim-hodeshi, man hen Dan-yaan man hen iningirtar i Shidon," 
2Samuel24:7 ve va hen garutya u Tiru, man agar a Mbahivi cii kua a Mbakanaan; nahan ve va nyôr ken Bersheba u a lu vegher u Imbusutariyan i Yuda la." 
2Samuel24:8 Tsô zum u ve kure ijende ve ken tar la cii yô, ve hide ken Yerusalem; ve tsa ken zende la iwer itiankarinyiin kua ayange ikundu." 
2Samuel24:9 Nahan Yoabi na tor iyenge i ior mba i ôr ve la; ken Iserael yô, mbanôngontyav lu dubu deri anigheni mba tsuwan sanker; man ior mba Yuda yô, lu dubu deri utaan je." 
2Samuel24:10 Tsô ishima na Davidi ibo zum u a ôr iyenge i ior kera la. Nahan Davidi kaa a TER er: M er kwaghbo kpishi je sha kwagh u m er ne; nahan kpaa, TERE, shi ese ibo i wanakiriki Wou ne kera; gadia m er ibumekwagh tsô." 
2Samuel24:11 Er Davidi mough pepe yô, kwaghôron u TER va hen profeti Gadi, or u Davidi, ornengenakaa la, er:" 
2Samuel24:12 Za, za ôr kwagh a Davidi wer: TER ngu kaan nahan er: M ver u akaa atar; tsuwa kwagh u M̱ er u yô." 
2Samuel24:13 Nahan Gadi va hen Davidi va ôr un kwagh la, kaa a na er: Shin ka u ijen i̱ gba ken tar wou anyom ataankaraharou? Shin ka u ú yevese mbaihomov ou iwer itiar, vea lu yan we angaharou? Shin ka u bouange a̱ lu ken tar wou ayange atarou? Nenge hegen, hen kwagh u me za kaa u A tindim la yô." 
2Samuel24:14 Davidi kaa a Gadi er: Kondom iyol kpishi je; yô, sé gba sha ikev i TER tsô; gadia mhôônom Nam ma zungwen ma vese, de rumun wer m̱ gba sha ikev i or ga." 
2Samuel24:15 Tsô TER tindi bouange sha Iserael, hii pepe je zan zan ar sha shighe u i ver la; hii hen Dan zan zan za ar hen Bersheba, ior kpe dubu akunduatargber." 
2Samuel24:16 Zum u ortyom la naregh uwegh sha gar u Yerusalem sha u una tim un yô, mhôônom kôr TER sha kwaghbo la, A gema A kaa a ortyom u timin ior la er: Kuma ve; hide a uwegh ough ijime tsô. Ortyom u TER gema lu hen vande u gbiren alakema u Arauna Oryebushi la." 
2Samuel24:17 Tsô Davidi ôr kwagh a TER zum u a nenge a ortyom u a woo ior la yô, a kaa er: Nenge, m er kwaghbo, m er kwagh u vihin; kpa iyôngo ngin yô, ka nyi i ere? Yô, shi de, uwegh Ough ku̱ lu num a mo kua ya u terem tsô." 
2Samuel24:18 Tsô sha iyange la je, Gadi va hen Davidi va kaa a na er: Kôndo za ta TER atse a nanden nagh sha vande u gbiren alakema u Arauna Oryebushi la." 
2Samuel24:19 Nahan Davidi kôndo sha imo i Gadi, er TER kaa un yô." 
2Samuel24:20 Tsô Arauna ta ashe, za nenge a tor a mbayev nav, lu van her a na; nahan Arauna due ngurum wa ityough inya sha ishigh ki tor." 
2Samuel24:21 Tsô Arauna kaa er: Ka nyi terem tor a ve hen wanakiriki na? Nahan Davidi kaa er: Ka sha u me yam vande u gbiren alakema ne a we, me ta atse a nanden nagh sha mi sha u bouange ne a̱ de u eren ior yô." 
2Samuel24:22 Tsô Arauna kaa a Davidi er: Terem tor a̱ gba tôôn kwagh u a sar un tsô, a̱ na nagh a mi; nenge, abua ngala sha ci u nagh ku nanden man shi ikav mbi gbiren alakema kua ikav mbi abuav mbila, mbi̱ lu ikon i keer usu a min;" 
2Samuel24:23 akaa ne cii, tor, Arauna na tor. Arauna shi kaa a tor er: TER, Aôndo Wou, A̱ rumun we." 
2Samuel24:24 Kpa tor kaa a Arauna er: Ei, saa me yam a yam a we sha ishe i a; me na TER Aôndo wam, nagh ku nanden sha kwagh u m ngohol gbilin ga. Nahan Davidi yam vande u gbiren alakema kua abua la sha ushekel mba azurfa akunduahargber." 
2Samuel24:25 Davidi ta TER atse a nanden nagh sha mi heregh, a na iniav mbi nanden man iniav mbi bem. Nahan TER rumun msen u i er sha ci u tar la yô, tsô bouange la bee hen Iserael." 
1Kings1:1 Davidi bee iyol, a tsa kpishi; vea cir un akondo kpaa, i tsee un iyol ga." 
1Kings1:2 Tsô mbashiren un kaa a na er: I̱ ker terem tor iniunkwase a̱ wasen tor, a̱ koson un, shi a̱ yaven we sha ikum kpaa, sha u i̱ tsee terem tor iyol." 
1Kings1:3 Tsô i ker iniunkwase i doon ashe ken tar u Iserael cii, nahan i zua a Abishagi u Shunam, i va na tor." 
1Kings1:4 Lu wankwase u doon ashe tsung; a koson tor, a wasen un dedoo; kpa tor yav a na ga." 
1Kings1:5 Tsô Adoniya wan u Hagiti gba gengese iyol, a kaa er: Mo me ya tor; tsô a ver akeke man mbaanyinyav kua ior akunduahargber mba zan un sha hemen ayem." 
1Kings1:6 Mayange je, ter na vande vihin un ishima ga, sha u pinen un er: Ka nyi u er nahana? A lu or u doon ashe kpekpe kpaa, i vande maren Abesalom a na." 
1Kings1:7 A tume idyu vea Yoabi wan u Seruya kua pristi Abiatar; nahan ve dondo Adoniya, ve wase un." 
1Kings1:8 Kpa pristi Sadoki man Benaia wan u Yehoyada man profeti Natan man Shimei man Rei kua anomaior a a lu a Davidi la, ve yô, ve dondo Adoniya ga." 
1Kings1:9 Tsô Adoniya sôngo iyôngo man ilev mbi kehen hen iwen i Soheleti, i i lu hen En-rogel la, a lôhô anmgbianev nav, ônov mba tor cii, kua Mbayuda cii, mbashiren tor;" 
1Kings1:10 kpa a lôhô profeti Natan, man Benaia man anomaior kua anngô na Solomon ga." 
1Kings1:11 Nahan Natan ôr kwagh a Batesheba, ngô u Solomon, a kaa er: Shin u ungwa er Adoniya wan u Hagiti a ye tor man ter wase Davidi a fe ga kpa?" 
1Kings1:12 Yô, shi va, m̱ wa u kwagh sha er ú war uma wou kua uma u wan wou Solomon kpaa yô." 
1Kings1:13 Za, za nyôr hen tor Davidi, kaa a na wer: Terem tor, iyange u bum a kpan wou u kwase wer, mimi je, wan wou Solomon una ya tor ken ijime yam, una tema sha ikônough yagh ki torough gaa? Man er nan Adoniya a ye toro?" 
1Kings1:14 Nenge, shighe u ú lu ôron kwagh a tor ave la je, mo kpaa me va nyôr ken ijime you me taver kwaghôron wou la." 
1Kings1:15 Tsô Batesheba nyôr hen tor hen iyou na i tsan, tor bee iyol kumbur kumbur; yô, Abishagi u Shunam lu wasen tor." 
1Kings1:16 Nahan Batesheba ngurum sugh tor. Tor kaa er: Ka nyi i sar uwe? 
1Kings1:17 A kaa a na er: Terem, iyange u bum a kpan wou u kwase sha ishigh ki TER, Aôndo wou, wer: Mimi je, wan wou Solomon una ya tor ken ijime yam, man una tema sha ikônough yagh ki torough je." 
1Kings1:18 Man nenge Adoniya ngu tor; we kpaa, terem tor, u fa ga." 
1Kings1:19 A sôngo ibua man ilev mbi kehen kua iyôngo kpishi, a lôhô ônov mba tor cii, man pristi Abiatar kua kurutya Yoabi kpaa; kpa wanakiriki wou Solomon yô, a lôhô un ga." 
1Kings1:20 We terem tor, ashe a Iserael cii nga sha a we, sha u u̱ kaa ve or u nana tema sha ikônough ki torough ki terem tor ken ijime na yô." 
1Kings1:21 Á lu nahan ga yô, zum u terem tor una yav a uter nav imôngo yô, mo vea wan wam Solomon á gema se sé hingir mbalun a ibo." 
1Kings1:22 Tsô er lu ôron kwagh a tor ave la yô, nenge, profeti Natan va nyôr." 
1Kings1:23 I kaa a tor er: Profeti Natan ngula. Va ar hen tor yô, a ngurum sha ishigh ki tor, a wa ityough inya." 
1Kings1:24 Tsô Natan kaa er: Terem tor, u shi kaa wer: Adoniya una lu tor ken ijime yam, man una tema sha ikônough yagh ki torough je kpa?" 
1Kings1:25 Gadia nyian a sen, a sôngo ibua man ilev mbi kehen kua iyôngo kpishi, a lôhô ônov mba tor cii, man mbahemenev mba utyav kua pristi Abiatar; nenge, mba yan akaa, man akaa, sha ishigh nagh, mba kaan er: Tor Adoniya a̱ tsa sha won!" 
1Kings1:26 Kpa mo, wanakiriki wou, man pristi Sadoki, man Benaia wan u Yehoyada kua wanakiriki wou Solomon yô, a lôhô se ga." 
1Kings1:27 Aluer ka terem tor je, a er kwagh ne yô, nahan u vande pasen mbayev ou or u nana tema sha ikônough ki torough ki terem tor ken ijime na ga." 
1Kings1:28 Tsô tor Davidi gema kaa er: Yilam Batesheba. Tsô a va hen tor, a va tile sha ishigh ki tor." 
1Kings1:29 Nahan tor bum, kaa er: Er TER u A yem uma wam ken atsan am cii A lu u uma ne," 
1Kings1:30 mimi je, er lu m bum a we sha ishigh ki TER, Aôndo u Iserael, mer, wan wou Solomon una ya tor ken ijime yam, man una tema sha ikônough yagh ki torough sha ityough yagh yô, kape me er nyian je la." 
1Kings1:31 Nahan Batesheba ngurum wa ityough inya, a sugh tor, a kaa er: Terem tor Davidi a̱ tsa sha won gbem." 
1Kings1:32 Shi Davidi kaa er: Yilam nen pristi Sadoki, man profeti Natan, kua Benaia wan u Yehoyada. Tsô ve za va sha ishigh ki tor." 
1Kings1:33 Tor kaa a ve er: Kua nen a mbayev mba ter wen, penda nen wan wam Solomon sha alfadari wam iyol yam, za nen a na shin Gihon;" 
1Kings1:34 pristi Sadoki man profeti Natan ve̱ za shighe un mkurem keregh a̱ hingir tor u Iserael; tôngo nen ikor kpaa, kaa nen ner: Tor Solomon a̱ tsa sha won!" 
1Kings1:35 Nahan yô, dondo nen sha a na, kôndo nen, a̱ za tema sha ikônough yagh ki torough; gadia una hingir tor sha ityough yagh; man m ver un mer, a̱ tema orhemen u Iserael kua Yuda cii." 
1Kings1:36 Tsô Benaia wan u Yehoyada, gema kaa a tor er: Amen, Ter, Aôndo u terem tor, A̱ rumun nahan." 
1Kings1:37 Er TER lu a terem tor nahan, kape shi A̱ lu a Solomon la, A̱ maa ikônough nagh ki torough ki̱ hemba ikônough ki torough ki terem tor Davidi icivir." 
1Kings1:38 Nahan pristi Sadoki man profeti Natan man Benaia wan u Yehoyada kua Mbakereti man Mbapeleti ve sen ve za penda Solomon sha alfadari u tor Davidi, ve za a na shin Gihon." 
1Kings1:39 Tsô pristi Sadoki tôô korough ku mkuregh ken tenti, shighe Solomon. Ve tôngo korough; ior cii kaa er: Tor Solomon a̱ tsa sha won!" 
1Kings1:40 Ior dondo sha a na, kôndo, ior gba tôngon amar ember, saan ve iyol kpishi je, inya tenger sha acin a ve." 
1Kings1:41 Tsô Adoniya kua ior mba i lehe la cii, ve ungwa zum u ve bee kwaghyan la. Man zum u Yoabi ungwa korough yô, a kaa er: I er nan man ayôôso a lu ken gar yum nahana?" 
1Kings1:42 Ngur ôron kwagh nahan yô, nenge, Yonatan wan u pristi Abiatar za va; tsô Adoniya kaa er: Nyôr je, gadia we u ngu ormimi je, u ngu van a loho u dedoo kpaa." 
1Kings1:43 Kpa Yonatan gema kaa a Adoniya er: Mimi je, ter wase, tor Davidi ver Solomon tor;" 
1Kings1:44 shi tor tindi pristi Sadoki man profeti Natan man Benaia wan u Yehoyada kua Mbakereti man Mbapeleti a na imôngo, ve na un alfadari u tor je a henda." 
1Kings1:45 Pristi Sadoki kua profeti Natan ve shighe un mkurem shin Gihon er a̱ tema tor; ve mough keela, ve kôndo a iember je, gar cii hingir yagh yagh. Ka ayôôso a ne ongo je la." 
1Kings1:46 Solomon kpaa za tema sha ikônough ki torough. 
1Kings1:47 Shi mbayev mba tor va sha u va veren ter wase tor Davidi doo doo kpaa, ve kaa er; Aôndo wou A̱ civir iti i tor Solomon i̱ hemba iti you, A̱ er ikônough nagh ki torough ki̱ hemba ki you; tsô tor kpaa suwa ityough inya er msen sha gambe na." 
1Kings1:48 Shi tor kaa nahan er: I̱ wuese TER, Aôndo u Iserael, u A ne or u teman sha ikônough yagh ki torough nyian ne, m nenge sha ashe am je." 
1Kings1:49 Tsô ior mba Adoniya lôhô ve la cii, cier ve iyol, ve hembe, hanma or kôr gbenda u nan." 
1Kings1:50 Adoniya kpaa cia Solomon; tsô a mough a za kôr ave sha akoratseegh. 
1Kings1:51 Nahan i za kaa Solomon er: Nenge, Adoniya ngu cian tor Solomon; gadia nenge a kôr ave sha akoratseegh, ngu kaan er: Tor Solomon a̱ vande bumun a mo er una wua wanakiriki na sha sanker ga." 
1Kings1:52 Tsô Solomon kaa er: Aluer una lu ormimi yô, ma gwarce na una gba inya ga; kpa aluer á zua un a ifer yô, una kpe." 
1Kings1:53 Tsô tor Solomon tindi, i za hungwa a na sha atse a nanden nagh sha mi. Nahan a va a va gure a sugh tor Solomon. Tsô Solomon kaa a na er: Gba yemen hen ya wou tsô." 
1Kings2:1 Tsô ayange nga sôôn a Davidi una kpe yô, a ôr kwagh a wan na Solomon, a kaa er:" 
1Kings2:2 M ngu zan sha gbenda u ior mba sha won cii; yô, taver ishima, tese iyol you er u lu nomsoor yô;" 
1Kings2:3 ver ishima sha imo i TER, Aôndo wou, zaan sha igbenda Na, ver ishima sha akaawan a Na man atindi a Na man akaaôron a Na sha u ú lu a iveren ken akaa a ú er cii, man sha hanma ian i wea geman cii;" 
1Kings2:4 sha u TER A̱ kure kwaghôron Na, u A ôr sha a mo la er: Aluer ônov ou vea ver ishima sha igbenda ve, sha u vea zenden sha ishigh Yagh sha mimi a asema ve cii kua uuma vev cii kpaa yô, ú ban a or u teman sha ikônough ki torough ki Iserael ga." 
1Kings2:5 Man shi u fa kwagh u Yoabi wan u Seruya lu erem yô; ka kwagh u lu er a mbahemenev uhar mba akumautya a Iserael la, ka Abiner wan u Ner man Amasa wan u Yeter, mba a wua ve a haa awambe a utya sha ayange a bem, nahan awambe a utya haa un sha kwange na u shin iwenge na, man shi sha akôv a shin angahar a na la." 
1Kings2:6 Yô, er a na sha kwaghfan wou, de rumun ityough nagh ki ivuugh ki̱ senen shin Sheol bem bem ga." 
1Kings2:7 Kpa er a ônov mba Barshilai, Orgileadi la, dedoo; ve̱ lu ken mbayan kwagh a we imôngo je; gadia kape iyange ve va her a mo, zum u m lu yevese anngôu Abesalom la." 
1Kings2:8 Nenge, Shimei, wan u Gera, Orbenyamin u ken Bahurim ngu a we, un u lu tuhwam boutyuhwan sha iyange i m lu zan sha Mahanaim la; kpa a va keghem gbenda hen Yordan, nahan m bum a na sha ishigh ki TER m kaa mer, me wua u sha sanker ga." 
1Kings2:9 Kpa hegen yô, de kera gbe den un nahan ga, gadia we u ngu or u fan kwagh je; nahan yô, gba fan kwagh u a doo u ú er un tsô, hungwa a ityough nagh ki ivuugh shin Sheol a awambe sha mi." 
1Kings2:10 Tsô Davidi yav a uter nav imôngo, i ii un ken gar u Davidi." 
1Kings2:11 Ayange a Davidi lu tor sha Iserael yô, kuma anyom akunduahar; a tema tor ken Heberon anyom ataankarahar, lu tor ken Yerusalem anyom ikundugber kar atar." 
1Kings2:12 Nahan Solomon tema sha ikônough ki torough ki ter na Davidi; tor na taver tsung. 
1Kings2:13 Tsô Adoniya wan u Hagiti va hen Batesheba ngô u Solomon. A pine un er: U va ka bem kpa? A kaa er: Ka bem. 
1Kings2:14 A gema a kaa er: Kwagh gbam u ôron a we. A kaa er: Ôr ase. 
1Kings2:15 A kaa er: U fa tor lu u wam, Iserael cii kpaa lu veren ashe sha a mo er m̱ ya tor; kpa kwagh va gema, tor hingir u anngôm; gadia ka TER A ne un ye." 
1Kings2:16 Man hegen yô, senegh agh a we yô, ka di kwagh môm tsô, de nyumum ga. A kaa a na er: Ôr ase." 
1Kings2:17 A kaa er: Shi ôrom kwagh a tor Solomon (gadia una nyiman imo you ga), a̱ nam Abishagi u Shunam a̱ lu kwase wam." 
1Kings2:18 Batesheba kaa er: Ka sha mi; me ôr tor kwagh wou ne. 
1Kings2:19 Tsô Batesheba za hen tor Solomon, sha u za ôron un kwagh u Adoniya la. Nahan tor mough sha, za kohol un, sugh un, a ngurum inya, tsô a hide a tema sha ikônough nagh ki torough, shi a kaa, i̱ ver ikônough sha ci u ngô u tor; tsô a tema un ken uwegh ku yanegh." 
1Kings2:20 Nahan a kaa a tor er: M ngu sônon we ankwagh u kiriki tsô, de nyumum ga. Tor kaa er: Gba sônon tsô ngôm; gadia me nyume u ga." 
1Kings2:21 A kaa er: Rumun, i̱ na anngô u Adoniya Abishagi u Shunam a̱ lu kwase na." 
1Kings2:22 Tsô tor Solomon gema kaa a ngô na er: Ka nyi u keren Abishagi u Shunam sha ci u Adoniya? Yô, ker un ase tor kpaa; gadia ka anngôm u vesen; ker sha ci na man pristi Abiatar kua Yoabi wan u Seruya kpaa." 
1Kings2:23 Tsô tor Solomon bum sha ishigh ki TER kaa er: Aôndo A̱ er a mo nahan shi i̱ hemba nahan kpaa, aluer Adoniya una zua a ku sha kwaghôron ne ga yô." 
1Kings2:24 Hegen yô, er TER A lu u uma ne, u A verem, A pendem sha ikônough ki torough ki terem Davidi, man A nem ya sha ityendezwa Na la, mimi je, á wua Adoniya nyian ne." 
1Kings2:25 Tsô tor Solomon tindi Benaia wan u Yehoyada; a za ta num sha a na, wua un." 
1Kings2:26 Shi tor kaa a pristi Abiatar er: Yem ken Anatoti, ken tar wou, gayô, u kuma ku, kpa me wua u hen shighe ne ga, gadia u tôô areki u Ter AÔNDO sha ishigh ki terem Davidi je, man shi u ya ican a terem ityô kpaa." 
1Kings2:27 Kape Solomon zenda Abiatar dugh un ken tom u pristi u TER la; sha er kwaghôron u TER lu kaa sha ya u Eli ken Shilo la, a̱ kure sha mi vough." 
1Kings2:28 Tsô Yoabi ungwa agwa (gadia Yoabi ta ken Adoniya, kpa iyange ta ken Abesalom ga), nahan Yoabi yevese za hen tenti u TER, za kôr ave sha akoratseegh." 
1Kings2:29 Tsô i va kaa tor Solomon er: Yoabi yevese za hen tenti u TER; nenge, ngu hen atse a nanden nagh sha mi. Nahan Solomon tindi Benaia wan u Yehoyada, kaa er: Za, za wua un." 
1Kings2:30 Tsô Benaia va hen tenti u TER, va kaa a na er: Tor kaa er, u̱ due. Kpa a kaa er: Ei, me kpe heen. Nahan Benaia hide va ôr tor er: Kape Yoabi a gem a kaam ne." 
1Kings2:31 Tor kaa a na er: Er, er a kaa nahan, wua un, za ii, sha er ú kar a ike i awambe a Yoabi lu haa a ityôikaa ga la, sha a mo kua ya u terem kera yô." 
1Kings2:32 TER A̱ hide a awambe na sha ityough nagh, sha ci u a wua ior ihiar i i hemba un perapera kua inja i doon kpaa yô, a wua ve sha sanker, terem Davidi kpaa fa ga, lu Abiner wan u Ner, orhemen u ikumutya i Iserael man Amasa wan u Yeter orhemen u ikumutya i Yuda." 
1Kings2:33 Nahan awambe ve a̱ hide sha ityough ki Yoabi man sha tsombor na gbem; kpa Davidi man tsombor na man ya na kua ikônough nagh ki torough yô, vea lu a bem u TER gbem sha won." 
1Kings2:34 Tsô Benaia wan u Yehoyada kôndo za ta num sha a na, a wua un, i ii un hen ya na iyol na, ken desereti." 
1Kings2:35 Tsô tor ver Benaia wan u Yehoyada orhemen u ikumutya sha ityough nagh; man pristi Sadoki yô, tor ver un sha ityough ki Abiatar." 
1Kings2:36 Shi tor tindi er i̱ yila Shimei; a kaa a na er: Maa ya wou ken Yerusalem, tema ker, de kera duen ker zaan mape ga." 
1Kings2:37 Gadia iyange i ú due, ú per uwagh u Kideron yô, fa dedoo, ú kpe keng, awambe a ou aa lu sha ityough you." 
1Kings2:38 Shimei gema kaa a tor er: Mkaanem ou doo; er terem tor a kaa yô, kape wanakiriki na una er je la. Nahan Shimei tema ken Yerusalem ayange kpishi." 
1Kings2:39 Tsô anyom nga kar atar yô, mbayev mba Shimei uhar yevese yem hen Akishi wan u Maaka, tor u Gati. Tsô i va kaa Shimei er: Nenge, mbayev ou mba ken Gati." 
1Kings2:40 Nahan Shimei mough kange jaki na shidi, za ken Gati hen Akishi, sha u za keren mbayev nav; Shimei za za kua a mbayev nav ken Gati hide a ve." 
1Kings2:41 Nahan i va kaa Solomon er: Shimei due ken Yerusalem za ken Gati, a shi a hide." 
1Kings2:42 Tsô tor tindi i za yila Shimei, a kaa a na er: Iyange m kaa u, u bum sha ishigh ki TER, m kaa a we je mer: Fa doo doo, iyange i ú za zende mape yô, ú kpe kpee gaa? U kaa a mo je wer: Mkaanem ou mara doo; m ungwa." 
1Kings2:43 Man er nan u we iko sha mbum u TER man sha kwagh u m kaa u la ga? 
1Kings2:44 Tor shi kaa a Shimei er: U fa aferakaa cii a ishima you kpaa i fe yô, a u er a terem Davidi la, yô, TER Una hide a ifer you sha ityough you." 
1Kings2:45 Kpa tor Solomon yô, una lu a iveren ikônough ki torough ki Davidi kpaa kia lu dông sha ishigh ki TER gbem." 
1Kings2:46 Tsô tor kaa Benaia wan u Yehoyada; nahan a due a za ta num sha a na, a wua un. Nahan tor taver sha ikev i Solomon." 
1Kings3:1 Tsô Solomon kôr hur a Farao tor u Igipiti, a er wan u Farao a va lu a na ken gar u Davidi zan zan a maa ya na bee, man iyou i TER, kua gilgar u kasen Yerusalem la kpaa." 
1Kings3:2 Ior gema lu sôngon iniav sha ajiir a taven sha tsô, gadia zan zan ar hen shighe la, i lu a maa iyou sha ci u iti i TER ga." 
1Kings3:3 TER doo Solomon ishima, a lu zan sha akaawan a ter na Davidi; ka di tsô er a lu sôngon iniav, nanden mbi sha ajiir a taven sha la yô." 
1Kings3:4 Tsô tor za ken Gibeon sha u za nan nagh ker, gadia ijiir i taven sha la lu i hemban vesen; Solomon nande iniav kuma dubu sha atse a nanden nagh sha mi la." 
1Kings3:5 Ken Gibeon la, TER ande hen Solomon ken mnyam ma cien tugh. Aôndo kaa er: Sônom kwagh u a sar u u M̱ na u yô." 
1Kings3:6 Tsô Solomon kaa er: U tese wanakiriki wou terem Davidi erdoo u vesen, er a lu zenden sha ishigh You sha mimi man sha perapera man sha ishima i wang a We imôngo yô, man U ver un erdoo u vesen ne, er U na un wan Wer a̱ tema sha ikônough nagh ki torough er i lu nyian nahan ne." 
1Kings3:7 Hegen yô, TERE, Aôndo wam, U ver wanakiriki Wou tor sha ityough ki terem Davidi; man m ngu wanakiriki u kpeghee tsô, m fa u duen man u nyôron kpaa ga." 
1Kings3:8 Wanakiriki Wou ngu hen atô u ior ou mba U tsough, ikpelaior mba i fetyô u ôron ve ga, shin u fan iyenge ve kpaa ga, sha ci u mngee ve." 
1Kings3:9 Na wanakiriki Wou ishima i fan kwagh er una ôron ior Ou ijir, er una paven perapera a ifer yô; gadia ka anti je, nana fatyô u ôron imbaikpelaior You ne ijiri?" 
1Kings3:10 Er Solomon sôn kwagh ne nahan yô, doo TER." 
1Kings3:11 Tsô Aôndo kaa a na er: Er u sen kwagh ne, u sen u tsan sha won ga, man u sen inyaregh ga, shi u sen u wuan mbaihomov ou kpaa ga, u gem u sen kwaghfan er ú fatyô u ôron ijir yô," 
1Kings3:12 nahan M er sha imo you; nenge, M na u ishima i fan kwagh man i kaven kwagh je, ma or vande ngun er we nahan ga, man ma or nana mough ken ijime you nana kuma sha a we kpaa ga." 
1Kings3:13 M shi M na u kwagh u u sen ga kpaa, ka inyaregh man icivir, zan zan je yô, sha ayange a ou cii, á zua a ma tor ugen u kuman sha a we ga." 
1Kings3:14 Aluer ú zenden sha igbenda Yam, ú veren ishima sha akaawan a Am man sha atindi a Am, er teru Davidi lu zenden nahan yô, Me seer we ayange kpaa." 
1Kings3:15 Tsô Solomon maa nder; yô, lu mnyam ma cien tsô; nahan a va ken Yerusalem a va tile sha ishigh ki areki u ikuryan u TER, a na iniav mbi nanden, shi a na iniav mbi bem kpaa, a er mbashiren un cii iniongo." 
1Kings3:16 Tsô uidyambakasev uhar, va hen tor, ve va tile sha ishigh nagh." 
1Kings3:17 Kwase u môm la kaa er: Terem, mo vea kwase ne, se mba iyou i môm, mo m mar wan er un lu ken iyou." 
1Kings3:18 Tsô er m mar ayange kar atar yô, kwase ne kpaa mar; se lu imôngo; ma orgen lu a vese ken iyou la ga, saa se uhar tsô, se lu ken iyou la ye." 
1Kings3:19 Wan u kwase ne kpe tugh, gadia a yav a kighir un." 
1Kings3:20 Tsô a mough ateghôtôutu, a tôô wan wam hen ikum yam, zum u kpan wou u kwase lu mnya la, a gbir hen ikum na, a gema a gbir wan na u kpen la hen ikum yam." 
1Kings3:21 Er m mough pepe mer, me na wan atumba yô, nenge, m kav un kpenegh; kpa zum u m kenger un doo doo pepe yô, m nenge lu wan wam u m mar la ga." 
1Kings3:22 Kwase ugen la gema kaa er: Ei, u uma la, ka un a lu wan wam ye, u kpen la ka wan wou. Ngun gema kaa er: Ei, ka u kpen la a lu wan wou ye, u uma ne ka wan wam je. Kape ve lu kpelan kwagh sha ishigh ki tor la." 
1Kings3:23 Tsô tor kaa er: U môm la kaa er: Ngun u a lu uma ne ka wan wam, ka u a kpe la man a lu u wou ye; man ugen gema kaa er: Ei, ka wan wou a lu u kpen ye, wan wam ka u uma je." 
1Kings3:24 Nahan tor kaa er: I̱ va nam sanker. Nahan i va a sanker hen tor. 
1Kings3:25 Tor kaa er: Pav nen wan u uma la avegher ahar; yô, na u môm la vegher, na di ugen la kpaa vegher." 
1Kings3:26 Tsô kwase u wan u uma lu u na la, ôr kwagh a tor, gadia mhôônom kôr un a wan na, a kaa er: Terem, gba nan un wan u uma la tsô, de woo un je ga; kpa ugen la kaa er: I̱ de lu u wam shin u wou kpaa ga, i̱ gba paven tsô." 
1Kings3:27 Nahan tor gema kaa er: Na un wan u uma, de woo un je ga; ka un a lu ngô u wan ne ye." 
1Kings3:28 Tsô Iserael cii ungwa agwa, er tor a kur ijir la yô; nahan ve cia tor, gadia ve kav er kwaghfan u Aôndo a lu ken a na sha u ôron ijir yô." 
1Kings4:1 Nahan tor Solomon tema tor sha Iserael cii. 
1Kings4:2 Ka atiator a na ne: Asaria wan u Sadoki, lu pristi;" 
1Kings4:3 Elihorev kua Ahiya, ônov mba Shisa, lu umaga; Yehoshafati wan u Ahiludi, lu or u ngeren abaver ken takerada;" 
1Kings4:4 Benaia wan u Yehoyada, nengen sha ikumutya; Sadoki kua Abiatar lu upristi." 
1Kings4:5 Asaria wan u Natan, nengen sha mbatarev; Sabudi, wan u Natan, lu ortaregh u vesen, man lu ikar u tor;" 
1Kings4:6 Ahishar lu or u nengen sha ya u tor; Adoniram wan u Abeda, lu or u nengen sha mbaerentom u i kighir ve a kighir yô." 
1Kings4:7 Solomon lu a mbavesen pue kar uhar mba ve nengen sha Iserael cii, mba ve lu koson tor kua ior mba hen ya na yô; hanmô ve vaan a kwaghyan ken inyom i môm uwer môm." 
1Kings4:8 Ati a ve er: Ben-hur, sha tar u iwoogh u Eferaim;" 
1Kings4:9 Ben-deker, ken Makasa man Shaalbim man Bete-shemeshi kua Elon-bete-hana;" 
1Kings4:10 Ben-hesedi ken Aruboti, a lu a Soko kua tar u Hefer cii;" 
1Kings4:11 Ben-abinadabi, sha agungu a Dor cii; Tafati wan u Solomon lu kwase na." 
1Kings4:12 Baana wan u Ahiludi, ken Taanaki man Megido kua Bete-shean cii u a lu ikua ikua a Saretan, vegher u shin Yesereel la, hii hen Bete-shean zan zan za ar hen Abel-mehola, zan zan kar Yokemeam ken hemen;" 
1Kings4:13 Ben-geber ken Ramoti-gileadi, lu a agar a Yair wan u Manase, a a lu ken Gileadi la, shi lu a tar u Argobi u u lu ken Bashan la kpaa, ka uzegembaagarev akunduatar, mba lun a ugil man ihinda i iyôv mbi togula;" 
1Kings4:14 Ahinadabi wan u ldo, ken Mahanaim;" 
1Kings4:15 Ahimaashi, ken Nafetali, un er Basemati wan u Solomon;" 
1Kings4:16 Baana wan u Hushai, lu ken Asher man ken Bealoti;" 
1Kings4:17 Yehoshafati wan u Parua lu ken Isakar; 
1Kings4:18 Shimei wan u Ela, lu ken Benyamin;" 
1Kings4:19 Geber wan u Uri, lu ken tar u Gileadi, ka tar u Shihon tor u Mbaamor man u Ogo tor u Bashan je la, ka un tseegh lu ortaregh ken tar la ye." 
1Kings4:20 Yuda man Iserael ve ngee kpishi er waarawa hen kpe u zegemnger nahan, ve lu yan akaa, man akaa, ve lu yagh yagh." 
1Kings4:21 Solomon tema tor sha ityartor cii, hii hen ifi u Uferati zan zan ar hen tar u Mbafiliti, shi ar henpe tar u Igipiti va kighir la; ve lu tan kpandegh, shi ve lu eren Solomon tom sha ayange a a lu uma la cii." 
1Kings4:22 Kwaghyan u Solomon u sha iyange i môm lu mwem ma tsaan uikaren ikundugber, man mwem ma kengese uikaren akunduatar;" 
1Kings4:23 uicighanmbaabuav pue man abua agen ikundu man iyôngo deri; nahan i ôr ishôso i ken toho er mbaashim man umorya man ikpam ga, man shi uicighanmbaikeghdam kpaa ga." 
1Kings4:24 Gadia a tema tor yande Ifi keen cii, hii hen Tifesa zan zan za ar hen Gasa, sha utor mba yande Ifi keen cii; man a lu a bem hanma ijiir i i kase un cii." 
1Kings4:25 Nahan Yuda man Iserael ve tema doo doo, hanma or hen itine i wain i nan, man hen itine i tur i nan, hii hen Dan zan zan za ar hen Bersheba, sha ayange a Solomon la cii." 
1Kings4:26 Solomon lu a atôr dubu akunduahar sha ci u anyinya a kpelan un akeke, man mbaanyinyav dubu pue kar uhar." 
1Kings4:27 Mbatarev mbala ve kohol kwaghyan sha ci u tor Solomon man sha ci u mba ve yaan kwagh a tor Solomon imôngo, hanma or sha uwer u nan; ve rumun er ma kwagh a̱ ban ga." 
1Kings4:28 Shair man adenga a alakema, sha ci u anyinya man anyinya a yevese fefa la yô, i va a mi hen ijiir i i ver la; hanma or nan va a kwagh u i kaa nan yô." 
1Kings4:29 Aôndo na Solomon kwaghfan man mkav kpishi je, kua ishima i bughun, ngee er waarawa u hen kpezegemnger yô." 
1Kings4:30 Kwaghfan u Solomon hemba kwaghfan u ior mba sha ityoughkitaregh cii, kua kwaghfan u Igipiti cii kpaa." 
1Kings4:31 Gadia a hemba ior mbagenev kwaghfan cii, a hemba Etan Oresera man Heman kua Kalkol man Darda, ônov mba Mahol; lu a icivir ken akuraior a a kase un la cii." 
1Kings4:32 A dugh anzaakaa dubu utar; atsam a na lu dubu môm kar ataan. 
1Kings4:33 A ôr kwagh sha kwagh u ikon, hii sha kon u sedar u sha Lebanon zan zan sha kwagh u hisop u a menden sha kpekpe; shi a ôr kwagh sha kwagh u zendenya man u inyon man a akaa a kpelan iyav kua u ishu." 
1Kings4:34 Ior mbagenev mba ken akuraior cii ve va sha u va ungwan kwaghfan u Solomon, ve mough hen utor mba sha won cii, mba ve ungwa gwa u kwaghfan na la." 
1Kings5:1 Tsô Hiram tor u Tiru tindi mbayev nav hen Solomon; gayô a ungwa gwa er i kôr un tor sha ityough ki ter na; gadia Hiram vande lun huror u Davidi gbem. 
1Kings5:2 Nahan Solomon tindi loho hen Hiram, kaa er:" 
1Kings5:3 U fa er terem Davidi lu fatyô u maan iyou sha ci u iti i TER, Aôndo na, ga yô, sha ci u ityav mbi lu kase un mbi tser la, zan zan TER gema ve, ve hingir un shin akevangahar je." 
1Kings5:4 Kpa hegen yô, TER, Aôndo wam nam mmem hanma ian kpaa, orhendan kwagh a mo ngu ga, ma kwagh u bo kpaa ngu ga." 
1Kings5:5 Man nenge, m ver ishima u maan iyou sha ci u iti i TER, Aôndo wam, er TER lu ôr kwagh la a terem Davidi yô, A kaa er: Ka wan wou u Me ver un sha ikônough you ki torough sha ityough you la, ka un je una maa iyou sha ci u iti Yam ye." 
1Kings5:6 Yô, kaa, i̱ gberem ikon i sedar sha Lebanon; mbatomov av vea lu a mbatomov ou imôngo, me na u tôndo sha ci u mbatomov cii, sha kwagh u ú kaa cii; gadia u fa, ken a vese, mbafan ikon i gberen yum er Mbashidon nahan, mba ga." 
1Kings5:7 Er Hiram ungwa akaaôron a Solomon la yô, a ember kpishi, a kaa er: I̱ wuese TER nyian, u A ne Davidi wan u fan kwagh sha ikurior i vesen ne yô." 
1Kings5:8 Tsô Hiram tindi loho hen Solomon, kaa er: M ungwa kwaghôron u u tindim a mi la; nahan mo kpaa me er sha ishima you cii, sha kwagh u ikon i sedar, kua sha ikon i fer kpaa." 
1Kings5:9 Mbatomov av vea hungwa a i sha Lebanon vea va a mi shin zegemnger; me tar i me kor i, me sen a i shin zegemnger zan zan hen ijiir i u kaam la, tsô me sagh i her, man ú ngohol ye; yô, we kpaa, er sha ishima yam, na ior mba hen ya wam kwaghyan." 
1Kings5:10 Nahan Hiram na Solomon ikon i sedar man ikon i fer sha ishima na cii. 
1Kings5:11 Tsô Solomon gema na Hiram alakema uikaren dubu ikundu man mkurem ma wang uikaren ikundu sha ci u kwaghyan u ior mba hen ya na; kape Solomon naan Hiram sha anyom anyom je la. 
1Kings5:12 TER na Solomon kwaghfan, er A tôndo zwa a na nahan; Hiram man Solomon ve lu bem ayol a ve; ve uhar ve ya ikur ayol a ve." 
1Kings5:13 Tsô tor Solomon kôr ior mba ve va eren un tom u i kighir ve a kighir yô, ken Iserael cii; mbaerentom u i kighir ve a kighir mbala lu ior dubu ikundugber." 
1Kings5:14 A tindi ve hen Lebanon, ior dubu pue sha hanma uwer, ve za musan mbagenev; uwer môm ve lu sha Lebanon, iwer ihiar ve lu hen ya; Adoniram lu or u nengen sha mbatomov mbala." 
1Kings5:15 Shi Solomon lu a ior dubu akunduatargber mba tôôn ikav, man shi ior dubu akunduanyiin mba dughun awen sha iwo;" 
1Kings5:16 man shi mbahemenev mba Solomon mba ve lu sha tom la, lu ior dubu utar man deri utar, mba ve lu nengen sha mbatomov mbala yô." 
1Kings5:17 Tor kaa, i dugh uzegembaawenev mba injaav, sha u timin imagh ki iyou la sha awen a kuan." 
1Kings5:18 Mbamaankwagh mba Solomon man mbamaankwagh mba Hiram kua Mbagebal ve lu kuan a; ve sôr ikon kua awen sha ci u maan iyou la. 
1Kings6:1 Shighe u Iserael due ken tar u Igipiti la, anyom kar deri unyiin man akunduanyiin, tsô sha inyom i sha unyiin i Solomon lu tor sha Iserael la, sha uwer u Shiv, ka uwer u sha uhar je la, a hii u maan iyou i TER." 
1Kings6:2 Iyou i tor Solomon maa TER la yô, iniembe na lu aseva akunduatar, igbanger na lu aseva ikundu, man ityaven na lu aseva ikundugber." 
1Kings6:3 Puadwer u i zor sha ishigh ki kparyoughough u vesen u iyou la lu iniembe aseva ikundu sha igbanger i iyou la; igbanger na lu aseva pue sha ishigh ki iyou. 
1Kings6:4 A gber iyou la a-an, a cir a ikpande atera atera." 
1Kings6:5 Ken kungur u iyou la, a maa ayou ker, ningir tser, suur ken kpekpe u iyoughough kase kparyoughough kua icighankpar u hemban cii la, a maa aniyoughouv ukpo ukpo kase tser." 
1Kings6:6 Kpo u shin inya la, igbangese na lu aseva ataan, u dondon la, igbanger na lu aseva ataratar, u sha utar la, igbanger na lu aseva ataankarahar; gadia a er ugbor ken won sha kpekpe kase iyou la, sha u i̱ de kera tsehen kpekpe u iyou la ga yô." 
1Kings6:7 Zum u i lu maan iyou la yô, i maa i sha awen a i vande kuan a hen ijiir i dughun a la je; i lu ungwan iov i msabe shin ijembe shin hanma ikagh ki tomough ki iyôgh hen iyou la, zum u i lu maan ave la ga." 
1Kings6:8 Hunda u nyôron kpoyou u shin la, lu iyou vegher u ken uwegh ku yanegh; i unden sha gogo agese agese u zan sha kpo u dondon la, shi i due sha u dondon la, i yem sha kpo u sha utar la." 
1Kings6:9 Kape a maa iyou la, a kure i; a cir iyou la sha itiran kua ikpande i sedar." 
1Kings6:10 A maa ayou a a suur ken iyou la cii, hanma kpo ityaven na lu aseva ataan, a zua sha iyou la sha ikon i sedar." 
1Kings6:11 Tsô kwaghôron u TER va hen Solomon, A kaa er:" 
1Kings6:12 Sha kwagh u iyou i u maan ne, aluer wea zaan sha akaawan a Am, wea ôron ijir sha atindi Am, man wea waan iko sha atindi Am cii, ú eren sha mi yô, Mo kpaa, Me kure kwaghôron Wam a we, u lu M ôr a teru Davidi la," 
1Kings6:13 man shi Me tema hen Mbaiserael, Me gbihi ior Av Iserael mayange ga." 
1Kings6:14 Kape Solomon maa iyou ne, kure i la." 
1Kings6:15 A cir ukpekpe mba iyou la kimi sha ikpande i sedar; hii sha tembe u iyou la zan zan za ar sha ikpande i sha ihange cii, a cir ikon sha mi cii; tembe u iyou la kpaa, a cir ikpande i kon u fer sha mi cii." 
1Kings6:16 Vegher u ken ijime i iyou la, a tôndo kpar ugen sha ikpande i sedar, hii shin inya za ar sha ihange, igbanger na lu aseva ikundu; a ver kpar u kimi la sha er a̱ lu icighankpar u hemban cii." 
1Kings6:17 Iyou la, ka kparyoughough u vesen u a lu sha ishigh ki kpar u ker atô je la, iniembe na lu aseva akunduahar." 
1Kings6:18 Ikon i sedar cir iyou kimi; i er eev sha mi, i nger uikparen man uimondon mba ikonov sha mi; akaa ne cii lu sha ikon i sedar; i kera nengen a ma iwen ga." 
1Kings6:19 Shi a sôr kpar u kimi ken atô u iyou la, sha u veren areki u ikuryan u TER ker." 
1Kings6:20 Kpar u kimi la yô, ilihen na lu aseva ikundu man igbanger na kpaa lu aseva ikundu kua ityaven na kpaa lu aseva ikundu, a cir un sha zenaria u wang; atse a nanden nagh sha mi yô, a cir a sha kon u sedar." 
1Kings6:21 Kape Solomon cir iyou la kimi sha zenaria u wang ne; a ta mshirim ma zenaria sha ishigh ki kpar u kimi u a cir un zenaria la. 
1Kings6:22 Iyou la cii, a cir zenaria sha mi zan zan i bee iyou la cii; atse a nanden nagh sha mi a a lu sha ci u kpar u kimi la kpaa, a cir a zenaria iyol." 
1Kings6:23 Ken kpar u kimi la, a er ucerubi uhar sha kon u olev, hanmô ve ityaven na lu aseva pue." 
1Kings6:24 Kpelegh ku cerubi kun lu aseva ataan, shi kpelegh ku cerubi kugenegh kpaa lu aseva ataan; hii hen ikighir i kpelegh môm zan zan za ar hen ikighir i kpelegh kugenegh lu aseva pue." 
1Kings6:25 Cerubi ugen kpaa lu aseva pue; ucerubi uhar cii, ikaren ve lu môm tsô, mluyol ve kpaa lu môm." 
1Kings6:26 Ityaven i cerubi môm lu aseva pue, kape i cerubi ugen kpaa i lu la." 
1Kings6:27 A ver ucerubi ken atô u kpar u kimi; akper a ucerubi naregh, kpelegh ku u môm bende sha kpekpe ngun, kpelegh ku ugen la kpaa bende di sha kpekpe ugen; akper a ve zua ayol a a her atô u iyou." 
1Kings6:28 A cir ucerubi zenaria iyol. 
1Kings6:29 Ukpekpe mba iyou la cii, a er eev sha mi, a nger ucerubi man avile man uimondon mba ikonov sha mi, kpar u kimi kua u ken won la kpaa." 
1Kings6:30 Tembe u iyou la, a cir zenaria sha mi, kpar u kimi kua u ken won la kpaa." 
1Kings6:31 A er ucivir sha kon u olev, sha ci u hunda u kpar u kimi la; kon u hunda la lu a azongo ataan." 
1Kings6:32 Nahan a er ucivir uhar sha kon u olev; a gba eev sha mi, a nger ucerubi man avile kua uimondon mba ikonov sha mi, a cir ve zenaria iyol, a cir ucerubi kua avile la cii zenaria iyol." 
1Kings6:33 Kape a er ikpande i hunda sha kon u olev sha ci u hunda u nyôron ken tempel la, i lu a azongo anyiin," 
1Kings6:34 man ucivir uhar sha ikon i fer; u môm i hure un akpaar ahar, ugen la kpaa i hure un akpaar ahar." 
1Kings6:35 A gba eev sha mi, a nger ucerubi man avile kua uimondon mba ikonov sha mi, a cir ve zenaria u i pesem un i var sha akaa a i nger la." 
1Kings6:36 A kase tembe u kimi sha kpekpe u i maa sha awen a kuan iniongo itiar, man nongo ugen sha ikpande i sedar." 
1Kings6:37 Sha inyom i sha unyiin la i tim imagh ki iyou i TER sha uwer u Shiv. 
1Kings6:38 Sha inyom i sha pue kar môm la sha uwer u Bul, ka uwer u sha anigheni je la, i bee iyou la kua akaa a i cii, sha inja i i cii kpaa. Nahan a maa i anyom ataankarahar." 
1Kings7:1 Solomon maa iyou na anyom pue kar atar, tsô a maa a bee iyou na cii." 
1Kings7:2 Nahan a maa Iyou i Ikô i Lebanon; iniembe i i lu aseva deri, igbanger i i lu aseva akunduahargber, ityaven i i lu aseva ikundugber, i tim i sha mtôm ma ikon i sedar iniongo inyiin, i penda itiran i sedar sha mtôm mara." 
1Kings7:3 Man i san i sha ikon i sedar sha, sha ukpo mba ayoughouv akunduahar kar utaan mba ve lu sha mtô la; sha nongo môm a lu pue kar ataan." 
1Kings7:4 Uwindou lu iniongo itiar, i môôr uwindou utar utar, zua ishigh." 
1Kings7:5 Ihinda cii man uwindou kpaa lu azongo anyiin anyiin akuku; i môôr uwindou utar utar. 
1Kings7:6 Shi a tim Iyou i Mtô kpaa, iniembe i i lu aseva akunduahargber, igbanger i i lu aseva ikundugber, a zor puadwer sha ishigh ki i, a tim mtôm, man a cir haav sha mi." 
1Kings7:7 Shi a maa dwer u ikônough ki tor kpaa, henpe una ôron ijir yô, ka dwer u ijirigh je la; i cir u ikon i sedar hii shin inya je zan zan za ar sha ihange." 
1Kings7:8 Iyou na i tsan ker yô, i lu hen tembe ugen u ken ijime i dwer la, m-er u i er i, lu kwagh môm a dwer la. Shi Solomon er iyou igen er dwer la nahan sha ci u wan u Farao u a er la." 
1Kings7:9 Ayou ne cii lu sha awen a mimi i maa a ye, awen a kuan, a i kar a a kar, i tôndo a sha zerto kimi kua ken won, hii shin imagh zan zan sha kur na, man hii ken won zan zan za ar sha zegetembe la." 
1Kings7:10 Imagh nagh lu sha awen a mimi, awen a tamen, awen a lun aseva pue man awen a lun aseva anigheni." 
1Kings7:11 Sha mkur sha yô, awen agen a mimi lu, awen a kuan a i kar a a kar, man ikon i sedar." 
1Kings7:12 Zegetembe la, i kase un sha awen a kuan iniongo itiar man itiran i sedar nongo môm, vough er tembe u kimi u iyou i TER la nahan, man er puadwer u iyou la nahan." 
1Kings7:13 Tsô tor Solomon tindi er i̱ za va a Hiram u ken Tiru. 
1Kings7:14 A lu wan u kwasecôghol u ken kwe u Nafetali, ter na yô, lu or u Tiru u eren tom sha togula; a iv a kwaghfan man mkav, a fa u eren hanma injatom sha togula. Nahan a va hen tor Solomon a va er tom na cii." 
1Kings7:15 A ker mtôm ma togula mhar, ityaven i hanmôgh lu aseva pue kar anigheni; i kar indi i hanmôgh sha kor u u kom aseva pue kar ahar yô." 
1Kings7:16 A er uindyuruku uhar mba i ker a ker ve sha togula yô, sha u pendan sha ityouv mbi mtôm mara; ityaven i indyuruku u môm lu aseva ataan je, ityaven i indyuruku ugen di kpaa lu aseva ataan." 
1Kings7:17 I er kwagh er ukper mba i tum sha ikar, inja er mshirim nahan, sha ci u uindyuruku mba sha ityouv mbi mtôm mara; utaankaruhar sha ci u indyuruku u môm, utaankaruhar sha ci u indyuruku ugen la kpaa." 
1Kings7:18 Shi a er atam a pomegraneti; iniongo lu ihiar kase kper môm ningir tser, sha ci u cirin uindyuruku mba sha ityouv mbi mtôm mara; sha indyuruku ugen kpaa kape a er la." 
1Kings7:19 Uindyuruku mba ve lu sha ityouv mbi mtôm ma hen puadwer la, ve lu er ka imondon u lôhô nahan, ve tav aseva anyiin." 
1Kings7:20 Ka uindyuruku mba ve lu sha mtôm ma mhar mara, vegher u sha, ikua ikua her ape ve we gbor henpe ukper ve va kighir la; atam a pomegraneti lu deri uhar kase hanma indyuruku sha nongo nongo tser." 
1Kings7:21 A tim mtôm mara hen puadwer u tempel; a tim ityôgh ki ken iyan, a ii ki iti er Yakin; shi a tim ityôgh ki ken imese, a ii ki iti er Boashi." 
1Kings7:22 Sha ityouv mbi mtôm mara i er hwe sha mi sha inja i imondon u lôhô nahan; ka ape i kure tom u mtô la. 
1Kings7:23 Shi a er zegetasa u haan mngerem shin mi, a ker un a ker, hii hen kur ne za ar ken ngula, lu aseva pue, a lu gbilititi, ityaven na lu aseva ataan, kor u lun aseva ikundugber fatyô u kasen un yisan." 
1Kings7:24 Akpoghol kase akur a na tser, sha hanma ishiva a lu pue, a kase zegetasa la ningir tser; akpoghol la lu iniongo ihiar, i ker a sha mi imôngo cii." 
1Kings7:25 A tema sha abua pue kar ahar, a atar ver ishigh ken imbusutarimese, a atar ver ishigh shin ityôtar, a atar ver ishigh ken imbusutariyan, shi a atar ver ishigh sha ityoughkitaregh; i penda zegetasa la sha a, a cii a na atô zua kimi." 
1Kings7:26 A civir er ikevwe nahan, kur na la, lu er kur u iyongo er imondon u lôhô nahan, a ivin sha ubav dubu uhar." 
1Kings7:27 Man shi a er asange a pendan utasa sha mi pue, sha togula, iniembe i ishange i môm lu aseva anyiin, igbanger i i kpaa aseva anyiin, ityaven i i aseva atar." 
1Kings7:28 I er asange la nahan: a lu a ikpande i ken ambusu; ikpande i ken ambusu lu hen atô u mtôm ma sha azongo. 
1Kings7:29 Ikpande i ken ambusu, i i lu hen atô u mtôm ma sha azongo la, ubegha man ibua man ucerubi lu sha i, kua sha mtô kpaa; ubegha man ibua la vegher ve u sha kua u shin kpaa, i har akar a i hure a sha hwe." 
1Kings7:30 Hanma ishange lu a akaver a togula anyiin man itiran i hen atô lu i togula; mtôm ma sha azongo a anyiin lu a aheran; i ker a ker aheran la shin ityô i tasa, man akar a i hure a sha hwe lu hen kpe u a ser ser." 
1Kings7:31 Zwa u i la, lu hen atô u akur a aheran a azongo na la, tav sha, ishiva i môm; zwa u i lu gbilititi lu er ima nahan, lu ishiva i môm man tiôn; zwa u i kpaa i nger akaa sha mi sha hwe; ikpande i i ken ambusu la lu a azongo anyiin akuku, lu gbilititi ga." 
1Kings7:32 Akaver a anyiin la lu ikpande i hen ambusu vegher u shin; ave a akaver la zua sha ishange; ityaven i ikaver i môm lu ishiva i môm man tiôn. 
1Kings7:33 I er akaver la, lu er ikaver u ikyekye i anyinya nahan; ave a a man ajime a a man usepoke mba a man ityev mbi a la, i ker a ker cii." 
1Kings7:34 Aheran lu anyiin sha azongo a anyiin a hanma ishange, aheran la zua sha ishange." 
1Kings7:35 Sha ityough ki ishange la, i er zwa u gbilititi, ityaven i u lu tiônshiva je; sha ityough ki ishange la yô, ave a i man ikpande i ken ambusu a i zua." 
1Kings7:36 Sha ape ave a i a lu la man sha ikpande i ken ambusu a i la, a nger ucerubi man ubegha man atineavilegh sha a-an a a due sha mi cii, man akar a i hure a sha hwe, ningir tser." 
1Kings7:37 Asange a pue la, kape a er a je ne; a cii i ker a inja i môm, ikaren i môm, mluashe môm." 
1Kings7:38 A er atasa pue sha togula; hanma tasa ivin ubav akunduahar; hanma tasa lu aseva anyiin; asange a pue la, hanma ishange tasa lu sha mi môm." 
1Kings7:39 A ver asange la, ataan lu iyou vegher u ken uwegh ku yanegh, shi ataan lu iyou vegher u ken uwegh ku imesegh; shi a ver zegetasa, lu iyou vegher u ken uwegh ku yanegh vegher u sha ityoughkitaregh, ver ishigh ken imbusutariyan." 
1Kings7:40 Hiram er ityev man ushebul kua atasa kpaa. Kape Hiram kure ityom na cii i a er tor Solomon ken iyou i TER la;
