1Kings7:41 mtôm mhar man adôôr ahar a uindyuruku mba ve lu sha ityouv mbi mtô la, man ukper uhar sha u cirin adôôr ahar a uindyuruku mba ve lu sha ityouv mbi mtô la," 
1Kings7:42 man upomegraneti deri unyiin sha ukper mba uhar mbala, iniongo i upomegraneti ihiar sha hanma kper sha u cirin adôôr ahar a uindyuruku mba ve lu sha ityouv mbi mtô la," 
1Kings7:43 man asange pue, man atasa pue sha asange la," 
1Kings7:44 man zegetasa môm, man ibua pue kar ihiar i shin ityô i zegetasa la," 
1Kings7:45 man ityev man ushebul kua atasa; akaa ne cii Hiram er tor Solomon ken iyou i TER sha togula u engem je. 
1Kings7:46 Ka hen gbulumaa u Yordan hen inya i tiher, tor ker a ye, hen harga u Sukoti vea Saretan." 
1Kings7:47 Ikav mbila cii Solomon kar myohom ma mbi ga, gadia mbi ngee yum; myohom ma togula kpaa gande u fan." 
1Kings7:48 Shi Solomon er ikav mbi ken iyou i TER cii sha zenaria, ka atse a nanden nagh sha mi a zenaria, man tebul u i penda ubredi mba sha ishi sha mi la kpaa," 
1Kings7:49 man udaarmbaamengerev mba sha zenaria u wang, utaan ken uwegh ku yanegh, shi utaan di ken uwegh ku imesegh, sha ishigh ki kpar u kimi la; man uimondon mba ikonov mba agbaa a amenger, man akambe kpaa, sha zenaria;" 
1Kings7:50 man ayongo man akambe a sôron amenger a min, man atasa man mbaahwa kua ugbande mba usuv, sha zenaria u wang; man ukokombo mba zenaria mba zeren ihinda i iyou i kimi, ka icighanjiir u hemban cii je la, kua sha ci u ihinda i kparyough u vesen u tempel la kpaa." 
1Kings7:51 Er i kure tom u Solomon er ken iyou i TER cii yô, Solomon nyôr a akaa a ter na Davidi lu tsegha la, azurfa man zenaria kua ikav, a ver a ken ayou a koson akaa ker a iyou i TER la." 
1Kings8:1 Tsô Solomon lôhô mbatamen mba Iserael man mbavesen mba sha ikwe cii kua mbahemenev mba sha uipaven mba Mbaiserael; ve va kohol hen tor Solomon hen Yerusalem, sha u za tôôn areki u ikuryan u TER hen gar u Davidi, ka Shion je la." 
1Kings8:2 Nahan ior mba Iserael cii va kohol hen tor Solomon hen iniongo sha uwer u Etanim, ka uwer u sha utaankaruhar je la." 
1Kings8:3 Mbatamen mba Iserael cii va, nahan upristi za tôô areki la." 
1Kings8:4 Ve va a areki u TER, man tenti u kohol ker la, uicighanmbaakaav cii mba ve lu ken tenti la; ka upristi kua Mbalevi ve va a mi ye." 
1Kings8:5 Tor Solomon kua ior i Iserael cii i i va kohol her a na la, ve lu sha ishigh ki areki, ve lu nan nagh ku sôngon sha iyôngo man ibua, iyenge i i gande u ôron fan." 
1Kings8:6 Nahan upristi va nyôr a areki u ikuryan u TER la, ve va ver un hen ijir na ken kpar u iyou kimi ken icighankpar u hemban cii la, shin atô u akper a ucerubi." 
1Kings8:7 Gadia ucerubi naregh akper a ve sha ijiir i areki la, ucerubi cir areki kua igbough nav." 
1Kings8:8 Igbough mbila lihe je, i nengen a ityouv mbi igbough mbila ken icighankpar sha ishigh ki kpar u kimi la, kpa i nengen a mi ken won ga; mbi her zan zan nyian." 
1Kings8:9 Ma kwagh ugen lu ken areki ga, saa ikpande i awen ihiar i Mose wa kimi hen Horebi, zum u TER ya ikur a Mbaiserael shighe u ve due ken tar u Igipiti la." 
1Kings8:10 Tsô zum u upristi due hen icighanjiir la kera yô, ibeenegh iv ken iyou i TER," 
1Kings8:11 je upristi kera fatyô u tilen eren tom ga sha ci u ibeenegh kila; gadia iengem i TER iv ken iyou i TER la. 
1Kings8:12 Tsô Solomon ôr kwagh, a kaa er: TER kaa er, ka Un pe teman ken angôghime." 
1Kings8:13 Yô, m maa U iyou i teman ker, ijiir i Ú teman ker gbem yô." 
1Kings8:14 Tsô tor gema ishigh ver mkohol u Iserael cii doo doo; mkohol u Iserael cii tile sha. 
1Kings8:15 A kaa er: I̱ wuese TER, Aôndo u Iserael, u A ôr kwagh a terem Davidi sha zwa Na, man A kure un sha uwegh Nagh je, A kaa er:" 
1Kings8:16 Hii sha iyange i M due a ior Av Iserael ken tar u Igipiti la je, M tsuwa ma gar ken ikwe i Iserael Mer, Me maa iyou sha u iti Yam i̱ lu ker ga; kpa M tsuwa Davidi Mer, a̱ tema tor sha ior Av Iserael." 
1Kings8:17 Terem Davidi lu veren ishima er una maa iyou sha ci u iti i TER, Aôndo u Iserael." 
1Kings8:18 Kpa TER kaa a terem Davidi er: Er u ver ishima u maan iyou sha ci u iti Yam yô, u er doo, er u ver ishima nahan yô;" 
1Kings8:19 nahan kpaa, ka we ú maa iyou la ga, wan wou u ú mar iyol you je, ka un una maa iyou la sha ci u iti Yam ye." 
1Kings8:20 TER kpaa A er vough sha kwaghôron Na u A ôr la, gadia mo m va tile sha ityough ki terem Davidi, man m tema sha ikônough ki torough ki Iserael, er TER lu tôndo zwa yô, man m maa iyou la sha ci u iti i TER, Aôndo u Iserael." 
1Kings8:21 M ver ijiir ker sha ci u areki u ikuryan i TER i̱ lu ker, i A ye a uter asev zum u A due a ve ken tar u Igipiti la." 
1Kings8:22 Tsô Solomon kar za tile sha ishigh ki atse a TER a nanden nagh sha mi, sha ishigh ki mkohol u Iserael cii, a naregh ave Sha," 
1Kings8:23 a kaa er: TERE, Aôndo u Iserael, ma Aôndo ugen ngu er We nahan ga, Sha kpaa ga, shin tar kpaa ga, We, u U we iko sha ikuryan man U ver ishima sha erdoo a mbayev Ou, mba ve zenden sha ishigh You a ishima i môm yô;" 
1Kings8:24 We u U kur kwagh u U tôndo zwa a terem Davidi wanakiriki Wou la; mimi je, U ôr kwagh sha zwa Wou, U kure un sha uwegh Ough, er i lu nyian nahan." 
1Kings8:25 Yô, TERE, Aôndo u Iserael, wa iko sha kwagh u lu U tôndo zwa a wanakiriki Wou terem Davidi, er U kaa Wer: Ú ban a or sha ishigh Yagh u nana tema sha ikônough ki torough ki Iserael ga, aluer ônov ou vea ver ishima sha gbenda ve, vea zende sha ishigh Yagh er we u lu zenden sha ishigh Yagh nahan yô." 
1Kings8:26 Yô, TERE, Aôndo u Iserael, kwaghôron Wou u U ôr a terem Davidi wanakiriki Wou la ma a kur sha mi vough." 
1Kings8:27 Aôndo Una tema shin tar mimi jee? Nenge, Sha man Sha u a hembe gban ca la je kpa fatyô u ngohol We ga, man hide iyou i m maa ne?" 
1Kings8:28 Nahan kpaa, wa iko sha msen u wanakiriki Wou kua zamber na, TERE, Aôndo wam, ver ato sha imo i wanakiriki Wou man msen u a sen U nyian ne." 
1Kings8:29 Ashe a Ou a̱ nengen sha iyou ne tugh man atetan kpaa, ka ijiir i U kaa Wer: Iti Yam ia lu her; sha u ú ver ato sha msen u wanakiriki Wou una sôn zum u una ver ishigh hen ijiir ne yô." 
1Kings8:30 Man shi ver ato ungwa zamber u wanakiriki Wou, man u ior Ou Iserael, zum u vea eren msen vea ver ishigh hen ijiir ne yô; een, ungwa Sha, sha ijiir You i teman la, man zum u U ungwa yô, de se kwaghbo." 
1Kings8:31 Aluer or nana er or u nan we ndor a nan kwaghbo, man i ver nan mbum er nana̱ bum, man nana va bum sha ishigh ki atse Ou a nanden nagh sha mi ken iyou ne yô," 
1Kings8:32 ungwa Sha, er sha mi, ôr ijir i mbayev Ou, na iferor ibo, hide nan a ieren i nan sha ityough ki nan; man gema na or u mimi ishô, er a nan sha mimi u nan la." 
1Kings8:33 Zum u mbaihomov vea hemba ior ou Iserael sha ci u isholibo i ve er U yô, aluer vea gema her a We, vea pase iti You, vea er msen vea zamber We ken iyou ne yô," 
1Kings8:34 ungwa Sha, de ior Ou Iserael asorabo a ve, shi hide a ve ken tar u U ne uter vev yô." 
1Kings8:35 Zum u á cir Sha man ura kera nôô ga, sha ci u ve er U isholibo yô, man vea er msen, vea ver ishigh hen ijiir ne, vea pase iti You, vea gema asema sha u den isholibo ve, sha ci u mtsaha u U tsaha ve yô," 
1Kings8:36 ungwa Sha, de isholibo i mbayev Ou kua i ior Ou Iserael kpaa, gadia U tese ve gbenda u doon u vea zenden sha mi yô; yô, nôô ura sha tar Wou, u U ne ior Ou dyako la." 
1Kings8:37 Aluer ijen ia gba sha tar, shin aluer bouange una za va, shin alakema una gba akpor shin mningem, shin ikomon ia za va, shin igyer, aluer mbaihomov vev vea va kase ve ken agar a ken tar ve, shin a lu hanma kwagh u bo, shin hanma inja i uange ia lu kpaa," 
1Kings8:38 hanma msen man zamber u hanma or u ior Ou Iserael nan zamber yô, aluer hanma or nana fa mvihi u ishima i nan iyol i nan, man nana naregh ave sha iyou ne yô," 
1Kings8:39 ungwa Sha, sha ijiir i teman You, de nan isholibo, er sha mi, na hanma or sha ieren i nan cii, er U fe ishima i nan yô (gadia ka We tseegh U fa ishima i ônov mba iorov cii ye);" 
1Kings8:40 sha u ve̱ cia U sha ayange a uma ve cii, ken tar u U ne uter asev ne." 
1Kings8:41 Man shi or u ken nongo ugen u nan lu or u ior Ou Iserael ga yô, u nan dugh ken tar u icaa sha ci u iti You yô," 
1Kings8:42 (gadia vea ungwa gwa u iti You i vesen, man uwegh Ough ku ageegh, man uwegh Ough ku naregh), zum u nana va er msen nana ver ishigh hen iyou ne," 
1Kings8:43 ungwa Sha, hen ijiir You i teman la, er akaa a orvanava la nan sen U cii; sha er akuraior sha won cii a̱ fa iti You man a̱ cia U, er ior Ou Iserael nahan, man shi a̱ fa er iyou ingin i m maa ne ka iti You i yer i min ye." 
1Kings8:44 Aluer ior Ou vea za nôngo ityav a mbaihomov vev, sha hanma gbenda u Ú tindi ve cii, vea sôn TER, vea ver ishigh hen gar u U tsough, man hen iyou i m maa sha ci u iti You ne yô," 
1Kings8:45 ungwa msen ve kua zamber ve Sha, suwe mimi ve." 
1Kings8:46 Aluer vea er U isholibo (gadia or u den eren isholibo nan ngu ga), man ishima ia lu vihin We a ve, Wea na ve sha ikev i mbaihomov, man vea yem a ve uikangen ken tar ve, a lu ca shin a lu ikua ikua;" 
1Kings8:47 kpa aluer vea za hen ken asema a ve ken tar u i ze a ve uikangen la, vea gema ishima vea zamber We ken tar u mba ve ze a ve uikangen la, vea kaa er: Se er isholibo, se er kwaghbo, se er ifer;" 
1Kings8:48 aluer vea hide hen a We a ishima ve cii kua uma ve cii, ken tar u mbaihomov vev, mba ve ze a ve uikangen la, vea sôn U, vea ver ishigh vegher u ken tar ve, u U ne uter vev, hen gar u U tsough man iyou i m maa sha ci u iti You ne yô," 
1Kings8:49 ungwa msen ve man zamber ve Sha, hen ijiir You i teman, suwe mimi ve;" 
1Kings8:50 de ior Ou mba ve er U isholibo ve per atindi a Ou la; er ve ve̱ kôr mhôônom sha ishigh ki mba ve yem a ve uikangen sha u ve̱ zungwe ve mhôônom yô; 
1Kings8:51 gadia ka ior Ou je, ka dyako Wou kpaa u U due a mi ken tar u Igipiti, ken atô u usu u adum;" 
1Kings8:52 ashe a Ou a̱ lu sha zamber u wanakiriki Wou, man sha zamber u ior Ou Iserael, er Ú ver ato her a ve, hanma shighe u vea vaa a We yô." 
1Kings8:53 Gadia ken akuraior a sha won cii ka ve U tsegh ve ye, sha u ve̱ lu dyako Wou, er U kaa a Mose wanakiriki Wou zum u U due a uter asev ken Igipiti la nahan, Tere AÔNDO." 
1Kings8:54 Er Solomon kure msen ne kua zamber ne a TER cii yô, a mough sha ishigh ki atse a TER a nanden nagh sha mi, henpe a gure a naregh ave Sha la." 
1Kings8:55 A tile sha, a ver mkohol u Iserael cii doo doo sha imo i taver taver, a kaa er:" 
1Kings8:56 I̱ wuese TER u A ne ior Nav Iserael mmem, sha kwagh u A tende zwa sha mi cii yô; ma kwaghôron môm sha ityendezwa Na i dedoo cii, i A tôndo a Mose wanakiriki Na la, gba inya ga." 
1Kings8:57 TER, Aôndo wase, A̱ lu a vese, er lu a uter asev nahan, A̱ de undun se ga, man A̱ de te se kera kpaa ga;" 
1Kings8:58 A̱ gema asema ase sha u zan hen a Na, u zenden sha igbenda Na cii, man u wan atindi a Na iko, man akaawan a Na man ajiraôron a Na a A kaa uter asev yô." 
1Kings8:59 Akaaôron a am angan, a m zamber sha ishigh ki TER, a̱ lu ikua ikua a TER, Aôndo wase, atetan man tugh, sha er A̱ suwe mimi u wanakiriki Na man mimi u ior Nav Iserael ayange ayange;" 
1Kings8:60 sha u akuraior a sha won cii a̱ fa er TER, A lu Aôndo yô, mô gen ngu ga." 
1Kings8:61 Yô, ishima yen i̱ lu vough sha ishigh ki TER, Aôndo wase, sha u zenden sha akaawan a Na man u wan atindi a Na iko er i eren nyian nahan." 
1Kings8:62 Tsô tor kua Iserael mba ve lu a na cii, ve na nagh sha ishigh ki TER." 
1Kings8:63 Solomon na TER nagh ku iniav mbi bem sha ibua dubu ikundukaruhar man iyôngo dubu deri man dubu ikundu. Kape tor a Mbaiserael cii ve tsegha iyou i TER la. 
1Kings8:64 Sha iyange la je, tor tsegha ijiir i ken atô u tembe u u lu sha ishigh ki iyou i TER la; gadia ka heregh je a na nagh ku nanden man nagh ku sha samuyia kua ahôm a iniav mbi bem; gadia atse a togula a a lu sha ishigh ki TER la, yina u tôôn nagh ku nanden man nagh ku sha samuyia kua ahôm a iniav mbi bem la." 
1Kings8:65 Kape Solomon a er iniongo hen shighe shon la, a Iserael mba ve lu a na cii; lu zegemkohol, ior hii hen gbenda u karen zan Hamati je zan zan za ar hen uwagh u Igipiti, sha ishigh ki TER, Aôndo wase, ayange ataankarahar kua ayange ataankarahar, ka ayange pue kar anyiin je la." 
1Kings8:66 Iyange i sha anigheni la a na ior gbenda, tsô ve ver tor doo doo; ve yem hen utenti vev saan saan a iember ken asema sha ci u aeren a dedoo a TER A er a wanakiriki Na Davidi kua ior Nav Iserael yô." 
1Kings9:1 Tsô zum u Solomon bee u maan iyou i TER kua iyou i tor, man hanma kwagh u a sar Solomon u eren cii yô," 
1Kings9:2 TER shi ande hen Solomon m-ande u sha kwa har, er lu ande her a na hen Gibeon nahan." 
1Kings9:3 TER kaa a na er: M ungwa msen wou man zamber wou u u zamber sha ishigh Yagh yô; M tsegha iyou i u maa ne, m ver iti Yam Mer i̱ lu her gbem; ashe Am kua ishima Yam kpaa vea lu sha i gbem." 
1Kings9:4 Man we yô, aluer wea zenden sha ishigh Yagh, er teru Davidi nahan a ishima i wang man sha perapera, wea eren akaa a M kaa u cii, wea veren ishima sha akaawan a Am man ajiraôron a Am yô," 
1Kings9:5 Mo kpaa Me taver ikônough you ki torough sha Iserael gbem sha won, sha ityendezwa i M tôndo a teru Davidi Mer, ú ban a or u nana tema sha ikônough ki torough ki Iserael ga la." 
1Kings9:6 Kpa aluer ne de u dondon Mo, ne shin ônov enev, nea waan atindi Am man akaawan a Am a M ver sha ishigh yenegh la iko ga, nea gema nea za civir mbaaôndo mbagenev nea gure nea civir ve yô," 
1Kings9:7 Me dugh Iserael ken tar u M ne ve ne kera, man iyou i M tsegh sha ci u iti Yam ne, Me kar a i sha ishigh Yagh kera; Iserael una hingir kwagh u wan ishenge a min ken akuraior cii;" 
1Kings9:8 shin er iyou ne i gbe ikôr nahan kpaa, hanma or u nana kar hen i cii, á kpiligh nan iyol, nana gbidye vaa; man shi vea kaa er: Ka nyi man TER A er a tar ne kua iyou ne nahana?" 
1Kings9:9 Nahan vea gema á kaa er: Ka sha ci u ve undu TER, Aôndo ve, u A due a uter vev ken tar u Igipiti, ve gem ve ker mbaaôndo mbagenev ve gur ve civir ve, ve er ve tom kpaa yô; ka nahan man TER A ve a kwaghbo ne cii sha a ve nahan ye." 
1Kings9:10 Tsô anyom ikundu a Solomon maa ayou ahar la nga kar yô, ka iyou i TER kua iyou i tor je la," 
1Kings9:11 (Hiram tor u Tiru yô, na Solomon ikon i sedar man ikon i fer kua zenaria, er i sar un cii), nahan tor Solomon na Hiram agar ikundu ken tar u Galilia." 
1Kings9:12 Nahan Hiram due ken tar u Tiru sha u va nengen agar a Solomon na un la, kpa a doo un ga." 
1Kings9:13 Tsô a gema a kaa er: Ka nyi agar u nem ne nahana, anngômô? Nahan maa a ii a iti er, Tar u Kabul, zan zan nyian." 
1Kings9:14 Hiram kpaa tindi tor a utalenti mba zenaria deri man ikundu. 
1Kings9:15 Ityôkwagh i tor Solomon kighir ior a tom yô, lu sha ci u maan iyou i TER man iyou na man Milo man gilgar u Yerusalem man Hasor man Megido kua Geser." 
1Kings9:16 Farao tor u Igipiti vande kôndon, ngohol Geser, nande un sha usu, wua Mbakanaan mba ve tema ken gar la, gema na wan na u kwase iwua, kwase u Solomon la." 
1Kings9:17 Nahan Solomon maa Geser man Bete-horon u Shin la," 
1Kings9:18 man Baalati man Tamar ken ikôngough ki hen tar la," 
1Kings9:19 man agar a ombon iyiav ker, a Solomon lu a mi la cii, man agar a akekeautya a na man agar a mbaanyinyav nav man akaa a a sar Solomon u maan a cii ken Yerusalem man ken Lebanon kua ken tar u a lu tor sha mi cii." 
1Kings9:20 Asande a ior a Mbaamor man Mbahiti man Mbaperishi man Mbahivi man Mbayebushi a a shi her cii, mba ve lu Mbaiserael ga la," 
1Kings9:21 ônov vev mba ve shi ken ijime ve ken tar la, mba Mbaiserael fatyô u timin ve kera ga la, Solomon kighir ve a tom zan zan nyian." 
1Kings9:22 Kpa Mbaiserael yô, Solomon gema ve hingir ikpan ga; kpa ka ve ve lu mbautyav man mbatomov nav man atiator a na man ukurmbautyav nav man mbahemenev mba nengen sha akeke na kua mbaanyinyav nav kpaa ye." 
1Kings9:23 Mbavesen mba sha tom u Solomon yô, lu ior deri utaan man akunduahargber, mba ve nengen sha ior mba eren tom." 
1Kings9:24 Er Wanfarao kough hen ya u Davidi za nyôr hen iyou na i Solomon maa un la yô, maa a maa Milo je." 
1Kings9:25 Sha hanma inyom Solomon a na iniav mbi nanden man mbi bem kwa tar sha atse a TER A nanden nagh sha mi a a ta la; a nanden kwaghhumandoon sha atse a sha ishigh ki TER la. Kape a eren ken iyou la je ne. 
1Kings9:26 Shi tor Solomon er utso ken Eshion-geber u a lu ikua ikua a Eloti, hen kpe u Zegemnger u Nyian, ken tar u Edom." 
1Kings9:27 Hiram kpaa tindi mbayev nav sha utso mbala, ka mba eren tom u utso, mba ve fe zegemnger, sha u ve̱ za a mbatomov mba Solomon imôngo yô." 
1Kings9:28 Nahan ve za hen Ofir ve za kura zenaria keregh, kuma utalenti deri unyiin man ikundu, ve va na tor Solomon." 
1Kings10:1 Zum u torkwase u Sekeba ungwa gwa u Solomon sha kwagh u iti i TER yô, a va u va karen un sha mbampin mba cimin." 
1Kings10:2 A va ken Yerusalem a ior mba va veren un, kpishi je, a urakumi mba tôôn ilyôghonov man zenaria kpishi je, kua awen a injaa. Er a va hen Solomon yô, a ôr un akaa a a lu un ken ishima cii." 
1Kings10:3 Solomon kpaa pase un mbampin nav cii; ma kwagh môm hemba tor, u pasen un ga." 
1Kings10:4 Er torkwase u Sekeba nenge kwaghfan u Solomon cii man iyou i a maa la," 
1Kings10:5 man kwaghyan u sha tebul na man injamtem i ior nav man injamtil i mbatomov nav man akondo a ve man mbanan un kwaghman kua nagh nagh ku nanden ku a naan ken iyou i TER yô, kondo un iyol gbong." 
1Kings10:6 A kaa a tor er: Gwa u m ongo ken tar wam sha akaa a ou kua mfe wou yô, ka mimi je." 
1Kings10:7 Nahan kpaa m na jighjigh sha akaaôron la ga, zan zan m va nenge sha ashe am, yô, i ôron ma kwagh je ga; kwaghfan wou man inyaregh you gande gwa u m ongo yô." 
1Kings10:8 Saan ior ou iyol, saan mbayev ou mban iyol mba ve til sha ishigh you gbem, ve ongo kwaghfan wou ne." 
1Kings10:9 I̱ wuese TER, Aôndo wou, u u doo Un ishima A ver u sha ikônough ki torough ki Iserael; ka er Iserael a doo TER ishima gbem man A ver u tor er u̱ ôron ijir, shi u̱ eren perapera kpaa ye." 
1Kings10:10 Tsô a na tor zenaria kuma utalenti deri man ikundu, man ilyôghonov kpaa ngee kpishi kua awen a injaa; mayange je i kera shi va nyôr a ilyôghonov kpishi er mbi torkwase u Sekeba na tor Solomon la nahan ga." 
1Kings10:11 Utso mba Hiram mba ve za tôô zenaria ken Ofir ve va a mi la, ve za va a ikon i sandal man awen a injaa kpishi kpaa ken Ofir." 
1Kings10:12 Tor er itiran i kôron ave sha mi sha agbur a unden zan sha iyou i TER kua iyou i tor, sha ikon i sandal la; shi a er umolo man mbaadiguve sha ci u mbawanatsam; i kera nyôr a ikon i sandal nahan ga, shi i kera nenge a i nahan mayange kpaa ga zan zan nyian." 
1Kings10:13 Tor Solomon na torkwase u Sekeba akaa a a sar un cii, hanma kwagh u a sôn yô, seer sha akaa a Solomon na un sha inja i tor la. Tsô a mough a yem hen tar na, un a ior nav." 
1Kings10:14 Myohom ma zenaria ma Solomon a zua a mi sha inyom i môm yô, lu zenaria kuma utalenti deri ataratar man akundu atar kar ataratar;" 
1Kings10:15 i ôr kwagh u i zua a mi hen mbazendenkpenga man mbateenkasua, man utor mba akuraior kposo kposo kua ugomna la ga." 
1Kings10:16 Tor Solomon var iperutya deri uhar sha zenaria; a vihi zenaria kuma ushekel deri ataratar sha hanma perutya. 
1Kings10:17 Shi a var akuvautya kpaa deri utar sha zenaria, a vihi zenaria kuma pam utar sha hanma akuvautya; tor ver ve ken Iyou i Ikô i Lebanon." 
1Kings10:18 Shi tor er zegeikôn u tor sha anyi a nortar; a cir un zenaria u wang iyol. 
1Kings10:19 Agbur a unden sha ikônough ki torough kila lu ataratar, ityough ki ikônough kila va igundu ken ijime, man i gema i wa un igyar i kôron ave sha mi, vegher ne man vegher la, henpe teman la, ubegha uhar tile hen igyar i kôron ave sha mi la." 
1Kings10:20 Ubegha pue kar uhar tile sha agbur a unden sha mi ataratar la, ken imbusu ne kua ngila kpaa; mayange je i er kwagh nahan ken tartor ugen ga." 
1Kings10:21 Ayongo a man kwagh a min a tor Solomon cii lu a zenaria, man ikav mbi ken Iyou i Ikô i Lebanon cii kpaa lu mbi zenaria cii, azurfa lu sha mi ga; gadia sha ayange a Solomon la a lu kwagh u ikoogh ga." 
1Kings10:22 Gadia sha zegemnger, tor lu a ikpilautso mba Tarshishi, ve lu a utso mba Hiram imôngo; anyom a kuman atar yô, utso mba Tarshishi cii ve va kwa môm a zenaria man azurfa man anyi a nortar man ikarakya kua upikoki." 
1Kings10:23 Kape tor Solomon hemba utor mba sha won cii inyaregh kua kwaghfan la. 
1Kings10:24 Tar cii, sar u u nengen a Solomon, sha u ungwan kwaghfan na, u Aôndo A ne un ken ishima la." 
1Kings10:25 Hanma or lu van a iwua i nan, lu ikav mbi i er sha azurfa man mbi sha zenaria man akondo man ikav mbi utyav man ilyôghonov man anyinya kua mbaalfadari, anyom anyom." 
1Kings10:26 Solomon kohol akekeautya kua mbaanyinyav; a lu a akekeautya dubu man deri unyiin, man mbaanyinyav dubu pue kar uhar, a ver ve ken agar a akekeautya a lu ker yô, man hen tor ken Yerusalem kpaa." 
1Kings10:27 Tor er azurfa ngee hingir er awen nahan ken Yerusalem, ikon i sedar kpaa ngee hingir er ikon i tur i shin pev nahan, ngee je gande u ôron." 
1Kings10:28 Anyinya a Solomon lu a mi yô, ka ken Igipiti man ken Kue i za vaan a a ye; mbakasuav mba tor za yamen a ken Kue sha ishe i a vough." 
1Kings10:29 Ka a za va a ikyekye ken Igipiti yô, i va tee i sha ushekel mba azurfa deri ataratar, nyinya yô, sha ushekel deri man akunduahargber; kape i vaan a mi i va teen utor mba Hiti kua utor mba Shiria cii la." 
1Kings11:1 Kasev mba ken akuraior agen kpishi doo tor Solomon ishima, lu wan u tor Farao kua kasev mba Mbamoabi man Mbaamon man Mbaedom man Mbashidon kua Mbahiti;" 
1Kings11:2 ka mba ken akuraior a TER lu kaa Mbaiserael er: De nyer nen nongo a ve ga, ve kpaa ve̱ de nyer nongo a ven ga; gadia vea gema ne ishima er né dondo mbaaôndo vev kpee je; Solomon var a ve, ve doo un ishima." 
1Kings11:3 A lu a kasev deri utaankaruhar, ônov mba utor, man kasev mba sha uika deri utar; nahan kasev nav gema un ishima." 
1Kings11:4 Er Solomon va bee iyol yô, kasev nav gema un ishima, a dondo mbaaôndo mbagenev; ishima na lu sha TER, Aôndo na, vough, er ishima i ter na Davidi nahan ga." 
1Kings11:5 Solomon dondo Ashetaroti mgbianaôndo u Mbashidon man Milkom kwaghhôngorough u Mbaamon. 
1Kings11:6 Nahan Solomon er kwagh u a lu u bo sha ishigh ki TER, a dondo TER jighilii, er ter na Davidi nahan ga." 
1Kings11:7 Solomon maa ijiir i taven sha i civir Kemoshi kwaghhôngorough u Moabi, kua Moleki kwaghhôngorough u Mbaamon kpaa, sha uwo u u lu sha ishigh ki Yerusalem la." 
1Kings11:8 Kape a er sha ci u kasev nav mba ken akur agen kpaa, mba ve nanden kwaghhumandoon ve naan mbaaôndo vev nagh la." 
1Kings11:9 Nahan ishima vihi TER a Solomon, sha ci u ishima na i gem, a de u dondon TER, Aôndo u Iserael, u A ande hen a na kwa har la," 
1Kings11:10 man A vande tan un icin sha kwagh ne er: a̱ de kera dondon mbaaôndo mbagenev ga; kpa a wa iko sha kwaghwan u TER wa un la ga. 
1Kings11:11 Nahan TER kaa a Solomon er: Er u er nahan, u we iko sha ikuryan Yam man akaawan a Am, a M we u la ga yô, mimi je, Me tsuwe tor her a we kera, Me na wanakiriki wou." 
1Kings11:12 Nahan kpaa sha ayange a ou yô, Me er kwagh ne ga, sha ci u teru Davidi; kpa Me tsuwe un sha ikev i wan wou." 
1Kings11:13 Nahan kpaa Me ngohol tor kera cii ga, kpa me na wan wou kwe môm sha ci u wanakiriki Wam Davidi, man shi sha ci u Yerusalem u M tsough yô." 
1Kings11:14 Tsô TER ver orhendan kwagh a Solomon, lu Hadadi Oredom; a lu tsombor u tor ken Edom." 
1Kings11:15 Gadia zum u Davidi lu ken Edom la, man Yoabi kurutya kôndo sha u una za ii mbakpenev yô, a wua hanma nomsoor ken Edom;" 
1Kings11:16 (gadia Yoabi kua Iserael cii ve tema keregh iwer ataratar zan zan a tim hanma nomsoor ken Edom kera)," 
1Kings11:17 kpa Hadadi yevese, kua Mbaedom mbagenev mba ve lu ikpan i ter na, a na imôngo, ve yem ken Igipiti; yô, shighe la Hadadi lu wanye u kpeghee je." 
1Kings11:18 Nahan ve mough hen Midian ve va hen Paran; ve kua a ior mbagenev hen Paran, ve va ken Igipiti hen Farao tor u Igipiti; a na un ya, shi a na un kwaghyan kua tar kpaa." 
1Kings11:19 Tsô doo Farao a Hadadi kpishi je, a na un idyondon u kwase na, a er, ka idyondon u Tapeneshi, torkwase je la." 
1Kings11:20 Idyondon u Tapeneshi la mar un wan iti na er Genubati, kpa Tapeneshi koso un ken ya u tor Farao, nahan Genubati lu ken ya u Farao a ônov mba Farao imôngo." 
1Kings11:21 Tsô zum u Hadadi ungwa ken Igipiti er Davidi yav a uter nav, man Yoabi kurutya kpaa kpe kera yô, Hadadi kaa a Farao er: Nam gbenda m̱ hide hen tar wam." 
1Kings11:22 Nahan Farao kaa a na er: Ka nyi i ban u her a mo je man u nenge u yemen her tar wouwe? A kaa er: Ka ma kwagh ga; nahan kpaa de m̱ yem tsô. 
1Kings11:23 Shi Aôndo ver orgen u hendan a na kpaa, lu Reson wan u Eliada, u a yevese ter na Hada-deser tor u Soba yô." 
1Kings11:24 Zum u Davidi lu wuan ve la, a kohol ior a hingir orhemenegh u ikumior i numun gbenda, nahan ve yem sha Damaseku, ve za tema her, ve ya tor hen Damaseku." 
1Kings11:25 A lu orihom u Iserael sha ayange a Solomon la cii, shi seer kwaghbo u Hadadi er la kpaa; a tema tor u Shiria, Iserael ndôhôr un ishima je." 
1Kings11:26 Yerobiam wan u Nebati, Oreferaim, u hen Sereda, wanakiriki u Solomon, u i yilan iti i ngô na er Serua, kwasecôghol, un kpaa a mough sha u hendan a tor." 
1Kings11:27 Kwagh u a na man a mough ahendan a tor yô, Solomon maa Milo, a kondo ihura i gar u ter na Davidi henpe a tsehe yô." 
1Kings11:28 Un Yerobiam la lu nomsoor mimi. Solomon nengen er wanye la lu ortom u mimi yô, a ver un er a̱ nengen sha mbatomov mba ken ya u Yosev cii." 
1Kings11:29 Tsô hen shighe la, er Yerobiam due ken Yerusalem yô, profeti Ahiya or u Shilo va kohol un sha gbenda; Ahiya haa riga u he iyol; ve lu ken ikôngo ve uhar tseegh." 
1Kings11:30 Tsô Ahiya kôr riga u he u a lu a mi iyol la, ande un abamber pue kar ahar." 
1Kings11:31 A kaa a Yerobiam er: Tôô abamber pue sha ci wou; gadia TER, Aôndo u Iserael, ngu kaan nahan er: Nenge, Me tsuwe tor sha ikev i Solomon Me na u ikwe pue," 
1Kings11:32 (kpa una shi a kwe môm sha ci u wanakiriki Wam Davidi man sha ci u Yerusalem gar u ken Iserael cii, u M tsough un la)," 
1Kings11:33 sha ci u ve undum ve gur ve civir Ashetaroti, Mgbianaôndo u Mbashidon man Kemoshi aôndo u Moabi man Milkom aôndo u Mbaamon yô; ve zenden sha igbenda Yam ga, ve er kwagh u lu vough sha ashe Am kpaa ga, man ve wa iko sha akaawan a Am man ajiraôron a Am er ter na Davidi er nahan ga." 
1Kings11:34 Nahan kpaa, Me ngohol tor sha ikev na kera cii ga, kpa Me taver tor na sha ayange a a lu uma cii, sha ci u wanakiriki Wam Davidi, u M tsuwa, sha ci u a wa iko sha atindi a Am kua akaawan a AM." 
1Kings11:35 Kpa Me ngohol tor sha ikev i wan na, Me na u ikwe pue." 
1Kings11:36 Wan na yô, Me na un kwe môm, sha u wanakiriki Wam Davidi a̱ lu a imenger sha ishigh Yagh gbem ken Yerusalem, gar u M tsough sha ci Wam iyol Yam sha u Me ver iti Yam ker la." 
1Kings11:37 Me tôô u, ú tema tor sha akaa a a sar u ken ishima cii, ú lu tor u Iserael." 
1Kings11:38 Man aluer wea ver ato sha kwagh u Me wa u cii, wea zenden sha igbenda Yam, wea eren kwagh u lun vough sha ashe Am ú waan akaawan a Am man atindi a Am iko er Davidi wanakiriki Wam lu eren nahan yô, Me lu a we, Me maa u icôronya, er lu M maa Davidi nahan, Me gema Iserael Me na u." 
1Kings11:39 Ka sha ci u kwagh ne Me er tsombor u Davidi ican, kpa á lu gbem ga." 
1Kings11:40 Tsô Solomon gba nôngon u wuan Yerobiam; nahan Yerobiam mough yevese yem ken Igipiti, hen Shishaki, tor u Igipiti, za lu ken Igipiti zan zan Solomon kar kpen." 
1Kings11:41 Aerenakaa a Solomon agen man akaa a a lu eren cii, kua kwaghfan na, i nger a ken ruamabera u aeren a Solomon la gaa?" 
1Kings11:42 Ayange a Solomon tema tor ken Yerusalem sha Iserael cii yô, kuma anyom akunduahar je." 
1Kings11:43 Tsô Solomon yav a uter nav imôngo, i ii un ken gar u ter na Davidi; wan na Rehobiam ya tor sha ityough nagh." 
1Kings12:1 Tsô Rehobiam za hen Shekem; gadia Iserael cii va hen Shekem sha u va kôron un tor. 
1Kings12:2 Er Yerobiam wan u Nebati ungwa nahan yô (gadia a lu ken Igipiti, henpe a yevese tor Solomon a za lu la), a mough ken Igipiti a hide." 
1Kings12:3 Tsô ve tindi i za yila un, Yerobiam man mkohol u Iserael cii ve va, ve va ôr kwagh a Rehobiam, ve kaa er:" 
1Kings12:4 Teru lu wan se ikav mbi yuhwan; yô, shi pande se tom u ican u teru man ikav nav mbi yuhwan mbi a wa se ne; nahan yô, sé rumun we." 
1Kings12:5 A kaa a ve er: Mough yem nen, ayange á kar atar yô, shi hide nen her a mo. Maa ior hembe yem." 
1Kings12:6 Nahan tor Rehobiam tume idyu a mbatamen, mba iyange ve tilen sha ishigh ki ter na Solomon shighen u a lu uma la. A pine er: Mnenge wen yô, ngu nana, sha kwagh u mbana?" 
1Kings12:7 Ve kaa a na er: Aluer wea rumun u hingir ortom u ior ne nyian man wea wa ve iko man wea na ve imo man wea ôr kwagh a ve sar sar yô, nahan vea hingir mbatomov ou gbem je." 
1Kings12:8 Kpa a ta imo i mbatamen ve kaa un la kera, a gema a hen kwagh a mbayev mba ve lu kwav a na, ve tilen sha ishigh nagh yô." 
1Kings12:9 A pine ve er: Mhen wen yô, ngu nana, sha kwagh u sé ôr ior mban mba ve er kwagh a mo ve pinim er: Heghem se ikav mbi teru lu wa se la?" 
1Kings12:10 Tsô mbayev mba ve lu kwav na la, ve kaa a na er: Yô, kaa ior mba ve er kwagh a we mban, ve kaan er: Teru wa se ikav mbi yuhwan kpa we yô, pande se mbi la; kaa a ve nahan wer: Ihôwe-ikumbul wam hemba kehen a iwenge i terem." 
1Kings12:11 Yô, aluer terem lu wan ne ikav mbi yuhwan yô, mo me seer ne mbi; aluer terem lu tsahan ne sha akpa, mo me tsaha ne sha kwagir." 
1Kings12:12 Tsô Yerobiam a ior cii ve va hen Rehobiam sha iyange i sha utar, sha imo i tor kaa a ve la er: Va nen her a mo sha iyange i sha utar la." 
1Kings12:13 Nahan tor gema ôr kwagh a ior sha tswam; a venda imo i mbatamen kaa un la," 
1Kings12:14 a gema a ôr ve kwagh sha imo i mbayevikaior mbala, a kaa er: Terem lu wan ne ikav mbi yuhwan, mo me seer ne mbi, terem tsaha ne sha akpa, mo me gema me tsaha ne sha kwagir." 
1Kings12:15 Kape tor wa ior iko ga la; gadia lu sha awashima u TER je, sha u Una kure kwaghôron Na u Ahiya Orshilo ôr a Yerobiam wan u Nebati sha imo i TER la." 
1Kings12:16 Zum u Iserael cii ve nenge er tor wa ve iko ga yô, ior gema kaa a tor er: Kwar wase shi ngu ken Davidi hana? Se kera mba a dyako ken wan u Yese kpaa ga; hide nen hen utenti enev ne Iserael; yô, gba nôngon sha ya wou iyol you tsô Davidi. Nahan Iserael hembe yem hen utenti vev." 
1Kings12:17 Kpa Mbaiserael mba ve lu ken agar a Yuda yô, Rehobiam tema tor sha a ve." 
1Kings12:18 Nahan tor Rehobiam tindi Adoram u a lu nengen sha mbatomov mba i kighir ve a tom la, kpa Iserael cii ta un awen ve wua. Tsô tor Rehobiam unde ikyekye na fefa sha u yevese yemen ken Yerusalem." 
1Kings12:19 Kape Iserael hendan a ya u Davidi la, zan zan nyian ne." 
1Kings12:20 Nahan zum u Iserael cii ungwa gwa er Yerobiam hide yô, ve tindi i za yila un er a̱ va hen mkohol, nahan ve ver un tor sha Iserael cii; ma orgen ta ken ya u Davidi ga, saa kwe u Yuda tseegh." 
1Kings12:21 Zum u Rehobiam va ken Yerusalem yô, a kohol ya u Yuda cii man kwe u Benyamin, uicuwanmbaiorov dubu deri man dubu akunduanyiin, mba ve lu mbanôngontyav yô, sha u á nôngo ityav a ya u Iserael, á shi á hide a tor hen Rehobiam wan u Solomon yô." 
1Kings12:22 Kpa imo i TER va hen Shemaia, or u Aôndo er:" 
1Kings12:23 Ôr kwagh a Rehobiam wan u Solomon, tor u Yuda, man a ya u Yuda cii kua u Benyamin kua ior mbagenev cii, kaa ve wer:" 
1Kings12:24 TER ngu kaan nahan er: De kende nen ga, de za nenge nen ityav a anmgbianev enev, Mbaiserael ga; hanma or nana̱ hide hen ya u nan; gadia kwagh ne ka her a Mo a dugh ye. Tsô ve ungwa imo i TER, ve kôr gbenda ave, ve hide sha imo i TER." 
1Kings12:25 Tsô Yerobiam maa Shekem sha tar u iwoogh u Eferaim, a tema ker; a mough keregh, a za maa Penuel." 
1Kings12:26 Nahan Yerobiam kaa ken ishima na er, tor una va hide hen ya u Davidi;" 
1Kings12:27 aluer ior mban vea kôndo sha u za nan nagh ken iyou i TER ken Yerusalem yô, asema a ior aa shi á hide hen ter ve, Rehobiam, tor u Yuda; nahan vea wuam, vea hide hen Rehobiam tor u Yuda." 
1Kings12:28 Nahan tor hen kwagh, a gema a er anibuav uhar sha zenaria; a kaa a ve er: Ne za ken Yerusalem kuma ve; nenge mbaaôndo ou, we Iserael, ka mba ve due a we ken tar u Igipiti je ne." 
1Kings12:29 A ver u môm ken Betel, ugen a ver ken Dan." 
1Kings12:30 Kwagh ne gema hingir kwaghbo; gadia ior ve za civir u môm hen Betel ugen di hen Dan. 
1Kings12:31 A gema ajiir a taven sha hingir utempel; shi a tôô ior wue wue a ver ve upristi, mba ve lu ônov mba Levi ga yô." 
1Kings12:32 Tsô Yerobiam ver iniongo sha uwer u sha anigheni, ayange a u pue kar ataan la, sha inja i iniongo i ken Yuda, a za unde sha atse a nanden nagh sha mi la, kape a er ken Betel la, a lu nan anibuav mba a er mbala nagh; shi a ver upristi ken Betel sha ajiir a taven sha a a er la." 
1Kings12:33 A za unde sha atse a a er ken Betel la, sha iyange i sha pue kar ataan sha uwer u sha anigheni la, ka uwer u a tsuwa iyol na sha ishima na la; a ver iniongo sha ci u Mbaiserael man a unde sha atse u za nanden kwaghhumandoon kpaa." 
1Kings13:1 Tsô or u Aôndo due ken Yuda sha imo i TER, va hen Betel; yô, Yerobiam tile hen atse er una nande kwaghhumandoon." 
1Kings13:2 Nahan a genger imo, a ter atse sha imo i TER, a kaa er: Atse, atse, TER ngu kaan nahan er: Nenge, iyange igen á mar wan hen ya u Davidi, iti na er, Yoshia; una nande nagh sha a we sha upristi mba sha ajiir a taven sha mba ve nanden kwaghhumandoon sha a we ne; shi á nande akuhe a ior sha a we kpaa." 
1Kings13:3 Shi a tese ikav sha iyange la kpaa, a kaa er: ikav i TER A tese yô, nenge, atse aa pav, mtwem ma ma lu sha a kpaa maa haa inya." 
1Kings13:4 Tsô, zum u tor ungwa mkaanem ma or u Aôndo, u a genger imo, a ter atse a hen Betel la yô, Yerobiam naregh uwegh nagh sha atse la, kaa er: Kôr un. Tsô uwegh nagh ku a naregh sha a na la saa nelôô, a kera fatyô u hiden a ku ga." 
1Kings13:5 Atse kpaa pav, mtwem kpaa haa inya, sha ikav i or u Aôndo tese sha imo i TER la." 
1Kings13:6 Tsô tor gba ôron kwagh, kaa a or u Aôndo la er: Yô, sôn ase TER, Aôndo wou, A̱ zungwem mhôônom, er msen sha ci wam er m̱ shi m̱ hide a uwegh agh her yô. Tsô or u Aôndo la zamber a TER, uwegh ku tor kpaa hide her er ku lu keke nahan." 
1Kings13:7 Nahan tor kaa a or u Aôndo la er: Va, sé yem hen ya wam imôngo, va ma mngerem, shi me na u injar kpaa." 
1Kings13:8 Kpa or u Aôndo la kaa a tor er: Wea nam vegher ya wou je kpaa me za a we imôngo ga, kwaghyan kpaa me ya ga, mngerem kpaa me ma hen ijiir ne ga;" 
1Kings13:9 gadia TER kaa a mo nahan er: De ye bredi ga, shi de me mngerem kpaa ga, mhir kpaa de hir sha gbenda u u ve min la ga." 
1Kings13:10 Tsô a hide sha gbenda ugen, a kera hide sha gbenda u a ve min hen Betel la ga." 
1Kings13:11 Kpa tseprofeti ugen tema lu ken Betel; yô, ônov nav mba nomso va ôr un akaa a or u Aôndo a er ken Betel sha iyange la cii; akaaôron a a ôr tor la kpaa, ve ôr ter ve." 
1Kings13:12 Ter ve pine ve er: Ka hanma gbenda a ze? Nahan ônov nav tese un gbenda u or u Aôndo, u a due ken Yuda, yem mi la." 
1Kings13:13 A gema a kaa a ônov nav er: Kangem nen jaki shidi. Tsô ve kange un jaki shidi; nahan a henda. 
1Kings13:14 A gba zendan or u Aôndo la ityô, a za kohol un, a tema hen tinekon i terebin; a pine un er: Ka we or u Aôndo u a dugh ken Yuda nee? A rumun er: Ka mo." 
1Kings13:15 Tsô a kaa a na er: Yô, sé hide ken ya, va ya kwagh." 
1Kings13:16 A kaa a na er: Me fatyô u hiden a we ga, shin u nyôron hen a we kpaa ga; kwagh kpaa me ya ga, mngerem kpaa me ma a we hen ijiir ne ga;" 
1Kings13:17 gadia sha kwaghôron u TER i kaa a mo er: De ye kwagh ga, mngerem kpaa de me ker ga, man shi de kera hidi sha gbenda u u ve min kpaa ga." 
1Kings13:18 Tsô a gema a kaa a na er: Mo kpaa, m ngu profeti er we nahan; man ortyom ôr kwagh a mo sha imo i TER, er: Hide a na hen ya wou, a̱ va ya kwagh, a̱ ma mngerem kpaa. Kpa lu tsughun un a tsugh." 
1Kings13:19 Tsô a hide a na je, a va ya kwagh hen ya na, shi a ma mngerem kpaa." 
1Kings13:20 Kpa er ve tema ve lu yan kwagh la, imo i TER va hen profeti u a hide a na la;" 
1Kings13:21 a genger imo a ôr a or u Aôndo u a due ken Yuda la, a kaa er: TER ngu kaan nahan er: Er u vende imo i TER, u we kwaghôron u TER, Aôndo wou, A kaa u la iko ga," 
1Kings13:22 kpa u hir, u va ye kwagh, u me mngerem, henpe A vende a we er: De ye kwagh ga, man de me mngerem her kpaa ga la yô, ikom you ia nyôr shin uwar u uter ou ga." 
1Kings13:23 Tsô er a ya kwagh man a ma mngerem kera kpaa yô, a kange jaki shidi sha ci u profeti u un hide a na la." 
1Kings13:24 Er a lu yemen yô, a za zua a begha sha gbenda, begha wua un, gbihi ikom na sha gbenda, jaki tile her; begha kpaa tile hen ikom la." 
1Kings13:25 Ior lu karen nengen ikom i i gbihi sha gbenda la man begha tile hen ikom la; nahan ve va ôr kwagh ken gar, henpe tseprofeti la lu la." 
1Kings13:26 Er profeti u a hide a na sha gbenda la ungwa kwagh la yô, a kaa er: Ka or u Aôndo, u a vende imo i Aôndo je la; ka sha ci u nahan TER A ne un sha ikev i begha u a ande un, a woo un, sha imo i TER kaa un la." 
1Kings13:27 Tsô a ôr kwagh a ônov nav, a kaa er: Kangem nen jaki shidi. Nahan ve kange i shidi." 
1Kings13:28 Tsô a za a za kohol ikom na, i i gbihi sha gbenda la, jaki kua begha ve tile hen ikom la; begha ya ikom la ga, man ande jaki kpaa ga." 
1Kings13:29 Nahan profeti la tôô ikom i or u Aôndo la, penda sha jaki, hide a mi; a va hen gar u tseprofeti la, sha u vaan ku man u iin un kpaa." 
1Kings13:30 A ii ikom la shin uwar na iyol na; ve vaa ku na, er: Kpe ahii! Anngômô!" 
1Kings13:31 Tsô zum u a ii un kera yô, a ôr kwagh a ônov nav, a kaa er: Zum u mea kpe yô, iim nen shin uwar, henpe i ii or u Aôndo ne; ver akuhe am a akuhe na imôngo." 
1Kings13:32 Gadia kwaghôron u a genger imo, a ôr sha imo i TER, a ter atse a nanden nagh sha mi, a Betel, kua utempel mba sha ajiir a taven sha cii, mba ve lu ken agar a Samaria la, mimi je una kure sha mi kpee." 
1Kings13:33 Ken masetyô u kwagh ne kpaa Yerobiam de gbenda na u bo la ga, kpa a shi a tôô ior wue wue a ver upristi sha ajiir a taven sha, hanma or u a sar nan yô, a tsegha nan je, nan za kohol upristi mba sha ajiir a taven sha." 
1Kings13:34 Kwagh ne hingir kwaghbo sha ya u Yerobiam je sha u á hembe un kera, á tim un sha tar kera kpaa." 
1Kings14:1 Hen shighe la Abiya wan u Yerobiam gba angev. 
1Kings14:2 Tsô Yerobiam kaa a kwase na er: Shi mough ase gema iyol, i̱ de kera kaven er u lu kwase u Yerobiam ga; yô, za hen Shilo; nenge ka ker profeti Ahiya a lu ye, un u lu teren mo er me ya tor sha ior mban yô." 
1Kings14:3 Shi tôô ikpen i bredi pue man akpekpa kua ishegh i iyoughough, za her a na; una ôr u kwagh u una er wanakiriki ne yô." 
1Kings14:4 Tsô kwase u Yerobiam er nahan, a mough a za hen Shilo, a va hen ya u Ahiya. Ahiya nengen ga, gadia ashe na lu gang, sha ci u iyol i been." 
1Kings14:5 Nahan TER kaa a Ahiya er: Nenge, kwase u Yerobiam ngu van her a we er una pine kwagh u wan na, gadia ngu uange; yô, ka nahan nahan ú ôr un ye; gadia zum u una nyôr yô, una gema iyol er ka kwase ugen yô." 
1Kings14:6 Tsô zum u Ahiya ungwa acin a angahar a na, er a va nyôr sha hunda yô, a kaa er: Nyôrôhô, kwase u Yerobiam; ka nyi u gem iyol you er u ngu kwase ugen nahana? Gadia i tindim a loho u bo her a we." 
1Kings14:7 Hide, za kaa Yerobiam wer: TER, Aôndo u Iserael, ngu kaan nahan er: Er M kende u sha ken ior, M ver u orhemen sha ior Av Iserael," 
1Kings14:8 M tsuwe tor hen ya u Davidi, M na u; nahan kpaa u lu er wanakiriki Wam Davidi ga, u a wa iko sha atindi a Am, a dondom a ishima na cii, lu eren kwagh u a lu vough tseegh sha ashe Am yô;" 
1Kings14:9 kpa we yô, u er ifer hemba mba ve vande hemen a we cii, je u gema u za er mbaaôndo mbagenev iyol you, man ieev mbi keren a ker, sha u u bamem yô, shi u gbihim ken ijime you kpaa;" 
1Kings14:10 yô, nenge Me va a ican sha ya u Yerobiam, Me gber Yerobiam hanma wannomso kera, u nan lu ken uikangen man u nan tem enger enger ken Iserael kpaa, Me ese ya u Yerobiam kera purututu er or ka nan ese ihôghonov zan zan mbi bee kera cii nahan." 
1Kings14:11 Or u Yerobiam u nana kpe ken gar yô, iwa ia ya nan; u nana kpe ken ikôngo yô, inyon i sha ia ya nan, gadia TER kaa nahan." 
1Kings14:12 Nahan mough, yem hen ya wou; shighe u ú za haan angahar ken gar yô, wan la di una kpen;" 
1Kings14:13 Iserael cii vea zungwe ku na, vea ii un; gadia ior i Yerobiam cii ka un tseegh a ii un shin uwar ye; gadia ken a na yô, i wa zuan a kwagh u dedoo sha ishigh ki TER, Aôndo u Iserael, ken ya u Yerobiam." 
1Kings14:14 Man shi TER Una ver tor ugen sha Iserael, u una hembe ya u Yerobiam sha iyange la yô. Ka nana? Hegen je kpaa." 
1Kings14:15 Gadia TER Una gbidye Iserael er kunakwa ka u tenger shin mnger nahan; Una wuhe Iserael ken tar u dedoo ne kera, u A na uter vev la, Una sambe ve zan zan yande ifi u Uferati la; gadia ve er Asherim ve, ve bam TER sha u vihin Un ishima." 
1Kings14:16 Una ta Iserael kera, sha ci u asorabo a Yerobiam a er la, man a ne Iserael a er a kpaa la." 
1Kings14:17 Tsô kwase u Yerobiam mough yem za nyôr hen Tirsa; va ar hen kpandehunda u iyoughough yô, wan la maa sule." 
1Kings14:18 Iserael cii ii un, ve zungwe ku na, sha imo i TER kaa wanakiriki na profeti Ahiya la vough." 
1Kings14:19 Aerenakaa a Yerobiam agen, er a nôngo ityav man er a tema tor yô, nenge, i nger a ken ruamabera u abaver a utor mba Iserael." 
1Kings14:20 Ayange a Yerobiam tema tor yô, kuma anyom ikundu kar ahar; tsô a yav a uter nav imôngo; wan na Nadabi tema tor sha ityough nagh." 
1Kings14:21 Rehobiam wan u Solomon tema tor ken Yuda. Zum u Rehobiam ya tor la, a lu anyom akunduahar kar môm; a tema tor anyom pue kar ataankarahar ken Yerusalem; ka gar u ken ikwe i Iserael cii u TER A tsough un u Una ver iti Na ker la; iti i ngô na er, Naama, wan u Mbaamon." 
1Kings14:22 Yuda er kwaghbo sha ashe a TER, ve kpoghol iwuhe Na sha asorabo a ve er la, gande kwagh u uter vev ve er cii." 
1Kings14:23 Gadia ve maa ajiir a taven sha, shi ve tim mtôm ma awenem man Asherim sha hanma igungu u taven, man shin itine i hanma kon u lun a mure;" 
1Kings14:24 mba lun inja er Mbasodom nahan kpaa ve lu ken tar la; ve lu eren akaa a hôngorough a akuraior, a TER zenda a sha ishigh ki Iserael kera la." 
1Kings14:25 Tsô, sha inyom i sha utaan i tor Rehobiam la, Shishaki tor u Igipiti kôndo sha u va nôngon ityav a Yerusalem;" 
1Kings14:26 a kura ikav mbi injaav mbi ken iyou i TER, kua ikav mbi injaav mbi ken iyou i tor; a kura ca ca; shi a kura iperutya i zenaria i Solomon er la cii." 
1Kings14:27 Nahan tor Rehobiam er iperutya igen sha togula sha ityouv mbi ingila; a ver i sha ikev i mbahemenev mba mbakuran, mba ve kuran hundaya u tor yô." 
1Kings14:28 Tsô hanma shighe u tor una nyôron ken iyou i TER yô, mbakuran ve tôô i, man ve shi ve hide a mi ken iyou i mbakuran." 
1Kings14:29 Aerenakaa a Rehobiam agen, man akaa a a er cii, i nger a ken ruamabera u abaver a utor mba Yuda la gaa?" 
1Kings14:30 Ityav lu hen atô u Rehobiam a Yerobiam gbem. 
1Kings14:31 Tsô Rehobiam yav a uter nav imôngo, i ii un a uter nav imôngo, ken gar u Davidi; iti i ngô na er, Naama, wan u Mbaamon. Wan na Abiyam tema tor sha ityough nagh." 
1Kings15:1 Ka sha inyom i sha pue kar anigheni i tor Yerobiam wan u Nebati la, Abiyam ya tor sha Yuda ye." 
1Kings15:2 A tema tor ken Yerusalem anyom atar, iti i ngô na er, Maaka, wan u Abishalom." 
1Kings15:3 A zenden sha igbenda i asorabo a ter na lu vande eren a na cii; ishima na lu jighilii sha ishigh ki TER, Aôndo na, er ishima i Davidi ter na nahan ga." 
1Kings15:4 Nahan kpaa, sha ci u Davidi yô, TER, Aôndo na, na un imenger ken Yerusalem, sha u veren wan na ken ijime na, man u taver Yerusalem kpaa;" 
1Kings15:5 gadia Davidi er kwagh u jighilii sha ishigh ki TER, a undu ma kwagh u A kaa un ga, sha ayange a uma na cii, saa di sha kwagh u Uria Orhiti la tsô." 
1Kings15:6 Ityav lu hen atô u Rehobiam vea Yerobiam sha ayange a uma na la cii. 
1Kings15:7 Aerenakaa a Abiyam agen, man akaa a a er cii yô, i nger a ken ruamabera u abaver a utor mba Yuda la gaa? Ityav lu hen atô u Abiyam vea Yerobiam." 
1Kings15:8 Tsô Abiyam yav a uter nav imôngo, i ii un ken gar u Davidi; wan na Asa gema tema tor sha ityough nagh." 
1Kings15:9 Ka sha inyom i sha ikundu i Yerobiam tor u Iserael la, Asa ya tor sha Yuda ye." 
1Kings15:10 A tema tor ken Yerusalem anyom akunduahar kar môm; iti i ngô na er Maaka, wan u Abishalom." 
1Kings15:11 Asa eren kwagh jighilii sha ashe a TER, er Davidi ter na lu er nahan." 
1Kings15:12 A dugh mba lun inja er Mbasodom nahan, ken tar la kera, shi a dugh akombo a uter nav lu er la kera cii." 
1Kings15:13 A dugh ngô na Maaka ken nagbaa kera, gadia a er eev mbu ndôhôr ishima sha ci u Ashera; Asa vihi eev nav mbula kera, nande mbu shin uwagh u Kideron." 
1Kings15:14 Kpa i vihi ajiir a taven sha la ga; nahan kpaa ishima i Asa lu vough sha ishigh ki TER sha ayange a uma na cii. 
1Kings15:15 Akaa a ter na lu tsegha, kua a un iyol na kpaa tsegha la: azurfa man zenaria kua ikav kposo kposo, a va ver a ken iyou i TER." 
1Kings15:16 Ityav lu hen atô u Asa vea Baasha tor u Iserael sha ayange a uma ve cii. 
1Kings15:17 Baasha tor u Iserael mough ityav a Yuda, a maa Rama, sha u una yange hanma or nana̱ de dugh, shin nana̱ nyôron hen Asa tor u Yuda ga." 
1Kings15:18 Tsô Asa tôô azurfa kua zenaria u a shi ken ayou a koson akaa ker, a iyou i TER la cii, kua a ken ayou a koson akaa ker, a iyou i tor la kpaa, a na sha ikev i mbayev nav; tor Asa tindi mbi hen Benhada, wan u Taberimon, wan u Heshion, tor u Shiria, u a lu ken Damaseku la, a kaa er:" 
1Kings15:19 Ikuryan ngi hen atô wam a we, er i lu hen atô u terem a teru nahan; nenge, m tindi u a iwua sha azurfa kua zenaria; yô, za bunde ikuryan you a Baasha tor u Iserael la, sha u a̱ mough hen mo kera a̱ dem yô." 
1Kings15:20 Nahan Benhada ungwa imo i tor Asa, tsô a tindi mbahemenev mba akumautya na er ve̱ za nôngo ityav a agar a Iserael; a hembe Iyon man Dan man Abel-bete-maaka man Kinereti cii kua tar u Nafetali cii." 
1Kings15:21 Tsô er Baasha ungwa nahan yô, a de u maan Rama, a za tema ken Tirsa." 
1Kings15:22 Tsô tor Asa lôhô Yuda cii, i tsegha ma or môm ga, ve kura awen a Rama man ikpande i Baasha maa a mi la, nahan tor Asa za maa Geba u Benyamin man Misepa a min." 
1Kings15:23 Aerenakaa a Asa agen, man tahav nav cii kua akaa a a er cii man agar a a maa cii yô, i nger a ken ruamabera u abaver a utor mba Yuda la gaa? Kpa er a va bee iyol yô, angev kôr un shin angahar." 
1Kings15:24 Tsô Asa yav a uter nav imôngo, i ii un ken gar u ter na Davidi a uter nav imôngo; wan na Yehoshafati gema tema tor sha ityough nagh." 
1Kings15:25 Nadabi, wan u Yerobiam, ya tor sha Iserael sha inyom i sha uhar i Asa tor u Yuda la, a tsa tor anyom ahar sha Iserael." 
1Kings15:26 A er iferkwagh sha ishigh ki TER, a zenden sha gbenda u ter na, a eren kwaghbo na la, u a ne Iserael kpaa a er un la." 
1Kings15:27 Kpa Baasha wan u Ahiya u hen ya u Isakar, lu keren un a ku; Baasha wua un hen Gibeton u a lu sha ikev i Mbafiliti la; gadia Nadabi man Iserael cii haa afo kase Gibeton, nôngo ityav a na." 
1Kings15:28 Sha inyom i sha utar i Asa tor u Yuda la, Baasha wua un, gema tema tor sha ityough nagh." 
1Kings15:29 Tsô er a ya tor yô, a tim ya u Yerobiam cii; a de Yerobiam ma or u ôôn môm ga, zan zan a tim un cii, sha imo i TER, i wanakiriki Na Ahiya Orshilo kaa la;" 
1Kings15:30 sha ci u asorabo a Yerobiam a er a la, man a ne Iserael u eren a kpaa la; man sha ci u mbam u a bam TER, Aôndo u Iserael, la." 
1Kings15:31 Aerenakaa a Nadabi agen, man akaa a a er cii yô, i nger a ken ruamabera u abaver a utor mba Iserael la gaa?" 
1Kings15:32 Ityav lu hen atô u Asa vea Baasha tor u Iserael sha ayange ve la cii. 
1Kings15:33 Sha inyom i sha utar i Asa tor u Yuda la, Baasha wan u Ahiya ya tor sha Iserael cii, ken Tirsa; a tema tor anyom ikundu kar anyiin." 
1Kings15:34 A er iferkwagh sha ishigh ki TER, a zenden sha gbenda u Yerobiam, a eren isholibo na la, i a ne Iserael kpaa a eren i la." 
1Kings16:1 Tsô kwaghôron u TER va hen Yehu wan u Hanani, lu teren Baasha, er:" 
1Kings16:2 Er M kende u hen vuulevu sha je, M ver u orhemen u ior Av Iserael, kpa u za sha gbenda u Yerobiam, u ne ior Av Iserael ve eren isholibo ve bamem sha asorabo a ve yô," 
1Kings16:3 nenge, Me ese Baasha kua ya na kera purututu; Me gema ya wou una hingir er ya u Yerobiam wan u Nebati nahan." 
1Kings16:4 Or u Baasha u nana kpe ken gar yô, iwa ia ya nan, u nana kpe ken ikôngo yô, inyon i sha ia ya nan." 
1Kings16:5 Aerenakaa a Baasha agen man akaa a a er cii kua tahav nav yô, i nger a ken ruamabera u abaver a utor mba Iserael la gaa?" 
1Kings16:6 Tsô Baasha yav a uter nav imôngo, i ii un ken Tirsa; wan na Ela gema tema tor sha ityough nagh." 
1Kings16:7 Man shi imo i TER va hen profeti Yehu wan u Hanani, lu teren Baasha kua ya na, sha ci u aferakaa a a er sha ishigh ki TER cii er a bam Un sha tom u ave na la yô, sha ci u a er, er ya u Yerobiam nahan, man shi sha ci u a wua un kpaa yô." 
1Kings16:8 Sha inyom i sha ikundu kar ataratar i Asa tor u Yuda la, Ela wan u Baasha ya tor sha Iserael ken Tirsa; a tema tor anyom ahar." 
1Kings16:9 Tsô wanakiriki na Shimeri orhemen u sha kwe ugen u akekeautya a na, zua zwa a ior mbagenev sha u keren un a ku. A lu ken Tirsa, lu man akaa hunden ken ya u Arsa, or u nenge sha ya u tor ken Tirsa la;" 
1Kings16:10 tsô Shimeri va nyôr ta num sha a na, wua un, sha inyom i sha ikundu kar ataankarahar i Asa tor u Yuda la, maa a tema tor sha ityough nagh." 
1Kings16:11 Tsô zum u a hingir tor yô, er a tema sha ikônough nagh ki torough yô, a gema a tim ya u Baasha cii, a de un ma wannomso môm tsô kpaa ga; ken anmgbianev nav kpaa, ken akar a na kpaa, a de ga." 
1Kings16:12 Kape Shimeri a tim ya u Baasha cii, sha imo i TER, i A kaa profeti Yehu sha kwagh u Baasha la," 
1Kings16:13 sha ci u asorabo a Baasha cii, kua asorabo a wan na Ela, a ve er, a ve ne Iserael u eren a kpaa la, sha u bamen TER, Aôndo u Iserael, sha akaa a ve a dang la." 
1Kings16:14 Aerenakaa a Ela agen, man akaa a a er cii yô, i nger a ken ruamabera u abaver a utor mba Iserael la gaa?" 
1Kings16:15 Sha inyom i sha ikundu kar ataankarahar i Asa tor u Yuda la, Shimeri tema tor ayange ataankarahar ken Tirsa. Ior lu haan afo, kasen Gibeton, u a lu u Mbafiliti la." 
1Kings16:16 Ior mba ve haa afo la, ve ungwa i lu kaan er: Shimeri zua zwa a ior, wua tor je; nahan Iserael cii gema tôô Omeri orhemen u akumautya, ve ver un tor sha Iserael hen afo sha iyange la je." 
1Kings16:17 Tsô Omeri mough hen Gibeton a Iserael cii, ve kôndo ve va kase Tirsa sha utya." 
1Kings16:18 Er Shimeri nenge er i ngohol gar yô, a nyôr ken iyou i taver i ken ya u tor, a nande iyou i tor la, a hia ker, a kpe," 
1Kings16:19 sha ci u akaabo a na a a er yô, er lu eren ifer sha ishigh ki TER, lu zenden sha gbenda u Yerobiam, eren asorabo a na la, a a ne Iserael kpaa a er a la." 
1Kings16:20 Aerenakaa a Shimeri agen, man mzough u zuan zwa a ior la, i nger a ken ruamabera u abaver a utor mba Iserael la gaa?" 
1Kings16:21 Tsô ior mba Iserael pav iniongo ihiar, nongo ugen dondo Tibeni wan u Ginati er vea ver un tor; nongo ugen dondo Omeri." 
1Kings16:22 Kpa ior mba ve dondo Omeri la, ve hemba taver a mba ve dondo Tibeni wan u Ginati la; nahan Tibeni kpe, Omeri maa ya tor." 
1Kings16:23 Sha inyom i sha ikundugber kar môm i Asa tor u Yuda la, Omeri ya tor sha Iserael, a lu tor anyom pue kar ahar; a lu tor ken Tirsa, anyom ataratar." 
1Kings16:24 A yam igungu u Samaria a Shemer sha utalenti mba azurfa uhar; a maa sha igungu la, a ii gar u a maa la, iti er Samaria, sha iti i Shemer u igungu lu u na la." 
1Kings16:25 Omeri er kwaghbo sha ishigh ki TER, a er akaabo hemba a mba ve vande lun a na cii." 
1Kings16:26 Gadia a zende sha gbenda u Yerobiam wan u Nebati cii kua asorabo a na, a a ne Iserael kpaa a er a la, sha u bamen TER, Aôndo u Iserael, sha akaa ve a dang la." 
1Kings16:27 Aerenakaa agen a Omeri er, man tahav nav mbu a er yô, i nger a ken ruamabera u abaver a utor mba Iserael la gaa?" 
1Kings16:28 Tsô Omeri yav a uter nav imôngo, i ii un ken Samaria; wan na Ahaba gema tema tor sha ityough nagh." 
1Kings16:29 Sha inyom i sha ikundugber kar anigheni i Asa tor u Yuda la, Ahaba wan u Omeri ya tor sha Iserael; Ahaba wan u Omeri tema tor sha Iserael ken Samaria anyom ikundu kar ahar." 
1Kings16:30 Ahaba wan u Omeri er kwaghbo sha ishigh ki TER, hemba mba ve vande lun a na cii." 
1Kings16:31 Tsô er aeren asorabo a Yerobiam wan u Nebati la, kera lu un kwagh u ikoogh ga yô, a shi a za er Yesebel, wan u Etebaal tor u Mbashidon; a za, a za civir Baal, a gure un inya kpaa." 
1Kings16:32 A ta atse a nanden nagh sha mi ken iyou i Baal i a maa ken Samaria la. 
1Kings16:33 Shi Ahaba er Ashera; Ahaba shi seer sha u bamen TER, Aôndo u Iserael, hemba utor mba Iserael mba ve vande lun a na cii." 
1Kings16:34 Sha ayange na la Hiel or u Betel maa Yeriko; a tim imagh nagh sha ku u wan na u iunda Abiram, shi a wa ihinda na sha ku u wan na u masetyô Segube, sha imo i TER lu kaa Yosua wan u Nun la." 
1Kings17:1 Tsô Eliya Ortishibi u hen Tishibi u ken Gileadi la, a kaa a Ahaba er: Mimi je, er TER, Aôndo u Iserael, u m til sha ishigh Nagh A lu u uma ne, avure aa kera gba ga, ura kpaa ua kera nôô ken anyom ne ga, saa sha imo yam." 
1Kings17:2 Nahan imo i TER va her a na kaa er: 
1Kings17:3 Mough heen, ver ishigh vegher u sha ityoughkitaregh, za yer hen uwagh u Keriti u u lu sha ishigh ki Yordan la." 
1Kings17:4 Yô, gbaa man mngerem ma uwagh la tsô; M kaa ugugôô Mer, ve̱ gba koson we ker tsô." 
1Kings17:5 Tsô a yem a za er sha imo i TER; a za lu hen kpeuwagh u Keriti u u lu sha ishigh ki Yordan la. 
1Kings17:6 Ugugôô va naan un bredi kua inyam pepe, man shi bredi kua inyam aikighe; a maan mngerem shin uwagh la." 
1Kings17:7 Ka tse dôghôô yô, uwagh la uma kera, gadia ura nôô ken tar la ga." 
1Kings17:8 Tsô imo i TER va her a na kaa er: 
1Kings17:9 Mough za ken Sarefati u ken tar u Shidon, za tema ker; nenge, M kaa kwasecôghol u ker Mer, a̱ koson we." 
1Kings17:10 Nahan a mough a za ken Sarefati; za ar hen hundagar yô, nenge, kwasecôghol lu her, lu sangen ayegheraikon; tsô a yila un, a kaa er: Shi za kese anmnger shin ishegh va nam m̱ ma." 
1Kings17:11 Ngur zan u za kesen yô, a yila un, a kaa er: Shi vam a ankwaghyan kpaa." 
1Kings17:12 Kpa a kaa er: Er TER, Aôndo wou, A lu u uma ne, m ngu a anivurkwaghyan ga saa anmwe shin itye kua anmkure ciôn shin tum tsô; nenge, m ngu sangen ayegheraikon kpuaa mer, me za naha sha ci wam kua wan wam, sé ya, maa sé kpe." 
1Kings17:13 Tsô Eliya kaa a na er: De cie ga; za, za er kwagh u u kaa la, kpa vande panden eren mo anakpekpa a mi, va nam, tsô ú mase za eren sha ci wou kua wan wou." 
1Kings17:14 Gadia TER, Aôndo u Iserael, ngu kaan nahan er: Ityegh ki mweegh kin kia bee ga, tumugh ku mkure kpaa kua yina ga, zan zan iyange i TER Una kar nôôn ura shin tar." 
1Kings17:15 Tsô a za a za er sha imo i Eliya la; nahan un vea Eliya kua ya na, ve ya ayange kpishi." 
1Kings17:16 Ityegh ki mweegh bee ga, tumugh ku mkure kpaa yina ga, sha imo i TER, i A kaa Eliya la." 
1Kings17:17 Tsô ken masetyô u akaa ne yô, wan u kwase shon u ya lu u na la, gba angev; angev nav taver je, a kera lu uma ga." 
1Kings17:18 Nahan a kaa a Eliya er: Ka nyi i zoughom a we, we or u Aôndo? U va her a mo wer, m̱ umbur asorabo am, shi ú wuam wan kpaa!" 
1Kings17:19 Tsô a kaa a na er: Nam wan wou. Nahan a ngohol un sha ikum i kwase la, a za a na sha iyou i yaven i sha, henpe a tema la, a penda un sha gambe na." 
1Kings17:20 A vaa a TER a kaa er: TERE, Aôndo wam, U va a ican sha kwasecôghol u m tem her a na ne je, U wua wan na?" 
1Kings17:21 Tsô a samber sha wanakiriki la kuma kwa tar, a sôn TER, a kaa er: TERE, Aôndo wam, uma u wanakiriki ne a̱ shi a nyôr ker a na, a̱ hingir uma." 
1Kings17:22 Tsô TER ungwa imo i Eliya, uma u wanakiriki la, shi nyôr ker a na, a hingir uma." 
1Kings17:23 Nahan Eliya tôô wanakiriki la, sha iyou i yaven, hungwa a mi va nyôr a mi ken ya la, za na ngô na; Eliya kaa er: Nenge, wan wou ngu uma!" 
1Kings17:24 Kwase la gema kaa a Eliya er: Hegen yô, m fa u ngu or u Aôndo je, kwaghôron u TER u ken zwa wou ka u mimi je." 
1Kings18:1 Tsô ayange nga kar kpishi yô, imo i TER va hen Eliya sha inyom i sha utar la, kaa er: Za, za ande hen Ahaba; yô Mo kpaa Me nôô ura shin tar." 
1Kings18:2 Nahan Eliya za er una za ande hen Ahaba. Yô, ijen taver ken Samaria." 
1Kings18:3 Tsô Ahaba yila Obadia or u nengen sha ya na. Obadia yô, lu or u cian TER tsung je;" 
1Kings18:4 gadia zum u Yesebel lu timin uprofeti mba TER la yô, un Obadia tôô uprofeti deri, yer ve akunduahargber, akunduahargber, ken bar, a koson ve sha kwaghyan kua mngerem." 
1Kings18:5 Yô Ahaba kaa a Obadia er: Zende ken tar, za hen ihwembe cii kua hen iwagh cii kpaa, alaghga sé zua a toho, sé koso anyinya kua mbaalfadari ve̱ war, sha er uzendenya asev ve̱ de saan cii ga yô." 
1Kings18:6 Nahan ve pav tar, ve zenden ker; Ahaba kôr gbenda ugen un mtswen, Obadia kpaa kôr di gbenda ugen un mtswen." 
1Kings18:7 Er Obadia lu sha gbenda la yô, nenge, Eliya va kohol un; kav un yô, a gure a kuma ishigh inya, a kaa er: Ka we, terem Eliya?" 
1Kings18:8 A kaa a na er: Ka mo; yô, hide za kaa teru wer, Eliya ngu heen." 
1Kings18:9 Kpa a pine er: Ka nyi kwaghbo m er, man u ne wanakiriki wou sha ikev i Ahaba wer, a̱ wuama?" 
1Kings18:10 Mimi je, er TER, Aôndo wou, A lu u uma ne, ma ikurior shin ma tartor henpe terem a de tindin u keren we yô, ngu ga; zum u ka vea kaa un er: Ngu heen ga yô, a kaa a tartor kua ikurior la, ve̱ bum er ve zough a we ga yô." 
1Kings18:11 Man hegen, u ngu kaan wer za, za kaa teru wer: Nenge, Eliya ngu heen." 
1Kings18:12 Tsô aluer me karen hen we kera yô, Jijingi u TER Una tôô u, Una yem a we henpe m fe ga yô, nahan zum u me za kaa Ahaba man una fan ityô u zuan a we ga yô, una wuam je. Kpa mo wanakiriki wou m cia TER, er m lu iyev je." 
1Kings18:13 Shin i kaa terem kwagh u m er zum u Yesebel wua uprofeti mba TER la, m yer uprofeti mba TER ior deri ken bar, akunduahargber, akunduahargber, m koson ve sha kwaghyan kua mngerem ga ase?" 
1Kings18:14 Man hegen yô, u kaa wer, za, za kaa teru wer: Nenge, Eliya ngu heen; yô, una wuam." 
1Kings18:15 Kpa Eliya kaa er: Er TER u akum a Sha u m til sha ishigh Nagh A lu u uma ne, mimi je, me ande her a na nyian." 
1Kings18:16 Tsô Obadia mough za kohol Ahaba, a ôr un nahan. Ahaba kpaa za, er una za kohol Eliya." 
1Kings18:17 Tsô Ahaba za nenge a Eliya yô, Ahaba kaa a na er: Ka we, or u u nzughul a Iserael yum ne ga?" 
1Kings18:18 A gema a kaa er: Ka mo m nzughul a Iserael ga, kpa ka we kua ya u teru, sha er u undu atindi a TER, u gem u dondo sha Ubaal yô." 
1Kings18:19 Hegen yô, tindi i̱ za kohol mo Iserael cii sha uwo u Karmel man uprofeti mba Baal deri unyiin man akunduahargber la, kua uprofeti mba Ashera deri unyiin mba ve ye kwagh sha tebul u Yesebel la." 
1Kings18:20 Tsô Ahaba tindi i za yila Mbaiserael cii, shi a kohol uprofeti sha uwo u Karmel." 
1Kings18:21 Tsô Eliya kporom hen ior cii, a kaa er: Shi nan je, man né de u lun asema ahara? Aluer TER A lu Aôndo yô, dondo nen Un; a lu Baal yô, dondo nen un. Kpa ior bugh zwa a na ga." 
1Kings18:22 Tsô Eliya kaa a ior er: Ka mo tswen m shi profeti u TER ye; kpa uprofeti mba Baal yô, mba deri unyiin man akunduahargber." 
1Kings18:23 Yô, ve̱ na se anomabua ahar; ve̱ tsuwa nombua môm sha ci ve, ve̱ sôngo, ve̱ bur, ve̱ penda sha ikon, kpa ve̱ de we usu ga; mo me sôngo bua ugen me penda di sha ikon, kpa me wa usu ga." 
1Kings18:24 Yila nen iti i aôndo wen, mo me yila iti i TER; yô, Aôndo u Una rumun sha usu la, ka Un A lu Aôndo ye. Tsô ior cii gema kaa er: I ôr kwagh ne doo tsô." 
1Kings18:25 Nahan Eliya kaa a uprofeti mba Baal er: Tsuwa nen ase bua môm sha ci wen, vande sôngon nen un; gadia ne, ne mba kpishi; yô, yila nen iti i aôndo wen, kpa de we nen usu ga." 
1Kings18:26 Tsô ve kôr bua u i na ve la, ve sôngo, ve gba yilan iti i Baal; hii pepe je zan zan iyange sha tembe, ve lu kaan er: Baal shi rumun se ga! Kpa imo lu ga, mô bugh zwa ga. Tsô ve gba tsuwen hen atse a ve ta la." 
1Kings18:27 Tsô ka kom er iyange sha tembe nahan yô, Eliya gba nahan ve tar, kaan er: Genger nen imo, gadia un ka aôndo ga; alaghga ngu henen kwagh, shin a ta ibalegh, shin a yem zende, shin alaghga ngu yaven; saa á nder un." 
1Kings18:28 Nahan ve genger imo ve tôndo ayol a ve avav sha ahô kua awange, sha aeren a ve la, zan zan awambe gba duen ve iyol." 
1Kings18:29 Tsô, er iyange kpeese yô, ve gba ôron kwaghôron u profeti zan zan shighe u nan nagh ku aikighe la; kpa imo lu ga, mô kpaa bugh zwa ga, mô wa iko kpaa ga." 
1Kings18:30 Tsô Eliya kaa a ior cii er: Kporom nen her a mo; tsô ior cii kporom her a na. Tsô a sôr atse a TER a nanden nagh sha mi a i yôhôl a la. 
1Kings18:31 Eliya tôô awen pue kar ahar sha iyenge i ikwe i ônov mba Yakob, u imo i TER lu va her a na la kaa er, á yila iti you er Iserael." 
1Kings18:32 A ta atse a nanden nagh sha mi ken iti i TER sha awen la; a time ihungwa wa atse la atô, gbangese kuma uikaren mba samegh uhar." 
1Kings18:33 A tar ikon, a bur nombua, a penda sha ikon la. A kaa er: Iv nen uzwar mba mngerev unyiin; yô, haa nen sha nagh ku nanden kun kua sha ikon ne." 
1Kings18:34 A kaa er: Er nahan i̱ kuma kwa har; tsô ve er nahan kuma kwa har. Shi a kaa er: Er, i̱ kuma kwa tar; ve er nahan kuma kwa tar je." 
1Kings18:35 Nahan mngerem ningir atse la; a iv mngerem shin ihungwa la kpaa. 
1Kings18:36 Tsô sha shighe u nan nagh ku aikighe la, profeti Eliya kporom, kaa er: TERE, Aôndo u Aberaham man u Isaka kua u Iserael, na i̱ fa nyian ken igbar je er We U lu Aôndo ken Iserael, man mo kpaa m lu wanakiriki Wou, m er akaa ne cii sha imo You yô." 
1Kings18:37 Ungwam, TERE, ungwam, sha u ior mban ve̱ fa, er We TER, U lu Aôndo je, man U gema ve asema hen a We kpaa ye." 
1Kings18:38 Tsô usu u TER sen, hia nagh ku nanden, man ikon man awen kua vuulevu, ndiar mngerem ma shin ihungwa kpaa." 
1Kings18:39 Zum u ior cii ve nenge nahan yô, ve gure inya ve kuma ishiv inya, ve kaa er: Ka TER A lu Aôndo ye. Ka TER A lu Aôndo ye." 
1Kings18:40 Nahan Eliya kaa a ve er: Kôr nen uprofeti mba Baal, mô ve môm a̱ de waren ga. Tsô ve kôr ve, Eliya sen a ve hen kpeuwagh u Kishon, za wua ve heregh." 
1Kings18:41 Tsô Eliya kaa a Ahaba er: Kôndo, za ya kwagh, ma kwagh, gadia ihuran i zegeura ngi." 
1Kings18:42 Nahan Ahaba kôndo sha u za yan kwagh shi man kwagh kpaa. Kpa Eliya kar za unde sha ityough ki Karmel; a gure inya, a kuma ishigh hen anu na." 
1Kings18:43 A kaa a wanakiriki na er: Kôndo za nenge vegher u shin zegemnger. Tsô a kôndo, a za jinge, a kaa er: Ma kwagh ngu ga. A kaa er: Za, zan zan kuma kwa taankaruhar." 
1Kings18:44 Tsô sha shighe u kwa taankaruhar la, a kaa er: Nenge, anibeen ngu duen shin zegemnger kpuaa er ikevwe i or nahan. Nahan a kaa er: Mough, za kaa Ahaba wer, sôr ikyekye you, sen sha er ura ua yisa u ga yô." 
1Kings18:45 Tsô tem dôghôô yô, kwavaôndo ile dimii sha abeen kua ahumbe, zegeura gba. Tsô Ahaba henda ikyekye, yem ken Yesereel." 
1Kings18:46 Uwegh ku TER lu sha Eliya, a fiir ikondo shin iwenge, a yevese a kar Ahaba sha hemen zan zan hen hunda u Yesereel." 
1Kings19:1 Tsô Ahaba ôr Yesebel kwagh u Eliya er la cii, man er a woo uprofeti cii sha sanker kpaa." 
1Kings19:2 Nahan Yesebel tindi ortyom hen Eliya er a̱ za kaa un er: Mbaaôndo ve̱ er a mo nahan shi i̱ hemba nahan kpaa, aluer kper hen shighe ne nahan mea gema uma wou una hingir er uma u mô ve ga yô." 
1Kings19:3 Nengen nahan yô, a mough a yevese er una yima uma na, a za nyôr ken Bersheba u ken Yuda, a undu wanakiriki na her." 
1Kings19:4 Kpa un iyol na a yem ken ikôngo kuma zende u iyange i môm, a za tema hen itine i kon u yuniper; a lu tômon er ma un kpe; a kaa er: Kuma hegen ne; TERE, ngohol uma wam, gadia m hemba uter av ga." 
1Kings19:5 Tsô a yav inya, a gba mnyam hen itine i kon u yuniper; yô, nenge, ortyom va kpoghol un, kaa a na er: Mough sha, ya kwagh." 
1Kings19:6 Tsô a gba yengen, man nenge, hen tiôn u sha ityough nagh la, akpekpa u i kaa sha awen a tseen lu her, kua isheghmnger kpaa. Nahan a ya, a ma, a shi a hide a yav her." 
1Kings19:7 Ortyom u TER shi va, kuma kwa har, va kpoghol un, kaa er: Mough sha, ya kwagh, gayô, zende ngu u her je gande." 
1Kings19:8 Tsô a mough, a ya, a ma; man sha agee a kwaghyan la je, a zende ayange akunduahar kua aime akunduahar, zan zan a za ar hen Horebi, uwo u Aôndo la." 
1Kings19:9 A va hen bar, a nyôr a tsa ker; tsô imo i TER va her a na, va pine un er: Ka nyi u eren heene, Eliya?" 
1Kings19:10 A kaa er: Ishima tseem tsung sha kwagh u TER, Aôndo u akum a Sha; gadia Mbaiserael undu ikuryan You, ve vihi atse a Ou a nanden nagh sha mi, shi ve wua uprofeti Ou sha sanker; mo m mase shin tswen; man shi mba keren mo a ku kpaa." 
1Kings19:11 Tsô A kaa a na er: Due, tile sha uwo ne sha ishigh ki TER. Tsô nenge, TER va kar, zegeahumbe u taver za va, a pav uwo, hembe avande sha ishigh ki TER; kpa TER lu ken ahumbe ga; ahumbe la nga kar kera yô, tar tenger; kpa TER lu ken tartenger la ga;" 
1Kings19:12 tartenger ngu kar kera yô, lu usu; kpa TER lu ken usu ga; usu la ngu kar kera yô, anihuran za va luee." 
1Kings19:13 Er Eliya ungwa nahan yô, a yisa ishigh nagh sha ikondo, a due a za tile hen zwa u bar. Yô, nenge, imo va her a na, kaa er: Ka nyi u eren heene, Eliya?" 
1Kings19:14 A kaa er: Ishima tseem tsung sha kwagh u TER, Aôndo u akum a Sha; gadia ônov mba Iserael undu ikuryan You, ve vihi atse a Ou a nanden nagh sha mi, ve wua uprofeti Ou sha sanker, mo, m mase shin tswen, man mba keren mo a ku kpaa." 
1Kings19:15 Kpa TER kaa a na er: Hide sha gbenda u u ve la, yem hen ikôngough ki Damaseku; ú za nyôr her yô, shighe Hasael mkurem a̱ lu tor u Shiria;" 
1Kings19:16 man Yehu wan u Nimshi yô, shighe un mkurem a̱ lu tor u Iserael; Elisha wan u Shafati u ken Abel-mehola yô, shighe un mkurem a̱ hingir profeti sha ityough you." 
1Kings19:17 Nahan or u nana war sanker u Hasael yô, Yehu a̱ wua nan; man or u nana war sanker u Yehu yô, Elisha a̱ wua nan." 
1Kings19:18 Nahan kpaa, Me shi ior dubu utaankaruhar ken Iserael, ka mba anu a ve a gur Baal inya ga la cii, man hanma zwa u u susu un kpaa ga yô." 
1Kings19:19 Tsô a mough heregh, a za kohol Elisha wan u Shafati; lu kahan sule a ibua ihiar ihiar kwa pue kar uhar sha ishigh nagh; wen iyol na lu a ihiar kpaa, i masetyô la; tsô Eliya kar za kohol un, gema ikondo na haa un iyol." 
1Kings19:20 Nahan a undu ibua, a gba zendan Eliya ityô, a kaa er: Shi de m̱ za suse terem zwa kua ngôm, man me va dondo sha a we ye. A kaa a na er: Yô, za ase, gadia mo m er u nyi?" 
1Kings19:21 Tsô a de u dondon sha a na, a kôr ibua ihiar la, a sôngo, a jiir inyam i i sha ikon i ikav mbi kahan sule a mi la, a na ior, ve ya. Tsô a mough, a gba dondon sha Eliya, eren un tom." 
1Kings20:1 Tsô Benhada, tor u Shiria, kohol akumautya na cii, utor ikundugber kar uhar lu a na imôngo a anyinya man akeke; tsô a kôndo a za kase Samaria, a nôngo ityav a na." 
1Kings20:2 A tindi mbatyomov hen Ahaba tor u Iserael, ken gar, a kaa a na er: Benhada ngu kaan nahan er:" 
1Kings20:3 Azurfa man zenaria wou ka mba av; kasev ou kua ônov ou mba hemban doon ka mba av. 
1Kings20:4 Tor u Iserael gema kaa er: Er u kaa nahan, kape i lu je la, terem tor; mo m ngu u wou kua akaa a m lu a mi cii." 
1Kings20:5 Tsô mbatyomov mbala shi hide, va kaa er: Benhada ngu kaan nahan er: M tindi u loho je, m kaa mer, nam azurfa wou man zenaria wou man kasev ou kua ônov ou;" 
1Kings20:6 kpa kper er hegen nahan shi me tindi mbayev av her a we, ve̱ za ker ken ya wou vighe vighe kua ken uya mba mbayev ou kpaa; yô, hanma kwagh u a doo u ashe, vea tôô sha uwegh vegh, vea yem a mi." 
1Kings20:7 Tsô tor u Iserael yila mbatamen cii mba hen tar la, a kaa er: Shi nenge nen er or ne a kerem iyongo yô; gadia a tindi loho er m̱ na un kasev av kua ônov av man azurfa wam man zenaria wam, kpa m nyume un ga." 
1Kings20:8 Tsô mbatamen cii kua ior cii kpaa ve kaa a na er: De ongo ga, de rumun je ga." 
1Kings20:9 Nahan a kaa a mbatyomov mba Benhada la er: Yô, za kaa nen terem tor, ner: Hanma kwagh u u vande tindin hen wanakiriki wou wer a̱ er yô, me er, kpa kwagh ngun yô, me fatyô u eren ga. Tsô mbatyomov mbala mough hide va ôr un." 
1Kings20:10 Benhada shi tindi un loho er: Mbaaôndo ve̱ er a mo nahan shi i̱ hemba nahan kpaa, aluer alôgh a Samaria aa kuma ior mba ve dondom cii, er vea iv akevaveegh a mi yô." 
1Kings20:11 Nahan tor u Iserael gema kaa er: Za kaa un: Or u nan kange a kange iyol i utya yô, nana̱ de te ihagh er or u nan vande eren ikav kera la ga." 
1Kings20:12 Tsô zum u Benhada ungwa loho ne nahan yô, lu man msôrom ave, un kua utor, ken afo nahan a kaa a mbayev nav er: Tange nen ityav; tsô ve tange ityav sha u nôngon a gar la." 
1Kings20:13 Tsô profeti ugen kporom hen Ahaba tor u Iserael, a kaa er: TER ngu kaan nahan er: U nenge ikpilaior ne kpa? Nenge, nyian Me na i sha ikev you, man ú fa er Mo M lu TER ye." 
1Kings20:14 Ahaba kaa er: Sha ikev i ana? A kaa er: TER ngu kaan nahan er: Ka sha ikev i mbayev mba atiator a uipaven mba tar ne. Tsô a kaa er: Ka an nana hii ityava? A kaa er: Ka we. 
1Kings20:15 Tsô a ôr iyenge i mbayev mba atiator a uipaven la, ve lu ior deri uhar man ikundugber kar uhar; ken ijime ve yô, a ôr iyenge i ior cii, ka mba Iserael cii je la, ve lu ior dubu utaankaruhar je." 
1Kings20:16 Ve due iyange sha tembe. Benhada lu man kwagh hunden ken afo, un kua utor, ka utor mba ikundugber kar uhar mba wasen un mbala." 
1Kings20:17 Mbayev mba atiator a uipaven la, ve vande duen; tsô Benhada tindi, nahan i va kaa un er: Ior mba duen ken Samaria." 
1Kings20:18 A kaa er: Shin vea va á lu bem kpaa, kôr nen ve uma; man shin á lu ityav ve ve kpaa, kôr nen ve uma." 
1Kings20:19 Kape ve due ken gar la, mbayev mba atiator a uipaven la, kua akumautya a a dondo sha a ve la." 
1Kings20:20 Hanma or wua or u nan; tsô Mbashiria yevese man Iserael gba zendan ve ijime; Benhada tor u Shiria yevese sha nyinya war a mbaanyinyav mbagenev imôngo. 
1Kings20:21 Tsô tor u Iserael due wua anyinya, shi vihi akekeautya kpaa, a wua Mbashiria je falegh gba." 
1Kings20:22 Tsô profeti kporom hen tor u Iserael kaa a na er: Za za waan ago iyol, man ver ishima kpaa, nenge sha kwagh u ú er yô; gadia sha mhii u inyom yô, tor u Shiria una shi á va nôngo ityav a we." 
1Kings20:23 Tsô mbayev mba tor u Shiria la, ve kaa a na er: Aôndo ve ka Aôndo u sha agungu, ka nahan man ve hembe se agee ye; sé nôngo nen ityav a ve shin pev u kpuun kpuun, nahan sé hemba ve agee kpee." 
1Kings20:24 Yô, er ase nahan: dugh utor kera, hanma or sha ijiir i nan, gema ver ugomna sha ityouv vev;" 
1Kings20:25 yô, shi kohol akumautya, vough er akumautya a a saa u la nahan, nyinya kpaa sha ityough ki nyinya, ikyekye kpaa sha ityough ki ikyekye; yô, sé nôngo ityav a ve shin pev u kpuun kpuun, nahan sé hemba ve agee kpee je. A rumun kwaghôron ve, a er nahan kpaa." 
1Kings20:26 Tsô sha mhii u inyom la yô, tor Benhada kohol Mbashiria, kôndo sha Afeki, sha u za nôngon ityav a Iserael." 
1Kings20:27 I kohol Mbaiserael, i er ve kwaghyan u gbenda, tsô ve za u za nôngon ityav a ve; Mbaiserael haa afo sha ishiv vev er akum a ivo a kiriki ahar nahan; Mbashiria yô, iv tar la." 
1Kings20:28 Tsô or u Aôndo kporom, ôr kwagh a tor u Iserael, kaa er: TER ngu kaan nahan er: Er Mbashiria ve kaan er: TER ka Aôndo u sha agungu, ka Aôndo u shin pev u kpuun kpuun ga yô, nahan Me na ikpilaior ne cii sha ikev you, man né fa er Mo M lu TER ye." 
1Kings20:29 Ayange ataankarahar ve lu ken afo ve lu kenger ishiv ayol a ve. Tsô sha iyange i sha utaankaruhar la, ve hii ityav; Mbaiserael wua Mbashiria mba zan sha angahar ior dubu deri sha iyange i môm." 
1Kings20:30 Mba ve shi yô, ve yevese ve yem ken Afeki, ve za nyôr ken gar; nahan kpekpe u gar yôhôl kighir ior dubu ikundu kar utaankaruhar mba ve shi la. Benhada yevese nyôr ken gar za yer ken iyou i ken atô." 
1Kings20:31 Tsô mbayev nav kaa a na er: Nenge, se ungwa agwa ser, utor mba ken ya u Iserael ka utor mba zungwen mhôônom; yô, sé ta ikondo uya sé kange ikor sha ityou sé due sé za hen tor u Iserael, tsô alaghga una yima uma wou." 
1Kings20:32 Nahan ve ta ikondo uya ve kange ikor sha ityou ve va hen tor u Iserael ve va kaa er: Wanakiriki wou Benhada kaa er: M ngu zamber we, shi dem m̱ lu uma. A pine er: Ngu uma here? Ka anngôm je." 
1Kings20:33 Ior mbala ver ikav doo doo nahan ve kav fefa er i lu ishima na mimi je yô; tsô ve kaa er: Benhada ka anngôu je. Nahan a kaa er: Za, za va nen a na. Tsô Benhada due va her a na; a rumun un er a̱ unde sha ikyekye na." 
1Kings20:34 Tsô Benhada kaa a na er: Agar a terem lu ngohol sha ikev i teru yô, mo me hide a mi; ú lu a ian ken Damaseku er terem lu a mi ken Samaria nahan. Mo kpaa, kape Ahaba kaa la, me de u u yem sha ci u ikuryan ne. Tsô a ya ikur a na, a na un gbenda." 
1Kings20:35 Tsô orgen ken uprofeti kaa a ijende na sha imo i TER, er: Shi gbidyem. Ngula venda u gbidyen un." 
1Kings20:36 Tsô a kaa a na er: Er u vende u ungwan imo i TER yô, nenge ú moughon ú undun mo heen, tsô begha una wua u je. Tsô moughon undun un yô, begha za zua a na, wua un." 
1Kings20:37 Tsô a shi a kohol orgen a kaa er: Shi gbidyem. Ngula gbidye un, vihi un iyol je." 
1Kings20:38 Nahan profeti la mough za kegh tor gbenda, a gema iyol, a kange ikondo sha ashe." 
1Kings20:39 Tor ngur karen yô, a genger imo a yila tor; a kaa er: Wanakiriki wou nyôr ken atô u utya, tsô orgen kaha va nam or, a kaa er: Kura or ne; aluer shin a lu nan nan je kpaa nana saa yô, uma wou una lu sha ityough ki uma u nan, gayô, ú kimbi talenti u azurfa môm." 
1Kings20:40 Tsô er wanakiriki wou lu eren kwagh kera wue wue yô, or la osough. Tor u Iserael gema kaa a na er: Kape ijir you ia lu je la; we iyol you je u kure i." 
1Kings20:41 Tsô a sagh ikangenev mbi sha ashe na mbila fefa, nahan tor u Iserael kav un er a lu orprofeti yô." 
1Kings20:42 A gema a kaa a na er: TER ngu kaan nahan er: Er u de or u M ver un Mer a̱ tim, a osough we sha ikev yô, uma wou una lu sha ityough ki uma na, ior ou kpaa sha ityough ki ior nav." 
1Kings20:43 Tsô tor u Iserael yem hen ya na hingir zunguluu, ishima vihi un, maa a va ken Samaria." 
1Kings21:1 Tsô akaa ne nga kar kera yô, kwagh ne shi er: Naboti Oryesereel lu a sule u ikon i wain ken Yesereel, ikua ikua a ya u Ahaba tor u Samaria." 
1Kings21:2 Nahan Ahaba ôr kwagh a Naboti, a kaa er: Nam sule u ikon i wain wou ne, u̱ hingir mo sule u iue, gadia ngu ikua a ya wam, me na u sule a ikon i wain i hemban doon a ungun sha ityough ki u; shin aluer a hemba doon we yô, me yam a yam u sha inyar." 
1Kings21:3 Kpa Naboti kaa a Ahaba er: TER A̱ yangem u nan we dyako u uter av. 
1Kings21:4 Tsô Ahaba nyôr ken iyou na, hingir zunguluu, ishima vihi un sha kwaghôron u Naboti Oryesereel ôr a na la, er a kaa er: Me na u dyako u uter av ga. Nahan a za yav sha gambe na, a gema ishigh kera, a venda kwaghyan." 
1Kings21:5 Nahan kwase na Yesebel va her a na, va pine un er: Ka nyi ishima i vihi u yum, u vende kwaghyan nahana?" 
1Kings21:6 A kaa a na er: Ka sha ci u m ôr kwagh a Naboti Oryesereel, m kaa a na mer: Nam sule u ikon i wain wou me yam sha inyar; shin aluer a doo u yô, me na u sule ugen sha ityough ki u; kpa a gema a kaa er: Me na u sule wam mayange ga." 
1Kings21:7 Tsô kwase na Yesebel kaa a na er: U ngu tor u Iserael ga ha? Mough, ya kwagh ishima i̱ lu u gbar gbar; me na u sule u ikon i wain u Naboti Oryesereel la." 
1Kings21:8 Nahan a nger utakerada sha iti i Ahaba, a cir ve, a ver ikav na sha mi, a tindi utakerada mbala hen mbatamen man mbatarev mba ken gar na, mba ve lu a Naboti yô." 
1Kings21:9 Ken utakerada mbala a nger er: Yôô iyange i hôron kwaghyan, ver Naboti ken hemen sha ishigh ki iorough;" 
1Kings21:10 shi ver ior uhar, agbilinaior, sha ishigh nagh, ve̱ er shiada sha a na, ve̱ kaa er: U tuhwa Aôndo kua tor. Yô, due a na ken won, za ta un awen, a̱ kpe." 
1Kings21:11 Tsô ior mba ken gar na, mbatamen kua mbatarev mba ve lu ken gar na la, ve er er Yesebel tindi ve loho nahan vough, er i nger ken utakerada mba a tindi ve a mi la yô." 
1Kings21:12 Ve yôô iyange i hôron kwaghyan, ve ver Naboti ken hemen sha ishigh ki iorough." 
1Kings21:13 Tsô ior ihiar, agbilinaior, ve nyôr ve tema sha ishigh nagh; ve agbilinaior la, ve gba eren shiada sha a na, ka sha Naboti je la, sha ishigh ki iorough, ve kaa er: Naboti tuhwa Aôndo kua tor. Tsô maa ve due a na ken won ken akôngo a gar, ve za ta un awen, a kpe." 
1Kings21:14 Nahan ve tindi hen Yesebel ve kaa er: I ta Naboti awen, a kpe ve." 
1Kings21:15 Zum u Yesebel ungwa er i ta Naboti awen a kpe kera yô, Yesebel kaa a Ahaba er: Mough ase sha, ya dyako u sule u ikon i wain u Naboti Oryesereel, u iyange a venda u teen we u sha inyar la; gadia Naboti ngu uma ga, a kpe kera." 
1Kings21:16 Tsô zum u Ahaba ungwa er Naboti kpe kera yô, Ahaba mough sen hen sule u ikon i wain u Naboti Oryesereel, sha u una ngohol u yô." 
1Kings21:17 Tsô imo i TER va hen Eliya Ortishibi kaa er: 
1Kings21:18 Mough, sen, za kohol Ahaba tor u Iserael, u a tem ken Samaria la; nenge, ngu ken sule u ikon i wain u Naboti, a za ker er una za ya dyako sha u." 
1Kings21:19 Za ôr kwagh a na wer: TER ngu kaan nahan er: U wua, shi ú kôr u ngoholo? Yô, shi ôr kwagh a na kaa wer: TER ngu kaan nahan er: Henpe iwa i ndiar awambe a Naboti la, iwa shi ia ndiar awambe a ou je." 
1Kings21:20 Tsô Ahaba kaa a Eliya er: U zua a mo ve orihom wama? A rumun er: M zua a we; gadia u tee iyol you sha u eren ifer sha ishigh ki TER. 
1Kings21:21 Nenge, Me va a ican sha a we, Me ese u kera purututu, Me gber Ahaba hanma wannomso u nan lu ken uikangen man u nan tem enger enger ken Iserael kpaa;" 
1Kings21:22 shi Me gema ya wou una hingir er ya u Yerobiam wan u Nebati man er ya u Baasha wan u Ahiya nahan, sha ci u mbam u u bamen ne, shi u na Iserael a er kwaghbo kpaa." 
1Kings21:23 Yesebel kpaa, TER kaa er: Iwa ia ya Yesebel hen gilgar u Yesereel u ken won la." 
1Kings21:24 Or u Ahaba u nana kpe ken gar yô, iwa ia ya nan, man u nana kpe ken ikôngo yô, inyon i sha ia ya nan." 
1Kings21:25 Mimi je or u nan tee iyol i nan u eren ifer sha ishigh ki TER er Ahaba nahan, nan lu ga, gadia kwase na Yesebel tor un ityô." 
1Kings21:26 A er kwagh u hôngorough kpishi sha akombo a a dondo a, sha ieren i Mbaamor, mba TER zenda ve sha ishigh ki Mbaiserael kera la." 
1Kings21:27 Tsô, zum u Ahaba ungwa akaaôron ne yô, a ande akondo a na, a ta ikondo uya, a hôr kwaghyan, a yav a ikondo uya, a gba zenden teghelee teghelee." 
1Kings21:28 Nahan imo i TER va hen Eliya Ortishibi kaa er: 
1Kings21:29 U nenge er Ahaba a hide a iyol na ijime sha ishigh Yagh kpa? Yô, er a hide a iyol na ijime sha ishigh Yagh nahan, nahan yô, Me kera va a ican la sha ayange na ga; saa sha ayange a wan na man Me va a ican la hen ya na ye." 
1Kings22:1 Anyom atar je, ityav kera lu hen atô u Shiria a Iserael ga." 
1Kings22:2 Tsô ken inyom i sha utar la, Yehoshafati tor u Yuda va hen tor u Iserael." 
1Kings22:3 Tsô tor u Iserael pine mbayev nav er: Ne fa er Ramoti-gileadi a lu u wase kpa? Nahan kpaa se mba ving se ngohol un sha ikev i tor u Shiria ga! 
1Kings22:4 Nahan a pine Yehoshafati er: Ú shi za a mo imôngo sha u za nôngon ityav a Ramoti-gileadi kpa? Yehoshafati kaa a tor u Iserael er: Mo m ngu er we nahan, ior av kpaa mba er ior ou yô, anyinya am kpaa nga er anyinya ou yô." 
1Kings22:5 Yehoshafati shi kaa a tor u Iserael er: Ma u shi vande pinen imo i TER. 
1Kings22:6 Tsô tor u Iserael kohol uprofeti, ve lu er deri unyiin nahan, a pine ve er: M̱ za, m̱ za nôngo ityav a Ramoti-gileadi, shin m̱ de ze ga? Ve kaa er: Gba zan tsô, gadia TER Una na un sha ikev i tor." 
1Kings22:7 Kpa Yehoshafati kaa er: Profeti u TER ugen ngu heen, er sé pine nan gaa?" 
1Kings22:8 Tor u Iserael kaa a Yehoshafati er: Or shi môm u sé pine nan imo i TER, ka Mikaia wan u Imla; kpa m kôr un ihom, gadia er ma kwaghôron u profeti u dedoo sha a mo ga, saa kwaghbo tseegh. Kpa Yehoshafati kaa er: Tor a̱ de kaan nahan ga." 
1Kings22:9 Nahan tor u Iserael yila dugwer kaa er: Za, za va a Mikaia wan u Imla fefa." 
1Kings22:10 Tsô tor u Iserael vea Yehoshafati tor u Yuda ve tema, hanmô nan tema sha ikônough ki torough ki nan, a iwuhanev mbi torov iyol, hen vande u gbiren alakema hen hunda u nyôron ken Samaria la; uprofeti cii lu ôron kwaghôron u profeti sha ishiv vev." 
1Kings22:11 Sedekia wan u Kenaana er akor a iyôô, a kaa er: TER ngu kaan nahan er: Ka sha a né mgbegha Mbashiria zan zan vea tim ye." 
1Kings22:12 Kape uprofeti cii ve ôr la, ve kaa er: Gba zan hen Ramoti-gileadi tsô, ú za hemba; gadia TER Una na un sha ikev i tor." 
1Kings22:13 Ortyom u a za u za yilan Mikaia la, kaa a na er: Nenge, uprofeti cii mba haan zwa môm, mba pasen kwagh u doon tor; yô, kwaghôron wou a̱ lu er kwaghôron u mô ve nahan, za ôr kwagh u dedoo."
