1Kings22:14 Kpa Mikaia kaa er: Er TER A lu u uma ne, kwagh u TER Una kaam yô, ka un me ôr ye." 
1Kings22:15 Ve hen tor yô, tor pine un er: Mikaia, se̱ za hen Ramoti-gileadi, se̱ za nôngo ityav shin se̱ de ze ga? A kaa a na er: Gba zan tsô, ú za hemba; TER Una na un sha ikev i tor." 
1Kings22:16 Tsô tor kaa a na er: Ka kwa me je man me na u ú bum wer u gba ôron mo kwagh ugen ga, saa u mimi tseegh ken iti i TERE?" 
1Kings22:17 Nahan a kaa er: M nenge Iserael cii hingir kughukuku sha iwo er iyôngo i i lu a orkuran ga yô; TER kaa er: Mban mba a ter ga; nahan hanmô ve, nana̱ hide hen ya u nan bem bem." 
1Kings22:18 Tsô tor u Iserael kaa a Yehoshafati er: Ashen m kaa a we je mer, una ôrom kwagh u doon ga, saa u bo tsô gaa?" 
1Kings22:19 Shi a kaa er: Nahan yô, ungwa ase imo i TER; m nenge TER tema sha ikônough Nagh ki torough, akum a Sha cii tile Un ken uwegh ku yanegh kua ku imesegh kpaa." 
1Kings22:20 Tsô TER pine er: Ka an nana za mee Ahaba er a̱ za ken num a̱ za kpe hen Ramoti-gileadi ase? Tsô ugen ôr kwagh nahan, ugen ôr di kwagh ugen kposo." 
1Kings22:21 Nahan jijingi ugen due tile sha ishigh ki TER, kaa er: Mo me za mee un." 
1Kings22:22 TER pine un er: Ka sha nyi? A kaa er: Me due, me hingir jijingi u aiegh ken zwa u uprofeti nav cii. Tsô A kaa er: We, ú mee un, ú hemba un kpaa; za ase, za er nahan." 
1Kings22:23 Yô, nenge TER ver jijingi u aiegh ken zwa u uprofeti ou mban cii; man TER gema ôr kwagh u bo sha a we." 
1Kings22:24 Tsô Sedekia wan u Kenaana kporom, ta Mikaia sambe sha henge, kaa er: Ka sha hanma gbenda man jijingi u TER A dugh her a mo kera, A za er kwagh a wee?" 
1Kings22:25 Mikaia kaa er: Yô, sha iyange la ú nenge, zum u ú nyôr ken iyou i ker atô sha u yeren la." 
1Kings22:26 Tsô tor u Iserael kaa er: Kua nen a Mikaia hide nen a na hen orkurangar, Amon, man hen wan u Yoashi," 
1Kings22:27 kaa nen ner, tor kaa nahan er: Wa nen or ne ken gaadi, koso nen un sha kwaghyan u ican kua mngerem ma icanem kpaa, zan zan me kar hiden bem bem." 
1Kings22:28 Tsô Mikaia kaa er: Aluer wea hide bem bem yô, TER ôr kwagh a mo ga. Shi a kaa er: Ne ior cii ungwa nen." 
1Kings22:29 Nahan tor u Iserael kua Yehoshafati tor u Yuda ve gba kôndon zan hen Ramoti-gileadi. 
1Kings22:30 Tsô tor u Iserael kaa a Yehoshafati er: Me gema iyol, man me nyôr ken utya ye; kpa we yô, haa ikav mbi torov. Nahan tor u Iserael gema iyol, nyôr ken utya." 
1Kings22:31 Yô, tor u Shiria wa mbahemenev mba sha akeke a na ikundugber kar uhar tindi er: De nenge nen ityav a mbakiriki shin mbavesen kpaa ga, saa tor u Iserael tseegh." 
1Kings22:32 Tsô er mbahemenev mba sha akeke nenge a Yehoshafati yô, ve kaa er: Ka tor u Iserael je ne; nahan ve gema er vea nôngo ityav a na; kpa Yehoshafati genger imo." 
1Kings22:33 Er mbahemenev mba akeke mbala za kav er i lu tor u Iserael ga yô, ve hide, ve de u zendan un ijime." 
1Kings22:34 Tsô orgen henda ada gba keren ivaan abu tsô, za ta tor u Iserael hen ijuwan i ikav mbi utyav mbi yisan iyol a mi la; nahan a kaa a or u kôôm ikyekye na la er: Gema, hide ijime, due a mo ken utya kera, gadia i vihim iyol." 
1Kings22:35 Ityav seer taver sha iyange la; tor yier shin ikyekye, a ver ishigh ken Mbashiria; iyange i been yô, a maa a kpe; awambe a a due sha ivav la haa shin ikyekye." 
1Kings22:36 Er iyange i been nahan yô, i gba yôôn hen akumautya cii, er: Hanma or nana̱ hide ken gar u nan, hanma or nana̱ hide ken tar u nan." 
1Kings22:37 Kape tor kpe la, i va a na ken Samaria, maa i ii tor ken Samaria." 
1Kings22:38 Er ve ôô ikyekye la hen ityungu i Samaria la, iwa gba ndiar awambe a na (mbaagbaga di lu ôôn iyol her) sha imo i TER i A kaa yô." 
1Kings22:39 Aerenakaa a Ahaba agen man akaa a a er cii man iyou i a maa i sha anyinor la, kua agar a a maa yô, i nger a ken ruamabera u abaver a utor mba Iserael la gaa?" 
1Kings22:40 Nahan Ahaba yav a uter nav imôngo; wan na Ahashia gema tema tor sha ityough nagh. 
1Kings22:41 Yehoshafati wan u Asa ya tor sha Yuda sha inyom i sha unyiin i Ahaba tor u Iserael la. 
1Kings22:42 Yehoshafati lu anyom ikundugber kar ataan zum u a ya tor la; a lu tor ken Yerusalem anyom ikundu kar ataan. Iti i ngô na er Asuba, wan u Shilhi." 
1Kings22:43 A zende sha gbenda u ter na Asa cii jighilii; a kaha a undu u ga, lu eren kwagh u vough sha ishigh ki TER; nahan kpaa i vihi ajiir a taven sha la ga; ior lu nan nagh ku sôngon shi lu nanden kwaghhumandoon sha ajiir a taven sha la her." 
1Kings22:44 Yehoshafati hime iyongo a tor u Iserael. 
1Kings22:45 Aerenakaa a Yehoshafati agen, man tahav nav mbu a er, kua ityav mbi a nôngon yô, i nger a ken ruamabera u abaver a utor mba Yuda la gaa?" 
1Kings22:46 Mba inja ve i lu er i Mbasodom nahan la, mba ve lu sha ayange a ter na Asa, ve shi her la, a tim ve ken tar la kera." 
1Kings22:47 Ken Edom yô, tor lu ga; or ugen hira lu ker er ka tor nahan." 
1Kings22:48 Yehoshafati er utso mba Tarshishi sha u za tôôn zenaria hen Ofir, kpa ve za ga; gadia utso mbala hembe hen Eshion-geber." 
1Kings22:49 Nahan Ahashia wan u Ahaba kaa a Yehoshafati er: De, mbayev av ve̱ za a mbayev ou imôngo shin utso. Kpa Yehoshafati kera rumun ga." 
1Kings22:50 Tsô Yehoshafati yav a uter nav imôngo, i ii un a uter nav imôngo ken gar u ter na Davidi; wan na Yehoram gema tema tor sha ityough nagh." 
1Kings22:51 Ahashia wan u Ahaba ya tor u Iserael ken Samaria sha inyom i sha pue kar ataankarahar i Yehoshafati tor u Yuda la; a tema tor sha Iserael anyom ahar. 
1Kings22:52 A er kwagh u bo sha ishigh ki TER, a zende sha gbenda u ter na man sha gbenda u ngô na man sha gbenda u Yerobiam wan u Nebati, u a ne Iserael a̱ er isholibo la." 
1Kings22:53 A civir Baal, a gure un inya; a bam TER, Aôndo u Iserael, er ter na er nahan cii." 
2Kings1:1 Zum u Ahaba kpe kera yô, Moabi due sha ikev i Iserael kera." 
2Kings1:2 Ahashia osogh sha ian i sha kpoyou na u sha ken Samaria gba shin inya, nahan iyol nyoon un; tsô a tindi mbatyomov, a kaa a ve er: Za, za pine nen Baal-sebu aôndo u Ekeron ner, me war angev mbun kpa." 
2Kings1:3 Kpa ortyom u TER kaa a Eliya Ortishibi er: Mough kôndo, za kohol mbatyomov mba tor u Samaria mbala, pine ve, wer: Aôndo ngu ken Iserael ga, shin ne za pin Baal-sebu aôndo u Ekerono?" 
2Kings1:4 Yô, TER ngu kaan nahan er: Ú hungwa sha gambe u u undu ne ga, ú kpe kpee. Nahan Eliya mough yem." 
2Kings1:5 Tsô mbatyomov mbala cin hide her a na, a pine ve er: Ka nyi ne hide?" 
2Kings1:6 Ve kaa a na er: Orgen kôndo va kohol se, nan kaa a vese er: Hide, za nen hen tor u a tindi ne la, za kaa nen un ner: TER ngu kaan nahan er: Aôndo ngu ken Iserael je ga, shin u tindi wer i̱ za pine Baal-sebu aôndo u Ekerono? Nahan, ú hungwa sha gambe u u undu ne ga, ú kpe kpee." 
2Kings1:7 A pine ve er: Or shon nan ngu nana, u nan kende nan va kohol ne, nan er ne kwagh nee?" 
2Kings1:8 Ve gema ve kaa a na er: Nan ngu a ice iyol, a zer kwange u ikôv shin iwenge. Tsô a kaa er: Ka Eliya Ortishibi." 
2Kings1:9 Nahan a tindi orhementyav u a lu a ior akunduahargber sha ikev yô, a ior nav mba akunduahargber mbala cii. Tsô a kôndo sha a na; yô, un tema sha ityough ki igungu. A kaa a na er: Or u Aôndo, tor kaa er: U̱ hungwa!" 
2Kings1:10 Eliya gema kaa a orhementyav u ior akunduahargber la er: Aluer mea lu or u Aôndo mimi yô, usu u̱ sen Sha u̱ va hia u kua ior ou mba akunduahargber mban cii. Tsô usu sen Sha hia un kua ior nav mba akunduahargber mbala." 
2Kings1:11 Nahan a shi a tindi orhementyav ugen u lun a ior akunduahargber sha ikev a ior nav mba akunduahargber mbala. Un kpaa a gema a kaa a na er: Or u Aôndo, tor kaa nahan er: U̱ hungwa fefa!" 
2Kings1:12 Eliya gema kaa a ve er: Aluer mea lu or u Aôndo mimi yô, usu u̱ sen Sha u̱ va hia u a ior ou mba akunduahargber mban. Tsô usu u Aôndo sen Sha, hia un a ior nav mba akunduahargber mbala." 
2Kings1:13 Shi a tindi orhementyav ugen u lun a ior akunduahargber sha ikev, u sha kwa tar, a ior nav akunduahargber la. Un orhementyav u ior akunduahargber, u sha utar la, kôndo va gure sha ishigh ki Eliya, a zamber a na, a kaa a na er: Or u Aôndo, uma wam kua uma u mbayev ou akunduahargber mban, a̱ shi lu kwagh u injaa sha ashe ou." 
2Kings1:14 Nenge, usu sen Sha va hia mbahemen ityav mba uhar mba lun a ior akunduahargber akunduahargber sha ikev, mba tsuaa la, a ior vev mba akunduahargber mbala; yô uma wam a̱ shi lu kwagh u injaa sha ishigh you." 
2Kings1:15 Tsô ortyom u TER kaa a Eliya er: Hungwa a na imôngo; de cie un ga. Nahan a mough, a hungwa a na imôngo, a za vea na hen tor." 
2Kings1:16 A kaa a na er: TER ngu kaan nahan er: Er u tindi mbatyomov wer, ve̱ za pine Baal-sebu aôndo u Ekeron yô—shin Aôndo u á pine imo Na ngu ken Iserael ga ase?—nahan ú kera hungwa sha gambe wou u u undu ne ga, ú kpe kpee." 
2Kings1:17 Nahan a kpe di sha imo i TER, er Eliya kaa un nahan je. Yehoram ya tor sha ityough nagh sha inyom i sha uhar i Yehoram wan u Yehoshafati tor u Yuda la; gadia a lu a wan ga." 
2Kings1:18 Aerenakaa agen a Ahashia er yô, i nger a ken ruamabera u abaver a utor mba Iserael la gaa?" 
2Kings2:1 Tsô zum u kuma TER pe Una tôô Eliya sha hiar, Una yem a na Sha yô, Eliya mough hen Gilgal a Elisha imôngo." 
2Kings2:2 Eliya kaa a Elisha er: Ma u lu heen yôô, gadia TER tindim hen Betel. Kpa Elisha kaa er: Er TER A lu u uma man we kpaa u lu uma ne, me undu u ga. Tsô ve sen shin Betel." 
2Kings2:3 Yô, uprofeti mba ve lu ken Betel la, ve due ve za kegh Elisha gbenda, ve kaa a na er: U fa er TER Una tôô teru sha ishigh you kera nyian kpa? A kaa er: Een, m fa! Huan nen ving tsô." 
2Kings2:4 Tsô Eliya kaa a na er: Elisha, shi lu heen, gadia TER tindim hen Yeriko. Kpa a kaa er: Er TER A lu u uma man we kpaa u lu uma ne, me undu u ga. Tsô ve va ken Yeriko." 
2Kings2:5 Nahan uprofeti mba ve lu ken Yeriko la, ve kporom, hen Elisha, ve kaa a na er: U fa er TER Una tôô teru sha ishigh you kera nyian kpa? A gema a kaa er: Een, m fa! Huan nen ving tsô." 
2Kings2:6 Tsô Eliya kaa a na er: Shi lu heen, gadia TER tindim hen Yordan. A kaa er: Er TER A lu u uma man we kpaa u lu uma ne, me undu u ga. Nahan ve gba yemen hemen." 
2Kings2:7 Tsô uprofeti ior akunduahargber ve za, ve za tile ken ica, ve ver ishigh sha a ve; ve uhar ve tile hen kpe u Yordan." 
2Kings2:8 Tsô Eliya kôr riga na, hure, gbidye sha mnger, nahan ma tôndo, ma shaam tile, ma shinim kuwa; ve uhar ve per sha tareghnyaagh." 
2Kings2:9 Er ve per yô, Eliya kaa a Elisha er: Kaam kwagh u m̱ er u yô, er m lu a pav a we ga ne. Elisha kaa er: Shi rumun ikwar ihiar i jijingi wou i̱ gba sha a mo." 
2Kings2:10 A kaa a na er: U sôn kwagh u ican tsô; nahan kpaa, aluer wea nengen a mo zum u á tsuwem her a we kera la yô, á lu nahan; kpa aluer ka nahan ga yô, á lu nahan je ga." 
2Kings2:11 Tsô er ve lu ôron kwagh yemen la, nenge, ikyekye i usu kua anyinya a usu va ande, pav ve; tsô Eliya kôndo sha hiar yem Sha." 
2Kings2:12 Elisha nenge, gba yilan er: Terem, terem, akeke a Iserael kua mbaanyinyav nav kpaa! A kera seer nengen a na ga; nahan a kôr ikondo na a ande abamber ahar." 
2Kings2:13 Shi a tôô riga u Eliya u a osough un a gba la, a hide a va tile hen kpe u Yordan." 
2Kings2:14 A kôr riga u Eliya u a osough un a gba la, a gbidye sha mnger, a kaa er: TER, Aôndo u Eliya, ngu hana? Er a gbidye sha mnger yô, mngerem tôndo; tsô Elisha per." 
2Kings2:15 Zum u uprofeti mba ve lu ken Yeriko, vegher u sha ishigh nagh la, za nenge a na, ve kaa er: Jijingi u Eliya tema sha Elisha ve. Tsô ve va, ve va kohol un, ve gure inya sha ishigh nagh." 
2Kings2:16 Ve kaa a na er: Nenge, ior mba taver ayol akunduahargber, mba heen, a mbayev ou imôngo, shi rumun, ve̱ za ker teru, gayô, alaghga Jijingi u TER kende a na sha, za gbihi un sha ma uwo, shin shin ma pev. A kaa er: De tindin nen ga." 
2Kings2:17 Er ve za un iyol zan zan kuma un iyol yô, a kaa er: Tindi nen. Nahan ve tindi ior akunduahargber; ve gba za keren ayange atar, kpa ve zua a na ga." 
2Kings2:18 Tsô ve hide her a na, er a lu ngôôr ken Yeriko la; nahan a kaa a ve er: M kaa ne gaa, mer, de kera ze nen ga ga?" 
2Kings2:19 Tsô ior mba ken gar ve kaa a Elisha er: Nenge, mlu u gar heen ne, doo, er terem kpaa a nengen nahan; kpa mngerem doo ga, inya kpaa doo iyiav ga." 
2Kings2:20 A kaa er: Va nam nen tasa u he, haa nen bar shimi. Tsô ve va na un." 
2Kings2:21 Nahan a due a za hen imbormnger, a za haa bar shimi, a kaa er: TER ngu kaan nahan er: M sôr mngerem man; ku man iyiagh ki vihin vea kera due sha mi ga." 
2Kings2:22 Nahan mngerem hingir dedoo zan zan nyian, sha mkaanem ma Elisha kaa la." 
2Kings2:23 A mough keela a gba kôndon zan sha Betel; er a lu kôndon sha gbenda la yô, anmbayev mba nomso due ken gar gba nahan un tar, ve kaa a na er: Kôndo yem Sha, we orkpuluntyough ne; kôndo, yem Sha, we orkpuluntyough ne!" 
2Kings2:24 Tsô a gema ashe a kenger ve a wa ve ifan ken iti i TER. Nahan ungômbadwem uhar due shin ikô va kôr anmbayev nomso mbagenev akunduahar kar uhar ken ve, ande." 
2Kings2:25 Tsô a mough keela, a za sha uwo u Karmel; shi a za mough keela, a hide ken Samaria." 
2Kings3:1 Yehoram wan u Ahaba ya tor sha Iserael ken Samaria ken inyom i sha pue kar anigheni i Yehoshafati tor u Yuda; a tema tor anyom pue kar ahar. 
2Kings3:2 A er kwagh u ifer sha ishigh ki TER, kpa kuma sha ter na man ngô na ga; gadia a dugh ityôgh ki iwenegh ki Baal, ki ter na tim la, kera." 
2Kings3:3 Nahan kpaa a var sha akaabo a Yerobiam wan u Nebati, a a ne Iserael a̱ er a la; a pav a a ga." 
2Kings3:4 Mesha tor u Moabi lu or u lun a iyôngo, a taan tor u Iserael kpandegh sha ônovmbaiyôngov dubu deri man aive a anomaiyôngo dubu deri." 
2Kings3:5 Kpa zum u Ahaba kpe yô, tor u Moabi mough hendan a tor u Iserael." 
2Kings3:6 Nahan tor Yehoram due ken Samaria hen shighe la, a kohol Iserael cii," 
2Kings3:7 shi a tindi loho hen Yehoshafati tor u Yuda, a kaa er: Tor u Moabi mough sha u hendan a mo, ú rumun ú za a mo imôngo sha u za nôngon ityav a Moabi kpa? A kaa er: Me kôndo; mo m ngu er we yô, ior av mba er ior ou, man anyinya am kpaa nga er anyinya ou yô." 
2Kings3:8 A kaa er: Ka hanma gbenda sé kôndoo? A gema a kaa er: Ka sha gbenda u ken desereti u Edom. 
2Kings3:9 Nahan tor u Iserael za, man tor u Yuda kua tor u Edom kpaa; ve due nev ve zende ayange ataankarahar; ve zua a mngerem sha ci u akumautya kua uzendenya mba ve lu zan a ve la ga." 
2Kings3:10 Tsô tor u Iserael kaa er: Kpe ahii! TER yila utor mba utar mban er Una na ve sha ikev i Moabi. 
2Kings3:11 Kpa Yehoshafati kaa er: Profeti u TER u sé pine un imo i TER ngu heen gaa? Nahan wanye ugen u tor u Iserael la, gema kaa er: Elisha wan u Shafati ngu heen, u lu haan Eliya mngerem sha ave la." 
2Kings3:12 Tsô Yehoshafati kaa er: Kwaghôron u TER ngu a na. Nahan tor u Iserael man Yehoshafati kua tor u Edom sen her a na. 
2Kings3:13 Elisha kaa a tor u Iserael er: Ka nyi i zoughom a we? Za hen uprofeti mba teru, kua uprofeti mba ngôu! Kpa tor u Iserael kaa a na er: Ka nahan ga; gadia TER yila utor mba utar mban er Una na ve sha ikev i Moabi." 
2Kings3:14 Elisha kaa a na er: Er TER u akum a Sha, u m til sha ishigh Nagh A lu u uma ne, mimi je, aluer mea we iko sha mlu u Yehoshafati tor u Yuda a lu heen ne ga yô, ma m gem ashe her a we, ma m nenge a we je ga." 
2Kings3:15 Yô, vam ase a or u kuhwan adiguve. Tsô zum u oradiguve ngur kuhwan yô, uwegh ku TER sen sha a na." 
2Kings3:16 Tsô a kaa er: TER ngu kaan nahan er: Time nen ahungwa shin pev ne gbulugh gbulugh. 
2Kings3:17 Gadia TER ngu kaan nahan er: Né nenge a ahumbe ga, man né nenge a ura kpaa ga, nahan kpaa mngerem maa iv shin pev, né ma, ne man ilev yenev kua uzendenya enev." 
2Kings3:18 Kwagh ne ka ankwagh u kiriki tsô sha ishigh ki TER; shi Una na Mbamoabi sha ikev yen kpaa. 
2Kings3:19 Né hembe hanma gar u lun a gir kua hanma gar u i tsough un kpaa, shi né gber hanma kon u dedoo, man né cir azôr cii, shi né vihi hanma ijiir i doon sule sha awen." 
2Kings3:20 Tsô kper nan pepe sha shighe u nan nagh nahan, nenge, mngerem, za va sha gbenda u Edom, mngerem va iv ken tar la." 
2Kings3:21 Er Mbamoabi ungwa er utor va sha u nôngon ityav a ve yô, ve kohol imôngo cii, mba ve kuma u zeren ikav mbi utyav cii kua mbaganden kpaa, ve za tile sha ikighirtar." 
2Kings3:22 Mba moughon pepe yô, iyange due ta sha mnger, nahan Mbamoabi nenge mngerem mara nyian ken ica er awambe nahan;" 
2Kings3:23 nahan ve kaa er: Ka awambe je, utor mbala nôngo num wua ayol a ve je. Yô, Moabi, za ya nen ishar." 
2Kings3:24 Er ve va hen afo a Iserael yô, Mbaiserael mough ta num sha Mbamoabi je, ve yevese; Mbaiserael cir ve ijime gba wuan Mbamoabi yemen hemen." 
2Kings3:25 Ve hembe agar; hanma ijiir i doon sule ve haa awen sha mi, hanma or kende iwen i nan her, ve cir awen sha mi; ve kondo azôr cii, ve paa ikon i injaa kera cii, zan zan ve mase undun Kir-hareseti a garawen heregh tseegh; nahan kpaa mbakeren awen sha mzu kase un ta num sha mi." 
2Kings3:26 Zum u tor u Moabi nenge ityav hemba un agee yô, a tôô ior deri utaankaruhar mba lun a sanker a na imôngo er una ande hen ian i tor u Edom, kpaa ve kanshio." 
2Kings3:27 Nahan a tôô wan na u iunda u ma a va tem tor sha ityough nagh la, a na nagh ku nanden a mi sha gilgar. Tsô iyugh va sha Iserael tsung, nahan ve mough her a na kera, ve hide ken tar ve." 
2Kings4:1 Tsô kwase ugen ken kasev mba uprofeti va vaa a Elisha kaa er: Wanakiriki wou, nomom, kpe; man we kpaa u fa wanakiriki wou lu cian TER; yô, oryareninjô va er una va kuram ônov uhar, ve̱ za hingir ikpan na." 
2Kings4:2 Elisha gema kaa a na er: Tsô m̱ er u nyi? Kaam yôô; ka nyi u lu a mi ken ya wouwe? A kaa er: Wanakiriki wou u kwase ngu a ma kwagh hen ya ga, saa ityegh ki mkuregh tsô." 
2Kings4:3 Tsô a kaa er: Yô, za sôn atum ken won hen mba ve dondo a we cii, atum a a lu a ma kwagh shimi ga yô; sôn a̱ de lu kpeghee ga." 
2Kings4:4 Yô, nyôr, wuhe hunda, uwe a ônov ou, haa shin atum la cii, ver a a iv la kposo." 
2Kings4:5 Tsô a mough a due a za nyôr, a wuhe hunda, un a ônov nav; ve na un atum a haa." 
2Kings4:6 Er atum la iv yô, a kaa a wan na er: Shi nam tumugh kugenegh, kpa a kaa a na er: Tumugh kera ku ga. Tsô mkurem tôndo." 
2Kings4:7 Nahan a va kaa or u Aôndo la. A kaa er: Za tee mkurem mara kimbi injô you, kwagh u una shi yô, mase koson iyol you kua ônov ou a mi." 
2Kings4:8 Tsô iyange igen Elisha lu zan Shunem; shagbakwase ugen lu her, a za un iyol tsung er a̱ ya kwagh. Tsô hanma shighe u una karen yô, a kaha a za ya kwagh her." 
2Kings4:9 Nahan a kaa a nom na er: Nenge, m kav or ne ka icighanor u Aôndo je, u a karen heen keke ne." 
2Kings4:10 Yô, sé maa nen un anyou sha, sé ver un gambe ker man tebul man ikônough kua imenger, nahan shighe u una va her a vese yô, a̱ nyôr ker." 
2Kings4:11 Tsô iyange igen a va her, a nyôr ken iyou la, a yav." 
2Kings4:12 A gema a kaa a Gehashi wanakiriki na er: Yila kwase u Shunem ne: yer un yô, a va tile un sha ishi." 
2Kings4:13 A kaa a na er: Kaa un wer, nenge, ishima nyian we a vese, u er se akaa ne cii; yô, ka nyi i̱ er di sha ci wouwe? Shin i̱ za ôr tor kwagh wou, shin i̱ ôr kurutya ase. A gema a kaa er: M tema hen ityô yam je." 
2Kings4:14 Shi a gema a kaa er: Nahan ka nyi kwagh á er unu? Tsô Gehashi kaa er: Ngu a wan ga, man nom na kpaa bee iyol." 
2Kings4:15 A kaa er: Yila un. Er a yila un yô, a va tile sha hunda." 
2Kings4:16 A kaa er: Inyom á va hurugh á kuman hen shighe ne yô, ú wa wan ikum. A kaa er: Eihe, terem, we or u Aôndo je, de tsughun kpan wou u kwase ga!" 
2Kings4:17 Tsô kwase la wa iyav, mar wan u nomso er inyom hurugh va ar hen shighe la yô, er Elisha kaa un nahan vough." 
2Kings4:18 Wan la vesen yô, iyange igen a due a za hen ter na hen mbasundav." 
2Kings4:19 Tsô a hii a ter na er: Ityough, ityougho! Nahan a kaa a wanakiriki na er: Tôô un, za a na hen ngô na." 
2Kings4:20 Tsô a tôô un a za a na hen ngô na, a yav un sha ikum zan zan kuma iyange sha tembe nahan, maa a kpe." 
2Kings4:21 Tsô a unde a za penda un sha gambe u or u Aôndo la, a due a kôr hunda a wuhe." 
2Kings4:22 Nahan a yila nom na, a kaa a na er: Shi tindim a wanye môm a jaki môm, me gber ayem, me za hen or u Aôndo man me hide ye." 
2Kings4:23 A kaa er: Ka nyi man i sar u u zan her a na nyiana? Ka uwer u he ga, shi ka iyange i memen kpaa ga. A kaa er: Dem tsô hô!" 
2Kings4:24 Tsô a kange jaki shidi, a kaa a wanakiriki na er: Hure i, yem hemen, de gbe wer u huren ga, saa me kaa u." 
2Kings4:25 Tsô a za, a za ar hen or u Aôndo sha uwo u Karmel je. Er or u Aôndo ta ashe za nenge a na ca yô, a kaa a wanakiriki na Gehashi er: Nenge, kwase u Shunem ngula;" 
2Kings4:26 shi gber ayem, za kohol un, pine un wer: U ngu dedoo jee? Nomu ngu dedoo? Wanakiriki la kpaa ngu dedoo? A rumun er: Doo." 
2Kings4:27 Va ar hen or u Aôndo sha igungu yô, a kôr un angahar, tsô Gehashi kporom er una mgbegha un kera; kpa or u Aôndo kaa er: De un; gadia ishima vihi un, man TER yerem kwagh la, A kaam ga." 
2Kings4:28 Tsô kwase kaa er: Iyange m vaa wan a tereme? Iyange m kaa u mer: De tsughun mo ga ga? 
2Kings4:29 Nahan a kaa a Gehashi er: Fiir ikondo, tôô gbough agh sha uwe, za, wea kohol an or kpaa de sughun nan ga, man aluer orgen nana sugh u kpaa, de bughun nan zwa ga; za penda gbough agh sha ishigh ki wanye la." 
2Kings4:30 Kpa ngô u wanye la kaa er: Er TER A lu u uma, man we kpaa u lu uma ne yô, mayange me undu u ga. Nahan a mough a dondo sha a na." 
2Kings4:31 Gehashi kar ve sha hemen, za ver gbough kura sha ishigh ki wanye la; kpa imo lu ga, m-ongo kpaa ga. Nahan, a hide a va kohol un, a kaa a na er: Wanye la nder ga." 
2Kings4:32 Er Elisha nyôr hen ya la yô, nenge, wan la yav sha gambe kpenegh." 
2Kings4:33 Nahan a nyôr, a wuhe hunda, a lu ker vea na, ve uhar, a sôn TER." 
2Kings4:34 Tsô a unde a samber sha wanye la, a penda zwa sha zwa na, ashe kpaa sha ashe na, ave na kpaa sha ave na; a samber sha a na; nahan iyol i wan la gba tseen." 
2Kings4:35 Tsô a hide a zende ken iyou kwa môm; a shi a unde a samber iyol na sha a na; wanye la yesem kwa taankaruhar, maa a bugh ashe na." 
2Kings4:36 A yila Gehashi, a kaa a na er: Yila kwase u Shunem ne. Nahan a yila un. Er kwase la nyôr her a na yô, a kaa a na er: Tôô ase wan wou." 
2Kings4:37 Tsô a nyôr, a gure un hen angahar, a wa ityough inya je, a tôô wan na, a due." 
2Kings4:38 Tsô Elisha shi va ken Gilgal; yô, ijen gba ken tar la; uprofeti tema un sha ishi; nahan a kaa a wanakiriki na er: Ver zegeitye la, jiidi kwaghyan sha ci u uprofeti." 
2Kings4:39 Tsô ugen za ken toho za zôr iue, a zua a icegherme, a zôr atam a i, a kuve ikum poo, a va sev, a haa shin ityegh ki kwaghyan kila; gadia ve vande fan ga." 
2Kings4:40 Nahan ve haa er ior mbala ve̱ ya. Er ve lu yan kwaghyan ave yô, ve gbire iwer, ve kaa er: Kpash! or u Aôndo, ku ngu shin ityegh kin. Ve fatyô u yan ga." 
2Kings4:41 Nahan a kaa er: Za tôô mwem va a mi. Tsô a haa ma shin ityegh kila; a kaa er: Haa nen ase, ior ve̱ ya. Nahan ma kwagh u bo kera lu shin ityegh kila ga." 
2Kings4:42 Tsô orgen za va sha Baal-shalisha, a va na or u Aôndo bredi u iyiagh ki tsutswagh, ikpen i bredi i shair ikundu kua asagher a alakema a ndor ken iba na. Nahan a kaa er: Na ior ve̱ ya." 
2Kings4:43 Wanakiriki na kaa er: Kwagh ne nahan di tsô me na ior derii? Kpa a kaa er: Na ior ve̱ ya; gadia TER ngu kaan nahan er, vea ya je á neer ve." 
2Kings4:44 Tsô a na ve ve ya, neer ve, sha imo i TER kaa la." 
2Kings5:1 Naaman kurutya u tor u Shiria lu ter na or u injaa kpekpe, lu orcivirigh, gadia ka sha ikev na je TER na Mbashiria mhembe ye, shi a lu or u ageegh u tseen ishima sha kwagh, kpa a lu orimande." 
2Kings5:2 Yô, Mbashiria due akum akum, kôr wankwase u kpeghee ken tar u Iserael, yem a mi uikangen; a lu eren kwase u Naaman tom." 
2Kings5:3 Tsô a kaa a ngô na la er: Terem ma a lu ase hen profeti u ken Samaria la, nahan ma a bee un imande!" 
2Kings5:4 Tsô a nyôr a za kaa ter na er: Wankwase u a due ken tar u Iserael la, a kaa nahan nahan." 
2Kings5:5 Tsô tor u Shiria kaa er: Za ase, me tindi tor u Iserael a washika. Nahan a mough a tôô azurfa utalenti pue man zenaria ushekel dubu ataratar kua uriga pue." 
2Kings5:6 Tsô a va a washika la hen tor u Iserael, i nger sha mi er: Zum u washika ne una nyôr hen we yô, nenge, m tindi u a wanakiriki wam Naaman mer, bee un imande na." 
2Kings5:7 Er tor u Iserael ôr washika la yô, a ande akondo a na, a kaa er: Mo m ngu Aôndo man m̱ wua shi m̱ nder yee, ve or ne a tindi her a mo er m̱ bee or imande na nahana? Fa nen, shi nenge nen er a keren mo iyongo yô." 
2Kings5:8 Tsô er Elisha or u Aôndo ungwa gwa er tor u Iserael a ande akondo a na yô, a tindi loho hen tor, a kaa er: Ka nyi u ande akondo ouwe? De, a̱ va her a mo, tsô una fa er profeti a lu ken Iserael yô." 
2Kings5:9 Nahan Naaman va a anyinya na kua akeke na, va tile sha hundaya u Elisha." 
2Kings5:10 Tsô Elisha tindi ortyom her a na, za kaa a na er: Za, za ôô iyol shin Yordan kwa taankaruhar, tsô iyol you ia hire her, ú hingir wang." 
2Kings5:11 Kpa ishima vihi Naaman, a gba zôhôn yemen kaan er: M fa mer, una due una va her a mo, una tile una yila iti i TER, Aôndo na, una tiligh uwegh sha ijiir la, una bee imande ne." 
2Kings5:12 Abana man Farpar, uifi mba Damaseku, hemba doon a mngerem ma Iserael cii gaa? Ma m ee iyol shin ve, ma i wanger mo gaa? Tsô a gema a gba yuwen yemen." 
2Kings5:13 Nahan mbayev nav kporom ôr kwagh a na, ve kaa er: Terem, aluer profeti una kaa er u̱ er ma zegekwagh je yô, ma u er ga shinii? Man hire hegen u a kaa a we er: Ôô iyol, tsô ú hingir wang, ne?" 
2Kings5:14 Nahan a hungwa, a mire kwa taankaruhar shin Yordan, sha imo i or u Aôndo la; nahan iyol na hide her, hingir er iyol i wanikundan nahan, tsô a hingir wang." 
2Kings5:15 Tsô a hide hen or u Aôndo, un a ior nav cii, a va, a va tile sha ishigh nagh; a kaa er: Nenge, hegen m fa Aôndo ugen ngu sha won ga saa ken Iserael; yô, shi ngohol iwua hen wanakiriki wou." 
2Kings5:16 Kpa a kaa er: Er TER A lu u uma, u m til sha ishigh Nagh ne, me ngohol ma kwagh ga. A za un iyol er a̱ ngohol, kpa a venda." 
2Kings5:17 Tsô Naaman kaa er: Á lu nahan ga yô, shi rumun i̱ na wanakiriki wou inya, i̱ kuma ikav mbi alfadari uhar; gadia wanakiriki wou una kera naan mbaaôndo mbagenev nagh ku nanden shin ku sôngon ga, saa TER tsô." 
2Kings5:18 Sha kwagh ne tsô, TER A̱ de wanakiriki wou ibo na, zum u terem una nyôr ken iyou i Rimon sha u guren civir her, man una yier sha uwegh agh, man mo kpaa me wa ityough inya ken iyou i Rimon; zum u me wa ityough inya ken iyou i Rimon yô, TER A̱ de wanakiriki wou ibo na sha kwagh ne." 
2Kings5:19 A kaa a na er: Yem bem bem. Tsô a mough her a na; yemen dôghôô yô," 
2Kings5:20 Gehashi wanakiriki u Elisha or u Aôndo la, kaa er: Nenge, terem de Naaman or u Shiria ne, a ngohol kwagh u a ve a mi la ga; yô, er TER A lu u uma ne, me zenda un ijime ayem, me za ngohol kwagh her a na." 
2Kings5:21 Tsô Gehashi gba zendan Naaman ijime. Er Naaman nenge or lu van un ijime ayem yô, a hungwa sha ikyekye, a za kegh un gbenda, a pine er: Ka dedoo je kpa?" 
2Kings5:22 A kaa er: Ka dedoo! Terem tindim, a kaa er: Nenge, hegen hegen ne, mbayev uhar ken uprofeti due sha tar u iwoogh u Eferaim va her a mo; yô, shi na ve azurfa talenti môm kua uriga uhar." 
2Kings5:23 Naaman kaa er: Shi ngohol utalenti uhar. A za un iyol, nahan a kange azurfa utalenti uhar ken akpa ahar, man uriga uhar, a na mbayev nav uhar, ve tôô ve hemen a mi." 
2Kings5:24 Er a va ar sha igungu yô, a ngohol mbi sha ikev ve, a koso mbi ken iyou; tsô a na mbayev mbala gbenda, ve hide." 
2Kings5:25 Er a va nyôr a va tile sha ishigh ki ter na yô, Elisha pine un er: Ka han u za ve nahan Gehashi? A kaa er: Wanakiriki wou za mape je ga." 
2Kings5:26 A kaa a na er: Ishima yam za a we imôngo, zum u or hongo sha ikyekye nan kegh u gbenda la gaa? Ka shighe u ngohol inyaregh, shin u ngohol akondo, shin ishule i olev, shin ikon i wain, shin iyôngo shin ibua, shin ikpan i nomso, shin ikpan i ukase je ne?" 
2Kings5:27 Yô, imande i Naaman la ia hire ia kôr u kua tsombor wou cii gbem sha won. Nahan a due her a na a imande iyol pung er irkpiigh nahan." 
2Kings6:1 Tsô uprofeti kaa a Elisha er: Nenge, ijiir i se tem sha ishigh you ne, i yina se." 
2Kings6:2 Yô, shi rumun se̱ za shin Yordan, hanmô wase nana̱ za gber hwange, sha er sé er ijiir i teman her yô. A gema a kaa er: Za nen." 
2Kings6:3 Tsô ugen kaa er: Shi za a mbayev ou imôngo. A gema a kaa er: Me za. 
2Kings6:4 Tsô a za a ve imôngo, mba za ar hen Yordan yô, ve gba gberen ikon." 
2Kings6:5 Kpa orgen ngur gberen hwange yô, ijembe tsuwa gba shin mnger; tsô a genger imo, a kaa er: Kpe ahii, terem! man m sôn a sôn i kpaa." 
2Kings6:6 Or u Aôndo pine er: I gba hana? A tese un ijiir la. Tsô a tôndo gbaakon, a gbihi her, a er iyôgh kila ki due ki gba zenden sha kwavmnger." 
2Kings6:7 A kaa a na er: Ngohol. Tsô a za uwegh a ngohol. 
2Kings6:8 Sha shighe u tor u Shiria lu nôngon ityav a Iserael la, a tume idyu a mbayev nav, a kaa er: Ka sha ijiir i nahan nahan me haa afo ye." 
2Kings6:9 Tsô or u Aôndo tindi tor u Iserael loho, a kaa er: Ver ishima de karen hen ijiir i nahan la ga, gadia Mbashiria mba van her." 
2Kings6:10 Nahan tor u Iserael tindi hen ijiir i or u Aôndo a kaa un, a we un kwagh sha i la, nahan a ver ishima her, lu kwa môm shin kwa har tseegh tsô ga." 
2Kings6:11 Nahan ishima vihi tor u Shiria kpishi sha kwagh la, a yila mbayev nav, a kaa a ve er: Né shi tesem or u ken a vese u nan te ikaa ken tor u Iserael gaa?" 
2Kings6:12 Tsô wanye na ugen kaa er: Ei, terem tor; kpa ka Elisha, profeti u a lu ken Iserael la, a kaan tor u Iserael akaaôron a ou a u er ken iyou you i yaven ye." 
2Kings6:13 A kaa er: Za, za nenge henpe a lu yô, er me tindi, á za kôr un yô. Tsô i kaa un er: Ngu ken Dotan." 
2Kings6:14 Nahan a tindi anyinya kua akeke man ikumutya i vesen ker; ve va tugh, ve kase gar la." 
2Kings6:15 Er wanakiriki u or u Aôndo mough pepe, due yô, nenge, ikumutya man akeke kua anyinya kase gar cii. Tsô wanakiriki na la kaa a na er: Kpei, terem! Sé er nana?" 
2Kings6:16 A gema a kaa a na er: De cie ga; gadia mba ve lu a vese, hemba mba ve lu a ve la iyenge." 
2Kings6:17 Nahan Elisha sôn er: TERE, shi bugh un ashe, a̱ nenge. Tsô TER bugh wanye la ashe; yô, nenge, anyinya kua akeke a usu mgbough sha uwo la, kase Elisha." 
2Kings6:18 Er ve sen her a na yô, Elisha sôn TER, kaa er: Shi pir ior mban ashe. Tsô A pir ve ashe sha imo i Elisha la." 
2Kings6:19 Nahan Elisha kaa a ve er: Ka gbenda ne ga, ka gar shon ne kpaa ga; dondo nen sha a mo, m̱ za a ven hen or u ne keren la. Tsô a za a ve hen Samaria." 
2Kings6:20 Mba nyer ken Samaria yô, Elisha kaa er: TERE, bugh ior mban ashe, ve̱ nenge kera. Tsô TER bugh ve ashe ve nenge kera; yô, ve lu ken Samaria je." 
2Kings6:21 Zum u tor u Iserael nenge a ve yô, a kaa a Elisha er: Terem m̱ wua vee, m̱ wua vee?" 
2Kings6:22 A gema a kaa er: De woo ve ga; mba u ker a kôr, ú wua ve sha sanker wou kua ada wouwe? Ver ve kwaghyan inya kua mngerem, ve̱ ya, ve̱ ma, ve̱ yem hen ter ve." 
2Kings6:23 Tsô a yôr ve iwer kpishi er ve̱ ya shi ve̱ ma yô; a na ve gbenda, ve yem hen ter ve. Nahan akumautya a Shiria shi kera kimbir u van ken tar u Iserael ga." 
2Kings6:24 Tsô ken masejime u kwagh ne yô, Benhada tor u Shiria kohol akumautya na cii, a kôndo a za haa afo a kase Samaria." 
2Kings6:25 Zegejen gba ken Samaria; ve kase un a ityav je, i gema teen ityough ki jaki sha agbenger a azurfa akunduanyiin man akôngo a mkungu a a kom môm sha unyiin u ikaren i kab, sha agbenger a azurfa ataan." 
2Kings6:26 Tsô er tor gba karen sha gir u gar yô, kwase ugen va genger imo yila un kaa er: Wasem, terem tor!" 
2Kings6:27 Nahan a kaa er: Aluer TER Una wase u ga yô, ka sha hanma gbenda mo me wase we? Ka hen vande u gbiren alakema, shin shin ihungwa i shoghol atam a waina?" 
2Kings6:28 Tor pine un er: Ka nyi i tser uwe? A kaa er: Kwase ne kaa a mo er: Na wan wou sé ya un nyian, kper sé ya di wan wam." 
2Kings6:29 Nahan se jiidi wan wam, se ya; kper nan, m kaa a na mer: Na ase wan wou sé ya di, kpa a gema a yer wan na." 
2Kings6:30 Tsô, zum u tor ungwa kwaghôron u kwase la yô, a ande akondo a na, lu karen sha gilgar; nahan ior nenge er a te ikondo uya yô." 
2Kings6:31 Tsô a kaa er: Aôndo A̱ er a mo nahan shi i̱ seer nahan kpaa, aluer á de ityough ki Elisha wan u Shafati sha a na nyian yô." 
2Kings6:32 Yô, Elisha tema ken iyou na, mbatamen lu a na imôngo; tor tindi or hemen, kpa er ortyom la lu a ar ga je tsô, a kaa a mbatamen mbala er: Ne nenge, er wan u orwuanor la, a tindi or er nana̱ va gberem ityough kpa? Nenge, zum u ortyom la una va ar yô, wuhe nen hunda, kighir nen hunda gbong gbong; acin a ter na nga van un ijime gaa?" 
2Kings6:33 Er lu ôron kwagh ave la je tsô, nenge, ortyom la va sôôn her a na. Tsô tor kaa er: Nenge ican ne ka hen TER i dugh ye, ka nyi man shi me kegh TERE?" 
2Kings7:1 Tsô Elisha kaa er: Ungwa nen imo i TER! TER ngu kaan nahan er: Kper hen shighe ne nahan á tee ikaren i mwem ma kengese sha gbenger shekel, man ikaren i shair uhar sha gbenger shekel, hen hunda u Samaria." 
2Kings7:2 Kpa orhemen, u tor suur sha uwegh nagh la, gema kaa a or u Aôndo er: Nenge, shin TER Una bugh a-an Sha je yô, kwagh ne una er nahana? A kaa er: Ú nenge sha ashe ou je, kpa ú ya ga." 
2Kings7:3 Yô, ior mba amandev unyiin lu hen ape nyôron sha hundagar, ve kaa ayol a ve er: Ka nyi se gbe teman heen zan zan sé va kpe nahana?" 
2Kings7:4 Aluer se kaa ser, sé za nyôr hen gar, kpa nenge ijen ngi ken gar, nahan sé kpe ker; man aluer se gba teman heen, kpa sé kpe. Yô, va nen, sé za nyôr nen ken akumautya a Mbashiria; aluer vea de se uma yô, sé lu di uma je ve, man aluer vea wua se kpaa, sé kpe kera tsô." 
2Kings7:5 Nahan ve mough aôndoaimegh je ve yem hen afo a Mbashiria la; er ve va ar hen akôngoafogh a Mbashiria yô, nenge, ma or lu her ga." 
2Kings7:6 Gadia TER er akumautya a Mbashiria ve ungwa ihuran i akeke man i anyinya, lu ihuran i zegeikumutya; nahan ve kaa ayol a ve er: Nenge, tor u Iserael za na utor mba Mbahiti kua utor mba Mbaigipiti tôndo er ve̱ va, ve̱ va nôngo ityav a vese." 
2Kings7:7 Nahan ve mough aôndoaimegh, ve yevese ve undu utenti vev man anyinya ve man ujaki vev kua afo cii, ve yevese sha u vea war uma ve." 
2Kings7:8 Er mbaamandev mbala za ar hen akôngoafogh yô, ve nyôr ken tenti môm, ve ya kwagh, ve ma kwagh, ve kura azurfa man zenaria kua akondo keregh ve za yer; tsô shi ve hide ve za nyôr ken tenti ugen, ve tôô akaa kimi ve za yer." 
2Kings7:9 Nahan ve gema ve kaa ayol a ve er: Se er sha mi ga; nyian ka iyange i loho u doon je, man se gema se huan; aluer sé ngôôr zan zan sev á av yô, ibo ia kôr se; yô, va sé za nen, sé za kaa nen ior mba hen ya u tor." 
2Kings7:10 Tsô ve va yila mbakuranhundagar, ve ôr ve, ve kaa er: Se va hen afo a Mbashiria, yô, or ngu her ga, imo i or tsô kpaa ga, saa anyinya a i zer a kua ujaki kpaa, man utenti lu her nahan." 
2Kings7:11 Nahan mbakuranhunda genger imo, gema kaa ior mba hen ya u tor." 
2Kings7:12 Tsô tor mough tugh, kaa a mbayev nav er: De, me ôr ne kwagh u Mbashiria ve er a vese yô. Ve fa ijen kôr se, nahan ve due ken afo kera, ve za yer ken toho; mba kaan er: Zum u vea due ken gar yô, sé kôr ve uma, sé nyôr ken gar." 
2Kings7:13 Kpa wanakiriki na ugen gema kaa er: Shi de mbagenev ve̱ kôr anyinya ataan a a shi her ken gar ne; nenge, ve mba er ikpelaior i Iserael i i shi her ne nahan; nenge, ve mba er ikpelaior i Iserael i i saa la, sé tindi ve, sé nenge." 
2Kings7:14 Tsô ve tôô akeke ahar a anyinya; tor tindi er i̱ zenda akumautya a Mbashiria ijime; a kaa er: Za, za nenge nen." 
2Kings7:15 Ve zenda ve ijime zan zan hen Yordan; yô, akondo ngee sha gbenda cii, kua ikav mbi Mbashiria ve haa kera sha ci u ve lu yevese fefa yum la. Nahan mbatyomov mbala hide, ve kaa tor nahan." 
2Kings7:16 Tsô ior due, ve za ya ishar hen afo a Mbashiria. Nahan i tee mwem ma kengese ikaren môm sha gbenger shekel, man shair uikaren mba uhar sha gbenger shekel, sha imo i TER kaa la." 
2Kings7:17 Tor ver orhemen, u tor suur sha uwegh nagh la, er a̱ kuran hunda, nahan ikpelaior ndyar un sha hunda a kpe, sha imo i or u Aôndo kaa zum u tor sen hen a na la." 
2Kings7:18 Gadia er or u Aôndo kaa tor er: Á tee shair uikaren mba uhar sha gbenger shekel, man mwem ma kengese ikaren môm sha gbenger shekel, kape kper shighe ne nahan á lu hen hunda u Samaria la," 
2Kings7:19 orhemen la, gema kaa a or u Aôndo er: Yô, aluer TER Una bugh a-an Sha je yô, kwagh ne una er nahana? Un gema kaa er: Ú nenge sha ashe a ou je kpa ú ya ga;" 
2Kings7:20 kape kwagh er un la; ior ndyar un hen hunda je, maa a kpe." 
2Kings8:1 Yô, Elisha ôr kwagh a kwase, u un hire wan na a uma her la, a kaa er: Mough, yem, we a ior mba hen ya wou, gba za teman shir henpe i doo u pe za teman tsô; gadia TER yila ijen er i̱ gba; ia gba hen tar ne anyom ataankarahar je." 
2Kings8:2 Tsô kwase la mough, er sha imo i or u Aôndo la, a yem a ior mba hen ya na, a za tema shir ken tar u Mbafiliti, anyom ataankarahar." 
2Kings8:3 Tsô anyom ataankarahar la nga been yô, kwase la mough hen tar u Mbafiliti hide; nahan a due a za vaa a tor sha ci u ya na kua sule na." 
2Kings8:4 Yô, tor lu ôron kwagh a Gehashi, wanakiriki u or u Aôndo, lu kaan er: Shi ôrom uzegembaakaav mba Elisha a er la cii." 
2Kings8:5 Tsô ngur ôron tor er lu nder orkpen yô, nenge, kwase u a nder wan la va, lu va vaan a tor sha ci u ya na kua sule na. Tsô Gehashi kaa er: Terem tor, ka kwase shon je ne, man shi ka wan shon je ne, u Elisha nder un ne." 
2Kings8:6 Nahan tor pine kwase la, a ôr un. Tsô tor na un or u nengen sha ya na, kaa er: Hide un a akaa a a lu a na cii, kua iyiagh ki hen sule na cii, hii sha iyange i a undu tar ne zan zan nyian." 
2Kings8:7 Tsô Elisha va hen Damaseku; yô, Benhada tor u Shiria gba angev; nahan i kaa un er: Or u Aôndo va heen." 
2Kings8:8 Tsô tor kaa a Hasael er: Tôô iwua, yem za kohol or u Aôndo la, pine un imo i TER, pine wer: Me war angev mbun je kpa?" 
2Kings8:9 Nahan Hasael za kohol un a iwua sha ikev, lu hanma kwagh u injaa u ken Damaseku cii, ikav mbila kuma urakumi akunduahar; a va a va tile sha ishigh nagh, a kaa er: Wan wou Benhada tor u Shiria tindim her a we, ngu pinen er: Me war angev mbun je kpa?" 
2Kings8:10 Elisha kaa a na er: Hide, za kaa un wer, ú war kpee je; nahan kpaa TER tesem er una kpe kpee." 
2Kings8:11 Tsô a bon ashe sha a na bong, zan zan kunya kôr un; nahan or u Aôndo vaa." 
2Kings8:12 Tsô Hasael kaa er: Ka nyi terem a vaa? A gema a kaa er: ka sha ci u m fa kwagh u bo u ú va er Mbaiserael yô; ú nande ayouautya a ve sha usu, ú wua mbayevikaior vev sha sanker, ú ta mbayev vev mba kiriki inya ú her ve; kasev vev mba lun iyav kpaa, ú pav ve iyav." 
2Kings8:13 Hasael gema kaa er: Wanakiriki wou ngu nyi je; aniwa tsô, una er zegekwagh ne nahana? Elisha gema kaa er: TER tesem er ú hingir tor u Shiria." 
2Kings8:14 Tsô a mough hen Elisha a hide hen ter na; a pine un er: Elisha kaa u nana? A gema a kaa er: A kaam er, mimi je, ú war angev mbun." 
2Kings8:15 Tsô kper nan yô, a tôô ikondo i gambe a mir shin mnger, a cir un sha ishi, maa a kpe; Hasael maa tema tor sha ityough nagh." 
2Kings8:16 Sha inyom i sha utaan i Yoram wan u Ahaba tor u Iserael, er Yehoshafati lu tor u Yuda la, Yehoram wan u Yehoshafati ya tor." 
2Kings8:17 Anyom a na lu ikundugber kar ahar zum u a ya tor la; a tema tor anyom anigheni ken Yerusalem. 
2Kings8:18 A lu zan sha gbenda u utor mba Iserael er ya u Ahaba er nahan; gadia kwase na lu wan u Ahaba; a er ifer sha ishigh ki TER. 
2Kings8:19 Nahan kpaa TER rumun u timin Yuda ga, sha ci u wanakiriki Na Davidi, gadia A tôndo zwa a na er Una na un imenger sha ci u ônov nav gbem." 
2Kings8:20 Sha ayange na la, Edom due sha ikev i Yuda kera, ve gema ve ver tor ve ayol a ve." 
2Kings8:21 Nahan Yoram per za hen Sair a akeke na a utya cii; tsô a mough tugh, a hemba Mbaedom mba ve kase un kua mbahemenev mba akekeautya la; nahan ior yevese hide hen utenti vev." 
2Kings8:22 Kape Edom hendan due sha ikev i Yuda kera zan zan nyian ne. Hen shighe la Libena kpaa hendan. 
2Kings8:23 Aerenakaa a Yoram agen man akaa a a er cii yô, i nger a ken ruamabera u abaver a utor mba Yuda la gaa?" 
2Kings8:24 Tsô Yoram yav a uter nav imôngo, i ii un a uter nav imôngo, ken gar u Davidi; wan na Ahashia gema tema tor sha ityough nagh." 
2Kings8:25 Sha inyom i sha pue kar uhar i Yoram, wan u Ahaba, tor u Iserael la, Ahashia wan u Yehoram tor u Yuda, ya tor." 
2Kings8:26 Ahashia lu anyom ikundu kar ahar zum u a ya tor la; a lu tor inyom i môm ken Yerusalem. Iti i ngô na er Atalia wan u Omri tor u Iserael. 
2Kings8:27 A za sha gbenda u ya u Ahaba, a er ifer sha ishigh ki TER, er ya u Ahaba lu er nahan; gadia un lu wankem hen ya u Ahaba je." 
2Kings8:28 A za vea Yoram wan u Ahaba imôngo sha u za nôngon ityav a Hasael tor u Shiria hen Ramoti-gileadi; kpa Mbashiria vihi Yoram iyol. 
2Kings8:29 Nahan tor Yoram hire hen Yesereel sha u za sôron avav a Mbashiria gber un hen Rama zum u a lu nôngon ityav a Hasael tor u Shiria la; Ahashia, wan u Yehoram, tor u Yuda va er una nenge Yoram wan u Ahaba hen Yesereel, gadia lu uange." 
2Kings9:1 Tsô profeti Elisha yila wanyeprofeti ugen, a kaa a na er: Fiir ikondo, kôr tumugh ku mkuregh kun sha uwe, za hen Ramoti-gileadi." 
2Kings9:2 Zum u ú za ar ker yô, ker Yehu wan u Yehoshafati wan u Nimshi la; nyôr, kaa un, a̱ mough hen atô u anmgbianev nav kera, za a na ken iyou i ken atô." 
2Kings9:3 Gema tumugh ku mkuregh kun haa un sha ityou, kaa wer: TER ngu kaan nahan er: M shighe u mkurem Mer, tema tor sha Iserael. Yô, bugh hunda, yevese, de timbir ga." 
2Kings9:4 Tsô wanye la, ka wanyeprofeti je la, a za hen Ramoti-gileadi." 
2Kings9:5 Zum u a za ar her yô, mbahemenev mba akumautya la tema lu her; a kaa er: Kwaghôron ngum a we, orhemenegh. Tsô Yehu pine er: Ka hanmô wase? A kaa er: Ka we je, orhemenegh." 
2Kings9:6 Nahan a mough a nyôr ken iyou; tsô a maa a haa un mkurem sha ityou, a kaa a na er: TER, Aôndo u Iserael, ngu kaan nahan er: M shighe u mkurem Mer, tema tor sha ior i TER, ka Iserael je la." 
2Kings9:7 Ú tim ya u teru Ahaba, sha er M̱ or iyev i awambe a mbayev av uprofeti kua awambe a mbayev mba TER cii, sha Yesebel." 
2Kings9:8 Gadia ya u Ahaba cii una tim, Me gber Ahaba hanma wannomso kera, u nan lu ken uikangen man u nan tem enger enger ken Iserael kpaa." 
2Kings9:9 Me gema ya u Ahaba una hingir er ya u Yerobiam wan u Nebati yô, man shi er ya u Baasha wan u Ahiya nahan." 
2Kings9:10 Iwa ia ya Yesebel ken akôngo a Yesereel, ma or á ii un ga. Tsô a bugh hunda a due a yevese." 
2Kings9:11 Nahan Yehu due va hen mbayev mba ter na; ve pine un er: Ka bem kpa? Ka nyi orihundu ne a ve her a we? A kaa a ve er: Ne ayol a en kpaa ne fa inja i or la man kwaghôron na kpaa. 
2Kings9:12 Ve kaa er: Ka aie; shi ôr se. A kaa er: A ôrom kwagh nahan nahan, a kaa er: TER ngu kaan nahan er: M shighe u mkurem Mer, tema tor sha Iserael." 
2Kings9:13 Tsô hanmô ve tôô riga u nan fefa samber un shin angahar sha agbur a unden a mi, nahan ve tôngo korough ve kaa er: Yehu ka tor!" 
2Kings9:14 Nahan Yehu wan u Yehoshafati wan u Nimshi gba keren Yoram a ku. Yô, Yoram lu kuran Ramoti-gileadi, un kua Iserael cii, sha ci u Hasael tor u Shiria;" 
2Kings9:15 kpa tor Yoram hide ken Yesereel sha u va sôron avav a na, a Mbashiria gber un zum u a nôngo ityav a Hasael tor u Shiria la. Tsô Yehu kaa er: Aluer kwagh ne a lu ishima yen yô, or môm nana̱ de osogh nana̱ dugh ken gar nana̱ de za er kwagh min ken Yesereel ga." 
2Kings9:16 Nahan Yehu henda ikyekye gba zan hen Yesereel; gadia Yoram lu yaven ker; Ahashia tor u Yuda kpaa sen er una va nenge Yoram. 
2Kings9:17 Yô, orkuran tile sha gôgôyou u taven ken Yesereel, a ta ashe a za nenge a ikpelaior i Yehu, lu van. A kaa er: M nenge a ikpelaior. Tsô Yoram kaa er: Tindi ornyinya nana̱ za kohol ve, nana̱ pine er: Ka bem kpa?" 
2Kings9:18 Tsô orgen za sha nyinya, nan za kohol un, nan kaa er: Tor ngu pinen er: Ka bem kpa? Yehu kaa er: Ka nyi i gbe u a beme? Kar lum ken ijime, dondo sha a mo. Tsô orkuran la kaa er: Ortyom la za ar her a ve je, kpa ngu hiden ga." 
2Kings9:19 Nahan a shi a tindi ornyinya u sha uhar; ngula za ar her a ve, a kaa er: Tor ngu pinen er: Ka bem kpa? Yehu gema kaa er: Ka nyi i gbe u a beme? Kar lum ken ijime, dondo sha a mo." 
2Kings9:20 Tsô orkuran la kaa er: A za ar hen a ve je, kpa ngu hiden ga; kpa myevese u ikyekye la ngi er i Yehu wan u Nimshi nahan; gadia ngu yemen sha ihundu je." 
2Kings9:21 Nahan Yoram kaa er: Wa nen ago iyol. Nahan ve sôr un ikyekyeutya na. Tsô Yoram tor u Iserael kua Ahashia tor u Yuda ve due, hanmô ve lu sha ikyekye i nan, ve due u za keghen Yehu gbenda, ve za kohol un hen sule u Naboti or u Yesereel la." 
2Kings9:22 Er Yoram nenge a Yehu yô, a pine er: Yehu ka bem kpa? A gema a kaa er: Ka bem hana, er idya i ngôu Yesebel man akombo a na a ngee yum nahana?" 
2Kings9:23 Tsô Yoram gema fese gba yevese; a kaa a Ahashia er: Ahashia kwagh ne ka num je. 
2Kings9:24 Tsô Yehu henda ada na ta Yoram ivaan hen huwa ijime, ivaan kar kôr ishima, a gba shin ikyekye na." 
2Kings9:25 Yehu gema kaa a Bidekar orhemen u utya na er: Tôô un, gbihi ken sule u Naboti or u Yesereel; gadia umbur, shighe u mo vea we se henda nyinya, se dondo ken ijime i ter na Ahaba la, TER ôr kwagh sha a na er:" 
2Kings9:26 Mimi je, nyen M nenge a awambe a Naboti kua awambe a ônov nav, kape TER kaa la, Me or iyev sha a we hen sule ne, kape TER kaa la. Yô, tôô un ase, gbihi ken sule ne, sha imo i TER kaa la." 
2Kings9:27 Zum u Ahashia tor u Yuda nenge nahan yô, a gba yevese yemen vegher u hen Bete-hagan la. Kpa Yehu zenda un ijime kaa er: Un kpaa, ta nen un shin ikyekye; nahan ve ta un hen ape kôndon sha Gur u a lu hen Ibeleam la. A yevese zan zan a za ar hen Megido, a za kpe her." 
2Kings9:28 Mbayev nav tôô un shin ikyekye, ve yem a mi ken Yerusalem, ve za ii un shin uwar na a uter nav imôngo, hen gar u Davidi." 
2Kings9:29 Sha inyom i sha pue kar môm i Yoram wan u Ahaba la, Ahashia ya tor u Yuda." 
2Kings9:30 Er Yehu va ken Yesereel yô, Yesebel ungwa nahan; nahan a wa tojir sha ashe, shi a kange ityough kpaa, a gbir ashe hen ian i iyoughough." 
2Kings9:31 Yehu nyer hen hunda yô, a kaa er: Ka bem kpa, we Shimeri orwuan teruwe?" 
2Kings9:32 Tsô a kende ashe sha hen ian la, a pine er: Ka an nan te ikaa ken a mo? Ka ana? Tsô mbaerentom ken ya u tor uhar shin utar ve shir ashe ve nenge a na." 
2Kings9:33 A kaa er: Gbihi nen un shin inya. Tsô ve gbihi un shin inya; awambe na tsenda sha kpekpe kua sha anyinya kpaa, tsô a ndyar un shin angahar." 
2Kings9:34 Nyer yô, a za ya kwagh, a ma kwagh; a kaa er: Za nenge nen kwase u lun a ifanyol ne, za ii un, gadia ka wan u tor je." 
2Kings9:35 Kpa er ve za u za iin un yô, ve kohol un ga, saa igbôndotyou man angahar kua akevaveegh tseegh." 
2Kings9:36 Nahan ve hide ve va kaa un. A kaa er: Kwagh ne ka kwaghôron u TER u lu kaa wanakiriki Na Eliya Ortishibi la je ne, er: Ka ken akôngo a gar u Yesereel iwa ia ya inyam i Yesebel ye;" 
2Kings9:37 ikom i Yesebel kpaa ia hingir er ihôghonov mbi ken sule nahan, ken akôngoagar u Yesereel; nahan á kera fatyô u kaan er: Ngun ka Yesebel ne ga." 
2Kings10:1 Ahaba lu a ônov mba nomso akunduatargber ken Samaria. Tsô Yehu nger uwashika, tindi hen Samaria, hen mbatarev mba Yesereel, ka mbatamen je la, man shi hen mba ve koso ônov mba Ahaba la, a kaa er:" 
2Kings10:2 Shighe u washika ne una va nyôron her a ven yô, er ônov mba ter wen ve lu a ven imôngo man ne kpaa ne lu a akekeautya man anyinya man gilgar kua ikav mbi utyav kpaa yô," 
2Kings10:3 tsuwa nen or u hemban doon, man u hemban lun a inja ken ônov mba ter wen, penda nen nan sha ikônough ki torough ki ter wen." 
2Kings10:4 Kpa cier ve iyol kpishi, ve kaa er: Nenge, utor mba uhar mbala kpaa, fatyô u tilen sha ishigh nagh ga, man hire se, sé tile yee?" 
2Kings10:5 Nahan orvesen u nengen sha ya u tor, man shi orvesen u nengen sha gar, man mbatamen kpaa, kua mba ve koson mbayev mbala, ve tindi loho hen Yehu, ve kaa er: Se mba mbayev ou, sé er kwagh u wea kaa se cii; sé ver ma or tor ga; gba eren kwagh u a doo u tsô." 
2Kings10:6 Tsô a nger washika u sha uhar her a ve. A kaa er: Aluer nea ta ken a mo yô, man aluer nea veren ato sha kwaghôron wam kpaa yô, tôô nen ityough mbi ônov mba ter wen la, va nen a mi her a mo, kper hen shighe ne nahan, hen Yesereel. Yô, ônov mba tor, ior akunduatargber, ve lu a mbavesen mba ken gar imôngo, mba ve koson ve la." 
2Kings10:7 Tsô er washika va her a ve yô, ve kôr ônov mba tor mbala ve wua ve, lu ior akunduatargber, ve wa ityouv vev shin akese, ve tindi un a mi ken Yesereel." 
2Kings10:8 Ortyom ugen va, va kaa un er: I va a ityouv mbi ônov mba tor ve. A kaa er: Ver nen mbi atihi ahar henpe nyôron hen hundagar, zan zan sev mbu̱ av." 
2Kings10:9 Tsô sev mbu av yô, a due, a tile, a kaa a ior cii er: Ne mba mbaishôôv je; nenge, ka mo m te num sha terem, m woo un ye; kpa mban cii yô, ka unô ve woo di ve?" 
2Kings10:10 Fa nen, ma kwaghôron u TER, u TER ôr sha ya u Ahaba la, una gba inya ga; gadia TER er kwagh u lu ôr wanakiriki Na Eliya, Eliya gema kaa la." 
2Kings10:11 Tsô Yehu wua mba ve mase shin ken ya u Ahaba ken Yesereel cii, kua mbavesen nav cii, man ahur a na a mimi, kua upristi nav, a shi un ma or je ga." 
2Kings10:12 Nahan a mough a due a za hen Samaria. Er a za ar hen Bete-ekedi u mbakuranilev yô," 
2Kings10:13 Yehu kohol anngôôv mba Ahashia tor u Yuda, a pine ve er: Ka ne unô nee? Ve gema ve kaa a na er: Ka se anngôôv mba Ahashia; se sen ser, sé va sugh ônov mba tor kua ônov mba ngô u tor." 
2Kings10:14 Tsô a kaa er: Kôr nen ve uma. Nahan i kôr ve uma, i wua ve hen ijôr i hen Bete-ekedi la, lu ior akunduahar kar uhar, a de mô ve ga." 
2Kings10:15 Moughon heera kera yô, a kohol Yehonadabi wan u Rekabi, lu van u va keghen un gbenda; a sugh un, a pine un er: Ishima you ngi a mo vough er ishima yam i lu a i you nahan kpa? Yehonadabi gema kaa er: Ngi vough. A kaa er: Aluer a lu nahan yô, zua uwegh a mo. Tsô a zua uwegh a na, a urugh un, a unde a na sha ikyekye na." 
2Kings10:16 A kaa er: Va a mo imôngo, va nenge gbashima wam sha ci u TER. Tsô a gba zenden vea na sha ikyekye." 
2Kings10:17 Va nyer ken Samaria yô, a wua ior mba Ahaba mba ve shi ken Samaria cii zan zan a tim un, sha imo i TER, i A kaa Eliya la." 
2Kings10:18 Nahan Yehu kohol ior cii, a kaa a ve er: Ahaba lu civir Baal yum ga, kpa Yehu yô, una civir un kpishi." 
2Kings10:19 Yô, shi yilam nen uprofeti mba Baal cii, mbacivir un cii kua upristi nav cii; i̱ de undun mô môm ga; gadia m ngu a nagh zegenan u me na Baal yô; hanma or u i nenge a nan heen ga yô, nana̱ kera lu uma ga. Kpa lu ayom Yehu er ye, a wa ishima u timin mbacivir Baal." 
2Kings10:20 Shi Yehu kaa er: Ver nen shighe u icighanmkohol sha ci u Baal. Tsô i yôô un. 
2Kings10:21 Nahan Yehu tindi loho ken Iserael cii; mbacivir Baal cii va, mô ve de van ga, ve nyôr ken iyou i Baal; iyou i Baal kpaa iv, hii ken kpekpe ne je, ar ken ngula." 
2Kings10:22 Tsô a kaa a ornengen sha iyou i akondo la er: Due a akondo sha ci u mbacivir Baal cii. Tsô a due ve a akondo. 
2Kings10:23 Tsô Yehu vea Yehonadabi wan u Rekabi, ve nyôr ken iyou i Baal; a kaa a mbacivir Baal er: Ker nen, jinge nen, ma or u civir TER môm nana̱ de luun a ven ga, saa mba civir Baal tseegh." 
2Kings10:24 Tsô ve nyôr u nan iniav mbi sôngon kua mbi nanden; Yehu vande veren ior akunduanyiin ken won, a kaa a ve er: Aluer ior mba me wa ve sha ikev yen, mô ve môm nana war yô, u nan pase or la, uma u nan una paa uma u or la." 
2Kings10:25 Tsô er i bee nagh ku nanden kera yô, Yehu kaa a mbakuran kua mbahemenev er: Nyôr, wua nen ve; mô ve môm nana̱ de dugh ga. Tsô ve wua ve sha zwa u sanker, mbakuran kua mbahemenev haa ve ken won, maa ve nyôr ken gar u iyou i Baal." 
2Kings10:26 Ve due a mtôm ma ma lu ken iyou i Baal, ve nande ma." 
2Kings10:27 Ve yôhôl ityôgh ki Baal, shi ve yôhôl iyou i Baal kpaa, ve gema i i hingir ahungwa a wanger iyol her zan zan nyian." 
2Kings10:28 Kape Yehu tim Baal ken Iserael kera la. 
2Kings10:29 Kpa asorabo a Yerobiam wan u Nebati, a a ne Iserael a er a la yô, Yehu pav a a ga, ka anibuav mba zenaria mba ve lu ken Betel kua ken Dan la." 
2Kings10:30 Tsô TER kaa a Yehu er: Er u er dedoo, u er kwagh u a lu vough sha ashe Am, u er a ya u Ahaba sha kwagh u a lu ken ishima Yam cii yô, nahan ônov ou vea tema sha ikônough ki torough ki Iserael zan zan ikov inyiin je." 
2Kings10:31 Kpa Yehu wa iko u zan sha atindiakaa a TER, Aôndo u Iserael, a ishima na cii ga, a undu asorabo a Yerobiam a a ne Iserael a er a la ga." 
2Kings10:32 Sha ayange la, TER hii u panden Iserael tar; Hasael hemba ve ken tar u Iserael cii," 
2Kings10:33 hii hen Yordan vegher u sha ityoughkitaregh la, tar u Gileadi cii, Mbagadi man Mbaruben man Mbamanase, hii hen Aroer, u a lu hen kpe u pev u Arnon la, Gileadi kua Bashan kpaa." 
2Kings10:34 Aerenakaa a Yehu agen man akaa a a er cii kua agee na yô, i nger a ken ruamabera u abaver a utor mba Iserael la gaa?" 
2Kings10:35 Tsô Yehu yav a uter nav imôngo, i ii un ken Samaria; Yehoahashi wan na tema tor sha ityough nagh." 
2Kings10:36 Anyom a Yehu tema tor sha Iserael ken Samaria yô, kuma ikundu kar anigheni." 
2Kings11:1 Zum u Atalia ngô u Ahashia nenge er wan na kpe yô, a mough a wua ônov mba tor cii." 
2Kings11:2 Kpa Yehosheba, wan u tor Yoram, anngô u Ahashia u kwase za tôô Yoashi wan u Ahashia myer ken ônov mba tor mba i lu wuan ve la, un vea yese na, a wa ve ken iyou i yaven ker; i yer Atalia un, nahan i wua un ga." 
2Kings11:3 A lu vea na myer ken iyou i TER, anyom ataratar; nahan Atalia tema tor sha tar la." 
2Kings11:4 Sha inyom i sha utaankaruhar la, Yehoyada tindi i yila mbahemenev mba Mbakariti kua mba mbakuran, mba lun a ior sha ikev deri deri, i va a ve her a na ken iyou i TER, a ya ikur a ve, a er ve ve bum ken iyou i TER, nahan a tese ve wan u tor." 
2Kings11:5 A kaa a ve er: Kwagh u né er yô, ka un ne: pav nen nongo wen u u hii yaren tom sha iyange i memen la, akum atar ikum i môm i̱ kuran ya u tor," 
2Kings11:6 ikum igen, i̱ tilen hen hunda u Sur, shi igen hen hunda u u lu ken ijime i mbakuran la; kape né kura ya la." 
2Kings11:7 Iniongo yen ihiar, mba ve mem tom sha iyange i memen la cii, ve̱ kura iyou i TER, ve̱ kase tor." 
2Kings11:8 Kase nen tor, hanma or nana̱ lu a ikav mbi utyav mbi nan sha ikev; hanma or u nana nyôr ken nongo wen yô, i̱ wua nan je; lu nen a tor imôngo zum u una duen man shi una nyôron, kpaa." 
2Kings11:9 Tsô mbahemenev mba ve lu a ior deri deri sha ikev la ve er sha imo i pristi Yehoyada vough, hanmô tôô ior mba nan, mba ve hii yaren tom sha iyange i memen la, kua mba ve mem tom sha iyange i memen la kpaa, tsô ve va hen pristi Yehoyada." 
2Kings11:10 Pristi tôô awange kua iperutya i yan lu i tor Davidi la, i i lu ken iyou i TER la, na mbahemenev mba ve lu a ior deri deri sha ikev la." 
2Kings11:11 Tsô mbakuran mbala tile, hanma or a ikav mbi nan mbi utyav sha uwe, hii iyou vegher u ken iyan zan zan ar iyou vegher u ken imese, sha ishigh ki atse a nanden nagh sha mi kua sha ishigh ki iyou, ve kase tor." 
2Kings11:12 Nahan a due a wan u tor, a cir un idyer i tor, shi a na un Shiada; ve kôr un tor, ve shighe un mkurem sha ityou; ve kure ave, ve kaa er: Tor a̱ tsa sha won!" 
2Kings11:13 Zum u Atalia ungwa ayôôso a mbakuran kua a ior yô, a va hen ior ken iyou i TER;" 
2Kings11:14 jingi yô, a nenge tor tile hen ityô sha ieren ve, man mbahemenev kua mbaikorov tile a tor; ior mba tar la cii, lu ember tôngon ikor. Tsô Atalia ande akondo a na genger imo kaa er: I dughum myer! I dughum myer!" 
2Kings11:15 Kpa pristi Yehoyada kaa mbahemenev mba ve lu a ior deri deri sha ikev mba ve lu sha akumautya la, er: Wa nen un ken atô u iniongo, due nen a na; or u nana za a na ityô yô, i̱ wua nan sha sanker; gadia pristi kaa er: De woo nen un ken iyou i TER ga." 
2Kings11:16 Tsô ve za ave ve kôr un; a kar hen gbenda u i nyer a anyinya mi ken ya u tor la, ka her je i wua un ye." 
2Kings11:17 Tsô Yehoyada er tor kua ior ve̱ ya ikur a TER er vea lu ior mba Aôndo; shi tor kpaa ya ikur a ior nav. 
2Kings11:18 Nahan ior mba tar la cii za hen iyou i Baal, ve za yôhôl i; ve hembe atse na a nanden nagh sha mi kua ieev nav; ve wua Matan pristi u baal, sha ishigh ki atse. Pristi gema ver mbakuran iyou i TER." 
2Kings11:19 Shi a tôô mbahemenev mba ve lu a ior deri deri sha ikev la man Mbakariti man mbakuran kua ior mba tar la cii, ve due a tor, ve sen ve kar sha hunda u mbakuran ve za ar hen iyou i tor. Tsô a za tema sha ikônough ki torough." 
2Kings11:20 Nahan ior mba tar la cii, ember, bem gba ken gar, Atalia yô, ve wua un sha sanker hen ya u tor." 
2Kings11:21 Zum u Yoashi ya tor la, a lu anyom ataankarahar." 
2Kings12:1 Ka sha inyom i sha utaankaruhar i Yehu la, Yoashi ya tor ye; a tema tor anyom akunduahar ken Yerusalem; iti i ngô na er, Shibia u ken Bersheba." 
2Kings12:2 Yoashi eren kwagh u dedoo sha ishigh ki TER sha ayange a na cii, a pristi Yehoyada lu tesen un la." 
2Kings12:3 Kpa ajiir a taven sha yô, i vihi a kera ga, ior shi lu nan nagh her, shi ve lu nanden kwaghhumandoon sha ajiir a taven sha la." 
2Kings12:4 Tsô Yoashi kaa a upristi er: Hanma inyaregh ki i ne icighannagh a mi cii, ki i ve a mi ken iyou i TER la, ka inyaregh ki i eren kasua a min la, inyaregh ki i we hanma or er nana̱ kimbin yô, man inyaregh ki hanma or nan ve a mi cii ken iyou i TER sha ishima i nan yô," 
2Kings12:5 upristi ve̱ ngohol ki, hanmô hen ior mba nan, nahan ve̱ sôr iyou sha ajiir a i vihi yô, hanma ijiir i i vihi cii." 
2Kings12:6 Kpa er sha inyom i sha ikundu kar atar i Yoashi la, upristi lu a sôr ajiir a vihin sha iyou la ga yô," 
2Kings12:7 tor Yoashi yila pristi Yehoyada kua upristi mbagenev, a kaa a ve er: Ka nyi ne ser iyou sha ajiir a i vihi la ga? Hegen yô, de kera shi seer ngohol nen inyaregh hen ior enev ga, kpa ver nen ki sha ci u ajiir a vihin sha iyou ne." 
2Kings12:8 Tsô upristi rumun er vea kera ngohol inyaregh hen ior ga, man ajiir a vihin a sha iyou la kpaa vea kera sôr ga." 
2Kings12:9 Nahan pristi Yehoyada tôô akwati pev un ihura sha kughur na, ver un hen kpe u atse a nanden nagh sha mi, vegher u ken iyan, henpe nyôron ken iyou i TER la; upristi mba kuran hunda haa inyaregh ki i ve a mi ken iyou i TER la cii kimi." 
2Kings12:10 Tsô zum u ve nenge er inyaregh ki ngee ken akwati yô, nahan orngeren u tor kua pristi u tamen, ve kôndo ve za kohol ki, ve kange, ve za ôr inyaregh ki ve zough a mi ken iyou i TER." 
2Kings12:11 Tsô ve na inyaregh ki ve kar myohom ma ki la, sha ikev i mbaerentom mba ve nengen sha iyou i TER la; ve kimbi mbagbanakaa kua mbamaankwagh mba ve lu eren tom sha iyou i TER," 
2Kings12:12 man mbamaan sha akam, man mbakuanawen, man sha ci u yamen ikpande man awen a kuan sha u sôron iyou i TER sha ajiir a i vihi yô, man shi sha ci u hanma kwagh u i gbe u kimbin sha ci u sôron iyou la yô." 
2Kings12:13 Kpa inyaregh ki i va a mi ken iyou i TER la yô, i er ayongo a azurfa a mi ga, shin akambe a sôron amenger a mi kpaa ga, shin utasa ga, shin ikor i tôngon kpaa ga, shin ma ikav mbi zenaria shin ikav mbi azurfa sha ci u iyou i TER kpaa ga;" 
2Kings12:14 kpa ve gema ki ve na mbaerentom er ve̱ sôr iyou i TER a mi. 
2Kings12:15 Inyaregh ki ve na ior sha ci u ve̱ kimbi mbatomov yô, ve kera pine ve kwagh u ve er a mi ga; sha ci u ve lu eren kwagh ve sha mimi yô." 
2Kings12:16 Kpa inyaregh ki iniav mbi iboov man inyaregh ki iniav mbi isholibo, i va a mi ken iyou i TER ga; ki lu sha ci u upristi." 
2Kings12:17 Tsô Hasael tor u Shiria kôndo za nôngo ityav a Gati ngohol un je; nahan Hasael gema ver ishigh u zan ken Yerusalem. 
2Kings12:18 Tsô Yoashi tor u Yuda kura uicighanmbaakaav mba Yehoshafati man Yehoram man Ahashia, uter nav, utor mba Yuda lu tsegha la, kua uicighanmbaakaav nav cii, kua zenaria mba i zua a mi ken ayou a koson akaa ker, a iyou i TER, kua a iyou i tor kpaa, a gema a tindi Hasael tor u Shiria a mi; tsô a mough hen Yerusalem a yem." 
2Kings12:19 Aerenakaa a Yoashi agen man akaa a a er cii yô, i nger a ken ruamabera u abaver a utor mba Yuda la gaa?" 
2Kings12:20 Tsô mbatomov mba Yoashi zua zwa, wua un hen iyou i Milo sha gbenda u zan Shila la." 
2Kings12:21 Yosakar wan u Shimeati man Yehoshabadi wan u Shomer, mbatomov nav, wua un, i ii un a uter nav imôngo ken gar u Davidi; wan na Amashia tema tor sha ityough nagh." 
2Kings13:1 Tsô sha inyom i sha ikundu kar atar i Yoashi wan u Ahashia, tor u Yuda la, Yehoahashi wan u Yehu ya tor sha Iserael ken Samaria, a tsa tor anyom pue kar ataankarahar." 
2Kings13:2 A er ifer sha ishigh ki TER; a eren asorabo a Yerobiam wan u Nebati, a a ne Iserael a er a la, a undu a ga." 
2Kings13:3 Nahan ishima vihi TER a Iserael tsung, A na ve sha ikev i Hasael tor u Shiria, man sha ikev i Benhada wan u Hasael, ve lu sha ikev ve gbem." 
2Kings13:4 Kpa Yehoahashi zamber a TER, nahan TER ungwa imo na, gadia A nenge ican i Iserael i tor u Shiria lu eren ve yô." 
2Kings13:5 (Tsô TER na Iserael oryiman, ve due sha ikev i Mbashiria kera, nahan Mbaiserael tema ken utenti vev er tsuaa nahan." 
2Kings13:6 Nahan kpaa ve undu asorabo a ya u Yerobiam, a a ne Iserael a er a la ga, ve zenden sha mi; Ashera kpaa lu ken Samaria her.)" 
2Kings13:7 A undu Yehoahashi a ior je ga, saa mbaanyinyav akunduahargber tseegh man akekeautya pue kua mbazanangahar dubu pue; gadia tor u Shiria tim ve, gema ve, ve hingir er vuulevu u ndyaren angahar mi yô." 
2Kings13:8 Aerenakaa a Yehoahashi agen man akaa a a er cii, kua agee na yô, i nger a ken ruamabera u abaver a utor mba Iserael la gaa?" 
2Kings13:9 Tsô Yehoahashi yav a uter nav imôngo, i ii un ken Samaria; wan na Yoashi gema tema tor sha ityough nagh." 
2Kings13:10 Sha inyom i sha ikundugber kar utaankaruhar i Yoashi tor u Yuda la, Yoashi wan u Yehoahashi ya tor ken Samaria sha Iserael; a tema tor anyom pue kar ataratar." 
2Kings13:11 A er ifer sha ishigh ki TER, a undu asorabo a Yerobiam wan u Nebati, a a ne Iserael a er a la ga, a zenden ken a." 
2Kings13:12 Aerenakaa a Yoashi agen man akaa a a er cii kua agee na a a lu nôngon ityav a Amashia tor u Yuda la, i nger a ken ruamabera u abaver a utor mba Iserael la gaa?" 
2Kings13:13 Tsô Yoashi yav a uter nav imôngo; nahan Yerobiam tema sha ikônough ki torough nagh; i ii Yoashi ken Samaria a utor mba Iserael imôngo. 
2Kings13:14 Tsô zum u Elisha gba angev mbu una kpe yô, Yoashi tor u Iserael va her a na gba va vaan un kaan er: Tereme, tereme, akeke a Iserael kua mbaanyinyav nav kpaa!" 
2Kings13:15 Nahan Elisha kaa a na er: Tôô ada kua avaan; tsô a tôô ada kua avaan. 
2Kings13:16 A kaa a tor u Iserael er: Penda uwegh ough sha ada; tsô a penda uwegh nagh sha ada. Elisha kpaa penda ave na sha ave a tor. 
2Kings13:17 Nahan a kaa er: Bugh ian i sha vegher u sha ityoughkitaregh la, tsô a bugh i. Elisha kaa er: Ker! Tsô a ker. A kaa er: Ivaan i TER i hemban; ka ivaan i hemban Shiria je la; ú va hemba Mbashiria hen Afeki je." 
2Kings13:18 Shi A kaa er: Tôô avaan; tsô a tôô a. A kaa a tor u Iserael er: Gbidye a inya; a gbidye kwa tar, tsô a de." 
2Kings13:19 Nahan ishima vihi or u Aôndo a na, a kaa er: Ma u gbidye kwa taan shin kwa taratar nahan, yô, ma u hembe Shiria purututu; kpa hegen yô, ka di kwa tar tsô ú hemba Shiria ye." 
2Kings13:20 Tsô Elisha maa kpe, ve ii un. Inyom i he hiin yô, akum a Mbamoabi nyôr ken tar la." 
2Kings13:21 Tsô mba ngur iin orgen yô, ve ta ashe ve za nenge ikumutya, nahan ve gbihi orkpen la shin uwar u Elisha; er orkpen la za bende a akuhe a Elisha yô, a nder, a tile sha, sha angahar a na." 
2Kings13:22 Hasael tor u Shiria er Iserael ican sha ayange a Yehoahashi la cii. 
2Kings13:23 Kpa TER er a ve dedoo, zungwe ve mhôônom, A umbur ve sha ci u ikuryan Na i A ya a Aberaham man Isaka kua Yakob la, nahan A rumun u timin ve ga, man shi lu a ta ve kera sha ishigh Nagh ga, zan zan hegen." 
2Kings13:24 Tsô Hasael tor u Shiria kpe, wan na Benhada gema tema tor sha ityough nagh." 
2Kings13:25 Yoashi wan u Yehoahashi shi ngohol Benhada wan u Hasael agar a yan ngohol hen ter na Yehoahashi sha utya la. Yoashi hemba un kwa tar, nahan a ngohol agar a Iserael la." 
2Kings14:1 Sha inyom i sha uhar i Yoashi, wan u Yehoahashi, tor u Iserael la, Amashia, wan u Yoashi, tor u Yuda ya tor." 
2Kings14:2 A lu anyom ikundu kar ataan zum u a ya tor la; a tsa tor anyom ikundu kar ataankaranyiin ken Yerusalem, iti i ngô na er, Yehoadan u Yerusalem." 
2Kings14:3 A eren kwagh u dedoo sha ishigh ki TER, kpa a ar sha ter na Davidi ga; a er kwagh u ter na Yoashi lu er la cii." 
2Kings14:4 Nahan kpaa i vihi ajiir a taven sha la ga; ior lu nan nagh shi lu nanden kwaghhumandoon sha ajiir a taven sha la her. 
2Kings14:5 Tsô zum u tor taver sha uwegh nagh yô, a wua mbatomov nav mba ve wua tor u a lu ter na la," 
2Kings14:6 kpa a wua ônov mba mbawuanior mbala ga; er i nger ken ruamabera u atindigh u Mose nahan, er TER kaa yô, er: De woo uter sha ci u ônov vev ga, man shi de woo ônov sha ci u uter vev ga; kpa hanma or nana̱ kpe sha ci u kwaghbo u nan iyol i nan." 
2Kings14:7 A wua ior mba Edom dubu pue shin Pev u Bar, a hemba Sela ityav, a maa a ii un iti er Yoketeel, zan zan nyian." 
2Kings14:8 Tsô Amashia tindi mbatyomov hen Yoashi, wan u Yehoahashi, wan u Yehu, tor u Iserael, akaa er: Va, sé zua ishigh ayol a ase." 
2Kings14:9 Kpa Yoashi tor u Iserael tindi loho hen Amashia tor u Yuda a kaa er: Saa u sha Lebanon tindi loho hen Sedar u sha Lebanon a kaa er: Na wan wam, wan wou u kwase a̱ er: kpa ishôso i sha Lebanon va kar ndyar saa la." 
2Kings14:10 Mimi je, u hemba Edom, nahan ishima you ngi hagher; yô gba manger sha kwagh la tsô, tema hen ya gir gir, inja na nan man ú kumbur ú ve a kwaghbo sha iyol you, ú va gba kua Yuda imôngo?" 
2Kings14:11 Kpa Amashia wa iko ga. Tsô Yoashi tor u Iserael kôndo, nahan un vea Amashia tor u Yuda, ve za zua ishigh ayol a ve hen Bete-shemeshi u Yuda." 
2Kings14:12 Tsô kwagh hemba Yuda sha ishigh ki Iserael; hanma or yevese hide hen tenti u nan. 
2Kings14:13 Yoashi tor u Iserael kôr Amashia tor u Yuda, wan u Yoashi, wan u Ahashia, hen Bete-shemeshi, kar va ken Yerusalem, va hembe gilgar u Yerusalem, hii hen Hundagar u Eferaim zan zan ar hen Hundagar u Zongo, ka aseva deri unyiin je la." 
2Kings14:14 Shi a kura zenaria man azurfa cii kua ikav mbi i zua a mi ken iyou i TER cii, kua ken ayou a koson akaa ker a iyou i tor, kua mbakwarev kpaa, tsô a hide hen Samaria." 
2Kings14:15 Aerenakaa a Yoashi agen a a er, man agee na kua ityav mbi a nôngo a Amashia tor u Yuda yô, i nger a ken ruamabera u abaver a utor mba Iserael la gaa?" 
2Kings14:16 Tsô Yoashi yav a uter nav imôngo, i ii un ken Samaria a utor mba Iserael imôngo; wan na Yerobiam gema tema tor sha ityough nagh." 
2Kings14:17 Kpa Amashia, wan u Yoashi, tor u Yuda shi tsa anyom pue kar ataan shighe u Yoashi, wan u Yehoahashi, tor u Iserael kpe kera la." 
2Kings14:18 Aerenakaa a Amashia agen yô, i nger a ken ruamabera u abaver a utor mba Yuda la gaa?" 
2Kings14:19 I zua zwa sha a na ken Yerusalem, nahan a yevese a za hen Lakishi; kpa ve tindi i tôv un angahar zan zan hen Lakishi, ve za wua un ker." 
2Kings14:20 Tsô i va a na sha anyinya, i va ii un a uter nav imôngo ken Yerusalem ken gar u Davidi." 
2Kings14:21 Nahan ior mba Yuda cii tôô Asaria, u a lu anyom pue kar ataratar, ve ver un tor sha ityough ki ter na Amashia." 
2Kings14:22 Ka un je a maa Elati a hide a mi hen Yuda ye, ken ijime i tor yav kera a uter nav imôngo la." 
2Kings14:23 Sha inyom i sha pue kar utaan i Amashia wan u Yoashi tor u Yuda la, Yerobiam wan u Yoashi tor u Iserael ya tor ken Samaria; a tema tor anyom akunduahar kar môm." 
2Kings14:24 A er ifer sha ishigh ki TER; a undu asorabo a Yerobiam wan u Nebati, a a ne Iserael a er a la ga." 
2Kings14:25 Ka un a hide a tar u Iserael, hii hen gbenda u karen zan Hamati zan zan za ar hen zegemnger u Araba la, sha imo i TER, Aôndo u Iserael, i A kaa, wanakiriki Na Yona wan u Amitai, profeti u ken Gati-hefer, a gema ôr i la." 
2Kings14:26 Gadia TER nenge ican i Iserael er i vihi yum yô; gadia ma or u nan lu ken uikangen shin u nan tem enger enger kpaa, u wasen Iserael nan lu je ga." 
2Kings14:27 Man TER kaa er Una ese iti i Iserael sha won kera ga; nahan A yima ve sha uwegh ku Yerobiam wan u Yoashi. 
2Kings14:28 Aerenakaa a Yerobiam agen man akaa a a er cii kua agee na man ityav mbi a nôngo man er a hide a Damaseku kua Hamati, mba ve lu mba Yuda tsuaa la, hen Iserael yô, i nger a ken ruamabera u abaver a utor mba Yuda la gaa?" 
2Kings14:29 Tsô Yerobiam yav a uter nav imôngo, ka utor mba Iserael je la; wan na Sekaria ya tor sha ityough nagh." 
2Kings15:1 Sha inyom i sha ikundu kar utaankaruhar i Yerobiam tor u Iserael la, Asaria wan u Amashia tor u Yuda ya tor;" 
2Kings15:2 a lu anyom pue kar ataratar zum u a ya tor la; a tema tor anyom akunduahargber kar ahar ken Yerusalem; iti i ngô na er Yekolia u hen Yerusalem. 
2Kings15:3 A er kwagh u dedoo sha ishigh ki TER er ter na Amashia er nahan cii. 
2Kings15:4 Kpa ajiir a taven sha yô, i vihi a kera ga; ior lu nan nagh shi lu nanden kwaghhumandoon sha ajiir a taven sha la her." 
2Kings15:5 TER haa tor la imande, zan zan kar kpen a mi; a za lu ken iyou igen kposo. Nahan Yotam wan u tor gema lu nengen sha ya u tor, lu ôron ior mba tar la ajir." 
2Kings15:6 Aerenakaa agen a Asaria man akaa a a er cii yô, i nger a ken ruamabera u abaver a utor mba Yuda la gaa?" 
2Kings15:7 Tsô Asaria yav a uter nav imôngo, i ii un a uter nav imôngo ken gar u Davidi; wan na Yotam gema tema tor sha ityough nagh." 
2Kings15:8 Sha inyom i sha ikundugber kar anigheni i Asaria tor u Yuda la, Sekaria wan u Yerobiam ya tor u Iserael ken Samaria, iwer ataratar." 
2Kings15:9 A er ifer sha ishigh ki TER, er uter nav lu er nahan; a undu asorabo a Yerobiam wan u Nebati a a ne Iserael a er a la ga." 
2Kings15:10 Tsô Shalum wan u Yabeshi zua zwa a ior, ta num sha a na sha ishigh ki iorov, wua un, gema tema tor sha ityough nagh." 
2Kings15:11 Aerenakaa agen a Sekaria er yô, nenge, i nger a ken ruamabera u abaver a utor mba Iserael la." 
2Kings15:12 Ka imo i TER lu ôr Yehu je la, er: Ônov ou vea tema sha ikônough ki torough ki Iserael zan zan ikov inyiin. Lu di nahan je." 
2Kings15:13 Shalum wan u Yabeshi ya tor sha inyom i sha ikundugber kar utaankarunyiin i Ushia tor u Yuda la; a tema tor ken Samaria uwer môm. 
2Kings15:14 Tsô Menahem wan u Gadi mough ken Tirsa va ken Samaria, va ta num sha Shalum wan u Yabeshi ken Samaria, wua un, gema tema tor sha ityough nagh." 
2Kings15:15 Aerenakaa a Shalum agen man er a zua zwa a ior la, nenge i nger a ken ruamabera u abaver a utor mba Iserael la." 
2Kings15:16 Tsô Menahem ta num sha Tifesa hemba un kua mba ve lu ker cii, kua iningirtar na cii, hii hen Tirsa je; sha ci u ve bugh un hunda ga yô, ka nahan man a ta num sha ve ye; kasev mba uyaav mba ve lu ker cii a pav ve mbu." 
2Kings15:17 Sha inyom i ikundugber kar utaankarunyiin i Asaria tor u Yuda la, Menahem wan u Gadi ya tor sha Iserael, a tema tor ken Samaria, anyom pue." 
2Kings15:18 A er ifer sha ishigh ki TER; sha ayange a uma na cii, a undu asorabo a Yerobiam wan u Nebati, a a ne Iserael a er a la ga." 
2Kings15:19 Pul tor u Ashiria va ityav hen tar la; nahan Menahem na Pul azurfa utalenti dubu, sha er uwegh nagh ku̱ lu a na imôngo sha u taver tor sha ikev na yô." 
2Kings15:20 Menahem ngohol inyaregh kila hen Iserael hen mbanyarev cii, hen hanma or azurfa ushekel akunduahargber, sha ci u nan tor u Ashiria. Nahan tor u Ashiria mough hide, kera lu ken tar la ga." 
2Kings15:21 Aerenakaa a Menahem agen man akaa a a er cii yô, i nger a ken ruamabera u abaver a utor mba Iserael la gaa?" 
2Kings15:22 Tsô Menahem yav a uter nav imôngo; wan na Pekahia gema tema tor sha ityough nagh. 
2Kings15:23 Sha inyom i sha akunduahargber i Asaria tor u Yuda la, Pekahia wan u Menahem ya tor sha Iserael ken Samaria, tsa tor anyom ahar." 
2Kings15:24 A er ifer sha ishigh ki TER; a undu asorabo a Yerobiam wan u Nebati, a a ne Iserael a er a la ga." 
2Kings15:25 Peka, wan u Remalia, orhementyav na, zua zwa a ior, ta num sha a na, wua un kua Argobi man Arie ken Samaria ken iyouutya i hen ya u tor; ior akunduahargber mba Mbagileadi lu a na imôngo; a wua un, a tema tor sha ityough nagh." 
2Kings15:26 Aerenakaa a Pekahia agen man akaa a a er cii yô, nenge, i nger a ken ruamabera u abaver a utor mba Iserael la." 
2Kings15:27 Sha inyom i sha akunduahargber kar uhar i Asaria tor u Yuda la, Peka wan u Remalia ya tor sha Iserael ken Samaria, a tema tor anyom ikundu." 
2Kings15:28 A er ifer sha ishigh ki TER; a undu asorabo a Yerobiam wan u Nebati, a a ne Iserael a er a la ga." 
2Kings15:29 Sha ayange a Peka tor u Iserael la, Tigelati-pileser tor u Ashiria va, va ngohol Iyon man Abel-bete-maaka man Yanoa man Kedeshi man Hasor man Gileadi kua Galilia, ka tar u Nafetali cii je la; a kura ve a yem a mi uikangen ken Ashiria." 
2Kings15:30 Hoshea wan u Ela zua zwa a ior sha Peka wan u Remalia la, a ta num sha a na, a wua un, a tema tor sha ityough nagh sha inyom i sha ikundu i Yotam wan u Ushia la." 
2Kings15:31 Aerenakaa a Peka agen man akaa a a er cii yô, nenge, i nger a ken ruamabera u abaver a utor mba Iserael la." 
2Kings15:32 Sha inyom i sha uhar i Peka wan u Remalia tor u Iserael la, Yotam, wan u Ushia tor u Yuda, ya tor." 
2Kings15:33 A lu anyom ikundu kar ataan zum u a ya tor la; a tema tor ken Yerusalem anyom pue kar ataratar; iti i ngô na er Yerusha, wan u Sadoki." 
2Kings15:34 A eren kwagh u dedoo sha ishigh ki TER er ter na Ushia lu eren nahan cii. 
2Kings15:35 Kpa ajiir a taven sha la, a vihi a kera ga; ior shi lu nan nagh man nanden kwaghhumandoon sha ajiir a taven sha la her. Ka un a maa hunda u iyou i TER, u sha." 
2Kings15:36 Aerenakaa a Yotam agen man akaa a a er cii yô, i nger a ken ruamabera u abaver a utor mba Yuda la gaa?" 
2Kings15:37 Sha ayange la, TER hii u tindin Reshin tor u Shiria kua Peka wan u Remalia er ve̱ za nôngo ityav a Yuda." 
2Kings15:38 Tsô Yotam yav a uter nav imôngo, i ii un a uter nav imôngo ken gar u ter na Davidi; wan na Ahashi tema tor sha ityough nagh." 
2Kings16:1 Sha inyom i sha pue kar utaankaruhar i Peka wan u Remalia la, Ahashi, wan u Yotam tor u Yuda, ya tor." 
2Kings16:2 Ahashi lu anyom ikundu zum u a ya tor la, a tema tor anyom pue kar ataratar ken Yerusalem; a eren kwagh u dedoo sha ishigh ki TER, Aôndo na, er ter na Davidi nahan ga;" 
2Kings16:3 kpa a zaan sha gbenda u utor mba Iserael, zan zan je yô, a er wan na kar ken atô u usu sha inja i kwaghhôngorough u atôatyev a TER lu zendan a sha ishigh ki Mbaiserael kera la." 
2Kings16:4 Shi a naan nagh, a nanden kwaghhumandoon sha ajiir a taven sha man sha iwo kua shin hanma itinekon i lun a mure." 
2Kings16:5 Tsô Reshin tor u Shiria man Peka, wan u Remalia, tor u Iserael ve va sha u nôngon ityav a Yerusalem; ve kase Ahashi, kpa ve fatyô u hemban un ga." 
2Kings16:6 Hen shighe la, Reshin tor u Shiria shi ngohol Elati hingir ijiir i Shiria, a zenda Mbayuda ken Elati kera; nahan Mbashiria va hen Elati, ve va tema ker zan zan nyian." 
2Kings16:7 Tsô Ahashi tindi mbatyomov za hen Tigelati-pileser tor u Ashiria, kaa er: Mo m ngu wanakiriki wou man wan wou kpaa, yô, va yimam sha ikev i tor u Shiria man sha ikev i tor u Iserael, mba ve mough ityav a mo ne." 
2Kings16:8 Shi Ahashi tôô azurfa kua zenaria mba i zua a mi ken iyou i TER man ken ayou a koson akaa ker a ken ya u tor, a tindi tor u Ashiria a mi iwua." 
2Kings16:9 Tsô tor u Ashiria ungwa imo na; nahan tor u Ashiria kôndo za nôngo ityav a Damaseku, a hemba un je, a kura ior a yem a ve uikangen ken Kir, a wua Reshin." 
2Kings16:10 Tsô tor Ahashi za ken Damaseku, za kegh Tigelati-pileser tor u Ashiria gbenda; er a nenge a atse a nanden nagh sha mi a a lu ken Damaseku la yô, nahan tor Ahashi tindi pristi Uria a foto u atsegh la, kua eev mbu a, sha inja i i er a cii." 
2Kings16:11 Tsô pristi Uria ta atse la, lu vough er a tor Ahashi tindi un a mi ken Damaseku la nahan; kape Uria er, man tor Ahashi mase za hiden ken Damaseku la." 
2Kings16:12 Er tor za hide ken Damaseku yô, tor nenge a atse shon, nahan tor kporom hen atse la, na nagh sha a." 
2Kings16:13 A nande nagh ku nanden kua nagh nagh ku sha samuyia kpaa, a too nagh nagh ku man, shi a haa awambe a iniav nav mbi bem sha atse." 
2Kings16:14 Atse a togula a nanden nagh sha mi a a lu sha ishigh ki TER la, a tôô a sha ishigh ki iyou hen harga u atse a na a iyou i TER kera, a gema a ver a vegher u atse a na u ken imbusutarimese la." 
2Kings16:15 Tsô tor Ahashi kaa a pristi Uria er: Nande nagh ku nanden ku pepegh sha zegeatse nagh ku sha samuyia ku aikighe kpaa, man nagh ku nanden ku tor man nagh nagh ku sha samuyia man shi nagh ku ior mba tor la cii, man nagh vegh ku sha samuyia kua nagh ku man; haa awambe a nagh ku nanden cii sha a, kua awambe a nagh ku sôngon cii kpaa; atse a togula la yô, me mase fan kwagh u me er sha mi yô." 
2Kings16:16 Kape pristi Uria er la, er tor Ahashi kaa un nahan cii." 
2Kings16:17 Shi tor Ahashi tôndo ikpande i ken ambusu i asange la kera, tasa la a tôô un sha abua a togula a a lu shin ityô na la kera, a gema un a penda sha awen." 
2Kings16:18 Man shi gbenda u i saan u sha, sha ci u iyange i memen, u i maa u ken iyou la, kua hunda u tor nyôron min ken won la, a due a mi ken iyou i TER kera sha ci u tor u Ashiria." 
2Kings16:19 Aerenakaa a Ahashi agen a a er yô, i nger a ken ruamabera u abaver a utor mba Yuda la gaa?" 
2Kings16:20 Tsô Ahashi yav a uter nav imôngo, i ii un a uter nav imôngo ken gar u Davidi; wan na Hesekia gema tema tor sha ityough nagh." 
2Kings17:1 Sha inyom i sha pue kar uhar i Ahashia tor u Yuda la, Hoshea wan u Ela ya tor ken Samaria sha Iserael, tsa tor anyom ataankaranyiin." 
2Kings17:2 A eren ifer sha ishigh ki TER, kpa i ar sha utor mba Iserael mba ve vande a na mbala ga." 
2Kings17:3 Shalmaneser tor u Ashiria va nôngo ityav a na; tsô Hoshea gema hingir wanye na, gba tan un kpandegh." 
2Kings17:4 Kpa tor u Ashiria kav er Hoshea a zough zwa a ior sha a na yô, gadia a tindi mbatyomov hen So, tor u Igipiti, a kera na tor u Ashiria kpandegh er a eren anyom anyom nahan la ga; nahan tor u Ashiria wuhe un ken gaadi." 
2Kings17:5 Tsô tor u Ashiria kôndo kar hen atô u tar la cii, za sha Samaria, za kase un anyom atar." 
2Kings17:6 Sha inyom i sha utaankarunyiin i Hoshea la, tor u Ashiria ngohol Samaria, a kura Iserael, a yem a ve uikangen ken Ashiria, a za ver ve ken Hala man hen kpe u Habor ifi u ken Gosan, man ken agar a Mbamede." 
2Kings17:7 Gadia Mbaiserael er TER, Aôndo ve, kwaghbo, u A due a ve ken tar u Igipiti sha ikev i Farao tor u Igipiti la, ve civir mbaaôndo mbagenev," 
2Kings17:8 ve zaan sha aeren a akuraior a TER zenda a sha ishigh ki Mbaiserael kera la, kua aeren a utor mba Iserael ve ver a la." 
2Kings17:9 Mbaiserael er akaa ken myer a a lu sha mi ga yô, a a vihi TER, Aôndo ve, ishima yô; ve maa ajiir a taven sha ken agar a ve cii, hii hen daar u mbakuran je, zan zan za ar hen gar u lun a gir;" 
2Kings17:10 ve tim mtôm ma awenem sha ci u ve ayol a ve kua Asherim kpaa, sha hanma igungu u taven man shin hanma kon u lun a mure;" 
2Kings17:11 ka sha her sha ajiir a taven sha la cii, ve nanden kwaghhumandoon, vough er akuraior a TER lu kura a sha ishiv vev yem a a kera la, lu eren nahan; ve er akaabo, ve bam TER," 
2Kings17:12 ve civir ieev mbi TER vande ôron kwagh u mbi, kaa er: De eren nen kwagh ne ga la." 
2Kings17:13 Kpa TER pase Iserael kua Yuda sha hanma profeti man hanma ornengenakaa er: Gema nen, undu nen aferakaa a en, waan nen atindi a Am man akaawan a Am iko sha gbenda u atindiakaa cii a M wa uter enev man shi a M tindi ne a mi sha ikev i mbayev Av, uprofeti la." 
2Kings17:14 Nahan kpaa, ve venda u ungwan, ve nômbo ikôr, er uter vev mba ve na TER, Aôndo ve, jighjigh ga la nahan." 
2Kings17:15 Ve venda akaawan a Na man ikuryan Na i A ya a uter vev kua mbampase Nav mba A pase ve kpaa; ve gema, ve dondo akaagbilinigh zan zan ve hingir dang, ve dondo akuraior a a kase ve la, a TER wa ve tindi sha kwagh ve er, ve̱ de eren er ve nahan ga la." 
2Kings17:16 Man shi ve undu atindi a TER, Aôndo ve, cii, ve er ieev mbi keren a ker, ka anibuav mba uhar je la, shi ve er Ashera, ve gure ve civir akum a Sha cii, ve civir Baal kpaa." 
2Kings17:17 Ve er ônov vev mba nomso kua mba kasev, ve kar ken usu, ve kpehe asor, shi ve er ahir, ve tee ayol a ve sha u eren ifer sha ishigh ki TER, bamen Un." 
2Kings17:18 Nahan ishima vihi TER a Iserael kpishi, A kar a ve sha ishigh Nagh kera, mô kera shi ga, saa kwe u Yuda tseegh." 
2Kings17:19 Yuda je kpaa wa atindi a TER, Aôndo ve, iko ga, ve lu zenden sha aeren a Iserael ver a la." 
2Kings17:20 Nahan TER venda tsombor u Iserael cii, A er ve ican, A na ve sha ikev i mbayanshar zan zan A zenda ve sha ishigh Nagh kera." 
2Kings17:21 Gadia A tsuwe Iserael, A pav ve a ya u Davidi kera; nahan ve kôr Yerobiam wan u Nebati tor; tsô Yerobiam urugh ve, ve de u dondon TER, a na ve er zegekwaghbo." 
2Kings17:22 Mbaiserael lu zan sha asorabo a Yerobiam lu er la cii; ve undu a ga;
