2Kings17:23 zan zan TER kar a Iserael sha ishigh Nagh kera, er lu kaa mbayev Nav uprofeti ve gema ve ôr yô; ka nahan man i dugh Iserael ken tar na kera, i yem a ve ken Ashiria uikangen zan zan nyian ye." 
2Kings17:24 Tsô tor u Ashiria za va a ior ken Babilon man ken Kuta man ken Ava man ken Hamati kua Sefarvaim, a va ver ve ken agar a Samaria sha ityough ki Mbaiserael; tsô ve ngohol Samaria ve tema ken agar a na." 
2Kings17:25 Sha mtem ve ker, hiihii la, ve cian TER ga; nahan, TER tindi ubegha ken a ve va pande ior vev mbagenev, wua." 
2Kings17:26 Nahan ve ôr kwagh a tor u Ashiria ve kaa er: Akuraior a u kor, u va ver ken agar a Samaria la, ve fa atindi a Aôndo u tar ne ga, nahan A tindi ubegha ken a ve, nenge, mba va wuan ve je, gadia ve fa atindi a Aôndo u tar ne ga." 
2Kings17:27 Tsô tor u Ashiria kaa er: Yô, tsuwa nen pristi môm ken mba ne kor kera la, a̱ yem a̱ za tema ken ijiir la a̱ tesen ve atindi a Aôndo u tar la." 
2Kings17:28 Tsô pristi môm u ken mba ve kor ken Samaria kera la, mough va tema ken Betel, a va tese ve er vea er man vea civir TER yô." 
2Kings17:29 Nahan kpaa hanma ikurior er aôndo u i, ve ver ve ken utempel mba sha ajiir a taven sha a Mbasamaria lu er yô, hanma ikur ken agar a ve, henpe ve tema yô." 
2Kings17:30 Ior i Babilon er Sukoti-benoti, ior i Kuta er Nergal, ior i Hamati er Ashima," 
2Kings17:31 man Mbaava er Nibahashi man Tartaki; man Mbasefarvaim yô, ve nande ônov vev ken usu sha ci u Adrameleki kua Anameleki, mbaaôndo mba Sefarvaim." 
2Kings17:32 Shi ve cian TER kpaa, ve sange ior ken iniongo ve cii, ve ver ve upristi sha ajiir a taven sha, mbala eren ve tom ken utempel mba sha ajiir a taven sha la." 
2Kings17:33 Nahan ve cian TER, kpa ve gema ve civir mbaaôndo vev sha inja i aeren a akuraior a i za kura ve ken a la." 
2Kings17:34 Zan zan nyian je kpaa mba eren aeren a tsuaa la her. Ve cian TER ga, man ve kera eren sha akaawan, shin sha akaaôron a jirigh, shin sha atindiakaa, shin sha tindi u TER wa ônov mba Yakob u A ii un iti er Iserael la, ga," 
2Kings17:35 mba TER ya ikur a ve, man A wa ve kwagh er: De cie nen mbaaôndo mbagenev ga, man shi de gur civir nen ve ga, de eren nen ve tom ga, de ne nen ve nagh kpaa ga;" 
2Kings17:36 kpa TER, u A due a ven ken tar u Igipiti sha agee a vesen kua sha uwegh ku naregh, ka Un cian nen Un ye, shi ka Un guren civir nen Un ye, man shi ka Un kpaa naan nen Un nagh ye;" 
2Kings17:37 akaawan man akaaôron a jirigh man atindiakaa kua inezwa i A ne ne la, wa nen iko, eren nen sha mi gbem; man de cie nen mbaaôndo mbagenev ga;" 
2Kings17:38 ikuryan i M ya a ven kpaa, i̱ de hungul ne ga; man shi de cie nen mbaaôndo mbagenev ga," 
2Kings17:39 kpa ka TER, Aôndo wen, né cian Un ye; wen Una yima ne sha ikev i mbaihomov enev cii." 
2Kings17:40 Nahan kpaa, ve ver ato ga, ve er sha inja ve i tsuaa la." 
2Kings17:41 Kape akuraior ne, ve cian TER shi ve civir ieev vev mbi gban a gba la; ônov vev kua ônov mba ônov vev kpaa eren er uter vev lu er yô, zan zan nyian." 
2Kings18:1 Tsô sha inyom i sha utar i Hoshea wan u Ela tor u Iserael la, Hesekia wan u Ahashi tor u Yuda, ya tor." 
2Kings18:2 Zum u a ya tor la, anyom a na lu ikundu kar ataan; a tema tor anyom ikundu kar ataankaranyiin ken Yerusalem, iti i ngô na er Abi wan u Sekaria." 
2Kings18:3 A eren kwagh u dedoo sha ishigh ki TER, er ter na Davidi lu eren nahan." 
2Kings18:4 A vihi ajiir a taven sha la kera, a hembe mtôm ma awenem, a gber Asherim kera; shi a hembe iyô i togula i Mose lu er la; gadia zan zan hen shighe la je kpaa Mbaiserael lu nanden kwaghhumandoon sha ci u i; i yila i er Nehushetan." 
2Kings18:5 A suur sha TER, Aôndo u Iserael; nahan ken ijime na yô, i kera zua a ma tor u Yuda u kuman sha a na ga, shin mba ve vande a na mbala kpaa, mô lu ga;" 
2Kings18:6 gadia a var a TER, a undu Un ga, a waan atindi Na iko, a TER na Mose yô." 
2Kings18:7 TER lu a na; henpe una za cii, i kpe un iyol; a hendan a tor u Ashiria, a eren kwagh sha ishima na ga." 
2Kings18:8 A hemba Mbafiliti zan zan a za ar hen Gasa man iningirtar na, hii hen daar u mbakuran zan zan za ar hen gar u lun a gir." 
2Kings18:9 Kpa sha inyom i sha unyiin i tor Hesekia la, ka inyom i sha utaankaruhar i Hoshea wan u Ela tor u Iserael je la, Shalmaneser tor u Ashiria va ityav hen Samaria, a haa afo a kase un." 
2Kings18:10 Anyom nga kar atar yô, ve ngohol un; ka inyom i sha ataratar i Hesekia la, shi ka anyom ataankaranyiin a Hoshea tor u Iserael je la, i hemba Samaria ye." 
2Kings18:11 Nahan tor u Ashiria kura Iserael yem a mi ken Ashiria, za ver ve ken Hala, man hen kpe u Habor, ifi u ken Gosan, man ken agar a Mbamede la," 
2Kings18:12 gadia ve wa iko sha imo i TER, Aôndo ve, ga, kpa ve vihi ikuryan Na, ka akaa a Mose wanakiriki u TER wa tindi sha mi cii je la, ve venda u ungwan un man u eren sha mi kpaa." 
2Kings18:13 Sha inyom i sha pue kar unyiin i tor Hesekia la, Senakeribi tor u Ashiria kôndo sha u nôngon ityav a agar a Yuda a lun a ugir cii, a ngohol a kpaa." 
2Kings18:14 Tsô Hesekia tor u Yuda tindi loho hen tor u Ashiria hen Lakishi, kaa er: M er kwaghbo, mough yem tsô, kwagh u u wam cii me er sha mi. Tsô tor u Ashiria wa Hesekia tor u Yuda azurfa utalenti deri utar man zenaria utalenti ikundugber." 
2Kings18:15 Nahan Hesekia na un azurfa cii, mba i zua a mi ken iyou i TER kua ken ayou a koson akaa ker a ken ya u tor cii." 
2Kings18:16 Hen shighe la, Hesekia bugh zenaria u sha ihinda i tempel u TER, kua u sha ambusu a ihinda, u Hesekia tor u Yuda cir sha mi la, a na tor u Ashiria." 
2Kings18:17 Tsô tor u Ashiria tindi Tartan man Rabesarishi kua Rabeshake er ve̱ mough hen Lakishi ve̱ za hen Hesekia hen Yerusalem a ikumutya i ngeen. Nahan ve mough ve va hen Yerusalem. Zum u ve ar yô, ve va tile hen akpa u ityungumnger u sha, u a lu sha kômgbenda u zan hen ijiir i kungun akondo la." 
2Kings18:18 Er ve yila tor yô, Eliakim wan u Hilkia, ua nengen sha ya u tor la man Shebena orngeren kua Yoa wan u Asav or u ngeren abaver ken takerada la due, ve va her a ve." 
2Kings18:19 Tsô Rabeshake kaa a ve er: Kaa nen Hesekia ahegen je, zegetor, tor u Ashiria a kaa er: Ka nyi agee u suur sha mi nahana?" 
2Kings18:20 U ngu henen wer, ka kwaghôron u sha ityumbuzwaagh a lu mhen man agee a utya yee? Ka sha an je u suur, ve u hendan a moo?" 
2Kings18:21 Nenge, u ngu suur sha Igipiti ishombongbo u iyia ne, u or nana lian sha mi yô, kua nyôr nan ken ikevwe kua kuma nan tsula, kape Farao tor u Igipiti a lu hen mba ve suur sha a na cii je la." 
2Kings18:22 Kpa aluer nea kaam ner: Se mba suur sha TER, Aôndo wase, yô, kera ka Un shon u Hesekia lu vihi ajiir a Na a taven sha kua atse Na a nanden nagh sha mi kera, shi a gema a kaa a Yuda kua Yerusalem er: Gure civir nen sha ishigh ki atse a ken Yerusalem ne gaa?" 
2Kings18:23 Yô, ta ase hwande a terem, tor u Ashiria; mo yô, me na u anyinya dubu uhar aluer wea fatyô u nan mbahendan a yô." 
2Kings18:24 Ú er nan man ú hemba gomna môm u alu u hemban gban ijime cii ken mbayev mba terem la ityava? U gema u suur sha Igipiti sha u zuan a akekeautya kua mbaanyinyav tsô. 
2Kings18:25 Kera ka sha mrumun u TER man m kende sha ijiir ne sha u va timin i gaa? Ka TER je, A kaa a mo er: Kôndo, za nôngo ityav a tar la tim u ye." 
2Kings18:26 Tsô maa Eliakim wan u Hilkia man Shebena kua Yoa, ve kaa a Rabeshake er: Ma u shi ôr kwagh a mbayev ou ken zwa u Shiria, gadia se mba ongo u; de kera er kwagh a vese ken zwa u Mbayuda sha ato a ior mba ve lu sha gilgar ne ga." 
2Kings18:27 Kpa Rabeshake kaa a ve er: Terem tindim er m̱ va ôr kwagh a ter wen kua ne tseegh tsôô? Kera ka hen ior mba ve tem sha gilgar, a tindim sha er vea ya akôngo a ve man vea ma mnyandem vem a ven imôngo gaa?" 
2Kings18:28 Tsô Rabeshake tile genger imo taver taver ken zwa u Mbayuda, kaa er: Ungwa nen imo i zegetor, tor u Ashiria." 
2Kings18:29 Tor ngu kaan nahan er: Hesekia a̱ de kera tsughun ne ga; gadia una fatyô u yiman ne sha ikev na ga; 
2Kings18:30 shi de rumun nen ner, Hesekia a̱ gema ne, ne suur sha TER ga, er a kaan er: TER Una yima se kpee je, á na gar ne sha ikev i tor u Ashiria ga la." 
2Kings18:31 De ongo nen kwaghôron u Hesekia ga; gadia tor u Ashiria ngu kaan nahan er: Lu nen bem a mo, due va nen her a mo; nahan hanmô wen nana ya atam a kon u wain u nan, man hanmô wen kpaa nana ya tur u nan, hanmô wen nana ma mngerem ma ijôr i nan kpaa;" 
2Kings18:32 zan zan me va kua a ven me za a ven tar ugen u u lu er tar wen nahan, tar u uyia man zar u wain, tar u ruam man u ishule i ikon i wain, tar u ikon i olev kua iyough, sha er ne̱ lu uma, ne̱ kpe ga yô, de veren nen ato sha Hesekia ga, gadia ngu nôngon u geman ne sha u a kaa er, TER Una yima se yô." 
2Kings18:33 Ma aôndo u ken mbaaôndo mba akuraior cii u a yima tar na sha ikev i tor u Ashiria ngu kpa? 
2Kings18:34 Mbaaôndo mba Hamati kua mba Arpadi mba hana? Mbaaôndo mba Sefarvaim man mba Hena kua mba Iva mba hana? Ve yima Samaria sha ikev yam kpa? 
2Kings18:35 Mbaaôndo mba ityar la cii, ka hanmô je a yem tar na sha ikev yama, ve TER Una yima Yerusalem sha ikev yama?" 
2Kings18:36 Kpa ior huan ving, bugh zwa a na sha kwagh môm ga; gadia tor kaa er: De bughun nen zwa a na ga." 
2Kings18:37 Tsô Eliakim wan u Hilkia u a nengen sha ya u tor man Shebena orngeren kua Yoa wan u Asav or u ngeren abaver ken takerada, ve va hen Hesekia a akondo a anden iyol, ve va ôr un mkaanem ma Rabeshake la." 
2Kings19:1 Tsô zum u tor Hesekia ungwa kwagh ne yô, a ande akondo a na, a haa iba iyol, a za nyôr ken iyou i TER." 
2Kings19:2 A tindi Eliakim u a nengen sha ya u tor man Shebena orngeren kua upristi mba tamen, ve haa aba iyol ve za hen profeti Yesaia wan u Amoshi." 
2Kings19:2 A tindi Eliakim u a nengen sha ya u tor man Shebena orngeren kua upristi mba tamen, ve haa aba iyol ve za hen profeti Yesaia wan u Amoshi." 
2Kings19:3 Ve za kaa un er: Hesekia ngu kaan nahan er: Iyange ne ka iyange i ican je, man i mtsaha kua ilyahan kpaa; gadia ônov kuma u á mar ve yô, kpa agee a maren ve nga je ga." 
2Kings19:4 Alaghga TER, Aôndo wou, Una ungwa akaaôron a Rabeshake cii, u ter na, tor u Ashiria tindi un er a̱ va tuhwa Aôndo u uma yô, man Una tsaha un sha akaaôron a TER, Aôndo wou, A ongo la; nahan yô, ma u shi kende imo, man u er msen sha ci u asande a a shi ker yô." 
2Kings19:5 Tsô mbayev mba tor Hesekia mba ve hen Yesaia yô," 
2Kings19:6 Yesaia gema kaa a ve er: Za kaa nen ter wen nahan ner: TER ngu kaan nahan er: De cie akaaôron a u ongo, a mbayev mba tor u Ashiria ve tohom sha a la ga." 
2Kings19:7 Nenge, Me na jijingi ugen ken a na, una ungwa agwa, tsô una hide una yem ken tar na la; Me na una kpe ku u sha sanker ken tar na la." 
2Kings19:8 Tsô Rabeshake hir yô, za kohol tor u Ashiria lu nôngon ityav a Libena, gadia vande ungwan er a mough hen Lakishi kera yô." 
2Kings19:9 Tsô er a ungwa er i lu ôron kwagh u Tirhaka tor u Etiopia er: Nenge, a due sha u nôngon ityav a we; nahan a shi a tindi mbatyomov hen Hesekia, a kaa er:" 
2Kings19:10 Za kaa nen Hesekia tor u Yuda nahan ner: Aôndo wou u u suur sha a Na la, A̱ de tsughun we kaan er, á na Yerusalem sha ikev i tor u Ashiria ga, ze." 
2Kings19:11 Nenge, u ungwa kwagh u utor mba Shiria lu er a ityar cii, er ve tim i purututu la; nahan we yô, ú wara?" 
2Kings19:12 Mbaaôndo mba akuraior, a uter av tim a la, ve yima a kpa? Ka Gosan man Haran man Resev kua ior mba Eden mba ve lu ken Telasar la." 
2Kings19:13 Tor u Hamati man tor u Arpadi man tor u gar u Sefarvaim man u Hena kua u Iva la, mba hana?" 
2Kings19:14 Er Hesekia ngohol washika sha ikev i mbatyomov mbala, ôr yô, Hesekia kôndo, za sha iyou i TER, A samber un sha ishigh ki TER." 
2Kings19:15 Tsô Hesekia sôn TER, kaa er: TER, Aôndo u Iserael, We u U tem sha ucerubi, ka We tseegh U lu Aôndo u ityartor i sha won cii ye; ka We je, U gbe Sha man tar ye." 
2Kings19:16 TERE, ver ato, ungwa TERE, bugh ashe nenge; ungwa akaaôron a Senakeribi, a a tindi sha u lahan Aôndo u uma ne." 
2Kings19:17 Mimi je, TERE, utor mba Ashiria vihi akuraior kua ityar ve kpaa," 
2Kings19:18 ve gbihi mbaaôndo vev ken usu, gadia ve ka mbaaôndo mimi ga, kpa ka tom u sha ave a ior tsô, ikon kua awen; ka nahan man ve tim ve kera ye." 
2Kings19:19 Yô, TERE, Aôndo wase, shi yima se sha ikev na, sha er ityartor i sha won cii i̱ fa er We TER U lu Aôndo, We tseegh yô." 
2Kings19:20 Tsô Yesaia wan u Amoshi tindi loho hen Hesekia kaa er: TER, Aôndo u Iserael ngu kaa nahan er: Msen u u senem sha kwagh u Senakeribi tor u Ashiria la yô, M ungwa imo you." 
2Kings19:20 Tsô Yesaia wan u Amoshi tindi loho hen Hesekia kaa er: TER, Aôndo u Iserael ngu kaa nahan er: Msen u u senem sha kwagh u Senakeribi tor u Ashiria la yô, M ungwa imo you." 
2Kings19:21 Ka kwaghôron u TER A kaa sha a na ne er: Iniunkwase wankwase u Shion ngu lahan we, ngu sen we sha ilyahan; wankwase u Yerusalem ngu jingir ityough ken ijime you." 
2Kings19:22 Ka an je u laha nan man u toho nan kpaa? Man ka an je u hagher sha nan sha kwaghôrono, u kenden ashe sha sha ihagher kpaa? Ka sha Icighan u Iserael je." 
2Kings19:23 Ka sha mbatyomov ou mbala, u laha TER ye, u kaa wer: Sha ikpila-akeke yam m unde sha ityouv mbi iwoogh zan zan ken atô u Lebanon, m gber ugôgômbausedar nav kua uicighanmbaikonov mba fer nav; m nyôr zan zan m za ar hen zuer na henpe ikô i hembe wan la." 
2Kings19:24 M time azôr, m ma mngerem ma ken ityar igen, sha akevangahar am ne me uma asalegh a ifi u Igipiti cii." 
2Kings19:25 U ungwa er M vande eren akaa la tsuaa, M ver a ngise je kpaa gaa? Hegen yô, M kure a sha mi vough, ka nahan man u tim agar a lun a ugir, u gema a, a hingir atihi a alôgh ye." 
2Kings19:26 Ka nahan man ior mba ve lu ken a la, ve kera lu a agee iyol ga ye, asema yina ve, kondo ve iyol; ve hingir er toho u ken akôngo man er gwergwe nahan, man shi er toho u u mende sha uha, man shi er alakema u ka a use er a lu amar ga la nahan." 
2Kings19:27 Kpa M fa mtem wou man mdugh wou man mnyer wou man ihundugh ki u hundu sha a Mo kpaa. 
2Kings19:28 Er u hundu sha a Mo, man imanger you i u manger la i va nyerem ker ato yô, Me wa tsue Wam ken ihinga you kua lijam Wam kpaa ken zwa wou, Me hide a we sha gbenda u u ve mi la." 
2Kings19:29 Kwagh ne una hingir we ikav: inyom ne, né ya kwagh u a gbe menden iyol na tsô yô, inyom i sha kpaa né ya kwagh u una shi á mende la, kpa ken inyom i sha utar la yô, lôô nen, sunda nen, môôr nen ikon i wain, ya nen atam a i." 
2Kings19:30 Asande a a wer ken ya u Yuda a a shi her la, shi aa wa amise shin inya man á ume atam sha." 
2Kings19:31 Gadia ka ken Yerusalem asande a a shi her yô, aa due man sha uwo u Shion kpaa mbawaren vea due. Gbashima u TER una er kwagh ne." 
2Kings19:32 Ka nahan man TER A kaa sha kwagh u tor u Ashiria la er: Una nyôr ken gar ne ga, man una ta tihinya sha u nôngon a na kpaa ga." 
2Kings19:33 Gbenda u a ve mi la, ka sha u je una hide ye, una nyôr ken gar ne ga, kape TER A kaa la." 
2Kings19:34 Me kumba gar ne, Me yima un, sha ci Wam iyol Yam, man sha ci u wanakiriki Wam Davidi kpaa." 
2Kings19:35 Tsô ken tugh mbula je, ortyom u TER due wua ior dubu deri man dubu akunduanyiin kar utaan ken afo a Mbaashiria. Zum u ior nder pepe yô, nenge, ve lu akom gbulugh gbulugh." 
2Kings19:36 Nahan Senakeribi tor u Ashiria mough hide, yem, a za tema ken Nineve." 
2Kings19:37 Tsô er a gure ken iyou i Niseroki, aôndo na la yô, ônov nav Adrameleki man Shareser ve wua un sha sanker, maa ve yevese ve yem ken tar u Ararati; wan na Esar-hadon gema tema tor sha ityough nagh." 
2Kings20:1 Tsô sha ayange la Hesekia gba angev je, gba nôngon ku. Nahan profeti Yesaia wan u Amoshi va her a na, va kaa a na er: TER ngu kaan nahan er: Sôr akaa hen ya wou, gadia kpen you, ú war ga." 
2Kings20:1 Tsô sha ayange la Hesekia gba angev je, gba nôngon ku. Nahan profeti Yesaia wan u Amoshi va her a na, va kaa a na er: TER ngu kaan nahan er: Sôr akaa hen ya wou, gadia kpen you, ú war ga." 
2Kings20:2 Tsô a gema ishigh ken kpekpe, a sôn TER, a kaa er:" 
2Kings20:3 TERE, shi umbur er m zende sha ishigh You sha mimi a ishima i jighilii, shi m er akaa a dedoo sha ashe a Ou kpaa yô. Nahan Hesekia gba vaan tsung." 
2Kings20:4 Tsô er Yesaia za ar her atô u gar yô, imo i TER va her a na kaa er:" 
2Kings20:5 Hide, za kaa Hesekia, orhemenegh u ior Av wer: TER, Aôndo u teru Davidi, ngu kaan nahan er: M ungwa msen wou, M nenge mliam ou kpaa; yô, Me bee u angev; sha iyange i sha utar la ú kôndo ú za sha iyou i TER." 
2Kings20:6 Me seer we anyom pue kar ataan sha ayange a ou; shi Me yima u kua gar ne cii sha ikev i tor u Ashiria; Me shi Me yisa gar ne sha ci Wam iyol Yam man sha ci u wanakiriki Wam Davidi kpaa. 
2Kings20:7 Tsô Yesaia kaa er: Za tôô ijen i atam a tur va a mi. Nahan ve za tôô, ve penda sha ityundu la, tsô angev mbula bee un." 
2Kings20:8 Hesekia gema kaa a Yesaia er: Ka nyi ia lum ikav i TER Una beem angev man me kôndo me za nyôr ken iyou i TER sha iyange i sha utar laa? 
2Kings20:9 Yesaia kaa er: Kwagh u una lu u ikav i i dugh hen TER, er TER Una er kwagh u A kaa la yô: Ka u ka mure a̱ kporom ken hemen ihange pue, shin a̱ hire ijime ihange pue?" 
2Kings20:10 Hesekia gema kaa er: U mure a̱ za sen ihange pue la ka ican ga; yô, mure a̱ hire ijime ihange pue." 
2Kings20:11 Tsô profeti Yesaia sôn TER, nahan A hire a mure ijime ihange pue, u a vande senen sha anar u tesen mzende u iyange u Ahashi la." 
2Kings20:12 Hen shighe la je Berodaki-baladan wan u Baladan, tor u Babilon, tindi mbatyomov hen Hesekia a washika kua iwua; gadia a ungwa er Hesekia lu gba angev yô." 
2Kings20:13 Hesekia ungwa kwaghôron ve; a tese ve iyou na i koson akaa ker cii, azurfa man zenaria man ilyôghonov man mkurem ma injaam man iyou na i ikav mbi utyav cii, man akaa a a lu ken ayou a na a koson ikav ker cii; ma kwagh u ken ya na, shin u ken tar na cii, u Hesekia de tesen ve yô, lu ga." 
2Kings20:14 Tsô profeti Yesaia va hen tor Hesekia va pine un er: Ior mban kaa nana? Man ka han ve dugh ve ve her a wee? Hesekia kaa er: Ve due ken tar u icaa, ken Babilon je." 
2Kings20:15 A pine er: Ka nyi ve nenge a mi ken ya wouwe? Hesekia gema kaa er: Akaa a a lu ken ya wam cii ve nenge a mi; ma kwagh môm u a lu ken ayou am a koson ikav ker cii u m tese ga yô, ngu ga." 
2Kings20:16 Tsô Yesaia kaa a Hesekia er: Ungwa ase kwaghôron u TER. 
2Kings20:17 Nenge, ayange nga van a akaa a a lu ken ya wou cii kua akaa a uter ou ve koso cii, zan zan nyian ne, á kura a, á yem a mi ken Babilon; kwagh môm una shi ga, kape TER A kaa la." 
2Kings20:18 Ônov ou mba vea due ken a we, mba wea mar ve je, á kôr mbagenev á yem a ve, vea za hingir mbaerentom ken ya u tor u Babilon." 
2Kings20:19 Tsô Hesekia gema kaa a Yesaia er: Imo i TER i u kaa la, i dio tsô. Shi a kaa er: Gayô, sha ayange am, bem man mkpeyol vea lu." 
2Kings20:20 Aerenakaa a Hesekia agen kua agee a na cii man er a er ityungumnger man akpamnger sha er mngerem ma nyôr ken gar la, i nger a ken ruamabera u abaver a utor mba Yuda la gaa?" 
2Kings20:21 Tsô Hesekia yav a uter nav imôngo; Manase wan na gema tema tor sha ityough nagh. 
2Kings21:1 Manase lu anyom pue kar ahar zum u a ya tor la; a tema tor ken Yerusalem anyom akunduahargber kar ataan; iti i ngô na er Hefeshiba. 
2Kings21:2 A er kwaghbo sha ishigh ki TER, a zaan sha akaahôngorough a akuraior a TER lu zenda sha ishigh ki Mbaiserael kera la." 
2Kings21:3 Gadia a shi a maa ajiir a taven sha a ter na Hesekia lu vihi kera la; a ta atse a nanden nagh sha mi imôngo je sha ci u Baal, a er Ashera kpaa, er Ahaba tor u Iserael lu er nahan, a guren civir akum a Sha cii, a waan a iko." 
2Kings21:4 Shi a ta atse a nanden nagh sha mi imôngo ken iyou i TER, i TER lu kaa er: Ka ken Yerusalem Me ver iti Yam la." 
2Kings21:5 Shi a ta atse a nanden nagh sha mi imôngo sha ci u akum a Sha cii, hen ityembe i ihiar i iyou i TER la." 
2Kings21:6 Shi a er wan na kar ken atô u usu, a eren ahir, man lu veren ishima sha ishor i kpehen, a ver mba ve lu a ujijingi mba mbakpenev kua mbatsenganpasen akaa; a er ifer kpishi sha ishigh ki TER, sha u bamen Un." 
2Kings21:7 Shi a ver eev mbu Ashera mbu gban a gba mbu a er la, ken iyou i TER ôr kwagh u i a Davidi kua wan na Solomon er: Ka ken iyou ne, kua ken Yerusalem u ken ikwe i Iserael cii M tsough un ne, Me ver iti Yam i̱ lu her gbem ye;" 
2Kings21:8 man Me er angahar a Iserael á kera due ken tar u M ne uter vev ne, á zenden wue wue ga, aluer vea waan iko sha imo Yam cii yô, shi vea eren sha atindiakaa cii a wanakiriki wam Mose lu wa ve yô." 
2Kings21:9 Kpa ve ver ato ga; Manase kpaa mee ve u eren ifer, hemba akuraior a TER lu tim a sha ishigh ki Mbaiserael kera la." 
2Kings21:10 Tsô uprofeti, mbayev mba TER or kwagh sha zwa Na kaa er:" 
2Kings21:11 Er Manase tor u Yuda a er akaa a ihôngorough ne, man a er ifer, hemba i Mbaamor lu er la cii, mba ve vande lun a na, shi a na Yuda u eren kwaghbo sha ieev nav," 
2Kings21:12 nahan TER, Aôndo u Iserael, ngu kaan er: Nenge, Me va a ican sha Yerusalem kua Yuda, inja i hanma or u nana ungwa gwa u i yô, a hingir nan ken ato gbong." 
2Kings21:13 Man shi Me kar Yerusalem sha ikaren i Samaria man ikaren i ya u Ahaba; Me ese Yerusalem er or ka nan ese tasa nahan, nan ese, nan cir un zwa inya." 
2Kings21:14 Shi Me haa dyako Wam u a shi her la kera, Me na ve sha ikev i mbaihomov vev; vea hingir ishar i yan; man mbaihomov vev vea sar ve cii;" 
2Kings21:15 gadia ve er ifer sha ishigh Yagh, ve bamen hii sha iyange i uter vev due ken Igipiti la je, zan zan nyian." 
2Kings21:16 Shi Manase haa awambe a mbaishôôv kpishi kpaa, a iv Yerusalem a a, hii ken ikighir ne ar ken ngila, seer sha kwaghbo na u a ne Yuda a er la; nahan a hingir u eren ifer sha ishigh ki TER." 
2Kings21:17 Aerenakaa a Manase agen man akaa a a er cii, kua kwaghbo u a er yô, i nger a ken ruamabera u abaver a utor mba Yuda la gaa?" 
2Kings21:18 Tsô Manase yav a uter nav imôngo, i ii un ken sule na u hen ya na, ka sule u Usa je la; wan na Amon gema tema tor sha ityough nagh." 
2Kings21:19 Amon lu anyom ikundu kar ahar zum u a ya tor; a tema tor ken Yerusalem anyom ahar; iti i ngô na er Meshulemeti wan u Harushi u hen Yoteba. 
2Kings21:20 A er kwaghbo sha ishigh ki TER er ter na Manase lu er nahan. 
2Kings21:21 A za sha igbenda i ter na cii; a civir ieev mbi ter na lu civir la, a gure a civir mbi." 
2Kings21:22 A undu TER, Aôndo u uter Nav, a lu zan sha gbenda u TER ga." 
2Kings21:23 Tsô mbatomov mba tor Amon zua zwa sha a na, ve wua tor ken ya na." 
2Kings21:24 Kpa ior mba hen tar la, gema wua di ior mba ve zua zwa sha tor Amon la cii; tsô ior mba hen tar la gema kôr wan na Yoshia tor sha ityough nagh." 
2Kings21:25 Aerenakaa agen a Amon er yô, i nger a ken ruamabera u abaver a utor mba Yuda la gaa?" 
2Kings21:26 I ii un ken uwar na, ken sule u Usa. Wan na Yoshia gema tema tor sha ityough nagh." 
2Kings22:1 Yoshia lu anyom anigheni zum u a ya tor la; a tema tor ken Yerusalem anyom ikundugber kar môm; iti i ngô na er Yedida, wan u Adaia u Bosekati." 
2Kings22:2 A eren kwagh u dedoo sha ishigh ki TER, a zaan sha gbenda u ter na Davidi cii, a kaha ken uwegh ku yanegh shin ku imesegh kpaa ga." 
2Kings22:3 Tsô sha inyom i sha pue kar anigheni i tor Yoshia la, tor tindi Shafan wan u Asalia, wan u Meshulam, orngeren, hen iyou i TER; a kaa er:" 
2Kings22:4 Za hen zegepristi Hilkia, a̱ ôr inyaregh ki i ve a mi ken iyou i TER, ki mbakuranhunda ve ngohol hen ior, ve kohol la;" 
2Kings22:5 ve̱ na ki sha ikev i mbatomov mba ve nenge sha tom u iyou i TER yô, sha u ve̱ gema ki ve̱ na mba ve eren tom ken iyou i TER, sha u ve̱ sôr ajiir a vihin a sha iyou la," 
2Kings22:6 ka mbagbanakaa man mbamaankwagh kua mbamaan sha akam, man sha ci u yamen ikon man awen a kuan sha u sôron iyou la." 
2Kings22:7 Nahan á kera pine ve kwagh sha inyaregh ki i na sha ikev ve la ga, gadia ve lu eren tom ve sha mimi." 
2Kings22:8 Tsô zege pristi Hilkia kaa a Shafan orngeren la er: M zua a ruamabera u atindigh ken iyou i TER. Nahan Hilkia gema ruamabera la na Shafan, a ôr." 
2Kings22:9 Tsô Shafan orngeren la va hen tor, a va ôr tor; a kaa a na er: Mbayev ou dugh inyaregh ki i zough a ki ken iyou la cii ve gema ki ve na sha ikev i mbatomov mba ve nengen sha tom u iyou i TER la." 
2Kings22:10 Shi Shafan ôr tor ruamabera la. 
2Kings22:11 Er tor ungwa akaaôron a ken ruamabera u atindigh la yô, a ande akondo a na." 
2Kings22:12 Nahan tor ôr a pristi Hilkia kua Ahikam wan u Shafan man Akebor wan u Mikaia man Shafan orngeren kua Asaia wanakiriki u tor la, a kaa er:" 
2Kings22:13 Za, za pine nen TER sha ci wam man sha ci u ior kua sha ci u Yuda cii kpaa, sha kwagh u akaaôron a ruamabera u i zough a mi ne, gadia iyugh i TER haa sha a vese, vese je, ngi yeghen a yegh; gadia uter asev lu wan iko sha akaaôron a ruamabera u atindigh sha u eren sha kwagh u i wa se la cii ga." 
2Kings22:14 Nahan pristi Hilkia man Ahikam man Akebor kua Shafan man Asaia ve za hen Hulda, profeti u kwase, kwase u Shalum, wan u Tikwa, wan u Harhashi, orkuran iyou i akondogh (ya na lu ken Yerusalem, ken gar u he), ve za ôr kwagh a na." 
2Kings22:15 A gema a kaa a ve er: TER, Aôndo u Iserael, ngu kaan nahan er: Za za kaa nen or u a tindi ne her a mo la ner:" 
2Kings22:16 TER ngu kaan nahan er: Nenge, Me va a ican sha ijiir ne, kua sha mba ve tem ken i kpaa, ka akaaôron a ruamabera u tor u Yuda a er la cii;" 
2Kings22:17 gadia ve undum ve gema ve nande mbaaôndo mbagenev kwaghhumandoon sha u vea bamen sha tom u ave ve la cii; nahan iyugh Yam ia yegh hen ijiir ne, ia kera pir ga." 
2Kings22:18 Kpa tor u Yuda u a tindi ne sha u ne va pine imo i TER yô, za kaa nen un nahan ner: TER, Aôndo u Iserael, ngu kaan nahan er: Sha kwagh u akaaôron a u ongo la yô," 
2Kings22:19 er u lu a ishima i legh legh u hire a iyol you ijime sha ishigh ki TER, zum u u ongo kwaghôron u M er sha ijiir ne, kua sha mba ve tem ken i kpaa, Mer, vea hingir kwagh u cieryol man kwagh u i we un ifan yô, man u ande akondo a ou, shi u vaa sha ishigh Yagh kpaa, nahan, Mo kpaa M ungwa u, kape TER A kaa la." 
2Kings22:20 Nahan yô, nenge, Me kohol we a uter ou imôngo, á hungwa a we shin uwar bem bem, ashe ou aa nenge bokwagh u Me va a mi sha ijiir ne je ga. Tsô ve shi ve hire hen tor ve va ôr un nahan." 
2Kings23:1 Tsô tor tindi i za lôhô mbatamen mba Yuda kua mba Yerusalem cii, ve va kohol hen a na." 
2Kings23:2 Nahan tor kôndo za sha iyou i TER a ior mba Yuda cii man ior mba ken Yerusalem man upristi man uprofeti kua ior cii, mba kiriki kua mba vesen cii; tsô a ôr akaaôron a ken ruamabera u ikuryan u i zua a mi ken iyou i TER la cii, sha ato a ve." 
2Kings23:3 Tor tile hen ityô, a tôndo zwa sha ishigh ki TER, er una dondo TER man una waan atindi a Na iko man mbampase Nav kua akaawan a Na, a ishima na cii kua a uma na cii, una er sha akaaôron a ikuryan a i nger ken ruamabera la vough; ior ci ca cii rumun ikuryan la." 
2Kings23:4 Tsô Tor kaa zegepristi Hilkia man upristi mba gbiren sha a na, man mbakuranhunda er, ve̱ due a ikav ken tempel u TER cii, mbi i er sha ci u Baal man sha ci u Ashera man shi sha ci u akum a Sha la; a nande mbi ken akôngo a Yerusalem ken mkôngom ma Kideron, a kura mtwem ma mbi, a za a mi hen Betel." 
2Kings23:5 Shi a dugh upristi mba akombov kera, mba utor mba Yuda lu ver ve er ve̱ nanden kwaghhumandoon sha ajiir a taven sha a ken agar a Yuda kua ken ajiir a a kase Yerusalem la, man mba ve nanden kwaghhumandoon sha ci u Baal man iyange kua uwer man atihi a asan kua akum a Sha cii." 
2Kings23:6 Shi a dugh Ashera ken iyou i TER kera, a yem a mi ken akôngo a Yerusalem shin uwagh u Kideron, a za nande un shin uwagh u Kideron, a kume un hingir vuwe, a haa vuwe la sha iwar i ior mba ken inya." 
2Kings23:7 Shi a hembe ayou a Mbasodom, a a lu ken iyou i TER, henpe kasev tumen utenti sha ci u Ashera la." 
2Kings23:8 A due a upristi cii ken agar a Yuda kera, a hôngor a ajiir a taven sha henpe upristi lu nanden kwaghhumandoon la, hii hen Geba zan zan za ar hen Bersheba je, a hembe ajiir a taven sha a ihindagar, a a lu hen ijiir i nyôron hen hunda u Yosua, orvesen u nengen sha gar la, a a lu vegher u ken uwegh ku imesegh ku hundagar la." 
2Kings23:9 Upristi mba sha ajiir a taven sha yô, i rumun ve u unden sha atse a TER a nanden nagh sha mi a ken Yerusalem la ga, kpa ve lu yan bredi u i we kwa sha mi ga yô, a anmgbianev vev imôngo." 
2Kings23:10 Shi a hôngor a Tofeti u a lu shin pev u ônov mba Hinom la kpaa, sha er ma or nana̱ de kera eren wan u nan u nomso shin u kwase a̱ karen ken atô u usu sha ci u Moleki ga." 
2Kings23:11 Shi a kura anyinya a utor mba Yuda lu na er i̱ civir iyange a mi la kera, hen ijiir i nyôron ken iyou i TER la, hen iyou i Natan-meleki i i suwe ker la, un lu oreren tom ken ya u tor; a nande akeke a iyange sha usu." 
2Kings23:12 Atse a nanden nagh sha mi a a lu sha haav mbu kpoyou u sha u Ahashi, a utor mba Yuda ta la, kua atse a Manase ta a sha ityembe i ihiar i iyou i TER la, tor hembe a, a kura a her kera, a gema avur a a, a haa shin uwagh u Kideron." 
2Kings23:13 Tor shi hôngor ajiir a taven sha a a lu sha ishigh ki Yerusalem, a a lu uwo u hôngorough vegher u ken uwegh ku yanegh la, a Solomon tor u Iserael maa a sha ci u Ashetaroti, kwaghhôngorough u Mbashidon la, man sha ci u Kemoshi, kwaghhôngorough u Moabi kua sha ci u Milkom, kwaghhôngorough u Mbaamon la kpaa." 
2Kings23:14 Shi a hembe mtôm ma awenem man a gber Asherim, a iv ajiir a ve sha akuhe a ior." 
2Kings23:15 Man shi atse a nanden nagh sha mi a a lu ken Betel kua ijiir i taven sha i Yerobiam wan u Nebati u a na Iserael a er isholibo la, lu er la, atse shon man ijiir i taven sha la, a hembe a, a nande ijiir i taven sha la, a hembe i zan zan hingir vuwe, a nande Ashera la kpaa." 
2Kings23:16 Yoshia gem yô, a nenge a iwar i i lu sha uwo la; nahan a tindi i za dugh akuhe shin iwar la, a nande a sha atse, a hôngor a, sha kwaghôron u TER, u or u Aôndo lu yôô la, un u lu yôô akaa ne la." 
2Kings23:17 Tsô a kaa er: Ka nyi ikav i waregh m nengen mi keelaa? Nahan ior mba hen gar la kaa a na er: Ka uwar u or u Aôndo u lu due ken Yuda la, va yôô akaa a u er sha atse a Betel ne ye." 
2Kings23:18 Tsô a kaa er: De nen un, a̱ lu gir gir, ma or a̱ de kpoghol akuhe na ga. Tsô ve de akuhe a na kua a profeti u lu due ken Samaria la." 
2Kings23:19 Man shi ayou a sha ajiir a taven sha cii a a lu ken agar a Samaria, a utor Mbaiserael lu er sha ci u bamen TER la, Yoshia kar a a kera cii, a er a a vough sha aeren a a er ken Betel la cii." 
2Kings23:20 A sôngo upristi mba sha ajiir a taven sha mba ve lu her la cii, sha atse a nanden nagh sha mi la, a nande akuhe a ior sha a; tsô a hire ken Yerusalem." 
2Kings23:21 Tsô tor kaa a ior cii er: Er nen TER, Aôndo wen, iniongo i Paseka er i nger ken ruamabera u ikuryan ne nahan." 
2Kings23:22 I vande eren injainiongo i Paseka er ngin nahan ga, hii sha iyange i mbaajiriv mba ve lu ôron Iserael ajir je, shin ken ayange a utor mba Iserael cii, shin ken a utor mba Yuda kpaa ga;" 
2Kings23:23 kpa sha inyom i sha pue kar anigheni i tor Yoshia la yô, i er TER iniongo i Paseka ne ken Yerusalem." 
2Kings23:24 Man shi mba ve lu a ujijingi mba mbakpenev man mba tsengan pasen akaa man uterafim man ieev kua akaa a ihôngorough cii a i nenge a mi ken tar u Yuda, man ken Yerusalem yô, Yoshia due a mi kera, sha u una taver akaaôron a atindigh a i nger ken ruamabera u pristi Hilkia zua a mi ken iyou i TER la." 
2Kings23:25 Ma tor ugen vande lun er un nahan ga, u nan gema hen TER a ishima i nan cii man uma u nan cii man agee a nan cii, sha atindi a Mose cii, er un nahan ga, ken ijime na kpaa mô mough er un nahan ga." 
2Kings23:26 Nahan kpaa, TER de iyugh Na i tsung i A yuwe a Yuda la ga, sha ci u mbam u Manase bam Un a mi la cii." 
2Kings23:27 TER kaa er: Me kar a Yuda sha ishigh Yagh kera, er M kar a Iserael kera nahan, shi Me gbihi gar u Yerusalem u M tsough ne kera, kua iyou i M ôr kwagh u i, M kaa Mer: Iti Yam ia lu ker la kpaa." 
2Kings23:28 Aerenakaa a Yoshia agen man kwagh u a er cii yô, i nger a ken ruamabera u abaver a utor mba Yuda la gaa?" 
2Kings23:29 Sha ayange na la, Farao-neko tor u Igipiti kôndo sha u za nôngon ityav a tor u Ashiria hen ifi u Uferati; tsô tor Yoshia za nôngo ityav a na, kpa a wua un hen Megido zum u a nenge a na yô." 
2Kings23:30 Tsô mbayev nav tôô un kpenegh sha ikyekye hen Megido, ve va a mi ken Yerusalem, ve va ii un shin uwar na. Tsô ior mba hen tar la ve tôô Yehoahashi wan u Yoshia, ve shighe un mkurem, ve ver un tor sha ityough ki ter na." 
2Kings23:31 Yehoahashi lu anyom ikundu kar atar zum u a ya tor la; a tema tor ken Yerusalem iwer itiar, iti i ngô na er Hamutal wan u Yeremia u hen Libena." 
2Kings23:32 A eren ifer sha ishigh ki TER, er uter nav lu eren nahan cii." 
2Kings23:33 Farao-neko kôr un za ver un hen Ribela uikangen ken tar u Hamati sha u a̱ de kera tem tor ken Yerusalem ga yô; shi a ya tar la zwajirigh sha azurfa utalenti deri kua zenaria talenti môm. 
2Kings23:34 Farao-neko ver Eliakim wan u Yoshia tor sha ityough ki ter na Yoshia, a gema un iti er Yehoyakim; kpa a gema a yem a Yehoahashi ken Igipiti, a za kpe ker." 
2Kings23:35 Nahan Yehoyakim na Farao-neko azurfa kua zenaria la, kpa a wa tar la kpandegh sha u una na inyaregh sha imo i Farao yô, a kura azurfa man zenaria hen ior mba hen tar la, hanma or sha kpandegh ku i we nan yô, sha ci u tan Farao-neko kpandegh a mi." 
2Kings23:36 Yehoyakim lu anyom ikundu kar ataan zum u a ya tor la; a tema tor ken Yerusalem anyom pue kar môm, iti i ngô na er Sebida wan u Pedaia u hen Ruma." 
2Kings23:37 A eren ifer sha ishigh ki TER, er uter nav lu eren nahan cii." 
2Kings24:1 Sha ayange na la Nebukadinesar tor u Babilon va ityav, nahan Yehoyakim hingir wanakiriki na zan zan anyom atar; ken masetyô yô, a gema a hendan a na." 
2Kings24:2 Tsô TER tindi akumautya a Mbakaldi man akum a Mbashiria man akum a Mbamoabi man akum a Mbaamon hen a na. A tindi a er a̱ za nôngo ityav a Yuda a̱ tim un sha imo i TER i mbayev Nav uprofeti ôr i sha zwa Na yô. 
2Kings24:3 Mimi je ka sha imo i TER kwagh la er Yuda ye, sha er á kar a ve sha ishigh Nagh kera, sha ci u akaabo a Manase, sha akaa a a er cii yô," 
2Kings24:4 man shi sha ci u awambe a mbaishôôv a a haa yô; gadia a iv Yerusalem a awambe a mbaishôôv nahan TER rumun u den ibo la ga. 
2Kings24:5 Aeren a Yehoyakim agen man akaa a a er cii yô, i nger a ken ruamabera u abaver a utor mba Yuda la gaa?" 
2Kings24:6 Tsô Yehoyakim yav a uter nav imôngo, wan na Yehoyakin tema tor sha ityough nagh." 
2Kings24:7 Tor u Igipiti kera seer duen ken tar na ga, gadia tor u Babilon ngohol akaa a a lu a tor u Igipiti cii, hii hen uwagh u Igipiti zan zan ar shin ifi u Uferati." 
2Kings24:8 Yehoyakin lu anyom pue kar anigheni zum u a ya tor la; a tema tor iwer itiar ken Yerusalem; iti i ngô na er Nehusheta wan u Elnatan u hen Yerusalem. 
2Kings24:9 A eren ifer sha ishigh ki TER er ter na lu eren nahan cii. 
2Kings24:10 Sha shighe la mbayev mba Nebukadinesar tor u Babilon va hen Yerusalem, i va kase gar sha utya." 
2Kings24:11 Nebukadinesar tor u Babilon kpaa va hen gar la zum u mbayev nav kase un la. 
2Kings24:12 Nahan Yehoyakin tor u Yuda due za hen tor u Babilon, un man ngô na man mbatomov nav man mbatamen nav kua mbatomov mba hen ya na; tsô tor u Babilon maa kôr un sha inyom i sha anigheni i a lu tor la." 
2Kings24:13 Shi a kura ikav mbi injaav mbi ken iyou i TER cii, kua ikav mbi injaav mbi hen ya u tor kpaa, a yem a mi; shi a bugh zenaria u sha akaa a Solomon tor u Iserael lu er ken tempel u TER la, er TER lu kaa yô." 
2Kings24:14 A kura Yerusalem cii, kua mbatamen cii, man ashagbaior cii; mbakwarev lu dubu pue, kua mbafan tomaveegh, man mbavareniwa kpaa, a yem a ve; mô shi ga, saa mbaatsanev mba hen tar la tsô." 
2Kings24:15 A kua a Yehoyakin, a yem a na hen Babilon, kua ngô u tor man kasev mba tor man mbatomov mba hen ya na man mbavesen mba hen tar la, a due a ve uikangen ken Yerusalem, a yem a ve ken Babilon;" 
2Kings24:16 ashagbaior cii kpaa, ior dubu utaankaruhar man mbafan tomaveegh kua mbavareniwa dubu, ve cii ve lu mbaageev mbafantyav, ka ve je tor u Babilon yem a ve uikangen ken Babilon ye." 
2Kings24:17 Nahan tor u Babel ver Matania anngô u ter u Yehoyakin tor sha ityough nagh, a gema un iti er Sedekia." 
2Kings24:18 Sedekia lu anyom ikundu kar môm zum u a ya tor la; a tema tor ken Yerusalem anyom pue kar môm; iti i ngô na er Hamutal wan u Yeremia u ken Libena. 
2Kings24:19 A er ifer sha ishigh ki TER er Yehoyakin lu er la cii. 
2Kings24:20 Ka sha ishima i vihin i TER, akaa la er ken Yerusalem man Yuda zan zan A ta ve sha ishigh Nagh kera ye." 
2Kings25:1 Tsô sha inyom i sha utaankarunyiin i a ya tor la, uwer u sha pue, ayange a u di kpaa pue la, Nebukadinesar tor u Babilon za va a mbautyav nav cii, er una nôngo ityav a Yerusalem, ve va haa afo; shi ve kaha gil kpaa, ve kase un." 
2Kings25:2 Nahan i kase gar la zan zan ar sha inyom i sha pue kar môm i tor Sedekia la. 
2Kings25:3 Uwer u sha unyiin ayange a u ataankaranyiin la, ijen gba ken gar kpishi, nahan ior mba ken tar la zua a kwaghyan ga." 
2Kings25:4 Tsô i pev gilgar, nahan mbautyav cii yevese tugh, ve due hen hunda u lu hen haregh u ukpekpe uhar mba ve lu hen sule u tor la–Mbakaldi gema kase gar la tser, nôngo ityav a na–ve yem gbenda u u ver ishigh hen Araba la." 
2Kings25:5 Kpa mbautyav mba Mbakaldi zenda tor ityô ve za kohol un hen kpuunkpuun u Yeriko; mbautyav nav ci ca sambe undu un. 
2Kings25:6 Tsô ve kôr tor ve yem a na hen tor u Babilon hen Ribela, ve za ôr un ijir." 
2Kings25:7 Ve wua ônov mba Sedekia mba nomso sha ashe na je, man shi ve ongor Sedekia ashe, ve kange un sha mshir, ve yem a na ken Babilon." 
2Kings25:8 Tsô sha uwer u sha utaan ayange a u ataankarahar la, sha inyom i sha pue kar utaankarunyiin i tor Nebukadinesar tor u Babilon la, Nebusaradan orhemen u mbakurantor, wanakiriki u tor u Babilon, va ken Yerusalem." 
2Kings25:9 A va nande iyou i TER man iyou i tor kua ayou a ken Yerusalem; hanma iyou i vesen a nande i sha usu. 
2Kings25:10 Mbautyav mba Mbakaldi mba ve lu a orhemen u mbakurantor la, ve hembe ugil mba Yerusalem cii ve ningir ve tser." 
2Kings25:11 Asande a ior a a shi ken gar man mba ve za ta ken tor u Babilon la kua ikpelaior i i shi la, Nebusaradan orhemen u mbakurantor kura ve cii, yem a ve uikangen." 
2Kings25:12 Mbaatsanev mbagenev mba ken tar la yô, orhemen u mbakurantor la undu ve er ve̱ lu mbanengen sha ishule i ikon i wain man i uyia." 
2Kings25:13 Mtôm ma togula ma ma lu ken iyou i TER, kua asange a pendan utasa sha mi man zegetasa u togula mba ve lu ken iyou i TER la, Mbakaldi hembe ve avur avur, ve kura utogula ve yem a mi ken Babilon." 
2Kings25:14 Ityev kpaa, man ushebul man akambe a sôron amenger a min man mbaahwa kua ikav mbi sha togula cii, mbi i eren tom a mi, ve kura ve yem a mi." 
2Kings25:15 Man ugbande mba usuv man utasa, orhemen u mbakurantor kura yem a mi, ka akaa a i er a sha zenaria man sha azurfa la." 
2Kings25:16 Mtôm mhar man zegetasa u môm la man asange a pendan utasa sha mi a Solomon er sha ci iyou i TER yô, togula u i er ikav mbin a mi cii, myohom nam gande u ôron." 
2Kings25:17 Ityaven i ityôgh ki mômough lu aseva pue kar anigheni, ki lu a indyuruku u togula sha mi; ityaven i indyuruku la lu aseva atar; man kper kua upomegraneti lu sha indyuruku vegher u sha kase tser, ve cii lu sha togula; ityôgh ki sha uhar kpaa, lu di nahan a kper." 
2Kings25:18 Orhemen u mbakurantor la, kôr pristi u vesen Seraia man Sefania pristi u dondon sha a na la, kua mbakuranhunda, ior itiar;" 
2Kings25:19 shi ken gar la, a kôr orhemen u i wa un mbautyav sha ikev yô, a ior itian mba lun a tor, mba i zua a ve ken gar yô, man orngeren u kurutya, u a kohol ior mba ken inya sha ci u utya yô, kua ior akunduatar mba ken inya, mba i zua a ve ken atô u gar yô." 
2Kings25:20 Nebusaradan orhemen u mbakurantor kôr ve, va a ve hen tor u Babilon hen Ribela;" 
2Kings25:21 tor u Babilon wua ve hen Ribela ken tar u Hamati. Kape i kura Yuda ken tar ve kera, i yem a ve uikangen la." 
2Kings25:22 Sha kwagh u ior mba ve shi ken tar u Yuda, mba Nebukadinesar tor u Babilon undu la, a ver Gedalia wan u Ahikam wan u Shafan lu gomna sha a ve." 
2Kings25:23 Tsô zum u mbahemenev mba akumautya cii, ve a ior vev, ve ungwa er tor u Babilon ver Gedalia, hingir gomna yô, ve va hen Gedalia hen Misepa, ka Ishemael wan u Netania man Yohanan wan u Karea man Seraia wan u Tanhumeti, Ornetofa, man Yaasania wan u Ormaakati, ve a ior vev." 
2Kings25:24 Tsô Gedalia bum a ve kua ior vev, a kaa a ve er: De kera cie nen mbatomov mba Mbakaldi ga, gba teman nen ken tar ne tsô, er nen tor u Babilon tom, tsô á kpe ne iyol." 
2Kings25:25 Kpa sha uwer u sha utaankaruhar la Ishemael wan u Netania, wan u Elishama u ken tsombor u tor, va a ior pue a na imôngo, ve va ta num sha Gedalia, ve wua un kua Mbayuda man Mbakaldi mba ve lu a na imôngo hen Misepa la." 
2Kings25:26 Tsô ior cii, mbakiriki man mbavesen kua mbahemenev mba akumautya, ve hembe ve yem hen Igipiti, gadia ve lu cian Mbakaldi." 
2Kings25:27 Tsô sha inyom i sha ikundugber kar utaankaruhar i Yehoyakin tor u Yuda lu ken kwar la, uwer u sha pue kar uhar, ayange a u ikundu kar utaankaruhar la, Evil-merodaki, tor u Babilon, sha inyom i a ya tor la, a kende a Yehoyakin tor u Yuda sha, a dugh un ken gaadi," 
2Kings25:28 a ôr kwagh a na dedoo, a kende ikônough nagh ki torough sha hemba mkônom ma torom ma utor mba ve lu a na ken Babilon la." 
2Kings25:29 A er un akondo a gaadi kera, a haa un agen, a gema yaan kwagh a na imôngo sha ayange a uma na cii;" 
2Kings25:30 sha kwagh u gbayol na kpaa, tor lu nan un kwar na gbem, hanma iyange a lu zuan a kwar na, sha ayange a uma na cii." 
1Chronicles1:1 Adam, Setu, Enoshi," 
1Chronicles1:2 Kenan, Mahalalel, Yaredi," 
1Chronicles1:3 Enoki, Metusela, Lameki," 
1Chronicles1:4 Noa, Shem, Ham, man Yafeti." 
1Chronicles1:5 Ônov mba Yafeti mba nomso lu: Gomer man Magogi man Madai man Yavan man Tubal man Mesheki man Tirase. 
1Chronicles1:6 Man ônov mba Gomer yô, lu: Asekenashi man Difati man Togarma." 
1Chronicles1:7 Man ônov mba Yavan yô, lu: Elisha man Tarshishi, Kitim man Rodanim." 
1Chronicles1:8 Ônov mba Ham mba nomso lu: Kushi man Miseraim, Puti man Kanaan." 
1Chronicles1:9 Man ônov mba Kushi yô, lu: Seba man Havila man Sabeta man Raama man Sabateka. Man ônov mba Raama yô, lu Sekeba kua Dedan." 
1Chronicles1:10 Kushi mar Nimrodi; ka un a hii lun nomor sha tar ye. 
1Chronicles1:11 Miseraim mar Ludim man Anamim man Lehabim man Nafetuhim 
1Chronicles1:12 man Paterushim man Kaseluhim (ka henpe Mbafiliti due je la) kua Kafetorim. 
1Chronicles1:13 Kanaan mar wan na u iunda Shidon man Heti 
1Chronicles1:14 man Mbayebushi man Mbaamor man Mbagirgashi 
1Chronicles1:15 man Mbahivi man Mbaarki man Mbashini 
1Chronicles1:16 man Mbaarvadi man Mbasemari man Mbahamati. 
1Chronicles1:17 Ônov mba Shem mba nomso lu: Elam man Ashur man Arpakeshadi man Ludi man Aram man Ushi man Hul man Geter man Mesheki. 
1Chronicles1:18 Arpakeshadi mar Shela, man Shela gema mar Eber." 
1Chronicles1:19 Eber yô, mar ônov uhar mba nomso, iti i u môm er Pelegi; gadia ka ken ayange na i pav tar ye; iti i anngô na er Yokotan." 
1Chronicles1:20 Yokotan gema mar Almodadi man Shelefi man Hasar-maveti man Yera 
1Chronicles1:21 man Hadoram man Usal man Dikela 
1Chronicles1:22 man Ebal man Abimael man Sekeba 
1Chronicles1:23 man Ofir man Havila man Yobabi. Mban cii lu ônov mba Yokotan. 
1Chronicles1:24 Shem, Arpakeshadi, Shela," 
1Chronicles1:25 Eber, Pelegi, Reu," 
1Chronicles1:26 Serugi, Nahor, Tera," 
1Chronicles1:27 Aberam, ka Aberaham je la." 
1Chronicles1:28 Ônov mba Aberaham lu Isaka man Ishemael. 
1Chronicles1:29 Ka icombor ve je ne: Wan u iunda u Ishemael lu Nebayoti, Kedar dondo man Adebeel man Mibesam," 
1Chronicles1:30 Mishema man Duma, Masa, Hadadi man Tema," 
1Chronicles1:31 Yetur, Nafishi man Kedema. Mban ka ônov mba Ishemael." 
1Chronicles1:32 Man ônov mba Ketura, kwase u Aberaham u sha uika: a mar Shimeran man Yokeshan man Medan man Midian man Ishebaki man Shua. Man ônov mba Yokeshan yô, lu: Sekeba man Dedan." 
1Chronicles1:33 Man ônov mba Midian yô, lu: Efa man Efer man Hanoki man Abida man Eldaa. Mban cii ka ônov mba Ketura." 
1Chronicles1:34 Aberaham mar Isaka; ônov mba Isaka lu Isou kua Iserael. 
1Chronicles1:35 Ônov mba Isou yô, lu: Elifasa man Reuel man Yeushi man Yalam man Kora." 
1Chronicles1:36 Ônov mba Elifasa yô, lu Teman man Omar, Sefi man Gatam, Kenashi man Timna kua Amaleki." 
1Chronicles1:37 Ônov mba Reuel yô, lu: Nahati, Sera, Shama kua Misa." 
1Chronicles1:38 Ônov mba Seir yô, lu: Lotan man Shobal man Shibeon man Ana man Dishon man Eser man Dishan." 
1Chronicles1:39 Ônov mba Lotan yô, lu: Hori man Homam; man Timna lu anngô u Lotan u kwase." 
1Chronicles1:40 Ônov mba Shobal yô, lu: Alian man Manahati kua Ebal, Shefi kua Onam. Ônov mba Shibeon yô, lu: Aya kua Ana." 
1Chronicles1:41 Ônov mba Ana yô, lu: Dishon. Man ônov mba Dishon yô, lu: Hameran man Esheban man Iteran man Keran." 
1Chronicles1:42 Ônov mba Eser yô, lu: Bilhan man Saavan kua Yaakan. Ônov mba Dishan yô, lu: Ushi man Aran." 
1Chronicles1:43 Mban yô, ka uityombaiorov mba lu ve tema ken tar u Edom, er ityoor lu a lu ken Mbaiserael ga la: Ka Bela wan u Beor; iti i gar na er Dinhaba." 
1Chronicles1:44 Tsô Bela kpe, nahan Yobabi wan u Sera u Bosera tema tor sha ityough nagh." 
1Chronicles1:45 Yobabi kpaa kpe, nahan Husham u ken tar u Mbateman tema tor sha ityough nagh." 
1Chronicles1:46 Husham kpe yô, Hadadi wan u Bedadi u a hemba Midian ken tar u Moabi la tema tor sha ityough nagh; iti i gar na er Aviti." 
1Chronicles1:47 Hadadi kpe yô, Samla u Masereka tema tor sha ityough nagh." 
1Chronicles1:48 Samla kpe yô, Shaul u Rehoboti hen Ifi la, tema tor sha ityough nagh." 
1Chronicles1:49 Shaul kpe yô, Baal-hanan wan u Akebor tema tor sha ityough nagh." 
1Chronicles1:50 Baal-hanan kpe yô, Hadadi tema tor sha ityough nagh; iti i gar na er Pai; iti i kwase na yô, er Mehetabel wan u Materedi wan u Meshahaba." 
1Chronicles1:51 Zum u Hadadi kpe la, uityombaiorov mba Edom gema lu: Timna, Alia, Yeteti," 
1Chronicles1:52 Oholibama, Ela, Pinon," 
1Chronicles1:53 Kenashi, Teman, Mibesar," 
1Chronicles1:54 Makediel man Iram. Mban ka uityombaiorov mba Edom je ne. 
1Chronicles2:1 Ônov mba Iserael ka: Ruben man Simeon man Levi man Yuda man Isakar man Sebulon 
1Chronicles2:2 man Dan man Yosev man Benyamin man Nafetali man Gadi kua Asher. 
1Chronicles2:3 Ônov mba Yuda yô, lu: Er man Onan kua Shela; mba utar mban a mar ve a wan u Shua wan u Kanaan; Er, wan u iunda u Yuda lu iferor sha ishigh ki TER, nahan A wua un kera." 
1Chronicles2:4 Tamar, kwase u wan na, mar un Perese man Sera. Ônov mba Yuda cii lu utaan." 
1Chronicles2:5 Ônov mba Perese yô, lu: Heseron man Hamul." 
1Chronicles2:6 Ônov mba Sera yô, lu: Shimeri man Etan man Heman man Kalkol kua Dara; ve cii ve lu utaan." 
1Chronicles2:7 Ônov mba Karmi yô, lu: Akar, or u a er Iserael ican la, gadia a nzughul kwagh sha kwagh u i te icin sha mi yô." 
1Chronicles2:8 Man ônov mba Etan yô, lu: Asaria." 
1Chronicles2:9 Ônov mba Heseron mba a mar yô, lu: Yerameel man Ram man Kelubai." 
1Chronicles2:10 Ram mar Aminadabi; man Aminadabi mar Nashon, ityoor u ônov mba Yuda;" 
1Chronicles2:11 Nashon mar Salma, man Salma mar Boashi," 
1Chronicles2:12 man Boashi mar Obedi, man Obedi mar Yese;" 
1Chronicles2:13 Yese mar wan na u iunda Eliabi man idyondon na Abinadabi man Shimea lu u sha utar," 
1Chronicles2:14 Netanel lu u sha unyiin, Radai lu u sha utaan," 
1Chronicles2:15 Osem lu u sha ataratar, Davidi lu u sha utaankaruhar;" 
1Chronicles2:16 man anngôôv vev mba kasev yô, lu: Seruya man Abigail. Ônov mba Seruya yô, lu: Abishai man Yoabi man Asahel; ve lu utar." 
1Chronicles2:17 Abigail mar Amasa; ter u Amasa yô, lu Yeter Orishemael." 
1Chronicles2:18 Kalebu wan u Heseron mar ônov a kwase na Asuba man a Yerioti; ônov nav yô, lu: Yesher man Shobabi kua Ardon." 
1Chronicles2:19 Zum u Asuba kpe kera yô, Kalebu za er Eferata, a mar Hur a na." 
1Chronicles2:20 Hur mar Uri, man Uri gema mar Besalel." 
1Chronicles2:21 Ken masetyô la, Heseron yav a wan u Makir ter u Gileadi; a lu anyom akunduatar zum u a er un la; a mar Segubi a na." 
1Chronicles2:22 Segubi mar Yair; un lu a agar ikundu kar atar ken tar u Gileadi. 
1Chronicles2:23 Geshur man Aram ngohol agar a Yair her a ve, man Kenati kua angarev vev kpaa; lu agar akunduatar. Ve cii ve lu ônov mba Makir ter u Gileadi." 
1Chronicles2:24 Ken masetyô u Heseron kpe kera ken Kalebi-Eferata yô, kwase u Heseron, Abiya, mar Ashur ter u Tekoa." 
1Chronicles2:25 Ônov mba Yerameel, waniunda u Heseron la, lu: Ram waniunda, man mbadondon sha a na ka: Buna man Oren man Osem kua Ahiya." 
1Chronicles2:26 Yerameel lu a kwase ugen kpaa, iti na er Atara; a lu ngô u Onam." 
1Chronicles2:27 Ônov mba Ram, waniunda u Yerameel, lu: Maasa man Yamin kua Eker." 
1Chronicles2:28 Ônov mba Onam lu: Shamai kua Yada. Ônov mba Shamai yô, lu: Nadabi kua Abishur." 
1Chronicles2:29 Iti i kwase u Abishur yô, er Abihail; a mar Aban kua Molida a na." 
1Chronicles2:30 Ônov mba Nadabi yô, lu: Seledi kua Apaim; kpa Seledi yô, kpe atseen." 
1Chronicles2:31 Ônov mba Apaim yô, lu: Ishi. Ônov mba Ishi yô, lu: Sheshan. Ônov mba Sheshan yô, lu: Alai." 
1Chronicles2:32 Ônov mba Yada, anngô u Shamai yô, lu: Yeter kua Yonatan; kpa Yeter kpe atseen." 
1Chronicles2:33 Ônov mba Yonatan yô, lu: Peleti man Sasa. Mban ka ônov mba Yerameel." 
1Chronicles2:34 Sheshan yô, lu a ônov mba nomso ga, saa mba kasev tseegh. Sheshan lu a wanakiriki, lu or u Igipiti, iti na er Yarha." 
1Chronicles2:35 Sheshan na Yarha wanakiriki na la wan na u kwase, a er: a mar Atai a na." 
1Chronicles2:36 Atai mar Natan, Natan gema mar Sabadi," 
1Chronicles2:37 Sabadi mar Efelal, Efelal gema mar Obedi," 
1Chronicles2:38 Obedi mar Yehu, Yehu gema mar Asaria," 
1Chronicles2:39 Asaria mar Helese, Helese gema mar Eleasa," 
1Chronicles2:40 Eleasa mar Shisemai, Shisemai gema mar Shalum," 
1Chronicles2:41 Shalum mar Yekamia, Yekamia gema mar Elishama." 
1Chronicles2:42 Ônov mba Kalebu, anngô u Yerameel, lu: Mesha wan na u iunda (a lu ter u Shiv) man ônov mba Maresha, ter u Heberon." 
1Chronicles2:43 Ônov mba Heberon yô, lu Kora man Tapua man Rekem kua Shema." 
1Chronicles2:44 Shema mar Raham ter u Yorkeam; man Rekem mar Shamai. 
1Chronicles2:45 Wan u Shamai yô, lu Maon; Maon lu ter u Bete-sur." 
1Chronicles2:46 Efa, kwase u Kalebu u sha uika, mar Haran man Mosa man, Gasese; Haran mar Gasese." 
1Chronicles2:47 Ônov mba Yahedai yô, lu: Regem man Yotam man Geshan man Peleti man Efa kua Shaav." 
1Chronicles2:48 Maaka kwase u Kalebu u sha uika mar Shebar man Tirham. 
1Chronicles2:49 Shi a mar Shaav ter u Mademana, man Sheva ter u Makebena, man ter u Gibea; man wan u Kalebu u kwase yô, lu Akesa." 
1Chronicles2:50 Mban ka ônov mba Kalebu. Ônov mba Hur, waniunda u Eferata: Shobal ter u Kiriati-yearim," 
1Chronicles2:51 Salma ter u Betelehem, Harev ter u Bete-gader." 
1Chronicles2:52 Shohal ter u Kiriati-yearim yô, lu a ônov mba nomso: Haroe man kwe u Menuhoti." 
1Chronicles2:53 Icombor i Kiriati-yearim yô, lu: Mbaiteri man Mbaputi man Mbashumati man Mbamishera; ka hen ve Mbasorati kua Mbaesetaol ve due ye." 
1Chronicles2:54 Ônov mba Salma yô, lu Betelehem man Mbanetofati man Ateroti-bete-yoabi man kwe u Mbamanahati man Mbasori." 
1Chronicles2:55 Icombor i mbangerentakerada man mba ve tema hen Yabeshi yô, lu Mbatirati man Mbashimeti kua Mbasukati. Mban ka Mbakeni mba ve due ken Hamati, ter u ya u Rekabi." 
1Chronicles3:1 Ônov mba Davidi mba a mar ve ken Heberon yô, lu: Amnon waniunda, a mar un a Ahinoam, wan u Mbayesereel; u sha uhar yô, lu Daniel, a mar un a Abigail, wan u Mbakarmel;" 
1Chronicles3:1 Ônov mba Davidi mba a mar ve ken Heberon yô, lu: Amnon waniunda, a mar un a Ahinoam, wan u Mbayesereel; u sha uhar yô, lu Daniel, a mar un a Abigail, wan u Mbakarmel;" 
1Chronicles3:2 u sha utar yô, lu Abesalom wan u Maaka, wan u Talmai, tor u Geshur; u sha unyiin yô, lu Adoniya wan u Hagiti;" 
1Chronicles3:3 u sha utaan yô, lu Shefatia, a mar un a Abital; u sha ataratar yô, lu Iteream, a mar un a kwase na Egela." 
1Chronicles3:4 A mar ve ataratar hen Heberon; a tema tor heregh anyom ataankarahar man iwer ataratar; ken Yerusalem yô, a tema tor anyom ikundugber kar atar." 
1Chronicles3:5 Ken Yerusalem yô, a mar Shimea man Sholabi man Natan man Solomon, ve unyiin a Beteshua, wan u Amiel;" 
1Chronicles3:6 man Ibehar man Elishama man Elifeleti 
1Chronicles3:7 man Noga man Nefegi man Yafia 
1Chronicles3:8 man Elishama man Eliada man Elifeleti, ka utaankarunyiin je la." 
1Chronicles3:9 Mban cii ka ônov mba nomso mba Davidi, i ôr ônov mba nomso mba kasev mba sha uika ga; man Tamar lu anngô ve u kwase." 
1Chronicles3:10 Wan u Solomon yô, lu Rehobiam, wan na lu Abiya, wan na lu Asa, wan na lu Yehoshafati," 
1Chronicles3:11 wan na lu Yoram, wan na lu Ahashia, wan na lu Yoashi," 
1Chronicles3:12 wan na lu Amashia, wan na lu Asaria, wan na lu Yotam," 
1Chronicles3:13 wan na lu Ahashi, wan na lu Hesekia, wan na lu Manase," 
1Chronicles3:14 wan na lu Amon, wan na lu Yoshia." 
1Chronicles3:15 Ônov mba Yoshia yô, wan u iunda lu Yohanan, u sha uhar lu Yehoyakim, u sha utar lu Sedekia, u sha unyiin lu Shalum." 
1Chronicles3:16 Ônov mba Yehoyakim yô, lu Yekonia wan na, Sedekia wan na." 
1Chronicles3:17 Ônov mba Yekonia u a lu uikangen la yô, lu: Shealtiel wan na," 
1Chronicles3:18 man Malkiram man Pedaia man Shenasar man Yekamia man Hoshama kua Nedabia. 
1Chronicles3:19 Ônov mba Pedaia yô, lu: Serubabel man Shimei; man ônov mba Serubabel yô, lu: Meshulam man Hanania; man Shelomiti lu anngô ve u kwase;" 
1Chronicles3:20 man Hashuba man Ohel man Berekia man Hasadia man Yushabi-hesedi, ve lu utaan." 
1Chronicles3:21 Ônov mba Hanania yô, lu Pelatia kua Yeshaia; ônov mba Refaia, ônov mba Arnan, ônov mba Obadia, ônov mba Shekania." 
1Chronicles3:22 Ônov mba Shekania yô, lu Shemaia; ônov mba Shemaia yô, lu: Hatushi man Igal man Baria man Nearia man Shafati, ve lu ataratar." 
1Chronicles3:23 Ônov mba Nearia yô, lu: Elioenai man Hisekia man Aserikam, ve lu utar." 
1Chronicles3:24 Ônov mba Elioenai yô, lu: Hodavia man Eliashibi man Pelaia man Akubi man Yohanan man Delaia man Anani, ve lu utaankaruhar." 
1Chronicles4:1 Ônov mba Yuda yô, lu Perese man Heseron man Karmi man Hur man Shobal." 
1Chronicles4:2 Reaia wan u Shobal mar Yahati; Yahati mar Ahumai man Lahadi, mban ka icombor i Mbasorati." 
1Chronicles4:3 Ônov mba Etam yô, lu Yesereel man Ishema man Idebashi; man iti i anngô ve u kwase lu Haseleleponi;" 
1Chronicles4:4 Penuel lu ter u Gedor man Eser ter u Husha. Mban ka ônov mba Hur, waniunda u Eferata, ter u Betelehem." 
1Chronicles4:5 Ashur ter u Tekoa lu a kasev uhar, Hela man Naara." 
1Chronicles4:6 A mar Ahusam man Hefer man Mbateman man Mbaahashetari a Naara. Ka ônov mba Naara je ne. 
1Chronicles4:7 Ônov mba Hela lu: Sereti man Isehar man Etenan. 
1Chronicles4:8 Koshi mar Anubi man Sobeba man icombor i Aharhel wan u Harum. 
1Chronicles4:9 Yabeshi hemba anmgbianev nav icivir; ngô na yila un iti er Yabeshi, a kaa er: Gadia m mar un sha ican." 
1Chronicles4:10 Yabeshi sôn Aôndo u Iserael er: Ma U verem doo doo, ma U seer tar wam, uwegh Ough ma ku lu a mo, ma U yemen, kwaghbo ma a tserem ga. Tsô Aôndo er un kwagh u a sôn la." 
1Chronicles4:11 Kelubi anngô u Shua mar Mehir, ka ter u Esheton je la." 
1Chronicles4:12 Esheton gema mar Bete-rafa kua Pasea man Tehina ter u Irnahashi. Ka ior mba Reka je ne. 
1Chronicles4:13 Ônov mba Kenashi yô, lu: Oteniel man Seraia; man ônov mba Oteniel yô, lu: Hatati man Meonotai." 
1Chronicles4:14 Meonotai mar Ofera, Seraia mar Yoabi ter u Geharashim; gadia ve lu mbafan tomaveegh doo doo." 
1Chronicles4:15 Ônov mba Kalebu wan u Yefune yô, lu: Iru man Ela man Naam; man ônov mba Ela lu: Kenashi." 
1Chronicles4:16 Ônov mba Yehalelel yô, lu: Shiv man Shifa, Tiria kua Asarel." 
1Chronicles4:17 Ônov mba Esera yô, lu: Yeter man Meredi man Efer man Yalon; mban yô, ka ônov mba Bitia, wan u Farao u kwase, u Meredi er yô; a mar Miriam man Shamai, man Isheba ter u Eshetemoa." 
1Chronicles4:18 Kwase na, wan u Mbayuda, mar Yeredi ter u Gedor, man Heber ter u Soko, kua Yekutiel ter u Sanoa." 
1Chronicles4:19 Ônov mba kwase u Hodia, anmgbian u Naham u kwase yô, lu: ter u Keila, Orgarmi, man Eshetemoa, Ormaakati." 
1Chronicles4:20 Ônov mba Shimon yô, lu: Amnon man Rina man Benhanan man Tilon. Ônov mba Ishi yô, lu: Soheti man Ben-soheti." 
1Chronicles4:21 Ônov mba Shela wan u Yuda yô, lu: Er, ter u Leka, man Laada ter u Maresha, man icombor i ya u mba ve tumen akondo a pupuu a legh legh, hen Bete-ashebea," 
1Chronicles4:22 man Yokim, kua ior mba Koseba, man Yoashi man Sarafi mba ve tema tor ken Moabi, man Yashubi-lehem (akaangeren ne ka a ngise je)." 
1Chronicles4:23 Mban ka mbamaantyev, mba ve tema ken Netaim man Gedera la; ve tema keregh a tor imôngo, ve lu eren un tom." 
1Chronicles4:24 Ônov mba Shimeon yô, lu: Nemuel man Yamin man Yaribi man Sera man Shaul;" 
1Chronicles4:25 Shalum wan na, Mibesam wan na, Mishema wan na." 
1Chronicles4:26 Ônov mba Mishema yô, lu: wan na Hamuel, wan na Sakur, wan na Shimei." 
1Chronicles4:27 Shimei yô, lu a ônov mba nomso pue kar ataratar, ônov mba kasev ataratar; kpa anngôôv nav yô, mar kpishi ga, man icombor ve cii seer er ônov mba Yuda nahan ga." 
1Chronicles4:28 Ve tema ken Bersheba man Molada kua Hasar-shual 
1Chronicles4:29 man hen Bila man hen Esem man hen Toladi," 
1Chronicles4:30 hen Betuel kpaa man hen Horma man hen Shikelagi," 
1Chronicles4:31 man hen Bete-markaboti man Hasar-sushim man hen Bete-biri man hen Shaaraim. Ka agar a ve je ne, zan zan ar sha ayange a tor u Davidi." 
1Chronicles4:32 Angarev vev yô, lu Etam man Ain man Rimon man Token man Ashan, lu agar ataan;" 
1Chronicles4:33 kua agar a ve cii, a a kase agar shon la zan zan ar hen Baal. Ka ajiir a ve a teman je la, ve nger ati a icombor ve." 
1Chronicles4:34 Man Meshobabi kua Yameleki man Yosha wan u Amashia," 
1Chronicles4:35 man Yoel man Yehu wan u Yoshibia, wan u Seraia, wan u Ashiel," 
1Chronicles4:36 man Elioenai man Yaakoba man Yeshohaia man Asaia man Adiel man Yeshimiel man Benaia," 
1Chronicles4:37 man Shisa wan u Shifi, wan u Alon, wan u Yedaia, wan u Shimeri, wan u Shemaia," 
1Chronicles4:38 mban mba i ter ve sha ati ve ne lu uityombaiorov sha icombor ve; uya mba uter vev kpaa seer kpishi. 
1Chronicles4:39 Ve za zan zan ar hen pe nyôron Gedor hen pev la, vegher u sha ityoughkitaregh, sha u keren ajiir a toho sha ci u akumauile ve." 
1Chronicles4:40 Ve zua a toho u hômon u dedoo, tar la gbangese lu ving, bem bem; gadia mba ve tema her tsuaa la, lu Mbaham je." 
1Chronicles4:41 Mba i nger ati ve mbala, ve va sha ayange a Hesekia tor u Yuda, ve yôhôl utenti vev, ve hemba Mbameun mba i kohol ve her la, ve tim ve purututu zan zan nyian, maa ve tema sha ityouv vev; gadia ajiir a yan toho lu heregh sha ci u akumauile ve." 
1Chronicles4:42 Mbagenev ken a ve, ka ônov mba Shimeon, ior deri utaan, ve za sha uwo u Seir; mbahemenev vev yô, lu: Pelatia man Nearia man Refaia man Ushiel, ônov mba Ishi." 
1Chronicles4:43 Ve hemba Mbaamaleki mba lu ve war, ve shi her la, maa ve tema heregh zan zan nyian." 
1Chronicles5:1 Man ônov mba Ruben waniunda u Iserael (gadia un ka waniunda; kpa er a hôngor a gambe u ter na yô, i gema tamen na i na ônov mba Yosev, wan u Iserael, nahan i kera nger tsombor na er ka wan u tamen ga." 
1Chronicles5:2 Gadia Yuda hemba anmgbianev nav, ka ker a na je orkurantar due ye; kpa dyako u iunda yô, hingir u Yosev);" 
1Chronicles5:3 ônov mba Ruben waniunda u Iserael yô, lu: Hanoki man Palu, Heseron man Karmi." 
1Chronicles5:4 Ônov mba Yoel yô, lu: Wan na Shemaia, wan na Gogi, wan na Shimei," 
1Chronicles5:5 wan na Mika, wan na Reaia, wan na Baal," 
1Chronicles5:6 wan na Beeri u Tilgati-pilneser tor u Ashiria yem a na uikangen la, un lu ityoor u Mbaruben." 
1Chronicles5:7 Man anmgbianev nav, sha icombor ve er i nger ati ve sha mar ve yô, ka: Yeiel orhemen, man Sekaria," 
1Chronicles5:8 man Bela wan u Asase, wan u Shema, wan u Yoel u a tema hen Aroer zan zan za ar hen Nebo man Baal-meon la;" 
1Chronicles5:9 shi a tema vegher u sha ityoughkitaregh zan zan za ar henpe nyôron ken desereti hii hen ifi u Uferati je, gadia ilev vev seer ngeen ken tar u Gileadi." 
1Chronicles5:10 Sha ayange a Saulu la, ve nôngo ityav a Mbahager ve hemba ve, maa ve za tema ken utenti vev ken tar u Gileadi vegher u sha ityoughkitaregh la cii." 
1Chronicles5:11 Ônov mba Gadi tema sha ishigh vegh ken tar u Bashan zan zan za ar hen Saleka; 
1Chronicles5:12 Yoel lu orhemen, Shafam gema dondo; Yanai man Shafati kpaa tema ken Bashan;" 
1Chronicles5:13 anmgbianev vev mba sha uipaven mba uya mba uter vev yô, ka: Mikael man Meshulam man Sheba man Yoraia man Yakan man Shia kua Eber; lu utaankaruhar je." 
1Chronicles5:14 Mban lu ônov mba Abihail wan u Huri, Wan u Yaroa, wan u Gileadi, wan u Mikael, wan u Yeshishai, wan u Yado, wan u Bushi;" 
1Chronicles5:15 Ahi wan u Abediel, wan u Guni, lu orhemen u uya mba uter vev." 
1Chronicles5:16 Ve tema ken Gileadi ken Bashan man ken agar a na, man ken ajiir a toho a Sharon, zan zan za ar hen akighir a a." 
1Chronicles5:17 Mban cii i nger ati a ve ken takerada u icombor ve, sha ayange a Yotam tor u Yuda man sha ayange a Yerobiam tor u Iserael." 
1Chronicles5:18 Ônov mba Ruben man Mbagadi man vegherkwe u Manase, anomaior a a tôôn perutya man sanker, man mbakerenavaan, mbafantyav yô, ve lu ior dubu akunduahar kar unyiin man deri utaankaruhar man akunduatar, ka mba ve zaan ityav je la." 
1Chronicles5:19 Ve nôngo ityav a Mbahager man a Yetur man Nafishe man Nodabi. 
1Chronicles5:20 Ve zua a iwasen sha u nôngon ityav a ve, Mbahager hingir sha ikev ve, kua mba ve lu a ve imôngo la cii; gadia ve vaa a Aôndo ken utya, Un kpaa A ungwa zamber ve, er ve suur sha a Na yô." 
1Chronicles5:21 Ve kura uzendenya vev: urakumi dubu akunduahargber, man iyôngo dubu deri uhar man akunduahargber, man ujaki dubu uhar, kua ior dubu deri kpaa." 
1Chronicles5:22 Gadia i wua ior ngee, sha ci u ityav mbila lu mbi Aôndo yô, maa ve tema ken ajiir a ve sha ityouv vev zan zan shighe u i yem a ve uikangen la." 
1Chronicles5:23 Ônov mba vegherkwe u Manase yô, ve tema ken tar la, ve ngee, ve hii hen Bashan zan zan za ar hen Baal-hermon man Senir kua uwo u Hermon." 
1Chronicles5:24 Mbahemenev mba uya mba uter vev ka: Efer man Ishi man Eliel man Aseriel man Yeremia man Hodavia man Yadiel, ve lu anomaior a zan ati, mbahemenev mba uya mba uter vev." 
1Chronicles5:25 Kpa ve per atindi a Aôndo u uter vev, ve er idya ve dondo mbaaôndo mba ior mba hen tar la, mba Aôndo lu tim ve sha ishigh vegh kera la." 
1Chronicles5:26 Tsô Aôndo u Iserael tor jijingi u Pul tor u Ashiria la ityô, man jijingi u Tilgati-pilneser tor u Ashiria; tsô a va kura Mbaruben man Mbagadi kua vegherkwe u Manase, a yem a mi uikangen ken Hala man Habor man Hara man hen ifi u Gosan zan zan nyian." 
1Chronicles6:1 Ônov mba Levi yô, lu: Gershon, Kohati man Merari." 
1Chronicles6:2 Ônov mba Kohati yô, lu: Amram man Isehar man Heberon kua Ushiel." 
1Chronicles6:3 Ônov mba Amram yô, lu: Aron man Mose man Miriam. Ônov mba Aron yô, lu: Nadabi man Abihu man Eleasar man Itamar." 
1Chronicles6:4 Eleasar mar Pinehashi, Pinehashi mar Abishua," 
1Chronicles6:5 Abishua mar Buki man Buki mar Ushi," 
1Chronicles6:6 Ushi mar Serahia man Serahia mar Merayoti," 
1Chronicles6:7 Merayoti mar Amaria man Amaria mar Ahitubi," 
1Chronicles6:8 Ahitubi mar Sadoki man Sadoki mar Ahimaashi," 
1Chronicles6:9 Ahimaashi mar Asaria man Asaria mar Yohanan," 
1Chronicles6:10 Yohanan mar Asaria (ka wen lu eren tom u pristi ken iyou i Solomon maa ken Yerusalem la)," 
1Chronicles6:11 Asaria mar Amaria man Amaria mar Ahitubi," 
1Chronicles6:12 Ahitubi mar Sadoki man Sadoki mar Shalum," 
1Chronicles6:13 Shalum mar Hilkia man Hilkia mar Asaria," 
1Chronicles6:14 Asaria mar Seraia man Seraia mar Yehosadaki; 
1Chronicles6:15 Yehosadaki yem a Yuda kua Yerusalem imôngo zum u TER yem a ve uikangen sha ikev i Nebukadinesar la. 
1Chronicles6:16 Ônov mba Levi yô, lu: Gershon man Kohati man Merari." 
1Chronicles6:17 Ati a ônov mba Gershon er: Libeni man Shimei. 
1Chronicles6:18 Ônov mba Kohati yô, lu: Amram man Isehar man Heberon kua Ushiel." 
1Chronicles6:19 Ônov mba Merari yô, lu: Maheli man Mushi. Icombor i Mbalevi sha uya mba uter vev yô, ka:" 
1Chronicles6:20 U Gershon yô, ka: wan na Libeni, wan na Yahati, wan na Shima," 
1Chronicles6:21 wan na Yoa, wan na Ido, wan na Sera, wan na Yeaterai." 
1Chronicles6:22 Ônov mba Kohati yô, ka: wan na Aminadabi, wan na Kora, wan na Ashir," 
1Chronicles6:23 wan na Elkana, wan na Ebiasav, wan na Ashir," 
1Chronicles6:24 wan na Tahati, wan na Uriel, wan na Ushia, wan na Shaul." 
1Chronicles6:25 Ônov mba Elkana yô, ka: Amasai man Ahimoti." 
1Chronicles6:26 Sha kwagh u Elkana yô, ônov mba Elkana ka: wan na Sofaia, wan na Nahati," 
1Chronicles6:27 wan na Eliabi, wan na Yeroham, wan na Elkana." 
1Chronicles6:28 Ônov mba Samuel yô, waniunda ka Yoel, idyondon ka Abiya." 
1Chronicles6:29 Ônov mba Merari yô, ka: Maheli, wan na Libeni, wan na Shimei, wa na Usa," 
1Chronicles6:30 wan na Shimea, wan na Hagia, wan na Asaia." 
1Chronicles6:31 Ka mba Davidi ver ve, ve waan atsam ken iyou i TER zum u areki zua a mmem la," 
1Chronicles6:32 Ve lu mbawanatsam sha ishigh ki tabernakel u tenti u kohol ker zan zan ar sha shighe u Solomon maa iyou i TER ken Yerusalem la; ve ver ishima sha tom ve sha dondo sha dondo. 
1Chronicles6:33 Mban ka mba ve lu eren tom la a ônov vev ne: Ken ônov mba Mbakohati yô, lu Heman orwancam, wan u Yoel, wan u Samuel," 
1Chronicles6:34 wan u Elkana, wan u Yeroham, wan u Eliel, wan u Toa," 
1Chronicles6:35 wan u Sufi, wan u Elkana, wan u Mahati, wan u Amasai," 
1Chronicles6:36 wan u Elkana, wan u Yoel, wan u Asaria, wan u Sefania," 
1Chronicles6:37 wan u Tahati, wan u Ashir, wan u Ebiasav, wan u Kora," 
1Chronicles6:38 wan u Isehar, wan u Kohati, wan u Levi, wan u Iserael." 
1Chronicles6:39 Anngô na yô, lu Asav, u a tilen un ken uwegh ku yanegh; ka Asav wan u Berekia, wan u Shimea," 
1Chronicles6:40 wan u Mikael, wan u Baaseia, wan u Malkiya," 
1Chronicles6:41 wan u Eteni, wan u Sera, wan u Adaia," 
1Chronicles6:42 wan u Etan, wan u Shima, wan u Shimei," 
1Chronicles6:43 wan u Yahati, wan u Gershon, wan u Levi." 
1Chronicles6:44 Ken uwegh ku imesegh yô, lu anmgbianev vev, ônov mba Merari; ka Etan wan u Kishi, wan u Abedi wan u Maluki," 
1Chronicles6:45 wan u Hashabia, wan u Amashia, wan u Hilkia," 
1Chronicles6:46 wan u Amshi, wan u Bani, wan u Shemer," 
1Chronicles6:47 wan u Maheli, wan u Mushi, wan u Merari, wan u Levi." 
1Chronicles6:48 I ver anmgbianev vev Mbalevi sha ci u tom u tabernakel u iyou i Aôndo cii. 
1Chronicles6:49 Kpa Aron man ônov nav yô, ve naan nagh sha atse a nanden nagh sha mi la kua sha atse a kwaghhumandoon sha ci u tom u ken icighanjiir u hemban cii la, man sha u nan iwom sha ci u Iserael, sha kwagh u Mose wanakiriki u Aôndo kaa la cii." 
1Chronicles6:50 Ônov mba Aron yô, ka: wan na Eleasar, wan na Pinehashi, wan na Abishua;" 
1Chronicles6:51 wan na Buki, wan na Ushi, wan na Serahia," 
1Chronicles6:52 wan na Merayoti, wan na Amaria, wan na Ahitubi," 
1Chronicles6:53 wan na Sadoki, wan na Ahimaashi." 
1Chronicles6:54 Ajiir a ve a teman sha mhaa u afo a ve ken tar ve yô, ka a ne: Ônov mba Aron mba ken tsombor u Mbakohati (gadia kwar u hiihii lu u ve)," 
1Chronicles6:55 i na ve Heberon ken tar u Yuda kua akôngo a a kase un la; 
1Chronicles6:56 kpa ishule i hen gar man angarev nav yô, i na Kalebu wan u Yefune." 
1Chronicles6:57 Ônov mba Aron yô, i na ve agar a waren ker, ka Heberon, man Libena kua akôngo a na, man Yatir, man Eshetemoa kua akôngo a na," 
1Chronicles6:58 man Hilen kua akôngo a na, man Debir kua akôngo a na," 
1Chronicles6:59 man Ashan kua akôngo a na, man Bete-shemeshi kua akôngo a na." 
1Chronicles6:60 Ken kwe u Benyamin yô, ka Geba kua akôngo a na, man Alemeti kua akôngo a na, man Anatoti kua akôngo a na. Agar a ve cii a ken icombor ve, lu agar pue kar atar." 
1Chronicles6:61 Ônov mba Kohati mba ve shi yô, i na ve agar pue sha ishor i eren ken tsombor u kwe, ka vegherkwe, ka vegher u Manase je la." 
1Chronicles6:62 Ônov mba Gershon yô, sha icombor ve, i na ve agar pue kar atar ken kwe u Isakar man ken kwe u Asher, man ken kwe u Nafetali, man ken kwe u Manase ken Bashan." 
1Chronicles6:63 Ônov mba Merari yô, i na ve agar pue kar ahar sha ishor i eren sha icombor ve, ken kwe u Ruben man ken kwe u Gadi man ken kwe u Sebulon." 
1Chronicles6:64 Ônov mba Iserael na Mbalevi agar kua akôngo a a. 
1Chronicles6:65 Ka sha ishor i eren, ve na agar a i ter ati a a ye, ken kwe u ônov mba Yuda man ken kwe u ônov mba Shimeon man ken u ônov mba Benyamin." 
1Chronicles6:66 Mbagenev ken icombor i ônov mba Kohati zua a agar a ve a teman ker ken kwe u Eferaim. 
1Chronicles6:67 I na ve agar a waren ker, ka Shekem sha tar u iwoogh u Eferaim kua akôngo a na, Geser kpaa kua akôngo a na," 
1Chronicles6:68 man Yokemeam kua akôngo a na, man Bete-horon kua akôngo a na," 
1Chronicles6:69 man Aiyalon kua akôngo a na, man Gati-rimon kua akôngo a na;" 
1Chronicles6:70 ken vegherkwe u Manase yô, ka Aner kua akôngo a na, man Bileam kua akôngo a na, sha ci u tsombor u ônov mba Kohati mba ve shi la." 
1Chronicles6:71 Ônov mba Gershon yô, i na ve agar ken tsombor u vegherkwe u Manase, ka Golan ken Bashan a akôngo a na;" 
1Chronicles6:72 man ken kwe u Isakar yô, ka Kedeshi a akôngo a na, man Daberati a akôngo a na," 
1Chronicles6:73 man Ramoti a akôngo a na, man Anem a akôngo a na;" 
1Chronicles6:74 ken kwe u Asher yô, ka Mashal a akôngo a na man Abedon a akôngo a na," 
1Chronicles6:75 man Hukoki a akôngo a na, man Rehobi a akôngo a na;" 
1Chronicles6:76 ken kwe u Nafetali yô, ka Kedeshi ken Galilia a akôngo a na, man Hamon a akôngo a na, man Kiriataim a akôngo a na." 
1Chronicles6:77 Mbalevi mba ve shi ken ônov mba Merari la, i na ve agar ken kwe u Sebulon, ka: Rimon a akôngo a na, man Tabor a akôngo a na;" 
1Chronicles6:78 man yande Yordan hen Yeriko, Yordan vegher u sha ityoughkitaregh la, ken kwe u Ruben yô, i na ve Beser ken ikôngo a akôngo a na man Yasa a akôngo a na," 
1Chronicles6:79 man Kedemoti a akôngo a na, man Mefaati a akôngo a na;" 
1Chronicles6:80 man ken kwe u Gadi yô, ka: Ramoti ken Gileadi a akôngo a na, man Mahanaim a akôngo a na," 
1Chronicles6:81 man Heshebon a akôngo a na, man Yaser a akôngo a na." 
1Chronicles7:1 Ônov mba Isakar yô, lu: Tola man Pua man Yashubi man Shimeron, ve lu unyiin." 
1Chronicles7:2 Ônov mba Tola yô, lu: Ushi man Refaia man Yeriel man Yahemai man Ibesam man Shemuel, mbavesen mba sha uya mba uter vev; ka ior mba Tola je la, ka anomaior a ageegh ken ikov ve; sha ayange a Davidi la, ve kuma ior dubu ikundu kar uhar man deri ataratar." 
1Chronicles7:3 Ônov mba Ushi yô, lu Iserahia; ônov mba Iserahia yô, lu; Mikael man Obadia man Yoel man Ishia, ve lu utaan; ve cii ve lu uityombaiorov;" 
1Chronicles7:4 man akumautya lu a ve imôngo sha ikov ve sha uya mba uter vev; ve lu ior dubu ikundugber kar ataratar; gadia ve lu a kasev man ônov kpishi. 
1Chronicles7:5 Anmgbianev vev kpaa, mba ve lu ken icombor i Isakar la cii, ve lu anomaior a ageegh, lu ior dubu akunduanyiin kar utaankaruhar, ka iyenge ve i sha takerada u icombor ve je la." 
1Chronicles7:6 Ônov mba Benyamin yô, lu: Bela man Beker man Yediael, ve lu utar." 
1Chronicles7:7 Ônov mba Bela yô, lu: Esebon man Ushi man Ushiel man Yerimoti man Iri, ve lu utaan; ka uityombaiorov mba sha uya mba uter, anomaior a ageegh; iyenge ve sha takerada u icombor ve lu ior dubu ikundu kar uhar ior kar ikundugber kar unyiin." 
1Chronicles7:8 Ônov mba Beker yô, lu: Semira man Yoashi man Elieser man Elioenai man Omri man Yeremoti man Abiya man Anatoti man Alemeti." 
1Chronicles7:9 Mban cii lu ônov mba Beker; iyenge i sha takerada u icombor ve, sha ikov ve, uityombaiorov mba sha uya mba uter vev, anomaior a ageegh, lu ior dubu ikundu man deri uhar." 
1Chronicles7:10 Ônov mba Yediael yô, lu Bilhan; man ônov mba Bilhan yô, ka: Yeushi man Benyamin man Ehudi man Kenaana man Setan man Tarshishi man Ahishahar." 
1Chronicles7:11 Mban cii ka ônov mba Yediael uityombaiorov mba sha uya mba uter vev, anomaior a ageegh, lu ior dubu pue kar utaankaruhar man deri uhar mba ve zaan a akumautya imôngo yô." 
1Chronicles7:12 Shupim man Hupim kpaa lu ônov mba Ir; Hushim lu ônov mba Aher. 
1Chronicles7:13 Ônov mba Nafetali yô, lu: Yahashiel man Guni man Yeser man Shalum, ônov mba Bila." 
1Chronicles7:14 Ônov mba Manase yô, lu: Aseriel u kwase na u sha uika wan u Aram mar yô (a mar Makir ter u Gileadi;" 
1Chronicles7:15 Makir er kwase ken Hupim man Shupim, iti i anngô na u kwase er Maaka), iti i u sha uhar er Selofehadi; Selofehadi lu a ônov mba kasev." 
1Chronicles7:16 Maaka kwase u Makir mar wan u nomso, a ii un iti er Pereshi; man iti i anngô na er Shereshi; ônov nav yô, ka Ulam man Rakem." 
1Chronicles7:17 Ônov mba Ulam yô, lu: Bedan. Mban lu ônov mba Gileadi wan u Makir, wan u Manase." 
1Chronicles7:18 Anngô na u kwase Hamoleketi mar Ishehodi man Abieser kua Mahela. 
1Chronicles7:19 Ônov mba Shemida yô, lu: Ahian man Shekem man Likehi kua Aniam." 
1Chronicles7:20 Ônov mba Eferaim yô, lu: Shutela, wan na Beredi, wan na Tahati, wan na Eleada, wan na Tahati," 
1Chronicles7:21 wan na Sabadi, wan na Shutela, wan na Eser kua Eleadi; ior mba Gati mba i mar ve ken tar la wua ve sha ci u ve sen sha u va kuran ve ilev yô." 
1Chronicles7:22 Tsô Eferaim ter ve zungwe ku ve ayange kpishi, nahan anmgbianev nav va sur un ishima." 
1Chronicles7:23 A yav a kwase na, a wa iyav a mar wan u nomso, a ii un iti er Beria, gadia lu shighe u ican tser ya na la." 
1Chronicles7:24 Wan na u kwase lu Sheera, a maa Bete-horon u Shin man u Sha, kua Usen-sheera." 
1Chronicles7:25 Refa lu wan na, wan na Reshev, wan na Tela, wan na Tahan," 
1Chronicles7:26 wan na Ladan, wan na Amihudi, wan na Elishama," 
1Chronicles7:27 wan na Nun, wan na Yosua." 
1Chronicles7:28 Akaa ve man ajiir a ve a teman yô, lu Betel kua agar a na; vegher u sha ityoughkitaregh yô, lu Naaran; vegher u shin ityôtar yô, lu Geser man agar a na, man Shekem kua agar a na zan zan za ar hen Aya man agar a na;" 
1Chronicles7:29 man hen akighiratar a Manase yô, lu Bete-shean kua agar a na, man Taanaki kua agar a na, man Megido kua agar a na, man Dor kua agar a na. Ken angan, ônov mba Yosev wan u Iserael ve tema ker." 
1Chronicles7:30 Ônov mba Asher yô, lu: Imna man Isheva man Ishevi man Beria, kua Sera anngô ve u kwase." 
1Chronicles7:31 Ônov mba Beria yô, lu: Heber man Malkiel; un lu ter u Birsaiti." 
1Chronicles7:32 Heber mar Yafeleti man Shomer man Hotam, kua Shua anngô ve u kwase." 
1Chronicles7:33 Ônov mba Yafeleti yô, lu: Pasaki man Bimhal man Ashevati. Ka ônov mba Yafeleti je la." 
1Chronicles7:34 Ônov mba Shemer yô, lu: Ahi man Roga man Yehuba man Aram." 
1Chronicles7:35 Ônov mba Helem anngô na yô, lu: Sofa man Imna man Sheleshi man Amal." 
1Chronicles7:36 Ônov mba Sofa yô, lu: Sua man Harnefer man Shual man Beri man Imra;" 
1Chronicles7:37 Beser man Hodi man Shama man Shilesha man Iteran man Beera. 
1Chronicles7:38 Ônov mba Yeter yô, lu: Yefune man Pisepa man Ara." 
1Chronicles7:39 Ônov mba Ula yô, lu: Ara man Haniel man Rishia." 
1Chronicles7:40 Mban cii ka ônov mba Asher, uityombaiorov mba sha uya mba uter, uicuwanmbaiorov, anomaior a ageegh, mbahemenev mba atiator. Iyenge ve i i nger ken takerada u icombor sha ci u tom u utya yô, lu ior dubu ikundu kar ataratar." 
1Chronicles8:1 Benyamin mar Bela wan na u iunda, Ashebel lu idyondon na man Ahara lu u sha utar," 
1Chronicles8:2 Noha lu u sha unyiin man Rafa u sha utaan. 
1Chronicles8:3 Bela lu a ônov, ka Adar man Gera man Abihudi" 
1Chronicles8:4 man Abishua man Naaman man Ahoa 
1Chronicles8:5 man Gera man Shefufan kua Huram. 
1Chronicles8:6 Mban ka ônov mba Ehudi (ve lu uityombaiorov mba sha uya mba uter, ve tema ken Geba, i yem a ve uikangen hen Manahati;" 
1Chronicles8:7 ka Naaman man Ahiya man Gera, ve yem a ve uikangen ye), a mar Usa kua Ahihudi." 
1Chronicles8:8 Shaharaim mar ônov ken tar u Moabi, ken masejime u a na kasev nav Hushim kua Baara gbenda kera la." 
1Chronicles8:9 A mar Yobabi a kwase na Hodeshi, kua Shibia man Mesha man Malkam" 
1Chronicles8:10 man Yeushi man Shakia kua Mirma. Ka ônov nav je la, uityombaiorov mba sha uya mba uter." 
1Chronicles8:11 A mar Abitubi man Elpaal a Hushim. 
1Chronicles8:12 Ônov mba Elpaal yô, lu Eber man Misham, man Shemedi u a maa Ono kua Lodi a agar a ve," 
1Chronicles8:13 man Beria kua Shema mba ve lu uityombaiorov sha uya mba uter, ve tema ken Aiyalon, ve zenda ior i Gati kera," 
1Chronicles8:14 man Ahio man Shashaki man Yeremoti 
1Chronicles8:15 man Sebadia man Aradi man Eder 
1Chronicles8:16 man Mikael man Ishepa man Yoha, ônov mba Beria" 
1Chronicles8:17 man Sebadi man Meshulam man Hiseki man Heber 
1Chronicles8:18 man Ishemerai man Iselia man Yobabi, ônov mba Elpaal;" 
1Chronicles8:19 man Yakim man Shikeri man Sabedi 
1Chronicles8:20 man Elienai man Shiletai man Eliel 
1Chronicles8:21 man Adia man Beraia man Shimerati, ônov mba Shimei;" 
1Chronicles8:22 man Ishepan man Eber man Elier 
1Chronicles8:23 man Abedon man Shikeri man Hanan 
1Chronicles8:24 man Hanania man Elam man Antotiya 
1Chronicles8:25 man Ifedeia man Penuel, ônov mba Shashaki;" 
1Chronicles8:26 man Shamsherai man Sheharia man Atalia 
1Chronicles8:27 man Yaareshia man Eliya man Shikeri, ônov mba Yeroham." 
1Chronicles8:28 Ve lu uityombaiorov mba sha uya mba uter sha ikov ve, ka ashagbaior; ve tema ken Yerusalem." 
1Chronicles8:29 Ken Gibeon yô, ter u Gibeon lu ker, ka Yeiel, u i yer kwase na er Maaka la;" 
1Chronicles8:30 man wan na iunda u nomso iti na er Abedon, man Sur man Kishi man Baal man Nadabi" 
1Chronicles8:31 man Gedor man Ahio man Seker," 
1Chronicles8:32 man Mikeloti ter u Shimea. Ve kpaa ve tema a anmgbianev vev ken Yerusalem imôngo, ve zua ishigh a anmgbianev vev." 
1Chronicles8:33 Ner mar Kishi, Kishi gema mar Saulu; Saulu gema mar Yonatan man Malkishua man Abinadabi kua Eshebaal;" 
1Chronicles8:34 wan u Yonatan yô, lu Meribibaal; Meribibaal mar Mika." 
1Chronicles8:35 Ônov mba Mika yô, lu: Piton man Meleki man Tarea man Ahashi;" 
1Chronicles8:36 Ahashi gema mar Yehoada; Yehoada mar Alemeti man Asemaveti man Shimeri; Shimeri mar Mosa; 
1Chronicles8:37 Mosa mar Binea; wan na lu Rafa, wan na Eleasa, wan na Asel." 
1Chronicles8:38 Asel lu a ônov mba nomso ataratar, ati a ve er: Aserikam man Bokeru man Ishemael man Shearia man Obadia man Hanan; mban cii lu ônov mba Asel." 
1Chronicles8:39 Ônov mba Esheki anngô na yô, lu wan na u iunda Ulam, Yerushi lu u sha uhar man Elifeleti lu u sha utar." 
1Chronicles8:40 Ônov mba Ulam yô, lu anomaior a ageegh, ve lu ior mba fan avaan, ve lu a ônov kpishi kua ônov mba ônov vev, ve lu ior deri man akunduahargber. Mban cii ka ônov mba Benyamin." 
1Chronicles9:1 Kape i nger ati a Iserael cii ken takerada u icombor ve la; nenge, i nger a ken ruamabera u utor mba Iserael. I yem a Yuda uikangen ken Babilon sha ci u atindi ve a peren la." 
1Chronicles9:2 Mba ve vande va teman ken ityar ve ken agar a ve yô, lu Iserael man upristi man Mbalevi kua mbasôrontempel." 
1Chronicles9:3 Ônov mba Yuda man mba Benyamin man mba Eferaim kua Manase ve pande ve tema ken Yerusalem," 
1Chronicles9:4 lu: Utai wan u Amihudi, wan u Omri, wan u Imri, wan u Bani; ken ônov mba Perese, wan u Yuda." 
1Chronicles9:5 Man ken Mbashilon yô, lu: Asaia wan u iunda a ônov nav." 
1Chronicles9:6 Man ken ônov mba Sera yô, lu: Yehuel man anmgbianev vev, ve lu ior deri ataratar man akunduanyiingber." 
1Chronicles9:7 Ken ônov mba Benyamin yô, lu: Salu wan u Meshulam, wan u Hodavia, wan u Hasenua;" 
1Chronicles9:8 man Ibeneia wan u Yeroham man Ela wan u Ushi, wan u Mikeri; man Meshulam wan u Shefatia, wan u Reuel, wan u Ibeniya;" 
1Chronicles9:9 kua anmgbianev vev sha ikov ve; ve lu ior deri utaankarunyiin man akunduahargber kar ataratar. Mban cii lu uityombaiorov mba sha uya mba uter ken icombor ve. 
1Chronicles9:10 Ken upristi yô, lu Yedaia man Yehoyaribi man Yakin;" 
1Chronicles9:11 man Asaria wan u Hilkia, wan u Meshulam, wan u Sadoki, wan u Merayoti, wan u Ahitubi, orvesen u nengen sha iyou i Aôndo;" 
1Chronicles9:12 man Adaia wan u Yeroham, wan u Pashur, wan u Malkiya; man Maasai wan u Adiel, wan u Yasera, wan u Meshulam, wan u Meshilemiti, wan u Imer;" 
1Chronicles9:13 man anmgbianev vev, uityombaiorov mba sha uya mba uter vev; ve lu ior dubu man deri utaankaruhar man akunduatar; ve lu ior mba ve fa tom u eren ken iyou i Aôndo dedoo yô." 
1Chronicles9:14 Man ken Mbalevi yô, lu Shemaia, wan u Hashubi, wan u Aserikam, wan u Hashabia, ken ônov mba Merari;"
