1Chronicles9:15 man Bakebakar man Hereshi man Galal man Matania, wan u Mika, wan u Shikeri, wan u Asav;" 
1Chronicles9:16 man Obadia, wan u Shemaia, wan u Galal, wan u Yedutun; man Berekia, wan u Asa, wan u Elkana; ka mba ve tema ken agar a Mbanetofati je la." 
1Chronicles9:17 Mbakuranhunda yô, lu: Shalum man Akubi man Talmon man Ahiman kua anmgbianev vev; ka Shalum lu orvesen ye;" 
1Chronicles9:18 ngu sha hunda u tor vegher u sha ityoughkitaregh heregh zan zan hegen; ve lu mbakuranhunda u afo a ônov mba Levi. 
1Chronicles9:19 Shalum wan u Kore, wan u Ebiasav, wan u Kora, man anmgbianev nav mba ken ya u ter na, ka Mbakora je la, i wa ve tom sha ikev, ve lu kuran ihinda i tenti; uter vev vande lun mbakuran hunda u nyôron ken afo a TER." 
1Chronicles9:20 Pinehashi wan u Eleasar lu or u nengen sha a ve, sha ayange a tsuaa la; TER lu a na imôngo." 
1Chronicles9:21 Sekaria wan u Meshelemia lu orkuran hunda u tenti u kohol ker la; 
1Chronicles9:22 mban cii mba i sange ve sha er ve lu mbakuran ihinda yô, lu ior deri uhar man pue kar uhar. Ve cii i nger ati ve ken takerada u icombor ve, ken agar a ve; ka Davidi kua Samuel ornengen akaa a ken hemen la, ve ver ve sha tom ve ye." 
1Chronicles9:23 Ve kua ônov vev, ve lu mbanengen sha ihinda i iyou i TER, ka iyou i tenti je la; ve lu mbakuran." 
1Chronicles9:24 Mbakuranihinda lu sha avegher anyiin, ka vegher u sha ityoughkitaregh man u shin ityôtar man u ken imbusutarimese man u ken imbusutariyan la." 
1Chronicles9:25 I ver anmgbianev vev mba ken agar a ve, er ve̱ nyôr tom a ve imôngo sha ashighe ashighe, hanmô ve nan nyôr ayange ataankarahar;" 
1Chronicles9:26 gadia mbakuran mba unyiin mba ve lu mbahemenev la, ve lu Mbalevi, ve lu sha tom gbem, ve lu nengen sha ayou kua sha akaa a i koso a ken iyou i Aôndo la yô." 
1Chronicles9:27 Ve kase iyou i Aôndo ve tsaan her, gadia i wa ve tom u kuran i sha ikev, ve bughun i kpaa hanma sev." 
1Chronicles9:28 Mbagenev lu mba nengen ikav mbi tomov; gadia i ôron iyenge i mbi shighe u nyôron a mi man u duen a mi kpaa. 
1Chronicles9:29 Shi i ver mbagenev kpaa sha u kuran ikav mbi ken iyou la, man uicighanmbaakaav cii, man shi u kuran mwem ma kengese man wain man mkurem man kwaghhumandoon kua ilyôghonov." 
1Chronicles9:30 Ônov mba upristi mbagenev lu mbasôron ilyôghonov nungwan mbi. 
1Chronicles9:31 Matitia, Orlevi, waniunda u Shalum, Orkora, lu or u nengen sha tom u kaan akaa sha atsenge." 
1Chronicles9:32 Anmgbianev vev mbagenev ken ônov mba Kohati ve lu nengen sha ubredi mba sha ishi, sha u sôron ve hanma iyange i memen." 
1Chronicles9:33 Man mbawanatsam kpaa lu, mbavesen mba sha uya mba uter mba Mbalevi, ve teman ken ayou a hen tempel la, i na ve tom ugen ga, gadia tugh man tetan cii, ve luun sha tom ve." 
1Chronicles9:34 Mban lu mbavesen mba sha uya mba uter ken Mbalevi, ve lu mbahemenev sha ikov ve; ve tema ken Yerusalem." 
1Chronicles9:35 Ken Gibeon yô, ter u Gibeon, Yeiel tema ker; iti i kwase na er Maaka," 
1Chronicles9:36 wan na u iunda lu Abedon, man Sur man Kishi man Baal man Ner man Nadabi" 
1Chronicles9:37 man Gedor man Ahio man Sekaria man Mikeloti. 
1Chronicles9:38 Mikeloti mar Shimean; ve kpaa ve tema a anmgbianev vev imôngo ken Yerusalem, ve zua ishiv a anmgbianev vev." 
1Chronicles9:39 Ner mar Kishi; Kishi gema mar Saulu; Saulu gema mar Yonatan man Malkishua man Abinadabi man Eshebaal. 
1Chronicles9:40 Wan u Yonatan yô, lu Meribibaal; Meribibaal mar Mika." 
1Chronicles9:41 Ônov mba Mika yô, lu Piton man Meleki man Taharea man Ahashi." 
1Chronicles9:42 Ahashi mar Yara; Yara mar Alemeti man Asemaveti kua Shimeri; Shimeri mar Mosa; 
1Chronicles9:43 Mosa mar Binea, wan na Refaia, wan na Eleasa, wan na Asel." 
1Chronicles9:44 Asel lu a ônov mba nomso ataratar, ati ve yô, lu: Aserikam, Bokeru, Ishemael, Shearia, Obadia man Hanan; ka ônov mba Asel je la." 
1Chronicles10:1 Tsô Mbafiliti nôngo ityav a Iserael; ior mba Iserael yevese Mbafiliti, i wua ve ken utya sha uwo u Gilboa." 
1Chronicles10:2 Nahan Mbafiliti cir sha Saulu a ônov nav nombuloo. Mbafiliti wua ônov mba Saulu, Yonatan man Abinadabi kua Malkishua." 
1Chronicles10:3 Ityav imbishi Saulu tsung, mbaavaanev tsule un ngegh; cier un iyol kpishi a mbaavaanev." 
1Chronicles10:4 Tsô Saulu kaa a or u tilin un ikav mbi tswamev la er: Tsuwa sanker wou kumam i̱ due kera, sha er mbaipusuv mban ve̱ de va heen mo ga. Kpa or u tilin un ikav mbi tswamev la venda, gadia cier un iyol yum. Tsô Saulu ngohol sanker na ta sha mi pov." 
1Chronicles10:5 Tsô er or u tilin un ikav mbi tswamev nenge er Saulu a kpe yô, un kpaa a ta sha sanker na maa a kpe." 
1Chronicles10:6 Ka ape Saulu kpe a ônov nav utar la; nahan ya na cii kpe shighe môm. 
1Chronicles10:7 Zum u ior mba Iserael cii mba ve lu shin pev la nenge er ve yevese yô, man shi er Saulu kua ônov nav ve kpe kera kpaa yô, ve yevese ve undu agar a ve, nahan Mbafiliti kar va tema ker." 
1Chronicles10:8 Tsô kper nan er Mbafiliti va u va yan ishar i mbakpenev yô, ve kohol ikom i Saulu kua akom a ônov nav sha uwo u Gilboa." 
1Chronicles10:9 Ve er un akondo, ve gber un ityough, ve kura ikav nav mbi utyav, ve tindi a mi ken tar u Mbafiliti ningir tser cii, sha u i̱ za yôô loho la hen akombo a ve kua hen ior kpaa." 
1Chronicles10:10 Ve ver ikav nav mbi utyav ken iyou i mbaaôndo vev, ve mande ityough nagh ken iyou i Dagon." 
1Chronicles10:11 Kpa zum u ior mba Yabeshi-gileadi cii, ve ungwa kwagh u Mbafiliti ve er a Saulu la cii yô," 
1Chronicles10:12 anomaior cii mough, ve za tôô gundu u Saulu man akom a ônov nav, ve va a mi ken Yabeshi, ve va ii akuhe a ve hen itinekon i terebim ken Yabeshi, ve hôr kwaghyan ayange ataankarahar." 
1Chronicles10:13 Kape Saulu kpe sha ci u kwaghbo u a er TER la, man sha ci u a wa imo i TER iko ga, man sha ci u a pine jijingi u orkpen kwagh," 
1Chronicles10:14 a pine TER ga. Ka nahan man A wua un, A gema tor na la A na Davidi wan u Yese ye." 
1Chronicles11:1 Tsô Iserael cii kohol hen Davidi hen Heberon, ve kaa er; Nenge, se mba ikuhe you kua inyam you kpaa." 
1Chronicles11:2 Sha ayange a tsuaa a Saulu lu tor la je kpaa, lu we je u hemen Iserael, u duen a ve, shi u nyôron a ve kpaa ye; man TER, Aôndo wou, kaa a we er: Ka we ú kuran ior Av Iserael, shi ka we ú lu orhemen u ior Av Iserael kpaa ye." 
1Chronicles11:3 Tsô mbatamen mba Iserael cii ve va hen tor hen Heberon; Davidi ya ikur a ve hen Heberon sha ishigh ki TER; nahan ve shighe Davidi mkurem ve ver un tor sha Iserael, sha imo i TER i Samuel kaa la." 
1Chronicles11:4 Nahan Davidi kua Iserael cii ve yem hen Yerusalem (ka Yebushi je la). Mbayebushi, mba ve tema hen tar la kpaa ve lu her." 
1Chronicles11:5 Mba ve tema ken Yebushi la kaa a Davidi er: Ú nyôr heen ga. Nahan kpaa Davidi hemba garutya u Shion la, ka gar u Davidi je la." 
1Chronicles11:6 Tsô Davidi kaa er: Anti or u nana hii u hemban Mbayebushi yô, nana hingir orhemen man kurutya kpaa. Tsô Yoabi wan u Seruya vande unden, nahan i ver un orhemen." 
1Chronicles11:7 Tsô Davidi za tema sha garutya la; nahan maa i yilan un er, gar u Davidi." 
1Chronicles11:8 A maa gar la a ningir, hii hen Milo zan zan, yisa; Yoabi kpaa mase sôron gar u a shi la." 
1Chronicles11:9 Davidi seer taver yem hemen hemen; gadia TER u akum a Sha lu a na. 
1Chronicles11:10 Mban ka mbahemenev ken anomaior a ageegh a Davidi, mba ve var a na gbang gbang ken tor na, a Iserael imôngo cii, sha u kôron un tor sha kwaghôron u TER lu kaa sha Iserael la." 
1Chronicles11:11 Ka iyenge i anomaior a Davidi lu a mi ne, ka: Yashobeam wan u Hakemoni, orhemen u mba ikundugber; a kende iwange na sha ior deri utar, a wua ve icin i môm." 
1Chronicles11:12 Ken ijime na yô, lu Eleasar wan u Dodo, Orahohi, lu u môm ken anomaior a ageegh atar." 
1Chronicles11:13 A lu a Davidi imôngo hen Pasedamin, zum u Mbafiliti kohol her sha ci u utya yô; sule ugen lu her, shair iv ken u, tsô ior yevese Mbafiliti." 
1Chronicles11:14 Kpa ve za tile her atô u sule la, ve sendegh her, ve hemba Mbafiliti; TER na ve mhembe u vesen." 
1Chronicles11:15 Ior itiar ken mbahemenev mba ikundugber mbala ve sen ve va hen Davidi hen vande ken bar u Adulam; Mbafiliti gema haa afo shin pev u Refaim. 
1Chronicles11:16 Hen shighe la Davidi lu ken garutya man ikumutya i Mbafiliti gema haa ken Betelehem. 
1Chronicles11:17 Tsô sar Davidi ken ishima tsung, a kaa er: Ma or ma nan shi nem mngerem ma shin ijôr i Betelehem, i i lu hen hunda la, ma m me." 
1Chronicles11:18 Tsô mba utar mbala tor hen atô u ikumutya i Mbafiliti za kese mngerem shin ijôr i Betelehem i i lu hen hunda la, ve va na Davidi; kpa Davidi kera rumun u man ma ga, a gema a haa ma inya sha ishigh ki TER," 
1Chronicles11:19 a kaa er: Aôndo wam A̱ yangem er me er nahan ga yô; kera ka awambe a ior mba ve te uma ve kera gaa? Gadia ka sha icihi i uma ve je ve ve a ma ye. Ka nahan man a rumun u man ma ga ye. Ka kwagh u anomaior atar la er je ne. 
1Chronicles11:20 Abishai anngô u Yoabi lu orhemen ken a ve mba utar mbala, gadia a kende iwange na sha ior deri utar, a wua ve, nahan a due iti ken ve mba utar mban." 
1Chronicles11:21 Ve mba utar mban un hemba mba uhar icivir, nahan a hingir orhemen ve; nahan kpaa a ar sha mba utar mba hiihii mbala ga." 
1Chronicles11:22 Benaia wan u Yehoyada, wan u nomor ugen u ken Kabeseel, u a er akaavesen yô, a wua ônov mba Ariel, Ormoabi, uhar, shi a hungwa shin ihungwa a wua begha sha shighe u senou lu haan la." 
1Chronicles11:23 A shi a wua Origipiti or u taven tsung, ityaven na kuma aseva ataan; Origipiti la lu a iwange sha uwe, i lu er igyaikondo nahan; a sen hen a na a gbough, a tsuwe Origipiti la iwange sha uwe, a wua un sha iwange na la je." 
1Chronicles11:24 Ka akaa a Benaia wan u Yehoyada a er je ne; a due iti ken anomaior atar la. 
1Chronicles11:25 A hemba mba ikundugber mbala icivir je, kpa a ar sha mba utar mba hiihii mbala ga; Davidi ver un orvesen u mbakuran un." 
1Chronicles11:26 Anomaior a ageegh a akumautya lu: Asahel, anngô u Yoabi; Elhanan wan u Dodo u Betelehem;" 
1Chronicles11:27 Shamoti, Orharodi; Helese, Orpelon;" 
1Chronicles11:28 Ira, wan u Ikeshi, Ortekoa; Abieser, Oranatoti;" 
1Chronicles11:29 Shibekai, Orhusha; Ilai, Orahohi;" 
1Chronicles11:30 Maharai, Ornetofa; Heledi wan u Baana, Ornetofa;" 
1Chronicles11:31 Itai wan u Ribai u Gibea u ken ônov mba Benyamin; Benaia, Orpiraton;" 
1Chronicles11:32 Hurai u hen iwagh i Gaashi; Abiel, Orarbati;" 
1Chronicles11:33 Asemaveti, Orbahurim; Eliaba Orshaalbon;" 
1Chronicles11:34 ônov mba Hashem, Orgison; Yonatan wan u Shage, Orharar;" 
1Chronicles11:35 Ahiam wan u Sakar, Orharar; Elifal wan u Ur;" 
1Chronicles11:36 Hefer, Ormekarati; Ahiya, Orpelon;" 
1Chronicles11:37 Hesero, Orkarmel; Naarai wan u Esebai;" 
1Chronicles11:38 Yoel anngô u Natan; Mibehar wan u Hageri; 
1Chronicles11:39 Seleki, Oramon; Naharai, Orbeeroti, or u tilin Yoabi wan u Seruya ikav mbi utyav;" 
1Chronicles11:40 Ira, Oriteri; Garebi, Oriteri;" 
1Chronicles11:41 Uria, Orhiti; Sabadi wan u Ahelai;" 
1Chronicles11:42 Adina wan u Shisa, Orruben, orhemen u Mbaruben, ior ikundugber lu a na imôngo;" 
1Chronicles11:43 Hanan wan u Maaka; man Yoshafati, Ormiteni;" 
1Chronicles11:44 Ushia, Orasheterati; Shama man Yeiel, ônov mba Hotam, Oraroer;" 
1Chronicles11:45 Yediael, wan u Shimeri, man anngô na Yoha, Ortishi;" 
1Chronicles11:46 Eliel, Ormahav; man Yeribai man Yoshavia, ônov mba Elnaam; man Itema, Ormoabi;" 
1Chronicles11:47 Eliel man Obedi, man Yaashiel, Ormesoba." 
1Chronicles12:1 Mban yô, ka mba ve va kohol Davidi hen Shikelagi zum u a lu ken iuv sha ci u Saulu wan u Kishi la; ve kpaa ve lu anomaior a ageegh, ve lu wasen un ken utya." 
1Chronicles12:2 Ve lu mbakerenavaan, ve fa u eren kwagh ken uwegh ku yanegh kua ken ku imesegh kpaa, u keren awen sha mzu man u keren avaan sha ada; ve lu anmgbianev mba Saulu ken Benyamin." 
1Chronicles12:3 Ahieser lu orhemen, Yoashi gema dondo, ônov mba Shemaa, Orgibea; Yeshiel man Peleti, ônov mba Asemaveti; man Beraka, man Yehu, Oranatoti;" 
1Chronicles12:4 man Ishemaia, Orgibeon, lu nomor u ageegh ken mba ikundugber mbala, lu orhemen u mba ikundugber mbala; man Yeremia man Yahashiel man Yohanan man Yosabadi, Orgedera;" 
1Chronicles12:5 Elusai man Yerimoti man Bealia man Shemaria man Shefatia, Orharufi;" 
1Chronicles12:6 Elkana man Ishia man Asarel man Yoeser man Yashobeam, ka Mbakora je la;" 
1Chronicles12:7 man Yoela man Sebadia, ônov mba Yeroham u hen Gedor." 
1Chronicles12:8 Mbagadi kpaa pande za kohol Davidi hen garutya u ken toho, ka anomaior a ageegh a fan ityav a a lu a perutya kua iwange; ishiv vev yô, lu er ishiv mbi ubegha nahan, ve fa u nyôngoso er ivodura i sha iwo nahan;" 
1Chronicles12:9 Eser lu orhemen, Obadia dondo, man Eliabi lu u sha utar," 
1Chronicles12:10 Mishemana u sha unyiin, Yeremia u sha utaan," 
1Chronicles12:11 Atai u sha ataratar, Eliel u sha utaankaruhar," 
1Chronicles12:12 Yohanan u sha anigheni, Elsabadi u sha utaankarunyiin," 
1Chronicles12:13 Yeremia u sha pue, Makebanai u sha pue kar môm." 
1Chronicles12:14 Mban lu ken ônov mba Gadi, ve lu mbahemenev mba akumautya; u gban ijime la kuma sha ior deri, u hemban vesen kuma sha dubu." 
1Chronicles12:15 Ka ve je ve per Yordan sha uwer u hiihii ye, zum u ifi sar avenge cii la; ve zenda mba ve lu ken upev cii, vegher u sha ityoughkitaregh kua shin ityôtar kpaa." 
1Chronicles12:16 Tsô ônov mba Benyamin mbagenev kua mba Yuda kpaa va hen Davidi hen garutya. 
1Chronicles12:17 Nahan Davidi due za kegh ve gbenda, a kaa a ve er: Aluer nea va her a mo sha bem sha u va wasen mo yô, ishima yam ia var a ven; kpa aluer nea va sha u va nengen mker, nan mo sha ikev i mbaahendanev av, er ma ibo i lu sha ave am kpaa ga yô, Aôndo u uter asev A̱ nenge kwagh la, man A̱ yange ne." 
1Chronicles12:18 Tsô Jijingi sen tema sha Amasai, orhemen u mba ikundugber la, a kaa er: Se mba mba ou Davidi; se mba tan ken a we je, we wan u Yese. Lu bem bem; man bem a̱ lu a mbawasen we kpaa; gadia Aôndo wou ngu wasen we. Nahan Davidi rumun ve ver ve mbahemenev mba ikumutya." 
1Chronicles12:19 Mbamanase mbagenev kpaa pande za kohol Davidi, zum u a va a Mbafiliti imôngo, u va nôngon ityav a Saulu la (kpa a wase ve ga, gadia utor mba Mbafiliti hen imôngo, nahan ve na un gbenda er a̱ hide, ve lu kaan er: Una za kohol ter na Saulu nahan ityouv yasev mbia saa)." 
1Chronicles12:20 Er a lu zan hen Shikelagi yô, ior mba Manase, na ve za kohol un yô, lu: Adena man Yosabadi man Yediael man Mikael man Yosabadi man Elihu man Shiletai, mbahemenev mba ken Manase mba lun a ior dubu dubu sha ikev." 
1Chronicles12:21 Ve wase Davidi, ve nôngo ityav a ikum i mbanumungbenda la, gadia ve cii ve lu anomaior a ageegh je, shi ve lu mbahemenev kpaa ken akumautya." 
1Chronicles12:22 Ior va kohol Davidi ayange ayange sha u wasen un, zan zan hingir zegeikumutya, er ikumutya i Aôndo nahan." 
1Chronicles12:23 Iyenge i mbavesen, mba ve kange ikav mbi utyav, ve va hen Davidi hen Heberon, er vea gema tor vea na un sha ityough ki Saulu sha imo i TER yô, ka:" 
1Chronicles12:24 Ônov mba Yuda, mba ve lu a perutya man iwange yô, ve kuma ior dubu ataratar man deri anigheni mba ve kange ikav mbi utyav yô." 
1Chronicles12:25 Ônov mba Shimeon, anomaior a ageegh a a kohol iyol sha ci u utya yô, lu ior dubu utaankaruhar man deri môm." 
1Chronicles12:26 Ônov mba Levi yô, lu ior dubu unyiin man deri ataratar." 
1Chronicles12:27 Shi Yehoyada orhemen u Mbaaron kua ior dubu utar man deri utaankaruhar a na imôngo; 
1Chronicles12:28 man Sadoki, wanyekwaor, nomor u ageegh, kua ior mba hen ya u ter na, mbahemenev ikundu kar uhar." 
1Chronicles12:29 Ônov mba Benyamin, anmgbianev mba Saulu, lu ior dubu utar, mba ve hembe ngeen ken ve yô, ve var a ya u Saulu her." 
1Chronicles12:30 Ônov mba Eferaim yô, lu ior dubu ikundu man deri anigheni, anomaior a ageegh a a due iti ken uya mba uter vev." 
1Chronicles12:31 Vegherkwe u Manase yô, lu ior dubu pue kar anigheni mba i ter ve sha ati ati; ve va sha u va kôron Davidi tor." 
1Chronicles12:32 Mbaisakar, ior mba ve fa ashighe, nahan ve fa kwagh u a doo u Iserael una er yô, ve lu mbavesen ior deri uhar a anmgbianev vev cii mba ve lu sha ikev ve la kpaa." 
1Chronicles12:33 Sebulon, mba ve kuma u nyôron ken akumautya, ve fa u tangen ityav a hanma inja ikav mbi utyav yô, lu ior dubu akunduahargber; ve wan ago iyol sha ci u utya, ve zua doo doo ve lu a asema ahar ga." 
1Chronicles12:34 Nafetali yô, mbahemenev lu dubu, man ior mbagenev dubu ikundugber kar utaankaruhar a ve imôngo, mba lun a perutya kua iwange." 
1Chronicles12:35 Mbadan mba ve fa u tangen ityav yô, lu ior dubu ikundu kar anigheni man deri ataratar." 
1Chronicles12:36 Asher, mba ve kuma u nyôron ken akumautya man ve fa u tangen ityav yô, lu ior dubu akunduahar." 
1Chronicles12:37 Yande Yordan keela, Mbaruben man Mbagadi man vegherkwe u Manase yô, lu ior dubu deri man ikundu, a hanma inja i ikav mbi utyav." 
1Chronicles12:38 Mban cii ve lu mbanôngontyav mba ve fa u tangen ityav yô; ve va ken Heberon a ishima i môm sha u va kôron Davidi tor sha Iserael cii; Mbaiserael mbagenev cii kpaa, ishima ve lu i môm sha u kôron Davidi tor." 
1Chronicles12:39 Ve lu heregh a Davidi imôngo, ayange atar, ve lu yan kwagh man kwagh, gadia anmgbianev vev vande kohol iyol sha ci ve." 
1Chronicles12:40 Man shi mba ve lu anmgbianev vev yô, zan zan ar hen Isakar man Sebulon man Nafetali kpaa, ve va a kwaghyan sha ujaki man sha urakumi man sha mbaalfadari man sha ibua, kwaghyan er mwem, man azen a tur, man asume a atam a wain a ombor, man wain kua mkurem, man ibua kua iyôngo kpishi; gadia saan Iserael iyol kpishi." 
1Chronicles13:1 Tsô Davidi tume idyu a mbahemenev mba lun a ior dubu dubu man deri deri sha ikev, ka hanma orhemenegh je la." 
1Chronicles13:2 Nahan Davidi kaa a mkohol u Iserael cii er: Aluer nea nenge a doo nahan, man a lu ishima i TER, Aôndo wase, kpaa yô, sé tindi nen loho hen anmgbianev asev sha hanma ijiir cii, mba ve shi ken tar u Iserael yô, kua upristi man Mbalevi mba ve lu a ve imôngo ken agar a ve a a lu a ajiir a ilev yan toho her, sha u ve̱ va kohol her a vese yô;" 
1Chronicles13:3 yô, sé shi sé hide nen a areki u Aôndo wase her a vese; gadia sha ayange a Saulu la, se ker un ga." 
1Chronicles13:4 Tsô mkohol cii kaa er, vea er nahan; gadia kwagh la, lu sha ishima i ior cii." 
1Chronicles13:5 Nahan Davidi kohol Iserael cii, hii hen Shihor uwagh u Igipiti zan zan za ar hen gbenda u karen zan Hamati la, er ve̱ za tôô areki u Aôndo hen Kiriati-yearim." 
1Chronicles13:6 Tsô Davidi kôndo a Iserael cii, ve za hen Baala, ka Kiriati-yearim u Yuda je la, sha u za tôôn areki u Aôndo, TER, u A tem sha ucerubi, areki u i yer Iti la sha mi yô." 
1Chronicles13:7 Nahan ve tôô areki u Aôndo sha ikyekye i he ken iyou i Abinadabi, Usa man Ahio lu kôôm ikyekye la." 
1Chronicles13:8 Davidi kua Iserael cii ve lu vinen amar sha ishigh ki Aôndo sha agee a ve cii, a icam zwa man umolo man mbaadiguve man anigingav man ukwen kua ukakaki." 
1Chronicles13:9 Kpa zum u ve ar hen vande u gbiren alakema u Kidon la yô, Usa za uwegh er una kôr areki, gadia abua nôngo gbev." 
1Chronicles13:10 Tsô ishima vihi TER a Usa, A wua un sha ci u a ze uwegh a bende sha areki la yô, tsô a kpe keregh je sha ishigh ki Aôndo." 
1Chronicles13:11 Cier Davidi iyol er TER A ande A te num sha Usa yô, a maa a ii ijiir la iti er Perese-Usa, zan zan nyian." 
1Chronicles13:12 Davidi cia Aôndo sha iyange la je, a kaa er: Me er nan man me tôô areki u Aôndo me va ver hen ya wama?" 
1Chronicles13:13 Nahan Davidi kera tôô areki u Aôndo la za nyôr a mi her a na ken gar u Davidi ga, kpa a kaha a mi a za a mi hen ya u Obedi-edom, Orgiti." 
1Chronicles13:14 Nahan areki u Aôndo lu hen ior i Obedi-edom ken iyou na iwer itiar, TER ver ya u Obedi-edom doo doo kua kwagh u a lu a mi cii." 
1Chronicles14:1 Tsô Hiram tor u Tiru tindi mbatyomov hen Davidi a ikon i sedar kua mbamaankwagh man mba gbanikon er ve̱ va maa un iyou. 
1Chronicles14:2 Nahan Davidi kav er TER A ver un tor sha Iserael yô, gadia i kende a tor na sha kpishi, sha ci u ior nav Iserael." 
1Chronicles14:3 Davidi shi seer eren kasev mbagenev ken Yerusalem, man Davidi shi mar ônov mba nomso kua mba kasev." 
1Chronicles14:4 Ati a ônov mba a zua a mi ken Yerusalem yô, ka: Shamua man Shobabi man Natan man Solomon" 
1Chronicles14:5 man Ibehar man Elishua man Elpeleti 
1Chronicles14:6 man Noga man Nefegi man Yafia 
1Chronicles14:7 man Elishama man Beeliada man Elifeleti. 
1Chronicles14:8 Zum u Mbafiliti ungwa er i shighe Davidi mkurem i kôr un tor sha Iserael cii yô, Mbafiliti cii kôndo sha u va keren Davidi; tsô Davidi ongo nahan yô, a due sha u za nôngon ityav a ve." 
1Chronicles14:9 Yô, Mbafiliti va va samber ityav shin pev u Refaim." 
1Chronicles14:10 Tsô Davidi pine Aôndo kaa er: M̱ kôndo m̱ za nôngo ityav a Mbafiliti? Ú na ve sha ikev yam shinii? TER kaa a na er: Kôndo, gadia Me na ve sha ikev you." 
1Chronicles14:11 Nahan ve va hen Baal-perashim, Davidi hemba ve heregh. Tsô Davidi kaa er: Aôndo ande nyôr ken mbaihomov av sha uwegh agh, er ka m-ande u mnger yô. Ka nahan man i ii ijiir la iti er Baal-perashim ye." 
1Chronicles14:12 Ve undu mbaaôndo vev heregh, nahan Davidi na zwa er i̱ nande ve sha usu." 
1Chronicles14:13 Kpa Mbafiliti shi va samber ityav shin pev la. 
1Chronicles14:14 Nahan Davidi shi pine Aôndo, Aôndo kaa a na er: De kera zende ve ityô ga, wa nev, tsô ú za ta num sha a ve hen atine a balsem." 
1Chronicles14:15 Tsô zum u ú ungwa acin sha ityouv mbi ikon i balsem yô, due nôngo ityav, gadia Aôndo kar hemen we sha u za hemban akumautya a Mbafiliti ve." 
1Chronicles14:16 Nahan Davidi er er Aôndo kaa un nahan, ve hemba akumautya a Mbafiliti, hii hen Gibeon zan zan za ar hen Geser je." 
1Chronicles14:17 Gwa u Davidi samber sha ityar ityar cii; TER er akuraior cii, a cian un." 
1Chronicles15:1 Davidi maa ayou sha ci na ken gar u Davidi; shi a sôr ijiir sha ci u areki u Aôndo kpaa, a tim un tenti." 
1Chronicles15:2 Tsô Davidi kaa er: Doo u hanma or nana̱ gba tôôn areki u Aôndo ga, saa Mbalevi, gadia ka ve je Aôndo tsuwa ve er ve̱ tôôn areki u Aôndo shi ve̱ eren Un tom gbem ye." 
1Chronicles15:3 Nahan Davidi kohol Iserael cii ken Yerusalem sha u za van a areki u TER hen ijiir na i i ser un la. 
1Chronicles15:4 Davidi kohol ônov mba Aron kua Mbalevi. 
1Chronicles15:5 Ônov mba Kohati yô, lu Uriel orhemen, man anmgbianev nav ior deri man ikundu;" 
1Chronicles15:6 ônov mba Merari yô, lu Asaia orhemen, man anmgbianev nav ior deri uhar man ikundu;" 
1Chronicles15:7 ônov mba Gershon yô, lu Yoel orhemen, man anmgbianev nav ior deri man ikundugber;" 
1Chronicles15:8 ônov mba Elisafan yô, lu Shemaia orhemen, man anmgbianev nav ior deri uhar;" 
1Chronicles15:9 ônov mba Heberon yô, lu Eliel orhemen, man anmgbianev nav ior akunduanyiin;" 
1Chronicles15:10 ônov mba Ushiel yô, lu Aminadabi orhemen, man anmgbianev nav ior deri man pue kar uhar." 
1Chronicles15:11 Tsô Davidi yila upristi Sadoki man Abiatar; man Mbalevi: Uriel, Asaia, Yoel, Shemaia, Eliel, kua Aminadabi," 
1Chronicles15:12 a kaa a ve er: Ne mba mbahemenev sha uya mba uter mba Mbalevi, nahan yô, wanger nen ayol a en, ne kua anmgbianev enev, sha u ne̱ va a areki u TER, Aôndo u Iserael né va ver hen ijiir i m ser un yô." 
1Chronicles15:13 Gadia ka sha ci u ne tôô un tsuaa la ga, man TER, Aôndo wase, ta num sha a vese yô, gadia se ker Un sha gbenda u vough ga." 
1Chronicles15:14 Nahan upristi man Mbalevi wanger ayol a ve sha u vea va a areki u TER, Aôndo u Iserael, yô." 
1Chronicles15:15 Nahan Mbalevi tôô areki u Aôndo sha avande a ve sha igbo er Mose wa tindi sha imo i TER nahan. 
1Chronicles15:16 Shi Davidi kaa mbahemenev mba Mbalevi er, ve̱ ver anmgbianev vev, mbawanatsam mbala, a ityogholov, mbaadiguve man umolo man ukwen, ve̱ kuhwan taver, taver ve̱ kende imo a iember." 
1Chronicles15:17 Nahan Mbalevi ver Heman wan u Yoel; man ken anmgbianev nav yô, ve ver Asav wan u Berekia; man ken ônov mba Merari, anmgbianev vev, Etan wan u Kushaia," 
1Chronicles15:18 kua anmgbianev vev mba ve gbire sha a ve, lu: Sekaria man Ben man Yaashiel man Shemiramoti man Yehiel man Uni man Eliabi man Benaia man Maaseia man Matitia man Elifelehu man Mikeneia; man Mbakuranhunda yô, lu Obedi-edom man Yeiel." 
1Chronicles15:19 Man mbawanatsam, Heman man Asav man Etam, ve lu a ukwen mba togula er ve̱ kuhwan taver taver," 
1Chronicles15:20 man Sekaria man Ashiel man Shemiramoti man Yehiel man Uni man Eliabi man Maaseia man Banaia, a mbaadiguve mba i ver sha imo i ukase yô," 
1Chronicles15:21 man Matitia man Elifelehu man Mikeneia man Obedi-edom man Yeiel man Asashia, a umolo er ve hemen sha imo i nomso." 
1Chronicles15:22 Man Kenania, orhemen u Mbalevi lu tesen er i̱ wa icam sha inja, gadia a fa kwagh la dedoo." 
1Chronicles15:23 Man Berekia man Elkana lu mbakuranhunda hen ape areki lu la. 
1Chronicles15:24 Man upristi Shebania man Yoshafati man Netanel man Amasai man Sekaria man Benaia man Elieser, ve tôngo ikor sha ishigh ki areki u Aôndo la; man Obedi-edom man Yehia lu mbakuranhunda hen ape areki lu la." 
1Chronicles15:25 Nahan Davidi man mbatamen mba Iserael man mbahemenev mba lun a ior dubu dubu sha ikev la, ve mough sha u za tôôn areki u ikuryan hen ya u Obedi-edom a iember." 
1Chronicles15:26 Tsô zum u Aôndo wase Mbalevi mba ve tôô areki u ikuryan i TER la yô, ve na nagh sha abua ataankarahar kua iyôngo itiankarihiar." 
1Chronicles15:27 Davidi haa riga u ikondo i pupuu i kôngor, kua Mbalevi cii kpaa mba ve tôô areki la, man mbawanatsam man Kenania orhemen u tesen mbawanatsam icam; Davidi lu a efodi u ikondo i pupuu iyol." 
1Chronicles15:28 Kape Iserael cii, ve va a areki u ikuryan u TER a awer a gbiren kondo kondo sha imo i amar a tôngon man ikor man ukwen, er ve lu kuhwan taver taver sha mbaadiguve man umolo." 
1Chronicles15:29 Tsô er areki u ikuryan u TER va nyôr ken gar u Davidi yô, Mikal wan u Saulu ta ashe hen ianiyoughough za nenge tor Davidi lu vinen amar, numben yô, tsô a laha un ken ishima na." 
1Chronicles16:1 Tsô ve nyôr a areki u Aôndo ve ver un ken atô u tenti u Davidi tim sha ci na la, nahan ve na iniav mbi nanden man iniav mbi bem sha ishigh ki Aôndo." 
1Chronicles16:2 Zum u Davidi bee u nan nagh ku nanden kua iniav mbi bem yô, a ver ior doo doo ken iti i TER." 
1Chronicles16:3 Hanma or u Iserael nomsoor man kwase kpaa, a na nan akpekpa man ijuugh ki inyamegh man ijen i atam a wain a ombor." 
1Chronicles16:4 A ver Mbalevi mbagenev er ve̱ eren tom sha ishigh ki areki u TER, ve̱ pasen iwuese Na, ve̱ sughun, ve̱ civir TER, Aôndo u Iserael." 
1Chronicles16:5 Asav lu orvesen, Sekaria dondo sha a na man Yeiel man Shemiramoti man Yehiel man Matitia man Eliabi man Benaia man Obedi-edom man Yeiel, ve lu a mbaadiguve man umolo; Asav lu a ukwen, lu kuhwan taver taver;" 
1Chronicles16:6 man upristi Benaia man Yahashiel ve lu a ukakaki, ve tôngon sha ishigh ki areki u ikuryan u Aôndo gbem." 
1Chronicles16:7 Ka sha iyange la je Davidi hii veren Asav a anmgbianev nav er ve̱ wuese TER ye. 
1Chronicles16:8 Wuese nen TER, yila nen sha iti Na; pase nen akuraior ityom Na." 
1Chronicles16:9 Wa icam ter nen Un, wa nen atsam a wuese Un; ôron nen kwagh u akaa a Na a kpilighyol cii." 
1Chronicles16:10 Ta nen ihagh sha icighanti Na; asema a mba ve keren TER yô, a̱ ember tsung." 
1Chronicles16:11 Ker nen TER kua agee a Na kpaa, keren nen ishigh Nagh gbem!" 
1Chronicles16:12 Umbur nen ityom Na i kpilighyol i A er yô, uivande Nav kua ajiraôron a ken zwa Na;" 
1Chronicles16:13 ne tsombor u wanakiriki Na Iserael, ne ônov mba Yakob, ne uicuwan Nav." 
1Chronicles16:14 Un, TER, ka Aôndo wase je; ajiraôron a Na nga sha won cii." 
1Chronicles16:15 Umbur nen ikuryan Na gbem; ka mkaanem ma A kaa sha ci u ikov dubu je la; 
1Chronicles16:16 ikuryan i A ya a Aberaham la, man mbum Na a Isaka;" 
1Chronicles16:17 A shi A taver i hingir tindi hen Yakob, hen Iserael kpaa hingir icôronikuryan je," 
1Chronicles16:18 er lu kaan er: Ka we je Me na u tar u Kanaan, u̱ lu kwar u dyako wen." 
1Chronicles16:19 Zum u ve lu ior kpeghee tsô la, ve ndahar mimi, man ve lu shir ken u la;" 
1Chronicles16:20 ve lu zenden ken akuraior sha adondo adondo, ve mough ken tartor ugen, ve yem ken ikurior igen kposo." 
1Chronicles16:21 A rumun ma or nzughul a ve ga; een, A zôhô a utor sha ci ve kpaa." 
1Chronicles16:22 Lu kaan er: De benden nen mba M shigh ve mkurem la ave ga; uprofeti Av kpaa de eren nen ve kwagh u vihin ga. 
1Chronicles16:23 Wa icam, ter TER, we tar cii; pase myom Na ayange ayange." 
1Chronicles16:24 Pase akuraior iengem Na, man akaa a Na a kpilighyol kpaa, pase a hen ior cii." 
1Chronicles16:25 Gadia TER hemba cii, A kuma iwuese kpishi je; A hemba cier iyol a mbaaôndo mbagenev cii." 
1Chronicles16:26 Gadia mbaaôndo mba akuraior cii, ka agbilinakaa tsô; kpa TER gba Usha." 
1Chronicles16:27 Icivir man iengem mba Un sha ishi; agee man iember mba ken ijiir Na i teman. 
1Chronicles16:28 Ne icombor i ior, na nen TER, na nen TER icivir man agee;" 
1Chronicles16:29 na nen TER icivir i i kom sha iti Na yô; va nen a nagh, va nen sha ishigh Nagh. Gure civir nen TER a uicighanmbaakondov iyol." 
1Chronicles16:30 Ikarikase i̱ gbidye u iyol sha ishigh Nagh, we tar sha won cii; tar kpaa u taver je ua kera tenger ga." 
1Chronicles16:31 Usha ve̱ ember man tar kpaa u̱ ember tsung; ve̱ kaa a akuraior er: TER tema tor. 
1Chronicles16:32 Zegemnger a̱ hura, kua m-iv na kpaa; toho u̱ ember, kua akaa a a lu ken u cii." 
1Chronicles16:33 Zum la ikon i ken ikô cii ia wa icam a iember sha ishigh ki TER; gadia ngu van sha u va ôron tar ijir. 
1Chronicles16:34 Wuese nen TER gadia A doo; gadia erdoo Na ka u tsôron gbem sha won je. 
1Chronicles16:35 Yô, kaa nen ner: Yima se, Aôndo u myom wase, kohol se imôngo, yima se sha ikev i akuraior, sha er sé wuese icighanti Wou man sé ta ihagh sha iwuese You yô." 
1Chronicles16:36 I̱ wuese TER, Aôndo u Iserael, hii sha uicôrombaashighev zan zan gbem sha won cii! Nahan ior cii rumun er Amen! Man ve wuese TER." 
1Chronicles16:37 Tsô a ver Asav kua anmgbianev nav er ve̱ tilen sha ishigh ki areki u ikuryan u TER, ve̱ eren tom sha ishigh ki areki gbem, sha gbayol u hanma iyange," 
1Chronicles16:38 kua Obedi-edom a anmgbianev nav kpaa, ior akunduatar kar anigheni; Obedi-edom wan u Yedutun man Hosa, ve lu mbakuranhunda;" 
1Chronicles16:39 man pristi Sadoki, kua anmgbianev nav upristi, a ver ve sha ishigh ki tabernakel u TER sha igungu u hen Gibeon la," 
1Chronicles16:40 sha u ve̱ naan iniav mbi nanden sha atse a nagh ku nanden gbem, pepe man aikighe, er i nger ken tindi u TER u A wa Iserael la nahan." 
1Chronicles16:41 Heman man Yedutun lu a ve imôngo, man shi mbagenev mba i tsuwa yô, mba i ter ati a ve, sha u ve̱ wuese TER, gadia erdoo Na ngu gbem sha won." 
1Chronicles16:42 Heman man Yedutun kpaa lu a ukakaki man ukwen sha ci u ior mba tôngon man mba kuhwan la, man shi ityogholov sha ci u atsam a wuese Aôndo; kpa ônov mba Yedutun ve tilen sha hunda." 
1Chronicles16:43 Tsô ior cii hembe, hanma or hide hen ya u nan; Davidi kpaa hide sha u za sughun ya na." 
1Chronicles17:1 Tsô er Davidi tema ken iyou na yô, Davidi kaa a profeti Natan er: Nenge, mo m ngu teman ken iyou i ikon i sedar, kpa areki u ikuryan u TER yô, gema ngu ken tenti." 
1Chronicles17:2 Tsô Natan kaa a Davidi er: Er kwagh u a lu u ken ishima cii, gadia Aôndo ngu a we." 
1Chronicles17:3 Tsô hen tugh mbula je, kwaghôron u Aôndo va hen Natan er:" 
1Chronicles17:4 Za, za kaa wanakiriki Wam Davidi wer: TER ngu kaan nahan er: De maan Mo iyou sha u M̱ tema kimi ga," 
1Chronicles17:5 gadia hii sha iyange i M due a Iserael la je zan zan nyian M ngu a tema ken ma iyou ga, kpa M lu ken tenti tsô, man ken utabernakel." 
1Chronicles17:6 Sha ajiir a M lu zenden a Iserael imôngo cii, M shi ôr kwagh a ma orjir u Iserael u M ver nan sha u nana̱ kura ior Av la, Mer: Ka nyi ne maam iyou i sha ikon i sedar ga, kpa?" 
1Chronicles17:7 Yô, za kaa wanakiriki Wam Davidi nahan wer, TER, u akum a Sha ngu kaan nahan er: M tôô u hen ijiir i ilev yan toho henpe u lu kuran iyongo la, Mer, hingir orhemen u ior Av Iserael." 
1Chronicles17:8 M lu a we kpaa, her ape u zenden cii, M tim mbaihomov ou sha ishigh you kera cii, man shi Me er iti you ia za gwa er iti i uzegembaiorov mba ve lu sha won nahan." 
1Chronicles17:9 Man shi Me ver ijiir sha ci u ior Av Iserael, Me môôr ve sha u ve̱ tema hen ijiir ve ayol a ve, á kera num ve ga, ônov mba mbaaferev kpaa vea kera er ve ican er tsuaa la nahan ga," 
1Chronicles17:10 er hii sha ayange a M ver mbaajiriv Mer, ve̱ nengen sha ior Av Iserael la; Me gema Mbaihomov ou cii vea var inya. Man shi M ngu kaan we, TER Una maa u ya." 
1Chronicles17:11 Tsô zum u ayange ou aa kuma a ú za kohol uter ou yô, Me ver vor wou, á lu ma wan wou je, Me taver tor u nan." 
1Chronicles17:12 Ka nan nana maam iyou ye, Me ver ikônough ki torough ki nan kia lu gbem." 
1Chronicles17:13 Me lu TER u nan, nan di nana lu wan Wam; Me kar a erdoo Wam sha a nan kera ga, er lu M kar a mi hen un u a vande lun a we la kera nahan ga;" 
1Chronicles17:14 kpa Me ver nan ken iyou Yam man ken tartor Wam kpaa, gbem sha won; ikônough ki torough ki nan kpaa kia lu her gbem sha won." 
1Chronicles17:15 Ka sha akaaôron ne cii kua mpase ne cii, Natan a ôr kwagh a Davidi ye." 
1Chronicles17:16 Tsô Davidi nyôr za tema sha ishigh ki TER, a kaa er: Mo m ngu nyi TER, Aôndo; man ya wam yô, ngu di nyi je, er U korom zan zan hegene?" 
1Chronicles17:17 Kwagh ne kpaa ka kwagh u kiriki sha ashe Ou tsô, Aôndo; U shi U ter kwagh u ya u wanakiriki Wou, sha ayange a ken hemen ca je, man shi U nenge a kwagh wam ken hemen er ka nongo u ior nahan, TERE, Aôndo." 
1Chronicles17:18 Ka nyi je Davidi una shi á seer kaan We sha kwagh u icivir i U ne wanakiriki Wou ne? Gadia U fa wanakiriki Wou. 
1Chronicles17:19 TERE, ka sha ci u wanakiriki Wou ne je, shi ka sha ishima You kpaa, U er zegekwagh ne, U pase akaa a vesen ne cii ye." 
1Chronicles17:20 TERE, ma or u kuman sha a We nan ngu ga, ma Aôndo ugen kpaa ngu ga, saa We, sha akaa a se ongo sha ato ase cii." 
1Chronicles17:21 Ka hanma ikurior igen sha won i lu er ior Ou Iserael nahana, i Aôndo A za yem i er i̱ hingir ior Nav, sha u iti You i̱ za sha won, sha uzegembaakaav mba cier iyol, er U zenda akuraior sha ishigh ki ior Ou kera, mba U yem ve ken Igipiti la?" 
1Chronicles17:22 Gadia U gema ior Ou Iserael ve hingir ior Ou gbem sha won; We TER, U hingir Aôndo ve." 
1Chronicles17:23 Yô, TERE, shi na kwaghôron u U er sha wanakiriki Wou kua ya na la, a̱ lu nahan gbem, er kwagh u U kaa la." 
1Chronicles17:24 Een, i̱ kure un sha er á kende a iti You sha gbem sha won yô, er ior vea kaan er: TER u akum a Sha, Aôndo u Iserael, ka Aôndo u Iserael je; ya u wanakiriki Wou Davidi kpaa, una lu sha ishigh You taveraa," 
1Chronicles17:25 Gadia Aôndo Wam, U pase wanakiriki Wou Wer, Ú maa un ya, ka nahan man wanakiriki Won a sen kwagh sha ishigh You vangertiôr ne ye." 
1Chronicles17:26 Hegen yô, TERE, ka We U lu Aôndo ye, man U tôndo zwa a wanakiriki Wou sha kwagh u doon ne;" 
1Chronicles17:27 yô, doo U u veren ya u wanakiriki Wou dedoo sha u a̱ tsôr sha ishigh You gbem sha won, gadia We TERE, U na un iveren i dedoo, nahan una lu a iveren gbem sha won." 
1Chronicles18:1 Tsô ken masejime la, Davidi hemba Mbafiliti, ve hingir sha ikev na, a ngohol Gati kua angarev nav sha ikev i Mbafiliti." 
1Chronicles18:2 A hemba Moabi kpaa; Mbamoabi hingir sha ikev i Davidi, ve taan un kpandegh." 
1Chronicles18:3 Davidi shi hemba Hada-deser tor u Soba kpaa, hen Hamati, zum u a lu zan sha u una za taver tor na hen ifi u Uferati la." 
1Chronicles18:4 Davidi ngohol un akekeautya dubu man mbaanyinyav dubu utaankaruhar man mbazanangahar dubu ikundu, Davidi tôndo anyinya a kpelan akeke cii igbela i shin akishiangahar, kpa a tsegha agen, kuma sha akeke deri." 
1Chronicles18:5 Er Mbashiria mba sha Damaseku va sha u vea wase Hada-deser tor u Soba yô, Davidi wua Mbashiria ior dubu ikundu kar uhar." 
1Chronicles18:6 Tsô Davidi maa ver mbautyav mba kuran ken Shiria u Damaseku; Mbashiria hingir sha ikev i Davidi, ve taan un kpandegh. TER na Davidi mhembe hanma ijiir i una za cii." 
1Chronicles18:7 Davidi kura iperutya i zenaria i ior mba Hada-deser lu a mi la, a va a mi ken Yerusalem." 
1Chronicles18:8 Hen Tibehati man Kun, agar a Hada-deser la kpaa, Davidi kura utogula heregh kpishi, ka ve je Solomon er zegetasa u togula man mtôm kua ikav mbi togula a min ye." 
1Chronicles18:9 Zum u Tou, tor u Hamati, ungwa er Davidi hemba akumautya a Hada-deser, tor u Soba, cii yô," 
1Chronicles18:10 a tindi wan na Hadoram hen tor Davidi er a̱ za sugh un, shi a̱ wuese un kpaa, er a nenge ityav a Hada-deser, a hembe un yô; gadia Hada-deser vande nôngon ityav a Tou; a va a hanma inja i ikav mbi zenaria man mbi azurfa kua mbi togula." 
1Chronicles18:11 Mbila kpaa Davidi tsegha mbi sha ci u TER, seer sha azurfa man zenaria mba a kura hen akuraior cii, hen Edom man hen Moabi man hen Mbaamon man hen Mbafiliti kua hen Mbaamaleki." 
1Chronicles18:12 Abishai wan u Seruya kpaa wua Mbaedom ior dubu puenigheni shin pev u Bar. 
1Chronicles18:13 Shi a ver mbautyav mba kuran ken Edom, nahan Mbaedom cii hingir sha ikev i Davidi; TER na Davidi mhembe hanma ijiir i una za cii." 
1Chronicles18:14 Davidi tema tor sha Iserael cii a ôron ior nav cii ijir sha mimi kua sha perapera. 
1Chronicles18:15 Yoabi wan u Seruya lu a akumautya sha ikev; Yehoshafati wan u Ahiludi lu or u ngeren abaver ken takerada. 
1Chronicles18:16 Sadoki wan u Ahitubi man Abimeleki wan u Abiatar lu upristi; Shavsha lu orngeren. 
1Chronicles18:17 Benaia wan u Yehoyada lu a Mbakereti man Mbapeleti sha ikev; ônov mba Davidi lu atiator a wasen tor tom. 
1Chronicles19:1 Tsô ken Masejime u kwagh la yô, Nahashi tor u Mbaamon kpe, wan na gema tema tor sha ityough nagh." 
1Chronicles19:2 Nahan Davidi kaa er: Me er a Hanun wan u Nahashi doo doo, gadia ter na lu eren a mo dedoo. Tsô Davidi tindi mbatyomov er ve̱ za yar un ku u ter na la. Mbayev mba Davidi mbala za nyôr ken tar u Mbaamon hen Hanun sha u yaren un ku." 
1Chronicles19:3 Kpa atiator a Mbaamon kaa a Hanun er: U ngu fan wer, Davidi ngu civir teru je, sha er a tindi mbayaren we ku yôô? Mbayev nav kera va sha u vea va nenge aker ken tar ne man shi u hemban u man u fan akaa a ker gaa?" 
1Chronicles19:4 Nahan Hanun kôr mbayev mba Davidi mbala, hondo ve ishigh, tôndo ve uriga hen atô sha asenatôôgh je, tsô a na ve gbenda." 
1Chronicles19:5 Tsô mbagenev yem za ôr Davidi kwagh u i er ior mbala yô. Nahan a tindi sha u i̱ za kegh ve gbenda; gadia kunya kôr ior mbala mimi. Tor kaa er: Hira lu nen ken Yeriko zan zan indyer yen i̱ kar menden, man né hide ye." 
1Chronicles19:6 Zum u Mbaamon kav er ve gem ayol a ve ve hingir kwagh u duen Davidi ishima yô, Hanun man Mbaamon ve tindi utalenti mba azurfa dubu, er i̱ za goho akeke man mbaanyinyav ken Mesopotamia man ken Aram-maaka kua ken Soba kpaa." 
1Chronicles19:7 Tsô ve goho akeke dubu ikundugber kar uhar, kua tor u Maaka a ior nav, ve va haa afo sha ishigh ki Medeba. Mbaamon kpaa due ken agar a ve, ve kohol, ve va ityav." 
1Chronicles19:8 Zum u Davidi ungwa kwagh la yô, a tindi Yoabi a ikumutya cii, lu anomaior cii." 
1Chronicles19:9 Tsô Mbaamon due, tange ityav hen hundagar; kpa utor mba ve va la yô, ve lu ijiir ve kposo ken ikôngo." 
1Chronicles19:10 Zum u Yoabi kav er i himbir un sha utya ken hemen kua ken ijime kpaa yô, a tsuwa ior ken uicuwanmbaiorov mba Iserael cii a samber ve sha u ve̱ nôngo ityav a Mbashiria." 
1Chronicles19:11 Ior mba ve shi la, a gema a wa ve sha ikev i anngô na Abishai; ve di kpaa ve samber sha u nôngon ityav a Mbaamon." 
1Chronicles19:12 Nahan a kaa er: Aluer Mbashiria vea hemban mo yô, ú va wasem; kpa aluer Mbaamon vea hemban we yô, mo di me va wase u." 
1Chronicles19:13 Yô, taver nen ishima, sé lu nen nomso sha ci u ior asev man sha ci u agar a Aôndo wase; TER A̱ er kwagh u a doo Un yô." 
1Chronicles19:14 Nahan Yoabi a ior mba ve lu a na kporom hen Mbashiria sha u nôngon ityav; maa ve yevese un. 
1Chronicles19:15 Zum u Mbaamon nenge Mbashiria mba ngur yevese yô, ve di kpaa ve yevese anngô na Abishai, ve za nyôr ken gar. Nahan Yoabi hide ken Yerusalem." 
1Chronicles19:16 Zum u Mbashiria nenge er ve yina sha Iserael yô, ve tindi mbatyomov er ve̱ za va a Mbashiria mba ve lu Ifi yande la; Shofaki kurutya u akumautya a Hada-deser hemen ve." 
1Chronicles19:17 I va ôr Davidi kwagh la, nahan a kohol Iserael cii, a per Yordan a za tser ve sha hemen, maa a cinge ityav a ve. Nahan er Davidi cinge ityav a ve yô, ve kpaa ve gba nôngon ityav a na." 
1Chronicles19:18 Mbashiria gema yevese Mbaiserael; Davidi wua Mbashiria mba sha akeke ior dubu utaankaruhar man mbazanangahar ior dubu akunduahar, a wua Shofaki kurutya u akumautya a ve kpaa." 
1Chronicles19:19 Zum u mbayev mba Hada-deser nenge er ve yina sha Iserael yô, ve hime iyôngo a Davidi ve hingir sha ikev na; nahan Mbashiria kera rumun u wasen Mbaamon ga." 
1Chronicles20:1 Tsô sha inyom i he, sha shighe u utor ka ve zaan ityav la yô, Yoabi mough a akumautya a ageegh, due a ve, za vihi tar u Mbaamon, shi za kase Raba sha utya. Kpa Davidi gema lu ken Yerusalem. Yoabi hemba Raba, tim un." 
1Chronicles20:2 Tsô Davidi bugh tor ve la idyer i tor kera, a kar myohom ma i, kuma talenti u zenaria môm, iwen i injaa lu sha mi; i gema i i cir Davidi sha ityou; a kura ishar i ken gar la, ngee je zua ga." 
1Chronicles20:3 A due a ior mba ve lu ker la, a na ve tom u eren sha uzerto man sha ucanca mba iyôô kua sha azembe. Kape Davidi er a agar a Mbaamon cii la. Tsô Davidi a ior cii ve hide." 
1Chronicles20:4 Tsô ken masejime la, ityav shi mough ken Geser a Mbafiliti; hen shighe la Shibekai Orhusha wua Shipai, u a lu môm ken ônov mba Rafa; ve hingir sha ikev ve." 
1Chronicles20:5 I shi i nôngo ityav a Mbafiliti; tsô Elhanan wan u Yair wua Lahami anngô u Goliati, Orgiti, u ihande i iwange na lu er igaikondo nahan la." 
1Chronicles20:6 Shi i nôngo ityav hen Gati, orgen lu ker u taven tsung, ahôaveegh a na kua ahôangahar a na lu ikundu kar anyiin, ataratar sha hanma uwegh, man shi ataratar shin hanma nguhar kpaa; un kpaa a lu wan u Rafa." 
1Chronicles20:7 Er a lu lahan Iserael yô, Yonatan wan u Shimea anngô u Davidi wua un." 
1Chronicles20:8 Mban lu ônov mba Rafa ken Gati; Davidi man mbayev nav ve wua ve. 
1Chronicles21:1 Tsô Satan mough hendan a Iserael, a tor Davidi ityô er a̱ ôr iyenge i Iserael." 
1Chronicles21:2 Nahan Davidi kaa a Yoabi man atiator a ior er: Za, za ôr nen iyenge i Iserael hii nen hen Bersheba zan zan za ar nen hen Dan; yô, i̱ va ôrom, sha er me fa iyenge ve yô." 
1Chronicles21:3 Tsô Yoabi gema kaa er: TER A̱ seer iyenge i ior Nav zan zan ve̱ hemba mba hegen kwa deri je. Ku! terem tor, ve cii ka mbayev mba terem gaa? Man ka nyi kwagh ne a sar tereme? Ka nyi man á haa Iserael ibo iyol nahana?" 
1Chronicles21:4 Kpa imo i tor hemba i Yoabi. Tsô Yoabi mough zende ken Iserael cii, hide va ken Yerusalem." 
1Chronicles21:5 Nahan Yoabi va na Davidi iyenge i ior mba i ôr ve la; kohol nomsombaiorov mba Iserael mba tsuwan sanker cii, lu dubu deri pue kar môm; man Yuda yô, lu dubu deri unyiin man akunduatargber, mbatsuwan sanker." 
1Chronicles21:6 Kpa iyenge i Levi man Benyamin yô, a ôr i ga, gadia imo i tor la lu Yoabi kwagh u ndôhôrshima." 
1Chronicles21:7 Kwagh ne vihi Aôndo ishima, nahan A tsaha Iserael tsung." 
1Chronicles21:8 Tsô Davidi kaa a Aôndo er: M er zegekwaghbo er m er kwagh ne yô; kpa shi de wanakiriki Wou ibo na; gadia m er kwagh u ibume tsô. 
1Chronicles21:9 Tsô TER ôr kwagh a Gadi ornengenakaa, u Davidi la, A kaa er:" 
1Chronicles21:10 Za, za ôr kwagh a Davidi kaa un wer: TER ngu kaa nahan er: M ver u akaa atar, tsuwa kwagh u M̱ er u yô." 
1Chronicles21:11 Nahan Gadi va hen Davidi va kaa a na er: TER ngu kaan nahan er: U̱ tsuwa kwagh u a lu u guda yô; 
1Chronicles21:12 Shin ka ijen anyom atarou; shin ka u iwer itiar ú lu yevese mba ve hendan a we, man sanker u mbaihomov ou a̱ nzughul a we shinii; shin sanker u TER ayange atar, ka bouange ken tar je la, er ortyom u TER a̱ va tim ken tar u Iserael cii la ase? Yô, hen kwagh u me za kaa a u A tindim la yô," 
1Chronicles21:13 Davidi kaa a Gadi er: Kondom iyol kpishi; yô me gba sha ikev i TER tsô, gadia mhôônom Nam ma zungwen ma vese, de rumun wer m̱ gba sha ikev i or ga." 
1Chronicles21:14 Tsô TER tindi bouange sha Iserael; nahan ior kpe dubu akunduatargber ken Iserael. 
1Chronicles21:15 Shi Aôndo tindi ortyom hen Yerusalem kpaa er a̱ za tim un; er a sôôn u timin un yô, TER nenge, nahan mhôônom kôr Un sha kwagh u bo la, A gema A kaa a ortyom u timin la er: Kuma ve; hide a uwegh ough ijime. Ortyom u TER la gema tile hen vande u gbiren alakema u Ornan, Oryebushi la." 
1Chronicles21:16 Davidi kenden ashe sha yô, a nenge a ortyom u TER tile hen ato, undu inya shin undu aôndo Sha, a tsuwa sanker, lu a mi sha uwe, a naregh sha Yerusalem. Tsô Davidi kua mbatamen va gure, ve kuma ishiv vev inya a akondo uya." 
1Chronicles21:17 Nahan Davidi kaa a Aôndo er: Ka mo m ne zwa mer, i̱ ôr iyenge i ior gaa? Een, ka mo m er kwaghbo, m er kwagh u vihin tsung ye; kpa iyôngo ingin ne yô, ka nyi i ere? Yô, TERE, Aôndo wam, shi de uwegh Ough ku̱ lu num a mo kua ya u terem kpaa, bouange a̱ de lu sha ior av ga." 
1Chronicles21:18 Tsô ortyom u TER kaa a Gadi er a̱ kaa Davidi er, a̱ kôndo, a̱ za ta TER atse a nanden nagh sha mi, sha vande u gbiren alakema u Ornan, Oryebushi la." 
1Chronicles21:19 Tsô Davidi kôndo sha imo i Gadi a kaa ken iti i TER yô. 
1Chronicles21:20 Tsô Ornan gema ashe nenge a ortyom la; ônov nav unyiin mba ve lu a na yô, ve yer; Ornan lu gbiren alakema." 
1Chronicles21:21 Davidi ngur van hen Ornan yô, Ornan ta ashe za nenge a Davidi nahan a mough hen vande u gbiren alakema, a ngurum a wa ityough inya sha ishigh ki Davidi." 
1Chronicles21:22 Tsô Davidi kaa a Ornan er: Nam vande u gbiren alakema ne sha u me ta atse a nanden TER nagh sha mi heregh, nam sha ishe na vough, sha u bouange a̱ de u eren ior yô." 
1Chronicles21:23 Kpa Ornan kaa a Davidi er: Gba ngohol tsô ga! Terem tor, a̱ er kwagh u a doo un yô; nenge, m na u abua ne sha ci u iniav mbi nanden, kua ikav mbi gbiren alakema a mi kpaa, mbi̱ lu ikon i keer usu a min, man alakema kpaa sha ci u nagh ku sha samuyia; m na u cii." 
1Chronicles21:24 Kpa Tor Davidi gema kaa a Ornan er: Ei; saa me yam sha ishe na vough, gadia m rumun u tôôn kwagh u a lu u wou, nan TER ga, me na nagh ku nanden sha kwagh u m ngohol a ngohol gbilin ga." 
1Chronicles21:25 Nahan Davidi na Ornan ushekel mba zenaria deri ataratar sha ci u vande la. 
1Chronicles21:26 Davidi ta atse a nanden TER nagh sha mi heregh, a na iniav mbi nanden man iniav mbi bem, a vaa a TER; Un kpaa A rumun sha usu u senen Sha, sha atse a nagh ku nanden la." 
1Chronicles21:27 Tsô TER kaa a ortyom er, a̱ hide a sanker na a̱ shindi ken var." 
1Chronicles21:28 Tsô hen shighe la, zum u Davidi kar, er TER rumun imo na hen vande u gbiren alakema u Ornan, Oryebushi la yô, a na nagh her." 
1Chronicles21:29 Gadia tabernakel u TER u Mose er ken toho la, man atse a nagh ku nanden lu sha igungu u hen Gibeon hen shighe la." 
1Chronicles21:30 Kpa Davidi fatyô u zan hen a, sha u za pinen Aôndo kwagh ga, gadia a lu cian sanker u TER la." 
1Chronicles22:1 Tsô Davidi kaa er: Ingin ka iyou i TER Aôndo, man angan ka atse a nanden nagh sha mi, sha ci u Iserael." 
1Chronicles22:2 Tsô Davidi kaa er, i̱ kohol akuraior agen a a lu ken tar u Iserael cii; nahan a ver mbakuanawen er ve̱ kua awen, ve̱ sôr sha ci u maan iyou i Aôndo." 
1Chronicles22:3 Davidi shi var iyôv mbi iliv kpishi, sha ci u ukusa mba ucivir mba ihindav, man sha ci u uiwever; man utogula ngee je gande u karen myohom;" 
1Chronicles22:4 ikon i sedar kpaa, gande u ôron iyenge; gadia Mbashidon man Mbatiru ve va na Davidi ikon i sedar kpishi je." 
1Chronicles22:5 Gadia Davidi kaa er: Wan wam Solomon ngu wanye denge denge tsô, man iyou i á maa TER yô, ia gba ikôr tsung je, ia za iti, ia lu a icivir sha ityar ityar cii; yô, mo me kohol akaa sha ci u i. Kape Davidi kohol akaa kpishi er a lu a kpe ga la." 
1Chronicles22:6 Tsô a yila wan na Solomon a kaa un er a̱ maa TER, Aôndo u Iserael, iyou." 
1Chronicles22:7 Nahan Davidi kaa a wan na Solomon er: Mo yô, m wa ishima mer, me maa iyou sha ci u iti i TER, Aôndo wam." 
1Chronicles22:8 Kpa imo i TER va her a mo er: U haa awambe inya kpishi, man u nôngo uzegembautyav, nahan ú maa iyou sha ci u iti Yam ga, gadia u haa awambe inya sha ishigh Yagh kpishi yum." 
1Chronicles22:9 Nenge, ú va mar wan, un yô, una lu or u bem; yô, Me na un bem a mbaihomov nav mba vea kase un cii; gadia á yila un iti er Solomon, Me na Iserael bem kua mmem sha ayange a na." 
1Chronicles22:10 Ka un una maa iyou sha ci u iti Yam ye, una lu wan Wam. Mo kpaa Me lu ter na; Me taver ikônough ki torough nagh sha Iserael gbem sha won." 
1Chronicles22:11 Hegen yô, wan wam, TER A̱ lu a we, lu a iveren, maa iyou i TER, Aôndo wou, er A ôr sha a we yô." 
1Chronicles22:12 Yô, TER A̱ na u kwaghfan man mkav, zum u Una ver u er u hemen Iserael yô, ú waan atindi a TER, Aôndo wou, iko." 
1Chronicles22:13 Nahan ú lu a iveren aluer wea ver ishima u wan akaawan iko kua akaaôron a ijirigh a TER na Mose sha ci u Iserael yô; lu taveraa, taver ishima; de cie kwagh ga, de yen ishima ga." 
1Chronicles22:14 Man nenge er m ye ican nahan kpaa, m kohol zenaria kuma utalenti dubu deri sha ci u iyou i TER kua azurfa utalenti dubu kwa dubu; togula man iyôgh ki iligh yô, gande u karen myohom, gadia ve ngee yum; ikon man awen kpaa m kohol m ver a ver; a lu u ka seer kpaa, seer." 
1Chronicles22:15 Man shi mbaerentom kpaa mba a we imôngo kpishi, mbakuanawen man mbaerentom u awen kua ikon man shi mbafaneev sha hanma inja i tom cii." 
1Chronicles22:16 Sha kwagh u zenaria man Azurfa togula kua iyôgh ki iligh yô, ka kwagh u ôron a ôr ga; yô, mough ase, er tom, TER kpaa A̱ lu a we." 
1Chronicles22:17 Davidi shi kaa uityombaiorov mba Iserael cii er, ve̱ wase wan na Solomon; a kaa er:" 
1Chronicles22:18 TER, Aôndo wen, ngu a ven gaa? Man A na ne bem hanma ian kpaa gaa? Gadia A na mba ve tem hen tar ne sha ikev yam; tar hingir sha ikev i TER kua sha ikev i ior Nav." 
1Chronicles22:19 Yô, ver nen ishima yen kua uma wen sha u keren TER, Aôndo wen; mough nen, maa nen icighanjiir u TER Aôndo, sha u né va a areki u ikuryan u TER man uicighanmbaakaav mba Aôndo ken iyou i á maa sha ci u iti i TER la." 
1Chronicles23:1 Davidi hingir tamenor, bee iyol, nahan a ver wan na Solomon tor sha Iserael." 
1Chronicles23:2 A kohol uityombaiorov mba Iserael cii a upristi kua Mbalevi. 
1Chronicles23:3 I ôr iyenge i Mbalevi, hii sha mba ve kuma anyom ikundugber man mba ve hembe nahan kpaa, iyenge i i ôr ve sha asange asange yô, lu ior dubu ikundugber kar anigheni." 
1Chronicles23:4 Ior vev dubu ikundu kar unyiin lu mbanengen sha tom u iyou i TER; ior dubu ataratar lu mbahemenev kua mbaajiriv; 
1Chronicles23:5 ior dubu unyiin lu mbakuranihinda; ior dubu unyiin yô, lu mba wuese TER sha ityogholov mbi m er, mer, i̱ wa atsam i̱ wuese a mi." 
1Chronicles23:6 Davidi pav ve iniongo iniongo, sha ati a ônov mba Levi, ka Gershon man Kohati kua Merari." 
1Chronicles23:7 Ior mba ken Mbagershon yô, lu: Ladan man Shimei." 
1Chronicles23:8 Ônov mba Ladan yô, lu: Yehiel orhemen man Setam kua Yoel, ve lu utar." 
1Chronicles23:9 Ônov mba Shimei yô, lu: Shelomoti man Hashiel man Haran, ve lu utar. Mban ve lu uityombaiorov mba sha uya mba uter mba Ladan." 
1Chronicles23:10 Ônov mba Shimei yô, lu: Yahati man Shina man Yeushi man Beria, mba unyiin mban ka ônov mba Shimei." 
1Chronicles23:11 Yahati lu orhemen, Shisa dondo; kpa Yeushi man Beria ve lu a ônov kpishi ga; nahan, i kohol ve, ve hingir tsombor môm, tom ve kpaa lu môm." 
1Chronicles23:12 Ônov mba Kohati yô, lu: Amram man Isehar man Heberon man Ushiel, ve lu unyiin." 
1Chronicles23:13 Ônov mba Amram yô, lu Aron kua Mose; i tsegha Aron sha u a̱ tseghan uicighanmbaakaav mba hemban cii, un a ônov nav gbem sha won, sha u ve̱ nanden kwagh u humandoon sha ishigh ki TER, ve̱ eren Un tom man ve̱ naan iveren ken iti Na gbem sha won." 
1Chronicles23:14 Kpa Mose or u Aôndo yô, i wa ônov nav ken kwe u Levi." 
1Chronicles23:15 Ônov mba Mose yô, lu: Gershon man Elieser." 
1Chronicles23:16 Ônov mba Gershon yô, lu Shebuel, orhemen." 
1Chronicles23:17 Ônov mba Elieser yô, lu: Rehabia, orhemen, Elieser lu a ônov mbagenev ga; kpa ônov mba Rehabia lu kpishi." 
1Chronicles23:18 Ônov mba Isehar yô, lu: Shelomiti, orhemen." 
1Chronicles23:19 Ônov mba Heberon yô, lu: Yeria, orhemen, Amaria dondo, Yahashiel gbire man Yekameam mase." 
1Chronicles23:20 Ônov mba Ushiel yô, lu: Mika, orhemen, man Ishia dondo." 
1Chronicles23:21 Ônov mba Merari yô, lu: Maheli man Mushi. Ônov mba Maheli yô, lu: Eleasar man Kishi." 
1Chronicles23:22 Eleasar kpe, lu a ônov mba nomso ga, saa mba kasev tseegh; nahan ônov mba Kishi, anmgbianev vev mbala, gema er ve." 
1Chronicles23:23 Ônov mba Mushi yô, lu: Maheli man Eder man Yeremoti, ve lu utar." 
1Chronicles23:24 Mban ka ônov mba Levi sha uya mba uter vev, ka mbavesen mba sha uya mba uter, mba i ôr iyenge ve sha asange asange, mba ve eren tom u ken iyou i TER, hii sha or u nan kom anyom ikundu man u nan hembe nahan kpaa." 
1Chronicles23:25 Gadia Davidi kaa er: TER, Aôndo u Iserael, na ior Nav mmem, A tema ken Yerusalem gbem sha won." 
1Chronicles23:26 Mbalevi kpaa kera gba u shi vea tôôn tabernakel kua ikav nav cii mbi eren tom na a mi la ga— 
1Chronicles23:27 gadia sha akaaôron a Davidi a masetyô yô, i ôr iyenge i ônov mba Levi, hii sha u nan kom anyom ikundu man u nan hembe nahan kpaa—" 
1Chronicles23:28 tom ve yô, lu u wasen ônov mba Aron tom u ken iyou i TER, ken ityembe kua ken ayou, man u wanger uicighanmbaakaav cii, ka tom u ken iyou i Aôndo je la;" 
1Chronicles23:29 tom u ubredi mba sha ishi man mwem ma kengese sha ci u nagh ku sha samuyia man sha ci u ubredi mba par par mba i we kwa sha mi ga yô, man sha ci kwagh u i kaa a kaa sha icenge yô, shin sha kwagh u nungwan man hanma inja i ikaren i sha tasa kua ikaren i sha iniembe;" 
1Chronicles23:30 man shi u tilen hanma sev naan TER ishughun kua iwuese, aikighe kpaa nahan;" 
1Chronicles23:31 man shi u nan TER iniav mbi nanden cii sha ayange a memen man sha mdugh u iwer i he, man sha ashighe a iniongo, sha iyenge i i ver mbi la, sha ishigh ki TER gbem;" 
1Chronicles23:32 man sha u ve̱ ver ishima sha tom u tenti u kohol ker, man tom u icighanjiir, man tom u wasen anmgbianev vev, ônov mba Aron, sha ci u tom u ken iyou i TER la." 
1Chronicles24:1 Ônov mba Aron kpaa i pav ve sha iniongo iniongo. Ônov mba Aron yô, lu: Nadabi man Abihu man Eleasar kua Itamar." 
1Chronicles24:2 Kpa Nadabi man Abihu yô, ve kpe sha ishigh ki ter ve, ve ver tse ga; nahan Eleasar man Itamar er tom u pristi." 
1Chronicles24:3 Davidi kua Sadoki u ken ônov mba Eleasar, man Ahimeleki u ken ônov mba Itamar, ve kar ve ityom cii sha mver u i ver ityom ve yô." 
1Chronicles24:4 Er mbahemenev mba ken ônov mba Eleasar ve hemba ngeen a mbahemenev mba ken ônov mba Itamar yô, i pav ve nahan: ken ônov mba Eleasar yô, mbahemenev mba sha uya mba uter lu pue kar ataratar; ken ônov mba Itamar mbahemenev lu anigheni." 
1Chronicles24:5 Kape i kar ve sha ishor i eren la, ngun man ngula; gadia mbavesen sha tom u icighanjiir man mbavesen sha tom u Aôndo lu ken ônov mba Eleasar kua ken ônov mba Itamar kpaa." 
1Chronicles24:6 Shemaia wan u Netanel, orngeren, lu Orlevi, a nger ve sha ishigh ki tor man ki mbatarev man pristi Sadoki man Ahimeleki wan u Abiatar, kua mbavesen mba sha uya mba uter mba upristi man mba Mbalevi; ya u ter môm sha ci u Eleasar man u môm sha ci u Itamar kpaa." 
1Chronicles24:7 Kwar u hiihii gba sha Yehoyaribi, u sha uhar gba sha Yedaia," 
1Chronicles24:8 u sha utar gba sha Harim, u sha unyiin gba sha Seorim," 
1Chronicles24:9 u sha utaan gba sha Malkiya, u sha ataratar gba sha Miyamin," 
1Chronicles24:10 u sha utaankaruhar gba sha Hakoshi, u sha anigheni gba sha Abiya," 
1Chronicles24:11 u sha utaankarunyiin gba sha Yeshua, u sha pue gba sha Shekania," 
1Chronicles24:12 u sha pue kar môm gba sha Eliashibi, u sha pue kar uhar gba sha Yakim," 
1Chronicles24:13 u sha pue kar utar gba sha Hupa, u sha pue kar unyiin gba sha Yeshebeabi," 
1Chronicles24:14 u sha pue kar utaan gba sha Bilga, u sha pue kar ataratar gba sha Imer," 
1Chronicles24:15 u sha pue kar utaankaruhar gba sha Heshir, u sha pue kar anigheni gba sha Hapise," 
1Chronicles24:16 u sha pue kar utaankarunyiin gba sha Petahia, u sha ikundu gba sha Yehesekel," 
1Chronicles24:17 u sha ikundu kar môm gba sha Yakin, u sha ikundu kar uhar gba sha Gamul," 
1Chronicles24:18 u sha ikundu kar utar gba sha Delaia, u sha ikundu kar unyiin gba sha Maashia." 
1Chronicles24:19 Kape i ver ve sha adondo adondo ken tom ve u nyôron ken iyou i TER, sha mver ve la, er TER, Aôndo u Iserael, kaa un nahan." 
1Chronicles24:20 Ônov mba Levi mba ve shi yô: ken ônov mba Amram lu Shubael; ken ônov mba Shubael, lu Yedeia." 
1Chronicles24:21 Rehabia yô: ken ônov mba Rehabia, ka Ishia, orhemen." 
1Chronicles24:22 Ken Mbaisehar yô, ka Shelomoti; ken ônov mba Shelomoti, ka Yahati." 
1Chronicles24:23 Ônov mba Heberon yô, ka: Yeria u vesen, Amaria dondo, Yahashiel gbire, Yekameam mase." 
1Chronicles24:24 Ônov mba Ushiel yô, ka Mika; ken ônov mba Mika, ka Shamir." 
1Chronicles24:25 Anngô u Mika, ka Ishia; ken ônov mba Ishia, ka Sekaria." 
1Chronicles24:26 Ônov mba Merari yô, ka Maheli man Mushi, ônov mba wan na Yaashia." 
1Chronicles24:27 Ônov mba Merari mba ken wan na Yaashia, ka: Shoham man Sakur man Iberi." 
1Chronicles24:28 Ken Maheli yô, lu Eleasar, u a lu a ônov mba nomso ga la." 
1Chronicles24:29 Ken Kishi yô, lu ônov mba Kishi: Yerameel." 
1Chronicles24:30 Ônov mba Mushi yô, lu: Maheli man Eder man Yerimoti. Mban ka ônov mba Levi sha uya mba uter vev." 
1Chronicles24:31 Mban kpaa ve er ishor er anmgbianev vev, ônov mba Aron nahan, sha ishigh ki tor Davidi kua ki Sadoki man Ahimeleki man ki mbahemenev mba sha uya mba uter mba upristi man mba Mbalevi; orhemen u sha hanma ya u uter kua anngô u nan u kiriki kpaa." 
1Chronicles25:1 Tsô Davidi man mbahemenev mba akumautya ve tsegha ônov mba Asav mbagenev man ônov mba Heman kua mba Yedutun kpaa, sha ci u tom la, sha u ve̱ pasen kwagh sha imo a umolo man a mbaadiguve kua a ukwen. Iyenge i mba ve lu eren tom la sha inja i tom ve yô:" 
1Chronicles25:2 Ken ônov mba Asav yô, lu Sakur man Yosev man Netania man Asharela, ka ônov mba Asav mba ve lu sha ikev i Asav, u a ôron kwaghôron u profeti sha imo i tor je la." 
1Chronicles25:3 Ken Yedutun yô, lu ônov mba Yedutun, ka: Gedalia man Seri man Yeshaia man Shimei man Hashabia man Matitia, ka ior ataratar je la, sha ikev i ter ve Yedutun u a lu pasen kwagh sha imo i molo sha u sughun TER, wuese un." 
1Chronicles25:4 Ken Heman yô, lu ônov mba Heman, ka: Bukia, Matania, Ushiel, Shebuel man Yerimoti, Hanania, Hanani Eliata, Gidalti man Romamti-eser, Yoshebekasha, Maloti, Hotir, Mahashioti;" 
1Chronicles25:5 mban cii, lu ônov mba Heman, ornengenakaa u tor, sha u pasen kwaghôron u Aôndo sha u kenden a korough sha. Aôndo na Heman ônov mba nomso pue kar unyiin man mba kasev utar." 
1Chronicles25:6 Mban cii ve lu sha ikev i ter ve, sha ci u wan atsam ken iyou i TER a ukwen man mbaadiguve man umolo sha ci u tom u ken iyou i Aôndo sha imo i tor; ka Asav man Yedutun kua Heman." 
1Chronicles25:7 Kohol iyenge ve cii a anmgbianev vev imôngo, mba i tese ve atsam a wan wuese TER, ka mba ve fa dedoo je la, ve lu deri uhar man akunduanyiin kar anigheni." 
1Chronicles25:8 Ve er ishor sha u vea fa tom u vea er yô, ve cii, orvesen man wanye, ortesen kua orhenen kpaa." 
1Chronicles25:9 Ishor i hiihii i sha ci u Asav yô, gba sha Yosev; i sha uhar lu sha Gedalia, un a anmgbianev nav man ônov nav lu ior pue kar uhar;" 
1Chronicles25:10 i sha utar gba sha Sakur, ônov nav mba anmgbianev nav, ior pue kar uhar;" 
1Chronicles25:11 i sha unyiin gba sha Iseri, ônov nav man anmgbianev nav, ior pue kar uhar;" 
1Chronicles25:12 I sha utaan gba sha Netania, ônov nav man anmgbianev nav, ior pue kar uhar;" 
1Chronicles25:13 i sha ataratar gba sha Bukia, ônov nav man anmgbianev nav, ior pue kar uhar;" 
1Chronicles25:14 i sha utaankaruhar gba sha Yesharela, ônov nav man anmgbianev nav, ior pue kar uhar;" 
1Chronicles25:15 i sha anigheni gba sha Yeshaia, ônov nav man anmgbianev nav, ior pue kar uhar;" 
1Chronicles25:16 i sha utaankarunyiin gba sha Matania, ônov nav man anmgbianev nav, ior pue kar uhar;" 
1Chronicles25:17 i sha pue gba sha Shimei, ônov nav man anmgbianev nav, ior pue kar uhar;" 
1Chronicles25:18 i sha pue kar môm gba sha Asarel, ônov nav man anmgbianev nav, ior pue kar uhar;" 
1Chronicles25:19 i sha pue kar uhar gba sha Hashabia, ônov nav man anmgbianev nav, ior pue kar uhar;" 
1Chronicles25:20 i sha pue kar utar gba sha Shubael, ônov nav man anmgbianev nav; ior pue kar uhar;" 
1Chronicles25:21 i sha pue kar unyiin gba sha Matitia, ônov nav man anmgbianev nav, ior pue kar uhar;" 
1Chronicles25:22 i sha pue kar utaan gba sha Yeremoti, ônov nav man anmgbianev nav, ior pue kar uhar;" 
1Chronicles25:23 i sha pue kar ataratar gba sha Hanania, ônov nav man anmgbianev nav, ior pue kar uhar;" 
1Chronicles25:24 i sha pue kar utaankaruhar gba sha Yoshebekasha, ônov nav man anmgbianev nav, ior pue kar uhar;" 
1Chronicles25:25 i sha pue kar anigheni gba sha Hanani, ônov nav man anmgbianev nav, ior pue kar uhar;" 
1Chronicles25:26 i sha pue kar utaankarunyiin gba sha Maloti, ônov nav man anmgbianev nav, ior pue kar uhar;" 
1Chronicles25:27 i sha ikundu gba sha Eliati, ônov nav man anmgbianev nav, ior pue kar uhar;" 
1Chronicles25:28 i sha ikundu kar môm gba sha Hotir, ônov nav man anmgbianev nav, ior pue kar uhar;" 
1Chronicles25:29 i sha ikundu kar uhar gba sha Gidalti, ônov nav man anmgbianev nav, ior pue kar uhar;" 
1Chronicles25:30 i sha ikundu kar uhar gba sha Mahashioti, ônov nav man anmgbianev nav, ior pue kar uhar;" 
1Chronicles25:31 i sha ikundu kar unyiin gba sha Romamti-eser, ônov nav man anmgbianev nav, ior pue kar uhar." 
1Chronicles26:1 Sha kwagh u iniongo i mbakuranhunda yô, ken Mbakora i ver Meshelemia wan u Kore, u ken ônov mba Asav." 
1Chronicles26:2 Meshelemia lu a ônov mba nomso, ka: Sekaria waniunda, Yediael dondo, Sebadia lu u sha utar, Yateniel u sha unyiin," 
1Chronicles26:3 Elam u sha utaan, Yehohanan u sha ataratar, Elioenai u sha utaankaruhar." 
1Chronicles26:4 Obedi-edom kpaa lu a ônov mba nomso, ka: Shemaia waniunda. Yehoshabadi dondo. Yoa lu u sha utar, Sakar u sha unyiin, Netanel u sha utaan," 
1Chronicles26:5 Amiel u sha ataratar, Isakar u sha utaankaruhar, Peuletai u sha anigheni; gadia Aôndo ver un dedoo." 
1Chronicles26:6 Wan na Shemaia kpaa mar ônov mba nomso; ve lu mbahemenev hen ya u ter ve, gadia ve lu anomaior a ageegh." 
1Chronicles26:7 Ônov mba Shemaia yô, lu: Oteni man Refael man Obedi man Elsabadi; anmgbianev vev lu ior mba ageev, ka Elihu man Semakia." 
1Chronicles26:8 Mban cii lu ken ônov mba Obedi-edom; ve a ônov vev man anmgbianev vev, ve lu ior mba ageev, ve kuma sha tom la, ve lu akunduatar kar uhar, mba Obedi-edom." 
1Chronicles26:9 Meshelemia lu a ônov man anmgbianev, ior mba ageev, pue kar anigheni." 
1Chronicles26:10 Hosa u ken ônov mba Merari, lu a ônov mba nomso: Shimeri lu orhemen (gadia shin er un lu waniunda ga, nahan kpaa ter na ver un tamen)," 
1Chronicles26:11 Hilkia lu u sha uhar, Tebalia u sha utar, Sekaria u sha unyiin; kohol ônov man anmgbianev mba Hosa cii lu ior pue kar uhar." 
1Chronicles26:12 Iniongo i mbakuranhunda ne, er i pav hanma orvesen a nongo u nan, ve lu a tom u eren, er anmgbianev vev nahan, ken iyou i TER." 
1Chronicles26:13 Ve er ishor, mbakiriki kua mbavesen kpaa, sha mlu u iyenge i uya mba uter vev, sha ci u hanma hunda cii." 
1Chronicles26:14 Ishor i sha ci u vegher u sha ityoughkitaregh la, gba sha Shelemia. Tsô ve er ishor sha ci u wan na Sekaria, or u wasen u henen kwagh jighilii; kwar na gema gba vegher u ken imbusutarimese." 
1Chronicles26:15 Kwar u Obedi-edom yô, gba vegher u ken imbusutariyan; kwar u ônov nav gema lu di iyou i koson akaa ker." 
1Chronicles26:16 Kwar u Shupim man u Hosa yô, lu vegher u shin ityôtar, hen hunda u Shaleketi sha igbudu u kôndon sha la, mbakuran lu keen man keen, ve zua ishigh." 
1Chronicles26:17 Vegher u sha ityoughkitaregh, Mbalevi lu ataratar; vegher u ken imbusutarimese la, ve luun unyiin ayange ayange; vegher u ken imbusutariyan kpaa unyiin ayange ayange; sha iyou i koson akaa yô, ve luun uhar uhar." 
1Chronicles26:18 Hen ayou a i maa ken kungur la, vegher u shin ityôtar yô, ve luun unyiin sha igbudu u kôndon sha la, man uhar hen ayou a i maa ken kungur la." 
1Chronicles26:19 Ka iniongo i mbakuranhunda je ne; ka mba ken ônov mba Kora, kua mba ken ônov mba Merari." 
1Chronicles26:20 Man anmgbianev vev, Mbalevi lu nengen sha inyaregh ki iyou i Aôndo, man sha inyaregh ki uicighanmbaakaav la." 
1Chronicles26:21 Ônov mba Ladan, ônov mba Mbagershon mba ve lu mba Ladan la, mbahemenev mba sha uya mba uter mba Ladan, Orgershon la, lu: Yehieli." 
1Chronicles26:22 Ônov mba Yehieli yô, lu: Setam man anngô na Yoel; ve nengen sha inyaregh ki iyou i TER." 
1Chronicles26:23 Sha kwagh u Mbaamram man Mbaisehar man Mbaheberon kua Mbaushiel yô," 
1Chronicles26:24 lu Shebuel wan u Gershon, wan u Mose, lu orvesen sha ayouanyar la." 
1Chronicles26:25 Man anmgbianev nav mba ken Elieser yô, lu: Rahabia wan na, Yeshaia wan na, Yoram wan na, Shikeri wan na, Shelomoti wan na." 
1Chronicles26:26 Shelomoti ne kua anmgbianev nav ve lu nengen sha inyaregh ki uicighanmbaakaav cii, ki tor Davidi man mbahemenev mba sha uya mba uter, man mbahemenev mba lun a ior dubu dubu man deri deri sha ikev, man mbahemenev mba akumautya, ve tsegha yô." 
1Chronicles26:27 Ve pande ishar i utya ve tsegha sha ci u sôron iyou i TER. 
1Chronicles26:28 Akaa cii a profeti Samuel lu tsegha kpaa kua Saulu wan u Kishi, man Abiner wan u Ner, man Yoabi wan u Seruya, hanma kwagh u i tsegh un cii, ka sha ikev i Shelomoti kua anmgbianev nav a lu ye." 
1Chronicles26:29 Ken Mbaisehar yô, i ver Kenania a ônov nav er ve̱ lu mbahemenev man mbaajiriv mba Iserael sha ci u akaa a ken won." 
1Chronicles26:30 Ken Mbaheberon yô, Hashabia a anmgbianev nav, nomsombaiorov mba ageev, ior dubu man deri utaankaruhar, ve lu mba nengen sha Iserael yande Yordan vegher u shin ityôtar, sha ci u akaa a TER cii man tom u tor." 
1Chronicles26:31 Ken Mbaheberon yô, Yeriya lu orhemen, ka ken Mbaheberon je la, sha ikov ve ken uya mba uter. (Sha inyom i sha akunduahar i tor u Davidi la, i time sha kwagh, i zua a anomaior a ageegh ken ve hen Yaser u Gileadi.)" 
1Chronicles26:32 Anmgbianev nav kpaa lu anomaior, ve lu dubu uhar man deri utaankaruhar, mbavesen mba sha uya mba uter; tor Davidi ver ve, ve lu mba nengen sha Mbaruben man Mbagadi man vegherkwe u Mbamanase, sha ci u hanma kwagh u Aôndo kua akaa a tor." 
1Chronicles27:1 Mbaiserael ka iyenge ve ne: mbavesen mba sha uya mba uter, man mbahemenev mba lun a ior dubu dubu man deri deri sha ikev, man mbatomov vev mba ve lu eren tor tom sha hanma kwagh u iniongo i i lu nyôron man i lu duen sha iwer iwer, sha iwer i ken inyom cii, hanma nongo lu ior dubu ikundu kar unyiin." 
1Chronicles27:2 Or u nengen sha nongo u hiihii sha uwer u hiihii la yô, lu Yashobeam wan u Sabediel; ken nongo na ior lu dubu ikundu kar unyiin." 
1Chronicles27:3 Ken ônov mba Perese yô, un lu orvesen u mbahemenev mba akumautya cii sha uwer u hiihii la." 
1Chronicles27:4 Or u nengen sha nongo u sha uwer u sha uhar yô, lu Dodai, Orahohi; sha nongo na Mikeloti lu orvesen; ken nongo na, ior lu dubu ikundu kar unyiin." 
1Chronicles27:5 Orhemen u ikumutya i sha utar, sha uwer u sha utar la yô, lu Benaia wan u zegepristi Yehoyada; ken nongo na ior lu dubu ikundu kar unyiin." 
1Chronicles27:6 Ka Benaia u a lu or u ageegh ken mba ikundugber mbala je ne, man shi mba ikundugber mbala lu sha ikev na, wan na Amisabadi kpaa lu ken nongo na." 
1Chronicles27:7 U sha unyiin sha uwer u sha unyiin yô, lu Asahel, anngô u Yoabi, wan na Sebadia gema gbire sha a na; ken nongo na ior lu dubu ikundu kar unyiin." 
1Chronicles27:8 Orhemen u sha utaan sha uwer u sha utaan yô, lu Shamahuti, Orisera; ken nongo na ior lu dubu ikundu kar unyiin." 
1Chronicles27:9 U sha ataratar sha uwer u sha ataratar yô, lu Ira wan u Ikeshi, Ortekoa; ken nongo na ior lu dubu ikundu kar unyiin." 
1Chronicles27:10 U sha utaankaruhar sha uwer u sha utaankaruhar yô, lu Helese, Orpelon, u ken ônov mba Eferaim; ken nongo na ior lu dubu ikundu kar unyiin." 
1Chronicles27:11 U sha anigheni sha uwer u sha anigheni yô, lu Shibekai, Orhusha, u ken Mbaserahi; ken nongo na ior lu dubu ikundu kar unyiin." 
1Chronicles27:12 U sha utaankarunyiin sha uwer u sha utaankarunyiin yô, lu Abieser, Oranatoti, u ken Mbabenyamin; ken nongo na ior lu dubu ikundu kar unyiin." 
1Chronicles27:13 U sha pue sha uwer u sha pue yô, lu Maharai, Ornetofa, u ken Mbaserahi; ken nongo na ior lu dubu ikundu kar unyiin." 
1Chronicles27:14 U sha pue kar môm sha uwer u sha pue kar môm yô, lu Benaia, Orpiraton, u ken ônov mba Eferaim; ken nongo na yô, ior lu dubu ikundu kar unyiin." 
1Chronicles27:15 U sha pue kar uhar sha uwer u sha pue kar uhar yô, lu Heldai, Ornetofa, u ken Oteniel; ken nongo na yô, ior lu dubu ikundu kar unyiin." 
1Chronicles27:16 Sha ikwe i Iserael ken Mbaruben yô, Elieser wan u Shikeri lu orhemen; ken Mbashimeon yô, lu Shefatia wan u Maaka;" 
1Chronicles27:17 ken Levi yô, lu Hashabia wan u Kemuel; ken Aron yô, lu Sadoki;" 
1Chronicles27:18 ken Yuda yô, lu Elihu, u ken anmgbianev mba Davidi; ken Isakar yô, lu Omeri wan u Mikael;" 
1Chronicles27:19 ken Sebulon yô, lu Ishemaia wan u Obadia; ken Nafetali yô, lu Yeremoti wan u Aseriel;" 
1Chronicles27:20 ken ônov mba Eferaim yô, lu Hoshea wan u Asashia; ken vegherkwe u Manase yô, lu Yoel wan u Pedaia;" 
1Chronicles27:21 ken vegherkwe u Manase ken Gileadi yô, lu Ido wan u Sekaria; ken Benyamin yô, lu Yaashiel wan u Abiner;" 
1Chronicles27:22 ken Dan yô, lu Asarel wan u Yeroham. Mban lu mbahemenev mba sha ikwe i Iserael." 
1Chronicles27:23 Kpa Davidi ôr iyenge i mba ve kom anyom ikundu man mba ve yen la ga, gadia TER kaa er, Una ngee Iserael er asan a Sha nahan." 
1Chronicles27:24 Yoabi wan u Seruya hii u ôron iyenge, kpa er lu a bee ga tsô, iyugh sen sha Iserael sha ci u kwagh shon ne; ka nahan man i nger iyenge ve ken ruamabera u abaver u tor Davidi ga ye." 
1Chronicles27:25 Akaa a tor a i koso a yô, lu sha ikev i Asemaveti wan u Adiel; akaa a i koso ken ishule man ken agar a vesen man agar a kiriki man ken ayouautya yô, lu sha ikev i Yonatan wan u Ushia;" 
1Chronicles27:26 Eseri wan u Kelubi lu or u nengen sha mbakahansule; 
1Chronicles27:27 Shimei Orrama nengen di sha ishule i ikon i wain; Sabedi Orshifemi yô, a nengen sha wain u i ombo un ken ishule i wain." 
1Chronicles27:28 Ikon i olev man ikon i tur i shin pev yô, lu sha ikev i Baal-hanan, Orgeder; ayou a koson mkurem ker lu sha ikev i Yoashi;" 
1Chronicles27:29 akumabua a yan toho ken Sharon yô, lu sha ikev i Shiteria, Orsharon; man akumabua a a lu shin apev yô, lu sha ikev i Shafati, wan u Adelai;" 
1Chronicles27:30 urakumi yô, lu sha ikev i Obil, Orishemael; ujaki yô, lu sha ikev i Yedeia, Ormeronoti; man akumauile yô, lu sha ikev i Yashishi, Orhagar." 
1Chronicles27:31 Mban cii lu mbahemenev sha akaa a Davidi. 
1Chronicles27:32 Yonatan wan u anngô u Davidi lu or u wasen henen kwagh, lu orfankwagh, shi lu orngeren kpaa; Yehiel wan u Hakemoni lu a ônov mba tor imôngo;" 
1Chronicles27:33 Ahitofel lu or u wasen tor kwaghhenen; Hushai, Orarkiti, lu ikar u tor;" 
1Chronicles27:34 or u nan dondo sha Ahitofel yô, lu Yehoyada wan u Benaia, man Abiatar; Yoabi lu orhemen u akumautya a tor." 
1Chronicles28:1 Tsô Davidi kohol mbahemenev mba Iserael cii, ka mbahemenev mba sha ikwe, man mbahemenev mba iniongo i eren tor tom, man mbahemenev mba lun a ior dubu dubu sha ikev, man mbahemenev mba lun a ior deri deri sha ikev, man mbahemenev mba nengen sha ikav mbi tor man inyaregh nagh kua mbi ônov nav, man mbaerentom ken ya u tor, kua nomsombaiorov mba vian asema, ka anomaior a ageegh la cii, a kohol ve ken Yerusalem." 
1Chronicles28:2 Nahan tor Davidi mough tile sha, kaa er: Ungwa nen ase imo yam anmgbianev av, man ior av; mo yô, lum ken ishima u maan iyou i memen sha ci u areki u ikuryan u TER man sha ci u kwaghpendanangahar min, u Aôndo wase, man m kohol iyol je sha u maan iyou la." 
1Chronicles28:3 Kpa Aôndo kaa a mo er: We ú maa iyou sha ci u iti Yam ga, sha ci u u lu orutya, man shi u hee awambe inya kpaa yô." 
1Chronicles28:4 Nahan kpaa, TER, Aôndo u Iserael, tsuwam ken ya u terem, mo tswen, er m̱ tema tor sha Iserael gbem; gadia A tsuwa Yuda er a̱ lu ityoor, man ken ya u Yuda yô, A verem tor sha Iserael cii;" 
1Chronicles28:5 man ken ônov av cii yô (gadia TER nam ônov kpishi) A tsuwa wan wam Solomon er a̱ tema sha ikônough ki torough ki tartor u TER, sha Iserael." 
1Chronicles28:6 Nahan A kaa a mo er: Wan wou Solomon ka un una maa iyou Yam kua ityembeya Yam ye; gadia M tsuwa un Mer, a̱ lu wan Wam, Me lu ter na." 
1Chronicles28:7 Man Me taver tor na gbem, aluer una taver ishima u wan atindi a Am kua akaawan a Am iko er i eren nyian nahan yô." 
1Chronicles28:8 Hegen yô, sha ishigh ki Iserael, mkohol u TER ne cii, man sha ato a Aôndo wase kpaa, waan nen atindi a TER, Aôndo wen, iko cii, timen nen sha a, sha u tar u dedoo ne u̱ lu u wen, man né undu ônov enev dyako u u ken ijime yen gbem yô." 
1Chronicles28:9 Nahan yô, we wan wam Solomon, fa Aôndo u teru, civir Un a ishima i môm man ishima i gbar gbar kpaa; gadia TER tev asema cii, man A kar hanma mhen cii. Aluer ú ker Un yô, ú zua a Na; man aluer ú undu Un yô, Una ta u kera, Una hunde ishima a we gbem je." 
1Chronicles28:10 Nenge, TER tsuwa u er u̱ maa iyou, i̱ lu icighanjiir; yô, lu taveraa, er ase nahan." 
1Chronicles28:11 Tsô Davidi tese wan na Solomon mlu u puadwer u tempel, man u ayou a na, man u ayou a na a koson akaa ker, man mlu u ukpo nav mba shaav, man u ukpar nav mba kimi, man u kpar na u ijiir i nan iwom ker la," 
1Chronicles28:12 man mlu u akaa a a lu a mi ken ishima cii sha kwagh u ityembe i iyou i TER, man ayou a a kase i cii, man ayou a koson akaa a iyou i Aôndo ker, kua ayou a koson uicighanmbaakaav;" 
1Chronicles28:13 man sha kwagh u iniongo i upristi kua Mbalevi kpaa, man sha kwagh u ityom i eren ken iyou i TER cii, man ikav mbi tomov mbi ken iyou i TER cii." 
1Chronicles28:14 (A na) zenaria u i kar myohom nam, sha ci u ikav mbi zenaria, sha ci u ikav mbi sha hanma injatom cii; shi a na azurfa i kar myohom nam, sha ci u ikav mbi sha hanma injatom cii;" 
1Chronicles28:15 i kar myohom ma udaarmbaamengerev mba zenaria kua amenger a ve a zenaria, i kar myohom ma zenaria sha ci u hanma daarimenger kua amenger a na; man shi i kar myohom ma azurfa sha ci u daarimenger u azurfa sha mkar u myohom u daarimenger kua amenger a na, sha injatom i hanma daarimenger cii;" 
1Chronicles28:16 man i kar myohom ma zenaria sha ci u utebul mba ubredi mba sha ishi, sha ci u hanma tebul; man azurfa kpaa sha ci u utebul mba azurfa;" 
1Chronicles28:17 man zenaria u wang sha ci u iyôv mbi dughun inyam a mi man utasa man ayongo, man sha ci u ugbande mba zenaria, sha myohom ma hanma gbande; man sha ci u ugbande mba azurfa kpaa, sha myohom ma hanma gbande;" 
1Chronicles28:18 man sha ci u atse a nanden kwagh u humandoon sha mi kpaa, a na zenaria u i ser sha usu i kar un myohom yô; man zenaria sha ci u ikav i ikyekye, ka ucerubi mba ve naregh akper a ve, ve cir areki u ikuryan u TER je la." 
1Chronicles28:19 Akaa angan, ityom ne cii, akav a i la, A tesem sha mnger u i nger sha uwegh ku TER ku ku lu sha a mo yô." 
1Chronicles28:20 Davidi kaa a wan na Solomon er: Lu taveraa, taver ishima, er ase nahan; de cie kwagh ga, de yen ishima ga, gadia TER, Aôndo, Aôndo wam, ngu a we je, Una gbihi u ga, Una undu u ga, zan zan ú kure tom u iyou i TER ne cii." 
1Chronicles28:21 Nenge, iniongo i upristi man i Mbalevi ngi sha ci u tom u ken iyou i Aôndo cii; sha hanma injatom cii, u ngu a ior mba fan eev, mba vea er hanma injatom; mbahemenev kua ior cii kpaa vea wase u sha hanma kwagh cii." 
1Chronicles29:1 Tsô tor Davidi kaa ior cii er: Wan wam Solomon u Aôndo A tsough un ne, hide ka wanye tsô, ngu denge denge, man tom yô, u kehe; gadia zegeyou la ngu sha ci u or ga, kpa ka sha ci u TER Aôndo je." 
1Chronicles29:2 Ka sha agee am cii je, m kohol akaa sha ci u iyou i Aôndo wam ye; zenaria sha ci u akaa a sha zenaria, man azurfa sha ci u akaa a sha azurfa, man togula sha ci u akaa a sha togula, man iyôv mbi iliv sha ci u akaa a sha iyôv mbi iliv, man ikon sha ci u akaa a sha ikon, man awen a oniki, man awen a wan sha akaa, man awen a hweegh man a lun ashe anza kposo kposo, man awen a injaa anza kposo kposo, kua awen a mabel kpishi kpaa." 
1Chronicles29:3 Man er iyou i Aôndo wam i diom ishima yum yô, inyaregh yagh iyol yam, ki zenaria kua ki azurfa, m na ki sha ci u iyou i Aôndo wam, seer sha ki m vande kohol sha ci u icighanyou la cii;" 
1Chronicles29:4 ka zenaria, utalenti dubu utar, zenaria u Ofir; man azurfa u i ser sha usu yô, ka utalenti dubu utaankaruhar, sha u cirin ukpekpembaayoughouv a mi;" 
1Chronicles29:5 zenaria sha ci u akaa a zenaria, man azurfa di sha ci u akaa a azurfa, man shi sha ci u hanma injatom i sha ave a mbafaneev. Ka an nana na iyol i nan nyian gbar gbar u ivin ikev i nan sha u nan TER iwua?" 
1Chronicles29:6 Tsô mbahemenev mba sha uya mba uter, man mbahemenev mba ikwe i Iserael, man mbahemenev mba sha ior dubu dubu man mba sha ior deri deri, kua mbahemenev mba sha tom u tor, ve na iwua sha asema a gbar gbar;" 
1Chronicles29:7 ve na zenaria utalenti dubu utaan man udariki dubu pue, man azurfa utalenti dubu pue, man togula utalenti dubu deri, sha ci u tom u iyou i Aôndo." 
1Chronicles29:8 Mba i zua ve a awen a injaa yô, ve na a sha ci u akaainjaa a iyou i TER, sha ikev i Yehiel Orgershon." 
1Chronicles29:9 Tsô ior ember, er ve na gbar gbar nahan, gadia ve na TER iwua a ishima i môm gbar gbar; tor Davidi kpaa lu saan saan." 
1Chronicles29:10 Nahan Davidi wuese TER Sha ishigh ki ior cii. Davidi kaa er: I̱ wuese We, TER, Aôndo u ter wase Iserael, gbem sha won." 
1Chronicles29:11 We TER, U kuma ivesen man agee man iengem man mhembe man icivir, akaa a Sha man a shin tar cii ka a Ou; We TER, U kuma u teman tor, U ngu ityough sha akaa cii." 
1Chronicles29:12 Inyaregh man icivir ka her a We ve dugh ye, U tema tor sha akaa cii; sha uwegh Ough yô, agee nga kua tahav kpaa; ka sha uwegh Ough á civir man á taver akaa cii ye." 
1Chronicles29:13 Hegen yô, Aôndo wase, se mba sughun We, shi se mba wuese iti You i iengem kpaa." 
1Chronicles29:14 Kpa mo m ngu an je, man ior av mba di nyi je, u se taver se na iwua sha ishima i gbar gbar nahana? Gadia akaa cii ka hen a We a dugh ye, ka kwagh Wou se hidi a mi, se ne U ye." 
1Chronicles29:15 Gadia se mba mbavannya man ushirmbaiorov sha ishigh You er uter asev cii lu nahan; ayange ase a sha won kpaa nga er mure nahan, ishimaverenkeghen kpaa kera ngi ga." 
1Chronicles29:16 TERE, Aôndo wase, ikav mbin mbi se kohol cii se ver sha u maan We iyou sha ci u icighanti Wou ne, ka ken uwegh Ough mbi dugh ye, ka mbi You cii." 
1Chronicles29:17 Shi m fa kpaa, Aôndo wam, U kar ishima, perapera doo U. Mo iyol yam yô, ka sha ishima yam i wang je, m ne akaa ne cii gbar gbar ye; hegen yô, ka sha iember je, m nenge ior Ou, mba ve kohol heen, ve ne U akaa gbar gbar ye." 
1Chronicles29:18 TERE, Aôndo u uter asev, Aberaham man Isaka man Iserael, kura kwagh ne ken mhen u asema a ior Ou, gbem, ver ve asema sha a We taveraa;" 
1Chronicles29:19 na wan wam Solomon ishima i jighilii kpaa, er una wa atindi a Ou man mbampase Ou man akaawan a Ou iko, a̱ er akaa ne cii man shi a̱ maa tempel u m kohol ikav mbi eren un a mi la." 
1Chronicles29:20 Tsô Davidi kaa a ior cii er: Yô, wuese nen TER, Aôndo wen. Tsô ior cii wuese TER, Aôndo u uter vev, ve wa ityough inya, ve gure ve civir Aôndo, ve civir tor kpaa." 
1Chronicles29:21 Kper nan la yô, ve na TER nagh, ve na TER iniav mbi nanden sha abua dubu, man anomaiyôngo dubu, man agumaiyôngo dubu, a iniav vev mbi man imôngo, man iniav mbi sôngon wuee, sha ci u Iserael cii." 
1Chronicles29:22 Ve ya kwagh ve ma kwagh sha ishigh ki TER, a iember kpishi sha iyange la; shi ve ver Solomon wan u Davidi tor, ka kwa har je la, ve shighe un mkurem a̱ lu ityoor sha ci u TER, Sadoki di lu pristi." 
1Chronicles29:23 Tsô Solomon tema sha ikônough ki torough ki TER, a ya tor sha ityough ki ter na Davidi, a tema kpe un iyol; Iserael cii ve ungwan imo na." 
1Chronicles29:24 Atiator cii man anomaior a ageegh kua ônov mba tor Davidi cii, ve ungwan imo i tor Solomon."
