1Chronicles29:25 TER kende a Solomon sha kpishi sha ishigh ki Iserael cii, A na un icivir i tor i ma tor ugen u nan vande a na ken Iserael nan lu a zua a mi nahan ga yô." 
1Chronicles29:26 Kape Davidi wan u Yese lu tor sha Iserael cii la. 
1Chronicles29:27 Anyom a a lu tor sha Iserael yô, lu akunduahar; anyom ataankarahar a lu tor ken Heberon, man anyom ikundugber kar atar a lu tor ken Yerusalem." 
1Chronicles29:28 A kpe, a tsa sha won dedoo, mgbough a inyaregh, a lu a icivir kpishi; tsô wan na Solomon tema tor sha ityough nagh." 
1Chronicles29:29 Aerenakaa a tor Davidi a hiihii man a masetyô cii, nenge i nger a ken abaver a Samuel, ornengenakaa, man ken abaver a profeti Natan, man ken abaver a Gadi ornengenakaa," 
1Chronicles29:30 i nger kwagh u tartor na kpaa, man tahav nav cii, man ayange a a kar sha a na man sha Iserael kua sha utor mba ityar igen cii." 
2Chronicles1:1 Tsô Solomon wan u Davidi taver sha tor na, TER, Aôndo na, lu a na, A kende a na sha kpishi." 
2Chronicles1:2 Nahan Solomon ôr kwagh a Iserael cii, a mbahemenev mba ve lu a ior dubu dubu sha ikev, man mba ve lu a ior deri deri sha ikev, man a mbaajiriv, man shi a hanma ityoor u ken Iserael cii, ka mbatamen mba sha uya mba uter je la." 
2Chronicles1:3 Tsô Solomon kua mkohol u ior cii, ve kôndo, ve za sha ijiir i taven sha i i lu hen Gibeon la, gadia ka her man tenti u kohol ker u Aôndo, u Mose wanakiriki u TER er ken ikôngo la, lu ye." 
2Chronicles1:4 Kpa Davidi vande tôôn areki u Aôndo ken Kiriati-yearim kera ve, a va a mi hen ijiir i Davidi sôr sha ci na la; gadia a tim un tenti ken Yerusalem." 
2Chronicles1:5 Atse a nanden nagh sha mi a togula, a Besalel, wan u Uri, wan u Hur, er la yô, lu her, sha ishigh ki tabernakel u TER; Solomon man mkohol u ior ve za her a." 
2Chronicles1:6 Solomon za na nagh heregh sha atse a togula sha ishigh ki TER, a a lu hen tenti u kohol ker la; a na iniav mbi nanden sha a kuma dubu." 
2Chronicles1:7 Hen tugh mbula je, Aôndo ande hen Solomon, A kaa a na er: Sônom kwagh u a sar u u M̱ na u yô." 
2Chronicles1:8 Tsô Solomon kaa a Aôndo er: U tese terem Davidi erdoo u vesen, man U verem tor sha ityough nagh." 
2Chronicles1:9 Hegen yô, TERE, Aôndo, ityendezwa You a terem Davidi i kure sha mi vough; gadia U verem tor sha ior ngee er vuulevu u hen inya nahan." 
2Chronicles1:10 Yô, nam mkav man mfe sha u m̱ duen, m̱ nyôron sha ishigh ki ior mban; gadia ka anti je nana fatyô u ôron imbaikpelaior You ne ijiri?" 
2Chronicles1:11 Tsô Aôndo kaa a Solomon er: Er kwagh ne a lu u ken ishima, u sen inyaregh shin mkpeyol shin icivir shin u wuan mba ve ker u ihom kpaa ga, man u sen u tsan sha won kpaa ga, kpaa u gem u sen mkav man mfe, sha er ú fatyô u ôron ior Av ijir, mba M ver u tor sha a ve yô;" 
2Chronicles1:12 yô, mkav man mfe la i na u ve; shi Me na u inyaregh man mkpeyol man icivir, imba i ma tor ugen u nan vande lun a we nan lu a min ga, man shi ma or môm kpaa nana kera zua a mi ken ijime you nahan ga." 
2Chronicles1:13 Nahan Solomon mough sha ijiir i taven sha i sha Gibeon la, sha ishigh ki tenti u kohol ker, a hide hen Yerusalem, a va tema tor sha Iserael." 
2Chronicles1:14 Tsô Solomon kohol akekeautya man mbaanyinyav; a lu a akeke dubu man deri unyiin man mbaanyinyav dubu pue kar uhar, mba a ver ve ken agar a akeke a lu ker yô, man hen tor ken Yerusalem kpaa." 
2Chronicles1:15 Tor er azurfa man zenaria ngee hingir er awen nahan ken Yerusalem, man ikon i sedar kpaa ngee hingir er ikon i tur shin pev nahan, ngee je, gande." 
2Chronicles1:16 Anyinya a Solomon lu a mi yô, ka ken Igipiti man ken Kue i za vaan a a ye; mbakasuav mba tor, za yamen a ken Kue sha ishe i a vough." 
2Chronicles1:17 Ikyekye i ka a za va a mi ken Igipiti la, i tee i sha ushekel mba azurfa deri ataratar, nyinya yô, sha ushekel deri man akunduahargber; kape i vaan a mi, i va teen utor mba Hiti man Mbashiria kpaa la." 
2Chronicles2:1 Tsô Solomon ver ishima u maan iyou sha ci u iti i TER, man iyou i tor sha ci na kpaa." 
2Chronicles2:2 Nahan Solomon ver ior dubu akunduatargber mbatôônikav, man ior dubu akunduanyiin mbadughun awen sha iwo, man shi ior dubu utar man deri ataratar mbanengen sha a ve." 
2Chronicles2:3 Shi Solomon tindi loho hen Huram tor u Tiru, a kaa er: Er lu u er a terem Davidi, u tindi un a ikon i sedar sha u i̱ maan un iyou i tsan ker la, yô, mo kpaa er a mo nahan." 
2Chronicles2:4 Nenge, m ngu kohol iyol sha u maan iyou sha ci u iti i TER, Aôndo wam, sha u tseghan i sha ci Na, sha u nanden ilyôghonov mbi human doon sha ishigh Nagh, man shi sha ci u ubredi mba sha ishi mba lun her gbem la, man shi sha ci u iniav mbi nanden pepe man aikighe, sha ayange a memen sha iwer i he, man sha uiniongo mba i ver sha ashighe ashighe la, mba TER, Aôndo wase. Ka kwagh u Iserael una eren gbem je la." 
2Chronicles2:5 Man iyou i me maa la, i kehe; gadia Aôndo wase gba ikôr hemba mbaaôndo mbagenev cii." 
2Chronicles2:6 Kpaa ka an nana fatyô u maan Un iyougho? Gadia Sha man Sha u a hembe gban ca la je kpaa, fatyô u ngohol Un ga. Man mo m ngu nyi je u me maa Un iyou, saa di u nanden kwaghhumandoon sha ishigh nagh tsô gaa?" 
2Chronicles2:7 Yô, tindim a or u fan tom u zenaria man u azurfa man u togula man u iyôgh ki iligh, man u ikondo i nyian dindee, man i nyian bong, man i kwel, u nan fe eev; nana̱ va lu a mbafaneev mba ve lu a mo ken Yuda man ken Yerusalem, mba terem Davidi lu kohol la." 
2Chronicles2:8 Shi tindim a ikon i sedar man i fer man i sandal i sha Lebanon; gadia m fa mbayev ou fa u gberen ikon sha Lebanon; yô, mbayev av vea lu a mbayev ou imôngo;" 
2Chronicles2:9 ve̱ kohol mo ikon kpishi; gadia iyou i me maa la, ia gba ikôr je, á kpiligh iyol." 
2Chronicles2:10 Yô, kwagh u me na mbayev ou mba gberen ikon yô, ka alakema uikaren dubu ikundu, man shair uikaren dubu ikundu, man wain ubav dubu ikundu, kua mkurem ubav dubu ikundu." 
2Chronicles2:11 Tsô Huram tor u Tiru rumun, nger, tindi Solomon a mi, kaa er: Ka er ior mba Ter ve doo Un ishima man A ver u tor sha a ve ye." 
2Chronicles2:12 Shi Huram kaa er: I̱ wuese TER, Aôndo u Iserael, U A er Sha man tar, u A ne tor Davidi wan u fan kwagh u a iv a kwaghfan man mkav er una maa iyou sha ci u TER, man iyou sha ci u tor na kpaa." 
2Chronicles2:13 Yô, m ngu tindin orfaneev u kaven kwagh doo doo, iti na er Huramabi," 
2Chronicles2:14 ka wan u kwase u Mbadan, man ter na yô, gema lu Ortiru, u a fa tom u zenaria, man u azurfa, man u togula, man u iyôgh ki iligh, man u awen, man u ikon, man u ikondo i nyian dindee, man i kwel, man ikondo i pupuu i kôngor, man ikondo i nyian bong; ka or u fan eev, man u dughun hanma inja i uee; yô, a̱ lu a ior ou mba fan eev imôngo man shi a ior mba fan eev mba terem Davidi, teru." 
2Chronicles2:15 Yô, terem a̱ tindi mbayev nav a alakema man shair man mkurem kua wain, akaa a terem a kaa la." 
2Chronicles2:16 Se kpaa sé gber ikon sha uwo u Lebanon, er i sar u cii; sé tar i sé kor i, sé sen a mi shin zegemnger sé va na u hen Yopa; yô, we di ú tôô ú yem a mi sha Yerusalem." 
2Chronicles2:17 Tsô Solomon ôr iyenge i akuraior agen a a lu ken tar u Iserael cii sha iyenge i Davidi ter na lu ôr ve yô, i zua a ve ior dubu deri môm kar dubu akunduahargber kar utar man deri ataratar." 
2Chronicles2:18 Tsô a pande dubu akunduatargber, a ver ve er ve̱ kuran ikav, man dubu akunduanyiin er ve̱ dughun awen sha iwo, man ior dubu utar man deri ataratar er ve̱ nengen sha a ve, ve̱ naan ior tom." 
2Chronicles3:1 Tsô Solomon hii u maan iyou i TER hen Yerusalem sha uwo u Moria, henpe TER ande hen ter na Davidi la, sha ijiir i Davidi sôr, hen vande u gbiren alakema u Ornan Oryebushi la." 
2Chronicles3:2 A hii u maan sha uwer u sha uhar ayange a u ahar, sha inyom i sha unyiin i a ya tor la." 
2Chronicles3:3 Amagh a Solomon tim sha u maan iyou i Aôndo yô, ka a ne: Iniembe na lu aseva akunduatar sha inja i ikaren i tse la, igbanger na yô, lu aseva ikundu." 
2Chronicles3:4 Puadwer u sha ishigh ki iyoughough la, iniembe na lu aseva ikundu sha igbanger i iyou la, ityaven na lu deri man ikundu; a cir un zenaria u wang kimi." 
2Chronicles3:5 A cir iyou i hemban vesen la ikon i fer, shi a cir i zenaria u dedoo, a er hwe sha mi, a nger avile man mshirim sha mi." 
2Chronicles3:6 A er hwe sha iyou la sha awen a injaa; zenaria la lu u ken Parvaim. 
2Chronicles3:7 A cir iyou la zenaria, ihange man ikpandeihinda i shin man ukpekpe kua ucivir mba i cii; a er ieev mbi ucerubi sha ukpekpe." 
2Chronicles3:8 A er icighankpar u hemban cii la kpaa, iniembe na lu aseva ikundu sha igbanger i iyou la, man igbanger na lu aseva ikundu; a cir i zenaria u dedoo kuma utalenti deri ataratar." 
2Chronicles3:9 Iyohov mbi ukusa lu ushekel mba zenaria akunduahargber. Ukpombaayoughouv mba shaav kpaa a cir ve zenaria. 
2Chronicles3:10 Ken icighankpar u hemban cii la, a er ieev mbi ucerubi ihiar; i cir mbi zenaria iyol." 
2Chronicles3:11 Iniembe i akper a ucerubi lu aseva ikundu, iniembe i kpelegh ku cerubi môm lu aseva ataan, suur ken kpekpe iyou; iniembe i kpelegh kugenegh la kpaa lu aseva ataan, zua sha kpelegh ku cerubi ugen la." 
2Chronicles3:12 Kpelegh ku cerubi ugen lu aseva ataan, suur ken kpekpe iyou; kpelegh kugenegh la kpaa lu aseva ataan, gema zua a kpelegh ku cerubi u hiihii la." 
2Chronicles3:13 Iniembe i akper a ucerubi mban samber kuma aseva ikundu; ve tile sha angahar a ve, ve ver ishiv sha iyou la." 
2Chronicles3:14 Shi a er ikondo i yisan, i kwel, man i nyian dindee, man i nyian bong kua i pupuu i kôngor, a er ucerubi sha i." 
2Chronicles3:15 Sha ishigh ki iyou la yô, a tim mtôm mhar, ityaven mbi ma lu aseva ikundugber kar ataan, indyuruku u a lu sha hanma ityôgh, lu aseva ataan." 
2Chronicles3:16 A er mshirim er ikar nahan a har ma sha uindyuruku mba sha mtô la; a er upomegraneti deri, a zer ve sha mshirim mara." 
2Chronicles3:17 A tim mtôm mara sha ishigh ki tempel, ki mômough ken uwegh ku yanegh, kigenegh ken imese; a ii ki ken uwegh ku yanegh la iti er Yakin, man ki ken imese la, a ii ki iti er Boashi." 
2Chronicles4:1 Shi a er atse a nanden nagh sha mi a togula; ilihen i a lu aseva ikundu, igbanger i a kpaa aseva ikundu, ityaven i a lu aseva pue." 
2Chronicles4:2 A shi a er zegetasa u haan mngerem shimi, a ker un a ker, hii hen kur ne za ar ken ngula lu aseva pue, á lu gbilititi, ityaven na lu aseva ataan; kor u lihen aseva ikundugber a fatyô u kasen un yisan." 
2Chronicles4:3 I er ieev mbi abua shin ityô na la, kase yisa kuma aseva pue je, a kase zegetasa u mnger la a tser. Abua la lu iniongo ihiar, i ker a, lu kwagh môm a zegetasa u mnger la." 
2Chronicles4:4 A tema sha abua pue kar ahar, atar ver ishigh ken imbusutarimese, atar ver ishigh shin ityôtar, atar ver ishigh ken imbusutariyan, man atar di ver ishigh sha ityoughkitaregh; i ver zegetasa la sha a, a zua atô kimi cii." 
2Chronicles4:5 A civir er ikevwe nahan, kur na la lu er kur u iyongo er imondon u loho nahan; a ivin sha ubav dubu utar." 
2Chronicles4:6 A er utasa mba ôôn akaa shimi pue, a ver utaan ken uwegh ku yanegh, shi utaan ken imese, sha ci u ôôn akaa shimi, i ôôn akaa a iniav mbi nanden shimi; kpa zegetasa u mnger la yô, lu sha ci u upristi ve̱ ôôn iyol shimi." 
2Chronicles4:7 Shi a er udaarmbaamengerev mba sha zenaria pue, vough er i tese er i̱ er ve la; a ver ve ken tempel, mba utaan ken uwegh ku yanegh, shi mba utaan ken imese." 
2Chronicles4:8 Shi a er utebul pue, a ver ve ken tempel, mba utaan ken uwegh ku yanegh shi mba utaan ken imese. Shi a er utasa mba zenaria deri." 
2Chronicles4:9 Man a shi a er tembe u upristi, man zegetembe u gbanger la, man ucivir sha ci u tembe, a cir ucivir mba i togula iyol." 
2Chronicles4:10 A ver zegetasa u mnger la, lu iyou la vegher u ken uwegh ku yanegh, vegher u sha ityoughkitaregh, gema ver ishigh ken imbusutariyan." 
2Chronicles4:11 Huram er ityev man ushebul kua atasa. Kape Huram kure tom, u a er sha ci u tor Solomon ken iyou i Aôndo la;" 
2Chronicles4:12 mtôm ma mhar, man adôôr a uindyuruku mba uhar mba ve lu sha ityouv mbi mtôm mara, man ukper uhar sha ci u cirin adôôr ahar a uindyuruku mba ve lu sha ityouv mbi mtô la," 
2Chronicles4:13 man upomegraneti deri unyiin sha ci u ukper mba uhar mbala, upomegraneti iniongo ihiar sha ci u hanma kper, sha ci u cirin adôôr ahar a uindyuruku mba ve lu sha ityouv mbi mtô la." 
2Chronicles4:14 A shi a er asange, man a er atasa a ôôn akaa shimi sha asange la," 
2Chronicles4:15 man zegetasa u mnger môm, man abua pue kar ahar shin ityô na." 
2Chronicles4:16 Ityev kpaa man ushebul man iyôv mbi dughun inyam kua ikav vev cii, Huramabi er tor Solomon mbi sha togula u engem sha ci u iyou i TER." 
2Chronicles4:17 Ka hen gbulumaa u Yordan hen inya i tiher tor ker mbi ye, hen harga u Sukoti vea Sereda." 
2Chronicles4:18 Kape Solomon er ikav mbila kpishi la, gadia myohom ma togula gande u karen." 
2Chronicles4:19 Solomon er ikav mbi ken iyou i Aôndo cii, atse a nanden nagh sha mi a zenaria, man utebul mba ve lu a ubredi mba sha ishi sha mi la;" 
2Chronicles4:20 man udaarmbaamengerev a amenger a ve, sha u a̱ yeghen sha ishigh ki kpar u kimi la, vough er i tese er i̱ er ve la, a er ve sha zenaria u wang;" 
2Chronicles4:21 uimondon kua amenger man akambe, lu sha zenaria cii, ka zenaria u wang je;" 
2Chronicles4:22 man akambe a sôron amenger a min man utasa man mbaahwa kua ugbande mba usuv, sha zenaria u wang. Sha kwagh u hunda u nyôron ken iyou yô, ucivir mba ken atô u i, sha ci u icighanjiir i hemban cii la, man ucivir mba kpoyou u vesen u tempel la, lu sha zenaria cii." 
2Chronicles5:1 Kape tom u Solomon er sha ci u iyou i TER u kure cii la. Tsô Solomon nyôr a ikav mbi ter na Davidi tsegha la; ka azurfa man zenaria kua ikav cii, a ver ken ayou a koson akaa ker a ken iyou i Aôndo." 
2Chronicles5:2 Tsô Solomon lôhô mbatamen mba Iserael man mbavesen mba sha ikwe cii, kua mbahemenev mba sha uipaven mba Mbaiserael; ve va zua hen Yerusalem, sha u za tôôn areki u ikuryan u TER ken gar u Davidi, ka Shion je la." 
2Chronicles5:3 Nahan ior mba Iserael cii va kohol hen tor hen iniongo, sha uwer u sha utaankaruhar la." 
2Chronicles5:4 Mbatamen mba Iserael cii va, nahan Mbalevi za tôô areki la." 
2Chronicles5:5 Ve va a areki kua tenti u kohol ker la a uicighanmbaakaav cii mba ve lu ken tenti la; ka upristi mba ken Mbalevi ve va a mi ye. 
2Chronicles5:6 Tsô tor Solomon a ior mba Iserael cii mba ve kohol her a na la, ve lu sha ishigh ki areki, ve lu nan nagh ku sôngon sha iyôngo man abua, iyenge i i gande u ôron fan." 
2Chronicles5:7 Nahan upristi va nyôr a areki u ikuryan u TER la, ve va ver un hen ijiir na, ken kpar u iyou u kimi la, hen icighankpar u hemban cii la, shin atô u akper a ucerubi." 
2Chronicles5:8 Gadia ucerubi naregh akper a ve sha ijiir i areki la; ucerubi cir areki kua igbough nav. 
2Chronicles5:9 Igbough mbila lihe je, i nengen a ityouv mbi igbough mbila ken icighankpar la sha ishigh ki kpar u kimi la; kpa i nengen a mi ken won ga; mbi her zan zan nyian ne." 
2Chronicles5:10 Ma kwagh ugen lu ken areki la ga, saa ikpande ihiar i Mose wa ker hen Horebi, zum u TER ya ikur a Mbaiserael shighe u ve due ken tar u Igipiti la." 
2Chronicles5:11 Tsô zum u upristi due ken icighankpar kera yô (gadia upristi mba ve lu her la cii, ve wanger ayol a ve, ve kera wa iko sha iniongo ve ga)," 
2Chronicles5:12 Mbalevi mbawan atsam, ve cii, ka Asav man Heman man Yedutun a ônov vev man anmgbianev vev imôngo, ve haa akondo a pupuu, ve lu a ukwen man mbaadiguve kua umolo, ve tile he kpeatsegh vegher u sha ityoughkitaregh la, upristi deri man ikundu lu a ve imôngo, lu tôngon ikor." 
2Chronicles5:13 Tsô zum u mba tôngonikor man mbawanatsam lu imôngo cii, lu wan icam imo i môm, sha u wuese TER sughum Un yô, zum u ve ger imo a ikor man ukwen kua ityougholov, ve lu wuese TER kaan er: Gadia A doo, gadia erdoo Na ngu gbem sha won. Nahan maa iyou iv a ibeenegh, ka iyou i TER je la," 
2Chronicles5:14 nahan upristi kera fatyô u tilen eren tom ga, sha ci u ibeenegh kila, gadia iengem i TER iv iyou i Aôndo la." 
2Chronicles6:1 Tsô Solomon ôr kwagh, a kaa er: TER kaa er, ka Un pe teman ken angôghime." 
2Chronicles6:2 Kpa mo m maa U iyou i teman ker, ijiir i Ú teman ker gbem yô." 
2Chronicles6:3 Nahan tor gema ishigh, ver mkohol u Iserael cii doo doo; mkohol u Iserael cii tile sha." 
2Chronicles6:4 A kaa er: I̱ wuese TER, Aôndo u Iserael, u A ôr kwagh a terem Davidi sha zwa Na, man A kure un sha ave Na je, A kaa er:" 
2Chronicles6:5 Hii sha iyange i M due a ior Av ken tar u Igipiti la je, M tsuwa ma gar ken ikwe i Iserael u Me maa iyou ker Mer iti Yam i̱ lu ker ga, man M tsuwa ma or u nana lu ityoor u ior Av Iserael kpaa ga;" 
2Chronicles6:6 kpa M tsuwa Yerusalem Mer iti Yam i̱ lu ker; shi M tsuwa Davidi Mer a̱ tema tor sha ior Av Iserael. 
2Chronicles6:7 Terem Davidi lu veren ishima er una maa iyou sha ci u iti i TER, Aôndo u Iserael." 
2Chronicles6:8 Kpa TER kaa a terem Davidi er: Er u ver ishima u maan iyou sha ci u iti Yam yô, u er doo, er u ver ishima nahan yô." 
2Chronicles6:9 Nahan kpaa ka we ú maa iyou la ga; kpa ka wan wou u u mar iyol you je, ka un una maa iyou la sha ci u iti Yam ye." 
2Chronicles6:10 TER kpaa A er vough sha kwaghôron Na u A ôr la; gadia mo m va tile sha ityough ki terem Davidi, man m tema sha ikônough ki torough ki Iserael, er TER lu tôndo zwa yô, man m maa iyou la sha ci u iti i TER, Aôndo u Iserael." 
2Chronicles6:11 Ka her kpaa m ver areki u ikuryan i TER i lu ker, i A ye a ônov mba Iserael la ye." 
2Chronicles6:12 Tsô a za tile sha ishigh ki atse a TER a nanden nagh sha mi, sha ishigh ki mkohol u Iserael cii, a naregh ave sha;" 
2Chronicles6:13 gadia Solomon vande eren daa u togula, iniembe na lu aseva ataan, igbanger na kpaa aseva ataan, ityaven na aseva atar, a ver un her atô tembe, a tile sha mi a gure inya sha ishigh ki mkohol u Iserael cii a kende ave Sha," 
2Chronicles6:14 a kaa er: TERE, Aôndo u Iserael, ma Aôndo ugen ngu er We nahan ga, Sha kpaa ga, shin tar kpaa ga, We u U we iko sha ikuryan man U ver ishima sha erdoo a mbayev Ou mba ve zenden sha ishigh You a ishima i môm yô;" 
2Chronicles6:15 We u U kur kwagh u U tôndo zwa a wanakiriki Wou terem Davidi la; mimi je, U or kwagh sha zwa Wou, shi U kure un sha uwegh Ough, er i lu nyian nahan." 
2Chronicles6:16 Yô TERE, Aôndo u Iserael wa iko sha kwagh u lu U tôndo zwa a wanakiriki Wou terem Davidi la, er U kaa wer: Ú ban a or sha ishigh Yagh, u nana tema sha ikônough ki torough ki Iserael ga, aluer ônov ou vea ver ishima sha gbenda ve, vea zenden sha atindiakaa Am, er we u lu zenden sha ishigh Yagh nahan yô." 
2Chronicles6:17 Yô, TERE, Aôndo u Iserael, kwaghôron Wou u U ôr a wanakiriki Wou Davidi la, a kure sha mi vough." 
2Chronicles6:18 Aôndo Una tema shin tar a ior imôngo mimi jee? Nenge, Sha man Sha u a hembe gban ca la je kpaa, fatyô u ngohol We ga; man hire iyou i m maa ne!" 
2Chronicles6:19 Nahan kpaa wa iko sha msen u wanakiriki Wou, man zamber na, TERE, Aôndo wam, ver ato sha imo i wanakiriki Wou man msen u a sen sha ishigh You ne kpaa." 
2Chronicles6:20 Ashe a Ou a̱ nengen sha iyou ne, tetan man tugh kpaa, ka ijiir i U kaa Wer, Ú ver iti You ker; sha u Ú ver ato sha msen u wanakiriki Wou una sôn, zum u una ver ishigh hen ijiir ne yô," 
2Chronicles6:21 man shi ver ato ungwa zamber u wanakiriki Wou, man u ior Ou Iserael, zum u vea eren msen vea veren ishigh hen ijiir ne yô; een, ungwa Sha, sha ijiir You i teman la, man zum u Ú ungwa yô, de se asorabo ase." 
2Chronicles6:22 Aluer or nana er or u nan we ndor a nan kwaghbo, man i ver nan mbum er nana̱ bum, man nana va bum sha ishigh ki atse Ou a nanden nagh sha mi, ken iyou ne yô," 
2Chronicles6:23 ungwa Sha, er sha mi, ôr ijir i mbayev Ou, or iferor iyev, hire nan a ieren i nan sha ityough ki nan, man gema na ormimi ishô, er a nan sha mimi u nan la." 
2Chronicles6:24 Man aluer mbaihomov vea hemba ior Ou Iserael sha ci u isholibo i ve er U yô, man shi vea gema ishima vea pase iti You, vea er msen vea zamber sha ishigh You ken iyou ne yô," 
2Chronicles6:25 ungwa Sha, de ior Ou Iserael isholibo ve shi hire a ve ken tar u U ne ve a uter vev ne." 
2Chronicles6:26 Zum u á cir Sha man ura kera nôô ga, sha ci u ve er U isholibo yô, man vea er msen vea ver ishigh hen ijiir ne, vea pase iti You, vea gema ishima sha u den isholibo ve, sha ci u mtsaha u U tsaha ve yô," 
2Chronicles6:27 ungwa Sha, de isholibo i mbayev Ou kua i ior Ou Iserael kpaa, gadia U tese ve gbenda u doon u vea zenden sha mi yô; yô, nôô ura sha tar Wou, u U ne ior Ou dyako la." 
2Chronicles6:28 Man aluer ijen ia gba sha tar, shin aluer bouange una za va, shin aluer alakema una gba akpor shin mningem, shin ikomon ia za va, shin igyer, shin aluer mbaihomov vev vea va kase ve ken agar a ken tar ve, shin a lu hanma kwagh u bo shin hanma inja i uange ia lu kpaa;" 
2Chronicles6:29 hanma msen man zamber u hanma or, shin u ior Ou Iserael cii, aluer hanma or nana fa mvihi u nan, man ican i nan, man nana naregh ave sha iyou ne yô," 
2Chronicles6:30 ungwa Sha, sha ijiir You i teman la, de nan isholibo i nan, na hanma or sha ieren i nan cii, er U fe ishima i nan yô (gadia ka We tseegh U fe asema a ônov mba iorov ye)," 
2Chronicles6:31 sha u ve̱ cia U, ve̱ zenden sha igbenda You, sha ayange a uma ve cii, ken tar u U ne uter asev ne." 
2Chronicles6:32 Man shin or u ken nongo ugen u nan lu or u ior Ou Iserael ga yô, u nan dugh ken tar u icaa sha ci u nan ongo gwa u iti You man uwegh Ough ku ageegh kua uwegh Ough ku naregh yô, zum u vea va er msen vea ver ishigh hen iyou ne yô," 
2Chronicles6:33 ungwa Sha, hen ijiir You i teman, er akaa a orvanava la nan sen U cii, sha u akuraior sha won cii a̱ fa iti You, man a̱ cia U, er ior Ou Iserael nahan, man shi a̱ fa er iyou ingin i m maa i ne, ka iti You i yer i min ye." 
2Chronicles6:34 Aluer ior Ou vea za ityav hen mbaihomov vev, sha hanma gbenda u U tindi ve cii, man vea sôn U, vea ver ishigh hen gar u U tsough ne man iyou i m maa sha ci u iti You ne yô," 
2Chronicles6:35 ungwa msen ve kua zamber ve Sha, suwe mimi ve." 
2Chronicles6:36 Man aluer vea er U isholibo (gadia or u den eren isholibo nan ngu ga), man ishima ia lu vihin We a ve, Wea na ve sha ikev i mbaihomov vev, man vea yem a ve uikangen ken tar u icaa shin u ikua ikua," 
2Chronicles6:37 kpa aluer vea za hen kwagh ken asema a ve ken tar u i za a ve uikangen la, man vea gema ishima vea zamber We ken tar u ve lu uikangen la, vea kaa er: Se er isholibo, se er kwaghbo se er ifer," 
2Chronicles6:38 man aluer vea hide hen a We a ishima ve cii man uma ve cii, ken tar u ve lu uikangen, ka tar u mba ve yem a ve uikangen la, vea sôn vea ver ishigh vegher u ken tar ve, u U ne uter vev, man hen gar u U tsough, man hen iyou i m maa sha ci u iti You ne yô," 
2Chronicles6:39 ungwa msen ve kua zamber ve Sha, hen ijiir You i teman la, suwe mimi ve, de ior Ou asorabo a ve er U la." 
2Chronicles6:40 Aôndo wam, ashe Ou a̱ lu ivegher, ato Ou kpaa a̱ ver sha msen u i eren hen ijiir ne." 
2Chronicles6:41 Yô, TERE, Aôndo, mough va hen ijiir You i memen, We, kua areki u agee Ou; TERE, Aôndo, upristi Ou ve̱ haa myom iyol, uicighan Ou kpaa ve̱ ember kwagh u doon." 
2Chronicles6:42 TERE, Aôndo, de gem ishigh ki or u U shigh nan mkurem la kera ga! Umbur aeren a dedoo a U er a wanakiriki Wou Davidi la." 
2Chronicles7:1 Er Solomon kur msen u eren yô, usu sen Sha va hia nagh ku nanden kua iniav mbi sôngon; iengem i TER iv ken iyou la." 
2Chronicles7:2 Upristi kpaa kera fatyô u nyôron ken iyou i TER ga, sha ci u iengem i TER iv ken iyou i TER la." 
2Chronicles7:3 Mbaiserael cii gba kenger, zum u usu sen man iengem i TER kpaa lu sha iyou la yô; nahan ve gure ve wa ityough inya sha kungur, ve gba civir sughun TER, kaan er: Gadia A doo; gadia erdoo Na ngu gbem sha won." 
2Chronicles7:4 Tsô tor a ior cii, ve na nagh sha ishigh ki TER." 
2Chronicles7:5 Tor Solomon na nagh sha ibua dubu ikundu kar ihiar man iyôngo dubu deri kar dubu ikundu. Kape tor a ior cii ve tsegha iyou i Aôndo la. 
2Chronicles7:6 Upristi kpaa tile sha ityom ve; Mbalevi kpaa a ityogholov mbi TER, mbi tor Davidi er sha u wuese TER a mi–gadia erdoo Na ngu gbem sha won–sha icam i wuese i Davidi i ve lu wan la; upristi kpaa lu tôngon ikor sha ishiv vev; Iserael cii gema tile sha." 
2Chronicles7:7 Tsô Solomon tsegha ijiir i ken atô u tembe u u lu sha ishigh ki iyou i TER la; gadia ka heregh a na iniav mbi nanden man ahôm a iniav mbi bem ye, gadia atse a togula a Solomon er la, a yina u tôôn nagh ku nanden man nagh ku sha samuyia kua ahôm la." 
2Chronicles7:8 Nahan hen shighe la Solomon er iniongo la ayange ataankarahar a Iserael mba ve lu a na cii; lu zegemkohol, ior hii hen gbenda u karen zan Hamati je zan zan za ar hen uwagh u Igipiti." 
2Chronicles7:9 Sha iyange i sha anigheni la ve er icighaniniongo; gadia ayange ataankarahar la cii ve lu tseghan atse a nanden nagh sha mi la, man ayange ataankarahar la cii ve er iniongo." 
2Chronicles7:10 Sha iyange i sha ikundu kar atar sha uwer u sha utaankaruhar la, a na ior gbenda er ve̱ yem hen utenti vev; ve gba ember saan saan sha ci u aeren a dedoo a TER A er a Davidi man Solomon kua ior Nav Iserael, yô." 
2Chronicles7:11 Kape Solomon kure iyou i TER man iyou i tor kpaa la; hanma kwagh u a va Solomon ken ishima u eren ken iyou i TER kua ken iyou na iyol na cii yô, a kure un doo doo je." 
2Chronicles7:12 Tsô TER ande hen Solomon tugh, kaa a na er: M ungwa msen wou, shi M tsuwa ijiir ne Mer i̱ lum iyou i nan nagh ker." 
2Chronicles7:13 Aluer Mea cir Sha, ura ua kera lu ga, shin Mea na zwa ikomon ia ya akaa a ken sule, shin Mea haa ior Av bouange," 
2Chronicles7:14 man aluer ior Av mba i yer ve sha iti Yam ne, vea hide a ayol a ve ijime, vea er msen vea ker ishigh Yagh, vea undu igbenda i ifer ve yô, Me ungwa Sha, Me de ve akaabo a ve, shi Me sôr tar ve kpaa." 
2Chronicles7:15 Hegen yô, ashe Am aa lu ivegher, ato Am kpaa a kegh sha msen u á sôn hen ijiir ne yô," 
2Chronicles7:16 gadia hegen yô, M tsuwa iyou ne M tsegha i Mer, iti Yam i̱ lu ker gbem; ashe Am kua ishima Yam kpaa vea luun sha i gbem." 
2Chronicles7:17 Man we yô, aluer wea zenden sha ishigh Yagh er teru Davidi lu zenden nahan, man wea eren akaa a M kaa u cii, wea ver ishima sha akaawan a Am, kua ajiraôron a Am yô," 
2Chronicles7:18 Mo kpaa Me taver ikônough you ki torough sha ityendezwa i M tôndo a teru Davidi Mer, ú ban a or u nan tema tor ken Iserael ga la." 
2Chronicles7:19 Kpa aluer nea gema nea undu akaawan a Am, man akaaôron a Am a M ver sha ishigh yenegh, nea gema nea za civir mbaaôndo mba genev, né gure né civir ve yô," 
2Chronicles7:20 nahan Me wuhe ve shin amise je ken tar wam u M ne ve; man iyou i M tsegh i sha ci u iti Yam ne, Me kar a i sha ishigh Yagh kera, Me gema i, ia hingir kwagh u veren ishor man kwagh u wan ishenge a mi ken akuraior cii." 
2Chronicles7:21 Iyou ngin er i gbe ikôr nahan kpaa, hanma or u nana kar hen i cii, á kpiligh nan iyol, nana kaa er: Ka nyi TER A er a tar na kua iyou ne nahana?" 
2Chronicles7:22 Nahan vea gema á kaa er: Ka sha ci u ve undu TER, Aôndo u uter vev, u A due a ve ken tar u Igipiti, ve gem ve ker mbaaôndo mbagenev, ve gur ve civir ve, man ve er ve tom kpaa yô; ka nahan man A ve a kwaghbo ne cii sha a ve nahan ye." 
2Chronicles8:1 Tsô anyom ikundu a Solomon maa iyou i TER kua iyou na iyol na la, nga kar yô," 
2Chronicles8:2 Solomon maa agar a Huram na un la, a ver Mbaiserael tema ken a." 
2Chronicles8:3 Nahan Solomon za hen Hamatisoba, a za hemba un." 
2Chronicles8:4 A maa Tademor ken ikôngo, kua agar a ombon iyiav ker, a a maa ken Hamati la cii." 
2Chronicles8:5 Shi a maa Bete-horon u Sha kua Bete-horon u Shin, agar a utya a lun a ugir kua ihinda i lun a uishindan," 
2Chronicles8:6 shi a maa Baalati, man agar a ombon iyiav ker, a Solomon lu a mi la cii, man agar a akekeautya na cii, man agar a mbaanyinyav nav, man akaa a a sar Solomon u maan a cii ken Yerusalem man ken Lebanon, kua ken tar u a lu tor sha mi cii." 
2Chronicles8:7 Asande a ior a Mbahiti man Mbaamor man Mbaperishi man Mbahivi man Mbayebushi a a shi her cii, mba ve lu Mbaiserael ga la;" 
2Chronicles8:8 ônov vev mba ve shi ken ijime ve ken tar la, mba Mbaiserael tim ve ga la, Solomon kighir ve a tom zan zan nyian." 
2Chronicles8:9 Kpa Mbaiserael yô, Solomon kighir ve sha u ve̱ eren un tom u kpan ga; kpa ve lu mbautyav man ukur mba mbautyav nav mba hemban, man mbahemenev mba nengen sha akeke a na a utya kua sha mbaanyinyav nav." 
2Chronicles8:10 Mban lu mbavesen mba sha tom u tor Solomon, ve lu ior deri uhar man akunduahargber, mba ve lu nengen sha ior." 
2Chronicles8:11 Tsô Solomon dugh Wanfarao ken gar u Davidi za wa un ken iyou i a maa un la; gadia a kaa er: Kwase wam una tema ken iyou i Davidi, tor u Iserael ga, gadia ijiir i areki u Aôndo a nyer her la, hingir icighanjiir." 
2Chronicles8:12 Tsô Solomon na TER iniav mbi nanden sha atse a TER a nanden nagh sha mi a a ta sha ishigh ki puadwer la; 
2Chronicles8:13 i gba nan nagh vough er i ver sha hanma iyange nahan, sha imo i Mose, ka sha ayange a memen man sha ayange a iwer i he, man sha uiniongo mba i ver sha hanma inyom kwa tar yô; ka sha iniongo i bredi u i we kwa sha mi ga, man iniongo i ulahadi, kua iniongo i atumbe." 
2Chronicles8:14 Sha imo i ter na Davidi yô, a ver upristi sha iniongo iniongo sha ityom ve, man Mbalevi di kpaa sha i ve, sha u ve̱ wuese TER, ve̱ eren tom sha ishigh ki upristi er i ver sha hanma iyange nahan; mbakuranhunda kpaa, i ver ve sha iniongo iniongo, sha hanma hunda; gadia kape Davidi, or u Aôndo, kaa la." 
2Chronicles8:15 I undu imo i tor sha kwagh u upristi man Mbalevi sha ma kwagh ga, shin sha kwagh u ayou a koson akaa ker kpaa ga." 
2Chronicles8:16 Kape i er tom u Solomon cii, hii sha iyange i timin imagh ki iyou i TER la je, zan zan iyange i i kar kuren i. Kape i kure tom u iyou i TER cii la." 
2Chronicles8:17 Tsô Solomon za hen Eshion-geber kua hen Eloti kpaa, hen kpe u zegemnger ken tar u Edom." 
2Chronicles8:18 Huram tindi un a utso sha ikev i mbayev nav kua mbatomov mba ve fa kwagh u zegemnger yô; ve va a mbayev mba Solomon imôngo hen Ofir, ve za kura zenaria keregh, kuma utalenti deri unyiin man akunduahargber, ve va na tor Solomon." 
2Chronicles9:1 Zum u torkwase u Sekeba ungwa gwa u Solomon yô, a va u va karen Solomon sha mbampin mba cimin ken Yerusalem, a va a ior mba va veren un kpishi, man urakumi mba tôôn ilyôghonov man zenaria kpishi, kua awen a injaa; zum u a va hen Solomon yô, a ôr akaa a a lu un ken ishima cii." 
2Chronicles9:2 Solomon pase un akaa a a pine un la cii; ma kwagh hemba Solomon u pasen un ga. 
2Chronicles9:3 Tsô er torkwase u Sekeba nenge kwaghfan u Solomon, kua iyou i a maa la," 
2Chronicles9:4 man kwaghyan u sha tebul na, man injamtem i mbayev nav, man injamtil i mbatomov nav, kua akondo a ve a iyolough, man mbanan un kwaghman kua akondo a ve a iyolough, kua agbur a na a a unden sha mi zan sha iyou i TER yô, kondo un iyol gbong." 
2Chronicles9:5 Tsô a kaa a tor er: Gwa u m ongo ken tar wam sha akaa a ou kua mfe wou yô, ka mimi." 
2Chronicles9:6 Nahan kpaa m na jighjigh sha kwaghôron ve ga, zan zan m va nenge sha ashe am ne; man nenge, kwaghfan wou u hemban ne, vegher na tsô kpaa i ôrom ga; u gande gwa u m ongo yô." 
2Chronicles9:7 Saan ior ou iyol, saan mbayev ou mban iyol, mba ve til sha ishigh you gbem, ve ongo kwaghfan wou ne." 
2Chronicles9:8 I̱ wuese TER, Aôndo wou, u u doo Un ishima, A ver u sha ikônough Nagh ki torough er u̱ tema tor sha ci u TER, Aôndo wou; ka er Iserael a doo Aôndo wou ishima, er Una ver ve ve̱ lu gbem yô, ka nahan man A ver u tor sha a ve er u̱ ôron ijir, shi u̱ eren perapera kpaa ye." 
2Chronicles9:9 Tsô a na tor zenaria kuma utalenti deri man ikundu, man ilyôghonov kpishi, man awen a injaa; mayange ilyôghonov mbi a ngee er torkwase u Sekeba va na tor Solomon la nahan ga." 
2Chronicles9:10 Mbayev mba Huram kpaa man mbayev mba Solomon mba ve za tôô zenaria hen Ofir la, ve va a ikon i sandal man awen a injaa kpaa." 
2Chronicles9:11 Tor er agbur a unden zan sha iyou i TER kua sha iyou i tor kpaa sha ikon i sandal la, kua umolo man mbaadiguve sha ci u mbawanatsam, mayange i lu a vande nengen a anza la nahan ken tar u Yuda ga." 
2Chronicles9:12 Tor Solomon na torkwase u Sekeba akaa a a sar un cii, hanma kwagh u a sôn yô; gema hemba kwagh u un va na tor la cii. Tsô a mough a yem hen tar na, un a ior nav." 
2Chronicles9:13 Myohom ma zenaria ma Solomon a zua a mi sha inyom i môm yô, lu zenaria kuma utalenti deri ataratar man akunduatar kar ataratar;" 
2Chronicles9:14 i ôr kwagh u mbazendenkpenga man mbateenkasua hen ityôinya ve zua a mi la, ga; utor mba Arabia cii kua ugomna mba ken tar na kpaa ve va naan Solomon zenaria man azurfa." 
2Chronicles9:15 Tsô tor Solomon var iperutya deri uhar sha zenaria, a vihi zenaria kuma ushekel deri ataratar sha hanma perutya." 
2Chronicles9:16 Shi a var akuvautya kpaa deri sha zenaria, a vihi zenaria kuma ushekel deri utar sha hanma akuvautya; tor ver ve ken Iyou i Ikô i Lebanon." 
2Chronicles9:17 Man shi tor er zegeikôn u tor sha anyi a nortar, a cir un zenaria u wang iyol." 
2Chronicles9:18 Agbur a unden sha ikônough ki torough kila lu ataratar, ijiir i pendan angahar kpaa lu, i er i sha zenaria, i zua i sha ikônough ki torough kila, man i gema i wa un igyar i kôron ave sha mi, vegher ne, man vegher la, henpe teman la; ubegha uhar tile hen igyar i kôron ave sha mi la;" 
2Chronicles9:19 ubegha pue kar uhar tile sha agbur a unden ataratar ken imbusu ne man ngila kpaa; mayange je i er kwagh nahan ken ma tartor ugen ga. 
2Chronicles9:20 Ayongo a man kwagh a mi a tor Solomon cii lu a zenaria; ikav mbi ken Iyou i Ikô i Lebanon cii kpaa, lu mbi zenaria u wang; azurfa yô, lu kwagh u ikoogh sha ayange a Solomon la ga." 
2Chronicles9:21 Gadia tor lu a utso mba ve zaan hen Tarshishi a ior mba Huram imôngo; anyom a kuman atar yô, utso mba Tarshishi ve va kwa môm, ve va a zenaria man azurfa man anyi a nortar man ikarakya kua upikoki." 
2Chronicles9:22 Kape tor Solomon hemba utor mba sha won cii inyaregh kua kwaghfan la. 
2Chronicles9:23 Utor mba sha won cii sar ve u nengen a Solomon sha u ungwan kwaghfan na u Aôndo A na un ken ishima la. 
2Chronicles9:24 Hanmô ve nan lu van a iwua i nan, lu ikav mbi i er sha azurfa, man mbi sha zenaria, man akondo, man ikav mbi utyav, man ilyôghonov, man anyinya kua mbaalfadari, anyom anyom." 
2Chronicles9:25 Solomon lu a atôranyinya dubu unyiin man akekeautya man mbaanyinyav dubu pue kar uhar; a ver ve sha agar a akekeautya a lu ker yô, kua hen tor ken Yerusalem kpaa." 
2Chronicles9:26 A tema tor sha utor cii, hii hen ifi u Uferati zan zan za ar hen tar u Mbafiliti, za kighir hen kpe u Igipiti kpaa." 
2Chronicles9:27 Tor er azurfa ngee hingir er awen nahan ken Yerusalem, ikon i sedar kpaa ngee hingir er ikon i tur i shin pev, ngee je, gande u ôron." 
2Chronicles9:28 I za vaan Solomon a anyinya ken Igipiti kua ken ityar igen cii. 
2Chronicles9:29 Aerenakaa a Solomon agen, a hiihii man a masetyô cii, i nger a ken akaaôron a profeti Natan man ken kwaghôron u profeti u Ahiya Orshilon, kua sha mbampase mba Ido, or u nengen akaa sha kwagh u Yerobiam wan u Nebati la, gaa?" 
2Chronicles9:30 Solomon tema tor ken Yerusalem sha Iserael cii anyom akunduahar. 
2Chronicles9:31 Tsô Solomon yav a uter nav imôngo, i ii un ken gar u ter na Davidi; wan na Rehobiam tema tor sha ityough nagh." 
2Chronicles10:1 Tsô Rehobiam za ken Shekem, gadia Iserael cii va hen Shekem sha u va kôron un tor." 
2Chronicles10:2 Er Yerobiam wan u Nebati, ungwa nahan yô (gadia a lu ken Igipiti, henpe a yevese tor Solomon a za lu la), nahan Yerobiam maa mough ken Igipiti hide." 
2Chronicles10:3 Ve tindi i za yila un; tsô Yerobiam a Iserael cii ve va, ve va ôr kwagh a Rehobiam, ve kaa er:" 
2Chronicles10:4 Teru lu wa se ikav mbi yuhwan; yô, shi pande se tom u ican u teru man ikav nav mbi yuhwan mbi a wa se ne, nahan yô, sé rumun we." 
2Chronicles10:5 A kaa a ve er: Ayange á kar atar yô, shi hide nen her a mo. Maa ior hembe yem." 
2Chronicles10:6 Nahan tor Rehobiam tume idyu a mbatamen mba iyange ve tilen sha ishigh ki ter na Solomon, shighen u a lu uma la. A pine er: Mnenge wen yô, ngu nana, sha kwagh u me kaa ior mbana?" 
2Chronicles10:7 Ve kaa a na er: Aluer wea er a ior mban doo doo, wea er sha ishima ve, wea ôr kwagh a ve sar sar yô, nahan vea hingir mbatomov ou gbem je." 
2Chronicles10:8 Kpa a ta imo i mbatamen ve kaa un la kera, a gema a hen kwagh a mbayev mba ve lu kwav a na, ve tilen sha ishigh nagh yô." 
2Chronicles10:9 A pine ve er: Mhen wen yô, ngu nana, sha kwagh u se̱ kaa ior mban mba ve er kwagh a mo, ve pinim er: Heghem se ikav mbi teru lu wa se la?" 
2Chronicles10:10 Tsô mbayev mba ve lu kwav a na la, ve kaa a na er: Yô, kaa ior mba ve er kwagh a we mban, ve kaan er: Teru wa se ikav mbi yuhwan, kpa we yô, pande se mbi la; kaa a ve nahan wer: Ihôwe-ikumbul wam hemba kehen a iwenge i terem." 
2Chronicles10:11 Yô, aluer terem lu wan ne ikav mbi yuhwan yô, mo me seer ne mbi; aluer terem lu tsahan ne sha akpa, mo me tsaha ne sha kwagir." 
2Chronicles10:12 Tsô Yerobiam a ior cii ve va hen Rehobiam sha iyange i sha utar, sha imo i tor kaa a ve la yô, er: Shi va nen her a mo sha iyange i sha utar la." 
2Chronicles10:13 Nahan tor gema ôr kwagh a ve sha tswam; tor Rehobiam venda imo i mbatamen la," 
2Chronicles10:14 a gema a ôr ve kwagh sha imo i mbayevikaior mbala, a kaa er: Terem lu wan ne ikav mbi yuhwan, mo me seer ne mbi; terem tsaha ne sha akpa, mo me gema me tsaha ne sha kwagir." 
2Chronicles10:15 Kape tor wa ior iko ga la; gadia lu sha awashima u Aôndo je, sha er TER Una kure kwaghôron Na u Ahiya Orshilon ôr a Yerobiam wan u Nebati sha imo i TER la." 
2Chronicles10:16 Zum u Iserael cii ve nenge er tor wa ve iko ga yô, ior gema kaa a tor er: Kwar wase shi ngu ken Davidi hana? Se kera mba a dyako ken wan u Yese kpaa ga; hanma or nana̱ yem hen tenti u nan, ne Iserael. Yô, gba nôngon sha ya wou iyol you tsô, Davidi. Nahan Iserael cii ve hembe ve yem hen utenti vev." 
2Chronicles10:17 Kpa Mbaiserael mba ve lu ken agar a Yuda yô, Rehobiam tema tor sha a ve." 
2Chronicles10:18 Nahan tor Rehobiam tindi Hadoram u a lu nengen sha mbatomov mba i kighir ve a tom la; kpa Mbaiserael ta un awen, ve wua. Tsô tor Rehobiam unde ikyekye na fefa sha u yevese yemen ken Yerusalem." 
2Chronicles10:19 Kape Iserael hendan a ya u Davidi la, zan zan nyian ne." 
2Chronicles11:1 Zum u Rehobiam va ken Yerusalem yô, a kohol ya u Yuda kua u Benyamin, uicuwanmbaiorov dubu deri man akunduanyiin, mba ve lu mbanôngontyav yô, sha u á nôngo ityav a Iserael, shi á hide a tor hen Rehobiam." 
2Chronicles11:2 Kpa imo i TER va hen Shemaia or u Aôndo er: 
2Chronicles11:3 Ôr kwagh a Rehobiam wan u Solomon, tor u Yuda, man a Iserael cii, ken Yuda man Benyamin, kaa ve wer:" 
2Chronicles11:4 TER ngu kaan nahan er: De kende nen ga, de za nenge nen ityav a anmgbianev enev kpaa ga; hanma or nana̱ hide hen ya u nan, gadia kwagh ne, ka her a Mo a dugh ye. Tsô ve ungwa imo i TER, ve hide, ve kera za nôngo ityav a Yerobiam ga." 
2Chronicles11:5 Nahan Rehobiam tema ken Yerusalem, gema maa agarautya ken Yuda." 
2Chronicles11:6 A maa Betelehem man Etam man Tekoa 
2Chronicles11:7 man Bete-sur man Soko man Adulam 
2Chronicles11:8 man Gati man Maresha man Shiv 
2Chronicles11:9 man Adoraim man Lakishi man Aseka 
2Chronicles11:10 man Sora man Aiyalon man Heberon, agar a a lu ken Yuda man Benyamin, ka agarautya a lun a ugir je la." 
2Chronicles11:11 A taver agarautya la, a ver mbahemenev ken a, shi a ombo kwaghyan man mkurem kua wain ken a kpaa." 
2Chronicles11:12 Ken hanma gar a ver iperutya kua awange, a taver a kpishi. Yuda kua Benyamin lu mba nav." 
2Chronicles11:13 Upristi man Mbalevi mba ve lu ken Iserael cii, ve mough ken ityar ve cii, ve va her a na." 
2Chronicles11:14 Gadia Mbalevi undu ajiir a ve a ilev yan toho her, man akaa a ve, ve va hen Yuda kua ken Yerusalem; gadia Yerobiam kua ônov nav ta ve kera, er ve̱ de kera eren TER tom u pristi ga;" 
2Chronicles11:15 a̱ gema a ver upristi nav iyol na, sha ci u ajiir a taven sha man sha ci u ujijingi mba bov man sha ci u anibuav mba a er la." 
2Chronicles11:16 Mbagenev kpaa, ken ikwe i Iserael cii va a ve ityô, ka mba ve ver asema a ve sha u keren TER, Aôndo u Iserael, je la, ve va ken Yerusalem, sha u va nan TER, Aôndo u uter vev, nagh." 
2Chronicles11:17 Nahan ve taver tor u Yuda, ve taver Rehobiam wan u Solomon ishima anyom atar; gadia anyom atar je, ve lu zenden sha gbenda u Davidi kua u Solomon." 
2Chronicles11:18 Rehobiam er Mahalati, wan u Yerimoti, wan u Davidi, wan u Abihail, wan u Eliabi, wan u Yese," 
2Chronicles11:19 a mar ônov mba nomso a na: Yeushi man Shemaria man Saham. 
2Chronicles11:20 Ken ijime i ngula yô, a shi a er Maaka, wan u Abesalom; a mar Abiya man Atai man Shisa man Shelomiti a na." 
2Chronicles11:21 Maaka wan u Abesalom doo Rehobiam ishima hemba kasev nav mbagenev cii kua kasev nav mba sha uika kpaa (gadia a er kasev pue kar anigheni man kasev mba sha uika akunduatar, a mar ônov mba nomso ikundu kar anigheni man ônov mba kasev akunduatar)." 
2Chronicles11:22 Rehobiam ver Abiya wan u Maaka tamen, er a̱ lu orhemen ken anngôôv nav, gadia a lu wan ishima u veren un tor." 
2Chronicles11:23 A er kwagh sha kwaghfan, a samber ônov nav cii, a ver ve ken ityar i Yuda man i Benyamin cii, ken hanma gar u lun a gir, a na ve kwaghyan kpishi, shi a er kasev kpishi sha ci ve." 
2Chronicles12:1 Tsô zum u tor u Rehobiam taver man a lu a agee kpaa yô, a gema a undu atindiakaa a TER, un kua Iserael cii." 
2Chronicles12:2 Nahan sha inyom i sha utaan i tor Rehobiam la yô, Shishaki tor u Igipiti kôndo sha u va nôngon ityav a Yerusalem, sha ci u ve er TER kwaghbo yô," 
2Chronicles12:3 a va a akekeautya dubu man deri uhar man mbaanyinyav dubu akunduatar; man ior mba ve va a na ken Igipiti yô, gande u ôron, Mbalibia man Mbasuki kua Mbaetiopia." 
2Chronicles12:4 A ngohol agar a Yuda a lun a ugir man a mase van ken Yerusalem ye. 
2Chronicles12:5 Tsô profeti Shemaia va hen Rehobiam man hen atiator a Yuda mba ve kohol ken Yerusalem sha ci u kwagh u Shishaki yô, a kaa a ve er: TER ngu kaan nahan er: Ne ne tam kera, ka nahan man Mo kpaa Me na ne sha ikev i Shishaki ye." 
2Chronicles12:6 Tsô atiator a Iserael kua tor kpaa ve hide ayol a ve ijime, ve kaa er: TER ka u perapera je." 
2Chronicles12:7 Er TER nenge ve hide ayol a ve ijime nahan yô, imo i TER va hen Shemaia, A kaa er: Ve hide ayol a ve ijime, nahan Me tim ve ga, shin ciôn Me yima ve; ka sha ikev i Shishaki man á haa iyugh Yam sha Yerusalem ga." 
2Chronicles12:8 Nahan kpaa vea lu ikpan na, sha u ve̱ fa er tom Wam u lu man er tom u utor mba ityar igen di u lu yô." 
2Chronicles12:9 Tsô Shishaki tor u Igipiti kôndo sha u va nôngon ityav a Yerusalem, a kura ikav mbi injaav mbi ken iyou i TER, kua ikav mbi injaav mbi ken iyou i tor; a kura ca ca; shi a kura iperutya i zenaria i Solomon er la kpaa." 
2Chronicles12:10 Nahan tor Rehobiam gema er iperutya igen sha togula sha ityouv mbi ingila, a ver i sha ikev i mbahemenev mba mbakuran, mba ve kuran hundaya u tor yô." 
2Chronicles12:11 Tsô hanma shighe u tor una nyôron ken iyou i TER yô, mbakuran ve tôô i man ve shi ve hide a i ken iyou i mbakuran." 
2Chronicles12:12 Er a hire a iyol na ijime nahan yô, iyugh i TER kar her a na kera, nahan A kera tim un ca ca ga; akaadoon agen lu ken Yuda kpaa." 
2Chronicles12:13 Tsô tor Rehobiam seer taver ken Yerusalem, a tema tor; Rehobiam lu anyom akunduahar kar môm zum u a ya tor la, a tema tor anyom pue kar ataankarahar ken Yerusalem, ka gar u TER tsuwa ken ikwe i Iserael cii, er Una ver iti Na ker la; iti i ngô na er Naama, wan u Mbaamon." 
2Chronicles12:14 A er ifer, gadia a ver ishima u keren TER ga." 
2Chronicles12:15 Aerenakaa a Rebobiam a hiihii man a masetyô yô, i nger a ken akaaôron a profeti Shemaia man a Ido ornengenakaa, sha inja i takerada u icombor la gaa? Ityav lu hen atô u Rehobiam a Yerobiam gbem." 
2Chronicles12:16 Tsô Rehobiam yav a uter nav imôngo, i ii un ken gar u Davidi; wan na Abiya tema tor sha ityough nagh." 
2Chronicles13:1 Sha inyom i sha pue kar anigheni i tor Yerobiam la, Abiya ya tor ken Yuda." 
2Chronicles13:2 A tema tor ken Yerusalem anyom atar, iti i ngô na er Mikaia wan u Uriel u Gibea. Tsô ityav mough hen atô u Abiya vea Yerobiam." 
2Chronicles13:3 Abiya hii ityav a akum a anomaior a utya, lu uicuwanmbaiorov dubu deri unyiin; Yerobiam di ver uicuwanmbaiorov dubu deri anigheni er ve̱ nôngo ityav a na, lu anomaior a ageegh je." 
2Chronicles13:4 Tsô Abiya tile sha uwo u Semaraim u u lu sha tar u iwoogh u Eferaim la, a kaa er: Ungwa nen imo yam, Yerobiam kua Iserael cii!" 
2Chronicles13:5 Doo u ma ne fe er TER, Aôndo u Iserael, A ne Davidi tor u Iserael gbem, un a ônov nav sha ikuryan i bar gaa?" 
2Chronicles13:6 Kpa Yerobiam wan u Nebati, wanakiriki u Solomon wan u Davidi mough, hendan a ter na." 
2Chronicles13:7 Udangmbaiorov kohol un, agbilinaior, ve taver ayol a ve sha u hendan a Rehobiam wan u Solomon, zum u Rehobiam lu iyev, lu a taver ishima ga la, nahan a fatyô u yangen ve ga." 
2Chronicles13:8 Hegen yô, ne mba henen ner, ne fatyô u hendan a tor u TER, u a lu sha ikev i ônov mba Davidi, gadia ne mba ikumior i vesen je, man ne mba a anibuav mba zenaria mba Yerobiam er ne, er ve̱ hingir ne mbaaôndo la." 
2Chronicles13:9 Ne zenda upristi mba TER, ônov mba Aron man Mbalevi, ne gema ne ver upristi ayol a en er ior mbagenev mba ken ityar igen ve eren nahan gaa? Hanma or u ka nana va a wanbua man anomaiyôngo ataankarahar sha ci u nana va tsegha iyol i nan yô, maa nan gema nan hingir pristi u mbaaôndo mba ve lu Aôndo u mimi ga la!" 
2Chronicles13:10 Kpa se yô, TER, ka Aôndo wase, se undu Un ga, ônov mba Aron mba eren TER tom u pristi, man Mbalevi kpaa mba ken tom ve." 
2Chronicles13:11 Hanma iyange pepe man aikighe ve nanden TER iniav mbi nanden man kwaghhumandoon, ve veren ubredi mba sha tebul u wang, ve tsaren daarimenger u zenaria a amenger a na a zer yeghen aikighe gbem, gadia se mba we iko sha imo i TER, Aôndo wase; kpa ne yô, ne undu Un." 
2Chronicles13:12 Nenge, Aôndo ngu a vese, ngu hemen se kua upristi Nav a ikor i tôngon sha u nôngon ityav a ven. Ne ônov mba Iserael, de nenge nen ityav a TER, Aôndo u uter enev, ga; gadia á kpe ne iyol ga." 
2Chronicles13:13 Kpa Yerobiam ver mbautyav mbagenev due ve nev ken ijime; ve ve lu Yuda sha ishi, mba duen nev mbala lu ve ken ijime." 
2Chronicles13:14 Tsô zum u Mbayuda mba gem ashe yô, nenge ityav yisa ve ken hemen kua ken ijime, tsô ve vaa a TER, upristi kpaa tôngo ikor." 
2Chronicles13:15 Nahan ior mba Yuda ger akenge; Mbayuda mba geren akenge yô, Aôndo na Abiya man Yuda ve hemba Yerobiam a Iserael cii ityav." 
2Chronicles13:16 Tsô Mbaiserael yevese Yuda, Aôndo gema ve na sha ikev na." 
2Chronicles13:17 Abiya a ior nav wua ve je falegh gba, uicuwanmbaiorov mba Iserael dubu deri utaan kpe ken ityav mbila." 
2Chronicles13:18 Nahan Mbaiserael var inya hen shighe la, kpa Mbayuda seer taver a taver, gadia ve suur sha TER, Aôndo u uter vev." 
2Chronicles13:19 Abiya gba zendan Yerobiam ityô, ngohol un agar: Betel a agar a na, man Yeshana a agar a na, kua Eferon a agar a na." 
2Chronicles13:20 Yerobiam kera hide a agee na sha ayange a Abiya la, je ga; TER tsaha un, maa a kpe." 
2Chronicles13:21 Kpa Abiya yô, seer taver a taver, a er kasev pue kar unyiin, amar ônov mba nomso ikundu kar uhar man mba kasev pue kar ataratar." 
2Chronicles13:22 Aerenakaa a Abiya agen man igbenda na man mkaanem nam yô, i nger a ken mpase u profeti Ido." 
2Chronicles14:1 Tsô Abiya yav a uter nav imôngo, i ii un ken gar u Davidi; wan na Asa tema tor sha ityough nagh; sha ayange la bem gba hen tar la anyom pue." 
2Chronicles14:2 Asa er kwagh u doon u jighilii sha ashe a TER, Aôndo na;" 
2Chronicles14:3 gadia a vihi atse a nanden nagh sha mi agen, a a lu a ve ga la, kera, kua ajiir a taven sha la kpaa, a hembe mtôm ma awenem shi a gber Asherim kera;" 
2Chronicles14:4 a kaa a Yuda er, ve̱ ker TER, Aôndo u uter vev, ve̱ wa atindiakaa iko kua uiniezwa kpaa." 
2Chronicles14:5 Man shi a vihi ajiir a taven sha man atse a nanden kwaghhumandoon sha mi, ken agar a Yuda cii kera; tar na lu bem sha ikev na." 
2Chronicles14:6 Shi a maa agar a lun a gir ken Yuda; gadia tar lu a bem, i nôngo ityav a na sha anyom la ga; gadia TER na un mmem." 
2Chronicles14:7 Ka nahan man a kaa a Yuda er: Sé maa nen agar ne, sé kase a ugir man ayou a taven gôgônan man ihinda i iyôô i lun a uishindan; tar ngu sha ikev yase her, gadia se ker TER Aôndo wase; se ker Un, nahan A na se mmem sha hanma ian. Nahan ve za hemen u maan doo doo." 
2Chronicles14:8 Asa lu a ikumutya ken Yuda, ior dubu deri utar, mbatôôn iperutya kua awange; ken Benyamin yô, mba ve tôôn iperutya man mbahendan ada ve lu ior dubu deri uhar man akunduanyiin; mban cii lu anomaior a ageegh je." 
2Chronicles14:9 Tsô Sera Orkushi va ityav her a ve a ikumutya, ior dubu kwa dubu, man akekeautya deri utar; a va hen Maresha." 
2Chronicles14:10 Nahan Asa due u za zuan ityav a na, maa ve samber ityav shin pev u Sefata hen Maresha." 
2Chronicles14:11 Tsô Asa genger imo yila TER, Aôndo na, a kaa er: TERE, ma orwasen u nana nyôr hen atô u or u ageegh vea isheeror nan ngu ga, saa We; wase se TERE, Aôndo wase, gadia se mba suur sha a We, man ka ken iti You kpaa se ve ityav hen ikpelaior ne ye. TERE, ka We U lu Aôndo wase ye; or a̱ de hembe ga, saa We tseegh." 
2Chronicles14:12 Tsô TER na Asa man Yuda ve hemba Mbakushi, nahan Mbakushi yevese." 
2Chronicles14:13 Asa man ior mba ve lu a na, ve zenda ve ityô zan zan ve za ar hen Gerar; i wua Mbakushi ngee je ve kera fatyô u shi nôngon ga, gadia ve tim sha ishigh ki TER, kua sha ishigh ki akumautya Na; ve ya ishar kpishi." 
2Chronicles14:14 Ve hemba agar a a kase Gerar la cii, gadia mcieryol u TER ta sha a ve; ve kura akaa ken agar la cii, gadia ishar lu ken a kpishi." 
2Chronicles14:15 Ve vihi utenti mba mbakuranibua kpaa, ve kura iyôngo kpishi kua urakumi, tsô ve hide ken Yerusalem." 
2Chronicles15:1 Tsô Jijingi u TER sen sha Asaria wan u Obedi; 
2Chronicles15:2 nahan a mough a za kegh Asa gbenda; a kaa a na er: Ungwam nen, we Asa, kua Yuda cii man Benyamin; TER ngu a ven, er ne lu a Na yô; aluer né ker Un yô, né zua a Na je; kpa aluer né undu Un yô, Un kpaa Una undu ne." 
2Chronicles15:3 Nenge, ayange vese je, Iserael lu a Aôndo u mimi ga, pristi u tesen kwagh lu ga, man atindi kpaa lu ga," 
2Chronicles15:4 kpa er ve hide hen TER, Aôndo u Iserael, ve ker Un zum u ican er ve la, ve zua a Na." 
2Chronicles15:5 Sha ayange la bem lu a or u duen man a or u nyôron kpaa ga, kpa atsan kpishi lu sha ior mba ve tema ken ityar la cii." 
2Chronicles15:6 Ikurior igen lu ihom a ikurior igen, gar ugen lu ihom a gar ugen, gadia Aôndo nzughul a ve sha akaa a tseren ve kposo kposo." 
2Chronicles15:7 Kpa ne yô, taver nen ayol, ave a̱ de kpeen ne ga, gadia á na ne injar sha tom wen." 
2Chronicles15:8 Zum u Asa ungwa kwaghôron ne, man mpase u profeti Obedi yô, a taver ishima, a due a akaa a hôngorough ken tar u Yuda man Benyamin kera cii, man ken agar a a ngohol sha tar u iwoogh u Eferaim la kpaa; shi a sôr atse a TER a nanden nagh sha mi a a lu sha ishigh ki puadwer u TER la." 
2Chronicles15:9 Nahan a kohol Yuda cii kua Benyamin man ushirmbaiorov mba ve tem a ve, mba ve due ken Eferaim man Manase kua ken Simeon, gadia ior kpishi due ken Iserael va kohol un er ve nenge TER, Aôndo na, lu a na yô." 
2Chronicles15:10 Nahan ve kohol ken Yerusalem sha uwer u sha utar, sha inyom i sha pue kar utaan i Asa tema tor la;" 
2Chronicles15:11 ve na TER nagh sha iyange la, sha ishar i ve va a mi yô, ibua deri utaankaruhar man iyôngo dubu utaankaruhar." 
2Chronicles15:12 Shi ve ya ikur er vea ker TER, Aôndo u uter vev, a ishima ve cii kua uma ve cii;" 
2Chronicles15:13 man aluer anti or nana ker TER, Aôndo u Iserael ga yô, á wua nan, a lu wanye shin orvesen shin nomsoor shin kwase kpaa." 
2Chronicles15:14 Ve bum a TER sha imo i taver man a iember sha ibusa man ikor i tôngon. 
2Chronicles15:15 Yuda cii ember sha ci mbum la; gadia ve bum a ishima ve i môm je, shi ve ker Un sha gbashima kpaa, nahan ve zua a Na; TER kpaa na ve mmem hen ningir la cii." 
2Chronicles15:16 A dugh Maaka, ngô u tor Asa, ken nagbaa kera, gadia a er eev mbu ndôhôr ishima sha ci u Ashera; Asa vihi eev nav mbula kera, hembe mbu avur avur, nande mbu shin uwagh u Kideron." 
2Chronicles15:17 Kpa i vihi ajiir a taven sha a hen Iserael la kera ga; nahan kpaa ishima i Asa lu jighilii sha ayange na cii. 
2Chronicles15:18 Akaa a ter na lu tsegha la, kua a un iyol na kpaa tsegha la, azurfa man zenaria kua ikav kposo kposo, a va ver a ken iyou i TER Aôndo." 
2Chronicles15:19 I kera nôngo ityav ga zan zan anyom ikundugber kar ataan a Asa tema tor la. 
2Chronicles16:1 Sha inyom i ikundugber kar ataratar i Asa tema tor la yô, Baasha tor u Iserael kôndo sha u za nôngon ityav a Yuda, a maa Rama sha u una yange hanma or nana̱ de dugh shin nana̱ nyôr hen Asa tor u Yuda ga." 
2Chronicles16:2 Nahan Asa kura azurfa man zenaria ken ayou a koson akaa ker, a ken iyou i TER, kua ken iyou i tor la, a tindi i za na Benhada tor u Shiria u a lu ken Damaseku la, a kaa er:" 
2Chronicles16:3 Ikuryan ngi hen atô wam a we, er i lu hen atô u terem a teru nahan; nenge, m tindi u a azurfa man zenaria, yô, za bunde ikuryan you a Baasha tor u Iserael la, sha u a̱ mough hen mo kera, a̱ dem yô." 
2Chronicles16:4 Tsô Benhada ungwa imo i tor Asa, nahan a tindi mbahemenev mba akumautya na er ve̱ za nôngo ityav a agar a Iserael; ve hemba Iyon man Dan man Abelmaim kua agar a ombon iyiav a Nafetali cii." 
2Chronicles16:5 Tsô er Baasha ungwa nahan yô, a de u maan Rama, a undu tom na." 
2Chronicles16:6 Nahan tor Asa lôhô Yuda cii, ve za kura awen a Rama kua ikpande i Baasha maan a mi la; tsô a za maa Geba man Misepa a mi." 
2Chronicles16:7 Sha shighe la ornengenakaa Hanani, va hen Asa tor u Yuda, va kaa a na er: Er u suur sha tor u Shiria, u kera suur sha TER, Aôndo wou, ga yô, nahan ikumutya i tor u Shiria war sha ikev you je ve." 
2Chronicles16:8 Mbakushi man Mbalibia ve lu zegeikum a akekeautya man mbaanyinyav kpishi dumbur je gaa? Nahan kpaa er u suur sha TER yô, A na ve sha ikev you." 
2Chronicles16:9 Gadia ashe a TER nga jingen sha akaa a sha won cii, sha u Una pase agee Na hen mba asema a ve a lu jighilaa her a Na yô. Sha kwagh ne yô, u er ibumekwagh; gadia hii hegen je ityav mbia za u iyol." 
2Chronicles16:10 Tsô ishima nyoon Asa a ornengenakaa la, a wa un ken gaadi, gadia ishima vihi un a na kpishi sha ci u kwagh ne. Man shi Asa er ior mbagenev ican hen shighe la kpaa." 
2Chronicles16:11 Nenge, aerenakaa a Asa a hiihii man a masetyô cii, i nger a ken ruamabera u utor mba Yuda man mba Iserael." 
2Chronicles16:12 Sha inyom i sha ikundugber kar utaankarunyiin i Asa tema tor la, angev kôr un shin angahar; angev nav mbula nyoon un ngeegh, nahan kpaa ken angev nav a ker iwasen hen TER ga, kpa a gema a lu keren iwasen hen mbaucimbiv." 
2Chronicles16:13 Tsô Asa yav a uter nav imôngo, a kpe sha inyom i sha akunduahar kar môm i a tema tor la." 
2Chronicles16:14 Ve ii un ken uwar na u a time sha ci na iyol na ken gar u Davidi yô; i gbir un sha gambe u a mgbough a ilôghonov mbi human doon atô kposo kposo, mbi i nongo mbi sha mfe u orfan u nungwan kwaghhumandoon yô, ve nande kwaghhumandoon kpishi sha ci na." 
2Chronicles17:1 Wan na, Yehoshafati tema tor sha ityough nagh; nahan a wa ago iyol sha u nôngon ityav a Iserael." 
2Chronicles17:2 A ver mbanôngontyav ken agar a Yuda a lun a ugil cii, shi a ver mbakuran ken tar u Yuda kua ken agar a Eferaim a ter na Asa lu ngohol la." 
2Chronicles17:3 TER lu a Yehoshafati, gadia a lu zan sha gbenda u ter na Davidi vande zan la; a ker Ubaal ga," 
2Chronicles17:4 kpa a ker Aôndo u ter na, a zenden sha atindi a Na, a er er Iserael nahan ga." 
2Chronicles17:5 Ka nahan man TER taver tor na sha ikev na ye; Yuda cii vaan a iwua va nan Yehoshafati; nahan a lu a inyaregh man icivir kpishi. 
2Chronicles17:6 Ishima taver un u zan sha igbenda i TER; shi a vihi ajiir a taven sha kua Asherim ken Yuda kera. 
2Chronicles17:7 Sha inyom i sha utar i a tema tor la, a tindi atiator a na Benhail man Obadia man Sekaria man Netanel kua Mikaia er ve̱ za tese ken agar a Yuda," 
2Chronicles17:8 kua Mbalevi kpaa a ve imôngo, lu: Shemaia man Netania man Sebadia man Asahel man Shemiramoti man Yehonatan man Adoniya man Tobiya man Tobadoniya, ka Mbalevi je la, kua upristi Elishama man Yehoram, a ve imôngo." 
2Chronicles17:9 Ve tese ken Yuda, ve lu a ruamabera u atindiakaa a TER, ve zende ken agar a Yuda cii, ve lu tesen ior." 
2Chronicles17:10 Tsô mcieryol u TER haa sha ityar i i ningir Yuda la cii, nahan ve kera nôngo ityav a Yehoshafati ga." 
2Chronicles17:11 Mbafiliti mbagenev va na Yehoshafati iwua man kpandegh sha tihi azurfa. Mbaarabia kpaa va na un akumauile: anomaiyôngo dubu utaan kar uhar man deri utaankaruhar, ukpev kpaa lu dubu utaankaruhar man deri utaankaruhar." 
2Chronicles17:12 Nahan Yehoshafati seer taver a taver kpishi je; a maa ayouautya ken agar a Yuda, kua agar a ombon akaa ker." 
2Chronicles17:13 A ombo akaa kpishi ken agar a Yuda; a ver mbautyav ken Yerusalem, lu anomaior a ageegh." 
2Chronicles17:14 Iyenge ve sha uya mba uter vev yô, ka i ne: Ken Yuda, mbahemenev mba nengen sha ior dubu dubu, lu Adena orhemen, a anomaior a ageegh dubu deri utar a na imôngo;" 
2Chronicles17:15 u dondon sha a na yô, lu Yehohanan orhemen, a ior dubu deri uhar man akunduanyiin a na imôngo;" 
2Chronicles17:16 u dondon sha a na yô, lu Amashia wan u Shikeri, u a na iyol na sha ikev i TER gbar gbar la, man anomaior a ageegh dubu deri uhar a na imôngo;" 
2Chronicles17:17 man hen Benyamin yô, lu Eliada nomor u ageegh, a ior dubu deri uhar mba lun a ada kua perutya a na imôngo;" 
2Chronicles17:18 u dondon sha a na yô, lu Yehoshabadi a ior dubu deri man akunduanyiin mba ve wa ago iyol sha utya a na imôngo." 
2Chronicles17:19 Mban lu mbaeren tor tom, seer sha mba tor ver ve ken agar a Yuda a lun a ugil la cii." 
2Chronicles18:1 Tsô zum u Yehoshafati lu a inyaregh man icivir kpishi yô, a ya ikar a Ahaba sha kwase u eren." 
2Chronicles18:2 Anyom nga kar kpuaa yô, a za hen Ahaba ken Samaria. Nahan Ahaba sôngo un iyôngo man abua kpishi un kua ior mba ve lu a na imôngo, shi a za un iyol er a̱ za a na imôngo hen Ramoti-gileadi." 
2Chronicles18:3 Tsô Ahaba tor u Iserael pine Yehoshafati tor u Yuda, er: Ú shi za a mo imôngo hen Ramoti-gileadi kpa? A gema a kaa a na er: Mo m ngu er we nahan, ior av kpaa mba er ior ou yô, sé lu a we imôngo ken ityav mbin." 
2Chronicles18:4 Yehoshafati shi kaa a tor u Iserael er: Ma u shi vande pinen imo i TER. 
2Chronicles18:5 Tsô tor u Iserael kohol uprofeti kuma ior deri unyiin, a kaa a ve er: Sé za sé za nôngo ityav a Ramoti-gileadi, shin m̱ de ze ga? Ve kaa a na er: Gba zan tsô; gadia Aôndo Una na un sha ikev i tor." 
2Chronicles18:6 Kpa Yehoshafati kaa er: Profeti ugen u Aôndo ngu heen, er sé pine nan gaa?" 
2Chronicles18:7 Tor u Iserael kaa a Yehoshafati er: Or shi môm u sé pine nan imo i TER; kpa m kôr un ihom, gadia er ma kwaghôron u profeti u dedoo sha a mo ga, saa kwaghbo tseegh; ka Mikaia wan u Imla. Kpa Yehoshafati kaa er: Tor a̱ de kaan nahan ga." 
2Chronicles18:8 Tsô tor u Iserael yila dugwer kaa er: Za, za va a Mikaia wan u Imla fefa." 
2Chronicles18:9 Nahan tor u Iserael man Yehoshafati tor u Yuda ve tema, hanmô nan tema sha ikônough ki torough ki nan, a iwuhanev mbi torov iyol, hen vande u gbiren alakema hen hunda u nyôron ken Samaria la; uprofeti cii lu ôron kwaghôron u profeti sha ishiv vev." 
2Chronicles18:10 Sedekia wan u Kenaana er akor a iyôô, a kaa er: TER ngu kaan nahan er: Ka sha a man ú mgbegha Mbashiria zan zan vea tim ye." 
2Chronicles18:11 Kape uprofeti cii ve ôr la, ve kaa er: Gba zan hen Ramoti-gileadi tsô, ú za hemba; gadia TER Una na un sha ikev i tor." 
2Chronicles18:12 Ortyom u a za u za yilan Mikaia la, kaa a na er: Nenge, uprofeti cii mba haan zwa môm, mba pasen kwagh u doon tor; yô, we kpaa, kwaghôron wou a̱ lu er kwaghôron u mô ve nahan, za ôr kwagh u dedoo." 
2Chronicles18:13 Kpa Mikaia kaa er: Er TER A lu u uma ne, kwagh u Aôndo Una kaam yô, ka un me ôr ye." 
2Chronicles18:14 Ve hen tor yô, tor pine un er: Mikaia sé za hen Ramoti-gileadi, sé za nôngo ityav, shin m̱ de ze ga? A kaa a na er: Gba zan tsô, ú za hemba; á na ve sha ikev you." 
2Chronicles18:15 Tsô tor kaa a na er: Ka kwa me je man me na u, ú bum wer, ú gba ôron mo kwagh ugen ga, saa u mimi tseegh ken iti i TERE?" 
2Chronicles18:16 Nahan a kaa er: M nenge Iserael cii hingir kughukuku sha iwo, er iyôngo i i lu a orkuran ga yô; yô, TER kaa er: Mban mba a ter ga, nahan hanmô ve, nana̱ hide hen ya u nan bem bem." 
2Chronicles18:17 Tsô tor u Iserael kaa a Yehoshafati er: Ashen m kaa a we je mer, una ôron kwagh u doon ga, saa u bo tsô gaa?" 
2Chronicles18:18 Shi a kaa er: Nahan yô, ungwa ase imo i TER; m nenge TER tema sha ikônough Nagh ki torough, akum a Sha cii tile Un ken uwegh ku yanegh kua ku imesegh kpaa." 
2Chronicles18:19 Tsô, TER pine er: Ka an nana za mee Ahaba tor u Iserael er a̱ za ken num a̱ za kpe hen Ramoti-gileadi ase? Tsô ugen ôr kwagh nahan, ugen ôr di kwagh ugen kposo." 
2Chronicles18:20 Nahan jijingi ugen due va tile sha ishigh ki TER, kaa er: Mo me ze mee un. TER pine un er: Ka sha nyi?" 
2Chronicles18:21 A kaa er: Me due me hingir jijingi u aiegh ken zwa u profeti nav cii, A kaa er: We ú mee un, ú hemba un kpaa, za ase za er nahan." 
2Chronicles18:22 Yô, nenge, TER ver jijingi u aiegh ken zwa u uprofeti ou mban; man TER gema ôr kwagh u bo sha a we." 
2Chronicles18:23 Tsô Sedekia wan u Kenaana kporom, ta Mikaia sambe sha henge, a kaa er: Ka sha hanma gbenda man Jijingi u TER A dugh her a mo kera, A za er kwagh a wee?" 
2Chronicles18:24 Mikaia kaa er: Yô, sha iyange la ú nenge, zum u ú nyôr ken iyou i ker atô sha u yeren la." 
2Chronicles18:25 Tsô tor u Iserael kaa er: Kua nen a Mikaia hide nen a na hen Amon orkurangar, man hen Yoashi wan u tor;" 
2Chronicles18:26 kaa nen ner, tor kaa nahan er: Wa nen or ne ken gaadi, koso nen un sha kwaghyan u ican kua mngerem ma icanem kpaa, zan zan me kar hiden bem bem." 
2Chronicles18:27 Tsô Mikaia kaa er: Aluer wea hide bem bem yô, TER ôr kwagh a mo ga. Shi a kaa er: Ne ior cii ungwa nen." 
2Chronicles18:28 Tsô tor u Iserael kua Yehoshafati tor u Yuda, ve gba kôndon zan sha Ramoti-gileadi." 
2Chronicles18:29 Nahan tor u Iserael kaa a Yehoshafati er: Me gema iyol, man me nyôr ken utya ye; kpa we yô, haa ikav mbi torov. Tsô tor u Iserael gema iyol; maa ve nyôr ken utya je." 
2Chronicles18:30 Yô, tor u Shiria wa mbahemenev mba akeke a na kwagh, a kaa er: De nenge nen ityav a mbakiriki shin mbavesen kpaa ga, saa tor u Iserael tseegh." 
2Chronicles18:31 Tsô er mbahemenev mba akeke nenge a Yehoshafati yô, ve kaa er: Ka tor u Iserael je ne. Nahan ve gema er vea nôngo ityav a na; kpa Yehoshafati genger imo, TER kpaa wase un, Aôndo yange ve, nahan ve de un." 
2Chronicles18:32 Tsô er mbahemenev mba akeke za kav er i lu tor u Iserael ga yô, ve hide ve de u zendan un ijime." 
2Chronicles18:33 Tsô orgen henda ada gba keren ivaan abu tsô, za ta tor u Iserael hen ijuwan i ikav mbi utyav mbi yisan iyol a mi la; nahan a kaa a or u kôôm ikyekye na la er: Gema, hide ijime due a mo ken utya kera, gadia i vihim iyol." 
2Chronicles18:34 Ityav seer taver sha iyange la; tor u Iserael yier shin ikyekye, a ver ishigh ken Mbashiria zan zan aikighe; iyange i been yô, a maa a kpe." 
2Chronicles19:1 Tsô Yehoshafati tor u Yuda hide hen ya na ken Yerusalem doo doo. 
2Chronicles19:2 Ornengenakaa Yehu wan u Hanani, due va kegh un gbenda, a kaa a tor Yehoshafati er: Doo u ú wasen mbaafereve, man mba kôron TER ihom kpaa ve̱ doo u ishimaa? Sha ci u kwagh ne yô, iyugh i TER ngi van sha a we." 
2Chronicles19:3 Nahan kpaa i zua a akaadoon her a we, gadia u vihi Asherim ken tar ne kera, shi u ver ishima u keren TER kpaa." 
2Chronicles19:4 Tsô Yehoshafati maa a tema ken Yerusalem; a shi a due a gba zenden zan hen ior, a hii hen Bersheba zan zan za ar sha tar u iwoogh u Eferaim, a hire a ve hen TER, Aôndo u uter vev." 
2Chronicles19:5 A ver mbaajiriv ken tar la, ken agar a lun a ugir ken Yuda, sha agar agar;" 
2Chronicles19:6 a kaa a mbaajiriv mbala er: Ver nen ishima sha kwagh u ne eren yô; gadia ne mba ôron ijir sha ci u or ga, kpa ka sha ci u TER; man Un ngu a ven imôngo hen ijir." 
2Chronicles19:7 Yô, mciem ma cian TER ma lu sha a ven; ver nen ishima er nen nahan; gadia ma ifer ngi hen TER, Aôndo wase, man msange u sha dooshima kpaa ga, man u ngohol inyaregh ki yamen ishô kpaa ga." 
2Chronicles19:8 Ken Yerusalem kpaa, Yehoshafati ver Mbalevi mbagenev kua upristi man mbahemenev mba sha uya mba uter mba Iserael sha ci u ijir i ôron i TER, man ijir i akaa a kperan. Tsô ve hide ken Yerusalem." 
2Chronicles19:9 Man shi a wa ve kwagh, a kaa er: Er nen kwagh nahan sha mcie u cian TER la, sha ishima i veren man sha ishima i môm." 
2Chronicles19:10 Hanma ijir i anmgbianev enev mba ve tem ken agar a ve, vea va a mi her a ven yô, shin a lu kwagh u iwooor shin kwagh u atindi kua atindiakaa man akaawan kua ajiraôron, wa nen ve kwagh, ve̱ de luun a ibo hen TER, er iyugh ia va sha a ven kua anmgbianev enev, ga; er nen nahan, tsô né kera lu a ibo ga." 
2Chronicles19:11 Nenge, pristi u tamen Amaria ngu nengen sha a ven sha akaa a TER cii; man Sebadia, wan u Ishemael, orvesen u sha ya u Yuda ngu nengen sha akaa a tor cii; man Mbalevi vea lu mbatomov sha ishigh yenegh. Lu nen taveraa, er nen nahan. TER A̱ lu a mbamimi!" 
2Chronicles20:1 Tsô ken masejime u kwagh ne yô, Mbamoabi man Mbaamon kua Mbameuni mbagenev a ve imôngo, ve va u va nôngon ityav a Yehoshafati." 
2Chronicles20:2 Nahan ior mbagenev va va kaa a Yehoshafati, er: Ikpelaior kpishi i yande zegemnger ngi van num sha a we, ve due ken Shiria; nenge, mba ken Hasason-tamar (ka En-gedi je la)." 
2Chronicles20:3 Nahan cier Yehoshafati iyol, a ver ishima sha u keren TER; a yôô er i̱ hôr kwaghyan ken Yuda cii." 
2Chronicles20:4 Nahan Yuda zua cii sha u keren iwasen hen TER; ve due ken agar a Yuda cii sha u va keren TER. 
2Chronicles20:5 Tsô Yehoshafati kar za tile hen atô u ikpelaior i Yuda man Yerusalem, ken iyou i TER, sha ishigh ki tembe u he," 
2Chronicles20:6 a kaa er: TERE, Aôndo u uter asev, We U ngu Aôndo u Sha gaa? Ka We U tem tor sha utor mba akuraior cii ye gaa? Ka sha uwegh Ough, tahav mbu lu kua agee kpaa ye, ka nahan man ma or á fatyô u hendan kwagh a We ga ye." 
2Chronicles20:7 Aôndo wase, ka We man lu U zenda mba ve tema ken tar ne sha ishigh ki ior Ou Iserael kera, man U gema u, U na tsombor u ikaru Aberaham gbem gaa?" 
2Chronicles20:8 Nahan ve tema ker, ve maa U icighanjiir ken u, sha ci u iti You, er:" 
2Chronicles20:9 Aluer kwaghbo una tser se, shin sanker, shin mtsaha, shin bouange, shin ijen kpaa, sé va tile sha ishigh ki iyou ne, man sha ishigh You kpaa (gadia iti You ngi ken iyou ne), sé genger imo her a We ken ican yase man We kpaa Ú ungwa man Ú yima." 
2Chronicles20:10 Yô, nenge, Mbaamon man Mbamoabi man mba sha uwo u Seir, mba U yange Mbaiserael u karen ken tar ve zum u ve due ken tar u Igipiti la, gadia ve kaha ape gen, ve de ve her, ve tim ve ga;" 
2Chronicles20:11 nenge, imba iyev i ve oron se ne, er ve ve sha u va dughun se ken tar Wou kera, u U ne se dyako ne." 
2Chronicles20:12 Aôndo wase, Ú shi ôr ve ijir gaa? Gadia se mba a agee sha ikpelaior i vesen i i ve ityav hen vese ne ga, man se kera fa kwagh u sé er ga, kpa ashe ase nga sha awe." 
2Chronicles20:13 Tsô Mbayuda cii tile sha ishigh ki TER, mbayev vev mba kiriki man kasev vev kua ônov vev kpaa." 
2Chronicles20:14 Tsô Jijingi u TER sen her atô u ior sha Yahashiel wan u Sekaria, wan u Benaia, wan u Yeiel, wan u Matania, Orlevi u ken ônov mba Asav;" 
2Chronicles20:15 nahan a kaa er; Ver nen ato, ne Mbayuda cii, man ne mba ne tem ken Yerusalem, man we tor Yehoshafati kpaa; TER ngu kaan a ven nahan er: De cie nen ga, asema kpaa a̱ de yen ne sha ci u ikpelaior i vesen ne ga; gadia ityav ka mbi yenev ga, ka mbi Aôndo je." 
2Chronicles20:16 Kper, sen nen za nôngo nen ityav a ve; nenge, mba kôndon sha mkende u Shise; nea kohol ve hen ikighir i pev sha ishigh ki desereti u Yeruel." 
2Chronicles20:17 Ka ne né nôngo ityav mbin ga; wa nen ago iyol, tile nen ving, tsô né nenge myem u TER Una yima ne, we Yuda man Yerusalem; de cie nen ga, asema a̱ de yen ne kpaa ga; kper, due nen, nôngo nen ityav a ve, gadia TER ngu a ven." 
2Chronicles20:18 Tsô Yehoshafati gure kuma icul inya; Yuda cii kua mba ve tem ken Yerusalem kpaa ve haa inya sha ishigh ki TER, ve civir TER." 
2Chronicles20:19 Mbalevi mba ken ônov mba Mbakohati man ken ônov mba Mbakora, ve mough ve tile sha, ve civir TER, Aôndo u Iserael, sha imo i genger genger, tsung je." 
2Chronicles20:20 Ve mough pepe, ve za nyôr ken desereti u Tekoa; mba ngur yemen hemen yô, Yehoshafati tile sha, kaa er: Ungwam nen, Yuda, man ne mba ne tem ken Yerusalem! Na nen TER, Aôndo wen, jighjigh, ka nahan man né tile dông ye; uprofeti Nav kpaa na nen ve jighjigh, ka nahan man á kpe ne iyol ye." 
2Chronicles20:21 Tsô a hen kwagh a ior, nahan a ver mbagenev er ve̱ wa atsam ve̱ wuese TER, ve̱ wuese a uicighanmbaakondov iyol, ve̱ zaan ikumutya ken hemen, ve̱ kaa er: Wuese nen TER, gadia erdoo Na ngu gbem sha won." 
2Chronicles20:22 Zum u ve hii icam i wam man u wuese, yô, TER ver mbagenev myer er ve̱ kegh Mbaamon man Mbamoabi kua ior mba sha uwo u Seir, mba ve va ityav hen Yuda la; nahan i hemba ve je." 
2Chronicles20:23 Gadia Mbaamon man Mbamoabi, ve mough ityav a ior mba ve tem sha uwo u Seir la, er vea wua ve, vea tim ve purututu. Tsô, zum u ve wua ior mba ve tem sha Seir la, ve bee yô, ve gema ve gba timin ayol a ve." 
2Chronicles20:24 Zum u Yuda va hen igungu u mbakuran u a lu ken desereti la yô, ve nenge ikpelaior; yô, nenge, ve hingir akom hen inya gbulugh gbulugh, ma or môm nan war ga." 
2Chronicles20:25 Er Yehoshafati a ior nav ve va u yan ishar yô, ve zua a akaa her a ve kpishi; akondo kua ikav mbi hweev mbi injaav mbi ve kura sha ci u ayol a ve la, ngee je gande ve u yemen a mi cii; ayange atar je ve lu kuran ishar, gadia i ngee kpishi." 
2Chronicles20:26 Sha iyange i sha unyiin la, ve kohol shin Pev u Beraka, gadia ve wuese TER ker; ka nahan man i yilan ijiir la er, Pev u Beraka, zan zan nyian ye." 
2Chronicles20:27 Tsô ior i Yuda kua i Yerusalem cii gba hiden, Yehoshafati lu ve sha hemen; ve gba hiden ken Yerusalem a iember, gadia TER na ve iember ken asema sha mbaihomov vev." 
2Chronicles20:28 Tsô ve nyôr ken Yerusalem a mbaadiguve man umolo kua ikor i tôngon, ve za ken iyou i TER." 
2Chronicles20:29 Mcieryol u TER haa sha utor mba sha tar cii, zum u ve ungwa er TER A nenge ityav a mbaihomov mba Iserael yô." 
2Chronicles20:30 Nahan bem gba ken tar u Yehoshafati; gadia Aôndo na, na un mmem, hanma ian cii." 
2Chronicles20:31 Yehoshafati tema tor sha Yuda; a lu anyom ikundugber kar ataan zum u a ya tor la, man a tema tor anyom ikundu kar ataan ken Yerusalem; iti i ngô na er Asuba wan u Shilhi." 
2Chronicles20:32 A zende sha gbenda u ter na Asa, a kaha a undu u ga, a lu eren kwagh u jighilii sha ishigh ki TER." 
2Chronicles20:33 Nahan kpaa, i vihi ajiir a taven sha la, kera ga; ior kpaa lu a ver asema a ve sha Aôndo u uter vev ga." 
2Chronicles20:34 Aerenakaa a Yehoshafati agen, a hiihii man a masetyô cii, nenge, i nger a ken ruamabera u Yehu wan u Hanani, u i we ken ruamabera u utor mba Iserael la." 
2Chronicles20:35 Ken masejime ne yô, Yehoshafati tor u Yuda la, ya ikur a Ahashia tor u Iserael; un yô, eren ifer kpishi;" 
2Chronicles20:36 a ya ikur a na er vea gba utso mba vea za a mi hen Tarshishi yô; ve er utso mbala ken Eshion-geber. 
2Chronicles20:37 Tsô Elieser wan u Dodavahu u Maresha ôr kwaghôron u profeti sha Yehoshafati, a kaa er: Er u ye ikur a Ahashia yô, TER tim ityom you kera. Nahan utso mbala hembe, ve kera fatyô u zan hen Tarshishi ga." 
2Chronicles21:1 Tsô Yehoshafati yav a uter nav imôngo, i ii un a uter nav imôngo ken gar u Davidi; wan na Yehoram gema tema tor sha ityough nagh." 
2Chronicles21:2 A lu a anmgbianev, ka ônov mba Yehoshafati je la, lu: Asaria man Yehiel man Sekaria man Asaria man Mikael man Shefatia; mban cii lu ônov mba Yehoshafati tor u Iserael." 
2Chronicles21:3 Ter ve er ve uzegembaiwuav sha azurfa man sha zenaria man sha ikav mbi injaav kua agar a lun a ugir ken Yuda; kpa a na Yehoram tor, gadia un lu wan na u iunda." 
2Chronicles21:4 Kpa zum u Yehoram ngohol tor u ter na la, er a va taver yô, a gema a wua anngôôv nav ca ca sha sanker, kua atiator agen a Iserael kpaa." 
2Chronicles21:5 Yehoram lu anyom ikundugber kar ahar zum u a ya tor yô; a tema tor ken Yerusalem anyom anigheni. 
2Chronicles21:6 A zenden sha gbenda u utor mba Iserael, er ya u Ahaba lu eren nahan; gadia a er wan u Ahaba; a er kwaghbo sha ishigh ki TER." 
2Chronicles21:7 Nahan kpaa, TER rumun u timin ya u Davidi ga, sha ci u ityendezwa i A tôndo a Davidi la, gadia A tôndo zwa a na er Una na un imenger, un kua ônov nav gbem." 
2Chronicles21:8 Sha ayange na la, Edom due sha ikev i Yuda kera, ve gema ve ver tor ve ayol a ve." 
2Chronicles21:9 Tsô Yehoram per a mbahemenev nav kua akekeautya a na cii; a mough tugh, a hemba Mbaedom mba ve kase un a mbahemenev mba akekeautya la." 
2Chronicles21:10 Kape Edom hendan due sha ikev i Yuda kera, zan zan nyian ne. Libena kpaa hendan a na sha shighe shon môm la; gadia a undu TER, Aôndo u uter nav." 
2Chronicles21:11 Shi a er ajiir a taven sha, sha iwo i Yuda, a na mba ve tema ken Yerusalem sha u ve̱ er idya; a tsume a Yuda sha gbenda u bo." 
2Chronicles21:12 Tsô takerada due hen profeti Eliya va nyôr hen a na, a kaa er: TER, Aôndo u Davidi teru, ngu kaa nahan er: Er u ze sha gbenda u teru Yehoshafati, shin sha gbenda u Asa tor u Yuda kpaa ga, yô," 
2Chronicles21:13 u gem u ze sha gbenda u utor mba Iserael, man u ne mba ve tem ken Yuda kua Yerusalem sha u ve̱ er idya, er ya u Ahaba lu er nahan, man shi u wua anmgbianev ou mba hen ya u teru mba ve hembe doon a we la," 
2Chronicles21:14 Nenge, TER Una tsaha ior ou sha mtsaha u vesen, kua ônov ou, man kasev ou, man kwagh u u lu a mi cii;" 
2Chronicles21:15 We iyol you kpaa angev mbua er u kpishi ken mya, anyom imôngo, myam ou maa haa won sha angev mbula." 
2Chronicles21:16 Tsô TER kende jijingi u Mbafiliti kua Mbaarabia mba ve lu ikua ikua a Mbakushi la er ve̱ nôngo ityav a Yehoram; 
2Chronicles21:17 ve va ityav hen Yuda, ve hemba ve, ve nyôr, ve kura inyaregh ki ve zua a mi ken ya u tor cii kua ônov nav man kasev nav, je yô, i shi un ma wan môm ga, saa Yehoahashi wan na u masetyô tsô." 
2Chronicles21:18 Ken masejime u akaa ne cii yô, TER tsaha un sha angev mbu been mayange ga, ken myam nam." 
2Chronicles21:19 Tsô shighe kar er anyom ahar nahan yô, myam nam haa won sha angev nav mbula; a kpe sha bouange. Ior nav kera nande un kwaghhumandoon er ve nande uter nav nahan ga." 
2Chronicles21:20 A lu anyom ikundugber kar uhar zum u a ya tor la, a tema tor ken Yerusalem anyom anigheni; er a kar kera nahan, i sar ve a na ga; ve ii un ken gar u Davidi, kpa lu ken iwar i utor ga." 
2Chronicles22:1 Tsô mba ve tema ken Yerusalem la, ve gema Ahashia, wan na u masetyô la, ve ver un tor sha ityough nagh; gadia ikumior i i va a Mbaarabia hen afo la, ve wua ônov nav mba vesen cii. Nahan Ahashia wan u Yehoram tor u Yuda, ya tor." 
2Chronicles22:2 Ahashia lu anyom akunduahar kar ahar zum u a ya tor la; a tema tor inyom i môm ken Yerusalem; iti i ngô na er Atalia wan u Omri. 
2Chronicles22:3 Un kpaa zaan sha gbenda u ya u Ahaba; gadia ngô na lu wasen un u henen ifer i eren. 
2Chronicles22:4 A er ifer sha ishigh ki TER, er ya u Ahaba lu er nahan; gadia ka ve je ve lu wasen un u henen akaa shighe u ter na kpe kera la, zaan a na ken mtim ye." 
2Chronicles22:5 A lu zan sha ityesen ve kpaa, shi a za vea Yehoram wan u Ahaba tor u Iserael sha u za nôngon ityav a Hasael tor u Shiria hen Ramoti-gileadi; kpa Mbashiria vihi Yoram iyol," 
2Chronicles22:6 nahan a hire ken Yesereel er, i̱ va sôr un avav a i gber un hen Rama zum u a lu nôngon ityav a Hasael tor u Shiria la, Ahashia wan u Yehoram tor u Yuda va er una za nenge Yoram wan u Ahaba ken Yesereel, gadia lu uange." 
2Chronicles22:7 Mtim u Ahashia due her Aôndo, sha mze u a za hen Yoram la; gadia er a va yô, a za a Yehoram imôngo sha u za keghen Yehu wan u Nimshi gbenda, u TER shighe un mkurem kôr un tor sha u a̱ za tim ya u Ahaba la." 
2Chronicles22:8 Tsô er Yehu lu kuren ijir sha ya u Ahaba la yô, a zua a atiator a Yuda man ônov mba anngôôv mba Ahashia, ve lu mbatomov mba Ahashia, nahan a wua ve." 
2Chronicles22:9 Tsô a gba keren Ahashia, ve za kôr un, a yer a lu ken Samaria; ve va a na hen Yehu, ve wua un; ve ii un, gadia ve kaa er: Un ka wan u Yehoshafati je, u a ker TER a ishima na i môm la. Nahan ma or ken ya u Ahashia u nana fatyô u teman tor yô, nan kera lu ga." 
2Chronicles22:10 Zum u Atalia ngô u Ahashia nenge er wan na a kpe yô, a mough, a wua ônov mba tor mba hen ya u Yuda la cii." 
2Chronicles22:11 Kpa Yehoshabeati wan u tor, u kwase, za tôô Yoashi wan u Ahashia la myer, ken ônov mba tor mba i lu wuan la, a ver un a yese na ken iyou i yaven. Nahan Yehoshabeati wan u tor Yehoram, kwase u pristi Yehoyada (gadia un lu anngô u Ahashia), a yer Atalia un, nahan a wua un ga." 
2Chronicles22:12 A lu a ve myer ken iyou i Aôndo, anyom ataratar; nahan Atalia tema tor sha tar la." 
2Chronicles23:1 Sha inyom i sha utaankaruhar la Yehoyada taver ishima ker, nahan a zua zwa a mbahemenev mba ve lu a ior deri deri sha ikev la, lu Asaria wan u Yeroham, man Ishemael wan u Yehohanan, man Asaria wan u Obedi, man Maaseia wan u Adaia, kua Elishafati wan u Shikeri." 
2Chronicles23:2 Ve gba zenden ken tar u Yuda ve kura Mbalevi ken agar a Yuda cii man mbahemenev mba sha uya mba uter mba Iserael, ve va ken Yerusalem." 
2Chronicles23:3 Tsô ikpelaior cii ya ikur a tor ken iyou i Aôndo. A kaa a ve, er: Nenge, wan u tor una ya tor, er TER lu kaa sha kwagh u ônov mba Davidi la." 
2Chronicles23:4 Yô, kwagh u né er yô, ka un ne: pav nen nongo wen u u hii yaren tom sha iyange i memen la akum atar, upristi kua Mbalevi kpaa; ikum i môm i̱ lu mbakuranihinda;" 
2Chronicles23:5 ikum igen i̱ lu hen ya u tor; shi ikum igen i̱ lu hen Hundagar u Imagh; yô, ior cii ve̱ lu hen ityembe i iyou i TER." 
2Chronicles23:6 Kpa or môm nana̱ de nyer ken iyou i TER ga, saa upristi kua Mbalevi mba ve eren tom ker la; ve yô, ve̱ nyôr gadia ve mba wang; kpa ior mbagenev cii yô, ve̱ wa iko sha imo i TER." 
2Chronicles23:7 Mbalevi yô, ve̱ kase tor, hanma or nana̱ lu a ikav mbi utyav mbi nan sha ikev, hanma or u nana nyôr ken iyou la yô, i̱ wua nan je; kpa ne yô, lu nen a tor imôngo zum u una nyôron man una duen kpaa." 
2Chronicles23:8 Nahan Mbalevi man Yuda cii ve er kwagh u pristi Yehoyada kaa la cii; hanma or nan kohol ior mba nan, mba ve hii yaren tom sha iyange i memen kua mba vea mem tom sha iyange i memen la kpaa; gadia pristi Yehoyada na iniongo la gbenda ga." 
2Chronicles23:9 Pristi Yehoyada tôô awange man akuvautya kua iperutya i yan lu i tor Davidi la, i i lu ken iyou i Aôndo la, a na mbahemenev mba ve lu a ior deri deri sha ikev la." 
2Chronicles23:10 A ver ior cii kase tor wa atô hanmô a ikav mbi utyav sha uwe, hii iyou vegher u ken iyan zan zan ar iyou vegher u ken imese, sha ishigh ki atse a nanden nagh sha mi kua sha ishigh ki iyou." 
2Chronicles23:11 Tsô ve due a wan u tor maa ve cir un idyer i tor, ve na un Shiada: ve kôr un tor; Yehoyada kua ônov nav ve shighe un mkurem; ve kaa er, Tor a̱ tsa sha won!" 
2Chronicles23:12 Zum u Atalia ungwa ayôôso a ior er ve lu van iuu ember tor yô, a va hen ior ken iyou i TER;" 
2Chronicles23:13 jingi yô, a nenge tor tile hen ityô henpe nyôron la, mbahemenev kua mbaikorov tile a tor; ior mba tar la cii, lu ember, tôngon ikor; mbawanatsam kpaa lu kuhwan ityogholov, ve gba nderan icam i wuese. Tsô Atalia ande akondo a na, kaa er: I dughum myer! I dughum myer!" 
2Chronicles23:14 Kpa Yehoyada due a mbahemenev mba ve lu a ior deri deri sha ikev, mba ve lu sha akumautya la, a kaa a ve er: Nyôr nen a na ken atô u iniongo, due a na; or u nana za a na ityô yô, i̱ wua nan sha sanker; gadia pristi kaa er: De woo nen un ken iyou i TER ga." 
2Chronicles23:15 Tsô ve na un ian er a̱ due; za ar hen hunda u anyinya her ape nyôron zan ken ya u tor yô, maa ve wua un her." 
2Chronicles23:16 Tsô Yehoyada ya ikur a ior cii kua tor kpaa, er vea lu ior mba TER." 
2Chronicles23:17 Tsô ior cii ve za hen iyou i Baal, ve za yôhôl i; ve hembe atse na a nanden nagh sha mi kua ieev nav, ve wua Matan pristi u Baal sha ishigh ki atsegh."
