2Chronicles23:18 Man shi Yehoyada ver tom u ken iyou i TER sha ikev i upristi mba ve lu Mbalevi, mba Davidi lu pav ve iniongo iniongo ken iyou i TER er ve̱ naan iniav mbi nanden mbi TER, er i nger ken atindi a Mose nahan, a iember man atsam a wan, sha imo i Davidi." 
2Chronicles23:19 Shi a ver mbakuran sha ihinda i iyou i TER, sha ci u or u nan lu wang ga yô, shin a lu sha hanma gbenda kpaa, nana̱ de nyer ker ga yô." 
2Chronicles23:20 A shi a tôô mbahemenev mba ve lu a ior deri deri sha ikev man ashagbaior kua uityombaiorov man shi ior mba ken inya cii, a due a tor ken iyou i TER, a sen a na; ve kar sha hunda u sha, ve za ar hen iyou i tor, ve ver tor sha ikônough ki torough." 
2Chronicles23:21 Nahan ior mba hen tar la cii, ember; bem gba ken gar. Atalia yô, ve wua un sha sanker." 
2Chronicles24:1 Yoashi lu anyom ataankarahar zum u a ya tor la; a tema tor anyom akunduahar ken Yerusalem, iti i ngô na er, Shibia u ken Bersheba." 
2Chronicles24:2 Yoashi eren kwagh u dedoo sha ishigh ki TER, sha ayange a pristi Yehoyada la cii;" 
2Chronicles24:3 Yehoyada er kasev uhar na un; a mar ônov mba nomso kua mba kasev. 
2Chronicles24:4 Tsô ken masejime la yô, sar Yoashi u sôron iyou i TER." 
2Chronicles24:5 Nahan a kohol upristi man Mbalevi, a kaa a ve er: Za nen ken agar a Yuda, za kohol nen inyaregh hen Iserael cii, ki sôron iyou i Aôndo wen a mi anyom anyom, ver nen asema er nen fefa sha kwagh ne. Nahan kpaa, Mbalevi er fefa ga." 
2Chronicles24:6 Tsô tor yila pristi u tamen Yehoyada pine un er: Ka nyi u kaa Mbalevi wer, ve̱ za kohol inyaregh hen Yuda man hen Yerusalem, ki Mose wanakiriki u TER a wa mkohol u Iserael sha ci u tenti u Shiada la ga?" 
2Chronicles24:7 Gadia ônov mba Atalia iferkwase la ve hembe iyou i Aôndo, ve gema uicighanmbaakaav mba ken iyou i TER cii ve vihi sha Ubaal." 
2Chronicles24:8 Nahan tor kaa er, ve̱ er akwati, ve̱ ver ken won hen hunda u iyou i TER." 
2Chronicles24:9 Tsô ve yôô ken Yuda man ken Yerusalem er i̱ va TER a inyaregh ki Mose wanakiriki u Aôndo lu wa Iserael ken desereti la. 
2Chronicles24:10 Nahan atiator cii kua ior cii ve ember, ve va a ki, ve va haa shin akwati la, zan zan ve na ve bee cii." 
2Chronicles24:11 Tsô hanma shighe u Mbalevi vea va a akwati la hen mbatomov mba tor, man vea nenge inyaregh kia lu kpishi yô, orngeren u tor man or u eren tom hen pristi u tamen la, ve va kura kwagh u kimi, shi ve hire a mi hen ijiir na. Kape ve eren ayange ayange la; nahan ve kohol inyaregh kpishi." 
2Chronicles24:12 Tsô tor vea Yehoyada ve gema ki ve na mbaerentom u iyou i TER; nahan ve ker ior mba maan kwagh man mba gban akaa er, ve̱ sôr iyou i TER sha inyar, man shi mbavaren iyôv mbi iliv man mbi togula kpaa er, ve̱ sôr iyou i TER." 
2Chronicles24:13 Tsô mbatomov er tom, tom la kpaa za hemen doo doo sha ikev ve; ve sôr iyou i TER la her, hingir dedoo." 
2Chronicles24:14 Zum u ve bee cii yô, ve va a inyaregh ki ki neer la sha ishigh ki tor vea Yehoyada; ka sha ki man i er ikav mbi tomov sha ci u iyou i TER ye, ka ikav mbi eren tom a mi man mbi nan nagh a mi, man ugbande mba nanden nagh a mi man ikav mbi sha zenaria kua azurfa. Ve naan iniav mbi nanden ken iyou i TER gbem sha ayange a Yehoyada la cii." 
2Chronicles24:15 Kpa Yehoyada hingir or u been iyol, anyom a na ngee, nahan a kpe; anyom a na lu deri man ikundugber zum u a kpe la." 
2Chronicles24:16 Tsô ve ii un ken gar u Davidi a utor imôngo, gadia a er tom u dedoo ken Iserael sha ci u Aôndo kua iyou Na kpaa." 
2Chronicles24:17 Er Yehoyada kpe kera yô, atiator a Yuda va gure civir tor. Tor kpaa ver ato hen ve." 
2Chronicles24:18 Nahan ve undu iyou i TER, Aôndo u uter vev, ve gba civir Asherim man ieev; tsô iyugh sen sha Yuda man Yerusalem sha ci u ibo ve ne." 
2Chronicles24:19 Nahan kpaa, A tindi uprofeti hen a ve er ve̱ hide a ve hen TER; ve wa ve kwagh, kpa ve ver ato ga." 
2Chronicles24:20 Tsô Jijingi u TER va sha Sekaria, wan u pristi Yehoyada; a tile sha ishigh ki ior, a kaa a ve er: Aôndo ngu kaan nahan er: Ka nyi ne peren atindi a TER, ne kera soo u zuan a mkpeyol ga nahana? Er ne undu TER yô, Un kpaa A undu ne ve." 
2Chronicles24:21 Tsô ve zua zwa sha a na, ve ta un awen sha imo i tor ken tembe u iyou i TER." 
2Chronicles24:22 Kape tor Yoashi kera umbur kwagh u dedoo u Yehoyada ter u Sekaria er un, ga la, a gema a wua wan na je. Ngur nôngon ku yô, a kaa er: TER A̱ nenge, A̱ or iyev!" 
2Chronicles24:23 Tsô er inyom kar i môm yô, ikumutya i Mbashiria va nôngo ityav a na; ve va hen Yuda man Yerusalem, ve wua atiator a ior kera cii, ve tindi ishar i ve ya la cii hen tor u Damaseku." 
2Chronicles24:24 Shin er ikumutya i Mbashiria va a ior kpuaa tsô, nahan kpaa, TER na zegeikumutya sha ikev ve, gadia ve undu TER, Aôndo u uter vev. Kape ve kure Yoashi ijir la." 
2Chronicles24:25 Zum u ve undu un la (gadia ve undu un a angev mbu nyoon tsung), mbatomov nav zua zwa sha a na, sha ci u ike i awambe a wan u pristi Yehoyada, ve wua un sha gambe na, a kpe; ve ii un ken gar u Davidi, kpa ve ii un ken iwar i utor ga." 
2Chronicles24:26 Mba ve zua zwa sha a na yô, lu Sabadi wan u Shimeati wankwase u Mbaamon, man Yehoshabadi wan u Shimeati wankwase u Mbamoabi." 
2Chronicles24:27 Kwagh u ônov nav mba nomso, man akaaôron a Aôndo a i ôr sha a na la man kwagh u iyou i sôron i Aôndo la, nenge, i nger ve ken Mpase u ruamabera u utor. Tsô wan na Amashia tema tor sha ityough nagh." 
2Chronicles25:1 Amashia lu anyom ikundu kar ataan zum u a ya tor la; a tema tor anyom ikundu kar ataankaranyiin ken Yerusalem; iti i ngô na er Yehoadan, lu u ken Yerusalem." 
2Chronicles25:2 A eren kwagh u dedoo sha ishigh ki TER, kpa lu sha ishima i môm ga." 
2Chronicles25:3 Tsô zum u tor taver sha uwegh nagh yô, a wua mbatomov nav mba iyange ve wua tor, ter na la." 
2Chronicles25:4 Kpa a wua ônov vev ga, a er sha kwagh u i nger ken atindi a ken ruamabera u Mose yô, ape TER kaa er: Uter ve̱ de kpeen sha ci u ônov ga, ônov kpaa ve̱ de kpeen sha ci u uter ga, kpa hanma or nana̱ kpe sha ci u isholibo i nan iyol i nan." 
2Chronicles25:5 Tsô Amashia kohol Yuda, ver ve sha uya mba uter vev, sha ikev i mbahemenev mba lun a ior dubu dubu sha ikev man mbahemenev mba ve lu a ior deri deri sha ikev, ka Yuda cii kua Benyamin je la; a ôr iyenge ve hii sha mba ve kom anyom ikundu man mba ve hembe nahan, a zua a ior dubu deri utar, lu uicuwanmbaiorov, mba ve kuma u zan ityav, mbafan awange man iperutya." 
2Chronicles25:6 Man shi a lôhô anomaior a ageegh ken Iserael, ior dubu deri, a na ve tôndo sha azurfa kuma utalenti deri." 
2Chronicles25:7 Kpa or u Aôndo va her a na, kaa er: Tor, de kera rumun ikumutya i Iserael i̱ za a we imôngo ga, gadia TER ngu a Iserael ga, ka Mbaeferaim cii je la." 
2Chronicles25:8 Kpa gba zan tsô, taver ishima sha ityav mbi nôngon, Aôndo, Una zôhô u sha ishigh ki mbaihomov; gadia Aôndo ngu a tahav mbu wasen man mbu gbihin inya kpaa." 
2Chronicles25:9 Tsô Amashia pine or u Aôndo la er: Tsô me er nan sha kwagh u utalenti deri mba m ne ikumutya i Iserael laa? Or u Aôndo la gema kaa er: TER ngu a agee u nan we kwagh u a hembe ngun kpishi je. 
2Chronicles25:10 Tsô Amashia dugh ikumutya i i due ken Eferaim la kera er ve̱ hide ken ya; nahan ishima vihi ve kpishi a Yuda, ve hide hen ya a ishima i vihin tsung." 
2Chronicles25:11 Kpa Amashia taver ishima kar hemen ior nav, ve za shin Pev u Bar, ve za wua Mbaseir, ior dubu pue." 
2Chronicles25:12 Dubu pue ugen yô, Mbayuda yem a ve uma, ve unde a ve sha iwen i taven, ve mgbegha ve, ve gba shin inya, nahan ve cii ve sombo avur avur." 
2Chronicles25:13 Kpa mbanôngontyav mba Amashia na ve gbenda er ve̱ de ze ityav a na imôngo ga la, ve gema ve ta num sha agar a Yuda, hii hen Samaria zan zan ar hen Bete-horon, ve wua ior dubu utar, ve kura ishar kpishi." 
2Chronicles25:14 Tsô er Amashia za hemba Mbaedom hide yô, a va a mbaaôndo mba Mbaseir, a va ver ve er ve̱ hingir mbaaôndo nav, a gure a civir ve, a nande kwaghhumandoon sha ci ve kpaa." 
2Chronicles25:15 Nahan iyugh i TER mough sha Amashia, tsô A tindi profeti her a na, va kaa a na er: Ka nyi u keren mbaaôndo mba iorov mba ve yem ior vev sha ikev you ga laa?" 
2Chronicles25:16 Tsô, ngur ôron kwagh a na yô, tor kaa a na er: Se ver u or u henen kwagh a toro? Kighir je; i̱ wua u keng, ka nyi? Tsô profeti la kighir je, kaa er: M fa Aôndo vande veren ishima sha u timin we, sha ci u u er kwagh ne, man shi sha ci u u kera ver ato sha kwaghôron wam kpaa ga yô." 
2Chronicles25:17 Tsô Amashia tor u Yuda hen kwagh a ior, tindi loho hen Yoashi wan u Yehoahashi, wan u Yehu, tor u Iserael, a kaa er: Va, sé zua ishigh ayol ase." 
2Chronicles25:18 Tsô Yoashi tor u Iserael tindi loho hen Amashia tor u Yuda, a kaa er: Saa u sha Lebanon tindi loho hen sedar u sha Lebanon, a kaa er: Na wan wam, wan wou u kwase, a̱ er; kpa ishôso i sha Lebanon va kar, ndyar saa la." 
2Chronicles25:19 U fa wer, u hemba Edom; nahan ishima i gengese we wer, ú ker icivir yô. Gba teman hen ya wou gir gir tsô, inja na nan man ú kumbur ú ve a kwaghbo sha iyol you, ú va gba, kua Yuda imôngo?" 
2Chronicles25:20 Kpa Amashia wa iko ga; gadia lu ishima i Aôndo u nan ve sha ikev i mbaihomov vev, gadia ve ker mbaaôndo mba Edom." 
2Chronicles25:21 Nahan Yoashi tor u Iserael kôndo; un vea Amashia tor u Yuda ve za zua ishigh hen Bete-shemeshi u Yuda. 
2Chronicles25:22 Tsô Iserael hemba Yuda; hanma or yevese hide hen tenti u nan. 
2Chronicles25:23 Yoashi tor u Iserael kôr Amashia tor u Yuda wan u Yoashi wan u Yehoahashi hen Bete-shemeshi, va a na ken Yerusalem, va hembe gilgar u Yerusalem, hii hen Hundagar u Eferaim je zan zan ar hen Hundagar u Zongo, ka aseva deri unyiin je la." 
2Chronicles25:24 A kura zenaria man azurfa cii, man ikav mbi i zua a mi ken iyou i Aôndo cii, mbi mbi lu sha ikev i Obedi-edom la, kua inyaregh ki ken iyou i tor, man mbakwarev kpaa; tsô a hide hen Samaria." 
2Chronicles25:25 Amashia wan u Yoashi tor u Yuda lu uma, ken ijime i Yoashi wan u Yehoahashi tor u Iserael kpe kera la, anyom pue kar ataan je." 
2Chronicles25:26 Aerenakaa a Amashia a hiihii man a masetyô cii, i nger a ken ruamabera u utor mba Yuda man mba Iserael la gaa?" 
2Chronicles25:27 Hii sha shighe u Amashia gema sha u den u dondon TER la je tsô, ve zua zwa sha a na ken Yerusalem; nahan a yevese a za hen Lakishi; ve tindi i tôv un angahar zan zan hen Lakishi, ve za wua un ker." 
2Chronicles25:28 Tsô ve va a na sha anyinya, ve va ii un a uter nav imôngo ken gar u Yuda." 
2Chronicles26:1 Tsô ior mba Yuda cii ve tôô Ushia, a lu anyom pue kar ataratar, ve ver un tor sha ityough ki ter na Amashia." 
2Chronicles26:2 Ka un je a maa Eloti, a hide a mi hen Yuda ye, ken ijime i tor yav kera a uter nav imôngo la." 
2Chronicles26:3 Ushia lu anyom pue ka ataratar zum u a ya tor la; a tema tor anyom akunduahargber kar ahar hen Yerusalem; iti i ngô na er Yekolia u hen Yerusalem. 
2Chronicles26:4 A er kwagh u dedoo sha ishigh ki TER, er ter na Amashia er nahan cii." 
2Chronicles26:5 A ver ishima u keren Aôndo sha ayange a Sekaria, u a lu tesen er i̱ civir Aôndo la. Sha ayange a a lu keren TER la yô, Aôndo na un mkpeyol." 
2Chronicles26:6 A due a za nôngo ityav a Mbafiliti, a hembe gilgar u Gati man gilgar u Yabene kua gilgar u Ashedodi; a maa agar ken tar u Ashedodi, kua hen atô u Mbafiliti kpaa." 
2Chronicles26:7 Aôndo wase un u nôngon ityav a Mbafiliti man Mbaarabia mba ve tema ken Gur-baal, kua a Mbameun kpaa." 
2Chronicles26:8 Mbaamon kpaa lu tan Ushia kpandegh; iti na za gwa zan zan nyôr ken Igipiti je, gadia lu a tahav kpishi je." 
2Chronicles26:9 Shi Ushia maa ayou a taven gôgônan ken Yerusalem hen Hundagar u Zongo la, man shi hen Hundagar u Pev la, kua hen iniuugh ki gilgar, a taver ve sha ikav mbi utyav." 
2Chronicles26:10 Shi a maa ayou a taven gôgônan ken desereti; a time azôr kpishi, gadia a lu a ilev kpishi shin pev kua sha tar u delaa kpaa; a lu a mbashilensule man mbasôron ikon i wain sha iwo kua hen ipusuinya kpaa, gadia un lu or u sule doon un mimi." 
2Chronicles26:11 Man shi Ushia lu a ikumutya, ve zaan ityav akum akum, sha iyenge i orngeren Yeiel kua Maaseia ornengen sha ve, ve ôr la, sha ikev i Hanania, u môm ken mbavesen mba tor la." 
2Chronicles26:12 Iyenge i mbahemenev mba sha uya mba uter cii, anomaior a ageegh, lu dubu uhar man deri ataratar." 
2Chronicles26:13 Ikumutya lu sha ikev ve, lu ior dubu deri utar dubu kar utaankaruhar man deri utaan, mba ve nôngon ityav ngeegh, ve wasen tor sha mbaihomov nav yô." 
2Chronicles26:14 Ushia er ikumutya la cii, iperutya man awange man aderashouja man uriga mba iyôv man mbaada kua awen a mzu." 
2Chronicles26:15 Ken Yerusalem yô, a er akeke a nôngon ityav a mi, a i er a sha kwaghfan, er a̱ tile sha ayou a taven gôgônan kua sha azongo, sha u keren avaan man uzegembaawenev a mi. Iti na za gwa yem ca, gadia a zua a iwasen i kpilighyol zan zan a taver je." 
2Chronicles26:16 Kpa zum u a taver la yô, ishima gengese un, nahan a er kwaghbo, a per tindi u TER, Aôndo na; gadia a nyôr ken tempel u TER er una nande kwaghhumandoon sha atse a nanden kwaghhumandoon sha mi la." 
2Chronicles26:17 Tsô pristi Asaria va un ken ijime, a upristi mba TER mbagenev akunduanyiin, ior mba taver asema," 
2Chronicles26:18 ve hendan a tor Ushia, ve kaa a na er: Ushia, u nanden TER kwaghhumandoon ne, ka kwagh wou ga, saa upristi, ônov mba Aron mba i tsegha ve er ve̱ nanden kwaghhumandoon la; due ken icighanjiir ne kera, gadia u per tindi; man kwagh ne kpaa ú zua a icivir hen TER Aôndo ga." 
2Chronicles26:19 Kpa ishima vihi Ushia; er a lu a gbande u nanden kwaghhumandoon sha uwe, man er ishima lu vihin un a upristi nahan yô, imande maa due un sha icul sha ishigh ki upristi ken iyou i TER la je, hen kpe u atse a nanden kwaghhumandoon sha mi la." 
2Chronicles26:20 Tsô er zegepristi Asaria man upristi cii lu kenger un yô, nenge, imande lu un sha icul, nahan ve mgbegha un kera fefa; een, un iyol na je kpaa, a kar fefa, a due, gadia TER tsaha un." 
2Chronicles26:21 Nahan tor Ushia lu orimande zan zan a kar kpen a mi, a tema ken iyou igen kposo, gadia lu orimande, i pav un a iyou i TER; wan na Yotam lu nengen sha ya u tor, lu ôron ior mba tar la ijir." 
2Chronicles26:22 Aerenakaa agen a Ushia a hiihii man a masetyô yô, profeti Yesaia, wan u Amoshi nger a." 
2Chronicles26:22 Aerenakaa agen a Ushia a hiihii man a masetyô yô, profeti Yesaia, wan u Amoshi nger a." 
2Chronicles26:23 Tsô Ushia yav a uter nav imôngo; ve ii un a uter nav imôngo hen ijiir i waregh i utor, gadia ve kaa er: Ka orimande; wan na Yotam gema tema tor sha ityough nagh." 
2Chronicles27:1 Yotam lu anyom ikundu kar ataan zum u a ya tor la; a tema tor ken Yerusalem anyom pue kar ataratar; iti i ngô na er Yerusha, wan u Sadoki." 
2Chronicles27:2 A eren kwagh u dedoo sha ishigh ki TER, er ter na Ushia lu eren nahan cii; kpa a nyôr ken tempel u TER ga. Kpa ior yô, ve lu eren kwaghbo heregh." 
2Chronicles27:3 A maa hunda u sha, u iyou i TER, gir u Ofel la kpaa a maa un kpishi." 
2Chronicles27:4 Man shi a maa agar sha tar u iwoogh u Yuda; shin akô kpaa, a maa ayouautya kua ayou a taven gôgônan." 
2Chronicles27:5 Shi a nôngo ityav a tor u Mbaamon kpaa, a hemba ve. Nahan Mbaamon na un azurfa kuma utalenti deri, man alakema kuma uikaren dubu pue kua shair kpaa dubu pue, hen inyom la je. Kape Mbaamon na un sha inyom i sha uhar kua i sha utar la kpaa." 
2Chronicles27:6 Nahan Yotam hingir or u ageegh, gadia a zende jighilaa sha ishigh ki TER, Aôndo na." 
2Chronicles27:7 Aerenakaa agen a Yotam man ityav nav mbi nôngon cii, kua aeren a na kpaa, nenge i nger a ken ruamabera u utor mba Iserael man mba Yuda." 
2Chronicles27:8 A lu anyom ikundu kar ataan zum u a ya tor la, man a tema tor ken Yerusalem anyom pue kar ataratar." 
2Chronicles27:9 Tsô Yotam yav a uter nav imôngo, ve ii un ken gar u Davidi; wan na Ahashi gema tema tor sha ityough nagh." 
2Chronicles28:1 Ahashi lu anyom ikundu zum u a ya tor la; a tema tor ken Yerusalem anyom pue kar ataratar; a eren kwagh u dedoo sha ishigh ki TER, er ter na Davidi nahan ga;" 
2Chronicles28:2 kpa a zaan sha igbenda i utor mba Iserael je, a ker ieev sha ci u Ubaal." 
2Chronicles28:3 Man shi a nande kwaghhumandoon shin pev u wan u Hinom, a nande ônov nav sha usu sha aeren a hôngorough a atôatyev, a TER lu zenda a sha ishigh ki Mbaiserael kera la." 
2Chronicles28:4 A naan nagh, shi a nanden kwaghhumandoon sha ajiir a taven sha man sha iwo kua shin hanma itinekon i lun a mure." 
2Chronicles28:5 Ka nahan man TER, Aôndo na, na un sha ikev i tor u Shiria ye, ve ve hemba un, ve kôr ior nav kpishi, ve yem a mi hen Damaseku. Shi i na un sha ikev i tor u Iserael kpaa, a hemba un, a wua un ior kpishi." 
2Chronicles28:6 Gadia Peka wan u Remalia wua ior dubu deri, dubu kar ikundu, ken Yuda, sha iyange i môm, ve cii ve lu anomaior a ageegh je; gadia ve undu TER, Aôndo u uter vev." 
2Chronicles28:7 Shikeri nomor u ageegh u Eferaim wua Maaseia wan u tor, kua Aserikam or u nengen sha ya u tor, kua Elkana mue u tor kpaa." 
2Chronicles28:8 Tsô Mbaiserael kura anmgbianev vev dubu deri uhar, lu kasev man ônov mba nomso man mba kasev, ve yem a ve uikangen, shi ve kura ishar kpishi kpaa her a ve, ve va a i hen Samaria." 
2Chronicles28:9 Kpa profeti u TER lu her, iti na er Odedi; a due a za kegh ikumutya i i lu hiden hen Samaria la gbenda, a kaa a ve er: Nenge nen, er TER, Aôndo u uter enev, A yugh a Yuda yô, A na ve sha ikev yen, ne wua ve sha iyugh i i ar Sha je yô." 
2Chronicles28:10 Hegen yô, ne ver ishima ner, né kighir ônov mba Yuda man Yerusalem ve̱ hingir ne ikpan i nomso man i ukase; nahan ne yô, ne mba a ma ibo hen TER, Aôndo wen, ga zee?" 
2Chronicles28:11 Yô, ungwam nen, na nen mbakwarev mba ne ker hen anmgbianev enev la gbenda; gadia iyugh i TER i vihin tsung ngi sha a ven." 
2Chronicles28:12 Tsô mbatamen mbagenev ken Mbaeferaim, lu: Asaria wan u Yohanan man Berekia wan u Meshilemoti man Yehisekia wan u Shalum, kua Amasa wan u Hadelai, ve hendan a mba ve hide ken utya la," 
2Chronicles28:13 ve kaa a ve er: Né nyôr a mbakwarev mban heen ga; gadia ne ver ishima u seer asorabo ase kua ibo yase sha u se̱ hingir mbabov sha ishigh ki TER; gadia ibo yase vese man iyugh i tsung kpaa ngi sha Iserael. 
2Chronicles28:14 Tsô mbautyav undu mbakwarev mbala kua ishar sha ikev i atiator kua ior cii. 
2Chronicles28:15 Nahan ior mba i ter ati a ve la mough, ve kua a mbakwarev mbala, ve pande ishar la, ve haa mba ve lu idyelegh la akondo, ve na ve akondo, ve wa ve akôv shin angahar, ve na ve kwaghyan man kwaghman, ve shighe ve mkurem, ve penda mba ve vôr la cii sha ujaki, ve hide a ve ken Yeriko, gar u avilegh, hen anmgbianev vev; tsô ve hide hen Samaria." 
2Chronicles28:16 Hen shighe la tor Ahashi tindi loho hen utor mba Ashiria er ve̱ va wase un; 
2Chronicles28:17 gadia Mbaedom shi va, va hemba Yuda, ve kôr mbagenev ve yem a mi uikangen." 
2Chronicles28:18 Mbafiliti kpaa va nôngo ityav a agar a shin pev man a ken tar u Imbusutariyan u Yuda la, ve ngohol Bete-shemeshi man Aiyalon man Gederoti man Soko kua agar a ve, man Timna a agar a na, man Gimso a agar a na; maa ve tema her je." 
2Chronicles28:19 Gadia TER hide a Mbayuda ijime sha ci u Ahashi tor u Iserael; gadia a kôr iyol na tsaha ken Yuda ga, shi a per atindi a TER kpishi kpaa." 
2Chronicles28:20 Tsô Tilgati-pilneser tor u Ashiria va her a na, kpa a va za un iyol tseegh, wase un ga;" 
2Chronicles28:21 gadia Ahashi kura inyaregh ken iyou i TER man ken iyou i tor kua ken iyou i atiator kpaa, a na tor u Ashiria; kpa kwagh la wase un ga." 
2Chronicles28:22 Zum u ican tser un la, a seer peren atindi a TER, un tor Ahashi shon la;" 
2Chronicles28:23 gadia a na mbaaôndo mba Damaseku nagh, mba ve hemba un la; a kaa er: Er mbaaôndo mba utor mba Shiria ve wese ve yô, nahan mo kpaa, me na ve nagh, ve̱ wasem. Kpa ve gema ve hingir ityôkwagh i timin un kua Iserael cii." 
2Chronicles28:24 Tsô Ahashi kohol ikav mbi ken iyou i TER Aôndo, a hembe ikav mbi iyou i Aôndo, a wuhe ihinda i iyou i TER; a er atse hen hanma zongough ken Yerusalem." 
2Chronicles28:25 Ken hanma gar u Yuda kpaa, a er ajiir a taven sha, sha ci u nanden mbaaôndo mbagenev kwaghhumandoon; a bam TER, Aôndo u uter nav." 
2Chronicles28:26 Aerenakaa a na agen man akaa a na cii, a hiihii man a masetyô, nenge, i nger a ken ruamabera u utor mba Yuda man mba Iserael." 
2Chronicles28:27 Tsô Ahashi yav a uter nav imôngo, ve ii un ken gar, ka ken Yerusalem je la, gadia ve va a na ken iwar i utor mba Iserael ga; wan na Hesekia gema tema tor sha ityough nagh." 
2Chronicles29:1 Hesekia ya tor zum u a lu anyom ikundu kar ataan la; man a tema tor ken Yerusalem anyom ikundu kar ataankaranyiin; iti i ngô na er Abiya wan u Sekaria. 
2Chronicles29:2 A eren kwagh u dedoo sha ishigh ki TER, er ter na Davidi lu eren nahan." 
2Chronicles29:3 Sha inyom i hiihii i a tema tor, sha uwer u hiihii la je, a bugh ihinda i iyou i TER, a sôr i." 
2Chronicles29:4 A nyôr a upristi man Mbalevi, a kohol ve hen tembe u u lu vegher u sha ityoughkitaregh la," 
2Chronicles29:5 a kaa a ve er: Ungwam nen, ne Mbalevi! Yô, wanger nen ayol a en, shi wanger nen iyou i TER, Aôndo u uter enev kpaa, kura nen hôngor ken icighanjiir kera." 
2Chronicles29:6 Gadia uter asev per atindi, ve er aferakaa sha ishigh ki TER, Aôndo wase, ve ta Un kera, ve gema ishiv vev hen ijiir i TER teman la kera, ve na ajime her." 
2Chronicles29:7 Man shi ve wuhe ihinda i puadwer, ve pir amenger, ve kera nande kwaghhumandoon ga, ve kera nyôr a nagh ku nanden ken icighanjiir u Aôndo u Iserael ga." 
2Chronicles29:8 Ka nahan man iyugh i TER va sha Yuda kua Yerusalem, A gema ve, ve hingir kwagh u tan mke iyol, man kwagh u cieryol, man kwagh u lahan kpaa, er ne nenge sha ashe a en nahan." 
2Chronicles29:9 Gadia, nenge, i wua uter asev sha sanker, ônov asev mba nomso man mba kasev kua kasev asev kpaa mba uikangen sha ci u kwagh ne." 
2Chronicles29:10 Hegen yô, sarem ken ishima u yan ikur a TER, Aôndo u Iserael, sha u A̱ hide a iyugh Na i vihin yum ne sha a vese kera." 
2Chronicles29:11 Ônov av, de kera hunden nen ishima sha kwagh ne ga; gadia TER tsuwa ne er ne̱ tile sha ishigh Nagh, ne̱ er Un tom kpaa, ne̱ hingir mbatomov Nav, ne̱ nanden kwaghhumandoon kpaa." 
2Chronicles29:12 Tsô Mbalevi mough, Mahati wan u Amasi, man Yoel wan u Asaria, mba ken ônov mba Kohati man ken ônov mba Merari yô, lu: Kishi wan u Abedi, man Asaria wan u Yehalelel; man ken mba Gershon yô, lu; Yoa wan u Shima, man Eden wan u Yoa;" 
2Chronicles29:13 ken ônov mba Elisafan yô, lu: Shimeri man Yeuel; man ken ônov mba Asav yô, lu: Sekaria man Matania;" 
2Chronicles29:14 man ken ônov mba Heman yô, lu: Yehuel man Shimei; man ken ônov mba Yedutun yô, lu: Shemaia man Ushiel." 
2Chronicles29:15 Ve kohol anmgbianev vev, ve wanger ayol a ve, tsô ve nyôr, sha mkaa u tor kaa sha imo i TER la, sha u vea wanger iyou i TER yô." 
2Chronicles29:16 Upristi kpaa ve nyôr ken atô u iyou i TER, sha u wanger i, ve kura ihôghonov mbi ve zua a mi ken tempel u TER cii, ve va a mi hen tembeyough u TER; nahan Mbalevi tôô mbi sha u vea za a mi ken won shin uwagh u Kideron." 
2Chronicles29:17 Sha uwer u hiihii iyange i u i hiihii la, ve hii u wanger akaa, ayange a u anigheni la ve ar hen puadwer u TER, shi ayange anigheni ve lu eren tom u wanger iyou i TER; sha uwer u hiihii ayange a u pue kar ataratar la, ve kure." 
2Chronicles29:18 Tsô ve va nyôr hen tor Hesekia, ve kaa er: Se wanger iyou i TER cii, kua atse a nan nagh ku nanden sha mi a ikav mbi a cii, man tebul u ubredi mba sha ishi a ikav nav cii kpaa." 
2Chronicles29:19 Man shi ikav mbi tor Ahashi lu haa kera la cii, sha iyange i a tema tor, zum u a er kwaghbo la, se sôr mbi, shi se wanger mbi kpaa; nenge, mbi sha ishigh ki atse a TER a nanden nagh sha mi la." 
2Chronicles29:20 Tsô tor Hesekia mough pepe, kohol mbatamen mba hen gar, a kôndo sha iyou i TER." 
2Chronicles29:21 Ve va a nagh ku isholibo sha anomabua ataankarahar, man anomaiyôngo ataankarahar, man agumaiyôngo ataankarahar, kua ukpev utaankaruhar kpaa, sha ci u tor man icighanjiir kua Yuda kpaa. Shi a kaa upristi ônov mba Aron er, ve̱ na ku sha atse a TER a nanden nagh sha mi la." 
2Chronicles29:22 Tsô ve sôngo anomabua; upristi ngohol awambe la, ve tsenda sha atse; ve sôngo anomaiyôngo la kpaa, ve tsenda awambe sha atse; shi ve sôngo agumaiyôngo la kpaa, ve tsenda awambe sha atse." 
2Chronicles29:23 Ve kporom a ukpev sha ci u nagh ku isholibo sha ishigh ki tor man ki mkohol u ior; ve penda ve ave sha ityou; 
2Chronicles29:24 tsô upristi sôngo ve, ve na nagh ku isholibo sha awambe a ve sha atse, sha u wamen sha ci u Iserael cii; gadia tor kaa er, i̱ na nagh ku nanden man nagh ku isholibo sha ci u Iserael cii." 
2Chronicles29:25 A ver Mbalevi ken iyou i TER a ukwen man mbaadiguve kua umolo sha imo i Davidi man i Gadi ornengenakaa u tor la, man i profeti Natan kpaa; gadia imo la due hen TER je, va hen uprofeti Nav ye." 
2Chronicles29:26 Tsô Mbalevi za tile a ityougholov mbi Davidi, upristi di lu a ikor i tôngon." 
2Chronicles29:27 Nahan Hesekia na zwa er i̱ na nagh ku nanden sha atse. Mba ngur nan nagh ku nanden yô, i hii icam i wuese TER kua ikor i tôngon kpaa, a ityogholov mbi Davidi tor u Iserael la imôngo." 
2Chronicles29:28 Tsô mkohol u ior cii gure civir, i wa atsam, i tôngo ikor, zan zan i kar kuren nagh ku nanden kura." 
2Chronicles29:29 Zum u ve kure tom u nan nagh yô, tor kua mba ve lu a na imôngo cii, ve gure ve wa ityough inya." 
2Chronicles29:30 Tsô tor Hesekia kua atiator, ve kaa Mbalevi er, ve̱ wa icam i wuese TER, sha kwaghôron u Davidi man u Asav ornengenakaa. Nahan ve wa icam, i wuese a iember, ve gure ve wa ityough inya." 
2Chronicles29:31 Tsô Hesekia gema kaa er: Hegen yô, ne tsegha ayol a en hen TER ve, yô, kporom nen, va nen a iniav mbi sôngon man iniav mbi iwuese ken iyou i TER. Tsô mkohol u ior va a iniav mbi sôngon man iniav mbi iwuese; mba ve lu a ishima i gbar gbar cii, ve va a iniav mbi nanden." 
2Chronicles29:32 Iyenge i iniav mbi nanden mbi mkohol u ior va a mi la yô, lu: anomabua akunduatargber, anomaiyôngo deri, man agumaiyôngo deri uhar; angan cii lu sha ci u nagh ku nanden TER." 
2Chronicles29:33 Uicighanmbaiwuav lu: abua deri ataratar, man iyôngo dubu utar." 
2Chronicles29:34 Kpa upristi ngee kuma ga, ve fatyô u burun iniav mbi nanden cii ga, nahan anmgbianev vev Mbalevi wase ve zan zan shighe u tom la kar been, man zan zan upristi ve wanger ayol a ve la; gadia Mbalevi hemba upristi ishima i veren sha u wanger ayol a ve." 
2Chronicles29:35 Iniav mbi nanden kpaa lu kpishi, a ahôm a iniav mbi bem, kua iniav mbi man sha ci u nagh ku nanden kpaa. Kape i sôr tom u iyou i TER la." 
2Chronicles29:36 Hesekia kpaa ember a ior cii, sha ci u kwagh u Aôndo A er sha ci u ior yô; gadia i er kwagh la fefa je." 
2Chronicles30:1 Tsô Hesekia tindi loho hen Iserael cii kua Yuda, shi a nger uwashika hen Eferaim man Manase er, ve̱ va hen iyou i TER ken Yerusalem, ve̱ va ya iniongo i Paseka i TER, Aôndo u Iserael." 
2Chronicles30:2 Gadia tor zua zwa un a atiator a na, man mkohol u ior i ken Yerusalem cii er vea ya Paseka sha uwer u sha uhar." 
2Chronicles30:3 Gadia ve fatyô u yan un hen shighe la ga, sha ci u upristi mba ve wanger ayol a ve la, ve lu kpeghee tsô, man ior kpaa lu a kohol ken Yerusalem ga." 
2Chronicles30:4 Kwagh ne doo tor kua mkohol u ior cii. 
2Chronicles30:5 Tsô ve ver tindi er, i̱ yôô ken Iserael cii, hii hen Bersheba zan zan ar hen Dan er, ve̱ va ya Paseka u TER, Aôndo u Iserael, ken Yerusalem; gadia i lu yan un a ior kpishi er i vande ngeren er i̱ er nahan la ga." 
2Chronicles30:6 Tsô mbatyomov za a uwashika mbala mba ve due hen tor man atiator a na la, ve za hen Iserael cii man Yuda, sha imo i tor, ve kaa er: Ne Mbaiserael, shi hide nen hen TER, Aôndo u Aberaham man u Isaka kua u Iserael, sha u A̱ hide hen mba ve wer sha ikev i utor mba Ashiria ve shi her ne." 
2Chronicles30:7 De kera luun nen er uter enev, shin er anmgbianev enev nahan ga, mba ve er TER, Aôndo u uter vev kwaghbo man A gema ve ve hingir kwagh u tan mke iyol er ne nengen nahan." 
2Chronicles30:8 Hegen yô, de kera nembe nen ikôr er uter enev lu er nahan ga, kpa na nen TER ayol a en, nyôr nen hen icighanjiir Na u A tsegh un gbem ne, civir nen TER, Aôndo wen, sha ci u iyugh Na i taveraa i̱ kar her a ven kera." 
2Chronicles30:9 Gadia aluer shi nea gema hen TER yô, anmgbianev enev kua ônov enev vea zua a mhôônom ma zungwen hen mba ve yem a ve uikangen la, shi vea hide hen tar ne je, gadia TER, Aôndo wen, ngu a erdoo, man shi zungu mhôônom kpaa, man Una gema ishigh Nagh her a ven kera ga, aluer né gema ishima né hire her a Na yô." 
2Chronicles30:10 Tsô mbatyomov mbala zende sha agar agar ken tar u Eferaim man u Manase zan zan ve za ar hen Sebulon kpaa; kpa ve gema ve se a se ve ibumegh, ve naha ve tar kpaa." 
2Chronicles30:11 Nahan kpaa, ior mbagenev ken Asher man ken Manase kua Sebulon ve hide ayol a ve ijime, ve va ken Yerusalem." 
2Chronicles30:12 Shi ken Yuda kpaa TER na ve u lun ishima i môm, u eren sha tindi u tor kua atiator, sha imo i TER la." 
2Chronicles30:13 Tsô ior kpishi kohol ken Yerusalem sha u yan iniongo i bredi u i we kwa sha mi ga yô, sha uwer u sha uhar la, lu zegemkohol je." 
2Chronicles30:14 Nahan ve mough, ve kura atse a nanden nagh sha mi a ken Yerusalem la kera, kua atse a nanden kwaghhumandoon sha mi la cii kpaa, ve kura a kera, ve haa shin uwagh u Kideron." 
2Chronicles30:15 Tsô ve sôngo Paseka sha uwer u sha uhar ayange a u pue kar anyiin la; upristi man Mbalevi kpaa, kunya kôr ve, nahan ve wanger ayol a ve, ve va a iniav mbi nanden ken iyou i TER." 
2Chronicles30:16 Ve va tile ken ajiir a ve sha iniongo ve, sha tindi u Mose or u Aôndo la; upristi tsenda awambe a ve ngohol sha ikev i Mbalevi la." 
2Chronicles30:17 Gadia ior lu ken mkohol kpishi mba ve vande wanger ayol a ve ga yô; ka nahan man Mbalevi lu sôngon aniyôngov mba Paseka sha ci u hanma or u nan lu wang ga yô, sha u ve̱ lu TER kwagh u wang yô." 
2Chronicles30:18 Gadia ior kpishi mba ken Eferaim man Manase man Isakar kua Sebulon, ve lu a wanger ayol a ve ga, nahan kpaa ve ya Paseka, lu er i nger la nahan ga. Kpa Hesekia sôn sha ci ve, kaa er: TER u zungwen mhôônom, A̱ de hanma or isholibo i nan," 
2Chronicles30:19 u nan ver ishima u keren Aôndo TER, Aôndo u uter mba nan yô, shin er nan lu wang sha mwanger u icighanjiir la ga kpaa." 
2Chronicles30:20 Nahan TER ungwa msen u Hesekia la, A war ior." 
2Chronicles30:21 Tsô Mbaiserael mba ve lu ken Yerusalem la, ve tsa ayange ataankarahar, ve lu yan iniongo i bredi u i we kwa sha mi ga la, a iember kpishi; Mbalevi kua upristi kpaa ve lu wuese TER ayange ayange sha ityogholov mbi kaan, mbi wuese TER a mi." 
2Chronicles30:22 Hesekia ôr kwagh sha ishima i nongo u Mbalevi cii, mba ve fe tom u TER dedoo la. Ayange ataankarahar cii, ve lu yan iniongo, ve lu nan iniav mbi bem, ve lu sughun TER, Aôndo u uter vev." 
2Chronicles30:23 Tsô mkohol la cii, ver ishima u vea shi á ya iniongo ayange agen ataankarahar kpaa yô, nahan ve ya iniongo ayange a ataankarahar shon la, a iember je." 
2Chronicles30:24 Gadia Hesekia tor u Yuda na mkohol anomabua dubu man iyôngo dubu utaankaruhar; atiator kpaa na mkohol anomabua dubu man iyôngo dubu pue, upristi kpishi je, wanger ayol a ve." 
2Chronicles30:25 Mkohol u ior mba Yuda cii a upristi kua Mbalevi, man mkohol u ior mba ve due ken Iserael cii, man shi ushirmbaiorov mba ve due ken tar u Iserael, kua mba ve tem ken Yuda yô, ve gba ember." 
2Chronicles30:26 Nahan iember lu kpishi ken Yerusalem, gadia hii sha ayange a Solomon wan u Davidi tor u Iserael la je, i lu a er injakwagh ne ken Yerusalem nahan ga." 
2Chronicles30:27 Tsô upristi man Mbalevi mough, ver ior doo doo. Nahan i ungwa imo ve, msen ve kpaa kôndo ar sha icighanjiir Na u teman, za ar Sha je." 
2Chronicles31:1 Tsô zum u i kure akaa ne cii yô, Mbaiserael mba ve lu her cii, ve due ve za ken agar a Yuda, ve za hembe mtôm ma awenem, ve gber Asherim kera, ve hembe ajiir a taven sha man atse a nanden nagh sha mi a ken Yuda cii man a ken Benyamin man ken Eferaim kua Manase kpaa, ve vihi a ci ca cii. Tsô ônov mba Iserael cii hide, hanma or nan yem hen gar u nan hen ya u nan." 
2Chronicles31:2 Tsô Hesekia ver iniongo i upristi man Mbalevi sha iniongo ve, upristi kua Mbalevi cii, hanmô ve sha tom u nan, sha ci u tom u iniav mbi nanden man iniav mbi bem, sha u eren tom, man u sughun, man u wuese ken ihinda i afo a TER." 
2Chronicles31:3 Man shi iwua i tor a ne sha inyaregh nagh la, lu sha ci u iniav mbi nanden: iniav mbi nanden mbi pepe man mbi aikighe, man shi iniav mbi nanden sha ayange a memen, man sha iwer i he, kua sha ayange a iniongo la, er i nger ken atindi a TER nahan." 
2Chronicles31:4 Shi a kaa ior mba ve tem ken Yerusalem la er, ve̱ na kwar u upristi man u Mbalevi, sha u vea ver asema a ve sha atindi a TER yô." 
2Chronicles31:5 Fese nahan, er imo la i samber yô, Mbaiserael na iyiav mbi tsutswav mbi alakema man wain man mkurem man iyough man shi akaa a a lu ken ikôngo cii; ve va a môm-ken-upue u hanma kwagh cii; ve va a mi kpishi." 
2Chronicles31:6 Mbaiserael man Mbayuda, mba ve tem ken agar a Yuda la, ve kpaa, ve va a môm-ken-upue mba abuav man iyôngo, man môm-ken-upue ken uicighanmbaakaav mba i tsegh sha ci u TER, Aôndo ve yô, ve ta a atihi atihi." 
2Chronicles31:7 Sha uwer u sha utar la, ve hii u tan atihi, sha uwer u sha utaankaruhar la ve kure." 
2Chronicles31:8 Zum u Hesekia man atiator ve va, ve va nenge atihi la yô, ve wuese TER, kua ior Nav Iserael kpaa." 
2Chronicles31:9 Tsô Hesekia pine upristi man Mbalevi sha kwagh u atihi la. 
2Chronicles31:10 Nahan zegepristi Asaria, u hen ya u Sadoki, gema kaa a na er: Er ior hii u van a iniav vev ken iyou i TER yô, se ya, kuma se je, neer kpishi; gadia TER ver ior Nav doo doo man kwagh u a neer yô, ngun kpishi ne." 
2Chronicles31:11 Tsô Hesekia kaa er, i̱ sôr ayou a ken iyou i TER; tsô i sôr a je." 
2Chronicles31:12 Ve nyôr a iniav man môm-ken-upue mba akaav man uicighanmbaakaav sha ishima i veren; Konania, Orlevi, hingir ornengen sha akaa la, anngô na Shimei gema dondo sha a na." 
2Chronicles31:13 Yehiel man Asashia man Nahati man Asahel man Yerimoti man Yosabadi man Eliel man, Isemakia man Mahati kua Benaia, ve lu mbahemenev sha ikev i Konania man anngô na Shimei, sha mver u tor Hesekia man Asaria or u nengen sha iyou i Aôndo ve ver ve la." 
2Chronicles31:14 Kore wan u Imna, Orlevi, orkuranhunda vegher u sha ityoughkitaregh la, un lu nengen sha iniav mbi nan Aôndo sha ishima i dedoo la, lu karen kwar sha iniav mbi TER man uicighanmbaakaav mba hemban cii la." 
2Chronicles31:15 Mba ve lu sha ikev na yô, lu: Eden man Miniamin man Yeshua man Shemaia man Amaria kua Shekania, ve lu ken agar a upristi, ve karen anmgbianev vev kwar sha iniongo iniongo sha ishima i veren, mbakiriki kua mbaganden cii;" 
2Chronicles31:16 i wa mbanomso mba i nger ve ken takerada u icombor ve la ker ga, hii hen wan ua lu anyom atar man u a hembe nahan kpaa, ka mba ve nyer ken iyou i TER sha tom u hanma iyange sha u eren ityom ve sha iniongo ve cii je la." 
2Chronicles31:17 Sha mnger u i nger upristi la yô, i nger ve sha uya mba uter vev; Mbalevi yô, hii sha or u nan lu anyom ikundu man u nan hembe nahan kpaa, i nger ve sha ityom ve sha iniongo ve;" 
2Chronicles31:18 i nger ve ken utakerada mba icombor ve, a ônov vev cii; kasev vev man mbayev vev mba nomso man mba kasev, nongo ve cii; gadia ve lu eren tom sha uicighanmbaakaav a ishima i veren." 
2Chronicles31:19 Upristi ônov mba Aron, mba ve tema ken akôngo a agar a ve la kpaa, ken hanma gar yô, ior lu mba i nger ati a ve sha u ve̱ karen upristi mba nomso cii kwar, kua hanma Orlevi kpaa u i nger nan ken takerada u icombor yô." 
2Chronicles31:20 Kape Hesekia er ken Yuda cii la; a er kwagh u doon man u vough man u jighilii sha ishigh ki TER Aôndo na. 
2Chronicles31:21 Hanma tom u a kôr ave sha mi u eren yô, u ken iyou i TER, man sha atindiakaa kua atindi cii, sha u keren Aôndo na yô, a er u sha ishima na i môm je, a kure u dedoo kpaa." 
2Chronicles32:1 Ken ijime i akaa ne man tom u i er u sha ishima i veren ne yô, Senakeribi tor u Ashiria va, va nyôr ken Yuda, va wa afo a utya kase agar a lun a ugir, lu henen er una hemba a." 
2Chronicles32:2 Zum u Hesekia nenge Senakeribi va man norom u nôngon ityav a Yerusalem yô," 
2Chronicles32:3 a tume idyu a atiator a na man anomaior a na er vea cir amboramnger a ken akôngo a gar; tsô ve wase un. 
2Chronicles32:4 Nahan ior kpishi kohol imôngo, ve cir amboramnger cii kua uwagh u u kar hen atô u tar la, ve kaa er: Ka sha ci u nyi man utor mba Ashiria vea va vea va zua a mngerem kpishi nahana?" 
2Chronicles32:5 Tsô a taver ishima a maa ukpekpe mba ve yôhôl la cii, a maa ayou a taven gôgônan sha mi kpaa, shi a maa kpekpe ugen ken won; a taver Milo ken gar u Davidi man a er awange kua iperutya kpishi." 
2Chronicles32:6 A ver ukurmbautyav sha ior, a kohol ve sha ishigh nagh hen tembe u hundagar, a ôr kwagh a ve sha asema a ve, a kaa er:" 
2Chronicles32:7 Taver nen, lu nen icihi, de cie nen ga, asema a̱ de nyian ne a tor u Ashiria ga, shin sha ci u zegeikumutya u a lu a na imôngo la kpaa ga; gadia u a lu a vese a hemba u a lu a na yô," 
2Chronicles32:8 her a na yô, ka agee a iyolough tsô, kpa her a vese yô, TER, Aôndo wase, ngu, u Una wase se, Una nôngo ityav sha ci wase. Tsô ior suur sha kwaghôron u Hesekia tor u Yuda la." 
2Chronicles32:9 Ken masejime u kwagh ne yô, Senakeribi tor u Ashiria tindi mbayev nav hen Yerusalem (gadia a lu sha ishigh ki Lakishi a akumautya a na cii a na imôngo), a tindi loho hen Hesekia tor u Yuda man hen Yuda mba ve lu ken Yerusalem cii yô, a kaa er:" 
2Chronicles32:10 Senakeribi tor u Ashiria ngu kaan er: Ne mba suur sha nyi man ne gbe teman ken Yerusalem keghen ityav nahana? 
2Chronicles32:11 Ka icugh Hesekia a tsughun ne, sha er ne̱ kpe ijen man imura, gaa? er a kaa er: TER, Aôndo wase, Una war se sha ikev i tor u Ashiria yô." 
2Chronicles32:12 Kera ka Hesekia shon u a vihi ajiir a Na a taven sha man atse a Na a nanden nagh sha mi kera, man a kaa a Yuda man Yerusalem er: Gure civir nen sha ishigh ki atse a nanden nagh sha mi ne tseegh, shi ka sha a kpaa né nanden kwaghhumandoon gaa?" 
2Chronicles32:13 Man ne kera fa kwagh u mo kua uter av se er akuraior a ken ityar ne cii gaa? Mbaaôndo mba akuraior a ken ityar ne, ve fatyô u yiman tar ve sha ikev yam mayange je kpa?" 
2Chronicles32:14 Ka hanmô u ken mbaaôndo mba ken akuraior la cii, a uter av tim ve kera la, una fatyô u waren ior nav sha ikev yam, je u Aôndo wen Una fatyô u yiman ne sha ikev yama?" 
2Chronicles32:15 Yô, de rumun nen Hesekia a̱ tsughun ne, a̱ tsumen a ven nahan ga, man shi de kera ne nen un jighjigh kpaa ga, gadia ma aôndo môm môm u hanma ikur shin tartor fatyô u yiman ior nav sha ikev yam kua sha i uter av kpaa ga, man hire Aôndo wen Una yima ne sha ikev yam yee?" 
2Chronicles32:16 Mbayev nav shi seer u ôron kwagh u dang sha TER Aôndo man sha wanakiriki Na Hesekia kpaa. 
2Chronicles32:17 Man shi a nger washika u tuhwan TER, Aôndo u Iserael, man shi u ôron kwagh u dang sha a Na, a kaa er: Er mbaaôndo mba akuraior a ken ityar igen la, ve yem ior vev sha ikev yam ga nahan, kape Aôndo u Hesekia kpaa Una yima ior Nav sha ikev yam ga ne." 
2Chronicles32:18 Shi ve genger imo taver taver ken zwa u Mbayuda a ior mba Yerusalem mba ve lu sha gilgar la, sha u tan ve mciem iyol man nan ve anzughul, sha er vea ngohol gar la yô." 
2Chronicles32:19 Man shi ve ter Aôndo u Yerusalem er ka mbaaôndo mba ior mba shin tar nahan, mba ve lu tomaveegh u ior yô." 
2Chronicles32:20 Tsô tor Hesekia vea profeti Yesaia wan u Amoshi, ve er msen sha kwagh ne, ve genger imo ve yila Aôndo u Sha." 
2Chronicles32:20 Tsô tor Hesekia vea profeti Yesaia wan u Amoshi, ve er msen sha kwagh ne, ve genger imo ve yila Aôndo u Sha." 
2Chronicles32:21 Nahan TER tindi ortyom, va tim anomaior a ageegh man mbahemenev mba ukurmbautyav ken afo a tor u Ashiria. Tsô a hide hen ya na a kunya. Zum u a nyôr ken iyou i aôndo na yô, mba a mar ve iyol na je, ve wua un ker, sha sanker." 
2Chronicles32:22 Kape TER yima Hesekia kua mba ve tem ken Yerusalem sha ikev i Senakeribi tor u Ashiria man sha ikev i mbagenev cii la, A na ve mmem sha hanma ian." 
2Chronicles32:23 Ior kpishi va na TER iwua ken Yerusalem. Hesekia tor u Yuda kpaa ve va un a ikav mbi injaav; tsô hen shighe la je a lu a icivir sha ashe a akuraior cii. 
2Chronicles32:24 Tsô sha ayange la, Hesekia gba angev je war kpen, nahan a sôn TER, TER ôr kwagh a na, shi A tese un ikav i kpilighyol kpaa." 
2Chronicles32:25 Kpa Hesekia er kwagh sha kwagh u doon u i er un la ga, gadia ishima kehe un ker, ka nahan man iyugh sen sha a na kua sha Yuda man Yerusalem kpaa ye." 
2Chronicles32:26 Kpa Hesekia hide a iyol na ijime sha mkehe u ishima na la, un a mba ken Yerusalem, nahan iyugh i TER kera sen sha a ve sha ayange a Hesekia la ga." 
2Chronicles32:27 Hesekia lu a inyaregh man icivir kpishi je; a er ayou a koson azurfa man zenaria ker, kua awen a injaa man ilyôghonov man iperutya kua ikav mbi dedoo anza kposo kposo kpaa;" 
2Chronicles32:28 man ayou a ombon iyiav man wain kua mkurem ker, man atôr a hanma injauile kua atôr a iyôngo kpaa." 
2Chronicles32:29 Man shi a maa agar sha ci na, shi a lu a iyôngo man abua wuee, gadia Aôndo na un akaa kpishi je." 
2Chronicles32:30 Ka un Hesekia shon ne kpaa a cir kungômnger u Gihon u sha la, a goom a mi sen gar u Davidi vegher u shin ityôtar ye. Hesekia er tom na kure u cii doo doo." 
2Chronicles32:31 Kpa sha kwagh u mbatyomov mba atiator a Babilon la, mba i tindi ve her a na er ve̱ va fa kwagh u kpilighyol u a er hen tar la yô, Aôndo maa undu un sha u karen un, sha u Una fa kwagh u a lu a mi ken ishima cii yô." 
2Chronicles32:32 Aerenakaa agen a Hesekia man ityom na i dedoo kpaa, nenge, i nger a ken mpase u profeti Yesaia wan u Amoshi man ken ruamabera u utor mba Yuda man Iserael." 
2Chronicles32:32 Aerenakaa agen a Hesekia man ityom na i dedoo kpaa, nenge, i nger a ken mpase u profeti Yesaia wan u Amoshi man ken ruamabera u utor mba Yuda man Iserael." 
2Chronicles32:33 Tsô Hesekia yav a uter nav imôngo, i ii un sha ijiir i taven sha hen iwar i ônov mba Davidi la; Yuda cii kua mba ve tem ken Yerusalem, ve civir ku na. Wan na Manase gema tema tor sha ityough nagh." 
2Chronicles33:1 Manase lu anyom pue kar ahar zum u a ya tor la; a tema tor ken Yerusalem anyom akunduahargber kar ataan. 
2Chronicles33:2 A er kwaghbo sha ishigh ki TER; a zaan sha akaahôngorough a atôatyev, a TER lu zenda a sha ishigh ki Mbaiserael kera la." 
2Chronicles33:3 Gadia a shi a hire a maa ajiir a taven sha a ter na Hesekia lu vihi kera la; a ta atse a nanden nagh sha mi, imôngo je, sha ci u Ubaal, a er Asherim, a gure a civir akum a Sha cii, a er ishima i a." 
2Chronicles33:4 A ta atse a nanden nagh sha mi ken iyou i TER kpaa, i TER lu kaa er: Ka ken Yerusalem iti Yam ia lu gbem la." 
2Chronicles33:5 Shi a ta atse a nanden nagh sha mi imôngo sha ci u akum a Sha cii, hen ityembe i iyou i TER ihiar la." 
2Chronicles33:6 Man shi a er ônov nav ve kar ken atô u usu shin pev u wan u Hinom; a eren ahir man lu veren ishima sha ishor i kpehen, man a lu a ukurayol; a ver mba ve lu a ujijingi mba mbakpenev, man mba tsengan pasen akaa; a er ifer kpishi sha ishigh ki TER, sha u bamen Un." 
2Chronicles33:7 A ver eev mbu gban a gba mbu akombo mbu a er la, ken iyou i Aôndo, i Aôndo ôr kwagh u i A kaa a Davidi man wan na Solomon er: Ken iyou ne kua ken Yerusalem u ken ikwe i Iserael cii, M tsough un ne, Me ver iti Yam i̱ lu her gbem;" 
2Chronicles33:8 man shi Me kera kar a nguhar ku Iserael ken tar u M ver Mer u̱ lu u uter enev ne, kera ga, aluer vea waan iko sha imo Yam cii yô, ka atindiakaa cii man akaawan kua ajiraôron a Mose na la." 
2Chronicles33:9 Kpa Manase mee Yuda kua mba ve tem ken Yerusalem, ve er ifer, hemba akuraior a TER lu tim a sha ishigh ki Mbaiserael kera la." 
2Chronicles33:10 Tsô TER ôr kwagh a Manase kua a ior nav, kpa ve ver ato ga." 
2Chronicles33:11 Ka nahan man TER va a mbahemenev mba akumautya a tor u Ashiria sha a ve ye; ve kôr Manase sha uiwever, ve kange un sha mshirim ma togula, ve yem a mi ken Babilon." 
2Chronicles33:12 Shighen u a lu ken ican la yô, a zamber a TER, Aôndo na, a hire a iyol na ijime tsung je, sha ishigh ki Aôndo u uter nav." 
2Chronicles33:13 A sôn Un, Un kpaa A ver ato sha zamber na, A rumun msen na, A hire a na hen Yerusalem ken tartor na. Tsô Manase fa er TER A lu Aôndo yô." 
2Chronicles33:14 Ken masetyô u kwagh ne yô, a maa gir ugen ken wongar u Davidi, vegher u Gihon u shin ityôtar, shin pev zan zan ar hen Hundagar u Ishu; a kase Ofel, a wa un atô, a maa un tav kpishi; a ver mbahemenev mba utya ken agar a Yuda a lun a ugir cii." 
2Chronicles33:15 Man shi a due a mbaaôndo mbagenev kera, man eev mbu mbu lu ken iyou i TER kpaa, kua atse a nanden nagh sha mi a un ta sha igungu u iyou i TER kua ken Yerusalem la cii, a haa a ken akôngo a gar." 
2Chronicles33:16 Man shi a ta atse a nanden nagh sha mi a TER, a na iniav mbi bem man mbi ishughun sha a, shi a kaa Yuda er ve̱ civir TER, Aôndo u Iserael." 
2Chronicles33:17 Nahan kpaa ior de u nan nagh sha ajiir a taven sha la ga, kpa lu sha ci u TER, Aôndo ve, tseegh." 
2Chronicles33:18 Aerenakaa agen a Manase man msen na u a sôn Aôndo na la, man kwaghôron u mbanengenakaa, mba ve ôr kwagh a na ken iti i TER, Aôndo u Iserael la, nenge, i nger a ken aerenakaa a utor mba Iserael." 
2Chronicles33:19 Msen na u a sôn kpaa man er TER ungwa, rumun un, man asorabo na cii man M-undu u a undu mimi na la, man ajiir a taven sha a a maa a la, man Asherim kua ieev mbi a er, er a lu a hire a iyol na ijime ga la, nenge i nger a ken abaver a Hosai." 
2Chronicles33:20 Tsô Manase yav a uter nav imôngo, i ii un ken ya na iyol na; nahan wan na Amon gema tema tor sha ityough nagh." 
2Chronicles33:21 Amon lu anyom ikundu kar ahar zum u a ya tor la, man a tema tor ken Yerusalem anyom ahar." 
2Chronicles33:22 A er kwagh u bo sha ishigh ki TER, er ter na Manase lu er nahan; Amon na ieev mbi gban a gba mbi ter na Manase er la cii nagh, a ishima i môm, a civir mbi kpaa." 
2Chronicles33:23 Kpa a kera hire a iyol na ijime sha ishigh ki TER, er ter na Manase lu hide a iyol na ijime nahan ga; kpa Amon ne yô, lu seer a seer ifer." 
2Chronicles33:24 Tsô mbatomov nav zua zwa sha a na, ve za wua un ken ya na." 
2Chronicles33:25 Kpa ior mba hen tar la gema wua ior mba ve zua zwa sha tor Amon la cii; tsô ior mba hen tar la gema kôr wan na Yoshia tor sha ityough nagh. 
2Chronicles34:1 Yoshia lu anyom anigheni zum u a ya tor la; a tema tor ken Yerusalem anyom ikundugber kar môm. 
2Chronicles34:2 A eren kwagh u dedoo sha ishigh ki TER, a zaan sha igbenda i ter na Davidi; a kaha ken uwegh ku yanegh shin ku imesegh kpaa ga." 
2Chronicles34:3 Gadia sha inyom i sha anigheni i tor na la, er a lu iyev la je, a hii u keren Aôndo u ter na Davidi; sha inyom i sha pue kar ahar la, a hii u wanger Yuda man Yerusalem sha ajiir a taven sha, man Asherim, man ieev mbi gban a gba, man mbi keren a ker la." 
2Chronicles34:4 I hembe atse a nanden nagh sha mi a Ubaal, sha ishigh nagh je, man atse a nanden kwaghhumandoon sha mi la, a a lu sha a la, a gber a kera; a hembe Asherim man ieev mbi gban a gba kua ieev mbi keren a ker, a wua mbi, via, hingir vuwe, a urugh u sha iwar i mba yan ve na mbi nagh la." 
2Chronicles34:5 Man shi a nande akuhe a upristi sha atse a ve, a nanden nagh sha mi la, a wanger Yuda kua Yerusalem." 
2Chronicles34:6 Kape a er ken agar a Manase man Eferaim man Shimeon zan zan Nafetali kpaa, man sha ajiir a i vihi a kera a a kase her la kpaa." 
2Chronicles34:7 A hembe atse a nanden nagh sha mi, a kume Asherim kua ieev mbi gban a gba, via, hingir vuwe, a gber atse a nanden kwaghhumandoon sha mi a ken tar u Iserael kera cii; nahan a hide ken Yerusalem." 
2Chronicles34:8 Tsô sha inyom i sha pue kar anigheni i tor na, zum u a vande wanger tar kua iyou la yô, a tindi Shafan wan u Asalia, man Maaseia or u nengen sha gar, man Yoa wan u Yoahashi or u ngeren abaver ken takerada, er ve̱ za sôr iyou i TER, Aôndo na." 
2Chronicles34:9 Tsô ve va hen zegepristi Hilkia, ve na inyaregh ki i va a ki ken iyou i Aôndo, ki Mbalevi mbakuranhunda kohol ken Manase man Eferaim, man asande a Iserael a a shi her cii, man Yuda cii, kua Benyamin, man mba ve tem ken Yerusalem kpaa la." 
2Chronicles34:10 Ve kende ki ve na sha ikev i mbatomov, mba ve lu nengen sha tom u iyou i TER la; ve di ve gema ki ve na mbaerentom ken iyou i TER er ve̱ sôr iyou la, i̱ hingir dedoo;" 
2Chronicles34:11 ka mbagbanakaa man mbamaankwagh, ve na ve ki ye, sha u ve̱ yam awen a kuan man ikon sha ci u uinderan man sha u eren ihange i ayou, a utor mba Yuda yan vihi kera la." 
2Chronicles34:12 Ior mbala er tom sha ishima i môm; mbanengen sha a ve la yô, lu: Yahati man Obadia, ka Mbalevi mba ken ônov mba Merari je la; man i ver Sekaria man Meshulam, mba ken ônov mba Kohati, er ve̱ hemen ve. Mbalevi mba ve fa u kuhwan ityougholov doo doo yô," 
2Chronicles34:13 ve lu nengen sha mbatôônikav, shi ve lu tesen mbaerentom tom u vea er yô, hanma inja i tom cii; Mbalevi mbagenev lu mbangeren man mbanengen sha akaa kua mbakuranhunda." 
2Chronicles34:14 Zum u ve dugh inyaregh ki i va a mi ken iyou i TER la yô, pristi Hilkia za zua a ruamabera u atindiakaa a TER heregh u i na un sha ikev i Mose la." 
2Chronicles34:15 Tsô Hilkia kaa a Shafan orngeren la, er: M zua a ruamabera u atindigh ken iyou i TER. Nahan Hilkia gema ruamabera la na Shafan." 
2Chronicles34:16 Shafan za a ruamabera la hen tor; shi a ôr tor, a kaa a na er: Tom u u ne mbayev ou cii, mba eren u je." 
2Chronicles34:17 Ve dugh inyaregh ki i zough a ki ken iyou i TER la, ve gema ki, ve na sha ikev i mbanengen sha tom kua sha ikev i mbatomov kpaa." 
2Chronicles34:18 Orngeren Shafan shi kaa a tor er: Pristi Hilkia nam ruamabera; nahan Shafan ôr kwagh kimi sha ishigh ki tor. 
2Chronicles34:19 Er tor ungwa akaaôron a atindiakaa la yô, a ande akondo a na." 
2Chronicles34:20 Nahan tor kaa a Hilkia man Ahikam wan u Shafan man Abedon wan u Mika man Shafan orngeren kua Asaia wanakiriki u tor, er:" 
2Chronicles34:21 Za, za pine nen TER sha ci wam man shi sha ci u ior mba ve shi her ken Iserael man Yuda, sha kwagh u akaaôron a ruamabera u i zough a mi ne; gadia iyugh i TER haa sha a vese kehe yum, gadia uter asev lu wan iko sha kwaghôron u TER, sha u eren sha kwagh u i nger ken ruamabera ne cii ga." 
2Chronicles34:22 Tsô Hilkia kua mba tor tindi ve la ve za hen profeti u kwase Hulda, kwase u Shalum, wan u Tokati, wan u Hasera, orkuran iyou i akondogh (ya na lu ken Yerusalem ken gar u he), ve za ôr un kwagh la nahan." 
2Chronicles34:23 Nahan a gema a kaa a ve er: TER, Aôndo u Iserael, ngu kaan nahan er: Za, za kaa nen or u a tindi ne her a mo la, ner:" 
2Chronicles34:24 TER ngu kaan nahan er: Nenge, Me va a ican sha ijiir ne, kua sha mba ve tem ken i kpaa, ka afan a i nger a ken ruamabera u ve er sha ishigh ki tor u Yuda la cii;" 
2Chronicles34:25 gadia ve undum, ve gema ve nande mbaaôndo mbagenev kwaghhumandoon, sha u vea bamem sha tom u ave ve la cii yô; ka nahan man á haa iyugh Yam sha ijiir ne, á pir i kpaa ga ye." 
2Chronicles34:26 Kpa tor u Yuda u a tindi ne sha u né va pine imo i TER yô, za kaa nen un nahan ner: TER, Aôndo u Iserael, ngu kaan nahan er: Sha kwagh u akaaôron a u ongo la yô," 
2Chronicles34:27 er u lu a ishima i legh legh, u hire a iyol you ijime sha ishigh ki Aôndo, zum u u ongo kwaghôron Na u sha ijiir ne kua sha mba ve tem ken i kpaa, man u hire a iyol you ijime sha ishigh Yagh, u ande akondo a ou, u vaa sha ishigh Yagh kpaa yô, nahan Mo kpaa M ungwa u, kape TER A kaa la." 
2Chronicles34:28 Nenge, Me kohol we a uter ou imôngo, á hungwa a we shin uwar bem bem, ashe ou aa nenge bokwagh u Me va a mi sha ijiir ne kua sha mba ve tem ken i ne ga. Tsô ve shi ve hide hen tor ve va ôr un nahan." 
2Chronicles34:29 Tsô tor tindi i za kohol Mbavesen mba Yuda cii kua mba ken Yerusalem kpaa. 
2Chronicles34:30 Nahan tor kôndo za sha iyou i TER a ior mba Yuda cii, man ior mba ken Yerusalem man upristi kua Mbalevi, man ior cii, mbavesen kua mbakiriki cii; tsô a ôr akaaôron a ken ruamabera u ikuryan u i zua a mi ken iyou i TER la cii, sha ato ve." 
2Chronicles34:31 Tor tile hen ijiir na, nahan a tôndo zwa sha ishigh ki TER er una dondo TER man una waan atindi a Na iko man mbampase Nav kua akaawan a Na kpaa, a ishima na cii, kua uma na cii kpaa, una er sha akaaôron a ikuryan a i nger ken ruamabera la vough." 
2Chronicles34:32 A er mba i zough a ve ken Yerusalem kua Benyamin cii ve̱ nyôr ken ikuryan na la. Nahan mba ve lu ken Yerusalem ve er sha ikuryan i Aôndo, Aôndo u uter vev la, vough." 
2Chronicles34:33 Tsô Yoshia dugh akaahôngorough a ken ityar i Mbaiserael kera cii; a gema mba i zough a ve ken Iserael cii, ve hingir mba civir TER, Aôndo ve. Sha ayange a a lu uma la cii, ve de u dondon TER, Aôndo u uter vev ga." 
2Chronicles35:1 Tsô Yoshia er Paseka u TER ken Yerusalem; ve sôngo iyôngo i Paseka sha uwer u hiihii, ayange a u pue kar anyiin la." 
2Chronicles35:2 A ver upristi sha tom ve, a taver ve asema sha tom u iyou i TER," 
2Chronicles35:3 Shi a kaa a Mbalevi mba ve tesen Iserael cii, mba i tsegh ve sha ci u TER la, er: Ver nen icighanareki ken iyou i Solomon wan u Davidi tor u Iserael maa la; kera gba u né tôôn un sha avande ga; yô, gba eren nen TER, Aôndo wen tom tsô, kua ior Nav Iserael kpaa." 
2Chronicles35:4 Wa nen ago iyol, sha uya mba uter enev, sha iniongo yen, er Davidi tor u Iserael lu nger nahan, man er wan na Solomon kpaa lu nger la." 
2Chronicles35:5 Tile nen ken icighanjiir sha ikwe i uya mba uter, mba anmgbianev enev, ior mba ken inya la, ipaven i nongo u Levi môm sha ci u hanma kwe." 
2Chronicles35:6 Sôngo nen Paseka, wanger nen ayol a en, sôr nen un sha ci u anmgbianev enev, er nen sha imo i TER i Mose lu kaa la." 
2Chronicles35:7 Tsô Yoshia na ior mba ken inya mba ve kohol her la cii ilev, lu agumaiyôngo man agumaivo, mbin cii lu sha ci u iniav mbi Paseka, iyenge i mbi ar dubu ikundugber man shi ibua di dubu utar; mbin nahan cii lu inyarev mbi tor." 
2Chronicles35:8 Atiator a na kpaa na ior iwua a ishima i dedoo, upristi kua Mbalevi kpaa. Hilkia man Sekaria kua Yehiel, mbanengen sha iyou i Aôndo, ve na upristi ilev dubu uhar man deri ataratar man ibua deri utar, sha ci u iniav mbi Paseka," 
2Chronicles35:9 Konania kpaa, man anmgbianev nav Shemaia man Netanel, man Hashabia man Yeiel man Yosabadi, mbavesen mba Mbalevi, ve na Mbalevi agumaiyôngo man agumaivo dubu utaan man ibua deri utaan sha ci u iniav mbi Paseka." 
2Chronicles35:10 Kape i sôr akaa i ver je la, upristi tile sha ajiir a ve, Mbalevi kpaa sha iniongo ve, sha imo i tor." 
2Chronicles35:11 Tsô ve sôngo Paseka; upristi tsenda awambe a ve ngohol sha ave ve la; nahan Mbalevi gba burun. 
2Chronicles35:12 Ve pav iniav mbi nanden, ve ver er vea kar mbi sha uipaven mba uya mba uter mba ior mba ken inya la, sha u vea na TER nagh, er i nger ken ruamabera u Mose nahan. Kape ve er a ibua kpaa la." 
2Chronicles35:13 Nahan ve mgbagh Paseka sha usu, sha tindi; kpaa iniav mbi tseghan yô, ve jiidi mbi shin uitye man ilwese kua utasa; ve tôô mbi fefa, ve za na ior mba ken inya." 
2Chronicles35:14 Ken masejime la yô, ve sôr sha ci u ayol a ve man sha ci u upristi kpaa; gadia upristi, ônov mba Aron, ve lu eren tom gbem sha u nan nagh sha iniav mbi nanden man sha ahôm zan zan tugh; ka nahan man Mbalevi ve sôr sha ci ve ayol a ve kua sha ci u upristi ônov mba Aron kpaa ye." 
2Chronicles35:15 Mbawanatsam, ônov mba Asav kpaa, lu sha ijiir ve sha imo i Davidi vea Asav man Heman man Yedutun ornengenakaa u tor; mbakuran kpaa lu sha hanma hunda; gba u ve undu tom ve kpee ga, gadia anmgbianev vev Mbalevi ve sôr kwagh sha ci ve." 
2Chronicles35:16 Kape i sôr tom u TER sha iyange shon la je la, sha u eren Paseka man u nan iniav mbi nanden sha atse a nanden nagh sha mi a TER la, sha imo i tor Yoshia." 
2Chronicles35:17 Tsô Mbaiserael mba ve lu her la, ve er Paseka hen shighe la, man iniongo i bredi u i we kwa sha mi ga la, ayange ataankarahar." 
2Chronicles35:18 Hii sha ayange a profeti Samuel la je i er injainiongo i Paseka er ngin nahan ken Iserael ga; ma tor u Iserael u nan er Paseka er Yoshia nahan a upristi man Mbalevi man Yuda cii man Iserael mba ve lu her la kua mba ve tem ken Yerusalem kpaa, nan ngu ga." 
2Chronicles35:19 I er Paseka ne sha inyom i sha pue kar anigheni a tor u Yoshia la. 
2Chronicles35:20 Ken masejime u akaa ne cii, er Yoshia sôr tempel kera yô, Neko tor u Igipiti kôndo sha u za nôngon ityav a Karkemishi hen ifi u Uferati; tsô Yoshia due er una za nôngo ityav a na." 
2Chronicles35:21 Kpa a tindi mbatyomov her a na, a kaa er: Ka nyi i zoughom a we, we tor u Yuda nee? Ka we, m ve u nôngon ityav a we nyian ga, kpa ka ya u m lu ihom a na la, man Aôndo kpaa kaa er M̱ za fefa; yô, de bamen Aôndo u A lu a mo ne, A̱ tim u ga." 
2Chronicles35:22 Kpa Yoshia rumun u geman ishigh kera den un ga, kpa a er ayom, a gema iyol sha u una nôngo ityav a na yô, a kera wa iko sha imo i Neko i i due sha zwa u Aôndo la ga, nahan a va ityav shin pev u Megido." 
2Chronicles35:23 Tsô mbakerenavaan ta tor Yoshia, nahan tor kaa a mbayev nav er: Tôôm nen heen kera, gadia i vihim iyol kehelee." 
2Chronicles35:24 Tsô mbayev nav dugh un shin ikyekye na, wa un shin ikyekye na i sha uhar i a lu a mi la, ve va a na ken Yerusalem, maa a kpe; i ii un ken iwar i uter nav. Yuda cii kua Yerusalem zungwe ku u Yoshia." 
2Chronicles35:25 Yeremia kpaa dugh kwelegh sha ci u Yoshia; mbawanatsam mba nomso cii kua mba kasev kpaa ve ter Yoshia ken ukwelegh vev zan zan nyian; gema hingir ieren ve u eren nahan ken Iserael je; nenge, i nger ve ken Ukwelegh." 
2Chronicles35:26 Aerenakaa a Yoshia agen man aeren a na a dedoo, a sha a kaa a i nger a ken atindi a TER la," 
2Chronicles35:27 man aeren a na a hiihii kua a masetyô kpaa la, nenge i nger a ken ruamabera u utor mba Iserael man mba Yuda." 
2Chronicles36:1 Tsô ior mba hen tar la, tôô Yehoahashi wan u Yoshia, ve ver un tor sha ityough ki ter na ken Yerusalem." 
2Chronicles36:2 Yehoahashi lu anyom ikundu kar atar zum u a ya tor la; a tema tor ken Yerusalem iwer itiar. 
2Chronicles36:3 Kpa tor u Igipiti va dugh un tor ken Yerusalem, a ya tar la zwajirigh sha azurfa utalenti deri man zenaria utalenti môm." 
2Chronicles36:4 Tsô tor u Igipiti gema ver anngô na Eliakim tor sha Yuda man Yerusalem, a gema un iti er Yehoyakim. Neko kua a anngô na Yehoahashi, yem a na ken Igipiti." 
2Chronicles36:5 Yehoyakim lu anyom ikundu kar ataan zum u a ya tor la; a tema tor ken Yerusalem anyom pue kar môm; a er ifer sha ishigh ki TER, Aôndo na." 
2Chronicles36:6 Tsô Nebukadinesar tor u Babilon mough ityav a na, va kange un sha mshir er una yem a na ken Babilon." 
2Chronicles36:7 Nebukadinesar kura ikav mbigenev ken iyou i TER, yem a mbi ken Babilon, za ver ken tempel na, ken Babilon." 
2Chronicles36:8 Aerenakaa a Yehoyakim agen, man akaahôngorough a a er, man ifer i i zough a mi ken a na kpaa, nenge, i nger a ken ruamabera u utor mba Iserael man mba Yuda; tsô wan na Yehoyakin gema tema tor sha ityough nagh." 
2Chronicles36:9 Yehoyakin lu anyom pue kar anigheni zum u a ya tor la; a tema tor ken Yerusalem iwer itiar man ayange pue; a eren ifer sha ishigh ki TER. 
2Chronicles36:10 Er inyom i he i kom yô, tor Nebukadinesar tindi er i̱ va a na ken Babilon, kua ikav mbi dedoo mbi iyou i TER la kpaa; a gema a ver anngô na Sedekia tor sha Yuda man Yerusalem." 
2Chronicles36:11 Sedekia lu anyom ikundu kar môm zum u a ya tor la; a tema tor ken Yerusalem anyom pue kar môm; 
2Chronicles36:12 a eren ifer sha ishigh ki TER, Aôndo na; a hide a iyol na ijime sha ishigh ki profeti Yeremia ga, un u a ôron kwaghôron u TER la." 
2Chronicles36:13 Man a hendan a tor Nebukadinesar kpaa, u lu na un bum iti i Aôndo la; a nômbo ikôl, a cighir ishima, a kera hide hen TER, Aôndo u Iserael, ga." 
2Chronicles36:14 Upristi mba vesen cii kua ior kpaa, ve per atindi kpishi sha akaahôngorough a atôatyev la cii; ve hôngor a iyou i TER, i A tsegha ken Yerusalem la." 
2Chronicles36:15 Tsô TER, Aôndo u uter vev, tindi mbatyomov Nav her a ve tugh man tetan sha u wan ve kwagh, sha ci u mhôônom lu kôron Un a ior Nav kua ijiir Na i teman kpaa yô;" 
2Chronicles36:16 kpa ve gema ve se mbatyomov mba Aôndo, ve laha kwaghôron Na, ve nenge sha uprofeti Nav kpenenene, zan zan iyugh i TER mough sha ior Nav je gbenda u vea war kera lu ga." 
2Chronicles36:17 Nahan yô, A va ve a tor u Mbakaldi, a va wua ve mbayevikaior sha sanker, ken icighanjiir ve; mhôônom tsô kpa, kôr un a ma wanyekwaor ga, shin iniunkwase, shin tamenor, shin tseor u kumbur kumbur kpaa ga; A na ve sha ikev na cii." 
2Chronicles36:18 Ikav mbi ken iyou i Aôndo cii, mbi vesen man mbi kiriki man inyarev mbi ken iyou i TER, man inyarev mbi tor man mbi atiator na, a va a mbi ken Babilon cii." 
2Chronicles36:19 Tsô ve nande iyou i Aôndo sha usu, ve yôhôl gilgar u Yerusalem, ve nande ayou a tor a ker cii sha usu, ikav mbi doon cii, ve vihi mbi kera." 
2Chronicles36:20 Man mba ve war sanker yô, a yem a ve uikangen ken Babilon; ve hingir ikpan na kua i ônov nav kpaa zan zan sha ayange a tor u Pershia je;" 
2Chronicles36:21 sha u kwaghôron u TER u Yeremia lu ôr la, a̱ kure sha mi vough, zan zan tar la zua a mmem sha ayange a memen a u, gadia shighe u u hingir ice la yô, u mem zan zan anyom akunduatargber kar ivin." 
2Chronicles36:22 Tsô sha inyom i hiihii i Shirushi tor u Pershia la, sha er kwaghôron u TER u Yeremia lu ôr la a̱ kure sha mi vough yô, TER tor jijingi u Shirushi tor u Pershia ityô, nahan a yôô ken tar na cii, shi i nger a nger kpaa er:" 
2Chronicles36:23 Shirushi tor u Pershia ngu kaan nahan er: TER, Aôndo u Sha, nam ityartor i sha won cii, man A kaa er, M̱ maa Un iyou ken Yerusalem u a lu ken Yuda la. Yô, hanmô wen u nan lu u ken ior Nav cii yô, TER, Aôndo u nan, A̱ lu a nan, nana̱ mough, nana̱ yem keregh." 
Ezra1:1 Tsô sha inyom i hiihii i Shirushi tor u Pershia la yô, sha er kwaghôron u TER u Yeremia lu ôr la a̱ kure sha mi vough yô, TER tor jijingi u Shirushi tor u Pershia ityô, nahan a yôô ken tar na cii, man shi a nger a nger kpaa er:" 
Ezra1:2 Shirushi tor u Pershia ngu kaan nahan er: TER, Aôndo u Sha nam ityartor i sha won cii, man shi A kaa er, m̱ maa Un iyou ken Yerusalem, u a lu ken Yuda la." 
Ezra1:3 Yô, hanmô wen u nan lu u ken ior Nav cii yô, Aôndo u nan A̱ lu a nan; yô, nana̱ yem ken Yerusalem, u a lu ken Yuda la, nana̱ za maa iyou i TER, Aôndo u Iserael, ka Un A lu Aôndo u A lu ken Yerusalem la ye." 
Ezra1:4 Hanma or u nan shi ken hanma ijiir i nan lu shir her la, ior mba hen ijiir i nan la, ve̱ wase nan sha azurfa man zenaria man ikav man uzendenya kua nagh ku nan sha ishima i dedoo sha ci u iyou i Aôndo i i lu ken Yerusalem la." 
Ezra1:5 Tsô mbavesen mba sha uya mba uter mba Yuda man Benyamin, man upristi kua Mbalevi ve mough; ka mba Aôndo tor asema a ve ityô la cii, sha u ve̱ kôndo ve̱ za maa iyou i TER i i lu ken Yerusalem la." 
Ezra1:6 Mba ve wa ndor a ve, ve kase ve la cii, ve wase ve sha ikav mbi azurfa man sha zenaria man ikav man uzendenya man ikav mbi injaav kua akaa a i na a sha ishima i dedoo yô." 
Ezra1:7 Tor Shirushi kpaa due a ikav mbi ken iyou i TER, mbi Nebukadinesar lu kura ken Yerusalem va a mi va ver mbi ken iyou i mbaaôndo vev la;" 
Ezra1:8 Shirushi tor u Pershia due a mbi, gema na sha ikev i Miteredati orkosoninyaregh, a ôr iyenge i mbi sha ishigh ki Sheshibasar ortaregh u Yuda." 
Ezra1:9 Iyenge i mbi yô, ka: Utasa mba zenaria mba vesen ikundugber, man utasa mba azurfa mba vesen dubu môm, man ahô ikundu kar ataankaranyiin," 
Ezra1:10 man ayongo a zenaria ikundugber, man ayongo agen a azurfa deri unyiin man pue, man ikav mbigenev dubu môm." 
Ezra1:11 Ikav mbi zenaria man mbi azurfa cii lu dubu utaan man deri unyiin. Sheshibasar va a mbi cii, zum u ve due ken kwar ken Babilon ve hide ken Yerusalem la." 
Ezra2:1 Mban ka ônov mba hen ipaventar la, mba ve mough ve due ken kwar ken mba i kura ve i yem a mi uikangen la, mba Nebukadinesar tor u Babilon kura yem a mi ken Babilon la, mba ve hide ken Yerusalem man Yuda, hanmô hen gar u nan;" 
Ezra2:2 mba ve va a Serubabel imôngo yô, lu: Yeshua, Nehemia, Seraia, Reelaia, Mordekai, Bilshan, Misepar, Bigevai, Rehum man Baana. Iyenge i nomsombaiorov mba Iserael yô, ka:" 
Ezra2:3 Ônov mba Paroshi lu dubu uhar man deri kua akunduatargber kar uhar. 
Ezra2:4 Ônov mba Shefatia lu deri utar man akunduatargber kar uhar. 
Ezra2:5 Ônov mba Ara lu deri utaankaruhar man akunduatargber kar utaan. 
Ezra2:6 Ônov mba Pahati-moabi, mba ken ônov mba Yeshua man Yoabi, lu dubu uhar man deri anigheni man pue kar uhar." 
Ezra2:7 Ônov mba Elam lu dubu môm man deri uhar man akunduahargber kar unyiin. 
Ezra2:8 Ônov mba Satu lu deri utaankarunyiin man akunduahar kar utaan. 
Ezra2:9 Ônov mba Sakai lu deri utaankaruhar man akunduatar. 
Ezra2:10 Ônov mba bani lu deri ataratar man akunduahar kar uhar. 
Ezra2:11 Ônov mba Bebai lu deri ataratar man ikundu kar utar. 
Ezra2:12 Ônov mba Asegadi lu dubu man deri uhar man ikundu kar uhar. 
Ezra2:13 Ônov mba Adonikam lu deri ataratar man akunduatar kar ataratar. 
Ezra2:14 Ônov mba Bigevai lu dubu uhar man akunduahargber kar ataratar. 
Ezra2:15 Ônov mba Adin lu deri unyiin man akunduahargber kar unyiin. 
Ezra2:16 Ônov mba Ater, ka mba Hesekia je la, lu akunduanyiingber kar anigheni." 
Ezra2:17 Ônov mba Besai lu deri utar man ikundu kar utar. 
Ezra2:18 Ônov mba Yora lu deri man pue kar uhar. 
Ezra2:19 Ônov mba Hashum lu deri uhar man ikundu kar utar. 
Ezra2:20 Ônov mba Gibar lu akunduanyiingber kar utaan. 
Ezra2:21 Ônov mba Betelehem lu deri man ikundu kar utar. 
Ezra2:22 Ior mba Netofa lu akunduahargber kar ataratar. 
Ezra2:23 Ior mba Anatoti lu deri man ikundu kar anigheni. 
Ezra2:24 Ônov mba Asemaveti lu, akunduahar kar uhar." 
Ezra2:25 Ônov mba Kiriati-arim, Kefira man Beeroti, lu deri utaankaruhar man akunduahar kar utar." 
Ezra2:26 Ônov mba Rama man Geba lu deri ataratar man ikundu kar môm. 
Ezra2:27 Ior mba Mikemashi lu deri man ikundu kar uhar. 
Ezra2:28 Ior mba Betel man Ai lu deri uhar man ikundu kar utar. 
Ezra2:29 Ônov mba Nebo lu akunduahargber kar uhar. 
Ezra2:30 Ônov mba Magebishi lu deri man akunduahargber kar ataratar. 
Ezra2:31 Ônov mba Elam ugen la lu dubu man deri uhar man akunduahargber kar unyiin. 
Ezra2:32 Ônov mba Harim lu deri utar man ikundu. 
Ezra2:33 Ônov mba Lodi, Hadidi man Ono lu deri utaankaruhar man ikundu kar utaan." 
Ezra2:34 Ônov mba Yeriko lu deri utar man akunduahar kar utaan. 
Ezra2:35 Ônov mba Senaa lu dubu utar man deri ataratar man ikundugber. 
Ezra2:36 Upristi yô; ônov mba Yedaia, u hen ya u Yeshua, lu deri utaankarunyiin man akunduatargber kar utar." 
Ezra2:37 Ônov mba Imer lu dubu môm man akunduahargber kar uhar. 
Ezra2:38 Ônov mba Pashur lu dubu môm man deri uhar man akunduahar kar utaan kar uhar. 
Ezra2:39 Ônov mba Harim lu dubu môm man pue kar utaankaruhar. 
Ezra2:40 Mbalevi yô: ônov mba Yeshua man Kademiel, mba hen ônov mba Hodavia, lu akunduatargber kar unyiin." 
Ezra2:41 Mbawanatsam yô: ônov mba Asav, lu deri man ikundu kar anigheni." 
Ezra2:42 Ônov mba mbakuranihinda yô: ônov mba Shalum, ônov mba Ater, ônov mba Talmon, ônov mba Akubi, ônov mba Hatita, ônov mba Shobai, kohol ve cii, ve lu deri man ikundugber kar utaankarunyiin." 
Ezra2:43 Mbasôrontempel yô: ônov mba Shiha, ônov mba Hasufa, ônov mba Tabaoti," 
Ezra2:44 ônov mba Keroshi, ônov mba Shiaha, ônov mba Padon," 
Ezra2:45 ônov mba Lebana, ônov mba Hagaba, ônov mba Akubi," 
Ezra2:46 ônov mba Hagabi, ônov mba Shamlai, ônov mba Hanan," 
Ezra2:47 ônov mba Gidel, ônov mba Gahar, ônov mba Reaia," 
Ezra2:48 ônov mba Reshin, ônov mba Nekoda, ônov mba Gasam," 
Ezra2:49 ônov mba Usa, ônov mba Pasea, ônov mba Besai," 
Ezra2:50 ônov mba Asena, ônov mba Meunim, ônov mba Nefishim," 
Ezra2:51 ônov mba Bakebuki, ônov mba Hakufa, ônov mba Harhur," 
Ezra2:52 ônov mba Baseluti, ônov mba Mehida, ônov mba Harsha," 
Ezra2:53 ônov mba Barekoshi, ônov mba Shisera, ônov mba Tema," 
Ezra2:54 ônov mba Neshia, ônov mba Hatifa." 
Ezra2:55 Ônov mba mbatomov mba Solomon yô, lu: ônov mba Sotai, ônov mba Hasofereti, ônov mba Peruda," 
Ezra2:56 ônov mba Yaala, ônov mba Darkon, ônov mba Gidel," 
Ezra2:57 ônov mba Shefatia, ônov mba Hatil, ônov mba Pokereti-hasebaim, ônov mba Ami." 
Ezra2:58 Kohol mbasôrontempel cii kua ônov mba mbatomov mba Solomon, lu ior deri utar man akunduanyiingber kar uhar." 
Ezra2:59 Mba ve due ken Tel-mela man Tel-harsha man Kerubi man Adan kua Imer, kpa ve fatyô u pasen uya mba uter vev man tsombor ve, er ve lu mba Iserael ga yô, ka:" 
Ezra2:60 Ônov mba Delaia, ônov mba Tobia, ônov mba Nekoda; lu ior deri ataratar man akunduahargber kar uhar." 
Ezra2:61 Man ken ônov mba upristi, lu ônov mba Habaia, man ônov mba Hakoshi, ônov mba Barshilai–u a er kwase ken ônkasev mba Barshilai, Orgileadi, maa i yila un sha iti ve." 
Ezra2:62 Mban yô, ve ker ape i nger tsombor ve ken mba i nger ve ken takerada u icombor ve la, kpa i tser a mi ga; ka nahan man i ver ve ken mba lun wang ga ye, i rumun ve sha tom u pristi kpaa ga." 
Ezra2:63 Gomna kaa a ve er, ve̱ de ye icighankwaghyan la ga, saa iyange i pristi u nan lu a Urim man Tumim nana lu." 
Ezra2:64 Iyenge i ior cii lu dubu akunduahar kar uhar man deri utar man akunduatar; 
Ezra2:65 i wa mbatomov vev mba nomso man mba kasev ker ga, ve yô, ve lu ior dubu utaankaruhar man deri utar man ikundugber kar utaankaruhar; man ve lu a mbawanatsam deri uhar, lu nomso kua kasev." 
Ezra2:66 Anyinya ve lu deri utaankaruhar man ikundugber kar ataratar; Mbaalfadari vev lu deri uhar man akunduahar kar utaan; 
Ezra2:67 urakumi vev lu deri unyiin man ikundugber kar utaan; ujaki vev lu dubu ataratar man deri utaankaruhar man ikundu. 
Ezra2:68 Mbavesen mbagenev mba sha uya mba uter, zum u ve va hen iyou i TER i i lu ken Yerusalem la yô, ve na iwua a ishima i dedoo sha ci u iyou i Aôndo sha er á maa i hen ijiir i i la;" 
Ezra2:69 ve na inyaregh sha agee ve, er ve kôrcio yô, sha ci u tom la: zenaria udariki dubu akunduatar kar môm man azurfa umina dubu utaan man akondo a upristi deri." 
Ezra2:70 Nahan upristi man Mbalevi man ior mbagenev man mbawanatsam man mbakuranihinda man mbasôrontempel, ve za tema ken agar a ve, Iserael cii di kpaa tema ken agar a ve." 
Ezra3:1 Zum u uwer u sha utaankaruhar due yô, Mbaiserael lu ken agar a ve, nahan ior va kohol ken Yerusalem a ishima i môm." 
Ezra3:2 Tsô, Yeshua wan u Yosadaki mough a anmgbianev nav upristi kua Serubabel wan u Shealtiel man anmgbianev nav ve ta atse a nanden nagh sha mi a Aôndo u Iserael, er i̱ naan nagh ku nanden sha a, er i nger ken atindi a Mose or u Aôndo la nahan." 
Ezra3:3 Ve ta atse la hen ijiir i a, sha ci u ve cia ior mba hen tar la, ve na TER iniav mbi nanden sha a, ka iniav mbi nanden pepe kua a aikighe je la." 
Ezra3:4 Shi ve er iniongo i atumbe, er i nger nahan, ve naan iniav mbi nanden ayange ayange sha iyenge i mbi, sha kwaghwan u i wa la, hanma iyange kwagh u i ver sha iyange la je;" 
Ezra3:5 ken masejime la yô, lu nagh ku i nanden ku gbem, bunden ga la, man iniav mbi sha iwer i he, man mbi sha uiniongo mba TER mba i ver ve, i tsegh ve la cii, man ku hanma or u nan ne TER nagh sha ishima i dedoo yô." 
Ezra3:6 Hii sha iyange i hiihii i uwer u sha utaankaruhar la je, ve hii u nan TER iniav mbi nanden; kpa i lu a tim imagh ki tempel u TER ga." 
Ezra3:7 Kpa ve na mbakuanawen kua mbagbanikon inyaregh; man Mbashidon kua Mbatiru yô, ve na ve kwaghyan man kwaghman man mkurem, er ve̱ za tôô ikon i sedar sha Lebanon ve̱ va a i hen kpe u zegemnger zan zan hen Yopa, sha mrumun u Shirushi tor Pershia rumun na ve ian la." 
Ezra3:8 Sha inyom i sha uhar i ve va hen iyou i Aôndo ken Yerusalem sha uwer u sha uhar la, Serubabel wan u Shealtiel vea Yeshua wan u Yosadaki kua anmgbianev vev mbagenev, upristi man Mbalevi, kua mba ve due ken kwar cii, mba ve va hen Yerusalem yô, ve hii u veren Mbalevi, hii sha or u nan kom anyom ikundu man u nan hembe nahan kpaa, er ve̱ nengen sha tom u iyou i TER." 
Ezra3:9 Tsô Yeshua a ônov nav man anmgbianev nav, Kademiel di a va ônov nav, ônov mba Yuda la, ve mough ishima i môm sha u nengen sha mbaerentom u iyou i Aôndo, kua ônov mba Henadadi a ônov vev man anmgbianev vev kpaa a ve imôngo, lu Mbalevi cii." 
Ezra3:10 Zum u mbamaan tim imagh ki tempel u TER yô, ve ver upristi tile a akondo a ve iyol, ve lu a ikor i tôngon; man Mbalevi, ônov mba Asav lu a ukwen, sha u wuese TER, sha tindi u Davidi tor u Iserael." 
Ezra3:11 Ve nderan atsam, mbagenev rumun; ve wuese TER, ve sughun Un ve kaan er: Gadia A doo, gadia erdoo Na sha Iserael ngu gbem sha won. Ior cii ger akenge genger genger, er ve lu wuese TER la, sha ci u i tim imagh ki iyou i TER yô." 
Ezra3:12 Kpa upristi man Mbalevi kua mbavesen mbagenev mba sha uya mba uter, mbabeenyol mbala, mba ve nenge iyou i tsuaa la yô, ve vaa genger genger, zum u i tim imagh ki iyou ne sha ashe ve yô; kpa ior kpishi ger akenge genger genger sha iember;" 
Ezra3:13 nahan ior kera fatyô u fan mkposo u imo a iember man imo a mliam ma iorom ga; gadia ior ger akenge genger genger, i ungwa ayôôso ca je." 
Ezra4:1 Kpa zum u mbaihomov mba Yuda man Benyamin ungwa er mbakwarev ve lu maan TER, Aôndo u Iserael, tempel yô," 
Ezra4:2 ve va hen Serubabel man hen mbavesen mba sha uya mba uter kpaa, ve kaa a ve er: Se kpaa ma se maa a ven imôngo, gadia se mba keren Aôndo wen, er ne kpaa ne eren nahan, se mba nan Un nagh hii sha ayange a Esar-hadon tor u Ashiria va a vese heen la je." 
Ezra4:3 Kpa Serubabel vea Yeshua man mbavesen mba ve shi sha uya mba uter ken Iserael la, kaa a ve er: Kwagh zua se a ven sha u maan Aôndo wase iyou ga; kpa sé maa TER, Aôndo u Iserael, iyou ayol a ase er Shirushi tor u Pershia kaa se nahan." 
Ezra4:4 Tsô ior mba hen tar la na Mbayuda iyol i kpen, ve ta ve mciem iyol sha u ve̱ de maan ga yô." 
Ezra4:5 Ve za goho ior mba wasen ve henen u bunden awashima ve la, sha ayange a Shirushi tor u Pershia la cii, zan zan ar sha ayange a mtemtor u Dariu tor u Pershia la." 
Ezra4:6 Sha ayange a mtemtor u Ahasueru, sha mhii u mtemtor na la, ve nger un washika sha u senden mba ve tema ken Yuda man Yerusalem la ityough." 
Ezra4:7 Tsô sha ayange a Artashaseta la, Bishelam man Miteredati man Tabeel kua ahur a na agen, ve nger Artashaseta tor u Pershia kwagh; i nger washika la sha injangeren i Shiria, shi i gema un ken zwa u Shiria kpaa." 
Ezra4:8 Rehum orjir u tamen man Shimshai orngeren, ve nger tor Artashaseta washika sha u senden Yerusalem ityough er:" 
Ezra4:9 Rehum orjir u tamen man Shimshai orngeren kua akar a ve a tom, mbaajiriv man ugomna man Mbaafarsa man Mbaereki man Mbababilon man Mbasusa, ka Mbaelam je la," 
Ezra4:10 kua akuraior agen a Osenapar, orcivirigh la, va a ve uikangen, va ver ve ken gar u Samaria, kua ken tar u yande Ifi la." 
Ezra4:11 Washika u ve nger ve tindi tor Artashaseta a mi la, kaa nahan er: Mbayev ou, mba yande Ifi la, mba kaan er:" 
Ezra4:12 Doo u tor a̱ fa er Mbayuda mba ve dugh hen we, ve ve hen vese hen Yerusalem ne, mba maan gar u ayongo man u ifer la, ve kure ugir nav je, man ve sôr imagh nagh kpaa." 
Ezra4:13 Yô, tor a̱ fa hegen, aluer á maa gar ne man á kure ugir nav kpaa yô, vea kera na kpandegh shin inyaregh ki saven shin inyaregh ki peren kpaa ga, nahan inyaregh ki utor ma ve zough a mi kia bunde ve." 
Ezra4:14 Man er se lu yan bar u hen ya u tor yô, nahan doo se u se nenge er i lu nzughul a tor ga, ka nahan man se tindi se pasen we ye," 
Ezra4:15 sha u i̱ time ken ruamabera u abaver a uter ou, tsô ú za zua a mi ken ruamabera u abaver la, man ú fa er gar ne a lu gar u ayongo, man a lu zan utor iyol man lu vihin ityar, man ve hendan kwagh kimi hii sha ayange a tsuaa la je ye; ka nahan man i gema gar ne hingir ice kpaa ye." 
Ezra4:16 Yô, se pase tor ve, aluer á maa gar ne, man á kure ugir nav kpaa yô, ú kera zua a kwagh yande Ifi ga." 
Ezra4:17 Tsô tor tindi Rehum orjir u tamen la a imo, kua Shimshai orngeren kua nongo ve mba ve lu ken Samaria man mbagenev mba yande Ifi la er: Bem." 
Ezra4:18 Washika u ne tindim a mi la, i ôr un sha ishigh yagh wanger wanger." 
Ezra4:19 Man m kaa, nahan i time i za zua a mi, er gar ne, sha ayange a tsuaa la, lu hendan a utor, man ihendan man ayôôso lu kimi." 
Ezra4:20 Ngise utor mba ageev kpaa lu ken Yerusalem, ve tema tor sha ityar i i lu yande Ifi la cii; i lu tan ve kpandegh, ve lu saven akaa, shi ve ngohol inyaregh ki peren kpaa." 
Ezra4:21 Yô, wa nen tindi, yange ior mban ve̱ de; i̱ de kera maan gar la ga, saa mo me na zwa." 
Ezra4:22 Ver nen ishima, de gbe nen uwer sha kwagh ne ga; inja na nan man á de kwagh u vihin á ngee á seer u nan utor ican nahana?" 
Ezra4:23 Tsô er ve ôr washika u tor Artashaseta sha ishigh ki Rehum man Shimshai orngeren, kua nongo ve yô, ve za hen Yerusalem fefa, hen Mbayuda, ve za yange ve taveraa sha agee je." 
Ezra4:24 Nahan i tile tom u iyou i TER i i lu ken Yerusalem la; i tile u zan zan inyom i sha uhar i mtemtor u Dariu, tor u Pershia la." 
Ezra5:1 Tsô mbaprofeti, Hagai man Sekaria wan u Ido, ve ôr kwaghôron u profeti a Mbayuda mba ve lu ken Yuda kua Yerusalem la, ken iti i Aôndo u Iserael." 
Ezra5:2 Nahan Serubabel wan u Shealtiel man Yeshua wan u Yosadaki ve mough, shi ve gba maan iyou i Aôndo i i lu ken Yerusalem la; mbaprofeti mba Aôndo, lu a ve imôngo, lu wasen ve." 
Ezra5:3 Hen shighe la je Tatenai gomna u yande Ifi la vea Shetar-bosenai, man nongo ve, va her a ve, va pine ve nahan, er: Ka an nan ne ne zwa u maan iyou ne man u kuren gilgar ne kpaa?" 
Ezra5:4 Shi ve pine ve er: Ati a ior mba ve lu maan iyou ne er nana? 
Ezra5:5 Kpa ishe i Aôndo ve lu sha mbavesen mba Mbayuda, nahan ve kera yange ve er ve̱ de ga, zan zan i za a kwagh ne hen Dariu, man a mase nan imo ken washika sha kwagh ne ye." 
Ezra5:6 Washika u i kura washika u Tatenai gomna u yande Ifi la ker, man Shetar-bosenai kua nongo ve, ugomna mba ve lu yande Ifi la, ve tindi hen tor Dariu;" 
Ezra5:7 ve tindi un a washika i nger ker nahan er: Hen tor Dariu: Bem cii! 
Ezra5:8 Doo u tor a̱ fa, se za ken tar u Yuda, hen iyou i Aôndo u vesen, mba maan i sha uzegembaawenev, man mba wan ikpande ken ukpekpe, tom la ngu zan hemen sha gbashima, man ngu zan dedoo sha ave ve." 
Ezra5:9 Tsô se pine mbavesen mbala, se kaa a ve nahan ser: Ka an nan ne ne zwa u maan iyou ne man u kuren gilgar ne kpaa?" 
Ezra5:10 Shi se pine ati ve sha u se pase u, man sha u se nger ati a mbahemenev vev yô." 
Ezra5:11 Ve gema ve kaa a vese er: Se mba mbayev mba Aôndo u Sha man tar, se mba maan iyou i lu i maa i anyom kar kpishi la, i zegetor u Iserael ugen lu maa i, kure kpaa la." 
Ezra5:12 Kpa er uter asev bam Aôndo u Sha yô, A na ve sha ikev i Nebukadinesar tor u Babilon, Orkaldi, a yôhôl iyou ne, shi a kura ior a yem a i ken Babilon." 
Ezra5:13 Kpa sha inyom i hiihii i Shirushi tor u Babilon la, tor Shirushi na zwa er i̱ maan iyou i Aôndo ne." 
Ezra5:14 Ikav mbi zenaria man mbi azurfa kpaa mbi ken iyou i Aôndo, mbi Nebukadinesar lu kura ken tempel u a lu ken Yerusalem yem a mi ken tempel u Babilon la, tor Shirushi due a mbi ken tempel u Babilon la, i gema mbi i na sha ikev i or u i yilan nan er Shesebasar, u a ver un er a̱ lu gomna la;" 
Ezra5:15 a kaa a na er: Tôô ikav mbin yem a mi, za ver mbi ken tempel u a lu ken Yerusalem la; yô, i̱ maa iyou i Aôndo hen ijiir i i la." 
Ezra5:16 Nahan Shesebasar shon ne va, va tim imagh ki iyou i Aôndo i i lu ken Yerusalem ne; hii sha iyange la zan zan nyian je mba maan i, kpa mba a kure i ga." 
Ezra5:17 Nahan, aluer tor a nenge a doo yô, i̱ ker ken iyou i koson ityakerada i tor i ken Babilon la, i̱ nenge, shin a lu nahan, er tor Shirushi lu na zwa u maan iyou i Aôndo ne ken Yerusalem yô, tor kpaa a̱ pase se ishima na sha kwagh ne." 
Ezra6:1 Tsô tor Dariu kaa, nahan i ker ken iyou i koson uruamabera henpe i koson ikav mbi injaav ken Babilon la." 
Ezra6:2 Nahan i zua a ihurentakerada hen Akemeta, ken iyou i tor, i ken tar u Media la, i nger sha mi nahan: Kwagh u umbur:" 
Ezra6:3 Sha inyom i hiihii i tor Shirushi la, tor Shirushi kaa er: Sha kwagh u iyou i Aôndo i ken Yerusalem la, i̱ shi i̱ maa iyou la her, ka ijiir i nan nagh her je la, i̱ tim imagh ki i ki̱ taver; ityaven i i, i̱ lu aseva akunduatar, igbanger i i kpaa aseva akunduatar," 
Ezra6:4 sha uzegembaawenev iniongo itiar man ikpande i he, nongo môm; inyaregh ki á vihi yô, á dugh ki ken iyounyar i tor;" 
Ezra6:5 ikav mbi zenaria man mbi azurfa mbi ken iyou i Aôndo mbi Nebukadinesar lu kura ken tempel u a lu ken Yerusalem, va mi ken Babilon la kpaa, i̱ hide a mi, shi i̱ za ver mbi ken tempel u ken Yerusalem la, hanmôgh sha ijiir i ki; ú ver mbi ken iyou i Aôndo."
