Ezra6:6 Nahan yô, we, Tatenai, gomna u yande Ifi man Shetar-bosenai kua nongo wen, ugomna mba ve lu yande Ifi la, kar nen hen ijiir la kera, yem nen ca;" 
Ezra6:7 tsuwa nen ave sha kwagh u tom u iyou i Aôndo la kera; gomna u Mbayuda kua mbavesen mba Mbayuda ve̱ maa iyou i Aôndo la hen ijiir i i. 
Ezra6:8 Man shi m wa tindi sha kwagh u né er mbavesen mba Mbayuda mbala, sha u wasen ve u maan iyou i Aôndo la; ka ken inyaregh ki tor a zough a mi sha kpandegh ku yande Ifi la je, i̱ pande i̱ na ior mban inyaregh ki ve vihi la, doo doo ye, i̱ de timbir ga." 
Ezra6:9 Man kwagh u a gbe ve sha agumabua man anomaiyôngo man agumaiyôngo sha ci u iniav mbi nanden Aôndo u Sha, man alakema man bar man wain kua mkurem, sha imo i upristi mba ve lu ken Yerusalem la yô, i̱ naan ve ayange ayange i̱ de bundu ga," 
Ezra6:10 sha u ve̱ naan Aôndo u Sha iniav mbi human doon man ve̱ eren msen kpaa sha ci u uma u tor kua u ônov nav. 
Ezra6:11 Shi m kaa mer, hanma or u nana er kposo sha kwaghôron ne yô, i̱ tsuwa hwange hen ya u nan, i̱ kende nan sha, i̱ mande nan sha u; shi á gema ya u nan á hingir tihi u uihôgh sha ci u kwagh ne;" 
Ezra6:12 man Aôndo u A ne iti Na i tem hen ijiir la kpaa, A̱ nzughul a utor cii man akuraior, a vea za uwegh sha u geman kwagh ne kposo, er vea yôhôl iyou i Aôndo i i lu ken Yerusalem la yô. Mo Dariu m kaa nahan; yô, i̱ er nahan sha ishima i môm je." 
Ezra6:13 Tsô Tatenai, gomna u yande Ifi la, vea Shetar-bosenai, kua nongo ve, ve er kwagh u tor Dariu tindi loho sha mi la cii, sha gbashima je." 
Ezra6:14 Nahan mbavesen mba Mbayuda gba maan; kpe ve iyol, sha kwaghôron u profeti u Hagai man Sekaria wan u Ido ve ôr la; ve maa i, ve kure, sha imo i Aôndo u Iserael man sha imo i Shirushi man Dariu man Artashaseta tor u Pershia la." 
Ezra6:15 I kure iyou la sha uwer u Adar ayange a u atar, sha inyom i sha ataratar i mtemtor u Dariu la." 
Ezra6:16 Tsô ônov mba Iserael man upristi man Mbalevi kua ônov mba mbakwarev mbagenev ve er iniongo i mtsegh u iyou i Aôndo ne a iember. 
Ezra6:17 Sha mtsegh u iyou i Aôndo ne, ve na nagh sha abua deri, anomaiyôngo deri uhar man agumaiyôngo deri unyiin; man sha ci u nagh ku isholibo sha ci u Iserael cii yô, ukpev pue kar uhar, sha iyenge i ikwe i Iserael." 
Ezra6:18 Ve ver upristi sha iniongo ve, man Mbalevi kpaa sha ityom ve sha tom u Aôndo ken Yerusalem, er i nger ken ruamabera u Mose nahan." 
Ezra6:19 Ônov mba mbakwarev er Paseka sha uwer u hiihii ayange a u pue kar anyiin. 
Ezra6:20 Gadia upristi man Mbalevi ve vande wanger ayol a ve ishima i môm; ve cii, ve lu wang. Nahan ve sôngo Paseka sha ci u ônov mba mbakwarev cii, man sha ci u anmgbianev vev upristi, kua sha ci u ve ayol a ve kpaa." 
Ezra6:21 Mbaiserael, mba ve hide ken kwar, ve ya un, kua hanma or u nan tsegh iyol i nan, nan kem iyol i nan sha hôngor u atôatyev a ken tar la yô, nan va kohol ve sha u keren TER, Aôndo u Iserael." 
Ezra6:22 Ve er iniongo i bredi u i we kwa sha mi ga yô, ayange ataankarahar cii, a iember; gadia TER na ve, ve lu saan saan, man A gema ishima i tor u Ashiria hen ve, er a̱ taver ve ave sha tom u iyou i Aôndo, Aôndo u Iserael." 
Ezra7:1 Ken ijime i akaa ne yô, sha ayange a tor Artashaseta, tor u Pershia la, Esera wan u Seraia, wan u Asaria, wan u Hilkia," 
Ezra7:2 wan u Shalum, wan u Sadoki, wan u Ahitubi," 
Ezra7:3 wan u Amaria, wan u Asaria, wan u Merayoti," 
Ezra7:4 wan u Serahia, wan u Ushi, wan u Buki," 
Ezra7:5 wan u Abishua, wan u Pinehashi, wan u Eleasar, wan u Aron pristi u tamen la—" 
Ezra7:6 Esera ne mough hen Babilon, lu orngeren, a fa atindi a Mose, a TER, Aôndo u Iserael na, la; tor rumun mbampin nav cii, gadia uwegh ku TER, Aôndo na, lu a na." 
Ezra7:7 Mbaiserael mbagenev mough kua upristi man Mbalevi man mbawanatsam man mbakuranihinda kua mbasôrontempel kpaa, ve yem ken Yerusalem sha inyom i sha utaankaruhar i tor Artashaseta la." 
Ezra7:8 A va hen Yerusalem sha uwer u sha utaan, lu sha inyom i sha utaankaruhar i tor la." 
Ezra7:9 Gadia sha uwer u hiihii sha iyange i hiihii la, a hii moughon ken Babilon, man sha uwer u sha utaan, sha iyange i hiihii la, a ar ken Yerusalem, gadia uwegh ku Aôndo na ku doon, lu a na." 
Ezra7:10 Gadia Esera ver ishima na u timen sha atindi a TER, man u eren sha a, man shi u tesen Iserael akaawan kua ajiraôron kpaa." 
Ezra7:11 Ngun ka washika u i kura sha washika u tor Artashaseta na pristi Esera, orngeren, or u fan akaaôron a atindi a TER kua akaawan a Na, a A wa Iserael yô:" 
Ezra7:12 Artashaseta tor u utor, u zan hen pristi Esera, orngeren, u fan atindi a Aôndo u Sha, or u jighilii." 
Ezra7:13 M na zwa mer, hanma or u Iserael cii, man upristi vev kua Mbalevi, mba ve lu ken tar wam, mba i sar ve u yemen ken Yerusalem yô, ve̱ za a we imôngo." 
Ezra7:14 Gadia er tor man atiator a na ataankarahar ve tindi u sha u u̱ za time sha kwagh u Yuda man Yerusalem, sha tindi u Aôndo wou, u u lu a mi sha uwe la;" 
Ezra7:15 man shi sha u u̱ za a azurfa man zenaria mba tor kua atiator a na ve ne Aôndo u Iserael a ishima i dedoo, Un u ijiir Na i teman i lu ken Yerusalem la;" 
Ezra7:16 man azurfa kua zenaria cii mba wea zua a mi ken tar u Babilon la cii, kua iwua i ior man upristi, i ve ne sha ishima i dedoo sha ci u iyou i Aôndo ve, i i lu ken Yerusalem la," 
Ezra7:17 nahan yô, yam anomabua sha inyaregh kin sha gbashima, kua anomaiyôngo man agumaiyôngo a iniav vev mbi sha samuyia man iniav vev mbi man, za na mbi sha atse a nanden nagh sha mi a ken iyou i Aôndo wen i ken Yerusalem la." 
Ezra7:18 Hanma kwagh u we kua anmgbianev ou ne nenge a doo u eren sha azurfa man zenaria mba ve shi la yô, er nen je sha ishima i Aôndo wen." 
Ezra7:19 Kpa ikav mbi i lu nan we sha ci u tom u iyou i Aôndo wou ne, na mbi sha ishigh ki Aôndo u Yerusalem." 
Ezra7:20 Man shi hanma kwagh, u kwagh a gbe sha mi sha ci u iyou i Aôndo wou man a lu u u̱ na yô, tôô ken iyounyar i tor, gema na." 
Ezra7:21 Man mo, tor Artashaseta kpaa, m ngu nan mbakosoninyaregh mba ve lu yande Ifi cii zwa mer, hanma kwagh u pristi Esera, orngeren, u fan atindi a Aôndo u Sha, a pin ne yô, i̱ na un sha gbashima je," 
Ezra7:22 zan zan kuma azurfa utalenti deri, man alakema uikaren deri, man wain ubav deri, man mkurem ubav deri, man bar yô, á kar a kar ga." 
Ezra7:23 Hanma kwagh u Aôndo u Sha á kaa yô, i̱ er un nahan vough sha ci u iyou i Aôndo u Sha la, gadia inja na nan man á va a iyugh sha tar u tor kua ônov nava?" 
Ezra7:24 Man shi se mba pasen ne sha kwagh u upristi man Mbalevi man mbawanatsam man mbakuranihinda kua mbasôrontempel shin mbatomov mba ken iyou i Aôndo ne cii, or môm ngu a tahav mbu wan ve kpandegh ga, shin inyaregh ki saven shin ki peren kpaa ga." 
Ezra7:25 We Esera kpaa, sha kwaghfan u Aôndo wou u A lu a we la, ver mbahemenev man mbaajiriv, mba vea ôron ajir a ior mba yande Ifi cii, ka mba ve fe atindi a Aôndo wou la cii; man or u nan fe ga yô, tese nan." 
Ezra7:26 Hanma or u nana venda u eren sha tindi u Aôndo wou, man tindi u tor yô, i̱ ôr nan ijir fese je, shin a lu i kuugh, shin i zendan nan, shin i yan nan zwajirigh, shin i wan nan gaadi kpaa." 
Ezra7:27 I̱ wuese TER, Aôndo u uter asev, u A we imbakwagh ne ken ishima i tor sha u eren iyou i TER i i lu ken Yerusalem la hwe nahan yô;" 
Ezra7:28 man A zungum mhôônom sha ishigh ki tor man atiator a na kua sha ishigh ki uityombaiorov mba tor cii. M zua a ishima i taver, gadia uwegh ku TER, Aôndo wam, lu a mo, nahan m kohol mbatamen ken Iserael, sha u ve̱ kôndo a mo imôngo." 
Ezra8:1 Mbavesen mba sha uya mba uter vev, man iyenge i ken takerada i icombor i mba ve mough a mo imôngo ken Babilon, ken tartor u Artashaseta la yô, ka:" 
Ezra8:2 Ken ônov mba Pinehashi yô, lu Gershon. Ken ônov mba Itamar yô, lu Daniel. Ken ônov mba Davidi yô, lu Hatushi," 
Ezra8:2 Ken ônov mba Pinehashi yô, lu Gershon. Ken ônov mba Itamar yô, lu Daniel. Ken ônov mba Davidi yô, lu Hatushi," 
Ezra8:3 ken ônov mba Shekania. Ken ônov mba Paroshi yô, lu Sekaria; man iyenge i nomso mba ve lu a na imôngo mba i nger ve ken takerada u icombor yô, ve lu deri man akunduahargber." 
Ezra8:4 Ken ônov mba Pahati-moabi yô, lu Eliehoenai wan u Serahia man nomsombaiorov deri uhar a na imôngo." 
Ezra8:5 Ken ônov mba Satu yô, lu Shekania wan u Yahashiel man nomsombaiorov deri utar a na imôngo." 
Ezra8:6 Ken ônov mba Adin yô, lu Ebedi wan u Yonatan man nomsombaiorov akunduahargber a na imôngo." 
Ezra8:7 Ken ônov mba Elam yô, lu Yeshaia wan u Atalia man nomsombaiorov akunduatargber a na imôngo." 
Ezra8:8 Ken ônov mba Shefatia yô, lu Sebadia wan u Mikael man nomsombaiorov akunduanyiin a na imôngo." 
Ezra8:9 Ken ônov mba Yoabi yô, lu Obadia wan u Yehiel man nomsombaiorov deri uhar man pue kar anigheni a na imôngo." 
Ezra8:10 Ken ônov mba Bani yô, lu Shelomiti wan u Yoshifia man nomsombaiorov deri man akunduatar a na imôngo." 
Ezra8:11 Man ken ônov mba Bebai yô, lu Sekaria wan u Bebai man nomsombaiorov ikundu kar anigheni a na imôngo." 
Ezra8:12 Man ken ônov mba Asegadi yô, lu Yohanan wan u Hakatan man nomsombaiorov deri môm man pue, a na imôngo." 
Ezra8:13 Ken ônov mba Adonikam, ka mba ve mase van la, ati a ve er: Elifeleti man Yeuel man Shemaia man nomsombaiorov akunduatar a ve imôngo." 
Ezra8:14 Ken ônov mba Bigevai yô, lu Utai man Sabudi man nomsombaiorov akunduatargber a ve imôngo." 
Ezra8:15 M kohol ve imôngo hen ifi u senen shin Ahava la; se za haa her, se tsa ayange atar; m nenge ior kua upristi, kpa ônov mba Levi yô, m nenge a mô ve ga." 
Ezra8:16 Tsô m tindi Elieser man Ariel man Shemaia man Elnatan man Yaribi man Elnatan man Natan man Sekaria man Meshulam, ka mbavesen je la, kua Yoyaribi man Elnatan, mba ve lu mbatesen la;" 
Ezra8:17 m tindi ve mer, ve̱ za hen Ido, orhemen u hen ijiir i Kashifia la, man shi m kaa ve kwagh u ve̱ za kaa Ido kua anmgbianev nav, mbasôrontempel mba hen ijiir i Kashifia la, sha u ve̱ va se a mbatomov sha ci u iyou i Aôndo wase." 
Ezra8:18 Tsô sha uwegh ku doon ku Aôndo wase ku ku lu a vese yô, ve va se a orfankwagh u ken ônov mba Mahali wan u Levi, wan u Iserael, ka Sherebia a ônov nav kua anmgbianev nav, ior pue kar anigheni je la;" 
Ezra8:19 man Hashabia man Yeshaia ken ônov mba Merari, man anmgbianev nav kua ônov vev a na imôngo, ve lu ior ikundu;" 
Ezra8:20 man mbasôrontempel mbagenev, mba Davidi kua atiator a na, na ve sha ci u tom u Mbalevi la yô; mbasôrontempel la lu deri uhar man ikundu; ve cii i ter va sha ati." 
Ezra8:21 Nahan m yôô kwaghyan u hôron her, hen ifi u Ahava, sha u se̱ hide a ayol a ase ijime sha ishigh ki Aôndo wase, man se̱ sôn iveren Na sha zende wase man mbayev asev kua akaa a se lu a mi cii." 
Ezra8:22 Gadia kunya kôrom u sônon tor er a̱ nam ikum i mbautyav kua mbaanyinyav sha u wasen se sha mbaihomov asev sha gbenda; gadia se vande ôron kwagh a tor ser: Uwegh ku Aôndo wase ku a mbakeren Un cii sha u Una er a ve dedoo yô, kpa agee Na gema nga num a mba ve undu Un cii, iyugh Na kpaa nahan." 
Ezra8:23 Tsô se hôr kwaghyan se sôn Aôndo wase sha ci u kwagh ne; A rumun msen wase kpaa. 
Ezra8:24 Tsô m tsegha ior pue kar uhar ken upristi mba tamen, lu Sherebia man Hashabia, man anmgbianev vev ior pue a ve imôngo;" 
Ezra8:25 m kar ve azurfa man zenaria kua ikav, ka iwua sha ci u iyou i Aôndo wase, i tor kua atiator a na man uityombaiorov nav man Iserael mba ve lu heregh la cii, ve na yô;" 
Ezra8:26 m kar azurfa utalenti deri ataratar man akunduahargber m na sha ikev ve, man ikav mbi azurfa kuma utalenti deri, zenaria kpaa utalenti deri;" 
Ezra8:27 man ayongo a zenaria ikundu, kuma udariki dubu; man atasa ahar a togula a dedoo a engem, a lu a inja kpishi er zenaria nahan." 
Ezra8:28 Tsô m kaa a ve mer, i tsegha ne sha ci u TER, ikav kpaa i tsegha mbi; man azurfa man zenaria ka nagh ku sha ishima i dedoo ku i ne TER, Aôndo u uter enev." 
Ezra8:29 Yô, ver nen ishima, kura nen mbi, zan zan shighe u né kar myohom ma mbi sha ishigh ki upristi mba tamen kua Mbalevi man mbavesen mba sha uya mba uter mba Iserael ken Yerusalem ken ukpar man ken iyou i TER." 
Ezra8:30 Tsô upristi kua Mbalevi ngohol myohom ma azurfa man zenaria man ikav, sha u zan a mi ken iyou i Aôndo wase ken Yerusalem." 
Ezra8:31 Tsô se mough hen ifi u Ahava sha uwer u hiihii ayange a u pue kar ahar sha u zan ken Yerusalem; uwegh ku Aôndo wase kpaa lu a vese, A yima se sha ikev i orihom kua i ornumungbenda." 
Ezra8:32 Nahan se va ken Yerusalem, se va tsa her ayange atar." 
Ezra8:33 Sha iyange i sha unyiin la, i kar myohom ma azurfa man zenaria man ikav ken iyou i Aôndo wase, i gema i na sha ikev i Meremoti wan u pristi Uria; Eleasar wan u Pinehashi lu a na; man Mbalevi, Yosabadi wan u Yeshua, kua Noadia wan u Binui lu a ve imôngo;" 
Ezra8:34 i ôr iyenge i mbi, man i kar myohom ma mbi; i nger myohom ma mbi cii hen shighe la." 
Ezra8:35 Ônov mba mbakwarev mba ve due ken uikangen la, ve na Aôndo u Iserael iniav mbi nanden: anomabua pue kar ahar sha ci u Iserael cii, anomaiyôngo akunduanyiingber kar ataratar, agumaiyôngo akunduatargber kar ataankarahar, ukpev pue kar uhar sha ci u nagh ku isholibo; angan cii lu nagh ku nanden sha ci u TER." 
Ezra8:36 Man shi ve gema imo i tor i i nger i a nger la, ve na mbatarev mba tor man ugomna mba yande Ifi la; nahan ve wase ior kua iyou i Aôndo kpaa." 
Ezra9:1 Zum u i kure akaa ne yô, atiator va her a mo, ve kaa er: Ior mba Iserael man upristi kua Mbalevi ve kem ayol a ve sha akaahôngorough a ior mba hen ityar ne ga, ka i Mbakanaan man Mbahiti man Mbaperishi man Mbayebushi man Mbaamon man Mbamoabi man Mbaigipiti kua Mbaamor je la." 
Ezra9:2 Gadia ve er ônov vev mba kasev sha ci ve ayol a ve man sha ci u ônov vev kpaa; nahan icighantsombor nungwa a atôatyev a hen ityar ne; ka atiator man mbatarev je, ve hemen sha kwaghbo ne ye." 
Ezra9:3 Zum u m ungwa kwagh ne yô, m ande ikondo yam kua riga wam kpaa, man m gbera ice yam i sha ityou man indyer yam kpaa, m tema kông." 
Ezra9:4 Tsô mbacian akaaôron a Aôndo u Iserael cii, ve va kohol her a mo sha ci u kwaghbo u mbakwarev la; kpa m tema her kông, zan zan nagh ku aikighe kuma." 
Ezra9:5 Sha shighe u nagh ku aikighe la yô, m mough a iheen yam, a ikondo yam i anden kua riga wam kpaa, m gure anu inya, m naregh ave sha TER, Aôndo wam;" 
Ezra9:6 m kaa mer: Ahii! Aôndo wam, m va ahenge, kunya kôrom u kenden ishigh yagh sha a We Aôndo wam, gadia afer a ase seer je kar ityough yasegh sha, ibo yase kôndo ar Sha je." 
Ezra9:7 Hii sha ayange a uter asev je, se lu ken zegeibo zan zan nyian; ka sha ci u afer a ase kpaa, i tôô se a utor asev man upristi asev, i na se sha ikev i utor mba ityar igen, man shi i na se sha sanker, man ken uikangen, man ishar i yan, man kunya u sha ishi, er i lu nyian nahan." 
Ezra9:8 Man hegen yô, ka anshighe kpuaa tsô, TER, Aôndo wase, A zungu se mhôônom i de se asande a a wer ne, man i ne se se lu a imande i manden ken icighanjiir Na, je Aôndo wase A wanger se ashe man A na i yôhôl se iyol kpuaa ken ikangenev yasev." 
Ezra9:9 Gadia se mba ikpan je, nahan kpaa Aôndo wase gbihi se ken ikangenev yasev kera ga, kpa A er, doo utor mba Pershia a vese sha u ve̱ na i̱ yôhôl se iyol er se̱ maa iyou i Aôndo wase man se̱ sôr atse a i la her, man sha u wan se igyar ken Yuda man ken Yerusalem." 
Ezra9:10 Hegen yô, ken ijime i akaa ne shi sé kaa nana, Aôndo wase? Gadia se undu atindi a Ou," 
Ezra9:11 a U we se sha mbayev Ou mbaprofeti, U kaa Wer: Tar u ne ze sha u za ngohol u la, ka tar u wang ga, sha ci u mlu u wang ga u ior mba ken ityar la, sha akaahôngorough a ve iv u a mi la sha mlu ve u wang ga la, hii hen ikighir ingin ar hen ngila." 
Ezra9:12 Yô, de kera rumun nen ônov enev mba kasev ve̱ eren ônov vev mba nomso ga, man shi de kera eren nen ônov vev mba kasev sha ci u ônov enev mba nomso ga; de keren nen bem shin mkpeyol sha ci ve mayange je ga, sha er né taver, né ya mdoom ma tar la, shi né undu ônov enev dyako u u gbem yô." 
Ezra9:13 Man ahegen ken masejime u akaa a a tser se cii, sha ci u ityom yase i ifer man zegeibo wase ne kpaa, Aôndo wase, U tsaha se sha mngee u afer a ase la ga, shi U na se asande ne kpaa," 
Ezra9:14 nahan shi sé vihi atindi a Ou, sé zua ivese a ior mba ve eren akaahôngorough angan nahana? Nahan Ú kera yuwe a vese je, Ú tim se, man asande á kera shi ga, shin mô u waren kpaa nana kera lu ga gaa?" 
Ezra9:15 TERE, Aôndo u Iserael, We U ngu u perapera je, gadia se mba asande a waren, er i lu nyian nahan; nenge, se tile a ibo yase iyol sha ishigh You; gadia mô u nana fatyô u tilen sha ishigh You sha ci u kwagh ne nan ngu ga." 
Ezra10:1 Tsô er Esera lu eren msen, pasen kwaghbo, vaan, gbidyen iyol inya sha ishigh ki iyou i Aôndo yô, ikpelaior kpishi due ken Iserael, nomso man kasev kua mbayev, ve va kohol her a na, ve gba vaan tsung je." 
Ezra10:2 Nahan Shekania wan u Yehiel, u ken ônov mba Elam, gema kaa a Esera er: Se er Aôndo wase kwagh u bo, se er kasev ken atôatyev a tar ne; nahan kpaa ishima i veren keghen ngi her sha ci u Iserael sha kwagh ne." 
Ezra10:3 Yô, sé ya ikur a Aôndo wase, sé pav nen a kasev kua ônov mba i mar a ve cii, sha mhen u terem man u mba ve gbidi akarkase iyol sha tindi u Aôndo wase yô; kpa i̱ er kwagh ne sha tindi." 
Ezra10:4 Mough sha, gadia kwagh ne ka we ú er un ye, se kpaa se mba a we imôngo; taver ishima er un je." 
Ezra10:5 Tsô Esera mough, na upristi mba tamen man Mbalevi kua Iserael cii ve bum er vea er sha mkaanem man. Tsô ve bum." 
Ezra10:6 Nahan Esera mough sha ishigh ki iyou i Aôndo kar za nyôr ken iyou i Yehohanan wan u Eliashibi; er a nyôr her kpaa, a ya kwaghyan ga, a ma mngerem kpaa ga, gadia lu zungwen sha ci u kwaghbo u mbakwarev la." 
Ezra10:7 Tsô i yôô ken Yuda kua Yerusalem er mbakwarev mba ve hire la cii, ve̱ kohol ken Yerusalem;" 
Ezra10:8 man hanma or u nana va ga, zan zan ayange á kar atar, sha mhen u atiator kua mbatamen yô, á ngohol nan akaa cii, man nan iyol i nan kpaa á dugh nan ken mkohol u mbakwarev kera." 
Ezra10:9 Tsô ior i Yuda kua i Benyamin cii, ve kohol ken Yerusalem er ayange atar la lu a kuma ga je yô; lu sha uwer u sha utaankarunyiin, ayange a u ikundu la; tsô ior cii tema sha tembe u sha ishigh ki iyou i Aôndo, ve lu gbidyen akarkase iyol sha ci u kwagh ne, man shi sha ci u ura u u lu nôôn kpishi la." 
Ezra10:10 Tsô pristi Esera mough tile sha, kaa a ve er: Ne er kwaghbo, ne er kasev ken atôatyev, sha u ne seer Iserael ibo." 
Ezra10:11 Hegen yô, pase nen ase TER, Aôndo u uter enev, kwaghbo wen, er nen ishima Na; kem nen iyol a atôatyev a tar ne kua kasev mba atôatyev kpaa." 
Ezra10:12 Nahan mkohol u ior cii rumun sha imo i taver, ve kaa er: Er u kaa nahan, kape sé er je la." 
Ezra10:13 Kpa ior ngee kpishi, man shi ka shighe u ura kpaa, se fatyô u tilen ken won ga; man kwagh ne ka tom u iyange i môm shin ayange ahar tsô ga; gadia se er kwaghbo vese je, sha kwagh ne." 
Ezra10:14 Yô, atiator a ase a̱ tile sha ci u ior mbagenev cii, nahan mba ken agar ase cii, mba ve er kasev ken atôatyev la, ve̱ va sha shighe u á ver ve la, a mbatamen kua mbaajiriv mba ken hanma gar, a ve imôngo, i̱ tôô iyugh i vihin i Aôndo wase A yugh se sha ci u kwagh ne sha a vese kera." 
Ezra10:15 Ka Yonatan wan u Asahel kua Yaseia wan u Tikwa, ve tseegh ve hendan sha kwagh ne ye; Meshulam kua Orlevi Shabetai ta ken ve." 
Ezra10:16 Tsô ônov mba mbakwarev er nahan, ve ver pristi Esera kua mbavesen mbagenev mba sha uya mba uter, hanma or sha ya u ter u nan, ve cii i ter ve sha ati ati; ve tema sha uwer u sha pue, iyange i hiihii i uwer la, sha u timen sha kwagh ne." 
Ezra10:17 Sha uwer u hiihii, iyange i u i hiihii la, ve kure kwagh u ior mba ve er kasev ken atôatyev la cii." 
Ezra10:18 Ken ônov mba upristi kpaa, i zua a mbagenev mba ve er kasev ken atôatyev yô. Ken ônov mba Yeshua wan u Yosadaki man angbianev nav yô, lu: Maaseia man Elieser man Yaribi kua Gedalia." 
Ezra10:19 Ve zua zwa er vea pav a kasev vev, man vea na nagh ku iboogh sha nomiyôngo môm sha ci u ibo ve." 
Ezra10:20 Man ken ônov mba Imer yô, lu: Hanania kua Sebadia." 
Ezra10:21 Ken ônov mba Harim yô, lu: Maaseia man Eliya man Shemaia man Yehiel kua Ushia." 
Ezra10:22 Man ken ônov mba Pashur yô, lu: Elioenai, Maaseia, Ishemael, Netanel, Yosabadi kua Elasa." 
Ezra10:23 Ken Mbalevi yô, lu: Yosabadi man Shimei man Kelaia (ka Kelita je la) man Petahia man Yuda kua Elieser." 
Ezra10:24 Ken mbawanatsam yô, lu: Eliashibi. Ken mbakuranihinda yô, lu: Shalum man Telem kua Uri." 
Ezra10:25 Ken Iserael, ken ônov mba Paroshi yô, lu: Ramia man Ishia man Malkiya man Miyamin man Eleasar man Malkiya kua Benaia." 
Ezra10:26 Ken ônov mba Elam yô, lu: Matania man Sekaria man Yehiel man Abedi man Yeremoti kua Eliya." 
Ezra10:27 Ken ônov mba Satu yô, lu: Elioenai man Eliashibi man Matania man Yeremoti man Sabadi kua Ashisa." 
Ezra10:28 Ken ônov mba Bebai yô, lu: Yehohanan man Hanania, Sabai kua Atelai." 
Ezra10:29 Ken ônov mba Bani yô, lu: Meshulam man Maluki man Adaia, Yashubi man Sheal man Yeremoti." 
Ezra10:30 Ken ônov mba Pahati-moabi yô, lu: Adena man Kelal, Benaia, Maaseia, Matania, Besalel man Binui kua Manase." 
Ezra10:31 Ken ônov mba Harim yô, lu: Elieser, Ishiya, Malkiya, Shemaia, Shimeon," 
Ezra10:32 Benyamin, Maluki man Shemaria." 
Ezra10:33 Ken ônov mba Hashim yô, lu: Matenai, Matata, Sabadi, Elifeleti, Yeremai, Manase man Shimei." 
Ezra10:34 Ken ônov mba Bani yô, lu: Maadai, Amram, Uel," 
Ezra10:35 Benaia, Bedeia, Keluhi," 
Ezra10:36 Vania, Meremoti, Eliashibi," 
Ezra10:37 Matania, Matenai, Yaasu," 
Ezra10:38 Bani, Binui, Shimei," 
Ezra10:39 Shelemia, Natan, Adaia," 
Ezra10:40 Makenadebai, Shashai, Sharai," 
Ezra10:41 Asarel, Shelemia, Shemaria," 
Ezra10:42 Shalum, Amaria man Yosev." 
Ezra10:43 Ken ônov mba Nebo yô, lu: Yeiel, Matitia, Sabadi, Sebina, Yadai, Yoel man Benaia." 
Ezra10:44 Mban cii ve er kasev ken atôatyev; kasev mbagenev ken ve mar ônov je. 
Nehemiah1:1 Kwagh u Nehemia wan u Hakalia. Tsô sha uwer u Kiselev sha inyom i sha ikundu la, er m lu ken Shushan gar u tor yô," 
Nehemiah1:2 anngôm ugen Hanania, za va, un a ior mbagenev mba ken Yuda; tsô, m pine ve kwagh u Mbayuda mba ve dugh ken kwar la, kua kwagh u Yerusalem kpaa." 
Nehemiah1:3 Ve kaam er: Asande a a shi her a a dugh ken kwar a a lu ken ipaventar la nga ken zegecan kua ilyahan kpishi kpaa; gilgar u Yerusalem yôhôl, ucivir nav kpaa usu hia ve." 
Nehemiah1:4 Tsô er m ungwa akaaôron ne yô, m shar inya, m gba vaan, m ure ayange kar je; m hôr kwaghyan, m sôn sha ishigh ki Aôndo u Sha," 
Nehemiah1:5 m kaa mer: TERE, Aôndo u Sha, Aôndo u hemban, u cier iyol, u wan ikuryan iko man erdoo a mba A doo ve ishima man ve we atindi Na iko yô." 
Nehemiah1:6 Shi kegh ato, ashe Ou kpaa a̱ lu ivegher, ungwa msen u wanakiriki Wou, u m sen U nyian ne, atetan man tugh, sha ci u mbayev Ou Mbaiserael, er m lu pasen akaabo a Mbaiserael, a se er U yô; mo a ya u terem kpaa, se er U kwaghbo." 
Nehemiah1:7 Se er U kwagh u vihin kpishi, atindi man akaawan kua ajiraôron, a U we wanakiriki Wou Mose la, se wa a iko ga." 
Nehemiah1:8 Yô, shi umbur kwaghôron u U ôr a Mose wanakiriki Wou la, U kaa Wer: Aluer ne er kwaghbo yô, Me sambe ne ken atôatyev;" 
Nehemiah1:9 kpa aluer shi ne gema her a Mo, ne wa atindi a Am iko, ne eren sha a kpaa yô, shin ior ou mba i tsende ve kera la, vea lu sha ikighir i Sha je kpaa, nahan kpaa Me za kohol ve her, Me hide a ve ken ijiir i M tsough Mer iti Yam i̱ lu her la." 
Nehemiah1:10 Yô, mban ka mbayev Ou man ior Ou mba U paa ve sha agee a Ou a hemban man uwegh Ough ku taver kpaa yô." 
Nehemiah1:11 Tere, shi kegh ato sha msen u wanakiriki Wou man msen u mbayev Ou, mba i lu ve ka cian iti You yô; shi na wanakiriki Wou ikôr-laghen nyian, man na i̱ doo or ne a na. Mo yô, m lu or u nan tor kwaghman." 
Nehemiah2:1 Tsô sha uwer u Nisan, sha inyom i sha ikundu i tor Artashaseta la, er wain lu un sha ishi yô, m tôô wain, m kende m na tor. Kpa kera keke yô, m vanden vihin ishigh sha, sha ashe na ga." 
Nehemiah2:2 Tsô tor kaa a mo er: Ka nyi u vihi ishigh sha, er angev kpaa mbu ker u ga nee? Ka kwagh ugen ga, ka ishima i vihin. Nahan cier mo iyol kpishi." 
Nehemiah2:3 M kaa a tor mer: Tor a̱ tsa sha won gbem; á er nan man ishigh yagh kia vihi sha ga, er gar u iwar i uter av i lu ker la, a gem a hingir ice, ihinda na kpaa i hie kera nahana?" 
Nehemiah2:4 Tsô tor kaa a mo er: Ka nyi i sar uwe? Nahan m sôn Aôndo u Sha. 
Nehemiah2:5 M gema m kaa a tor mer: Aluer tor una rumun, man aluer wanakiriki wou ne, a doo u a na yô, nam gbenda m̱ za hen Yuda, hen gar u iwar i uter av i lu ker la, m̱ za maa un." 
Nehemiah2:6 Tsô er pendatyo u tor tema un hen ikooso la, tor pinem er: Ú tsa zende ayange a me, man ka hanma iyange ú hidee? Nahan doo tor u nan mo gbenda; tsô m ver un ayange," 
Nehemiah2:7 m kaa a tor mer: Aluer tor una rumun yô, ma a nem uwashika mba za nan ugomna mba yande Ifi la, sha u ve̱ de m̱ kar zan zan m̱ nyôr ken Yuda yô;" 
Nehemiah2:8 man shi washika u za nan Asav orkuran ikô i tor la, sha u a̱ nam ikon sha ci u ihinda i iyouitya i i lu hen tempel la, man shi sha ci u gilgar, man sha ci u iyou i me za nyôr her yô. Tor rumun a mo, gadia uwegh ku Aôndo wam ku doon ku lu a mo." 
Nehemiah2:9 Tsô m va ar hen ugomna mba yande Ifi la, m na ve uwashika mba tor mbala. Tor tindi ukurmbautyav man mbaanyinyav a mo imôngo kpaa." 
Nehemiah2:10 Zum u Sanbalati Orhoron man Tobia ortom, Oramon la, ve ungwa ahula er orgen nan ve u va keren mkpeyol sha ci u Mbaiserael yô, gema vihi ve kpishi." 
Nehemiah2:11 Tsô m va nyôr ken Yerusalem, m tsa ayange atar;" 
Nehemiah2:12 nahan m mough tugh, mo a ior kpuaa; kpa m ôr ma or kwagh u Aôndo A tesem ken ishima u me er sha ci u Yerusalem la ga; ma zendenya kpaa lu a mo imôngo ga, saa di zendenya u m henda la tsô." 
Nehemiah2:13 Tsô m due tugh, m kar hen Hundagar u Pev, m za hen Ijôr i Iyô man hen Hundagar u Ihôgh la, m gba kenger ukpekpe mba Yerusalem mba ve tsehe la, man ihinda na i usu u hie i la kpaa." 
Nehemiah2:14 Tsô m kar m za hen Hundagar u Imbor man hen Ityungu u Tor; kpa ian lu i zendenya u m henda la, una kar ga." 
Nehemiah2:15 Tsô m kôndo shin pev tugh, m gba kenger kpekpe; nahan m gema m nyôr hen Hundagar u Pev la, m hide." 
Nehemiah2:16 Kpa mbatarev yô, ve fa her ape m ze, shin kwagh u m er kpaa ga; Mbayuda kpaa, m lu a kaa ve ga, shin upristi shin mbatamen shin mbatarev shin mba ve lu eren tom la kpaa." 
Nehemiah2:17 Tsô m kaa a ve mer: Ne nenge imbacan i se lu ken i ne, er Yerusalem a hingir ice man ihinda na kpaa usu hia i kera; yô, va, sé maa nen gilgar u Yerusalem sha er sé kera lu kwagh u lahan ga yô." 
Nehemiah2:18 Shi m ôr ve kwagh u uwegh ku dedoo ku Aôndo wam ku ku lu a mo la, kua akaaôron a tor ôrom yô. Tsô ve kaa er: Sé mough, sé cinge nen mi u maan je. Nahan ve taver ishima sha ci u tom u dedoo ne." 
Nehemiah2:19 Kpa zum u Sanbalati Orhoron man Tobia ortom, Oramon la, kua Geshem Orarabia, ve ungwa ahura yô, ve se se ibumegh, ve laha se, ve kaa er: Ka nyi kwagh ne eren nee? Ka ne pe hendan a tor zee?" 
Nehemiah2:20 Tsô m gema m kaa a ve mer: Ka Aôndo u Sha Una na se ikôr-laghen ye, nahan se mbayev Nav sé mough, sé maa; kpa ne yô, ne mba a ma ci shin ian shin kwagh u umbur ken Yerusalem kpaa ga." 
Nehemiah3:1 Tsô zegepristi Eliashibi mough a anmgbianev nav upristi imôngo, ve maa Hundagar u Iyôngo, ve wanger u, ve zer ucivir mba u, ve wanger u zan zan ve ar hen gôgôyou u taven u Hamea, man zan zan ar hen gôgôyou u taven u Hananel." 
Nehemiah3:2 Tiôn u dondon a na la, ior mba Yeriko lu maan. Tiôn u dondon a mban yô, Sakur wan u Imri lu maan." 
Nehemiah3:3 Hundagar u Ishu yô, lu ônov mba Hasenaa maa ye; ve wa ikpande i u, ve zer ucivir mba u man uishindan kua uiwever mba u." 
Nehemiah3:4 U dondon a ve yô, Meremoti wan u Uria, wan u Hakoshi lu sôron. U dondon a ve yô, Meshulam wan u Berekia, wan u Meshesabel lu sôron. U dondon a ve yô, Sadoki wan u Baana lu sôron." 
Nehemiah3:5 U dondon a ve yô, Mbatekoa lu sôron; kpa ashagbaior a ve nyôr mon sha tom u Ter ve ne ga." 
Nehemiah3:6 Hundagar u Tse yô, lu Yoyada wan u Pasea man Meshulam wan u Besodeia ve sôr ye; ve wa ikpande i u, ve zer ucivir mba u man uishindan kua uiwever mba u." 
Nehemiah3:7 U dondon a ve yô, Melatia Orgibeon man Yadon Ormeronoti, ka ior i Gibeon man i Misepa mba ve lu sha ikev i gomna u yande Ifi la, ve lu sôron." 
Nehemiah3:8 U dondon a ve yô, Ushiel wan u Harhaia, mbavarenzenaria, lu sôron. U dondon a na yô, Hanania u môm ken mbanungwancigh lu sôron. Ve kera bende Yerusalem ave ga zan zan ar hen gilgar u gbanger la." 
Nehemiah3:9 U dondon a ve yô, Refaia wan u Hur, ortaregh u vegher u tar u u kase Yerusalem la lu sôron." 
Nehemiah3:10 U dondon a ve yô, Yedaia wan u Harumav lu sôron, sha ishigh ki iyou na je. U dondon a na yô, Hatushi wan u Hashabeneia lu sôron." 
Nehemiah3:11 Malkiya wan u Harim man Hashubi wan u Pahati-moabi, ve sôr tiôn ugen kua gôgôyou u taven u Atse a kaan akaa ker." 
Nehemiah3:12 U dondon a na yô, Shalum wan u Haloheshi, ortaregh u vegher u tar u u kase Yerusalem la lu sôron un a ônov nav mba kasev." 
Nehemiah3:13 Hundagar u Pev yô, Hanun man ior mba ken Sanoa, ve sôr u; ve maa u, ve zer u ucivir man uishindan kua uiwever, shi ve maa gil aseva dubu zan zan ar hen Hundagar u Ihôgh la." 
Nehemiah3:14 Hundagar u Ihôgh yô, Malkiya wan u Rekabi, ortaregh u tar u u kase Bete-hakerem la sôr u; a maa u, a zer u ucivir man uishindan kua uiwever." 
Nehemiah3:15 Hundagar u Imbor yô, Shalum wan u Kolhose, ortaregh u tar u u kase Misepa la, sôr u; a maa u, a cir u, shi a zer u ucivir man uishindan man uiwever; shi a maa gil u Ityungu u Shela hen sule u tor la, zan zan ar hen agbur a duen hen gar u Davidi senen la." 
Nehemiah3:16 U dondon a na yô, Nehemia wan u Asebuki, ortaregh u veghertar u u kase Bete-sur la lu sôron zan zan ar hen ijiir i i ver ishigh hen iwar i Davidi la, kar za ar hen ityungu i i er i la, man hen ya u anomaior a ageegh." 
Nehemiah3:17 U dondon a na yô, Mbalevi, Rehum wan u Bani ve lu sôron. U dondon a na yô, Hashabia, ortaregh u veghertar u u kase Keila la lu sôron sha ci u veghertar na." 
Nehemiah3:18 U dondon a na yô, anmgbianev vev, Bavai wan u Henadadi, ortaregh u veghertar ugen u u kase Keila la lu sôron." 
Nehemiah3:19 U dondon a na yô, Eser wan u Yeshua, ortaregh u Misepa, lu sôron tiôn ugen u sha ishigh ki ijiir i kôndon zan sha iyou i ikav mbi tswamev, hen iniuugh ki gil la." 
Nehemiah3:20 U dondon a na yô, Baruki wan u Sabai lu sôron tiôn ugen sha ishima i môm je, hii hen iniuugh ki gil zan zan ar hen hunda u iyou i zegepristi Eliashibi la." 
Nehemiah3:21 U dondon a na yô, Meremoti wan u Uria, wan u Hakoshi, lu sôron tiôn ugen, hii hen hunda u iyou i Eliashibi zan zan ar hen ikighir i iyou i Eliashibi la." 
Nehemiah3:22 U dondon a na yô, upristi, ior mba hen tar u delaa la ve lu sôron." 
Nehemiah3:23 U dondon a ve yô, Benyamin man Hashubi, ve lu sôron sha ishigh ki ya ve. U dondon a ve yô, Asaria wan u Maaseia, wan u Anania lu sôron hen kpe u iyou na." 
Nehemiah3:24 U dondon a na yô, Binui wan u Henadadi lu sôron tiôn ugen, hii hen iyou i Asaria zan zan za ar iniuugh ki gil man zan zan hen zongo je." 
Nehemiah3:25 Palal wan u Usai lu sôron sha ishigh ki iniuugh ki gil man gôgôyou u taven sha, u sha iyou i tor, hen tembe u mbakuran la. U dondon a na yô, Pedaia wan u Paroshi lu sôron," 
Nehemiah3:26 mbasôrontempel tema ken Ofel zan zan ar hen ishigh ki Hundagar u Mnger vegher u sha ityoughkitaregh, man hen gôgôyou u taven sha la." 
Nehemiah3:27 U dondon a na yô, Mbatekoa, ve lu sôron tiôn ugen sha ishigh ki gôgôyou u a tav sha la, zan zan ar hen gil u Ofel." 
Nehemiah3:28 Poso Hundagar u Anyinya ken hemen nahan, upristi lu sôron, hanmô ve sha ishigh ki ya u nan." 
Nehemiah3:29 U dondon a ve yô, Sadoki wan u Imer lu sôron sha ishigh ki iyou na. U dondon a na yô, Shemaia wan u Shekania lu sôron, un lu orkuranhunda u sha vegher u sha ityoughkitaregh la." 
Nehemiah3:30 U dondon a na yô, Hanania wan u Shelemia man Hanun wan u Salav u sha ataratar la, ve lu sôron tiôn ugen. U dondon a na yô, Meshulam wan u Berekia lu sôron sha ishigh ki iyou na." 
Nehemiah3:31 U dondon a na yô, Malkiya, u môm ken mbavarenzenaria, lu sôron zan zan ar hen iyou i mbasôrontempel man i mbakasuav, sha ishigh ki Hundagar u Mkor man shi hen kpoyoughough u sha zongo la." 
Nehemiah3:32 Hen atô u kpoyoughough u sha zongo man Hundagar u Uile la yô, lu mbavarenzenaria man mbakasuav ve lu sôron ye." 
Nehemiah4:1 Kpa zum u Sanbalati ungwa er se lu maan gilgar yô, ishima vihi un, ishima nyoon un tsung, nahan a gba nahan Mbayuda tar;" 
Nehemiah4:2 a ôr kwagh sha ishigh ki anmgbianev nav kua ikumutya i Samaria, a kaa er: Ka nyi Mbayuda aseeraior ne a erene? Á gba den ve, ve̱ za hemen tsôô? Vea na nagha? Vea kure tom iyange i mômô? Vea nder awen ken atihialôgh a i nande a kera la?" 
Nehemiah4:3 Yô, Tobia Oramon la, lu a na ikua, a gema a kaa er: Kwagh u ve maa la yô, icôngo tsô kpaa ia unde sha gil ve u awen la, una yôhôl kera." 
Nehemiah4:4 Ungwa, Aôndo wase, mba lahan se; yô, hide a ilyahan ve la sha ityough vegh, na ve ve̱ hingir ishar i yan ken tar u á za a ve uikangen ker la," 
Nehemiah4:5 de cirin ifer ve ga, man shi de esen asorabo a ve sha ishigh You kera kpaa ga; gadia ve bam U sha ishigh ki mbamaan je." 
Nehemiah4:6 Nahan se maa gil la; gilgar cii zua zan zan za ar her atô u ityaven na; gadia ior kange ishima sha tom. 
Nehemiah4:7 Kpa zum u Sanbalati man Tobia man Mbaarabia man Mbaamon kua Mbaashedodi ve ungwa er mser u gilgar u Yerusalem la lu zan hemen, man i hii u kondon a-an a i pev un la yô, asema vihi ve tsung;" 
Nehemiah4:8 nahan ve cii ve zua zwa ishima i môm er vea va nôngo ityav a Yerusalem, vea na anzughul." 
Nehemiah4:9 Kpa se yô, se sôn Aôndo wase, shi se ver mbakuran atetan man tugh sha ci u kwagh ve la, sha u yangen ve." 
Nehemiah4:10 Tsô Yuda kaa er: Agee a mbatôônikav yina man alôgh ngee kpishi, nahan se kera fatyô, u maan gilgar ga." 
Nehemiah4:11 Mbaihomov asev kpaa kaa er: Ve̱ de fe ga, mnenge kpaa ve̱ de nengen ga, nahan sé za nyôr her atô ve, sé wua ve, sé bunde tom la." 
Nehemiah4:12 Tsô zum u Mbayuda mba ve tem ikua a ve la za va yô, ve kaa a vese kuma kwa pue je er: Mba duen hanma ian sha u va tan num a vese." 
Nehemiah4:13 Nahan m ver ior shin ajiir a hemban gban apev a a lu gbar gbar ken ijime i gilgar la, m ver ve sha icombor ve, a usanker vev man awange a ve man avaan a ve." 
Nehemiah4:14 M nenge, nahan m mough, m kaa a mbatamen man mbatarev man ior mbagenev, mer: De cie nen ve ga; umbur nen TER u A hembe A cier iyol la, nôngo nen ityav sha ci u anmgbianev enev man ônov enev mba nomso man mba kasev man kasev enev kua uya enev." 
Nehemiah4:15 Tsô zum u mbaihomov asev ungwa er se fe kwagh shon, man shi Aôndo kpaa A gem mhen ve a hingir gbilinkwagh yô, nahan se cii se hide hen gilgar, hanma or sha tom u nan." 
Nehemiah4:16 Tsô hii hen shighe la je zan zan ken hemen, mbatomov av, vegher môm lu eren tom, vegher ugen kôr awange ave man iperutya man avaan kua uriga mba iyôôv; mbatarev kpaa lu taver ya u Yuda cii ishima," 
Nehemiah4:17 sha tom u maan gil la. Mbatôônikav, ve wa ikav mbi utyav iyol; hanma or nan lu eren tom uwegh môm, uwegh kugenegh di nan kôr ikav mbi tswamev mbi nan;" 
Nehemiah4:18 mbamaan kpaa, hanmô ve nan kange sanker u nan iwenge man nan lu maan ye. Ortôngonkorough lu a mo." 
Nehemiah4:19 Tsô m kaa mbatamen man mbatarev kua ior mbagenev mer: Tom ne gba ikôr ngu geghekeke kpaa, man se mba sha gil wue wue, orgen ka nan lu ca a orgen;" 
Nehemiah4:20 yô, sha hanma ijiir i ne ongo korough imo yô, va kohol nen se heregh. Aôndo wase Una nôngo ityav sha ci wase." 
Nehemiah4:21 Kape se lu eren tom shon ne; vegher ve ugen kôr awange ave, hii sha shighe u iyange ka i due la je, zan zan asan kar duen." 
Nehemiah4:22 Ka hen shighe la je, m kaa a ior mer: Hanma or a wanye u nan, ve̱ tsa ken Yerusalem, ve̱ hingir se mbakuran tugh; atetan yô, ve̱ eren tom." 
Nehemiah4:23 Nahan mo iyol yam man anmgbianev av man mbayev av kua ior mba kuran mba ve zenden a mo ityô yô, mô wase môm nan er ikav mbi iyolough kera ga; hanma or lu a ikav mbi utyav mbi nan kua mngerem." 
Nehemiah5:1 Tsô ior ger mliam kpishi a kasev vev sha ci u anmgbianev vev Mbayuda. 
Nehemiah5:2 Mbagenev lu kaan er: Se a ônov asev mba nomso man mba kasev, se ngee; yô, i̱ na se alakema, se̱ ya se̱ lu uma." 
Nehemiah5:3 Shi mbagenev lu kaan er: Se ver ishule yase ityungu kua ikon yase i wain man uya asev kpaa; yô, i̱ na se alakema sha ci u ijen." 
Nehemiah5:4 Mbagenev di lu kaan er: Se gba injô sha ci u kpandegh ku tor, se ver ishule yase ityungu man ikon i wain kpaa." 
Nehemiah5:5 Nahan ayol ase kua a anmgbianev asev ka kwagh môm, ônov asev kpaa mba er ônov vev nahan; man nenge ase, se mba nan mbayev asev mba nomso man mba kasev ken uikangen, ve hingir ikpan; ônov asev mba kasev mbagenev yô, vande hingir ikpan kera ve; man se fa kwagh u sé er ga, gadia ior mbagenev ngohol ishule yase kua ikon i wain kpaa." 
Nehemiah5:6 Nahan ishima vihim kpishi zum u m ungwa mliam vem kua akaaôron ne kpaa yô. 
Nehemiah5:7 Tsô m hen ken ishima yam, nahan m zôhô a mbatamen man mbatarev, m kaa a ve mer: Ne mba nan injô hiden ngohol mtser karen ikaa inya, hanmô wen hen anmgbian u nan. Tsô m lôhô ior mkohol u vesen sha kwagh ve la." 
Nehemiah5:8 M kaa a ve, mer: Se yô, sha mfetyô wase yô, se paa anmgbianev asev Mbayuda, mba lu i tee ve atôatyev yam la; man ne yô, gema ne mba teen anmgbianev enev; nahan doo u ve̱ tee ayol a ve, se se̱ yama? Tsô ve huan ving, ve kera fa kwagh u vea kaa ga." 
Nehemiah5:9 Man shi m kaa mer: Kwagh u ne eren ne a doo ga; guda u ne zenden ne cian Aôndo wase sha ci u iheen i atôatyev, mbaihomov asev la gaa?" 
Nehemiah5:10 Mo kpaa a anmgbianev av man mbatomov av, se lu nan ve injô i inyar man i uyia; yô, sé shi de nen injô ne." 
Nehemiah5:11 Yô, shi hide nen ve a ishule ve nyian, ishule ve i ikon i wain, man ishule ve i ikon i olev kua uya vev man shi ci môm ken mbaaci deri u inyaregh vegh man i iyiav man u wain kua u mkure, mba lu ne ngohol her a ve la." 
Nehemiah5:12 Tsô ve kaa er: Sé hide ve a mi, sé kera ker ma kwagh hen ve ga; sé er er u kaa nahan vough. Nahan m yila upristi, m kaa a ve mer, ve̱ bum er vea er sha ityendezwa ne." 
Nehemiah5:13 Shi m nduur riga wam, m kaa mer: Kape hanma or u nan er sha ityendezwa ne ga yô, Aôndo Una nduur nan ken ya u nan kua tom u nan kera ne; kape á nduur nan nana hingir aveve la. Tsô, ior cii kaa er: Amen! Shi ve wuese TER. Nahan ior er sha ityendezwa ne." 
Nehemiah5:14 Man shi hii sha iyange i i verem gomna ve ken tar u Yuda la, hii sha inyom i sha ikundu la je zan zan ar sha inyom i sha ikundugber kar uhar i tor Artashaseta la, ka anyom pue kar ahar je la, mo vea anmgbianev av se ya kwaghyan u gomna ga." 
Nehemiah5:15 Kpa ugomna mba ve vande teman a mo yô, ve yuhwan ior ikav, ve ngohol bredi man wain her a ve, man shi azurfa ushekel akunduahar; mbatomov vev kpaa lu eren tahav sha ior; kpa mo yô, m er nahan ga, sha ci u cian Aôndo." 
Nehemiah5:16 Shi m taver ishima sha tom u gilgar ne kpaa, se yam ma inya kpuaa kpaa ga; mbatomov av cii kpaa ve kohol sha tom la." 
Nehemiah5:17 Man shi Mbayuda mbagenev man mbatarev, ior deri môm man akunduahargber, kua shi mba ve due ken atôatyev a a kase se, ve va her a vese la, ve yaan kwaghyan hen tebul wam." 
Nehemiah5:18 Kwagh u i sôngo sha iyange i môm yô, lu bua môm man uicighanmbaiyôngov ataratar kua ikegh kpaa; i sôngo a sha inyaregh yagh; man ayange a karen pue yô, i va a hanma inja i wain kpishi; nahan kpaa m za iyol mer, i̱ nam kwaghyan u gomna ga, sha ci u ican lu eren ior mban yum." 
Nehemiah5:19 Umbur mo sha kwagh u dedoo, Aôndo wam, sha akaa a m er sha ci u ior mban cii." 
Nehemiah6:1 Tsô zum u i za ôr Sambalati man Tobia man Geshem Orarabia kua mbaihomov asev mbagenev er m maa gil cii, ian kera shi ga yô, nahan kpaa hen shighe la, m lu a zer ucivir sha ihindagar ga." 
Nehemiah6:2 Nahan Sanbalati man Geshem tindi loho her a mo, kaa er: Va sé zua ken gar ugen ken agar a ken gbulumaa u Ono. Kpa ve lu wan ishima u eren mo kwagh u bo." 
Nehemiah6:3 Nahan m tindi mbatyomov her a ve, m kaa mer: M ngu eren zegetom, nahan me fatyô u van ga; inja na nan man á timbir tom shighe u me undu u, me va hen a vene?" 
Nehemiah6:4 Ve tindi loho her a mo kuma kwa nyiin je sha imbagbenda ne; mo di kpaa m lu kaan ve imo i môm la tsô. 
Nehemiah6:5 Tsô Sanbalati tindi wanakiriki na her a mo er keke nahan, ka u sha kwa taan je la, a washika u ivegher sha uwe;" 
Nehemiah6:6 i nger kimi er: Mba ôron ken atôatyev, Gashemu kpaa ngu ôron, er we kua Mbayuda, ka ne ka hendan kwagh, ka nahan je man u maan gil ye; man we yô, hange u ka teman tor ve, kape i lu ôron la." 
Nehemiah6:7 Shi u ver uprofeti sha u teren we ken Yerusalem, er: Tor ngu ken Yuda; nahan yô, á za pase tor akaaôron ne. Yô, va ase, sé nenge sha kwagh ne." 
Nehemiah6:8 Tsô m tindi un a loho, m kaa mer: Akaa a u kaa a la cii, i er a nahan ga, kpa ka ken ishima you tsô u hen a ye." 
Nehemiah6:9 Gadia ve cii, lu ve ka tan se mciem iyol, ve lu kaan er: Ave a̱ kpe ve sha tom la, je á kera er u ga. Yô, shi taver mo ave!" 
Nehemiah6:10 Tsô er m za hen ya u Shemaia wan u Delaia, wan u Mehetabel, u i wuhe un la yô, a kaa er: Yô, sé zua ken iyou i Aôndo, ken tempel, sé wuhe ihinda i tempel, gadia mba van sha u va wuan we, vea va tugh, vea va wua u." 
Nehemiah6:11 Kpa m kaa mer: Or er mo nahan kpaa nana yevese kwagh ha? Man shi ka hanma or er mo nahan, nana nyôr ken tempel, man nana lu uma here? Me nyôr ga." 
Nehemiah6:12 Tsô m kav er i lu Aôndo A tindi un ga yô, kpa a ôrom kwaghôron u profeti a kwaghbo ishima, gadia Tobia man Sanbalati ve ôr tôndo a na." 
Nehemiah6:13 I ôr tôndo a na, sha u m̱ cia, m̱ er nahan, m̱ er kwaghbo, sha u vea zua a ityôkwagh i wan mo acôghol iyol, sha u vea heem yô." 
Nehemiah6:14 Aôndo wam, umbur Tobia man Sanbalati sha aeren a ve ne, man profeti u kwase Noadia kua uprofeti mbagenev, mba i lu ve ka tan mo mciem iyol la." 
Nehemiah6:15 Tsô i bee gilgar sha uwer u Elul ayange a u ikundu kar utaan, kohol ayange cii kuma akunduahargber kar ahar je." 
Nehemiah6:16 Zum u mbaihomov asev cii ungwa nahan yô, atôatyev a a kase se cii, cier a iyol, iyol kpe ve, ve ure, gadia ve kav er tom ne, i lu sha agee a Aôndo wase i er u ye." 
Nehemiah6:17 Man shi sha ayange la, mbatamen mba Mbayuda tindi uwashika kpishi hen Tobia, man uwashika mba Tobia kpaa lu nyôron hen ve." 
Nehemiah6:18 Gadia ior mbagenev kpishi ken Yuda ve bum a na, gadia a lu wankem u Shekania wan u Ara; man wan na Yehohanan kpaa er wan u Meshulam wan u Berekia." 
Nehemiah6:19 Man shi ve ter aeren a na a dedoo sha ishigh yagh, man ve ôr un kwaghôron wam kpaa. Tobia kpaa tindi uwashika sha u tan mo mciem iyol." 
Nehemiah7:1 Tsô zum u i maa gilgar, man m zer ucivir, man i ver mbakuranhunda man mbawanatsam kua Mbalevi kpaa yô," 
Nehemiah7:2 m ver anngôm Hanani, kua Hanania, orvesen u nengen sha iyou i utya, mer, ve̱ nengen sha Yerusalem; gadia a lu or u jighjigh, shi a cian Aôndo, a hemba ior mbagenev kpishi." 
Nehemiah7:3 M kaa a ve mer: I̱ de gbe bughun ihinda i Yerusalem ga, saa iyange i̱ vande kôndon ve; man er ve tile ve lu kuran la je, i̱ wuhe ihinda; man senda nen i sha itiran; ver mbagenev mba ve tem ken Yerusalem la, ve̱ lu mbakuran, hanmô sha ijiir i nan i kuran, man hanmô kpaa sha ishigh ki ya u nan." 
Nehemiah7:4 Gar yô, gbanger man kehe, kpa ior mba ker yô, lu kpuaa tsô, i lu a maa ayou ga." 
Nehemiah7:5 Tsô Aôndo wam tesem ken ishima er, m̱ kohol mbatamen man mbatarev kua ior, sha u ngeren icombor ve. Nahan m zua a takerada u icombor i mba ve vande van la, man m nenge i nger kimi er:" 
Nehemiah7:6 Mban ka ônov mba ken tar la, mba ve mough ve due ken kwar, mba iyange i kura ve i yem a mi uikangen la, mba Nebukadinesar tor u Babilon lu kura la, mba ve hide ken Yerusalem kua Yuda, hanma or hen gar u nan;" 
Nehemiah7:7 mba ve va a Serubabel man Yeshua, Nehemia, Asaria, Raamia, Nahamani, Mordekai, Bilshan, Misepereti, Bigevai, Nehum man Baana imôngo la. Iyenge i nomsombaiorov mba Iserael yô:" 
Nehemiah7:8 Ônov mba Paroshi lu dubu uhar man deri man akunduatargber kar uhar. 
Nehemiah7:9 Ônov mba Shefatia lu deri utar man akunduatargber kar uhar. 
Nehemiah7:10 Ônov mba Ara lu deri ataratar man akunduahargber kar uhar. 
Nehemiah7:11 Ônov mba Pahati-Moabi, mba ken ônov mba Yeshua man Yoabi, lu dubu uhar man deri anigheni man pue kar anigheni." 
Nehemiah7:12 Ônov mba Elam lu dubu man deri uhar man akunduahargber kar unyiin. 
Nehemiah7:13 Ônov mba Satu, lu deri anigheni man akunduahar kar utaan." 
Nehemiah7:14 Ônov mba Sakai lu deri utaankaruhar man akunduatar. 
Nehemiah7:15 Ônov mba Binui lu deri ataratar man akunduahar kar anigheni. 
Nehemiah7:16 Ônov mba Bebai lu deri ataratar man ikundu kar anigheni. 
Nehemiah7:17 Ônov mba Asegadi lu dubu uhar man deri utar man ikundu kar uhar. 
Nehemiah7:18 Ônov mba Adonikam lu deri ataratar man akunduatar kar utaankaruhar. 
Nehemiah7:19 Ônov mba Bigevai lu dubu uhar man akunduatar kar utaankaruhar. 
Nehemiah7:20 Ônov mba Adin lu deri ataratar man akunduahargber kar utaan. 
Nehemiah7:21 Ônov mba Ater u Hesekia lu akunduanyiingber kar anigheni. 
Nehemiah7:22 Ônov mba Hashum lu deri utar man ikundu kar anigheni. 
Nehemiah7:23 Ônov mba Besai lu deri utar man ikundu kar unyiin. 
Nehemiah7:24 Ônov mba Hariv lu deri man pue kar uhar. 
Nehemiah7:25 Ônov mba Gibeon lu akunduanyiingber kar utaan. 
Nehemiah7:26 Ior mba Betelehem man Netofa lu deri môm man akunduanyiin kar anigheni. 
Nehemiah7:27 Ior mba Anatoti lu deri môm man ikundu kar anigheni. 
Nehemiah7:28 Ior mba Bete-asemaveti lu akunduahar kar uhar. 
Nehemiah7:29 Ior mba Kiriati-yearim man Kefira man Beeroti lu deri utaankaruhar man akunduahar kar utar. 
Nehemiah7:30 Ior mba Rama man Geba lu deri ataratar man ikundu kar môm. 
Nehemiah7:31 Ior mba Mikemashi lu deri môm man ikundu kar uhar. 
Nehemiah7:32 Ior mba Betel man Ai lu deri môm man ikundu kar utar. 
Nehemiah7:33 Ior mba Nebo ugen la lu akunduahargber kar uhar. 
Nehemiah7:34 Ônov mba Elam ugen la, lu dubu môm man deri uhar man akunduahargber kar unyiin." 
Nehemiah7:35 Ônov mba Harim lu deri utar man ikundu. 
Nehemiah7:36 Ônov mba Yeriko lu deri utar man akunduahar kar utaan. 
Nehemiah7:37 Ônov mba Lodi man Hadidi man Ono lu deri utaankaruhar man ikundu kar môm. 
Nehemiah7:38 Ônov mba Senaa lu dubu utar man deri utaankarunyiin man ikundugber. 
Nehemiah7:39 Upristi yô: ônov mba Yedaia, hen ya u Yeshua lu deri utaankarunyiin man akunduatargber kar utar;" 
Nehemiah7:40 ônov mba Imer lu dubu môm man akunduahargber kar uhar; 
Nehemiah7:41 ônov mba Pashur lu dubu môm man deri uhar man akunduahar kar utaankaruhar; 
Nehemiah7:42 ônov mba Harim lu dubu môm man pue kar utaankaruhar. 
Nehemiah7:43 Mbalevi yô: ônov mba Yeshua u Kademiel u ken ônov mba Hodeva lu akunduatargber kar unyiin. 
Nehemiah7:44 Mbawanatsam yô: ônov mba Asav lu deri man akunduahar kar anigheni. 
Nehemiah7:45 Mbakuranhunda yô, ônov mba Shalum, ônov mba Ater, ônov mba Talmon, ônov mba Akubi, ônov mba Hatita, ônov mba Shobai, lu deri môm man ikundugber kar anigheni." 
Nehemiah7:46 Mbasôrontempel yô: ônov mba Shiha, ônov mba Hasufa, ônov mba Tabaoti," 
Nehemiah7:47 ônov mba Keroshi, ônov mba Shia, ônov mba Padon," 
Nehemiah7:48 ônov mba Lebana, ônov mba Hagaba, ônov mba Salemai," 
Nehemiah7:49 ônov mba Hanan, ônov mba Gidel, ônov mba Gahar," 
Nehemiah7:50 ônov mba Reaia, ônov mba Reshin, ônov mba Nekoda," 
Nehemiah7:51 ônov mba Gasam, ônov mba Usa, ônov mba Pasea," 
Nehemiah7:52 ônov mba Besai, ônov mba Meunim, ônov mba Nefusheshim," 
Nehemiah7:53 ônov mba Bakebuki, ônov mba Hakufa, ônov mba Harhur," 
Nehemiah7:54 ônov mba Baseliti, ônov mba Mehida, ônov mba Harsha," 
Nehemiah7:55 ônov mba Barkoshi, ônov mba Shisera, ônov mba Tema," 
Nehemiah7:56 ônov mba Neshia, ônov mba Hatifa." 
Nehemiah7:57 Ônov mba mbatomov mba Solomon yô, lu: ônov mba Sotai, ônov mba Sofereti; ônov mba Perida," 
Nehemiah7:58 ônov mba Yaala, ônov mba Darkon, ônov mba Gidel," 
Nehemiah7:59 ônov mba Shefatia, ônov mba Hatil, ônov mba Pokereti-hasebaim, ônov mba Amon." 
Nehemiah7:60 Kohol mbasôrontempel cii man ônov mba mbatomov mba Solomon yô, lu ior deri utar man akunduanyiingber kar uhar." 
Nehemiah7:61 Mba ve mough ve due ken Tel-mela man Tel-harsha man Kerubi man Adon man Imer, kpa ve fatyô u pasen uya mba uter vev man tsombor ve, er ve lu mba Iserael ga yô, ka:" 
Nehemiah7:62 ônov mba Delaia, ônov mba Tobia, ônov mba Nekoda, ve lu ior deri ataratar man akunduahar kar uhar." 
Nehemiah7:63 Ken upristi yô: ônov mba Hobaia, ônov mba Hakoshi, ônov mba Barshilai (a er kwase ken ônkasev mba Barshilai Orgileadi, maa i yila un sha iti ve)." 
Nehemiah7:64 Mban yô, ve ker ape i nger tsombor ve ken mba i nger ve ken takerada u icombor ve la, kpa i tser a mi ga; ka nahan man i ver ve ken mba lun wang ga ye, i rumun ve ken tom u pristi kpaa ga." 
Nehemiah7:65 Gomna kaa a ve er, ve̱ de ye icighankwaghyan la ga, saa iyange i pristi u nan lu a Urim man Tumim nana lu." 
Nehemiah7:66 Iyenge i ior cii lu dubu akunduahar kar uhar man deri utar man akunduatar; 
Nehemiah7:67 i wa mbatomov vev mba nomso man mba kasev ker ga; ve yô, ve lu ior dubu utaankaruhar man deri utar man ikundugber kar utaankaruhar; man shi ve lu a mbawanatsam deri uhar man akunduahar kar utaan, lu nomso man kasev." 
Nehemiah7:68 Anyinya ve lu deri utaankaruhar man ikundugber kar ataratar; mbaalfadari vev lu deri uhar man akunduahar kar utaan; 
Nehemiah7:69 urakumi vev lu deri unyiin man ikundugber kar utaan; ujaki vev lu dubu ataratar man deri utaankaruhar man ikundu. 
Nehemiah7:70 Mbavesen mbagenev mba sha uya mba uter na kwagh sha ci u tom la. Gomna na inyaregh: zenaria kuma udariki dubu, atasa akunduahargber, man akondo a upristi deri utaan man ikundugber." 
Nehemiah7:71 Man shi mbavesen mbagenev mba sha uya mba uter na inyaregh sha ci u tom la; zenaria kuma udariki dubu ikundu, azurfa umina dubu uhar man deri uhar." 
Nehemiah7:72 Man kwagh u ior mbagenev ve na yô, lu: zenaria kuma udariki dubu ikundu, man azurfa umina dubu uhar, man akondo a upristi akunduatar kar ataankarahar." 
Nehemiah7:73 Nahan upristi kua Mbalevi man mbakuranihinda man mbawanatsam man ior mbagenev man mbasôrontempel kua Iserael cii ve za tema ken agar a ve la. Er uwer u sha utaankaruhar due yô, ônov mba Iserael lu ken agar a ve." 
Nehemiah8:1 Tsô ior cii kohol ishima i môm hen tembe u sha ishigh ki Hundagar u Mnger la; ve kaa a Esera, orngeren la er, a̱ va a ruamabera u atindi a Mose a TER wa Iserael la." 
Nehemiah8:2 Tsô pristi Esera va a atindi sha ishigh ki mkohol u ior, nomso man kasev, kua ior mba ve fatyô u ungwan kaven cii, sha uwer u sha utaankaruhar sha iyange i hiihii la." 
Nehemiah8:3 A ôr kimi hen tembe u sha ishigh ki Hundagar u Mnger la, hii pepe je zan zan iyange sha tembe, sha ishigh ki nomso man kasev man mba ve fetyô u ungwan kaven yô; ior cii ver ato sha ruamabera u atindigh la." 
Nehemiah8:4 Esera orngeren la tile sha daar u ikon u ve er sha ci u kwagh la yô; Matitia man Shema man Anaia man Uria man Hilkia kua Maaseia ve tile ikua a na, ken uwegh nagh ku yanegh; man ken uwegh nagh ku imesegh yô, lu Pedaia man Mishael man Malkiya man Hashum man Hashebadana man Sekaria kua Meshulam." 
Nehemiah8:5 Tsô Esera bugh ruamabera la sha ashe a ior cii; gadia a tile a kar ior cii sha; er a bugh un yô, ior cii mough tile sha." 
Nehemiah8:6 Tsô Esera sugh TER, Aôndo u hemban. Ior cii rumun er: Amen, Amen! Ve naregh ave ve sha; ve gure ve civir TER, ve kuma ishiv inya." 
Nehemiah8:7 Man Yeshua man Bani man Sherebia, Yamin, Akubi, Shabetai, Hodia, Maaseia, Kelita, Asaria, Yosabadi, Hanan, Pelaia kua Mbalevi, ve pase ior atindi la; ior tile sha hen ajiir a ve je." 
Nehemiah8:8 Man ve ôr ken uruamabera, ken atindi a Aôndo la, wanger wanger, ve pase inja i a kpaa, sha u ior ve̱ kav kwaghôron la yô." 
Nehemiah8:9 Tsô Nehemia u a lu gomna la, man pristi Esera orngeren, man Mbalevi mba ve tesen ior, ve kaa a ior cii er: Nyian ka icighaniyange i TER, Aôndo wen; yô, de kera zungu nen ga, de kera vaan nen kpaa ga. Gadia ior cii lu vaan er ve ungwa akaaôron a atindi la yô." 
Nehemiah8:10 Shi a kaa a ve er: Gba yemen nen tsô, za ya nen tar, ma nen kwaghnyohon, tindi nen mba i er kwagh sha ci ve ga la a kwar; gadia nyian ka icighaniyange i TER wase je, ishima i̱ de kera vihin ne ga; gadia iember i ne ember TER la ka agee a en je." 
Nehemiah8:11 Mbalevi yange ior cii er ve̱ huan, ve kaa er: Huan nen, gadia iyange ne ka icighaniyange je; asema a̱ de vihin ne ga." 
Nehemiah8:12 Tsô ior hembe yem cii, sha u vea za ya kwagh, vea ma kwagh, man sha u vea tindi a kwar hen mbagenev, shi vea ember kpishi, gadia ve kav akaaôron a i pase ve la." 
Nehemiah8:13 Sha iyange i sha uhar la yô, mbavesen mba sha uya mba uter mba ior cii, man upristi kua Mbalevi ve kohol hen Esera orngeren, sha u vea ver ato sha akaaôron a atindigh yô." 
Nehemiah8:14 Ve nenge i nger ken atindi er TER kaa Mose er Mbaiserael ve̱ tema ken atumbe, sha ayange a iniongo i sha uwer u sha utaankaruhar la;" 
Nehemiah8:15 man ve̱ yôô, shi ve̱ tindi loho hen agar a ve cii kua ken Yerusalem kpaa er: Due, za nen sha iwo, za tôô nen agbaa a olev man agbaa a olev u ken toho man agbaa a mirtel man andar a avile kua agbaa a ikon i wan ahu kpishi sha u eren atumbe er i nger nahan." 
Nehemiah8:16 Tsô ior due, za va a mi, ve va er atumbe a ve a mi, hanmô sha hav mbu iyou i nan man sha ityembe ve, man sha ityembe i iyou i Aôndo, tembe u hen Hundagar u Mnger kua sha tembe u hen Hundagar u Eferaim la." 
Nehemiah8:17 Tsô mkohol u ior mba ve hide ken kwar cii, ve er atumbe, ve tema ken a; gadia hii sha ayange a Yeshua wan u Nun la je ar sha iyange ne, Mbaiserael lu a er nahan ga. Nahan iember lu her kpishi." 
Nehemiah8:18 Man ayange ayange, hii sha iyange i hiihii je zan zan ar sha iyange i masetyô la, a lu ôron ken ruamabera u atindigh u Aôndo. Ve er iniongo la ayange ataankarahar; iyange i sha anigheni la yô, lu icighanmkohol sha tindi." 
Nehemiah9:1 Tsô sha iyange i sha ikundu kar unyiin i uwer ne yô, Mbaiserael kohol, ve hôr kwaghyan a ajav a ikondo iyol man inya sha ityouv vev." 
Nehemiah9:2 Tsombor u Iserael kem ayol a ve a atôatyev cii, ve tile sha, ve pase asorabo a ve, kua aferakaa a uter vev." 
Nehemiah9:3 Á pav iyange atôôn anyiin yô, tiôn môm ve tile sha hen ajiir a ve, ve ôr ken ruamabera u atindigh u TER, Aôndo ve la, shi tiôn ugen ken atôôn anyiin la, ve pase akaabo a ve, ve sôn TER, Aôndo ve." 
Nehemiah9:4 Tsô Yeshua man Bani, Kademiel, Shebania, Buni, Sherebia, Bani man Kenani, ve va tile sha agbur a unden mi, a Mbalevi la, ve genger imo taver taver, ve sôn TER, Aôndo ve." 
Nehemiah9:5 Tsô Mbalevi: Yeshua man Kademiel, Bani, Hashabeneia, Sherebia, Hodia, Shebania kua Petahia, ve kaa er: Mough, tile nen sha, wuese nen TER, Aôndo wen, hii sha uicôronmbaashighev zan zan gbem sha won; i̱ wuese iti You i iengem i i gande iwuese kua icivir cii inya la." 
Nehemiah9:6 We U ngu TER, We tseegh; We U er Sha man shi Sha u a lu sha la a ikum ve cii, tar kua akaa a a lu shin u kpaa man uzegembamngerev man akaa a a lu shimi cii, U koson a cii; ikum i Sha kpaa ngi civir We." 
Nehemiah9:7 We U ngu TER, Aôndo u U tsough Aberam, U dugh a na ken Ur u Mbakaldi man U ii un iti Wer Aberaham." 
Nehemiah9:8 U zua un a ishima i jighjigh sha ishigh You man shi U tôndo zwa a na kpaa, Wer, Ú na un tar u Mbakanaan man Mbahiti man Mbaamor man Mbaperishi man Mbayebushi kua Mbagirgashi, Ú na tsombor na je; man shi U er sha kwaghôron Wou vough, gadia We U ngu u perapera." 
Nehemiah9:9 Man U nenge ican i uter asev ken Igipiti man U ungwa mliam vem hen kpe u Zegemnger u Nyian kpaa; 
Nehemiah9:10 man U tese uivande man akaa a kpilighyol sha Farao man mbayev nav cii, kua ior mba hen tar na cii; gadia U fa, ve manger sha uter asev; nahan U due iti, er i lu nyian nahan." 
Nehemiah9:11 U tôndo zegemnger sha ishiv vev, nahan ve kar sha tareghnyaagh her atô u zegemnger; mbatôvon ve angahar yô, U gbihi ve shin iv, er ka iwen shin zegemnger nahan." 
Nehemiah9:12 Man shi U hemen ve sha ityôgh ki ibeenegh atetan man sha ityôgh ki usugh tugh, sha u nan ve iwanger sha gbenda u vea za yô." 
Nehemiah9:13 Shi U sen sha uwo u Senai, U ôr kwagh a ve Sha, U na ve akaaôron a jirigh a jighilii, man atindiakaa a mimi man akaawan a dedoo kua atindi;" 
Nehemiah9:14 U pase ve icighaniyange i memen You man U wa ve atindi man akaawan kua atindiakaa sha ikev i wanakiriki Wou Mose; 
Nehemiah9:15 U na ve kwaghyan u Sha kpaa, sha ci u ijen ve, man U due ve a mngerem ken vande sha ci u imura ve, U kaa a ve Wer, ve̱ nyôr, ve̱ ngohol tar u U kende uwegh Ough sha Wer, Ú na ve la." 
Nehemiah9:16 Kpa ve, uter asev, ve er kwagh sha imanger, ve nômbo ikôr, ve ver ato sha atindi a Ou ga," 
Nehemiah9:17 ve venda u ungwa kwagh, ve umbur akaa a kpilighyol a Ou a U er hen ve la ga, kpa ve nômbo ikôr; sha mhendan ve la je, ve ver orhemen ugen sha u vea hide vea za lu ikpan her. Kpa U ngu Aôndo u den asorabo, U mgbough a mrumun u sha mhôôn man mhôônom ma zungwen man ishima i wan kua erdoo wuee, U gbihi ve kera ga." 
Nehemiah9:18 Een, je yô, shighe u ve haa wanbua la, ve kaa er: Ngun ka Aôndo wou u A dugh a we ken tar u Igipiti je ne, man ve er kwagh u ndôhôrshima kpishi," 
Nehemiah9:19 nahan kpaa sha mhôônom Ou ma zungwen kpishi yô, U undu ve ken desereti ga; ityôgh ki ibeenegh kpaa kar sha ityouv vev kera ga, sha u hemen ve gbenda atetan, man ityôgh ki usugh kpaa kar kera ga, sha u tesen ve iwanger man gbenda u vea zaan a mi tugh yô." 
Nehemiah9:20 Man shi U na ve Jijingi Wou u dedoo Wer, A̱ tesen ve, U nyume ve mana Wou ken zwa ve ga, U na ve mngerem sha ci u imura ve." 
Nehemiah9:21 Een, anyom akunduahar je, U lu koson ve ken desereti, kwagh ban ve ga; akondo a ve bee iyol ga, angahar a ve kpaa mura ga." 
Nehemiah9:22 Man shi U na ve ityartor kua akuraior, U kar kwar sha ityar ve; nahan ve ngohol tar u Shihon, ka tar u tor u Heshebon je la, man tar u Ogo tor u Bashan." 
Nehemiah9:23 U seer ve ônov ngee er asan a Sha nahan, U nyôr a ve ken tar u U kaa a uter vev Wer, vea nyôr vea ya u la." 
Nehemiah9:24 Kape ônov mban nyôr, ya tar ne, man U gema ior mba ve tema ken tar la hingir sha ikev ve, ka Mbakanaan je la, U na ve sha ikev ve a utor vev imôngo, kua akuraior a tar la, sha u ve̱ er a ve sha ishima ve yô." 
Nehemiah9:25 Ve ngohol agar a lun a ugil kua tar u doon iyiagh, ve ngohol uya mba mgboughon a akaa a dedoo man azôr a ombon mngerem shimi a i time a shin avande man ishule i ikon i wain man ishule i olev kua ikon ngôgh i umen atam; ve ya kwagh kuma ve, ve kehe, kpe ve iyol sha iveren You i vesen." 
Nehemiah9:26 Nahan kpaa ve hemba ato, ve hendan a We, ve gbihi atindi a Ou ken ijime, ve wua uprofeti Ou mba ve pase ve ibo ve, sha u hiden a ve her a We la, ve er akaa a ndôhôrshima kpishi." 
Nehemiah9:27 Nahan U na ve sha ikev i mbaihomov vev Wer, ve̱ er ve ican; kpa zum u ican er ve man ve vaa a We yô, U ungwa ve Sha; sha mhôônom Ou ma zungwen kpishi la, U na ve mbayiman, ve yima ve sha ikev i mbaihomov vev." 
Nehemiah9:28 Kpa er ve zua a mmem kera yô, shi ve er kwaghbo sha ishigh You, nahan U na ve sha ikev i mbaihomov vev Wer, ve̱ ya tor sha a ve; nahan kpaa zum u ve hide ve zamber a We yô, U ungwa ve Sha; acin imôngo je U yima ve sha mhôônom Ou ma zungwen;" 
Nehemiah9:29 shi U pase ve ibo ve, sha u hiden a ve hen atindi a Ou; nahan kpaa ve er kwagh sha ityough ki kehen, ve ver ato sha atindi a Ou ga, kpa ve er kwaghbo, ve laha ajiraôron a Ou, a or nana wa a iko yô, nana lu uma sha a la, ve yoghol akende, ve nômbo ikôr, ve venda u ungwa." 
Nehemiah9:30 Anyom kpishi je U lu wan ishima a ve, U pase ve ibo ve sha Jijingi Wou, sha akaaôron a uprofeti Ou; nahan kpaa ve rumun ve ver ato ga; ka nahan man U gema ve U na sha ikev i akuraior a ken tar la." 
Nehemiah9:31 Nahan kpaa sha mhôônom Ou ma zungwen yum la, U tim ve ci ca ga, man shi U undu ve kera ga; gadia U ngu Aôndo u mgboughon a mrumun u sha mhôôn man mhôônom ma zungwen." 
Nehemiah9:32 Yô, Aôndo wase, u hemban, u ageegh, u cier iyol, u wan ikuryan man erdoo iko; ican ne cii i̱ de luun kwagh u kiriki sha ishigh You ga, ican i i tser se a utor asev man atiator a ase man upristi asev man uprofeti asev man uter asev kua ior Ou cii la, hii sha ayange a utor mba Ashiria je zan zan nyian ne." 
Nehemiah9:33 Nahan kpaa U ngu a ishô sha akaa a a tser se la cii; gadia U er ieren i mimi, kpa se yô, se er ifer;" 
Nehemiah9:34 utor asev man atiator a ase man upristi asev kua uter asev kpaa, ve wa atindi a Ou iko ga, ve ver ato sha atindi a Ou kua mbampase Ou kpaa ga, mba U we ve kwagh sha mi la." 
Nehemiah9:35 Gadia ve civir We ken tar ve ga, man sha iveren You i vesen i U ver ve a mi la kpaa ga, man ken tar u vesen u doon sule u U na ve la kpaa ga, man shi ve gema ishima, ve undu aeren a ve a bo kpaa ga." 
Nehemiah9:36 Nyian yô, se mba ikpan, man tar u U ne uter asev Wer ve̱ ya atam a u man ahôm a u ne, nenge, se mba ikpan ken u je." 
Nehemiah9:37 Man ngu nan utor mba U ver sha a vese sha ci u asorabo a ase la, mtsera kpishi; man mba yan tor sha ayol a ase kua sha uzendenya asev kpaa, sha asema a ve je; se yô, kwagh tsule se kpishi." 
Nehemiah9:38 Nahan se mba yan ikur i mimi, se mba ngeren i je; mbahemenev asev kua upristi asev mba veren ikav sha mi." 
Nehemiah10:1 Mba ve ver ikav yô, lu: Gomna Nehemia wan u Hakalia man Sedekia," 
Nehemiah10:2 Seraia, Asaria, Yeremia," 
Nehemiah10:3 Pashur, Amaria, Malkiya," 
Nehemiah10:4 Hatushi, Shebania, Maluki," 
Nehemiah10:5 Harim, Meremoti, Obadia," 
Nehemiah10:6 Daniel, Gineton, Baruki," 
Nehemiah10:6 Daniel, Gineton, Baruki," 
Nehemiah10:7 Meshulam, Abiya, Miyamin," 
Nehemiah10:8 Maashia, Bilgai, Shemaia; ka upristi je la." 
Nehemiah10:9 Mbalevi yô, lu: Yeshua wan u Asania, Binui u ken ônov mba Henadadi, Kademiel;" 
Nehemiah10:10 kua anmgbianev vev: Shebania, Hodia, Kelita, Pelaia, Hanan," 
Nehemiah10:11 Mika, Rehobi, Hashabia," 
Nehemiah10:12 Sakur, Sherebia, Shebania," 
Nehemiah10:13 Hodia, Bani, Beninu." 
Nehemiah10:14 Uityombaiorov yô, lu: Paroshi, Pahati-moabi, Elam, Satu, Bani," 
Nehemiah10:15 Buni, Asegadi, Bebai," 
Nehemiah10:16 Adoniya, Bigevai, Adin," 
Nehemiah10:17 Ater, Hesekia, Asur," 
Nehemiah10:18 Hodia, Hashum, Besai," 
Nehemiah10:19 Hariv, Anatoti, Nebai," 
Nehemiah10:20 Magepiashi, Meshulam, Heshir," 
Nehemiah10:21 Meshesabel, Sadoki, Yadua." 
Nehemiah10:22 Pelatia, Hanan, Anaia," 
Nehemiah10:23 Hoshea, Hanania, Hashubi," 
Nehemiah10:24 Haliheshi, Pilha, Shobeki," 
Nehemiah10:25 Rehum, Hashebena, Maaseia," 
Nehemiah10:26 Ahia, Hanan, Anan," 
Nehemiah10:27 Maluki, Harim man Baana." 
Nehemiah10:28 Man ior mbagenev, upristi man Mbalevi man mbakuranihinda man mbawanatsam man mbasôrontempel kua mba ve kem ayol a ve a ior mba ken ityar la sha u kuran atindi a Aôndo yô, kasev vev man ônov vev mba nomso man mba kasev, hanmô u nan kom u ungwan kwagh kaven yô," 
Nehemiah10:29 ve var a anmgbianev vev kua mbatamen vev, ve zua zwa ve tseva zwa, shi ve bum er vea zende sha atindiakaa a Aôndo, a i na sha ikev i Mose wanakiriki u Aôndo la, shi vea wa atindi a TER, Ter wase, cii iko, vea er sha mi, kua akaaôron a Na a jirigh man akaawan a Na kpaa;" 
Nehemiah10:30 mayange sé kera na ônov asev mba kasev hen ior mba ken tar ne ga, man shi mayange sé er ônov vev mba kasev sha ci u ônov asev mba nomso ga;" 
Nehemiah10:31 man aluer ior mba ken tar ne vea va a ikav mbi teen shin hanma injakwaghyan sha iyange i memen sha u teen yô, sé yam a ve sha iyange i memen ga, shin sha ma icighaniyange kpaa ga; man hanma inyom i sha utaankaruhar la sé tsôr sule, shi sé kera yar ma injô kpaa ga." 
Nehemiah10:32 Shi se zua zwa ayol a ase, sé na vegher môm u ken avegher atar a shekel hanma inyom sha ci u tom u iyou i Aôndo wase;" 
Nehemiah10:33 sha ci u ubredi mba sha ishi, man nagh ku sha samuyia ku ayange ayange, man nagh ku nanden ku ayange ayange, man ku sha ayange a memen man sha iwer i he, man sha ci u uiniongo, man sha ci u uicighanmbaakaav, man iniav mbi asorabo sha u wamen sha ci u Iserael, man sha ci u tom u iyou i Aôndo wase cii." 
Nehemiah10:34 Man se, upristi man Mbalevi kua ior mbagenev sé er ishor sha u fan mba vea naan ikon i van a mi ken iyou i Aôndo wase yô, sha uya mba uter asev, sha ashighe a i ver sha anyom anyom la, sha u nanden sha atse a nanden nagh sha mi a TER, Aôndo wase, er i nger ken atindiakaa nahan." 
Nehemiah10:35 Shi se tôndo zwa u van a iyiagh ki tsutswagh ki ishule yase, man atam a tsutswa a hanma injakon, anyom anyom, ken iyou i TER;" 
Nehemiah10:36 man shi ônov asev mba iundav mba nomso kua mba uzendenya asev er i nger ken atindiakaa nahan, man ônov mba iundav mba abua a ase, man mba iyôngo yase, sé va a mi hen you i Aôndo wase, hen upristi mba ve eren tom ken iyou i Aôndo wase;" 
Nehemiah10:37 man sé va a mwem asem ma geran ma hem, man iniav yasev mbi nan la, man atam a hanma injakon, man wain man mkurem, hen upristi, ken ayou a koson akaa ker a ken iyou i Aôndo wase; man sé va a môm-ken-upue u ishule yase hen Mbalevi; gadia Mbalevi vea ngohol môm-ken-upue sha agar a se kahan sule cii." 
Nehemiah10:38 Pristi wan u Aron una lu a Mbalevi imôngo, zum u Mbalevi vea ngohol môm-ken-upue yô, shi Mbalevi vea tsuwa môm-ken-upue u umôm-ken-upue mba akaav la, vea va a mi hen iyou i Aôndo wase, ken ukpar mba ken iyou i koson akaa ker la." 
Nehemiah10:39 Gadia Mbaiserael man Mbalevi vea va a iniav mbi alakema man wain man mkurem, hen ayou, henpe ikav mbi icighanjiir, man upristi mba ve eren tom la, man mbakuranhunda kua mbawanatsam ve lu yô; mayange sé kera gbihi iyou i Aôndo wase ga." 
Nehemiah11:1 Atiator a ior tema ken Yerusalem; ior mbagenev yô, ve er ishor sha u tsuwan or môm ken mbapuev er nana̱ va tema ken Yerusalem, icighangar la, mba utaankarunyiin yô, ve̱ tema ken agar agen." 
Nehemiah11:2 Tsô ior wuese mba ve rumun u za teman ken Yerusalem sha asema ve la cii. 
Nehemiah11:3 Mban ka mbahemenev mba hen ipaventar la, mba ve za tema ken Yerusalem la; kpa ken agar a Yuda yô, hanma or nan tema ken ya u nan ken agar a ve: Iserael man upristi man Mbalevi man mbasôrontempel kua ônov mba mbatomov mba Solomon." 
Nehemiah11:4 Ken Yerusalem yô, ônov mba Yuda mbagenev tema ker, kua ônov mba Benyamin kpaa. Ken ônov mba Yuda yô, lu: Ataia wan u Ushia, wan u Sekaria, wan u Amaria, wan u Shefatia, wan Mehalalel, ken ônov mba Perese;" 
Nehemiah11:5 man Maaseia wan u Baruki, wan u Kolhose, wan u Hasaia, wan Adaia, wan u Yoyaribi, wan u Sekaria, wan u Orshilo." 
Nehemiah11:6 Ônov mba nomso mba Perese cii, mba ve tema ken Yerusalem yô, lu ior deri unyiin man akunduatar kar anigheni, anomaior a ageegh." 
Nehemiah11:7 Ônov mba nomso mba Benyamin yô lu: Salu wan u Meshulam, wan u Yoedi, wan u Pedaia, wan u Kolaia, wan u Maaseia, wan u Itiel, wan u Yeshaia." 
Nehemiah11:8 Ken ijime na yô, lu Gabai man Salai, lu ior deri utaankarunyiin man ikundu kar anigheni." 
Nehemiah11:9 Yoel wan u Shikeri lu ornengen sha a ve; Yuda wan u Hasenua lu or u sha uhar u nengen sha gar la. 
Nehemiah11:10 Ken upristi yô, lu: Yedaia, wan u Yoyaribi man Yakin man" 
Nehemiah11:11 Seraia wan u Hilkia wan u Meshulam, wan u Sadoki, wan u Merayoti, wan u Ahitubi, orhemen u nengen sha iyou i Aôndo," 
Nehemiah11:12 man anmgbianev vev mba ve lu eren tom u iyou la, lu ior deri anigheni man ikundu kar uhar; man Adaia wan u Yeroham, wan u Pelalia, wan u Amshi, wan u Sekaria, wan u Pashur, wan u Malkiya," 
Nehemiah11:13 man anmgbianev nav, uityombaiorov mba sha uya mba uter, lu ior deri uhar man akunduahar kar uhar; man Amashai wan u Asarel, wan u Ahasai wan u Meshilemoti, wan u Imer," 
Nehemiah11:14 man anmgbianev vev, anomaior a ageegh, lu ior deri man ikundu kar anigheni; ornengen sha a ve yô, lu Sabediel, wan u Hagedolim." 
Nehemiah11:15 Ken Mbalevi yô, lu Shemaia wan u Hashubi, wan u Aserikam, wan u Hashabia, wan u Buni;" 
Nehemiah11:16 man Shabetai man Yosabadi, mba uhar ken uityombaiorov mba Mbalevi, mba ve lu nengen sha tom u iyou i Aôndo u ken won la;" 
Nehemiah11:17 man Matania, wan u Mika, wan u Sabedi, wan u Asav, u a lu orhemen sha u hiin ishughun ken msen yô, kua Bakebukia, un lu orhemen u sha uhar ken anmgbianev nav; man Abeda wan u Shamua, wan u Galal, wan u Yedutun." 
Nehemiah11:18 Mbalevi mba ken icighangar cii yô, lu ior deri uhar man akunduanyiin kar unyiin." 
Nehemiah11:19 Man shi mbakuranhunda yô, lu Akubi man Talmon kua anmgbianev vev mba ve lu kuran ihinda la, lu ior deri man akunduatargber kar uhar." 
Nehemiah11:20 Mba ve shi ken Iserael man ken upristi man Mbalevi yô, ve lu ken agar a Yuda cii, hanmô hen dyako u nan." 
Nehemiah11:21 Kpa mbasôrontempel yô, tema ken Ofel; Shiha man Gisepa lu nengen sha mbasôrontempel." 
Nehemiah11:22 Ornengen sha Mbalevi ken Yerusalem yô, lu: Ushi wan u Bani, wan u Hashabia, wan u Matania, wan u Mika, ken ônov mba Asav mba ve wan atsam la, sha ci u tom u iyou i Aôndo." 
Nehemiah11:23 Gadia tor kaa imo sha kwagh ve, man shi i ver tindi u taver sha ci u mbawanatsam, sha ci u gbayol ve u ayange ayange." 
Nehemiah11:24 Man Petahia wan u Meshesabel, u ken ônov mba Sera, wan u Yuda, lu angahar a tor sha akaa cii sha ci u ior." 
Nehemiah11:25 Sha kwagh u agar man akôngo a ve yô, ônov mba Yuda mbagenev tema ken Kiriati-arba kua agar a na, man ken Dibon kua agar a na, man ken Yekabeseel man agar a na;" 
Nehemiah11:26 man ken Yeshua, man ken Molada, man Bete-peleti;" 
Nehemiah11:27 man ken Hasar-shual, man ken Bersheba kua agar a na;" 
Nehemiah11:28 man ken Shikelagi, man ken Mekona, man agar a na;" 
Nehemiah11:29 man ken En-rimon, man ken Sora, man ken Yarmuti," 
Nehemiah11:30 Sanoa, Adulam man agar a ve, Lakishi man akôngo a na, Aseka man agar a na; ve haa afo, hii hen Bersheba zan zan ar hen pev u Hinom." 
Nehemiah11:31 Ônov mba Benyamin kpaa tema ken Geba zan zan za ar hen Mikemashi man Aiya man hen Betel a agar a na; 
Nehemiah11:32 hen Anatoti, Nobu, Anania," 
Nehemiah11:33 Hasor, Rama, Gitaim," 
Nehemiah11:34 Hadidi, Seboim, Nebalati," 
Nehemiah11:35 Lodi, man Ono, Pev u mbafan tom u aveegh la." 
Nehemiah11:36 Man Mbalevi yô, ikwe ve igen ken Yuda i magh i a Benyamin." 
Nehemiah12:1 Upristi kua Mbalevi mba ve kôndo a Serubabel wan u Shealtiel, man Yeshua imôngo yô, ka: Seraia, Yeremia, Esera," 
Nehemiah12:2 Amaria, Maluki, Hatushi," 
Nehemiah12:3 Shekania, Rehum, Meremoti," 
Nehemiah12:4 Ido, Ginetoi, Abiya," 
Nehemiah12:5 Miyamin, Maadai, Bilga," 
Nehemiah12:6 Shemaia, Yoyaribi, Yedaia," 
Nehemiah12:7 Salu, Amoki, Hilkia, Yedaia; mban lu mbahemenev mba upristi man mba anmgbianev vev sha ayange a Yeshua la." 
Nehemiah12:8 Man shi Mbalevi yô, lu: Yeshua, Binui, Kademiel, Sherebia, Yuda, man Matania u a lu orhemen sha atsam a wuese la, un a anmgbianev nav," 
Nehemiah12:9 Bakebukia man Uno, anmgbianev vev mbala lu sha ishigh vegh sha iniongo ve i sha tom ve." 
Nehemiah12:10 Yeshua mar Yoyakim, Yoyakim gema mar Eliashibi, Eliashibi gema mar Yoyada," 
Nehemiah12:11 Yoyada gema mar Yonatan, Yonatan gema mar Yadua." 
Nehemiah12:12 Sha ayange a Yoyakim la, upristi mba ve lu mbavesen mba sha uya mba uter yô, u hen Seraia lu Meraia; u Yeremia lu Hanania;" 
Nehemiah12:13 u Esera lu Meshulam; u Amaria lu Yehohanan; 
Nehemiah12:14 u Maluki lu Yonatan; u Shebania lu Yosev; 
Nehemiah12:15 u Harim lu Adena; u Merayoti lu Helkai; 
Nehemiah12:16 u Ido lu Sekaria; u Gineton lu Meshulam; 
Nehemiah12:17 u Abiya lu Shikeri; u Miniamin u Moadia la, lu Piltai;" 
Nehemiah12:18 u Bilga lu Shamua; u Shemaia lu Yehonatan; 
Nehemiah12:19 u Yoyaribi lu Matenai; u Yedaia lu Ushi; 
Nehemiah12:20 u Salai lu Kalai; u Amoki lu Eber; 
Nehemiah12:21 u Hilkia lu Hashabia; u Yedaia lu Netanel. 
Nehemiah12:22 Sha kwagh u Mbalevi yô, sha ayange a Eliashibi man Yoyada man Yohanan man Yadua, i nger mba vesen sha uya mba uter kua upristi kpaa zan zan ar sha ayange a tor Dariu, Orpershia, la." 
Nehemiah12:23 I nger ônov mba Levi, mbavesen mba sha uya mba uter ken ruamabera u abaver zan zan ar sha ayange a Yohanan wan u Eliashibi." 
Nehemiah12:24 Mbahemenev mba Mbalevi yô, lu: Hashabia, Sherebia man Yeshua wan u Kademiel; anmgbianev vev lu sha ishigh vegh, sha u wuese man u sughun sha ikaan i Davidi or u Aôndo sha iniongo iniongo." 
Nehemiah12:25 Matania man Bakebukia, Obadia, Meshulam, Talmon man Akubi, ve lu mbakuranihinda, ve lu kuran ayou a koson ikav ker, a hen ihinda la." 
Nehemiah12:26 Mban lu sha ayange a Yoyakim wan u Yeshua, wan u Yosadaki, man sha ayange a gomna Nehemia, man pristi Esera, orngeren la." 
Nehemiah12:27 Tsô sha shighe u mtsegh u gilgar u Yerusalem la yô, ve ker Mbalevi sha ajiir a ve cii, sha u van a ve ken Yerusalem sha u va ember mtsegh la, a iember man sha ishughun kua atsam a wan man sha ukwen man mbaadiguve kua umolo." 
Nehemiah12:28 Tsô ônov mba mbawanatsam kohol imôngo, ve due hen tar u u kase Yerusalem la, man hen angarev mba Mbanetofati kpaa," 
Nehemiah12:29 man hen Betegilgal man hen akôngo a Geba man Asemaveti; gadia mbawanatsam maa agar a ve, kase Yerusalem yisa." 
Nehemiah12:30 Upristi kua Mbalevi wanger ayol a ve; shi ve wanger ior man ihindagar kua gilgar kpaa. 
Nehemiah12:31 Nahan m unde a atiator a Yuda sha gilgar, m ver ior iniongo ihiar i vesen i wan atsam a wuese, ve zan sha nongo nongo; nongo u môm lu zan sha gilgar vegher u sha uwegh ku yanegh hen Hundagar u Ihôgh;" 
Nehemiah12:32 ken ijime ve yô, Hoshaia man vegher u atiator a Yuda dondo," 
Nehemiah12:33 man Asaria, Esera man Meshulam," 
Nehemiah12:34 Yuda, Benyamin, Shemaia man Yeremia," 
Nehemiah12:35 man ônov mba upristi mbagenev a ikor: Sekaria wan u Yonatan, wan u Shemaia, wan u Matania, wan u Mikaia, wan u Sakur, wan u Asav;" 
Nehemiah12:36 kua anmgbianev nav, Shemaia, Asarel, Milalai, Gilalai, Maai, Netanel, Yuda man Hanani, ve lu a ityogholov mbi Davidi or u Aôndo; Esera orngeren lu ve sha hemen." 
Nehemiah12:37 Hen Hundagar u Imbor ve kôndo sha ishigh vegh jighilii sha agbur a unden zan sha gar u Davidi, hen ijiir i unden sha gilgar hen ya u Davidi, zan zan ar hen Hundagar u Mnger vegher u sha ityoughkitaregh." 
Nehemiah12:38 Nongo ugen u wan atsam a wuese la, lu zan sha u za keghen ve gbenda, mo kpaa m dondo ve a vegher u ior sha gilgar sha gôgôyou u taven u atsegh zan zan ar sha gilgar u gbanger la je;" 
Nehemiah12:39 man sha Hundagar u Eferaim man Hundagar u Tse man Hundagar u Ishu man gôgôyou u taven u Hananel man gôgôyou u taven u Hamea kpaa, zan zan ar hen Hundagar u Iyôngo; hen Hundagar u Orkuran yô, ve tile her." 
Nehemiah12:40 Nahan iniongo ihiar i wan atsam a wuese tile ken iyou i Aôndo, mo kpaa kua vegher u mbatarev a mo imôngo;" 
Nehemiah12:41 man shi upristi: Eliakim, Maaseia, Miniamin, Mikaia, Elioenai, Sekaria man Hanania, ve lu a ikor;" 
Nehemiah12:42 man Maaseia man Shemaia man Eleasar man Ushi man Yehohanan man Malkiya man Elam man Eser. Mbawanatsam genger imo, a Yeserahia orhemen ve." 
Nehemiah12:43 Ve na iniav kpishi sha iyange la, ve ember; gadia Aôndo na ve ve ember zegeiember; kasev kua mbayev kpaa ve lu ember; nahan i ungwa iember i Yerusalem ca je." 
Nehemiah12:44 Sha iyange la i ver ior sha u nengen sha ayou a koson akaa ker, ka iniav mbi kenden sha, man iyiav mbi tsutswav, man môm-ken-upue mba akaav, man sha u ve̱ kohol akaa ker a i tsough a ken ishule i agar sha ci u upristi kua Mbalevi sha tindi la, gadia Yuda ember sha ci u upristi kua Mbalevi mba ve til sha tom la." 
Nehemiah12:45 Ve wa tindi u Aôndo ve iko, man tindi u wanger akaa, kape mbawanatsam kua mbakuranhunda kpaa ve er sha imo i Davidi man i wan na Solomon la." 
Nehemiah12:46 Gadia hii sha ayange a Davidi man Asav, tsuaa la je, orhemen u mbawanatsam lu, kua atsam a wuese man a sughun Aôndo kpaa." 
Nehemiah12:47 Sha ayange a Serubabel man sha ayange a Nehemia la, Iserael lu nan mbawanatsam man mbakuranhunda kwar sha gbayol ve u hanma iyange je; ve tsegha akaa sha ci u Mbalevi, Mbalevi di kpaa gema tsegha sha ci u ônov mba Aron." 
Nehemiah13:1 Tsô sha iyange la, ve ôr ken ruamabera u Mose sha ato a ior; i nger kimi er, or u Amon man or u Moabi nana̱ de nyer ken mkohol u ior mba Aôndo mayange je ga;" 
Nehemiah13:2 gadia ve kegh Mbaiserael gbenda a kwaghyan man mngerem ga, ve gema ve ôr tôndo a Balaam er a̱ wa ve ifan; kpa Aôndo wase gema ifan la hingir iveren." 
Nehemiah13:3 Tsô zum u ve ungwa atindi yô, ve sange ior mba ve lu nungwa nungwa mbala cii ken Iserael kera." 
Nehemiah13:4 Tsuaa la, pristi Eliashibi u i ver un sha u nengen sha ukpar mba ken iyou i Aôndo wase, er a lu anmgbian u Tobia yô," 
Nehemiah13:5 a sôr un zegekpar henpe ngise ve koson iniav mbi sha samuyia man kwaghhumandoon man ikav man môm-ken-upue u alakema man wain man mkurem, akaa a i na Mbalevi man mbawanatsam man mbakuranhunda sha tindi, kua iniav mbi kenden sha sha ci u upristi la." 
Nehemiah13:6 Kpa sha shighe la cii, m lu ken Yerusalem ga; gadia sha inyom i sha ikundugber kar uhar i Artashaseta tor u Babilon la, m za hen tor; man ayange nga kar yô, m sôn tor ian," 
Nehemiah13:7 tsô m va hen Yerusalem. Nahan m va kav kwaghbo u Eliashibi er la, er a sôr iyou hen kungur u iyou i Aôndo sha ci u Tobia yô." 
Nehemiah13:8 Ishima vihim kpishi, nahan m kura ikav mbi ken iyou i Tobia cii, m haa mbi ken won;" 
Nehemiah13:9 shi m kaa mer, ve̱ wanger ayou la; shi m hide a ikav mbi iyou i Aôndo her, man iniav mbi sha samuyia kua kwaghhumandoon." 
Nehemiah13:10 Shi m nenge er i lu nan Mbalevi kwar ve ga yô, nahan Mbalevi man mbawanatsam, ve mba ve lu eren tom la, ve yevese, hanma or yem hen sule u nan." 
Nehemiah13:11 Nahan m zôhô a mbatarev, m kaa mer: Ka nyi i gbihi iyou i Aôndo nahana? Tsô m kohol ve imôngo m hide a ve sha tom ve." 
Nehemiah13:12 Nahan Yuda cii, va a môm-ken-upue u alakema man u wain man u mkurem, va ver ken ayou a koson akaa ker la." 
Nehemiah13:13 Man m ver mba nengen sha akaa a a lu ken ayou a koson akaa ker la, lu pristi Shelemia man orngeren Sadoki; man ken Mbalevi yô, lu Pedaia. Or u wasen ve yô, lu Hanan wan u Sakur wan u Matania, gadia i nenge ve ve lu mba jighjigh; tom ve yô, lu u karen anmgbianev vev kwar." 
Nehemiah13:14 Umbur mo Aôndo wam sha kwagh ne, de esen aeren a am a dedoo a m er sha ci u iyou i Aôndo wam kua sha ci u ityom i i la kpaa kera ga." 
Nehemiah13:15 Sha ayange la je, m nenge ior mbagenev ken Yuda mba ve lu shoghol atam a wain ken ahungwa sha iyange i memen, shi ve lu nyôron a aile a alakema ve penda a sha ujaki, kua wain man atam a wain man a tur man hanma injauika kpaa, ve va a mi ken Yerusalem sha iyange i memen; nahan m pase ve ibo ve sha iyange i ve lu teen kwaghyan la." 
Nehemiah13:16 Ior mba Tiru mbagenev kpaa mba ve tema ker, ve va a ishu kua hanma injauika i kasua, ve lu va teen sha iyange i memen hen Mbayuda ken Yerusalem je." 
Nehemiah13:17 Nahan m zôhô a mbatamen mba Yuda, m kaa a ve mer, ka nyi kwaghbo ne eren ne, ne hôngor iyange i memen nahana?" 
Nehemiah13:18 Kape uter enev lu er je ne man Aôndo wase kpaa va a ican ne cii sha a vese man sha gar ne kpaa gaa? Nahan kpaa ne seer iyugh sha Iserael er ne hôngor iyange i memen ne. 
Nehemiah13:19 Tsô zum u ime hii u wan hen ihindagar i Yerusalem, er iyange i memen lu a kuma ga yô, m kaa mer, i̱ wuhe ihindagar, man shi m kaa mer, i̱ de kera bughun i ga, saa iyange i memen ia bee kera ve; shi m ver mbatomov av mbagenev sha u nengen sha ihinda sha u i̱ de kera nyer a ikav her sha iyange i memen ga yô." 
Nehemiah13:20 Nahan mbakasuav man mbateen kasua u hanma injauika la, ve va tsa ken akôngo a Yerusalem kwa môm shin kwar har." 
Nehemiah13:21 Tsô m yange ve, m kaa a ve mer, ka nyi ne tse hen kpe u gilgara? Aluer né shi né er nahan yô, me de ne ga. Hii hen shighe la je zan zan ve kera seer van sha iyange i memen ga." 
Nehemiah13:22 Shi m kaa a Mbalevi mer, ve̱ wanger ayol a ve, ve̱ va, ve̱ va kura ihindagar, sha u tseghan iyange i memen. Umbur mo Aôndo wam sha kwagh ne kpaa, man shi tsegham sha erdoo Wou u U lu a mi yum la." 
Nehemiah13:23 Sha ayange la kpaa, shi m nenge Mbayuda mba ve er kasev ken Ashedodi man ken Amon kua ken Moabi;" 
Nehemiah13:24 ônov vev mbagenev lu lamen zwa u Ashedodi, ve fatyô u ôron zwa u Mbayuda ga, saa di zwa u ma ikur igen la tsô." 
Nehemiah13:25 Nahan m zôhô a ve, m wa ve ifan, m gbidye mbagenev, m gbera ve ice, m er ve ve bum Aôndo, m kaa mer: De kera ne nen ônov enev mba kasev ner, ônov vev mba nomso ve̱ er ga, man shi de kera eren nen ônov vev mba kasev sha ci u ônov enev mba nomso ga, shin sha ci wen ayol a en kpaa ga." 
Nehemiah13:26 Kera lu sha akaa ne man Solomon tor u Iserael er kwaghbo gaa? Ken akuraior kpishi ma tor ugen kuma sha a na ga, man un doo Aôndo ishima kpaa, Aôndo kpaa ver un tor sha Iserael cii, nahan kpaa kasev mba akuraior agen na un a er kwaghbo." 
Nehemiah13:27 Nahan er se ungwa ser ne er zegekwaghbo ne cii, ne per tindi u Aôndo wase, ne er kasev mba akur agen, doo je kpa?" 
Nehemiah13:28 Wan ugen u Yoyada, wan u zegepristi Eliashibi, lu wankem u Sanbalati, Orhoron; nahan m zenda u her a mo kera."
