Nehemiah13:29 Umbur ve Aôndo wam, gadia ve hôngor tom u upristi kua ikuryan i upristi man i Mbalevi." 
Nehemiah13:30 Kape m wanger ve, m pav ve a atôatyev cii la, shi m ver iniongo i tom i upristi man Mbalevi, hanma or sha tom u nan," 
Nehemiah13:31 man shi u van a ikon sha ashighe ashighe, kua iyiav mbi tsutswav kpaa. Umbur mo Aôndo wam, verem, doo doo." 
Esther1:1 Tsô sha ayange a Ahasueru (ka Ahasueru shon u a tema tor hii hen India je, zan zan ar hen Etiopia la, sha uipaven deri man ikundu kar utaankaruhar);" 
Esther1:2 sha ayange la, er tor Ahasueru tema sha ikônough nagh ki torough, ki ki lu ken garutya u Shushan la," 
Esther1:3 sha inyom i sha utar i tor na la, a er atiator a na iniongo kua mbatomov nav cii; ikumutya i Pershia man Media, ashagbaior kua atiator a ken uipaven mba, tile un sha ishi;" 
Esther1:4 a tese mngee u akaa a tor na man iengem i icivir i mhembe na, ayange kpishi je, kuma ayange deri man akunduanyiin." 
Esther1:5 Er ayange la bee yô, tor er iniongo sha ci u mba ve lu ken garutya u Shushan cii, mbavesen kua mbakiriki, ayange ataankarahar, sha tembe u sule u ikon u hen iyou i tor la." 
Esther1:6 I har akondo agen sha, a pupuu man a lun ikôn ikôn kua a kwel, i kange a sha ikor i sha mou u pupuu man mou u nyian dindee sha ikunya i azurfa man sha mtôm ma sha iwen i mabel; ugambe mba teman sha mi lu mba zenaria man azurfa, i ver ve sha tembe u i we u awen a nyian man a pupuu man a ayaikure kua a ir." 
Esther1:7 Ve na ve kwaghman shin ayongo a zenaria, ayongo la lu atô kposo kposo, man wain u tor kpaa kpishi, sha inja i tor." 
Esther1:8 Mme la kpaa lu sha tindi, i kighir or ga; gadia tor kaa mbahemenev mba hen ya na cii, ve̱ er a hanma or sha ishima i nan." 
Esther1:9 Shi Vaseti pendatyo u tor kpaa a er kasev iniongo ken iyou i tor i Ahasueru la. 
Esther1:10 Tsô sha iyange i ataankarahar la, er ishima i tor lu saan saan sha msôr yô, a kaa Mehuman man Biseta man Harbona man Bigeta man Abageta man Setar kua Karkashi, ka mbatomov mba ken iyou i tor, mba utaankaruhar mba ve lu eren tor Ahasueru tom je la, er," 
Esther1:11 ve̱ za va a Vaseti pendatyo u tor la, sha ishigh ki tor a idyer i tor, sha u tesen ior kua atiator mdooashe na; gadia a doo u kenger." 
Esther1:12 Kpa Vaseti, pendatyo u tor la, venda imo i tor, i mbatomov mba ken iyou i tor va kaa un la, a za ga; nahan ishima vihi tor je, lu yeghen a yegh." 
Esther1:13 Tsô tor ôr kwagh a mbafankwagh mba fan ashighe, gadia kape i vaan a akaa a tor sha ishigh ki mbafan atindi kua ijirôron la;" 
Esther1:14 mba ve dondo sha a na yô, lu: Karshena, Shetar, Ademata, Tarshishi, Merese, Marsena man Memukan, ka atiator a ataankarahar a Pershia man Media, mba ve kenger tor sha ishi je la, shi ka ve, ve tema mbahemenev mba hii hii ken tartor na ye, a pine ve er:" 
Esther1:15 Sha tindi yô, sé er nan a Vaseti pendatyo u tor er a er sha imo i tor Ahasueru sha zwa u mbatomov mba ken iyou i tor mban ga nee?" 
Esther1:16 Nahan Memukan gema kaa sha ishigh ki tor man atiator a na er: Vaseti, pendatyo u tor er tor kwaghbo tseegh ga, kpa ka atiator cii kua ior mba ve lu sha uipaven mba tor Ahasueru cii." 
Esther1:17 Gadia kwagh u pendatyo u tor a er ne una gba kasev cii ker ato, nahan noov vev vea hingir ve kwagh u lahan, aluer a samber a gwa er: Tor Ahasueru kaa er, Vaseti pendatyo na a̱ va sha ishigh nagh, kpa a vende u van yô." 
Esther1:18 Nyian je ashagbaukase a Pershia man Media aa ungwa kwagh u pendatyo u tor a er ne, nahan vea ôr kwagh ne a atiator a tor cii, nahan yô, iheen kua ishima i vihin ia mough taveraa." 
Esther1:19 Aluer tor a nenge a doo un nahan yô, tindi a̱ due hen tor, man i̱ nger un ken atindi a Mbapershia man Mbamedia, sha u i̱ de gem un ga, er Vaseti a̱ de kera shi ve sha ishigh ki tor Ahasueru mayange ga; man shi tor a̱ gema icivir na la, a̱ na kwase ugen u nan hembe un yô." 
Esther1:20 Tsô zum u á yôô tindi u tor u una wa ken tartor na cii la yô, gadia u vese, kasev cii vea civir noov vev, á hii sha mba vesen zan zan á ar sha mba kiriki je." 
Esther1:21 Kwaghôron la doo tor kua atiator; nahan tor er sha imo i Memukan la; 
Esther1:22 a tindi uwashika sha uipaven mba tor cii, hen hanma ipaven sha mnger u i je, man hen hanma ikurior sha zwa u i, a nger er, hanma orya nana̱ nengen sha ya u nan, shi nana̱ ôron kwagh sha zwa u ityô i nan." 
Esther2:1 Ken masejime u akaa ne, er ishimanyoon i tor Ahasueru la pever yô, a umbur Vaseti kua kwagh u a er, man ijir i i ôr un la kpaa." 
Esther2:2 Nahan mbayev mba tor, mba ve eren un tom la, kaa er: I̱ ker tor anuunaukase a doon ashe;" 
Esther2:3 shi tor a̱ ver mbatomov sha uipaven mba tartor na cii, ve̱ kohol anuunaukase a doon ashe cii, i̱ va a ve hen garutya u Shushan, ken ya u ukase, yô i̱ wa ve sha ikev i Hegai or u a eren tom ken iyou i tor a kor kasev la; i̱ na ve akaa a ishin iyol;" 
Esther2:4 yô, iniunkwase i ia doo tor la, ia hingir pendatyo u tor sha ityough ki Vaseti. Nahan kwaghôron la doo tor, maa a er nahan je." 
Esther2:5 Oryuda ugen lu ken garutya u Shushan, iti na er Mordekai wan u Yair, wan u Shimei, wan u Kishi, Orbenyamin," 
Esther2:6 u i due a na ken Yerusalem a mbakwarev mba i kura ve i yem a ve a Yekonia tor u Yuda imôngo la, mba Nebukadinesar tor u Babilon lu kura ve yem a ve la." 
Esther2:7 A koso Hadasa, ka Eseter je la, lu wan u anngô u ter na, gadia a lu a ter shin ngô kpaa ga; wankwase la kuma ashe, dooashe kpaa; er ter na man ngô na ve kpe yô, Mordekai tôô un hingir wan na." 
Esther2:8 Tsô zum u i ungwa ikaan i tor man tindi na kpaa yô, i kohol ônkasev kpishi ken garutya u Shushan sha ikev i Hegai; nahan Eseter kpaa i za a na ken ya u tor za lu sha ikev i Hegai or u kuran kasev la." 
Esther2:9 Iniunkwase la doo un, a er a na doo doo, nahan a na un akaa a ishin iyol fese je, man akaayan a doon, kua anuunaukase ataankarahar, a i tsuwa a tsuwa a ken ya u tor sha ci na; tsô a tôô un a mbayev nav mba kasev mbala a za a ven ken ijiir i hemban doon ken ya u ukase la." 
Esther2:10 Eseter pase nongo na shin tsombor na kpaa ga, gadia Mordekai ta un icin er a̱ de pasen ga." 
Esther2:11 Hanma iyange kpaa Mordekai a due a tera hen tembe u iyou i ukase, sha u una fa er Eseter a lu yô, man er kwagh na una za yô." 
Esther2:12 Er shighe u hanma iniunkwase kuma u ia nyôr hen tor Ahasueru er i vande eren a i sha tindi u ukase la, iwer pue kar ihiar yô, gadia kape ayange ve a sôron iyol kighir la: iwer ataratar lu sha mkurem ma mire, man iwer ataratar lu sha akaahumandoon kua akaa agen a ishin iyol, a ukase;" 
Esther2:13 zum u a kuma u iniunkwase ia za hen tor yô, hanma kwagh u a sar i u tôôn hen ya u ukase zan a mi hen iyou i tor yô, i na i." 
Esther2:14 Iyange ia been yô, i nyôr, pepe yô, i hide i za hen iyou i ukase i sha uhar sha ikev i Shaashigashi or u a eren tom ken iyou i tor a kuran kasev mba sha uika yô; nan kera hide hen tor ga, saa u nan doo tor ishima man á yila nan sha iti i nan ye." 
Esther2:15 Zum u shighe u Eseter wan u Abihail, anngô u ter u Mordekai u a tôô un a hingir wan na la, kuma u una nyôr hen tor yô, a ker ma kwagh ga saa kwagh u Hegai or u a eren tom ken iyou i tor a kor kasev la, vande veren yô. Eseter kuman mba ve nenge a na cii ishima." 
Esther2:16 Nahan i nyôr a Eseter hen tor Ahasueru ken iyou i tor sha uwer u sha pue, ka uwer u Tebeti je la, sha inyom i sha utaankaruhar i tor na." 
Esther2:17 Eseter doo tor ishima hemba kasev mbala cii, doo un a na, a kuma un ishima hemba anuunaukase agen la cii; nahan maa a cir un idyer i tor sha ityou, a ver un pendatyo sha ityough ki Vaseti." 
Esther2:18 Tsô tor er atiator a na zegeiniongo kua mbatomov nav cii, ka iniongo i Eseter je la; a na uipaven iyange i memen, shi a na iwua sha inja i tor." 
Esther2:19 Zum u shi i kohol anuunaukase la yô, Mordekai tema lu hen hunda u tor." 
Esther2:20 Yô, Eseter lu a pase tsombor na shin ior nav kpaa ga, er Mordekai ta un icin nahan; gadia Eseter ungwan imo i Mordekai her, er sha shighe u a lu sha ikev na la nahan." 
Esther2:21 Sha ayange la, er Mordekai tema hen hunda u tor yô, mbaerentom ken iyou i tor, ior ihiar, ka Bigetan kua Tereshi mbakuranhunda, asema vihi ve, nahan ve lu nôngon u wuan tor Ahasueru." 
Esther2:22 Kpa Mordekai ungwa kwagh ve la nahan a pase Eseter pendatyo u tor, Eseter di gema pase tor ken iti i Mordekai." 
Esther2:23 Er i time sha kwagh la, man i zua di a mi nahan yô, i sende ve uhar cii sha kon; man i nger kwagh ve ken ruamabera u abaver a utor sha ishigh ki tor." 
Esther3:1 Ken masejime u akaa ne yô, tor Ahasueru na Haman wan u Hamedata, Oragagu la, hemen, a kende un sha, a ver un ikagh ki teman hemba atiator a a lu a na imôngo cii." 
Esther3:2 Mbatomov mba tor cii, mba ve lu hen hundaya u tor la, ve ngurum, ve civir Haman; gadia kape tor wa tindi sha kwagh na la. Kpa Mordekai yô, ngurum ga, kuma ishigh inya kpaa ga." 
Esther3:3 Nahan mbatomov mba tor mba ve lu hen hundaya u tor la, ve kaa a Mordekai er: Ka nyi u peren tindi u toro?" 
Esther3:4 Tsô er ve zer ôron a na ayange ayange, kpa a wa ve iko ga yô, nahan ve kaa Haman, sha u vea nenge er Mordekai shi una hemba yô, gadia a vande kaan ve er un lu Oryuda yô." 
Esther3:5 Er Haman nenge Mordekai ngurum ga, man kuma ishigh inya kpaa ga yô, ishima nyoon Haman kpishi." 
Esther3:6 Kpa u benden Mordekai ave tseegh yô, lu un kwagh u iheenegh; gadia ve pase un nongo u Mordekai. Nahan Haman gba nôngon u timin Mbayuda kera cii, mba ve lu ken tar u Ahasueru la cii, ka nongo u Mordekai je la." 
Esther3:7 Sha uwer u hiihii, ka uwer u Nisan je la, sha inyom i sha pue kar uhar i tor Ahasueru la, ve haa Pur, ka ishor i eren je la, sha ishigh ki Haman, ayange ayange, sha uwer uwer zan zan ar sha uwer u sha pue kar uhar, ka uwer u Adar je la." 
Esther3:8 Tsô Haman kaa a tor Ahasueru er: Ikurior igen ngi; ngi saratete, paleghaa, ken akuraior a a lu ken uipaven mba tar wou cii, atindi a ve nga kposo a hanma ikurior, mba we atindi a tor iko kpaa ga, nahan doo u tor á gba den ve nahan ga." 
Esther3:9 Aluer tor a rumun yô, i̱ nger kwagh i̱ tim ve kera; yô, me na azurfa kuma utalenti dubu pue sha ikev i mbaerentom u tor la, sha u ve̱ seer un sha inyaregh ki tor yô." 
Esther3:10 Tsô tor tsuwa kunya ken uwegh nagh, na Haman wan u Hamedata, Oragagu, orihom u Mbayuda la." 
Esther3:11 Tsô tor kaa a Haman er: Azurfa la yô, m na u, kua ior mbala kpaa, er a ve sha ishima you." 
Esther3:12 Nahan i yila mbangeren mba tor sha uwer u hiihii ayange a u pue kar utar la, nahan i nger akaa a Haman kaa la cii, i tindi hen mbatarev mba tor, man hen ungomna mba ve lu sha hanma ipaven kua hen atiator a hanma ikurior kpaa, hen hanma ipaven sha mnger na, man hen hanma ikurior kpaa sha zwa u i; ka ken iti i tor Ahasueru i nger a ye, shi i ver ikav sha mi, sha kunya u tor kpaa." 
Esther3:13 I tindi uwashika mbala sha ikev i mbatyomov sha uipaven mba tor cii, er, i̱ wua, i̱ tim Mbayuda kera cii, mbayevikaior man mbabeenyol, mbayev mba kiriki man kasev, sha iyange i môm, ka sha uwer u sha pue kar uhar ayange a u pue kar atar la, ka uwer u Adar je la; shi ve̱ kura akaa a ve, ve̱ ya ishar." 
Esther3:14 I kaa ken kwaghngeren la er, i̱ wa tindi sha hanma ipaven, i̱ yôô ken akuraior cii, sha u ve̱ wa ago iyol sha ci u iyange la yô." 
Esther3:15 Tsô mbatyomov mbala za fefa sha imo i tor, i yôô tindi la hen garutya u Shushan kpaa; tsô tor vea Haman tema u man kwagh; kpa gar u Shushan yô, nzughul." 
Esther4:1 Tsô zum u Mordekai fa akaa a i er la cii yô, Mordekai ande akondo a na, ta mzemba uya, haa mtwem iyol, a kar hen atô gar a gbehe kwelegh tsung;" 
Esther4:2 a za va hen hunda u ya u tor je; kpa ma or nyôron hen hunda u tor a mzemba uya ga. 
Esther4:3 Ken hanma ipaven henpe ikaan i tor man tindi na ve ar yô, mzungu lu kpishi ken Mbayuda, kua kwaghyan u hôron man mliam man kwelegh kpaa; man mbagenev kpishi yav sha aba man sha mtwe." 
Esther4:4 Ônkasev mba Eseter man mbaeren un tom ken iyou ve va, ve va ôr un, nahan ishima vihi pendatyo u tor kpishi, tsô a tindi ikondo er i̱ za haa Mordekai i̱ sagh un mzemba uya kera, kpa a venda u ngohol i." 
Esther4:5 Nahan Eseter yila Hataki, u môm ken mbaerentom ken iyou i tor u i ver un er a̱ nengen sha a na la, a kaa a na er a̱ za hen Mordekai, a̱ za fa kwagh shon la man inja na kpaa." 
Esther4:6 Tsô Hataki due za hen Mordekai hen zegetembe u gar u a lu sha ishigh ki hunda u ya u tor la. 
Esther4:7 Tsô Mordekai ôr un kwagh u a tser un cii, man inyaregh ki Haman a tende zwa er una na ki i̱ seer ki sha inyaregh ki tor la, sha u timin Mbayuda cii." 
Esther4:8 Shi a na un takerada u i kura tindi u i wa ken Shushan sha u timin ve la ker yô, er a̱ za tese Eseter man a̱ pase un inja na kpaa; man shi a̱ kaa un er, a̱ za nyôr hen tor a̱ zamber a na man a̱ sôn un sha ci u nongo na kpaa." 
Esther4:9 Tsô Hataki va, va ôr Eseter kwaghôron u Mordekai la." 
Esther4:10 Nahan Eseter ôr kwagh a Hataki, gema tindi un a loho hen Mordekai, er:" 
Esther4:11 Mbatomov mba tor cii, man ior mba sha uipaven mba tor ve fa er hanma or, shin nomsoor shin kwase, u i yer nan ga yô, u nana gba nyôron hen tor hen tembe u ken atô la, ijir i nan ngi môm tsô, ka u wuan nan, saa or u tor una naregh nan tôgh ku zenaria la, ka nan tseegh nana war ye; kpa hegen ka ayange ikundugber je ne, mba a yilam er m̱ nyôr hen tor ga." 
Esther4:12 Tsô ve za ôr Mordekai kwaghôron u Eseter la nahan. 
Esther4:13 Nahan Mordekai kaa er, ve̱ hide, ve̱ za kaa Eseter nahan, er: De henen wer, we ú war hen ya u tor, man Mbayuda mbagenev cii yô, ve̱ saa ga." 
Esther4:14 Gadia aluer u huan ving hen shighe ne yô, iwasen man myom una va hen Mbayuda hen ma ijiir igen, kpa we a ya u teru yô, né tim; ka an nan fe, alaghga ka sha kwagh ne je man u zough a icivir i tor hen shighe ne ye gaa?" 
Esther4:15 Tsô Eseter kaa ve, ve̱ za kaa Mordekai er:" 
Esther4:16 Za za kohol Mbayuda cii, mba ve tem ken Shushan yô, hôr nen kwaghyan sha ci wam, de ye nen kwagh ga, de me nen kwagh ga, tugh man atetan zan zan ayange atar; kape mo a ônkasev av kpaa sea hôr kwaghyan ne; ka nahan man me za nyôr hen tor, a lu sha tindi ga kpaa ye; aluer mea saa yô, m saa di je ve." 
Esther4:17 Nahan Mordekai mough yem za er kwagh u Eseter kaa un la cii. 
Esther5:1 Tsô, sha iyange i sha utar la, Eseter haa akondo a na a tor, za tile ken tembe u ken atô u ya u tor, sha ishigh ki tor; yô, tor tema sha ikônough ki torough ken iyou i tor, ver ishigh vegher u sha hunda u iyoughough." 
Esther5:2 Tsô, er tor nenge Eseter pendatyo na tile ken tembe yô, doo un a na; nahan tor naregh tôgh ku zenaria ku a lu a mi sha uwe la sha Eseter. Tsô Eseter kporom bende ityough ki tôgh kura." 
Esther5:3 Nahan tor pine un er: Ka nyi i sar uwe, pendatyo Esetere? Ka nyi u sene? Shin a lu vegher u tartor je kpaa, á na u." 
Esther5:4 Tsô Eseter kaa er: Aluer tor una nenge a doo yô, tor kua Haman ve̱ va nyian hen iwer i m yer un ne." 
Esther5:5 Tsô tor kaa er: Torough a Haman a̱ er fefa, sha er sé er sha imo i Eseter yô. Nahan tor kua Haman ve va hen iwer i Eseter yôr la." 
Esther5:6 Tsô tor kaa a Eseter hen iniongo i man wain la er: Ka nyi i sar uwe? Á na u je. Ka nyi u sene? A lu vegher u tartor je kpaa, á na u." 
Esther5:7 Tsô Eseter kaa er: Msen wam man kwagh u a sarem yô, ka un ne:" 
Esther5:8 Aluer a doo tor a mo yô, man doo tor u nan mo msen wam man kwagh u a sarem kpaa yô, tor vea Haman shi ve̱ va hen iwer i mea yôr ve la; yô, kper me er kwagh u tor a kaam la." 
Esther5:9 Tsô Haman due sha iyange la a iember, lu saan saan; kpa er Haman nenge a Mordekai hen hunda u tor yô, er a mough a tile sha ga, man a gbidye ikarikase iyol sha ishigh nagh kpaa ga yô, nahan ishima nyoon un a Mordekai mimi." 
Esther5:10 Nahan kpaa, Haman kundu ishima yem hen ya na; tsô a tindi i za yila akar a na kua kwase na Sereshi." 
Esther5:11 Haman ôr ve mngee u inyaregh nagh man mngee u ônov nav, man akaa a tor kende un sha sha mi cii, man er a ver un hemba atiator kua mbatomov mba tor kpaa." 
Esther5:12 Haman shi seer kaan er: Een, Eseter pendatyo u tor je kpaa rumun er ma or nana̱ nyôr a tor imôngo hen iwer i un yer la ga, saa mo tseegh; man shi a lôhôm iwer i kper a tor imôngo kpaa." 
Esther5:13 Kpa ka mea nenge a Mordekai Oryuda ne una tema hen hundaya u tor nahan, akaa ne cii a kera lum a inja ga." 
Esther5:14 Tsô kwase na Sereshi kua akar a na la cii gema kaa a na er: Kaa, i̱ tim kon, ityaven i u i lu aseva akunduahargber; yô, kper pepe ôr kwagh a tor i̱ sende Mordekai sha u; yô, yem vea tor saan saan hen iniongo. Kwagh ne doo Haman tsô, a kaa er, i̱ tim kon la je." 
Esther6:1 Hen tugh mbula tor fatyô u yaven ga; nahan a kaa er, i̱ va a ruamabera u umbur akaa, ka u abaver a utor je la, nahan i va ôr un sha ishigh ki tor." 
Esther6:2 Tsô i zua a kwaghngeren keregh er Mordekai pase kwagh u Bigetan man Tereshi, ka mbaerentom ken iyou i tor, ve uhar, ve lu ken mbakuranhunda, man ve nôngo u wuan tor Ahasueru." 
Esther6:3 Tsô tor pine er: I wuese Mordekai, i civir un sha ci u kwagh shon nana? Tsô mbatomov mba tor mba ve eren un tom la, kaa a na er: I er un ma kwagh ga." 
Esther6:4 Tsô tor pine er: Ka an nan lu hen tembe? Yô, Haman nyôr hen tembe u ken won u ya u tor kera ve, sha u una ôr kwagh a tor er á sende Mordekai sha kon u un tim sha ci na la." 
Esther6:5 Mbatomov mba tor gema kaa a na er: Nenge, Haman tile, ngu hen tembe. Tor kaa er: Kaa nen un, a̱ nyôr." 
Esther6:6 Tsô Haman nyôr. Tor pine un er: Á er a or u i sar tor pe nan nan icivir la nana? Nahan Haman hen ken ishima na, er: Ka an je nan hembe doon tor u una na nan icivir, a lu mo ga?" 
Esther6:7 Tsô Haman kaa a tor er: Or u i doo tor u nan nan icivir yô," 
Esther6:8 i̱ va a ikav mbi torov mbi tor a vanden haan man nyinya u tor a hende, u i cir un idyer i tor la;" 
Esther6:9 i̱ na akondo kua nyinya la sha ikev i or môm u ken atiator a tor a hemban la, sha u ve̱ za haa or u nan doo tor u nan nan icivir la; yô, i̱ ver nan nana̱ tema sha nyinya, nana̱ ningir sha tembe u ken atôgar, i̱ yôô nan sha hemen, i̱ kaan er: Kape á er a or u nan doo tor, u nan nan icivir ne." 
Esther6:10 Tsô tor kaa a Haman er: Yô, er fefa, tôô akondo kua nyinya, er u kaa nahan, za er a Mordekai, Oryuda, u a tem hen hunda u ya u tor la nahan; de panden ma kwagh môm ken akaa a u kaa ne ga." 
Esther6:11 Nahan Haman tôô akondo kua nyinya la, za wuha Mordekai, a er un a ningir hen tembe u hen atôgar, shi a gba yôôn un sha hemen er: Kape á er a or u nan doo tor, u nan nan icivir ne." 
Esther6:12 Tsô Mordekai shi hide hen hunda u ya u tor; kpa Haman yô, yem hen ya na fefa a ijungwen, a yisa kwagh sha ityou." 
Esther6:13 Haman za ôr kwase na Sereshi kua akar a na cii, akaa a a tser un cii. Nahan ior nav mbafankwagh man kwase na Sereshi gema kaa a na er: Aluer Mordekai u u hii u gban sha ishigh nagh la, una lu or u ken nongo u Yuda je yô, ú fatyô u hemban un sha ma kwagh je ga, kpa ú gba sha ishigh nagh kpee." 
Esther6:14 Er ve lu ôron kwagh a na nahan yô mbaerentom ken iyou i tor za va, ve za a Haman fefa hen iwer i Eseter yôr la." 
Esther7:1 Tsô tor kua Haman ve va hen iniongo i pendatyo Eseter. 
Esther7:2 Sha iyange i sha uhar i iniongo i wain la, tor shi kimbir pinen Eseter er: Ka nyi i sar uwe, pendatyo Esetere? Á na u je; man ka nyi u sene? Á lu vegher u tartor je kpaa á na u." 
Esther7:3 Tsô pendatyo Eseter gema kaa er: Aluer a doo u a mo yô, tor, man aluer a doo tor nahan kpaa yô, i̱ nam uma wam sha zamber wam, kua uma u nongo wam kpaa sha msen wam." 
Esther7:4 Gadia i tee se, mo a nongo wam er, i̱ sar se, i̱ wua se, i̱ tim se kera. Kpa aluer á tee se sha u sé gba lun ikpan i nomso man u i ukase tsô yô, ma m huan, gadia ican yase la ma i kom u á za tor iyol sha i ga." 
Esther7:5 Tsô tor Ahasueru ôr kwagh, kaa a pendatyo na Eseter er: Or shon ka ana, man nan ngu hana, u nan we ishima u eren kwagh nee?" 
Esther7:6 Tsô Eseter kaa er: Orhendan man orihom ka Haman iferor ne. Tsô cier Haman iyol a tor kua pendatyo. 
Esther7:7 Nahan tor mough a iyugh hen iniongo i wain, yem hen sule u hen ya u tor; tsô Haman kighir mough tile sha, gba zamber a pendatyo Eseter sha ci u uma na; gadia a nenge tor ver ishima u eren un kwagh u bo je." 
Esther7:8 Er tor za hide hen sule u ya u tor la, va nyôr hen ijiir i iniongo i wain yô, nenge, Haman yav sha gambe u Eseter tema la. Tsô tor kaa er: Una er pendatyo kwaghvihin sha ishigh yagh je, ken iyou nee? Er kwaghôron ne due tor ken zwa nahan yô, ve cir ishigh ki Haman kera kpaa." 
Esther7:9 Tsô Harbona, u môm ken mbaerentom ken iyou i tor, mba ve lu sha ishigh ki tor la, kaa er: Yô, nenge, kon u taven aseva akunduahargber, u Haman a tim sha ci u Mordekai u a ôr kwagh u dedoo sha ci u tor la, ngu hen ya u Haman. Tsô tor kaa er: Za sende un sha u." 
Esther7:10 Nahan ve za sende Haman sha kon u a tim sha ci u Mordekai la. Tsô ishima yôhôl tor. 
Esther8:1 Sha iyange la je tor Ahasueru gema ya u Haman orihom u Mbayuda la, na pendatyo Eseter. Tsô Mordekai va sha ishigh ki tor, gadia Eseter pase er a lu vea na yô." 
Esther8:2 Tor tsuwa kunya na u a ngohol hen Haman la, gema na Mordekai. Eseter gema ya u Haman la, wa sha ikev i Mordekai." 
Esther8:3 Tsô Eseter shi ôr kwagh a tor, a gba un hen angahar, a zamber a na a mliam ashe je, er, a̱ bunde kwaghbo u Haman, Oragagu la, man kwagh u a hen sha Mbayuda la." 
Esther8:4 Tsô tor naregh tôgh ku zenaria sha Eseter; nahan Eseter mough tile sha sha ishigh ki tor. 
Esther8:5 A kaa er, aluer a doo tor yô, man aluer a doo un a mo yô, man kwagh shon una kuma tor, man mea lu sha ishima na yô, i̱ nger, i̱ bunde uwashika mba Haman wan u Hamadata Oragagu a nger sha u timin Mbayuda mba ve lu ken uipaven mba tor cii la;" 
Esther8:6 gadia me er nan man me fatyô u nengen ican i ia va tser ior ava? Shin me er nan man me fatyô u nengen mtim u tsombor wama? 
Esther8:7 Tsô tor Ahasueru kaa a pendatyo na Eseter kua Mordekai Oryuda la er: Nenge, m vande nan Eseter ya u Haman; man wen yô i sende un sha kon kpaa, gadia a za uwegh sha Mbayuda." 
Esther8:8 Yô, gba ngeren nen Mbayuda kwagh u a doo ne ken iti i tor tsô, ver nen ikav i tor sha mi; gadia kwaghngeren u i nger ken iti i tor man i ver un ikav sha kunya u tor yô, ma or nana fatyô u bunden un ga." 
Esther8:9 Tsô hen shighe la je, i yila mbangeren mba tor, sha uwer u sha utar ka uwer u Shivan, ayange a u ikundu kar utar la; nahan i nger kwagh u Mordekai kaa Mbayuda cii man mbatarev kua ugomna man atiator a uipaven la, hii hen India zan zan ar hen Etiopia, ka uipaven deri man ikundu kar utaankaruhar, hen hanma tar sha mnger u u, man hen hanma ikurior kpaa sha zwa u i, man hen Mbayuda sha mnger ve man sha zwa ve kpaa." 
Esther8:10 Tsô a nger ken iti i tor Ahasueru, a ver ikav sha mi sha kunya u tor, a tindi uwashika sha ikev i mbatyomov mba hendan anyinya a tor a yevese tsung, a i mar a hen ya u tor la;" 
Esther8:11 a nger er, tor rumun er Mbayuda mba ve lu ken hanma gar, ve̱ kohol imôngo, ve̱ nôngo sha ci u uma ve, sha u saren man u wuan man u timin hanma ikumutya i ior man i ipaven cii, mba vea mough num a ve la, a mbayev mba kiriki kua kasev vev, man shi ve̱ kura inyarev vev ve̱ ya ishar," 
Esther8:12 sha iyange i môm ken uipaven mba tor Ahasueru cii, ka sha iyange i sha pue kar utar sha uwer u sha pue kar uhar la, ka uwer u Adar je la." 
Esther8:13 I kaa ken kwaghngeren la er, i̱ wa tindi la sha hanma ipaven, man i̱ yôô un hen akuraior cii, sha er Mbayuda ve̱ wa ago iyol sha ci u iyange la, ve̱ or iyev sha mbaihomov vev yô." 
Esther8:14 Tsô mbatyomov mbala mba ve henda anyinya a tor a yevese tsung la, ve due, i torough a ve, i mgbegha ve sha imo i tor a kaa la; i yôô tindi la ken garutya u Shushan kpaa." 
Esther8:15 Tsô Mordekai due sha ishigh ki tor a akondo a tor iyol, a kwel man a pupuu, man zegedyer u zenaria, man riga u sha ikondo i mou u pupuu man u vel vel man u nyian dindee; tsô gar u Shushan gba genger imo, ember." 
Esther8:16 Mbayuda zua a iwanger man iember man ishima i saan saan man icivir. 
Esther8:17 Ken hanma ipaven, man hanma gar, henpe imo i tor kaa la man tindi na nyôr yô, Mbayuda lu a iember man ishima i saan saan, ve yôr iwer, ve er iniongo. Nahan mbagenev kpishi ken akuraior a ken tar la, ve gema ve hingir Mbayuda, gadia ve lu cian Mbayuda." 
Esther9:1 Tsô sha uwer u sha pue kar uhar, ka uwer u Adar, ayange a u pue kar atar la, zum u imo i tor kaa la kua tindi na mgbôghom sha u á er sha mi, sha iyange i mbaihomov mba Mbayuda ver asema u hemban ve la yô (kpa kwagh shon gema hingir u Mbayuda vea zua a agee sha mbakôron ve ihom la)," 
Esther9:2 Mbayuda kohol ken agar a ve han han kpaa, ken uipaven mba tor Ahasueru cii, sha u vea za ave sha mba ve lu nôngon u eren ve kwagh u bo la; ma or fatyô u tilen ve sha ishi ga, gadia akuraior cii lu cian ve." 
Esther9:3 Atiator a sha uipaven cii, kua mbatarev man ugomna man mba ve eren tom u tor, ve wase Mbayuda; gadia kwagh u Mordekai ta ve mciem iyol." 
Esther9:4 Gadia Mordekai lu shagbaor ken ya u tor, gwa u iti na samber sha uipaven mbala cii; gadia Mordekai shon la za hemen hemen a icivir." 
Esther9:5 Tsô Mbayuda gber mbaihomov vev cii sha sanker, ve wua ve, ve tim ve kpaa, ve er kwagh u a sar ve u eren a mbaihomov vev yô." 
Esther9:6 Ken garutya u Shushan yô, Mbayuda wua ior deri utaan, tim ve kera." 
Esther9:7 Shi ve wua Parshandata man Dalfon man Asepata 
Esther9:8 man Porata man Adalia man Aridata 
Esther9:9 man Parmasheta man Arisai man Aridai kua Vaisata," 
Esther9:10 ka ônov mba nomso pue mba Haman wan u Hamedata, orihom u Mbayuda la; kpa akaa ve yô, ve bende ave sha mi ga." 
Esther9:11 Sha iyange la je, i va tor a iyenge i ior mba i wua hen gar u Shushan yô." 
Esther9:12 Tsô tor kaa a pendatyo Eseter er: Mbayuda wua, tim ior deri utaan ken garutya u Shushan, kua ônov mba Haman mba puev la kpaa; man hire ken uipaven mba tor mbagenevee? Yô, ka nyi i sar uwe? Á na u je; man ka nyi shi u sene? Á er u un je." 
Esther9:13 Tsô Eseter kaa er: Aluer a doo tor yô, i̱ rumun Mbayuda mba ve lu ken Shushan, kper kpaa ve̱ er sha tindi u nyian ne nahan, man i̱ hambe ônov mba Haman mba puev mbala sha kon." 
Esther9:14 Tsô tor kaa er, i̱ er nahan; nahan i wa tindi ken Shushan, ve hambe ônov mba Haman mba puev mbala sha kon." 
Esther9:15 Mbayuda mba ve lu ken Shushan la, ve kohol sha uwer u Adar ayange a u pue kar anyiin la kpaa, ve wua ior ken Shushan deri utar, kpa akaa a ve yô, ve bende ave sha mi ga." 
Esther9:16 Mbayuda mbagenev mba ve lu ken uipaven mba tor la, ve kohol ve nôngo sha ci u uma ve, pever ve iyol a mbaihomov, ve wua mba ve ker ve ihom mbala ior dubu akunduatargber kar utaan; kpa akaa a ve yô, ve bende ave sha mi ga." 
Esther9:17 I er kwagh ne sha uwer u Adar ayange a u pue kar atar la; ayange a u pue kar anyiin la yô, ve mem, ve ver i, hingir iyange i iniongo man i iember." 
Esther9:18 Kpa Mbayuda mba ve lu ken Shushan la yô, ve kohol sha ayange a u pue kar atar kua sha ayange a u pue kar anyiin la kpaa; sha ayange a u pue kar ataan la ve mem, ve ver i, hingir iyange i iniongo man i iember." 
Esther9:19 Mbayuda mba ken angarev mba ve tema ken agar a lun a ugir ga la, ve gema ve ver uwer u Adar ayange a u pue kar anyiin la, hingir iyange i iember man i iniongo, man iyange i lun saan saan, man i tindin a iwua hen ayol a ve." 
Esther9:20 Mordekai nger akaa ne, tindi uwashika hen Mbayuda cii, mba ve lu ken uipaven mba tor Ahasueru cii, mba ikua ikua man mba icaa kpaa," 
Esther9:21 sha u kaan ve u wan uwer u Adar ayange a u pue kar anyiin la iko, kua ayange a u pue kar ataan la kpaa, sha anyom anyom," 
Esther9:22 er ka ayange a Mbayuda zua a mmem sha mbaihomov vev la, man uwer u i gema ishimavihin ve, hingir iember la, man ijungwen hingir iyange i msaanyol; sha er ve̱ gema a, a̱ hingir ayange a iniongo kua a iember, man a tindin iwua hen ayol a ve, kua hen mbaatsanev kpaa." 
Esther9:23 Kwagh ne hingir ieren i Mbayuda er ve vande hiin u eren la, man shi er Mordekai nger ve nahan;" 
Esther9:24 gadia Haman wan u Hamedata, Oragagu, orihom u Mbayuda cii, hen kwaghbo sha Mbayuda sha u timin ve, man a haa Pur, ka ishor i kpehen je la, sha u una sar ve, shi una tim ve kera kpaa;" 
Esther9:25 kpa er kwagh la za va hen tor yô, a kaa ken uwashika er, mhen u bo, u a hen sha Mbayuda la, a̱ hide sha ityough nagh; un a ônov nav kpaa i sende ve sha kon." 
Esther9:26 Ka sha ci u nahan man ve yila ayange la er Purim sha iti i Pur la ye. Nahan sha ci u kwaghôron u ken washika la cii, man sha kwagh u ve nenge sha kwagh shon la, man kwagh u a tser ve," 
Esther9:27 Mbayuda wa tindi man ve ver asema, ve man tsombor ve man mba ve nyôr nongo a ve mbala cii, sha er kwagh la a̱ de bundu ga, sha u vea waan ayange ahar ne iko sha kwaghngeren la, man sha shighe u i ver a sha hanma inyom la;" 
Esther9:28 man sha er i̱ umbur ayange ne, i̱ waan a iko sha ikov ikov, man hanma tsombor man hanma ipaven man hanma gar; sha er i̱ de kera bundu ayange a Purim ne ken Mbayuda ga, man m-umbur u a kpaa a̱ de hungul ken tsombor ve ga." 
Esther9:29 Tsô pendatyo Eseter u Abihail, kua Mordekai, Oryuda, ve nger sha utaha sha u taver washika u sha uhar u Purim ne." 
Esther9:30 Tsô a tindi uwashika hen Mbayuda cii, sha uipaven deri man ikundu kar utaankaruhar mba ken tartor u Ahasueru, a kwaghôron u bem man mimi," 
Esther9:31 sha u taver ayange a Purim la sha ashighe a i ver a yô, er Mordekai Oryuda man Eseter pendatyo ve wa tindi sha a nahan, man er ve ver kwagh u kwaghyan u hôron man mliam ma vaan sha ci u ayol a ve kua tsombor ve kpaa la." 
Esther9:32 Imo i Eseter taver kwagh u Purim ne; i nger un ken ruamabera. 
Esther10:1 Tsô tor Ahasueru wa inyaregh ki kpandegh sha tar man sha ucile mba shin zegemnger. 
Esther10:2 Aeren a agee a na man a tahav nav man kwagh u icivir i Mordekai, er tor kende un sha yô, i nger a ken ruamabera u abaver a utor mba Media man Pershia la gaa?" 
Esther10:3 Gadia Mordekai, Oryuda, gbire sha tor Ahasueru, a lu a icivir hen Mbayuda, man a doo anmgbianev nav ishima kpishi; keren kwagh u dedoo sha ci u ior nav, ôron kwagh a tsombor na cii bem bem." 
Job1:1 Ngise orgen lu ken tar u Ushi, iti i nan er Yobu; or la lu or u mimi, u perapera, u cian Aôndo, paregh kwaghbo." 
Job1:2 A mar ônov mba nomso utaankaruhar man mba kasev utar. 
Job1:3 Inyaregh nagh yô: iyôngo lu dubu utaankaruhar, urakumi dubu utar, abua a kpelan ikyekye ahar ahar kuma deri utaan, anmgbian a ujaki deri utaan man mbatomov kpishi; nahan or la hemba ior mba ken ityoughkitaregh cii." 
Job1:4 Yô, ônov nav mba nomso zaan iniongo hen ya u anmgbianev vev sha adondo adondo, hanmô sha iyange i nan; shi ve tindin i lôhôn anmgbianev vev mba kasev mba utar mbala kpaa er ve̱ va yaan man ve̱ maan a ve imôngo." 
Job1:5 Tsô zum u iniongo ve ia ningir ia tser yô, Yobu a tindi loho er ve̱ va, i̱ wanger ve; nahan a mough pepe, a na iniav mbi nanden sha iyenge ve cii; gadia Yobu a hen er: Alaghga ônov av er kwaghbo, ve venda Aôndo ken asema a ve. Kape Yobu eren gbem la." 
Job1:6 Nahan iyange igen ônov mba Aôndo va, va tile sha ishigh ki TER, Satan di kpaa va a ve imôngo." 
Job1:7 Tsô TER pine Satan er: U due hana? Satan gema kaa a TER er: Ka ken ijende wue wue shin tar, u kôndon man u senen shin u." 
Job1:8 Nahan TER pine Satan er: U fa kwagh u wanakiriki Wam Yobu dedoo kpa? Gadia ma or kuma sha a na shin tar ga, ka or u mimi, u perapera, u cian Aôndo, palegh kwaghbo." 
Job1:9 Tsô Satan gema kaa a TER er: Ka gbilin Yobu a cie Aôndo yee? 
Job1:10 U wa un igyar, U kase un a ya na kua akaa a a lu a mi cii gaa? U ver tom u ave na dedoo, uzendenya nav kpaa seer kpishi shin tar." 
Job1:11 Kpa naregh ase uwegh Ough, bende akaa a a lu a mi la cii, tsô una venda U sha ishigh You je!" 
Job1:12 Tsô TER gema kaa a Satan er: Yô, nenge, akaa a a lu a mi cii nga sha ikev you; kpa sha iyol na jim yô, de ze uwegh ga. Nahan Satan kar sha ishigh ki TER kera." 
Job1:13 Tsô iyange igen er ônov nav mba nomso man mba kasev ve lu yan kwagh man man wain hen ya u anngô ve u tamen yô," 
Job1:14 Ortyom za va hen Yobu, va kaa er: Abua lu kpelan ikyekye i kahan sule, ujaki kpaa lu yan toho ikua a a;" 
Job1:15 yô, Mbasabea va ta num sha mi, kôr yem a mi; ve wua mbatomov sha sanker; ka mo tseegh m wer m va kaan we ye." 
Job1:16 Ngur ôron nahan yô, ugen shi za va, gba va kaan er: Usu u Aôndo sen Sha, va hia iyôngo kua mbatomov, wua kera; ka mo tseegh m wer m va kaan we ye." 
Job1:17 Ngur ôron nahan yô, ugen shi za va, gba va kaan er: Mbakaldi za va akum atar, va ta num sha urakumi kôr yem a mi, ve wua mbatomov sha zwa u sanker; ka mo tseegh m wer m va kaan we ye." 
Job1:18 Ngur ôron nahan yô, ugen shi za va, gba va kaan er: Ônov ou mba nomso man mba kasev, ve lu yan kwagh man man wain hen ya u anngô ve u tamen;" 
Job1:19 yô, zegehiar due ken desereti va ta sha azongo a iyoughough a anyiin yôhôl kighir mbayev, ve kpe cii; ka mo tseegh m wer m va kaan we ye." 
Job1:20 Tsô Yobu mough ande riga na, tolough ityough nagh, a gba inya, a gure a civir;" 
Job1:21 a kaa er: Lu m duen ken iyav mbu ngôm idyelegh, shi ka idyelegh kpaa me hide ye; ka TER A ne ye, shi ka TER A ngohol kpaa ye; i̱ wuese iti i TER." 
Job1:22 Ken akaa ne cii Yobu er kwaghbo ga, a na Aôndo ibo er A er kwagh u kpeegh kpaa ga." 
Job2:1 Shi iyange igen ônov mba Aôndo va, va tile sha ishigh ki TER, Satan di kpaa shi va a ve imôngo va tile sha ishigh ki TER." 
Job2:2 Tsô TER pine Satan er: U due hana? Satan gema kaa a TER er: Ka ken ijende wue wue shin tar, u kôndon man u senen shin u." 
Job2:3 Nahan TER pine Satan er: U fa kwagh u wanakiriki Wam Yobu dedoo kpa? Gadia ma or kuma sha a na shin tar ga, ka or u mimi, u perapera, u cian Aôndo, palegh kwaghbo; man shi a kusu mimi na taveraa shin er u va vemben Mo wer, M̱ kôr un ihom, M̱ tim un sha ityôikaa ga, nahan kpaa." 
Job2:4 Satan gema kaa a TER er: Kwavyolough sha kwavyolough; mimi je, hanma kwagh u or nan lu a mi cii; nana na sha ci u uma u nan." 
Job2:5 Naregh ase uwegh Ough, bende ikuhe na kua inyam na, tsô una venda U sha ishigh You je." 
Job2:6 Tsô TER kaa a Satan er: Nenge, ngu sha ikev you; kpa ka di uma na tsô de ye." 
Job2:7 Tsô Satan kar sha ishigh ki TER kera, va haa Yobu avav a nyoon, hii shin akevangahar a na je, ar sha ihaghtyo na." 
Job2:8 Nahan a tôô agbatsenge, a gba a-an iyol a mi; a shar hen mtwe." 
Job2:9 Tsô kwase na kaa a na er: Nahan kpaa shi u kusu mimi wou hereghe? Venda Aôndo, yô, kpe kera." 
Job2:10 Kpa a gema a kaa a na er: U ngu ôron kwagh er ibumekwase nahan. Sé ngohol kwagh u dedoo hen Aôndo, man kwaghbo yô, sé kera ngohol gaa? Ken akaa ne cii Yobu er kwaghbo sha kwaghôron na ga." 
Job2:11 Zum u akar a Yobu atar ungwa atsan a a tser Yobu la cii yô, ve cii ve mough, hanmô hen ya u nan, ve va her a na; ka Elifasa Orteman, man Bildadi Orshuhi, man Sofar Ornaamati, ve ver iyange i vea va vaa un, vea sur un ishima yô." 
Job2:12 Kpa er ve ta ashe ve za nenge a na ken ica je, man ve kav un ga yô, ve gba vaan genger genger; tsô hanmô ve ande riga u nan, ve tsenda inya sha, i va haa ve sha ityou." 
Job2:13 Nahan ve shar inya a na imôngo kuma ayange ataankarahar kua aime di ataankarahar, mô ôr kwagh a na ga, gadia ve kav er ican la i kehe yum yô." 
Job3:1 Ken masetyô u kwagh ne yô, Yobu bugh zwa na wa iyange na ifan." 
Job3:2 Yobu ka er 
Job3:3 Iyange i i marem la, i̱ saa ishe; kua tugh mbu mbu kaa er: I mar wannomso, la." 
Job3:4 Iyange la, i̱ hingir ime; Aôndo A̱ de we i iko Sha ga, iwanger kpaa, i̱ de te sha i ga." 
Job3:5 Ime man mure u kuugh ve̱ kôr i i̱ hingir kwagh ve je; abeen a̱ cir i; hanma kwagh u a ne iyange i we ime yô, a̱ ta i mciem iyol." 
Job3:6 Tugh mbula yô, angôghime a̱ kôr mbu; mbu̱ de lu saan saan ken ayange a inyom ga; mbu̱ de nyer ken iyenge i iweregh kpaa ga." 
Job3:7 Een, tugh mbula mbu̱ de lu a kwagh ga; iember kpaa i̱ de kera nyer ken mbu ga." 
Job3:8 Mba ve we iyange ifan la, ve̱ wa mbu ifan; ka mba ve fe u nomon gumgum je la." 
Job3:9 Asan a mbu a sha use la, a̱ wa ime; mbu̱ kegh iwanger, kpa mbu̱ de zough a mi ga; man shi mbu̱ de nengen akurashee a sha use la ga;" 
Job3:10 gadia mbu wuhe ihinda i iyav mbu ngôm ga, mbu yer ashe am a ican kpaa ga." 
Job3:11 Ka nyi man m kpe shighe u i marem la ga ase? man m saa zum u m due ken uya la ga nahana? 
Job3:12 Ka nyi man anu ngohol mo? man atumba kpaa, er m̱ amba?" 
Job3:13 Nahan ma m yav inya, ma m huan kpaa, ma m gbe mnyam, ma m mem," 
Job3:14 a utor man mbaajiriv mba tarev imôngo, mba ve shi ve maa ajiir a i yôhôl a kera la her, sha ci ve ayol a ve;" 
Job3:15 shin a atiator a a lu a zenaria, a a iv uya vev a azurfa;" 
Job3:16 shin ma m lu er iyav mbu dughun mbu mbu lu myer nahan, ma m lu ga, er anikundanev mba ve nenge a iwanger mayange je ga yô." 
Job3:17 Keela yô, mbaaferev ve kera kumbur ga, keela kpaa mbavôron mba memen." 
Job3:18 Keela yô, mbakwarev mba memen imôngo, mba ongo imo i or u torough a ve ga." 
Job3:19 Mbakiriki kua mbatamen mba her; ortom kpaa nan kera ngu sha ikev i orvesen u nan ga. 
Job3:20 Ka nyi A ne or u nan lu ken ican la iwanger, man mba asema a vihi ve tsung la uma kpaa?" 
Job3:21 mba ku u sar ve, kpa u va ga, mba ve time, ve ker u, hemba inyaregh ki ken myer;" 
Job3:22 mba ma ve ember tsung, ma ve lu saan saan aluer vea fatyô u zuan a uwar yô." 
Job3:23 Er nan man A ne or u gbenda u nan u lu myer la, iwanger, u Aôndo A we nan igyar, A kase nana?" 
Job3:24 Gadia ishimashirin i vem er ka kwaghyan wam yô, mbamtoghor av kpaa mba hee er mngerem yô," 
Job3:25 gadia kwagh u m cie un la, gem te sha a mo, man kwagh u a nem mciem ken ishima yô, gem tseren mo." 
Job3:26 Yôhôl mo iyol ga, m zua a bem ga, mmem kpaa m ngu a mi ga, ka ican tsô, i tseren mo ye." 
Job4:1 Tsô Elifasa Orteman, gema kaa er:" 
Job4:2 Aluer or nana nôngo u ôron kwagh a we, nahan ishima ia vihi wee? Kpa, ka an nana wa ishima nana de kwaghôrono?" 
Job4:3 Nenge, we u lu tesen ior kpishi, u taver ave a kpen la." 
Job4:4 Akaaôron a ou suwe un u a nenge gbev la, u taver anu a a tenger la." 
Job4:5 Kpa hegen er kwagh ne a ve sha a we yô, ishima yina u; er a bende a we yô, kondo u iyol." 
Job4:6 Mcieaôndo wou ka ishuur wou gaa, perapera u aeren a ou kpaa ka ishimaverenkeghen you gaa?" 
Job4:7 Shi umbur ase yô, or u lun a ibo ga, nan saan ishe mayange kpa? Shin ka han je man lu i gber mbaperapera kera?" 
Job4:8 Sha mnenge wam yô, mba ve tsôghol ifer, kua mbalôôn anzughul, ka ve sunda di sha mi vough." 
Job4:9 Sha iôôn i Aôndo tsô, ka ve tim, man sha humbe u iyugh Na, ka ve saa kera." 
Job4:10 Kume u begha, man imo i iperabegha, anyi a agumabegha la, i kever a." 
Job4:11 Tsebegha ka a kpe sha ci u mban u swase, ônov mba ngôbegha i sambe ve kera." 
Job4:12 Iyange i ôrom kwaghhuwa; togh agh ungwa kwagh u i er ivarivase la; 
Job4:13 ken mbamhen mba ve dugh sha akaa a i nengen a ken mnya tugh, zum u mnyam ka ma kôr ior yum la," 
Job4:14 mciem tam iyol, kua akarkase kpaa, je akuhe am cii tsongor." 
Job4:15 Tsô jijingi karem sha ishi vishi; ikeende timim iyol. 
Job4:16 A tile, kpa m fatyô u kaven mlu na ga; eev mbu ma kwagh lum sha ashe; m ungwa imo i ivarivase, er:" 
Job4:17 Or u nan lu a ku iyol, nana lu perapera sha ishigh ki Aôndo kpa? Or nana lu wang sha ishigh ki u A gbe nan jee?" 
Job4:18 Nenge, A suur sha mbatomov Nav ga; mbatyomov Nav mba Shaav kpaa ka A zua ve a kwagh u kpeegh;" 
Job4:19 man hire mban mba ve tem ken ayou a inyaagh, a amagh a a, a lu shin vuulevu ne, mba i her ve er ivina nahana!" 
Job4:20 Ka i tim ve hen haregh u pepe man u iyangeibeen; ka ve saa gbem, ma or nan wa ve iko ga." 
Job4:21 I kera tsuwe kor u tenti ve ken a ve kera gaa? Ka ve gba kpen tsô, a kwaghfan kpaa ga." 
Job5:1 Yô, yila ase; ma or u nana vengese we nan ngu kpa? Man ken uicighanmbaiorov yô, ka hen an ú zaa?" 
Job5:2 Gadia ishimanyoon ka i wua imbumeor, man iwuhe kpaa ka i wua orlanenkwagh." 
Job5:3 M nenge ibumeor wa amise; kpa m wa ya na ifan fese je. 
Job5:4 Ônov nav gba ica a mkpeyol, i her ve hen hunda je, ma or u yiman ve kpaa nan ngu ga." 
Job5:5 Iyiagh ki ken sule ve, mbagenev ka ve ya ki, ken usaa je kpaa ve kura ki kera, mtim aver zwa u menan inyarev vev." 
Job5:6 Gadia mzungu ka shin vuulevu a dugh ga; ican kpaa ka shin inya i menden ga; 
Job5:7 kpa i mar or sha u nan ya ican, er amarama a usu ka a kôndon sha nahan." 
Job5:8 Kpa a lu mo yô, ma m ker Aôndo, ka her Aôndo kpaa ma m ze a kwagh wam ye;" 
Job5:9 u A eren akaa a vesen a a gande u timen; akaakpilighyol a a ngee je a gande u ôron; 
Job5:10 u A nee ura shin tar, man A tindi mngerem ken akôngo;" 
Job5:11 nahan ka A kende mbaatsanev sha; man mba ve zungu yô, A na ve mkpeyol u hemban." 
Job5:12 Ka A bunde awashima u mbawanayom, nahan ave ve nga kera fetyô u eren ma kwagh u lun vough ga." 
Job5:13 Ka A kôr mbafankwagh sha ayom a ve la; man mhen u mbawanayom la a bunde fese. 
Job5:14 Atetan kpaa ka ve ya kapa a ime; iyange sha tembe kpaa ka ve peven a pev er ka tugh nahan. 
Job5:15 Kape ka A yima mbaibanave sha sanker u duen ken zwa ve la, man sha ikev i mbaageev kpaa la." 
Job5:16 Ka nahan man mbaatsanev ve lu a ishima i veren keghen ye, ifer kpaa kusu zwa u i." 
Job5:17 Nenge, saan or u Aôndo A kôôm nan la iyol; yô, de kera lahan mtsaha u Uhembanagee la ga." 
Job5:18 Gadia Un yô, ka A na mnyoonom, shi A sôr kpaa; ka A na iyolvihin, shi ave Na a gema a wanger i." 
Job5:19 Una yima u ken atsan ataratar kpaa; een, ken ataankarahar je kpaa, ifer ia bende a we ga." 
Job5:20 Sha ijen i gban kpaa, Una yima u sha ku; man ken utya kpaa sha agee a sanker." 
Job5:21 Á yer u sha ifan i nombor la; man shi ú cian mtim zum u una va la kpaa ga. 
Job5:22 Ú se mtim kua ijen kpaa; man shi ú cia inyamtoho kpaa ga. 
Job5:23 Awen a ken toho kpaa á ya ikar a we; man inyam i toho kpaa, ia lu a we bem bem;" 
Job5:24 nahan wea fa er tenti wou a lu doo doo yô; ú za nenge ya wou kpa ú ker ma kwagh shio ga. 
Job5:25 Shi ú fa er tsombor wou ua ngee, kua ônov ou kpaa, er toho u hen inya nahan." 
Job5:26 Anyom a ou á iv man ú va shin uwar ye, er ile u alakema sha shighe u u nahan." 
Job5:27 Nenge, se tôv sha kwagh ne, kape a lu je ne; yô, ungwa ase, shi fa un iyol you kpaa." 
Job6:1 Tsô Yobu gema kaa er: 
Job6:2 Ma i kar ishimavihin yam, man ican i i tserem la kpaa, ma i ver ve sha ikyekye i karen kwagh a min!" 
Job6:3 Ma i yoho ma i hembe waarawa u zegemnger; ka nahan man m er kwagh sha lan ye. 
Job6:4 Gadia avaan a Uhembanagee cii ngam ken iyol, megh ku a kpaa, jijingi wam, ngu man ku; mcieryol u Aôndo sendegh tange ityav a mo." 
Job6:5 Jakitoho ka i vaa zum u i lu a toho? Shin bua yô, vaan er kwaghyan a lu un sha ishi la kpa?" 
Job6:6 Kwagh u a nyoho ga, á ya un á wa bar ga kpa? Shin ndera u ijikegh nahan, á bende un ken zwa á kav er a lu kpa?" 
Job6:7 Ishima yam venda u benden a ve; mbam er kwaghyan u ndôhôr ishima nahan. 
Job6:8 Ma i shi er sha msen wam; Aôndo ma A shi erem kwagh u a sarem yô: 
Job6:9 Aôndo ma A rumun ma A herem, ma A naregh uwegh ma A woom kera." 
Job6:10 Nahan ma i pever mo iyol; een, ma m ember ken atô u mnyoonom ma ma lu a mhôônom ga la, gadia m nyiman kwaghôron u Icighan la ga." 
Job6:11 Agee am nga han, u me keghe? Mkur wam ngu nan je, u me wa ishima?" 
Job6:12 Agee am, ka agee a iwene? Shin inyam yam ka iyôgh ase?" 
Job6:13 Ma iwasen kera ngi her a mo je ga, iwaren kpaa, i mgbegha i her a mo kera cii gaa?" 
Job6:14 Or u nan eren a ikar u nan dedoo ga yô, nan de u cian Uhembanagee je ve." 
Job6:15 Anmgbianev av ka mba suur sha a ve ga er uwagh nahan, er ukungômbaiwaghev mba ve kough kera nahan," 
Job6:16 mba ve il dimii sha ci u mngerem ma ma kôrough sha wuhe, henpe senou a yeren shimi la;" 
Job6:17 kpa zum u oo ta yô, ve ndiir kera, á va tsee yô, ve uma shin ajiir a ve kera." 
Job6:18 Igbenda i ve senen min la i hure, i nyôr ken taaikôngo, i saa kera." 
Job6:19 Mbakasuav mba ken Tema ve yenge ve, mbazendev mba Sekeba ver ashe sha a ve," 
Job6:20 kunya kôr ve sha ishimaverenkeghen ve la; ve va heregh, kunda ve iyol." 
Job6:21 Kape ne kpaa ne hingir mo gbilinkwagh ne; ne nenge a kwagh u tan mciem iyol, nahan ne cia." 
Job6:22 Mo m kaa mer: Nam nen kwagha? Shin: Pande nen inyaregh yenegh, nam nen iwua i doon ityougho?" 
Job6:23 Shin: Yimam nen sha ikev i orihom ase? Shin: Paam nen sha ikev i mba ve kighir mo laa? 
Job6:24 Tesem nen, tsô mo me huan; pasem nen hen ape m tsum yô." 
Job6:25 Kwaghôron u mimi ngu a agee tsô! Kpa ibo yen i nan yô, ngi a inja hana?" 
Job6:26 Ka ne ka nan asemberakaa ne ibo? Gadia kwaghôron u or u i kondo nan iyol ngu er ahumbe nahan tsô! 
Job6:27 Een, nea er ishor sha ancôghol, shi nea gema ikar wen una hingir kwagh u yamen kasua a mi." 
Job6:28 Hegen yô, kenger nen mo, gadia me er aie sha ishigh yenegh je ga." 
Job6:29 Shi gema nen ase, ma kwagh u mimi ga, a̱ de lu ga; een, gema nen, kwagh wam ka u perapera her." 
Job6:30 Nahan zwa wam ngu a mimi gaa? Me bende akaavihin yô, me kav gaa?" 
Job7:1 Or nenge sha ican sha won gaa? Ayange a nan kpaa kera nga er a or u eren tom sha tôndo nahan gaa? 
Job7:2 Er kpan u mure ka a sar nan tsung yô, man er or u eren tom sha tôndo ka nan ver ishima sha injar i nan nahan," 
Job7:3 kape i kar kwar i nem sha iwer i ican ne, shi i verem aime a a lu a mmem ga yô." 
Job7:4 Er ka mea yav inya yô, m kaa mer: Shighe shi nan man me mougho? Tugh tsa yum; m zer geman gbem, kumam iyol, zan zan sev av." 
Job7:5 Azôô kua akpoghol a inyaagh cirim iyol; kwavyolough wam ka u kôrough shi u gba ijumbu. 
Job7:6 Ayange am hemba karen fefa a akusha u ortumenikondo; nga karen, ishimaverenkeghen kpaa ngi ga." 
Job7:7 Umbur er uma wam a lu humbe yô; ashe am kpaa aa kera nenge a kwagh u doon mayange ga. 
Job7:8 Ishe i or u nan nenge a mo la, ia kera nenge a mo mayange ga; ashe a ou aa lu sha a mo, kpa me kera lu ga." 
Job7:9 Er ibeenegh ka ki sambe, ki ndiir kera nahan, kape or u nan sen shin Sheol nana kera hide ga la." 
Job7:10 Nana kera hide hen ya u nan ga, man ijiir i nan kpaa ia kera fa nan ga." 
Job7:11 Ka nahan man mo kpaa, me kera kusu zwa wam ga ye, me ôr kwagh sha mcihi u jijingi wam, me vaa ican sha ishimavihin tsung i uma wam ne." 
Job7:12 Mo m ngu zegemngere, shin inyam i cieryol i ken zegemngere, je U gema U ver orkuran moo?" 
Job7:13 Zum u ka mea kaa mer: Gambe wam una surum ishima, man ikagh yagh ki yaven mi kia yôhôl mo ishima yô," 
Job7:14 U gema U tam mciem iyol sha mnyam ma cien, shi U tam mciem iyol sha akaa a i nengen a mi ken mnya la;" 
Job7:15 zan zan je yô, m tsuwa ihamber iker, ku hembam doon a akuhe am ne." 
Job7:16 Uma wam ndôhôr mo ishima; kera kam ka lun uma zan zan ga; yô, dem, gadia ayange am ka gbilinkwagh tsô." 
Job7:17 Or ngu nyi je man U kenden nan sha, man U veren ishima You sha a nan kpaa?" 
Job7:18 Man U ser nan hanma sev, shi U karen nan hanma shighe kpaa?" 
Job7:19 Ka hanma shighe je man Ú de u kenger mo, man U shi dem, m̱ kar menan ijer yama?" 
Job7:20 A lu m er kwaghbo yô, ka nyi m er U, We Orkuran ioro? Er nan je, man U gemam, m hingir We ishor i keren, je iyol yam i hingir mo ikav mbi yuhwana?" 
Job7:21 Er nan man U dem kwaghbo wam, man U hir a iferkwagh yam kera ga? Gadia ahegen shi côhin tsô, me yav shin vuulevu; Ú kerem, kpa me lu ga." 
Job8:1 Tsô Bildadi Orsuhi, gema kaa er:" 
Job8:2 Ka hanma shighen je man ú de u ôron anzaakaa nee? man shi akaaôron a ken zwa wou kpaa aa de u lun er zegeahumbe nahana? 
Job8:3 Nahan Aôndo Una ôr ijir sha mimi ga zee? Shin Uhembanagee Una kaha Una undu mimi zee? 
Job8:4 Aluer ônov ou ve er Un kwaghbo yô, A gema A na di ve sha ikev i ifer ve la." 
Job8:5 Aluer we u ker Aôndo, man u zamber a Uhembanagee," 
Job8:6 aluer wea lu wang man jighilaa yô, ma A nder, ma A we u iko kpee je, ma A hir a ya wou u perapera her." 
Job8:7 Man shi er mhii wou a lu côhin nahan kpaa, mkur wou yô, una seer kpishi." 
Job8:8 Shi pine ase sha kwagh u kov u ngise ver ishima sha kwagh u uter vev, lu ve tôv yô." 
Job8:9 Gadia se, se mba mbanyenev tsô, se fa ma kwagh ga; gayô, ayange ase a shin tar ne nga er mure nahan tsô." 
Job8:10 Ka ve, vea tese u, man vea kaa u, shi vea ôr akaa a ken asema a ve ye gaa?" 
Job8:11 Papiru una gba menden henpe angbiôr a lu ga kpa? Man awoo di kpaa, aa gba vesen henpe mngerem ma lu ga kpa?" 
Job8:12 Er ve lu ndor, man i lu a tôndo ve ga tsô, ve use je er toho ugen u lu a use ga yô." 
Job8:13 Kape igbenda i mba ve hungul Aôndo cii i lu la; ishimaverenkeghen i or u wan Aôndo iko ga yô, ia saa ishe." 
Job8:14 Ishimaveren i nan ia saa ishe, ishuur u nan una lu er kper u tetange yô," 
Job8:15 Nana lian sha iyou i nan, kpa ia tile ga; nana kôr gbang gbang, kpa ia lu her gbem ga." 
Job8:16 Nan ngu ndor gese gese ken oo, agbaa a nan samber sha sule u nan." 
Job8:17 Amise a nan kamber sha tihiawen, nga shindin ken atô u awen." 
Job8:18 Aluer á tim nan hen ijiir i nan kera yô, ia nyiman nan, er: Mayange je m ngu a nenge a we ga." 
Job8:19 Nenge, ka iember i gbenda u nan je la, shin vuulevu yô, mbagenev vea mende." 
Job8:20 Nenge, Aôndo Una gbihi or u jighilii kera ga, Una wase mbaerenafer mayange ga." 
Job8:21 Una va iv zwa wou a ahan, ityumbuzwaagh you kpaa a iember." 
Job8:22 Mba ve ker u ihom yô, kunya ua cir ve iyol; tenti u mbaaferev kpaa, una kera lu ga." 
Job9:1 Tsô Yobu gema kaa er: 
Job9:2 Mimi je, m fa ka nahan; kpa á er nan man or á lu a ishô her Aôndo?" 
Job9:3 Shin á sar nan u hendan a Na, nana fatyô u nan Un imo i môm sha mbampin dubu ga." 
Job9:4 Ngu a kwaghfan ken ishima, man shi A hemba agee; ka an nan vande hendan a Na, man i kpe nan iyolo?" 
Job9:5 Wen u A karen a iwo kera, kpa i fe ga, zum u A yôhôl i sha iyugh Na yô;" 
Job9:6 A tenger tar, A mgbegh u sha ijiir i u kera, je ityouv mbi u tenger;" 
Job9:7 A te iyange icin, i kera dugh ga la, A cir asan;" 
Job9:8 A samber kwavaôndo Un tswen, A ndyar sha agôndo a zegemnger;" 
Job9:9 A gbe Ber man Anyamaiwa man Ancôgholov, kua Ayou a ken Imbusutariyan la;" 
Job9:10 A eren akaavesen a a gande u timen fan; een, akaakpilighyol a a ngee je gande u ôron." 
Job9:11 Ka A kar hen mo, kpa m nenge a Na ga, A kar vishi, kpa m kav Un ga." 
Job9:12 Una kôr kwagh Una ngohol yô, ka an nana yange Unu? Ka an nana pine Un er: Ka nyi U eren ne?" 
Job9:13 Aôndo Una hide a iyugh Na ijime ga; mbawasen Rahabi gure Un inya; 
Job9:14 man hire mo, me zua a imo i me kaa Unu? Me fatyô u tsuwan akaaôron am a me hendan a Na?" 
Job9:15 Wen yô, shin mea lu a mimi kpaa, me zua a imo i me kaa Un ga; me gba zamber a Orjir wam tsô." 
Job9:16 Aluer mea yer, man Una vengese je kpaa, me kera na jighjigh er A ver ato sha imo yam ga." 
Job9:17 Una sombom sha zegeahumbe, Una seer mo iyolvihin sha ityôikaa ga kpaa." 
Job9:18 M-ee tsô kpaa Una rumun er m̱ ôô ga, shi Una ivim a akaayuan." 
Job9:19 Aluer mba ôron kwagh u agee a u a hembe taver la yô, Mo M ngun ne! Man aluer ka u ijirigh yô, ka an nana yilama?" 
Job9:20 Shin mea lu a mimi kpaa, zwa wam je ua nam ibo; shin mea lu jighilii kpaa, Una pase er m lu iferor yô." 
Job9:21 M ngu jighilii; m wa iyol yam iko ga; uma wam ngum kwagh u lahan je. 
Job9:22 Ka kwagh môm tsô; ka nahan man m kaa mer: Un yô, ka A tim ormimi kua iferor kpaa." 
Job9:23 Zum u kwagh u bo za va a ku u fefa yô, Un A gema A naha lanshima u mba ve lu a ibo ga la tar." 
Job9:24 I gema tar i na sha ikev i mbaaferev; ka A cir mbaajiriv mba u, ishigh; aluer ka Un ga yô, shi ka an je?" 
Job9:25 Ayange am hemba karen fefa a oryevese, nga ze ayem, nga nengen a ma kwagh u doon ga." 
Job9:26 A kar fefa er utso mba i er ve sha ikenaika nahan, er gafa u a shir ufu sha kwaghyan yô." 
Job9:27 Aluer me kaa mer, me hungul ivever yam, me kera vihi ishigh sha ga, me lu gbar gbar yô," 
Job9:28 nahan m gba cian atsan am cii kera kpaa, m fa, Ú nam ishô ga." 
Job9:29 Á nam ibo kpee je; nahan me gba nyoon iyol yam gbilin tsôô? 
Job9:30 Aluer mea ee iyol yam sha senou, man mea kile ave am sha mtse kpaa," 
Job9:31 nahan kpaa, Wea tam shin acôvoracô, akondo am je kaa aa gema á nyaghem." 
Job9:32 Gadia Un ka or, er mo nahan ga, sha u me fatyô u kaan Un imo, man sé va hen ijir imôngo kpaa ga." 
Job9:33 Ma or u been se anyiman nan ngu u nana penda ave a nan sha a vese, se mba uhar mban nan ngu ga." 
Job9:34 Yô, A̱ hidem a akpa Na la kera, mcieryol Na la, a̱ de tem mciem iyol ga." 
Job9:35 Nahan me ôr kwagh, me kera cia Un ga, gadia ka inja yam nahan ga." 
Job10:1 M vôr a uma wam cii; me pase kwagh u a tserem yô, me yer ga; me ôr kwagh sha ishimavihin yam i tsung la." 
Job10:2 Me kaa a Aôndo mer: De nem ibo ga, kpa tesem kwagh u a er man U lu num a mo la." 
Job10:3 Doo u We Ú kighir or a icana, Ú laha tom u ave Ou, man Ú geman Ú wanger mhen u mbaafereve?" 
Job10:4 Ashe Ou ka a iyolougho, mnenge Wou kpaa ka mnenge u oro?" 
Job10:5 Ayange a Ou nga er ayange a oro, shin anyom a Ou kpaa nga er ayange a or nahana," 
Job10:6 er U tevem sha ibo yam, U ker kwaghbo wam," 
Job10:7 shin er U fe er m lu a ibo ga nahan kpaa, man er ma or u nana fatyô u yiman or sha ikev You kpaa nan lu ga?" 
Job10:8 Ave Ou erem, a maghem kpaa, a zuam cii doo doo; nahan kpaa, Ú gema Ú timin keraa?" 
Job10:9 Yô, shi umbur er U erem er inyatyuu nahan yô; nahan Ú shi Ú gemam M̱ hingir vuulevu zee?" 
Job10:10 U haam er atumbabua, man U tam ijen er atumbabua a kôrough nahan gaa?" 
Job10:11 U cirim inyam iyol kua kwavyolough kpaa; U korom, U zuam sha ikuhe kua igbila." 
Job10:12 U nam uma, shi U er a mo dedoo, iko i U wem ne, i kura jijingi wam." 
Job10:13 Nahan kpaa U hen akaa ne ken ishima You; m fa er kwagh ne a lu U ken ishima yô. 
Job10:14 Aluer mea er kwaghbo yô, ma U verem ikav, ma U nem ishô sha ifer yam ga." 
Job10:15 Aluer mea lu a ibo yô, kwagh una tserem; shin mea lu or u jighilii kpaa, me kende ityough sha ga; kunya ua ivim iyol je gande, man me lu nengen ican yam kpaa." 
Job10:16 Shin ityough yagh kia kende sha kpaa, Ú tôvom er begha a tev kwagh nahan; shi Ú er a mo á kpiligh iyol je." 
Job10:17 Ú va a mbashiada mba hev sha a mo, man Ú seer ishimanyoon You a mo; akumautya kposo kposo nga van ityav sha a mo." 
Job10:18 Ka nyi je man U due a mo ken uya? Guda ma m kpe, ma ishe kpaa, ma i nenge a mo ga." 
Job10:19 Ma m hingir er lu i jilem ga yô; ma i dughum ken uya, ma i ze a mo shin uwar." 
Job10:20 Ayange am nga kpeghee tsô ga? Tile nahan, shi dem, i̱ pever mo iyol kpeghee," 
Job10:21 er m lu a za henpe me kera hide ga la yô, ka hen tar u imegh man mure u kuugh je la;" 
Job10:22 tar u imegh mgbigh mgbigh, er angôghime nahan; tar u mure u kuugh, u lun nzughul nzughul; iwanger i u ngi er angôghime nahan." 
Job11:1 Tsô Sofar Ornaamati, gema kaa er:" 
Job11:2 Akaaôron ne kpishi nahan kpaa, ma i kaa imo sha mi gaa? Or u lamen yum nahan nana zua a ishô kpa?" 
Job11:3 Ior vea huan sha ci u imanger you nee? Er u gbe nahan tar nahan kpaa, ma or nana hee u gaa?" 
Job11:4 Gadia u kaa wer: Ityesen yam ka i wang je, m ngu wang sha ashe Ou." 
Job11:5 Aôndo ma A er kwagh, ma A bugh zwa Na, ma A yange u!" 
Job11:6 Ma A tese u akaamyer a kwaghfan, gadia a nga a seer or mfe je kuma mfe u nan vande lun a mi la kwa har; nahan u fa er Aôndo A kera umbur ibo you cii ga yô." 
Job11:7 U fatyô u fan mze u akaa a Aôndo a ze yum la kpa? U fatyô u fan kwagh u Uhembanagee cii, ú bee kpa?" 
Job11:8 Ka ica Sha hweng; ú er nana? Za shin je hemba Sheol kpaa; ú fa nyi? 
Job11:9 Ikaren na hemba lihen a tar, man hemba gbanger a zegemnger kpaa." 
Job11:10 Aluer Una gba karen man Una kôr á wuhe, Una yila mkohol u jirigh yô, ka an nana yange Unu?" 
Job11:11 Gadia Un yô, A fa agbilinaior; ka A nenge ifer, shin Una wa iko sha i ga kpaa." 
Job11:12 Kape gbilinor kpaa nana zua a mfe; man á mar wanjaki u toho hingir or je. 
Job11:13 Aluer we ú ver ishima you jighilii, man ú naregh ave ou hen a Na;" 
Job11:14 aluer ifer ia lu sha uwegh ough yô, hire a i kera ca, de kera deen iferkwagh i̱ luun ken utenti ou ga;" 
Job11:15 een, ka nahan man ú kende ishigh you sha a ibo ga, ma u til dong, ma u cie ga kpaa ye;" 
Job11:16 een, ma u hungul ican you, ma u umbur i er mngerem ma ma kar kera nahan." 
Job11:17 Uma wou kpaa ma a wanger je, ma a hembe iyange sha tembe; shin ime ia lu je kpaa, ia lu er ka sha use nahan." 
Job11:18 Tsô ma u tem dedoo, sha ci u ishimaverenkeghen ngi; een, ú yenge han han kpaa, ú za yav bem bem." 
Job11:19 Wea yav inya kpaa, ma or nana ta u mciem iyol ga; een, ior kpishi vea ker iwasen her a we." 
Job11:20 Kpa mbaaferev yô, vea hungwa ashe ikôr, gbenda u waren kpaa ngu ga, ishimaverenkeghen ve mase shin u sulen tsô." 
Job12:1 Tsô Yobu gema kaa er: 
Job12:2 Mimi je, ka ne ne lu ior ye, man kwaghfan una kpe a ven imôngo." 
Job12:3 Mo kpaa m ngu a mkav er ne nahan; m yina sha a ven ga; ka an je nan fe akaa ne ga? 
Job12:4 Mo m hingir huror wam kwagh u ahan je, mo u m yer Aôndo man Aôndo A ongom kpaa ne; or u jighilii, u mimi hingir kwagh u ahan je." 
Job12:5 Sha mhen u or u i kpe nan iyol yô, kwaghbo u tseren or, ka nan kwagh u lahan kera; ngu keghen a kegh mba angahar a dolough ve yô." 
Job12:6 Utenti mba mbanumungbenda ka ve lu a mkpeyol mbabamen Aôndo kpaa, ka ve tema bem bem; mba ve tee aôndo ve sha ave la." 
Job12:7 Kpa, pine ase ishôso, i̱ pase u; kua inyon i sha kwavaôndo kpaa, i̱ kaa u;" 
Job12:8 shin ôr kwagh a tar kpaa, u̱ tese u, kua ishu i shin zegemnger kpaa, i̱ pase u." 
Job12:9 Ken mban cii ka an nan fe er i lu uwegh ku TER ku er kwagh ne ga? 
Job12:10 Un u uma u hanma kwaghuma a lu sha ikev Na yô, kua iôôn i uumace cii kpaa." 
Job12:11 Togh ka ku kar kwaghôron, er zwa kpaa ka u bende u kav mnyoho u kwaghyan u u nahan gaa?" 
Job12:12 Ka hen mbatsan sha won kwaghfan a lu ye, shi ka ken ayange a ngeen mkav a lu kpaa ye." 
Job12:13 Ka her a Na kwaghfan kua agee a lu ye; Un ngu a mhen man mkav. 
Job12:14 Nenge, ka A yôhôl, i kera fatyô u shi maan her ga; ka A wuhe or, i kera fatyô u bughun ga." 
Job12:15 Nenge, ka A yange mngerem, tsô ma tôndo; A shi A pase ma, zan zan ma vihi tar." 
Job12:16 Ka her a Na agee kua mfe u mimi, ve lu ye; or u i tsugh nan man orcugh la, ka mba Nav je." 
Job12:17 Ka A bugh mbahenen kwagh akondo iyol, A yem a ve kera, shi A gema mbaajiriv kpaa ve hingir abumeaior." 
Job12:18 Ka A sagh ikangenev mbi utor ve kange la kera, A gema A zer ve atsar shin iwenge." 
Job12:19 Ka A bugh upristi akondo iyol, A yem a ve kera, shi A zôhô mbaageev." 
Job12:20 Ka A ngohol kwaghôron u mba ve kom u veren ishima sha a ve la kera, shi ngohol mkav u mbatamen kera kpaa." 
Job12:21 Ka A hee ashagbaior, shi A oghom kwange u mbaageev." 
Job12:22 Ka A pase akaamyer a a lu ken ime, man a dugh mure u kuugh A va a mi ken igbar." 
Job12:23 Ka A seer akuraior iyenge, shi A gema A tim a kpaa; ka A er akuraior a samber sha won, shi A za a a ken kwar." 
Job12:24 Kaa ngohol kwaghfan u uityombaiorov mba tar kera, A na ve u zenden wue wue ken desereti henpe gbenda u lu ga yô." 
Job12:25 Ve peven a pev ken ime, iwanger lu ga, ka A na ve ve zenden zemba ze zemba er or u hunden msôrom nahan." 
Job13:1 Nenge, ishe yam nenge kwagh ne cii, togh agh kpaa ungwa kar." 
Job13:2 Kwagh u ne fe la, mo kpaa m fa; m yina sha a ven ga." 
Job13:3 Kpa mo yô, me ôr kwagh a Uhembanagee, sarem ka sendegh kwagh vea Aôndo." 
Job13:4 Kpa ne yô, ne mba samber a aie, ne mba mbatwerev mba lun a inja ga." 
Job13:5 Guda yô, ma ne gbe huan ving tsô! Yô, ma i lu er ne mba a kwaghfan yô." 
Job13:6 Yô, ungwa ase ityôikaa yam hegen, ver nen ato sha akaawan a sha zwa wam ne." 
Job13:7 Ka sha ci u Aôndo je, ne er kwagh u mimi ga la, shi ka sha ci Na, ne gem ne er kwagh u icughugh kpaa yee?" 
Job13:8 Nahan né ta ken a Na? Né nôngo kwagh sha ci u Aôndo? 
Job13:9 Nahan aluer Una tôv kwagh wen yô, á doo je kpa? Shin né tsugh Un, er ka i tsugh or nahana?" 
Job13:10 Una yange ne kpee je, aluer nea sangen a sange sha dooshima ken myer yô." 
Job13:11 Icivir Na i hemban la, ia cier ne iyol gaa? Man mcieryol Na, Una ta ne mciem iyol gaa?" 
Job13:12 Akaaôron a en a a kom u á umbur a yô, nga er anzaakaa a mtwe nahan, akaayisan a en ka akaayisan a sha inya tsô." 
Job13:13 Huan nen ayôôso, dem, mo me ôr kwagh, hanma kwagh u una tserem yô, a̱ gba van tsô." 
Job13:14 Ka sha ci u nyi man me nyuman inyam yam sha anyi, man me kusu uma wam ken uwe?" 
Job13:15 Shin Una wuam kpaa, me ver ishima sha a Na; nahan kpaa me kpelan ishô i zende wam sha ishigh Nagh je." 
Job13:16 Kwagh ne una hingir mo myom je; gadia or u wan Aôndo iko ga, nana va sha ishigh Nagh ga." 
Job13:17 Ver ato doo doo sha kwaghôron wam, kwagh u m pase kpaa, a̱ nyôr ne ken ato." 
Job13:18 Nenge, m kegh iyol sha ijir yam, m fa, mo m ngu a ishô." 
Job13:19 Ka an nana cihi nana hendan a moo? gadia nahan me huan ving, me sule." 
Job13:20 Akaa ahar ne tsô, de kera eren mo a ga ye, nahan me kera yer sha ishigh You ga:" 
Job13:21 tôô uwegh Ough sha a mo kera; mcieryol Wou a̱ de tem mciem iyol ga. 
Job13:22 Yila, mo me na imo; shin mo me ôr kwagh, We gema kaam imo." 
Job13:23 Afer a am man asorabo a am yô, nga nan je? Pasem, m̱ fa tindi u peren wam kua isholibo yam." 
Job13:24 Ka nyi U yer ishigh You, U gem U nengen mo er m ngu orihom Wouwe?" 
Job13:25 Kwa u ahumbe a pulugh a mi kpaa, Ú ta un mciem iyolo? Ú zenda atôayia a ombor ityôô?" 
Job13:26 U ver akaavihin sha ci wam, U gemem, m hingir u yan dyako u afer a iyev av la." 
Job13:27 U ngu wan mo angahar ken igbe kpaa, shi U ngu tôvon igbenda yam cii, U ngu veren akevangahar a am ikighir i a̱ de aver i ga." 
Job13:28 Man gema ka or u saan ishe er kon u u venge nahan, man er ikondo i ivina i ye i yô." 
Job14:1 Or u kwase a mar nan yô, ayange a nan nga ciôn tsô, man a iv a ican kpaa." 
Job14:2 Ka nan due er fele nahan, shi nan use; ka nan kar kera er mure nahan, nan lu gbem ga!" 
Job14:3 Ka sha imbaor ne nahan ú ver ashe, Ú za a mo ken ijir Youwe?" 
Job14:4 Kpash, kwagh u wang ma a dugh ken kwagh u a lu wang ga yô! môm tsô ngu ga." 
Job14:5 Er i ver or ayange a nan yô, iyenge i iwer i nan kpaa ngi hen a We, shi U ver nan ikighir i nana fatyô u karen i ga yô;" 
Job14:6 nahan gema ashe Ou sha a nan kera, nana̱ mem, nana̱ ember sha iyange i nan, er or u eren tom sha tôndo nahan." 
Job14:7 Gadia kon u i gber u yô, mba fan er, shi ua hôm, ua de taan agbaa ga." 
Job14:8 Shin mise u u ua bee iyol shin inya, itine i u kpaa ia kpe shin inya," 
Job14:9 nahan kpaa sha u ungwan ihuma i mnger tsô ua hôm, ua ta agbaa er ahu yô." 
Job14:10 Kpa or yô, ka nan kpe nan yav inya a agee shio; een, or tôndo iôôn; yô, shi nan ngu hana?" 
Job14:11 Er mngerem ka ma uma shin ber, man er ifi ka a tôndo a uma yô," 
Job14:12 kape or ka nan yav, nan kera mough ga la; vea kera mough ga, zan zan Usha vea kar kera ve, man á nder ve ken mnyam vem kpaa ga." 
Job14:13 Kpe ahii, ma U yerem shin Sheol, ma U yerem zan zan iyugh You ma i kar kera, ma U verem shighe, ma U shi U umbur mo!" 
Job14:14 Aluer or á kpe yô, shi nana lu uma? Nahan sha ayange a mnenge u sha ican yam ne cii me kegh me veren ashe, zan zan mdugh wam una kar kuman." 
Job14:15 Ú yila, mo me gema me vengese; tom u ave Ou ua sar U." 
Job14:16 Shin er Ú ôr iyenge i a-avenangahar a am kpaa, Ú kera nenge a kwaghbo wam ga;" 
Job14:17 i kange mkarkpe wam i wa shin ikpa, Ú cir ifer yam kera." 
Job14:18 Er uwo ka u yôhôl u sar kera man i mgbegha vande hen ijiir i u kera," 
Job14:19 man mngerem ma koo awen, uikuwan mba ma kpaa, ve kuwa inya i tar kera nahan, kape ishimaverenkeghen i or i lu la, U bunde i kera." 
Job14:20 U hemba nan gbem, tsô nan kar kera; U gema ishigh ki nan, U na nan gbenda nan yem." 
Job14:21 Ônov mba nan ve zua a icivir, kpa nan fa ga, shi ve gba ijime, kpa nan fa ma kwagh sha mi ga." 
Job14:22 Ka iyol i nan tseegh, i nyoon nan ye, man shi uma u nan kpaa, nan zungu ye." 
Job15:1 Tsô Elifasa Orteman, gema kaa er:" 
Job15:2 Doo u orfankwagh nana or kwagh sha mfe u gbilinigh, nana iv iyav mbu nan a ahumbe a ken ityoughkitaregha?" 
Job15:3 Nana sendegh sha kwaghôron u a lu a inja ga, shin sha akaaôron a a wase nan ma kwagh ga?" 
Job15:4 Een, nahan yô, u ngu bunden mcie u cian Aôndo, shi u ngu nzughul a icivir i ka i civir Aôndo a mi la kpaa." 
Job15:5 Gadia ka ifer you i tese zwa wou ye, shi u tsuwa nombor u mbaatsereghev kpaa." 
Job15:6 Ka zwa wou je, u ne u ibo ye, ka mo ga! Een, ka zwa wou iyol you je, u lu pasen ibo you ye." 
Job15:7 Ka we u lu or u i hii maren nan yee? U vande lun a agunguu? 
Job15:8 U ongo mhen u ken myer u Aôndo? U urugh kwaghfan, u ngu a mi, we tswene?" 
Job15:9 Ka nyi u fe, i se se fe ga? Ka nyi mkav u lu a mi, u se se kav ga?" 
Job15:10 Mbamendenivu kua mbatsan tsung je mba hen a vese, mba tamen a teru ca je." 
Job15:11 Ishimasurun i Aôndo i kuma u ga, kua kwagh u i er a we legh legh la kpaa?" 
Job15:12 Er nan man ishima you i mgbegh u nahana? Man shi er nan ve u norom ashe," 
Job15:13 jijingi wou a hendan a Aôndo je, u rumun akaaôron a dugh u ken zwa nahana?" 
Job15:14 Or ngu nyi je, u nana lu wang? Man shi u kwase a mar nan, nana lu perapera?" 
Job15:15 Nenge, A kera suur sha uicighanmbaiorov la ga; een, Usha kpaa kera mba wang sha ishigh Nagh ga;" 
Job15:16 man hire u nan ndôhôr ishima nan hôngor kpaa, or u ka nan ma ifer er ka mngerem nahan la!" 
Job15:17 Ver ato me tese u; kwagh u m nenge a mi yô, ka un me pase u ye;" 
Job15:18 kwagh u mbafankwagh ve pase gbar gbar, hii sha uter vev je, ve yer un ga;" 
Job15:19 ka ve tseegh i ne ve tar la ye, ma orvannya lu a kar ve her atô ga." 
Job15:20 Iferor ka nan ya ican ayange a nan cii, een, anyom a i ver a sha ci u ipilaor la cii." 
Job15:21 I ov i tan mciem ngi nan ker ato; sha ayange a nan lu yagh yagh la, ortimin ka a va bul nan;" 
Job15:22 nan na jighjigh er nana due ken ime ga, man sanker kpaa ngu keghen a kegh nan." 
Job15:23 Ka nan zenden wue wue nan keren kwaghyan, nan kaan er: Ka han a lu? Shi nan fa er iyange i imegh i zurum a nan kpaa." 
Job15:24 Ishimanyian kua zayol ve ta nan mciem iyol, ve hemba nan er tor u a kohol iyol i utya yô," 
Job15:25 gadia nan naregh uwegh sha Aôndo sha ihom, nan cihi Uhembanagee;" 
Job15:26 nan nômbo ikôr nan za ta sha a Na, a igundu i akuvautya u nan." 
Job15:27 Gadia nan wa ahôm sha ishi, man nan haa adivir iwenge;" 
Job15:28 shi nan tema ken agar a a hingir atse, ayou a ma or ma nan tem ker ga, a i ver a er a̱ lu atse yô." 
Job15:29 Nana lu ornyar ga, man akaa a nan kpaa aa lu gbem ga; akaa a nan aa gba kwagh shin tar ga." 
Job15:30 Nana due ken ime ga; nomborusu ua uma agbaa a nan, nana kar kera sha iôôn i ken zwa u nan." 
Job15:31 Nana̱ de kera suur sha kwagh u gbilinigh er nana tsugh iyol i nan ga; gadia gbilinkwagh una hingir injar i nan. 
Job15:32 Á tôndo nan er shighe u nan a lu a kuma ga la je, ndaregh ku nan kpaa kua lu ndor ga." 
Job15:33 Nana ndoor atam a nan kôgh er kon u wain nahan, nana ndoor ikparen u nan er kon u olev yô." 
Job15:34 Gadia ikumior i mbaaferev ia saa ikôm, usu ua hia utenti mba mbayaningyato." 
Job15:35 Ka ve jile iyol sha dang, ve mar ifer, iyav vev mbu mar icugh." 
Job16:1 Tsô Yobu gema kaa er: 
Job16:2 M vande ungwan imbaakaa ne kpishi; ne cii, ne mba mbasurunshima mba injaav ga." 
Job16:3 Akaaôron a sha ahumbe nga a mkur kpa? Shin ka nyi je i tor u ityô u kaan imo? 
Job16:4 Mo kpaa ma m fetyô u ôron kwagh er ne nahan, aluer uma wen una lu sha ian i uma wam yô; ma m fetyô u maghen akaaôron sha a ven, ma m jingi ityough sha a ven." 
Job16:5 Ma m taver ne sha zwa wam je, ishimasurun i sha zwa wam kpaa ma i pever ne asema." 
Job16:6 Shin mea ôr kwagh kpaa, ishimavihim yam ia pever ga; shin mea wa ishima yô, ka nyi je i pandema?" 
Job16:7 Kpa hegen yô, A bee agee am cii; U tim ya wam cii kera." 
Job16:8 U kôrom taveraa–gema hingir ipasen i nan mo ibo; angev av mough num a mo mbu nan mo ibo ken igbar je. 
Job16:9 Iyugh Na andem, i ta num sha a mo; A nyuma tsombo a mo; orihom wam bon ashe sha a mo." 
Job16:10 Ve aver zwa ve sha a mo; ve; tam sambe sha henge sha ilyahan; ve kohol sha a mo a ishima i môm. 
Job16:11 Aôndo nam sha ikev i mbamimiga, A gbihim sha ikev i mbaaferev." 
Job16:12 M tema bem bem, kpa A sombom; A tam uwegh ikôr, A sombom vughô vughô; A timim sha, m hingir ishor i keren." 
Job16:13 A vaan a Na kasem yisa; A pav ahi am, A zungwe mhôônom ga; A haa mlem am inya." 
Job16:14 A pevem ahura bever bever; A va ta sha a mo er ikôror yô. 
Job16:15 M kor ibashôhô m haa iyol, m kuma korough agh inya." 
Job16:16 Ishigh yagh hingir nyian sha mlia, akurashee am kpaa, mure u kuugh gba sha mi," 
Job16:17 shin er ma kwagh u aperagh a lu sha ave am ga nahan kpaa, man msen wam kpaa a lu wang yô." 
Job16:18 We tar, de cirin awambe am ga, mliam am ma de zough a ijiir i memen ga!" 
Job16:19 Hegen je kpaa, nenge, shiada wam ngu Sha, Un u wasen mo la ngu Sha." 
Job16:20 Akar a am nga nahan mo tar; ishe yam ngi vaan a Aôndo," 
Job16:21 sha u A̱ zamber Aôndo sha ci u or, er wan u or ka nan zamber sha ci u or u nan we ndor a nan yô!" 
Job16:22 Gadia anyom shi kpuaa tsô, me za gbenda u me kera hide ga yô." 
Job17:1 Jijingi wam vôr, ayange am kpaa bee ve, ka uwar tsô u mase keghen mo ye." 
Job17:2 Mimi je, tarnahan ngu a mo, ishe yam ngi nengen sha mbam ve la." 
Job17:3 Na ase ibumun hegen, va lum ishuur hen a We iyol You; ka anti ugen nana lum ishuuruu?" 
Job17:4 Gadia U cir ve mkav u ken ishima; ka nahan man Ú na ve mhembe ga ye. 
Job17:5 Or u nan pase kwagh u akar a nan, nan ne a ibo sha u zuan a kwagh yô, ashe a ônov mba nan kpaa, aa hungwa ikôr." 
Job17:6 A geman m hingir ior kwagh u veren ishor a mi; m hingir or u i hee nan azer sha ishi yô. 
Job17:7 Ishe hingir mo cing sha ci u ishimavihin; alegh a iyolough am cii, nga er mure nahan." 
Job17:8 Kpiligh ior mbamimi iyol sha kwagh ne, mbaishôôv mba moughon num a mba ve we Aôndo iko ga yô." 
Job17:9 Kpa orperapera nana taver ishima sha gbenda u nan, u nan lu ave wang kpaa, nana seer taver a taver." 
Job17:10 Kpa ne cii, hide, shi va nen tsô; gadia m zua a ma orfankwagh ken a ven ga." 
Job17:11 Ayange am bee mbaawashima av kpaa saa ishe, ka akaa a m ver ishima sha mi je la." 
Job17:12 Ve gema tugh hingir atetan; iwanger kpaa ngi ve ikua ikua a ime. 
Job17:13 Aluer m ver ishima shin Sheol mer, ka ya wam yô, man m tar gambe wam ken ime," 
Job17:14 m kaa a mhee mer: U ngu terem; man a ijôô di mer: Ngôm man anngôm u kwase; 
Job17:15 nahan ishimaverenkeghen yam shi ngi hana? Ishimaverenkeghen yam la, ka anti nana nenge a mini?" 
Job17:16 Ia sen shin uishindan mba sheol, zum la mmem una lu shin vuulevu." 
Job18:1 Tsô Bildadi Orshuhi, gema kaa er:" 
Job18:2 Ka hanma shighe je né de u hônon akaaôrono? Vande henen nen kwagh, man sé mase ôron kwagh ye." 
Job18:3 Ka sha ci u nyi i nengen se er se mba uzendenya nahan, se hingir we er abumeaior nahana?" 
Job18:4 We u u ande iyol you sha ishimavihin ne, sha ci wou tsô, á undu tar u̱ hingir gbilini? shin á bugh vande hen ijiir i u kera?" 
Job18:5 Een, iwanger i iferor ia pir, nomborusu u nan kpaa ua mondo ga." 
Job18:6 Iwanger i i lu ken tenti u nan kpaa ia hingir ime, imenger i i lu sha a nan kpaa ia pir." 
Job18:7 A-avenangahar a nan a sha agee la aa kôvor, man mhen u nan iyol i nan una gema á gbihi nan inya." 
Job18:8 Gadia nan gba kper sha angahar a nan je, nan zende sha ihungwa i hônon." 
Job18:9 Kwaghhônon kôr nan ikishinguhar, nan gba wese." 
Job18:10 I yer nan to shin inya, kua ikôv sha gbenda." 
Job18:11 Mciem ta nan iyol avegher cii, ma ya nan angahar." 
Job18:12 Ijen bee nan agee iyol, mtim kegh nan ikua ikua." 
Job18:13 Waniunda u ku ya kwavyolough u nan, a ya alegh a nan." 
Job18:14 I tôô nan hen tenti u nan suur min la kera, i za a nan hen tor u mcieryol." 
Job18:15 Kwagh u a lu u nan ga la, gema tema ken iyou i nan, i haa sulfur sha ya u nan." 
Job18:16 Amise a nan uma shin inya, vegher u sha yô, gbaa u nan use." 
Job18:17 M-umbur u ma i umbur nan hen tar kpaa, hungul kera, á kera ter iti i nan sha won mayange ga." 
Job18:18 I zenda nan ken iwanger kera, nan yem ken ime, i hure nan shin tar kera kpaa." 
Job18:19 Nan ngu a wan shin ma wan u wan u nan ken ityô i nan kpaa ga; ma or shi hen ajiir a nan lu tsan la kpaa ga. 
Job18:20 Mba ve lu shin ityôtar yô, kpiligh ve iyol sha iyange na la; man mba ve lu sha ityoughkitaregh yô, mke ta ve iyol." 
Job18:21 Mimi je, kape uya mba mba ve lu a mimi ga la, ve lu ne, kape ya u or u fan Aôndo ga kpaa, a lu ne." 
Job19:1 Tsô Yobu gema kaa er: 
Job19:2 Né vihim ishima nan je, né heren mo sha akaaôrono?" 
Job19:3 Ka acin pue je, ne lu van mo ahenge ne; ne er a mo dang, kunya kpaa u kôr ne ga." 
Job19:4 Shin a lu mimi je, m er kwaghbo yô, kwaghbo wam ngu sha a mo iyol yam tsô." 
Job19:5 A lu mimi je, hange ne u gengese iyol sha a mo yô, pasem nen ibo yam, i i lu ityôikaa i van mo ahenge la." 
Job19:6 Fa nen, ka Aôndo je, A nzughul a mo ye, A wa kper Na kasem yisa." 
Job19:7 Nenge, ka m gbire vaa, kpa i ungwam her ga, m yila mer i̱ wasem, kpa ijirôron i sha mimi ngi ga." 
Job19:8 A wa igyar yisam gbenda sha er m̱ de fetyô u karen ga yô, A wam ime sha igbenda!" 
Job19:9 A erem icivir kera, A saghem tsar sha ityou kpaa." 
Job19:10 A yôhôl mo avegher cii, m saa ve; A môgh ishimaverenkeghen yam, er ka kon nahan." 
Job19:11 Iyugh Na ta sha mo, yegh er usu nahan, A nengem er m ngu orihom Na yô." 
Job19:12 Akum a Na ka a va ishima i môm, a ta atihi a inyaagh sha u nôngon ityav a mo, a wa afo a kase tenti wam a yisa." 
Job19:13 A za ver anmgbianev av ica a mo; mba ve fem kpaa ve gbihim kera. 
Job19:14 Anmgbianev av kpaa, ve de u van her a mo, ahur a am a mimi kpaa ve hungul mo." 
Job19:15 Mba ken ya wam kua mbayevkasev mba eren mo tom, ve gema ve nengen mo er orvannya nahan, m hingir ve er or u ve fe nan ga yô." 
Job19:16 M yila kpan wam, kpa a vengese ga, ka m zamber a na sha zwa wam." 
Job19:17 Iôôn yam kpaa hingir kwagh u vihin kwase wam je; m hingir ônov mba ngôm kwagh u ndôhôrshima. 
Job19:18 Mbayev mba kiriki kpaa laham, ka mea nôngon u moughon sha kpaa ve terem." 
Job19:19 Ahur a am a tumen idyu a ve cii, nyaghem, mba ve doom ishima kpaa ve gema ijime a mo." 
Job19:20 Akuhe am var sha kwav wam kua inyam yam, m war sha ikughur." 
Job19:21 Yô, zungwem mhôônom, zungwem nen mhôônom, ne ahur a am; gadia uwegh ku Aôndo ta sha a mo." 
Job19:22 Shi ka nyi ne tevem a ican er Aôndo nahana? Man ne yam ijime je, kpa kuma ne gaa?" 
Job19:23 Ma i nger akaaôron am hegen! Ma i nger a ken ruamabera! 
Job19:24 Ma i nger a sha pensel u iyôô man sha tojir, ma i nger a sha vande, a̱ lu her gbem!" 
Job19:25 Kpa mo yô, m fa Oryiman wam ngu uma, ken masejime Una mough Una tile sha vuulevu." 
Job19:26 Er á tolough kwavyolough wam kera, inyam yam ia lu ga kpaa, me nenge a Aôndo." 
Job19:27 Un u mo me nenge a Na iyol yam, ashe am je, aa nenge, á lu a orgen ga. Ahi am nga vihin ken atô wam sha mzungu." 
Job19:28 Aluer nea kaa ner: Nahan sé er un ican nana? Gayô i zua a ityôkwagh ken a na je— 
Job19:29 yô, cia nen sanker; gadia iyugh ka iferkwagh, i kuma mtsaha u sha sanker, sha u ne̱ fa er ijirôron i lu yô." 
Job20:1 Tsô Sofar Ornaamati, gema kaa er:" 
Job20:2 Ka sha ci u nahan je man mbamhen av ka ve vam a mrumun ye, sha ci u tolough mo ken ishima." 
Job20:3 M ongo mzehe u a nem kunya la, kpa ka jijingi u a dugh sha mkav wam a nem imo ye." 
Job20:4 U kera fa kwagh ne hii ngise je, hii shighe u i ver or shin tar la je gaa?" 
Job20:5 er m-erikenge u iferor a lu tiônôô, man iember i ormimiga kpaa i lu kpeghee tsô." 
Job20:6 Shin icivir i nan kôndo ar Sha, ityough ki nan kpaa ki tagher sha abeen," 
Job20:7 nahan kpaa nana saa ishe er akôngo a nan ze yô; mba ve vande nengen a nan, vea pine er: Nan ngu hana?" 
Job20:8 Nana purugh kera er mnyam ma cien nahan, á kera zua a nan ga; een, á zenda nan kera er kwagh u i nenge a mi ken mnya tugh yô." 
Job20:9 Ishe i i vande nengen a nan kpaa ia kera nenge a nan ga; man ijiir i nan kpaa ia kera nenge a nan ga. 
Job20:10 Ônov mba nan vea ker iwasen hen mbaatsanev, ave a nan kpaa aa shi á hide a inyaregh ki nan;" 
Job20:11 akuhe a nan iv a agee a iyev mbu nan, kpa mbu yav a nan imôngo shin vuulevu." 
Job20:12 Shin er ifer nyoho nan ken zwa, shin nan yer i shin nombor u nan," 
Job20:13 shin nan kôr i, nan rumun er i̱ yem ga, zwa u nan kpaa u koso i, i̱ lu her," 
Job20:14 nahan kpaa, kwaghyan u nan u ken uya, una gema una hingir mlem ma igbinde ken iyav mbu nan." 
Job20:15 Nan mena inyaregh kpa shi nan sua ki kera; Aôndo Una dugh ki ken iyav mbu nan kera. 
Job20:16 Nana ma megh ku gbinde; nombor u iyô ua wua nan. 
Job20:17 Nana nenge a uifi ga, uikuwan mba zar u iyoughough kua atumbabua a kôrough la." 
Job20:18 Kwagh u nan zough a mi sha tom u ican la, nana hide a min–nana mena un ga–nana zua a iember sha min ga, mtsera u nan zough a min sha kasua la kpaa." 
Job20:19 Gadia nan er mbaatsanev ican, nan ta ve kera, ya u nan ngohol sha agee la kpaa, nana maa un ga." 
Job20:20 Gadia nan fe mmem ken a nan ga, nana yem a akaa a a doo nan la ga." 
Job20:21 Ma kwagh shi her u nan ye ga ze, ka nahan man mkpeyol u nan una tsa ga ye." 
Job20:22 Er akaa a nan a dumbur nahan kpaa, nana ya ican; uwegh ku hanma or u nan lu ken ican ku sha a nan." 
Job20:23 Sha u ivin iyav mbu nan yô, Aôndo Una haa nan iyugh Na i vihin, Una nôô i sha a nan, ia hingir kwaghyan u nan." 
Job20:24 Nana nyôngoso ikav mbi tswamev mbi iyôôv, ada u togula una pev nan á due kera;" 
Job20:25 nan tsuwa i, ken ijime i nan kera; zwaivaan u engem u due nan ken mle; mciem ta nan iyol." 
Job20:26 I ver angôghime sha ci u inyaregh ki nan; usu u i keer u a keer ga, ua hia nan; ua hia kwagh u a shi ken tenti u nan la kera." 
Job20:27 Sha ngu pasen kwaghbo u nan, tar kpaa mough num a nan." 
Job20:28 Akaa a ken ya u nan á kura a kera, á kar a mi kera sha iyange i iyugh Na." 
Job20:29 Ka kwar u iferor sha uwegh ku Aôndo je ne, kua dyako u Aôndo A ver nan yô." 
Job21:1 Tsô Yobu gema kaa er: 
Job21:2 Ver nen ato ungwa nen kwaghôron wam doo doo; a̱ gema a̱ hingir ne kwagh u surunshima. 
Job21:3 Nam ian, mo kpaa, m̱ ôr kwagh; me ôr kwagh wam, tsô ú mase nahan taraha." 
Job21:4 Mo yô, ijir i m yer yô, ka sha kwagh u oro? Á er nan man me yina ishima ga?" 
Job21:5 Kenger mo, i̱ kpiligh ne iyol, wa uwegh zwa." 
Job21:6 Ka mea hen sha mi yô, ishima i nyian mo, i cier mo iyol." 
Job21:7 Ka nyi je mbaaferev ve lu uma, ve hingir mbabeenyol; een, ve seer a seer agee kpaa nahana?" 
Job21:8 Tsombor ve ngu a ve imôngo je, ônov vev kpaa mba sha ashe ve je." 
Job21:9 Uya vev mba bem bem, kwagh u tan mciem iyol ngu her ga, akpa u Aôndo u tsahan a mi kpaa ngu sha a ve ga." 
Job21:10 Nombua ve ka a unde a yina ga; ngôbua ve ka a mar a dugh iyav ga. 
Job21:11 Ka ve tindi mbayev vev ve zenden er ka ikumuile yô, ônov vev kpaa ve tsuwen ve ember." 
Job21:12 Ve wan imo sha angenga man molo, ve ember sha imo i imar i tôngon." 
Job21:13 Kpe ve iyol sha ayange a ve cii; fese je ve sen shin Sheol. 
Job21:14 Nahan kpaa, ve kaa a Aôndo er: Kar hen a vese kera, gadia sar se u fan igbenda You ga." 
Job21:15 Uhembanagee la ngu nyi je, u sé civir Unu? Man ka nyi mtsera sé zua a mi aluer se sônon Un yôô?" 
Job21:16 Nenge, mkpeyol ve la, ka sha ikev ve a lu ga; mhen u mbaaferev gba ca a mo." 
Job21:17 Ka acin a me je ka i pir imenger i mbaaferev, man mtim ve kpaa a tser ve, man shi Aôndo a ne ve akaavihin sha iyugh Naa?" 
Job21:18 Man ve hingir er atôayia sha ahumbe, man er akoo a ahumbe a taver a purugh a mi kera nahana?" 
Job21:19 Aôndo ka A ver ifer i nan, i̱ lu her, sha ci ônov mba nan; guda ma A kimbi nan iyol i nan, er nana kav yô." 
Job21:20 Guda ashe a nan iyol i nan ma a nenge a mtim u nan, man nan iyol i nan nana ma iyugh i Uhembanagee la." 
Job21:21 Gadia ka nyi shi i gbe nan a ya u nan ken ijime i nan, zum u i tôndo iyenge i iwer i nan kera laa?" 
Job21:22 Ma or ngu u nan tese Aôndo kwaghfan je kpa, Un u A er mba ve tem Sha ijir laa?" 
Job21:23 Orgen ka nan kpe a agee a nan iyol taveraa, kwagh nyian nan ishima ga, kwagh za nan iyol kpaa ga," 
Job21:24 iyol i nan wa ahôm, mshiam ma akuhe a nan ma ndôhôr shou shou." 
Job21:25 Orgen di ka nan kpe a mvihi u ken ishima i nan, nan vande benden kwaghdoon zwa ga." 
Job21:26 Ve cii ka ve yav shin vuulevu imôngo, azôô a cir ve iyol." 
Job21:27 Nenge, m fa mhen wen, kua zwazuan u ne zough sha a mo sha mhen u bo." 
Job21:28 Gadia ne kaa ner: Ya u ipilator ngu hana, man tenti u mbaaferev ve tem her la ngu hana?" 
Job21:29 Ne pine mbazenden sha gbenda la gaa? Ne fatyô u nyiman ushiada vev ga," 
Job21:30 er ka i yima iferor sha iyange i bo la, man shi ka i war nan sha iyange i iyugh la." 
Job21:31 Ka an nan na nan ibo sha inja i nan la, sha ishigh ki nana? Man ka an nan or nan iyev sha kwagh u nan ere?" 
Job21:32 Ka i tôô nan i za a nan shin uwar, shi i kuran uwar u nan u lu her doo doo." 
Job21:33 Akpoghol a inyaagh a shin pev doo nan, ior cii kpaa mba dondon nan ijime, mba ve vande a nan kpaa ve ngee iyenge gande u ôron." 
Job21:34 Né er nan man né surun mo ishima sha gbenda u gbilinigh nahana? Kwaghôron wen u ne ve a mi, ka icugh tseegh i mase lun sha mi ye!" 
Job22:1 Tsô Elifasa Orteman, gema kaa er:" 
Job22:2 Or á fatyô u eren Aôndo kwagh u una lu Un a inja je kpa? Ei, orfankwagh ka nan er kwagh u injaa sha ci u nan iyol i nan."
