Job22:3 Perapera wou ngu Uhembanagee ma kwagh u wan iko a mi je kpa? Shin ka Un a mtser aluer igbenda you ngi vough yôô? 
Job22:4 Ka sha ci u mcieaôndo wou, A tsahan we, shi A ze a we ken ijir kpaa yee?" 
Job22:5 Kera ka ifer you i vese ye gaa? Akaabo a ou kpaa nga a ikighir ga. 
Job22:6 Gadia u ngohol atungu hen anngôu sha inja ga, u er uidyeleghmbaiorov akondo a ve kera kpaa," 
Job22:7 u ne mbavôron mngerem wer ve̱ ma ga, u nyum mbagenev kwaghyan kpaa." 
Job22:8 Kpa or u ageegh yô, ka nan, nan lu a tar ye; man or u icivirigh kpaa, ka nan, nana tema ken u." 
Job22:9 U ne kasev mba côgholov gbenda ave gbilin, akaseaveegh a ancôgholov kpaa i kever a kera." 
Job22:10 Ka nahan man akaahônon a kase u a wa atô, man mciem ma tan we iyol fese ye." 
Job22:11 Shin u nenge a ime kua aiv a mnger a a uv u la gaa? 
Job22:12 Aôndo ngu Sha hweng je gaa? Nenge mgbeca u asan a a hembe gban ca la. 
Job22:13 Man u kaa wer: Aôndo fa nyi? Una fatyô u ôron ijir ken angôghime? 
Job22:14 Abeen a wan ime hingir kwagh u yisan Un sha u A̱ de nengen kera ga yô; ngu zenden sha kwavaôndo Sha! 
Job22:15 Ka u ka zan sha tsegbenda, u mbaaferev ve vande zenden sha mi la?" 
Job22:16 Ve mba i tsuwe ve kera er shighe ve a lu a kuma ga la, mba imagh vegh ki kough kera er ifi nahan;" 
Job22:17 ve mba ve kaa a Aôndo er: Kar hen a vese kera; man: Ka nyi je, Uhembanagee Una er se?" 
Job22:18 Nahan kpaa, A iv uya vev sha akaa a dedoo. Kpa mhen u mbaaferev gba ca a mo." 
Job22:19 Mbaperapera mba nengen kwagh la, ka saan ve iyol; mbaishôôv mba nahan ve tar:" 
Job22:20 Mimi je, mba ve mough num a vese la, i gber ve kera, man kwagh u a shi ve her kpaa, usu hia." 
Job22:21 Zua vea Aôndo, yô, tema bem bem; ka nahan man ú zua a iveren ye." 
Job22:22 Shi ngohol ityesen hen zwa Na, koso akaaôron a Na ken ishima you." 
Job22:23 Aluer ú hide hen Uhembanagee yô, á maa u; aluer ú dugh afer ken utenti ou kera," 
Job22:24 aluer ú haa zenaria shin inya, man zenaria u Ofir kpaa ken awen a shin iwagh," 
Job22:25 nahan Uhembanagee Una hingir inyaregh you kua atihi a azurfa a ou kpaa ye; 
Job22:26 ka nahan man ú ember ken Uhembanagee, shi ú kende ishigh you sha ken Aôndo kpaa ye." 
Job22:27 Ú sôn Un, Una ungwa u, shi ú kure uiceghzwa ou kpaa." 
Job22:28 Kwagh u u we ken ishima yô, una kure sha mi, iwanger kpaa ia wanger sha igbenda you." 
Job22:29 Shighe u ia sen a sen yô, ú kaa wer: Kende sha; man or u varen inya kpaa, Una yima nan." 
Job22:30 Una yima u nan lu a ishô ga kpaa; een, á yima nan sha ci u mwanger u ave ou." 
Job23:1 Nahan Yobu kaa er: 
Job23:2 Nyian je kpaa mliam am ma sha ishimavihin; uwegh agh yuhwa sha mtoghor wam. 
Job23:3 Ma m shi fe henpe me zua a Na yô, ma m ze zan zan sha ijiir Na i teman la." 
Job23:4 Yô, ma m er kwagh wam wanger wanger sha ishigh Nagh, ma m iv zwa wam a atôakaa." 
Job23:5 Ma m fe akaaôron a Una kaam, man shi ma m kav kwagh u Una ôrom kpaa yô." 
Job23:6 Una kighir mo sha tahav Nav mbu vesenee? Ei, Una ver ato her a mo." 
Job23:7 Nahan orperapera una zamber a Na; ka nahan man me war orjir wam gbem ye. 
Job23:8 Nenge, mea za vegher u sha ityoughkitaregh, Un ngu ker ga; shin shin ityôtar kpaa, m nenge a Na ga;" 
Job23:9 ken imbusutarimese, her ape A lu eren tom kpaa, m fatyô u nengen a Na ga; Una gema vegher u ken imbusutariyan kpaa, m nenge a Na ga." 
Job23:10 Gadia A fa er zende wam u lu yô; aluer Una karem kpaa, me due er zenaria nahan." 
Job23:11 Nguhar wam var sha angahar a Na; m wa gbenda Na iko, m kaha ga." 
Job23:12 M hide ijime sha tindi u sha zwa Na kpaa ga; m wa akaaôron a Na iko, je hemba kwaghyan wam kpaa." 
Job23:13 Kpa Un ngu a mhen môm tsô, ka an nana gema Unu? Kwagh u a sar Un la yô, Una er." 
Job23:14 Gadia Una er kwagh u i verem la; ambaakaa ne nahan nga Un ken ishima kpishi. 
Job23:15 Ka nahan man i cier mo iyol sha ishigh Nagh ye; shighen u ka mea umbur yô, mciem ma haam iyol a Na." 
Job23:16 Gadia Aôndo er ishima yam, i vôr, Uhembanagee tam mciem iyol;" 
Job23:17 gadia m ngu saan, ka sha ci u ime ga, shin ka sha ci u angôghime u a cirim ishigh ne kpaa ga." 
Job24:1 Ka nyi Uhembanagee A ver ashighe ga, man mba ve fe Un kpaa, ve nengen ayange a jirigh a Na ga?" 
Job24:2 Mba ve kper a akav a ipaventar, mba; ka ve ngohol akumaiyôngo sha apera, ve gba koson a." 
Job24:3 Ka ve zenda jaki i ancôgholov, ve ngohol kwasecôghol bua ityungu." 
Job24:4 Ve mgbegha mbaibanave sha gbenda kera; atsanaior a shin tar kohol imôngo yer kera. 
Job24:5 Nenge, bee ujaki mba ken toho ken desereti nahan, kape ka ve yar tom ve la, ve keren kwaghyan; taaikôngo ka a na ve kwaghyan sha ci u ônov vev." 
Job24:6 Ka ve sunda kwaghyan ve ken toho; ve yar twar sha ikon i wain i mbaaferev. 
Job24:7 Ka ve yav tugh idyelegh a ikondo ga, mba a kwagh u cirin wuhe mi ga." 
Job24:8 Iyol heen ve sha ura u sha iwo, ve lian ken vande sha mban u ijiir yeren." 
Job24:9 Mba ve tsough wanikundan u icôghol ityumba zwa, mba; man ve ngohol kwagh u mbaatsanev ve lu a mi iyol la, ityungu." 
Job24:10 Ve zenden idyelegh, mba a ikondo iyol ga, man ve tôôn aile a uwua ijen;" 
Job24:11 ve kaan mkurem ken atô gar u ior mban, ve shoghol wain shin ahungwa a shoghol wain ker la, kpa imura lu kôron ve." 
Job24:12 Ken gar yô, mtoghor u ior dugh ker, man uma u mba i gber ve avav la ngu vaan; kpa Aôndo ngu wan msen la iko ga." 
Job24:13 Mban yô, mba ken nongo u mbavendan iwanger; ve fa igbenda i i ga, mba tem ken igbenda i i kpaa ga." 
Job24:14 Orwuanor ka nan mough sha use, nan za wua icanor kua oribanave; tugh yô, ka nan hingir er ormbaiv nahan." 
Job24:15 Ishe i idyaor ka i keghen aôndoaimegh, nan kaan er: Ma ishe ia nenge a mo ga; nan cir ishigh ki nan kpaa." 
Job24:16 Ken ime ve pev ayou; atetan ve yer ayol a ve, ve fa iwanger ga." 
Job24:17 Gadia ve cii, angôghime ngu ve er sev nahan; gadia ve fa mcieryol u angôghime dedoo." 
Job24:18 Ka ve kar kera fefa sha kwavmnger; i wa tar u ve ya dyako la ifan shin tar; ve kera za sha gbenda u sule u ikon i wain ga. 
Job24:19 Icegh kua mtsee, ka ve uma mngerem ma senou kera, kape Sheol ka a er a mba ve er kwaghbo la." 
Job24:20 Iyav mbu mbu mar nan mbu hungul nan, nan nyoho azôô, u yan, á kera umbur nan mayange je ga; kape á kever mban u perapera kera er kon nahan la." 
Job24:21 Ka or u nan sar kwaseikôm u a maren ga la, shi nan eren a kwasecôghol dedoo ga la." 
Job24:22 Nahan kpaa, A rumun er mbaageev ve̱ tsa sha won sha tahav Nav; ve mough, shin er ve lu henen er vea kera war ga nahan kpaa." 
Job24:23 Ka A de ve, ve̱ tema bem bem, ve̱ suur sha mi kpaa; man ashe Na nga sha igbenda ve." 
Job24:24 Ve kende ayol a ve sha, shighe kpeghee tsô, maa ve kera lu ga; een, i kighir ve inya, i kar a ve kera er mbagenev cii nahan. I tôndo ve kera er asagher a wua nahan." 
Job24:25 A lu nahan ga yô, ka an nana pasem er m lu or u aie, man nana gema kwaghôron wam una hingir gbilini?" 
Job25:1 Tsô Bildadi Orshuhi, gema kaa er:" 
Job25:2 Torteman kua mciem ma tan iyol mba her a Na; ka A na bem sha ajiir a Na a sha. 
Job25:3 Akumautya a Na nga a ikighir je kpa? Man ka an je iwanger Na i de wanger sha nan ga? 
Job25:4 Nahan á er nan man or nana lu perapera sha ishigh ki Aôndo? Shin á er nan man or u kwase a mar nan, nana lu wanger wangeraa?" 
Job25:5 Nenge, uwer je kpaa u wanger ga, asan kpaa nga wang sha ishigh Nagh ga," 
Job25:6 man hire or, u nan lu ijôô, kua wan u or u nan lu anyigôô!" 
Job26:1 Tsô Yobu gema kaa er: 
Job26:2 Nenge, er u wase or u nan lu a agee ga la, shi u yima uwegh ku ku taver ga la kpaa!" 
Job26:3 Nenge, er u wase or u fan kwagh ga mhen je, shi u pase kwaghfan wuee kpaa!" 
Job26:4 Ka an u pase nan kwaghôron wouwe, man ka jijingi u an a dugh hen a wee?" 
Job26:5 Ujijingi mba mbakpenev mba gbidyen akarkase iyol shin mkur u mnger, kua mba ve tem shimi kpaa." 
Job26:6 Sheol ngu idyelegh sha ishigh Nagh, ijiir i mtim ngi a kwagh u cirin iyol min ga." 
Job26:7 A samber imbusutarimese sha iamegh, A har tar sha ma kwagh ga." 
Job26:8 A kohol mngerem A hure ken abeen a Na a il, nahan kpaa ma pav ibeenegh ga." 
Job26:9 A yisa ishigh ki ikônough Nagh ki torough, A samber ibeenegh Nagh sha mi." 
Job26:10 A kpela ihwa sha ikighir i kwavmnger A ningir A tser, zan zan za ar sha ikighir i iwanger a ime." 
Job26:11 Ityôv mbi Shaav tenger, kondo mbi iyol gbong sha mzehe Na." 
Job26:12 A kpianger zegemnger sha agee Na, A her Rahabi sha kwaghfan Na." 
Job26:13 Ka sha iôôn Na, i wanger Usha ye; uwegh Nagh kuma iyô i karen ayem." 
Job26:14 Nenge, akaa angan ka akaa a ken kpe u aeren a Na tsô; ka anivur u aun a Na tsô, se ongo ye! kpa mdor u agee a Na yô, ka an nana fatyô u kavena?" 
Job27:1 Tsô Yobu shi tôô injakwagh na, gba ôron er:" 
Job27:2 Mimi je, er Aôndo A lu u uma, u A ngohol mo mimi kera, man Uhembanagee, u A er uma wam ican yum ne," 
Job27:3 er uma wam hira ngu ker a mo doo doo ne, man iôôn i Aôndo kpaa ngim ken ahenga," 
Job27:4 zwa wam ua ôr kwagh u ifer ga, man nombor wam kpaa ua ôr kwagh u icughugh ga." 
Job27:5 Mayange me na ishô sha won ga, zan zan me kpe je kpaa, me gbihi mimi wam ga." 
Job27:6 Me kusu perapera wam, me gbihi un ga, ayange a uma wam cii, ishima ngi nan mo ibo sha imô mayange ga." 
Job27:7 Orihom wam a̱ hingir er iferor nahan, man or u moughon num a mo nana̱ hingir er u nan lu a mimi ga yô." 
Job27:8 Gadia ishimaverenkeghen i or u nan vende Aôndo la, ngi nana, zum u Aôndo Una tôndo nan kera, Una tsuwe uma u nan kera laa?" 
Job27:9 Aôndo Una ungwa mliam ma nan zum u ican i tser nan laa? 
Job27:10 Nana zer ember ken Uhembanagee, shi nana yilan sha iti i Aôndo gbem gbem je kpa?" 
Job27:11 Me tese ne kwagh u sha uwegh ku Aôndo; kwagh u a lu hen Uhembanagee la, me yer un ga." 
Job27:12 Nenge, ne ayol a en cii ne nenge a mi; man inja na nan ne hingir dang nahana?" 
Job27:13 Ngun ka ci u iferor nan ngohol hen Aôndo, kua dyako u uipirambaiorov ve ngohol hen Uhembanagee yô;" 
Job27:14 Aluer ônov mba nan vea ngee kpaa, ka sha ci u hingir kwaghyan u sanker tsô; tsombor u nan kpaa, kwaghyan una kuma u ga." 
Job27:15 Asande a a shi nan her la kpaa, bouange una haa a shin uwar; man kasev mba côgholov mba nan kpaa, vea zungwe ku ga." 
Job27:16 Shin nana kohol azurfa er vuulevu nahan, man shi akondo er inyandor nahan kpaa," 
Job27:17 nana kohol a kpaa, kpa ka mbaperapera vea haa a ye, azurfa la kpaa, mbaishôôv vea kar kwar sha mi." 
Job27:18 Ka nan maa iyou i nan er adenger nahan, man er daar u or u kuran sule ka nan er la nahan." 
Job27:19 Nan za yav a inyaregh je, kpa nan kera mough ga; nan bugh ashe a nan, ma kwagh kpaa a kera lu ga." 
Job27:20 Mciem ma haa nan iyol er ikuwanmnger nahan; uraahumbe va kuwa a nan tugh. 
Job27:21 Ahumbe a sha ityoughkitaregh a va tera nan kera, a kar a nan sha ijiir i nan kera." 
Job27:22 Gadia Aôndo Una ta nan kwagh, Una zungwe mhôônom ga, nana nôngo u waren uwegh Nagh fese." 
Job27:23 Ior vea kure nan ave, vea hure nan hen ijiir i nan kera." 
Job28:1 Gadia ijiir i azurfa a dugh her, ngi, shi ijiir ngi sha ci u zenaria u i ser un la kpaa." 
Job28:2 Ka shin inya i dughun iyôgh ki iligh ye, man ka iwen kpaa i soughon i man togula a dugh ker ye." 
Job28:3 Or ka nan er ime i bee kera, zan zan ar hen ikighir i hemban zan cii, nan sangen awen a angôghime kua a mure u kuugh kpaa ye." 
Job28:4 Nan time ihungwa ca a ijiir i or nan tem la; angahar a karen sha kera umbur ve ga; i zer ve, ve shir shin, mba ca a ior, ve zungur." 
Job28:5 Inya yô, ka shin i je kwaghyan a dugh ye; kpa shin atô u i je, i vughul shimi er ka sha usu yô." 
Job28:6 Awen a i, ka ijiir i usafir, vuwe zenaria ngu ker." 
Job28:7 Gbenda la yô, inyon i tswam fa u ga, ishe i tsoghor kpaa ngi a nenge u mayange ga;" 
Job28:8 inyamikume i manger, ndyar sha u ga; begha kpaa kar sha u ga." 
Job28:9 Nan naregh uwegh ku nan sha vande u taver; nan môgh iwo shin atine a i je. 
Job28:10 Nan ongor igbenda ken avande; ishe i nan ngi nengen akaa a injaa atô kposo kposo. 
Job28:11 Nan kondo ambor a mnger er a̱ de saar ga; kwagh u a lu myer kpaa, ka nan due a mi ken igbar." 
Job28:12 Kpa kwaghfan yô, ka han je á zua a mini? man ijiir i mkav yô, ngi hana?" 
Job28:13 Or fa inja na ga; mba zough a mi ken tar u mbaumav kpaa ga. 
Job28:14 Ivmnger ngi kaan er: Ngu ken a mo ga; zegemnger kpaa kaan er: Ngu hen a mo ga. 
Job28:15 Zenaria u wang kpaa á fatyô u nan sha mi ga, man azurfa kpaa, á fatyô u karen myohom nam kimbin ishe na a min kpaa ga." 
Job28:16 Zenaria u Ofir kuma sha mi ga, shin oniki u taver ishe je kpaa ga, shin safir kpaa ga." 
Job28:17 Zenaria man jingi kpaa yina u karen sha mi; á fatyô u musan un sha ikav mbi zenaria u wang kpaa ga. 
Job28:18 Korali man krusetalu kuma u teren je ga; een, u lun a kwaghfan hemba urubi inja," 
Job28:19 Topashi u Etiopia kpaa kuma u karen sha mi ga, á fatyô u karen ishe na sha zenaria u wang kpaa ga." 
Job28:20 Kwaghfan yô, ka han je a dughu? Man ijiir i mkav yô, ngi hana?" 
Job28:21 Ngu myer sha ashe a uumace cii, i cir un sha u inyon i sha kpaa i̱ de fe un ga yô." 
Job28:22 Mtim man ku ve kaa er: Se ungwa gwa na sha ato ase je. 
Job28:23 Ka Aôndo A kav gbenda na ye, shi ka Un A fe ijiir na kpaa ye." 
Job28:24 Gadia Un yô, ngu nengen zan zan akighir a tar, A nenge akaa a shin tar cii." 
Job28:25 Zum u yan kar myohom ma ahumbem la yô, shi A kar mngerem sha ikaren kpaa," 
Job28:26 zum u A wa ura tindi yô, shi A ver gbenda sha ci u inyiar kpaa," 
Job28:27 zum la A nenge a mi, shi A yôô un kpaa, A ver un taveraa, shi A tôv inja na cii kpaa;" 
Job28:28 kpa or yô, A kaa a nan er: Nenge, mcie u cian TER, ka kwaghfan je la, man u paven a iferkwagh ka mkav." 
Job29:1 Tsô Yobu shi tôô injakwagh na, kaa er:" 
Job29:2 Ma m lu er sha iwer i tsuaa la yô, er sha ayange a Aôndo lu wan mo iko la nahan;" 
Job29:3 zum u imenger Na lu wanger sha ityough yagh la, man sha iwanger Na la, m lu zenden karen ken atô u imegh;" 
Job29:4 er m lu sha ayange am a uye, shighe u kwaghmyer u Aôndo lu sha tenti wam la;" 
Job29:5 shighe u Uhembanagee hira lu a mo, man ônov av kpaa ve kasem la;" 
Job29:6 shighe u i lu ôôn angahar am a ndyaren sha atumba a kôrough, man vande lu haan mo uikuwanmbamkurev la!" 
Job29:7 Zum u mea zaan sha hunda u karen yemen hen gar, mea sôr kwaghteman wam sha tembe yô," 
Job29:8 mbayevikaior vea nenge a mo yô, ve yer, mbatamen kpaa ve mough ve tile sha;" 
Job29:9 atiator huan ayôôso, a wa ave zwa;" 
Job29:10 imo i mbavesen i kondo, nombor ve u var sha ikughô." 
Job29:11 Gadia togh ku ungwam a ungwa tsô, ku nam iveren, man ishe ia nenge a mo kpaa i pase kwagh wam;" 
Job29:12 gadia m yima icanor u nan vaa er i̱ wase nan yô, kua ancôghol, u nan lu a or u wasen nan ga yô." 
Job29:13 Iveren i or u nan mgbôghom u saan ishe la, i haa sha a mo; m er ishima i kwasecôghol i ember yagh yagh." 
Job29:14 M haa perapera iyol, a cirim er ka ikondo yô; mimi wam lu er riga nahan man shi er tsar u sha ityou yô." 
Job29:15 M hingir ashe a orapirashe, man angahar a orsombon." 
Job29:16 M hingir ter u mbaibanave; m tôv ijir i or u m fe nan ga yô. 
Job29:17 M tsuwa anomanyiigh a iferor, m tsuwa nan kwagh u nan nyom sha anyi la kera." 
Job29:18 Nahan m fa mer, me kpe ken iya yam, me seer iyenge i ayange am er waarawa nahan." 
Job29:19 Mise wam samber za ar henpe mngerem ma lu yô, avure lu sha gbaa wam tugh jimin cii." 
Job29:20 Icivir i lum hegh gbem, ada wam kpaa hingir mo hegh ken uwe." 
Job29:21 Ka her a mo ior lu veren ato, keghen kpaa ye, ve huan ving, ve ungwan mhen wam." 
Job29:22 Mea ôr kwagh yô, ve kera bugh zwa ga, kwaghôron wam a nôndo ve iyol." 
Job29:23 Ve veren ashe mo er i veren sha ura nahan, ve aver zwa gbangese er ka sha ci u urahe nahan." 
Job29:24 M se ve zum u ve lu tan akperan la; msaan u ishigh yagh kpaa, ve fatyô u bunden ga." 
Job29:25 Mea kar mea za hen ve kpaa, m tema ityoor, m lu er tor u ikumior nahan, er or u surun mbazungwen asema yô." 
Job30:1 Kpa hegen yô, mba m lu tamen a ve la, mba nahan mo tar, ka ior mba uter vev kumam u me ver ve a iwa i mbakuranilev av imôngo ga." 
Job30:2 Agee a ave ve yan ma a seer mo nyi? Agee a iyolough kpaa kar hen ve kera. 
Job30:3 Ve kande sha ci u ibanave kua ijen; ve ngegher tar u ombor u kwagh a lu ker ga la. 
Job30:4 Ve zôr uihômon mba ahuuv; man amise a toho ka kwaghyan ve. 
Job30:5 I zenda ve ken ior kera; mba geren akenge a ve er ka ormbaiv yô. 
Job30:6 Nahan ka ken ikwever i shin apev ve tem ye, kua shin ahungwa a shin inya man ken ubarmbaavandev." 
Job30:7 Mba geren imo ken toho; ka ve kpela inya ve kohol shin atine a imo. 
Job30:8 Ka ônov mba abumeaior, een, ka ônov mba udangmbaiorov je, i zenda ve shin tar kera sha akpa." 
Job30:9 Man hegen yô, mo m hingir ve u wan mo icam, m hingir ve u ôron kwagh wam cam ce cam." 
Job30:10 M ndôhôr ve ishima, ve tile paleghaa a mo, kunya kôr ve u tan mo azer sha ishi kpaa ga." 
Job30:11 Gadia A saghem kwange u ada, A heem; ve kera kôr lijam sha ishigh yagh ga." 
Job30:12 Agbilinaior moughom ken uwegh ku yanegh, mba mgbeghan mo angahar kera, mba kahan igbenda ve i mtim, sha u eren num a mo." 
Job30:13 Mba vihin gbenda wam, mba wasen mtim wam er a̱ za hemen, ve ayol a ve mba a ma orwasen ve ga." 
Job30:14 Mba van er ka ken ihuragar i i gbanger yô; ka ken atô u alôgh a ayoughough je, ve dolough ve ve sha a mo ye." 
Job30:15 Mciem gba tan mo iyol, mba mgbeghan mo icivir kera er ahumbe yô, mkpeyol wam sambe kera er ibeenegh yô." 
Job30:16 Hegen yô, ishima yam vihi kondo je, ayange a ican kpaa kôrom." 
Job30:17 Tugh yô, akuhe am lu sôôn mo je a poso kera, mnyoonom am ma ngeregh, nam mmem ga." 
Job30:18 Riga wam gema, sha agee Na a hemban la, a tsulem er monriga yô." 
Job30:19 A gbihim shin anmgbiôr, m hingir er vuulevu kua mtwem yô." 
Job30:20 M ngu vaan a We, kpa U bughum zwa ga, m mough, m tile sha, kpa U gba kenger mo ving tsô." 
Job30:21 U gema U kera ngum or u zungwen mhôônom ga; ka sha agee a uwegh Ough U tevem a ican ye. 
Job30:22 U kendem sha ahumbe, U erem m zende sha a, U soughom ken kume u hiar." 
Job30:23 Gadia m fa ka U ka zan a mo ken ku, man ken ya u i ver er uumace cii ve̱ kohol ker la." 
Job30:24 Or ka nana gban yô, nan gese uwegh ku nan gaa? Shin ken mtim u nan yô, nana vaan, nana keren iwasen gaa?" 
Job30:25 M vaa sha ci u or u ican i eren nan la gaa? Ishima lu vihin mo sha ci u mbaibanave gaa? 
Job30:26 Gadia er m lu veren ishima sha kwaghdoon yô, ifer gema va ande; er m ver ashe mer me nenge iwanger yô, ime gema va." 
Job30:27 Myam zômon mo, ma mem ga; ayange a ican ta sha a mo." 
Job30:28 M ile, kpa ka sha ci u iyange ga; ka m mough m tile sha ken mkohol, m vaa, m ker iwasen." 
Job30:29 M hingir anngô u ugbaseela, or u zenden a ukonkofi imôngo." 
Job30:30 Kwav wam hingir il, ngu bughun kera, akuhe am hia sha mtsee." 
Job30:31 Ka nahan man molo wam a hingir kwelegh, imar yam kpaa hingir imo i mbavaan ye." 
Job31:1 M ya ikur a ashe am; nahan á er nan man me kenger sha iniunkwasa? 
Job31:2 Gadia ka hanma kwar á zua a mi hen Aôndo Sha; man ka hanma dyako á zua a mi hen Uhembanagee sha ajiir a Sha? 
Job31:3 Ka mtim sha ci u or u nan ban a perapera man bocan sha ci u mbaerenafer gaa? 
Job31:4 Un A nenge igbenda yam man A ôr iyenge i a-avenangahar am cii kpaa gaa? 
Job31:5 Aluer mea zenden sha atseregh, man angahar a am kpaa aa zaan fefa sha icugh yô," 
Job31:6 A̱ karem ase sha ikaren i mimi, sha er Aôndo A̱ fa mimi wam yô!" 
Job31:7 Aluer mea kaha gbenda, man ishima yam ia zaan sha isharen i ashe am, man ma acôghol kpaa aa luun mo sha ave yô," 
Job31:8 yô, de, m̱ lôô, orgen nana̱ ya, iyiagh ki ken sule wam kpaa, i̱ wuhe ki kera." 
Job31:9 Aluer ishima yam ia nzughul sha isharen i kwase, man mea lian hen hunda u or u nan we ndor a mo yô," 
Job31:10 i̱ de, kwase wam a̱ wua orgen uwua, mbagenev kpaa ve̱ gure sha a na." 
Job31:11 Gadia kwagh shon ka kwaghbo u dang je; een, ka kwaghbo u a kom mtsaha sha ikev i mbaajiriv je la." 
Job31:12 Gadia ka usu u hian zan zan aren ken mtim je, u ua vihim akaa am a m zough a mi cii kera." 
Job31:13 Aluer mea laha ityôkwagh i kpan wam u nomso shin kpan wam u kwase, zum u vea gba ayôôso a mo sha kwagh yô," 
Job31:14 nahan me er nan je aluer Aôndo Una mough sha? Aluer Una va pinem yô, me kaa Un mer nyi?" 
Job31:15 Wen u A erem ken uya, ka Un A er ngula kpaa ye gaa? Ka Un môm A er se cii ken uya ye gaa?" 
Job31:16 Aluer mea nyumen mbaatsanev kwagh u a sar ve, shin mea er kwasecôghol nana̱ hungwa ashe ikôr kpaa," 
Job31:17 shin mea yaan anruam wam mo tswen, ancôghol nana zuan a anivur ga yô—" 
Job31:18 gadia er m lu iyev je a vese hen a mo er ka hen ter na yô, m hemen un gbenda hii ken iyav mbu ngôm je—" 
Job31:19 aluer mea nenge ma or nana lu saan ishe sha mban u akondo, shin mbaibanave, vea lu a kwagh u cirin iyol ga;" 
Job31:20 aluer iwenge na ia wuese mo ga, man aluer a tsee un iyol sha ul u iyôngo yam kpaa ga yô;" 
Job31:21 aluer mea naregh uwegh sha u nzughul a ancôghol, sha ci u m nenge a iwasen yam sha hundagar yô," 
Job31:22 de, vandegh ku̱ tôndom sha kpaakpawe kera, uwegh agh kpaa ku̱ sombo sha kuhe kera." 
Job31:23 Gadia mtim u sha ikev i Aôndo kam kwagh u cieryol, icivir Na i hemban la, erem, m kera fatyô u eren ma kwagh ga." 
Job31:24 Aluer mea veren ishima yam sha zenaria, man mea kaan a zenaria u wang mer: We u ngum kwagh u suur sha mi yô;" 
Job31:25 aluer mea ember sha er m ngee a inyaregh, man sha ci u uwegh agh ku zough a kwagh kpishi kpaa yô;" 
Job31:26 aluer mea kenger sha iyange er i te la, shin uwer u u lu tan wanger wanger la," 
Job31:27 zan zan i mee ishima yam ken myer, man zwa wam ua suse uwegh agh, kua tese sha a ve yô," 
Job31:28 ngun kpaa, ka kwaghbo u a kom mtsaha sha ikev i mbaajiriv je; gadia mea er nahan tsô kpaa, m nyiman Aôndo u Sha je ve." 
Job31:29 Aluer mea ember sha kwaghbo u a tser or u nan kerem ihom, man mea timin akende zum u ican i tser nan kpaa—" 
Job31:30 mimi je, m rumun zwa wam u er kwaghbo u wa nan ifan er nana̱ saa ga—" 
Job31:31 aluer ior mba hen tenti wam vea kaa nahan ga yô, er: Or u nan idi sha iweryôron na i sha inyam ga yô, nan ngu je kpa?—" 
Job31:32 Orvannya tsa hen gbenda mayange ga, m bughun orzende ihinda yam—" 
Job31:33 Aluer mea cirin akaabo am er Adam nahan, mea yeren ifer yam ken vanger kpaa yô," 
Job31:34 sha ci u m cia ikpelaior, man ilyahan i icombor i ior i tan mo mciem iyol, je, m huan ving, sha hunda tsô kpaa m due ga yô." 
Job31:35 Kpei, ma m shi lu a or u ungwan mo!— Nenge, ikav i m we i sha uwegh agh ngin, Uhembanagee, A̱ kaa imo!— Ma m shi ongo msende u orihom wam a nger sha a mo yô!" 
Job31:36 Ma m tee un sha avande am kpee je, ma m kange un sha ityough yagh er tsar nahan," 
Job31:37 ma m pase Un kwagh u a-aven am cii, ma m ve sha ishigh Nagh er wantor yô." 
Job31:38 Aluer sule wam ua yilam ijir, man ihigha i u cii ia vaa yô," 
Job31:39 aluer mea yaan iyiagh ki u, mea kimbin ga, mea er uma u mbasulev a saa ishe kpaa yô," 
Job31:40 de, usaa ve̱ mende sha ityough ki alakema, man toho u̱ mende sha ityough ki shair. Kwaghôron u Yobu kure ve." 
Job32:1 Tsô ior itiar ne de u bughun zwa a Yobu, gadia a lu a perapera ken ashe na yum." 
Job32:2 Nahan ishima nyoon Elihu wan u Barakel, Orbushi, u ken tsombor u Ram; ka Yobu ishima nyoon un a na ye; gadia a na ishô iyol na sha ishigh ki Aôndo yum." 
Job32:3 Akar a na atar la kpaa, ishima nyoon un a ve, sha ci u ve zough a imo i ôron ga, kpa ve ne Yobu ibo yô." 
Job32:4 Elihu lu tamber u ôron kwagh a Yobu, gadia ve cii ve lu tamen a na." 
Job32:5 Kpa zum u Elihu nenge er ior itiar ne kera bugh zwa ga yô, ishima nyoon un." 
Job32:6 Tsô Elihu wan u Barakel, Orbushi, hii kwaghôron er: Mo m ngu wanye; ne yô, ne tsa sha won; ka nahan man m ne ian, m cihi u tesen ne mnenge wam ga ye." 
Job32:7 M kaa mer: Ayange a̱ ôr kwagh, ikpila-anyom kpaa i̱ tese kwaghfan." 
Job32:8 Kpa ka jijingi u ken or la, kua iôôn i Uhembanagee kpaa, ve ne ve mkav ye." 
Job32:9 Ka mbatamen tsô, ve lu mbafankwagh ga, shi ka mbatsan sha won tseegh kpaa ve fe ijir ga." 
Job32:10 Ka nahan man m kaa mer: Ver nen ato hen mo, ye, mo kpaa, me pase mhen wam." 
Job32:11 Nenge, m kegh mer me ungwa akaaôron a en, m ver ato sha atôakaa a en kpaa, zan zan ne zua a akaaôron a vough." 
Job32:12 Een, m ver ato ven, man nenge, or môm hemba Yobu ga, mô wen môm kpaa na mrumun sha kwaghôron na ga." 
Job32:13 Shi de kaan nen ner: Se zua a kwaghfan ve, ga; Aôndo Una hemba un, á lu or ga!" 
Job32:14 Gadia a sendegh kwaghôron a mo ga; man mo kpaa, ka sha mkaanem enem me ôr kwagh a na ga." 
Job32:15 Kunda ve iyol, ve kera bugh zwa ga, ve kera lu a kwaghôron ga." 
Job32:16 Nahan me tamber er ve kera er kwagh ga, ve huan ving ve kera lu a imo ga nee?" 
Job32:17 Mo kpaa me ôr kwagh wam, mo kpaa me pase mhen wam." 
Job32:18 Gadia m mgbough a akaaôron; jijingi u a lu ken a mo ngu tolough a mo. 
Job32:19 Nenge, vanger wam ngu er wain u a lu a gbenda u duen ga yô, er akpa a wain a he a a mgbôghom u paven yô." 
Job32:20 Yô, me ôr kwagh, i̱ shi heghem mo iyol, me bugh zwa me kaa imo." 
Job32:21 Yô, me ta ken ma or ga, me kume or sha kwaghôron kpaa ga." 
Job32:22 Gadia m fa u kumen or sha kwaghôron ga; á lu nahan yô, u A gbem la, Una kar a mo kera fese je." 
Job33:1 Yô, shi ungwa kwaghôron wam, Yobu ver ato sha akaaôron am cii." 
Job33:2 Nenge, m bugh zwa wam ve, nombor wam ngu ôron kwagh ken zwa wam." 
Job33:3 Akaaôron am nga pasen mimi u ishima yam; kwagh u zwa wam u fe yô, ka un ua ôr sha ishima i wang ye." 
Job33:4 Jijingi u Aôndo gbam, iôôn i Uhembanagee ngi nan mo uma." 
Job33:5 Wea fatyô yô, kaam imo; kohol iyol sha ishigh yagh, kegh ase iyol." 
Job33:6 Nenge, sha ishigh ki Aôndo yô, m ngu er we nahan vough; ka shin inya i coon mo kpaa ye." 
Job33:7 Yô, mciem am maa ta u iyol ga, mkighir wam kpaa, una yuhwa u iyol ga." 
Job33:8 Mimi je, u ôr kwagh sha ato am, m ungwa, m ungwa iov i kwaghôron wou er:" 
Job33:9 M ngu wang, m per tindi ga, m ngu tsenger tsenger je, ifer ngi ken a mo je ga." 
Job33:10 Nenge, ngu keren atôakaa sha a mo, A nengem er m ngu orihom Na nahan;" 
Job33:11 A mandem igbe angahar, tevem sha igbenda yam cii." 
Job33:12 Nenge, me kaa u, sha kwagh ne u ngu a ishô ga, gadia Aôndo hemba or." 
Job33:13 Man er nan u zehe a Na wer: Ngu nan imo sha akaaôron a or cii ga, nahana?" 
Job33:14 Gadia Aôndo ka A ôr kwagh gbenda môm, een, igbenda ihiar je kpaa, kpa or ver ikav ga." 
Job33:15 Ken mnyam ma cien, man ken mpase u ken mnya tugh, zum u or ka nana yav mem mem, ken mmeer u mnya sha gambe la," 
Job33:16 hen shighe la, ka A bugh ior ato, A var ityesen i A tesen ve la ikav," 
Job33:17 sha u Una yange or awashima u nan, shi Una bunde nan iyolgengese kpaa;" 
Job33:18 sha er Una yima uma u nan shin ihungwa, a̱ de saan sha sanker kpaa ga." 
Job33:19 Ka i tsaha nan kpaa sha mnyoonom sha gambe u nan je, man sha mtseenem ken akuhe a nan," 
Job33:20 je uma u nan a nyagh ruam, man ishima i nan i nyagh kwaghyan u dedoo;" 
Job33:21 inyam i nan i ndiir kera i saa ishe, akuhe a nan a ngise i nengen a mi ga kpaa, a due." 
Job33:22 Mimi je uma u nan a kporom ikua a ihungwa, man uma u nan kpaa kporom hen mbatimin nan." 
Job33:23 Aluer ortyom u Sha una lu a nan, ortafinta, môm ken dubu, sha u tesen or kwagh u a lu vough, u nana er yô;" 
Job33:24 man aluer Una zungwe nan mhôônom, Una kaa er: Yima nan, nana̱ de senen shin ihungwa ga, M zua a ipaan ve;" 
Job33:25 zum la inyam i nan ia hingir hegh á hemba i wanye kpaa; nana hide nana hingir er sha ayange a nan lu iyev la yô. 
Job33:26 Nana sôn Aôndo, yô, Un kpaa á doo Un a nan; nahan nana nenge ishigh Nagh a iember; kape ka A hire or a perapera u nan la." 
Job33:27 Nan gba wan icam sha ishigh ki iorough, kaan er: M er kwaghbo, m undu gbenda u mimi, kpa i kera orom iyev ga." 
Job33:28 A paa uma wam er a̱ de senen shin ihungwa ga, uma wam kpaa ngu ember iwanger." 
Job33:29 Nenge, akaa ne cii ka Aôndo A eren a sha or ye, kwa har, een, kwa tar je kpaa," 
Job33:30 sha u hiden a uma u nan shin ihungwa kera, sha er iwanger i uma i̱ taan nan iyol yô." 
Job33:31 Ver ishima dedoo, Yobu ver ato her a mo; huan ving, mo me ôr kwagh." 
Job33:32 Aluer kwaghôron ngu u yô, kaam; Ôr ase, gadia kam pe nan we ishô." 
Job33:33 A lu nahan ga yô, we ver ato her a mo, huan ving, mo me tese u kwaghfan." 
Job34:1 Tsô shi Elihu gema kaa er: 
Job34:2 Ungwa nen ase akaaôron am, ne ior mba fan kwagh; ver nen ato her a mo, ne mba ne lu a mfe." 
Job34:3 Gadia togh ku kar kwaghôron, er zwa u benden kwaghyan nahan." 
Job34:4 Yô, sé tsuwa nen ayol a ase kwagh u a lu vough; sé fa kwagh u a lu u mimi ker a vese yô." 
Job34:5 Gadia Yobu kaa er: Mo m ngu orperapera je, kpa Aôndo ngohol mimi wam kera;" 
Job34:6 er m lu a mimi nahan kpaa, i nengem er m ngu or u aie yô; ivav yam ngi been ga, shin er m lu a ibo ga nahan kpaa." 
Job34:7 Ka anti nan bee Yobu, u a me tarnahan er mngereme?" 
Job34:8 u a zenden nongo a mbaeren ityom i ifer, man ngu zan a mbaaferev imôngo kpaa?" 
Job34:9 Gadia a kaa er: Ka or a inja je ga, er nan lu a Aôndo doo doo yô." 
Job34:10 Yô, ver nen ase ato her a mo, ne ior mba kaven kwagh; Aôndo Una er iferkwagh mayange ga, Uhembanagee kpaa Una er kpe ga." 
Job34:11 Gadia Una na hanma or sha tom u nan, Una na hanma or kwagh sha ieren i nan." 
Job34:12 Een, mimi je, Aôndo Una er ifer ga, Uhembanagee Una nzughul ijir ga." 
Job34:13 Ka anti nan gem tar nan we Un sha ikeve? Man ka anti nan ver tar cii er lu here? 
Job34:14 Aluer Una ver ishima sha iyol Na yô, Una kohol Jijingi Na kua iôôn Na Una hide a mi hen iyol Na," 
Job34:15 nahan akaa a uma cii aa saa ishe, man shi or kpaa nana hire á hingir vuulevu." 
Job34:16 Aluer u ngu a mkav yô, ungwa kwagh ne; Ver ato sha imo i kwaghôron wam." 
Job34:17 Á fatyô u or u vendan mimi nana lu ortaregh kpa? Ú cihi u na Un u A lu perapera man u ageegh ibo kpa? 
Job34:18 Ka vough je, u á kaa a tor er: U ngu gbilinoro? shin á kaa a atiator er: Ne mba mbaafereve?" 
Job34:19 Man hire Un u A te ken atiator sha dooshima ga, man A hemba wan mbanyarev iko a mbaatsanev kpaa ga, gadia ve cii ka tom u ave Na je." 
Job34:20 Ka ve kpe fese; shin ateghôtôutu je kpaa, i kpoghol a ior, ve kar kera, mbaageev kpaa i kar a ve sha, kpa i lu sha uwegh ku or ga." 
Job34:21 Gadia ashe Na nga sha igbenda i or; ngu nengen ijende i nan cii kpaa. 
Job34:22 Man ime ngi ga, mure u kuugh kpaa ga, hen ape mbaerenifer vea fatyô u yeren la." 
Job34:23 Gadia A ver or shighe u nana za sha ishigh ki Aôndo er á ôr nan ijir ga. 
Job34:24 Ka A hembe ior mbaageev kera, A kera tôv ga, A gema A ver mbagenev sha ityough vev." 
Job34:25 Gadia A fa ityom ve; A ta ve inya tugh, i her ve je." 
Job34:26 A tsaha ve er aferaior nahan, sha ishigh ki mba ve lu kenger;" 
Job34:27 gadia ve kaha ve de u dondon Un, ve kera ver ishima sha ma gbenda Na môm môm je ga;" 
Job34:28 nahan ve er mliam ma mbaatsanev ar her a Na, man A ungwa mliam ma mba ican i er ve la." 
Job34:29 Aluer Wen Una huan yô, ka anti je nana na ibo? man aluer Una yer ishigh Nagh yô, ka anti nana nenge a Na— shin a lu ikurior, shin a lu or môm kpaa, ve imôngo cii—" 
Job34:30 sha er or u wan Aôndo iko ga, nana̱ de tem tor, i̱ hônon ior ga." 
Job34:31 Gadia ma or nana kaa a Aôndo je er: M ya mtsaha, kpa m er kwaghbo ga;" 
Job34:32 kwagh u m nenge ga yô, We tesem; aluer mea vande eren kwaghbo yô, me kera er ga—" 
Job34:33 nahan A̱ kure kwagh sha awashima wouwee? Gadia doo u ga, nahan we ú tese kwagh u hemban doon; ka mo ga! Yô, ôr kwagh u u fe yô." 
Job34:34 Mbakavenkwagh vea kaam, kua orfankwagh u nan ver ato her a mo yô, kpaa er:" 
Job34:35 Yobu gbe lamen tsô, ka sha mfe ga, akaaôron a na kpaa ka a sha kwaghfan ga." 
Job34:36 Guda yô, ma i kar Yobu zan zan mkur, gadia ngu ôron kwagh er ka mbaaferev yô!" 
Job34:37 Gadia ngu seer anyiman sha kwaghbo na, ngu kuren ave her atô wase, ngu seer a seer kwaghôron na u hendan a Aôndo la." 
Job35:1 Tsô Elihu shi za hemen a kwaghôron kaa er: 
Job35:2 Ngun ka vough sha mhen wou zee? U ngu kaan wer: Ka perapera wam sha ishigh ki Aôndo," 
Job35:3 er u kaan wer, ka u a inja sha nyi? M zua a nyi hemba kwagh u ma m zough a mi aluer mea lu eren kwaghbo yôô?" 
Job35:4 Yô, me kaa u imo, kua akar a ou a we imôngo cii." 
Job35:5 Kenger Sha, nenge, nenge abeen a a tav sha a kar u sha la," 
Job35:6 aluer wea er kwaghbo yô, ka nyi kwaghvihin u er Unu? Man aluer afer a ou aa ngee nan nan yô, ka nyi u er Unu?" 
Job35:7 Aluer wea lu orperapera yô, u na di Un nyi? Shin ka nyi je Una ngohol sha ikev youwe?" 
Job35:8 Ifer you yô, ka or er we nahan u er nan i ye; perapera wou kpaa ka wan u or una lu nan a inja ye." 
Job35:9 Er mbamkighir mba sha ican ve ngee yô, ior mba vaan; mba vaan keren iwasen sha ci u agee a mbautahav." 
Job35:10 Kpa ma or pine er: Aôndo u A gbem la ngu hana, ga, u A ne atsam a wuese tugh;" 
Job35:11 u A hembe tesen se kwagh a inyamtoho, man shi A er se, se hemba fan kwagh a inyon i sha." 
Job35:12 Mba vaan je, kpa A bugh zwa a ve ga, sha ci u iyolgengese i mba ve eren afer la." 
Job35:13 Mimi je, Aôndo Una ungwa gbilinkwagh ga; Uhembanagee Una wa iko sha mi kpaa ga." 
Job35:14 Man hire aluer ú kaa wer, u nenge a Na ga, ityôkwagh ngi Un sha ishi; nahan ú kegh Un!" 
Job35:15 Kpa hegen yô, er A kera tsaha sha ishima i vihin ga, man A we imanger iko yum kpaa ga yô," 
Job35:16 nahan yô, Yobu gema ngu bughun zwa na gbilin, ngu seer a seer akaaôron sha lan." 
Job36:1 Tsô Elihu shi seer kaan er: 
Job36:2 Yô, wa ishima a mo kpeghee, m̱ tese u; gadia kwaghôron shi ngu sha ci u Aôndo." 
Job36:3 Me za va a mfe wam ken ica je, me na Un u A gbem la mimi." 
Job36:4 Gadia mimi je, kwaghôron wam ka u aie ga, or u nan lu a mfe u mimi yô, nan ngu a we imôngo." 
Job36:5 Aôndo yô, ka u ageegh je, lahan ma or ga; ngu a tahav mbu mkav u ganden cii," 
Job36:6 kor uma u mbaaferev ga, kpaa ne mbayanican kwagh u a kom sha a ve yô." 
Job36:7 A tôô ashe Na sha mbaperapera kera ga; kpa A ver ve, ve tema a utor imôngo sha ikônough ki torough gbem, i kende ve sha kpishi." 
Job36:8 Aluer i mande ve agbe, man ican tser ve kpaa," 
Job36:9 nahan A pase ve aeren a ve, kua afer a ve, er ve kenden ayol a ve sha yô." 
Job36:10 Ka A bugh ve ato kpaa, sha u ve̱ ungwa ityesen, A kaa a ve er, ve̱ undu ifer ve̱ hide." 
Job36:11 Aluer vea wa iko, vea civir Un yô, vea zua a mkpeyol sha ayange a ve, man á doo ve iyol ken anyom a ve kpaa." 
Job36:12 Kpa aluer vea wa iko ga yô, vea saa ishe sha sanker, man vea kpe a mfe shio." 
Job36:13 Mba ve we Aôndo iko ken asema ve ga yô, ve mba a ishima i nyoon; mba keren iwasen shighe u A kange ve la ga." 
Job36:14 Ka ve kpe iyev, uma ve a saa ishe er mbahôngorouv nahan." 
Job36:15 Ka A yima or u yan ican sha ican i nan la, A bugh ve ato sha zayol." 
Job36:16 Kape ka A urugh we, A due a we ken bocan kera la, A va a we hen ijiir i gbangese, i i hoghol ga yô; kwaghyan u i ver u sha tebul kpaa, mkurem ma ngee sha mi." 
Job36:17 Kpa u kuma ijirôron i á ôr mbaaferev la; ijirôron kua mtsaha kôr u doo doo. 
Job36:18 Ver ishima, ishimanyoon i̱ de ze a we ken tarnahan ga; man shi mvese u ipaan a̱ de ne u mtsum ga." 
Job36:19 Inyaregh you kia kuma u yangen ican i eren we, shin tahav mbu agee ou la ciilii?" 
Job36:20 Tugh mbula mbu̱ de sar u ga, shighe u ka i kar a akuraior hen ijiir i a kera la." 
Job36:21 Kura iyol, de kera veren ishima sha ifer ga, gadia kwagh ne hemba doon we a ican i yan." 
Job36:22 Nenge, Aôndo ngu eren kwagh u icivirigh sha agee Na; ka an nan lu ortesen er Un nahana?" 
Job36:23 Ka an nan tese Un gbenda? Man shi ka an nana kaa er: Ifere? 
Job36:24 Umbur u civir tom Na, u ior ve teren u sha icam i wan la." 
Job36:25 Ior cii ve nenge a u, or ka nan nenge a u ken ica je." 
Job36:26 Nenge, Aôndo gba ikôr je, gande mfe wase; iyenge i anyom Na gande u tôvon fan." 
Job36:27 Gadia ka A kohol aberamnger, A hamber ura sha tulugh Na," 
Job36:28 A er abeen a nee ura shin inya, u nee sha ior kpishi wuee." 
Job36:29 Ma or nana fatyô u kaven msamber u abeen kua mdor u ityumbe Na kpa? 
Job36:30 Nenge, ka A samber iwanger Na, i cir Un iyol; ka A cir aiv a zegemnger kpaa." 
Job36:31 Gadia ka sha akaa angan ka A ôr akuraior ijir, shi A na kwaghyan wuee kpaa ye." 
Job36:32 Ka A gema inyiar A cir ave Na a mi; A na i zwa i gba sha orhendan. 
Job36:33 Mdor u i la, ka a pase Un; uzendenya kpaa fa er A lu van yô." 
Job37:1 Sha kwagh ne kpaa ishima ngi tan mo kwe, kera ngim ikum ga." 
Job37:2 Yô, ver ato ungwa nen ihuran i imo Na, man kume u u dugh ken zwa Na kpaa." 
Job37:3 Ka A er u u sambe shin tar cii, man inyiar Na kpaa zan zan ar sha akighir a tar je." 
Job37:4 Ken masetyô yô, imo gba kumen, A gba duran sha imo Na i ageegh; A yange inyiar shighe u ka a ungwa imo Na la kpaa ga." 
Job37:5 Aôndo ka A dura sha imo Na i cieryol, eren uzegembaakaav mba ve gande se u fan yô." 
Job37:6 Gadia ka A kaa a senou er: Haa shin inya; man a ura u nôôn kpishi kpaa er: Taver. 
Job37:7 Ka A kusu uwegh ku hanma or, sha er ior mba A gbe ve cii, ve̱ fa tom Na." 
Job37:8 Shighe la inyamtoho i ker ajiir a yeren, i tema ken avur a i." 
Job37:9 Ka ken iyou na hiar a dugh ye, man wuhe yô, ka ken ahumbe a a samben abeen la." 
Job37:10 Ka sha iôôn i Aôndo mngerem ma kôrough sha wuhe ye; mngerem ma gbanger kpaa, ma kôrough her." 
Job37:11 Ka A iv abeen a mngerem; A samber abeen a Na a nyiar la. 
Job37:12 Ka a goom wue wue sha mver Na, a eren hanma kwagh u A kaa a la, sha tar u ior ve lu sha mi ne cii;" 
Job37:13 shin ka sha ci u mtsaha, shin ka sha ci u tar Na, shin ka sha ci u erdoo, ka A na a a va." 
Job37:14 Ver ato sha kwagh ne, Yobu; tile ving, umbur ityom i Aôndo i kpilighyol la." 
Job37:15 U fa er Aôndo ka A wa i tindi, er A er iwanger i abeen a Na a nyiar la kpa?" 
Job37:16 Shin u fa er i er man abeen a til kpa? Ka ityom i kpilighyol i Un u A lu a mfe u vough la je. 
Job37:17 We u akondo ou a tsee, zum u tar ka u huan sha ahumbe a imbusutariyan la." 
Job37:18 U fatyô u samber kwavaôndo a Na imôngo, u u taver er jingi i i ker i a ker la, nahan kpa?" 
Job37:19 Tese se kwagh u sé kaa Un yô; gadia se fatyô u van a kwaghôron ga, sha ci u ime." 
Job37:20 Á kaa Un, zum u i sarem pe ôron kwagh kpa? Shin or nan kaan er i sar nan pe ma i tim nan kera, mayange kpa?" 
Job37:21 Hegen yô, or fetyô u kenger iwanger i i engem sha kwavaôndo, zum u ahumbe a kar a ese u kera la ga." 
Job37:22 Ken imbusutarimese yô, iengem i lun er zenaria nahan due; kpa Aôndo yô, tema sha icivir Na i hemban la, ta ihindi je cier iyol." 
Job37:23 Uhembanagee yô, se fatyô u kaven Un ga; A hemba agee; kpa ijirôron kua m-iv u perapera yô, Una nzughul a mi ga." 
Job37:24 Ka nahan man ior ve cie Un ye, we mba ve fe er ve mba mbafankwagh la, iko ga." 
Job38:1 Tsô TER gema kaa a Yobu ken ura u hiar er: 
Job38:2 Ka an nan we mhen ime sha akaaôron a sha mfe ga laa? 
Job38:3 Yô, ta ikondo uya hegen er nomsoor yô; Me pine u kwagh, yô, we, pasem." 
Job38:4 Shighe u M tim imagh ki taregh la, u lu hana? Kaa ase, aluer wea lu a mkav sha mi yô." 
Job38:5 Ka an nan ver mkighir u ki–gadia u fa. Shin ka an nan naregh kor u karen kwagh a mi sha ki? 
Job38:6 Ka sha nyi i tim imagh ki u? shin ka an nan ver iwen i sha zongo i u; 
Job38:7 zum u asan a sha use lu wan icam, man ônov mba Aôndo cii ger imo sha iember laa?" 
Job38:8 Ka an nan wuhu zegemnger sha uciviri, zum u a te poo, a dugh ken uya laa?" 
Job38:9 zum u M cir un abeen iyol er ikondo nahan, man angôghime gema hingir un kwagh u huren un ker la;" 
Job38:10 shi M ver un ikighir Yam kpaa, M ver un uishindan kua ucivir," 
Job38:11 man M kaa Mer: Kape ú kighir je ne, ú kar ga; ka heregh je, agôndoamnger ou a sha imanger aa kighir ye!" 
Job38:12 Er u lu je, u kaa a sev wer, av, mayange kpa? u tese m-av u use ijiir na," 
Job38:13 sha u a̱ kôr akighir a tar, a̱ ndoor mbaaferev sha u kera kpa?" 
Job38:14 I gema u er inyandor i i ver ikav sha mi nahan; akaa cii due ken igbar er ikondo yô; 
Job38:15 i ngohol mbaaferev iwanger ve kera, uwegh ku kenden sha kpaa i sombo ku." 
Job38:16 We u hungwa shin ambor a zegemnger mayange kpa? U zende ken ajiir a iuv a shin aiv kpa? 
Job38:17 I pase u kwagh u ihinda i kuugh kpa? U nenge ihinda i mure u kuugh mayange kpa? 
Job38:18 U kav igbanger i tar kpa? Kaa ase, aluer wea fa akaa angan cii yô." 
Job38:19 Gbenda u zan hen ya u iwanger ngu hana? Man ime yô, ijiir i i ngi hana?" 
Job38:20 Sha er ú hemen i zan zan hen ijiir i i, man ú kav igbenda i zan hen ya u i kpa?" 
Job38:21 U fa dedoo, gadia i mar u hen shighe la, man ayange a ou sha won kpaa ngee je!" 
Job38:22 U nyôr ken iuna i senou, shin u nenge iuna i awombo" 
Job38:23 a M ombo sha ci u ayange a ican, man sha ci u iyange i num man i utya la kpa?" 
Job38:24 Gbenda u zan henpe i pav iwanger ngu hana, henpe ahumbe a ken ityoughkitaregh nga a samber sha tar cii la?" 
Job38:25 Ka an nan pav akpa sha ci u ikumenura, man gbenda sha ci u inyiar" 
Job38:26 sha u nôôn ura hen tar u or lu ga, hen taaikôngo henpe ma or lu ga yô," 
Job38:27 sha u ivin ajiir a a lu gbilin dang la, man sha u nan gwergwe a̱ mende?" 
Job38:28 Ura ngu a ter kpa? Man ka an nan mar aberavureghe? 
Job38:29 Ka ken iyav mbu an mngerem ma ma kôrough sha wuhe la ma dughu? Man avure a a dugh Sha a a kôrough sha wuhe la, ka an nan mara?" 
Job38:30 Mngerem ka ma kôrough er ka iwen yô, kwavmnger u iv, kôrough." 
Job38:31 U fatyô u kangen ikor i Ancôgholov, shin u saghen ikangenev mbi Anyamaiwa?" 
Job38:32 U fa u duen akav a Sodiaki sha shighe u a? Shin u fatyô u hemen Ber a ônov nav gbenda? 
Job38:33 U fa atindi a Sha kpa? U fatyô, u veren mtem u una tema tor sha won kpa?" 
Job38:34 U fatyô u ngoron imo aren sha abeen, sha er mngerem ma ngeen ma cir u iyol kpa?" 
Job38:35 U fatyô u tindin inyiar, i̱ za; man ia kaa a we er: Se mban, kpa?" 
Job38:36 Ka an nan ver kwaghfan sha abeene? Shin ka an nan ne mkohol u abeen mkava? 
Job38:37 Ka an nana fatyô u ôron iyenge i abeen sha kwaghfana? Shin ka an nana fatyô u keren asegh a mnger a Sha haan kera," 
Job38:38 zum u ihundu kohol ijiir i môm hingir ijen, man alôgh a kohol a zua ayol a a laa?" 
Job38:39 U fatyô u yaren ikôr sha ci u ngôbegha? Shin u fatyô u nan agumabegha kwaghyan u been ve ijen," 
Job38:40 zum u ve yav ken avur a ve, ve meen kwagh ken ajiir a ve a yeren la kpa?" 
Job38:41 Ka anti nan ne gugôô kwaghyan na, zum u ônov nav ve vaa a Aôndo, ve zenden wue wue sha ci u mban u kwaghyan laa?" 
Job39:1 U fa shighe u ivodura i sha uwo ka i mar kpa? Shin u fatyô u tesen shighe u mbaashim ka ve mar kpa? 
Job39:2 U fa iwer i ve lu iyav kpa? Shighe u ve maren yô, u fa kpa?" 
Job39:3 Ka ve nur igundu man ve mar ônov vev ye, martoghol ve bee kera." 
Job39:4 Kpe ônov vev iyol; ka ken ikôngo ve vesen ye; ka ve due ve yem, ve kera hide her a ve ga." 
Job39:5 Ka an nan pase jakitoho, i zenden sha ishima i ii? Ka an nan sagh ikangenev mbi jaki i ken taaikôngo laa?" 
Job39:6 i M er desereti a hingir ya u i, ijiir i isha i lu her la, i hingir ijiir na i tsan." 
Job39:7 Ka i laha ayôôso a ken gar, ikenge i orhuren kpaa i ongo i ga." 
Job39:8 Ajiir a hen iwo ka ajiir a i a yan toho, i keren hanma kwagh u ndor." 
Job39:9 Iyar ia rumun ia er u tom, shi ia tsa hen kpese wou u haan ilev kwaghyana?" 
Job39:10 Ú fatyô u zeren iyar hen huwa, ú tsôghol sulee? Shin ia dondo sha a we ia tsôghol apeve?" 
Job39:11 Ú suur sha i er i lu a agee yum yôô? Shin ú wa i tom wou sha ikeve? 
Job39:12 Ú na i jighjigh wer, ia va u a iyiagh ken ya, ia kohol ki sha vande u gbiren iyiava?" 
Job39:13 Kperegh ku konkofi ka ku peer sha iember; kperegh nagh kua ingur na doo kwagh kpa? 
Job39:14 Gadia ka a undu aji na hen inya, er i̱ tsee a iyol hen inya." 
Job39:15 Hungul un er, adooga nguhar ua va hembe a, shin inyamtoho ia va ndyar a." 
Job39:16 Eren a ônov nav sha dooshima ga, er ka mba nav ga yô; ishima nyian un er tom na ua va hingir gbilinkwagh kpaa ga;" 
Job39:17 gadia Aôndo nyume un kwaghfan, A na un mkav kpaa ga." 
Job39:18 Ka una mough sha ayem yô, a laha nyinya kua orhendan un la kpaa." 
Job39:19 Ka we u ne nyinya agee na yee? Ka we u cir un ingya sha mon yee? 
Job39:20 Ka we u ne un a tsugh er ahungwa yee? Ahenga na a usan sha kume la, ka kwagh u cieryol." 
Job39:21 Ka a kaha apande inya shin pev, doo un iyol a agee na, a due a za ya kapa a ikav mbi utyav." 
Job39:22 Lahan mciem, ishima nyian un ga; yevese sanker kpaa ga." 
Job39:23 Gbandeavaan ka a uvan sha ijime na kua iwange i engem man dagi kpaa. 
Job39:24 Ka a mena ihundu sha ishima i nyoon man i vihin, til shighe u korough ku gbe imo kpaa ga." 
Job39:25 Hanma shighe u ka a tôngo korough cii yô, a nande er: Haha, haha! Ka a ungwa ihuma i utya ken ica je; mnande u ukurmbautyav kua akenge a utya kpaa." 
Job39:26 Ka sha kwaghfan wou tsoghor ka u kôndo sha, u samber akper u zan ken imbusutariyan yee?" 
Job39:27 Ka sha imo you gafa ka a kôndo sha, a wa ya na sha ijiir i taven sha kpaa yee?" 
Job39:28 Tem sha vande, ka a tsa shami kpaa, sha ityough ki vandegh hen ijiir i taver." 
Job39:29 Ka a ta ashe shaala je, a za nenge a inyam; ashe a na ka a nenge a i ken ica je." 
Job39:30 Ônov nav kpaa mba me awambe; henpe akaa a i woo a, a lu yô, u kohol un her." 
Job40:1 Tsô TER shi kaa a Yobu er: 
Job40:2 Or u nan ibo, nana sendegh kwaghôron a Uhembanagee? U nan hendan kwagh a Aôndo yô, nana̱ ôr ase kwagh ne!" 
Job40:3 Tsô Yobu gema kaa a TER er: 
Job40:4 Nenge, m ngu ma kwagh je ga, me kaa U nyi? M wa uwegh zwa." 
Job40:5 M ôr kwagh kwa môm tsô; me kera bugh zwa ga; een, kwa har je kpaa, kpa me kera za hemen ga." 
Job40:6 Tsô TER gema kaa a Yobu ken hiar er: 
Job40:7 Ta ikondo uya hegen er nomsoor yô; Me pine u, yô, we pasem." 
Job40:8 Ú sagh ijirôron Yama? Ú nam ibo sha u ú zua a ishô zee? 
Job40:9 Shin u ngu a uwegh er Aôndo yôô? Ú fatyô u duran imo er Un kpa? 
Job40:10 Er hwe, haa mhembe kua icivir iyol; cir icivir kua iengem iyol." 
Job40:11 Haa iyugh you er mngerem ma ma sar avenge yô; kenger hanma or u nan gengese iyol yô, hee nan." 
Job40:12 Kenger hanma or u nan gengese iyol yô, hire a nan ijime; ndyar mbaaferev hen inya henpe ve til la." 
Job40:13 Ii ve shin vuulevu imôngo cii; kange ishiv vev ken ijiir i imegh. 
Job40:14 Tsô Mo kpaa Me wuese we, er uwegh ough ku yanegh ku ne u mhembe yô." 
Job40:15 Nenge, normnger u M er un di er we nahan; ye toho er bua nahan." 
Job40:16 Shi nenge agee a na nga ken iwenge na, tahav nav mbu ken asongonyam a ken iyav nav." 
Job40:17 Ka a naregh tsa na er kon u sedar nahan; igbela i ken anam a na peregh. 
Job40:18 Akuhe a na ka atam a i er a sha togula je; alegh a na nga er iyôv mbi ipeev mbi iliv yô. 
Job40:19 Un ka mhii u igbenda i Aôndo; ka Un u A er un la, A ne un sanker na ye." 
Job40:20 Gadia ka iwo i ne un kwaghyan ye; inyamtoho cii ngi numbu her. 
Job40:21 Ka a yav shin atine a lotushi, ken iuv shin awoo, man shin ijande," 
Job40:22 ikon i lotushi ka i gba un mure, mbaakinde mba shin uwagh ka ve kase un." 
Job40:23 Nenge, shin ifi una sar avenge kpaa, ikarikase ia gbidye un iyol ga; kwagh nyian un ishima ga, shin ifi u Yordan una tagher un sha zwa je kpaa." 
Job40:24 Or nana kôr un shighe u a ver ishigh sha a nan, nana pev un ihinga sha iyô kpa?" 
Job41:1 U fatyô u tsuwen Leviatan sha tsuwe kpa? Shin ú kighir nombor na sha kor kpa? 
Job41:2 U fatyô u shindin koricen ken ihinga na kpa? Shin ú pev un zeeregh sha ashavela? 
Job41:3 Una zamber we kpishi? Shin una ôr kwagh a we legh leghe? 
Job41:4 Una ya ikur a we, ú gema un una hingir kpan wou gbeme?" 
Job41:5 Ú numbe a na er annyon nahana? Shin ú zer un sha ci u ônov ou mba kaseva? 
Job41:6 Mbakôronishu vea ôr ishe na, vea kar un vea na mbazendenkasua?" 
Job41:7 Ú fatyô u côvor ikôvough nagh sha iyô kpa, man ityough nagh kpaa sha udagi mba ishuvu?" 
Job41:8 Penda ase uwegh ough sha a na; hen sha numnôngon la, nahan ú kera kimbir eren nahan ga." 
Job41:9 Nenge ishimaverenkeghen i gba gbilin; u nengen na tsô kpaa, ishima ia yina or gaa?" 
Job41:10 Ma or u taver ishima cihin u bamen un, nan ngu ga. Tsô ka an je nana fatyô u tilen Mo sha ishi?" 
Job41:11 Ka an nan vande nan Mo kwagh er Me shi Me hire nan a mini? Hanma kwagh u shin tar cii ka u Wam. 
Job41:12 Me huan ving sha kwagh u alegh a na ga, shin agee a na a vesen, shin iyol na i i doo yum la, kpaa ga." 
Job41:13 Ka an nana bugh un agbende iyolo? Ka an nana nyôr un hen atô u ugbemzwa? 
Job41:14 Ka an nana bugh ihinda i ishigh nagha? Anyi a na a sha nongo nongo la, cier iyol." 
Job41:15 Mtaver u agbende na, ka kwagh na u tan ihagh a mi je, a kor ayol, er i var a var a yô." 
Job41:16 Kigen zua a kigen, je, ahumbe tsô kpaa a fatyô u nyôron her atô u a ga." 
Job41:17 A zua ayol kpi kpi, kigen a kigen; a var ayol a a, je, nga paven ga." 
Job41:18 Myesem na dugh a iwanger, ashe na nga er kurashee u m-av u use yô." 
Job41:19 Ken zwa na la, usu u yeghen ngu dugh ker, amarama a usu kpaa nga tsende." 
Job41:20 Ken ahenga na la, mnyim ma dugh ker, er ka ken ityegh ki ki pagher man shi er usu u i keer u sha ikenaika yô." 
Job41:21 Iôôn na ngi enger akausu; nomborusu ngu dugh ken zwa na. 
Job41:22 Sha mon na la, agee tema ker, mcieryol due ngu tsuwen sha ishigh nagh." 
Job41:23 Asongonyam a na zua imôngo, a taver gbang gbang ken a na, nga tenger ga." 
Job41:24 Ishima na taver er iwen yô, taver er nase nahan." 
Job41:25 Er ka una mough sha yô, mbaageev ve cia; sha ci u ishimanyian, ve hingir dang." 
Job41:26 Shin ka a gber un sanker je kpaa, a kôr ker ga, shin dagi shin kapa shin iwange kpaa ga." 
Job41:27 Iyôgh ki iligh ki un er atôyia nahan, togula ngu er ivuwenkon yô." 
Job41:28 Ivaan ia fatyô u eren un u yevese ga; awen a keren sha mzu hingir un er atôayia nahan. 
Job41:29 Atumbu a ikon nga un er atôayia nahan; humbe u iwange ka a na un ahan. 
Job41:30 Ikum na ngi er atsenge a esen yô; ka a nger sha angbiôr er ikyekye i gbiren iyiav nahan. 
Job41:31 Ka a er ivmnger i pagher er ityegh yô; ka a gema ber a hingir er ityegh ki mkuregh yô. 
Job41:32 A er gbenda u engem ken ijime na; bee er iv hingir ivu yô. 
Job41:33 Kwagh u lun er un nahan ngu sha won ga, ka kwagh u i gbe un, a lu a mciem ga je la." 
Job41:34 Kenger hanma kwagh u icivirigh, a ya tor sha inyamikume i i manger la cii." 
Job42:1 Tsô Yobu gema kaa a TER er: 
Job42:2 M fa We U fatyô u eren akaa cii, ma awashima Wou u bunden ngu ga." 
Job42:3 Ka an nan we mhen ime sha mfe ga? Nahan m gba ôron kwagh u m kav ga tsô, akaa a a gandem, a m fe a ga je." 
Job42:4 Shi ver ato, mo me ôr kwagh; me pine U, yô, pasem," 
Job42:5 Lu m ungwa agwa Wou sha m-ongo u ken ato; kpa hegen yô, ashe am nenge a We." 
Job42:6 Ka nahan man m laha iyol yam, m zamber ken vuulevu kua ken mtwe ye." 
Job42:7 Tsô ken masejime u TER ôr Yobu akaa ne kera yô, TER kaa a Elifasa Orteman, er: Iyugh kendem ken ishima sha a we kua akar a ou ahar la; gadia ne terem sha kwagh u mimi er wanakiriki Wam Yobu a er nahan ga." 
Job42:8 Yô, hegen, kôr nen anomabua ataankarahar man anomaiyôngo ataankarahar, za nen hen wanakiriki Wam Yobu, za na nen nagh ku nanden sha ci wen; wanakiriki Wam Yobu a̱ er msen sha ci wen; gadia Me rumun un, nahan Me kera or ne iyev sha lanegh enegh ga; gadia ne terem sha kwagh u mimi er wanakiriki Wam Yobu a er nahan ga." 
Job42:9 Tsô Elifasa Orteman, man Bildadi Orshuhi, man Sofar Ornaamati, ve yem, ve za er er TER kaa ve nahan; TER kpaa rumun Yobu." 
Job42:10 Nahan TER dugh Yobu ken ican na kera, zum u a er msen sha ci u akar a na la; TER shi na Yobu akaa kuma er a tsuaa la nahan kwa har." 
Job42:11 Tsô anngôôv nav cii va her a na, mba nomso kpaa, mba kasev kpaa, kua mba ve vande fan un kera cii, ve va ya kwagh a na imôngo hen ya na; ve sugh un; shi ve sur un ishima sha ican i TER va a mi sha a na cii la; nahan hanma or na un gbengeriyôô kua kunya u zenaria." 
Job42:12 Nahan TER ver Yobu ken masejime doo doo, hemba mver u tsuaa la; a lu a iyôngo dubu pue kar unyiin, urakumi dubu ataratar, abua a kpelan ikyekye ahar ahar kuma dubu môm, kua anmgbianajaki dubu." 
Job42:13 Shi a lu a ônov mba nomso utaankaruhar man mba kasev utar. 
Job42:14 U kwase u hiihii la, a ii un iti er, Yemima; u sha uhar la er, Keshia; u sha utar la yô, er, Kerenhapu." 
Job42:15 Ken tar la cii, i zua a kasev mba doon ashe er ônov mba Yobu nahan ga; ter ve na ve dyako a anmgbianev vev mba nomso imôngo." 
Job42:16 Ken masetyô la Yobu shi tsa anyom deri man akunduahar, a nenge ônov nav kua ônov mba ônov nav, zan zan ikôv inyiin." 
Job42:17 Tsô Yobu kpe, bee iyol, tsa sha won kpishi." 
Psalms1:1 I saan or u nan zenden sha mhen u mbaaferev ga la iyol, gbenda u mbaasorabo nan til sha u ga, mbanahantar kpaa nan tem imôngo a ve ga;" 
Psalms1:2 atindi a TER ka kwagh u gban nan ishima, shi ka atindi a Na nan zeren henen a ken ishima tugh kua tetan kpaa ye." 
Psalms1:3 Nan ngu er kon u i môôr hen ukungômbamngerev, u u um sha shighe u u yô, ika i u kpaa ngi usu ga; hanma kwagh u nan eren kpaa, nana kure un vough." 
Psalms1:4 Mbaaferev yô, mba nahan ga; ve yô, mba er imough i ahumbe a purugh a i yô," 
Psalms1:5 ka nahan man mbaaferev vea tile sha, sha iyange i ijir ga, man mbaasorabo kpaa ken mkohol u mbaperapera ga ye," 
Psalms1:6 gadia TER fa gbenda u mbaperapera, kpa gbenda u mbaaferev yô, ua saa ishe." 
Psalms2:1 Ka nyi man akuraior a kumbur yumu, ior kpaa ve henen ugbilinmbaakaava?" 
Psalms2:2 Utor mba sha won ve mough ahendan, mbatarev kpaa ve zua sha u henen akaa a num sha TER man Un u TER A ver Un tor la, mba kaan er:" 
Psalms2:3 Sé tôndo nen ikangenev vev kera, sé kende nen ikor ve her a vese kera!" 
Psalms2:4 Wen u A tem Sha, ngu sen, TER ngu nahan ve tar." 
Psalms2:5 Zum la Una ôr kwagh a ve sha iyugh Na, Una ta ve mciem iyol sha ishima Na i vihin tsung." 
Psalms2:6 Nahan kpaa, Mo M ver Tor Wam sha icighanwo Wam, Shion." 
Psalms2:7 Me pase awashima u TER: A kaa a Mo er: We, U ngu Wan Wam je, Mo M mar U nyian." 
Psalms2:8 Sônom, yô, Me na U akuraior, a̱ hingir dyako Wou, man akighir a tar kpaa, a̱ hingir kwagh Wou je." 
Psalms2:9 Ú her ve sha tôgh ku iyôgh; Ú hembe ve avur avur er gbande u ormaantyegh nahan. 
Psalms2:10 Nahan yô, ne utor, lu nen a mfe, ungwa nen ityesen, ne mbaajiriv mba tarev." 
Psalms2:11 Civir nen TER a mciem, ember nen a akarkase iyol." 
Psalms2:12 Suse nen Wan zwa, sha er A̱ de yugh man né saa ishe sha gbenda ga yô; gadia ka Un ican u yuwen ga. Mba ve suur sha a Na cii saan ve iyol!" 
Psalms3:1 Kpash! TERE, mbaihomov av seer je, zua ga; ior kpishi mba moughon num a mo;" 
Psalms3:2 ior kpishi mba lamen sha a mo kaan er: Ngu a mwar her Aôndo je ga. Sela. 
Psalms3:3 Kpa We TERE, U ngum perutya u yisan mo, man icivir yam, man shi ka We U kenden mo ityough sha kpaa ye." 
Psalms3:4 Ka m yila TER sha ikenge, A ungwa imo yam sha icighanwo Na kpaa. Sela." 
Psalms3:5 Mo m yav inya, m gba mnyam, shi m nder, gadia TER ta ikaa ken a mo." 
Psalms3:6 Me cia ior udubu kwa pue mba ve kasem a num ga. 
Psalms3:7 Mough sha, TERE, yimam, Aôndo wam! U ta mbaihomov av azu sha ahenge cii, U or mbaaferev anyi." 
Psalms3:8 Mwar ka hen TER a lu ye, iveren You i̱ lu sha ior Ou. Sela." 
Psalms4:1 Zum u me yila yô, ungwa imo yam, Aôndo u perapera wam; U verem ken ijiir i gbanger, shighe u m lu ken mzeyol yô; zungwem mhôônom, ungwa msen wam." 
Psalms4:2 Ne ônov mba iorov, shi nan je man icivir yam ia de u hingir iheene? Shi nan je man gbilinkwagh una de u doon ne ishima, man né de u keren aie ase? Sela." 
Psalms4:3 Fa nen, TER tsegha or u i doo Un a na la sha ci Na iyol Na. TER Una ungwa zum u me yila Un yô." 
Psalms4:4 Nyoon nen ishima, kpa de eren nen isholibo ga; hen nen kwagh ken asema a en sha ugambe enev; lu nen ving. Sela." 
Psalms4:5 Na nen nagh ku perapera; suur nen sha TER. 
Psalms4:6 Ior kpishi mba kaan er: Ka an nana tese se kwagh u doono? TERE, kende a iwanger i ishigh You sha, sha a vese." 
Psalms4:7 U nam iember ken ishima i hemba i ve shighe u iyiagh vegh man wain ve ngee la. 
Psalms4:8 Me yav inya, me gba mnyam a ishima i gbar gbar kpaa; gadia ka We tseegh, TERE, U ne, m lu uma ken mkpeyol ye." 
Psalms5:1 TERE, ver ato sha akaaôron am; ver ishima sha mtoghol wam." 
Psalms5:2 Ver ato sha imo i myer wam, Tor wam man Aôndo wam; gadia ka We m sen U ye." 
Psalms5:3 TERE, pepe Ú ungwa imo yam; pepe me ver msen wam sha ishigh You man me kegh kpaa." 
Psalms5:4 Gadia We, U ngu Aôndo u ifer i dio U ga yô; kwaghbo una tema a We imôngo ga." 
Psalms5:5 Mbaihaghev vea tile U sha ishi ga; mbaerenafer cii U vende ve. 
Psalms5:6 Ú tim mba ve eren aie kera; or u haan awambe inya man orcugh yô, ndôhôr TER ishima." 
Psalms5:7 Kpa mo yô, sha mngee u erdoo Wou, me nyôr ken iyou You; me gure me ver ishigh sha icighantempel Wou, a mciem sha ishigh You." 
Psalms5:8 TERE, hemen mo a perapera Wou sha ci u mbaihomov av; sôr gbenda Wou wanger wanger sha ishigh yagh." 
Psalms5:9 Gadia zwa ve ngu a kwagh u mimi ga; ken atô ve yô, ka ifer tsô; gôngor ve ka uwar u lun ivegher; nombor ve u leghem tsô." 
Psalms5:10 Na ve ibo, Aôndo; ve̱ gbidye inya sha mbamhen vev ayol a ve; zenda ve kera sha ci u mngee u asorabo a ve; gadia ve hendan a We." 
Psalms5:11 Kpa mba ve suur sha a We cii yô, ve̱ ember; ve̱ genger amo sha iember gbem, sha ci u U cir iyol sha a ve yô; mba iti You i doo ve kpaa, ve̱ ember ken a We." 
Psalms5:12 Gadia U ver orperapera doo doo, TERE, U kase un a mkomshima er ka sha akuvautya nahan." 
Psalms6:1 TERE, de zehe a mo sha iyugh You ga, man shi de tsahan mo sha ishima You i vihin tsung la ga." 
Psalms6:2 Zungwem mhôônom TERE, gadia mo m ure cii; beem angev TERE, gadia kondo akuhe am iyol." 
Psalms6:3 Kondom iyol ken ishima tsung; man We yô, TERE, shi nan je?" 
Psalms6:4 Hide TERE, yima uma wam, yimam sha ci u erdoo Wou." 
Psalms6:5 Gadia shin ku á umbur We ga; shin Sheol yô, ka an nana wuese We?" 
Psalms6:6 M kine je, m vôr; hanma ime m heen gambe wam, m ndôhôr gambe wam sha mlia." 
Psalms6:7 M hungwa ashe ikôl sha ci u ishima i vihin, nga been iyol sha ci u mbaahendanev av cii." 
Psalms6:8 Kar nen hen a mo kera, ne cii mba ne eren ifer; gadia TER ungwa kweleghmlia wam." 
Psalms6:9 TER ungwa zamber wam; TER rumun msen wam. 
Psalms6:10 Mbaihomov av cii vea va ahenge, á kondo ve iyol tsung kpaa, vea va ahenge vea hide ijime fese je." 
Psalms7:1 TERE, Aôndo wam, ka sha a We m suur ye; yimam sha ikev i mbazendan mo ityô cii, warem," 
Psalms7:2 sha er a̱ de tusen a mo, er begha ka a tuse a kwagh, orwasen a kera lu ga, nahan ga." 
Psalms7:3 TERE, Aôndo wam, aluer m er nahan, aluer ifer ia lu sha ave am yô," 
Psalms7:4 aluer m or or u doon a mo iyev i ifer —mimi je, un u a gbe moughon num a mo a ityôikaa ga la, m yima un—" 
Psalms7:5 orihom wam a̱ zendam ityô, a̱ kôrom je, a̱ ndyar uma wam angahar hen inya, a̱ gbihi icivir yam shin vuulevu je. Sela." 
Psalms7:6 Mough sha a ishima i vihin You TERE, kegh iyol i num sha iyugh i mbaahendanev av; nder sha ci wam, We, u U kaa wer, i̱ ôr ijir sha mimi!" 
Psalms7:7 Mkohol u akuraior a̱ kase U; tsô Ú hide sha, Ú kar ve sha ityou." 
Psalms7:8 TER er akuraior ijir; TERE, er a mi jighilii sha perapera wam, man shi sha mimi u a lu ken a mo kpaa." 
Psalms7:9 Ifer i mbaaferev i̱ kure, kpa mbamimi yô, taver ve her, We u U karen asema man ahi kpaa, Aôndo u perapera." 
Psalms7:10 Perutya wam ngu her Aôndo u A yem mba ve lu a mimi ken ishima yô. 
Psalms7:11 Aôndo ka orjir u mimi je, man ka Aôndo u yuwen ayange ayange." 
Psalms7:12 Aluer or á gema ishima ga yô, Una wua sanker Na; A henda ada Na, A kegh iyol;" 
Psalms7:13 A sôr ikav Nav mbi tswamev mbi kuuv; A er avaan a Na hingir er ka a usu yô. 
Psalms7:14 Nenge, or ngu toghol mar sha ifer, nan jile iyol sha kwaghbo, nan gema nan mar aie." 
Psalms7:15 Nan time ihungwa i kôron kwagh, nan vungur i kpaa, kpa nan gba shin akpa u nan tim la." 
Psalms7:16 Kwaghbo u nan una hide sha ityough ki nan, ipila i nan kpaa ia sen nan sha ityo." 
Psalms7:17 Me sugh TER sha mlu Na u perapera la; me wa icam i wuese iti i TER, Uhembansha." 
Psalms8:1 TERE, Ter wase, iti You ngi a icivir sha won, gande cii, We u U ver iengem You sha Usha." 
Psalms8:2 Ka ken zwa u anikundanev man mbamanatumba U ver agee, sha ci u mbaahendanev Ou, sha u Ú yange mbaihomov man mbaoroniyev ayôôso ye." 
Psalms8:3 Er m veren ishima sha akaa a sha aôndo a a lu tôm u ahôaveegh Ou, ka uwer man asan a U ver a yô," 
Psalms8:4 or ngu nyi ve U umbur nana? man wan u or kpaa er U we nan iko yôô? 
Psalms8:5 Gadia U er nan shi kpuaa ma nan lu er Aôndo nahan, U cir nan iengem iyol kua icivir kpaa." 
Psalms8:6 U ver nan Wer, nana̱ tema tor sha ityom i ave Ou; U wa nan akaa cii sha ikev:" 
Psalms8:7 iyôngo man abua cii, kua inyamtoho je kpaa," 
Psalms8:8 inyon i sha aôndo, man ishu i shin zegemnger, hanma kwagh u a zenden sha igbenda i shin zegemnger kpaa." 
Psalms8:9 TERE, Ter wase, iti You ngi a icivir sha won, gande cii!" 
Psalms9:1 Me wuese TER a ishima yam cii, me pase aeren a Ou a kpilighyol cii." 
Psalms9:2 Me ember, me ember tsung ken a We, me wa icam i civir iti You, We Uhembansha," 
Psalms9:3 gadia mbaihomov av gema ijime, ve nôngo gbev, ve gba timin sha ishigh You." 
Psalms9:4 Gadia U taver ishô yam man ijirôron yam; U kar U za tema sha ikônough ki torough, U ôr ijir sha mimi." 
Psalms9:5 U yange atôatyev, U tim mbaaferev, U kough ati a ve kera purututu." 
Psalms9:6 Mbaihomov saa doo doo, ve hingir dang gbem; agar a U yôhôl a la, u umbur a tsô kpaa, kera ka ga." 
Psalms9:7 Kpa TER yô, tem gbem; A sôr ikônough Nagh ki torough sha ci u ijirôron." 
Psalms9:8 Una ôr tar ijir sha mimi, Una ôr akuraior ijir vough." 
Psalms9:9 TER Una hingir ijiir i yeren sha ci u mba i kighir ve a ican yô, ijiir i yeren sha ayange a ican i tsung la." 
Psalms9:10 Mba ve fe iti You yô, vea suur sha a We, gadia TERE, We, U kende mbakeren We la, dang mayange ga." 
Psalms9:11 Wa nen icam i wuese TER u A tem sha Shion, ôr nen akuraior kwagh u ityom Na!" 
Psalms9:12 Gadia Wen u A oron iyev i awambe a i hee inya la, umbur ve; mliam ma mbaatsanev ma hungul Un ga." 
Psalms9:13 TERE, zungwem mhôônom; nenge ican yam, i m ye sha ikev i mba ve kerem ihom la, We u U kendem sha hen ihinda i kuugh ne," 
Psalms9:14 sha u m̱ pase iwuese You cii; ka ken ihinda i wankwase u Shion la, me ember myom Wou ye." 
Psalms9:15 Akuraior gba shin ihungwa i ve tim yô, ka ken kper u ve we la angahar a ve a cimin ye." 
Psalms9:16 TER gema pase iyol Na: A ôr ijir ve! Ka sha tom u ave na iyol na la, i ker iferor ye. Higayon. Sela." 
Psalms9:17 Mbaaferev vea hide shin Sheol, ka atôatyev cii a Aôndo A hungul a je la." 
Psalms9:18 Gadia á hungul mbaibanave gbem ga, ishimaverenkeghen i mbaatsanev kpaa ia saa gbem ga." 
Psalms9:19 Mough sha TERE, or a̱ de hembe ga, i̱ ôr atôatyev ijir sha ishigh You!" 
Psalms9:20 Ta ve mciem iyol, TERE, atôatyev a̱ fa er a lu ior tsô yô. Sela." 
Psalms10:1 TERE, ka nyi U til ca; ka nyi U yer iyol sha ayange a mzeyolo?" 
Psalms10:2 Sha mhagher u iferor yô, ngu tôvon icanor ityô tsung; i̱ kôr ve sha akaahônon a ve hen la." 
Psalms10:3 Gadia orifer ka a ta ihagh sha kwagh u isharen i ken ishima na, a ver oreren hua doo doo, a gema a laha TER." 
Psalms10:4 Iferor ka nana manger yô, nan kaa er: Una or iyev ga; sha mbamhen nav cii, a hen er: Aôndo ngu ga." 
Psalms10:5 Igbenda na cii ngi lagh un gbem; ajiraôron a Ou nga sha je, a gba ca a nan; mbaahendanev nav cii kpaa, a ta ve ahenge." 
Psalms10:6 Ken ishima na yô, ngu a kaan er: Me tenger ga, zan zan sha ikov ikov kpaa, ican ia tserem mayange ga." 
Psalms10:7 Zwa na mgbough a ityuhwanev man icugh man mkighir; kwaghbo man kwagh u ifer ve lu un shin nombor. 
Psalms10:8 Ka ken ajiir a iuvugh a ken angarev a tem ye; ken ajiir a yeren la, ka a wuan mbaishôôv. A dughun aseeraior ashe ken myer," 
Psalms10:9 a kegh ken iuv er begha ken bar na nahan, a kegh sha u kôron icanor; a kôr icanor zum u a cimin nan ken kper na yô." 
Psalms10:10 A gure, a var inya; mba ve lu aseer yô, ve gba sha ikev na." 
Psalms10:11 Ken ishima na yô, ngu a kaa er: Hungul Aôndo ve, A yer ishigh Nagh, Una nenge a min mayange ga." 
Psalms10:12 Mough sha TERE, kende uwegh Ough sha, Aôndo, mbaatsanev ve̱ de hungul We ga." 
Psalms10:13 Ka nyi man iferor ka nan laha Aôndo; nan kaan ken ishima i nan er: Ú or iyev ga, ase?" 
Psalms10:14 U nenge a mi; gadia We, U ngu nengen zayol man ishimavihin, sha er Ú tôô sha uwegh Ough; ka her a We man isheeror ka i ver iyol i i ye; We, U lu Orwasen u ancôghol." 
Psalms10:15 Sombo ikasewe i iferor man dangor la, time ifer na zan zan ma kwagh a̱ de shi ga." 
Psalms10:16 TER ka Tor gbem sha won; atôatyev tim ken tar Na kera. 
Psalms10:17 TERE, U ungwa isharen i mbaasemaleghlegh; U taver asema ve, U gema U ver ato sha u ungwan," 
Psalms10:18 sha u eren a ancôghol vough man a u i kighir nan a ican la kpaa, sha er or u nan lu u tar ne tsô, nana̱ de kera shi naan mciem mayange ga." 
Psalms11:1 Ka sha TER m suur ye; man ka nyi ne kaan a uma wam ner: Yevese yem sha uwo wou er ka inyon nahana? 
Psalms11:2 Gadia nenge, mbaaferev henda ada, ve wa ivaan ve sha da, sha er vea ker or u lun a mimi ken ishima, ken ime." 
Psalms11:3 Aluer amagh aa yôhôl yô, orperapera nana er nana?" 
Psalms11:4 TER ngu ken icighantempel Na; ikônough ki torough ki TER ki Sha; ashe Na nga kenger, akurashee a Na nga karen ônov mba iorov." 
Psalms11:5 TER ngu karen orperapera kua iferor kpaa; or u ipila i doo nan la yô, A kôr nan ihom." 
Psalms11:6 Una haa akausu a kpenger kpenger sha mbaaferev kua sulfur kpaa; ahumbe a hian, ka kwar u iyongo ve." 
Psalms11:7 Gadia TER ka u perapera je, perapera doo Un ishima; mbamimi yô, vea nenge ishigh Nagh." 
Psalms12:1 TERE, yima, gadia or u cian Aôndo kera ngu ga; gadia mbamimi ve bee ken ônov mba iorov kera." 
Psalms12:2 Hanma or ka aie tsô nan eren a orwanndor a nan ye; sha ityumbuzwaagh i nyohon, mba er kwagh sha asema ahar." 
Psalms12:3 TER A̱ tim ityumbuzwaagh i nyohon la cii, kua shi nombor u u te ihagh la kpaa;" 
Psalms12:4 ve mba ve kaan er: Ka sha nombor wase man sé hemba la; ityumbujôôgh yase ka i yase ayol a ase je, ka an nan lu tor sha a vese?" 
Psalms12:5 Sha ci u mkighir u i kighir mbaatsanev man mtoghor u mbaibanave yô, Me mough hegen kape TER A kaa la, Me ver or u nan lu tômon la, nana tema a mkpeyol." 
Psalms12:6 Akaaôron a TER yô, ka a wang je, er azurfa u i ser un ken adum u shin inya, u i ser un kwa taankaruhar je." 
Psalms12:7 We, Ú koson ve, TERE; Ú kuran se sha kov ne gbem." 
Psalms12:8 Mbaaferev mba zenden wue wue hanma ian kpaa, zum u ka a kende akaadang sha ken ônov mba iorov la." 
Psalms13:1 Shi nan je, TERE, man Ú de u hungul mo gbeme? Shi nan je man Ú de u yeren mo ishigh Youwe?" 
Psalms13:2 Shi nan je me hen akaa ken ishima yam, er ishima ka i shi nyian mo didi nee? Shi nan je orihom wam una de u hemban mo?" 
Psalms13:3 Ver ishima, ungwa imo yam, TERE, Aôndo wam! wanger ashe am, er m̱ de yaven mnyam ma kuum ga yô;" 
Psalms13:4 er orihom wam a̱ de kaan er: M hemba un ve, ga! mbaahendanev av kpaa, ve̱ de ember shighe u m nenge gbev la ga." 
Psalms13:5 Kpa mo yô, m suur sha erdoo Wou; ishima yam ia ember myom Wou." 
Psalms13:6 Me wa icam i wuese TER, gadia A er a mo doo kpishi je." 
Psalms14:1 Ibumeor ka nan kaa ken ishima i nan er: Aôndo ngu ga; ve er akaadang a ndôhôrshima; mô u eren dedoo nan ngu ga. 
Psalms14:2 TER shir ashe shin, ngu kenger ônov mba iorov, er Una nenge shin mô u lun a mkav nan ngu, u keren Aôndo." 
Psalms14:3 Ve cii, ve hide ijime, ve hingir mbavihin cii; mô u eren dedoo nan ngu ga, môm tsô kpaa ga." 
Psalms14:4 Mbaerenafer cii, mba a kwaghfan je gaa? mba ve ye ior Av er ka ruam ve ye yôô? Mba yer sha iti i TER kpaa ga." 
Psalms14:5 Ka heela je mciem ma te ve iyol yum ye; gadia Aôndo ngu ken kov u perapera. 
Psalms14:6 Ne mba heen mhen u icanor, kpa TER ka ijiir na i waren ker." 
Psalms14:7 Kpash! Myom u Iserael ma a dugh ken Shion ma a shi ve yôô! Zum u TER Una sôr mlu u ior Nav yô, shighe la Yakob una tsuwe amar man Iserael kpaa una ember!" 
Psalms15:1 TERE, ka an nana tsa ken tenti Wouwe? Man ka an nana lu sha icighanwo Wouwe?" 
Psalms15:2 Ka u nan zenden jighilaa, nan eren perapera, nan er kwagh sha mimi ken ishima i nan," 
Psalms15:3 nan eren anger sha zwa u nan ga, nan eren huror u nan ifer ga, man nan we or u wan ndor a nan akaadang iyol ga;" 
Psalms15:4 sha mnenge u nan yô, dangor ka nan kwagh u lahan je; kpa nan ngu civir mba ve cie TER. Ka nana bum yô, shin a hingir u kwagh á va tser nan kpaa, nan gema kposo ga;" 
Psalms15:5 nan ne inyaregh kera sha ci u zuan a mtsera ganden ikaa inya ga, nan ngohol inyaregh ki yamen ishô sha u geman nan orishôôgh ibo ga. Or u nan eren akaa ne yô, nana tenger mayange ga." 
Psalms16:1 Kosom Aôndo, gadia ka sha a We m suur ye." 
Psalms16:2 M kaa a TER mer: We U ngu Terem; m ngu a ma mdoom magenem ma hemban We ga. 
Psalms16:3 Sha kwagh u uicighanmbaiorov mba ve lu sha tar yô, ka ve ve lu ior mba mimi mba i saan mo iyol a ve ye." 
Psalms16:4 Atsan aa ngee sha mba ve civir aôndo ugen la; me too nagh vegh ku man ku awambegh ga; ati ve tsô kpaa, me teren sha zwa wam ga." 
Psalms16:5 TER ka kwar u dyako wam man u iyongo yam kpaa; ka We U kor mlu wam gbem ye. 
Psalms16:6 Kwar u i kar i nem yô, u gba, doom kpishi, dyako wam doom je zua ga." 
Psalms16:7 Me wuese TER u A wesem henen, tugh kpaa, ishima yam ka i tesen mo." 
Psalms16:8 M ver TER sha ishigh yagh gbem; er A lum ken uwegh ku yanegh yô, me tenger ga." 
Psalms16:9 Ka sha ci u nahan man ishima yam, i ember, uma wam kpaa saan un iyol tsung je, iyol yam kpaa ia lu gbar gbar." 
Psalms16:10 Gadia Ú undu uma wam shin Sheol ga; man shi U de Wer, un u i doo U a na la a̱ nenge a ijiir i mtim ga." 
Psalms16:11 Ú tesem gbenda u uma; msaanyol mgbough sha ishigh You, uishar mba haan iyol mba ken uwegh Ough ku yanegh gbem sha won." 
Psalms17:1 TERE, ungwa kwagh u lun a ishô, wa iko sha mliam am; ver ato sha msen wam u a dugh ken ityumbuzwaagh u lun a icugh ga yô." 
Psalms17:2 Ijirôron mo, i̱ due her a We; ashe Ou a̱ nenge sha mimi vough." 
Psalms17:3 U kar ishima yam, U va sôrom tugh; U karem, kpa U zua a ma kwagh ga; m wa ishima mer, zwa wam ua kar kpe ga." 
Psalms17:4 Sha kwagh u aerenakaa a ior yô, sha kwaghôron u zwa Wou la, m gema m nyagh igbenda i oraperagh." 
Psalms17:5 Angahar a am var sha igbenda You, angahar a am a dolough ga." 
Psalms17:6 Mo m ngu yilan We, gadia We Ú ungwam, Aôndo! Ver ato her a mo, ungwa kwaghôron wam." 
Psalms17:7 Tese erdoo Wou u kpilighyol, We Oryiman u mba ve yer mbaihomov vev hen uwegh Ough ku yanegh yô." 
Psalms17:8 Kuram er hongorshe nahan; yerem ken mure u akper a Ou," 
Psalms17:9 hen mbaaferev mba ve imbishi mo, mbaihomov av mba ve keren mo a ku, ve kasem la." 
Psalms17:10 Ve cir asema a ve, mba er kwagh u imangeregh sha zwa ve." 
Psalms17:11 Hegen ve kase se sha zende wase, ve ver ashe sha er vea gbihi se inya yô." 
Psalms17:12 Ngu er begha u i sar un pe tusen nahan, bee er ka gumbegha u keghen ken ajiir a iuvugh yô." 
Psalms17:13 Mough, TERE, za ta sha a na, gbihi un inya; yima uma wam sha ikev i iferor, sha sanker Wou," 
Psalms17:14 man sha ikev i ior, sha uwegh Ough je, TERE, sha ikev i ior i tar, i kwar ve u lu hen uma ne, mba U mgbough iyav vev a kwagh u U vande veren sha ci ve la, je ônov vev kpaa kuma ve gbing gbing, ve di kpaa mba undun akaa ve a a neer la sha ci u ônov vev." 
Psalms17:15 Kpa mo yô, me nenge ishigh You ken perapera; zum u me nder yô, mluashe Wou una kumam." 
Psalms18:1 U doom ishima tsung je, TERE, We u U lu agee am!" 
Psalms18:2 TER ka vande wam man garutya wam, man Oryiman wam kpaa, ka Aôndo wam, vande wam u taver, ka sha a Na me suur ye, ka perutya wam man korough ku myom wam, man barwoogh wam kpaa." 
Psalms18:3 M yer TER, u A kom u á wuese Un yô; ka nahan man ka i yimam sha ikev i mbaihomov av ye." 
Psalms18:4 Ikor i kuugh kamber sha a mo, iwuhamnger i mtim ta sha a mo," 
Psalms18:5 ikor i Sheol kasem, akaahônon a kuugh tserem." 
Psalms18:6 Ken mkighir u i kighir mo ne, m yila TER; m genger, imo, m yila Aôndo wam. A ungwa imo yam ken tempel Na, mliam am ma m vaa a Na la nyôr ken ato Na." 
Psalms18:7 Tsô tar tenger, er ngigh ngigh, amagh a iwoogh kpaa tenger, i tenger a sha ci u A yugh yô." 
Psalms18:8 Mnyim due Un ken ahenga, kôndo sha; usu due ken zwa Na, hia je, aka kpaa kôr usu sha u." 
Psalms18:9 A nelem Usha, A hungwa shin inya; angôghime lu shin angahar a Na." 
Psalms18:10 A unde sha cerubi, A purugh, A purugh fefa sha akper a ahumbe." 
Psalms18:11 A gema ime, hingir ijiir Na i yeren, hingir ityumbe Na i kasen Un wan atô: mngerem ma wan ime kua abeen a il." 
Psalms18:12 Sha iengem i sha ishigh Nagh la, abeen a Na a il gba karen, lu ura u awomboogh man akausu." 
Psalms18:13 TER dura Sha, Uhembansha kende a imo Na sha— lu ura u awomboogh man akausu." 
Psalms18:14 A ker avaan a Na, A sambe ve; inyiar Na nyiar kpishi nzughul a ve." 
Psalms18:15 Zum la tareghnyaagh u zegemnger due, amagh a taregh hingir ken igbar, sha myange Wou TERE, sha m-ee u humbe u ken ahenga a Ou." 
Psalms18:16 A naregh uwegh Sha, A kôrom, A dughum shin uzegembamngerev." 
Psalms18:17 A yimam sha ikev i orihom wam u ageegh, sha ikev i mba ve kerem ihom la, gadia ve hembam agee." 
Psalms18:18 Ve ta sha a mo sha iyange i ican yam, kpa TER lu ishuur wam;" 
Psalms18:19 A va a mo hen ijiir i gbanger, A yimam sha ci u i doo Un a mo yô." 
Psalms18:20 TER er a mo vough sha mlu wam u perapera, A nam injar sha mwanger u ave am;" 
Psalms18:21 gadia m wa igbenda i TER iko, m undu Aôndo wam sha u eren ifer ga." 
Psalms18:22 Gadia akaaôron a Na a jirigh cii lum sha ishi, m hunde ishima sha akaawan a Na kpaa ga." 
Psalms18:23 M lu jighilii sha ishigh Nagh, m kem iyol, m nyagh iferkwagh yam." 
Psalms18:24 Ka nahan man TER A nem injar sha perapera wam, sha ave am a wanger wanger sha ishigh Nagh ye." 
Psalms18:25 Or u nan zungu mhôônom yô, U tese di nan mhôônom Ou ma zungwen je; or u mimi yô, U tese nan mimi Wou je;" 
Psalms18:26 or u wang kpaa, U tese nan iyol You er U lu wang yô; kpa or u nan lu ormimi ga yô, U shi U tese nan di ishimanyoon You je." 
Psalms18:27 Gadia We U yima ior mba i kighir ve a ican yô; kpa ashe a a manger la yô, U hee a." 
Psalms18:28 Gadia We U tam imenger; TER, Aôndo wam, wanger ime yam." 
Psalms18:29 Gadia ka sha agee Ou je man m te num sha ikumutya ye; shi ka sha agee a Aôndo wam je m tsugh gilgar m aver ye. 
Psalms18:30 Gbenda u Aôndo yô, ka u jighilii je; mkaanem ma TER ma wang cii; Un ka perutya u mba ve suur sha a Na la cii." 
Psalms18:31 Gadia ka an nan lu Aôndo, saa TER tseegh gaa? Man ka an nan lu vande, saa Aôndo wase tseegh gaa?" 
Psalms18:32 Ka Aôndo u A wem agee iyol la; man A gem gbenda wam u hingir vough ye. 
Psalms18:33 A gema angahar a am hingir er ka a ashim yô; A verem m tile sha ajiir a am a taven sha. 
Psalms18:34 Ngu tesen ave am ityav mbi nôngon; zan zan je akaseaveegh am nga hende ada u iyôgh ki bashigh. 
Psalms18:35 U nam perutya u myom Wou kpaa, uwegh Ough ku yanegh ku kôrom sha; ishima You i legh legh erem m gba ikôr." 
Psalms18:36 U naregh a-avenangahar a am gba ca; angahar a am kpaa, a dolough ga." 
Psalms18:37 M zenda mbaihomov av, m za kohol ve, m hide ga, saa m vande timin ve." 
Psalms18:38 M her ve je, ve kera fatyô u moughon ga, ve gbidye inya hen angahar a am." 
Psalms18:39 Gadia U wam agee iyol sha u zan ityav, mba ve mough num a mo, U er ve ve shiligh hen ikum yam." 
Psalms18:40 Man shi U na mbaihomov av yevese mo; mba ve kerem ihom yô, m tim ve kera." 
Psalms18:41 Ve er ikenge, kpa or u yiman ve lu ga; ve yila TER, kpa A rumun ga." 
Psalms18:42 Tsô m kume ve, ve hingir er vuulevu u ahumbe a purugh a min yô; m haa ve kera er angbiôr a sha igbenda yô." 
Psalms18:43 U yimam sha inyum i ior; U gemam m hingir orhemen u akuraior; ior mba m fe ve ga kpaa, ve hingir mbashilen mo." 
Psalms18:44 Er ve ungwa a ungwa gwa wam tseegh tsô, ve rumun imo yam je; atôatyev va hen a mo agurenu." 
Psalms18:45 Atôatyev use, a due ken ajiir a a, a ken iuv la, a akarkase iyol." 
Psalms18:46 TER ngu uma; i̱ wuese Vande wam; i̱ kende Aôndo u myom wam ne sha; 
Psalms18:47 ka Aôndo u A oron iyev sha ci wam, u A ne akuraior sha ikev yam;" 
Psalms18:48 A yimam sha ikev i mbaihomov av; een, U kendem sha hen mba ve hendan a mo, U yimam sha ikev i ipilaor." 
Psalms18:49 Ka nahan man me wuese We ken akuraior, TERE; me wa atsam a wuese iti You kpaa ye." 
Psalms18:50 Ngu nan tor Na myom u vesen; ngu tesen erdoo a u A shigh un mkurem la, a Davidi kua tsombor na gbem." 
Psalms19:1 Usha mba pasen icivir i Aôndo; kwavaôndo kpaa ngu tesen tom u ave Na. 
Psalms19:2 Sev mbun mbu er kwagh a sev mbugenev nduuluu, man tugh mbun mbu tesen tugh mbugenev kwaghfan." 
Psalms19:3 Mba lamen ga, zwa kpaa mba a min ga, mba fetyô u ungwan imo ve kpaa ga," 
Psalms19:4 nahan kpaa imo ve samber sha tar sha won cii, kua akaaôron a ve kpaa, zan zan ikighir i tar je. A ver iyange tenti ker;" 
Psalms19:5 i yô, ngi er orkwasehe u ka nan duen ken iyou i nan, i ember er ortaveryol nahan, sha u zan ayem sha hwange u i." 
Psalms19:6 Mdugh u i ka ken ikighir i Sha je; mningir u i kpaa ka zan zan za ar sha ikighir na igen, ma kwagh lun myer sha mtsee u i kpaa ga." 
Psalms19:7 Atindi a TER nga vough je, nga hir, nga taver uma her; mpase u TER ka u jighjigh, ka a na orlanenkwagh nan hingir orfankwagh." 
Psalms19:8 Uiniezwa mba TER ka mba vough je, mba ne iember ken ishima; tindi u TER ngu wang je, ngu a wanger or ashe." 
Psalms19:9 Mcie u cian Aôndo ka kwagh u wang, u lun gbem; akaaôron a jirigh a TER ka a mimi je, ka a perapera cii;" 
Psalms19:10 ka kwagh u saren, hemba zenaria, een, hemba zenaria u dedoo, u ngeen je; a nyoho je, hemba iyough, een, hemba anende a ikpayough." 
Psalms19:11 Man shi ka sha a je i we wanakiriki Wou kwagh ye; u wan a iko yô, ka zegeinjar." 
Psalms19:12 Mbamtsum yô, ka an nana fatyô u kaven ve? Nam ishô sha mbamtsum mba ken myer la." 
Psalms19:13 Kura wanakiriki Wou sha asorabo a sha apera; a̱ de hembem agee ga, tsô me lu a acôghol a wan iyol ga, man shi me war u eren isholibo i vesen." 
Psalms19:14 Akaaôron a ken zwa wam man mhen wam u ken ishima, ve̱ lu kwagh u kuman We ishima, TERE, Vande wam man Orpaan wam." 
Psalms20:1 TER A̱ ungwa u sha iyange i ican, iti i Aôndo u Yakob i̱ kende a we sha;" 
Psalms20:2 A̱ tindi u a iwasen hen icighanjiir, A̱ taver we ken Shion;" 
Psalms20:3 A̱ umbur nagh ough cii, A̱ rumun nagh ough ku nanden. Sela" 
Psalms20:4 A̱ na u sha isharen i ken ishima you, shi A̱ er sha awashima wou cii." 
Psalms20:5 Sé ember myom Wou; man ken iti i Aôndo wase yô, sé tim ityuta yase sha. TER A̱ er sha mbamsen ou cii." 
Psalms20:6 Hegen yô, m fa, TER ngu yiman u A shigh un mkurem la, Una rumun un sha icighanjiir Na u Sha, sha agee a sha uwegh Nagh ku yanegh ku yiman la." 
Psalms20:7 Mbagenev mba suur sha akekeautya, mbagenev yô, sha anyinya, kpa se yô, sea ter iti i TER, Aôndo wase." 
Psalms20:8 Ve yô, i shiligh a ve inya, ve gba; kpa se, se mough, se tile sha." 
Psalms20:9 TERE, yima tor, A̱ rumun se shighe u se yer yô." 
Psalms21:1 TERE, tor ngu ember agee Ou, man sha m-ember u myom Wou je yô, á kpen lun nan je!" 
Psalms21:2 Isharen i ken ishima na, U na un je, msen u ken zwa na kpaa, U nyume un ga. Sela." 
Psalms21:3 Gadia U za kegh un gbenda a iveren i sha akaadoon; u cir un idyer i tor, i zenaria u wang, sha ityo." 
Psalms21:4 A sôn U uma, U na un je; ka ayange a ngeen gbem sha won je." 
Psalms21:5 Iengem na vese sha myom Wou tsô; U na un icivir man shagbator. 
Psalms21:6 Gadia U ver un Wer, a̱ lu a iveren i tsôron, U na un, a ember, saan un iyol sha ishigh You." 
Psalms21:7 Gadia tor ngu suur sha TER; sha erdoo u Uhembansha la, á tenger a na ga." 
Psalms21:8 Uwegh Ough kua tser a mbaihomov Ou cii, uwegh Ough ku yanegh kpaa kua tser a ior mba ve ker U ihom yô." 
Psalms21:9 Ú gema ve, vea hingir er atse a hian nahan, shighe u Ú va ande ken igbar yô. TER Una mena ve sha iyugh Na; usu ua hia ve." 
Psalms21:10 Ú va tim ônov vev sha won kera, tsombor ve kpaa, Ú va tim u ken ônov mba iorov kera." 
Psalms21:11 Gadia ve wa ifer ishima a We; ve hen ken ishima sha u hônon kwagh u vea fatyô u eren ga yô. 
Psalms21:12 Gadia Ú er ve, vea gema ijime, Ú urugh ivaan sha ishiv vev." 
Psalms21:13 Kende iyol You sha, TERE, sha agee a Ou; nahan sé wa icam sé ter agee a Ou. Ka sha ci u orhemen u mbawanatsam; sha ikenge i icam i; Ashim u m-av u use. Ka Pasalmi u Davidi" 
Psalms22:1 Aôndo wam, Aôndo wam, ka nyi U undumu? Ka nyi U gbe ca a mo sha u wasen mo, man sha akaaôron am a sha mtoghor nahana?" 
Psalms22:2 Kpash! Aôndo wam, ka a lu atetan yô, m ngor ikenge, kpa U bugh zwa ga, a lu tugh kpaa m huan ga." 
Psalms22:3 Kpa We U ngu Icighan je, We u U tem ken atsam a wuese a Iserael." 
Psalms22:4 Uter asev lu suur sha a We; ve suur, nahan U yima ve je;" 
Psalms22:5 ve vaa a We, man ve war ye; ve suur sha a We, ve va ahenge ga." 
Psalms22:6 Kpa mo m ngu anyigôô, m ngu or ga; m ngu kwagh u ndôhôrshima hen ior, m ngu kwagh u lahan hen ikurior ne." 
Psalms22:7 Mba ve nengen a mo cii, ve sem sha mlaha; ve nur zwa, ve jingir ityough, ve kaa er:" 
Psalms22:8 A wa iyol na sha ikev i TER; yô, A̱ yima un! A̱ war un, gadia i doo Un a na."
