Psalms22:9 Kpa ka We je, lu U due a mo ken uya ye, U na, m suur je, er m lu man atumba yô." 
Psalms22:10 Er i marem la je, i gemam i na U; er m lu ngôm ken uya je, ka We U lu Aôndo wam ye." 
Psalms22:11 De gbe ca a mo ga, gadia ican zurum, man or u wasen mo ngu ga." 
Psalms22:12 Anomabua kpishi kasem, anomabua a taver a Bashan mough num a mo, kasem wam atô," 
Psalms22:13 a aver ijô sha mo, er begha u tan kume yô." 
Psalms22:14 I haam kera er mngerem yô; akuhe am cii ndivir; ishima yam hingir er tsur yô, i sough ken atô wam;" 
Psalms22:15 agee am uma kera er icenge nahan, nombor wam varem sha ikighô; U va a mo hen vuulevu u kuugh." 
Psalms22:16 Gadia iwa kasem; mkohol u mbaaferev kpaa wam atô, ve kuma ave am ve pev a kua angahar am kpaa." 
Psalms22:17 Me fatyô u ôron akuhe am cii; ve kenger mo, ve bon ashe sha a mo;" 
Psalms22:18 mba karen akondo am hen ayol a ve; mba eren ishor sha riga wam. 
Psalms22:19 Kpa We TERE, de gbe ca a mo ga, We, Or u wasen mo, er fefa sha u va wasen mo." 
Psalms22:20 Yima uma wam sha ikev i sanker, ka u a lum môm tsô la, yima un sha ikev i iwa." 
Psalms22:21 Yimam sha zwa u begha; sha ikor i yaregh kpaa, U vande ungwan imo yam." 
Psalms22:22 Me pase anmgbianev av, iti You; ka ken atô u mkohol man me wuese iti You ye." 
Psalms22:23 Ne mba ne cie TER, wuese nen Un! Civir nen Un, ne tsombor u Yakob cii, cia nen Un, ne tsombor u Iserael cii." 
Psalms22:24 Gadia A laha shin A nyagh ican i or u ican i tser nan ga, yeren nan ishigh nagh kpaa ga. Kpa zum u nan genger imo nan yila Un la yô, A ungwa." 
Psalms22:25 Ka hen a We man iwuese yam i dugh ken mkohol u vesen ye; me kure uiceghzwa av sha ishigh ki mba ve cie Un la. 
Psalms22:26 Mbaasemaleghlegh vea ya kwagh, á kuma ve gbing gbing je; mba ve keren TER yô, vea wuese Un! Asema a en a̱ lu uma gbem." 
Psalms22:27 Akighir a tar cii aa umbur, aa gema aa rumun TER; icombor i akuraior cii ia gure sha ishigh You ia civir We;" 
Psalms22:28 gadia tartor ka u TER je; ka Un A tem tor sha akuraior ye. 
Psalms22:29 Mba ve gbe akôr sha won cii, vea ya kwagh, vea gure, vea civir; mba ve lu hingir vuulevu cii yô, vea gure sha ishigh Nagh, ka u nan fetyô u lun uma ga je kpaa." 
Psalms22:30 Tsombor u ken hemen ua civir Un; á va ôr kov u ken hemen kwagh u Ter. 
Psalms22:31 Vea va, vea pase perapera Na hen ikurior i á va mar i la, er ka Un A er ngun ye. Ka Pasalmi u Davidi" 
Psalms23:1 TER ka orkuran mo, kwagh môm banem ga;" 
Psalms23:2 A erem, m yav inya henpe agumatoho a hem yô; A hemen mo A za a mo hen mngerem ma ma lu ving yô." 
Psalms23:3 A er i yôhôl uma wam iyol; A hemen mo sha igbenda i perapera sha ci u iti Na. 
Psalms23:4 Shin mea karen ken pev u mure u kuugh kpaa, me cia kwagh u bo ga, sha ci u We U lu a mo yô; aga Wou man gbough Ough ka ve surun mo ishima." 
Psalms23:5 U verem kwaghyan sha ishigh ki mbaihomov av; U shighem mkurem sha ityo, iyongo yam iv je, ngi haan." 
Psalms23:6 Akaadoon man mhôônom ma kôron tseegh aa zan a mo ityô sha ayange a uma wam cii; me tema ken iyou i TER zan zan je ayange á ngee. Ka Pasalmi u Davidi 
Psalms24:1 Tar ka u TER je, man m-iv u u, tar u sha won cii a mba ve lu ken u kpaa." 
Psalms24:2 Gadia ka Un je A tim u imagh sha zegemnger, man A ver u taveraa sha uikuwanmbamngerev kpaa ye." 
Psalms24:3 Ka an je nana kôndo sha uwo u TERE? Ka an je nana tile ken icighanjiir Na? 
Psalms24:4 Ka u nan lu a ave a wang je, man ishima i mimi kpaa la; shi nan veren ishima i nan sha gbilinkwagh ga, man nan bumun sha icugh kpaa ga yô." 
Psalms24:5 Ka nan nana ngohol iveren hen TER, man perapera kpaa hen Aôndo u myom u nan ye." 
Psalms24:6 Ungun ka kov u mba ve keren Un je la, mba ve keren ishigh You, We Aôndo u Yakob. Sela." 
Psalms24:7 Kende nen ityouv sha, ne ihinda; kende nen sha, ne ucivir mba tsôron, Tor u iengem A̱ nyôr." 
Psalms24:8 Ka an nan lu Tor u iengeme? ka TER u ageegh u A lu a tahav yô, TER ngu a tahav ken utya." 
Psalms24:9 Kende nen ityouv sha, ne ihinda; kende nen sha, ne ucivir mba tsôron, Tor u iengem A̱ nyôr." 
Psalms24:10 Ka an nan lu Tor u iengem nee? ka TER u akum a Sha, ka Un A lu Tor u iengem ye. Ka Pasalmi u Davidi" 
Psalms25:1 TERE, ka sha a We m veren ishima ye." 
Psalms25:2 Aôndo wam, ka sha a We m suur ye; i̱ de vem ahenge ga; mbaihomov av kpaa ve̱ de hembem ga." 
Psalms25:3 Een, ve cii mba ve veren ashe We yô, vea va ahenge ga; mba ve eren akaa sha icugh sha ityôikaa ga yô, ka ve je vea va ahenge ye." 
Psalms25:4 TERE, nam, m̱ fa igbenda You, tesem ihange You." 
Psalms25:5 Hemen mo ken mimi Wou, tesem, gadia ka We, U lu Aôndo u myem wam ye; ka We m shi veren ashe We didi ye." 
Psalms25:6 TERE, umbur mhôônom Ou ma ngeen man uerdoo Ou, gadia hii tsuaa je ve lu, zan zan gbem sha won." 
Psalms25:7 De umbur asorabo am a m lu iyev la ga, man atindi a m lu peren la kpaa ga; umbur mo sha erdoo Wou, sha ci u mdoom Ou, TERE." 
Psalms25:8 TER ka u doon man u mimi kpaa, ka nahan man Una tese mbaasorabo gbenda ye." 
Psalms25:9 Una hemen mbaasemaleghlegh sha u eren jighilii; Una tese mbaasemaleghlegh gbenda Na. 
Psalms25:10 Igbenda i TER cii ka i sha erdoo man i sha mimi sha ci u mba ve we ikuryan Na iko kua mbampase Nav kpaa yô. 
Psalms25:11 Sha ci u iti You yô, TERE, dem iferkwagh yam, gadia i vese." 
Psalms25:12 Ka anti nan cie TERE? Una tese nan gbenda u nana̱ tsuwa yô. 
Psalms25:13 Ka nan nana tema á kpe nan iyol ye, tsombor u nan ua ya dyako u tar." 
Psalms25:14 Kwaghmyer u TER ngu a mba ve cie Un yô, Una tese ve ikuryan Na." 
Psalms25:15 M veren ashe sha TER gbem, gadia Wen je, dughum angahar ken kper kera." 
Psalms25:16 Gema her a mo, zungwem mhôônom, gadia m hingir tseneke wam, man ican kpaa i erem." 
Psalms25:17 Atsan a ken ishima yam seer a seer; dughum ken mbamzeyol av. 
Psalms25:18 Nenge ican yam man mtoghor wam, dem asorabo am cii." 
Psalms25:19 Nenge mbaihomov av, gadia mba kpishi, mba kôron mo ihom i bo je." 
Psalms25:20 Kura uma wam, yimam; i̱ de vem ahenge ga, gadia ka sha a We m suur ye." 
Psalms25:21 Mimi man jighjigh ve̱ kuram, gadia m ver ashe We." 
Psalms25:22 Aôndo, yima Iserael ken akaa a tseren un la cii. Ka Pasalmi u Davidi" 
Psalms26:1 Er a mo jighilii TERE, gadia mo m zenden sha mimi, m suur sha TER a akpelan ga." 
Psalms26:2 Time kwagh wam, TERE, karem doo doo, kar ahi am kua ishima yam kpaa." 
Psalms26:3 Gadia erdoo Wou ngum sha ashe; ka sha mimi Wou m zenden ye. 
Psalms26:4 M tem a ugbilinmbaiorov imôngo ga; lun yam a mbaayomov imôngo kpaa ga. 
Psalms26:5 M kôr mkohol u mbaerenakaabo ihom; m rumun u teman a mbaaferev imôngo ga. 
Psalms26:6 Me nyian ishô iyol; ka nahan man me ningir sha atse a Ou a nanden nagh sha mi ye, TERE;" 
Psalms26:7 sha er me er, á ungwa imo i ishughun yô, man me ôr akaa Ou a kpilighyol cii kpaa yô." 
Psalms26:8 TERE, iyou You i U tem ker la, doom ishima, kua ijiir henpe iengem You i lu la." 
Psalms26:9 De ngohol uma wam kera a u mbaasorabo la imôngo ga, shin uma wam a ior mba haan awambe la kpaa ga," 
Psalms26:10 mba ifer i dang i lu ve sha ave, man uwegh vegh ku yanegh ku iv a inyaregh ki yamen ishô a mi la." 
Psalms26:11 Kpa mo yô, ka sha ishô yam m zenden ye; paam, zungwem mhôônom." 
Psalms26:12 Nguhar wam tile hen ijiir i shambe shambe; me wuese TER ken mbamkohol mba iorov je. Ka Pasalmi u Davidi 
Psalms27:1 TER ka iwanger yam man myom wam kpaa, ka an je me cia? TER ka agee a uma wam, ka an je nana wam mciem iyolo?" 
Psalms27:2 Zum u mbaerenakaabo ta sha a mo sha u vea ya inyam yam yô, —ka mbaahendanev av man mbaihomov av je la— ve nôngo gbev, ve gba." 
Psalms27:3 Shin ikumutya ia gbidye afo sha u nôngon a mo, me cia ken ishima ga; shin ityav mbia mough a mo kpaa, me taver ishima her." 
Psalms27:4 M sôn TER kwagh môm tsô, ka un me ker ye, mer: Ma m lu ken iyou i TER sha ayange am cii, sha u me nenge mkomashe u TER, man me time kwagh ken tempel Na kpaa." 
Psalms27:5 Gadia Una yerem ken ityumbe Na sha iyange i bo la, Una yerem ken iuv i tenti Na, Una kendem sha sha vande je." 
Psalms27:6 Hegen kpaa, kendem ityough sha, sha mbaihomov av mba ve kasem yô; man me na nagh a iember ken tenti Na, me wa icam, een, me wa atsam a wuese TER." 
Psalms27:7 TERE, ungwa, er m vaan genger genger yô, zungwem mhôônom, rumun msen wam." 
Psalms27:8 Ishima yam ngi ôron kwagh Wou er: Ker nen ishigh Yagh. Ka ishigh You je me ker ye, TERE." 
Psalms27:9 De yeren mo ishigh You ga, de huren wanakiriki Wou sha iyugh kera ga; ka We je U lu u wasen mo ye, de tem kera ze, de undun mo ga, Aôndo u myom wam!" 
Psalms27:10 Gadia terem man ngôm undum, kpa TER Una tôôm." 
Psalms27:11 TERE, tesem gbenda Wou, hemen mo sha gbenda u shambe shambe kpaa, sha ci u mbaihomov av." 
Psalms27:12 De nem sha awashima u mbaahendanev av ga; gadia mbashiada mba aiev mough num a mo kua mba ve ee sha num tsuen tsuen kpaa. 
Psalms27:13 M na jighjigh mer me nenge mdoom ma TER ken tar u mbaumav. 
Psalms27:14 Kegh TER, lu dông, ishima you i̱ taver; een, kegh TER. Ka Pasalmi u Davidi" 
Psalms28:1 TERE, ka We m yer U ye; TERE, vande wam, de ongom ato ze, sha er, aluer Ú ungwam ato yô, me hingir er mba ve yem shin ihungwa la nahan." 
Psalms28:2 Ungwa imo i uzamber av, zum u me yila U yô, zum u me naregh ave am sha hen icighanjiir u ken atô la." 
Psalms28:3 De kpelem a mbaaferev man a mbaerenaferakaa imôngo ga, mba ve er kwagh u bem a mbawanndor a ve, kpa kwagh u bo a gema a lu ve ken asema la." 
Psalms28:4 Na ve injar sha aeren a ve la, man sha ifer i aeren a ve kpaa; na ve injar sha ieren i ave a ve, na ve kwagh u ve kom sha mi." 
Psalms28:5 Sha ci u ve we iko sha ityom i TER man sha aeren a ave Na ga yô, Una hembe ve kera, Una kera maa ve ga." 
Psalms28:6 I̱ wuese TER, er A ongo imo i uzamber av yô." 
Psalms28:7 TER ka agee am je, man perutya wam kpaa, ishima yam suur sha a Na, m zough a iwasen, nahan yô, ishima yam ngi ember tsung; ka sha icam yam kpaa me wuese Un ye." 
Psalms28:8 TER ka agee a ve je, ka Un A lu garutya u sha myom, sha ci u un u A shigh un mkurem la ye." 
Psalms28:9 Yima ior Ou, ver dyako Wou doo doo, koson ve kpaa, zeren kenden a ve sha gbem. Ka Pasalmi u Davidi" 
Psalms29:1 Ne, ônov mba Aôndo, na nen TER, na nen TER icivir man agee." 
Psalms29:2 Na nen TER iengem i i kom sha iti Na yô, civir nen TER a uicighanmbaakondov iyol." 
Psalms29:3 Imo i TER ngi sha mngerem ma kpishim, Aôndo u iengem ngu duran; TER ngu sha uzegembamngerev." 
Psalms29:4 Imo i TER ngi a agee, imo i TER iv a icivir." 
Psalms29:5 Imo i TER ka i sombo ikon i sedar, een, TER ka A sombo ikon i sedar i sha Lebanon avur avur;" 
Psalms29:6 ka A er i, i tsuwe er gumbua yô; man Lebanon kua Shirion ve tsuwe er ka gumyar nahan." 
Psalms29:7 Imo i TER ka i pav iniomborusu; 
Psalms29:8 imo i TER ka i tenger ikôngough, TER ka A tenger ikôngough ki Kadeshi." 
Psalms29:9 Imo i TER ka i er mbaashim ve mar, ka i er ikô i ndoor i hingir wang, kpa ken tempel Na yô, ve cii mba kaan er: Iengem!" 
Psalms29:10 TER tema sha mngerem ma deemee; een, TER tema tor gbem." 
Psalms29:11 TER Una na ior Nav agee, TER Una ver ior Nav sha bem. Ka Pasalmi u Davidi; ka icam i sha mtsegh u Iyou" 
Psalms30:1 Me civir We, TERE, gadia U kendem sha, U rumun mbaihomov av ve ember sha a mo ga." 
Psalms30:2 TERE, Aôndo wam, m yila U, man U beem angev kpaa." 
Psalms30:3 TERE, U dugh uma wam ken Sheol, U nam uma, m war ken mba ve yem shin ihungwa la." 
Psalms30:4 Wa nen icam i civir TER, ne mba i doo Un a ven ne, wuese nen icighanti Na." 
Psalms30:5 Gadia iyugh Na ngi sha anshighe kpeghee tsô, mrumun Na yô, ngu zan zan ayange a uma u or cii; mliam ma haan ka ma tsa tugh, kpa pepe yô, a lu iember." 
Psalms30:6 Mo yô, sha ikyôr yam i dedoo, m kaa mer: Me kera tenger mayange ga—" 
Psalms30:7 TERE, sha mrumun Wou yô, U na uwo wam tile dông— U yer ishigh You, tsô kondom iyol gbong." 
Psalms30:8 M yila U TERE, ka TER m zamber a Na ye:" 
Psalms30:9 Ka mtsera u nyi a lu sha awambe am, aluer mea yem shin ihungwa yôô? Vuulevu ua wuese Wee? ua ôr kwagh u mimi wouwe?" 
Psalms30:10 TERE, ver ato, zungwem mhôônom; TERE, lu Or u wasen mo." 
Psalms30:11 U gemam mzungu wam hingir mo ahan; U saghem ajav, U gema u zerem iember" 
Psalms30:12 sha er icivir yam, ia wa icam ia wuese We, ia huan ga yô. TERE, Aôndo wam, me wuese We gbem. Ka sha ci u orhemen u mbawanatsam. Ka Pasalmi u Davidi" 
Psalms31:1 TERE, ka sha a We m suur ye, de deen Wer m̱ va ahenge mayange ga; Yimam sha perapera Wou." 
Psalms31:2 Ver ato Ou her a mo, yimam fese; lum vande u taver man iyouutya sha u yiman mo." 
Psalms31:3 Gadia ka We, U lu barwo wam, man garutya wam kpaa ye; nahan yô, hemen mo man tesem gbenda sha ci u iti You." 
Psalms31:4 Dughum ken kper u ve wem ken myer ne; gadia ka We, U lu garutya wam ye." 
Psalms31:5 M gema jijingi wam m wa un sha ikev You; U paam, TERE, We, Aôndo u mimi." 
Psalms31:6 M kôr mba ve we iko sha agbilinakaa a aiegh la ihom; mo yô, m ngu suur sha TER." 
Psalms31:7 Me ember, me ember tsung sha erdoo Wou, gadia U nenge ican yam, U fa er i lu zan uma wam iyol yum yô." 
Psalms31:8 U wam sha ikev i orihom ga, kpa U verem angahar sha ijiir i gbanger." 
Psalms31:9 Zungwem mhôônom, TERE, gadia ishima nyian mo, m hungwa ashe ikyôr sha ci u ishima i vihin, uma wam kua iyol yam kpaa use." 
Psalms31:10 Gadia m tsa a ijungwen sha won je, man m shil ishima anyom kar, agee nga yinan mo sha ci u ifer yam, akuhe am kpaa nga vihin kera." 
Psalms31:11 Mbaahendanev av ci ca cii, m hingir ve kwagh u aheenegh je, een, jim je yô, ka mba ve we ndor a mo; m hingir kwagh u cian hen ashe a mba ve fem; mba ve nenge a mo ken won kpaa, ve yevese mo." 
Psalms31:12 M hungul ior ca ca er orkpen nahan; m hingir er bebajôndo yô. 
Psalms31:13 Gadia m ungwa msende u ior kpishi, —mcieryol kase tser— mba zuan zwa sha a mo, mba henen er vea er man vea wuam yô." 
Psalms31:14 Kpa mo yô, m suur sha a We, TERE; m kaa mer: Ka We, U lu Aôndo wam ye." 
Psalms31:15 Ayange am cii nga sha ikev You, yimam sha ikev i mbaihomov av kua mba ve tevem a ican kpaa." 
Psalms31:16 Na er ishigh You ki̱ wanger sha wanakiriki Wou, yimam sha erdoo Wou." 
Psalms31:17 TERE, de deen Wer m̱ va ahenge ga, gadia m yila U. Mbaaferev ve̱ va ahenge, ve̱ cir ijô shin Sheol." 
Psalms31:18 Ityumbujôôgh i aiegh i̱ huan, i mba ve teren mbaperapera sha dang a iyolgengese man ilyaha." 
Psalms31:19 Kpash! Mdoon Ou vese je, ma U ver sha ci u mba ve cie U la, ma U ser sha ci u mba ve suur sha a We, sha ishigh ki ônov mba iorov yô!" 
Psalms31:20 U koso ve ken iuv i sha ishigh You sha mbamzoughzwa mba iorov; U yer ve ken ityumbe sha ci u iniumsuwen i sha iniombor la. 
Psalms31:21 I̱ wuese TER, gadia A tesem erdoo Na u kpilighyol zum u ican i tserem yum la." 
Psalms31:22 Mo yô, er i kondom iyol yô, m kaa mer, m ndiir We ashe, nahan kpaa, U ungwa imo i uzamber av, er m yer U yô." 
Psalms31:23 TER, A̱ doo ne ishima, ne mba i doo Un a ven la cii; TER koson mbamimi, ne orgengeseyol injar i bo kpishi." 
Psalms31:24 Lu nen dông, asema a en a̱ taver, ne cii mba ne veren ishima, ne keghen TER yô. Ka Pasalmi u Davidi. Ka ityesen" 
Psalms32:1 Saan or u i de nan kwaghbo u nan la iyol, man i cir isholibo i nan kpaa yô." 
Psalms32:2 Saan or u TER A ne nan ibo sha ifer i nan ga la, iyol; shi nan lu a icugh ken ishima i nan kpaa ga yô." 
Psalms32:3 Er m huan ving yô, akuhe am bee iyol sha ci u mtoghor wam u m shi toghol didi yô," 
Psalms32:4 gadia tugh man tetan kpaa, uwegh Ough kighir mo, mshiam am uma, hingir er ka sha mtsee u inyom yô. Sela." 
Psalms32:5 M pase isholibo yam sha ishigh You, ifer yam kpaa m yer U ga, m kaa mer, me pase TER akaabo a am; tsô We U dem ibo i isholibo yam Sela." 
Psalms32:6 Nahan yô, hanma or u cian Aôndo nana̱ sôn Un sha shighe u i lu pe á zua a Na yô. Mimi je, zum u uzegembamngerev vea sar avenge kpaa, vea ar her a nan ga." 
Psalms32:7 Ka We, U lu ijiir yam i yeren ye, U kuram sha mzeyol, U kasem a atsam a myom. Sela." 
Psalms32:8 Me pase u, shi Me tese u gbenda u ú za kpaa; Me wase u henen; ishe Yam ia lu sha a we." 
Psalms32:9 De luun nen er nyinya shin alfadari, mba ve lu a kwaghfan ga nahan ga, mba i kôôm ve sha lijam man lagema, ga yô, vea mgbôghom a we ga." 
Psalms32:10 Iferor nana ya ican sha akaa kpishi, kpa u nan suur sha TER yô, erdoo Na una wa nan atô." 
Psalms32:11 Lu nen saan saan ken TER, ember nen tsung, ne mbaperapera, genger nen imo sha iember, ne mba asema a en a lu jighilii cii yô." 
Psalms33:1 Ember nen tsung ken TER, ne mbaperapera; kuma u mbaperapera ve̱ wa icam i wuese." 
Psalms33:2 Sugh nen TER sha molo, wa nen Un atsam a wuese sha adiguve u sha ingyanyinya pue." 
Psalms33:3 Wa nen Un icam i he, kuhwa nen dedoo, i̱ kaa kpishi." 
Psalms33:4 Gadia kwaghôron u TER ka u vough je; tom Na cii kpaa, i er u sha mimi." 
Psalms33:5 Perapera doo Un ishima kua kwagh u mimi; tar kpaa mgbough a erdoo u TER. 
Psalms33:6 Ka sha mkaanem ma TER i er Usha ye; shi ka sha iôôn i ken zwa Na i er akum a ve cii kpaa ye. 
Psalms33:7 A kohol mngerem ma zegemnger, er ka tihi yô; A koso aiv a mnger ken iuna." 
Psalms33:8 Tar cii, u̱ cia TER, ior mba ve lu sha won cii, ikarikase i̱ gbidye ve iyol a Na." 
Psalms33:9 Gadia Wen yô, ngu A ôr kwagh, maa i lu nahan je, shi A kaa, maa i tile her dông." 
Psalms33:10 TER bundu kwaghhenen u akuraior, ka A gema mbamhen mba iorov ve hingir gbilinkwagh." 
Psalms33:11 Mhen u TER ngu dông gbem sha won, mbamhen mba ken ishima Na kpaa mba sha ikov ikov." 
Psalms33:12 Saan ior mba TER A lu Aôndo ve yô, iyol, ikurior i A tsough i sha u i̱ lu dyako Na la." 
Psalms33:13 TER shir ashe shin, ngu kenger ônov mba iorov cii." 
Psalms33:14 Hen ijiir Na i teman la, A ta ashe A nenge mba ve tem shin tar cii," 
Psalms33:15 Un u A er asema a ve cii, A we iko sha ityom ve cii kpaa." 
Psalms33:16 Ma tor nan wer sha ikumutya i vesen ga, ortaveryol kpaa nan wer sha mvese u agee a nan ga." 
Psalms33:17 Nyinya ngu a inja sha u zuan a mhembe ga, una war or sha agee a na a vesen kpaa ga." 
Psalms33:18 Nenge, ashe a TER nga sha mba ve cie Un, mba ve ver ishima ve keghen erdoo Na yô," 
Psalms33:19 sha u yiman uma ve ken ku, man u koson ve sha iyange i ijen." 
Psalms33:20 Uma wase ngu keghen TER, ka Un A lu iwasen yase man perutya wase kpaa ye." 
Psalms33:21 Gadia ka ken a Na ishima yase i ember ye, ka sha icighanti Na se suur ye." 
Psalms33:22 TERE, mhôônom Ou ma zungwen ma lu sha a vese, er se lu veren ishima keghen We yô. Ka Pasalmi u Davidi, zum u a gema mlu na sha ashe a Abimeleki u a zenda un a yem kera la" 
Psalms34:1 Wuese TER sha hanma shighe cii; iwuese Na ia lum ken zwa gbem. 
Psalms34:2 Ka ken TER uma wam a te ihagh ye; mbaasemaleghlegh ve̱ ungwa man i̱ saan ve iyol. 
Psalms34:3 Kehe nen iti i TER a mo imôngo; sé kende nen iti Na sha imôngo. 
Psalms34:4 M ker TER, A ungwam, A maa A dughum ken mciem am cii." 
Psalms34:5 Ve kenger Un, nahan ishigh vegh engem, vea va ahenge kpaa ga." 
Psalms34:6 Icanor ne yila, TER ungwa un je, A yima un sha atsan a na cii." 
Psalms34:7 Ortyom u TER ka a haa afo a wa mbacian Un atô, a yima ve kpaa." 
Psalms34:8 Bende, nenge nen, TER ka u doon je; saan or u nan suur sha a Na la, iyol." 
Psalms34:9 Cia nen TER, ne uicighan Nav, gadia kwagh banen mba ve cie Un la ga!" 
Psalms34:10 Agumabegha je kpaa kwagh ka a ban a, ijen i kôr a; kpa mba ve keren TER yô, ma kwagh u dedoo una ban ve ga." 
Psalms34:11 Va nen, ne mbayev, va ver nen ato her a mo; me tese ne u cian TER." 
Psalms34:12 Ka anti je uma a sar nan, man nan soo u tsan sha won, sha er nana nenge a akaa a dedoo?" 
Psalms34:13 Kura zwa wou u̱ de er kwaghbo ga, man ityumbuzwaagh you kpaa, i̱ de er kwagh u icughugh ga." 
Psalms34:14 De ifer, eren akaa a dedoo, ker bem, zenda un ityô kpaa." 
Psalms34:15 Ashe a TER nga sha mbaperapera, A kegh ato sha u ungwan myer ve kpaa." 
Psalms34:16 TER tsughur ishigh a mbaerenkwaghbo, sha u Un a tim m-umbur u ma i umbur ve sha won la kera yô." 
Psalms34:17 Ve yila; TER ungwa ve, A dugh ve ken atsan a ve cii." 
Psalms34:18 TER ngu ikua a mba asema a vihin ve la, yem mba ve lu a ishima i zamber yô." 
Psalms34:19 Atsan a orperapera ngee, kpa TER ka A dugh nan ken a cii." 
Psalms34:20 Ka A kura akuhe a nan cii, môm môm kpaa u sombo ga." 
Psalms34:21 Kwagh u bo una wua mbaaferev; man shi mba ve ker mbaperapera ihom yô, á na ve ibo." 
Psalms34:22 TER ngu paan uma u mbayev Nav; mba ve suur sha a Na cii yô, á na ve ibo ga. Ka Pasalmi u Davidi" 
Psalms35:1 TERE, zôhô a mba ve zehe a mo yô, shi nôngo num a mba ve nenge num a mo yô." 
Psalms35:2 Kôr akuvautya man perutya, mough sha, va wasem." 
Psalms35:3 Tsuwa dagi kpaa, za yisa gbenda u mba ve tevem a ican la; kaa a uma wam Wer: Ka Mo M lu myem wou ye." 
Psalms35:4 Mba ve keren mo a ku yô, ve̱ va ahenge, i̱ hee ve; man mba ve henen kwagh u bo sha a mo yô, i̱ hile a ve ijime, kunya u̱ kôr ve." 
Psalms35:5 Ve̱ hingir er imough i ahumbe a purugh a min, zum u Ortyom u TER a lu zendan ve yô;" 
Psalms35:6 gbenda ve, u̱ wa ime, u̱ lyemen kpaa, zum u Ortyom u TER a lu zendan ve ityô yô." 
Psalms35:7 Gadia lu sha ityôikaa ga, ve gba wan kper a mo tsô; shi lu sha ityôikaa kpaa ga, ve gba timen uma wam ihungwa tsô." 
Psalms35:8 Mtim a̱ va a̱ bur un a bur; kper u a we la, a̱ gema, a̱ gba mi iyol na; a̱ gba mi, a̱ tim je." 
Psalms35:9 Man uma wam una ember ken TER, una ember tsung ken myom Na." 
Psalms35:10 Akuhe am cii aa kaa er: TERE, ka an nan lu er We? We u U yem icanor sha ikev i or u nan hembe un agee yô, icanor kua oribanave kpaa sha ikev i or u nan ngohol nan akaa sha apera la." 
Psalms35:11 Mbashiada mba aiev mough, mba pinen mo kwagh sha akaa a m fe ga yô," 
Psalms35:12 mba oron mo iyev i kwaghdedoo sha ifer; hingir mo tumbuluu ken ishima. 
Psalms35:13 Kpa mo yô, zum u ve gba angev la yô, m lu a mzemba uya, m ya ican ken ishima sha kwaghyan u hôron, msen wam kpaa hidem ken vanger." 
Psalms35:14 M er inja er ka ikarem shin ma anngôm yô, m gôvor sha mzungu er ka or u nan zungu ku u ngô u nan yô." 
Psalms35:15 Kpa ve yô, zum u m nôngo gbev yô, ve ember ve kohol je; udangmbaiorov mba m fe ve ga kohol num sha a mo, ve tuse a mo ve de ga." 
Psalms35:16 Er mbanahantar sha dang ken iniongo nahan, ve nyuma tsombo a mo." 
Psalms35:17 TERE, shi nan man Ú de u kenger ving ase? Yima uma wam ken mbamtim vev, ka u a lum môm tsô la, sha ikev i agumabegha." 
Psalms35:18 Nahan me sugh U ken mkohol u tamen, me wuese We ken atô u ior kpishi." 
Psalms35:19 Ve mba ve lu mbaihomov av sha aie la, ve̱ de ember sha a mo ga; man shi mba ve kerem ihom sha ityôikaa ga la, ve̱ de kamen ashe sha a mo ga." 
Psalms35:20 Gadia, mba er kwagh u bem ga; mba henen akaaôron a icughugh sha mba ve tem gil gil sha tar." 
Psalms35:21 Mimi je, ve aver ijô sha a mo, ve kaa er: Ahoo! Kaa ase ga! Ashe ase nenge a min ve!" 
Psalms35:22 U nenge a mi, TERE, de huan ga; TERE, de gbe ca a mo ga." 
Psalms35:23 Kpoghol iyol, nder sha u nan mo ishô sha kwagh wam, Aôndo wam, man Terem." 
Psalms35:24 Lu orjir wam, TERE, Aôndo wam, sha perapera Wou; ve̱ de ember sha a mo ga." 
Psalms35:25 Ve̱ de kaan ken asema a ve er: Ahoo! kape i sar se ne, ga; ve̱ de kaan er: Se mena un jimin cii ve, ga." 
Psalms35:26 Ve̱ va ahenge, kunya u̱ kôr ve, ve mba ve ember sha ican i eren mo la; kunya u̱ cir ve man iheen, ve mba ve pende kwagh a mo la." 
Psalms35:27 Ve̱ er ikenge sha iember, ve̱ lu saan saan, ve mba perapera wam a doo ve la, ve̱ zer kaan er: TER hemba cii, u i doo Un a mkpeyol u wanakiriki Na." 
Psalms35:28 Nombol wam ua shi ôron kwagh u perapera Wou man u iwuese You iyange jimin cii. Ka Pasalmi u Davidi wanakiriki u TER, sha ci u orhemen u mbawanatsam" 
Psalms36:1 Kwaghbo ngu a ôr kwagh a iferor ken atô u ishima i nan; —nan cie Aôndo je ga— 
Psalms36:2 gadia ka nan bumen iyol i nan sha u kaan er, ifer i nan ia due, ia hingir kwagh u ndôhôrshima ga." 
Psalms36:3 Akaaôron a nan a ken zwa u nan ka a ifer man a icughugh kpaa; nan undu mfe nan de u eren dedoo kpaa; 
Psalms36:4 ka nan hen ifer sha gambe u nan, nan ver ishima i nan sha gbenda u u doo ga yô; kwaghbo ndôhôr nan ishima ga." 
Psalms36:5 TERE, erdoo Wou ngu je, ar sha Usha, mimi Wou ar sha abeen je." 
Psalms36:6 Perapera Wou ngu er iwo i Aôndo yô, ijirôron You ngi er ivmnger nahan; TER, U koson or kua inyamtoho kpaa." 
Psalms36:7 Aôndo, erdoo Wou ngu a inja je gande cii; ônov mba iorov mba yeren ken mure u akper a Ou," 
Psalms36:8 ahôm a ken ya Wou kuma ve kpekpe, U na ve ve ma ifi u uishar Ou." 
Psalms36:9 Gadia ka her a We imbor i uma i lu ye; ka ken iwanger You man se nenge a iwanger ye. 
Psalms36:10 Zer eren erdoo Wou a mba ve fe U yô, man perapera Wou kpaa a mba ve lu a asema a jighilii yô." 
Psalms36:11 De rumun nguhar u orgengeseyol u̱ ndyaren mo ga, de deen uwegh ku mbaaferev ku̱ hurem kera ga." 
Psalms36:12 Ka keela mbaerenaferakaa ve gbe ye; i ta ve inya, ve kera fatyô u moughon ga. Ka Pasalmi u Davidi" 
Psalms37:1 Ishima i̱ de vihin we sha ci u mbaerenakaabo ga, man shi de tem kwagh u mbaerenafer la kpaa ga;" 
Psalms37:2 gadia ka ve uma kera fese er toho nahan, ve use er ahu a ndor yô." 
Psalms37:3 Suur sha TER, eren akaadedoo, tema ken tar la, dondo sha kwagh u mimi." 
Psalms37:4 I̱ saan we iyol ken TER, man Una na u asaren a ken ishima you ye." 
Psalms37:5 Wa TER gbenda wou sha ikev, suur sha a Na, Una er sha mi vough." 
Psalms37:6 Una er perapera wou, una due ken igbar er iwanger yô, mimi wou kpaa una lu er iyange ka ia lu sha tembe nahan yô." 
Psalms37:7 Tema gir gir sha ishigh ki TER, ver ashe sha a Na sha ishima i wan; ishima i̱ de vihin we sha ci u or u nan zough a mkpeyol sha gbenda u nan, u nan eren atseregh la, ga." 
Psalms37:8 De ishima i nyoon, de iyugh; ishima i̱ de vihin we ga, ka u nan or, ifer i eren tsô." 
Psalms37:9 Gadia á va tim aferaior kera; kpa mba ve veren ashe hen TER yô, ka ve vea ya dyako u tar ye." 
Psalms37:10 Gadia shi côhin tsô iferor á kera lu ga; mimi je, ú nenge sha ijiir i nan, nan nan kpaa, nana lu ga." 
Psalms37:11 Kpa mbaasemaleghlegh yô, vea ya dyako u tar, á saan ve iyol sha mngee u bem." 
Psalms37:12 Iferor henen akaabo a nana er orishôôgh yô, ka a nyuma tsombo a nan." 
Psalms37:13 TER Una se nan, gadia A nenge shighe u nan ngu van." 
Psalms37:14 Mbaaferev tsuwa sanker, ve henda mbaada vev, sha u vea gbihi icanor man oribanave inya, vea wua mba ve zenden jighilii yô." 
Psalms37:15 Sanker ve una kuma asema a ve ayol a ve; mbaada vev kpaa á kever ve kera. 
Psalms37:16 Guda kwagh u côhin u orperapera nan lu a mi a mngee u akaa a mbaaferev mba kpishi ve lu a mi la. 
Psalms37:17 Gadia akaseaveegh a mbaaferev aa sombo, kpa TER yô, ka A tuur mbaperapera;" 
Psalms37:18 TER fa ayange a mba ve lu jighilii, dyako ve una lu gbem;" 
Psalms37:19 vea va ahenge sha iyange i bo ga, sha ayange a ijen kpaa kwagh á kuma ve gbing gbing." 
Psalms37:20 Kpa mbaaferev yô, vea tim; mbaihomov mba TER kpaa vea lu er mhem u toho, vea kar kera—vea kar kera er mnyim nahan." 
Psalms37:21 Iferor ka nan ya injô, nan kimbi ga, kpa orperapera yô, mhôônom ma ker nan, ka nan gba nan tsô." 
Psalms37:22 Gadia mba A ver ve doo doo la, vea ya dyako u tar, kpa mba A we ve ifan la yô, á gber ve kera." 
Psalms37:23 Ka TER A taver zende u or ye, ka i doo Un a gbenda u nan kpaa;" 
Psalms37:24 shin nana gba kpaa, nana gbidye inya ga, gadia TER kôr nan sha uwe." 
Psalms37:25 Ngise m lu iyev, hegen m bee iyol, nahan kpaa, mayange m ngu a nenge i ta orperapera kera ga, shin tsombor u nan kpaa u sônon kwaghyan ga;" 
Psalms37:26 iyange jimin cii nan eren kwagh sha mhôônom ma zungwen, nan pwaren kwagh, tsombor u nan kpaa ua lu a iveren." 
Psalms37:27 De ifer, eren akaadedoo, nahan ú lu gbem sha won." 
Psalms37:28 Gadia kwagh u mimi doon TER ishima, man shi te mba i doo Un a ve la kera ga. Mba koson ve gbem, kpa tsombor u mbaerenafer yô, á tim ve kera." 
Psalms37:29 Mbaperapera vea ya dyako u tar, vea lu ken u gbem." 
Psalms37:30 Zwa u orperapera ngu er kwagh sha kwaghfan, nombor u nan kpaa, ngu er kwagh u mimi." 
Psalms37:31 Tindi u Aôndo u nan ngu nan ken ishima; zende u nan cii kpaa ua dolough ga. 
Psalms37:32 Iferor dughun ashe sha orperapera, keren un a ku;" 
Psalms37:33 TER Una de un a̱ hingir sha ikev i nan ga; man shi Una rumun er a̱ na un ibo zum u á ôron un ijir la kpaa ga. 
Psalms37:34 Ver ashe hen TER, wa iko sha gbenda Na, tsô Una kende u sha, ú ya dyako u tar, ú nenge mtim u á tim mbaaferev kera yô." 
Psalms37:35 Lu m nenge iferor a zegeutaha sha ikev, lu samber er kon u ndor hen tar u u yô," 
Psalms37:36 kpa or va karen her yô, nenge, kera lu ga! M ker un je, kpa i fatyô u zuan a na ga." 
Psalms37:37 Ver ishima sha or u vough, shi nenge sha or u mimi kpaa, gadia injar ngi sha ci u or u bem;" 
Psalms37:38 kpa mbaasorabo yô, á tim ve imôngo icin i môm, á tim tsombor u mbaaferev kera." 
Psalms37:39 Kpa myom u mbaperapera yô, due hen TER je, ka Un A lu garutya ve sha iyange i mzeyol ye." 
Psalms37:40 TER wese ve, shi wer ve, wer ve sha ikev i mbaaferev, yem ve, gadia mba yeren her a Na. Ka Pasalmi u Davidi sha nagh ku m-umbur" 
Psalms38:1 TERE, de zehe a mo sha iyugh You ga, man shi de tsahan mo sha ishima You i vihin tsung ga!" 
Psalms38:2 Gadia avaan a Ou nyôr temam ken iyol je, uwegh Ough kpaa, kighir mo." 
Psalms38:3 Ma ijiir i dedoo kera ngi sha iyol yam ga sha ci u ishima You i vihin tsung la; kpem iyol ken akuhe am kpaa ga, sha ci u isholibo yam." 
Psalms38:4 Gadia aferakaa am cirim, yisa, a yuhwam a hembam, er ikav mbi yuhwan yum yô." 
Psalms38:5 Avav a am huma, gba ijumbu, sha ci u lanegh agh." 
Psalms38:6 M ngughur, m hingir gôvorôô, iyange jimin cii m shi zungwen." 
Psalms38:7 Gadia iwenge nyoon mo, ma ijiir i dedoo kera ngi sha iyol yam ga." 
Psalms38:8 M ure, kundam iyol tsung, m toghor sha ci u anzughul a ken ishima yam." 
Psalms38:9 TERE, isharen yam cii ngi sha ishigh You, mtoghor wam kpaa ngu U myer ga." 
Psalms38:10 Ishima ngi tan mo kwe, agee nga yinan mo, iwanger i ashe am kpaa kera ngi ga." 
Psalms38:11 Mbadoon mo ishima man akar a am mba nyaghen mo sha ci u uange; ityô yam kpaa tile ca. 
Psalms38:12 Mbakeren mo a ku hônom; mba ve keren u eren mo ican, mba ôron akaadang, ka ve shi henen akaa a icughugh didi." 
Psalms38:13 Kpa mo yô, m ngu er orakondoato nahan, m ungwa ga; m ngu er orkondoniker u a bughun zwa na ga yô." 
Psalms38:14 Een, m ngu er or u nan ongo ga, man u nan lu a ahendan ken zwa kpaa ga yô." 
Psalms38:15 Gadia ka her a We, TERE, m veren ishima, m keghen ye; We Ú ungwa imo yam, TERE, Aôndo wam." 
Psalms38:16 Gadia m kaa mer, ve̱ de ember sha a mo ga; shighe u nguhar wam ua dolough yô, ve̱ de gengese iyol sha a mo ga." 
Psalms38:17 M ngu nôngon u gban, ishimavihin yam ngi a mo gbem;" 
Psalms38:18 gadia m pase iferkwagh yam, ishima vihim sha ci u isholibo yam." 
Psalms38:19 Kpa mbaihomov av mba per usôô, ve taver kpaa; mba ve gbe kôron mo ihom tsô la, ve ngee." 
Psalms38:20 Mba ve oron iyev i kwaghdedoo sha ifer la, ka mbaahendanev av, sha ci u mo m veren ishima sha kwagh u dedoo yô." 
Psalms38:21 De undun mo ga, TERE; Aôndo wam, de gbe ca a mo ga." 
Psalms38:22 Er fefa sha u wasen mo, Tere, myom wam. Ngun ka sha ci u orhemen u mbawanatsam. Ka sha ci u Yedutun. Ka Pasalmi u Davidi" 
Psalms39:1 M kaa mer, me ver ishima sha aeren a am, sha er me er isholibo sha zwa wam ga yô; me kôron zwa wam tsaha shighe u iferor a lum sha ishi yô." 
Psalms39:2 M tema a ikerkondon ving, m bugh zwa ga, shin sha u ôron kwagh u dedoo kpaa ga, kpa ican yam seer a seer," 
Psalms39:3 i tseem ken ishima; m ngur henen yô, gba yeghen mo ken ishima. Tsô m ôr kwagh sha zwa wam:" 
Psalms39:4 TERE, tesem, m̱ fa mkur wam; man mngee u ayange am er a lu yô; tesem m̱ fa er m lu kwagh u karen kera yô." 
Psalms39:5 Nenge, U gema ayange am hingir er igbangese i akevaveegh nahan; ayange a uma wam kpaa, sha ishigh You yô, nga er ka ma kwagh je ga yô; mimi je, hanma or sha mtil u nan, nan ngu er humbe nahan tsô. Sela." 
Psalms39:6 Mimi je, hanma or nan gbe zenden er jijingi nahan tsô; mimi je, mba gbe kumbur sha, gbilin tsô; nan kohol inyaregh, kpa nan fa u nan lu yan ki ga." 
Psalms39:7 Hegen yô, TERE, ka nyi m veren ashe mi? Ishimaverenkeghen yam yô, ngi her a We." 
Psalms39:8 Yimam sha akaabo am cii; de gemem m̱ hingir kwagh u aheenegh hen ibumeor ga. 
Psalms39:9 M huan ving, m bugh zwa ga, gadia ka We je, U er kwagh ne ye." 
Psalms39:10 Hidem a mtsaha Wou kera, mo m gba kera sha ci u gbidiv mbu sha uwegh Ough." 
Psalms39:11 Zum u ka Wea kôôm or sha mbamtsaha sha ci u iferkwagh yô, U er mdooashe u nan a saa ishe, er ivina nahan; mimi je, hanma or ka humbe tsô. Sela." 
Psalms39:12 TERE, ungwa msen wam, ver ato er m yer U yô, de ongom ato sha mliam am ga, gadia m ngu orvannya hen a We, man shiror er uter av cii nahan." 
Psalms39:13 Gema ashe hen a mo kera sha er i̱ saan mo iyol, man me mase karen kera, me kera lu ga ye. Ngun ka sha ci u orhemen u mbawanatsam. Ka Pasalmi u Davidi" 
Psalms40:1 M ver ashe hen TER a ishima i tiaver, Un kpaa, A ver ato her a mo, A ungwa mliam am." 
Psalms40:2 A dughum shin ihungwa i mtim man ken angbiôr a tiher; A ver angahar am sha vande, A taver mo sha zende wam." 
Psalms40:3 A na, m dugh icam i he, ka icam i wuese Aôndo wase je la. Ior kpishi vea nenge, vea cia, vea suur sha TER." 
Psalms40:4 Saan or u nan suur sha Aôndo la iyol, man nan veren ashe hen mbagengeseyol, shin hen mba ve kaha ve dondo aie la ga." 
Psalms40:5 TERE, Aôndo wam, U er akaa a Ou a kpilighyol ngee kua mbamhen Ou mba sha a vese la kpaa; kwagh u á kar un sha a We yô, kera ngu ga. Shin er i sarem u pasen ve, ôron kwagh ve nahan kpaa, ve ngee gande u ôron." 
Psalms40:6 Nagh ku sôngon man nagh ku sha samuyia ka ma kwagh u doon We ishima ga; U bughum ato. Nagh ku nanden man ku isholibo yô, U kaa Wer, i̱ na ku kpee ga." 
Psalms40:7 Tsô m kaa mer, nenge, m va ve, ka ken ihurenruamabera i nger kwagh wam ye." 
Psalms40:8 Doom u eren ishima You, Aôndo wam; atindiakaa a Ou ngam ken ishima." 
Psalms40:9 M yôô loho u dedoo u kwagh u perapera ken zegemkohol; nenge, m kusu zwa wam ga, TERE, U fa." 
Psalms40:10 M yer perapera Wou ken ishima yam ga, m pase kwagh u mimi Wou kua myom Wou kpaa; m yer erdoo Wou man mimi Wou hen zegemkohol ga." 
Psalms40:11 We, TERE, de nyumum mhôônom Ou ma zungwen ga, erdoo Wou man mimi Wou ve̱ kuram gbem!" 
Psalms40:12 Gadia atsan kasem gande u ôron; aferakaa am tserem je, m kera fatyô u nengen ga, a hemba ngeen a ice yam i sha ityou, ishima kpaa yinam." 
Psalms40:13 Wea rumun yô, yimam, TERE, TERE, er fefa sha u wasen mo." 
Psalms40:14 Mba ve keren u wuan uma wam yô, ve̱ va ahenge, kunya u̱ kôr ve cii; man mba ve ember sha ican i i tserem la kpaa, i̱ hile a ve ijime, i̱ hee ve." 
Psalms40:15 I̱ kondo ve iyol, sha ci u kunya ve, ve mba ve kaan a mo er: Ahoo! Ahoo! la." 
Psalms40:16 Mba ve keren We cii, ve̱ ember tsung, i̱ saan ve iyol ken a We; mba myom Wou a doo ve yô, ve̱ zer kaan er: TER hemba!" 
Psalms40:17 Kpa mo m ngu icanor, oribanave kpaa, nahan kpaa, Ter ka A umbur mo; ka We U lu iwasen yam man Or u yimam mo kpaa ye, de ngôôr ga, Aôndo wam! Ngun ka sha ci u orhemen u mbawanatsam. Ka Pasalmi u Davidi" 
Psalms41:1 Saan or u nan we mbaatsanev iko la, iyol, TER Una yima nan sha iyange i bo." 
Psalms41:2 TER Una kura nan, Una koso uma u nan, á saan nan iyol sha won kpaa; Ú na nan sha awashima u mbaihomov mba nan ga." 
Psalms41:3 TER Una suwe nan sha gambe u nan u uange; Ú gema myavinya u nan la sha iyange i angev mbu nan. 
Psalms41:4 Mo m kaa mer: TERE, zungwem mhôônom; beem angev, gadia m er U isholibo." 
Psalms41:5 Mbaihomov av mba lamen sha a mo dang, kaan er: Ka hanma iyange je una kpe, iti na kpaa ia saa kera ase?" 
Psalms41:6 Zum u mô ve ka nana va sôrom kpaa, nan ôr aie tseegh, nan kohol angereke ken ishima i nan, zum u nana due yô, nan za ôr kwagh a mi." 
Psalms41:7 Mba ve kerem ihom cii ve zua, mba kôson mo ivarivase, mba henen akaa a dang sha a mo." 
Psalms41:8 Mba kaan er: Ma bouange ngu a na, er a gbe inya ne yô, una kera mough ga." 
Psalms41:9 Een, kua orwam je, u m suur sha a na se ye kwagh ikagh i môm la, a tumem angahar iyol." 
Psalms41:10 Kpa We TERE, zungwem mhôônom, shi moughom sha kpaa, sha er m̱ or ve iyev yô." 
Psalms41:11 Ka sha kwagh ne man me fa er i doo U a mo ye, er un u a kerem ihom la una kera ember er un hembem ga yô." 
Psalms41:12 Kpa mo yô, U suwem ken mimi wam, U veren mo sha ishigh You gbem." 
Psalms41:13 I̱ wuese TER, Aôndo u Iserael, hii sha uicôronmbaashighev zan zan gbem sha won cii; Amen man shi Amen. Ngun ka sha ci u orhemen u mbawanatsam. Ka ityesen i ônov mba Kora" 
Psalms42:1 Er ashim ka a ôôn fegh fegh, iwagh i i lu a mngerem i sar un nahan, kape uma wam kpaa ka a ôôn fegh fegh, U sar un la Aôndo." 
Psalms42:2 Aôndo, Aôndo u uma la, sarem er imurakôron yô; shi nan je me va, me va tile sha ishigh ki Aôndo?" 
Psalms42:3 Mliam am hingir kwaghyan wam tugh man tetan kpaa; gadia mba pinim gbem er: Aôndo wou ngu hana? 
Psalms42:4 Akaa ne m umbur a, man m seer vaan shin ishima: er yan m zenden a ikpelaior imôngo, m hemen ve u zan ken iyou i Aôndo, a imo i iember man i iwuese, ka ikpelaior i eren iniongo je la." 
Psalms42:5 Ishima yam, ka nyi u lu zuduu, man ka nyi u tem gir gir ken a mo ga? Ver ishima kegh Aôndo, gadia nahan kpaa shi me wuese Un, Oryiman wam man Aôndo wam kpaa." 
Psalms42:6 Aôndo wam, ishima yam ngi zuduu ken a mo, ka nahan man m umbur We er m lu ken tar u Yordan man hen iwo i Hermon, kua uwo u Misar la." 
Psalms42:7 Iv ngi yilan iv sha ihuran i ugugul Ou; mbamkpianger man agôndoamnger a Ou karem sha, uvem." 
Psalms42:8 Nahan kpaa TER Una wa erdoo Na kwagh atetan, tugh kpaa icam Na ia lu a mo, ka msen u sônon Aôndo u uma wam je la." 
Psalms42:9 Me pine Aôndo, vande wam, mer: Ka nyi m hungul We? Shi ka nyi m zenden m zungu sha ci u mkighir u mbaihomovo?" 
Psalms42:10 Bee sanker ken akuhe am, kape mbaahendanev av ve heen mo, er ve pinim gbem er: Aôndo wou ngu hana? yô." 
Psalms42:11 Ishima yam ka nyi u lu zuduu, man ka nyi u tem gir gir ken a mo ga? Ver ishima kegh Aôndo, gadia nahan kpaa shi me wuese Un, Oryiman wam man Aôndo wam kpaa." 
Psalms43:1 Er a mo jighilii, Aôndo, ôr kwagh wam, hendan a ikurior i cian Aôndo ga la; warem sha ikev i orcugh, u a lu a mimi ga la." 
Psalms43:2 Gadia ka We, U lu Aôndo u m yeren ken a We; ka nyi U gbihimi? Ka nyi m zenden a mzungu sha ci u mkighir u mbaihomovo?" 
Psalms43:3 Tindi iwanger You kua mimi Wou, ve̱ hemen mo; ve̱ za a mo sha icighanwo Wou, man hen ajiir a U tem la." 
Psalms43:4 Nahan me za hen atse a Aôndo a nanden nagh sha mi, Aôndo u m-ember wam u tsung; me wuese We sha adiguve, Aôndo, Aôndo wam." 
Psalms43:5 Ishima yam, ka nyi u lu zuduu? Ka nyi u tem gir gir ken a mo ga? Ver ishima kegh Aôndo, gadia nahan kpaa shi me wuese Un, Oryiman wam man Aôndo wam kpaa. Ngun ka sha ci u orhemen u mbawanatsam. Ka Pasalmi u ônov mba Kora. Ka ityesen" 
Psalms44:1 Se ungwa sha ato ase je, Aôndo, uter asev ôr se, tom u U er sha ayange a ve, sha ayange a ngise la." 
Psalms44:2 U zenda akuraior sha uwegh Ough je; ve yô, U gema U môôr ve; U er ior mbala ican; ve yô, U gema u ngee ve." 
Psalms44:3 Gadia lu sha sanker ve ayol a ve, ve ngohol tar la ga, man lu ikasewe ve, i war ve kpaa ga, kpa lu uwegh Ough ku yanegh a ikasewe You man iwanger i ishigh You, sha ci u doo U a ve yô." 
Psalms44:4 Ka We je, U lu Tor wam ye, Aôndo; kaa i̱ na Yakob mhembe." 
Psalms44:5 Ka sha a We man se gbihi mbaahendanev asev inya ye; man ka sha iti You kpaa se ndyar mba ve mough num a vese ye. 
Psalms44:6 Gadia m suur sha ada wam ga, sanker wam kpaa una yimam ga." 
Psalms44:7 Kpa We, U yima se sha ikev i mbaahendanev asev, man shi U va, mba ve ker se ihom la, ahenge kpaa." 
Psalms44:8 Ka ken Aôndo man se shi tan ihagh didi ye, sé wuese iti You gbem sha won. Sela." 
Psalms44:9 Nahan kpaa, U gbihi se kera man U hee se, U kera due a ikumutya yase imôngo ga." 
Psalms44:10 U er se, se gema ijime hen or u hendan a vese; mba ve ker se ihom kpaa, ve ya ishar sha asema a ve." 
Psalms44:11 U gema se, se hingir er iyôngo i i senge i yô; U sambe se ken akuraior." 
Psalms44:12 U tee ior Ou, U wa ishe ga; U ya mtsera sha ishe ve ga." 
Psalms44:13 U er se, se hingir kwagh u aheenegh hen mba ve we ndor a vese, kwagh u nahan tar man kwagh u ahan hen mba ve kase se yô." 
Psalms44:14 U er se, se hingir kwagh u veren ishor a mi hen akuraior, se hingir kwagh u jingir ityough a mi hen ior." 
Psalms44:15 Iyange jimin cii, iheen yam ngim sha ishi, kunya u sha ishigh yagh kpaa cirim," 
Psalms44:16 sha ci u kwaghôron u, or u heen ior shi nan toho la kpaa, man sha ci u orihom man or u oron iyev." 
Psalms44:17 Akaa ne cii er se, nahan kpaa U hungul se ga; se nzughul sha ikuryan You kpaa ga." 
Psalms44:18 Asema ase hide ijime ga, angahar ase kpaa kaha undu gbenda Wou ga," 
Psalms44:19 shin er U gem U her se je se hingir ijiir i ugbaseela, man U cir se mure u kuugh iyol nahan kpaa." 
Psalms44:20 Aluer iti i Aôndo wase ia hungul se, shin sea naregh ave ase hen ma aôndo ugen yô," 
Psalms44:21 Aôndo ma A dugh a kwagh ne ken igbar gaa? Gadia A fa akaamyer a ken ishima. 
Psalms44:22 Een, sha ci Wou yô, mba shi wuan se didi, mba nengen se er se mba iyôngo i sôngon yô." 
Psalms44:23 Nder, Tere, ka nyi U yava? Mough sha, de te se kera gbem ga." 
Psalms44:24 Ka nyi U yer ishigh You, man ican yase i hungul We, kua mkighir u i kighir se laa?" 
Psalms44:25 Gadia asema ase shiligh shin vuulevu, iyol yase var hen inya." 
Psalms44:26 Mough sha, wase se, paa se sha ci u erdoo Wou la. Ngun ka sha ci u orhemen u mbawanatsam; sha ikenge i: Ulôhô. Ka Pasalmi u ônov mba Kora. Ka ityesen. Ka icam i sha dooshima" 
Psalms45:1 Ishima yam iv a kwaghôron u dedoo je, ngu haan. M ngu ôron Tor kwaghôron wam u sha inja; nombor wam ka pensel u orfan kwaghngeren dedoo." 
Psalms45:2 U hemba doon ashe a ônov mba iorov; akaaôron a doon nga dugh ken zwa Wou, ka nahan man Aôndo A ver U doo doo gbem sha won ye." 
Psalms45:3 Har sanker Wou a̱ gba hen ikooso, We u ageegh, cir iengem You man icivir You iyol." 
Psalms45:4 Zende a icivir You doo doo, sha ci u kwagh u mimi man u ishima i legh legh man u perapera; uwegh Ough ku yanegh ku̱ tese U akaa a cieryol!" 
Psalms45:5 Avaan a Ou hor je—ior gbidye inya sha ishigh You— nga ken ishima i mbaihomov mba tor. 
Psalms45:6 Aôndo, ikônough You ki torough ki gbem sha won, tôgh ku tartor Wou ka ku perapera je," 
Psalms45:7 perapera doo U ishima, kpa iferkwagh yô, vihi U ishima, ka nahan man Aôndo, Aôndo Wou, A shigh U mkurem ma iember hemba mba kwav Wou ye." 
Psalms45:8 Akondo a ou cii huma mire man alue man kashia; mbaadiguve mba ken ayou a tor a sha anyinor la, mba nan we msaanyol." 
Psalms45:9 Ônkasev mba torov, mba ken ashagbaukase ou; torkwase tile u ken iyan, a haa zenaria u Ofir iyol." 
Psalms45:10 Ver ato, we wankwase, wa iko, kegh ato, ior ou ve̱ hungul we, kua ya u teru kpaa," 
Psalms45:11 ka nahan man á sar tor a dooashe wou ye, gadia un ka teru je; gure civir un kpaa." 
Psalms45:12 We wankwase u Tiru ne, ashagbaior va a iwua, vea ker sha u ma i doo u a ve yô." 
Psalms45:13 Wan u tor u kwase doo kpekpe; ngu ken iyou na; akondo na, i tume a, i wa zenaria sha mi je;" 
Psalms45:14 á za a na hen tor a ikondo i i tum i sha hwe; anuunaukase, akar a na a a lu a na ityô la, á za a ve hen a we;" 
Psalms45:15 mba zan a ve a msaanyol man iember i tsung, ve za nyôr ken ya u tor." 
Psalms45:16 Ônov ou vea tema sha ityough ki uter ou, ú ver ve, sha u ve̱ lu mbatarev sha won cii." 
Psalms45:17 Me er, á zer umbur iti You sha ikov ikov; nahan akuraior aa wuese We gbem sha won. Ngun ka sha ci u orhemen u mbawanatsam. Ka Pasalmi u ônov mba Kora. Ka icam i ver sha ikenge i ukase" 
Psalms46:1 Aôndo ka ijiir yase i waren ker man agee ase kpaa, ka iwasen i i lu ikua ikua ken ican je." 
Psalms46:2 Ka nahan man se cie ga ye, shin tar ua tenger kpaa, shin iwo ia môgh, ia za gba shin atô u zegemnger kpaa;" 
Psalms46:3 mngerem nam, ma hura, ma kpianger, iwo i̱ tenger sha mmough na u sha imanger la. Sela." 
Psalms46:4 Ifi ngu, u ukungômbamngerev nav ve ne gar u Aôndo a ember yô, ka icighanjiir u Uhembansha je la." 
Psalms46:5 Aôndo ngu ken atô na je, una tenger ga; Aôndo Una wase un pepe pepe je." 
Psalms46:6 Akuraior hunde, ityartor tenger, A ôr imo Na, tar sough." 
Psalms46:7 TER u akum a Sha ngu a vese; Aôndo u Yakob ka ijiir yase i yeren. Sela. 
Psalms46:8 Va, va nenge nen ityom i TER, A er akaacieryol shin tar," 
Psalms46:9 A er ityav mbi bee zan zan ar hen ikighir i tar je, A sombo ada, A kever iwange, A nande akekeautya sha usu." 
Psalms46:10 De nen kera, fa nen, ka Mo M lu Aôndo ye; i kendem sha hen akuraior, i kendem sha shin tar kpaa." 
Psalms46:11 TER u akum a Sha ngu a vese, Aôndo u Yakob ka ijiir yase i yeren. Sela. Ngun ka sha ci u orhemen u mbawanatsam. Ka Pasalmi u ônov mba Kora" 
Psalms47:1 Ne ior cii, kure nen ave, wuese nen Aôndo sha imo i ember." 
Psalms47:2 Gadia TER Uhembansha cier iyol kpekpe, ka zegetor sha won cii." 
Psalms47:3 A gema ior, ve hingir sha ikev yase; akuraior kpaa hingir se kwagh u tan angahar mi." 
Psalms47:4 A sange se dyako wase, ihagh i Yakob u a doo Un ishima yô. Sela." 
Psalms47:5 Aôndo kôndo sha a ikenge; TER kôndo sha, sha mkaa u kôr." 
Psalms47:6 Wa nen atsam a wuese Aôndo kpishi, wa nen atsam a wuese; wa nen Tor wase atsam a wuese, wa nen atsam a wuese." 
Psalms47:7 Gadia Aôndo ka Tor u tar cii; wa nen atsam a wuese ken pasalmi u ityesen. 
Psalms47:8 Aôndo tema tor sha akuraior; Aôndo ngu teman sha icighanikôn Na u tor. 
Psalms47:9 Mbatarev mba iorov kohol hingir ior i Aôndo u Aberaham; gadia iperutya i tar ka i Aôndo je; i kende Un sha kpishi je. Ka Icam. Ka Pasalmi u ônov mba Kora 
Psalms48:1 TER hemba, A kuma iwuese kpishi je, ken gar u Aôndo wase, sha icighanwo Na!" 
Psalms48:2 A doo, ngu sha, tser tser, ka kwagh u iember sha won cii, ka uwo u Shion je la, sha vegher u sha imbusutarimese, gar u Zegetor." 
Psalms48:3 Aôndo pase iyol Na ken ayou a na a tor er Un lu ijiir i yeren yô. 
Psalms48:4 Gadia nenge, utor kohol ayol a ve je, ve kôndo imôngo;" 
Psalms48:5 ve nenge a mi, tsô kondo ve iyol, cier ve iyol, ve hembe kera fefa." 
Psalms48:6 Ikarikase gbidye ve iyol heregh, mnyoonom kôr ve, inja er kwase ka nana toghor mar nahan." 
Psalms48:7 Ka sha ahumbe a sha ityoughkitaregh U hembe utso mba Tarshishi la ye. 
Psalms48:8 Er se ungwa yô, kape se nenge kpaa la, ken gar u TER u akum a Sha, ken gar u Aôndo wase; Aôndo Una ver un una lu gbem. Sela." 
Psalms48:9 Aôndo, se umbur erdoo Wou ken atô u tempel Wou." 
Psalms48:10 Er iti You i lu nahan Aôndo, kape iwuese You kpaa i nyer ken akighir a tar je la; uwegh Ough ku yanegh iv a perapera." 
Psalms48:11 Uwo u Shion, u ember; ônkasev mba Yuda kpaa, ve̱ ember tsung, sha ajiraôron a Ou." 
Psalms48:12 Ningir Shion, zende, ningir nen un, ôr nen ugôgômbaayoughouv nav." 
Psalms48:13 Kenger nen ukpekpe nav doo doo, zende ken ayou a na a tor, sha er né va ôr kov u ua va mough la yô," 
Psalms48:14 er Aôndo ne A lu Aôndo wase gbem sha won yô; Una lu orhemen wase zan zan ku kpaa. Ngun ka sha ci u orhemen u mbawanatsam. Ka Pasalmi u ônov mba Kora 
Psalms49:1 Ungwa nen kwagh ne, ne akuraior cii! Ver nen ato, ne mba ne lu sha won cii," 
Psalms49:2 ne mba ne lu a icivir ga, man mbaciviriv kpaa, mbanyarev kua mbaatsanev imôngo cii." 
Psalms49:3 Zwa wam ua ôr kwagh sha kwaghfan, mhen u ken ishima yam kpaa, una lu sha mkav." 
Psalms49:4 Me ver ato sha kwaghôron u injakwagh, me pase kikya wam sha molo." 
Psalms49:5 Inja na nan man me cia sha ayange a bo, zum u ifer i mba ve tevem a ican la, i kasema?" 
Psalms49:6 Ka mba ve suur sha inyaregh vegh je la, ve ta ihagh sha inyaregh vegh ki ngeen la." 
Psalms49:7 Or u nan fetyô u paan anngô u nan, nan ngu je ga, shin u nan Aôndo kwagh u á paa nan a mi kpaa ga," 
Psalms49:8 —gadia mpaa u uma ve taver ishe tsô, yina gbem sha won—" 
Psalms49:9 sha u ma nan lu uma gbem, ma nan nenge a ijiir i mtim ashe ga yô;" 
Psalms49:10 gadia nan nengen mbafankwagh mba kpen, ibumeor man or u tumbuluu ka ve saa ishe imôngo, ve gema ve undu mbagenev a inyaregh vegh." 
Psalms49:11 Mhen ve u ken asema yô, mba henen er uya vev vea tsôr gbem, ayou a ve kpaa aa lu her sha ikov ikov; ve tôô ati ve, ve gema ve ii sha ityar ve." 
Psalms49:12 Kpa or a icivir i nan la cii, nan tem gbem ga, nan ngu er ishôso i saan ishe nahan." 
Psalms49:13 Ungun ka gbenda u mba ve suur sha ayol a ve, vea za sha mi yô, kua mba ve dondo ve ityô, ve rumun mkaanem vem la kpaa. Sela." 
Psalms49:14 I ver ve sha ci u Sheol, er ka iyôngo nahan, ku ua lu orkuran ve; mbaperapera yô, vea tema tor sha a ve pepe; mdooashe ve kpaa, Sheol una kar a mi kera, sha er vea kera lu a ijiir i teman ga yô." 
Psalms49:15 Kpa Aôndo Una paa uma wam sha agee a Sheol, gadia Una tôôm. Sela." 
Psalms49:16 De cie zum u orgen nan hingir ornyar, man icivir i seer hen ya u nan la, ga," 
Psalms49:17 gadia shighe u nana kpe yô, nana yem a ma kwagh ga, icivir i nan kpaa ia za a nan ityô ga." 
Psalms49:18 Shin er nan lu uma, nan lu wuese er i kpe nan iyol —ior kpaa ve wuese we, zum u wea eren a iyol you dedoo la—" 
Psalms49:19 nahan kpaa nana za hen kov u uter mba nan, mba vea kera nenge a iwanger mayange ga yô." 
Psalms49:20 Kpa or u nan lu a icivir, man nan fe kwagh ga yô, nan ngu er ishôso i saan ishe nahan. Ka Pasalmi u Asav" 
Psalms50:1 Uhembanagee, Aôndo, TER, ngu ôron kwagh, ngu yilan tar hii sha iyangeduen je zan zan ar shin iyangemiren." 
Psalms50:2 Ken Shion u a lu mdooashe u ganden la, Aôndo mondo er iwanger nahan." 
Psalms50:3 Aôndo wase ngu van Una huan ving ga; usu ngu hian sha ishigh Nagh, uraahumbe kase Un kpishi." 
Psalms50:4 Ngu yilan Usha, shaala, kua tar kpaa, sha er Una ôr ior Nav ijiir yô:" 
Psalms50:5 Kohol mba i doom a ve la imôngo her a Mo, ka mba ve ye ikur a Mo sha nagh ku sôngon je la." 
Psalms50:6 Usha mba pasen perapera Na, gadia Aôndo iyol Na ka Orjir. Sela." 
Psalms50:7 Ver nen ato, ne ior Av, Me ôr kwagh, we Iserael, Me ta kwagh ken a we ga; Mo M ngu Aôndo, Aôndo wou je." 
Psalms50:8 Me zôhô a we sha ci u nagh ough ga; nagh ough ku nanden, ku sha ishigh Yagh gbem." 
Psalms50:9 Me ngohol nombua hen ya wou ga, shin ukpev ken akumauile ou kpaa ga." 
Psalms50:10 Gadia hanma inyam i toho ka i Yam je, uzendenya sha iwo udubu imôngo." 
Psalms50:11 M fa inyon i sha iwo cii; ishôso i ken toho cii ka i Yam je. 
Psalms50:12 Shin ijen ia kôrom kpaa Me kaa u ga, gadia tar ka u Wam kua akaa a a lu ken u cii." 
Psalms50:13 M ye inyam i anomabua kpa? Shin M me awambe a ivo ase? 
Psalms50:14 Na Aôndo nagh ku ishughun, kure uiceghzwa ou mba u tsegh a Uhembansha la;" 
Psalms50:15 yilam sha iyange i ican, Me yima u, ú gema ú civir Mo." 
Psalms50:16 Kpa iferor yô, Aôndo ngu kaan a nan er: Ka nyi u pasen akaawan a Ama, man ka nyi u teren ikuryan Yam ken zwa wou" 
Psalms50:17 er u gem u vende mkôôm, man u te mkaanem Am ken ijime you kera kpaa yôô?" 
Psalms50:18 Zum u ka wea nenge a ormbaiv yô, u ya ikar a nan, u nyôr nongo a udyambaiorov." 
Psalms50:19 U er kwagh u ifer sha zwa wou, nombor wou, ngu er kwagh sha icugh." 
Psalms50:20 Ka u tema u teren anngôu dang, u eren anger sha wan u ngô u a mar je." 
Psalms50:21 Akaa ne u er, kpa M huan ving, nahan u hen wer, M ngu er we nahan vough; kpa Me zôhô a we, Me pase a sha ashe ou." 
Psalms50:22 Ver nen ishima sha kwagh ne, ne mba Aôndo A hungul ne yô, sha er M̱ de tusen a ven man ma or u yiman nana lu ga ze." 
Psalms50:23 Hanma or u nan ne nagh ku ishughun yô, nan ngu civir Mo; or u nan ser gbenda u nan yô, Me tese nan myom u Aôndo. Ngun ka sha ci u orhemen u mbawanatsam. Ka Pasalmi u Davidi a dugh, zum u profeti Natan va her a na er a vande eren kwaghbo a Batesheba kera la" 
Psalms51:1 Zungwem mhôônom Aôndo, sha erdoo Wou; sha mhôônom Ou ma kôron yum la, esem akaabo am kera." 
Psalms51:2 Ôôm iferkwagh yam kera ca ca, wanger mo sha isholibo yam." 
Psalms51:3 Gadia mo m fa akaabo am, isholibo yam ngim sha ishi gbem." 
Psalms51:4 Ka We tseegh, m er U isholibo ye, m er kwagh u a lu u bo sha ishigh You; sha er Ú lu a ishô zum u U ôron kwagh, Ú lu wang zum u U lu ôron ijir la." 
Psalms51:5 Shi nenge, i marem ken ifer, ka ken isholibo je, ngôm wa iyav av ye." 
Psalms51:6 Nenge, ka mimi U keren ken atô u ishima ye; ka ken myer je, U nem m lu a mfe ye." 
Psalms51:7 Wanger mo sha hisop, tsô me hingir wang; ôôm, tsô me kungu, á hemba senou je." 
Psalms51:8 Nam m̱ ungwa msaanyol man shi m-ember; akuhe am a U sombo la, a̱ ember." 
Psalms51:9 Gema ishigh sha asorabo am kera, esem aferakaa am kera cii." 
Psalms51:10 Gba ishima i wang ken a mo, Aôndo, shi ver jijingi u he u taver ken a mo." 
Psalms51:11 De tem kera sha ishigh You ga, shi de ngohol Icighan Jijingi Wou her a mo kera ga." 
Psalms51:12 Hidem a iember i myom Wou her, suwem, m̱ lu a jijingi u vangertiôr." 
Psalms51:13 Tsô me tese mbaerenakaabo igbenda You, mbaasorabo kpaa vea gema asema, vea hide her a We." 
Psalms51:14 Warem sha ike i awambe, Aôndo, We, Aôndo u myom wam, nahan nombor wam ua wa icam ua wuese perapera Wou." 
Psalms51:15 Tere, bughum ityumbuzwaagh, nahan zwa wam ua pase iwuese You." 
Psalms51:16 Saan We ken ishima a nagh ku sôngon ga, gayô ma m ne ku; nagh ku nanden kpaa doo U ga." 
Psalms51:17 Nagh ku Aôndo A rumun yô, ka jijingi u zamber; ishima i zamber, i uren tsung yô, Ú laha ga, Aôndo." 
Psalms51:18 Er dedoo a Shion, sha mdoo u i doo U a na la; maa ugilgar mba Yerusalem." 
Psalms51:19 Tsô á saan We ken ishima a nagh ku nan ku perapera, a nagh ku nanden man nagh ku nanden jimin la; tsô á na nagh ku anomabua sha atse a Ou a nanden nagh sha mi la. Ngun ka sha ci u orhemen u mbawanatsam. Ka ityesen i Davidi zum u Doegi, Oredom, va, va kaa a Saulu er: Davidi va hen ya u Ahimeleki, la" 
Psalms52:1 We, orageegh, ka nyi man u manger sha kwaghbo nahana? Erdoo u Aôndo ngu her zan zan." 
Psalms52:2 U ngu veren ishima u vihin kwagh, nombor wou ngu er atsem u esen yô, we, u u eren kwagh sha atseregh ne." 
Psalms52:3 Kwaghbo hemba doon we ishima a kwagh u dedoo, aie u eren kpaa, a u ôron kwagh u mimi. Sela." 
Psalms52:4 Akaaôron a timin doo u ishima, we, nombor u ôron kwagh u icughugh ne." 
Psalms52:5 Kpa Aôndo Una yôhôl we kera gbem; Una tôô u kera, Una due a we ken ityumbe you kera, Una wuhe u ken tar u mbaumav kera. Sela." 
Psalms52:6 Mbaperapera vea nenge, vea cia, vea se un, vea kaa er:" 
Psalms52:7 Ehee! Nenge, or ne ka or u a gem Aôndo A hingir agee a na ga yô, kpa a suur sha mngee u inyaregh nagh, a taver ishima sha ifer na." 
Psalms52:8 Kpa mo yô, m ngu er kon u olev u ndor ken iyou i Aôndo; m ngu suur sha erdoo u Aôndo gbem sha won." 
Psalms52:9 Me wuese We gbem sha ci u U er nahan yô; me ver ashe sha iti You kpaa—gadia i dio— sha ishigh ki mba i doo U a ve la. Ngun ka sha ci u orhemen u mbawanatsam; i ver un sha ikenge i Mahalati. Ka ityesen i Davidi 
Psalms53:1 Ibumeor ka nan kaa ken ishima i nan er: Aôndo ngu ga; ve er akaa a dang a ndôhôrshima kpaa; mô u eren dedoo nan ngu ga. 
Psalms53:2 Aôndo shir ashe shin, ngu kenger ônov mba iorov, er Una nenge shin mô u lun a mkav nan ngu, u keren Aôndo." 
Psalms53:3 Ve cii, ve hide ijime, ve hingir mbavihin cii, mô u eren dedoo nan ngu ga, môm tsô kpaa ga!" 
Psalms53:4 Mbaerenafer cii, mba a kwaghfan je gaa? mba ve ye ior Av er ka ruam ve ye yô? Mba yer sha iti i Aôndo kpaa ga." 
Psalms53:5 Ka keela ve gba cian sulugha ye, shin er kwagh u cian lu ga nahan kpaa; gadia Aôndo sambe akuhe a or u nan we afo, nan kase u la; u va ve ahenge sha ci u Aôndo A vende ve yô." 
Psalms53:6 Kpash! myom u Iserael ma a dugh ken Shion, ma a shi ve yôô! Zum u Aôndo Una sôr mlu u ior Nav yô, shighe la Yakob una tsuwe amar, Iserael kpaa una ember. Ngun ka sha ci u orhemen u mbawanatsam, i kuhwan un sha mbaadiguve; ka ityesen i Davidi, zum u Mbashiv va, va kaa Saulu er: Ka hen vese Davidi a yer ye gaa?" 
Psalms54:1 Yimam Aôndo sha iti You, er a mo jighilii sha agee Ou." 
Psalms54:2 Ungwa msen wam, Aôndo, ver ato sha akaaôron a ken zwa wam ne." 
Psalms54:3 Gadia atôatyev mough num a mo, mbaaperav kpaa mba keren mo a ku; ve ver Aôndo sha ishigh vegh ga. Sela." 
Psalms54:4 Nenge, Aôndo ka Orwasen mo je; Ter ngu suwen uma wam." 
Psalms54:5 Una or mbaihomov av iyev i sha ifer ve; tim ve kera sha mimi Wou. 
Psalms54:6 Me na U nagh sha ishima i dedoo, me wuese iti You, TERE, gadia i dio kpishi." 
Psalms54:7 Gadia A dughum ken akaa a a tserem cii; ashe am kpaa nenge isharen yam sha mbaihomov av. Ngun ka sha ci u orhemen u mbawanatsam; i kuhwan un sha mbaadiguve; ka ityesen i Davidi 
Psalms55:1 Ver ato sha msen wam, Aôndo, de yeren iyol You sha zamber wam ga." 
Psalms55:2 Ver ishima sha a mo ungwa imo yam; m hingir kera ke kera sha ishimanyian, m ngu toghor," 
Psalms55:3 sha ci u imo i orihom, sha ci u mkighir u mbaaferev; gadia mba van a akaabo sha a mo, man mba tevem a ican sha ishimanyoon." 
Psalms55:4 Ishima ngi yinan mo ken vanger tsung; mcieryol u kuugh kpaa ta sha a mo. 
Psalms55:5 Mciem tam iyol, ikarikase kpaa gbidyem iyol, cier mo iyol tsung." 
Psalms55:6 Zan zan m kaa mer: Ma m lu a akper er atii nahan; ma m purugh, ma m yem pe gen, ma i za kpem iyol." 
Psalms55:7 Ma m yem ijiir igen i caa, ma m za lu ken taaikôngo je. Sela." 
Psalms55:8 Ma m er fefa, ma m ker ijiir i yeren zegeahumbe man uraahumbe." 
Psalms55:9 Nzughul a ve Tere, pav ve ijô, gadia m nenge kwagh u aperagh man num ken gar la." 
Psalms55:10 Tugh man tetan mba zenden ningir sha ugil nav, ifer man kwaghbo kpaa mba keregh." 
Psalms55:11 Mtim ngu ken atô na, mkighir man icugh mba been hen tembe na ga." 
Psalms55:12 Gadia lu orihom nan heem ga; gayô, ma m taver ishima; shin lu or u kôron mo ihom man nan gengese iyol sha a mo kpaa ga, gayô, ma m yer un;" 
Psalms55:13 kpa lu we, orkwav wam je, ikyarem je, man ijende yam kpaa!" 
Psalms55:14 Se lu ishima i môm sha mhen wase, se zenden imôngo a ikpelaior ken iyou i Aôndo." 
Psalms55:15 Ku u̱ bul ve fefa, ve̱ sen ve̱ nyôr shin Sheol uma, gadia iferkwagh ngi ken ya ve, ken asema a ve kpaa." 
Psalms55:16 Kpa mo yô, m ngu yilan Aôndo, TER Una yimam." 
Psalms55:17 Iyange i been man pepe man iyange sha tembe m vaan m toghor; A ungwa imo yam kpaa. 
Psalms55:18 A yima uma wam sha bem je, ken ityav mbi mbi mough a mo la, gadia mba ve lu num a mo yô, ve ngee kpishi." 
Psalms55:19 Aôndo ungwa, Una er ve ican; —Un u A tem tor gbem la— Sela. Gadia ve mba ior i geman kposo ga, mba cie Aôndo kpaa ga." 
Psalms55:20 A naregh ave na sha u una er num a mba ve lu bem a na yô, a vihi ikuryan na;" 
Psalms55:21 zwa na leghem er ka ahôm a bua yô, kpa ishima na yô, ka ityav tseegh; akaaôron na hemba leghem a mkurem, nahan kpaa ka usanker mba i tsough yô." 
Psalms55:22 Haa akaa a zan we iyol cii sha TER, tsô Una taver we; Una rumun er i̱ tenger a mbaperapera mayange ga." 
Psalms55:23 Kpa We, Aôndo, Ú sen a ve shin ihungwa i mtim ior mba haan awambe man mba wan atseregh yô, vea kporom a ayange a uma ve ken hemen ga. Kpa mo yô, me suur sha a We. Ngun ka sha ci u orhemen u mbawanatsam, i ver un sha imo i: Ikungugh ki hen ikon i terebin ken ca. Ka Pasalmi u Davidi. Ka icam i a dugh zum u Mbafiliti kôr un ken Gati la" 
Psalms56:1 Zungwem mhôônom, Aôndo gadia ior ndyarem angahar; u a nenge num a mo la, ngu a shi kighir mo a ican didi." 
Psalms56:2 Mbaihomov av ka ve shi ndyaren mo angahar didi; gadia mba ve nenge ityav a mo sha iyolgengese yô, mba kpishi je." 
Psalms56:3 Sha iyange i mciem maa tserem yô, me suur sha a We," 
Psalms56:4 ka sha Aôndo, u m wuese mkaanem Nam la; ka sha Aôndo m suur ye, me cia ga, ka nyi man or á ereme?" 
Psalms56:5 Ve shi geman akaaôron a am didi; mbamhen vev cii, mba henen u eren mo kwagh u bo." 
Psalms56:6 Ve zua imôngo, ve yer, ve ver ishima sha zende wam, kape ve meen uma wam la." 
Psalms56:7 Er ve er aferakaa, nahan kpaa vea wara? Gbihi akuraior inya sha ishimavihin, Aôndo!" 
Psalms56:8 U ôr iyenge i ayem a am cii; haa mliam am ken ishegh You; kera ka ken ruamabera Wou ma lu gaa? 
Psalms56:9 Tsô mbaihomov av vea hile ijime sha iyange i me yila la; m fa kwagh ne er Aôndo A te ikaa a mo yô. 
Psalms56:10 Ka sha Aôndo u m wuese mkaanem Nam la, ka sha TER u m wuese mkaanem Nam la." 
Psalms56:11 Ka sha Aôndo m suur ye, me cia ga, ka nyi man or á ereme?" 
Psalms56:12 Uiceghzwa mba m tsegh a We, mba sha a mo, Aôndo; me na U nagh ku ishughun." 
Psalms56:13 Gadia U yima uma wam sha ku; U yima angahar am sha gbev mbu nôngon, sha er m̱ zenden sha ishigh ki Aôndo ken iwanger i uma yô. Ngun ka sha ci u orhemen u mbawanatsam; i ver un sha ikenge i: De timin ga. Ka icam i Davidi dugh zum u a yevese Saulu a yem ken barwo la" 
Psalms57:1 Zungwem mhôônom, Aôndo, zungwem mhôônom, gadia ka ken a We, uma wam a yer ye, een, ka ken mure u akper a Ou me yer ye, zan zan akaavihin ne aa kar kera." 
Psalms57:2 M ngu yilan Aôndo Uhembansha, Aôndo u A eren akaa cii sha ci wam la." 
Psalms57:3 Una tindi Sha, á va yimam, Una hee u a ndyaren mo angahar la; Sela. Aôndo Una tindi erdoo Na man mimi Na." 
Psalms57:4 Uma wam ngu hen atô u ubegha, m ngu yaven hen atô u mba usu u lu hian ve la; ka ônov mba iorov mba anyi a ve a lu awange man avaan, nombor ve kpaa u lu sanker u esen yô." 
Psalms57:5 Kende a iyol You sha je, kar Usha cii, Aôndo; iengem You kpaa, i̱ kende i sha sha tar cii." 
Psalms57:6 Ve wa angahar am kper, uma wam var inya, ve timem ihungwa sha ishi, kpa ve gema ve gba shimi ayol a ve. Sela." 
Psalms57:7 Ishima taver mo, Aôndo, ishima taver mo; me wa icam, een, me wa atsam a wuese." 
Psalms57:8 Nder, we uma wam! Nder, we adiguve u vesen man u kiriki kpaa! Me nder sha use je." 
Psalms57:9 Me wuese We, Tere, hen atô u ior; me wa atsam a wuese We ken akuraior." 
Psalms57:10 Gadia erdoo Wou vese ar sha Usha je, mimi Wou kpaa ar sha ikwavaôndo je." 
Psalms57:11 Kende a iyol You sha je, kar Usha cii, Aôndo; iengem You kpaa, i̱ kende i sha sha tar cii. Ngun ka sha ci u orhemen u mbawanatsam; i ver un sha ikenge i: De timin ga. Ka icam i Davidi" 
Psalms58:1 Ne mbaaôndo, ne mba er kwagh sha mimi je kpa? Ne mba er ônov mba iorov ijir sha mimi kpa?" 
Psalms58:2 Ei, ken ishima yô, ne mba eren kwagh u ifer, ne mba kar myohom ma ipila i sha ave a en la, sha tar je." 
Psalms58:3 Mbaaferev due paleghaa ken uya je, er i mar ve je, tsô ve hii u tsumen sha aie u eren." 
Psalms58:4 Megh vegh ku er megh ku iyôgh yô, mba er igbinde i i kondo ato a i yô," 
Psalms58:5 i i we iko sha imo i mbanumben a i la ga, shin vea fa inyumbe ve nan nan kpaa." 
Psalms58:6 Aôndo, oso ve anyi ken zwa kera, TERE, or anomanyiigh a agumabegha;" 
Psalms58:7 ve̱ sough kera er mngerem ma kuwan kera nahan; zum u una ulugh avaan yô, a̱ hingir er i tôndo a ijô kera yô;" 
Psalms58:8 ve̱ hingir er ihyer i ka i zenden i nyuran i been kera yô, man er iyav mbu ka a dugh, mbu nenge a iyange ga la nahan!" 
Psalms58:9 Er ityev yenev mbi a lu a kav ayegher a ikon ga je tsô, Una kar a mi kera sha hiar, kwagh u kô kua mtsee u usu la cii kpaa." 
Psalms58:10 Orperapera una ember tsung, zum u una nenge iyevoron la; una ôô angahar shin awambe a mbaaferev." 
Psalms58:11 Tsô ior vea kaa er: Mimi je, injar i orperapera ngi, mimi je, Aôndo u ôron tar ijir ngu. Ngun ka sha ci u orhemen u mbawanatsam; i ver un sha ikenge i: De timin ga. Ka icam i Davidi, zum u Saulu tindi er i̱ za kura iyou sha ci u wuan un la" 
Psalms59:1 Dughum sha ikev i mbaihomov av, Aôndo wam, kende a mo sha hen mba ve mough num a mo la." 
Psalms59:2 Dughum sha ikev i mbaerenafer, yimam sha ikev i mbahaan awambe." 
Psalms59:3 Gadia nenge ase, mba meen uma wam; mbaageev kohol iyol u tan num sha a mo, ka sha ci u mkarkpe wam ga, man shi ka sha ci u isholibo yam kpaa ga, TERE," 
Psalms59:4 shin er iferkwagh i lu ga kpaa, nahan kpaa, ve gber ayem, ve za wa ago iyol. Nder sha u wasen mo, man shi nenge kpaa!" 
Psalms59:5 We, TERE, Aôndo u akum a Sha, Aôndo u Iserael, mough sha, ôr atôatyev ijir, de kera zungwen ma or u ken mba ve eren akaabo sha atseregh la mhôônom ga. Sela." 
Psalms59:6 Ka ve hide aikighe, ve eren imo er iwa yô, ve zenden ve ningir ken gar." 
Psalms59:7 Nenge, ve kaa imbwase sha zwa ve, usanker mba ve sha ityumbujôôgh; gadia ka an nana ungwa? Kape ve kaan la." 
Psalms59:8 Kpa We, TERE, Ú se ve; atôatyev cii, Ú nahan a tar." 
Psalms59:9 We, agee am, me ver ashe We, gadia ka Aôndo je, A lu gôgôyou wam ye." 
Psalms59:10 Aôndo wam Una keghem gbenda a erdoo Na; Aôndo Una rumun u me nenge isharen yam sha mbaihomov av. 
Psalms59:11 De woo ve ga, sha er á hungul ior av ga yô; sambe ve sha agee Ou, gbihi ve inya, TERE, perutya wase!" 
Psalms59:12 Isholibo i ken zwa ve, ka kwaghôron u sha ityumbujôôgh ve. Yô, i̱ kôr ve sha imanger ve la, man sha ci u ityuhwanev vev man kwaghôron ve u aiegh u ve er la." 
Psalms59:13 Tim ve sha iyugh, tim ve ve̱ saa sha won kera, ve̱ fa er Aôndo A tem tor sha ya u Yakob, zan zan i za ar hen akighir a tar je yô. Sela." 
Psalms59:14 Shin vea hile aikighe, ve eren imo er iwa yô, ve zenden ve ningir ken gar," 
Psalms59:15 ve hingir kera ke kera sha u zenden keren kwaghyan; aluer vea ide ga yô, ve tsa eren nahan." 
Psalms59:16 Kpa mo yô, me wa icam i teren agee a Ou; een, pepe me wa icam me ember erdoo Wou, gadia ka We, U lum gôgôyou ye, ijiir yam i yeren sha iyange i ican i tserem la." 
Psalms59:17 Ka We, agee am, me wa U atsam a wuese ye; gadia Aôndo ka gôgôyou wam, Aôndo u A eren a mo dedoo ne. Ngun ka sha ci u orhemen u mbawanatsam; i ver un sha ikenge i: Loho u Shiada. Ka icam i Davidi dugh sha u tesen ior, zum u a nôngo ityav a Mbaaram mba ken tar u Mesopotamia, man a Mbaaram mba ken tar u Soba, man zum u Yoabi hide, man a wua Mbaedom shin pev u Bar, ior dubu pue kar uhar la" 
Psalms60:1 Aôndo, U ta se kera, U sombo se, ishima vihi U; yô, shi hide a vese." 
Psalms60:2 U er tar tenger, U pav u kpaa; shi kondo ikwe i u, gadia ngu tenger." 
Psalms60:3 U tese ior Ou akaa a ican, U na se se ma zar u wain u u ne zuzumsôr." 
Psalms60:4 U na mbacian We tuta, Wer, ve̱ yevese ada. Sela." 
Psalms60:5 Sha er á yima mba ve doo U ishima yô, yima sha uwegh Ough ku yanegh, ungwa imo yase." 
Psalms60:6 Aôndo ôr kwagh ken icighanjiir Na: Mo Me ember yagh yagh, Me pav Shekem, man shi Me kar kwar sha pev u Sukoti." 
Psalms60:7 Gileadi ka u Wam, Manase kpaa ka u Wam je; Eferaim ka kwagh u yisan ityough Yagh a mi je; Yuda ka tôgh Agh;" 
Psalms60:8 Moabi ka ikagh Yagh ki ôôn iyol a mi; sha Edom yô, Me kende ikôvough ki nguhar Yagh; Filitia yô, Me er ikenge, Me ember un." 
Psalms60:9 Ka an nana za a mo ken gar u taveraa? Ka an nan fetyô u zan a mo ken Edomo? 
Psalms60:10 Kera ka We, Aôndo, U te se kera gaa? U kera due a akumautya ase imôngo ga, Aôndo." 
Psalms60:11 Na se iwasen sha u nôngon a or u ahendanegh, gadia iwasen i or yô, ka gbilinkwagh tsô." 
Psalms60:12 Ka ken Aôndo man sé eren akaageegh ye; gadia ka Un, Una ndyar mbaahendanev asev shin angahar ye. Ngun ka sha ci u orhemen u mbawanatsam; mba koho un sha adiguve. Ka Pasalmi u Davidi" 
Psalms61:1 Ungwa zamber wam, Aôndo; wa msen wam iko." 
Psalms61:2 Ka sha ikighir i tar je, m yer U ye, zum u ishima ka ia yinam la; hemen mo, unde a mo sha vande u u tav, u gandem yô." 
Psalms61:3 Gadia U ngum ijiir i yeren, gôgôyou u taver kpaa, henpe me yer orihom yô." 
Psalms61:4 Ma m tema ken tenti Wou gbem, ma m yer ken ijiir i yeren i ken akper a Ou la. Sela." 
Psalms61:5 Gadia Aôndo, We, U ungwa uiceghzwa av; U na mba ve cie iti You yô, dyako." 
Psalms61:6 Seer tor ayange a tsan sha won; anyom a na a̱ lu zan zan sha ikov ikov je," 
Psalms61:7 a̱ tema tor sha ishigh ki Aôndo gbem; na erdoo man mimi, ve̱ kuran un." 
Psalms61:8 Kape me wan icam i wuese iti You gbem ne, me kuren uiceghzwa av ayange ayange yô. Ngun ka sha ci u orhemen u mbawanatsam; ka sha ikenge i Yedutun. Ka Pasalmi u Davidi" 
Psalms62:1 Ka her Aôndo tseegh uma wam a veren ashe ving ye; ka hen a Na myem wam a dugh ye. 
Psalms62:2 Ka Un tseegh A lu vande wam man myem wam kpaa ye; Un ka gôgôyou wam, me tenger yum ga." 
Psalms62:3 Shi nan je man né de u tan num sha or sha u wuan un, ne cii, er kpekpeyou u a nelem man er garawen u a nenge u gbana?" 
Psalms62:4 Mba henen ma kwagh ga, saa di u mgbeghan un sha icivir na kera; aie u eren doo ve, mba ne iveren sha zwa, kpa ken asema ve yô, ka ifan ve we ye. Sela." 
Psalms62:5 Ka her Aôndo tseegh ú ver ashe ving ye, we uma wam, gadia ka hen a Na man ishimaverenkeghen yam i lu ye." 
Psalms62:6 Ka un tseegh A lu vande wam man myem wam kpaa ye; Un ka gôgôyou wam, me tenger ga." 
Psalms62:7 Ka hen Aôndo man myem wam a lu, kua icivir yam kpaa ye. Vande u agee am, man ijiir yam i waren ker kpaa, ka hen Aôndo ve lu ye." 
Psalms62:8 Ne ikurior ne, suur nen sha a Na hanma shighe, pase nen asema a en sha ishigh Nagh; Aôndo ka ijiir yase i yeren je. Sela." 
Psalms62:9 Mimi je, ior mba ve lu a icivir ga, mba er humbe u karen kera nahan; mba ve lu a icivir kpaa, ka aie tsô, sha ikyekye i karen kwagh a mi yô, vea kuma ga, ve imôngo cii ve kuma sha humbe u karen kera la kpaa ga." 
Psalms62:10 De suur nen sha mkighir ga, man shi de veren ishima sha u i ga. Aluer inyaregh kia seer yô, de veren ishima sha ki ga." 
Psalms62:11 Aôndo ôr kwagh, kwa môm, kwa har je kpaa, m ungwa nahan, mer: Agee yô, ka Aôndo A lu a mi ye;" 
Psalms62:12 erdoo kpaa Tere, ka We U lu a mi ye; gadia We U na hanma or injar sha inja i tom u nan. Ka Pasalmi u Davidi dugh zum u a lu ken taaikôngo u Yuda la" 
Psalms63:1 Aôndo, ka We U lu Aôndo wam ye, m ngu keren We, U sarem ken ishima er imurakôron nahan; U sar iyol yam tsung, ken tar u ombor u tseghe tseghe, ape mngerem ma lu ga yô." 
Psalms63:2 Kape m lu kenger We ken icighanjiir la, sha u me nenge agee Ou man iengem You kpaa." 
Psalms63:3 Gadia erdoo Wou doo, hemba uma; zwa wam ua wuese We." 
Psalms63:4 Kape me wuese We er m lu uma sha won je; ka ken iti You man me kende ave am sha ye. 
Psalms63:5 Uma wam una ide er ka sha mshia man ahôm yô; zwa wam kpaa ua wuese We sha ityumbuzwaagh i ember tsung. 
Psalms63:6 Zum u ka mea umbur We sha gambe wam yô, m hen kwagh Wou sha ashighe a mbamkor mba utugh la cii," 
Psalms63:7 gadia We U lu Orwasen mo, ka ken mure u akper a Ou kpaa me ember tsung je ye." 
Psalms63:8 Uma wam var a We ityô; uwegh Ough ku yanegh ku suwem. 
Psalms63:9 Kpa mba ve keren uma wam sha er vea tim un yô, vea sen shin ajiir a zan a taregh." 
Psalms63:10 Á gema ve a na sha agee a sanker; vea hingir kwar u ugbaseela. 
Psalms63:11 Kpa tor yô, una ember tsung ken Aôndo; hanma or u nan bumun Un yô, nana ta ihagh, gadia á cir zwa u mbaaiev. Ngun ka sha ci u orhemen u mbawanatsam. Ka Pasalmi u Davidi" 
Psalms64:1 Ungwa imo yam er m vaan yô, Aôndo; kura uma wam sha mcieryol u orihom." 
Psalms64:2 Yerem sha mhen u ken myer, u mbaerenkwaghbo kua sha mkohol u mbaerenafer la;" 
Psalms64:3 mba ve hor nombor ve er sanker yô, ve hôn avaan a ve—ka kwaghôron u bo je la," 
Psalms64:4 sha er vea ker or u jighilii ken myer; ve ker un fefa je, ve ya ishe ga." 
Psalms64:5 Mba taver asema a ve sha awashima u bo, mba ôron imôngo sha u vea wa ukper myer, mba kaan er: Ka an nana nenge a mi?" 
Psalms64:6 Mba henen u eren aferakaa: Se kohol iyol ve, se zua a mhen u dedoo ve. Mhen u ken myer kua ishima i or yô, taver kpishi gande u fan." 
Psalms64:7 Kpa Aôndo Una ker ve ivaan; á bura ve sha ivaan fefa je. 
Psalms64:8 Kape á er ve, vea nôngo gbev ne, nombor ve je kpaa u hendan a ve; mba vea nenge a ve cii, vea jingir ityough." 
Psalms64:9 Nahan ior cii vea cia, man vea pase tom u Aôndo, shi vea ver ishima sha ieren Na kpaa ye." 
Psalms64:10 Orperapera una ember ken TER, una yer ken a Na; mba ve lu a mimi ken asema a ve cii kpaa, vea lu a icivir. Ngun ka sha ci u orhemen u mbawanatsam. Ka Pasalmi. Ka icam i Davidi" 
Psalms65:1 Aôndo We U kuma u á wuese We ken Shion; ka We, man á kure iceghzwa a We kpee ye." 
Psalms65:2 We, u U ongo msen, ka hen a We man uuma cii vea va ye." 
Psalms65:3 Aferakaa hembam agee, akaabo ase yô, ka We U ese a kera ye." 
Psalms65:4 I saan or u U tsough nan la iyol, Wer nana̱ kporom er nana tema ken ityembe i iyou You la. Mdoom ma ya Wou maa kuma se, ka icighantempel Wou je la." 
Psalms65:5 Ka sha akaacieryol man U rumun se sha perapera ye, We, Aôndo u myem wase, We u akighir a tar cii ve veren ishima sha a We ne, kua uzegembamngerev mba ve lu ca la kpaa;" 
Psalms65:6 We u iwo i til dông i lu sha agee a Ou; We u U cir agee iyol; 
Psalms65:7 We u U yange kume u uzegembamngerev, ka kume u agôndoamnger, kua ayôôso a akuraior la." 
Psalms65:8 Nahan mba ve tem ken ajiir a caa kpaa, mba cian uivande Ou; ka U er mdugh u iyange man mmir u i ve ember!" 
Psalms65:9 Ka U va sôr tar, U na u ura kpaa, U er u u mgbough a akaa, u hôm kpishi; ifi u Aôndo iv mngerem; U na ve iyiagh; kape U ser tar la." 
Psalms65:10 Ka U na mngerem shin ikwever i u wuee, U sough alôgh a u; U er inya i hingir bôdo bôdo sha ura, U ver mmende u u doo doo;" 
Psalms65:11 U wuha inyom i mdoom Ou iyol, igbenda You ngi nende ahôm." 
Psalms65:12 Ajiir a hômon toho ken ikôngo nga nende, man agungu kpaa nga cirin iember iyol." 
Psalms65:13 Akumauile cir ajiir a a hem toho la, man iyiav cir apev cii, ve ger akenge ve ember, shi ve wa atsam kpaa. Ngun ka sha ci u orhemen u mbawanatsam. Ka icam. Ka Pasalmi" 
Psalms66:1 Ember, wuese Aôndo, we tar sha won cii," 
Psalms66:2 wa icam, ter icivir i iti Na; gema iwuese Na, i̱ hingir kwagh u icivirigh!" 
Psalms66:3 Kaa nen a Aôndo ner: Ityom You ka i cier iyol; ka sha mvese u agee Ou man mbaihomov Ou vea var U inya ye. 
Psalms66:4 Tar cii ua gure, ua civir We, ua wa U icam, ua ter iti You. Sela." 
Psalms66:5 Va, va nenge ityom i Aôndo u aeren a Na a ônov mba iorov a cier iyol yum ne:" 
Psalms66:6 A gema zegemnger hingir tar u tseghe tseghe; ve per ifi sha angahar; keela yô, se ember Un." 
Psalms66:7 A tema tor sha agee a Na gbem; ashe a Na gba kenger sha akuraior; mbahendan yô, ve̱ de kera kenden ayol a ve sha ga. Sela." 
Psalms66:8 Yô, wuese nen Aôndo wase, ne ior, er nen er á ungwa iwuese Na;" 
Psalms66:9 Un u A de se er se̱ lu uma her, shi A rumun er angahar ase a̱ dolough ga la." 
Psalms66:10 Gadia U kar se Aôndo, U kar se er i karen azurfa nahan." 
Psalms66:11 U va a vese ken kper, U penda se ikav mbi yuhwan shin iwenge." 
Psalms66:12 U na ior Wer, ve̱ zende se sha ityou; se kar ken usu kua shin mnger, kpa U due a vese, U va a vese ken ijiir i akaa a ngee her yô." 
Psalms66:13 Me nyôr ken iyou You a nagh ku nanden, me za kure uiceghzwa av a We," 
Psalms66:14 mba ityumbuzwaagh yam ôr la, man zwa wam kpaa ôr sha shighe u ican i erem la." 
Psalms66:15 Me na U nagh ku nanden ku sha uicighanmbailev, kua nagh ku human doon ku sha anomaiyôngo; me na U nagh sha abua kua ivo. Sela." 
Psalms66:16 Ne mba ne cie Aôndo cii, va, va ungwa nen, me pase ne kwagh u A er sha ci u uma wam yô." 
Psalms66:17 M yila Un sha zwa wam, nombor wam kpaa u wuese Un." 
Psalms66:18 Mea ver ishima sha ma kwaghbo yô, Ter ma A ongo ga;" 
Psalms66:19 kpa mimi je, Aôndo ungwa, A wa imo i msen wam iko." 
Psalms66:20 I̱ wuese Aôndo, u A daa msen wam kera ga, shi A kar a erdoo Na hen a mo kera kpaa ga yô. Ngun ka sha ci u orhemen u mbawanatsam; i kuhwa un sha mbaadiguve. Ka Pasalmi. Ka icam kpaa" 
Psalms67:1 Aôndo A̱ zungwe se mhôônom, A̱ ver se doo doo; A̱ er ishigh Nagh ki wanger hen a vese; Sela." 
Psalms67:2 Sha er á fa gbenda Wou sha won, man myom Wou kpaa ken akuraior cii." 
Psalms67:3 Ior ve̱ wuese We, Aôndo; ior ci ca ve̱ wuese We." 
Psalms67:4 Akuraior a̱ ember, a̱ wa icam i wuese, gadia U er ior ijir sha mimi, man U hemen akuraior a shin tar. Sela." 
Psalms67:5 Ior ve̱ wuese We, Aôndo; ior ci ca ve̱ wuese We." 
Psalms67:6 Inya mende iyiav dedoo; Aôndo, Aôndo wase, Una ver se doo doo;" 
Psalms67:7 Aôndo Una ver se doo doo, man akighir a tar cii aa cia Un. Ngun ka sha ci u orhemen u mbawanatsam. Ka Pasalmi u Davidi. Ka icam" 
Psalms68:1 Aôndo A̱ mough sha, mbaihomov Nav ve̱ sambe, mba ve ker Un ihom la, ve̱ yevese sha ishigh Nagh kera." 
Psalms68:2 Er ahumbe ka a kar a mnyim kera nahan, kape U kar a ve kera la; man er tsur ka u sough sha usu nahan, kape mbaaferev ve saa ishe sha ishigh ki Aôndo la." 
Psalms68:3 Kpa mbaperapera mba ember, mba ember tsung sha ishigh ki Aôndo; een, mba ember tsung a msaanyol je." 
Psalms68:4 Wa icam ter nen Aôndo, wa nen atsam a wuese iti Na; kaha nen igbudu a̱ tav sha, sha ci u Un u A zenden A karen ken udeserti la; iti Na er TER, ember nen tsung sha ishigh Nagh." 
Psalms68:5 Aôndo ka ter u ancôgholov, man orjir u kasev mba côgholov, ken icighanyou Na la." 
Psalms68:6 Aôndo ka A gema or u mtswen, nan hingir u lun a ior ken ya; ka A dugh mbakwarev, A na ve mkpeyol; kpa mbahembanato yô, ve tema ken tar u iombor." 
Psalms68:7 Aôndo, zum u U due U hemen ior Ou, U zenden, U karen ken toho la, Sela" 
Psalms68:8 tar tenger ura kpaa nôô, sha ishigh ki Aôndo, een, Senai la je kpaa tenger sha ishigh ki Aôndo, Aôndo u Iserael la." 
Psalms68:9 U na ura u nôô kpishi, Aôndo. U taver dyako Wou zum u a ver la," 
Psalms68:10 nongo Wou u tema ker; sha mdoom Ou, Aôndo, ka U sôr kwagh sha ci u mbaatsanev." 
Psalms68:11 Ka Ter man A kaa imo Na ye; kasev mba ve yôôn loho u dedoo ka ikum i vesen. 
Psalms68:12 Utor mba akumautya mba yevese, mba yevese je; man kasev mba ve lu ken ya yô, mba karen ishar je." 
Psalms68:13 Shin er ne yav ken atô u atôrauile la yô, i cir azurfa sha akper a atii, zenaria u ayaikure kpaa cir ingur i akper a na." 
Psalms68:14 Zum u Uhembansha cii sambe utor keregh yô, senou gba ken Salmon." 
Psalms68:15 Uwo u Bashan ka uwo u Aôndo je, uwo u Bashan ka uwo u zôngo zôngo je." 
Psalms68:16 Ne iwo i zôngo zôngo ne, ka nyi ne kenger uwo u u sar Aôndo sha u u̱ lu ijiir Na i teman la, dang nahana? Een, TER Una tema sha u gbem je." 
Psalms68:17 Akekeanyinya a Aôndo nga udubu ikundu je, een, udubu kwa udubu; Ter ngu ken atô u a, ka Senai ken icighanjiir." 
Psalms68:18 U kôndo U yem Sha, U yem a mbakwarev uikangen, U ngohol uiwua hen ior, een, zan zan hen mbahendan kpaa, sha er TER Aôndo Una tema a ve imôngo yô." 
Psalms68:19 I̱ wuese Ter u A tee se ayange ayange yô; ka Aôndo A lu myem wase ye. Sela. 
Psalms68:20 Aôndo wase ka Aôndo u yiman se acin imôngo je, iku i waren kpaa ka hen AÔNDO Ter i lu ye." 
Psalms68:21 Kpa Aôndo Una hembe mbaihomov Nav ityouv, man shi ityough ki umen ki or u nan taver ishima ken ifer i nan la kpaa." 
Psalms68:22 Ter kaa er: Me dugh ve ken Bashan, Me hide a ve, shi Me dugh ve shin aiv a zegemnger, Me hide a ve," 
Psalms68:23 sha er u̱ wa nguhar wou ken awambe yô, nombor u iwa you kpaa ua zua a kwar u u sha mbaihomov ou." 
Psalms68:24 Ve nenge zende Wou a ikumior You, Aôndo, ka zende u Aôndo wam man Tor wam a ikumior ken icighanjiir je la." 
Psalms68:25 Mbawanatsam hemen, mbakuhwandagh dondo, ve lu her atô u ônkasev mba kuhwan gbande." 
Psalms68:26 Wuese nen Aôndo ken mbamkohol, ka TER je la, ne mba ne dugh ken imbormnger i Iserael yô." 
Psalms68:27 Benyamin u kiriki, tor ve la, ngula; kua mbatarev mba Yuda man ikpelaior ve la; mbatarev mba Sebulon, kua mbatarev mba Nafetali kpaa." 
Psalms68:28 Aôndo wou A̱ kaa i̱ taver we agee; Aôndo, taver kwagh u U er sha ci wase la." 
Psalms68:29 Utor vea va na U iwua, sha ci u tempel Wou u a lu ken Yerusalem la." 
Psalms68:30 Yange inyamtoho i hen awoo ne, man ikum i anomabua a anibuav mba akuraior, ndyar ve shin angahar, ve mba inyaregh ki kpandegh ki doon ve yum la; sambe ior mba ityav mbi doo ve yô." 
Psalms68:31 Ashagbaior aa due ken Igipiti; Etiopia una naregh ave hen Aôndo fefa. 
Psalms68:32 Ne ityartor i sha won, wa nen icam ter nen Aôndo, wa nen atsam a wuese Ter, Sela" 
Psalms68:33 u A zenden sha Usha mba ve hembe gban ca, mba ve lu tsuaa je yô; ungwa, A ôr kwagh sha imo Na, ka zegeimo je la!" 
Psalms68:34 Wuese nen agee a Aôndo; icivir Na i hemban ngi sha Iserael, man agee a Na nga sha ikwavaôndo." 
Psalms68:35 Aôndo U cier iyol ken icighanjiir Wou; Aôndo u Iserael ne ior Nav agee kua tahav kpaa. I̱ wuese Aôndo. Ngun ka sha ci u orhemen u mbawanatsam; i ver un sha ikenge i: Ulôhô. Ka Pasalmi u Davidi 
Psalms69:1 Yimam, Aôndo, gadia mngerem kpishi arem sha uma je." 
Psalms69:2 M mile shin angbiôr a zan, henpe fan ityô u tilen ga; m gba shin mngerem ma zan, agôndoamnger uvem." 
Psalms69:3 M yila je, m vôr, iker umam; m ver ashe sha Aôndo wam je, ashe kughur mo ikôr." 
Psalms69:4 Mba ve kerem ihom sha ityôikaa ga yô, ve hemba ngeen a ice yam i sha ityo; mbaihomov av mba icughuv, mba i lu ve ka timin mo kera yô, ve taver; nahan m gba kimbin kwagh u m vande ngohol un ga tsô." 
Psalms69:5 Aôndo, We U fa lanegh agh; aeren am a bo nga myer sha ishigh You ga." 
Psalms69:6 De deen mba ve veren ashe sha a We, kunya u̱ kôron ve sha ci wam ga, Tere AÔNDO u akum a Sha; de deen mba ve keren We, ve̱ zua a iheen sha ci wam ga, Aôndo u Iserael!" 
Psalms69:7 Gadia ka sha ci Wou man i heem, kunya u cirim sha ishi ye." 
Psalms69:8 M hingir anmgbianev av er ka orvannya nahan, man ônov mba ngôm kpaa er orityôtyev nahan."
