Psalms69:9 Gadia ishima i veren sha iyou You la wuam; man aheen a mba ve heen We la, a hide sha a mo." 
Psalms69:10 Zum u m vaa shi m hôr kwaghyan kpaa yô, kwagh la gema hingir mo iheen." 
Psalms69:11 Er m ta ikondo uya yô, m hingir ve kwagh u veren ishor a mi." 
Psalms69:12 Mba ve tem hen hundagar yô, mba ôron kwagh wam; m hingir icam i mbahundenmsôrom wan." 
Psalms69:13 Kpa mo yô, msen wam ngu her a We, TERE; sha shighe u doon We la, Aôndo, ungwam sha erdoo Wou u ngeen yum man sha mimi u myom Wou la." 
Psalms69:14 Dughum shin angbiôr, de deen mo, m̱ uven ga; i̱ yimam sha ikev i mba ve kerem ihom, man shin mngerem ma zan la kpaa." 
Psalms69:15 Iwuhamnger i̱ de uv a mo ga, iv i̱ de miren a mo ga, ihungwa kpaa, i̱ de cirin mo ga." 
Psalms69:16 Bugh zwa a mo, TERE, gadia erdoo Wou doo kpee; sha mhôônom Ou ma zungwen yum yô, gema ishigh ken a mo." 
Psalms69:17 De yeren wanakiriki Wou ishigh You ga, gadia m ngu ken mkighir je, bugh zwa a mo fefa." 
Psalms69:18 Kporom ikua ikua a uma wam, paa un; paam sha ci u mbaihomov av." 
Psalms69:19 We U fa ilyahan yam, man kunya wam, man iheen yam; mbaahendanev av cii, mba sha ishigh You." 
Psalms69:20 Iheen nam ishimavihin je, kondo iyol, agee kera ngam iyol ga; M ker mba mhôônom ma kôr ve a mo, kpa mô lu ga, mbasurun mo ishima kpaa, m zua a min ga." 
Psalms69:21 Ve nam megh er ku̱ lum kwaghyan; sha imura yam i kôron kpaa ve nam vineger er m̱ ma. 
Psalms69:22 Tebul ve a̱ hingir kper sha ishigh vegh; mkpeyol ve kpaa, i̱ hingir ve shile u hônon." 
Psalms69:23 Ime i̱ wa ve ashe, sha er ve̱ de kera nengen ga yô, awenge ve kpaa a̱ zeren tenger gbem." 
Psalms69:24 Haa iyugh You sha a ve, mvihi u iyugh You a̱ tser ve." 
Psalms69:25 Ijiir i ve hee afo her la, i̱ hingir ice, ma or a̱ de kera tem ken utenti vev ga." 
Psalms69:26 Gadia ve tôv un u U tsaha la, a ican, mba ôron kwagh u ishima i vihin i mba U gber ve avav la." 
Psalms69:27 Seer ve a seer ibo ve la, ve̱ de nyer ken perapera Wou ga." 
Psalms69:28 I̱ kough ve ken ruamabera u uma kera; i̱ de ngeren ve a mbaperapera imôngo ga. 
Psalms69:29 Kpa mo yô, m ngu icanor u lun a ijungwen; yô, myom Wou a̱ kendem sha, Aôndo." 
Psalms69:30 Me wuese iti i Aôndo sha icam, me civir Un sha ishughun." 
Psalms69:31 Á doo TER je, á hemba Un nombua, Shin bua u lun a akor kua apande kpaa." 
Psalms69:32 Zum u mbaasemaleghlegh vea nenge yô, vea ember; ne mba ne keren Aôndo yô, asema a en a̱ lu uma." 
Psalms69:33 Gadia TER ongo imo i mbaibanave, man lahan mbakwarev Nav kpaa ga." 
Psalms69:34 Sha man tar ve̱ wuese Un, uzegembamngerev man akaa a a zenden shimi cii kpaa." 
Psalms69:35 Gadia Aôndo Una war Shion, Una maa agar a Yuda, vea tema keregh je, á hingir kwagh ve." 
Psalms69:36 Vor u mbayev Nav, ua ya dyako sha mi, man mba iti Na i doo ve kpaa, vea tema ker. Ngun ka sha ci u orhemen u mbaatsamev. Ka Pasalmi u Davidi, sha u umbur" 
Psalms70:1 Aôndo, shi yimama! TERE, er fefa, wasem!" 
Psalms70:2 Mba ve keren mo a ku yô, ve̱ va ahenge, kunya u̱ kôr ve cii; man mba ve ember sha ican i eren mo kpaa, i̱ hile a ve ijime, i̱ hee ve." 
Psalms70:3 Mba ve kaa er: Ahoo! Ahoo! yô, i̱ hile a ve ijime sha ci u kunya u ve ye la." 
Psalms70:4 Mba ve keren We cii, ve̱ ember tsung, i̱ saan ve iyol ken a We; mba myom Wou a doo ve ishima kpaa, ve̱ zeren kaan er: Aôndo hemba!" 
Psalms70:5 Kpa mo m ngu icanor man oribanave kpaa; Aôndo, er fefa u van hen a mo! Ka We U lu iwasen yam man Oryiman wam kpaa ye; de ngôôr ga, TERE!" 
Psalms71:1 TERE, ka sha a We m suur ye, de rumun m̱ va ahenge mayange ga." 
Psalms71:2 Yimam sha perapera Wou, warem kpaa; ver ato Ou her a mo, yimam," 
Psalms71:3 lum vande u teman ker, henpe me zer nyôron gbem yô; ka We U kaa Wer, m̱ war ye, gadia ka We U lu barwo wam man garutya wam kpaa ye." 
Psalms71:4 Aôndo wam, dughum sha ikev i iferor kera, sha ikev i or u lun a perapera ga, ipiraor." 
Psalms71:5 Gadia ka We je U lu ishimaverenkeghen yam ye, Terem, AÔNDO ka sha a We m suur ye, hii er m lu iyev la je." 
Psalms71:6 Ka sha a We m suur ye, hii sha mmar je, ka We U dugh a mo ken iyav mbu ngôm ye, me wuese We gbem." 
Psalms71:7 Mo yô, m ngu er ka kwagh u kpilighyol hen ior kpishi yô; kpa ka We U lu ijiir yam i waren ker ye." 
Psalms71:8 Zwa wam iv a iwuese You, man a icivir You kpaa, iyange jimin cii." 
Psalms71:9 De tem kera sha shighe u iyolibeen la ga, de undun mo shighe u agee am a bee la ga." 
Psalms71:10 Gadia mbaihomov av, mba ôron kwagh sha a mo, man mba ve ker uma wam a ku kpaa, ve zua zwa," 
Psalms71:11 ve kaa er: Aôndo ta un kera ve; zenda nen, za kôr nen un, gadia kera ngu a oryiman ga." 
Psalms71:12 Aôndo, de gbe ca a mo ga. Aôndo wam, er fefa, va wasem." 
Psalms71:13 Mba ve hendan a uma wam cii, ve̱ va ahenge, ve̱ saa ishe; man mba ve keren mo a ican kpaa ilyahan man kunya u̱ cir ve iyol." 
Psalms71:14 Kpa mo yô, me ver ishima me kegh gbem, me seer a seer wuese We." 
Psalms71:15 Zwa wam ua shi ôron kwagh u perapera Wou didi, man u myom Wou, gadia m fa iyenge ve ga." 
Psalms71:16 Me va a aeren a ageegh a Ter AÔNDO; me ter perapera Wou, á lu u Wou la tseegh." 
Psalms71:17 Aôndo, hii yev wam je, U tesem; zan zan ahegen yô, m ngu pasen aeren a Ou a kpilighyol her." 
Psalms71:18 Een, zan zan shighe u m bee iyol, m mende ivu kpaa, de undun mo ga, Aôndo, saa me kar pasen agee a Ou hen kov u ua va la, man tahav Ou kpaa hen hanma or u nana va lu la." 
Psalms71:19 Perapera Wou ar Sha je, Aôndo; We u U er akaa a vesen, Aôndo, ka an nan lu er We?" 
Psalms71:20 We u U tesem atsan kpishi a nyoon iyol, Ú shi Ú hidem a uma wam her, shi Ú dughum shin aiv a taregh." 
Psalms71:21 Seer mo icivir, gema, surum ishima." 
Psalms71:22 Nahan mo kpaa me wuese We sha adiguve, ka mimi Wou je la, Aôndo wam. Me wa U atsam a wuese sha adiguve u vesen, We, Icighan u Iserael." 
Psalms71:23 Zwa wam ua ember tsung je zum u me wa atsam a wuese We yô, kua uma wam u U paa un la kpaa." 
Psalms71:24 Nombol wam kpaa ua shi teren perapera Wou iyange jimin cii; gadia mba ve keren mo a ican la yô, ve va ahenge, kunya u kôr ve cii. Ka Pasalmi u Solomon" 
Psalms72:1 Aôndo, na tor ajiraôron a Ou, na wan u tor perapera Wou." 
Psalms72:2 A̱ ôr ior Ou ijir sha perapera; mbaatsanev Ou kpaa sha mimi. 
Psalms72:3 Iwo i̱ va ior a bem, kua agungu kpaa, sha perapera." 
Psalms72:4 A̱ ôr ijir i atsanaior, a̱ yima ônov mba mbaibanave, a̱ gema a̱ her ipiraor." 
Psalms72:5 Ve̱ cia u er iyange i lu her yô, man shighe u uwer u lu her kpaa zan zan sha ikov ikov cii." 
Psalms72:6 A̱ lu er ura u u nee sha toho u i tende u yô, man er iura i nôôn shin inya yô." 
Psalms72:7 Sha ayange na yô, i̱ kpe orperapera iyol, man bem a̱ ngee zan zan uwer ua kera lu ga." 
Psalms72:8 A̱ tema tor, hii hen zegemnger zan zan za ar hen zegemnger, man shi hii hen Ifi zan zan ar sha akighir a tar." 
Psalms72:9 Mba ve tem ken taaikôngo ve̱ gure un inya, mbaihomov nav ve̱ ndiar vuulevu." 
Psalms72:10 Utor mba Tarshishi man mba ken ityar i shin kpe zegemnger ve̱ va un a iwua; utor mba Sekeba man Seba kpaa ve̱ va a uiwua. 
Psalms72:11 Utor cii vea gure un inya; akuraior cii aa er un tom. 
Psalms72:12 Gadia una yima oribanave zum u nana vaa yô, man icanor kua or u nan lu a orwasen ga kpaa." 
Psalms72:13 Mhôônom maa kôr un a mbaatsanev man mbaibanave, una yima uuma mba mbaibanave kpaa." 
Psalms72:14 Una paa uma ve sha mkighir man ipila; awambe a ve aa lu kwagh u injaa sha ishigh nagh. 
Psalms72:15 Ma a lu uma, ma i ne un zenaria u Sekeba; ior ve̱ er msen sha ci na gbem, ve̱ shi veren un doo doo didi." 
Psalms72:16 Iyiav mbi̱ ngee shin tar sha ityouv mbi iwoov je kpaa, asagher a mbi a̱ hingir war war er Lebanon yô, ior ve̱ hôm ken agar er toho u menden hen inya yô." 
Psalms72:17 Iti na i̱ lu gbem sha won, iti na i̱ samber er iyange i lu her ne, ior ve̱ ver ayol a ve doo doo ken a na, ve̱ wuese un er ka or u sar sar." 
Psalms72:18 I̱ wuese TER, Aôndo, Aôndo u Iserael, ka Un tseegh A eren akaakpilighyol ye," 
Psalms72:19 man shi i̱ wuese iti Na i dion tsung gbem sha won; tar cii u̱ iv a iengem Na. Amen, man shi Amen kpaa." 
Psalms72:20 Mbamsen mba Davidi wan u Yese, ka mkur ve je ne. Ka Pasalmi u Asav" 
Psalms73:1 Mimi je, Aôndo eren dedoo a Iserael, a mba ve lu a asema a wang yô." 
Psalms73:2 Kpa mo yô, shi kpuaa tsô angahar a am ma a kera lu ga, shi kpuaa tsô angahar a am ma a dolough kera." 
Psalms73:3 Gadia m lu tômon kwagh u mbaihaghev, zum u m nenge ikôl-laghen i mbaaferev la yô." 
Psalms73:4 Gadia ma kwagh u vihin tseren ve ga, ayol a ve taver gbong gbong." 
Psalms73:5 Ican eren ve er ior mbagenev nahan ga, man shi kwagh u bo te sha a ve er ior mbagenev nahan kpaa ga." 
Psalms73:6 Ka nahan man iyolgengese i har ve sha mon er ishiligh nahan ye, ipila cir ve iyol er ka ikondo nahan." 
Psalms73:7 Ashe ve nga ikôl ngbôô sha ci u mkehem, msenge u ve sengen ken asema a ve iv je haa inya." 
Psalms73:8 Mba nahan tar, man shi mba er kwagh u ifer, mba er kwagh sha mkighir sha gesa u tan." 
Psalms73:9 Zwa ve ngu hendan a Usha, nombor ve yô, ngu gem ngu zenden shin inya." 
Psalms73:10 Ka nahan man ior ve hir heen ye, man mba sughur man mngerem ma kpishim." 
Psalms73:11 Ka ve kaa er: Á er nan man Aôndo Una fa? Man kwaghfan ngu hen Uhembansha kpa? 
Psalms73:12 Nenge, kape mbaaferev ve lu je ne; nahan kpaa, er kwagh a ze ve iyol ga yô, ve seer inyaregh vegh." 
Psalms73:13 Mimi je, m gbe wanger ishima yam, man m nyian ishô iyol gbilin tsô." 
Psalms73:14 Gadia ka m shi yan ican didi, kua mtsaha kpaa hanma sev." 
Psalms73:15 Aluer mea kaa mer: Kape me kaa ne yô, ma m er vough a kov u ônov ou ga." 
Psalms73:16 Zum u m gba nôngon u me fa kwagh ne yô, gema lum kwagh u zan iyol," 
Psalms73:17 zan zan m nyôr ken icighanjiir u Aôndo, man m nenge mkur ve ye." 
Psalms73:18 Mimi je, U ver ve ken ajiir a lyemen, U gbihi ve ken mtim." 
Psalms73:19 Nenge, er ve yôhôl, fefa yô, ve saa doo doo sha akaa a tan mciem iyol!" 
Psalms73:20 Er mnyam ma cien ma lu nahan, zum u or ka nan nder kera la, kape, Tere, zum u U mough sha yô, U laha mlu ve la." 
Psalms73:21 Zum u ishima lu vihin mo, man shi sôôm ken ishima kpaa yô," 
Psalms73:22 m hingir ibumeor u lanen kwagh, m lu er inyamtoho nahan sha ishigh You." 
Psalms73:23 Nahan kpaa m ngu a We gbem, U kôrom sha uwegh agh ku yanegh." 
Psalms73:24 Ú hemen mo sha mhen Wou, ken masetyô yô, U ngohol mo, Ú za a mo ken icivir." 
Psalms73:25 Ka an m lu a mi Sha, saa We tseegh gaa? Man ma kwagh u a sarem sha tar ngu ga, saa We." 
Psalms73:26 Shin iyol yam kua ishima yam vea taver ga kpaa, Aôndo ngu agee a ishima yam man kwar wam gbem sha won." 
Psalms73:27 Gadia nenge, mba ve lu ica a We yô, vea saa ishe; Ú tim mba ve undu U cii sha idya i eren yô." 
Psalms73:28 Kpa mo yô, doom u mgbôghom a Aôndo; m gema Ter AÔNDO hingir mo ijiir yam i yeren ker, sha er me ôr kwagh u aeren a Ou cii yô. Ka ityesen i Asav" 
Psalms74:1 Aôndo, ka nyi U gbihi se kera gbeme? Man ka nyi U yugh tsum tsum a iyôngo You i U koro?" 
Psalms74:2 Umbur nongo Wou u U yam ica i gba je, u U paa Wer, u̱ hingir ior i dyako Wou, kua uwo u Shion u U tem sha u la." 
Psalms74:3 Kende angahar a Ou sha, sha u zan hen icôronce la; orihom vihi akaa a ken icighanjiir la kera ca ca." 
Psalms74:4 Mbaahendanev Ou ta kume ken atô u ijiir i mkohol Wou, ve tim tuta ve sha, hingir ikav." 
Psalms74:5 Ve mba er ior mba ve kende azembe a ve sha, sha ikon i shin ikô yô." 
Psalms74:6 Man akaa a na a gban a gba cii mba vihin a kera sha asôm man mbamsabe. 
Psalms74:7 Ve nande icighanjiir Wou sha usu; ve hôngor a ijiir i iti You i tem ker la, je ve yôhôl i ve haa inya." 
Psalms74:8 Ken asema a ve yô, ve lu kaan er: Sé tim nen ve kera purututu; ve nande ajiir a Aôndo a i kohol ker, ken tar la cii." 
Psalms74:9 Se nenge a akav a ase ga; profeti kpaa kera ngu ga; man ken a vese kpaa ma or fa er i shi ga. 
Psalms74:10 Aôndo, shi nan je man or u ahendanegh una de ilyahana, man orihom kpaa una de u zeren tuhwan iti You gbeme?" 
Psalms74:11 Ka nyi U hile a uwegh Ough ijime, uwegh Ough ku yanegha? Dugh ku ken vanger, tim ve kera!" 
Psalms74:12 Nahan kpaa Aôndo ka Tor wam hii ngise je, eren tom u myom sha tar." 
Psalms74:13 Ka We U pav zegemnger sha agee Ou ye; U hembe ityouv mbi udarakon shin mnger. 
Psalms74:14 U her ityouv mbi Leviatan, U na un a hingir kwaghyan u inyam i ken desereti." 
Psalms74:15 U pev imbor man ikuwan, mngerem due; U er uifi mba ve uman ga ve tôndo." 
Psalms74:16 Sev ka mbu Ou je, tugh kpaa ka mbu Ou; ka We je, U ver akaa a nan iwanger sha, kua iyange kpaa ye." 
Psalms74:17 Ka We U ver akighir a tar cii ye, inyom man fam kpaa, ka We U er ve ye." 
Psalms74:18 TERE, umbur er orihom a hee U, man er ior mba lanen kwagh ve toho iti You yô." 
Psalms74:19 De ne inyamtoho uma u atii Wou ga; uma u mbaatsanev Ou a̱ de hungul We zan zan ga. 
Psalms74:20 Wa ikuryan iko; gadia ajiir a imegh a tar mgbough a ajiir a teman a aperagh. 
Psalms74:21 De rumun Wer, mba i kighir ve la, ve̱ hile ken kunya ga; mbaatsanev man mbaibanave ve̱ wuese iti You." 
Psalms74:22 Mough sha, Aôndo ôr kwagh Wou iyou You; umbur iheen i orlanenkwagh nan shi heen We didi yô." 
Psalms74:23 Imo i mbaahendanev Ou i̱ de hungul We ga, ka ayôôso a mba ve mough num a We, a a kende sha gbem la. Ngun ka sha ci u orhemen u mbawanatsam; i ver un sha ikenge i: De timin ga. Ka Pasalmi u Asav. Ka icam" 
Psalms75:1 Se mba wuese We, Aôndo, se mba wuese, gadia iti You ngi ikua; ior mba ôron kwagh u akaa a Ou a kpilighyol." 
Psalms75:2 Shighe u M vande veren la á va kuma yô, Mo, Me ôr ijir sha mimi." 
Psalms75:3 Shin er tar kua mba ve lu sha u cii, vea kpegher kpaa, ka Mo M tim u mtôm ye. Sela." 
Psalms75:4 M kaa a mbaihaghev Mer: De nen ihagh; a mbaaferev kpaa Mer: De kenden nen korough sha ga. 
Psalms75:5 De kera kenden nen korough enegh sha ga; man shi de kera ôron nen kwagh sha ikôr i nômbon ga. 
Psalms75:6 Gadia ka sha ityoughkitaregh, shin shin ityôtar, shin ken desereti man mkende a dugh ga," 
Psalms75:7 kpa ka Aôndo A lu Orjir ye, ka A hile a orgen ijime, A kende a orgen sha." 
Psalms75:8 Gadia ken uwegh ku TER yô, iyongo ngi, man zar u wain u u lu shimi ngu oso hugh, i nungwa u dedoo, ka sha i je A toon ye; mimi je akase a na la yô, mbaaferev mba shin tar cii vea mase ndeer." 
Psalms75:9 Kpa mo yô, me zer yôôn gbem, me wa atsam a wuese Aôndo u Yakob." 
Psalms75:10 Akor a mbaaferev cii, me tôndo a kera; kpa akor a mbaperapera yô, á kende a sha. Ngun ka sha ci u orhemen u mbawanatsam; i kuhwan un sha mbaadiguve. Ka Pasalmi u Asav. Ka icam" 
Psalms76:1 Ken Yuda yô, i fa Aôndo; iti Na ka i icivirigh ken Iserael." 
Psalms76:2 I tim tenti Na ken Salem; man ijiir Na i teman yô, ngi ken Shion." 
Psalms76:3 Keregh la A sombo avaan a sha ada, man perutya kua sanker man ityav kpaa. Sela." 
Psalms76:4 U engem U doo tsung sha iwo i yan ishar sha mi la. 
Psalms76:5 I ngohol mbataverasema akaa cii, ve yav mnyam vem ma kuum; mô ve môm u ken mbataveryol kpaa zua a ave ve ga." 
Psalms76:6 Sha mzehe Wou, Aôndo u Yakob, ikyekyeutya kua nyinya ve hume cii." 
Psalms76:7 Ka We, U kom u á cia U ye; ka an je nana tile U sha ishi zum u U yuwen laa?" 
Psalms76:8 Ka Sha je, ijirôron You i dugh ye, tar cii, huan ving," 
Psalms76:9 zum u Aôndo mough sha u ôron ijir, sha u Una yima mbaasemaleghlegh shin tar cii la. Sela." 
Psalms76:10 Mimi je, iyugh i or ia wuese We; iyugh igen i i shi yô, ú zer shin iwenge." 
Psalms76:11 Tsegha nen zwa, yô, kure nen u a TER, Aôndo wen; mba ve kase Un cii, ve̱ va a iwua hen u A kom u á cia Un la;" 
Psalms76:12 u A gber iyolgengese i mbatarev kera, u A te utor mba tarev mciem iyol. Ngun ka sha ci u orhemen u mbawanatsam; ka sha ikenge i Yedutun. Ka Pasalmi u Asav" 
Psalms77:1 M genger imo m yila Aôndo, m vaa; m genger imo m yila Aôndo, Una ver ato her a mo." 
Psalms77:2 Sha iyange i ican tserem la, m ker Aôndo, m naregh uwegh tugh, m shil ku ga, ishima yam kpaa rumun er i̱ sur i ga." 
Psalms77:3 Zum u m umbur Aôndo yô, m toghor ken ishima, zum u m henen ken ishima yô, jijingi wam ure. Sela." 
Psalms77:4 U kôrom akurashee sha er a̱ lu ivegher yô; ishima nyian mo je, m kera fatyô u ôron kwagh ga." 
Psalms77:5 M hen kwagh u ayange a ngise la, kwagh u anyom a tsuaa la." 
Psalms77:6 M umbur icam yam i utu la, m hen ken ishima yam, man jijingi wam time kwagh tsung kpaa:" 
Psalms77:7 Ter Una gbihi kera gbeme? Una kera shi er erdoo Na ga? 
Psalms77:8 Erdoo Na bee kera purututu jee? Ityendezwa Na kpaa bunde kera gbem sha wono? 
Psalms77:9 Shin hungul Aôndo u zungwen mhôônom ase? Sha iyugh Na la, A cir mhôônom Nam ma kôrono? Sela." 
Psalms77:10 Tsô m kaa mer: Ka kwagh u nzughul mo ne, er uwegh ku yanegh ku Uhembansha ku gem kposo yô." 
Psalms77:11 Me ter aeren a TER; een, me umbur akaakpilighyol a Ou a sha ayange a tsuaa la." 
Psalms77:12 Me hen kwagh kpaa sha tom Wou cii; me hen kwagh ken ishima sha aeren a Ou. 
Psalms77:13 Aôndo, gbenda Wou ngu ken icighanjiir; ka an je, nan lu Aôndo u vesen er Aôndo nahana?" 
Psalms77:14 Ka We, U lu Aôndo u U eren akaa a kpilighyol ye; U pase ior agee a Ou, ve fa." 
Psalms77:15 Ka sha uwegh ku ageegh U paa ior Ou ye, ka ônov mba Yakob man mba Yosev je la. Sela." 
Psalms77:16 Aôndo, mngerem nenge a We, mngerem nenge a We, yô, ma cia, aiv kpaa gbidye akarkase iyol." 
Psalms77:17 Abeen a sha, ndoor ura, kwavaôndo dura, avaan a Ou kpaa tsenda." 
Psalms77:18 Imo i mdor Wou lu ken hiar, inyiar kpishi wanger tar, tar tenger, er ngigh ngigh." 
Psalms77:19 Gbenda Wou lu shin zegemnger, igbenda You lu shin uzegembamngerev kpaa, angahar a Ou kpaa, i kera nenge a min ga." 
Psalms77:20 U hemen ior Ou er ikumuile nahan, sha ikev i Mose man Aron. Ka ityesen i Asav" 
Psalms78:1 Ne ior av, ver nen ato sha ityesen yam, kegh nen ato sha akaaôron a ken zwa wam ne." 
Psalms78:2 Me bugh zwa wam me ôr injakwagh, me ôr ukikya mba tsuaa la," 
Psalms78:3 akaa a se ongo man se fe kpaa, uter asev kpaa lu kaa se." 
Psalms78:4 Sé yer ônov vev a ga, sé ôr kov u u ve la kwagh u iwuese i TER kua agee a Na cii, man ityom Na i kpilighyol i A er yô." 
Psalms78:5 Gadia A ver shiada ken Yakob, A wa tindi ken Yakob, u A ne uter asev, sha er ve̱ tese ônov vev, ve̱ fa yô;" 
Psalms78:6 sha er kov u u ve la ua fa yô, ka ônov mba á va mar je la, ve di kpaa vea gema á ôr ônov vev;" 
Psalms78:7 sha er ve̱ ver asema a ve sha Aôndo, ve̱ de hungul ityom i Aôndo ga, kpa ve̱ waan atindi a Na iko," 
Psalms78:8 ve̱ de kera luun er uter vev ga, kov u taver ityough u henda kwagh, kov u tilen a ishima i u vough ga, u ishima i u i lu jighilii a Aôndo ga la." 
Psalms78:9 Ônov mba Eferaim, mba ve lu a mbaada kua avaan ve gema ijime sha iyange utya." 
Psalms78:10 Ve wa iko sha ikuryan i Aôndo ga, ve lumun u zenden sha atindi a Na kpaa ga," 
Psalms78:11 ve hungul aeren a Na, man akaa a Na a kpilighyol a A tese ve a yô." 
Psalms78:12 A er akaacieryol sha ashe a uter vev, ken tar u Igipiti ken toho u Soan." 
Psalms78:13 A pav zegemnger, A per a ve, A er mngerem ma tile er tihi nahan." 
Psalms78:14 Tetan A hemen ve sha ibeen, tugh cii yô, i gema i lu sha iwanger i usu." 
Psalms78:15 A pav avande ken desereti, A na ve mngerem, ve ma wuee er ka shin iv yô." 
Psalms78:16 A er mngerem due ken vande kuwa, A er mngerem kuwa er ka uifi nahan." 
Psalms78:17 Nahan kpaa ve zer eren Un asorabo, ve lu hendan a Uhembansha ken tar u iombor." 
Psalms78:18 Ve mee Aôndo ken asema a ve sha u pinen kwaghyan sha mtôm ve la. 
Psalms78:19 Een, ve ôr kwagh a Aôndo sha mhendan, ve kaa er: Aôndo Una fatyô u yôron se iwer ken desereti kpa?" 
Psalms78:20 Nenge, A gbidye vande, tsô mngerem due kpishi, uikuwan sar avenge; Una shi á fatyô u nan ruam kpaa? Una na ior Nav inyama?" 
Psalms78:21 Ka nahan man TER ungwa, ishima nyoon Un ye; i keer usu u ver tswam a Yakob, iyugh kpaa ta sha Iserael;" 
Psalms78:22 gadia ve na Aôndo jighjigh ga, man shi ve suur sha iwasen Na kpaa ga." 
Psalms78:23 Nahan kpaa A wa ikwavaôndo kwagh Sha, A bugh ihinda i Usha," 
Psalms78:24 A haa ve mana, er ura ka ua nôôn nahan, sha u ve̱ ya yô, A na ve iyiagh ki Shaagh." 
Psalms78:25 Hanma or nan ya ruam u mbaageev; A tindi ve a kwaghyan kuma ve je. 
Psalms78:26 A er ahumbe a sha ityoughkitaregh hura Sha; ka sha agee a Na A tese ahumbe a ken imbusutariyan gbenda u zan ye; 
Psalms78:27 A haa ve inyam er vuulevu yô, man inyon i akperegh er waarawa u uzegembamngerev nahan;" 
Psalms78:28 A er i i gba haan her atô u afo ve, kase ajiir a ve a teman la." 
Psalms78:29 Tsô ve ya kuma ve gbing gbing; A na ve sha isharen ve la. 
Psalms78:30 Isharen ve la lu a bee ga, er ve lu a kwaghyan zwa la je," 
Psalms78:31 tsô iyugh i Aôndo mough sha a ve, A wua mba ve hemba taver iyol la, A haa ikaior i Mbaiserael inya." 
Psalms78:32 Nahan kpaa ve seer a seer isholibo; jighjigh tsô, kpaa, ve na sha akaa a Na a kpilighyol la ga." 
Psalms78:33 Nahan A er ayange a ve saa kera er humbe nahan, anyom a ve kpaa saa kera sha mcie." 
Psalms78:34 Er A wua ve yô, zum la ve pine Un, ve gema ishima ve ker Aôndo." 
Psalms78:35 Tsô ve umbur er Aôndo A lu vande ve, man Aôndo Uhembansha A lu Orpaan ve je yô." 
Psalms78:36 Kpa ve bume Un sha zwa, ve tsugh Un sha nombor ve." 
Psalms78:37 Gadia ishima ve var ken a Na ga, ve lu veren asema sha ikuryan Na kpaa ga." 
Psalms78:38 Kpa Un yô, er mhôônom kôr Un yô, A de ve ifer ve, A tim ve ga; een, acin imôngo je A de ishima Na i vihin, A kera kpoghol iyugh Na cii ga." 
Psalms78:39 A umbur er ve lu ior tsô, ahumbe a karen kera, hilen ga." 
Psalms78:40 Kpash! Ve hendan a Na ken desereti, acin imôngo je, ve vihi Un ishima ken toho;" 
Psalms78:41 ve shi ve mee Aôndo, ve bam Icighan u Iserael." 
Psalms78:42 Ve umbur agee Na ga, shin iyange i A paa ve sha ikev i orahendanegh la kpaa ga," 
Psalms78:43 zum u A er uivande Nav ken Igipiti, man akaa a Na a kpilighyol ken toho u Soan la," 
Psalms78:44 man er A gema uifi vev hingir awambe, kua iwagh ve kpaa, je ve kera fatyô u man ga la." 
Psalms78:45 A tindi ikpila i akughô her a ve a a ya ve, kua asôhô kpaa, a a tim ve." 
Psalms78:46 A na iyiav vev, igyer ya; tom ve u ican kpaa, ikomon ya." 
Psalms78:47 A vihi ve ikon i wain sha awombo, kua ikon i tur vev kpaa sha avure a a korough sha wuhe." 
Psalms78:48 A na awombo wua uzendenya vev; man ilev vev kpaa, inyiar gba sha mi." 
Psalms78:49 A haa ve iyugh Na i vihin, ishima i nyoon man ishima i vihin i cieryol, ka ikum i mbatyomov mba bov je la." 
Psalms78:50 A bugh iyugh Na gbenda; A kera tsegha uma ve ken ku ga, kpa A gbihi uma ve ken bouange." 
Psalms78:51 A wua hanma waniunda ken Igipiti, ka mhii u agee a ve, ken tenti u Ham je la." 
Psalms78:52 A due a ior Nav er ka iyôngo nahan, A hemen ve ken desereti er ikumuile nahan." 
Psalms78:53 A hemen ve gbenda doo doo, er vea kera cia ga yô; kpa zegemnger uve a mbaihomov vev." 
Psalms78:54 A va a ve hen tar u icighanjiir Na a lu her la, hen uwo u uwegh Nagh ku yanegh ngohol la." 
Psalms78:55 A zenda akuraior sha ishigh vegh kera kpaa, A kar ve dyako sha a; A er ikwe i Iserael tema ken utenti vev." 
Psalms78:56 Nahan kpaa ve mee Aôndo ve hendan a Na, Un Uhembansha la; ve kera wa mbampase Nav iko ga," 
Psalms78:57 kpa ve hide ijime, ve er sha icugh, er uter vev nahan, ve hure er ada u bo nahan." 
Psalms78:58 Gadia ve bam Un sha ajiir a ve a taven sha la; ve kpoghol iwuhe Na sha ieev vev mbi gban la. 
Psalms78:59 Zum u Aôndo ungwa nahan, ishima vihi Un tsung, maa A ta Iserael kera eleghee je;" 
Psalms78:60 A undu tabernakel u ken Shilo, tenti u A tim hen atô u ior la." 
Psalms78:61 A na agee a Na ken uikangen, man iengem Na kpaa ken ikev i or u ahendanegh." 
Psalms78:62 A na ior Nav sha ikev i sanker; ishima vihi Un tsung a dyako Na. 
Psalms78:63 Usu hia ikaior ve; mbayev vev mba kasev kpaa i kera wa ve icam i sha kwaseeren ga. 
Psalms78:64 I wua upristi vev sha sanker; kasev mba côgholov vev kpaa, vaa ku ga." 
Psalms78:65 Tsô Ter nder er ka or u nan nder mnya nahan, man er orageegh u msôrom ma ker nan nan genger imo yô." 
Psalms78:66 A gbidye mbaahendanev Nav, A hide a ve ijime, A er, i hee ve gbem." 
Psalms78:67 A venda tenti u Yosev, A tsuwa kwe u Eferaim ga," 
Psalms78:68 kpa A tsuwa kwa u Yuda, uwo u Shion u u doo Un ishima la." 
Psalms78:69 A maa icighanjiir Na er Sha u a gbe ca la nahan, man er tar u A ver u u lu gbem nahan." 
Psalms78:70 A tsuwa Davidi, wanakiriki Na, A tôô un ken akumauile;" 
Psalms78:71 A tôô un henpe lu kuran ungômbaiyôngov mba lun a ônov, A va a na, er a̱ va koso nongo Na Yakob kua dyako Na Iserael." 
Psalms78:72 Nahan a koso ve di sha inja i mimi u ken ishima na je, a hemen ve sha kwaghfan u sha ave na la. Ka Pasalmi u Asav" 
Psalms79:1 Aôndo, atôatyev nyôr ken dyako Wou, ve hôngor a icighantempel Wou, ve gema Yerusalem hingir alôgh." 
Psalms79:2 Ve gema akom a mbayev Ou hingir kwaghyan u inyon i sha kwavaôndo; man inyam i mba i doo U a ve la kpaa ve na inyamtoho. 
Psalms79:3 Ve haa awambe a ve er mngerem nahan, kase Yerusalem; ma or u iin ve kpaa lu ga." 
Psalms79:4 Se hingir kwagh u aheenegh hen mba ve we ndor a vese, man kwagh u nahan tar man u ahan hen mba ve kase se yô." 
Psalms79:5 Shi nan je, TERE, man Ú de u yuwen gbeme, man iwuhe You ia de u yeghen er usu nahan?" 
Psalms79:6 Haa iyugh You sha atôatyev a a fe U ga yô, man sha ityartor i i yer sha iti You kpaa ga yô." 
Psalms79:7 Gadia ve ya Yakob, ve vihi ijiir na i teman kera." 
Psalms79:8 De ne se ibo sha aferakaa a uter asev ga; mhôônom Ou ma kôron, ma va hen a vese fefa, gadia se mba seelee." 
Psalms79:9 Wase se, Aôndo u myem wase, sha ci u icivir i iti You; yima se, ese se asorabo ase kera sha ci u iti You." 
Psalms79:10 Ka nyi man atôatyev aa pine er: Aôndo ve yô, ngu han ase? Iyevoron i sha awambe a mbayev Ou a i hee la, i̱ hingir kwagh u atôatyev a̱ fa, sha ashe ase je." 
Psalms79:11 Ishimashirin i orkwar kpaa, i̱ ar sha ishigh You; mba i we ve ken ku la ve̱ war sha mvese u agee a Ou." 
Psalms79:12 Tere, iheen i mba ve we ndor a vese, ve hee U a mi yô, hile ve a mi ken ikum ve zan zan kwa taankaruhar." 
Psalms79:13 Nahan yô, se ior Ou man iyôngo You i U kor, sé wuese We gbem sha won, man sé pase iwuese You sha ikov ikov. Ngun ka sha ci u orhemen u mbawanatsam; i ver un sha ikenge i: Ulôhô mba sha Mpase. Ka Pasalmi u Asav" 
Psalms80:1 We, Orkuran u Iserael, ver ato, We u U hemen Yosev er ikumuile nahan; We u U tem sha ucerubi, mondo er iwanger nahan." 
Psalms80:2 Kpoghol agee Ou sha ishigh ki Eferaim man Benyamin kua Manase; va, va yima se." 
Psalms80:3 Aôndo, hide a vese; er, ishigh You ki̱ wanger, se̱ war." 
Psalms80:4 TERE, Aôndo u akum a Sha, shi nan je man ishima ia de vihin We a msen u ior Ouwe?" 
Psalms80:5 U koso ve sha ruam u mlia, U na ve mliam, ve ma kpishi." 
Psalms80:6 U gema se se hingir kwagh u akpelanegh hen mba ve we ndor a vese; mbaihomov asev kpaa mba sen. 
Psalms80:7 Aôndo u akum a Sha hide a vese; er, ishigh You ki̱ wanger, se̱ war." 
Psalms80:8 U due a kon u wain ken Igipiti, U va a mi, U zenda akuraior kera, U gema U môôr u," 
Psalms80:9 U sôr u ijiir; u ta amise gbang gbang, u iv tar la;" 
Psalms80:10 u gba uwo mure, kua usedar mba Aôndo kpaa, sha agbaa a u;" 
Psalms80:11 u ta agbaa a u zan zan ar shin kpe u zegemnger, azengel a u kpaa ar shin Ifi je." 
Psalms80:12 Ka nyi man U yôhôl igyar i u je, mba ve karen hen gbenda la cii, ve zer u nahana?" 
Psalms80:13 Swam u shin gbor ngu va vihin u, inyam i ken toho kpaa ngi yan u." 
Psalms80:14 Aôndo u akum a Sha, shi hide, shir ashe shin, nenge, wa kon u wain ne iko," 
Psalms80:15 kwagh u uwegh Ough ku yanegh ku môôr ne, man wan u U koso un sha ci Wou iyol You la." 
Psalms80:16 I nande u sha usu, i gber u; mba saan ishe sha myugh u ishigh You." 
Psalms80:17 Uwegh Ough ku̱ cir or u a lu U or u sha uwegh ku yanegh la, ka wan u or u U koso un sha ci Wou iyol You je la." 
Psalms80:18 Nahan yô, sé kera gema ijime sé undu U ga; na se se̱ lu uma, nahan sé yila sha iti You." 
Psalms80:19 TERE, Aôndo u akum a Sha hide a vese; er, ishigh You ki̱ wanger, se̱ war. Ngun ka sha ci u orhemen u mbawanatsam; i ver un sha ikenge i Gititi. Ka Pasalmi u Davidi" 
Psalms81:1 Wa icam genger genger, wuese nen Aôndo u A lu agee ase yô; ger, ember nen Aôndo u Yakob." 
Psalms81:2 Wa nen icam, va nen a genga heen, man molo u doon imo, man adiguve u vesen kpaa." 
Psalms81:3 Tôngo nen korough sha iyange i uwer u he u u dugh yô, man sha iyange i u hingir jimin, ka iyange i iniongo yase je la." 
Psalms81:4 Gadia ngun ka kwaghwan hen Mbaiserael je ne, ka iniezwa i Aôndo u Yakob je la." 
Psalms81:5 A ver, i hingir mpase ken Yosev, zum u A due u tan num sha Igipiti, henpe m ungwa zwa u m lu a vande fan u ga yô." 
Psalms81:6 M tôô un ikav sha vande sha, a pase ave na sha ikese kera." 
Psalms81:7 U yila ken ican, man M va war u; M rumun we hen ijiir i ken myer i idyuran; M kar u hen mngerem ma Meriba. Sela." 
Psalms81:8 Ungwa nen ase, ne ior Av, Mo Me pase ne, we Iserael, a lu u pe ma u ver ato her a Mo yô." 
Psalms81:9 Ma aôndo ugen kposo a̱ de kera luun her a we ga; man shi de gur sha u civir aôndo ugen kpaa ga. 
Psalms81:10 Ka Mo TER M lu Aôndo wou ye, u M dugh a we ken tar u Igipiti yô; gbanger zwa wou, Mo Me iv u." 
Psalms81:11 Kpa ior Av ver ato sha imo Yam ga, Iserael rumun Mo ga." 
Psalms81:12 Ka nahan man M gbihi ve sha ihembeato i sha asema ve la, Mer, ve̱ er sha mbamhen vev ayol a ve ye." 
Psalms81:13 Kpash! Ior Av ma ve ver ato hen a Mo, Iserael kpaa ma a zende sha igbenda Yam!" 
Psalms81:14 Nahan yô, ma M hembe mbaihomov vev fefa je, ma M gem uwegh Agh ma ku hendan a mbaahendanev vev." 
Psalms81:15 Mbaihomov mba TER kpaa ma ve ve hen a Na agurenu, ican i i er ve la, ma i tser gbem sha won." 
Psalms81:16 Ma M koso ve sha iyiagh ki hemban doon, ma M ne u zar u iyoughough u ken vande je ma u kom u. Ka Pasalmi u Asav" 
Psalms82:1 Aôndo ngu tilen ken mkohol u Aôndo; ngu ôron ijir hen atô u mbaaôndo. 
Psalms82:2 Shi nan je man né de u ôron ijir sha mimi ga, man né de u tan ken mbaafereve? Sela." 
Psalms82:3 Ôr nen ijir i mbagbanjime man ancôgholov; ôr nen ijir sha mimi a mba ikaa i tser ve kua mbaibanave kpaa. 
Psalms82:4 Yima nen mbagbanjime kua mbaatsanev, dugh nen ve sha ikev i iferor kera." 
Psalms82:5 Ve fa kwagh ga, mkav tsô kpaa, ve kav ga, mba zenden wue wue ken ime je; amagh a tar cii tenger." 
Psalms82:6 M kaa je Mer: Ne mba mbaaôndo; ne cii, ne mba ônov mba Uhembansha;" 
Psalms82:7 nahan kpaa né kpe er ior mbagenev yô, né gba er u môm ken mbatarev nahan." 
Psalms82:8 Aôndo, mough sha, ôr tar ijir; akuraior cii, nga sha ikev You. Ka icam. Ka Pasalmi u Asav" 
Psalms83:1 Aôndo, de luun ving ga; de huan ga, Aôndo, de memen ga;" 
Psalms83:2 gadia, nenge, mbaihomov Ou mough ayôôso, mba ve ker U ihom kpaa, ve kende iyol sha;" 
Psalms83:3 mba henen kwagh u bo sha u hendan a ior Ou, mba henen imôngo sha kwagh u vea er mba U yer ve kera la." 
Psalms83:4 Ve kaa er: Va, sé za tim nen ve, ve̱ de kera luun ikurior ga; sha er i̱ kera umbur iti i Iserael sha won ga yô." 
Psalms83:5 Gadia ve hen imôngo a ishima i môm, ve zua zwa sha u hendan a We:" 
Psalms83:6 utenti mba Edom man Mbaishemael, Moabi man Mbahager," 
Psalms83:7 Gebal man Amon man Amaleki, Filitia a mba ve lu ken Tiru imôngo kpaa;" 
Psalms83:8 Ashiria kpaa nyôr nongo a ve, ve wase ônov mba Loti. Sela." 
Psalms83:9 Er a ve di er yan U er a Mbamidian man a Shisera man Yabin hen ifi u Kishon nahan," 
Psalms83:10 mba ve tim ken Endor, ve hingir er ihôghonov mbi sôron sule a min la nahan." 
Psalms83:11 Gema ashagbaior a ve a̱ hingir er Orebi man Seebe nahan; een mbatarev vev cii ve̱ hingir, er Seba man Salmuna nahan," 
Psalms83:12 mba ve kaa er: Sé ngohol ajiir a teman a Aôndo, a̱ hingir a ase." 
Psalms83:13 Aôndo wam, gema ve, ve̱ hingir er ihundu i hiar nahan, man er imough i ahumbe a purugh a i yô." 
Psalms83:14 Er usu u hie ikô yô, man er nomborusu u u ne iwo i yeghen yô," 
Psalms83:15 tôv ve a ican ityô nahan, sha ahumbe a taver, ta ve mciem iyol sha uraahumbe Wou." 
Psalms83:16 Iv ishiv vev a kunya, sha u ve̱ ker iti You yô, TERE." 
Psalms83:17 Kunya u̱ kôr ve, i̱ kunda ve iyol gbem, i̱ nzughul a ve je, ve̱ tim kera," 
Psalms83:18 sha er ve̱ fa er We, u i yer iti You er TER la, i lu We tseegh U lu Uhembansha sha tar cii yô. Ngun ka sha ci u orhemen u mbawanatsam; i ver un sha Gititi. Ka Pasalmi u ônov mba Kora" 
Psalms84:1 Ijiir You i teman doo je, gande, We TER u akum a Sha." 
Psalms84:2 Ityembe i sha ishigh ki iyou i TER sarem ken ishima je, iyol i kpem cii; ishima yam man iyol yam ngi ember Aôndo u uma genger genger." 
Psalms84:3 Een, atsator zua a ijiir na i tsan, man gbargbar kpaa wa iya na, i una tsev ônov sha mi yô: ka hen atse a Ou a nanden nagh sha mi, TER u akum a Sha, Tor wam man Aôndo wam kpaa." 
Psalms84:4 Saan mba ve tem ken iyou You iyol, mba wuese We gbem. Sela." 
Psalms84:5 Saan or u agee a nan a lu ken a We la iyol, u uigbudu mba zan sha Shion ve lu nan ken ishima yô." 
Psalms84:6 Zum u vea karen hen pev u ombor yô, ve gema a mi hingir ijiir i imbormnger i saar her; mngerem ma urahe ma iv un a iveren." 
Psalms84:7 Er ve zan yô, ve seer taver a taver agee; hanmô ve nana va ar sha ishigh ki Aôndo ken Shion." 
Psalms84:8 TERE, Aôndo u akum a Sha, ungwa msen wama! Aôndo u Yakob, shi ver ato. Sela." 
Psalms84:9 Aôndo, perutya wase, shi nenge; nenge ishigh ki un u U shigh un mkurem la." 
Psalms84:10 Gadia sev môm sha ityembe i sha ishigh ki iyou You yô, hemba dubu; hemba doon mo u ma m lu orkuranhunda ken iyou i Aôndo wam a u ma m lu ken utenti mba ifer la." 
Psalms84:11 Gadia TER Aôndo ka iyange man perutya kpaa; TER Una na mrumun u sha mhôôn man icivir; Una nyume mbazan jighilii la ma kwagh u dedoo ga. 
Psalms84:12 TER u akum a Sha, or u nan suur sha a We yô, saan nan iyol. Ngun ka sha ci u orhemen u mbawanatsam. Ka Pasalmi u ônov mba Kora" 
Psalms85:1 TERE, doo U a tar Wou, U hide Yakob a mkpeyol na la." 
Psalms85:2 U de ior Ou ifer ve, U cir isholibo ve cii kpaa. Sela." 
Psalms85:3 U hile a iyugh You kera cii, U gema U de mvihi u ishimavihin You la." 
Psalms85:4 Aôndo u myom wase, hide a vese; de ishimanyoon You a vese la." 
Psalms85:5 Ú zer yuwen se gbeme? Ú zaan hemen a ishimanyoon You la zan zan sha ikov ikov jee? 
Psalms85:6 Ú shi Ú na se uma er ior Ou ve̱ ember ken We gaa? 
Psalms85:7 Tese se erdoo Wou, TERE, na se myom Wou." 
Psalms85:8 Me ungwa kwagh u Aôndo TER Una kaa yô, gadia ôron Na kwagh u bem a ior Nav, man a ior mba i doo Un a ve la; kpa ve̱ de kera shi hilen ken ibume ga." 
Psalms85:9 Mimi je, myom Na ngu ikua ikua a mbacian Un, sha er iengem ma i lu ken tar wase yô." 
Psalms85:10 Erdoo man mimi ve zua ve, perapera man bem suse zwa ayol a ve," 
Psalms85:11 mimi ngu duen shin inya, perapera tema sha kwavaôndo shir ashe shin." 
Psalms85:12 TER Una na kwagh u a lu u dedoo, man tar wase ua doo iyiagh ye;" 
Psalms85:13 perapera una zaan Un sha hemen, una sôron angahar a Na gbenda. Ka msen u Davidi" 
Psalms86:1 TERE, shir ato Ou, ungwa imo yam, gadia m ngu icanor man oribanave." 
Psalms86:2 Kura uma wam, gadia m ngu or u cian Aôndo je; We Aôndo wam, yima wanakiriki Wou u a suur sha a We yô." 
Psalms86:3 Tere, zungwem mhôônom, gadia m zeren yilan We iyange jimin cii." 
Psalms86:4 Na, i̱ saan wanakiriki Wou iyol; gadia Tere, ka sha a We m veren ishima yam ye." 
Psalms86:5 Gadia We, Tere, U doo, U kegh iyol u den kwaghbo, erdoo Wou ngee a mba ve yer sha iti You cii." 
Psalms86:6 TERE, ver ato sha msen wam, ungwa imo i uzamber av." 
Psalms86:7 Sha iyange i ican i tserem yô, me yila U, gadia Ú ungwam." 
Psalms86:8 Tere, ma Aôndo u lun er We nahan kera ngu ga, ma ityom i i kom sha i You kpaa ngi ga." 
Psalms86:9 Tere, akuraior a U er cii, aa va, aa va gure U inya, aa civir iti You kpaa." 
Psalms86:10 Gadia U hemba, U eren akaa a kpilighyol; ka We tseegh U lu Aôndo ye." 
Psalms86:11 TERE, tesem gbenda Wou, sha u me zende ken mimi Wou; sôr ishima yam i̱ hingir i môm sha u cian iti You." 
Psalms86:12 Tere, Aôndo wam, me wuese We a ishima yam cii; man shi me civir iti You gbem kpaa;" 
Psalms86:13 gadia erdoo Wou vese hen a mo, U dugh uma wam shin atô u Sheol je." 
Psalms86:14 Aôndo, mbaihaghev mough num a mo, ikum i mbaaperav ngi keren mo a ku, ve ver U sha ishigh vegh ga." 
Psalms86:15 Kpa We yô, Tere, U ngu Aôndo u mgboughon a mhôônom ma zungwen kua mrumun u sha mhôôn, u wan ishima man u lun a erdoo man mimi wuee je." 
Psalms86:16 Gema her a mo, zungwem mhôônom, na wanakiriki Wou agee Ou, yima wan u wanye Wou u kwase." 
Psalms86:17 Tesem ikav i sha kwagh u doon, sha er mba ve kerem ihom ve̱ nenge, ve̱ va ahenge; gadia We, TERE, U wasem, man U surum ishima kpaa yô. Ka Pasalmi u ônov mba Kora. Ka icam" 
Psalms87:1 Imagh nagh ki sha uicighanmbaiwoov; 
Psalms87:2 ihindagar i Shion hemba doon TER ishima a uya mba Yakob cii. 
Psalms87:3 Mba teren akaa a icivirigh sha a we, We, gar u Aôndo. Sela." 
Psalms87:4 Me ter Rahabi man Babilon Mer, ka mba ve fem je ne; nenge Filitia man Tiru kua Etiopia; ngun yô, ka keregh i mar un ye." 
Psalms87:5 Een, á ôr kwagh u Shion er: Via man via yô, ka keregh i mar ve ye; Uhembansha iyol Na kpaa Una taver un." 
Psalms87:6 Zum u TER Una nger akuraior yô, Una nger er: Ngun ka ker i mar un ye. Sela." 
Psalms87:7 Mbawanatsam man mbavinenamar cii vea kaa er: Amboramnger a am cii ka ken a We a lu ye. Ka icam. Ka Pasalmi u ônov mba Kora. Ka sha ci u orhemen u mbawanatsam; i ver un sha ikenge i Mahalati. Ka ityesen i Heman Oresera 
Psalms88:1 TERE, Aôndo u myom wam, tetan m yilan mer i̱ wasem, tugh kpaa m lu sha ishigh You." 
Psalms88:2 Msen wam a̱ nyôr her a We, ver ato, ungwa mliam am," 
Psalms88:3 gadia atsan ivim ken vanger, uma wam kpaa zulum a Sheol." 
Psalms88:4 Mba nengen mo er m ngu ken mba ve sen shin ihungwa la yô; m ngu er or u nan lu a iwasen ga yô; 
Psalms88:5 u i te kera hen mbakpenev, man er mba i woo ve, mba ve lu shin uwar, mba U kera umbur ve mayange ga yô, i pav ve a iwasen i sha ikev You kera." 
Psalms88:6 U gbirim shin ihungwa i zan kweng, ken ajiir a imegh, shin aiv." 
Psalms88:7 Iyugh You yuhwam kighir mo inya; u erem ican sha agôndoamnger Ou cii. Sela. 
Psalms88:8 U pavem a mba m fe ve la, U ver ve ca je, U erem m hingir ve kwagh u ndôhôrshima; i wuhem, m fetyô u duen ga." 
Psalms88:9 M hungwa ashe ikôl sha ican; hanma iyange m yer U TERE, m naregh ave her a We." 
Psalms88:10 Ú er tom u kpilighyol sha ci u mbakpenev kpa? Mba ve saa kera la vea shi á mough, á wuese Wee? Sela." 
Psalms88:11 Á pase erdoo Wou shin uwara? shin jighjigh Wou ken mtimi? 
Psalms88:12 Á fa akaa a Ou a kpilighyol ken ime? man perapera Wou kpaa ken tar u mhungulu? 
Psalms88:13 Kpa mo yô, m ngu yilan We TERE, pepe msen wam ka a va sha ishigh You." 
Psalms88:14 TERE, ka nyi U tem kera? Ka nyi U yerem ishigh Youwe?" 
Psalms88:15 Hii iyev je ican lu eren mo, m zulum a ku; er akaa a Ou a cier mo iyol yum yô, kundam iyol." 
Psalms88:16 Iyugh You i tsung la i haam sha ityou; akaa a Ou a cier iyol timim kera," 
Psalms88:17 a kasem er mngerem nahan iyange jimin cii, a yisam hanma ian cii." 
Psalms88:18 U paven a or u doon mo ishima man ijende yam, U ver ve ca je; mba m fe ve kpaa mba ken ime. Ka ityesen i Etan, Oresera" 
Psalms89:1 Me wa icam, me ter erdoo u TER gbem sha won; me ôr kwagh u jighjigh Wou u mimi sha zwa wam sha ikov ikov." 
Psalms89:2 Gadia m kaa mer: Á maa a maa erdoo zan zan gbem sha won; U ver jighjigh Wou u mimi sha Usha je. 
Psalms89:3 M ya ikur a u M tsough un la, M bum a wanakiriki Wam, Davidi Mer:" 
Psalms89:4 Me ver tsombor wou u̱ lu her gbem sha won; Me maa ikônough you ki torough zan zan sha ikov ikov cii. 
Psalms89:5 TERE, Usha mba wuese akaa a Ou a kpilighyol kua jighjigh Wou u mimi kpaa, ken mkohol u uicighanmbaiorov." 
Psalms89:6 Gadia ka an nan lu Sha je, u á kar nan a TERE? man ken mbaaôndo yô, ka an nan lu er TERE?" 
Psalms89:7 Ka Aôndo u i cie Un kpishi ken mkohol u uicighanmbaiorov, A cier iyol hen mba ve kase Un cii." 
Psalms89:8 TERE, Aôndo u akum a Sha, ka an nan lu a agee er We TERE, jighjigh Wou u mimi kpaa kase U." 
Psalms89:9 We U tema tor sha imanger i zegemnger, zum u agôndo a na ka a mough yô, U yange a, a de." 
Psalms89:10 We, U sombo Rahabi njighe njighe er or u i woo nan yô; U sambe mbaihomov Ou sha uwegh Ough ku ageegh." 
Psalms89:11 Usha ka mba Ou je, tar kpaa ka u Wou; tar u sha won cii man m-iv u u kpaa, ka We U er ve, ve lu ye." 
Psalms89:12 Imbusutarimese man i yan kpaa, ka We U gba a ye; Tabor man Hermon mba ember ken iti You." 
Psalms89:13 U ngu a uwegh ku ageegh, uwegh Ough ka ku taver je, U kende uwegh Ough ku yanegh, ku sha je." 
Psalms89:14 Perapera man ijirôron i mimi, ka ve ve lu imagh ki ikônough You ki torough ye; erdoo man mimi mba zan We sha ishi." 
Psalms89:15 Mba ve fe imo i iember ne yô, saan ve iyol, mba zenden ken iwanger i ishigh You, TERE." 
Psalms89:16 Ka ken iti You man ve shi ember didi ye, shi ka ken perapera Wou kpaa i kende ve sha ye." 
Psalms89:17 Gadia ka We U lu iengem i agee a ve ye; sha mdoo u i doo U a vese yô, á kende a korough asegh sha." 
Psalms89:18 Gadia perutya wase ka u TER je; tor wase kpaa ka Icighan u Iserael la. 
Psalms89:19 Iyange U ôr kwagh a or u i doo U a na la sha mpase u sha mnenge, U kaa Wer: M ver iwasen sha or u a lu a tahav, M kende a or sha, u i tsough un ken ior yô." 
Psalms89:20 M zua a wanakiriki Wam, Davidi, M shighe un icighanmkure Wam;" 
Psalms89:21 uwegh Agh kua lu a na gbem, ikasewe Yam kpaa ia taver un." 
Psalms89:22 Orihom á kighir un ga, wan u ifer kpaa una er un ican ga." 
Psalms89:23 M her mbaahendanev nav sha ishigh nagh; mba ve ker un ihom yô, Me wua ve." 
Psalms89:24 Jighjigh Wam man erdoo Wam vea lu a na; man shi ka ken iti Yam kpaa, á kende a korough nagh sha ye." 
Psalms89:25 Man shi Me penda uwegh nagh sha zegemnger, man uwegh nagh ku yanegh sha uifi." 
Psalms89:26 Una yilam er: Ka We, U lu Terem ye, Aôndo wam, man vande u myem wam." 
Psalms89:27 Mo Me gema un, una hingir waniunda, u hemban utor mbagenev mba sha won cii." 
Psalms89:28 Erdoo Wam una lu her sha ci na gbem sha won, ikuryan Yam a na kpaa ia lu her taveraa." 
Psalms89:29 Me er tsombor na ua lu gbem, ikônough nagh ki torough kpaa, kia lu er ayange a Sha yô." 
Psalms89:30 Aluer ônov nav vea undu tindi Wam, vea zaan sha iniezwa Yam ga yô," 
Psalms89:31 aluer vea vihin akaawan a Am, man vea waan atindi a Am iko kpaa ga yô," 
Psalms89:32 zum la Me va tsaha kwaghbo ve sha akpa, man iferkwagh ve sha ugbidi," 
Psalms89:33 kpa Me kar a erdoo Wam her a na kera ga, jighjigh Wam kpaa Me vihi un kera ga." 
Psalms89:34 Me bunde ikuryan Yam ga, kwagh u a dughum ken zwa kpaa una gema kposo ga." 
Psalms89:35 M bum a bum mtsegh Wam je, Me er Davidi aie ga;" 
Psalms89:36 Tsombor na ua lu gbem, ikônough nagh ki torough kpaa kia lu sha ishigh Yagh er ka iyange yô;" 
Psalms89:37 kia taver her gbem, er uwer nahan, orshiada u Sha ka u mimi je. Sela." 
Psalms89:38 Nahan kpaa U ta kera, U venda, U yuwe a or u U shigh un mkurem la;" 
Psalms89:39 U bunde ikuryan a wanakiriki Wou, U hôngor a idyer na i tor la, U gbihi hen inya;" 
Psalms89:40 U yôhôl uigyar nav cii, U hembe ayouautya na kpaa, hingir alôgh;" 
Psalms89:41 mbakaren hen gbenda cii mba vihin un akaa; a hingir kwagh u aheenegh hen mbawanndor a na. 
Psalms89:42 U kende a uwegh ku yanegh ku mbaahendanev nav sha, U er mbaihomov nav ca ca ve ember tsung je;" 
Psalms89:43 een, U er kur u sanker na hide ijime, U taver un wer a̱ tile dông ken utya ga;" 
Psalms89:44 U kar a iengem na kera, U gbihi ikônough nagh ki torough inya;" 
Psalms89:45 U nyura un ayange a iyev nav, U cir un kunya iyol. Sela;" 
Psalms89:46 Shi nan je, TERE, man Ú de u yeren gbeme, man iyugh You kpaa ia de u yeghen er usu nahana?" 
Psalms89:47 Umbur er ayange am a ndahar yô, man er U gbe ior ve lu gbilinkwagh tsô yô!" 
Psalms89:48 Ka an or je nan lu uma, man nana nenge ku ashe ga, nana yima uma u nan sha ikev i Sheolo? Sela." 
Psalms89:49 Tere, uerdoo Ou mba ngise la mba hana mba yan U bum a Davidi sha jighjigh Wou laa?" 
Psalms89:50 Tere, umbur mlaha u i laha mbayev Ou la, man er m tee mlaha u akuraior kpishi ken vanger wam yô," 
Psalms89:51 u mbaihomov Ou ve laha la, TERE, u ve laha angahar a u U shigh un mkurem la." 
Psalms89:52 I̱ wuese TER gbem sha won. Amen man shi Amen. Msen u Mose, or u Aôndo" 
Psalms90:1 TERE, ka We je, U lu ijiir yase i teman, sha ikov ikov ye." 
Psalms90:2 Er i lu a due a iwo ken igbar ga, man er U lu a gba inya man tar ga, hii sha uicôrombaashighev je zan zan gbem sha won, U ngu Aôndo." 
Psalms90:3 Ka U gema or, nan hingir vuulevu; U kaa wer: Hide nen ijime, ne ônov mba iorov!" 
Psalms90:4 Gadia anyom dubu her a We yô, nga er sev mbu nyenev mbu mbu kar la yô, man er mkorutu môm nahan." 
Psalms90:5 Ka U kar a ve kera er ka sha ikuwanmnger nahan; ve mba er mnyam nahan, pepe yô, ve mba er toho u u menden yô;" 
Psalms90:6 pepe yô, ka u mende doo doo, u vese, aikighe yô, i tôndo u kera, u use." 
Psalms90:7 Gadia se saa ishe sha ishima You i vihin, kondo se iyol sha iyugh You kpaa." 
Psalms90:8 U ver aferakaa ase sha ishigh You, asorabo ase a ken myer kpaa, U ver a ken iwanger i ishigh You." 
Psalms90:9 Gadia ayange ase cii nga karen been sha iyugh You, anyom ase nga karen been er ishimashirin nahan." 
Psalms90:10 Ayange a anyom a ase kuma anyom akunduatargber, man aluer ayol ase aa taver kpishi yô, a kuma akunduanyiin je; nahan kpaa ihagh i a yô, ka zayol man ishima i vihin, gadia nga a kar fefa, se kpaa se kar kera wase." 
Psalms90:11 Ka an nan fe agee a ishimanyoon Youwe? kua iyugh You i sha inja i mciem ma ma kom u á cia U laa? 
Psalms90:12 Tese se se̱ fa er i doo u ma se ôr ingeegh ki ayange ase sha u sé zua a ishima i fan kwagh yô. 
Psalms90:13 TERE, hide, shi nan je? mhôônom ma kôr U a mbayev Ou." 
Psalms90:14 Na erdoo Wou a̱ kuma se pepe, sha er sé ember, á saan se iyol sha ayange ase cii yô." 
Psalms90:15 Na, i̱ saan se iyol er sha ayange a U na se ican la nahan vough, man er anyom a kwaghbo a tser se la nahan." 
Psalms90:16 Tom Wou ma u dugh ken igbar hen mbayev Ou, man iengem You kpaa sha ônov vev." 
Psalms90:17 Mdoom ma TER Aôndo wase; ma lu a vese, taver tom u ave ase sha a vese, een, tom u ave ase la, taver u." 
Psalms91:1 Or u nan tem ken ijiir i yeren i Uhembansha yô, nana tsa ken mure u Uhembanagee cii." 
Psalms91:2 Me kaa a TER mer: U ngu ijiir yam i yeren man iyouutya yam, Aôndo wam u m suur sha a We ne." 
Psalms91:3 Gadia ka Wen, Una yima u sha kwar u orhônoninyon, sha bouange u timin la ye." 
Psalms91:4 Una cir u sha akper a Na, ka ken atô u akper a Na je, ú yer ye; mimi Na ka perutya man akuvautya." 
Psalms91:5 Ú kera cia mcieryol u utu mayange ga, shin ivaan i i keren i atetan la kpaa ga," 
Psalms91:6 shin bouange u a zenden ken ime kpaa ga, shin mtim u timin sha iyange sha tembe kpaa ga." 
Psalms91:7 Shin er ior dubu vea gba inya hen imbusu you, man ior dubu pue hen uwegh ough ku yanegh kpaa, we yô, una mgbôghom a we ga." 
Psalms91:8 Sha ashe ou ú nenge a nenge iyevoron i á or mbaaferev la. 
Psalms91:9 Gadia ka We, U lu ijiir yam i yeren ye, TERE. U gema Uhembansha hingir ijiir you i teman;" 
Psalms91:10 kwagh u bo una tser u ga, ma bokwagh u vihin una mgbôghom a tenti wou kpaa ga;" 
Psalms91:11 gadia Una wa mbatyomov Nav kwagh sha a we, er ve̱ kuran we sha igbenda you cii;" 
Psalms91:12 vea tôô u sha ave ve je, sha er u̱ de kem nguhar sha iwen ga yô." 
Psalms91:13 Ú ndyar begha kua igbinde kpaa; gumbegha kua iyô kpaa ú ndyar ve shin angahar. 
Psalms91:14 Er M doo un ishima tsung yô, ka nahan man Me war un ye; Me kende un sha, sha ci u a fe iti Yam yô." 
Psalms91:15 Zum u una yilam yô, Mo kpaa Me ungwa imo na; ken ican Mo Me lu a na, Me yima un, shi Me civir un kpaa." 
Psalms91:16 Me na un ayange a tsan sha won, je, á kuma un gbing gbing, Me pase un myom Wam kpaa. Ka Pasalmi. Ka icam i sha Lahadi" 
Psalms92:1 U sughun TER ka kwagh u dedoo, man u wan atsam a wuese iti You, We Uhembansha," 
Psalms92:2 u pasen erdoo Wou pepe, man jighjigh Wou kpaa hanma tugh," 
Psalms92:3 sha adiguve u vesen man u kiriki kpaa, sha imo i kôron sha molo." 
Psalms92:4 Gadia U erem saan mo iyol sha tom Wou, TERE; me ember sha ityom i ave Ou." 
Psalms92:5 Ityom You gba ikôr mimi, TERE! mbamhen Ou za kpishi." 
Psalms92:6 Orlanenkwagh fe ga, ibumeor kpaa nan kaven kwagh ne ga:" 
Psalms92:7 Zum u mbaaferev ka vea menden er toho nahan, man mbaerenafer kpaa á kpe ve iyol yô, i lu sha u á tim ve kera gbem tsô." 
Psalms92:8 Kpa We yô, TERE, U ngu sha, gbem sha won." 
Psalms92:9 Gadia nenge, mbaihomov Ou, TERE, nenge, mbaihomov Ou vea tim; mba ve eren aferakaa cii, á sambe ve kera." 
Psalms92:10 Kpa U kende a korough agh sha, er ka ku iyaregh yô; i haam mkurem ma hem iyol." 
Psalms92:11 Ashe am nenge awashima wam sha mbaihomov av, ato am kpaa ungwa kwagh u mbaerenakaabo, mba ve mough num a mo." 
Psalms92:12 Orperapera nana vese, nana hôm yaghelaa er kughugh nahan, nana vese er sedar u sha Lebanon yô." 
Psalms92:13 I môôr ve ken iyou i TER, á kpe ve iyol ken ityembe i sha ishigh ki iyou i Aôndo wase." 
Psalms92:14 Vea ume atam a iyol i been ve her; vea lu a zar kpishi, shi vea lu gese gese kpaa," 
Psalms92:15 sha u pasen er TER A lu u perapera yô; Un ka vande wam, kwagh u a lu perapera ga ngu ken a Na kpaa ga." 
Psalms93:1 TER tema tor, A haa icivir iyol; TER cir ikondo iyol, A wa agee iyol; tar taver dông, ua tenger ga." 
Psalms93:2 Ikônough You ki torough ki dông ngise je; U lu sha won gbem. 
Psalms93:3 Uifi kende, TERE, uifi kende ayôôso a ve, uifi kende ihuran ve!" 
Psalms93:4 Kar sha je, sha uihuranmbamngerev, sha agôndo a zegemnger, TER hemba agee sha." 
Psalms93:5 Mbampase Ou ka mba mimi je; iyou You kuma mtsegh, gbem, mayange kera bee ga, TERE." 
Psalms94:1 TERE, We Aôndo u iyevoron i lu i You, We, Aôndo, u iyevoron i lu i You yô, mondo iwanger." 
Psalms94:2 Mough sha, We, Orjir u taregh; na mbagengeseyol kwagh u a kom sha a ve yô." 
Psalms94:3 TERE, shi nan je man mbaaferev, shi nan je man mbaaferev vea de u embere?" 
Psalms94:4 Mba lamen, ôron kwagh sha imanger; mbaerenafer cii mba er kwagh sha ihagh." 
Psalms94:5 Mba heren ior Ou, TERE, mba kighir dyako Wou." 
Psalms94:6 Mba woo kwasecôghol man shiror, mba woo ancôgholov kpaa." 
Psalms94:7 Mba kaan er, TER nenge ga, Aôndo u Yakob kav ga." 
Psalms94:8 Ver nen ishima ne ior mbalanenkwagh; man ne abumeaior yô, ka hanma iyange je né fa kwagha?" 
Psalms94:9 Wen u A we togh yô, Una ungwa ga ha? Wen u A er ishe yô, Una nenge ga ha?" 
Psalms94:10 Wen u A tsahan akuraior yô, Una kera kôôm gaa— Wen u A tesen or mfe la ha?" 
Psalms94:11 TER fa mbamhen mba orov er i lu humbe tsô yô. 
Psalms94:12 Or u i saan nan iyol yô, ka or u u tsaha nan, TERE, shi U tese nan tindi Wou kpaa yô," 
Psalms94:13 sha er Ú na nan mmem sha ayange a mzeyol, zan zan á va time ihungwa sha ci u iferor yô." 
Psalms94:14 Gadia TER Una ta ior Nav kera ga, man Una undu dyako Na kpaa ga." 
Psalms94:15 Gadia ijirôron ia hide ken perapera; mba asema a ve a lu jighilii cii, vea za a i ityô." 
Psalms94:16 Ka an nana mough num a mbaerenakaabo sha ci wama? Ka an nana wasem nana mough num a mbaerenaferakaa? 
Psalms94:17 Ka er TER A lu orwasen wam yô, gayô, ica kpaa ma i gbe ga, tsô uma wam ma a lu ken ijiir i ving je." 
Psalms94:18 Zum u m hen mer, nguhar wam ngu dolough yô, erdoo Wou kôrom sha, TERE." 
Psalms94:19 Zum u mbamhen ve ngeem ken ishima yô, mbamsurshima Ou nam ishima i saan saan." 
Psalms94:20 Ikônough ki ijirigh ki ifer kia zua nongo a We he, un u a eren ifer a gem a suur sha tindi laa?" 
Psalms94:21 Ve zua sha u tan num sha uma u orperapera, ve na orishôôgh ibo." 
Psalms94:22 Kpa TER gema hingir gôgôyou wam, man Aôndo wam ka vande u m yer ker yô." 
Psalms94:23 Una hide a aferakaa a ve sha ityough vev, Una tim ve ken iferkwagh ve kera; TER, Aôndo wase, Una tim ve kera." 
Psalms95:1 Va, sé wa nen icam i wuese TER, sé ember, sé ter nen vande u myom wase." 
Psalms95:2 Sé va nen sha ishigh Nagh a ishughun, sé ember, sé ter nen Un sha atsam a wuese." 
Psalms95:3 Gadia TER ka Aôndo u vesen, ka Tor u vesen u hemban mbaaôndo mbagenev ca je." 
Psalms95:4 Ka sha ikev Na man ajiir a zan a shin tar a lu ye; ityouv mbi iwoov kpaa ka mbi Nav je. 
Psalms95:5 Zegemnger ka u Na, ka Un A gbe un ye; ka ave Na man lu er tareghnyaagh ye." 
Psalms95:6 Va, sé gure, sé civir, sé ngurum nen, sé gure nen inya sha ishigh ki TER u A gbe se la." 
Psalms95:7 Gadia Wen ka Aôndo wase je, man se se mba ior Nav mba A koson se yô, man ilev mbi sha ikev Na. Nyian yô, ma ne shi ongo imo Na!"

Psalms96:1 Wa TER icam i he, wa TER icam, we, tar cii!" 
Psalms96:2 Wa TER icam, wuese iti Na, pase kwagh u myom Na ayange ayange." 
Psalms96:3 Pase akuraior iengem Na, man akaa a Na a kpilighyol kpaa hen ior cii." 
Psalms96:4 Gadia TER hemba cii, A kuma iwuese kpishi je, A hemba cier iyol a mbaaôndo mbagenev cii." 
Psalms96:5 Gadia mbaaôndo mba iorov cii ka agbilinakaa tsô, kpa TER gba Usha." 
Psalms96:6 Icivir man iengem mba Un sha ishi, agee man mdooashe mba ken icighanjiir Na." 
Psalms96:7 Ne icombor i ior, na nen TER, na nen TER icivir man agee." 
Psalms96:8 Na nen TER icivir i i kom sha iti Na yô, va nen a nagh, va nyôr nen hen ityembe Na." 
Psalms96:9 Gure civir nen TER a uicighanmbaakondov iyol. Ikarikase i̱ gbidye u iyol sha ishigh Nagh, we tar sha won cii!"

Psalms97:3 Usu ngu zan Un sha hemen, ngu hian mbaahendanev Nav mba ve kase Un yô."

Psalms97:5 Iwo sough er tsur nahan sha ishigh ki TER, sha ishigh ki TER u tar cii."

Psalms98:4 Ember TER, we tar cii; ger, wa nen icam a iember, een, wa nen atsam a wuese."
