Psalms100:1 Ember TER, we tar cii." 
Psalms100:2 Civir nen TER a iember ken ishima, va nen sha ishigh Nagh a atsam a wan." 
Psalms100:3 Fa nen er TER A lu Aôndo yô; ka Un A er se ye, se mba u Nav je; se mba ior Nav je, man iyôngo Na i A koson yô." 
Psalms100:4 Nyôr nen hen ihinda Na a ishughun, man hen ityembe Na kpaa a iwuese. Sugh nen Un, wuese nen iti Na." 
Psalms100:5 Gadia TER doo, erdoo Na ngu gbem je, jighjigh Na kpaa ngu sha ikov ikov. Ka Pasalmi u Davidi" 
Psalms101:1 Me wa icam me ter erdoo kua ijirôron i mimi kpaa; me wa atsam a wuese We, TERE." 
Psalms101:2 Me ver ishima sha gbenda u u lu a acôghol a wan iyol ga yô. Ka hanma shighe je man Ú shi va hen a moo? Me zenden a ishima i lun a acôghol a wan iyol ga ken iyou yam. 
Psalms101:3 Me kera ver kwagh u dang sha ashe am mayange ga; m kôr aeren a mba ve kaha ve undu gbenda la ihom, aa var a mo ga." 
Psalms101:4 Boshima a̱ lu ca a mo; me fa iferkwagh ga. 
Psalms101:5 Or u nan eren anger ken myer sha orwanndor a nan yô, me tim nan kera; man or u nan manger man nan kehen ityough yô, me wa ishima a nan ga." 
Psalms101:6 Ashe am aa lu sha mbamimi mba shin tar, sha u vea lu a mo imôngo yô; or u nan zenden sha gbenda u lun a acôghol a wan iyol ga yô, ka nan je nana erem tom ye." 
Psalms101:7 Or u nan eren kwagh sha icugh yô, nana lu ken ya wam ga; man or u nan eren aie kpaa, nana kera tema sha ishigh yagh ga." 
Psalms101:8 Hanma sev me timin mbaaferev mba shin tar cii kera; ken gar u TER kpaa me gber mbaereniferkwagh la cii kera. Ka msen u or u ican i tser nan, zum u tar u hembe nan nan pase ican i nan cii sha ishigh ki TER yô" 
Psalms102:1 TERE, ungwa msen wam, mliam am ma ma nyer her a We." 
Psalms102:2 De yeren mo ishigh You sha iyange i mzeyol wam la ga; ver ato her a mo, sha iyange i me yila yô, rumun mo fese;" 
Psalms102:3 gadia ayange am nga saan kera er mnyim nahan, akuhe am hia er kwagh u usu u ker sha min yô;" 
Psalms102:4 i cagh ishima yam er toho nahan i use je; gadia kwaghyan kpaa hungul mo u yan. 
Psalms102:5 Sha mtoghor wam yum la, akuhe am var sha inyam yam," 
Psalms102:6 m hingir er akumedu u ken desereti nahan, man shi m hingir er ivungu i hen atse a iyoughough nahan." 
Psalms102:7 Ka m tsa per, m hingir er inyon i i tem sha tor tswen dang yô." 
Psalms102:8 Mbaihomov av ka ve shi heen mo iyange jimin cii; mba asema a vihi ve a mo tsung la, mba geman iti yam hingir kwagh u wan ifan a mi." 
Psalms102:9 Gadia m ya mtwem er ka ruam yô, m nungwa mliam sha kwaghman wam," 
Psalms102:10 sha ci u ishima i vihin You man iyugh You la, gadia U tôôm, U ta kera." 
Psalms102:11 Ayange am nga er mure u a gbe a ze ca yô; m use er toho nahan. 
Psalms102:12 Kpa We yô, TERE, U ngu gbem sha won, á umbur iti You sha ikov ikov." 
Psalms102:13 Ú mough, Ú zungwe Shion mhôônom; gadia shighe u zungwen un mhôônom kuma ve, shighe u i vande veren la kuma ve." 
Psalms102:14 Gadia doo mbayev Ou a awen a na, man mhôônom kôr ve a alôgh a ayou a na la." 
Psalms102:15 Nahan akuraior aa cia iti i TER, utor mba sha won cii kpaa, vea cia iengem You." 
Psalms102:16 Gadia TER maa Shion, A ande a iengem Na," 
Psalms102:17 A ungwa msen u mba ve lu a orjime ga yô, A laha msen ve je ga." 
Psalms102:18 Á nger kwagh ne sha ci u kov u ua va la, man ikurior i á va gba i la, ia wuese TER." 
Psalms102:19 Gadia A tema sha icighanjiir Na u sha, A shir ashe shin, TER tema Sha, gema nenge tar shin," 
Psalms102:20 sha u Una ungwa ishimashirin i orkwar, man sha u Una pase á tuhwa mba i we ve ken ku yô;" 
Psalms102:21 sha er ior ve̱ yôô iti i TER ken Shion yô, man iwuese Na ken Yerusalem," 
Psalms102:22 zum u ior cii kua akuraior, vea kohol ijiir i môm sha u civir TER la yô." 
Psalms102:23 A vihim agee sha gbenda, A nyuram a ayange kpaa." 
Psalms102:24 M kaa mer: Ku! Aôndo wam, de kera tôôn mo kera er m lu hen atô u ayange am ne ga; anyom a Ou nga sha ikov ikov." 
Psalms102:25 U tim imagh ki taregh hiihii je, Usha kpaa ka tom u sha ave Ou." 
Psalms102:26 Ve vea saa ishe, kpa We yô, Ú tsôr sha won, ve cii vea bee iyol er riga ka a bee nahan, man U musan ve er ka ikondo nahan, vea kar kera." 
Psalms102:27 Kpa We yô, Ú lu di her nahan; anyom a Ou kpaa nga a mkur ga." 
Psalms102:28 Ônov mba mbayev Ou kpaa vea lu her, man tsombor ve kpaa ua lu sha ishigh You gbem. Ka Pasalmi u Davidi" 
Psalms103:1 Wuese TER, we uma wam; kwagh u a lu ken mo cii kpaa, a̱ wuese icighanti Na." 
Psalms103:2 Wuese TER, we uma wam, ma kwagh môm ken aeren a Na a doon la cii, a̱ de hungul we ga;" 
Psalms103:3 u A de u aferakaa a ou cii, A bee u angev ou cii," 
Psalms103:4 A dugh uma wou ken mtim kera; A kange u tsar u erdoo man mhôônom ma kôron sha ityou," 
Psalms103:5 A iv uma wou a akaadedoo, je iyev ou hingir hegh er mbu iguve nahan." 
Psalms103:6 TER eren akaa a perapera, man shi er ijir i mimi sha ci u mba i kighir ve a ican yô." 
Psalms103:7 A pase Mose igbenda Na, man aeren a Na hen ônov mba Iserael." 
Psalms103:8 TER mgbough a mhôônom ma zungwen kua mrumun u sha mhôôn, we ishima, erdoo Na ngee wuee;" 
Psalms103:9 zehe gbem ga, ishima i nyoon Un gbem kpaa ga." 
Psalms103:10 A or se iyev sha asorabo ase ga, A na se injar i sha aferakaa ase la kpaa ga." 
Psalms103:11 Gadia er Sha a gbe ca a kar tar sha nahan, kape erdoo Na kpaa a kehe a mba ve cie Un la." 
Psalms103:12 Er ica i ityoughkitaregh a ityôtar nahan, kape ngu A pav akaabo ase a vese la;" 
Psalms103:13 er mhôônom ka ma kôr ter a ônov nahan, kape TER kpaa mhôônom ma ker Un a mba ve cie Un la." 
Psalms103:14 Gadia Un yô, A fa mlu wase, A umbur er se lu vuulevu je yô." 
Psalms103:15 Or yô, ayange a nan nga er toho yô; ka nan gbaa hômon er imondon u ken toho yô," 
Psalms103:16 zum u ahumbe a te sha mi la, a kar kera; ijiir na tsô kpaa i kera fa un ga." 
Psalms103:17 Kpa erdoo u TER yô, ngu sha mba ve cie Un hii sha uicôronmbaashighev zan zan gbem sha won; perapera Na kpaa ngu zan zan sha ônov mba ônov je," 
Psalms103:18 sha mba ve kor ikuryan Na, man mba ve umbur atindi Na, ve eren sha mi kpaa yô." 
Psalms103:19 TER ver ikônough Nagh ki torough dong sha Usha, tartor Na kpaa ngu sha won cii." 
Psalms103:20 Wuese nen TER, ne mbatyomov Nav, ne mbaageev, mba ne eren sha imo Na, er ne we imo i kwaghôron Na iko yô." 
Psalms103:21 Wuese nen TER, ne akum a Na a Sha cii, ne mbatomov Nav, mba ne eren sha ishima Na yô." 
Psalms103:22 Wuese nen TER, ne ityom Na cii, ken ajiir a A tem tor la cii. Wuese TER, we uma wam." 
Psalms104:1 Wuese TER, we uma wam! TERE, Aôndo wam, We, U hemba cii, U haa icivir man iengem iyol." 
Psalms104:2 A cir iwanger iyol er ka ikondo yô, A samber Usha er ka tenti nahan;" 
Psalms104:3 A tim imagh ki ukpombaayoughouv Nav Sha, sha mngerem ma kpishim; ka A gema abeen hingir ikyekye Na, A zenden sha akper a ahumbe;" 
Psalms104:4 A gema ahumbe a hingir mbatyomov Nav, man iniomborusu hingir mbatomov Nav." 
Psalms104:5 U tim tar sha amagh a u, sha er u̱ de tenger mayange ga yô." 
Psalms104:6 U cir u zegemnger er ka ikondo i cirin iyol yô, mngerem kar iwo sha cii;" 
Psalms104:7 ma ongo a ungwa myange Wou tsô, ma yevese, ma ongo a ungwa imo i idyuran You tsô, ma num ayem;" 
Psalms104:8 iwo due, apev gba hen ajiir a U vande sôron sha ci ve la." 
Psalms104:9 U ver ma ikighir Wer ma de peren ma hiden, ma va cirin tar ga." 
Psalms104:10 A er ambor a due shin apev, nga kough ken ihigha i iwoogh," 
Psalms104:11 ishôso i ken toho cii ngi me a, ujaki mba ken toho mba been imura ve." 
Psalms104:12 Ka hen a inyon i sha kpaa i tem, i gberen amo sha ahu ye." 
Psalms104:13 Ka A na iwo mngerem, ma due sha ukpombaayoughouv Nav mba Shaav; tar iv gbing sha atam a aeren a Ou la." 
Psalms104:14 A er toho u mende sha ci u uile, man imendenev sha ci u or nana eren tom a mbi, sha er nana zuan a kwaghyan shin inya yô," 
Psalms104:15 man zar u wain sha u nan or msaanyol, man mkurem sha u engem or ishigh, man ruam sha u taver or ishima yô." 
Psalms104:16 Ikon i TER zua a kwagh, kuma i, ka usedar mba sha Lebanon mba A môôr la," 
Psalms104:17 henpe inyon i we aya a i yô; ikon i fer ka ya u ipevnor. 
Psalms104:18 Ugôgômbaiwoov ka sha ci u ivotoho je; man avande ka ajiir a yeren a akuwa je. 
Psalms104:19 A ver uwer sha ci u ashighe; iyange kpaa fa shighe u i u milen. 
Psalms104:20 Ka U er ime i wa i hingir tugh, shighe u inyamtoho cii ka i due." 
Psalms104:21 Agumabegha ka a taan kume, a yaren ikôr, a keren kwaghyan hen Aôndo." 
Psalms104:22 Iyange ka ia duen yô, a ta ibalegh sha, a za yav ken ajiir a a." 
Psalms104:23 Or ka nan due, nan yar tom u nan, nan er u, zan zan iyange i kar been." 
Psalms104:24 Kpash! TERE, ityom You ngi atô kposo kposo, U er i cii sha kwaghfan, tar iv a akaa a U gbe la." 
Psalms104:25 Zegemnger ngula, a kehe shi a gbangese kpaa, inyarev mbi zenden ker, mbi ngee, gande u ôron je, ishôso i kiriki man i vesen." 
Psalms104:26 Ka keregh utso ve zenden ye, man Leviatan u U gbe un sha ci u a numbe shimi, ngu ker." 
Psalms104:27 Mban cii mba veren ashe sha a We, sha u ma U ne ve kwaghyan sha ashighe ashighe yô." 
Psalms104:28 Kwagh u U ne ve ka ve kura un je; ka U bugh uwegh Ough, nahan ve ide sha a kaa a dedoo je." 
Psalms104:29 Ka Wea yer ishigh You yô, i za ve iyol; ka Wea tôô ve iôôn kera yô, ve kpe, ve gema ve hingir vuulevu." 
Psalms104:30 Ka Wea tindi Jijingi Wou yô, i gba ve; U gema ishigh ki inyaagh ki hingir ki hegh." 
Psalms104:31 Iengem i TER i̱ lu gbem; TER A̱ ember sha ityom Na," 
Psalms104:32 Un u ka A kenger tar, tsô u gbidye ikarikase iyol la, A bende iwo, tsô mnyim ma due." 
Psalms104:33 Me wa TER icam sha ayange a m lu uma yô, me wa icam me ter Aôndo wam er m lu her yô." 
Psalms104:34 Mbamhen av ken ishima ma ve doo Un; mo yô, me ember ken TER tsung." 
Psalms104:35 Mbaasorabo ma ve bee shin tar, mbaaferev kpaa ve̱ de kera lu ga. Wuese TER, we uma wam! Haleluya." 
Psalms105:1 Wuese nen TER, yila nen sha iti Na, pase nen akuraior ityom Na." 
Psalms105:2 Wa icam ter nen Un, wa nen atsam a wuese Un, ôron nen kwagh u akaa Na a kpilighyol cii." 
Psalms105:3 Ta nen ihagh sha icighanti Na, asema a mba ve keren TER yô, a̱ ember tsung." 
Psalms105:4 Ker nen TER kua agee a Na kpaa, keren nen ishigh Nagh gbem." 
Psalms105:5 Umbur nen ityom Na i kpilighyol i A er yô, uivande Nav kua ajiraôron a ken zwa Na," 
Psalms105:6 ne tsombor u wanakiriki Na Aberaham, ne ônov mba Yakob, ne uicuwan Nav." 
Psalms105:7 Un TER ka Aôndo wase je, ajiraôron a Na nga sha won cii." 
Psalms105:8 A umbur ikuryan Na gbem, —ka mkaanem ma A kaa sha ci u ikov dubu je la—" 
Psalms105:9 ikuryan i A ya a Aberaham, man mbum Na a Isaka;" 
Psalms105:10 A shi A taver i, hingir tindi hen Yakob, hen Iserael kpaa hingir icôronikuryan je," 
Psalms105:11 er lu kaan er: Ka we je, Me na u tar u Kanaan, u̱ lu kwar u dyako wen." 
Psalms105:12 Zum u ve lu ior kpeghee tsô, ve ndahar mimi, man ve lu shir ken u la," 
Psalms105:13 ve lu zenden ken akuraior sha adondo adondo, ve mough ken tartor ugen ve yem ken ikurior igen kposo." 
Psalms105:14 A rumun ma or nzughul a ve ga, A zôhô a utor sha ci ve kpaa," 
Psalms105:15 lu kaan er: De bende nen mba M shigh ve mkurem la ave ga, mbaprofeti Av kpaa de eren nen ve kwagh u vihin ga." 
Psalms105:16 A yila ijen, gba hen tar la, A vihi kwaghyan u ve suur sha mi la kera cii." 
Psalms105:17 A tindi or vande hemen ve; i tee Yosev, hingir kpan;" 
Psalms105:18 i mande un agbe shin angahar, ican er un sha iyô," 
Psalms105:19 zan zan shighe u imo Na kar kuren, man mkaanem ma TER kar un kera la." 
Psalms105:20 Tor tindi er i̱ pase un, i̱ tuhwa; ka ortaregh u ior pase un tuhwa ye;" 
Psalms105:21 a gema ya na cii a wa un sha ikev, er a̱ nengen sha akaa a na cii," 
Psalms105:22 a̱ kangen mbatarev nav sha ishima na, man a̱ tesen mbavesen nav kwaghfan kpaa." 
Psalms105:23 Iserael kpaa, va ken Igipiti, Yakob za lu shir ken tar u Ham." 
Psalms105:24 A er ior nav ngee kpishi, ve taver ve hemba mbaahendanev vev agee." 
Psalms105:25 A gema asema a ve, er ve̱ kôr ior Nav ihom, ve er ayom a bo sha mbayev Nav kpaa." 
Psalms105:26 A tindi wanakiriki Na Mose man Aron u A tsuwa un yô. 
Psalms105:27 Ve za er uivande Nav hen ve, kua akaakpilighyol kpaa ken tar u Ham." 
Psalms105:28 A na ime, za wa keregh, ve hendan a imo Na ga." 
Psalms105:29 A gema mngerem vem hingir awambe, A tim ishu ve kera." 
Psalms105:30 Asôhô mgbough ken tar ve, kua ken ayou a mbatarev vev kpaa." 
Psalms105:31 A ôr kwagh, tsô ikpila-akughô va, inyarev mbi nyuman gba ken tar ve cii." 
Psalms105:32 A nôô ve ura u awomboogh, man usu u inyiar kpaa lu ken tar ve." 
Psalms105:33 A vihi ikon ve i wain man i tur kera, shi A kever ikon i ken tar ve kpaa." 
Psalms105:34 A ôr kwagh, nahan ikomon va, kua agum a na, ngee gande u ôron," 
Psalms105:35 i ya ahu a ken tar ve cii, i ya iyiav mbi ken sule ve kpaa." 
Psalms105:36 A wua ônovmbaiundav ken tar ve cii kpaa, ka mhii u agee a ve je la." 
Psalms105:37 Nahan A na ve ve due a azurfa man zenaria; ma or u nôngon gbev lu ken ikwe Na ga. 
Psalms105:38 Zum u ve yem la, doo Mbaigipiti, gadia ve cier ve iyol." 
Psalms105:39 A samber ibeenegh hingir kwagh u cirin, man usu sha u u̱ wanger tugh yô." 
Psalms105:40 Ve sôn, A tindi ve a utakange, A na ve ruam u Sha kuma ve." 
Psalms105:41 A bugh vande, tsô mngerem due, kuwa ken ajiir a ombor er ka ifi yô." 
Psalms105:42 Gadia A umbur icighanmkaan Na, kua wanakiriki Na Aberaham." 
Psalms105:43 A due a ior Nav saan saan, uicuwan Nav kpaa a atsam a ember." 
Psalms105:44 A gema ityar i akuraior, A na ve, ve ngohol akaa a ior lu yan ican sha mi yô," 
Psalms105:45 sha er ve̱ wa iko sha akaawan a Na, man ve̱ ver ishima sha atindi a Na kpaa. Haleluya." 
Psalms106:1 Haleluya. Wuese nen TER, gadia A doo; gadia erdoo Na ka u tsôron gbem sha won." 
Psalms106:2 Ka an nana fatyô u ôron aeren a ageegh a TER, man nana pase iwuese Na cii?" 
Psalms106:3 Mba i saan ve iyol yô, ka mba ve we ajiraôron a mimi la iko, mba ve eren perapera gbem yô." 
Psalms106:4 Umbur mo, TERE, sha mdoom Ou ma i doon We a ior Ou la; va sôrom a myom Wou," 
Psalms106:5 sha er me nenge mkpeyol u uicuwan Ou, sha er me ember a nongo Wou ken msaanyol ve la, man me ta ihagh a dyako Wou imôngo yô." 
Psalms106:6 Se er isholibo di er uter asev nahan, se er sha mi ga, se er aferakaa." 
Psalms106:7 Zum u uter asev lu ken Igipiti la, ve wa akaa Ou a kpilighyol la iko ga, ve umbur erdoo Wou u ngeen yum la ga, kpa ve hendan hen zegemnger, ka Zegemnger u Nyian je la." 
Psalms106:8 Nahan kpaa A yima ve sha ci u iti Na, sha u Una pase agee a Na a vesen yô;" 
Psalms106:9 A yange Zegemnger u Nyian, maa hingir tareghnyaagh; A per a ve shin iv er ka sha desereti nahan." 
Psalms106:10 A yima ve sha ikev i or u kôron ve ihom, man A paa ve sha uwegh ku orihom kpaa." 
Psalms106:11 Mngerem uve mbaahendanev vev, mô ve shi ga." 
Psalms106:12 Tsô ve na mkaanem Nam jighjigh, ve wa icam i wuese Un." 
Psalms106:13 Ica kpaa lu a gba ga, tsô ityom Na hungul ve, ve kera kegh awashima Na la ga;" 
Psalms106:14 ve lu tômon tsung tsung ken desereti, ve mee Aôndo ken toho;" 
Psalms106:15 A na ve kwagh u ve sen yô, kpa a tindi ve mkande ken ishima." 
Psalms106:16 Shi ve er Mose iwuhe ken afo kpaa, kua Aron icighanor u TER." 
Psalms106:17 Inya bugh, mena Datan, cir nongo u Abiram kpaa." 
Psalms106:18 Usu yegh ken mkohol ve, nomborusu hia mbaaferev." 
Psalms106:19 Ve er wanbua hen Horebi, ve gure ve civir eev mbu i ker a ker mbu yô," 
Psalms106:20 kape ve musan Iengem ve, ve ngohol eev mbu bua u yan toho sha ityough ki i la." 
Psalms106:21 Aôndo Oryiman ve, hungul ve, u A er akaavesen ken Igipiti la," 
Psalms106:22 ityom i cieryol ken tar u Ham, man akaacieryol hen Zegemnger u Nyian." 
Psalms106:23 Ka nahan man A kaa er, Una tim ve kera ye; ka Mose, icuwanor Na la, va tile Un sha ishi a zamber, sha u goom a iyugh Na kera, sha er A̱ de timin ve ga ye." 
Psalms106:24 Ve laha tar u dedoo la, ve na mkaanem Nam jighjigh ga;" 
Psalms106:25 kpa ve er ivever ken utenti vev, ve ver ato sha imo i TER ga." 
Psalms106:26 Ka nahan man A kende uwegh Nagh sha A bum er Una wua ve ken desereti ye," 
Psalms106:27 shi Una sambe tsombor ve ken akuraior kpaa, Una tsenda ve sha ityar ityar." 
Psalms106:28 Shi ve zua a Baal-peor kangenaa, ve ya nagh ku i ne akaa a a lu uma ga la." 
Psalms106:29 Kape ve bam Un sha aeren a ve, man bouange kôr ve la." 
Psalms106:30 Tsô Pinehashi mough, tile, ôr ijir, bouange maa bee." 
Psalms106:31 Tsô kwagh la maa hingir perapera na je, sha ikov ikov gbem sha won." 
Psalms106:32 Ve bam Un kpaa hen mngerem ma Meriba, nahan kera kpe Mose iyol ga sha ci ve;" 
Psalms106:33 gadia ve hendan a Jijingi Na, nahan a bugh zwa na, a ôr kwagh u kpeegh." 
Psalms106:34 Ve tim akuraior la er TER kaa ve nahan ga," 
Psalms106:35 kpa ve nungwa a atôatyev la, ve hen aeren a ve;" 
Psalms106:36 ve civir ieev vev, kwagh la gema hingir ihônon hen a ve." 
Psalms106:37 Ve gema ônov vev mba nomso man mba kasev ve na ujijingi mba bov nagh a mi; 
Psalms106:38 ve haa awambe a mbaishôôv inya, ka awambe a ônov vev mba nomso man mba kasev, mba ve ne ieev mbi Kanaan nagh a mi je la; nahan tar cii hôngor sha awambe." 
Psalms106:39 Kape ve hôngor sha aeren a ve la, ve gba eren idya sha aeren a ve la;" 
Psalms106:40 ka nahan man iyugh i TER mough sha ior Nav, dyako Na kpaa ndôhôr Un ishima ye." 
Psalms106:41 Nahan A gema ve A na ve sha ikev i akuraior, mba ve ker ve ihom la gema tema tor sha a ve." 
Psalms106:42 Mbaihomov vev kpaa kighir ve a ican, ve var inya sha ikev ve." 
Psalms106:43 A yima ve acin imôngo, kpa ve lu hendan a Na sha mbamhen vev mbala; ka nahan man ve saa ken iferkwagh ve ye." 
Psalms106:44 Nahan kpaa A wa iko a ican ve, zum u A ungwa mliam vem la;" 
Psalms106:45 a umbur ikuryan Na sha ci ve kpaa, mhôônom kôr Un, sha ci u A ngee a erdoo yô." 
Psalms106:46 Shi A er mhôônom kôr mba ve yem a ve uikangen la a ve. 
Psalms106:47 Yima se, TERE, Aôndo wase, due a vese ken akuraior kera, sha er se̱ sugh icighanti Wou man se̱ ta ihagh sha iwuese You yô." 
Psalms106:48 I̱ wuese TER, Aôndo u Iserael, hii sha uicôronmbaashighev zan zan gbem sha won; ior ci ca ve̱ kaa er: Amen. Haleluya." 
Psalms107:1 Wuese nen TER, gadia A doo; gadia erdoo Na ka u tsôron gbem sha won je." 
Psalms107:2 Mba TER A paa ve yô, ve̱ kaa nahan, mba A paa ve sha ikev i ican la," 
Psalms107:3 mba A kohol ve ken ityar kposo kposo, A hidi a ve yô, sha ityoughkitaregh man shin ityôtar, man shi ken imbusutarimese man iyan." 
Psalms107:4 Mbagenev zende wue wue ken desereti, gbenda kpaa lu ga, ve zua a gar u teman ker ga;" 
Psalms107:5 ijen man imura kôr ve, vôr ve iyol;" 
Psalms107:6 nahan ken ican ve la je, ve genger amo ve vaa a TER, Un kpaa A yima ve ken atsan a a tser ve la." 
Psalms107:7 A hemen ve sha gbenda u jighilii, sha er vea za ken gar u vea za tema ker yô." 
Psalms107:8 Yô, ve̱ wuese TER sha erdoo Na, man aeren a Na a kpilighyol, a A eren a ônov mba iorov yô." 
Psalms107:9 Gadia ka A bee or imura i i ker nan la; man shi or u ijen i ker nan kpaa, ka A iv nan a kwagh u doon." 
Psalms107:10 Mbagenev tema ken ime man mure u kuugh, i kange ve sha ican man sha iyô," 
Psalms107:11 sha ci u ve hendan a akaaôron a Aôndo, man ve laha kwaghwan u Uhembansha yô;" 
Psalms107:12 ka nahan man A shirigh a asema a ve inya sha tom u ican, ve nôngo gbev ve gba, orwasen môm nan lu ga ye." 
Psalms107:13 Nahan ken ican ve la je, ve genger amo ve vaa a TER, Un kpaa A yima ve ken atsan a a tser ve la." 
Psalms107:14 A due a ve ken ime man mure u kuugh, A tôndo ikangenev vev kera." 
Psalms107:15 Yô, ve̱ wuese TER sha erdoo Na, man aeren a Na a kpilighyol, a A eren a ônov mba iorov yô." 
Psalms107:16 Gadia A hembe ihinda i togula, man A tôndo uishindan mba iyôô kera." 
Psalms107:17 Mbagenev lu abumeaior; sha akaabo a ve man aferakaa a ve yô, ve lu yan ican tsung;" 
Psalms107:18 hanma injakwaghyan cii, ndôhôr ve ishima, ve mgbôghom a ihinda i kuugh." 
Psalms107:19 Nahan ken ican ve la je, ve genger amo ve vaa a TER, Un kpaa A yima ve ken atsan a a tser ve la." 
Psalms107:20 A tindi mkaanem Nam, A bee ve angev, a due a ve ken mtim kera." 
Psalms107:21 Yô, ve̱ wuese TER sha erdoo Na, man aeren a Na a kpilighyol, a A eren a ônov mba iorov yô." 
Psalms107:22 Ve̱ na iniav mbi sha ishughun, man ve̱ pase ityom Na sha atsam a ember." 
Psalms107:23 Mbagenev sen shin zegemnger ken utso, ve yamen kasua ken mngerem ma tamen;" 
Psalms107:24 ve nenge a ityom i TER, man aeren a Na a kpilighyol shin iv." 
Psalms107:25 Gadia A ôr kwagh, zegeahumbe mough, u a er agôndo a zegemnger mough;" 
Psalms107:26 ve kôndo ve mande sha kwavaôndo, shi ve hide ve sen shin iv; kondo ve iyol sha ican i i tser ve la." 
Psalms107:27 Ve hingir ze ze ze, zemba ze zemba, er or u nan hundu msôrom yô; kwaghfan ve bee ca ca." 
Psalms107:28 Nahan ken ican ve la je, ve genger amo ve vaa a TER, Un kpaa A dugh a ve ken atsan a a tser ve la." 
Psalms107:29 A yange uraahumbe, u huan ving, man agôndoamnger kpaa a de," 
Psalms107:30 nahan saan ve iyol er a hingir ving yô; tsô A za ar a ve hen ihongo i ve ver ishima u zan la. 
Psalms107:31 Yô, ve̱ wuese TER sha erdoo Na, man aeren a Na a kpilighyol a A eren a ônov mba iorov yô." 
Psalms107:32 Ve̱ kende Un sha ken mkohol u ior, ve̱ wuese Un hen ajiir a mbatamen ve tem idyu la." 
Psalms107:33 Ka A gema uifi ve hingir udeserti, man amboramnger kpaa, a hingir tar u imuragh;" 
Psalms107:34 inya i dedoo, i hingir inyabar, sha ci u ifer i mba ve tem ker la." 
Psalms107:35 Ka A gema desereti, a hingir ber u mnger, man tar u tseghe tseghe kpaa, u hingir amboramnger." 
Psalms107:36 A ver mbagenev er ve̱ tema ker; ve̱ maa gar, ve̱ tema ker," 
Psalms107:37 ve̱ kaha ishule i uyia, ve̱ môôr ikon i wain kpaa, iyiav ngee ker kpishi." 
Psalms107:38 A ver ve doo doo kpaa, zan zan ve seer ngeen a ngee; A rumun er ilev vev mbi̱ pande a pande ga." 
Psalms107:39 Kpa shi iyenge ve pande, ve var inya, sha mkighir man ican i tseren ve kua mzungu kpaa." 
Psalms107:40 Ka A hee ashagbaior, A na ve, ve zende wue wue ken taaikôngo henpe gbenda lu ga yô." 
Psalms107:41 Ka A dugh oribanave ken ican, A kende a nan sha, A gema icombor i nan i hingir er ikumuile yô." 
Psalms107:42 Mbaperapera mba nengen kwagh la, nahan saan ve iyol; iferkwagh cii kusu zwa u i." 
Psalms107:43 Or u nan lu a kwaghfan yô, nana̱ ver ishima sha akaa ne, ve̱ ver ishima sha uerdoo mba TER kpaa. Ka icam. Ka Pasalmi u Davidi" 
Psalms108:1 Ishima taver mo, Aôndo; me wa icam, een, me wa atsam a wuese, a uma wam cii." 
Psalms108:2 Nder, we adiguve u vesen man u kiriki kpaa! mo kpaa me nder sha use." 
Psalms108:3 Me wuese We, TERE, ken atô u ior, me wa atsam a wuese We, ken akuraior." 
Psalms108:4 Gadia erdoo Wou vese, kar Usha je, mimi Wou kpaa ar sha ikwavaôndo je." 
Psalms108:5 Kende a iyol You sha je, kar Usha cii, Aôndo; iengem You kpaa i̱ kende i sha sha tar cii." 
Psalms108:6 Sha er á yima mbadoon We ishima yô, yima sha uwegh Ough ku yanegh, ungwa imo yase." 
Psalms108:7 Aôndo ôr kwagh ken icighanjiir Na: Mo Me ember yagh yagh, Me pav Shekem, man shi Me kar kwar sha pev u Sukoti." 
Psalms108:8 Gileadi ka U Wam, Manase kpaa ka u Wam je; Eferaim ka kwagh u yisan ityough Yagh a mi je; Yuda ka tôgh Agh." 
Psalms108:9 Moabi ka ikagh Yagh ki ôôn iyol a mi; sha Edom yô, Me kende ikôvough ki nguhar Yagh; Filitia yô, Me er ikenge Me ember un." 
Psalms108:10 Ka an nana za a mo ken gar u taveraa? Ka an nana fatyô u zan a mo ken Edomo? 
Psalms108:11 Kera ka We, Aôndo, U te se kera gaa? U kera due a akumautya ase imôngo ga, Aôndo." 
Psalms108:12 Na se iwasen sha u nôngon a or u ahendanegh, gadia iwasen i or yô, ka gbilinkwagh tsô." 
Psalms108:13 Ka ken Aôndo man sé eren akaa a ageegh ye; gadia ka Un Una ndyar mbaahendanev asev shin angahar ye. Ngun ka sha ci u orhemen u mbawanatsam. Ka Pasalmi u Davidi 
Psalms109:1 De huan ga, Aôndo u iwuese Yam," 
Psalms109:2 gadia ka zwa u iferor, ka zwa u icughugh ve bugh sha a mo ye; ve ôr kwagh a mo sha nombor u aiegh." 
Psalms109:3 Ve toor a mo cam ce cam sha akaaôron a sha ihom, ve gba nôngon num a mo sha ityôikaa ga." 
Psalms109:4 Sha dooshima wam la, ve gema ve hingir mbaahendanev av, kpa mo yô, m lu eren msen." 
Psalms109:5 Ve orom iyev i kwaghdedoo sha ifer, man dooshima wam kpaa sha ihom." 
Psalms109:6 Wa un sha ikev i iferor, ormsende a̱ tile un ken uwegh ku yanegh." 
Psalms109:7 Zum u á ôron un ijir yô, a̱ due a ibo iyol, msen na kpaa a̱ gema a̱ hingir isholibo." 
Psalms109:8 Ayange a na a̱ ndahar, orgen nana̱ ngohol tom na." 
Psalms109:9 Ônov nav kpaa, icôghol i ter i̱ kôr ve, kwase na kpaa, a̱ hingir kwasecôghol." 
Psalms109:10 Ônov nav ve̱ hingir mbazenden wue wue, sônon kwagh, i̱ num ve hen ice ve kera." 
Psalms109:11 Or u yaren injô nana̱ kura un ikav cii; atôatyev a̱ ya ishar sha tom na cii. 
Psalms109:12 A̱ de lu a or u zungwen un mhôônom ga; or môm tsô kpaa, nana̱ de zungu ancôgholov nav mhôônom ga." 
Psalms109:13 Tsombor na, u̱ tim, iti ve i̱ hungul ken kov u ua va mough la kera." 
Psalms109:14 Ifer i uter nav i̱ lu kwagh u á umbur sha ishigh ki TER; i̱ de koughon isholibo i ngô na kera ga," 
Psalms109:15 i̱ lu sha ishigh ki TER heregh gbem, sha er Una tim m-umbur u ma i umbur ve sha won la kera." 
Psalms109:16 Gadia a umbur mhôônom ma zungwen ga, kpa a tôv icanor man oribanave, a ican ityô, kua oryinanshima kpaa er una wua ve yô." 
Psalms109:17 Een, ityuhwanev kpaa doo un, nahan mbi̱ gema mbi̱ hile sha a na; iveren doo un ga, nahan shi i̱ gba di ca a na je." 
Psalms109:18 A̱ cir ityuhwanev iyol er ka ikondo na yô, mbi̱ nyôr un ken semayolough er mngerem nahan, man er mkurem nahan ken akuhe a na!" 
Psalms109:19 De, mbi̱ hingir un er ikondo i cirin iyol i a cirin la nahan, man er kwange u a zeren shin iwenge gbem yô." 
Psalms109:20 Ka injar i mbaahendanev av ma ve zough a mi hen TER je ne, mba ve kesem sha ifer kpaa yô." 
Psalms109:21 Kpa We Aôndo, Tere, nenge sha kwagh wam sha ci u iti You, Yimam, er erdoo Wou la a doo yum yô." 
Psalms109:22 Gadia m ngu icanor man oribanave, ishima vihim ken vanger tsung." 
Psalms109:23 M kar kera er mure u a gbe a ze ca yô; i mishim kera er ikomon nahan. 
Psalms109:24 Anu kpem cii sha ci u kwaghyan u hôron, iyol yam kande, ahôm kera nga ga;" 
Psalms109:25 m gema m hingir kwagh u lahan hen ve; ka vea nenge a mo yô, ve gba jingir ityough." 
Psalms109:26 Wasem, TERE, Aôndo wam, yimam sha erdoo Wou;" 
Psalms109:27 sha er vea fa er i lu uwegh Ough je, shi i lu We je, U er nahan ye, TERE." 
Psalms109:28 Ve yô, ve̱ gbaa tuhwan tsô, kpa We yô, naan iveren heregh. Ve̱ mough, ve̱ ya kunya, kpa wanakiriki Wou yô, a̱ ember." 
Psalms109:29 I̱ cir mbaahendanev av iheen iyol, kunya ve u̱ cir ve iyol er ka riga nahan." 
Psalms109:30 Me wuese TER kpishi sha zwa wam, me wuese Un ken atô u ikpelaior," 
Psalms109:31 gadia til ken uwegh ku yanegh ku oribanave, sha u yiman un sha mba ve lu ôron un ijir i kuugh yô. Ka Pasalmi u Davidi" 
Psalms110:1 TER kaa a Terem er: Temam ken uwegh ku yanegh, zan zan Me gema mbaihomov Ou vea hingir We kwagh u pendan angahar sha mi." 
Psalms110:2 TER Una naregh tôgh ku ageegh Ough ken Shion, Una kaa er: Tema tor hen atô u mbaihomov Ou!" 
Psalms110:3 Ior Ou vea na nagh sha ayol a ve sha asema a dedoo je sha iyange i ikumutya You, a uicighanmbaakondov iyol, sha mve u use; er avure a lu nahan kape ikaior You ia va la." 
Psalms110:4 TER bum Una kera vaa afanyô ga: We U ngu pristi u tsôron gbem sha won sha inja i mlu u tom u Melkisedeki la. 
Psalms110:5 Ter u A lu U ken uwegh ku yanegh, Una her utor njighe njighe sha iyange i iyugh Na." 
Psalms110:6 Una ôr ijir her atô u akuraior, Una iv a a akomaior, Una her uityombaiorov sha tar wuee." 
Psalms110:7 Una ma mngerem shin uwagh u hen gbenda, ka nahan man Una kende ityough sha ye." 
Psalms111:1 Haleluya. Me wuese TER a ishima yam cii, ken nongo u mbaperapera kua ken mkohol kpaa." 
Psalms111:2 Ityom i TER kehe je, ka kwagh u timen sha mi hen mba i doo ve ishima cii yô." 
Psalms111:3 Tom Na ka u icivirigh man u engem kpishi kpaa, perapera Na kpaa ngu gbem sha won." 
Psalms111:4 A er ityom Na i kpilighyol er á umbur i yô; TER ngu a mrumun u sha mhôôn man mhôônom ma zungwen kpaa. 
Psalms111:5 A na mba ve cie Un la kwaghyan; Una zer umbur ikuryan Na gbem. 
Psalms111:6 A tese ior Nav agee a ityom Na, sha er A ne ve dyako u atôatyev yô." 
Psalms111:7 Ityom i sha ave Na ka i mimi man i vough kpaa; uiniezwa Nav cii ka mba dông," 
Psalms111:8 ve taver gbem, mayange á kera bee ga, i er ve sha mimi man perapera kpaa." 
Psalms111:9 A tindi ior Nav a mpaa; A ver ikuryan Na er i̱ lu gbem; iti Na ka i tseghan man i cier iyol kpaa. 
Psalms111:10 Mcie u cian Aôndo ka mhii u kwaghfan je la, mbaeren sha mi cii yô, mba a mkav u dedoo; iwuese Na ngi gbem sha won." 
Psalms112:1 Haleluya. Saan or u nan cie TER la iyol, man atindi a Na a doo nan ishima tsung la." 
Psalms112:2 Tsombor u nan ua hingir u ageegh sha won; kov u mbaperapera yô, á ver u doo doo." 
Psalms112:3 Mngee u akaa man inyaregh ki kpishigh vea lu hen ya u nan; perapera u nan kpaa una lu gbem sha won je. 
Psalms112:4 Iwanger due kôndo sha ken ime sha ci u mba ve lu a mimi yô, a mrumun u sha mhôôn man mhôônom ma zungwen man perapera kpaa." 
Psalms112:5 Kpe or u mhôônom ma ker nan la iyol, nan pwaren nan ne la, u nan eren akaa a nan sha mimi yô," 
Psalms112:6 gadia nana tenger mayange ga; or u perapera yô, á umbur nan gbem." 
Psalms112:7 Nana cia loho u bo ga, ishima i nan i taver sha er nan suur sha TER yô." 
Psalms112:8 Ishima i nan i taver, nana cia kwagh ga, zan zan nana kar nengen a awashima u nan sha mbaahendanev mba nan la;" 
Psalms112:9 nan sar, nan na mbaibanave; perapera u nan una lu gbem sha won je; á kende korough ku nan sha, sha icivir." 
Psalms112:10 Iferor nan nenge, vihi nan, nan yan anyi nan sough kera; isharen i iferor ia saa ishe." 
Psalms113:1 Haleluya. Wuese nen, ne mbayev mba TER, wuese nen iti i TER." 
Psalms113:2 I̱ wuese iti i TER, hii hegen je zan zan gbem sha won." 
Psalms113:3 Hii sha iyangeduen je, zan zan iyangemiren á wuese iti i TER." 
Psalms113:4 TER ngu sha, kar akuraior sha cii, iengem Na kpaa kar Usha je." 
Psalms113:5 Ka an nan lu er TER, Aôndo wase, u A tem Sha," 
Psalms113:6 Un u ka A shir ashe shin sha u Una nenge Sha man tara? 
Psalms113:7 Ka A dugh icanor shin vuulevu kera, A mough a nan sha, A kende a oribanave shin tihi u ihôgh sha," 
Psalms113:8 er ve̱ tema a mbatarev imôngo, ka mbatarev mba ior Nav je la." 
Psalms113:9 Ka A na, ikômkwase nan lu a ya, nan lu ngô u saan saan u mbayev. Haleluya." 
Psalms114:1 Zum u Iserael due ken tar u Igipiti, ya u Yakob due ken ior mba zwa ve lu kposo la yô," 
Psalms114:2 Yuda hingir icighanjiir Na, Iserael gema hingir tartor Na." 
Psalms114:3 Zegemnger nenge nahan, yevese, Yordan hide ijime." 
Psalms114:4 Iwo gba tsuwen er anomaiyôngo, man agungu kpaa er agumaiyôngo nahan." 
Psalms114:5 Ka nyi i er u, zegemnger, ve u yevese, man Yordan kpaa, u hidi ijime nahana," 
Psalms114:6 ne iwo ne tsugh er anomaiyôngo, man ne agungu kpaa er agumaiyôngo nahana?" 
Psalms114:7 We tar, ikarikase i̱ gbidye u iyol, sha ishigh ki TER, sha ishigh ki Aôndo u Yakob," 
Psalms114:8 u A gem vande u hingir bermnger yô, iwen i taver kpaa i hingir imbormnger yô." 
Psalms115:1 Ka se ga, ka se ga, TERE, kpa ka iti You á na i icivir, sha ci u erdoo Wou man mimi Wou ye." 
Psalms115:2 Ka nyi man atôatyev aa pine er: Aôndo ve yô, ngu han ase?" 
Psalms115:3 Aôndo wase yô, ngu Sha, ka A er hanma kwagh u i doo Un u eren yô." 
Psalms115:4 Ieev vev ka azurfa man zenaria, tom u sha ave a ior." 
Psalms115:5 Mbi a ijô, kpa mbi er kwagh ga; mbi a ashe, kpa mbi nengen ga;" 
Psalms115:6 mbi a ato, kpa mbi ongo ga; mbi a ahenga, kpa mbi ongo ihuma ga;" 
Psalms115:7 mbi a ave, kpa mbi peven sha kwagh ga; mbi a angahar, kpa mbi zenden ga; imo kpaa ngi dugh ken gôngor u mbi ga." 
Psalms115:8 Mba ve gbe mbi la vea hingir er mbi nahan, hanmô u nan suur sha mbi yô." 
Psalms115:9 We, Iserael, suur sha TER; ka Un A lu iwasen ve man perutya ve kpaa ye." 
Psalms115:10 We, ya u Aron, suur sha TER; ka Un A lu iwasen ve, man perutya ve kpaa ye." 
Psalms115:11 Ne mba ne cie TER yô, suur nen sha TER; ka Un A lu iwasen ve, man perutya ve kpaa ye." 
Psalms115:12 TER umbur se, Una na iveren; Una ver ya u Iserael doo doo; Una ver ya u Aron doo doo;" 
Psalms115:13 Una ver mba ve cie TER doo doo, mbakiriki kua mbavesen cii." 
Psalms115:14 TER A̱ seer ne er ne̱ ngee, ne̱ za a za hemen yô, ne kua ônov enev cii." 
Psalms115:15 TER A̱ ver ne doo doo, Un u A gbe sha man tar la." 
Psalms115:16 Usha ka usha mba TER, kpa tar yô, A na ônov mba iorov." 
Psalms115:17 Mbakpenev mba wuese TER ga, mô môm u senen shin ijiir i ving kpaa ga." 
Psalms115:18 Kpa se yô, sé wuese TER, hii hegen je zan zan gbem sha won. Haleluya." 
Psalms116:1 TER doom ishima sha ci u A ongo imo yam man uzamber av yô. 
Psalms116:2 Er A ver ato hen a mo yô, nahan me yila Un sha ayange a m lu uma yô." 
Psalms116:3 Ikor i kuugh kasem, mcieryol u Sheol tserem, m zua a ican man mzungu." 
Psalms116:4 Nahan m yila iti i TER mer: TERE, ma U shi yem uma wama!" 
Psalms116:5 TER ngu a mrumun u sha mhôôn man perapera kpaa, Aôndo wase zungu mhôônom." 
Psalms116:6 TER kor mbalanenkwagh; m lu seelee, kpa A yimam." 
Psalms116:7 Hile hen mmem wou, uma wam, gadia TER er a we dedoo yum." 
Psalms116:8 Gadia U yima uma wam ken ku, ashe am sha mlia, angahar am kpaa, sha mgbe." 
Psalms116:9 Me zende sha ishigh ki TER, ken tar u mbaumav." 
Psalms116:10 M na jighjigh, zum u m ôr mer: Ican erem tsung la." 
Psalms116:11 Er kondom iyol yô, m kaa mer: Ior cii ka mbaaiev." 
Psalms116:12 Ka nyi me na TER sha ci u akaa a Na a dedoo a A erem cii laa? 
Psalms116:13 Me ngohol iyongo i myom, me yila sha iti i TER." 
Psalms116:14 Me kure uiceghzwa av a TER sha ishigh ki ior Nav cii. 
Psalms116:15 Sha ishigh ki TER yô, ku u uicighan Nav ka kwagh u injaa kpishi." 
Psalms116:16 TERE, mimi je, m ngu wanakiriki Wou; m ngu wanakiriki Wou, wan u wanye Wou u kwase; U sagh ikangenev yav." 
Psalms116:17 Me na U nagh ku ishughun, me yila sha iti i TER." 
Psalms116:18 Me kure uiceghzwa av a TER, sha ishigh ki ior Nav cii," 
Psalms116:19 ken ityembe i sha ishigh ki iyou i TER, hen atô wou, we Yerusalem. Haleluya." 
Psalms117:1 Wuese nen TER, ne akuraior cii, civir Un, ne ior cii!" 
Psalms117:2 Gadia erdoo Na a vese kehe yum. Mimi u TER kpaa ka u tsôron gbem sha won. Haleluya. 
Psalms118:1 Wuese nen TER, gadia A doo, gadia erdoo Na ka u tsôron gbem sha won je." 
Psalms118:2 Iserael a̱ kaa er: Erdoo Na ka u tsôron gbem sha won je. 
Psalms118:3 Ya u Aron a̱ kaa er: Erdoo Na ka u tsôron gbem sha won je. 
Psalms118:4 Mba ve cie TER ve̱ kaa er: Erdoo Na ka u tsôron gbem sha won. 
Psalms118:5 Ken ican i i tserem la m yila TER; TER ungwa imo yam, A verem ken ijiir i gbanger." 
Psalms118:6 TER ta ikaa a mo, me kera cia ga, ka nyi je or á ereme?" 
Psalms118:7 TER ta ikaa a mo hingir orwasen mo, nahan me nenge a awashima wam sha mba ve kerem ihom la." 
Psalms118:8 Hemba doon u suur sha TER a u veren ishima sha or. 
Psalms118:9 Hemba doon u suur sha TER a u veren ishima sha mbatarev. 
Psalms118:10 Akuraior cii kasem; ka ken iti i TER man m ngbegh a kera ye. 
Psalms118:11 A kasem, een, a kasem; ka ken iti i TER man m ngbegh a kera ye." 
Psalms118:12 A kasem er iyough i ken toho yô; i pir a er usu u sha ayegher a ikon nahan. 
Psalms118:13 U mgbegham ngegh wer, m̱ gba, kpa TER wasem." 
Psalms118:14 Ka TER A lu agee am man icam yam ye, A hingir myem wam kpaa." 
Psalms118:15 Imo i iember kua i myom ngi ken utenti mba mbaperapera; uwegh ku yanegh ku TER ku eren akaa a ageegh," 
Psalms118:16 uwegh ku yanegh ku TER ku kende sha; uwegh ku yanegh ku TER ku eren akaa a ageegh. 
Psalms118:17 Me kpe ga, me lu uma, me pase ityom i TER." 
Psalms118:18 TER tsaham taver je, kpa A nam ken ku ga." 
Psalms118:19 Bughum ihinda i perapera, m̱ nyôr sha i, m̱ za sugh TER." 
Psalms118:20 Ka hunda u TER je ne, mbaperapera vea nyôr sha u." 
Psalms118:21 Me wuese We, gadia U ungwa imo yam, man U hingir myom wam kpaa." 
Psalms118:22 Iwen i mbamaan ve venda i la, ka i je, i hingir i sha zongo ye." 
Psalms118:23 Ka TER A er kwagh ne ye, ka kwagh u kpilighyol sha ashe ase." 
Psalms118:24 Ka iyange i TER A er i je ne, sé ember nen, i̱ saan se iyol sha i kpaa." 
Psalms118:25 TERE, shi yima! TERE, shi na ikôr i̱ lagha!" 
Psalms118:26 Saan or u nan nyer ken iti i TER la iyol; se mba nan ne iveren i dedoo i ken ya u TER. 
Psalms118:27 TER ka Aôndo, A na se iwanger kpaa. Kange nen nagh sha ikor je, za nen a mi hen akor a atse a nanden nagh sha mi la." 
Psalms118:28 We U ngu Aôndo wam, me wuese We, We Aôndo wam me civir We." 
Psalms118:29 Wuese nen TER, gadia A doo, gadia erdoo Na ka u tsôron gbem sha won." 
Psalms119:1 Mba i saan ve iyol yô, ka mba gbenda ve u lu vough, ve zenden sha tindi u TER la." 
Psalms119:2 Mba i saan ve iyol yô, ka mba ve we mbampase Nav iko, ve keren Un a ishima ve cii la;" 
Psalms119:3 shi ve eren ma ifer ga, kpa ve zenden sha igbenda Na." 
Psalms119:4 We, U na uiniezwa Ou, sha er á waan ve iko a ishima i môm yô." 
Psalms119:5 Aeren a am ma a lu ase taveraa, sha u eren sha akaawan a Ou vough." 
Psalms119:6 Nahan ma m ve ahenge ga, er m veren ishima sha atindi a Ou ne cii yô." 
Psalms119:7 Me wuese We a ishima i jighilii, zum u me henen akaaôron a Ou a jirigh a perapera la yô." 
Psalms119:8 Me kura akaawan a Ou; de undun mo purututu ga. 
Psalms119:9 Ka sha nyi man wanyekwaor una wanger gbenda na? Ka sha u wan mkaanem Ou iko. 
Psalms119:10 M ker U a ishima yam cii, de deen mo, m̱ undu atindi a Ou ga." 
Psalms119:11 M kusu mkaanem Ou ken ishima yam, sha er me er U isholibo ga yô." 
Psalms119:12 We U kuma iwuese, TERE, tesem, akaawan a Ou." 
Psalms119:13 Ka sha zwa wam je, m pase akaaôron a jirigh a sha zwa Wou la cii ye." 
Psalms119:14 M ember sha gbenda u mbampase Ou tsung je, bee er ka sha inyaregh ki ngeen nahan." 
Psalms119:15 Me zer henen sha uiniezwa Ou, me ver ishima sha igbenda You kpaa." 
Psalms119:16 Doom ken ishima u wan akaawan a Ou iko, mkaanem Ou maa hungul mo mayange ga." 
Psalms119:17 Er dedoo a wanakiriki Wou, m̱ lu uma, nahan me wa mkaanem Ou iko." 
Psalms119:18 Bughum ashe, m̱ nenge akaakpilighyol a ken atindiakaa a Ou la." 
Psalms119:19 M ngu shiror shin tar; de yeren mo atindi a Ou ga. 
Psalms119:20 Sar uma wam tsung a akaaôron a Ou a jirigh hanma shighe je. 
Psalms119:21 U zehe a mba ve gengese ayol mba i we ve ifan, mba ve undu atindi a Ou la." 
Psalms119:22 Hilem a iheen man ilyahan kera, gadia m kor mbampase Ou." 
Psalms119:23 Shin er mbatarev vea tema vea zuan zwa sha a mo kpaa, wanakiriki Wou una zeren henen sha akaawan a Ou." 
Psalms119:24 Mbampase Ou kpaa ka iember yam je, shi ka ve kpaa ve hingir mbawasen mo mhen ye." 
Psalms119:25 Uma wam var hen vuulevu, taver uma wam sha mkaanem Ou." 
Psalms119:26 M pase igbenda yam, We kpaa, ungwa imo yam; tesem akaawan a Ou." 
Psalms119:27 Nam m̱ kav gbenda u uiniezwa Ou, sha er m̱ hen kwagh u aeren a Ou a kpilighyol la." 
Psalms119:28 Ishima yinam sha ci u zayol, taver mo sha mkaanem Ou." 
Psalms119:29 Hilem a gbenda u aiegh kera, man shi sha mrumun u sha mhôôn Wou la, nam atindiakaa a Ou." 
Psalms119:30 M tsôr gbenda u mimi, m ver akaaôron a Ou a jirigh sha ishigh yagh." 
Psalms119:31 M var a mbampase Ou, TERE, de nem kunya ga." 
Psalms119:32 Me za ayem sha gbenda u atindi a Ou, gadia U er ishima yam, ngi gbar gbar." 
Psalms119:33 TERE, tesem gbenda u akaawan a Ou, nahan me kuran a zan zan sha mkur je." 
Psalms119:34 Nam mkav, m̱ kuran atindiakaa a Ou, m̱ waan a iko a ishima yam cii." 
Psalms119:35 Erem m̱ zenden sha gbenda u atindi a Ou, gadia ka u u doom ye." 
Psalms119:36 Goom a ishima yam ken mbampase Ou, i̱ de luun sha mtsera u bo ga." 
Psalms119:37 Gemam ashe kera sha u kenger gbilinkwagh, man taver uma wam u zan sha igbenda You." 
Psalms119:38 Kule ityendezwa You a wanakiriki Wou, i i kom mba ve cie U la." 
Psalms119:39 Gema iheen yam, i m cie i la, kera, gadia akaaôron a Ou a jirigh la doo." 
Psalms119:40 Nenge, uiniezwa Ou sarem tsung, taver uma wam u zan sha perapera Wou." 
Psalms119:41 Uerdoo Ou ma ve ve her a mo TERE, ka myom Wou u sha ityendezwa You je la," 
Psalms119:42 sha er me lu a kwagh u me ôr a u a heen mo la yô, gadia m suur sha mkaanem Ou." 
Psalms119:43 De ngohol mo kwaghôron u mimi ken zwa kera ca ca ga, gadia m taver ishima sha akaaôron a Ou a jirigh," 
Psalms119:44 ka nahan man me waan atindiakaa a Ou iko gbem sha won ye. 
Psalms119:45 Man shi me zende gbar gbar kpaa, gadia m ker uiniezwa Ou." 
Psalms119:46 Me ôr kwagh u mbampase Ou sha ishigh ki utor kpaa, kunya ua kôrom ga." 
Psalms119:47 Saan mo iyol a atindi a Ou, a a doom ishima la." 
Psalms119:48 Me kende ave am sha kpaa, sha atindi a Ou a a doom ishima la, gadia U erem m ngu a ishimaverenkeghen." 
Psalms119:49 Umbur mkaanem Ou ma U er a wanakiriki Wou la, gadia U erem m ngu a ishimaverenkeghen." 
Psalms119:50 Ka ishimasurun yam i ken ican yam ne, er mkaanem Ou ma taver uma wam yô." 
Psalms119:51 Mbagengeseyol lu sen mo ibumegh, nahan kpaa, m pav a atindiakaa a Ou ga." 
Psalms119:52 M umbur akaaôron a Ou a jirigh a ngise la, TERE, nahan ishima pever mo." 
Psalms119:53 Ishima vihim tsung, sha ci u mbaaferev mba ve undu atindiakaa a Ou la." 
Psalms119:54 Akaawan a Ou hingir mo atsam a wan, hen ya u m lu shiror her la." 
Psalms119:55 M umbur iti You tugh, TERE, shi m kor atindiakaa a Ou kpaa." 
Psalms119:56 Ka kwagh wam je ne, sha ci u m kor uiniezwa Ou yô." 
Psalms119:57 TER ka kwar wam, m tôndo zwa mer, me kuran akaaôron a Ou." 
Psalms119:58 M zamber We a ishima i môm mer, ma i doo U a mo, zungwem mhôônom sha ityendezwa You la." 
Psalms119:59 M hen sha igbenda yam, m gema angahar a am u zan sha mbampase Ou." 
Psalms119:60 M er fefa, m ngôôr ga, sha u kuran atindi a Ou." 
Psalms119:61 Ikor i mbaaferev kpelegh sha a mo, kpa atindiakaa a Ou hungul mo ga." 
Psalms119:62 Ka m mough ateghôtôutu m wuese We, sha ci u akaaôron a jirigh a Ou a mimi la." 
Psalms119:63 Mo m ngu ijende i mba ve cie U cii, kua mba ve kor uiniezwa Ou yô." 
Psalms119:64 Tar iv a erdoo Wou, TERE, Tesem akaawan a Ou." 
Psalms119:65 U er a wanakiriki Wou dedoo TERE, sha mkaanem Ou." 
Psalms119:66 Tesem mkav u dedoo man kwaghfan, gadia m na atindi a Ou jighjigh." 
Psalms119:67 Zum u ican i lu a erem ga la, m tsume, kpa hegen yô, m ngu wan mkaanem Ou iko." 
Psalms119:68 U doo, man U eren akaadoon kpaa, tesem akaawan a Ou." 
Psalms119:69 Mbagengeseyol wam aie iyol, kpa mo yô, m kor uiniezwa Ou a ishima yam cii." 
Psalms119:70 Ishima ve ngi juhuluu, er ahôm yô, kpa mo yô, m ember sha atindiakaa a Ou." 
Psalms119:71 Doom er ican i erem, sha er m̱ hen akaawan a Ou yô." 
Psalms119:72 Atindiakaa a sha zwa Wou hembam agbenger a zenaria man a azurfa udubu je. 
Psalms119:73 Ka ave Ou a erem man a maghem kpaa ye; nam mkav, m̱ hen atindi a Ou." 
Psalms119:74 Mba ve cie U vea nenge a mo, yô, vea ember, sha er ishimaverenkeghen yam i lu sha mkaanem Ou yô." 
Psalms119:75 M fa, TERE, akaaôron a Ou a jirigh ka a perapera je, man er i lu sha jighjigh Wou man U erem ican je ye." 
Psalms119:76 Erdoo Wou a̱ shi hingir kwagh u surun mo ishima, sha ityendezwa You i U tôndo a wanakiriki Wou la." 
Psalms119:77 Mhôônom ma kôron Ou ma ar her a mo, er me lu uma yô, gadia atindiakaa a Ou ka a, a lu iember yam ye." 
Psalms119:78 Kunya u̱ kôr mbagengeseyol, gadia ve nzughul a mo sha aie, kpa mo yô, me hen kwagh u uiniezwa Ou ken ishima." 
Psalms119:79 Mbacian We ve̱ gema ve̱ va her a mo, sha er ve̱ fa mbampase Ou yô." 
Psalms119:80 Ishima yam i̱ lu vough ken akaawan a Ou, sha er kunya u̱ de kerem ga yô." 
Psalms119:81 Isharen ngim ken ishima sha myom Wou tsung je, m ngu veren ishima keghen mkaanem Ou." 
Psalms119:82 Ashe ngam sha mkaanem Ou tsung; m kaa mer, shi nan je man Ú shi surum ishima ase?" 
Psalms119:83 Gadia m hingir er ka ikpa i sha mnyi nahan, nahan kpaa akaawan a Ou hungul mo ga." 
Psalms119:84 Ayange a wanakiriki Wou sha won a shi nana? Shi nan je man Ú ôr ijir a mba ve tevem a icana? 
Psalms119:85 Mbagengeseyol time ahungwa sha ci wam, ka mba ve we atindiakaa a Ou iko ga je la." 
Psalms119:86 Atindi a Ou cii ka a mimi; ve tôvom a ican a ityôikaa shio, shi wasema!" 
Psalms119:87 Shi kpuaa tsô, ma ve timin shin tar kera, kpa mo yô, m ta uiniezwa Ou kera ga." 
Psalms119:88 Taver uma wam sha erdoo Wou, sha er me kura mpase u sha zwa Wou yô." 
Psalms119:89 Mkaanem Ou TERE, ma dông ken Usha gbem sha won." 
Psalms119:90 Jighjigh Wou ngu sha ikov ikov; U ver tar dông, ngu her;" 
Psalms119:91 ka sha akaawan a Ou ve lu her zan zan nyian ye, gadia akaa cii nga eren We tom." 
Psalms119:92 Ka er atindiakaa a Ou a doom ishima tsung yô, gayô, ma m tim ken ican yam ne." 
Psalms119:93 Uiniezwa Ou vea hungul mo mayange ga, gadia ka sha a ve U taver uma wam ye." 
Psalms119:94 Mo m ngu u Wou, warem, gadia m ker uiniezwa Ou." 
Psalms119:95 Mbaaferev kegh er vea timim, kpa me wa mbampase Ou iko." 
Psalms119:96 M nenge ikighir i hanma kwagh u vough cii, kpa tindi Wou yô, gbangese kpishi." 
Psalms119:97 Atindiakaa a Ou, doom ishima zee! Kam kwagh u shin henen sha mi didi." 
Psalms119:98 Atindi a Ou nam m hemba mbaihomov av kwaghfan, gadia a nga a mo gbem je." 
Psalms119:99 M hemba kaven kwagh a mbatesen av cii, gadia mbampase Ou mbam kwagh u henen sha mi." 
Psalms119:100 M hemba kaven kwagh a mbabeenyol, sha ci u m kor uiniezwa Ou yô." 
Psalms119:101 M kôvor angahar a am kera sha hanma gbenda u ifer, sha er me kura mkaanem Ou yô." 
Psalms119:102 M kaha m undu akaaôron a Ou a jirigh ga, gadia ka We, U tesem ye." 
Psalms119:103 Mkaanem Ou zam zwa zee! Een, a hembam zam zwa a iyough i ken toho kpaa." 
Psalms119:104 Ka sha uiniezwa Ou m zough a mkav ye, ka nahan man m ker hanma gbenda u aiegh ihom ye." 
Psalms119:105 Mkaanem Ou ka imenger i angahar a am, man iwanger i gbenda wam kpaa." 
Psalms119:106 M bum, shi me kure un kpaa, me kuran akaaôron a jirigh a Ou a perapera." 
Psalms119:107 Ican erem tsung je doo ga; taver uma wam TERE, sha mkaanem Ou." 
Psalms119:108 TERE, ma U ngohol nagh ku sha ishima i dedoo ku sha zwa wam ne, shi tesem akaaôron a Ou a jirigh kpaa." 
Psalms119:109 M kusun uma wam ken uwegh agh gbem, nahan kpaa atindiakaa a Ou hungul mo ga." 
Psalms119:110 Mbaaferev hônom, nahan kpaa m kaha m undu uiniezwa Ou ga." 
Psalms119:111 M ngohol mbampase Ou mer ve̱ lu dyako wam gbem, gadia ka ve, ve lu iember i ishima yam ye." 
Psalms119:112 M ver ishima sha u eren akaawan a Ou gbem zan zan mkur je. 
Psalms119:113 M ker mbaasemaahar ihom, kpa atindiakaa a Ou yô, doom ishima." 
Psalms119:114 We U ngu ijiir yam i yeren, man perutya wam kpaa, m ngu veren ishima keghen mkaanem Ou." 
Psalms119:115 Kar nen hen a mo sha, ne mbaerenafer, sha er m̱ kuran atindi a Aôndo wam yô!" 
Psalms119:116 Tuur mo sha mkaanem Ou, m̱ lu uma, m̱ de ve ahenge sha ishima yam i verenkeghen la ga." 
Psalms119:117 Suwem, man me war ye, nahan me waan akaawan a Ou iko gbem." 
Psalms119:118 U venda mba ve tsum ve undu akaawan a Ou cii, gadia ayom a ve la ka aie." 
Psalms119:119 U kough mbaaferev shin tar kera ca ca, er ka hugh nahan, ka nahan man mbampase Ou ve doom ishima ye." 
Psalms119:120 Ikarikase gbidyem iyol sha mciem ma m cie U la, m ngu cian ajiraôron a Ou kpaa." 
Psalms119:121 M er kwagh u a lu vough, man u perapera kpaa, de undun mo sha ikev i mba ve kighir mo a ican la ga." 
Psalms119:122 Lu ishuur u wanakiriki Wou er á kpe un iyol yô; mbagengeseyol ve̱ de kighir mo a ican ga. 
Psalms119:123 Ashe ngam sha myom Wou tsung je, kua mkaanem Ou ma perapera la." 
Psalms119:124 Er a wanakiriki Wou sha erdoo Wou la, man tesem akaawan a Ou kpaa." 
Psalms119:125 Mo m ngu wanakiriki Wou, nam mkav, m̱ fa mbampase Ou." 
Psalms119:126 Kuma pe TER Una er kwagh ve, gadia i vihi atindiakaa a Ou." 
Psalms119:127 Kape i lu man atindi a Ou a doom, a hembem zenaria la, een, hemba zenaria u dedoo kpaa." 
Psalms119:128 Ka nahan man me ver angahar a am jighilii sha uiniezwa Ou cii ye, shi m ker hanma gbenda u aiegh ihom." 
Psalms119:129 Mbampase Ou ka kwagh u kpilighyol, ka nahan man uma wam a kor ve ye." 
Psalms119:130 Mbugh u akaaôron a Ou ne iwanger, man shi ne mba ve lan kwagh mkav kpaa." 
Psalms119:131 M aver zwa gbangese, m ôô tsuree, gadia atindi a Ou gbam ishima." 
Psalms119:132 Gema ishigh ken a mo, zungwem mhôônom, er ka U er a mba iti You i doo ve ishima la nahan." 
Psalms119:133 Ver angahar a am a̱ lu taveraa sha mkaanem Ou, ma injaifer i môm i̱ de ye tor sha a mo ga." 
Psalms119:134 Paam sha mkighir u sha ican i or la, nahan me wa uiniezwa Ou iko." 
Psalms119:135 Er ishigh You ki̱ wanger sha wanakiriki Wou, shi tesem akaawan a Ou kpaa." 
Psalms119:136 Ashe am nga haan mliam er uikuwanmbamngerev mba senen yô, sha ci u ve we atindiakaa a Ou iko ga yô." 
Psalms119:137 TERE, We U ngu u perapera, ajir a Ou a ôron kpaa ka a sha mimi." 
Psalms119:138 U ver mbampase Ou sha perapera man sha mimi tseegh. 
Psalms119:139 Gbashima wam wuam, sha ci u mbaahendanev av hungul akaaôron a Ou yô." 
Psalms119:140 Mkaanem Ou ma wang je, ma doo wanakiriki Wou ishima je." 
Psalms119:141 M ngu kpeghee man i laham kpaa, nahan kpaa uiniezwa Ou hungul mo ga." 
Psalms119:142 Perapera Wou ka perapera u tsôron gbem sha won je, atindiakaa a Ou kpaa ka a mimi." 
Psalms119:143 Zayol kua ican i tsung tserem, kpa atindi a Ou doom ishima tsung." 
Psalms119:144 Mbampase Ou ka mba perapera gbem sha won je; nam mkav, m̱ lu uma." 
Psalms119:145 M yila a ishima yam cii, ungwam TERE! Me kuran akaawan a Ou la." 
Psalms119:146 M yila U; yimam m̱ waan mbampase Ou iko. 
Psalms119:147 Er sev lu a wanger ga tsô, m yila; m ngu veren ishima keghen mkaanem Ou." 
Psalms119:148 Ashe am vande a mbamkor mba utugh, sha u henen sha kwagh u mkaanem Ou." 
Psalms119:149 Ungwa imo yam sha erdoo Wou, taver uma wam sha akaaôron a Ou a jirigh, TERE." 
Psalms119:150 Mba ve ze sha ifer yô, mba van ikua ikua, mba ca a atindiakaa a Ou." 
Psalms119:151 U ngu ikua, TERE, atindi a Ou cii kpaa, ka a mimi je." 
Psalms119:152 M fa ngise je sha kwagh u mbampase Ou, er U ver ve sha er ve̱ lu gbem yô." 
Psalms119:153 Nenge ican yam, yimam, gadia atindiakaa a Ou hungul mo ga." 
Psalms119:154 Ta ken a mo, ôr kwagh wam, paam, taver uma wam sha mkaanem Ou." 
Psalms119:155 Myem ngu ca a mbaaferev, gadia mba keren akaawan a Ou ga." 
Psalms119:156 Mhôônom Ou ma kôron ngee tsô, TERE; taver uma wam sha akaaôron a Ou a jirigh." 
Psalms119:157 Mbatôvon mo a ican man mbaahendanev av ve ngee tsô, nahan kpaa m undu mbampase Ou ga." 
Psalms119:158 M nenge mbaeren kwagh sha icugh la, yô, ishima ndôhôr mo; sha ci u ve we mkaanem Ou iko ga yô." 
Psalms119:159 Nenge er uiniezwa Ou ve doom ishima yô; taver uma wam sha erdoo Wou, TERE." 
Psalms119:160 Mkaanem Ou jimin cii ka kwagh u mimi je, akaaôron a Ou a jirigh a perapera ci ca cii, ka a tsôron sha won je." 
Psalms119:161 Mbatarev gba tôvon mo a ican tsô, ityôikaa lu ga, kpa m cie kwaghôron Wou ken ishima." 
Psalms119:162 M ember tsung sha mkaanem Ou, vough er ka or u nan ye ishar kpishi yô." 
Psalms119:163 Icugh vihim ishima, i ndôhôr mo ishima kpaa, kpa atindiakaa a Ou gema doom ishima." 
Psalms119:164 Ka m wuese We kwa taankaruhar sha iyange i môm, sha ci u akaaôron Ou a jirigh a perapera la." 
Psalms119:165 Mba atindiakaa a Ou a doo ve ishima yô, mba a bem kpishi je, ma kwagh u nan ve gbev mbu nôngon kera ngu ga." 
Psalms119:166 M ngu veren ishima keghen myom Wou, TERE, shi m er sha atindi a Ou kpaa." 
Psalms119:167 Uma wam kor mbampase Ou, ve doom ishima tsung je!" 
Psalms119:168 M kor uiniezwa Ou man mbampase Ou, gadia igbenda yam cii, ngi sha ishigh You." 
Psalms119:169 Mliam am ma mgbôghom sha ishigh You TERE, nam mkav sha mkaanem ou." 
Psalms119:170 Zamber wam ma a mgbôghom sha ishigh You, warem sha mkaanem Ou." 
Psalms119:171 Zwa wam ua wuese nduuluu, gadia U tesen mo akaawan a Ou." 
Psalms119:172 Nombor wam ua wa icam ua ter mkaanem Ou, gadia atindi a Ou cii ka a perapera." 
Psalms119:173 Uwegh Ough ku̱ lu iwasen yam, gadia m tsôr uiniezwa Ou." 
Psalms119:174 M ngu veren ashe sha myom Wou TERE, atindiakaa a Ou kpaa nga iember yam je." 
Psalms119:175 Uma wam a̱ lu uma, a̱ wuese We; akaaôron a Ou a jirigh kpaa, a̱ wasem." 
Psalms119:176 M tsume er iyôngo i i saa yô, ker wanakiriki Wou, gadia atindi a Ou hungul mo ga." 
Psalms120:1 M yila TER ken ican yam i tsung, A ungwam kpaa." 
Psalms120:2 Yima uma wam sha zwa u aiegh, TERE, man sha nombor u icughugh kpaa." 
Psalms120:3 Ka nyi á na u, man ka nyi á seer we, we nombor u tsughun a tsugh ne?" 
Psalms120:4 Ka avaan a horon a or u ageegh kua akausu a gbaaye kpaa. 
Psalms120:5 Kwagh tserem ve, er m lu shiror ken Meseki, er m tem ken utenti mba Kedar yô!" 
Psalms120:6 Uma wam tema ya môm a mba ve ker bem ihom la, caigba yum!" 
Psalms120:7 Mo yô, ka bem a doom ye, kpa zum u ka mea ôr kwagh yô, ve kegh iyol sha num u nôngon. Ka icam i zan iniongo" 
Psalms121:1 M kende ashe am sha iwo: ka han iwasen yam ia va? 
Psalms121:2 Iwasen yam yô, ia va sha TER, Un u A gbe Sha man tar la." 
Psalms121:3 Una de nguhar wou ua dolough ga; u A kor u yô, Una meer mnyam ga." 
Psalms121:4 Nenge, u A kor Iserael yô, Una meer mnyam ga, Una yav kpaa ga." 
Psalms121:5 TER ka orkuran wou, TER ka mure wou u ken uwegh ough ku yanegh;" 
Psalms121:6 oo ua ta u atetan ga, shin uwer tugh kpaa ga." 
Psalms121:7 TER Una kura u sha kwaghbo cii, Una kura uma wou kpaa." 
Psalms121:8 TER Una kura mdugh wou man mnyer wou, hii hegen je, zan zan gbem sha won cii. Ka icam i zan iniongo. Ka i Davidi" 
Psalms122:1 M ember zum u i kaa a mo er: Sé za nen hen iyou i TER yô. 
Psalms122:2 Angahar a ase tile ken ihindagar you, Yerusalem;" 
Psalms122:3 Yerusalem u i maa un er gar u i zough un kpogholoo yô; 
Psalms122:4 henpe ikweior ka i kôndo, ka ikwe i TER je la; ka tindi u i we Iserael, sha u vea za sugh iti i TER yô." 
Psalms122:5 Gadia i ver mkônom ma torom heregh sha ci u ijirigh, ka mkônom ma torom ma hen ya u Davidi je la." 
Psalms122:6 Sôn nen ner: Bem a̱ lu ken Yerusalem; mba u doo ve ishima yô, ka ve, tar ua lagh ve ye." 
Psalms122:7 Bem a̱ lu ken atô u ugil ou, man mkpeyol kpaa ken ayou a tor a ou." 
Psalms122:8 Sha ci u anmgbianev av man akar a am yô, me kaa mer: Bem a̱ lu ken a we." 
Psalms122:9 Sha ci u iyou i TER, Aôndo wase yô, me ker mer, i̱ kpe u iyol. Ka icam i zan iniongo." 
Psalms123:1 M ngu kenden ashe am sha a We, We, u U tem Sha." 
Psalms123:2 Nenge, er ashe a mbashiren nga a lu sha uwegh ku uter vev nahan, man er ashe a wanyekwase nga a lu sha uwegh ku ngô na nahan kape ashe ase kpaa a nengen sha TER, Aôndo wase je la, zan zan Una zungwe se mhôônom." 
Psalms123:3 Zungwe se mhôônom, TERE, zungwe se mhôônom, gadia i laha se je, kuma se iyol gbing gbing." 
Psalms123:4 Kuma uma wase iyol gbing je, a iheen i mba i kpe ve ayol la, man a ilyahan i mbamoronyol kpaa. Ka icam i zan iniongo. Ka i Davidi" 
Psalms124:1 TER Una te ikaa a vese ga yô,—Iserael a̱ kaa er—" 
Psalms124:2 ka er TER A te ikaa a vese yô, gayô, zum u ior mough num a vese la," 
Psalms124:3 ma ve men se uma, zum u ishima i vihi ve a vese tsung la," 
Psalms124:4 mngerem ma ma uv se, iwuhamnger ma i mir a uma wase;" 
Psalms124:5 mngerem ma sha imanger la ma ma mir a uma wase. 
Psalms124:6 I̱ wuese TER, u A ne se se hingir kwagh u tusen a mi sha anyi ve ga la!" 
Psalms124:7 Uma wase war er inyon i ka i war sha kwar u mbahônoninyom nahan; kwar tôndo, se, se war." 
Psalms124:8 Iwasen yase ngi ken iti i TER, u A gbe Sha man tar yô. Ka icam i zan iniongo" 
Psalms125:1 Ve mba ve suur sha TER yô, mba er uwo u Shion nahan, u u tenger ga, u gbe lun gbem sha won yô." 
Psalms125:2 Er iwo i i kase Yerusalem nahan, kape TER kpaa A kase ior Nav la, hii hegen je, zan zan gbem sha won cii." 
Psalms125:3 Gadia tôgh ku iferegh kua tema sha tar u i ne mbaperapera la ga, sha u mbaperapera ve̱ de naregh ave, ve̱ bende a ifer ga yô." 
Psalms125:4 TERE, er dedoo a mbadedoo, kua mba asema a ve a lu jighilii yô." 
Psalms125:5 Kpaa mba ve hulugh ve yem uihurenmbaigbendav vev yô, TER Una due a ve kera a mbaerenifer imôngo. Bem a̱ lu sha Iserael! Ka icam i zan iniongo" 
Psalms126:1 Zum u TER za va a mba ve lu hiden ken Shion la yô, se lu er mba mnyam ma cie ve yô." 
Psalms126:2 Shighe la zwa wase iv a ahan, man nombor wase a icam i wan; zum la i lu ôron ken akuraior er: TER er ve uzegembaakaav ve." 
Psalms126:3 TER er se uzegembaakaav, se ember tsung." 
Psalms126:4 TERE, gema mlu wase er iwagh i ken tar u Imbusutariyan yô." 
Psalms126:5 Mba ve lee a mliam iker yô, vea sunda a iember tsung." 
Psalms126:6 U nan zenden a mliam ashe, nan lu a ivor i tan la yô, nana hide a a iember a aile a nan ave kpee je. Ka icam i zan iniongo, i Solomon"

Psalms127:2 Ka gbilin tsô ne nderen pepe dindee shi ne yaven fefa ga tugh, ne ye kwaghyan u sha tom u ican ye, gadia ka A na mbadoon Un ishima ken mnya." 
Psalms127:3 Nenge, ônov mba nomso ka dyako u TER A ne yô, man kwagh u a dugh ken sagh kpaa ka injar i A ne yô." 
Psalms127:4 Er avaan ka a lu sha uwegh ku orageegh nahan, kape ônov mba nomso mba i mar ve, mbamaren vev ve lu iyev her, ve lu la." 
Psalms127:5 Saan or u gbande u nan a iv a ve la, iyol! kunya ua kôr ve ga, zum u vea ôron kwagh a mbaihomov vev sha hundagar yô. Ka icam i zan iniongo"

Psalms132:1 TERE, umbur Davidi kua ican na cii;" 
Psalms132:2 er a bum a TER, man a tsegha zwa a Uageegh u Yakob yô, er:"

Psalms132:4 me keer mnyam ashe ga, mnyam ma meer tsô kpaa, maa vam sha akurashee ga," 
Psalms132:5 saa me vande zuan TER a ijiir ve, ijiir i teman sha ci u Uageegh u Yakob." 
Psalms132:6 Nenge, se ungwa kwagh ne ken Eferata, se zua a mi ken ikôngough ki Yaar." 
Psalms132:7 Sé za nen hen ijiir Na i teman, sé gure nen inya hen anar Na u tan angahar a mi." 
Psalms132:8 TERE, mough, za hen ijiir You i memen, We vea areki u agee a Ou la!" 
Psalms132:9 I̱ cir upristi Ou perapera iyol; mba i doo U a ve la, ve̱ ember tsung je." 
Psalms132:10 De vende un u U shigh un mkurem la ga, sha ci u wanakiriki Wou Davidi."

Psalms132:14 Ingin ka ijiir Yam i memen ker gbem sha won je ne, ka ker Me tema ye, gadia i sarem yum." 
Psalms132:15 Me ver kwaghyan na dedoo, Me na mbaatsanev nav kwaghyan una kuma ve." 
Psalms132:16 Upristi nav kpaa, Me cir ve myom iyol, mba i doo Un a ve la kpaa, vea ember tsung je." 
Psalms132:17 Ka keregh je man Me er korough kua mende Davidi ye; M sôr un u M shigh un mkurem la imenger.

Psalms135:1 Haleluya. Wuese nen iti i TER; wuese nen ne mbayev mba TER," 
Psalms135:2 ne mba ne til ken iyou i TER, ken ityembe i sha ishigh ki iyou i Aôndo wase;" 
Psalms135:3 wuese nen TER, gadia TER doo, wa nen atsam a wuese iti Na, gadia i doo kpishi."

Psalms135:5 Gadia mo m fa er TER A hembe lun a icivir cii, man er Ter wase A hembe mbaaôndo mbagenev cii kpaa yô." 
Psalms135:6 TER eren hanma kwagh u a doo Un ishima yô, sha aôndo, man shin tar, man shin uzegembamngerev kua shin aiv kpaa." 
Psalms135:7 Ka A er tulugh a kôndo sha, sha akighir a tar je; man ka A er inyiar sha ci u ura; shi A due a ahumbe ken iuna Na kpaa."

Psalms135:9 A tindi uivande man akaakpilighyol ken atô wou, we Igipiti, sha Farao kua sha mbayev nav cii." 
Psalms135:10 A hemba akuraior kpishi, shi A wua utor mba ageev kpaa;" 
Psalms135:11 Shihon, tor u Mbaamor, man Ogo, tor u Bashan, kua ityartor i Kanaan cii kpaa."

Psalms135:13 TERE, iti You yô, ka i tsôron gbem sha won; TERE, m-umbur u á umbur We kpaa, á lu sha ikov ikov." 
Psalms135:14 Gadia TER Una ôr ior Nav ijir sha mimi, mhôônom maa kôr Un a mbayev Nav." 
Psalms135:15 Ieev mbi atôatyev yô, ka azurfa man zenaria, tom u sha ave a ior." 
Psalms135:16 Mbi a ijô, kpa mbi er kwagh ga; mbi a ashe, kpa mbi nengen ga;" 
Psalms135:17 mbi a ato, kpa mbi ongo ga; shin ma iôôn kpaa ngi ken ijô i mbi ga." 
Psalms135:18 Mba ve gbe mbi vea hingir er mbi nahan, hanmô u nan suur sha mbi yô."

Psalms135:20 we, ya u Levi, wuese TER; ne mba ne cie TER yô, wuese nen TER."

Psalms136:8 iyange sha u i̱ tema tor atetan, gadia erdoo Na ka u tsôron gbem sha won;"

Psalms139:20 ve mba ve hendan a We sha ifer, ve teren iti You sha aie la."

Psalms139:22 M kôr ve ihom sha boihom je; ve hingir mbaihomov av.

Psalms140:2 mba ve henen akaabo ken asema a ve, man ve kohol iyol ayange ayange sha ci u num yô." 
Psalms140:3 Ve hor iniombor ve er ka i iyô nahan, megh ku igbindegh ku ve sha ijô." 
Psalms140:4 Kuram, TERE, sha ave a mbaaferev; kuram sha uipirambaiorov, mba ve we ishima u vea mgbegha angahar a am kera yô."

Psalms140:7 AÔNDO, Tere, We, agee a myom wam, Ú cirim ityough sha iyange i utya."

Psalms141:2 Msen wam a̱ lu U sha ishi er nagh ku humandoon nahan, man shi mkende u ave am sha kpaa, er nagh ku nan ku aikighe yô." 
Psalms141:3 Ver mkor sha zwa wam TERE, kura ityumbuzwaagh yam." 
Psalms141:4 De kera goom a ishima yam er ia za ken kwagh u bo ga, er me hingir u eren aferakaa a ior mba ve eren ifer la imôngo, ga yô; de rumun Wer, m̱ ya akaanyohon a ve la kpaa ga." 
Psalms141:5 De orperapera nana̱ gbidyem, á lum kwagh u dedoo, nana̱ zôhô a mo kpaa, á lum er ka mkurem ma sha ityou nahan, ityough yagh kia venda ma ga; kpa me eren msen her, shin er ve eren afer nahan kpaa;" 
Psalms141:6 zum u á haa mbaajiriv vev shin bo sha kpe u vandegh yô, vea ungwa akaaôron am er a doo yô."

Psalms142:2 M ngu pasen ican yam sha ishigh Nagh, m ngu ôron Un zayol wam." 
Psalms142:3 Zum u jijingi wam ure ken a mo yô, We U fa gbenda wam. Sha gbenda u m zenden sha mi la, ve hônom kwagh sha u." 
Psalms142:4 M jinge ken iyan kpa ma or u wan mo iko nan ngu ga, ape waren ngum ga, ma or u wan uma wam iko, nan ngu ga." 
Psalms142:5 M yila U TERE, m kaa mer: Ka We U lu ijiir yam i waren, kua kwar wam u ken tar u mbaumav kpaa ye." 
Psalms142:6 Wa iko sha mliam am, gadia m ngu seelee; yimam sha ikev i mbatôvon mo a ican, gadia ve hembam agee."

Psalms143:1 Ungwa msen wam, TERE, ver ato sha uzamber av; ungwam sha jighjigh Wou man sha perapera Wou kpaa." 
Psalms143:2 De er wanakiriki Wou ijir ga, gadia ma or u umace nan ngu a ishô sha ishigh You ga." 
Psalms143:3 Gadia orihom tôv uma wam ityô a ican, a kighir uma wam hen inya je, a erem m tsa ken ajiir a imegh, er mba ve vande kpen kera ica i gbe yô." 
Psalms143:4 Jijingi wam ure ken a mo, ishima kondom ker cii." 
Psalms143:5 M umbur ayange a ngise la, m hen kwagh sha aeren a Ou cii, m hen kwagh ken ishima sha tom u ave Ou je." 
Psalms143:6 M ngu naregh ave am hen a We, imura kôr uma wam a We er inyaombor yô. Sela." 
Psalms143:7 Ungwam fefa je, TERE; kwagh gba hemban jijingi wam ve! De yeren mo ishigh You ga, m̱ de hingir er mba ve sen shin ihungwa nahan ga." 
Psalms143:8 Erem m̱ ungwa erdoo Wou pepe, gadia ka sha a We m suur ye. Tesem gbenda u me za yô, gadia ka sha a We m veren ishima ye." 
Psalms143:9 Yimam, TERE, sha ikev i mbaihomov av, ka hen We m va yer ye." 
Psalms143:10 Tesem, m̱ er ishima You, gadia We U ngu Aôndo wam; Jijingi Wou u dedoo la, A̱ za a mo ken tar u u lu vaanaa." 
Psalms143:11 Taver uma wam, TERE, sha ci u iti You; sha perapera Wou la, dugh uma wam ken ican sha." 
Psalms143:12 Sha erdoo Wou la, wua mbaihomov av, tim mba ve kerem ihom cii kera, gadia mo m ngu wanakiriki Wou je. Ka Pasalmi u Davidi" 
Psalms144:1 I̱ wuese TER, vande wam, u A tese ave am ityav mbi nôngon, man ahôaveegh am kpaa num u nôngon ne." 
Psalms144:2 Erdoo wam man iyouutya yam, gôgôyou wam, man Oryiman wam kpaa, perutya wam, man Un u m suur sha a Na, u A gem a ior av, ve hingir sha ikev yam yô." 
Psalms144:3 TERE, or ngu nyi man U fe nana? man wan u or kpaa, er U we nan iko yô?" 
Psalms144:4 Or ngu er ka humbe nahan, ayange a nan nga er mure u a karen kera fefa nahan." 
Psalms144:5 Nerem a Usha Ou, TERE, hungwa shin inya, bende a iwo, i̱ due mnyim." 
Psalms144:6 Haa inyiar, sambe ve, ker avaan a Ou, nzughul a ve;" 
Psalms144:7 naregh uwegh Ough Sha, va yimam, dughum ken uzegembamngerev, ken ikev i atôatyev la," 
Psalms144:8 mba zwa ve u er kwagh u aiegh, uwegh vegh ku yanegh kpaa ku lu uwegh ku yanegh ku icughugh yô." 
Psalms144:9 Me wa U icam i he, Aôndo; ka sha adiguve u ingyanyinya pue me wa atsam a wuese We ye," 
Psalms144:10 We u U ne utor mhembe, U yem wanakiriki Wou Davidi sha sanker u bo la." 
Psalms144:11 Yimam, dughum sha ikev i atôatyev, mba zwa ve u er kwagh u aiegh, uwegh vegh ku yanegh kpaa ku lu uwegh ku yanegh ku icughugh yô." 
Psalms144:12 Ônov asev mba nomso, ve̱ hingir er agumaikon a a vese doo doo ken iyev vev je; ônov asev mba kasev kpaa, ve̱ lu er awen a sha zongo, a i koo a doo doo er ka sha ci u iyou i tor nahan;" 
Psalms144:13 Iuna yase i̱ iv, i̱ iv a hanma iyiagh; ilev yasev kpaa mbi̱ mar udubu man udubu pue, mbi̱ ngee ken akôngo a ase;" 
Psalms144:14 ibua yase kpaa, i̱ penda i ikav mbi vesen; i̱ de peven gilgar ga, mdugh kpaa i̱ de dugh ga, ivaa i gbidyen kpaa, i̱ de lu hen ityembe yase ga." 
Psalms144:15 Saan ior mba ve lu a imbamlu ne iyol je, een, saan ior mba TER A lu Aôndo ve la, iyol. Ka Pasalmi u iwuese, u Davidi" 
Psalms145:1 Me civir We, Tor, Aôndo wam me wuese iti You gbem sha won." 
Psalms145:2 Hanma iyange me wuese we, me wuese iti You gbem sha won," 
Psalms145:3 TER hemba cii, A kuma iwuese kpishi je, icivir Na kpaa gande u kaven." 
Psalms145:4 Kov ugen ua wuese ityom You a kov ugen, ua pase aeren a Ou a ageegh." 
Psalms145:5 Me pase kwagh u iengem i icivir You i hemban la, man shi aeren a Ou a kpilighyol." 
Psalms145:6 Ior vea ôr kwagh u aeren a Ou a ageegh a a cier iyol la, mo kpaa me pase mhembe Wou er U hembe cii yô." 
Psalms145:7 Vea ôr nduuluu vea umbur mdoom Ou ma vesen, vea wa icam genger genger vea ter perapera Wou kpaa." 
Psalms145:8 TER mgbough a mrumun u sha mhôôn man mhôônom ma zungwen kpaa, ishima vihin Un fefa ga, erdoo Na ngee wuee." 
Psalms145:9 TER eren dedoo a ior cii; mhôônom ma ker Un a ityom Na cii. 
Psalms145:10 Ityom You cii ia wuese We, TERE; mba i doo U a ve la, vea wuese We;" 
Psalms145:11 vea ôr kwagh u iengem i tartor Wou, vea ter agee a Ou kpaa;" 
Psalms145:12 sha er á pase ônov mba iorov aeren a Na a ageegh, kua iengem i icivir i tartor Na la kpaa." 
Psalms145:13 Tartor Wou ka icôrontartor je, Ú tema tor Wou sha ikov ikov cii." 
Psalms145:14 TER ka A kôr mba ve gbe la cii, kenden a mba ve lu ngugh ngugh la sha." 
Psalms145:15 Ashe a uuma cii nga sha a We, U ne ve kwaghyan sha ashighe ashighe." 
Psalms145:16 U bugh uwegh Ough, U ne hanma kwagh u uma sha isharen na, ka kom un." 
Psalms145:17 TER eren perapera sha igbenda Na cii, man shi eren dedoo ken ityom Na cii kpaa." 
Psalms145:18 TER ngu ikua ikua a mba ve yer Un cii, mba ve yer Un sha mimi la cii." 
Psalms145:19 Una na mba ve cie Un la kwagh u a sar ve yô, man shi Una ungwa mliam vem, Una yima ve kpaa." 
Psalms145:20 TER kor mba A doo ve ishima la cii, kpa mbaaferev yô, Una tim ve kera." 
Psalms145:21 Zwa wam ua ôron kwagh u iwuese i TER; uuma cii ve̱ wuese icighanti Na gbem sha won. 
Psalms146:1 Haleluya. Wuese TER, we uma wam." 
Psalms146:2 Me wuese TER, sha ayange a m lu uma ne, me wa atsam me wuese Aôndo wam, sha ayange a m hile lu her ne." 
Psalms146:3 De suur nen sha mbatarev, sha wan u or u iwasen i lu her a na ga la ze;" 
Psalms146:4 zum u iôôn i nan ka ia due yô, nan shi nan hide hen inya i nan, sha iyange la je mbamhen mba nan saa ishe." 
Psalms146:5 Saan or u Aôndo u Yakob A lu iwasen i nan la, iyol, u ishimaverenkeghen i nan kpaa, i lu sha TER, Aôndo u nan yô," 
Psalms146:6 u A gbe Sha man tar, kua zegemnger man akaa a a lu shimi cii kpaa yô, u A lu jighjigh gbem sha won," 
Psalms146:7 u A er ijir i mimi sha ci u mba i kighir ve a ican yô; u A ne mbagenev kwaghyan. TER pasen mbakwarev, toho," 
Psalms146:8 TER bughun ashe a mbaapirashe, TER kenden a mba ve lu ngugh ngugh la sha, mbaperapera doo TER ishima." 
Psalms146:9 TER kor ushirmbaiorov, wese ancôgholov man kasev mba côgholov, kpa nzughul a gbenda u mbaaferev." 
Psalms146:10 TER Una tema tor gbem sha won. Shion, Aôndo wou ngu sha ikov ikov je. Haleluya." 
Psalms147:1 Wuese TER, gadia doo u wan atsam wuese Aôndo wase, gadia ka kwagh u doon tsung, iwuese ka kwagh u doon." 
Psalms147:2 TER maan Yerusalem, ka A kohol mba i te ve ken Iserael kera la, imôngo." 
Psalms147:3 Ka A sôr mba asema a vihi ve tsung la, A kange ve avav." 
Psalms147:4 A ôr iyenge i asan, A ii a ati cii." 
Psalms147:5 Ter wase hemba cii, A taver agee kpaa, mfe Na ngu a ikighir ga." 
Psalms147:6 TER suwe mbaasemaleghlegh la, ka A shirigh a mbaaferev inya." 
Psalms147:7 Wa nen icam, ter nen TER a ishughun, wa nen atsam a wuese Aôndo wase sha adiguve," 
Psalms147:8 Un u A cir kwavaôndo sha abeen la, A kohol ura sha u nôôn sha tar, A ne toho u mende sha iwo," 
Psalms147:9 A ne ishôso kwaghyan u i, kua ônov mba gugôô kpaa, zum u ka vea vaan la." 
Psalms147:10 Un ember sha agee a nyinya la ga, angahar a or kpaa doo Un ga." 
Psalms147:11 Mba ve cie TER yô, ve doo Un ishima, kua mba ve veren asema, ve keghen erdoo Na la." 
Psalms147:12 We Yerusalem, wuese TER, wuese Aôndo wou, we Shion." 
Psalms147:13 Gadia A taver uishindan mba ucivir mba ihindagar you, A ver ônov ou ken a we doo doo;" 
Psalms147:14 A na bem ken tar wou cii, A na u iyiav mbi hemban doon, kuma u gbing gbing." 
Psalms147:15 A tindi imo Na shin tar, mkaanem Nam ma zan fefa je." 
Psalms147:16 Ka A haa senou er aive a iyôngo nahan, ka A tsenda avure a a kôrough sha wuhe la er ka mtwem nahan." 
Psalms147:17 Ka A kende mngerem Nam ma ma kôrough sha wuhe la kera, er ka avurakaa nahan; ka an je nana cihi á tile hen mndorom Nama?" 
Psalms147:18 Ka A tindi mkaanem Nam ma va sough ve, A er ahumbe Na, a va pever, man mngerem ma kuwa ye." 
Psalms147:19 A tesen Yakob mkaanem Nam, man Iserael kpaa akaawan a Na man ajir a Na a ôron." 
Psalms147:20 Akuraior agen cii, A er a i mô nahan ga, a fa ajiraôron a Na kpaa ga. Haleluya." 
Psalms148:1 Haleluya. Wuese nen TER, ne mba ne lu sha Usha shaala, wuese nen Un sha ajiir a a lu sha la." 
Psalms148:2 Wuese nen Un ne mbatyomov Nav mba Shaav cii, wuese nen Un ne akum a Na cii." 
Psalms148:3 Wuese nen Un, we iyange man uwer kpaa; wuese nen Un ne asan a tan iwanger cii." 
Psalms148:4 Wuese nen Un ne Usha mba ne hembe gban ca la cii, ne mngerem ma sha Usha kpaa." 
Psalms148:5 Ve̱ wuese iti i TER, gadia Un A kaa man i gba ve ye," 
Psalms148:6 A ver ve er ve̱ lu heregh gbem sha won, A wa tindi u mô ve môm una per ga yô." 
Psalms148:7 Wuese nen TER shin tar, ne ishôso i vesen i shin zegemnger kua aiv cii kpaa," 
Psalms148:8 usu man ura u awomboogh man senou man irkpiigh, man uraahumbe u u eren sha mkaanem Nam vough yô;" 
Psalms148:9 iwo man agungu cii, ikon i umen atam kua usedar cii kpaa;" 
Psalms148:10 inyamtoho man uzendenya cii, akaa a a kper a kpela inya man inyon i purugh cii kpaa;" 
Psalms148:11 utor mba tarev man akuraior cii kpaa, mbatarev man mbaajiriv mba shin tar cii kpaa;" 
Psalms148:12 ikaior kua mbayevkasev, utsembaiorov man mbayev kpaa;" 
Psalms148:13 ve̱ wuese iti i TER, gadia ka iti Na tseegh i kende i sha ye, iengem Na ngi sha, kar tar kua Sha kpaa." 
Psalms148:14 A kende a korough sha, sha ci u ior Nav, ka iwuese sha ci u mba i doo Un a ve la cii, ka ônov mba Iserael mba ve mgbôghom a na ikua je la. Haleluya." 
Psalms149:1 Haleluya. Wa nen icam i he i wuese TER, wuese Un ken mkohol u uicighan Nav la." 
Psalms149:2 Iserael a̱ ember ken Un u A gbe un la, ônov mba Shion kpaa, ve̱ ember Tor ve." 
Psalms149:3 Ve̱ wuese iti Na, ve̱ tsuwe amar, ve̱ wa atsam a wuese Un a gbande u kuhwan kua adiguve kpaa." 
Psalms149:4 Gadia doo TER a ior Nav, Una wuha mbaasemaleghlegh iyol sha myom." 
Psalms149:5 Uicighan Nav ve̱ ember iengem gur gur, ve̱ ember sha ugambe vev gur gur." 
Psalms149:6 Iwuese i Aôndo i̱ lu ken gôngor ve, man sanker u esen akur cii, a̱ lu sha ikev ve," 
Psalms149:7 sha u oron iyev sha akuraior, man u tsahan ior kpaa;" 
Psalms149:8 sha u kangen utor vev sha mshir, man atiator a ve kpaa sha ahye a iyôô," 
Psalms149:9 sha u ôron ve ijir i i vande ngeren yô! Kwagh la una hingir icivir i mba i doo Un a ve la cii. Haleluya. 
Psalms150:1 Haleluya. Wuese nen Aôndo ken icighanjiir Na, wuese nen Un sha kwavaôndo Na u ageegh la." 
Psalms150:2 Wuese nen Un sha aeren a Na a ageegh, wuese nen Un sha mhembe Na u A hembe cii la." 
Psalms150:3 Wuese nen Un sha korough ku tôngon, wuese nen Un sha adiguve u vesen man u kiriki," 
Psalms150:4 wuese nen Un sha gbande u kuhwan kua amar a tsuwen kpaa, wuese nen Un sha akaa a kuhwan sha ingyanyinya kua akaa a tôngon kpaa," 
Psalms150:5 wuese nen Un sha ukwen mba kaan amo wang je, wuese nen Un sha ukwen mba kaan amo taver taver." 
Psalms150:6 Hanma kwagh u a lu a iôôn tsô yô a̱ wuese TER. Haleluya. 
Proverbs1:1 Anzaakaa a Solomon wan u Davidi tor u Iserael: 
Proverbs1:2 Sha u i̱ fa kwaghfan kua ityesen, man i̱ kav akaaôron a sha mkav kpaa yô;" 
Proverbs1:3 Sha u i̱ ngohol ityesen sha ieren i sha kwaghfan, perapera man ijirôron i sha mimi, kua m-er u vough;" 
Proverbs1:4 Sha u nan orlanenkwagh m-er u sha uee, man wanyekwaor mfe kua m-er u sha inja;" 
Proverbs1:5 Sha u orfankwagh nana̱ ungwa nana̱ seer mhen, orkavenkwagh kpaa nana̱ ar sha mbamhen mba mimi;" 
Proverbs1:6 Sha u kaven injakwagh man kwagh u tesen ikav, ka akaaôron a mbafankwagh kua mkaanem vem ma cimin je la." 
Proverbs1:7 Mcie u cian TER, ka mhii u kwaghfan je la, kpa mbalanenkwagh yô, ve laha kwaghfan kua ityesen." 
Proverbs1:8 Wan wam, ungwan ityesen i teru, tindi u ngôu kpaa, de te un kera ga;" 
Proverbs1:9 Gadia vea hingir we kwagh u hweegh sha icul, kua mshirim sha mon wou kpaa." 
Proverbs1:10 Wan wam aluer aferaior aa mee u yô, de rumun ga." 
Proverbs1:11 Aluer vea kaa er: Va sé za kegh sha u haan awambe inya, se dugh ashe ken myer sha or ishôôgh, ikerave kpaa ngi ga;" 
Proverbs1:12 Sé mena ve uma er Sheol nahan, a agee a ve iyol her, er ka mba ve senen shin ihungwa nahan;" 
Proverbs1:13 Sé va zua a akaa a taver ishe atô kposo kposo, sé iv ishar ken uya asev." 
Proverbs1:14 Yô, nyôr nongo a vese, se cii ikpanyar yase ia lu i môm." 
Proverbs1:15 Wan wam, de zough gbenda a ve ga, dugh nguhar wou sha gbenda ve kera" 
Proverbs1:16 Gadia angahar a ve nga ze ayem sha u za eren ifer, mba eren fefa sha u za haan awambe inya." 
Proverbs1:17 Gadia u hônon to ka gbilinkwagh sha ashe a hanma inyon; 
Proverbs1:18 kpa mban yô, ka awambe ve ayol a ve je ve keghen ye, mba dughun ashe ken myer sha uma ve ayol a ve." 
Proverbs1:19 Kape igbenda i hanma or u yan mtsera u bo i lu la; ka a ngohol uma u mba ve lu a mi la kera. 
Proverbs1:20 Kwaghfan yô, ngu yôôn kwagh sha gbenda u ken gar, ka sha ityembegar a genger imo na ye," 
Proverbs1:21 ngu yilan sha akahar a igbenda, hen ape nyôron sha ihinda ken gar la, a pasen akaaôron a na her:" 
Proverbs1:22 Ne mbalanenkwagh, ka hanma shighe je lanegh kua de saren ne; man mbapuunakaa kpaa kwaghpuun una de doon ve; abumeaior kpaa aa de u vendan mfe?" 
Proverbs1:23 Wa nen myange wam iko, tsô me haa ne jijingi wam, me pase ne akaaôron am." 
Proverbs1:24 Er m yer man ne venda u ungwan yô, m dugh uwegh, kpa or môm wa iko her ga," 
Proverbs1:25 kpa ne ta mhen wam kera, ne rumun myange wam mayange ga," 
Proverbs1:26 mo kpaa, sha iyange i ican yen yô, me se a se, me naha tar zum u mciem maa ta ne iyol la;" 
Proverbs1:27 zum u mciem maa ta sha a ven er uraahumbe nahan, man mtim wen una ta sha a ven er hiar yô, zum u ishimanyian kua zayol vea tser ne yô," 
Proverbs1:28 zum la vea yilam, kpa me bugh zwa ga, vea kerem sha gbashima je, kpa vea zua a mo ga." 
Proverbs1:29 Gadia ve venda mfe, mcie u cian TER kpaa, ve tsuwa ga," 
Proverbs1:30 ve rumun mhen wam mayange ga, ve laha myange wam cii kera," 
Proverbs1:31 nahan vea ya ibo sha gbenda ve la, shi vea ide sha mbamhen vev." 
Proverbs1:32 Gadia ishimahunden i mbalanenkwagh ia wua ve, mkpeyol u abumeaior kpaa una tim a kera." 
Proverbs1:33 Kpa hanma or u nan ver ato her a mo yô, nana tema doo doo, ishima ia yôhôl nan, nana kera lu a mciem ma cian ican la ga." 
Proverbs2:1 Wan wam, aluer u ngohol akaaôron am, man u koso atindi am her a we," 
Proverbs2:2 je, er u ver ato ou sha kwaghfan, u ver ishima you sha mkav yô," 
Proverbs2:3 een, aluer wea yila mkav, wea genger imo sha u keren mkav yô," 
Proverbs2:4 aluer wea ker un er azurfa nahan, man wea ker un er akaa a injaa a i yer yô," 
Proverbs2:5 nahan ú kav mcie u cian TER, mfe u fan Aôndo kpaa, ú zua a mi." 
Proverbs2:6 Gadia TER ne kwaghfan, mfe kua mkav mba dugh ken zwa Na;" 
Proverbs2:7 ka A veren myom sha ci u mbaperapera, Un ka perutya u mba ve zenden sha mimi yô;" 
Proverbs2:8 ka A kura igbenda i mimi, shi A sôron gbenda u mba i doo Un a ve la." 
Proverbs2:9 Nahan ú kav perapera kua mimi man m-er u vough, een, hanma gbenda u dedoo kpaa." 
Proverbs2:10 Gadia kwaghfan una nyôr u ken ishima, mfe una doo u ken uma wou;" 
Proverbs2:11 m-er u sha inja una kuran we, mkav kpaa una kumban we," 
Proverbs2:12 sha u á yima u sha gbenda u ifer, sha ikev i ior mba ôron akaadang;" 
Proverbs2:13 mba ka ve undu igbenda i perapera, sha u zenden ken akaa a imegh la;" 
Proverbs2:14 mba ve ember sha u eren ifer, ka doon ve iyol a ifer i dang;" 
Proverbs2:15 mba igbenda ve i hur i te aningir, mba eren dang ken zende ve;" 
Proverbs2:16 sha u á yima u sha ikev i kwase u u fe nan ga yô, ka kwase u i fe nan ga, u nan er kwagh sha zwanyohon yô," 
Proverbs2:17 u nan gbihi ikar u nan u uye la, man ikuryan i Aôndo u nan kpaa i hungul nan;" 
Proverbs2:18 gadia ya u nan ngu hungwan shin ku, igbenda i nan kpaa i sen shin ujijingi mba mbakpenev;" 
Proverbs2:19 mbazan her a na cii, mô hir ga, mba ar sha igbenda i uma kpaa ga;" 
Proverbs2:20 sha u ú zenden sha gbenda u ior mba mimi, man ú karen sha igbenda i mbaperapera" 
Proverbs2:21 gadia mbaperapera vea tema sha tar, man mbajighjigh kpaa vea tema sha u gbem." 
Proverbs2:22 Kpa aferaior yô, á tim a sha tar kera, man mbakoron ior ndiar ave kpaa, á wuhe ve kera." 
Proverbs3:1 Wan wam, ityesen yam i̱ de hungul we ga, ishima you i̱ waan atindi am iko," 
Proverbs3:2 gadia vea seer we ayange á ngee, man anyom a uma kua bem kpaa." 
Proverbs3:3 Erdoo man mimi ve̱ de undun we ga, har ve sha mon wou, nger ve sha kpande u ishima you," 
Proverbs3:4 ka nahan man ú zua a mrumun man mkav u dedoo, sha ishigh ki Aôndo kua ki iorov kpaa ye." 
Proverbs3:5 Suur sha TER a ishima you cii, de yier sha mkav wou ga." 
Proverbs3:6 Umbur Un sha ijende you cii, Un kpaa Una kôôm igbenda you." 
Proverbs3:7 De nengen iyol you wer, u ngu orfankwagh ga, cia TER, pav a ifer kpaa;" 
Proverbs3:8 kwagh ne una na mkpeyol sha iyol you, man myôhôryol ken akuhe a ou." 
Proverbs3:9 Civir TER sha inyaregh you, man sha iyiav mbi tsutswav mbi u zough a mi cii," 
Proverbs3:10 ka nahan man iuna you ia iv kpishi ye, ihungwa you i shoghol atam a wain shimi, ia iv a wain u he je á haa inya." 
Proverbs3:11 Wan wam de lahan mtsaha u TER ga, ishima i̱ de vihin we sha myange Na kpaa ga;" 
Proverbs3:12 gadia or u nan doo TER ishima yô, ka nan a tsahan nan ye, er ter, ka nan er a wan u doon nan nahan." 
Proverbs3:13 Saan or u nan zough a kwaghfan la iyol, kua or u nan zough a mkav kpaa," 
Proverbs3:14 gadia kasua na hemba doon a u azurfa, mtser na kpaa hemba zenaria u wang." 
Proverbs3:15 A hemba urubi ishe, akaa a a sar u la cii, ma kwagh u a kom sha mi ngu ga." 
Proverbs3:16 Ayange a ngeen sha won, nga ken uwegh nagh ku yanegh; ken uwegh nagh ku imesegh kpaa, inyaregh ki ker kua icivir kpaa." 
Proverbs3:17 Igbenda na ka igbenda i dedoo je, igbenda na cii kpaa ka i bem." 
Proverbs3:18 Ngu kon u uma sha ci u mba ve ker sha mi la; or u nan kusu un yô, saan nan iyol." 
Proverbs3:19 TER er tar sha kwaghfan; ka sha mkav kpaa A taver Usha ye. 
Proverbs3:20 Ka sha mfe Na man aiv a mnger a ande sha man Usha kpaa ve hee avure ye. 
Proverbs3:21 Wan wam, de kera deen ve, ve̱ karen hen ashe ou kera ga, waan kwaghfan u mimi iko man m-er u sha inja kpaa," 
Proverbs3:22 ka nahan man vea hingir uma ken jijingi wou, man kwagh u hweegh sha mon wou kpaa ye." 
Proverbs3:23 Nahan ú za sha gbenda wou doo doo, nguhar wou kpaa ua kema kera ga." 
Proverbs3:24 Shighe u ú yav inya yô, ú cia kwagh ga, mimi je ú yav, ú gba mnyam doo doo." 
Proverbs3:25 De cie kwagh u cieryol u á va bur a bur la ga, kua mtim u mbaaferev shighe u una va yô," 
Proverbs3:26 gadia TER Una hingir we ishuur wou, Una kura u angahar i̱ de kombor a ga." 
Proverbs3:27 De nyum u eren kwagh u dedoo a mba ve kom un la ga, zum u u lu a tahav mbu eren un yô." 
Proverbs3:28 De kaan a or u wan ndor a we wer: Za, man ú hile, kper tsô me na u, ga—er kwagh la a lu sha ikev you yô." 
Proverbs3:29 De we kwaghbo ishima a or u wan ndor a we, er nan lu a we doo doo la ga." 
Proverbs3:30 De gbe eren num a or a ityôikaa ga, ga, aluer nana er u kwaghbo ga yô." 
Proverbs3:31 De tem mlu u ipiraor ga, man shi de tsough ma gbenda u nan kpaa ga."
