Proverbs3:32 Gadia iferor ka kwagh u ndôhôr TER ishima je, kpa mzough Na yô, ngu a mbaperapera." 
Proverbs3:33 Ifan i TER ngi ken ya u mbaaferev, kpa ijiir i mbaperapera yô, ka A ver i dedoo." 
Proverbs3:34 Mba ve puun akaa yô, ka A puu ve, kpa mba ve hir ayol a ve ijime yô, A zungwen ve mhôônom." 
Proverbs3:35 Icivir ia lu dyako u mbafankwagh, kpa abumeaior yô, kunya ua kôr a." 
Proverbs4:1 Ne ônov, ungwan nen ityesen i ter, ver nen ishima sha er ne lu a mkav yô;" 
Proverbs4:2 gadia ka mhen u dedoo m ne ne ye; ityesen yam kpaa de undun nen i ga. 
Proverbs4:3 Gadia mo m lu wan u terem u mimi je, u denge denge u doon tswen ken ashe a ngôm;" 
Proverbs4:4 a tesem, a kaa a mo er: Ishima you i̱ kusu akaaôron am; waan atindi a am iko, tsô ú lu uma." 
Proverbs4:5 Zua a kwaghfan, zua a mkav, de hungul ga, de undun akaaôron am ga." 
Proverbs4:6 De te un kera ga, tsô una kura u, rumun un, tsô una koso u." 
Proverbs4:7 Mhii u kwaghfan yô: zua a kwaghfan, man sha akaa a u vande zuan a mi cii yô, shi zua a mkav kpaa." 
Proverbs4:8 Kende un sha, nahan una za a we hemen, una na u icivir, aluer wea kuve un yô." 
Proverbs4:9 Una kange u kwagh u hweegh sha icul, una na u idyer i tor i icivirigh je." 
Proverbs4:10 Ver ato wan wam, ngohol akaaôron am, nahan anyom a uma wou aa ngee je." 
Proverbs4:11 Ka gbenda u kwaghfan, m tese u ye, m hemen we sha igbenda i perapera." 
Proverbs4:12 Zum u u zenden yô, a-aven a angahar a ou aa kôvor ga, man wea yevese kpaa, ú nôngo gbev ga." 
Proverbs4:13 Kôr ityesen gbang gbang, de pasen i ga, waan i iko, gadia ka i i lu uma wou ye." 
Proverbs4:14 De nyer sha gbenda u ior mba bov ga, man shi de zenden sha gbenda u mbaaferev kpaa ga." 
Proverbs4:15 Nyagh u, de karen sha u ga; goom sha u, kar kera." 
Proverbs4:16 Gadia mba gbe yaven ga, saa ka ve vande eren kwaghbo; mnyam vem kpaa mba gbe yaven ga, saa ka ve vande nan or gbev kpee." 
Proverbs4:17 Gadia ka kwaghyan u ifer ve ye ye, mba me wain u aperagh." 
Proverbs4:18 Kpa gbenda u orperapera ngu er iwanger i sha use nahan, ngi seer aseer zan hemen zan zan mkende u iyange sha sha tembe la." 
Proverbs4:19 Gbenda u mbaaferev yô, ngu er ime nahan, mba fe kwagh u vea kema nguhar sha mi ga." 
Proverbs4:20 Wan wam ver ishima sha akaaôron a am; ver ato sha mkaanem am; 
Proverbs4:21 ma de karen we sha ashe kera ga, koso ma ken atô u ishima you." 
Proverbs4:22 Gadia ma ka uma je hen mba ve zough a ma yô, ma ve iyol ve cii a mkpeyol je." 
Proverbs4:23 Hemba kuran ishima you a akaa a u kor a cii, gadia ka ken i uma a dugh ye." 
Proverbs4:24 Kar a kwaghôron u aiegh her a we kera, zwa u ôron akaadang u̱ lu ca a we." 
Proverbs4:25 Ashe ou a̱ nenge sha hemen jighilii, akurashee ou kpaa a̱ za nôôn sha ishigh you." 
Proverbs4:26 Sôr gbenda u angahar a ou u̱ lu vaanaa, man igbenda you cii kpaa i̱ lu taveraa." 
Proverbs4:27 De kahan ken iyan shin ken imese ga, kar a nguhar wou hen kwaghbo kera." 
Proverbs5:1 Wan wam ver ishima sha kwaghfan wam, ver ato sha mkav wam," 
Proverbs5:2 sha er ú kusu m-er u sha inja, man zwa wou kpaa ú kura mfe." 
Proverbs5:3 Gadia ityumbuzwaagh i kwase u u fe nan ga la, ngi nende er anende a ikpayough nahan, man zwa u nan kpaa hemba leghem a mkurem," 
Proverbs5:4 kpa mkur u nan yô, yua er kon u yuan nahan, er sanker u esen akur ahar nahan." 
Proverbs5:5 Angahar a nan nga senen shin ku, a-aven a angahar a nan a kôr gbenda u zan shin Sheol." 
Proverbs5:6 Sha er u̱ de zough a gbenda u uma ga yô, igbenda i nan kaha sha mtsum, man u fatyô u fan i ga kpaa." 
Proverbs5:7 Yô, ne ônov, ver nen ato her a mo, de undun nen kwaghôron u sha zwa wam ga." 
Proverbs5:8 Kporom a gbenda wou ca a nan, de kporom hen hunda u ya u nan kpaa ga," 
Proverbs5:9 sha er u̱ de gem icivir you u̱ na mbagenev ga, man u̱ de gem anyom a ou kpaa u̱ na or u vihin ishima ga yô;" 
Proverbs5:10 sha er mbavanava ve̱ de iden sha agee ou ga, tom wou u ican kpaa, u̱ de nyer hen ya u or u nongo ugen ga yô;" 
Proverbs5:11 man sha ayange a ou a masetyô, ú gba toghol, zum u inyam you man iyol you ia kunde la;" 
Proverbs5:12 nahan ú kaa wer: Kpe ahi! lu m venda mkôôm, ishima yam kpaa laha myange;" 
Proverbs5:13 m ungwa imo i mbatesen av ga, mba ve tesen mo kwagh kpaa m ver ato hen ve ga!" 
Proverbs5:14 Shi ciôn tsô ma m gbe ken ifer cii, ken atô u mkohol u icighannongo la." 
Proverbs5:15 Kese mngerem shin zuar wou iyol you, ma, man mngerem ma kuwan kpaa shin ijôr you." 
Proverbs5:16 Doo u ambor a ou a̱ iv a̱ haa inya a̱ samber ken wono, uikuwanmbamngerev ou kpaa ve̱ samber sha ityembeya?" 
Proverbs5:17 De, ve̱ lu sha ci wou iyol you tseegh, i̱ de lu sha ci wou a mbavanava imôngo ga." 
Proverbs5:18 Imbor you i̱ lu a iveren, ember kwase wou u sha uye la:" 
Proverbs5:19 ashim u doon ishima, morya u doon kenger; de atumba na a̱ kuma u sha ashighe cii; gba ken imeen i dooshima na gbem." 
Proverbs5:20 Inja na nan man u gbe ken imeen i kwase ugene, wan wama, man u kuv kwase u u fe nan ga yôô?" 
Proverbs5:21 Gadia aeren a or nga sha ashe a TER, ka A kar igbenda i nan cii." 
Proverbs5:22 Aferakaa a iferor aa kôr nan, ikor i isholibo i nan ia kange nan." 
Proverbs5:23 Nana kpe sha ci u mban u ityesen; man sha zegeibume u nan la, nana tsume." 
Proverbs6:1 Wan wam aluer wea hingir ishuur sha ci u or u nan we ndor a we, aluer wea ngohol uwegh ku orvanava yô," 
Proverbs6:2 i hôn u sha kwaghôron u sha zwa wou, i kôr u sha kwaghôron u sha zwa wou je ve;" 
Proverbs6:3 yô, er ase nahan hegen, wan wam yima iyol you, gadia u hingir sha ikev i or u wan ndor a we je ve; hide, za za shar inya, zamber or u wan ndor a we la." 
Proverbs6:4 De ne ashe ou mnyam ga, akurashee a ou kpaa a̱ de meer mnyam ga;" 
Proverbs6:5 tsuwe iyol you sha uwegh ku orough kera er ashim nahan, man shi er inyon nahan sha ikev i orhônon." 
Proverbs6:6 Za hen iyôn, we oruhwe; ver ishima sha aeren a i; yô, hingir orfankwagh;" 
Proverbs6:7 ngi a or u hemen i ga, shin ornengen sha i, shin ityoor kpaa ga," 
Proverbs6:8 nahan kpaa ka i kohol kwaghyan u i inyom, i koson iyiav mbi i sha shighe u sunda." 
Proverbs6:9 Ka hanma shighe ú de mnyama, we oruhwe, man ka hanma shighe man ú nder ken mnyam ouwe?" 
Proverbs6:10 Mnyam mase shin kpeghee, shi mnyam ma meer kpuaa, man shi ave a wan ikum kpeghee sha u memen—" 
Proverbs6:11 ka nahan man ibanave you ia bur u er ka ornumungbenda nahan ye, man mban u akaa ou kpaa er orutya nahan." 
Proverbs6:12 Gbilinor, iferor, ngu zenden a ifer sha zwa;" 
Proverbs6:13 ngu nyiar ashe, ngu ôron kwagh sha angahar, ngu tesen ikav sha ahôaveegh;" 
Proverbs6:14 ifer ngi ken ishima na, ngu senden ior ityough, nan mpav," 
Proverbs6:15 ka nahan man mtim na una va abur abur ye, ú sombo un fese je, mwar á kera lu ga." 
Proverbs6:16 Akaa nga ataratar a TER A vende yô, een, ataankarahar je kpaa, a ishima i ndôhôr Un a a yô:" 
Proverbs6:17 Ashe a sha imanger, man nombor u aiegh, ave a haan awambe a or u lun a ibo ga," 
Proverbs6:18 ishima i henen mbamhen mba bov, angahar a zan ayem sha u za eren ifer," 
Proverbs6:19 or u eren shiada u mimi ga, u nan eren aie, man or u senden ior ityough nan anmgbianev mpav." 
Proverbs6:20 Wan wam wa tindi u teru iko, ityesen i ngôu kpaa de undun i ga;" 
Proverbs6:21 kange i ken ishima you gbem, har i sha mon wou;" 
Proverbs6:22 zum u u zenden yô, vea hemen we gbenda; zum u u yav kpaa vea kura u zum u u nder yô, vea ôr kwagh a we." 
Proverbs6:23 Gadia tindi ka imenger je, ityesen kpaa ka iwanger, myange u sha mtsaha ka gbenda u uma je;" 
Proverbs6:24 sha u kuran we sha iferkwase, sha zwanyohon u nombor u u fe nan ga la." 
Proverbs6:25 Dooashe u nan la, a̱ de saren we ken ishima ga; nana̱ de ker u sha akurashee a nan ga." 
Proverbs6:26 Gadia sha ci u idyakwase tsô, or ka nan mase hingir oribanave; kwase u orgen kpaa ka nan yar ikôr sha uma u or jim." 
Proverbs6:27 Or á fatyô u veren usu sha vanger u nan, man akondo a nan á hia ga kpa?" 
Proverbs6:28 Shin or á fatyô u ndyaren sha akausu, man angahar a nan á hughum ga kpa?" 
Proverbs6:29 Kape or u nan nyer hen kwase u or u nan we ndor a nan kpaa nan lu la; hanmô u nan bende a na yô, nana lu a isho ga." 
Proverbs6:30 Mba gbe lahan ormbaiv ga, aluer nana ii sha u been msar u nan zum u ijen i ker nan yô," 
Proverbs6:31 kpa aluer á va fa nan yô, nana hile a mi kwa taankaruhar, nana na akaa a ken ya u nan cii." 
Proverbs6:32 Or u nan er idya a kwase yô, nan kav kwagh je ga, or u nan er nahan la, ka uma u nan nan lu timin ye." 
Proverbs6:33 Avav á tser nan kua iheen, kunya u nan la kpaa á kera ese u mayange ga." 
Proverbs6:34 Gadia iwuhe ka ishima i vihin i or je, nan de kwagh la, sha iyange i oron iyev mayange ga," 
Proverbs6:35 mpaa una lu nan nan kpaa nana wa iko her ga, ishima ia pever nan ga, shin wea na nan iwua kpishi je kpaa." 
Proverbs7:1 Wan wam, wa akaaôron am iko, atindi am kpaa, koso a her a we." 
Proverbs7:2 Wa atindi am iko, lu uma, ityesen yam kpaa, kura i er hongorshe wou nahan," 
Proverbs7:3 kange a sha ahôaveegh a ou, nger a sha kpande u ishima you." 
Proverbs7:4 Kaa a kwaghfan wer, u ngu anngôm u kwase je, gema yila mkav wer, huror wam," 
Proverbs7:5 sha u vea kura u sha kwase ugen, ka kwase u i fe nan ga, u nan er kwagh sha zwanyohon yô." 
Proverbs7:6 Gadia sha windou u iyou yam, m gbir ashe hen kper-windou wam," 
Proverbs7:7 m nenge ken mbalanenkwagh, ken mbayevikaior, m nenge a wanyekwaor ugen u kaven kwagh ga," 
Proverbs7:8 ngu karen sha gbenda ikua ikua iniuugh ki gbenda na, a kôr gbenda u hen ya na," 
Proverbs7:9 shighe u aikighe aôndoaimegh, ken ateghôtôutu er ime wa yô." 
Proverbs7:10 Nenge, kwase ugen za va, va kohol un a akondo a agbaga iyol, u lun a ishima i ayomough." 
Proverbs7:11 Ka idyurankwase u norom sha kwagh, angahar a na nga lun hen ya na ga;" 
Proverbs7:12 shighe ugen ka a lu sha igbenda, shighe ugen a lu hen ityembe, sha hanma iniuugh ki gbendagh a lian myer, a yengen." 
Proverbs7:13 Tsô a kôr un, a suse un zwa, a lu ishigh sha nendaa, a kaa a na er:" 
Proverbs7:14 Iniav mbi bem mbi her a mo, nyian je m kure iceghzwa yam," 
Proverbs7:15 ka nahan m dugh sha u keghen we gbenda ye, sha u keren ishigh you sha gbashima, tsô m zua a we ve." 
Proverbs7:16 M tar ubutu mba legh legh sha gambe wam, man ingerenikondo i sha mou u sendan u Igipiti." 
Proverbs7:17 M mishi akaahumandoon sha gambe wam, ka mire man alue man shinamon." 
Proverbs7:18 Yô, sé za ya dooshima sé ide zan zan sev mbu̱ av; i̱ doo se iyol a dooshima." 
Proverbs7:19 Gadia orya ngu hen ya ga, a za zende u caa je;" 
Proverbs7:20 a za a ikpanyar je, ka ken atôuweregh una hide ye." 
Proverbs7:21 A mee un sha kwaghôron na u dedoo yum la, sha zwanyohon na la a hemba un." 
Proverbs7:22 Maa a dondo un fese, er bua u zan hen ijiir i sôngon yô, man er or u i kange nan i ze a nan hen mtsaha u ibumeor yô," 
Proverbs7:23 zan zan ivaan i ta un sha mtema tsula; er inyon i yemen fefa hen kwaghhônon yô, a kera fa er i lu sha ci u msaa u uma na je ga." 
Proverbs7:24 Hegen yô, ônov, ver nen ato her a mo, wa nen kwaghôron u sha zwa wam iko." 
Proverbs7:25 Ishima you i̱ de goom i̱ ze sha igbenda na ga, de kera kahan sha igbenda na ga." 
Proverbs7:26 Gadia a zôhô ior kpishi a ta ve inya a gber ve avav, mba a wua ve la cii, ka zegeikumior je." 
Proverbs7:27 Ya na ka igbenda i zan shin Sheol je, i tingir i sen shin ayou a kuugh." 
Proverbs8:1 Kwaghfan ngu yilan gaa, mkav kpaa ngu genger imo gaa?" 
Proverbs8:2 Sha ajiir a taven sha, hen gbenda, hen akahar a igbenda, ka a tile her;" 
Proverbs8:3 hen ihinda i nyôron ken gar, hen ape nyôron sha ihinda la, ngu genger imo er:" 
Proverbs8:4 M ngu yilan ne, ne nomso cii, ikenge yam i kaan kpaa ngi zan hen ônov mba iorov." 
Proverbs8:5 Ne mbalanenkwagh, fa nen u eren sha uee; ne abumeaior kpaa, fa nen u eren sha inja." 
Proverbs8:6 Ver nen ato, me ôr akaa a hemban doon, mbugh u zwa wam kpaa una lu sha akaa a vough je." 
Proverbs8:7 Gadia zwa wam ua ôr kwagh u mimi; iferkwagh yô, ka zwa wam kwagh u ndôhôrshima je." 
Proverbs8:8 Akaaôron a ken zwa wam cii ka a perapera, ma kwagh u huren shin u icughugh ngu ken a kpaa ga." 
Proverbs8:9 Or u nan kav yô, a cii nga nan ken igbar, mba ve zough a mfe kpaa, nga ve vough je." 
Proverbs8:10 Ngohol ityesen yam, i̱ de lu azurfa ga; ngohol mfe, guda un, a zenaria u hemban doon cii." 
Proverbs8:11 Gadia kwaghfan hemba urubi ca je, man akaa a a sar u cii a kuma sha na ga." 
Proverbs8:12 Mo, kwaghfan ne, m gema m-er u sha uee hingir mo ijiir i teman ker, m zua a mfe u fan m-er u sha inja." 
Proverbs8:13 Mcie u cian TER yô, ka u vendan kwaghbo je; iyolmoron man iceen man gbenda u bo kua zwa u u er kwagh sha ifer yô, m vende." 
Proverbs8:14 Mhen ka u wam je, kua kwaghfan u mimi; mo m ngu mkav; m ngu a tahav." 
Proverbs8:15 Ka sha a mo utor ve tem tor, man mbatarev kpaa ve kur ajir ye." 
Proverbs8:16 Ka sha a mo mbakurantar ve kor tar ye, kua mbavesen kpaa, man mbaajiriv mba shin tar cii." 
Proverbs8:17 Mba m doo ve ishima la, mo kpaa ve doom ishima; mba ve keren mo sha gbashima yô, vea zua a mo." 
Proverbs8:18 Inyaregh ki hen a mo kua icivir kpaa, een, icôronnyar kua perapera." 
Proverbs8:19 Atam a am hemba zenaria, een, hemba zenaria u wang; mtser wam kpaa hemba azurfa u hemban doon cii." 
Proverbs8:20 M ngu zenden sha gbenda u perapera, ken atô u igbenda i ijirigh i mimi," 
Proverbs8:21 sha u me er mba m doo ve ishima la, vea ya dyako sha akaa, man sha er ne iv ayou a ve a ombon akaa ker la." 
Proverbs8:22 TER lu a mo sha mhii u gbenda Na je, je er ityom Na lu a lu ga, tsuaa la je," 
Proverbs8:23 I verem m lu sha uichôronmbaashighev mba ngise la, ka sha mhii u akaa er i lu a gba tar ga la je." 
Proverbs8:24 Er aivamnger lu a lu ga la, i marem, er ambor a lun a mngerem kpishi lu a lu ga la." 
Proverbs8:25 Er i lu a tim iwo ga, man er agungu kpaa lu a lu ga je, tsô i maren;" 
Proverbs8:26 er A lu a gba tar shin mkôngom kpaa ga, shin vuulevu u hiihii u sha won kpaa ga." 
Proverbs8:27 Zum u A er Usha la m lu her je, zum u A samber ishigh ki aivamnger gbilititi la," 
Proverbs8:28 zum u A ver abeen a Sha, zum u ambor a aivamnger taver," 
Proverbs8:29 zum u A ver zegemnger ikighir na, sha u mngerem ma de karen imo Na ga yô, 2 zum u A tim imagh ki taregh la," 
Proverbs8:30 shighe la, m lu vea Na, er or u fan tom nahan, hanma iyange m lu saan saan gbem, m lu ember sha ishigh Nagh gbem," 
Proverbs8:31 m lu ember ken tar Na u sha won cii, doom a ônov mba iorov tsung." 
Proverbs8:32 Hegen yô, ne ônov, ver nen ato her a mo, gadia saan mba ve we igbenda yam iko la, iyol." 
Proverbs8:33 Ungwan nen ityesen, lu nen mbafankwagh, de vende nen i ga." 
Proverbs8:34 Á saan or u nan ongom la, iyol, er nan kor hen ihinda yam hanma iyange, nan keghen hen ambusu a ihinda yam yô." 
Proverbs8:35 Gadia or u nan zough a mo, ka uma nan zough a mi ye, á doo TER a nan kpaa." 
Proverbs8:36 Kpa or u nan karem kpe yô, nan ngu vihin uma u nan iyol i nan je; mba ve vendem cii, ka ku u doo ve ye." 
Proverbs9:1 Kwaghfan maa ya na, a gba mtôm nam mtaankarmhar," 
Proverbs9:2 a sôngo ilev nav, a nungwa wain na; a sôr tebul na kpaa." 
Proverbs9:3 A tindi anuunaukase a na, ngu genger imo sha ajiir a hemban taven sha ken gar, kaan er:" 
Proverbs9:4 Hanma orlanenkwagh nana̱ kaha heen, man shi or u nan ban a mkav yô, a kaa a nan er:" 
Proverbs9:5 Va, va ya nen kwaghyan wam, ma wain u m nongo ne;" 
Proverbs9:6 undu nen lanegh enegh, lu nen uma, zaan nen sha gbenda u mkav." 
Proverbs9:7 Or u nan kôôm orpuunakaa yô, nan ngu van a iheen sha iyol i nan; or u nan zehe a iferor yô, nan ngu van a acôghol sha iyol i nan." 
Proverbs9:8 De yangen orpuunakaa ga, sha er nana̱ de ker u ihom ga yô; yange orfankwagh, tsô ú doo nan ishima." 
Proverbs9:9 Tese orfankwagh kwagh, tsô nana seer kwaghfan; tese orperapera, tsô nana seer mhen." 
Proverbs9:10 Mcie u cian TER ka mhii u kwaghfan je la, mfe u fan u A lu Icighan la kpaa ka mkav je." 
Proverbs9:11 Gadia ka sha ikev yam man ayange a ou aa seer ye; anyom a uma wou kpaa á seer a. 
Proverbs9:12 Aluer wea lu a kwaghfan yô, ka sha ci wou iyol you je u lu a mi ye; aluer wea lu orpuunakaa yô, ka di kwagh wou je la." 
Proverbs9:13 Ibumekwase ngu inja baveraa, a lan kwagh, a fa ma kwagh ga." 
Proverbs9:14 Ka a tema hen hunda u ya na sha ika sha ajiir a taven sha ken gar," 
Proverbs9:15 sha u una yila mba ve kar yô, mba ve ze sha gbenda ve jighilii la, er:" 
Proverbs9:16 Or u nan lu orlanenkwagh yô, nana̱ kaha, nana̱ va heen! Man shi u nan ban a mkav yô, a kaa a nan er:" 
Proverbs9:17 Mngerem ma iin a ii ma nyoho, man kwaghyan u i ye ken myer kpaa a doo." 
Proverbs9:18 Kpa nan kera fa er ujijingi mba mbakpenev ve lu her ga, man er mba a lehe ve la, ve lu ken ajiir a zan a Sheol kpaa ga." 
Proverbs10:1 Anzaakaa a Solomon. Wan u fan kwagh ka nan na i saan ter u nan iyol, kpa ibumewan yô, ka nan na ngô u nan ishima i zunguluu." 
Proverbs10:2 Inyaregh ki iferegh ki a ma inja ga, kpa perapera yô, ka a yima ken ku." 
Proverbs10:3 TER Una de uma u mbaperapera er a̱ lu ijen ga, kpa isharen i mbaaferev yô, A mgbegha i kera." 
Proverbs10:4 Or u nan eren tom sha uhwe yô, nana gba ican, kpa uwegh ku mbataverasema yô, ka ku kohol inyaregh." 
Proverbs10:5 U nan kohol iyiav fam yô, ka wan u fan kwagh, kpa u nan yav sha shighe u sundan la, ka wan u van a kunya je la." 
Proverbs10:6 Iveren ngi sha ityough ki mbaperapera, kpa zwa u mbaaferev yô, ka u yer ipila." 
Proverbs10:7 M-umbur u ka i umbur mbaperapera la, ne iveren je; kpa iti i mbaaferev yô, ia saa ishe." 
Proverbs10:8 Or u fan kwagh ken ishima, nana rumun atindi, kpa u nan lamen sha ibume dang dang yô, nana gba." 
Proverbs10:9 Or u nan zenden ken perapera yô, nan ngu zenden bem bem; kpa or u nan goom a igbenda i nan yô, a fa nan." 
Proverbs10:10 Or u kamen ashe nan ne ishimavihin, man u nan lamen sha ibume dang yô, nana gba." 
Proverbs10:11 Zwa u mbaperapera ka imbor i uma je, kpa zwa u mbaaferev yô, ka u yer ipila." 
Proverbs10:12 Ihom nderen ayongo, kpaa dooshima yô, cirin akaabo cii." 
Proverbs10:13 Sha zwa u or u kaven kwagh, mba zough a kwaghfan, kpa or u nan ban a mkav yô, akpa ngu sha ci u nan." 
Proverbs10:14 Mbafankwagh ka ve kohol mfe, kpa zwa u abumeaior yô, ka mtim u a lu ikua ikua je." 
Proverbs10:15 Inyaregh ki shagbaor ka gar u nan u taveraa je; kwagh u van mbaatsanev a mtim yô, ka ibanave ve la." 
Proverbs10:16 Tom u mbaperapera ngu ne uma, kpa mtser u mbaaferev yô, ne kwaghbo." 
Proverbs10:17 U nan we iko sha mkôôm yô, nan ngu sha gbenda u uma je; kpa u nan vende kwaghwan yô, nan tsume." 
Proverbs10:18 Or u nan yer ihom yô, nan ngu a ityumbuzwaagh i aiegh je; man shi u nan er anger yô, ka ibumeor." 
Proverbs10:19 Akaaôron kpishi yum la, kwaghbo ban sha mi ga, kpa u nan kusu zwa u nan yô, nan er sha kwaghfan." 
Proverbs10:20 Nombor u mbaperapera ngu er azurfa u hemban cii nahan, kpa ishima i mbaaferev yô, gbe ishe ga." 
Proverbs10:21 Ityumbuzwaagh i mbaperapera ngi koson ior kpishi, kpa abumeaior yô, nga kpe sha ci u mban u mkav." 
Proverbs10:22 Iveren i TER ngi ve a inyaregh, tom u nyoonyol seer ma kwagh sha i ga." 
Proverbs10:23 Ibumeor yô, ifer i eren ka i maa nan iyol, kape kwaghfan a lu di hen or u kaven kwagh la." 
Proverbs10:24 Kwagh u iferor nan cie la, ka un je una tser nan ye, kpa isharen i mbaperapera yô, á na ve i." 
Proverbs10:25 Zum u hiar ka una kar kera yô, iferor nan kera lu ga, kpa orperapera nan ngu er ka imagh ki tsôron nahan." 
Proverbs10:26 Er kwagh u angen a lu sha anyi man er mnyim ma lu ken ashe nahan, kape oruhwe nan lu hen mba ve tindi nan la." 
Proverbs10:27 Mcie u cian TER seer ayange, kpa anyom a aferaior yô, a pande a kera." 
Proverbs10:28 Ishimaverenkeghen i mbaperapera ia hingir iember, kpa awashima u aferaior yô, una saa ishe." 
Proverbs10:29 Gbenda u TER ka garutya u mbaperapera, kpa mbaerenafer yô, gema ka ve mtim." 
Proverbs10:30 Mbaperapera yô, á tenger a ve mayange ga, kpa aferaior yô, aa tsa ken tar gbem ga." 
Proverbs10:31 Zwa u mbaperapera ngu dugh a kwaghfan, kpa nombor u aiegh yô, á tim u kera." 
Proverbs10:32 Zwa u mbaperapera u fa kwagh u a doo u ungwan yô, kpa zwa u aferaior yô, ngu er kwagh u dang." 
Proverbs11:1 Iyôgh ki karen kwagh a mi sha icugh ka kwagh u ndôhôr TER ishima je, kpa ikaren u myoho u mimi yô, ka Un kwagh u ember je." 
Proverbs11:2 Zum u iyolgengese ia va yô, kunya di kpaa ua due je, kpa kwaghfan ngu hen mbahiden a iyol ijime la." 
Proverbs11:3 Mimi u mbaperapera una hemen ve, kpa dang u mbaatsereghev yô, una tim ve." 
Proverbs11:4 Inyaregh ki lu a inja sha iyange i ishima i vihin la ga, kpa perapera yô, ka a yima ken ku." 
Proverbs11:5 Perapera u ormimi una kôôm nan gbenda, kpa iferor nan gba sha ifer i nan je." 
Proverbs11:6 Perapera u mbaperapera una war ve, kpa á kôr mbaatsereghev sha isharen ve je." 
Proverbs11:7 Zum u iferor ka nan kpe yô, awashima u nan a saa ishe, ishimaverenkeghen i iferor kpaa ia saa ishe." 
Proverbs11:8 Ka i dugh orperapera ken ican kera, iferor a gema a tema sha ityough ki nan." 
Proverbs11:9 Or u cian aôndo ga, ka nan tim or u wan ndor a nan sha zwa u nan je, kpa orperapera nana war sha mfe." 
Proverbs11:10 Zum u mbaperapera ka vea zua a mkpeyol yô, gar á ember, man zum u mbaaferev ka vea saa ishe yô, i ger akenge." 
Proverbs11:11 Sha iveren i mbaperapera, gar ka a zua a icivir, kpa sha zwa u mbaaferev yô, ka i yôhôl un kera." 
Proverbs11:12 Or u nan laha or u wan ndor a nan yô, nan fa kwagh je ga, kpa or u fan kwagh yô, ka nan lu ving." 
Proverbs11:13 Or u nan zenden anger yô, nan ngu pasen akaamyer, kpa or u nan lu a jijingi u mimi yô, ka nan cir kwagh." 
Proverbs11:14 Henpe mhen u mimi ka una lu ga yô, ikurior i gba kera; aluer mbawasenmhen vea lu imôngo yô, mwar ngu." 
Proverbs11:15 Or u nan hingir ishuur u orgen yô, nana ya ican sha mi, kpa u nan vende uwegh ku ngohol yô, á kpe nan iyol." 
Proverbs11:16 Kwase u kuman ishima ka a zua a icivir; uipirambaiorov yô, ka ve zua a inyaregh." 
Proverbs11:17 Or u zungwen mhôônom ka iyol i nan je nan eren a i dedoo ye, kpa ipiraor yô, ka iyol i nan je, nan eren i ican ye." 
Proverbs11:18 Orifer ka nan ngohol injar i kpeegh, kpa u nan lee perapera yô, injar i nan ka i mimi je." 
Proverbs11:19 Or u nan taver ishima sha perapera, nana lu uma; or u nan zende ifer ityô yô ka ku u nan nan keren ye." 
Proverbs11:20 Mba ve lu a asema dang yô, ve ndôhôr TER ishima, kpa mba ve lu a mimi ken akaa a ve yô, ka mba doon Un je." 
Proverbs11:21 Á shi didi kpaa, iferor nana war ibo i yan ga, kpa tsombor u mbaperapera yô, ua war." 
Proverbs11:22 Er kunya u zenaria sha ishôngozwa i igo nahan, kape kwase u doon ashe u nan fe kwagh ga nan lu la." 
Proverbs11:23 Isharen i orperapera ka i kure sha kwagh u dedoo tseegh, kpa awashima u iferor yô, ka sha ishimavihin." 
Proverbs11:24 Orgen ka or u nan akaa a nan kera nahan kpaa akaa a nan a seer a seer; man ugen di yô, ka nan kusu, i kar ikaa inya, nahan kpaa nan hingir oribanave." 
Proverbs11:25 Or u nan nagh yô, nana mgbough a akaa, man shi or u nan ne mngerem ma man yô, nan iyol i nan kpaa á na nan mngerem." 
Proverbs11:26 Or u nan nyum iyiav yô, ior vea wa nan ifan, kpa iveren ia lu sha ityough ki or u nan tee ki la." 
Proverbs11:27 Or u nan keren kwaghdoon sha gbashima yô, nan ngu keren u i doo ior a nan, kpa u nan keren kwaghbo yô, kwagh la una hide sha a nan." 
Proverbs11:28 Or u nan suur sha inyaregh ki nan yô, nan á gba, kpa orperapera yô, nan hôm er ahu yô." 
Proverbs11:29 Or u nan nzughul a ya u nan, nana ya dyako u ahumbe, or u lanen kwagh kpaa, nana hingir kpan u or u lun a ishima i fan kwagh." 
Proverbs11:30 Ityamegh ki orperapera ka kon u uma je, u nan lu orfankwagh yô, ka nan wa ior." 
Proverbs11:31 Nenge, orperapera je kpaa, a na nan sha ieren i nan shin tar, man hile iferor vea orisholiboo!" 
Proverbs12:1 Or u tsaha u doo nan yô, ka mfe a doo nan ye, kpa u nan vende myange yô, nan lan kwagh." 
Proverbs12:2 Ormimi yô, á doo TER a nan, kpa or u nan hen ubombaakaav yô, Una na nan ibo." 
Proverbs12:3 Or a taver sha ifer ga, kpa mise u orperapera yô, ua tenger ga." 
Proverbs12:4 Kwase u mimi nan ngu tsar u sha ityou u nom u nan, kpa u nan eren kwagh u kunya yô, nan ngu er ihôônkwagh nahan ken akuhe a nom u nan." 
Proverbs12:5 Mhen u mbaperapera ka u mimi je, kpa mbamhen mba aferaior yô, ka icugh tsô." 
Proverbs12:6 Kwaghôron u aferaior ka u gban gwe sha u za haan awambe inya, kpa zwa u mbaperapera yô, ua yima ve." 
Proverbs12:7 Ka i mgbegha aferaior kera, ve kera lu ga, kpa ya u mbaperapera yô, á lu her taveraa." 
Proverbs12:8 A wuese or sha kwaghfan u nan, kpa or u lun a ishima i dang yô, á laha nan." 
Proverbs12:9 Guda or u i wongor nan ga, kpa nan lu a kpan, a or u nan civir iyol i nan, kpa nan lu a kwaghyan ga la." 
Proverbs12:10 Orperapera we uma u zendenya na iko, kpa mhôônom ma zungwen ma iferor yô, ka tswam." 
Proverbs12:11 Or u nan kaha sule u nan yô, nana lu a kwaghyan kpishi, kpa or u nan zenden sha agbilinakaa yô, nan kav kwagh je ga." 
Proverbs12:12 Kwagh u aferaior a ker ken kper la sar iferor, kpa mise u orperapera ngu um atam." 
Proverbs12:13 Ka sha ifer i sha ityumbuzwaagh la, ka i hôn iferor i kôr nan ye, kpa orperapera nana war ican." 
Proverbs12:14 Or nana mgbough a kwaghdoon, sha kwagh u injaa u a dugh sha zwa u nan la; man shi aeren a ave a or la, aa hide sha a nan." 
Proverbs12:15 Sha mnenge u ibumeor yô, gbenda u nan ngu vough je, kpa or u nan ver ato sha kwaghwan yô, nan fa kwagh." 
Proverbs12:16 Iyugh i ibumeor ka i due ken igbar fese je, kpa or u nan yer kunya yô, nan fa kwagh." 
Proverbs12:17 Or u nan kaan mimi yô, ka perapera je nan pasen ye, kpa shiada u aie yô, ka icugh." 
Proverbs12:18 Orgen ka nan gba ôron kwagh gagh er mkuma u sanker yô, kpa nombor u orfankwagh yô, ngu ne mkpeyol." 
Proverbs12:19 Zwa u ôron kwagh sha mimi, ua lu gbem, kpa nombor u eren aie yô, ua lu di her dôghôô tsô." 
Proverbs12:20 Icugh ngi ken ishima i mbadughunifer, kpa mba ve dugh mhen u bem yô, mba a m-ember." 
Proverbs12:21 Ma kwaghbo una tser orperapera ga, kpa iferor yô, ican ia ume sha a nan." 
Proverbs12:22 Ityumbuzwaagh i aiegh ka kwagh u ndôhôr TER ishima je, kpa mba ve eren sha mimi yô, doo Un a ve." 
Proverbs12:23 Orfankwagh ka nan yer mfe u nan, kpa ishima i abumeaior yô, ka i yôôn ibumegh." 
Proverbs12:24 Uwegh ku or u veren ishima sha kwagh kua ya tor, kpa or u eren hwev yô, á kighir nan sha tom." 
Proverbs12:25 Ishima i nyian ka i na or nan ure, kpa kwaghôron u saan saan ka a na nan iember." 
Proverbs12:26 Orperapera ka orhemengbenda u or u wan ndor a nan, kpa gbenda u aferaior yô, ka u na ve mtsum." 
Proverbs12:27 Oruhwe nan zua a inyam sha ikôl i yaren i nan ga; kpa ishima i tiaver yô, ka kwaghinjaa u or." 
Proverbs12:28 Sha gbenda u perapera uma ngu, kpa gbenda u ifer yô, u ver ishigh ken ku." 
Proverbs13:1 Wan u fan kwagh nan rumun ityesen i ter u nan, kpa orpuunakaa nan rumun myange ga." 
Proverbs13:2 Or nana ya tar sha kwagh u injaa u a dugh sha zwa u nan, kpa isharen i mbaatsereghev yô, ka ipila á koso i a mi ye." 
Proverbs13:3 Or u nan kor zwa u nan yô, ka uma u nan nan kor ye; kpa u nan gbanger zwa u nan yô, nana zua a mtim." 
Proverbs13:4 Uma u oruhwe, kwagh ka a sar un, kpa a zua a kwagh ga, kpa uma u mbatavershima yô, una mgbough a akaa." 
Proverbs13:5 Orperapera ka nan venda aie; kpa iferor ne ihom i kôron kua kunya. 
Proverbs13:6 Perapera ka a kura or u nan ze sha gbenda jighilii yô, kpa ifer yô, ka i zôhô orisholibo." 
Proverbs13:7 Orgen ka nan ver iyol er nan ngu ornyar je, kpa nan lu a kwagh ga; orgen di ka nan ver iyol er nan ngu icanor, kpa nan ngee akaa kpishi." 
Proverbs13:8 Mpaa u uma u or ka inyaregh ki nan je; kpa icanor yô, á cier nan ga." 
Proverbs13:9 Iwanger i orperapera ka i ember, kpa imenger i iferor yô, á pir i." 
Proverbs13:10 Iyolgengese ngi ne num tsô; kpa mba ve ngohol mhen u mimi yô, kwaghfan ngu her a ve." 
Proverbs13:11 Inyaregh ki i gbe zuan a mi gbilin tsô yô, kia hide ijime, kpa or u nan kohol ki sha tom u nan yô, nana seer a seer." 
Proverbs13:12 Ishimaverenkeghen i i zough a mi ga yô, ka i na ishima i uren; kpa isharen i ia kure sha mi yô, ka kon u uma je." 
Proverbs13:13 Or u nan laha kwaghôron yô, nana ya ican, kpa u nan cie tindi yô, nana ngohol injar." 
Proverbs13:14 Ityesen i orfankwagh yô, ka imbor i uma je, sha u waren akaahônon a kuugh." 
Proverbs13:15 Mkav u mimi ve a mkpeyol, kpa gbenda u iferor yô, ka u ican je." 
Proverbs13:16 Hanma orfankwagh ka nan er tom u nan sha mfe, kpa ibumeor yô, ka nan samber ibumegh." 
Proverbs13:17 Ortyom u ifer ka nan gba ken bo, kpa ortyom u mimi yô, ka or u kpen inja iyol." 
Proverbs13:18 Ibanave man iheen ngi hen or u vendan mkôôm, kpa u nan we iko sha myange yô, á civir nan." 
Proverbs13:19 Isharen i i kure sha mi yô, ka kwagh u doon uma u or, kpa u paven a ifer yô, ka abumeaior kwagh u ndôhôrshima." 
Proverbs13:20 Zende a mbafankwagh imôngo, nahan we kpaa ú hingir orfankwagh, kpa ijende i abumeaior yô, ia zua a ican." 
Proverbs13:21 Ifer ka i tôv aferaior ityô; kpa mbaperapera yô, á na ve injar sha kwagh u dedoo." 
Proverbs13:22 Ormimi ka nan undu dyako sha ci u ônov mba ônov mba nan, kpa inyaregh ki orsholibo yô, i ombo ki sha ci u orperapera." 
Proverbs13:23 Kwaghyan ngu ken ishule i he i mbaatsanev, kpa orgen yô, kwagh ka a saa nan ishe sha ci u ieren i nan i mimi ga la." 
Proverbs13:24 Or u nan ver akpa u nan gir yô, nan kôr wan u nan ihom; kpa u wan u nan a doo nan ishima yô, ka nan tsaha un sha gbashima." 
Proverbs13:25 Orperapera ka nan ya kwagh i kuma nan, kpa iyav mbu iferor yô, mbua lu ijen." 
Proverbs14:1 Hanma kwase u fan kwagh ka nan maa iyou i nan, kpa ibumekwase yô, ka nan yôhôl i sha ave a nan je." 
Proverbs14:2 Or u nan zenden sha mimi u nan yô, nan ngu cian TER, kpa u nan lu dang sha ieren i nan yô, nan ngu lahan Un." 
Proverbs14:3 Ken zwa u ibumeor yô, akpa ngu sha ci u mgengeseyol u nan la, kpa ityumbujôôgh i mbaperapera ia kura ve." 
Proverbs14:4 Henpe abua a lu ga yô, kpese ka u lu wanger wanger, kpa sha agee a bua a kahan sule yô, mtser ka a lu kpishi." 
Proverbs14:5 Orshiada u mimi yô, nana er aie ga, kpa orshiada u mimi ga yô, ka nan ôron kwagh sha aie." 
Proverbs14:6 Orpuunakaa ka nan ker kwaghfan, kpa nan zua a mi ga, kpa or u nan lu a mkav yô, mfe ngu nan ican ga." 
Proverbs14:7 Kar sha ishigh ki ibumeor kera, gadia ú ungwa akaaôron a sha mfe heregh ga." 
Proverbs14:8 Kwaghfan u or u nan lu a mfe ngu sha ci u nana kar gbenda u nan, kpa ibumegh ki abumeaior yô, ka icugh je." 
Proverbs14:9 Nagh ku isholibo gema naha abumeaior tar, kpa doo Aôndo a mbamimi." 
Proverbs14:10 Ishima fa ican i i, iember i i kpaa, orgen fatyô u nyôron nongo a i ga." 
Proverbs14:11 Ya u aferaior yô, á tim un kera, kpa tenti u mbaperapera yô, una za hemen." 
Proverbs14:12 Gbenda ugen sha mnenge u or yô, ka u lu vough, kpa mkur u u yô, ka igbenda i kuugh je." 
Proverbs14:13 Ken ahan a sen je kpaa, ishima ka i vihi, mkur u mhen kpaa shighe ugen ka ishima i nyian." 
Proverbs14:14 Or u undun gbenda u mimi nana ide sha igbenda i nan la, orinjaa di kpaa, sha kwagh u nan lu a mi la." 
Proverbs14:15 Orlanenkwagh ka nan gba nan jighjigh sha hanma kwaghôron tsô, kpa orfankwagh yô, ka nan ver ishima sha zende u nan." 
Proverbs14:16 Orfankwagh ka nan cian ifer, shi nan pav a i kpaa, kpa ibumeor yô, ka nan cihin kwagh, nan cian kwagh ga." 
Proverbs14:17 Or u nan nyoon ishima fefa yô, nana er kwagh sha ibume; or u ayomough yô, mba vende nan." 
Proverbs14:18 Mbalanenkwagh yô, dyako ve ka lanegh, kpa mbafankwagh yô, mba kange ve tsar u mfe sha ityou." 
Proverbs14:19 Mbabov ka ve ngurum inya sha ishigh ki mbamimi, aferaior di kpaa sha ihinda i mbaperapera." 
Proverbs14:20 Icanor yô, or u wan ndor a nan je kpaa ka i kera doo nan a nan ga; kpa ornyar yô, ka nan lu a ahuraior kpishi." 
Proverbs14:21 Or u nan lahan or u nan we ndor a nan yô, nan ngu eren kwaghbo, kpa or u mhôônom ma ker nan a mbaatsanev yô, saan nan iyol." 
Proverbs14:22 Mba ve henen ifer, ka gbenda ve tsum gaa? Kpa erdoo kua mimi vea hingir kwar u mba ve henen kwagh u dedoo." 
Proverbs14:23 Hanma tom u nyoon iyol ngu a mtser, kpa u lamen sha zwa yô, ka a na mban u akaa tsô." 
Proverbs14:24 Tsar u sha ityou u mbafankwagh yô, ka inyaregh vegh je, kpa ibumegh ki abumeaior yô, ka ibumegh tsô." 
Proverbs14:25 Orshiada u mimi ka a yima uuma, kpa or u ôron kwagh sha aie yô, nan ngu orcugh." 
Proverbs14:26 Sha mcie u cian TER la, ishima á taver or, ônov mba nan kpaa vea zua a ijiir i waren." 
Proverbs14:27 Mcie u cian TER ka imbor i uma je, sha u waren akaahônon a kuugh." 
Proverbs14:28 Ihagh i tor yô, ka mngee u ior la, kpa mban u ior gema ka mtim u ortaregh." 
Proverbs14:29 Or u nan yugh fefa ga yô, nan ngu a mkav u vesen, kpa or u nyoon ishima gagh yô, ka nan kende a ibumegh sha." 
Proverbs14:30 Ishima i bem bem ka uma u iyolough je, kpa iwuhe yô, ka mhee u akuhe." 
Proverbs14:31 Or u nan nzughul a icanor yô, nan laha u A gbe nan la, kpa u nan zungu oribanave mhôônom yô, nan ngu civir Un." 
Proverbs14:32 Iferor ka nan gba sha ifer i nan, kpa orperapera yô, ka nan lu a mwar ken ku u nan je kpaa." 
Proverbs14:33 Kwaghfan tem ken ishima i orkavenkwagh, ken atô u abumeaior je kpaa, i fa nahan." 
Proverbs14:34 Perapera ka a kende ikurior sha kpa isholibo yô, ka kwagh u aheenegh hen ior je." 
Proverbs14:35 Mrumun u tor ka a lu sha or u nan eren tom sha kwaghfan yô, kpa iyugh na ka i lu sha or u eren kwagh u kunya yô." 
Proverbs15:1 Imo i legh legh ngi bundu ishima i nyoon, kpa kwaghôron u sha ipila yô, kenden a iyugh sha." 
Proverbs15:2 Nombor u mbafankwagh ka u pasen mfe u mimi, kpa zwa u abumeaior yô, ngu hee ibumegh." 
Proverbs15:3 Ashe a TER nga sha hanma ijiir, nga kor mbavihinkwagh kua mbamimi." 
Proverbs15:4 Nombor u bem ka kon u uma je, kpa u u lu dang la yô, ngu ne ishima i yinan." 
Proverbs15:5 Ibumeor ka nan lahan mkôôm u ter u nan, kpa u nan we iko sha myange yô, ka nan hingir u fan kwagh." 
Proverbs15:6 Ken ya u orperapera kwaghinjaa ngee keregh, kpa ken mtser u iferor yô, kwaghnzughul ngu." 
Proverbs15:7 Ityumbujôôgh i mbafankwagh ngi samber a mfe, kpa ishima i abumeaior yô, ngi vough ga." 
Proverbs15:8 Nagh ku aferaior ka TER kwagh u ndôhôrshima je, kpa msen u mbamimi yô, ka Un kwagh u ember je." 
Proverbs15:9 Gbenda u iferor ka TER kwagh u ndôhôrshima je, kpa or u zan a perapera ityô yô, nan doo Un ishima." 
Proverbs15:10 Mtsaha u nyoon ngu sha ci u or u nan undu gbenda yô, or u nan vende myange yô, ka ku nana kpe ye." 
Proverbs15:11 Sheol kua Abadon mba sha ishigh ki TER atar, man hile asema a ônov mba iorovoo!" 
Proverbs15:12 Orpuunakaa, doo nan u i̱ yange nan ga, nan rumun u zan hen mbafankwagh kpaa ga." 
Proverbs15:13 Ishima i saan saan i ne ishigh ki saan sha, kpa ishima i vihin yô, i ne ishima i yinan." 
Proverbs15:14 Ishima i or u lun a mkav ka i keren mfe, kpa zwa u abumeaior yô, kwaghyan u u ka ibumegh." 
Proverbs15:15 Ayange a mbayanican cii, nga nyoon iyol, kpa ishima i saan saan yô, i ye iniongo gbem je." 
Proverbs15:16 Guda u lun a akaa kpeghee man cian TER, a inyaregh ki kpishi kua ishimanyian la." 
Proverbs15:17 Guda u yan ikyaiue henpe dooshima a lu yô, a u yan icôngonbua a ihom ken asema la." 
Proverbs15:18 Or u nyoon ishima yum, nan ne num, kpa or u nan yugh fefa ga yô, nan soughon num." 
Proverbs15:19 Gbenda u oruhwe ngu er igyar i saa nahan, kpa gbenda u orperapera yô, ka igbudu." 
Proverbs15:20 Wan u fan kwagh ka nan na i saan ter u nan iyol; kpa ibumeor yô, ka nan laha ngô u nan." 
Proverbs15:21 Ibumegh ka or u lanenkwagh kwagh u iember je, kpa or u kaven kwagh yô, ka nan kôôm zende u nan jighilaa." 
Proverbs15:22 Mbaawashima ka ve bunde henpe idyu i teman i lu ga yô, kpa sha iwasen i mbawasenmhen imôngo la, ka ve lu taveraa." 
Proverbs15:23 Or ngu a iember sha mrumun u vough u sha zwa u nan, kwaghôron u a gbe sha shighe vough yô, ka a doo tsung!" 
Proverbs15:24 Gbenda u uma kôndo sha, sha ci u orfankwagh, sha u nana̱ war Sheol u shin inya la." 
Proverbs15:25 TER Una yôhôl ya u ormoronyol kera, kpa Una taver dyako u kwasecôghol." 
Proverbs15:26 Mbamhen mba aferaior ka TER kwagh u ndôhôrshima je, kpa akaaôron a dedoo yô, nga wang." 
Proverbs15:27 Or u nan ye mtsera u bo yô, ka nan nzughul a ya u nan, kpa or u nan vende inyaregh ki yamen ishô la yô, nana lu uma." 
Proverbs15:28 Ishima i orperapera ka i henen imokwagh i ia ôr yô, kpa zwa u iferor ka u haan ubombaakaav." 
Proverbs15:29 TER ngu ca a aferaior, kpa ongo msen u mbaperapera." 
Proverbs15:30 Iwanger i ashee ngi ne ishima msaanyol, loho u dedoo kpaa, ngu ne akuhe a kehe." 
Proverbs15:31 Togh ku ku ongo mtsaha u nan uma la yô, kua lu hen atô u mbafankwagh je." 
Proverbs15:32 Or u nan vende mkôôm yô, nan ngu lahan uma u nan iyol i nan je. Kpa or u nan ver ato sha myange yô, nan zough a mkav." 
Proverbs15:33 Mcie u cian TER ngu tesen a tese kwaghfan je, icivir dondo sha mhir u iyol ijime." 
Proverbs16:1 Mbamhen mba ken ishima ka mba iorov tsô, kpa imo i kaan ken zwa yô, ka hen TER i dugh ye." 
Proverbs16:2 Aeren a or cii nga wang ken ashe a nan, kpa TER yô, karen ujijingi." 
Proverbs16:3 Wa TER aeren a ou cii sha ikev, yô, mbaawashima ou kpaa vea kure sha mi vough." 
Proverbs16:4 TER gba hanma kwagh sha inja je, een, kua aferaior je kpaa, sha ci u boiyange." 
Proverbs16:5 Hanma or u lun a imanger ken ishima, nan ngu TER kwagh u ndôhôrshima je, mimi je, nana war mtsaha ga." 
Proverbs16:6 Ka sha mhôônom ma zungwen kua mimi i wanger afer kera ye, ka sha mcie u cian TER kpaa, ior ve undun kwaghbo ye." 
Proverbs16:7 Zum u aeren a or ka a doo TER yô, A na mbaihomov mba nan je kpaa, ve lu a nan doo doo." 
Proverbs16:8 Guda u lun a akaa kpeghee a perapera imôngo, a u zuan a akaa kpishi, man mimi geman banen la." 
Proverbs16:9 Ishima i or ka i hen gbenda u nan, kpa ka TER A tesen nan ape ndyaren ye." 
Proverbs16:10 Mkurjir u mimi ngu sha zwa u tor, zwa na ngu karen kpe sha ijir ga." 
Proverbs16:11 Iyôgh ki karen kwagh a min ki mimi ka ki TER je kua ikagh ki karen kwagh a mi kpaa, uikaren mba myoho mba ken ikpa cii, ka tom Na je." 
Proverbs16:12 U eren ifer yô, ka kwagh u ndôhôr utor ishima, gadia ka sha perapera ikônough ki torough ki lu taveraa ye." 
Proverbs16:13 Doo utor a zwa u ôron kwagh u perapera, or u nan er kwagh mimi la, ka nan doo ve ishima." 
Proverbs16:14 Ishimanyoon i tor ngi er mbatyomov mba kuuv nahan, kpa orfankwagh yô, nana pever i." 
Proverbs16:15 Ken iwanger i sha ishigh ki tor, uma ngu, iveren na ngi er ibeenegh ki ura u masetyô yô." 
Proverbs16:16 U zuan a kwaghfan hemba doon a zenaria ca je gaa! Een, u zuan a mkav hemba doon a u tsuwan azurfa." 
Proverbs16:17 Igbudu u mbaperapera yô, ka u paven a ifer; u nan kor zende u nan yô, ka uma u nan nan kor ye." 
Proverbs16:18 Ken ijime i iyolgengese yô, ka mtim, ken ijime i iceen ka mgbe." 
Proverbs16:19 Guda u lun icanor ken jijingi a mbaatsanev imôngo, a u karen ishar a mbagengeseyol la." 
Proverbs16:20 U nan ver ishima sha kwaghôron yô, nan zua a kwaghdoon, man u nan suur sha TER yô, saan nan iyol." 
Proverbs16:21 Mba ve lu a kwaghfan ken ishima yô, á yila ve er, mbaeren kwagh sha mfe, kwaghôron u dedoo u sha zwa kpaa seer ityesen." 
Proverbs16:22 Mkav ka imbor i uma je, hen u nan lu a mi yô, kpa tsaha u abumeaior yô, ka ibumegh tsô." 
Proverbs16:23 Ishima i orfankwagh ka i tesen zwa u nan, man shi i seer zwa u nan ityesen kpaa." 
Proverbs16:24 Akaaôron a doon nga er ikpayough yô, a nyoho ken uma, ka mkpeyol ken akuhe." 
Proverbs16:25 Gbenda ugen sha mnenge u or yô, ka u lu vough, kpa mkur u u yô, ka igbenda i kuugh je." 
Proverbs16:26 Isharen i kwaghyan i ortom ka i wase nan tom, gadia zwa u nan ka u mgbegha nan ityô." 
Proverbs16:27 Gbilinor henen aferakaa, zwa u nan ngu er usu u hian yô." 
Proverbs16:28 Iferor nan samber a num, man or u angeregh paven ahuraior." 
Proverbs16:29 Ipilaor ka nan mee or u wan ndor a nan, nan za a nan sha gbenda u u doo ga yô." 
Proverbs16:30 Or u nan nyiar ashe yô, nan ngu henen akaa a dang, man u nan nyom tsombo yô, nan ngu eren ifer." 
Proverbs16:31 Ivu ka tsar u sha ityou u icivirigh, mba zuan a i sha gbenda u perapera." 
Proverbs16:32 Or u nan nyoon ishima fefa ga yô, nan hemba or u ageegh; u nan ker iyol i nan tsaha kpaa, nan hemba or u a ngohol gar sha utya yô." 
Proverbs16:33 Ka i er ishol sha ikum, kpa mkur u i cii yô, ngu sha ikev i TER je." 
Proverbs17:1 Guda ikevruam i yan kagh a bem, a ya u a mgbough a iniongo i yan kpa num u lu ker la." 
Proverbs17:2 Kpan u nan eren tom sha kwaghfan, nana hemba wan u a eren kwagh u kunya la, nana ya kwar u dyako a anmgbianev imôngo." 
Proverbs17:3 Adum ngu sha ci u sôron azurfa je, man usu u iwaagh kpaa ngu sha ci u zenaria, kpa TER yô, karen asema." 
Proverbs17:4 Iferor nan we zwa u ifer iko, or u aiegh kpaa ka nan ver ato sha nombor u vihin kwagh." 
Proverbs17:5 Or u nan naha icanor tar yô, ka u A gbe un la nan laha ye; or u nan ember sha bocan u or yô, nana de zuan a mtsaha ga." 
Proverbs17:6 Tsar u sha ityou u mbabeenyol ka ônov mba ônov vev; ihagh i uôn ka uter vev je. 
Proverbs17:7 Kwaghôron u sha icivir kuma ibumeor ga, man hile ityumbuzwaagh i aiegh hen shagbaoro!" 
Proverbs17:8 Iwua ngi er isha i tiaver ishe nahan ken ashe a or u nan lu a i la, hanpe ka nana gema cii, i kpe nan iyol." 
Proverbs17:9 Or u nan cir ibo yô, ka dooshima je nan keren ye, kpa or u nan saar akaa, nan ngu paven ahuraior a mimi." 
Proverbs17:10 Myange hembe nyôron orfankwagh ken ishima, a u gbidyen ibumeor akpa kwa deri." 
Proverbs17:11 Ka num tseegh iferor nan keren ye, kpa á tindi nan a ipilaortyom." 
Proverbs17:12 Guda or á kohol inyamikume i i kor i ônov kera, a u kohol ibumeor a lanegh nagh la." 
Proverbs17:13 Or u nan or iyev i kwagh u dedoo sha ifer yô, ifer ia undu ya u nan mayange ga." 
Proverbs17:14 Mhii u num yô, ngu er ka a na mngerem ian ma a ande yô, nahan yô, de anyimanaikaa, je er a lu a hingir num ga la." 
Proverbs17:15 Or u nan ne iferor ishô, man or u nan ne orperapera ibo yô, ve uhar cii mba kwagh u ndôhôr TER ishima." 
Proverbs17:16 Inja na nan man ibumeor nana lu a inyaregh sha u yamen kwaghfan, er nan lu a mkav ga yôô?" 
Proverbs17:17 Huror yô, lu a dooshima gbem, man shi i mar anmgbian sha ci u ayange a ican." 
Proverbs17:18 Or u nan ban a mkav, ka nan ngohol uwegh, nan hingir ishuur sha ishigh ki or u wan ndor a nan." 
Proverbs17:19 Or u num u doo nan yô, ka tindi u peren je a doo nan ye; or u nan maa hunda u ya u nan u tav yô, ka mtim nan keren ye." 
Proverbs17:20 Or u nan lu a ishima i dang yô, nan zough a kwagh u injaa ga, man u nan lu a nombor u icughugh yô, nan gbe ken ican." 
Proverbs17:21 Or u nan mar ibumeor, nan tser a ishima i vihin, ter u ibumeor kpaa, lu a iember ga." 
Proverbs17:22 Ishima i saan saan ka icigh ki dedoo, kpa ishima i yinan yô, i om akuhe." 
Proverbs17:23 Iferor yô, ka nan ngohol inyaregh ki yamen ishô ken myer, sha u nana za vihi igbenda i ijirigh yô." 
Proverbs17:24 Kwaghfan ngu sha ashe a or u lun a mkav, kpa ashe a ibumeor yô, nga ken ikighirtar je." 
Proverbs17:25 Wan u lanen kwagh nan ne ter u nan ishima i vihin, shi nan ne ngô u a mar nan la ishimavihin tsung." 
Proverbs17:26 Doo u á ya orperapera zwajirigh ga, u gbidyen ashagbaior kpaa, ka sha min ga." 
Proverbs17:27 Or u nan lam yum ga yô, ka nan lu a mfe, man shi or u nan lu a ishima i dem dem kpaa ka or u kaven kwagh je." 
Proverbs17:28 Ibumeor je kpaa, zum u ka nana huan ving yô, i wa nan ken mbafankwagh; zum u nana kusu zwa u nan kpaa i nenge nan er nan ngu orkavenkwagh yô." 
Proverbs18:1 Or u nan dugh iyol i nan kposo yô, ka isharen i nan iyol i nan, nan keren ye, nahan nan mough num a kwaghfan u mimi cii." 
Proverbs18:2 Ibumeor nan ngu a ma iember sha mkav ga, saa di u ishima i nan ia pase iyol i i tsô." 
Proverbs18:3 Zum u iferor ka una va yô, iheen kpaa i va, man sha ieren i kunya yô, ilyahan kpaa i va." 
Proverbs18:4 Akaaôron a ken zwa u or nga er mngerem ma zan yô, ka uwagh u kuwan, man imbor i kwaghfan kpaa." 
Proverbs18:5 U tan ken iferor, man geman nan ormimi ibo sha ijir yô, doo ga." 
Proverbs18:6 Ityumbuzwaagh i ibumeor ka i va a ayôôso, zwa u nan kpaa u keren gbidiv." 
Proverbs18:7 Zwa u ibumeor ka mtim u nan je, ityumbuzwaagh i nan kpaa ka ihônon i uma u nan je." 
Proverbs18:8 Akaaôron a orangeregh nga er kwaghyan u nyohon nahan, ka a sen a nyôr shin aji ir a shin iuv je." 
Proverbs18:9 Or u nan lu hwev sha tom u nan je yô, nan ngu anmgbian u or u timin a tim ior." 
Proverbs18:10 Iti i TER ka gôgôyou u taven u taver, orperapera ka nan yevese nan ta kimi, nan war." 
Proverbs18:11 Inyaregh ki ornyar ka gar u nan u taver je, man ka er kpekpe u taven nahan, sha mnenge u nan." 
Proverbs18:12 Mtim dondo sha ishima i moron i or, icivir di dondo sha mhir u iyol ijime." 
Proverbs18:13 Or u nan kaa imo je er nan lu a ungwa ga yô, á hingir lanegh ku nan man kwagh u kunya kpaa." 
Proverbs18:14 Jijingi u or una taver nan ken angev mbu nan, kpa jijingi u uren yô, ka an nana taver unu?" 
Proverbs18:15 Ishima i orkavenkwagh ka i zua a mfe, ato a orfankwagh kpaa nga keren mfe." 
Proverbs18:16 Iwua i or ka i sôr nan ijiir i teman, man ka i za a nan sha ishigh ki ashagbaior kpaa." 
Proverbs18:17 Or u nan vande van a ityôikaa i nan yô, ka i nenge nan a mimi, kpa or u wan ndor a nan a gema a va time kwagh u nan dedoo." 
Proverbs18:18 Ishor i eren ka i kure anyimanaikaa, man i pav mbaageev kpaa." 
Proverbs18:19 Anmgbian u i vihi nan ishima yô, nan ngu er gar u taver nahan; inyum ngi er uishindan mba iyou i taver yô." 
Proverbs18:20 Ka sha atam a sha zwa u or la, man iyav mbu nan mbua ide ye, ka sha mtser u sha zwa u nan nana lu kiva kiva ye." 
Proverbs18:21 Ku kua uma mba ken tahav mbu nombor, mba ve doo a u la, vea zua a atam a u." 
Proverbs18:22 Or u nan er kwase yô, ka kwagh u doon je nan zough a mi ye, doo TER a nan." 
Proverbs18:23 Mbaatsanev ka ve ôron kwagh sha zamber, kpa mbanyarev yô, ka ve ôron kwagh sha nomor." 
Proverbs18:24 Or u nan lu a akar kpishi yô, nan ngu timin a tim iyol i nan, kpa huror ngu u a hembe varen a anmgbian yô." 
Proverbs19:1 Guda icanor u nan zenden ken mimi u nan la, a or u nan er akaadang sha zwa man nan lu ibumeor la." 
Proverbs19:2 U lun a gbashima man mfe lun ga yô, doo ga, or u nan zenden fefa sha angahar a nan yô, ka nan kar kpe." 
Proverbs19:3 Ibumegh ki orough ka ki vihi nan gbenda, ishima i nan kpaa i hingir iyongo a TER." 
Proverbs19:4 Inyaregh ki seer a seer akar kpishi, kpa icanor yô, ka i pav nan a ikar u nan je." 
Proverbs19:5 Orshiada u aiegh nan wer mtsaha ga, or u eren aie kpaa nana war ga." 
Proverbs19:6 Ior kpishi mba keren u i doo shagbaor a ve yô; hanma or nan ngu ikar a or u nan ne iwua yô. 
Proverbs19:7 Anmgbianev mba icanor cii, mba ker nan ihom, man hile akar a nan, á undu nan, á gba ca a nan ga yee? ka nan dondo a ijime a kwaghôron, kpa a yem kera." 
Proverbs19:8 Or u nan zough a mfe yô, uma u nan doo nan ishima; or u nan we mkav iko yô, nana zua a kwaghdoon." 
Proverbs19:9 Orshiada u aiegh nan war mtsaha ga, or u ôron kwagh sha aie kpaa nana tim." 
Proverbs19:10 U ngeen a inyaregh kpishi kuma ibumeor ga, man hile kpan ngun una lu a tahav sha mbatarev yee?" 
Proverbs19:11 Kwaghfan u or ka a na nan yuwen fefa ga, u den or kwaghbo, ka nan kwagh u icivirigh je." 
Proverbs19:12 Iyugh i tor ngi er kume u gumbegha yô, kpa iveren na gema ngi er avure sha toho u ndor nahan." 
Proverbs19:13 Wan u lanen kwagh ka mtim u ter u nan; ayongo a kwase kpaa ka mnende u lugh lugh je. 
Proverbs19:14 Ya kua inyaregh ka dyako u a dugh hen uter yô, kpa kwase u fan kwagh yô, ka hen TER je nan dugh ye." 
Proverbs19:15 Hwev ka mbu na or nan yav kputu, oruhwe kpaa, ijen ia kôr nan." 
Proverbs19:16 Or u nan we tindi iko yô, ka uma u nan je nan kor ye, kpa or u nan we aeren a nan iko ga yô, nana kpe." 
Proverbs19:17 Or u nan zungu mbaatsanev mhôônom yô, nan pwar TER kwagh je, nahan Un kpaa Una na nan sha ieren i nan i dedoo la." 
Proverbs19:18 Tsaha wan wou er ishimaverenkeghen i lu her yô, de veren ishima u wuan un ga." 
Proverbs19:19 Or u nyoon ishima yum, nana tôô ibo, gadia aluer u yima un kpaa, ú shi ú va yima un keng." 
Proverbs19:20 Ver ato sha kwaghwan, rumun ityesen, sha u u̱ hingir orfankwagh sha ayange a ou a ken hemen yô." 
Proverbs19:21 Mbamhen mba kpishi ken ishima i or, kpa awashima u TER yô, ka un una lu taveraa ye." 
Proverbs19:22 Erdoo u or yô, ka un a doo ior ye; guda icanor a or u eren aie." 
Proverbs19:23 Mcie u cian TER ve a uma, or u nan lu a mi yô, nana tema a ishima i yôhôl, kwaghbo una tser nan ga." 
Proverbs19:24 Oruhwe ka nan za uwegh ku nan shin ijôndo, kpa nan hide a ku sha zwa u nan ga." 
Proverbs19:25 Gbidye orpuunakaa, tsô orlanenkwagh nana hen u eren kwagh sha inja, yange or u nan lu a mkav, tsô nana seer mfe." 
Proverbs19:26 Or u nan er a ter u nan dang, man shi nan zende ngô u nan kpaa yô, ka wan u nan kunya man u van a iheen kpaa." 
Proverbs19:27 Wan wam, mem u ungwan ityesen, aluer wea gbihin akaaôron a mfe la yô." 
Proverbs19:28 Gbilinor u eren shiada ka nan naha tar sha ijirôron i mimi, zwa u iferor ka u mena icugh." 
Proverbs19:29 I ver mbapuunior ajir a mtsaha, man shi akpa sha ci u ijime i abumeaior." 
Proverbs20:1 Wain ka orpuunakaa, msôrom ma yuwan kpaa ka orayôôso; hanma or u nan hundu ma yô, ka orfankwagh ga." 
Proverbs20:2 Mcieryol u tor ngu er kume u gumbegha yô, or u nan bam iyugh na yô, nan ngu eren uma u nan kwaghbo." 
Proverbs20:3 Or u nan palegh num yô, ka kwagh u icivirigh je, kpa hanma ibumeor yô, nan ngu keren num." 
Proverbs20:4 Oruhwe venda u kahan sule sha wangernyom, nahan nana ker kwaghyan fam shio." 
Proverbs20:5 Mhen u ken ishima i or ngu er mngerem ma zan yô; kpa or u nan lu a mkav yô, nan kese ma." 
Proverbs20:6 Ior kpishi mba pasen erdoo ve ken igbar; kpa or u jighjigh yô, ka an nana zua a mini?" 
Proverbs20:7 Orperapera u nan zenden ken mimi u nan yô, ônov mba nan mba ken ijime kpaa á saan ve iyol!" 
Proverbs20:8 Tor u a tem sha kwavjirigh yô, ka a peer ifer kera cii sha ashe na je." 
Proverbs20:9 Ka anti nana fatyô u kaan er, m wanger ishima yam, m ngu wang, i wanger isholibo yam kera?" 
Proverbs20:10 Uikaren mba myoho anza ahar man ikav mbi karen kwagh a mi anza ahar, ve uhar cii ka kwagh u ndôhôr TER ishima je." 
Proverbs20:11 Wanye kpaa ka nan pase iyol i nan sha aeren a nan je, shin aeren a nan a lu wang man vough kpaa." 
Proverbs20:12 Togh ku ungwan kua ishe i nengen, ve uhar cii ka TER A er ve ye." 
Proverbs20:13 Mnyam ma de doon we ishima ga, sha er ú gba ican ga yô, bugh ashe ou, ka nahan man ú lu a kwaghyan á kuma u gbing ye." 
Proverbs20:14 Ka kwagh u injaa ga, ka kwagh u injaa ga, kape oryamen nan kaa la, kpa zum u ka nana yem kera yô, nan gba za tan ihagh." 
Proverbs20:15 Zenaria ngu, asa a injaa kpaa ngee, kpa zwa u lun a mfe yô, ka isha i taver ishe je." 
Proverbs20:16 Ngohol ikondo i or u nan hingir ishuur sha ci u orvanava la, kôr un a̱ lu ityungu sha ci u mbavanava." 
Proverbs20:17 Ruam u icugh nyoho or tsô; kpa ken masetyô yô, zwa u nan ua iv a agboghol." 
Proverbs20:18 Hanma awashima ka a taver sha mhen, man ka sha mfe u mimi ú nôngo ityav ye." 
Proverbs20:19 Or u nan zenden anger yô, ka nan pasen akaamyer, nahan yô, de nyer nongo a or u lamen yum ga." 
Proverbs20:20 Or u nana tuhwa ter u nan, shin ngô, u nan yô, á pir imenger i nan ken angôghime." 
Proverbs20:21 Dyako u i ye fefa sha hiihii la, mkur na yô, una lu a iveren ga." 
Proverbs20:22 De kaan wer, me or iyev sha ifer, ga! Kegh TER, tsô Una yima u." 
Proverbs20:23 Uikaren mba myoho anza ahar, ka kwagh u ndôhôr TER ishima, iyôgh ki karen kwagh a mi sha icugh kpaa ki doo ga." 
Proverbs20:24 A-avenangahar a or cii, ka hen TER a lu ye, nahan á er nan man or nana fatyô u kaven gbenda u nana?" 
Proverbs20:25 Ka kwagh u hônon or, aluer nana ôr kwagh gagh er: Ka icighankwagh, man nana mase henen, er nan tende zwa kera la." 
Proverbs20:26 Tor u fan kwagh ka a peer mbaaferev, a gema a va a ikaver u ikyekye i gbiren iyiav i va ningir sha a ve." 
Proverbs20:27 Jijingi u or ka imenger i TER je, tev ajiir a ken atô u or." 
Proverbs20:28 Erdoo kua mimi mba kor tor, nan suwe ikônough ki torough ki nan sha erdoo." 
Proverbs20:29 Icivir i ikaior ka agee a ve je, hwe u mbabeenyol yô, ka ivu." 
Proverbs20:30 Agbir a akpa ka a wanger ifer, man gbidiv kpaa, ka mbu ar ken ajiir a ken atô u or." 
Proverbs21:1 Ishima i tor ngi sha ikev i TER er uikuwanmbamngerev nahan, ka A gema i henpe i sar Un cii." 
Proverbs21:2 Hanma gbenda u or ngu vough sha ashe a nan, kpa TER yô, karen asema." 
Proverbs21:3 U eren perapera kua mimi, hemba doon TER a nagh ku nan." 
Proverbs21:4 U kenger sha ilyahan kua ishima i imangeregh, iwanger i mbaaferev la, ka isholibo je." 
Proverbs21:5 Mbamhen mba ortseenshima, ka sha u kwagh ma a ngee yô, kpa hanma or u nan tolough kwagh yum yô, ka ken ibanave nan lu zan ye." 
Proverbs21:6 Inyaregh ki zuan a mi sha nombor u aiegh yô, ka tulugh u samben kera fefa, ka akaahônon a kuugh." 
Proverbs21:7 Ipila i mbaaferev la, ia kura ve kera, gayô ve venda u eren kwagh sha mimi." 
Proverbs21:8 Gbenda u or u nan lu a ibo iyol yô, u hule tsô, kpa or u wang yô, ieren i nan ngi jighilii je." 
Proverbs21:9 Guda u teman ken iniuugh ki iyoughough sha uha, a u teman a kwase u iyongo ken ya u ior ve ngee ker yô." 
Proverbs21:10 Ishima i iferor yô, ka i lu a isharen sha ifer, or u nan we ndor a na la, doo un a nan ga." 
Proverbs21:11 Zum u ka a tsaha orpuunakaa yô, orlanenkwagh nan hen kwaghfan, zum u ka a tese orfankwagh yô, nan ngohol mfe." 
Proverbs21:12 U a lu u perapera la, ka A kenger ya u mbaaferev, A gbihi mbaaferev ken kwaghbo." 
Proverbs21:13 Or u nan cir ato a nan sha u nana ungwan mliam ma icanor ga yô, nan kpaa nana vaa, kpa á ungwa nan her ga." 
Proverbs21:14 Iwua i ken iuv ka pever iyugh, man iwua i ken myer kpaa, i surun ishima i vihin i tsung la." 
Proverbs21:15 U eren mimi, ka orperapera kwagh u iember je, kpa mbaerenafer yô, kondo ve iyol." 
Proverbs21:16 Or u nan undu gbenda u mkav yô, nana za mem henpe ujijingi mba mbakpenev ve kohol yô." 
Proverbs21:17 Or u ugurgurmbaakaav ve maa nan iyol yô, nana hingir icanor je, or u wain kua mkurem ve doo nan yô, nana lu ornyar ga." 
Proverbs21:18 Orifer ka ipaa i orperapera, man, orcugh kpaa ngu sha ityough ki mbamimi." 
Proverbs21:19 Guda u teman ken taaikôngo, a u teman a kwase u iyongo kua u wan tswam." 
Proverbs21:20 Inyaregh ki injaagh ki ken ya u orfankwagh kua mkurem kpaa, kpa ibumeor yô, ka a gema a vihi ki kera cii." 
Proverbs21:21 Or u nan dondon sha perapera kua erdoo yô, nana zua a uma nan, perapera kua icivir." 
Proverbs21:22 Orfankwagh ka nan unde gar u mbaageev, nan yôhôl garutya u ve suur sha mi la." 
Proverbs21:23 Or u nan kor zwa u nan kua nombor u nan yô, nan ngu kuran uma u nan er a̱ war ican." 
Proverbs21:24 Or u gengese iyol man or u iceenegh iti i nan yô, ka orpuunakaa je, ka sha imanger i iyolgengese i nan nan eren kwagh ye." 
Proverbs21:25 Isharen i oruhwe ngi i wua nan, gadia ave a nan nga nyaghen tom." 
Proverbs21:26 Or ngu u ka nan shi tômon kwagh didi, kpa orperapera yô, ka nan na, nan nyume ga." 
Proverbs21:27 Nagh ku iferor ka kwagh u ndôhôrshima je, man hile aluer nana va a mi sha mhen u boo?" 
Proverbs21:28 Orshiada u aiegh nana saa ishe, kpa u nan ongo kwagh yô, nana ôr kwagh zan zan." 
Proverbs21:29 Iferor ka nan lu sha ishi nendaa, kpa orperapera yô, ka nan kôôm igbenda i nan dedoo." 
Proverbs21:30 Ma mfe shin mkav shin mhen u hendan a TER, ngu je ga." 
Proverbs21:31 Ka i sôr nyinya iyol sha ci u iyange i utya; kpa mhembe yô, ka hen TER a lu ye." 
Proverbs22:1 Iti i doon yô, ka kwagh u tsuwan je, hemba inyaregh ki ngeen, erdoo kpaa hemba azurfa kua zenaria." 
Proverbs22:2 Ornyar kua icanor ka ve zua, ka TER A gbe ve cii ye." 
Proverbs22:3 Orfankwagh ka nan nenge a kwaghbo, nan yer, kpa mbalanenkwagh yô, ka ve kar, ve za ya ican." 
Proverbs22:4 Injar i mhir u iyol ijime, cian TER yô, ka inyaregh man icivir kua uma je." 
Proverbs22:5 Usaa man akaahônon nga sha gbenda u udangmbaiorov, or u nan kor uma u nan yô, nana palegh ve." 
Proverbs22:6 Tese wanye gbenda u nana za yô, nahan shighe u nana bee iyol je kpaa, nana pav a u ga." 
Proverbs22:7 Mbanyarev ka ve tema tor sha mbaatsanev, man or u yan injô yô, ka kpan u or u nan injô, la." 
Proverbs22:8 Or u nan lee ifer yô, nana sunda bocan, man gbough ku iyugh i nan la, kua saa ishe." 
Proverbs22:9 Or u nan lu a ishe i zungwen mhôônom yô, nana zua a iveren, gadia nan pande kwaghyan u nan, nan na mbaatsanev." 
Proverbs22:10 Zenda orpuunakaa kera, tsô num kpaa ua yem, iyongo kua ilyahan kpaa vea bee." 
Proverbs22:11 Or u ishima i wang i doo nan yô, u nan lu a kwaghôron u doon ken zwa u nan la, tor una hingir huror u nan." 
Proverbs22:12 Ashe a TER nga kor mfe, kpa ka A bunde akaaôron a oratseregh la kera." 
Proverbs22:13 Oruhwe ka nan kaa er: Begha ngu ken won! á va wuam sha igbudu je! 
Proverbs22:14 Zwa u kasev mba u fe ve ga la, ka ihungwa i zan je, or u ishima i vihi TER a nan la, nana gba shimi." 
Proverbs22:15 Lanegh kange wanye ken ishima, kpa kwagir u tsahan a mi ua zenda ku, ua gbihi ica a nan." 
Proverbs22:16 Or u nan kighir icanor nan ngu nan sha u nana zua a kwagh, man u nan ne ornyar kwagh yô, nan ngu geman nan nan hingir oribanave." 
Proverbs22:17 Kegh ato, ungwa akaaôron a mbafankwagh, ver ishima sha mfe wam." 
Proverbs22:18 Gadia aluer ú kura a ken ishima you yô, ka kwagh u doon je, aluer aa lu sha zwa wou gbem yô." 
Proverbs22:19 Sha er msuur wou una lu sha TER yô, ka nahan man m tese u a nyian ye, een, ka we je," 
Proverbs22:20 mnger u anzaakaa a sha inja, a sha mbamhen kua mfe," 
Proverbs22:21 sha er me na u, ú fa mimi u akaaôron a a kom u veren ishima sha mi yô, man ú hide a akaaôron a mimi hen mba ve tindi u la gaa?" 
Proverbs22:22 De ngohol icanor kwagh ga, gadia ngu icanor je, man shi de kighir mbaatsanev hen hundagar ga," 
Proverbs22:23 gadia TER Una ôr kwagh ve, man Una vihi uma u mba ve nzughul a ve la kera." 
Proverbs22:24 De ye ikar a or u yuwen fefa ga, man shi de zenden a or u nyoon ishima ga," 
Proverbs22:25 sha er ú hen igbenda i nan ga, man ú er uma wou kwaghhônon ga yô." 
Proverbs22:26 De luun ken mba ve ngohol uwegh la ga, ka mba ve hingir ishuur u mbayananzô la." 
Proverbs22:27 Aluer u ngu a kwagh u kimbin a mi ga yô, ka sha ci u nyi man á ngohol we gambe sha ikevee?" 
Proverbs22:28 De kper a ikav i ipaventar i tse i uter ou ve tim la ga. 
Proverbs22:29 Aluer u nenge a or u fan tom u nan dedoo yô, nana tile sha ishigh ki utor je, nana tile sha ishigh ki upeepee-mbaiorov ga." 
Proverbs23:1 Zum u wea tema a ortaregh imôngo hen kwaghyan yô, ver ishima dedoo sha kwagh u a lu u sha ishi la." 
Proverbs23:2 Penda ihô sha iker you, aluer wea lu or u kwaghyan doon we yum yô." 
Proverbs23:3 Akaayan a na a nyohon a̱ de sar u ga, gadia ka kwaghyan u imeen je." 
Proverbs23:4 De eren iyol you ican wer, ú lu ornyar ga, de zaan hemen u veren ishima you sha mi ga;" 
Proverbs23:5 sar u ka veren ashe sha mini? Yô, ki ga; gadia ki wa akper fefa je, er gafa ka a purugh a yem sha nahan." 
Proverbs23:6 De ye kwaghyan u or u nan kenger ashe a iyongo ga, akaayan a nan a nyohon kpaa a̱ de saren we ga." 
Proverbs23:7 Gadia er nan henen ken ishima i nan la, kape nan lu kpaa la; nana kaa a we er: Ya kwagh, ma kwagh, kpa ishima i nan yô, ngi a we ga." 
Proverbs23:8 Anivur u u ye la kpaa ú sua un kera, akaaôron ou a dedoo kpaa aa saa u." 
Proverbs23:9 De er kwagh sha ato a ibumeor ga, gadia nana laha kwaghfan u akaaôron a ou la." 
Proverbs23:10 De kper a ikav i ipaventar u tse la ga, man shi de nyer ken ishule i ancôgholov kpaa ga," 
Proverbs23:11 gadia Orpaan ve taver tsô, Una ôr kwagh ve, Una na u ibo." 
Proverbs23:12 Ver ishima sha u ungwan ityesen, ato a ou kpaa sha u ungwan akaaôron a sha mfe." 
Proverbs23:13 De deen u tsahan wanye ga, gadia wea gbidye un sha kwagir kpaa una kpe ga;" 
Proverbs23:14 ú gbidye un sha kwagir yô, ú yima uma na shin Sheol je." 
Proverbs23:15 Wan wam, aluer ishima you ia lu a kwaghfan yô, mo iyol yam kpaa, á saan mo ken ishima." 
Proverbs23:16 Een, ahi am aa ember, aluer zwa wou ua ôron akaa a vough yô." 
Proverbs23:17 Ishima you i̱ de tem kwagh u ior mba bov ga, kpa lu ken mcie u cian TER iyange jimin cii." 
Proverbs23:18 Gadia injar ngi ken hemen kpee je, man ishimaverenkeghen you kpaa, á bunde i ga." 
Proverbs23:19 Ungwa ase, wan wam, fa kwagh kpaa, ver ishima you sha gbenda jighilii." 
Proverbs23:20 De luun a mbamanmsôrom imôngo ga, shin a mbaeren hua sha inyam kpaa ga." 
Proverbs23:21 Gadia or u hunden msôrom man or u eren hua vea hingir mbaibanave; mnyam ma meer kpaa maa cir or ajav iyol. 
Proverbs23:22 Ver ato sha teru u a mar u yô, de lahan ngôu shighe u a bee iyol la ga." 
Proverbs23:23 Yam mimi, de teen un ga, een, kua kwaghfan man ityesen man mkav kpaa." 
Proverbs23:24 Ter u orperapera nana ember kpe kpe, or u nan mar wan u fan kwagh yô, nana zua a iember sha a na." 
Proverbs23:25 De teru man ngôu ve̱ ember, ngôu u a mar kpaa, i̱ saan un iyol!" 
Proverbs23:26 Wan wam, nam ishima you, i̱ saan ashe ou iyol sha igbenda yam." 
Proverbs23:27 Gadia idyakwase ka ihungwa i zan je, agbaga kpaa ka ijôr i hoghol je;" 
Proverbs23:28 een, ka a ôso er ka ornumungbenda yô, seer mbamimiga ken ônov mba iorov." 
Proverbs23:29 Ka an nan kaan er: Ayoo! Man ka an nan kaan er: Kpe ahii! Man ka an nan lu a inyumu? Ka an nan vaan icana? Ka an nan gbe tôndon avav iyol a ityôikaa ga nahana? Ka an nan lu ashe jaanga? 
Proverbs23:30 Ka mba ve shi hen wain; ka mbakeren wain u i nongo un la. 
Proverbs23:31 De kenger wain zum u a nyian la ga, er a tese iengem na shin iyongo, u una senen liemenee;" 
Proverbs23:32 ken masetyô yô, ka a nyuma er iyô, ka a gber er igbinde nahan." 
Proverbs23:33 Ashe ou aa nenge akaa a u lu a nenge a mi ga yô, man ishima you ia ôron akaadang;" 
Proverbs23:34 een, ú hingir er or u yaven her atô u zegemnger nahan, shin er or u nan yav sha ityough ki ityôgh ki tsogh yô." 
Proverbs23:35 Ú kaa wer, ve gbidyem, kpa nyoon mo ga, ve gbidyem tsung, kpa m kav mbu ga; ka hanma shighe je me ndere? Me shi me ker un!" 
Proverbs24:1 De tem kwagh u iferor ga, i̱ de hangen we u teman a ve imôngo kpaa ga;" 
Proverbs24:2 gadia ishima ve henen ipila, zwa ve kpaa ngu er kwagh u vihin." 
Proverbs24:3 Ka sha kwaghfan i maa ya ye, shi ka sha mkav kpaa i taver un ye;" 
Proverbs24:4 ka sha mfe kpaa i ivin ayou sha akaa a injaa kua a dedoo kpaa ye. 
Proverbs24:5 Orfankwagh ka nan taver tsô, or u lun a mfe kpaa ka nan seer agee." 
Proverbs24:6 Gadia ka sha mhen u sha mfe man ú nôngo ityav you ye, man sha mhen u mbawasen mhen imôngo yô, mwar ngu." 
Proverbs24:7 Kwaghfan tav mimi, a hemba ibumeor, nan bughun zwa hen hundagar ga." 
Proverbs24:8 Or u nan veren ishima sha u eren ifer yô, ior vea yila nan er, oratsereghegh." 
Proverbs24:9 Mhen u ibume ka kwaghbo je, man ornahantar ka kwagh u ndôhôr ishima je." 
Proverbs24:10 Aluer ú gba uwer sha iyange i ican yô, agee ou vese ga." 
Proverbs24:11 Yima mba i lu yemen a ve ken ku la, man mba ve lu zan ze ze ze hen ijiir i sôngon la kpaa, kôr ve hide a mi!" 
Proverbs24:12 Aluer ú kaa wer: Nenge, lu se fa kwagh ne ga, Un u a karen asema, Una kav kwagh la gaa? Man Un u A kor uma wou kpaa, Una fa gaa? Man Una na hanma or sha ieren i nan kpaa gaa?" 
Proverbs24:13 Wan wam, ya iyough gadia i dio, zaryoughough kpaa, u̱ nyoho u ken zwa;" 
Proverbs24:14 nahan fa, kape kwaghfan kpaa a lu ken uma wou la, aluer wea zua a mi yô, injar ia lu ken hemen, man ishimaverenkeghen you kpaa á bunde i ga." 
Proverbs24:15 We orifer ne, de gbe mee sha ya u orperapera ga, man shi de vihin ijiir na i teman kpaa ga." 
Proverbs24:16 Gadia orperapera ka nan gba kwa taankaruhar kpa nan mough, kpa iferor yô, ka nan gba ken bocan." 
Proverbs24:17 Zum u orihom wou nan gbe yô, de ember ga, zum u nana nôngo gbev kpaa, ishima you i̱ de ember ga," 
Proverbs24:18 sha er TER A̱ de nengen, i̱ vihin Un, man A̱ gema A̱ kar a iyugh Na sha a nan kera ga." 
Proverbs24:19 Ishima i̱ de vihin we sha ci u mbaerenafer ga, de tem kwagh u mbaaferev kpaa ga;" 
Proverbs24:20 gadia iferor nan ngu a injar ken hemen ga, imenger i iferor kpaa ia pir." 
Proverbs24:21 Wan wam, cia TER kua tor kpaa; de nyer nongo a ior mba moughon ayongo ga," 
Proverbs24:22 gadia bocan una mough a ve fese, mkur u anyom a ve yô, ka an nan fe unu?" 
Proverbs24:23 Angan kpaa ka akaaôron a mbafankwagh je. U tan ken or sha dooshima sha ijir yô, doo ga." 
Proverbs24:24 Or u nan kaa a iferor er: U ngu a ishô yô, ior vea tuhwa nan, akuraior kpaa aa wa nan ifan," 
Proverbs24:25 Kpa mba ve tsaha nan yô, vea lu dedoo, iveren i dedoo kpaa ia sen sha a ve." 
Proverbs24:26 Or u nan kaa imo vough yô, ka or u susen orgen zwa je." 
Proverbs24:27 Sôr tom wou ken won, sôr akaa ken sule wou wanger wanger, ken masetyô yô, maa ya wou." 
Proverbs24:28 De luun orshiada sha or u wan ndor a we a ityôikaa ga ze, shin ú er aie sha zwa wouee?" 
Proverbs24:29 De kaan wer: Me er a na er a er a mo nahan, me ov or shon iyev, ga." 
Proverbs24:30 M kar hen sule u oruhwe, man hen sule u ikon i wain i orkavenkwagh ga;" 
Proverbs24:31 nenge, usaa mende ken u, mgbough cii, ijiir la cii, usagher cir sha mi, igyar i awen i u kpaa yôhôl kera." 
Proverbs24:32 Tsô m kenger, m ver ishima, m nenge, m zua a ityesen:" 
Proverbs24:33 mnyam mase shin kpeghee, shi mnyam ma meer kpuaa, man shi ave a wan ikum kpeghee sha u memen," 
Proverbs24:34 ka nahan ibanave you ia bur u er ka ornumungbenda nahan ye, man mban u akaa ou kpaa er orutya nahan." 
Proverbs25:1 Angan kpaa ka anzaakaa a Solomon, a ior mba Hesekia, tor u Yuda, ve kura a yô:" 
Proverbs25:2 Icivir i Aôndo yô, ka u cirin kwagh, kpa icivir i utor yô, ka u timen kwagh." 
Proverbs25:3 Mgbeca u Usha, man mze u tar, kua ishima i utor, gande u tôvon." 
Proverbs25:4 Kura hugh u azurfa kera, tsô ikagh kia due orvareniwa ker;" 
Proverbs25:5 kar a mbaaferev sha ishigh ki tor kera, ikônough nagh ki torough kia taver sha perapera." 
Proverbs25:6 De tesen mkom wou sha ishigh ki tor ga, man de til sha ijiir i mbavesen kpaa ga." 
Proverbs25:7 Gadia guda u i̱ kaa a we er: Kôndo sha ijiir ne, a u i̱ hile a we ijime sha ishigh ki shagbaor, u ashe ou a nenge a na la." 
Proverbs25:8 De dugh fefa sha u za eren num ga; gayô, ken masetyô yô, ú va er nana, zum u or u nan we ndor a we nana va u ahenge yôô?" 
Proverbs25:9 Kure kwagh wou vea or u nan we ndor a we la, kpa de pasen kwaghmyer u orgen ga," 
Proverbs25:10 sha er or u nan ongo yô, nana̱ de toho u ga, man gwa wou u bo kpaa u̱ de lu zan zan ga." 
Proverbs25:11 Kwaghôron u sha shighe vough yô, ngu er atam a ikon a zenaria a i we a shin agbande a azurfa nahan." 
Proverbs25:12 Er kunya u zenaria u ken to, man kwagh u hweegh u zenaria u wang a lu nahan, kape or u yangen kwagh sha kwaghfan nan lu hen togh ku ungwan ikaan la." 
Proverbs25:13 Er mndôhôr u senou sha shighe u sunda a lu nahan, kape ortyom u jighjigh nan lu hen mba ve tindi nan la; gadia ka nan na i yôhôl uma u ter u nan iyol." 
Proverbs25:14 Er abeen man ahumbe a lun a ura ga a lu nahan, kape or u nan manger er nana na iwua kpa nan ne ga nan lu la." 
Proverbs25:15 Ka sha ishima i wan ngegh i hembe ortaregh ye; nombor u legh legh kpaa ka u sombo kuhe. 
Proverbs25:16 U zua a iyougho? Ya i er ia kuma u yô, sha er a due u ishima, ú gema ú sua i kera, ga yô." 
Proverbs25:17 Nguhar wou u̱ de kumbur hen ya u or u nan we ndor a we yum ga; sha er ú due nan ishima nana venda u ga yô. 
Proverbs25:18 Or u eren shiada sha or u nan we ndor a nan sha aie yô, nan ngu er gbough ku lun ityough kpogholoo man sanker kua ivaan i horon nahan." 
Proverbs25:19 Msuur u sha or u jighjigh ga la, sha iyange i ican yô, ngu er inyigh ki ki tende, man nguhar u u ndivir nahan." 
Proverbs25:20 Er or u eren riga kera shighe u wuhe u ker yô, man er vineger sha mtse a lu nahan, kape or u wan or u ishima i vihin nan atsam nan lu la." 
Proverbs25:21 Aluer ijen ia kôr orihom wou yô, na nan kwaghyan nana̱ ya, man aluer imura ia kôr nan kpaa na nan mngerem nana̱ ma;" 
Proverbs25:22 gadia nahan yô, ú haa nan akausu a enger sha ityou je ve, TER kpaa Una na u injar." 
Proverbs25:23 Ahumbe a ken imbusutarimese ka a va a ura, kape nombor u angeregh kpaa u ve a ishigh ki yuwen la." 
Proverbs25:24 Guda u teman ken iniuugh ki iyoughough sha uha, a u teman a kwase u lun iyongo ken ya u ior ve ngee ker yô." 
Proverbs25:25 Er mngerem ma ndôhôr ma lu hen or u nan ver nahan, kape loho u dedoo u ken tar u icaa u lu la." 
Proverbs25:26 Er ijôr i hundun man imbormnger i i hôngor a i yô, i lu nahan, kape orperapera u mbaaferev ve hembe nan, nan lu la." 
Proverbs25:27 Iyough i yan kpishi doo ga, kpa u timen sha akaavesen yô, ka kwagh u icivirigh." 
Proverbs25:28 Er gar u i hembe un man a lu a gir ga nahan, kape or u nan ker iyol i nan tsaha ga nan lu la." 
Proverbs26:1 Er senou u sha wangernyom man er ura u sha shighe u sunda u lu nahan, kape icivir i kom ibumeor ga la." 
Proverbs26:2 Er atsator a zenden daa daa man er gbargbar di a purugh sha nahan, kape ifan i lun a ityôikaa ga, i ker ga la." 
Proverbs26:3 Akpa sha ci u nyinya, lagema sha ci u jaki, kwagir di sha ci u ijime i abumeaior." 
Proverbs26:4 De geman nan ibumeor imo sha inja i lanegh ku nan ga, sha er we kpaa ú hingir er un nahan ga yô." 
Proverbs26:5 Na ibumeor imo sha inja i lanegh ku nan, sha er nana̱ de luun orfankwagh sha mnenge u nan ga yô." 
Proverbs26:6 Or u nan tindin a loho sha ikev i ibumeor yô, nan ngu tôndon angahar a nan iyol i nan kera, shi nan ngu man kwaghbo." 
Proverbs26:7 Angahar a orsombon ka a zungur gbiva gbiva, kape kwaghôron u sha inja a lu ken zwa u abumeaior la." 
Proverbs26:8 Er or nan kange iwen ken mzu nahan, kape or u nan civir ibumeor nan lu la." 
Proverbs26:9 Er saa ka a kuma or u hunden msôrom sha uwe nahan, kape kwaghôron u sha inja a lu ken zwa u abumeaior la." 
Proverbs26:10 Er orkerenivaan ka nan vihi ior iyol wue wue nahan, kape or u nan er tôndo a ibume or man u nan er tôndo a mba karen a kar hen gbenda nan lu la." 
Proverbs26:11 Er iwa ka i hide hen isho i i nahan, kape ibumeor u nan hir sha lanegh ku nan kpaa, nan lu la." 
Proverbs26:12 U nenge or u nan lu a kwaghfan sha mnenge u nan iyol i nana? Yô, guda ibumeor a nan." 
Proverbs26:13 Oruhwe ka nan kaa er: Begha ngu sha gbenda, begha ngu zenden sha akômaigbinda." 
Proverbs26:14 Er hunda ka u zômon sha ukokombo mba u nahan, kape oruhwe kpaa, ka nan zômon iyol sha gambe u nan la." 
Proverbs26:15 Oruhwe ka nan za uwegh shin ijôndo, hwev mbu haa nan iyol u dughun zan a mi sha zwa." 
Proverbs26:16 Oruhwe sha mnenge u nan yô, nan hemba fan kwagh a ior utaankaruhar mba ve fe u nan mrumun sha mpin jighilii yô." 
Proverbs26:17 Or u ishima i vihi nan sha num u u lu u nan ga yô, nan ngu er or u nan ker iwa i i lu karen sha ato a i nahan." 
Proverbs26:18 Er orihundu u ka nan ker ityôndousu kua avaan a kuugh nahan," 
Proverbs26:19 kape or u nan tsugh or u wan ndor a nan, nan lu la, man nan gem nan kaan er: Ka asenge tsô m eren ye gaa?" 
Proverbs26:20 Ikon ia lu ga yô, usu ua pir, henpe orangeregh nan lu ga yô, num kpaa ka u mem." 
Proverbs26:21 Er akausu ka a enger man er kon u yeghen usu nahan, kape orayongo nan lu sha u hiin iyongo la." 
Proverbs26:22 Akaaôron a orangeregh nga er kwaghyan u nyohon nahan, ka a sen a nyôr shin ajiir a shin atô je." 
Proverbs26:23 Zwa u fan kwaghôron man ishima i bo, bee er ka ikagh ki i maa sha inya i cir ki azurfa iyol nahan." 
Proverbs26:24 Or u kôron ior ihom, ka nan tsugh ior sha zwa u nan, kpa ker atô u nan yô, nan koso icugh ker;" 
Proverbs26:25 aluer nana ôron kwagh sha zwa u dedoo kpaa, de ne nan jighjigh ga, gadia akaa a ndôhôrshima nga nan ken ishima ataankarahar;" 
Proverbs26:26 shin er nan cir ihom i nan sha icugh nahan kpaa ifer i nan ia due ken igbar sha ishigh ki mkohol u ior. 
Proverbs26:27 Hanma or u nan tim ihungwa yô, nana gba shimi, man u nan menger iwen kpaa, ia hile sha a nan." 
Proverbs26:28 Nombor u ôron aie ngu ker mba u nzughul a ve la ihom; man zwa u nyohon kpaa ngu ne mtim. 
Proverbs27:1 De sugh kwagh iyol you sha ci u kper ga, gadia u fa kwagh u iyange ia va a mi ga." 
Proverbs27:2 De orgen nana̱ wuese we, i̱ de lu zwa wou ga, i̱ lu or u u fe nan ga yô, i̱ de lu zwa wou ga." 
Proverbs27:3 Iwen ka kwagh u yuhwan je, waarawa kpaa yuhwa, kpa ishimavihin i ibumeor hemba akaa ahar ne cii." 
Proverbs27:4 Ishima i nyoon ka ipilakwagh u bo, iyugh di ka kwagh u usan haan inya, kpa iwuhe yô, ka an nana fatyô u tilen i sha ishi?" 
Proverbs27:5 Guda myange u ken igbar, a dooshima u a lu ken myer la." 
Proverbs27:6 Avav a huror a gber a la, ka kwagh u mimi, kpa ijôsusen i orihom yô, ngi wuee." 
Proverbs27:7 Or u nan idi yô, zaryoughough je kpaa ka u ndôhôr nan ishima, kpa or u ijen i ker nan yô, hanma kwagh u yuan kpaa ka nan kwagh u nyohon." 
Proverbs27:8 Er ngôinyon ka a undu iya na a zenden ca nahan, kape or u nan zenden ca a ya u nan nan lu la." 
Proverbs27:9 Mkurem ma shighen kua kwaghhumandoon mba ne ishima i saan saan, kape mdoom ma ikar u or ma ma dugh ken mhen u gbar gbar ma lu la." 
Proverbs27:10 Huror wou man huror u teru yô, de te ve kera ga; de nyer hen ya u anngôu sha iyange i ican i tser u la ga; guda or u wan ndor a we, u nan lu ikua ikua, a anngô, u a lu ca la," 
Proverbs27:11 Wan wam, lu orfankwagh, na i̱ saan mo iyol, sha er me gema me kaa imo a or u a laham yô." 
Proverbs27:12 Orfankwagh ka nan nenge a kwaghbo, nan yer, kpa mbalanenkwagh yô, ka ve kar ve za ya ican." 
Proverbs27:13 Ngohol ikondo i or u nan hingir ishuur yô, man shi kôr un a̱ hingir ityungu sha ci u kwase u nan ve a va yô." 
Proverbs27:14 Or u nan ver ikar u nan dedoo sha imo i genger genger, pepe pepe yô, á hingir er ka ifan nan we i nahan." 
Proverbs27:15 Mnende u lugh lugh sha iyange i ura yô, ka kwagh môm a kwase u iyongo." 
Proverbs27:16 Or u i sar nan ka yangen un yô, ka ahumbe nan yange ye, uwegh ku yanegh ku nan kpaa ku bende a mkurem." 
Proverbs27:17 Iyôgh ka ki wua iyôgh, kape or kpaa ka nan wua orgen la." 
Proverbs27:18 Hanma or u nan kor kon u tur yô, nana ya atam a u, or u nan we orvesen u nan iko yô, á civir nan." 
Proverbs27:19 Er ishigh ka ki nenge ishigh ken mnger nahan, kape ishima i or kpaa ka i tese mlu u or la." 
Proverbs27:20 Sheol man Abadon mba idi je ga, kape ashe a or kpaa a idi mayange ga la." 
Proverbs27:21 Adum ngu sha ci u sôron azurfa je, usu iwaagh kpaa ngu sha ci u zenaria, or kpaa mba karen nan sha kwagh u nan wuese yô." 
Proverbs27:22 Shin aluer wea kume ibumeor shin akpela sha tor a samuyia imôngo je kpaa, nahan kpaa ibumegh ki nan kia pav a nan ga." 
Proverbs27:23 Nôngo fa mlu u ikumiyôngo you, nenge sha akumauile a ou doo doo kpaa;" 
Proverbs27:24 gadia inyaregh ki lu gbem ga; idyer i tor ia lu sha ikov ikov cii kpa? 
Proverbs27:25 Zum u toho ua bee kera, man gwergwe una mende, man á kohol ahu a sha iwo á ombo a yô," 
Proverbs27:26 ônovmbaiyôngov vea lu sha ci u akondo a ou je, man ivo kpaa sha ci u yamen sule a mi," 
Proverbs27:27 atumba a ivo kpaa aa kuma u kwaghyan wou man kwaghyan u ior ou cii, kua kwaghyan u mbayevkasev mba shilen we tom kpaa." 
Proverbs28:1 Mbaaferev ka ve gba yevese tsô, ma or kpaa nan zendan ve ityô ga, kpa mbaperapera yô, ka ve lu a ishima i tiaver er begha nahan." 
Proverbs28:2 Ka sha ci u kwaghbo u a lu hen tar la, man utor ka ve ngee ken u kpishi nahan ye, kpa sha ior mba ve lu a mkav kua mfe yô, ua lu her taveraa zan zan je." 
Proverbs28:3 Icanor u nan kighir mbaatsanev yô, nan ngu er ura u kuwan akaa kera, undun kwaghyan her ga nahan." 
Proverbs28:4 Mba ve undu tindi yô, ka ve civir mbaaferev, kpa mba ve we tindi iko yô, ka ve ta num sha a ve." 
Proverbs28:5 Aferaior nga kaven ijir i mimi ga, kpa mba ve keren TER yô, mba kaven akaa cii." 
Proverbs28:6 Guda icanor u nan zenden ken mimi u nan la, a or u nzughul igbenda i nan, shin nana lu ornyar je kpaa." 
Proverbs28:7 Or u nan we tindi iko yô, ka wan u fan kwagh je, kpa or u nan lu ijende i mbavihin inyaregh dang dang, nan ngu nan ter u nan kunya." 
Proverbs28:8 Or nan seer kwagh u nan sha u ngohol mngerem kua mtsera kpaa yô, nan ngu kohol kwagh sha ci u or u zungwen mbaatsanev mhôônom." 
Proverbs28:9 Or u nan gem togh ku nan kera sha u nana ungwa tindi ga yô, msen u nan je kpaa, ka kwagh u ndôhôrshima." 
Proverbs28:10 Or u nan er mbaperapera sha u ve̱ kaha ve̱ za sha gbenda u bo yô, nan iyol i nan je nana gba shin ihungwa i nan, kpa mbamimi yô, vea ya dyako u dedoo." 
Proverbs28:11 Ornyar ka nan lu a kwaghfan sha mnenge u nan, kpa icanor u nan lu a mkav yô, ka nan time nan fa kwagh u nan doo doo." 
Proverbs28:12 Zum u mbaperapera ve hembe yô, icivir ka i lu kpishi, kpa zum u mbaaferev ve zough a tahav yô, ior ka ve yer kera." 
Proverbs28:13 Or u nan cir akaabo a nan yô, nana zua a iveren ga, kpa u nan pase a, shi nan undu a yô, nana zua a mhôônom ma zungwen." 
Proverbs28:14 Á saan or u nan cie TER gbem la iyol, kpa u nan cighir ishima i nan yô, nan gba ken kwaghbo." 
Proverbs28:15 Er begha u tan kume man er dwem u zenden ikôr nahan, kape iferor u teman tor sha ior mbaibanave nan lu la." 
Proverbs28:16 Ititor i i lu a mkav ga yô, ka zegeipiraor kpaa, kpa or u nan vende mtsera u bo yô, ayange a na aa seer sha won." 
Proverbs28:17 Or u ike i awambe a orgen i ker nan yô, nana̱ yevese nana̱ yem shin uwar je kpaa, ma or nana̱ de yangen nan ga." 
Proverbs28:18 Hanma or u nan zenden sha mimi yô, á yima nan, kpa or u nan nzughul igbenda i nan yô, nana gba fese je." 
Proverbs28:19 Or u nan kaha sule u nan yô, nana lu a kwaghyan kpishi, kpa or u nan zenden sha agbilinakaa yô, ibanave ia tser nan." 
Proverbs28:20 Or u jighjigh nana mgbough a iveren, kpa or u i kumbur nan iyol u hingir ornyar yô, nana de zuan a mtsaha ga." 
Proverbs28:21 U tan ken or sha dooshima yô, doo ga; gadia sha u zuan a ankwaghyan je kpaa, or ka nan per tindi." 
Proverbs28:22 Or u nan we bo yô, nan kumbur sha u hingir ornyar, nan kera fa ase er ibanave ia va tser nan ga." 
Proverbs28:23 Or u nan kôôm or yô, ken masetyô á hemba rumun nan, a or u nan er kwagh sha zwa u nyohon la." 
Proverbs28:24 Or u nan ngohol ter shin ngô u nan kwagh sha apera man nan kaa er: Kwagh ne ka kwaghbo ga yô, or shon nan ngu kwagh môm a or u timin ior je." 
Proverbs28:25 Or u nan lu a ishima i yan mtsera yum yô, ka nan naan num, kpa or u nan suur sha TER yô, á kpe nan iyol." 
Proverbs28:26 Or u nan suur sha ishima i nan iyol i nan yô, ka ibumeor je, kpa or u nan zenden sha kwaghfan yô, á yima nan." 
Proverbs28:27 Or u nan ne mbaatsanev kwagh yô, kwagh á ban nan ga, kpa or u nan gem ashe a nan kera yô, á wa nan ifan kpishi." 
Proverbs28:28 Zum u mbaaferev ka vea za hemen yô, ior ve yer kera, kpa zum u ka vea saa ishe yô, mbaperapera ve seer a seer." 
Proverbs29:1 Or u i kôôm nan gbem kpa nan nembe ikôr her yô, á sombo nan fese, mwar á kera lu ga." 
Proverbs29:2 Zum u mbaperapera ka vea seer yô, ior ve ember kpa zum u iferor ka nana tema tor yô, ior ve shir asema." 
Proverbs29:3 Or u kwaghfan a doo nan yô, ka nan na ter u nan iember, kpa u nan tem imôngo a mbaagbaga yô, nan vihin inyaregh ki nan dang." 
Proverbs29:4 Tor yô, ka sha ieren i mimi ka a sôr tar ye, kpa u nan ngohol kwagh sha apera yô, ka nan vihi u." 
Proverbs29:5 Or u nan kpamegh or wan ndor a nan yô, nan ngu gbihin nan kwaghhônon shin angahar." 
Proverbs29:6 Sha tindi u peren u iferor yô, kwaghhônon ngu, kpa orperapera yô, ka nan wa icam nan ember." 
Proverbs29:7 Orperapera ka nan wa mbaatsanev iko sha ian i ve lu sha mi, iferor yô, nan ngu a mkav u nana fa nahan ga." 
Proverbs29:8 Ior mba nahan tar ka ve sende ior ityough ken gar, kpa mbafankwagh yô, ka ve gema ve hide a iyugh ijime." 
Proverbs29:9 Aluer orfankwagh nana hendan a ibumeor hen ijir yô, ibumeor nana yôôso dang dang man nana se je nana kera mem ga." 
Proverbs29:10 Mba i doo ve u haan awambe inya yô, mba ker ormimi ihom, mba keren uma u mbaperapera kpaa." 
Proverbs29:11 Ibumeor ka nan pase ishimanyoon i nan cii, kpa orfankwagh yô, ka nan kighir i, i mem." 
Proverbs29:12 Aluer ortaregh ver ato u ungwan aie yô, mbatomov nav cii vea hingir mbaaferev." 
Proverbs29:13 Icanor man ipiraor ka ve zua, TER na ashe ve iwanger ve uhar cii." 
Proverbs29:14 Tor u nan er ijir i mbaatsanev sha mimi yô, ikônough nagh ki torough kia lu taveraa gbem." 
Proverbs29:15 Kwagh man tsaha mba ne kwaghfan, kpa wanye u i gbe den nan tsô yô, nana na ngô u nan kunya." 
Proverbs29:16 Shighe u mbaaferev ka vea seer yô, atindi a peren kpaa a seer, kpa mbaperapera vea kenger mgbe ve." 
Proverbs29:17 Tsaha wan wou, tsô nana na u mmem ken ishima, een, nana na u iember ken ishima." 
Proverbs29:18 Henpe mpase a lu ga yô, ior ka ve ar ave, kpa or u nan we atindi iko yô, á saan nan iyol." 
Proverbs29:19 Kpan ongo mkôôm u sha kwaghôron ga, gadia shin nana kav je kpaa, nana wa iko ga."
