Proverbs29:20 U nenge or u ôron kwagh gagh kpa? Yô, guda ibumeor a nan." 
Proverbs29:21 Or u nan yese kpan u nan legh legh er a lu iyev la je yô, una hingir wan u nan ken masetyô." 
Proverbs29:22 Or u nyoon ishima fefa, nan ne num; or u yuwen di kpaa nan peren atindi kpishi." 
Proverbs29:23 Mgengeseyol u or una hile a nan ijime, kpa u nan hidi a iyol i nan ijime yô, nana zua a icivir." 
Proverbs29:24 Hanma or u nan nyer nongo a ormbaiv yô, ka uma u nan je nan ker un ihom ye, ka nan ungwa mbum, kpa nan bugh zwa ga." 
Proverbs29:25 Mcie u cian or ka a va a kwaghhônon, kpa or u nan suur sha TER yô, nana tema doo doo." 
Proverbs29:26 Ior kpishi mba nenge u doon a ortaregh, kpa ijir i or yô, ka hen TER i dugh ye." 
Proverbs29:27 Or u nan lu a mimi ga yô, nan ngu mbaperapera kwagh u ndôhôrshima, or u nan zenden jighilaa di kpaa nan ngu aferaior kwagh u ndôhôrshima." 
Proverbs30:1 Akaaôron a Agur wan u Yake. Kwaghôron u injaa je. Or la kaa er: M er iyol yam m vôr, Aôndo; m er iyol yam m vôr, Aôndo; kwagh nenger mo." 
Proverbs30:2 Mimi, mo m lan kwagh je kuma u me lu or ga, m ngu a mkav er or nahan kpaa ga," 
Proverbs30:3 m hen kwaghfan kpaa ga, man m ngu a mfe u, u A lu Icighan la kpaa ga." 
Proverbs30:4 Ka an nan undu Sha, shi nan hongo? Ka an nan kusu ahumbe ken ave a nana? Ka an nan kange mngerem ken ikondo i nana? Ka an nan ver akighir a tar ciilii? Iti i nan er nyi, man iti i wan u nan er nyi? aluer wea fa yô." 
Proverbs30:5 Hanma kwaghôron u Aôndo cii ka u wang, Un ka perutya u mba ve lian ken a Na yô." 
Proverbs30:6 De kera seer kwagh sha akaaôron a Na ga, sha er A̱ de yangen we man i̱ kaven er u lu or u aiegh ga." 
Proverbs30:7 M ker akaa her a We ahar tsô, de nyumum a er m lu a kpe ga ne ga:" 
Proverbs30:8 Na, akaa a gbilinigh kua mbaaie, ve̱ gba ca a mo; de nem ibanave ga, shin inyaregh kpishi kpaa ga, kosom sha kwaghyan u una kuma sha gbayol wam yô," 
Proverbs30:9 sha er m̱ de idi m̱ nyiman We, m̱ kaan Mer; Ka an nan lu TERE? ga, man shi m̱ de lu oribanave je er me za ii, me gema me ter iti i Aôndo wam gbilin, ga." 
Proverbs30:10 De senden wanye ityough a orvesen u nan ga, sha er nana wa u ifan, man á na u ibo kpaa ga yô." 
Proverbs30:11 Kov ugen ngu u u we ter ve ifan, man shi u kera veren ngô ve doo doo kpa ga yô," 
Proverbs30:12 Kov ugen ngu u u lu perapera sha ashe a ve yô, nahan kpaa, i ôô ve hôngor ve kera ga." 
Proverbs30:13 Kov ngu, kpash, imanger i ashe a ve kehe tsô! Akurashee ve nga sha je." 
Proverbs30:14 Kov ngu u anyi a ve a lu usanker yô, man anyi a ve a ken azegher kpaa ka ahô je, sha u vea ya mbaatsanev shin tar kera, kua mbaibanave ken ior kpaa yô." 
Proverbs30:15 Hiin ngu a ônov mba kasev uhar, ka: Na man Na! Akaa nga atar a a idi mayange ga yô, anyiin je kpaa nga, a a fatyô u kaan er: Kuma ve! mayange ga yô." 
Proverbs30:16 Ka Sheol man iyav mbu kwaseikôm, inya i mngerem ma kom i ga, man usu u mayange u kaan er, kuma u je ga yô." 
Proverbs30:17 Ishe i i naha ter u i tar, man ii laha u wan ngô u i iko yô, ugugôô mba shin pev vea dugh i, ônov mba gafa kpaa vea ya i." 
Proverbs30:18 Akaa nga atar a kpiligh mo iyol je, a gandem, een, nga anyiin je kpaa, a m fe a ga yô:" 
Proverbs30:19 Ka mpurugh u gafa sha kwavaôndo, mzende u iyô sha vande, mzende u tso ken atô u zegemnger, man shi kwagh u nomsoor a wanyekwase." 
Proverbs30:20 Kwagh u idyakwase yô, ka ape a lu ne: ka nan ya, nan ese zwa u nan kera, nan kaa er: M er kwaghbo ga." 
Proverbs30:21 Ka sha akaa atar, tar ka u tenger ye, ka anyiin je, a a nenger u yô:" 
Proverbs30:22 sha kpan zum u ka nan hingir tor yô, man ibumeor u ka nana ide kwaghyan yô," 
Proverbs30:23 sha kwase u i ker nan ihom zum u nan er nom yô, man kpankwase u nan dugh ngô u nan kera, nan gem nan tem sha ityough ki nan yô." 
Proverbs30:24 Akaa nga anyiin je, a a ndahar sha won yô, kpa gema nga a kwaghfan kpishi:" 
Proverbs30:25 iyôn ka nongo u taver ga, nahan kpaa ngi kohol kwaghyan u i inyom;" 
Proverbs30:26 akuwa ka nongo u taver je ga, kpa nga eren ya u a ken avande;" 
Proverbs30:27 ikomon ngi a tor ga, nahan kpaa ngi zenden akum akum cii;" 
Proverbs30:28 vendeve yô, u fatyô u kôron un sha ave, nahan kpaa lu ken uya mba utor." 
Proverbs30:29 Akaa nga atar a a we iceen sha ijende i a yô, een, nga anyiin je kpaa, a a we iceen sha zende:" 
Proverbs30:30 ka begha u a hembe agee ken inyamtoho cii, te ma or gbenda ga;" 
Proverbs30:31 nyinyautya man kpev kpaa, man shi tor u a lu a ikum i mbautyav yô." 
Proverbs30:32 Aluer wea bume sha u kenden iyol you sha, shin aluer wea hen ifer i eren yô, wa uwegh zwa." 
Proverbs30:33 Gadia atumba a kunden ka a na ahôm, ihinga i zômon, ka i due awambe, kape ishima i nyoon yum kpaa, i ne num la." 
Proverbs31:1 Akaaôron a Lemuel tor u Masa, a ngô na tese un a la:" 
Proverbs31:2 Ka nyi, wan wama? Ka nyi, wan wam u iyav ava? Ka nyi, wan wam u uiceghzwa ava?" 
Proverbs31:3 De vihin agee ou sha ukase ga, de zenden ze hen mba ve timin utor ga." 
Proverbs31:4 Doo u utor, Lemuel, doo u utor ve̱ de maan wain ga, shin u mbatarev kpaa msôrom ma yuwan ma doo ve ga," 
Proverbs31:5 sha er ve̱ de me, tindi a̱ hungul ve, man ve̱ vihi ijir i mba ican i tser ve la ga." 
Proverbs31:6 Na or u nan mgbôghom u saan ishe la msôrom ma taver, man or u ishima i vihi nan yum la yô, na nan wain," 
Proverbs31:7 nana̱ ma, ibanave i nan i̱ hungul nan, nana̱ de kera shi umbur zayol u nan la ga." 
Proverbs31:8 Bugh zwa wou sha u wasen mbakondonaker, man sha u wasen mba ve sôôn u saan ishe yô." 
Proverbs31:9 Bugh zwa wou ôr ijir sha mimi, ôr ijir i mbaatsanev kua mbaibanave sha mimi." 
Proverbs31:10 Ka an nana fatyô u zuan a kwase u injaa? Gadia nan hemba asa a mimi inja. 
Proverbs31:11 Ishima i nom u nan, ka i suur sha a nan, una de zuan a mtser ga." 
Proverbs31:12 Kwase la eren a na dedoo, eren un ifer ga, sha ayange a a lu uma la cii." 
Proverbs31:13 Kwase la ker ul kua mou, nan eren tom sha ave a nan sha gbashima." 
Proverbs31:14 Nan ngu er utso mba mbakasuav nahan, nan van a kwaghyan u nan ca je." 
Proverbs31:15 Nan nderen dindee je, nan nan mbayev mba nan kwaghyan, nan karen mbayevkasev mba ve eren nan tom ci ve." 
Proverbs31:16 Nan ver ishima i nan sha sule ugen maa nan yam u je; ka sha mtser u ave a nan je, nan môôr ikon i wain ye." 
Proverbs31:17 Nan wa agee iyol, nan taver akaseaveegh a nan." 
Proverbs31:18 Nan kav er ikav mbi kasuav mbi nan mbi ve a mtsera yô; imenger i nan i pirin tugh ga. 
Proverbs31:19 Ka nan kôr ave a nan sha ijingamou, akevaveegh a nan kpaa a kôr sha igyambe." 
Proverbs31:20 Ka nan naregh uwegh ku nan hen mbaatsanev, nan naregh ave a nan hen mbaibanave." 
Proverbs31:21 Cie senou sha ci u ior mba hen ya u nan ga, gadia mba hen ya u nan cii, ve haa akondo a nyian dindee." 
Proverbs31:22 Ka nan er kwagh u nan u haan sha gambe, akondo a nan kpaa a lu a pupuu a kôngor man a nyian dindee." 
Proverbs31:23 Nom u nan kpaa i fa un hen ihinda i gar, zum u ka una tema ken atô u mbatarev yô." 
Proverbs31:24 Ka nan koron uriga sha ikondo i pupuu i kôngor, nan teen; ka nan naan mbakasuav ikange i shin iwenge." 
Proverbs31:25 Tahav kua icivir ka ikondo i nan je; ka nan seen iyange i i lu van ken hemen la kpaa. 
Proverbs31:26 Nan bugh zwa u nan sha kwaghfan, ityesen i erdoo kpaa i lu sha nombor u nan." 
Proverbs31:27 Ka nan nengen sha tom u ken ya u nan dedoo, ye kwaghyan u oruhwe ga." 
Proverbs31:28 Ônov mba nan ve mough, ve wuese nan ve ver nan doo doo, nom u nan kpaa, wuese nan, a kaa er:" 
Proverbs31:29 Ônkasev kpishi ve er akaa sha inja, kpa we u gema u hemba ve cii." 
Proverbs31:30 Kumashe ka icugh, dooashe ka gbilinkwagh, kwase u cian TER yô, ka nan á wuese nan ye." 
Proverbs31:31 Na nan sha atam a ave a nan, man ityom i nan i wuese nan hen ihindagar." 
Ecclesiastes1:1 Akaaôron a Orpasenkwagh, wan u Davidi, tor u ken Yerusalem:" 
Ecclesiastes1:2 Gbilinkwagh u agbilinakaa, kape Orpasenkwagh a kaa ne, gbilinkwagh u akaagbilinigh, ka gbilin cii." 
Ecclesiastes1:3 Ka nyi mtser je or nana zua a mi sha tom u nan u sha ican cii u nan lu eren shin tara? 
Ecclesiastes1:4 Kov ugen ka u kar, ugen shi u va, kpa tar yô, ngu gbem sha won." 
Ecclesiastes1:5 Iyange ka i due, man iyange ka i mire, i tolough yemen u zan henpe ka i due la." 
Ecclesiastes1:6 Ahumbe ka a ver ishigh a za ken imbusutariyan, shi a gema a za ken imbusutarimese, nga ningir gbem sha gbenda u a, man ahumbe shi a hide henpe a vande ningir yô." 
Ecclesiastes1:7 Uifi cii mba kough mba za hee shin zegemnger, nahan kpaa zegemnger ivin ga; henpe uifi ka vea ver ishigh la, ka her je, shi ka ve za ye." 
Ecclesiastes1:8 Akaa cii vôr gbida gbida, gande u ôron; ishe ngi idi sha mnenge ga, togh kpaa ku idi sha m-ongo ga." 
Ecclesiastes1:9 Kwagh u a vande lun, shi ka un una lu ye, kwagh u i vande eren ka un je shi á er ye; ma kwagh u he ngu sha won ga." 
Ecclesiastes1:10 Kwagh ugen ngu u or nana ter nana kaa er: Nenge, kwagh ne ka u he kpa? A vande lun sha won sha ayange a tsuaa, a se lu a lu ga la." 
Ecclesiastes1:11 Mba umbur ior mba tsuaa ga, man mba ve lu van ken hemen kpaa, mba vea mase van vea umbur di ve ga." 
Ecclesiastes1:12 Mo Orpasenkwagh ne, m lu tor u Iserael ken Yerusalem." 
Ecclesiastes1:13 M ver ishima sha u me ker man me time sha kwaghfan sha akaa cii a a eren sha won yô; ka kwagh u ican tsung je, u Aôndo A ne ônov mba iorov sha u vea er tom u nyoon iyol sha mi yô." 
Ecclesiastes1:14 M nenge tom u i eren shin tar cii; yô, nenge ase, ka gbilinkwagh ci ca, ka u zendan ahumbe ityô tsô!" 
Ecclesiastes1:15 Kwagh u a vande huren kera yô, á fatyô u hingir jighilaa ga, man kwagh u a lu ga yô, á fatyô u ôron iyenge na ga." 
Ecclesiastes1:16 M ôr kwagh a iyol yam, m kaa mer: Nenge, m zua a kwaghfan kpishi hemba mba ve vande lun a mo ken Yerusalem cii; een, ishima yam zua a kwaghfan kua mfe wuee." 
Ecclesiastes1:17 M ver ishima yam sha u fan kwaghfan kua mfe, man sha u fan ihundugh kua ibumegh; tsô m kav, ngun kpaa ka u zendan di ahumbe ityô tsô." 
Ecclesiastes1:18 Gadia sha kwaghfan kpishi, mye u ican kpaa ngu di kpishi; or u nan seer mfe yô, nan seer ishima i vihin kpaa." 
Ecclesiastes2:1 M kaa ken ishima yam mer: Yô, me kar u sha msaanyol; nahan yô, i̱ kpe u iyol sha ishar i haan iyol; kpa nenge, kwagh ne kpaa lu gbilinkwagh tsô." 
Ecclesiastes2:2 M yila ahan a sen mer, ka ihundugh; m kaa sha msaanyol, mer, ne nyi?" 
Ecclesiastes2:3 M time ken ishima yam, m ker gbenda u mea er man á kpem iyol sha wain, er ishima yam lu zan a mo sha kwaghfan heregh yô, man er mea er man me kôr lanegh, zan zan me kar nengen kwagh u a doo u ônov mba iorov vea er sha won sha ayange a uma ve cii yô." 
Ecclesiastes2:4 M er ityom i vesen, m maa uya sha ci wam, m môôr ikon i wain," 
Ecclesiastes2:5 m er ishule i ahuu man ajiir a man ahumbe ker, m môôr ikon ken a i umen hanma inja i atamegh," 
Ecclesiastes2:6 m er atungu sha ci u me urun ikô i agumaikon. 
Ecclesiastes2:7 M yam ikpan i nomso man i ukase, m lu a ikpan i i mar hen ya wam kpaa, man shi m lu a akumabua kpen kpen kua iyôngo, hemba mba ve vande lun a mo ken Yerusalem cii." 
Ecclesiastes2:8 M kohol azurfa man zenaria, man akaainjaa a utor man a sha ityar kposo kposo; m lu a mbaatsamev mba nomso kua mba kasev, man akaa a saren ônov mba iorov, man hanma injakwagh i doon ior cii;" 
Ecclesiastes2:9 nahan m gande, m seer a seer, hemba mba ve vande lun a mo ken Yerusalem cii, kwaghfan wam kpaa lu a mo her." 
Ecclesiastes2:10 Hanma kwagh u a sar ashe am yô, m nyume a ga, m nyume ishima yam hanma kwagh u iember ga, gadia ishima yam ember sha tom wam u m ye ican sha mi cii; ka kwagh ne je lu injar yam i sha tom wam cii u m ye ican sha mi la ye." 
Ecclesiastes2:11 Tsô m gema m nenge ityom yam cii, i ave am a er yô, man shi tom u m ye ican sha mi la kpaa, nenge ase, nahan kpaa lu gbilinkwagh cii, ka di u zendan ahumbe ityô tsô, ma mtsera lu sha mi sha won ga." 
Ecclesiastes2:12 Tsô m gema sha u me nenge er kwaghfan man ihundugh kua lanegh ve lu yô; gadia or u nan ve ken ijime i tor yô, shi nana er nyi? Saa di kwagh u i vande eren tsuaa je yô." 
Ecclesiastes2:13 Tsô m nenge kwaghfan hemba lanegh ca je, er iwanger i hemba ime nahan." 
Ecclesiastes2:14 Orfankwagh ngu a ashe sha ityough ki nan, ibumeor yô, nan zenden ken ime; nahan kpaa, m kav kwagh u tseren ve ngu di inja i môm tsô." 
Ecclesiastes2:15 Tsô m ôr ken ishima yam mer, kwagh u á er ibumeor la, mo kpaa una erem di nahan vough, nahan shi m hemba kwaghfan sha ci u nyi? Tsô shi m kaa ken ishima yam mer, kwagh ne kpaa ka gbilinkwagh je." 
Ecclesiastes2:16 Gadia á kera umbur orfankwagh sha won ga, di er ibumeor nahan vough; gadia sha ayange a ken hemen yô, akaa cii hungul kera ve. Kape ku u orfankwagh man ibumeor u lu inja i môm je nee!" 
Ecclesiastes2:17 Ka nahan man uma a dughum ishima ye, gadia tom u i eren shin tar u lum kwagh u nyoon iyol, gadia ka gbilinkwagh ci ca, ka u zendan di ahumbe ityô tsô." 
Ecclesiastes2:18 Tom u m ye ican a mi shin tar cii u duem ishima, sha er m lu undun u sha ci u or u nana va ken ijime yam la yô." 
Ecclesiastes2:19 Man ka an nan fe shin nana lu orfankwagh shin nana lu ibumeoro? Nahan kpaa tom wam cii u lu m ya ican sha mi la, u m nôngo sha mi sha kwaghfan wam shin tar la, ua hingir sha ikev i nan. Kwagh ne kpaa ka gbilinkwagh." 
Ecclesiastes2:20 Ka nahan man m gem m hundu ishima yam sha hanma tom u m ye ican sha mi shin tar ne ye. 
Ecclesiastes2:21 Gadia orgen ngu, u tom u nan u lu sha kwaghfan man sha mfe man sha mhembefan, nahan kpaa nana undu orgen a mi, u nan er tom sha mi ga yô, á hingir dyako u nan. Kwagh ne kpaa ka gbilinkwagh je man mvihi u vesen kpaa." 
Ecclesiastes2:22 Gadia ka nyi kwagh man or nana zua a mi sha tom u nan cii man sha mnenge u tsung u sha ishima i nan, u nan ye ican sha mi shin tara?" 
Ecclesiastes2:23 Gadia ayange a nan cii ka ican tseegh, tom u nan kpaa ka ishima i vihin tsô; een, tugh je kpaa ishima i nan i mem ga. Kwagh ne kpaa ka gbilinkwagh." 
Ecclesiastes2:24 Kwaghdoon ugen ngu ga, saa u or nana̱ ya kwagh nana̱ ma kwagh man á kpe uma u nan iyol ken tom u nan u sha ican la. Kwagh ne kpaa m nenge, ka sha ikev i Aôndo a dugh ye." 
Ecclesiastes2:25 Gadia ka an nana fatyô u gban yan kwagh, man ka an nana fatyô u ember, aluer a lu Un ga yô?" 
Ecclesiastes2:26 Gadia ka or u i doo Un a nan la, ka nan Aôndo A ne nan kwaghfan man mfe kua iember ye; kpa orisholibo yô, ka A na nan tom er nana̱ kohol nana̱ ta tihi, nahan á gema á na or u i doo Aôndo a nan yô. Kwagh ne kpaa ka gbilinkwagh, ka u zendan di ahumbe ityô tsô." 
Ecclesiastes3:1 Hanma kwagh ngu a ayange na; man shighe kpaa ngu sha ci u hanma kwagh sha won: 
Ecclesiastes3:2 Shighe u maren ngu, man shighe u kpen, shighe u môôr kwagh, man shighe u wuhen kwagh u i môôr la kera;" 
Ecclesiastes3:3 shighe u wuan ngu, man shighe u waren; shighe u yôhôl, man shighe u maan kpaa;" 
Ecclesiastes3:4 shighe u mlia ngu, man shighe u ahan a sen; shighe u zungwen, man shighe u yaren kwan;" 
Ecclesiastes3:5 shighe u haan awen kera, man shighe u kohol awen; shighe u kuven, man shighe u den ikuven;" 
Ecclesiastes3:6 shighe u keren kwagh, man shighe u kwagh á gba saan tsô; shighe u koson kwagh, man shighe u haan kera;" 
Ecclesiastes3:7 shighe u anden, man shighe u koron; shighe u huan ving, man shighe u lamen;" 
Ecclesiastes3:8 shighe u lun a dooshima, man shighe u kôron ihom; shighe u nôngon ityav, man shighe u bem." 
Ecclesiastes3:9 Ka nyi mtser man ortom nan zough a mi sha tom u nan ye ican sha mi laa? 
Ecclesiastes3:10 M nenge tom u Aôndo A ne ônov mba iorov sha u vea nyoon iyol sha mi yô. 
Ecclesiastes3:11 A er hanma kwagh er a̱ doo ashe sha shighe na, man A shi A ver mtsôr ken asema a ve; nahan kpaa, or fatyô u timen fan tom u Aôndo A er sha hiihii je, zan zan mkur la kpaa ga." 
Ecclesiastes3:12 M fa ma kwagh u hemban doon ve ngu ga, saa u ember man u eren akaa a dedoo sha ayange a ve lu uma la cii." 
Ecclesiastes3:13 Man shi er hanma or nana̱ ya kwagh, nana̱ ma kwagh, i̱ doo nan iyol ken tom u nan ye ican sha mi la cii; kwagh ne ka iwua i Aôndo je." 
Ecclesiastes3:14 M fa hanma kwagh u Aôndo A er yô, una lu gbem; á seer ma kwagh sha mi ga, man á pande ma kwagh sha mi kpaa ga; Aôndo er un nahan, sha u ior ve̱ cia sha ishigh Nagh." 
Ecclesiastes3:15 Hanma kwagh u a lu hegen yô, tsuaa je kpaa vande lun, kwagh u una va la, tsuaa je kpaa vande lun; Aôndo keren u hiden a kwagh u a vande karen kera yô." 
Ecclesiastes3:16 Shi m nenge shin tar, hen ape ôron ijir la, nenge, ifer lu her; man hen ijiir i perapera kpaa, ifer shi lu her." 
Ecclesiastes3:17 M kaa ken ishima yam mer, Aôndo Una ôr mbaperapera ijir kua mbaaferev cii; gadia kera yô, shighe u hanma kwagh ngu man u hanma tom kpaa." 
Ecclesiastes3:18 M kaa ken ishima yam mer, kwagh ne ngu sha ci u ônov mba iorov, sha u Aôndo Una kar ve, ve̱ nenge er ve ayol a ve ve lu er ishôso nahan." 
Ecclesiastes3:19 Gadia kwagh u a eren ônov mba iorov yô, ka un je shi ka a er ishôso ye, ka kwagh shon la môm ngu a tser ve cii ye; er ngun a kpe nahan, kape ngula kpaa a kpe la; een, ve cii iôôn ve ngi môm; or hemba ishôso sha ma kwagh je ga; gadia ka gbilinkwagh cii." 
Ecclesiastes3:20 Ve cii ka ijiir i môm vea za ye, ve cii ka shin vuulevu ve dugh, shi ka shin vuulevu kpaa vea hide ye." 
Ecclesiastes3:21 Ka an nan fe er iôôn i or ia yem Sha man iôôn i ishôso yô, ia sen ia yem shin inyaa?" 
Ecclesiastes3:22 Nahan yô, ma kwagh u hemban doon ngu ga, saa u or nana ember ken ityom i nan tsô, gadia kwagh ne ka kwar u nan je ne; gayô, ka an nana hide a nan er nana va nenge kwagh u a er ken ijime i nan laa?" 
Ecclesiastes4:1 Tsô m gema m nenge ipila i i eren shin tar cii; man nenge, mliam ma mba i kighir ve la, man ve lu a orsurun ve ishima ga; mba ve kighir ve la ve lu a tahav, kpa ve lu a orsurunshima ga." 
Ecclesiastes4:2 Nahan m wuese mbakpenev mba ve vande kpen la, hemba kpen ve iyol a mba ve lu uma her yô;" 
Ecclesiastes4:3 een, or u nan lu a vande lun ga je, nan hemba ve uhar cii, ka u nan nenge a tom u ifer u i er shin tar ne ga yô." 
Ecclesiastes4:4 Tsô m gema m nenge tom u ican cii, man hanma tom u i er u u hembe doon yô, i lu sha iwuhe i lu eren u ye. Kwagh ne kpaa ka gbilinkwagh man ka u zendan di ahumbe ityô tsô." 
Ecclesiastes4:5 Ibumeor ka nan wa ave ikum, nan gba yan inyam i iyol i nan je." 
Ecclesiastes4:6 Guda uwegh môm ku ku iv a mmem a ave ahar a a iv a ican kua u zendan ahumbe ityô la. 
Ecclesiastes4:7 Tsô, shi m gema m nenge gbilinkwagh shin tar." 
Ecclesiastes4:8 Orgen ka nan lu tswen, nan lu a ma orgen ga, een, shin wan kpaa ga, shin anmgbian tsô kpaa ga, nahan kpaa tom u nan u ican, u kuren ga, ashe a nan kpaa a kenger inyaregh ki kuman a ga. Ka sha ci u an je m ye icana man m gbe nyumen uma wam akaa a doon nahan? Kwagh ne kpaa ka gbilinkwagh tsô, een, ka ican tsung je." 
Ecclesiastes4:9 Guda uhar a u môm, sha ci u mba a injar i dedoo sha tom ve u sha ican." 
Ecclesiastes4:10 Gadia aluer vea gba kpaa, u môm nana kôr ugen nana mough a nan sha; kpa, kwagh á tser u nan lu tswen la, aluer nana gba yô, nana lu a or u moughon a nan sha ga." 
Ecclesiastes4:11 Man shi aluer ior ihiar ia yav ijiir i môm yô, á tsee ve iyol; kpa á lu or môm tsô yô, á er nan man á tsee nan iyolo?" 
Ecclesiastes4:12 Man shi aluer or á hemba u a lu tswen la, kpa mba uhar vea gema á hemba di nan; kor u i zômon u igbar itiar yô, ngu fetyô u tôndon fese ga." 
Ecclesiastes4:13 Guda wanyekwaor u gban ican, u fan kwagh, a ibumetor u a tse sha won, u a gande u ungwan kwaghwan yô;" 
Ecclesiastes4:14 gadia ngula ka ken gaadi a dugh sha u va yan tor ye, shin er i mar un a ibanave ken tar u tor la kpaa." 
Ecclesiastes4:15 M nenge mbaumav mba ve zenden shin tar cii, ve ta ken wanyekwaor la, ka u sha uhar je la, wen u una tema sha ityough ki ngula la," 
Ecclesiastes4:16 ior ngee gande ikaa inya mba a lu orhemen ve yô; nahan kpaa kov u ua va ken hemen yô, ua ember un ga. Mimi je kwagh ne kpaa ka gbilinkwagh, man ka u zendan di ahumbe ityô tsô." 
Ecclesiastes5:1 Ver ishima sha nguhar wou zum u u zaan hen iyol i Aôndo yô; gadia u zan sha u za ungwan hemba doon a u nan nagh ku abumeaior la; gadia ve kera fa er ve lu eren ifer ga. 
Ecclesiastes5:2 De kera bughun zwa fefa ga, ishima you kpaa i̱ de kera kumbur sha u ôron ma kwagh sha ishigh ki Aôndo ga; gadia Aôndo ngu Sha man we u ngu shin tar, nahan yô, kwaghôron wou a̱ de ngeen ga." 
Ecclesiastes5:3 Gadia mnyam ma cien ka ma va sha mngee u ityom, imo i ibumeor ka sha mngee u akaaôron." 
Ecclesiastes5:4 Zum u wea tsegha zwa sha ishigh ki Aôndo yô, de kera ngôôr u eren sha mi ga, gadia doo Un a abumeaior ga; yô, er kwagh u u tsegh zwa sha mi la." 
Ecclesiastes5:5 Guda ma u tsegha zwa ga, a u u tsegha zwa man u er sha mi ga la." 
Ecclesiastes5:6 De rumun zwa wou u̱ haa u kwaghbo iyol ga, de kaan a ortyom u Aôndo wer, m tsume, ga; ka sha ci u nyi man Aôndo A̱ yuwe a imo you man A̱ tim tom u sha ave a ou la keraa?" 
Ecclesiastes5:7 Gadia er mnyam ma cien ma lu kpishi nahan, kape kwaghôron u gbilinigh kpaa a ngee la, kpa we yô, cia Aôndo!" 
Ecclesiastes5:8 Aluer wea nenge mkighir u i kighir icanor man mvihi u ijirôron kua mimi ken ipaven ugen yô, kwagh shon a̱ de kpiligh we iyol ga, gadia u a hembe tahav ngu kenger u a lu a tahav la, man shi mbagenev mba hemban ve kpaa mba." 
Ecclesiastes5:9 Kwagh u a lu mtsera u tar sha hanma ijiir yô, ka tor u a we sule u kahan iko yô." 
Ecclesiastes5:10 Or u azurfa a doo nan yô, azurfa una kuma nan ga; u nan keren inyaregh ki ngeen kpaa, mtsera una kuma nan ga; kwagh ne kpaa ka gbilinkwagh tsô." 
Ecclesiastes5:11 Shighe u inyaregh ka ki seer yô, mbayan ki di kpaa ve seer; yô, ki ornyar la a inja sha nyi, saa di u kenger ki sha ashe tsô gaa?" 
Ecclesiastes5:12 Mnyam ma ortom ka ma dedoo, shin nana ya kwagh ciôn, shin kpishi kpaa, kpa m-ide u ornyar yô, una rumun nan nana yav ga." 
Ecclesiastes5:13 Zegekwagh u vihin ugen ngu u m nenge a mi shin tar: inyaregh ki or ka nan koso la, ki gema ki hingir kwagh u vihin mlu u nan;" 
Ecclesiastes5:14 aluer inyaregh kila kia saa ishe sha ikôr i bo yô, nana mar wan kpaa, una lu a ma kwagh sha ave ga;" 
Ecclesiastes5:15 er nan dugh ken iyav mbu ngô u nan nahan, kape shi nana hide idyelegh er lu nan due la nahan, nana tôô ma kwagh sha tom u nan u ican la, nana yem a mi ga." 
Ecclesiastes5:16 Kwagh ne kpaa ka zegekwagh u vihin je: er nan ve nahan, kape shi nana hide vough la; ka nyi mtser je nan ye sha tom u nan er sha ci u ahumbe laa?" 
Ecclesiastes5:17 Ayange a nan cii nan ye kwagh ken ime a ishima i vihin man angev kua iyugh. 
Ecclesiastes5:18 Nenge, kwagh u m nenge a doo man a lu vough hen or yô, ka u nana̱ ya kwagh, nana̱ ma kwagh, nana̱ ember sha tom u nan cii, u nan er sha ican shin tar, sha ayange a nan a Aôndo A ne nan cii, gadia kwagh ne ka kwar u nan je la." 
Ecclesiastes5:19 Hanma or kpaa u Aôndo A ne nan inyaregh kpishi man mkpeyol, man A shi A na nan agee u yan ki kpaa, man u ngohol ci u nan, man u ember ken tom u nan u sha ican la, ka iwua i Aôndo A ne nan je." 
Ecclesiastes5:20 Gadia nana kera umbur ayange a uma u nan la kpishi ga, gadia Aôndo ngu nan nan, nan ember ken ishima i nan." 
Ecclesiastes6:1 Kwaghvihin ngu u m nenge a mi shin tar, a yuhwa ior kpaa:" 
Ecclesiastes6:2 ka or u Aôndo A ne nan akaa kpishi, inyaregh man icivir, je nan kera ban a ma kwagh sha ci u uma u nan sha akaa a a sar nan la ga; nahan kpaa, Aôndo na nan tahav mbu yan a ga, kpa ka orgen nana ya a ye; kwagh ne kpaa ka gbilinkwagh, ka bocan je." 
Ecclesiastes6:3 Aluer or nana mar ônov deri, nana tsa anyom kpishi kpaa, je zan zan ayange a anyom a nan kpaa a ngee, kpa uma u nan una iv a kwagh u doon ga, man á ii nan kpaa ga yô, m kaa mer, guda, iyav mbu vihin a or la," 
Ecclesiastes6:4 gadia mbu va gbilin, man shi mbu hiden ken ime kpaa, iti i mbu, ime gema yer kera," 
Ecclesiastes6:5 man mbu nenge iyange ga, man shi mbu fa i kpaa ga; yô, mbu a mmem hemba or la;" 
Ecclesiastes6:6 een, shin nana lu uma anyom dubu kwa har je kpaa man nana zua a iveren i dedoo ga—yô, akaa cii ka ijiir i môm tsô aa za gaa?" 
Ecclesiastes6:7 Tom u or u sha ican cii, ka sha ci u zwa u nan je, nahan kpaa kwagh kom isharen i nan la ga." 
Ecclesiastes6:8 Ka sha nyi je orfankwagh nan hembe ibumeoro? Shin icanor, u nan fe u zenden sha ishigh ki uuma yô, nan hemba sha nyi?" 
Ecclesiastes6:9 Guda u nengen a kwagh sha ashe a u lun a isharen sha akaa wuee la; kwagh ne kpaa ka gbilinkwagh je, ka u zendan di ahumbe ityô tsô." 
Ecclesiastes6:10 Kwagh u nan lu cii kpaa, i vande yilan iti i nan ngise je, shi i fa er nan lu or yô, nana fatyô u hendan a, u a hembe nan agee la kpaa ga." 
Ecclesiastes6:11 Er akaaôron a seer ngeen, gbilinkwagh di kpaa seer, nahan ka or a inja sha nyi?" 
Ecclesiastes6:12 Gadia ka an nan fe kwagh u a hembe doon or sha mlu u nan sha ayange a uma u nan a gbilinigh cii, a a kar nan er mure la nahana? Gadia ka an nana fatyô u ôron or kwagh u una lu ken ijime i nan shin tara?" 
Ecclesiastes7:1 Iti i mimi hemba doon a mkurem ma doon tsung; man shi iyange i kuugh hemba doon a iyange i maren or la. 
Ecclesiastes7:2 Guda u zan hen ya u mlia a u zan hen ya u iniongo, gadia ngula ka mkur u ior cii, or u uma nana̱ lu a kwagh ne ken ishima i nan." 
Ecclesiastes7:3 Ishima i vihin hemba doon a ahan a sen; gadia ka sha ishigh ki tsughur, ishima i hingir dedoo ye." 
Ecclesiastes7:4 Ishima i mbafankwagh ngi sha ya u mlia, kpa ishima i abumeaior yô, ngi sha ya u ahan." 
Ecclesiastes7:5 Guda u ungwan tsaha u orfankwagh a u or á ver ato sha icam i abumeaior. 
Ecclesiastes7:6 Gadia er m-baver u agbaa a saa shin atô a ityegh a lu nahan, kape mse u ibumeor a lu la; kwagh ne kpaa ka gbilinkwagh je." 
Ecclesiastes7:7 Mimi je inyaregh ki ngohol sha apera ka ki gema orfankwagh nan hingir ibumeor, inyaregh ki yamen ishô ki vihin mkav kera." 
Ecclesiastes7:8 Guda mkur u kwagh a mhii na; orwanshima hemba doon a orimangeregh. 
Ecclesiastes7:9 De nyoon ishima fefa ga, gadia ishima i nyoon tema ken vanger u abumeaior." 
Ecclesiastes7:10 De kaan wer: Ka nyi ayange a tsuaa la a hembe doon a ahegene? ga. Gadia ka sha kwaghfan u pin kwagh ne je ga. 
Ecclesiastes7:11 Kwaghfan ngu a inja er dyako nahan, ngu a inja hen ior mba ve nengen a iyange yô." 
Ecclesiastes7:12 Gadia kwaghfan kor or sha kwagh u vihin di er inyaregh nahan kpaa; kpa mhembe u mfe yô, ka er kwaghfan a kor uma u or u nan lu a mi la." 
Ecclesiastes7:13 Ver ishima sha tom u Aôndo; gadia ka an nana fatyô u naregh kwagh u Un A vande hurene? 
Ecclesiastes7:14 Sha iyange i mkpeyol yô, ember, sha iyange i ican yô, hen kwagh ken ishima: ngin kpaa Aôndo er i di er ngila nahan, sha u or nana̱ de fe ma kwagh u una va er ken ijime i nan la ga yô." 
Ecclesiastes7:15 M nenge a akaa cii sha ayange am a gbilinigh; orperapera ngu, u ka nan saa ishe shin er nan lu perapera nahan kpaa; iferor ugen di kpaa ngu, u ka nan gema nan tsa sha won a ifer i nan yô." 
Ecclesiastes7:16 De eren perapera a̱ karen ikaa inya ga, man shi de luun a kwaghfan a̱ karen ikaa inya ga; inja na nan man ú va tim iyol youwe?" 
Ecclesiastes7:17 De eren ifer i̱ karen ikaa inya ga, man shi de eren ibumekwagh kpaa ga; inja na nan ú kpe je er shighe wou a lu a kuma ga?" 
Ecclesiastes7:18 Doo u ú kôr ngun, ngula di kpaa de kera tôôn uwegh ough sha mi kera ga; gadia or u cian Aôndo yô, nana due ken akaa la cii." 
Ecclesiastes7:19 Kwaghfan ka a na orfankwagh agee je, a hemba mbatarev pue mba ve lu ken gar yô." 
Ecclesiastes7:20 Gadia ma orperapera môm u shin tar u nan eren kwagh u dedoo nan eren isholibo ga, nan ngu ga." 
Ecclesiastes7:21 Man shi de we iko sha akaa a i lu ôron la cii ga, sha u de va ongo er kpan wou a toho u ga;" 
Ecclesiastes7:22 gadia we iyol you kpaa u fa ken ishima you er acin imôngo u toho mbagenev kpaa yô. 
Ecclesiastes7:23 Akaa ne cii, m kar a sha kwaghfan, m kaa mer: Me hingir orfankwagh; kpa a gba ca a mo." 
Ecclesiastes7:24 Kwagh u a lu yô, ngu ca tsô, a za kpishi je; ka an nana fatyô u timen fan unu?" 
Ecclesiastes7:25 M gema m ver ishima yam mer, me fa, me time, me ker kwaghfan kua atôakaa, sha u me fa er ifer i lu ibumekwagh man ibumegh kpaa ki gem ki lu ihundugh yô." 
Ecclesiastes7:26 Tsô m gema m zua a kwagh ugen ua hembe yuan a ku yô; ka kwase u ishima i nan i lu ityamberev mbi hônon kua ukper yô, ave a na kpaa a lu mshirim; or u i doo Aôndo a nan yô, nana war un, kpa orsholibo yô, una gema á kôr nan." 
Ecclesiastes7:27 Nenge, m zua a kwagh ne, kape Orpasenkwagh a kaa la, m gba karen kwagh ugen sha ugen, m lu karen ve sha u me fa inja i hanma kwagh yô;" 
Ecclesiastes7:28 kwagh u ishima yam i zer keren zan zan hegen, kpa m lu a zua a mi ga yô: or môm ken ior dubu m zua a mi, kpa kwase yô, môm kpaa m zua a mi ker ga." 
Ecclesiastes7:29 Nenge, ka kwagh ne tseegh m zough a mi ye: Aôndo er or dedoo, kpa mba keren u eren akaa sha ayom yum." 
Ecclesiastes8:1 Ka an nan lu er orfankwagh nahana? Ka an nan fe mpase u kwagha? Kwaghfan u or ka a na ishigh ki nan ki wanger, ka a gema mlu u gbua gbua u ishigh ki nan la." 
Ecclesiastes8:2 M kaa mer: wa tindi u tor iko sha ci u mbum u i bum Aôndo la yô. 
Ecclesiastes8:3 De dugh sha ishigh nagh kera fefa ga, de norom sha kwagh u ifer ga, gadia ka a er hanma kwagh u a sar un yô." 
Ecclesiastes8:4 Gadia imo i tor ngi a tahav; ka an nana fatyô u pinen un er: Ka nyi u erene? 
Ecclesiastes8:5 Hanma or u nan we tindi iko yô, nana kav kwagh u vihin ga; ishima i orfankwagh fa shighe kua gbenda kpaa;" 
Ecclesiastes8:6 gadia hanma kwagh yô, shighe na ngu, kua gbenda u una za yô; gayô, ifer i or ngi kighir nan;" 
Ecclesiastes8:7 gadia nan fa kwagh u una va er ga; man ka an nana fatyô u ôron nan er kwagh una va luu? 
Ecclesiastes8:8 Ma or ngu a tahav sha ahumbe u yangen a ga, shi nan ngu a tahav sha iyange i kuugh kpaa ga; ken utya yô, mba ne or gbenda ga, kape ifer kpaa ia war or u nan eren i ga la." 
Ecclesiastes8:9 Akaa ne cii m nenge, shi m ver ishima m nenge tom u i eren shin tar cii, shighe u or ka nana lu a tahav sha orgen yô, nan eren nan ican." 
Ecclesiastes8:10 Tsô m nenge i ii aferaior, ve sen shin uwar, man mba ve lu eren dedoo la, i gema i dugh ve ken ijiir i wang kera, ve hungul ken gar kpaa; kwagh ne kpaa ka gbilinkwagh." 
Ecclesiastes8:11 Ka er i kur ijirôron i sha tom u ifer fefa ga yô, man ishima i ônov mba iorov i taver sha u eren ifer nahan ye." 
Ecclesiastes8:12 Orsholibo ka nan er ifer kwa deri, kpa nan tsa sha won; nahan kpaa, m fa mimi je, mba ve cie Aôndo yô, vea tema doo doo, gadia ve cia Un;" 
Ecclesiastes8:13 kpa mkpeyol una lu hen orifer ga, man ayange a nan kpaa aa lihe er mure nahan ga, gadia nan cie Aôndo ga." 
Ecclesiastes8:14 Gbilinkwagh ugen u i eren sha won yô, ka kwagh u ka a tser ior mba perapera er ka sha aeren a mbaaferev la; man shi mbaaferev kpaa kwagh ngu a er ve er ka sha aeren a mbaperapera yô; nahan m kaa mer, kwagh ne kpaa ka gbilinkwagh tsô." 
Ecclesiastes8:15 Nahan m wuese ishar i haan iyol, gadia ma kwagh ugen u hemban doon or sha won er nana ya kwagh, nana ma kwagh i̱ saan nan iyol yô, ngu ga, gadia ia lu a nan ken tom u nan u sha ican la, sha ayange a uma u nan cii, a Aôndo A ne nan shin tar yô." 
Ecclesiastes8:16 Shighe u m gem a ishima m ver sha kwaghfan sha u me nenge ityom i i eren sha won yô, gadia orgen ngu u tugh kua tetan cii nan kusun ashe sha mnya ga yô," 
Ecclesiastes8:17 nahan m nenge tom u Aôndo cii, er ma or nana fatyô u kaven tom u i eren u shin tar la ga; gadia shin er nana nôngo nan, nana time u kpaa, nana kav ga; een, shin er orfankwagh nan henen er nan fa kpaa, nana kav u ga." 
Ecclesiastes9:1 Gadia akaa angan cii, m time sha mi ken ishima yam, sha u henen sha a, er mbaperapera kua mbafankwagh cii a aeren a ve a lu sha ikev i Aôndo yô, shin a lu dooshima shin ihom i kôron; or fa kwagh u a lu nan ken hemen ga." 
Ecclesiastes9:2 Akaa cii nga ve sha ior inja i môm; ci môm ngu sha ci u orperapera man iferor kpaa, man ormimi kua or u wang man or u nan lu wang ga kpaa, man or u nan ne nagh kua or u nan ne ga kpaa; er ormimi nan lu nahan, kape orsholibo kpaa nan lu la; man or u bumun kpaa nan ngu er or u cian mbum nahan." 
Ecclesiastes9:3 Akaa a a eren shin tar cii yô, kwagh ne ka kwagh u vihin er kwagh u a tseren ve la cii ngu môm; man shi ishima i ônov mba iorov kpaa i iv a ifer, ihundugh kpaa ki ve ken ishima er ve lu uma yô, ken masetyô la ve yem shin mbakpenev." 
Ecclesiastes9:4 Gadia er or nan lu a mbaumav cii imôngo yô, ishimaverenkeghen ngi her; gadia iwa i uma hemba begha u kpen." 
Ecclesiastes9:5 Gadia mbaumav fa er vea kpe, yô, kpa mbakpenev yô, fa ma kwagh ga, kera mba a ma injar kpaa ga, u umbur ve tsô kpaa mba kera umbur ve ga." 
Ecclesiastes9:6 Dooshima ve kua ihom ve i kôron man iwuhe ve cii saa ishe ngise je; mayange je kera mba a ma ci sha akaa a a mase eren shin tar ga. 
Ecclesiastes9:7 Yô, ya kwaghyan wou a iember, ma wain wou a iember ken ishima, gadia Aôndo vande rumun ityom you kera ve." 
Ecclesiastes9:8 Akondo a ou a̱ kungun gbem, mkurem kpaa ma̱ de banen we sha ityou ga." 
Ecclesiastes9:9 Tema saan saan a kwase u a doo u ishima sha ayange a uma wou u gbilinigh la cii a A ne u shin tar yô, ayange a ou a gbilinigh la cii, gadia ka kwar wou u sha uma wou je la, kua ken tom wou u u ya ican sha mi shin tar yô." 
Ecclesiastes9:10 Hanma kwagh u uwegh ough ku zough a mi u eren yô, er un sha agee ou je, gadia ma tom shin mhen shin mfe shin kwaghfan mba shin Sheol henpe u ze la ga." 
Ecclesiastes9:11 M shi m gema, m nenge shin tar, ayem a gban ka or u fefa nan hembe ga, ityav kpaa ka or u taver nan hembe ga, kwaghyan kpaa ngu sha ci u mbafankwagh ga, inyaregh kpaa ki sha ci u mbakavenkwagh ga, icivir kpaa ngi sha ci u mbahemban fan kwagh ga; gadia shighe man aikôr mba ve sha gbenda ve cii." 
Ecclesiastes9:12 Gadia or fe shighe u nan ga; er ishu i i ker shin kper u bo yô, man er inyon i i ker sha kwaghhônon yô, kape ka i kôr ônov mba iorov sha shighe u bo, zum u ka a bur ve a bur la." 
Ecclesiastes9:13 Shi m nenge a kwaghfan sha won er ngun nahan, lum zegekwagh je:" 
Ecclesiastes9:14 Angar ugen lu, ior kpaa ngee ker ga; tsô zegetor ugen va ityav her, a va kase un, a maa igyar i utya." 
Ecclesiastes9:15 Tsô i zua a icanor u fan kwagh kimi, man un gema yima gar la sha kwaghfan na; nahan kpaa ma or kera umbur icanor shon la ga." 
Ecclesiastes9:16 Nahan m kaa mer: Kwaghfan hemba agee inja; nahan kpaa kwaghfan u icanor yô, mba lahan un, kwaghôron u nan kpaa mba ungwan un ga." 
Ecclesiastes9:17 Akaaôron a mbafankwagh a i ongo a sha bem la, hemba mnande u tor u abumeaior." 
Ecclesiastes9:18 Kwaghfan hemba ikav mbi utyav inja; kpa orsholibo môm ka nan vihi akaa a injaa kpishi. 
Ecclesiastes10:1 Iji i kpen ka i na mkurem ma ornungwan mkurem ma human doon la, ma huma, ma hôô kpaa, ibumegh kpuaa ka ki yuhwa ki hemba kwaghfan kua icivir kpaa." 
Ecclesiastes10:2 Ishima i orfankwagh ka i za a nan ken iyan; kpa ishima i ibumeor yô, ka i za a nan ken imese." 
Ecclesiastes10:3 Zum u ibumeor ka nan zenden sha gbenda yô, mkav a yina nan, nan kaan a hanma or er nan lu ibumeor yô." 
Ecclesiastes10:4 Aluer ishima i ortaregh ia kende sha a we yô, de karen hen ijiir you kera ga, gadia ishima i bem ka i yange ifer i vesen." 
Ecclesiastes10:5 Kwaghvihin ngu u m nenge a mi shin tar yô, ka mtsum u a dugh hen ortaregh yô:" 
Ecclesiastes10:6 ka i kende a ibumegh sha kpishi, man mbanyarev gema tema hen ijiir i gban ijime." 
Ecclesiastes10:7 M nenge ikpan henda anyinya, man ônov mba torov gema lu zenden shin inya er ka ikpan nahan." 
Ecclesiastes10:8 Or u nan tim ihungwa yô, nana gba shimi; man or u nan tsehe igyar i awen kpaa, iyô ia nyima nan." 
Ecclesiastes10:9 Or u nan bugh awen yô, nana vihi iyol sha a; man or u nan aren ikon kpaa kwaghvihin una fatyô u tseren nan." 
Ecclesiastes10:10 Aluer iyôgh kia kpughul man or nana wua zwa u ki ga yô, nana seer u gberen sha agee; kpa kwaghfan ngu a inja sha u nan er kwagh á kure vough." 
Ecclesiastes10:11 Aluer iyô ia vande nyuman or kera er i lu a kumbur i ga yô, kera ka a inja u orfanzwa nana va kumbur i ga." 
Ecclesiastes10:12 Akaaôron a sha zwa u orfankwagh ka a doo ken ato, kpa ityumbuzwaagh i ibumeor ia mena iyol i nan." 
Ecclesiastes10:13 Mhii u akaaôron a sha zwa u nan ka ibumegh je, mkur u kwaghôron u nan kpaa ka ihundugh ki dang je." 
Ecclesiastes10:14 Ibumeor nan ngee kwaghôron; kpa or fa kwagh u una va er ga; man kwagh u una lu ken ijime i nan kpaa, ka an nana kaa unu?" 
Ecclesiastes10:15 Tom u sha ican u ibumeor ngu ne nan iyol i kpen, gadia nan fa gbenda u nyôron ken gar ga." 
Ecclesiastes10:16 Kwagh tser tar u tor u u a lu iyev yô, man atiator a u kpaa a yaan iniongo pepe je!" 
Ecclesiastes10:17 Saan we iyol, we tar, aluer tor wou una lu wan u ormimi je yô, man atiator a ou lu yan kwagh sha shighe u a doo yô, er nomsombaiorov nahan, er mbahundenmsôrom nahan ga." 
Ecclesiastes10:18 Sha hwev yô, hav ka mbu piin; man ka sha uwer u gban, iyou ka i nôô ura ye." 
Ecclesiastes10:19 Ka i er iniongo sha ci u ahan a sen; wain yô, ne ishima i saan saan; inyaregh di ki kur akaa cii." 
Ecclesiastes10:20 De toho tor, ken ishima you kpaa ga, man de toho ornyar ken iyou you i yaven ga, gadia inyon i sha ia za a imo you, kwagh u lun a akper una za pase kwaghôron wou la." 
Ecclesiastes11:1 Kende ruam wou shin mnger, gadia ayange á va kar kpishi, tsô ú zua a mi." 
Ecclesiastes11:2 Kar kwar sha ior utaankaruhar, een, zan zan anigheni je kpaa, gadia u fa kwaghbo u una va er shin tar ga." 
Ecclesiastes11:3 Aluer abeen a iv a mgerem yô, á haa ma shin tar; man aluer kon ua gba vegher u imbusutariyan yô, shin i imese, hen ijiir i kon u gbe la, ka her ua lu ye." 
Ecclesiastes11:4 Or u nan ver ishima sha ahumbe yô, nana lôô ga; man shi or u nan ver ishima sha abeen kpaa nana sunda ga." 
Ecclesiastes11:5 Er u fe gbenda u ahumbe ga, man mlu u akuhe a ken sagh u nan we iyav la kpaa ga yô, kape tom u Aôndo u A er akaa cii kpaa u fe u ga la." 
Ecclesiastes11:6 Lôô ivor you pepe, man aikighe kpaa de hiden a uwegh ough ga; gadia u fa i ia doo la ga, shin ka ngin shin ka ngila, shin ihiar cii ia doo u." 
Ecclesiastes11:7 Mimi je, iwanger doo, ashe kpaa doo a u nengen a iyange." 
Ecclesiastes11:8 Een, shin or nana tsa anyom imôngo kpaa, nana̱ ember sha a cii; kpa nana̱ umbur ayange a imegh, gadia aa ngee. Akaa a a ve cii, ka a gbilinigh tsô." 
Ecclesiastes11:9 Ember, wanyekwaor, sha iyev ou, ishima kpaa i̱ lu u saan saan sha ayange a u lu iyev yô, zende sha isharen i ishima you, man sha mnenge u ashe ou kpaa; kpa fa, sha ci u akaa ne cii, Aôndo Una va a we hen ijir." 
Ecclesiastes11:10 Nahan yô, dugh ijungwen ken ishima you kera, man kar a kwaghvihin sha iyol you kera; gadia iyev kua akase a ir ka gbilinkwagh tsô." 
Ecclesiastes12:1 Umbur u A gbe u la sha ayange a iyev ou, er ayange a bo a lu a va ga, anyom kpaa a lu a kuma ga, a ú va kaa wer: Kera gbam ishima ga la;" 
Ecclesiastes12:2 er iyange man iwanger man uwer man asan vea lu a wa ime ga, man abeen kpaa a lu a kohol her ken ijime i ura ga la;" 
Ecclesiastes12:3 sha iyange i mbakuranya vea kunde akarkase iyol, mbaageev kpaa vea ngurum, mbawuan sha nase kpaa vea de tom ve, sha ci u ve ngee ga, mba ve kenger sha a-an kpaa, ime ia wa ve," 
Ecclesiastes12:4 man á wuhe ihinda i sha gbenda la; iov i wuan sha nase kpaa ia pande, man nana mough sha sha imo i inyon kpaa, man imo a atsam cii kpaa aa kera taver ga;" 
Ecclesiastes12:5 een, nana cia kwagh u taven, akaa a cieryol aa lu sha gbenda, kon u amondi kpaa ua kpar, ahungwa kpaa una hingir zumbee, isharen kpaa ia bee kera; gadia or ngu zan hen ya u nan u tsôron, man mbazungwen mba zenden sha igbenda;" 
Ecclesiastes12:6 man kor u azurfa kpaa ua mase tôndon ye, isheghmkure i zenaria kpaa ia gba ia hembe, ityumnger kpaa ia hembe hen imbormnger, ikaver i ikyekye kpaa ia sombo hen ijôr," 
Ecclesiastes12:7 man vuulevu shi ua hide shin inya er i lu tsuaa nahan, jijingi kpaa una hide her Aôndo U lu na un yô." 
Ecclesiastes12:8 Gbilinkwagh u agbilinakaa, kape Orpasenkwagh kaa la, ka gbilinkwagh cii." 
Ecclesiastes12:9 Man shi er Orpasenkwagh a lu orfankwagh yô, a gba zan hemen u tesen ior mfe; een, a hen, a time, a dugh anzaakaa kpishi." 
Ecclesiastes12:10 Orpasenkwagh ker er una zua a akaaôron a dedoo, man kwagh u i nger jighilii yô, ka akaaôron a mimi je la." 
Ecclesiastes12:11 Asemberakaa a mbafankwagh nga er utakera yô; man er ukusa mba i mande i taver yô, kape akaaôron a i kohol a imôngo a lu la, ka hen orkuran môm a dugh ye." 
Ecclesiastes12:12 Ken masetyô yô, wan wam, er teghelee; m-er u i er uruamabera kpishi la yô, ikighir ngi ga; takerada u henen kpishi ne iyol i kpen." 
Ecclesiastes12:13 Ngun ka mkur u kwagh, u i vande ungwan la cii: Cia Aôndo, waan atindi Na iko; gadia ngun ka kwagh u ior cii ma ve er je ne." 
Ecclesiastes12:14 Gadia Aôndo Una va a hanma tom hen ijir kua hanma kwaghmyer kpaa, shin a lu u dedoo, shin a lu u bo kpaa." 
SongOfSongs1:1 Icam i hemban atsam cii ne, ka i Solomon." 
SongOfSongs1:2 De a̱ susem zwa sha mbamsusu nav, gadia dooshima wou doo je hemba wain." 
SongOfSongs1:3 Mkurem ou ma human doon, ma huma tsô, iti you ngi er mkurem ma human doon ma i hee ma yô, ka nahan man u doo ônkasev ishima ye." 
SongOfSongs1:4 Urugh mo, m̱ dondo sha a we, sé er nen fefa! Tor nyôr a mo ken ayou a na. Sé ember, sé lu saan saan ken a we, sé hemba teren dooshima wou a wain! U doo ve ishima, ka sha inja je." 
SongOfSongs1:5 Ne ônkasev mba Yerusalem, mo m ngu il, kpa m doo u kenger er utenti mba Kedar nahan, man er akondo a yisan a Solomon nahan." 
SongOfSongs1:6 De kenger nen mo er m lu il sha ci u oo u u tem la ga: Ônov mba ngôm mba nomso yuwem, ve verem orkuran sha ishule i wain; kpa sule wam iyol yam yô, m kura ga." 
SongOfSongs1:7 Kaam, we u u doom ishima ne, hen ape u ne ikumuile you toho yô, man hen ape u ver i i mem iyange sha tembe la. Gadia ka nyi man m gbe hingir er or u azende azende hen akumauile a akar a ou nahana?" 
SongOfSongs1:8 Aluer wea fa ga yô, we u u hembe doon ashe ken ukase cii ne, za ase sha ihange i ikumuile, za a agumaivo a ou, a̱ za ya toho hen utenti mba mbakuranilev." 
SongOfSongs1:9 We u u doom ishima ne, m kar u sha tulenyinya u akeke a Farao." 
SongOfSongs1:10 Ahenge a ou doo tsung a asa a dedoo sha mi, man mon wou kpaa a ikor i asa a dedoo." 
SongOfSongs1:11 Sé tume u mshirim ma zenaria a anzôr a azurfa sha mi. 
SongOfSongs1:12 Er tor a tem sha tebul na yô, mkurem am ma nardu kpurum ihuma i ma i dedoo." 
SongOfSongs1:13 Or u a doom ishima la ngum er ijen i mire, i i yavem hen huwa u atumbagh nahan." 
SongOfSongs1:14 Or u a doom ishima la ngum er ikagh i imondon u henna u human doon, ken ishule i wain i En-gedi nahan." 
SongOfSongs1:15 U doo ashe tsô, we u u doom ishima, u doo ashe tsô; ashe a ou nga er atii nahan." 
SongOfSongs1:16 U doo ashe tsô, we u u doom ishima, u doo je, gande; gambe wase u teman mi kpaa ngu shou shou." 
SongOfSongs1:17 Ihange i iyou yase ka ikon i sedar, mtuunum ma iyou yase ka ikon i fer je." 
SongOfSongs2:1 M ngu er ishohough ki Sharon, imondon i ityombo i shin ijande." 
SongOfSongs2:2 Er imondon i ityombo i ken atô u usaa i lu nahan, kape u a doom ishima la a lu ken atô u ônkasev la." 
SongOfSongs2:3 Er kon u apel u lu ken ikon i ikôô nahan, kape u a doom ishima la a lu ken ônnomso la. M tema shin mure na, doom iyol kpekpe, atam a na nyohom ken zwa." 
SongOfSongs2:4 A nyôr a mo ken iyou i man wain, tuta u a tim sha a mo yô, ka dooshima." 
SongOfSongs2:5 Taver mo sha azen a atam a wain a ombor, i̱ kundum iyol sha uapel, gadia m hume sha dooshima." 
SongOfSongs2:6 Uwegh nagh ku imesegh ku̱ lum shin ityou, uwegh nagh ku yanegh ku̱ gema ku kuvem." 
SongOfSongs2:7 M ngu wan ne kwagh, ne ônkasev mba Yerusalem, sha umorya man mbaashim mba ken toho, de kpoghol nen dooshima ga, man shi de nderen nen un kpaa ga, saa á kuma un ve." 
SongOfSongs2:8 Ungwa! Wen u a doom ishima la! Ngula van la; ngu tsuwen sha iwo, ngu shimin sha agungu." 
SongOfSongs2:9 U a doom ishima la ngu er morya shin gumashim nahan; ngula! a til ken ijime i kpekpe wase, a gbirin ashe ken ahura, a meen a nengen her a-an a windou la!" 
SongOfSongs2:10 U a doom ishima gba ôron kwagh, a kaa a mo er: Mough sha, we u u doom ishima ne, udoonashe wam, va ase." 
SongOfSongs2:11 Gadia nenge ase, fam bee ve, ura tôndo tsembelee." 
SongOfSongs2:12 Uimondon mba toho mba duen ken igbar sha tar; shighe u wan icam kuma ve, mba ungwan imo i atii ken tar wase." 
SongOfSongs2:13 Kon u tur ngu kagher atam a u, ikon i wain ngi kparen, ngi nan ihuma i i, i dedoo. Mough sha, we u u doom ishima ne, udoonashe wam, va ase." 
SongOfSongs2:14 Atii wam, u a lu ken kwevande, ken ijiir i yeren hen bowoogh, de m̱ nenge mlu wou, m̱ ungwa imo you, gadia imo you i dio, u wa doo kpekpe." 
SongOfSongs2:15 Kôr nen se atsôngo, atsôngo a kiriki angan a a vihin ishule i ikon i wain ne, gadia ishule yase i wain ngi kparen ave je." 
SongOfSongs2:16 U a doom ishima la, ka u wam je, mo kpaa m ngu u na; ngu kuran ilev nav henpe uimondon mba ityombo ve lu yô," 
SongOfSongs2:17 zan zan iyange ia ndôhôr man mure kpaa una kar kera ve. Hide, we u u doom ishima ne, hingir er morya nahan, shin er gumashim nahan sha iwo i i pav ahigha la." 
SongOfSongs3:1 Tugh, sha gambe wam, m ker un u a doom ishima la, m ker un, kpa m zua a na ga." 
SongOfSongs3:2 Yô, me mough hegen, me zende ken gar, sha igbenda kua ityembe, me ker un u a doom ishima la; m ker un, kpa m zua a na ga." 
SongOfSongs3:3 Mbakuran mba ve zenden ken gar la, zua a mo. Ne shi nenge a un u a doom ishima la kpa?" 
SongOfSongs3:4 M undu ve ca lu a gba ga, tsô m kohol un u a doom ishima la; m kôr un, m rumun u pasen un tuhwan ga, saa er m vande van a na hen ya u ngôm, ken iyou i u a marem yô." 
SongOfSongs3:5 M ngu wan ne kwagh, ne ônkasev mba Yerusalem; sha umorya man mbaashim mba ken toho, de kpoghol nen dooshima ga man shi de nderen nen un kpaa ga, saa á kuma un ve." 
SongOfSongs3:6 Ka unô ve moughon shin ikôngo ve kende er mtôm ma mnyim nahana? mgbough a ihuma i dedoo i mire kua i libano, kua vuwe u ilyôghonov mbi human doon mbi orkasua cii." 
SongOfSongs3:7 Nenge, ka gambe u Solomon je; ior mba ageev akunduatar kase un, ka ior mba ageev mba ken Iserael je." 
SongOfSongs3:8 Ve cii ve lu a sanker, ka mbafantyav doo doo je, hanmô a sanker u nan ikooso, sha ci u cian tugh." 
SongOfSongs3:9 Tor Solomon er ikônough ki torough nagh, ki tôôn un a mi, sha ikon i Lebanon." 
SongOfSongs3:10 A er mtuunum ma ki sha azurfa, ijime i ki lu sha zenaria, pe teman la lu nyian dindee, her atô u ki cii, i er ki sha hwe, lu iwua i sha dooshima i ônkasev mba Yerusalem." 
SongOfSongs3:11 Due nen, ne ônkasev mba Shion, nenge nen tor Solomon, a tsar u sha ityou u ngô na kange un sha iyange i a er kwase la, sha iyange i iember na i ken ishima la." 
SongOfSongs4:1 U doo ashe tsô, we u u doom ishima ne, een, u doo ashe; ashe ou nga er a atii nahan, ken ijime i ikondo you i yisan la; ice you ngi er ikpilaivo, i i hongo sha uwo u Gileadi yô." 
SongOfSongs4:2 Anyi ou nga er ikumiyôngo i i tende i aive hegh, i i dugh shin ijiir i ôôn iyol, hanmô i lu a ônov uhar uhar yô, i mô i môm ngi tswen ga." 
SongOfSongs4:3 Ityumbuzwaagh you ngi er mou u nyian bong yô, zwa wou kpaa doo u kenger; a-ase a ou nga er pomegraneti u i pav un avegher ahar nahan ken ijime i ikondo you i yisan la." 
SongOfSongs4:4 Mon wou ngu er gôgôyou u Davidi u taven tsung, u i maa sha ci u ikav mbi utyav la nahan, henpe i har mbaakuvautya dubu yô, ka iperutya i anomaior cii je la." 
SongOfSongs4:5 Atumba a ou ahar nga er ônov mba ahinav uhar mba morya, mba ve ye toho ken atô u uimondon mba ityombov yô." 
SongOfSongs4:6 Zan zan iyange ia va ndôhôr, man mure kpaa una kar kera ve, me yem sha uwo u mire u human doon, man igungu u libano u human doon la." 
SongOfSongs4:7 U doo ashe tsembelee, we u u doo ishima ne; ma kwagh u vihin ngu sha iyol you ga." 
SongOfSongs4:8 Mough a mo imôngo sha Lebanon, kwasehe, mough a mo imôngo sha Lebanon. Hungwa sha ityough ki Awana, sha ityough ki Senir kua Hermon, sha ubar mba ubegha, sha iwo i mbaanyam la." 
SongOfSongs4:9 U ngohol mo ishima anngômkwase, kwasehe, u ngohol mo ishima sha mkenger u ashe ou kwa môm, sha gbaashaa môm u sha mon wou la." 
SongOfSongs4:10 Dooshima wou doo je, anngômkwase, kwasehe! Dooshima wou doo hemba wain je! ihuma i mkurem ou kpaa doo hemba hanma ilyôghonough cii!" 
SongOfSongs4:11 Zwa wou ngu nôndon zaryoughough, kwasehe, iyough ngi shin ijime i nombor wou kua atumba kpaa; ihuma i akondo a ou kpaa ngi er ihuma i Lebanon yô." 
SongOfSongs4:12 Sule u i kase u igyar, kape anngômkwase, kwasehe a lu la; imbormnger i i kase i, man ijôr i i wuhe i." 
SongOfSongs4:13 Agbaa a ou ka ishule i ikon i pomegraneti a atam a mimi, imondon u henna, ikparen u nardu," 
SongOfSongs4:14 nardu man saferon, kalamu man shinamon a ikon i libano i human doon cii, mire man alou, a ilyôghonov mbi hemban cii." 
SongOfSongs4:15 Hwembemnger u ken ishule, ijôr i mngerem ma umam, man uikuwanmbamngerev mba senen sha Lebanon." 
SongOfSongs4:16 Nder, we ahumbe a ken imbusutarimese; va, we ahumbe a ken imbusutariyan; pever sha sule wam, ihuma i ilyôghonov mbi u i̱ samber ken won. U a doom ishima la, a̱ nyôr ken sule na, a̱ ya atam a u a dedoo la." 
SongOfSongs5:1 M va ken sule wam, anngômkwase, kwasehe, m kohol mire wam kua ilyôghonov yav; m ya ikpayough kua zaryoughough wam; m ma wain wam kua atumbabua am. Ya nen ase akar, ma nen, een, ma nen i̱ kuma ne, ne mbadoonshima." 
SongOfSongs5:2 M gba mnyam, kpa ishima yam yô, lu per. Ungwa! u a doom ishima la! Ngu manden uwegh kaan er: Bughum hunda, anngômkwase, udoon mo ishima, atii wam u lun jighilii; gadia ityough yagh heen sha avure, amôghol a icee a am kpaa aberamnger a utu nga sha mi." 
SongOfSongs5:3 M er riga wam; á er nan man me shi me haa unu? M ôô angahar am; á er nan man me shi me vihi a? 
SongOfSongs5:4 U a doom ishima la za uwegh nagh hen ihura i hunda, kôrom ken ishima a na." 
SongOfSongs5:5 M mough sha u me bugh u a doom ishima la hunda; mire lu nôndon mo sha ave, ahôaveegh a am heen sha zar u mire, u gba haan sha ishindan i hunda." 
SongOfSongs5:6 M bugh u a doom ishima la hunda, kpa wen u a doom ishima la kar yem kera ve. Hingir mo ken ishima humee zum u a lu ôron kwagh la; m ker un kpa m zua a na ga, m yila un kpa a vengese ga." 
SongOfSongs5:7 Mbakuran mba ve zenden ken gar la, ve zua a mo, ve gbidyem, ve vihim iyol; mbakuran mba sha gilgar la, ve ngohol mo togo sha apera." 
SongOfSongs5:8 M wa ne kwagh, ne ônkasev mba Yerusalem, aluer nea zua a u a doom ishima la yô, kaa nen un ner, m hume sha dooshima." 
SongOfSongs5:9 Ka sha nyi man u a doo u ishima la a hemba udoonshima ugene, we u u hembe doon ashe a kasev cii nee? Ka sha nyi man u a doo u ishima la a hembe udoonshima ugene, sha er u we se kwagh taveraa nahana?" 
SongOfSongs5:10 U a doom ishima la engem iyol man shi nyian kpaa, ior dubu pue kpaa un hemba cii." 
SongOfSongs5:11 Ityough nagh ka zenaria u dedoo je, amôghol a icee a na nga yugh yugh, ile er gugôô nahan." 
SongOfSongs5:12 Ashe na nga er atii hen kpe u iwaghegh yô, i ôô a sha atumba, a tema hen uwagh u ngeen a mngerem." 
SongOfSongs5:13 Ahenge a na nga er mbaagbegi mba ilyôghonov, mbi mbi kpurum ihuma i doon; ityumbuzwaagh na ka uimondon mba ityombo, ngi haan zar u mire." 
SongOfSongs5:14 Akaseaveegh a na ka atôôn a zenaria a vingir vingir a i we iwen i topashi sha mi yô; iyol na i er i sha anyinor a engem, a i cir a awen a safir yô." 
SongOfSongs5:15 Angahar a na nga er mtôm ma mabel ma i we ma ken agbur a zenaria u wang; mluashe na ngu er Lebanon, doo tsung er ikon i usedar nahan." 
SongOfSongs5:16 Zwa na doo tsung, een, un cii a doo. Ka u a doom ishima je la, shi ka ikarem kpaa, ne ônkasev mba Yerusalem." 
SongOfSongs6:1 Ka han u a doo u ishima la a ze, we u udoo ashe, u hembe kasev cii ne? Ka han u a doo u ishima la a ver ishigh, er sé ker un a we imôngo?" 
SongOfSongs6:2 U a doom ishima la sen shin sule na, shin mbaagbegi mba ilyôghonov mbi human doon, sha u za nan ilev toho ken ishule man sha u kohol uimondon mba uityombo." 
SongOfSongs6:3 U a doom ishima la, m ngu u na, un di kpaa ka u wam; ngu nan ikumuile na toho ken atô u uimondon mba uityombo." 
SongOfSongs6:4 We u u doom ishima ne, u doo ashe er Tirsa nahan; u doo u kenger er Yerusalem nahan, u cier iyol er akumautya a a lu a ityuta nahan." 
SongOfSongs6:5 Tôô ashe sha a mo kera, gadia a cier mo iyol. Ice you ngi er ikpilaivo, i i hongo sha Gileadi yô." 
SongOfSongs6:6 Anyi ou nga er ikum i ungômbaiyôngov yô, i i dugh sha ijiir i ôôn iyol, i hanmô i lu a ônov uhar uhar yô, i mô i môm ngi tswen ga." 
SongOfSongs6:7 A-ase a ou nga er pomegraneti u i pav un avegher ahar nahan, ken ijime i ikondo you i yisan la." 
SongOfSongs6:8 Utormbakasev mba akunduatar, kasev mba sha uika akunduanyiin, mbayevkasev gande u ôron." 
SongOfSongs6:9 Atii wam, u lun inja jighilii, ngum môm tsô, ngu wan u ngô na môm, ngu wan u ishima ishima u u a mar un la. Ônkasev nenge a na, ve wuese un ve ver un doo doo; utormbakasev kua kasev mba sha uika kpaa ve wuese un." 
SongOfSongs6:10 Ka an nan dugh nan kôndo sha, er iwanger i sha use nahan, doo ashe er uwer, wang er iyange yô, man cier iyol er akumautya a a lu a ityuta nahana?" 
SongOfSongs6:11 M sen shin sule u ikon i ahii sha u me za nenge akaa a a mende shin pev la, sha u me za nenge itinewain ia hôm, man upomegraneti vea kpar yô." 
SongOfSongs6:12 Er lu a wanger mo ga je tsô, isharen yam yem a mo za verem sha akeke a ior av mba mimi la." 
SongOfSongs6:13 Hide, hide, wankwase u Shulam; hide, hide, sé kenger we. Ka nyi i sar ne u kenger wankwase u Shulam, er ka amar a i lu vinen hen Mahanaim la nahana?" 
SongOfSongs7:1 Angahar a ou doo ken akôv wantor! Uvingir mba akooso ou mba er kwagh u hweegh nahan, tomaveegh u or u fan eev." 
SongOfSongs7:2 Icombo you ngi er gbande u gbisha yô, u wain u i nongo un a banen ker ga yô; iyav ou mbu er tihi u alakema yô, i kase mbu sha uimondon mba ityombo." 
SongOfSongs7:3 Atumba a ou ahar nga er ônov uhar, ônov mba ahinav mba morya nahan." 
SongOfSongs7:4 Mon wou ngu er gôgôyou u taven u sha anyinor yô, ashe a ou nga er atungu a ken Heshebon hen hundagar u Bate-rabim; ihinga you ngi er gôgôyou u taven u Lebanon u a ver ishigh ken vegher u Damaseku la nahan." 
SongOfSongs7:5 Ityough you ki sha iyol you er Karmel nahan, ice you i sha ityou ngi nyian dindee, i kôr tor sha ayôr a i." 
SongOfSongs7:6 U doo ashe, u kuma ishima je, we u u doom ishima ne, ken akaa a saren la cii." 
SongOfSongs7:7 Mtil wou ngu er ivile nahan, atumba a ou nga er asume a i nahan." 
SongOfSongs7:8 M kaa mer, me unde ivile ngin, me zôr atam a i; atumba a ou ma a lu er asume a wain, ihuma i iôôn you kpaa ma i lu er atam a apel yô," 
SongOfSongs7:9 zwa wou kpaa er wain u hemban doon cii yô, u a senen jighilii sha ci u u a doom ishima la, ngu nyôron sha ityumbujôôgh i mba ve yav yô." 
SongOfSongs7:10 U a doom ishima la, m ngu u na, isharen na kpaa ngi sha a mo." 
SongOfSongs7:11 Va, we u u doom ishima ne, sé za ken toho sé za tsa ken angarev." 
SongOfSongs7:12 Sé mough dindee sé za ken ishule i ikon i wain, sé za nenge kon wain ua hôm, man ikparen na kpaa ia mondo, man upomegraneti kpaa vea kpar yô. Ka keela me za na u dooshima wam ye." 
SongOfSongs7:13 Atam a mkehem nga human dedoo; hen ihinda yase kpaa hanma inja i atam a dedoo nga, a he kua a tse kpaa; we u u doom ishima ne, m koso a sha ci wou." 
SongOfSongs8:1 Sarem er ma u lu er anngôm, u a me atumba a ngôm je yô! Mea kohol we ken won, me suse u zwa, man ma or nana laham kpaa ga." 
SongOfSongs8:2 Ma m hemen we, ma m ve a we hen ya u ngôm, wen ma a tesem; ma m ne u wain u i nongo ilyôghonov sha mi, ma u me, zar u he u pomegraneti wam." 
SongOfSongs8:3 Uwegh nagh ku imesegh ku̱ lum shin ityou, man uwegh nagh ku yanegh ku̱ kuvem." 
SongOfSongs8:4 M ngu wan ne kwagh, ne ônkasev mba Yerusalem, ka nyi man ne kpoghol dooshima, man ka nyi ne nderen un er i lu a kuma un ga nahana?" 
SongOfSongs8:5 Ka anti nan moughon shin ikôngo nan kende, nan suur sha u a doo nan ishima laa? Shin itinekon u apel m nder u, ka her je ngôu lu toghol iyav ou ye, ka her je un u a mar u la a lu toghol iyav ye." 
SongOfSongs8:6 Verem er kunya u i nger ikav sha mi sha ishima you man er kunya u i nger ikav sha mi sha uwegh ough kpaa; gadia dooshima taver er ku nahan; mgbegh u dooshima taver er Sheol nahan, myegh na ka myegh u usu je, nomborusu u TER je." 
SongOfSongs8:7 Mngerem ma kpishim kpaa maa fatyô u pirin dooshima ga, uifi kpaa vea fatyô u miren a na ga; aluer or nana na akaa a hen ya u nan cii sha u yamen dooshima yô, á laha nan doo doo je." 
SongOfSongs8:8 Se mba a anmgbian u kwase u kiriki, ngu a va atumba ga; tsô sé er a anngô wase shon nana, sha iyange i á va sôôr un laa?" 
SongOfSongs8:9 Aluer una lu kpekpe yô, sé kumba igyar i azurfa sha mi, una lu hunda yô, sé hire un sha ikpande i sedar." 
SongOfSongs8:10 Mo m ngu kpekpe, atumba am kpaa nga er ugôgômbaayoughouv nahan. Zum la m hingir ken ashe na er or u nan zough a bem yô." 
SongOfSongs8:11 Solomon lu a sule u wain hen Baal-hamon, a na u sha ikev i mbakuran; hanmô nana̱ va a agbenger a azurfa dubu sha ci u atam a u la." 
SongOfSongs8:12 Sule wam u wain u u lu u wam je yô, ngum sha ishi; dubu ne ka u wou Solomon, man gema deri uhar ka u mba ve nengen sha atam a u yô." 
SongOfSongs8:13 We u u tem ken ishule la, akar a am a zende nga keghen ato sha imo you, mo kpaa ma m ongo i." 
SongOfSongs8:14 Za ayem, we u u doom ishima, lu er morya shin er gumashim nahan, sha iwo i lun a ilyôghonov la. Shin er gumashim nahan, sha iwo i lun a ilyôghonov la" 
Isaiah1:1 Mpase u Yesaia wan u Amoshi, u a nenge sha kwagh u Yuda kua Yerusalem, sha ayange a Ushia man Yotam man Ahashi kua Hisekia, utor mba Mbayuda." 
Isaiah1:1 Mpase u Yesaia wan u Amoshi, u a nenge sha kwagh u Yuda kua Yerusalem, sha ayange a Ushia man Yotam man Ahashi kua Hisekia, utor mba Mbayuda." 
Isaiah1:2 Ungwa nen, ne Usha; ver ato we tar kpaa, gadia TER ôr kwagh er: M koso ônov, m yese ve, kpa ve je, ve gema ve hingir iyongo a Mo." 
Isaiah1:3 Bua fa or na, jaki kpaa fa kpese u ter u i, kpa Iserael yô, fa ga, ior Av mba henen kwagh ken ishima ga." 
Isaiah1:4 Kwagh á tser ne! Ne ikurior i eren kwaghbo, Ne ior mba ne lu a iferkwagh i yuhwan ne, ne tsombor u mbaaferev, ne ônov mba eren dang! Ve undu TER, ve laha Icighan u Iserael, ve pav a Na, ve hile ijime." 
Isaiah1:5 Ka nyi shi i lu ne pe i̱ seer gbidyen ne, er ne taver ishima u undun gbenda? Ityough cii gba angev, kua ishima cii kpaa ure." 
Isaiah1:6 Hii shin akevangahar zan zan ar sha ityo je, ijiir i dedoo ngi ga, saa agbir man atange, man avav a kô, i kam a ga, ikange a kpaa ga, i leghem a sha mkure kpaa ga." 
Isaiah1:7 Tar wen hingir toho; agar a en, i nande a sha usu; ishule yen kpaa, ior mba tar ugen mba yan i sha ishigh yenegh je; i hingir toho, bee er ior mba tar ugen ve vihi u kera cii nahan." 
Isaiah1:8 Man i undu wankwase u Shion er ka ityumbe i ken sule u wain yô, man shi er daarkura u ken sule yô, man shi er gar u ityav mbi kase un mbi tser yô." 
Isaiah1:9 Aluer TER u akum a Sha Una shi se asande ciôn her ga yô, ma se hingir er Sodom nahan, shi ma se hingir er Gomora nahan." 
Isaiah1:10 Ungwa nen kwaghôron u TER, ne mbavesen mba Sodom; ver nen ato sha ityesen i Aôndo wase, ne ior i Gomora!" 
Isaiah1:11 Ka nyi i gbem a iniav yenev mbi sôngon kpishi laa? kape TER A pin la. Iniav mbi nanden mbi sha anomaiyôngo, man ahôm a uicighanmbaabuav duem ishima; awambe a abua man a agumaiyôngo kua a ukpev kpaa, kera doom ga." 
Isaiah1:12 Shighe u ka nea vaan sha ishigh Yagh yô, ka an nan ker kwagh ne her a ven er ne̱ va ne̱ va ndyar ityembe Yam dang dang nahana?" 
Isaiah1:13 Mayange shi de kera vaan nen a iniav sha lanshima ga; kwaghhumandoon kpaa kam kwagh u hôngorough je; uwer u he man iyange i memen, kua mlehe u sha mbamkohol kpaa— M kera fatyô u rumun iferkwagh a mkohol u iniongo imôngo ga." 
Isaiah1:14 Iwer yen i he man uiniongo enev mba sha ashighe ashighe la ve duem ishima, nyôrom iyol a mi, iyol kpem u wan ishima a mi." 
Isaiah1:15 Zum u ka nea naregh ave a en yô, M gema M yer ne ishigh Yagh kera; zum u ne seer a seer eren mbamsen kpishi kpaa, M ver ato ga; ave a en iv a awambe." 
Isaiah1:16 Ôô nen ayol, wanger nen ayol a en; kar nen a ifer i aeren a en sha ishigh Yagh kera; de nen akaabo a eren;" 
Isaiah1:17 hen nen u eren kwagh u dedoo; ker nen kwagh u jighilii, yange nen ipilaor; er nen a ancôgholov dedoo, ôr nen ijir i kwasecôghol, wase nan." 
Isaiah1:18 Va nen ase, sé hen nen kwagh imôngo, kape TER A kaa ne; shin er asorabo a en a nyian bong, nahan kpaa aa kungu er awombo nahan; shin er a nyian er kpagh nahan kpaa aa kungu er mou nahan." 
Isaiah1:19 Aluer nea rumun nea ver ato yô, né ya mdoom ma tar la;" 
Isaiah1:20 kpa aluer nea venda, nea hendan kpaa yô, á wua ne sha sanker; gadia kape zwa u TER u kaa la." 
Isaiah1:21 Er nan man gar u mimi a hingir idyakwase nahana, wen u a mgbough a mimi la! Perapera yan lu ker a na, kpa hegen yô, mase kan mbawuanior tseegh ve lu ker ye." 
Isaiah1:22 Azurfa wou iyôgh ki mimi ga nungwa sha mi; wain wou kpaa i nungwa mngerem sha mi. 
Isaiah1:23 Atiator a ou ka mbaahendanev, akar a mbanumungbenda; hanmô ve nan soo inyaregh ki yamen ishô a mi, mba keren injar; mba er ijir i kuran ancôgholov ga, mba we kasev mba côgholov iko sha ijir kpaa ga." 
Isaiah1:24 Ka nahan man Ter, TER u akum a Sha, Uageegh u Iserael A kaa er: Ata! Me yôhôl ishima Yam sha mbaahendanev Av, Me or iyev sha mbaihomov Av;" 
Isaiah1:25 Me kende uwegh Agh sha a we, Me wanger atsaase a ou kera er sha mtse nahan, me dugh iyôgh you ki mimi ga la kera cii;" 
Isaiah1:26 Me hide a mbaajiriv ou her, er tsuaa nahan, man mbawasentor kpaa er sha hiihii nahan; ken masetyô, á yilan we er, gar u perapera, gar u mimi." 
Isaiah1:27 Á yima Shion sha ijirôron i mimi, kua mba ve gem ishima ken a na kpaa, á yima ve sha perapera." 
Isaiah1:28 Kpa mtim u mbaperenatindi kua u mbaasorabo una va shighe môm, man mba ve undu TER kpaa, á tim ve kera." 
Isaiah1:29 Gadia kunya ua kôr ne a ikon i terebin i i sar ne la, nea va ahenge kpaa, sha ci u ishule i ikon i ne tsough i la." 
Isaiah1:30 Gadia nea hingir er kon u terebin u ikya na i use yô, man er sule u ikon u mngerem ma lu ker yô." 
Isaiah1:31 Or u ageegh kpaa nana hingir er vuwe ada nahan, tom u nan kpaa ua lu er amaramausu nahan, ve uhar cii vea hia imôngo, ma or u pirin nana lu ga." 
Isaiah2:1 Kwaghôron u Yesaia wan u Amoshi nenge sha Yuda kua Yerusalem la. 
Isaiah2:1 Kwaghôron u Yesaia wan u Amoshi nenge sha Yuda kua Yerusalem la. 
Isaiah2:2 Sha ayange a masetyô yô, uwo u iyou i TER ua tile dông, ua tav sha ua hemba iwo cii, á kende u sha, ua hemba agungu; akuraior cii aa kôndo sha u iuu." 
Isaiah2:3 Ior kpishi vea za, vea kaa er: Va sé kôndo nen sha uwo u TER, sha iyou i Aôndo u Yakob, A̱ tese se igbenda Na, se kpaa sé zende sha igbenda Na; gadia ka ken Shion man tindi una due ye, kua kwaghôron u TER kpaa ken Yerusalem." 
Isaiah2:4 Una ôr ijir her atô u akuraior, Una kure kwagh u ior kpishi; nahan vea gema usanker vev, vea var indyuhar a mi, awange a ve kpaa aa hingir ahô a sôron ikon a mi; ikurior igen ia kera tsuwa sanker a ikurior igen ga, vea kera hen ityav mbi nôngon kpaa ga." 
Isaiah2:5 We ya u Yakob, va sé zende nen ken iwanger i TER." 
Isaiah2:6 Gadia U ta ior Ou, ya u Yakob kera, gadia ve iv a akaa a sha inja i mba sha ityoughkitaregh la, ve ka mbakpehenasor sha inja i Mbafiliti, man shi ve nyôr nongo a ônov mba ior mba tar ugen." 
Isaiah2:7 Tar ve mgbough a azurfa man zenaria, inyaregh vegh ngee je gande; man tar ve mgbough a anyinya; akeke a ve a utya kpaa ngee je gande." 
Isaiah2:8 Tar ve mgbough a akombo kpaa; mba gur mba civir tom u ave a ve, kwagh u ahôaveegh a ve, a er la." 
Isaiah2:9 Kape uuma, ve hingir dang ne, man ior ve hee ayol a ve la; de deen ve kwaghbo ve ga." 
Isaiah2:10 Nyôr ken vande, yer shin inya, sha ci u mcieryol u TER, man sha ci u icivir Na i hemban la." 
Isaiah2:11 Ashe a a kenger sha ilyahan la, á hee a, man iyol gengese i or kpaa á hide a i ijime, Ka TER tseegh Una lu a icivir sha iyange la ye." 
Isaiah2:12 Gadia iyange i Ter u akum a Sha ngi van sha mbaihaghev man mbagengeseyol cii, man sha akaa a i kende a sha kpaa, sha ci u hiden a a ijime," 
Isaiah2:13 man sha usedar mba Lebanon cii, mba ve tav ve kende sha la, man sha uouki mba Bashan cii kpaa," 
Isaiah2:14 man sha iwo i taven cii, man sha agungu a kenden sha cii," 
Isaiah2:15 man sha hanma gôgôyou u taven, man sha hanma gilgar u taver," 
Isaiah2:16 man sha utso mba Tarshishi cii, kua sha akaa a doon ashe a engem." 
Isaiah2:17 Á hide a iyolmoron i uuma la ijime, iyolgengese i ior kpaa á hee i; ka TER tseegh Una lu a icivir sha iyange la ye." 
Isaiah2:18 Akombo kpaa á kar a mi kera purututu. 
Isaiah2:19 Ior vea nyôr ken ubarmbaiwoov man ken ijô i shin inya, sha ci u mcieryol u TER man sha ci u icivir Na i hemban la, zum u Una mough sha u tan tar mciem iyol la." 
Isaiah2:20 Sha iyange la yô, or nana haa akombo a nan a azurfa kua akombo a nan a zenaria kera, a nan er sha ci u gulen civir a la, nana gema a, nana gbihi ijuhyev man anema," 
Isaiah2:21 sha u nana nyôr ken ubarmbaiwoov man ken ikwe i avande kpaa, sha ci u mcieryol u TER man sha ci u icivir Na i hemban la, zum u Una mough sha u tan tar mciem iyol la." 
Isaiah2:22 De suur nen sha or ga, u iôôn i nan i lu ken ahenga a nan, gadia nan kuma u wan nan iko hana?" 
Isaiah3:1 Gadia nenge, Ter, TER u akum a Sha, ngu ngohol Yerusalem man Yuda ishuwen kua ishuur kera, ishuwen u bredi cii, kua ishuwen u mnger cii," 
Isaiah3:2 orageegh kua orutya, orjir kua profeti, orkpehenasor kua ortamen," 
Isaiah3:3 torshoja u nengen sha ior akunduahargber man orcivirigh, orwasen sha kwaghhenen man orfaneev kua orfan ahir a eren." 
Isaiah3:4 Man shi Me ver mbayev vea hingir atiator a ve, ipila kpaa ia tema tor sha a ve." 
Isaiah3:5 Ior vea kighir ayol a ve a ican, hanma or a orgen, man hanma or a or u nan we ndor a nan yô; wanye u kiriki nana cihi tamenor, kape or u gban kera kpaa nana er a orcivirigh la." 
Isaiah3:6 Zum u or nana gema nana kôr anngô u nan ken ya u ter u nan, nana kaa er: U ngu a akondo je, yô, lu orvesen wase, ice i i hingir atihi a alôgh ne i̱ hingir sha ikev you," 
Isaiah3:7 sha iyange la je, nana genger imo, nana venda er: Me fatyô u lun ortwer ga, gadia ken ya wam kwaghyan ngu ga, akondo kpaa ga; de gemem ner, m̱ hingir orvesen u ior ga." 
Isaiah3:8 Gadia Yerusalem nôngo gbev, Yuda kpaa gba; gadia nombor ve kua aeren a ve nga ihom a TER, sha u bamen ashe a Na a icivirigh." 
Isaiah3:9 Msange ve u sha dooshima ngu eren shiada nan ve ibo; mba pasen kwaghbo ve er Sodom nahan, mba yeren kwagh ga. Kwagh tser ve ve! Gadia ve va a kwaghbo sha ayol a ve!" 
Isaiah3:10 Ter nen orperapera, kaa nen ner, á kpe nan iyol, gadia nana ya atam a aeren a nan." 
Isaiah3:11 Kwagh á tser iferor! Á kpe nan iyol ga, gadia kwagh u ave a nan a er la, á va er nan un nahan vough." 
Isaiah3:12 Ior Av mban, mba ve kighir ve a ican yô, ka mbayev, kasev kpaa mba yan tor sha a ve. Ior Av, mba ve hemen ne la, ka ve je ve tsume a ven ye, man gbenda u ma u ze sha mi la, ve vihi u kera." 
Isaiah3:13 TER mough tile sha, kuma Un u sendegh kwagh, ngu tilen sha sha u ôron ior ijir." 
Isaiah3:14 TER Una nyôr ijir a mbatamen mba ior Nav kua atiator a ve: Ka ne je, ne ye sule u wain; kwagh u i ngohol atsanaior sha apera la, ngu ken uya enev." 
Isaiah3:15 Inja na nan man ne cagh ior Av, ne er atsanaior icana? Kape Ter, TER u akum a Sha A kaa ne." 
Isaiah3:16 Shi TER kaa er: Er ônkasev mba Shion ve te ihagh, ve zenden ve dughun imon ve, ve nyiar ashe, mba zenden zende ve, eren iyar, uvan ahye shin angahar a ve," 
Isaiah3:17 nahan yô, TER Una haa ônkasev mba Shion lagh sha ihaghtyo, TER Una pase kunya u idyelegh ve ken igbar." 
Isaiah3:18 Sha iyange la je, TER Una kar a mbaagba mba sha hwe la kera kua atsar a kangen sha ityo man aniwerev," 
Isaiah3:19 man inyarev mbi ken ato man mbi sha ave, kua akondo a yisan ishigh la kpaa," 
Isaiah3:20 man mbaadikpo mba kangen sha ityo man mshirim ma shin agbôônangahar man atsar a shin iwenge man akpe a tulali man akpagher," 
Isaiah3:21 man ikunya i sha ave kua i sha ahenga," 
Isaiah3:22 man akondo a hweegh a haan sha iniongo man akondo a hamben sha avande man a zeren shin iwenge man ankpaam ma kôron sha ave," 
Isaiah3:23 man anjingim man ushimi man atsar a sha ityou kua uriga mba haan iyol. 
Isaiah3:24 Kwagh u hôôn una gema á va lu sha ityough ki kwagh u human doon la; kor ua lu sha ityough ki tsar u shin iwenge la; ityough ki kpurun kia tema sha ityough ki kuran la; ibashôhô una lu sha ityough ki ikondo i zan iniongo a mi la; iyolough ku usugh sha ityough ki mdooashe la. 
Isaiah3:25 Á wua nomsombaiorov ou sha sanker, anomaior a ou kpaa aa kpe ken utya." 
Isaiah3:26 Ihindagar na ia vaa, ia zungwen, una shar hen inya aveve." 
Isaiah4:1 Sha iyange la kasev utaankaruhar vea kohol sha or môm, vea kaa er: Sé yaan kwaghyan wase ayol a ase, sé zeren akondo ayol a ase, i̱ gbaa yilan se sha iti you tsô, tôô se aheen ase ne kera." 
Isaiah4:2 Sha iyange la mende u TER ua doo ashe ua engem, iyiav mbi shin tar kpaa mbia lu icivir man iengem i mba ve wer ken Iserael la." 
Isaiah4:3 Or u nan shi ken Shion man u nan lu ken Yerusalem her yô, á yila nan er, icighanor, ka hanma or u i nger nan ken mbaumav ken Yerusalem la," 
Isaiah4:4 shighe u TER Una ôô hôngor u ônkasev mba Shion kera la, man Una kile awambe a Yerusalem her atô na kera, sha Jijingi u ijirigh man Jijingi u koughon kwagh kera." 
Isaiah4:5 Sha tar u uwo u Shion cii kua sha ajiir a eren mbamkohol her la, TER Una er ibeenegh kia lu atetan kua mnyim, man iwanger i inyomborusu i yeghen tugh; gadia icivir la cii, kwaghcirin una lu sha mi." 
Isaiah4:6 Ityumbe ia lu atetan sha ci u mure u yeren oo ker, man sha ci u ijiir i yeren uraahumbe kua ura kpaa." 
Isaiah5:1 Kam pe wan icam teren u a doom ishima la, icam i u a doom ishima la, sha sule na u wain. U a doom ishima la yan lu a sule u ikon i wain sha igungu u doon inya kpishi;" 
Isaiah5:2 a kaha u, a sange awen ken u kera, a lôô ikon i wain i hemban doon cii ker, a maa gôgôyou u taven her atô u u, man a time ihungwa i shoghol wain shimi, A ver ishima er ua ume atam a wain a dedoo, kpa u gema u ume atam a bo." 
Isaiah5:3 Hegen yô, ne mba ne lu ken Yerusalem man ior mba Yuda, shi ôrom nen ase ijir, Mo vea sule wam u wain." 
Isaiah5:4 Ka nyi i shi, i ma M er ken sule wam ve M er i ga? Er M ver ishima Mer ua ume atam a wain yô, er nan man u gem u um atam a bo?" 
Isaiah5:5 Hegen yô, Me pase ne kwagh u Me er a sule Wam u wain la: Me sough igyar i u kera, á ya u; Me hembe kpekpe u u kera, á ndyar u shin angahar;" 
Isaiah5:6 Me vihi u kera, á kera sôr u agbaa ga, á vughul u kpaa ga; kpa ua mende usaa kua sagher; Me ta abeen icin, á kera nôô ura sha u ga." 
Isaiah5:7 Gayô, sule u wain u TER u akum a Sha ne, ka ya u Iserael je, ior mba Yuda kpaa ka mende u sha ishima Na je; A ver ishima sha ijirôron i mimi, kpa nenge, gema ka awambe a haan inya, man shi sha perapera, kpa nenge gema ka mliam." 
Isaiah5:8 Kwagh á tser mba ve seer ya sha ya ve, mba ve seer sule sha sule ve, je zan zan ma ijiir i kera shi ga, man ne mase teman hen atô u tar ne, ne tseegh." 
Isaiah5:9 TER u akum a Sha kaa, sha ato am je, er: Mimi je, uya kpishi vea hingir atse, mba kehen kua mba dedoo kpaa, or á kera tema ken ve ga." 
Isaiah5:10 Gadia sule u wain u u lu indyor pue ua iv gbanggbang uhar tsô, man ikaren i ivor i homer môm (ka efa pue je la) ia va iv efa môm tseegh." 
Isaiah5:11 Kwagh á tser mba ve moughon pepe sha u zendan msôrom ma yuwan ityô, mba ve tema tugh zan zan wain a nzughul a ve la!" 
Isaiah5:12 Ve mba a adiguve man molo man genga man imar kua wain hen uiniongo vev la, kpa aeren a TER yô, ve wa a iko ga, man tom u ave Na kpaa mba nengen a mi ga." 
Isaiah5:13 Ka nahan man ior Av ve lu nyôron ken uikangen ye, sha ci u mfe a ban yô; ashagbaior a ve hingir mbajenev, man ikpilaior ve ngi kpen imura." 
Isaiah5:14 Ka nahan man Sheol a seer isharen na, a aver zwa gbanger gande, nahan icivir ve man ikpilaior ve man ayôôso a ve kua or u nan ember ken a ve, mba hungwan shimi." 
Isaiah5:15 Kape uuma ve hingir dang man or nan hee la, ashe a mbagengeseyol kpaa á hee a;" 
Isaiah5:16 kpa TER u akum a Sha yô, á kende Un sha sha ijirôron i mimi, man Aôndo u wang tsegha iyol Na sha perapera." 
Isaiah5:17 Tsô aniyôngov vea gba yan toho ker er ka hen ijiir ve i yan toho yô, man mba azende azende vea ya atse a mbanyarev." 
Isaiah5:18 Kwagh á tser mba ve udugh ifer sha ikor i aiegh man isholibo kpaa er ka sha kor u ikyekye i kpelan yô; 
Isaiah5:19 mba ve kaan er: A̱ er ase fefa, A̱ torough a tom, Na, sé nenge; awashima u Icighan u Iserael la, a̱ nangem, a̱ va, sha u se̱ fa un yô!" 
Isaiah5:20 Kwagh á tser mba ve yer ifer er, kwagh u dedoo, man kwagh u dedoo yô, ve gem ve yer er ifer la; mba ve gem ime i̱ hingir iwanger, shi ve gem iwanger i̱ hingir ve ime la; man ve ver myough er ka mnyohom, man mnyohom di er ka myough la!" 
Isaiah5:21 Kwagh á tser mba ve nengen ayol a ve er ve mba mbafankwagh, man shi ve nengen ayol a ve er ve mba mbakavenkwagh yô!" 
Isaiah5:22 Kwagh á tser mba ve taver ayol sha wain u man, man ve lu mbaageev sha u nungwan msôrom ma yuwan la;" 
Isaiah5:23 mba ve ne mbalun a ibo ishô sha ci u inyar, kpa orperapera yô, ve ngohol mimi u nan kera!" 
Isaiah5:24 Nahan yô, er nomborusu ka u hia atôayia man er toho u uman kpaa ka u haa inya sha usu, kape mise ve ua vôngo la, imondon ve kpaa una mough er ihundu yô, gadia ve venda ityesen i TER u akum a Sha, ve laha kwaghôron u Icighan u Iserael la." 
Isaiah5:25 Ka nahan man iyugh i TER i kende sha ior Nav ye, man shi A naregh uwegh Nagh sha u eren num a ve; A tsaha ve, iwo kpaa tenger, man akom a ve hingir er ihôghonov nahan ker atô u akômaigbinda. Nahan kpaa iyugh Na ngi a kar kera ga, kpa uwegh Nagh ku naregh ku di her tsô." 
Isaiah5:26 Man shi Una kende tuta sha, sha ci u ikurior i caa je, Una yila i sha hondo u tôngon sha ikighir i tar je; tsô ia va ayem gagh je." 
Isaiah5:27 Mô ve môm nana vôr shin nana nôngo gbeev ken a ve ga, mô môm kpaa nana meer mnyam shin nana yav kpaa ga; kwange u iwenge ve kpaa ua sagh ga, kwange u akôvangahar a ve kpaa ua tôndo ga;" 
Isaiah5:28 avaan a ve ka a horon, mbaada vev cii kpaa i henda ve; apande a anyinya ve kpaa aa lu er iwen i gberusu nahan, akaver a ve kpaa nga er ahumbe a hiar yô;" 
Isaiah5:29 kume ve ngu er ngôbegha yô, vea ta kume er agumabegha yô; een, vea kpela iker, vea tsuwe vea kôr inyam, vea kpela i vea yem a mi doo doo kpaa, ma or u yiman i nana lu ga." 
Isaiah5:30 Sha iyange la ahura á ta sha a ve er ihuran i zegemnger nahan; aluer or nana nenge shin tar yô, nana nenge a ime i ican, iwanger ia hingir ime sha ci u abeen." 
Isaiah6:1 Sha inyom i tor Ushia kpe la, m nenge Ter, tema sha ikônough ki torough ki taven ki lun sha geng, akur a akondo a Na samber ken tempel cii." 
Isaiah6:2 Userafim tile a Na vegher u sha, hanmô ve lu a akper ataratar: a ahar a yisa ishigh nagh a mi; ahar, a yisa angahar a mi; a ahar di yô, a purugh a mi." 
Isaiah6:3 U môm gema gba yilan ugen kaan er: Icighan, icighan, icighan, kape TER u akum a Sha A lu la; tar cii iv a iengem Na." 
Isaiah6:4 Tsô amagh a ikpande i ihinda tenger sha imo i u a yer la, iyou la kpaa mnyim mgbough ker." 
Isaiah6:5 Tsô m kaa mer: Kwagh tserem ve, m saa ve! gadia mo m ngu or u zwa wam u hôngor yô, man m tem her atô u ior mba ijô ve i hôngor kpaa yô; gadia ashe am nenge a Tor, TER u akum a Sha." 
Isaiah6:6 Tsô ugen ken userafim la purugh va her a mo, kôr ikausu i enger sha uwe, a dugh i ken atse a nan nagh sha mi la, sha gbegba;" 
Isaiah6:7 a va bendem i sha zwa, a kaa er: Nenge, ngin bende u sha ityumbuzwaagh ve, nahan i tôô ibo you kera man i de u isholibo you kpaa." 
Isaiah6:8 Tsô m ungwa imo i Ter lu kaan er: Ka an Me tindi nan, man ka an nana za sha ci Wasa? Tsô m kaa mer: Mo ne, tindim." 
Isaiah6:9 Nahan A kaa er: Za, za kaa ior mban wer: M-ongo yô, ungwan nen, kpa de kaven nen ga; mnenge kpaa, nengen nen, kpa de kaven nen ga." 
Isaiah6:10 Er, ishima i ior ne i̱ wa ahôm, man ato ve a̱ yuhwa, cir ve ashe, sha er ve̱ de nengen sha ashe ve ga, ve̱ de ongo sha ato ve kpaa ga, shi ve̱ de kaven ken ishima, ve̱ gema man i̱ bee ve angev kpaa ga." 
Isaiah6:11 Tsô m kaa mer: Zan zan hanma iyange je, Tere? A gema A kaa er: Zan zan agar aa kar hingir atse ve, or á kera lu ker ga, ayou kpaa or á lu ker ga man tar ua hingir toho dang ve;" 
Isaiah6:12 man TER Una yem a ior ca, man ajiir a i undu a kpaa, á ngee ken tar la." 
Isaiah6:13 Man aluer nahan kpaa shi môm-ken-upue una shi ker yô, shi á kar a ve ken usu; er kon u terebin man u ouki mba ka a gber ve man akpughur a ve a shi her la, kape icighantsombor una lu ikpughur her la." 
Isaiah7:1 Sha ayange a Ahashi wan u Yotam, wan u Ushia, tor u Yuda la, Reshin tor u Shiria man Peka wan u Remalia, tor u Iserael, ve kôndo sha Yerusalem sha u za nôngon ityav a na; kpa ve fatyô u nôngon ityav a na ga." 
Isaiah7:2 I za kaa ya u Davidi er: Shiria sen va haa ken Eferaim, nahan ishima na tenger kua ishima i ior nav kpaa, er ikon i shin ikô ka i tenger nahan." 
Isaiah7:3 Tsô TER kaa a Yesaia er: Due ase, we a wan wou Shear-Yashubi (Asande a a shi her la aa hide), za kegh nen Ahashi gbenda, hen ikighir i akpa u ityungumnger u sha, sha kômgbenda u zan hen ijir i i kungun akondo her la." 
Isaiah7:4 Kaa a na wer: Ver ishima, ishima i̱ de nyian we ga; de kera cie ga, ishima i̱ de yen u sha ci u atôndo a usu a mnyiigh ahar ne ga, sha ci u iyugh i kenden tsung i Reshin man Shiria kua i wan u Remalia, la." 
Isaiah7:5 Gadia er Shiria hen kwagh u bo sha a we, man Eferaim kua wan u Remalia, mba kaan er:" 
Isaiah7:6 Sé kôndo nen sha Yuda, sé ta nen un mciem iyol, sé hemba nen un, sé ver nen wan u Tabeel tor her atô na." 
Isaiah7:7 Ter AÔNDO ngu kaan nahan er: Kwagh shon una lu nahan ga, una er nahan kpaa ga." 
Isaiah7:8 Gadia ityough ki Shiria yô, ka Damaseku je, man ityough ki Damaseku yô, ka Reshin je. (Er anyom akunduatar kar ataan aa lu a kuma ga je tsô, á sombo Eferaim avur avur, sha er a̱ de kera luun ikurior ga yô.)" 
Isaiah7:9 Ityough ki Eferaim ka Samaria je, man ityough ki Samaria ka wan u Remalia je. Aluer nea na jighjigh ga yô, mimi je né tile dông ga." 
Isaiah7:10 TER shi ôr kwagh a Ahashi, kaa er:" 
Isaiah7:11 Pine ivande hen TER, Aôndo wou, i̱ lu shin, shin Sheol, shin sha, sha aôndo je." 
Isaiah7:12 Kpa Ahashi kaa er: Me pine ga, me kar TER kpaa ga." 
Isaiah7:13 Tsô a kaa er: Shi ungwa, we ya u Davidi, ka ne kwagh u kiriki u nan ior ivôron, je er ne na Aôndo wam kpaa Una vôr yôô?" 
Isaiah7:14 Nahan yô, TER iyol Na je, Una na ne ivande: Nenge, iniunkwase ia wa iyav ia mar wannomso, ia yila un iti er Imanuel." 
Isaiah7:15 Una ya atumbabua a kôrough kua iyough, zum u una va fa u vendan kwagh u bo man u tsuwan kwagh u dedoo yô." 
Isaiah7:16 Gadia er wanakiriki la una lu a fa u vendan kwagh u bo man u tsuwan kwagh u dedoo ga je tsô, tar u we u cie utor mba u, uhar mban, á undu u gbilin." 
Isaiah7:17 TER Una va u, we a ior ou kua ya u teru, a ayange a alu avande van ga, hii sha iyange i Eferaim undu Yuda la je–ka tor u Ashiria je la!" 
Isaiah7:18 Sha iyange la TER Una tôngo hondo, Una yila iji i ken ca, ken akighir a iwagh i Igipiti, kua iyough i ken tar u Ashiria." 
Isaiah7:19 Ia va, i cii, ia mem ken apev a iwoogh man ken ubarmbaawenev man sha usaa cii kua sha ajiir a adegh a toho a lu la." 
Isaiah7:20 Sha iyange la TER Una hondo sha atsem u i goho a goho un yande Ifi la, ka sha tor u Ashiria je la, Una hondo ice i sha ityo kua i shin angahar, indyer kpaa Una torough i kera." 
Isaiah7:21 Tsô sha iyange la, or nana koso ngôbua môm man iyôngo ihiar," 
Isaiah7:22 nahan yô, sha ci u atumba a vea na kpishi la, nana ya atumba a kôrough; gadia ka atumba a kôrough kua iyough man hanmô u nan shi her hen tar la nana ya ye." 
Isaiah7:23 Tsô sha iyange la, hanma ijiir henpe ikon i wain ka i lu dubu man i kom u á yam i sha agbenger a azurfa dubu la, ia hingir ijiir i kôrakondo kua usaa." 
Isaiah7:24 Ka sha avaan kua ada man á va hen ijiir la ye; gadia tar la cii, ua hingir kôrakondo kua usaa." 
Isaiah7:25 Agungu cii a ngise i vughul a sha nduhar kpaa, wea mgbôghom a a ga, sha ci u cian kôrakondo kua usaa, kpa á hingir ijiir i zan a abua her, man i akusu a iyôngo á ndyaren her." 
Isaiah8:1 TER shi kaa a mo er: Tôô zegekpande, nger sha mi sha pensel u or wer: Maher-shalal-hashi-bashi (hegen, hegen je, ishar i yan, fefa je, msar)" 
Isaiah8:2 man Me tôô mbashiada mba mimi, pristi Uria man Sekaria wan u Yeberekia." 
Isaiah8:3 Tsô m za hen profeti u kwase, nahan a wa iyav a mar wan u nomso. Tsô TER kaa a mo er: Ii un iti wer, Maher-shalal-hashi-bashi."
