Isaiah8:4 Gadia er wanakiriki la una lu a fa u yilan er, terem man ngôm ga je tsô, á kura inyaregh ki Damaseku man ishar i á ya ken Samaria la, á za a mi sha ishigh ki tor u Ashiria." 
Isaiah8:5 TER shi ôr kwagh a mo, kaa er:" 
Isaiah8:6 Er ior mban ve vende mngerem ma Shiloa ma ma kough ving la, ve gem ve ember a Reshin man wan u Remalia yô;" 
Isaiah8:7 nahan yô, TER Una va ve a mngerem ma Ifi ma taver, maa ngee kpishi, ka tor u Ashiria a icivir na cii je la; ma á iv ukungô nav cii, ma á sar avenge na cii;" 
Isaiah8:8 una kuwa zan zan ken Yuda; una kuwa emememe, una kar; una gba or iker iker je; mnaregh u akper a na una iv igbanger i tar wou cii, we Imanuel." 
Isaiah8:9 Ger nen ayôôso ne ior, i̱ kondo ne iyol; ver nen ato, ne mba ken ityar i icaa cii, ta nen akondo uya, i̱ kondo ne iyol, ta nen ikondo uya, i̱ kondo ne iyol." 
Isaiah8:10 Hen nen kwagh ayol a en, kpa una lu a inja ga; ôr nen kwagh, kpa kwagh á er sha mi ga, gadia Aôndo ngu a vese." 
Isaiah8:11 Gadia TER kaam nahan zum u uwegh Nagh ku kôrom man A wam kwagh er m̱ de zenden sha gbenda u ior mban ga la, A kaa er:" 
Isaiah8:12 De yer nen kwagh u ior mban ve yer er “zwa u zuan” la, ner, zwa u zuan, ga; man shi de cie nen kwagh u ve cie la ga, man shi mciem ma̱ de te ne iyol ga." 
Isaiah8:13 TER u akum a Sha ka Un, tsegha nen Un ye, ka Un A̱ lu ne kwagh u cian, shi A̱ lu ne kwagh u cier iyol kpaa ye." 
Isaiah8:14 Tsô Una hingir icighanjiir man iwen i keman angahar sha mi, man vande u nôngon gbev sha mi, hen uya mba Iserael uhar cii, man shi kper man kwaghhônon kpaa sha ci u mba ve tem ken Yerusalem." 
Isaiah8:15 Ior kpishi vea nôngo gbev, vea gba, vea sombo, vea gba ken kwaghhônon, á kôr ve." 
Isaiah8:16 Kange mpase, cir ityesen, ver ikav sha mi hen mbahenen Av." 
Isaiah8:17 Tsô me kegh TER u A yer ya u Yakob ishigh Nagh la, ka sha a Na ishimaverenkeghen yam i lu ye." 
Isaiah8:18 Nenge, mo kua ônov mba TER A nem ne, se mba uivande kua akav hen Iserael sha ikev i TER u akum a Sha, u A tem sha uwo u Shion la." 
Isaiah8:19 Zum u vea kaa a ven er: Pine nen ujijingi mba mbakpenev kua mbatsenganpasen akaa kpaa, mba ve ndahar imo, ve er kwagh shin iker la–kera hemba doon u ior vea pine Aôndo ve gaa? Á pine mbakpenev kwagh sha ci u mbaumavaa?" 
Isaiah8:20 Hide nen sha ityesen kua mpase! Aluer vea ôr sha kwaghôron ne ga yô, m-av u use kera ngu sha ci ve ga." 
Isaiah8:21 Tsô vea gba zenden ken ican kua ijen kpaa; zum u ijen ia kôr ve yô, ishima ia nyoon ve, vea tuhwa tor ve kua Aôndo ve vea kenger sha;" 
Isaiah8:22 vea kenger shin inya, kpa nenge, ka ican man ime, ime i cier iyol; á zenda ve vea nyôr ken angôghime." 
Isaiah9:1 Ime kera ngi sha ci u un u a lu ken ican la ga. Sha ayange a ngise la A gema tar u Sebulon kua u Nafetali, hingir kwagh u iheenegh; kpa sha ayange a masetyô yô, Una civir ian i yemen shin zegemnger, yande Yordan, veghertar u akuraior la." 
Isaiah9:2 Ior mba ve zenden ken ime, ve nenge iwanger i vesen; mba ve tem ken tar u mure u kuugh la kpaa, iwanger ta sha a ve." 
Isaiah9:3 U seer ikurior ne, i ngee, U seer ve iember kpishi kpaa; mba ember sha ishigh You sha inja i m-ember i sha iyange i sunda, er ior ve ember shighe u ka vea karen kwar sha ishar yô." 
Isaiah9:4 Gadia igber i i yoho un man gbough ku sha ijime na kua kwagir u or u kighir un a ican la, U sombo kera er sha iyange i Midian yô." 
Isaiah9:5 Gadia hanma ikôvough ki nguhar ki orutya ki ki lu karen a m-ov, man ikondo i haan iyol, i i gem i i shigh i awambe la yô, á nande kera, á hingir kwagh u keer usu a mi." 
Isaiah9:6 Gadia i mar se Wan, i na se Wan u nomso; tarkuran ngu sha vandegh Nagh; mba yer iti Na er: Orwasenmhen u Kpilighyol, Aôndo u Ageegh, Ter u Tsôron, Wantor u Bem." 
Isaiah9:7 Mseer u tarkuran kua bem vea lu a ikighir je ga, sha ikônough ki torough ki Davidi man sha tartor na kpaa, sha er á ver u dông u̱ lu taveraa sha ijirôron i vough kua sha perapera, hii hegen je zan zan gbem sha won. Gbashima u TER u akum a Sha una er kwagh ne." 
Isaiah9:8 Ter tindi a kwaghôron ken Yakob a gba ken Iserael. 
Isaiah9:9 Ior cii vea fa, ka Eferaim man mba ve tem ken Samaria, mba ve er kwagh ken ishima sha iyolgengese kua sha ishima i iceenegh, ve kaan er:" 
Isaiah9:10 Akam yôhôl, kpa sea maa sha awen a kuan; i gber utur, kpa sea gema sé ver usedar sha ityouv vev." 
Isaiah9:11 Nahan TER va a mbaahendanev mba Reshin sha a ve, A tor mbaihomov nav ityô:" 
Isaiah9:12 ka Mbashiria sha vegher u sha ityoughkitaregh man Mbafiliti vegher u shin ityôtar la; ve gema ve aver zwa, ve mena Iserael. Nahan kpaa iyugh Na ngi a kar kera ga, kpa uwegh Nagh ku naregh ku di her tsô." 
Isaiah9:13 Nahan kpaa ior gema her a Na, u A tsaha ve la, ga; shi ve ker TER u akum a Sha kpaa ga." 
Isaiah9:14 Nahan TER gber Iserael ityough kua tsa man ndaregh ku ivilegh kua ikenaika, sha iyange i môm je." 
Isaiah9:15 Orvesen u lun a icivir ka nan nan lu ityough ye, man profeti u tesen ior aie la, ka un a lu tsa ye." 
Isaiah9:16 Gadia ve mba ve hemen ior ne, ve gema ve hingir mba nan mtsum, man shi mba i hemen ve la ve gba ken mtsum la." 
Isaiah9:17 Ka nahan man Ter Una kera ember ikaior ve ga, man shi Una zungwe ancôgholov vev kua kasev vev mba côgholov mhôônom kpaa ga ye, gadia hanmô ve ka dangor man u eren ifer tsô, hanma zwa kpaa ngu ôron iferkwagh. Nahan kpaa iyugh Na ngi a kar kera ga, kpa uwegh Nagh ku naregh ku di her tsô." 
Isaiah9:18 Gadia ifer hie er usu nahan, i nande ukôrakondo kua usaa kera; mimi je, ngu hie ikô i i we mgbigh mgbigh yô, zan zan i kôndo sha er mnyim ma ma vingir ma yem sha nahan." 
Isaiah9:19 Sha iyugh i TER u akum a Sha yô, inya hia kera, ior kpaa ve hingir er kwagh u keer usu a mi yô; or zungwe anngô u nan ga." 
Isaiah9:20 Mba tsugh kwagh vegher u ken uwegh ku yanegh, nahan kpaa ijen ngi kôron ve her, mba ye kwagh ken uwegh ku imesegh kpa ka kom ve ga; vea ya inyam, hanma or inyam i uwegh ku nan iyol i nan;" 
Isaiah9:21 Manase ya Eferaim, Eferaim di Manase, ve imôngo cii ve kôr Yuda ihom. Nahan kpaa iyugh Na ngi a kar kera ga kpa uwegh Nagh ku naregh ku di her tsô." 
Isaiah10:1 Kwagh á tser mba ve we atindi a ifer, kua mbangeren mba ve nger akaavihin," 
Isaiah10:2 sha u mgbeghan mbaibanave sha ijirôron kera, man sha u ngohol ian i mbaatsanev mba ken ior Av la kera, sha u kasev mba côgholov ve̱ hingir ishar ve, man sha u ve̱ gema ve̱ sar ancôgholov kpaa!" 
Isaiah10:3 Né er nan sha iyange i oron iyeve, man sha mtim u una due ca laa? Ka an je né za gba nan ikumu? Man ka han né undu inyaregh yeneghe?" 
Isaiah10:4 Vea gba ngurum inya er mbakwarev nahan tsô, vea gba inya er mba i woo ve yô. Nahan kpaa iyugh Na ngi a kar kera ga, kpa uwegh Nagh ku naregh ku di her tsô." 
Isaiah10:5 Kwagh á tser u, Ashiria, gbough ku iyugh Yam; ishimavihin Yam ngi ken uwegh vegh er aga nahan." 
Isaiah10:6 Me tindi un er a̱ za ta num sha ikurior i eren dang yum la, man sha ior mba M yugh a ve; Me kaa un Mer, a̱ ya ishar, a̱ sar akaa, a̱ ndyar ve er angbiôr a sha igbenda nahan." 
Isaiah10:7 Kpa un yô, a wa ishima nahan ga, a hen ken ishima na nahan kpaa ga, kpa ishima na ka u timin man u gberen akuraior kera kpeghee ga." 
Isaiah10:8 Gadia a kaa er: Atiator am cii ka utor gaa? 
Isaiah10:9 Kalno hingir er Karkemishi nahan gaa? Hamati kpaa hingir er Arpadi nahan gaa? Samaria kpaa hingir er Damaseku nahan gaa? 
Isaiah10:10 Er uwegh agh ku za ar sha ityartor i ieev mbi i civir mbi la, shin er ieev vev mbi gban a gba mbi hembe mbi Yerusalem kua mbi Samaria nahan kpaa," 
Isaiah10:11 nahan me kera er a Yerusalem kua ieev nav er m er a Samaria kua ieev nav nahan gaa? 
Isaiah10:12 Tsô zum u Ter Una vande kuren tom Na cii sha uwo u Shion kua ken Yerusalem kpaa yô, Me or iyev sha atam a ishima i gban gesa i tor u Ashiria man ihagh i ashe na a kenden sha la kpaa." 
Isaiah10:13 Gadia a kaa er: Ka sha agee a uwegh agh man sha kwaghfan wam kpaa m er kwagh ne ye, gadia mo m ngu orkavenkwagh je; nahan m kar a indyor i ityar i akuraior kera, shi m sar inyarev vev, m mgbegha ior, m ta ve inya er nombua nahan;" 
Isaiah10:14 uwegh agh kpaa ku naregh sha inyaregh ki iorov er ka sha iya i inyon yô; man er ka i kohol aji a i undu a nahan, kape m kohol tar cii la, ma or tenger kpelegh ga, ma or aver zwa ga, shin ôr kwagh ken iker kpaa ga." 
Isaiah10:15 Ijembe ia ta ihagh a or u gberen kwagh sha i kpa? Shin zerto una hagher sha or u sôngon kwagh a mi kpa? Bee er gbough kua jingir mba ve ker ku la, shin bee er aga una kende u a lu kon ga la sha yô." 
Isaiah10:16 Ka nahan man Ter, TER u akum a Sha, Una tindi ikande hen mbakehen nav; man shi shin atô a icivir na, mhie una hia er mhie u usu nahan." 
Isaiah10:17 Iwanger i Iserael ia hingir usu, Icighan Na kpaa Una hingir nomborusu, ua hia usaa kua ukôrakondo sha iyange i môm." 
Isaiah10:18 Shi Una nande icivir i ikô na kua i ikon na i umen atam, uma kua iyol cii, á hingir er oruange ka nan ure nahan." 
Isaiah10:19 Asande a ikon a ken ikô na a a shi her kpeghee la, wanye u kpuaa kpaa nana fatyô u ngeren iyenge i a." 
Isaiah10:20 Tsô sha iyange la asande a Iserael a a shi her man mba ve wer hen ya u Yakob vea kera suur sha u a gbidye ve la ga, kpa vea suur sha TER, Icighan u Iserael, sha mimi." 
Isaiah10:21 Asande aa hide, asande a Yakob je, aa hide hen Aôndo u ageegh." 
Isaiah10:22 Gadia shin er ior ou Iserael ve lu er waarawa hen kpezegemnger nahan, nahan kpaa ka asande ken a ve tsô aa hide ye; i ver mtim keng, a mgbough a perapera je neer haa inya." 
Isaiah10:23 Gadia Ter, TER u akum a Sha, Una kure mtim u i vande veren kera je, her atô u tar cii." 
Isaiah10:24 Nahan Ter, TER u akum a Sha, ngu kaan nahan er: Ne ior Av, mba ne tem ken Shion ne, de kera cie nen Ashiria u a gbidi ne sha aga man a kende gbough nagh sha a we sha inja i Igipiti la ga." 
Isaiah10:25 Gadia mase shin ciôn tsô, iyugh ia kure, ishima i vihin Yam kpaa ngi sha u za timin ve." 
Isaiah10:26 Man shi TER u akum a Sha, Una jinge kwagir sha a na, sha inja i mwoo u i wua Midian hen vande u Orebi la nahan; gbough Nagh kua naregh sha zegemnger man shi Una kende ku sha, vough er lu er a Igipiti nahan." 
Isaiah10:27 Tsô sha iyange la, ikav nav mbia osogh sha avande a ou, igbur na kpaa sha mon wou, igbur ia vihi sha avande a ou kera." 
Isaiah10:28 A va ta sha Ayati a kar hen atô u Migeron, a undu ikav nav hen Mikemashi;" 
Isaiah10:29 ve kar hen huwawoogh, ve va tsa hen Geba; Rama ngu gbidyen ikarikase iyol, Gibea u Saulu yevese." 
Isaiah10:30 Er ikenge, we, wankwase u Galim! Ver ishima, we Laisha! We, Anatoti, kwagh u kôron mhôônom!" 
Isaiah10:31 Mademena yevese; mba ve tem ken Gebim mba yevese keren ijiir i waren. 
Isaiah10:32 Nyian, nyian je, una haa hen Nobu, á kende iju na sha uwo u wankwase u Shion, uwo u Yerusalem je." 
Isaiah10:33 Nenge, Ter, TER u akum a Sha, Una paa agbaa je, sha agee a cier iyol, á gber a taven sha la, man a karen sha; a a hembe la kpaa aa haa inya." 
Isaiah10:34 Una paa agbaa a ikô a a we mgbigh mgbigh la sha iyô; Lebanon kpaa una gba sha ikev i u civirigh la. 
Isaiah11:1 Iceren una tser sha ikpughur u Yese, gbaa una due ken amise na, una ume atam je;" 
Isaiah11:2 Jijingi u TER Una lu sha a Na, ka Jijingi u kwaghfan man u mkav, Jijingi u wasen henen kwagh man u ageegh, Jijingi u mfe man u cian TER." 
Isaiah11:3 Á doo Un iyol a mcie u cian TER la; Una gba ôron ijir sha kwagh u A nenge sha ashe tsô ga, kwagh kpaa Una gba kuren sha er A ongo sha ato Na tsô ga," 
Isaiah11:4 kpa ka sha perapera Una ôr ijir i mbaatsanev ye; man shi Una kure kwagh sha mi vough a mbalun asema legh legh shin tar; Una tsaha tar sha kwagir u ken zwa Na; man sha iôôn i ken zwa Na la, Una wua mbaaferev." 
Isaiah11:5 Perapera una lu kwange Na u shin iwenge man mimi una lu kwange Na u hen uya. 
Isaiah11:6 Zum la gbaseela una teman vea waniyôngo imôngo, anyam kpaa una yaven a wanivo imôngo; gumbua man gumbegha kua icighanile vea teman imôngo, wanye u kpeghee una hemen ve." 
Isaiah11:7 Ngôbua vea ngôdwem vea yan kwagh, ônov vev vea yaven ijiir i môm; begha je kpaa una ya toho er bua nahan." 
Isaiah11:8 Wanikundan u man atumba una numbe hen zwa u tayar, wan u den atumba una za uwegh ken zwa u igbinde." 
Isaiah11:9 Vea vihi kwagh ga, vea tim kwagh sha icighanwo Wam cii kpaa ga, gadia tar ua mgbough a mfe u TER er mngerem ma ngee shin zegemnger nahan." 
Isaiah11:10 Sha iyange la, mise u Yese ua lu er tuta u i tim u sha sha ci u ior; ka hen u man akuraior aa ver ishigh ye; ijiir i u i memen kpaa ia engem." 
Isaiah11:11 Tsô sha iyange la je, Ter Una shi á naregh uwegh Nagh á kuma kwa har je, sha u paan asande a ior Nav mba ve shi ken Ashiria man ken Igipiti man ken Pateroshi Kushi man ken Elam man ken Shinar man ken Hamati kua ken ityar i hen kpezegemnger la." 
Isaiah11:12 Una tim tuta sha sha ci u akuraior, Una kohol mba i zende ve kera ken Iserael, man Una kohol Mbayuda mba ve sambe sha azongo a tar a anyiin la, hen ijiir i môm." 
Isaiah11:13 Iwuhe i Eferaim ia kar kera; mba ve eren Yuda ican kpaa á tim ve kera; Eferaim una kera er Yuda iwuhe ga, Yuda kpaa una kera er Eferaim ican ga." 
Isaiah11:14 Vea purugh vea gba sha avande a Mbafiliti vegher u shin ityôtar; ve uhar cii vea num ior i sha vegher u sha ityoughkitaregh, vea penda ave ve sha Edom kua Moabi; Mbaamon vea hingir sha ikev ve." 
Isaiah11:15 Tsô TER Una vihi nombor u zegemnger u Igipiti purututu, Una kunde uwegh Nagh sha Ifi sha ahumbe Na a hian la. Una gbidye un, Una pav un á hingir iwagh itiankarihiar, Una er ior vea per a akôvangahar je." 
Isaiah11:16 Kômgbenda kpaa una lu sha ci u asande a ior Nav a a shi ken Ashiria la, er iyange lu sha ci u Iserael zum u a mough ken Igipiti la nahan." 
Isaiah12:1 Sha iyange la ú kaa wer: Me wuese We, TERE, gadia shin er U yugh a mo, nahan kpaa iyugh You kar kera, man U ngu surun mo ishima." 
Isaiah12:2 Nenge, ka Aôndo A lu myom wam ye; me suur sha a Na me cia ga; gadia TER AÔNDO ka agee am kua icam yam man shi A hingir myom wam kpaa." 
Isaiah12:3 Nahan yô, ka sha iember je né tsugh mngerem shin azôr a myom ye." 
Isaiah12:4 Sha iyange la kpaa nea kaa ner: Wuese nen TER, yila nen sha iti Na, pase nen ityom Na hen ior, ter nen Un er i kende a iti Na sha yô." 
Isaiah12:5 Wa nen TER icam, gadia A er akaa a doon a hemban cii; kwagh ne a̱ hingir ken igbar sha tar cii." 
Isaiah12:6 Genger imo, er ikenge, we u u tem ken Shion ne, gadia Icighan u Iserael u A tem hen atô wou ka u hemban cii je." 
Isaiah13:1 Mkaanem ma Aôndo sha Babilon, ma Yesaia wan u Amoshi nenge yô." 
Isaiah13:1 Mkaanem ma Aôndo sha Babilon, ma Yesaia wan u Amoshi nenge yô." 
Isaiah13:2 Kende nen tuta sha sha uwo u penem penem, genger nen imo yila ve, viligh nen ave, ve̱ nyôr sha ihinda i atiator." 
Isaiah13:3 Mo iyol yam je, M na mba M tsegh ve la zwa, M yila mbaageev Av Mer, ve̱ er sha ishima i vihin Yam, ka mba Av mba ve te ihagh, ve ember yagh yagh la." 
Isaiah13:4 Ungwa, ayôôso baver baver sha iwo er ka zegeikumior yô! Ungwa, ayôôso a ityartor i akuraior a a kohol imôngo yô! TER u akum a Sha ngu kohol ikumutya sha ci u ityav mbi nôngon." 
Isaiah13:5 Mba za van ken tar u icaa, sha ikighir i Sha je, ka TER a ikav mbi tomov mbi iyugh Na, sha u timin tar cii je la." 
Isaiah13:6 Gbidye nen vaa, gadia iyange i TER mgbôghom ve, ngu van er ka mtim u a dugh sha Uhembanagee cii yô." 
Isaiah13:7 Ka nahan man ave cii á shir livaa, ishima i hanma or kpaa ia sough;" 
Isaiah13:8 mciem maa ta ve iyol, mtoghor man asemavihin aa tser ve, á nyoon ve er kwase u nan toghol mar nahan; vea kenger ayol a ve a anzughul ken ishima; ishiv vev yô, mbia lu er mbi usuv nahan." 
Isaiah13:9 Nenge, iyange i TER ngi van, ngi a mhôônom ma zungwen ga, ngi a ishimavihin kua iyugh i tsung, sha u geman tar u̱ hingir ice dang, man shi u timin mbaasorabo mba ve lu ken u kera." 
Isaiah13:10 Gadia asan a Sha man uzegembaiwangerev mba Shaav vea kera na iwanger ga, iyange ia wa ime sha mdugh u i, uwer kpaa ua kera ta iwanger ga." 
Isaiah13:11 Me tsaha tar sha ci u kwaghbo u u, mbaaferev kpaa sha ci u ifer ve; Me na, ihagh i mbagengeseyol ia bee, man ityough ki kehen ki ior mba aperav kpaa, Me hee ki." 
Isaiah13:12 Me er, ior vea za ihyen, á hemba zenaria u wang, een, ior vea za ihyen hemba zenaria u Ofir je." 
Isaiah13:13 Ka sha ci u nahan Me er Usha vea tenger, tar kpaa ua tenger ua kar hen ijiir i u la kera, sha iyugh i TER u akum a Sha, sha iyange i iyugh Na i yeghen tsung la." 
Isaiah13:14 Tsô er ashim u i zende un ijime man er iyôngo i i lu a or u kumban i ga yô, kape hanma or kpaa, nana gema á yem hen ityô i nan la, man hanma or kpaa, nana yevese nana yem hen tar u nan." 
Isaiah13:15 Hanma or u á kohol nan yô, a tume nan á due keela, man hanmô u á kôr nan kpaa, nana kpe ku u sanker." 
Isaiah13:16 Á hyer anikundanev vev hen inya sha ashe ve, á sar uya vev, á nzughul a kasev vev kpaa." 
Isaiah13:17 Nenge, Me kpoghol Mbamede, ve̱ er num a ve, ka ior mba ve we azurfa iko ga yô, zenaria kpaa doo ve ga." 
Isaiah13:18 Mbaada vev vea haa ikaior inya; mhôônom kpaa maa kôr ve a ônov mba ken uya ga, ishe ve kpaa ia zungwe mbayev ga." 
Isaiah13:19 Babilon, icivir i ityartor, mdoom ma ihagh i Mbakaldi la, una lu er Sodom man Gomora nahan, zum u Aôndo yan tim ve kera la." 
Isaiah13:20 Á kera tema ya her mayange ga, ior á kera tema ker ga, sha ikov ikov, Orarabia nana tim tenti her ga, mbakuranilev kpaa vea er akumauile á za yav her ga." 
Isaiah13:21 Kpa inyamtoho ia yav her; uya vev vea mgbough a avungu; ukonkofi vea tema ker; ujijingi mba bov mba ken toho vea vine amar ker. 
Isaiah13:22 Ugbaseela vea vaa ken ayouautya ve, acire kpaa, ken ayouator a dedoo; shighe na kuma ve, á kera seer ayange na ga." 
Isaiah14:1 Gadia TER Una zungwe Yakob mhôônom, Una shi á tsuwa Iserael, Una ver ve er ve̱ tema ken tar ve; ior mba ken nongo ugen kpaa vea nyôr nongo a ve, vea var hen ya u Yakob." 
Isaiah14:2 Akuraior a sha won aa kua a ve aa yem a ve ken tar ve; ya u Iserael kpaa una ya dyako sha ve ken tar u TER, vea hingir ve ikpan i nomso man i ukase, vea kôr mba ngise ve kôr ve la, vea tema tor sha mba ngise ve kighir ve la." 
Isaiah14:3 Tsô sha iyange i TER Una na u mmem sha ishima i zungwen you man sha mmemga wou kua tom u ican u i ver u sha mi la," 
Isaiah14:4 ú gema ipilaikaa sha tarnahan, ú gba teren tor u Babilon wer: Kape orkighir ior a ican a kur ne! Mkighir bee!" 
Isaiah14:5 TER sombo gbough ku mbaaferev, ka tôgh ku mbatarev" 
Isaiah14:6 ku ku zeren gbidyen ior sha ishimavihin la, ku ku tem tor sha akuraior sha iyugh sha mkighir u sha ican a mhôônom ma zungwen ga la." 
Isaiah14:7 Tar cii hingir bem bem, u mem; i gba wan atsam ember." 
Isaiah14:8 Ikon i fer kpaa ngi ember we; usedar mba sha Lebanon mba kaan er: Er i yôhôl u kera yô, ma or u gberen ikon nan ngu a kôndo sha vese ga." 
Isaiah14:9 Sheol u shin mkur u inyaagh je kpaa hingir gudu gudu sha ci wou, sha u va keghen we gbenda; ngu kpoghol ujijingi mba mbakpenev sha ci wou, ka ukpev mbatarev je la, a er utor mba akuraior cii ve mough sha, sha mkônom vem ma torom." 
Isaiah14:10 Ve cii vea bugh zwa vea pine u er: We je kpaa, u hingir seelee er se yôô? U hingir er se nahan vee?" 
Isaiah14:11 I hungwa a imanger you shin Sheol je kua imo i umolo ou kpaa; i tar u azôô shin, shi azôô cir u iyol kpaa." 
Isaiah14:12 U osough Sha, u gba kpen kpen, we, Lushifer, wan u Use! I gber u, i gbihi inya je, we u u sar akuraior kera ne!" 
Isaiah14:13 U kaa ken ishima you wer: Me kôndo Sha, me kende ikônough yagh ki torough Sha je; kia kar asan a Aôndo sha je; me tema sha Uwo u Mkohol, ken zuer u imbusutarimese," 
Isaiah14:14 me kôndo sha, me kar abeen a hemban gban ca la, me hingir er Uhembansha nahan," 
Isaiah14:15 nahan kpaa i gema i gbihi u shin Sheol, hen ajiir a hemban zan shin ihungwa la." 
Isaiah14:16 Mba ve nenge a we vea kenger we ashe, vea hen kwagh sha a we, vea kaa er: Ka or u a ne tar u gbidi akarkase iyol man a tenger ityartor," 
Isaiah14:17 a gem tar u hingir ikôngough dang, a yôhôl agar a u, a pase mbakwarev nav ve hidi hen ya ve ga, nee?" 
Isaiah14:18 Utor mba akuraior cii, ve cii, ka ken icivir ve yav ye, hanmô hen ya u nan," 
Isaiah14:19 kpa we yô, i ta u kera, u gba ca a uwar wou, er gbaa u dang nahan, i cir u, mba i woo ve la iyol, mba i kom ve sanker a dugh keela la, mba ve sen shin awen a shin ihungwa er ikom i i ndyar i angahar yô." 
Isaiah14:20 Á zua u a ve shin uwar imôngo ga, gadia u tim tar wou, u wua ior ou. Á kera ter iti i tsombor u mbaaferev sha won ga." 
Isaiah14:21 Wa nen ago iyol sha u wuan ônov nav, sha ci u ifer i uter vev, sha er ve̱ de moughon, ve̱ ngohol tar, ve̱ ivin agar sha tar ga." 
Isaiah14:22 Me mough Me er num a ve, kape TER u akum a Sha A kaa la, Me tim Babilon iti kera, man asande a a shi her, man wan kua wan u wan kpaa, kape TER A kaa la." 
Isaiah14:23 Me gema un á hingir sha ikev i mbaadendem man shi una lu atunguamnger; Me ese un kera sha canca u mtim kpaa, kape TER u akum a Sha A kaa la." 
Isaiah14:24 TER u akum a Sha bum kaa er: Mimi je, er M hen nahan, kape á er la; man er M ver ishima nahan, kape á lu la;" 
Isaiah14:25 Me sombo Orashiria ken tar Wam, man sha iwo Yam kpaa, Me ndyar un shin angahar; tsô igbur na ia osogh sha ve kera, ikav nav kpaa mbia kar sha avande a ve kera." 
Isaiah14:26 Ka awashima u i we a tar cii je la; man ka uwegh ku ku naregh sha akuraior cii je la. 
Isaiah14:27 Gadia TER u akum a Sha wa ishima kera je, man ka an nana bunde unu? Uwegh Nagh ku naregh, yô, ka an nana hule ku?" 
Isaiah14:28 Sha inyom i tor Ahashi kpe la, mkaanem ma Aôndo man va er:" 
Isaiah14:29 We, Filisetia man ne mba keregh cii, de ember nen er gbough ku i gbidye u a mi la ku sombo kera ga, gadia ken mise u iyô yô, igbinde ia due, tsombor na kpaa ua lu iyô i usu i purugh." 
Isaiah14:30 Waniunda u icanor kpaa una ya kwagh, oribanave kpaa nana yav bem bem. Me wua mise wou sha ijen, asande a ou a a shi her la kpaa, Me wua a kera." 
Isaiah14:31 Genger mliam, we, hundagar; gbidye vaa, we, gar; sough kera, we, Filisetia man mba keregh cii; gayô ka ken imbusutarimese mnyim ma dugh ye, ma or u gban ijime ken tangeutya na nan ngu ga." 
Isaiah14:32 Ka nyi kwagh, á ôr mbatyomov mba ikurior ne? TER ver Shion, nahan ka ker man ior Nav mba ve ye ican vea yer ye." 
Isaiah15:1 Mkaanem ma Aôndo sha Moabi. Ka ken tugh môm tsô, i tim Ar u Moabi kera a saa ishe ye; ka ken tugh môm tsô, i tim Kir u Moabi kera a saa ishe ye." 
Isaiah15:2 Wankwase u Dibon kôndo sha ajiir a taven sha, sha u za vaan; Moabi ngu vaan sha Nebo kua sha Medeba; ityouv vev cii kpul, hanma indyer cii kpaa i hondo i kera." 
Isaiah15:3 Mba tan mzemba uya sha akômaigbinda ve; mba sha ihaav vev man sha ityembe ve kpaa, hanma or ngu vaan haan mliam tsung." 
Isaiah15:4 Heshebon kua Eleale ve ger mliam, mba ungwan imo ve zan zan za ar hen Yahashi je; ka nahan man mbautyav mba Moabi ve gbidye vaa genger genger ye, ishima ngi tenger un ker." 
Isaiah15:5 Ishima yam ngi vaan sha ci u Moabi; ior nav mba yevese, ve za ar hen Soar, hen Egelati-shelishiya, gadia gbenda u kôndo sha Luhiti la, mba kôndon u a mliam zwa je; man sha gbenda u zan sha Horonaim la kpaa mba geren mliam gbidyen vaa." 
Isaiah15:6 Gadia mngerem ma Nimerim ma saa ishe; toho uma, akaa a hômon kpaa use; ma kwagh u ndor kera ngu ga." 
Isaiah15:7 Nahan kwagh u ve zough a mi i ngee i gande la, man kwagh u ve koso kera la, vea kura, vea per a mi hen Uwagh u ikon i wilou." 
Isaiah15:8 Vaa u gbidyen kase tar u Moabi cii, mliam nam ar hen Egelaim, mliam nam ar hen Beer-elim." 
Isaiah15:9 Gadia awambe iv shin mngerem ma Dimon; nahan kpaa Me shi Me seer Dimon ican, Me va a begha hen Mbamoabi mba ve wer mbala, man hen asande a a shi ken tar la." 
Isaiah16:1 Tindi nen aniyôngov sha ci u tor u tar la, i̱ mough a mi hen Sela i̱ kar a mi sha gbenda u ken taaikôngo, i̱ yem a mi sha uwo u wankwase u Shion." 
Isaiah16:2 Er inyon i i purugh wue wue, man shi er iya i i sough i nahan, kape ônkasev mba Moabi ve lu hen ahongo a Arnon la." 
Isaiah16:3 Wase henen, kure ijir sha mi vough, na mure wou a̱ hingir er tugh nahan shighe u iyange i kom sha tembe la; yer mba i num ve kera la; de pasen u a yevese la ken igbar ga." 
Isaiah16:4 De mba i num ve kera la, ve̱ tema a we imôngo, gema hingir Moabi ijiir i yeren ortimin; gayô zum u orkighir nana kera lu ga yô, mtim una bee man mbandyaren ior shin angahar vea bee shin tar kera yô," 
Isaiah16:5 zum la á tar ikônough ki torough sha erdoo man orgen nana tema sha mi sha jighjigh, ken tenti u Davidi, u nana ôr ijir, nana keren mimi man nana eren kwagh sha perapera fefa je." 
Isaiah16:6 Se ungwa agwa u iyolgengese i Moabi, a gengese iyol tsung je, man imanger na man iyolgengese na man icihi na; ihagh na i kaan ka gbilinkwagh je." 
Isaiah16:7 Ka nahan man Moabi una vaa Moabi, hanma or nana vaa; azen a atam a wain a ombor a Kir-hareseti la, nea zungwe a, á kondo ne iyol gbong." 
Isaiah16:8 Gadia ishule i ikon i wain i Heshebon i use kua kon u wain u Shibema; utor mba akuraior gber agbaa a na a a ar hen Yaser, a zende hulugh hulugh a za nyôr ken desereti la; agbaa a u samber zan zan a per zegemnger." 
Isaiah16:9 Ka nahan man me haa mliam a mliam ma Yaser imôngo ye, me vaa kon u wain u Shibema, me ur u sha mliam am, we, Heshebon man Eleale, gadia vaautya ger sha shighe u kohol atam a ou la, kua sha sunda wou kpaa." 
Isaiah16:10 I tôô iember kua msaanyol ken sule u ikon i umen atam kera; ken ishule i wain á ungwa atsam a wan ker ga, man ikenge i iember kpaa ga, ma or u shoghol nana kera shoghol wain la ga, m-erikenge u iember la, i kure." 
Isaiah16:11 Ka nahan man myam am ma eren imo er adiguve nahan sha ci u Moabi kua ishima yam kpaa sha ci u Kir-hereshi ye. 
Isaiah16:12 Tsô zum u Moabi va man a vôr iyol na sha ijiir i taven sha yô, man a nyôr ken icighanjiir na sha u eren msen kpaa yô, una fa ma kwagh ityô ga." 
Isaiah16:13 Ka kwagh u TER ôr sha Moabi sha ayange a tsuaa je ne. 
Isaiah16:14 Kpa hegen yô, TER ôr kwagh kaa er: Er anyom atar, sha inja i anyom a or eren tom sha tôndo nahan, a lu a kuma ga je tsô á gema icivir i Moabi ia hingir kwagh u lahan a ior nav mba ve ngee la cii; asande a na a a shi her la aa hingir hicu, aa kuma kwagh ga." 
Isaiah17:1 Mkaanem ma Aôndo sha Damaseku. Nenge, mba karen a Damaseku sha, una kera lu gar ga, una hingir tihi u alôgh." 
Isaiah17:2 I undu agar a Aroer, hingir ice, aa hingir ajiir a akumauile yaven inya memen her, ma or kpaa nana num a ga." 
Isaiah17:3 Garutya u taver kpaa una bee ken Eferaim, tor di kpaa una bee ken Damaseku; asande a Shiria a a shi her yô, kwagh á er ve er kwagh er icivir i Mbaiserael la nahan, kape TER u akum a Sha A kaa la." 
Isaiah17:4 Sha iyange la icivir i Yakob ia pande, mkehem nam kpaa maa bee kera." 
Isaiah17:5 Tsô á hingir er orsundan ka nan kombor uwua u u til sha man nan sundan asagher sha uwe, een, á hingir er or ka nan yaren twar u asagher shin pev u Refaim nahan." 
Isaiah17:6 Nahan kpaa á undu twar her, er ka i ndoor kon u olev, atam ahar shin atar a shi sha agbaa a sha man anyiin shin ataan sha agbaa a umen atam la, kape TER, Aôndo u Iserael A kaa la." 
Isaiah17:7 Sha iyange la or nana nenge sha u A gbe nan la, ashe a nan kpaa aa gema hen Icighan u Iserael." 
Isaiah17:8 Nana nenge sha atse a nanden nagh sha mi, tom u sha ave a nan la ga, nana gema ashe hen kwagh u ahôaveegh a nan er la ga, shin a lu Asherim shin atse a nanden kwaghhumandoon sha mi la kpaa ga." 
Isaiah17:9 Sha iyange la agar a nan a taver la aa hingir er tar u u lu gbilin u ken ikô kua sha ityough ki uwoogh, u ior undu u sha ci u Mbaiserael la nahan, á hingir toho dang." 
Isaiah17:10 Gadia Aôndo u myom wou hungul we, u kera umbur Vande wou u waren ker la kpaa ga, ka nahan man u lee ahu a mondon a dedoo man u môôr ikon i wain igen kposo ye;" 
Isaiah17:11 sha iyange i u lôô la je, u er i i kôr, man pepe kpaa u er ivor you i mende, kpa sunda yô, ndiir kera sha iyange i uange man i ishima i vihin i á fatyô u surun i ga yô." 
Isaiah17:12 Uwu! Ayôôso a ior kpishi, ve yôôso er ayôôso a zegemnger nahan; man ihuran i akuraior nga huran er ka ihuran i mngerem ma kpishim yô!" 
Isaiah17:13 Akuraior ka a hura er ihuran i mngerem ma kpishim yô, kpa Una zôhô a ve, tsô vea nyôngoso vea yem ca je, á num ve er imough i sha iwo, i ahumbe a purugh a i yô, man er ihundu i hiar sha ishigh ki uraahumbe nahan." 
Isaiah17:14 Iyange i been, mciem ma tan iyol; er sev mbu a lu a av ga tsô, vea kera lu ga. Ka kwar u mba ve ye se ishar je la, man kwar u mba ve saren se la." 
Isaiah18:1 Ehee! Tar u uvan akper u u lu yande uifi mba Kushi la," 
Isaiah18:2 u ka u tindi mbatyomov sha zegemnger, sha utso mba ikenaika sha mnger, er: Yem nen, ne mbatyomov mba zenden fefa, za nen hen ikurior i taven i kôngor iyol, hen ior i i cier ior iyol, mba ikua ikua man mba ken ica kpaa, ikurior i taver agee man i ndyaren ior, i uifi pav tar ve la." 
Isaiah18:3 Ne mba ne tem sha won cii, man ne mba ne tem sha tar kpaa, zum u á kende tuta sha, sha iwo yô, nenge nen, man zum u á tôngo korough kpaa, ungwa nen!" 
Isaiah18:4 Gadia TER kaa a mo nahan er: Me lu ving, Me kenger ken ijiir Yam i teman, er mtsee u war war sha mte u iyange, er ibeenegh ki irkpiigh ken mtsee u sha shighe u sundan iyiagh yô." 
Isaiah18:5 Gadia er sunda lu a kuma ga la, zum u uikparen ndoor kera man imondon á hingir ityamegh ki wain ki vian yô, Una paa agbaa sha ahô a sôron ikon, uiceren kpaa Una asegh ve kera." 
Isaiah18:6 Á gema ve imôngo cii, vea hingir kwagh u inyontswam i sha iwo, man u inyamtoho i sha tar; inyontswam ia ya ve inyom man inyamtoho sha tar cii ia ya ve fam." 
Isaiah18:7 Hen shighe la je, á za va TER u akum a Sha a iwua ken ikurior i taven i kôngor iyol, ken ior i i cier ior iyol, mba ikua ikua man mba ken ica kpaa, ikurior i taver agee man i ndyaren ior, i uifi pav tar ve la, á va a mi hen ijiir i iti i TER u akum a Sha, ka hen uwo u Shion je la." 
Isaiah19:1 Mkaanem ma Aôndo sha Igipiti. Nenge, TER tema sha ibeenegh ki zenden fefa, ngu van hen Igipiti; akombo a Igipiti aa gbidye akarkase iyol sha ishigh Nagh, ishima i Igipiti kpaa ia sough ken vanger na." 
Isaiah19:2 Me tor Mbaigipiti ityô, Mer ve̱ ta num sha Mbaigipiti; vea nôngo ityav hanma or a anngô u nan man hanma or a or u wan ndor a nan, gar a gar man tartor a tartor." 
Isaiah19:3 Jijingi u Igipiti una vôr ken vanger. Me vihi awashima na kera, una hingir gbilin; vea hen kwagh a akombo man a mbayangenakombo man a ujijingi mba mbakpenev kua ujijingi mba tsengan pasen akaa." 
Isaiah19:4 Me gema Mbaigipiti Me na ve sha ikev i ter u wan tswam, tor ugen u nyoon ishima una tema tor sha a ve, kape Ter A kaa la, TER u akum a Sha." 
Isaiah19:5 Mngerem maa uma ken zegemnger, ifi una uma, una gba ikpegheregh." 
Isaiah19:6 Iwagh kpaa ia huma, mbaakpambamngerev mba Igipiti vea panden a pande mngerem vea uma, ikenaika man ilyôgh vea use." 
Isaiah19:7 Ijande hen ifi u Nil, hen kpe u Nil, man akaa a lôôn hen Nil cii, aa uma, ahumbe aa kar a mi sha." 
Isaiah19:8 Mbakôronishu vea vaa vea zungwe kua mbahaan tsuwe shin ifi u Nil la cii kpaa; man mbasamber ukper sha mnger vea ure. 
Isaiah19:9 Mbaeren tom u saghen ada, kunya ua kôr ve, kua mbatumen akondo a pupuu la kpaa." 
Isaiah19:10 Mtôm nam ma suur sha mi la, á hembe ma avur avur, man mbaerentom sha tôndo cii, asema aa vihi ve." 
Isaiah19:11 Atiator a Soan ka ior mba lanen kwagh dedoo je; mhen u mbahenen kwagh a Farao mba ve hembe fan la, hingir ibumegh dang. Hii nan man ne kaan a Farao ner: Mo m ngu wan u mbafankwagh, wan u utor mba tsuaa je, nahana?" 
Isaiah19:12 Nahan mbafankwagh ou mbala mba hana? De ase, ve̱ pase u hegen, i̱ fa kwagh u TER u akum a Sha A we ishima u eren Igipiti yô." 
Isaiah19:13 Atiator a Soan hingir abumeaior, utor mba Nofi kpaa i tsugh ve; ve mba ve lu iwen sha zongo i uipaven nav, la, ve na Igipiti tsume." 
Isaiah19:14 TER haa jijingi u tumbuluu sha a ve; ve na Igipiti tsume sha ityom na cii er orhundenmsôrom ka nan zenden ze ze ze sha isho i nan nahan. 
Isaiah19:15 Mayange á shi Igipiti a ma tom ga, u ityough shin tsa, shin ndaregh ku ivilegh shin ikenaika, vea er ga." 
Isaiah19:16 Sha iyange la Mbaigipiti vea hingir er kasev nahan, vea gbidye akarkase iyol, vea cia kpaa, sha ci u mkundu u uwegh ku TER u akum a Sha ku A kundu sha a ve la." 
Isaiah19:17 Tar u Yuda ua hingir Mbaigipiti kwagh u cieryol, or nana ter ve kwagh u u yô, vea cia, sha ci u awashima u TER u akum a Sha A we sha a ve la." 
Isaiah19:18 Sha iyange la agar ataan aa lu ken tar u Igipiti a a er kwagh sha zwa u Kanaan, man aa bumun TER u akum a Sha, ugen ken a á yila un er: Gar u mtim." 
Isaiah19:19 Sha iyange la atse a TER a nanden nagh sha mi aa lu ken atô u tar u Igipiti, man iwen i i tim i sha, sha u umbur TER ia lu sha ikighir i u." 
Isaiah19:20 Á hingir ikav kua shiada u TER u akum a Sha ken tar u Igipiti; shighe u vea vaa a TER sha ci u mba ve kighir ve a ican la yô, Una tindi ve a oryiman man orageegh u nana yima ve yô." 
Isaiah19:21 TER una pase iyol Na hen Igipiti, man Mbaigipiti vea fa TER sha iyange la; een, vea civir Un sha nagh ku sôngon kua iwua kpaa, vea tsegha zwa a TER, vea er sha mi kpaa." 
Isaiah19:22 TER Una tsaha Igipiti, una tsaha man Una shi á sôr; tsô vea gema asema vea hide hen TER; Un kpaa, Una rumun msen ve, man Una sôr ve." 
Isaiah19:23 Sha iyange la kômgbenda una due ken Igipiti u zan Ashiria; Orashiria nana nyôr ken Igipiti man Origipiti kpaa nana nyôr ken Ashiria; Mbaigipiti vea civir Aôndo a Mbaashiria imôngo. 
Isaiah19:24 Sha iyange la Iserael una lu u sha utar a Igipiti man Ashiria imôngo, vea lu iveren i dedoo hen atô u tar cii;" 
Isaiah19:25 gadia TER u akum a Sha ver ve, kaa er: I̱ ver ior Av Igipiti doo doo man tom u ave Am Ashiria kua dyako Wam Iserael." 
Isaiah20:1 Inyom i Tartan za va hen Ashedodi la, shighe u Sargon tor u Ashiria tindi un la, man a nôngo ityav a Ashedodi a hemba un je," 
Isaiah20:2 hen shighe la TER ôr kwagh sha ikev i Yesaia wan u Amoshi, kaa er: Za, za sagh ikondo i aivegh shin iwenge you kera man shi tsuwa akôv a ou shin angahar kpaa. Tsô a er nahan, a gba zenden idyelegh, a akôvangahar kpaa ga." 
Isaiah20:2 hen shighe la TER ôr kwagh sha ikev i Yesaia wan u Amoshi, kaa er: Za, za sagh ikondo i aivegh shin iwenge you kera man shi tsuwa akôv a ou shin angahar kpaa. Tsô a er nahan, a gba zenden idyelegh, a akôvangahar kpaa ga." 
Isaiah20:3 Tsô TER kaa er: Er wanakiriki Wam Yesaia a lu zenden idyelegh anyom atar, a akôvangahar kpaa ga yô, sha u i̱ lu ivande man ikav sha kwagh u Igipiti man sha kwagh u Kushi yô," 
Isaiah20:4 kape tor u Ashiria una yem a mbakwarev mba Igipiti man Mbakushi mba i zende ve ken tar ve kera la, mbayevikaior kua mbatamen, idyelegh a akôv kpaa ga, man asenatôôgh a ve ken won; kape kunya ua kôr Igipiti je la." 
Isaiah20:5 Á kondo ve iyol, vea va ahenge sha ci u Kushi u ve suur min la, man Igipiti ihagh ve la." 
Isaiah20:6 Sha iyange la mbateman ken tar u hen kpe u zegemnger ne, vea kaa er: Nenge ase, kape ishuur wase a lu ne, henpe se yevese se za ker iwasen sha u sé war sha ikev i tor u Ashiria yô; nahan yô, se er nan man sé wara?" 
Isaiah21:1 Mkaanem ma Aôndo sha desereti u zegemnger. Er uhiar mba ken tar u Imbusutariyan la, ka ve karen ve huran sha agee nahan, kape ngu a due ken ikôngo ken tar u cieryol." 
Isaiah21:2 Ka mpase u ican kpishi i tesem ye: Oratseregh nan ngu eren sha atseregh, ortiminakaa di kpaa nan ngu timin. Za ityav, we Elam; za kase ityav, we Media. Me na ishimashirin ia bee cii." 
Isaiah21:3 Ka nahan man awenge am a mgbough a mnyoonom, mtoghor kôrom er martoghol ka ua kôr kwase nahan; m hingir ngugh ngugh je m kera fatyô u ungwan ga, kundam iyol je m kera fatyô u nengen ga." 
Isaiah21:4 Ishima ngi tan mo kwe, mciem tam iyol; aôndoaimegh a a doom la yô, a hingir mo ikarikase i gbidyen iyol." 
Isaiah21:5 Mba sôron tebul, mba taren ubutu, mba yan kwagh, mba man kwagh; mough nen sha, ne atiator, shighe nen perutya mkurem." 
Isaiah21:6 Gadia Ter kaa a mo nahan er: Za za ver orkuran, nana̱ pase kwagh u nan nenge yô," 
Isaiah21:7 aluer nana nenge a ikum i mbaanyinyav mba ve zenden uhar uhar man ikum i ujaki kua ikum i urakumi yô, nana̱ tim ato, nana̱ ver ishima dedoo." 
Isaiah21:8 Tsô u a nenge la ngor ikenge er: Nenge, Tere! Ka sha gôgôyou u taven u kuran sha mi ka m tile, m shi her didi; man sha ijiir yam i kuran, ka m tile, m lu heregh kuran hanma tugh." 
Isaiah21:9 Man nenge, ikum i mbaanyinyav mba van, mba zenden uhar uhar. Tsô a gema a kaa er: Babilon gba, a gba ve, ieev mbi gban a gba mbi mbaaôndo vev cii, i hembe mbi shin inya je." 
Isaiah21:10 Ior av ne mba i ndyar ne shin angahar, i gbidye ne er uwua nahan, kwagh u m ongo hen TER u akum a Sha, Aôndo u Iserael la, ka un m pase ne ye." 
Isaiah21:11 Mkaanem ma Aôndo sha Duma. Or ngu yilan mo ken Seir pinen mo er: Orkuran, tugh za nana? Orkuran, tugh za nana?" 
Isaiah21:12 Orkuran gema kaa er: Sev mbu van kua tugh kpaa; aluer á sar ne ka pinen yô, pinen nen; hide, shi va nen." 
Isaiah21:13 Mkaanem ma Aôndo sha Arabia. Ka ken ikô i Arabia la, tsa nen ker, ne ior mba Dedan mba azende azende." 
Isaiah21:14 Za kegh mba imura i ker ve la gbenda a mngerem, ne mba ne tem ken tar u Tema, za kohol nen mbayevese mbala a kwaghyan." 
Isaiah21:15 Gadia ve yevese usanker, sanker u i tsough un la, man ada u i hende un kua ican i utya la." 
Isaiah21:16 Gadia Ter kaa a mo nahan er: Er inyom i môm, sha inja i anyom a or u eren tom sha tôndo nahan la, i lu a kuma ga tsô icivir i Kedar ia bee;" 
Isaiah21:17 iyenge i mbaavaanev man mbaageev mba Mbakedar mba ve shi her la, ia hingir hicu; gadia TER, Aôndo u Iserael, kaa nahan." 
Isaiah22:1 Mkaanem ma Aôndo sha pev u Mpase la. Ka nyi i er u, man we a ior ou cii, ne undu sha ityouv mbi ayoughouv nahana?" 
Isaiah22:2 We, u ikenge i genger genger i mgbough ker a we ne, gar u ngeen a ayôôso, gar u iember! Mba i woo ve ken a we la, ka sha sanker i woo ve ga, man shi ka ken utya ve kpe kpaa ga." 
Isaiah22:3 Mbahemenev ou cii yevese imôngo, ve lu a mbaada ga, i kange ve a kange; ior ou mba i kohol ve cii, i kange ve nongo, ve yevese ve yem ca je." 
Isaiah22:4 Ka nahan man m kaa mer: Tôô ashe sha a mo kera, m vaa mliam ma vihin tsung; de nenge u surun mo ishima sha mtim u wankwase u ior av ga." 
Isaiah22:5 Gadia ka iyange i ayôôso je, man i ndyaren shin angahar man i mnzughul i Ter, TER u akum a Sha A ne shin pev u Mpase ne; ka mhembe u i hembe ugilmbaagarev man amo a genger yilan iwo." 
Isaiah22:6 Elam yô, tôô gbandeavaan a akekeautya man mbautyav kua mbaanyinyav; Kir kpaa bugh perutya." 
Isaiah22:7 Apev a ou a hemban doon la mgbough a akekeautya, mbaanyinyav kpaa tange ityav hen hundagar." 
Isaiah22:8 A bugh Yuda kwaghyisan na kera. Tsô sha iyange la ú gema ashe ú nenge ikav mbi tswamev ken Iyou i Ikô. 
Isaiah22:9 Ne nenge ajiir a tsehen a sha gar u Davidi la, er a ngee; ne kohol mngerem ma shin Ityungu u Shin la ijiir i môm." 
Isaiah22:10 Ne ôr iyenge i ayou a Yerusalem, ne hembe ayou sha u taver gilgar a mi;" 
Isaiah22:11 ne time ijiir i ombon mngerem her atô u ugilgar uhar sha ci u mngerem ma Ityungu u Tse la; kpa ne ver ishima sha Un u A er kwagh ne ga, man Un u A ver kwagh ne ngise ngise la kpaa, ne wa Un iko ga." 
Isaiah22:12 Sha iyange la, Ter, TER u akum a Sha, yila kaa er, i̱ vaa, i̱ zungwe, i̱ hondo ityough, shi i̱ ta ikondo uya;" 
Isaiah22:13 kpa nenge ase, msaanyol ngu kua iember; mba sôngon abua, mba wuan iyôngo, mba yan inyam man mba man wain; sé gbaa yan nen akaa man akaa tsô, gadia kper se mba kpen." 
Isaiah22:14 TER u akum a Sha A pase iyol Na sha ato am er: Mimi je, á paa ne sha ibo ne ga zan zan né kar kpen, kape Ter A kaa ne, TER u akum a Sha." 
Isaiah22:15 Ter, TER u akum a Sha ngu kaan nahan er: Za ase hen orvesen shon, ka hen Shebena, u a nengen sha ya u tor la, kaa wer:" 
Isaiah22:16 Ka nyi u eren heene? Man ka an u lu a nan heene, je u tim uwar hen ijiir nee? We u u time uwar sha ci wou iyol you sha, man u time ijiir i teman sha ci wou iyol you ken vande ne!" 
Isaiah22:17 Nenge, TER Una ta u kera sha agee, we, or ne, Una hule u gbang gbang," 
Isaiah22:18 Una hule u, Una ta u kera er bol nahan ken tar u gbanger; heera yô, ú kpe, keela kpaa, akeke a ou a imanger you la aa lu; uwe, kunya u ya u teru!" 
Isaiah22:19 Me dugh u ken tom wou kera, man shi sha ijiir you la kpaa á tule u kera." 
Isaiah22:20 Tsô, sha iyange la, Me yila wanakiriki wam Eliakim wan u Hilkia," 
Isaiah22:21 Me haa un riga wou, Me zer un kwange wou kpaa, shi Me wa un tahav ou sha ikev; una hingir ter u mba ve tem ken Yerusalem kua sha ya u Yuda kpaa." 
Isaiah22:22 Me gema ishindan i ya u Davidi Me penda un sha avande na, una bugh man orwuhen nana lu ga, una wuhe man orbughun kpaa nana lu ga." 
Isaiah22:23 Me mande un er kusa nahan hen ijiir i tiaver; una hingir ya u ter na ijiir i teman i icivirigh; 
Isaiah22:24 á har myohom ma ya u ter na cii sha a na, uiceren kua agbaa, hanma anikav u kiriki, hii sha utasa zan zan ar sha mbaagu cii." 
Isaiah22:25 Sha iyange la, kape TER u akum a Sha A kaa la, kusa u i mande un hen ijiir i tiaver la una tsuwa, á gber un kera, una gba, ikav mbi i har sha mi cii á saa ishe; gadia TER kaa nahan." 
Isaiah23:1 Mkaanem ma Aôndo sha Tiru. Gbire nen ivaa ne utso mba Tarshishi, gadia i tim un kera, zan zan ma ya kera shi ga, ma gbenda u nyôron ker kpaa ngu ga; hii hen tar u Kitim je, i pase ve nahan." 
Isaiah23:2 I̱ kondo ne iyol, ne mba ne tem hen kpe u zegemnger; mbakasuav mba Shidon mba ve peren zegemnger la, ve iv u a akaa." 
Isaiah23:3 Sha uzegembamngerev i va a ivor i Shihor, ka iyiav mbi Nil, i nyôr a mi ken na, a gema a hingir kasua u akuraior je." 
Isaiah23:4 Kunya u̱ kôr u, we Shidon, gadia zegemnger ôr kwagh, garutya u zegemnger ngu kaan er: M ya ican sha iyav mbu toghol ga, m mar ga, m koso mbayevikaior ga, shi m yese anuunaukase kpaa ga." 
Isaiah23:5 Zum u Igipiti za ungwa abaver yô, cier ve iyol je, sha ci u abaver a sha Tiru la." 
Isaiah23:6 Per, za hen Tarshishi; gbire nen vaa, ne mba ne tem hen kpe u zegemnger!" 
Isaiah23:7 Ka gar wen u ember yagh yagh je ne, u mhii na a lu ngise je, u angahar a na lu zan a na ca sha u za tsan ken ityar igen ne?" 
Isaiah23:8 Ka an nan we kwagh ishima a Tiru nahana, un u lu kôron ior tor, u mbakasuav nav lu ashagbaior, u mbayamen kasua a na lu mbaciviriv mba sha wono?" 
Isaiah23:9 TER u akum a Sha, ka Un A we ishima sha u vihin iyolgengese i icivir la cii, sha u heen mbaciviriv mba sha won cii ye." 
Isaiah23:10 Samber ken tar wou er ifi u Nil nahan, we wankwase u Tarshishi, ma kwagh u tsulen we kera ngu hegen ga." 
Isaiah23:11 A naregh uwegh Nagh sha zegemnger, A tenger ityartor; TER na zwa sha Kanaan er i̱ tim agarautya a na kera." 
Isaiah23:12 Man shi A kaa er: Á kera lu u iyol yagh yagh mayange ga, we iniunkwase i i nzughul a we ne, wankwase u Shidon; mough sha, per za ken Kitim, keela kpaa ú za zua a mmem ga." 
Isaiah23:13 Nenge, tar u Mbakaldi,ikurior i i kera lu ga ne; Ashiria ver u sha ci u inyamtoho i ken ikôngo; ve maa ugôgômbaayoughouv vev mba taven, ve yôhôl ayou a utor a u, ve gema a mi hingir atihi a alôgh." 
Isaiah23:14 Gbire nen ivaa, ne utso mba Tarshishi, gadia garutya wen i tim un kera." 
Isaiah23:15 Tsô, sha iyange la yô, á hungul Tiru zan zan á kuma anyom akunduatargber je, á kuma sha ayange a tor môm; sha mkur u anyom akunduatargber la yô, á hingir Tiru er i kaa ken icam i idyakwase nahan:" 
Isaiah23:16 Tôô molo, kuhwa, zende ken gar, uwe, idyakwase u i hungul we ne; kuhwa, imo i̱ due dedoo, wa atsam kpishi, i̱ umbur we." 
Isaiah23:17 Ken masejime u anyom akunduatargber á kar kera la yô, TER Una va sôr Tiru, nahan una hide sha tom na u sha tôndo, una er idya a ityartor i sha won cii i i lu sha tar yô;" 
Isaiah23:18 mtsera u sha kasua na kua injar na la, á lu TER icighankwagh; á ombo ki ga, á koso ki kpaa ga; gadia mtsera u kasua na una lu sha ci u mba ve tem sha ishigh ki TER yô, sha u ve̱ ya, i̱ kuma ve, man sha ci u akondo a doon ashe." 
Isaiah24:1 Nenge, TER ngu geman tar hingir gbilin, ngu vihin u kera hingir ice, ngu geman mlu u u, hingir nzughul nzughul, ngu samben mba ve tem sha u kera." 
Isaiah24:2 Tsô er mba ken inya ve lu nahan, kape pristi kpaa una lu la; er kpan a lu nahan, kape ter na kpaa una lu la; er kpankwase a lu nahan, kape ngô na kpaa una lu la; er oryamenkwagh nan lu nahan, kape orteenkwagh kpaa nana lu la; er or u nan injô nan lu nahan, kape or u yan injô kpaa nana lu la; er or u pwaren or inyaregh wan mtsera sha mi nan lu nahan, kape or u kimbin injô hiden a mtsera sha mi kpaa nana lu la." 
Isaiah24:3 Tar ua hingir gbilin purututu man á sar u purututu kpaa; gadia TER ôr kwagh ne nahan. 
Isaiah24:4 Tar ngu zungwen, ngu usen, tar sha won cii ngu vôron, ngu usen; ashagbaior a ken tar nga uren." 
Isaiah24:5 Tar iyol i u je kpaa u hôngor sha ci u mba ve tem sha u la; gadia ve per atindi, ve wa aeren a sha ba iko ga, ve vihi ikuryan i tsôron." 
Isaiah24:6 Ka nahan man ifan i ker tar, man mba ve tem sha u kpaa ve lu yan ican sha ibo ve ye; ka nahan man i nande mba ve tem sha tar kera, ior ve shi her kpeghee ye." 
Isaiah24:7 Wain u he ngu zungwen, kon u wain ngu usen, mba i saan ve iyol cii mba shirin ishima;" 
Isaiah24:8 iember i agbande a kuhwan huan, ayôôso a mba ve lu gur gur kpaa bee cii, iember i molo kpaa huan." 
Isaiah24:9 Mba kera me wain a icam zwa ga; msôrom ma taver ma vihi mbaman ken zwa. 
Isaiah24:10 Gar u lun nzughul nzughul, i yôhôl un kera; i wuhe hanma iyou, sha u ma or môm nana̱ de nyer ker ga yô." 
Isaiah24:11 Mliam ma sha igbenda sha ci u wain; msaanyol cii gema wa ime, iember kar shin tar kera." 
Isaiah24:12 Kwagh u a mase shin ken gar yô, ka di alôgh tsô, i hembe hundagar vughô vughô." 
Isaiah24:13 Gadia kape á va lu shin tar hen akuraior je la, er mndoor u kon u olev nahan man er twaryaren u atam a ikon i wain zum u i bee sunda kera yô." 
Isaiah24:14 Mba genger imo ember gur gur; sha ci u icivir i TER i hemban la, mba genger imo hen vegher u shin zegemnger." 
Isaiah24:15 Nahan yô, civir nen TER sha vegher u sha iwanger la; sha ityar i hen kpe u zegemnger, civir nen iti i TER, Aôndo u Iserael." 
Isaiah24:16 Hii shin ikighir i tar je, se ungwa atsam er: I̱ wuese orperapera. Kpa mo m kaa mer: M ngu saan, kwagh tserem ve! Mbaatsereghev mba eren kwagh sha atseregh, een ka sha atseregh mbaatsereghev ve eren kwagh ye." 
Isaiah24:17 Mciem man ihungwa i hônon kua to vea bur u, we, u u tem shin tar ne!" 
Isaiah24:18 Or u nan yevese iov i mcie, nana gba shin ihungwa i hônon, man shi or u nan dugh shin atô u ihungwa i hônon la, nana gba ken to; gadia i bugh ahura a Sha, man amagh a taregh kpaa tenger." 
Isaiah24:19 Tar yôhôl puru, tar hembe avur avur, tar tenger cii." 
Isaiah24:20 Tar hingir zemba ze zemba er orhundenmsôrom nahan, ngu tenger er daarkura yô; tindi u peren u u yuhwa sha u, ua gba, mayange ua kera mough ga." 
Isaiah24:21 Tsô sha iyange la, TER Una tsaha akum a Sha a a lu Sha la, kua utor mba tarev mba shin tar kpaa." 
Isaiah24:22 Á kohol ve ijiir i môm er ka i kohol mbakwarev shin ihungwa i zan kweng nahan, á wuhe ve ken gaadi, ayange á karen kpishi yô, á va tsaha ve." 
Isaiah24:23 Zum la kunya ua kôr uwer, ua hingir nyian, iyange kpaa kunya ua kôr i; gadia TER u akum a Sha Una tema tor sha uwo u Shion kua ken Yerusalem kpaa, man sha ishigh ki mbatamen Nav yô, iengem ia lu." 
Isaiah25:1 TERE, ka We, U lu Aôndo wam ye; me kende U sha, me wuese iti You; gadia U er akaakpilighyol, ka mbamhen mba tsuaa je, sha mimi kua jighjigh." 
Isaiah25:2 Gadia U gema gar u tamen hingir tihi u alôgh, gar u taveraa hingir ice; garutya u ior mba tar ugen hingir er ka gar ga yô, á kera maa un mayange ga." 
Isaiah25:3 Ka nahan ikurior i taver agee ia civir We, gar u akuraior a cier iyol kpaa una cia U ye." 
Isaiah25:4 Gadia U hingir ijiir i waren i mbaatsanev, ijiir i waren i oribanave ken ican i nan, ijiir i yeren uraahumbe man mure u yeren oo, gadia kumetan u uipirambaiorov ngu er uraahumbe u tan sha kpekpe yô." 
Isaiah25:5 Er mtsee ken iombortar nahan, kape U yange ayôôso a ior mba tar ugen la; er mtsee a hide ijime sha mure u ibeen nahan, kape á hide a icam i mhembe i uipirambaiorov ijime la." 
Isaiah25:6 Sha uwo ne TER u akum a Sha Una yôr akuraior cii iwer sha akaa a wan ahôm, iwer i sha wain u atse a akase na, sha akaa a ahômough a a mgbough a mshiam, sha wain u tse u i kase un dedoo yô." 
Isaiah25:7 Man shi sha uwo ne Una vihi ikondo i cirin kera, i i cir sha ior cii la, kua ikondo i yisan i i samber i sha akuraior cii la." 
Isaiah25:8 Una tim ku sha won kera; Ter AÔNDO Una ese mliam sha ishiv mbi iorov cii, man shi Una hide a ilyahan sha ior Nav kera sha won cii; gadia ka TER je, A er kwagh ne ye." 
Isaiah25:9 Tsô sha iyange la, á kaa er: Nenge, ngun ka Aôndo wase u se lu veren ashe Na ser, A̱ va yima se je ne; ka TER je u se lu veren ashe Na; sé lu nen saan saan, sé ember nen myom Na." 
Isaiah25:10 Gadia ka sha uwo ne uwegh ku TER kua mem ye, kpa á ndyar Moabi hen ijiir na, er ka i ndyar ayer shin mngerem ma ihungwa i uihôgh nahan." 
Isaiah25:11 Una naregh ave na ken atô u ma er orôônwe ka nan naregh ave a nan sha u ôôn uwe nahan, kpa Una hide a iyolgengese na ijime cii, shin er ave na a fe eev nahan kpaa." 
Isaiah25:12 Iyouutya i taven sha, i sha gilgar la, Una yôhôl i, Una haa i inya, Una samber i inya zan zan shin vuulevu je." 
Isaiah26:1 Sha iyange la á wa icam ne ken tar u Yuda er: Se mba a gar u taver; A ver myom er, a̱ lu gilgar kua akpagar." 
Isaiah26:2 Bugh nen ihinda, ikurior i perapera i lun a jighjigh, i̱ nyôr." 
Isaiah26:3 Ishima i tiaver i geman kposo ga la, Ú kura i, ia lu bem bem, gadia ngi suur sha a We." 
Isaiah26:4 Suur nen sha TER gbem sha won; gadia TER AÔNDO ka vande u tsôron je. 
Isaiah26:5 Gadia mba ve tem sha la, A hide a ve shin inya, ka gar u taven sha je la; A yôhôl un, A haa un inya je, A samber un inya zan zan shin vuulevu je." 
Isaiah26:6 Nguhar ua ndyar un, ka angahar a mbaatsanev kua angaharandyaren a mbaibanave je la." 
Isaiah26:7 Gbenda u orperapera ngu vaanaa; ka U sôr gbenda u orperapera u lu shambe shambe. 
Isaiah26:8 Sha gbenda u ajiraôron a Ou kpaa, TERE, se lu keghen We. Iti You man m-umbur u umbur We la, sar uma wase tsung." 
Isaiah26:9 U sar uma wam tugh tsung je, jijingi wam u ken a mo kpaa ngu keren We sha gbashima; gadia shighe u ajiraôron a Ou a lu sha won yô, mba ve tem shin tar la mba henen perapera." 
Isaiah26:10 Ka a zungwe iferor mhôônom kpaa, nan hen u eren perapera ga, nan eren iferkwagh ken tar u mimi je, nan nengen a icivir i TER i hemban la ga." 
Isaiah26:11 TERE, shin er uwegh Ough ku kende Sha nahan kpaa, mba nengen ga; kpa vea va nenge man kunya ua kôr ve sha gbashima Wou u sha ior Ou la; usu ua hia mbahendan a We la." 
Isaiah26:12 TERE, Ú ver se bem, gadia ityom yase cii kpaa ka We U er se i ye." 
Isaiah26:13 TER, Aôndo wase, uter mbagenev vande teman tor sha a vese, lu We tseegh ga; kpa ka iti You tseegh sé civir i ye." 
Isaiah26:14 Mbakpenev mba nderen ga, ujijingi mba mbakpenev mba moughon ga; ka nahan man Ú va sôr ve, Ú tim ve shi Ú ese m-umbur u ma i umbur ve sha won la kera ye." 
Isaiah26:15 We, TER, U seer ikurior iyenge, U seer ikurior iyenge, i kende icivir You sha; U gbanger akighir a tar la cii." 
Isaiah26:16 TERE, ken ican yô, ve ker U, shighe u mtsaha Wou lu sha a ve la, ve gba eren msen." 
Isaiah26:17 Er kwase u wan iyav, shighe u nan u maren ka una mgbôghom yô, nan toghor, nan genger imo ken mnyoonom nam, kape se kpaa se lu sha ishigh You la, TERE." 
Isaiah26:18 Se wa iyav, se toghor, bee er ka ahumbe se mar yô; se va tar a ma myom ga, i kera mar mba vea tema shin tar kpaa ga." 
Isaiah26:19 Mbakpenev Ou vea lu uma; akom a am kpaa aa nder. Nder nen, wa nen icam, ne mba ne tem shin vuulevu; gadia avure a Ou ka avure a iwanger je, man tar kpaa ua due a ujijingi mba mbakpenev." 
Isaiah26:20 Va nen, ior Av, nyôr nen ken ayou a en, wuhe nen ihinda kera cii, yer nen kpeghee, zan zan iyugh i̱ kar kera." 
Isaiah26:21 Gadia nenge, TER ngu duen hen ijiir Na sha u tsahan mba ve tem sha won sha afer a ve; tar kpaa ua tese awambe a i hee sha u yô, ua kera cir mba i woo sha u la ga." 
Isaiah27:1 Sha iyange la TER Una ôr Leviatan, iyô i yevese fefa la, ijir, a sanker Na u gendeghee u kehen u taver, kua Leviatan, iyô i hulen nure nu nure la, shi Una wua darakon u a lu shin zegemnger la kpaa." 
Isaiah27:2 Sha iyange la sule u ikon i wain u dedoo ua lu; yô, ter nen u icam." 
Isaiah27:3 Mo TER, M ngu kuran u; Me urun u hanma shighe; sha u ma or môm nana̱ de vihin u ga yô, Me kuran u tugh kua tetan." 
Isaiah27:4 M yugh je ga; usagher kua usaa ma ve lu ase ihom a Mo! Yô, ma M te sha a ve, ma M nande ve ci ca" 
Isaiah27:5 saa vea gbam ikum, vea hime a Mo, vea hime a Mo je." 
Isaiah27:6 Sha ayange a ken hemen la Yakob una wa amise, Iserael una mondo, una denger, una iv tar cii a atam." 
Isaiah27:7 A tsaha ve er yan tsaha mba ve lu tsahan ve la nahana? Shin i wua ve er yan i wua mba ve wua ve la nahana? 
Isaiah27:8 Ka sha u zendan ve nan ve gbenda, U nenge num a ve ye; A kar a ve kera sha ahumbe Na a taver, sha iyange i ahumbe a a dugh sha ityoughkitaregh la." 
Isaiah27:9 Ka sha kwagh ne je man á kough ifer i Yakob kera ye, mkarkera u kwaghbo na la, ka atam a na ne: Una gema awen a atse a nanden nagh sha mi cii, aa hingir er awen a akpena a i hembe a avur avur yô, Asherim kua atse a nanden kwaghhumandoon sha mi vea kera tile sha je ga." 
Isaiah27:10 Gadia gar u lun a gir hingir gbilin, ka ijiir i teman i i mough her kera, i undu i er desereti nahan, wanbua una ya toho heregh je, ka her kpaa una yav ye, man una ya agbaa a na." 
Isaiah27:11 Zum u agbaa a na aa use kera yô, á kever a kera, kasev vea va, vea nande a sha usu; gadia ka ior mba kaven kwagh ga, ka nahan je man Un u A gbe ve la, Una zungwe ve mhôônom ga, Un u A maa ve la, Una tese ve erdoo Na kpaa ga ye." 
Isaiah27:12 Sha iyange la TER Una gbidye alakema, hii hen ifi u Uferati zan zan ar hen uwagh u Igipiti, man á sange ne môm môm á kohol ne, ne ônov mba Iserael." 
Isaiah27:13 Sha iyange la, á tôngo zegeikpamkor, tsô mba ve saa ken tar u Ashiria vea va, kua mba i zende ve kera ve yem ken tar u Igipiti la, vea va civir TER sha icighanwo, ken Yerusalem." 
Isaiah28:1 Kwagh á tser idyer i tor i gengeseyol i mbahundenmsôrom mba Eferaim man imondon u usen kera, u mdooashe na u tsung la, u a lu sha ityough ki pev u doon sule yum, u mba wain a gbihi ve inya la!" 
Isaiah28:2 Nenge, Ter ngu a orageegh u taver iyol, er ura u awomboogh man ijeverahumbe u vihin kwagh nahan, er ura u tamen u mngerem ma sar avenge nahan, u ka u haa akaa inya sha agee." 
Isaiah28:3 Idyer i tor i gengeseyol i mbahundenmsôrom mba Eferaim la, á shoghol un angahar je;" 
Isaiah28:4 man imondon u usen kera u mdooashe na u tsung la, u a lu sha ityough ki pev u doon sule la, una hingir er ka ityamegh ki tur ki ki vie fefa er shighe lu a kuma ga yô; or nana nenge a ki, tsô er ki lu nan sha uwe la, maa nana ya ki je." 
Isaiah28:5 Sha iyange la TER u akum a Sha Una hingir asande a ior Nav a a shi her la er ka idyer i tor i icivirigh man tsar u doon ashe nahan," 
Isaiah28:6 man jijingi u ijirigh u or u nan tem sha u ôron ijir la, man agee a mba ve daan ityav sha ihinda ve hidi a mi ijime yô." 
Isaiah28:7 Mban kpaa ve hingir mee sha zar u wain man zemba ze zemba sha msôrom ma yuwan; pristi kua profeti ve hingir mee sha msôrom ma yuwan, wain nzughul a ve, ve hingir zemba ze zemba sha msôrom ma yuwan; mpase u sha mnenge kera wanger ve ga, mba nôngon gbev sha ijirôron." 
Isaiah28:8 Gadia utebul cii iv a isho i ndôhôr ishima je, ma ijiir i wang kera ngi ga." 
Isaiah28:9 Ka anti je, i lu un ka tesen nan mfe? Man shi ka anti je i lu un ka pasen nan, nana kar loho u i ôr laa? Ka mba ve de atumba man i kôr ve hen atumba kera laa?" 
Isaiah28:10 Gadia ka tindi sha tindi, tindi sha tindi, icin i tan sha icin tan, icin i tan sha icin i tan, heen kpeghee, keela kpaa kpeghee." 
Isaiah28:11 Mimi je! Ka sha ior mba ve er zwa u i kav u ga man sha nombor ugen kposo Una ôr kwagh a ior ne ye; 
Isaiah28:12 Un u A kaa a ve er: Ngun ka mmem je ne, na nen u vôron la mmem; man ka ngun man a lu mkunduyol je ye, nahan kpaa ve rumun u ungwan ga." 
Isaiah28:13 Ka nahan man kwaghôron u TER una hingir ve tindi sha tindi, tindi sha tindi, icin i tan sha icin i tan, icin i tan sha icin i tan, heen kpeghee, keela kpaa kpeghee; sha u ve̱ za, ve̱ gba ajimejime, ve̱ sombo, ve̱ gba ken kwaghhônon, i̱ kôr ve." 
Isaiah28:14 Nahan yô, ungwa nen kwaghôron u TER, ne mbanahantar mban, ne mba ne hemen ior mba ken Yerusalem!" 
Isaiah28:15 Gadia ne kaa ner: Se ya ikur a ku, se zua zwa a Sheol, zum u bocan u van sha agee una va karen la, una va hen vese ga; gadia se gema aie hingir se ijiir i yeren, man se yer ayol ase ken icugh je." 
Isaiah28:16 Nahan yô, Ter AÔNDO ngu kaan nahan er: Nenge, M tim iwen ken Shion Mer, i̱ lu imagh, iwen i i kar i, iwen i injaa i sha zongo, i imagh ki i, ki lu dông yô; u nan ne jighjigh yô, nan kumbur sha kwagh ga." 
Isaiah28:17 Me gema ijirôron ia hingir kor u karen kwagh a mi man perapera una hingir kor u sôron kwagh a mi sha u a̱ lu jighilaa yô; awombo aa kar a ijiir i aiegh i yeren ker la kera, ijiir i waren ker kpaa, mngerem maa kuwa a i kera." 
Isaiah28:18 Á bunde ikuryan yen a ku la kera, man mzoughzwa wen a Sheol la una taver ga; zum u bocan u van sha agee la una karen yô, una shoghol ne angahar." 
Isaiah28:19 Hanma shighe u una kar cii, una kura ne kera; gadia una kar ayange ayange tugh kua tetan kpaa; u kaven kwagh u i pase la, á lu kwagh u cieryol kpen kpen." 
Isaiah28:20 Gadia gambe á yina u or nana naregh iyol i nan sha mi; kwagh u cirin iyol kpaa á yina igbanger u or nana cir iyol i nan sha mi. 
Isaiah28:21 Gadia TER Una mough sha er lu vande eren sha uwo u Perashim la nahan, ishima ia nyoon Un er lu vande eren shin pev u Gibeon nahan, sha u eren tom Na, tom u kpilighyol je! man u eren ieren Na,ieren Na i kpiligh iyol tsô!" 
Isaiah28:22 Nahan yô, de hingir nen mbanahantar ga, sha u i̱ de kera nyôôso ikangenev yenev ga yô; gadia m ungwa hen Ter, TER u akum a Sha, kwagh u mtim u i we ishima u eren sha tar cii." 
Isaiah28:23 Kegh nen ato, ungwa nen imo Yam, ver nen ato, ungwa nen kwaghôron Wam." 
Isaiah28:24 Ortsôghol ka nan zer tsôghol gbem sha u lôôn ivoro? Ka nan zer vuul hemben akpen a inyaagh gbeme? 
Isaiah28:25 Zum u nana vande saren a vaanaa, nan kera hamber nee, man nan ta ishwa, man nan lôô alakema sha nongo nongo man shair hen ijiir i i ver la, man shi agase kpaa sha kpe u u gaa?" 
Isaiah28:26 Gadia Aôndo na ngu pasen un vough, ngu tesen un." 
Isaiah28:27 Gadia mba shoghol nee sha ikyekye i kpelan inya ga, man shi mba menger ikaver u ikyekye i shoghol iyiav sha ishwa ga, kpa mba gbidi nee sha aga man ishwa kpaa sha ankon." 
Isaiah28:28 Alakema u eren bredi a mi la or hemben unu? Ei, ka nan zer gbidyen gbem ga; shin er ka nan kar a ikaver u ikyekye kua anyinya sha mi kpaa mba hemben un ga." 
Isaiah28:29 Kwagh ne kpaa ka hen TER u akum a sha a dugh ye, Un u A lu a mhen u kpilighyol kua kwaghfan u hemban cii la." 
Isaiah29:1 Kwagh tser u ve Ariel, Ariel, gar henpe Davidi lu wa afo la! Seer inyom sha inyom, uiniongo ve̱ ningir," 
Isaiah29:2 tsô Me er Ariel ican, mzungu man mliam vea lu her; una hingir Mo er Ariel (atse) nahan." 
Isaiah29:3 Me wa afo Me ningir we, Me tser, me kase u sha akumautya, Me wa u atô sha ikav mbi utyav." 
Isaiah29:4 Nahan ú ôr kwagh shin atô u inyaagh, kwaghôron wou una due kur kur shin vuulevu, imo you ia due shin inya er i jijingi u orkpen nahan, man kwaghôron wou kpaa una due hiin hiin shin vuulevu." 
Isaiah29:5 Kpa ikpila i mbaihomov ou la vea hingir er vuulevu u puer nahan, man ikpelaior i wan ipila kpaa er ka imough i i kar kera yô; kwagh ne una er fefa, á bur a bur je." 
Isaiah29:6 TER u akum a Sha Una va sôr u sha idyuran man mtenger u tar man iov i vesen man hiar man Ura u nôôn baver baver man nomborusu u hian akaa. 
Isaiah29:7 Akuraior ikpila a a nenge ityav a Ariel la cii, mba ve kôndo sha a na kua sha gilgar na, mba ve tsule un, mba ve eren un ican la, vea hingir er ka mnyam ma cien yô, kwagh u i nenge a mi tugh nahan." 
Isaiah29:8 Tsô aluer or u ijen i ker nan man mnyam ma cie nan er nan ngu yan kwagh, kpa nana nderen yô, nan ngu ijen her tsô, shin er or u imura i ker nan man mnyam ma cie nan er nan ngu man mngerem yô, kpa nana nderen yô, nan vôr man imura i kôr nan her, kape akuraior ikpela cii vea hingir la, mba ve nenge ityav a uwo u Shion la." 
Isaiah29:9 Tile nen, i̱ kondo ne iyol, pir nen ashe, lu nen mbaapirashe! Ve hunde kpa ka sha wain ga, ve hingir zemba ze zemba kpa ka sha msôrom ma yuan ga." 
Isaiah29:10 Gadia TER haa ne jijingi u mnyam ma mem mem, A pir ne ashe, ka uprofeti je la, man A cir ne ityouv, ka mbanengenakaa je la." 
Isaiah29:11 Mpase u sha akaa ne cii ngu ne er akaaôron a ken ruamabera u i cir un i ver ikav nahan, u ka i na orfantakerada er: Shi ôr kwagh ne; kpa una kaa er: Me fatyô ga, gadia i cir un i ver ikav sha mi;" 
Isaiah29:12 shi i na or u nan fe takerada ga ruamabera ne, er: Shi ôr kwagh ne; kpa a kaa er: M fa u ôron ga." 
Isaiah29:13 Ter kaa er: Er ior ne ve kporom her a Mo sha zwa ve, man ve civir Mo sha ityumbujôôgh ve, kpa asema a ve gema gba ca a mo man mciem ma ve lu cian Mo kpaa ka tindi u ior u i tese ve a tese tsô," 
Isaiah29:14 nahan yô, nenge, shi Me er tom u kpilighyol hen ior mban, ka tom u kpilighyol man u cieryol, kwaghfan u mbafankwagh vev una saa ishe, man mkav u mbakavenkwagh vev kpaa una yer kera." 
Isaiah29:15 Kwagh á tser mba ve yeren TER mbamhen vev kpen kpen la, man aeren a ve kpaa a lu ken ime; mba kaan er: Ka an nan nengen a vese? Man ka an nan fe se?" 
Isaiah29:16 Nenge, mtsum wene! Ormaantyegh nana lu kwagh môm a inyaityuu, nahan kwagh u i er un, una kaa a u a er un la er: A erem ga, shin kwagh u a gbe un, una kaa a un u a gbe un la er: Ngu a mkav ga, kpa?" 
Isaiah29:17 Mase shin ciôn tsô, á gema Lebanon una hingir sule u atam a ikon a dedoo, man sule u atam a ikon a dedoo ua gema á hingir er ka ikô nahan gaa?" 
Isaiah29:18 Sha iyange la mbaakondoato vea ungwa akaaôron a ruamabera, man ashe a mbaapirashe kpaa, mba ve lu ken aôndoaimegh man ime, vea nenge kera." 
Isaiah29:19 Mbaasemaleghlegh kpaa vea seer iember ve ken TER, man mbaatsanev ken ior kpaa vea ember ken Icighan u Iserael." 
Isaiah29:20 Gadia ipilaor nana hingir gbilinor, ornahantar nana kera lu sha won ga, man mba ve veren ishima sha iferkwagh i eren cii á tim ve kera;" 
Isaiah29:21 ve mba ve ne or ibo sha ishember kwagh i kwaghôron, man ve hôn to sha u kôron u a tem hen hundagar sha u ôron ijir sha mimi la, man ve mgbegha orperapera kera sha gbilinkwagh." 
Isaiah29:22 Nahan yô, TER u A yima Aberaham la, ngu kaan kwagh sha ya u Yakob la er: Yakob una kera va ahenge ga, ishigh nagh kpaa kia kera lu peng ga." 
Isaiah29:23 Gadia zum u un kua ônov nav vea nenge tom u ave Am ken atô ve yô, vea tsegha iti Yam; een, vea tsegha Icighan u Yakob, Aôndo u Iserael Una cier ve iyol." 
Isaiah29:24 Mba ve tsumen ken jijingi la vea zua a mkav, man shi mbagbanahon vea rumun ityesen." 
Isaiah30:1 Kwagh á tser ônov mba hendan kwagh, kape TER A kaa la; mba dughun mhen, kpa ka u a dugh hen a Mo ga; mba zuan zwa, kpa ka u sha Jijingi Wan ga, ka sha u vea seer isholibo sha isholibo yô;" 
Isaiah30:2 mba yemen senen shin Igipiti, kpa ve pine zwa Wam ga, sha u vea ker mwar ken agee a Farao man vea yer ken mure u Igipiti yô!" 
Isaiah30:3 Nahan yô, agee a Farao aa hingir kunya wen, man u yeren ken mure u Igipiti kpaa una hingir iheen yen." 
Isaiah30:4 Gadia atiator a ve mba ken Soan man mbatyomov vev kpaa za ar ken Haneshi; 
Isaiah30:5 ve cii ve va ahenge sha ci u ior mba ve fetyô u lun ve a ma inja ga la; ve kera lu ve a iwasen shin ma inja kpaa ga, saa kunya man iheen tseegh tsô." 
Isaiah30:6 Mkaanem ma Aôndo sha ishôso i ken tar u Imbusutariyan la. Mba karen ken tar u ican man u nyian ishima, henpe ngôbegha man nombegha man igbinde man iyôusu i purugh ve dugh la; ve tôô inyarev sha ajime a agumajaki, man akaa a ve a injaa kpaa sha agundu a urakumi, ve yem hen ior igen i i lu ve a ma inja ga yô." 
Isaiah30:7 Gadia iwasen i Igipiti ka i gbilinigh, ka i ikoogh kpaa ga, ka nahan man m yer un mer: Rahabi u a gbe teman tsô ye." 
Isaiah30:8 Yem ase, za nger kwagh ne sha kpande sha ishigh vegh, shi nger un ken ruamabera kpaa, a̱ lu sha ci u ayange a ken hemen gbem sha won." 
Isaiah30:9 Gadia ka ior i hendan kwagh je, ônov mba aiev, ônov mba ve rumun u ungwan ityesen i TER ga yô;" 
Isaiah30:10 ka ve kaa a mbanengenakaa la er: De nengen nen ga; man shi ve kaa a uprofeti kpaa er: De pasen nen akaa a mimi ga, ôr nen se akaa a doon se la pasen nen se akaa a icughugh;" 
Isaiah30:11 undu nen gbenda, kaha nen sha ihange kera, na nen Icighan u Iserael A̱ ndiir se ashe." 
Isaiah30:12 Nahan yô, Icighan u Iserael ngu kaan nahan er: Er ne laha kwaghôron ne, ne suur sha ipila man ayom, ne lian sha mi yô," 
Isaiah30:13 nahan yô, iferkwagh shon ne ia hingir ne er ka kwe u kwagh u a sôôn u gban, u a nur sha gôgôkpekpe u m-osogh na ka a va fese, ian i kar ga yô." 
Isaiah30:14 Una hembe un er ka i hembe ityegh ki ormaantyegh nahan, ki i hembe ki avur avur, mhôônom ma ker ga; je i kera zuan a ancenge ken avur a ki, sha u za tôôn usu sha mi ken atse, shin u kesen mngerem a mi shin ityumnger kpaa ga yô." 
Isaiah30:15 Gadia Ter AÔNDO, Icighan u Iserael kaa nahan er: Ka sha u hiden shi memen man né war ye, ka sha mtem u bem bem man jighjigh u nan, agee a en aa lu ye." 
Isaiah30:16 Kpa ne rumun ga, ne gema ne kaa ner: Ei, sé za ayem ayem sha anyinya, nahan nea yevese a yevese je; man shi: Sé henda anyinya a hemban ayem; nahan mbazendan ne ijime kpaa vea zenda fefa je." 
Isaiah30:17 Ior dubu vea yevese sha mnande u or môm; sha mnande u ior itian yô, nea yevese, zan zan á undu ne er ka ityôgh ki i tim sha ityough ki uwoogh man er tuta kpaa sha igungu nahan." 
Isaiah30:18 Kpa TER yô, Una kegh, sha u eren a ven dedoo, ka nahan man A kende iyol Na sha, sha u Una zungwe ne mhôônom ye; gadia TER, ka Aôndo u ôron ijir je; saan mba ve keghen Un la cii iyol!" 
Isaiah30:19 Gadia ne ior mba ne tem sha Shion ken Yerusalem, nea kera vaa ga; Una er a we dedoo kpee sha mliam ou; zum u Una ungwa yô, Una ver ato we." 
Isaiah30:20 Ter na ne bredi u bocan man mngerem ma icanem, nahan kpaa mbatesen ou vea kera yer ayol a ve ga, kpa ashe ou aa nenge a mbatesen ou;" 
Isaiah30:21 ato ou kpaa aa ungwa kwaghôron ken ijime you u kaan er: Ka gbenda je ne, za nen sha u, zum u á sar ne u geman ken iyan shin ken imese la yô." 
Isaiah30:22 Nea hôngor ieev you mbi gban a gba mbi i cir mbi azurfa iyol la, man ieev you mbi haan a haa mbi i cir mbi zenaria iyol la; wea haa mbi kera er kwagh u hôngorough nahan; wea kaa a mbi wer: Kar heen kera." 
Isaiah30:23 Tsô Una na ura sha ci u ivor you i lôôn ken sule, kua alakema u eren bredi a mi, ka iyiav mbi i zough a mi ken sule je la; mbia doo ken zwa, shi mbia taver or agee. Sha iyange la yô, uzendenya ou vea ya toho hen ijiir i yan toho i gbangese." 
Isaiah30:24 Abua man agumajaki a a kaha inya la aa ya kwaghyan u i we bar sha mi, u i peer un sha tser man i tsaan un sha lalia yô." 
Isaiah30:25 Sha hanma uwo u taven man sha hanma igungu u taven kpaa iwagh ia lu kua uikuwanmbamngerev, sha iyange i mwoo u vesen, zum u ugôgômbaayoughouv mba taven sha la vea yôhôl á gba la." 
Isaiah30:26 Shi iwanger i uweregh kpaa ia hingir er iwanger i iyange nahan, man iwanger i iyange kpaa ia seer iwanger kwa taankaruhar, er iwanger i ayange ataankarahar nahan, sha iyange i TER una kange mvihiyol u ior Nav la, man Una bee ve ivav i i gbidi ve la." 
Isaiah30:27 Nenge, ka ken ica, iti i TER i dugh ye, iyugh Na ngi hian, mnyim ma kôrkôr ma kôndon sha; ityumbuzwaagh Na mgbough a iyugh, man nombor Na ngu er usu u hian nahan;" 
Isaiah30:28 iôôn Na ngi er uwagh u saren avenge, u mngerem ma ar iker iker yô, sha u tsaan akuraior sha lalia u mtim; man lijam u ka a goom a yem ken mtsum ngu akuraior ken azegher." 
Isaiah30:29 Nea wa icam er ka i eren icighaniniongo tugh nahan, man iember kpaa ia lu ne ken ishima er or ka nan zenden sha korough ku tôngon nan vaan sha uwo u TER, hen Vande u Iserael yô." 
Isaiah30:30 TER Una na á ungwa imo Na i icivirigh, man Una tese mshir u uwegh Nagh, a iyugh Na i vesen man a nomborusu u hian, a ahumbe a hiar man uraahumbe man awombo." 
Isaiah30:31 Gadia sha imo i TER, Ashiria una cia sulugha, Una gbidye un sha gbough Nagh." 
Isaiah30:32 Hanma mgbidye u sha aga u a ver sha ci na, u TER A shir sha a na yô, una lu a iember i sha agbande a kuhwan man umolo; sha uwegh ku jingir ken utya, Una ta num sha a ve." 
Isaiah30:33 Gadia i vande sôron Tofeti ngise je; i sôr un sha ci u utor kpaa; A er un a za man a gbanger kuma sha ci u usu man ikon kpishi je; iôôn i TER ngi er ka ikuwan i sulfur nahan, ngi tsaren un." 
Isaiah31:1 Kwagh á tser mba ve yem shin Igipiti sha u za keren iwasen, man ve suur sha anyinya, shi ve suur sha akekeautya, sha ci u a ngee yô, man sha mbaanyinyav, sha ci u ve taver kpishi yô, kpa mba kenger sha Icighan u Iserael ga, man mba keren TER kpaa ga!" 
Isaiah31:2 Nahan kpaa Wen kpaa ka u fan kwagh je, Una va a kwaghvihin, Una hide a kwaghôron Na ijime ga; Una mough num a ya u mbaerenafer kua a iwasen i mba ve eren iferkwagh la kpaa." 
Isaiah31:3 Mbaigipiti ka ior tsô, ka Aôndo ga, anyinya a ve kpaa ka inyam tsô, ka jijingi ga; zum u TER Una naregh uwegh Nagh yô, u nan wase la nana nôngo gbev, u nan ngohol iwasen la kpaa nana gba, ve cii vea tim imôngo." 
Isaiah31:4 Gadia TER kaam nahan er: Er begha man gumbegha ka a ta kume sha inyam na i a woo nahan, shin á yila ikpela i mbakuranilev sha u va tan num sha a na je kpaa, una wa imo ve iko ga man una cia ayôôso a ve kpaa ga; kape TER u akum a Sha kpaa Una sen sha u va nôngon ityav a uwo u Shion kua a igungu na kpaa la." 
Isaiah31:5 Er inyon ka i purugh i gbidyen akper nahan, kape TER u akum a Sha kpaa Una kura Yerusalem la; Una kura un, Una war un, Una de un, Una yima un." 
Isaiah31:6 Gema nen hile nen her a Na, Un u ne undu Un la, ne ônov mba Iserael." 
Isaiah31:7 Gadia sha iyange la, hanma or nana ta ieev mbi nan mbi sha azurfa kera, kua ieev mbi nan mbi sha zenaria, mbi ave a en a er i hingir ne kwaghbo la." 
Isaiah31:8 Zum la Orashiria una kpe ku u sanker, kpa ka sha u or ga; sanker kpaa á lu u ior ga, una wua un; una yevese sanker, man ikaior na ia hingir mbaerentom u kpan." 
Isaiah31:9 Vande na ua saa kera sha ci u mciem, atiator a na kpaa aa undu tuta sha ci u mciem; kape TER A kaa ne, Un u usu Na u lu ken Shion man usu Na u iwaagh u lu ken Yerusalem kpaa la." 
Isaiah32:1 Nenge, tor ugen una tema tor sha perapera, atiator kpaa aa kura tar sha ijirôron i mimi." 
Isaiah32:2 Man hanmô ve kpaa nana hingir er ijiir i yeren ahumbe nahan, man er ijiir i yeren uraahumbe yô, er uikuwanmbamngerev hen ikpoghonya nahan yô, er mure u zegevande u ken tar u vôron kpishi yô." 
Isaiah32:3 Ashe a mbanengen aa kera pir ga, man ato a mba ve ongo la aa ungwa." 
Isaiah32:4 Ishima i mbaeren kwagh gagh kpaa ia wa mfe iko, man nombor u mbakaanmkeghenem kpaa ua gema ua ôr kwagh wanger wanger." 
Isaiah32:5 Á kera yila ibumeor er ormimi mayange ga, oratseregh kpaa, á yila nan er, orinjaa ga." 
Isaiah32:6 Gadia ibumeor ka nan ôr ibume kwagh, ishima i nan kpaa i eren iferkwagh, sha u eren kwagh u dang, man u ôron kwagh sha mtsum sha TER, geman den mbagenev ve̱ lu ijen her, man u nyumen mba imura i ker ve la, kwaghman." 
Isaiah32:7 Ayom a oratsereghegh kpaa ka a vihin tsô, ka nan henen udangmbaakaav sha u timin atsanaior sha akaaôron a aiegh, sha shighe u oribanave a lu ôron sha mimi kpaa la." 
Isaiah32:8 Kpa ormimi ka nan henen akaa a mimi, ka nan tile sha akaa a mimi gbem je." 
Isaiah32:9 Mough nen sha, ne kasev mba ishima i nyian ne sha kwagh ga ne, ungwa nen imo yam, ne ônkasev mba ne we iko sha kwagh ga ne, ver nen ato sha kwaghôron wam." 
Isaiah32:10 Gadia ayange aa kar á hemba inyom i môm kpuaa, tsô né gbidye ikarikase iyol, ne mba ne we iko sha kwagh ga ne, gadia msondo u atam a wain la bunde, á kera zua a ma kwagh ga." 
Isaiah32:11 Mciem ma̱ ta ne iyol, ne kasev mba ishima i nyian ne sha kwagh ga ne; gbidye nen ikarikase iyol, ne mba ne we iko sha kwagh ga ne; er nen akondo kera, lu nen idyelegh, ta nen ikondo uya." 
Isaiah32:12 Ta nen ave vanger sha ci u ishule i dedoo, sha ci u ikon i wain i umen atam kpishi la," 
Isaiah32:13 sha ci u tar u ior av u u mende usaa kua usagher, man sha ci u ayou a iember cii ken gar u iember;" 
Isaiah32:14 gadia i undu iyou i tor dang, gar u lun a ior kpishi huan, hingir ving, igungu man gôgôyou u taven u tilen sha mi kuran la, hingir ubar gbem sha won, kwagh u ujaki mba ken toho ve ember man ijiir i yan toho i akumauile;" 
Isaiah32:15 zan zan á haa se Jijingi u Sha man desereti una hingir sule u ikon i umen atam man sule u ikon i umen atam kpaa ia hingir er ka ikô nahan. 
Isaiah32:16 Tsô ijirôron i mimi ia tema ken desereti man perapera kpaa una tema ken sule u ikon i umen atam la. 
Isaiah32:17 Tom u perapera ua lu bem je; man atam a perapera ka mtem u bem bem man jighjigh u nan gbem sha won. 
Isaiah32:18 Ior Av vea tema ken ijiir i bem man ken uya mba taver man ken ajiir a memen a yôhôl iyol. 
Isaiah32:19 Kpa á nôô awombo zum u ikô ia gba la, man shi á yôhôl gar cii." 
Isaiah32:20 Á saan ne iyol, ne mba ne lee hen hanma ijiir i mngerem ma lu her la cii, ne mba ne de angahar a bua kua a jaki a zenden enger enger yô." 
Isaiah33:1 Kwagh á tser u, we or u vihin ior akaa kera, kpa we yô, i vihi u akaa kera ga, we u u eren atseregh, kpa we yô, i er atseregh a we ga. Zum u ú mem u vihin ior akaa kera la, á vihi u kera; man zum u ú de u eren atseregh yô, á er atseregh a we." 
Isaiah33:2 TERE, zungwe se mhôônom; se mba keghen We; lu uwegh asegh hanma sev, myom wase kpaa sha shighe u ican." 
Isaiah33:3 Sha ayôôso a baver baver la, akuraior sambe; sha mkende u iyol You sha yô, akuraior sambe saratete." 
Isaiah33:4 Á kura ishar yen kera, er ikomon ka i kura akaa nahan, man er ahungwa ka a tsuwen nahan, kape vea tsuwe vea ta sha i la." 
Isaiah33:5 I kende a TER sha; gadia A tema sha, A iv Shion a ijirôron i mimi kua perapera." 
Isaiah33:6 Akaa aa lu taveraa sha ayange a ou la, myom una lu wuee kua kwagh fan man mfe kpaa; mcie u cian TER ka kwagh na u injaa je la." 
Isaiah33:7 Nenge, anomaior a ve nga geren imo ken won; mbatyomov mba i tindin ve u keren bem, mba geren mliam tsung." 
Isaiah33:8 Akômaigbinda nga gbilin or u zenden nan ngu ga. A vihi ikuryan, a laha agar a tamen, a wa or iko ga." 
Isaiah33:9 Tar ngu zungwen, ngu usen; Lebanon va ahenge, a use; Sharon hingir er desereti nahan; Bashan man Karmel ve ndoor ika kera." 
Isaiah33:10 Hegen yô, Me mough sha, kape TER A kaa ne; hegen Me kende iyol Yam sha; hegen Me tile sha." 
Isaiah33:11 Ne wa iyav mbu akoouwua, né mar atighir; iôôn yen ka usu u hian ne je." 
Isaiah33:12 Akuraior aa hingir er mnande u alie, er usaa mba i paa kera, i nande sha usu nahan." 
Isaiah33:13 Ungwa nen, ne mba ne lu ken ica, kwagh u M er yô; man shi ne mba ne lu ikua kpaa, rumun nen er M lu a tahav yô." 
Isaiah33:14 Mbaeren asorabo ken Shion mba cian; mba ve we Aôndo iko ga la, akarkase gbidye ve iyol. Ka anti wase nana fatyô u teman a usu u hian imôngo? Ka anti wase nana fatyô u teman a icôronmhie imôngoo?" 
Isaiah33:15 Ka u nan zenden sha perapera la, man nan er kwagh sha mimi, shi nan lahan mtsera u sha apera, nan nduur ave a nan, nan vende u ngohol inyaregh ki yamen ishô la, nan kondon ato a nan sha u nan ungwa kwagh u iwooor ga, man nan kusu ashe a nan sha u nana nenge iferkwagh kpaa ga yô;" 
Isaiah33:16 ka nan nana tema sha ijiir i sha ye, gar u sha avande ka ijiir i nan i waren ker; á na nan kwaghyan u nan mngerem ma nan ma manem maa lu keng je." 
Isaiah33:17 Ashe a ou aa nenge a Tor ken iengem Na, aa nenge tar u gbangese zan zan ca ca." 
Isaiah33:18 Ishima you ia gba henen ican i cieryol, ia kaa er: Wen u a er iyenge la ngu hana, man wen u a karen myohom la yô, ngu hana? Wen u a er iyenge i ayou a taven gôgônan la yô, ngu hana?" 
Isaiah33:19 Ikurior i i ye kwagh ishe ga la, ú kera nenge a i ga, ikurior i lamen zwa u cimin u u kav ga, sha nombor ugen kposo u u fatyô u kaven u ga la." 
Isaiah33:20 Kenger Shion gar u mkohol u uiniongo asev; ashe a ou aa nenge Yerusalem, ijiir i teman i bem, er tenti u a kporom a na ijiir igen ga, amande a na kpaa á tsuwa a mayange ga, ma kor na môm kpaa ua tôndo ga." 
Isaiah33:21 TER Una lu se kwagh u icivirigh heregh je, ijiir i uifi man iwagh i gbangese, utso mba nahan vea kar sha mi ga, man tso u vesen kpaa ga." 
Isaiah33:22 Gadia TER ka Orjir wase, TER ka Orwan se atindi, TER ka Tor wase; ka Un je Una yima se ye." 
Isaiah33:23 Ikor you gba dur; i fatyô u taver ityôgh ki tsogh ga, i fatyô u samber ikondo ga. Tsô maa á kar ishar i ngeen yum la, mbaawanev kpaa ya ishar." 
Isaiah33:24 Ma or u nan tem ker kpaa nana kera kaa er: Kwagh nyoon mo, ga; ior mba ve tem heregh kpaa, á de ve asorabo a ve." 
Isaiah34:1 Kporom nen akuraior sha u ne ungwa, ver nen ato ne ior; tar u̱ ungwa, kua m-iv u u, tar sha won cii kua akaa a a dugh sha mi cii." 
Isaiah34:2 Gadia TER ngu yuwen akuraior cii, ishima ngi vihin Un a akum a ve cii, A tim ve puru, A na ve sha u i̱ sôngo ve." 
Isaiah34:3 Ior vev mba i woo ve la, á haa ve kera, ihuma i akom a ve ia kpurum, man iwo ia sough sha awambe a ve." 
Isaiah34:4 Akum a Sha aa saa kera, Usha kpaa á hule ve er ihurenruamabera nahan; akum a ve cii kpaa aa haa inya, er kwa u kon u wain ka u gba inya nahan, man er kon u tur ka u ndoor ika nahan." 
Isaiah34:5 Gadia sanker Wam ma je hunde Sha, nenge ngu senen, una va ta sha Edom, sha u ôron ior ijir mba M we ve ifan Mer, i̱ tim ve kera la." 
Isaiah34:6 Sanker u TER iv a awambe, engem iyol sha ahôm, sha awambe a agumaiyôngo man a ivo, sha ahôm a ahi a anomaiyôngo; gadia TER ngu a nagh ku sôngon ken Bosera, á sôngo kwagh ken tar u Edom je falegh á gba." 
Isaiah34:7 Iyar ia gba a ve imôngo kua agumabua a anomabua imôngo; tar ve ua hunde sha awambe, vuulevu ve kpaa hingir shou shou sha ahôm." 
Isaiah34:8 Gadia ka iyange i oron iyev i TER je la, ka inyom i oron iyev sha mhendan u i hendan a Shion la." 
Isaiah34:9 Á gema iwagh na ia hingir mningem ma ilim, vuulevu na kpaa ua hingir sulfur, tar na kpaa ua hingir mningem ma ilim ma hian." 
Isaiah34:10 Tugh man tetan ua pir ga; mnyim ma u maa zer kôndon gbem; ua hingir ice sha ikov ikov; ma or kpaa nana kera kar sha u sha won ga. 
Isaiah34:11 Kpa akumedu man adendem vea ngohol u, ivungu man gugôô kpaa vea tema ken u; Una ta kor u karen kwagh a mi u nzughul man kor u sôron kwagh a min sha u a̱ lu jighilaa yô, u gbilinigh sha u." 
Isaiah34:12 Ashagbaior a na la, or môm u yôôn ve tartor ker, nana kera lu ga; atiator a u cii kpaa aa gba kwagh ga." 
Isaiah34:13 Usaa vea mende ken ayou a na a tor kua usukungwagh man usagher kpaa ken ayou a na a utya, á hingir ikpur i ugbaseela, man ijiir i ukonkofi." 
Isaiah34:14 Mbaanyamazenga vea zua a acire, ujijingi mba ken toho vea kohol anngôôv vev; jijingiutu una tema her, una zua a ijiir i memen." 
Isaiah34:15 Heera yô, iyô i tsuwen ia wa ya, ia ta aji, ia tsev man ia kohol ônov shin mure her; heera yô, icoghol ia kohol, hanmô a ugen." 
Isaiah34:16 Ker nen ken ruamabera u TER, ôr nen! Mô môm ken akaa ne una ban ga, hanmô una de zuan a ugen ga; gadia ka zwa Na u we tindi ye, man ka Jijingi Na A kohol ve A ver her ye." 
Isaiah34:17 Ka Un je A er ve ishor ye, ka uwegh Nagh ku kar ve kwar ye; vea tema her gbem, vea tsa her sha ikov ikov cii." 
Isaiah35:1 Taaikôngo man ikpoghonya vea lu sar sar, desereti una ember, una mondo er ishohough nahan," 
Isaiah35:2 una mondo mgbesee, man una ember, una ember a icam zwa; á na un icivir i Lebanon kua icivir i hemban i Karmel man Sharon; vea nenge iengem i TER, icivir i hemban cii i Aôndo wase." 
Isaiah35:3 Taver nen ave a vôron la, man taver nen anu a kunden la." 
Isaiah35:4 Kaa nen a mba ve lu a ishima i cian kwagh yum la, ner: Taver nen, de cie nen ga; nenge, Aôndo wen Una va a iyevoron; man mtsaha u Aôndo; Una va á va yima ne." 
Isaiah35:5 Tsô á bugh mbaapirashe ashe, man á bugh mbakondonato ato." 
Isaiah35:6 Tsô orkeer nana gba tsuwen er ashim nahan, man nombor u orkondoniker kpaa ua wa icam; gadia mngerem maa due shin inya ken taaikôngo kua uikuwanmbamngerev kpaa ken desereti." 
Isaiah35:7 Waarawa u hian war war ua hingir ityungumnger, man inya i imura i ker i la ia hingir amboramnger; hen ajiir a ugbaseela, ape ve yaven yô, toho ua lu man ikenaika kua ilyôgh kpaa." 
Isaiah35:8 Kômgbenda una lu her, á yila un er Icighangbenda; or u nan lu wang ga yô, nana kar sha mi ga; kpa una lu sha ci ve, mbazenden sha mi kua abumeaior je kpaa vea tsume sha mi ga." 
Isaiah35:9 Begha una lu her ga, ma inyamtswam kpaa ia unde sha mi ga, á tser a ve her ga, kpa mba i yem ve yô, vea zenden sha mi."
