Isaiah35:10 Mba TER A paa ve la vea hide, vea va a icam i wan hen Shion; iember i tsôron ia lu ve sha ityou; vea zua a msaanyol kua iember, ishima i vihin kua ishima i shirin ia yevese kera." 
Isaiah36:1 Tsô sha inyom i sha pue kar unyiin i tor Hesekia la yô, Senakeribi tor u Ashiria kôndo sha u nôngon ityav a agar a Yuda a lun a ugir cii, a ngohol a kpaa." 
Isaiah36:2 Nahan tor u Ashiria tindi Rabeshake u hen Lakishi er a̱ za hen Yerusalem hen tor Hesekia a ikumutya i ngeen. Tsô a za tile hen akpa u ityungumnger u sha, sha kômgbenda u hen ijiir i kungun akondo la." 
Isaiah36:3 Nahan Eliakim wan u Hilkia, orvesen u nengen sha ya u tor man Shebena orngeren man Yoa wan u Asav or u ngeren abaver ken takerada la, ve due ve va her a na." 
Isaiah36:4 Nahan Rabeshake kaa a ve er: Kaa nen Hesekia ner, zegetor, tor u Ashiria, a kaa er: Ka nyi agee u suur sha mi nee?" 
Isaiah36:5 U ngu fan wer, kwaghôron u sha zwa tseegh ka mfe kua agee a nôngon ityav a mini? Ka sha an je u suur, ve u hendan a moo?" 
Isaiah36:6 Nenge, u ngu suur sha Igipiti ishombongbo u iyia ne, ku or nana lian sha mi yô, kua nyôr nan ken ikevwe, kua kuma nan tsula; kape Farao tor u Igipiti a lu hen mba ve suur sha a na cii je la." 
Isaiah36:7 Kpa aluer u kaam wer: Se mba suur sha TER, Aôndo wase, yô, kera ka Un shon u Hesekia lu vihi ajiir a Na a taven sha man atse a Na a nanden nagh sha mi kera, shi a kaa a Yuda man Yerusalem er: Gure civir nen sha ishigh ki atse ne, gaa?" 
Isaiah36:8 Yô, ta ase hwande a terem tor u Ashiria: mo yô, me na u anyinya dubu uhar, aluer wea fatyô u nan mbahendan a yô." 
Isaiah36:9 Ú er nan man ú hemba gomna môm u a lu u hemban gban ijime cii ken mbayev mba terem la, ityava? U gema u gba suur sha Igipiti sha u zuan a akeke kua mbaanyinyav tsôô!" 
Isaiah36:10 Kera ka sha mrumun u TER je man m kende sha tar ne sha u va timin u gaa? Ka TER je A kaa a mo er: Kôndo, za nôngo ityav a tar la, tim u, ye." 
Isaiah36:11 Tsô maa Eliakim man Shebena man Yoa ve kaa a Rabeshake er: Ma u shi er kwagh a mbayev ou ken zwa u Shiria, gadia se mba ongo u, kpa de kera er kwagh a vese ken zwa u Yuda sha ato a ior mba ve lu sha gilgar ne ga." 
Isaiah36:12 Kpa Rabeshake kaa er: Terem tindi er m̱ va ôr kwagh a ter wen kua ne tseegh tsôô? Kera ka hen ior mba ve tem sha gilgar a tindim sha u vea ya akôngo a ve man vea ma mnyandem vem a ven imôngo gaa? 
Isaiah36:13 Tsô Rabeshake tile genger imo taver taver ken zwa u Mbayuda, kaa er: Ungwa nen kwaghôron u zegetor, tor u Ashiria!" 
Isaiah36:14 Tor ngu kaan nahan er: Hesekia a̱ de kera tsughun ne ga, gadia una fatyô u yiman ne ga;" 
Isaiah36:15 shi de rumun nen ner Hesekia a̱ gema ne ne̱ suur sha TER ga, er a kaan er: TER Una yima se kpee je, á na gar ne sha ikev i tor u Ashiria ga, la." 
Isaiah36:16 De ongo nen kwaghôron u Hesekia ga, gadia tor u Ashiria ngu kaan nahan er: Lu nen bem a mo, due, va nen her a mo, hanmô wen nana ya atam a kon u wain u nan, man hanmô wen kpaa nana ya tur u nan, hanmô wen nana ma mngerem ma shin ijôr i nan kpaa;" 
Isaiah36:17 zan zan me kar van, me va kua a ven, me za a ven ken tar ugen u u lu er tar wen nahan, tar u uyia man u zar u wain, tar u ruam man u ishule i ikon i wain." 
Isaiah36:18 Hesekia a̱ de kera tsughun ne kaan er: TER Una yima se, ga. Mbaaôndo mba akuraior cii, môm tsô u a yem tar na sha ikev i tor u Ashiria ngu kpa?" 
Isaiah36:19 Mbaaôndo mba Hamati man mba Arpadi mba hana? Mbaaôndo mba Sefarvaim mba hana? Ve yima Samaria sha ikev yam kpa? 
Isaiah36:20 Mbaaôndo mba ityar ne cii ka hanmô je a yem tar na sha ikev yam, ve TER Una yima Yerusalem sha ikev yama?" 
Isaiah36:21 Kpa ve huan ving, ve bugh zwa a na sha kwagh môm ga, gadia tor kaa er: De bughun nen zwa a na ga." 
Isaiah36:22 Tsô Eliakim wan u Hilkia u a nengen sha ya u tor man Shebena orngeren man Yoa wan u Asav or u ngeren abaver ken takerada, ve va hen Hesekia a akondo a ve a anden iyol, ve ôr un mkaanem ma Rabeshake la." 
Isaiah37:1 Tsô zum u tor Hesekia ungwa kwagh ne yô, a ande akondo a na, a haa iba iyol, a za nyôr ken iyou i TER." 
Isaiah37:2 Nahan a tindi Eliakim u a nengen sha ya u tor, man Shebena orngeren kua upristi mba tamen, ve haa aba iyol, ve za hen profeti Yesaia wan u Amoshi." 
Isaiah37:2 Nahan a tindi Eliakim u a nengen sha ya u tor, man Shebena orngeren kua upristi mba tamen, ve haa aba iyol, ve za hen profeti Yesaia wan u Amoshi." 
Isaiah37:3 Ve za kaa un er: Hesekia ngu kaan nahan er: Iyange ne ka iyange i ican je, man i mtsaha kua ilyahan kpaa; gadia ônov kuma u á mar ve yô, kpa agee a maren ve nga ga." 
Isaiah37:4 Alaghga TER, Aôndo wou, Una, ungwa akaaôron a Rabeshake, u ter na tor u Ashiria, a tindi un er a̱ tuhwa Aôndo u uma la yô, man Una tsaha un sha akaaôron a TER, Aôndo wou, A ongo la; nahan yô, ma u shi kende imo ma u er msen sha ci u asande a a shi her yô." 
Isaiah37:5 Tsô mbayev mba tor Hesekia mba ve hen Yesaia yô," 
Isaiah37:6 Yesaia gema kaa a ve er: Za kaa nen ter wen nahan ner: TER ngu kaan er: De cie akaaôron a u ongo, a mbayev mba tor u Ashiria ve tohom sha a la ga." 
Isaiah37:7 Nenge, Me na jijingi ugen ker a na, una ungwa agwa, tsô una hide una yem ken tar na la; Me na una kpe ku u sha sanker ken tar na la." 
Isaiah37:8 Tsô Rabeshake hile yô, za kohol tor u Ashiria lu nôngon ityav a Libena; gadia vande ungwan er a mough hen Lakishi kera yô." 
Isaiah37:9 Tsô er a ungwa er i lu ôron kwagh u Tirhaka, tor u Etiopia, er: A due sha u va nôngon ityav a we–er a ungwa nahan yô, a tindi mbatyomov hen Hesekia a kaa er:" 
Isaiah37:10 Za kaa nen Hesekia tor u Yuda nahan ner: Aôndo wou u u suur sha a Na la, A̱ de tsughun we kaan er, á na Yerusalem sha ikev i tor u Ashiria ga ze." 
Isaiah37:11 Nenge, u ungwa kwagh u tor mba Ashiria lu er a ityar cii er ve tim i purututu la, nahan we yô, ú wara?" 
Isaiah37:12 Mbaaôndo mba akuraior, a uter av tim a la, ve yima a kpa? —ka Goshan man Haran man Resev kua ônov mba Eden mba ve lu ken Telasar la." 
Isaiah37:13 Tor u Hamati man tor u Arpadi man tor u gar u Sefarvaim man u Hena kua u Iva la, mba hana?" 
Isaiah37:14 Er Hesekia ngohol washika sha ikev i mbatyomov mbala, ôr yô, Hesekia kôndo, za sha iyou i TER, a samber un sha ishigh ki TER." 
Isaiah37:15 Tsô Hesekia sôn TER, kaa er:" 
Isaiah37:16 We, TER u akum a Sha, Aôndo u Iserael, We, u U tem sha ucerubi, ka We tseegh U lu Aôndo u ityartor i sha won cii ye, ka We je, U gbe Sha man tar ye." 
Isaiah37:17 TERE, ver ato, ungwa TERE, bugh ashe, nenge, ungwa akaaôron a Senakeribi cii, a a tindi sha u lahan Aôndo u uma ne." 
Isaiah37:18 Mimi je, TERE, utor mba Ashiria tim akuraior la cii kua ityar ve kpaa," 
Isaiah37:19 ve gbihi mbaaôndo vev ken usu kpaa; gadia ve ka mbaaôndo mimi ga, kpa ka tom u ave a ior tsô, ikon kua awen; ka nahan man ve tim ve ye." 
Isaiah37:20 Yô, TERE, Aôndo wase, shi yima se sha ikev na, ityartor i sha won i̱ fa er We u lu TER tswen yô." 
Isaiah37:21 Tsô Yesaia wan u Amoshi tindi loho hen Hesekia, kaa er: TER, Aôndo u Iserael, ngu kaan nahan er: Sha kwagh u msen u u senem sha kwagh u Senakeribi tor u Ashiria la yô," 
Isaiah37:21 Tsô Yesaia wan u Amoshi tindi loho hen Hesekia, kaa er: TER, Aôndo u Iserael, ngu kaan nahan er: Sha kwagh u msen u u senem sha kwagh u Senakeribi tor u Ashiria la yô," 
Isaiah37:22 ka kwaghôron u TER A kaa sha a na ne, er: Iniunkwase, wankwase u Shion ngu lahan we, ngu sen we sha ilyahan; wankwase u Yerusalem ngu jingir ityough ken ijime you." 
Isaiah37:23 Ka an je u laha nan, man u toho nan kpaa? Man ka an je u hagher sha nan sha kwaghôrono, u kenden ashe sha sha ihagher kpaa? Ka sha Icighan u Iserael je." 
Isaiah37:24 Ka sha mbayev ou u laha TER ye, u kaa wer: Sha ikpila-akeke yam, m unde sha ajiir a taven a sha iwo zan zan ken atô u Lebanon, me gber ugôgômbausedar nav man uicighanmbaikonov mba fer nav, me za ar sha ityough nagh shaala je, hen pe ikô na i hembe wan la." 
Isaiah37:25 M time azôr, m ma mngerem ma ken ityar igen, M uma asalegh a ifi u Igipiti cii sha akevangahar a am ne." 
Isaiah37:26 U ungwa er M vande eren akaa la tsuaa, man M ver a ngise je kpaa, gaa? Hegen yô, M kure a sha mi vough, ka nahan man u tim agar a lun a ugir, u gema a, a hingir atihi alôgh ye." 
Isaiah37:27 Ka nahan man mba ve tem ken a, ve kera lu a agee iyol ga ye, asema yina ve, kondo ve iyol, ve hingir er toho u ken akôngo nahan, man er gwergwe nahan man er toho u u mende sha uha, man shi er sule u alakema u a wa asange ga nahan." 
Isaiah37:28 Kpa M fa mtem wou man mdugh wou man mnyer wou kua ihundugh ki u hundu sha a Mo kpaa. 
Isaiah37:29 Er u hundu sha a Mo, man imanger you i u manger la, i va nyerem ker ato yô, nahan Me wa tsuwe Wam ken ihinga you, kua lijam Wam kpaa ken zwa wou, Me hide a we sha gbenda u u ve mi la." 
Isaiah37:30 Kwagh ne una hingir we ikav: inyom ne né ya kwagh u a gbe menden iyol na tsô yô, inyom i sha kpaa né ya kwagh u una shi á mende la, kpa sha inyom i sha utar la yô, lôô nen, sunda nen, môôr nen ikon i wain, ya nen atam a i." 
Isaiah37:31 Asande a a wer ken ya u Yuda a a shi her la, shi aa wa amise shin inya, man á ume atam sha." 
Isaiah37:32 Gadia ka ken Yerusalem asande a a shi her yô, aa due, man sha uwo u Shion kpaa mbawaren vea due; gbashima u TER u akum a Sha Una er kwagh ne." 
Isaiah37:33 Ka nahan man TER A kaa sha kwagh u tor u Ashiria la, er: Una nyôr ken gar ne ga, una ker ivaan ker ga, una kende perutya sha ishigh nagh ga man una ta tihinya sha u nôngon a na kpaa ga." 
Isaiah37:34 Gbenda u a ve mi la, ka sha u je una hide ye, kpa una nyôr ken gar ne ga, kape TER A kaa la." 
Isaiah37:35 Me kumba gar ne, Me yima un sha ci Wam iyol Yam kua sha ci u wanakiriki Wam Davidi kpaa." 
Isaiah37:36 Tsô ortyom u TER due za wua ior dubu deri man dubu akunduanyiin kar utaan ken afo a Mbaashiria. Zum u ior nder pepe yô, nenge, ve lu akom gbulugh gbulugh." 
Isaiah37:37 Nahan Senakeribi tor u Ashiria mough hide, yem, a za tema ken Nineve." 
Isaiah37:38 Tsô er a gure ken iyou i Niseroki, aôndo na la yô, ônov nav Adrameleki man Shareser ve wua un sha sanker, maa ve yevese ve yem ken tar u Ararati. Wan na Esar-hadon gema tema tor sha ityough nagh." 
Isaiah38:1 Tsô sha ayange la Hesekia gba angev je, gba nôngon ku. Nahan profeti Yesaia wan u Amoshi va her a na, va kaa a na er: TER ngu kaan nahan er: Sôr akaa hen ya wou, gadia kpen you, ú war ga." 
Isaiah38:1 Tsô sha ayange la Hesekia gba angev je, gba nôngon ku. Nahan profeti Yesaia wan u Amoshi va her a na, va kaa a na er: TER ngu kaan nahan er: Sôr akaa hen ya wou, gadia kpen you, ú war ga." 
Isaiah38:2 Tsô Hesekia gema ishigh nagh hen kpekpe, a sôn TER," 
Isaiah38:3 a kaa er: TERE, shi umbur er m zende sha ishigh You sha mimi a ishima i jighilii, shi m er akaa a dedoo sha ashe Ou kpaa yô. Nahan Hesekia gba vaan tsung." 
Isaiah38:4 Tsô kwaghôron u TER va hen Yesaia, er:" 
Isaiah38:5 Yem, za kaa Hesekia, wer: TER, Aôndo u teru Davidi, ngu kaan nahan er: M ungwa msen wou, M nenge mliam ou kpaa; yô, Me seer we anyom pue kar ataan sha ayange a ou;" 
Isaiah38:6 Me yima u kua gar ne sha ikev i tor u Ashiria, man Me kumba gar ne." 
Isaiah38:7 Kwagh ne una hingir we ikav i i dugh hen TER, er TER Una er kwagh u A kaa ne yô:" 
Isaiah38:8 Nenge, Me na mure u a gbe sha ihange i anar u tesen mzende u iyange u Ahashi la, una hide ijime ihange pue. Nahan iyange hide ijime ihange pue sha anar henpe i vande karen la." 
Isaiah38:9 Kwagh u Hesekia tor u Yuda nger, zum u a gba angev man a war angev nav la:" 
Isaiah38:10 M kaa mer: Er ayange am a shi her doo doo nahan kpaa gba u m̱ yem, m̱ nyôr ken ihinda i Sheol; i nyumem anyom a a shim her yô." 
Isaiah38:11 M kaa mer: Me kera nenge a TER, TER ken tar u mbaumav la ga Me kera nenge a or hen mba ve tem ken tar la ga." 
Isaiah38:12 I kar a ijiir yam i teman kera, i tsuwem i kera er ka tenti u orkuranilev nahan, m hule uma wam er ortumenikondo ka nan hule i nahan, A tôndom sha igaikondo; hii pepe zan zan tugh U beem kwagh wam kera." 
Isaiah38:13 M nôngo u huan ving zan zan sev av; er begha nahan, kape A kever akuhe am cii la; hii pepe zan zan tugh U beem kwagh wam kera." 
Isaiah38:14 Er gbargbar shin ôô-ôô ve yôôso nahan, kape mo kpaa m zer yôôso gbem la; m vaa, m zungwe er atii nahan; ashe am kenger sha je, hingir mir mir, TERE, kwagh tsulem, hingir ishuur wam." 
Isaiah38:15 Shi me kaa nana? A ôrom kwagh, man shi ka Un iyol Na kpaa A er kwagh ne ye; me gba yemen ving sha anyom a am cii, sha ci u ishimavihin yam." 
Isaiah38:16 TERE, ka sha akaa angan or ka nan lu uma ye, man ka ken a, uma u jijingi wam a lu jimin ye. Nahan yô, beem angev, m̱ lu uma." 
Isaiah38:17 Nenge, bocan wam ne, gema nam mkpeyol, gadia uma wam doo U ishima je, U dugh un shin ihungwa i mtim kera, U gema asorabo am cii U gbihi ken ijime You." 
Isaiah38:18 Gadia Sheol fatyô u wuese We ga, man ku kpaa u fatyô u civir We ga; mba ve senen shin ihungwa vea fatyô u suur sha jighjigh Wou ga." 
Isaiah38:19 Or u uma, or u uma, ka nan je nana wuese We ye, er mo m eren nyian nahan; ter ka a tese ônov nav jighjigh Wou." 
Isaiah38:20 TER rumun u yiman mo kpaa; nahan sé wa atsam a ityogholov mbi sha ingyanyinya, sha ayange a uma wase cii, ken iyou i TER." 
Isaiah38:21 Yesaia kaa er: Ve̱ tôô ijen i atam a tur, ve̱ cir sha ityundu, angev mbu̱ bee un." 
Isaiah38:22 Hesekia kpaa kaa er: Ka nyi i lu ikav i mea kôndo sha iyou i TERE? 
Isaiah39:1 Hen shighe la je, Merodaki-baladan, wan u Baladan, tor u Babilon, tindi mbatyomov hen Hesekia a washika kua iwua; gadia a ungwa er a gbe angev, man a shi a wer yô." 
Isaiah39:2 Tsô Hesekia kpaa ember ve, a tese ve iyou na i koson akaa ker cii, azurfa man zenaria man ilyôghonov man mkurem ma injaam, man iyou na i ikav mbi utyav cii, man akaa a a lu ken ayou a na a koson ikav ker cii; ma kwagh u ken iyou na shin ken tartor na cii, u Hesekia de tesen ve yô, lu ga." 
Isaiah39:3 Tsô profeti Yesaia va hen tor Hesekia, va pine un er: Ior mban kaa nana? Man ka han ve dugh man ve ve her a wee? Hesekia kaa er: Ve due ken tar u icaa, ve ve her a mo, ka ken Babilon je." 
Isaiah39:4 Shi a pine er: Ka nyi ve nenge a mi ken ya wouwe? Hesekia gema kaa er: Akaa a a lu ken ya wam cii, ve nenge a mi, ma kwagh môm u a lu ken ayou am a koson ikav ker cii u m tese ve ga yô, ngu ga." 
Isaiah39:5 Tsô Yesaia kaa a Hesekia er: Ungwa kwaghôron u TER u akum a Sha: 
Isaiah39:6 Nenge, ayange nga van a kaa a a lu ken ya wou cii, man akaa a uter ou ve koso cii zan zan nyian ne, á kura a, á yem a mi ken Babilon, kwagh môm una shi ga, kape TER A kaa la." 
Isaiah39:7 Ônov ou mba vea due ken a we, mba wea mar ve je, á kôr mbagenev á yem a ve, vea za hingir mbaerentom ken ya u tor u Babilon." 
Isaiah39:8 Hesekia gema kaa a Yesaia er: Imo i TER i u kaa la i dio tsô. Shi a kaa er: Gayô, sha ayange am yô, bem man mkpeyol vea lu." 
Isaiah40:1 Sur nen ior Av asema, sur nen ve asema je; kape Aôndo wen A kaa la." 
Isaiah40:2 Ôr nen kwagh u pever Yerusalem ishima, yila nen un genger genger, kaa nen ner, ayange a na a yan ican bee ve, i de un iferkwagh na kpaa; a ngohol mtsaha sha ikev i TER sha asorabo na cii, kuma kwa har je." 
Isaiah40:3 Imo gba yilan kaan er: Sôr nen gbenda u TER ken desereti, kôôm nen kômgbenda ken taaikôngo sha ci u Aôndo wase." 
Isaiah40:4 Á kondo hanma pev, hanma uwo man hanma igungu kpaa á sar ve; kwagh u a lu gbeen gbe gbeen la, una hingir vaanaa; ajiir a a lu awen awen aa hingir gbulumuu;" 
Isaiah40:5 iengem i TER ia ande ken igbar, uumace cii vea nenge a i imôngo, gadia ka zwa u TER u kaa nahan ye." 
Isaiah40:6 Imo gba kaan er: Yôô ase! Ugen pine er: M̱ yôô nyi? Uumace cii mba er toho nahan, mdooashe ve cii kpaa ngu er imondon u ken toho nahan;" 
Isaiah40:7 toho ka u uma, imondon a use, zum u iôôn i TER ka ia ta sha mi yô; mimi je, ior ka toho tsô." 
Isaiah40:8 Toho ka u uma, imondon a use, kpa kwaghôron u TER wase yô, una lu her gbem sha won." 
Isaiah40:9 Unde sha uwo u taven, we Shion u u yee loho u dedoo ne; genger imo taver taver, we Yerusalem u u yee loho u dedoo ne, genger imo de cie ga, kaa agar a Yuda wer: Nenge, Aôndo wen Ngun!" 
Isaiah40:10 Nenge, Ter AÔNDO Una va sha agee, Una kura tar sha uwegh Nagh je; nenge, injar Na ngi a Na; iyevoron Na kpaa kar ngi zan Un sha hemen." 
Isaiah40:11 Una koso ilev Nav er orkuranilev nahan, Una kohol ônovmbaiyôngov sha uwegh Nagh, Una tôô ve Una wa sha ikum Na, una za a mbi amben ônov tegh tegh." 
Isaiah40:12 Ka an nan kar gidamnger sha ikevwe i nan, shi nan kar Usha sha ishiva, nan kohol vuulevu u tar shin ikagh ki karen kwagh a mi, man nan kar iyohov mbu iwoov sha ikaren, man agungu kpaa sha iyôgh ki karen kwagh a mini?" 
Isaiah40:13 Ka an nan lu wa Jijingi u TER kwagh, shi nan lu orwasen Un henen kwagh, nan tesen Unu?" 
Isaiah40:14 Ka an A hen kwagh a nan man nan pase Un kwagh, nan tese Un gbenda u vough, nan seer Un mfe man nan pase Un gbenda u kaven kwagh ase?" 
Isaiah40:15 Nenge, akuraior nga er ibelegh ki mngeregh ki ki lu shin ika yô, man er ihundu i puer i i hee sha iyôgh ki karen kwagh a mi nahan; nenge, acile a shin zegemnger nga er vuulevu u lun lueen u i tsenda kera yô." 
Isaiah40:16 Lebanon kpaa kuma u keer usu a mi ga, ishôso i sha mi kpaa kuma u nan nagh ku nanden a mi ga." 
Isaiah40:17 Akuraior cii kpaa nga sha ishigh Nagh er ka ma kwagh ga yô; nga Un er ka ma kwagh je ga, man er gbilinkwagh tsô yô." 
Isaiah40:18 Tsô né kar Aôndo sha ana? Man ka hanma mluyol a kom u karen sha a Naa? 
Isaiah40:19 Eev mbu haan yô, ortom ka nan haa mbu, orvarenzenaria nan cir mbu zenaria iyol, nan var mbu mshirim ma azurfa." 
Isaiah40:20 Or u nan gbe ican yum nan yen sha nagh kura yô, nan tsuwa kon u ua vôngo ga yô, nan ker orfan eev dedoo, sha er nana̱ gba eev mbu mbua tenger ga yô." 
Isaiah40:21 Ne fa gaa? M-ongo kpaa, ne ungwa gaa? I kaa ne sha hiihii je gaa? Ne kav sha mgbetar je gaa?" 
Isaiah40:22 Ka Un u A undu kpighikiki u tar shin, A tema sha la, mba ve tem sha u kpaa, mba er mbaahungwa yô; A naregh Usha er ikondo i vel vel nahan, A samber ve er tenti u teman ker yô;" 
Isaiah40:23 A gema atiator hingir gbilinkwagh; mbatarev kpaa a gema ve ve hingir kwagh u gbilinigh. 
Isaiah40:24 I môôr ve ica ngi a gba ga; i lôô ve ica ngi a gba ga; er itine ve i lu a kôr amise shin inya ica ngi a gba kpaa ga, A ta ahumbe sha a ve, ve use kera; hiar a va kura ve kera er atighir a uwua nahan." 
Isaiah40:25 Tsô ne karem sha an, u Me lu vough a nana? Kape u A lu Icighan la A pin la." 
Isaiah40:26 Kende nen ashe a en sha, nenge nen: ka an nan gbe akaa ne, nan dugh a akum a ve sha iyenge ve, nan yer a cii sha ati ati? Sha mvese u agee a Na man sha ci u mtaver u tahav Nav, mô môm u lun ga ngu ga." 
Isaiah40:27 We Yakob, ka nyi u kaan nahan, man we Iserael, u er kwagh u kaa wer: Gbenda wam ngu myer hen TER; man u kuren mo ijir sha mimi kpaa, Aôndo wa iko sha mi ga ase?" 
Isaiah40:28 U vande fan gaa? M-ongo kpaa, u ungwa gaa? TER ka Aôndo u tsôron je, Orgban u akighir a tar, gbe uwer ga, ver kpaa ga, mkav Na gande u timen fan." 
Isaiah40:29 Ka A na or u nan ver la agee, man A seer or u nan taver ga la agee." 
Isaiah40:30 Shin er mbayevikaior je kpaa iyol i kpe ve, ve ver nahan, man mbaageev kpaa ve lu nôngon gbev je," 
Isaiah40:31 nahan kpaa, mba ve veren ashe sha TER yô, vea hide a agee a ve her; vea kôndo sha sha akper er ugafa nahan; vea yevese, kpa vea vôr ga; vea zende, kpa iyol ia kpe ve ga." 
Isaiah41:1 Ne ityar i shin kpe u zegemnger, ver nen ato sha Mo ving; akuraior a̱ hide a agee a a her; ve̱ kporom, ve̱ ôr kwagh; sé za nen imôngo hen ijirôron." 
Isaiah41:2 Ka an nan kpoghol or la vegher u sha iyangeiduen, u mhembe va kohol un sha hanma iaven i nguhar na la? Ka an nan gem akuraior nan ne a sha ikev na er a̱ ndyar utor shin angahar, a̱ er ve, ve̱ hingir er ihundu nahan sha sanker na, man er imough i purugh nahan, sha ada na la?" 
Isaiah41:3 A zenda ve ityô, a kar doo doo, sha gbenda u a lu a vande karen sha u ga je kpaa." 
Isaiah41:4 Ka an je nan er kwagh ne nan kur unu? Ka Un u A yila ikov hii sha mhii je; Mo, TER u hiihii je, man hen mbamasetyô kpaa, Me lu her nahan vough." 
Isaiah41:5 Ityar i hen kpezegemnger nenge, nahan i cia, akighir a tar cii gbidye akarkase iyol; ve gba kporom ikua, van." 
Isaiah41:6 Hanma or nan wase ugen, nan kaa a anngô u nan er: Taver ishima!" 
Isaiah41:7 Or u gban kwagh, taver or u varen zenaria ishima; or u caghen kwagh sha msabe ngu taver or u gbidyen sha ijôv ishima, nan wuese er, mvar la doo; man a mande un sha ukusa, sha u a̱ de tenger ga yô." 
Isaiah41:8 Kpa we, Iserael, wanakiriki Wam, Yakob, u M tsough yô, tsombor u huror Wam Aberaham," 
Isaiah41:9 uwe, u M kôr u, M tôô u sha akighir a tar je, M yila u sha azongo a u, M kaa a we Mer: We, u ngu wanakiriki Wam, M tsuwa u, M ta u kera ga," 
Isaiah41:10 de cie ga, gadia M ngu a we; de enger kenger sha mcie ga, gadia Mo M ngu Aôndo wou, M taver we, shi M wasen we, man M tuur we sha uwegh Agh ku yanegh ku yiman a yima la." 
Isaiah41:11 Nenge, mba asema a vihi ve a we cii, vea va ahenge, vea hingir kwaghkunya; man mba ve hendan a we kpaa, vea lu ma kwagh ga, vea saa ishe je." 
Isaiah41:12 Ú ker mba ve nenge num a we la, kpa ú zua a ve ga; mba ve nenge ityav a we la, vea hingir er ka ma kwagh ga yô, man er gbilinkwagh kpaa." 
Isaiah41:13 Gadia Mo, TER, Aôndo wou, M kôr uwegh ough ku yanegh; M kaa a we Mer: De cie ga, M wasen we." 
Isaiah41:14 De cie ga, we Yakob, ananyigôgh, ne ior mba Iserael! Ka Mo M wasen we ye, kape TER A kaa ne, Orpaan wou ka Icighan u Iserael je." 
Isaiah41:15 Nenge, geman Yam we, ú hingir ikyekye i he i gbidyen alakema, i horon, i lun a anyi kpishi; ú gbidye iwo, ú hembe i avur avur, ú gema agungu, aa hingir er imough yô." 
Isaiah41:16 Ú peer ve, ahumbe aa purugh a mi kera, hiar una sambe ve kera; kpa we yô, ú ember ken TER, ú ta ihagh sha Icighan u Iserael." 
Isaiah41:17 Mbaatsanev man mbaibanave ker mgerem, kpa ma ga, nombor ve uma sha ci u imura; Mo, TER, Me ungwa imo ve, Mo, Aôndo u Iserael, Me undu ve ga." 
Isaiah41:18 Me bugh uifi sha agungu a kpuun kpuun man amboramnger shin apev; Me gema desereti una hingir ityungumnger, tar u ombor kpaa ua hingir amboramnger." 
Isaiah41:19 Me môôr kon u sedar ken desereti, man shi kon u akashia man mertel kua kon u olev u ken toho kpaa; ken taaikôngo Me môôr kon u fer man u pelane a u ouki imôngo," 
Isaiah41:20 sha u ve̱ nenge, ve̱ fa, ve̱ hen sha mi, ve̱ kar imôngo cii er i lu uwegh ku TER ku er nahan yô, ka Icighan u Iserael A gbe akaa ne ye." 
Isaiah41:21 Due nen a ijir yen, kape TER A kaa la; va nen a atôakaa a en, kape Tor u Yakob A kaa la." 
Isaiah41:22 Ve̱ due a a, ve̱ pase se kwagh u una va er yô. Pase nen akaa a ngise, er a lu yô, sha er se̱ hen sha a, se̱ fa mkur u a; shin tese se akaa a aa va er yô;" 
Isaiah41:23 pase nen se akaa a a va er ken hemen yô, sha er se̱ fa er ne lu mbaaôndo yô; er nen ma kwagh, shin a lu u dedoo, shin a lu u bo, sha er i̱ kondo se iyol, sé gba kenger imôngo tsô yô." 
Isaiah41:24 Nenge, ne mba ma kwagh ga, tom wen kpaa ka gbilinkwagh tsô; or u nan tsough ne la kpaa nan ngu kwagh u ndôhôrshima." 
Isaiah41:25 M kpoghol orgen sha imbusutarimese, a va je; sha vegher u sha iyangeiduen je, or u una yila sha iti Yam; una ndyar mbatarev er ka inyandor nahan, er ormaantyegh ka nan kume inyaityuu nahan." 
Isaiah41:26 Ka an nan vande pasen kwagh la sha hiihii je, sha u se̱ fa, man tsuaa kpaa, sha er ma se kaa ser: Nan kaa mimi je yôô? Een, ma or u pasen nan ngu ga, ma or u tesen kpaa nan ngu ga, ma or u ungwan kwaghôron wen kpaa nan ngu ga." 
Isaiah41:27 Mo M vande kaan a Shion, Mer: Nenge, nenge mban; Me na Yerusalem oryôôn loho u dedoo." 
Isaiah41:28 Zum u M jinge yô, or lu ga; ken a ve je kpaa ma or u wasen mhen nan ngu ga, sha u ma M pin ve kwagh, ma ve kaam yô." 
Isaiah41:29 Nenge, ve cii, mba ma kwagh je ga, ityom ve kpaa ka gbilinkwagh tsô, ieev mbi keren a ker kpaa ka ahumbe man gbilinkwagh dang tsô." 
Isaiah42:1 Nenge Wanakiriki Wam u M tuur Un; icuwan Wam u ishima i doom a Na yum yô; M ver Jijingi wam sha a Na, Una va a ijirôron i mimi hen akuraior." 
Isaiah42:2 Una genger imo ga, Una er ikenge ga; Una na, á ungwa imo Na sha gbenda kpaa ga." 
Isaiah42:3 Ijinga i hemben Una sombo i ga, mou u imenger u yughur mnyim la kpaa Una pir un ga; Una va a ijirôron sha mimi kpaa." 
Isaiah42:4 Una gba ikure ga, á sombo Un kpaa ga, zan zan Una kar veren ijirôron i mimi sha won, ityar i hen kpezegemnger kpaa ia kegh ityesen Na." 
Isaiah42:5 TER, Aôndo u A gbe Usha man A naregh ve, u A samber tar a akaa a a dugh sha u la, u A ne ior mba ve lu sha u la, iôôn, man shi A ne mba ve zenden sha u, jijingi kpaa yô, ngu kaan nahan er:" 
Isaiah42:6 Mo TER, M yila U sha perapera, M kôr u Uwegh, M kura U kpaa; M gema U, U hingir ikuryan i ior man iwanger i akuraior," 
Isaiah42:7 sha u bughun mbaapirashe ashe, u dughun mbakwarev agbe, man u dughun mba ken gaadi ken ime kera." 
Isaiah42:8 Ka Mo TER, ka iti Yam je ne; icivir Yam kpaa Me na orgen ga, iwuese Yam Me na ieev mbi gban a gba la ga." 
Isaiah42:9 Nenge, akaa a ngise la, a er kera ve, ka akaa a he M lu tesen ye; M ngu ôron ne kwagh u a, er a lu a due ga je yô." 
Isaiah42:10 Wa nen TER icam i he, iwuese Na i̱ hii sha ikighir i tar je, ne mba ne zenden sha zegemnger man akaa a a lu shimi cii kpaa; man ne ityar i hen kpezegemnger kua mba ve tem sha i." 
Isaiah42:11 Desereti man agar a keregh ve̱ genger imo, angarev mba Kedar a tem kimi la kpaa; mba ve tem ken Sela, ve̱ wa icam, ve̱ er akenge sha ityouv mbi iwoov." 
Isaiah42:12 Ve̱ na TER icivir, ve̱ pase iwuese Na ken ityar i hen kpezegemnger." 
Isaiah42:13 TER Una due er or u ageegh nahan, Una mough sha kume er ornôngontyav nahan, Una genger imo, een, Una er ikenge, Una tese mbaihomov Nav tahav Nav." 
Isaiah42:14 M huan gbang, M lu ving, M wa ishima gbong gbong; ahegen yô, Me ngor er kwase u toghor mar yô, Me ôô taver taver kua fegh fegh icin i môm." 
Isaiah42:15 Me er iwo kua agungu vea hingir caveraa, Me er ahu a ve cii aa uma; Me er uifi vea uma; á hingir tar; Me er atungu kpaa, á uma." 
Isaiah42:16 Shi Me va a mbaapirashe sha gbenda u ve fe u ga yô; ka sha igbenda i ve fe i ga je, Me kar a ve ye; Me gema ime ia hingir iwanger sha ishiv vev; ajiir a lun gbeen gbe gbeen aa hingir vaanaa. Akaa ne yô, Me er a, Me de a ga." 
Isaiah42:17 Vea hide ijime, vea va ahenge tsung, ve mba ve suur sha ieev mbi gban a gba, mba ve kaan a ieev mbi keren a ker er: Ka ne, ne lu mbaaôndo asev la." 
Isaiah42:18 Ne mbakondonato, ungwa nen, ne mbaapirashe, kenger nen, sha er né nenge yô." 
Isaiah42:19 Ka an nan pir ashe, saa wanakiriki Wam la man ato kpaa a kondo nan er ortyom Wam u M tindi la nahana? Ka an nan pir ashe er or u M tsegh nan la shi nan pir ashe er wanakiriki u TER nahana?" 
Isaiah42:20 U nenge a akaa kpishi, kpa u ver ishima ga, ato ou lu ivegher je, kpa u ungwa ga." 
Isaiah42:21 Doo TER u kenden ityesen sha, hingir kwagh u icivirigh sha ci u perapera Na." 
Isaiah42:22 Kpa ior mban ka mba i num ve gbenda, i sar ve; ve cii i mande ve agbe, i wuhe ve ken ugaadi; ve hingir ishar, ma or u yiman lu ga; i kura ve er ishar i yan nahan, ma or u kaan er: Hide a mi kpaa, lu ga." 
Isaiah42:23 Ka hanmô wen je nan veren ato sha akaa nee, man nan we iko, nan ongo sha ci u ayange a a ve laa?" 
Isaiah42:24 Ka an nan ne Yakob a hingir ishar, man nan ne Iserael sha ikev i mbanumungbenda? Kera ka TER, u se er Un isholibo la gaa? Un u ve venda u zenden sha igbenda Na, ve hemba ato sha ityesen Na kpaa." 
Isaiah42:25 Ka nahan man A haa ve iyugh Na i vihin tsung kua tahav mbu utya ye; i gba nanden ve sha usu, usu kase ve wa atô, nahan kpaa ve fa ga; hia ve kpaa, kpa ve wa iko ga." 
Isaiah43:1 Kpa ahegen yô, TER u A gbe u, we Yakob, Un u A maa u, we Iserael, ngu kaan nahan er: De cie ga, gadia M paa u, M yila u sha iti, uwe u ngu u Wam je." 
Isaiah43:2 Zum u wea peren gidamnger yô, Me lu a we; wea peren uifi kpaa, vea uve u ga; wea zenden ker atô usu kpaa, ua hia u ga; nomborusu kpaa ua kôr u ga." 
Isaiah43:3 Gadia Mo, M ngu TER, Aôndo wou, Icighan u Iserael, Oryiman wou; M na Igipiti hingir kwagh u paan we a mi, man Etiopia kua Seba kpaa sha ityough you." 
Isaiah43:4 Er u lum kwagh yum, man kwagh u icivirigh, shi u doom ishima kpaa yô, sha ci u nahan yô, Me na ior sha ityough you, man akuraior sha ci u paan uma wou." 
Isaiah43:5 De cie ga, gadia M ngu a we; Me za va a tsombor wou sha ityoughkitaregh, Me za kura u shin ityôtar kera;" 
Isaiah43:6 Me kaa a imbusutarimese Mer: Na; shi Me kaa a imbusutariyan kpaa Mer: De kera luun a mi her ga, va a ônov Av mba nomso mba ken ica la kua ônov Av mba kasev mba ken ikighirtar la kpaa;" 
Isaiah43:7 hanmô u i yer nan sha iti Yam, u M gbe nan sha ci u icivir Yam, u M maa nan, u M er nan la." 
Isaiah43:8 Due a ior mba ve pir ashe, shin ve lu a ashe nahan kpaa, man mba ve kondo ato, shin er ve lu a ato nahan kpaa." 
Isaiah43:9 Akuraior cii, a̱ kohol imôngo, ior cii ve̱ zua imôngo. Ka anti ken ve je nana fatyô u pasen kwagh ne, man nana tese se akaa a a vande karen kera? Ve̱ va a ushiada vev sha er vea zua a ishô yô, ve̱ ungwa, ve̱ kaa er: Ka mimi je." 
Isaiah43:10 Ka ne ne lu mbashiada Av ye, kape TER A kaa ne, wanakiriki Wam u M tsough, sha er ne̱ fam, ne̱ nam jighjigh, ne̱ kav er M lu Un kpaa yô; aôndo ugen vande lun a Mo ga, ken ijime Yam kpaa una lu ga." 
Isaiah43:11 Ka Mo M lu TER ye; á lu Mo ga yô, ma Oryiman ugen ngu ga." 
Isaiah43:12 Mo M pase, M yima, man shi M yôô kpaa; ma aôndo ugen lu her a ven ga, ka nahan man ne ne lu mbashiada Av ye, kape TER A kaa ne; ka Mo M lu Aôndo ye." 
Isaiah43:13 Hii nyian zan zan ayange a ken hemen kpaa, ka Mo Un her; mô u yiman sha ikev Yam ngu ga. Mo M eren tom, ka an je nana yange?" 
Isaiah43:14 TER, Orpaan wen, Icighan u Iserael ngu kaan nahan er: Ka sha ci wen je Me tindi sha Babilon ye; Me sen a Mbakaldi cii, vea hingir mbayevese, ken utso vev mba ve ember sha mi la." 
Isaiah43:15 Mo M ngu TER, Icighan wen, Orgban u Iserael, Tor wen." 
Isaiah43:16 Kape TER A kaa ne, Un u A er gbenda shin zegemnger, man gbenda u karen shin mngerem ma vesen kpaa;" 
Isaiah43:17 Wen u A ve a ikyekyeutya man nyinya kua ikumutya man ortaveryol; mba yaven imôngo, vea kera mough ga, ve saa kera, i pir ve er ka mou u imenger nahan:" 
Isaiah43:18 De kera umbur nen akaa a ngise ga, man de kera waan akaa a a er tsuaa la iko ga." 
Isaiah43:19 Nenge, eren Yam kwagh u he; una due hegen je, ne kera nenge a mi gaa? Me er gbenda ken desereti man uifi ken taaikôngo." 
Isaiah43:20 Inyamtoho ia civir Mo ugbaseela kua ukonkofi, sha ci u M ne mngerem ken desereti man uifi ken taaikôngo, sha u Me na ior Av mngerem ve̱ ma, ka uicuwan Av je la." 
Isaiah43:21 Ior mba M maa sha ci Wam iyol Yam je, vea pase iwuese Yam." 
Isaiah43:22 Nahan kpaa u yilam ga, Yakob; kwagh Wam kumbur we iyol kpaa ga, Iserael." 
Isaiah43:23 U vam a iyôngo i nagh ough ku nanden ga, u civir Mo sha nagh ough ku sôngon kpaa ga. Mo M kighir we Mer, va nam nagh ku sha samuyia ga, M za u iyol sha nagh ku nanden ku human doon kpaa ga." 
Isaiah43:24 U yamen kalamu u human doon sha inyar ga man u nam ahôm a iniav youv mbila wer i̱ saan Mo iyol, ga; u er i nyôrom iyol a asorabo a ou la, u zam iyol sha aferakaa a ou." 
Isaiah43:25 Ka Mo je M ese atindi a ou a peren kera sha ci Wam iyol Yam; Me kera umbur asorabo a ou kpaa ga. 
Isaiah43:26 Umbur Mo kwagh, va se hen nen kwagh imôngo; ôr kwagh wou, sha er ú zua a ishô yô." 
Isaiah43:27 Teru u hiihii la, er isholibo, mbapasen we kwagh kpaa ve per atindi a Am." 
Isaiah43:28 Nahan M hôngor mbavesen mba icighanjiir, M gema Yakob M na i tim un purututu, Iserael kpaa hingir kwagh u aheenegh." 
Isaiah44:1 Kpa hegen yô, ungwa, we wanakiriki Wam Yakob, man Iserael kpaa u M tsough la." 
Isaiah44:2 TER u A er u, A maa u ken uya je, man A wasen we la, ngu kaan nahan er: De cie ga, we Yakob, wanakiriki wam, man we, Yeshurun u M tsough ne." 
Isaiah44:3 Gadia Me haa mngerem sha tar u imura i ker u yô, man uikuwanmbamngerev kpaa hen ikpoghonya; Me haa Jijingi Wam sha mbayev ou, kua iveren Yam kpaa sha tsombor wou;" 
Isaiah44:4 vea mende er toho ken atô u mnger nahan, er ikon i wilou i hen kpe u ukungômbamngerev yô." 
Isaiah44:5 Ugen nana kaa er: Mo m ngu u TER je; ugen kpaa nana tôô iti i Yakob; ugen yô, nana nger sha uwegh ku nan er: Ka kwagh u TER je, nana seer iti i nan er, Iserael." 
Isaiah44:6 TER, Tor u Iserael man Orpaan na kpaa, TER u akum a Sha ngu kaan nahan er: Mo M ngu u hiihii, shi M ngu u masetyô kpaa; ma aôndo ugen ngu ga, saa Mo." 
Isaiah44:7 Ka anti nan lu er Mo nahana; yô, nana̱ yôô, nana̱ pase nana̱ verem kwagh la sha ishi M ver ikurior i tse la, tsuaa je. Ve̱ pase akaa a a ve la, man a aa va er la." 
Isaiah44:8 De cie nen ga, mciem ma̱ de gbe ne iyol ga; M tsengaôron ne ngise je, M pase ne gaa? Ka ne je ne lu mbashiada Av ye. Ma aôndo ugen ngu jee, saa Mo tsô gaa? Mimi je, ma Vande ugen ngu ga, M fa mô ga." 
Isaiah44:9 Ve mba ve gbe ieev, ve cii ka agbilinaior tsô, man akaa a doon ve yum la, aa lu ve a inja ga; ushiada vev mba nengen ga, mba fe kwagh kpaa ga, nahan kunya ua kôr ve." 
Isaiah44:10 Ka an nan gbe aôndo, shin nan ker eev mbu mbu lu a inja sha ma kwagh ga ne ase?" 
Isaiah44:11 Nenge, mba ve nyer nongo a nan cii, kunya ua kôr ve; mbatomov je kpaa, ka ior tsô; de ve cii, ve̱ kohol ijiir i môm, ve̱ mough, ve̱ tile sha; vea cia, kunya kpaa ua kôr ve imôngo cii." 
Isaiah44:12 Orvareniwa ka nan er tom u mbu sha aka, nan var mbu sha mbamsabe, nan er tom sha mbu sha uwegh ku nan ku ageegh je; ijen kpaa i kôr nan, agee a yina nan iyol, mngerem tsô kpaa nan ma ga, zan zan iyol i kpe nan cii." 
Isaiah44:13 Orgbankwagh ka nan ta kor u karen kwagh a mi nan kpela mbu hwange sha pensel, nan sôr mbu sha mbaityôv, nan nger mbu sha iyôgh ki karen kwagh, nan er mbu sha inja i mlu u or, sha inja i mluashe u or, sha er mbu̱ lu ken iyou yô." 
Isaiah44:14 Ka nan gber usedar sha ci u nan, nan tôô kon u shiperu man u ouki, nan de u môm u̱ mende u̱ vese sha ci u nan ken ikô nan môôr kon u pain, tsô ura u gbaa vesen u tsô." 
Isaiah44:15 Tsô u gema u hingir kwagh u or nana wa usu a mi, nan pande u, nan ôso usu, shi nan wa, nan kaa bredi a mi, shi nan er aôndo a mi kpa, nan gule nan civir un; nan gba eev sha u, nan gule mbu inya." 
Isaiah44:16 Nan nande tiôn ugen sha usu, tiôn ugen la nan ya inyam a mi, nan mgbagh inyam sha mi, nan ya nan ide; shi nan ôso usu nan kaa er: Ehe! gba tseen mo ve, m nenge a usu ve!" 
Isaiah44:17 Tiôn u masen shin la, nan gema nan er aôndo a mi, ka eev mbu nan mbu gban a gba je la; nan gule mbu sha ishi, nan civir, nan er mbu msen, nan kaa er: Yimam, gadia ka we u lu aôndo wam ye." 
Isaiah44:18 Ve fa ga, mba henen kwagh ken asema ve kpaa ga, gadia i cir ve ashe sha u vea fatyô u nengen ga kua asema a ve kpaa, sha u vea fatyô u kaven ga yô." 
Isaiah44:19 Mô môm kpaa nan kera hen ken ishima i nan ga, kwaghfan ngu ga, shin mkav kpaa u vea kaa er: Tiôn na ugen m keer usu a min, m kaa bredi sha aka na kpaa, man m mgbagh inyam, m ya; nahan m tôô tiôn na u a shi la, m̱ er kwagh u ndôhôrshima a mini? m̱ gule m̱ civir tiônkono?" 
Isaiah44:20 Ka mtwem nan ye ye; icugh i ken ishima, i tsume a nan sha gbenda je, nan kera fatyô u yiman uma u nan ga; u pinen er: Ka aie a lum ken uwegh ku yanegh ye gaa, kpa nan pine ga." 
Isaiah44:21 Umbur akaa ne, we Yakob, kua we Iserael kpaa, gadia u ngu wanakiriki Wam; ka Mo M maa u ye; u ngu wanakiriki Wam; Iserael, hungul Yam we ga." 
Isaiah44:22 M ese atindi a ou a peren kera er irkpiigh nahan, man asorabo a ou kpaa, er ibeenegh yô; hide her a Mo, gadia M paa u." 
Isaiah44:23 Ember nen, ne Usha, gadia ka TER A er nahan ye; er nen ikenge, ne ajiir a zan a shin tar; ger nen atsam a wan, ne iwo, man we ikô, a hanma kon u kimi cii, gadia TER paa Yakob, Una pase icivir Na ken Iserael." 
Isaiah44:24 TER, Orpaan wou, man u A maa u ken uya je, ngu kaan nahan er: Ka Mo M lu TER u M er akaa cii ye, M samber Usha, Mo tswen, M samber tar sha won; ka an nan lu vea Mo?" 
Isaiah44:25 M bundu uivande mba uprofeti mba aiev, M gem mbakpehenasor ve hingir abumeaior; M hir a mbafankwagh ijime, M gem kwaghfan ve a hingir ibumegh." 
Isaiah44:26 M taver kwaghôron u wanakiriki Wam, M kur kwagh sha imo i mbatyomov Av vough; M kaa a Yerusalem Mer: Ior ve̱ tema ker; man a agar a Yuda kpaa, Mer: I̱ maa a her, Me shi Me maa atse a na," 
Isaiah44:27 M kaa a aivamnger, Mer: Uma kera; Me uma uifi ou;" 
Isaiah44:28 M kaa sha Shirushi, Mer: Ka orkuranilev Wam je, una er kwagh u a doom ken ishima u eren cii je, una kaa a Yerusalem er: I̱ maa u her, tempel kpaa i̱ tim imagh nagh." 
Isaiah45:1 TER ngu kaan a or Na u i shigh un mkurem, ka Shirushi je la, u M ker un sha uwegh ku yanegh, sha u Me ta akuraior inya sha ishigh nagh, man Me sagh utor ikange shin iwenge kera, shi Me bugh ihinda sha ishigh nagh, á kera wuhe ihindagar kpaa ga," 
Isaiah45:2 Me hemen we, Me gema ajiir a gbeen gbe gbeen la aa hingir vaanaa; Me hembe ihinda i togula, man Me tôndo uishindan mba iyôôv kera;" 
Isaiah45:3 Me na u akaa a injaa a ken ime man akaa a injaa a i yer a ken ajiir a myer, sha u ú fa er Mo M lu TER, u M yer u sha iti You yô, Mo Aôndo u Iserael." 
Isaiah45:4 Ka sha ci u Yakob wanakiriki Wam man Iserael icuwan Wam, M yer sha iti you ye, M seer u iti i icivirigh, shin er u vande fan Mo ga nahan kpaa." 
Isaiah45:5 Mo M ngu TER, mô ugen ngu ga; ma aôndo ugen ngu ga saa Mo; M ta u ikondo uya shin er u fem ga nahan kpaa;" 
Isaiah45:6 sha u I̱ fa, hii sha mdugh u iyange je zan zan mmir u i, mô ugen ngu ga saa Mo; ka Mo M lu TER ye, mô ugen ngu ga." 
Isaiah45:7 M ver iwanger, man shi M gba ime; M va a kwaghdoon man kwaghvihin kpaa, ka Mo TER M er akaa ne cii ye." 
Isaiah45:8 Ne usha, haa nen aber shin inya, abeen kpaa A̱ nôô perapera shin inya, tar u̱ bugh, myom a̱ due, perapera a̱ mende nongo; gadia ka Mo TER M gbe u ye." 
Isaiah45:9 Kwagh á tser un u a hendan a, u A maa un la, icenge i ken atsenge a hen inya! Inyatyuu ia kaa a or u maan i er: Ka nyi u erenee? Shin tom wou ua kaa er: Ngu a ave ga, kpa?" 
Isaiah45:10 Kwagh á tser un u a kaa a ter er: Ka nyi u mara? Shin a kwase er: Ka nyi u toghol mara? 
Isaiah45:11 TER, Icighan u Iserael, u A maa un la, ngu kaan nahan er: Pinem kwagh u akaa a aa va er ken hemen la; ônov Av kua tom u ave Am yô, de ve, ve̱ lu sha ikev Yam tsô." 
Isaiah45:12 Ka Mo je M er tar ye, M gba or, M ver nan sha u kpaa; ka ave Am je, a samber Usha, akum a ve la cii kpaa, M wa a atindi." 
Isaiah45:13 Mo M mough a na sha ken perapera, Me sôr igbenda na cii, una maa gar Wam, man ka un je una pase mbakwarev Av kpaa ye, á lu sha inyar ga man sha iwua kpaa ga, kape TER u akum a Sha A kaa la." 
Isaiah45:14 TER ngu kaan nahan er: Iwengeoron i Igipiti, man ikav mbi kasuav mbi Etiopia kua Mbasabea, ugôgômbaiorov la, vea per vea va her a we, vea hingir mba ou kpaa, vea dondo u ijime, vea per ken a we a mshirim iyol, vea gule sha ishigh you, vea zamber a we er: Mimi je, ka hen a we tseegh Aôndo A lu ye, mô ugen ngu ga, Aôndo ugen ngu ga." 
Isaiah45:15 Mimi je, U ngu Aôndo u U yer iyol You, Aôndo u Iserael, Oryiman." 
Isaiah45:16 Kunya kôr ve, ve cii ve va ahenge; ve yem a iheen iyol imôngo, ve mba ve gbe eev la." 
Isaiah45:17 Kpa Iserael yô, TER Una yima ve, sha myom u tsôron; kunya ua kôr ne ga, né va ahenge sha won kpaa ga." 
Isaiah45:18 Gadia kape TER A kaa ne, Un u A gbe Usha—ka Un man A lu Aôndo ye—u A maa tar man A er u kpaa la, ka Un A ver u ye; A gba u er u̱ lu gbilin dang ga, A maa u sha er ior ve̱ tema sha u: Ka Mo M lu TER ye, mô ugen ngu ga." 
Isaiah45:19 M ôr kwagh ken myer, shin ken ma ijiir ken tar u imegh kpaa ga; M kaa a tsombor u Yakob Mer: Gba keren nen Mo gbilin tsô ga; Mo TER M er kwagh u perapera, M pasen akaa a a lu vough." 
Isaiah45:20 Kohol nen ayol a en va nen; kporom nen imôngo, ne mba ne wer ken akuraior. Ve mba a mfe ga, ve mba ve tee ieev vev mbi i gbe mbi sha kon la, man mba ve eren msen, ve sen aôndo u a fetyô u yiman ga la." 
Isaiah45:21 Pase nen, due nen a mi; ve̱ hen kwagh ayol a ve: Ka anti nan tese kwagh ne, hii sha ayange a tsuaa la je? Ka anti nan pase kwagh ne sha ayange a tsuaa la? Kera ka Mo TER gaa? Ma aôndo ugen kpaa ngu ga, saa Mo; Aôndo u jighilii man u yiman kpaa ngu ga, saa Mo." 
Isaiah45:22 Gema nen her a Mo, i̱ yima ne, ne akighir a tar cii; gadia M ngu Aôndo, mô ugen kpaa ngu ga." 
Isaiah45:23 M bum iyol Yam je, kwaghperapera due sha zwa Wam, kwaghôron u una kera hide ga yô, M kaa Mer: Ka Mo je, hanma inyu ia gulem inya, man hanma nombor kpaa ua bum ye." 
Isaiah45:24 Ka ken TER tseegh, kape á ôr kwagh sha a Mo la er, perapera kua agee a lu ye; ka her a Na je ior vea va ye; kpa mba asema a vihi ve a Na cii, kunya ua kôr ve." 
Isaiah45:25 Ka ken TER tsombor u Iserael cii ua zua a perapera, ua ta ihagh kpaa ye." 
Isaiah46:1 Bel gba inya, Nebo ngurum; ieev vev mbi sha uzendenya kua sha uile; akaa a ne tee ne zenden a mi la, hingir ikav mbi yuhwan uzendenya mba ve ver yô." 
Isaiah46:2 Mba ngurum, gulen inya nongo, ve fatyô u yiman ikav mbila ga, ve ayol a ve je kpaa i yem a ve uikangen." 
Isaiah46:3 Ver ato her a Mo, we ya u Yakob, man asande a hen ya u Iserael a a shi her la, ne mba M tee ne, hii sha mmar wen je, mba M tee ne hii ken uya je;" 
Isaiah46:4 zan zan iyol i been kpaa Me lu her nahan vough man zan zan ivu je kpaa, Me tôô ne; ka Mo M lu eren nahan ye, Mo Me tôô, Mo Me kôr, shi Me yima kpaa." 
Isaiah46:5 Ka an, né karem sha a nana, man né verem vough a nana; né karem sha mluyol u ana er se̱ lu kwagh mômô?" 
Isaiah46:6 Ve mba ve haa zenaria u ken ikpa hen inya, man shi ve karen azurfa sha iyôgh ki karen kwagh a min la, ka ve er tôndo a orvarenzenaria er nana̱ er aôndo a mi; maa ve gule inya ve civir!" 
Isaiah46:7 Ka ve tôô un sha avande, ve za a na, ve za ver hen ijiir na; a tile sha, moughon hen ijiir na kera mayange ga. Or á yila un kpaa, una rumun ga, una yima nan ken ican i nan kpaa ga." 
Isaiah46:8 Umbur nen kwagh ne, lu nen nomso; shi hen nen ken ishima, ne mba ne peren atindi." 
Isaiah46:9 Umbur nen aerenakaa a tsuaa la; gadia Mo M ngu Aôndo, mô ugen ngu ga; Mo Aôndo je, mô ugen ngu er Mo nahan ga," 
Isaiah46:10 u M pasen hii sha mhii zan zan mkur, man hii sha ayange a tsuaa la je, akaa a a lu a vande eren ga la; M kaa Mer: Awashima Wam una lu je, Me er kwagh u a doom ken ishima u eren la cii;" 
Isaiah46:11 M yila inyon i tswam sha ityoughkitaregh, or u sha awashima Wam ken tar u caa; M ôr kwagh, Me kure un sha mi vough kpaa; M vande veren ishima sha kwagh, shi Me er un kpaa." 
Isaiah46:12 Ver nen ato her a Mo, ne mbacighirasema, ne mba ne gbe ca a perapera la." 
Isaiah46:13 M ngu kporom a perapera Wam, a gba ca ga, myom Wam kpaa una ngôôr ga, Me na myom ken Shion sha ci u Iserael icivir Yam." 
Isaiah47:1 Hungwa, tema shin vuulevu, we, iniunkwase i Babilon; shar inya, de tem sha ikônough ki torough ga, we, wankwase u Mbakaldi; gadia á kera yila u er u ngu kwase u lun iyol vel vel, u nan fe ican ga, ga." 
Isaiah47:2 Tôô nase, wua mwem; bugh ikondo i yisan ishigh you, kôvor ikondo sha, tor ikondo shin agbelan, per iwagh." 
Isaiah47:3 Á pase idyelegh wou, een, á nenge a kunya wou. Me or iyev, Me tsegha or môm ga." 
Isaiah47:4 Oryiman wase, ka TER u akum a Sha, ka iti Na je la, Icighan u Iserael." 
Isaiah47:5 Tema ving, yem ken ime, we, wankwase u Mbakaldi, gadia á kera yila u er, kpamkwase u ityartor ga." 
Isaiah47:6 Ishima vihim a ior Av, M hôngor a dyako Wam, shi M na ve sha ikev you, mayange u zungwe ve mhôônom ga; mbatamen kpaa u kighir ve igbur you i yuhwan tsung la sha mon." 
Isaiah47:7 Man shi u kaa wer: Me tema kpamkwase gbem; kpa u ver ishima sha akaa ne ga, u kera umbur mkur u a kpaa ga." 
Isaiah47:8 Hegen yô, ungwa kwagh ne, we, u i maan we iyol a ishar i haan iyol la, we, u u tem a mkpeyol, u kaa ken ishima you wer: Mo ne, ugen ngu ga saa mo; me tema kwasecôghol ga, man me fa msaa u ônov kpaa ga;" 
Isaiah47:9 kpa akaa ahar ne aa tser u fese, sha iyange i môm: msaa u ônov man u teman icôghol; aa tser u jimin, shin er ahir a ou a ngee, man akaasôron a ou la a taver nahan kpaa." 
Isaiah47:10 Gadia u suur sha ifer you; u kaa wer: Ma or ngu nengen ga. Mfe wou kua kwaghfan wou la ve tsume a we; man u kaa ken ishima you wer: Mo ne, ugen ngu ga saa mo." 
Isaiah47:11 Ka sha ci u nahan man kwaghbo una tser u ye, ú fa msôr na kpaa ga; kwaghbo una tser u, ú fatyô u mgbeghan un kera ga; mtim kpaa una bur u, kwagh u u fe un ga yô." 
Isaiah47:12 Gba zan hemen a akaasôron a ou kua ahir a ou a a ngee yum ne, a u lu eren tom u zan we iyol sha mi, hii sha iyev ou la je; alaghga ú fatyô u eren ma kwagh, alaghga ú ta mciem iyol!" 
Isaiah47:13 U vôr a mbamhen ou mba kpishiv la; yô, de, mba ve paven Usha, mbanengen asan, mba ve lu ôron we kwagh u á va eren sha iwer iwer la, ve̱ mough ve̱ tile sha, ve̱ yima u sha akaa a á va tser u la." 
Isaiah47:14 Nenge, ve hingir er atighir a toho nahan; usu hia ve kera; ve fatyô u waren ayol a ve sha agee a usu ga; ka akausu a ôson ga, shin usu u á tema hen u kpaa ga." 
Isaiah47:15 Kape akaa a u ye ican i nyoon iyol sha mi, aa lu her a we la; mba ve teen we kasua hii sha iyev ou la, vea yem hanma or hen ijiir i nan; ma or nana lu u yiman we ga." 
Isaiah48:1 Ungwa nen kwagh ne, we ya u Yakob, ne mba ne yer ayol a en sha iti i Iserael yô, man ne dugh ken mngerem ma Yuda, ne mba ne bumun iti i TER, man ne teren Aôndo u Iserael, kpa i lu sha mimi ga, shin sha perapera kpaa ga." 
Isaiah48:2 Gadia mba yer ayol a ve er, ior i icighangar, ve suur sha Aôndo u Iserael, TER u akum a Sha, ka iti Na je la." 
Isaiah48:3 Akaa a tsuaa la, M tsenga pasen a je, ka ken zwa Wam a dugh ye, M tese a, M kure a fese je, a er kera kpaa." 
Isaiah48:4 Gadia M fa, u taver ityough, mon wou ka gbelaiyôgh, man icul you ka togula je;" 
Isaiah48:5 Ka nahan M tsengapasen we akaa ne ngise ye, er lu a kuma ga je, M tese u a, sha u we de va kaan wer: Ka eev av mbu er a, ga; shin eev av mbu gban a gba, shin eev av mbu keren a ker mbu ve a a kpaa, ga." 
Isaiah48:6 U vande ungwan akaa ne; yô, kenger ase akaa ne cii; nahan ne kpaa, ne kera pase akaa ne gaa? Hii hegen je zan zan, Me tese u akaa a he, akaa a ken myer, a u vande fan a ga yô." 
Isaiah48:7 I gba a hegen, ka ngise ga; er i lu a kuma sha iyange ngin ga yô, u vande ungwan kwagh u a je ga; sha u we de va kaan wer: Nenge, m vande fan a, ga." 
Isaiah48:8 Een, u ungwa ga; een, u fa ga; een, ato ou vande bughun tsuaa kpaa ga; gadia M fa er u eren kwagh sha atseregh yum yô, i yila u er, orhendankwagh, er u lu ken uya je." 
Isaiah48:9 Sha ci u iti Yam yô, Me ngôôr a iyugh Yam, sha ci u iwuese Yam yô, Me wa ishima a we, Me tim u ga." 
Isaiah48:10 Nenge, M wanger we, kpa ka er azurfa nahan ga; M kar u ken atse a usu u ican." 
Isaiah48:11 Ka sha ci Wam iyol Yam, ka sha ci Wam iyol Yam, Me er kwagh ne ye, gadia á er nan man Me rumun Mer, i̱ hôngor a iti Yama? Icivir Yam kpaa Me na orgen ga." 
Isaiah48:12 Ver ato her a Mo, we Yakob, man Iserael u M yila u; ka Mo je ne; Mo M ngu u hiihii, shi M ngu u masetyô kpaa." 
Isaiah48:13 Ka uwegh Agh je ku tim imagh ki taregh ye; uwegh Agh ku yanegh samber Usha; zum u ka Mea yila ve yô, ve mough ve tile sha imôngo." 
Isaiah48:14 Kohol nen imôngo, ne cii, ver nen ato; ka anti ker a ven nan pase akaa angara? Un u a doo TER ishima la, una er ishima na sha Babilon, man uwegh nagh kpaa kua lu sha Mbakaldi." 
Isaiah48:15 Mo, Mo, M ôr kwagh, een, Mo M yila un; Ka Mo M ve a na ye; ikôr ia lagh un sha gbenda na kpaa." 
Isaiah48:16 Kporom nen her a Mo, ungwa nen kwagh ne: sha hiihii je M ôr kwagh ken myer ga; zum u kuma u kwagh la una er yô, Mo M lu heregh je; hegen Ter AÔNDO tindim kua Jijingi Na." 
Isaiah48:17 TER Orpaan wou, Icighan u Iserael, ngu kaan nahan er: Mo M ngu TER Aôndo wou, M tese u kwagh u una lu u a inja yô, M hemen we sha gbenda u ú zende sha mi la." 
Isaiah48:18 Ma u ver ato sha atindi Am, tsô bem wou ma a lu er ifi nahan, man shi perapera wou kpaa ma a lu er agôndo a zegemnger nahan," 
Isaiah48:19 man shi tsombor wou ma u lu er waarawa nahan, man ônov mba iyav ou kpaa er ka sam u waarawa yô; ma i gber iti na kera ga, ma i tim i sha ishigh Yagh kera kpaa ga." 
Isaiah48:20 Due nen ken Babilon kera, yevese nen Mbakaldi; pase nen sha imo i icam je, kaa nen kwagh ne, yôô nen un zan zan ikighir i tar, kaa nen ner: TER paa wanakiriki Na Yakob." 
Isaiah48:21 Imura kôr ve, zum u A hemen ve ken udeserti la, ga; A er mngerem due ken vande sha ci ve; A pav vande, tsô mngerem gba kuwan." 
Isaiah48:22 Ma bem kera ngu sha ci u aferaior ga, kape TER A kaa la." 
Isaiah49:1 Ungwa nen kwagh Wam, ne ityar i hen kpezegemnger, ver nen ato ne akuraior a ken ca; TER yilam ken uya je, ka ken iyav mbu ngôm je A ter iti Yam ye;" 
Isaiah49:2 A er zwa Wam hingir er sanker u esen nahan, A yerem ken mure u ikevwe Na; A gemam M hingir ivaan i horon, A kosom ken gbande Na;" 
Isaiah49:3 man shi A kaa a mo er: U ngu Wanakiriki Wam, Iserael, U Me pase icivir Yam ken a we yô." 
Isaiah49:4 Kpa Mo M kaa Mer, M ya ican gbilin, M vihi agee Am gbilin dang tsô; nahan kpaa u kuren Mo ijir sha mimi yô, ka TER, injar Yam kpaa ngi hen Aôndo Wam." 
Isaiah49:5 Hegen yô, Ter ngu kaan, TER u A erem je er M lu ngôm ken uya, sha u M̱ lu Wanakiriki Na, M̱ hide a Yakob her a Na, sha u Iserael a̱ kohol her a Na yô—i civir Mo sha ashe a TER, Aôndo Wam kpaa hingir agee Am—" 
Isaiah49:6 A kaa er: Kwagh ne yina sha a We sha u Ú lu Wanakiriki Wam sha u moughon a ikwe i Yakob sha, man u hiden a mba ve wer ken Iserael la, M ver Ú lu Wanakiriki Wam sha u moughon a ikwe i Yakob sha, man u hiden a mba ve wer ken Iserael la, M ver U Mer, lu iwanger i akuraior, sha u myom Wam a̱ ar zan zan ken ikighir i tar je." 
Isaiah49:7 TER, Orpaan u Iserael, Icighan na ngu kaan a Or u i laha Un yum A ndôhôr ior asema la, Wanakiriki u mbatarev la er: Utor vea nenge vea mough sha, atiator kpaa nahan, vea gule inya vea civir, sha ci u TER u A lu u jighjigh, Icighan u Iserael, u A tsough U yô." 
Isaiah49:8 TER ngu kaan nahan er: Sha shighe u doon yô, M rumun We, man sha iyange i myom kpaa, M wase U; Me kura U kpaa, Me ver U Ú lu ikuryan i ior sha u moughon a tar sha, man sha u nan ve dyako u i vande vihin un kera la;" 
Isaiah49:9 man sha u kaan a mbakwarev er: Due nen, man a mba ve lu ken ime er: Va nen ken igbar. Vea ya kwagh sha igbenda; man sha agungu a kpuun kpuun kpaa vea zua a ajiir a yan kwagh." 
Isaiah49:10 Ijen ia kôr ve ga shin imura kpaa ga; mtsee u ahumbe a tseen man oo kpaa ua ta ve ga; gadia u A zungu ve mhôônom la, Una hemen ve, Una hemen ve gbenda, Una za a ve hen amboramnger." 
Isaiah49:11 Iwo Yam cii kpaa Me gema i ia hingir gbenda, akômaigbinda Am kpaa aa hingir sha gunguluu." 
Isaiah49:12 Nenge, mban ka ken ica ve dugh ye; mbala ka ken imbusutarimese man shin ityôtar kpaa; shi mbagenev ka ken tar u Shinim ve dugh ye." 
Isaiah49:13 Ember nen ne Usha; we tar, ember; ger nen atsam, ne iwo; gadia TER sur ior Nav ishima, A zungwe mba Nav mba ve ye ican la mhôônom." 
Isaiah49:14 Kpa Shion kaa er: TER tam kera, m hungul TER kera kpaa." 
Isaiah49:15 Wan u man atumba una hungul ngô na je kpa, mhôônom maa kôr un a wan u a dugh ken iyav nav la gaa? Shin ve yô, á hungul ve, kpa Mo yô, ú hungul Mo ga." 
Isaiah49:16 Nenge, M gber u sha akevaveegh Am; ukpekpe ou kpaa mbam sha ishi gbem." 
Isaiah49:17 Ônov ou mba van fefa; mba ve tim u man mba ve saren we la, vea due her a we kera." 
Isaiah49:18 Kende ashe ou sha, jinge kera, man nenge; ve cii mba kohol imôngo, mba van her a we. Er M lu u uma yô, kape TER kaa la, mimi je ú wuha iyol sha a ve cii er ka ikav mbi hweev yô, man ú zer ve iyol er ka kwasehe nahan." 
Isaiah49:19 Gadia atse a agar a ou man ajiir a ou a a hingir gbilin, man tar wou u i vihi u kera la, mimi je hegen á imbishi we sha ci u mngee u ior mba ve tem ken a we; man mba ve mena u la vea gba ica." 
Isaiah49:20 Mbayev ou mba yan i kura ve kera la, vea kaa sha ato a ou er: Ijiir ne ndahar mo, nam ian m̱ tema." 
Isaiah49:21 Nahan ú kaa ken ishima you wer: Ka an nan marem mbana, gadia i vande kuran mo mbayev kera, m hingir gbilin man orkwar, or u i gbihi nan kera? Ka an nan koso mbana? Nenge, i undum tswen; mban yô, ve lu hana?" 
Isaiah49:22 Ter AÔNDO ngu kaan nahan er: Nenge, Me kende uwegh Agh sha akuraior, Me tim tuta Wam sha ishigh ki akuraior, vea va a ônov ou mba nomso sha ikum, ônov ou mba kasev kpaa á tôô ve sha avande." 
Isaiah49:23 Utor vea lu uter ou mba kuran we, man ashagba a ukase a ve vea lu ungô mba koson we; vea gule u sha ishi, vea kuma ishiv vev inya, vea ndiar ihundu i shin angahar a ou; tsô ú fa er M lu TER, mba ve veren ashe Mo vea va ahenge ga ye." 
Isaiah49:24 Á fatyô u yan orutaha ishara? Shin mbakwarev mba ipilaor vea waraa? 
Isaiah49:25 TER ngu kaan nahan er: Mbakwarev mba orutaha je kpaa á ngohol ve kera, man ishar i ipilaor kpaa ia war, Kpa Mo Me hendan a mba ve hendan a we yô, Me yima ônov ou kpaa." 
Isaiah49:26 Mba ve kighir we a ican la, Mo Me na ve inyam ve vea ya; vea hunde sha awambe a ve ayol a ve kpaa, er ka sha wain u nyohon nahan; man uuma cii vea fa er Mo, TER, M lu Oryiman wou man Orpaan wou kpaa ye, Uageegh u Yakob." 
Isaiah50:1 TER ngu kaan nahan er: Takerada u paven ivôson i ngôu, u M te kera la, ngu hana? Man shi ka hanma or u yaren Mo injô, M tee nan we? Nenge, ka sha ci u akaabo a en i tee ne ye, man ka sha ci u afer a en man i te ngô wen kera kpaa ye." 
Isaiah50:2 Ka sha ci u u nyi man zum u M va la, M kohol ma or ga? Zum u M yila kpaa, ma or vengese ga? Uwegh Agh kôvor, je kua kera fatyô u paan gaa? Shin M ngu a tahav mbu Me yiman gaa? Nenge, sha mzehe Wam ka M uma zegemnger, ka M gema uifi ve hingir desereti, ishu ve kpaa i human sha ci u mngerem ma ga yô, i kpe sha ci u imura." 
Isaiah50:3 Ka M cir Usha sha angôghime, M gema ibashôhô hingir ve ikondo i cirin." 
Isaiah50:4 Ter AÔNDO nam nombor u ior mba henen kwagh, sha u Me fa er Me suwe wen u a ver la, sha kwaghôron yô. Hanma sev ka A nderem, ka A bughum ato er M̱ ungwa er ior mba henen kwagh nahan." 
Isaiah50:5 Ter Aôndo bugh ato Am, M hendan ga, M hide ijime kpaa ga." 
Isaiah50:6 M gema ijime Yam M na mbagbidyen, ahenge Am kpaa M na mbagbelanice; M yer ishigh Yagh kera sha u cian kunya kua azer a haan ga." 
Isaiah50:7 Kpa Ter AÔNDO wasen Mo; nahan yô, kunya kôrom ga; ka nahan kpaa M ver ishigh Yagh er ka iwen i gberusu nahan, shi M fe, Me va ahenge kpaa ga ye." 
Isaiah50:8 Wen u a nem ishô la, ngu ikua ikua; ka an je i sar nan u yilan Mo ijiri? Sé mough nen sha imôngo! Ka an nan lu orhendan a moo? Nana̱ kporom ase her a Mo." 
Isaiah50:9 Nenge, Ter AÔNDO wasen Mo; ka an je nana nam ibo? Nenge, ve cii vea hingir mbabeenyol er ikondo nahan; ivina ia ya ve." 
Isaiah50:10 Ka anti wen nan lu u cian TER, nan we iko sha imo i Wanakiriki Naa? Zum u nan zenden ken ime man nan lu a iwanger kpaa ga yô, nana̱ suur sha iti i TER, nana̱ lian ken Aôndo u nan kpaa." 
Isaiah50:11 Yô, ne mba ne keer usu cii, mba ne zeren akagh a usu iyol, zende nen ken nomborusu wen, man ken akagh a usu a ne tsar yô. Ka sha ikev Yam je kwagh ne una tser ne ye: nea yav inya a mnyoonom iyol." 
Isaiah51:1 Ver nen ato her a Mo, ne mba ne ze a perapera ityô, ne mba ne keren TER; nenge nen sha vande u i tsehe ne ker yô, man shin ihungwa henpe i tim ne yô." 
Isaiah51:2 Nenge nen sha Aberaham ter wen kua Sara u a mar ne la, gadia zum u a lu tswen la, M yila un, M ver un doo doo, M ser un iyenge." 
Isaiah51:3 Gadia TER sur Shion ishima, A sur atse a agar a na cii ishima, A gema desereti na hingir er ka Eden nahan, taaikôngo na kpaa er ka sule u TER yô; á zua a msaanyol kua iember her, ishughun kua imo i icam kpaa." 
Isaiah51:4 Ver nen ishima her a Mo, ne ior Av, ver nen ato her a Mo, we ikurior Yam; gadia ityesen ia due her a Mo, Me ver mimi Wam una hingir iwanger i akuraior." 
Isaiah51:5 Mhembe Wam mgbôghom, myom Wam due ken igbar, ave Am aa ôr akuraior ijir; ityar i hen kpe u zegemnger ia keghem, ia suur sha uwegh Agh." 
Isaiah51:6 Kende nen ashe a en sha Usha, nenge nen shin tar, gadia Usha vea kar kera er mnyim nahan, tar kpaa ua bee iyol er ikondo yô, mba ve tem shin u kpaa, vea kpe er amunan nahan; kpa myom Wam una lu gbem sha won man á kar a perapera Wam kera kpaa ga." 
Isaiah51:7 Ver nen ato her a Mo ne mba ne fe perapera, ne ior mba atindi Am a lu ken asema a en yô; de cie nen mlaha u ior ga, ishima i̱ de nyian ne sha ci u ityuhwanev vev mbi tuhwan kpaa ga." 
Isaiah51:8 Gadia ivina ia ya ve er ikondo nahan, ijôô kpaa ia ya ve er ul nahan; kpa perapera Wam una tsôr gbem sha won, myom Wam kpaa una lu sha ikov ikov cii." 
Isaiah51:9 Nder, nder wa agee iyol, we, uwegh ku TER; nder er sha ayange a atsuaa la nahan, a sha ikov i ngise la. Kera ka We U paa Rahabi avur avur, shi U kuma darakon kpaa gaa?" 
Isaiah51:10 Ka We U uma zegemnger, mngerem ma zan tsung la; man U gema aiv a zegemnger, hingir gbenda sha ci u mba i paa ve, ve̱ per gaa?" 
Isaiah51:11 Mba TER A paa ve la vea hide, vea nyôr ken Shion a atsam zwa, iember i tsôron ia lu ve sha ityo, vea zua a iember kua msaanyol, ishimavihin man ishimashirin ia yevese kera." 
Isaiah51:12 Ka Mo, M surun ne ishima ye! Ka nyi man we u cie or u nana va kpe man wan u or u á gema nan á hingir er toho kpaa yôô?" 
Isaiah51:13 man TER u A gbe u la hungul we, Un u A samber Usha, man A tim imagh ki taregh la; man u shi cian didi sha ci u iyugh i orkighir, zum u a kohol iyol sha u timin la. Nahan iyugh i orkighir ngi han hegen ase?" 
Isaiah51:14 Orkwar u nan var inya la á pase nan á tuhwa fese, nana kpe ga, nana sen shin ihungwa ga, kwaghyan u nan kpaa una ban nan ga." 
Isaiah51:15 Gadia Mo M ngu TER, Aôndo wou, ka M kpianger zegemnger, je agôndo a na a ta kume; TER u akum a Sha, ka iti Yam je la." 
Isaiah51:16 M ver akaaôron a Am ken zwa wou, M yer u ken mure u ikevwe Yam; M samber Usha, M tim imagh ki taregh, M kaa a Shion kpaa Mer: Ne mba ior Av je." 
Isaiah51:17 Nder, nder, mough tile sha, we Yerusalem, we u u me iyongo i iyugh sha ikev i TER; u ma iyongo i nan zuzu, u ma i ndeera." 
Isaiah51:18 Ônov nav mba a mar cii, mô u hemen un gbenda nan ngu ga; ônov nav mba a yese cii kpaa, mô u kôron un uwegh nan ngu ga." 
Isaiah51:19 Akaa a ahar ne á tser u; ka anti nana zungwe we? Myôhôr kua mtim man ijen kua sanker; Me er nan man Me sur u ishima? 
Isaiah51:20 Ônov ou hume, ve yav sha ityouv mbi igbendav mbi ken gar cii er ka ashim u ken kper nahan; ve iv a iyugh i TER, mzehe u Aôndo wou." 
Isaiah51:21 Nahan yô, shi ungwa ase kwagh ne, we u ican i tser u ne, we orhunden ne, kpa ka sha wain ga;" 
Isaiah51:22 Teru, TER, Aôndo wou, u A te ikaa ken ior Nav sha kwagh u tseren ve la, ngu kaan nahan er: Nenge, M ngohol iyongo i nan zuzu sha uwegh ough kera, ka kuca u iyugh Yam je la, mayange ú kera kimbir u man u ga;" 
Isaiah51:23 Me gema u, Me na sha ikev i mba ve eren we ican la; ve mba ve kaan a we er: Ngurum nen, sé unde sha a ven; man u gema ijime you hingir er inya nahan, man er ka gbenda u mba ve zenden sha u yô." 
Isaiah52:1 Nder, nder, we Shion, wa agee a ou iyol, haa akondo a ou a dedoo, we Yerusalem, icighangar; gadia ken hemen yô, oripusu man orhôngorough vea kera nyôr ken a we ga." 
Isaiah52:2 Nduur ihundu iyol kera; mough, tema sha, we Yerusalem; sagh ikangenev sha mon wou kera, we wankwase u kwaregh u Shion." 
Isaiah52:3 Gadia TER ngu kaan nahan er: I tee ne gbilin, nahan á paa ne sha inyar kpaa ga." 
Isaiah52:4 Gadia Ter AÔNDO ngu kaan nahan er: Hiihii la ior Av za ken Igipiti, za lu shir ker, man Mbaashiria er ve ican sha ityôikaa ga." 
Isaiah52:5 Nahan hegen yô, ka nyi M lu a mi heene, kape TER A pin la, er i gbe kuran ior Av kera gbilin nahana? Mba ve ye tor sha a ve mba eren akenge, kape TER A kaa la, man hanma sev kpaa mba shi tuhwan iti Yam." 
Isaiah52:6 Nahan ior Av vea fa iti Yam; sha iyange la vea fa er i lu Mo, M er kwagh yô; Mo M ngun heen ne." 
Isaiah52:7 Angahar a or u nan ve a loho u dedoo, a doo u nengen a mi sha iwo tsô, u nan yee bem, u nan ve a loho u dedoo, u nan yee myom, man nan kaa a Shion er: Aôndo wou ya tor!" 
Isaiah52:8 Ungwa! imo i mbakuran we! Mba genger imo, mba wan icam imôngo, gadia mba nengen sha ashe ve je, er TER A lu hiden hen Shion yô." 
Isaiah52:9 Ger nen iember, wa nen icam imôngo, ne atse a ayou a ken Yerusalem ne, gadia TER sur ior Nav asema, A paa Yerusalem." 
Isaiah52:10 TER bugh icighanwe Na sha ashe a akuraior cii; akighir a tar cii kpaa, aa nenge myom u Aôndo wase." 
Isaiah52:11 Mough nen, mough nen, due nen ken ijiir la kera, de benden nen ma kwagh u hôngorough ave ga; due nen ker atô na kera; wanger nen ayol a en, ne mbatôôn ikav mbi TER." 
Isaiah52:12 Gadia nea due fele fe fele ga, nea yevese a yevese kpaa ga; gadia TER Una kar Una hemen ne, Aôndo u Iserael kpaa Una lu orkuran wen ken ijime." 
Isaiah52:13 Nenge, á kpe Wanakiriki Wam iyol, á na Un icivir, á kende Un sha tsung je." 
Isaiah52:14 Er ior kpishi i kpiligh ve iyol a We— mluashe Na vihi je, kera bee er ka or ga nahan, man mlu u iyol na kpaa kera bee mlu u ônov mba iorov ga—" 
Isaiah52:15 kape Una cier akuraior iyol kpishi la; utor vea kusu ijô ve sha ci Na, gadia kwagh u i lu a kaa ve ga je, vea nenge, kwagh u ve lu a ungwa ga kpaa, vea kav un." 
Isaiah53:1 Ka an je nan ne kwagh u i pase se la jighjighii? Man i pase uwegh ku TER hen ana? 
Isaiah53:2 Gadia A vese sha ishigh Nagh er zamkon nahan, man er mise u shin inya i ombor yô, lu a ma mkomashe, shin icivir i sé kenger Un ga, lu a ma dooashe u Una sar se kpaa ga." 
Isaiah53:3 I laha Un, ior kpaa ta Un kera; lu or u yan ican, hool Un a angev kpaa, A lu er or u ior ve gem ishiv vev hen nan kera yô; i laha Un man se kpaa se wa Un iko ga." 
Isaiah53:4 Mimi je, ka angev asev je A tee sha iyol Na ye, atsan ase kpaa A tôô a; kpa se yô, lu se er kwagh tser Un a tser je yô, man er Aôndo kpaa tsaha Un, shi A kighir Un a ican kpaa yô." 
Isaiah53:5 Kpa i kuma Un sha ci u akaabo ase, i vihi Un iyol sha ci u aferakaa a ase; mtsaha u van se a bem la, gema lu sha a Na; ka sha igbidiv Nav man i wanger se ye." 
Isaiah53:6 Se cii se tsume er iyôngo nahan, hanmô wase hulugh sha u zan sha gbenda u nan, kpa TER gema na ibo yase cii i shile sha a Na." 
Isaiah53:7 I er Un ican je, nahan kpaa A rumun er i̱ hee Un, zwa tsô kpaa A bugh ga; er waniyôngo u i ze a mi sha u za sôngon yô, man er iyôngo ka i lu ving sha ishigh ki mbatôndon i aive nahan, kape A bugh zwa Na ga la." 
Isaiah53:8 I tôô Un ken mkighir u sha ican kua ijirôron kera; man kov Na yô, ka anti je nan hen er i gber Un ken tar u mbaumav kera? Lu sha ci u atindi a peren a ior av, kwaghbo tser Un ye." 
Isaiah53:9 I ver Un war a mbaerenakaabo imôngo, kpa ken ku Na yô, A lu a mbanyarev imôngo; gadia A er ma kwagh u ifer ga, icugh kpaa lu Un ken zwa ga." 
Isaiah53:10 Nahan kpaa lu ishima i TER je u vihin Un iyol; A haa Un angev iyol kpaa; shighe u Una gema iyol Na Una na nagh sha mi sha ci u isholibo yô, Una nenge a tsombor Na; Una tsa sha won, man á kpe kwagh u TER A ver ishima sha mi la iyol sha uwegh Nagh;" 
Isaiah53:11 sha mtoghor u uma Na, Una nenge a min je, á kuma Un; sha kwaghfan Na, wanakiriki Wam u perapera la, Una gema ior kpishi vea hingir mbaperapera; Una tôô afer a ve sha iyol Na kpaa." 
Isaiah53:12 Nahan Me na Un kwar a ashagbaior imôngo, Una kar ishar a mbataveryol imôngo kpaa, sha ci u A gbihi uma Na ken ku je, shi i wa Un ken mbaaferev kpaa; nahan kpaa, ka Un je A tee isholibo i ior kpishi sha iyol Na, man A shi A sôn sha ci u mbaaferev kpaa ye." 
Isaiah54:1 Wa atsam, we ikômkwase u u mar ga ne, hii ember sha atsam; genger imo, we u u toghor mar ga ne; gadia ônov mba kwase u a lu tseeneke la, hemba ngeen a mba kwase u lun a nom, kape TER A kaa la." 
Isaiah54:2 Ver ian i tenti wou i̱ gbangese; i̱ naregh akondo a yisan a utenti ou mba u tem ker la; de yangen ga, seer ikor you i̱ lihe, taver amande a ou." 
Isaiah54:3 Gadia ú samber ken iyan kua ken imese kpaa; ka vor wou je ua tema tor sha akuraior ye, agar a i hembe a kera kpaa, ú na ior vea tema ker." 
Isaiah54:4 De cie ga, gadia ú ya kunya ga; i̱ de kondon we iyol kpaa ga, gadia ú va ahenge ga; gadia kunya u iyev ou ua hungul we, iheen you i sha mlu u kwasecôghol la kpaa, ú kera umbur i ga." 
Isaiah54:5 Gadia u A gbe u la, ka nomu je la, iti Na er, TER u akum a Sha je; man Icighan u Iserael ka Orpaan wou; á yila Un er Aôndo u sha won cii." 
Isaiah54:6 Gadia TER yila u er kwase u i gbihi nan kera man ishima i vihi nan ken vanger yô, man er kwase u i er nan iyev man i hir i vende nan yô, kape Aôndo wou A kaa la." 
Isaiah54:7 M gbihi u kera sha anshighe kpeghee tsô, kpa Me hide a we sha mhôônom ma zungwen ma vesen." 
Isaiah54:8 Ka sha ishima i nyoon M yer u ishigh Yagh sha anshighe kpeghee ye; kpa M zungwe u mhôônom sha erdoo u tsôron, kape TER Orpaan wou A kaa la." 
Isaiah54:9 Gadia kwagh ne ngum er sha ayange a Noa la nahan; er M bum Mer, mngerem ma deemee ma Noa maa kera cir tar mayange ga nahan kape M bum Mer Me kera yuwe ga je la, mzehe kpaa Me zôhô a we ga." 
Isaiah54:10 Shin iwo ia kar kera, man agungu kpaa aa kpegher nahan kpaa erdoo Wam a we yô, una kar hen a we kera ga; ikuryan Yam i bem kpaa ia kpegher ga, kape TER u A zungu u mhôônom, A kaa la." 
Isaiah54:11 We u ican i tser u, man ijeverahumbe kpaa a te sha a we, u lu a ishima i surun ga ne, yô, nenge, Mo Me maa awen a ou sha inya i engem, Me tim imagh you sha usafir." 
Isaiah54:12 Me er ityouv mbi ayoughouv ou sha urubi, ihindagar you kpaa sha ukarbunkel, man gilgar wou cii kpaa á lu sha awen a injaa." 
Isaiah54:13 Ônov ou ci ca kpaa vea lu mba TER A tese ve yô; mkpeyol u ônov ou kpaa una vese je. 
Isaiah54:14 Ka sha perapera ú tile taveraa ye; fa er u gbe ica a mkighir u sha ican yô, gadia gba u ú cia ga; man u gbe ica a kwagh u tan mciem iyol kpaa, gadia una sosom a we ga." 
Isaiah54:15 Aluer ior mba kpoghol num kpaa, ka Mo M ne zwa ga, hanmôv mba vea kohol vea mough num a we yô, vea ta sha a we vea kar á za gba." 
Isaiah54:16 Nenge, ka Mo je M gbe orvareniwa u suwen akpa a iwaagh sha akausu man nan var ityumugh ki tswamegh sha mfetom u nan la; man ka Mo kpaa M gbe ortiminakaa sha u nana tim akaa ye." 
Isaiah54:17 Hanma ityumugh ki i var sha ci u vihin we iyol, ikôl ia lagh ki ga; hanma zwa u ua mough ua hendan a we sha ijir kpaa, ú hemba u. Kwagh ne ka dyako u mbayev mba TER kua perapera ve u a dugh her a Mo je ne, kape TER A kaa la." 
Isaiah55:1 Ne mba imura i ker ne cii, va nen hen mnger, kua u nan lu a inyaregh je ga kpaa; va nen, va yam nen, ya nen, een, va nen, va yam nen wain kua atumbabua, á lu sha inyar ga, man sha ishe i wan kpaa ga." 
Isaiah55:2 Ka nyi man ne vihin inyaregh sha kwagh u a lu kwagh u yan ga, man tom wen u tsung kpaa sha kwagh u a lu u yan kuman ga nahana? Ver nen ato her a Mo, sule nen iyol sha u ungwan, ya nen kwagh u a lu u dedoo yô, man i̱ doo uma wen iyol a taryan u wan ahôm." 
Isaiah55:3 Ver nen ato, va nen her a Mo; ungwa nen, uma wen u ken ishima a̱ lu uma; Me ya ikur i tsôron a ven, ka mhôônom ma zungwen ma i zungu Davidi ma bunden mayange ga la." 
Isaiah55:4 Nenge, M ver un Mer, a̱ lu shiada hen ior a̱ lu orhemen man orwan akuraior kwagh." 
Isaiah55:5 Nenge, wea yila ikurior i u fe i ga, ikurior i i fe u ga kpaa, ia va her a we ayem, sha ci u TER, Aôndo wou, man sha ci u Icighan u Iserael; gadia A civir we." 
Isaiah55:6 Ker nen TER er ian i zuan a Na i lu her yô, yila nen Un er A lu ikua ikua ne." 
Isaiah55:7 Iferor nana̱ undu gbenda u nan; u nan lu perapera ga kpaa, nana̱ gbihi mbamhen mba nan kera, nana̱ hide hen TER, tsô Una zungwe nan mhôônom, man hen Aôndo wase, gadia Un deen kwaghbo wuee." 
Isaiah55:8 Gadia mbamhen Av ka mbamhen enev ga, igbenda yen kpaa ka igbenda Yam ga, kape TER A kaa la." 
Isaiah55:9 Gadia er Usha ve tav sha ve gbe ica a tar nahan, kape igbenda Yam i tav i hembe igbenda yen la, mbamhen Av kpaa ve hembe mba enev je la." 
Isaiah55:10 Gadia er ura kua senou ka ve sen shin inya, ve kera hide Sha ga, kpa ve gema ve ndôhôr tar, ve na u, u mende akaa, u hôm, u na orlôôn ivor, shi u na oryankwagh ruam," 
Isaiah55:11 kape kwaghôron Wam, u a dugh ken zwa Wam, una lu la, una hide her a Mo gbilin ga, kpa una er kwagh u M we ishima yô, ikôr ia lagh un sha kwagh u M tindi un u eren yô." 
Isaiah55:12 Gadia nea due a iember, man á hemen ne a bem; iwo kua agungu vea ger icam i wan sha ishigh yenegh, ikon i ken toho cii kpaa ia kure ave." 
Isaiah55:13 Kon u fer ua mende sha ityough ki saa, kon u mertel ua mende di sha ityough ki sagher; kwagh ne una hingir TER iti, icôronikav i á vihi i kera mayange je ga yô." 
Isaiah56:1 TER ngu kaan nahan er: Waan nen ijirôron iko, eren nen perapera; gadia myom Wam mgbôghom u van kua perapera Wam kpaa, sha u á pase un." 
Isaiah56:2 Saan or u nan eren nahan la, iyol, man wan u or u nan taver ishima sha mi la, u nan kor iyange i memen sha u hôngor i ga, man nan ze uwegh sha u eren ma kwaghbo kpaa ga yô." 
Isaiah56:3 Man or u ken nongo ugen u nan nyer nongo a TER kpaa, nana̱ de kaan er mimi je TER una pavem a ior Nav, ga; man or u nan lu icôngonor kpaa, nana̱ de kaan er: Nenge, mo kon u ombor m ngun ne, ga." 
Isaiah56:4 Gadia TER ngu kaan sha kwagh u mba i tsenge ve ve hingir uicôngonmbaiorov la, mba ve kor ayange a memen am, man mba ve tsough akaa a doon Mo, ve taver ishima sha ikuryan Yam kpaa la, er:" 
Isaiah56:5 Ka ken iyou Yam man ken atô u ukpekpe Av Me ver ve ikav i umbur ve, man iti i i hembe doon a ônov mba nomso kua mba kasev kpaa ye; Me na ve icôronti u una bee mayange ga yô." 
Isaiah56:6 Man ior mba ken nongo ugen, mba ve nyer nongo a TER sha u vea er Un tom man sha u iti i TER ia doo ve ishima man sha u vea lu mbatomov Nav kpaa, hanmô u nan kor iyange i memen sha u hôngor i ga, man nan taver ishima sha ikuryan Yam yô," 
Isaiah56:7 Me va a ve hen icighanwo wam je, Me na, á saan ve iyol ken iyou Yam i msen, iniav vev mbi nanden man iniav vev mbi sôngon kpaa á rumun mbi sha atse Am a nanden nagh sha mi; gadia á yila iyou Yam er iyou i msen sha ci u akuraior cii." 
Isaiah56:8 Ter AÔNDO u A kohol Iserael mba ve sambe la, ngu kaan er: Mbagenev kpaa Me kohol ve, á seer ve sha mba nav mba i vande kohol la." 
Isaiah56:9 Ne inyamtoho cii, va ya nen! Een, ne inyam i ken ikô cii." 
Isaiah56:10 Mbakuran nav cii ka mbaapirashe, ve cii mba a mfe ga, ve cii ka iwa i kondon aker je, ve fatyô u gbehen ga, mnyam ma cien ve, ve yaven inya, doo ve u meer mnyam." 
Isaiah56:11 Een, iwa i eren hua, mayange ngi fe iden ga; ve ka mbakuranilev mba ve fe u veren ishima sha kwagh ga yô; ve cii ve hurugh, hanmô ve ngu yemen gbenda u nan je, hanmô ve, hen mtsera u nan, ve cii mba kwagh môm tsô." 
Isaiah56:12 Va nen (kape ve kaa la) me za va a wain, sé ma msôrom ma yuwan sé ide nen; kper kpaa á lu er nyian nahan, á lu iyange i vesen je, á gande." 
Isaiah57:1 Orperapera ka nan saa kera, kpa ma or nan wa iko her ga; mba tôôn mba ve we Aôndo iko mbala kera, kpa ma or nan kera hen ken ishima i nan er i lu sha ci u palegh kwaghbo man i tee orperapera kera nahan ga;" 
Isaiah57:2 nan kar nan nyôr ken bem; mba memen sha ugambe vev, hanmô u nan lu zenden jighilaa yô." 
Isaiah57:3 Kpa ne yô, kporom nen heen, ne ônov mba kwase u eren ahir, vor u idyaor man u agbaga." 
Isaiah57:4 Ka an ne neen iyar sha nanaa? Man ka an ne aver zwa, ne dughun nombor sha nanaa? Ka ne ônov mba peren atindi, vor u aiegh ne gaa?" 
Isaiah57:5 Ne mba asaren a iyolough a mgbegh ne hen ikon i terebin, shin itine i hanma kon u ndor yô; ne mba ne woo mbayev shin pev, shin ikwe i avande kpaa." 
Isaiah57:6 Ci wou ngu hen awen a kôngor a shin pev, ka a je alu kwar wou je ye, ka a je u hee a nagh ku man shi u ve a a nagh ku sha samuyia kpaa ye. Nahan Me rumun akaa angana?" 
Isaiah57:7 U tar gambe wou sha uwo u taven u kenden sha; ka shaala je, u undu u za ne nagh ku sôngon ye." 
Isaiah57:8 Ken ijime i ihinda man ikpandeihinda u ver ikav i umbur we a mi; gadia er u undum kera u bugh gambe wou, u unde sha mi, u gbanger un kpaa, u ôr injar a mba gambe ve a doo u ishima la, u nenge a idyelegh ve kpaa." 
Isaiah57:9 U za hen Moleki kpaa a mkurem ma ishin, man shi u seer mkurem ou ma human doon ma ngee, u tindi mbatyomov ou ken ca, ve yem shin, ve za ar shin Sheol je." 
Isaiah57:10 U vôr a zende wou u caa la; nahan kpaa mayange u shi kaa wer, ka iyolnyoon gbilin ga; hide shi taver we iyol, ka nahan man iyol i kera kpe u ga ye." 
Isaiah57:11 Ka an je nan cier we iyol, u cie nan je u nyer eren aie; Mo kpaa, u kera umbur Mo ga, u kera wa iko her kpaa ga. Ka er M huan ving ica i gbe man u kera ciem ga yee?" 
Isaiah57:12 Me pase perapera wou kua aeren a ou kpaa, aa kera lu u a inja ga." 
Isaiah57:13 Zum u u vaa yô, mba u kohol ve la, ve̱ yima u ase; kpa ahumbe aa kura ve kera, iôôn ia kar a mi kera cii; kpa u nan suur sha a Mo yô, nana ya dyako u tar la, shi nana ya dyako u icighanwo Wam kpaa." 
Isaiah57:14 A kaa er: Haa nen inya guree, haa nen inya guree, sôr nen gbenda, tôô nen ityôkwagh i nan gbev mbu nôngon sha gbenda u ior Av kera." 
Isaiah57:15 Gadia u A lu Sha, u A hemba Sha, Un u A tem sha ajiir a tsôron gbem, Un u iti Na i lu Icighanti je yô, ngu kaan nahan er: M tem sha ijiir i Sha i i tsegh i yô, shi M tem hen un u a lu a jijingi u vaan afanyô man u hiden a iyol ijime, man Me nder ishima i mbavaanafanyô la." 
Isaiah57:16 Gadia Me kera zôhô zan zan ga, man shi Me kera yuwe gbem kpaa, ga; gayô jijingi una ule sha ishigh Yagh, kua uuma mba M er la." 
Isaiah57:17 Ka sha ci u ifer i hua na, M yuwe, M gbidye un, M yer ishigh Yagh kera sha ishima i vihin ye; nahan kpaa a hulugh a gba zan gbenda u sha ishima na tsô." 
Isaiah57:18 M nenge igbenda na, Me sôr un una wanger; Me hemen un kpaa; Me shi Me sur un ishima, ka mbanav mba ve zungu je la." 
Isaiah57:19 M gba atam a ityumbuzwaagh; bem, bem sha ci u u nan lu ca la kua sha ci u u nan lu ikua ikua la kpaa, kape TER A kaa la; Me sôr nan nana wanger." 
Isaiah57:20 Kpa aferaior nga er zegemnger u kpianger nahan; gadia fetyô u teman gil gil ga; man mngerem nam ma saar angbiôr kua ihôghonov duen a mi sha. 
Isaiah57:21 Ma bem kera ngu sha ci u aferaior ga, kape Aôndo wam A kaa la." 
Isaiah58:1 Genger imo, de deen ga, kende imo you sha er ka ikpamkor nahan, pase ior Av kwaghbo ve, kua ya u Yakob asorabo a ve." 
Isaiah58:2 Nahan kpaa mba keren Mo ayange ayange man sar ve u fan igbenda Yam, bee er ikurior i eren kwagh u perapera man i undun akaawan a Aôndo ve ga yô, ve gema ve pinem akaawan a perapera, u kporom hen Aôndo kpaa doo ve." 
Isaiah58:3 Ka sha ci u nyi man se her kwaghyan, kpa U kera nenge ga? Ka sha ci u nyi se er uma wase ican, kpa U kera we iko ga? Nenge, sha iyange yen i hôron kwaghyan la, ne gema ne mba eren akaa a en tsô, man ne tsule mbatomov enev cii sha u ve̱ er tom." 
Isaiah58:4 Nenge, ne mba her kwaghyan sha ci u num u nôngon man zwazôhôn, man sha ci u tan iju sha dang, ne mba kera her kwaghyan hegen sha u á ungwa imo yen Sha ga." 
Isaiah58:5 Ka imbakwaghyan i hôron i M tsough la ha? Iyange i or nana er uma u nan ican, je nana wa ityough inya er ikenaika nahan, man nana tar abaasôhô man mtwem hingir gambe u nana? Ka kwagh u u yer wer, kwaghyan u hôron man iyange i doon TER ishima je nee?" 
Isaiah58:6 Kwaghyan u hôron u M tsough yô, kera ka u né sagh ikangenev mbi iferkwagh kera, man né poso igbur, né na mba i kighir ve la ian u yemen, man shi né kever hanma igbur gaa?" 
Isaiah58:7 Shi ka u karen mbagenev kwaghyan wou, man u van a mbaatsanev mba ve lu a ape suur ga hen ya wou gaa?" 
Isaiah58:8 Nahan iwanger you ia due er ka sev mbu aven nahan, man mkpeyol wou una va fefa, perapera wou kpaa una za u sha ishi, iengem i TER kpaa ia yisa u ken ijime." 
Isaiah58:9 Nahan wea yila, TER kpaa Una rumun; wea genger imo kpaa, Una kaa er: Mo ne. Aluer wea dugh igbur i hen a we la kera, man shi hôwe u dughun sha ilyahan kua u ôron kwagh sha ifer kpaa yô;" 
Isaiah58:10 aluer ú na mbagenev kwagh u we kpaa a doo u la, man ú na icanor nan ide, nahan iwanger you ia wanger ken ime, ime You kpaa ia hingir er ka atetan nahan;" 
Isaiah58:11 TER kpaa Una hemen we gbenda gbem zan zan je, Una na uma wou una ide ken ajiir a ombor, Una taver akuhe ou; nahan wea hingir er ka sule u i ur u mngerem yô, man er ka imbor i i om mngerem mayange ga yô." 
Isaiah58:12 Mba ou vea hile á maa agar a ngise i yôhôl la; amagh a ikov i ngise la ú shi ú maa a heregh; á yila u er: Orsôron ukpekpe mba hemben, ornderen igbenda i gar sha ci u teman her." 
Isaiah58:13 Aluer wea hide a nguhar wou ijime sha iyange i memen, wea kera er tom wou sha icighanyange Yam ga, aluer wea yila iyange i memen wer: Ka kwagh u saren mo, man ka icighanyange i TER, kwagh u icivirigh je, man ú civir i, er ú kera za sha igbenda you ga, shin ú ker ian sha ci u tom wou ga, shi ú kera ôr akaa a ou kpaa ga yô," 
Isaiah58:14 nahan ú ember ken TER kpishi, Mo kpaa Me na er ú unde sha ajiir a taven sha, a shin tar, Me koso u sha dyako u teru Yakob kpaa; gadia kape zwa u TER je u kaa ne." 
Isaiah59:1 Nenge, uwegh ku TER ku yina sha u Una yiman ga, ato Na kpaa yuhwa sha u ungwan ga;" 
Isaiah59:2 kpa ka aferakaa a en je a pav ne a Aôndo wen, shi ka asorabo a en kpaa a cir ne ishigh Nagh, er Una ungwa ga ye." 
Isaiah59:3 Gadia ave a en hôngor sha awambe, man ahôaveegh a en kpaa sha iferkwagh; ityumbuzwaagh yen kpaa er aie, nombor wen kpaa ngu er kwagh sha icugh." 
Isaiah59:4 Mô môm nan za yer ijir sha perapera ga, mô môm kpaa nan kpelan ishô sha mimi ga; mba suur sha gbilinkwagh mba er aie; ve jile iyol sha dang, ve mar ifer." 
Isaiah59:5 Ve tsev aji a gbinde, ve tume kper u kperekpetange; u nan ye aji ve la, nan kpe; man i i hembe i yô, igbinde gema due kimi." 
Isaiah59:6 Kwaghtumen ve la una hingir ikondo ga, vea cir ayol a ve sha ityom ve la ga; ityom ve la ka ityom i ifer, man aeren a aperagh nga sha ave ve." 
Isaiah59:7 Angahar a ve nga zan ayem sha u za eren kwaghbo; mba zan fefa sha u za haan awambe a orishôôgh; mbamhen vev ka mbamhen mba ifer tsô, myôhôr kua mtim mba sha igbenda ve." 
Isaiah59:8 Gbenda u bem ve fa u ga; kwagh u vough ngu sha ihange ve ga; ve er igbenda ve gbunô gbu gbunô; hanma or u nana zende sha i yô, nan fa bem ga." 
Isaiah59:9 Ka nahan man ijirôron sha mimi i gbe ca a vese, perapera kpaa a ar sha a vese ga ye, se mba keghen iwanger, kpa ime gema ngi, se mba keghen mmondo u iwanger kpa se mba geman zenden ken angôghime." 
Isaiah59:10 Se mba peven kpekpe yemen er mbaapirashe nahan; een, se mba peven er mba ve lu a ashe ga yô; iyange sha tembe kpaa se mba nôngon gbev er ka shighe u aôndoaimegh yô; se mba ken atô u mbataveryol er ka mbakpenev nahan." 
Isaiah59:11 Se cii, se mba te kume er udwem nahan, se mba vaan zungwen er atii nahan; ka ijirôron i mimi se keghen ye, kpa ngi ga, man myom kpaa, kpa ngu ca a vese." 
Isaiah59:12 Gadia atindi a ase a peren ngee sha ishigh You, asorabo ase kpaa nga nan se ibo; gadia atindi a ase a peren nga a vese ityô, man aferakaa ase kpaa, se fa a," 
Isaiah59:13 ka u peren atindi man u nyiman TER, man u geman kera den u dondon Aôndo wase ityô, u ôron kwagh u mkighir u sha ican man mhendan, u henen akaaôron a aiegh ken ishima man ôron a kpaa." 
Isaiah59:14 Ijirôron i mimi kpaa, i daa i kera, i hide ijime, perapera kpaa tile ca; gadia mimi nôngo gbev gba hen tembejirigh, man perapera kpaa kera zua a gbenda u nyôron ga." 
Isaiah59:15 Een, mimi ngu ga; or u nan kem iyol sha ifer yô, mba ngohol nan akaa sha apera. Tsô TER nenge, vihi Un er kwagh u jighilii a lu ga yô," 
Isaiah59:16 Shi A nenge or môm lu ga, kpiligh Un iyol er ma or u nan paase kwagh nan lu ga yô; ka sha ci u nahan man uwegh Nagh ku wase Un; perapera Na kpaa suwe Un." 
Isaiah59:17 A haa perapera iyol er rigautya u iyôô nahan; idyer i myom ngu Un sha ityou; A haa iyevoron iyol er ka akondo nahan, man A haa gbashima iyol er ka riga u wuhegh nahan." 
Isaiah59:18 Er aeren a ve a lu la, kape Una kimbi ve je la: ishimanyoon sha mbaahendanev Nav, iyevoron sha mbaihomov Nav; Una or iyev sha ityar i hen kpe u zegemnger la." 
Isaiah59:19 Nahan vea cia iti i TER, á hii shin ityôtar je, man iengem Na kpaa hii sha iyangeiduen je; gadia Una va er iwuhamnger i tiaver, i humbe u TER a mgbegh i yô." 
Isaiah59:20 Una va hen Shion sha u va lun Orpaan ve, kua hen ior mba Yakob mba ve gem sha u undun kwaghbo ve la, kape TER A kaa ne." 
Isaiah59:21 TER ngu kaan nahan er: Ikuryan Yam a ve ka i ne: Jijingi Wam u A lu sha a we man akaaôron Am a M we u ken zwa, aa due u ken zwa kera mayange ga, shin sha zwa u tsombor u vor wou kpaa ga, kape TER A kaa la, hii hegen je, zan zan gbem sha won." 
Isaiah60:1 Mough sha, ta iwanger; gadia iwanger you i va, iengem i TER kpaa ngi mondon sha a we." 
Isaiah60:2 Gadia, nenge, ime ia cir tar, man angôghime kpaa una cir akuraior; kpa we yô, TER Una mondo iwanger sha a we, iengem Na kpaa á nenge a i sha we." 
Isaiah60:3 Akuraior aa va hen iwanger you, utor kpaa vea va hen iwanger i i mondo sha a we la."
