Isaiah60:4 Kende ashe, kenger hanma ian, nenge; ve cii mba kohol mba van her a we; ônov ou mba nomso mba moughon ken ica, van her a we, ônov ou mba kasev kpaa, mba van a ve sha ihan." 
Isaiah60:5 Nahan wea nenge man ishigh you kia engem sha iember, ishima you ia tsuwe, ia bugh ia gbanger; gadia inyaregh ki zegemnger kia gema á va hen a we, man akaa a injaa a akuraior kpaa aa va her a we." 
Isaiah60:6 Ikpela i urakumi ia cir u, agumarakumi a Midian kua Efa; ve cii vea due ken Sheba, vea va a zenaria kua kwagh u human doon, vea yôô aeren a TER a a kom iwuese la, saan saan." 
Isaiah60:7 Akumauile a Kedar aa va kohol her a we cii, anomaiyôngo a Nebayoti aa er u tom, aa va, á va hingir nagh ku dedoo sha atse Am a nanden nagh sha mi, man Me civir iyou Yam i icivirigh la." 
Isaiah60:8 Ka unô ne, ve purugh er ibeenegh nahan, man ve ve er mkungum hen ahura a ma nahana?" 
Isaiah60:9 Ityar i hen kpezegemnger ia keghem, utso mba Tarshishi kpaa vea hemen sha u tôôn ônov ou mba ken ica van a ve; mba van a azurfa ve kua zenaria ve a ve imôngo, sha ci u iti i TER, Aôndo wou man sha ci u Icighan u Iserael, gadia A civir we." 
Isaiah60:10 Ior mba ken iniongo igen vea maa ugilgar ou, man utor vev vea er u tom; gadia sha ishima i nyoon Yam M gbidye u, kpa sha erdoo Wam M zungu u mhôônom." 
Isaiah60:11 Ihindagar you kpaa ia luun ivegher gbem, á wuhen i tugh shin tetan kpaa ga, sha u i̱ va u a akaa a injaa a akuraior, kua utor vev kpaa." 
Isaiah60:12 Gadia ikurior vea tartor u ua er u tom ga yô, vea saa ishe, akuraior ngara á tim a purututu." 
Isaiah60:13 Icivir i Lebanon ia va her a we, kon u fer man kon u pelane kua kon u ouki, i cii, sha ci u eren icighanjiir Wam hwe; Me gema ijiir Yam i veren angahar ia lu i icivirigh." 
Isaiah60:14 Ônov mba ior mba ve er u ican yô, vea va her a we agurenu; man mba ve laha u cii, vea shalegh inya hen akevangahar a ou; vea yila u er: Gar u TER, Shion u Icighan u Iserael." 
Isaiah60:15 Er ngise i ta u kera, i kôr u ihom, je ma or kera kar hen we ga, nahan Mo Me gema u, ú hingir kwagh u engem zan zan gbem, man shi kwagh u iember sha ikov ikov." 
Isaiah60:16 Ú ma atumba a akuraior, man shi ú ambe atumba a utor, man ú fa er Mo TER, M lu Oryiman wou man Orpaan wou kpaa, Uageegh u Yakob." 
Isaiah60:17 Me va a zenaria sha ityough ki togula, shi Me va a azurfa sha ityough ki iyôgh, togula sha ityough ki kon, iyôgh sha ityough ki awen. Me ver bem a̱ lu orkurantar wou man perapera a̱ lu ityoor wou." 
Isaiah60:18 Mayange á kera ungwa iperakwagh ken tar wou ga, shin myôhôr shin mtim ken ipaventar wou kpaa ga; wea yila ugilgar ou wer Myom, man ihindagar you kpaa wer Iwuese." 
Isaiah60:19 Iyange ia kera lu iwanger you atetan ga; shin mte u uwer kpaa una kera lu u iwanger you ga, kpa TER Una gema á lu iwanger you i tsôron man Aôndo wou kpaa Una lu icivir you." 
Isaiah60:20 Iyange you ia kera mire ga, uwer wou kpaa ua hide ijime ga, gadia TER Una lu iwanger you i tsôron; ayange a zungwen a ou kpaa aa bee." 
Isaiah60:21 Ior ou cii vea hingir mbaperapera, vea tsôr yan dyako u tar la sha won, ka gbaa u M lee je la, tom u ave Am, sha u i̱ civir Mo yô." 
Isaiah60:22 U kiriki una hingir kweior, man u hemban ndahar una hingir ikurior i ageegh; Mo TER, Me er kwagh ne fefa zum u shighe á kuma yô." 
Isaiah61:1 Jijingi u Ter AÔNDO ngu sha a Mo, sha ci u TER shighem mkurem; A verem er M̱ sur mba asema a vihi ve la asema, M̱ yôô i̱ pase mbakwarev man i̱ bugh gaadi u mba i hee ve ahye la." 
Isaiah61:2 Shi M̱ yôô inyom i erdoo u TER, man iyange i iyevoron i Aôndo wase; man mba ve zungu cii, M̱ sur ve asema." 
Isaiah61:3 Shi M̱ ver mba ve zungu ken Shion la, tsar u hweegh sha ityough ki mtwe, mkurem ma msaanyol sha ityough ki mzungu; ikondo i cirin i iwuese sha ityough ki ishima i zunguluu; sha u á yila ve er, ikon i ouki i perapera, ka mmôôr u TER, sha er i̱ civir Un yô." 
Isaiah61:4 Vea maa ayou a i vihi a ngise hingir atse la, vea hide á kor ajiir a ngise i yôhôl a la, vea sôr agar a i yôhôl a, a a lu atse ikov kar imôngo la." 
Isaiah61:5 Ior mba ken iniongo igen vea tile, vea kura akumauile a en, akur agen aa hingir mbashilen ne man mbaeren ne tom u ikon i wain." 
Isaiah61:6 Kpa ne yô, á yila ne er upristi mba TER; á yila ne er, mbatomov mba Aôndo wase, nea ya akaa a injaa a akuraior, man nea ta ihagh sha icivir ve la kpaa." 
Isaiah61:7 Sha ityough ki kunya u ne ye yô, á kimbi ne kwa har; sha ityough ki iheen kpaa vea ember kwar ve; nahan vea ya dyako ken tar ve kwa har vea ember iember i tsôron je." 
Isaiah61:8 Gadia Mo TER, ijirôron i mimi doom, kpa M kôr mngohol u i ngohol ior akaa sha apera la ihom kua ifer kpaa; Me na ve injar sha shighe vough, Me ya ikur i tsôron a ve." 
Isaiah61:9 Vor ve kpaa á fa u ken akuraior, man tsombor ve kpaa ken ior kpishi; mba vea nenge a ve cii, vea pase er, mban ka vor u Aôndo A ver u doo doo yô." 
Isaiah61:10 M ember tsung ken TER, uma wam kpaa ember ken Aôndo wam; gadia A haam akondo a myom iyol, A cirim riga u perapera, er orkwasehe ka nan kange tsar u hweegh sha ityou er pristi nahan, man er kwasehe kpaa ka nan er hwe iyol sha asa a nan nahan." 
Isaiah61:11 Gadia er inya ka i due a akaa a menden a i man er sule kpaa ka u na akaa a i lee ken u a mende nahan, kape Ter AÔNDO Una na perapera man iwuese vea due sha ishigh ki akuraior cii la." 
Isaiah62:1 Sha ci u Shion yô, Me huan ving ga, man sha ci u Yerusalem kpaa Me mem ga, saa perapera na una mondo er iwanger nahan, myom na kpaa er imenger i yeghen yô." 
Isaiah62:2 Akuraior aa nenge perapera wou, utor cii kpaa vea nenge icivir you; man á yila u sha iti i he, i zwa u TER ua ii yô." 
Isaiah62:3 Wea lu tsar u tor u engem ken uwegh ku TER, man idyer i tor ken uwegh ku Aôndo wou." 
Isaiah62:4 Á kera yila u er, Uitekera ga, á kera yila tar wou er Ice kpaa ga, kpa á yila u er, Hepeshiba (doom a na) man tar wou kpaa er, Bula (kwase u ngohol); gadia doo TER a we, tar wou kpaa ua hingir er kwasengohol nahan." 
Isaiah62:5 Gadia er wanyekwaor ka nan er iniunkwase nahan, kape ônov ou vea ngohol we la, man er orkwasehe ka nan ember kwasehe nahan, kape Aôndo wou kpaa Una ember we la." 
Isaiah62:6 M ver mbakuran sha ugir ou, we Yerusalem, mayange vea huan ving ga, tugh kua tetan kpaa; ne mba ne lu mbaumbur TER akaa, de memen nen ga," 
Isaiah62:7 man de deen nen Un kpaa ga, zan zan tsô Una taver Yerusalem man Una gema un á hingir kwagh u iwuese sha won." 
Isaiah62:8 TER bum uwegh Nagh ku yanegh man uwegh Nagh ku ageegh, er: Mayange Me kera na alakema wou a̱ hingir kwaghyan u mbaihomov ou ga; ior mba iniongo igen kpaa vea kera ma zar u atam a wain a ou, a u er tom u ican sha mi la, ga;" 
Isaiah62:9 kpa mba ve kur a mi la, vea ya un man vea wuese TER; man ve mba ve kohol un kpaa, ka ve, vea ma un ken ityembe i icighanjiir Wam ye." 
Isaiah62:10 Nyôr nen, nyôr nen sha ihindagar, sôr nen ior gbenda, haa nen inya guree, haa nen inya sha igbudu guree, kohol awen kera, kende tuta sha sha ior!" 
Isaiah62:11 Nenge, TER yôô zan zan ar ken ikighir i tar je, er: Kaa wankwase u Shion wer: Nenge, myom wou ngu van; nenge, injar Na ngi a Na, man iyevoron Na kpaa ngi zan Un sha hemen." 
Isaiah62:12 Á yila ve er, uicighanmbaiorov, Mbaipaave mba TER; man á yila u kpaa er, Asarior man Gar u i te un kera ga yô." 
Isaiah63:1 Ka an or nan lu duen ken Edom, a akondo a nyian bong ken Bosera, nan civir ashe sha akondo a nan lu a mi iyol la, nan zenden ken tahav mbu nan mbu vesen laa? Ka Mo u M er kwagh u perapera man M lu a agee a yiman ne." 
Isaiah63:2 Ka nyi akondo a ou a nyian, man uriga ou kpaa ve lu er or u shoghol atam a wain shin ihungwa nahana?" 
Isaiah63:3 M shoghol atam a wain shin ihungwa Mo mtswen, akuraior kpaa, ma or môm lu a Mo imôngo ga; een, M shoghol ve angahar sha ishima i vihin Yam, M dyendegh ve sha iyugh Yam; awambe a uma ve gema haam sha akondo, zure kôrom sha akondo cii." 
Isaiah63:4 Gadia iyange i iyevoron lum ken ishima, man inyom i myom Wam kpaa i va." 
Isaiah63:5 M yenge, kpa ma or u wasen lu ga; kpiligh Mo iyol, kpa ma or u wan uwegh lu ga; tsô uwegh Agh wasem, iyugh Yam kpaa suwem." 
Isaiah63:6 M ndyar akuraior sha ishimavihin Yam, M na, ve hunde sha iyugh Yam, man M haa awambe a uma ve inya." 
Isaiah63:7 Me ter uerdoo mba TER, aeren a TER a a kom iwuese la, akaa a TER A er se cii yô, man mdoom ma vesen ma sha ya u Iserael ma A er ve sha mhôônom Nam ma zungwen man sha mngee u uerdoo Nav." 
Isaiah63:8 A kaa er: Ve, ka ior Av je, ka ônov mba vea er sha icugh ga; man A hingir Oryiman ve kpaa." 
Isaiah63:9 Sha ican ve i yan la cii, Un kpaa lu yan ican, man Ortyom u sha ishigh Nagh la kpaa yima ve; sha dooshima Na man mhôônom Nam ma kôron A paa ve, A tôô ve, A yese ve sha ayange a tsuaa la cii." 
Isaiah63:10 Kpa ve je, ve gema ve hendan a Na, ve vihi Icighan Jijingi Na ishima; Nahan A gema a hingir er ka orihom ve nahan, A nôngo ityav a ve iyol Na kpaa." 
Isaiah63:11 Kpa A umbur ayange a tsuaa la, man Mose kua ior Nav kpaa. Wen u A dugh orkuran u ikumuile Na shin zegemnger la, ngu hana? Wen u A ver Icighan Jijingi Na hen atô ve la, ngu hana?" 
Isaiah63:12 Wen u lu na uwegh Nagh ku icivirigh ku zan a uwegh ku yanegh ku Mose imôngo man A pav mngerem sha ishigh vegh, sha u Una er iti Na i̱ tsôr sha won;" 
Isaiah63:13 Wen u A per a ve shin aiv a zegemnger laa? Er nyinya ken desereti nahan, kape ve nôngo gbev ga la." 
Isaiah63:14 Er ilev ka mbi ndôôr senen shin pev nahan, kape Jijingi u TER na ve u ve mem la; kape U hemen ior Ou, sha u nan iti You i̱ hingir i icivirigh la." 
Isaiah63:15 Hen ijiir You i teman i tseghan kua i icivirigh la, shir ashe shin, nenge. Gbashima Wou kua aeren a Ou a utaha nga hana? Mhôônom Ou ma kôron tsung ma ken ishima kua mhôônom Ou ma zungwen la kera ma a mo ga." 
Isaiah63:16 Gadia We U ngu Ter wase je, shin er Aberaham a kera fe se ga, man Iserael kpaa a kera rumun se ga; kpa We TER, U ngu Ter wase, man Orpaan wase, ka iti You ngise je la." 
Isaiah63:17 TERE, ka nyi U de Wer, se̱ undu igbenda You, shi U cighir se asema kpaa Wer, se̱ de cie U ga nahana? Hide sha ci u mbayev Ou, ikwe i dyako Wou la." 
Isaiah63:18 Ka ayange kpuaa tsô, uicighanmbaiorov Ou ve lu a mi ye; mbaihomov asev shoghol angahar sha icighanjiir Wou." 
Isaiah63:19 Se hingir we ior mba ve lu a lu sha ikev You mayange ga nahan; beer er ka ior mba i lu a yila ve sha iti You je ga yô. 
Isaiah64:1 Ma U shi pav Usha, ma U hongo, iwo kpaa ma i tenger sha ishigh You," 
Isaiah64:2 er usu ka u hia ayegheraikon, man er usu ka u na mngerem ma pagher nahan; sha u á pase mbahendan a We iti You, sha er akuraior a̱ gbidye akarkase iyol sha ishigh You yô," 
Isaiah64:3 er U er akaa a cieryol a se hen kwagh sha a ga; ma U hongo, iwo ma i tenger sha ishigh You." 
Isaiah64:4 Gadia hii ngise je ior ungwa ga, shi ve kav ken ato a ve ga, ma ishe kpaa nenge a Aôndo ugen ga, saa We, u U eren tom sha ci u or u nan veren ashe sha a We yô." 
Isaiah64:5 Or u nan eren perapera saan saan la yô, U kegh nan gbenda, ka mba ve umbur We sha igbenda You. Nenge, U yuwe, se kpaa se er asorabo, se lu ken a ica i gba, nahan sé war je kpa?" 
Isaiah64:6 Se cii se hingir er or u nan wanger ga yô, perapera wase cii ngu er ikondo i hôngor nahan; se cii ka se use er kwakon nahan, aferakaa ase kpaa kar a vese kera er ahumbe nahan." 
Isaiah64:7 Ma or u yilan sha iti You u nan torough iyol i nan er nana var a We, nan ngu ga; gadia U yer ishigh You, man U gbihi se se saa sha ikev i aferakaa ase." 
Isaiah64:8 Kpa hegen yô, TERE, U ngu Ter wase je, se mba inyaityuu man We U ngu Ormaan se; se cii se mba tom u ave Ou." 
Isaiah64:9 De yugh tsung ga, TERE, man de umbur ifer kwagh zan zan gbem ga; shi nenge er se cii se lu ior Ou yô." 
Isaiah64:10 Uicighanmbaagarev Ou hingir desereti, Shion kpaa hingir desereti, Yerusalem hingir toho." 
Isaiah64:11 Icighanyou wase u icivirigh, henpe uter asev wuese We la, usu hia un kera; ajiir a doon se la cii, i yôhôl a kera." 
Isaiah64:12 Nahan kpaa er akaa ne a lu nahan yô, Ú wa ishima TERE? Ú huan ving, U er se ican tsung jee?" 
Isaiah65:1 M rumun u ungwan ve mba ve pinem ga la; M rumun Mer ve̱ zua a Mo, ve mba ngise ve kerem ga la; M kaa a ikurior i i yer sha iti Yam ga yô, Mer: M ngun heen ne, M ngun heen ne." 
Isaiah65:2 M shi dughun ave didi sha ior mba hendan akaa, mba ve zenden sha gbenda u dedoo ga, sha mbamhen vev ayol a ve la;" 
Isaiah65:3 ior mba ve bamen Mo sha ishigh Yagh je, ve ne nagh ken ishule man ve nanden kwaghhumandoon sha akam la," 
Isaiah65:4 mba ve tem her atô u iwaregh man ve tse ken ajiir a myer; mba ve ye inyamigo, man kwaghyan u nungwa nungwa u ndôhôrshima ngu ken ugbande vev;" 
Isaiah65:5 mba ve kaan er: Tile keela, de manger a mo ga, gayô i tsegham a tsegha je. Mban yô, kam mnyim ken ihinga je, usu u u shi hian didi." 
Isaiah65:6 Nenge, i nger akaa ne sha ishigh Yagh je: Me huan ga, saa Me or iyev ve, een, Me haa ve injar ve sha ikum je" 
Isaiah65:7 Ka sha ci u aferakaa a en kua aferakaa a uter enev imôngo, kape TER A kaa la; er ve nande nagh sha iwo, man ve tohom sha agungu kpaa, nahan Me vande karen ve injar i tom ve, Me haa ve i sha ikum je." 
Isaiah65:8 TER ngu kaan nahan er: Er wain u he ka a lu ken sumegh her nahan, man ugen nan kaa er: De vihin ku ga, gadia iveren ngi kimi, kape Me er sha ci u mbayev Av la, Me tim ve kera cii ga." 
Isaiah65:9 Me er tsombor ua due ken Yakob, man ken Yuda kpaa, or u yan dyako u iwo Yam; uicuwan Av vea ngohol i man mbayev Av vea tema ker." 
Isaiah65:10 Sharon una hingir ijiir i akumauile yan toho her, man pev u Akor kpaa una lu ijiir i akumabua yaven her, sha ci u ior Av mba ve keren Mo yô." 
Isaiah65:11 Kpa ne mba ne undu TER, ne hungul icighanwo Wam, ne ser tebul sha ci u Gadi (akombo a doon ikôr la) man ne toon wain u nungwan sha ci u Meni (akombo a vihin ikôr la) yô," 
Isaiah65:12 Me ver ne sha ci u ishôm, né cii né ngurum sha u á sôngo ne; sha ci u zum u M yila la, ne vengese ga, zum u M ôr kwagh kpaa ne ungwa ga, kpa ne er kwaghbo sha ashe Am, ne tsuwa kwagh u a doom la ga yô." 
Isaiah65:13 Nahan yô, Ter AÔNDO ngu kaan nahan er: Nenge, mbayev Av vea ya kwagh, kpa ne yô, nea lu ijen; nenge, mbayev Av vea ma kwagh, kpa ne yô, nea lu imura; nenge, mbayev Av Vea ember, kpa ne yô, kunya ua kôr ne;" 
Isaiah65:14 man nenge, mbayev Av, vea wa icam sha ci u iember ken ishima, kpa ne yô, nea vaa sha ci u ishima i vihin, nea gbire ivaa sha ci u mvihi u i vihi jijingi wen tsung la." 
Isaiah65:15 Nea undu uicuwan Av iti yen la ia hingir ve kwagh u wan ifan a mi, Ter AÔNDO kpaa Una wua u kera; kpa mbayev Nav yô, Una ii ve iti igen kposo;" 
Isaiah65:16 sha u or u nan ver iyol i nan doo doo shin tar yô, nana ver iyol i nan ken Aôndo u mimi, man u nan bumun shin tar yô, nana bum Aôndo u mimi; sha ci u mbamzeyol mba tsuaa la hungul ve kera, i yer ashe Am ve je." 
Isaiah65:17 Gadia, nenge, M ngu gban Usha u he man tar u he kpaa; á kera umbur akaa a tsuaa la ga, man shi aa kera va or ken ishima kpaa ga." 
Isaiah65:18 Kpa lu nen saan saan, ember nen gbem sha kwagh u M lu gban yô; gadia, nenge, M ngu gban Yerusalem Mer, a̱ lu kwagh u iember, ior nav kpaa ve̱ lu saan saan." 
Isaiah65:19 Me ember Yerusalem, man á saan Mo iyol a ior Av kpaa; á kera ungwa imo i mlia ken a na ga," 
Isaiah65:20 Hii sha shighe la je, wanikundan u lun ayange kpuaa nana kera lu ga, gadia wanye nana kpe er anyom a nan aa kuma deri nahan, man orsholibo kpaa ka u nan kom anyom deri la, ifan ia kôr nan ye." 
Isaiah65:21 Vea maa uya man vea tema keregh, vea kaha ishule i ikon i wain, man vea ya atam a i." 
Isaiah65:22 Mayange vea maa ya, orgen á kar á tema ker ga, vea lôô, man orgen á kar á ya, ga; gadia er ayange a ikon a lu nahan kape ayange a ior Av kpaa aa lu la; uicuwan Av kpaa vea ya tom u ave ve zan zan je." 
Isaiah65:23 Vea kera er tom gbilin ga, vea kera mar ônov sha ci u ve̱ tim kera kpaa ga; gadia ve ka vor u mba TER A ver ve doo doo la, kua tsombor ve a ve imôngo kpaa." 
Isaiah65:24 Tsô er ve lu a yila ga kpaa, Me rumun, man er ve lu a kure kwaghôron ga je, tsô Me ungwa." 
Isaiah65:25 Gbaseela man waniyôngo vea ya toho imôngo, begha una ya toho er bua nahan, vuulevu ua lu kwaghyan u iyô. Vea kera er kwagh u vihin ga, shin vea tim kwagh sha icighanwo Wam cii mayange kpaa ga, kape TER A kaa la." 
Isaiah66:1 TER ngu kaan nahan er: Sha ka ikônough Yagh ki torough je, man tar ka ijiir Yam i pendan angahar sha mi; ka nyi iyou je nea maama? Man ka nyi ijiir je ia lum ijiir i memen heree?" 
Isaiah66:2 Gadia akaa angan cii ka uwegh Agh ku er a ye, ka nahan man akaa angan cii a va lu ye, kape TER A kaa la; imbaor i Me ver ishima sha a nan yô, ka u nan hide a iyol i nan ijime man nan lu a jijingi u vaan afanyô, shi nan gbidye ikarikase iyol sha kwaghôron Wam yô." 
Isaiah66:3 Or u nan woo bua yô, nan ngu er or u nan woo or nahan; or u nan ne nagh ku sôngon sha tuleiyôngo yô, nan ngu er or u nan sombo aniwa mon yô; u nan ve a nagh ku sha samuyia yô, nan ngu er or u nan ve a nagh ku awambe a igogh nahan; man or u nan ve a kwaghhumandoon sha ci u nagh ku umbur yô, nan ngu er or u wuese akombo nahan. Er ve tsough igbenda i sha asema a ve, uma ve kpaa a ember sha akaa a ve a hôngorough nahan," 
Isaiah66:4 Mo kpaa Me tsuwa akaa a zan ve iyol, man Me va ve a akaa a tan ve mciem iyol, sha ci u zum u M yila la, ma or nan vengese ga, zum u M ôr kwagh kpaa, ve ungwa ga; ve gema ve er kwagh u a lu u ifer sha ashe Am, man ve tsuwa kwagh u a doom ishima ga yô." 
Isaiah66:5 Ungwa nen kwaghôron u TER, ne mba ne gbidi ikarikase iyol sha kwaghôron Na la! Anmgbianev enev, mba ve ker ne ihom, mba ve te ne kera sha ci u iti Yam yô, mba kaan er: TER A̱ tese ase icivir Na, se̱ nenge a iember yen! Kpa ka ve, vea va ahenge ye!" 
Isaiah66:6 Ikenge i ayôôso due ken gar, imo i ken tempel, imo i TER i oron mbaihomov Nav iyev yô." 
Isaiah66:7 Er lu a toghor mar ga tsô, a mar je; er mnyoonom lu a kôr un ga tsô, a mar wan u nomso." 
Isaiah66:8 Ka an nan vande ungwan imbakwagh nee? Ka an nan vande nengen ambaakaa shono? Á mar tar sha iyange i mômôô? Á mar ikurior icin i mômôô? Gadia er Shion hii er una toghor mar yô, a mar mbayev nav kera kpaa." 
Isaiah66:9 Me va a na hen shighe u a kom u maren yô, man Me kera na er wan a̱ due gaa? Kape TER A kaa la. Mo u M ne mar, Me wuhe iyava? Kape Aôndo wou A kaa la." 
Isaiah66:10 Lu nen sar sar a Yerusalem imôngo, ember nen un, ne mba a doo ne ishima cii; ember nen yagh yagh a na imôngo, ne mba ne zungu sha ci na cii;" 
Isaiah66:11 sha er né ambe atumba a na a surun ishima, á kuma ne gbing gbing yô, sha er né kam atumba, man á doo ne ken ishima sha mngee u icivir na." 
Isaiah66:12 Gadia TER ngu kaan nahan er: Me va un a bem er ifi ka a va nahan, kua icivir i akuraior kpaa er uwagh ka u sar avenge nahan; nea ambe, á ta ne sha ihan je, man á numbe a ven sha anu je." 
Isaiah66:13 Er or u ngô u nan ka a sur nan ishima nahan, kape Mo kpaa Me sur ne asema la; á sur ne asema ken Yerusalem je." 
Isaiah66:14 Nea nenge nahan, man ishima yen ia ember, akuhe a en aa hingir gese gese er gwergwer nahan, man á fa er uwegh ku TER ku lu a mbayev Nav yô, man Una yuwe a mbaihomov Nav." 
Isaiah66:15 Gadia, nenge, TER Una va ken usu, man akekeautya a Na aa lu er ka hiar nahan je, Una pase ishima i nyoon Na sha iyugh, man mzehe Na sha igyamusu." 
Isaiah66:16 Gadia TER Una ôr uuma cii ijir sha usu je, kua sha sanker kpaa; mba TER Una wua ve la kpaa vea ngee." 
Isaiah66:17 Ve mba ve tsegh ayol a ve man ve wanger ayol a ve, ve dondo sha ugen u a lu ve her atô la sha u vea nyôr ken ishule yô, mba ve ye inyamigo man kwagh u hôngorough man ihyev la, vea saa nongo, kape TER A kaa la." 
Isaiah66:18 Gadia M fa aeren a ve kua mbamhen vev; shighe ngu van u Me kohol akuraior cii kua ijô cii, vea va, vea va nenge icivir Yam." 
Isaiah66:19 Me er kwagh u cieryol ker atô ve, man mba ve wer ken a ve kpaa, Me tindi ve hen akuraior, ka hen Tarshishi man Pul man Ludi, mba ve keren avaan sha ada la, man hen Tubal man Yavan, hen ityar i hen kpezegemnger i gban ca, i i lu a ungwa icivir Yam ga, man i lu a nenge iengem Yam kpaa ga la; tsô vea pase icivir Yam ken akuraior." 
Isaiah66:20 Vea va a anmgbianev enev cii ken akuraior cii, sha ci u nagh ku nan TER, sha anyinya man sha akeke a kpelan, man sha akaa a tôôn ior a mi, man sha mbaalfadari man sha urakumi, á va a ve hen icighanwo Wam Yerusalem, kape TER A kaa la, er Mbaiserael ka ve va a nagh shin tasa u wang, ken iyou i TER nahan." 
Isaiah66:21 Uvev mbagenev Me ver upristi man Mbalevi, kape TER A kaa la." 
Isaiah66:22 Gadia er Sha u he man tar u he, mba Me er ve la, vea lu sha ishigh Yagh gbem nahan, kape vor wen man iti yen vea lu gbem je la, kape TER A kaa la." 
Isaiah66:23 Tsô hii sha uwer u he ne zan zan ar sha uwer u he ugen, man hii sha iyange i memen ne zan zan ar sha iyange i memen igen, uuma cii vea va gure sha ishigh Yagh, kape TER A kaa la." 
Isaiah66:24 Vea due vea za kenger akom a ior mba ve hendan a Mo la, gadia ijôô ve ia kpe ga, man usu ve kpa á pir u ga; vea hingir kwagh u ndôhôr uumace cii ishima." 
Jeremiah1:1 Akaaôron a Yeremia, wan u Hilkia, u ken upristi mba ve lu ken Anatoti ken tar u Benyamin;" 
Jeremiah1:2 u kwaghôron u TER va her a na sha ayange a Yoshia wan u Amon, tor u Yuda, sha shighe u anyom a na a tor kuma pue kar atar la." 
Jeremiah1:3 Shi a va sha ayange a Yehoyakim wan u Yoshia, tor u Yuda, zan zan mbee u inyom i sha pue kar môm i Sedekia wan u Yoshia, tor u Yuda, zan zan je ar sha shighe u i yem a Yerusalem uikangen sha uwer u sha utaan la." 
Jeremiah1:4 Yô, kwaghôron u TER va her a mo, er:" 
Jeremiah1:5 Er M lu a er u ken uya ga je tsô, M fa u, er u lu a due ken uya ga je tsô, M tsegha u; M ver u profeti u akuraior je." 
Jeremiah1:6 Tsô, m kaa mer: Uwu! Tere, AÔNDO! M fa u ôron kwagh dedoo ga, gadia mo m ngu wanye je." 
Jeremiah1:7 Kpa TER kaa a mo er: De kaan wer: M ngu wanye, ga; gadia hanmô u Me tindi u her a nan yô, ka hen nan ú za ye, man hanma kwagh u Me kaa u yô, ka wen ú ôr ye." 
Jeremiah1:8 De cie ve ga; gadia M ngu a we sha u yiman we, kape TER A kaa ne." 
Jeremiah1:9 Tsô TER naregh uwegh Nagh bendem sha zwa; man TER kaa a mo er: Nenge, M ver akaaôron Am ken zwa wou;" 
Jeremiah1:10 nenge, nyian M ver u sha akuraior man sha ityartor, sha u wuhen man u yôhôl, u timin man u vihin kera, u maan man u lôôn." 
Jeremiah1:11 Man shi kwaghôron u TER va her a mo, er: Yeremia, ka nyi u nenge a mini? M kaa mer, m ngu nengen a gbough ku kon u amondi." 
Jeremiah1:12 Nahan TER kaa a mo er: U nenge vough, ishima ngim per sha kwaghôron Wam sha u Me kure un vough yô." 
Jeremiah1:13 Kwaghôron u TER shi va her a mo u sha kwa har; er: Ka nyi u nenge a mini? M kaa mer: M ngu nengen a ityegh ki ki toor yô; ki due vegher u ken imbusutarimese. 
Jeremiah1:14 Tsô TER kaa a mo er: Ka ken imbusutarimese man kwaghbo una due fese una va tser mba ve tem sha tar ne cii ye. 
Jeremiah1:15 Gadia, nenge, Me yila icombor i ityartor i ken imbusutarimese cii, kape TER A kaa ne; vea va di je, hanmô ve nana ver ikônough ki ijirigh ki nan hen ihindagar i Yerusalem cii, man hen ugilgar nav cii á ningir á tser, man hen agar a Yuda cii." 
Jeremiah1:16 Me ôr ijir Yam a ve sha aferakaa a ve cii, sha ci u ve tem kera, ve nande mbaaôndo mbagenev nagh, man ve gure ve civir tom u sha ave ve la." 
Jeremiah1:17 Ahegen yô, we, fiir ikondo shin iwenge, mough sha, ôr ve kwagh u Me kaa u cii; de yen ishima sha ishigh vegh ga, sha er M̱ de ne u ishima i yinan sha ishigh vegh ga yô." 
Jeremiah1:18 Gadia, nenge, Mo je, M gema u nyian, u hingir garutya man ityôgh ki iyôgh man ugilgar mba togula, sha tar ne cii, man sha utor mba Yuda, man atiator a na, man upristi nav, kua ior mba ken inya la." 
Jeremiah1:19 Vea ta num sha a we, kpa vea hemba u ga; gadia M ngu a we sha u yiman we, kape TER A kaa ne." 
Jeremiah2:1 Man shi kwaghôron u TER va her a mo er: 
Jeremiah2:2 Za, za yila sha ato a Yerusalem, kaa Wer: TER ngu kaan nahan er: Sha kwagh wou yô, M umbur erdoo u iyev ou man dooshima u ivaa you, er u dondo sha a Mo ken taaikôngo, hen tar u i lee kwagh her ga yô." 
Jeremiah2:3 Iserael lu TER icighankwagh je, atam a tsutswa a iyiav Nav; mba ve ye un cii, á na ve ibo, kwaghbo una tser ve, kape TER A kaa ne." 
Jeremiah2:4 Ungwa nen kwaghôron u TER, we ya u Yakob, kua icombor i ya u Iserael cii;" 
Jeremiah2:5 TER ngu kaan nahan er: Ka nyi mban u mimi uter enev ve zough a mi ken a Mo, je u ve gba ca a Mo, ve dondo kwagh u gbilinigh ityô, man ve hingir gbilin nahana?" 
Jeremiah2:6 Ve kera pine er: TER u A dugh a vese ken tar u Igipiti la yô, ngu han ga, Wen u A kar a vese ken taaikôngo, ken tar u udeserti man u ahungwa, ken tar u ikpoghonya man u mure u kuugh, ken tar u or nan karen ken u ga, man ma or kpaa nan tem ya ker ga yô?" 
Jeremiah2:7 Man shi M va a ven ken tar u doon iyiagh, sha u ne̱ ya atam a u, man mdoom ma u; kpa er ne nyôr yô, ne hôngor Mo tar, ne gema dyako Wam hingir kwagh u ndôhôrshima." 
Jeremiah2:8 Upristi ve kera pine er: TER ngu hana? ga. Mbaeren tom u atindigh kpaa ve fam ga; mbatarev kpaa per atindi a Am; uprofeti kpaa ôr kwagh sha Baal, man ve dondo sha akaa a a fatyô u nan or ma kwagh u injaa ga yô." 
Jeremiah2:9 Ka sha ci u nahan shi Me nôngo num a ven, kape TER A kaa ne; man ônov mba ônov enev kpaa, Me nôngo num a ve." 
Jeremiah2:10 Yô, per, za ase hen ityar i hen kpe u zegemnger i Kitim man nenge nen; tindi nen hen Kedar, ver nen ishima dedoo, nenge nen; shin injakwagh ne vande eren nahan je kpa?" 
Jeremiah2:11 Ikurior igen ngi i musan mbaaôndo vev mayange kpa? shin er ve lu mbaaôndo mba mimi ga nahan kpaa. Kpa ior Av ve tôô icivir ve, ve musan akaa a a fatyô u nan or ma kwagh u injaa ga la a mi." 
Jeremiah2:12 Ne Usha, i̱ cier ne iyol sha kwagh ne, cia nen tsung, i̱ kondo ne iyol, kape TER A kaa ne." 
Jeremiah2:13 Gadia ior Av ve er aferakaa ahar: ve tam kera, Mo u M lu imbor i mngerem ma umam ne, ve gema ve time ahungwa a ombon mngerem shimi shin avande, ahungwa a ombon mngerem shimi a paven ikwe, a a fetyô u lun a mngerem shin mi ga yô." 
Jeremiah2:14 Iserael ka kpan jee? I mar un a mar hen ya? Ka sha ci u nyi man a hingir ishar i yana? 
Jeremiah2:15 Agumabegha ve ta un kume, ve taver imo; ve gema tar na hingir ice; i nande agar a na sha usu, or kera tema ker ga." 
Jeremiah2:16 Ior i Memfishi man Tahapanheshi la ve kômbo u ityough. 
Jeremiah2:17 Kera ka we man u ne iyol you kwagh ne, sha ci u u undu TER, Aôndo wou, zum u A hemen we sha gbenda la, gaa?" 
Jeremiah2:18 Tsô, ka nyi i gbe u a gbenda u Igipiti sha u man mngerem ma ifi u Nili? Man shi ka nyi i gbe u a gbenda u Ashiria, sha u man mngerem ma ifi u Uferati?" 
Jeremiah2:19 Iferkwagh you ia tsaha u, man mhirjime wou una yange u; fa man nenge, er ka kwagh u bo man u yuwan er u undu TER, Aôndo wou, man er mcie u cian Mo la, a kera lu ker a we ga yô, kape Ter A kaa ne, TER u akum a Sha." 
Jeremiah2:20 Gadia hii tsuaa je u sombo igbur you man u tôndo ikangenev you kera, u kaa wer: Me kera er tom ga; gadia sha hanma igungu u taven kua shin hanma kon u hômon je, u ngurum her er idyakwase nahan." 
Jeremiah2:21 Nahan kpaa, Mo M môôr we er kon u wain u injaa, ivor i mimi; man ka nyi u gem u hingir Mo agbaa a bo a kon u wain ugen nahana?" 
Jeremiah2:22 Shin u ôô iyol you sha mtse man u tôô icahul kpishi, nahan kpaa iferkwagh you ngi sha ishigh Yagh er zure u koughon ga nahan, kape Ter AÔNDO A kaa ne." 
Jeremiah2:23 Er nan man u kaa wer: M hôngor ga, Ubaal kpaa m dondo ve ga? Nenge gbenda wou shin pev, fa kwagh u u er yô, mgbianrakumi u zenden fefa man hurugh hurugh;" 
Jeremiah2:24 mgbianjaki u ken toho u i hool un ken taaikôngo, u kuran ahumbe sha isharen na je; ka anti nana yange un sha shighe u a hie laa? Mbakeren un cii vea ya ican sha u keren un ga; ken uwer na vea tser a na." 
Jeremiah2:25 De rumun wer nguhar wou u̱ tsuwa ikôvough kera ga, man gôngor wou kpaa a̱ de om imura ga; kpa u kaa wer: Gbenda ngu ga, ei, gadia mbaaôndo mbagenev doom ishima, ka ve me dondo ve ye." 
Jeremiah2:26 Er ormbaiv ka nan va ahenge zum u i ker nan nahan, kape ya u Iserael kpaa a ve ahenge la; ve man utor vev man mbatarev vev man upristi vev man uprofeti vev;" 
Jeremiah2:27 ve mba ve kaan a tiônkon er: We u ngu terem je; man shi a iwen er: ka we u marem ye; gadia ve gema ijime a Mo, ve ver ishigh sha a Mo ga; kpa sha shighe u ican ia tser ve la, vea kaa a Mo er: Mough sha, yima se!" 
Jeremiah2:28 Tsô mbaaôndo ou mba u er sha ci wou la mba hana? Ve̱ mough ase sha, aluer vea fatyô u yiman we sha shighe u ican you yô, gadia er iyenge i agar a ou i lu nahan, kape mbaaôndo ou kpaa ve lu la, we Yuda." 
Jeremiah2:29 Ka sha ci u nyi man ne hendan kwagh a Mo? Ne cii ne per atindi a Am, kape TER A kaa ne." 
Jeremiah2:30 Ka gbilin tsô man M gbidi ônov enev ye; ve rumun mkôôm ga; sanker wen wua uprofeti enev, er begha ka a ande kwagh nahan." 
Jeremiah2:31 We, ikov ne, ungwa nen kwaghôron u TER. M hingir Iserael taaikôngo je vee? Shin tar u angôghimee? Ka nyi man ior Av ve kaan er: Se mba zenden sha ishima yase se kera va her a We ga nahana?" 
Jeremiah2:32 Iniunkwase á fatyô u hungul ikav nav mbi hweev je, shin kwasehe una hungul kwange na u sha hwe je kpa? Nahan kpaa ior Av je kera umbur Mo ga, ayange gande u ôron." 
Jeremiah2:33 U fa u sôron gbenda wou sha u keren dooshima zee! Ka nahan man igbenda you i hool we sha aferakaa ye. 
Jeremiah2:34 Sha akondo a ou kpaa i zua a awambe a mbaatsanev mba ve lu a ishô yô; u kohol ve hemben iyou shin iin kwagh kpaa ga; er akaa ne a lu nahan kpaa u gema," 
Jeremiah2:35 u kaa wer: Mo m ngu a ishô; iyugh Na kar her a mo kera je. Nenge, Me za a we sha ijir, sha ci u u kaa wer: M er isholibo ga, yô;" 
Jeremiah2:36 Ka nyi u zenden wue wue kpishi sha u geman gbenda wou nahana? Ú va ahenge ken Igipiti kpaa, vough er u ve ahenge ken Ashiria nahan." 
Jeremiah2:37 Her a na kpaa ú mough ú due a ave ou sha ityou; gadia TER venda mba u suur sha a ve la; mayange á lagh u a ve ga. 
Jeremiah3:1 A kaa er: Aluer or nan pav a kwase u nan, man a due her a nan a za hingir u orgen, nahan shi nana hide hen kwase laa? Nahan tar la ua kera hôngor tsung je gaa? Man we yô, u er idya a ior kpishi mba u doo ve la, nahan kpaa u ngu fan wer, ú shi ú hide her a Moo? Kape TER A kaa ne." 
Jeremiah3:2 Kende ashe ou sha, nenge agungu a penem penem! Ka hanma ijiir man i de yaven a wee? Sha igbenda kpaa, u tema sha u keghen ve, er Orarabia ken taaikôngo nahan; u hôngor tar sha udya ou man dang wou." 
Jeremiah3:3 Ka nahan man i nyume iura, man ura u masetyô kpaa u kera nôô ga ye; nahan kpaa u lu a icul i idyakwase, u rumun u van ahenge ga." 
Jeremiah3:4 Kera ka hegen tsô u hii u yilan Mo, wer: Tereme! U ngu Ijende yam i sha iyev av, gaa?" 
Jeremiah3:5 Una zer yuwen zan zan gbemee? Ishima ia nyoon Un zan zan mkur jee? Nenge, kape u ôr la, kpa u er aferakaa, sha ishima you je." 
Jeremiah3:6 Man shi TER kaa a mo sha ayange a tor Yoshia la er: U nenge kwagh u Iserael u a undu mimi na la a er kpa? A unde sha hanma gôgôwo man a nyôr shin hanma tinekon i lun a mure, a er idya heregh." 
Jeremiah3:7 Ken masetyô u a bee aeren a akaa angan cii yô, M kaa Mer: hide her a Mo, kpa a hide ga; anngô na u kwase, Yuda u jighjigh ga la kpaa, nenge je." 
Jeremiah3:8 Tsô, m nenge, zum u M pav a Iserael u a undu mimi na la sha ci u ityôikaa i idya na la, man M na un takerada u paven ivôson, nahan kpaa, anngô na u kwase, Yuda, u jighjigh ga la, cia ga, kpa un je kpaa a za a za er idya." 
Jeremiah3:9 Tsô sha idya na i dang de dang la, tar hôngor, een, a er idya a awen man a ikon." 
Jeremiah3:10 Nahan kpaa, anngô na u kwase Yuda, u a lu a jighjigh ga la, hide her a Mo, kpa ka sha ishima i môm ga, ka sha igyer tsô, kape TER A kaa ne." 
Jeremiah3:11 Tsô TER kaa a mo er: Iserael u a undu mimi na la, tese er perapera na hemba u Yuda, u a lu u jighjigh ga la." 
Jeremiah3:12 Za, za yôô akaaôron ne vegher u hen imbusutarimese, kaa wer: Hide, we Iserael u u undu mimi wou la, kape TER A kaa ne; Me kera kenger we a iyugh ga, gadia Mo M ngu u zungwen mhôônom je, kape TER A kaa ne; ishima ia vihim zan zan gbem ga." 
Jeremiah3:13 Kpa rumun iferkwagh you er u er TER, Aôndo wou, kwaghbo, man u kaha u ze hen mbaaôndo mbagenev, shin hanma itinekon i lun a mure; man imo Yam kpaa ne kera wa iko sha mi ga, kape TER A kaa ne." 
Jeremiah3:14 Hide nen, ne ônov mba ne undu mimi wen la, kape TER A kaa ne; gadia Mo M ngu ter wen, nahan Me tôô ne u môm ken gar, uhar ken kwe môm, Me va a ven hen Shion." 
Jeremiah3:15 Me na ne mbakuran mba sha ishima Yam, mba vea kura ne sha kwaghfan kua mkav yô." 
Jeremiah3:16 Tsô, zum u né seer a seer, né ngee hen tar ne yô, sha ayange la, kape TER A kaa ne, á kera ôr kwagh er: Areki u ikuryan u TER ga; una kera nyôr ken ishima ga, man shi á kera umbur un ga, á kera ker un ga, man á kera kimbir u eren un kpaa ga." 
Jeremiah3:17 Hen shighe la, á yila Yerusalem er, ikônough ki torough ki TER; man akuraior aa va kohol her, sha ci u iti i TER ken Yerusalem; mayange vea kera seer u zenden sha mcighir u ishima ve i bo ga." 
Jeremiah3:18 Sha ayange la, ya u Yuda una zua a ya u Iserael, vea due imôngo ken Imbusutarimese la, vea va nyôr ken tar u M na uter enev dyako yô." 
Jeremiah3:19 Mo M kaa Mer: Me wa u ken uôn, man Me na u tar u doon, dyako u hemban doon cii u akuraior! Shi M kaa Mer: Wea yilam wer: Terem; man wea kaha ú undum kpaa ga." 
Jeremiah3:20 Kpa, er kwase ka nan undu mimi u nan a nom u nan yô, kape ne kpaa ne undu mimi wen a Mo la, we ya u Iserael, kape TER A kaa ne." 
Jeremiah3:21 Ungwa, ikenge sha agungu a penem penem, mliam man zamber u ônov mba Iserael, sha ci u ve kaha gbenda dang, TER, Aôndo ve, hungul ve." 
Jeremiah3:22 Hide nen, ne ônov mba ne undu mimi la, Mo Me wanger m-undu u mimi wen la. Nenge, se mban, se mba van her a We; gadia ka We u lu TER, Aôndo wase ye." 
Jeremiah3:23 Mimi je, agungu la ka gbilin tsô, ayôôso a sha iwo la; mimi je, ka ken TER, Aôndo wase, myom u Iserael a lu ye." 
Jeremiah3:24 Kpa kwagh u kunya la, ya akaa a uter asev zua a mi sha tom ve la, hii sha iyev asev je, akum a uile kua a abua a ve, ônov vev mba nomso kua mba kasev kpaa." 
Jeremiah3:25 Sé yav nen ken kunya wase, ahenge ase a van a̱ cir se, gadia se er TER, Aôndo wase, kwaghbo, se kua uter asev, hii sha iyev asev je zan zan nyian; man se wa imo i TER, Aôndo wase, iko ga." 
Jeremiah4:1 Aluer wea hide yô, we Iserael, kape TER A kaa ne, ka her a Mo ú hide ye; aluer wea dugh akaa a hôngorough a ou sha ishigh Yagh kera yô, nahan kera gba u, ú zende wue wue ga." 
Jeremiah4:2 Tsô u bum wer: Er TER A lu u uma yô, sha mimi man sha ijirôron i mimi kua sha perapera; nahan akuraior aa ver ayol a a doo doo ken a Na, shi ka ken a Na aa ta ihagh kpaa ye." 
Jeremiah4:3 Gadia TER ngu kaan a ior mba Yuda kua mba Yerusalem nahan er: Vuul tsa wen, de lee nen ken usagher ga." 
Jeremiah4:4 Tsôngo nen ayol a en sha ci u TER, kar nen a apusu a asema a en kera, ne ior mba Yuda kua mba ve tem ken Yerusalem, sha er iyugh Yam i̱ de yeghen er usu nahan, i̱ hia zan zan ma or u pirin nana lu ga ze, sha ci u ifer i aeren a en la." 
Jeremiah4:5 Pase nen ken Yuda, man yôô nen ken Yerusalem kaa nen ner: Tôngo ikpamkor ken tar; genger imo, kaa nen ner: Kohol nen, sé nyôr nen ken agar a lun a ugir." 
Jeremiah4:6 Tim tuta u̱ ver ishigh ken Shion; yevese nen, ker nen ijiir i waren, de til nen ga; gadia Me va a kwaghbo, una due ken imbusutarimese, ka kwagh u vihin u vesen je." 
Jeremiah4:7 Begha due ken ikô na, man ortimin u akuraior, mough, a due hen ijiir na, sha u una gema tar wou u̱ hingir toho dang yô; á tim agar a ou kera, or á kera tema ker ga." 
Jeremiah4:8 Sha ci u nahan yô, ta nen ibashôhô uya, gber nen kwelegh, vaa nen, gadia ishima i vihin i tsung i TER la, ngi a gema sha u undun se ga." 
Jeremiah4:9 Tsô, sha iyange la je, kape TER A kaa ne, á lan tor ishima, á lan mbatarev asema kpaa; á kpiligh upristi iyol, uprofeti kpaa á kondo ve iyol." 
Jeremiah4:10 Tsô m kaa mer: Kpe ahii! Ter AÔNDO mimi je U tsugh nongo ne kua Yerusalem tsung je, er U kaa Wer: Nea zua a bem; man sanker gema ngu benden sha uma je." 
Jeremiah4:11 Hen shighe la á kaa ior ne kua Yerusalem er: Ahumbe a tseen a a dugh sha agungu a penem penem ken taaikôngo, nga karen yemen hen wankwase u ior av, kpa ka sha u peer ga, shin sha u wanger kpaa ga;" 
Jeremiah4:12 ahumbe a taver a hemban nga van sha ci Wam; hegen yô, Mo Me ôr ve ijir." 
Jeremiah4:13 Nenge, ngu van er ka abeen yô, akekeautya na kpaa nga er hiar nahan; anyinya na wa kpaver hemba ugafa. Kpe ahii, se ne! mba timin se kera!" 
Jeremiah4:14 Ôô iferkwagh ken ishima you kera, we Yerusalem, sha u u̱ war. Ka hanma shighe je man mhen wou u sha ifer u a tem a we ne, una kuree?" 
Jeremiah4:15 Ungwa, imo due ken Dan je, ngi yôôn kwagh, ngi pasen kwaghbo sha agungu a Eferaim." 
Jeremiah4:16 Ôr nen akuraior kwagh ne! Nenge, yôô nen Yerusalem ner: Mbakasentyav mba van ken tar u caa, mba genger imo sha agar a Yuda;" 
Jeremiah4:17 er mbakuransule nahan, kape ve kase un ve tser la, sha ci u a hendan kwagh a Mo yô, kape TER A kaa ne." 
Jeremiah4:18 Gbenda wou kua aeren a ou la, va u a akaa ne; ka ifer you ne; mimi je, kwagh ne yuwa, een, nyôr ken ishima je." 
Jeremiah4:19 Myam ama, myam ama! Nyoon mo ken ishima je, ishima yam ngi tan mo kwe; m kera fatyô u teman ving ga, gayô, m ngu ungwan mkaa u ikpamkor, ikenge i utya je!" 
Jeremiah4:20 Mba yôôn mhembe u utya hanma ijiir sha adondo adondo, i vihi tar cii kera; i vihi utenti av kera fese je, kua akondo am a yisan kpaa, ngôôr je ga." 
Jeremiah4:21 Shi nan je man me de u nengen a tuta, man me de u ungwan imo i ikpamkoroo?" 
Jeremiah4:22 Gadia ior Av lan kwagh, ve fam ga; ka ônov mba lanen kwagh, mba a mkav ga; ve fa u eren iferkwagh, kpa u eren kwagh u dedoo yô, ve fa ga." 
Jeremiah4:23 M nenge tar, man nenge, u lu dang man gbilin; m nenge Usha kpaa, iwanger ve lu ga." 
Jeremiah4:24 M nenge iwo, man nenge, i tenger, agungu cii kpaa kpegher." 
Jeremiah4:25 M nenge, ma or lu ga, inyon i sha cii kpa, i purugh i yem kera." 
Jeremiah4:26 M nenge sule u doon iyiagh hingir taaikôngo, agar a u cii, i yôhôl a kera sha ishigh ki TER, sha ishigh ki iyugh Na i tsung la." 
Jeremiah4:27 Gadia TER ngu kaan nahan er: Á vihi tar cii kera ua hingir atse; nahan kpaa Me kera tim u Me bee ga. 
Jeremiah4:28 Ka sha ci u kwagh ne, tar ua zungwe, Sha kpaa una hingir il, gadia M ôr kwagh ne man M ver ishima sha mi, Me kera vaa afanyô ga, Me gema ishima Yam sha mi kpaa ga." 
Jeremiah4:29 Hanma gar cii yevese sha ci u iov i mbaanyinyav kua mbakerenavaan; ve nyôr ikô, man ve unde sha avande; i undu hanma gar, ma or môm kera tema ker ga." 
Jeremiah4:30 We u i sar u kera ne, ka nyi u eren ne, er u haa akondo a murufu man u wuha iyol sha ikav mbi zenaria, man u wa tojir sha ashe ou; gbilin je u eren iyol you hwe ye; mbadoon we ishima laha u kera, ve gema mba keren uma wou." 
Jeremiah4:31 Gadia m ungwa mliam er ka kwase u nan toghor mar yô, ican er i kwase u nan mar wan u nan u iunda la nahan, mliam ma wankwase u Shion; ngu shirin ishima, naregh ave, kaan er: Kwagh tserem ve! Uma wam vôr sha ishigh ki mbawuanior." 
Jeremiah5:1 Zende nen wue sha igbenda i Yerusalem, shi nenge, pine man ker nen sha ityembe na, shin nea fatyô u zuan a oro, shin or môm ngu u nan eren jighilii nan keren mimi; nahan Me de un kwaghbo na." 
Jeremiah5:2 Shin vea kaa er: Er TER A lu u uma ne, nahan kpa mba bumun sha aie." 
Jeremiah5:3 TERE, ka mimi ashe Ou a keren gaa? U gbidye ve, kpa nyoon ve ga; U tim ve kera, kpa ve rumun mkôôm ga, ve taver ishiv vev je, hemba vande; ve venda u geman asema." 
Jeremiah5:4 Kpa mo m kaa mer: Mban ka a ka apwaaior tsô; mba bumen, gadia ve fa gbenda u TER ga, shin tindi u Aôndo ve kpaa ga;" 
Jeremiah5:5 yô, me za hen mbavesen, me za ôr kwagh a ve, gadia ve fa gbenda u TER, man tindi u Aôndo ve. Kpa ve cii imôngo ve kever igbur, ve tôndo ikangenev kera." 
Jeremiah5:6 Ka nahan man begha u ken ikô una wua ve, icile i ken taaikôngo ia tim ve kera, anyam una kegh hen agar a ve, hanma or u nana due ker, á ande nan, gadia afer a ve ngee, man mhirjime ve kpaa vese." 
Jeremiah5:7 Á er nan man Me de u asorabo a ouwe? Ônov ou tam kera, ve gema ve bum mba ve lu mbaaôndo ga la; zum u m koso ve zan zan kuma ve yô, ve er idya, ve tim nongo tu tu hen uya mba mbaagbaga." 
Jeremiah5:8 Ka anomanyinya a kehen a zenden wue wue, hanmô nan ngu ngoron imo hen kwase u or u wan ndor a nan." 
Jeremiah5:9 Nahan Me kera or iyev sha ci u akaa ne gaa? Kape TER A pin ne; uma Wam kpaa una kera or imbaikurior ne iyev gaa? 
Jeremiah5:10 Unde nen sha ukpekpe nav, tim kera; kpa de kera been nen cica ga; paa agbaa a na, gadia ka a TER ga." 
Jeremiah5:11 Gadia ya u Iserael kua ya u Yuda ve tsughum tsung je, kape TER A kaa ne." 
Jeremiah5:12 Ve nyiman TER, ve kaa er: Ka un ga; kwaghbo kpaa una tser se ga; sea nenge a sanker shin ijen kpaa ga." 
Jeremiah5:13 Uprofeti vea hingir er ahumbe nahan, kwaghôron ngu ken a ve ga; kape á er a ve je la." 
Jeremiah5:14 Nahan yô, TER, Aôndo u akum a Sha, ngu kaan nahan er: Er ne er kwagh ne yô, nenge, Me ver kwaghôron Wam ken zwa wou a̱ hingir usu, man ior mban ka ikon, ua hia ve." 
Jeremiah5:15 Nenge, M ngu van a ikurior igen i ken ica sha a we, we ya u Iserael, kape TER A kaa ne; ka ikurior i been je ga, ka ikurior i tse i tse je, ikurior i u fe zwa u i ga, man u kav kwagh u i er kpaa ga yô." 
Jeremiah5:16 Gbandeavaan ve ngu er uwar u u lu ivegher yô, ve cii ka anomaior." 
Jeremiah5:17 Vea ya iyiav youv mbi u sondo, kua kwaghyan wou, vea ya ônov ou mba nomso kua mba kasev; vea ya ikumuile you kua ibua you; man shi vea ya ikon i wain you kua ikon i tur you; agar a ou a a lu a ugir, a u suur sha mi la, vea tim a sha sanker." 
Jeremiah5:18 Kpa sha ayange shon la kpaa, Me bee ne cii ga, kape TER A kaa ne." 
Jeremiah5:19 Tsô zum u ne kaa ner: Ka sha ci u nyi TER, Aôndo wase, A er se akaa angan ciili? Nahan u kaa a ve wer: Er ne tem kera, man ne er mbaaôndo mbagenev tom ken tar wen yô, kape nea er ior mbagenev tom ken tar ugen u u lu u wen ga la." 
Jeremiah5:20 Pase kwagh ne ken ya u Yakob, yôô un ken Yuda, kaa wer:" 
Jeremiah5:21 Shi ungwa nen kwagh ne, ne ior mba lanen kwagh man mbakavenkwagh kpaa ga; ne mba ne lu a ashe, kpa ne mba nengen ga; ne mba ne lu a ato, kpa ne ongo ga ne." 
Jeremiah5:22 Mo je kpaa ne ciam gaa? Kape TER A kaa ne. Ne kera gbidye ikarikase iyol sha ishigh Yagh gaa? Mo u M ver waarawa Mer, u̱ lu mkighir u zegemnger, sha tindi u tsôron u una kar un mayange ga yô; shin agôndo a na a va a taver kpaa, kpa nga a tahav mbu hemban je ga; shin er a te kume nahan kpaa, nga peren u ga." 
Jeremiah5:23 Kpa ior mban mba a ishima i num man i hendan; ve gba num ve yem kera. 
Jeremiah5:24 Ve kera kaa ken ishima ve kpaa er: Sé shi cia nen TER, Aôndo wase ga, u A nee ura u he kua u masetyô kpaa, sha shighe u u; ashighe a sundan kpaa A ver se a." 
Jeremiah5:25 Afer a en bunde ne akaa angan kera man asorabo a en kpaa yange ne iveren i dedoo. 
Jeremiah5:26 Gadia ken ior Av i zua a aferaior; mba meen er mbakôroninyon ka ve meen ve ngurum inya nahan; ve hôn to, ve kôr ior." 
Jeremiah5:27 Er keiji i i iv a inyon nahan, kape uya vev kpaa ve ngbough a icugh la; ka nahan ve gbe ikôr ve hingir mbanyarev kpaa ye." 
Jeremiah5:28 Ve wa ahôm, ve kôngor ayol, een, ve er kwaghbo je, kar ikaa inya; mba er ijir sha mimi ga, mba eren a ancôgholov sha mimi er i̱ kpe ve iyol kpaa ga; mbaibanave kpaa mba kuren ve ijir sha mi ga." 
Jeremiah5:29 Me kera tsaha akaa ne gaa? Kape TER A pin ne; uma Wam kpaa una kera or imbaikurior ne iyev gaa? 
Jeremiah5:30 Kwagh u kpilighyol u dang er ken tar ne: 
Jeremiah5:31 uprofeti mba ôron kwagh sha aie, upristi kpaa mba eren tahav sha ityesen ve, ior Av kpaa doo ve er i lu nahan; tsô nea er nan sha mkuru?" 
Jeremiah6:1 Yevese nen, ker nen ijiir i waren ne ônov mba Benyamin, due nen ken Yerusalem kera. Tôngo nen ikpamkor ken Tekoa, man kende nen a ikav sha, sha Bete-hakerem, gadia kwaghbo u ken imbusutarimese ngu kenger kua zegemtim kpaa." 
Jeremiah6:2 U doon ashe man u fan ican ga la, Me tim un kera, ka wankwase u Shion je la." 
Jeremiah6:3 Mbakuranilev a akumauile ve, vea va her a na; vea tim utenti vev vea kase un á tser; hanmô ve nana ya toho hen ijiir i nan." 
Jeremiah6:4 Kohol nen iyol i nôngon ityav a na; mough sha, sé kôndo nen er iyange i lu sha tembe ne je. Kpa! kwagh tser se ve! gadia iyange ngi been, mure u aikighe ngu lihen!" 
Jeremiah6:5 Sé mough nen, sé kôndo nen tugh, sé za hembe nen ayou a na a tor!" 
Jeremiah6:6 Gadia TER u akum a Sha ngu kaan nahan er: Paa nen ikon na, haa nen atihi a inyaagh a̱ tav sha, sha u nôngon ityav a Yerusalem; ka gar u á or un iyev je la; kwagh ugen ngu ken a na ga, saa u eren kwagh sha mkighir." 
Jeremiah6:7 Er ijôr i dugh mngerem nahan, kape un kpaa a dugh aferakaa na la; mba ungwan ipila man mkighir ker a na; angev kua avav nga sha ishigh Yagh gbem." 
Jeremiah6:8 We Yerusalem, rumun ityesen, sha er uma Wam a̱ de vende u ga yô; man sha er M̱ de gem u u̱ hingir ice, tar u lun a orteman ker ga, ze." 
Jeremiah6:9 TER u akum a Sha ngu kaan nahan er: Yar nen twar u asande a Iserael a a shi her la, er twar u kon u wain nahan; gema uwegh shi za sha agbaa, er orsundan atam a wain nahan." 
Jeremiah6:10 Ka an je Me ôr kwagh a nan, Me pase nan man vea ungwa? Nenge, ve tsôngo ato sha u vea ungwa kpaa ga; nenge, kwaghôron u TER kpaa hingir ve kwagh u lahan, a kera doo ve je ga." 
Jeremiah6:11 Nahan yô, M mgbough a iyugh i TER; M wa ishima je M vôr. Haa i sha mbayev mba sha gbenda u ken gar, kua sha mkohol u mbayevikaior cii; gadia nom vea kwase u nan kpaa á kôr ve, orvesen a or u ayange a nan a iv la kpaa." 
Jeremiah6:12 Uya vev vea hingir uya mba ior mbagenev, man ishule ve kua kasev cii kpa; gadia Me naregh uwegh Agh sha num, sha mba ve tem hen tar ne, kape TER A kaa ne." 
Jeremiah6:13 Gadia hii sha u kiriki zan zan ar sha u vesen, hanmô ve cii maa nan iyol sha mtsera u dang; man hii sha profeti zan zan ar sha pristi, hanmô ve cii, nan ngu eren kwagh sha icugh." 
Jeremiah6:14 Mba nenge pe been ior Av angev sha sha tseegh, mba kaan er: Bem, bem; kpa bem ngu ga." 
Jeremiah6:15 Ve va ahenge sha ci u ve er kwagh u ndôhôrshima yô; nahan kpaa kunya ngu ken ve côhin je ga, gadia ve fa ahenge a van kpaa ga; nahan yô, vea gba a mbagban imôngo; sha shighe u Me va tsaha ve la, vea nôngo gbev, kape TER A kaa ne." 
Jeremiah6:16 TER ngu kaan nahan er: Tile nen sha igbenda, nenge nen, pine nen igbenda i tse, henpe gbenda u doon shi u lu yô, zende nen sha u, tsô nea zua a mmem sha ci u uuma enev; kpa ve kaa er: Ka se ka zenden sha mi ga." 
Jeremiah6:17 Man shi M ver ne mbakuran, Mer: Ver nen ato sha mkaa u ikpamkor; kpa ve kaa er: Ka se ka veren ato ga." 
Jeremiah6:18 Sha ci u nahan yô, ungwa nen, ne akuraior, man fa nen, ne ikumior, kwagh u a lu ken a ve yô." 
Jeremiah6:19 Ungwa, we tar, nenge, M ngu van a kwaghbo sha ior mban, ka atam a mbamhen vev je la; gadia ve ver ato sha akaaôron a Am ga, tindi wam kpaa, ve venda un." 
Jeremiah6:20 Ka sha ci u nyi i shi i vem a kwaghhumandoon hen Sheba, man kalamu u human doon ken tar u icaa? Iniav yenev mbi nanden ka kwagh u rumun ga, man iniav yenev mbi sôngon kpaa doom ga." 
Jeremiah6:21 Sha ci u nahan yô, TER ngu kaan nahan er: Nenge, Me ver akaa a nôngon gbev sha ishigh ki ior mban; uter a ônov vev imôngo vea nôngo gbev sha a, orwanndor a ikar na kpaa vea saa ishe." 
Jeremiah6:22 TER ngu kaan nahan er: Nenge, ior mba van shin tar u Imbusutarimese la, ikurior i vesen ngi moughon sha avegher a tar a gban ca la." 
Jeremiah6:23 Ve kôr ada ken uwe, kua iwange; ka mbavihinkwagh je, mba a mhôônom ma zungwen ga ikenge ve ngi er kumetan u zegemnger nahan, mba hendan anyinya, er or u nan kange iyol i utya nahan, sha u nôngon ityav a we, we wankwase u Shion." 
Jeremiah6:24 Se ungwa gwa ve, ave ase shir livaa; ican tser se, mnyoonom kpaa kôr se er ka kwase u toghor mar nahan." 
Jeremiah6:25 De dugh nen ken akôngo ga, man de kera zenden nen sha gbenda ga; gadia sanker u orihom ngu ker, mcieryol kpaa kase tser." 
Jeremiah6:26 We, wankwase u ior av, ta ibashôhô uya, vingir sha mtwe; zungwe, er ka i zungwe wan u a lu môm nahan, gber kwelegh, gadia ortimin ngu va burun se a bur." 
Jeremiah6:27 M gema u M ver u orkaren man ortimenakaa ken ior Av, sha u u̱ fa man u̱ kar gbenda ve." 
Jeremiah6:28 Ve cii, ka mbahendan tsung je, mba zenden anger; ka togula man iyôgh ki iligh ve lu ye; ve cii ka mbaeren dang je." 
Jeremiah6:29 Akpaaiwaagh nga tan ahumbe sha agee; inyelegh hia ken usu; ka gbilin tsô ve ser ye, gadia i kar a mbaaferev kera ga." 
Jeremiah6:30 Mba yer ve er, azurfa u i te kera, sha ci u TER A te ve kera yô." 
Jeremiah7:1 Kwaghôron ne due hen TER, va hen Yeremia, er:" 
Jeremiah7:2 Tile hen hunda u iyou i TER, yôô kwaghôron ne her, kaa wer: Ungwa nen kwaghôron u TER, ne mba ken Yuda cii, mba ve nyer sha ihinda ne sha u za civir TER yô." 
Jeremiah7:3 TER u akum a Sha, Aôndo u Iserael, ngu kaan nahan er: Sôr nen igbenda yen kua aeren a en, nahan Me na, né tema hen ijiir ne." 
Jeremiah7:4 De suur nen sha kwaghôron u aiegh ner: Tempel u TER, tempel u TER, ka tempel u TER je ne! ga." 
Jeremiah7:5 Gadia aluer nea sôr igbenda yen kua aeren a en wang yô, man aluer nea ôron ijir sha mimi a hanma or yô;" 
Jeremiah7:6 aluer nea eren shiror, man ancôghol kua kwasecôghol ican ga, man nea haa awambe a or u ishôôgh inya hen ijiir ne ga man shi nea dondo mbaaôndo mbagenev nea vihin ayol a en kpaa ga yô," 
Jeremiah7:7 nahan Me na, né tema hen ijiir ne, ken tar u M na uter enev ne, gbem sha won." 
Jeremiah7:8 Nenge, ne yô, ne mba suur sha kwaghôron u aiegh u lun a inja ga." 
Jeremiah7:9 Ne gema ne ii, ne wua or, ne er idya, ne bum sha aie, ne nande Baal nagh, ne dondo mbaaôndo mbagenev mba ngise ne fa ve ga," 
Jeremiah7:10 tsô ne va tile sha ishigh Yagh, ken iyou ne, i i yer i sha iti Yam, ne kaa ner: I yima se ve! sha u se̱ eren akaa a ndôhôrshima ne cii, zee?" 
Jeremiah7:11 Nahan iyou ngin, i i yer i sha iti Yam, i̱ hingir bar u mbanumungbenda sha ashe a en zee? Nenge, Mo, M nenge a mi, kape TER A kaa ne." 
Jeremiah7:12 Shi za nen hen ijiir Yam i i lu ken Shilo la, henpe M na, iti Yam vande lun her tsuaa la, za nenge nen kwagh u M er i, sha ci u iferkwagh i ior Av Iserael la." 
Jeremiah7:13 Nahan, er ne er akaa ne cii yô, kape TER A kaa ne, man gema M lu ôron kwagh a ven, pepe kua aikighe, kpa ne ungwan ga; shi M yila ne kpaa, kpa ne vengese ga;" 
Jeremiah7:14 sha ci u nahan yô, iyou ne, i i yer i sha iti Yam, i ne suur sha mi la, man ijiir i M na ne kua uter enev, Me er a i vough er M er a Shilo nahan." 
Jeremiah7:15 Me ta ne sha ishigh Yagh kera, vough er M vande tan anmgbianev enev, vor u Eferaim la cii kera nahan." 
Jeremiah7:16 Nahan yô, we, de kera eren msen sha ci u ior mban ga, man shi de genger mliam shin msen sha ci ve ga, man shi de zamber a Mo sha ci ve ga, gadia Me ungwa u ga." 
Jeremiah7:17 U kera nenge kwagh u ve eren ken agar a Yuda kua sha igbenda i Yerusalem gaa? 
Jeremiah7:18 Mbayev kohol ikon, uter keer usu, kasev hôr mwem, sha u kaan torkwase u Sha la kuese a min, man sha u toon mbaaôndo mbagenev iniav mbi man, sha u vea bamem yô." 
Jeremiah7:19 Ka Mo je ve bamem yee? Kape TER A kaa ne. Mba kera eren a er ican ayol a ve geman van a kunya sha ishiv vev gaa? 
Jeremiah7:20 Sha ci u nahan yô, Ter AÔNDO ngu kaan nahan er: Nenge, á haa iyugh Yam kua ishima i vihin Yam sha ijiir ne, sha or man sha zendenya man sha ikon i ken akôngo, kua sha iyiav mbi hen inya; ia hia a kera, á pir i ga." 
Jeremiah7:21 TER u akum a Sha, Aôndo u Iserael ngu kaan nahan er: Gema iniav yenev mbi nanden, magh nen sha iniav yenev mbi sôngon, gba yan nen inyam kera tsô." 
Jeremiah7:22 Gadia zum u M due a uter enev ken tar u Igipiti la, M ôr kwagh a ve ga, m kaa ve kwagh sha kwagh u iniav mbi nanden shin mbi sôngon kpaa ga." 
Jeremiah7:23 Kpa tindi ne M wa ve, M kaa Mer: Ver nen ato sha imo Yam, nahan Me hingir Aôndo wen, man shi ne kpaa né hingir ior Av, man zende nen sha gbenda u M kaa ne la cii, sha u i̱ kpe ne iyol yô." 
Jeremiah7:24 Kpa ve wa iko ga, man shi ve ver ato kpaa ga, kpa ve za sha mbamhen vev man sha mcighir u asema ve a bo la, ve hide ijime, ve za hemen ga." 
Jeremiah7:25 Hii sha iyange i uter enev due ken tar u Igipiti la je, zan zan nyian, M lu tindin ne a mbatomov Av, uprofeti cii, ayange ayange, pepe kua aikighe kpaa;" 
Jeremiah7:26 nahan kpaa ve wam iko ga, man shi ve ver ato kpaa ga, kpa ve nômbo ikôr; ve hemba uter vev dang u eren." 
Jeremiah7:27 Nahan ú ôr ve akaa angan cii, kpa vea wa u iko ga; shi ú yila ve, kpa vea vengese ga." 
Jeremiah7:28 Nahan kaa a ve wer: Ungun ka nongo u wan imo i TER, Aôndo ve, iko ga je ne, ngu rumun mkôôm kpaa ga; mimi saa kera, i dugh un ken zwa ve kera." 
Jeremiah7:29 Tôndo ice you i sha ihyaghtyo, haa kera, gber kwelegh zungwe sha agungu a penem penem, gadia TER gbihi man A undu ikov i A yugh i la." 
Jeremiah7:30 Gadia ônov mba Yuda er iferkwagh sha ishigh Yagh, kape TER A kaa ne; ve ver akaa a ve a ndôhôrshima ken iyou i i yer sha iti Yam sha u vea hôngor i yô." 
Jeremiah7:31 Ve maa ajiir a taven sha a Tofeti, u a lu shin Pev u Ben-hinom la, sha u vea nande ônov vev mba nomso kua mba kasev sha usu, kwagh u M ne zwa ga, man shi a nyer ken ishima Yam kpaa ga yô." 
Jeremiah7:32 Nahan yô, nenge, ayange nga van, kape TER A kaa ne, a á kera yila un er Tofeti ga, shin Pev u Ben-hinom kpaa ga, kpa á yila er Pev u Wuan Ior heregh; gadia vea ii ken Tofeti sha ci u ijiir i iin ia kera shi ape genegh ga yô." 
Jeremiah7:33 Akom a ior mban aa hingir kwaghyan u inyon i sha man u inyamikume i shin tar, ma or kpaa nana zenda i kera ga." 
Jeremiah7:34 Zum la Me na imo i ahan man imo i iember man imo i orkwasehe man shi imo i kwasehe kpaa, vea been ken agar a Yuda man sha igbenda i Yerusalem kpaa, gadia tar la ua hingir atse." 
Jeremiah8:1 Sha shighe la, kape TER A kaa ne, vea dugh akuhe a utor mba Yuda shin iwar ve, akuhe uityombaiorov nav, man akuhe a upristi man akuhe a uprofeti, man akuhe a mba ve tem ken Yerusalem," 
Jeremiah8:2 man vea gbulugh a sha ishigh ki iyange man ki uweregh kua ki akum a Sha cii, a a doo ve ishima man ve eren a tom, shi ve dondo sha a man ve keren a, man ve gur a inya kpaa la; á kohol akuhe la ga, man shi á ii a kpaa ga, aa hingir ihôghonov mbi sôron sule a min hen inya sha tar la." 
Jeremiah8:3 Asande a tsombor u bo cii, a a shi her la, uma a ku yô, ku ua lu ve guda, ka mba ve wer ken ajiir a M zende ve cii je la, kape TER u akum a Sha A kaa ne." 
Jeremiah8:4 Man shi kaa a ve wer: TER ngu kaan nahan er: Aluer or á gba yô, nana kera mough sha gaa? Shin or á kaha á undu gbenda yô, nana kera hide ga ase?" 
Jeremiah8:5 Ka sha ci u nyi je ior mba Yerusalem mban mhirjime ve a lu mhirjime u gbemee? Ve kôr icugh gbang, ve venda u hiden." 
Jeremiah8:6 M ver ato, M ungwa; mba ôron kwagh vough ga; ma or nan vaa afanyô sha ci u isholibo i nan ga; ka ve kaa er: Ka nyi m ere? Hanma or je, nan kôr gbenda u nan, er nyinya u a nur ayem sha u zan ken utya yô." 
Jeremiah8:7 Ôô-ôô u sha aôndo je kpaa, fa ashighe na; man atii man gbargbar man hulô mba we iko sha shighe u mve ve, kpa ior Av yô, ve fa tindi u TER ga." 
Jeremiah8:8 Ka nyi man ne kaan ner: Se mba mbafankwagh je, man tindi u TER ngu a vese? Kpa nenge, pensel u aiegh u mbangeren ngu eren tom u aiegh." 
Jeremiah8:9 Mbafankwagh va ahenge, kunda ve iyol, i kôr ve; nenge, ve venda kwaghôron u TER; nahan ka hanma inja i kwaghfan je ve lu a mini?" 
Jeremiah8:10 Nahan Me gema kasev vev Me na ior mbagenev, ishule ve kpaa Me na mba ve hembe ve ityav yô; gadia hanmô ve cii, hii sha u kiriki zan zan ar sha u vesen, maa ve iyol sha mtsera u dang; man hii sha profeti zan zan ar sha pristi kpaa, hanmô ve cii, nan ngu eren kwagh sha icugh." 
Jeremiah8:11 Mba nenge pe been wankwase u ior Av angev sha sha tseegh mba kaan er: Bem, bem! Kpa bem ngu ga." 
Jeremiah8:12 Ve va ahenge sha ci u ve er kwagh u ndôhôrshima yô; nahan kpaa kunya ngu ken ve côhin je ga, gadia ve fa ahenge a van kpaa ga; nahan yô, vea gba a mbagban imôngo; sha shighe u Me va tsaha ve la, vea nôngo gbev, kape TER A kaa ne." 
Jeremiah8:13 Me kohol ve, Me kura kera, kape TER A kaa ne; atam a wain kera nga sha kon u wain ga, man atam a tur kpaa kera nga sha kon u tur ga, ika kpaa ngi usen kera; akaa a M ne ve yô, nga karen her a ve kera." 
Jeremiah8:14 Ka nyi man se gbe teman tsôô? Kohol nen, sé nyôr nen ken agar a lun a ugir, sé za kpe nen ker; gadia TER, Aôndo wase, A na, se saa ishe, man A na se mngerem ma meghem er, se̱ ma, sha ci u se er TER isholibo yô." 
Jeremiah8:15 Se mba veren ashe ser, bem a̱ va, kpa ma kwagh u dedoo va ga; man sha ayange a mwar, kpa nenge, gema ka mkondoyol!" 
Jeremiah8:16 Hii hen Dan mba ungwan m-osoahenga u anyinya; sha mngor u imo a mbaageev nav la, tar cii gbidye akarkase iyol; ve va, mba va yan tar kua akaa a a lu ken u cii, gar kua mba ve tem ker yô." 
Jeremiah8:17 Gadia nenge, Me tindi iyô i vihin kwagh ken a ven, i i we iko sha imo i mbanumben a i ga yô, ia nyuma ne, kape TER A kaa ne." 
Jeremiah8:18 Ma m sur ishima yam, ishima i vihin ma i pandem kera! Ishima hingir mo ker dang je." 
Jeremiah8:19 Ungwa! Imo i mlia i wankwase u ior Av ken tar u icaa tsung je; TER kera ngu ken Shion gaa? Tor na kera ngu keregh gaa? Ka nyi man ve bamen Mo sha ieev vev mbi gban man sha akaagbilinigh a tar ugene? 
Jeremiah8:20 Sunda kar kera, inyom bee ve, kpa se yô, se zua a mwar ga." 
Jeremiah8:21 Sha mvihi u i vihi wankwase u ior av kera la, ishima vihim kpen kpen; m zungwe, kondom iyol." 
Jeremiah8:22 Ma balsem kera ngu ken Gileadi je gaa? Ma ortwer kera ngu keela gaa? Ka nyi man angev mbu wankwase u ior av mbu been ga nahana? 
Jeremiah9:1 Ityough yagh ma ki lu ase mngerem man ishe yam kpaa ma i lu ase imbor i mlia, ma m vaa tugh kua tetan sha ci u mba i woo ve ken wankwase u ior av la!" 
Jeremiah9:2 Ma m lu ase a ijiir i tsan ker ken taaikôngo, i i ver sha ci u mbakaren gbenda, ma m pav a ior av, ma m undu ve! Gadia ve cii ka udyambaiorov je, ikumior i lun a jighjigh ga." 
Jeremiah9:3 Ka ve henda nombor ve er ka ada u aiegh nahan, ve taver hen tar la, kpa lu sha mimi ga, gadia mba zan hemen hemen sha ifer, kpa Mo yô, ve kera fam ga, kape TER A kaa ne." 
Jeremiah9:4 Hanma or nana̱ er teghelee sha huror u nan, de kera suur sha ma anmgbian ga, gadia hanma huror nan zenden anger." 
Jeremiah9:5 Hanma or ka nan tsugh huror u nan, mba er kwagh sha mimi ga; ve tese nombor ve u eren aie, ve er dang je ve vôr a mi." 
Jeremiah9:6 Ya wou ngu ken atô u icugh, sha ci u icugh ve yô, ve venda u fan Mo, kape TER A kaa ne." 
Jeremiah9:7 Nahan yô, TER u akum a Sha ngu kaan nahan er: Nenge, Me sough ve, Me kar ve; gadia Me er nana ase, sha ci u wankwase u ior Ava?" 
Jeremiah9:8 Nombor ve ka ivaan je, i van a ku, ngu er icugh, or ka nan ôr kwagh u bem sha zwa a or u nan wa ndor a nan, kpa ken ishima i nan yô, nan lu dughun nev." 
Jeremiah9:9 Nahan Me kera or ve iyev sha ci u akaa ne gaa, kape TER A pin ne, Me kera or imbaikurior ne iyev gaa?" 
Jeremiah9:10 Me gber kwelegh sha ci u iwo, man sha ci u ajiir a ilev yan toho ken taaikôngo la, Me zungwe; gadia i nande a, a hia je ma or fatyô u karen her ga; man i kera ungwa mliam ma uile ga, inyon i purugh sha kua ishôso i ken toho cii nyôngoso, yem kera." 
Jeremiah9:11 Me gema Yerusalem una hingir atihi a alôgh ijiir i tsan i ugbaseela; Me gema agar a Yuda á hingir atse, ma or nana kera tema ken a ga." 
Jeremiah9:12 Ka anti je nan lu orfankwagh u nana kav kwagh nee? Wen u zwa u TER u er kwagh a nan sha u nana pase kwagh nee? Ka sha ci u nyi man tar u saa ishe, u hie er taaikôngo nahan je or kera karen ken u ga?" 
Jeremiah9:13 TER gema kaa er: Ka sha ci u ve gbihi tindi Wam u M ver sha ishigh vegh la kera, man ve wa imo Yam iko ga, shi ve zende sha i kpaa ga;" 
Jeremiah9:14 kpa ve zende sha asema ve a cighir, ve dondo Ubaal, er uter vev lu tesen ve yô." 
Jeremiah9:15 Nahan yô, TER u akum a Sha, Aôndo u Iserael ngu kaan nahan er: Nenge, Me koso ior mban sha kon u yuwan, man Me na ve mngerem ma meghem ve̱ ma." 
Jeremiah9:16 Me tsenda ve ken akuraior, a uter vev kua ve kpaa ve fe a ga yô; shi Me tindi sanker una dondo ve ijime, zan zan Me tim ve." 
Jeremiah9:17 TER u akum a Sha ngu kaan nahan er: Ver nen ishima, yila nen kasev mba vaan ku, ve̱ va; tindi nen, i̱ za yila kasev mba hemban fan kwagh ve̱ va;" 
Jeremiah9:18 ve̱ er fefa, ve̱ va gber kwelegh sha ci wase, sha u ashe ase a̱ haa mliam, akurashee kpaa a̱ ndoor mliam ga ga ga." 
Jeremiah9:19 Gadia i ungwa imo i mlia je ken Shion: U wuu, i tim se kera! Se va ahenge kpishi, sha ci u se undu tar ne, sha ci u ve hembe uya asev kera yô." 
Jeremiah9:20 Nahan ne kasev ungwa nen kwaghôron u TER, ato en a̱ ngohol mkaanem ma sha zwa Na, tese nen ônkasev enev u gberen kwelegh, man hanmô nana̱ gema nana̱ tese di ugen icam i mzungu ne:" 
Jeremiah9:21 Gadia ku unde sha uwindou asev, u nyôr sha ayou a utor asev, sha u wuan mbayev sha igbenda, man mbayevikaior sha ityembe." 
Jeremiah9:22 Ôr kwagh kaa wer: TER ngu kaan nahan er: Akom a ior aa gba er ihôghonov mbi sôron sule a min shin inya nahan, man er atihi a uyia ken ijime i orsundan nahan, man or á kera kura a kpaa ga." 
Jeremiah9:23 TER ngu kaan nahan er: Orfankwagh a̱ de te ihagh sha kwaghfan u nan ga, orageegh kpaa a̱ de te ihagh sha agee a nan ga, ornyar kpaa a̱ de te ihagh sha inyaregh ki nan ga;" 
Jeremiah9:24 kpa u i sar nan ka tan ihagh yô, nana̱ ta ihagh sha kwagh ne, er nan kav man shi nan fam, er Mo M lu TER u eren dedoo, u ôron ijir sha mimi man u eren perapera sha tar, gadia ka akaa ne a doom ye, kape TER A kaa ne." 
Jeremiah9:25 Nenge, ayange nga van, kape TER A kaa ne, a Me tsaha mbala mba i tsenge ve, kpa ve tsenge ishima ga la;" 
Jeremiah9:26 ka Igipiti man Yuda man Edom man Mbaamon man Moabi, kua mba ve hondon a-ase cii, mba ve tem ken desereti la; gadia akuraior ne cii tsôngo ga, man ya u Iserael cii kpaa ve tsôngo asema ga." 
Jeremiah10:1 Ungwa nen kwaghôron u TER, u A er a ven yô, ya u Iserael;" 
Jeremiah10:2 TER ngu kaan nahan er: De henen nen gbenda u akuraior ga; man asema a̱ de nyian ne sha uivande mba sha kwavaôndo la ga, gadia asema nga nyian akuraior sha ci ve." 
Jeremiah10:3 Gadia akaawan a akuraior ka gbilinkwagh; gadia ka kon u or nan gber ken ikô, ka tom u sha ave a ortom sha ijembe je la." 
Jeremiah10:4 Ve cir u azurfa iyol kua zenaria; ve mande u ukusa sha mbamtalega sha er ua tenger ga yô. 
Jeremiah10:5 Mba er ka kwagh u cien inyon a min ken sule nahan mba er kwagh ga; mba tee a tôô ve, sha ci u mba fetyô u zenden ga. De cie ve ga, gadia mba fetyô u eren kwagh u vihin ga, man shi kwagh u eren u dedoo kpa ngu her a ve ga." 
Jeremiah10:6 Ma or môm ngu er We nahan ga TERE! We U hemba cii, iti You kpaa ngi a agee hemba cii." 
Jeremiah10:7 Ka an je nana cia U ga, We Tor u akuraioro? Gadia We U kuma; gadia mbafankwagh mba akuraior cii, kua icivir i utor vev cii, ma or môm ngu er We nahan ga." 
Jeremiah10:8 Kpa ve imôngo cii, ve lan kwagh ve bume; ityesen i ieev ka kon tsô." 
Jeremiah10:9 Azurfa u i cagh un ka i va a mi ken Tarshishi je, man zenaria ken Ufashi, tom u orfan tomaveegh man u sha ave a orvarenzenaria; akondo a mbi ka a kwel man a nyian dindee, mbi cii ka tom u ior mba fan eev je." 
Jeremiah10:10 Kpa TER yô, ka Aôndo u mimi je; Un ka Aôndo u uma je man shi ka Tor u tsôron gbem sha won; sha iyugh Na yô, tar tenger, man akuraior fatyô u kundun ishima sha ishimavihin Na la ga." 
Jeremiah10:11 Kaa nen ve nahan ner: Mbaaôndo mba ve gbe Sha man tar ga yô, vea saa ishe shin tar man sha won cii kpaa." 
Jeremiah10:12 U A gbe tar sha tahav Nav, man A ver tar sha won sha kwaghfan Na, man A samber Usha sha mkav Na," 
Jeremiah10:13 ka Una ôr kwagh yô, mngerem ma hura sha Usha; ka A er turugh a due ken akighiratar a kôndo sha; A er inyiar sha ci u ura, man A due a ahumbe ken ayou a Na a koson akaa ker." 
Jeremiah10:14 Hanma or nan hingir orlanenkwagh, nan ban a mfe; hanma or u nan eren tom sha zenaria nan va ahenge sha ieev mbi nan mbi gban a gba la; gadia ieev mbi nan mbi keren a ker mbila ka kwagh u icughugh je, ma iôôn ngi ken mbi ga." 
Jeremiah10:15 Mbi gbilin tsô, ka tom u icughugh; sha shighe u mtsaha u mbi yô, mbia saa ishe." 
Jeremiah10:16 Kpa kwar u Yakob ngu er mbi nahan ga; gadia Un ka Ormaan u akaa cii; Iserael ka nongo u u lu dyako Na je yô; TER u akum a Sha ka iti Na je la. 
Jeremiah10:17 Kura ikav you hen inya kera, we u i kase u sha utya ne." 
Jeremiah10:18 Gadia TER ngu kaan nahan er; Nenge, Me ta mba ve tem ken tar ne kera, sha shighe ne, Me na, ishima ia nyian ve je, vea fa i dedoo." 
Jeremiah10:19 Kpe ahii! sha ci u mvihi u i vihim ne! Ivav yam vihi je; kpa m kaa mer: Mimi je kwagh ne ka ican i tsung je, me wa ishima a i." 
Jeremiah10:20 Tenti wam vihi kera, ikor yam cii kpa tôndo; ônov av due her a mo kera, kera mba ga; mô kera ngu u nana samber tenti wam, man nana zeren akondo a tenti ga." 
Jeremiah10:21 Gadia mbakuranilev hingir mbalanenkwagh, ve kera ker TER ga, nahan ve er kwagh sha mfe ga, uzendenya vev cii kpaa sambe kera." 
Jeremiah10:22 Ungwa, aun! Angara van keela; ayôôso a vesen je nga van ken tar u imbusutarimese la, sha u va geman agar a Yuda hingir atse, ijiir i tsan i ugbaseela." 
Jeremiah10:23 TERE, m fa, gbenda u or ngu sha ikev i nan ga; or u zenden la, mvershigh u iaven i angahar a nan ngu sha ikev i nan ga." 
Jeremiah10:24 TERE, tsaham, kpa i̱ lu akuma akuma; i̱ de luun sha iyugh You ga, sha er u̱ de gemem m̱ hingir kwagh u ikoogh ga, ga." 
Jeremiah10:25 Haa ishimavihin You sha akuraior a a fe U ga yô, man sha icombor i i yer sha iti You ga la; gadia ve ya Yakob puru, een, ve ya un, ve bee un, ve tim ijiir na kera." 
Jeremiah11:1 Kwaghôron ne due hen TER va hen Yeremia er: 
Jeremiah11:2 Ungwa nen akaaôron a ikuryan ne, man ôr kwagh a ior mba Yuda, kua mba ve tem ken Yerusalem kpaa," 
Jeremiah11:3 kaa a ve wer: TER, Aôndo u Iserael, ngu kaan nahan er: Or u nan ver ato sha akaaôron a ikuryan ne ga yô, nan ngu a ifan iyol. Ka akaaôron" 
Jeremiah11:4 a M ôr uter enev sha iyange i M due a ve ken tar u Igipiti, shin adum u soughon iyôgh la, M kaa Mer: Ungwa nen imo Yam, er nen er M we ne kwagh nahan cii; ka nahan man né hingir ior Av ye, Mo kpaa Me lu Aôndo wen;" 
Jeremiah11:5 sha u Me kure mbum u M bum a uter enev, Mer, Me na ve tar u atumbabua kua iyough ve dumbur ker la, er i lu nyian nahan ne. Tsô m rumun, mer: Amen, TERE." 
Jeremiah11:6 TER shi kaa a mo er: Yôô akaaôron ne ken agar a Yuda cii, man sha igbenda i Yerusalem, kaa wer: Ungwa nen akaaôron a ikuryan ne, er nen sha a kpaa." 
Jeremiah11:7 Gadia M wa uter enev kwagh gbang gbang je sha iyange i M due a ve ken tar u Igipiti la, zan zan nyian, pepe kua aikighe, M kaa Mer: Ungwa nen imo Yam." 
Jeremiah11:8 Nahan kpaa ve ungwa ga, ve ver ato ga, hanmô ve nan gba zenden sha mcighir u ishima i nan i bo la; nahan M kure akaaôron a ikuryan ne cii, a M kaa a ve Mer, ve̱ er a, kpa ve er a ga la." 
Jeremiah11:9 TER shi kaa a mo er: I tser a mzoughzwa u bo hen ior mba Yuda, kua mba ve tem ken Yerusalem kpaa." 
Jeremiah11:10 Ve gema ve hide sha u eren aferakaa a uter vev, mba ve venda u ungwan akaaôron Am la; ve gba dondon mbaaôndo mbagenev, civir ve; ya u Iserael kua ya u Yuda ve vihi ikuryan Yam i M ya a uter vev la." 
Jeremiah11:11 Nahan yô, TER ngu kaan nahan er: Nenge, Me va a kwaghbo sha a ve, u vea fatyô u waren un ga yô; tsô vea vaa a Mo, kpa Me ver ato hen a ve ga." 
Jeremiah11:12 Nahan agar a Yuda man mba ve tem ken Yerusalem ve̱ za vaa a mbaaôndo mba ve ne ve nagh ku human doon la; kpa vea yima ve sha ayange a kwagh á tser ve la je ga. 
Jeremiah11:13 Gadia er iyenge i agar a ou i lu nahan, kape mbaaôndo ou kpaa ve ngee la, we Yuda! man er iyenge i igbenda i Yerusalem i ngee nahan kape ne te atse sha ci u kwaghkunya, ka atse a nanden Baal nagh a mi je la." 
Jeremiah11:14 We yô, de eren msen sha ci u ior mban ga, man de genger mliam shin msen sha ci ve ga; gadia Me kera ungwa ve sha shighe u ve vaa mliam a Mo sha ci u kwagh u a tser ve la ga." 
Jeremiah11:15 U a doom ishima la, ka nyi i gbe un, ken iyou Yama? Gadia ka imanger a lu manger ye. Uiceghzwa man icighaninyam vea fatyô u karen a kwagh u una va tser u la kera kpa? Nahan shighe la ú ember kpa?" 
Jeremiah11:16 TER ii u iti er: Kon u olev u hômon pivir pivir, man u doon atam; ka sha ihuran i zegeayôôso A nande u sha usu, man agbaa a u kpaa kever kera." 
Jeremiah11:17 Gadia TER u akum a Sha u A môôr we, A ter er Una haa u kwaghbo iyol sha ci u iferkwagh i ya u Iserael man i ya u Yuda kpaa, i ve er sha u bamen Mo, sha u nanden Baal nagh la." 
Jeremiah11:18 TER kpaa pasem kwagh ne, sha u m̱ fa un; tsô U tesem aeren a ve." 
Jeremiah11:19 Kpa mo m lu er waniyôngo u sulan or yô, u i ze a mi hen ijiir i sôngon un yô; m kera fa er ve we kwaghbo ishima a mo nahan ga, er: Sé tim nen kon kua atam a u, man shi sé paa un sha tar u mbaumav kera, i̱ de kera umbur iti na ga." 
Jeremiah11:20 Kpa, We TER u akum a Sha, u U er ijir sha mimi kpaa yô, ma m nenge iyev i Ú or ve yô; gadia ka We m we U kwagh wam sha ikev ye." 
Jeremiah11:21 Nahan yô, TER ngu kaan nahan sha kwagh u ior mba Anatoti ne, mba ve keren uma wou ve kaan er: Mayange de kera pasen kwagh sha iti i TER ga, gayô kpen you sha ikev yase." 
Jeremiah11:22 Nahan yô, TER u akum a Sha ngu kaan nahan er: Nenge, Me tsaha ve; ikaior ia kpe ku u sha sanker; ônov vev mba nomso kua mba kasev vea kpe ijen;" 
Jeremiah11:23 asande tsô kpaa aa shi ve her ga; gadia Me haa ior mba Anatoti kwaghbo iyol, sha inyom i á va tsaha ve la." 
Jeremiah12:1 TERE, We U ngu u perapera, aluer me huna U kpaa; nahan kpaa kwagh ngum u ôron a We: Ka nyi man gbenda u iferor u lu a iverene? Man ka nyi mba ve eren kwagh sha atseregh la cii, i kpe ve iyolo?" 
Jeremiah12:2 U môôr ve, ve wa amise je; ve vese, ve ume atam je; U ngu ikua ikua a ve sha zwa ve, kpa U ngu ca a asema a ve." 
Jeremiah12:3 Kpa, We TERE, U fam; U ngu nengen a mo, U kar mlu u ishima yam a We. Tsuwe ve kera er ka iyôngo nahan sha ci u za sôngon, tsegha ve ver kposo sha ci u iyange i sôngon." 
Jeremiah12:4 Ka hanma iyange je man tar ua de u uren, man ahu a shin tar cii aa de u usene? Sha ci u kwaghbo u mba ve tem ken u la, ishôso ngi timin kua inyon kpaa, sha ci u ve kaan er: Una nenge mkur wase ga, yô." 
Jeremiah12:5 Aluer u gba ayem a mbazenden sha angahar kpa u vôr yô, nahan á er nan man ú nyôngoso a anyinya? Man aluer ken tar u bem kpaa ishima ngi nyian we yô, nahan ú er nan ken gborikô u Yordana?" 
Jeremiah12:6 Gadia anngôôv ou, man ya u teru je kpaa, ve je kpaa, ve ya zwa sha a we; ve je kpaa ve lu camber we ijime van ye; de ne ve jighjigh ga, shin vea ôr u akaa a doon nan nan kpaa." 
Jeremiah12:7 M undu ya Wam, M gbihi dyako Wam kera, M gema u a doo uma Wam ishima la, M na sha ikev i mbaihomov nav." 
Jeremiah12:8 Dyako Wam hingir Mo er begha ken ikô nahan; a ta kume a Mo, ka nahan man M ker un ihom ye." 
Jeremiah12:9 Dyako Wam hingir Mo er inyon i tswam i muelem iyol nahana? Inyon i tswam ta sha a na kase un tsere? Za nen, za kohol nen inyamtoho cii, va nen a i, i̱ va ya inyam." 
Jeremiah12:10 Mbakuranilev kpishi vihim sule u ikon i wain ve ndyar kwar Wam shin akev angahar a ve, ve gema kwar Wam u doon hingir taaikôngo dang." 
Jeremiah12:11 Ve gema un hingir ice; ngu zungwen sha ishigh Yagh, er a lu ice yô; tar la cii hingir ice, ma or kpaa nan ver ishima sha mi ga." 
Jeremiah12:12 Agungu a penem penem a ken mkôngo cii, mbatiminakaa unde sha a; gadia sanker u TER ngu wuan, hii ken vegher u tar ne zan zan ar vegher u keela; ma or u uma u zuan a bem nan kera ngu ga." 
Jeremiah12:13 Ve lôô alakema, ve gema ve sunda usaa; ve er ayol a ve ican, kpaa ve zua a ma mtsera ga; kunya u̱ kôr ne a iyiav yenev, sha ci u iyugh i tsung i TER." 
Jeremiah12:14 TER ngu kaan nahan er: Mba ve we ndor a Mo, ve eren kwaghbo ne cii, ve benden dyako, u M ver ior Av Iserael, ave ne, nenge, Me tsuwe ve ken tar ve kera, man Me tsuwe ya u Yuda ken atô ve kpaa." 
Jeremiah12:15 Tsô ken masetyô u M tsuwe ve kera yô, Me shi Me zungwe ve mhôônom; shi Me hide a ve, hanma or hen dyako u nan, man hanma or hen tar u nan." 
Jeremiah12:16 Tsô, aluer vea hen igbenda i ior Av sha gbashima, sha u bumun iti Yam kaan er: Er TER A lu u uma yô, er ve kpaa ve tese ior Av u bumun Baal nahan, nahan á maa ve ken atô u ior Av." 
Jeremiah12:17 Kpa aluer vea ver ato ga yô, Me tsuwe ikurior la kera, Me tim i kera, kape TER A kaa ne." 
Jeremiah13:1 TER kaam nahan er: Za, za yam tsar sha ci wou u i tum sha mou yô, kange un shin iwenge, kpa de we un shin mnger ga." 
Jeremiah13:2 Nahan m yam tsar sha imo i TER, m kange un shin iwenge." 
Jeremiah13:3 Tsô kwaghôron u TER va her a mo u sha kwa har, er:" 
Jeremiah13:4 Tôô tsar u u yam, u a lu u shin iwenge la, mough za hen Uferati, za yer un ken kwevande." 
Jeremiah13:5 Nahan m za, m za yer un hen Uferati, er TER kaam nahan." 
Jeremiah13:6 Tsô ayange nga kar kpishi yô, TER kaa a mo er: Mough, za hen Uferati, za tôô tsar u M kaa u Mer, za koso ker la." 
Jeremiah13:7 Nahan m za hen Uferati, m za time, m tôô tsar la hen ijiir i m koso un la; kpa nenge, tsar vihi, kera lu a ma inja ga." 
Jeremiah13:8 Tsô kwaghôron u TER va her a mo, kaa er:" 
Jeremiah13:9 TER ngu kaan nahan er: Kape Me vihi iyolmoron i Yuda man iyolmoron i vesen i Yerusalem kera la. 
Jeremiah13:10 Aferaior a a vende u veren ato sha akaaôron Am ne, a zenden sha mcighir u ishima i a, man shi a dondon mbaaôndo mbagenev sha u eren ve tom, man u guren civir ve, aa hingir vough er tsar ne nahan, u alu a ma inja ga ne." 
Jeremiah13:11 Gadia er tsar ka a var or shin iwenge nahan, kape M er ya u Iserael cii kua ya u Yuda cii, Mer, ve̱ var a Mo ne, kape TER A kaa ne; sha u ve̱ lum nongo man iti, man iwuese, man icivir; kpa ve venda u ungwan." 
Jeremiah13:12 Nahan yô, ôr ve imo ne, wer: TER, Aôndo u Iserael, ngu kaan nahan er: Hanma ikpe á iv i a zar u wain; tsô vea kaa a we er: Se se fa er á iv hanma ikpe a zar u wain ga ha?" 
Jeremiah13:13 Nahan ú kaa ve wer: TER ngu kaan nahan er: Nenge, mbatamen ken tar ne cii: utor mba ve tem sha ikônough ki torough ki Davidi man upristi man uprofeti kua mba ve tem ken Yerusalem cii, Me iv ve a ihundugh ki msôr." 
Jeremiah13:14 Me kôr hanma or, Me ta sha ugen, uter a ônov mba nomso imôngo, kape TER A kaa ne; Me zungwe mhôônom ga; mhôônom maa kôrom er Me de u timin ve kpaa ga." 
Jeremiah13:15 Ungwa nen, ver nen ato; de moron nen iyol ga, gadia TER ôr kwagh." 
Jeremiah13:16 Na nen TER, Aôndo wen, icivir, er A lu a er ime i wa ga ne, man er ne lu a ta angahar kera sha iwo i wan ime la ga ne, man er ne lu keren iwanger yô, A gema i i hingir mure u kuugh man shi angôghime." 
Jeremiah13:17 Kpa aluer ne venda u ungwan un yô, uma wam una vaa ken myer sha ci u iyolmoron la; man ashe am aa vaa tsung, mliam maa haa, sha ci u i kôr ikumuile i TER, i kange i, i yem a mi yô." 
Jeremiah13:18 Ôr kwagh a tor man ngô u tor, kaa wer: Shar nen inya; gadia atsar a en a sha ityou, sagh kera, ka tsar u icivir yen je la." 
Jeremiah13:19 Agar a ken tar u Imbusutariyan la i wuhe a, man or u bughun a nan ngu ga; i kange Yuda i yem a mi eleghaa, i yem a ve kera ci ca cii." 
Jeremiah13:20 Kende ashe ou Sha, nenge mba ve lu van shin tar u Imbusutarimese la; ikumuile i i ne u, i i doo yum la, ngi hana?" 
Jeremiah13:21 Tsô ú kaa nana, aluer Una gema Una ver mba u ye ikar a ve la, er ve̱ tema tor sha a wee? Mtoghor una tser u er kwase u togholmar nahan gaa?" 
Jeremiah13:22 Aluer u kaa ken ishima you wer: Ka nyi man ambaakaa angan a tsereme? Ka sha ci u ifer you i vesen, i kôvor ikondo you, man akishiangahar a ou kpaa a zua a ican i aperagh ye." 
Jeremiah13:23 Oretiopia nana fatyô u geman kwavyolough u nan hingir kposo kpa? Shin anyam yô, una gema amian a na? Aluer ka nahan yô, ne kpaa né er kwagh u dedoo, ne mba iferkwagh i hool ne ne." 
Jeremiah13:24 Ka nahan man Me sambe ve kera, er atighir a uwua a ahumbe a hir a purugh a mi kera nahan." 
Jeremiah13:25 Ka kwar wou je ne, ka kwar u u zough a mi her a Mo ne, kape TER A kaa ne, sha ci u M hungul we man u gema u lian sha aie yô." 
Jeremiah13:26 Nahan Mo iyol Yam je, Me kôvor ikondo you je ia va ar u sha ishi, idyelegh wou una due ken igbar." 
Jeremiah13:27 M nenge akaa a ou a ndôhôrshima ka idya you, man mngor wou sha inja i nyinya la, man ijimba you, sha agungu a ken toho. Kwagh á tser u! We Yerusalem. Ka hanma shighe man ú va hingir wang ase?" 
Jeremiah14:1 Kwaghôron u TER u a ve hen Yeremia sha kwagh u icegh ki ki za la. 
Jeremiah14:2 Yuda ngu zungwen, ihindagar na hingir dang; ve tema inya hundughuu, mliam ma Yerusalem ma kôndon sha." 
Jeremiah14:3 Ashagbaior a ve tindi mbayev vev shin mnger; ve va hen azôr, kpa ve zua a mngerem ga, ve hide a ikav vev gbilin; ve va ahenge, kunya kôr ve, ve yisa ityough vev." 
Jeremiah14:4 Er inya ure sha ci u ura nôô sha tar la ga yô, mbashirensule va ahenge, ve yisa ityouv vev." 
Jeremiah14:5 Ngôashim u ken toho kpaa mar wan, gema undu kera, sha ci u toho ngu ga." 
Jeremiah14:6 Ujaki mba ken toho kpaa tile sha agungu a penem penem, mba ôôn fegh fegh fegh er ka ugbaseela nahan; yina ashe a ve iyol, sha ci u toho ngu ga." 
Jeremiah14:7 Shin er aferakaa ase a lu pasen se nan se ibo, nahan kpaa, er kwagh sha ci u iti You TERE, gadia mbamhirjime asev ngee; ka We se er U kwaghbo ye." 
Jeremiah14:8 We, ishimaverenkeghen i Iserael, Oryiman na, sha ayange a ican, ka nyi man U hingir er orvannya ken tar ne, man er or u nan dugh zende, u nan kaha nan yav tugh tseegh nahan?" 
Jeremiah14:9 Ka nyi man U hingir er or u i kondo nan iyol, er orageegh u nan fetyô u yiman or ga nahana? Nahan kpaa U ngu her atô wase TERE, mba yer se sha iti You; de undun se ga!" 
Jeremiah14:10 TER ngu ôron kwagh u ior mban kaan nahan er: Kape i doo ve u zenden wue wue je ne; mba her angahar inya ga; nahan TER kera rumun ve ga; hegen yô, Una umbur iferkwagh ve, man Una tsaha asorabo a ve." 
Jeremiah14:11 Shi TER kaa a mo er: De kera eren msen sha ci u ior mban, i̱ kpe ve iyol ga." 
Jeremiah14:12 Vea hôron kwaghyan kpaa, Me ungwan mliam vem ga; man vea naan nagh ku nanden kua ku sha samuyia kpaa, Me rumun ve ga; Me tim ve sha sanker, man sha ijen, kua sha bouange kpaa." 
Jeremiah14:13 Tsô m kaa mer: Ku! Tere AÔNDO! Nenge, uprofeti mba kaan a ve er: Ne nenge a sanker ga, man shi ijen kpaa ga, kpa Me na ne bem u mimi hen ijiir ne." 
Jeremiah14:14 Nahan TER kaa a mo er: Uprofeti mba pasen kwagh ken iti Yam sha aie; M tindi ve ga, M na ve zwa ga, M ôr kwagh a ve kpaa ga; mba pasen ne kwagh nengen a mi, u aiegh, man mtsengeôron u gbilinigh kua icugh i ken asema ve." 
Jeremiah14:15 Nahan TER ngu kaan nahan er: Sha kwagh u uprofeti mba ve pasen kwagh ken iti Yam, man M tindi ve ga, mba ve kaan er: Sanker man ijen vea lu ken tar ne ga ne: Ka sha sanker kua ijen á tim uprofeti mbala ye." 
Jeremiah14:16 Ior mba ve lu pasen ve kwagh la kpaa, á haa ve kera sha igbenda i Yerusalem sha ci u ijen kua sanker; or u iin ve kpaa nana lu ga, ve man kasev vev man ônov vev mba nomso kua mba kasev: kape Me gema afer a ve Me haa ve iyol la." 
Jeremiah14:17 Yô kaa ve imo ne, wer: Ashe am a̱ haa mliam tugh man tetan, a̱ de memen ga; gadia i vihi iniunkwase, wankwase u ior av sha mvihi u vesen je, kwaghbo tser un tsung." 
Jeremiah14:18 Ka mea za ken toho, nenge, mba i woo sha sanker mban! Mea hide ken gar kpaa, nenge, mba ve gbe ijen mban! Profeti kua pristi je kpaa mba zenden sha tar tsô, ve hingir tumbuluu." 
Jeremiah14:19 U venda Yuda elegh elegh jee? Shion je kpaa ndôhôr we ishimaa? Ka nyi man U gbidi se je, mwar a kera lu se ga nahana? Mba veren ashe er, bem a̱ va, kpa ma kwagh u dedoo va ga; man sha ayange a mwar, kpa nenge, gema ka mkondoyol." 
Jeremiah14:20 TERE, se mba rumun kwaghbo wase kua ifer i uter asev; gadia se er U kwaghbo." 
Jeremiah14:21 De te se kera ga, sha ci u iti You; man shi de heen ikônough ki torough You ki icivirigh ga; shi umbur, de saghen ikuryan You a vese ga." 
Jeremiah14:22 Agbilinakaa a atôatyev la, ma kwagh ngu ker, u una fatyô u nôôn ura kpa? Shin Usha fatyô u nôôn ura u ioo kpa? Kera ka We gaa, TER, Aôndo wase? Nahan yô, sé kegh U; gadia ka We je U er akaa ne cii ye." 
Jeremiah15:1 Nahan TER kaa a mo er: Shin Mose kua Samuel vea tile sha ishigh Yagh je kpaa, mayange Me kera ver ishima sha ior mban ga; zenda ve sha ishigh Yagh kera, ve̱ yem kera." 
Jeremiah15:2 Man aluer vea pine u er: Se̱ yem hana? Yô, ú kaa a ve wer: TER ngu kaan nahan er: Mba i ver ve sha ci u ku la, ve̱ za hen ku; mba i ver ve sha ci u sanker la, ve̱ za hen sanker; mba i ver ve sha ci u ijen la, ve̱ za hen ijen; mba i ver ve sha ci u ikangenev la, ve̱ za di ken uikangen." 
Jeremiah15:3 Me tsaha ve sha mbamtsaha anza anyiin, kape TER A kaa ne: sanker sha ci u wuan kera, man iwa sha ci u tusen a mi, inyon i sha kua inyam ikume sha tar sha ci u yan man u anden kera."
