Jeremiah15:4 Me na, vea hingir ityartor i sha won cii kwagh u cieryol, sha ci u Manase, wan u Hesekia, tor u Yuda, sha ci u kwagh u a er ken Yerusalem la." 
Jeremiah15:5 Gadia ka anti mhôônom maa kôr nan a we, we Yerusalem? Shin ka anti nana zungwe u? Man ka anti nana kaha sha u pinen mlu wouwe?" 
Jeremiah15:6 We, u tem kera, kape TER A kaa ne, u hide ijime je; ka sha ci u nahan, M naregh uwegh Agh sha a we, M tim u kera ye; M vôr a afanyô a vaan." 
Jeremiah15:7 M peer ve sha tser hen ihinda i tar ve la; M tsuwe ve ônov kera, M tim ior Av; ve undu igbenda ve la ga." 
Jeremiah15:8 Kasev mba côgholov vev ngeem je, ve hemba ngeen a waarawa u uzegembamngerev; M va a ortimin iyange sha tembe, a va bur ngô u mbayevikaior; M na ican kua mcieryol va ta sha a na fese." 
Jeremiah15:9 U a mar utaankaruhar la, ngu uren; a kpe, iyange na mire er iyange i lu her je yô; a va ahenge, a̱ hingir tumbuluu; man Me gema asande a ve a a shi her me na sanker sha ishigh ki mbaihomov vev, kape TER A kaa ne." 
Jeremiah15:10 Kpe ahii, ngôm! er u marem, m lu or u num man or u ayongo hen tar ne yô! M na or injô ga, ve kpaa ve nam injô ga; nahan kpaa, ve cii mba tuhwan mo." 
Jeremiah15:11 TER kaa er: Mimi je, Me pase u Me tuhwa, á kpe u iyol; mimi je, Me na mbaihomov ou vea zamber we sha iyange i kwaghbo kua sha iyange i ican la." 
Jeremiah15:12 Or á fatyô u kever iyôgh ki iligh, iyôgh ki iligh ki ki dugh ken Imbusutarimese la kua togula, kpa?" 
Jeremiah15:13 Akaa a ou kua inyaregh you, Me na, á ya ishar sha mi, á yam a yam ga, sha ci u asorabo a ou cii, ken tar wou cii." 
Jeremiah15:14 Me na u, ú er mbaihomov ou tom ken tar u u fe u ga yô; gadia i keer usu sha iyugh Yam, u ua hia ne yô." 
Jeremiah15:15 TERE, We U fa, umbur mo, va sôrom, orom iyev sha mba ve tevem a ican la; sha ishima You i wan la, de karen a mo kera ga; fa, ka sha ci Wou i heem ye." 
Jeremiah15:16 Ka a zua a akaaôron a Ou yô, m ya a, akaaôron a Ou hingir mo iember man msaanyol ken ishima yam; gadia i yilam sha iti You je, TERE, Aôndo u akum a Sha." 
Jeremiah15:17 M tema nongo a mba i lu ve iyol yagh yagh la ga, m ember kpaa ga; m tema tswen, sha ci u uwegh Ough ku lu sha a mo yô, gadia U ivim a iyugh." 
Jeremiah15:18 Ka nyi man mnyoonom am ma nyoon mo gbemee, man ivav yam kpaa i den ga, i rumun u been ga nahana? Nahan Ú hingir mo er uwagh u icughugh nahan? Er mngerem ma ka ma va uma kera nahana?" 
Jeremiah15:19 Nahan yô, TER ngu kaan nahan er: Aluer wea hide yô, nahan Me hide a we, ú va tile sha ishigh Yagh; man aluer wea ôr kwagh u injaa, á kera lu kwagh u gbilinigh ga yô, ú hingir er ka zwa Wam nahan; ve yô, ve̱ hide her a we je, kpa we yô, de kera hidi her a ve ga." 
Jeremiah15:20 Me gema u, ú hingir ior mban er gilgar u taver u iyôgh ki togula nahan; vea nôngo ityav a we, kpa vea hemba u ga, gadia M ngu a we sha u waren we man u yiman we, kape TER A ne." 
Jeremiah15:21 Me yima u sha ikev i mbaaferev, man Me paa u sha ikev i mbacieryol." 
Jeremiah16:1 Kwaghôron u TER shi va her a mo er: 
Jeremiah16:2 De eren kwase ga, man shi de luun a ônov mba nomso shin mba kasev hen ijiir ne ga." 
Jeremiah16:3 Gadia sha kwagh u ônov mba nomso man ônov mba kasev mba i mar ve hen ijiir ne, man sha ungô vev mba ve mar ve kua uter vev mba ve Mar ve ken tar ne yô, TER ngu kaan nahan er:" 
Jeremiah16:4 Angev mbu bov mbua wua ve, á vaa ve ga, man á ii ve kpaa ga; vea hingir er atihi a ihôghonov mbi sôron sule a min hen inya nahan; ka sha sanker kua sha ijen á tim ve kera ye; akom a ve aa hingir kwaghyan u inyon i sha man inyamikume i shin tar." 
Jeremiah16:5 Gadia TER ngu kaan nahan er: De nyer ken iyou i mzungu ga man shi de ze sha ci u za vaan shin sha ci u za zungwen ve ga, gadia M ngohol bem Wam hen ior mban kera, kape TER A kaa ne, ka erdoo kua mhôônom ma zungwen je la." 
Jeremiah16:6 Mbavesen kua mbakiriki cii vea kpe ken tar ne; á ii ve ga, man shi á zungwe ve kpaa ga, á gber ivav iyol ga, shin á torough ityough sha ci ve kpaa ga;" 
Jeremiah16:7 á coon kwaghyan u zungwen ku, sha u á sur or ishima a mi ga; man á na or iyongo i surun ishima sha u nana ma sha ci u ter u nan, shin ngô u nan kpaa ga." 
Jeremiah16:8 Man shi de nyer ken ya u iniongo sha u teman a ve imôngo sha u yan man u man kwagh ga. 
Jeremiah16:9 Gadia TER u akum a Sha, Aôndo u Iserael ngu kaan nahan er: Nenge, Me er sha ashe a en man ken ayange a en kpaa, er imo i ahan man imo i iember man imo i orkwasehe kua imo i kwasehe ia bee hen ijiir ne." 
Jeremiah16:10 Tsô, zum u ú pase ior mban akaaôron angan cii yô, man vea kaa a we er: Ka nyi man TER A shi ter zegekwaghbo ne cii nahana? Iferkwagh yase ka nyi? Man kwaghbo u se er TER, Aôndo wase, ka nyi?" 
Jeremiah16:11 Yô, ú kaa ve wer: Ka sha ci u uter enev ve tem kera yô, kape TER A kaa ne, man ve dondon mbaaôndo mbagenev, ve eren ve tom, ve gur ve civir ve, Mo yô, ve gemam ve ta kera, atindiakaa Am kpaa ve wa iko ga;" 
Jeremiah16:12 kpa ne yô, ne er ifer hemba uter enev; gadia nenge, hanmô wen nan zenden sha mcighir u ishima i nan i bo, je yô, ne kera ver ato her a Mo ga;" 
Jeremiah16:13 nahan yô, Me gbihi ne ken tar ne kera, né yem ken tar u ne kua uter enev kpaa ne fe u ga yô; ka keela né eren mbaaôndo mbagenev tom tugh man tetan ye; gadia Me zungwe ne mhôônom côhin tsô kpaa ga." 
Jeremiah16:14 Nahan yô, nenge, ayange nga van, kape TER A kaa ne, a á kera kaa er: Er TER u A dugh a Mbaiserael ken tar u Igipiti A lu u uma ne, ga;" 
Jeremiah16:15 kpa á kaa er: Er TER u A dugh a Mbaiserael shin imbusutarimese man ken ityar i A zende ve ve yem ker la cii A lu u uma ne. Een, Me shi Me hide a ve ken tar u lu M na uter vev la yô." 
Jeremiah16:16 Nenge, Me tindi, á yila mbakôronishu kpishi, kape TER A kaa ne, vea va kôr ve; ken masetyô Me tindi, á yila mbayarenikôr kpishi, vea num ve sha hanma uwo man sha hanma igungu man ken ikwe i avande kpaa." 
Jeremiah16:17 Gadia ashe Am ne nga sha igbenda ve cii, ngi myer sha ishigh Yagh ga, man iferkwagh ve kpaa ngi myer sha ashe Am ga." 
Jeremiah16:18 Nahan Me vande oron ve iyev á kuma kwa har sha iferkwagh ve kua isholibo ve, sha ci u ve hôngor tar Wam sha akom a akaa a ve a ndôhôr shima, man ve mgbough dyako Wam a akaa a ve a hôngorough la." 
Jeremiah16:19 TERE, agee am man garutya wam man ijiir yam i yeren ker sha iyange i ican, ka her a We akuraior aa due ken akighir a tar aa va ye, aa kaa er: Ka aie tseegh a lu dyako u uter asev ve ye ye; ka agbilinakaa, kwagh môm u lun a inja ngu ker ga." 
Jeremiah16:20 Or nana fatyô u eren mbaaôndo sha ci u nana? Mbala ka mbaaôndo ga. 
Jeremiah16:21 Ka sha ci u nahan, nenge, Me na, vea fa, hen shighe ne je, vea fa uwegh Agh kua tahav Av; man shi vea fa er iti Yam i lu TER je yô." 
Jeremiah17:1 Isholibo i Yuda yô, i nger i sha pensel u iyôgh man sha diamondi u horon zwa; i gber i sha kpande u ishima ve, kua sha ikor i atse a ve a nanden nagh sha mi kpaa," 
Jeremiah17:2 er ônov vev ve umbur atse a ve a nanden nagh sha mi man Asherim ve hen ikon i hômon ika sha agungu a taven," 
Jeremiah17:3 sha iwo i ken ikôngo. Akaa a ou kua inyaregh you Me gema Me na, á ya ishar sha mi kua ajiir a ou a taven sha kpaa, sha ci u isholibo i ken tar wou la cii." 
Jeremiah17:4 Man we ú gema ú pase uwegh ough sha dyako wou u M ne u la kera; man shi Me na, ú er mbaihomov ou tom ken tar u u fe u ga yô; gadia ne keer usu sha iyugh Yam, u ua tsôron hian yô." 
Jeremiah17:5 TER ngu kaan nahan er: Or u nan suur sha or man nan gem inyamyolough i̱ hingir agee, a nan, man ishima i nan i pav a TER yô, nan ngu a ifan iyol." 
Jeremiah17:6 Gadia nana hingir er anihu u ken desereti u lun tsaasaa nahan, nana nenge a shighe u mkpeyol a ve ga, kpa nana tema ken ajiir a tseghe tseghe a ken taaikôngo, tar u inya i bar u ma or tem ker ga yô." 
Jeremiah17:7 Or u nan suur sha TER yô, saan nan iyol, u TER A lu ishuur u nan yô." 
Jeremiah17:8 Gadia nana hingir er kon u i môôr u hen kpemnger, u u samber amise a u, a za ar shin kungômnger, u u cie mtsee u iyange ga, kpa ika i u i lu ndor shough shough; inyom i icegh ki ze kpaa, ishima ia nyian u ga, man shi ua de u umen atam kpaa ga." 
Jeremiah17:9 Ishima i wa atseregh je hemba hanma kwagh cii, i vihi je gande; ka an nana fatyô u fan i?" 
Jeremiah17:10 Mo TER M tev ishima, M kar ahi, sha u Me na hanma or sha igbenda i nan, sha inja i atam a aeren a nan." 
Jeremiah17:11 Er ikuna i ka i tsev aji a i lu i, i te a ga yô, kape or u nan kohol inyaregh, kpa i lu sha gbenda u mimi ga, nan lu la; ken atô u ayange a nan nana undu ki man sha mkur u nan yô, nana hingir ibumeor." 
Jeremiah17:12 Ikônough ki torough ki icivirigh, ki i kende ki sha sha hiihii je, ka icighanjiir wase." 
Jeremiah17:13 We TERE, ishimaverenkeghen i Iserael, mba ve undu U cii vea va ahenge. Mba ve pav a Mo cii, á nger ve hen inya, sha ci u ve undu TER, imbor i mngerem ma umam la." 
Jeremiah17:14 Beem angev, TERE, tsô me hingir dedoo; yimam, tsô me war; iwuese yam ka We je." 
Jeremiah17:15 Nenge, mba kaan a mo er, Kwaghôron u TER ngu hana? A̱ va ase!" 
Jeremiah17:16 Mo yô, m torough a We mer va a kwagh u bo ga, iyange i bo kpaa m tôm i ga; U fa, kwagh u a due ken zwa wam yô, lu sha ishigh You." 
Jeremiah17:17 De hingir mo kwagh u cieryol; ga; U ngu ijiir yam i yeren je sha iyange i kwaghbo. 
Jeremiah17:18 Mba ve tevem a ican ve̱ va ahenge, kpa mo yô, de rumun m̱ va ahenga ga; ve yô, mciem ma̱ haa ve iyol, kpa mo yô, mciem ma̱ de heem iyol ga; va a kwaghbo sha a ve, sombo ve vughô vughô." 
Jeremiah17:19 TER kaa a mo nahan er: Za, za tile hen hunda u ônov mba iorov, u utor mba Yuda ve nyer min shi ve dugh min kpaa la, kua hen ihinda i Yerusalem cii;" 
Jeremiah17:20 kaa a ve wer: Ungwa nen kwaghôron u TER, ne utor mba Yuda, man Mbayuda cii kua mba ve tem ken Yerusalem cii, ne mba ne nyer ken ihinda ne cii;" 
Jeremiah17:21 TER ngu kaan nahan er: Ver nen ishima sha ci u uma wen, de tee nen ma ikav sha iyange i memen ga, man shi de nyer nen a mi sha ihinda i Yerusalem kpaa ga." 
Jeremiah17:22 Man shi de tee nen ma ikav ken uya enev, duen a mi sha iyange i memen ga, man shi de eren nen ma tom kpaa ga, kpa tseghan nen iyange i memen er lu M kaa uter enev nahan." 
Jeremiah17:23 Kpa ve wa iko ga, man shi ve ver ato kpaa ga, ve nômbo ikôr ve her, sha u vea ungwa ga, man sha u vea ngohol ityesen kpaa ga yô." 
Jeremiah17:24 Tsô, aluer nea ungwam mimi mimi, kape TER A kaa ne, man nea kera nyôron a ikav sha ihinda i gar ne sha iyange i memen ga, kpa nea tsegha iyange i memen, sha u eren ma tom sha i ga yô;" 
Jeremiah17:25 nahan sha ihinda i gar ne utor man atiator vea nyôr, mbateman sha ikônough ki torough ki Davidi man, mbateman sha akekeautya kua sha anyinya, ve man atiator a ve man nomsombaiorov mba Yuda, man mba ve tem ken Yerusalem kpaa; man gar ne una hingir igbekeke." 
Jeremiah17:26 Á due ken agar a Yuda, man ken iningirtar i Yerusalem, man ken tar u Benyamin, man shin pev, man sha iwo kua ken Imbusutariyan la, á va a iniav mbi nanden man iniav mbi sôngon man iniav mbi sha samuyia kua kwaghhumandoon man shi á va a iniav mbi ishughun hen iyou i TER kpaa." 
Jeremiah17:27 Kpa aluer nea ungwam ga, nea rumun u tseghan iyange i memen ga, man u den ikav mbi tôôn nyôron a mi hen ihinda i Yerusalem sha iyange i memen ga, nahan Me keer usu hen ihinda na, ua hia ayou a utor a Yerusalem, á kera pir u kpaa ga." 
Jeremiah18:1 Kwaghôron ne due hen TER va hen Yeremia, er:" 
Jeremiah18:2 Mough za shin iyou i ormaantyegh, ka shin la man Me na, ú ungwa akaaôron Am ye." 
Jeremiah18:3 Nahan m sen shin iyou i ormaantyegh; man nenge, a lu eren tom ave je, sha ikyekye." 
Jeremiah18:4 Ityegh ki a lu maan la, ki vihin kera yô, er inyatyuu ka i er sha ave a ormaantyegh nahan, a maa a gema ki ityegh kigenegh kposo, er i doo ormaantyegh la u eren yô." 
Jeremiah18:5 Tsô kwaghôron u TER va her a mo, er:" 
Jeremiah18:6 We ya u Iserael, Me kera fatyô u eren a ven er ormaantyegh ne nahan gaa? Kape TER A kaa ne. Nenge, er inyatyuu ka i lu ken uwegh ku ormaantyegh nahan, kape ne kpaa ne lu ken uwegh Agh ne, we ya u Iserael." 
Jeremiah18:7 Shighe gen ka M ôr kwagh sha ikurior, man sha tartor, sha u wuhen man u yôhôl man u timin ve kera;" 
Jeremiah18:8 kpa aluer ikurior i M ter i la, ia gema ia undu ifer i i yô, Me vaa afanyô, Me de kwaghbo u M we ishima u eren i la." 
Jeremiah18:9 Shighe gen yô, ka M ôr kwagh sha ikurior, man sha tartor, sha u maan man u môôr ve," 
Jeremiah18:10 kpa aluer vea er ifer sha ishigh Yagh, vea wa iko sha imo Yam ga yô, nahan Me vaa afanyô, Me de kwagh u doon u M kaa Mer, Me er ve la." 
Jeremiah18:11 Nahan hegen yô, shi ôr kwagh a ior i Yuda man mba ve tem ken Yerusalem, kaa wer: TER ngu kaan nahan er: Nenge, M ngu sôron kwaghbo veren a ver, Mer, a̱ va tser ne, man M ngu henen kwagh u Me er ne yô; shi hide nen, hanma or nana̱ gbihi gbenda u nan u ifer la, sôr igbenda yen kua aeren a en." 
Jeremiah18:12 Kpa mba kaan er: Ka gbilin tsô, sé zende sha mbamhen asev, man hanmô wase nana er sha mcighir u ishima i nan i bo la." 
Jeremiah18:13 Nahan yô, TER ngu kaan nahan er: Pine nen ase ken akuraior, ner: Ka anti nan vande ungwan imbakwagh ne; iniunkwase i Iserael er kwagh u vihin je zua ga." 
Jeremiah18:14 Senou u sha Lebanon la, una de luun sha vande u sha ikôngo la mayange kpa? Shin mngerem ma ndôhôr ma ma kough ken ijiir i caa maa uma keraa?" 
Jeremiah18:15 Nahan kpaa, ior Av yô, M hungul ve, ve nande akaagbilinigh nagh; ve nôngo gbev sha igbenda ve, igbenda i tsuaa la, er ve gem ve zenden sha anigbendav mba sha kpe, gbenda u i kaha u ga yô," 
Jeremiah18:16 sha u geman tar ve̱ hingir kwagh u cieryol, man kwagh u gbiren iwer a mi gbem sha won; hanma or u nan kar heregh yô, á cier nan iyol, nana jingir ityough." 
Jeremiah18:17 Me sambe ve, er ka sha ahumbe a sha ityoughkitaregh nahan, sha ishigh ki mbaihomov vev. Me gema ijime a ve, Me ver ishigh sha a ve ga, sha iyange i kwaghbo a tser ve la." 
Jeremiah18:18 Tsô ve kaa er: Va, sé hen nen kwagh u sé er Yeremia yô; gadia atindiakaa aa bee hen pristi ga, mhen kpaa una bee hen orfankwagh ga, kwaghôron kpaa una bee hen profeti ga. Va, sé za vihi nen un sha nombor; sé kera ver nen ishima sha ma kwaghôron na môm môm ga." 
Jeremiah18:19 Ver ishima sha a mo, TERE, ungwa imo i mba ve mough num a mo la." 
Jeremiah18:20 Á er or kwagh u bo sha kwagh u dedoo u nan er la, shinii? Gadia ve time uma wam ihungwa i hônon. Umbur er m til sha ishigh You sha u ôron kwagh u dedoo sha ci ve, sha u geman a iyugh You sha a ve kera yô," 
Jeremiah18:21 nahan yô, gema ônov vev na ijen, man shi na ve sha tahav mbu sanker; kasev vev ve̱ hingir aveve man shi ve̱ hingir kasev mba côgholov kpaa; noov vev ku u̱ wua ve, man ikaior vev sanker a̱ wua ve ken utya." 
Jeremiah18:22 I̱ ungwa shisha vaa ken uya vev, zum u Ú va bur ve a ikumutya la, gadia ve time ihungwa sha u kôron mo, man ve hôn ityo sha u kôron angahar a am." 
Jeremiah18:23 Nahan kpaa, We, TERE, U fa mhen ve u ve hen sha u wuan mo la cii; de deen iferkwagh ve ga, man shi de esen isholibo ve kera sha ishigh You kpaa ga, ve gba sha ishigh You; er a ve sha ishima You, sha shighe u Ú yugh yô." 
Jeremiah19:1 TER kaa nahan er: Za, za yam agu u ormaantyegh, due a mbatamen mbagenev, kua upristi mba tamen mbagenev;" 
Jeremiah19:2 za shin Pev u Ben-hinom, u a lu sha ishigh ki Hunda u Atsengegh la, za yôô akaaôron a Me kaa U la, heregh;" 
Jeremiah19:3 kaa wer: Ungwa nen kwaghôron u TER, ne utor mba Yuda, kua ne mba ne tem ken Yerusalem; TER u akum a Sha, Aôndo u Iserael, ngu kaan nahan er: Nenge, Me va a kwaghbo sha ijiir ne, u hanma or u nana ungwa un, ato á hura nan ker yô;" 
Jeremiah19:4 sha ci u ve undum man ve nzughul a ijiir ne, ve nande mbaaôndo mbagenev nagh ker, mba, ve man uter vev kua utor mba Yuda kpaa fa ve ga la; man ve iv ijiir ne sha awambe a mbaishôôv a i hee a inya la;" 
Jeremiah19:5 man ve maa ajiir a taven sha a Baal, sha u nanden ônov vev mba nomso sha usu, nan Baal iniav mbi nanden a mi, kwagh u M ne zwa ga, man shi M kaa kpaa ga, man shi a nyer ken ishima Yam kpaa ga yô." 
Jeremiah19:6 Nahan yô, nenge ayange nga van, kape TER A kaa ne, a á kera yila ijiir ne er Tofeti, shin Pev u Ben-hinom kpaa ga, kpa á yila er Pev u Wuan ior heregh." 
Jeremiah19:7 Me vihi mhen u Yuda man Yerusalem hen ijiir ne, Me na, vea kpe ku u sha sanker sha ishigh ki mbaihomov vev, man sha uwegh ku mba ve keren uma ve yô; Me na akom a ve kpaa, aa hingir kwaghyan u inyon i Sha man u ishôso i shin tar kpaa." 
Jeremiah19:8 Me gema gar ne una hingir kwagh u cieryol man kwagh u gbiren iwer min; hanma or u nana kar her yô, á cier nan iyol, nana gbire iwer sha ci u atsan a a um sha a na la cii." 
Jeremiah19:9 Shi Me na, vea ya inyam i ônov vev mba nomso kua inyam i ônov vev mba kasev, hanma or nana ya inyam i ikar u nan, sha mkase u i kase gar man m-imbishi u mbaihomov vev, man mba ve keren uma ve, vea imbishi ve yô." 
Jeremiah19:10 Nahan hembe agu la sha ishigh ki ior mba ve ze a we la," 
Jeremiah19:11 man kaa a ve wer: TER u akum a Sha ngu kaan nahan er: Kape M hembe ior mban kua gar ne je ne, er or ka nan hembe ityegh je ki gande u shi sôron la; man vea ii ken Tofeti sha ci u ijiir i iin, ia shi ape genegh ga yô." 
Jeremiah19:12 Kape Me er a ijiir ne je ne, kua mba ve tem ken i, kape TER A kaa ne; Me gema gar ne una hingir er Tofeti nahan je;" 
Jeremiah19:13 uya mba Yerusalem man uya mba utor mba Yuda vea hingir er Tofeti nahan, ijiir i i lu wang ga yô, uya cii mba i nanden akum a Sha cii nagh sha ityor ve la, shi i toon mbaaôndo mbagenev iniav mbi man sha mi la." 
Jeremiah19:14 Nahan Yeremia hire hen Tofeti, henpe TER tindi un sha u za ôron kwagh la; a va tile hen tembe u iyou i TER, man a kaa a ior cii er:" 
Jeremiah19:15 TER u akum a Sha, Aôndo u Iserael, ngu kaan nahan er: Nenge, Me va a kwaghbo sha gar ne kua angarev nav cii, u M ter sha a ve la cii; sha ci u ve nembe ikôr, ve kera ongo akaaôron Am ga yô." 
Jeremiah20:1 Tsô Pashur, wan u Imer, u a lu orvesen cii sha tom u iyou i TER la, ungwa er Yeremia lu ôron kwagh pasen akaa angan yô," 
Jeremiah20:2 nahan Pashur gbidye profeti Yeremia man a za mande un igbe i i lu hen Hunda u Benyamin u sha u hen iyou i TER la. 
Jeremiah20:3 Tsô kper nan gen yô, Pashur dugh Yeremia igbe. Nahan Yeremia kaa a na er: TER kera yila u iti er Pashur ga, kpa er Magor-misa-bibi (Mcieryol kase tser)." 
Jeremiah20:4 Gadia TER ngu kaan nahan er: Nenge, Me gema u ú hingir iyol you kwagh u cieryol, akar a ou cii kpaa ú cier a iyol; aa kpe ku u sha sanker u mbaihomov vev, ashe ou je kpaa aa nenge; man shi Me na Yuda cii sha ikev i tor u Babilon, una yem a ve uikangen hen Babilon, man una wua ve sha sanker." 
Jeremiah20:5 Man shi Me na inyaregh ki gar ne cii, man mtsera na cii, man ikav nav mbi taver ishe cii; een, akaa a injaa a utor mba Yuda cii, Me na a sha ikev i mbaihomov vev, vea ya ishar sha a, vea kura a, man vea yem a mi sha Babilon" 
Jeremiah20:6 Man we, Pashur, kua mba ve tem ken ya wou cii, á yem a ven uikangen; ú za nyôr sha Babilon je, ka keela ú za kpe, man shi ka keela kpaa á ii u ye, we kua akar a ou cii, a u lu ôron ve kwaghôron u profeti sha aie la." 
Jeremiah20:7 TERE, U tsulem man mo kpaa m rumun mer, i̱ tsulem. U hembam agee, U nenger mo; m hingir kwagh u ahan iyange jimin cii, hanma or nan ngu nahan mo tar." 
Jeremiah20:8 Gadia hanma shighe u ka mea ôron kwagh yô, m gba ngoron; m genger imo mer: Ipila man mkighir! Sha ci u kwaghôron u TER gema hingir u nan mo iheen man tarnahan iyange jimin cii." 
Jeremiah20:9 Ka mea kaa mer: Me kera ter Un ga, me kera ôr kwagh ken iti Na kpaa ga, nahan i hingir mo ken ishima er usu u hian, u i cir u ken akuhe am yô, m wa ishima je, m vôr, hembam kera." 
Jeremiah20:10 Gadia m ungwa mkese u ior kpishi, mcieryol kase tser! Wa un akaa iyol, se kpaa sé wa un akaa iyol. Ior mba m lu a ve doo doo cii mba veren ashe er m̱ nôngo gbev; Adooga una tumbul, nahan sé hemba un, sé or un iyev." 
Jeremiah20:11 Kpa TER ngu a mo er orageegh u cier iyol; nahan yô, mba ve tevem a ican vea nôngo gbev, vea hemba ga; vea va ahenge tsung je, sha ci u ikôr doo ve ga, ka kunya u gbem sha won je, u ua hungul mayange ga yô." 
Jeremiah20:12 Kpa TER u akum a Sha u U kar mbaperapera, U nengen ahi kua ishima kpaa ne, ma̱ m nenge iyev You i oron sha a ve; gadia ka We, m we U kwagh wam sha ikev ye." 
Jeremiah20:13 Wa nen TER icam, wuese nen TER, gadia A yima uma u oribanave sha ikev i mbaaferev." 
Jeremiah20:14 Ifan i̱ kôr iyange i i marem sha i la; iyange i ngôm marem la i̱ de luun a iveren ga. 
Jeremiah20:15 Ifan i̱ kôr or u nan ve terem a loho, er: I mar u wannomso, nan ne er i̱ saan un iyol kpishi la." 
Jeremiah20:16 Or shon la nana̱ hingir er agar a TER yôhôl a, je A kera vaa afanyô ga la, nana̱ ungwa shisha vaa pepe man ikengeutya iyange sha tembe," 
Jeremiah20:17 sha ci u A wuam er m lu ken uya la ga; ngôm ma a hingir uwar wam, iyav nav ma mbu gbe lun nahan gbem tsô." 
Jeremiah20:18 Ka nyi je man m shi dugh ase ken uya sha u nengen ican man ishima vihin je ayange am a gbe been kera sha kunya nahana? 
Jeremiah21:1 Kwaghôron ne due hen TER va hen Yeremia, zum u tor Sedekia tindi Pashur wan u Malkia her a na kua Sefania wan u pristi Maaseya la, er:" 
Jeremiah21:2 Shi pine ase ishima i TER; gadia Nebukadinesar, tor u Babilon ngu nôngon ityav a vese; alaghga TER Una er a vese sha aeren a Na a kpilighyol la cii, sha er una mough her a vese kera yô." 
Jeremiah21:3 Nahan Yeremia kaa a ver er: Kaa nen Sedekia nahan ner: 
Jeremiah21:4 TER, Aôndo u Iserael, ngu kaan nahan er: Nenge, Me hide a ikav mbi utyav mbi mbi lu sha ikev yen la ijime, mbi ne nôngo ityav a mi ken won gar a tor u Babilon, man a Mbakaldi, mba ve kase ne la, Me kohol mbi ken atô u gar ne." 
Jeremiah21:5 Mo iyol Yam je Me nôngo ityav a ven sha uwegh ku naregh man sha uwegh ku ageegh, á lu sha ishima i nyoon man sha iyugh, kua sha ishima i vihin tsung je." 
Jeremiah21:6 Me tsaha mba ve tem ken gar ne, or kua zendenya; bouange u vesen una wua ve." 
Jeremiah21:7 Ken masetyô la yô, kape TER A kaa ne, Me gema Sedekia tor u Yuda man mbatomov nav, kua ior mba ken gar ne mba ve wer bouange man sanker kua ijen la, Me na ve sha ikev i Nebukadinesar tor u Babilon man sha ikev i mbaihomov vev, kua sha ikev i mba ve keren uma ve, una wua ve sha zwa u sanker, una de ve uma ga, mhôônom maa kôr un a ve ga, man una zungwe ve mhôônom kpaa ga." 
Jeremiah21:8 Kaa ior mban wer: TER ngu kaan nahan er: Nenge, M ngu veren ne gbenda u uma kua gbenda u kuugh sha ishi:" 
Jeremiah21:9 Or u nan hanger akughul ken gar ne yô, nana kpe ku u sha sanker man u sha ijen kua u sha bouange; kpa or u nan dugh nan za hingir sha ikev i Mbakaldi, mba ve kase ne sha utya la yô, ka nan nana lu uma ye, man uma u nan una hingir nan er ka ishar nan ye yô." 
Jeremiah21:10 Gadia M gema ishigh M ver sha gar ne, ka sha u eren un kwagh u vihin, ka kwagh u dedoo ga, kape TER A kaa ne: á gema un á na sha ikev i tor u Babilon, una nande un sha usu." 
Jeremiah21:11 Sha kwagh u ya u tor u Yuda yô, ungwa nen kwaghôron u TER:" 
Jeremiah21:12 We, ya u Davidi, TER ngu kaan nahan er: Ôron ijir sha mimi pepe, yiman mba i nzughul a ve sha ikev i ipilaor la, sha er iyugh Yam i̱ de dugh er usu nahan u̱ hia zan zan ma or nana̱ fatyô u pirin u ga ze, sha ci u iferkwagh i aeren a en la." 
Jeremiah21:13 Nenge, M ngu num a we, we u u tem shin pev, we vande u shin pev la, kape TER A kaa ne; ne mba ne kaa ner: Ka an je nana va ta num sha a vese? Man shi ka anti nana fatyô u nyôron shin ajiir a ase a temana?" 
Jeremiah21:14 Tsô Me tsaha ne sha atam a aeren a en vough, kape TER A kaa ne; Me keer usu ken ikô na, ua hia hanma kwagh u a kase un cii." 
Jeremiah22:1 TER kaa er: Sen shin ya u tor u Yuda, za ôr kwagh ne her," 
Jeremiah22:2 kaa wer: Ungwa kwaghôron u TER, we tor u Yuda, u u tem sha ikônough ki torough ki Davidi ne, we man mbatomov ou, kua ior ou mba ve nyer sha ihinda ne." 
Jeremiah22:3 TER ngu kaan nahan er: Ôron nen ijir sha mimi man perapera, yiman mba i nzughul a ve sha ikev i ipilaor; de kera eren orvannya shin ancôghol shin kwasecôghol kwagh u bo shin kwagh u iperagh ga, man shi de kera haan awambe a orishôôgh inya hen ijiir ne ga." 
Jeremiah22:4 Gadia aluer ú er kwagh ne keng yô, nahan utor mba ve tem sha ikônough ki torough ki Davidi, mba ve zenden a akekeautya man ve hende anyinya yô, vea nyôr hen ihinda i ya ne; un a mbatomov nav, kua ior nav." 
Jeremiah22:5 Kpa aluer nea ungwa kwaghôron ne ga yô, M bum sha iyol Yam je, kape TER A kaa ne, ya ne una hingir ice je." 
Jeremiah22:6 Gadia TER ngu kaan sha kwagh u ya u tor u Yuda nahan er: U hingir Mo Gileadi, ityough ki Lebanon je; nahan kpaa Me gema u ú hingir taaikôngo je man er agar a a lu a ma or u teman ker ga yô." 
Jeremiah22:7 Man shi Me ver mba vea tim u la, hanmô ve a ikav mbi tswamev mbi nan; vea gber usedar ou mba hemban doon mbala, vea haa ve ken usu." 
Jeremiah22:8 Akuraior kpishi aa kar hen gar ne, aa kaa ayol a a er: Ka sha ci u nyi man TER A shi er a zegegar ne nahana?" 
Jeremiah22:9 Vea gema á kaa er: Ka sha ci u ve gbihi ikuryan i TER, Aôndo ve, man ve gur ve civir mbaaôndo mbagenev, ve eren ve tom kpaa yô." 
Jeremiah22:10 De vaan nen u a kpe la ga, man shi de zungu un kpa ga; kpa vaa nen tsung sha ci u wen u a yem la, gadia una kera hide ga, una kera nenge a tar u i mar un ker la kpaa ga." 
Jeremiah22:11 Gadia TER ngu kaan sha kwagh u Shalum wan u Yoshia, tor u Yuda u a tema tor sha ityough ki ter na Yoshia, u a mough hen ijiir ne kera ne, er: Una kera hide mayange ga;" 
Jeremiah22:12 kpa ijiir i i yem a na uikangen her la, ka ker je una kpe ye, una kera nenge tar ne ashe ga." 
Jeremiah22:13 Kwagh á tser or u nan maa ya u nan sha perapera ga la, man ukpombaayoughouv mba nan kpaa sha mimi ga la; u nan ne orgen tom, nan eren nan gbilin, injar i nan kpaa nan kimbi nan ga la;" 
Jeremiah22:14 U nan kaa er: Me maa zegeyou, me tôndo ukpo mba shaav ve̱ gbangese, man nan gber uwindou, nan cir un ikon i sedar, nan shighe un icigh ki nyian." 
Jeremiah22:15 Nahan u tema tor je ve he, er u nenge u hemban sha ikon i sedar la zee! Teru lu yan kwagh man man kwagh man eren akaa a mimi, kua a perapera gaa? Nahan kpe un iyol." 
Jeremiah22:16 A wa iko sha ijir i mbaatsanev kua mbaibanave, nahan tar doo. Kera ka u fan Mo je la gaa? Kape TER A kaa ne." 
Jeremiah22:17 Kpa ishe you kua ishima you mba sha ma kwagh ugen ga saa mtsera u dang man u haan awambe a orishôôgh, man u eren kwagh sha mkighir man u ngohol kwagh sha apera." 
Jeremiah22:18 Nahan yô, TER ngu kaan sha kwagh u Yehoyakim wan u Yoshia, tor u Yuda la, nahan er: Á kera vaa un er: Aye, anngômô! Shin: Aye, anngôm u kwase! kpaa ga. Á kera vaa un er: Aye, Tere! Shin: Aye, orcivirigh! kpaa ga." 
Jeremiah22:19 Á ii un sha inja i m-ii u jaki, á kpela un á ta kera ca a ihinda i Yerusalem." 
Jeremiah22:20 Za unde sha Lebanon, za vaa; genger imo you sha Bashan; vaa shin Abarim; gadia i tim mba ve doo u ishima la cii." 
Jeremiah22:21 M ôr u kwagh zum u u tema kpe u iyol la; u gema u kaa wer: Me ungwa ga. Ka inja you je la, hii iyev wou je, u venda u ungwa imo Yam." 
Jeremiah22:22 Mbakuranilev ou cii ahumbe aa kar a ve kera mba ve doo u ishima á yem a ve uikangen; nahan ú va ahenge keng, ú ya kunya sha ci u iferkwagh you cii." 
Jeremiah22:23 We or u u tem sha Lebanon, u wa iya you sha ikon i sedar ne, nenge imbamtoghol i ú toghol sha shighe u ican i va tser u yô, bee er ka mnyoonom ma kwase u toghol mar nahan!" 
Jeremiah22:24 Er M lu u uma ne, kape TER A kaa ne: Shin Konia wan u Yehoyakim tor u Yuda una lu kunya u veren ikav a mi sha uwegh Agh ku yanegh je kpaa, nahan kpaa Me tsuwa u kera," 
Jeremiah22:25 Me na u sha ikev i mba ve keren uma wou, man sha ikev i mba u cie ve yô, ka sha ikev i tor Nebukadinesar tor u Babilon, man sha ikev Mbakaldi je la." 
Jeremiah22:26 Me ta u kera, kua ngôu, u a mar u la kpaa, ken tar ugen, u i mar ne ker ga la, ka keregh né za kpe ye." 
Jeremiah22:27 Kpa tar u u sar uma ve u hiden hen u la, vea hide her ga." 
Jeremiah22:28 Nahan Konia shon ne, ka kokotye u lahana? Ityegh ki lun a inja ga zee? Hii nan man i te ve kera, un kua vor na, i te ve ken tar u ve fe u ga nahana?" 
Jeremiah22:29 We tar, tara, tara, ungwa ase imo i TER." 
Jeremiah22:30 TER ngu kaan nahan er: Nger wer: Or ne ngu a wan ga, ka or u tar ua wa un sha ayange a na ga, gadia ma wan na u ikôr i lagh nan, nana tema sha ikônough ki torough ki Davidi, nana ya tor ken Yuda, nana lu ga." 
Jeremiah23:1 Kwagh tser mbakuranilev mba ve timin iyôngo shi ve sambe i hen ijiir yam i sôôso ilev la! Kape TER A kaa la. 
Jeremiah23:2 Nahan yô, TER, Aôndo u Iserael ngu kaan sha kwagh u mbakuranilev mba ve koson ior Av ne, nahan er: Ne gema ne sambe ikumuile Yam, ne zenda i kera, ne kera nenge sha i ga; nenge Me va tsaha ne sha ifer i aeren a en la, kape TER A kaa ne." 
Jeremiah23:3 Mo Me kohol asande a ikumuile Yam a a shi her la, ken ityar i M zende i i yem ker la cii, Me shi Me hire a i hen ajiir a i; ia ngee kpishi, ia seer a seer." 
Jeremiah23:4 Me shi Me ver mbakuranilev sha i, mba vea sôôso i yô; ia kera cia kwagh ga, shin kwagh á cier i iyol kpaa ga, hanmôgh kia kera ban ken i ga, kape TER A kaa ne." 
Jeremiah23:5 Nenge, ayange nga van, kape TER A kaa ne, a Me mough Davidi a Gbaa u perapera, Una tema tor, Una eren kwagh sha kwaghfan, Una ôr ijir sha mimi man Una er perapera sha tar." 
Jeremiah23:6 Sha ayange Na, Yuda una war, man Iserael kpaa una tema bem bem; iti i á yilan Un a mi je yô, er: TER KA PERAPERA WASE." 
Jeremiah23:7 Nahan yô, nenge ayange nga van, kape TER A kaa ne, a á kera kaa er: Er TER u A dugh a Mbaiserael ken tar u Igipiti A lu u uma ne, ga," 
Jeremiah23:8 kpa á kaa er: Er TER u A dugh man A hemen vor u ya u Iserael shin tar u Imbusutarimese man ken ityar i M zende ve, ve yem ker la cii A lu u uma ne. Vea tema ken tar ve jim." 
Jeremiah23:9 Sha kwagh u uprofeti: Ishima vihim ker cii, akuhe am cii tenger; m hingir er orhumdenmsôrom nahan, man er or u wain a ker nan yô; sha ci u TER man sha ci u akaaôron a Na a tseghan la." 
Jeremiah23:10 Gadia tar ne iv a udyambaiorov; ifan gema na tar mzungu; ajiir a yan toho a ken taaikôngo uma cii; kwagh u ve ze her ayem yô, saa ka u bo; gbenda u ve keren tahav a mi yô, ka u mimi ga." 
Jeremiah23:11 Gadia profeti kua pristi ve uhar cii mba we Aôndo iko ga; ken iyou Yam je kpaa M tser a ifer ve, kape TER A kaa ne." 
Jeremiah23:12 Nahan yô, gbenda ve ua hingir ve er ka ajiir a lyemen ken ime; á mgbegha ve vea gba shimi; gadia Me haa kwaghbo sha a ve sha inyom i á va tsaha ve la, kape TER A kaa ne." 
Jeremiah23:13 M nenge a udangmbaakaav hen uprofeti mba Samaria: mba ôron kwagh pasen ken iti i Baal, ve na ior Av Iserael ve tsume gbenda." 
Jeremiah23:14 Kpa ken uprofeti mba Yerusalem yô, M nenge a kwagh u ndôhôrshima; ka ve er idya, ve zenden sha aie, ve taver ave a mbaerenifer, je ma or môm u geman undun ifer i nan nan ngu ga; ve cii ve hingir Mo er Sodom nahan, man mba ve tem ken a na er Gomora yô." 
Jeremiah23:15 Nahan yô, TER u akum a Sha ngu kaan sha kwagh u uprofeti nahan er: Nenge, Me na ve kon u yuwan, ve̱ ya, man shi Me na ve mngerem ma meghem, ve̱ ma; gadia ka ken uprofeti mba Yerusalem je u wan Aôndo iko ga a dugh a nyer ken tar la cii ye." 
Jeremiah23:16 TER u akum a Sha ngu kaan nahan er: De we nen iko sha akaaôron a uprofeti mba ve ôron ne kwagh la ga; mba tesen ne u veren ishima sha gbilinkwagh; kwagh u ve nenge a mi, ve er na la, ka u sha asema a ve tsô, ka kwagh u sha zwa u TER ga." 
Jeremiah23:17 Mba zeren kaan a mbalahan Mo mbala er: TER kaa er: nea lu a bem; man hanma or u nan zenden sha mcighir u ishima i nan, ve kaa a nan er: Ma kwaghbo una tser u ga." 
Jeremiah23:18 Gadia ka anti nan til ken mhen u TER sha u nana nenge man nana ungwa kwaghôron Naa? Ka anti nan ver ato sha kwaghôron Na, nan ongo Unu?" 
Jeremiah23:19 Nenge, zegeahumbe u TER, ka iyugh je la, i dugh, ka hiar je; ka sha ityough ki mbaaferev je una va ta ye." 
Jeremiah23:20 Ishima i vihin i TER ia hide ga, saa Una kure man Una er sha awashima Na; ka sha ayange a masetyô man né va kav inja i kwagh ne wanger wanger ye." 
Jeremiah23:21 M tindi uprofeti mban ga, nahan kpaa ve gba zan tsô; M ôr kwagh a ve ga, nahan kpaa mba gbe ôron kwaghôron u uprofeti tsô." 
Jeremiah23:22 Kpa aluer yan vea til ken mhen Wam yô, ma ve ne ior Av ma ve ongo akaaôron Am, ma ve gem ve sha gbenda ve u bo la kera, kua sha ifer i aeren a ve kpaa." 
Jeremiah23:23 Mo M ngu Aôndo u ikuaa? Kape TER A kaa ne, kera ka Aôndo u caa gaa?" 
Jeremiah23:24 Ma or nana fatyô u za yeren ken ajiir a ken iuv je er Mo Me nenge a nan ga yôô? Kape TER a kaa ne. M iv Sha man tar gaa? Kape TER A kaa ne. 
Jeremiah23:25 M ungwa kwagh u uprofeti ve kaa la, mba ve ôron kwaghôron u uprofeti sha aie ken iti Yam, er: Mnyam ciem, mnyam ciem la." 
Jeremiah23:26 Shi nan je man kwagh ne una bee uprofeti mba ve ôron kwaghôron u profeti sha aie ken asema, uprofeti mba sha icugh i asema ve la," 
Jeremiah23:27 mba ve ver ishima u nan ior Av, iti Yam i̱ hungul ve sha mnyam vem ma ve er ayol a ve la, er uter vev kpaa, iti Yam lu hungul ve, sha ci u Baal nahana?" 
Jeremiah23:28 Profeti u a lu a mnyam ma cien yô, a̱ ôr ase mnyam shi un di u a lu a kwaghôron Wam kpaa, a̱ ôr kwaghôron Wam sha mimi. Adenga alakema kuma sha alakema je kpa? Kape TER A kaa ne." 
Jeremiah23:29 Kwaghôron wam ngu er usu nahan gaa? Kape TER A kaa ne, man er nondo u hemben awen nahan kpaa gaa?" 
Jeremiah23:30 Nahan yô, nenge, M ngu num a uprofeti, kape TER A kaa ne, mba ve iin akaaôron a Am hen ayol a ve la." 
Jeremiah23:31 Nenge, M ngu num a uprofeti, kape TER A kaa ne, mba ve kaan sha zwa ve, er: Kape A kaa ne." 
Jeremiah23:32 Nenge, M ngu num a mba ve er mnyam ma cien la, kape TER A kaa ne, man ve pasen ma, ve ne ior Av ve tsum sha aie ve, kua kwaghôron ve u sha ihagher la; nahan kpaa, Mo M tindi ve ga, M na ve zwa kpaa ga; man shi vea lu ior mban a ma inja je ga, kape TER A kaa ne." 
Jeremiah23:33 Aluer ior mban, shin profeti, shin pristi, una pine u er: Ikav mbi TER ka nyi? Tsô u kaa a ve, wer: Ka ne je ne lu ikav ye! Me ta ne kera, kape TER A kaa ne." 
Jeremiah23:34 Man sha kwagh u profeti man pristi man ior mban mba ve kaan er: “Ikav mbi TER” yô—Me tsaha or la kua ya u nan. 
Jeremiah23:35 Kaa nen hanmô wen a or u wan ndor a nan man hanmô wen a anngô u nan nahan ner: TER kaa imo nana? Man, TER ôr kwagh er nana?" 
Jeremiah23:36 De kera seer teren nen kwagh u ikav mbi TER la ga; gadia kwaghôron u hanma or una hingir ikav mbi nan; gadia ne goom akaaôron a Aôndo u uma, TER u akum a Sha, Aôndo wase." 
Jeremiah23:37 Kaa a profeti nahan wer: TER kaa imo nana? Man TER ôr kwagh nana? 
Jeremiah23:38 Kpa aluer nea kaa ner: “Ikav mbi TER” yô, nahan yô, TER kaa nahan er: Er ne er kwagh ne, ne kaa ner: “Ikav mbi TER” yô, man M vande tindin ne a loho Mer: De kera kaan nen ner: “Ikav mbi TER” ga," 
Jeremiah23:39 sha ci u nahan yô, nenge, Me tôô ne man gar u M na ne kua uter enev la, Me ta ne sha ishigh Yagh kera;" 
Jeremiah23:40 Me haa ne aheen a tsôron, man kunya u ua hungul mayange ga yô." 
Jeremiah24:1 TER tesem, yô, nenge, akese ahar a atam a tur lu sha ishigh ki tempel u TER; lu ken masejime u Nebukadinesar tor u Babilon yem a Yekonia wan u Yehoyakim, tor u Yuda, uikangen, kua atiator a Yuda, man mbaeren tomaveegh kua mbavareniwa kpaa, a due a ve ken Yerusalem kera, a va a ve sha Babilon la." 
Jeremiah24:2 Ikese i môm lu a atam a tur a dedoo je, er ka atam a tur a ka a vande vian nahan; man ikese igen la yô, lu a atam a tur a vihin tsung je, vihi je gande u yan a." 
Jeremiah24:3 Tsô TER kaa a mo er: Ka nyi u nenge a mi Yeremia? M kaa mer: Atam a tur; a doon la, a doo kpishi; man shi a bo la gema vihi tsung, vihi je gande u yan a." 
Jeremiah24:4 Nahan kwaghôron u TER va her a mo, er:" 
Jeremiah24:5 TER, Aôndo u Iserael, ngu kaan nahan er: Er atam a tur a dedoo a lu nahan, kape Me wa Mbayuda mba i yem a ve uikangen la iko, mba M tindi ve, ve mough hen ijiir ne, ve yem ken tar u Mbakaldi la, sha u eren a ve dedoo." 
Jeremiah24:6 Gadia Me ver ashe Am sha a ve sha u eren a ve dedoo, shi Me hide a ve hen tar ne; Me maa ve, Me yôhôl ve ga; Me môôr ve, Me wuhe ve ga." 
Jeremiah24:7 Me na ve ishima sha u vea fa er Mo M lu TER yô; vea hingir ior Av je, Mo kpaa Me lu Aôndo ve, gadia vea hide her a Mo a ishima i môm." 
Jeremiah24:8 Man er atam a tur, a a vihi gande u yan a la, a lu nahan— mimi je TER ngu kaan nahan er: Kape Me er a Sedekia tor u Yuda, man atiator a na man asande a Yerusalem mba ve shi ken tar la, man mba ve tem ken tar u Igipiti;" 
Jeremiah24:9 Me gema ve vea hingir ityartor i sha won cii kwagh u tumbul a min ave, man u timin kera, sha u eren ve kwagh u bo; vea hingir kwagh u iheenegh man u ôron injakwagh a mi, man ilyahan man kwagh u lun a ifan iyol ken ajiir a Me zenda ve vea yem ker la cii." 
Jeremiah24:10 Me tindi ve a sanker man ijen kua bouange, zan zan á tim ve ken tar u M na ve kua uter vev la, kera." 
Jeremiah25:1 Kwaghôron ne va hen Yeremia sha kwagh u ior mba Yuda cii, ken inyom i sha unyiin i Yehoyakim wan u Yoshia, tor u Yuda (ka inyom i hiihii i Nebukadinesar tor u Babilon je la);" 
Jeremiah25:2 ka kwagh u profeti Yeremia ôr a ior i Yuda cii, kua mba ve tem ken Yerusalem kpaa, er:" 
Jeremiah25:3 Hii sha inyom i sha pue kar utar i Yoshia wan u Amon, tor u Yuda, zan zan nyian, anyom ikundu kar atar ne, kwaghôron u TER va her a mo, man mo di kpaa m lu ôron a ven ye, pepe kua aikighe; kpa ne ver ato ga." 
Jeremiah25:4 TER kpaa tindi ne a mbatomov Nav cii, uprofeti, pepe kua aikighe; kpa ne wa iko ga, ato tsô kpaa ne ver sha u ungwan ga;" 
Jeremiah25:5 lu kaan er: Shi gema nen, hanmô wen nana̱ undu gbenda u nan u bo kua shi afer a aeren a en la, tema nen ken tar u TER A ne ne kua uter enev sha ikov ikov je;" 
Jeremiah25:6 de kera dondon nen mbaaôndo mbagenev, eren nen ve tom man shi civir ve ga, man shi de kera bamen nen Mo sha tom wen u aveegh la ga; nahan Me er ne kwagh u vihin ga." 
Jeremiah25:7 Nahan kpaa, ne ver ato her a Mo ga, kape TER A kaa ne; ne gema ne mba bamen Mo sha tom wen u aveegh, u ne eren ne vihin ayol a en a min yô." 
Jeremiah25:8 Nahan yô, TER u akum a Sha ngu kaan nahan er: Er ne ver ato sha akaaôron Am ga yô," 
Jeremiah25:9 nenge, Me tindi i̱ za kura icombor i ken imbusutarimese cii, kape TER A kaa ne, kua Nebukadinesar, tor u Babilon, wanakiriki Wam, Me va a ve, vea ta num sha tar ne, kua mba ve tem sha u kpaa, man sha akuraior a a kase ve ne cii; Me tim ve purututu, Me gema ve vea hingir kwagh u cieryol man kwagh u gbiren iwer a min man atse a aa lu gbem sha won." 
Jeremiah25:10 Man shi Me er imo i ahan man imo i ember man imo i orkwasehe man imo i kwasehe man iov i nase kua iwanger i imenger vea bee ken a ve. 
Jeremiah25:11 Tar ne cii kpaa ua hingir ijiir i atse a ayou aa lu her man kwagh u cieryol; man akuraior angan aa lu sha ikev i tor u Babilon anyom akunduatargber. 
Jeremiah25:12 Tsô shighe u anyom akunduatargber á akuma yô, Me tsaha tor u Babilon man ikurior la, kape TER A kaa ne, sha ci u ifer ve man tar u Kaldi kpaa, Me gema u, ua hingir toho dang gbem sha won." 
Jeremiah25:13 Me er a tar la sha akaaôron Am cii a M er sha u yô, ka akaa a i nger a ken ruamabera ne cii, a Yeremia ôr sha akuraior ne cii la." 
Jeremiah25:14 Gadia ve kpaa akuraior kpishi man utor mba vesen vea gema ve vea hingir ikpan ve; Me or ve iyev sha aeren a ve, kua sha tom ve u aveegh kpaa." 
Jeremiah25:15 Gadia TER, Aôndo u Iserael, kaa a mo nahan er: Ngohol iyongo i wain i iyugh Yam sha uwegh Agh, za na akuraior a M tindi u hen a la, a̱ ma." 
Jeremiah25:16 A̱ ma, a̱ hingir ze ze ze, a̱ nyôr ihundu sha ci u sanker u M lu tindin hen a yô." 
Jeremiah25:17 Tsô m ngohol iyongo la hen uwegh ku TER, m za na akuraior a TER tindim hen a la cii mer, a̱ ma:" 
Jeremiah25:18 Yerusalem man agar a Yuda, man utor nav, man atiator a na; sha u geman ve, ve̱ hingir ijiir i atse a ayou a lu her man kwagh u cieryol man kwagh u gbiren iwer a min man kwagh u lun a ifan iyol, er i lu nyian nahan;" 
Jeremiah25:19 Farao, tor u Igipiti man mbatomov nav man atiator a na man ior nav cii" 
Jeremiah25:20 kua ior anza kposo kposo cii, man utor mba ken tar u Ushi, man utor mba ken tar u Mbafiliti cii man Ashekelon man Gasa man Ekeron man asande a Ashedodi a a shi her," 
Jeremiah25:21 Edom man Moabi man Mbaamon," 
Jeremiah25:22 man utor mba Tiru cii, man utor mba Shidon cii, man utor mba sha ityar i hen kpe u zegemnger yande la," 
Jeremiah25:23 Dedan man Tema man Busu kua mba ve hondon a-ase cii," 
Jeremiah25:24 man utor mba Arabia cii, man utor mba anza a ior kposo kposo mba ve tem ken desereti," 
Jeremiah25:25 man utor mba Shimeri man utor mba Elam cii, man utor mba Media cii," 
Jeremiah25:26 man utor mba shin imbusutarimese cii, mba ken ica man mba ikua ikua sha adondo adondo, man ityartor i sha won cii, i i lu sha tar; tor u Sheshaki una mase man." 
Jeremiah25:27 Kaa a ve, wer: TER u akum a Sha, Aôndo u Iserael, ngu kaan nahan er: Ma nen, hunde nen, haa nen azer, gbidye nen inya, de kera shi moughon nen ga, sha ci u sanker u M lu tindin her a ven yô." 
Jeremiah25:28 Tsô, aluer vea venda u ngohol iyongo la sha ikev you man yô, nahan ú kaa a ve wer: TER u akum a Sha ngu kaan nahan er: Man yen i keng." 
Jeremiah25:29 Gadia, nenge, gar u i yer un sha iti Yam je kpaa, M ngu hiin u haan akaabo sha a na, man hire ne, á de ne yee? Á de ne ga; gadia M ngu yilan sanker Mer a̱ va ta num sha mba ve tem sha won cii, kape TER u akum a Sha A kaa la." 
Jeremiah25:30 Nahan we yô, ôr kwaghôron u profeti ne cii sha a ve, kaa a ve wer: TER Una ta kume Sha, Una kende imo Na hen icighanjiir Na u teman la; Una ta kume tsung a ikumuile Na; Una genger imo a mba ve tem sha won cii, bee er ka mbashoghol atam a wain nahan." 
Jeremiah25:31 Acin a utya kaa zan zan ar sha ikighir i tar je, gadia TER ngu waren kwagh a akuraior, ngu ôron uumace cii ijir; mbaaferev yô, Una gema ve á na ve sha ikev i sanker, kape TER A kaa ne." 
Jeremiah25:32 TER u akum a Sha ngu kaan nahan er: Nenge, kwaghbo una due ken ikurior igen una va ken igen, man zegeahumbe ngu moughon sha akighir a tar je." 
Jeremiah25:33 Sha iyange la mba TER A woo ve la, vea lu hen inya, á hii sha ikighirtar ngin zan zan á zar ar ikighirtar ngila, á zungwe ve ga, á kohol ve ijiir i môm ga, á ii ve kpaa ga; vea hingir er atihi a ihôghonov mbi sôron sule a min hen inya nahan." 
Jeremiah25:34 Gbidye nen vaa, ne mbakuranilev, vaa nen; vingir nen iyol shin mtwe, ne mbahemenev mba ikumuile, gadia ayange a wuan ne kuma ve, man Me sambe ne, né gba inya er gbande u injaa nahan." 
Jeremiah25:35 Mbakuranilev vea zua a gbenda u nyôngoso ga, man mbahemen ikumuile kpaa vea zua a gbenda u waren ga." 
Jeremiah25:36 Ungwa! imo i mliam ma mbakuranilev, man vaa u mbahemen ikumuile! Gadia TER ngu vihin ijiir ve i yan toho." 
Jeremiah25:37 Ajiir a yan toho her bem bem la hingir ving, sha ci u ishima i vihin i tsung i TER." 
Jeremiah25:38 A mough hen ijiir Na i yeren kera, er gumbegha nahan; gadia tar ve hingir ice sha ci u sanker u aperagh man sha ci u iyugh Na i tsung." 
Jeremiah26:1 Sha hiihii u Yehoyakim, wan u Yoshia, tor u Yuda tema tor la, kwaghôron ne za va, a due hen TER, er:" 
Jeremiah26:2 TER ngu kaan nahan er: Za tile sha tembe u iyou i TER, ôr kwagh a agar a Yuda cii a ka a va civir ken iyou i TER ne, ôr ve akaaôron a M kaa Mer ôr ve la cii; de shi ma kwaghôron môm kpaa ga." 
Jeremiah26:3 Alaghga vea ver ato, man hanmô ve nana undu gbenda u nan u ifer; sha u M̱ vaa afanyô, M̱ de kwaghbo u M we ishima Mer, Me er ve sha ci u ifer i aeren a ve la." 
Jeremiah26:4 Kaa a ve wer: TER ngu kaan nahan er: aluer ne venda u veren ato her a Mo, u zenden sha tindi Wam, u M ver ne sha ishi yô," 
Jeremiah26:5 man né venda u veren ato sha akaaôron a mbayev Av, uprofeti, mba M tindi her a ven pepe kua aikighe yô, kpa ne we iko ga la," 
Jeremiah26:6 nahan Me gema iyou ne ia hingir er Shilo nahan, man Me gema gar ne una hingir akuraior a sha won cii kwagh u lun a ifan iyol." 
Jeremiah26:7 Tsô upristi man uprofeti kua ior cii ungwa akaa a Yeremia lu ôron ken iyou i TER la. 
Jeremiah26:8 Zum u Yeremia kure akaa cii a TER kaa un er a̱ ôr ior cii la yô, upristi man uprofeti kua ior cii ve kôr un, ve kaa er: Kpen you keng." 
Jeremiah26:9 Ka nyi u ôr kwaghôron u profeti ken iti i TER wer: Iyou ne ia hingir er Shilo nahan, man gar ne kpaa una hingir ice je, or á kera tema ker ga nahana? Tsô ior cii va kohol hen Yeremia ken iyou i TER." 
Jeremiah26:10 Zum u atiator a Yuda ungwa akaa angan yô, ve mough ken iyou i tor, ve kôndo sha iyou i TER; ve va tema hen ape nyôron hunda u he u iyou i TER la." 
Jeremiah26:11 Tsô upristi man uprofeti ôr kwagh a atiator kua ior cii, ve kaa er: Or ne kuma ku, gadia a ôr kwagh sha gar ne er ne ongo sha ato a en nahan." 
Jeremiah26:12 Nahan Yeremia ôr kwagh a atiator man ior cii, a kaa er: Ka TER je A tindim er m̱ ôr kwagh sha iyou ne kua gar ne, akaaôron a ne ongo la cii ye." 
Jeremiah26:13 Nahan yô, sôr nen ase igbenda yen kua aeren a en, man wa nen imo i TER, Aôndo wen, iko; nahan TER kpaa Una vaa afanyô, Una de kwagh u bo u A ter sha a ven la." 
Jeremiah26:14 Kpa mo yô, m ngun sha ikev yen ne; er nen a mo er ne nenge i doo ne, man i lu ne sha mi yô;" 
Jeremiah26:15 kpa fa nen mimi je, aluer né wuam yô, né va a awambe a orishôôgh sha ityough yenegh kua sha gar ne, man sha mba ve tem ker; gadia mimi je, TER tindim her a ven er m̱ or akaa ne cii sha ato a en." 
Jeremiah26:16 Nahan atiator kua ior cii kaa a upristi man a uprofeti er: Or ne kuma ku ga, gadia a ôr se kwagh ken iti i TER, Aôndo wase." 
Jeremiah26:17 Mbagenev mba ken mbatamen mba hen tar la kpaa, ve mough ve tile sha, ve ôr kwagh a mkohol u ior ve kaa er:" 
Jeremiah26:18 Mika Ormoresheti ôr kwaghôron u profeti sha ayange a Hisekia tor u Yuda, a ôr kwagh a ior i Yuda cii, a kaa er: TER u akum a Sha ngu kaan nahan er: Shion ne, á tsôghol un er sule nahan, man Yerusalem ne, una hingir atihi a alôgh, man uwo u tempel ne ua hingir er agungu a a lu ken ikô nahan." 
Jeremiah26:19 Nahan Hisekia tor u Yuda kua ior i Yuda cii, ve wua un kpa? A cia TER gaa, man a zamber a TER, TER kpaa vaa afanyô de kwagh u bo u lu ôr sha a ve la gaa? Se yô, se mba kpelan kwaghbo u vesen haan sha uuma asev je." 
Jeremiah26:20 Man shi orgen kpaa lu, u yan ôr kwaghôron u profeti ken iti i TER yô, ka Uria wan u Shemaia u ken Kiriati-yearim; a ôr kwaghôron u profeti sha gar ne kua tar ne vough er Yeremia nahan." 
Jeremiah26:21 Zum u tor Yehoyakim a mbaageev nav cii, kua atiator a na cii, ve ungwa akaaôron a na la, tor gba keren u wuan un; kpa er Uria ungwa aun yô, a cia, a yevese a yem ken Igipiti;" 
Jeremiah26:22 tsô tor Yehoyakim tindi ior ken Igipiti, ka Elnatan wan u Akebor, man ior mbagenev a na imôngo, ve za ken Igipiti;" 
Jeremiah26:23 ve due a Uria ken Igipiti, ve va a na hen tor Yehoyakim, nahan a wua un sha sanker, a gbihi ikom na sha ijiir ape i iin ior mba ken inya yô." 
Jeremiah26:24 Kpa Ahikam wan u Shafan wase Yeremia, nahan i kera na un sha ikev i ior er, ve̱ wua un ga." 
Jeremiah27:1 Sha hiihii u Sedekia wan u Yoshia, tor u Yuda, tema tor la, kwaghôron ne due hen TER va hen Yeremia, er:" 
Jeremiah27:2 TER ngu kaan a mo nahan er: Er ikangenev kua agbur haa sha mon wou; 
Jeremiah27:3 gema tindi a mi hen tor u Edom man hen tor u Moabi man hen tor u Mbaamon man hen tor u Tiru, kua hen tor u Shidon, sha ikev i mbatyomov mba ve ve hen Yerusalem hen Sedekia tor u Yuda la;" 
Jeremiah27:4 tindi ve hen uter vev a imo ne wer: TER u akum a Sha, Aôndo u Iserael, ngu kaan nahan er: za kaa nen uter enev nahan ner:" 
Jeremiah27:5 Ka Mo M gbe tar man ior kua ishôso i i lu sha won cii, sha tahav Av mbu vesen kua sha uwegh Agh ku naregh; man M gem u, M ne u i doom u nan nan ye." 
Jeremiah27:6 Hegen yô, Mo, M gema ityar ingin cii, M na sha ikev i Nebukadinesar tor u Babilon, wanakiriki Wam; inyam i ken toho kpaa, M na un i, i̱ eren ishima na." 
Jeremiah27:7 Akuraior cii aa eren ishima na, kua wan na man wan u wan na kpaa, zan zan shighe u tar na iyol na kpaa una va kuma; nahan akuraior a ageegh man utor mba tamen vea gema un, una hingir sha ikev ve." 
Jeremiah27:8 Tsô, ikurior man tartor u u rumun u lun sha ikev i Nebukadinesar tor u Babilon ga, man shi u rumun u huwan igbur i tor u Babilon sha mon ve ga yô, Me tsaha ikurior la sha sanker man ijen kua bouange je, kape TER A kaa ne, zan zan Me tim ve kera sha uwegh nagh." 
Jeremiah27:9 Nahan ne yô, de veren nen ato sha uprofeti enev, shin sha mbakpehenasor enev, shin sha mnyam ma cien enem, shin sha mbatsenganfan enev, shin sha mbaahiriv enev kpaa ga, mba ve er kwagh aven ve kaa er: sha ikev i tor u Babilon ga la." 
Jeremiah27:10 Ka aie ve tsengeôron ne ye, sha u karen a ven hen tar wen kera, yemen a ven ca; man sha u M̱ zenda ne ne̱ saa ishe kera yô." 
Jeremiah27:11 Kpa ikurior i ia huwa mon u i ken igbur i tor u Babilon, man ia er un tom yô, Me de i, ia tema ken tar u i, kape TER A kaa ne; ia shire u, ia tema ken u kpaa." 
Jeremiah27:12 Sedekia tor u Yuda kpaa, m ôr a na nahan vough, m kaa mer: Huwa nen imon yen ken igbur i tor u Babilon, er nen un tom kua ior nav, tsô né lu uma." 
Jeremiah27:13 Ka sha ci, u nyi né kpe, we kua ior ou, sha sanker man sha ijen kua bouange er TER A er sha kwagh u ikurior i i vende u eren tor u Babilon tom la?" 
Jeremiah27:14 De veren nen ato sha akaaôron a uprofeti, mba ve lu kaan er: Nea lu sha ikev i tor u Babilon ga la ze; gadia ka aie ve tsengeôron ne ye." 
Jeremiah27:15 Gadia M tindi ve ga, kape TER A kaa ne, kpa mba ôron kwaghôron u uprofeti ken iti Yam sha aie tsô, sha u M̱ zenda ne kera, ne̱ saa ishe, ne kua uprofeti mba ve tsengeôron ne kwagh la." 
Jeremiah27:16 Man shi m ôr kwagh a uprofeti man ior ne cii m, kaa mer: TER ngu kaan nahan er: De veren nen ato sha akaaôron a uprofeti enev ga, mba ve ôr ne kwaghôron u profeti er: Nenge, ikav mbi iyou i TER mbi mbi lu ken Babilon la, á hide a mi fefa je; gadia ka aie ve tsengeôron ne ye." 
Jeremiah27:17 De veren ato her a ve ga; er nen tor u Babilon tom, tsô né lu uma; ka sha ci u nyi man gar ne a̱ hingir ice?" 
Jeremiah27:18 Kpa aluer vea lu uprofeti je, man kwaghôron u TER una lu a ve yô, nahan yô, ve̱ zamber ase a TER u akum a Sha, er ikav mbi mbi shi ken iyou i TER man ken iyou i tor u Yuda man ken Yerusalem mbia za sha Babilon ga yô." 
Jeremiah27:19 Gadia TER u akum a Sha ngu kaan nahan er: Sha kwagh u mtôm, man sha kwagh u zegetasa u mnger, man sha kwagh u asange a pendan utasa sha mi, man sha kwagh u asande a uika a a shi ken gar ne yô," 
Jeremiah27:20 a Nebukadinesar tor u Babilon kor a ga la, zum u a due a Yekonia wan u Yehoyakim, tor u Yuda, ken Yerusalem yem a na uikangen sha Babilon a ashagba a Yuda man Yerusalem cii la," 
Jeremiah27:21 TER u akum a Sha, Aôndo u Iserael, ngu kaan sha kwagh u ikav mbi mbi shi ken iyou i TER, man ken iyou i tor u Yuda, man ken Yerusalem la nahan er:" 
Jeremiah27:22 Á yem a mbi ken Babilon, ka keregh mbia za lu ye, zan zan sha iyange i Me va nenge sha kwagh u mbi yô, kape TER A kaa ne; sha shighe la, Me kura mbi Me hide a mbi hen ijiir ne ye." 
Jeremiah28:1 Tsô sha inyom la, sha mhii u mtemtor u Sedekia tor u Yuda, inyom i sha unyiin, man uwer u sha utaan la yô, profeti Hanania wan u Asur, Orgibeon ôr kwagh a mo ken iyou i TER sha ishigh ki upristi kua ior cii, a kaa er:" 
Jeremiah28:2 TER u akum a Sha, Aôndo u Iserael, ngu kaan nahan er: M vihi igbur i tor u Babilon kera." 
Jeremiah28:3 Er anyom ahar a lu a kuma ga yô, Me shi Me hide a ikav mbi iyou i TER cii ken ijiir ne, mbi Nebukadinesar tor u Babilon iyange kura hen ijiir ne yem a mi sha Babilon la;" 
Jeremiah28:4 shi Me hide a Yekonia wan u Yehoyakim tor u Yuda hen ijiir ne, kua mbauikangenev mba Yuda cii, mba ve yem sha Babilon la, kape TER A kaa ne, gadia Me vihi igbur i tor u Babilon la kera." 
Jeremiah28:5 Nahan profeti Yeremia gba ôron kwagh a profeti Hanania sha ishigh ki upristi man sha ishigh ki ior cii mba ve tile ken iyou i TER la," 
Jeremiah28:6 profeti Yeremia gema kaa er: Amen, TER ma A er nahan; TER ma A er sha akaaôron a ou a u tsengeôron ne cii, sha u hiden a ikav mbi iyou i TER man mbauikangenev cii ken Babilon hen ijiir ne." 
Jeremiah28:7 Nahan kpaa, ungwa ase kwaghôron ne u me ôr sha ato ou kua sha ato a ior cii ne:" 
Jeremiah28:8 Uprofeti mba ve vande lun a mo kua a we kpaa ngise la ve ôr kwaghôron u profeti sha ityar kpishi man sha uzegembaityartor, sha kwagh u utya man sha kwaghbo man sha bouange kpaa." 
Jeremiah28:9 Profeti u a pase er bem una lu la, zum u kwaghôron u profeti la una va kure sha mi vough yô, nahan sha shighe la á fa er profeti la, a lu profeti u TER A tindi un mimi je yô." 
Jeremiah28:10 Nahan profeti Hanania kôr igbur i sha mon u profeti Yeremia la, vihi kera." 
Jeremiah28:11 Tsô Hanania ôr kwagh sha ishigh ki ior cii kaa er: TER ngu kaan nahan er: Kape Me vihi igbur i Nebukadinesar tor u Babilon er anyom ahar aa lu a kuma ga yô, sha mon u akuraior cii kera. Nahan profeti Yeremia kôr gbenda yem a nagh." 
Jeremiah28:12 Tsô kwaghôron u TER va hen Yeremia, ken masetyô u profeti Hanania vihi igbur i sha mon u profeti Yeremia la kera, kaa er:" 
Jeremiah28:13 Za, za kaa Hanania, wer: TER ngu kaan nahan er: U vihi agbur a ikon kera, kpa u gema u er agbur a iyôô sha ityough ki angara." 
Jeremiah28:14 Gadia TER u akum a Sha, Aôndo u Iserael ngu kaan nahan er: M har igbur i iyôô sha mon u akuraior ne cii, sha u a̱ er Nebukadinesar tor u Babilon tom; vea lu sha ikev na; M shi M na un inyamtoho kpaa." 
Jeremiah28:15 Nahan profeti Yeremia kaa a profeti Hanania er: Ungwa ase, Hanania, TER tindi u ga, kpa we u na ior mban ve suur sha aie;" 
Jeremiah28:16 nahan yô, TER ngu kaan nahan er: Nenge, Me zenda u sha tar kera; ú kpe ken inyom ne je, sha ci u u tese wer, i̱ hendan kwagh a TER yô." 
Jeremiah28:17 Tsô profeti Hanania maa kpe sha inyom shon la je, sha uwer u sha utaankaruhar la." 
Jeremiah29:1 Angan ka akaaôron a washika u profeti Yeremia nger ken Yerusalem tindi hen mbatamen mba mbauikangenev mba ve shi her, man hen upristi, man hen uprofeti kua ior cii mba Nebukadinesar kôr ve hen Yerusalem yem a ve uikangen sha Babilon la—" 
Jeremiah29:2 ken masetyô u tor Yekonia man ngô u tor man mbatomov mba ken ya u tor atiator a Yuda man Yerusalem man mbafan ityomaveegh man mbavareniwa, vande moughon ken Yerusalem kera la" 
Jeremiah29:3 sha ikev i Elasa wan u Shafan man Gemaria wan u Hilkia mba Sedekia tor u Yuda tindi ve sha Babilon hen Nebukadinesar tor u Babilon la—er: 
Jeremiah29:4 TER u akum a Sha, Aôndo u Iserael, ngu kaan a mbauikangenev cii, mba i kôr ve hen Yerusalem i yem a ve uikangen sha Babilon la nahan er:" 
Jeremiah29:5 Maa nen uya, tema nen ker, môôr nen ikon, yaan nen atam a i;" 
Jeremiah29:6 er nen kasev, mar nen ônov mba nomso kua mba kasev, er nen kasev na nen ônov enev mba nomso man naan nen ônov enev mba kasev ken unoo, ve̱ mar ônov mba nomso kua mba kasev; seer nen a seer ngeen, de panden nen a pande ga." 
Jeremiah29:7 Ker nen bem u gar u M ne i yem a ven uikangen ker la, sôn nen TER sha ci na; gadia ka sha bem na, ne kpaa né zua a bem ye." 
Jeremiah29:8 TER u akum a Sha, Aôndo u Iserael, ngu kaan nahan er: De rumun nen uprofeti enev mba ve lu a ven kua mbakpehenasor enev ner, ve̱ tsugh ne ga, man shi de veren nen ato sha mnyam ma cien ma ma cien ne la ga." 
Jeremiah29:9 Gadia ka sha aie ve ôron ne kwaghôron u profeti ken iti Yam ye; M tindi ve ga, kape TER A kaa ne." 
Jeremiah29:10 Gadia TER ngu kaan nahan er: Saa anyom akunduatargber á iv sha ci u Babilon, man Me va sôr ne, Me kure kwaghôron Wam u dedoo a ven, Me hide a ven hen ijiir ne ye." 
Jeremiah29:11 Gadia M fa mbamhen mba M lu henen sha a ven ne, kape TER A kaa ne, ka mhen u bem, ka u bo ga, sha u nan ne ishimaverenkeghen i dedoo ken masetyô." 
Jeremiah29:12 Nahan né vaa a Mo, man né za, né za sônom man Mo kpaa Me ver ato her a ven." 
Jeremiah29:13 Nahan né kerem, man né zua a Mo kpaa, zum u né kerem a ishima i môm la." 
Jeremiah29:14 Me rumun er ne̱ zua a Mo kpaa, kape TER A kaa ne, Me gema mlu wen, Me kohol ne ken akuraior cii, man ken ajiir a Me zenda ne ne yem ker la cii, kape TER A kaa ne; Me shi Me hide a ven hen ijiir i lu M na, i kura ne her kera, i yem a ven uikangen la." 
Jeremiah29:15 Aluer ne kaa ner: TER na se uprofeti ken Babilon yô— 
Jeremiah29:16 kpa TER ngu kaan sha kwagh u tor u a tem sha ikônough ki torough ki Davidi, kua sha kwagh u ior cii mba ve tem ken gar ne, ka anmgbianev enev mba ve ze a ven ken uikangen imôngo ga la," 
Jeremiah29:17 TER u akum a Sha ngu kaan nahan er: Nenge, Me tindi ve a sanker man ijen kua bouange, Me gema ve, vea hingir er ubombaatamev mba tur nahan, mba ve vihi i gande u yan la." 
Jeremiah29:18 Me zenda ve ityô a sanker, man ijen kua bouange, Me na ve sha u i̱ tumbul a ve ken ityartor i sha won cii, ve̱ hingir kwagh u lun a ifan iyol man kwagh u cieryol man kwagh u gbiren iwer a mi, man kwagh u aheenegh, ken akuraior cii a M zende ve ve yem ker la;" 
Jeremiah29:19 er ve ver ato sha akaaôron Am ga yô, kape TER A kaa ne," 
Jeremiah29:20 nahan ungwa nen ase kwaghôron u TER, ne mba ne lu ken uikangen cii, mba M ne ne gbenda ken Yerusalem ne yem ken Babilon la." 
Jeremiah29:21 TER u akum a Sha, Aôndo u Iserael, ngu kaan sha kwagh u Ahaba wan u Kolaia, man sha kwagh u Sedekia wan u Maaseya, mba ve ôron ne kwaghôron u profeti ken iti Yam sha aie la er: Nenge, Me na ve sha ikav i Nebukadinesar tor u Babilon, una wua ve sha ashe a en;" 
Jeremiah29:22 man ka sha a ve mbauikangenev mba Yuda mba ve lu ken Babilon la cii vea dugh kwaghôron u wan ifan a mi er: TER A̱ gema u, hingir er Sedekia man Ahaba nahan, mba tor u Babilon lu mgbagh ve sha usu la," 
Jeremiah29:23 sha ci u ve er kwagh u ibume ken Iserael, man ve er idya a kasev mba ior mba wan ndor a ve man ve ôr kwagh ken iti Yam sha aie je, kwagh u M ne ve zwa sha mi ga yô; ka Mo M fe, shi M eren shiada kpaa ye, kape TER A̱ kaa ne." 
Jeremiah29:24 Man shi ôr kwagh a Shemaia, Ornehelam, kaa wer:" 
Jeremiah29:25 TER u akum a Sha, Aôndo u Iserael, ngu kaan nahan er: Er we, u tindi uwashika ken iti you hen ior mba ve lu ken Yerusalem cii, man hen Sefania wan u pristi Maaseya, kua hen upristi cii, wer:" 
Jeremiah29:26 Ka TER je A ver u pristi sha ityough ki pristi Yehoyada, sha u mbahemenev ve̱ lu ken iyou i TER yô, sha er hanma or u nan lu bumen, nan veren iyol er nan ngu profeti yô, ú mande nan igbe shi ú senda nan itiligh sha mon kpaa ye." 
Jeremiah29:27 Tsô hii nan man u yange Yeremia Oranatoti, u a ver iyol na er un ngu profeti hen a ven la ga?—" 
Jeremiah29:28 gadia a tindi se loho ken Babilon, er: Ica ia gba; maa nen ayou, tema nen ker, môôr nen ikon, man ya nen atam a i." 
Jeremiah29:29 Nahan pristi Sefania ôr washika ne sha ato a profeti Yeremia. 
Jeremiah29:30 Nahan kwaghôron u TER va hen Yeremia, kaa er:" 
Jeremiah29:31 Tindi hen mbauikangenev cii, kaa wer: TER ngu kaan sha kwagh u Shemaia Ornehelam nahan er: Er Shemaia a er ne kwaghôron u profeti man M tindi un kpaa ga, a na, ne suur sha aie," 
Jeremiah29:32 nahan yô, TER ngu kaan nahan er: Nenge, Me tsaha Shemaia Ornehelam kua tsombor na; una lu a ma or u nana tema ken ior mban ga, man shi una nenge a kwagh u dedoo u Mea er a ior Av kpaa ga, kape Ter A kaa ne gadia a tese er i̱ hendan kwagh a Ter." 
Jeremiah30:1 Kwaghôron ne due hen TER va hen Yeremia, er:" 
Jeremiah30:2 TER, Aôndo u Iserael, ngu kaan nahan er: Nger akaaôron a M er a we cii ken takerada." 
Jeremiah30:3 Gadia, nenge, ayange nga van, kape TER A kaa ne, a Me gema mlu u ior Av Iserael man Yuda, kape TER A kaa ne, Me hide a ve hen tar u lu M na uter vev yô, vea ngohol u, ua hingir sha ikev ve kpaa." 
Jeremiah30:4 Angan ka akaaôron a TER ôr sha Iserael kua sha Yuda. 
Jeremiah30:5 Gadia TER ngu kaan nahan er: Se ungwa imo i ikarikase, ka i mcie, ka i bem ga." 
Jeremiah30:6 Shi pine nen ase, nenge, nomsoor maren kpa? Hii nan man M nenge hanma or nan suur ave shin iwenge, er kwase ka nana toghol mar man ishiv cii mbi gema mbi hingir peng nahana?" 
Jeremiah30:7 Wuu! Gadia iyange shon gba ikôr je gande agen cii; ka shighe u ican i Yakob je la; kpa á yima un sha i. 
Jeremiah30:8 Tsô sha iyange shon la, kape TER u akum a Sha A kaa ne, Me sombo igbur na sha mon ve, Me tôndo ikangenev vev, ior i tar ugen ia kera gema ve er vea er ve tom ga," 
Jeremiah30:9 kpa vea er TER, Aôndo ve, tom, kua tor ve Davidi u Me ver ve la." 
Jeremiah30:10 Nahan yô, de cie ga, we Yakob wanakiriki Wam, kape TER A kaa ne, man ishima i̱ de nyian we ga, we Iserael; gadia, nenge, Me yima u ken ica je man vor wou kpaa ken tar u u lu uikangen ker la; Yakob una hide, ishima ia yôhôl un, una mem kpaa; ma or nana kera ta un mciem iyol ga." 
Jeremiah30:11 Gadia M ngu a we je, kape TER A kaa ne, sha u yiman we; gadia Me tim akuraior cii, a M sambe u ken a la; kpa we yô, Me tim u cii ga, kpa me tsaha u akuma akuma, Me gba den we nahan tsô ga." 
Jeremiah30:12 Gadia TER ngu kaan nahan er: Iyolvihin you, i vihi kpen kpen, man avav a ou kpaa ka a nyoon tsung je." 
Jeremiah30:13 Ma or u tan ken a we nan ngu ga; man icimbiv mbi been angev ou kpaa, mbi sha ci wou ga." 
Jeremiah30:14 Mba ve soo u cii, u hungul ve, mba pinen we ga; gadia M gber u ivav sha inja i orihom, m tsaha u ornyoonshima je, sha ci u ifer you vese, asorabo a ou kpaa ngee." 
Jeremiah30:15 Ka nyi man u vaa sha ci u mvihi u i vihi u iyol, er mnyoonom ou ma been ga nahana? Sha ci u ifer you vese, asorabo a ou kpaa ngee ngun ve M er u akaa ne nahan ye." 
Jeremiah30:16 Nahan yô, mba ve ye u cii, á ya ve; mbaahendanev ou ci ca cii vea za ken uikangen; mba ve ngohol we akaa sha apera cii, ve di kpaa á ngohol di a ve sha apera; mba ve gem u u hingir ve ishar i yan cii, Me gema di ve, vea hingir kwagh u yan ishar sha mi." 
Jeremiah30:17 Gadia Me hide u a mkpeyol, Me bee u avav je, kape TER A kaa ne, sha ci u ve yer u er: or u i te un kera yô, ka Shion je u ma or nan kera pin un ga yô." 
Jeremiah30:18 TER ngu kaan nahan er: Nenge, Me gema mlu u utenti mba Yakob, uya nav vea kôrom mhôônom, á maa gar na sha ice na, man iyou i tor kpaa sha ijiir i i la vough je." 
Jeremiah30:19 Tsô á ungwa imo i iwuese ken a ve kua imo i mba ve lu sar sar yô; man shi Me seer ve vea ngee, vea kera ndahar ga; Me shi Me kende ve sha, vea kera lu kwagh u ikoogh ga ze." 
Jeremiah30:20 Ônov vev kpaa vea hingir er ngise nahan, mkohol ve kpaa una hingir igbekeke sha ishigh Yagh, man Me tsaha mba ve kighir ve a ican cii." 
Jeremiah30:21 Ortaregh ve á lu or u ken a ve ayol a ve, man or u nan tem tor ken a ve kpaa nana due ken a ve, Me kporom a nan, nana mgbôghom a Mo; gadia ka an je nana cihi nana kporom her a Mo? Kape TER A kaa ne." 
Jeremiah30:22 Nea lu ior Av, Mo kpaa Me lu Aôndo wen." 
Jeremiah30:23 Nenge, zegeahumbe u TER, ka iyugh, i dugh ye, ka hiar je; ka sha ityough ki mbaaferev je a va te ye." 
Jeremiah30:24 Ishima i vihin i TER ia hide ga, saa Una kure man Una er awashima Na; sha ayange a masetyô yô, né va kav inja i kwagh ne." 
Jeremiah31:1 Hen shighe la, kape TER A kaa ne, Me hingir Aôndo u icombor i Iserael cii, ve di vea gema á hingir ior Av." 
Jeremiah31:2 TER ngu kaan nahan er: Ior mba ve wer sanker, ve zua a mhôônom ma zungwen ken desereti; ka Iserael je la, er a lu yemen sha u za memen yô." 
Jeremiah31:3 TER ande her a mo ken ica je, kaa er: Een, u doom ishima sha dooshima u tsôron je, ka sha ci u nahan M udugh we sha erdoo ye." 
Jeremiah31:4 Me shi Me maa u, tsô ú lu her, we iniunkwase u Iserael; á shi á er u hwe sha anigingav ou, tsô ú due, ú za vine amar a mba ve numbu sar sar la." 
Jeremiah31:5 Ú shi ú môôr ikon i wain sha iwo i Samaria; mbamôôr vea môôr man shi vea ya atam a i kpaa. 
Jeremiah31:6 Gadia iyange ia va, i mbakuran mba sha iwo i Eferaim vea genger imo vea kaa er: Mough nen, sé kôndo nen sha Shion hen TER, Aôndo wase." 
Jeremiah31:7 Gadia TER ngu kaan nahan er: Wa nen icam, ember nen Yakob, ember nen ikurior i i lu ityough ki akuraior yô; yôô nen, wuese nen, kaa nen ner: TER yima ior Nav, ka asande a Iserael a a shi her je la." 
Jeremiah31:8 Nenge, Me va a ve shin tar u Imbusutarimese, Me kohol ve sha akighir a tar, mbaapirashe man mbakeer man kwase a iyav kua kwase u toghol mar, vea lu a ve imôngo; ka ikumior i vesen ia hide heen ye." 
Jeremiah31:9 Vea va a mliam ashe je, man ka sha mzamber Me hide a ve ye. Me va a ve hen ukungômbamngerev, sha gbenda u nôô, henpe vea ta nguhar kera ga yô; gadia Mo M ngu Iserael ter je, man Eferaim ka wan Wam." 
Jeremiah31:10 Ungwa nen imo i TER, ne akuraior, pase nen i hen ityar i hen kpe u zegemnger i ken ica la; kaa nen ner: Wen u A sambe Iserael la, Una kohol un, una kura un er orkuranilev ka nan kura ikumuile nahan." 
Jeremiah31:11 Gadia TER paa Yakob, A yima un sha ikev i or u nan hembe un agee yô." 
Jeremiah31:12 Vea va man vea wa atsam sha igungu u Shion, vea sen gudu gudu hen mdoom ma TER, hen alakema man zar u wain, man hen mkurem, man hen agum a iyôngo man a ibua; uma ve una hingir er sule u i urun u mngerem yô, vea kera shi lu gbuu mayange je ga." 
Jeremiah31:13 Hen shighe la iniunkwase ia ember ia vinen amar, kua ikaior man mbatamen imôngo kpaa; gadia Me gema ijungwen ve ia hingir iember, Me sur ve ishima man Me na vea ember er ishimavihin ve i bee yô." 
Jeremiah31:14 Me na uma u upristi una mgbough a ahôm, man ior Av kpaa vea ide sha mdoom Am, kape TER A kaa ne." 
Jeremiah31:15 TER ngu kaan nahan er: Ungwa! Imo ken Rama, kwelegh man mliam ma vaan tsung; Rahel ngu vaan ônov nav; a venda ishima i surun sha ci u ônov nav, gadia kera mba ga." 
Jeremiah31:16 TER ngu kaan nahan er: Yange imo you mliam, man ashe ou kpaa a̱ de kera hee mliam ga, gadia á na u injar sha tom wou, kape TER A kaa ne; man vea due ken tar u mbaihomov vev vea hide." 
Jeremiah31:17 Ishimaverenkeghen ngi ken mlu wou u masetyô, ka ape TER A kaa ne; ônov ou vea hide hen tar ve." 
Jeremiah31:18 Mimi je, M ungwa Eferaim lu toghor iyol, kaan er: U tsaham, er gumbua u a lu a hool a igbur ga yô, kape i tsaham la; gemam, tsô me gema; gadia ka We U lu TER, Aôndo wam, ye." 
Jeremiah31:19 Ken masejime u m gema la, m vaa afanyô; man ken masejime u i kôôm mo la, m gbidye uwegh sha nam, m va ahenge, een, zan zan kundam iyol, gadia m tôô iheen i iyev av je." 
Jeremiah31:20 Eferaim ka wan u ishima ishima udoon mo ishima kpen kpen gaa? Gadia hanma shighe u ka Mea teren un sha ishimavihin yô, M gba umbur un di sha gbashima je, nahan yô, a sar ishima Yam tsung, mimi je, Me zungwe un mhôônom, kape TER A kaa ne." 
Jeremiah31:21 Tim akav a ou a tesen gbenda, man shi er mtôm ma tesen gbenda; ver ishima sha kômgbenda, ka gbenda u ngise u za sha u la; shi hide, we iniunkwase i Iserael, shi hide hen agar a ou ne." 
Jeremiah31:22 Shi nan je man ú de u tan akpelan, we wankwase u u undu mimi wou ne? Gadia TER gba kwagh ugen u he shin tar: kwase nana kura nomsoor!" 
Jeremiah31:23 TER u akum a Sha, Aôndo u Iserael, ngu kaan nahan er: Shi vea ôron kwagh ne ken tar u Yuda man ken agar a na, zum u Me gema mlu ve la er: TER A̱ ver u doo doo, we ya u perapera, we icighanwo." 
Jeremiah31:24 Yuda man agar a na cii, vea tema kimi imôngo; mbashirensule kua mbazenden sôôso ikumuile." 
Jeremiah31:25 M na uma u orvôron kundu un iyol, man hanma or u ishima i yen nan kpaa M taver nan ishima." 
Jeremiah31:26 Tsô m nder m kende ashe sha, mnyam am yô, doom tsô." 
Jeremiah31:27 Nenge, ayange nga van, kape TER A kaa ne, a Me ta vor u or man vor u zendenya ken ya u Iserael kua ya u Yuda." 
Jeremiah31:28 Tsô, er lu M ver ishima sha a ve u wuhen man u yôhôl man u karen a mi sha, man u timin man u vihin ve kera la, kape Me gema Me ver ishima sha u maan man u môôr ve la, kape TER A kaa ne." 
Jeremiah31:29 Sha ayange la vea kera kaa er: Uter ya atam a ikon i wain a angen, nahan anyi a mbayev vev dura, ga." 
Jeremiah31:30 Kpa hanma or nana kpe sha ci u ifer i nan; man hanma or u nan ye atam a ikon i wain a angen yô, ka nan anyi á dura nan ye." 
Jeremiah31:31 Nenge, ayange nga van, kape TER A kaa ne, a Me ya ikuryan i he a ya u Iserael kua ya u Yuda;" 
Jeremiah31:32 kpa ia kera lu sha inja i ikuryan i M ya a uter vev ayange a M kôr ve uwegh sha u duen a ve ken tar u Igipiti la ga—ikuryan Yam i ve vihi la, shin er M lu ter ve je nahan kpaa, kape TER A kaa ne." 
Jeremiah31:33 Kpa ikuryan i Me ya a ya u Iserael er ayange ne á kar kera yô, ka i ne, kape TER A kaa ne: Me ver atindi Am ken atô ve je man shi Me nger a ken asema a ve kpaa; nahan Me lu Aôndo ve, ve di kpaa vea lu ior Av." 
Jeremiah31:34 Nahan hanmô ve nana kera tese or u wan ndor a nan, shin anmgbian u nan er: Fa TER ga; gadia ve cii vea fam, á hii sha u kiriki ve zan zan ar sha u vesen, kape TER A kaa ne; gadia Me de ve ifer ve, asorabo a ve kpaa Me kera seer u umbur a ga." 
Jeremiah31:35 TER u A ne iwanger sha ci u iwanger i atetan, man mzende u uwer man asan sha ci u iwanger i utu, Un u A kpianger zegemnger, je agôndo a na kpaa a te kume; TER u akum a Sha, ka iti Na je la, ngu kaan nahan er:" 
Jeremiah31:36 Aluer aeren a sha atindi atindi angan aa kar sha ishigh Yagh kera yô, kape TER A kaa ne, nahan vor u Iserael kpaa ua kera lu ikurior sha ishigh Yagh sha won ga." 
Jeremiah31:37 TER ngu kaan nahan er: Aluer á fatyô u karen mtav u Sha, man á fatyô u timen fan amagh a taregh yô, nahan Mo kpaa Me ta vor u Iserael kera cii, sha ci u akaa a ve er la cii, kape TER A kaa ne." 
Jeremiah31:38 Nenge, ayange nga van kape TER A kaa ne, a á maa TER gar la, á hii sha gôgôyou u taven u Hananel je á za ar hen Hundagar u Zongo." 
Jeremiah31:39 Kor u karen kwagh a mi ua kar ua yem jighilii sha igungu u Garebi, ua ningir ua yem hen Goa." 
Jeremiah31:40 Pev u akom cii man u mtwe man akôngo la cii zan zan á ar hen uwagh u Kideron, hen iniuugh ki Hundagar u Nyinya vegher u sha ityoughkitaregh la, vea hingir TER icighankwagh; á kera wuhe ve man á kera yôhôl ve sha won kpaa ga." 
Jeremiah32:1 Kwaghôron ne due hen TER va hen Yeremia sha inyom i sha pue i Sedekia tor Yuda la, man gema lu di inyom i sha pue kar anigheni i Nebukadinesar la." 
Jeremiah32:2 Hen shighe la yô, mbautyav mba tor u Babilon kase Yerusalem; profeti Yeremia yô, i gema i wuhe un ken tembe u mbakuran, u u lu ken iyou i tor u Yuda la;" 
Jeremiah32:3 gadia Sedekia tor u Yuda wuhe un, kaa er: Ka sha ci u nyi man u er kwaghôron u profeti u kaa wer: TER ngu kaan nahan er: Nenge, Me na gar ne sha ikev i tor u Babilon, una ngohol un kpaa;" 
Jeremiah32:4 man Sedekia tor u Yuda una war sha ikev i Mbakaldi ga, kpa á na un sha ikev i tor u Babilon kpee je, una ôr kwagh a na sha zwa na, man ashe a ngun aa nenge a ashe a ngula;" 
Jeremiah32:5 una yem a Sedekia sha Babilon, man una za lu ker zan zan Me va nenge sha kwagh na, kape TER A kaa ne; shin nea nôngo ityav a Mbakaldi kpaa á za ne sha mi ga, nahana?" 
Jeremiah32:6 Tsô Yeremia kaa er: Kwaghôron u TER va her a mo, kaa er:" 
Jeremiah32:7 Nenge, Hanemel wan u Shalum anngô u teru, ngu van her a we, una va kaa er: Yam sule wam u u lu ken Anatoti la, gadia we u ngu a tahav mbu paan u man u yamen u kpaa." 
Jeremiah32:8 Nahan Hanamel wan u anngô u terem va her a mo hen tembe u mbakuran, er TER kaa la, a kaa a mo er: Shi yam sule wam u u lu ken Anatoti, u u lu ken tar u Benyamin la, gadia we u ngu a tahav mbu ngohol u hingir u wou, mpaa kpaa ka u wou; yam u sha ci wou. Nahan m fa er i lu imo i TER je yô." 
Jeremiah32:9 Tsô m yam sule u u lu ken Anatoti a Hanamel wan u anngô u terem man m kar un inyaregh, azurfa kuma ushekel pue kar utaankaruhar." 
Jeremiah32:10 Nahan m nger takerada u yamen kwagh, m var ikav sha mi m yila mbashiada, man m kar un inyaregh sha iyôgh ki karen myohom a min." 
Jeremiah32:11 Tsô m tôô takerada u pasen kwagh u m yam la, u i var ikav sha mi la, sha atindi man sha ieren la, kua u a lu ivegher la kpaa," 
Jeremiah32:12 nahan m gema takerada u pasen kwagh u m yam la, m na Baruki wan u Neria, wan u Mahaseya, sha ishigh ki Hanamel, wan u anngô u terem, man sha ishigh ki mbashiada mba ve wa uwegh sha takerada u pasen kwagh u m yam la, kua sha ishigh ki Mbayuda cii mba ve tema sha tembe u mbakuran la." 
Jeremiah32:13 Tsô m kaa a Baruki sha ishigh vegh, mer:" 
Jeremiah32:14 TER u akum a Sha, Aôndo u Iserael, ngu kaan nahan er: Tôô utakerada mban, takerada u pasen kwagh u m yam la, ka u i ver ikav sha mi la, kua u a lu ivegher ne kpaa, wa ve ken ityegh ki inyaagh, sha u ve̱ tsa ayange á ngee yô." 
Jeremiah32:15 Gadia TER u akum a Sha, Aôndo u Iserael, ngu kaan nahan er: Shi á yam uya man ishule man ishule i ikon i wain ken tar ne." 
Jeremiah32:16 Nahan er m gema takerada u pasen kwagh u m yam la, m na Baruki wan u Neria yô, m sôn TER, m kaa mer:" 
Jeremiah32:17 Ahi! Tere, AÔNDO. Nenge, We, U er Sha man tar sha agee a Ou a vesen man sha uwegh Ough ku naregh; ma kwagh u hemban we ngu ga;" 
Jeremiah32:18 We u U zungu ior udubu imôngo mhôônom man u oron iyev sha ifer i uter, U haa ônov vev mba ken ijime ve la, ikum; ka Aôndo u vesen, u hemban agee, TER u akum a Sha; ka iti Na je la;" 
Jeremiah32:19 mhen Na vese, tom Na hemba; ashe Na nga ivegher sha u nengen sha igbenda i ônov mba iorov cii, sha u nan hanma or sha inja i igbenda i nan man sha inja i atam a aeren a nan;" 
Jeremiah32:20 Wen u A er uivande man akaakpilighyol ken tar u Igipiti, ken Iserael kua ior mbagenev kpaa zan zan nyian, man U er iti You i za er i lu nyian nahan;" 
Jeremiah32:21 U due a ior Ou Iserael ken tar u Igipiti sha uivande man akaakpilighyol man sha uwegh ku ageegh man sha uwegh ku naregh, kua sha mciem ma tan iyol ma vesen;" 
Jeremiah32:22 man shi U na ve tar ne U bum a uter vev Wer, Ú na ve, tar u atumbabua man iyough ve dumbur ken u la;" 
Jeremiah32:23 nahan ve nyôr, ve ngohol u; kpa ve wa imo You iko ga, man shi ve zende sha atindi a Ou kpaa ga; akaa a U kaa ve Wer, ve̱ er la cii, ve er ma kwagh môm ga; ka nahan man U ne kwaghbo ne cii a va tser ve ye;" 
Jeremiah32:24 nenge, atihianyaagh a tav je, za ar sha gar sha u ngohol un; i gema gar i na sha ikev i mbakaldi mba ve nenge ityav a na ne, sha sanker man ijen kua bouange; kwagh u U er kpaa a kure sha mi vough; man nenge, U ngu nengen a mi kpaa." 
Jeremiah32:25 Kpa We, Tere AÔNDO, U kaa a mo iyol You wer: Yam sule la sha inyar, man yila mbashiada; man i gema gar ne i na Mbakaldi sha ikev kera ve." 
Jeremiah32:26 Tsô kwaghôron u TER va hen Yeremia er: 
Jeremiah32:27 Nenge, Mo M ngu TER, Aôndo u uuma cii; ma kwagh u hemban Mo ngu jee?" 
Jeremiah32:28 Nahan yô, TER ngu kaan nahan er: Nenge, Me na gar ne sha ikev i Mbakaldi, man sha ikev i Nebukadinesar, tor u Babilon, una ngohol un kpaa;" 
Jeremiah32:29 Mbakaldi mba ve nenge ityav a gar ne, vea va nande un sha usu, una hia kera, kua uya mba ve nanden Baal nagh sha ityor ve la, shi ve toon mbaaôndo mbagenev iniav mbi man sha u bamen Mo la kpaa." 
Jeremiah32:30 Gadia Mbaiserael man Mbayuda er ma kwagh ugen sha ishigh Yagh ga, saa ifer, hii iyev vev je; gadia Mbaiserael mba bamen Mo a bam tseegh sha tom ve u aveegh la, kape TER A kaa ne." 
Jeremiah32:31 Gadia gar ne kpoghol ishima Yam i vihin kua iyugh Yam i tsung, hii sha iyange i ve maa un la zan zan nyian ne, sha u M kar a na sha ishigh Yagh kera," 
Jeremiah32:32 sha ci u iferkwagh i Mbaiserael kua i Mbayuda cii, i ve er sha ci u bamen Mo, ve man utor vev, man atiator a ve, man upristi vev man uprofeti vev, man ior mba Yuda, kua mba ve tem ken Yerusalem." 
Jeremiah32:33 Ve gema ijime a Mo, ve ver ishigh sha a Mo ga; shin er M lu tesen ve, pepe kua aikighe, nahan kpaa ve ver ato sha u vea ngohol ityesen ga." 
Jeremiah32:34 Kpa ve ver akaa a ve a ndôhôrshima ken iyou i i yer i sha iti Yam la, sha u vea hôngor i yô." 
Jeremiah32:35 Ve maa ajiir a taven sha a Baal kpaa, a a lu shin pev u Ben-hinom, sha u nan ônov vev mba nomso kua mba kasev ve kar ken usu sha u civir Moleki; kwagh u M ne ve zwa ga, a nyer ken ishima Yam kpaa ga; sha u vea er kwagh u ndôhôrshima ne, vea na Yuda a er isholibo yô." 
Jeremiah32:36 Nahan yô, TER, Aôndo u Iserael, ngu kaan nahan er: sha kwagh u gar, u ne ter un ner: I na un sha ikev i tor u Babilon sha sanker man sha ijen kua sha bouange ne:" 
Jeremiah32:37 Nenge, Me kohol ve ken ityar cii, i M zende ve ve yem ker sha ishima Yam i vihin, man sha iyugh Yam i tsung kua ishimavihin Yam la; shi Me va a ve hen ijiir ne Me ver ve vea tema bem bem;" 
Jeremiah32:38 vea hingir ior Av, Mo kpaa Me gema Me hingir Aôndo ve;" 
Jeremiah32:39 Me na ve ishima i môm man gbenda môm, sha u ve̱ ciam gbem, i̱ kpe ve iyol kua ônov vev mba ken ijime ve;" 
Jeremiah32:40 Me ya ikur i tsôron a ve, Me de u eren a ve dedoo ga; Me ver mciem ma cian Mo ken asema a ve, sha u ve de kera undun Mo ga yô." 
Jeremiah32:41 Een, Me ember ve, Me eren a ve dedoo, Me môôr ve ken tar ne kpee sha ishima Yam cii man sha uma Wam cii kpaa." 
Jeremiah32:42 Gadia TER ngu kaan nahan er: Er M hee ior mban kwaghbo u vesen ne iyol nahan, kape Me va di ve a mkpeyol cii u M ter sha ve la." 
Jeremiah32:43 Nahan á yam ishule ken tar ne, u ne kaan ner: Ka ice, i or man zendenya kpaa ve kera lu ker ga, i gema u u hingir sha ikev i Mbakaldi kpaa." 
Jeremiah32:44 Ior vea yam ishule sha inyar, vea nger utakerada mba yamen akaa, vea var ve ikav, vea yila mbashiada ken tar u Benyamin, man ken iningirtar i Yerusalem, man ken agar a Yuda, man ken agar a tar u Iwoogh man ken agar a tar u shin Pev, kua ken agar a ken tar u Imbusutarimese la, gadia Me gema mlu ve la, kape TER A kaa ne." 
Jeremiah33:1 Kwaghôron u TER va hen Yeremia u sha kwa har, er a lu ken tembe u mbakuran, ape i wuhe un la," 
Jeremiah33:2 TER u A eren kwagh ne, TER u ka A sôr kwagh A ver er á va er sha mi vough la, TER ka iti Na je la, ngu kaan nahan er:" 
Jeremiah33:3 Vaa, yilam, M̱ vengese, M̱ pase u akaa a vesen, a a gande u timen, a u fe a ga yô." 
Jeremiah33:4 Gadia TER, Aôndo u Iserael, ngu kaan sha kwagh u ayou a ken gar ne, kua ayou a utor mba Yuda a i yôhôl a sha ci u atihianyaagh man sanker la, nahan er:" 
Jeremiah33:5 Mba van sha u nôngon ityav a Mbakaldi, kpa ka di sha u ivin a sha akom a ior tsô, mba M woo sha ishima Yam i vihin man sha iyugh Yam i tsung; gadia ka sha ci u ifer ve la cii, M yer gar ne ishigh Yagh ye." 
Jeremiah33:6 Nenge, Me va un a mkpeyol man mwar, Me bee ve angev; Me pase ve mngee u bem u been ga." 
Jeremiah33:7 Me gema mlu u Yuda man mlu u Iserael, Me maa ve er tsuaa nahan." 
Jeremiah33:8 Me wanger ve sha ifer ve cii, i ve erem yô; Me de ve aferakaa ve cii, a ve erem la, man mper u ve per atindi a Am kpaa yô." 
Jeremiah33:9 Tsô gar ne una hingir Mo iti i iember, man kwagh u iwuese man u icivirigh, sha ishigh ki akuraior a sha won cii, a aa ungwa akaadoon a M eren a ve la cii; man aa cia, aa gbidye akarkase iyol sha ci u akaadoon cii man mkpeyol cii mba M ne un la." 
Jeremiah33:10 TER ngu kaan nahan er: Sha ijiir ne, i ne kaan ner: Ka ice, or man zendenya ve lu her ga ne, ken agar a Yuda man sha igbenda i ken Yerusalem, u a hingir ice, or kera lu ga, or u teman her kpaa nan lu ga man zendenya kpaa ga, á shi á ungwa" 
Jeremiah33:11 imo i iember ker, man imo i sar sar, man imo i orkwasehe man imo i kwasehe man imo i mba ve kaan er: Wuese nen TER ka u akum a Sha, gadia TER ka u doon je, gadia erdoo Na ngu zan zan gbem sha won. Ka imo i mba ve ve a iniav mbi ishughun ken iyou i TER je la. Gadia Me gema mlu u tar la, ua hingir er tsuaa nahan, kape TER A kaa ne." 
Jeremiah33:12 TER u akum a Sha ngu kaan nahan er: Sha tar u u lu ice ne, or kera lu ga man zendenya kpaa ga, man ken agar a u la cii, shi ijiir i mbakuranilev i ve sôôso ilev her la, ia lu; ape vea er akumauile a ve a yav her yô." 
Jeremiah33:13 Ken agar a ken tar u Iwoogh man ken agar a ken tar u shin Pev man ken agar a ken tar u Imbusutarimese, man ken tar u Benyamin man ken iningirtar i Yerusalem kua ken agar a Yuda, akumauile shi aa kar sha ishigh ki u a er iyenge la, kape TER A kaa ne." 
Jeremiah33:14 Nenge, ayange nga van, kape TER A kaa ne, a Me kure kwaghôron u doon u M er sha ya u Iserael kua sha ya u Yuda la." 
Jeremiah33:15 Sha ayange la man sha shighe la Me na Gbaa u perapera Una ta hen Davidi; ka Un Una ôr ijiir sha mimi man Una er perapera shin tar ye. 
Jeremiah33:16 Sha ayange shon la á yima Yuda, man Yerusalem una tema bem bem; iti i á yila un a mi yô, er: TER ka perapera wase." 
Jeremiah33:17 Gadia kape TER A kaa ne, er: Or nana ban Davidi u nana tema sha ikônough ki torough ki ya u Iserael mayange ga;" 
Jeremiah33:18 upristi mba ken nongo u Levi kpaa vea ban a or u nana̱ tile sha ishigh Yagh sha u nan iniav mbi nanden ga, man sha u nanden iniav mbi sha samuyia man sha u nan nagh ku sôngon ayange ayange la ga." 
Jeremiah33:19 Kwaghôron u TER shi va hen Yeremia er: 
Jeremiah33:20 TER ngu kaan nahan er: Aluer nea fatyô u bunden ikuryan yam atetan man a tugh, je er tetan man tugh ve̱ de kera lu sha ashighe a ve ga yô,"
