Jeremiah33:21 nahan á fatyô u bunden ikuryan Yam a Davidi, wanakiriki Wam, je er una kera lu a wan u nana̱ tema tor sha ikônough nagh ki torough ga yô; man a Mbalevi mba ve lu upristi, mbatomov Av la kpaa." 
Jeremiah33:22 Er á fatyô u ôron akum a Sha ga nahan, man waarawa u zegemnger kpaa á fatyô u karen u ga, kape Me seer ingeegh ki vor u Davidi wanakiriki Wam kua Mbalevi mba ve eren Mo tom ne." 
Jeremiah33:23 Tsô kwaghôron u TER va hen Yeremia, kaa er:" 
Jeremiah33:24 U ungwa kwagh u ior mban ve er, ve kaan er: Icombor ihiar i TER A tsough ne yô, A ta i kera, la kpa? Mba lahan ior Av je, kera mba ikurior sha ashe ve ga." 
Jeremiah33:25 TER ngu kaan nahan er: Aluer M ya ikur a tugh man a tetan, M ver aeren a sha atindi atindi a Sha man a shin tar ga yô," 
Jeremiah33:26 nahan vor u Yakob man u Davidi wanakiriki wam la kpaa Me gbihi u kera, je Me kera tôô or ken vor na u nana̱ tema tor sha vor u Aberaham man Isaka kua Yakob ga; gadia Me gema mlu ve la, Me zungwe ve mhôônom." 
Jeremiah34:1 Kwaghôron ne due hen TER va hen Yeremia, zum u Nebukadinesar tor u Babilon, man akumautya na cii, man ityartor i sha won cii i i lu sha ikev na la, man ior cii, ve lu nôngon ityav a Yerusalem man a agar a na cii la, er:" 
Jeremiah34:2 TER, Aôndo u Iserael, ngu kaan nahan er: Za, za ôr kwagh A Sedekia tor u Yuda, kaa a na wer: TER ngu kaan nahan er: Nenge, Me na gar ne sha ikev i tor u Babilon, una nande un sha usu;" 
Jeremiah34:3 we kpaa ú war sha ikev na ga, kpa á kôr u keng, á na u sha ikev na; ashe ou aa nenge ashe a tor u Babilon, zwa na ua ôr kwagh a zwa wou je, man yemen you ken Babilon." 
Jeremiah34:4 Nahan kpaa ungwa imo i TER, we Sedekia tor u Yuda; TER ngu kaan sha a we nahan er:" 
Jeremiah34:5 Ú kpe ku u ishôm ga; ú kpe ku u anange; er i nanden kwagh sha ci u uter ou nahan, ka utor mba tsuaa mba ve vande lun a we la, kape á nande kwagh sha ci wou kpaa la; vea zungwe u, vea kaa er: Aye, tere! Gadia Mo M vande ôron kwagh ne, kape TER A kaa ne." 
Jeremiah34:6 Tsô profeti Yeremia ôr akaa angan cii a Sedekia tor u Yuda ken Yerusalem," 
Jeremiah34:7 zum u ikumutya i tor u Babilon lu nôngon ityav a Yerusalem, man a agar a Yuda cii a a shi la, ka Lakishi man Aseka je la; gadia ka angan tseegh a mase shin agar a Yuda a a lu agarautya ye." 
Jeremiah34:8 Kwaghôron ne due hen TER va hen Yeremia, ken masetyô u tor Sedekia ya ikur a ior mba ken Yerusalem cii la, sha u yôôn er i̱ pase ikpan i̱ tuhwa;" 
Jeremiah34:9 sha er hanma or nana̱ pase kpan u nan u nomso man kpan u nan u kwase u nan lu Orheberu shin kwase u Heberu; ma or nana̱ de kera gem anngô u nan Oryuda a̱ hingir kpan u nan ga; 
Jeremiah34:10 nahan atiator cii kua ior cii mba ve nyer ken ikuryan la, rumun er hanma or nana̱ pase kpan u nomso man kpan u nan u kwase, ve̱ de kera lu ikpan ve ga; ve rumun je, ve pase ve ve tuhwa;" 
Jeremiah34:11 kpa ken masetyô yô, ve gema, shi ve hide a ikpan i nomso man i ukase, i ve pase ve tuhwa la ve gema i, shi i̱ hingir ikpan i nomso man i ukase her." 
Jeremiah34:12 Nahan yô, kwaghôron u TER due hen TER va hen Yeremia, kaa er:" 
Jeremiah34:13 TER, Aôndo u Iserael, ngu kaan nahan er: Mo M ya ikur a uter enev sha iyange i M due a ve ken tar u Igipiti, ken ya u ikpan la, M kaa Mer:" 
Jeremiah34:14 Er anyom ataankarahar a kar kera yô, hanmô wen nana̱ pase anngô u nan u nan lu Orheberu, u nan tee u iyol i nan u yam la, man nan er u u tom anyom ataratar; pase nan tuhwa, na nan gbenda; kpa uter enev lumun imo Yam ga, ato tsô kpaa ve ver her ga." 
Jeremiah34:15 Kpa ne yô, ne gema, ne er kwagh u a lu vough sha ashe Am, er ne yee i pase ikpan i toho yô, hanma or a or u wan ndor a nan; shi ne ya ikur sha ishigh Yagh ken iyou i i yer i sha iti Yam;" 
Jeremiah34:16 kpa ne gema shi ne hôngor a iti Yam, sha er hanmô wen shi nan hidi a kpan u nan u nomso man kpan u nan u kwase, u lu ne pase ne tuhwa sha ishima ve la; ne gema ve, hingir ne ikpan i nomso man i ukase." 
Jeremiah34:17 Nahan yô, TER ngu kaan nahan er: Mayange ne ver ato her a Mo ne yôô ner, i̱ pase ikpan i̱ tuhwa ga, hanma or a anngô u nan, man hanma or a or wan ndor a nan; nenge, M ngu yôôn Mer, i̱ pase ne i̱ tuhwa, hingir nen sha ikev i sanker man i bouange kua i ijen, kape TER A kaa ne; Me gema ne né hingir ityartor i sha won cii kwagh u tumbul a min ave." 
Jeremiah34:18 Me na ior mba ve per atindi a Am, mba ve er sha akaaôron a ikuryan i ve ya sha ishigh Yagh ne ga la, vea hingir er wanbua u ve pav un avegher ahar ve kar her atô u avegher a na la nahan;" 
Jeremiah34:19 atiator a Yuda, man atiator a Yerusalem, mbatomov mba ken ya u tor, man upristi, man ior i hen tar la cii, mba ve kar her atô u avegher a wanbua la," 
Jeremiah34:20 Me na ve sha ikev i mbaihomov vev, man sha ikev i mba ve keren uma ve la; akom a ve kpaa aa hingir kwaghyan u inyon i sha man inyamtoho i shin tar." 
Jeremiah34:21 Sedekia tor u Yuda kua atiator a na, Me na ve sha ikev i mbaihomov vev, man sha ikev i mba ve keren uma ve la, man sha ikev i mbautyav mba tor u Babilon, mba ve mough her a ven kera la." 
Jeremiah34:22 Nenge, TER ngu kaan nahan er: Me kaa imo, Me hide a ve hen gar ne; vea nôngo ityav a na, vea ngohol un kpaa, vea nande un sha usu; Me gema agar a Yuda aa hingir atse, or á kera lu ker ga." 
Jeremiah35:1 Kwaghôron ne due hen TER va hen Yeremia sha ayange a Yehoyakim wan u Yoshia, tor u Yuda la, er:" 
Jeremiah35:2 Za hen ya u Mbarekabi, za ôr kwagh a ve, nyôr a ve ken iyou i TER, ken kparyoughough, na ve wain ve̱ ma." 
Jeremiah35:3 Tsô m kua a Yaasania, wan u Yeremia, wan u Habashinia, man anngôôv nav man ônov nav cii, man ya u Mbarekabi cii;" 
Jeremiah35:4 m nyôr a ve ken iyou i TER, ken kpar u ônov mba Hanan, wan u Igadalia, or u Aôndo; kpar u a dondo a kpar u atiator, u a lu sha ijime i kpar u Maaseya, wan u Shalum, orkuranhunda la;" 
Jeremiah35:5 tsô m ver utasa iv a wain, kua ayongo, sha ishigh ki ior mba ken ya u Mbarekabi, m kaa a ve mer: Ma nen wain." 
Jeremiah35:6 Kpa ve kaa er: Sé ma wain je ga, gadia Yonadabi wan u Rekabi, ter wase, ta se icin kaa er: De me nen wain sha won ga, ne kua ônov enev kpaa;" 
Jeremiah35:7 shi de maan nen iyou ga, de lee nen ivor ga, man de môôr nen ikon i wain ga, man de luun nen a mi kpaa ga; kpa tema nen ken utenti ayange a uma wen cii; sha u ne tsa ayange á ngee ken tar u ne lu shir ken u yô." 
Jeremiah35:8 Se kpaa se wa imo i Yonadabi wan u Rekabi, ter wase la iko, sha akaa a a kaa se cii, se kera ma wain ga, sha ayange ase cii, se a kasev asev man ônov asev mba nomso kua mba kasev kpaa," 
Jeremiah35:9 man shi se kera maa ayou a teman ken a kpaa ga; se mba a ikon i wain ga, sule kpaa ga, ivor kpaa ga;" 
Jeremiah35:10 kpa se tema ken utenti, se wa iko, se er akaa cii a Yonadabi ter wase a kaa se yô." 
Jeremiah35:11 Kpa er Nebukadinesar tor u Babilon va sha tar ne yô, se kaa ser: Sé yem nen ken Yerusalem sha ci u cian mbautyav mba Mbakaldi, man sha ci u cian mbautyav mba Mbashiria, ka nahan se va tem ken Yerusalem ye." 
Jeremiah35:12 Tsô kwaghôron u TER va hen Yeremia, er:" 
Jeremiah35:13 TER u akum a Sha, Aôndo u Iserael, ngu kaan nahan er: Za, za kaa ior mba Yuda man mba ve tem ken Yerusalem, wer: Ne rumun u ngohol ityesen sha u wan iko sha akaaôron Am gaa? Kape TER A kaa ne." 
Jeremiah35:14 Akaaôron a Yonadabi wan u Rekabi, a a kaa mbayev nav er ve̱ de me wain ga la, ve er sha mi vough, mba me ga zan zan nyian, gadia ve wa icin i ter ve ta ve la iko; kpa Mo M ôr kwagh a ven pepe kua aikighe, kpa ne ver ato her a Mo ga." 
Jeremiah35:15 Shi M tindi mbatomov Av cii, uprofeti her a ven pepe kua aikighe, M kaa Mer: Shi hide nen, hanmô wen nana̱ undu gbenda u nan u bo, sôr nen aeren a en, de kera dondon nen sha mbaaôndo mbagenev sha u eren ve tom ga, nahan né tema ken tar u M na ne kua uter enev la; kpa ne ver ato ga, iko kpaa ne wam her je ga." 
Jeremiah35:16 Ônov mba Yonadabi wan u Rekabi ve er sha tindi u ter ve wa ve la vough; kpa ior mban yô, ve wam iko ga." 
Jeremiah35:17 Nahan yô, TER, Aôndo u akum a Sha, Aôndo u Iserael, ngu kaan nahan er: Nenge, Me va a kwaghbo la cii sha Yuda man sha mba ve tem ken Yerusalem cii u lu M ter sha a ve la, sha ci u M ôr kwagh a ve kpa ve ungwa ga; shi M yila ve, kpa ve vengese ga." 
Jeremiah35:18 Tsô Yeremia kaa a ya u Mbarekabi la er: TER u akum a Sha, Aôndo u Iserael, ngu kaan nahan er: Er ne we iko sha imo i Yonadabi ter wen, ne kor atindi na cii, man ne er sha akaa a a kaa ne la cii yô," 
Jeremiah35:19 nahan yô, TER u akum a Sha, Aôndo u Iserael, ngu kaan nahan er: Yonadabi wan u Rekabi una ban a or u nana tile sha ishigh Yagh sha won ga." 
Jeremiah36:1 Tsô sha inyom i sha unyiin i Yehoyakim wan u Yoshia, tor u Yuda la yô, kwaghôron ne due hen TER va hen Yeremia, er:" 
Jeremiah36:2 Tôô ihurenruamabera, nger akaaôron a M er u cii, sha Iserael man sha Yuda kua sha akuraior cii, hii sha iyange i M ôr a we la, hii sha ayange a Yoshia zan zan nyian ne." 
Jeremiah36:3 Alaghga ya u Yuda una ungwa kwaghbo u M we ishima u eren ve la cii yô, vea gema, hanmô ve nana undu gbenda u nan u bo sha u M̱ de ve ifer ve man isholibo ve yô." 
Jeremiah36:4 Tsô Yeremia yila Baruki wan u Neria; nahan Baruki nger akaaôron a TER, a A ôr un la cii, ken ihurenruamabera sha zwa u Yeremia." 
Jeremiah36:5 Nahan Yeremia kaa a Baruki er: Mo yô, i yangem, m fatyô u nyôron ken iyou i TER ga;" 
Jeremiah36:6 nahan yô, we za, za ôr ken ihurenruamabera, u u nger sha zwa wam la, akaaôron a TER, sha ato a ior, ken iyou i TER, sha iyange i hôron kwaghyan; man shi ôr a sha ato a ior mba Yuda cii, mba ve dugh ken agar a ve kpaa." 
Jeremiah36:7 Alaghga zamber ve una gba hen ikum i TER, man vea gema, hanmô ve nana undu gbenda u nan u bo la; gadia ishima i vihin man iyugh i TER i A ter sha ior mban i gba ikôr." 
Jeremiah36:8 Nahan Baruki wan u Neria er kwagh u profeti Yeremia kaa un la cii, a gba ôron ken ruamabera akaaôron a TER la, ken iyou i TER." 
Jeremiah36:9 Tsô sha inyom i sha utaan i Yehoyakim wan u Yoshia, tor u Yuda la, sha uwer u sha utaankarunyiin la, ior mba ken Yerusalem cii, kua ior mba ve due sha agar a Yuda cii, ve va hen Yerusalem; ve yôô er, i̱ hôr kwaghyan sha ishigh ki TER." 
Jeremiah36:10 Nahan Baruki gema ôr akaaôron a Yeremia a ken ruamabera la ken iyou i TER, ken kpar u Gemaria wan u orngeren Shafan, sha tembe u sha, ape nyôron hen hunda u he u iyou i TER la, sha ato a ior cii." 
Jeremiah36:11 Zum u Mikaia wan u Gemaria, wan u Shafan, ungwa akaaôron a TER ken ruamabera la yô," 
Jeremiah36:12 a sen shin iyou i tor, hen kpar u orngeren; man nenge, atiator cii gema tema lu her, ka orngeren Elishama, man Delaia wan u Shemaia, man Elnatan wan u Akebor, man Gemaria wan u Shafan, man Sedekia wan u Hanania kua atiator cii." 
Jeremiah36:13 Nahan Mikaia pase ve akaaôron a a ungwa la cii, zum u Baruki ôr ruamabera sha ato a ior la yô." 
Jeremiah36:14 Nahan atiator cii tindi Yehudi wan u Netania wan u Shelemia, wan u Kushi hen Baruki, ve kaa er: Ihurenruamabera u u er sha ato a ior la, tôô un va a mi. Nahan Baruki wan u Neria za tôô ihurenruamabera la je, va her a ve." 
Jeremiah36:15 Tsô ve kaa a na er: Tema ase inya, ôr un sha ato ase. Nahan Baruki ôr un sha ato a ve." 
Jeremiah36:16 Tsô zum u ve ungwa akaaôron la cii yô, ve gema ve kenger ayol a ve, cier ve iyol, ve kaa a Baruki er: Akaaôron ne cii sé ôr tor a kpee." 
Jeremiah36:17 Ve gema ve pine Baruki er: Shi ôr ase yôô, u er nan man u nger akaaôron ne cii sha zwa na nahana?" 
Jeremiah36:18 Tsô Baruki gema kaa a ve er: Ka sha zwa na je a pasem akaaôron ne, ve m nger a sha inki ken ruamabera ye." 
Jeremiah36:19 Nahan atiator kaa Baruki er: Za, we kua Yeremia, za yer nen, or môm nana̱ de fe henpe ne lu ga." 
Jeremiah36:20 Tsô ve za hen tor, ve nyôr ken kwa; kpa ve vande veren ihurenruamabera la ken iyou i orngeren Elishama; man ve ôr tor akaaôron la cii sha ato na je." 
Jeremiah36:21 Nahan tor tindi Yehudi er a̱ za tôô ihurenruamabera shon a̱ va a mi; tsô a za tôô un ken iyou i orngeren Elishama. Yehudi va ôr un sha ato a tor, man sha ato a atiator cii, mba ve tile a tor yô." 
Jeremiah36:22 Tor gema tema ken iyou i teman ker sha shighe u wuhegh, uwer u sha utaankarunyiin; usu lu yeghen shin icenge sha ishigh nagh." 
Jeremiah36:23 Tsô Yehudi una ôr ityange i ruamabera itiar shin inyiin yô, tor a tôndo i sha ihô a gema a gbihi sha usu u shin icenge la, zan zan ihurenruamabera la hia cii sha usu u shin icenge la." 
Jeremiah36:24 Cier ve iyol ga, ve ande akondo a ve ga, tor kpaa ga, mô u ken mbatomov nav mba ve ungwa akaaôron la cii kpaa ga." 
Jeremiah36:25 Kpa Elnatan man Delaia kua Gemaria yô, ve zamber a tor er a̱ de nanden ihurenruamabera la ga; kpa a wa ve iko her ga." 
Jeremiah36:26 Tsô tor kaa Yerameel wan u tor, man Seraia wan u Aseriel, man Shelemia wan u Abadeel er, ve̱ kôr orngeren Baruki man profeti Yeremia; kpa TER yer ve." 
Jeremiah36:27 Tsô kwaghôron u TER va hen Yeremia, er tor vande nanden ihurenruamabera u a lu a akaaôron a Baruki nger sha zwa u Yeremia la kera yô, er:" 
Jeremiah36:28 Shi tôô ihurenruamabera ugen, nger akaaôron a tsuaa la cii keregh, a a lu ken ihurenruamabera u hiihii la, u Yehoyakim tor u Yuda a nande la." 
Jeremiah36:29 Man sha kwagh u Yehoyakim tor u Yuda la yô, kaa wer: TER ngu kaan nahan er: We, u nande ihurenruamabera ne, u kaa wer: Ka sha ci u nyi man u nger keregh wer: Tor u Babilon una va kpee, una tim tar ne, man una na or man zendenya vea bee ken u nahana?" 
Jeremiah36:30 Nahan yô, TER ngu kaan sha kwagh u Yehoyakim tor u Yuda la er: Una lu a ma or u nana tema sha ikônough ki torough ki Davidi ga; á ta ikom na kera, ia lu ken oo atetan, tugh ia lu ken wuhe." 
Jeremiah36:31 Me tsaha un man vor na kua mbatomov nav sha ci u iferkwagh ve, man me va a kwaghbo sha a ve man sha mba ve tem ken Yerusalem man sha ior mba Yuda, u lu M ter sha a ve la cii, kpa ve wa iko ga la." 
Jeremiah36:32 Nahan Yeremia tôô ihurenruamabera ugen, na orngeren Baruki wan u Neria, wen gema nger akaaôron a ken ruamabera u Yehoyakim tor u Yuda nande sha usu la cii ker sha zwa u Yeremia, shi a seer akaaôron agen sha mi kpishi a sha inja i angara." 
Jeremiah37:1 Sedekia, wan u Yoshia, tema tor sha ityough ki Konia, wan u Yehoyakim, u Nebukadinesar tor u Babilon ver un tor ken tar u Yuda la." 
Jeremiah37:2 Kpa un, shin mbatomov nav, shin ior mba ken tar la, ve wa iko sha akaaôron a TER ôr sha ikev i profeti Yeremia la, ga." 
Jeremiah37:3 Tsô tor Sedekia tindi Yehukal wan u Shelemia, man pristi Sefania, wan u Maaseya, hen profeti Yeremia, a kaa er: Shi sôn TER, Aôndo wase, sha ci wase." 
Jeremiah37:4 Yeremia yô, lu nyôron man duen hen ior, gadia ve lu a wuhe un ken gaadi ga." 
Jeremiah37:5 Mbautyav mba Farao kpaa due ken Igipiti; tsô zum u Mbakaldi mba ve kase Yerusalem la, ve ungwa aun a ve yô, ve hembe ve mough ken Yerusalem kera." 
Jeremiah37:6 Nahan kwaghôron u TER va hen profeti Yeremia, er:" 
Jeremiah37:7 TER, Aôndo u Iserael, ngu kaan nahan er: Kaa nen tor u Yuda, u a tindi ne her a Mo sha u ne̱ va pinem la, ner: Nenge, mbautyav mba Farao, mba ve dugh sha u va wasen we la, vea cin á hide hen Igipiti ken tar ve." 
Jeremiah37:8 Man Mbakaldi shi vea hide, vea nôngo ityav a gar ne, vea ngohol un, vea nande un sha usu kpaa." 
Jeremiah37:9 TER ngu kaan nahan er: De kera tsughun nen ayol a en kaan nen ner: Mbakaldi vea mough hen a vese kera kpaa la ga; gadia vea mough ga. 
Jeremiah37:10 Gadia shin nea hemba mbautyav mba Mbakaldi cii mba ve nenge ityav a ven la je, á mase shin mbavihinyol tseegh tsô, kpa ma ve mough hanma or ken tenti u nan, ma ve nande gar ne sha usu." 
Jeremiah37:11 Tsô zum u mbautyav mba Mbakaldi ve hembe hen Yerusalem kera, sha ci u cian mbautyav mba Farao la yô," 
Jeremiah37:12 Yeremia due ken Yerusalem er una za ken tar u Benyamin, una za ngohol dyako keregh ker atô u ior." 
Jeremiah37:13 Zum u a lu hen Hundagar u Benyamin yô, orhemen u mbakuran lu her, iti na er Iriya wan u Shelemia, wan u Hanania, a kôr profeti Yeremia er: U ngu meen yemen hen Mbakaldi." 
Jeremiah37:14 Nahan Yeremia nyiman er: Ka mimi ga; m ngu yemen hen Mbakaldi ga; kpa a wa un iko her ga; nahan Iriya kôr Yeremia za a na hen atiator. 
Jeremiah37:15 Tsô asema vihi atiator a Yeremia ve gbidye un, ve wa un ken gaadi ken ya u orngeren Yonatan; gadia ve gema ya la, hingir gaadi." 
Jeremiah37:16 Zum u Yeremia nyôr ken gaadi ken ukpar mbala, man a vande tsan ker ayange ngee," 
Jeremiah37:17 nahan tor Sedekia tindi er i̱ za dugh un i̱ va a na; tsô tor pine un ken myer ken iyou na, a kaa er: Ma kwaghôron u TER ngu shinii? Yeremia kaa er: Ngu yum. Tsô a kaa er: Á gema u á na sha ikev i tor u Babilon." 
Jeremiah37:18 Shi Yeremia kaa a tor Sedekia, er: M er u nyi, shin mbatomov ou, shin ior mban, man ne wuhum ken gaadii?" 
Jeremiah37:19 Uprofeti enev, mba ve tsengeôron ne kwagh, ve kaan er: Tor u Babilon una va nôngo ityav a ven ga, shin hen tar ne kpaa ga la, mba han ahegene?" 
Jeremiah37:20 Shi ungwa ase hegen terem tor; m zamber, zamber wam a̱ gba u hen ikum, m de kera hidi ken ya u orngeren Yonatan la ga, sha er m̱ de za kpeen ker ga yô." 
Jeremiah37:21 Tsô tor Sedekia na zwa er ve̱ wa un ken tembe u mbakuran, man ve̱ naan un kpenbredi u duen hen ya u orkaanbredi ayange ayange, zan zan bredi u ken gar á bee cii. Kape Yeremia tema ken tembe u mbakuran la." 
Jeremiah38:1 Tsô Shefatia wan u Matan, man Gedalia wan u Pashur, man Yukal wan u Shelemia, man Pashur wan u Malkia, ve ungwa kwaghôron u Yeremia lu ôron a ior cii la, er:" 
Jeremiah38:2 TER ngu kaan nahan, er: U nana hanger akughul ken gar ne yô, nana kpe ku u sha sanker man u sha ijen kua u sha bouange kpaa; kpa u nana due nana za kohol Mbakaldi yô, nana lu uma, uma u nan kpaa una hingir nan er ka ishar nan ye yô, nana lu uma." 
Jeremiah38:3 TER ngu kaan nahan er: Á na gar ne sha ikev i mbautyav mba tor u Babilon kpee je, una ngohol un kpaa." 
Jeremiah38:4 Tsô atiator kaa a tor er: Ma i shi woo or ne; gadia ngu nan ishima ngi yinan mbautyav mba ve shi ken gar ne kua ior cii, er a lu ôron ambaakaa ne a ve yô; gadia or ne ngu keren mkpeyol sha ci u ior ne ga, saa mvihi tsô." 
Jeremiah38:5 Nahan tor Sedekia kaa er: Nenge, ngu sha ikev yen: gadia tor á fatyô u yangen ne kwagh ga." 
Jeremiah38:6 Tsô ve tôô Yeremia, ve gbihi un shin ijôr i Malkia, wan u tor, i i lu ken tembe u mbakuran la; ve hungwa a Yeremia sha ikor. Shin ijôr la mngerem lu ga, lu angbiôr tseegh; nahan Yeremia hungwa shin angbiôr." 
Jeremiah38:7 Kpa zum u Ebedi-meleki Oretiopia, ortom u ken ya u tor, ungwa er ve gbihi Yeremia ken ihungwa yô—hen shighe la tor tema ken Hundagar u Benyamin—" 
Jeremiah38:8 nahan Ebedi-meleki due hen ya u tor, a gba ôron kwagh a tor kaan er:" 
Jeremiah38:9 Terem tor, ior mban ve er kwaghbo sha ieren i ve er a profeti Yeremia la cii, er ve gbihi un shin ijôr yô, ngu kpen ijen henpe a lu la je; gadia ma kwaghyan kera ngu ken gar ga." 
Jeremiah38:10 Nahan tor na Ebedi-meleki Oretiopia, zwa, er: Tôô ior utar heen, za dugh profeti Yeremia shin ijôr er a lu a kpe ga ne." 
Jeremiah38:11 Nahan Ebedi-meleki maa tôô ior mbala, a nyôr ken ya u tor shin atô a iyou i koson inyaregh, a tôô ajav a ikondo man abamber a ikondo a anden shimin, a iligh sha ikor, a kende shin ijôr za ar hen Yeremia." 
Jeremiah38:12 Tsô Ebedi-meleki, Oretiopia, kaa a Yeremia er, wa ajav a ikondo man abamber a ikondo a anden la ken akutsahagh a ou, huwa ikor sha mi; nahan Yeremia er nahan." 
Jeremiah38:13 Tsô ve dugh Yeremia sha ikor, ve dugh un shin ijôr; Yeremia maa lu hen tembe u mbakuran." 
Jeremiah38:14 Nahan tor Sedekia tindi, i za kua a profeti Yeremia i va a na her a na hen ijiir i nyôron i sha utar i ken iyou i TER la; tsô tor kaa a Yeremia er: Me pine u kwagh; de yeren mo ma kwagh ga." 
Jeremiah38:15 Nahan Yeremia kaa a Sedekia er: Aluer mea pase u un, ú wuam keng gaa? Man aluer mea wase u mhen kpaa, ú wan iko her ga." 
Jeremiah38:16 Nahan tor Sedekia bum a Yeremia ken myer er: Er TER u A ne se uma ne, A lu u uma ne, Me wua u ga man shi me na u sha ikev i ior mban mba ve keren uma wou kpaa ga." 
Jeremiah38:17 Nahan Yeremia kaa a Sedekia er: TER, Aôndo u akum a Sha, Aôndo u Iserael, ngu kaan nahan er: Aluer wea due iyol you je, wea za hen atiator a tor u Babilon yô, uma wou una war, man gar ne kpaa á kera nande un sha usu ga, wea lu uma, we kua ya wou je;" 
Jeremiah38:18 kpa aluer u venda u duen zan hen atiator a tor u Babilon yô, nahan á na gar ne sha ikev i Mbakaldi, vea nande un sha usu, we kpaa ú war sha ikev ve ga." 
Jeremiah38:19 Tsô tor Sedekia kaa a Yeremia er: M ngu cian Mbayuda mba ve za kohol Mbakaldi la, sha er ve̱ de nem sha ikev ve, ve̱ nahan mo tar ga." 
Jeremiah38:20 Kpa Yeremia kaa er: Vea na u sha ikev ve ga. Shi ungwa imo i TER, sha kwagh u m kaa u la, ka nahan man á kpe u iyol man uma wou kpaa una war ye." 
Jeremiah38:21 Kpa aluer u venda u duen zan yô— TER tesem nahan er: 
Jeremiah38:22 Nenge, kasev mba ve shi ken ya u tor u Yuda cii, á due a ve, á za a ve hen atiator a tor u Babilon, man kasev mbala je vea kaa er: Ahuraior a ou la tsugh u, ve hemba u je; er angahar a ou a nyer shin angbiôr yô, ve gema ijime a we." 
Jeremiah38:23 Á due a kasev ou cii kua mbayev ou, á va a mi hen Mbakaldi; man we kpaa ú war sha ikev ve ga, kpa uwegh ku tor u Babilon kua kôr u, man ka we je u na á nande gar ne sha usu ye." 
Jeremiah38:24 Tsô Sedekia kaa a Yeremia er: Or môm môm nana̱ de fe kwaghôron ne ga, man ú kpe ga ye." 
Jeremiah38:25 Kpa aluer atiator á ungwa aun er m er kwagh a we, man vea va her a we, vea kaa we er: Shi pase se kwagh u u kaa a tor yô; de yeren se ma kwagh ga, sé wua u ga; man tor yô, ôr u nyi?" 
Jeremiah38:26 Nahan ú kaa a ve wer: M va a zamber wam sha ishigh ki tor mer, a̱ de kera ne, i̱ hide a mo hen ya u Yonatan m̱ za kpe her ga." 
Jeremiah38:27 Tsô atiator cii va hen Yeremia, ve va pine un; nahan a ôr ve sha akaa a tor kaa un la cii. Tsô ve de un; gadia kwagh la due ken igbar ga." 
Jeremiah38:28 Nahan Yeremia tema ken tembe u mbakuran zan zan sha iyange i i ngohol Yerusalem la. 
Jeremiah39:1 Tsô zum u i ngohol Yerusalem kera yô—sha inyom i sha utaankarunyiin i Sedekia tor u Yuda la, sha uwer u sha pue, Nebukadinesar tor u Babilon man akumautya na cii va ta num sha Yerusalem, ve kase un;" 
Jeremiah39:2 sha inyom i sha pue kar môm i Sedekia, sha uwer u sha unyiin man iyange i sha utaankarunyiin i uwer la, i pev gilgar—" 
Jeremiah39:3 atiator a tor u Babilon cii va nyôr, za tema hen hunda ker atô, lu Nergal-shareser man Samgar-nebo man rabesari Sarsekim, kua rabemagi Nergal-shareser, kua atiator agen a tor u Babilon cii." 
Jeremiah39:4 Tsô er Sedekia tor u Yuda kua mbautyav cii nenge a ve yô, ve yevese, ve due ken gar tugh, sha gbenda u ken sule u tor, sha hunda u u lu hen haregh u ukpekpe uhar la; ve yem gbenda u u ver ishigh hen Araba la." 
Jeremiah39:5 Kpa mbautyav mba Mbakaldi zenda ve ityô, za kohol Sedekia shin kpuun kpuun u Yeriko; mba ker un yô, ve kôndo a na hen Nebukadinesar tor u Babilon hen Ribela ken tar u Hamati, a ôr un ijir heregh." 
Jeremiah39:6 Nahan tor u Babilon wua ônov mba nomso mba Sedekia ken Ribela sha ashe na je; ashagbaior a Yuda cii kpaa, tor u Babilon wua ve," 
Jeremiah39:7 man shi a ongor Sedekia ashe, man a kange un sha mshirim ma togula sha u yemen a na sha Babilon." 
Jeremiah39:8 Ya u tor kua uya mba ior mbagenev kpaa, Mbakaldi nande sha usu, man ve yôhôl gilgar u Yerusalem kpaa." 
Jeremiah39:9 Asande a ior a a shi her la, Nebusaradan orhemen u mbakurantor yem a ve uikangen sha Babilon." 
Jeremiah39:10 Kpa mbaatsanev mbagenev, mba ve lu a ma kwagh ga yô, Nebusaradan orhemen u mbakurantor undu ve ken tar u Yuda, a na ve ishule i kon i wain man ishule igen sha iyange shon la je." 
Jeremiah39:11 Man Nebukadinesar tor u Babilon, na Nebusaradan, orhemen u mbakurantor, zwa sha kwagh u Yeremia er:" 
Jeremiah39:12 Kua a na, ver ishima sha a na dedoo, de eren un ma kwaghvihin ga; ka kwagh u una kaa u la, er un ye." 
Jeremiah39:13 Nahan Nebusaradan, orhemen u mbakurantor, man rabesari Nebushaseban, man rabemagi Nergal-shareser, man mbahemenev mba tor u Babilon cii" 
Jeremiah39:14 ve tindi, i za kua a Yeremia ken tembe u mbakuran, ve gema un ve wa sha ikev i Gedalia wan u Ahikam, wan u Shafan, sha u a̱ yem a na hen ya; nahan a hingir u teman a ior imôngo." 
Jeremiah39:15 Kwaghôron u TER shi va hen Yeremia er a lu hen tembe u mbakuran henpe i wuhe un la, er:" 
Jeremiah39:16 Za, za ôr kwagh a Ebedi-meleki, Oretiopia la, wer: TER u akum a Sha, Aôndo u Iserael, ngu kaan nahan er: Nenge, Me er akaa a M ter sha gar ne, ka a bo, ka a dedoo ga, aa va er sha ashe ou sha iyange shon la." 
Jeremiah39:17 Kpa Me yima u sha iyange la, kape TER A kaa ne, á na u sha ikev i ior mba ve cier we iyol la ga." 
Jeremiah39:18 Gadia Me yima u kpee je, ú kpe ku u sha sanker ga, kpa uma wou una hingir we er ka ishar u ye yô; sha ci u u suur sha a Mo yô, kape TER A kaa ne." 
Jeremiah40:1 Kwaghôron ne due hen TER, va hen Yeremia, ken ijime i Nebusaradan, orhemen u mbakurantor, pase un tuhwa ken Rama la, zum u a tindi er i̱ za va a na, er a lu a ahye ave, a mbauikangenev mba Yerusalem kua Yuda cii imôngo, mba i lu yemen a ve uikangen sha Babilon la." 
Jeremiah40:2 Orhemen u mbakurantor la kua a Yeremia, man a kaa a na er: Ka TER, Aôndo wou je, a ter kwaghbo ne sha ijiir ne ye;" 
Jeremiah40:3 TER kpaa va mi, man A er er A vande teren la nahan vough; gadia ne er TER isholibo, ne wa imo Na iko ga, ka nahan man kwaghbo ne a tser ne ye." 
Jeremiah40:4 Hegen yô, nenge, dughun yam we ahye sha ave kera nyian ne. Aluer a doo u u zan a mo imôngo sha Babilon yô, va, me ver ishima sha a we dedoo; kpa aluer wea nenge a doo u u zan a mo imôngo sha Babilon ga kpaa, de kera tsô; nenge, tar cii ngu sha ishigh you, henpe u nenge i doo u, man i lu u pe zan cii yô, gba zan her tsô." 
Jeremiah40:5 Tsô er a lu a hide ga la, a kaa a na er: Nahan kpaa, hide, za hen Gedalia wan u Ahikam, wan u Shafan, u tor u Babilon a ver un gomna sha agar a Yuda la, tema a na, a ior imôngo; shin za henpe u nenge i lu u pe zan yô. Nahan orhemen u mbakurantor la na un inyaregh ki kwaghyan man iwua; tsô a na un gbenda." 
Jeremiah40:6 Nahan Yeremia yem hen Gedalia wan u Ahikam, hen Misepa, a za tema a na a ior imôngo mba ve shi ken tar la yô." 
Jeremiah40:7 Tsô zum u mbahemenev mba akumautya mba ve lu ken akôngo la, ve kua ior vev, ve ungwa aun er tor u Babilon ver Gedalia wan u Ahikam, gomna sha tar la, man a wa un nomso man kasev man mbayev man atsanaior a hen tar la, a i yem a ve uikangen ken Babilon ga la, sha ikev," 
Jeremiah40:8 nahan ve va hen Gedalia hen Misepa, lu Ishemael wan u Netania man Yohanan kua Yonatan ônov mba Karea, man Seraia wan u Tanhumeti man ônov mba Efai Ornetofa, man Yesania wan u Ormaakati, ve a ior vev." 
Jeremiah40:9 Gedalia wan u Ahikam wan u Shafan bum a ve man ior vev, kaa er: De cie nen u eren Mbakaldi tom ga; tema nen ken tar man er nen tor u Babilon tom, tsô á kpe ne iyol." 
Jeremiah40:10 Kpa mo yô, nenge me tema hen Misepa sha u tilen sha ishigh ki Mbakaldi, mba vea va her a vese yô; kpa ne yô, kohol nen zar u wain, man atam a ikon sha wangernyom, man mkurem, koso nen ken atum a en, man tema nen ken agar a en a ne ngohol a yô." 
Jeremiah40:11 Er Mbayuda mba ve lu ken Moabi cii man ken Mbaamon man ken Edom kua mba ve lu ken ityar la cii, ve ungwa aun er tor u Babilon undu asande ken Yuda, je, a ver Gedalia wan u Ahikam, wan u Shafan gomna sha a ve;" 
Jeremiah40:12 nahan Mbayuda cii za hide ken ajiir a i zenda ve, ve yem ker la, ve va hen tar u Yuda, ve za hen Gedalia hen Misepa; nahan ve kohol zar u wain man atam a ikon a sha wangernyom kpen kpen." 
Jeremiah40:13 Tsô Yohanan wan u Karea man mbahemenev mba akumautya mba yan ve lu ken tangeutya la cii, ve va hen Gedalia hen Misepa," 
Jeremiah40:14 ve kaa a na er: U shi fa er Baali tor u Mbaamon a tindi Ishemael wan u Netania er a̱ va wua u kpa? Kpa Gedalia wan u Ahikam na ve jighjigh ga. 
Jeremiah40:15 Nahan Yohanan wan u Karea ôr kwagh a Gedalia hen Misepa ken myer je, er: Shi de, m̱ za wua Ishemael wan u Netania, ma or kpaa nana fa ga; ka sha ci u nyi man una gba wuan we, man Mbayuda mba ve kohol her a we cii vea sambe, man asande a Yuda a a shi her la, vea saa ishe nahana?" 
Jeremiah40:16 Kpa Gedalia wan u Ahikam kaa a Yohanan wan u Karea er: De eren kwagh ne ga; gadia u ngu wan Ishemael aie iyol. 
Jeremiah41:1 Tsô sha uwer u sha utaankaruhar la, Ishemael wan u Netania, wan u Elishama, u ken tsombor u tor, man u ken mbatamen mba tor, man ior pue a na imôngo, ve va hen Gedalia wan u Ahikam hen Misepa; ve ya kwaghyan heregh imôngo, ken Misepa." 
Jeremiah41:2 Tsô Ishemael wan u Netania a ior mba puev mba ve lu a na imôngo la, ve mough sha, ve wua Gedalia wan u Ahikam wam u Shafan sha sanker; ve wua un, u tor u Babilon ver un gomna sha tar shon la." 
Jeremiah41:3 Ishemael shi wua Mbayuda mba ve lu a na imôngo cii, mba ve lu a Gedalia hen Misepa la, man Mbakaldi mba ve lu her, ve lu mbautyav la." 
Jeremiah41:4 Tsô sha iyange i sha uhar i ken ijime i a wua Gedalia la, ma or kpaa nan lu a fa ga la," 
Jeremiah41:5 ior mbagenev, akunduanyiin due ken Shekem man ken Shilo kua ken Samaria, ve va, ve torough ander a ve kera, ve lu a akondo a anden iyol, man ve ese avav iyol, ve lu a iniav mbi sha samuyia man kwaghhumandoon sha u van a mi hen iyou i TER." 
Jeremiah41:6 Nahan Ishemael wan u Netania due hen Misepa sha u za keghen ve gbenda, lu vaan zan; tsô, zum u a kohol ve yô, a kaa a ve er: Va nen hen Gedalia wan u Ahikam." 
Jeremiah41:7 Tsô, zum u ve nyôr ken atô gar yô, Ishemael wan u Netania wua ve, haa ve shin ijôr, wen kua ior mba ve lu a na imôngo la." 
Jeremiah41:8 Kpa ior vev mbagenev pue kaa a Ishemael er: De woo se ga, gadia se koso akaa ken myer ken toho, ka alakema man shair man mkurem man iyough. Nahan a de, a kera wua ve a anmgbianev vev imôngo ga." 
Jeremiah41:9 Ijôr i Ishemael gbihi akom a ior mba a wua la cii shimi, a ikom i Gedalia imôngo, lu ijôr i vesen i tor Asa dugh sha ci u cian Baasha tor u Iserael la yô. Ishemael wan u Netania gema iv i sha mba a wua la." 
Jeremiah41:10 Nahan Ishemael kura asande a ior a a shi hen Misepa la cii, yem a ve uikangen: ka ônkasev mba tor kua ior mba ve shi ken Misepa cii, mba Nebusaradan orhemen u mbakurantor wa Gedalia wan u Ahikam sha ikev la; Ishemael wan u Netania gema kura ve, yem a ve uikangen, nahan a mough a gba yemen hen Mbaamon." 
Jeremiah41:11 Kpa zum u Yohanan wan u Karea man mbahemenev mba mbautyav mba ve lu a na imôngo la cii, ve ungwa aun a kwaghbo u Ishemael wan u Netania a er la cii," 
Jeremiah41:12 nahan ve kura ior cii, sha u za nôngon ityav a Ishemael wan u Netania; ve za kohol un hen kpe u mngerem ma hen Gibeon la." 
Jeremiah41:13 Tsô zum u ior mba ve lu a Ishemael cii ve nenge a Yohanan wan u Karea, man mbahemenev mba mbautyav mba ve lu a na imôngo cii la yô, ve gba ember." 
Jeremiah41:14 Nahan ior cii mba Ishemael kura hen Misepa yem a mi uikangen la, ve hembe, ve yem ve za kohol Yohanan wan u Karea." 
Jeremiah41:15 Kpa Ishemael wan u Netania war sha ikev i Yohanan a ior anigheni, a yem hen Mbaamon." 
Jeremiah41:16 Nahan Yohanan wan u Karea man mbahemenev mba mbautyav mba ve lu a na imôngo la, ve kua a asande a ior cii, a Ishemael wan u Netania kôr hen Misepa yem a ve uikangen ken masejime u a wua Gedalia wan u Ahikam la; lu mbautyav man kasev man mbayev kua mbatomov mba ken ya u tor, a hide a ve hen Gibeon;" 
Jeremiah41:17 tsô ve mough ve za tema hen Geruti-kimham, u a lu ikua a Betelehem la, ve ver ishima u za nyôron ken Igipiti" 
Jeremiah41:18 sha ci u cian Mbakaldi; gadia ve lu cian ve, sha ci u Ishemael wan u Netania wua Gedalia wan u Ahikam, u tor u Babilon ver un gomna sha tar shon la yô." 
Jeremiah42:1 Nahan mbahemenev mba mbautyav cii, man Yohanan wan u Karea man Yesania wan u Hoshaia man ior cii, hii sha u kiriki zan zan ar sha u vesen kporom," 
Jeremiah42:2 ve kaa a profeti Yeremia er: Zamber wase a̱ shi gba u hen ikum, sôn TER, Aôndo wou, sha ci wase sha ci u asande a ior a a shi her ne, gadia ikpelaior ne nahan, se mase shin her kpeghee tsô, er ashe ou kpaa a lu nenge se nahan;" 
Jeremiah42:3 sha er TER, Aôndo wou, A̱ tese se gbenda u se̱ za sha mi, man kwagh u se̱ er yô." 
Jeremiah42:4 Tsô profeti Yeremia kaa a ve er: M ungwa ve; nenge, me sôn TER, Aôndo wen, er ne kaa nahan; man hanma kwagh u TER Una kaa ne cii, me pase ne, me yer ne ma kwagh ga." 
Jeremiah42:5 Nahan ve gema ve kaa a Yeremia er: TER A̱ hingir shiada u mimi man u jighjigh, u nan se ibo, aluer sea kera er sha kwaghôron u TER, Aôndo wou, A tindi u a mi her a vese la cii vough ga yô." 
Jeremiah42:6 Shin á lu u dedoo shin á lu u bo kpaa, sé ungwa imo i TER, Aôndo wase, u se tindi u her a Na yô, sha u á kpe se iyol, zum u sé wa imo i TER, Aôndo wase, iko yô." 
Jeremiah42:7 Tsô ayange nga kar pue yô, kwaghôron u TER va hen Yeremia." 
Jeremiah42:8 Nahan a yila Yohanan wan u Karea, man mbahemenev mba mbautyav cii mba ve lu a na imôngo la, man ior cii, hii sha u kiriki zan zan ar sha u vesen," 
Jeremiah42:9 a kaa a ve er: TER, Aôndo u Iserael, u ne tindim her a Na ner, m̱ za a zamber wen hen ishigh Nagh la, ngu kaan nahan er:" 
Jeremiah42:10 Aluer nea tema gil gil ken tar ne yô, nahan Me maa ne, Me yôhôl ne ga, Me môôr ne, Me wuhe ne ga; gadia M vaa afanyô sha kwaghvihin u M er ne la." 
Jeremiah42:11 De cie nen tor u Babilon, u ne cie un la ga; de cie un ga kape TER A kaa ne; gadia Mo M ngu a ven sha u waren ne, man sha u yiman ne sha ikev na." 
Jeremiah42:12 Me na, né kôr un mhôônom, una zungwe ne mhôônom, man una de ne, né tema hen tar wen." 
Jeremiah42:13 Kpa aluer né kaa ner: Sé kera tema ken tar ne ga yô, nahan ne kera wa imo i TER, Aôndo wen, iko ga ve;" 
Jeremiah42:14 nea kaa ner: Ei; kpa ka ken tar u Igipiti sé yem ye, henpe sé kera nenge a ityav ga, man sé ungwa imo i ikpamkor ga, man shi ijen i kwaghyan kpaa ia kera kôr se ga; ka keela je sé za tema ye:" 
Jeremiah42:15 yô, hegen ungwa nen ase kwaghôron u TER, ne asande a Yuda a a shi her ne; TER u akum a Sha, Aôndo u Iserael, ngu kaan nahan er: Aluer nea ver ishigh u nyôron ken Igipiti kpee, man nea yem nea za tema shir keela yô," 
Jeremiah42:16 nahan sanker u ne cie un la, una za kohol ne keela ken tar u Igipiti je; man ka keela nea kpe kpaa ye." 
Jeremiah42:17 Kape nomso mba iorov mba ve ver ishigh u zan ken Igipiti sha u za teman shir ker la cii, vea kpe ku u sha sanker man ijen kua bouange la; ma or ve môm nana shi, shin nana war kwaghbo u Me va a mi sha a ve la ga." 
Jeremiah42:18 Gadia TER u akum a Sha, Aôndo u Iserael, ngu kaan nahan er: Er i hee ishima Yam i vihin man iyugh Yam sha mba ve tem ken Yerusalem nahan, kape á haa iyugh yam sha a ven je la, zum u nea nyôr ken Igipiti yô; nea hingir kwagh u i we un ifan, man kwagh u cieryol, man ityuhwanev, man kwagh u aheenegh; man nea kera nenge ijiir ne mayange ga." 
Jeremiah42:19 TER ôr kwagh a ven ve, ne asande a Yuda a a shi her ne: De ze nen ken Igipiti ga; fa nen doo doo, m wa ne kwagh nyian ve," 
Jeremiah42:20 gadia ne tsume je ne vihi uuma enev kera; gadia ne tindim hen TER, Aôndo wen, ner: Sôn TER, Aôndo wase, sha ci wase, kwagh u TER, Aôndo wase, Una ôr cii yô, pase se, sé er un." 
Jeremiah42:21 M pase ne un nyian ve, kpa ne wa imo i TER, Aôndo wen, iko sha ma kwagh u A tindim a mi her a ven ga." 
Jeremiah42:22 Hegen yô, fa nen dedoo, né va kpe ku u sha sanker man ijen kua bouange, ken ijiir i ne ver ishima u né za tema shir ker la." 
Jeremiah43:1 Tsô zum u Yeremia kure u ôron kwagh a ior cii, sha akaaôron a TER, Aôndo ve, cii, a TER, Aôndo ve, A tindi un a mi her a ve yô, ka akaaôron angan cii," 
Jeremiah43:2 nahan Asaria wan u Hoshaia man Yohanan wan u Karea man ior mba kehen ityough cii, ve ôr kwagh, ve kaa a Yeremia er: Ka aie u eren ye; TER, Aôndo wase, tindi u sha u kaan er: De ze nen ken Igipiti sha u za teman shir ker ga, ze;" 
Jeremiah43:3 kpa ka Baruki wan u Neria a toron we ityô sha u nan se sha ikev i Mbakaldi ve̱ wua se, ve̱ yem a vese uikangen sha Babilon ye." 
Jeremiah43:4 Kape Yohanan wan u Karea man mbahemenev mba mbautyav cii kua ior cii ve kera wa imo i TER iko sha u teman ken tar u Yuda ga la. 
Jeremiah43:5 Kpa Yohanan wan u Karea man mbahemenev mba mbautyav cii, ve kura asande a Yuda a a shi her cii, a a due ken akuraior cii, a i zenda ve ve yem ker la, a hide a va tema ken tar u Yuda la;" 
Jeremiah43:6 nomso man kasev man mbayev man ônov mba tor mba kasev man hanma or u Nebusaradan orhemen u mbakurantor yan undu sha ikev i Gedalia wan u Ahikam wan u Shafan la, man profeti Yeremia kua Baruki wan u Neria," 
Jeremiah43:7 ve yem ken tar u Igipiti; gadia ve wa imo i TER iko ga, ve yem zan zan ve za nyôr hen Tahapanheshi." 
Jeremiah43:8 Nahan kwaghôron u TER va hen Yeremia ken Tahapanheshi er: 
Jeremiah43:9 Tôô awen a tamen sha uwe, yer a shin inya i hôron ken tembe u u lu sha hunda u ya u Farao ken Tahapanheshi la, sha ashe a ior mba Yuda;" 
Jeremiah43:10 kaa a ve wer: TER u akum a Sha, Aôndo u Iserael, ngu kaan nahan er: Nenge, Me tindi, i̱ za kua a Nebukadinesar tor u Babilon, wanakiriki Wam, man Me ver ikônough nagh ki torough sha awen angan a M yer ne; una samber butu na u tor sha a." 
Jeremiah43:11 Una va, una va hemba tar u Igipiti; mba i ver ve ku la vea za ken ku, mba i ver ve ikangenev la, vea za ken uikangen je, man mba i ver ve sanker la, vea za sha sanker je." 
Jeremiah43:12 Me keer usu ken uya mba mbaaôndo mba Igipiti; una nande ve, una yem a ve uikangen; una cir tar u Igipiti iyol, er orkuranilev ka nan cir ikondo i nan nahan; una due keregh bem bem." 
Jeremiah43:13 Shi una hembe mtôm ma awenem ma tempel u iyange, ma ma lu ken tar u Igipiti la; man una nande uya mba mbaaôndo mba Igipiti sha usu." 
Jeremiah44:1 Kwaghôron ne va hen Yeremia sha kwagh u Mbayuda mba ve tema ken tar u Igipiti cii, ka mba ve tema ken Migedol man ken Tahapanheshi man ken Nofe man ken tar u Pateroshi je la, er:" 
Jeremiah44:2 TER u akum a Sha, Aôndo u Iserael, ngu kaan nahan er: Ne ayol an en je, ne nenge kwaghbo la cii, u M ve a mi sha Yerusalem kua sha agar a Yuda cii; nenge, ve hingir atse nyian, ma or kera tema ker ga," 
Jeremiah44:3 sha ci u iferkwagh ve, i ve er, ve bamem, ve za nande nagh, ve civir mbaaôndo mbagenev, mba ve fe ve ga la, shin ve, shin ne, shin uter enev kpaa." 
Jeremiah44:4 Nahan kpaa M tindi ne a mbatomov Av cii, uprofeti, pepe kua aikighe Mer: Shi de eren nen kwagh u ndôhôrshima ne, u uma Wam a nyagh un la ga." 
Jeremiah44:5 Kpa ve wa iko ga, man shi ve ver ato sha u geman undun iferkwagh ve, er vea de u nanden mbaaôndo mbagenev nagh la ga." 
Jeremiah44:6 Ka sha ci u nahan man ishima Yam i vihin man iyugh Yam i ve, i gbe yeghen sha agar a Yuda man sha akômaigbinda a Yerusalem ye; a hingir atse man taaikôngo er i lu nyian nahan." 
Jeremiah44:7 Hegen yô, TER, Aôndo u akum a Sha, Aôndo u Iserael, ngu kaan nahan er: Ka sha ci u nyi man ne eren zegeiferkwagh ne vihin uuma enev ayol a en, ne timin nomsoor man kwase man wanye kua wan u sha ikum ken Yuda je, ne kera shi ma or ga," 
Jeremiah44:8 er ne bamem sha aeren a ave a en, ne nanden mbaaôndo mbagenev nagh ken tar u Igipiti, henpe ne ze u za teman shir la, sha u i̱ tim ne kera man ne̱ hingir akuraior a shin tar cii kwagh u ityuhwanev man kwagh u aheenegh nahana?" 
Jeremiah44:9 Aferakaa a uter enev, man aferakaa a utor mba Yuda, man aferakaa a kasev vev, man aferakaa a en ayol a en, man aferakaa a kasev enev, a ve er ken tar u Yuda kua sha akômaigbinda a Yerusalem la a hungul ne ve shinii?" 
Jeremiah44:10 Zan zan nyian je mba a var inya ga, man shi mba cian ga, man mba zenden sha atindiakaa a Am kua akaawan a Am kpaa ga, a M ver ne kua uter enev sha ishi la." 
Jeremiah44:11 Nahan yô, TER u akum a Sha, Aôndo u Iserael, ngu kaan nahan er: Nenge, M gema ishigh M ver sha aven ka sha u eren ne kwagh u vihin, ka sha u timin Yuda cii kera." 
Jeremiah44:12 Me kura asande a Yuda a a shi her a a ver ishigh u zan ken tar u Igipiti sha u za teman shir keregh la kera, ve cii vea saa ishe ken tar u Igipiti; vea kpe ku u sha sanker, ijen ia wua ve, hii sha mbakiriki zan zan ar sha mbavesen; vea kpe ku u sha sanker kua ijen vea hingir kwagh u i we un ifan man kwagh u cieryol man kwagh u ityuhwanev man kwagh u aheenegh." 
Jeremiah44:13 Gadia Me tsaha mba ve tem ken tar u Igipiti, er lu M tsaha Yerusalem nahan, sha sanker man sha ijen kua bouange;" 
Jeremiah44:14 nahan ma or u ken asande a Yuda, a a ze ken tar u Igipiti sha u za teman shir ker, nana war ga, shin nana shi her, sha u hiden ken tar u Yuda, henpe i sar ve u hiden man u teman ker la kpaa ga; gadia vea hide ga, saa mbayevese môm môm la." 
Jeremiah44:15 Nahan nomso cii mba ve fe er kasev vev lu nanden mbaaôndo mbagenev nagh, kua kasev cii mba ve til heregh, ikpelaior kpishi, ka ior mba ve tem ken tar u Igipiti ken Pateroshi cii je la, ve gema ve kaa a Yeremia, er:" 
Jeremiah44:16 Sha kwaghôron u u ôr se ken iti i TER la, sé wa u iko ga." 
Jeremiah44:17 Kpa se yô, hanma kwaghôron u a dugh se ken zwa yô, sé er un kpee je, sé nanden torkwase u Sha nagh, shi sé toon un iniav mbi man er se vande eren nahan, se kua uter asev man utor asev kua mbatarev asev, ken agar a Yuda man sha igbenda i Yerusalem; gadia hen shighe la se lu a kwaghyan kpishi man se lu doo doo, se nenge kwaghbo ashe ga." 
Jeremiah44:18 Kpa er se de u nan torkwase u Sha la nagh man u toon un iniav mbi man yô, se ban akaa cii man se tim sha sanker kua ijen." 
Jeremiah44:19 Man zum u se lu nanden torkwase u Sha nagh, man se lu toon un iniav mbi man la, kera lu sha mrumun u noov asev se lu kaan un ukuese mba ve lu er eev nav la nahan, man se lu toon un iniav mbi man gaa?" 
Jeremiah44:20 Nahan Yeremia kaa a ior cii, nomso kua kasev, mba ve na un imo ne cii er:" 
Jeremiah44:21 Nagh ku ne lu nande ken agar a Yuda, man sha igbenda i Yerusalem la, ne man uter enev man utor enev, man atiator a en kua ior i hen tar la, TER kera umbur ku gaa, man kwagh shon nyôr Un ken ishima gaa?" 
Jeremiah44:22 Zan zan TER kera fatyô u wan ishima ga, sha ci u iferkwagh i aeren a en, man sha ci u akaa a ndôhôrshima a ne er la; ka sha ci u nahan tar wen hingir ice, man kwagh u cieryol man kwagh u ityuhwanev, or kera tema ker ga ye, er i lu nyian nahan." 
Jeremiah44:23 Sha ci u ne nande nagh, man sha ci u ne er TER isholibo man ne wa imo i TER iko ga, man shi ne zende sha atindiakaa Na ga, man sha akaawan a Na, kua ushiada Nav kpaa ga; ka nahan man kwaghbo ne a tser ne ye, er i lu nyian nahan." 
Jeremiah44:24 Shi Yeremia kaa a ior cii, kua kasev cii er: Ungwa nen kwaghôron u TER, ne Mbayuda mba ne lu ken tar u Igipiti cii," 
Jeremiah44:25 TER u akum a Sha, Aôndo u Iserael, ngu kaan nahan er: Ne man kasev enev, ne ôr kwagh sha zwa wen shi ne kure un sha ave a en kpaa, ne mba kaan ner: Se kure mbambum asev mba se bum ser, sé nanden torkwase u Sha nagh man sé toon un iniav mbi man la kpee je; nahan yô, gba taver nen ishima sha mbambum enev tsô, man kure nen ve kpaa." 
Jeremiah44:26 Nahan yô, ungwa nen kwaghôron u TER, ne Mbayuda mba ne tem ken tar u Igipiti cii; nenge, M bum sha iti Yam i vesen, kape TER A kaa ne, ma or u Yuda ken tar u Igipiti cii, nana kera ter iti Yam nana kaa er: Er Ter AÔNDO A lu u uma ne, ga." 
Jeremiah44:27 Nenge, M ngu kuran ve sha u eren ve kwagh u bo, ka u dedoo ga; ior mba Yuda cii, mba ve lu ken tar u Igipiti ne, á tim ve sha sanker man sha ijen, zan zan je vea kar been." 
Jeremiah44:28 Mba ve wer sanker, mba vea due ken tar u Igipiti, vea hide ken tar u Yuda yô, vea lu ior kpeghee tsô; man asande a Yuda cii a a yem ken tar u Igipiti sha u za teman shir ker la, vea fa kwaghôron u una tile her yô, shin á lu u Wam, shin á lu u ve." 
Jeremiah44:29 Kwagh ne una hingir ne ikav, kape TER A kaa ne: Me tsaha ne ken ijiir ne, sha u ne̱ fa er kwaghôron Wam una tile her, sha u eren ne kwagh u bo yô;" 
Jeremiah44:30 TER ngu kaan nahan er: Nenge, Me gema Farao Hofera tor u Igipiti Me na un sha ikev i mbaihomov nav, man sha ikev i mba ve keren uma na la, er M na Sedekia tor u Yuda sha ikev i Nebukadinesar tor u Babilon, orihom na, u a lu keren uma na la nahan." 
Jeremiah45:1 Kwaghôron u profeti Yeremia ôr Baruki wan u Neria zum u a kura akaaôron ne sha zwa u Yeremia man a nger a ken ruamabera, sha inyom i sha unyiin i Yehoyakim wan u Yoshia, tor u Yuda la, a kaa er:" 
Jeremiah45:2 TER, Aôndo u Iserael, ngu kaan a we, we Baruki:" 
Jeremiah45:3 U kaa wer: Aye! Kwagh tserem ve! Gadia TER seer ijungwen sha ican yam; m vôr a mkin wam, man m zough a mmem ga!" 
Jeremiah45:4 Kaa a na nahan wer: TER ngu kaan nahan er: Nenge, kwagh u M maa yô, Me yôhôl un, man kwagh u M môôr kpaa, Me wuhe un; kape á lu sha tar cii la." 
Jeremiah45:5 U ngu keren akaa a vesen sha ci wou iyol youwe? De kera keren a ga; gadia nenge, M ngu van a kwagh u bo sha uuma cii, kape TER A kaa ne; kpa Me gema uma wou a̱ hingir we er ka ishar u ye yô, sha ajiir a ú zenden cii." 
Jeremiah46:1 Kwaghôron u TER ne va hen profeti Yeremia sha kwagh u akuraior. 
Jeremiah46:2 Kwagh u Igipiti. Sha kwagh u mbautyav mba Farao-neko tor u Igipiti, mba ve lu hen kpe ifi u Uferati ken Karkemishi, mba Nebukadinesar tor u Babilon hemba ve ken inyom i sha unyiin i Yehoyakim wan u Yoshia, tor u Yuda la." 
Jeremiah46:3 Sôr nen akuva man perutya, kporom nen sha u nôngon ityav." 
Jeremiah46:4 Zer nen akeke sha anyinya, unde nen, ne mbahendan, due nen ken igbar a mbaakera enev, kile nen awange, a̱ engem, haa nen uriga mba iyôôv!" 
Jeremiah46:5 Ka nyi man m nenge, ishima i nyian ve, ve gem ijime? Kwagh hemba ior vev mbataveryol, mba yevese je; ashe tsô kpaa ve gema ijime ga; mcieryol kase tser! Kape TER A kaa ne." 
Jeremiah46:6 Or u fefa fatyô u yevese ga, orageegh kpaa fatyô waren ga; ken imbusutarimese hen ifi u Uferati, ve nôngo gbev ve gbidye inya." 
Jeremiah46:7 Ka anti or nan moron iyol er ifi u Nil, u mngerem nam ma hor er uifi nahana?" 
Jeremiah46:8 Igipiti ngu moron iyol er ifi u Nil nahan man mngerem nam ma hor er uifi nahan; ngu kaan er: Me mor, me cir tar cii me tim agar kua mba ve tem ken a cii!" 
Jeremiah46:9 Kôr nen gbenda u yemen, ne anyinya; yevese nen sha agee, ne akekeautya; ior mba taver ayol ve̱ kôr gbenda ve̱ yem; ka Kushi man Puti mba ve hir perutya man Mbaludi mba ve fe u hendan ada." 
Jeremiah46:10 Gadia iyange i shon la, ka iyange i TER je, TER u akum a Sha; iyange i oron iyev sha u Una or iyev sha mbaihomov Nav; sanker una ya, una ide man una ma awambe a ve je á kuma un; gadia Ter, TER u akum a Sha ngu a nagh ku sôngon je, ken tar u Imbusutarimese, ken ifi u Uferati la." 
Jeremiah46:11 Kôndo nen sha Gileadi, za tôô balsem, we iniunkwase, wankwase u Igipiti; u gba di ngeen a icimbiv anza kposo kposo gbilin tsô; man mwar ngu sha ci wou ga." 
Jeremiah46:12 Akuraior ungwa gwa u kunya wou, mliam ou mgbough sha tar cii, gadia ortaveryol nôngo gbev ta sha ortaveryol ugen, ve uhar cii, ve gbidye inya." 
Jeremiah46:13 Kwaghôron ne TER ôr a profeti Yeremia sha kwagh u Nebukadinesar tor u Babilon er una va una va tsaha tar u Igipiti yô. 
Jeremiah46:14 Pase nen kwagh ne ken Igipiti, yôô nen un ken Migedol. Een, yôô nen un ken Nofe man ken Tahapanheshi, kaa nen ner: Mough tile sha, wa ago iyol, gadia sanker wua ningir we tser." 
Jeremiah46:15 Er nan man i kar a mbaageev ou la kera? Ve tile ga gadia TER mgbegha ve kera. 
Jeremiah46:16 A na mbagenev kpishi ve nôngo gbev, ve ta sha ayol a ve, ve gbidye inya; ve kaa er: Mough nen, sé hide nen ken ior asev, ken tar u i mar se la, sé war nen sanker u aperagh ne." 
Jeremiah46:17 Ve genger imo keela, ve kaa er: Farao tor u Igipiti yô, ka ayôôso tseegh tsô; a de tso kar ihongo." 
Jeremiah46:18 Er M lu u uma ne, kape Tor A kaa ne, u i yer iti Na er, TER u akum a Sha la, or ngu van, nana lu er Tabor ken iwo yô, man er Karmel u hen kpezegemnger nahan." 
Jeremiah46:19 Kohol iyol u zan ken uikangen we wankwase u u tem ken tar u Igipiti, gadia Nofe hingir ice, á nande un kera, or á kera tema ken a na ga." 
Jeremiah46:20 Igipiti ka tulebua u dedoo tsung je, kpa akughô va shin imbusutarimese, va haa sha a na." 
Jeremiah46:21 Mbautyav mba a er injar a ve la, mba ker atô na er uicighanmbaagumabua nahan; gadia ve kpaa ve na ijime, ve coon ayem imôngo, ve tile ga; gadia iyange i mtim ve gba sha a ve, ka iyange i mtsaha ve je la." 
Jeremiah46:22 Iov na ngi er iov i iyô ka ia karen nahan; gadia mba kôndon a ikumutya, mba tan sha a na a azembe, er ka mba gberen ikon nahan." 
Jeremiah46:23 Mba paan ikô na, kape TER A kaa ne, gadia ve ngee gande; gadia ve hemba ikomon ingeegh, á fatyô u ôron iyenge ve ga." 
Jeremiah46:24 Wankwase u Igipiti hingir kwagh u aheenegh, i na un sha ikev i ior mba shin imbusutarimese." 
Jeremiah46:25 TER u akum a Sha, Aôndo u Iserael, ngu kaan er: Nenge, Me tsaha Amon u No, man Farao, man Igipiti a mbaaôndo nav kua utor nav, ka Farao a mba ve suur sha a na la;" 
Jeremiah46:26 man shi Me gema ve Me na sha ikev i mba ve keren uma ve la, man sha ikev i Nebukadinesar tor u Babilon man sha ikev i mbayev nav; kpa ken masetyô la, ior shi vea tema ker, er sha ayange a tsuaa la nahan, kape TER A kaa ne." 
Jeremiah46:27 Kpa we yô, de cie ga, wanakiriki Wam Yakob; ishima i̱ de nyian we ga, we Iserael, gadia nenge, Me yima u ken ica je, man vor wou kpaa ken tar u u lu uikangen ker la; Yakob una hide, ishima ia yôhôl un, una mem kpaa, ma or nana kera ta un mciem iyol ga." 
Jeremiah46:28 We, Yakob wanakiriki Wam, de cie ga, kape TER A kaa ne; gadia M ngu a we; gadia Me tim akuraior cii, a M sambe u ken a la, kpa we yô, Me tim u cii ga, kpa Me tsaha u akuma akuma, Me gba den we nahan tsô ga." 
Jeremiah47:1 Kwaghôron u TER ne va hen profeti Yeremia sha kwagh u Mbafiliti, er Farao lu a hembe Gasa ga la." 
Jeremiah47:2 TER ngu kaan nahan er: Nenge, mngerem ma moron shin imbusutarimese, maa hingir ifi u saren avenge, maa uve tar man kwagh u a lu ken u cii, gar kua mba ve tem ker cii; ior vea gbire ivaa man mba ve tem ken tar la cii, vea ger mliam." 
Jeremiah47:3 Sha ci u acin a apande a anyinya na, man sha ayem a akekeautya a na, man sha mhor u akaver a a, uter kera gema ashe ijime ape ônov vev lu ga, sha ci u ave ve hingir livaa;" 
Jeremiah47:4 sha ci u iyange i i lu van sha u timin Mbafiliti cii, man sha u wuan hanma orwasen u nan shi ken Tiru man Shidon la kera; gadia TER Una tim Mbafiliti, ka asande a a shi her ken icile i Kafetor je la." 
Jeremiah47:5 I tolough Gasa ityough kera; i tim Ashekelon kera, ka asande a a shi shin pev je la; shi nan je man né de u gberen avav iyolo?" 
Jeremiah47:6 we sanker u TER, shi nan je man ú meme? Shindi iyol you ken var wou, mem, huan ving." 
Jeremiah47:7 Á er nan man una huan ving, er i lu TER je A kaa er a̱ er iyongo a Ashekelon man a kpe u zegemngere? Ka keela A ver un ye." 
Jeremiah48:1 Sha kwagh u Moabi: TER u akum a Sha, Aôndo u Iserael, ngu kaan nahan er: Kwagh tser Nebo! Gadia i tim un kera; Kiriataim hingir kwagh u aheenegh, i ngohol un kpaa; iyouutya hingir kwagh u aheenegh, i yôhôl i kera;" 
Jeremiah48:2 icivir i Moabi bee kera; ken Heshebon ve wa kwaghbo ishima a na, er: Va nen, sé tim un kera, a̱ de kera lu ikurior ga. We, Mademen kpaa, á gema u ú hingir ving, sanker una dondo u ijime." 
Jeremiah48:3 Ungwa! vaa due ken Horonaim: mvihi man mtim u vesen! 
Jeremiah48:4 I tim Moabi; mbayev nav mba kiriki ger mliam. 
Jeremiah48:5 Sha ijiir i unden sha Luhiti la, mba haan mliam kôndon; man shin ijiir i hungwan sha Horonaim kpaa, i ungwa vaa u mliam ma mtim." 
Jeremiah48:6 Yevese, war nen, lu nen er anihu u tsaasaa ken desereti nahan." 
Jeremiah48:7 Gadia, er u suur sha ityom you kua sha inyaregh you, nahan we kpaa á hemba u; Kemoshi una za ken uikangen, a upristi nav man atiator a na imôngo." 
Jeremiah48:8 Ortimin una va ta sha hanma gar, ma gar una war ga; pev kpaa una vihi kera, man á tim ijiir i i lu shambe shambe la kera, er TER A kaa nahan." 
Jeremiah48:9 Na Moabi akper, a̱ purugh a̱ war; agar a na aa hingir atse, ma or nana tema keregh ga." 
Jeremiah48:10 Ifan i̱ kôr or u nan er tom u TER asema ahar la, man ifan i̱ kôr or u nan nyum sanker u nan awambe yô." 
Jeremiah48:11 Moabi tema kpe un iyol, hii iyev na je, a tsa a akase a na her, ma or gema un haa ken ityegh kigenegh ga, man shi a za ken uikangen kpaa ga; ka sha ci u nahan man mnyohom nam ma undu un ga, man ihuma na kpaa i gem kposo ga ye." 
Jeremiah48:12 Nahan yô, nenge, ayange nga van, kape TER A kaa ne, Me tindi un a mbahaan, vea haa un, vea undu un ityev nav gbilin; shi vea hembe ityev vev kera." 
Jeremiah48:13 Moabi una va ahenge sha ci u Kemoshi, er ya u Iserael lu va ahenge sha ci u Betel, u ve suur sha mi la nahan." 
Jeremiah48:14 Ka nyi man ne kaan ner: Se mba mbaageev man anomaior a utya? 
Jeremiah48:15 I tim Moabi kera, ve kôndo ve nyôr ken agar a na, man ikaior na i hemban cii la, sen sha u i̱ za wua ve, kape Tor A kaa ne, u i yer iti Na er TER u akum a Sha la." 
Jeremiah48:16 Mtim u Moabi mgbôghom u van, man kwagh u bo ngu van fefa u va tseren un," 
Jeremiah48:17 Ne mba ne kase un cii, zungwe nen un, kua ne cii mba ne fe iti na kpaa; kaa nen ner: Nenge, er i kever tôgh ku taver, gbough ku doon ashe la!" 
Jeremiah48:18 Hungwa sha iengem you la, we wankwase u u tem sha Dibon, tema hen inya i tseghe tseghe; gadia or u a tim Moabi la va ta num sha a we, a tim ayouautya ou a taver." 
Jeremiah48:19 Tile hen kpegbenda, jinge, we u u tem hen Aroer la, pine or u yevese man kwase u yevese waren la, kaa wer: Ka nyi i ere?" 
Jeremiah48:20 Kunya kôr Moabi, gadia i yôhôl un; ger nen mliam, gbire nen vaa, pase nen ken Arnon, er i tim Moabi kera yô." 
Jeremiah48:21 Ijirôron va sha tar u shambe shambe, sha Holon man sha Yasa man sha Mefaati," 
Jeremiah48:22 man sha Dibon man sha Nebo man sha Bete-dibela-taim," 
Jeremiah48:23 man sha Kiriataim man sha Bete-gamul man sha Bete-meon 
Jeremiah48:24 man sha Kerioti man sha Bosera, sha agar a ken tar u Moabi cii a lun ca man a lun ikua kpaa." 
Jeremiah48:25 I gber korough ku Moabi, uwegh nagh sombo, kape TER A kaa ne." 
Jeremiah48:26 Er un a̱ hunde, gadia tseen sha TER yum; Moabi una vingir sha isho na, una hingir kwagh u lahan kpaa." 
Jeremiah48:27 Shin yan Iserael lu u kwagh u lahan ga ase? I kohol un hen mbaiv, shin hanma shighe u ka wea teren un u jingir ityougho?" 
Jeremiah48:28 Undu nen agar, za tema nen ken barwo, ne mba ne tem ken Moabi la; lu nen er atii u a we ya na hen kpe u ijem vegher u keela nahan." 
Jeremiah48:29 Se ungwa gwa u iyolmoron i Moabi—tseen tsung je— icivir na man ityough ki kehen nagh man imanger na, man iyolgengese na." 
Jeremiah48:30 TER kaa er: Mo M fa ishima na i vihin, ngi ma kwagh ga; ihagh na i kaan i er ma kwagh ga." 
Jeremiah48:31 Nahan yô, me vaa Moabi, een, me vaa Moabi cii genger genger, me zungwe ior i Kir-hereshi." 
Jeremiah48:32 Me vaa je á hemba mvaa u Yaser la, we kon u wain u Shibema; agbaa a ou samber per zegemnger je, za ar sha zegemnger u Yaser, ortiminakaa va ta num sha atam a ou a inyom, kua sha mtende u atam a ou a ikon i wain." 
Jeremiah48:33 Nahan i kar a msaanyol man iember ken sule u dedoo u uyia kua ken tar u Moabi kera; man shi M na zar u wain, u bee hen ahungwa a shoghol atam a wain; or nana kera shoghol a a ayôôso zwa ga; ayôôso shon aa hingir er ka ma ayôôso ga yô." 
Jeremiah48:34 Sha mliam ma Heshebon la, ve genger imo je zan zan za ar sha Eleale man sha Yahashi, man hii ken Soar zan zan ar sha Horonaim man Egelati-shelishiya kpaa; gadia mngerem ma Nimerim kpaa maa uma maa ta ikembegh." 
Jeremiah48:35 Man shi Me na er or u nan ne nagh ku sôngon sha ijiir i taven kua u nan nanden mbaaôndo mba nan la nagh, nana kera lu ken Moabi ga yô, kape TER A kaa ne." 
Jeremiah48:36 Nahan yô, ishima yam ngi jandegh imo er ka alaketa nahan sha ci u Moabi, man ishima yam ngi jandegh imo er alaketa nahan sha ci ior mba Kir-hereshi; gadia inyaregh ki a zough a mi la saa ishe." 
Jeremiah48:37 Hanma ityough i torough ki; hanma indyer i hondo i kera; ave cii i gber a avav, hanma or ta ikondo uya." 
Jeremiah48:38 Sha ityembe i sha ityoriyoughough i Moabi cii, man sha igbenda na hingir ukwelegh cii; gadia M hembe Moabi er ka ityegh ki ki kera lu or a inja ga yô, kape TER A kaa ne." 
Jeremiah48:39 Nenge, er i hembe un! Mba vaan! Nenge, er Moabi a gem ijime a kunya iyol! Kape Moabi una hingir mba ve kase un cii kwagh u ilyahan man kwagh u cieryol la." 
Jeremiah48:40 Gadia TER ngu kaan nahan er: Nenge, una purugh er gafa nahan, una samber akper sha u tan num sha Moabi." 
Jeremiah48:41 I ngohol agar, i hembe ayouautya a taver; asema a mbaageev mba Moabi aa hingir er ishima i kwase u toghor mar nahan sha iyange shon la." 
Jeremiah48:42 Á tim Moabi kera una kera lu ikurior ga, gadia tseen sha TER yum." 
Jeremiah48:43 Mciem, man ihungwa kua to vea bur u, we u u tem ken Moabi, kape TER A kaa ne." 
Jeremiah48:44 Or u nan yevese mciem nana gba shin ihungwa, man or u nan due shin ihungwa yô, nana gba ken to, gadia Me va un, ka Moabi la, a inyom i mtsaha ve la, kape TER A kaa ne." 
Jeremiah48:45 Mba ve yevese la ve tile shin mure u Heshebon a agee iyol shio; gadia usu due ken Hesebon, man nomborusu kpaa ken atô u Shihon, u hia a-ase a Moabi man ihaghtyo i mbaerenayôôso." 
Jeremiah48:46 Kwagh á tser u, we Moabi! Ior mba Kemoshi saa ishe, gadia i yem a ônov ou mba nomso uikangen man ônov ou mba kasev kpaa hingir uikangen." 
Jeremiah48:47 Nahan kpaa, Me dugh Moabi ken uikangen kera sha ayange a masetyô, kape TER A kaa ne. Ka mkur u ijir i i ôr Moabi je ne." 
Jeremiah49:1 Sha kwagh u Mbaamon: TER ngu kaan nahan er: Iserael ngu a ônov je gaa? ngu a or u yan dyako na gaa? Ka nyi man Milkom a ye dyako u Gadi man ior nav kpaa ve tem ken agar a na? 
Jeremiah49:2 Nahan yô, nenge, ayange nga van, kape TER A kaa ne, a Me na á ungwa shishavaa u utya sha Raba u Mbaamon; una hingir atihialôgh, man agar a na a kiriki yô, á nande a sha usu; tsô Iserael una ya dyako u mbala mba ve ye un dyako la, kape TER A kaa ne." 
Jeremiah49:3 Vaa, we Heshebon, gadia i tim Ai kera; ngor nen mliam ônkasev mba Raba, ta nen akondo uya, zungwe nen, yevese nen hurugh hurugh, her atô u ugar mba ishulev; gadia á yem a Milkom uikangen a upristi nav man atiator a na imôngo." 
Jeremiah49:4 Ka sha ci u nyi man u te ihagh sha upev mba gbulumaa, pev wou u doon akaa laa? we wankwase u jighjigh ga ne, we u u suur sha inyaregh you, man u kaan wer: Ka an nana mough num a mo?" 
Jeremiah49:5 Nenge, Me haa u mciem iyol, kape TER A kaa ne, TER u akum a Sha, ú cia mba ve kase u la cii; á zenda ne, hanma or nana za sha ishigh ki nan jighilii, or u shi kohol mba ve yevese la nana̱ kera lu ga." 
Jeremiah49:6 Kpa ken masetyô shi Me dugh Mbaamon ken uikangen kera, kape TER A kaa ne." 
Jeremiah49:7 Sha kwagh u Edom: TER u akum a Sha ngu kaan nahan er: Kwaghfan kera ngu ken Teman je gaa? Mhen u mbakavenkwagh saa kera? Kwaghfan ve ndiiri? 
Jeremiah49:8 Yevese nen, hide nen ijime, tema nen ken ajiir a zan, ne mba ne tem ken Dedan, gadia Me va a mtim u Isou sha a na, sha shighe u Me va tsaha un la." 
Jeremiah49:9 Aluer mbasundan atam a wain vea va hen a we yô, vea kera shi ma kwagh her er á yar twar ga. Aluer mbaiv va tugh yô, vea vihi akaa kera, zan zan á kuma ve." 
Jeremiah49:10 Gadia Mo M sar Isou, M bugh ajiir a na a yeren, una kera fatyô u yeren iyol na ga; i tim vor na kua anmgbianev nav man mbawanndor a na; un kera ngu ga." 
Jeremiah49:11 Undu ancôgholov ou, Me kura ve ve̱ lu uma; kasev mba côgholov ou kpaa, ve̱ suur sha a Mo." 
Jeremiah49:12 Gadia TER ngu kaan nahan er: Nenge, ve mba i ver ve u man iyongo ga la kpaa, vea ma kpee je, man hire we ve, ú kera zua a mtsaha ga yee? Ú war mtsaha ga, ú ma keng." 
Jeremiah49:13 Gadia M bum iyol Yam, kape TER A kaa ne: Bosera una hingir kwagh u kpilighyol, kwagh u aheenegh, ijiir i gbilinigh man kwagh u ifan; agar a na cii aa hingir atse gbem sha won." 
Jeremiah49:14 M ungwa loho due hen TER, man i tindi ortyom hen akuraior, er: Kohol nen, va ta nen num sha a na, wa nen ago iyol sha u nôngon ityav." 
Jeremiah49:15 Gadia, nenge, M gema u, u hingir kwagh u kiriki ken akuraior, man kwagh u lahan hen ior." 
Jeremiah49:16 Mcieryol wou u u cier iyol man ihagh i tan i ishima you la, tsugh u, we u u tem ken ikwe i avande, we u u lu a agee sha ityough ki igungu; shin er u we iya you sha ijiir i taven sha er gafa nahan kpaa, ka sha her je Me hungwa a we shin inya ye, kape TER A kaa ne." 
Jeremiah49:17 Nahan Edom una hingir kwagh u kpilighyol; hanmaor cii u nana kar her a na yô, á kpiligh nan iyol, nana gbire iwer sha atsan a na cii." 
Jeremiah49:18 Er mtim u Sodom man Gomora man agar a a wa ndor a ve la nahan, kape TER A kaa ne, ma or nana kera tema heregh ga, man shi ma wan u or nana za shir ker kpaa ga." 
Jeremiah49:19 Nenge, nana kôndo er begha u a dugh hen gborikô u Yordan sha u za tan num sha ijiir i ilev mbi ye toho her gbem yô; gadia Me zenda ve heregh kera fese, man wen u i tsough un la, Me ver un sha i; gadia ka an nan lu er Mo? Man ka anti je nana verem iyange? Man ka an nan lu orkuranilev u nana tile sha ishigh Yagha?" 
Jeremiah49:20 Yô, ungwa nen mhen u TER u A hen sha Edom; man awashima Na u a we sha ior i Teman; mimi je, ônov mba kiriki mba ikumuile, á kôr ve á kpela á yem a mi; mimi je, á cier ijiir ve i teman la iyol a ve." 
Jeremiah49:21 Ihuran i mgbe ve la, na tar tenger; mliam hura ar hen zegemnger u Nyian." 
Jeremiah49:22 Nenge, nana kôndo nana purugh er gafa nahan nana samber akper a nan sha Bosera; man sha iyange la ishima i anomaior a Edom ia hingir er ishima i kwase u toghol mar nahan." 
Jeremiah49:23 Kwagh u Damaseku. Hamati va ahenge kua Arpadi kpaa, gadia ve ungwa gwa u bo, iyol kpe ve; ishima i zungwen ngi er zegemnger nahan, fatyô u lun ving ga." 
Jeremiah49:24 Damaseku hingir seelee, a gema ijime u yevese, ikarikase gbidye un iyol; ican man ishima i zungwen tser un tsung, er ka kwase u toghol mar nahan." 
Jeremiah49:25 Nenge, er gar u icivirigh ne a kera lu a or ga yô! ka gar u iember la." 
Jeremiah49:26 Nahan yô, ikaior na ia gba sha igbenda na, man mbautyav cii á er ve, vea huan ving sha iyange la, kape TER u akum a Sha A kaa ne." 
Jeremiah49:27 Me keer usu sha gilgar u Damaseku, ua hia ayouator a Benhada." 
Jeremiah49:28 Kwagh u Kedar man ityartor i Hasor, i Nebukadinesar tor u Babilon hemba i la. TER ngu kaan nahan er: Mough, za nen hen Kedar, za tim ior mba ve lu vegher u sha ityoughkitaregh la." 
Jeremiah49:29 Á kura utenti vev man akumauile a ve; á kura akondo a ve a tenti, man ikav vev cii man urakumi vev, á yem a mi; á ngor imo, á kaa a ve er: mcieryol kase tser!" 
Jeremiah49:30 Yevese yem nen ca, tema nen shin ajiir a zan, ne mba ne tem ken Hasor, kape TER A kaa ne; gadia Nebukadinesar tor u Babilon hen kwagh sha a ven, a wa kwaghbo ishima a ven." 
Jeremiah49:31 Mough, kôndo nen hen ikurior i i tem bem bem a ishima i nyian ga la, kape TER A kaa ne, i i lu a ihinda man uishindan kpaa ga, man i tem tseke u i la." 
Jeremiah49:32 Urakumi vev vea hingir ishar man akumauile a ve á kura a kera; Me sambe ve sha hanma ahumbe, ve mba ve hondo a-ase kera la; Me va ve a kwaghbo sha hanma vegher cii, kape TER A kaa ne." 
Jeremiah49:33 Hasor una hingir ijiir i teman i ugbaseela, ia lu ice gbem sha won, ma or nana kera tema ker ga, man shi ma wan u or nana za shir ker ga." 
Jeremiah49:34 Kwaghôron u TER u a va hen profeti Yeremia sha kwagh u Elam, sha hiihii u Sedekia hii teman tor ken Yuda la, A kaa er:" 
Jeremiah49:35 TER akum a Sha ngu kaan nahan er: Nenge, Me sombo ada u Elam, ka agee ve a hemban je la." 
Jeremiah49:36 Me va a ahumbe a anyiin a a dugh sha azongo a anyiin a Sha sha Elam, Me sambe ve sha ahumbe la cii; mba i zende ve ken Elam la, ma ikurior i vea za ker ga yô, ia lu ga." 
Jeremiah49:37 Me er Elam una cia mbaihomov nav man mba ve keren uma na a ku; Me va a kwaghbo sha a ve, ka iyugh Yam i yeghen je la, kape TER A kaa ne; man shi Me na sanker una dondo ve ijime, zan zan Me tim ve kera;" 
Jeremiah49:38 Me ver ikônough Yagh ki torough ken Elam, Me tim tor kua atiator ker kera, kape TER A kaa ne." 
Jeremiah49:39 Kpa sha ayange a masetyô yô, Me dugh Elam ken uikangen kera, kape TER A kaa ne." 
Jeremiah50:1 Ka kwaghôron u TER A er sha kwagh u Babilon, sha kwagh u tar u Mbakaldi u sha ikev i profeti Yeremia ne:" 
Jeremiah50:2 Pase nen akuraior, yôô nen, tim tuta, yôô nen, de kera yeren nen ga, kaa nen, ner: I ngohol Babilon, Bel va ahenge, kwagh hemba Merodaki; ieev nav va ahenge, kwagh hemba akombo a na." 
Jeremiah50:3 Gadia ikurior igen due hen imbusutarimese ngi van num sha a na, ia gema tar na ua hingir ice, ma or nana kera tema ker ga; or kua zendenya kpaa yevese yem." 
Jeremiah50:4 Sha ayange la man sha shighe la, kape TER A kaa ne, Mbaiserael vea va, ve kua Mbayuda, vea kôr gbenda vea lu vaan hiden, keren TER, Aôndo ve, kpaa." 
Jeremiah50:5 Vea pine kwagh u Shion, vea ver ishigh her a na, vea kaa er: Va, sé zua nen a TER sha ikuryan i tsôron i ia hungul mayange ga yô." 
Jeremiah50:6 Ior Av, iyange ve lu er iyôngo i i ndiir yô; mbakuran mba i tsume a i, ve yem a i sha iwo; i zende wue wue sha iwo man agungu, ijiir i tsan i i hungul i." 
Jeremiah50:7 Mba ve kohol ve cii ve ya ve; mbaahendanev vev kaa er: Se mba a ibo ga, sha ci u ve er TER, ijiir i teman i perapera la, isholibo, ka TER u A lu ishimaverenkeghen i uter vev la." 
Jeremiah50:8 Yevese, due nen ken atô u Babilon kera, due nen ken tar u Mbakaldi, lu nen er ukpev mba ve hemen akumauile nahan!" 
Jeremiah50:9 Gadia nenge, Me tor ikpelaior i akuraior a vesen ityô, a ken imbusutarimese la, Me er, á va ta num sha Babilon, aa tange ityav sha a ve, ka sha her je man á hemba un ye; avaan a ve aa lu er avaan a orutya u fan ivaan nahan u nana hidi ave gbilin ga yô." 
Jeremiah50:10 Kaldi una hingir ishar; mba ve sar un la cii vea ide, kape TER A kaa ne." 
Jeremiah50:11 Shin er ne lu sar sar, shin er ne ember, ne mba ne ye ishar sha dyako Wam, shin er ne lu yagh yagh er tulebua u a shoghol iyiav yô, man ne lu ngoron er anomanyinya nahan," 
Jeremiah50:12 ngô wen una va ahenge tsung, un u a mar ne la una hee; nenge, ken akuraior cii, una hingir u gban ijime cii, taaikôngo man tar u tseghe tseghe man desereti." 
Jeremiah50:13 Sha ci u ishima i vihin i TER ma or nana kera tema ker ga, kpa ua hingir ice cii; hanma or u nana kar hen Babilon yô, á kpiligh nan iyol, nana gbire iwer sha atsan a na cii." 
Jeremiah50:14 Tange nen ityav sha Babilon tser nen, ne mba ne hende mbaada cii; ker nen un, de tangen nen avaan ga; gadia a er TER isholibo." 
Jeremiah50:15 Ger nen akenge i̱ ningir i̱ tser cii; a na hum ve; mtuunum nam gba, ugir nav kpaa yôhôl, gadia ka iyevoron i TER je ne; or nen un iyev, er a er nahan, shi er di nen a na nahan vough." 
Jeremiah50:16 Tim ortanivor u ken Babilon kera kua un u a eren tom sha loji sha shighe u sundan la kpaa; sha ci u mvihi u sanker, hanma or nana hide hen ior mba nan man hanma or nana yevese nana yem hen tar u nan." 
Jeremiah50:17 Iserael ka iyôngo i i num i kera yô, ubegha zenda i; hiihii tor u Ashiria ya un, ken masetyô Nebukadinesar tor u Babilon mase hemben akuhe a na." 
Jeremiah50:18 Nahan yô, TER u akum a Sha, Aôndo u Iserael, ngu kaan nahan er: Nenge, Me tsaha tor u Babilon kua tar na, er M vande tsahan tor u Ashiria nahan." 
Jeremiah50:19 Man shi Me hide a Iserael hen ijiir na i yan toho, una yaan toho sha Karmel man Bashan, una ya kwagh sha agungu a Eferaim man ken Gileadi kpaa je una ide." 
Jeremiah50:20 Sha ayange la man sha shighe la, kape TER A kaa ne, á ker iferkwagh i Iserael, kpa ia kera lu ga; man asorabo a Yuda kpaa á zua a mi ga; gadia me de asande a Me shi a her la, kwaghbo ve." 
Jeremiah50:21 Kôndo sha tar u Merataim, ta num sha u je, kua sha mba ve tem ken Pekodi kpaa, wua ve, tim kera purututu ken ijime ve, kape TER A kaa ne, man er nen er M kaa ne nahan cii." 
Jeremiah50:22 Ayôôso a utya nga ken tar man mtim u vesen! 
Jeremiah50:23 Nenge, er i tende man i hembe msabe u tar cii yô! Nenge, Babilon hingir kwagh u cieryol ken akuraior!" 
Jeremiah50:24 M hôn u to, u gba ker je, we Babilon, kpa u fa ga; i tser a we man i kôr u kpaa, sha ci u u nenge num a TER yô." 
Jeremiah50:25 TER bugh ijiir i koson ikav mbi utyav Nav, man A due a ikav mbi utyav mbi iyugh Na; gadia Ter, TER u akum a Sha ngu a tom u eren ken tar u Mbakaldi." 
Jeremiah50:26 Va, va ta num sha a na, va ken hanma ian cii, bugh iuna na, kohol un, ta atihi atihi er iyiav nahan, tim un kera purututu, ma kwagh na a̱ de shin her ga." 
Jeremiah50:27 Wua agumabua na cii; i̱ sen a mi sha u za sôngon. Kwagh tser ve! gadia iyange ve i va ve, ka shighe u mtsaha ve je ne." 
Jeremiah50:28 Ungwa! Imo i mba ve yevese ken tar u Babilon ve war la, sha u za pasen ken Shion iyevoron i TER Aôndo wase, iyevoron i tempel Na." 
Jeremiah50:29 Yila mbakerenavaan, ve̱ kohol imôngo, ve̱ ta num sha Babilon, mba ve hende mbaada cii; haa nen afo kase nen un tser; ma or u keregh nana̱ de waren ga; or un iyev sha ieren na; er a er nahan, shi er di nen a na nahan vough; gadia a cihi TER, Icighan u Iserael." 
Jeremiah50:30 Nahan ikaior na ia gba sha igbenda na, man mbautyav nav cii á er ve vea huan ving sha iyange la, kape TER A kaa ne." 
Jeremiah50:31 Nenge, M ngu ihom a we, we u u moron iyol ne, kape Ter, TER u akum a Sha A kaa ne; gadia iyange you i va ve, ka shighe u Me tsaha u je ne." 
Jeremiah50:32 U moron iyol la, una nôngo gbev, una gba ma or u moughon a na sha nana lu ga; Me keer usu ken agar a na a vesen, ua hia hanma kwagh u a kase un cii." 
Jeremiah50:33 TER u akum a Sha ngu kaan nahan er: I kighir Mbaiserael kua Mbayuda imôngo; man mba ve kura ve ve yem a ve uikangen la cii, ve kôr ve gbang gbang, ve venda u nan ve gbenda." 
Jeremiah50:34 Orpaan ve ngu a agee, TER u akum a Sha, ka iti Na je la; Una ta ikaa ken a ve doo doo, sha u Una na tar mmem yô, kpa ior i ken Babilon yô, Una tumbul a ve." 
Jeremiah50:35 Sanker a̱ va sha Mbakaldi, kape TER A kaa ne, man sha ior i ken Babilon, man sha atiator a na kua sha mbafankwagh nav kpaa!" 
Jeremiah50:36 Sanker a̱ va sha mba ve hagher sha kwaghôron, ve̱ hingir abumeaior, sanker a̱ va sha anomaior a na, mciem ma̱ haa ve iyol." 
Jeremiah50:37 Sanker a̱ va sha anyinya a ve, man sha akeke a ve a utya, man sha ior anza kposo kposo mba ve lu ker a na kpaa, ve̱ hingir er kasev nahan; sanker a̱ va sha inyaregh vegh, i̱ kura ki kera." 
Jeremiah50:38 Icegh ki̱ va sha mngerem nam, ma uma kera; gadia ka tar u ieev je, akombo a ve la er ve, ve nyôr ihundu." 
Jeremiah50:39 Nahan yô, inyamtoho i ken desereti a ugbaseela vea tsaan ker, ukonkofi kpaa vea luun ker; ma or nana kera tema ker sha won je ga; man shi á kera tema her ga zan zan sha ikov ikov cii." 
Jeremiah50:40 Er Aôndo yôhôl Sodom man Gomora man agar a a wa ndor a ve nahan, kape TER A kaa ne, kape ma or nana kera tema ker ga, man shi ma wan u or nana kera za shir ker kpaa ga." 
Jeremiah50:41 Nenge, ior due hen imbusutarimese, mba van; ikurior i vesen man utor kpishi mba moughon sha akighir a tar je." 
Jeremiah50:42 Ve kôr ada uwe man iwange, ka mbavihin kwagh tsung je, mba a mhôônom ma zungwen ga; ikenge ve ngi er kumetan u zegemnger nahan, ka mbahendan anyinya kpaa; ve wa ago iyol er or u nan kange iyol i utya nahan, sha u nôngon ityav a we, we wankwase u Babilon." 
Jeremiah50:43 Tor u Babilon ungwa ve, ave na maa shir livaa; ican tser un man mnyoonom kôr un er kwase u toghor mar nahan." 
Jeremiah50:44 Nenge, nana kôndo er begha u a dugh ken gborikô u Yordan nahan, nana va ta num sha ijiir i ilev mbi ye toho her gbem yô, gadia Me na, vea yevese heregh kera fese; man wen u i tsough un la, Me ver un sha i; gadia ka an nan lu er Mo? Man ka anti je nana verem iyange? Man ka an nana lu orkuranilev u nana tile sha ishigh Yagha?" 
Jeremiah50:45 Yô, ungwa nen mhen u TER u A hen sha Babilon, man awashima Na u A we sha tar u Mbakaldi la; mimi je, ônov mba kiriki mba ikumuile, á kôr ve á kpela ve á yem a mi; mimi je nana er, á cier ijiir ve i teman la iyol a ve." 
Jeremiah50:46 Myee u i yôô er: I hemba Babilon kera la, na tar tenger, mliam hura ken akuraior." 
Jeremiah51:1 TER ngu kaan nahan er: Nenge, Me kpoghol jijingi u ortimin akaa kera la, a̱ va ta sha Babilon man sha ior mba asema a ve a hendan a Mo la." 
Jeremiah51:2 Me tindi Babilon a mbayegher, vea yegher un, vea er tar na ua hingir gbilin; gadia vea kase un a num vea tser, sha iyange i ican la." 
Jeremiah51:3 Orivaan nana henda ada u nan sha or u hendan ada kua sha or u nan til sha a rigautya u nan iyol la; de tsegh nen ikaior ve ga; tim nen akumautya na kera cii purututu. 
Jeremiah51:4 A haa ve inya kpenegh sha utya, ken tar u Mbakaldi, a avav iyol sha igbenda i u." 
Jeremiah51:5 Gadia Aôndo, TER u akum a Sha ta Iserael man Yuda kera ga, shin er tar ve u mgbough a ibo hen Icighan u Iserael nahan kpaa." 
Jeremiah51:6 Yevese, due ken atô u Babilon kera, hanma or nana̱ yima uma u nan; i̱ de kera timin ne kera sha ifer na ga; gadia ka shighe u iyevoron i TER je ne, ngu kimbin un sha ieren na." 
Jeremiah51:7 Babilon vande lun iyongo i zenaria sha uwegh ku TER, i i na tar cii u hunde la; akuraior ma wain na, nahan akuraior hunde." 
Jeremiah51:8 Babilon gba fese, tim je; gbidye nen un ivaa; za nen un a icigh sha ci u mnyoonom nam, alaghga una war." 
Jeremiah51:9 Ma se wanger Babilon, kpa a wanger ga; sé undu nen un, sé yem nen hanma or hen tar u nan; gadia ijirôron na ar Sha je, i kôndo a i sha zan zan za ar sha kwavaôndo je." 
Jeremiah51:10 TER due a perapera wase ken igbar; va, sé za pase nen tom u TER, Aôndo wase, ken Shion." 
Jeremiah51:11 Hor nen avaan, kôr nen iperutya ave! TER tor jijingi u utor mba Media ityô gadia awashima Na sha kwagh u Babilon yô, ka u timin un kera, gadia ka iyevoron i TER je la, iyevoron i tempel Na." 
Jeremiah51:12 Tim nen tuta sha u nôngon ityav a ugir mba Babilon, seer taver nen ajiir a kuran, ver nen mbakuran, sôr nen ajiir a yeren her; gadia TER wa ishima man A kure kwagh u A ôr sha ior i Babilon kpaa." 
Jeremiah51:13 We, u u tem hen mngerem ma kpishim, man inyaregh ki ngeen we ne, mkur wou va ve, mtsera wou sha gbenda u bo la iv ve." 
Jeremiah51:14 TER u akum a Sha A bum iyol Na er: Mimi je, Me iv u a ikpelaior er ikomon nahan; vea ger u akenge a mhembe." 
Jeremiah51:15 Ka un A gbe tar sha tahav Nav man A ver tar sha won cii sha kwaghfan Na, man A samber Usha sha mkav Na ye:" 
Jeremiah51:16 ka Una ôr kwagh yô, mngerem hura sha Usha, ka A er tulugh a due ken akighir a tar a kôndo sha; A er inyiar sha ci u ura, man A due a ahumbe ken ayou a Na a koson akaa ker." 
Jeremiah51:17 Hanma or nan hingir orlanenkwagh nan ban a mfe; hanma or u nan eren tom sha zenaria nan va ahenge sha ieev mbi nan mbi gban a gba la; gadia ieev mbi nan mbi keren a ker mbila, ka kwagh u icughugh je, ma iôôn ngi ken mbi ga." 
Jeremiah51:18 Mbi gbilin tsô, ka tom u icughugh; sha shighe u mtsaha u mbi yô, mbia saa ishe." 
Jeremiah51:19 Kpa kwar u Yakob ngu er mbi nahan ga, gadia un ka or maan akaa cii, man Iserael kpaa ka nongo u u lu dyako Na je yô; TER u akum a Sha ka iti Na je la." 
Jeremiah51:20 We, u ngum msabe man ikav Yav mbi utyav; ka sha a we man M hemben akuraior avur avur ye; ka sha a we man M timin ityartor kera ye;" 
Jeremiah51:21 ka sha a we M hemben nyinya man orhendan un avur avur ye; ka sha a we M hemben kyekyeutya man u nan undu sha min la avur avur ye; 
Jeremiah51:22 ka sha a we M hemben nomsoor kua kwase avur avur ye; ka sha a we M hemben tamenor man wanye avur avur ye; ka sha a we M hemben wanyekwaor man iniunkwase avur avur ye; 
Jeremiah51:23 ka sha a we M hemben orkuranilev man ikumuile i nan avur avur ye; ka sha a we M hemben orsule man abua a nan a kpelan ikyekye la avur avur ye; man shi ka sha a we kpaa M hemben ugomna man mbatarev avur avur ye. 
Jeremiah51:24 Me or Babilon iyev kua ior i Kaldi cii, sha ifer ve cii, i ve er ken Shion sha ishigh yenegh yô, kape TER A kaa ne." 
Jeremiah51:25 Nenge, M ngu ihom a we, we uwo u timin akaa kera ne, kape TER A kaa ne, we u u timin tar cii kera ne; Me naregh uwegh sha a we, Me menger we sha avande kera, Me gema u ú hingir uwo u hian;" 
Jeremiah51:26 á kera bugh ma iwen her a we sha ci u wan sha zongo shin sha ci u wan imagh a mi kpaa ga, kpa ú hingir ice gbem sha won, kape TER A kaa ne." 
Jeremiah51:27 Tim nen tuta sha tar, tôngo nen ikpamkor ken akuraior, ver akuraior, tsegha a sha u tan num sha a na, yila ityartor i Ararati man Mini man Asekenashi sha u tan num sha a na; ver kurutya sha u nôngon ityav a na, na anyinya a̱ kôndo er ikomon nahan." 
Jeremiah51:28 Ver akuraior, tsegha a sha u tan num sha a na, utor mba Media, ugomna man mbatarev nav cii, man tar u a ye tor sha mi cii." 
Jeremiah51:29 Nahan tar ngu tenger, ngu zômon iyol sha mnyoon; gadia awashima u TER sha Babilon la ngu her taveraa sha u geman tar u Babilon u̱ hingir ice, ma or nana kera tema ker ga." 
Jeremiah51:30 Mbautyav mba Babilon de u nôngon ityav, ve gba teman ken ayou a ve a utya tsô; agee ve saa; ve hingir er kasev nahan; i nande ajiir a na a teman sha usu; i kever uishindan nav kera." 
Jeremiah51:31 Oryevese yevese za zua a ugen, man orkaanloho ugen kpaa za kohol ugen, sha u za pasen tor u Babilon er i ngohol gar na hanma vegher yô;" 
Jeremiah51:32 ahongo kpaa i ngohol a, i nande azande sha usu, cier mbautyav iyol." 
Jeremiah51:33 Gadia TER u akum a Sha, Aôndo u Iserael ngu kaan nahan er: Wankwase u Babilon ngu er ka ijiir i gbiren iyiav sha shighe u i kindigh i la nahan; ica ia gba ga tsô shighe u á sunda un una kuma." 
Jeremiah51:34 Nebukadinesar tor u Babilon, yam, a vihim kera, a verem inya er ikagh ki lun gbilin nahan, a menam er zegeiyô nahan, a iv iyav nav a akaa nyohon am; a gbihim kera." 
Jeremiah51:35 Kwagh u iperagh u i erem man u i er iyol yam la kpaa a̱ hide sha Babilon! Or u teman ken Shion a̱ kaa nahan; awambe am a̱ hire sha ityough ki mba ve tem ken Kaldi la! Yerusalem kpaa a̱ kaa nahan. 
Jeremiah51:36 Nahan yô, TER ngu kaan nahan er: Nenge, Me ta ikaa a we, man Me or iyev sha ci wou; Me uma zegemnger na, man Me na imbormnger na kpaa ia uma." 
Jeremiah51:37 Babilon una hingir atihialôgh, ijiir i teman i ugbaseela, kwaghcieryol man kwagh u gbiren iwer a min, ma or una kera tema her ga." 
Jeremiah51:38 Vea ta kume imôngo er agumabegha nahan; man vea kpela iker er ônov mba begha mba kiriki nahan. 
Jeremiah51:39 Zum u isharen ve ia yegh yô, Me er ve iniongo, man Me er, vea hunde; sha er ve̱ hume ve̱ gba mnyam, ve̱ yav gbem sha won, ve̱ de kera nderen ga yô, kape TER A kaa ne." 
Jeremiah51:40 Me sen a ve er ka agumaiyôngo hen ijiir i sôngon yô, man er anomaiyôngo man ukpev nahan." 
Jeremiah51:41 Nenge, i hemba Sheshaki, man i ngohol icivir i tar cii kera. Nenge, er Babilon a hingir kwagh u cieryol hen akuraior!" 
Jeremiah51:42 Zegemnger va ar sha Babilon; i cir un sha agôndoamnger. 
Jeremiah51:43 Agar a na a vesen hingir atse, tar u ombor man desereti, tar u ma or nana tema ker ga, man shi u wan u or nan kar her ga yô." 
Jeremiah51:44 Me tsaha Bel ken Babilon, Me dugh kwagh u a men ken zwa na la; akuraior kpaa aa kera za her a na lugh lugh ga; gilgar u Babilon kpaa gba." 
Jeremiah51:45 Ior Av, due nen ken atô na kera, hanma or nana̱ yima uma u nan sha ishima i vihin i tsung i TER la." 
Jeremiah51:46 Ishima i̱ de yen ne ga, man shi de cie nen gwa u á va ungwa hen tar la ga, gadia gwa ua va ken inyom i môm, man shi inyom igen kpaa shi ua va; aeren a aperagh aa lu sha tar, ortaregh una mough num a ortaregh." 
Jeremiah51:47 Nahan nenge, ayange nga van a Me tsaha ieev mbi Babilon mbi gban a gba, tar na cii ua va ahenge, man ior nav mba i woo ve cii, vea gba ker atô na." 
Jeremiah51:48 Nahan Sha man tar man akaa a a lu kimi cii, vea wa atsam, á ember mgbe u Babilon gba la; gadia mbatimin vea due hen imbusutarimese vea va her a na, kape TER A kaa ne." 
Jeremiah51:49 Babilon una gba sha ci u mba i woo ve ken Iserael la, di er ior mba i woo ve sha won la, ve gbe inya sha ikev i Babilon nahan." 
Jeremiah51:50 Ne mba ne wer sanker, yem nen, de til nen ga; umbur nen TER ken ica, man Yerusalem a̱ lu ne ken ishima." 
Jeremiah51:51 Se va ahenge, gadia se ungwa tarnahan; kunya cir se ishigh cii, gadia ior mba ken nongo ugen va nyôr ken ajiir a tseghan a iyou i TER." 
Jeremiah51:52 Nahan yô, nenge, ayange nga van, kape TER A kaa ne, a Me tsaha ieev nav mbi gban a gba la; man ken tar na cii, mba i gber ve avav vea kine." 
Jeremiah51:53 Shin er Babilon una kôndo Sha, shin er una taver ayouautya na sha ijiir i taven, nahan kpaa mbatimin akaa kera vea due her a Mo vea ar her a na, kape TER A kaa ne." 
Jeremiah51:54 Ungwa! Mliam ma ken Babilon, man mvihi u vesen u ken tar u Mbakaldi la!" 
Jeremiah51:55 Gadia TER ngu timin Babilon kera, man ngu yangen ayôôso a vesen a ken a na la; agôndoamnger a ve, nga tan kume er mngerem ma kpishim nahan, ihuran i akenge a ve kende Sha;"
