Jeremiah51:56 gadia ortimin va ta sha a na, ka sha Babilon je la, i kôr mbautyav nav, i sombo mbaada vev avur avur kpaa; gadia TER ka Aôndo u oron iyev je, Una or iyev kpee je." 
Jeremiah51:57 Me na atiator a na á hunde kua mbafankwagh nav, man ugomna nav, man mbahemenev nav, man mbautyav nav kpaa; vea gba mnyam vea saa yaven gbem sha won, vea nder ga, kape Tor A kaa ne, TER u akum a Sha ka iti Na je la." 
Jeremiah51:58 TER u akum a Sha ngu kaan nahan er: Á yohôr gilgar u Babilon u civir la purututu, á nande ugôgômbaihindav nav sha usu; nahan ior er tom gbilin, akuraior kpaa er ayol a ve ican gbilin, ka sha ci u usu tsô." 
Jeremiah51:59 Ka kwaghôron u profeti Yeremia kaa Seraia wan u Neria, wan u Mahaseya je ne, zum u a yem ken Babilon a Sedekia tor u Yuda imôngo ken inyom i sha unyiin i a ya tor la. Seraia lu orvesen u mbakuran ya u tor je." 
Jeremiah51:60 Yeremia nger akaa a bo a á va tser Babilon la cii ken ruamabera, ka akaaôron angan cii a i nger a sha Babilon ne." 
Jeremiah51:61 Yeremia shi kaa a Seraia er: Zum u ú za ar sha Babilon yô, ver ishima u ôron akaa ne cii," 
Jeremiah51:62 kaa wer: We TER, ka We U ôr kwagh sha ijiir ne Wer, Ú sar i kera er ma or nana kera tema ken i ga yô, shin or, shin zendenya kpaa ga, kpa i̱ hingir ice gbem sha won." 
Jeremiah51:63 Tsô, zum u ú bee u ôron ruamabera ne yô, kange un iwen man gbihi un ker atô u Uferati;" 
Jeremiah51:64 shi kaa wer: Kape Babilon una mire ne, mayange una kera due sha ga, sha ci u kwagh u bo u Me va a mi sha a na la. Ka mkur u akaaôron a Yeremia je ne." 
Jeremiah52:1 Sedekia lu anyom ikundu kar môm zum u a ya tor la; a tema tor ken Yerusalem anyom pue kar môm; iti i ngô na er Hamutal, wan u Yeremia u ken Libena." 
Jeremiah52:2 A er ifer sha ishigh ki TER sha inja i Yehoyakim lu er la cii. 
Jeremiah52:3 Ka sha ishima i vihin i TER akaa ne er ken Yerusalem man Yuda, zan zan A ta ve sha ishigh Nagh kera ye. Sedekia gema hendan a tor u Babilon." 
Jeremiah52:4 Tsô, sha inyom i sha utaankarunyiin i a ya tor la, uwer u sha pue, ayange a u di kpaa pue la, Nebukadinesar tor u Babilon za va, a mbautyav nav cii, er una nôngo ityav a Yerusalem; ve haa afo, shi ve maa ayou a taver, ve kase un." 
Jeremiah52:5 Nahan i kase gar la zan zan ar sha inyom i sha pue kar môm i tor Sedekia la. 
Jeremiah52:6 Sha uwer u sha unyiin, ayange a u ataankaranyiin la, ijen gba kpishi ken gar, nahan ior mba ken tar la kera zua a kwaghyan ga." 
Jeremiah52:7 Tsô i pev gilgar, mbautyav cii yevese, ve due ken gar tugh hen hunda u u lu hen haregh u ukpekpe uhar, mba ve lu hen sule u tor la—Mbakaldi gema kase gar, tser—ve yem gbenda u u ver ishigh hen Araba la." 
Jeremiah52:8 Kpa mbautyav mba Mbakaldi zenda tor ityô, ve za kohol Sedekia hen kpuun kpuun u Yeriko; mbautyav nav cii sambe undu un." 
Jeremiah52:9 Nahan ve kôr tor, ve yem a na hen tor u Babilon hen Ribela ken tar u Hamati; a ôr un ijir." 
Jeremiah52:10 Tor u Babilon wua ônov mba Sedekia mba nomso sha ashe na; man mbatarev mba Yuda cii kpaa, a wua ve ken Ribela." 
Jeremiah52:11 A ongor Sedekia ashe, a kange un sha mshir tor u Babilon maa yem a na sha Babilon, a za wa un ken gaadi zan zan a kar kpen." 
Jeremiah52:12 Tsô sha uwer u sha utaan, ayange a u pue la, ka inyom i sha pue kar utaankarunyiin i tor Nebukadinesar, tor u Babilon je la. Nebusaradan, orhemen u mbakurantor, u a til sha ishigh ki tor u Babilon la, za va ken Yerusalem;" 
Jeremiah52:13 a nande iyou i TER, man iyou i tor man ayou a ken Yerusalem cii, hanma iyou i vesen, a nande i sha usu." 
Jeremiah52:14 Mbautyav mba Mbakaldi cii mba ve lu a orhemen u mbakurantor la, ve hembe ugir mba Yerusalem cii, ve ningir ve tser." 
Jeremiah52:15 Mbagenev ken mbaatsanev man ior mba ve shi ken gar, man mba ve na ayol a ve sha ikev i tor u Babilon, man asande a ikpelaior a a shi her la, Nebusaradan orhemen u mbakurantor kura ve cii, yem a ve uikangen." 
Jeremiah52:16 Mbaatsanev mbagenev mba ken tar la yô, Nebusaradan orhemen u mbakurantor undu ve er ve̱ lu mbanengen sha ishule i wain man i uyia." 
Jeremiah52:17 Mtôm ma togulam ma ma lu ken iyou i TER, man asange a pendan utasa sha mi kua zegetasa u togula mba ve lu ken iyou i TER la, Mbakaldi hembe ve avur avur, kura utogula yem a mi ken Babilon." 
Jeremiah52:18 Ityev kpaa, man ushebul man akambe a sôron amenger a mi man utasa man mbaahwa man ikav mbi togula mbi i eren tom a mi la, ve kura ve yem a mi." 
Jeremiah52:19 Ayongo man agbande a usu man utasa man ityev man udaarmbaamengerev man mbaahwa man agbande; akaa a i er a sha zenaria man a i er a sha azurfa kpaa, orhemen u mbakurantor kura, yem a mi." 
Jeremiah52:20 Mtôm mhar man zegetasa môm, man abua pur kar ahar a togula a a lu shin ityô i tasa la, man asange a pendan utasa sha mi a tor Solomon er sha ci u iyou i TER, togula u i er ikav mbin a mi cii myohom nam gande u karen." 
Jeremiah52:21 Sha kwagh u mtô la yô, ityaven ki ityôgh ki mômough lu aseva pue kar anigheni, indi na lu aseva pue kar ahar, icivir na lu ahôaveegh anyiin; ki lu a ho kimi." 
Jeremiah52:22 I ta indyuruku u togula sha ki; ityaven i indyuruku u môm lu aseva ataan; man kper kua upomegraneti lu sha indyuruku vegher u sha ningir tser, ve cii lu sha togula; ityôgh ki sha uhar la kpaa lu di nahan a upomegraneti." 
Jeremiah52:23 Upomegraneti lu akunduanyiingber kar ataratar sha akpe; kohol upomegraneti cii lu deri sha kper la ningir tser. 
Jeremiah52:24 Orhemen u mbakurantor la kôr pristi u vesen Seraia man Sefania pristi u dondon sha a na la, man mbakuranhunda, ior itiar," 
Jeremiah52:25 man shi ken gar, a kôr orhemen u i wa un mbautyav sha ikev yô, a ior itiankarihiar mba lun a tor, mba i zua a ve ken gar yô, man orngeren u kurutya u a kohol ior mba ken inya la sha ci u utya yô, man ior akunduatar mba ken inya mba i zua a ve ken atô u gar yô." 
Jeremiah52:26 Nebusaradan orhemen u mbakurantor kôr ve, va a ve hen tor u Babilon hen Ribela." 
Jeremiah52:27 Nahan tor u Babilon wua ve hen Ribela ken tar u Hamati. Kape i kura Yuda ken tar ve kera i yem a ve uikangen la. 
Jeremiah52:28 Ka ior mba Nebukadinesar yem a ve uikangen ne: Sha inyom i sha utaankaruhar la, Mbayuda dubu utar man ikundu ka utar;" 
Jeremiah52:29 sha inyom i sha pue kar anigheni i Nebukadinesar la, a kura ior deri anigheni man ikundugber kar uhar ken Yerusalem, a yem a mi uikangen;" 
Jeremiah52:30 sha inyom i sha ikundu kar utar i Nebukadinesar la, Nebusaradan orhemen u mbakurantor kura Mbayuda deri utaankaruhar man akunduahar ka utaan, yem a ve uikangen; kohol ior cii ve lu dubu unyiin man deri ataratar." 
Jeremiah52:31 Tsô sha inyom i sha ikundugber kar utaankaruhar i Yehoyakin, tor u Yuda, lu ken kwar la, uwer u sha pue kar uhar, ayange a u ikundu kar ataan la, Evil-merodaki tor u Babilon, sha inyom i a ya tor la, a kende a Yehoyakin tor u Yuda sha, a dugh un ken gaadi kera;" 
Jeremiah52:32 a ôr kwagh a na dedoo, a kende ikônough nagh ki torough sha hemba mkônom ma utor mba ve lu a na ken Babilon la." 
Jeremiah52:33 A er un akondo a ken gaadi kera, a haa un agen, man a gema yan kwagh a na imôngo, sha ayange a uma na cii." 
Jeremiah52:34 Sha kwagh u gbayol na kpaa, tor u Babilon lu nan un kwar na gbem, hanma iyange a lu zuan a kwar na sha ayange a uma na cii zan zan ku na." 
Lamentations1:1 Uwu! Nenge, gar a gbe teman gbilin, ma or kera ngu ker ga; gar u yan mgbough a ior ne; a hingir er kwasecôghol nahan, un u a lu kwagh u vesen ken akuraior! Un u a lu wan u tor u kwase ken uipaven mba taregh la, a hingir u tan kpandegh!" 
Lamentations1:2 Ngu vaan mliam tsung tugh, mliam nam ndôôr un sha ahenge; mba a doo ve ishima mbala cii, mo ve u surun un ishima ngu ga; akar a na cii tsugh un, ve hingir mbaihomov nav." 
Lamentations1:3 I kura Yuda ken tar na kera sha ci u atsan, man sha ci u tom u kpan u tsung; a tema ken akuraior, a zua a mmem ga; mbazendan un mbala za kohol un ken ajiir a hogholoo." 
Lamentations1:4 Igbenda i zan hen Shion ngi zungwen, sha ci u ma or kera ngu van hen iniongo i i ver la ga yô; ihindagar na cii hingir kuree; upristi nav mba shirin ishima; ishima vihi anuunaukase a na; un iyol na kpaa, ican ngi eren un tsung." 
Lamentations1:5 Mbaahendanev nav hingir mba sha hemen, mbaihomov nav tema a mkpeyol; gadia TER er un ican sha ci u mngee u afer a na; i yem a mbayev nav uikangen sha ishigh ki orhendan." 
Lamentations1:6 Icivir i wankwase u Shion cii i undu un; atiator a na cii hingir er ishôso i i zough a ijiir i yan toho ga yô, ve yevese a agee iyol shio sha ishigh ki ortôvon ve hwange." 
Lamentations1:7 Sha ayange a atsan a na man ijende na i wue wue la Yerusalem umbur akaa a na a dedoo a a lu a mi sha ayange a tsuaa la; zum u ior nav gba sha ikev i orhendan, man ma or u wasen un lu ga la, mbaahendanev kenger un, ve nahan un tar sha mkur na u vihin la." 
Lamentations1:8 Yerusalem er isholibo tsung je; nahan a hingir er kwagh u ndôhôrshima nahan; mba ve civir un ngise la, mba lahan un, sha ci u ve nenge idyelegh na; een, un iyol na kpaa ngu shirin ishima geman ishigh kera." 
Lamentations1:9 Ihôngor na var un sha akondo; a umbur mkur na ga; nahan yô, mgbe na kpiligh iyol je; ngu a ma or u surun un ishima ga; TERE, nenge ican yam, gadia orihom kende iyol na sha!" 
Lamentations1:10 Orhendan naregh uwegh nagh sha akaa a na a dedoo cii; gadia a nenge er atôatyev nyôr ken ichighanjiir na la, u U yange wer, a̱ de nyer ken mkohol Wou ga yô." 
Lamentations1:11 Ior nav cii mba shirin ishima, mba keren kwaghyan; ve gema akaa a ve a dedoo, ve yam kwaghyan a mi, sha u taver uma ve. Nenge, TERE, nenge er m hingir kwagh u aheenegh yô." 
Lamentations1:12 Ka ne ma kwagh ga, ne mba ne lu karen ne cii? Ver ashe, nenge nen, shin ma ican ngi er ican yam ne kpaou? i TER vam a mi sha iyange i iyugh Na i tsung la." 
Lamentations1:13 Ka Sha, A tindi usu ken akuhe am ye, u hemba a kpaa. A wam kper angahar, A hide a mo ijime; A er i kondom iyol, m shi uren didi." 
Lamentations1:14 A harem igbur i aferakaa am; uwegh Nagh tume a, ngam sha mon; a na agee am yina; TER nam sha ikev i mba m fatyô u hendan kwagh a ve ga yô." 
Lamentations1:15 TER gema mbaageev av ker atô wam cii hingir gbilinkwagh: A lôhô iniongo sha u tan num sha a mo sha u timin ikaior yam; TER shoghol iniunkwase, wan u Yuda, ken ihungwa i shoghol atam a wain." 
Lamentations1:16 Ka nahan man m lu vaan mliam ye; ashe am nga ndôôr mliam, sha ci u orsurunshima u una taver uma wam ngu ca a mo; ônov av kpaa kondo ve iyol sha ci u orihom hemba." 
Lamentations1:17 Shion ngu naregh ave na, orsurun un ishima nan ngu ga; TER na zwa sha Yakob er, mba ve kase un cii ve̱ lu mbaahendanev nav; Yerusalem hingir ve er ka kwagh u hôngorough ken atô ve nahan." 
Lamentations1:18 TER ka u perapera je, gadia m hendan a imo Na; shi ungwa nen, ne ior cii, nenge nen ican yam; anuunaukase am man ikaior yam, i yem a ve uikangen." 
Lamentations1:19 M yila mba ve doom ishima la, kpa ve tsughum a tsugh; upristi man mbatamen av ve kpe ken gar, er ve lu keren kwaghyan sha u taver uuma vev yô." 
Lamentations1:20 Nenge, TERE, gadia ican tserem; myam am ma zômon; ishima ngi geman mo ken vanger; gadia m hendan sha apera. Ken won sanker ngu wuan, ken ya yô, gema ka ku." 
Lamentations1:21 Mba ungwan ishimashirin yam; orsurun mo ishima nan ngu ga; mbaihomov av cii ve ungwa kwagh u a tserem yô; ve ember sha ci u U er nahan yô; Wea va a iyange i U yôô i la, nahan vea hingir er mo nahan." 
Lamentations1:22 Iferkwagh ve la cii, i̱ va U sha ishi; er a ve er U er a mo nahan, sha ci u atindi am a peren la cii. Gadia asema am a shirin nga kpishi, ishima yam kpaa ure." 
Lamentations2:1 Kpei! Nenge er TER A cir wankwase u Shion abeen iyol sha iyugh Na! A kende iengem i Iserael i gba shin inya, A umbur kwagh Na u tan angahar sha mi sha iyange i iyugh Na la ga." 
Lamentations2:2 TER vihi ajiir a teman a Yakob la cii, A zungwe mhôônom ga; sha iyugh Na la, A yôhôl ayouautya a taver a wankwase u Yuda la kera, A haa a inya; A vihi tartor man mbatarev mba u kpaa." 
Lamentations2:3 Sha iyugh Na i tsung, A gber hanma korough ku Iserael; A hide a uwegh Nagh ku yanegh ijime sha ishigh ki orihom; A yegh ken Yakob er nomborusu u hian akaa a a kase u cii yô;" 
Lamentations2:4 A henda ada Na er ka orihom nahan, A tile A kende uwegh Nagh ku yanegh sha er ka orahendanegh nahan; man A wua mba ve doo u kenger sha ashe cii; ken tenti u wankwase u Shion la, A haa iyugh Na er usu nahan." 
Lamentations2:5 TER hingir er orihom nahan, A vihi Iserael kera; A vihi ayou a na a tor cii kera; A yôhôl ayouautya na a taver; man A seer wankwase u Yuda mzungu man ijungwen." 
Lamentations2:6 A vihi tenti Na kera, er ka igyar i sule nahan; A hembe ijiir i mkohol Na la; TER na, i hungul mkohol u iniongo man iyange i memen ken Shion kera. Sha mvihi u iyugh Na la A laha tor kua pristi." 
Lamentations2:7 TER ta atse a Na a nan nagh sha mi la kera, A venda icighanjiir Na, A na ukpekpe mba ayou a Na a taven sha la, sha ikev i orihom; ve ger ayôôso ken iyou i TER, er ka sha iyange i iniongo nahan." 
Lamentations2:8 TER wa ishima u hemben kpekpe u wankwase u Shion; A samber kor u karen kwagh, A hide a uwegh Nagh ijime sha u timin ga; A er akpagar man kpekpe ve zungwe; ve yôhôl imôngo." 
Lamentations2:9 Ihinda na sen mire shin inya; A vihi uishindan nav, A kever ve kera. Tor na man atiator a na mba ken akuraior ape i tesen atindi ga la; uprofeti nav kpaa zua a mpase u sha mnenge hen TER ga." 
Lamentations2:10 Mbatamen mba wankwase u Shion shar inya, mba ving, ve haa inya sha ityouv vev, ve ta akondo uya. Anuunaukase a Yerusalem wa ityouv inya." 
Lamentations2:11 Ashe am hungwa ikôr sha ci u mlia, myam am zômon, mtemam am sough haa inya cii, sha ci u mtim u wankwase u ior av; sha ci u mbayev mba kiriki man mbamanatumba hume sha ityembe i ken gar." 
Lamentations2:12 Mba pinen ungô vev er: Uwua man zar u wain mba hana? Zum u ve hume er ka mba i gber ve avav nahan sha ityembe i ken gar, zum u ve kpe ungô vev sha ikum la." 
Lamentations2:13 Ka nyi kwagh me pase u, man ka nyi kwagh me kar u sha mi, we wankwase u Yerusalem? Ka nyi kwagh me zua u sha mi, sha u me sur u ishima, we iniunkwase u Shiono? Gadia mvihi wou gbangese er zegemnger nahan; ka anti nana fatyô u sôron mvihi wou laa?" 
Lamentations2:14 Uprofeti ou nenge a mbampase mba sha mnenge sha ci wou mba aiev man mba gbilinigh; ve pase u ifer you sha u hiden a we ken uikangen kera ga; kpa ve nenge a akaaôron a aiegh sha ci wou man a zan a we ken mtsum. 
Lamentations2:15 Mbakarengbenda cii mba kuren we ave; mba gbiren awer jingir ityough sha wankwase u Yerusalem, kaan er: Ka gar u lu i yilan er, dooashe u hemban, iember i tar cii je nee?" 
Lamentations2:16 Mbaihomov ou cii aver zwa gbanger sha a we; ve gbire awer, ve nyuma tsombo, mba kaan er: Se mena un ve; mimi je ka iyange i se lu veren ishima sha mi je ne; se ar sha i, se nenge a i ve." 
Lamentations2:17 TER er kwagh u lu wa ishima la; A kure kwaghôron Na u A kaa ayange a tsuaa la yô, A yôhôl, A zungwe mhôônom ga; A na orihom a ember sha a we, A kende korough ku mbaahendanev ou sha." 
Lamentations2:18 Ishima ve ngi vaan yilan TER; we, kpekpe u wankwase u Shion, ndôôr mliam er kungômnger nahan tugh man atetan; de ne iyol you mmem ga; hongorshe wou kpaa a̱ de memen ga." 
Lamentations2:19 Mough, vaa mliam tugh, sha mhii u mbamkor mba utugh, ur ishima you inya er mngerem nahan sha ishigh ki TER; kende ave a ou sha her a Na sha ci u uma u mbayev ou mba ve hum sha ijen sha ityough ki hanma gbenda yô." 
Lamentations2:20 Nenge, TERE, nenge, un u U er kwagh a na nahan ne! Kasev ve̱ ya ônov vev, mba ve tee ve sha ave laa? I̱ wua pristi man profeti ken icighanjiir u TERE?" 
Lamentations2:21 Kwaor man ortamen mba yaven hen inya sha igbenda; anuunaukase am man mbayevikaior av kpe ku sha sanker; U wua ve sha iyange i iyugh You; U sôngo ve, U zungwe mhôônom ga." 
Lamentations2:22 U lôhô mcieryol va kasem avegher cii tser, er ka sha iyange i iniongo nahan; ma or u yevese shin u waren kera lu sha iyange i iyugh i TER la ga; mba m tee ve sha ave man mba m yese ve la, orihom wam va tim ve kera." 
Lamentations3:1 Ka mo or u m nenge a ican sha akpa u iyugh Na je ne; 
Lamentations3:2 A yem a mo, A na m zende ken ime, ape iwanger lu ga yô." 
Lamentations3:3 Mimi je A shi geman uwegh Nagh didi sha u eren mo ican. 
Lamentations3:4 A er inyam yam man kwav wam ve ndahar, A sombo akuhe am," 
Lamentations3:5 A maa igyar, A kasem sha zarmle man ican." 
Lamentations3:6 A erem m tsa ken ajiir a imegh, er mba ve kpe ica i gbe yô." 
Lamentations3:7 A maa igyar, A kasem sha u m̱ de fetyô u duen ga yô; A haam mshirim ma yuhwan;" 
Lamentations3:8 shin er m vaa, m ker iwasen kpaa, A ungwa msen wam ga;" 
Lamentations3:9 A maa igyar, A kondo igbenda yam sha awen a kuan, A er igbenda yam i hure." 
Lamentations3:10 Ngum er dwem u a uv a keghen kwagh nahan, man er begha ken ajiir a yeren nahan." 
Lamentations3:11 A goom a igbenda yam kera, A andem avur avur, A gemam, m hingir kundaa." 
Lamentations3:12 A henda ada Na, A verem m hingir ishor i keren sha ivaan." 
Lamentations3:13 A na avaan a ken gbande Na pevem ahi. 
Lamentations3:14 M hingir kwagh u nahan tar hen ior av cii; man icam ve i lahan i shin wan didi. 
Lamentations3:15 A ivim a akaayuan, A idem sha kon u yuan." 
Lamentations3:16 A hembem anyi sha agboghol, a erem m shar shin mtwe." 
Lamentations3:17 U kar a uma wam hen bem kera; mkpeyol hungul mo. 
Lamentations3:18 M kaa mer: Agee am saa ishe, ishimaverenkeghen yam sha TER kpaa saa." 
Lamentations3:19 Umbur ican yam man ijende yam i wue wue, kon u yuan man zarmle!" 
Lamentations3:20 Uma wam ngu umbur ve her gbem, a var inya ker a mo." 
Lamentations3:21 Kwagh ne m ngu umbur un, nahan m ngu a ishimaverenkeghen:" 
Lamentations3:22 Ka sha erdoo u TER man i tim se ga ye, sha ci u mhôônom Nam ma zungwen ma been mayange ga," 
Lamentations3:23 ve mba hegh hanma sev; jighjigh Wou gba ikôr. 
Lamentations3:24 TER ka kwar wam, kape uma wam a lu kaan ne; nahan yô, ishimaverenkeghen yam ia lu sha a Na." 
Lamentations3:25 TER eren dedoo a mba ve veren ishima sha a Na, a uma u a keren Un la." 
Lamentations3:26 Doo u or nana ver ishima nana kegh myom u TER ving. 
Lamentations3:27 Doo u or nana tôô igbur er nan lu iyev la je. 
Lamentations3:28 Nana̱ tema tswen, nana̱ huan ving, zum u A penda nan i yô." 
Lamentations3:29 Nana̱ wa zwa u nan shin vuulevu; alaghga ishimaverenkeghen ia lu! 
Lamentations3:30 Nana̱ gema uasegh hen or u gbidyen nan; nana̱ ide sha aheen. 
Lamentations3:31 Gadia TER Una ta or kera zan zan gbem ga. 
Lamentations3:32 Gadia shin er A na ishima i vihin, nahan kpaa mhôônom maa kôr Un sha mngee u erdoo Na la." 
Lamentations3:33 Gadia ka ishima Na u eren ônov mba iorov ican man u vihin ve ishima kpaa ga. 
Lamentations3:34 U ndyaren mbauikangenev mba shin tar cii shin angahar," 
Lamentations3:35 u geman ishô i or sha ishigh ki Uhembansha," 
Lamentations3:36 u nzughul a or sha ijir i nan yô, Ter rumun ga." 
Lamentations3:37 Ka anti nana kaa kwagh, man á kure sha mi aluer TER ngu a na zwa ga yôô?" 
Lamentations3:38 Ka ken zwa u Uhembansha kwagh u bo man kwagh u doon ve dugh ye gaa? 
Lamentations3:39 Ka sha ci u nyi man or u uma nan hon iker sha ci u mtsaha u asorabo a nanaa? 
Lamentations3:40 Sé time nen sé kar igbenda yase, man shi sé hide nen hen TER." 
Lamentations3:41 Sé kende nen asema ase man ave ase hen Aôndo u Sha. 
Lamentations3:42 Se per atindi, se hendan; U de se kwaghbo ga." 
Lamentations3:43 U cir iyugh iyol, U tôv se ityô; U wua, u zungwe mhôônom ga." 
Lamentations3:44 U cir ibeenegh iyol, sha u ma msen a̱ de kera karen aren her a We ga yô." 
Lamentations3:45 U gema se se hingir ingbôrakembegh man ihôghonov ker atô u akuraior. 
Lamentations3:46 Mbaihomov asev cii aver zwa gbanger sha a vese. 
Lamentations3:47 Mciem man ihungwa i hônon va ta sha a vese, mvihi man mtim kpaa." 
Lamentations3:48 Mliam ndôôr mo ashe er ukungômbamngerev nahan, sha ci u mtim u wankwase u ior av." 
Lamentations3:49 Ishe yam haa mliam, tôndo ga, i mem kpaa ga," 
Lamentations3:50 zan zan TER shir ashe Sha, kenger shin inya nenge." 
Lamentations3:51 Ishe yam ngi nan uma wam ican sha ci u ônkasev mba ken gar wam cii. 
Lamentations3:52 Ve zendam tsung er ka inyon nahan, ve mba ve lu mbaihomov av, a ityôikaa ga la." 
Lamentations3:53 Ve tim uma wam kera shin ijôr ve gema awen ve haa sha mo. 
Lamentations3:54 Mngerem uvem ityough; tsô m kaa mer, m saa ve." 
Lamentations3:55 M yila sha iti You, TERE, shin ihungwa i zan." 
Lamentations3:56 U ungwa imo yam; de kera cirin togh Ough sha u ungwan iôôn yam man mliam am kpaa ga. 
Lamentations3:57 U va ikua ikua sha iyange i m yila U; U kaa wer: De cie ga. 
Lamentations3:58 TERE, U ta ikaa ken a mo, u paa uma wam." 
Lamentations3:59 TERE, U nenge kwaghbo u i erem ne; ôr ijir yam." 
Lamentations3:60 U nenge iyev ve i oron cii, man mbaawashima vev mba ve we sha a mo cii." 
Lamentations3:61 U ungwa iheen ve, TERE, man mbaawashima vev mba ve we sha a mo cii," 
Lamentations3:62 ka ityumbujôôgh i mbahendan a mo, man mhen ve u ve shi henen sha a mo didi la." 
Lamentations3:63 Yô, kenger ve, mtem ve man mmough ve; m hingir ve icam i sha ilyahan." 
Lamentations3:64 Ú va or ve iyev, TERE, sha inja i tom u ave ve." 
Lamentations3:65 Ú cighir ve ishima, ifan You ia lu sha a ve." 
Lamentations3:66 Ú tôv ve ityô sha iyugh man Ú tim ve, shin atô a Usha mba TER." 
Lamentations4:1 Nenge, er zenaria a hingir cing yô, zenaria u mimi gema hingir kposo! I tsenda awen a icighanjiir sha ityough ki hanma gbenda." 
Lamentations4:2 Ônov mba Shion mba injaav, mba i kar ve sha zenaria u wang ne, nenge, i kenger ve, ve hingir er mbaagu mba inyaav nahan, tomaveegh u ormaantyegh." 
Lamentations4:3 Ugbaseela kpaa mba nan ônov vev atumba, sha u ve̱ ambe, kpa wankwase u ior av yô, mhôônom kôr un ga er ukonkofi mba ken taaikôngo nahan." 
Lamentations4:4 Nombor u wanikundan u man atumba var un sha ikighô sha ci u imura; anmbayev mba sônon kwaghyan, kpa ma or ngu nan ve ga." 
Lamentations4:5 Mba lu ve yaan akaadoon la, mba saan ishe sha gbenda; mba lu iyese ve sha murufu la, mba yaven sha atihi a uihôgh." 
Lamentations4:6 Gadia iferkwagh i wankwase u ior av kehe hemba kwaghbo u Sodom, u i yôhôl un kera fese, ma or za ave sha mi kpaa ga la." 
Lamentations4:7 Mbainjaa nav wanger je hemba senou, ve kungu je hemba atumba, ve nyian ayol je hemba ukorali, mluyol ve lu er safir nahan." 
Lamentations4:8 Mluashe ve ile hemba akausu; i kera fa ve sha igbendagar ga; kwav ve var ve ken akuhe, u uma, hingir er kon nahan." 
Lamentations4:9 Guda mba i woo ve sha sanker, a mba ijen i woo ve la, mba ve use, i kuma ve due kera, sha ci u mban u iyiav mbi ken sule yô." 
Lamentations4:10 Ave a kasev mba ve lu asema legh legh la jiidi ônov vev, ve hingir kwaghyan ve je sha mtim u i tim wankwase u ior av kera la." 
Lamentations4:11 TER kure ishima i vihin Na la cii, A haa iyugh Na i tsung la; A keer usu ken Shion, u u hie amagh a na." 
Lamentations4:12 Utor mba shin tar man ior mba sha won cii na jighjigh er, orhendan man orihom vea nyôr hen ihinda i Yerusalem ga." 
Lamentations4:13 Lu sha ci u asorabo a uprofeti nav man afer a upristi nav, mba ve haa awambe a mba perapera inya ken atô na yô." 
Lamentations4:14 Ve zende ze ze ze er mbaapirashe nahan sha igbenda ken igbenda i gar, ve hôngor sha awambe je or kera fatyô u benden akondo a ve ave ga." 
Lamentations4:15 Yem nen kera! Wanger ga! Kape ior lu geren ve akenge la, kar nen sha, kar nen sha, de kera benden nen ave ga! Zum u ve yevese man ve hingir mbazenden wue wue yô, ior mba ken akuraior kaa er: ve̱ de kera shi tem heen ga." 
Lamentations4:16 Ishigh ki TER sambe ve kera, Una kera wa ve iko ga. Ior kera civir upristi ga, mbatamen kpaa i zungwe ve mhôônom ga." 
Lamentations4:17 Ashe ase nga vihin sha u keghen iwasen, kpa ka gbilin tsô; sha mkegh wase, se kegh ikurior i ia fatyô u yiman se ga yô." 
Lamentations4:18 Ve tôv se angahar zan zan je se kera fatyô u karen sha ityembe i gar wase ga; mkur wase mgbôghom, ayange ase iv, mkur wase va ve." 
Lamentations4:19 Mbatôvon se ityô ve zende fefa hemba ugafa mba purugh sha kwavaôndo, ve dondo se ijime sha iwo, ve kegh se ken taaikôngo." 
Lamentations4:20 Iôôn i ahenga ase, un u TER A shigh un mkurem la, ve kôr un shin ahungwa a ve, u se fa ser, ka ken mure na sé tema ken akuraior ye." 
Lamentations4:21 Ember, lu saan saan, we wankwase u Edom, we, u u tem ken tar u Ushi; we kpaa, iyongo ne ia kar ia ar her a we, ú ma, ú hunde, ú er ikondo kera iyol you, ú hingir idyelegh." 
Lamentations4:22 Mtsaha u iferkwagh you kure ve, we wankwase u Shion; shi Una kera kimbir yemen a we ken uikangen ga; Una tsaha u sha iferkwagh you, we wankwase u Edom, Una tese asorabo a ou ken igbar." 
Lamentations5:1 TERE, umbur kwagh u a tser se ne; gema ashe, nenge iheen yase." 
Lamentations5:2 I gema dyako wase i na mbavannya, ayou a ase kpaa, i na ior mba ken ityar igen." 
Lamentations5:3 Se hingir ancôgholov, se mba a ter ga, ungô asev hingir er kasev mba côgholov nahan." 
Lamentations5:4 Se mba me mngerem asem sha inyar; ikon yase kpaa, se mba zuan a mi sha inyar." 
Lamentations5:5 Mbatorough a vese, mba se sha imon; se vôr, mba rumun er se̱ mem ga." 
Lamentations5:6 Ka hen Mbaigipiti, se dugh ave, kua hen Mbaashiria sha u ma se zough a kwaghyan u una kuma se yô." 
Lamentations5:7 Uter asev er isholibo, kera mba ga; se yô, se tôô mtsaha u aferakaa a ve." 
Lamentations5:8 Ikpan ngi yan tor, sha a vese; ma or u yiman se sha ikev ve nan ngu ga." 
Lamentations5:9 Ka sha u wan uuma asev iko ga, se zough a kwaghyan wase ye; sha ci u sanker u ken taaikôngo la." 
Lamentations5:10 Kwavyolough wase tsee er sweliwa nahan, sha ci u mtsee u tsung u ijen." 
Lamentations5:11 Ve nzughul a kasev ken Shion, ônkasev mba ken agar a Yuda la." 
Lamentations5:12 Ve sende atiator sha ave ve; i civir ishiv mbi mbatamen kpaa ga. 
Lamentations5:13 Ikaior tôô nase man mbayev nôngo gbev a ikaghikon. 
Lamentations5:14 Mbatamen mba hen hundagar ga; ikaior kpaa kera mba kuhwan ityogholov ga. 
Lamentations5:15 Iember i ken ishima yase bee; amar a ase kpaa hingir ijungwen. 
Lamentations5:16 Idyer i tor bugh se sha ityou, gba inya; kwagh tser se ve, gadia se er isholibo." 
Lamentations5:17 Sha ci u nahan yô, ishima yase ure, sha ci u akaa angan yô, ashe ase hingir dimii," 
Lamentations5:18 sha ci u uwo u Shion, u u hingir ice yô, ugbaseela mba zenden sha mi." 
Lamentations5:19 Kpa We TERE, U ngu her gbem sha won, U tema tor sha ikov ikov." 
Lamentations5:20 Ka nyi man se hungul We gbeme, man U gbihi se kera ayange a ngee nahana?" 
Lamentations5:21 Hide a vese hen a We, TERE, tsô se hide hen a We; er sha ayange a tsuaa la nahan." 
Lamentations5:22 Shin U ta a ta se kera je ase? Shin ishima i vihi U a vese i ganda? 
Ezekiel1:1 Tsô sha inyom i sha ikundugber, uwer u sha unyiin, ayange a u ataan la, er m lu ken mbakwarev hen kpeifi u Cebar yô, i bugh Sha man m nenge mbampase mba Aôndo." 
Ezekiel1:2 Sha iyange i sha utaan i uwer la, ka inyom i sha utaan i ikangenev mbi tor Yehoyakin je la," 
Ezekiel1:3 kwaghôron u TER va hen pristi Esekiel, wan u Bushi, ken tar u Mbakaldi hen kpeifi u Cebar; uwegh ku TER lu sha a na heregh." 
Ezekiel1:4 Tsô m kenger yô, nenge, ahumbe a uragh lu duen shin imbusutarimese lu van, ibeenegh ki vesen a usu u haan vir vir gbem, man iengem kase ki tser; ker atô, ka ker atô u usu la, lu er iyôgh ki engem nahan." 
Ezekiel1:5 Ken atô u u la, kwagh due, lu er akaauma anyiin nahan. Ka mlu u a ne: a lu iyol er ka or nahan." 
Ezekiel1:6 Hanmô ve lu a ishiv inyiin, man hanmô ve kpaa lu a akper anyiin." 
Ezekiel1:7 Angahar a a lu jighilii, man akev a angahar a a lu er ka apande a wanbua nahan, engem er ka togula u i kil un yô." 
Ezekiel1:8 Ave a or gema lu ker akper a a sha avegher a a anyiin la. Ishiv mbi a man akper a a, a anyiin la cii lu nahan:" 
Ezekiel1:9 akper a a zua ayol a a; zum u a yemen yô, a kahan ga; hanmô ve yemen ken hemen jighilii." 
Ezekiel1:10 Mlu u ishiv mbi a yô, lu er ka ishigh ki orough nahan; a anyiin la cii, lu a ishigh ki begha vegher u ken iyan; a anyiin la cii, lu a ishigh ki bua vegher u ken imese; man shi a anyiin la cii, shi lu a ishigh ki gafa." 
Ezekiel1:11 A samber akper a a sha; hanmô lu a akper ahar a a za zua sha a agen la, man ahar di gema cir a ayol." 
Ezekiel1:12 Hanmô yemen ken hemen jighilii; henpe a gba Jijingi u zan cii, ka heregh a yemen ye; zum u a yemen yô, a kahan ga." 
Ezekiel1:13 Sha kwagh u mlu u akaauma ne yô, mluashe ve lu er akausu a enger nahan, er akagh a yeghen nahan; a lu zan hiden her atô u akaauma la; usu la wanger; ker atô u u kpaa inyiar lu duen." 
Ezekiel1:14 Akaauma la, lu nyôngoso zan hiden, bee er ka mlu u inyiar i ka i nyiar nahan." 
Ezekiel1:15 Tsô er m nenge akaauma shon la, m nenge ikaver môm lu shin inya hen akaauma la, sha ishiv mbi a anyiin la cii ser ser." 
Ezekiel1:16 Mlu u akaver la man m-er u i er a la, lu er iwen i kerisoliti nahan; mlu u a anyiin cii, lu inja i môm; mluashe u a, man m-er u i er a la, lu er ikaver ken atô u ikaver nahan." 
Ezekiel1:17 Zum u a zenden yô, a zaan avegher a anyiin la cii, a kahan shighe u a zenden la ga." 
Ezekiel1:18 Ajime a a, a a menger shin inya yô, a tav je man a cier iyol kpaa; ajime a a anyiin la cii mgbough a ashe ningir tser." 
Ezekiel1:19 Zum u akaauma la a yemen yô, akaver kpaa a zaan a a nongo; man zum u a kenden a akaauma la sha shin tar yô, akaver kpaa a kenden a sha." 
Ezekiel1:20 Hanpe a gba Jijingi u zan cii, ka heregh a zaan ye, ka henpe a gba Jijingi u zan la cii; i kenden akaver a a imôngo, gadia jijingi u akaauma la lu ken akaver." 
Ezekiel1:21 Zum u a yemen yô, angan kpaa a yemen; man zum u a tilen yô, angan kpaa a tile; man zum u a kenden a sha shin tar yô, akaver kpaa a kende a a imôngo; gadia jijingi u akaauma lu ken akaver la." 
Ezekiel1:22 Sha ityouv mbi akaauma la, kwagh lu er kwavaôndo nahan, engem er krusetalu u cier iyol nahan, samber a sha ityouv." 
Ezekiel1:23 Kwavaôndo vegher u shin la, akper a a samber jighilii, kperegh môm ver ishigh sha kugenegh; hanmô lu a akper ahar a cirin iyol na ken ikum man ken ijime kpaa." 
Ezekiel1:24 Zum u a lu yemen yô, m ungwa iov i akper a a er ka ihuran i mngerem ma vesen nahan, er ka imo i Uhembanagee, ka ihuran i ayôôso er ka iov i ikumutya nahan; zum u a tilen yô, a shir akper a a." 
Ezekiel1:25 Imo due sha kwavaôndo u u lu a sha ityou la; zum u a tilen yô, a shir akper a a." 
Ezekiel1:26 Sha kwavaôndo u u lu a sha ityou la, kwagh lu bee ikônough ki torough, lu er ka mluashe u iwen i safir nahan; man sha kwagh u a bee ikônough ki torough la, kwagh lu sha mi er ka mluashe u or nahan." 
Ezekiel1:27 Man shi m nenge kwagh engem er iyôgh nahan; hii henpe lu er ka iwenge na la yem sha, lu er mluashe u usu nahan ningir tser; man shi hii henpe lu er ka iwenge na la yem shin lu er ka usu nahan, iwanger ningir tser." 
Ezekiel1:28 Lu er mluashe u ikume ken ibeen sha iyange i ura u nee yô, kape mluashe u iengem i i kase i tser la, i lu la. Kape m-ande u mluashe u icivir i TER a lu la. Zum u m nenge a mi yô, m gba, m kuma ityough inya, man m ungwa imo i or, lu ôron kwagh." 
Ezekiel2:1 A kaa mo er: Wan u or, mough, tile sha angahar a ou, M̱ ôr kwagh a we." 
Ezekiel2:2 Tsô Jijingi nyôr ken a mo zum u A ôr kwagh a mo la, A er m tile sha angahar a am; nahan m ungwa Un u A er kwagh a mo la." 
Ezekiel2:3 A kaa a mo er: Wan u or, M ngu tindin we hen Mbaiserael, hen akuraior a hendan kwagh, a a hendan a Mo yô; ve kua uter vev ve per atindi Am, zan zan nyian je." 
Ezekiel2:4 Man mbayev kpaa mba we kwagh iko ga, ve cighir asema. M ngu tindin we her a ve; kaa a ve wer; Ter AÔNDO ngu kaan nahan er:" 
Ezekiel2:5 Man ve kpaa, shin vea ungwa shin vea venda—gadia ka ya u hendan je—vea fa er yan profeti lu ve her atô je yô." 
Ezekiel2:6 We, wan u or, de cie ve ga, man shi de cie akaaôron a ve kpaa ga, shin er usaa man kpamberakpa ve lu a we, man er u tem her atô u ayese nahan kpaa; de cie akaaôron a ve ga, ishima i̱ de nyian we sha mdugh u ve dughun we ashe kpaa ga, shin er ve lu ya u hendan kwagh nahan je kpaa." 
Ezekiel2:7 Ôr ve akaaôron a Am, shin vea ungwa, shin vea venda u ungwan kpaa, gadia ve ka mbahendan kwagh je." 
Ezekiel2:8 Kpa we, wan u or, ungwa kwagh u M er u ne; de lu or u hendan kwagh er ya u hendan kwagh ne nahan ga. Aver zwa wou, ya kwagh u M ne u ne." 
Ezekiel2:9 Zum u m kenger yô, nenge, i naregh uwegh her a mo, man nenge, ihurenruamabera lu ken ku;" 
Ezekiel2:10 tsô A samber un sha ishigh Yagh; i nger un kimi kua ken ijime kpaa; man kwagh u i nger kimi yô, lu ukwelegh man mzungu man iwer i gbiren." 
Ezekiel3:1 Nahan A kaa a mo er: Wan u or, ya kwagh u i ne u ne; ya ihurenruamabera ne, za, za ôr kwagh a ya u Iserael." 
Ezekiel3:2 Tsô m aver zwa, A nam ihurenruamabera la, m ya." 
Ezekiel3:3 Nahan A kaa a mo er: Wan u or, de iyav ou mbu̱ ya, iv gbor wou a ihurenruamabera u M ne u ne. Tsô m ya i; i nyohom ken zwa er iyough nahan." 
Ezekiel3:4 A kaa a mo er: Wan u or, za ase hen ya u Iserael, za ôr ve akaaôron a Am." 
Ezekiel3:5 Gadia i tindi u ka hen ior mba zwa ve u lu kposo ga man shi u cimin kpaa ga yô, kpa ka hen ya u Iserael," 
Ezekiel3:6 ka hen akuraior kpishi a zwa ve u lu kposo ga shi u cimin kpaa ga yô, er u fatyô u kaven akaaôron a ve ga ze. Mimi je, Mea tindi u her a ve yô, ma ve ver ato her a we." 
Ezekiel3:7 Kpa ya u Iserael yô, una ver ato her a we ga; gadia ve rumun u veren ato her a Mo ga; gadia ya u Iserael cii ka mbatavertyough man mbakehenasema kpaa." 
Ezekiel3:8 Nenge, M taver ishigh you er ishiv vev nahan man ityough you kpaa er ityouv vev nahan." 
Ezekiel3:9 M taver ityough you er daimondi nahan, taver hemba vande kpaa; de cie ve ga, man ishima i̱ de nyian we sha mdugh u ve dughun we ashe ga, shin er ve lu ya u hendan kwagh nahan je kpaa." 
Ezekiel3:10 A shi A kaa a mo er: Wan u or, akaaôron Am a Me ôr u cii, ngohol a ken ishima you, man ungwa a sha ato ou kpaa." 
Ezekiel3:11 Yem tsô, za hen mbauikangenev, hen ônov mba ior ou, za ôr kwagh a ve kaa a ve wer: Ter AÔNDO ngu kaan nahan; shin vea ungwa shin vea venda u ungwan kpaa." 
Ezekiel3:12 Tsô Jijingi kendem sha man m ungwa ihuran i iov i vesen ken ijime yam i gba kaan er: I̱ wuese icivir i TER hen ijiir Na i teman. 
Ezekiel3:13 Man m ungwa iov i akper a akaauma la, er a lu benden ayol a a yô, man iov i akaver sha mi imôngo kpaa, ka ihuran i iov i vesen je." 
Ezekiel3:14 Tsô Jijingi kendem sha yem a mo; m yem a ishima i vihin, sha mtsee u jijingi wam, man uwegh ku TER lu sha a mo taveraa." 
Ezekiel3:15 Nahan m va hen mbauikangenev hen Telabiba mba ve tema hen kpeifi u Cebar, man hen ijir i ve tema la; m tema a ve ayange ataankarahar je, kundam iyol cii." 
Ezekiel3:16 Tsô ayange a ataankarahar la nga been yô, kwaghôron u TER va her a mo er:" 
Ezekiel3:17 Wan u or, M ver u orkuran sha ya u Iserael, aluer wea ungwa kwaghôron sha zwa Wam yô, wa ve kwagh sha ci Wam." 
Ezekiel3:18 Aluer M kaa a iferor Mer, ú kpe kpee je, man ú kera wa nan kwagh ga, ú kera ôr kwagh, ú wa nan kwagh sha gbenda u nan u bo la sha u yiman uma u nan ga yô, iferor shon nana kpe ken ifer i nan, kpa awambe a nan yô, Me ker a her a we." 
Ezekiel3:19 Kpa aluer ú wa iferor kwagh, kpa nan gema nan undu ifer i nan man gbenda u nan u bo la ga yô, nana kpe ken ifer i nan; kpa we yô, u yima uma wou." 
Ezekiel3:20 Man shi aluer ormimi nan gema nan undu perapera u nan, man nana er iferkwagh, man M ver kwagh u nôngon gbev sha ishigh ki nan yô, nana kpe; er u we nan kwagh ga yô, nana kpe ken isholibo i nan, á kera umbur aeren a perapera a nan, a yan nan lu er la ga; kpa awambe a nan yô, Me ker a her a we." 
Ezekiel3:21 Nahan kpaa aluer u wa ormimi kwagh wer, nana̱ de kera eren isholibo ga, man nana er isholibo ga yô, nana war kpee je, sha ci u nan wa kwaghwan wou la iko; we kpaa u yima uma wou." 
Ezekiel3:22 Uwegh ku TER lu sha mo hen ijiir la; man A kaa a mo er: Mough sha, due za shin pev, ka heera man Me za ôr kwagh a we ye." 
Ezekiel3:23 Tsô m mough, m due, m za shin pev; man nenge, iengem i TER tile her, er ka i m vande nengen a i hen kpeifi u Cebar la nahan; tsô m gba, m kuma ityough inya." 
Ezekiel3:24 Tsô Jijingi nyôr ker a mo, A erem, m tile sha angahar a am; a ôr kwagh a mo, A kaa a mo er: Za, za wuhe iyol you ken iyou." 
Ezekiel3:25 Kpa we, wan u or, nenge, vea ta u ikor man vea kange u sha i, sha er ú kera zende ker atô ve ga yô;" 
Ezekiel3:26 man Me er nombor wou ua var u sha ikighô, ú kondo iker, man ú kera lu or u wan ve tsaha ga, gadia ve mba ya u hendan je." 
Ezekiel3:27 Kpa zum u Me ôr kwagh a we yô, Me bugh zwa wou, nahan ú kaa a ve wer: Ter AÔNDO ngu kaan nahan er: Or u nan ongo yô, nana̱ ungwa, man u nan vende u ungwan yô, nana̱ venda; gadia ve mba ya u hendan je." 
Ezekiel4:1 We wan u or, tôô ikamegh, ver sha ishigh you, kpela foto u gar sha mi, ka Yerusalem je;" 
Ezekiel4:2 kase un sha utya, maa ayouautya a taver, ta atihi a inyaagh, haa un afo kpaa, man ver akeke a hemben kpekpegar, a̱ kase un a̱ tser." 
Ezekiel4:3 Man shi tôô gbandeiyô, ver un a̱ hingir kpekpe u iyôô her atô wou a gar; man ver ishigh sha mi, kase un sha utya, gema ta num sha a na, i̱ hingir ya u Iserael ikav." 
Ezekiel4:4 We yô, yav ken ihan you i imese, gema iferkwagh i ya u Iserael penda sha mi, iyenge i ayange a u yav sha mi la, ú tôô iferkwagh ve." 
Ezekiel4:5 Gadia m ver u iyenge i anyom a iferkwagh ve sha iyenge i ayangegh, ka ayange deri utar man akunduanyiingber; kape ú tôô iferkwagh i ya u Iserael je la." 
Ezekiel4:6 Man shi zum u ú bee ayange angan yô, yav ken ihan you i yan, tôô iferkwagh i ya u Yuda kpaa; M ver u ayange akunduahar, iyange i môm sha ci u inyom i môm." 
Ezekiel4:7 Ver ishigh kenger Yerusalem u i kase un la, bugh ikondo sha uwe kera, man ôr kwaghôron u profeti sha a na kpaa." 
Ezekiel4:8 Nenge, m ta u ikor, sha u ú kera gema ú yav ken ihan igen ga yô, zan zan ú bee ayange a i kase u sha utya ne." 
Ezekiel4:9 Shi tôô alakema man shair man alev man alev a kiriki man amine man agase, wa ve shin ityegh i môm, er bredi a mi sha ci wou; iyenge i ayange a ou a u yav ken ihan you la, ayange deri utar man akunduanyiingber, una lu kwaghyan wou." 
Ezekiel4:10 Kwaghyan u ú ya yô, á kar u myohom á kuma ushekel ikundu sha hanma iyange, ú yaan un sha shighe u i ver yô." 
Ezekiel4:11 Mngerem kpaa ú ma sha ikaren ma ma kom môm ken ataratar u hin (painti môm man tiôn); ú maan sha shighe u i ver yô. 
Ezekiel4:12 Yaan un er ka umasa mba i er sha shair nahan, kaa un sha usu u sha akôngo a or sha ashe ve." 
Ezekiel4:13 TER gema kaa er: Kape Mbaiserael vea ya kwaghyan ve u a lu wang ga, ken akuraior, henpe Me zenda ve vea yem la." 
Ezekiel4:14 Tsô m kaa mer: Uwu, Tere, AÔNDO! Nenge, m ngu a vande hôngor ga; gadia hii er m lu iyev la je zan zan hegen m ngu a vande yan kwagh u a gbe kpen ga, shin u inyam i kume i ande un kpaa ga, man inyam i ndôhôr ishima kpaa ngi a nyôrom ken zwa ga." 
Ezekiel4:15 Nahan A kaa a mo er: Nenge, M na u akôngo a bua sha ityough ki akôngo a or, kaa kwaghyan wou sha usu u a." 
Ezekiel4:16 Man shi A kaa a mo er: Wan u or, nenge, Me vihi kwaghyan u ve suur sha mi la kera, ken Yerusalem; vea kar myohom ma kwaghyan, vea ya un a ishima i nyian, man vea kar mngerem sha ikaren, vea ma a mciem;" 
Ezekiel4:17 sha ci u kwaghyan man mngerem á ban ve, man á kpiligh ve iyol hanma or a orgen, man vea use ken iferkwagh ve." 
Ezekiel5:1 Man we, wan u or, tôô sanker u esen dedoo, gema un a̱ hingir we er atsem u orhondontyough nahan, hondo ityough man indyer you a mi; nahan tôô iyôgh ki karen myohom, pav ice la;" 
Ezekiel5:2 nande tihi u môm ken atihi atar sha usu ken atô gar, zum u ayange a mkase u sha utya la aa bee kera yô; man shi tôô tihi ugen ken atihi atar la, gber i sha sanker ningir tser; man tihi môm ugen u sha utar la, tsenda i sha ahumbe, man Me tsuwa sanker ken ijime ve." 
Ezekiel5:3 Sange i côhin, kange ken riga wou." 
Ezekiel5:4 Shi pande i, haa ken atô u usu, nande i sha usu; ka her, usu ua due ua nyôr ken ya u Iserael cii ye." 
Ezekiel5:5 Ter AÔNDO ngu kaan nahan er: Ka Yerusalem je ne; M ver un ker ato u akuraior, ityar kase un tser." 
Ezekiel5:6 Kpa a hendan a akaaôron a jirigh a Am, a er ifer hemba akuraior, man a hendan a akaawan a Am kpaa, hemba ityar i i kase un la cii, gadia ve venda akaaôron a jirigh a Am, man akaawan a Am kpaa ve zende ken a ga." 
Ezekiel5:7 Nahan yô, Ter AÔNDO ngu kaan nahan er: Er ne hendan kwagh je, ne hemba akuraior a a kase ne la, man ne zende sha akaawan a Am ga, man shi ne we akaaôron a jirigh a Am iko ga, ne er sha akaaôron a jirigh a akuraior a a kase ne la tsô kpaa ga," 
Ezekiel5:8 nahan yô, Ter AÔNDO ngu kaan er: Nenge, Mo je kpaa, M ngu num a we, Me ôr ijir ker atô wou sha ishigh ki akuraior." 
Ezekiel5:9 Man ker atô wou kpaa Me er kwagh u M lu a vande eren ga yô, imbakwagh i mayange Me kera er i nahan ga, sha ci u akaa a ou a ndôhôrshima cii." 
Ezekiel5:10 Nahan yô, uter vea ya inyam i ônov vev ker atô wou, man ônov di kpaa vea ya uter vev; Me ôr u ijir man shi Me sambe asande a a shi ken a we la sha ahumbe, hanma ian cii." 
Ezekiel5:11 Nahan yô, mimi je, er M lu u uma ne, kape Ter AÔNDO A kaa ne: mimi je, sha ci u u hôngor icighanjiir wam, sha akaa a ou a hôngorough la cii, man sha akaa a ou a ndôhôrshima la cii, nahan Mo kpaa Me gema ishe yam kera, ia tange u ga, man shi Me kera zungwe mhôônom kpaa ga." 
Ezekiel5:12 Kwe wou u môm ken ikwe itiar ua kpe bouange, man ijen ia wua ve ker atô wou; shi kwe wou ugen ken ikwe itiar á wua u sha sanker, á ningir á tser, shi kwe ugen ken ikwe itiar Me sambe u sha ahumbe hanma ian cii, man shi Me tsuwa sanker ken ijime ve." 
Ezekiel5:13 Kape á kure ishimavihin Yam jimin cii ne, man Me er ishimavihin Yam a ve ia mem, man á yôhôl uma Wam iyol kpaa; nahan vea fa er Mo TER M er kwagh sha gbashima Wam yô, zum u Me kure ishimavihin Yam jimin cii sha a ve la." 
Ezekiel5:14 Man shi Me gema u ú hingir tihi u alôgh man kwagh u aheenegh ken akuraior a a kase u yô, sha ashe a hanma or u nan kar her yô." 
Ezekiel5:15 Kape ú hingir kwagh u aheenegh man ilyahan, ityesen man kwagh u kpilighyol, hen akuraior a a kase u ne, zum u Me ôr u ijir sha ishima i nyoon man sha iyugh man sha mbamtsaha mba sha ishima i vihin. Ka Mo TER M kaa nahan ye;" 
Ezekiel5:16 zum u Me tindi ve a avaan a bo a ijen a van a mtim la, a Me tindi sha u timin ne; man Me seer a seer ne ijen man Me vihi kwaghyan wen u ne suur sha mi la kera;" 
Ezekiel5:17 man Me tindi ne a ijen man inyamikume, ia kura ne ônov kera; angev mbu bov man awambe vea zende ken a we, man Me va u a sanker kpaa; ka Mo TER M kaa nahan ye." 
Ezekiel6:1 Kwaghôron u TER va her a mo, er:" 
Ezekiel6:2 Wan u or ver ishigh you sha iwo i Iserael, ôr kwaghôron u profeti sha i," 
Ezekiel6:3 kaa wer: Ne iwo i Iserael, ungwa nen kwaghôron u Ter AÔNDO; Ter AÔNDO ngu kaan a iwo man a agungu, man iwagh man apev nahan er: Nenge, ka Mo je, Me va a sanker sha a ven man Me tim ajiir a en a taven la kera." 
Ezekiel6:4 Atse a en a nanden nagh sha mi, á vihi a kera man á hembe atse a en a nanden kwaghhumandoon sha mi la; Me haa ior enev mba i woo ve la inya, sha ishigh ki akombo a en." 
Ezekiel6:5 Me gbir akom a Mbaiserael sha ishigh ki akombo a ve; man Me tsenda akuhe a en a̱ ningir atse a en a nan nagh sha mi a̱ tser. 
Ezekiel6:6 Ken ajiir a en a teman cii, á tim agar a vesen kera, man ajiir a taven sha la, aa hingir ice; sha u i̱ tim atse en a nan nagh sha mi la, a̱ hingir ice, man i̱ hembe akombo a en a̱ bee, man i̱ gber atse a en a nanden kwaghhumandoon sha mi la kera, man i̱ kar a ityom yen kera purututu." 
Ezekiel6:7 Mba i woo ve la, vea haa inya hen atô wen, man né fa er Mo M lu TER ye." 
Ezekiel6:8 Nahan kpaa Me de asande a̱ lu uma her, gadia mbagenev ken a ven vea war sanker ken akuraior, zum u á sambe ne sha ityar ityar la." 
Ezekiel6:9 Ve mba ve wer ken a ven la, vea umbur Mo ken akuraior henpe á yem a ve uikangen la, zum u Me vihi ishima ve i idya i i pav a Mo la kera, kua ashe a ve kpaa, a a za idya sha akombo a ve la, nahan ishima ia ndôhôr ve a ayol a ve sha ci u aferakaa a ve er sha akaa ve a ndôhôrshima la cii." 
Ezekiel6:10 Man vea fa er Mo M lu TER ye; ka gbilin man M kaa Mer, Me er kwagh u bo ne ga." 
Ezekiel6:11 Ter AÔNDO ngu kaan nahan er: Kure ave, man kure angahar a ou, kaa wer: Wuu! Akaa a ndôhôrshima cii a ya u Iserael ne; gadia á wua ve sha sanker man sha ijen man sha bouange." 
Ezekiel6:12 U nan lu ca, bouange una wua nan; u nan lu ikua sanker una wua nan; u nan shi her man i kase nan sha utya la, ijen ia wua nan; kape Me kure ishimavihin Yam jimin cii sha a ve ne." 
Ezekiel6:13 Man nea fa er Mo M lu TER ye, zum u mba i woo ve la, vea haa inya ken atô u akombo a ve hen atse a ve a nan nagh sha mi, á ningir á tser la, sha hanma igungu u taven man sha ityouv mbi iwoov cii, man shin hanma tinekon u ndor kpaa, man shin hanma itine i terebin u ngeen ika, hen ijiir i ve ne akombo a ve cii nagh ku dedoo la." 
Ezekiel6:14 Me naregh uwegh Agh sha a ve, Me vihi tar, ua hingir ice, hii hen desereti zan zan ar hen Dibela hen ajiir a ve a teman cii, man vea fa er Mo M lu TER ye." 
Ezekiel7:1 Kwaghôron u TER va her a mo, er:" 
Ezekiel7:2 We, wan u or, Ter AÔNDO ngu kaan sha kwagh u tar u Iserael er: Mkur! Mkur va sha azongo a tar a anyiin ne." 
Ezekiel7:3 Hegen yô, mkur va sha a we, Me tindi ishima Yam i vihin sha a we, man Me ôr u ijir sha aeren a ou, man Me tsaha u sha akaa a ou a ndôhôrshima cii." 
Ezekiel7:4 Ishe Yam ia tange u ga, man Me zungwe mhôônom kpaa ga; kpa Me tsaha u sha aeren a ou, man akaa a ou a ndôhôrshima a a lu ker atô wou la, man wea fa er Mo M lu TER ye." 
Ezekiel7:5 Ter AÔNDO ngu kaan nahan er: Kwagh u bo, ka kwagh u bo tseegh, nenge, ngu van;" 
Ezekiel7:6 mkur va, mkur va ve, a nder sha a we; nenge, ngu van." 
Ezekiel7:7 Iyevoron i á or u iyev va ve, we orteman shin tar ne; shighe va ve, iyange mgbôghom; iyange i ayôôso, kpa ka ikenge i iember sha iwo la ga." 
Ezekiel7:8 Ahegen yô, kera shi vese ga tsô, Me haa ishimavihin Yam sha a we, Me kure ishimavihin Yam sha a we, Me ôr u ijir sha aeren a ou; man Me tsaha u sha akaa ou a ndôhôrshima la cii." 
Ezekiel7:9 Ishe Yam ia tange ga, man shi Me zungwe mhôônom kpaa ga; Me tsaha u sha inja i aeren a ou cii, akaa a ou a ndôhôrshima a a lu ker atô wou la, man né fa er i lu Mo TER M lu tsahan ne ye." 
Ezekiel7:10 Nenge, iyange, nenge, i ngi van; mtim wou va ve; tôgh hôm, kpar, iyolmoron mende." 
Ezekiel7:11 Ipila vese hingir tôgh ku ifer; ma kwagh una shi ken a ve ga, shin sha mngee ve, shin sha inyaregh vegh kpaa ga, man shi ma icivir i hemban kpaa ia lu ken a ve ga." 
Ezekiel7:12 Shighe va ve, iyange mgbôghom, or u yamen a̱ de ember ga, man or u teen kpaa a̱ de zungu ga, gadia iyugh ngi sha ikpelaior ve cii." 
Ezekiel7:13 Gadia orteen una kera hide hen kwagh u i tee la ga, shin er nan lu uma her nahan kpaa; gadia mpase u sha mnenge ngu sha ikpelaior ve cii, ma or nana hide ga; man shi ma or nana taver uma u nan sha iferkwagh i nan ga." 
Ezekiel7:14 Ve tôngo ikpamkor, ve wa ago iyol, ve bee; kpa ma or ngu zan ityav ga; gadia ishima i vihin Yam ngi sha ikpelaior ve cii." 
Ezekiel7:15 Sanker ngu ken won, bouange man ijen mba kimi; u nan lu ken ityev á wua nan sha sanker, u nan lu ken gar ijen man bouange vea kar a nan kera." 
Ezekiel7:16 Shin er mbagenev vea war kpaa, vea lu sha iwo er mbaatii mba shin upev nahan, ve cii vea gber kwelegh, hanma or sha iferkwagh i nan." 
Ezekiel7:17 Ave cii aa shir livaa, man anu cii aa taver ga, er mngerem nahan." 
Ezekiel7:18 Vea ta ikondo uya; mciem maa haa ve iyol; kunya ua lu sha ishiv vev cii, man ityouv vev mbia kpur cii." 
Ezekiel7:19 Vea haa azurfa ve sha igbenda i ken gar, man zenaria ve kpaa una hingir er kwagh u hôngorough nahan; azurfa ve man zenaria ve vea fatyô u yiman ve sha iyange i iyugh i TER la ga; uma ve una ide sha mi ga, man vea iv iyav vev sha mi kpaa ga, gadia lu kwagh u nan ve gbev mbu nôngon sha u eren ifer la." 
Ezekiel7:20 Ve gema inyaregh kila ve er akaahweegh a mi, hingir kwagh u ihagh, shi ve var ieev vev mbi ndôhôrshima man akaa a ve a hôngorough a mi; sha ci u nahan yô, Me gema ki kia hingir ve kwagh u hôngorough je." 
Ezekiel7:21 Me gema ki Me na ikurior igen á hingir ve ishar i yan; man Me na aferaior a sha won sha u ve̱ kura ki kera, sha u ve̱ hôngor ami." 
Ezekiel7:22 Me gema ishigh Yagh her a ve kera kpaa, man á hôngor a ijiir Yam i injaa la, mbanumungbenda vea nyôr kimi man vea hôngor a i." 
Ezekiel7:23 Er ishirigh, gadia tar iv a ibo i awambe, gar la kpaa mgbough a ipila." 
Ezekiel7:24 Ka nahan man Me va a akuraior a hemban iferkwagh cii, a a ngohol uya vev ye; Me er ihagh i tan i mbaageev ia bee sha won; man á hôngor a ajiir a ve a tseghan la." 
Ezekiel7:25 Ishimanyian ngi van; vea ker bem, kpa vea zua a mi ga." 
Ezekiel7:26 Kwaghbo una dondo sha kwaghbo, man ahura di sha ahura; vea ker mpase u sha mnenge hen profeti; ityesen ia saa ishe hen pristi, man mhen di kpaa hen mbatamen." 
Ezekiel7:27 Tor una zungwe, man mciem maa haa ortaregh iyol, ave a ior mba hen tar la aa gbidye akarkase; Me er a ve sha aeren a ve, man ka sha inja i aeren a ve la, Me ôr ve ijir; man vea fa er Mo M lu TER ye." 
Ezekiel8:1 Tsô sha inyom i sha ataratar, uwer u sha ataratar la, ayange a u ataan la, er m tema m lu ken ya wam, man mbatamen mba Yuda kpaa tema lu sha ishigh yagh yô, nahan uwegh ku Ter AÔNDO va lu sha a mo heregh." 
Ezekiel8:2 Tsô m nenge, man nenge, kwagh lu, mluashe na lu er ka usu nahan, hii hen iwenge yem shin inya lu er ka usu nahan; man shi hii hen iwenge na kôndo, lu er ka iengem i amber nahan." 
Ezekiel8:3 Tsô A naregh kwagh, lu er ka uwegh nahan, a kôrom sha ice i sha ityou; tsô Jijingi kendem sha gbihi tar shin, gbihi kwavaôndo sha, man A yem a mo hen Yerusalem ken mbampase mba Aôndo, hen ijiir i nyôron hen hundagar u ker atô, u u ver ishigh ken imbusutarimese la, henpe eev mbu nan iwuhe lu, mbu bamen sha iwuhe la." 
Ezekiel8:4 Nenge, iengem i Aôndo u Iserael lu heregh, lu er ka mpase u m vande nengen a mi shin pev la nahan." 
Ezekiel8:5 Tsô A kaa a mo er: We, wan u or, shi kende ashe sha ken vegher u ken imbusutarimese la. Tsô m kende ashe sha ken vegher u ken imbusutarimese la, man nenge, vegher u ken imbusutarimese hen hundagar u hen atse a nanden nagh sha mi la, eev mbu nan iwuhe mbula lu her, hen ijir i nyôron i hundagar la." 
Ezekiel8:6 Tsô A kaa a mo er: Wan u or, u ngu nengen kwagh u ve eren kpa; ka akaa a ndôhôrshima a vesen a ya u Iserael a lu eren heen ne, sha u M̱ pav a ijiir Yam i tseghan, M̱ yem ca. Kpa ú shi ú va nenge akaa a ndôhôrshima a vesen agen." 
Ezekiel8:7 Nahan A va a mo hen ijiir i nyôron hen tembe la; zum u m kenger yô, nenge, ihura lu ken kpekpe." 
Ezekiel8:8 Tsô A kaa a mo er: wan u or, time kpekpe, pev un; tsô er m time kpekpe yô, nenge, hunda lu." 
Ezekiel8:9 Nahan A kaa a mo er: Nyôr ker, nenge akaa a ndôhôrshima a bo a ve eren ker yô." 
Ezekiel8:10 Nahan m nyôr, m nenge; nenge, hanma kwagh u kpelan iyav inya, man ishôso i ndôhôrshima, man ieev i ya u Iserael cii, i kpela foto ve sha kpekpe, ningir tser." 
Ezekiel8:11 Ior akunduatargber ken mbatamen mba ya u Iserael tile sha ishiv vev; Yaasania wan u Shafan kpaa lu a ve imôngo; hanma or lu a gbande u nan sha uwe, u nanden kwaghhumandoon a min; man ihuma i ibeenegh ki mnyim ma kwaghhumandoon la lu kôndon sha." 
Ezekiel8:12 Tsô A kaa a mo er: Wan u or, u nenge kwagh u mbatamen mba ya u Iserael ve lu eren ken ime, hanma or ken iyou i ieev mbi nan la kpa? Gadia mba kaan er: TER ngu nengen a vese ga; TER undu tar ne." 
Ezekiel8:13 Man shi A kaa a mo er: Shi ú va nenge akaa a ndôhôrshima a vesen agen a ve eren yô. 
Ezekiel8:14 Tsô A va a mo hen ijiir i nyôron i hunda u iyou i TER, u u ver ishigh sha imbusutarimese la; man nenge, ka heregh kasev tema lu vaan zungwen Tamushi ye." 
Ezekiel8:15 Nahan A kaa a mo er: We wan u or, u nenge kwagh ne kpa? shi ú va nenge akaa a ndôhôrshima a a hembe angan yô." 
Ezekiel8:16 Tsô A va a mo ken tembe u ken atô u iyou i TER la; yô, nenge, hen hunda u tempel u TER hen harga u puadwer a atse a nanden nagh sha mi la, ior lu her er ikundu kar utaan nahan, ve na ajime ken tempel u TER, ve ver ishiv sha ityoughkitaregh; ve lu guren iyange inya, veren ishigh sha ityoughkitaregh." 
Ezekiel8:17 Tsô A kaa a mo er: U nenge kwagh ne kpa, we wan u or? Ka ya u Yuda kwagh u kiriki er ve er akaa a ndôhôrshima a ve lu eren heen nee? Gadia ve iv tar ne sha ipila, man shi ve gema kpaa sha u vea bamem yô; man nenge, ve ver gbaakon sha ihinga ve." 
Ezekiel8:18 Sha ci u nahan yô, Mo kpaa Me yuwe, ishe Yam kpaa ia tange ga, man Me zungwe mhôônom kpaa ga; man shi vea genger imo vea vaa sha ato Am kpaa, nahan kpaa Me kera ungwa ve ga." 
Ezekiel9:1 Tsô A genger imo sha ato am, A kaa er: Kporom nen ikua ikua, ne mba ne nengen sha gar, hanma or a ikagh ki nan ki tswamegh ken uwe." 
Ezekiel9:2 Tsô nenge, ior ataratar za va sha gbenda u Hunda u Sha, u u ver ishigh sha imbusutarimese la, hanma or a ikagh nagh ki utya ken uwe; orgen lu a ve, cir akondo a pupuu iyol, lu a korough ku inki ku orngeren hen ikooso. Ve nyôr ve za tile hen kpe u atse a togula a nanden nagh sha mi la." 
Ezekiel9:3 Tsô iengem i Aôndo u Iserael mough sha cerubi, henpe i vande lun la, kar yem hen kpandehunda u iyou; A yila or u nan cir ikondo i pupuu iyol u nan lu a korough ku inki ku orngeren hen ikooso i nan la." 
Ezekiel9:4 TER maa kaa a nan er: Za kar ken atô u gar, ken atô u Yerusalem, ver ikav sha atsul a ior mba ve lu a asema a shirin man ve vaa sha ci u akaa a ndôhôrshima a i eren ken a na la cii." 
Ezekiel9:5 Man mbagenev mbala yô, A kaa a ve sha ato am er: Nyôr nen ken gar ken ijime na, wua nen; ishe yen i̱ de tangen ga, man shi de zungu nen mhôônom kpaa ga;" 
Ezekiel9:6 wua nen mbatamen man mbayevikaior man anuunaukase man mbayev mba kiriki man kasev; kpa de kera benden nen hanma or u nan lu a ikav la ave ga; hii nen hen icighanjiir wam je. Tsô ve hii sha mbatamen mba ve lu sha ishigh ki iyou la. 
Ezekiel9:7 Man A kaa a ve er: Hôngor nen a iyou la, iv nen ityembe sha mba i woo ve la, yem nen je. Tsô ve yem, ve gba wuan ior ken gar." 
Ezekiel9:8 Tsô, er ve lu wuan la yô, m shi her tswen, nahan m gure, m kuma ishigh inya, m vaa, m kaa mer: Ahii! Ter AÔNDO Ú tim asande a Iserael a a shi her ne cii sha mhee u iyugh You sha Yerusaleme?" 
Ezekiel9:9 Nahan A kaa a mo er: Iferkwagh i ya u Iserael man u Yuda i gba ikôr je cier iyol, man tar mgbough a awambe, man gar kpaa iv a mban u mimi; gadia mba kaan er: TER undu tar ne, man TER ngu nengen ga." 
Ezekiel9:10 Nahan Mo kpaa, ishe Yam ia tange ga, man shi Me zungwe mhôônom, ga, kpa Me hire ve a ieren ve la sha ityough vegh." 
Ezekiel9:11 Man nenge, or u a haa ikondo i pupuu iyol, u a lu a korough ku inki hen ikooso na la, a hide, a va kaa er: M er kwagh u U kaam Wer, m̱ er la, ve." 
Ezekiel10:1 Tsô m kenger, man nenge, sha kwavaôndo u lu sha ityough ki ucerubi la, kwagh lu ve vegher u sha er ka iwen i safir nahan, mwe na lu er ka ikônough ki torough nahan." 
Ezekiel10:2 Man A ôr kwagh a or u a cir ikondo i pupuu iyol la, a kaa er: Nyôr ken atô u akaver a ningir fing fing la, ka shin ityô i cerubi je la, iv ave ou ahar cii a akausu a kpenger kpenger hen atô u ucerubi, tsenda a sha gar. Nahan a nyôr sha ashe am." 
Ezekiel10:3 Ucerubi yô, tile hen iyou vegher u ken iyan, zum u or la za nyôr yô; ibeenegh gema iv sha tembe u her atô u iyou la." 
Ezekiel10:4 Tsô iengem i TER mough sha cerubi kera, kar yem hen kpandehunda u iyou; nahan iyou la iv a ibeenegh, man tembe kpaa iv a iengem i icivir i TER." 
Ezekiel10:5 I ungwa iov i akper a ucerubi zan zan hen tembe u ken won la, lu er ka imo i Aôndo u hemba agee cii zum u ka Una ôr kwagh yô." 
Ezekiel10:6 Tsô zum u A kaa a or u a cir ikondo i pupuu iyol la, er: Tôô usu ken atô u akaver a ningir fing fing la, ken atô u ucerubi yô—a nyôr a za tile ikua a ikaver." 
Ezekiel10:7 Tsô cerubi naregh uwegh nagh ker atô u ucerubi hen usu u u lu her atô u ucerubi la, a dugh u, a penda sha ave a or u a cir ikondo i pupuu iyol la, a maa a tôô u, a due." 
Ezekiel10:8 Tsô i nenge a kwagh hen ucerubi lu er ka uwegh ku orough nahan, lu ker akper a ve." 
Ezekiel10:9 Tsô m kenger, yô, nenge, akaver anyiin lu hen ucerubi mbala, ikaver môm hen cerubi môm, man ikaver ugen di hen cerubi ugen; man mluashe u akaver la lu er ka iwen i kerisoliti nahan." 
Ezekiel10:10 Man sha inja i mlu u a yô, a anyiin cii, lu inja i môm, lu er ikaver ken atô u ikaver nahan." 
Ezekiel10:11 Zum u a zenden yô, a zaan sha avegher a anyiin la cii; a kahan shighe u a lu zenden la ga, kpa henpe ityough kia ver ishigh yô, ka heregh a dondo ki ye; zum u a zenden yô, a kahan ga." 
Ezekiel10:12 Iyol ve cii, ajime a ve, man ave a ve, man akper a ve, kua akaver, mgbough a ashe ningir tser, ka akaver a ve anyiin a ve lu a mi la." 
Ezekiel10:13 Sha kwagh u akaver la yô, i yila iti sha ato am er: Ka akaver a ningir fing fing." 
Ezekiel10:14 Hanmô ve lu a ishiv inyiin, ishigh ki hiihii lu ishigh ki cerubi, man ishigh ki sha uhar lu ishigh ki orough, man ki sha utar lu ishigh ki begha, man ki sha unyiin lu ishigh ki gafa." 
Ezekiel10:15 Ucerubi kôndo sha; ka kwaghuma u lu m nenge hen kpeifi u Cebar je la. 
Ezekiel10:16 Zum u ucerubi vea yemen yô, akaver di kpaa a yemen a ve imôngo ken ambusu; man zum u ucerubi vea kenden akper a ve sha, sha u moughon shin tar yô, akaver di kpaa a kera gema sha ambusu a ve kera ga." 
Ezekiel10:17 Zum u vea tile yô, a kpaa a tile; man zum u vea mough yô, a kpaa a mough a ve imôngo; gadia jijingi u kwaghuma lu ken a." 
Ezekiel10:18 Tsô iengem i TER mough hen kpandehunda u iyou va tile sha ucerubi. 
Ezekiel10:19 Tsô ucerubi kende a kper a ve sha, ve mough shin tar kera, sha ashe am; er ve yemen yô, akaver kpaa lu a ve nongo; ve za tile hen ijiir i nyôron i hunda u iyou i TER u u lu vegher u sha ityoughkitaregh la; iengem i Aôndo u Iserael gema lu sha a ve vegher u sha." 
Ezekiel10:20 Ka kwaghuma u lu m nenge a mi ne, a lu Aôndo u Iserael vegher u shin hen ifi u Cebar la; man m kav er ve lu ucerubi yô." 
Ezekiel10:21 Hanmô ve lu a ishiv inyiin man hanmô kpaa lu a akper anyiin; kwagh u lun er ave a or nahan gema lu ken akper a ve. 
Ezekiel10:22 Man sha kwagh u mlu u ishiv vev yô, ka mbi m nenge a mi hen ifi u Cebar la, mluashe ve man ayol a ve kpaa, hanmô yem ken hemen jighilii." 
Ezekiel11:1 Tsô Jijingi kendem sha, A va a mo hen hunda u iyou i TER, u sha ityoughkitaregh u u ver ishigh sha ityoughkitaregh la; nenge, hen kpehunda la ior lu ikundu kar utaan, m nenge Yaasania wan u Asur ker atô ve kua Pelatia wan u Benaia, atiator." 
Ezekiel11:2 Man A kaa a mo er: Wan u or, ka ior mba ve henen iferkwagh je ne, mba ve ne mhen u bo ken gar ne." 
Ezekiel11:3 Mba kaan er: Ka a kuma pe maan ayou ga; gar ne ka ityegh je, man se gema se mba inyam." 
Ezekiel11:4 Sha ci u nahan yô, ôr kwaghôron u profeti sha a ve, ôr kwaghôron u profeti, we wan u or." 
Ezekiel11:5 Tsô Jijingi u TER gba sha a mo, A kaa a mo er: Kaa wer: TER ngu kaan nahan er: Kape ne kaa ne, we, ya u Iserael; M fa akaa a a nyer ne ken ishima cii." 
Ezekiel11:6 Ne wua ior ngee ken gar ne, ne iv igbenda na a mba i woo ve yô." 
Ezekiel11:7 Nahan yô, Ter AÔNDO ngu kaan nahan er: Ior mba ne woo ve ker atô gar la, ka ve ve lu inyam ye, man gar ne di gema ka ityegh; ne yô, Me due a ven ker atô na kera." 
Ezekiel11:8 Ne cia sanker, kpa ka sanker Me va a mi sha a ven ye, kape Ter AÔNDO A kaa ne." 
Ezekiel11:9 Me due a ven ker atô na kera, Me gema ne, Me na sha ikev i ikurior igen, Me ôr ne ijir Me tsaha ne." 
Ezekiel11:10 Á wua ne sha sanker; Me ôr ne ijir ken tar u Iserael; man nea fa er Mo M lu TER ye. 
Ezekiel11:11 Gar ne una lu ityegh yenegh ga, man ne kpaa né lu inyam ker atô na ga; Me ôr ne ijir ken ikighirtar i Iserael," 
Ezekiel11:12 man nea fa er Mo M lu TER ye; gadia ne zende sha akaawan a Am ga, man shi ne er sha akaaôron a jirigh a Am kpaa ga, kpa ne er sha aeren a akuraior a a kase ne la." 
Ezekiel11:13 Tsô er m lu ôron kwaghôron u profeti yô, Pelatia wan u Benaia maa kpe. Nahan m gure m kuma ishigh inya, m genger imo, m kaa mer: Uwu! Tere, AÔNDO! Ú bee asande a Iserael a a shi her ne purututu?" 
Ezekiel11:14 Kwaghôron u TER va her a mo, er:" 
Ezekiel11:15 We wan u or, ka anmgbianev ou, anmgbianev ou je, ityô you man ya u Iserael cii, ve cii, ka ve je man mba ve tem ken Yerusalem ve kaa a ve er: Mough yem nen ca a TER; ka se i ne se tar ne er u̱ lu u wase ye." 
Ezekiel11:16 Nahan yô, kaa wer: Ter AÔNDO ngu kaan nahan er: Shin er M yem a ve ca ken akuraior, man shi M sambe ve sha ityar ityar sha won, nahan kpaa, M hingir ve icighanjiir sha anyangem kpeghee sha ityar i ve yem ker la." 
Ezekiel11:17 Sha ci u nahan yô, kaa wer: Ter AÔNDO ngu kaan nahan er: Me kohol ne ken akuraior, Me due a ven ken ityar i i sambe ne ker la, Me na ne tar u Iserael." 
Ezekiel11:18 Vea hide heregh, vea due a akaa a hôngorough a u, kua akaa a ndôhôrshima cii, ken u kera." 
Ezekiel11:19 Me na ve u lun ishima i môm, Me ver jijingi u he ker a ve; Me dugh iwenshima ken iyol ve kera, Me na ve ishima i inyam;" 
Ezekiel11:20 sha u vea zende sha akaawan a Am man vea waan akaaôron a jirigh a Am iko, vea er sha a yô; vea hingir ior Av, Mo kpaa Me lu Aôndo ve." 
Ezekiel11:21 Kpa ve, mba ishima ve i ze sha akaa a ve a hôngorough man akaa a ve a ndôhôrshima yô, Me va a gbenda ve u bo sha ityouv vev, kape Ter Aôndo A kaa ne." 
Ezekiel11:22 Tsô ucerubi kende akper a ve sha, akaver la kpaa lu a ve nongo; man iengem i Aôndo u Iserael lu sha a ve vegher u sha." 
Ezekiel11:23 Iengem i TER mough ker atô u gar kera, va tile sha uwo u u lu gar vegher u sha ityoughkitaregh la." 
Ezekiel11:24 Nahan Jijingi kendem sha, va a mo, ken mpase u sha mnenge u sha Jijingi u Aôndo, ken Kaldia, hen mba ve lu uikangen la. Nahan mpase u m nenge a mi la kôndo yem sha, undum." 
Ezekiel11:25 Tsô m ôr ior mba ve lu uikangen la akaa a TER A tesem la cii. 
Ezekiel12:1 Kwaghôron u TER shi va her a mo er: 
Ezekiel12:2 Wan u or, u ngu teman ken atô u ior mba hendan kwagh, mba ve lu a ashe a nengen, kpa ve nengen ga yô, man ve lu a ato a ungwan, kpa ve ongo ga yô; gadia ka ior mba hendan kwagh je." 
Ezekiel12:3 Nahan yô, we wan u or, wa ikav mbi kohol iyol u yemen ken uikangen, yem ken uikangen atetan je sha ashe a ve, mough hen ijiir you i teman la, yem ijiir igen sha ashe a ve; alaghga vea ver ishima, shin er ve lu ior mba hendan kwagh nahan kpaa." 
Ezekiel12:4 Due a ikav you atetan sha ashe a ve, er ka ikav mbi yemen a mi ken uikangen, nahan we iyol you kpaa, mough aôndoaimegh sha ashe ve, er ka a yemen ken uikangen nahan." 
Ezekiel12:5 Time ihura ken kpekpe, pev, sha ashe a ve je, due aa mbi hen i." 
Ezekiel12:6 Tôô mbi sha vande sha ashe a ve je, due a mi ken ime; cir ishigh you sha er ú kera nenge a inya ga yô; gadia M ver u sha u u̱ lu ya u Iserael ikav." 
Ezekiel12:7 Tsô m er er i kaam nahan, M due a ikav yav atetan, er ka ikav mbi yemen a mi ken uikangen yô; m time ihura sha kpekpe aôndoaimegh, m pev sha uwegh agh; m due a mbi ken ime, m tôô mbi sha vande sha ashe a ve." 
Ezekiel12:8 Kwaghôron u TER va her a mo pepe er: 
Ezekiel12:9 Wan u or, ya u Iserael, ior mba hendan kwagh mbala, ve kera pine u er: Ka nyi u eren gaa?" 
Ezekiel12:10 We yô, kaa a ve wer: Ter AÔNDO ngu kaan nahan er: Kwaghôron ne ngu tesen sha kwagh u tor u ken Yerusalem, man sha ya u Iserael cii, mba ve lu ker yô." 
Ezekiel12:11 Kaa wer: Mo m ngu ne ikav, er m er nahan, kape á er a ve je la; vea undu tar ve, vea yem ken uikangen." 
Ezekiel12:12 Tor u a lu ken a ve la, una tôô ikav sha vande ken ime, una due; vea time ihura ken kpekpe vea pev, sha u duen a ikav her; una yisa ishigh nagh, gadia una kera nenge a inya sha ashe na ga." 
Ezekiel12:13 Me haa un kper Wam, man una gba ken kwaghhônon Wam; Me va a na hen Babilon ken tar u Mbakaldi; kpa una nenge a u ga, una kpe ker." 
Ezekiel12:14 Mba ve lu a na imôngo sha u wasen un la cii, man akumautya na cii, Me sambe ve sha ahumbe, sha hanma vegher cii; Me tsuwa sanker, Me cir ve ijime." 
Ezekiel12:15 Man vea fa er Mo m lu TER ye, zum u Me sambe ve ken akuraior man sha ityar ityar la." 
Ezekiel12:16 Kpa Me undu ior kpeghee ken a ve, mba sanker man ijen man bouange ve tim ve ga yô; sha u ve̱ pase akaa a ve a ndôhôrshima hen akuraior henpe vea za la; nahan vea fa er Mo M lu TER ye." 
Ezekiel12:17 Kwaghôron u TER shi va her a mo kaa er: 
Ezekiel12:18 Wan u or, ya kwaghyan wou a akarkase iyol, man ma mngerem ou gir gi gir a ishima i nyian;" 
Ezekiel12:19 kaa a ior mba hen tar la wer: Ter AÔNDO ngu kaan sha mba ve tem ken Yerusalem man tar u Iserael ne nahan er: Vea ya kwaghyan ve a ishima i nyian man vea ma mngerem a mkondoyol, sha ci u tar ve ua hingir ice, man akaa a a lu ken u cii, aa saa kera, sha ci u ipila i mba ve tem ken u la cii." 
Ezekiel12:20 Agar a ior ve tem ken a kpaa, á gema a á hingir ice, man tar la kpaa ua hingir gbilin; man nea fa er Mo M lu TER ye." 
Ezekiel12:21 Kwaghôron u TER va her a mo, er:" 
Ezekiel12:22 Wan u or, ka nyi injakwagh ne er ken tar u Iserael, ne kaan ner: Ayange nga karen man hanma mpase kpaa kur sha mi ga?" 
Ezekiel12:23 Nahan yô, kaa a ver wer: Ter AÔNDO ngu kaan nahan er: Me na injakwagh i i lu ôron ne ia bee, man vea kera ôr kwagh sha mi er ka injakwagh nahan ken Iserael ga; kpa kaa a ve wer: Ayange mgbôghom, kua mkur u hanma mpase kpaa." 
Ezekiel12:24 Gadia mpase u icughugh una kera lu ga, shin mtsengeôron kwagh u sha zwanyohon ken ya u Iserael kpaa ga." 
Ezekiel12:25 Gadia Mo M ngu TER; Me ôr kwagh, man kwagh u M kaa la una kure sha mi kpaa, una kera ngôôr ga; gadia we, ya u hendan kwagh, Me ôr kwagh sha ayange a en, man Me kure un kpaa, kape Ter AÔNDO A kaa ne." 
Ezekiel12:26 Tsô kwaghôron u TER shi va her a mo, er:" 
Ezekiel12:27 Wan u or, nenge, mba ken ya u Iserael mba kaan er: Mpase u a nengen la, ka u sha ayange a ken hemen kpishi je, man ngu ôron kwaghôron u profeti sha ayange a ken hemen ca." 
Ezekiel12:28 Nahan yô, kaa a ve wer: Ter AÔNDO ngu kaan nahan er: Ma kwaghôron Wam môm tsô kpaa, una kera timbir ga; kwaghôron u Me ôr una kure sha mi, kape Ter AÔNDO A kaa ne." 
Ezekiel13:1 Kwaghôron u TER va her a mo kaa er: 
Ezekiel13:2 Wan u or, ôr kwaghôron u profeti sha uprofeti mba Iserael mba ve er kwaghôron u profeti la, kaa a mba ve er kwaghôron u profeti sha asema a ve la wer: Ungwa nen kwaghôron u TER:" 
Ezekiel13:3 Ter AÔNDO ngu kaan nahan er: Kwagh á tser udangmbaprofeti mba ve dondon sha jijingi ve ayol a ve, mba ve nenge a ma kwagh ga yô." 
Ezekiel13:4 We, Iserael, uprofeti ou mba er ugbaseela mba hen ice nahan." 
Ezekiel13:5 Ne za tile sha ajiir a i hembe kpekpegar la ga, man ne maa kpekpegar sha ci u ya u Iserael sha u tilen ken utya sha iyange i TER kpaa ga." 
Ezekiel13:6 Ve nenge kwagh u icughugh man mtsengepasen u aiegh, ve mba ve kaan er: TER ngu kaan nahan, kpa TER tindi ve ga; nahan kpaa ve ver ishima er kwaghôron la una kure sha mi." 
Ezekiel13:7 Kera ka mpase u icughugh ne nenge, man mtsengepasen u aiegh ne ôr, er ne kaan ner: TER ngu kaan nahan, kpa M kaa ga ne, gaa?" 
Ezekiel13:8 Nahan yô, Ter AÔNDO ngu kaan nahan er: Er ne ôr kwagh u icughugh man ne nenge mpase u aiegh, sha ci u nahan yô, nenge, M ngu ihom a ven, kape Ter AÔNDO A kaa ne." 
Ezekiel13:9 Uwegh Agh kua lu ihom a uprofeti mba ve nengen mbampase mba icughugh man ve tsengepasen sha aie la: vea lu ken mkohol u ior Av ga, man á nger ati a ve ken ruamabera u ya u Iserael ga, shi vea nyôr ken tar u Iserael kpaa ga; nahan vea fa er Mo M lu Ter AÔNDO ye." 
Ezekiel13:10 Ka sha ci u, een, ka sha ci u ve tsume a ior Av, ve kaan er: Bem; kpa bem ngu ga; man aluer ior ve maa kpekpe yô, nenge, ve gema, ve shighe un ivue." 
Ezekiel13:11 Kaa a mba ve shighe ivue la wer, una gba; á nôô zegeura, mngerem maa sar avenge; ne awombo a tamen nea haa; man ijeverahumbe ia kar." 
Ezekiel13:12 Tsô zum u kpekpe una gba yô, á kera pine ne er: kwagh u ne shighe un a mi la ngu han, gaa?" 
Ezekiel13:13 Nahan yô, Ter AÔNDO ngu kaan nahan er: Me yôhôl un sha ijeverahumbe sha ishima i vihin Yam; á nôô zegeura, mngerem maa sar avenge sha iyugh Yam, man uzegembaawombov sha ishimavihin, sha u timin un." 
Ezekiel13:14 Kape Me yôhôl kpekpe u ne shighe un ivue la, Me yôhôl un je á mande shin inya; nahan imagh kia due sha; una gba man ne kpaa á tim ne kimi; man nea fa er Mo M lu TER ye." 
Ezekiel13:15 Kape Me kure iyugh Yam sha kpekpe, man sha mba ve shigh un ivue je la, man Me kaa a ven Mer: Kpekpe shon kera ngu ga, mba ve shigh un la cii kpaa kera mba ga;" 
Ezekiel13:16 ka uprofeti mba Iserael je la, mba ve er kwaghôron u profeti sha Yerusalem, man mba nengen mbampase mba bem sha ci na, kpa bem ngu ga, kape Ter AÔNDO A kaa ne." 
Ezekiel13:17 We wan u or, ver ishigh you sha u lun ihom a ônkasev mba ior ou, mba ve er kwaghôron u profeti sha asema a ve la; ôr kwaghôron u profeti a ve," 
Ezekiel13:18 kaa wer: Ter AÔNDO ngu kaan nahan er: Kwagh á tser kasev mba ve kor atsar sha azuanaveegh cii, man mba ve er akondo a yisan sha ityough ki hanma injaor sha u kôron ior. Ne soo u kôron ior Av, man u yiman ior sha ci u ayol a ene?" 
Ezekiel13:19 Ne heem ken ior Av, sha ci u zuan akevaveegh a sam u shair man avur a bredi, sha u wuan ior mba ve doo u ma ve kpe ga la, man shi sha u den ior mba i doo u ma ve lu uma ga la ka sha mbaaie enev mba ne ôr ior Av mba ve veren ato sha mbaaie yô." 
Ezekiel13:20 Nahan yô, Ter AÔNDO ngu kaan nahan er: Nenge, M ngu ihom a atsar a en a kangen, a ne ker ior a mi er ka inyon la, Me tôndo a sha ave a en kera; Me pase ior mba ne ker ve er ka inyon la, Me tuhwa." 
Ezekiel13:21 Akondo a en a yisan a sha ityou kpaa, Me ande a, man Me yima ior Av sha ikev yen, nahan vea kera lu sha ikev yen er ka kwagh u i ker un a kôr ga; man nea fa er Mo M lu TER ye." 
Ezekiel13:22 Sha ci u ne vihi ishima i mbaperapera sha aie, mba M vihi ve asema ga, man ne taver ave a iferor, sha er nana̱ de kera hiden ijime sha gbenda u nan u bo, nana̱ war ga." 
Ezekiel13:23 Nahan yô, né kera nenge a mpase u icughugh ga, man né kera tsengapasen kwagh kpaa ga; Me yima ior Av sha ikev yen; man nea fa er Mo M lu TER ye." 
Ezekiel14:1 Tsô mbagenev ken mbatamen mba Iserael va her a mo, ve va tema sha ishigh yagh." 
Ezekiel14:2 Nahan kwaghôron u TER va her a mo, er:" 
Ezekiel14:3 Wan u or, ior mban nyôr a akombo a ve ken asema a ve, man ve ver kwagh u nan gbev mbu nôngon u iferkwagh ve sha ishigh vegh je; nahan Me rumun Mer, ve̱ pinem kwagh je kpa?" 
Ezekiel14:4 Nahan yô, ôr ve kwagh, kaa a ve wer: Ter AÔNDO ngu kaan nahan er: Hanma or u ken ya u Iserael u nan nyer a akombo a nan ken ishima i nan man nan ver kwagh u nan gbev mbu nôngon u iferkwagh i nan sha ishigh ki nan, man nana va hen profeti yô, Mo TER Me kaa nan imo sha mi sha mngee u akombo a nan la;" 
Ezekiel14:5 sha u Me kôr asema a ya u Iserael, gadia ve cii ve pav a Mo sha akombo a ve la." 
Ezekiel14:6 Nahan yô, kaa a ya u Iserael wer: Ter AÔNDO ngu kaan nahan er: Gema nen asema; gema nen, undu nen akombo a en, man gema nen ishigh kera, sha akaa a en a ndôhôrshima la cii." 
Ezekiel14:7 Gadia hanma or u Iserael, shin u ken ikurior igen i i lu shir ken Iserael, u nan pav a Mo, nan nyer a akombo a nan ken ishima i nan, shi nan ver kwagh u nan gbev mbu nôngon u iferkwagh i nan sha ishigh ki nan, man nana va hen profeti sha u nana pinem kwagh yô, Mo Ter Me kaa nan imo sha mi, Mo iyol yam je;" 
Ezekiel14:8 Me ver ishigh sha orshon la, Me gema nan, nana hingir kwagh u kpilighyol man kwagh u veren ishor sha min. Me dugh nan ken atô u ior Av kera, man nea fa er Mo M lu TER ye." 
Ezekiel14:9 Aluer profeti shon la, nana rumun er i̱ bume nan, nana ôr kwagh yô, ka Mo TER M bum profeti la ye, Me naregh uwegh agh sha a nan, Me tim nan ken atô u ior Av Iserael kera." 
Ezekiel14:10 Vea ya mtsaha u sha iferkwagh ve la; iferkwagh i profeti la ia lu vough a i or u nan va pin kwagh la; 
Ezekiel14:11 sha u ya u Iserael a̱ de kera tsumen undun Mo ga, man ve̱ de kera hôngor ayol a ve sha afer a ve cii la ga; kpa ve̱ hingir ior Av, Mo di kpaa Me hingir Aôndo ve, kape Ter AÔNDO A kaa ne." 
Ezekiel14:12 Kwaghôron u TER va her a mo, er:" 
Ezekiel14:13 Wan u or, aluer ma tar ugen ua erem isholibo sha u gbihin mimi kera yô, man Me naregh uwegh Agh sha u, Me vihi kwaghyan u ve suur sha mi la kera, man Me tindi u a ijen, man Me wua or man zendenya ken u kera yô," 
Ezekiel14:14 shin er ior mba utar mban: Noa man Daniel man Yobu vea lu ken u kpaa, ka ve tseegh ma ve yem uma ve sha perapera ve ye, kape Ter AÔNDO A kaa ne." 
Ezekiel14:14 shin er ior mba utar mban: Noa man Daniel man Yobu vea lu ken u kpaa, ka ve tseegh ma ve yem uma ve sha perapera ve ye, kape Ter AÔNDO A kaa ne." 
Ezekiel14:15 Aluer Me na inyamikume ia zende ken tar la, man ia wua ior ken, u zan zan ua hingir ice, man ma or nana fatyô u karen ken u ga sha ci u inyamikume la yô," 
Ezekiel14:16 shin er ior mba utar mban vea lu ken u nahan kpaa, er M lu u uma ne, kape Ter AÔNDO A kaa ne, ma ve yom ônov mba nomso shin mba kasev kpaa ga; ka ve tseegh ma ve wer ye, kpa tar la yô, ua hingir ice." 
Ezekiel14:17 Shin aluer Me va a sanker sha tar shon la, Me kaa Mer: Sanker, za kar ken tar shon, zan zan M̱ wua or man zendenya cii ken u kera yô," 
Ezekiel14:18 shin er ior mba utar mban vea lu ken u kpaa, er M lu u uma ne, kape Ter AÔNDO A kaa ne, ma ve yom ônov mba nomso shin mba kasev kpaa ga, saa ayol a ve tseegh ma ve wer ye." 
Ezekiel14:19 Shin aluer Me tindi bouange ken tar shon la, man Me haa u iyugh Yam sha awambe, sha u wuan or man zendenya cii ken u kera yô," 
Ezekiel14:20 shin er Noa man Daniel man Yobu vea lu ken u kpaa, er M lu u uma ne, kape Ter AÔNDO A kaa ne, ma ve yem wan u nomso shin u kwase kpaa ga, saa uma ve tseegh, ma ve yem un sha perapera ve ye." 
Ezekiel14:20 shin er Noa man Daniel man Yobu vea lu ken u kpaa, er M lu u uma ne, kape Ter AÔNDO A kaa ne, ma ve yem wan u nomso shin u kwase kpaa ga, saa uma ve tseegh, ma ve yem un sha perapera ve ye." 
Ezekiel14:21 Gadia Ter AÔNDO ngu kaan nahan er: Man hire Mea tindi ajir a ôron a Am a anyiin a bo sha Yerusalem, ka sanker man ijen man inyamikume man bouange, sha u wuan or kua zendenya kera ciili!" 
Ezekiel14:22 Nahan kpaa, nenge, á undu asande ker a á due a a la, ka mbayev mba nomso man mba kasev; nenge, vea due vea va her a ven, man nea nenge gbenda ve man aeren a ve; man á sur ne asema sha kwaghbo u M ve a mi sha Yerusalem la, akaa a M ve un a mi la cii." 
Ezekiel14:23 Nahan vea sur ne ishima, zum u né nenge gbenda ve man aeren a ve yô; nahan nea fa er M gbe eren un akaa ne cii gbilin ga ye, kape Ter AÔNDO A kaa ne." 
Ezekiel15:1 Kwaghôron u TER va her a mo, er:" 
Ezekiel15:2 Wan u or, ka sha nyi je kon u wain u hembe doon a kon ugeneghe, gbaa u kon u wain u u lu shin ikô laa?" 
Ezekiel15:3 Á tôô kon na sha u gban ma kwagh a mini? Ior mba gberen u iwev sha u haren ma kwagh sha mi kpa? 
Ezekiel15:4 Nenge, i nande u sha usu; usu hia ityô na man zwa na bee, man tiôn u her atô kpaa kôr usu, nahan shi ngu a inja sha ma tom kpa?" 
Ezekiel15:5 Nenge, zum u a lu jimin la, a lu a inja sha ma tom ga, man hire hegen u usu u hie un kera, a bee, nahan shi una kuma ma tom kpa?" 
Ezekiel15:6 Nahan yô, Ter AÔNDO ngu kaan nahan er: Er kon u wain u u lu ken ikô, u M ne Mer i̱ keer usu a mi yô, kape M ne mba ve tem ken Yerusalem kpaa la." 
Ezekiel15:7 Me ver ishigh Yagh sha a ve sha ihom; ve due ken usu, nahan kpaa usu ua hia ve; man vea fa er Mo M lu TER ye, zum u Me ver ishigh Yagh sha a ve sha ihom la." 
Ezekiel15:8 Man Me gema tar la ua hingir ice, sha ci u ve gbihi mimi ve kera yô, kape Ter AÔNDO A kaa ne." 
Ezekiel16:1 Kwaghôron u TER va her a mo er: 
Ezekiel16:2 Wan u or, pase Yerusalem aeren a na ndôhôrshima la," 
Ezekiel16:3 kaa a na wer: Ter AÔNDO ngu kaan a Yerusalem nahan er: Mdugh wou man mmar wou ka ken tar u Kanaan, teru ka Oramor man ngôu ka kwase u Hiti." 
Ezekiel16:4 Sha kwagh u mmar wou yô, sha iyange i i mar u la, i tôndo u tsombo ga, man i ôô u iyol sha mnger sha u wanger we ga; bar kpaa i shighe u iyol ga, man shi i wa u ken ikondo kpaa ga." 
Ezekiel16:5 Ma ishe zungwe u mhôônom sha u eren we akaa angan, sha mhôônom ma zungwen ga; kpa i ta u kera ken ikôngo, gadia i nyagh u sha iyange i i mar u la je." 
Ezekiel16:6 Er M kar her a we, M nenge u lu nôngon ken awambe a ou yô, M kaa a we ken awambe a ou, Mer: Lu uma; een, M kaa a we ken awambe ou, Mer: Lu uma." 
Ezekiel16:7 M er u, u ngee iyenge er imendenev mbi ken toho nahan, u vese, u tav, u hia, u va atumba, ice you kpaa mende; nahan kpaa u lu idyelegh deleghee." 
Ezekiel16:8 Nahan zum u M kar her a we, man M kenger we yô, nenge, shighe wou u doon ishima kuma; nahan M haa u riga wam iyol, M cir u idyelegh wou; een, M bum a we man M tôndo zwa a we, kape Ter AÔNDO A kaa ne, nahan u hingir u Wam." 
Ezekiel16:9 Nahan M ôô u sha mnger, M ôô awambe a ou kera purututu, man M shighe u mkurem." 
Ezekiel16:10 M cir u ikondo i hwe iyol, M wa u akôvangahar a sha ikôvough ki ayu man M zer u ikondo i lugh lugh man M haa u ikondo i shiliti iyol." 
Ezekiel16:11 M er u hwe anza kposo kposo, M wa u ahye sha ave man ishirigh sha mon." 
Ezekiel16:12 M wa u kunya sha ihinga, man asa ken ato, man idyer i tor i doon ashe sha ityou kpaa." 
Ezekiel16:13 Kape i er u hwe sha zenaria man azurfa ne; akondo a ou kpaa lu sha ikondo i lugh lugh man shiliti man tom u sha hwe; u ya mwem ma kengese man iyough man mkurem; u hingir dedoo tsung mimi je, u zua a mkpeyol zan zan ar sha mlu u tor." 
Ezekiel16:14 Iti you za gwa ken akuraior sha ci u mdooashe wou; gadia a iv, sha mkendesha Wam u M kende u yô; kape Ter AÔNDO A kaa ne." 
Ezekiel16:15 Kpa u suur sha mdooashe wou, man u er idya sha ci u gwa u iti you la, u haa ijimba you sha hanma or u karen cii, i hingir i nan." 
Ezekiel16:16 U pande akondo a ou, u er ajiir a taven sha, a lun a hwe anza kposo kposo, u er idya sha a; ambaakaa angan vande lun ga, man shi doo u aa va lu nahan kpaa ga." 
Ezekiel16:17 Man shi u tôô ikav you mbi hweev mbi sha zenaria Wam man sha azurfa Wam mbi M ne u yô, u er ieev mbi nomso a mi, u er idya sha mi." 
Ezekiel16:18 U tôô akondo a ou a sha hwe, u cir mbi iyol, man u ver mkurem Am man kwaghhumandoon Wam sha ishiv mbi mbi." 
Ezekiel16:19 Kwaghyan Wam u M ne u kpaa, mwem ma kengese ma m koso u sha mi kua mkurem man iyough, u ver mbi sha ishi sha ci u ihuma i dedoo; kape i lu la, kape Ter AÔNDO A kaa ne." 
Ezekiel16:20 Man shi ônov ou mba nomso man mba kasev, mba u marem la, u gema ve u na mbi nagh a mi, sha u ve̱ hingir kwaghyan u mbi. Idya you la, ka kwagh u kiriki," 
Ezekiel16:21 er shi u gem u woo ônov Av, u ne ve, i̱ nande ve sha usu sha ci u mbi?" 
Ezekiel16:22 Ken akaa a ou a ndôhôrshima cii man ijimba you i eren la, u kera umbur ayange a iyev ou ga, zum u u lu idyelegh deleghee, u lu nôngon ken awambe ou la." 
Ezekiel16:23 Tsô ken masetyô u iferkwagh you cii yô, uwu! Kwagh á tser u! Kape Ter AÔNDO A kaa ne." 
Ezekiel16:24 U maa iyou i sha man u er ijiir i taven sha, sha hanma tembe." 
Ezekiel16:25 U maa ijiir i taven sha sha hanma akahar a igbenda cii, man u gema mdooashe wou, hingir kwagh u ndôhôrshima, man u na iyol you hen hanma or u karen, u seer idya you." 
Ezekiel16:26 U er idya a Mbaigipiti kpaa, mba wan ndor a we, mba ve mgbough a asaren a bo; u seer idya you sha ci u bamen Mo." 
Ezekiel16:27 Nahan nenge, M naregh uwegh Agh sha a we, M pande kwaghyan wou, M gema u, M na u sha ikev i mba ve ker u ihom la, ka ônkasev mba Mbafiliti, mba kunya u ker ve sha ci u aeren a ou a ijimbagh la." 
Ezekiel16:28 U er idya a Mbaashiria kpaa, gadia isharen you i bee ga; een, u er idya a ve, nahan kpaa kuma u ga." 
Ezekiel16:29 Man shi u seer idya you zan zan ar ken tar u ior mba zenden kpenga, ka ken Kaldia je la; nahan kpaa kuma u sha i ga." 
Ezekiel16:30 Isharen ngohol we ishima cii, kape Ter AÔNDO A kaa ne, er u eren akaa angan cii yô, ka tom u idyakwase u lun a kunya ga;" 
Ezekiel16:31 gadia u maan iyou you i sha, sha akahar a igbenda cii, man u er ijiir i taven sha sha hanma tembe; nahan kpaa u er er idyakwase nahan ga, gadia u laha inyaregh." 
Ezekiel16:32 Kwase u eren idya u nan nyer a mbavannya er nan lu a nom u nan her je! 
Ezekiel16:33 Mba ne uidyambakasev cii iwua, kpa we yô, u gema u ne mbadoon we ishima cii iwua, u ulugh ve sha i, sha u ve̱ va her a we hanma ian sha ci u idya you." 
Ezekiel16:34 Inja you ngi kposo a kasev mbagenev sha idya you i eren la, gadia ma or keren we sha u eren idya a we ga; man shi u kimbin inyaregh, kpa we yô, mba kimbin we ga, kape u lu kposo je ne." 
Ezekiel16:35 Nahan yô, we idyakwase, ungwa kwaghôron u TER;"
