Ezekiel16:36 Ter AÔNDO ngu kaan nahan er: Sha ci u kunya wou due ken igbar, man i bugh idyelegh wou sha idya you i eren a mbadoon we ishima la, man sha ci u akombo ou a ndôhôrshima la cii, man sha ci u awambe a mbayev ou mba u ne a la," 
Ezekiel16:37 sha ci u nahan yô, nenge, Me kohol mbadoon we ishima cii mba u doo ve yum la, man mba ve doo u cii, kua mba u ker ve ihom la kpaa; Me kohol ve sha hanma vegher, Me va a ve her a we, Me pase ve idyelegh wou, sha u ve̱ nenge idyelegh wou cii ken igbar." 
Ezekiel16:38 Me ôr u imbajir i ka i ôr kasev mba ve vihi ityendezwa i ivôson sha idya la, man i mba ve hee awambe la, Me va a awambe a iyugh man iwuhe sha a we." 
Ezekiel16:39 Me gema u Me na sha ikev ve, vea yôhôl iyou you i sha man vea vihi ajiir a ou a taven sha la, man vea er akondo a ou kera, vea ngohol akaa ou a hweegh la, vea undu u idyelegh deleghee." 
Ezekiel16:40 Vea kohol ikpelaior sha a we kpaa, vea ta u awen, man vea kuma u sha usanker vev." 
Ezekiel16:41 Vea nande ayou a ou sha usu, vea ôr u ijir, vea tsaha u sha ishigh ki kasev kpishi; nahan Me na ú de idya, man shi ú kera kimbi inyaregh ki idyakwase kpaa ga." 
Ezekiel16:42 Ka nahan man Me na ishimavihin Yam i sha a we la ia mem ye, iwuhe Yam kpaa ia pav a we, nahan Me mem, Me kera seer u yuwen ga." 
Ezekiel16:43 Sha ci u u umbur ayange a iyev ou ga, man u bamem sha akaa angan cii, sha ci u nahan yô, nenge, Mo kpaa me hire u a aeren a ou sha ityough you, kape Ter AÔNDO A kaa ne. U er ijimba u seer sha akaa a ou a ndôhôrshima cii la gaa?" 
Ezekiel16:44 Nenge, hanma or u nan er kwagh sha anzaakaa, nana ôr injakwagh ne sha a we, er: Er ngô a lu nahan, kape wan na u kwase kpaa a lu je ne:" 
Ezekiel16:45 U ngu wankwase u ngôu je, u a nyagh nom na man ônov nav; man u ngu anngô u kwase, u anngôôv ou mba kasev, mba ve nyagh noov vev man ônov vev; ngôu lu kwase u Hiti man teru lu Oramor." 
Ezekiel16:46 Wanngôu u tamen u kwase ka Samaria, u a tema ken uwegh ough ku imesegh la, un a ônov nav mba kasev; man anngôu u kiriki u kwase, u a tema ken uwegh ough ku yanegh la, ka Sodom ma ônov nav mba kasev." 
Ezekiel16:47 Nahan kpaa, u zenden sha igbenda ve ga, man u er sha akaa a ve a ndôhôrshima kpaa ga; ica gba ga tsô u hemba eren dang a ve sha igbenda you cii." 
Ezekiel16:48 Er M lu u uma ne, kape Ter AÔNDO A kaa ne: Sodom anngôu u kwase man ônov nav mba kasev, ve er er we man ônov ou mba kasev ne er nahan, ga." 
Ezekiel16:49 Nenge, ka iferkwagh i anngôu u kwase, Sodom ne: iyolgengese, u iden sha kwaghyan, man u lun ken mkpeyol bem bem a ônov nav mba kasev cii; man shi a wase mbaatsanev man mbaibanave ga." 
Ezekiel16:50 Ve manger man ve er kwagh u ndôhôrshima sha ishigh Yagh, nahan M kar a ve kera, zum u M nenge nahan la." 
Ezekiel16:51 Samaria je kpaa er vegher u isholibo you tsô kpaa ga; kpa u er akaa a ndôhôrshima hemba a ve, je u na anngôôv ou mba kasev hingir er ka mbaishôôv sha akaa a ou a ndôhôrshima a u er la cii." 
Ezekiel16:52 We kpaa, ya ase kunya wou, sha ci u u pande ibo i anngôôv ou mba kasev; sha asorabo a ou a u er, a a hemba ndôhôr ishima a a ve la, ve hemba u perapera. Nahan we kpaa va ahenge, ya kunya wou, sha er u ne anngôôv ou mba kasev ve hingir er ka mbaishôôv yô." 
Ezekiel16:53 Me dugh a ve ken kwar, ka kwar u Sodom man ônov nav mba kasev, man kwar u Samaria man ônov nav mba kasev, man kwar u mbakwarev ou ken atô ve;" 
Ezekiel16:54 sha u u̱ ya kunya wou man u̱ va ahenge sha akaa a u er la cii, a a hingir ve kwagh u surun ishima yô." 
Ezekiel16:55 Anngôôv ou mba kasev, Sodom man ônov nav mba kasev, vea hide sha mlu ve u tsuaa la, man Samaria man ônov nav mba kasev kpaa, vea hide sha mlu ve u tsuaa la; we di a ônov ou mba kasev kpaa nea hide sha mlu wen u tsuaa la." 
Ezekiel16:56 Gadia u ôr kwagh, u ter anngôu u kwase Sodom sha ayange a ou a tan ihagh" 
Ezekiel16:57 zum u i lu a pase iferkwagh you ken igbar ga la, ga; man ahegen yô, u hingir kwagh u nahantar hen ônkasev mba Shiria man mba ve kase un la cii, kua ônkasev mba Mbafiliti, mba ve hee u hanma ian yô." 
Ezekiel16:58 U tôô ibo i ijimba you man akaa a ou a ndôhôrshima, kape TER Akaa ne." 
Ezekiel16:59 Gadia Ter AÔNDO ngu kaan nahan er: Me er a we sha ieren you la, we u u lahan mbum u vihi ikuryan ne." 
Ezekiel16:60 Nahan kpaa, Me umbur ikuryan Yam a we sha ayange a iyev ou la, man shi Me ya ikur i tsôron a we." 
Ezekiel16:61 Nahan wea umbur igbenda you man ú va ahenge, zum u ú ngohol anngôôv ou mba kasev, anngôôv ou mbatamen man mba kiriki la, Me gema ve me na u, vea hingir ônov ou mba kasev, kpa á lu sha ikuryan i i ya a we la ga." 
Ezekiel16:62 Me taver ikuryan a we, nahan ú fa er Mo M lu TER yô," 
Ezekiel16:63 sha u u̱ umbur man u̱ va ahenge, man u̱ kera seer u bughun zwa wou ga, sha ci u kunya wou, zum u M de u akaa a ou a u er cii yô, kape Ter AÔNDO A kaa ne." 
Ezekiel17:1 Tsô kwaghôron u TER va her a mo, kaa er:" 
Ezekiel17:2 Wan u or, ta kikya, ôr ya u Iserael injakwagh;" 
Ezekiel17:3 kaa wer: Ter AÔNDO ngu kaan nahan er: Zegegafa a akper a vesen a lihen kpaa, mgbough a ingur iyol, i i nger anza kposo kposo yô, va hen Lebanon, va tôndo ityough ki kon u sedar;" 
Ezekiel17:4 a tôndo agbaa a kiriki a sha azengel a na, a tôô a za a mi ken tar u i zenden kpenga ker yô; a za ver ken gar u mbayamen kasua." 
Ezekiel17:5 Shi a tôô ivor i ken tar la, a va lôô ken inya i dedoo; a va ver henpe mngerem ma ngee la; a lôô i er kon u hen kpemnger nahan;" 
Ezekiel17:6 I vese, i hingir kon u wain u tan agbaa samber taven sha ga, agbaa a u shir a shir shin inya man amise a u kpaa lu shin tine i u; kape i hingir kon u wain la, u ta agbaa, u hôm." 
Ezekiel17:7 Zegegafa ugen kpaa lu, lu a uzegembaakperev, wa ingur kpishi; tsô nenge, kon u wain ne hurugh amise a u u zan hen a na, u naregh agbaa a u kpaa u zan hen a na, due shin inya henpe i lôô u la, sha u a̱ ur u mngerem." 
Ezekiel17:8 I lôô u ken inya i dedoo, henpe mngerem ma lu kpishi, sha u u̱ ta agbaa, u̱ ume atam, u̱ hingir kon u wain u dedoo." 
Ezekiel17:9 Kaa wer: Ter AÔNDO ngu kaan nahan er: Á kpe u iyol je kpa? Una kera wuhe amise a u, man Una kera gber atam a u; man uihômon mba u cii kpaa vea use gaa? Ka sha agee a vesen, shin sha mngee u ior man á wuhe u shin amise a u ga." 
Ezekiel17:10 Een, nenge, er i lee u nahan kpaa, á kpe u iyol je kpa? Ua kera use purututu zum u ahumbe a sha ityoughkitaregh a va sha u la ua use hen ijiir i u mende la je, gaa?" 
Ezekiel17:11 Kwaghôron u TER shi va her mo, kaa er:" 
Ezekiel17:12 Shi ôr kwagh a ya u hendan kwagh ne, kaa wer: Akaa ne wanger ne gaa? Kaa a ve nahan wer: Nenge, tor u Babilon va hen Yerusalem, va kôr tor na man mbatarev nav, yem a ve her a na ken Babilon." 
Ezekiel17:13 A tôô ugen ken tsombor u tor, a ya ikur a na, a er un a bum; man shi mbautahav hen tar la a kura ve kera;" 
Ezekiel17:14 sha u tartor la u̱ gba ijime, u̱ de kera kenden iyol i u sha ga, u̱ wa ikuryan na iko man ua tile her ye." 
Ezekiel17:15 Kpa ngula gema hendan a na gadia a tindi mbatyomov nav hen Igipiti, sha er ve̱ na un anyinya man mbautyav kpishi yô. Á kpe un iyol je kpa? U nan eren ambaakaa ne, nana̱ war je kpa? Er nan vihi ikuryan, nahan kpa shi nana wara?" 
Ezekiel17:16 Er M lu u uma ne, kape, Ter AÔNDO A kaa ne, mimi je, ken ijiir i tor a tem, u a va ker un tor la, un u mbum na a laha la, man shi a vihi ikuryan na la, ka hen a na ken atô u Babilon je una kpe ye." 
Ezekiel17:17 Farao kpaa a akumautya na a vesen man ior kpishi, vea wase un ken utya ga, zum u á va ta atihi a inyaagh a maa ayouautya a taver, sha u wuan ior kpishi la." 
Ezekiel17:18 Gadia a laha mbum er a vihi ikuryan kera yô; man nenge, a vande nan uwegh je, nahan kpaa a er akaa angan cii; una war je ga." 
Ezekiel17:19 Nahan yô, Ter AÔNDO ngu kaan nahan er: Er m lu u uma ne, mimi je, mbum Wam u a laha, man ikuryan Yam i a vihi la, Me hire a mi sha ityough nagh." 
Ezekiel17:20 Me samber kper Wam sha a na, á kôr un ken kwaghhônon Wam, Me va a na ken Babilon, Me za ôr un ijir keela sha ci u mimi ga ve, u ve er a Mo sha mimi ga la." 
Ezekiel17:21 Mbayevese ken a na cii, ken akum a na cii, sanker una wua ve, man mba ve shi her yô, á sambe ve sha ahumbe hanma vegher cii; nahan man né fa er i lu Mo TER M kaa kwagh ne ye." 
Ezekiel17:22 Ter AÔNDO ngu kan nahan er: Mo kpaa, Me tôndo gbaa sha azengel a kon u sedar u taven sha la, Me môôr un; sha azengel a na la, Me asegh gbaa u kiriki u masen hômon, Me môôr un sha uwo u taven sha tser tser;" 
Ezekiel17:23 ka sha uwo u Iserael u taven sha la, Me môôr un ye; una ta agbaa, una ume atam, una hingir kon u sedar u dedoo; inyon atô kposo kposo ia tema shin itine i u; ka shin mure u agbaa a u ia tema ye." 
Ezekiel17:24 Nahan ikon i ken toho cii ia fa er ka Mo TER M hidi a kon u taven la ijime, man M kende a kon u tav ga la sha, M er kon u ndor, u uma kera, man M er kon u ombor u hôm; ka Mo TER M kaa kwagh ne ye, shi Me er un kpaa." 
Ezekiel18:1 Kwaghôron u TER shi va her a mo er: 
Ezekiel18:2 Er nan man ne er injakwagh ne sha tar u Iserael, ne kaan ner: Uter ya atam a wain a angen, man anyi kar dura mbayeve?" 
Ezekiel18:3 Er M lu u uma ne, kape, Ter AÔNDO A kaa ne: Né zua a ityôkwagh i ôron injakwagh ne ken Iserael ga." 
Ezekiel18:4 Nenge, uuma cii ka mba Av je, uma u ter kua uma u wan kpaa ka u Wam je; or u nan eren isholibo yô, ka nan nana kpe ye." 
Ezekiel18:5 Kpa aluer or nana lu or u perapera, nana er kwagh u a lu sha tindi vough man sha mimi kpaa," 
Ezekiel18:6 nana ya kwagh sha iwo ga, nana kende ashe sha akombo a ya u Iserael kpaa ga, nana vihi kwase u or u wan ndor a nan ga, man nana va ikua a kwase hen shighe u a dugh won kpaa ga," 
Ezekiel18:7 man nan kighir orgen sha apera ga, kpa nan hidi a ityungu hen or u yan nan injô, man nan ngohol ma or kwagh sha agee ga, kpa nan ne mba ijen i ker ve kwaghyan, man nan cirin mbalun idyelegh akondo iyol," 
Ezekiel18:8 man nan ne injô, nan we mngerem ga, man nan ngohol mtsera kpaa ga, nan dugh uwegh ku nan sha kwaghbo kera, nan er ijir sha mimi hen atô u orgen a orgen," 
Ezekiel18:9 nan zenden ken akaawan a Am, man nan we akaaôron a Am a jirigh iko, sha u eren sha mimi, ka nan nan lu orperapera ye, nana lu uma kpee je, kape Ter AÔNDO A kaa ne." 
Ezekiel18:10 Aluer nana mar wan u numun gbenda, u haan awambe a ior inya, u eren ma kwagh ken akaa ne yô," 
Ezekiel18:11 man a we ma kwagh ken a iko ga, kpa una ya kwagh sha iwo, man una vihi kwase u or u wan ndor a na kpaa," 
Ezekiel18:12 una kighir mbaatsanev man mbaibanave sha apera, una ngohol kwagh sha agee man una hide a ityungu ga, man una kende ashe na sha akombo, una er akaa a ndôhôrshima," 
Ezekiel18:13 una na injô una wa mngerem una ngohol mtsera, nahan shi una lu umaa? Mayange una lu uma ga. A er akaa a ndôhôrshima ne cii; á wua un kpee; ike i awambe a na ia hide sha ityough nagh." 
Ezekiel18:14 Kpa nenge, aluer nana mar wan u a nengen a asorabo a ter na a eren la cii, kpa a cie, a er ambaakaa ne ga," 
Ezekiel18:15 man a ye kwagh sha iwo ga, a kenden ashe sha akombo a ya u Iserael la kpaa ga, a vihi kwase u or u wan ndor a na ga," 
Ezekiel18:16 a kighir ma or sha apera kpaa ga, a ngohol ma kwagh sha ityungu ga, a ngohol kwagh sha agee kpaa ga, kpa a ne mbaijenev kwaghyan na, man a cirin mbalun idyelegh ikondo iyol," 
Ezekiel18:17 a dugh uwegh ku nan sha kwaghbo kera, a ngohol mngerem sha injô ga, shin mtsera kpaa ga, a eren sha akaaôron Am a jirigh, man a zenden sha akaawan a Am, una kpe sha ci u iferkwagh i ter na la ga, una lu uma kpee je." 
Ezekiel18:18 Kpa ter na la yô, er a kighir sha apera man a ngohol anngô na kwagh sha agee, man a er kwagh u a lu dedoo a ior nav kpaa ga, nenge, una kpe sha ci u ifer na." 
Ezekiel18:19 Kpa ne mba kaan ner: Ka sha ci u nyi man wan á ya ican sha ci u ibo i ter na ga? Kpa wan yô, er kwagh sha tindi vough man sha mimi, man a wa akaawan a Am cii iko, a er sha a kpaa, una lu uma kpee je." 
Ezekiel18:20 Or u nan er isholibo yô, ka nan nana kpe ye; wan una ya ican sha ci u ibo i ter na ga, man ter di kpaa una ya ican sha ci u ibo i wan na ga; perapera u ormimi una lu sha a nan, man ifer i or u bo di kpaa ia hide sha ityough ki nan." 
Ezekiel18:21 Kpa aluer iferor nana gema á undu asorabo a nan cii, a nan lu eren la, man nana waan akaawan a Am cii iko, man nana eren sha tindi vough man sha mimi kpaa yô, nana lu uma kpee je, nana kpe ga." 
Ezekiel18:22 Á kera umbur ma iferkwagh i môm i nan er ga; sha perapera u nan er la, nana lu uma." 
Ezekiel18:23 Ku u iferor doomoo? Kape Ter AÔNDO A kaa ne; kera sarem er ma nan gem ishima ma nan undu gbenda u nan, ma nan zough a uma gaa?" 
Ezekiel18:24 Kpa aluer orperapera nana gema á undu perapera u nan man nana er iferkwagh nana eren akaa a ndôhôrshima a iferor nan eren yô, nahan nana lu uma jee? Á kera umbur aerenakaa a nan a perapera a nan lu eren la kwa môm tsô kpaa ga; ka sha ci u mimi ga u nan man sha ci isholibo i nan er la je, nana kpe ye." 
Ezekiel18:25 Nahan kpaa, ne mba kaan ner: Gbenda u TER ngu vough ga. Ungwa nen ase; we ya u Iserael: Gbenda Wam ngu vough ga zee? Kera ka igbenda yen i lu vough ga ye, gaa?" 
Ezekiel18:26 Zum u orperapera nan gem nan undu perapera u nan, man nan er iferkwagh yô, nana kpe sha i; ka sha iferkwagh i nan er la, nana kpe ye." 
Ezekiel18:27 Shi zum u iferor nan gem nan undu iferkwagh i nan i nan er la, man nan er kwagh sha tindi vough man sha mimi yô, nana lu uma her." 
Ezekiel18:28 Er nan gem nan undu aeren a sha mi ga, a nan la cii, a nan er la yô, nana lu uma kpee je, nana kpe ga." 
Ezekiel18:29 Nahan kpaa ya u Iserael ngu kaan er: Gbenda u TER ngu vough ga. We, ya u Iserael igbenda Yam ngi vough ga zee? Kera ka igbenda yen i lu vough ga ye, gaa?" 
Ezekiel18:30 Sha ci u nahan yô, we ya u Iserael, Me kure ne ijir, hanmô sha aeren a nan, kape Ter AÔNDO A kaa ne. Gema nen asema, undu nen asorabo a en cii; a̱ de kera hingir ne kwagh u nan gbev mbu nôngon eren iferkwagh ga." 
Ezekiel18:31 Haa nen asorabo a en, a ne er la cii kera, wa nen ishima i he man jijingi u he kpaa, gadia ka sha ci u nyi né kpe, we ya u Iseraele?" 
Ezekiel18:32 Gadia saan Mo iyol a ku u or u nan kpe la ga, kape Ter AÔNDO A kaa ne; nahan yô, gema nen asema lu nen uma." 
Ezekiel19:1 Nahan yô, gber kwelegh sha ci u uityombaiorov mba Iserael;" 
Ezekiel19:2 kaa wer: Ngôu lu ngôbegha zee! A yav her atô u ubegha; ka ker atô u agum a ubegha, a koson ônov nav ye." 
Ezekiel19:3 A yese wan na ugen, hingir gumbegha; a hen ikôr i yaren, a ya ior." 
Ezekiel19:4 Akuraior ungwa gwa na, i kôr un ken ihungwa ve i hônon; ve va a na sha utsuwe ken ta u Igipiti." 
Ezekiel19:5 Yô, zum u a nenge er a kegh yum, man ishimaverenkeghen na kpaa bunde kera yô, a tôô wan na ugen, a gema un hingir gumbegha." 
Ezekiel19:6 A zenden ker atô u ubegha; a hingir gumbegha; a hen ikôr i yaren, a ya ior." 
Ezekiel19:7 A vihi uya mba utor, a hembe agar a ve a vesen; tar la hingir ice kua m-iv u u, sha ci u ihuran i ikume na la." 
Ezekiel19:8 Nahan akuraior kohol iyol, mough iyongo a na sha hanma ipaventar; ve samber kper ve sha a na; i kôr un ken ihungwa ve i hônon." 
Ezekiel19:9 Ve wa un ken keiji a utsuwe, ve va a na hen tor u Babilon, ve nyôr a na ken ayouautya a taver, sha er á kera ungwa imo na sha iwo i Iserael ga yô." 
Ezekiel19:10 Ngôu lu er kon u wain nahan, zum u u lu iyev la, u i môôr un hen kpemnger; a ume atam dedoo, a mgbough a agbaa sha ci u mngee u mnger la." 
Ezekiel19:11 A lu a agbaa a taver, hingir atô a uityombaiorov; a tav je, a due a ityough sha hen ahu a wan mgbigh mgbigh; a tav sha tser tser a agbaa a u, a ngeen la." 
Ezekiel19:12 Kpa i wuhe un kera sha ishima i vihin, i ta un inya; ahumbe a sha ityoughkitaregh uma atam a u; i kever agbaa a u, a taver la, usu hia a kera." 
Ezekiel19:13 Hegen i môôr un ken taaikôngo ken tar u iombor u imura i ker her yô. 
Ezekiel19:14 Usu due ken agbaa a na hia atam a na, nahan i kera shi ma gbaa u taver u una va hingir tôgh ku torough ga. Ngun ka kwelegh je, hingir kwelegh kpaa." 
Ezekiel20:1 Tsô sha inyom i sha utaankaruhar uwer u sha utaan, ayange a u pue la, mbatamen mba Iserael mbagenev va sha u va pinen TER kwagh, ve va tema sha ishigh yagh." 
Ezekiel20:2 Nahan kwaghôron u TER va her a mo, er:" 
Ezekiel20:3 Wan u or, ôr kwagh a mbatamen mba Iserael kaa a ve wer: Ter AÔNDO ngu kaan nahan er: Ne va u va pinen Mo kwagha? Er M lu u uma ne, kape Ter AÔNDO A kaa ne: M rumun ne u pinen Mo kwagh ga." 
Ezekiel20:4 Ú ôr ve ijir, we wan u or, ú ôr ve ijiri? Yô, pase ve aeren a uter vev a ndôhôrshima la, ve̱ fa;" 
Ezekiel20:5 man shi kaa a ve wer: Ter AÔNDO ngu kaan nahan er: Iyange i M tsuwa Iserael la, M bum a tsombor u ya u Yakob, man M pase iyol Yam her a ve ken tar u Igipiti, M bum a ve, Mer: Mo M ngu TER, Aôndo wen." 
Ezekiel20:6 Sha iyange la je M bum a ve Mer: Me due a ve ken tar u Igipiti, Me va a ve ken tar u lu M tsuwa sha ci ve la, tar u dumbur a atumba man iyough, u hemba ityar igen cii mdoom." 
Ezekiel20:7 M kaa a ve Mer: Hanma or ker a ven, nana̱ haa akaa a ndôhôrshima a sha ashe a nan kera, man de kera hôngor nen ayol a en sha akombo a Igipiti ga, ka Mo M lu TER, Aôndo wen." 
Ezekiel20:8 Kpa ve hendan a Mo, ve rumun u ungwan imo Yam ga; or môm haa akaa a ndôhôrshima a sha ashe a nan la kera ga, man ve undu akombo a Igipiti kpaa ga; nahan M kaa Mer: Me haa iyugh Yam sha a ve sha u kuren ishima i vihin Yam sha a ve jimin cii, ker atô u tar u Igipiti je." 
Ezekiel20:9 Kpa M er kwagh sha ci u icivir i iti Yam, sha u i̱ de kera hôngor a i sha ashe a a akuraior, henpe ve tem la, ga; ka sha ashe a M pase iyol Yam her a ve, er M due a ve ken tar u Igipiti la." 
Ezekiel20:10 Nahan M due a ve ken tar u Igipiti, M va a ve ken desereti." 
Ezekiel20:11 M na ve akaawan a Am man M tese ve akaaôron a Am a jirigh, a or nana er sha mi man nana lu uma yô." 
Ezekiel20:12 Man shi M na ve ayange a memen a Am sha u a̱ lu ikav her atô Wam a ve, sha u ve̱ fa er Mo TER M tsegh ve yô." 
Ezekiel20:13 Kpa ya u Iserael hendan a Mo ken desereti, ve zende sha akaawan a Am ga man ve venda akaaôron a Am a jirigh a or nana̱ er sha mi man nana lu uma yô; ve vihi ayange a memen a Am tsung je, nahan M kaa Mer, Me haa ishima Yam i vihin sha a ve ken desereti, sha u timin ve." 
Ezekiel20:14 Kpa M er kwagh ne sha ci u icivir i iti Yam sha u i̱ de kera hôngor a i sha ashe a akuraior, a a lu nengen zum u M due a ve la, ga." 
Ezekiel20:15 Man shi M bum a ve ken desereti, Mer: Me kera va a ve ken tar u M na ve la ga, tar u u dumbur a atumbabua man iyough, u u hembe ityar igen cii mdoom la," 
Ezekiel20:16 sha ci u ve venda akaaôron a Am a jirigh, man ve zende sha akaawan a Am ga, man ve hôngor a ayange a memen a Am, gadia asema a ve lu zan sha akombo a ve la." 
Ezekiel20:17 Nahan kpaa, ashe Am zungwe ve mhôônom, M tim ve kera ga, M tim ve ken desereti kpaa ga." 
Ezekiel20:18 Shi M kaa a ônov vev ken desereti Mer: De kera zenden nen ken akaawan a uter enev ga, man shi de kera waan nen akaaôron a jirigh a ve iko ga, man shi de kera hôngor nen ayol a en sha akombo a ve kpaa ga." 
Ezekiel20:19 Mo M ngu TER, Aôndo wen; zenden nen ken akaawan a Am, waan nen akaaôron a Am a jirigh iko, man eren nen sha mi kpaa;" 
Ezekiel20:20 tseghan nen ayange a memen a Am nahan aa hingir ikav her atô Wam a ven, sha er ne̱ fa er Mo M lu TER, Aôndo wen, yô." 
Ezekiel20:21 Nahan kpaa ônov mbala hendan a Mo, ve zende sha akaawan a Am ga, man ve wa akaaôron a Am a jirigh iko sha u vea er sha mi kpaa ga, a or nana er sha mi, man nana lu uma yô; ve hôngor a ayange a memen a Am; nahan M kaa Mer, Me haa iyugh Yam sha a ve, sha u kuren ishimavihin Yam jimin cii sha a ve ken desereti." 
Ezekiel20:22 Nahan kpaa M hide a uwegh Agh ijime man M er kwagh sha ci u icivir i iti Yam, sha u i̱ de hôngor a i sha ashe a akuraior, a a lu nengen zum u M due a ve la, ga." 
Ezekiel20:23 M gema M bum a ve ken desereti, Mer: Me sambe ve ken akuraior, man Me tsenda ve sha ityar ityar;" 
Ezekiel20:24 sha ci u ve er sha akaaôron a Am a jirigh ga, kpa ve venda akaawan a Am, man ve hôngor a ayange a memen a Am man ashe ve lu sha akombo a uter vev." 
Ezekiel20:25 Nahan Mo kpaa M na ve akaawan a doon ga, man akaaôron a jirigh a vea lu uma sha a ga yô;" 
Ezekiel20:26 man M hôngor a ve sha iniav vev mbi nan er ve̱ na ônov vev mba iundav u karen ken usu, sha er M̱ vihi ve kera man ve̱ fa er Mo M lu TER ye." 
Ezekiel20:27 Sha ci u nahan yô, we wan u or, ôr kwagh a ya u Iserael, kaa a ve wer: Ter AÔNDO ngu kaan nahan er: Shi sha kwagh ne kpaa uter enev laham er ve gbihi mimi ve kera yô." 
Ezekiel20:28 Gadia zum u M va a ve ken tar, u M bum a ve Mer, Me na ve la, ve gema ve nengen hanma igungu u taven man hanma kon u lun a mure, ka heregh ve na iniav vev mbi sôngon, man ka heregh ve na iniav vev mbi nan ishimavihin; shi ka heregh kpaa ve we kwaghhumandoon ve, man ve toon iniav vev mbi man ye." 
Ezekiel20:29 Nahan M kaa a ve Mer: Inja i ijiir i taven sha i ne ze her la er nana? Ka nahan man i yer i iti er Bama (ijiir i taven sha) zan zan nyian ye. 
Ezekiel20:30 Nahan yô, kaa a ya u Iserael wer: Ter AÔNDO ngu kaan nahan er: Né hôngor ayol a en sha aeren a uter eneve? Né er idya né dondo akaa a ve a ndôhôrshima laa?" 
Ezekiel20:31 Sha iniav enev mbi ne na, er ne na ônov enev mba nomso u karen ken usu yô, ne mba hôngor a ayol a en sha akombo a en cii zan zan nyian, nahan kpaa shi Me rumun Mer, pinem nen kwagha, we ya u Iseraele? Er M lu u uma ne, kape Ter AÔNDO A kaa ne, M rumun ne u pinen Mo kwagh ga;" 
Ezekiel20:32 man kwagh u ne lu henen la kpaa una er je ga; u ne kaa ner: Sé lu nen er akuraior nahan, er uipaven mba ior mba icombor i sha won yô, sha u civir kon man iwen." 
Ezekiel20:33 Er M lu u uma ne, kape Ter AÔNDO A kaa ne, mimi je, ka sha uwegh ku ageegh, man sha uwegh ku naregh, man sha iyugh i haan, Me tema tor sha ven." 
Ezekiel20:34 Me due a ven ken akuraior, Me kohol ne ken ityar i ne sambe la, sha uwegh ku ageegh, man sha uwegh ku naregh, man sha iyugh i haan;" 
Ezekiel20:35 Me va a ven ken desereti u akuraior, ka keela Me ôr ne ijir ishigh a ishigh ye." 
Ezekiel20:36 Er lu M ôr uter enev ijir ken desereti u tar u Igipiti nahan, kape Me ôr ne ijir je la, kape Ter AÔNDO A kaa ne." 
Ezekiel20:37 Me er ne né kar shin atô u gbo, Me nyôr a ven ken mkange u ikuryan;" 
Ezekiel20:38 man Me yegher mbahendan kwagh ker atô wen kera kua Mbaperen atindi a Am kpaa; Me due a ve ken tar u ve lu shir ker la, kpa vea nyôr ken tar u Iserael ga, man nea fa er Mo M lu TER ye." 
Ezekiel20:39 Sha kwagh wen yô, we ya u Iserael, kape Ter AÔNDO A kaa ne: Yem, hanma or nana̱ gba za civir akombo a nan tsô; kpa ken masetyô yô, nea ver ato her a Mo, man nea kera hôngor a iti Yam i tseghan sha iniav yenev man akombo a en ga." 
Ezekiel20:40 Gadia sha uwo Wam u tseghan, sha uwo u taven u Iserael, kape Ter AÔNDO A kaa ne, ka keela ya u Iserael cii, vea civir Mo ken tar la; ka keela Me rumun ve, man ka keela kpaa Me ker iniav yenev, man iwua yen i sha iyiav mbi tsutswa, a akaa a en a tseghan cii." 
Ezekiel20:41 Er ka kwaghhumandoon nahan, kape Me rumun ne, zum u Me due a ven ken akuraior, man Me kohol ne ken ityar i i sambe ne ker la; man Me pase mtsegh Wam ken a ven sha ashe a akuraior." 
Ezekiel20:42 Nahan nea fa er Mo M lu TER yô, zum u Me va a ven ken tar u Iserael, ken tar u M bum Mer, Me na uter enev la." 
Ezekiel20:43 Ka keela nea umbur igbenda yen man aeren a en cii, a ne lu hôngor ayol a en sha mi la ye; kwagh wen una ndôhôrshima sha ci u afer a en cii a ne er yô." 
Ezekiel20:44 Nea fa er Mo M lu TER, zum u M er a ven nahan sha ci u iti Yam yô, Me kera er a ven sha igbenda yen i ifer la ga, man sha aeren a en a dang la kpaa ga, we ya u Iserael, kape Ter AÔNDO A kaa ne." 
Ezekiel20:45 Shi kwaghôron u TER va her a mo er: 
Ezekiel20:46 Wan u or, ver ishigh you shin imbusutariyan, ôr kwagh sha imbusutariyan; ôr kwaghôron u profeti sha ikô i imbusutariyan la;" 
Ezekiel20:47 kaa a ikô i ken imbusutariyan wer: Ungwa kwaghôron u TER; Ter AÔNDO ngu kaan nahan er: Nenge, Me keer usu ken a we, ua hia hanma kon u ndor ken a we, man hanma kon u ombor kpaa; usu u yeghen gam gam la, ua pir ga, ua anger ishiv cii, hii ken imbusutariyan zan zan za ar ken imbusutarimese." 
Ezekiel20:48 Uumace cii vea nenge er i lu Mo TER M keer u yô; ua pir ga. 
Ezekiel20:49 Tsô m kaa mer: Kpei! Tere, AÔNDO! Mba teren mo er: Kera ka or u ôron kwagh sha anzaakaa tsô gaa?" 
Ezekiel21:1 Tsô kwaghôron u TER va her a mo, er:" 
Ezekiel21:2 Wan u or, ver ishigh sha Yerusalem, ôr kwagh sha ajiir a tseghan, man ôr kwaghôron u profeti sha tar u Iserael;" 
Ezekiel21:3 kaa a tar u Iserael wer: TER ngu kaan nahan er: Nenge, M ngu ihom a we, Me tsuwe sanker Wam ken var na, man Me wua mbaperapera kua mbaaferev cii ken a we kera." 
Ezekiel21:4 Er M wua mbaperapera kua mbaaferev cii ken a we yô, nahan, sanker Wam una tsuwa ken var na, una ta num sha uuma cii, á hii sha imbusutariyan zan zan i imese." 
Ezekiel21:5 Nahan uuma cii vea fa er Mo TER M tsough sanker ken var na yô, una kera hide á nyôr ker ga." 
Ezekiel21:6 Nahan yô, shir ishima, we wan u or; shir ishima a mkondoyol man ishima i vihin tsung, sha ashe a ve." 
Ezekiel21:7 Tsô zum u vea pine u er: Ka nyi man u shirin ishima? Yô, kaa wer: Ka sha ci u loho, gadia ngu van; hanma ishima ia sough, ave cii aa shir livaa, hanma jijingi una vôr, man anu cii aa taver ga er mngerem nahan, nenge, ngu van, kwagh una va er kpee, kape Ter AÔNDO A kaa ne." 
Ezekiel21:8 Kwaghôron u TER shi va her a mo, kaa er:" 
Ezekiel21:9 Wan u or, ôr kwaghôron u profeti, kaa wer: TER ngu kaan nahan er: Kaa wer: Sanker, sanker! i wua un, i kile un kpaa;" 
Ezekiel21:10 i wua un sha u sôngon kwagh; i kile un sha u a̱ engem er inyiar nahan. Nahan kpaa se gba ember kera tsô? Tôgh ku wan wam ku laha hanma kon. 
Ezekiel21:11 I na sanker er i̱ kile un sha u eren tom a mi; i wua un, man i kile un kpaa, sha u nan sha ikev i orsôngonkwagh." 
Ezekiel21:12 Genger imo, vaa, wan u or; gadia á va ta sha ior Av, á va ta sha mbatarev mba Iserael cii, i gema ve i na sanker, a ior Av imôngo; nahan yô, kure ave hen ikooso." 
Ezekiel21:13 Gadia ikaren va kera kpaa; tsô á lu nana, aluer tôgh ku tor ku ku laha la kpaa kua kera lu ga? Kape Ter AÔNDO A kaa ne." 
Ezekiel21:14 Nahan yô, we, wan u or, ôr kwaghôron u profeti man kure ave ou, sanker a̱ gber, kwa har shin kwa tar je, sanker u mba á wua ve la; ka sanker u vesen u mba á wua ve la, u a kase ve hanma ian cii." 
Ezekiel21:15 M ver ku u sha sanker sha ihinda ve cii, sha u ishima ve i̱ sough, man gbev vev mbu nôngon kpaa mbu̱ seer ngeen; kpei! i er un er ka inyiar nahan, i wua un sha u sôngon kwagh." 
Ezekiel21:16 Kohol iyol, gber ken iyan; wa ago iyol, gber ken imese; hanma vegher u kur wou a ver ishigh cii." 
Ezekiel21:17 Mo kpaa Me kure ave, Me na ishimavihin Yam ia mem; ka Mo TER M kaa nahan ye." 
Ezekiel21:18 Kwaghôron u TER shi va her a mo, er:" 
Ezekiel21:19 We wan u or, ver igbenda ihiar, henpe sanker u tor u Babilon una va kar la; ihiar cii i̱ due tar môm; ver ikav i tesen ijiir, ver ikav sha mhii u gbenda u zan ken gar." 
Ezekiel21:20 Yô, ver gbenda u sanker una va ken Raba u Mbaamon, man hen Yuda ken Yerusalem u a lu a gilgar la." 
Ezekiel21:21 Gadia tor u Babilon tile sha akahar a igbenda, sha mhii u igbenda ihiar la, sha u kpehen ishor; a tsongor avaan keen man keen, a za hen kwagh a terafim, a nenge sha mtema." 
Ezekiel21:22 Sha uwegh nagh ku yanegh la ishor i gba sha Yerusalem sha u veren akeke a hemben kpekpegar a min, u gbidyen vaa, u wuan, u genger imo, veren akeke a hemben ihindagar, u haan atihi a inyaagh, man u maan ayou a taver." 
Ezekiel21:23 Kpa ishor i kpehen la lu ve gbilinkwagh sha ishi, ve mba iyange ve bum la; kpa á va umbur iferkwagh ve, sha u ma i ker ve." 
Ezekiel21:24 Nahan yô, Ter AÔNDO ngu kaan nahan er: Er ne ne, i umbur iferkwagh yen, er i pase afer a en ken igbar yô, nahan ken aeren a en cii, asorabo a en hingir ken igbar; sha ci u mba umbur ne, nahan á kôr ne sha ave je." 
Ezekiel21:25 Man we, dangor u ifer, ityoor u Iserael u iyange you i ve, sha shighe u mtsaha u masetyô la," 
Ezekiel21:26 Ter AÔNDO ngu kaan nahan er: Sagh atsar kera, bugh idyer i tor kpaa; kwagh una kera va lu nahan ga; kende kwagh u gban ijime la sha, gema hide a u a kende sha la ijime." 
Ezekiel21:27 Mtim, mtim, Me tim un kera; kwagh ne kpaa una kera va ga, zan zan un u i lu kwagh na jim, una kar van, u Me na un yô." 
Ezekiel21:28 We, wan u or, ôr kwaghôron u profeti, kaa wer: Ter AÔNDO ngu kaan sha kwagh u Mbaamon, man sha tarnahan ve la; kaa wer: Sanker, i tsuwa sanker sha ci u sôngon kwagh, i kile un je engem er inyar nahan—" 
Ezekiel21:29 er mba nengen mbampase mba gbilinigh sha ci wou man mba tsengan ôron we kwagh sha aie— sha u veren un sha imon i aferaior a dang, a iyange ve i ve kera, sha shighe u mtsaha u masetyô." 
Ezekiel21:30 Hide a sanker, wa ken var. Ka sha ijiir i i gbe u, ken tar u i mar u la, Me ôr u ijir ye." 
Ezekiel21:31 Me haa u iyugh Yam, Me fehe u usu u ishimanyoon Yam; Me na u sha ikev i ior mba vihin kwagh tsung, mba fan u timin kwagh." 
Ezekiel21:32 Ú hingir kwagh u keer usu a mi; awambe a ou aa lu ken atô u tar, á kera umbur we sha won ga; gadia ka Mo TER M kaa nahan ye." 
Ezekiel22:1 Kwaghôron u TER va her a mo, er:" 
Ezekiel22:2 We wan u or, ú ôr gar u haan awambe ne ijir, ú ôr un ijiri? Yô, pase un aeren a na a ndôhôrshima cii." 
Ezekiel22:3 Kaa wer: Ter AÔNDO ngu kaan nahan er: Gar u a hee awambe ken atô na, sha u shighe na a̱ kuma, man u a er akombo sha u hôngor iyol na a min!" 
Ezekiel22:4 U hingir u lun a ibo iyol sha awambe a u hee la, man shi u hôngor kpaa sha akombo a u er la; u kôvor ayange a ou, u ar sha ikighir i anyom a ou; nahan yô, M gema u, u hingir kwagh u iheen hen akuraior, man kwagh u nahan tar sha ityar cii." 
Ezekiel22:5 Mba ve lu ikua, man mba ve lu ca a we kpaa, vea naha u tar, we, kwagh u dang u mgboughon a ayôôso ne." 
Ezekiel22:6 Nenge, mbatarev mba Iserael mba ken a we, hanmô sha tahav mbu nan, nan lu haan awambe." 
Ezekiel22:7 I civir ter man ngô ken a we ga; shiror kpaa i er nan ican, ken a we; ancôghol man kwasecôghol kpaa i nzughul a ve ken a we." 
Ezekiel22:8 U laha akaatseghan a Am, man u hôngor a ayange a memen Am." 
Ezekiel22:9 Mbaangerev tema ken a we sha u haan awambe, man ve ya kwagh sha iwo ken a we, ve er ijimba ker atô wou." 
Ezekiel22:10 Ken a we, i bugh idyelegh u uter; ken a we kpaa, i tsa a kwase hen shighe u nan dugh won la." 
Ezekiel22:11 Orgen er idya a kwase u or u wan ndor a nan; man orgen hôngor iyol a kwase u wan u nan; man orgen ken a we kpaa nan vihi anngô u nan u kwase, wan u ter u nan." 
Ezekiel22:12 Ken a we, i ngohol inyaregh ki yamen ishô sha ci u haan awambe; u ngohol mngerem man mtsera u ganden ikaa inya, man u ngohol mtsera hen orwanndor a we sha mkighir je, man Mo M hungul we, kape Ter AÔNDO A kaa ne." 
Ezekiel22:13 Nahan yô, nenge, M kure ave, sha mtsera u bo u u ye la, man sha awambe a haan a ken atô wou la." 
Ezekiel22:14 Ishima you ia fatyô u taver her, ave ou kpaa a a fatyô u taver sha ayange a Me ta num sha a we laa? Ka Mo TER M kaa kwagh ne ye, shi Me kure un kpaa." 
Ezekiel22:15 Me sambe u ken akuraior man Me tsenda u sha ityar ityar, Me tim akaa a ou a hôngorough ken a we kera." 
Ezekiel22:16 Ú hôngor a iyol you sha ashe a akuraior cii man wea fa er Mo M lu TER ye. 
Ezekiel22:17 Kwaghôron u TER va her a mo, kaa er:" 
Ezekiel22:18 Wan u or, ya u Iserael hingir Mo er ka atsaase a kwagh nahan; ve cii, ve mba iyôgh ki togula man kwaza man iyôgh ki iligh man inyelegh ken atô u adum; ve hingir atsaase a azurfa je." 
Ezekiel22:19 Nahan yô, Ter AÔNDO ngu kaan nahan er: Sha ci u ne hingir atsaase cii yô, nahan nenge, Me kohol ne ken atô u Yerusalem." 
Ezekiel22:20 Er ka i kohol azurfa man togula man iyôgh ki iligh man inyelegh man kwaza ken atô u adum sha u á suwe usu u̱ sough mbi yô, kape Mo kpaa Me kohol ne ken ishimavihin Yam man iyugh Yam la, Me haa ne ker, man Me sough ne." 
Ezekiel22:21 Een, Me kohol ne, Me suwe ne usu u iyugh Yam, man né sough ken atô u u." 
Ezekiel22:22 Er ka i sough azurfa ken atô u adum nahan, kape á sough ne ker atô u u la, man nea fa er i lu Mo TER M hee ne iyugh Yam yô." 
Ezekiel22:23 Kwaghôron u TER va her a Mo, kaa er:" 
Ezekiel22:24 Wan u or, kaa a u wer: U ngu tar u i wanger u ga, man i nee ura sha u sha iyange i iyugh kpaa ga yô." 
Ezekiel22:25 Uprofeti Nav zua zwa u bo ker atô u u, er ka begha u tan kume anden inyam i a ker yô; ve ya uuma mba iorov, ve kura inyarev man akaa a injaa, ve seer kasev mba côgholov ken u kpishi." 
Ezekiel22:26 Upristi nav vihi atindi a Am, ve hôngor a uicighanmbaakaav Av; ve kera pav icighankwagh kposo a kwagh u a lu u tseghan ga la, ga; man shi ve tese ior u kaven mkposo u kwagh u a lu wang ga, a kwagh u a lu wang la, ga; man ve kusu ashe ve sha ayange a memen a Am; i laham, i kera civir Mo ker atô ve ga." 
Ezekiel22:27 Mbatarev nav ken a na mba er ugbaseela mba anden inyam i ve ker yô, sha u haan awambe, man u timin uuma mba iorov, sha u vea zua a mtsera u sha mimi ga yô." 
Ezekiel22:28 Uprofeti nav shighe ivue sha ci ve, mba nengen mpase u icughugh man mtsengeôron u aiegh, mba kaan er: Kape Ter AÔNDO A kaa ne, man TER kpaa kaa ga." 
Ezekiel22:29 Ior mba ken tar la mba ngohol kwagh sha agee man mba numun gbenda, een, ve er atsanaior man mbaibanave ican, man ve kighir shiror sha apera." 
Ezekiel22:30 M ker or môm ken ve u nana sôr kpekpegar man nana tile hen ijiir i i hembe kpekpegar la sha ishigh Yagh sha u M̱ de kera timin tar la ga, kpa M tser a ma or ga." 
Ezekiel22:31 Nahan yô, M haa ve ishimavihin Yam; M nande ve sha usu u iyugh Yam; M hire ve a ibo i gbenda ve sha ityouv vev, kape Ter AÔNDO A kaa ne." 
Ezekiel23:1 Tsô kwaghôron u TER shi va her a mo er: 
Ezekiel23:2 Wan u or, yan kasev lu uhar, ve lu ônov mba kwase môm;" 
Ezekiel23:3 Ve er idya ken Igipiti; ve er idya shighe u ve lu iyev la je; ka keregh i kighir ve atumba ye, man shi ka keregh kpaa i bende ve atumba a iniun ve la ave ye." 
Ezekiel23:4 Ati a ve lu Ohola, ka u vesen je la, man Oholiba anngô na u kwase; ve hingir mba Av man ve mar ônov mba nomso man mba kasev. Sha kwagh u ati ve yô, Samaria ka Ohola, man Yerusalem gema ka Oholiba." 
Ezekiel23:5 Nahan Ohola er idya zum u a lu u Wam la je, ishima na gema var sha mba ve doo un ishima la, ka Mbaashiria je la, mbautyav" 
Ezekiel23:6 mba haan akondo a kwel, ugomna man mbatarev, ve cii ka ikaior i kuman ashe, mbaanyinyav mba hendan anyinya." 
Ezekiel23:7 A gema uidya nav a na ve, ve cii ka uicuwanmbaiorov mba Ashiria; man mba ishima na i var a ve la, a hôngor iyol na sha akombo a ve cii." 
Ezekiel23:8 Hii sha ayange a Igipiti la je a undu ijimba na ga; er a lu iyev la je, ve yav a na man ve bende atumba a iniun na; ve gema ijimba ve la ve haa sha a na." 
Ezekiel23:9 Nahan yô, M na un sha ikev i mba ve doon un ishima la, ka sha ikev i Mbaashiria je la, mba ishima na i var a ve la." 
Ezekiel23:10 Mban bugh idyelegh na; ve tôô ônov nav mba nomso man mba kasev, man un iyol na kpaa ve wua un sha sanker; a hingir kasev kwagh u eren ishor a min; gadia ve ôr un ijir, ve tsaha un." 
Ezekiel23:11 Anngô na u kwase, Oholiba, a nenge kwagh ne, nahan kpaa, a hôngor iyol na sha isharen na hemba ngula, a er idya hemba idya i anngô na la kpaa." 
Ezekiel23:12 Ishima na var a Mbaashiria: ugomna man mbatarev, mbautyav mba ve hee akondo a dedoo, mbaanyinyav mba hendan anyinya, ve cii ka ikaior i kuman ashe." 
Ezekiel23:13 Tsô m nenge a hôngor; ve uhar cii ve za gbenda môm je. 
Ezekiel23:14 A shi a seer idya na kpaa, gadia a nenge ior mba i kpel foto ve sha kpekpe, foto u Mbakaldi, mba i kper ve sha icigh ki nyian bong;" 
Ezekiel23:15 ve zer ikange shin iwenge, a atsar a kenden icombo sha ityouv vev; ve cii ve lu er ka utor nahan, bee ior i Babilon ken Kaldia, tar u i mar ve ker la." 
Ezekiel23:16 Er a nenge ve la je, ishima na var a ve, nahan a tindi mbatyomov her a ve ken Kaldia." 
Ezekiel23:17 Tsô Mbababilon va her a na sha gambe u dooshima, ve hôngor a na sha idya ve; a hôngor a ve, tsô ve due un ishima." 
Ezekiel23:18 Zum u a due a idya na ken igbar man a bugh idyelegh na la, nahan a duem ishima, er anngô na u kwase lu duem ishima nahan." 
Ezekiel23:19 Nahan kpaa a seer idya na, er a umbur ayange a iyev na a a lu eren idya ken tar u Igipiti la yô." 
Ezekiel23:20 Ishima na kpaa var a mba lu ve doo un ishima la, mba ve mgbough a asaren a bo er ujaki nahan, man asaren a iyolough a ve a lu er a anyinya nahan." 
Ezekiel23:21 Kape u umbur idya i iyev ou ne, zum u Mbaigipiti bende atumba a ou ave la, man ve kighir atumba a iyev ou la." 
Ezekiel23:22 Nahan, we Oholiba, Ter AÔNDO ngu kaan nahan er: Nenge, Me na mba ve doo u ishima la vea ta num sha a we, ve mba ve dugh u ishima la, Me va a ve sha u ve̱ va ta num sha a we sha hanma vegher cii:" 
Ezekiel23:23 Mbababilon man Mbakaldi cii, Pekodi man Shoa man Koa, kua Mbaashiria cii a ve imôngo; mbayevikaior mba kuman ashe, ugomna man mbatarev, ve cii ka utor man mbaajiriv, ve cii mba ve hendan anyinya." 
Ezekiel23:24 Vea ta num sha a we a akekeautya man akaver man a akuraior kpishi, vea kase u sha utya a iper man mbaakuva man ader a iyôô, á tser; man Me gema ijirôron Me na ve, vea ôr u ijir sha inja i ajir a ve a ôron." 
Ezekiel23:25 Me tese iwuhe Yam sha a we, vea er a we sha ishima i vihin; vea tôndo u ihinga man ato; asande a ou a a shi her, á wua a sha sanker, vea kura ônov ou mba nomso man mba kasev; asande a ou a a shi her la usu ua hia a." 
Ezekiel23:26 Vea er u akondo kpaa, man vea kura ikav you mbi hweev mbi doon." 
Ezekiel23:27 Kape Me na ijimba you la ia bee her a we, man idya you i i dugh ken tar u Igipiti la, nahan ú kera kende ashe sha a ve ga, man ú kera umbur Igipiti kpaa ga." 
Ezekiel23:28 Gadia Ter AÔNDO ngu kaan nahan er: Nenge, Me na u sha ikev i mba u ker ve ihom la, sha ikev i mba ve dugh u ishima la;" 
Ezekiel23:29 vea er a we sha ihom, man vea kura kwagh u u ye ican sha mi cii, vea undu u idyelegh deleghee; á pase idyelegh u ijimba you ken igbar, ka ijimba you cii kua idya you kpaa." 
Ezekiel23:30 Akaa angan á er u, sha ci u u eren idya a akuraior, man sha ci u u hôngor sha akombo a ve kpaa." 
Ezekiel23:31 U zende sha gbenda u anngôu u kwase; nahan yô, Me na iyongo na sha uwegh ough." 
Ezekiel23:32 Ter AÔNDO ngu kaan nahan er: Ú ma iyongo i anngôu u kwase, i tumuu man i gbanger kpaa; á se u ibumegh, á hee u kpaa, gadia i iv gbing gbing." 
Ezekiel23:33 Ú iv a ihundugh man ishima i vihin; iyongo i cieryol man i mtim, ka iyongo i anngôu Samaria la." 
Ezekiel23:34 Ú ma i ndeera, ú tam avur a i kpaa, man ú ande atumba a ou; gadia Mo M kaa nahan ye, kape Ter AÔNDO A kaa ne." 
Ezekiel23:35 Nahan yô, Ter AÔNDO ngu kaan nahan er: Sha ci u Mo M hungul we man u tam kera ken ijime you, yô, tôô ase ibo i ijimba you man idya you." 
Ezekiel23:36 TER shi kaa a mo er: We wan u or, ú ôr Ohola man Oholiba ijiri? Yô, pase ve akaa a ve a ndôhôrshima la!" 
Ezekiel23:37 Gadia ve er idya, man awambe nga ve sha ave; ve er idya sha akombo a ve; man ônov vev mba nomso mba ve marem kpaa ve gema ve ve na a, hingir kwaghyan u a." 
Ezekiel23:38 Man shi kwagh ne kpaa ve erem: ve hôngor a icighanjiir Wam sha iyange shon i môm, man ve vihi ayange a memen Am." 
Ezekiel23:39 Gadia shighe u ve wua mbayev vev sha akombo a ve la je, ve va ken icighanjiir Wam sha iyange la je sha u hôngor un; yô, nenge, kape ve er ken atô u ya Wam ne." 
Ezekiel23:40 Man shi ve tindi er i̱ za va ve a ior mba ve dugh ca; i tindi ortyom her a ve, man nenge, ve va ve; ka sha ci ve u ôô iyol u wa tojir sha ashe, man u wuha iyol sha ikav mbi hweev ye;" 
Ezekiel23:41 u tema sha gambe u icivirigh, a tebul u i ser sha hemen na, u penda kwaghhumandoon Wam man mkurem Am sha mi." 
Ezekiel23:42 Imo i ikpelaior lu a na saan saan; seer sha mbainjaav ga, i va a mbahundenmsôrom ken desereti; ve wa ve mbaagba sha ave man shi ve kange ve atsar a hweegh sha ityou." 
Ezekiel23:43 Tsô M ter un u a bee iyol sha idya na la Mer: Un je kpaa a shi a er idya a na? 
Ezekiel23:44 Tsô ve nyôr hen a na er ka ve nyôr ken agbaga nahan; kape ve nyer hen Ohola man Oholiba, kasev mba ijimbav la." 
Ezekiel23:45 Ior mba perapera vea ôr ve ijir i udyambakasev man ijir i kasev mba haan awambe a ior inya; sha ci u ve mba udyambakasev, man awambe nga ve sha ave." 
Ezekiel23:46 Gadia Ter AÔNDO ngu kaan nahan er: Va a ikpelaior i tan num sha a ve, ve̱ gema ve, ve̱ hingir kwagh u cieryol man ishar." 
Ezekiel23:47 Ikpelaior ne ia ta ve awen man ia gber ve sanker, ia wua ônov vev mba nomso man mba kasev, man ia nande uya vev sha usu kpaa." 
Ezekiel23:48 Kape Me na ijimba ia bee ken tar la, sha u kasev cii ve̱ hen, ve̱ de kera eren ijimba er ne er nahan ga." 
Ezekiel23:49 Vea or ne iyev sha ijimba i ne er la, man nea tôô ibo i asorabo a akombo a en man nea fa er Mo M lu TER ye." 
Ezekiel24:1 Shi, ken inyom i sha utaankarunyiin, uwer u sha pue, ayange a u di kpaa pue, kwaghôron u TER va her a mo er:" 
Ezekiel24:2 wan u or, nger iti i iyange ne, iyange i nyian ne je; tor u Babilon ta sha Yerusalem, sha iyange i nyian ne je." 
Ezekiel24:3 Pase injakwagh sha ya u hendan ne, kaa a ve wer: Ter AÔNDO ngu kaan nahan er: Penda nen ityegh, penda nen ki, yô, shi haa nen mngerem shimi;" 
Ezekiel24:4 wa nen azuu a inyam shimi, hanma ijuugh ki dedoo, namegh man uwegh; iv ki sha akuhe a hemban doon." 
Ezekiel24:5 Tsuwa ilegh ki hemban doon cii; wa ikon shin ityô i ki, er ki̱ pughur dedoo; jiidi akuhe shimi kpaa." 
Ezekiel24:6 Nahan yô, Ter AÔNDO ngu kaan nahan er: Kwagh á tser u, gar u awambe, man ityegh ki nduran u lu shin ki yô, ki nduran u ki u bughun ga ne! Dughun ijuugh i môm i môm shin ki; ma ishor gba sha ki ga." 
Ezekiel24:7 Gadia awambe na nga ker atô na; a haa a sha vande u lun gbaam gbaam, a haa a shin inya er á cir a sha vuulevu ga." 
Ezekiel24:8 Ka sha u kenden iyugh sha man u oron iyev, M haa awambe na sha vande u lun gbaam gbaam, sha u i̱ de kera cirin a ga ye." 
Ezekiel24:9 Nahan yô, Ter AÔNDO ngu kaan nahan er: Kwagh á tser u, gar u awambe! Mo kpaa Me kohol ikon kpishi." 
Ezekiel24:10 Wa nen ikon, kende nen usu, jiir inyam dedoo, mzelam ma̱ kôrough, akuhe a̱ hia." 
Ezekiel24:11 Nahan penda ki sha usu gbilin, ki̱ tsee, togola u ki a̱ enger, sha u ihôngor i ki, i̱ sough ken ki kera, man nduran u ki kpaa u̱ hia kera yô." 
Ezekiel24:12 A nam M vôr sha tom u ican, nahan kpaa nduran na u kpishi la bugh ken na ga; nduran na u̱ yem ken usu." 
Ezekiel24:13 Sha ci u ijimba you i dang la, sha ci u M wanger we, kpa u wanger ga, nahan á kera wanger we sha hôngor wou ga, zan zan iyugh Yam sha a we ia mem." 
Ezekiel24:14 Ka Mo TER M kaa nahan ye; á va er nahan kpee, Me er un; Me de ga, Me tsegha kpaa ga, man afanyô kpaa Me vaa ga; sha igbenda you, man sha aeren a ou, vea ôr u ijir ye, kape Ter AÔNDO A kaa ne." 
Ezekiel24:15 Shi kwaghôron u TER va her a mo kaa er: 
Ezekiel24:16 Wan u or, nenge, Me tôô isharen i ashe ou kera fese; nahan kpaa de zungu ga, man de vaa ga, mliam ou kpaa ma de hee ga." 
Ezekiel24:17 Shir ishima teghelee, de kera zungu ku u orkpen ga, kange atsar sha ityou, wa akôv a ou shin angahar, de cirin zwa wou ga man de kera ye kwaghyan u ior ve va u a mi la ga." 
Ezekiel24:18 M ôr kwagh a ior pepe, man iyange i been yô, kwase wam kpe kera; tsô kper nan pepe m er er i kaam nahan." 
Ezekiel24:19 Tsô ior kaa a mo er: U kera pase se kwagh u akaa ne a lu tesen sha a vese, er u eren nahan, gaa?" 
Ezekiel24:20 Nahan m kaa a ve mer: Kwaghôron u TER va her a mo, er:" 
Ezekiel24:21 Kaa ya u Iserael, Ter AÔNDO ngu kaan nahan er: Nenge, Me hôngor icighanjiir Wam, ihagh i tahav enev, isharen i ashe a en, kwagh u i doo uma wen a na la; ônov enev mba nomso man mba kasev mba ne undu, á wua ve sha sanker." 
Ezekiel24:22 Ne kpaa nea er er m er nahan; nea cir zwa wen ga, man nea ya kwaghyan u ior ve va ne a mi la kpaa ga." 
Ezekiel24:23 Atsar a en aa lu ne sha ityou man akôv a en kpaa shin angahar; man nea zungwe shin nea vaa kpaa ga, kpa nea use ken afer a en, man hanma or nana toghor ican a ugen." 
Ezekiel24:24 Esekiel una lu ne ikav; hanma kwagh u a er cii, kape ne kpaa né er je la; zum u kwagh ne una er yô, nea fa er Mo M lu Ter AÔNDO yô." 
Ezekiel24:25 We wan u or yô, sha iyange i Me ngohol tahav vev kera, iember i iengem ve, isharen i ashe a ve, man kwagh u ve ver asema a ve sha mi la, ônov vev mba nomso man mba kasev la," 
Ezekiel24:26 sha iyange la je or u nan wer nana va her a we, sha u va kaan we loho gaa?" 
Ezekiel24:27 Sha iyange la zwa wou ua bugh zum u or u nan wer la, nana nyôr yô; tsô ú ôr kwagh ú kera huwan ga; kape ú hingir ikav her a ve, man vea fa er Mo M lu TER yô." 
Ezekiel25:1 Kwaghôron u TER va her a mo, er:" 
Ezekiel25:2 Wan u or, ver ishigh you sha Mbaamon, ôr kwaghôron u profeti sha a ve;" 
Ezekiel25:3 kaa Mbaamon wer: Ungwa nen kwaghôron u Ter AÔNDO: Ter AÔNDO ngu kaan nahan er: Sha ci u u kaa wer: Ehee! sha icighanjiir Wam la, zum u i hôngor a mi yô, man sha tar u Iserael kpaa, zum u i gema u u hingir ice la, man sha ya u Yuda kpaa, zum u i yem a ve ken uikangen la," 
Ezekiel25:4 nahan yô, nenge, M ngu nan we sha ikev i ior mba sha ityoughkitaregh, ú hingir kwagh ve, vea wa afo ve ken atô wou, man vea maa uya vev ken a we, vea ya atam a ikon a ou man vea ma atumba a ou." 
Ezekiel25:5 Me gema Raba una hingir ijiir i urakumi vea yan toho her, man Mbaamon vea hingir ijiir i yaven i ikumuile; nahan nea fa er Mo M lu TER yô." 
Ezekiel25:6 Gadia Ter AÔNDO ngu kaan nahan er: Sha ci u u kur ave man u kur angahar inya man u ember a mlaha u uma wou cii sha tar u Iserael yô," 
Ezekiel25:7 nahan, nenge, M naregh uwegh Agh sha a we, Me na u sha ikev i akuraior, ú hingir ishar, Me gber u ken ior kera kpaa, man Me na u, ú saa ishe ken ityar kera; Me tim u, nahan man ú fa er Mo M lu TER ye." 
Ezekiel25:8 Ter AÔNDO ngu kaan nahan er: Sha ci u Moabi man Seir ve kaan er: Nenge, ya u Yuda ngu er akuraior agen cii nahan;" 
Ezekiel25:9 nahan yô, nenge, Me bugh kpe u Moabi vegher u hen agar, hen vegher u agar a na a a lu sha akighiratar a na, icivir i tar la cii, Bete-yeshimon man Baal-meon man Kiriataim." 
Ezekiel25:10 Me gema un Me na un a Mbaamon imôngo, sha ikev i ior mba sha ityoughkitaregh, vea hingir kwagh ve, sha u á kera umbur Mbaamon ken akuraior ga yô;" 
Ezekiel25:11 Me ôr Moabi ijir Me tsaha un, man vea fa er Mo M lu TER ye." 
Ezekiel25:12 Ter AÔNDO ngu kaan nahan er: Sha ci u Edom a tese ihom sha ya u Yuda sha iyev i oron yô, man a vihi kwagh kpishi, a or iyev sha ve," 
Ezekiel25:13 nahan yô, Ter AÔNDO ngu kaan nahan er: Me naregh uwegh Agh sha Edom, man Me wua or kua zendenya cii ker kera; Me gema un, una hingir ice, hii hen Teman zan zan za ar hen Dedan, á wua ve sha sanker." 
Ezekiel25:14 Me na ior Av Iserael vea or Edom iyev sha ci Wam; vea er kwagh ken Edom sha ishima Yam i vihin, man sha iyugh Yam; nahan vea fa iyev Yam i oron, kape Ter AÔNDO A kaa ne." 
Ezekiel25:15 Ter AÔNDO ngu kaan nahan er: Sha ci u Mbafiliti ve er kwagh sha iyevoron man ve or iyev a mlaha ken ishima sha u timin sha ihom i gbem," 
Ezekiel25:16 nahan yô, Ter AÔNDO ngu kaan nahan er: Nenge, Me naregh uwegh Agh sha Mbafiliti, Me wua Mbakereti, man Me tim asande a a shi hen kpe u zegemnger la." 
Ezekiel25:17 Me or ve iyev i vesen sha mbamtsaha mba sha ishimavihin tsung; tsô vea fa er Mo M lu TER yô, zum u Me va a iyevoron Yam sha a ve la." 
Ezekiel26:1 Tsô sha inyom i sha pue kar môm, sha iyange i hiihii i uwer la, kwaghôron u TER va her a mo er:" 
Ezekiel26:2 Wan u or, sha ci u Tiru a ter Yerusalem, a kaa er: Ehee! i hembe un u a lu hunda u akuraior la, i ver un ivegher her a mo; mo m iv, un yô, gema hingir gbilin," 
Ezekiel26:3 nahan yô, Ter AÔNDO ngu kaan nahan er: Nenge, M ngu iyongo a we, we Tiru, Me na akuraior kpishi aa mough ityav a we, er zegemnger ngu a na agôndo na a moughon nahan." 
Ezekiel26:4 Vea yôhôl ukpekpe mba Tiru man vea hembe ugôgômbaayoughouv nav; Me kember vuulevu na kera kpaa, Me gema un una hingir er vande u gbaam gbaam nahan." 
Ezekiel26:5 Una hingir ijiir i tsenen ukper ken atô u zegemnger; gadia Mo M kaa nahan, kape Ter AÔNDO A kaa ne; una hingir ishar i yan hen akuraior kpaa." 
Ezekiel26:6 Ônov nav mba kasev mba ve lu ken sule, á wua ve sha sanker; nahan vea fa er Mo M lu TER yô." 
Ezekiel26:7 Gadia Ter AÔNDO ngu kaan nahan er: Nenge, Me va a Nebukadinesar tor u Babilon, tor u utor, sha imbusutarimese Mer, a̱ va ta num sha Tiru a anyinya man akekeautya man mbaanyinyav, ikumutya man ior kpishi." 
Ezekiel26:8 Una wua ônov ou mba kasev ken sule sha sanker; una maa ayouautya sha u nôngon a we, una haa u atihi a inyaagh, man una kende iperutya i vesen sha, sha u nôngon a we." 
Ezekiel26:9 Una ver akeke a hemben kpekpegar sha ugilmbaagarev ou, man una hembe ugôgômbaayoughouv ou sha azembe a na." 
Ezekiel26:10 Sha mngee u anyinya a na la, ihundu i a ia cir u; ukpekpe ou vea tenger sha iov i mbaanyinyav man akaver man akekeautya, zum u una nyôr sha ihinda you, er ior ka ve nyôr ken gar u i hembe kpekpe na yô." 
Ezekiel26:11 Sha apande a anyinya a na una vughul igbenda you cii; una wua ior ou sha sanker, man mtôm ma awenem ma sha agee ou la maa yôhôl maa gbidye inya." 
Ezekiel26:12 Vea kura inyaregh you man vea ya ishar sha akaa a ou a teen; vea yôhôl ukpekpe ou, man vea vihi uya ou mba dedoo la kera; vea haa awen a ou man ikpande you man alôgh a ou ken atô u mnger." 
Ezekiel26:13 Me na ikenge i atsam a ou ia bee; man imo i umolo ou kpaa á kera ungwa i ga. 
Ezekiel26:14 Me gema u ú hingir vande u gbaam gbaam; ú hingir ijiir i tsenen ukper; á kera kimbir u maan we ga; gadia ka Mo TER M kaa nahan ye, kape Ter AÔNDO A kaa ne." 
Ezekiel26:15 Ter AÔNDO ngu kaan a Tiru nahan er: Ityar i shin kpe u zegemnger ia kera tenger sha iov i mgbe wou, zum u mba i gber ve avav vea toghor, man iwoo-or ia lu ken atô wou la gaa?" 
Ezekiel26:16 Nahan utor mba hen zegemnger cii vea hungwa sha mkônom vem ma torom, vea er uriga vev, man vea bugh akondo ve a sha hwe la kera; vea gema vea cir ikarikase iyol, vea tema inya, vea zer gbidyen ikarikase iyol, man á kondo ve iyol sha ci wou." 
Ezekiel26:17 Vea gber kwelegh vea vaa u, vea kaa a we er: Nenge er u timi, we u ior i zegemnger ve tema ken a we ne, zegegar u zan iti, u lun taveraa ken zegemnger, wen a mba ve tem kimi, mba ve na mcieryol ve gba sha mba ve tem her cii!" 
Ezekiel26:18 Hegen yô, ityar i shin kpe u zegemnger ia tenger sha iyange i mgbe wou la; een, acile a a lu ken zegemnger la á cier a iyol sha mkarkera wou." 
Ezekiel26:19 Gadia Ter AÔNDO ngu kaan nahan er: Zum u Me gema u ú hingir gar u gbilinigh dang er agar a a lu a ior ker ga yô, zum u Me va a zegemnger sha a we, man uzegembamngerev vea cir u yô," 
Ezekiel26:20 sha shighe la Me hungwa a we a mba ve hongo shin ihungwa la imôngo, hen ior mba tsuaa la, Me na u ú tema ken ajiir a zan kweng a taregh la, ken udeserti mba ve vande lun gbem la, a mba ve hungwa shin ihungwa la imôngo, sha u i̱ de kera shi teman ken a we ga, man ú kera kôndo ú tema sha tar u mbaumav ga;" 
Ezekiel26:21 Me gema u, ú hingir kwagh u cieryol, man ú kera lu sha won ga, shin á ker kpaa á kera zua a we mayange ga, kape Ter AÔNDO a kaa ne." 
Ezekiel27:1 Kwaghôron u TER shi va her a mo er: 
Ezekiel27:2 We wan u or, gber kwelegh sha Tiru;" 
Ezekiel27:3 kaa a Tiru wer: We, u u tem hen ahongo a zegemnger, u u eren kasua a akuraior a a tem hen ityar i hen kpezegemnger la, Ter AÔNDO ngu kaan nahan er: We, Tiru, u kaa wer: M doo ashe je gande." 
Ezekiel27:4 Akighiratar a ou nga shin sema u uzegembamngerev, mba ve maa u, ve maa u, doo ashe gande." 
Ezekiel27:5 Ka sha ikon i fer hen Senir ve er ikpande you cii ye; ve tôô kon u sedar ken Lebanon sha u eren we ityôgh ki tsoogh sha mi. 
Ezekiel27:6 Ka sha ikon i ouki i Bashan ve gba u iniahatsoo ye; ve er tembetsoo wou sha anyinor a i wa sha ikon i pain i i dugh sha acile a Kitim la. 
Ezekiel27:7 Ka sha ikondo i pupuu i kôngor i i er hwe u Igipiti sha mi yô, i er tenti wou u tan sha tso la ye, sha u a̱ hingir we tuta; ka sha ikondo i kwel man i nyian dindee i i dugh ken acile a Elisha la man i san haav ou ye." 
Ezekiel27:8 Ior i Shidon man Arvadi ve lu mbanahan we tso je, mbafankwagh ou, we, Tiru, ve lu ken a we, ve lu mbakôôm we tso." 
Ezekiel27:9 Mbatamen mba Gebal man mbafankwagh nav, ka ve lu mbacirin ahura ken a we ye; utso mba shin zegemnger cii a mbatomov vev, ve lu ken a we, sha u geman a ikav you mbi kasuav ave." 
Ezekiel27:10 Pershia man Ludi man Puti lu ken ikumutya you, ka mbautyav ou; ve har iperutya man ve cir aderautya ken a we; ve seer we iengem." 
Ezekiel27:11 Ior mba Arvadi a ikumutya you imôngo, ve lu sha ugilmbaagarev ou, ningir tser, man Mbagamadi kpaa lu sha ugôgômbaayoughouv ou; ve har iperutya ve sha ugilmbaagarev ou, ningir tser; ve er u, u doo ashe je gande." 
Ezekiel27:12 Tarshishi lu orkasua wou je sha ci u mngee u akaa kposo kposo; ka sha azurfa man iyôgh ki iligh man kwaza man inyelegh ve er kasua a mi a we ye. 
Ezekiel27:13 Yavan man Tubal man Mesheki, ve lu mbayamen kasua a we; ve lu van a ikpan man ikav mbi togula sha u va yamen akaa a we." 
Ezekiel27:14 Mba ken ya u Togarma ve va a anyinya, man anyinya a utya, man mbaalfadari, sha u yamen ikav youv mbi kasuav." 
Ezekiel27:15 Ior mba Dedan lu mbayamen kasua a we; ityar i shin kpezegemnger kpishi hingir ajiir a ou a teen kasua, ve va u a anyi a nor man ikon i eboni sha u musan." 
Ezekiel27:16 Shiria lu orkasua wou sha ci u mngee u ityom i ave ou; ve yam kasua a we sha emeraldi, man akondo a nyian dindee man tom u hweegh man ikondo i pupuu i kôngor man korali man agati kpaa." 
Ezekiel27:17 Yuda man tar u Iserael ve lu mbayamen kasua a we; ve yam ikav youv mbi kasuav sha alakema u ken Miniti man mwem man iyough man mkurem man balsem. 
Ezekiel27:18 Damaseku lu orkasua wou sha ci u mngee u ityom i ave ou, man sha ci u mngee u akaa a ou anza kposo kposo cii; wain u helbon man ul u pupuu." 
Ezekiel27:19 Vedan man Yavan ka ken Usal ve va a kasua hen a we ye; iyôgh ki engem man kashia man kalamu, lu ken ikav youv mbi kasuav." 
Ezekiel27:20 Dedan lu orkasua wou sha akondo a shidi sha ci u, ú hendan nyinya a mi." 
Ezekiel27:21 Arabia man utor mba Kedar cii, ve lu mbaeren kasua a we; ve lu mbakasuav ou sha agumaiyôngo man anomaiyôngo man ivo; ka akaa a ve a kasua je ne." 
Ezekiel27:22 Mbakasuav mba Sheba man Raama, ve lu mbayamen kasua a we je; ve va yam akaa a we sha ilyôghonov mbi hemban doon anza kposo kposo, man hanma inja i awen a injaa, man zenaria." 
Ezekiel27:23 Haran man Kane man Eden, mbakasuav mba Sheba, Ashur man Kilemadi, ve cii, lu mbayamen kasua a we." 
Ezekiel27:24 Mban lu mbayamen kasua a we sha uihembanmbaakondov, akondo a cirin a kwel a ngeren, man ubutu mba ngeren, man ikor i i tume i i taver." 
Ezekiel27:25 Utso mba Tarshishi lu kuran ikav youv mbi kasuav. Kape u iv ne, i wa u ikav tsung ken atô u zegemnger." 
Ezekiel27:26 Ka sha uzegembamngerev mbanahan we ve za a we ye; ahumbe a ken ityoughkitaregh hembe u ken atô u zegemnger. 
Ezekiel27:27 Inyaregh you man akaa a ou man ikav youv mbi kasuav man mbatomov ou mba tsoov, man mbakôôm we tso man mbacirinahura, man mbamusan ikav youv mbi kasuav, man mbautyav ou cii, mba ve lu a we imôngo, a ikpelaior cii mba ve lu ken atô wou, ve cii ve mire shin atô u zegemnger sha iyange i mtim wou la." 
Ezekiel27:28 Sha mngor u ikenge i mbakôôm we tso agôndoamnger aa tenger. 
Ezekiel27:29 Ior vea due shin utso vev mbanahantso cii, mbatomov mba tsoov, man mbakôômtso sha zegemnger cii, vea va tile sha tar," 
Ezekiel27:30 vea ngor mliam vea vaa u sha ishima i vihin tsung, vea haa inya sha ityouv vev, man vea vingir iyol shin mtwe;" 
Ezekiel27:31 man vea torough ityouv vev sha ci wou, vea ta ikondo uya, vea vaa u, sha ishima i vihin man ijungwen i tsung." 
Ezekiel27:32 Ken mliam vem vea dugh kwelegh sha a we, vea ter u er: Ka anti nan lu er Tiru, u i tim un shin atô u zegemnger laa?" 
Ezekiel27:33 Zum u ikav youv mbi kasuav mough hen zegemnger samber yô, u na akuraior mgbough a akaa; sha mngee u akaa a ou man ikav youv mbi kasuav la, u na utor mba sha won kpishi hingir mbanyarev." 
Ezekiel27:34 Ahegen yô, i hembe u sha zegemnger, u uve shin aiv a mnger, ikav youv mbi kasuav man ikpelaior you cii, ve mire a we imôngo." 
Ezekiel27:35 Mbateman hen ityar i shin kpezegemnger cii kpiligh ve iyol a we, utor vev cia ngegh, ishiv vev hingir gbuu." 
Ezekiel27:36 Mbakasuav ken akuraior ve naha u tar; u hingir kwagh u cieryol, u kera lu sha won ga." 
Ezekiel28:1 Kwaghôron u TER shi va her a mo er: 
Ezekiel28:2 Wan u or, kaa tor u Tiru wer: Ter AÔNDO ngu kaan nahan er: Sha ci u ishima you i te ihagh, man u kaa wer: Mo M ngu aôndo, m tema sha ijiir i Aôndo ken atô u zegemnger, nahan kpaa u ngu or tsô, u ngu aôndo ga, shin er u hen ken ishima you wer, u ngu er Aôndo nahan kpaa—" 
Ezekiel28:3 yô, nenge, u hemba Daniel kwaghfan, ma kwagh u myer kera ngu u á yeren we ga;" 
Ezekiel28:3 yô, nenge, u hemba Daniel kwaghfan, ma kwagh u myer kera ngu u á yeren we ga;" 
Ezekiel28:4 ka sha kwaghfan wou man mkav wou la, u zua a inyaregh man u kohol zenaria man azurfa ken ayou a ou a koson inyaregh ker la;" 
Ezekiel28:5 sha mvese u kwaghfan wou man sha kasua wou, u seer inyaregh you man ishima you kpaa i kende sha, sha ci u inyaregh you;" 
Ezekiel28:6 nahan yô, Ter AÔNDO ngu kaan nahan er: Sha ci u u hen ken ishima you wer, u ngu er Aôndo yô," 
Ezekiel28:7 sha ci u nahan yô, nenge, Me va u a ior mba ve lu nongo ugen, ka ikurior i hemban cihin kwagh a akuraior cii, vea tsuwa usanker vev sha u eren num a mdooashe u kwaghfan wou, vea hôngor a iengem you la." 
Ezekiel28:8 Vea hungwa a we shin ihungwa, ú kpe ku u ishôm ken atô u zegemnger." 
Ezekiel28:9 Nahan kpaa shi ú kaa wer: Mo m ngu aôndo, sha ishigh ki u a lu wuan we, er u lu or tsô u lu aôndo ga, sha ikev i u a lu gberen we avav la zee?" 
Ezekiel28:10 Ú kpe ku u mbaipusuv sha ikev i ior mba ve lu nongo ugen; gadia ka Mo M kaa nahan ye, kape Ter AÔNDO A kaa ne." 
Ezekiel28:11 Man shi kwaghôron u TER va her a mo, er:" 
Ezekiel28:12 Wan u or, dugh kwelegh, ter tor u Tiru, kaa a na wer: Ter AÔNDO ngu kaan nahan er: We, u lu kunya u veren ikav a mi u kuman vough, u mgbough a mfe, man u doo ashe gande." 
Ezekiel28:13 U lu ken Eden, sule u Aôndo, hanma iwen i injaa cir u iyol: sardiu man topashi man daimondi, beril man oniki man yasepi, safir emeraldi man karbunkel; agbende a varen a sha mi sha u haren we a iyol yô, lu a sha zenaria; iyange i i gba u la, i vande sôron a, i ver a ver." 
Ezekiel28:14 We u lu cerubi u samber akper cirin; M ver u ijiir: U lu sha icighanwo u Aôndo, u zende hen atô u awen a usu." 
Ezekiel28:15 U lu vough sha igbenda you cii, hii sha iyange i i gba u je, zan zan ar sha iyange i i zua a ifer ken a we la." 
Ezekiel28:16 Ka sha mngee u akaa a kasua ou man i iv u a tom u iperagh ye, u maa u er isholibo; ka sha ci u nahan M zende u sha uwo u Aôndo kera er ka kwagh u hôngorough nahan ye, we, cerubi u cirin, M pav u a awen a usu." 
Ezekiel28:17 Ishima you ta ihagh sha ci u mdooashe wou; u vihi kwaghfan wou sha iengem you la; nahan M ta u inya, M gbihi u sha ishigh ki utor sha u ve̱ haa ashe sha a we." 
Ezekiel28:18 Ka sha mngee u aferakaa a ou, man sha mban u mimi u kasua wou, u hôngor a uicighanmbaajiriv ou; ka sha ci u nahan, M due a usu ken atô wou—u hia u—M gema u u hingir mtwem shin inya sha ishigh ki mba ve nenge a we cii." 
Ezekiel28:19 Ken akuraior mba ve fe u cii, kpiligh ve iyol a we; u hingir kwagh u cieryol, ú kera lu sha won ga." 
Ezekiel28:20 Kwaghôron u TER shi va her a mo, er:" 
Ezekiel28:21 Wan u or, ver ishigh you sha Shidon, ôr kwaghôron u profeti sha a na," 
Ezekiel28:22 kaa wer: Ter AÔNDO ngu kaan nahan er: Nenge, M ngu num a we, we Shidon; Me pase icivir Yam hen atô wou; man vea fa er Mo M lu TER ye, zum u Me ôr un ijir Me tsaha un, man Me pase mtsegh Wam ker a na kpaa la." 
Ezekiel28:23 Gadia Me tindi un a bouange man awambe sha ityembe na; mba i gber ve avav vea gba inya ken a na sha sanker u a lu num a na sha hanma ian cii, man vea fa er Mo M lu TER ye." 
Ezekiel28:24 Ma saa u kuman una kera lu ken ya u Iserael ga, shin ma kpamberakpa u vihin iyol una kera lu hen mba ve kase ve la kpaa ga, ka mba ngise ve laha ve la; nahan vea fa er Mo M lu Ter AÔNDO yô." 
Ezekiel28:25 Ter AÔNDO ngu kaan nahan er: Zum u Me kohol ya u Iserael hen akuraior a i sambe ve ker la, man Me pase mtsegh Wam ken a ve sha ashe a akuraior la, zum la vea tema ken tar ve, u lu M na wanakiriki Wam Yakob yô." 
Ezekiel28:26 Vea tema ken u bem bem, vea maa ayou, man vea môôr ikon i wain, een, vea tema bem bem, zum u Me ôr mba ve kase un ve laha un cii la ijir, Me tsaha ve; man vea fa er Mo TER M lu Aôndo ve ye." 
Ezekiel29:1 Sha inyom i sha pue, uwer u sha pue kpaa, ayange a u pue kar ahar la, kwaghôron u TER va her a mo er:" 
Ezekiel29:2 Wan u or, ver ishigh sha Farao tor u Igipiti, ôr kwaghôron u profeti sha a na man sha Igipiti cii;" 
Ezekiel29:3 ôr kwagh, kaa wer: Ter AÔNDO ngu kaan nahan er: Nenge, M ngu num a we, we, Farao tor u Igipiti, zegedarakon u a yaven shin atô u iwagh ne, u a kaa er: Ifi wam ka u wam iyol yam je, m er un sha ci u wam iyol yam." 
Ezekiel29:4 Me wa u utsuwe ken azegher, Me na ishu i ken uifi ou ia var sha avuu a ou; Me dugh u shin uifi ou kera, a ishu i ken uifi ou cii, i i var sha avuu a ou la." 
Ezekiel29:5 Nahan Me kende u ken desereti, we kua ishu i ken uifi ou cii; ú gba ken ikôngough ki kpuun kpuun, á kera kohol we ijiir i môm ga, man á ii u kpaa ga; Me gema u ú hingir kwaghyan u inyamtoho man inyon i sha." 
Ezekiel29:6 Tsô mba ve tem ken Igipiti cii vea fa er Mo M lu TER yô, sha ci u ve lu ya u Iserael gbough ku sha iyia yô." 
Ezekiel29:7 Zum u ve kôr u sha uwe, u sombo kera, man u ande avandeaveegh a ve cii; man zum u ve lian sha a we, u sombo, man u na awenge a ve cii tenger." 
Ezekiel29:8 Nahan yô, Ter AÔNDO ngu kaan nahan er: Nenge, Me va a sanker sha a we, man Me tim or man zendenya ken a we kera cii." 
Ezekiel29:9 Tar u Igipiti kpaa ua hingir ice man tihialôgh; man vea fa er Mo M lu TER ye; sha ci u a kaa er: Ifi ka u wam, man ka mo m er un ye." 
Ezekiel29:10 Nahan yô, nenge, M ngu num a we, man a uifi ou kpaa; Me er tar u Igipiti ua hingir tihialôgh man ice dedoo, hii hen Mikedol zan zan za ar hen Shiene man ikighirtar i Etiopia." 
Ezekiel29:11 Ma nguhar u or kar sha u ga, man ma pandegh ku zendenya kpaa kua kar sha u ga, ma or nana tema ken u kpaa ga, zan zan anyom á kar akunduahar." 
Ezekiel29:12 Me gema tar u Igipiti ua hingir ice ken atô u ityar igen i i lu atse yô, agar a na kpaa ken atô u agar agen a i yôhôl a la; aa hingir atse zan zan anyom akunduahar; man Me sambe Mbaigipiti ken akuraior, Me tsenda ve sha ityar ityar." 
Ezekiel29:13 Gadia Ter AÔNDO ngu kaan nahan er: Sha mbee u anyom akunduahar la, Me kohol Mbaigipiti ken akuraior a lu i sambe ve ker la." 
Ezekiel29:14 Me gema mlu u Mbaigipiti, Me na, vea hide ken tar u Pateroshi, hen tar u i mar ve la; vea hingir tartor u gban ijime heregh." 
Ezekiel29:15 Tartor ve ua hemba ndahar a ityartor igen; ua kera kende iyol i u sha ken akuraior ga; Me hide a ve ijime je, vea kera shi teman tor sha akuraior ga." 
Ezekiel29:16 Ua kera lu ishuur u ya u Iserael kpaa ga, er i umbur iferkwagh ve, zum u ve gema ashe hen a ve, la; man vea fa er Mo M lu Ter AÔNDO ye." 
Ezekiel29:17 Tsô sha inyom i sha ikundu kar utaankaruhar, uwer u hiihii sha iyange i u di i hiihii la, kwaghôron u TER va her a mo er:" 
Ezekiel29:18 Wan u or, Nebukadinesar tor Babilon, na ikumutya na, i nôngo num a Tiru sha ican; hanma ityough ki orough kpur, man hanma vandegh kpaa torough; nahan kpaa un kua ikumutya na zua a ma injar hen Tiru, sha ci u ityav mbi a nôngo a na la ga;" 
Ezekiel29:19 nahan yô, Ter AÔNDO ngu kaan nahan er: Nenge, Me na tar u Igipiti sha ikev i Nebukadinesar tor u Babilon, una kura ior i u, una ya ishar i u, una sar un, á hingir injar i ikumutya na." 
Ezekiel29:20 M na un tar u Igipiti sha ci u tom na u a er yô, gadia ve erem tom, kape Ter AÔNDO A kaa ne." 
Ezekiel29:21 Sha iyange la Me na korough kua mende hen ya u Iserael, man Me na, ú ôr kwagh vangertiôr ken a ve; nahan vea fa er Mo M lu TER yô." 
Ezekiel30:1 Kwaghôron u TER shi va her a mo er: 
Ezekiel30:2 Wan u or, ôr kwaghôron u profeti kaa wer: Ter AÔNDO ngu kaan nahan er: Vaa nen, wuu! iyange la!" 
Ezekiel30:3 Gadia iyange la mgbôghom, ka iyange i TER i mgbôghom ye, ka iyange i abeen; ka shighe u akuraior je la." 
Ezekiel30:4 Sanker una nyôr ken Igipiti, man ican kpishi ia lu ken Etiopia, zum u mba i woo ve vea haa inya ken Igipiti, man á kura ikumior na kera man á yôhôl amagh a na kpaa." 
Ezekiel30:5 Etiopia man Puti man Ludi, man ior anza kposo kposo, man Kubi, man ior mba tar u u ye ikur a ve la, á wua ve sha sanker a ve imôngo." 
Ezekiel30:6 TER ngu kaan nahan er: Ve mba ve tuur Igipiti la vea gba; imanger i tahav nav ia gba inya, á hii hen Mikedol zan zan za ar hen Shiene; á wua ve kimi sha sanker, kape Ter AÔNDO A kaa ne." 
Ezekiel30:7 Vea hingir ice ken atô u ityar igen i i lu atse yô, agar a na aa lu ken atô u agar agen a i yôhôl a la." 
Ezekiel30:8 Nahan vea fa er Mo M lu TER yô, zum u Me haa usu ken Igipiti, man mbawasen un cii vea tim." 
Ezekiel30:9 Sha iyange la mbatyomov vea due sha ishigh Yagh vea yem shin utso sha u za tan Mbaetiopia mba ve tem gbidaa la mciem iyol, ican kpishi ia tser ve er sha iyange i Igipiti nahan; gadia, nenge, ngi van." 
Ezekiel30:10 Ter AÔNDO ngu kaan nahan er: Me tim ikpelaior i Igipiti kera sha ikev i Nebukadinesar tor u Babilon la. 
Ezekiel30:11 Un a ior nav imôngo, ka ior mba hemban vihin kwagh a akuraior cii, á va a ve sha u vea tim tar la; vea tsuwa usanker vev sha u nôngon ityav a Igipiti, vea iv tar la a mba i woo ve." 
Ezekiel30:12 Me er uifi vea uma, Me gema tar Me wa u sha ikev i mbaaferev; Me gema tar ua hingir ice kua akaa a a lu kimi cii, sha ikev i ior mba ve lu nongo ugen; Ka Mo TER M kaa nahan ye." 
Ezekiel30:13 Ter AÔNDO ngu kaan nahan er: Me tim akombo kera, Me na mbaaôndo mba gbiliniv vea bee ken Nofe; ma tor una kera due ken tar u Igipiti ga; man Me haa mciem ken tar u Igipiti." 
Ezekiel30:14 Me gema Pateroshi kpaa una hingir ice, Me haa usu ken Soan, man Me ôr No ijir, Me tsaha un." 
Ezekiel30:15 Me haa iyugh Yam sha Shin, garutya u Igipiti la; man me tim ikpelaior i No." 
Ezekiel30:16 Me haa usu ken Igipiti; Shin una ya ican tsung; á hembe No kera; Nofe una zua a mbaahendanev atetan. 
Ezekiel30:17 Ikaior i Aven man i Pibeseti, á wua ve sha sanker; man kasev vea nyôr ken kwar." 
Ezekiel30:18 Hen Tehafeneheshi kpaa iyange ia wa ime, zum u Me kever igbouv mbi Igipiti heregh kera, man imanger i agee a na kpaa ia bee ker a na; un yô, ibeenegh kia cir un; man ônov nav mba kasev á yem a ve uikangen." 
Ezekiel30:19 Kape Me ôr Igipiti ijir Me tsaha un la, nahan man vea fa er Mo M lu TER ye." 
Ezekiel30:20 Tsô sha inyom i sha pue kar môm, uwer u hiihii, ayange a u ataankarahar la, kwaghôron u TER va her a mo er:" 
Ezekiel30:21 Wan u or, M kever uwegh ku Farao tor u Igipiti; man nenge, i kange ku sha u á sôr ku ga, man i kange ku tsarikondo sha u ku̱ taver er kua kusu sanker kpaa ga." 
Ezekiel30:22 Nahan yô, Ter AÔNDO ngu kaan nahan er: Nenge, M ngu num a Farao tor u Igipiti, Me kever ave a na, uwegh ku taver man ku ku vande kever la kpaa; Me na er sanker una osough sha uwegh nagh yô." 
Ezekiel30:23 Me sambe Mbaigipiti ken akuraior, me tsenda ve sha ityar ityar." 
Ezekiel30:24 Me taver ave a tor u Babilon, Me na sanker Wam sha uwegh nagh; kpa ave a Farao yô, Me kever a, nahan una toghor sha ishigh nagh er ka or u i gber nan ivav i kuugh yô." 
Ezekiel30:25 Me tuur ave a tor u Babilon, kpa ave a Farao yô, aa shir; nahan man vea fa er Mo M lu TER ye, zum u Me wa sanker Wam sha uwegh ku tor u Babilon, man una naregh ku sha tar u Igipiti yô." 
Ezekiel30:26 Me sambe Mba Igipiti ken akuraior, Me tsenda ve sha ityar ityar; nahan man vea fa er Mo M lu TER ye." 
Ezekiel31:1 Tsô sha inyom i sha pue kar môm, uwer u sha utar, iyange i u i hiihii la, kwaghôron u TER va her a Mo, er:" 
Ezekiel31:2 Wan u or, kaa a Farao tor u Igipiti, man a ikpelaior na wer: Ka an je u bee nan sha mhembe wouwe?" 
Ezekiel31:3 Nenge, Ashiria lu kon u sedar sha Lebanon, a agbaa a doon, man ikô i gban mure, man u tav kpaa; man ityough ki u tagher sha abeen." 
Ezekiel31:4 Mngerem koso un, zegemnger na un, a vese a tav sha, uifi nav kuwa kase tser ijiir i i lôô un la, ukungô nav kar yem hen ikon i ken ikôngo cii." 
Ezekiel31:5 Ka ape i lu man a tav a kar ikon i ken ikôngo cii ne; agbaa a na seer ngeen, man a lihe sha ci u mngerem ma kpishim, zum u a mende a vese la." 
Ezekiel31:6 Inyon i sha cii wa aya a i sha agbaa a na; shin agbaa a na, inyam i toho cii mar ônov vev; shin mure na, akuraior a vesen cii tema." 
Ezekiel31:7 Kape a hingir kwagh u doon ashe sha mkehe na, sha mlihi u agbaa a na la; gadia amise na za za ar hen mngerem ma kpishim." 
Ezekiel31:8 Ikon i sedar ken sule u Aôndo fatyô u yeren un ga; ikon i fer kpaa kuma sha agbaa a na ga; ikon i pelatanu kpaa kuma sha agbaa a na a kiriki ga; ma kon u ken sule u Aôndo kpaa doo ashe kuma sha a na ga. 
Ezekiel31:9 M er un, a doo ashe sha mngee u agbaa a na je, ikon i ken Eden cii, i i lu ken sule u Aôndo la, tôm er ma i lu er un nahan." 
Ezekiel31:10 Nahan yô, Ter AÔNDO ngu kaan nahan er: Sha ci u a tav sha, man ityough nagh tav tagher sha a been, ishima na kpaa ta ihagh, sha mtav na," 
Ezekiel31:11 Me na un sha ikev i orageegh u ken akuraior, una er un kwagh je; M zenda un sha ci u ifer na la." 
Ezekiel31:12 Ior mba ve lu nongo ugen, ka ikurior i hemban vihin kwagh a akuraior cii, ve wua un kera, ve undu un; agbaa a na haa sha iwo man shin apev cii, agbaa a na a kiriki kever haa shin iwagh i hen tar la cii; akuraior a sha won cii kar hen mure na kera, undu un." 
Ezekiel31:13 Inyon i sha cii, ia tema sha gungur na, man inyamtoho cii kpaa ia lu sha agbaa a na—" 
Ezekiel31:14 sha u ma ikon i shin mnger i̱ de kera kenden iyol i i sha sha mtav u i ga, man i̱ de kera taven i̱ za tagher ityough sha abeen kpaa ga, man shi sha er ma ikon i man mngerem, i̱ de kera taven aren sha ga; gadia ve cii i na ve ken ku, hen ajiir a zan kweng a taregh la, hen atô u ônov mba iorov, hen mba ve hongo shin ihungwa la." 
Ezekiel31:15 Ter AÔNDO ngu kaan nahan er: Sha iyange i a yem shin Sheol la, M na ijungwen; M cir aivamnger sha ci na, man M yange uifi nav, nahan mngerem ma kpishim tile. M na Lebanon kpaa, a zungwe sha ci na man ikon ken toho cii kpaa ure sha ci na." 
Ezekiel31:16 M na akuraior a gbidye ikarikase iyol sha ci u iov i mgbe na, zum u M gbihi un shin Sheol a mba ve hongo shin ihungwa la imôngo; ikon i Eden cii, uicuwan man mba hemban doon mba Lebanon, mbamanmngerem cii, i sur ve asema shin ajiir a zan kweng a taregh la." 
Ezekiel31:17 Ve kpaa ve yem shin Sheol a na imôngo, hen mba i woo ve sha sanker la, een, ka ve mba ve lu mbawasen un, mba ve tem ken mure na, ker atô u, akuraior la." 
Ezekiel31:18 Ka an je u bee nan sha icivir you man mhembe wou ken ikon i Edenee? Nahan kpaa á hungwa a we a ikon i Eden imôngo, shin ajiir a zan kweng a taregh la; ú yav ken atô u mbaipusuv, a mba i woo ve sha sanker la imôngo. Ka Farao a ikpelaior na la cii je la, kape Ter AÔNDO A kaa ne." 
Ezekiel32:1 Sha inyom i sha pue kar uhar, uwer di u sha pue kar uhar, sha iyange i u i hiihii la, kwaghôron u TER va her a mo er:" 
Ezekiel32:2 Wan u or, dugh kwelegh, ter Farao tor u Igipiti, kaa a na wer: Gumbegha u ken akuraior, u saa ve! U lu er darakon ken uzegembamngerev nahan; u duen ken uifi ou, u buusu mngerem sha angahar a ou, u hundu uifi vev." 
Ezekiel32:3 Ter AÔNDO ngu kaan nahan er: Me samber kper Wam sha a we; Me tindi ikpelaior i i kohol ken akuraior kpishi, vea kpela u sha kper Wam." 
Ezekiel32:4 Me gbihi u sha tar, Me kende u ken ikôngo, Me na inyon i sha cii ia tema sha a we, Me na inyam i toho sha won cii ia ide sha awe." 
Ezekiel32:5 Me haa inyam you sha iwo, Me iv apev sha mkehem ou." 
Ezekiel32:6 Me ur tar sha awambe a ou a a dugh ken a we la, zan zan á ar sha iwo; iwagh ia iv sha a we." 
Ezekiel32:7 Zum u Me pir u la, Me cir Sha, Me na asan a na a̱ wa ime; Me cir iyange sha ibeen, uwer kpaa ua kera na iwanger i u ga." 
Ezekiel32:8 Iwanger i i mondo Sha cii, Me gema i, ia hingir ime sha a we, Me na ime ia wa sha tar wou, kape Ter AÔNDO A kaa ne." 
Ezekiel32:9 Me na ishima ia nyian akuraior kpishi, zum u Me pase mtim wou ken akuraior, zan zan á za ar sha ityar i u lu a vande fan i ga la kpaa." 
Ezekiel32:10 Een, Me na akuraior kpishi, á kpiligh a iyol sha ci wou, utor mba a kpaa vea cia u tsung, zum u Me kunde sanker Wam sha ishiv vev la; vea zer gbidyen ikarikase iyol gbem, hanma or sha ci u uma u nan, sha iyange i u gba la." 
Ezekiel32:11 Gadia Ter AÔNDO ngu kaan nahan er: Sanker u tor u Babilon una va sha a we. 
Ezekiel32:12 Me na, á wua ikpelaior you sha usanker mba mbaageev; ikurior i hemban vihin kwagh a akuraior agen cii, vea vihi ihagh i Igipiti kera, ikpelaior na cii kpaa ia tim." 
Ezekiel32:13 Shi Me tim uzendenya nav cii kera, mba hen kpe u mngerem ma kpishim la; ma nguhar u or kua gbuusu ma ga, ma apande a uzendenya kpaa aa hundu ma ga." 
Ezekiel32:14 Nahan Me na mngerem vem maa wanger, Me na uifi vev vea kuwa er mkurem nahan, kape Ter AÔNDO A kaa ne." 
Ezekiel32:15 Zum u Me gema tar u Igipiti ua hingir ice man gbilinkwagh, tar u i kar a akaa a a mgbough kimi la kera; zum u Me tsaha mba ve tem ken u cii yô, shighe la man vea fa er Mo M lu TER ye." 
Ezekiel32:16 Ngun ka kwelegh u vea gber je ne; ônkasev mba akuraior vea gber un; ka sha Igipiti man ikpelaior na cii vea gber un ye, kape Ter AÔNDO A kaa ne." 
Ezekiel32:17 Tsô sha inyom i sha pue kar uhar la, sha ayange pue kar ataan a uwer shon la, kwaghôron u TER va her a mo er:" 
Ezekiel32:18 Wan u or, vaa sha ci u ikpelaior i Igipiti, haa ve (ka wen man ônkasev mba akuraior a a lun a agee la) shin ajiir a zan kweng a taregh, a mba ve hongo shin ihungwa la imôngo." 
Ezekiel32:19 Ka an je u hemba nan dooashee? Hungwa, za kohol mbaipusuv." 
Ezekiel32:20 Ve haa inya ken atô u mba i woo ve sha sanker. I na sanker ve; kura un kera a ikpelaior na cii. 
Ezekiel32:21 Shin atô u Sheol mbaageev mba taver ayol vea ôr kwagh na kua mba ve wasen un la, er: Ve sen, ve yav ving, ve mbaipusuv, mba i woo ve sha sanker la." 
Ezekiel32:22 Ashur ngu her a ikpelaior na cii; iwar na kase un; ka mba i woo ve cii; i wua ve sha sanker; 
Ezekiel32:23 i time iwar ve ken ajiir a hemban zan a shin ihungwa, man ikpelaior na kase uwar na, ve cii i wua ve, i wua ve sha sanker, ka ve mba ve tan ior mciem iyol ken tar u mbaumav je la." 
Ezekiel32:24 Elam kpaa ngu her a ikpelaior na cii, ve kase uwar na; ve cii i wua ve, i wua ve sha sanker, ka mba ve sen a ipusu shin ajiir a zan kweng a taregh la; ve mba ve tan ior mciem iyol ken tar u mbaumav, mba yan kunya ve a mba ve hongo shin ihungwa la imôngo." 
Ezekiel32:25 Ve tar un gambe ken atô u mba i woo ve, a ikpelaior na imôngo cii; iwar na kase un; ve cii ka mbaipusuv, i wua ve sha sanker; gadia ve taan ior mciem iyol ken tar u mbaumav, mba yan kunya ve a mba ve hongo shin ihungwa la imôngo; i wa un ken atô u mba i woo ve la." 
Ezekiel32:26 Mesheki man Tubal mba her a ikpelaior ve cii; iwar ve kase ve; ve cii ka mbaipusuv, i wua ve sha sanker; gadia ve taan ior mciem iyol ken tar u mbaumav" 
Ezekiel32:27 Ve kera yav a anomaior a mbaipusuv, a i wua la, imôngo ga; a a sen shin Sheol a ikav mbi utyav mbi a, i gbir usanker vev ve ver ityouv vev sha mi, man aferakaa a ve cir ve, nga sha akuhe ve; gadia anomaior ta ior mciem iyol ken tar u mbaumav." 
Ezekiel32:28 We kpaa á sombo u ken atô u mbaipusuv, ú yav a mba i woo ve sha sanker la imôngo." 
Ezekiel32:29 Edom ngu heregh, a utor nav man atiator a na cii, shin er ve lu a agee nahan kpaa, i gbir ve a mba i woo ve sha sanker la imôngo." 
Ezekiel32:30 Mbatarev mba shin imbusutarimese kpaa, mba her, ve cii, kua Mbashidon cii, mba ve sen a mba i woo ve la imôngo. Mciem ma ve taan ior iyol cii sha tahav vev la, hingir ve kwagh u kunya; ve yav ipusu a mba i woo ve sha sanker la imôngo, mba yan kunya ve a mba ve hongo shin ihungwa la imôngo." 
Ezekiel32:31 Farao una nenge a ve nahan ishima ia sur un sha ci u ikpelaior na cii; Farao man ikumutya na cii; i wua ve sha sanker, kape Ter AÔNDO A kaa ne." 
Ezekiel32:32 Gadia M ver un, lu kwagh u cier iyol ken tar u mbaumav; nahan á gbir un ken atô u mbaipusuv, mba i woo ve sha sanker la imôngo, ka Farao a ikpelaior na cii la, kape Ter AÔNDO A kaa ne." 
Ezekiel33:1 Kwaghôron u TER va her a mo, er:" 
Ezekiel33:2 Wan u or, ôr kwagh a ônov mba ior ou, kaa a ve wer: Zum u Me va a sanker sha ma tar yô, man ior mba hen tar shon la ve tsuwa or môm ken a ve, ve ver nan orkuran," 
Ezekiel33:3 man nana nenge sanker una lu van sha tar la, man nana tôngo korough, nan pase ior yô," 
Ezekiel33:4 nahan hanma or u nan ongo mkaa u kor la man nan we iko ga, man sanker una va una kar a nan kera yô, awambe a nan aa lu sha ityough ki nan." 
Ezekiel33:5 Nan ungwa mkaa u kor, kpa nan wa iko ga, awambe a nan aa lu sha ityough ki nan; kpa aluer nana we iko sha kwaghwan la yô, ma nan yem uma u nan." 
Ezekiel33:6 Kpa aluer orkuran nana nenge sanker van, man nana tôngo korough ga, man ior vea zua a mpase ga, man sanker za va, man una kar a ma or ken a ve kera yô; or la, á kar a nan kera sha ifer i nan, kpa awambe a nan yô, Me pine orkuran la kwagh sha mi." 
Ezekiel33:7 Nahan we, wan u or, M ver u orkuran sha ya u Iserael; nahan yô, aluer wea ungwa kwaghôron sha zwa Wam yô, wa ve kwagh sha ci Wam." 
Ezekiel33:8 Zum u M kaa a iferor Mer: We iferor, ú kpe kpee, man ú kera ôr kwagh, ú wa iferor kwagh sha u nana̱ undu gbenda u nan ga yô, nahan iferor la nana kpe ken isholibo i nan, kpa awambe a nan yô, Me ker a her a we." 
Ezekiel33:9 Nahan kpaa, aluer ú wa iferor kwagh sha gbenda u nan, sha u nana̱ undu u, kpa nana undu gbenda u nan ga yô, nana kpe ken ifer i nan; kpa we yô, u yima uma wou." 
Ezekiel33:10 We, wan u or, kaa ya u Iserael wer: Ne mba kaan nahan ner: Afer a ase man asorabo ase nga sha ityouv yasev, se ure ken a, á er nan sé lu uma?" 
Ezekiel33:11 Kaa a ve wer: Er M lu u uma ne, Ter AÔNDO ngu kaan nahan er: Ku u iferor doom ga; sarem pe iferor nana̱ gema, nana̱ undu gbenda u nan, nana̱ lu uma; gema nen, gema nen, undu nen igbenda yen i bo la; gadia ka sha ci u nyi né gba kpen nahana, we ya u Iseraele?" 
Ezekiel33:12 We wan u or, kaa a ônov mba ior ou wer: Perapera u ormimi una yima nan sha iyange i nan per tindi la ga; man sha kwagh u ifer i iferor yô, nana kera tim sha i ga, sha iyange i nana gema nana undu iferkwagh i nan la; man orperapera di kpaa, nana fatyô u lun uma sha perapera u nan sha iyange i nana er isholibo la ga." 
Ezekiel33:13 Zum u Mea kaa a orperapera Mer, nana lu uma kpee je, kpa nana suur sha perapera u nan, man nana gema á er iferkwagh yô, á kera umbur ma ieren i perapera i nan je ga; kpa iferkwagh i nan er la, ka sha i nana kpe ye." 
Ezekiel33:14 Man shi zum u Me kaa a iferor Mer: Ú kpe keng; aluer nana gema nana undu isholibo i nan, man nana er kwagh u sha tindi man u a lu vough yô—" 
Ezekiel33:15 aluer iferor nana hide a ityungu, man nana hide a kwagh u nan ngohol sha agee la, nana zende ken akaawan a uma, nana kera er ma iferkwagh ga yô, nana lu uma kpee je, nana kpe ga." 
Ezekiel33:16 Ma isholibo i môm i nan er kpaa, á kera umbur nan i ga; nan er sha tindi vough; nana lu uma kpee je." 
Ezekiel33:17 Nahan kpaa, ônov mba ior ou mba kaan er: Gbenda u TER ngu vough ga; kpa gema ka ve, gbenda ve u lu vough ga ye." 
Ezekiel33:18 Aluer orperapera nana gema nana undu perapera u nan la, nana er iferkwagh yô, nana kpe sha i." 
Ezekiel33:19 Man aluer iferor nana gema nana undu iferkwagh i nan la, man nana er kwagh u sha tindi man u vough yô, nana lu uma sha mi." 
Ezekiel33:20 Nahan kpaa, ne mba kaan ner: Gbenda u TER ngu vough ga. We ya u Iserael, Me ôr ne ijir, hanmô wen sha igbenda i nan." 
Ezekiel33:21 Tsô sha inyom i sha pue kar uhar i i yem a vese uikangen la, uwer u sha pue, ayange a u ataan la yô, or u nan wer ken Yerusalem nan va her a mo, nan va kaa er: I hembe gar." 
Ezekiel33:22 Yô, uwegh ku TER lu sha a mo aikighe, er or u nan wer la lu a va ga la; A bugh zwa wam, shighe u kuma u nana va nyôr her a mo pepe la, nahan zwa wam bugh, m kera lu ving ga." 
Ezekiel33:23 Nahan kwaghôron u TER va her a mo, er:" 
Ezekiel33:24 Wan u or, ve mba ve tem ken uya mba i yôhôl ve kera ken tar u Iserael la, mba kaan er: Aberaham lu or môm tsô, man a ya dyako u tar ne; man se yô, se mba kpishi, i na se tar ne, u hingir se dyako." 
Ezekiel33:25 Nahan yô, kaa a ve wer: Ter AÔNDO ngu kaan nahan er: Ne mba yan inyam a awambe ker, man ne mba kenden ashe a en sha sha akombo a en, shi ne mba haan awambe inya kpaa; nahan kpaa tar ne ua shi á lu dyako wene?"
