Ezekiel33:26 Ne mba suur sha sanker wen, ne mba eren akaa a ndôhôrshima; hanma or ker a ven nan vihi kwase u or u wan ndor a nan; nahan kpaa tar ne ua shi á lu dyako wene?" 
Ezekiel33:27 Kaa a ve nahan wer: Ter AÔNDO ngu kaan nahan er: Er M lu u uma ne, ve mba ve lu ken uya mba i yôhôl ve kera la, á wua ve sha sanker kpee, man u nan lu ken toho yô, Me na inyamtoho ia ya nan, man mba ve lu ken ayouautya a taver man ken ubarmbaiwoov, bouange una wua ve." 
Ezekiel33:28 Me gema tar ne ua hingir ice man kwagh u kpilighyol, man imanger i agee a u la ia kar kera; iwo i Iserael kpaa ia hingir ice, ma or nana kar sha i ga." 
Ezekiel33:29 Nahan vea fa er Mo M lu TER ye, zum u Me gema tar ua hingir ice man kwagh u kpilighyol, sha ci u akaa a ndôhôrshima a ve er la cii." 
Ezekiel33:30 Man we yô, wan u or, ônov mba ior ou mba teren we hen ukpekpe man sha ihinda i ayoughough mba ôron ayol a ve, hanmô a anngô u nan, er: Shi va, va ungwa kwaghôron u a dugh hen TER yô." 
Ezekiel33:31 Mba van her a we er ior ve ve nahan, ve tema sha ishigh you er ka ior Av nahan, ve ungwa akaaôron a ou, kpa mba eren sha a ga; gadia mba tesen dooshima ve sha zwa kpishi, kpa ishima ve yô, ngi sha mtsera ve." 
Ezekiel33:32 Nenge, u ngu ve icam i dedoo i or u nan doo imo, man nan fe u kuhwan ityogholov dedoo yô; gadia ve ungwa akaaôron a ou, kpa mba eren sha a ga." 
Ezekiel33:33 Man zum u kwagh ne una va kure sha mi yô—nenge, ngu van kpee—nahan vea fa er profeti a lu ken a ve yô." 
Ezekiel34:1 Kwaghôron u TER va her a mo, er:" 
Ezekiel34:2 Wan u or, ôr kwaghôron u profeti sha mbakuran mba Iserael, ôr kwaghôron u profeti, kaa a ve, ka mbakuran je la, wer: Ter AÔNDO ngu kaan nahan er: Kwagh á tser mbakuran mba Iserael mba ve koson ayol a ve la! Kera ka iyôngo man mbakuran ve koson i gaa?" 
Ezekiel34:3 Ne mba ye ahôm a i, man ne mba hee akondo a sha aive a i, ne mba woo i i kehen dindim dindim; kpa iyôngo yô, ne mba koson i ga." 
Ezekiel34:4 I zunen la, ne taver i ga, i uange la ne sôr i ga, i i kever la, ne kange i ga, i i tsum la, ne hide a i ga, man i i saa la kpaa, ne ker i ga; kpa ka sha agee man sha ipila ne tem tor sha i ye." 
Ezekiel34:5 Nahan i sambe kera, sha ci u orkuran lu ga yô, i gema i hingir kwaghyan u inyamtoho cii, maa i sambe kera." 
Ezekiel34:6 Iyôngo Yam lu zenden kughukuku sha iwo cii, man sha hanma igungu u taven; een, i sambe iyôngo Yam sha tar wuee, man ma or u keren shin u tôvon i lu ga." 
Ezekiel34:7 Nahan yô, ne mbakuran, ungwa nen kwaghôron u TER:" 
Ezekiel34:8 Ter AÔNDO ngu kaan nahan er: Er M lu u uma ne, mimi je, sha ci u iyôngo Yam i hingir ishar yô, man iyôngo Yam hingir kwaghyan u inyamtoho cii, sha ci u orkuran nan lu ga, man mbakuranilev Av kpaa ker iyôngo Yam ga, kpa mbakuranilev koso ayol a ve, ve koso iyôngo Yam ga," 
Ezekiel34:9 sha ci u nahan yô, ne mbakuranilev, ungwa nen kwaghôron u TER:" 
Ezekiel34:10 Ter AÔNDO ngu kaan nahan er: Nenge, M ngu num a mbakuranilev; Me ker iyôngo Yam hen a ve, Me kera rumun Mer ve̱ lu mbakosoniyôngo ga; mbakuranilev kpaa vea kera koso ayol a ve ga; Me yima iyôngo Yam sha zwa ve, sha u i̱ de kera luun kwaghyan ve ga yô." 
Ezekiel34:11 Gadia Ter AÔNDO ngu kaan nahan er: Nenge, Mo iyol Yam, Me ker iyôngo Yam man Me tôv i hwange." 
Ezekiel34:12 Er orkuranilev ka nan tôv ikumile i nan sha iyange i nan lu ker atô u iyôngo i nan i i sambe i wue wue la, kape Mo kpaa Me tôv iyôngo Yam; Me yima i ken ajiir a i sambe i la cii, sha iyange i abeen man angôghime la." 
Ezekiel34:13 Me due a ve ken akuraior, me kohol ve ken ityar i sha won, Me va a ve ken tar ve jim; Me koso ve sha iwo i Iserael, hen iwagh man ken ajiir a ior ve tem ken tar la cii." 
Ezekiel34:14 Me koso ve hen ijiir i toho u doo her yô; vea zenden vea yaan toho sha ugôgômbaiwoov mba Iserael; ka heera vea yav hen ijiir i dedoo ye, man hen ijiir i toho u lu gese gese yô, vea yaan kwagh sha iwo i Iserael." 
Ezekiel34:15 Mo iyol Yam Me koso iyôngo Yam, man Me na ia yav inya, kape Ter AÔNDO A kaa ne." 
Ezekiel34:16 Me ker kwagh u a saa yô, man Me hide a kwagh u a tsum kera la, man Me kange kwagh ua kever yô, man Me taver kwagh u a gbe angev yô; kpa kwagh u gban ikôr man u taver la, Me tim un kera; Me koso ve sha gbenda vough." 
Ezekiel34:17 We ikumuile Yam yô, kape Ter AÔNDO A kaa ne: Nenge, Me ôr ijir her atô u iyôngo a iyôngo man her atô u anomaiyôngo a ukpev." 
Ezekiel34:18 Er ne ye gwergwe u dedoo nahan, kuma ne gaa, ne shi ne ndyar kwagh u a shi la sha angahar a ene?" 
Ezekiel34:19 Nahan iyôngo Yam i̱ ya kwagh u ne ndyar angahar a en sha mi, man i̱ ma kwagh u ne hundu sha angahar a en shinii?" 
Ezekiel34:20 Nahan yô, Ter AÔNDO ngu kaan a ve nahan er: Nenge, Mo iyol Yam, Me ôr ijir her atô u iyôngo i kehen a i kanden." 
Ezekiel34:21 Sha ci u ne mgbegha i aseer la sha imbusu man sha vandegh, man ne tume ve ikor, ne sambe ve wue wue," 
Ezekiel34:22 sha ci u nahan yô, Me yima ikumuile Yam man ia kera lu ishar ga; man Me ôr ijir her atô u iyôngo a iyôngo." 
Ezekiel34:23 Me ver orkuran môm sha a ve, nana koson ve, ka wanakiriki Wam Davidi je la, ka un una koson ve shi ka un kpaa una hingir orkuran ve ye." 
Ezekiel34:24 Mo TER Me hingir Aôndo ve, man wanakiriki Wam, Davidi, una tema tor sha a ve; ka Mo TER M kaa nahan ye." 
Ezekiel34:25 Me ya ikur i bem a ve, Me er inyamtoho i vihin kwagh ia due hen tar la kera, man vea tema bem bem ken taaikôngo, man vea yav shin ikô kpaa." 
Ezekiel34:26 Me gema ve kua ajiir a a kase sha igungu Wam la, aa hingir iveren i dedoo; Me na ikumenura ua nôô sha shighe na; á lu ikumenura u haan iveren." 
Ezekiel34:27 Ikon i ken ikôngo ia ume atam, man tar kpaa ua doo iyiagh, vea tema bem bem ken tar ve; nahan vea fa er Mo M lu TER ye, zum u Me kever amande a igbur ve la, man Me yima ve sha ikev i mba ve ker ve, ve hingir ikpan la." 
Ezekiel34:28 Vea kera lu ishar i akuraior ga, man inyamtoho kpaa ia kera ya ve ga, kpa vea tema bem bem, ma or nana kera ta ve mciem iyol ga." 
Ezekiel34:29 Me na iyiav mbia doo ve je, mbia za gwa, ijen ia kera tim ve ken tar ve kera ga, man vea kera ya kunya hen akuraior kpaa ga." 
Ezekiel34:30 Nahan vea fa er Mo TER, Aôndo ve, M lu a ve imôngo, man ve, ya u Iserael kpaa ve lu ior Av yô, kape Ter AÔNDO A kaa ne." 
Ezekiel34:31 Ne iyôngo Yam, iyôngo i M koson i, ne mba ior, man Mo yô, M ngu Aôndo wen, kape Ter AÔNDO A kaa ne." 
Ezekiel35:1 Kwaghôron u TER va her a mo, kaa er:" 
Ezekiel35:2 Wan u or, ver ishigh you sha uwo u Seir, ôr kwaghôron u profeti sha u," 
Ezekiel35:3 kaa a u wer: Ter AÔNDO ngu kaan nahan er: Nenge, M ngu num a we, we uwo u Seir, Me naregh uwegh sha a we, Me gema u ú hingir ice, man kwagh u kpilighyol." 
Ezekiel35:4 Me gema agar a ou aa hingir alôgh, man we yô, ú hingir ice, man ú fa er Mo M lu TER ye." 
Ezekiel35:5 Sha ci u u lu a ihom ken ishima gbem, man u gema Mbaiserael u na ve sha agee a sanker sha iyange i ican ve, sha shighe u mtsaha ve, u masetyô la;" 
Ezekiel35:6 nahan yô, er M lu u uma ne, kape Ter AÔNDO A kaa ne, Me gema u, ú hingir awambe; awambe aa tôv u ityô; er u venda awambe ga yô, awambe aa tôv u ityô." 
Ezekiel35:7 Me gema uwo u Seir, ua hingir kwagh u kpilighyol man ice; Me wua mbakaren duen man mbanyôron cii." 
Ezekiel35:8 Me na iwo na ia mgbough a mba i woo ve ken a na la; ka sha agungu a ou, man shin apev a ou, man shin iwagh you, mba i woo ve sha sanker la vea gba ye." 
Ezekiel35:9 Me gema u, ú hingir ice gbem sha won, agar a ou kpaa, á kera tema ker ga; nahan man nea fa er Mo M lu TER ye." 
Ezekiel35:10 Sha ci u u kaa wer: Akuraior ahar ne, man ityar ihiar ne, ia hingir i yam, sé ngohol i—shin er TER lu her nahan kpaa—" 
Ezekiel35:11 nahan yô, er M lu u uma ne, kape Ter AÔNDO A kaa ne, Me er a we sha ishima i vihin you man iwuhe you i u tese ihom you a ve la; nahan Me pase iyol Yam her a ve, zum u Me ôr u ijir la." 
Ezekiel35:12 Nahan ú fa er Mo TER M ongo ityuhwanev mbi u toho iwo i Iserael la yô, er u kaa wer: I hingir ice ve, i na se i, sha u se̱ ya." 
Ezekiel35:13 Ne kende ayol a en sha sha u lun ihom a Mo, sha mkaanem enem, man ne seer kwaghôron sha a Mo; M ungwa." 
Ezekiel35:14 Ter AÔNDO ngu kaan nahan er: Shighe u tar cii ua ember la, Me gema u, ú hingir ice." 
Ezekiel35:15 Er u ember sha dyako u ya u Iserael, sha ci u a hingir ice yô, kape Mo kpaa, Me er a we ne; ú hingir ice, we uwo u Seir kua Edom cii, ka un jimin cii; nahan man né fa er Mo M lu TER ye." 
Ezekiel36:1 We, wan u or, ôr kwaghôron u profeti sha iwo i Iserael, kaa wer: Ne iwo i Iserael, ungwa nen kwaghôron u TER." 
Ezekiel36:2 Ter AÔNDO ngu kaan nahan er: Sha ci u orihom ngu teren ne kaan er: Ehe! Ajiir a taven sha a tsuaa la je kpaa, a hingir kwagh wase;" 
Ezekiel36:3 nahan yô, ôr kwaghôron u profeti kaa wer: Ter AÔNDO ngu kaan nahan er: Ka sha ci u, een, ka sha ci u ve gema ne, ne hingir ice, man ve mena ne sha hanma vegher, sha er ne̱ hingir dyako u akuraior aa shi la, man er ve teren ne man ior ve lamen sha a ven yô," 
Ezekiel36:4 nahan ne iwo i Iserael, ungwa nen kwaghôron u Ter AÔNDO. Ter AÔNDO ngu kaan a iwo man a agungu man iwagh man apev, man atihi a alôgh, man agar a i undu a, a a hingir ishar man kwagh u aheenegh hen akuraior a a shi her a kase ve la," 
Ezekiel36:5 sha ci u nahan yô, Ter AÔNDO ngu kaan nahan er: Mimi je, sha myegh u iwuhe Yam, M ôr kwagh a asande a akuraior kua a Edom cii, mba ve tôô tar Wam hingir ve dyako, a iember i ken ishima ve cii man a tarnahan, sha u tan u kera er u̱ hingir ishar;" 
Ezekiel36:6 nahan, ôr kwaghôron u profeti sha tar u Iserael, kaa a iwo man agungu man iwagh man apev, wer: Ter AÔNDO ngu kaan nahan er: nenge, M ôr kwagh sha iwuhe Yam man sha iyugh Yam; sha ci u mlaha u akuraior a laha ne la." 
Ezekiel36:7 Nahan Ter AÔNDO ngu kaan nahan er: M bum Mer, mimi je, akuraior a a kase ne ne, aa ya kunya u a." 
Ezekiel36:8 Kpa ne iwo i Iserael, nea ta agbaa, man nea ume atam sha ci u ior Av Iserael; gadia ve mgbôghom u hiden." 
Ezekiel36:9 Gadia nenge, M ta ken a ven, Me va her a ven kpaa, man á vughul ne, á lôô ne;" 
Ezekiel36:10 Me na ior vea ngee sha a ven, ka ya u Iserael cii, ka un jimin cii; agar aa lu a mbateman ker, man á hire á maa ajiir a a hingir atihi a alôgh la;" 
Ezekiel36:11 Me na ior kua uzendenya vea ngee sha a ven, vea mar ônov vea ngee; shi Me na ne mbateman sha a ven er tsuaa nahan, man Me er a ven dedoo á hemba ayange a hiihii la; nahan man né fa er Mo M lu TER ye." 
Ezekiel36:12 Een, Me na ior vea zende sha a ven, ka ior Av Iserael je la; vea ngohol ne, né hingir dyako ve, man né kera kura ve ônov kera ga." 
Ezekiel36:13 Ter AÔNDO ngu kaan nahan er: Sha ci u mba kaan a we er: We u ngu tar u yan ior, man u kuran ônov mba ior ou kera," 
Ezekiel36:14 nahan yô, ú kera seer u yan ior ga, man ú kera seer u kuran ônov mba ior ou kera kpaa ga, kape Ter AÔNDO A kaa ne." 
Ezekiel36:15 Me na, ú kera ungwa mlaha u akuraior a lahan we la ga, man shi ú kera ya kunya u ior ga, man shi ú kera na ior ou gbev mbu nôngon ga, kape Ter AÔNDO A kaa ne." 
Ezekiel36:16 Shi kwaghôron u TER va her a mo er: 
Ezekiel36:17 Wan u or, zum u ya u Iserael tema ken tar ve u ayol a ve la, ve hôngor a u sha gbenda ve man aeren a ve; gbenda ve lu sha ishigh Yagh er kwase u nan lu wang ga, sha shighe u nan dugh won yô." 
Ezekiel36:18 Nahan M haa ve iyugh Yam sha ci u awambe a ve hee sha tar la yô, man sha ci u ve hôngor a u sha akombo a ve;" 
Ezekiel36:19 nahan M sambe ve ken akuraior, man i tsenda ve ken ityar ityar; ka gbenda ve man aeren a ve la, M ôr ve ijir sha mi ye." 
Ezekiel36:20 Man zum u ve nyôr ken akuraior, henpe ve za la, ve hôngor a icighanti Wam; gadia ior ter ve er: Mban ka ior mba TER je, nahan kpaa ve due ken tar Na kera." 
Ezekiel36:21 Kpa mhôônom kôrom a icighanti Wam u ya u Iserael lu hôngor ken akuraior, henpe ve ze la." 
Ezekiel36:22 Nahan yô, kaa a ya u Iserael wer: Ter AÔNDO ngu kaan nahan er: M ngu eren kwagh ne ka sha ci wou ga, we ya u Iserael, kpa ka sha ci u icighanti Wam u ne hôngor a mi ken akuraior, henpe ne yem la." 
Ezekiel36:23 Me tsegha iti Yam i vesen i i hôngor a i ken akuraior la, i ne hôngor a i ken atô ve la; nahan akuraior aa fa er Mo M lu TER yô, kape Ter AÔNDO A kaa ne, zum u Me pase mtsegh Wam ken a ven sha ashe ve la." 
Ezekiel36:24 Gadia Me sange ne ken akuraior, Me kura ne ken ityar ityar cii, Me va a ven ken tar wen." 
Ezekiel36:25 Me mishi ne mngerem ma wang, nahan né wanger; Me wanger ne sha ihôngor yen kera cii, man sha akombo a en cii kpaa." 
Ezekiel36:26 Me na ne ishima i he man Me wa jijingi u he ker a ven; Me dugh iwenshima ken iyol yen kera, man Me na ne ishima i inyam." 
Ezekiel36:27 Me ver Jijingi Wam ker a ven, M na er né zenden ken akaawan a Am man né waan akaaôron Am a jirigh iko, né eren sha a vough kpaa." 
Ezekiel36:28 Né tema ken tar u M na uter enev; né hingir ior Av, Mo kpaa, Me hingir Aôndo wen." 
Ezekiel36:29 Me yima ne sha mhôngor wen cii; Me yila samuyia, ua ngee, Me kera na ne ijen ga." 
Ezekiel36:30 Me seer atam a ikon man iyiagh ki ken sule, sha er né kera shi zuan a iheen sha ijen ken akuraior ga." 
Ezekiel36:31 Sha shighe la né umbur igbenda yen i bo, man aeren a en a a doo ga la; nahan kwagh wen una ndôhôr ne ishima, sha ci u afer a en, man akaa a en a ndôhôrshima la." 
Ezekiel36:32 Ka sha ci wen M er kwagh ne ga, kape Ter AÔNDO A kaa ne, fa nen nahan; kunya u̱ kôr ne, va nen ahenge, sha ci u igbenda yen, we ya u Iserael." 
Ezekiel36:33 Ter AÔNDO ngu kaan nahan er: Sha iyange i Me wanger ne sha afer a en cii yô, Me na agar aa lu a ior, man á maa ajiir a a hingir atihi a alôgh la." 
Ezekiel36:34 Tar u u hingir ice la, á shire u, nahan ua kera lu ice sha ishigh ki ior mba karen hen u la ga." 
Ezekiel36:35 Nahan vea kaa er: Tar u u lu ice ne, gema hingir er sule u Eden nahan; man agar a alu atihi a lôgh man atse man i yôhôl a la, i maa a ugil, ior tema ker." 
Ezekiel36:36 Nahan akuraior a a shi her a kase ne la, aa fa er Mo TER M maa ajiir a i yôhôl a la, man M lôô kwagh u yan lu ice la; Mo TER M kaa nahan, shi Me er sha mi kpaa." 
Ezekiel36:37 Ter AÔNDO ngu kaan nahan er: Kwagh ne yô, kam pe ya u Iserael ma a va senem er Me er ve un yô; Me seer ve ior er ikumuile nahan." 
Ezekiel36:38 Er icighanikumuile nahan, er ikumuile ken Yerusalem sha shighe u uiniongo nav, kape agar a a hingir atse la aa iv a ikpelaior; ka nahan vea fa er Mo M lu TER ye." 
Ezekiel37:1 Uwegh ku TER lu sha a mo, A due a mo sha Jijingi u TER, A za verem shin atô u pev; a mgbough a akuhe;" 
Ezekiel37:2 A na, m ningir a, m tser; man nenge, a ngee kpishi shin pev; man nenge, a uma tseghe tseghe." 
Ezekiel37:3 Tsô A kaa a mo er: Wam u or, akuhe angan aa fatyô u lun umaa? Nahan m kaa a Na, mer: Ter AÔNDO, U fa." 
Ezekiel37:4 A shi A kaa a mo er: Ôr kwaghôron u profeti sha akuhe ne, kaa a wer: Ne akuhe a uman ne, ungwa nen kwaghôron u TER." 
Ezekiel37:5 Ter AÔNDO ngu kaan nahan er: Nenge, Me na iôôn ia nyôr ken a ven, nahan né hingir uma." 
Ezekiel37:6 Man Me wa ne igbela, Me va ne a inyam man Me cir ne kwav iyol, Me na iôôn ia nyôr ken a ven, nahan né hingir uma; man né fa er Mo M lu TER ye." 
Ezekiel37:7 Tsô m ôr kwaghôron u profeti er i kaam nahan; er m lu ôron kwaghôron u profeti ave la yô, iov due, man nenge, akaa gba kpoghol iyol, akuhe zua, hanma kuhe sha kuhe u u." 
Ezekiel37:8 Tsô m nenge, yô igbela gema lu sha a, man inyam kpaa va, man kwav va cir sha mi; kpa iôôn lu ker ga." 
Ezekiel37:9 Nahan A kaa a mo er: Ôr kwaghôron u profeti a jijingi, ôr kwaghôron u profeti, we wan u or, kaa jijingi wer: Ter AÔNDO ngu kaan nahan er: Va sha ahumbe a anyiin la, we jijingi, va ôô ken mba i woo ve mban, ve̱ hingir uma." 
Ezekiel37:10 Tsô m ôr kwaghôron u profeti er A kaam nahan, nahan iôôn gema va ken a ve, ve hingir mbaumav, ve tile sha, sha angahar a ve, ka ikumior i ngeen tsung je." 
Ezekiel37:11 Nahan A kaa a mo er: We wan u or, akuhe angan ka ior i nongo u Iserael cii je la; yô, nenge, mba kaan er: Akuhe ase uma man ishimaverenkeghen yase saa kera; i paa se kera!" 
Ezekiel37:12 Nahan yô, ôr kwaghôron u profeti, kaa a ve wer: Ter AÔNDO ngu kaan nahan er: Nenge, Me bugh iwar yen, Me na, né due ken iwar yen, ne ior Av; Me shi Me va a ven ken tar u Iserael." 
Ezekiel37:13 Nahan né fa er Mo M lu TER ye, zum u Me bugh iwar yen, man Me na, né due ken iwar yen yô, ne ior Av." 
Ezekiel37:14 Tsô Me er Jijingi Wam ken a ven, man né lu uma, Me ver ne ken tar wen kpaa; nahan né fa er Mo TER M kaa nahan man shi M er sha mi kpaa yô, kape TER A kaa ne." 
Ezekiel37:15 Kwaghôron u TER shi va her a mo er: 
Ezekiel37:16 We, wan u or, tôô aga nger sha mi nahan wer: Sha ci u Yuda man Mbaiserael mba ve lu ken nongo na; shi tôô aga ugen kpaa, nger sha mi, wer: Sha ci u Yosev—aga u Eferaim—man ya u Iserael mba ve lu ken nongo na;" 
Ezekiel37:17 zua ve, môm sha ugen ve̱ hingir aga môm, sha u ve̱ hingir môm sha uwegh ough." 
Ezekiel37:18 Man aluer ônov mba ior ou vea ôr kwagh a we, vea kaa er: U kera pase se inja i akaa a u eren ne gaa?" 
Ezekiel37:19 Yô, kaa a ve wer: Ter AÔNDO ngu kaan nahan er: Nenge, Me tôô aga u Yosev u a lu sha ikev i Eferaim la, man ikwe i Iserael mba ve lu ken nongo na la, Me zua ve sha aga u Yuda la, Me gema ve vea hingir aga môm, vea hingir môm sha ikev Yam." 
Ezekiel37:20 Mbaaga mba u nger kwagh sha min la, ve̱ lu sha uwegh ough sha ashe ve." 
Ezekiel37:21 Kaa a ve wer: Ter AÔNDO ngu kaan nahan er: Nenge, Me kura Mbaiserael ken atô u akuraior, a ve yem ker la, Me kohol ve hanma vegher cii, man Me va a ve ken tar ve jim;" 
Ezekiel37:22 Me gema ve, vea hingir ikurior i môm ken tar la, sha iwo i Iserael; tor môm una tema tor sha a ve cii; vea kera lu akuraior ahar ga, man á kera pav ve ityartor ihiar mayange kpaa ga;" 
Ezekiel37:23 man shi vea kera hôngor ayol a ve sha akombo a ve ga, shin sha akaa a ndôhôrshima a ve kpaa ga, shin sha ma atindi a ve a peren kpaa ga; kpa Me yima ve sha mbamhirjime vev cii mba ve er isholibo sha mi la, man Me wanger ve, nahan vea hingir ior Av, Mo kpaa Me lu Aôndo ve." 
Ezekiel37:24 Wanakiriki Wan Davidi una tema tor sha a ve; ve cii vea lu a orkuran môm; vea zenden ken akaaôron a Am a jirigh, vea waan akaawan a Am iko man vea eren sha mi kpaa." 
Ezekiel37:25 Vea tema ken tar u M na wanakiriki Wam Yakob la, henpe uter enev lu tema la; vea tema ken u, ve kua ônov vev man ônov mba ônov vev, gbem sha won; wanakiriki Wam Davidi kpaa una tema tor sha a ve gbem sha won." 
Ezekiel37:26 Man shi Me ya ikur i bem a ve, ia lu ikuryan i tsôron a ve; Me ver ve her, Me na, vea ngee, man Me ver icighanjiir Wam ken atô ve gbem sha won." 
Ezekiel37:27 Ijiir Yam i teman ia lu hen ve; Me hingir Aôndo ve, ve kpaa vea hingir ior Av." 
Ezekiel37:28 Nahan akuraior aa fa er ka Mo TER M tsegh Iserael ye, zum u icighanjiir Wam una lu ken atô ve gbem sha won yô." 
Ezekiel38:1 Kwaghôron u TER va her a mo er: 
Ezekiel38:2 Wan u or, ver ishigh you sha Gogi, u ken tar u Magogi, tor u Roshi man Mesheki man Tubal," 
Ezekiel38:3 ôr kwaghôron u profeti sha a na, kaa wer: Ter AÔNDO ngu kaan nahan er: Nenge, M ngu num a we, we Gogi tor u Roshi man Mesheki man Tubal;" 
Ezekiel38:4 Me gema u, ú hide ijime, Me wa u utsuwe ken azegher, Me due a we kera a ikumutya you cii, anyinya man mbaanyinyav, ve cii ve haa ikav mbi utyav iyol, ka zegeikumutya a iper man mbaakuva, ve cii mba a sanker sha ave;" 
Ezekiel38:5 Pershia man Kushi man Puti a ve imôngo; ve cii a iperutya man aderautya; 
Ezekiel38:6 Gomer man akumautya na cii; ior i Togarma ken akighiratar a imbusutarimese la, man akumautya na cii; ior kpishi a we imôngo." 
Ezekiel38:7 Yô, wa iyol man wa ago iyol, we a ikpelaior you i i kohol her a we la cii, lu or u hemen ve." 
Ezekiel38:8 Ayange á va kar kera kpishi yô, á umbur we; ken anyom a masetyô yô, wea va ken tar u i ser u, u sanker lu vihi la, hen ior i i kohol ve ken akuraior kpishi, i va a ve sha iwo i Iserael, i i lu ice gbem la, kpa i due a ve ken akuraior, man ve cii vea tema bem bem." 
Ezekiel38:9 Wea kôndo er ijeverahumbe nahan, wea lu er ibeenegh ki cirin tar nahan, we man akum a ou cii, man ior kpishi a we imôngo." 
Ezekiel38:10 Ter AÔNDO ngu kaan nahan er: Tsô sha iyange la, mbamhen vea va ken ishima you, ú hen mhen u bo;" 
Ezekiel38:11 ú kaa wer: Me kôndo hen tar u agar a u, a lu a ugir ga la, me za ta sha mba ve tem bem bem a mkpeyol la, ve cii ve tema mba a ugir ga, shi mba a uishindan man ihinda kpaa ga," 
Ezekiel38:12 sha u yan ishar man u kuran akaa, man u zan uwegh ough sha atse a ayoughough a ior ve hir ve va tem ker yô, mba i za kor ve ken akuraior la, mba ve zough a uzendenya man akaa, mba ve tem sha icombotar yô." 
Ezekiel38:13 Sheba man Dedan man mbakasuav mba Tarshishi a agumabegha a na, vea kaa a we er: U va sha u va yan ishara? U kohol ior ou sha u va kuran akaa? sha u yemen a azurfa man zenaria kera, man u kuran ilev man akaa, man u yan ishar kpishi?" 
Ezekiel38:14 Nahan yô, wan u or, ôr kwaghôron u profeti, kaa a Gogi wer: Ter AÔNDO ngu kaan nahan er: Sha iyange i ior Av Iserael vea tema bem bem la yô, wea fa gaa?" 
Ezekiel38:15 Nahan wea mough hen ijiir you hen akighiratar a ken imbusutarimese, we man ior kpishi a we imôngo, ve cii lu sha anyinya, ikpelaior i ngeen tsung, man ikumutya i ageegh;" 
Ezekiel38:16 wea va ta sha ior Av Iserael er ibeenegh ki ki cir tar nahan; kwagh ne una va er sha ayange a masetyô la; sha shighe la, Me va a we sha u u̱ va nôngo ityav a tar Wam sha u akuraior a̱ fam yô, zum u Me tese mtsegh Wam ken a we sha ashe ve la, we Gogi." 
Ezekiel38:17 Ter AÔNDO ngu kaan nahan er: Ka we M ter u tsuaa sha zwa u mbayev Av uprofeti mba Iserael, mba ve lu ôron kwaghôron u profeti anyom kpishi, sha kwagh u ayange shon la, er Mea va a we sha u va nôngon ityav a ve gaa?" 
Ezekiel38:18 Tsô sha iyange la, zum u Gogi una va ta num sha tar u Iserael yô, kape Ter AÔNDO A kaa ne, iyugh Yam ia kôndom ken ahenga." 
Ezekiel38:19 Gadia ka sha iwuhe Yam man sha myegh u ishima Yam i vihin M kaa kwagh ye: Mimi je, sha iyange la zegemtenger u tar una tenger ken tar u Iserael;" 
Ezekiel38:20 ishu i shin zegemnger man inyon i sha, man inyamtoho, man akaa a kpelan iyav inya shin tar cii, man ior mba ve lu sha tar cii, vea gbidye akarkase iyol sha ishigh Yagh á yôhôl iwo kera, man ajiir a taven sha aa tsehe, man hanma kpekpe una yôhôl." 
Ezekiel38:21 Me yila sanker hen iwo Yam cii, sha u tan num sha a na, kape Ter AÔNDO A kaa ne; sanker u hanma or una lu num a anngô u nan." 
Ezekiel38:22 Me ôr un ijir sha bouange man awambe; Me nôô ikumenura man awombo a kehen a usu man sulfur sha a na, man sha akum a na la, man sha ior kpishi, mba ve lu a na imôngo la." 
Ezekiel38:23 Nahan Me tese mhembe Wam man mtsegh wam, Me pase iyol Yam ken igbar sha ashe a akuraior kpishi; nahan man vea fa er Mo M lu TER ye." 
Ezekiel39:1 We wan u or, ôr kwaghôron u profeti sha Gogi, kaa wer: Ter AÔNDO ngu kaan nahan er: Nenge, M ngu num a we, we Gogi tor u Roshi man Mesheki man Tubal;" 
Ezekiel39:2 Me gema u ú hide ijime, Me hemen we, Me na u, ú mough hen akighiratar a imbusutarimese la, Me va a we sha iwo i Iserael." 
Ezekiel39:3 Me gbidye ada wou una osough sha uwegh ough ku imesegh, man me na avaan a ou a uwegh ough ku yanegh aa haa inya." 
Ezekiel39:4 Wea gba sha iwo i Iserael, we kua akum a ou cii, man ior mba ve lu a we imôngo la; Me gema u, Me na inyon i tswam i lun anza kposo kposo kua inyamtoho sha u i̱ ya u." 
Ezekiel39:5 Wea gba ken ikôngough ki kpuun kpuun; gadia M kaa nahan, kape Ter AÔNDO a kaa ne." 
Ezekiel39:6 Me haa usu sha Magogi man sha mba ve tem bem bem hen ityar i shin kpe u zegemnger; ka nahan man vea fa er Mo M lu TER ye. 
Ezekiel39:7 Me pase icighanti Wam ken atô u ior Av Iserael; man Me kera rumun Mer, i̱ hôngor a icighanti Wam ga; man akuraior aa fa er Mo M lu TER ye, Icighan ken Iserael." 
Ezekiel39:8 Nenge, ngi van, á va kure sha mi, kape Ter AÔNDO A kaa ne; ka iyange i M ter i je ne." 
Ezekiel39:9 Mba ve tem ken agar a Iserael vea due, vea keer usu sha ikav mbi tswamev, vea nande mbi: ka iperutya man mbaakuva man mbaada man avaan man agbur man udagi, vea keer usu a mi zan zan anyom ataankarahar;" 
Ezekiel39:10 nahan vea kera ker ikon ken toho ga, man shi vea kera gber ikon shin akô kpaa ga, gadia vea keer usu sha ikav mbi tswamev; mba ve ya ve ishar la, ve di kpaa vea ya ve ishar, mba ve kura ve akaa la, ve di kpaa vea kura ve akaa, kape Ter AÔNDO A kaa ne." 
Ezekiel39:11 Tsô sha iyange la, Me na Gogi ijiir i iwaregh ken Iserael, ka pev u mbakaren, u a lu zegemnger vegher u sha ityoughkitaregh la; ia yange mbakaren; ka heregh vea ii Gogi a ikpelaior na cii ye, nahan á ii ijiir la iti er: Pev u Hamon-Gogi (Ikpelaior i Gogi)." 
Ezekiel39:12 Ior i Iserael vea ii ve iwer itiankarihiar je, sha u vea wanger tar la yô." 
Ezekiel39:13 Een, ior mba ken tar la cii vea ii ve; nahan á hingir ve kwagh u icivirigh, sha iyange i Me tese icivir Yam, kape Ter AÔNDO A kaa ne." 
Ezekiel39:14 Man vea ver ior mba, á lu tom ve u zenden ken tar la, iin mbakaren mba ve shi her hen inya la, sha u wanger u; ken masejime u iwer itiankarihiar la vea gema keren a ker." 
Ezekiel39:15 Tsô aluer ma or u zenden karen her tar la nana nenge a kuhe u or yô, nana ver ikav sha u, zan zan mbaiin vea ii u ken pev u Hamon-gogi." 
Ezekiel39:16 Hamona (ikpelaior) una hingir iti i gar kpaa. Kape vea wanger tar la je ne. 
Ezekiel39:17 We, wan u or, Ter AÔNDO ngu kaan nahan er: Ôr kwagh a hanma inja i inyon man hanma inja i inyamtoho, kaa wer: Kohol nen, va nen; va nen hanma vegher, va kohol nen hen nagh Agh ku M senge sha ci wen la, ka nagh ku vesen sha iwo i Iserael; ya nen inyam man ma nen awambe." 
Ezekiel39:18 Né ya inyam i mbaageev, man né ma awambe a utor mba sha won; anomaiyôngo man agumaiyôngo man ivo man anomabua, ve cii ka ilev mbi wan ahôm mbi Bashan." 
Ezekiel39:19 Né ya ahôm zan zan né ide, man né hunde sha nagh Agh ku M ser sha ci wen yô." 
Ezekiel39:20 Nahan né ide hen tebul Wam sha anyinya man mbahendan anyinya man ior mba ageev, man sha mbanôngontyav anza kposo kposo, kape Ter AÔNDO A kaa ne." 
Ezekiel39:21 Me ver icivir Yam ken akuraior, man akuraior cii aa nenge ijirôron Yam i M er yô, man uwegh Agh ku M pende sha a ve la." 
Ezekiel39:22 Ka nahan man ya u Iserael vea fa er Mo M lu TER, Aôndo ve ye, hii sha iyange la zan zan ken hemen." 
Ezekiel39:23 Man akuraior aa fa er ya u Iserael a yem ken uikangen sha ci u ifer ve yô; ka sha ci u ve per atindi Am, man M yer ve ishigh Yagh M na ve sha ikev i mbaihomov vev, man ve cii i wua ve sha sanker ye." 
Ezekiel39:24 M er a ve sha inja i ihôngor ve, man sha atindi a ve a peren la, M yer ve ishigh Yagh." 
Ezekiel39:25 Nahan yô, Ter AÔNDO ngu kaan nahan er: Hegen Me dugh Yakob ken uikangen kera, Me hide a ve, Me zungwe ya u Iserael jimin cii mhôônom; Me gba iwuhe sha ci u icighanti Wam." 
Ezekiel39:26 Vea hungul kunya ve, man mimiga u ve er a Mo sha mimi ga la, zum u vea tema bem bem ken tar ve, ma or nana ta ve mciem iyol ga la." 
Ezekiel39:27 Zum u Mea due a ve ken akuraior man Mea kohol ve ken ityar i mbaihomov vev, Mea hide a ve la, Me pase mtsegh Wam ken a ve sha ishigh ki akuraior kpishi." 
Ezekiel39:28 Nahan vea fa er Mo M lu TER, Aôndo ve, sha ci u M na, ve yem uikangen ken akuraior, man shi M kohol ve, M hide a ve ken tar ve kpaa; Me kera undu mô ve môm keela ga;" 
Ezekiel39:29 man shi Me kera yer ve ishigh Yagh ga, gadia M haa Jijingi Wam sha ya u Iserael, kape Ter AÔNDO A kaa ne." 
Ezekiel40:1 Sha inyom i sha ikyundu kar utaan i mlu wase ken uikangen la, sha mhii u inyom la, sha uwer la, ayange a u pue, sha inyom i sha pue kar unyiin er i hembe gar kera la, sha iyange la je, uwegh ku TER lu sha a mo, man A za a mo keela." 
Ezekiel40:2 Sha mbampase mba Aôndo, A za a mo ken tar u Iserael, A verem sha uwo u taven tsung, kwagh lu sha mi er ka gar nahan, vegher u ken imbusutariyan la." 
Ezekiel40:3 Er A za a mo keela yô, nenge, or lu her, u mluashe u nan lu er ka togula nahan, lu a kor u ada sha uwe kua iyiagh ki karen kwagh a mi; a tile sha hunda." 
Ezekiel40:4 Or la gema kaa a mo er: Wan u or, nenge sha ashe ou, man ungwa sha ato ou, man ver ishima sha akaa a Me tese u ne cii, gadia ka sha u á tese u a man i ve a we heen ye; pase ya u Iserael akaa a u nenge ne cii." 
Ezekiel40:5 Nenge, kpekpe kase iyou ken won ningir tser, man iyiagh ki karen kwagh a mi lu sha uwegh ku or la, ilihen na lu aseva ataratar, hanma ishiva, i seer igbanger i ikevwe sha mi; a kar mcivir u kpekpe la, iyiagh i môm; ityaven na kpaa lu iyiagh i môm." 
Ezekiel40:6 Nahan a va hen hunda u u ver ishigh sha ityoughkitaregh la, a unde sha agbur a u; a kar kpandehunda u shin, igbanger i u lu iyiagh i môm; man kpandehunda u shin ugen la kpaa, igbanger i u lu iyiagh i môm." 
Ezekiel40:7 Hanma iyou i orkuran, ilihen i i lu iyiagh i môm, man igbanger i i kpaa lu iyiagh i môm; hen haregh u ayou a mbakuran la, lu aseva ataan ataan; man kpandehunda u hen puadwer u hunda, vegher u ken atô, lu iyiagh i môm je." 
Ezekiel40:8 Shi a kar puadwer u hunda, vegher u ken atô la, lu iyiagh i môm je." 
Ezekiel40:9 Nahan a kar puadwer u hunda la, lu aseva anigheni, man ambusu a u, aseva ahar; puadwer u hunda la, lu vegher u ken atô." 
Ezekiel40:10 Man ayou a mbakuran, a sha hunda u sha ityoughkitaregh la, lu atar ken vegher ne, atar di ken vegher ugen la; ayou atar la cii lu ikaren inja i môm; ambusu a u kpaa lu ikaren inja i môm, ken vegher ngun man ngula kpaa." 
Ezekiel40:11 Shi a kar igbangese i ijiir i nyôron hen hunda la, lu aseva pue; man iniembe i hunda lu aseva pue kar atar;" 
Ezekiel40:12 kur u sha ishigh ki ayou a mbakuran la, lu ishiva i môm hen vegher ngun, shi kur u ken vegher ugen la kpaa, lu ishiva i môm; ayou a mbakuran lu aseva ataratar vegher ngun, man shi aseva ataratar vegher ugen la kpaa." 
Ezekiel40:13 A kar hunda, hii sha haav mbu iyou i mbakuran ingin zan zan za ar hen haav mbu igen la, igbanger lu aseva ikundu kar ataan; hunda ver ishigh sha hunda ugen." 
Ezekiel40:14 A er ambusu a ihinda kpaa, aseva akunduatar; tembe ar sha imbusuhunda, ningir hunda tser." 
Ezekiel40:15 Hii sha ishigh ki hundagh hen ijiir i nyôron zan zan za ar sha ishigh ki puadwer u hunda u ker atô la, lu aseva akunduahargber." 
Ezekiel40:16 Uwindou mba lun ahura ahura lu ken ayou a mbakuran man ken ambusu a a kpaa vegher u ker atô u hunda, ningir tser; man ka di nahan hen puadwer la kpaa; uwindou ningir tser kimi, hanma imbusuhunda atineavilegh lu sha mi." 
Ezekiel40:17 Tsô a va a mo hen tembe u ken won, man nenge, ayou lu her, man tembe u i wa u awen, ningir tser tembe la cii; ayou ikundugber lu sha tembe u i wa u awen la." 
Ezekiel40:18 Tembe u i wa u awen la lu hen kpe ihinda, kighir sha ilihen i ihinda vough, ka tembe u i wa u awen u gban shin la." 
Ezekiel40:19 Nahan a kar igbanger hii sha ishigh ki hunda u gban shin zan zan za ar sha ishigh ki tembe u kimi ken won, lu aseva deri, vegher u sha ityoughkitaregh man shi vegher u shin imbusutarimese kpaa." 
Ezekiel40:20 Hunda u tembe u ken won u u ver ishigh ki u ken imbusutarimese la, a kar ilihen i u man igbanger i u kpaa." 
Ezekiel40:21 Ayou a mbakuran u, lu atar ken vegher ne man atar di ken vegher ngula; ambusu a u man puadwer u u lu ikaren môm a hunda u hiihii la, ilihen i u lu aseva akunduahargber man igbanger i u lu aseva ikundu kar ataan." 
Ezekiel40:22 Uwindou mba u man puadwer u u, man atineavilegh a u, lu ikaren i môm a hunda u u ver ishigh sha ityoughkitaregh la; agbur lu ataankarahar a unden sha mi, za nyôron sha u; puadwer u u, lu a ken hemen." 
Ezekiel40:23 Hunda lu u nyôron hen tembe u ken atô, u ver ishigh sha hunda u ken imbusutarimese man lu er hunda u sha ityoughkitaregh nahan; a kar, hii hen hunda ungun zan zan za ar hen hunda ungula lu aseva akunduataan." 
Ezekiel40:24 A za a mo ken vegher u imbu-sutariyan, yô, nenge, hunda lu, u ver ishigh ken imbusutariyan la; nahan a kar ambusu a u man puadwer u u, lu ikaren môm a u i vande karen la." 
Ezekiel40:25 Uwindou lu ken u man ken puadwer u u, kase tser, lu inja i môm a uwindou mbagenev mbala; ilihen i u lu aseva akunduahargber, man igbanger i u lu aseva ikundu kar ataan;" 
Ezekiel40:26 agbur lu ataankarahar a unden za nyôron sha u; puadwer u u, lu a ken hemen; u lu a atineavilegh, i môm vegher ne, i môm di vegher ugen sha ambusu a u." 
Ezekiel40:27 Shi hunda lu u u nyôr ken tembe u ker atô, vegher u ken imbusutariyan la; a kar, hii hen hunda ungun zan zan za ar hen hunda ungula vegher u imbusutariyan la, lu aseva deri." 
Ezekiel40:28 Tsô a nyôr a mo hen tembe u ken atô, sha hunda u ken vegher u imbusutariyan la; a kar hunda u ken vegher u imbusutariyan la, u lu ikaren môm;" 
Ezekiel40:29 man ayou a mbakuran a u, man ambusu a u, man puadwer u u, lu ikaren môm; uwindou lu ken u man ken puadwer u u, ningir tser; ilihen i u lu aseva akunduahargber man igbanger i u aseva ikundu kar ataan." 
Ezekiel40:30 Upuadwer ningir tser, ilihen lu aseva ikundu kar ataan, igbanger aseva ataan." 
Ezekiel40:31 Puadwer u u la, ver ishigh sha tembe u ken won la; atineavilegh lu sha ambusu a u; agbur a unden za nyôron sha u lu anigheni." 
Ezekiel40:32 A va a mo hen tembe u ken atô, vegher u sha ityoughkitaregh; a kar hunda, lu ikaren môm" 
Ezekiel40:33 man ayou a u a mbakuran man ambusu a u, man puadwer u u, lu ikaren môm; man uwindou lu ken u man ken puadwer u u ningir tser; ilihen i u lu aseva akunduahargber, man igbanger i u aseva ikundu kar ataan." 
Ezekiel40:34 Puadwer u u la, ver ishigh hen tembe u ken won la; atineavilegh lu sha ambusu a u, hen vegher ngun man ngula; agbur a unden nyôron sha u lu, anigheni." 
Ezekiel40:35 A va a mo hen hunda u ken vegher u imbusutarimese la; a kar u, lu ikaren môm:" 
Ezekiel40:36 ayou a u a mbakuran, ambusu a u, man puadwer u u; uwindou lu ken u ningir tser; ilihen i u, lu aseva akunduahargber man igbanger i u, lu aseva ikundu kar ataan." 
Ezekiel40:37 Puadwer u u la, lu vegher u hen tembe u ken won la; atineavilegh lu sha ambusu a u, ken vegher ngun man ngula; agbur a unden nyôron sha u lu anigheni." 
Ezekiel40:38 Iyou igen lu a hunda u i, u nyôr ken puadwer u hunda, ka heregh i ôôn nagh ku nanden ye." 
Ezekiel40:39 Hen puadwer u hunda, utebul lu uhar ken vegher ne, man utebul uhar ken vegher ngula kpaa, sha u sôngon nagh ku nanden man nagh ku isholibo man nagh ku iboogh sha mi." 
Ezekiel40:40 Man hen vegher u ken won, henpe i nyôron sha hunda u vegher u ken imbusutarimese la, utebul lu uhar; hen vegher ugen kpaa u u lu hen puadwer u hunda la, utebul lu uhar." 
Ezekiel40:41 Utebul unyiin lu hen vegher ne, man utebul di unyiin hen vegher ngula, hen hunda; ka utebul anigheni, mba i sôngon iniav sha mi." 
Ezekiel40:42 Utebul mba unyiin mba sha awen a kuan la, lu sha ci u nagh ku nanden, lihe ishiva i môm man tiôn, igbangese kpaa ishiva i môm man tiôn, itiaven gema lu ishiva i môm; ka sha ve i veren ikav mbi sôngon nagh ku nanden man nagh ku sôngon ye." 
Ezekiel40:43 Uiwev mba ve lihe er igbangese i ikevwe nahan la, i mande ve kimi ningir tser; utebul la yô, inyam i nan nagh a min lu sha mi." 
Ezekiel40:44 Ken won u hunda u ker atô la, ayou lu ahar ken tembe u ker atô la, i môm lu hen kpe u hunda u ken imbusutarimese, i ver ishigh ken imbusutariyan; i môm gema lu hen kpe u hunda u imbusutariyan, i ver ishigh ken imbusutarimese." 
Ezekiel40:45 A kaa a mo er: Iyou ngin, i i ver ishigh ken imbusutariyan la, ka sha ci u upristi mba ve eren tom ken tempel yô." 
Ezekiel40:46 Man iyou i i ver ishigh ken imbusutarimese la, ka sha ci u upristi mba ve eren tom sha atse a nanden nagh sha mi yô; mban ka ônov mba Sadoki, ken ônov mba Levi, mba ve kporom hen TER, sha u eren Un tom yô." 
Ezekiel40:47 A kar tembe, ilihen i u lu aseva deri man igbanger i u kpaa lu aseva deri, u lu akuku; man atse a nanden nagh sha mi lu sha ishigh ki iyou la." 
Ezekiel40:48 Tsô a va a mo hen puadwer u iyou, a kar hanma imbusu i puadwer la, lu aseva ataan hen vegher ne, man aseva ataan di hen ngula; igbanger i hunda lu aseva atar hen vegher ne, man aseva atar di hen vegher ungula." 
Ezekiel40:49 Ilihen i puadwer lu aseva ikundu, man igbanger na lu aseva pue kar uhar, ka hen agbur pue a i unden sha mi la; man mtôm lu hen ambusu, ki mômough hen vegher ne, kigenegh di ken vegher ngula." 
Ezekiel41:1 A va a mo ken kpar u vesen, a kar ambusu a hunda, igbanger aseva ataratar hen vegher ne, man igbanger aseva ataratar ken ngula ka igbanger i tabernakel je la." 
Ezekiel41:2 Igbanger i ijiir i nyôron lu aseva pue; ukpekpe mba hen ijiir i nyôron lu aseva ataan keen man shi aseva ataan keen; a kar ilihen na lu aseva akunduahar man igbanger na aseva ikundu. 
Ezekiel41:3 Nahan a nyôr kpar u ken atô, a kar imbusu i ijiir i nyôron la, lu aseva ahar; man ijiir i nyôron yô, lu aseva ataratar; igbanger i hen kpe u ijiir i nyôron la, lu aseva ataankarahar." 
Ezekiel41:4 A kar ilihen na, lu aseva ikundu, man igbanger na kpaa lu aseva ikundu sha ishigh ki kpar u vesen la; a kaa a mo er: Ngun ka icighankpar u hemban je ne." 
Ezekiel41:5 Nahan a kar kpekpe u iyou, lu aseva ataratar; man igbanger i ayou a ken akpe lu aseva anyiin, ningir iyou hanma vegher tser." 
Ezekiel41:6 Ayou a ken kpe la, lu ukpo utar, igen sha igen, a lu ikundugber sha hanma nongo; i wa ugbor sha kpekpeyou sha ci u maan ayou a ken kpe la sha mi, ningir tser, sha u suur a sha mi, sha u a̱ de suur ken kpekpe u iyou la ga." 
Ezekiel41:7 Ayou a a kase ken akpe la hanma kpo u sha ugen seer igbanger, gadia m-maa u kpekpeyou ken won la sondough yem sha, ningir iyou tser; ka nahan man igbanger i iyou lu seer a seer kôndon sha ye; or nana duen hen iyou i shin u yemen sha i mase sha la yô, nan kar ken i hen atô la." 
Ezekiel41:8 M shi m nenge iyou lu a tsembe ningir tser; amagh a ayou a ken akpe la tav kuma iyiagh ki jimin, lu aseva ataratar zan zan za ar hen ijuwan la." 
Ezekiel41:9 Mcivir u kpekpe u ken won u ayou a ken akpe la, lu aseva ataan; tsembe u iyou u a due ken inya di kpaa lu nahan." 
Ezekiel41:10 Harga u hen atô u ayou a ken akpe la man ayou a sha tembe gbangese aseva ikundu, ningir iyou tser hanma vegher." 
Ezekiel41:11 Ihinda i ayou a ken akpe la ver ishigh hen tsembe u iyou u a due ken inya la, hunda môm ver ishigh shin imbusutarimese, hunda ugen di ver ishigh sha imbusutariyan; igbanger i tsembe u iyou u a due ken inya la lu aseva ataan ningir tser." 
Ezekiel41:12 Iyou i i ver ishigh sha tembe u u lu vegher u shin ityôtar la, gbangese aseva akunduatargber; kpekpe u i la civir aseva ataan, ningir tser, man ilihen i i lu aseva akunduanyiingber." 
Ezekiel41:13 Nahan a kar iyou, ilihen i i lu aseva deri; man tembe la man iyou kua ukpekpe mba i, lihe aseva deri;" 
Ezekiel41:14 man igbanger i ishigh ki iyou kpaa man shi tembe u u ver ishigh vegher u sha ityoughkitaregh la kpaa, lu aseva deri." 
Ezekiel41:15 A kar ilihen i iyou i i lu sha ishigh ki tembe ken ijime i u la, ukpombaayoughouv man ugaleri mba i, vegher u keen man u keen kpaa, lu aseva deri; man ker atô u tempel man upuadwer mba sha tembe kpaa," 
Ezekiel41:16 man ikpandeihinda i shin, man uwindou mba lun ahura ahura, man ugaleri mba ve ningir ve tser la cii— sha ishigh ki kpandehunda u shin, i cir ikon ningir tser— hii shin inya zan zan za ar sha uwindou (uwindou yô, i cir ve)," 
Ezekiel41:17 man sha ian i hunda vegher u sha zan zan ken iyou i ker atô je, man ken won kpaa, man kpekpe cii, ningir tser, kimi man ken won kpaa, i kar a kar cii." 
Ezekiel41:18 I er ucerubi man atineavilegh sha mi, itinevilegh lu her haregh u cerubi a cerubi, hanma cerubi lu a ishiv ihiar;" 
Ezekiel41:19 ishigh ki orough ver ishigh sha itinevilegh vegher u keen, man ishigh ki gumbegha ver di ishigh sha itinevilegh vegher ken; kape i er ken iyou cii ningir tser la." 
Ezekiel41:20 Hii shin inya zan zan za ar sha hunda vegher u sha, i er ucerubi man atineavilegh sha kpekpe u tempel." 
Ezekiel41:21 Sha kwagh u tempel yô, ikpandehunda lu akuku; ishigh ki icighankpar la, lu inja môm a tempel." 
Ezekiel41:22 Atse a nanden nagh sha mi la, i er a sha ikon, ityaven i a lu aseva atar, man ilihen i a lu aseva ahar; azongo a a, man ityô i a, man ambusu a a, lu sha ikon cii. Tsô a kaa a mo er: Ngun ka tebul u a lu sha ishigh ki TER yô." 
Ezekiel41:23 Tempel kua icighankpar lu a ucivir uhar uhar. 
Ezekiel41:24 Ucivir la lu akpaar ahar, akpaar ahar a geman; akpaar ahar sha hunda môm, man akpaar ahar di sha ugen." 
Ezekiel41:25 Sha ucivir mba tempel la, i er ucerubi man atineavilegh, er i er sha ukpekpe nahan; man i zor haav mbu sha ikon sha ishigh ki puadwer ken won." 
Ezekiel41:26 Man uwindou mba lun ahura ahura man atineavilegh lu sha ukpekpe mba puadwer vegher u keen man shi vegher u keen kpaa; kua sha ayou a ken akpe man ihaav mbi i zor a zor mbi la. 
Ezekiel42:1 Tsô a va a a mo ken tembe u ken won sha gbenda u shin imbusutarimese la; a va a mo hen ayou a a ver ishigh hen huwa man a a ver ishigh hen iyou kpaa, vegher u ken imbusutarimese la," 
Ezekiel42:2 lihe aseva deri hen hunda u shin imbusutarimese la; igbanger lu aseva akunduahargber. 
Ezekiel42:3 Sha ishigh ki aseva ikundu a ken tembe u ken atô la, man sha ishigh ki tembe u i wa u sha awen u ken tembe u ken won la, galeri ver ishigh sha galeri ukpo utar." 
Ezekiel42:4 Sha ishigh ki ayou la gbenda lu, u ver ishigh ker atô, u gbangese aseva pue, u lihe aseva deri; ihinda i a ver ishigh ken imbusutarimese." 
Ezekiel42:5 Ayou a sha kpo u masen sha la hemba ndahar, sha ci u ugaleri mbala hemba yisan ian sha kpo u masen sha la a kpo u hen atô man u shin inya la." 
Ezekiel42:6 Gadia a lu ukpo utar, kpa a lu a a mtôm er mtôm ma sha ityembe la nahan ga; ka nahan man a sha la hemba ndahar a a shin inya man a her atô la." 
Ezekiel42:7 Kpekpe lu ayou la ken won jighilii, ken vegher u tembe u ken won, sha ishigh ki ayou la, ilihen na lu aseva akunduahargber." 
Ezekiel42:8 Gadia ilihen i ayou a a lu vegher u ken tembe u ken won la, lu aseva akunduahargber; kpa a sha ishigh ki tempel la lu aseva deri." 
Ezekiel42:9 Ayou ne vegher u shin, ijiir i nyôron lu vegher u sha ityoughkitaregh la, aluer or nana kar sha tembe u ken won la, nana nyôr ken a yô." 
Ezekiel42:10 Ken mcivir u kpekpe u tembe ken vegher u imbusutariyan sha ishigh ki huwa man sha ishigh ki iyou la kpaa ayou lu. 
Ezekiel42:11 Gbenda lu sha ishigh ki a; mlu u a lu inja môm a ayou a a lu ken vegher u imbusutarimese la, ilihen i a man igbanger i a kpaa lu kwagh môm; igbenda i duen i a, man m-er u i er a lu kwagh môm. Er igbenda i a, i nyôron la i lu la," 
Ezekiel42:12 kape igbenda i nyôron i ayou a a ver ishigh ken imbusutariyan kpaa i lu la: hunda lu sha mkur u gbenda, ka gbenda u u lu nôô sha ishigh ki kpekpe ken vegher u sha ityoughkitaregh je la, aluer or nana nyôron hen a yô." 
Ezekiel42:13 Tsô a kaa a mo er: Ayou a shin imbusutarimese man ayou a sha imbusutariyan, a a lu sha ishigh ki huwa la, ka ayou a tseghan henpe upristi mba ve mgbôghom a TER vea yaan uicighanmbaakaav mba i hembe tseghan ve la; ka heregh vea veren uicighanmbaakaav mba i hembe tseghan ve la, man nagh ku sha samuyia, man nagh ku isholibo, man nagh ku iboogh ye, gadia ka icighanjiir je." 
Ezekiel42:14 Zum u upristi vea nyôr kimi yô, ve̱ de kera duen hen icighanjiir ve̱ zaan hen tembe u ken won la ga, kpa ka her, vea veren akondo a ve, a ve er tom a mi la, gadia ka a tseghan je; vea haa akondo agen man vea kporom hen ijiir i i lu sha ci u ior mbagenev." 
Ezekiel42:15 Tsô zum u a kar iyou i kimi bee yô, a due a mo hen gbenda u hunda u u ver ishigh sha vegher u sha ityoughkitaregh la, a kar a ningir a tser." 
Ezekiel42:16 A kar vegher u sha ityoughkitaregh sha ikaren i iyiagh, aseva deri utaan, sha ikaren i iyiagh, ningir tser." 
Ezekiel42:17 A kar vegher u ken imbusutarimese, aseva deri utaan, sha ikaren i iyiagh, ningir tser." 
Ezekiel42:18 A kar vegher u ken imbusutariyan aseva deri utaan, sha ikaren i iyiagh." 
Ezekiel42:19 A gema vegher u shin ityôtar, a kar aseva deri utaan sha ikaren i iyiagh." 
Ezekiel42:20 A kar un avegher anyiin; a lu a kpekpe, ningir tser, ilihen deri utaan, man igbanger di deri utaan, sha u paven kwagh u tseghan kposo a kwagh u i tsegh ga yô." 
Ezekiel43:1 Tsô ken masetyô ne yô, a va a mo hen hunda, ka hunda u u ver ishigh vegher u sha ityoughkitaregh la." 
Ezekiel43:2 Yô, nenge, iengem i Aôndo u Iserael za va vegher u sha ityoughkitaregh; ihuran lu er ka ihuran i mngerem ma vesen nahan, tar wanger sha iengem Na la." 
Ezekiel43:3 Mpase u m nenge mi lu er mpase u m vande nengen mi zum u A va sha u va timin gar yô; man shi lu er mbampase mba m nenge a mi hen ifi u Cebar; tsô M gba m kuma ishigh inya. 
Ezekiel43:4 Iengem i TER nyôr ken iyou sha hunda u u ver ishigh vegher u sha ityoughkitaregh la. 
Ezekiel43:5 Tsô Jijingi kendem sha, va a mo ken tembe u ker atô; yô, nenge, iengem i TER iv ken iyou." 
Ezekiel43:6 M ungwa A lu ôron kwagh a mo ken tempel er orgen gema tile a mo yô. 
Ezekiel43:7 A kaa a mo er: Wan u or, ka ijiir i ikônough Yagh ki torough je ne, man ijiir i tan angahar Am, henpe Me tema hen atô u ônov mba Iserael gbem sha won yô; ya u Iserael vea kera seer u hôngor a iti Yam i tseghan ga, shin ve, shin utor vev kpaa ga, sha idya ve man sha akom a utor vev zum u ve kpe la;" 
Ezekiel43:8 gadia ve wa kpandehunda ve, dondo sha kpandehunda wam, man imbusuhunda ve kpaa dondo sha imbusuhunda Yam, saa di kpekpe tsô lu hen atô Wam a ve ye; ve hôngor a icighanti Wam sha akaa a ndôhôrshima a ve, a ve er la, nahan M tim ve kera sha iyugh Yam." 
Ezekiel43:9 Ahegen yô, vea kar a idya ve man akom a utor vev kera ca a Mo; Mo kpaa Me tema ken atô ve gbem sha won." 
Ezekiel43:10 We wan u or, pase ya u Iserael kwagh u tempel, sha u ve̱ va ahenge sha aferakaa a ve; ve̱ kar ikaren i mlu na la." 
Ezekiel43:11 Aluer vea va ahenge sha kwagh u ve er cii yô, tese ve mlu u tempel, man m-er u i er un, man ajiir a duen man ajiir a na a nyôron man mlu na cii, man akaa a wan a na cii, mlu na, man atindi na cii; nger a sha ashe ve, sha u ve̱ waan mlu na cii man akaa a wan a na cii iko, ve̱ eren sha mi." 
Ezekiel43:12 Ka tindi u tempel ne: sha ityough ki uwoogh, iningirtar la cii, ningir tser, ia lu icighankwagh u i hembe tseghan un yô. Yô, nenge, ka tindi u tempel je ne." 
Ezekiel43:13 Ka uikaren mba sha aseva mba atse a nanden nagh ne (ishiva la, ka ishiva man igbangese i ikevwe): Ityô i a tav ishiva i môm, igbanger i a lu ishiva môm, man akur a a kuma ishiva i abe môm, ningir tser; ka imagh i atsegh je ne." 
Ezekiel43:14 Hii hen ityô i a shin inya zan zan za ar hen gbor u shin lu aseva ahar, igbanger na ishiva i môm; hii hen gbor u kiriki zan zan za ar hen gbor u vesen la, lu aseva anyiin, igbanger na ishiva i môm." 
Ezekiel43:15 Ikegher i a lu aseva anyiin; hii hen ikegher kôndo sha, akor lu anyiin." 
Ezekiel43:16 Ikegher i atse la lihe aseva pue kar ahar, i gbangese aseva pue kar ahar, lu akuku." 
Ezekiel43:17 Ilihen i gbor i lu aseva pue kar anyiin, igbanger na kpaa lu aseva pue kar anyiin, lu akuku; kur na u u ningir tser la, lu tiônshiva, ityô na lu ishiva môm ningir tser; agbur a unden a a la, ver ishigh vegher u sha ityoughkitaregh." 
Ezekiel43:18 A kaa a mo er: Wan u or, Ter AÔNDO ngu kaan nahan er: Ka atindi a á wa sha kwagh u atse ne sha iyange i á er a la, sha u nan nagh ku nanden sha a man sha u haan awambe sha a kpaa." 
Ezekiel43:19 Na Mbalevi mba ve lu upristi mba ken tsombor u Sadoki, mba ve kporom her a Mo, sha u eren Mo tom la, na ve gumbua sha ci u nagh ku isholibo, kape Ter AÔNDO A kaa ne." 
Ezekiel43:20 Pande awambe a na, felegh sha akor a anyiin la, man sha azongo a anyiin a gbor la, man sha kur la ningir tser; kape ú wanger a, man ú na iwom sha ci u a la." 
Ezekiel43:21 Nahan tôô gumbua u nagh ku isholibo la, i̱ nande un sha ijiir i iyou la, i i vande veren i la, ken akôngo a icighanjiir." 
Ezekiel43:22 Iyange i sha uhar la, va a kpev u a lu a ihogholough iyol ga yô, sha ci u nagh ku isholibo, wanger atse, er i vande wanger a sha gumbua la nahan." 
Ezekiel43:23 Zum u ú wanger a ú bee yô, ú na gumbua u a lu a ihogholough iyol ga yô, man nomiyôngo môm u ken ikumuile, u a lu a ihogholough iyol ga yô." 
Ezekiel43:24 Va ver ve sha ishigh ki TER, upristi ve̱ haa bar sha a ve, ve̱ na TER nagh ku nanden sha mi." 
Ezekiel43:25 Ayange ataankarahar cii, ú sôr ivo i môm sha hanma iyange sha ci u nagh ku isholibo, shi ve̱ sôr gumbua man nomiyôngo môm u ken ikumuile, ve uhar cii ve̱ de lu a ihogholough iyol ga." 
Ezekiel43:26 Ayange ataankarahar cii, ve̱ na iwom sha ci u atse la, ve̱ wanger a, ve̱ tsegha a." 
Ezekiel43:27 Zum u vea iv ayange la yô, hii sha iyange i anigheni la yem ken hemen ve upristi ve̱ naan iniav yenev mbi nanden sha atse la, man iniav yenev mbi bem, man Me rumun ne, kape Ter AÔNDO A kaa ne." 
Ezekiel44:1 Tsô a hide a mo hen hunda u ken won u icighanjiir u u ver ishigh vegher u sha ityoughkitaregh la; u lu vingir. 
Ezekiel44:2 TER kaa a mo er: Hunda ngun u̱ lu vingir, á bugh u ga, ma or nana nyôr hen u ga, gadia TER, Aôndo u Iserael, nyôr hen u, sha ci u nahan yô, u̱ lu vingir." 
Ezekiel44:3 Tor yô, una tema kimi sha ci u a lu tor yô, sha u yan kwaghyan sha ishigh ki TER; ka sha gbenda u puadwer la, una nyôron, shi ka sha u, una duen kpaa ye." 
Ezekiel44:4 Tsô a za a mo hen hunda u u lu vegher u shin imbusutarimese sha ishigh ki iyou la, m kenger yô, nenge, iengem i TER mgbough ken iyou i TER; nahan m gba m kuma ishigh inya." 
Ezekiel44:5 Tsô TER kaa a mo er: Wan u or, ver ishima dedoo, kenger sha ashe ou man ungwa sha ato ou, akaa a Me kaa u cii, sha akaaôron a jirigh a sha iyou i TER cii man atindi a i cii; ver ishima dedoo sha mnyer u ken iyou man sha hanma gbenda u duen hen icighanjiir kpaa." 
Ezekiel44:6 Kaa a mbahendan kwagh mban, ka ya u Iserael je la, wer: Ne ya u Iserael, aeren a en a ndôhôrshima cii a kuma, kape Ter AÔNDO A kaa ne;" 
Ezekiel44:7 sha ci u ne nyer a atôatyev a a tsenge ken asema ga, man shi sha mlu u iyolough kpaa a tsenge ga yô, ner, a̱ tema ken icighanjiir Wam, a̱ hôngor a iyou Yam, zum u ne va a kwaghyan Wam, ahôm man awambe la, sha u a̱ vihi ikuryan Yam, seer sha aeren a ou a ndôhôrshima la cii." 
Ezekiel44:8 Ne kera wa iko sha tom u sha akaa Am a tseghan la ga; kpa ne gema ne ver atôatyev sha u a̱ eren Mo tom ken icighanjiir Wam. 
Ezekiel44:9 Ter AÔNDO ngu kaan nahan er: Ma or u ityôtyev u nan tsenge ken ishima ga, man sha mlu u iyolough kpaa nan tsenge ga, u ken atôatyev cii, a a lu ken Mbaiserael la, nana nyôr ken icighanjiir Wam ga." 
Ezekiel44:10 Kpa Mbalevi mba ve undum ve yem ca, zum u Iserael kaha la, mba ve undum sha u dondo akombo a ve la, vea ya mtsaha sha ifer ve la." 
Ezekiel44:11 Vea lu mbatomov ken icighanjiir Wam, vea kuran ihinda i iyou, vea eren tom ken iyou; vea wuan nagh ku nanden, man nagh ku sôngon sha ci u ior, vea tile sha ishigh ki iorov, vea eren tom." 
Ezekiel44:12 Sha ci u ve lu eren ve tom sha ishigh ki akombo ve man ve hingir ya u Iserael ityôikaa i nôngon gbev sha ifer; nahan M bum sha kwagh ve, kape Ter AÔNDO A kaa ne, Mer, vea ya mtsaha u sha ifer ve la." 
Ezekiel44:13 Vea kera kporom hen a Mo sha u eren Mo tom u pristi ga, man shi vea kera kporom hen akaa a tseghan a Am ga, ka akaa a i hembe tseghan a je la, kpa vea ya kunya ve, sha aeren a ve a ndôhôrshima a ve er yô." 
Ezekiel44:14 Nahan M ver ve mer ve̱ nengen sha iyou, ve̱ eren tom u i cii, man akaa cii a á va gba u eren ken i yô." 
Ezekiel44:15 Kpa Mbalevi mba ve lu upristi, ônov mba Sadoki, mba ve lu eren tom ken icighanjiir Wam, zum u Mbaiserael ve kaha ve undum la, ka ve vea kporom her a Mo sha u eren Mo tom man vea tile sha ishigh Yagh sha u nan Mo nagh sha ahôm man awambe, kape Ter AÔNDO A kaa ne;" 
Ezekiel44:16 ka ve vea nyôr ken icighanjiir Wam man ka ve vea kporom hen tebul Wam, sha u eren Mo tom, man u veren ishima sha tom Wam." 
Ezekiel44:17 Zum u vea nyôr hen ihinda i tembe u ken atô la, vea haa akondo a pupuu; kwagh u sha ul a̱ de lu sha ayol a ve, shighe u ve eren tom ken ihinda i tembe u ken atô, man ken iyou la kpaa ga." 
Ezekiel44:18 Ve̱ kange atsar a sha ikondo i pupuu sha ityouv vev man ve̱ huwa afo a sha ikondo i pupuu shin iwenge; ve̱ de zeren kwagh u una na iusa ia due ve ga. 
Ezekiel44:19 Zum u vea due u zan ken tembe u ken won, ken tembe u ken won hen ior yô, ve̱ er akondo a ve a eren tom a mi la, ve̱ ver a ken ukparmbaayoughouv mba icighanjiir la, ve̱ haa akondo agen, sha u ve̱ de gem ior ve̱ hingir uicighanmbaiorov sha akondo a ve la ga." 
Ezekiel44:20 Ve̱ de kera gbongor ityouv vev ga, man shi ve̱ de kera rumun ice ve i̱ lihen ga, ve̱ tôndo a tôndo ice i sha ityouv vev tsô." 
Ezekiel44:21 Ma pristi a̱ de me wain zum u una lu nyôron ken tembe u ken atô la ga. 
Ezekiel44:22 Man shi ve̱ de eren kwasecôghol ga, shin kwase u i pav a nan kpaa ga; kpa i̱ lu anuunaukase a megh megh a ken tsombor u ya u Iserael, shin kwasecôghol u nan lu kwasecôghol u ma pristi yô." 
Ezekiel44:23 Ve̱ tese ior Av mkposo u icighankwagh a kwagh u i tsegh un ga yô, man ve̱ na ve sha u paven kwagh u a lu wang ga kposo a kwagh u wang." 
Ezekiel44:24 Sha kwagh u ayôôso yô, ve̱ lu mbaôron ijir, ve̱ kure ijir sha akaaôron a jirigh a Am; ve̱ waan atindi a Am man akaawan a Am iko ken uiniongo mba M ver la cii, man ve̱ tseghan ayange a memen a Am." 
Ezekiel44:25 Ve̱ de ze henpe ikomor i lu sha u vea hôngor ayol a ve ga; saa sha ter shin sha ngô, shin sha wan u nomso, shin u kwase, shin sha anngô u nomso shin u kwase u a vande eren nom ga, vea fatyô u hôngor ayol a ve." 
Ezekiel44:26 Ken masetyô u i wanger nan yô, i̱ ôr ayange ataankarahar sha ci u nan." 
Ezekiel44:27 Sha iyange i nana nyôr ken icighanjiir, ken tembe u ken atô la, nana̱ na nagh ku isholibo ku nan, kape Ter AÔNDO A kaa ne." 
Ezekiel44:28 Dyako ve yô, ka Mo M lu dyako ve ye; nea na ve ma kwar ken Iserael ga, ka Mo M lu kwar ve ye." 
Ezekiel44:29 Ve̱ yaan nagh ku sha samuyia man nagh ku isholibo man nagh ku iboogh; man hanma kwagh u i tswer Iserael cii una hingir u ve. 
Ezekiel44:30 Iyiav mbi hemban doon mbi tsutswav cii mbi hanma kwagh, man hanma nagh ku kenden sha ku iniav yenev mbi kenden sha cii, mbia hingir mbi upristi; man shi mwem enem ma geran ma hemban doon kpaa, na nen upristi sha u iveren i̱ lu sha ya wou." 
Ezekiel44:31 Ma kwagh u a gbe kpen tsô, shin u i ande un a ande, shin á lu inyon, shin zendenya kpaa, upristi ve̱ de ye ga." 
Ezekiel45:1 Man shi zum u né kar tar sha ishor i eren sha ci u dyako yô, pande nen tar la tsegha nen sha ci u TER, u̱ lu icighantiôntar; ilihen i u i̱ lu aseva dubu ikundu kar utaan man igbanger i u i̱ lu aseva dubu ikundu; ua hingir icighankwagh zan zan ikighir i u jimin cii." 
Ezekiel45:2 Á tôndo tiôn ker sha ci u icighanjiir, ken vegher ne aseva deri utaan, man vegher la kpaa aseva deri utaan a̱ lu akuku ningir tser; shi i̱ gbihi ian aseva akunduahargber ken won ningir tser." 
Ezekiel45:3 Man sha tar u i kar la, shi gbihi ian ilihen dubu ikundu kar utaan man igbanger dubu pue; icighanjiir una lu ker, ka icighanjiir u hemban je la;" 
Ezekiel45:4 ka icighantiôntar je la; una lu sha ci u upristi, ka mbaerentom ken icighanjiir mba ve kporom sha u eren TER tom yô; una lu ijiir sha ci u uya vev, man ijiir i tseghan sha ci u icighanjiir la." 
Ezekiel45:5 Man tiôn u a lihe aseva dubu ikundu kar utaan man a gbangese aseva dubu pue, una lu sha ci u Mbalevi, ka mbaerentom u ken iyou la, a̱ lu kwagh ve, sha ci u agar a vea tema kimi yô." 
Ezekiel45:6 Sha ci u kwar u gar yô, ver nen igbanger aseva dubu utaan, man ilihen dubu ikundu kar utaan, hen kpe u icighannagh la; ua lu sha ci u ya u Iserael cii." 
Ezekiel45:7 Man tiôn u tor yô, vegher u keen man vegher u keen u icighannagh, man u kwar u gar, hii hen icighannagh la, man sha ishigh ki kwar u gar, vegher u shin ityôtar yem shin vegher u ityôtar, man hen vegher u ityoughkitaregh yem vegher u sha ityoughkitaregh, ilihen na ia lu vough a kwar môm u ken ikwar igen la, hii shin ikighir i shin ityôtar zan zan za ar sha ikighir i sha ityoughkitaregh." 
Ezekiel45:8 Veghertar la una lu kwagh na ken Iserael; nahan utor Av vea kera seer u kighir ior Av ga, kpa vea na ya u Iserael tar la sha mlu u ikwe ve." 
Ezekiel45:9 Ter AÔNDO ngu kaan nahan er: I̱ kuma ne, ne utor mba Iserael; de nen ipila man mkighir, eren nen kwagh sha mimi man sha perapera; de nen u zendan ior Av, kape Ter AÔNDO A kaa ne." 
Ezekiel45:10 Lu nen a uikaren mba mimi, efa u vough man bav u vough." 
Ezekiel45:11 Efa man bav ve̱ lu ikaren môm, i bav a̱ lu môm-ken-upue u homer; ka sha homer ikaren una lu vough ye." 
Ezekiel45:12 Man shekel yô, a̱ lu ugera ikundu; kohol ushekel ikundu man ushekel ikundu kar utaan man ushekel pue kar utaan, á lu ne mina." 
Ezekiel45:13 Ka nagh ku kenden sha, ku né va na ne: môm ken ataratar u efa ken hanma homer u alakema, man môm ken ataratar u efa ken hanma homer u shair;" 
Ezekiel45:14 man mkurem ma i ver sha tindi, sha bav u mkure, ma lu môm ken pue u bav ken hanma kor, ka ubav pue je la, ka homer kpaa; gadia ubav pue ka homer môm;" 
Ezekiel45:15 man gumiyôngo môm ken hanma ikumuile i i lu deri uhar, u ken ajiir a hômon a Iserael, sha ci u nagh ku sha samuyia man nagh ku nanden man iniav mbi bem, sha u nan iwom sha ci ve, kape Ter AÔNDO A kaa ne." 
Ezekiel45:16 Ior mba hen tar la cii ve̱ na nagh kun sha ci u tor u Iserael. 
Ezekiel45:17 Tor yô, kwagh na ka u nan iniav mbi nanden man iniav mbi sha samuyia man iniav mbi man, sha uiniongo, man sha iwer i he, man sha ayange a memen, sha uiniongo mba i ver ken ya u Iserael cii; ka un una na nagh ku isholibo man nagh ku sha samuyia man nagh ku nanden man iniav mbi bem sha u nan iwom, sha ci u ya u Iserael ye." 
Ezekiel45:18 Ter AÔNDO ngu kaan nahan er: Sha uwer u hiihii sha iyange i hiihii i uwer la, tôô gumbua u lun a ihogholough iyol ga, wanger icighanjiir." 
Ezekiel45:19 Pristi a̱ pande awambe a nagh ku isholibo, a̱ shighe sha ambusu a ihinda a iyou la, man sha azongo a anyiin a gbor u atsegh man sha ambusu a hunda u tembe u kimi la." 
Ezekiel45:20 Kape ú er sha iyange i sha utaankaruhar i uwer la, sha ci u hanma or u nan er isholibo abu man sha mlan yô; ka nahan man né na iwom sha ci u iyou la ye." 
Ezekiel45:21 Sha uwer u hiihii, ayange a u pue kar anyiin la, né er iniongo i Paseka, iniongo i ayange ataankarahar la, á ya bredi u i we kwa sha min ga yô." 
Ezekiel45:22 Sha iyange la tor una na nombua sha ci u nagh ku isholibo sha ci na iyol na man sha ci u ior mba ken tar la cii. 
Ezekiel45:23 Ayange a ataankarahar la cii una na TER nagh ku nanden sha anomabua ataankarahar man anomaiyôngo ataankarahar a a lu a ihogholough iyol ga yô, ayange ayange, sha ayange a ataankarahar la cii, man kpev môm kpaa hanma iyange sha ci u nagh ku isholibo." 
Ezekiel45:24 Shi una na nagh ku sha samuyia, efa môm sha ci u hanma nombua, man efa môm sha ci u hanma nomiyôngo, man hin u mkure môm sha hanma efa." 
Ezekiel45:25 Sha uwer u sha utaankaruhar, ayange a u pue kar ataan sha iniongo la kpaa, una na nagh nahan vough, ayange ataankarahar la cii; nagh ku isholibo man nagh ku nanden man nagh ku sha samuyia, man mkurem di nahan vough." 
Ezekiel46:1 Ter AÔNDO ngu kaan nahan er: Hunda u tembe u ken atô u u ver ishigh vegher u sha ityoughkitaregh la, i̱ wuhe u ayange ateratar a yaren tom la cii, kpa sha iyange i memen yô, i̱ bugh u, man sha iyange i uwer u he kpaa, i̱ bugh u." 
Ezekiel46:2 Tor una nyôr sha puadwer u hunda u ken won la, man una tile hen imbusuhunda man upristi vea na nagh ku nanden man iniav nav mbi bemev man una gure inya sha kpandehunda, tsô maa una due; kpa á wuhe hunda la ga, zan zan iyange i been." 
Ezekiel46:3 Ior mbagenev yô, ior mba hen tar la, ve̱ gure inya hen ijiir i nyôron hen hunda la, sha ishigh ki TER, sha ayange a memen kua sha iwer i he kpaa." 
Ezekiel46:4 Nagh ku nanden ku tor una na TER sha iyange i memen yô, kua lu agumaiyôngo ataratar a a lu a ihogholough iyol ga yô, man nomiyôngo kpaa, u a lu a ihogholough iyol ga yô," 
Ezekiel46:5 man nagh ku sha samuyia efa môm sha ci u nomiyôngo, man nagh ku sha samuyia sha ci u agumaiyôngo yô, ku a lu er a fetyô u nan la, man hin u mkure môm kpaa, sha hanma efa." 
Ezekiel46:6 Kpa sha iyange i uwer u he la yô, ku a lu gumbua u a lu a ihogholough iyol ga yô, man agumaiyôngo ataratar kua nomiyôngo môm, mba ve lu a ihogholough iyol ga yô;" 
Ezekiel46:7 una na nagh ku sha samuyia, efa môm sha ci u nombua, man efa môm sha ci u nomiyôngo, man sha ci u agumaiyôngo er a fetyô yô, man hin u mkure môm sha hanma efa." 
Ezekiel46:8 Zum u tor una nyôr yô, una nyôr sha gbenda u puadwer u hunda la, shi ka sha u una due ye." 
Ezekiel46:9 Kpa zum u ior mbagenev mba hen tar la, vea va sha ishigh ki TER sha uiniongo mba i ver la yô, u nan nyer sha hunda u hen vegher u imbusutarimese sha u za civir yô, nana̱ due sha hunda u hen imbusutariyan la; man u nan nyer sha hunda u sha imbusutariyan la, nana̱ due sha hunda u shin imbusutarimese nana̱ kera hide nana due sha hunda henpe nan nyer la ga, kpa nana̱ yem hemen jighilii." 
Ezekiel46:10 Man tor yô, zum u vea nyôron yô, a̱ nyôr a ve imôngo, man zum u vea duen yô, un kpaa a̱ due." 
Ezekiel46:11 Sha ayange a uiniongo mba i ver la, nagh ku sha samuyia kua lu efa môm sha ci u nombua man efa môm sha ci u nomiyôngo, man sha ci u agumaiyôngo er a fetyô u nan yô, man hin u mkure môm sha hanma efa." 
Ezekiel46:12 Zum u tor una na nagh ku sha ishima i dedoo, a lu nagh ku nanden shin iniav mbi bemev er ka nagh ku sha ishima i dedoo ku nan TER yô, i̱ bugh un hunda u u ver ishigh vegher u sha ityoughkitaregh la, nahan una na nagh ku nanden man iniav nav mbi bemev, er a eren sha iyange i memen nahan; tsô a̱ due, una duen kera yô, i̱ wuhe hunda." 
Ezekiel46:13 Na gumiyôngo u a lu inyom i môm, u a lu a ihogholough iyol ga yô, sha ci u nagh ku nanden ku nan TER ayange ayange; naan un pepe." 
Ezekiel46:14 Naan nagh ku sha samuyia kpaa a na imôngo pepe, môm ken ataratar u efa, man môm ken utar u hin u mkure, sha u haan sha mwem ma kengese; ka nagh ku sha samuyia ku nan TER gbem je la, ka kwaghôron u jirigh u gbem." 
Ezekiel46:15 Kape vea naan gumiyôngo man nagh ku sha samuyia man mkurem, pepe, sha ci u nagh ku nanden ku gbem gbem la." 
Ezekiel46:16 Ter AÔNDO ngu kaan nahan er: Aluer tor una na môgen ken ônov nav iwua yô, hingir dyako u nan je, á hingir kwagh u ônov nav, ka kwagh ve, ka dyako." 
Ezekiel46:17 Kpa aluer una pande dyako na una na môgen ken mbatomov nav iwua yô, á hingir kwagh u nan zan zan á za ar sha inyom i pasen tuhwan la, tsô ia hide hen tor; dyako na yô, ka ônov nav mba nomso vea saa a min ye." 
Ezekiel46:18 Man shi tor a̱ de ngohol kwagh ken dyako u ior nav ga, sha u a̱ de duen ve ken dyako ve kera ga yô; a̱ na ônov nav mba nomso dyako sha kwagh u a lu u na iyol na yô, sha u i̱ de zende ma or u ken ior Av sha dyako u nan kera ga yô." 
Ezekiel46:19 Tsô a nyôr a mo hen ijiir i nyôron i hen kpehunda la, a za a mo hen uicighan mba ukpombaayoughouv mba ve ver ishigh shin imbusutarimese la; yô, nenge, ijiir igen lu ken ijime vegher u shin ityôtar la." 
Ezekiel46:20 Tsô a kaa a mo er: Ingin ka ijiir i upristi vea jiidi nagh ku iboogh man nagh ku isholibo, henpe vea kaa nagh ku sha samuyia, sha u ve̱ de duen a mi ken tembe u ken won la, ve̱ tseghan ior ga yô." 
Ezekiel46:21 Nahan a va a mo ken tembe u ken won la, a za a mo hen azongo a tembe a anyiin la; yô, nenge, ken hanma zongough ku tembegh, tembe ugen lu." 
Ezekiel46:22 Sha azongo a anyiin a tembe la, ityembe igen lu, i i kase i, lihe aseva akunduahar man gbangese aseva ikundugber, i inyiin la cii lu ikaren môm." 
Ezekiel46:23 Kpekpe kase i inyiin cii, ningir tser, man i er ajiir ajiir kwagh sha mi shin amagh a ukpekpe, ningir tser." 
Ezekiel46:24 Nahan a kaa a mo er: Angan ka ajiir a jiir kwagh, henpe mbaerentom u iyou vea jiir nagh ku ior yô." 
Ezekiel47:1 Tsô shi a hide a mo hen hunda u iyou; man nenge, mngerem lu duen shin kpandehunda, lu kuwan yemen vegher u sha ityoughkitaregh, gadia iyou la ver ishigh vegher u sha ityoughkitaregh; mngerem mara lu duen iyou la shin, vegher u hen uwegh ku yanegh, kar atse a nanden nagh sha mi vegher u imbusutariyan." 
Ezekiel47:2 Nahan a due a mo ken won sha hunda u shin imbusutarimese, a ningir a mo sha gbenda u ken won, a za a mo hen hunda u ken won u u ver ishigh sha ityoughkitaregh la; yô, nenge, mngerem lu kuwan vegher u ken uwegh ku yanegh." 
Ezekiel47:3 Er or la due yem vegher u sha ityoughkitaregh yô, a lu a kor sha uwe, a kar aseva dubu, a per a mo shin mnger, mngerem ar sha agbôônangahar." 
Ezekiel47:4 A shi a kar aseva dubu, man a per a mo shin mnger, mngerem ar sha iwenge." 
Ezekiel47:5 Shi a kar dubu, maa hingir ifi u m fatyô u peren ga, gadia mngerem va, hingir mngerem ma ôôn a ôô, ka ifi u or á fatyô u peren ga yô." 
Ezekiel47:6 Tsô a kaa a mo er: Wan u or, u nenge kwagh ne kpa? Nahan a hire a mo hen kpeifi." 
Ezekiel47:7 Tsô, m hidi yô, nenge, ikon lu hen kpeifi kpishi, ken kpe ne man ken ungula kpaa." 
Ezekiel47:8 Nahan a kaa a mo er: Mngerem man ma kuwan yemen tiôntar u sha vegher u sha ityoughkitaregh, ma sen shin Araba, ma asegh shin zegemnger; ma za nyôr shin zegemnger sha u mngerem mara ma̱ hingir ma dedoo yô." 
Ezekiel47:9 Tsô akaa a uma a zenden ininini henpe uifi mba uhar mban ve kar yô, aa lu uma; ishu ia ngee shimi kpishi; gadia mngerem nam va ar her, nahan mngerem ma zegemnger maa hingir ma dedoo, hanma kwagh una lu uma henpe ifi la a va ar cii." 
Ezekiel47:10 Nahan mbakôronishu kpaa vea tile sha kpe na; hii hen En-gedi zan zan za ar hen En-egelaim cii, á hingir ijiir i tsenen ukper; ishu ia ngee anza kposo kposo er ishu i ken zegemnger nahan, ia dumbur." 
Ezekiel47:11 Kpa azande a na man aber a na yô, á sôr a ga; á de a, a̱ lu a bar her." 
Ezekiel47:12 Hen ifi la, sha akpe a na keen man keen, hanma inja i ikon i umen atam ia mende, ika i i ia use ga, atam a i kpaa aa bee ga; ia umen atam iwer iwer, sha ci u mngerem ma i ma dugh hen icighanjiir yô; atam a i kpaa aa lu kwaghyan, man ika i i kpaa ia lu sha ci u been angev." 
Ezekiel47:13 Ter AÔNDO ngu kaan nahan er: Ka ikighir i tar u né kar u sha ci u dyako u ikwe pue kar ihiar i Iserael ne— Yosev una zua a mbaaci uhar. 
Ezekiel47:14 Nea ya dyako sha u, ser ser; gadia M bum Mer, Me na uter enev u, nahan tar ne ua hingir dyako wen." 
Ezekiel47:15 Ka ikighir i tar ne: Shin vegher u imbusutarimese, hii hen Zegemnger u Tamen, sha gbenda u Hetelon zan zan za ar hen gbenda u karen zan Sedadi," 
Ezekiel47:16 Hamati, Berota man Shiberaim u a lu hen harga u tar u Damaseku a tar u Hamati la, man Hasar-hatikon u a lu sha ikighir i Hauran." 
Ezekiel47:17 Ikighir i̱ hii hen zegemnger i̱ yem zan zan za ar hen Hasar-enon hen tar u Damaseku; man hen imbusutarimese ka Hamati a lu ikighir ye; ka vegher u imbusutarimese je la. 
Ezekiel47:18 Vegher u sha ityoughkitaregh, hii hen harga u Hauran a Damaseku man hen harga u Gileadi a tar u Iserael, ka Yordan; kar nen, hii hen ikighir i imbusutarimese zan zan za ar hen zegemnger u sha ityoughkitaregh la; ka vegher u sha ityoughkitaregh je la." 
Ezekiel47:19 Man vegher u sha imbusutariyan u zan sha ian i imbusutariyan la, hii hen Tamar zan zan za ar hen mngerem ma Meriba-kadeshi, man hen uwagh u Igipiti zan zan za ar hen Zegemnger u Tamen. Ka vegher u sha imbusutariyan u zan sha ian i imbusutariyan je la." 
Ezekiel47:20 Vegher u shin ityôtar, ka Zegemnger u Tamen, hii sha ikighir i imbusutariyan zan zan za ar sha vegher u gbenda u karen zan Hamati la. Ka vegher u shin ityôtar je la." 
Ezekiel47:21 Kar nen tar ne hen ayol a en sha ikwe i Iserael. 
Ezekiel47:22 Kar nen tar sha ishor i eren sha ci u u̱ lu dyako wen, ne kua atôatyev a a lu shir her a ven, a a mar ônov her a ven yô; a̱ hingir her a ven vough er ônov mba ityôôv ken atô u ônov mba Iserael nahan; a̱ ya dyako a ven imôngo, ken ikwe i Iserael." 
Ezekiel47:23 Tsô hanma kwe u ortyôtyev nan lu shir her yô, ka heregh né na nan dyako ye, kape Ter AÔNDO A kaa ne." 
Ezekiel48:1 Ka ati a ikwe ne: Hii shin imbusutarimese, sha gbenda u Hetelon zan zan za ar hen gbenda u zan Hamati la man Hasar-enon hen ikighir i Damaseku, vegher u shin imbusutarimese, hen kpe u Hamati, hii vegher u sha ityoughkitaregh zan zan za ar vegher u shin ityôtar, ka kwar u Dan, môm je la." 
Ezekiel48:2 U dondon sha Dan yô, hii hen vegher u sha ityoughkitaregh zan zan za ar vegher u shin ityôtar, kwar u Asher, môm." 
Ezekiel48:3 Man u dondon sha Asher yô, hii hen vegher u sha ityoughkitaregh zan zan za ar vegher u shin ityôtar, ka kwar u Nafetali, môm." 
Ezekiel48:4 Man u dondon sha Nafetali yô, hii hen vegher u sha ityoughkitaregh zan zan za ar vegher u shin ityôtar, ka kwar u Manase, môm." 
Ezekiel48:5 Man u dondon sha Manase yô, hii hen vegher u sha ityoughkitaregh zan zan za ar vegher u shin ityôtar, ka kwar u Eferaim, môm." 
Ezekiel48:6 Man u dondon sha Eferaim yô, hii hen vegher u sha ityoughkitaregh zan zan za ar vegher u shin ityôtar ka kwar u Ruben, môm." 
Ezekiel48:7 Man u dondon sha Ruben yô, hii hen vegher u sha ityoughkitaregh zan zan za ar vegher u shin ityôtar, ka kwar u Yuda, môm." 
Ezekiel48:8 Man u dondon sha Yuda yô, hii hen vegher u sha ityoughkitaregh zan zan za ar vegher u shin ityôtar, nagh ku nea na la kua lu: igbanger i ku, ia lu aseva dubu ikundu kar utaan, ilihen i ku ia lu vough a kwar môm u ken ikwar igen la, hii hen vegher u sha ityoughkitaregh zan zan vegher u shin ityôtar; icighanjiir una lu her atô u ku." 
Ezekiel48:9 Nagh ku né na TER yô, ku̱ lihe aseva dubu ikundu kar utaan, man ku̱ gbangese aseva dubu pue." 
Ezekiel48:10 Icighannagh kun kua lu sha ci u upristi; vegher u sha imbusutarimese ku̱ lihe aseva dubu ikundu kar utaan, man vegher u shin ityôtar ku̱ gbangese aseva dubu pue, vegher u sha ityoughkitaregh ku̱ gbangese aseva dubu pue, man vegher u ken imbusutariyan ku̱ lihe aseva dubu ikundu kar utaan; icighanjiir u TER una lu ker atô u ku." 
Ezekiel48:11 Kua lu sha ci upristi mba i tsegh ve ken ônov mba Sadoki, mba ve lu wan iko sha tom Wam, ve kaha ga, zum u Mbaiserael kaha undu gbenda la, er ônov mba Levi kpaa ve kaha nahan la." 
Ezekiel48:12 Kua hingir ve ken nagh ku tar la, icighankwagh u hemban hen ikighirtar i Mbalevi." 
Ezekiel48:13 Mbalevi vea zua a tar sha ikighirtar i upristi, ua lihe di aseva dubu ikundu kar dubu utaan man ua gbangese aseva dubu pue; ilihen cii ia lu aseva dubu ikundu kar dubu utaan, man igbanger aseva dubu pue." 
Ezekiel48:14 Ve̱ de panden u, ve̱ teen ga, man shi ve̱ de musan u kpaa ga, ve̱ de gem ihembantar la ve̱ naan orgen ga, gadia ka TER icighankwagh je." 
Ezekiel48:15 Aseva dubu utaan a a shi her sha igbanger la, sha ishigh ki aseva dubu ikundu kar utaan la, ka icighankwagh ga, ka sha ci u gar, sha ci u ijiir i teman ya man akôngo; gar una lu her atô." 
Ezekiel48:16 Ka uikaren nav ne: vegher u ken imbusutarimese aseva dubu unyiin man deri utaan, man vegher u ken imbusutariyan aseva dubu unyiin man deri utaan, man vegher u sha ityoughkitaregh aseva dubu unyiin man deri utaan; man vegher u shin ityôtar aseva dubu unyiin man deri utaan." 
Ezekiel48:17 Gar una lu a akôngo: vegher u ken imbusutarimese aseva deri uhar man akunduahargber, man vegher u ken imbusutariyan kpaa aseva deri uhar man akunduahargber, man vegher u sha ityoughkitaregh aseva deri uhar man akunduahargber, man vegher u shin ityôtar aseva deri uhar man akunduahargber." 
Ezekiel48:18 Kwagh u a shi her sha ilihen, sha kpe u nagh ku tseghan la, una lu aseva dubu pue vegher u sha ityoughkitaregh, man aseva dubu pue vegher u shin ityôtar; una lu sha kpe u nagh ku tseghan la; iyiagh ki á zua a mi ker yô, kia lu kwaghyan u mbatomov mba ken gar." 
Ezekiel48:19 Mbatomov mba ken gar, mba ve dugh ken ikwe i Iserael cii, vea shiren u." 
Ezekiel48:20 Nagh ku kenden sha cii kua lihe aseva dubu ikundu kar dubu utaan man kua gbangese aseva dubu ikundu kar dubu utaan; kape né na nagh ku tseghan kun; kua lu akuku vough a tar u gar la imôngo. 
Ezekiel48:21 Kwagh u a shi her la, una lu sha ci u tor, vegher u keen man vegher u keela u nagh ku tseghan man kwar u gar la, hii hen aseva dubu ikundu kar utaan a nagh kura la, yem zan zan ikighirtar vegher u sha ityoughkitaregh, man shin vegher u shin ityôtar kpaa, hii hen aseva dubu ikundu kar utaan la yem zan zan ikighirtar, vegher u shin ityôtar la, ilihen ia lu vough a kwar môm u ken ikwar igen la, ka kwagh u tor; nagh ku tseghan man icighanjiir u iyou la, vea lu ker atô." 
Ezekiel48:22 Man shi hii hen kwar u Mbalevi man kwar u gar, u u lu her atô u tar u tor yô, tar u her atô u ikighirtar i Yuda a ikighirtar i Benyamin ua lu sha ci u tor." 
Ezekiel48:23 Sha kwagh u ikwe i i shi la yô, hii vegher u sha ityoughkitaregh zan zan za ar vegher u shin ityôtar, ka kwar u Benyamin, môm." 
Ezekiel48:24 Man u dondon sha Benyamin yô, hii vegher u sha ityoughkitaregh zan zan za ar vegher u shin ityôtar, ka kwar u Shimeon, môm." 
Ezekiel48:25 Man u dondon sha Shimeon yô, hii vegher u sha ityoughkitaregh zan zan za ar vegher u shin ityôtar, ka kwar u Isakar, môm." 
Ezekiel48:26 Man u dondon sha Isakar yô, hii vegher u sha ityoughkitaregh zan zan za ar vegher u shin ityôtar, ka kwar u Sebulon, môm." 
Ezekiel48:27 Man u dondon sha Sebulon yô, hii vegher u sha ityoughkitaregh zan zan za ar vegher u shin ityôtar, ka kwar u Gadi, môm." 
Ezekiel48:28 Man u dondon sha Gadi yô, hii vegher u ken imbusutariyan yem vegher u ken imbusutariyan la, ikighir ia hii hen Tamar yem zan zan za ar hen mngerem ma Meribata-kadeshi, zan zan za ar hen uwagh u Igipiti, zan zan za ar hen Zegemnger u Tamen." 
Ezekiel48:29 Ungun ka tar u né kar u sha ishor i eren sha ikwe i Iserael je ne, sha ci u dyako, man ingin ka ikwar ve ser ser, kape Ter AÔNDO A kaa ne." 
Ezekiel48:30 Ka ihinda i gar ne: vegher u ken imbusutarimese lihe aseva dubu unyiin man deri utaan; 
Ezekiel48:31 á ii ihindagar ati sha ikwe i ônov mba Iserael; ihinda itiar ia lu ken imbusutarimese: hunda u Ruben môm, man hunda u Yuda môm, man hunda u Levi môm;" 
Ezekiel48:32 vegher u sha ityoughkitaregh lihe aseva dubu unyiin man deri utaan; ihinda lu itiar: hunda u Yosev môm, man hunda u Benyamin môm, man hunda u Dan môm;" 
Ezekiel48:33 vegher u ken imbusutariyan lihe aseva dubu unyiin man deri utaan; ihinda lu itiar: hunda u Shimeon môm, man hunda u Isakar môm, man hunda u Sebulon môm;" 
Ezekiel48:34 vegher u shin ityôtar lihe aseva dubu unyiin man deri utaan; ihinda lu itiar: hunda u Gadi môm, man hunda u Asher môm man hunda u Nafetali môm." 
Ezekiel48:35 Ikasen na cii lu aseva dubu pue kar dubu anigheni hii sha iyange la je á yila gar la iti er, Yehova-shama (TER ngu ker)." 
Daniel1:1 Sha inyom i sha utar i mtemtor u Yehoyakim, tor u Yuda la, Nebukadinesar tor u Babilon va hen Yerusalem, va kase un tser." 
Daniel1:2 TER gema Yehoyakim tor u Yuda na sha ikev na, kua ikav mbigenev mbi ken iyou i Aôndo kpaa; a kura mbi a yem a mi ken tar u Shinar ken iyou i aôndo na; a gema ikav mbila a koso ken iyou i aôndo na." 
Daniel1:3 Nahan tor ôr kwagh a Ashipenashi, orvesen u mbatomov mba ken iyou na, er, a̱ va a Mbaiserael mbagenev, mba ken tsombor u tor man mba ken ashagbaior kpaa:" 
Daniel1:4 mbayevikaior mba ve lu a ihogholough iyol ga, mbadoonashe, mba ve vie sha hanma gbenda u mfe, mbalun a kwaghfan, man mbakaven akaa, mba ve kom u eren tom ken iyou i tor, sha u una tese ve ingeren man zwa u Mbakaldi yô." 
Daniel1:5 Tor ver ve kwar u kwaghyan u tor hanma iyange, man u wain u á maan yô, er, i̱ tese ve anyom atar, man sha mbee u shighe la, ve̱ er tor tom." 
Daniel1:6 Ken a ve yô, Mbayuda kpaa lu, ka: Daniel man Hanania man Mishael man Asaria." 
Daniel1:7 Tsô orvesen u mbaerentom ken iyou i tor la, ii ve ati; a ii Daniel er Belete-shasar man Hanania er Shaderaki man Mishael er Meshaki man Asaria er Abedi-nego." 
Daniel1:8 Kpa Daniel vande wan ken ishima er una hôngor iyol na sha kwaghyan u tor, shin sha wain u a maan la kpaa ga; nahan a pine orvesen u mbaerentom ken iyou i tor la er, a̱ na un ian sha u una hôngor iyol na ga yô." 
Daniel1:9 Aôndo na Daniel gema doo orvesen u mbaerentom ken iyou i tor la ishima, mhôônom kôr un a na." 
Daniel1:10 Tsô orvesen u mbaerentom ken iyou i tor la, kaa a Daniel er: M ngu cian terem tor, u a ver ne kwaghyan wen la, mer, alaghga una nenge ishiv yenev mbia hemba vihin a mbi mbayevikaior mba ve lu kwav môm a ven, nahan nea vihim ityough a tor." 
Daniel1:11 Tsô Daniel gema kaa a wanakiriki, u orvesen u mbaerentom ken iyou i tor ver un er a̱ nengen sha Daniel man Hanania man Mishael man Asaria la, er:" 
Daniel1:12 Yô, shi kar mbayev ou ayange pue, i̱ na se ikaiue, se̱ yaan, man mngerem kpaa se̱ maan." 
Daniel1:13 Nahan i̱ nenge mlu wase man mlu u mbayevikaior mba ve ye kwaghyan u tor la; ka kwagh u ú nenge la, ú er a mbayev ou ye." 
Daniel1:14 Nahan a rumun kwaghôron ve la, a kar ve ayange pue." 
Daniel1:15 Sha mbee u ayange pue la yô, i nenge ayol a ve hemba doon man ve hemba kehen a mbayevikaior mba ve yaan kwaghyan u tor la cii." 
Daniel1:16 Tsô or u nengen sha a ve la de u nan ve kwaghyan man wain u ma ve maan la, a gema a naan ve ikaiue." 
Daniel1:17 Mbayevikaior mba unyiin mban, Aôndo na ve kwaghfan man mfe sha hanma takerada man hanma gbenda u mfe cii; man Daniel lu a mkav u mbampase mba sha mnenge man u mnyam ma cien kpaa." 
Daniel1:18 Ayange a tor ver er i̱ va a ve la, nga been yô, orvesen u mbaerentom ken iyou i tor la za va a ve sha ishigh ki Nebukadinesar." 
Daniel1:19 Nahan tor ôr kwagh a ve; ken a ve cii; i zua a ma orgen er Daniel man Hanania man Mishael man Asaria nahan ga; nahan ve hingir mbaeren tor tom. 
Daniel1:20 Sha hanma kwagh u kwaghfan man mkav, u tor a pin ve sha mi yô, a nenge ve hemba mbaahiriv man mbaasorov mba ken tartor na cii kwa pue." 
Daniel1:21 Daniel lu her zan zan inyom i hiihii i tor Shirushi. 
Daniel2:1 Sha inyom i sha uhar i mtemtor u Nebukadinesar la yô, mnyam cie Nebukadinesar, nahan nzughul un ken ishima, tôndo un mnyam kpaa." 
Daniel2:2 Tsô tor kaa er, i̱ yila un mbaahiriv man mbaasorov man mbasôronakombo kua Mbakaldi, ve̱ va kaa tor mnyam nam mara. Tsô ve nyôr ve va tile sha ishigh ki tor." 
Daniel2:3 Nahan tor kaa a ve er: Mnyam ciem, nzughul mo ken ishima, nahan kam pe fan mnyam mara." 
Daniel2:4 Tsô Mbakaldi ôr kwagh a tor, ve kaa er: (ken zwa u Aram) Tor a̱ lu uma gbem sha won! Ôr mbayev ou mnyam mara, nahan se kpaa sé pase u inja i ma." 
Daniel2:5 Tor gema kaa a Mbakaldi er: Ka imo yam ne: Aluer né pasem mnyam man kua inja i ma ga yô, á paa ne avur avur, man á gema uya enev vea hingir atihi a uihôgh." 
Daniel2:6 Kpa aluer né pasem mnyam mara kua inja i ma yô, nea ngohol iwua man injar man icivir i vesen her a mo; nahan yô, kaam nen mnyam mara kua inja i ma." 
Daniel2:7 Ve shi ve kaa sha kwa har la er: Tor a̱ ôr mbayev nav mnyam ma shonov, nahan sé pase un inja i ma." 
Daniel2:8 Tor gema kaa er: M fa mimi je, sar ne ka zuan a ian, sha ci u ne nenge awashima wam;" 
Daniel2:9 aluer né pasem mnyam man ga yô, tindi ngu sha a ven môm tsô; gadia ne zua zwa ner, né ôrom kwagh u aiegh man u icughugh, zan zan kwagh á va gema kposo; nahan yô, kaam nen mnyam man, nahan mo kpaa me fa mer, ne fatyô u pasen mo inja i ma." 
Daniel2:10 Mbakaldi gema kaa sha ishigh ki tor er: Ma or ngu sha won u nana fatyô u pasen kwagh u tor ne ga, gadia mayange ma tor u vesen u lun a tahav ngu a vande pinen orahir shin orishor shin Orkaldi imbakwagh ne nahan je ga." 
Daniel2:11 Kwagh u tor a pin ne ka u ican, ma or ngu u nana fatyô u pasen tor un ga, saa di mbaaôndo, mba ve tem a ior imôngo ga la." 
Daniel2:12 Sha kwagh ne yô, tor yuwe, ishima vihi un tsung, nahan a kaa er, i̱ wua mbafankwagh mba ken Babilon cii." 
Daniel2:13 Nahan tindi due er, i̱ wua mbafankwagh; tsô i gba keren Daniel man ahur a na sha u wuan ve." 
Daniel2:14 Nahan Daniel gema ôr kwagh sha inja man sha mfe a Arioki, orvesen u mbakurantor, u a due sha u wuan mbafankwagh mba ken Babilon la;" 
Daniel2:15 a gema a kaa a Arioki orvesen u tor la er: Ka nyi tindi u tor ne a taver yum nahana? Tsô Arioki gema pase Daniel kwagh shon. 
Daniel2:16 Nahan Daniel nyôr, sôn tor er, a̱ ver un shighe, un una pase tor inja i ma." 
Daniel2:17 Tsô Daniel za hen ya na, za pase ahur a na, Hanania man Mishael kua Asaria kwagh la," 
Daniel2:18 sha u ve̱ sôn Aôndo u Sha, A̱ zungwe ve mhôônom sha kwaghmyer ne, sha er Daniel man ahur a na ve̱ de kera timin a mbafankwagh mbagenev mba ken Babilon la imôngo ga yô." 
Daniel2:19 Tsô i pase Daniel kwaghmyer ne ken mpase u sha mnenge, tugh. Nahan Daniel wuese Aôndo u Sha," 
Daniel2:20 Daniel gema kaa er: I̱ wuese iti i Aôndo gbem sha won, gadia mfe man tahav yô, ka Un A lu a mi ye;" 
Daniel2:21 ka Un A gem ashighe man a-an ye; ka A dugh utor shi A ver utor; ka A na mbafankwagh mfe, man mba ve lu a mkav yô, A na ve kwaghfan." 
Daniel2:22 Ka Un A pasen akaacimin man a ken myer ye; A fa kwagh u a lu ken ime, iwanger ngi tem a Na."
