Daniel2:23 We, Aôndo u uter Av, m sugh U, man m wuese We kpaa, U nam kwaghfan man tahav, man ahegen kpaa shi U tesem kwagh u se lu keren her a We yô; gadia U pase se kwagh u tor la." 
Daniel2:24 Nahan Daniel za hen Arioki, u tor ver un er, a̱ tim mbafankwagh mba Babilon la; a kaa a na er: De kera timin mbafankwagh mba Babilon ga; za a mo hen tor; me pase tor inja i ma." 
Daniel2:25 Tsô Arioki za a Daniel sha ishigh ki tor fese, man a kaa a na nahan er: M zua a or ken mbakwarev mba Yuda, u nana pase tor inja i mnya yô." 
Daniel2:26 Tor gema kaa a Daniel, u i yilan un er Belete-shasar la er: U fatyô u pasen mo mnyam ma, m nenge la, man inja i ma?" 
Daniel2:27 Daniel gema kaa sha ishigh ki tor er: Kwaghmyer u tor a pin la, mbafankwagh, shin mbaasorov, shin mbaahiriv, shin mbatsengan fan akaa kpaa, ve fatyô u pasen tor ga;" 
Daniel2:28 kpa Aôndo ngu Sha u A pasen akaamyer, man A pase tor Nebukadinesar kwagh u una va er sha ayange a masetyô la kpaa. Ka mnyam ou, man mbampase mba sha mnenge mba u nenge er u lu sha gambe wou ne:" 
Daniel2:29 We tor, mbamhen ou mba u hen sha gambe wou lu sha kwagh u una va er ken hemen; Wen u A pasen kwaghmyer la, A pase u kwagh u una va er yô." 
Daniel2:30 Mo yô, i pasem kwaghmyer ne, ka sha ci u ma kwaghfan u a lu ken a mo hemba u hanma orgen ga, kpa ka sha u i̱ pase tor inja i ma, man sha u u̱ fa mhen u ken ishima you la." 
Daniel2:31 We tor, u lu kenger, yô, nenge, zegeuee. Eev mbula taver ashe, iengem i mbu hemba cii, mbu tile u sha ishi; mluashe u mbu cier iyol." 
Daniel2:32 Eev mbula yô, ityough ki mbu lu sha zenaria u dedoo, vanger man ave a mbu lu sha azurfa, iyav man anam a mbu lu sha togula," 
Daniel2:33 ahambe-angahar a mbu lu sha iyôgh ki iligh, akevangahar a mbu lu sha iyô nungwa inyatyuu." 
Daniel2:34 Er u lu kenger yô, nenge, iwen bugh, ave a or bende sha i ga, i va ta eev mbula sha akevangahar a a lu iyôgh nungwa inyatyuu la, hembe a avur avur." 
Daniel2:35 Tsô hen shighe la je, i hembe iyôgh ki iligh man inyatyuu man togula man azurfa man zenaria cii, hingir er ka imough i sha vande u gbidyen iyiagh inyom yô; ahumbe purugh a mi kera, je avindigh a i tsô kpaa kera lu ga, man iwen i i te sha eev mbula gema hingir zegewo, iv tar cii." 
Daniel2:36 Ka mnyam ma shonom je ne, hegen sé pase tor inja i ma." 
Daniel2:37 We tor, u ngu tor u utor je, ka Aôndo u Sha A ne u tor, man tahav man agee man icivir ye," 
Daniel2:38 man hanma ijiir ape ior ve tem cii kua inyamtoho man inyon i sha kpaa, A na sha ikev you er u̱ tema tor sha ve cii; ka we je u lu ityough ki sha zenaria la ye." 
Daniel2:39 Zum u ú va kar kera yô, tartor ugen ua mough u ua kuma sha u wou ga, man shi tartor ugen kpaa u sha utar u sha togula, u ua ya tor sha tar cii." 
Daniel2:40 Man tartor u sha unyiin la ua taver, er iyôgh ki iligh nahan, er iyôgh ki iligh ka ki hembe akaa cii avur avur man ki cagh akaa cii nahan; man er iyôgh ki heren akaa cii nahan, kape kia hembe avur avur man kia her a cii la." 
Daniel2:41 Man er u nenge akevangahar kua ahôangahar, tiôn ugen a lu inyatyuu man tiôn ugen a lu iyôgh nahan, kape ua lu tartor u paven je la; agee a iyôô aa lu ker, er u nenge iyôgh ki nongo a inyatyuu nahan." 
Daniel2:42 Man er ahôangahar la, tiôn ugen a lu iyôgh man tiôn ugen inyatyuu yô, kape tartor la, vegher ugen una oson a oso la." 
Daniel2:43 Man er u nenge iyôgh ki nongo sha inyatyuu nahan, kape vea nungwa ayol a ve sha kwase u eren, kpa vea var ayol a ve ga, er iyôgh ki varen sha inyatyuu ga nahan." 
Daniel2:44 Man sha ayange a utor mbala, Aôndo u Sha Una ver tartor ugen u ua gba mayange ga yô, man shi tahav mbu u kpaa mbua hingir sha ikev i ma ikur igen ga, kpa ua hembe ityartor igen ne cii avur avur, ua tim i, kpa u yô, ua lu gbem sha won;" 
Daniel2:45 vough er u nenge iwen bugh sha uwo, ave a or bende sha mi ga, i va hembe iyôgh avur avur kua togula man inyatyuu man azurfa man zenaria nahan. Aôndo u hemban la pase tor kwagh u una va er ken hemen yô; mnyam mara ka kwagh u keng, inja i ma kpaa ka mimi je." 
Daniel2:46 Tsô tor Nebukadinesar gure kuma ishigh inya, ta Daniel inya, a shi a kaa er, i̱ va a nagh man akaahumandoon i̱ va na un." 
Daniel2:47 Tor shi gema kaa a Daniel er: Mimi je, Aôndo wen ka Aôndo u mbaaôndo mbagenev cii, man Ter u utor kpaa, man Orpasenakaamyer, ka nahan man u fetyô u pasen kwaghmyer ne ye." 
Daniel2:48 Tsô tor civir Daniel kpishi, na un uiwua mba vesen, a ver un tor sha tiôntar u Babilon cii, man shi orhemen u vesen u mbafankwagh mba Babilon cii." 
Daniel2:49 Daniel ôr kwagh a tor, nahan tor ver Sedaraki man Meshaki man Abedi-nego mbatarev sha tiôntar u Babilon; Daniel yô, lu ken ya u tor." 
Daniel3:1 Tor Nebukadinesar er eev mbu sha zenaria, ityaven i mbu lu aseva akunduatar man igbanger i mbu lu aseva ataratar; a ver mbu shin pev u Dura ken tiôntar u Babilon." 
Daniel3:2 Tsô tor Nebukadinesar tindi er, uityombaiorov man ugomna man mbaajiriv man mbanengen sha inyar man mbawasenmhen man mbafanatindi man mbakurantar mba atôônatar la cii, ve̱ va kohol hen mver u eev mbu tor Nebukadinesar er la." 
Daniel3:3 Nahan utor man uityombaiorov man ugomna man mbaajiriv man mbanengen sha inyar man mbawasenmhen man mbafanatindi man mbakurantar mba atôônatar la cii, ve va kohol hen mver u eev mbu tor Nebukadinesar er la, ve va tile sha ishigh ki eev mbu Nebukadinesar er la." 
Daniel3:4 Tsô oryôôn genger imo, kaa er: I wa ne tindi, ne ior man akuraior man ijô," 
Daniel3:5 shighe u nea ungwa imo i kor ma imar man molo man gbange man adiguve man ikpaimar man hanma inja i ityougholough cii yô, gure nen inya, sugh nen eev mbu zenaria mbu tor Nebukadinesar a er la;" 
Daniel3:6 man aluer or nana gure inya, nana sugh mbu ga yô, á gbihi nan shin atô u atse a usu u yeghen ker la, hen shighe la je." 
Daniel3:7 Nahan, hen shighe u ior cii ve ongo imo i kor man i mar man molo man gbange man adiguve man hanma inja i ityougholough cii yô, ior man akuraior man ijô cii, ve gure inya, ve sugh eev mbu zenaria mbu tor Nebukadinesar a er la." 
Daniel3:8 Tsô, hen shighe la je, Mbakaldi mbagenev va, va yila Mbayuda ijir." 
Daniel3:9 Ve ôr kwagh a tor Nebukadinesar, ve kaa er: Tor a̱ lu uma gbem." 
Daniel3:10 Tor, we u wa tindi wer, hanma or u nan ongo imo i kor man imar man molo man gbange man adiguve man ikpaimar, man hanma inja i ityougholough cii yô, nana̱ gure inya nana̱ sugh eev mbu zenaria mbula," 
Daniel3:11 man hanma or u nana gure inya nana sugh mbu ga yô, á gbihi nan ken atô u atse a usu u yeghen ker la." 
Daniel3:12 Mbayuda mbagenev mba, mba u ver ve sha akaa a tiôntar u Babilon la, ka Saderaki man Meshaki man Abedi-nego; ior mban yô, ve wa u iko ga tor; mba civir mbaaôndo ou ga, man mba civir eev mbu zenaria mbu u ver la kpaa ga." 
Daniel3:13 Tsô Nebukadinesar kaa sha ishima i vihin man iyugh na i tsung er, i̱ va a Saderaki man Meshaki man Abedi-nego. Tsô i va a ior mbala sha ishigh ki tor." 
Daniel3:14 Nebukadinesar gema pine ve er: We, Saderaki man Meshaki man Abedi-nego, ka sha apera je ne civir aôndo wam ga, man eev mbu zenaria mbu m ver la kpaa, ne civir mbu ga yee?" 
Daniel3:15 Hegen yô, aluer né wa ago iyol sha shighe u né ungwa imo i kor man imar man molo man gbange man adiguve man ikpaimar man hanma inja i ityougholough cii yô, man né gure inya, né sugh eev mbu m er la yô, doo; kpaa aluer né sugh mbu ga yô, á gbihi ne ken atô u atse a usu u yeghen ker la, hen shighe la je: ka hanma aôndo je una yima ne sha ikev yama?" 
Daniel3:16 Saderaki man Meshaki man Abedi-nego, ve gema ve kaa a tor Nebukadinesar er: Kera gba u sé kaa u imo sha kwagh ne ga." 
Daniel3:17 Aluer Aôndo wase u se civir Un la Una fatyô u yiman se yô, Una yima se ken atse a usu u yeghen ker la kua sha ave ou kpaa, tor." 
Daniel3:18 A lu nahan ga kpaa, fa kwagh ne, tor, sé civir mbaaôndo ou ga, man shi eev mbu zenaria mbu u ver la kpaa, sé civir mbu ga." 
Daniel3:19 Nahan ishima vihi Nebuka-dinesar kpishi, mlu u ishigh nagh gema kposo a Saderaki man Meshaki man Abedi-nego; nahan a ôr kwagh, a kaa er, i̱ kende usu u̱ hemba tseen a u i vande keer kwa taankaruhar." 
Daniel3:20 Shi a kaa a ior mbagenev mba taver iyol mba ve lu ken mbautyav nav er, ve̱ kange Saderaki man Meshaki man Abedi-nego, ve̱ gbihi ve ken atse a usu u yeghen ker la." 
Daniel3:21 Nahan i kange ior mbala a uriga vev iyol man uwondo vev, man atsar a ve, kua akondo a ve agen, i gbihi ve ken atô u atse a usu u yeghen ker la." 
Daniel3:22 Nahan er imo i tor taver yum, man atse kpaa tsee tsung yô, nomborusu gema wua ior mba ve tôô Saderaki man Meshaki man Abedi-nego la." 
Daniel3:23 Ior mba utar mban: Saderaki man Meshaki man Abedi-nego ve gba ken atô u atse a usu u yeghen ker la, a ikangenev mbila." 
Daniel3:24 Tsô kpiligh tor Nebukadinesar iyol, a mough sha gagh; a ôr kwagh a mbawasen un mhen, a kaa er: Kera ka ior itiar se gbihi ve uikangen ken atô u usu gaa? Ve gema ve kaa a tor er: Ka nahan tor." 
Daniel3:25 A gema a kaa er: Nenge, m ngu nengen a iorov unyiin mba a ikangenev iyol, ga, mba zenden ken atô u usu, kwagh er ve ga; mluashe u u sha unyiin la, ngu er wan u mbaaôndo nahan." 
Daniel3:26 Nahan Nebukadinesar kporom ikua hen hunda u atse a usu u yeghen ker la, a ôr kwagh a kaa er: We, Saderaki man Meshaki man Abedi-nego, ne mbayev mba Aôndo Uhembansha cii, due, va nen heen. Tsô Saderaki man Meshaki man Abedi-nego ve due ken atô u usu la." 
Daniel3:27 Nahan uityombaiorov man ugomna man mbawasen tor mhen, ve zua her cii, ve nenge ior mbala er usu lu a tahav sha ayol a ve ga, shin ice ve i sha ityou tsô kpaa, usu anger ga, uriga vev kpaa vihi ga, ihuma i usu tsô kpaa, bende ve ga." 
Daniel3:28 Nebukadinesar ôr kwagh, kaa er: I̱ wuese Aôndo u Saderaki man Meshaki man Abedi-nego, u A tindi ortyom Na, a va yem mbayev Nav, mba ve suur sha a Na, ve we tindi u tor iko ga, ve na ayol a ve sha u civir ma aôndo ugen sughun un ga, saa Aôndo ve tseegh yô." 
Daniel3:29 Nahan yô, m wa hanma ior man ikurior man zwa tindi mer, or u nana ôr kwagh dang sha Aôndo u Saderaki man Meshaki man Abedi-nego ne yô, á paa nan avur avur, á gema ya u nan á hingir tihi u ihôgh; gadia ma aôndo ugen ngu u una fatyô u yiman or sha imbakwagh ne nahan ga." 
Daniel3:30 Nahan tor seer nan Saderaki man Meshaki man Abedi-nego tahav ken tiôntar u Babilon. 
Daniel4:1 Tor Nebukadinesar, u zan hen ior man akuraior man ijô cii, mba ve tem sha won cii: Bem a̱ ngee her a ven." 
Daniel4:2 M nenge doo u me pase ikav man akaakpilighyol a Aôndo Uhembansha cii A erem yô. 
Daniel4:3 Uivande Nav vese je! Akaakpilighyol a Na kpaa cier iyol; tartor Na ka tartor u tsôron gbem, tahav Nav kpaa mbu sha ikov ikov!" 
Daniel4:4 Mo Nebukadinesar m tema bem bem ken ya wam, lu kpen mo iyol ken iyou yam i tor." 
Daniel4:5 Mnyam ciem, ma cier mo iyol; mhen wam u sha gambe, man mbampase mba sha mnenge mba m nenge a mi la tam mciem iyol." 
Daniel4:6 Nahan, m wa tindi mer, i̱ va a mbafankwagh mba ken Babilon cii sha ishigh yagh, ve̱ pasem inja i mnyam mara." 
Daniel4:7 Tsô mbaahiriv man mbaasorov man Mbakaldi man mbatsenganôron akaa, ve nyôr, tsô m ôr ve mnyam ma shonom, kpa ve pasem inja i ma ga." 
Daniel4:8 Kpa ken masetyô yô, Daniel va nyôr sha ishigh yagh, u i yilan un er Belete-shasar, sha iti i aôndo wam, u jijingi u uicighanmbaaôndo a lu ken a na la; m ôr un mnyam am, m kaa mer:" 
Daniel4:9 We Belete-shasar, orvesen u mbaahiriv, m fa jijingi u uicighanmbaaôndo ngu ken a we, man ma kwagh u myer u zan we iyol kpaa ngu ga; yô, ôrom mbampase mba sha mnenge mba m nenge a mi ken mnya, kua inja ve." 
Daniel4:10 Ka mbampase mba sha mnenge mba m nenge a mi sha gambe wam ne: M lu kenger, yô, nenge, kon ugen lu hen atô u tar, u tav tsung." 
Daniel4:11 Kon la vese, u taver, tav je, za kôr sha kwavaôndo, i nenge a u zan zan ken ikighir i tar cii." 
Daniel4:12 Ika i u doo u nengen, atam a u ngee; u lu a kwaghyan sha ci u ior cii; inyamtoho zuan a mure shin itine i u, inyon i sha teman sha agbaa a u, man hanma kwaghuma cii zua a kwaghyan sha u." 
Daniel4:13 M nenge ken mbampase mba sha mnenge mba m nenge a mi sha gambe wam la, yô, nenge, icighanor, ka orkuran je la, sen Sha." 
Daniel4:14 A genger imo, a kaa er: Gber kon ne kera, paa agbaa a u, or ika i u, tsenda atam a u kera; inyamtoho i̱ kar shin itine i u kera, man inyon kpaa i̱ mough sha agbaa a u." 
Daniel4:15 Nahan kpaa, de ikpughur na a amise na shin inya, a ikangenev mbi sha iyô man togula ken gwergwe u ken ikôngo; avure a sha a̱ heen un, kwar na u̱ lu a ishôso imôngo ken toho;" 
Daniel4:16 i̱ gema ishima na, i̱ de kera luun i or ga, i̱ na un ishima i inyamtoho, man ashighe a̱ kar un ataankarahar." 
Daniel4:17 Ka sha imo i mbakuran i wa tindi la, man ka sha mkaa u mba i tsegh ve la a lu ye, ka sha ci u mba ve lu uma, ve̱ fa. Uhembansha ngu a tahav sha tartor u ior, ka A gema u A na hanma or u i doo Un u nan nan yô, ka a ver or hemban gban ijime ken ior sha u kpaa." 
Daniel4:18 Mnyam man, mo tor Nebukadinesar m nenge ma; man we Belete-shasar, pasem inja i ma, gadia mbafankwagh mba ken tartor wam cii fatyô u pasen mo inja i ma ga; kpa we yô, u fatyô, gadia jijingi u uicighanmbaaôndo ngu ken a we." 
Daniel4:19 Tsô Daniel, u i yilan un er Belete-shasar la, tile ving, kondo un iyol, mbamhen nav cier un iyol. Nahan tor gema kaa er: We, Belete-shasar, de rumun mnyam shin mpase u ma a̱ cier we iyol ga. Belete-shasar gema kaa er: Terem, mnyam man ma̱ hide sha mba ve ker u ihom la, man mpase u ma kpaa sha mbaahendanev ou." 
Daniel4:20 Kon u u nenge, u u vese, taver, man u tav u za ker sha kwavaôndo man i nenge a u sha won cii la," 
Daniel4:21 u ika i u i doo u nengen, man atam a u kpaa a ngee, u lu a kwaghyan sha ci u ior cii, u inyamtoho i tem shin itine i u man inyon i sha kpaa i tem sha agbaa a u la, yô," 
Daniel4:22 ka we tor; u vese, u taver, gadia icivir you seer je ar sha, man tartor wou kpaa tser tar cii." 
Daniel4:23 Man er tor nenge icighanor, orkuran, lu senen Sha, kaan er: Gber kon ne kera wua u, nahan kpaa, de ikpughur na a amise shin inya, a ikangenev mbi sha iyô man togula ken gwergwe u ken ikôngo; avure a Sha a̱ heen un iyol, kwar na u̱ lu a ishôso imôngo ken toho; zan zan ashighe á kar un ataankarahar" 
Daniel4:24 ka inja i ma ne, tor; man ka imo i Uhembansha la, i i ve sha terem tor yô:" 
Daniel4:25 á zenda u ken ior kera, man ijiir i teman you ia lu a inyamtoho imôngo, man á er u, ú ya toho er ibua nahan, avure a Sha á heen we iyol, ashighe á kar u ataankarahar, zan zan ú fa er Uhembansha a lu a tahav sha tartor u ior yô, ka A gema u, A na or u i doo Un u nan yô." 
Daniel4:26 Man er i kaa er, i̱ de ikpughurkon la a amise yô, tartor wou ua lu taveraa ken masetyô u ú fa er Sha a tem tor yô." 
Daniel4:27 Nahan yô, tor, rumun kwaghwan u m we u ne, pav a asorabo a ou, gema eren perapera, man pav a aferakaa a ou kpaa, gema zungwe mbaatsanev mhôônom; tso alaghga á seer ayange a mkpeyol wou." 
Daniel4:28 A kaa ne cii er tor Nebukadinesar. 
Daniel4:29 Er iwer pue kar ihiar bee kera yô, a lu zenden sha tembeyough u sha, u iyou i tor ken Babilon." 
Daniel4:30 Tor ôr kwagh kaa er: Ngun kera ka zege Babilon, u m maa sha u a̱ lu ijiir i teman i tor, sha tahav mbu agee am, sha ci u icivir i shagba wam ne gaa?" 
Daniel4:31 Er tor lu ôron kwagh ave la je, tsô, imo due Sha, kaa er: We, tor Nebukadinesar, ka we i ôr kwagh ne a we er: I dugh u tor ve." 
Daniel4:32 Á zenda u hen ior kera, ijiir you i teman la ia lu a inyamtoho imôngo; á na u ú ya toho er ibua nahan, ashighe aa kar u ataankarahar; zan zan ú fa er Uhembansha a lu a tahav sha tartor u ior yô, ka A gema u A na hanma or u i doo Un u nan nan yô." 
Daniel4:33 Hen shighe la je i kure kwaghôron la sha Nebukadinesar; i zenda un hen ior kera, man a ya toho er ibua nahan, iyol na kpaa heen sha avure a Sha, zan zan ice na tav lihe er ingur i ugafa nahan, akughul a na kpaa hingir er akughul a inyon nahan." 
Daniel4:34 Tsô er ayange kar kera yô, mo Nebukadinesar m kende ashe am Sha, tsô mfe wam hide her a mo, m wuese Uhembansha, m sugh Un, shi m civir Un u A lu uma gbem sha won yô; mtemtor Na ka u tsôron gbem man tartor Na kpaa ka u sha ikov ikov cii;" 
Daniel4:35 mba ve tem sha won cii mba er ka ma kwagh ga nahan; ka A er sha awashima Na a akum a Sha man a mba ve tem shin tar kpaa; ma or fatyô u yangen uwegh Nagh ga, shin u pinen Un er: Ka nyi U eren nahan, kpaa ga." 
Daniel4:36 Hen shighe la je, mfe wam hide her a mo; icivir i tartor wam, shagba wam, man iengem yam gema hide her a mo; mbawasen mo mhen man mbatarev av kpaa kerem ityô, va her a mo; i taver tartor wam her, man i seer mo ivesen tsung." 
Daniel4:37 Hegen yô, mo Nebukadinesar m ngu civir Tor u Sha; gadia aeren a Na cii ka a mimi je, man igbenda Na ka i perapera, man mba ve zenden sha ihagh yô, A fatyô u hiden a ve ijime." 
Daniel5:1 Tor Beleshasar er zegeiniongo sha ci u mbatarev nav dubu môm, a ma wain sha ishigh ki ior mba ve lu dubu la." 
Daniel5:2 Beleshasar, er wain nyoho un yô, a kaa er, i̱ va a ikav mbi zenaria man mbi azurfa mbi ter na Nebukadinesar kura ken tempel u ken Yerusalem la, sha u tor man mbatarev nav man kasev nav man kasev nav mba sha uika ve̱ ma kwagh a mi yô." 
Daniel5:3 Nahan i va a ikav mbi zenaria mbi i kura ken tempel, iyou i Aôndo i i lu ken Yerusalem la; nahan tor man mbatarev nav man kasev nav kua kasev nav mba sha uika, ve ma kwagh a mi." 
Daniel5:4 Ve ma wain, ve wuese mbaaôndo mba sha zenaria man mba sha azurfa man mba sha togula man mba sha iyô man mba sha ikon man mba sha awen." 
Daniel5:5 Hen shighe la je ahôaveegh a uwegh ku orough due, gba ngeren kwagh sha ivue i pupuu i sha kpekpe u iyou i tor, sha ishigh ki daarimenger; tor gema nenge tiônwe u lu ngeren la." 
Daniel5:6 Tsô mluashe u ishigh ki tor gema kposo, mbamhen nav kpaa ta un mciem iyol; uijuan mba iwenge na oghom, anu a na kpaa gba kunden ikarikase, zuan." 
Daniel5:7 Tsô tor genger imo er, i̱ nyôr a mbaasorov man Mbakaldi man mbatsenganôron akaa. Tor ôr kwagh kaa a mbafankwagh mba Babilon er: Or u nana ôr ingeren nen man nana pasem inja i i kpaa yô, á haa nan akondo a nyian dindee iyol, á har nan ishiligh ku zenaria sha mon, nana lu tor u sha utar ken tartor la." 
Daniel5:8 Nahan mbafankwagh mba tor cii ve nyôr; kpa ingeren la yô, ve fatyô u ôron i ga, shin u pasen tor inja i i kpaa ga." 
Daniel5:9 Nahan mciem ta tor Beleshasar iyol tsung, mluashe u ishigh nagh gema kposo, mbatarev nav kpaa, kondo ve iyol." 
Daniel5:10 Torkwase va nyôr ken iyou i iniongo sha ci u kwaghôron u tor man mbatarev nav la; nahan torkwase ôr kwagh kaa er: Tor a̱ lu uma gbem sha won; mbamhen ou ve̱ de te u mciem iyol ga, mluashe u ishigh you kpaa a̱ de gem kposo ga." 
Daniel5:11 Orgen ngu ken tartor wou u jijingi u uicighanmbaaôndo a lu ken a na yô; sha ayange a teru la, i zua a iwanger man mkav man mfe, inja er mfe u mbaaôndo nahan ken a na; nahan tor Nebukadinesar teru ver un orvesen u mbaahiriv man mbaasorov man u Mbakaldi man mbatsenganôron akaa; ka teru je, tor." 
Daniel5:12 Gadia i zua a jijingi u hemban, man mfe man mkav, man u fan u pasen mnyam, man u pasen ukyikya, man u been akpelan, ken Daniel u tor ii un iti er Belete-shasar la. Yô, i̱ yila Daniel, tsô una pase inja i i." 
Daniel5:13 Nahan i va a Daniel sha ishigh ki tor. Tor ôr kwagh a Daniel kaa er: Ka we Daniel u u lu ken ônov mba mbakwarev mba Yuda, mba terem tor due a ve ken Yuda nee?" 
Daniel5:14 M vande ungwan kwagh wou, er, jijingi u mbaaôndo a lu ken a we yô, man er i zua a iwanger man mkav man mfe u hemban ken a we kpaa yô." 
Daniel5:15 Hegen yô, i vande nyôron a mbafankwagh, ka mbaasorov je la, sha ishigh yagh, sha u ve̱ ôr ingeren ne, man ve̱ pasem inja i i kpaa; kpa ve fatyô u pasen inja i kwagh la ga." 
Daniel5:16 Kpa m ungwa mer, we yô, u fatyô u pasen akaa, man u been akpelan; hegen yô, aluer ú fatyô u ôron ingeren la, man u pasen mo inja i i kpa yô, á haa u akondo a nyian dindee, á har u ishiligh ku zenaria sha mon kpaa, ú lu tor u sha utar ken tartor." 
Daniel5:17 Tsô Daniel gema kaa a tor er: Lu a iwua you, gema injar you la na orgen; nahan kpaa me ôr tor ingeren la, me pase un inja i i." 
Daniel5:18 We tor, Aôndo Uhembansha na Nebukadinesar teru tartor man ivesen man icivir man shagba." 
Daniel5:19 Sha ci u ivesen i A na un la, ior man akuraior man ijô cii, ve gbidye akarkase iyol ve cia un; hanma or u a nenge i doo un u wuan yô, a wua nan; hanma or u a nenge i doo u nana̱ lu uma yô, a de nan uma; man hanma or u i lu un pe kenden nan sha yô, a kende a nan sha; man hanma or u i lu un pe hiden a nan ijime yô, a hide a nan." 
Daniel5:20 Kpa zum u a hii u moron iyol yô, man jijingi na kpaa cighir zan zan a hingir u eren kwagh sha ihagh yô, i dugh un sha ikônough nagh ki torough kera, man icivir na kpaa i ngohol i kera;" 
Daniel5:21 i zenda un hen ior kera; ishima na gema hingir er i inyamtoho nahan, ijiir na i tsan kpaa lu a ujaki mba tohov imôngo; a hingir u yan toho er ibua nahan, iyol na heen sha avure a Sha, zan zan a kar fan er Aôndo Uhembansha la, A tem tor sha tartor u ior; ka A gema u, A na hanma or u i doo Un u nan nan yô." 
Daniel5:22 Man we wan na, Beleshasar, u hide a ishima you ijime ga, shin er u fe akaa ne nahan kpaa." 
Daniel5:23 Kpa u kende a iyol you sha, u hendan a Aôndo u Sha; shi i va a ikav mbi ken iyou Na sha ishigh you kpaa, we man mbatarev ou man kasev ou man kasev ou mba sha uika, ne ma wain a mi; man u civir mbaaôndo mba sha azurfa man mba sha zenaria man mba sha togula man sha iyô man mba ikon man mba sha awen, mba ve nengen ga, ve ongo ga, man ve lu a mfe kpaa ga; man Aôndo u iôôn you i lu sha ikev Na, kua igbenda you cii kpaa, u civir Un ga." 
Daniel5:24 Ka nahan man A tindi tiônwe a va nger ingeren ne ye. 
Daniel5:25 Ka ingeren i i nger i ne: MENE, MENE, TEKEL, UFARSHIN." 
Daniel5:26 Ka mpase u kwagh ne ne: MENE: Aôndo ôr ayange a tartor wou, A kure u kpaa." 
Daniel5:27 TEKEL: I kar u sha iyôgh ki karen kwagh; yô, u yina." 
Daniel5:28 PERESE: I pav tartor wou i na Mbamedia man Mbapershia. 
Daniel5:29 Tsô Beleshasar na zwa, nahan ve haa Daniel akondo a nyian dindee man ve har un ishiligh ku zenaria sha mon, man ve yôô kwagh na er una lu tor u sha utar ken tartor." 
Daniel5:30 Hen tugh mbula je, i wua Beleshasar tor u Mbakaldi. Dariu or u Media gema ngohol" 
Daniel5:31 tartor la, zum u anyom a na kuma akunduatar kar ahar la." 
Daniel6:1 Dariu nenge doo u una ver mbatarev deri man ikundu sha tartor la, mba vea tema ken tartor la cii;" 
Daniel6:2 man mbahemenev utar mba ve nengen sha a ve yô, Daniel gema lu u môm ken a ve, sha u mbatarev mban ve̱ ôron ve akaa a ve eren, sha er kwagh una saa tor ga yô." 
Daniel6:3 Nahan Daniel ne hemba mbahemenev man mbatarev la cii; gadia jijingi u hemban lu ker a na; nahan tor ver ishima u veren un sha tartor la cii. 
Daniel6:4 Tsô mbahemenev man mbatarev lu keren u zuan a ityôkwagh i bo sha Daniel sha kwagh u tartor la, kpaa ve zua a ityôikaa i bo shin ifer kpaa ga; gadia a lu ormimi je, man i zua a ma mtsum shin ifer ken a na kpaa ga." 
Daniel6:5 Tsô ior mban kaa er: Sea zua a ityôikaa i bo hen Daniel ne ga, saa di sé zua a mi sha tindi u Aôndo na la." 
Daniel6:6 Nahan mbahemenev man mbatarev mban zua hen tor, ve kaa a tor er: Tor Dariu a̱ lu uma gbem sha won!" 
Daniel6:7 Mbahemenev mba ken tartor ne cii; uityombaiorov man mbatarev man mbawasenmhen man ugomna ve hen imôngo er, tor a̱ wa tindi, a̱ ta icin taveraa zan zan ayange ikundugber, er hanma or u nana sôn kwagh hen ma aôndo shin ma or, á kera lu her a we ga yô, tor a̱ gbihi nan shin ihungwa i ubegha." 
Daniel6:8 Hegen yô, tor, yange kwagh ne taveraa, man wa uwegh sha u i̱ de gem un ga, a̱ lu sha inja i tindi u Mbamedia man Mbapershia u a gem mayange ga la nahan." 
Daniel6:9 Nahan tor Dariu wa uwegh sha ingeren la kua icin la cii. 
Daniel6:10 Zum u Daniel fa er i wa uwegh sha ingeren la yô, a nyôr ken iyou na, uwindou mba iyou na i sha, lu ivegher, vegher u shin Yerusalem la, a gure inya sha anu na kwa tar hanma iyange, a er msen, a na ishughun sha ishigh ki Aôndo na, er a vanden eren keke nahan." 
Daniel6:11 Tsô ior mbala zua imôngo, ve va kohol Daniel sônon man zamber sha ishigh ki Aôndo na." 
Daniel6:12 Nahan ve va, ve ôr kwagh a tor sha kwagh u icin i tan i tor la er: U wa uwegh sha icintan ne wer: Hanma or u nana sôn kwagh hen ma aôndo shin ma or ken ayange a ikundugber ne, á kera lu hen we ga yô, á gbihi nan shin ihungwa i ubegha gaa? Tor gema kaa er: Ka kwagh u bunden ga, sha inja i tindi u Mbamedia man Mbapershia, u a gem mayange ga yô." 
Daniel6:13 Tsô ve gema ve kaa a tor er: Daniel or u ken mbakwarev mba Yuda la, a wa u iko ga, kpa gbe sônon a nagh kera tsô kwa tar iyange i môm." 
Daniel6:14 Tsô tor ongo akaaôron ne nahan yô, ishima vihi un tsung, a wa ishima u yiman Daniel; a nôngo sha gbashima u yiman un zan zan iyange kar miren." 
Daniel6:15 Nahan ior mbala va zua hen tor, ve kaa a tor er: Fa, tor, ka tindi u Mbamedia man Mbapershia er ma icin i tan shin tindi u tor a we yô, á kera gema un mayange ga." 
Daniel6:16 Nahan tor na zwa, i va a Daniel, i gbihi un shin ihungwa i ubegha. Kpa tor ôr kwagh a Daniel kaa er: Aôndo wou u u civir Un gbem la, A̱ yima u." 
Daniel6:17 Shi i va a iwen, i va cir sha zwa ihungwa; tor ver i ikav sha kunya na, man sha kunya u mbatarev nav; sha u i̱ de gem ma kwagh sha Daniel kposo ga yô." 
Daniel6:18 Nahan tor hide ken iyou na i tor, a venda kwaghyan tugh mbula; i va a ityougholov sha ishigh nagh kpaa ga; mnyam kpaa bunde un." 
Daniel6:19 Tsô tor mough pepe dindee, a za hen ihungwa i ubegha la ayem." 
Daniel6:20 Za ar hen ihungwa la yô, a yila Daniel sha imo i mlia; tor ôr kwagh, kaa a Daniel er: We, Daniel, wanakiriki u Aôndo u uma, Aôndo wou u u civir Un gbem la, A fatyô u yiman we sha ikev i ubegha kpa?" 
Daniel6:21 Tsô Daniel gema kaa a tor er: Tor a̱ lu uma gbem. 
Daniel6:22 Aôndo wam tindi ortyom Na, va cir ubegha ijô, ve erem ma kwagh u vihin ga; gadia i zuam a ibo sha ishigh Nagh ga; sha ishigh you kpaa, tor, m er ma kwaghbo ga." 
Daniel6:23 Nahan tor ember tsung, a kaa er, i̱ dugh Daniel shin ihungwa kera. Nahan i dugh Daniel shin ihungwa, ve zua un a iyolvihin mape je ga, sha ci u a suur sha Aôndo na yô." 
Daniel6:24 Tor shi kaa er, i̱ va a ior mba ve sende Daniel mbala, i̱ gbihi ve shin ihungwa i ubegha, ve man ônov vev man kasev vev; er ve lu a mande shin mkur u ihungwa la ga je tsô ubegha ve va hemba ve, ve hembe akuhe a ve avur avur cii." 
Daniel6:25 Tsô tor Dariu nger hen ior man akuraior man ijô cii, mba ve tem sha won cii, er: Bem a̱ ngee ne." 
Daniel6:26 M ngu wan tindi mer: Sha ajiir a i lu tartor wam cii, ior ve̱ gbidye ikarikase iyol, ve̱ cia sha ishigh ki Aôndo u Daniel; gadia ka Un A lu Aôndo u uma, u lun gbem sha won ye, tartor Na kpaa ka u timin ga, man tahav Nav mbua lu zan zan mkur je." 
Daniel6:27 Ka A yima man shi a war, man A er akav man akaa a kpilighyol sha kwavaôndo kua shin tar kpaa, Wen u A yima Daniel ken agee a ubegha la." 
Daniel6:28 Kape Daniel ne zua a mkpeyol sha ayange a mtemtor u Dariu man sha ayange a mtemtor u Shirushi or u Pershia la. 
Daniel7:1 Sha inyom i hiihii i Beleshasar tor u Babilon la, mnyam cie Daniel, a nenge mbampase er a yav sha gambe na yô; nahan a nger mnyam mara, a ôr homonkwagh u ma." 
Daniel7:2 Daniel ôr kwagh kaa er: M nenge ken mpase wam tugh; yô, nenge, ahumbe a anyiin a sha la, ve gbuusu zegemnger." 
Daniel7:3 Inyam i vesen inyiin due shin zegemnger, hanimô lu kposo a igen." 
Daniel7:4 I hiihii lu er begha nahan, i lu a akper a ugafa; er m lu kenger yô, i tsuwa i akper kera, man i tôô i hen inya i kende a i sha, i er i i tile sha angahar ahar er or nahan, man i na i ishima i or kpaa." 
Daniel7:5 Man shi nenge inyam igen, i sha uhar, lu er dwem nahan, i kende vegher u môm sha, i nyuma ahan atar ken zwa u i sha anyi; i kaa a i er: Mough sha, ya inyam kpishi." 
Daniel7:6 Ken masejime ne yô, shi m nenge igen lu er anyam nahan, i lu a akper a inyon anyiin sha ijime i i, inyam la lu a ityouv inyiin; i na i tahav kpaa." 
Daniel7:7 Ken masejime ne shi m nenge ken mbampase mba utuuv, yô, nenge, inyam i sha unyiin, i cier iyol, ta ihindi, man i taver iyol kpishi kpaa; lu a uzegembaanyiiv mba iyôôv; i ya kwagh i hembe avur avur, kwagh u a shi la i shoghol angahar a i sha mi; i lu kposo a inyam igen i i vande a i cii; man i lu a akor pue." 
Daniel7:8 Er m lu timen sha akor la, nenge korough kugenegh ku kiriki gema due ken a, i tsuwa akor atar a a vande lun la sha ishigh ki ku kera; man nenge, ashe lu sha korough kun er ashe a or nahan, man zwa u ôron uzegembaakaav kpaa." 
Daniel7:9 Er m lu kenger her yô, i ver mkônom ma torom; or u tsan sha won kar za tema, akondo a na kungu er senou nahan, man ice i sha ityough nagh kpaa lu er mou u wang nahan; ikônough Nagh ki torough ki teman sha mi lu inyomborusu akaver a na lu usu u yeghen." 
Daniel7:10 Ifi u usu due gba kuwan sha ishigh nagh; ior udubu dubu lu eren Un tom, man dubu pue kwa dubu pue tile sha ishigh Nagh; i tema ijirôron man i bugh uruamabera." 
Daniel7:11 M lu kenger her sha ci u imo i akaaôron a vesen a korough kura lu ôron yô; er m lu kenger her yô, i wua inyam la, i tim iyol i i kera, i na i sha u i̱ nande i sha usu." 
Daniel7:12 Inyam i i shi la yô, i ngohol i tahav kera; kpa i de i i̱ hira lu uma her shighe kar." 
Daniel7:13 M nenge ken mbampase mba utuuv, yô, nenge Or gba van sha abeen a sha aôndo, lu er ka wan u or nahan, A va zan zan A va ar hen Or u tsan sha won la, i va a Na sha ishigh Nagh." 
Daniel7:14 I na Un tor sha won cii man icivir man tartor, sha u ior man akuraior man ijô cii ve̱ er Un tom; mtemtor Na ka mtemtor u tsôron, u una kar kera mayange ga, man tartor Na kpaa ka u timin kera mayange ga." 
Daniel7:15 Mo Daniel yô, jijingi wam a ure ken atô u iyol yam, mbampase mba m nenge a mi tam mciem iyol." 
Daniel7:16 M kporom hen ugen ken mba ve tile her la, m pine un inja i kwagh ne cii. Nahan a kaam, a pasem inja i akaa ne cii." 
Daniel7:17 Inyam i vesen i inyiin ne ka utor unyiin mba vea mough ken tar je la. 
Daniel7:18 Kpa uicighanmbaiorov mba Uhembansha vea ngohol tartor, man vea ya tor gbem, een, gbem sha won." 
Daniel7:19 Nahan sarem pe fan kwagh u inyam i sha unyiin, i i lu kposo a igen cii, i i cier iyol yum la, i anyi a i lu iyôgh man akughul a i lu togula, i ka i ya kwagh i hembe avur avur, man kwagh u a shi la i shoghol angahar a i sha mi la;" 
Daniel7:20 man sha kwagh u akor pue a a lu sha ityough ki i, man korough kugenegh ku ku due sha man agen atar gba sha ishigh ki ku la; ka korough ku ku lu ashe man zwa u ôron uzegembaakaav, ku ku lu er ku hemba kehen a akar a ku la." 
Daniel7:21 M nenge korough kun, ku nôngo ityav a uicighanmbaiorov, ku hemba ve;" 
Daniel7:22 zan zan Or u tsan sha won la za va, man i na uicighanmbaiorov mba Uhembansha ishô sha ijirôron; man shighe kuma u uicighanmbaiorov ve̱ ya dyako u tartor la." 
Daniel7:23 A kaa nahan er: Inyam i sha unyiin la, ia lu tartor u sha unyiin sha tar, u ua lu kposo a ityartor igen cii, ua vihitar cii, ua ndyar u, ua her u avur avur." 
Daniel7:24 Man akor a pue la yô: ken tartor ne, utor pue vea mough; ugen shi una mough ken ijime ve, una lu kposo a mbahiihii mbala, una gbihi utor utar inya." 
Daniel7:25 Una ôr akaavihin sha Uhembansha, una er uicighanmbaiorov mba Uhembansha ican; una ver ishima u geman ashighe man atindi, man á na ve sha ikev na zan zan shighe môm man ashighe man vegher u shighe." 
Daniel7:26 Kpa á ôr ijir man á ngohol un tor kera, á tim un kera, kwagh na una bee sha won." 
Daniel7:27 Á gema tartor man mtemtor man ivesen i ityartor i sha won cii, á na nongo u icighanmbaiorov mba Uhembansha; tartor ve ka tartor u tsôron, man ityahav cii mbia er ve tom, mbia ungwa ve." 
Daniel7:28 Ka mkur u kwagh shon ne je ne. Mo Daniel yô, mbamhen av tam mciem iyol kpishi, mluashe u ishigh yagh kpaa gema, kpa m koso kwagh shon ken ishima yam." 
Daniel8:1 Sha inyom i sha utar i mtemtor u Beleshasar la, mpase u sha mnenge ugen ande her a mo, mo Daniel, er ugen vande anden her a mo kera la." 
Daniel8:2 M nenge ken mpase; zum u m nenge la yô, m lu ken Shushan garutya u ken tiôntar u Elam; m nenge ken mpase u sha mnenge, m lu hen kpe ifi u Ulai." 
Daniel8:3 M kende ashe sha, m nenge; Yô, nomiyôngo tile hen kpeifi lu a akor ahar; akor la lihe; kpa ku mômough hemba lihen a kugenegh, ku hemban lihen kura ku mase duen." 
Daniel8:4 M nenge nomiyôngo la lu keman veren ishigh vegher u shin ityôtar man ken imbusutarimese man ken imbusutariyan; ma inyam i môm lu a tahav u tilen sha ishigh nagh ga, man shi ma or fatyô u yiman kwagh sha ikev na ga, kpa a lu eren sha ishima na, lu kenden iyol na sha." 
Daniel8:5 Er m lu kenger yô, nenge, kpev due shin ityôtar va kar sha tar cii, kpa bende shin inya ga; kpev la lu a korough ku tser tser sha kungwa." 
Daniel8:6 A va hen nomiyôngo u lun a akor ahar la, u m nenge a tile hen kpeifi la, a usa, a za sha a na ayem sha ishima i vihin i agee a na." 
Daniel8:7 M nenge a na, a va ikua ikua a nomiyôngo la, a gen ishima sha a na, a za ta sha nomiyôngo la, a sombo un akor ahar la; ma agee kera lu ken nomiyôngo la u tilen sha ishigh nagh ga; a ta un inya, a shoghol angahar sha mi; ma or lu a tahav u yiman nomiyôngo la sha ikev na ga." 
Daniel8:8 Kpev shon la er akaavesen; zum u a hemba yô, zegekor la tôndo; sha ityough ki korough kura, akor agen anyiin a tseer tseer gema due, ver ishiv sha avegher a ahumbe a anyiin a Sha." 
Daniel8:9 Ken ku mômough ken a, ankor u kiriki due, u a hingir ku vesen kpishi yô, a ver ishigh vegher u ken imbusutariyan man vegher u sha ityoughkitaregh man vegher u ken Tar u Icivirigh." 
Daniel8:10 A hingir zegenan zan zan a za ar sha akum a Sha; a pande akum a Sha, ka asan agen je la, a haa a shin inya, a shoghol angahar sha mi." 
Daniel8:11 Een, a kende iyol na sha zan zan a za ar sha Tor u akum a Sha kpaa; a ngohol Un nagh ku nanden ku gbem la kera, a yôhôl icighanjiir Na kera kpaa." 
Daniel8:12 I na ikum i utya sha ikev i ku a nagh ku nanden ku gbem la imôngo, sha ci u tindi u peren; man ku zôhô mimi inya, ku er sha ishima i ku; ikôr lagh ku kpaa." 
Daniel8:13 Nahan m ungwa icighanor lu ôron kwagh; man icighanor ugen gema kaa a u a lu ôron kwagh la er: Mpase u sha mnenge ne una lu ica ia gba nan je, sha kwagh u nagh ku nanden ku gbem la man mper u tindi u nan mtim sha u nan icighanjiir man ikum i Sha u shoghol angahar sha mi laa?" 
Daniel8:14 A kaa a mo er: Ka zan zan mbaaikighe man upepe dubu uhar man deri utar, man á sôr icighanjiir ye." 
Daniel8:15 Tsô zum u mo Daniel, m nenge mpase u sha mnenge la yô, m ker u kaven inja na; yô, nenge, kwagh tile sha ishigh yagh, lu er ka or nahan." 
Daniel8:16 M ungwa imo i or hen atô u ifi u Ulai, i kaa er: Gaberiel, na or ne a̱ kav mpase u sha mnenge ne." 
Daniel8:17 Nahan a va hen ape m tile; er a va yô, cier mo iyol, m gure m kuma ityough inya; kpa a kaa a mo er: Kav, wan u or, gadia mpase u sha mnenge ne ka kwagh u sha shighe u mkur." 
Daniel8:18 Er a lu ôron kwagh a mo nahan yô, m gba mnyam mem mem, m cir ishigh inya; kpa a kpoghol mo, a mough a mo sha;" 
Daniel8:19 a kaa er: Nenge, me na u u̱ fa kwagh u una er sha mkur u iyugh la; gadia kwagh ne tese sha shighe u mkur u i ver la." 
Daniel8:20 Nomiyôngo u u nenge un akor ahar la, ka utor mba Media man Pershia je la." 
Daniel8:21 Man kpev u gban ilyev la ka tor u Grika je la; zegekor u a lu sha kungwa na la ka tor u hiihii la. 
Daniel8:22 Man er ku tende, man anyiin a gem a mende sha ityough ki ku la, ka ityartor inyiin ia mough ken ikurior la, kpa ia kera lu a agee na ga." 
Daniel8:23 Sha mkur u tartor ve la, zum u mbaaferev vea iv ikaren ve yô, tor u vihin ishigh sha, u fan ayom una mough." 
Daniel8:24 Tahav nav mbua vese, kpa á lu sha tahav nav iyol na ga; una tim kwagh kera je á cier iyol, ikôr ia lagh un; una tim mbaageev kera, kua uicighanmbaiorov kpaa." 
Daniel8:25 Sha atseregh a na la una na ayom aa za hemen sha ikev na; una kende iyol na sha ken ishima na, man una bur a bur ior kpishi una tim ve kera, shi una hendan a Tor u utor kpaa; kpa á sombo un, á kera lu sha ave a or ga." 
Daniel8:26 Mpase u sha mnenge u mbaaikighe man upepe u i er kwagh na la, ka mimi je; kpa we yô, cir mpase u sha mnenge ne, gadia ngu sha kwagh u ayange a ken hemen ca." 
Daniel8:27 Tsô, mo Daniel m hume, m lu uange ayange kar; nahan m mough sha, m gba eren tor tom; kpiligh mo iyol, sha mpase u sha mnenge la, kpa ma or kav un ga." 
Daniel9:1 Sha inyom i hiihii i Dariu wan u Ahasueru, u ken tsombor u Mbamedia, u i ver un tor sha tartor u Mbakaldi," 
Daniel9:2 sha inyom i hiihii i mtemtor na la, mo Daniel m nenge ken ruamabera, iyenge i anyom i TER ôr profeti Yeremia, sha u kuren kwagh u mvihi u Yerusalem la, lu anyom akunduatargber je." 
Daniel9:3 Nahan m gema ishigh hen Ter Aôndo, sha u eren msen man uzamber a kwaghyan u hôron man a ikondo i tan uya man a mtwem." 
Daniel9:4 Tsô m sôn TER, Aôndo wam, m rumun ibo kpaa, m kaa mer: Tere, Aôndo u hemban, u cier iyol, u U we ikuryan man mhôônom ma zungwen iko a mba U doo ve ishima man mba ve eren sha atindiakaa a Ou kpaa yô;" 
Daniel9:5 se er isholibo, se er kwagh u dang, se er ifer, se hendan kpaa, se kaha se undu atindi a Ou man ajiraôron a Ou kpaa;" 
Daniel9:6 se ver ato sha mbatomov Ou uprofeti kpaa ga, mba ve lu ôron kwagh ken iti You a utor asev man mbatarev asev man uter asev kua ior i tar la cii." 
Daniel9:7 Ka We U lu a perapera ye, Tere; kpa se yô, gema ka ahenge a van, er i lu nyian nahan; hen ior i Yuda man hen mba ve tem ken Yerusalem man hen Iserael cii, mba ve lu ikua man mba ve lu ca, ken ityar i U sambe ve la cii, sha ci u mimi ga ve u ve er a We sha mimi ga la." 
Daniel9:8 Ka hen vese, TERE, ahenge a van a lu ye, hen utor asev man hen atiator a ase man hen uter asev, sha ci u se er U isholibo yô." 
Daniel9:9 Ka hen TER, Aôndo wase, mhôônom ma zungwen man mde u asorabo ve lu ye; gadia se hendan a Na;" 
Daniel9:10 se wa imo i TER, Aôndo wase, iko sha u zenden sha atindi a Na, a A ver se sha ishi sha ikev i mbatomov Nav uprofeti la ga." 
Daniel9:11 Iserael cii per atindi a Ou, ve kaha, ve kera wa imo You iko ga; ka nahan man i we se ifan, man mbum u i nger ken atindiakaa a Mose, ortom u Aôndo la, a ker se kpaa ye; gadia se er Un isholibo." 
Daniel9:12 A er sha akaaôron a Na vough a A ôr sha a vese man sha mbaajiriv asev mba ve er se ijir la, sha u van a zegekwaghbo sha a vese; gadia sha won cii, mba a er imbakwagh i i er a Yerusalem ne nahan ga." 
Daniel9:13 Er i nger ken atindiakaa a Mose nahan la, kape kwagh u bo ne cii a tser se ne; nahan kpaa se kera zamber TER, Aôndo wase, ser A̱ zungwe se ga, se de aferakaa a ase ga man se wa mimi Wou iko kpaa ga." 
Daniel9:14 Ka nahan man TER A lu per sha u van a kwagh u bo ne sha a vese ye; gadia TER, Aôndo wase, ka u perapera ken aeren a Na cii a A eren yô, kpa se wa imo Na iko ga." 
Daniel9:15 Hegen yô, Tere, Aôndo wase, u U dugh a ior Ou ken tar u Igipiti sha uwegh ku ageegh, U na iti You i za gwa er i lu nyian nahan, se er isholibo, se er kwagh u ifer." 
Daniel9:16 Yô, Tere, sha aeren a Ou a perapera cii, shi goom a ishima i vihin You man iyugh You sha gar Wou Yerusalem kera, ka icighanwo Wou je la; gadia sha ci u asorabo ase, man aferakaa a uter asev, Yerusalem man ior Ou gema hingir kwagh u lahan hen mba ve kase se cii." 
Daniel9:17 Hegen yô, Aôndo wase, ungwa msen u wanakiriki Wou, man uzamber nav, na ishigh You ki̱ wanger sha icighanjiir Wou u a hingir ice la, sha ci u iti i Ter." 
Daniel9:18 Aôndo wam, kegh ato, ungwa, bugh ashe a Ou, nenge mbamyôhôl asev, man gar u i yer sha iti You la; gadia se mba van a uzamber asev sha ishigh You, ka sha uperapera mba sha ayol a ase ga, kpa ka sha ci u mhôônom Ou ma zungwen ma vesen la." 
Daniel9:19 Tere, ungwa! Tere, de se asorabo! Tere, ver ato! Er sha mi; de ngôôr ga, sha ci Wou, We, Aôndo wam; gadia mba yilan gar Wou man ior Ou sha iti You." 
Daniel9:20 Er m lu ôron kwagh ave, eren msen man pasen isholibo yam man isholibo i ior av Iserael, man m lu van a zamber wam sha ishigh ki TER, Aôndo wam, sha ci u icighanwo u Aôndo wam;" 
Daniel9:21 er m lu ôron kwagh ken msen ave la je, Gaberiel, or u m vande nengen a na ken mpase hiihii la, purugh fefa va her a mo sha shighe u nagh ku nan ku aikighe nahan." 
Daniel9:22 A na m kav, man a ôr kwagh a mo, a kaa er: We, Daniel, m va hegen sha u nan we kwaghfan man mkav." 
Daniel9:23 Sha mhii u uzamber ou yô, imo due, man m va sha u kaan we i; gadia u doo ior ishima kpishi; yô, ver ishima sha kwagh ne, man kav mpase ne." 
Daniel9:24 I ver ulahadi akunduatargber sha ior Ou man icighangar wou, sha u been tindi u peren, man sha u been asorabo, sha u nan iwom sha ci u iferkwagh, man sha u nyôron a perapera u tsôron, man shi sha u veren ikav sha mpase u sha mnenge man kwaghôron u profeti, man sha u shighen icighanjiir u hemban la mkurem." 
Daniel9:25 Nahan yô, fa man kav kpaa, hii sha mdugh u tindi sha u sôron man u maan Yerusalem zan zan ar hen u i shigh Un mkurem, ka Tor je la, á lu ulahadi utaankaruhar; man ulahadi akunduatar kar uhar, á maa un a ityembe man ukpekpe, kpa a lu sha shighe u ican je." 
Daniel9:26 Ken masejime u ulahadi akunduatar kar uhar la, á gber u i shigh Un mkurem la kera, Una lu a ma ibo ga; ior mba tor u una va la, vea hembe gar man icighanjiir la; mkur na una lu sha avenge a saren, man zan zan mkur kpaa ityav mbia lu; mbamtim vea lu kpee je." 
Daniel9:27 Una ya ikur i taveraa a ior kpishi lahadi môm man ker atô u lahadi la una er nagh ku sha samuyia kua bunde; sha kpelegh ku akaahôngorough or u nan mtim la, una va zan zan mkur u i ver la kuma, á haa iyugh sha or u nan mtim la." 
Daniel10:1 Sha inyom i sha utar i Shirushi tor u Pershia la, i pase Daniel, u i yilan un er Belete-shasar la kwagh; kwagh la lu kwagh u mimi je, lu kwagh u ican i vesen; a kav kwagh la, mpase u sha mnenge la wanger un." 
Daniel10:2 Sha ayange la, mo Daniel m lu zungwen kuma ulahadi utar je." 
Daniel10:3 M ya kwaghyan u dedoo ga, inyam shin wain kpaa nyôr ken zwa wam ga, m shighe mkurem iyol je ga, zan zan ulahadi mba jimin utar." 
Daniel10:4 Uwer u hiihii ayange a u ikundu kar anyiin la, m lu hen kpe u zegeifi, ka Tigeri je la;" 
Daniel10:5 yô, m kende ashe sha, m kenger; yô, nenge, or cir ikondo i pupuu i kôngor iyol, zer kwange u zenaria u Ufashi shin iwenge;" 
Daniel10:6 iyol na lu er iwen i beril nahan, ishigh nagh lu er inyiar yô, man ashe a na lu er akagh a usu nahan, akaseaveegh a na man angahar a na lu er togula u engem nahan, man imo i akaaôron a na lu er ka imo i ikpelaior yô." 
Daniel10:7 Ka mo Daniel tseegh m nenge mpase u sha mnenge ne ye; ior mba ve lu a mo imôngo ve nenge a mpase ne ga; kpa zegemcie ta ve iyol, nahan ve yevese ve za yer." 
Daniel10:8 Nahan m mase shin tswen, tsô m nenge zegempase ne, ma agee kera lu ken a mo ga; gadia mluashe wam u dedoo gema hingir dang, m kera shi a ma agee ga." 
Daniel10:9 Nahan kpaa m ungwa imo i akaaôron a na; zum u m ungwa imo i akaaôron a na yô, m gba mnyam mem mem, m cir ishigh inya." 
Daniel10:10 Man nenge, uwegh bende a mo, ku erem, m gure a ikarikase sha anu man ave am." 
Daniel10:11 A gema a kaa a mo er: We, Daniel, or u doon ishima tsung ne, ver ishima sha kwaghôron u me ôr u ne, mough tile sha jighilii, gadia ka her a we i tindim hegen ye. Zum u a lu ôron mo kwagh ne yô, m tile sha, a ikarikase iyol." 
Daniel10:12 Tsô a kaa a mo er: De kera cie ga, Daniel; gadia hii sha iyange i u hii veren ishima sha u kaven man u hiden a iyol you ijime sha ishigh ki Aôndo wou la je, i ungwa kwaghôron wou, man m va ka sha kwaghôron wou la." 
Daniel10:13 Kpa ortaregh u tartor u Pershia la hendan a mo ayange ikundu kar môm; nenge, Mikael, u môm ken mbatarev mba vesen va wasem; nahan m shi her a utor mba Pershia." 
Daniel10:14 Hegen yô, m va sha u me na u ú kav kwagh u una va er ior ou sha ayange a masetyô yô, gadia mpase ne ngu sha kwagh u ayange a ken hemen ca." 
Daniel10:15 Er a ôrom akaaôron ne nahan, m kuma ishigh inya, m kondo iker." 
Daniel10:16 Yô, nenge, ugen u a bee or va bende ityumbuzwaagh yam; nahan m bugh zwa m ôr kwagh, m kaa a u a tile sha ishigh yagh la, mer: Terem, mpase u sha mnenge ne nam mnyoonom kôrom, m kera shi a ma agee ga." 
Daniel10:17 Gadia á hii nan man wanakiriki u terem ne una ôr kwagh a we terem? Gadia, mo yô, ma agee kera nga ken a mo ga, iôôn kpaa kera shi ken a mo ga." 
Daniel10:18 Nahan u a bee or la shi bende a mo; a nam agee. 
Daniel10:19 A kaa er: De cie ga, we or u doon ishima tsung ne, lu bem bem, taver, een, taver. Er a lu ôron kwagh a mo nahan, maa m taver, nahan m kaa mer: Terem, gba ôron kwagh tsô, gadia u nam agee." 
Daniel10:20 Nahan a kaa er: U fa kwagh u m ve hen a we ne kpa? Hegen yô, hiden yam sha u za nôngon ityav a ortaregh u Pershia; zum u me due yô, nenge, ortaregh u Grika una va." 
Daniel10:21 Nahan kpaa me ôr u kwagh u i nger ken Ruamabera u mimi la, ma or u tavershima u wasen mo u nôngon a ve nan ngu ga, saa Mikael ortaregh wen." 
Daniel11:1 Mo yô, sha inyom i hiihii i Dariu Ormedia la, m tile sha u wasen un man u taver un kpaa." 
Daniel11:2 Hegen yô, me pase u kwagh u mimi. Nenge, utor utar shi vea mough ken Pershia; u sha unyiin la una hemba ve inyaregh ci ca cii; zum u una taver sha ci u inyaregh nagh yô, una tor ior ityô cii, sha u hendan a tartor u Grika." 
Daniel11:3 Tsô tor u ageegh una mough u una tema tor sha tahav mbu vesen, una eren kwagh sha ishima na." 
Daniel11:4 Zum u una mough yô, tartor na ua gba, á pav u sha avegher a ahumbe a anyiin a Sha la, ua kera lu u tsombor na ga, tahav nav mbu a tem tor sha mi la kpaa mbua kera lu ga; gadia á wuhe tartor na kera, ua hingir u mbagenev, á kera lu mban ga." 
Daniel11:5 Tor u sha imbusutariyan una taver, kpa u môm ken atiator a na una hemba taver a na, una tema tor; tartor na ua lu tartor u vesen." 
Daniel11:6 Er anyom á kar yô, vea zua ayol a ve, wan u tor u ken imbusutariyan u kwase, una va hen tor u ken imbusutarimese sha u va himen iyongo, kpa una kera lu a agee a ikasewe na gbem ga; un tor la kpaa una tile ga, shin ikasewe na kpaa ga; un wan u tor la kpaa á due un kera kua mba ve ve a na la, man ter u a mar un la kua un u a er un sha ayange la kpaa." 
Daniel11:7 Kpa ken gbaa u shin amise na, ugen una mough hen ijiir na, u una va ta num sha ikumutya, una nyôr ken ayouautya a taver a tor u sha imbusutarimese la, una er a ve sha ishima na, una hemba ve kpaa;" 
Daniel11:8 mbaaôndo vev man ieev vev mbi keren a ker, a ikav vev mbi dedoo, mbi sha azurfa man sha zenaria, una kura kera, una yem a mi ken Igipiti; una mem u nôngon ityav a tor u sha imbusutarimese anyom á kar." 
Daniel11:9 Ngula kpaa una va ken tartor u tor u shin imbusutariyan, kpa una hide hen tar na." 
Daniel11:10 Ônov nav vea nôngo ityav, vea kohol akumautya a vesen kpishi, una va, una nyôr una kuwa emememe, una kar man una shi á hide una va nôngo ityav zan zan una za ar hen ayouautya a na a taver." 
Daniel11:11 Tsô tor u shin imbusutariyan una mough a ishima i vihin, una due, una nôngo ityav a na, ka tor u sha imbusutarimese la; ngun una due a ikumutya i vesen, kpa á na ikumutya la sha ikev i ngula." 
Daniel11:12 Zum u una kura ikpelaior la kera yô, ishima na ia kende sha; una haa ior inya udubu, udubu pue, kpa una taver zan zan ga." 
Daniel11:13 Tor u ken imbusutarimese una hide, una va a ikpelaior igen, ia hemba i hiihii la; anyom aa kar yô, una va a ikumutya i vesen man ikav kpishi kpaa." 
Daniel11:14 Sha ayange la ior kpishi vea hendan a tor u imbusutariyan la; shi ior mba vihin kwagh mba ken ior ou kpaa vea mough sha, sha u kuren mpase u sha mnenge la; kpa vea gba." 
Daniel11:15 Nahan tor u sha imbusutarimese una va, una ta tihinya, una ngohol garutya u taver; akumautya a ken imbusutariyan aa fatyô u tilen sha ga, shin uicuwanmbautyav nav kpaa ga, gadia ma agee a tilen sha aa lu ga." 
Daniel11:16 Kpa wen u una va ta num sha a na la, una er sha ishima na, ma or môm kpaa nana fatyô u tilen un sha ishi ga; shi una tile ken Tar u Icivirigh la, mtim una lu sha uwegh nagh kpaa." 
Daniel11:17 Una ver ishigh sha u van a tahav mbu tartor na cii, una hime iyongo a na; una na un wankwase sha u vihin tartor la kera; kpa mhen la una za sha mi ga, una lu un a iwasen kpaa ga." 
Daniel11:18 Ken masetyô la, una gema á ver ishigh nagh ken ityar i shin kpezegemnger, una ngohol i kpishi; kpa kurutya ugen una yange un ilyahan na la kera; een, zan zan una na ilyahan na la, ia hide sha ityough nagh." 
Daniel11:19 Hen shighe la una gema ishigh á ver ken ayouautya a taver a ken tar na; kpa una nôngo gbev, una gba, á kera zua a na ga." 
Daniel11:20 Tsô ugen una mough sha ityough nagh, una na or u ngohol kpandegh sha apera sha u a̱ nyôr ken ijiir i hemban doon i tartor la; kpa ayange á va kar kpeghee tsô una saa ishe, á lu sha iyugh ga, shin sha utya kpaa ga." 
Daniel11:21 Orgen shi nana mough sha ityough nagh nana lu dangor u i ne nan icivir i tor ga; kpa nana va abur abur, nana va ngohol tartor sha zwanyohon." 
Daniel11:22 Ikumutya i vesen i hendan a nan ia kar sha ishigh ki nan kera, ia saa; een, zan zan ortaregh u ikuryan je kpaa." 
Daniel11:23 Shighe u ka a ya ikur a na kpaa, a gema a eren sha ayom; gadia una mough sha, una taver sha ior kpuaa." 
Daniel11:24 Una va abur abur hen ajiir a doon sule a ken tar la; una er akaa a uter nav je kpaa lu vande eren ga yô, shin uter mba uter nav je kpaa lu er ga yô; una kar ve ishar man akaa a i kor ken utya yô, man ikav; een, una hen mbamhen mba vihin sha ayouautya a taver, zan zan shighe á kar côhin." 
Daniel11:25 Una kpoghol agee a na kua ishima na sha u za tan num sha tor u ken imbusutariyan a ikumutya i vesen; man tor u ken imbusutariyan la kpaa una nôngo ityav a na a ikumutya i vesen i taver agee; kpa una tile sha ga, gadia vea hen mbamhen mba vihin sha a na." 
Daniel11:26 Ka mba ve ye kwaghyan na la, vea vihi un agee ye, man ikumutya na kpaa ia sambe, á wua ior kpishi á haa inya." 
Daniel11:27 Utor mba uhar mban yô, vea ver asema a ve sha u eren kwaghbo, vea ôr kwagh sha aie hen tebul môm; kpa á za sha mi ga; gadia mkur una lu sha shighe u i ver la." 
Daniel11:28 Nahan una hide hen tar na a akaa kpishi; ishima na ia mough num a icighanikuryan, una er akaa sha ishima na, man una hide hen tar na ye." 
Daniel11:29 Sha shighe u i ver la una hide, una va ken imbusutariyan; kpa shighe u hegen ne, á kera lu er shighe u hiihii la nahan ga." 
Daniel11:30 Gadia utso mba Mbakitim vea va ta num sha a na; nahan una cia, una hide, una mough num a icighanikuryan, una er akaa sha ishima na; je yô, una hide una ver ishima sha mba ve undu icighanikuryan la." 
Daniel11:31 Akumautya aa mough her a na, vea hôngor a icighanjiir, garutya u taver la, vea yange nagh ku nanden ku gbem la kera, man vea gema á ver kwaghndôhôrshima u nan mtim." 
Daniel11:32 Mba ve eren ifer sha u hendan a ikuryan yô, una vihi ve sha zwanyohon; kpa ior mba ve fe Aôndo ve yô, vea lu dông, vea er kwagh." 
Daniel11:33 Ve mba ve lu a kwaghfan ken ior yô, vea na ior kpishi vea kav kwagh; nahan kpaa vea gba sha sanker man sha nomborusu man ken kwar man ken ishar, ayange á ngee." 
Daniel11:34 Zum u vea gba la, á wase ve sha aniwasen kpeghee; kpa ior kpishi vea zua a ve sha zwanyohon." 
Daniel11:35 Ken mbafankwagh mbala kpaa, mbagenev vea gba, sha u i̱ sôr ve man i̱ wanger ve man i̱ gema ve ve̱ kungu segh segh, zan zan sha shighe u mkur; gadia una kuma sha shighe u i ver la." 
Daniel11:36 Tor la una eren kwagh sha ishima na; una kende a iyol na sha, una moron iyol er un hemba hanma aôndo, una ôr akaavihin a cier iyol sha Aôndo u mbaaôndo cii; á kpe un iyol zan zan iyugh ia kar kuman; gadia kwagh u i ver yô, una kure sha mi vough." 
Daniel11:37 Una wa iko sha mbaaôndo mba uter nav ga, shin sha u a doo kasev ishima la kpaa ga, man una kera wa ma aôndo ugen iko ga, gadia una mor iyol á hemba cii." 
Daniel11:38 Sha ityouv vev yô, una civir aôndo u ayouautya a taver; aôndo u uter nav ve fe un ga la, una civir un sha zenaria man azurfa man awen a injaa man akaa a haan ishar iyol." 
Daniel11:39 Una ta num sha ayouautya a hemban taver la sha iwasen i aôndo ugen; mba ve rumun un yô, á civir ve kpishi; una ver ve vea ya tor sha ior kpishi, una kar ve tar sha inyar." 
Daniel11:40 Sha shighe u mkur yô, tor u ken imbusutariyan una va nôngo num a na; man tor u ken imbusutarimese kpaa una mough num a na er hiar nahan, a akekeautya man mbaanyinyav man utso kpishi; una nyôr ken ityar, una kar sha mi cii." 
Daniel11:41 Una nyôr ken Tar u Icivirigh la kpaa, man ior kpishi vea gba, kpa mba vea war sha ikev na yô, ka: Edom man Moabi man veghertar u hemban doon u Mbaamon." 
Daniel11:42 Shi una naregh uwegh nagh sha ityar; tar u Igipiti kpaa ua war ga. 
Daniel11:43 Una lu a tahav sha ayou a zenaria man a azurfa man sha akaa a injaa a ken Igipiti cii; Mbalibia man Mbaetiopia vea lu a na ityô. 
Daniel11:44 Kpa igwa i sha ityoughkitaregh man i ken imbusutarimese ia ta un mciem iyol, nahan una due a ishima i nyoon tsung sha u timin ior kpishi man shi u saren ve kera." 
Daniel11:45 Una mande utenti mba iyou i tor hen harga u zegemnger a icighanwo u Icivirigh; nahan kpaa una tim her, ma or nana wase un kpaa ga." 
Daniel12:1 Hen shighe la Mikael, ortaregh u a nengen sha ônov mba nongo wou la, una mough á tile sha; ican ia er sha shighe la, imba i i lu a er mayange ga yô, hii sha shighe u ikurior i lu sha won, zan zan ar hen shighe ne; hen shighe la, á yima ior ou, hanma or u i nger nan ken ruamabera yô." 
Daniel12:2 Ior kpishi ken mba ve lu yaven shin vuulevu u taregh vea nder, mbagenev sha u zan ken uma u tsôron, man mbagenev di sha u zan ken kunya man iheen i been mayange ga." 
Daniel12:3 Mba ve lu a kwaghfan yô, vea engem er iengem i sha kwavaôndo nahan, mba ve gem ior kpishi vea hingir mbaperapera, vea engem er asan nahan zan zan gbem sha won." 
Daniel12:4 Kpa we Daniel cir akaaôron man ver ikav sha ruamabera ne zan zan sha shighe u mkur; ior kpishi vea zende wue wue man mfe kpaa una seer. 
Daniel12:5 Nahan mo Daniel m kenger, yô, nenge, mbagenev uhar tile, u môm hen kpeifi yande ne man ugen di ken kpeifi yande la." 
Daniel12:6 Ugen kaa a or u haan ikondo i pupuu i kôngor u a lu sha sha mngerem ma ifim la, er: Shighe á kar nan je man mkur u akaakpilighyol ne una kuma?" 
Daniel12:7 Tsô m ungwa or u haan ikondo i pupuu i kôngor u a lu sha sha mngerem ma ifim la, zum u a kende uwegh nagh ku yanegh man uwegh nagh ku imesegh sha yô, a bum Un u A lu uma gbem la, er: á lu shighe man ashighe man veghershighe; zum u vea vihi agee a icighanikurior kera ci ca yô, akaa ne cii aa kure sha min." 
Daniel12:8 Tsô m ungwa, kpa m kav ga; nahan m kaa mer: Terem, mkur u akaa ne una lu nana?" 
Daniel12:9 A kaa er: Yem tsô Daniel, gadia i cir akaaôron la; i ver a ikav zan zan ar sha shighe u mkur la." 
Daniel12:10 Mbagenev kpishi vea wanger ayol a ve, vea tsegha ayol a ve, vea lu wang; kpa mbaaferev yô, vea er aferakaa; mô môm ken mbaaferev nana kav ga; kpa mba ve lu a kwaghfan yô, vea kav." 
Daniel12:11 Hii sha shighe u i kar a nagh ku nanden ku gbem la kera, man i ver kwaghndôhôrshima u nan mtim la yô, ayange aa kar dubu man deri uhar man akunduanyiingber." 
Daniel12:12 Á saan or u nan kegh nan ar sha ayange dubu man deri utar man ikundugber kar utaan la iyol. 
Daniel12:13 Kpa we, yem tsô, zan zan mkur; gadia ú mem, man ú mough ú tile sha kwar wou, sha mkur u ayangegh." 
Hosea1:1 Kwaghôron u TER u a va hen Hosea wan u Beeri, sha ayange a Ushia man Yotam man Ahashi man Hesekia, utor mba Yuda, man sha ayange a Yerobiam wan u Yoashi tor u Iserael." 
Hosea1:2 Zum u TER hii u ôron kwagh a Hosea yô, TER kaa a Hosea er: Za za er idyakwase man lu a ônov mba idyakwase kpaa, gadia tar ne ngu eren idya tsung undun TER." 
Hosea1:3 Nahan a yem a za er Gomer wan u Dibelaim u kwase; a wa iyav, a mar wannomso." 
Hosea1:4 Tsô TER kaa a na er: Ii un iti wer, Yesereel, gadia shi anshighe kpeghee tsô, Me or ya u Yehu iyev sha awambe a Yesereel la, Me er tartor u ya u Iserael ua kure." 
Hosea1:5 Tsô sha iyange la Me kever ada u Iserael shin pev u Yesereel. 
Hosea1:6 Shi a wa iyav, a mar wan u kwase. Nahan TER kaa a na er: Ii un iti wer, Lo-ruhama (i zungwe un mhôônom ga), gadia Me kera seer u zungwen ya u Iserael mhôônom sha u den ve ibo ve ga." 
Hosea1:7 Kpa Me zungwe ya u Yuda mhôônom, Me yima ve sha er M lu TER, Aôndo ve yô; Me yima ve sha ada shin sha sanker shin sha ikav mbi utyav shin sha anyinya shin sha mbaanyinyav kpaa ga." 
Hosea1:8 Er Lo-ruhama de atumba yô, a wa iyav a mar wan u nomso." 
Hosea1:9 Nahan TER kaa er: Ii un iti wer Lo-ami (Ioravga); gadia ne mba ior Av ga, Mo kpaa Me lu Aôndo wen ga." 
Hosea1:10 Nahan kpaa iyenge i ônov mba Iserael ia lu er waarawa u shin zegemnger, u i fetyô u karen u ga, shin u ôron u kpaa ga yô, tsô hen ijiir i i lu kaan a ve er: Ne mba nongoior Wam ga la, á gema á yila ve er: Ne mba ônov mba Aôndo u uma." 
Hosea1:11 Tsô ônov mba Yuda man ônov mba Iserael vea kohol imôngo, man vea ver or môm nana lu ityough sha a ve, vea due ken tar la; gadia iyange i Yesereel ia lu iyange i vesen je." 
Hosea2:1 Kaa nen a anngôôv enev mba nomso ner: Ami (Iorav); man a anngôôv enev mba kasev ner: Ruhama (i zungwe ve mhôônom). 
Hosea2:2 Hendan nen a ngô wen, hendan nen; gadia ka kwase Wam ga, Mo kpaa M ngu nom na ga; a̱ kar a idya na sha ishigh nagh kera, man a ijimba na kpaa her atô u atumba na kera;" 
Hosea2:3 gayô, Me kura un akondo una hingir idyelegh una tile er sha iyange i i mar un la nahan; man Me er un una hingir er desereti nahan, Me gema un una hingir er tar u ombor yô, Me wua un sha imura." 
Hosea2:4 Ônov nav kpaa Me zungwe ve mhôônom ga, gadia ve mba ônov mba i mar ve sha idya yô." 
Hosea2:5 Gadia ngô ve er ijimba; wen u a we iyav vev la kpaa, a er kwagh u kunya; gadia a kaa er: Me za hen mba m doo ve ishima, mba ve nem kwaghyan wam man mngerem man ul man mou man mkurem man kwaghman kpaa." 
Hosea2:6 Nahan yô, nenge, Me yua gbenda wou sha usaa, Me maa kpekpe u yangen un sha u a̱ de kera zough a igbenda na ga yô." 
Hosea2:7 Tsô una tôv mba ve doo un ishima la, kpa una kohol ve ga; una ker ve, kpa una zua a ve ga; nahan una kaa er: Guda me hide hen nomom u hiihii la, gadia mlu wam hen shighe la lu guda a u hegen ne." 
Hosea2:8 Gadia a kera fa er i lu Mo M ne un samuyia man wain man mkurem, man M seer un azurfa man zenaria mba ve gem ve ne Baal la ga." 
Hosea2:9 Nahan Me hire Me ngohol samuyia Wam kera sha shighe u u, man wain Wam kpaa sha shighe na, man Me ngohol ul Wam kera kua mou Wam kpaa mba a cirin idyelegh na a mi la." 
Hosea2:10 Hegen Me pase idyelegh na ken igbar sha ishigh ki mba ve doo un ishima yô, or u yiman un sha ikev Yam kpaa, nana lu ga." 
Hosea2:11 Me er msaanyol na kpaa una bee man uiniongo nav man iwer i he na man ayange a memen a na kua uiniongo nav mba i ver sha ashighe ashighe la cii. 
Hosea2:12 Me vihi ikon i wain na man ikon i tur na, i a kaa er: Ka injar yam i mba m doo ve ishima ve nem la; Me gema i ia hingir ikô, inyamtoho ia ya i." 
Hosea2:13 Me tsaha un sha ci u ayange a iniongo a Ubaal a un lu nanden ve nagh ku human doon la, man lu eren hwe sha inyarev mbi ken ato man sha asa a engem, dondon sha mbadoon un ishima la, Mo yô, M gema M hungul un, kape TER a kaa ne." 
Hosea2:14 Nahan yô, nenge, Me mee un, Me va a na ken desereti, Me ôr kwagh u pever un ishima." 
Hosea2:15 Keela Me na un ishule na i ikon i wain man Me gema pev u Akor una hingir un hunda u ishimaverenkeghen; una na mrumun keela er sha ayange a iyev nav man er sha iyange i a due ken tar u Igipiti la nahan. 
Hosea2:16 Tsô sha iyange la, kape TER A kaa ne, ú yilam wer: Nomom; ú kera yilam wer: Baal wam, ga." 
Hosea2:17 Gadia Me dugh ati a Ubaal ken zwa na kera, mayange á kera ter ati a ve ga." 
Hosea2:18 Sha iyange la Me ya ikur sha ci ve a inyamtoho man inyon i sha man akaa a kpelan iyav inya; man Me kever ada man sanker, Me bee ityav sha tar, man Me na vea tema bem bem." 
Hosea2:19 Me kange zwa a we u bunden mayange ga; een, Me kange zwa a we sha perapera, man sha ijirôron i mimi man sha erdoo man sha mhôônom ma zungwen." 
Hosea2:20 Me kange zwa a we sha mimi, nahan ú fa TER." 
Hosea2:21 Tsô sha iyange la Me rumun, kape TER A kaa ne, Me rumun Usha, ve kpaa vea rumun tar," 
Hosea2:22 tar ua gema á rumun samuyia man zar u wain man mkurem; ve di vea rumun Yesereel. 
Hosea2:23 Me lôô un shin tar sha ci Wam; Me zungwe Lo-ruhama (i zungwe un mhôônom ga) Me kaa a Lo-ami (Ioravga) Mer: Ne mba ior Av. Un di una kaa er: U ngu Aôndo wam. 
Hosea3:1 TER kaa a mo er: Shi za, za sôôr kwase u a doo huror na ishima, kpa a gema a hingir idyakwase, vough er TER A soo Mbaiserael shin er ve gem ve dondo mbaaôndo mbagenev nahan kpaa, shi ve soo azen a atam a ikon i wain a ombor." 
Hosea3:2 Nahan m yam un sha agbenger a azurfa pue kar ataan man shair kuma homer môm man tiôn. 
Hosea3:3 M kaa a na mer: Hegen ú lu u wam ayange kpishi; ú kera er idya ga, ú kera lu kwase u orgen ga; kape mo kpaa me lu a we ne." 
Hosea3:4 Gadia Mbaiserael vea lu a tor ga ayange kpishi, ortaregh kpaa ga, nagh ku nan kpaa ga, ityôgh ki iwenegh kpaa ga, efodi man terafim kpaa ga;" 
Hosea3:5 ken masetyô la Mbaiserael vea hide man vea ker TER, Aôndo ve, man tor ve Davidi, vea va a mciem iyol hen TER man hen erdoo Na, sha ayange a masetyô la." 
Hosea4:1 Ungwa nen imo i TER ne Mbaiserael; gadia TER ngu a ayôôso a mba ve tem ken tar ne, sha ci u jighjigh a lu ga, dooshima kpaa ga, shin u fan Aôndo ken tar ne kpaa ga yô." 
Hosea4:2 Ka u bumun, man u eren aie, man u wuan, man u iin, man u eren idya; mba hemben uya, je awambe a haan inya dondo sha awambe a haan." 
Hosea4:3 Ka nahan man tar u lu uren man mba ve tem ken u cii ve lu usen ye: inyamtoho kua inyon i purugh sha, een, ishu i shin zegemnger kpaa, á kar a i kera." 
Hosea4:4 Nahan yô, ma or nana̱ de zehe a or ga, shi nana̱ de yangen or kpaa ga; gadia ka we pristi m lu nan we ibo ye." 
Hosea4:5 Wea nôngo gbev atetan, man profeti kpaa una nôngo gbev a we imôngo tugh; Me tim ngôu kpaa." 
Hosea4:6 Ior Av ve saa ishe sha ci u mban u mfe; sha ci u u vende mfe yô, Mo kpaa Me venda u, ú kera lum pristi ga; er tindi u Aôndo wou a hungul we yô, Mo kpaa ônov ou vea hungul Mo." 
Hosea4:7 Er ve seer ngeen yô, kape ve seer di u eren Mo asorabo je la; nahan Me gema icivir ve ia hingir kunya." 
Hosea4:8 Ka sha asorabo a ior Av ve koson ayol a ve ye, man afer a ve la, ka kwagh u doon ve mimi." 
Hosea4:9 Er á er a ior nahan, kape pristi kpaa á er a nan la; Me tsaha un sha ci u igbenda na la man Me na un injar sha aeren a na." 
Hosea4:10 Vea ya kwagh, kpa á kuma ve ga; vea er idya, kpa vea seer iyenge ga, sha ci u ve de u wan TER iko yô." 
Hosea4:11 Idya man wain man zar u wain u he mba kar a kwaghfan kera. 
Hosea4:12 Ior Av mba keren mhen sha ikon ve, gbough vegh ku pasen ve kwagh; gadia jijingi u idya tsume a ve, ve yem ken idya, ve gbihi Aôndo ve." 
Hosea4:13 Mba ne nagh sha ityouv mbi iwoov, mba nanden kwaghhumandoon sha agungu, shin atine a ouki man upopler man uterebin sha ci u mure ve a doo yô; ka sha ci u nahan ônov enev mba kasev ve eren ijimba man kasev mba ônov enev kpaa ve eren idya ye." 
Hosea4:14 Me kera tsaha ônov enev mba kasev sha ijimba ve ga, man kasev mba ônov enev sha idya ve kpaa ga; gadia nomso ayol a ve kpaa mba zan hen udyambakasev ken iuv, man mba ne nagh a udyambakasev mba ken ayou a akombo la imôngo; ior mba ve lu a mkav ga yô, á tim ve kera." 
Hosea4:15 Shin er we Iserael u eren idya, nahan kpaa Yuda a̱ de hingir u lun a ibo ga; de kera ve nen hen Gilgal ga, man shi de kera ze nen sha Bete-aven ga, man de kera bumun kaan wer: Er TER A lu uma ne, kpaa ga." 
Hosea4:16 Gadia Iserael sôghor er ka tulebua u sôghor ityô yô; nahan TER Una shi á koso ve er gumiyôngo nahan hen ijiir i yan toho i i gbangese kpa? 
Hosea4:17 Eferaim var a akombo; de un tsô. 
Hosea4:18 Zum u ka vea ma msôrom kera yô, ve gba eren idya; mbatarev vev kpaa kunya doo ve ishima tsung." 
Hosea4:19 Ahumbe hure ve ken akper a a; vea va ahenge sha ci u iniav vev mbila. 
Hosea5:1 Ungwa nen kwagh ne, ne upristi, man ver ishima we ya u Iserael, kegh ato, we ya u tor! Gadia á ôr ne ijir sha ci u ne hingir kwaghhônon hen Misepa, man kper u wan sha Tabor." 
Hosea5:2 Mbaahendanev time ihungwa i zan; kpa Mo Me yange ve cii. 
Hosea5:3 Mo M fa Eferaim, man Iserael kpaa ngum myer ga; gadia hegen yô, we Eferaim, u er idya, Iserael kpaa hôngor." 
Hosea5:4 Aeren a ve rumun u ve̱ hide hen Aôndo ve ga; gadia jijingi u idya ngu ken a ve, man ve kera fa TER kpaa ga." 
Hosea5:5 Ihagh i Iserael ngi nan un ibo ken igbar je; nahan Iserael man Eferaim vea nôngo gbev ken ifer ve la; Yuda kpaa una nôngo gbev a ve imôngo. 
Hosea5:6 Vea za a akum a iyôngo a ve man a ibua ve sha u keren TER, kpa vea zua a Na ga; A kar hen a ve kera." 
Hosea5:7 Ve er a TER dang; gadia ve mar ônov mba sha idya; hegen yô, uwer u he ua tim ve kera a ityar ve cii." 
Hosea5:8 Tôngo nen korough hen Gibea man ikpamkor kpaa ken Rama; gbire nen ivaa ken Bete-aven; mba van we ken ijime, Benyamin." 
Hosea5:9 Eferaim una hingir ice sha iyange i mtsaha la; ken ikwe i Iserael M pase kwagh u una va er kpee yô. 
Hosea5:10 Mbatarev mba Yuda mba er mba ve kper a ikav i ipaventar yô; Me haa iyugh Yam sha a ve er mngerem nahan. 
Hosea5:11 I kighir Eferaim a ican, i cagh un sha ijirôron; gadia doo un u dondon akaagbilinigh." 
Hosea5:12 Nahan M hingir Eferaim er ka ivina nahan, man ya u Yuda er mhee u akuhe a hôôn nahan." 
Hosea5:13 Zum u Eferaim nenge angev nav man Yuda nenge ivav na yô, nahan Eferaim yem Ashiria, a tindi hen tor Yarebi, kpa a fatyô u wanger ne, shin u been ne ivav kpaa ga." 
Hosea5:14 Gadia Me hingir Eferaim er begha nahan man ya u Yuda kpaa er gumbegha nahan; Mo, een, Mo je, Me tuse, Me kar kera; Me yem a mi, ma oryiman nana lu ga." 
Hosea5:15 Me shi Me hide hen ijiir Yam, zan zan vea rumun ibo ve, vea ker ishigh Yagh; ken ican ve la vea kerem sha gbashima." 
Hosea6:1 Va sé hide nen hen TER; gadia ka Un A ande ye, shi Una wanger se; ka Un A gber avav ye, shi Una kange se a." 
Hosea6:2 Er ayange á kar kera ahar yô, Una na se uma; sha iyange i atar la Una mough a vese sha, nahan sé lu uma sha ishigh Nagh." 
Hosea6:3 Yô, sé fa nen, sé nôngo nen tsung u fan TER; mdugh Na ka u kpee je, er m-av u use nahan: Una va hen vese er ura nahan, er ka ura u masetyô u haan mngerem inya yô." 
Hosea6:4 Me er nana a we, we Eferaim? Me er nana a we, we Yuda? Gadia dooshima wen ngu er ka ibeenegh ki pepegh yô, man er avure a ka a ndoor kera fese yô." 
Hosea6:5 Ka sha ci u nahan, M gber ve sha uprofeti ye; M wua ve sha mkaanem ma ken zwa Wam; ajiraôron a i ôr u yô, due fele er ka iwanger yô." 
Hosea6:6 Gadia ka dooshima a sarem ye, ka nagh ga; man mfe u fan Aôndo kpaa hembam doon a iniav mbi nanden." 
Hosea6:7 Kpa ve vihi ikuryan er Adam nahan; ka heera ve er a Mo dang ye. 
Hosea6:8 Gileadi ka gar u mbaerenafer, a côvor sha awambe." 
Hosea6:9 Man er ikum i mbanumungbenda ka ve yer ve kegh nahan, kape nongo u upristi kpaa ve woo ior sha gbenda u zan Shekem la; een, ve er kwagh u kunya." 
Hosea6:10 M nenge a kwagh u ndôhôrshima ken ya u Iserael; Eferaim er idya ker, Iserael hôngor." 
Hosea6:11 We Yuda kpaa, i ver u iyange i sundan. Zum u Me due a ior Av ken kwar yô." 
Hosea7:1 Zum u M ver ishima u wanger Iserael yô, nahan ifer i Eferaim gema due ken igbar kua aeren a bo a Samaria kpaa, gadia ve eren kwagh sha aie; ormbaiv ngu nyôron, man ikum i mbanumungbenda ngi numun ken won." 
Hosea7:2 Kpa ve kera fa ken asema a ve er Mo M lu umbur aeren a ve a bo la ga; hegen yô, aeren a ve kase ve wa ve atô, nga sha ishigh Yagh." 
Hosea7:3 Ve na tor iember sha aeren a ve a bo, kua mbatarev kpaa sha mbaaie vev." 
Hosea7:4 Ve cii ka udyambaiorov; mba er atse a kaan kwagh ker a a tseen her yô, shin er orkaankwagh nan de u kenden usu, zum u a hii u hôron mwem zan zan kwa ua kar zuan sha mi cii yô." 
Hosea7:5 Sha iyange i tor wase la mbatarev na ayol a ve angev sha m-oso u wain; a naregh uwegh nagh a mbanahantar imôngo. 
Hosea7:6 Gadia ve gema asema a ve hingir er atse a kaan kwagh sha mi nahan, sha ayom a ve la; shin er orkaan ve yav tugh cii kpaa, sev mbu aven yô, a yegh her er nomborusu nahan." 
Hosea7:7 Ve cii, ve tsee er atse nahan, mba hian mbaajiriv vev kera, utor vev cii gba; mô ve môm ngu yilan Mo ga." 
Hosea7:8 Eferaim nungwa a akuraior; Eferaim ka gbace u kaan u i gem un ga yô. 
Hosea7:9 Atôatyev vihi agee na kera, kpa a fa ga; een, ivu ta un agar sha ityou, kpa a fa ga." 
Hosea7:10 Ihagh i Iserael ngi nan un ibo ken igbar je, nahan kpaa ve hide hen TER Aôndo ve ga, ve kera ker Un kpaa ga." 
Hosea7:11 Eferaim ngu er ibume atii u kaven kwagh ga yô; ka ve yila Igipiti, ve za hen Ashiria." 
Hosea7:12 Zum u vea yemen yô, Me hôn ve sha kper; Me sen a ve shin inya er ka inyon i sha, nahan; Me tsaha ve er i vande yôôn ken mkohol ve nahan." 
Hosea7:13 Kwagh á tser ve! Ve yevese ve undum! I̱ tim ve kera, gadia ve hendan a Mo; ma M paa ve, nahan kpaa ve wam aie iyol." 
Hosea7:14 Ve yilam sha ishima i môm ga, kpa mba ngoron sha ugambe vev; ve tôndo avav iyol ayol a ve sha ci u samuyia man wain u he; mba hendan a Mo." 
Hosea7:15 Shin er M tese ve man shi M taver ve akaseaveegh nahan kpaa, mba henen akaabo sha a Mo." 
Hosea7:16 Ve gema, kpa ve ver ishigh Sha ga; mba er ada u bo nahan; á wua mbatarev vev sha sanker sha ci u kwaghôron ve u dang sha zwa ve. Kwagh ne una hingir u nahan ve tar a mi ken Igipiti." 
Hosea8:1 Wa korough sha zwa. Bee iguve ngi shilin sha ya u TER; sha ci u ve vihi ikuryan Yam man ve per tindi Wam. 
Hosea8:2 Ve yilam er: Aôndo wam! Se Iserael, se fa U." 
Hosea8:3 Iserael gbihi kwagh u dedoo kera; mbaihomov vea tôv un ityô. 
Hosea8:4 Ve ver utor, kpa ka sha ishima Yam ga; ve ver mbatarev kpa ka sha mfe Wam ga; sha azurfa man zenaria ve la, ve er ieev vev sha u timin ayol a ve kera." 
Hosea8:5 Wanbua wou ndôhôr ishima, Samaria; iyugh Yam yegh sha a ve; ka hanma shighe je vea hingir wan ga?" 
Hosea8:6 Gadia kwagh ne due ka ken Iserael; or u eren eev er un, ka aôndo ga; wanbua u Samaria la, á hembe un avur avur." 
Hosea8:7 Gadia ve lôô ahumbe, vea gema á sunda hiar; asagher nga ga, kwagh u menden la kera ngu a mwem ga; aluer una we sam kpaa atôatyev ma a ye u." 
Hosea8:8 I mena Iserael; hegen ve mba ken akuraior er ikagh ki or nan soo ki ga yô. 
Hosea8:9 Gadia ve kôndo sha Ashiria, er jaki i toho i zenden tswen nahan; Eferaim kimbi inyaregh sha u zuan a mba un doo ve ishima yô." 
Hosea8:10 Shin er ve kimbi akuraior agen inyaregh, nahan kpaa hegen Me kohol ve; vea hii u panden sha ci u ikav mbi yuhwan mbi tor u mbatarev a we ve la." 
Hosea8:11 Gadia Eferaim a seer a seer atse a nanden nagh sha mi sha u eren kwaghbo, a hingir un atse a eren kwaghbo sha mi." 
Hosea8:12 Shin er M nger un atindi a Am, a kuma dubu pue nahan kpaa, nga ve er kwagh u ve fe un ga nahan." 
Hosea8:13 Mba sôngon iniav nan Mo, ka ve inyam tsô, mba ye i, doo TER a mbi ga; hegen yô, Una umbur iferkwagh ve man Una tsaha ve sha asorabo a ve, vea hide ken Igipiti." 
Hosea8:14 Gadia Orgban u Iserael hungul un, a maa ayou a utor; Yuda maa agar kpishi a lun a ugir, kpa Me tindi usu ken agar a na, ua hia ayouautya a a." 
Hosea9:1 Iserael de kera ember yagh yagh er akuraior nahan ga, gadia u er idya, u undu Aôndo wou, injar i sha idya doo u sha hanma vande u gbiren iyiav." 
Hosea9:2 Vande u gbiren iyiav man ihungwa i shoghol wain vea koso ve ga, wain u he kpaa una yina ve." 
Hosea9:3 Vea kera tema ken tar u TER ga; kpa Eferaim una hide hen Igipiti man vea ya kwaghyan u wang ga ken Ashiria. 
Hosea9:4 Vea kera toon iniav mbi wain sha ishigh ki TER ga, man iniav vev mbi sôngon kpaa mbia doo Un ga; mbia hingir ve er ka kwaghyan u mbazungwen ku nahan, mba vea ya mbi cii vea hôngor, gadia kwaghyan ve una lu sha ci u ijen ve tsô; una kera nyôr ken iyou i TER ga." 
Hosea9:5 Né er nyi sha iyange i mkohol u sha ashighe ashighe man sha iyange i iniongo i TERE? 
Hosea9:6 Gadia nenge, ve war mtim, nahan kpaa Igipiti una kohol ve imôngo, man Memfishi una ii ve; akaa a ve a doon a azurfa la, ukôrakondo vea ya dyako sha mi, usaa vea mende ken utenti vev." 
Hosea9:7 Ayange a mtsaha kuma ve, ayange a oron iyev va ve; Iserael una fa kwagh ne; profeti ka ibumeor, or u lun a jijingi ka orihundu, sha ci u mngee u ifer you man sha ci u ihom kpaa i vese yô." 
Hosea9:8 Orkuran u Eferaim ngu vea Aôndo wam, ka profeti; kwaghhônon u ordughuninyon ngu sha igbenda na cii, ihom kpaa ken ya u Aôndo na." 
Hosea9:9 Ve hôngor ayol a ve tsung je, er sha ayange a Gibea nahan; Una umbur ifer ve, Una tsaha asorabo a ve." 
Hosea9:10 M tser a Iserael er atam a kon u wain ken desereti nahan; M nenge a uter enev er atam a tsutswa a vian sha kon u tur sha m-um na u hiihii la yô; kpa ve va hen Baal-peor ve tsegha ayol a ve sha ci u kwagh u kunya la, nahan ve hingir kwagh ndôhôrshima vough er kwagh u a doo ve ishima la nahan." 
Hosea9:11 Sha kwagh u Eferaim yô, icivir ve ia purugh kera er inyon nahan; ma mmar una kera lu ga, ma iyav mbu wan kpaa ga, man ma iyol i jilen kpaa ga." 
Hosea9:12 Shin vea yese ônov vev, nahan kpaa Me ngohol ve ônov kera, zan zan ma or nana kera shi ga; kwagh una tser ve, zum u Me pav a ve la." 
Hosea9:13 Eferaim er m nenge a na yô, lu er Tiru nahan, i môôr un sha ijiir i dedoo; kpa Eferaim una due a ônov nav, una va a mi hen orsôngon." 
Hosea9:14 Na ve, TERE— ka nyi U na ve? Yô, na ve iyav mbu vihin man atumba a uman sha vanger." 
Hosea9:15 Iferkwagh ve cii ngi ken Gilgal; ka keela M ker ve ihom ye; sha ci u iferkwagh i aeren a ve la Me zenda ve ken iyou Yam kera; vea kera doom ishima ga; mbatarev vev cii ka mbaahendanev je. 
Hosea9:16 I gbidye Eferaim, mise ve uma kera, vea kera ume atam ga; shin er vea mar kpaa, Me wua ônov vev mba doon ve ishima la kera." 
Hosea9:17 Aôndo wam, Una ta ve kera, sha ci u ve ver ato hen a Na ga yô, nahan vea hingir mbaazende azende ken akuraior." 
Hosea10:1 Iserael ka kon u wain u hômon gese gese, u umen atam a u; er a seer umen atam yô, kape a seer di u tan atse a nanden nagh sha mi; er tar na u ze hemen, u doo yô, kape a timen mtôm ma awenem ma doon ashe kpaa la." 
Hosea10:2 Asema nga ve ahar, hegen yô, vea ya ibo; Una hembe atse a ve a nanden nagh sha mi, Una vihi mtôm vem ma awenem kera." 
Hosea10:3 Hegen vea kaa er: Se mba a tor ga; aluer se mba cian TER ga yô, tor yô, una wase se sha nyi?" 
Hosea10:4 Mba er akaaôron a gbilinigh, mba bumun sha aie, mba ye ikur; nahan ijirôron ia due er imendenev mbi bov mbi shin ahighasule nahan." 
Hosea10:5 Ishima ngi nyian mbateman ken Samaria sha ci u wanbua u Bete-aven; gadia ior nav vea zungwen un, man upristi nav kpaa, mba ve lu ember un sha ci u icivir na la, vea zungwe, gadia i kar her a na kera." 
Hosea10:6 Un iyol na kpaa á yem a mi ken Ashiria, á er tor Yarebi iwua a min; Eferaim una ya kunya, man Iserael una va ahenge sha mbamhen nav mba a hen la." 
Hosea10:7 Á tim Samaria kera; tor na hingir er ka ishaleghkon u sha mnger nahan. 
Hosea10:8 Ajiir a taven sha a Aven, ka isholibo i Iserael je la, á tim a kera; usaa man usagher vea mende sha atse a ve a nanden nagh sha mi la; vea kaa a iwo er: Cir nen se, man a agungu kpaa er: Kighir nen se." 
Hosea10:9 We Iserael, u er kwaghbo hii sha ayange a Gibea la je— ka keregh ve til ye; nahan ityav mbi i nôngo a ônov mba iferev la mbia kohol ve ken Gibea gaa?" 
Hosea10:10 Zum u á kumam yô, Me tsaha ve; á kohol akuraior sha u tan num sha a ve, zum u á kange ve sha afer a ve ahar la." 
Hosea10:11 Eferaim ka tulebua u i tese un, doo un u shoghol iyiav; M tange mon na u doon ashe la. Me zer Eferaim ikyekye; Yuda una kpela ikyekye i kahan sule, Yakob una kpela ikyekye i hemben alôgh." 
Hosea10:12 Lôô nen perapera sha ci wen, sunda nen dooshima; kaha nen utsa enev, gadia shighe kuma u keren TER, zan zan Una va nôô perapera sha a ven er ka ura nahan." 
Hosea10:13 Ne kaha kwaghbo ne sunda iferkwagh, ne ya atam a mbaaie; gadia u suur sha gbenda wou, ka sha mngee u ior ou mba ageev." 
Hosea10:14 Nahan yô, ayôôso a utya aa mough a ior ou; á vihi ayouautya a ou cii kera, er Shaleman yan vihi Bete-arbel sha iyange i utya, ta ngô a ônov nav inya, her ve avur avur la nahan." 
Hosea10:15 Kape Betel una er a ven sha ci u zegekwaghbo wen la; pepe dindee nahan kwagh u tor u Iserael una bee kera tsembelee. 
Hosea11:1 Zum u Iserael lu wanye yô, a doom ishima; ka ken Igipiti man M yila wan wam kpaa ye." 
Hosea11:2 Er i yila ve ngegh kpaa, ve hemba yemen a yem ca; ve na Ubaal nagh ku sôngon, man ve nande ieev mbi gban a gba nagh ku human doon." 
Hosea11:3 Nahan kpaa ka Mo M tese Eferaim u zenden, M kôr ve sha ave Am, kpa ve kera fa er i lu Mo M wanger ve ga." 
Hosea11:4 M urugh ve sha kor u or sha ikangenev mbi dooshima; M hingir ve er mbala mba ve kenden ve agbur sha azegher kera yô, man M ngurum M ver un kwaghyan." 
Hosea11:5 Una hide ken tar u Igipiti; Ashiria una lu tor na, sha ci u ve venda u geman ishima yô." 
Hosea11:6 Sanker una ta num sha agar a na, una vihi uishindan nav vea saa ishe, sha ci u mbamhen vev mba ve hen la." 
Hosea11:7 Ior Av ver ishima u geman undun Mo, aluer i lu yilan ve Sha nahan kpaa, mô ve môm nan nôngo u moughon sha kpaa ga." 
Hosea11:8 Me er nan man Me de u kera Eferaim, Me er nan man Me gbihi u Iserael? Me er nan man Me de u, u hingir er Adema nahana? Me er nan man Me gema u u hingir er Seboim nahana? Ishima gemam kimi, mhôônom kôrom tsung." 
Hosea11:9 Me kera er sha mvihi u iyugh Yam ga, Me kera tim Eferaim ga, gadia Mo M ngu Aôndo je, M ngu or ga, Icighan her atô wou, Me kera va sha iyugh ga." 
Hosea11:10 Vea zende a TER ityô; Una ta kume er begha nahan; gadia Una ta kume, tsô ônov mba nomso vea mough shin ityôtar vea va her a Na a akarkase iyol." 
Hosea11:11 Vea due ken Igipiti a akarkase iyol er annyon nahan, man er atii nahan ken tar u Ashiria; shi Me na ve vea tema ken uya vev, kape TER A kaa ne." 
Hosea11:12 Eferaim kasem sha mbaaie, ya u Iserael kpaa kasem sha icugh, man Yuda kpaa ar ave, kera wa Aôndo iko ga man U a lu Icighan u jighjigh la kpaa ga." 
Hosea12:1 Eferaim kôr hur a ahumbe, ngu zan ahumbe a ken ityoughkitaregh ityô; ngu seer a seer aie man ipila iyange jimin cii; ve ya ikur a Ashiria, shi mba zan a mkurem ken tar u Igipiti kpaa." 
Hosea12:2 TER ngu a ayôôso a Yuda kpaa, Una tsaha Yakob sha ci u igbenda na, man Una na un injar sha aeren a na." 
Hosea12:3 Ken uya a kôr anngô na sha ikishinguhar, man er a kuma or yô, a nôngo wav a Aôndo;" 
Hosea12:4 een, a nôngo wav a ortyom u Sha, a hemba un, a vaa, a zamber a na; a zua a Na hen Betel, ka heera A ôr kwagh a vese ye—" 
Hosea12:5 ka TER, Aôndo u akum a Sha, iti Na er TER." 
Hosea12:6 Nahan we yô, hire hen Aôndo wou, lu a dooshima man perapera, ver ishima kegh Aôndo wou gbem." 
Hosea12:7 Ka orkasua je, uikaren mba icughuv mba sha uwegh nagh; u ngohol mtsera ganden ikaa inya doo un." 
Hosea12:8 Nahan Eferaim kaa er: M hingir ornyar ve, m tser a inyaregh; ken akaa am cii, i zua a ma kwagh u ifer ken a mo u lun isholibo ga." 
Hosea12:9 Kpa M ngu TER, Aôndo wou, hii ken tar u Igipiti je, Me shi Me na u u̱ tsa ken utenti, er sha ayange a iniongo i i ver i la nahan." 
Hosea12:10 Shi M ôr kwagh a uprofeti kpaa; ka Mo je M seer mbampase ye, man sha ikev i uprofeti la M ôr kwagh sha anzaakaa." 
Hosea12:11 Er Gileadi vande lun iferkwagh yô, ve hingir gbilinkwagh cii; ken Gilgal mba nan nagh ku sôngon sha anomabua; atse ve a nanden nagh sha mi la aa hingir er atihi a awen ken ihighasule nahan." 
Hosea12:12 Yakob yevese yem ken tar u Aram, Iserael er tom sha u zuan a kwase, sha u zuan a kwase yô, a kura ilev." 
Hosea12:13 Ka sha ikev i profeti TER due a Iserael ken tar u Igipiti, man sha ikev i profeti kpaa i kura un ye." 
Hosea12:14 Eferaim na ishima i vihin tsung; nahan TER Una hide a awambe a ifer na sha ityough nagh, man Una or un iyev sha iheen na la." 
Hosea13:1 Zum u Eferaim ôr kwagh yô, ikarikase gbidye iyol; i kende un sha ken Iserael; kpa a hingir u lun a ibo iyol sha ci u a civir Baal yô, nahan a kpe." 
Hosea13:2 Hegen kpaa mba eren asorabo zan hemen hemen, mba keren ieev, akombo a i er a sha azurfa ve sha mfe, a cii ka tom u mbafaneev; mba kaan sha a er: Mba ve ne nagh yô, mba susu anibuav." 
Hosea13:3 Nahan yô, vea hingir er ibeenegh ki pepegh yô, man er avure a ka a ndoor fese nahan, er imough i ahumbe a purugh a i kera sha vande u gbiren iyiav nahan, man er mnyim ma duen ken ityam i mnyi yô." 
Hosea13:4 Nahan kpaa, Mo M ngu TER, Aôndo wou, hii ken tar u Igipiti je, u fa ma aôndo ugen ga saa Mo; Oryiman ugen ngu ga saa Mo." 
Hosea13:5 Ka Mo M fa u ken desereti, ken tar u ombor ye." 
Hosea13:6 Zum u ve zua a kwaghyan yô, ve ya ve ide; er ve ide yô, asema a ve kende sha; ka sha ci u nahan Mo M hungul ve ye." 
Hosea13:7 Nahan M hingir her a ve er ka begha nahan; M kegh sha gbenda er anyam nahan;
