Hosea13:8 Me ta sha a ve er dwem u i kor un ônov kera yô, Me ande vanger ve; Me ya ve er begha nahan; inyamikume ia tuse a ve." 
Hosea13:9 Mtim wou yô, Iserael ka er u hendan a Mo, Mo u M lu iwasen you yô." 
Hosea13:10 Tor wou ngu han ase, sha u una yima u ken agar a ou cii, man mbaajiriv ou mba hana, mba u kaa sha kwagh ve wer: Nam tor kua mbatarev laa?" 
Hosea13:11 M na u tor sha ishima i vihin, man shi M kar a na kera sha iyugh Yam." 
Hosea13:12 I kohol afer a Eferaim i kange a, i ver isholibo na i̱ lu her." 
Hosea13:13 Martoghol kôr un; un ka wan u fan kwagh ga, gadia zum u shighe kuma yô, a kera due ga." 
Hosea13:14 Me paa ve sha tahav mbu Sheol; Me paa ve sha ku; we ku, ka han ubombauangev ou ve lu? We, Sheol, ka han mtim wou a lu? Afanyô a vaan a yer sha ishigh Yagh." 
Hosea13:15 Shin er una ume atam ken atô u anmgbianev nav nahan kpaa ahumbe a ken ityoughkitaregh aa va, ahumbe a TER, aa due ken desereti; nahan hwembe na ua uma, imbor na kpaa ia uma; aa kura un ikav nav mbi injaav cii kera." 
Hosea13:16 Samaria una ya ibo na, gadia a hendan a Aôndo na; á wua ve sha sanker, á ta anikundanev vev inya á her ve, á pav kasev vev mba ve lu iyav la iyav." 
Hosea14:1 We, Iserael, hide hen TER, Aôndo wou; gadia u nôngo gbev sha ifer you." 
Hosea14:2 Tôô nen akaaôron ne, za nen a mi; hide nen hen TER; kaa nen a Na ner: De ifer ci ca cii, rumun kwagh u a lu u doon yô, nahan sé gema ityumbujôôv yase sé na nagh sha mi, sha ityough ki anomabua." 
Hosea14:3 Ashiria una yima se ga; sé henda anyinya ga; man sé kera yila tom wase u aveegh ser: Aôndo wase, ga; gadia ka her a We ancôgholov ve zough a mhôônom ma zungwen ye." 
Hosea14:4 Me wanger mhirjime ve, vea gba doon Mo ishima tsô; gadia iyugh Yam gema her a na kera;" 
Hosea14:5 Me hingir hen Iserael er avure nahan; una mondo er ityombo nahan, una ta amise a na er Lebanon nahan." 
Hosea14:6 Una ta agbaa, dooashe na una hingir er kon u olev nahan, ihuma na kpaa er Lebanon nahan." 
Hosea14:7 Mba ve tem shin mure na vea shi vea lôô alakema, vea kpar er kon u wain nahan; man iwuese i á wuese un ia lu er i wain u Lebanon nahan." 
Hosea14:8 Eferaim: Ka nyi i shi i gbem a akombo? Ka Mo M ongo un shi M nengen sha a na kpaa; M ngu er kon u fer u lun shough shough nahan; ka her a Mo atam a ou a dugh ye. 
Hosea14:9 Or u nan lu a kwaghfan yô, nana̱ ver ase ikav sha akaa ne; u nan lu a mfe yô, nana̱ fa a, gadia igbenda i TER ngi jighilii je, mbaperapera mba zenden sha i; kpa mbaperenatindi yô, mba nenge gbev sha i." 
Joel1:1 Kwaghôron u TER u a va hen Yoel wan u Petuel. 
Joel1:2 Ungwa nen kwagh ne, ne mbatamen, ver nen ato ne mba ne tem ken tar ne cii. Imbakwagh ne vande eren sha ayange a en shin sha ayange a uter enev kpa?" 
Joel1:3 Ôr nen ônov enev kwagh ne, ônov enev kpaa ve̱ gema ve̱ ôr ônov vev, ônov vev di kpaa ve̱ ôr kov ugen." 
Joel1:4 Kwagh u ikomon i tseren akaa la, i undu yô, ikomon i purugh sha ya; kwagh u ikomon i purugh sha i undu yô, agumaikomon ya; man kwagh u agumaikomon a undu yô, ikomon i oron akaa ya." 
Joel1:5 Nder nen ne mbahundenmsôrom, vaa nen; ngor nen Mliam ne mba man wain cii, sha ci u wain u nyohon, gadia i tsuwa un sha zwa wen kera." 
Joel1:6 Gadia ikur igen nyôr ken tar wam i taver, i ngee gande u ôron; anyi a i ka anyi a begha, anomanyiigh a i kpaa ka a mgbianbegha." 
Joel1:7 I vihim kon u wain, i asegh mo kon u tur; i bugh u avuu, i haa kera cii; agbaa a u hingir pung." 
Joel1:8 Zungwe nen er iniunkwase i i te ikondo uya, sha ci u nom na u sha iniun na la." 
Joel1:9 Nagh ku sha samuyia man nagh ku man tôndo ken iyou i TER; upristi, mbatomov mba TER, mba zungwen." 
Joel1:10 I vihi ishule kera, inya ngi zungwen; gadia samuyia vihi, wain u he uma kera, mkurem kpaa kera ma ga." 
Joel1:11 Kunya kôr mbashirensule, mbaerentom u ikon i wain mba zungwen, sha ci u alakema man shair, gadia iyiav mbi ken sule saa ishe." 
Joel1:12 Kon u wain uma kera, man kon u tur use; kon u pomegraneti man ivile kpaa man kon u apel, ikon i ken sule cii uma; man iember bee hen ônov mba iorov kera." 
Joel1:13 Ta nen ikondo uya, zungwe nen, ne upristi, ngor nen mliam ne mbatomov mba atse a nanden nagh sha mi; nyôr tsa nen a ikondo uya, ne mbatomov mba Aôndo wam; gadia i kar a nagh ku sha samuyia man ku man ken iyou i Aôndo wam kera." 
Joel1:14 Tsegha nen iyange i hôron kwaghyan, lôhô nen icighanmkohol; kohol mbatamen man mba ve tem ken tar la cii hen iyou i TER, Aôndo wen, vaa nen a TER genger genger." 
Joel1:15 Wuu, wuu! iyange la! Gadia iyange i TER mgbôghom ve, ia va er mtim u a dugh hen Uhembanagee nahan." 
Joel1:16 Kera ka sha ashe ase je, i kar a kwaghyan man iember man msaanyol ken iyou i Aôndo wase kera gaa?" 
Joel1:17 Ivor ngi zulugh shin alôgh a inyaagh; i vihi iuna kera, ikwer kpaa yôhôl, gadia alakema use." 
Joel1:18 Nenge, er uzendenya ve toghoroo! Kondo akumabua iyol sha ci u toho u aa ya ngu ga, een, ikumiyôngo je kpaa ngi yan ican." 
Joel1:19 TERE, ka We m vaa a We ye, gadia usu hia ajiir a yan toho ken taaikôngo, nomborusu hia ikon i ken ikôngo cii." 
Joel1:20 Inyam i ken toho je kpaa ngi vaan a We, gadia mngerem ma shin uwagh uma kera; man usu kpaa hia ajiir a yan toho a uile ken taaikôngo." 
Joel2:1 Tôngo nen korough ken Shion, gbire nen shishavaa sha icighanwo Wam; mba ve tem shin tar cii ve̱ gbidye ikarikase iyol, gadia iyange i TER ngi van, i mgbôghom je ve;" 
Joel2:2 ka iyange i ime i wan mgbigh mgbigh, iyange i abeen man angôghime, er mlu u pepe dindee nahan; ikurior i vesen man i ageegh haa sha iwo imba i i lu a vande nengen a mi ga, man á kera nenge a mi ken hemen kpaa ga, zan zan sha ikov ikov cii." 
Joel2:3 Usu ngu hian zan ve ken hemen, ken ijime ve kpaa nomborusu ngu yeghen; tar ngu er sule u Eden nahan sha ishiv vev, ken ijime ve ka taaikôngo gbilin, ma kwagh war sha ikev ve ga." 
Joel2:4 Mluashe ve bee mluashe u anyinya, bee er ka anyinyaautya nahan, kape ve nyôngoso la." 
Joel2:5 Er ihuran i akekeautya nahan, kape ve tsuwen sha ityouv mbi iwoov la, bee er ka kume u nomborusu u hian toho nahan man shi er ior mba ageev mba tangen ityav nahan." 
Joel2:6 Sha mve ve akuraior cii gbidye akarkase iyol; ishiv cii hingir peng. 
Joel2:7 Mba yevese er anomaior a taver iyol nahan, mba unden sha kpekpe er ka ior mba utyav yô; hanmô ve ngu zan sha gbenda u nan jighilaa, ve tôndo nongo ga." 
Joel2:8 Hanmô ve kpaa, mgbegha ugen ga; hanmô ve nan ngu zan sha gbenda u nan; ve kar sha ijôawange, ve kaha gbenda ga." 
Joel2:9 Ve ta sha gar, ve nyôngoso sha ukpekpe; ve unde ve nyôr ken ayou, ve nyôr sha a-an a ayou er ka mbaiv yô." 
Joel2:10 Tar tenger sha ishigh vegh, Usha gbidye ikarikase iyol; iyange man uwer wa ime, asan kpaa hide a iwanger ve ijime." 
Joel2:11 TER genger imo sha ishigh ki mbautyav Nav la, gadia ikumutya Na kehe gande; un u a eren sha imo Na la, ka u ageegh; gadia iyange i TER ka i vesen je, i cier iyol kpaa, ka an nana fatyô u hendan ishigh a ii?" 
Joel2:12 Shin hegen je kpaa, kape TER A kaa ne: Gema nen her a Mo a asema a en cii, a kwaghyan u hôron man mliam ashe man a ijungwen," 
Joel2:13 ande nen asema a en, i̱ de kera lu akondo ga; gema nen hen TER, Aôndo wen, gadia ngu a mrumun u sha mhôôn, a mgbough a mhôônom ma zungwen, we ishima man ngu a erdoo tsung, ka A vaa afanyô sha kwagh u bo u A we ishima u eren la." 
Joel2:14 Ka an nan fe er alaghga Una gema awashima Na, man Una undu iveren ken ijime Na— ka nagh ku sha samuyia man ku man, ku nan TER, Aôndo wen je la." 
Joel2:15 Tôngo nen korough ken Shion, tsegha iyange i hôron kwaghyan, lôhô nen icighanmkohol;" 
Joel2:16 kohol ior, tsegha ior mba ve kohol la, kohol mbatamen, kohol mbayev kua anikundanev kpaa; orkwasehe a̱ due ken iyou na, kwase kpaa a̱ due ken kparyou na." 
Joel2:17 Upristi, mbaerentom u TER, ve̱ vaa hen halegh u puadwer a atse a nanden nagh sha mi la, ve̱ kaa er: Tsegha ior Ou ver ve kposo TERE, de kera gbihin dyako Wou ken iheen je er akuraior aa nahan ve tar ga; ka sha ci u nyi man vea kaa ken akuraior er: Aôndo ve ngu hana?" 
Joel2:18 Tsô TER ta ikaa a tar Na, mhôônom kôr Un a ior Nav." 
Joel2:19 TER gema kaa a ior Nav er: Nenge, M ngu tindin ne a samuyia man wain u he man mkurem, á kuma ne gbing gbing; Me kera er ne, né hingir kwagh u nahan tar hen akuraior ga." 
Joel2:20 Me kar a mba ken imbusutarimese hen a ven kera, Me zenda ve, vea yem ken tar u ombor u lun gbilin, mba ken hemen vea yem shin zegemnger u sha ityoughkitaregh la, man mba ken ijime di vea yem shin zegemnger u shin ityôtar la, ihuma ve i bo ia mough; myughul ve u dang kpaa una mough, sha ci u ve er akaa a vesen." 
Joel2:21 De cie ga, tar, ember man i̱ saan we iyol, gadia TER er akaa a vesen." 
Joel2:22 De kera cie nen ga, ne ishôso i ken tar ne cii, gadia ajiir a yan toho a ken taaikôngo hôm ve, ikon ngi umen atam a i, kon u tur man kon u wain mba umen atam." 
Joel2:23 Yô, ember nen, ne ônov mba Shion, i̱ saan ne iyol ken TER, Aôndo wen, gadia ngu nan ne ortesen u una tese perapera, ngu nôôn ne ura, urahe man ura u masetyô kpaa, er ngise la nahan." 
Joel2:24 Avande a gbiren iyiav aa iv a sam; ahungwa a shoghol wain aa iv a zar u wain man a mkurem lev lev, je á haa inya." 
Joel2:25 Shi Me hide ne a anyom a ikomon i purugh agumaikomon man ikomon i oron akaa kua ikomon i tseren akaa lu ya la, ka zegeikumutya Yam i M tindi her a ven ne." 
Joel2:26 Nea ya je á kuma ne gbing gbing, né wuese iti i TER, Aôndo wen, u A er ityom i kpilighyol her a ven la; man ior Av kpaa, vea kera va ahenge mayange ga." 
Joel2:27 Nahan né fa er M lu ken atô u Iserael yô, man ka Mo M lu TER, Aôndo wen ye, ugen ngu ga; ior Av kpaa vea kera va ahenge ga." 
Joel2:28 Tsô sha ayange a masetyô la, Me haa Jijingi Wam sha uumace cii; ônov enev mba nomso man mba kasev vea ôron kwaghôron u profeti, mnyam maa cie mbatamen enev, ikaior yen ia nenge mbampase mba sha mnenge;" 
Joel2:29 mbatomov mba nomso man mba kasev kpaa Me haa Jijingi wam sha a ve sha ayange la. 
Joel2:30 Me er akaa a kpilighyol sha kua shin tar kpaa, awambe man usu man zegemnyi u kôndon sha." 
Joel2:31 Iyange ia gema ia hingir ime, uwer kpaa ua hingir awambe man iyange i TER i vesen i cieryol ia va ye." 
Joel2:32 Nahan yô, á hingir u hanma or u nan yer sha iti i TER yô, nana war; gadia sha uwo u Shion man ken Yerusalem á zua a mbawaren, er TER lu kaa yô; ka ken mbawaren mbala á zua a mba TER Una yila ve ye." 
Joel3:1 Gadia, nenge, sha ayange la, man sha shighe la kpaa, zum u me hire a Yuda man Yerusalem ken kwar yô," 
Joel3:2 Me kohol akuraior cii, Me sen a a shin pev u Yehoshafati, Me ôr a ijir shimi, sha kwagh u ior Av man sha kwagh u dyako Wam, Iserael, u ve sambe a mi ken akuraior, man ve gema ve kar kwar sha tar Wam la." 
Joel3:3 Ve er ishor sha ior Av, ve gema wannomso ve musan idyakwase a mi, man ve tee wanyekwase kpaa ve yam wain, ve ma." 
Joel3:4 Ne mba nyi je, we Tiru man Shidon man ityar i i kase Filitia cii? Né orom iyeve? Aluer ne orom iyev yô, fese je Me gema iyev la Me hire a i sha ityough yenegh." 
Joel3:5 Gadia ne kura azurfa Wam man zenaria Wam, ne yem a akaa Am a injaa ne za ver ken utempel enev;" 
Joel3:6 man shi ne tee ônov mba Yuda man ônov mba Yerusalem, Mbagrika yam; ne yem a ve ca a tar ve;" 
Joel3:7 yô, nenge, Me mough a ve hen ijiir i ne za tee ve la kera, Me hire a iyevoron la sha ityough yenegh;" 
Joel3:8 Mo kpaa Me tee ônov enev mba nomso man mba kasev, Mbayuda ve̱ yam, vea gema á tee ve, ior i Sabia vea yam, ikurior i caa, gadia ka TER A kaa nahan ye." 
Joel3:9 Yôô nen kwagh ne hen akuraior: Kohol nen iyol i utya; nder nen anomaior, ve̱ mough sha; mbautyav cii ve̱ kporom, ve̱ va." 
Joel3:10 Tôô nen indyuhar yen gema var nen usanker a mi, ahô a en a sôron ikon a mi kpaa, var nen awange a mi; isheeror kpaa i̱ kaa er: M taver." 
Joel3:11 Er nen fefa, va nen, ne akuraior a a ningir a tser hanma ian cii la, kohol nen imôngo; TERE, sen a mbaageev Ou heregh." 
Joel3:12 Akuraior a̱ mough, a̱ va hen pev u Yehoshafati; gadia ka keela Me za tema sha u ôron akuraior a a ningir a tser sha hanma ian la ijir ye." 
Joel3:13 Naregh nen loji gadia sunda via; va nen, va shoghol nen, gadia ihungwa i kamen wain iv, ahungwa iv lev lev nga haan; gadia ifer ve i vese." 
Joel3:14 Ikpelaior, zegeikpelaior shin pev u kuren ijir! Gadia iyange i TER i kuren ijir shin pev la mgbôghom." 
Joel3:15 Iyange man uwer wa ime, asan kpaa hide a iwanger i a ijime." 
Joel3:16 TER ngu tan kume ken Shion, ngu taver imo ken Yerusalem je; Usha man tar tenger kpa TER Una hingir ijiir i yeren i ior Nav, man garutya u Mbaiserael." 
Joel3:17 Ka nahan man né fa er M lu TER, Aôndo wen ye, M tem ken Shion, icighanwo Wam; zum la Yerusalem una hingir icighanjiir, atôatyev aa kera kar ker ga." 
Joel3:18 Tsô sha iyange la iwo ia nôndo wain u nyohon, atumba kpaa aa kuwa inya sha agungu; man iwagh i Yuda cii ia iv mngerem; imbormnger ia due ken iyou i TER, ia ur pev u Shitim." 
Joel3:19 Igipiti una hingir ice man Edom una hingir taaikôngo u or lu ker ga yô, sha ci u ipila i ve er a ônov mba Yuda la, gadia ve haa awambe a mbaishôôv ken tar ve." 
Joel3:20 Kpa Yuda yô, una lu gbem sha won man Yerusalem kpaa una lu sha ikov ikov." 
Joel3:21 Tsô Me pase ishô i awambe a ve a M vande pasen ishô i a ga la; gadia TER tem ken Shion. 
Amos1:1 Akaaôron a Amoshi, u a lu u môm ken mbakuraniyôngo mba ken Tekoa la, kwagh u a nenge sha ayange a Ushia tor u Yuda man sha ayange a Yerobiam wan u Yoashi, tor u Iserael, anyom kar ahar man tar mase tenger ye." 
Amos1:2 A kaa er: TER ngu tan kume ken Shion, ngu taver imo Na ken Yerusalem je, ajiir a yan toho a uile zungwe, ityough ki Karmel kpaa ure." 
Amos1:3 TER ngu kaan nahan er: Sha ci u atindi a peren atar a Damaseku, een, sha ci u anyiin je yô, Me kera hide a mtsaha na ijime ga, gadia ve shoghol Gileadi sha ikyekye i iyôô i shoghol iyiav;" 
Amos1:4 nahan Me haa usu ken ya u Hasael ua hia ayouator a Benhadadi. 
Amos1:5 Me sombo ishindanhunda i Damaseku, Me tim mba ve tem ken pev u Aven, kua wen u a lu a tôgh ku torough ken Bete-eden la kpaa; á yem a ior i Shiria uikangen ken Kir, kape TER A kaa ne." 
Amos1:6 TER ngu kaan nahan er: Sha ci u atindi a peren atar a Gasa, een, sha ci u anyiin je yô, Me kera hide a mtsaha na ijime ga, gadia ve yem a ikurior jimin cii uikangen, sha u za nan ve sha ikev i Edom;" 
Amos1:7 nahan Me haa usu sha gilgar u Gasa, ua hia ayouator a na;" 
Amos1:8 Me tim mba ve tem ken Ashedodi kua wen u a lu a tôgh ku torough ken Ashekelon kpaa; Me naregh uwegh Agh sha Ekeron, man asande a Mbafiliti a a shi her la aa tim kera, kape Ter AÔNDO A kaa la." 
Amos1:9 TER ngu kaan nahan er: Sha ci u atindi a peren atar a Tiru, een, sha ci u anyiin je yô, Me kera hide a mtsaha na ijime ga, gadia ve na ikurior jimin cii sha ikev i Edom man ve wa ikuryan i anmgbian a anmgbian la iko ga;" 
Amos1:10 nahan Me haa usu sha gilgar u Tiru ua hia ayouator a na. 
Amos1:11 TER ngu kaan nahan er: Sha ci u atindi a peren atar a Edom, een, sha ci u anyiin je yô, Me kera hide a mtsaha na ijime ga, gadia a cir anngô na ityô a sanker uwe, man shi a ta mhôônom ma zungwen kera cii, ishima na i nyoon pever ga, lu a iyugh gbem;" 
Amos1:12 nahan Me haa usu sha Teman, ua hia ayouator a Bosera." 
Amos1:13 TER ngu kaan nahan er: Sha ci u atindi a peren atar a Mbaamon, een, sha ci u anyiin je yô, Me kera hide a mtsaha ve ijime ga, gadia ve pav kasev mba Gileadi mba ve lu iyav la iyav sha u vea seer tar ve u̱ kehe;" 
Amos1:14 nahan Me keer usu sha gilgar u Raba, ua hia ayouator a na, a amo a geren sha iyange i utya, sha ijeverahumbe kpaa sha iyange i zegehiar;" 
Amos1:15 á yem a tor ve uikangen un a mbatarev nav imôngo, kape TER A kaa la." 
Amos2:1 TER ngu kaan nahan er: Sha ci u atindi a peren atar a Moabi, een, sha ci u anyiin je yô, Me kera hide a mtsaha na ijime ga; gadia a nande akuhe a tor u Edom, gema hingir alie," 
Amos2:2 nahan Me haa usu sha Moabi, ua hia ayouator a Kerioti; nahan Moabi una kpe ku sha ayôôso man mgerutya man mkaa u korough;" 
Amos2:3 Me gber orjir ken atô na kera, Me wua mbatarev nav a na imôngo cii, kape TER A kaa la." 
Amos2:4 TER ngu kaan nahan er: Sha ci u atindi a peren atar a Yuda, een, sha ci u anyiin je yô, Me kera hide a mtsaha na ijime ga, gadia ve venda atindiakaa a TER, ve wa akaawan a Na iko ga, mbaaie vev na ve mtsum, mba uter vev lu zenden sha mi la;" 
Amos2:5 nahan Me haa usu sha Yuda, ua hia ayouator a Yerusalem." 
Amos2:6 TER ngu kaan nahan er: Sha ci u atindi a peren atar a Iserael, een, sha ci u anyiin je yô, Me kera hide a mtsaha na ijime ga; gadia ve tee orperapera, ve yam azurfa, man oribanave kpaa sha kweakôvough môm;" 
Amos2:7 ve mba i gbe ve ishima u nengen a ihundu i inyaagh sha ityough ki mbaibanave man mba goom a gbenda u mbaasemaleghlegh; wan man ter u nan ka ve zua hen wankwase môm, sha u hôngor a icighanti Wam;" 
Amos2:8 ka ve yav sha akondo a ityungugh hen kpe u hanma atse a nanden nagh sha mi; ken iyou i aôndo ve, mba me wain u ior mba i ye ve zwajirigh la." 
Amos2:9 Nahan kpaa ka Mo M tim Amor sha ishigh vegh, u ityaven na lu er ityaven i usedar je, man a taver agee er ikon i ouki yô; M tim atam a na sha man amise na kpaa shin inya." 
Amos2:10 Shi Mo kpaa M due a ve ken tar u Igipiti, M hemen ve ken desereti anyom akunduahar sha u u̱ ngohol tar u Amor yô." 
Amos2:11 M gema ônov ou mbagenev ve hingir uprofeti, man mbayev ou mba ikaior mbagenev ve hingir Mbanasari. Shin kape i lu ne ga ase, ne Mbaiserael? Kape TER A kaa la." 
Amos2:12 Kpa ne na Mbanasari wain er ve̱ ma; man ne ta uprofeti icin ner: De er nen kwaghôron u profeti ga. 
Amos2:13 Yô, nenge, Me kighir we hen ijiir you er ikyekye i i iv a aile a uyia ka i kighir sha kwagh nahan." 
Amos2:14 Or u wan kpaver kpaa, ayem á nunde nan, orageegh nana kera fatyô u eren kwagh sha agee a nan ga, orutaha kpaa nana kera fatyô u waren uma u nan ga;" 
Amos2:15 orkerenivaan kpaa nana kera tile ga; u nan eren kpaver shin angahar kpaa nana war ga; orhendan nyinya kpaa nana yima uma u nan ga; 
Amos2:16 man un u a taver ishima ken mbaageev la kpaa, una yevese idyelegh sha iyange la, kape TER A kaa la." 
Amos3:1 Ungwa nen kwaghôron u TER A er sha a ven ne, ne Mbaiserael, sha tsombor u M dugh a u ken tar u Igipiti la cii, er:" 
Amos3:2 Ka ne tseegh M fe ne ken akuraior a sha won cii ye, ka nahan man Me va tsaha ne sha aferakaa a en cii ye." 
Amos3:3 Ior uhar vea gba zenden imôngo aluer vea vande zuan ga kpa? 
Amos3:4 Begha te kume shin ikô zum u a ker inyam ga kpa? Gumbegha te kume ken bar na zum u ka una kôr kwagh ga kpa? 
Amos3:5 Inyon i gbe ken kwaghhônon shin inya, zum u ka a hôn i ga kpa? Kwaghhônon una yôhôl aluer kwagh una gba ker ga kpa?" 
Amos3:6 Ka a tôngo ikpamkor ken gar nahan, mciem ma ta ior iyol ga kpa? Kwagh u bo una gba nyôron ken gar tsô, a lu TER A ve a mi ga kpa?" 
Amos3:7 Mimi je TER Una gba eren ma kwagh môm ga saa Una vande pasen kwaghmyer Na la hen mbatomov Nav, uprofeti ve." 
Amos3:8 Begha ta kume, yô, ka an je nana de ciana? Ter AÔNDO ôr kwagh, yô ka an je nana de pasenaa?" 
Amos3:9 Yôô nen sha ayouator a Ashedodi, man sha ayouator a ken tar u Igipiti, ner: Kohol nen sha iwo i Samaria, yô, nenge, uzegembaayôôsov mba ve lu ker, man mbamkighir mba ker atô na la." 
Amos3:10 Gadia ve kera fa u eren kwagh u mimi ga, kape TER A kaa ne, ve mba ve ombon ipila man iv ken ayou a ve a tor la." 
Amos3:11 Nahan yô, Ter AÔNDO ngu kaan nahan er: Orihom una lu, una kase tar la, una wa u atô, una shir a agee a ou inya, man á vihi ayouator a ou kera kpaa." 
Amos3:12 TER ngu kaan nahan er: Er orkuranilev ka a yima angahar ahar, shin vegherto sha zwa u begha nahan, kape á yima Mbaiserael mba ve tem ken Samaria sha zongough ku gambegh man sha ukushen mba sha shiliti mba gambev la." 
Amos3:13 Ungwa nen man er nen shiada pase nen ya u Yakob, kape Ter AÔNDO A kaa ne, Aôndo u akum a Sha ne." 
Amos3:14 Gadia sha iyange i Me va tsaha Iserael sha afer a ve yô, Me shi Me tsaha atse a Betel a nan nagh sha mi la kpaa, á tôndo akor a atsegh aa gba inya." 
Amos3:15 Me yôhôl iyou i teman ker shighe u wuhegh, man iyou i teman ker shighe u iceenyolough la; ayou a sha anyianor kpaa aa vihi kera, ayou kpishi aa saa ishe, kape TER A kaa ne." 
Amos4:1 Ungwa nen kwaghôron ne, ne ungômbaibuav mba Bashan mba ne lu sha uwo u Samaria ne, ne mba ne kighir atsanaior, ne heren mbaibanave, ne mba ne kaan a noov enev ner: Va nen a mi, se̱ ma la." 
Amos4:2 Ter AÔNDO bum mtsegh Na, er: Nenge, ayange a en nga van a vea va kura ne kera sha utsuwe, man mba vea shi yô, á kura ve kera sha utsuwe mba ishuuv." 
Amos4:3 Nea due sha ahura a gar, hanma or nana ver ishigh ken hemen jighilii, á gbihi ne ken Harmon, kape TER A kaa ne." 
Amos4:4 Va nen hen Betel, va per nen atindi; va nen hen Gilgal va seer peren nen atindi; va nen a iniav yenev mbi sôngon hanma sev, man môm-ken-upue enev hanma iyange i sha utar." 
Amos4:5 Na nen nagh ku ishughun sha kwagh u i we kwa sha mi yô, yôô nen iniav mbi nan sha ishima i dedoo, samber a mi, gadia ka kwagh u a doo ne je la, ne Mbaiserael! Kape Ter AÔNDO A kaa ne." 
Amos4:6 M gema M na ne mwanger u anyiigh ken agar a tamen a en cii, man mban u kwaghyan ken ajiir a en a teman cii; nahan kpaa, ne hide her a Mo ga, kape TER A kaa ne." 
Amos4:7 M shi M nyume ne ura, zum u iwer shi itiar i sunda ua kuma yô; M na ura nôô sha gar môm man sha ugen yô, M yange, u kera nôô ga; ijiir i môm i nôô ura, ijiir igen i ura nôô ker ga yô, i use." 
Amos4:8 Ka nahan man agar a tamen ahar shin atar lu zan ze ze ze hen gar môm sha u za man mngerem, kpa kuma a ga; nahan kpaa, ne hide her a Mo ga, kape TER A kaa ne." 
Amos4:9 M tsaha ne sha mhie u iyiav man yien; M vihi ishule yen man ikon i wain yen; ikon i tur yen man ikon i olev, ikomon ya; nahan kpaa, ne hide her a Mo ga, kape TER A kaa ne." 
Amos4:10 M haa ne bouange, sha inja i Igipiti la; M wua ikaior yen sha sanker, M kar a anyinya a en kera; M na ihuma i ken afo a en i nyôr ken ahenga a en je; nahan kpaa, ne hide her a Mo ga, kape TER A kaa ne." 
Amos4:11 M yôhôl ne er Aôndo yôhôl Sodom man Gomora nahan, ne lu er ityôndo i i sase duen a mi ken usu yô; nahan kpaa, ne hide her a mo ga, kape TER A kaa la." 
Amos4:12 Nahan yô, kape Me er a we ne, we Iserael; man er Me va er a we nahan yô, wa ago iyol sha u va kohol Aôndo wou, we Iserael." 
Amos4:13 Gadia nenge Wen u A er iwo man A gbe ahumbe, man A pasen or mhen u ken ishima i nan, Wen u A gem sev mbu hingir ime, u A zenden sha ajiir a taven a sha tar la, TER, Aôndo u akum a Sha, ka iti Na je la." 
Amos5:1 Ungwa nen kwaghôron ne u M ter ne kwelegh sha min ne, we ya u Iserael." 
Amos5:2 Iniunkwase i Iserael la i gba, ia kera mough ga, i ta i inya hen tar u i, or u moughon a i nan ngu ga." 
Amos5:3 Gadia Ter AÔNDO ngu kaan nahan er: Gar u ior lu duen ker dubu, ka ior deri tsô ve mase shin ye, man u ior lu duen ker deri, ka ior pue ve mase shin ker ken ya u Iserael ye." 
Amos5:4 Gadia TER ngu kaan a ya u Iserael nahan er: Kerem nen, nahan né lu uma." 
Amos5:5 Kpa de kera keren nen Betel ga, de nyer nen ken Gilgal kpaa ga, shi de ze nen hen Bersheba kpaa ga; gadia á yem a Gilgal uikangen kpee je, man Betel kpaa una hingir gbilinkwagh." 
Amos5:6 Ker nen TER, nahan né lu uma; gayô, Una yegh er usu nahan ken ya u Yosev, u ua hia je or u pirin u sha ci u Betel nana lu ga;" 
Amos5:7 ne mba ne gem ijirôron i hingir kon u yuwan, man ne te perapera inya!" 
Amos5:8 Un u A gbe Ancôgholov man Anyamaiwa, u A gem angôghime hingir sev, u A gem tetan a we ime a hingir tugh; Un u ka A yila mngerem ma zegemnger, A haa ma sha tar la; TER, ka iti Na je la;" 
Amos5:9 Un u ka A va a mtim sha orageegh fese, mtim kpaa a va sha iyouutya i taver." 
Amos5:10 Ve kôr un u a yange kwaghbo hen hundagar la ihom man or u nan er kwagh u mimi yô, ve laha nan." 
Amos5:11 Er ne ndyaren icanor man ne sav alakema na, ne maa ayou a sha awen a kuan, kpa tsan yen ker ga; ne kaha ishule i ikon i wain i dedoo, kpa man yen zar u i ga." 
Amos5:12 Gadia M fa mngee u atindi a peren a en, man ivesen i asorabo a en; ne mba ne eren mbamimi ican, ne mba ne ngohol inyaregh ki yamen ishô man ne mgbegha mbaibanave hen hundagar kera." 
Amos5:13 Nahan orfankwagh nan huan ving sha shighe la, gadia ka shighe u bo je." 
Amos5:14 Ker nen kwagh u dedoo, i̱ de lu u bo ga, sha u ne lu uma yô; ka nahan man TER, Aôndo u akum a Sha, Una lu a ven, er ne kaan la ye." 
Amos5:15 Kôr nen kwaghbo ihom man kwaghdedoo a̱ doo ne ishima; rumun nen ijirôron i mimi hen hundagar; shin alaghga TER, Aôndo u akum a Sha, Una zungwe asande a Yosev a a shi her la mhôônom." 
Amos5:16 Nahan yô, TER, Aôndo u akum a Sha, Ter, ngu kaan nahan er: Mliam maa lu sha ityembe cii; sha igbenda cii á kaa er: Kpe ahii! Kpe ahii! Vea yila orsule sha u nana̱ va zungwe, man mbafankwelegh er ve̱ gber kwelegh." 
Amos5:17 Ken ishule i ikon i wain cii kpaa, á vaa mliam; gadia Me kar ne her atô, ka ape TER A kaa ne." 
Amos5:18 Kwagh á tser ne, ne mba i sar ne pe iyange i TER ma i ve yô. Ka nyi i sar ne pe zuan a iyange i TERE? Ia lu ime, ia lu iwanger ga." 
Amos5:19 Ka er or yevese begha, dwem gema zua a nan; shin nan nyôr ken iyou nan tuur uwegh ken kpekpe, iyô i gema i nyuma nan." 
Amos5:20 Iyange i TER ia lu ime je, ia kera lu iwanger ga, een, á lu angôghime, ma iwanger ia lu ker ga." 
Amos5:21 M kôr uiniongo enev ihom, M laha ve, uicighanmbamkohol vev kpaa ve doom ishima ga." 
Amos5:22 Een, shin er ne nem iniav mbi nanden man iniav mbi sha samuyia, nahan kpaa Me ngohol mbi ga; iniav mbi bem mbi ne ne sha uzendenya enev mba wan ahôm la kpaa Me kera ver ishima sha mi ga." 
Amos5:23 Karem a ayôôso a atsam a ou kera; gadia mkoho u umolo ou la kpaa, M soo u ungwan ga." 
Amos5:24 Kpa ijirôron i mimi i̱ kuwa er ka mngerem nahan, man perapera kpaa er ka uwagh u tôndon ga nahan." 
Amos5:25 Ne vam a iniav mbi sôngon man mbi sha samuyia ken desereti anyom akunduahar la kpa, we ya u Iserael?" 
Amos5:26 Een, né tôô Sakuti tor wen man Kaiwan ieev yenev, ishan i aôndo wen, u ne er sha ci wen la." 
Amos5:27 Nahan yô, Me yem a ven uikangen kar Damaseku yem ken hemen, kape TER A kaa ne, Wen u iti Na i lu Aôndo u akum a Sha la." 
Amos6:1 Kwagh á tser ve mba ve tem ken Shion ve hee iyol inya, man mba ve tem sha uwo u Samaria bem bem, ashagbaior a ken nongo u hemban ken akuraior cii, ka ve mba ya u Iserael a ve her a ve la!" 
Amos6:2 Kar za nen ken Kalne, za nenge nen; keela kpa kar za nen hen Hamati u vesen, shi sen nen hen Gati u Mbafiliti; ve hemba doon a ityartor nginii? Shin tar ve hemba gbanger a tar wene?" 
Amos6:3 Ne mba ne kper a iyange i bo ken hemen ca, man ne kporom a ikônough ki torough ki iperagh ikua ne!" 
Amos6:4 Mba ve yaven sha ugambe mba sha anyianor, man ve naregh ayol a ve sha ugambe; mba ve ye agumabua a ken ikumuile man agumabua a ken ityôr;" 
Amos6:5 mba ve we atsam a gbilinigh sha imo a adiguve; mba ve dugh mbamhen sha u eren ityougholov er Davidi nahan; 
Amos6:6 mba ve me wain shin ikuca man ve shigh ayol a ve mkurem ma hemban doon, kpa ishima kera vihi ve sha ci u mvihi u i vihi Yosev kera la ga!" 
Amos6:7 Nahan yô, á yem a ve uikangen, vea lu mbahiihii mba á yem a ve uikangen la; ishar i haan iyol i mba i lu ve iyol yagh yagh la ia kar kera." 
Amos6:8 Ter AÔNDO bum uma Na; TER, Aôndo u akum a Sha, ngu kaan nahan er: Iyolgengese i Yakob ndôhôr Mo ishima, M kôr ayou a na a tor ihom; nahan Me tôô gar ne man akaa a a lu kimi cii, Me na kera." 
Amos6:9 Tsô aluer ior pue vea shi ken iyou i môm yô, vea kpe." 
Amos6:10 Man zum u anter u orkpen la, u una nande nan la, una tôô nan sha u duen a akuhe ken iyou la kera, man una pine or u nan lu shin atô u iyou la er: Orgen shi ngu a we imôngo kere? Nana gema á kaa er: Ei; nahan uhiihii la una kaa er: Huan ving, gadia doo u sé ter iti i TER ga." 
Amos6:11 Gadia, nenge TER na zwa, nahan á ta sha zegeyou, á yôhôl un, man iyou i kiriki kpaa á hembe i avur avur." 
Amos6:12 Anyinya nga nyôngoso sha avandaa? Or tsôghol zegemnger sha ibua? Kpa ne gema ijirôron i mimi i hingir megh man atam a perapera hingir kon u yuwan; 
Amos6:13 ne mba ne ember Lodebar (gbilinkwagh), mba ne kaan ner: Kera ka sha agee ase se ngohol Karnaim (akor) ga?" 
Amos6:14 Gadia, nenge, Me na ikurior ia hendan a we, we, ya u Iserael, kape TER, Aôndo u akum a Sha, A kaa ne; ia er ne ican, á hii hen gbenda u karen zan Hamati zan zan á za ar hen uwagh u Araba la je." 
Amos7:1 Ter AÔNDO tesem nahan: yô, nenge A haa ikomon sha mhii u mhem u toho u masetyô, ka toho u u hem zum u tor vande tôndon u kera la." 
Amos7:2 Tsô zum u ve bee u yan toho hen tar la yô, nahan m kaa mer: Tere, AÔNDO, shi de se kwaghbo; Yakob una er nan man una tilee? Gadia a ndahar." 
Amos7:3 TER gema ishima sha kwagh la. Á kera lu nahan ga, kape TER A kaa la." 
Amos7:4 Ter AÔNDO tesem nahan: yô, nenge Ter AÔNDO yila usu sha u tsahan sha u; u hia iv i zan tsung la, maa u hia tar kpaa." 
Amos7:5 Nahan m kaa mer: Tere, AÔNDO, shi de; Yakob una er nan man una tilee? Gadia a ndahar." 
Amos7:6 TER gema ishima sha kwagh la. Ngun kpaa una kera lu nahan ga, kape Ter AÔNDO A kaa la." 
Amos7:7 A tesem nahan: yô, nenge Ter tile hen kpekpe u i maa un sha kor u sôron kwagh a min sha u a̱ lu jighilaa man lu a kor u sôron kwagh a mi sha uwegh Nagh kpaa." 
Amos7:8 TER shi kaa a mo er: Amoshi, ka nyi u nenge a mini? M kaa mer: Ka kor u sôron kwagh a mi. Nahan Ter kaa er: Nenge, veren Yam kor u sôron kwagh a mi ken atô u ior Av, Iserael; kera den Yam ve je ga;" 
Amos7:9 ajiir a taven sha a Isaka la, aa hingir atse, man uicighanmbaajiiriv mba Iserael la kpaa, vea yôhôl; Me mough Me ta num sha ya u Yerobiam sha sanker." 
Amos7:10 Tsô, Amashia pristi u ken Betel, tindi hen Yerobiam tor u Iserael, kaa er: Amoshi ngu zuan zwa sha a we ken atô ya u Iserael; kera doo tar u ungwan akaaôron a na la ga." 
Amos7:11 Gadia Amoshi ngu kaan nahan er: Á wua Yerobiam sha sanker je, man Iserael kpaa á kura un ken tar na kera, á yem a na uikangen je." 
Amos7:12 Nahan Amashia kaa a Amoshi er: We ornengen ne, yem za yer ken tar u Yuda, ka keregh ú za ya kwaghyan shi ú ôr kwaghôron u profeti kpaa ye," 
Amos7:13 kpa de kera shi er kwaghôron u profeti ken Betel ga, gadia ka icighanjiir u tor, man ka ya u tor kpaa." 
Amos7:14 Tsô Amoshi gema kaa a Amashia er: Mo yô, m lu profeti ga, shin wan u profeti kpaa ga; kpa m lu orkuranilev man orsôron ikon i tur;" 
Amos7:15 TER tôôm pe m lu zan a ikumuile ityô la, man TER kaa a mo er: Za za ôr kwaghôron u profeti sha ior Av Iserael." 
Amos7:16 Nahan yô, ungwa ase kwaghôron u TER, U ngu kaan wer: De kera er kwaghôron u profeti sha Iserael ga, de kera ôron kwagh sha ya u Isaka kpaa ga;" 
Amos7:17 nahan yô, TER ngu kaan nahan er: Kwase wou una hingir idyakwase ken gar, ônov ou mba nomso man mba kasev á wua ve sha sanker, sule wou kpaa á kar kwar a mi sha kor u karen kwagh a min; we iyol you kpaa ú kpe ken tar u hôngorough, Iserael kpaa á kura un ken tar na kera, á yem a na uikangen." 
Amos8:1 Ter AÔNDO tesem nahan: yô, nenge, ikese i atamaikon a inyom." 
Amos8:2 Tsô A kaa er: Amoshi, ka nyi u nenge a mi? M kaa mer: Ka ikese i atamaikon a inyom. Tsô TER shi kaa a mo er: Mkur va sha ior Av Iserael; kera den Yam ve je ga." 
Amos8:3 Atsam a wan a ken tempel aa hingir mliam sha iyange la, kape Ter AÔNDO A kaa ne; akom aa ngee; hanma ijiir kpaa i de haan a ga! huan ving!" 
Amos8:4 Ungwa nen kwagh ne, ne mba ne ndyaren mbaibanave shin angahar, man ne tim mbaatsanev ken tar kera," 
Amos8:5 ne kaan ner: Ka hanma shighe uwer u he ne ua bee sha er sé tee samuyiaa? Man iyange i memen kpaa sha er sé tee kasua u alakema? sha u sé hide a efa ijime man geman kehen shekel a kehe, man sha u nyighen ior sha ikaren i icughugh;" 
Amos8:6 sha u sé yam atsanaior sha azurfa man oribanave sha kweakôvough môm man sha u teen akoo a alakema. 
Amos8:7 TER bum icivir i Yakob er: Mimi je, mayange ma ieren ve i môm ia hungul Mo ga." 
Amos8:8 Tar ua kera tenger sha kwagh ne ga, man hanma or u nan tem ken u kpaa nana kera zungwe gaa? Een, u cii ua mough sha, er ifi u Nil nahan; á tenger u shi ua songor er ifi u Igipiti nahan." 
Amos8:9 Tsô sha iyange la, kape Ter AÔNDO A kaa ne: Me er iyange ia mire iyange sha tembe, Me wa tar ime atetan." 
Amos8:10 Me gema uiniongo enev vea hingir ijungwen, atsam a en cii kpaa aa hingir kwelegh; Me na hanma or nana lu a ikondo uya man hanma ityough kia kpul; Me na ia hingir er ka mliam ma vaan wannomso u môm môm nahan, man mkur u i kpaa er ka sha iyange i vihin ishima tsung nahan." 
Amos8:11 Nenge, ayange nga van, kape Ter AÔNDO A kaa ne, a Me tindi ijen shin tar, kpa á lu ijen i kwaghyan shin imura i mnger ga, kpa á lu sha u ungwan kwaghôron u TER." 
Amos8:12 Vea zende hii hen zegemnger ne yem hen zegemnger ugen man hii hen imbusutarimese yem sha ityoughkitaregh; vea zende hurugh hurugh sha u keren kwaghôron u TER, kpa vea zua a mi ga." 
Amos8:13 Sha iyange la anuunaukase a doon ashe man mbayevikaior vea hume sha ci u imura. 
Amos8:14 Mba ve bumun kwaghbo u Samaria, mba ve kaan er: Er Aôndo wen a lu uma yô, we Dan; man shi: Er gbenda u yemen Bersheba u lu uma yô; vea gba, mayange vea kera mough sha ga." 
Amos9:1 M nenge TER tile hen kpe atse a nanden nagh sha mi; man A kaa er: Gbidye uindyuruku mba mtô zan zan amagh a̱ tenger; hembe ve avur avur sha ityouv mbi ior mbala cii; mba ve shi her yô, Me wua ve sha sanker, mô ve môm nana nyôngoso ga, mô ve môm kpaa nana war ga." 
Amos9:2 Shin vea time vea ar shin Sheol je kpaa, uwegh Agh kua za due a ve shimi; shin vea unde sha aôndo je kpaa, Me tôô ve shaala Me hide a ve shin inya." 
Amos9:3 Shin vea za yer sha ityough ki Karmel kpaa, Me tôv, Me za hungwa a ve sha her; shin vea yer ishigh Yagh shin atô u zegemnger kpaa, Me kaa iyô her, ia nyuma ve." 
Amos9:4 Shin vea yem uikangen sha ishigh ki mbaihomov vev kpaa, shi Me kaa sanker her una wua ve; Me ver ashe sha a ve sha u eren ve kwagh u bo, á kera lu kwagh u dedoo ga." 
Amos9:5 Gadia Ter AÔNDO u akum a Sha, ka Un u ka A bende a tar ve, u sough ne, man mba ve tem sha mi cii ve zungwe; u cii, u mough er ifi u Nil nahan, shi u songor er ifi u Igipiti nahan;" 
Amos9:6 u A maa ukpombaayoughouv Nav Sha, man A ver kwavaôndo Na suur shin tar; Un ka A yila mngerem ma zegemnger, A haa ma sha tar, TER, ka iti Na je la." 
Amos9:7 Ne kera mbam er ônov mba Etiopia nahan gaa, ne ônov mba Iserael? Kape TER A kaa ne, M due a Iserael ken tar u Igipiti man Mbafiliti ken Kafetor man Mbashiria ken Kir gaa?" 
Amos9:8 Yô, nenge, ashe a Ter AÔNDO nga sha tartor u bo la, Me tim u sha tar kera; saa ya u Yakob tseegh Me tim un ci ca ga ye, ka ape TER A kaa ne." 
Amos9:9 Gadia, nenge, Me na zwa, Me yegher ya u Iserael ken akuraior cii, er ka i yegher uwua sha tser nahan, nahan kpaa ishange i môm ia gba inya ga." 
Amos9:10 Á wua mbaasorabo mba ken ior Av cii sha sanker, ve mba ve kaan er: Kwagh u bo una tser se ga, una kohol se kpaa ga." 
Amos9:11 Sha iyange la Me mough a ityumbe i Davidi i lu i yôhôl la sha, Me maa ajiir a na a hemben; Me mough a atse a na sha, Me shi Me maa un er sha ayange a tsuaa la nahan;" 
Amos9:12 sha u ve̱ ngohol asande a Edom a a shi her man akuraior a i yer a sha iti Yam cii, kape TER u A er kwagh ne, A kaa la." 
Amos9:13 Nenge, ayange nga van, kape TER A kaa ne, a orkahan nana kohol orsundan man or u shoghol wain kpaa nana kohol ortanivor; iwo ia nôndo wain, je á kuwa inya sha agungu cii." 
Amos9:14 Shi Me dugh ior Av Iserael ken uikangen kera, shi vea maa agar a lu i yôhôl la, vea tema ker; vea kaha ishule i wain man vea ma zar na; shi vea kaha ishule i atamaikon vea ya atam a ker kpaa." 
Amos9:15 Me môôr ve ken tar ve, á kera wuhe ve ken tar ve u M ne ve la kera mayange ga, kape TER, Aôndo wou, A kaa ne." 
Obadiah1:1 Ka mpase u sha mnenge u Obadia ne: Ter AÔNDO ngu kaan sha kwagh u Edom nahan er: Se ungwa loho hen TER, i tindi ortyom hen akuraior er: Mough nen sha, sé za nôngo nen ityav a na." 
Obadiah1:2 Nenge, M gema u u hingir kpeghee ken akuraior; mba lahan we tsung." 
Obadiah1:3 Imanger i ken ishima you la, tsugh u, we u u tem ken ihighaavande, we u ijiir i teman you i tav sha ne, u u kaan ken ishima you wer: Ka an nana hungwa a mo shin inyaa?" 
Obadiah1:4 Shin er u yem sha je er gafa nahan, shin er u we iya you sha asan je nahan kpaa, ka sha her je Me hungwa a we shin inya ye, kape TER A kaa ne." 
Obadiah1:5 Aluer mbaiv vea va her a we, shin mbanumungbenda tugh— nenge, er i tim u kera yô!— vea kera ii kwagh zan zan á kuma ve tsô gaa? Aluer mbasundan atam a wain vea va hen a we yô, vea kera shi kwagh her, á yar twar gaa?" 
Obadiah1:6 Nenge er i ker ikav mbi Isou vighe vighe yô! Man nenge er i ker akaa a na a injaa a i koso a ken myer la! 
Obadiah1:7 Mbawasen we la cii ve tsugh u, ve zenda u zan zan ar ken ikighirtar; mba ve tem bem a we ve tsugh u, ve hemba u kpaa; mba ve ye kwaghyan wou la, ve hôn u ityambelegh— mkav kpaa ngu ken a na ga." 
Obadiah1:8 TER kaa er: Sha iyange la Me kera tim mbafankwagh ken Edom man mkav kpaa sha uwo u Isou kera gaa? 
Obadiah1:9 Iyol ia kpe anomaior a ou, Teman, zan zan á wua hanmô ve sha uwo u Isou, á tim ve kera." 
Obadiah1:10 Sha ci u ipilakwagh u i er anngôu Yakob la, kunya ua kôr u, man á tim u sha won kera." 
Obadiah1:11 Sha iyange i u tile her sha iyol i palegh, sha iyange i atôatyev va kura inyaregh nagh, man atôatyev nyôr sha ihinda na, ve er ishor sha Yerusalem la, we, u lu er u môm ken a ve nahan." 
Obadiah1:12 De kenger anngôu a iember sha iyange i ican na ga; man de ember nen sha iyange i mtim u ônov mba Yuda ga; man shi de er kwagh sha imanger sha iyange i kwagh a tser ve la ga. 
Obadiah1:13 De nyer sha hundagar u ior Av sha iyange i bocan ve la ga; een, de kenger ve a iember zum u ican tser ve sha iyange i bocan ve la ga; man shi de ze uwegh sha ikav vev sha iyange i bocan ve la ga." 
Obadiah1:14 De til sha akahar a gbenda, sha u wuan ior nav mba ve yevese la ga; man shi de ne mbawaren nav sha ikev i mbaihomov sha iyange i ican la ga." 
Obadiah1:15 Gadia iyange i TER mgbôghom sha akuraior cii; er u er nahan, kape we di kpaa á er a we je la; ieren you ia hire sha ityough you." 
Obadiah1:16 Gadia er ne me sha icighanwo Wam nahan, kape akuraior cii aa maan gbem la; een, aa maan aa menan je aa hingir er nga a vande lun sha won ga yô." 
Obadiah1:17 Kpa sha uwo u Shion yô, á zua a mbawaren, ua hingir icighanjiir; man ya u Yakob kpaa una shi á ngohol tar na." 
Obadiah1:18 Ya u Yakob una hingir usu, ya u Yosev kpaa una lu nombor usu, ya u Isou yô, una lu ayia, vea yegh ker vea hia a; ma kwagh á shi ken ya u Isou ga, gadia ka TER A kaa nahan ye." 
Obadiah1:19 Mba ken Imbusutariyan la vea ngohol uwo u Isou; man mba shin Pev kpaa vea ngohol Mbafiliti; vea ngohol tar u Eferaim man u Samaria, Benyamin kpaa una ngohol Gileadi." 
Obadiah1:20 Mbauikangenev mba ken ikum i Mbaiserael ne vea ngohol tar u Mbakanaan zan zan á za ar hen Sarefati; man mbaikangenev mba Yerusalem mba ve lu ken Sefaradi vea ngohol agar a ken Imbusutariyan la. 
Obadiah1:21 Mbayiman vea unde sha uwo u Shion sha u ôron uwo u Isou ijir; nahan tartor ua hingir u TER. 
Jonah1:1 Kwaghôron u TER va hen Yona wan u Amitai kaa er: 
Jonah1:2 Mough sha, za hen Nineve, zegegar la, za ôr kwagh sha a na, gadia iferkwagh ve kôndo ar her a Mo." 
Jonah1:3 Kpa Yona mough sha u yevese ishigh ki TER yemen hen Tarshishi; a sen shin Yopa, a za zua a tso u zan Tarshishi; nahan a kimbi injar, a nyôr ker, sha u yemen a ve hen Tarshishi, lu yevese ishigh ki TER." 
Jonah1:4 Kpa TER tindi zegeahumbe sha zegemnger, nahan zegeuraahumbe ta sha zegemnger, zan zan tso gba nôngon u hemben." 
Jonah1:5 Tsô mbatsoov gba cian, hanmô ve gba yilan aôndo u nan; ve gba haan ikav mbi mbi lu ken tso la shin zegemnger, sha u vea heghem un yô. Kpa Yona vande nyôron shin atô u tso la je, za yav shimi gba mnyam mem mem." 
Jonah1:6 Nahan orvesen u tso la va hen na, kaa a na er: Ka nyi mnya u yav nahana? Mough sha, yila Aôndo wou, alaghga Aôndo la Una umbur se er sé kera tim ga yô." 
Jonah1:7 Tsô ve kaa ayol a ve er: Va sé er nen ishor sha u sé fa or u nan ne man kwagh u bo ne a tser se yô. Nahan ve er ishor, ishor kôr Yona." 
Jonah1:8 Tsô ve kaa a na er: Shi kaa se, ka an nan ne ican ne i tser se nahana? Ka nyi tom u erene, man ka han u dughu? Tar wou ka unô? Ka hanma ikurior u lu?" 
Jonah1:9 A kaa a ve er: Mo m ngu Orheberu, man m ngu cian TER, Aôndo u Sha, u A gbe zegemnger man tar." 
Jonah1:10 Nahan cier ior mbala iyol kpishi, ve kaa a na er: Ka nyi u er nahana? Gadia ior mbala fa er a lu yevese ishigh ki TER yô, sha ci u a vande ôron ve." 
Jonah1:11 Tsô ve pine un er: Sé er a we nana, sha er zegemnger una tile se ving? Gadia zegemnger lu kpianger zan a za hemen." 
Jonah1:12 A kaa a ve er: Tôôm, gbihim nen shin zegemnger, tsô zegemnger una tile ne ving; gadia m fa ka sha ci wam man zegeuraahumbe ne, a tser ne ye." 
Jonah1:13 Nahan kpaa ior mbala lu nahan sha gbashima sha u vea ar sha kpetar yô, kpa ve fatyô ga, gadia zegemnger lu kpianger a ve zan a za hemen." 
Jonah1:14 Nahan ve vaa a TER, ve kaa er: TERE, shi de timin se sha ci u uma u or ne ga, man de ne ike i awambe a orishôôgh i̱ kôr se ga; gadia TERE, We, U er kwagh u a doo U yô." 
Jonah1:15 Tsô ve tôô Yona ve gbihi shin zegemnger; zegemnger maa huan ving. 
Jonah1:16 Nahan ior mbala seer cian TER tsung; ve na TER nagh ku sôngon, ve tsegha zwa kpaa." 
Jonah1:17 Yô, TER vande veren zegeishu sha u a̱ mena Yona; nahan Yona tsa ken iyav mbu ishu ayange atar man aime di atar." 
Jonah2:1 Tsô Yona sôn TER, Aôndo na, ken iyav mbu ishu." 
Jonah2:2 A kaa er: M yila TER ken ican yam ne, man A ungwa imo yam; m genger imo ken iyav mbu Sheol je, U ungwa imo yam kpaa." 
Jonah2:3 Gadia U gbihim shin iv, shin sema u uzegembamngerev; mngerem ma saren avenge kasem tser; agôndoamnger a Ou man uiwuha Ou cii ve uvem." 
Jonah2:4 Tsô m kaa mer: I gbihim sha ishigh You kera; nahan kpaa shi me kenger icighantempel wou. 
Jonah2:5 Mngerem ma kpishim kasem je, ar hen uma wam; iv kasem tser; uidyagh kpelegh mo sha ityou." 
Jonah2:6 M mire zan zan m ar shin atô a iwoogh; uishindan mba tar wuhem kera gbem sha won; nahan kpa U dugh uma wam shin ihungwa, TERE, Aôndo wam." 
Jonah2:7 Zum u uma wam hume ken a mo yô, m umbur TER; msen wam kpaa za nyôr her a We ken icighantempel Wou." 
Jonah2:8 Mba ve civir akombo a gbilinigh yô, ve undu Un u A zungu ve mhôônom la." 
Jonah2:9 Kpa mo yô, me na U nagh sha imo i ishughun; kwagh u m tsegh zwa sha mi la yô, me er. Myom ka u TER je." 
Jonah2:10 Tsô TER ôr kwagh a ishu la, nahan i za suwa Yona sha tar." 
Jonah3:1 Tsô kwaghôron u TER shi va hen Yona sha kwa har, kaa er:" 
Jonah3:2 Mough, za hen Nineve zegegar la, za pase un kwagh u Me kaa u ne." 
Jonah3:3 Nahan Yona mough za hen Nineve, sha imo i TER. Nineve lu zegegar tsung je, kuma zende u ayange atar." 
Jonah3:4 Yona hii u nyôron ken gar, a zende zende u iyange i môm, a genger imo, a kaa er: Shi ayange akunduahar tsô á yôhôl Nineve ne." 
Jonah3:5 Ior i Nineve gema na Aôndo jighjigh; nahan ve yôô kwaghyan u hôron man ve ta akondo uya, hii hen mbavesen vev zan zan ar hen mbakiriki." 
Jonah3:6 Loho la za ar hen tor u Nineve kpaa, nahan a mough sha ikônough nagh ki torough kera, a er riga na, a ta ikondo uya, a za tema shin mtwe." 
Jonah3:7 A kaa, i yôô ken gar u Nineve cii sha tindi u tor man ashagba a na er: Or shin zendenya, ibua shin iyôngo, ve̱ de benden ma kwagh zwa ga, ve̱ de kera ye kwagh ga, mngerem kpaa ve̱ de me ga;" 
Jonah3:8 or kua zendenya cii, ve̱ ta ikondo uya, ve̱ genger imo taver taver ve vaa a Aôndo; een, hanmô ve nana̱ gema ishima, nana̱ undu gbenda u nan u bo kua ipila i i lu nan sha ave la." 
Jonah3:9 Ka an nan fe er alaghga Aôndo Una gema awashima Na man Una hide a iyugh Na ijime sha u se̱ de timin ga yôô? 
Jonah3:10 Aôndo nenge aeren a ve er ve gema ishima ve undu gbenda ve u bo la, nahan Aôndo de kwagh u bo u A wa ishima u eren ve la; A kera er un ga." 
Jonah4:1 Kpa kwagh ne vihi Yona ishima tsung, je a yuwe." 
Jonah4:2 Tsô A sôn TER, a kaa er: TERE, ka kwagh u iyange m vande kaan, je er m lu ken tar wam la gaa? Ka nahan man iyange m gba yevese yemen Tarshishi ye; gadia m fa er U lu Aôndo u mhôônom ma ker U man u zungu mhôônom, U wan ishima, man U ngee a erdoo, man U deen ifer kpaa." 
Jonah4:3 Nahan yô, TERE, ma U shi ngohol uma wam her a mo kera tsô, gadia guda u me kpe a u m lu uma her." 
Jonah4:4 Nahan TER kaa er: Ishima vihi u sha inja je kpa? 
Jonah4:5 Tsô Yona due ken gar kera, a za tema gar vegher u sha ityoughkitaregh, a er antyumbe na her, a tema ken mure na sha u una nenge kwagh u una er gar la yô." 
Jonah4:6 Tsô TER Aôndo er ishilajôngo i mende i kar Yona sha, sha u i̱ va gba un mure sha ityou yô, sha u yiman un sha ishimavihin na la. Nahan doo Yona kpishi sha ci u ishilajôngo la." 
Jonah4:7 Kpa kper nan pepe dindee nahan, TER na ivungu, nyôr ya ishilajôngo la, maa use." 
Jonah4:8 Tsô zum u iyange due yô, Aôndo na ahumbe a tseen a sha ityoughkitaregh va; nahan iyange ta Yona sha ityou, zan zan a hume, a tôm er ma un kpe, a kaa er: Guda u me kpe a u me lu uma her." 
Jonah4:9 Tsô Aôndo gema kaa a Yona er: Ishima vihi u sha ci u kon u ishilajôngo, ka sha inja je kpa? Tsô a kaa er: Ishima vihim ka sha inja je, i vihim zan zan ar ken ku je." 
Jonah4:10 Tsô TER kaa er: We yô, sar u ka ishilajôngo i̱ war, i u er tom sha mi ga, u ne i mvese kpaa ga, i i mende tugh môm shi i saa ishe tugh môm la;" 
Jonah4:11 man Mo ma M kera war Nineve ga yee? Zegegar ne u ior ve iv kimi je, ve hembe dubu deri môm man dubu ikundu, mba ve fe mkposo u uwegh vegh ku yanegh a ku imesegh ga, man shi uzendenya mba keregh kpishi kpaa." 
Micah1:1 Kwaghôron u TER u a va hen Mika Ormoresheti sha ayange a Yotam man Ahashi man Hesekia, utor mba Yuda, u a nenge sha kwagh u Samaria man Yerusalem yô." 
Micah1:2 Ungwa nen, ne ior cii; ver ato, we tar man akaa a a lu ken u cii; Ter AÔNDO A̱ lu shiada u hendan a ven, Ter ken icighantempel Na je." 
Micah1:3 Gadia, nenge, TER ngu duen hen ijiir Na, Una hungwa, Una ndyar sha ajiir a taven sha a tar la." 
Micah1:4 Iwo ia sough shin angahar a Na, apev kpaa aa pav ikwe, er ikpayough ka i sough sha usu nahan, man er mngerem ma i ur shin ijiir i tingir nahan." 
Micah1:5 Ka sha ci u atindi a peren a Yakob man akaa ne cii a lu nahan ye, man sha ci u asorabo a ya u Iserael kpaa. Ka nyi i lu atindi a peren a Yakobo? Kera ka Samaria gaa? Man ajiir a taven sha a Yuda yee? Kera ka Yerusalem gaa?" 
Micah1:6 Nahan yô, Me gema Samaria una hingir tihialôgh ken ikôngo, ijiir i kahan sule u ikon i wain; Me menger awen a na a̱ haa shin pev; Me er amagh a na a̱ due sha." 
Micah1:7 Ieev nav mbi gban a gba cii, á hembe mbi avur avur, man injar na i sha idya la cii á nande i sha usu, Me gema ieev nav cii, mbia hingir ice; gadia ka sha injar i agbaga a kohol mbi ye, man shi mbia hide hen injar i agbaga kpaa." 
Micah1:8 Sha ci u kwagh ne yô, me gber kwelegh me vaa, me zende angahar gbilin man idyelegh; me vaa, me er ikenge er ugbaseela nahan, me er imo er ukonkofi nahan." 
Micah1:9 Gadia avav a na ka a been ga, man a ar hen Yuda je, a ar hen hunda u ior av, ka hen Yerusalem je la." 
Micah1:10 De er kwagh ne ken Gati ga, de vaan ciôn kpaa ga; vingir nen iyol shin vuulevu hen Betele-afera." 
Micah1:11 Kar yem nen, ne mba ne tem ken Shafir, yem nen idyelegh man a kunya; mba ve tem ken Saanan la, ve due ga; mliam ma Bete-esel maa ngohol ijiir yen i tilen her la kera." 
Micah1:12 Gadia mba ve tem ken Maroti mba keghen abaver a dedoo tsung, gadia kwagh u bo sen sha TER va hen hunda u Yerusalem." 
Micah1:13 Zer nen anyinya a yevese tsung la ikyekye i utya, ne mba ne tem ken Lakishi; ka un a lu ityôkwagh i mhii u isholibo i wankwase u Shion ye; gadia ka ken a we i zough a atindi a peren a Iserael ye." 
Micah1:14 Nahan yô, ú na Morasheti-gati iwua i paven a na; uya mba Akishibi vea hingir utor mba Iserael icughkwagh." 
Micah1:15 Van Yam we a or u nana ngohol we, we u u tem ken Maresha; icivir i Iserael ia va hen Adulam je." 
Micah1:16 Kpur nen ityough, tôndo nen ice sha ci u mbayev ou mba ishima ishima la; kpur ityough i̱ gbanger er apu nahan, gadia ve due hen a we, á yem a ve uikangen." 
Micah2:1 Kwagh á tser mba ve henen iferkwagh man ve we ago iyol u eren kwagh u bo sha ugambe vev la! Er sev a av yô, ve kure kwagh la kpaa, sha ci u a lu ken tahav mbu ave ve yô." 
Micah2:2 Ve tôm ishule man ve ngohol i sha apera, kua ayou kpaa, ve ngohol a kpaa; ka ve nzughul a or kua ya u nan, man a or kua dyako u nan kpaa." 
Micah2:3 Nahan yô, TER ngu kaan nahan er: Nenge, Me hen kwagh u bo sha tsombor ne, u nea fatyô u dughun imon yen ker kera ga yô, man nea kera zende sha imanger kpaa ga, gadia shighe la á lu u bo je." 
Micah2:4 Sha iyange la vea dugh ishor sha a ven, vea gber kwelegh, vea kaa er: Se saa ishe puru; A gema dyako u ior av A na ior mbagenev; nenge, er A pav un a mo yô! A kar mbaahendanev ishule yase." 
Micah2:5 Nahan yô, ú kera zua a ma or u nan samber kor u karen kwar ken mkohol u ior i TER ga." 
Micah2:6 De kera er kwaghôron u profeti ga, kape uprofeti ve kaan la. De kera er kwaghôron u profeti teren akaa angan ga; aheen nga been ga." 
Micah2:7 Doo u kaan kwagh ne kpa, we ya u Yakob, Jijingi u TER ngu a ishima i wan je gaa? Ka aeren a Na nee? Mkaanem Am ma ne mkpeyol hen or u nan zenden zende u jighilaa gaa?" 
Micah2:8 Kpa ayange kar je, ior Av ve mough er mbaihomov nahan; ne tuse ikondo i cirin iyol sha riga u mba ve karen bem bem mba ve we ityav ken ishima ga yô." 
Micah2:9 Ne mba zende kasev mba ior Av ken uya vev mba doon ve la kera; ne mba ngohol icivir Yam hen ônov vev mba kiriki kera gbem sha won. 
Micah2:10 Mough sha, yem nen, gadia ka ijiir i memen ne ga; sha ci u i hôngor yô, ia va a mtim, ka mtim u vihin tsung je." 
Micah2:11 Aluer or nan ngu zendan ahumbe ityô man nana er aie nana kaa er: Me ôr u kwaghôron u uprofeti sha kwagh u wain man msôrom ma taver yô, or la ma nan lu profeti u ior mban." 
Micah2:12 Me kohol ne cii kpee je, we ya u Yakob, Me kohol asande a Iserael a a shi her la je, Me zua ve imôngo er iyôngo ken ityôr nahan man er ikumuile ken atô u ijiir ve i yan toho yô; á hura iuu sha mngee u ior." 
Micah2:13 Orbughun gbenda hemen ve; ve hembe, ve za hen hunda, ve nyôr tsula; tor ve kar hemen ve, man TER gema ngu ve sha hemen." 
Micah3:1 Shi m kaa mer: Shi ungwa nen, ne mbahemenev mba Yakob, man mbatarev mba hen ya u Iserael kpaa! Kera ka u ne̱ fa ijirôron i mimi gaa?—" 
Micah3:2 ne mba ne ker kwagh u dedoo ihom man kwagh u bo a gem a doo ne, ne mba ka ne hua ior kwavyolough kera, kua inyam ve kpaa sha akuhe a ve kera;" 
Micah3:3 ne mba ne ye inyam i ior Av, man ne hoo ve kwavyolough kera, man ne hembe ve akuhe, man ne tende ve avur avur er ka inyam shin itye nahan, man er inyam i shin kwese nahan." 
Micah3:4 Zum la vea vaa a TER, kpa Una wa ve iko ga; Una yer ve ishigh Nagh hen shighe la, sha ci u aferakaa a ve er la." 
Micah3:5 Kape TER A ôr sha kwagh u uprofeti mba ve ne ior Av icumen la, mba zum u ka vea nyuma kwagh sha anyi a ve, ve genger imo er: Bem; kpa u nan we ve kwaghyan ken zwa ga la, ve gema ve suwe ityav a nan." 
Micah3:6 Nahan yô, á hingir tugh her a ven, né kera lu a mpase ga, á hingir ime her a ven, né kera tsengafan kwagh ga; iyange ia mire uprofeti, sev kpaa mbua hingir ve ime." 
Micah3:7 Mbanengen mbampase vea va ahenge, man mbatsenganôron akaa kpaa, kunya á kôr ve; vea cir mbaakuzwa vev, gadia mrumun kera va sha Aôndo ga." 
Micah3:8 Kpa Mo yô, m iv a agee, sha Jijingi u TER kua mimi man tahav kpaa, sha u pasen Yakob atindi a peren a na man Iserael kpaa isholibo na ye." 
Micah3:9 Shi ungwa nen kwagh ne, ne mbahemenev mba hen ya u Yakob man mbatarev mba hen ya u Iserael, ne mba ijirôron i mimi i ndôhôr ne ishima, man ne gem ne vihin hanma kwagh u a lu jighilii," 
Micah3:10 ne mba ne maan Shion sha awambe, man Yerusalem di sha ifer." 
Micah3:11 Mbahemenev nav mba ôron ijir sha inyaregh ki ken myer, upristi nav kpaa mba tesen sha tôndo, man uprofeti nav mba ôron kwaghôron u profeti sha inyar; nahan kpaa mba suur sha TER, mba kaan er: TER ngu ken vese gaa? Ma kwagh u bo una tser se ga." 
Micah3:12 Nahan yô, á tsôghol Shion sha ci wen er sule nahan; Yerusalem una hingir atihi a alôgh, man uwo u ya u Aôndo ua hingir er agungu shin ikô nahan." 
Micah4:1 Kpa sha ayange a masetyô la, á ver uwo u ya u TER sha ityough ki iwoov, á kende a u sha, ua kar agungu; akuraior aa ur yemen her;" 
Micah4:2 akuraior kpishi aa za aa kaa er: Va nen, sé za nen sha uwo u TER, hen ya u Aôndo u Yakob, sha u Una tese se igbenda Na man sha u sea zenden sha igbenda Na kpaa; gadia ka ken Shion tindi una due ye, kua kwaghôron u TER kpaa, ken Yerusalem." 
Micah4:3 Una ôr ijir hen atô u ior kpishi, Una kure ijir i akuraior a taver a ken ica, aa gema usanker mba a, aa var indyuhar a mi, man awange a ve kpaa aa hingir ahô a sôron ikon a min; ma ikurior ia kera tsuwa sanker a ikur igen ga, man shi aa kera hen ityav kpaa ga." 
Micah4:4 Kpa hanmô ve nana tema shin itine i kon u wain u nan, man shin itine i kon u tur u nan, ma or nana kera ta ve mciem iyol ga; gadia ka zwa u TER u akum a Sha je, u kaa nahan ye." 
Micah4:5 Gadia ior cii mba zenden hanmô ve ken iti i aôndo u nan, man se yô, sé zende ken iti i TER, Aôndo wase, gbem sha won." 
Micah4:6 Sha iyange la, kape TER A kaa ne, Me kohol mbakeer man Me kohol mba i zende ve la, man mba m er ve ican kpaa la." 
Micah4:7 Mbakeer la, Me de ve vea lu asande a ior her, man mba i yem a ve kera ca la kpaa, vea hingir ikurior i ageegh; man TER Una tema tor sha a ve sha uwo u Shion, hii hegen je zan zan gbem sha won." 
Micah4:8 Uwe, gôgôyou u taven u ikumuile, igungu u wankwase u Shion, ka her a we ua va ye, een, tartor u tsuaa la ua va, ka tartor u wankwase u Yerusalem je la." 
Micah4:9 Hegen yô, ka sha ci u nyi u vaan taver taver nahana? Tor kera ngu ken a we je gaa? Orwasen we mhen kpe shinii, nahan ican tser u je er kwase u toghor mar yôô?" 
Micah4:10 Lu ken ican, toghor, we wankwase u Shion, er kwase u toghol mar nahan; gadia hegen duen you ken gar kera, ú yem zan zan hen Babilon je, ka ker á yima u, ka ker kpaa TER Una paa u sha ikev i mbaihomov ou ye." 
Micah4:11 Hegen yô, akuraior kpishi kohol num sha a we, mba kaan er: I̱ hôngor a na, ashe ase a̱ kenger Shion." 
Micah4:12 Kpa ve kera fa mhen u TER ga, man shi ve kav awashima Na kpaa ga; gadia A kohol ve er aile a uyia hen vande u gbiren iyiav nahan." 
Micah4:13 Mough sha, shoghol iyiav, we wankwase u Shion; gadia Me gema korough ough kua hingir iyôgh man apande a ou kpaa aa hingir togula; wea hembe ior kpishi avur avur, wea tsegha mtsera ve sha ci u TER man inyaregh vegh kpaa kia lu sha ci u TER u sha won cii." 
Micah5:1 Hegen yô, kohol akum akum, we wankwase u akumautya; i kase se sha utya; vea gbidye ortaregh u Iserael gbough sha henge." 
Micah5:2 Kpa we Betelehem-efarata, er u lu kpeghee ken ikwe i Yuda, nahan kpaa ka ken a we or una duem, u una lu Orkurantar ken Iserael ye, mdugh Na hii tsuaa je sha ayange a ngise ngise la." 
Micah5:3 Nahan yô, Una na ve kera zan zan shighe u un u toghol mar la una mar; nahan asande a anmgbianev Nav a a shi her la aa hide a Mbaiserael imôngo." 
Micah5:4 Tsô Una tile, Una koso ikumuile Na ken agee a TER, sha icivir i iti i TER, Aôndo Na; vea tema bem bem, gadia hegen Una hemba zan zan á za ar sha akighir a tar je." 
Micah5:5 Una lu bem; zum u Ashiria una nyôr ken tar wase, man zum u una ndyaren ayou a ase a tor, nahan sea ver mbakuranilev utaankaruhar man mbatarev ken ior anigheni, sha u eren num a na." 
Micah5:6 Vea kuran tar u Ashiria sha sanker kua tar u Nimrodi kpaa sha ajiir a nyôron ken u la; Una yima se sha ikev i Ashiria, zum u una va ken tar wase man una ndyar angahar ken tar wase la." 
Micah5:7 Asande a Yakob a a shi her la, aa lu ken atô u akuraior kpishi er avure a a dugh hen TER nahan, man er aber a ura sha toho nahan, a a keghen or ga, shin á ngôôr her sha ci u ônov mba iorov kpaa ga yô." 
Micah5:8 Asande a Yakob a a shi her la, aa lu ken akuraior, ken atô u ior kpishi, er begha a lu ken atô u inyamtoho nahan man er gumbegha ken atô u akum a iyôngo nahan, u zum u ka una nyôr ker yô, a ndyar, a tuse caver caver, man ma oryiman kpaa nan kera lu ga." 
Micah5:9 Á kende a uwegh ough sha, sha mbaahendanev ou, á tim mbaihomov ou kera cii." 
Micah5:10 Tsô sha ayange la, kape TER A kaa ne: Me tim anyinya a ou ken atô wou kera, man Me vihi akekeautya a ou kera;" 
Micah5:11 shi Me tim agar a ken tar wou, man Me yôhôl ajiir a taver a ou cii;" 
Micah5:12 Me tim mbaasorov ken uwegh ough kera, ú kera lu a mbaahiriv ken a we ga;" 
Micah5:13 Me tim ieev you mbi gban man mtôm ma awenem ou ken atô wou kera, ú kera gure tomaveegh wou inya ga." 
Micah5:14 Me wuhe Asherim wou ken atô wou kera; Me tim agar a ou. 
Micah5:15 Me or iyev sha iyugh man ishima i vihin sha akuraior a a ongo kwagh ga yô. 
Micah6:1 Yô, ungwa kwagh u TER A kaa hegen ne, er: Mough sha, yila ijir sha ishigh ki iwoogh, agungu kpaa a̱ ungwa imo you!" 
Micah6:2 Ungwa nen ijir i TER A yer yô, ne iwo, man ne amagh a taregh a tsan sha won, gadia TER ngu yilan ior Nav ijir, Una ôr Iserael ijir." 
Micah6:3 Ior Av, ka nyi M er ne? M za ne iyol sha nyi? Kaam nen." 
Micah6:4 Gadia ka Mo M dugh a ven ken tar u Igipiti ye, M paa ne ken ya u ikpan; M tindi Mose mer a̱ hemen ne, kua Aron man Miriam kpaa." 
Micah6:5 Ne ior Av, umbur nen ase kwagh u Balaki tor u Moabi ngise hen la, man kwagh u Balaam wan u Beor gema kaa a na la; shi kwagh u a er hii hen Shitim zan zan ar hen Gilgal la, sha u ne̱ fa aeren a perapera a TER yô." 
Micah6:6 Ka nyi me va a mi sha ishigh ki TERE, me va gure sha ishigh ki Aôndo u Sha? M̱ va sha ishigh Nagh a iniav mbi nanden, agumabua a a kom inyom i mômôô?" 
Micah6:7 Á doo TER a anomaiyôngo udubuu? Shin uifi mba mkurev udubu puee? M̱ na waniunda wam sha ci u tindi wam u peren, tsombor wam sha ci u isholibo i uma wama?" 
Micah6:8 Yô, A tese u, kwagh u dedoo, we or; tsô ka nyi TER A keren her a we, saa u eren kwagh u mimi man u soon u zungwen mhôônom, man u hiden a iyol ijime er u zenden vea Aôndo wou la gaa?" 
Micah6:9 Imo i TER ngi yilan gar, u cian iti You ka mfe u mimi; wa nen gbidiv iko kua Un u A ver mbu la." 
Micah6:10 Inyaregh ki iferegh shi ki ken iyou i mbaaferev kua ikaren u yinan u a lu a ifan iyol la kpaa gaa? 
Micah6:11 Aluer Mea rumun uikaren mba aiev, man iba u a iv a uikaren mba icughugh kpaa yô, shi Me lu wang je kpa?" 
Micah6:12 Gadia mbanyarev mba ve lu keregh la ve mgbough a ipila, man mba ve tem ker kpaa ve er mbaaie, nombor u ken zwa ve iv a icugh." 
Micah6:13 Nahan yô, Mo kpaa M tsaha u sha uange; M gema u u hingir ice sha ci u asorabo a ou." 
Micah6:14 Ú ya, kpa á kuma u ga, ijen ia lu u ken atô; ú kura kwagh, kpa ú war a mi ga; man kwagh u ú yem a mi la kpaa, Me gema Me na sanker." 
Micah6:15 Ú lôô, kpa ú sunda ga; ú shoghol atam a olev, kpa ú ishi mkurem nam ga; ú shoghol atam a wain, kpa ú ma zar na ga." 
Micah6:16 Gadia mba eren sha atindi a Omri kua sha aeren a hen ya u Ahaba cii, man ne mba zenden sha mbamhen vev; sha u Me gema u u̱ hingir ice, man mba ve tem ker kpaa ve̱ hingir kwagh u̱ gbiren iwer a min; nea tôô iheen i ior Av kpaa." 
Micah7:1 Kpe ahii! Gadia m hingir er shighe u i vande kohol atam a ikon a fam kera, er twar u yaren sha atam a ikon i wain nahan; sumegh ku atam a wain ku yan, kera ku ga, shin ityamegh ki tur ki tsutswa ki ki sarem yum la kpaa ki ga." 
Micah7:2 Ormimi saa ishe hen tar kera, man orperapera kera ngu ken ior ga; ve cii mba yeren, keghen u haan awambe inya; hanma or nan ngu nôngon u kôron anngô u nan ken kper." 
Micah7:3 Ave ve wa iyol u eren kwagh u ifer a ishima i môm; ortaregh ka a sôn, man orjirigh kpaa ka a wa iyol sha u zuan a inyaregh ki ken myer; zegeor ka a due a isharen i dang i ken ishima na la; kape ve cingi kwagh ayol a ve la." 
Micah7:4 U hemban doon ken a ve la ngu er ka saa yô; u hemban perapera hen a ve la, hemba vihin a igyar i sha usaa; iyange i mbakuran ou, i mtsaha wou la, i va ve; hegen yô, kwagh á tser ve." 
Micah7:5 De gbe nan or u nan we ndor a we jighjigh ga, man shi de kera suur nen sha ijende ga; kura gbemzwa wou hen wen u a yav sha ikum you la." 
Micah7:6 Gadia wannomso gema laha ter na, wankwase kpaa mough, hendan a ngô na, man kwase kpaa a ngô u nom na; mbaihomov mba or ka mba hen ya u nan je." 
Micah7:7 Kpa mo yô, me ver ashe hen TER, me kegh Aôndo u myom wam; Aôndo wam kpaa Una ungwam." 
Micah7:8 De kera ember sha a mo ga, we orihom wam, mea gba kpaa, shi me mough; mea tema ken ime kpaa, TER Una lum iwanger." 
Micah7:9 Me tôô iyugh i TER, gadia m er Un kwaghbo— zan zan Una ôr ishô yam man Una kure ijir yam; Una va a mo ken iwanger, me nenge perapera Na." 
Micah7:10 Tsô orihom wam una nenge, kunya ua kôr un; un u a kaa a mo er: TER, Aôndo wou, ngu hana? la. Ashe am aa kenger un; hegen á ndyar un er angbiôr a sha igbenda yô." 
Micah7:11 Iyange i maan ukpekpe ou ngi van; sha iyange la á kpela a ikighirtar ken hemen ca. 
Micah7:12 Sha iyange la vea va her a we, vea due ken Ashiria man ken agar a Igipiti, hii hen Igipiti zan zan za ar hen ifi u Uferati, man hii hen zegemnger zan zan za ar hen zegemnger, man hii sha uwo zan zan za ar sha uwo." 
Micah7:13 Nahan kpaa tar ua hingir ice sha ci u mba ve tem ker la, sha ci u mlu u aeren a ve la." 
Micah7:14 Kura ior Ou sha gbough Ough, ikumuile i dyako Wou, mba ve tem tseke ve, ken ikô ker atô u Karmel; de, ve̱ yaan toho ken Bashan man Gileadi er sha ayange a tsuaa la nahan." 
Micah7:15 Er sha ayange a ne due ken tar u Igipiti la nahan, kape Me tese ve akaa a kpilighyol la." 
Micah7:16 Akuraior aa nenge aa va ahenge sha agee a ve cii; vea wa ave ijô, ato a ve aa kondo." 
Micah7:17 Vea ndiar vuulevu er iyô yô; vea due ken ajiir a ve a taver la a akarkase iyol, er akaa a kpelan inya nahan; vea va a mciem iyol hen TER, Aôndo wase, vea cia U kpaa." 
Micah7:18 Ka an nan lu Aôndo er We nahan, u U deen iferkwagh man U deen atindi a peren a asande a dyako Wou a a shi her laa? Ishima i nyoon We gbem ga, sha ci u erdoo doo U." 
Micah7:19 Shi Una zungwe se mhôônom; Una ndyar afer a ase shin angahar man Ú haa asorabo ase cii shin aiv a zegemnger. 
Micah7:20 Ú tese Yakob mimi man Aberaham di erdoo, u U vande bumun a uter asev hii sha ayange a tsuaa la je yô." 
Nahum1:1 Ka mkaanem ma Aôndo sha Nineve. Ruamabera u mpase u sha mnenge u Nahum or u Elkoshi. 
Nahum1:2 TER Aôndo ka u iwuhegh je, man oron iyev; TER ka u oron iyev man A mgbough a iyugh; TER ka u oron iyev sha mbaahendanev Nav, man ishima vihin Un a mbaihomov Nav." 
Nahum1:3 TER we ishima, tahav Nav vese, kpa u tsahan yô, deen ga. Gbenda Na ngu ken ihiar man ken ijeverahumbe, abeen ka ihundu i shin angahar a Na." 
Nahum1:4 Ka A zôhô a zegemnger, A er un a̱ uma, A uma uifi cii; Bashan use kua Karmel, man imondon u sha Lebanon kpaa use." 
Nahum1:5 Iwo cii tenger sha ishigh Nagh, agungu nga soughon; i kende a tar sha sha ishigh Nagh, tar sha won cii kua mba ve tem sha u cii." 
Nahum1:6 Ka an nana fatyô u hendan ishigh a iyugh Na? Ka an nana fatyô u teman hen mtsee u ishimavihin Na? Iyugh Na ngi haan er ka usu yô, avande nga paven sha ishigh Nagh." 
Nahum1:7 TER doo je, ka ijiir i waren sha iyange i ican; man A fa mba ve suur sha a Na yô." 
Nahum1:8 Sha mngerem ma saren avenge Una tim ijiir na kera cii, man Una tôv mbaihomov Nav, Una haa ve ken ime." 
Nahum1:9 Ka nyi kwaghbo ne henen sha TERE? Una tim kera cii, ican ia va kwa har ga." 
Nahum1:10 Gadia shin er ve lu er adagher a usaa nahan, man ve heen ayol er ka sha kwaghman ve la kpaa, á nande ve kera er ayia a ombor nahan." 
Nahum1:11 Orgen due ken a we, u nan hen kwaghbo sha TER yô, nan hen mbamhen mba dang." 
Nahum1:12 TER ngu kaan nahan er: Shin er ve mgbough a agee, man ve ngee nahan kpaa á tim ve kera, vea saa ishe. Shin er M vande eren we ican nahan, Me kera kimbir eren we ican ga." 
Nahum1:13 Hegen yô, Me kever igbur na sha mon wou kera, man Me tôndo ikangenev you kera." 
Nahum1:14 TER wa tindi sha kwagh wou er iti you ia kera seer u zan hemen sha won ga; ken iyou i mbaaôndo ou la Me tim ieev mbi gban man mbi haan la kera; Me tim uwar wou, gadia u kera gba kwagh ga." 
Nahum1:15 Nenge sha iwo, angahar a or u van a loho u dedoo, or u yôôn bem! Er uiniongo ou, we Yuda, kure uiceghzwa ou, gadia orifer la una kera kar ker atô wou ga; i tim un kera puru." 
Nahum2:1 Orhembenkwagh va u sha ishi ve; kura iyou i utya, nenge sha gbenda, taver iwenge, taver agee ou tsung je." 
Nahum2:2 Gadia TER ngu hiden a civir i Yakob her, er icivir i Iserael nahan, gadia mbasarenior va sar ve, ve vihi agbaa ve kera." 
Nahum2:3 Perutya u mbaageev nav i er u ngu nyian, anomaior haa akondo a nyian bong; akekeautya engem er usu nahan sha iyange i a wa ago iyol la, man mba kunden awange sha tsung je." 
Nahum2:4 Akekeautya nga huran sha akômaigbinda nga yevese sha ityembe tsung je, mlu u a ngu er akaghausu nahan, ka a nyôngoso er inyiar nahan." 
Nahum2:5 A umbur ukurmbautyav nav, mba nôngon gbev ken zende ve u fefa la, ve za fefa sha kpekpe, i sôr haav mbu utya mbu yeren ker ve." 
Nahum2:6 I bugh ihinda i uifi, iyou i tor sough." 
Nahum2:7 I vande kuren kwagh kera ve, i due a na ken igbar, i yem a na; ikpan i ukase na ngi gberen kwelegh eren imo er mbaatii nahan, mba kuren ave sha vanger." 
Nahum2:8 Kera je, Nineve lu er ityungumnger nahan; nahan kpaa ma kuwa kera. Tile nen, tile nen! Kpa ma or gema ashe ijime ga." 
Nahum2:9 Kura nen ishar i azurfa, kura ishar i zenaria; gadia inyaregh ngee gande, ikav mbi injaav mgbough." 
Nahum2:10 Ngu a kwagh ga, ngu gbilin, hingir ice; asema sough, anu nga gbidyen ikarikase, mnyoonom ma ken awenge cii, ishiv vev cii hingir peng." 
Nahum2:11 Ivugh i ubegha ngi hana, ijiir i yan kwagh i agumaubegha la? Henpe begha man ngôbegha ve zenden a wanbegha yô, man ma or ta ve mciem iyol ga la." 
Nahum2:12 Begha ande avur avur kuma sha ci ônov nav, man a sende ishôso ave iker sha ci u ungômbaubegha, a iv ubar nav sha ishar, man avugh a na sha agunduainyam." 
Nahum2:13 Nenge, M ngu num a we, kape TER u akum a Sha A kaa ne, Me nande akeke a ou a utya a̱ hingir mnyim, sanker kpaa una ya agumaubegha a ou; Me tim ishar you shin tar kera, á kera seer ungwan imo i mbatyomov ou ga." 
Nahum3:1 Kwagh á tser gar u awambe ne, iv a mbaaie man ipila cii— ye ishar je ikighir i lu ga!" 
Nahum3:2 Iov i akpa, man ihuran i akaver a akeke, anyinya a eren iyar, man akekeautya a zenden gungula gungula!" 
Nahum3:3 Mbaanyinyav mba ve nyôngoso, man sanker u karen jijingi, man iwange i engem; mba i woo ve ngee, atihi a mbakpenev, akom gande u ôron—mba nôngon gbev sha akom a ve!" 
Nahum3:4 Man ka sha ci u mngee u uidya u idyakwase u doon ashe la, ngô u ahir, u a teen akuraior sha uidya nav la, ikweior kpaa sha ahir a na." 
Nahum3:5 Nenge, M ngu num a we, kape TER u akum a Sha A kaa ne, Me kura a ikondo sha, i̱ cir u sha ishi, Me na akuraior aa nenge idyelegh wou, man ityartor kpaa ia nenge kunya wou." 
Nahum3:6 Me haa kwagh u hôngorough sha a we, Me gema u ú hingir dangkwagh, Me ver u ú hingir kwagh u kenger sha mi." 
Nahum3:7 Tsô mba ve kenger we cii, vea yevese we, vea kaa er: Nineve hingir ice; ka an nana zungwe unu? Man ka han Me ker u mbasurun we ishima?" 
Nahum3:8 U hemba No-amon u a lu hen asalegh a Nil, u mngerem ma kase un ma tser, u gilgar na a lu zegemnger man kpekpe na a lu mngerem la shinii?" 
Nahum3:9 Etiopia lu agee na kua Igipiti kpaa, taver gande u ôron; Puti man Lubim lu mbawasen nav." 
Nahum3:10 Nahan kpaa i kura un i yem a na uikangen; i her anikundanev nav avur avur sha hanma gbenda cii; ve er ishol sha ashagbaior a na, i kange mbavesen nav cii sha mshir." 
Nahum3:11 We kpaa, ú hunde, ú hume; we kpaa ú ker iyou i tiaver sha ci u yeren orihom." 
Nahum3:12 Ayou a taver a ou cii nga er ikon i tur a atam a tsutswa nahan; aluer i ndoor a yô, a haa ken zwa u oryan." 
Nahum3:13 Nenge, ior ou ker atô wou, ka kasev; ihinda i ken tar wou ngi ivegher sha ishigh ki mbaihomov ou; usu hia uishindan ou." 
Nahum3:14 Kese mngerem sha ci u ityav mbi kasen we, taver ayouautya a ou; hungwa shin inya i tiher, shoghol inya, kôr kurugh u gbidyen akam." 
Nahum3:15 Usu ua hia u heregh; sanker una tim u kera, una ya u er agumaikomon nahan. Seer nen ngeen er agumaikomon nahan; seer nen ngeen er ikomon nahan." 
Nahum3:16 U seer mbakasuav ou je ngee hemba asan a sha kwavaôndo; agumaikomon oo purugh kera. 
Nahum3:17 Utor ou mba er ikomon nahan man ukurmbautyav ou mba er jukuikomon nahan, i i tse sha igyar sha iyange i wuhegh yô, kpa zum u iyange ia ta yô, i mough kera, man i kera fa ape i ze ga." 
Nahum3:18 Mbakuran ou mba yaven, we tor u Ashiria; ashagba a ou nga memen; ior ou sambe sha iwo, ma or u kohol ve ngu ga." 
Nahum3:19 Mvihi u i vihi u la gande u sôron; ivav you ka i den ga; mba ve ongo ahura u kwagh wou cii, mba kuren ave sha mi; gadia ka an je ifer you i ve sha a nan ga?" 
Habakkuk1:1 Mkaanem ma Aôndo ma profeti Habaku nenge a min. 
Habakkuk1:2 TERE, ka nan je m yila, man We U kera ongom ga? M genger imo her a We mer: Ipila; kpa U rumun u yiman ga." 
Habakkuk1:3 Ka sha ci u nyi U erem m nengen a iferkwagh man m kenger icana? Gadia mtim man ipila mbam sha ishi; numsuwen ngu, man ahendan gema mough." 
Habakkuk1:4 Nahan yô, tindi kera ngu a agee ga, man ijirôron sha mimi kera due ken igbar ga; gadia mbaaferev kase mbaperapera tser, ka nahan man ijirôron i dugh mcinga ye." 
Habakkuk1:5 Yô, nenge nen ken akuraior, ver nen asema, i̱ kpiligh ne iyol tsung je, gadia M ngu eren tom ugen ken ayange a en, u zum u á ôr ne u, né rumun u jighjigh ga yô." 
Habakkuk1:6 Gadia nenge, Me mough a Mbakaldi, ikurior i nyoon ishima tsung, man i tsogh tso tsogh, i i zende sha igbanger i tar, sha u ngohol ajiir a teman a a lu a i ga yô." 
Habakkuk1:7 Ka mbatan ihindi iyol man cier iyol kpaa; ijirôron ve man icivir ve gema due her ayol a ve. 
Habakkuk1:8 Anyinya a ve wa kpaver hemba mbaanyam, a hemba vihin kwagh a ugbaseela mba aikighe; mbaanyinyav vev ngughum sha imanger, een, mbaanyinyav vev va ca je, ve purugh ve van er gafa u shirin sha kwagh u una ya yô." 
Habakkuk1:9 Ve cii ve va sha u eren ipila, ve ver ishiv vev ken hemen sha gbashima, ve kuran mbakwarev er waarawa nahan." 
Habakkuk1:10 Ve nahan utor tar, mbatarev kpaa ve lu ve kwagh u lahan kera; hanma iyou i utya i lu ve kwagh u lahan, gadia ve ta atihianyaagh ve ngohol." 
Habakkuk1:11 Nahan ve kar er ahumbe nahan ve yem ken hemen, ve hingir mbalun a ibo, ve mba agee a ve a lu aôndo ve la." 
Habakkuk1:12 We, U kera lu hiihii je ga, TERE, Aôndo wam, Icighan wama? Sé kpe ga. TERE, U va a ve sha ci u mtsaha, man We Vande, U ver ve sha u kôôm ior." 
Habakkuk1:13 We u ashe Ou a lu wang je, a gande u kenger sha iferkwagh, man U fetyô u kenger sha kwaghbo ga, ka nyi U kenger sha mbamimiga man shi U gbe huan ving zum u orbo ka a mena or u nan hembe un perapera la nahana?" 
Habakkuk1:14 Nahan U gema ior hingir er ishu i shin zegemnger man er akaa a kper a kpela inya a a lu a ortaregh ga nahan. 
Habakkuk1:15 Ve tsuwe ve cii sha tsuwe, ve kôr ve sha kper ve, man ve kohol ve shin kper ve; nahan doo ve ve ember yagh yagh." 
Habakkuk1:16 Nahan ve na kper ve nagh, man ve nande kper ve kwaghhumandoon; gadia ka sha a na je, ci na a gbe ikev man kwaghyan na dumbur kpaa ye." 
Habakkuk1:17 Nahan una nduur kper na, una timin akuraior gbem a mhôônom ga nahana?" 
Habakkuk2:1 Me tile sha ijiir yam i kuran, me lu sha iyou i taven gôgônan, me kenger sha u me fa kwagh u Una kaam yô, man kwagh u me gema me kaa sha mhuna wam yô." 
Habakkuk2:2 TER gema kaa a mo er: Nger mpase la a̱ due wanger wanger, sha i kpande, sha er or nana karen kpaa, nana ôr yô." 
Habakkuk2:3 Gadia mpase u sha mnenge ne ngu keghen shighe na, ngu zan fefa sha u kuren, una er aie ga; shin er una ngôôr kpaa, kegh un, gadia una va kpee, una bunde ga." 
Habakkuk2:4 Nenge, ishima na manger, ngi ken a na vough ga; kpa orperapera yô, ka sha jighjigh u nan, u nan ne la, man nana lu uma ye." 
Habakkuk2:5 Mimi je, wain ka kwagh u icughugh je; orimangeregh memen ga, hua na gba ikôr er Sheol nahan, ngu er ku nahan, kwagh kom un ga, a kohol akuraior cii sha ci na, man a ta ior ijuku her a na cii." 
Habakkuk2:6 Mban cii vea ver ishor sha a na gaa, man vea wa un asôngo gaa, man injakwaghôron er: Kwagh á tser un u a kohol akaa a a lu a na ga ne— ka zan zan hanma shighe je?—man a kange ikav iyol sha akaa a ityungugh." 
Habakkuk2:7 Mba vea nyuma u, vea mough sha fefa gaa, man mba vea ta u mciem iyol vea nder gaa, man ú kera hingir ve ishar gaa?" 
Habakkuk2:8 Sha ci u we u sar akuraior kpishi, ior mba ve shi her cii ve di kpaa vea sar u, sha ci u awambe a ior, man sha ci u ipila i i er tar man gar, man mbateman kimi cii." 
Habakkuk2:9 Kwagh á tser un u a ye mtsera u bo sha ci u ya na, sha u una wa iya sha ijiir i taven sha je, sha u una war kwagh u bo yô," 
Habakkuk2:10 U hen mhen u kunya sha ya wou, sha u ú tim ior kpishi, u vihi uma wou kera kpaa." 
Habakkuk2:11 Gadia iwen i ken kpekpe ia genger imo, man ihange i sha uha ia rumun." 
Habakkuk2:12 Kwagh á tser un u a maa gar sha awambe, man a taver garutya sha iferkwagh!" 
Habakkuk2:13 Yô, nenge, kera ka TER u akum a Sha A ne er ior ve eren tom u ican sha ci u usu, man akuraior ve vôr ayol a ve sha ci u gbilinkwagh ye gaa?" 
Habakkuk2:14 Gadia tar ua mgbough a mfe u iengem i TER, er mngerem ma ngee ma cir zegemnger nahan." 
Habakkuk2:15 Kwagh á tser un u a ne orwanndor a na kwaghman, we u u nongo megh ough sha mi, man u ne un ihundugh kpaa, sha u ú nenge idyelegh ve yô!" 
Habakkuk2:16 U mgbough a kunya sha ityough ki icivir; yô, we kpaa ma, kunya wou a̱ hingir ken igbar; iyongo i sha uwegh ku yanegh ku TER, á gema a i hen a we, man kunya u ndôhôrshima ua cir icivir you." 
Habakkuk2:17 Gadia ipila i i er Lebanon la ia cir u, man mtim u i tim inyamtoho la, una ta u mciem iyol— sha ci u awambe a ior man sha ci u ipila i i er tar, man gar, man mbateman kimi cii la." 
Habakkuk2:18 Eev mbu gban a gba, mbu or nan gbe mbu la, mbu a inja sha nyi? man shi eev mbu haan, mbu mbu lu ortesen u aiegh la, or u nan gbe mbu la nan gem nan suur sha kwagh u nan gbe la, or ka nan gba ieev mbi gbiliniv mbi fan ityô u lamen ga!" 
Habakkuk2:19 Kwagh á tser un u a kaa a kon er: Nder; man a iwen i lamen ga er: Mough sha la, ia fatyô u pasen kwagh kpa? Nenge, i cir i zenaria man azurfa iyol, man iôôn ngi ken atô u i ciôn kpaa ga." 
Habakkuk2:20 Kpa TER ngu ken icighantempel Na; yô, tar cii u̱ huan ving sha ishigh Nagh." 
Habakkuk3:1 Msen u profeti Habaku, mba we un sha ikenge i Shigionoti:" 
Habakkuk3:2 TERE, m ungwa ahura Wou, nahan cier mo iyol, TERE; shi nder tom Wou ken atô u anyom, na, i̱ fa u ken atô u anyom; ken iyugh kpaa umbur mhôônom ma zungwen." 
Habakkuk3:3 Aôndo mough ken Teman va, u A lu Icighan la, mough sha uwo u Paran va. Sela. Iengem Na cir Usha, tar kpaa mgbough a iwuese Na." 
Habakkuk3:4 Engem er iwanger i iyange nahan; iengem i haan vir vir ngi duen sha uwegh Nagh, ka ker i yer tahav Nav ye." 
Habakkuk3:5 Bouange ngu zan Un sha hemen, angev mbu tseenyol dondo Un ijime." 
Habakkuk3:6 A tile, A er tar tenger; A yenge, tsô akuraior sambe sha mcie, utsembaiwoov kpaa sar, uicôronmbaagunguv wa ityouv inya; igbenda Na ka i ngise je." 
Habakkuk3:7 M nenge utenti mba Kushan ken ican; akondo a tenti a tar u Midian tenger. 
Habakkuk3:8 Ishima vihi We a uifi, TERE? Ishima nyoon We a uifi? Shin U yuwe a zegemnger er U zende sha anyinya a Ou, sha akeke a Ou, a mhembe la?" 
Habakkuk3:9 Ada Wou hingir iyol gbilin; mbambum mba hen ikwe lu kwaghôron u dông. Sela. U pav tar sha uifi. 
Habakkuk3:10 Iwo nenge a We, cier i iyol; mngerem ma zegeura kar; iv kaa imo i i, i kende ave a i sha." 
Habakkuk3:11 Iyange man uwer tile gir gir hen ijiir ve, sha iwanger i avaan a Ou er a lu zan la, man sha iwanger i iwange You i iengem la." 
Habakkuk3:12 U zende U kar hen tar sha kume, sha ishima i vihin You, U shoghol akuraior angahar sha ishima i nyoon." 
Habakkuk3:13 U due sha ci u myom u ior Ou, sha ci u Un u i shigh Un mkurem la. U her ityough ki ya u ipila, U bugh imagh je, zan zan ar sha mon. Sela." 
Habakkuk3:14 Ka sha udagi nav iyol na U kuma ityough ki mbautyav nav mba ve ve er hir nahan sha u samben mo la ye; ve ember je, er vea ya mbaatsanev ken myer nahan." 
Habakkuk3:15 U ndyar zegemnger sha anyinya a Ou, ka tihi u mngerem ma vesen." 
Habakkuk3:16 M ungwa, nahan ikav yav mbi ken atô zômon; sha ci u imo la, ityumbuzwaagh yam kunde; mhee nyôr ken akuhe am je, ikarikase gbidyem iyol hen pe m til la; nahan kpaa me lu ving me kegh iyange i ican sha u i̱ va sha ior mba ve nenge ityav a vese a akumautya la." 
Habakkuk3:17 Shin er kon u tur ua kpar ga, man er ma atam aa lu sha ikon i wain ga, man atam a kon u olev aa lu ga; shin er ishule ia doo iyiagh ga, man iyôngo ia tim ken ityôr kera, man ibua kpaa ia kera lu ken atôr ga," 
Habakkuk3:18 nahan kpaa, mo me ember ken TER, me ember ken Aôndo u myom wam." 
Habakkuk3:19 AÔNDO, Ter, ka agee am, A gema angahar a am hingir er a ashim yô, a erem m zende sha ajir a am a taven sha. Ka sha ci u orhemen u mbawanatsam; mba koho mbaadiguve sha mi." 
Zephaniah1:1 Kwaghôron u TER u a va hen Sefania wan u Kushi, wan u Gedalia, wan u Amaria, wan u Hesekia, sha ayange a Yoshia wan u Amon, tor u Yuda." 
Zephaniah1:2 Me kar a akaa ci ca cii sha tar kera, kape TER A kaa la." 
Zephaniah1:3 Me kar a or kua zendenya kera; Me kar a inyon i sha kera, man ishu i shin zegemnger, kua atôakaa a nan gbev mbu nôngon, a mbaaferev imôngo; shi Me tim or sha tar kera, kape TER A kaa la." 
Zephaniah1:4 Me naregh uwegh Agh sha Yuda, man sha mba ve tem ken Yerusalem cii; man Me tim asande a Baal a a shi her la, hen ijiir ne kera, man iti i mba ve civir akombo la, a upristi imôngo," 
Zephaniah1:5 man mba ve gur ve civir akum a Sha sha ityor i iyoughough, man mba ve civir, ve bumun TER shi ve gem ve bumun Malkam kpaa," 
Zephaniah1:6 man mba ve hir ijime sha u dondon TER, mba ve keren TER ga, shin ve pin Un kwagh kpaa ga la." 
Zephaniah1:7 Huan ving sha ishigh ki Ter AÔNDO! gadia iyange i TER mgbôghom; gadia TER sôr nagh ku sôngon, A tsegha mbavannya Nav." 
Zephaniah1:8 Tsô sha iyange i nagh ku sôngon ku TER la, Me tsaha mbatarev kua ônov mba tor, man mba ve hee akondo a akuraior agen la cii." 
Zephaniah1:9 Man sha iyange la, Me tsaha mba ve tsugh ve aver igburhunda, mba ve ivin ya u ter ve a ipila man icugh la." 
Zephaniah1:10 Sha iyange la, kape TER A kaa la, shishavaa una due hen Hundagar u Ishu, man mliam hen veghergar u he la, man ihuran i vesen ia kaa sha agungu." 
Zephaniah1:11 Vaa nen, ne mba ne tem ken Maketeshi, gadia ior mba teen kasua cii saa ishe; mba ve karen myohom ma azurfa cii i tim ve kera." 
Zephaniah1:12 Tsô hen shighe la Me ker Yerusalem a amenger; man Me tsaha ior mba ve tse a akase a ve her la, mba ve kaan ken asema ve er: TER Una er kwagh u dedoo ga, shin u bo kpaa ga, la." 
Zephaniah1:13 Akaa a ve aa hingir ishar, man ayou a ve kpaa á yôhôl a kera; shin vea maa ayou kpaa, vea tema ken a ga; shin vea môôr ikon i wain kpaa, vea ma zar u i ga." 
Zephaniah1:14 Iyange i vesen i TER mgbôghom, ngi van fefa je; ungwa ihuran i iyange i TER! Orageegh ngu vaan tsung heregh." 
Zephaniah1:15 Iyange la ka iyange i iyughugh, ka iyange i ican man i ishima, nyian, ka iyange i mvihi man i myôhôr, ka iyange i ime i wan mgbigh mgbigh, ka iyange i abeen man i angôghime," 
Zephaniah1:16 iyange i tôngon ikor man i geren ityav sha agarautya a taver man sha ayouautya a taver. 
Zephaniah1:17 Me va a ican sha ior vea zenden er mbaapirashe nahan, sha ci u ve er TER kwaghbo yô; á haa awambe a ve inya er ka vuulevu nahan man myam vem kpaa er ka akôngo yô." 
Zephaniah1:18 Azurfa ve shin zenaria ve, vea fatyô u yiman ve sha iyange i iyugh i TER ga; kpa sha usu u iwuhe Na la, tar cii ua hia kera; gadia Una va a mtim, ka mkur u cieryol je, sha mba ve tem ken tar cii." 
Zephaniah2:1 Kohol nen imôngo, een, kohol nen, we, ikurior i lun a kunya ga ne," 
Zephaniah2:2 je er i lu a pase awashima la ga yô— iyange ngi karen er imough nahan— je er iyugh i TER i tsung la i lu a va sha a ven ga ne, man er iyange i iyugh i TER i lu a va sha a ven ga ne." 
Zephaniah2:3 Ker nen TER, ne mbaasemaleghlegh mba sha tar cii, ne mba ne we atindi a Na iko; ker nen perapera, ker nen ishima i legh legh, tsô alaghga á yer ne sha iyange i iyugh i TER la." 
Zephaniah2:4 Gadia á ta Gasa kera man Asekelon una hingir ice; á zenda Ashedodi iyange sha tembe, man á wuhe Ekeron kera." 
Zephaniah2:5 Kwagh á tser mba ve tem ken kpezegemnger, ikurior i Mbakereti! Kwaghôron u TER ngu num a we, we, Kanaan, tar u Mbafiliti; Me tim u, je orteman ker nana kera shi ga." 
Zephaniah2:6 Kpezegemnger kpaa ua hingir ijiir i ilev yan toho, man ajiir a tsan sha ci u mbakuranilev, man atôr sha ci u ikumuile."
