Zephaniah2:7 Kpezegemnger ua hingir kwar u asande a ya u Yuda a a shi her la; vea koso ilev vev keregh; vea yav ken ayou a Asekelon iyange i been; gadia TER Aôndo ve Una umbur ve, Una gema mlu ve." 
Zephaniah2:8 M ungwa tarnahan u Moabi man iheen i Mbaamon, i ve hee ior Av, man er ve va tseen sha tar ve yô." 
Zephaniah2:9 Nahan yô, TER u akum a Sha, Aôndo u Iserael ngu kaan nahan er: Er M lu u uma yô, mimi je, Moabi una hingir er Sodom, man Mbaamon er Gomora nahan, ijiir i imo menden her man ahungwa a bar, man ice gbem sha won; asande a ior Av aa sar ve, man asande a ikurior Yam a a shi her la aa ngohol ve." 
Zephaniah2:10 Kwagh ne una er ve sha ci u iyolgengese ve, sha ci u ve hee ior i TER u akum a Sha, man ve va tseen sha a ve yô." 
Zephaniah2:11 TER Una cier ve iyol; gadia Una bunde icivir i mbaaôndo mba shin tar cii kera; ior vea civir Un hanma or hen ijiir i nan, ityar i shin kpezegemnger i akuraior cii." 
Zephaniah2:12 Ne Mbaetiopia kpaa á wua ne sha sanker Wam. 
Zephaniah2:13 Una naregh uwegh Nagh sha imbusutarimese, Una tim Ashiria Una gema Nineve á hingir ice man iomborinya er desereti nahan." 
Zephaniah2:14 Akum a ibua aa yav ken atô na, man hanma inja i ishôso cii; akumedu man adendem vea tsa ken uindyuruku nav, mba gberen imo sha uwindou; mtim una lu sha agbur a ihinda a uya, gadia i bugh tom u sha ikon i sedar la kera." 
Zephaniah2:15 Ngun ka gar u iember u a tema bem bem, u a kaa ken ishima na er: Ka mo je ne, mô ugen ngu ga, saa mo; yô, nenge er a hingir ice man ijiir i inyamtoho i yaven her yô; hanma or u karen her nana gbire iwer man nana mishi uwegh." 
Zephaniah3:1 Kwagh á tser gar u ahendanegh man u hôngorough man u kighir ior! 
Zephaniah3:2 Ongo kwagh ga, rumun mkôôm ga, suur sha TER ga, man kporom ikua ikua a Aôndo na kpaa ga." 
Zephaniah3:3 Mbatarev mba ker atô na ka ubegha mba tan kume; mbaajiriv nav ka ugbaseela mba aikighe mba ve shin ma kwagh her sha ci u pepe ga yô. 
Zephaniah3:4 Uprofeti nav kôrough ga, ka mba lun a mimi ga; upristi nav mba hôngor a icighankwagh, ve per atindi sha apera." 
Zephaniah3:5 TER ka u perapera je ken na, eren iferkwagh ga; hanma sev pasen mimi na ken igbar, ka bundu Un ga; kpa ormimi ga yô, nan fa kunya ga." 
Zephaniah3:6 M tim akuraior kera, ayouautya a ve a taven hingir alôgh; M vihi igbendagar ve, ma or kera kar sha mi ga; i tim agar a ve, ma or u teman ker shi ga." 
Zephaniah3:7 M kaa Mer: Ma u shi ciem, ma u rumun mkôôm, sha er i̱ de kera timin ijiir na i teman, er M we ishima sha a na nahan ga; nahan kpaa ve mough fese ve vihi aeren a ve cii." 
Zephaniah3:8 Nahan yô, keghem nen, kape TER A kaa la, zan zan sha iyange i Me mough sha u yan ishar la; gadia awashima Wam yô, ka u kohol akuraior, sha u Me kohol ityartor ijiir i môm, sha u Me haa iyugh Yam sha a ve, ka ishimavihin Yam cii je la; gadia sha usu u iwuhe Yam la, tar cii ua hia kera." 
Zephaniah3:9 Gadia hen shighe la Me gema zwa u ior ua hingir zwa u wang, sha u ve cii ve̱ yila sha iti i TER, man ve̱ er Un tom sha ishima i môm yô." 
Zephaniah3:10 Yande u uifi mba Etiopia la je, mbacivir Mo, ior Av mba i sambe ve la, vea vam a nagh." 
Zephaniah3:11 Sha iyange la ú kera va ahenge sha ci u aeren a ou, a u erem kwaghbo sha mi la ga; gadia hen shighe la Me kar a mbagengeseyol ken a we kera cii, man mayange ú kera seer tesen imanger you sha icighanwo Wam ga." 
Zephaniah3:12 Kpa Me undu atereghaior man atsanaior ken atô wou, vea suur sha iti i TER." 
Zephaniah3:13 Asande a Iserael a a shi her aa kera er ifer ga, man shi aa kera er aie kpaa ga; á kera zua a ma nombor u icughugh ken zwa ve kpaa ga; gadia vea ya kwagh, vea yav inya, ma or u tan ve mciem nana kera lu ga." 
Zephaniah3:14 Wa icam, we wankwase u Shion; genger imo, we Iserael; ember man lu saan saan a ishima i môm, we wankwase u Yerusalem." 
Zephaniah3:15 TER tôô ajir a i ôr u la kera, A kar a orihom wou kera; Tor u Iserael, TER ngu ken atô wou; ú kera shi cia kwagh u bo ga." 
Zephaniah3:16 Sha iyange la á kaa a Yerusalem er: De kera cie ga, we Shion, ave ou a̱ de shirin livaa ga." 
Zephaniah3:17 TER, Aôndo wou, ngu ken atô wou, Orutaha u Una yima yô; Una ember we a iember, Una mem ken dooshima Na, Una ember we a icam i wan." 
Zephaniah3:18 Me kohol mba asema a vihi ve ve gbe ca a mkohol u iniongo la, ka mba ve lu ken a we je, mba iheen i kighir ve la." 
Zephaniah3:19 Nenge, hen shighe la Me ta sha mba ve eren we ican la cii; Me yima mbakeer, man Me kohol mba i zende ve kera la, Me gema ve vea hingir kwagh u wuese man u duen iti, ve mba kunya ve u lu sha won cii la." 
Zephaniah3:20 Hen shighe la Me hide a ven, hen shighe u Me kohol ne la, gadia Me na ne̱ due a iti, man ne̱ lu a iwuese kpaa ken akuraior a sha won cii, zum u Me gema mlu wen sha ashe a en la, kape TER A kaa ne." 
Haggai1:1 Sha inyom i sha uhar i tor Dariu, uwer u sha ataratar sha iyange i hiihii i uwer la, kwaghôron u TER va sha ikev i profeti Hagai hen Serubabel, wan u Shealtiel, gomna u Yuda, man hen zegepristi Yosua, wan u Yehosadaki, kaa er:" 
Haggai1:2 TER u akum a Sha ngu kaan nahan er: Ior mban mba kaan er: Shighe ngu a kuma u maan iyou i TER ga. 
Haggai1:3 Tsô kwaghôron u TER va sha ikev i profeti Hagai er: 
Haggai1:4 Shin shighe kuma u ne ayol a en ne tsa ken ayou a en a i cir a ikpande sha yô, er iyou ne i gem i lu alôgh nahana?" 
Haggai1:5 Nahan yô, TER u akum a Sha ngu kaan nahan er: Ver ishima, nenge nen sha akaa a a lu tseren ne yô." 
Haggai1:6 Ne lôô kpishi, kpa ne sunda kpeghee; ka ne ya kwagh kpa i kuma ne ga; ne haa akondo iyol, kpa i tsee ma or iyol ga; man or u nan eren tom sha tôndo kpaa, nan hee injar i nan ngohol la ken ikpa i peven." 
Haggai1:7 TER u akum a Sha ngu kaan nahan er: Ver ishima, nenge nen sha akaa a a lu tseren ne yô." 
Haggai1:8 Unde nen sha uwo, za tôô nen ikon, va maa nen iyou ne, Mo kpaa i̱ saan Mo iyol a i, M̱ zua a icivir, kape TER A kaa ne." 
Haggai1:9 Ne ver ishima ner, kwagh á ngee, kpa nenge gema ngu kpeghee tsô; man zum u ne va a mi ken ya yô, M fehe un kera. Ka sha ci u nyi? Kape TER u akum a sha A kaa ne. Ka sha ci u iyou Yam hembe hingir alôgh, man ne gema ne lu zan ayem hanma or hen ya u nan yô." 
Haggai1:10 Ka sha ci u nahan man Sha a de u gban avure sha a ven man tar kpaa u nyum iyiagh ki u ye. 
Haggai1:11 M yila icegh va sha tar man sha iwo, sha samuyia man sha wain, man sha mkure man sha hanma kwagh u a menden hen inya cii, man sha ior, man sha uile, man sha ityom i aveegh cii." 
Haggai1:12 Nahan Serubabel, wan u Shealtiel, man zegepristi Yosua wan u Yehosadaki kua asande a ior a a shi her cii la, ve wa imo i TER, Aôndo ve, iko kua akaaôron a profeti Hagai er TER, Aôndo ve, tindi un yô; ior kpaa cia sha ishigh ki TER." 
Haggai1:13 Tsô Hagai ortyom u TER ôr ior loho u TER, a kaa er: M ngu a ven imôngo, kape TER A kaa ne." 
Haggai1:14 Nahan TER kpoghol jijingi u Serubabel wan u Shealtiel, gomna u Yuda, man jijingi u zegepristi Yosua wan u Yehosadaki, man jijingi u asande a ior a a shi her la cii; nahan ve va sha u eren tom u iyou i TER u akum a Sha, Aôndo ve," 
Haggai1:15 sha uwer u sha ataratar, ayange a u ikundu kar anyiin, sha inyom i sha uhar i tor Dariu la." 
Haggai2:1 Sha uwer u sha utaankaruhar, ayange a u ikundu kar môm la, kwaghôron u TER va sha ikev i profeti Hagai, er:" 
Haggai2:2 Shi ôr kwagh a Serubabel wan u Shealtiel, gomna u Yuda, man a zegepristi Yosua wan u Yehosadaki, man a asande a ior a a shi her yô, kaa wer:" 
Haggai2:3 Ka an nan shi ken a ven u yan nan nenge iyou nen ken icivir i i laa? Man hegen yô, ne nenge a i, ngi nana? Kera ngi ken ashe a en er ka gbilinkwagh gaa?" 
Haggai2:4 Kpa hegen yô, taver ishima, we Serubabel, kape TER A kaa ne; man taver ishima we zegepristi Yosua, wan u Yehosadaki, man shi taver nen ishima, ne ior mba hen tar ne cii, er nen tom kape TER A kaa ne, gadia M ngu a ven, kape TER u akum a Sha A kaa ne," 
Haggai2:5 sha kwagh u ikur i M ya a ven, zum u ne due ken Igipiti la, man nenge jijingi Wam ngu a ven; de cie nen ga." 
Haggai2:6 Gadia TER u akum a Sha ngu kaan nahan er: Mase shin kwagh môm, kera shi ca ga tsô, Me tenger Sha man tar man zegemnger man iombortar;" 
Haggai2:7 shi Me tenger akuraior cii, nahan akaainjaa a akuraior cii aa va, nahan Me iv iyou ne a iengem, kape TER u akum a Sha A kaa ne." 
Haggai2:8 Azurfa ka u Wam, zenaria kpaa ka u Wam je, kape TER u akum a Sha A kaa ne." 
Haggai2:9 Icivir i iyou ne i masetyô ia hemba i tsuaa la, kape TER u akum a Sha A kaa ne; hen ijiir ne Me na bem, kape TER u akum a Sha A kaa ne." 
Haggai2:10 Sha uwer u sha utaankarunyiin ayange a u ikundu kar anyiin sha inyom i sha uhar i Dariu la, kwaghôron u TER va sha ikev i profeti Hagai, er:" 
Haggai2:11 TER u akum a Sha ngu kaan nahan er: Shi pine nen upristi sha kwagh u atindigh, ner:" 
Haggai2:12 Aluer or nana wa icighaninyam ken mkaikondo u nan, man nana bende mkaikondo u nan sha bredi, shin sha kwagh u jiidi, shin sha wain, shin sha mkure, shin sha hanma kwaghyan yô, una hingir icighankwagha? Upristi gema kaa er: Ei." 
Haggai2:13 Tsô Hagai kaa er: Aluer orgen nana hôngor iyol sha ikomor man nana bende a akaa ne yô, kwagh la una hôngorô? Upristi gema kaa er: Una hôngor." 
Haggai2:14 Nahan Hagai gema kaa er: Kape ior mban ve lu je ne, man kape ikurior ne i lu sha ishigh Yagh ne, kape TER A kaa ne; man kape hanma tom u aveegh ve kpaa u lu ne, kua kwagh u ve ne nagh a min la kpaa; ka u wang ga." 
Haggai2:15 Hegen yô, shi ver nen ishima, hii nyian je, nenge nen kwagh u ken ijime la, er i lu a ver iwen sha iwen igen ken tempel u TER ga je yô." 
Haggai2:16 Hen shighe la cii, zum u or nana va hen tihi u ikaren ikundu, yô, nan zua a mi pue tseegh; zum u or nana va hen ihungwa i shoghol wain sha u nana kese ikaren akunduahargber yô, nan tser a mi ikundu tseegh." 
Haggai2:17 M tsaha ne sha mhie u iyia man sha yien man sha awombo, ka ityom yen i aveegh cii; nahan kpaa ne hide her a Mo ga, kape TER A kaan ne." 
Haggai2:18 Shi ver nen ishima, hii nyian je, nenge nen kwagh u ken ijime la, hii sha uwer u sha utaankarunyiin ayange a u ikundu kar anyiin, hii sha iyange i i tim imagh ki tempel u TER la je, ver nen ishima sha mi." 
Haggai2:19 Sam shi sha una je kpa? Een, kon u wain man u tur man u pomegraneti kua u olev kpaa, ume ga. Hii nyian je, Me ver ne dedoo." 
Haggai2:20 Kwaghôron u TER shi va hen Hagai u sha kwa har sha uwer la ayange a u ikundu kar anyiin er: 
Haggai2:21 Kaa Serubabel gomna u Yuda, wer: Me tenger Sha man tar;" 
Haggai2:22 Me yôhôl ikônough ki torough ki ityartor, Me tim tahav mbu ityartor i akuraior kera; Me zôhô akekeautya a mbaunden sha mi la; anyinya man mbahendan a, vea haa inya, hanmô sha sanker u anngô u nan." 
Haggai2:23 Sha iyange la, kape TER u akum a Sha a kaa ne, Me tôô u, we Serubabel, wanakiriki Wam, wan u Shealtiel, kape TER A kaa ne, Me gema u ú hingir iyôgh ki ken uwe ki veren ikav a min; gadia M tsuwa u, kape TER u akum a Sha A kaa ne." 
Zechariah1:1 Sha uwer u sha anigheni, sha inyom i sha uhar i Dariu la, kwaghôron u TER va hen profeti Sekaria wan u Berekia, wan u Ido, er:" 
Zechariah1:2 Ishima vihi TER tsung a uter enev. 
Zechariah1:3 Nahan yô, kaa a ve wer: TER u akum a Sha ngu kaan nahan er: Hide nen her a Mo, kape TER u akum a Sha A kaa ne, nahan Mo kpaa Me hide her a ven, kape TER u akum a Sha A kaa ne." 
Zechariah1:4 De kera luun nen er uter enev nahan ga, mba uprofeti mba tsuaa mbala, ve lu genger imo kaan a ve er: TER u akum a Sha ngu kaan nahan er: Gema nen asema, undu nen igbenda yen i bo man aeren a en a bo; kpa ve ungwa ga, ve ver ato her a Mo kpaa ga, kape TER A kaa ne." 
Zechariah1:5 Uter enev mba hana? Man uprofeti yee; mba uma her zan zana? 
Zechariah1:6 Kpa akaaôron Am man akaawan a Am, a M wa mbatomov Av, uprofeti la yô, a kôr uter enev gaa? Nahan ve gema asema ve kaa er: Er TER u akum a Sha A we ishima u eren a vese sha inja i igbenda yase man sha inja i aeren a ase la yô, kape A er a vese je la." 
Zechariah1:7 Sha uwer u sha pue kar môm ayange a u ikundu kar anyiin, ka uwer u Shebati je la, sha inyom i sha uhar i Dariu la, kwaghôron u TER va hen profeti Sekaria, wan u Berekia, wan u Ido, er:" 
Zechariah1:8 M lu kenger tugh yô, nenge, or henda nyinya u nyian, tile ker atô u ikon i mertel i shin pev; man ken ijime na yô, anyinya lu, lu a nyian man a lun kang man a pupuu." 
Zechariah1:9 Nahan m kaa mer: Terem! Ka nyi kwagh nee? Nahan ortyom u lu ôron kwagh a mo la, kaa a mo er: Me tese u inja i akaa ne." 
Zechariah1:10 Tsô or u a tile ker atô u ikon i mertel la kaa er: Mban ka mba TER A tindi ve yô, sha u zenden ningir sha tar." 
Zechariah1:11 Ve gema ve kaa a Ortyom u TER u A tile ker atô u ikon i mertel la er: Se zende tar cii, man nenge tar cii huan ving man u mem kpaa." 
Zechariah1:12 Nahan Ortyom u TER la kaa er: TER u akum a Sha, shi nan je man Ú zungwe Yerusalem kua agar a Yuda mhôônom, a iyugh You i lu sha a je i kom anyom akunduatargber ne ase?" 
Zechariah1:13 Tsô TER gema ôr kwagh a ortyom u a lu ôron kwagh a mo la sha akaaôron a dedoo man a surun ishima kpaa. 
Zechariah1:14 Nahan ortyom u a lu ôron kwagh a mo la, kaa a mo er: Genger imo, kaa wer: TER u akum a Sha ngu kaan nahan er: M gba iwuhe sha ci u Yerusalem kua Shion, ka iwuhe i taveraa je." 
Zechariah1:15 Ishima vihim tsung a akuraior a a tem bem bem la; gadia er Ishima vihim kpuaa yô, ve di ve gema ve er kwagh hemba vihin." 
Zechariah1:16 Nahan yô, TER ngu kaan nahan er: M hide hen Yerusalem a mhôônom ma zungwen; á maa iyou Yam ker, kape TER u akum a Sha A kaa ne; á samber kor u karen sha Yerusalem cii." 
Zechariah1:17 Shi genger imo, kaa wer: TER u akum a Sha ngu kaan nahan er: Agar a Am aa shi á mgbough a mkpeyol; TER Una shi á sur Shion ishima, man Una shi á tsuwa Yerusalem kpaa." 
Zechariah1:18 Tsô m kende ashe sha, m kenger, yô, nenge akor lu anyiin." 
Zechariah1:19 M gema m pine ortyom u a lu ôron kwagh a mo la mer: Ka nyi kwagh nee? Nahan a kaa a mo er: Angan ka akor a a sambe Yuda man Iserael kua Yerusalem la. 
Zechariah1:20 TER shi tesem mbavareniwa unyiin. 
Zechariah1:21 Tsô m pine mer: Mban va sha u va eren nyi? Nahan A ôr kwagh A kaa er: Angan ka akor a a sambe Yuda je or u kenden ityough sha nan kera lu ga ne; kpa mban va sha u va tan a mciem, man u haan akor a akuraior inya, a a kende korough sha, sha u samben tar u Yuda la." 
Zechariah2:1 M kende ashe sha m kenger, yô, nenge, or lu a kor u karen kwagh a mi sha uwe." 
Zechariah2:2 Nahan m pine mer: Zan you hana? Tsô or la kaa a mo er: Ka sha u karen Yerusalem sha u nengen igbanger na man ilihen na er i lu yô. 
Zechariah2:3 Yô, nenge, er ortyom u a lu ôron kwagh a mo la kporom ken hemen yô, ortyom ugen due va kohol un," 
Zechariah2:4 a kaa a u masen van la er: Za ayem, za ôr kwagh a wanyekwaor la, kaa wer: Yerusalem una lu er agar a lun a ugir ga nahan, sha ci mngee u ior man uzendenya mba ve lu kimi yô." 
Zechariah2:5 Gadia TER ngu kaan nahan er: Mo Me hingir un gilgar u usu, á kase un á tser, man Me hingir un kwagh u icivirigh ken atô na." 
Zechariah2:6 Mough, mough yevese due nen ken tar u Imbusutarimese la kera, kape TER A kaa ne; gadia M sambe ne wuee er ahumbe a anyiin a Sha nahan, kape TER A kaa ne." 
Zechariah2:7 Mough yem hen Shion, yevese war, we u u tem vea wankwase u Babilon ne." 
Zechariah2:8 Gadia TER u akum a Sha ngu kaan nahan er, ka sha u m̱ tese icivir Na, A tindim hen akuraior a a ye ishar sha a ven la ye; gadia u nan bende a ven yô, nan bende hongorshe Na je." 
Zechariah2:9 Gadia, nenge, Me kunde uwegh Agh sha a ve, vea hingir ishar i mba iyange ve shiren ve tom la; tsô nea fa er i lu TER u akum a Sha, A tindim yô." 
Zechariah2:10 Wa icam, ember, we wankwase u Shion; gadia nenge, M ngu van, Me tema ken atô wou, kape TER A kaa ne." 
Zechariah2:11 Akuraior kpishi aa va zua a TER sha iyange la, aa hingir ior Av, Mo kpaa Me tema ken atô wou; tsô ú fa er i lu TER u akum a Sha A tindim her a we yô." 
Zechariah2:12 TER Una ya dyako sha Yuda, ka kwar Na ken icighantar je la, Una shi á tsuwa Yerusalem kpaa." 
Zechariah2:13 Huan nen ving sha ishigh ki TER, ne uuma cii; gadia A mough hen icighanjiir Na." 
Zechariah3:1 Tsô A tesem zegepristi Yosua, a tile sha ishigh ki Ortyom u TER, Satan gema tile un ken uwegh ku yanegh sha u yilan un ijir." 
Zechariah3:2 TER kaa a Satan er: TER A̱ yange u, we Satan; een, TER u A tsough Yerusalem la, A̱ yange u; ngun kera ka ityôndo i i sase duen a mi ken usu gaa?" 
Zechariah3:3 Yosua yô, lu a akondo a iligh iyol, a tile sha ishigh ki Ortyom la." 
Zechariah3:4 A gema A kaa a mba ve tile sha ishigh Nagh la, er: Er nen un akondo a iligh la kera. A kaa a na er: Nenge, M kar a ifer you hen a we kera, Me haa u akondo a icivirigh." 
Zechariah3:5 Nahan m kaa mer, ve̱ kange un atsar a wang sha ityou. Tsô ve kange un atsar a wang sha ityou, man ve haa un akondo kpaa; Ortyom u TER tile lu her." 
Zechariah3:6 Tsô Ortyom u TER shi ôr kwagh a Yosua gbang gbang, kaa er:" 
Zechariah3:7 TER u akum a Sha ngu kaan nahan er: Aluer ú zenden sha igbenda Yam man ú eren tom u M ne u yô, nahan ú nengen sha ya Wam man shi ú kuran ityembeya Yam, Mo kpaa Me na u ian i nyôron ken mba ve til heen ne." 
Zechariah3:8 Shi ver ato, zegepristi Yosua, we man akar a ou a a tem u sha ishi la, gadia ve ka ior i tesen a tese ikav; gadia nenge, duen Yam a wanakiriki Wam, icerenkon la." 
Zechariah3:9 Gadia nenge, iwen i M ver sha ishigh ki Yosua la, sha iwen i môm la, ashe nga ataankarahar; nenge, Me nger ingeren i sha iwen la, kape TER u akum a Sha A kaa ne, man shi Me kar a ifer i tar ne kera sha iyange i môm." 
Zechariah3:10 Sha iyange la, kape TER u akum a Sha A kaa ne, hanmô wen nana lôhô or u wan ndor a nan sha u nana̱ va hen nan shin itinekon i wain i nan man shin itine i tur i nan kpaa." 
Zechariah4:1 Tsô ortyom u a ôr kwagh a mo la shi va, va nderem er ka i nder or u yaven nahan." 
Zechariah4:2 A kaa a mo er: Ka nyi u nenge a mi? M kaa mer: M kenger, yô, nenge, daarimenger u i er sha zenaria jimin cii, a gbande u haan mkurem ker vegher na u sha, man amenger a na sha mi, ataankarahar; ugongor utaankaruhar lu sha ci u hanma imenger i i lu sha agbaa la;" 
Zechariah4:3 man ikon i olev lu her ihiar, u môm ken uwegh ku yanegh ku gbande la man ku gen di ken wegh nagh ku imesegh." 
Zechariah4:4 M gema m kaa a ortyom u a ôr kwagh a mo la mer: Terem, ka nyi nee?" 
Zechariah4:5 Tsô ortyom u a ôr kwagh a mo la gema kaa a mo er: U fa inja na gaa? M kaa mer: Ei, terem." 
Zechariah4:6 Nahan a gema a kaa a mo er: Ngun ka kwaghôron u TER a Serubabel er: Ka sha agee ga, ka sha utaha kpaa ga, kpa ka sha Jijingi Wam, kape TER u akum a Sha A kaa ne." 
Zechariah4:7 U ngu nyi, we zegewo ne? Sha ishigh ki Serubabel ú hingir shambe shambe; una due a iwen i sha kur a amo a genger sha i er: Mrumun u sha mhôôn, mrumun u sha mhôôn." 
Zechariah4:8 Kwaghôron u TER shi va her a mo er: 
Zechariah4:9 Ave a Serubabel tim imagh ki iyou ne, shi ka ave na kpaa aa kure i ye, tsô né fa er i lu TER u akum a Sha a tindim her a ven yô." 
Zechariah4:10 Gadia ka an nan laha iyange i akaa a kiriki laa? Gadia a ataankarahar ne, ka ashe a TER a a jingi a nengen tar cii la, aa ember, zum u aa nenge kor u sôron kwagh a min sha u a̱ lu jighilaa, sha uwegh ku Serubabel yô." 
Zechariah4:11 Nahan m gema m pine un mer: Inja i ikon i olev ihiar i i lu daarimenger vegher u ken uwegh ku yanegh kua ken imese kpaa la er nyi? 
Zechariah4:12 Tsô shi m pine un mer: Inja i agbaa a olev ahar a a lu hen ugongor mba zenaria uhar, mba mkurem ma zenaria ma dugh ker la, er nyi?" 
Zechariah4:13 A gema a kaa a mo er: U fa inja na gaa? M kaa mer: Ei, m fa ga, Terem." 
Zechariah4:14 Nahan a kaa er: Mban ka mba uhar mba i shigh ve mkurem, mba ve til sha ishigh ki Ter u taregh cii yô." 
Zechariah5:1 Tsô shi m kende ashe sha, m kenger yô, nenge, ihurenruamabera u purugh a purugh!" 
Zechariah5:2 A kaa a mo er: Ka nyi u nenge a mi? M gema m kaa a na mer: M nenge a ihurenruamabera u purugh a purugh, ilihen na ngi aseva ikundu, igbanger na, aseva pue." 
Zechariah5:3 Tsô a kaa a mo er: Ngun ka ifan i, i dugh i lu zenden sha tar cii yô, gadia hanma or u nan iin yô, ka sha i á tim nan kera hegen ye; hanmô u nan bumun kpaa, ka sha i á tim nan kera hegen ye." 
Zechariah5:4 Me na ia due, kape TER u akum a Sha A kaa ne, ia nyôr ken iyou i ormbaiv man ken iyou i or u bumun iti Yam sha aie; ia tema ken atô u iyou i nan, ia nande i puru a ikpande i i kua awen a i kpaa." 
Zechariah5:5 Tsô ortyom u a lu ôron kwagh a mo la due va kaa a mo er: Shi kende ashe sha, nenge kwagh u a lu duen la." 
Zechariah5:6 Tsô m kaa mer: Ka nyi kwagh nee? A kaa er: Ngun ka efa, a lu duen ye. Shi a kaa a mo er: Ngun ka mluashe ve u sha tar cii." 
Zechariah5:7 Tsô nenge, i kende a kughur u sha inyer sha, kwase lu ker, a tema ken atô u efa." 
Zechariah5:8 A kaa a mo er: Ka iferkwagh je ne; nahan a kende un shin atô u efa, a gema kughur u sha inyer la a cir zwa u efa a mi." 
Zechariah5:9 Tsô m kende ashe sha, yô, nenge, kasev uhar lu duen van, ahumbe lu ken akper a ve; ve lu a akper er ôô-ôô nahan; ve tôô efa la ve yem a mi hen halegh u tar man Sha." 
Zechariah5:10 Nahan m kaa a ortyom u a ôr kwagh a mo la mer: Ka han ve ze a efa nee? 
Zechariah5:11 A kaa a mo er: Ka u za maan un iyou hen tar u Shinar; zum u á sôr i kera yô, á ver un keregh sha ijiir na." 
Zechariah6:1 Shi m kende ashe sha, yô nenge, akekeautya anyiin due hen haregh u iwo ihiar; iwo shon lu iwo i togula." 
Zechariah6:2 Ikyekye i hiihii la lu a anyinya a nyian; i sha uhar la lu a anyinya a il; 
Zechariah6:3 i sha utar la lu a anyinya a pupuu; i sha unyiin lu a anyinya a lun abeen abeen a taver iyol. 
Zechariah6:4 Tsô m gema m ôr kwagh a ortyom u a lu ôron kwagh a mo la mer: Terem ka nyi akaa nee? 
Zechariah6:5 Nahan ortyom la gema kaa a mo er: Angan ka ahumbe a anyiin a Sha a a dugh er a vande tilen sha ishigh ki Ter u taregh cii yô. 
Zechariah6:6 I i lu a anyinya a il la due lu zan sha tar u Imbusutarimese la; man a pupuu la due dondo sha a; a lun abeen abeen la due lu zan shin tar u Imbusutariyan la. 
Zechariah6:7 A taver iyol la due a ver ishigh u zenden ningir sha tar; tsô a kaa er: Mough nen heen zende nen ningir nen sha tar. Nahan a gba zenden ningir sha tar. 
Zechariah6:8 Tsô a yilam sha imo i genger genger er: Nenge, a a yemen sha tar u Imbusutarimese la, a na Jijingi wam mmem shin tar u Imbusutarimese la." 
Zechariah6:9 Kwaghôron u TER va her a mo, kaa er:" 
Zechariah6:10 Ngohol kwagh hen mbauikangenev, ka hen Heldai man hen Tobiya man hen Yedaia; sha iyange shon la, we kpaa va, va nyôr hen ya u Yoshia wan u Sefania, henpe mba ve hidi ken Babilon ve nyer la" 
Zechariah6:11 ngohol azurfa man zenaria hen ve, er idyer i tor a mi, cir sha ityough ki zegepristi Yosua wan u Yehosadaki," 
Zechariah6:12 man ôr kwagh a na kaa wer: TER u akum a Sha ngu kaan nahan er: Nenge, or u i yer iti na er Icerenkon la una due hen ijiir na, ka un una maa tempel u TER ye;" 
Zechariah6:13 ka un je una maa tempel u TER ye; una ya icivir i tor, una tema tor sha ikônough nagh ki torough man una lu pristi sha ikônough nagh ki torough; mhen u bem una lu her atô u ve mba uhar." 
Zechariah6:14 Idyer i tor la ia lu kwagh u umbur Helem man Tobiya man Yedaia man Hen wan u Sefania a mi, ken tempel u TER." 
Zechariah6:15 Mba ve lu ica je vea va, vea va wase u maan tempel u TER, tsô nea fa er i lu TER u akum a Sha A tindim her a ven yô. Kwagh ne una kure sha mi vough, aluer nea wa imo i TER, Aôndo wen, iko a ishima i môm yô." 
Zechariah7:1 Tsô sha inyom i sha unyiin i tor Dariu la, kwaghôron u TER va hen Sekaria sha uwer u sha utaankarunyiin, ayange a u anyiin la, ka Kiselev je la." 
Zechariah7:2 Yô, ior mba Betel tindi Shareser man Regem-meleki man ior vev, sha u ve̱ za ker mrumun u sha mhôôn u TER," 
Zechariah7:3 ve̱ za pine upristi mba sha iyou i TER u akum a Sha man uprofeti, er: M̱ vaan, man m̱ hôron kwaghyan sha uwer u sha utaan, er m vande eren anyom a a kar kpishi la nahan shinii?" 
Zechariah7:4 Tsô kwaghôron u TER u akum a Sha va her a mo kaa er: 
Zechariah7:5 Ôr kwagh a ior mba hen tar ne cii man a upristi kpaa, kaa wer: Er ne lu hôron kwaghyan man zungwen sha uwer u sha utaan man u sha utaankaruhar la, anyom a akunduatargber ne cii, lu sha ci Wam je ne hôr kwaghyan ye he?" 
Zechariah7:6 Zum u ka nea yaan kwagh man nea maan kwagh la, kera ka sha ci wen ayol a en tsô ka ne yaan man ne maan gaa?" 
Zechariah7:7 Kera ka akaaôron a TER lu ôr sha uprofeti mba tsuaa mbala, zum u ior tema ken Yerusalem man ve lu a mkpeyol, man agar a na a a kase un tser la, man ior lu ken tar u Imbusutariyan man shin tar u Pev la gaa?" 
Zechariah7:8 Tsô kwaghôron u TER va hen Sekaria er: 
Zechariah7:9 TER u akum a Sha ngu kaan nahan er: Ôr ijir sha mimi, tese erdoo man mhôônom ma zungwen, hanma or a anngô u nan," 
Zechariah7:10 de kera kighir nen kwasecôghol a ican ga, man wancôghol man shiror shin icanor kpaa ga; hanmô wen nana de kera henen iferkwagh ken ishima i nan sha anngô u nan ga." 
Zechariah7:11 Kpa ve venda u ungwan, ve yoghol akende, ve cir ato a ve sha u vea ungwa ga yô." 
Zechariah7:12 Een, ve er asema a ve taver er ka iwen i diamondi yô, sha u vea ungwa atindiakaa man akaaôron ga yô, a TER u akum a Sha A tindi sha Jijingi Na sha ikev i uprofeti mba tsuaa mbala; nahan iyugh i vesen i due hen TER u akum a Sha." 
Zechariah7:13 Yô, er Un A yila man ve rumun u ungwan ga, nahan kape ve kpaa vea yila, kpa Me ungwa ga la, kape TER u akum a Sha A kaa ne;" 
Zechariah7:14 kpa Me purugh a ve sha hiar, Me sambe ve ken akuraior cii a ve fe a ga yô. Ka nahan man tar la hingir ice ken ijime ve, je ma or u zenden karen hiden ker, kera lu ga ye; ve gema tar u doon ne hingir ice." 
Zechariah8:1 Kwaghôron u TER u akum a Sha shi va her a mo, er:" 
Zechariah8:2 TER u akum a Sha ngu kaan nahan er: M gba iwuhe sha ci u Shion, ka iwuhe i vesen je, man m gba iwuhe sha ci na, sha ishima i vihin tsung." 
Zechariah8:3 TER ngu kaan nahan er: Me shi Me hide hen Shion Me tema ken atô u Yerusalem; man á yila Yerusalem er Gar u mimi, man uwo u TER u akum a Sha er Icighanwo." 
Zechariah8:4 TER u akum a Sha ngu kaan nahan er: Utamenmbaiorov man ungômbakasev, shi vea tema sha igbenda i Yerusalem, hanma or nana lu a gbough ku nan ken uwe sha ci u ayange kar ve sha won ngee." 
Zechariah8:5 Igbenda i gar kpaa ia mgbough a mbayev mba nomso man mba kasev, vea numben sha igbenda na." 
Zechariah8:6 TER u akum a Sha ngu kaan nahan er: Aluer á lu kwagh u kpilighyol sha ashe a asande a ior a a shi her hen ayange la yô, nahan ashe Am kpaa á kpiligh a iyolo? Kape TER u akum a Sha A kaa ne." 
Zechariah8:7 TER u akum a Sha ngu kaan nahan er: Nenge, Me yima ior Av mba ve lu ken tar u sha ityoughkitaregh man ken tar u shin ityôtar;" 
Zechariah8:8 Me hide a ve, vea va tema ken atô u Yerusalem, vea hingir ior Av, Mo kpaa Me hingir Aôndo ve ken jighjigh man ken perapera." 
Zechariah8:9 TER u akum a Sha ngu kaan nahan er: Ave a en a̱ taver, ne mba ne ongo akaaôron angan sha ayange ne, sha zwa u uprofeti, hii sha iyange i i tim imagh ki iyou i TER u akum a Sha, sha u á maa i ka tempel je la." 
Zechariah8:10 Gadia er ayange la lu a kuma ga yô, injar lu sha ci u or, shin sha ci u zendenya kpaa ga; man shi or u nyôron shin u duen lu a mwar ga sha ci u orihom; gadia M sende ior ityough cii, hanma or nan lu ihom a or u wan ndor a nan." 
Zechariah8:11 Kpa hegen yô, Me kera er a asande a ior a a shi ne, er sha ayange a tsuaa la nahan ga, kape TER u akum a Sha A kaa ne." 
Zechariah8:12 Gadia ivor i bem ia lu heregh; kon u wain ua ume atam a u, inya kpaa ia na iyiagh nagh, Usha kpaa vea gba avure a ve; Me na asande a ior a a shi her ne, aa ya dyako sha akaa ne cii." 
Zechariah8:13 Tsô, er ne lu a ifan iyol ken akuraior nahan, we, ya u Yuda man ya u Iserael, kape Me yima ne la, man nea hingir iveren; de kera cie nen ga, taver nen ave a en." 
Zechariah8:14 Gadia TER u akum a Sha ngu kaan nahan er: Er M wa ishima u eren ne kwagh u bo zum u uter enev bamem la, man ishima gemam kposo sha kwagh la ga, kape TER u akum a Sha A kaa ne," 
Zechariah8:15 kape sha ayange angan shi M ver ishima u eren dedoo a Yerusalem man ya u Yuda la; de kera cie nen ga. 
Zechariah8:16 Ka akaa a né er a ne: Ôron nen kwagh sha mimi, hanma or a orgen; ôron nen ijir sha mimi man sha bem hen ihindagar yen;" 
Zechariah8:17 ma or ken aven nana̱ de kera henen ifer ken ishima i nan sha or u wan ndor a nan ga; mbum u sha aie a̱ de kera doon ne ga; gadia akaa angan cii, M kôr a ihom, kape TER A kaa ne." 
Zechariah8:18 Kwaghôron u TER u akum a Sha shi va her a mo er: 
Zechariah8:19 TER u akum a Sha ngu kaan nahan er: Kwaghyan u hôron u sha uwer u sha unyiin man u sha utaan man u sha utaankaruhar man u sha pue, una hingir Yuda kwagh u msaanyol man u iember man uiniongo mba dedoo; nahan yô mimi man bem ve̱ doo ne ishima." 
Zechariah8:20 TER u akum a Sha ngu kaan nahan er: Akuraior shi aa va kua ior mba teman ken agar kpishi," 
Zechariah8:21 mbateman ken gar ugen vea za hen ugen, vea kaa er: Sé yem nen fefa, sé za ker nen mrumun u sha mhôôn u TER, man sé ker nen TER u akum a Sha; mo kpaa me za." 
Zechariah8:22 Een, ior kpishi man akuraior a ageegh vea va sha u keren TER u akum a Sha ken Yerusalem, man sha u keren mrumun u sha mhôôn u TER." 
Zechariah8:23 TER u akum a Sha ngu kaan nahan er: Sha ayange la, iorov pue ken akuraior a hanma zwa cii vea kôr mkaikondo u Oryuda, vea kaa er: Sé za a ven imôngo, gadia se ungwa ser, Aôndo ngu a ven." 
Zechariah9:1 Mkaanem ma TER ôr sha tar u Haderaki, Damaseku una lu ijiir i memen i ma; gadia ashe a TER nga sha ior kua sha ikwe i Iserael cii;" 
Zechariah9:2 man sha Hamati kpaa u a lu sha ikighirtar na la; sha Tiru man Shidon kpaa, shin er ve lu a kwaghfan kpishi nahan kpaa." 
Zechariah9:3 Tiru maa iyouutya i taver sha ci na, a ombo azurfa er vuulevu nahan, man zenaria kpaa er angbiôr a sha igbenda yô." 
Zechariah9:4 Nenge, TER Una kura kwagh na kera, Una yôhôl kpekpegar na á haa shin zegemnger; man un iyol na á nande un sha usu." 
Zechariah9:5 Asekelon una nenge a mi una cia; Gasa una gbidye akarkase iyol, Ekeron kpaa, gadia ishimaverenkeghen na saa dang, tor una saa ken Gasa kera; Asekelon una kera lu a ior mba teman ker ga." 
Zechariah9:6 Ikurior i nungwa nungwa ia tema ken Ashedodi, man Me tim ihagh i Mbafiliti kera." 
Zechariah9:7 Me kar a awambe a na ken zwa na kera kua akaa a ndôhôrshima a na kpaa ken ahigha a anyiigh a na la; un kpaa una shi asande her sha ci u Aôndo wase, man una hingir er orhemen u kwe nahan ken Yuda, man Ekeron una lu er Oryebushi nahan." 
Zechariah9:8 Me wa ya wam afo a utya, Me tser, sha u kuran un sha akumautya a a zenden karen man hiden la; ma ipilaor nana̱ de kera shi karen ker ga, gadia hegen M nenge sha ashe Am." 
Zechariah9:9 Ember tsung, we wankwase u Shion! Gbidye iwer we wankwase u Yerusalem; nenge, Tor wou ngu van her a we, Un ka u perapera je, man u hemban kpaa, u hiden a iyol Na ijime, A henda jaki, wan u mgbianjaki." 
Zechariah9:10 Me tim akekeautya hen Eferaim kera, man anyinya a utya kpaa ken Yerusalem, man á kar a adautya kera kpaa; Una yôô bem hen akuraior cii, Una tema tor á hii hen zegemnger á za ar hen zegemnger man á hii hen Ifi la zan zan á za ar sha akighir a tar." 
Zechariah9:11 We kpaa, sha ci u awambe a ikuryan you la yô, M pase mbauikangenev ou mba ve lu shin ihungwa i lun a mngerem shimi ga la, M tuhwa." 
Zechariah9:12 Hide yem nen hen iyou i utya i tiaver ne mbauikangenev mba ne lu a ishimaverenkeghen ne; nyian je, M pase Mer: Me ver u iveren ia kuma iveren kwa har je." 
Zechariah9:13 Gadia M henda Yuda er ada Wam nahan, M wa Eferaim sha mi er ka ivaan nahan; Me tor ônov ou mba nomso ityô, we Shion, sha u hendan a ônov ou, we tar u Grika; Me gema u, ú hingir er sanker u ortaveryol nahan." 
Zechariah9:14 Tsô á nenge a TER Una kar ve sha, ivaan Na kpaa ia due er inyiar nahan; man Ter AÔNDO Una tôngo korough, Una va ken hiar u ken imbusutariyan la." 
Zechariah9:15 TER u akum a Sha Una kura ve, vea ya, vea ndyar angahar sha awen a ken mzu; vea ma, vea yôôso er ve ma wain nahan, á iv ve er ka gbande nahan, man er ka azongo a atse a nanden nagh sha mi nahan." 
Zechariah9:16 Sha iyange la TER, Aôndo ve, Una yima ve er ka ikumuile i ior Nav nahan; gadia vea lu er awen a engem a sha idyer i tor yô, vea engem sha tar Na." 
Zechariah9:17 Mdoom vem gba ikôr, mdooashe ve kpaa vese gande! Samuyia ua er mbayevikaior man wain u he kpaa una er mbayevkasev vea gume." 
Zechariah10:1 Sôn nen TER ura u sha ayange a ura u masetyô la; ka TER A er inyiar ye, Una na ve ura u vesen, hanma or nana zua a akaamenden ken sule." 
Zechariah10:2 Gadia terafim ôr gbilinkwagh, mbaasorov kpaa mba nengen aie, mba ôron mnyam ma cien ma aiem, mba sur ior asema gbilin; ka nahan man ve zenden er iyôngo nahan, ican ngi eren ve, sha ci u orkuran ngu ga." 
Zechariah10:3 Iyugh Yam ngi yeghen sha mbakuran, Me tsaha ukpev; gadia TER u akum a Sha va sôr ikumuile Na, ka ya u Yuda je la, Una gema ve vea hingir er nyinya Na u dedoo ken utya yô." 
Zechariah10:4 Ka ken a ve iwen i sha zongo ia due ye, imande i tenti kpaa ka ken a ve, adautya kpaa ka ken a ve, ka ken a ven kpaa hanma ortaregh nana due ye." 
Zechariah10:5 Vea hingir er mbaageev mba ve ndyar angahar shin angbiôr a sha akômaigbinda ken utya yô; vea nôngo ityav, gadia TER ngu a ve; mbaanyinyav vea va ahenge." 
Zechariah10:6 Me taver ya u Yuda, Me yima ya u Yosev kpaa. Me hide a ve, gadia mhôônom kôrom a ve, vea hingir je á bee er lu M ta ve kera ga nahan; gadia Mo M ngu TER, Aôndo ve, Me ungwa ve kpaa." 
Zechariah10:7 Eferaim kpaa una hingir er orageegh yô, ishima ve ia ember er ka vea ma wain nahan; ônov vev vea nenge nahan, vea ember, ishima ve ia ember ken TER." 
Zechariah10:8 Me yila ve sha hondo, Me kohol ve, gadia M paa ve; vea ngee er ve vande ngeen nahan." 
Zechariah10:9 Shin er M tsenda ve ken akuraior nahan kpaa, vea umbur Mo ken ityar i caa; vea lu uma her a ônov vev, man vea hide kpaa." 
Zechariah10:10 Me shi Me due a ve ken tar u Igipiti kpaa, Me kohol mba ve lu ken Ashiria, Me va a ve ken tar u Gileadi man u Lebanon, ijiir i teman ia yina ve." 
Zechariah10:11 Vea kar ken zegemnger u ican, á gbidye agôndo a zegemnger; aiv a Nil cii aa uma; á shiligh a ihagh i Ashiria inya, tôgh ku torough ku Igipiti kpaa kua kar kera." 
Zechariah10:12 Me taver ve ken TER; vea zenden ken iti Na, kape TER A kaa la." 
Zechariah11:1 Bugh ihinda you, we Lebanon, sha u usu u̱ hia usedar ou." 
Zechariah11:2 Vaa, we kon u shiperu, gadia sedar gba, man i vihi ikon injaa kera; vaa nen, ne ikon i ouki i Bashan gadia ikô i lun dimii i gba." 
Zechariah11:3 Ungwa, mliam ma mbakuranilev! gadia icivir ve saa kera; ungwa, kume u agumaubegha! gadia gborikô u Yordan saa ishe." 
Zechariah11:4 TER, Aôndo wam, ngu kaan nahan er: Lu orkuran u iyôngo i á va sôngo i la;" 
Zechariah11:5 mbayamen i mba senge i, kpa ishima i ne ve ibo ga; mba ve teen i, ve kaan er: I̱ wuese TER, gadia m hingir ornyar; mbakuran i kpaa mhôônom kôr ve a i ga." 
Zechariah11:6 Gadia mhôônom maa kera kôrom a mba ve tem ken tar ne ga, kape TER A kaa ne; kpa nenge, Me na ior vea gba hanma or sha ikev i or u wan ndor a nan, man sha ikev i tor u nan, vea vihi tar kera, man Mo kpaa, Me yima môm môm sha ikev ve ga." 
Zechariah11:7 Nahan m hingir orkuran u iyôngo i á va sôngo i la—ka nahan man i ker mhôônom ye. Nahan Mtôô igbough ihiar, m yila u môm, mer Dooashe, ugen la m yila mer Mzough; tsô m gba koson iyôngo la." 
Zechariah11:8 Tsô m wua mbakuranilev utar ken uwer môm; gadia m kera fatyô u wan ishima a ve ga, ve di kpaa m due ve ishima." 
Zechariah11:9 Nahan m kaa mer: Me kera lu orkuran wen ga; kwagh u a lu u kpen yô, a̱ kpe, man kwagh u a lu u saan yô, a̱ saa, mba vea shi her yô, ve̱ ya inyam ve ayol a ve." 
Zechariah11:10 Nahan M tôô gbough agh Dooashe la, m kever ku her atô, m pav ikur i m ya a ior cii la." 
Zechariah11:11 I pav i sha iyange la, nahan iyôngo i i ker mhôônom i wem iko ne, i fa er i lu kwaghôron u TER je yô." 
Zechariah11:12 M kaa a ve, mer: Aluer a doo ne yô, nam nen injar yam; kpa aluer a doo ne ga yô, de nen. Nahan ve kar agbenger a azurfa ikundugber sha ci u injar yam." 
Zechariah11:13 Tsô TER kaa a mo er: Gema a, haa sha ci u ormaantyegh, ka zegeishe i ve nenge m kom je la. Nahan m tôô agbenger a azurfa ikundugber la, m haa a sha ci u ormaantyegh ken iyou i TER." 
Zechariah11:14 Tsô shi m kever gbough kugenegh kura, ka Mzough je la, m pav Yuda man Iserael mer ve̱ de kera luun anmgbianev ga." 
Zechariah11:15 TER kaa a mo er: Shi tôô ikav mbi ibumeorkuranilev. 
Zechariah11:16 Gadia, nenge, veren Yam orkuranilev sha tar, una wa mbisaanshe iko ga, una ker mbi mbi sambe la ga, una kange mbisombon ga, una koso mbitilensha la ga, kpa una ya inyam i mbiwanahôm, una tsuwa apande a mbi." 
Zechariah11:17 Kwagh á tser orkuranilev u dang ne u a undu iyôngo! Sanker ma a gber uwegh nagh kua ishe na i yan; uwegh nagh ku̱ uma tsong, ishe na i yan kpaa i̱ kôngor gbina." 
Zechariah12:1 Ka mkaanem ma TER ôr sha Iserael. TER ngu ôron kwagh, Un u A samber Usha, u A tim imagh ki taregh, man A er jijingi u or ken a nan yô, er:" 
Zechariah12:2 Nenge, M ngu eren Yerusalem a̱ hingir iyongo i nan ior mba ve kase un la cii, ve̱ hingir zemba ze zemba; man sha Yuda kpaa ia lu nahan, zum u á kase Yerusalem sha utya la." 
Zechariah12:3 Tsô sha iyange la, Me er Yerusalem una hingir ior cii iwen i yuhwan; mba vea kende i sha cii, vea vihi ayol a ve tsung; akuraior a sha tar cii aa kohol imôngo á ta num sha i." 
Zechariah12:4 Sha iyange la, kape TER A kaa ne, Me ta hanma nyinya mciem iyol, man orhendan un kpaa Me ta nan ihundugh. Me bugh ashe Am sha ya u Yuda man Me pir hanma nyinya u akuraior cii ashe." 
Zechariah12:5 Nahan mbahemenev mba ikwe i Yuda vea kaa ken asema a ve er: Mbateman ken Yerusalem, mba agee am ken TER u akum a Sha, Aôndo ve la." 
Zechariah12:6 Sha iyange la Me er mbahemenev mba Yuda vea hingir er gbande u lun a usu ken atô u ikon, man er ikaghusu ken atô u aile a uyia nahan; vea nande akuraior a a kase ve la cii ken iyan kua ken imese kpaa; Yerusalem una lu her hen ijiir na, ka hen Yerusalem je la." 
Zechariah12:7 TER Una vande yiman utenti mba Yuda, sha u icivir i ya u Davidi man icivir i mbateman ken Yerusalem i̱ de hemban i i Yuda la ga." 
Zechariah12:8 Sha iyange la TER Una kumba mba ve tem ken Yerusalem; u nan lu seelee kpaa, sha iyange la nana hingir er Davidi nahan; ya u Davidi kpaa una hingir er Aôndo nahan, er Ortyom u TER nahan, sha ishigh vegh." 
Zechariah12:9 Tsô sha iyange la Me ker u timin akuraior a a mough num a Yerusalem cii. 
Zechariah12:10 Me haa Jijingi u mhôôn man u zamber sha ya u Davidi man sha mba ve tem ken Yerusalem; man vea kenger Mo u ve komom la; vea zungwe Un er or ka nan zungwe wan u nan u môm môm nahan, asema aa vihi ve sha ci Na, er ishima ka i vihi or sha wan u nan u iunda yô." 
Zechariah12:11 Sha iyange la ijungwen i ken Yerusalem ia vese er ijungwen i Hadadi-rimon shin pev u Megido nahan. 
Zechariah12:12 Tar ua zungwe, hanma tsombor kposo; tsombor u ya u Davidi kposo, kasev vev kpaa kposo; tsombor u ya u Natan kposo, kasev vev kpaa kposo;" 
Zechariah12:13 Tsombor u ya u Levi kposo, kasev vev kpaa kposo; tsombor u ya u Shimei kposo, kasev vev kpaa kposo;" 
Zechariah12:14 icombor i i shi her cii, hanma tsombor kposo, kasev vev di kpaa kposo." 
Zechariah13:1 Sha iyange la imbormnger i lun ivegher ia lu sha ci u ya u Davidi man mbateman ken Yerusalem, sha ci u isholibo man mlu u wang ga." 
Zechariah13:2 Tsô sha iyange la, kape TER u akum a Sha A kaa ne, er: Me ese ati a ieev mbi hen tar ne kera, á kera umbur mbi sha won ga; shi Me kar a uprofeti mba aiev man jijingi u hôngorough ken tar ne kera." 
Zechariah13:3 Tsô aluer ma or shi nana ôr kwaghôron u profeti yô, hen shighe la ter u nan man ngô u nan mba ve mar nan vea kaa a nan er: Ú kera lu uma ga, gadia u ôr kwagh sha aie ken iti i TER; nahan ter u nan man ngô u nan mba ve mar nan la vea kuma nan á due kera, zum u nan lu ôron kwaghôron u profeti la." 
Zechariah13:4 Tsô sha iyange la uprofeti vea va ahenge, hanmô ve sha mpase u sha mnenge u nan, zum u nan lu ôron kwaghôron u profeti la, nana kera cir ikondo i aivegh sha u tsughun ior ga;" 
Zechariah13:5 kpa nana kaa er: Mo m ngu profeti ga, m ngu orkahansule, gadia or yamem er m lu iyev la je." 
Zechariah13:6 Aluer á pine nan er: Inja i avav a ken ave ou la ka nyi? Nahan nana gema á kaa er: Ka avav a i gberem hen ya u akar a am yô. 
Zechariah13:7 Nder, we sanker, za ta sha orkuranilev Wam, sha or u a lu ijende Yam la, kape TER u akum a Sha A kaa ne. Gbidye orkuranilev, iyôngo i̱ sambe; Me naregh uwegh sha mbakiriki." 
Zechariah13:8 Tsô ken tar la cii, kape TER A kaa ne, á tim akum ahar ken atar, aa kpe; kpa ikum i sha utar la yô, ia shi her." 
Zechariah13:9 Me haa ikum i sha utar la ken usu, Me wanger ve er ka i wanger azurfa nahan, Me kar ve er ka i kar zenaria nahan; vea yila sha iti Yam, Mo kpaa Me ungwa ve; Me kaa Mer: Ka ior Av; ve kpaa vea kaa er: TER ka Aôndo wam je." 
Zechariah14:1 Nenge, iyange i TER ngi van, i á kar ishar you ken atô wou yô." 
Zechariah14:2 Gadia Me kohol akuraior cii á va nôngo ityav a Yerusalem, á ngohol gar la, á kura akaa a ken ayou, á nzughul a kasev; vegher u gar á yem a ve uikangen; ior mba vea shi la, á tim ve ken gar la kera ga." 
Zechariah14:3 Zum la TER Una due, Una nôngo ityav a akuraior la, er ka A nôngo sha iyange i utya nahan." 
Zechariah14:4 Sha iyange la angahar a Na aa tile sha uwo u Olev u u lu Yerusalem sha ishi, vegher u sha ityoughkitaregh la; uwo u Olev ua pav her atô, hii vegher u sha ityoughkitaregh yem shin ityôtar, zegepev una lu ken atô; vegherwo u môm una yem vegher u ken imbusutarimese, ugen di vegher u ken imbusutariyan." 
Zechariah14:5 Nea yevese nea kar shin pev u iwo Yam; gadia pev u iwo la una ar hen Asel je; nea yevese er lu ne yevese mtenger u tar sha ayange a Ushia tor u Yuda la nahan; tsô TER Aôndo Wam Una va a uicighan Nav cii. 
Zechariah14:6 Sha iyange la iwanger ia lu ga; akaa a engem aa hide ijime iyol i a. 
Zechariah14:7 Á lu iyange i môm i TER A fe i yô; á lu atetan ga, á lu tugh kpaa ga; kpa á va hingir aikighe yô, iwanger ia lu." 
Zechariah14:8 Tsô sha iyange la mngerem ma umam maa due ken Yerusalem; tiôn u ma ugen una yem sha zegemnger u sha ityoughkitaregh man tiôn ugen shin zegemnger u shin ityôtar; fam kua inyom kpaa, á lu nahan." 
Zechariah14:9 TER Una tema tor sha tar cii; sha iyange la TER Una lu môm man iti Na kpaa ia lu i môm. 
Zechariah14:10 Tar la cii ua hingir shambe shambe, á hii hen Geba zan zan á za hen Rimon hen Yerusalem vegher u ken imbusutariyan la; kpa Yerusalem una tav sha, una lu hen ijiir na, á hii hen Hundagar u Benyamin zan zan á za ar hen ijiir i hunda u tsuaa la, kar za hen Hundagar u Zongo, man hii hen gôgôyou u taven u Hananel zan zan za ar hen ahungwa a shoghol wain a tor." 
Zechariah14:11 Ior vea tema ker, mtim u sha ifan i wan una kera lu ga, Yerusalem una tema bem bem." 
Zechariah14:12 Ka bouange u TER Una tsaha akuraior a a ve ityav sha Yerusalem cii a mi ne: Inyam ve ia hôô kera er ve til sha angahar a ve her la je, ashe ve kpaa aa hôô ken ategher, nombor ve kpaa ua hôô ken zwa ve." 
Zechariah14:13 Tsô sha iyange la injughul i vesen i i dugh hen TER ia ta sha a ve; hanma or nana gba or u wan ndor a nan sha uwe, uwegh ku orgenegh kua kende sha sha num a orgenegh." 
Zechariah14:14 Yuda je kpaa, una nôngo ityav a Yerusalem; man á kohol inyaregh ki akuraior a a kase un la cii: zenaria man azurfa man akondo, á ngee á dumbur." 
Zechariah14:15 Kape bouange inja ne nahan una haa sha anyinya man sha mbaalfadari man sha urakumi man sha ujaki man hanma zendenya u a lu ken afo la cii. 
Zechariah14:16 Tsô hanma or u nan shi ken akuraior a a ve ityav sha Yerusalem la, nana kôndon anyom anyom sha u za civir Tor, TER u akum a Sha, man sha u eren iniongo i atumbe kpaa." 
Zechariah14:17 Tsô á hingir u hanma tsombor ken icombor i sha tar cii ua za sha Yerusalem sha u za civir Tor, TER u akum a Sha la ga yô, ura ua kera nôô her a ve ga." 
Zechariah14:18 Aluer tsombor u Igipiti ua kôndo, ua va ga yô, mba ura u kera nee hen ve ga la, bouange una tser ve, u TER A tsahan akuraior a mi a a kende sha u za eren iniongo i atumbe ga la." 
Zechariah14:19 Ngun ka mtsaha u Igipiti man mtsaha u akuraior cii a a kende, sha u za eren iniongo i atumbe ga yô." 
Zechariah14:20 Sha iyange la á nger sha amem a anyinya er: Icighankwagh u TER; ityev mbi ken iyou i TER kpaa mbia hingir er ka agbande a sha ishigh ki atse a nanden nagh sha mi la nahan. 
Zechariah14:21 Een, hanma ityegh ki ken Yerusalem man ki ken Yuda kia hingir icighankwagh u TER u akum a Sha; mbanan iniav cii kpaa, vea va tôô ki, vea jiidi kwagh shimi; sha iyange la ma Orkanaan nana kera lu ken iyou i TER u akum a Sha ga." 
Malachi1:1 Mkaanem ma TER ôr a Iserael sha ikev i Malaki 
Malachi1:2 Ne doom ishima, kape TER A kaa ne. Nahan kpaa ne mba pin ner: se doo U ishima hana? Isou ka anngô u Yakob gaa? Kape TER A kaa ne. Nahan kpaa Yakob doom ishima;" 
Malachi1:3 kpa Isou yô, M kôr un ihom, M gema iwo na hingir ice, dyako na kpaa hingir kwagh u ugbaseela mba ken taaikôngo." 
Malachi1:4 Shin er Edom a kaan er: I hembe se, nahan kpaa sé hide, sé shi se maa ajiir a a hingir atse la, TER u akum a Sha gema ngu kaan nahan er: Vea maa, kpa Mo Me yôhôl; ior vea yilan ve er: Tar u ifer, man ior mba ishima i vihi TER a ve gbem sha won yô." 
Malachi1:5 Ashe a en aa nenge man nea kaa ner: TER vese je, A kar akighir a tar u Iserael ca je." 
Malachi1:6 Wan civir ter na, ortom kpaa civir orvesen na; aluer Mea lu ter yô, icivir Yam ngi hana? Man aluer Mea lu orvesen yô, mcia u i ciem ngu hana? Kape TER u akum a Sha A kaa a ven ne, upristi mba ne lahan iti Yam la; nahan kpaa ne kaa ner: Se laha iti You hana?" 
Malachi1:7 Ne mba nan nagh sha kwaghyan u hôngorough sha atse Am a nanden nagh sha mi, nahan kpaa ne mba kaan ner: Ka sha nyi se hôngor a we? ka er ne kaan ner: Tebul u TER ka kwagh u injaa ga yô." 
Malachi1:8 Zum u ka nea naan nagh sha kwagh u pirin ashe la, ka kwaghbo gaa? Man zum u ka nea naan nagh sha iwankwagh, shin kwagh u a lu uange yô, ka kwaghbo gaa? Na ase ortaregh wou kwagh la, á doo un a we kpa? Una rumun we kpa? Kape TER u akum a Sha A kaa ne." 
Malachi1:9 Hegen yô, shi zamber nen Aôndo, A̱ zungwe se mhôônom; ka ne ne er akaa ne ye; nahan kpaa shi Una rumun mô wene? Kape TER u akum a Sha A kaa ne." 
Malachi1:10 Or ma nan lu ase ken a ven u nana wuhe ihinda sha u né de kera keer usu sha atse Am a nan nagh sha mi la gbilin ga yô! Doom a ven ga, kape TER u akum a Sha A kaa ne, Me ngohol nagh ku sha ave a en la ga." 
Malachi1:11 Gadia hii sha mdugh u iyange je zan zan ar henpe i mir yô, iti Yam kume ken akuraior; sha hanma ijiir kpaa mba nanden iti Yam nagh ku humandoon kua nagh ku ku lu wang kpaa; gadia iti Yam kume ken akuraior, kape TER u akum a Sha A kaa ne." 
Malachi1:12 Kpa ne hôngor a i er ne kaan ner: Tebul u TER hôngor, man atam a na, ka kwaghyan na je la, ka kwagh u injaa ga." 
Malachi1:13 Shi ne kaa kpaa ner: Nenge er i lu kwagh u zan iyol yô! Shi ne ta un ahenga kpaa, kape TER u akum a Sha A kaa ne; shi ne va a kwagh u iin a ii man iwankwagh, man kwagh u a lu uange; ka nagh ku ne ne je la; nahan doo u Me ngohol ku sha ave a en kpa? Kape TER A kaa ne." 
Malachi1:14 Ifan i̱ kôr orcugh, u ka nan lu a nomile ken ikumuile i nan la, man nan tôndo zwa je, kpa nan gema nan na TER nagh sha kwagh u lun a ihogholough iyol; gadia Mo M ngu Zegetor, kape TER u akum a Sha A kaa ne, iti Yam kpaa cier iyol ken akuraior." 
Malachi2:1 Hegen yô, ne upristi, kwaghwan ne ka sha ci wen je." 
Malachi2:2 Aluer né ver ato ga, man né ver ishima sha mi sha u né na iti Yam icivir ga yô, kape TER u akum a Sha A kaa ne, nahan Me haa ne ifan, Me wa iveren yen kpaa ifan; een, M vande wan i ifan kera kpaa, sha ci u ne ver ishima ga yô." 
Malachi2:3 Nenge, Me tôndo tsombor wou, Me mishi ne icômbov sha ishi, ka icômbov mbi iniav mbi uiniongo enev je la; á yem a ven henpe mbi lu la." 
Malachi2:4 Nahan né fa er i lu Mo M tindi ne a kwaghwan ne ye, sha u ikuryan Yam a Levi i̱ lu her yô, kape TER u akum a Sha A kaa ne." 
Malachi2:5 Ikuryan Yam a Na lu: uma man bem; M na un ve sha u a̱ cia; un kpaa a ciam, a gbidye ikarikase iyol sha ci u iti Yam kpaa." 
Malachi2:6 Ityesen i mimi lu ken zwa na, i tser a ifer sha zwa na ga; a zende a Mo ken bem man perapera, a gema ior kpishi ve undu ifer." 
Malachi2:7 Gadia hemba doon u zwa u pristi ma u kor mfe man ior ma ve ker ityesen ken zwa na, gadia ka ortyom u TER u akum a Sha je." 
Malachi2:8 Kpa ne kaha ne undu gbenda; ne na ior kpishi gbev mbu nôngon sha ityesen; ne pav ikuryan i Levi, kape TER u akum a Sha A kaa la." 
Malachi2:9 Nahan, Mo kpaa M gema ne ne hingir kwagh u lahan man kwagh u gban ijime sha ishigh ki iorough cii, sha ci u ne we igbenda Yam iko ga, kpa ne gem ne sangen ior sha dooshima sha ityesen i atindi la yô." 
Malachi2:10 Kera ka ter môm se cii se lu a mi gaa? Ka Aôndo môm tsô A gbe se gaa? Yô, ka nyi se kera lu a mimi hen ayol a ase ga, man se hôngor a ikuryan i uter aseva?" 
Malachi2:11 Yuda er kwagh sha mimi ga, i er kwagh u ndôhôrshima ken Iserael kua ken Yerusalem; gadia Yuda hôngor a icighanjiir u TER u doon Un ishima la, man a er wankwase u aôndo ugen." 
Malachi2:12 TER A̱ tim or u nan er nahan la, ken utenti mba Yakob kera, oryilan kua orvengese kpaa, kua wen u a ne TER u akum a Sha nagh kpaa." 
Malachi2:13 Kwagh ne kpaa shi ne mba eren: ne mba cirin atse a TER a nanden nagh sha mi la, sha mlia man kwelegh man ishimashirin, sha ci u A kera wa nagh iko ga, A ngohol ku sha uwegh enegh sha ishima i gbar gbar kpaa ga yô." 
Malachi2:14 Ne mba pin ner: Ka sha ci u nyi? Ka sha ci u TER ngu Orshiada her atô wou a kwase wou u u er un iyev, u u er a na sha mimi ga la, shin er a lu ijende you man kwase wou u sha ikuryan je nahan kpaa." 
Malachi2:15 A er môm tseegh gaa? Shin er A shi a jijingi her nahan kpaa. Ka nyi man lu môm tseeghe? A lu keren vor u Aôndo. Nahan yô, ver nen ishima sha jijingi wen, de kera eren sha mimi ga a kwase wou u er un iyev la ga." 
Malachi2:16 Gadia M kôr ivaa i paven ihom, kape TER, Aôndo u Iserael, A kaa ne, kua wen u a cir ipila sha ikondo na la, kape TER u akum a Sha A kaa ne; nahan yô, ver nen ishima sha jijingi wen, sha u né kera undu mimi ga yô." 
Malachi2:17 Ne za TER iyol sha akaaôron a en. Nahan kpaa ne mba kaan ner: Hanma or u eren iferkwagh ka or u doon sha ishigh ki TER yô, doo Un a ve kpaa; shin: ka han Aôndo u mimi A luou?" 
Malachi3:1 Nenge, M ngu tindin ortyom Wam, una sôrom gbenda ken hemen; man Ter u ne keren Un la Una va ken tempel Na fese je, ka Ortyom u ikuryan, u i doo ne a Na yô; nenge, ngu van, kape TER u akum a Sha A kaa ne." 
Malachi3:2 Kpa ka anti nana hendan ishigh a iyange i mve Na laa? Man ka anti kpaa nana tile sha zum u Una ande laa? Gadia ngu er ka usu u orsoughon iyôgh nahan, man er icahul i or u ôôn akondo yô;" 
Malachi3:3 Una tema er orsoughon man orsôron azurfa sha u a̱ hingir wang yô, Una wanger ônov mba Levi, Una wanger ve wang er zenaria man azurfa nahan; nahan vea na TER nagh sha perapera." 
Malachi3:4 Zum la nagh ku Yuda man ku Yerusalem kua hingir kwagh u doon TER, er sha ayange a ngise, man er sha anyom a tsuaa la nahan." 
Malachi3:5 Me kporom her a ven sha u ôron ijir, Me lu Orshiada fese je sha mbaahiriv man sha udyambaiorov man sha mbabumun sha aie man sha mba ve kighir or u eren tom sha tôndo sha injar i nan, kua kwasecôghol man wancôghol kpaa, man mba ve daan shiror kera, man ve ciem ga, kape TER u akum a Sha A lu kaan ne." 
Malachi3:6 Gadia Mo TER M gem kposo ga, ka nahan man ne ônov mba Yakob kpaa, i tim ne ga ye." 
Malachi3:7 Hii sha ayange a uter enev la je ne kaha ne undu akaawan a Am, ne wa a iko kpaa ga. Hide nen her a Mo, Mo kpaa Me hide her a ven, kape TER u akum a Sha A kaa ne. Kpa ne mba kaan ner: Se hide nana?" 
Malachi3:8 Or nana fatyô u iin Aôndo kwagha? Nahan kpaa ne mba iin Mo kwagh. Kpa ne mba kaan ner: Ka han se ii U kwagha? Ka sha môm-ken-upue la, man sha iniav mbi nan kpaa." 
Malachi3:9 I wa ne ifan, ne mba a ifan iyol, gadia ne mba iin Mo kwagh, ne ikurior ne cii." 
Malachi3:10 Va nen a môm-ken-upue mba jimin ken iyou i koson inyaregh, sha u iyou Yam i̱ lu a kwaghyan; yô, karem nen ase sha kwagh ne, kape TER u akum a Sha A kaa ne, tsô Mea bugh ne a-an a Sha, Mea haa ne iveren, je ia neer á haa inya." 
Malachi3:11 Shi Me yange ikomon sha ci wen, ia kera vihi iyiav mbi ken tar wen ga; ikon i wain i ken sule ia kera de u umen ne atam ga, kape TER u akum a Sha A kaa ne." 
Malachi3:12 Akuraior cii aa yila ne er: Mba i saan ve iyol; gadia né hingir tar u doon tsung, kape TER u akum a Sha a kaa ne." 
Malachi3:13 Akaaôron a en hendan a Mo taveraa, kape TER A kaa la. Nahan kpaa ne kaa ner: Se hendan a We sha kwaghôron hana?" 
Malachi3:14 Ne kaa ner: U civir Aôndo ka gbilinkwagh; man ka nyi mtser je i lu, er se we atindi a Na iko man se zenden sha ishigh ki TER u akum a Sha a ijungwene?" 
Malachi3:15 Hegen yô, se mba yilan mbagengeseyol ser: Mba i saan ve iyol; mbaeren iferkwagh mba maan ve a maa tseegh ga, ka ve kar Aôndo nahan kpaa ve war." 
Malachi3:16 Tsô mbacian TER kpaa gema ôr kwagh ayol a ve; TER kpaa ver ato, ungwa, i nger ruamabera u umbur akaa sha ishigh Nagh, sha ci u mba ve cie TER, man mba ve civir iti Na yô." 
Malachi3:17 Vea hingir kwagh Wam jim je, kape TER u akum a Sha A kaa ne, sha iyange i Me er i la; Me er a ve dedoo er or ka nan er a wan u nan u a shir nan tom dedoo nahan." 
Malachi3:18 Tsô né gema né kav mkposo u orperapera a iferor, man u or u civir Aôndo a or u civir Un ga la." 
Malachi4:1 Gadia, nenge iyange ngi van ngi yeghen er usu u sha atse nahan; mbagengeseyol cii, man mbaerenafer cii vea hingir atôayia, man iyange i i ve la kpaa ia hia ve kera— kape TER u akum a Sha A kaa ne—je, ia shi ve mise shin gbaa kpaa ga." 
Malachi4:2 Kpa ne mba ne cie iti Yam yô, iyange i perapera ia due ne a mbee u uange ken akper a i; né due, né tsuwe er anibuav ka ve due ken ityôr nahan." 
Malachi4:3 Né ndyar mbaaferev; gadia vea hingir mtwem shin akevangahar a en sha iyange i Me er i yô, kape TER u akum a Sha A kaa ne." 
Malachi4:4 Umbur nen atindiakaa a wanakiriki wam Mose, a M wa Un sha uwo u Horebi sha ci u Mbaiserael cii, ka akaawan man ajiraôron je la." 
Malachi4:5 Nenge nen, tindin Yam ne a profeti Eliya er iyange i vesen i cieryol i TER i lu a va ga yô." 
Malachi4:6 Una va gema asema a uter á hide hen uôn, man asema a uôn di kpaa á hide hen uter vev; sha u M̱ de kera va timin tar purututu ga yô." 
Matthew24:15 Zum u nea nenge kwaghndôhôrshima u nan mtim u profeti Daniel ôr kwagh na la, er lu tilen ken icighanjiir yô, (or u ôron kwaghngeren ne nana̱ ver ikav)" 
Luke3:25 wan u Matatia, wan u Amoshi, wan u Nahum, wan u Eseli, wan u Nagai," 
Luke3:25 wan u Matatia, wan u Amoshi, wan u Nahum, wan u Eseli, wan u Nagai," 
Romans9:25 Kape i nger ken Hosea kpaa la er: Me yila mba ve lu nongoior Wam ga la Mer: nongoior Wam, u a doo ishima ga la kpaa Me yila Mer: U doon ishima."
